Genesis1:1 Pakutanga Mwari akasika denga napasi. 
Genesis1:2 Pasi pakanga pasati panyatsoumbwa, pasina chinhu. Rima rakanga rakaputira zigungwa, Mweya waMwari achidzengerera pamusoro pemvura." 
Genesis1:3 Mwari akati, Mwari akati, “Chiedza ngachivepo,” chiedza chikavapo." 
Genesis1:4 Mwari akaona kuti chiedza chakanaka. Mwari akaparadzanisa chiedza nerima. 
Genesis1:5 Mwari akatumidza chiedza kuti masikati, rima akariti usiku. Kwakasviba kukaedza. Iri rakava zuva rokutanga." 
Genesis1:6 Mwari akati, “Pakati pemvura ngapave neziendanakuenda rinokamuranisa mvura.”" 
Genesis1:7 Mwari akabva aita ziendanakuenda riya ndokukamuranisa mvura yakanga iri pasi peziendanakuenda iroro neyaiva nechapamusoro paro, zvikabva zvaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:8 Mwari akatumidza ziendanakuenda riya kuti denga. Kwakasviba kukaedza, iri rakava zuva rechipiri." 
Genesis1:9 Mwari akati, “Mvura iri pasi pedenga ngaiungane pamwechete kuti pasi pakaoma pabude pachena,” zvikabva zvaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:10 Mwari akatumidza pasi pakaoma kuti nyika. Mvura iya yakanga yaungana akaitumidza kuti makungwa. Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka. 
Genesis1:11 Mwari akati, “Nyika ngaimere zvinomera zvorudzi norudzi, zvinomera zvine mhodzi dzazvo, namarudzi emiti inobereka michero ine mhodzi panyika,” zvikabva zvaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:12 Nyika yakamera zvinomera zvorudzi norudzi, nezvinomera zvine mhodzi dzazvo, namarudzi namarudzi emiti inobereka michero ine mhodzi. Zvikabva zvaita saizvozvo. Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:13 Kwakasviba kukaedza, iri rakava zuva rechitatu." 
Genesis1:14 Mwari akati, “Muziendanakuenda romudenga ngamuve namavheneko okusiyanisa masikati nousiku ave okuratidza mwaka namazuva namakore." 
Genesis1:15 Ngaave mavheneko omuziendanakuenda romudenga kuti avhenekere nyika,” zvikabva zvaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:16 Mwari akaita mazivheneko maviri kunoti, zivheneko guru rokutonga masikati, kozoti zivheneko duku rokutonga usiku, akaitawo nyenyedzi." 
Genesis1:17 Mwari akazviisa muziendanakuenda romudenga kuti zvivhenekere nyika," 
Genesis1:18 zvichitonga masikati nousiku nokusiyanisa chiedza nerima. Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka. 
Genesis1:19 Kwakasviba kukaedza, iri rakava zuva rechina." 
Genesis1:20 Mwari akati, “Mumvura ngamuite bvakapfaka rezvinhu zvipenyu zvinoshambira. Shiriwo ngadzibhururuke pamusoro penyika nomudenga muziendanakuenda.”" 
Genesis1:21 Mwari akasika mhando nemhando dzamazigaranyanya omumvura nedzezvinhu zvose zvazvo zvipenyu zvinofamba, zvinoita bvakapfaka mumvura, namarudzi ose eshiri dzine mapapiro. Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:22 Mwari akazvikomborera achiti, “Berekanai muwande muzadze mvura yomumakungwa. Shiri ngadziwandewo panyika.”" 
Genesis1:23 Kwakasviba kukaedza, iri rakava zuva rechishanu." 
Genesis1:24 Mwari akati, “Nyika ngaiburitse mhando nemhando dzezvinhu zvipenyu, mhando nemhando dzezvipfuwo, nedzezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi, nedzemhuka dzesango,” zvikabva zvaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:25 Mwari akasika mhando nemhando dzemhuka dziri panyika, nemhando dzose dzezvipfuwo nedzezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi. Mwari akaona kuti zvakanaka." 
Genesis1:26 Mwari akati, “Ngatiitei munhu akafanana nesu, akatodzana nesu. Ngavave noutongi hwenyika yose nohwehove dzomugungwa neshiri dzedenga nezvipfuwo nezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi.”" 
Genesis1:27 Mwari akasika munhu akamufananidza naiye pachake, akavasika vari munhurume nomunhukadzi." 
Genesis1:28 Mwari akavakomborera achiti, “Berekanai muwande, muzadze nyika, muitonge. Ivai noutongi pamusoro pehove dzomugungwa, neshiri dzedenga, nezvinhu zvose zvipenyu zvinofamba panyika.”" 
Genesis1:29 Mwari akati, “Chionai, ndakupai zvinomera zvose zvine mhodzi dzazvo zviri panyika, nemiti inobereka michero ine mhodzi kuti zvive chokudya chenyu." 
Genesis1:30 Asi ndapa zvinomera zvinyoro kumhuka dzesango neshiri dzose dzedenga, nezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi, nezvinhu zvipenyu zvose zvinofema kuti chive chokudya chazvo,” zvikabva zvaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis1:31 Mwari akatarisa zvose zvaakanga aita, onei zvakanaka kwazvo. Kwakasviba kukaedza, iri rakava zuva rechitanhatu." 
Genesis2:1 Uku ndiko kupera kwakaita kusikwa kwedenga napasi nezvinhu zvose zvirimo. 
Genesis2:2 Musi wechinomwe Mwari akanga apedza basa rake raakaita. Akazorora musi wechinomwe pabasa rose raaiita, akasabata basa." 
Genesis2:3 Mwari akakomborera zuva rechinomwe akarieresa nokuti pazuva irori Mwari akazorora pabasa rake rose raakaita rokusika. 
Genesis2:4 Iyi ndiyo nhoroondo yokusikwa kwakaitwa denga napasi. Mwari Tenzi panguva yaakasika nyika nedenga," 
Genesis2:5 pasi pose pakanga pasati pava namakwenzi. Kwakanga kusinawo zvinomera nokuti Mwari Tenzi akanga asati anayisa mvura panyika uye hakuna airima nokuti kwakanga kusati kwava nomunhu aivapo. 
Genesis2:6 Asi mhute yaisimuka panyika ichinyorovesa pasi pose. 
Genesis2:7 Mwari Tenzi akatora ivhu panyika akaumba munhu, akamufemera mweya woupenyu mumhuno dzake. Munhu ndokubva ava noupenyu." 
Genesis2:8 Mwari Tenzi akasima bindu muEdheni kumabvazuva ndokuisamo munhu waakanga aumba. 
Genesis2:9 Mwari Tenzi akameresa muEdhenimo miti yorudzi norudzi yaiyevedza kutarisa, yaiva yakanaka kudya. Muti woupenyu waivawo pakati pebindu iroro, maivawo nomuti woruzivo rwezvakanaka nezvakaipa." 
Genesis2:10 Kwaiva norwizi rwaibva muEdheni rwaidiridza bindu iroro rwaizobudamo rwokamukana ruchiita nzizi ina. 
Genesis2:11 Rwizi rwokutanga ndiPishoni. Ndirwo runopoterera nenyika yeHavhira, kune ndarama." 
Genesis2:12 Ndarama yenyika iyoyo yakanaka kwazvo, kunowanikawo masiriridzi edheriumu anonhuhwirira uye notumabwe tunokosha tweonikisi." 
Genesis2:13 Rwizi rwechipiri ndiGihoni. Ndirwo runopoterera nyika yose yeKushi. 
Genesis2:14 Rwizi rwechitatu ndiTigirisi, runopfuura nechokumabvazuva kweAsiria. Rwizi rwechina ndiYufuratesi." 
Genesis2:15 Mwari Tenzi akatora munhu akamuisa mubindu reEdheni riya kuti aririme arichengete. 
Genesis2:16 Mwari Tenzi akaudza munhu kuti, “Idya zvako michero yemiti yose iri mubindu umu." 
Genesis2:17 Asi usadye muchero womuti woruzivo rwezvakanaka nezvakaipa, nokuti zvechokwadi musi waunoudya unofa.”" 
Genesis2:18 Mwari Tenzi akazoti, “Hazvina kunaka kuti munhu agare oga. Ndichamusikira mubatsiri akakodzerana naye.”" 
Genesis2:19 Mwari Tenzi akatora ivhu akaumba mhuka dzose dzesango, neshiri dzose dzedenga, akauya nadzo kuna Adhamu achida kuona kuti achadzitumidza mazita api. Mazita ose akatumidzwa zvinhu zvipenyu naAdhamu, ndiwo akava mazita azvo." 
Genesis2:20 Adhamu akatumidza mazita zvipfuwo zvose, neshiri dzedenga nemhuka dzose dzesango. Asi Adhamu akanga asina mubatsiri aikodzerana naye." 
Genesis2:21 Mwari Tenzi akavatisa Adhamu hope dzorufu. Avete kudaro, Mwari akamubvisa mbabvu yake imwechete ndokubva aisa nyama panzvimbo yayo." 
Genesis2:22 Mwari Tenzi akatora mbabvu iya ndokuumba munhukadzi ndokumupereka kuna Adhamu. 
Genesis2:23 Adhamu akati, “Hounoka zvino bvupa ramapfupa angu, nyama yomuviri wangu chaiyo. Achanzi munhukadzi, nokuti akatorwa pamunhurume.”" 
Genesis2:24 Naizvozvo murume achasiya baba vake naamai vake achiva chiname nomukadzi wake, vaviri ava vachiva nyama imwechete." 
Genesis2:25 Izvozvi murume nomukadzi wake vose vari vaviri vakanga vasina kusimira asi vakanga vasinganyarani. 
Genesis3:1 Zvino nyoka yakanga yakasvinuka kupinda mhuka dzesango dzose dzakasikwa naMwari Tenzi. Nyoka yakati kumukadzi, “Ko ndizvo here kuti Mwari akati, ‘Regai kudya michero yemiti yose yomubindu muno?’ ”" 
Genesis3:2 Mukadzi akati, “Isu tingadye zvedu michero yose yemiti iri mubindu." 
Genesis3:3 Asi Mwari akati musadye muchero womuti uri pakati pebindu, kana kuubata zvako nokuti mungafe.”" 
Genesis3:4 Nyokawo ikati kumukadzi, “Kwete, hamumbofa!" 
Genesis3:5 Chiripo ndechichi, Mwari anoziva kuti, musi wamunodya muchero iwoyo, meso enyu anopengenutswa, mobva mafanana naMwari, moziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa.”" 
Genesis3:6 Mukadzi akaona kuti muti wacho wakanaka kudya zve unoyevedza kutarisa uyewo kuti unogona kungwarisa munhu. Ipapo akabva atora muchero wawo akadya, akapawo murume wake akadyawo." 
Genesis3:7 Pakarepo meso avo, vose vari vaviri, akapengenuka, vakaziva kuti havana kusimira. Vakasonanidza mashizha omuonde vachizvigadzirira zvokupfeka." 
Genesis3:8 Ava manheru kwotonhorera vakanzwa Mwari Tenzi achifamba-famba zvake mubindu, Adhamu nomukadzi wake vakahwanda Mwari Tenzi mukati memiti yomubindu imomo." 
Genesis3:9 Asi Mwari Tenzi akadaidza Adhamu achiti, “Uri kupiko?”" 
Genesis3:10 Adhamu akati, “Ndanzwa kufamba kwamanga muchiita mubindu ndikatya nokuti handina kusimira, ndokubva ndahwanda.”" 
Genesis3:11 Mwari akati, “Ndiani akakuudza kuti hauna kusimira? Wadyasu muti wandakati usadye?”" 
Genesis3:12 Adhamu akati, “Mukadzi wamakandipa kuti ndive naye, ndiye andipa muchero womuti iwoyo ndikadya.”" 
Genesis3:13 Mwari Tenzi akabvunza mukadzi achiti, “Chii chawaita ichochi?” Mukadzi akati, “Nyoka ndiyo yandifurira ndikabva ndadya.”" 
Genesis3:14 Mwari Tenzi akataurira nyoka kuti, “Pamusana pezvawaita izvozvi, wapinda rushambwa pazvipfuwo zvose nemhuka dzose dzesango. Uchafamba nedumbu rako uchidya guruva, upenyu hwako hwose." 
Genesis3:15 Ndichaisa ruvengo pakati pako nomukadzi napakati pechizvarwa chake nechizvarwa chako, chizvarwa chake chichapwanya musoro wako, iwe ucharuma chitsitsinho chake.”" 
Genesis3:16 Kumukadzi, Mwari akati, “Ndichaita kuti urwadziwe chaizvo, paunenge wakatakura mimba napakusununguka vana. Uchagara wakapanga murume wako, iye ari wokukutonga.”" 
Genesis3:17 Kuna Adhamu, Mwari akati, “Pamusana pokuti wateerera zvako mukadzi wako, ukadya muti wandakati usadye; nyika yapinda rushambwa pamusana pako, chokudya chako kuti uchiwanewo panyika, uchaita chokutamburira upenyu hwako hwose." 
Genesis3:18 Nyika ichamera minzwa norukato. Iwe uchadya zvokudya zvomusango. 
Genesis3:19 Chokudya chako chichava chedikita kudzamara wadzokera muvhu, nokuti wakabva kuivhu, uri vhu, uchadzokerazve kuivhu.”" 
Genesis3:20 Adhamu akatumidza mudzimai wake zita rokuti Evha nokuti ndivo amai vavanhu vose. 
Genesis3:21 Mwari Tenzi akaitira Adhamu nomukadzi wake nguwo dzamatehwe ndokuvapfekedza. 
Genesis3:22 Mwari Tenzi akati, “Chionaika, munhu afanana nesu, ava kuziva zvakanaka nezvakaipa. Zvino angadaro akatanha michero yomuti woupenyu akadya akararama nokusingaperi.”" 
Genesis3:23 Naizvozvo Mwari Tenzi akamudzinga mubindu reEdheni kuti andorima muvhu muya maakabva. 
Genesis3:24 Mwari akabva adzinga munhu, akaisa makerubhu kurutivi rwamabvazuva ebindu reEdheni, akaisawo bakatwa rainge murazvo womoto, raivheya kwose kwose kuchengetedza nzira yokumuti woupenyu." 
Genesis4:1 Adhamu akaziva mukadzi wake Evha. Evha akabva ava napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana, Kaini. Akati, “Ndabatsirwa naTenzi kuwana mumwe munhu.”" 
Genesis4:2 Akaberekazve munun'una wake Abhero. Abhero akazova mupfuwi wehwai, Kaini ari murimi." 
Genesis4:3 Gare gare Kaini akaunza zvimwe zvirimwa zvake akapira kuna Tenzi. 
Genesis4:4 Abhero akaunzawo nyama yakakora yehwayana pahwayana dzake sheshe dzamatangwe. Tenzi akafadzwa naAbhero nomupiro wake. 
Genesis4:5 Asi haana kufadzwa naKaini kana nomupiro wake. Kaini akatsamwa zvikuru akafundumwara. 
Genesis4:6 Tenzi akabvunza Kaini achiti, “Watsamwireiko? Wapfundumwarireiko?" 
Genesis4:7 Handiti kana ukaita zvakanaka unogamuchirwawo here? Asi nokuti hauna kuita zvakanaka, chitadzo chakugaririra pamusuo, chichikutsvaka. Asi iwe unofanira kuchikunda, uchitonge.”" 
Genesis4:8 Kaini akazotaurirana nomunun'una wake Abhero achiti, “Ngatimboendaika zvedu musango.” Ikoko Kaini akamukira munun'una wake, Abhero akamuuraya." 
Genesis4:9 Mwari akazobvunza Kaini achiti, “Ko munun'una wako, Abhero aripiko?” Kaini akati, “Handizivi. Ko ndini muchengeti womunun'una wangu here?”" 
Genesis4:10 Mwari akati, “Ko izvozvi uri kuti waiteiko? Ropa romunun'una wako radeukira pasi, riri kuchema kwandiri." 
Genesis4:11 Chinzwa, wapinda rushambwa rwokudzingwa munyika ino yashama muromo wayo ikanwa ropa romunun'una wako rawadeura, iyewe noruoko rwako." 
Genesis4:12 Kana ukarima, nyika hapana chainokupa. Uchava swerakuenda nomudzungairi panyika.”" 
Genesis4:13 Kaini akapindura Tenzi achiti, “Chirango chamanditemera chakanyanya kukura zvokuti handikwanisi kuchitakura." 
Genesis4:14 Chionaika kuti zvamandidzinga munyika ino ndichandotambura ndiri kwamusinganditariri, kwandichava swerakuenda nomudzungairi panyika. Ani naani anosangana neni achandiuraya.”" 
Genesis4:15 Asi Tenzi akati, “Kwete. Ani naani anenge auraya Kaini anotsiviwa kakapetwa kanomwe.” Tenzi akaisa Kaini rupawo kuitira kuti munhu anenge azomuona arege kumuuraya." 
Genesis4:16 Kaini akabva paiva naTenzi akandogara kunyika yainzi Nodhi yaiva kumabvazuva kweEdheni. 
Genesis4:17 Kaini akasangana nomudzimai wake. Mudzimai wake akabva ava napamuviri ndokubereka Enoki. Akavaka guta akaritumidza zita romwana wake rokuti Enoki. 
Genesis4:18 Enoki akabereka Iradhi, Iradhi akabereka Mehuyaeri. Mehuyaeri akabereka Metushaeri. Metushaeri akabereka Rameki." 
Genesis4:19 Rameki aiva navakadzi vaviri, mumwe ainzi Adha mumwe achinzi Zira." 
Genesis4:20 Adha akabereka Jabhari, ndiye aiva baba vavanhu vanogara mumatendhe vanochengeta zvipfuwo." 
Genesis4:21 Munun'una wake ainzi Jubhari, ndiye akatanga kuridza madimbwa nenyere." 
Genesis4:22 Zira akabereka Tubharikaini, mupfuri wesimbi dzendarira noutare. Hanzvadzi yaTubharikaini yainzi Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Rameki akati kumadzimai ake: “Adha naZira, ndinzwei. Imi vakadzi vaRameki teererai zvandava kureva. Ini pachangu ndakauraya murume akandikuvadza, kunyange iye akandidenha aiva chigwindiri chaicho." 
Genesis4:24 Kana kuuraya Kaini kuchitsiviwa kakapetwa kanomwe, kuuraya ini kunotsiviwa makumi manomwe akapetwa kanomwe.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adhamu nomudzimai wake vakaberekazve mumwe mwana mukomana. Evha akamutumidza zita rokuti Seti achiti, “Mwari andipa zvakare mumwe mwana panzvimbo yaAbhero uya akaurayiwa naKaini.”" 
Genesis4:26 Seti akabereka mwana mukomana akamutumidza zita rokuti Enoshi. Panguva iyoyo vanhu vakatanga kunamata Tenzi. 
Genesis5:1 Haanoi mazita ezvizukuru zvaAdhamu. Mwari paakasika munhu, akamusika akafanana naiye Mwari pachake." 
Genesis5:2 Akavasika vari munhurume nomunhukadzi, akavakomborera akavatumidza kuti vanhu paakavasika." 
Genesis5:3 Adhamu akagara makore zana namakumi matatu ndokubereka mwana mukomana akafanana naye, akamutumidza kuti Seti." 
Genesis5:4 Akazoberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana. Mushure mokubereka Seti, Adhamu akazogarazve mazana masere amakore." 
Genesis5:5 Saka ose pamwechete, Adhamu akagara mazana mapfumbamwe amakore ana makore makumi matatu, ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis5:6 Seti akagara zana ramakore namakore mashanu ndokubereka Enoshi. 
Genesis5:7 Seti akaberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana. Mushure mokubereka Enoshi, Seti akagarazve mazana masere amakore ana makore manomwe." 
Genesis5:8 Saka ose pamwechete, Seti akagara mazana mapfumbamwe amakore ana makore gumi namaviri ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis5:9 Enoshi akagara makumi mapfumbamwe amakore ndokubereka Kenani. 
Genesis5:10 Enoshi akazoberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana. Mushure mokubereka Kenani, Enoshi akazogarazve mazana masere amakore namakore gumi namashanu." 
Genesis5:11 Saka ose pamwechete, Enoshi akagara mazana mapfumbamwe amakore ana makore mashanu, ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis5:12 Kenani akagara makumi manomwe amakore ndokubereka Mahararieri. 
Genesis5:13 Kenani akaberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana. Mushure mokubereka Mahararieri, Kenani akazogarazve mazana masere ana makumi mana amakore." 
Genesis5:14 Saka ose pamwechete, Kenani akagara mazana mapfumbamwe ane gumi ramakore, ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis5:15 Mahararieri akagara makumi matanhatu amakore ana makore mashanu akazobereka Jaredhi. 
Genesis5:16 Mushure mokubereka Jaredhi, Mahararieri kagara mazana masere ana makumi matatu amakore, akaberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis5:17 Saka ose pamwechete, Mahararieri akagara makore mazana masere ana makumi mashanu, ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis5:18 Jaredhi akagara zana rina makumi matanhatu amakore namakore maviri ndokubereka Enoki. 
Genesis5:19 Jaredhi akaberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana. Mushure mokubereka Enoki, Jaredhi akazogarazve mazana masere amakore." 
Genesis5:20 Saka ose pamwechete, Jaredhi akagara mazana mapfumbamwe ana makumi matanhatu amakore ana makore maviri ndokufa zvake." 
Genesis5:21 Enoki akagara makumi matanhatu amakore ana makore mashanu, ndokubereka Metushera." 
Genesis5:22 Mushure mokubereka Metushera Enoki akanyatsowadzana naMwari kwamazana matatu amakore, akaberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis5:23 Saka ose pamwechete, Enoki akagara mazana matatu amakore ana makore makumi matanhatu namashanu." 
Genesis5:24 Enoki ainyatsowadzana naMwari, ndokubva anyangarika nokuti Mwari akamutora." 
Genesis5:25 Metushera akagara zana rine makumi masere amakore ana makore manomwe vakazobereka Rameki. 
Genesis5:26 Metushera akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana. Mushure mokubereka Rameki, Metushera akazogarazve mazana manomwe ana makumi masere amakore ana makore maviri." 
Genesis5:27 Saka ose pamwechete, Metushera akagara mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi matanhatu amakore ana mapfumbamwe ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis5:28 Rameki akagara zana namakumi masere amakore ana makore maviri, akaberekawo mwana mukomana" 
Genesis5:29 waakatumidza zita rokuti Nowa, achiti, “Mwana uyu ndiye achatizorodza mwoyo pabasa redu rakaoma ratinotambura tichiita namaoko edu zvakakonzerwa nenyika yakapiwa rushambwa naTenzi.”" 
Genesis5:30 Rameki akaberekawo vamwe vana, vakomana navasikana. Mushure mokubereka Nowa, Rameki akazogarazve mazana mashanu ana makumi mapfumbamwe amakore ana makore mashanu." 
Genesis5:31 Saka ose pamwechete, Rameki akagara mazana manomwe ana makumi manomwe amakore ana makore manomwe, ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis5:32 Nowa akagara mazana mashanu amakore ndokubereka Shemu naHamu naJafeti. 
Genesis6:1 Vanhu pavakatanga kuwanda panyika, vakabereka vana vasikana." 
Genesis6:2 Vanakomana vaMwari vakaona kuti vasikana ivavo vakanga vakanaka, vakasarudza zvavo vakadzi vavakada, vakavaroora." 
Genesis6:3 Tenzi akati, “Handichabvumiri kuti mweya wangu uri mumunhu ugare maari nokusingaperi nokuti munhu ndowenyama, anofa. Saka haachagara panyika nguva inodarika zana ramakore rina makore makumi maviri.”" 
Genesis6:4 Mazuva iwayo namazuva akatevera, panyika paiva nemazihofori chaiwo avanhu vakareba vakaberekwa navanakomana vaMwari pavakatorana navanasikana vavanhu. Vana vacho ndivo magamba aye makuru akarekare aiva nomukurumbira." 
Genesis6:5 Tenzi akaona kuti uipi hwevanhu hwakanga hwanyanya kuwanda panyika. Akaonawo kuti twavaiswerofunga zuva rose mumwoyo yavo, hwaiva huipi hwoga hwoga." 
Genesis6:6 Mwari akakungura kuti dai zvake asina kusika munhu pasi pano, zvikamushungurudza mumwoyo." 
Genesis6:7 Tenzi akati, “Ndichatsakatisa panyika vanhu vandakasika, ivo vanhu nemhuka nezvinokambaira nezvinozvova napasi, neshiri dzedenga. Ndino urombo kuti ndakasika vanhu.”" 
Genesis6:8 Asi Tenzi akafadzwa zvake naNowa. 
Genesis6:9 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvaNowa. Nowa akanga ari munhu akarurama ano unhu huzere chaihwo pachizvarwa chake. Nowa ainyatsowadzana naMwari. 
Genesis6:10 Nowa aiva navana vakomana vatatu, mazita avo ndiShemu naHamu naJafeti." 
Genesis6:11 Mukuona kwaMwari nyika yose yakanga yaora noupi, izere nokupandukirana." 
Genesis6:12 Mwari akatarisa panyika ndokuona kuti paora kwazvo nouipi nokuti vanhu vose panyika vakanga voita zviito zvakaora. 
Genesis6:13 Mwari akataurira Nowa kuti, “Ndafunga kutsakatisa vanhu vose nokuti ndivo vakaita kuti nyika izare nokupandukirana. Ndichavaparadza pamwechete nenyika." 
Genesis6:14 Asi iwe chizvigadzirira ngarava yomuti womugoferi, uikamure-kamure kuita dzimba mukati mayo, uiname netara mukati nokunze." 
Genesis6:15 Igadzire wakadai, urefu hwayo ngahuite zana nemakumi matatu amamita ana mamita matatu. Hwasha hwayo ngahuite makumi maviri amamita ana mamita maviri. Urefu hwayo kukwira mudenga kuite gumi ramamita namamita matatu." 
Genesis6:16 Unoisa denga pangarava usiye gwanza rina masendimita makumi mana namana pakati pedenga nechengo chayo, uite musuo necheparutivi rwengarava. Igadzire iine uriri hutatu hwakaturikidzana." 
Genesis6:17 Chinzwaka, ini ndichaunza panyika mafashamo emvura achaparadza zvinhu zvose zvino mweya unofema. Zvinhu zvose zviri panyika zvichafa." 
Genesis6:18 Asi ini ndichaita chitenderano changu newe. Ndichati iwe upinde mungarava, nomudzimai wako navanakomana vako navaroora vako." 
Genesis6:19 Pamhando yoga yoga yezvinhu zvose zvipenyu unotora zviviri, chikono nechikadzi uende nazvo mungarava zvirarame pamwechete newe." 
Genesis6:20 Utorewo zviviri zviviri pamhando yoga yoga yeshiri nemhuka nezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi zvirarame. 
Genesis6:21 Unofanirawo kutora mhando dzose dzezvokudya uzviunganidzemo zvive chokudya chako nechazvo.” 
Genesis6:22 Nowa akaita zvose zvaakanzi naMwari aite. 
Genesis7:1 Tenzi akataurira Nowa achiti, “Pinda mungarava, iwe nemhuri yako yose. Ndazviona kuti pachizvarwa ichi ndiwe wakarurama." 
Genesis7:2 Pamhando yoga yoga yemhuka dzisina kun'ora tora mikono minomwe nehadzi dzacho nomwe. Pamhando yoga yoga yemhuka dzakan'ora utorewo mbiri mbiri hono nehadzi yacho. 
Genesis7:3 Torawo machongwe manomwe nesheshe nomwe pamhando yoga yoga yeshiri dzedenga kuti mhando yadzo isatsakatike panyika. 
Genesis7:4 Shure kwamazuva manomwe ini ndichanayisa mvura panyika siku nesikati, kwamazuva makumi mana. Ndichatsakatisa zvinhu zvose zvipenyu panyika.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nowa akaita zvose zvaakaudzwa naTenzi. 
Genesis7:6 Nowa akanga ava namazana matanhatu amakore panguva yakauya mafashamo emvura. 
Genesis7:7 Nowa akapinda mungarava pamwechete nomudzimai navanakomana vake navaroora vake kuti vapunyuke mafashamo emvura. 
Genesis7:8 Mhando dzose dzemhuka dzakan'ora nedzisina kun'ora dzakapinda mungarava naNowa," 
Genesis7:9 dziri mbiri mbiri, hono nehadzi, pamwechete nemhando dzose dzeshiri nezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi sokutaurirwa kwakaitwa Nowa naMwari." 
Genesis7:10 Kuzoti kwapera mazuva manomwe, mafashamo emvura akabva auya panyika." 
Genesis7:11 Nowa paakanga ava namazana matanhatu amakore mumwedzi wechipiri pazuva regumi nechinomwe romwedzi iwoyo, ndiro zuva rakatubuka zvisipiti zvemvura zhinji yepasipasi penyika zvikapfachuka, mahwindo okudenga akazarurwa," 
Genesis7:12 mvura zhinji ikanaya panyika siku nesikati, kwamazuva makumi mana." 
Genesis7:13 Pazuva iroro Nowa nomudzimai wake navanakomana vake vanaShemu naHamu naJafeti navaroora vake vatatu vakapinda mungarava 
Genesis7:14 pamwechete nemhando dzose dzemhuka, nezvipfuwo nezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi, nemhando dzose dzeshiri." 
Genesis7:15 Zvinhu zvose zvipenyu zvino mweya wokufema zvakapinda mungarava naNowa zviri zviviri zviviri," 
Genesis7:16 chikono nechikadzi sezvakaudzwa Nowa naMwari. Tenzi ndokumupfigiramo. 
Genesis7:17 Mvura zhinji yakaramba ichinaya pasi pose kwamazuva makumi mana. Yakawanda zvokuti yakasumudza ngarava ikayangarara pamusoro pemvura. 
Genesis7:18 Mvura yakaita mafashafasha, ikatutumuka kuzara pasi pose, ngarava ikayangarara pamusoro pemvura." 
Genesis7:19 Mvura yakazara ikanyudza makomo marefu ose epasi pose. 
Genesis7:20 Mvura yakazara ikafukidza makomo ikaapfuurira namamita manomwe. 
Genesis7:21 Zvinhu zvose zvipenyu zvinofamba panyika zvakafa, zvaiti: shiri nezvipfuwo nemhuka nezvinokambaira navanhu vose." 
Genesis7:22 Zvinhu zvose zvipenyu zvino mweya wokufema zvisingagare mumvura zvakapera kufa. 
Genesis7:23 Zvinhu zvipenyu zvose zvakatsakatiswa pasi pose zvaiti, vanhu nemhuka nezvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi neshiri dzedenga, zvakatsakatiswa pasi pose. Asi kwakangosara Nowa chete navaaiva navo mungarava." 
Genesis7:24 Mvura ndokuramba yakati fasha panyika kwamazuva zana namakumi mashanu. 
Genesis8:1 Mwari akazorangarira Nowa nezvipenyu zvose nezvipfuwo zvese zvaaiva nazvo mungarava, saka Mwari akaita kuti mhepo ivhuvhute pasi pose mvura ikabva yava kuserera." 
Genesis8:2 Zvisipiti zviya zvapasipasi namahwindo edenga zvakamiswa kubudisa mvura, mvura yokunaya ikagasa," 
Genesis8:3 mvura ndokuramba ichiserera pasi pose. Kwamazuva zana namakumi mashanu mvura yaingoserera. 
Genesis8:4 Zvino mumwedzi wechinomwe pamusi wegumi nechinomwe womwedzi iwoyo, ngarava yakagara pamakomo eArarati." 
Genesis8:5 Mvura yakaramba ichingoserera kusvikira pamwedzi wegumi. Zvino mumwedzi wegumi, pazuva rokutanga rawo, misoro yamakomo yakaonekwa." 
Genesis8:6 Kuzoti kwapera mazuva makumi mana, Nowa akazurura hwindo rengarava riya raakagadzira." 
Genesis8:7 Akatuma gunguo asi rakaramba richidzengerera zvaro kusvikira mvura yapwa panyika. 
Genesis8:8 Akazotumawo njiva achida kuziva kuti mvura yapwa here panyika. 
Genesis8:9 Asi njiva yakashaya pokumhara, ikadzokera kungarava nokuti mvura yakanga ichiripo panyika. Akaburitsa ruoko akaibata ndokuidzosera mungarava." 
Genesis8:10 Akagara mazuva manomwe ndokuburitsazve njiva iya mungarava. 
Genesis8:11 Ava manheru njiva yacho yakadzokera kwaari yakaruma pamuromo wayo shizha nyoro romuorivhi richangobva mukutanhwa. Saka Nowa akaziva kuti mvura yapwa panyika. 
Genesis8:12 Akagara mamwe mazuva manomwe ndokuburitsazve njiva iya, asi haina kuzodzokerazve kwaari." 
Genesis8:13 Pazuva rokutanga, mumwedzi wokutanga wegore rechimazana matanhatu ane gore rimwechete raNowa rokuberekwa, mvura yakanga yapwa panyika. Nowa akabvisa denga rengarava akaona kuti mvura yakanga yapwa panyika uye pakaoma pava kutoonekwa." 
Genesis8:14 Pazuva rechimakumi maviri namanomwe romwedzi wechipiri nyika yakanga yanyatsoti gwa kuoma. 
Genesis8:15 Mwari akataurira Nowa kuti," 
Genesis8:16 “Chibuda zvako mungarava iwe nomudzimai wako navanakomana vako navaroora vako. 
Genesis8:17 Ubudewo nezvinhu zvipenyu zvose zvaunazvo zvinoti, mhuka dzose neshiri nezvipfuwo nezvose zvinokambaira nezvinozvova napasi, zviite zararira kuwanda panyika, zviberekane zviwande panyika.”" 
Genesis8:18 Saka Nowa nomudzimai wake navanakomana vake navaroora vake vakabuda. 
Genesis8:19 Mhuka dzose nezvose zvinokambaira nezvinozvova napasi neshiri dzose nezvose zvinofamba panyika zvakabuda mungarava zviri mhando nemhando. 
Genesis8:20 Nowa akavakira Tenzi atari. Akatora mhuka imwechete pamhando yoga yoga yemhuka neyeshiri dzisina kun'ora, akapira mipiro yokupisa paatari." 
Genesis8:21 Tenzi akanzwa kunhuhwirira kwayo akati nechemumwoyo, “Handichazorega nyika ichiwirwa norushambwa pamusana pomunhu, nokuti ndangariro dzomwoyo womunhu dzakaipa kubvira pauduku hwake. Handichazomboparadzazve zvinhu zvipenyu zvose sezvandakaita rwendo runo." 
Genesis8:22 “Kana pasi richiripo, mwaka wokudyara nowokukohwa, wokutonhora nowokudziya, wezhizha nowechando, nguva yamasikati nousiku, zvichagara zviripo.”" 
Genesis9:1 Mwari akakomborera Nowa navana vake akati, “Berekanai muwande muzadze nyika." 
Genesis9:2 Mhuka dzose dzapasi pose, neshiri dzose dzedenga, nezvose zvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi, nehove dzose dzomugungwa dzichakutyai dzichikudederai. Dzose ndadziisa mumaoko enyu." 
Genesis9:3 Zvinhu zvipenyu zvose zvinofamba zvichava chokudya chenyu. Ndakupai zvose zvazvo sokukupai kwandakaita miriwo minyoro. 
Genesis9:4 Asi chete nyama ichine ropa rayo, ichine upenyu hwayo, musaidye." 
Genesis9:5 Ndinoti kuurayiwa kwenyu vanhu kunofanira kutoripwa. Mhuka kana munhu anouraya munhu ndinoda kuona kuti atoripa. Munhu anouraya mumwe munhu, mhaka iyoyo inoripwa norufu rwomunhu." 
Genesis9:6 Ani naani zvake anodeura ropa romumwe munhu, ropa rakewo rinofanira kutoita zvokudeurwa nomunhu nokuti Mwari akasika munhu akamufananidza naiye pachake." 
Genesis9:7 “Asi imi berekanai muwande, muite zararira chairo kuzara panyika, murambe muchiwanda mairi.”" 
Genesis9:8 Mwari akataurira Nowa navanakomana vake achiti," 
Genesis9:9 “Chinzwai, ndava kuita chitenderano changu newe nezvizvarwa zvako zvichauya," 
Genesis9:10 pamwechete nezvipenyu zvose zvaunazvo, zvinoti: shiri nezvipfuwo nemhuka dzose dzepanyika dzinewe nezvose zvabuda mungarava nemhuka dzose dzapasi pose." 
Genesis9:11 Chitenderano chandinoita nemi ndechichi chokuti, ‘Handichazomboparadza zvakare zvipenyu zvose namafashamo emvura uye hakuchazovizve namafashamo emvura okuparadza pasi pose.’ ”" 
Genesis9:12 Mwari akati, “Ichi ndicho chiratidzo chechitenderano chandinoita nemi nezvipenyu zvose zvinemi nezvizvarwa zvose zvichauya." 
Genesis9:13 Ndamisa muraraungu wangu mumakore kuti uve chiratidzo chechitenderano changu napasi pose. 
Genesis9:14 Kana ndichinge ndauyisa makore panyika, muraraungu ukaonekwa mumakore," 
Genesis9:15 ndipo pandichayeuka chitenderano changu chandaita nemi nezvipenyu zvose, saka mvura haizombove mafashamo okuparadza zvinhu zvipenyu zvose." 
Genesis9:16 Kana muraraungu wamira mumakore, ndichauona ndigoyeuka chitenderano chokugara nokugara chandaita nezvipenyu zvose zviri panyika.”" 
Genesis9:17 Mwari akataurira Nowa achiti, “Ichi ndicho chiratidzo chechitenderano chandaita nezvipenyu zvose zviri panyika.”" 
Genesis9:18 Vanakomana vaNowa vakabuda mungarava ndiShemu naHamu naJafeti. Hamu ndiye baba vaKanani. 
Genesis9:19 Ivava ndivo vanakomana vatatu vaNowa. Kwavari ivava ndiko kwakazobva vanhu vose vari panyika pano. 
Genesis9:20 Nowa aiva murimi akasima munda wemagirepisi. 
Genesis9:21 Akanwa waini akararadza akarara mutendhe rake asina kupfeka. 
Genesis9:22 Hamu baba waKanani akaonerera baba wake asina kupfeka, akandoudza mukoma nomunun'una wake panze." 
Genesis9:23 Shemu naJafeti vakatora nguwo vakaisumudza kusvika pamapfudzi avo vose vari vaviri, vakadududza namakotsi vakasvikofukidza baba vavo vakatarisa rutivi, saka havana kutarisa baba vavo vakanga vasina kupfeka." 
Genesis9:24 Nowa paakapengenuka mukuraradza newaini, akaziva zvakanga zvaitwa kwaari nomwanakomana wake muduku." 
Genesis9:25 Akati, “Kanani ngaawirwe norushambwa, ngaave muranda chaiye wokupedzesera kuvakoma navanun'una vake.”" 
Genesis9:26 Akatiwo, “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi Mwari waShemu, Kanani ngaave muranda waShemu." 
Genesis9:27 Mwari ngaakudziridze Jafeti, ngaagare mumatendhe aShemu, Kanani ave muranda wake.”" 
Genesis9:28 Shure kwamafashamo emvura Nowa akagara mazana matatu amakore ana makore makumi mashanu. 
Genesis9:29 Saka ose pamwechete, Nowa akaita makore mazana mapfumbamwe ana makumi mashanu ndokuzofa zvake." 
Genesis10:1 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvavana vaNowa vanoti Shemu naHamu naJafeti zvaakabereka shure kwamafashamo emvura. 
Genesis10:2 Jafeti akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Gomeri naMagogu naMadhai naJavhani naTubhari naMesheki naTirasi. 
Genesis10:3 Gomeri akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Ashikenazi naRifati naTogarima. 
Genesis10:4 Javhani akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Erisha naTarishishi naKitimu naDhodhanimu. 
Genesis10:5 Izvozvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvokwaJafeti, makabva madzinza akasiyana-siyana, akazogara akatevedza mahombekombe egungwa. Vagere munyika iyi vari mudzimhuri dzavo, mumarudzi akasiyana-siyana maererano nemitauro yavo." 
Genesis10:6 Hamu akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Kushi naIjipiti naPuti naKanani. 
Genesis10:7 Kushi akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Sebha naHavhira naSabhuta naRaama naSabhuteka. Raama akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Shebha naDhedhani. 
Genesis10:8 Kushi akaberekawo mwana wake mukomana anonzi Nimurodhi. Nimurodhi ndiye akazova mambo wokutanga pasi pano. 
Genesis10:9 Nenyasha dzaTenzi, Nimurodhi aiva hombarume chaiyo ndosaka vanhu vakazoita tsumo inoti, “Nenyasha dzaTenzi, ihombarume chaiyo saNimurodhi.”" 
Genesis10:10 Akatanga kutonga Bhabheri neEreki neAkadhi munyika yeShinari. 
Genesis10:11 Akabva kunyika iyoyo akaenda kunyika yeAsiria, ndokuvaka guta reNinevhe neRehobhoti neKara" 
Genesis10:12 neReseni, guta guru riri pakati peNinevhe neKara." 
Genesis10:13 Ijipiti akabereka Rudhimu naAnamimu naRehabhimu, kwouya Nafutuhimu" 
Genesis10:14 naPatirusimu naKasiruhimu tateguru kwakabva vaFirisitia, naKafutorimu." 
Genesis10:15 Kanani akabereka Sidhoni dangwe rake, naHeti" 
Genesis10:16 ndiye tateguru wamarudzi aya anoti, vaJebhusi nevaAmori nevaGirigashi," 
Genesis10:17 kwoti vaHivhi nevaAriki nevaSinai 
Genesis10:18 kwozoti vaArivhadhi nevaZemari nevaHamati. Gare gare madzinza evaKanani akazopararira. 
Genesis10:19 Nyika yavaKanani yaivambira kuSidhoni zvichienda kuGerari, kundosvika kuGaza, zvoenda nokuSodhomu neGomora neAdhima neZebhoimu kundogumira kuRasha." 
Genesis10:20 Ndizvozvi zvizvarwa zvokwaHamu, namadzinza avo nemitauro yavo nenyika dzavo nendudzi dzavo." 
Genesis10:21 Shemu mukoma waJafeti akaberekawo vana. Ndiye tateguru wemhuri yevaEbheru. 
Genesis10:22 Shemu akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Eramu naAshuri naAripakishadhi naRudhi naAramu. 
Genesis10:23 Aramu akabereka vanakomana vake vanoti: Uzi naHuru naGeteri naMashi. 
Genesis10:24 Aripakishadhi akabereka Shera, aShera akabereka Ebheru." 
Genesis10:25 Ebheru akabereka vanakomana vake vaviri, mumwe ndiPeregi nokuti panguva yake nyika yakanga yakakamuraniswa. Munun'una wake ainzi Jokitani." 
Genesis10:26 Jokitani akabereka Arimodhadhi naSherefu naHazarimavheti naJera," 
Genesis10:27 kwozouya Hadhoramu naUzari naDhikira 
Genesis10:28 naObhari naAbhimaeri naShebha 
Genesis10:29 kwozouya Ofiri naHavhira naJobhabhu, vose ivava ndivo vanakomana vaJokitani." 
Genesis10:29 kwozouya Ofiri naHavhira naJobhabhu, vose ivava ndivo vanakomana vaJokitani." 
Genesis10:30 Nyika yavakanga vagere yaibvira kuMesha ichinanga nokuSefari kugomo rokumabvazuva. 
Genesis10:31 Ndizvozvi zvizvarwa zvokwaShemu namadzinza avo nemitauro yavo nenyika dzavo nendudzi dzavo. 
Genesis10:32 Iwaya ndiwo madzinza emhuri dzavanakomana vaNowa, nezvizukuru zvavo uye nendudzi dzavo, vakazotekeshera panyika mushure mamafashamo emvura." 
Genesis11:1 Pasi chigare, vanhu vose vaingotaura mutauro mumwechete, vaine mazwi mamwechetewo." 
Genesis11:2 Mukutamatama kwaiita vanhu kumabvazuva, vakazondogara vakaita musha wavo mubani reShinari kuBhabhironi." 
Genesis11:3 Vakazorangana vachiti, “Ngatikanyei zvidhina tinyatsozvipisa zvakanaka.” Zvidhina ndozvaiva matombo avo, dhaka ravo rokuvakisa riri tara." 
Genesis11:4 Vakazoti, “Ngatizvivakirei guta rine nhungamakore yeshongwe, tiite zita rino mukurumbira, tirege kungopararira nenyika.”" 
Genesis11:5 Tenzi akaburuka kudenga kuzoona guta neshongwe zvakanga zvavakwa navanhu. 
Genesis11:6 Tenzi akati, “Onai vanhu ava vose vanongova rudzi rwumwechete uye vose vanotaura mutauro mumwechete. Idzi imviromviro chete dzezvavachaita. Hakuna chichavatadzisa kuita chinhu chose chose chavanofunga kuita." 
Genesis11:7 Ngatiburukei tindopesanisa mutauro wavo vagorega kunzwana pakutaura.” 
Genesis11:8 Tenzi akavaparadzanisa vakapararira nenyika yose, vakabva varega kuvaka guta riya." 
Genesis11:9 Saka zita reguta iroro rakanzi Bhabheri nokuti Tenzi akapesanisa mutauro wapasi pose. Tenzi akavaparadzanisa vakapararira nenyika, pasi pose." 
Genesis11:10 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvokwaShemu. Shemu akagara zana ramakore akabereka Aripakishadhi, makore maviri shure kwamafashamo emvura." 
Genesis11:11 Abva mukubereka Aripakishadhi, Shemu akagara mazana mashanu amakore akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:12 Aripakishadhi akagara makumi matatu amakore ana makore mashanu, ndokuzobereka Shera." 
Genesis11:13 Mushure mokubereka Shera, Aripakishadhi akagarazve mazana mana amakore ana makore matatu, akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:14 Shera akagara makumi matatu amakore akabereka Ebheru. 
Genesis11:15 Mushure mokubereka Ebheru, Shera akagarazve mazana mana amakore ana makore matatu akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:16 Ebheru akagara makore makumi matatu namana akabereka Peregi. 
Genesis11:17 Mushure mokubereka Peregi, Ebheru akagarazve mazana mana ana makumi matatu amakore akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:18 Peregi akagara makumi matatu amakore akabereka Reu. 
Genesis11:19 Mushure mokubereka Reu, Peregi akagara mazana maviri amakore ana makore mapfumbamwe akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:20 Reu akagara makumi matatu amakore ana makore maviri, akabereka Serugu." 
Genesis11:21 Mushure mokubereka Serugu, Reu akagara mazana maviri amakore ana makore manomwe akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:22 Serugu akagara makore makumi matatu akabereka Nahori. 
Genesis11:23 Mushure mokubereka Nahori, Serugu akagara mazana maviri amakore akaberekawo vamwe vana vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:24 Nahori akagara makumi maviri amakore ana makore mapfumbamwe akabereka Tera. 
Genesis11:25 Mushure mokubereka Tera, Nahori akagara zana ramakore namakore gumi namapfumbamwe akaberekawo vamwe vakomana navasikana." 
Genesis11:26 Tera akagara makore makumi manomwe akabereka Abhuramu naNahori naHarani. 
Genesis11:27 Hezvinoi zvizvarwa zvaTera. Tera akabereka Abhuramu naNahori naHarani. Harani ndiye baba vaRoti. 
Genesis11:28 Harani akafa baba vake vasati vafa, akafira kunyika kwaakaberekerwa muguta reUru kunyika yevaKaradhia." 
Genesis11:29 Abhuramu naNahori vakawana vakadzi vavo. Zita romukadzi waAbhuramu ndiSarai, zita romukadzi waNahori richinzi Mirika mwana waHarani. Harani, vakaberekawo Isika." 
Genesis11:30 Asi Sarai akanga asina mbereko asina mwana. 
Genesis11:31 Tera akatora mwanakomana wake Abhuramu, nomuzukuru wake Roti mwanakomana waHarani, nomuroora wake Sarai, mudzimai womwana wake Abhuramu. Vose ivavo vakabva kuguta reUru munyika yevaKaradhia vakasimuka voenda kuKanani. Asi pavakasvika kuHarani vakaita musha wavo ikoko." 
Genesis11:32 Makore ose pamwechete aTera akagara mazana maviri amakore ana makore mashanu, ndokubva Tera azofira zvake kuHarani." 
Genesis12:1 Tenzi akataurira Abhuramu kuti, “Chibva munyika mako, ubve mukati mehama dzako, usiye musha wababa vako utamire kunyika yandichakuratidza." 
Genesis12:2 Ndichakuita rudzi rukuru, ndichakukomborera. Ndichaita kuti zita rako rikurumbire, iwe uchiva chikomborero." 
Genesis12:3 Ndichakomborera vanokumborera. Vanoti uwirwe norushambwa, ndichivapinza murushambwa. Ndudzi dzose dzichakomborerwa pamusana pako.”" 
Genesis12:4 Saizvozvo Abhuramu akasimuka akaenda sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi. Roti akaendawo naye. Abhuramu akanga ava namakumi manomwe amakore ana makore mashanu paakatama kuHarani. 
Genesis12:5 Abhuramu akatora mudzimai wake Sarai naRoti mwanakomana womunun'una wake, noupfumi hwake hwose hwaakanga awana navaranda vaakanga awana muHarani. Akasimuka achienda kuKanani. Kuzoti asvika kuKanani," 
Genesis12:6 Abhuramu akafamba nomunyika imomo akasvikogara kuShikemu pamuti womuoki. Panguva iyoyo vaKanani vakanga vagere munyika iyoyi. 
Genesis12:7 Tenzi akazozviratidza kuna Abhuramu akati, “Ndichapa nyika ino kuzvizvarwa zvako.” Naizvozvo akavakira atari Tenzi akanga azviratidza kwaari." 
Genesis12:8 Akabva ipapo akaenda kugomo riri kumabvazuva kweBhetieri. Akadzika matendhe ake panoti Bhetieri kumavirira, guta reAi nechokumabvazuva. Akavakira Tenzi atari ipapo, akanamata Tenzi." 
Genesis12:9 Abhuramu akaramba achienda nechokuNegevhu. 
Genesis12:10 Munyika iyoyo makaita nzara, shangwa chaiyo yenzara. Saka Abhuramu akaenda Ijipiti kumbondogarako." 
Genesis12:11 Kuzoti ava kusvika Ijipiti, Abhuramu akafanotaurira mudzimai wake Sarai achiti, “Iwe uri mukadzi akanaka kwazvo." 
Genesis12:12 Naizvozvo kana vaIjipiti vakakuona vachati, ‘Uyu mukadzi wake uyu,’ vakandiuraya, iwe vachikurega uri mupenyu." 
Genesis12:13 Chitoti zvako iwe uri hanzvadzi yangu ndiko kuti vatondiitira zvakanaka pamusana pako ndirege kuurayiwa.” 
Genesis12:14 Abhuramu paakasvika kuIjipiti, vaIjipiti vakaona kuti mukadzi wacho akanga akanaka kwazvo." 
Genesis12:15 Kuzoti machinda aFarao amuona akamurumbidza pana Farao. Mukadzi uya ndokubva atorwa akaendwa naye kumba kwaFarao. 
Genesis12:16 Pamusana paSarai, Farao akabata Abhuramu zvakanaka kwazvo, akava nehwai nemombe, namadhongi makono namakadzi navaranda vechirume nevechikadzi nengamera." 
Genesis12:17 Asi Tenzi akaunzira Farao navanhu veimba yake matambudziko makuru kwazvo pamusana paSarai mudzimai waAbhuramu. 
Genesis12:18 Farao akadaidza Abhuramu akati, “Chiiko ichi chawaita kwandiri.” Wakaregerereiko kundiudza kuti mukadzi uyu mudzimai wako?" 
Genesis12:19 Seiko wakati, “Ihanzvadzi yangu, ndosaka ndakamutora kuti ave mukadzi wangu. Aiwa! Hoyu mudzimai wako. Chimutora ubve pano uende.”" 
Genesis12:20 Farao akatuma vamwe vanhu vake kuti vaburitse Abhuramu nomudzimai wake munyika iyoyo, nezvinhu zvose zvavaiva nazvo vachimuperekedza." 
Genesis13:1 Abhuramu akabva muIjipiti iye nomudzimai wake nezvinhu zvose zvaaiva nazvo pamwechete naRoti vakaenda kuNegevhu. 
Genesis13:2 Abhuramu akanga akapfuma kwazvo. Aiva nemombe nesirivha nendarama. 
Genesis13:3 Akazosumuka muNegevhu akafamba kudzamara asvika kuBhetieri padongo riya raakanga akadzika matendhe ake pakutanga riri pakati peBhetieri neAi," 
Genesis13:4 paya paakavaka atari pakutanga. Ipapo Abhuramu akanamata kuna Yahweh achimudoma nezita. 
Genesis13:5 Roti uya aifamba naAbhuramu aivawo nemombe nezvimwewo zvipfuwo namatendhe ake 
Genesis13:6 zvokuti kwakanga kusina mafuro akakwana okufudzira zvipfuwo zvavo pamwe chete. Upfumi hwavo hwakanga hwakawandisa zvokuti vakanga vasisakwanise kuchange vachagara pamwechete. 
Genesis13:7 Pakanga pangove nokupopotedzana pakati pavafudzi vezvipfuwo zvaAbhuramu nezvaRoti. Panguva iyoyo vaKanani nevaPerizi vakanga vachigerewo munyika iyoyo. 
Genesis13:8 Abhuramu akataurirana naRoti achiti, “Ngatiregei kuitirana gakava, kunyange vafudzi vedu ngavaregewo kuitirana gakava nokuti tiri hama nehama." 
Genesis13:9 Inga nyika ndiyo yese iyi yawakatarisa. Dai tikachiparadzana zvedu. Kana ukasarudza kuenda kuruboshwe, ini ndichaenda kurudyi. Kana ukasarudza kuenda kurudyi, ini ndichaenda kuruboshwe.”" 
Genesis13:10 Roti akatarisa akaona kuti bani rose romuna Jorodhani rakananga kuZoari rakanga riri bani renyika nyoro kwose kwose, rakaita sebindu raTenzi, sezvakaitawo nyika yeIjipiti. Izvozvo Tenzi akanga asati aparadza Sodhomu neGomora." 
Genesis13:11 Saka Roti akazvisarudzira bani rose romuna Jorodhani, akabva atamira kumabvazuva. Ndiko kuparadzana kwavakaita." 
Genesis13:12 Abhuramu akagara munyika yeKanani, Roti akandogarawo pakati pamaguta aiva mubani riya, akadzika matendhe ake pedyo neSodhomu." 
Genesis13:13 Vanhu veSodhomu vakanga vakaipa mwoyo, vaitadzira Tenzi kwazvo." 
Genesis13:14 Kuzoti Abhuramu naRoti vaparadzana Tenzi akataurira Abhuramu achiti, “Uri pauri ipapo, tarisa kuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba, kumabvazuva nokumadokero," 
Genesis13:15 nokuti nyika iyoyi yose yauri kuona ndichaipa kwauri nezvizvarwa zvako nokusingaperi. 
Genesis13:16 Ndichaita kuti zvizvarwa zvako zviwande seguruva renyika zvokuti kana kuine munhu anogona kuverengeta guruva renyika ndiye angagonewo kuzoverenga zvizvarwa zvako. 
Genesis13:17 Chisimuka ufambe uchimema nyika iyoyi uone kureba kwayo noupamhi hwayo, nokuti ndiyoyi nyika yandichakupa.”" 
Genesis13:18 Ipapo Abhuramu akandodzika matendhe ake paiva nemiti yemioku paMamure kuHebhuroni, akavakira Tenzi atari ipapo." 
Genesis14:1 Panguva yaAmuraferi mambo weShinari, Arioku mambo weErasari naKedhoriraomeri mambo weEramu naTidhari mambo weGoimu," 
Genesis14:2 madzimambo iwaya akaita hondo namadzimambo aya anoti: Bhera mambo weSodhomu naBhirisha mambo weGomora naShinabhu mambo weAdhima naShemebheri mambo weZebhoimu namambo weBhera (kana kuti Zoari). 
Genesis14:3 Madzimambo iwaya ari mashanu akafunga zvokuita chirwirangwe akaunganidza hondo dzawo mubani reSidhimu kana kuti Gungwa roMunyu. 
Genesis14:4 Vakanga vari pasi pamambo Kedhoriraomeri kwamakore gumi nemaviri. Asi vakazomuitira chimurenga mugore regumi nechitatu. 
Genesis14:5 Zvino mugore regumi nechina Kedhoriraomeri akauya namadzimambo aaiva nawo akakunda vaRefaimu vaigara kuAsherotikarinaimu, nevaZuzimu kuHamu nevaEmimu kuShavhekiriataimu" 
Genesis14:6 nevaHori mugomo ravo reSeiri kusvikira kuEriparani kumucheto werenje. 
Genesis14:7 Vakazodzoka vakaenda kuEnimishipati (kana kuti kuKadheshi), vakakurira nyika yose yavaAmereki navaAmori vakanga vagere Hazazonitamari." 
Genesis14:8 Madzimambo mashanu anoti, mambo weSodhomu namambo weGomora namambo weAdhima namambo weZebhoimu mambo weBhera (kana kuti Zoari) akandounganidza hondo dzawo mubani reSidhimu" 
Genesis14:9 vakarwisana namadzimambo mana anoti; mambo weKedhoriraomeri weEramu namambo Tidhari weGoimu namambo Amuraferi weShinari namambo Arioku weErasari. Vakarwisana vachiti uku vana, uku vashanu." 
Genesis14:10 Bani reSidhimu rakanga riine migodhi mizhinji yetara. Madzimambo eSodhomu neGomora akatiza, vamwe vanhu vavo vakawira mumigodhi yacho. Vakasarawo vakatizira kumakomo." 
Genesis14:11 Madzimambo mana aye akapamba upfumi hwose hweSodhomu neGomora, nezvokudya zvavo zvose vakaenda nazvo." 
Genesis14:12 Kunyange Roti uya, mwanakomana womunun'una waAbhuramu akanga agere kuSodhomu vakamutapawo, vakapambawo upfumi hwake, vakaenda." 
Genesis14:13 Mumwewo akapunyuka ipapo akaenda akandoudza Abhuramu muHebheru kwaiva nemiti yemioku yokwaMamure kwavakanga vagere. Mamure uyu aiva worudzi rwevaAmori, iye aivawo mukoma nomunun'una naEshikoru naAneru. Ivava vose vaibatana pamwechete naAbhuramu pakurwa." 
Genesis14:14 Abhuramu paakanzwa zvokutapwa kwehama yake akaunganidza vanhu vake mazana matatu ane gumi navasere vakanga vakanyatsodzidziswa zvehondo vakaberekwa mumhuri dzavaranda vake. Vakaronda madzimambo aya kusvika kuDhani. 
Genesis14:15 Abhuramu akakamura varwi vake akavarwisa nousiku akavakunda, akavadzingirira kusvika kuHobha kuchamhembe kweDhamasikusi." 
Genesis14:16 Akadzoka nezvinhu zvose zvakanga zvapambwa, akadzokawo nehama yake Roti nezvinhu zvake, navakadzi navamwe vanhu." 
Genesis14:17 Kuzoti Abhuramu adzoka kuya kwaakanga akunda Kedhoriraomeri namadzimambo aakanga anawo, mambo weSodhomu akandomuchingamidza pabani reShavhe (kana kuti bani raMambo)." 
Genesis14:18 Merekizedhekiwo mambo weSaremu aiva mupristi waMwari Wokumusorosoro akauyawo nechingwa newaini kuna Abhuramu. 
Genesis14:19 Akamukomborera achiti; “Mwari Wokumusorosoro, Musiki wedenga napasi, ngaakomborere Abhuramu." 
Genesis14:20 Ngaakudzwe Mwari Wokumusorosoro, akaisa vavengi venyu mumaoko enyu.” Abhuramu akabvisa chegumi chezvinhu zvose zvaakanga adzoka nazvo, akapa kuna Merekizedheki." 
Genesis14:21 Mambo weSodhomu akati kuna Abhuramu, “Pane zvawadzoka nazvo, ndipe vanhu utore zvako upfumi.”" 
Genesis14:22 Asi Abhuramu akapindura mambo weSodhomu achiti, “Ndakapika naTenzi Mwari Wokumusorosoro" 
Genesis14:23 ndichiti, ‘Pazvinhu zvenyu zvose handidi kutora kana chinhu zvacho, kunyange kashinda kana tambo zvayo yeshangu kuti murege kuzondikonora muchiti, ndini ndakatopfumisa Abhuramu.’" 
Genesis14:24 Ini pachangu handidi chinhu. Zvakadyiwa navarwi vangu pamwechete nomugove unopiwa vanhu vandakaenda navo, ndizvo zvanguwo zvandinowana. Asi regai Aneru naEshikoru naMamure vatore mugove wavo.”" 
Genesis15:1 Mushure maizvozvi zvose, Abhuramu akaona chiratidzo akanzwa izwi raTenzi richiti, “Usambotya zvako Abhuramu. Ndini nhoo yako yokukudzivirira. Mubayiro wako uchava mukuru kwazvo.”" 
Genesis15:2 Asi Abhuramu akati, “Nhai Mwari Tenzi, zvamuchandipa zvichandibatsirei ndichidai kufamba zvangu ndisina kana mwana? Iyeka Ereazari wokuDhamasikusi ndiye achadya zvake nhaka yacho yomumba mangu.”" 
Genesis15:3 Abhuramu akatizve, “Tarisai muoneka kuti hamuna kundipa mwana. Saka muranda akaberekerwa mumusha mangu ndiye achatodya nhaka yangu.”" 
Genesis15:4 Ipapo akanzwa izwi raTenzi richiti, “Munhu wauri kutaura uyu haasi iye achadya nhaka yako. Mwana wako chaiye wokubereka ndiye achadya nhaka yako.”" 
Genesis15:5 Mwari akabuda naye panze akati, “Tarisa kudenga uverenge nyenyedzi kana uchikwanisa kudziverenga.” Ndokuti, “Ndiko kuwanda kuchaita vana vako.”" 
Genesis15:6 Abhuramu akatenda Tenzi zvikaita kuti Tenzi amuti akarurama. 
Genesis15:7 Mwari akati, “Ndini Tenzi ndakakuburitsa kuUru yevaKaradhia kuti ndikupe nyika ino kuti ive yako.”" 
Genesis15:8 Abhuramu akati, “Nhai Mwari Tenzi, ndichaziva sei kuti ichazova yangu?”" 
Genesis15:9 Mwari akati, “Chitora tsiru remombe rina makore matatu nenhunzvi yembudzi ina makore matatu nehondohwe ine makore matatu nenjiva nenyana rehangaiwa.”" 
Genesis15:10 Abhuramu akandotora izvozvo zvose ndokuuya nazvo kuna Mwari. Akatsemura dzose napakati, ndokuisa mapandi emhuka imwe neimwe pasi akatarisana. Asi shiri haana kudzitsemura." 
Genesis15:11 Kwaiti kukauya magora pamitumbi iya yakanga yatsemurwa, Abhuramu oadzinga." 
Genesis15:12 Kuzoti zuva rodoka, Abhuramu akabatwa nehope akakotsira hope dzorufu, akaputirwa nezarima guru raityisa." 
Genesis15:13 Ipapo Tenzi akati kuna Abhuramu “Ndinoda kuti unyatsoziva izvi zvokuti, vana vako vachava vatorwa munyika isiri yavo. Ikoko vachange vari varanda vachibatwa zvakaipa kwamazana mana amakore." 
Genesis15:14 Asi ini ndicharanga rudzi irworwo runenge ruchivaita varanda. Vana vako vachazobva ikoko vaine upfumi uzhinji. 
Genesis15:15 Asi iwe uchaenda zvakanaka kwakaenda vamwe, kumadzitateguru ako, wanyatsokwegura zvako wozovigwa." 
Genesis15:16 Vachadzokera kuno panguva yechizvarwa chavo chechina nokuti uipi hwavaAmori hahusati hwasvika pakundifinha.” 
Genesis15:17 Kuzoti zuva radoka, kwasviba, kwakaoneka mbaura yaipfumbuka utsi nezhenje romoto richipfuura napakati pamapandi enyama aye." 
Genesis15:18 Pazuva iroro Tenzi akaita chitenderano naAbhuramu achiti, “Ndapa kuvana vako nyika ino inobvira mukakova keIjipiti kundosvika kurwizi rukuru, muna Yufuratesi." 
Genesis15:19 Munzvimbo iyoyi ndimo mune nyika dzamarudzi aya anoti: vaKeni navaKenizi navaKadhimoni 
Genesis15:20 kwouya vaHiti navaPerizi navaRefaimu 
Genesis15:21 kwozotiwo vaAmori navaKanani navaGirigashi navaJebhusi.” 
Genesis16:1 Sarai, mudzimai waAbhuramu haana kumuberekera mwana, asi aiva nomuranda wake wechikadzi worudzi rwechiIjipiti ainzi Hagari." 
Genesis16:2 Sarai akati kuna Abhuramu, “Tenzi akandinyima mwana. Wadii kutorana zvako nomuranda wangu. Zvimwe ndiye angazondiberekerawo vana.” Abhuramu akanzwa zvakataurwa naSarai." 
Genesis16:3 Saka Abhuramu apedza makore gumi ari munyika yeKanani, Sarai mudzimai waAbhuramu akatora Hagari muranda wake wechiIjipiti akamupa kuna Abhuramu kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
Genesis16:4 Abhuramu akapinda mumba naHagari akabva aita pamuviri. Kuzoti Hagari aona kuti ava napamuviri akatanga kushora Sarai, tenzikadzi wake." 
Genesis16:5 Sarai akanyunyutira Abhuramu vachiti, “Kutadzirwa kwose kwandiri kuitwa imhosva yako. Ndakakupa muranda wangu kuti ave murongo wako. Zvino zvaaona kuti ava napamuviri ava kundishora. Panyaya yangu iyoyi newe, Tenzi ngaakuone.”" 
Genesis16:6 Abhuramu akataurira Sarai achiti, “Inga muranda wako ari mumaoko ako wani! Ita zvako zvaunoda naye.” Sarai akaomesera Hagari upenyu, Hagari akabva atiza pamusha ipapo." 
Genesis16:7 Mutumwa waTenzi akawana Hagari ari pachisipiti chemvura chaiva murenje chokunzira inoenda Shuru. 
Genesis16:8 Mutumwa akati, “Nhai Hagari, muranda waSarai, uri kubva kupiko? Ko uri kuenda kupi?” Hagari akati, “Ndiri kutiza tenzikadzi wangu, Sarai.”" 
Genesis16:9 Mutumwa waTenzi akamuti, “Chidzokera kuna vatenzi vako, undozvirereka kwavari.”" 
Genesis16:10 Mutumwa waTenzi akamuti, “Ndichaitawo kuti vana vako vawande chaizvo zvokuti havangaverengeki." 
Genesis16:11 Iwe zvawava napamuviri, uchabereka mwana mukomana uzomutumidza zita rokuti Ishimaeri, nokuti Tenzi anzwa kuchema kwako." 
Genesis16:12 Mwana wako achange aine mwoyo wougandanga chaihwo. Achagara akabatira vamwe matemo, ivowo vachigara vakamubatira matemo. Achagara akazvitsaura kuhama dzake dzose akadzitsvukisira maziso.”" 
Genesis16:13 Hagari akapa zita kuna Tenzi nyakutaura naye rokuti “Muri Mwari anoona,” nokuti akazviti, “Ndatarisana here chokwadi naMwari wandaona, ndikaramba ndiri mupenyu?”" 
Genesis16:14 Ndokusaka tsime iroro riri pakati peKadheshi neBheredhi rakazotumidzwa zita rokuti Bheerirahairoi. 
Genesis16:15 Hagari akazoberekera Abhuramu mwana mukomana. Abhuramu akatumidza mwana wake zita rokuti Ishimaeri. 
Genesis16:16 Panguva yaakaberekerwa Ishimaeri naHagari, Abhuramu akanga ava namakore makumi masere ana makore matanhatu." 
Genesis17:1 Abhuramu paakanga ava namakore makumi mapfumbamwe, Tenzi akazviratidza kwaari akati, “Ndini Aripagomo. Tevera gwara rangu uvewo munhu akarurama." 
Genesis17:2 Ndichaita chitenderano changu newe, ndichaitawo kuti uve nezvizvarwa zvakawanda kwazvo.”" 
Genesis17:3 Abhuramu akati pasi gwadagwa akatyora uso, Mwari ndokuti," 
Genesis17:4 “Chitenderano changu newe ndechichi: uchava baba vendudzi zhinji zhinji dzavanhu. 
Genesis17:5 Zita rako harichanzi Abhuramu, asi rava kunzi Abhurahamu nokuti ndakuita baba vendudzi zhinji dzavanhu." 
Genesis17:6 “Ndichakupa vana vakawanda, mauri muchabva ndudzi dzakawanda, uye muchabudawo madzimambo mazhinji." 
Genesis17:7 “Ndichaita chitenderano changu newe chichagara nokusingaperi chinosvikira kuvana vako pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose zvichauya chokuti ndichava Mwari wako nowavana vako vachauya. 
Genesis17:8 Ndichapa iwe navana vako vachauya nyika ino yauchiri kumboti apa garei tamei apa garei. Nyika yose yeKanani ichava yavana vako narini wose, ini ndichava Mwari wavo.”" 
Genesis17:9 Mwari akataurira Abhurahamu kuti, “Unofanira kuchengeta chitenderano changu newe, iwe navana vako vachauya pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose." 
Genesis17:10 Chitenderano changu chaunofanira kuchengeta, iwe nezvizvarwa zvako zvichauya, ndechichi chokuti, mwana wose mukomana pakati penyu ngaadzingiswe." 
Genesis17:11 Munofanira kudzingiswa. Kudzingiswa ikoku ndiko kuchava chiratidzo chechitenderano changu nemi. 
Genesis17:12 Pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose, mwana mukomana anenge ava namazuva masere okuberekwa pakati penyu ngaadzingiswe, angave mwana womuranda wako akaberekwa mumusha mako kana womuranda wokutenga nemari yako, asiri worudzi rwako." 
Genesis17:13 Naizvozvo varanda vanoberekwa mumusha mako navaunotenga nemari yako, vose ngavadzingiswe. Nokudaro kudzingiswa ndiko kuchava chitenderano changu nemi chisingaperi chiri pamuviri wenyu." 
Genesis17:14 Munhurume wose anenge asina kudzingiswa, upenyu hwake nevokwake ngahugurwe nokuti atyora chitenderano changu.”" 
Genesis17:15 Mwari akataurirazve Abhurahamu kuti, “Mudzimai wako Sarai, chirega kunge uchamudaidza nezita rokuti Sarai, zita rake rava kunzi Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ndichakomborera Sara akuberekere mwana mukomana. Ndichakomborera Sara, agova amai vendudzi dzavanhu, maari muchabudawo madzimambo avanhu.”" 
Genesis17:17 Abhurahamu akati gwadagwa akatyora uso akazviti nechomumwoyo, “Iye munhu ane zana ramakore angaite mwana nhai? Ko Sara ava namakumi mapfumbamwe amakore angabereke mwana nhai?”" 
Genesis17:18 Abhurahamu akati kuna Mwari, “Madii zvenyu kuchengetera Ishimaeri nhaka iyoyi?”" 
Genesis17:19 Mwari akati, “Kwete. Sara, mudzimai wako ndiye achakuberekera mwana mukomana ugomutumidza zita rokuti Isaki. Iyeyu nezvizvarwa zvake ndiye wandichaita kuti chitenderano changu newe chienderere mberi nokusingaperi." 
Genesis17:20 Kana zviri zvaIshimaeri, zvawataura ndazvinzwa. Chiteerera unzwe, ndichamukomborera ndichimupa vana vakawanda. Achava tateguru wamadzishe gumi namaviri uye ndichamuita rudzi rukuru." 
Genesis17:21 Asi chitenderano changu ndichachiita naIsaki wauchaberekerwa naSara gore rinouya panguva ino.” 
Genesis17:22 Kuzoti Mwari apedza kutaura naye, Mwari akabva paiva naAbhurahamu oenda zvake kudenga." 
Genesis17:23 Abhurahamu akatora mwana wake Ishimaeri pamwechete navaranda vose vomumusha make vaiti: varanda vakaberekwa mumusha make novokutenga nemari yake. Munhu wose wechirume akadzingiswa musi iwoyo sokutaura kwakaita Mwari kwaari. 
Genesis17:24 Abhurahamu akanga ava namakumi mapfumbamwe amakore ana makore mapfumbamwe paakadzingiswa. 
Genesis17:25 Ishimaeri mwana wake mukomana akanga ava namakore gumi namatatu paakadzingiswa. 
Genesis17:26 Abhurahamu nomwana wake Ishimaeri vakadzingiswa pamusi wakarewo," 
Genesis17:27 navanhurume vose vaiti vakaberekerwa mumusha make navaya vaakatenga nemari kuvatorwa vakadzingiswa pamwechete naye. 
Genesis18:1 Tenzi akazviratidza kuna Abhurahamu ari pamiti yemioku yokwaMamure agere pamusuo wetendhe rake masikati zuva richipisa. 
Genesis18:2 Akatarisa akaona varume vatatu vamire pakadaro apo. Paakavaona akabva pamusuo wetendhe akamhanyira kundosangana navo, akavagwadamira pasi." 
Genesis18:3 Akati, “Changamire wangu, kana zvichikufadzai musanyenyeredze zvenyu musha womuranda wenyu." 
Genesis18:4 Regai ndikupei tumvura, mushambe tsoka dzenyu mumbozorora zvenyu munyasi memuti," 
Genesis18:5 ini ndichikutorerai chingwa kuti mudye mudzore mwoyo mozoti mosimudzira zvenyu rwendo rwenyu nokuti ndokusaka wani mauya nokuno kune muranda wenyu.” Ivo vakati, “Ita zvako sezvawataura.”" 
Genesis18:6 Abhurahamu akamhanyira kuna Sara mutendhe akati, “Kurumidza kutora zviero mwero mitatu yakaenzana youpfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hunokwana bhagidhi uhukanye ubike chingwa.”" 
Genesis18:7 Abhurahamu akamhanyira kumombe, ndokusarudza chimhuru chine nyama yakanaka yakapfava akaipa muranda wake kuti avagadzirire." 
Genesis18:8 Akatora mukaka wakakora nomumbishi nenyama yechimhuru chiya chaakanga agadzirira akavaperekera, ndokumira panyasi pavo pasi pomuti, ivo vachidya zvavo." 
Genesis18:9 Varume vaya vakazoti, “Ko Sara mudzimai wako ari kupiko?” Abhurahamu akati, “Ari mutendhe umu.”" 
Genesis18:10 Tenzi akati, “Chokwadi ini ndichakushanyirazve gore rinouya, panguva yepfumvudza. Ipapo Sara mudzimai wako achange ava nomwana mukomana.” Izvozvo Sara aizvinzwa zvake ari mutendhe raiva kuseri kwavo." 
Genesis18:11 Abhurahamu naSara vakanga vachembera vakwegura. Sara akanga aguma, asisateveri." 
Genesis18:12 Sara akabva aseka zvake nechomumwoyo achiti, “Iyeni ndachembera kudai, ndokunge ndichada zvomurume. Handiti vatenzi vangu kukwegura kwavaita izvozvi.”" 
Genesis18:13 Tenzi akabvunza Abhurahamu achiti, “Ko seiko Sara aseka, achiti, ‘Ini pangu pano ndachembera kudai ndingaberekewo mwana here?’" 
Genesis18:14 Pane chinhu chingaomere Tenzi here? Saka gore rinouya panguva ino yepfumvudza ndichakushanyirazve, Sara achange ava nomwana mukomana.”" 
Genesis18:15 Asi Sara akaramba akati, “Handina kuseka ini,” nokuti akanga ava kutya. Mwari akati, “Aiwa, waseka iwe.”" 
Genesis18:16 Varume vaya vakazosimuka vonanga kuSodhomu. Abhurahamu akavaperekedza. 
Genesis18:17 Tenzi akati, “Ko ndichavanzira Abhurahamu zvandava kuda kuita here," 
Genesis18:18 ini ndichiziva kuti Abhurahamu achazova rudzi rukuru rune simba uye kuti ndudzi dzose dzapasi pose dzichakomborerwa pamusana pake? 
Genesis18:19 Kwete. Handingamuvanzire nokuti ndakamusarudza ndichiti arayire vana vake nemhuri yake ichauya, kuti vatevere ini Tenzi vachiita zvakarurama nokuitirawo vamwe zvakarurama nezvine ruenzaniso kuti ndiwane mazadzikisiro ezvandakapika kuna iye Abhurahamu.”" 
Genesis18:20 Tenzi akati, “Mhosva dzeSodhomu neGomora dzasvika munzeve dzangu dzanyanya kuwanda, uye chitadzo chavo chaipisisa kwazvo." 
Genesis18:21 Naizvozvo ndiri kudzikako kundoona kana kuchema kuri kusvika munzeve dzangu kuri kukonzerwa zvechokwadi nezviito zvavo, kana zvisizvo ndigoziva.”" 
Genesis18:22 Varume vaye vakabva ipapo, vakananga kuSodhomu. Abhurahamu akasara amire pana Tenzi." 
Genesis18:23 Abhurahamu akaswedera pana Tenzi akati, “Ko muchaparadza vakarurama pamwechete navakaipa here?" 
Genesis18:24 Ngatiti muguta imomo mune vakarurama vanokwana makumi mashanu hamungarinzwire tsitsi here pamusana pemakumi mashanu arimo muchibva marega kuriparadza? 
Genesis18:25 Regai zvenyu kuita zvakadaro kuuraya vakarurama pamwechete navakaipa muchienzanisa vakarurama navakaipa. Regai zvenyu kumbodaro ko iye mutongi wepasi pose angatadze here kuita zvakarurama?” 
Genesis18:26 Tenzi akati, “Kana ndikawana muSodhomu muine vanhu vakarurama vanokwana makumi mashanu ndichanzwira tsitsi guta rose pamusana pavakarurama ivavo.”" 
Genesis18:27 Abhurahamu akati, “Kunyange zvangu ndiri guruva nedota, ndatsunga kutaura kwamuri Tenzi wangu." 
Genesis18:28 Ngatitii poperevedza navanhu vashanu kuti vakwane makumi mashanu avakarurama, mungaparadze here guta rose pamusana pavashanu vanenge vashayikwa?” Mwari akati, “Handingariparadze kana ndikawana muine makumi mana navashanu ivavo.”" 
Genesis18:29 Abhurahamu akataurazve achiti, “Zvimwe muchawanikwa muine makumi mana.” Mwari akati, “Handingazviite nokuda kwamakumi mana iwayo.”" 
Genesis18:30 Abhurahamu akati, “Tenzi wangu, regai zvenyu kunditsamwira kana ndikataurazve. Zvimwe muchawanikwa muine makumi matatu?” Mwari akati, “Handingazviite kana ndikawana muine makumi matatu iwayo.”" 
Genesis18:31 Abhurahamu akati, “Tenzi wangu, ndava kungoramba ndichikunyaudzai. Zvimwe muchawanikwa muine makumi maviri avakarurama.” Mwari akati, “Handingariparadze nokuda kwamakumi maviri iwayo.”" 
Genesis18:32 Abhurahamu akati, “Regai zvenyu kunditsamwira Tenzi wangu kana ndikataurazve kamwechete koga. Zvimwe muchawanikwa muine gumi rimwechete ravanhu.” Mwari akati, “Handingariparadze nokuda kwegumi iroro.”" 
Genesis18:33 Tenzi paakapedza kutaura naAbhurahamu akabva aenda zvake, Abhurahamu ndokudzokerawo zvake kwake." 
Genesis19:1 Vatumwa vaMwari vaviri ava vakasvika kuSodhomu ava manheru. Roti akanga agere pasuo guru reSodhomu. Roti avaona akasimuka akandochingurana navo akavagwadamira pasi akatyora uso 
Genesis19:2 akati, “Madzishe angu, uyai zvenyu kumba kwangu ini muranda wenyu, mushambe tsoka dzenyu, murareko mozofumomuka zvenyu moenda.” Asi ivo vakati, “Kwete. Tichavata zvedu pamusika.”" 
Genesis19:3 Roti akavateterera chaizvo kusvikira aenda navo kumba kwake, vakapinda mumba. Akavaitira mabiko akavabikira chingwa chisina mbiriso vakadya." 
Genesis19:4 Asi vasati vamborara, varume vomuguta iroro, varume muSodhomu vakuru navadiki, vanhu vose zvavo pasina akasara vakakomba imba iyi." 
Genesis19:5 Vakadaidzira kuna Roti vachiti, “Varume vauya kwauri manheru ano vari kupiko? Vaburitse pano panze kwatiri kuti tivaite vakadzi vedu.”" 
Genesis19:6 Roti akaenda kumusuo akabuda panze kuvanhu ivavo ndokupfiga musuo. 
Genesis19:7 Akati, “Hama dzangu regai kuita chakaipa chikadai." 
Genesis19:8 Ndine vanasikana vangu vaviri vachiri mhandara. Regai ndivaunze kwamuri muite zvenyu zvamunoda navo. Kana zviri zvavarume ava regai zvenyu kuwana chamungaite kwavari nokuti vaeni vauya mumba mangu.” 
Genesis19:9 Asi ivo vakati, “Ibvapo.” Vakatiwo, “Muchinda uyu akauya somuuyi, asi zvino ava kuzvitora somutongi! Zvino tichakuorora kupfuura zvatanga tichavaita.” Vakamomotera Roti vachimusunda vachida kupaza musuo wemba yake." 
Genesis19:10 Asi varume vaviri vaya vakatambanudza maoko avo, vakakwevera Roti mumba mavakanga vari, vakapfiga musuo." 
Genesis19:11 Vakapofomadza vanhu vose vaya vakanga vari pamusuo wemba, vakuru navaduku, vakadzungaira zvokutadza kuona musuo iwoyo." 
Genesis19:12 Varume vaviri vaya vakabvunza Roti vachiti, “Une vamwe vokwako muguta rino here, vakaita savakuwasha, kana kuti vana vakomana kana vasikana, kana vamwewo?" 
Genesis19:13 Vaburitse muno nokuti tava kuda kuparadza nzvimbo ino. Chatinodariro ndechichi: mhosva dzavanhu vayo dzasvika munzeve dzaTenzi, dzanyanya kuwanda zvokuti Tenzi atituma kuzoparadza.”" 
Genesis19:14 Roti akabuda akandotaurira vakuwasha vake vaitarisirwa kuzoroora vana vake achiti, “Simukai mubve muno nokuti Tenzi achaparadza guta rino.” Asi vakuwasha vake vakafunga kuti vari kuita jee navo." 
Genesis19:15 Kuzoti ava mambakwedza vatumwa vakakurumidzisa Roti vachiti, “Chisimuka utore mukadzi wako navanasikana vako vaviri vaunavo pano uende, kuitira kuti murege kuparadzwa pacharangwa guta rino.”" 
Genesis19:16 Asi Roti akaita chinono, varume ava ndokubva vati Roti nomukadzi wake navanasikana vake vaviri, maoko chapu, vakavaburitsa vachivakwekweretsera kunze kweguta nokuti Tenzi akavanzwira tsitsi." 
Genesis19:17 Pavakasvika navo kunze kweguta vakati, “Chitotizai muponese upenyu hwenyu, musacheuke muchitarisa shure kana kumira papi zvapo mubani. Tizirai kugomo mungadaro mukaparadzwa.”" 
Genesis19:18 Asi Roti akati, “Kweteka, madzishe angu." 
Genesis19:19 Inga makafadzwa neni muranda wenyu wani mukandinzwira tsitsi dzenyu dzakawanda mukandinunura. Asi zvokutizira kugomo handingazvikwanise, njodzi ingadaro ikandiwira ndisati ndasvikako, ndikafa." 
Genesis19:20 Inga pane kaguta kari pedyo ako, handiti kadiki zvako, regai nditizireko ndirarame.”" 
Genesis19:21 Mutumwa akati, “Zvakanaka, chichemo chako ndachinzwa. Chimwezve ndechokuti handichaparadza guta rawareva." 
Genesis19:22 Chikurumidza kutizira ikoko nokuti hakuna chandingaite usati wasvikako.” Saka zita reguta iroro rakatumidzwa kuti Zoari. 
Genesis19:23 Zuva rakanga ratobuda pakasvika Roti muZoari. 
Genesis19:24 Pakarepo Tenzi akanayisa moto wesarufa paSodhomu neGomora uchibva kudenga kuna iye Tenzi. 
Genesis19:25 Akaparadza maguta iwayo nebani rose navagari vomumaguta iwayo vose. Akaparadzawo zvose zvaimerapo. 
Genesis19:26 Asi mudzimai waRoti aivatevera ari shure, akacheuka akabva aita churu chomunyu." 
Genesis19:27 Abhurahamu akafumoenda paakanga amire naTenzi paya. 
Genesis19:28 Akatarisa kuSodhomu neGomora nokubani rose, onei utsi hwenzvimbo yose iyoyo huchitogoka mudenga soutsi hwevira romoto." 
Genesis19:29 Saka Mwari paakaparadza maguta omubani, akarangarira Abhurahamu, akaburitsa Roti mukati menhamo yokuparadzwa kwamaguta aaigara." 
Genesis19:30 Roti akazobva muZoari, akandogara mugomo, mubako, navanasikana vake vaviri vaya nokuti vakatya kugara muZoari." 
Genesis19:31 Mwana wavo wedangwe akataurira munun'una wake kuti, “Baba vedu vachembera uyezve hakuna varume munyika ino iyi vatingawanana navo sezvinongoitawo vanhu vose vose panyika." 
Genesis19:32 Ngatinwisei baba vedu waini tigorara navo kuti tiwane machengetero orudzi rurege kutsakatika.” 
Genesis19:33 Usiku ihwohwo vakanwisa baba vavo waini. Wedangwe akapinda muna baba vavo, akandovata navo. Baba ava havana kumboziva kuvata kwaakaita navo kana kuzobva kwaakaita pavari." 
Genesis19:34 Ramangwana racho, wedangwe akataurira munun'una wake achiti, “Ndakarara nababa usiku hwapfuura. Zvino ngativanwisei zvakare waini usiku hwanhasi, uendewo undorara navo kuti tiwane machengetero orudzi, rurege kutsakatika.”" 
Genesis19:35 Usiku ihwohwo vakanwisazve baba vavo waini. Munun'una wacho akandorarawo navo. Baba ava havana kumboziva kuvata kwaakaita navo kana kuzobva kwaakaita pavari. 
Genesis19:36 Saka vanasikana vaRoti, vose vari vaviri, vakaita vana nababa vavo." 
Genesis19:37 Mwanasikana wedangwe akabereka mwana mukomana, akamutumidza zita rokuti Moabhu. Ndiye tateguru wevaMoabhu." 
Genesis19:38 Munun'una wake akaberekawo mwana mukomana, akamutumidza zita rokuti Bheniami. Ndiye tateguru wevaAmoni variko nhasi uno." 
Genesis20:1 Abhurahamu akabva kuMamure akaenda kunyika yeNegevhu, akandogara pakati peKadheshi neShuru, akambogarawo kuGerari." 
Genesis20:2 Abhurahamu aiti, mudzimai wake, Sara ihanzvadzi yangu. Abhimereki mambo weGerari, akatuma vanhu vakandomuunzira Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Asi Mwari akauya kuna Abhimereki mukurota usiku akati kwaari, “Ndokufa uku kwawatoita pamusana pomukadzi wawandotora, mukadzi womuridzi.”" 
Genesis20:4 Asi Abhimereki akanga asati atorana naye. Abhimereki akati, “Nhai Tenzi, mungaparadze rudzi rwavanhu vasina mhosva here?" 
Genesis20:5 Haasiri iye pachake here akanditi, ‘Ihanzvadzi yangu.’ Mukadzi wacho pachake achiti, ‘Ihanzvadzi yangu.’ Ndakazviita mukusaziva, pasina chakaipa chandaimbofunga mumwoyo mangu.”" 
Genesis20:6 Mwari akamutaurira mukurota ikoku achiti, “Ndinozviziva zvangu kuti wakazviita mukusaziva pasina chakaipa chawaimbofunga mumwoyo mako. Ndini ndakaita kuti urege kunditadzira, saka ndisina kukubvumidza kumbomugunzva zvako." 
Genesis20:7 Zvino chidzorera mukadzi womuridzi. Murume wake achakunamatira ugorarama nokuti muporofita. Asi kana ukarega kumudzorera, chinyatsoziva zvako kuti ndokufa kwawava kuita uku, iwe navanhu vako vose.”" 
Genesis20:8 Saizvozvo Abhimereki akamuka mangwanani-ngwanani akadaidza makurukota ake ose ndokuaudza zvose izvozvi. Varume ivavo vakatya zvikuru. 
Genesis20:9 Abhimereki akadaidza Abhurahamu akati kwaari, “Chiiko ichi chawaita kwatiri? Ndakakutadzira zvakaita sei zvaunobva wandiunzira chitadzo chakakura chikadai ini nenyika yangu? Zvawandiitira izvi, hazvifanire kumboitwa!”" 
Genesis20:10 Abhimereki akati kuna Abhurahamu, “Waifungeiko kuita zvinhu zvakadai?”" 
Genesis20:11 Abhurahamu akati, “Ndakazviita ndichifunga kuti vanhu vokuno havatye Mwari, uye kuti zvimwe vangandiuraye pamusana pomudzimai wangu." 
Genesis20:12 Izvowo ihanzvadzi yangu chaiyo, baba vedu mumwechete, takangosiyana kunanamai. Akazovawo mudzimai wangu zvake." 
Genesis20:13 Mwari paakandibvisa kumusha kwababa vangu, achindiita kuti nditame-tame, ndakaudza mudzimai wangu ndichiti, ‘Ndiitirewo mwoyochena kwose kwatinoenda, upote uchinditi, ihanzvadzi yangu.’ ”" 
Genesis20:14 Abhimereki akatora hwai nemombe, navaranda vechikadzi nevechirume akapa izvozvo Abhurahamu, akamudzorerawo Sara mudzimai wake." 
Genesis20:15 Abhimereki akati, “Tarisa uone, nyika yangu yose iyi yauri kuona, enda unogara pose pose paunoda.” Akataurirawo Sara achiti," 
Genesis20:16 “Ndapa hanzvadzi yako chiuru chemari yesirivha yokuratidza kuti hauna nemhosva yose nokukuchenurawo pana vamwe vako vose vaunavo navanhu vose zvavo.” 
Genesis20:17 Abhurahamu akanamata Mwari, Mwari ndokuporesa Abhimereki nomudzimai wake, navaranda vake vechikadzi kuti vave nembereko zvakare" 
Genesis20:18 nokuti Tenzi akanga amisa kubereka vakadzi vose vemhuri yaAbhimereki, pamusana paSara, mudzimai waAbhurahamu." 
Genesis21:1 Tenzi akazoshanyira Sara sezvaakanga ataura, akamuitira zvaakanga amuvimbisa." 
Genesis21:2 Sara akava napamuviri akaberekera Abhurahamu mwana mukomana panguva yakatemwa naMwari paakataura naAbhurahamu. Izvozvo Abhurahamu akanga ava harahwa. 
Genesis21:3 Abhurahamu akatumidza mwana waaberekerwa naSara zita rokuti Isaki. 
Genesis21:4 Abhurahamu akadzingisa Isaki mwana wake ava namazuva masere okuberekwa sezvakanzi naMwari aite. 
Genesis21:5 Abhurahamu akanga ava namakore zana panguva yakaberekwa Isaki. 
Genesis21:6 Ipapo Sara akati, “Mwari andipa kuti ndiseke zvangu chikwe-e, vose vachazvinzwa vachasekawo neni.”" 
Genesis21:7 Akati, “Ndianiwo zvake aimbozvifunga kuti Abhurahamu angaberekerwewo zvake vana neni Sara? Asi hezvika ndamuberekera mwana mukomana achembera kudai.”" 
Genesis21:8 Mwana akazokura, akarumurwa. Abhurahamu akaita mabiko makuru kwazvo pamusi wakarumurwa Isaki." 
Genesis21:9 Zvakaitika kuti Sara akaona Ishimaeri mwanakomana waHagari muIjipiti, mwana waakaberekera Abhurahamu achiita jee naIsaki." 
Genesis21:10 Akataurira Abhurahamu kuti, “Dzinga muranda uyu nomwanakomana wake nokuti mwana womuranda uyu haafanire kudya nhaka pamwechete nomwanakomana wangu Isaki.”" 
Genesis21:11 Abhurahamu akashungurudzwa kwazvo mumwoyo nenyaya iyoyi yemwanakomana wake. 
Genesis21:12 Asi Mwari akataurira Abhurahamu achiti, “Rega kushungurudzwa zvako mumwoyo nezvomukomana uyu kana nezvomuranda uyu. Ita zvako zvose zvaunenge waudzwa naSara nokuti zvizvarwa zvako zvichadaidzwa nezita raIsaki." 
Genesis21:13 Ndichaitawo kuti mwana womuranda wako abereke vana vakawanda zvokutova rudzi rwavanhu nokuti mwana wakowo.” 
Genesis21:14 Naizvozvo Abhurahamu akafumomuka akatora chingwa neguchu redehwe rine mvura, akapa Hagari, akamuberekesa mwana kumusana akati aende zvake. Hagari akasumuka akaenda akandodzungaira ari murenje reBheerishebha." 
Genesis21:15 Kuzoti mvura iye yomuguchu yapera, Hagari akaisa mwana mune chimwe chigwenzi." 
Genesis21:16 Hagari akaenda chinhambwe chingasvike dombo rokukanda nemaoko, akagara pasi achichema ari pakanga pakatarisana napaya paiva nomwana nokuti aiti, “Handingadi zvangu kuona mwana achifa ndakatarisa.”" 
Genesis21:17 Mwari akanzwa kuchema kwomukomana uyu, mutumwa waMwari, ari mudenga, akadaidzira kuna Hagari achiti kwaari, “Ko chanetsa chiiko Hagari? Usatye zvako nokuti Mwari anzwa kuchema kwemwana paari ipapo." 
Genesis21:18 Simuka utore mwana unyatsomubata noruoko nokuti ndichaita kuti ave navana vakawanda zvokutova rudzi rukuru.” 
Genesis21:19 Mwari akapengenutsa maziso aHagari akaona tsime remvura. Akaenda akazadza guchu riya nemvura akapa mwana. 
Genesis21:20 Mwari aiva naIshimaeri akakura achigara murenje, akazova nyanzvi yokupfura nouta nemiseve." 
Genesis21:21 Aigara murenje reParani. Amai vake vakazondomutorera mukadzi kuIjipiti. 
Genesis21:22 Panguva iyoyo Abhimereki naFikori mukuru mukuru wehondo yake vakataurirana naAbhurahamu vachiti, “Mwari anewe pazvinhu zvose zvaunoita," 
Genesis21:23 saka ipo pano chipika naMwari kwandiri kuti hauzombonyengedza ini kana vana vangu, kana zvizukuru zvangu, sokutendeseka kwandakaita kwauri ugovawo wakatendeseka kwandiri nokunyika yaugere somutorwa.”" 
Genesis21:24 Abhurahamu akati, “Ndinopika.”" 
Genesis21:25 Abhurahamu paakanyunyutira Abhimereki nezvetsime remvura rakanga rapambwa navaranda vaAbhimereki," 
Genesis21:26 Abhimereki akati, “Handizive akaita izvozvo. Iwe hauna kumbondiudzawoka. Ndatotangisa kuzvinzwa nhasi uno.”" 
Genesis21:27 Abhurahamu akatora hwai nemombe ndokupa Abhimereki, vakabva vasunga chibvumirano pauviri hwavo." 
Genesis21:28 Abhurahamu akatsaurawo nhunzvi nomwe dzehwai ndokudziisa padzo dzoga. 
Genesis21:29 Abhimereki akabvunza Abhurahamu achiti, “Ko nhunzvi nomwe idzi dzawatsaura dzinoreveiko?”" 
Genesis21:30 Abhurahamu akati, “Gamuchirai nhunzvi nomwe idzi sechiratidzo chokundipupurira kuti ndini ndakachera tsime iri.”" 
Genesis21:31 Naizvozvo nzvimbo iyoyo yakatumidzwa zita rokuti Bheerishebha nokuti ipapo vakaitirana mhiko pauviri hwavo. 
Genesis21:32 Kuzoti vaita chitenderano chavo kuBheerishebha, Abhimereki naFikori, mukuru mukuru wehondo yake, vakasumuka vakadzokera zvavo, kunyika yevaFirisitia." 
Genesis21:33 Abhurahamu akasima muti womutamarisiki kuBheerishebha, akanamata Tenzi, Mwari Chidzachepo." 
Genesis21:34 Abhurahamu akagara munyika yevaFirisitia kwenguva ndefu. 
Genesis22:1 Mushure maizvozvi, Mwari akaedza Abhurahamu akati, “Abhurahamu.” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis22:2 Mwari akati, “Tora mwanakomana wako, iye mumwechete oga, wepamwoyo, Isaki uende naye kunyika yeMoria umuite chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa ikoko pane rimwe gomo randichakuudza.”" 
Genesis22:3 Abhurahamu akafumomuka akaisa chityaro padhongi rake akatora varanda vake vaviri nomwanakomana wake Isaki. Akatema huni dzokupisa nadzo mupiro wokupisa, ndokusimuka oenda kunzvimbo yaakanga audzwa naMwari." 
Genesis22:4 Pazuva retatu Abhurahamu akatarisa akaona nzvimbo iyoyo ichiri chinhambwe. 
Genesis22:5 Abhurahamu akataurira varanda vake achiti, “Chimbosarai pano apa nedhongi iri, ini nomwana timboenda kundonamata tigozoti todzoka zvedu kuno kwamuri.”" 
Genesis22:6 Abhurahamu akatora huni dziye akadzitakudza Isaki mwana wake. Iye akatakura moto nebanga mumaoko, vakaenda zvavo vose vari vaviri." 
Genesis22:7 Isaki akabvunza Abhurahamu baba vake achiti, “Nhai baba!” Iye akati, “Chiiko mwanangu?” Isaki akati, “Moto nehuni tinazvo, ko hwayana yokundoita chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa iri kupi?”" 
Genesis22:8 Abhurahamu akati, “Mwanangu, Mwari pachake ndiye achaona kuti tawana hwayana yechibayiro chemupiro wokupisa.” Saka vose vari vaviri vakaenda zvavo." 
Genesis22:9 Vakasvika panzvimbo yavakanga vataurirwa naMwari. Abhurahamu akavaka atari ipapo. Akanyatsoronga huni, akasunga Isaki mwanakomana wake akamuradzika paatari, pamusoro pehuni." 
Genesis22:10 Abhurahamu ndokutambanudza ruoko rwake otora banga kuti achibaya mwana wake. 
Genesis22:11 Pakarepo mutumwa waMwari akadaidzira ari mudenga achiti, “Abhurahamu, Abhurahamu!” Abhurahamu akati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis22:12 Mutumwa akati, “Usakuvadze mwana wako kana kuwana chaungaite paari. Zvino ndazoziva kuti unotya Mwari, zvausina kurambira nomwanakomana wako, mumwe chete oga.”" 
Genesis22:13 Abhurahamu akatarisa onei seri kwake kuine hondohwe yakakochekera nenyanga dzayo mugwenzi. Abhurahamu akandotora hondohwe iyoyo, akaiita chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa panzvimbo yomwana wake." 
Genesis22:14 Saka Abhurahamu akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rokuti “Tenzianoonazvokuita,” kunyange nanhasi uno zvichiri kungonzi, “Pagomo raTenzianoonazvokuita.”" 
Genesis22:15 Ipapo mutumwa waTenzi akadaidzira rwechipiri ari mudenga kuna Abhurahamu 
Genesis22:16 achiti, “Ndinopika neni pachangu. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro kutaura. Zvawaita chinhu chakadai ichi ukarega kurambira nomwanakomana wako, mwana wako mumwechete oga," 
Genesis22:17 ndichanyatsokukomborera chaizvo. Ndichaita kuti vana vako vawande senyenyedzi dzedenga, sejecha romumahombekombe egungwa. Maguta avavengi vavo, vana vako vachaaita avo." 
Genesis22:18 Nokuda kwavana vako marudzi apasi pose achakomborerwa nokuti wateerera zvandinoreva.” 
Genesis22:19 Abhurahamu akadzokera kuvaranda vake ndokusumuka voenda vose kuBheerishebha. Abhurahamu akaita musha wake kuBheerishebha. 
Genesis22:20 Shure kwaizvozvo Abhurahamu akazoudzwa kuti, “Mirika akaberekera munun'una wake Nahori vana vakomana.”" 
Genesis22:21 Wedangwe ndiUzi achiteverwa naBhuzi, kwozouya Kemueri baba waAramu," 
Genesis22:22 tevere Kesedhi naHazo naPiridhashi naJidhirafu naBhetueri. 
Genesis22:23 Bhetueri ndiye akazobereka Ribheka. Aya ndiwo majaya masere akaberekwa naMirika mudzimai waNahori munun'una waAbhurahamu. 
Genesis22:24 Nahori akaberekawo vamwe vana nomurongo wake ainzi Reuma. Murongo iyeyo akabereka Tebha naGahamu naTahashi naMaaka. 
Genesis23:1 Sara akagara zana namakumi maviri amakore ana makore manomwe. Iwaya ndiwo makore ose oupenyu hwaSara. 
Genesis23:2 Sara akafira kuKiriatiaribha kana kuti Hebhuroni, munyika yeKanani. Abhurahamu akambotora nguva yokuyeuka rufu rwaSara achimuchema." 
Genesis23:3 Abhurahamu akasiya chitunha chiri mumba akandotaurirana navaHiti vachiti," 
Genesis23:4 “Ini ndinongovawo mutorwa zvangu, muuyi pakati penyu. Ndiwaniseiwo nzvimbo pakati penyu yokuviga hama dzangu dzinenge dzafa.”" 
Genesis23:5 VaHiti vakapindura Abhurahamu vachiti, “Teererai munzwe, changamire, imi muri muchinda waMwari." 
Genesis23:6 Tinokuremekedzai kwazvo pakati pedu. Vigai zvenyu vafi venyu munzvimbo yakanakisisa pakati penzvimbo dzedu dzose dzokuvigira vanhu. Pakati pedu hapana angakunyimei nzvimbo yokuviga vafi venyu munzvimbo dzokuviga vafi.” 
Genesis23:7 Abhurahamu akasimuka ndokukotamira pasi achiremekedza vaHiti, varidzi venyika." 
Genesis23:8 Akati kwavari, “Kana mabvuma kuti ndivige vakafa vangu, chimbondinzwaiwo, zvino chindisvitsiraiwo chichemo changu kuna Efuroni mwanakomana waZohari," 
Genesis23:9 kuti andipe bako rake repaMakipera riri pamucheto womunda wake. Ngaanditengesere nomutengo waro wakakwana imi muchizviona. Ive nzvimbo yangu pachangu yokuviga vanhu.” 
Genesis23:10 Efuroni akanga agerepo mukati mevaHiti. Saka Efuroni, muHiti, akapindura Abhurahamu, vaHiti vose vakanga vauya kusuo guru vachizvinzwa. Akati," 
Genesis23:11 “Kwete, changamire. Ndinzwei ndinokupai munda iwoyo nebako ririmo, hama dzangu dzichizviona kuti muvige vafi venyu.”" 
Genesis23:12 Abhurahamu akakotamira varidzi venyika achivaremekedza. 
Genesis23:13 Akataura kuna Efuroni dare rose ravanhu venyika iyoyo richizvinzwa achiti, “Ndichakupai mari yokutenga munda iwoyo, igamuchirei kuti ndivige vafi vangu.”" 
Genesis23:14 Efuroni akapindura Abhurahamu achiti," 
Genesis23:15 “Changamire wangu, teererai munzwe. Kamutengo kenzvimbo yacho kanongova mazana mana chete emari yamashekeri yesirivha. Zvino munoti imari iyoyo here yatingatemeserane musoro nayo? Endai zvenyu mundoviga munhu wenyu.”" 
Genesis23:16 Abhurahamu akabvumirana naEfuroni, ndokubva Abhurahamu aerera Efuroni mari yesirivha iya yavakataura vaHiti vachizvinzwa. Mari yacho yaikwana mazana mana esirivha maererano nomwero wouremo waishandiswa pakutengeserana." 
Genesis23:17 Ndokusaka nzvimbo yaEfuroni yokuMakipera iri kumabvazuva kweMamure yakanzi yava yaAbhurahamu. Nzvimbo iyoyo yaisanganisira munda wacho, kwouya bako raivemo, nemiti yose yaivemo kusvikira kumucheto wawo kuitenderedza." 
Genesis23:18 Yakapiwa Abhurahamu kuti ive yake, vaHiti navamwe vose vedare vakanga vauya kusuo guru reguta vachizvinzwa." 
Genesis23:19 Abhurahamu akaviga Sara mudzimai wake mubako riri kuMakipera, pakatarisana neMamure kuHebhuroni munyika yeKanani." 
Genesis23:20 Saka vaHiti vakapa Abhurahamu nzvimbo iyoyo nebako ririmo zvikabva zvava nzvimbo yake yokuviga vanhu vake. 
Genesis24:1 Zvino Abhurahamu akanga achembera mazuva aendedzana Tenzi akanga amukomborera pazvinhu zvose.
