Genesis24:2 Abhurahamu akataurira muranda wake mukuru pazera pana vose mumusha make aiva mutariri mukuru wokutarisa zvose zvemhuri yake, vachiti, “Isa ruoko rwako pasi pechidya changu," 
Genesis24:3 ugopika naTenzi, Mwari wedenga napasi, kuti hauzotorera mwanakomana wangu mukadzi pavasikana veKanani vandigere navo" 
Genesis24:4 asi kuti uchazoenda kunyika kwangu, kune hama dzangu, kundotsvakira mwana wangu, Isaki, mukadzi ikoko.”" 
Genesis24:5 Muranda akati, “Ko kana mukadzi wacho akaramba kuuya neni kuno, ndinofanira kudzorera mwana wenyu kunyika kwamakabva here?”" 
Genesis24:6 Abhurahamu akati, “Kwete. Usambodzorera zvako mwana wangu ikoko." 
Genesis24:7 Tenzi, Mwari wedenga akandibvisa pamusha wababa vangu, munyika yandakaberekerwa akandipikira achiti, ‘Nyika ino ndichaipa kuzvizvarwa zvako,’ ndiye achatuma mutumwa wake kuzokutungamirira kuti undotorera mwana wangu mukadzi ikoko." 
Genesis24:8 Kana mukadzi iyeyo aramba kuuya newe, iwe uchasunungurwa pamhiko yangu yawapika. Asi chako iwe rega kudzokera nemwana wangu ikoko.”" 
Genesis24:9 Muranda uyu akaisa ruoko rwake pasi pechidya chaAbhurahamu, vatenzi vake, ndokupika mhiko yacho." 
Genesis24:10 Muranda uyu akatora gumi, pangamera dzavatenzi vake, nezvipo zvakasiyana-siyana zvakanakisisa zvaibva kuna vatenzi vake, akasimuka, oenda kuMesopotamia kuguta raNahori." 
Genesis24:11 Akaita kuti ngamera dzake dzirare patsime raiva kunze kweguta, manheru, nguva inouya vakadzi kuzochera mvura." 
Genesis24:12 Akanamata achiti, “Tenzi, Mwari waAbhurahamu, vatenzi vangu, nzwirai tsitsi vatenzi vangu Abhurahamu, mundibatsire ndiwane zvandafambira." 
Genesis24:13 Onai ndimire pano patsime pachauya vanasikana vavanhu vomuguta rino kuzochera mvura. 
Genesis24:14 Zvino musikana wandinenge ndati nditekerewo mvura ndinwe, kana iye akapindura achiti, ‘Inwai zvenyu uye ndichapawo ngamera dzenyu mvura yokunwa,’ iyeyo ngaave musikana wamakasarudzira muranda wenyu Isaki. Ndizvo zvichandiratidza kuti maitira mwoyochena vatenzi vangu.”" 
Genesis24:15 Asati ambopedza kutaura pakabva pasvika Ribheka mwanasikana waBhetueri. Bhetueri uyu akaberekwa naMirika, mudzimai waNahori munun'una waAbhurahamu. Ribheka akasvika akatakura chirongo chake papfudzi." 
Genesis24:16 Zvino musikana uyu aiva nechimiro chakanaka kwazvo, iri mhandara isina kumbosangana nomurume. Akapinda mutsime akazadza chirongo chake nemvura akabuda." 
Genesis24:17 Muranda uyu akamhanyira kwaari akati, “Regai ndingonyavawo pahuro nemvura yokunwa yomuchirongo chenyu.”" 
Genesis24:18 Musikana akati, “Inwai zvenyu tenzi wangu.” Akakurumidza kutura chirongo chake pasi ndokumubatira achinwa." 
Genesis24:19 Kuzoti amupa mvura, musikana akati, “Chiregai zvenyu nditekerewo ngamera dzenyu mvura, dzinwe dzigute.”" 
Genesis24:20 Akabva atora mvura yaiva muchirongo chake akaidururira mokuti dzinwire, ndokumhanyira kutsime kundocherera ngamera dzake dzose mvura yokunwa." 
Genesis24:21 Murume akatarisisa anyerere achida kuziva kuti chokwadi Tenzi anditungamirira kuwana zvandafambira here, kana kuti kwete." 
Genesis24:22 Kuzoti ngamera dzake dzanwa dzaguta muranda uyu akatora mhete yendarama yairema sechidimbu chapakati napakati cheshekeri, ndokushongedza Ribheka. Akamupawo makoza maviri endarama airema mashekeri gumi." 
Genesis24:23 Muranda akati, “Uri mwana waaniko? Ko tingawanawo here pokurara kumba kwababa venyu?”" 
Genesis24:24 Iye akati, “Ndiri mwana waBhetueri akaberekwa naMirika, mudzimai waNahori.”" 
Genesis24:25 Akatiwo, “Tine zvose zvakawanda, mashanga nezvokudya zvezvipfuwo uye pokurara paripo.”" 
Genesis24:26 Murume uyu akapfugama akanamata Tenzi achiti," 
Genesis24:27 “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari watenzi wangu Abhurahamu nokuti akaramba akatendeka, akaita zvaakatsidzira tenzi wangu. Kana ndirini, Tenzi anditungamirira akandisvitsa kumusha kwehama dzatenzi wangu.”" 
Genesis24:28 Musikana uyu akabva amhanyira kumba kwamai vake, ndokundovaudza zvose." 
Genesis24:29 Ribheka aiva nehanzvadzi yake yainzi Rabhani. Rabhani akamhanyira kumurume uye, kutsime," 
Genesis24:30 nokuti akanga aona hanzvadzi yake iine mhete, namakoza mumaoko ayo, akanzwawo kutaura kwaiita Ribheka achiti, “Ndizvo zvandaudzwa nomurume iyeyo.” Ndopaakamhanyira kumurume uya, akamuwana amire patsime paya nengamera dzake." 
Genesis24:31 Rabhani akati, “Titambireika vanyakukomborerwa naTenzi! Ko manga muchadarirei kumirira kunze kunze kuno uku. Izvozvi tatokugadzirirai imba nepokutenhera ngamera.”" 
Genesis24:32 Saka murume uyu akandopinda mumba. Rabhani akasunungura ngamera dziya, akamupa mashanga nezvokudya zvengamera. Akapawo murume uyu navaaiva navo mvura yokushamba tsoka." 
Genesis24:33 Vakamuperekera zvokudya, asi iye akati, “Handingadyi ndisati ndataura mashoko angu.” Rabhani akati, “Tipire zvako tinzwe.”" 
Genesis24:34 Iye akati, “Ndiri muranda waAbhurahamu." 
Genesis24:35 Tenzi akakomborera vatenzi vangu kwazvo zvokuti vakapfuma zvikuru. Vane hwai, mombe, sirivha, ndarama, navaranda vechirume nevechikadzi nengamera namadhongi mazhinji." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, mudzimai wavatenzi vangu, kunyange akanga achembera zvake, akaberekera vatenzi vangu mwana mukomana. Ivo vatenzi wangu vakapa mwana wavo iyeyo zvinhu zvose zvavanazvo." 
Genesis24:37 Zvino vatenzi vangu vakandiitisa mhiko vachiti, ‘Usatsvakire mwana wangu mukadzi mukati mevanasikana verudzi rwevaKanani vane nyika yandigere." 
Genesis24:38 Asi enda kumusha kwababa vangu, kuhama dzangu undotsvakira mwana wangu mukadzi ikoko.’" 
Genesis24:39 Ndakati kuna vatenzi vangu. ‘Zvimwe mukadzi wacho acharamba kuuya neni.’ 
Genesis24:40 Ivo vatenzi vangu ndokuti, ‘Tenzi wandinogara ndichinamata muupenyu, achatuma mutumwa wake akuperekedze kuti zvaunofambira zvibudirire, undotorera mwana wangu mukadzi kuhama dzangu kumusha kwababa vangu." 
Genesis24:41 Kana wasvika kuhama dzangu, vakaramba kukupa mukadzi iyeyo, uchasunungurwa zvako pamhiko yangu.’" 
Genesis24:42 “Pandasvika patsime nhasi uno ndati, ‘Tenzi, Mwari wavatenzi vangu Abhurahamu, nditungamirireiwo ndigowana zvandafambira.’" 
Genesis24:43 Zvino zvandimire patsime pano, kana pakauya musikana kuzochera mvura ndikamuti, ‘Dondipawo mvura muchirongo chako ndinwe,’" 
Genesis24:44 kana iye akati, ‘Inwai zvenyu, ndichatekerawo ngamera dzenyu mvura yokunwa,’ iyeyo ngaave mukadzi akasarudzirwa mwana wavatenzi vangu naTenzi." 
Genesis24:45 Zvino ndisati ndapedza kunamata nechemumwoyo ndabva ndaona Ribheka achiuya akatakura chirongo pamapfudzi ake, ndokusvikopinda mutsime, ndokuchera mvura. Ini ndamuti, ‘Dondipawo mvura yokunwa.’" 
Genesis24:46 Pakarepo iye abva atura chirongo chake pamafudzi akati, ‘Inwai zvenyu, uye ndichapawo ngamera dzenyu mvura yokunwa.’ Ndanwa ndokubva iye apawo ngamera dzangu dzikanwa." 
Genesis24:47 Ipapo ndamubvunza ndichiti, ‘Ko nhai, uri mwana waaniko?’ Iye ati, ‘Ndiri mwana womwana waNahori, baba vangu ari Bhetueri aberekwa naMirika mudzimai waNahori.’ Ini ndabva ndaisa mhete pamhuno yake namakoza mumaoko ake." 
Genesis24:48 Ndapfugama ndikanamata Tenzi, ndikarumbidza Tenzi wavatenzi vangu Abhurahamu nokuti anditungamirira kuti ndinange kuhama yavatenzi vangu Abhurahamu kuti ndiwanire muroora wavatenzi vangu." 
Genesis24:49 Zvino kana imi muchida kuva vanhu vakatendeka vanoita zviri pachokwadi kuna vatenzi vangu ndiudzei. Asi kana musingadi, ndiudzeiwo zvangu ndione zvokuita.”" 
Genesis24:50 Ipapo Rabhani naBhetueri vakapindura vachiti, “Zvinhu izvi zvabva kuna Tenzi. Isu hapana chatingataure." 
Genesis24:51 Ribheka ndiyeyu ari pano mutore zvako uende naye, andova mudzimai womwanakomana wavatenzi vako sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi.”" 
Genesis24:52 Muranda waAbhurahamu paakanzwa zvavakataura akapfugama pasi akanamata Tenzi. 
Genesis24:53 Muranda uyu akabva abudisa zvishongo zvesirivha nezvendarama nehanzu dzokupa Ribheka. Akaburitsawo zvipo zvinokosha ndokupa amai vaRibheka nehanzvadzi yake Rabhani. 
Genesis24:54 Muranda uyu navarume vaakanga anavo vakadya, vakanwa, ndokurarapo usiku ihwohwo. Kuzoti vamuka mangwanani akati, “Chiregai ndichidzokera zvangu kuna vatenzi vangu.”" 
Genesis24:55 Hanzvadzi yake naamai vake vakati, “Regai timboti garei nomusikana uyu nguva yakati kuti kana mazuva angaite gumi zvawo agoti oenda zvake.”" 
Genesis24:56 Asi iye akati, “Dai machirega zvenyu kundinonotsa, onai Tenzi andipa zvandafambira. Chiregai zvenyu ndidzokere kuna vatenzi vangu.”" 
Genesis24:57 Ivo vakati, “Regai tidaidze mhandara yacho tinzwe.”" 
Genesis24:58 Vakadaidza Ribheka vakati kwaari, “Unoda kuenda nomurume uyu here?” Iye akati, “Hongu ndinoda.”" 
Genesis24:59 Vakabvumidza Ribheka mwana wavo kuenda. Akaenda nomuranda wechikadzi nyakumurera. Vakaenda nomuranda waAbhurahamu pamwechete navanhu vake. 
Genesis24:60 Vakakomborera Ribheka vachiti, “Dai iwe mwana wedu ukava amai vamazana akazanirana avanhu! Zvizvarwa zvako ngazvikurire maguta avavengi vazvo.”" 
Genesis24:61 Ribheka navasikana vake vaimushandira vakagadzirira zvokusumuka, vakatasva ngamera dzavo, vakaenda nomurume uye vachimutevera. Muranda uyu ndiko kutora kwaakaita Ribheka akabva aenda zvake." 
Genesis24:62 Ipapo Isaki akanga achangotama kuBheerirahairoi, ava kugara kuNegevhu." 
Genesis24:63 Ava manheru, Isaki akaenda musango achimbondoti avarairwe zvake achifunga. Akasumudza musoro akaona ngamera dzichiuya." 
Genesis24:64 Ribheka akati tarisei, paakaonawo Isaki akabva akurumidza kuburuka pangamera yake," 
Genesis24:65 ndokubvunza muranda uyu achiti, “Ko murume uyo ari kuuya nomusango umo kuzochingurana nesu ndiani?” Muranda akati, “Ndivatenzi vangu.” Ribheka akatora dhuku rake akazvifukidza kumeso." 
Genesis24:66 Muranda uyu akaudza Isaki zvose zvaakanga aita. 
Genesis24:67 Isaki akaunza Ribheka mutendhe rakanga riri raSara amai vake. Akatora Ribheka akava mukadzi wake. Isaki akamuda. Saka ndiko kunyaradzwa kwaakaitwa mushure mokufa kwaamai vake Sara. 
Genesis25:1 Abhurahamu akaroorazve mumwe mukadzi ainzi Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Ketura akamuberekera Zimurani naJokishani naMedhani, naMidhiani naIshabhagi naShua." 
Genesis25:3 Jokishani akabereka Shebha naDhedhani. Zvizvarwa zvokwaDhedhani ndivo vaAshurimu navaRetushimu navaReumimu. 
Genesis25:4 Vanakomana vaMidhiani vaiva vanaEfa naEferi naHanoki naAbhidha naEridha. Ava vose vaiva vana vaKetura. 
Genesis25:5 Abhurahamu akapa Isaki zvose zvaakanga anazvo. 
Genesis25:6 Asi iye achiri mupenyu akapa zvipo vamwe vanakomana vake vaakabereka navamwe vakadzi, akavati vabve pana Isaki mwanakomana wake, vaende kunyika dziri kumabvazuva." 
Genesis25:7 Iri ndiro zera rakasvitswa naAbhurahamu, akagara panyika zana namakumi manomwe amakore ana makore mashanu." 
Genesis25:8 Abhurahamu akanyatsochembera zvake zvokugutsikanawo ndokubva azoenda zvake kwakaenda vamwe vokwake. 
Genesis25:9 Isaki naIshimaeri vanakomana vake vakamuviga mubako reMakipera panzvimbo yaiva yaEfuroni mwanakomana waZohari, muHiti nechokumabvazuva kweMamure." 
Genesis25:10 Ndiyo nzvimbo yakatengwa naAbhurahamu kuna Efuroni muHiti. Abhurahamu nomudzimai wake Sara ndipo pavakavigwa ipapo. 
Genesis25:11 Mushure mokufa kwaAbhurahamu, Mwari wakakomborera Isaki mwanakomana wake. Isaki akambogara pedyo neBheerirahairoi." 
Genesis25:12 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvokwaIshimaeri mwanakomana waAbhurahamu naHagari muIjipiti uya aiva muranda waSara. 
Genesis25:13 Haanoi mazita avanakomana vavaIshimaeri sokutevedzana kwavo: kwaiti dangwe ravo Nebhayoti tevere Kedhari naAdhibhieri naMibhusamu," 
Genesis25:14 kwouya Mishima naDhuma naMasa," 
Genesis25:15 kwoti Hadhadhi naTema naJeturi, kwozoti Nafishi naKedhima." 
Genesis25:16 Ivava ndivo vanakomana vaIshimaeri uyewo iwaya ndiwo mazita ematunhu avo nemisha yavo, vari vakuru vakuru gumi navaviri namamiriro akaita madzinza avo." 
Genesis25:17 Makore oupenyu hwaIshimaeri ndeaya, akagara zana namakumi matatu amakore ana makore manomwe zvoupenyu zvakazomuperera akafa ndokuzoenda zvake kwakaenda vamwe vokwake." 
Genesis25:18 Vezvizvarwa zvokwaIshimaeri vaigara munyika inobvira paHavhira ichindosvika kuShuru pakatarisana neIjipiti takananga kuAsiria. Asi vaigara kure nehama dzavo vasingawirirane nehama dzavo. 
Genesis25:19 Heinoi nhoroondo yemhuri yaIsaki mwanakomana waAbhurahamu. Abhurahamu akabereka Isaki. 
Genesis25:20 Isaki akanga ava namakore makumi mana panguva yaakaroora Ribheka mwanasikana waBhetueri worudzi rwavaAramu wokuPadhaniaramu, hanzvadzi yaRabhani muAramu." 
Genesis25:21 Isaki akanamata kuna Tenzi achikumbirira mudzimai wake Ribheka nokuti akanga asina mbereko. Tenzi akanzwa chichemo chake, ndokubva mudzimai wake Ribheka ava napamuviri." 
Genesis25:22 Zvino vana vaikikiridzana munhumbu make, ndokubva ati, “Kana zvichidai zvichandisvitsa kupiko?” Saka akaenda kundonzwa kuna Tenzi." 
Genesis25:23 Tenzi akamuti, “Munhumbu mako mune ndudzi mbiri dzavanhu. Uchasununguka ndudzi dzavanhu mbiri dzichagara dzakamukirana. Rumwe rwacho ruchange rune simba kupfuura rumwe. Mukoma achashandira munun'una.”" 
Genesis25:24 Kuzoti nguva yokusununguka kwake yasvika akapona vana vaviri, mapatya." 
Genesis25:25 Wokutanga akabuda akatsvukuruka, muviri wake wose wakati mvere tsvete, naizvozvo akatumidzwa zita rokuti Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Ndokuzobudawo munun'una wake akabata chitsitsinho chaEsau, naizvozvo akatumidzwa zita rokuti Jakobho. Isaki akanga ava namakore makumi matanhatu paakabereka vana ivava." 
Genesis25:27 Vakomana ava vakakura, Esau akava hombarume yokuvhima, munhu wokugara musango; Jakobho ari munhu akanyarara aida zvake zvokugara pamba." 
Genesis25:28 Isaki aida Esau nokuti aimuvhimira nyama, asi Ribheka aida Jakobho." 
Genesis25:29 Rimwe zuva Jakobho akati achibika rupiza Esau ndokudzoka achibva musango aziya nenzara. 
Genesis25:30 Esau akati kuna Jakobho, “Dondipawo zvawabika zvakatsvukirira izvo ndidye nokuti ndaziya nenzara!” (Ndosaka akatumidzwa zita rokuti Edhomu)." 
Genesis25:31 Jakobho akati, “Tanga wanditengesera udangwe hwako!”" 
Genesis25:32 Esau ndokuti, “Ini ndava kufa nenzara kudai, ko udangwe hungandibatsirei?”" 
Genesis25:33 Jakobho akati, “Tanga wapika izvozvo kwandiri nhasi uno. Naizvozvo Esau akapika akabva atengesera Jakobho udangwe hwake." 
Genesis25:34 Jakobho akapa Esau chingwa norupiza rwenyemba. Akadya akanwa akasumuka oenda zvake, nokudaro Esau akazvikanganisira udangwe hwake.”" 
Genesis26:1 Zvino munyika imomo makaita nzara isati iri nzara iya yakamboitika pamazuva aAbhurahamu. Isaki akaenda kuGerari, kuna Abhimereki mambo wavaFirisitia." 
Genesis26:2 Tenzi akazviratidza kwaari akati, “Usadzike kuIjipiti, asi gara munyika yandichakuudza." 
Genesis26:3 Chimbogara zvako munyika ino. Ini ndichava newe. Ndichakukomborera. Ndichakupa nyika idzi dzose iwe navana vako. Ndichaita zviya zvandakapika kuna Abhurahamu, baba vako." 
Genesis26:4 Ndichaita kuti vana vako vawande senyenyedzi dzedenga. Ndichavapa nyika idzi dzose. Vana vako vachawanisawo ndudzi dzose dzavanhu vapasi pano makomborero," 
Genesis26:5 nokuti Abhurahamu aiteerera zvandaireva, aiita zvose zvandaimutemera kuita achitevedza zvirongwa zvangu, achichengetawo mirao yangu nokuteerera mitemo yangu.”" 
Genesis26:6 Saizvozvo Isaki akagara kuGerari. 
Genesis26:7 Vanhu venyika iyoyo vakamubvunza nezvomukadzi wake, iye akati, “Ihanzvadzi yangu.” Izvozvo aitya kutaura kuti mudzimai wangu achiti zvimwe vanhu venyika ino vangandiuraye pamusana paRibheka nokuti akanga aine chimiro chakanaka kwazvo." 
Genesis26:8 Kuzoti Isaki agarapo nguva ndefu, Abhimereki mambo wavaFirisitia akatarisa napahwindo akaona Isaki achibata-bata Ribheka mudzimai wake." 
Genesis26:9 Ipapo Abhimereki akadaidza Isaki akati, “Ko zvaari mukadzi wako wani! Wakagotaurirei kuti, ‘Ihanzvadzi yangu.’ ” Isaki ndokuti, “Ndaiti zvimwe ndingaurayiwe pamusana pake.”" 
Genesis26:10 Abhimereki akati, “Zvino, ndochii ichochi chawakatiitira ipapa? Mumwe munhu aigona kunge akatadza nomudzimai wako iwe wotiparisa mhosva.”" 
Genesis26:11 Naizvozvo Abhimereki akayambira vanhu vake vose achiti, “Kuwana ane chakaipa chaanoita kune murume uyu, kana mudzimai wake anofanira kuurayiwa.”" 
Genesis26:12 Isaki akarima mbesa munyika iyoyo, gore iroro akakohwa mbesa dzakawanda kwazvo, Tenzi akamukomborera" 
Genesis26:13 akava mupfumi. Akaramba achibudirira kudzamara ava noupfumi hwakawanda. 
Genesis26:14 Akanga ano upfumi hwemombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo navaranda vazhinji zvokuti vaFirisitia vakamuitira shanje. 
Genesis26:15 VaFirisitia vakafushira vakazadza namavhu matsime ose akanga acherwa navaranda vababa wavo Abhurahamu, akacherwa Abhurahamu achiri mupenyu." 
Genesis26:16 Abhimereki akataurira Isaki kuti, “Chibvai zvenyu medu muno nokuti mava nesimba kupinda isu.”" 
Genesis26:17 Naizvozvo Isaki akatamapo akandodzika matendhe ake mubani reGerari, akamboita musha wake ipapo." 
Genesis26:18 Isaki akafukunura matsime emvura akanga acherwa pamazuva ababa wake Abhurahamu, nokuti Abhurahamu paakafa vaFirisitia vakabva vaafushira. Akaatumidzazve mazita aakanga akatumidzwa nababa wake." 
Genesis26:19 Varanda vaIsaki vakati vachichera mubani umu, vakawanawo tsime remvura yechitubu." 
Genesis26:20 Vafudzi vomuGerari vakaitirana nharo navafudzi vaIsaki vachiti, “Mvura iyi ndeyedu.” Saka Isaki akatumidza tsime irori zita rokuti, “Nharo,” nokuti vakanga vaitirana nharo navo." 
Genesis26:21 Varanda vaIsaki vakacherazve rimwe tsime. Vakaitirana nharo zvakare navafudzi vomuGerari pamusoro paro, Isaki akaritumidza zita rokuti, “Ruvengo.”" 
Genesis26:22 Isaki akazobvapo akandocherazve rimwe tsime. Ipapo havana kuzomboitirana nharo. Akabva aritumidza zita rokuti, “Ziendanakuenda,” vachiti, “Zvino Tenzi atipa nzvimbo huru kuti tigova vazhinji munyika ino.”" 
Genesis26:23 Zvino Isaki akabvapo akatamira kuBheerishebha. 
Genesis26:24 Tenzi akazviratidza kwaari usiku ihwohwo akati, “Ndini Mwari waAbhurahamu baba vako. Usatye zvako nokuti ndinewe. Ndichakukomborera ndichiita kuti vana vako vawande kwazvo pamusana paAbhurahamu muranda wangu.”" 
Genesis26:25 Isaki akavaka atari ipapo akanamata Tenzi ndokubva adzika tendhe yake ipapo. Varanda vake vakacherapo tsime. 
Genesis26:26 Ipapo Abhimereki nejinda rake Ahuzati naPikori mukuru wehondo yake vakabva Gerari vakaenda kuna Isaki. 
Genesis26:27 Isaki akavati, “Mavingeiko kuno? Handiti munondivenga imi. Inga makandidzinga wani kwenyu!”" 
Genesis26:28 Ivo ndokuti, “Tanyatsoona kuti Tenzi anewe. Saka tanga tafunga kuti dai paitwa chibvumirano pakati pedu newe, tiite chitenderano" 
Genesis26:29 chokuti ugorega kutiitira zvakaipa. Sezvatakaita isu, hatina chatakakutadzira asi takakuitira zvakanaka tikazotiwo uende zvako zvakanaka. Nhasi iwe wava nechikomborero chaTenzi.”" 
Genesis26:30 Isaki akavaitira mabiko vakadya vakanwa. 
Genesis26:31 Vakafumomuka vakaita chibvumirano. Isaki akavaperekedza ndokuenda zvavo norugare. 
Genesis26:32 Nomusi iwoyo varanda vaIsaki vakauya vakamuudza nezvetsime ravakanga vachera. Vakati, “Tabata mvura.”" 
Genesis26:33 Isaki akatumidza tsime iri zita rokuti, “Mhiko.” Naizvozvo zita reguta iroro rinonzi Bheerishebha kusvikira pari nhasi." 
Genesis26:34 Esau paakanga ava namakore makumi mana, akaroora vakadzi vechiHiti kwaiti Judhisi mwana waBheeri naBhasimati mwana waEroni." 
Genesis26:35 Vakadzi vacho vaifurusa Isaki naRibheka. 
Genesis27:1 Kuzoti Isaki ava harahwa, maziso ake ava kuonera madzerere asisaone akadaidza Esau dangwe rake akamuti, “Mwanangu!” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano baba!”" 
Genesis27:2 Vakati, “Ini ndakwegura, handizivi zuva rokufa kwangu." 
Genesis27:3 Zvino chitora zvombo zvako zvokuvhimisa, zvinoti mukutu nemiseve yako uende musango kundondivhimira nyama." 
Genesis27:4 Ugondigadzirira chokudya chakanaka chomwoyo wangu chaicho, undiigire ndidye, ndigokukomborera ndisati ndafa.”" 
Genesis27:5 Ribheka akanga akateerera Isaki achitaura naEsau mwanakomana wake. Esau paakaenda musango kundovhima," 
Genesis27:6 Ribheka akataurira Jakobho mwanakomana wake vachiti, “Ndanzwa baba vako vachitaura naEsau mukoma wako vachiti," 
Genesis27:7 ‘Ndiigire nyama yemhuka ugondigadzirira zvokudya zvakanaka, ndidye ndikupe chikomborero chaTenzi ndisati ndafa.’" 
Genesis27:8 Zvino, mwanangu chiteerera zvandava kukuudza." 
Genesis27:9 Enda kudanga undiigire mbudzana mbiri dzakakora ndibikire baba vako chokudya chakanaka chepamwoyo wavo chaicho. 
Genesis27:10 Ugoenda nazvo kuna baba vako, vadye vakukomborere vasati vafa.”" 
Genesis27:11 Jakobho akapindura amai vake Ribheka achiti, “Mukoma wangu Esau, munhu ane mvere muviri wose, asi ini handina mvere." 
Genesis27:12 Zvimwe baba vachabata muviri wangu vakazviziva kuti ndiri kuvanyengedza vakazoti rushambwa rundiwire ini ndanga ndichiti ndikomborerwe.” 
Genesis27:13 Asi amai vake vakati, “Mwanangu rushambwa rwacho ngaruwire inini. Chako iwe kuteerera zvandiri kureva, uende undodzitora uuye nadzo kwandiri.”" 
Genesis27:14 Jakobho akaenda akandodzibata, akauya nadzo kuna amai vake. Amai vake vakabikira baba vake chokudya chakanaka chapamwoyo pavo chaicho." 
Genesis27:15 Ribheka akatora hanzu dzakaisvonaka dzaEsau mwanakomana wake mukuru dzaaiva nadzo mumba, akadzipfekedza Jakobho munun'una wake." 
Genesis27:16 Akapfekedza Jakobho matehwe embudzana dziye mumaoko nomumutsipa make makanga musina mvere. 
Genesis27:17 Ribheka akatora zvokudya zvakanaka nechingwa zvaakanga abika, akapa Jakobho." 
Genesis27:18 Jakobho akaenda kuna baba vake akati, “Baba!” Ivo vakati, “Mwanangu! Ko ndiwe aniko mwanangu?”" 
Genesis27:19 Jakobho ndokuti, “Ndini dangwe renyu Esau ndaita zvamandiudza. Mukai zvenyu muite zvokugara mudye nyama yemhuka yandauya nayo, mundikomborere.”" 
Genesis27:20 Isaki akati, “Wakurumidza nei kuiwana mwanangu?” Jakobho ndokuti, “Ndaiwaniswa naTenzi, Mwari wenyu.”" 
Genesis27:21 Isaki akataurira Jakobho achiti, “Chimboswedera kuno mwanangu, ndibate muviri wako ndinzwe kana uriwe mwana wangu Esau zvechokwadi kana kuti kwete.”" 
Genesis27:22 Jakobho akaswedera pana baba vake Isaki. Ivo vakabata muviri wake vakati, “Izwi nderaJakobho asi maoko ndeaEsau.”" 
Genesis27:23 Isaki haana kuziva kuti ndiJakobho nokuti maoko ake akanga ava nemvere, sezvakanga zvakaita maoko omukoma wake Esau, akamukomborera." 
Genesis27:24 Akati, “Saka ndiwe here mwana wangu Esau?”" 
Genesis27:25 Akati, “Ndini.” Isaki akati, “Chindipa nyama yemhuka yawabaya, ndidye ndikukomborere.” Jakobho akavapa vakadya, akavapawo waini vakanwira zvavo." 
Genesis27:26 Baba vake Isaki vakamuti, “Chiswedera kuno unditsvode mwanangu.”" 
Genesis27:27 Akaswedera akavatsvoda. Isaki akanzwa kunhuwirira kwehanzu dzake akamupa chikomborero achiti, “Kunhuwirira kwemwana wangu kwakaita sokunhuwirira kwesango rakakomborerwa naTenzi." 
Genesis27:28 Mwari ngaakuunzire dova rokudenga, ngaanyatsokurisa zvirimwa zvako, akupe mbesanwa dzakawanda newaini." 
Genesis27:29 Ndudzi dzose ngadzikushandire, marudzi ose avanhu akugwadamire uve mutongi wehama dzako, vana vaamai vako vakuombere. Vanenge vati uwirwe norushambwa, rushambwa ngaruwire ivo, vakomborerwewo vanoti iwe ukomborerwe.”" 
Genesis27:30 Zvakaitika kuti Isaki achangopedza kukomborera Jakobho, iye Jakobho achangoti ibvei pana baba vake, Esau mukoma wake ndokubva atiwo vhu kusvikawo achibva kundovhima." 
Genesis27:31 Akabikawo zvokudya zvinonaka, akaenda nazvo kuna baba vake akasvikoti, “Baba, mukai muite zvokugara, mudye nyama yemhuka yandauya nayo, mugondikomborera.”" 
Genesis27:32 Baba vake, Isaki ndokumuti, “Ndiwe ani?” Akati, “Ndini Esau mwana wenyu wedangwe.”" 
Genesis27:33 Isaki akadedera zvikuru akati, “Ko ndianiko ambondivhimira nyama akauya nayo kwandiri ndikaidya yose usati wauya, ndikamupa chikomborero? Iyeyo ndiye atokomborerwa.”" 
Genesis27:34 Esau akati achinzwa zvaitaurwa nababa vake, akazhamba kuchema achishungurudzika achiti, “Baba neniwo ndikomborereiwo.”" 
Genesis27:35 Asi ivo vakati, “munun'una wako andinyengedza akabva atora chikomborero chako.”" 
Genesis27:36 Esau akati, “Handiti vakagona vakamutumidza zita rokuti Jakobho nokuti anditorera nzvimbo yangu ruviri rwese. Akanditorera udangwe hwangu, zvino hoyo watora chikomborero changu.” Akatizve, “Ko hamuna kundisiyirawo here chimwe chikomborero?”" 
Genesis27:37 Isaki ndokupindura Esau achiti, “Chitarisa uoneka, ndamuita kuti ave mutongi wako. Hama dzake dzose ndadziita kuti dzive varanda vake, ndikamupawo chikomborero chembesanwa newaini. Zvino chii chasara ipapa chandingakuitirewo mwanangu.”" 
Genesis27:38 Esau ndokupindura baba vake achiti, “Nhai baba, ko munongova nechikomborero chimwechete chete here? Baba neniwo ndipeiwo chikomborero!” Esau akabva achema zvinosiririsa." 
Genesis27:39 Baba vake Isaki ndokuti, “Musha wako uchava kure noupfumi hwenyika, uri kure kure nedova rinobva kumusoro kudenga." 
Genesis27:40 Zvokubatirana mapfumo navamwe vako, ndohuchagara huri upenyu hwako. Uchava muranda womunun'una wako. Asi paanongokuti tupfunu chete uchatyora joko rake pamutsipa wako.”" 
Genesis27:41 Esau akavenga Jakobho pamusana pechikomborero chaakanga apiwa nababa vake. Asi nechomumwoyo Esau akati, “Mazuva okufa kwababa vangu ava pedyo, tikapedza kuvachema ndichauraya munun'una wangu Jakobho.”" 
Genesis27:42 Ribheka paakanzwa zvairongwa naEsau mwanakomana wake mukuru akadaidza Jakobho mwanakomana wake muduku akati kwaari, “Chionaka iwe, mukoma wako Esau ari kuronga zvokukuuraya achitsividza." 
Genesis27:43 Saka mwanangu chinzwa zvandinokuudza. Chisimuka pano uende kuHarani kuhanzvadzi yangu Rabhani. 
Genesis27:44 Ugare ikoko mazuva akati kuti," 
Genesis27:45 kusvikira hasha dzomukoma wako dzaserera, kudzamara mukoma wako asisiri kukushatirirwa, akanganwa zvawakamuitira. Ndipo pandichazotumira munhu kuzokutora ikoko. Handidi ini kurasikirwa navanhu vaviri pamusi mumwechete.”" 
Genesis27:46 Ribheka akati kuna Isaki, “Vakadzi vechiHiti vandakaroorerwa naEsau vandipfuvisa. Kana Jakobhowo akaroora mukadzi wechiHiti savava ava kuvanasikana vomunyika muno zviri nani zvangu kuti ndife.”" 
Genesis28:1 Isaki akadaidza Jakobho akamukomborera ndokumuyambira achiti, “Usaroore mukadzi wechiKanani." 
Genesis28:2 Sumuka uende kuMesopotamia kumusha kwaBhetueri, baba vaamai vako undotsvaka musikana mumhuri yaRabhani, hanzvadzi yaamai vako uroore." 
Genesis28:3 Iye Aripagomo ngaakukomborere akupe vana vazhinji, vawande zvokuti vave madzinza namadzinza avanhu." 
Genesis28:4 Ngaakupe chikomborero chaAbhurahamu, iwe nezvizvarwa zvako chokuti uve muridzi wenyika ino yatiri kumboti apa garei tame apa garei yakapiwa Abhurahamu naMwari!”" 
Genesis28:5 Naizvozvo Isaki akaendesa Jakobho kuMesopotamia kuhanzvadzi yaRibheka, amai vaJakobho naEsau, kwaRabhani mwanakomana waBhetueri muAramu." 
Genesis28:6 Esau akazvinzwa kuti Isaki akakomborera Jakobho, akamuendesa kuMesopotamia kundoroora mukadzi ikoko. Akanzwawo kuti paakamukomborera akamuti, “Usaroore mukadzi wechiKanani.”" 
Genesis28:7 Akazvizivawo kuti Jakobho akanga ateerera baba naamai vake akaenda kuMesopotamia. 
Genesis28:8 Ipapo Esau akazviziva kuti baba vake Isaki havadi vakadzi vechiKanani," 
Genesis28:9 akabva aenda kuna Ishimaeri mwanakomana waAbhurahamu, akandoroora Maharati mwana waIshimaeri, hanzvadzi yaNebhayoti achiwedzera pavakadzi vaakanga anavo." 
Genesis28:10 Jakobho akapinda murwendo rwake rwokuenda kuHarani achibva kuBheerishebha. 
Genesis28:11 Akadokerwa nezuva ave pane imwe nzvimbo akararapo. Ava kurara akatora rimwe ibwe repo akariita mutsago ndokukotsira zvake. 
Genesis28:12 Akarota achiona manera akanga akamiswa panyika achisvika kudenga, vatumwa vaMwari vachiashandisa kukwira kudenga nokuburuka pasi." 
Genesis28:13 Akaonawo Tenzi amire kumusoro kwamanera acho achiti, “Ndini Tenzi, Mwari waAbhurahamu vasekuru vako naMwari waIsaki. Nyika iyoyi yaurere, ndichaipa kwauri navana vako." 
Genesis28:14 Vana vako vachawanda seguruva renyika, muchatekeshera kumadokero nokumabvazuva nokuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba. Pamusana pako iwe navana vako, mhuri dzapasi pose dzichawaniswa makomborero." 
Genesis28:15 Chinzwa, ndichava newe ndichikuchengeta kwose kwaunenge uri. Ndichakudzosera kunyika ino nokuti handizombosiyana newe kusvikira ndaita zvandakuudza izvi.”" 
Genesis28:16 Jakobho akapepuka muhope akati, “Zvechokwadi Tenzi ari panzvimbo ino asi ini ndanga ndisingazvizivi.”" 
Genesis28:17 Akabva atya ndokuti, “Inga nzvimbo ino inoera! Imba yaMwari chete, iwoyu ndomusuo wedenga.”" 
Genesis28:18 Jakobho akafumomuka, akatora ibwe raakanga akatsamira ndokurimisa kuti rive ibwe rechiyeuchidzo, ndokubva adira mafuta pamusoro paro." 
Genesis28:19 Akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rokuti Bhetieri, asi kare guta iroro raimbonzi Ruzi." 
Genesis28:20 Jakobho ndokupika nemhiko achiti, “Kana Mwari akava neni akandichengeta parwendo rwangu rwandiri kuenda achindipa chokudya nechokupfeka," 
Genesis28:21 ndichizodzokerazve kumusha kwababa vangu zvakanaka, Tenzi achava Mwari wangu." 
Genesis28:22 Paibwe iri randamisa pano kuti rive ibwe rechiyeuchidzo pachava imba yaMwari. Pazvinhu zvose zvamuchandipa ndichabvisa chegumi chazvo ndichikupai.” 
Genesis29:1 Jakobho akabvapo osumudzira rwendo rwake rwokuenda kunyika yavanhu vokumabvazuva. 
Genesis29:2 Akatarisa akaona tsime musango ndiye onei matanga matatu ehwai dzakanga dzirerepo zvadzo, ndopavainwisa zvipfuwo zvavo mvura. Pamuromo wetsime racho pakanga pane ibwe guru kwazvo." 
Genesis29:3 Vafudzi vaiti kana zvipfuwo zvavapo zvose, vaikungurutsa ibwe riya pamuromo wetsime, vopa hwai dzavo mvura yokunwa, vozodzosera ibwe riya pakare pamuromo wetsime." 
Genesis29:4 Jakobho akabvunza vafudzi kuti, “Ko, munobva kupiko nhai hama dzangu?” Vakati, “Tinobva kuHarani.”" 
Genesis29:5 Jakobho ndokuti, “Ko munozivawo here Rabhani mwana wokwaNahori?” Ivo vakati, “Tinomuziva.”" 
Genesis29:6 Akati kwavari, “Akadii zvake?” Ivo vakati, “Aripo zvake! Mwanasikana wake, Rakeri ndiye uyo ari kuuya nehwai uyo!”" 
Genesis29:7 Jakobho akati, “Ko zvaachiri masikati wani! Inga nguva yokukokorodza nokuunganidza zvipfuwo haisati yakwana! Ko madii kupa hwai mvura maenda nadzo kumbondodzifudzazve?”" 
Genesis29:8 Vafudzi vakati, “Hatingadzipe mvura kunze kwokunge mamwe matanga ose aungana, ibwe rapamuromo wetsime rakungurutswa. Ndopatinopa hwai dzedu mvura yokunwa.”" 
Genesis29:9 Achingunotaura kudaro navarume vaye, Rakeri akasvika nehwai dzababa vake nokuti ndiye aiva mufudzi wadzo." 
Genesis29:10 Jakobho akati achiona Rakeri mwana waRabhani, hanzvadzi yaamai vake, nehwai dzaRabhani sekuru vake, akakungurutsa ibwe pamuromo wetsime, ndokupa hwai dzasekuru vake mvura yokunwa." 
Genesis29:11 Jakobho akatsvoda Rakeri achikwazisana naye, akaburitsa misodzi yokufara." 
Genesis29:12 Akataurira Rakeri kuti, “Ini ndiri muzukuru wababa wako. Ndiri mwana waRibheka.” Rakeri ndokubva amhanyira kundoudza baba vake." 
Genesis29:13 Rabhani paakanzwa nezvaJakobho mwana wehanzvadzi yake akamhanyira kundomuchingura, akasvikomumbundira, akamutsvoda ndokuenda naye kumba kwake. Jakobho akarondedzera Rabhani zvinhu izvozvi zvose." 
Genesis29:14 Rabhani ndokuti, “Iwe uri hama yangu chaiyo! Tiri veropa rimwe chete!” Jakobho akagara nasekuru wake mwedzi wose." 
Genesis29:15 Rabhani akazoti kuna Jakobho, “Kunyange zvazvo uri hama yangu, ndopaungandishandire here pasina chaunowana? Chindiudza kuti ndokupawo pakadii.”" 
Genesis29:16 Zvino Rabhani aiva navanasikana vake vaviri, mukuru ainzi Rea, muduku achinzi Rakeri." 
Genesis29:17 Rea aiva akatsvetsvereka maziso, asi Rakeri aiva tsvarakadenga yomusikana kunaka aino uso hunoyevedza." 
Genesis29:18 Jakobho aida Rakeri saka akati, “Ndichagara makore manomwe ndichiitira Rakeri mwanasikana wenyu muduku ugariri.”" 
Genesis29:19 Rabhani ndokuti, “Zviri nani kuti ndimupe zvangu kwauri pane kumupa kune mumwewo murume.”" 
Genesis29:20 Saka Jakobho akashanda makore manomwe achiitira Rakeri ugariri. Pamusana pokuti aimuda, Jakobho akaona makore acho semazuva mashomanana." 
Genesis29:21 Jakobho akazoti kuna Rabhani, “Chindipaiwo mukadzi wangu ndichipinda naye mumba nokuti mazuva atakatarirana akwana.”" 
Genesis29:22 Rabhani akaita mabiko ndokukoka vanhu vomunharaunda iyoyo. 
Genesis29:23 Akati ava manheru, Rabhani akaenda naRea akandomupereka kuna Jakobho akabva azivana naye." 
Genesis29:24 Rabhani akapa muranda wake wechikadzi ainzi Ziripa kuna Rea kuti ave muranda wake. 
Genesis29:25 Kuzoti kwaedza, Jakobho akatarisa akaona kuti ndiRea. Jakobho akati kuna Rabhani, “Ko ndicho chiiko ichochi chamandiitira? Handiti Rakeri ndiye wandakaitira ugariri? Zvino mandinyengedzerei kudai?”" 
Genesis29:26 Rabhani ndokuti, “Kuno kwedu hazviitwe kuti muduku aroorwe dangwe richigere." 
Genesis29:27 Chimbopedza zvako vhiki remabiko uina Rea, tigozoti tokupa Rakeri. Asi ndokunge wabvuma zvokumushandira mamwe makore manomwe.”" 
Genesis29:28 Jakobho akabvuma akapedza svondo iroro naRea, Rabhani akazomupawo Rakeri kuti ave mudzimai wake." 
Genesis29:29 Rabhani akatora muranda wake wechikadzi ainzi Bhiriha akapa kuna Rakeri kuti ave muranda wake. 
Genesis29:30 Jakobho akazivanawo naRakeri. Zvakanga zviripo chaizvo ndezvokuti aida Rakeri kupinda Rea ndokusaka akashandira Rabhani kwamamwe makore manomwe zvakare. 
Genesis29:31 Tenzi akaona kuti Rea aivengwa ndokubva amupa mbereko, asi Rakeri akanga asina mbereko." 
Genesis29:32 Rea akava napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana akamutumidza zita rokuti Rubheni achiti, “Tenzi aonawo nhamo yangu! Zvino murume wangu achandidawo kwazvo!”" 
Genesis29:33 Rea akavazve napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana akati, “Tenzi anzwa kuti ndinovengwa saka andipazve mwana mukomana uyu.” Akamutumidza zita rokuti Simeoni." 
Genesis29:34 Rea akava napamuviri zvakare akabereka mwana mukomana akati, “Rwendo runo murume wangu achandida nokuti ndamuberekera vana vakomana ava vatatu.” Saka vakamutumidza zita rokuti Revhi." 
Genesis29:35 Rea akavazve napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana akati, “Zvino ndochirumbidza Tenzi.” Saka akamutumidza zita rokuti Judha. Ndokubva amira kubereka." 
Genesis30:1 Rakeri paakaona kuti haasi kuberekera Jakobho vana, akaitira mukoma wake shanje. Akanyunyutira Jakobho achiti, “Ndipeiwo mwana. Kana ukasandipa zviri nani kuti ndife zvangu!”" 
Genesis30:2 Jakobho akashatirirwa Rakeri akati, “Ko ndini ndava kutora nzvimbo yaMwari here akaita kuti ushaye mbereko?”" 
Genesis30:3 Rakeri akati, “Hoyuka Bhiriha muranda wangu pindai naye mumba zvako, andiberekere vana, ndiumbewo mhuri.”" 
Genesis30:4 Saizvozvo Rakeri akapa Jakobho muranda wake wechikadzi, Bhiriha kuti ave mukadzi wake Jakobho akapinda naye mumba." 
Genesis30:5 Bhiriha akava napamuviri ndokuberekera Jakobho mwana mukomana. 
Genesis30:6 Rakeri akati, “Mwari andiitira ruenzaniso, anzwa chichemo changu akandipawo mwana mukomana.” Naizvozvo akamutumidza zita rokuti Dhani." 
Genesis30:7 Bhiriha muranda waRakeri akavazve napamuviri ndokuberekera Jakobho mwana mukomana wechipiri. 
Genesis30:8 Ipapo Rakeri akati, “Ndakwikwidzana nomukoma wangu, ndikakunda.” Akabva amutumidza zita rokuti Nafutari." 
Genesis30:9 Rea paakaona kuti amira kubereka akapa Jakobho muranda wake Ziripa kuti ave mukadzi wake. 
Genesis30:10 Ziripa, muranda waRea akaberekera Jakobho mwana mukomana." 
Genesis30:11 Rea akati, “Makorokoto! Ndaita rombo rakanaka!” Akamutumidza zita rokuti Gadhi." 
Genesis30:12 Ziripa, muranda waRea akaberekera Jakobho mwana mukomana wechipiri." 
Genesis30:13 Rea akati, “Aiwa ndazofara kwazvo! Pamusana peizvi vakadzi vachanditi, ‘Zvako mai wakakomborerwa.’ ” Naizvozvo akamutumidza zita rokuti Asheru." 
Genesis30:14 Rimwe zuva panguva yokukohwa koroni, Rubheni akandotanha michero musango akauya nayo kuna amai vake Rea. Rakeri vakati kuna Rea, “Dondipaiwo michero yomwana wako.”" 
Genesis30:15 Rea akati, “Heya, zvawakanditorera murume wangu hazvina kukugutsa nhai! Zvino wodazve kunditorera michero yomwana wangu!” Rakeri akati, “Kana ukandipa michero yomwana wako ungatorane zvako nomurume kwousiku hwanhasi.”" 
Genesis30:16 Ava manheru, Jakobho paakauya achibva kumafuro, Rea akandomutambira akati, “Nhasi unofanira kuuya kumba kwangu nokuti ndakubvisira muripo wemichero yomwana wangu.” Jakobho akabva andorara kwaRea usiku ihwohwo." 
Genesis30:17 Mwari akanzwa chichemo chaRea akabva abata pamuviri ndokubereka mwana mukomana wechishanu. 
Genesis30:18 Rea akati, “Mwari andipa mubayiro wangu nokuti ndakapa murume wangu muranda wangu.” Nezvo akamutumidza zita rokuti Isakari." 
Genesis30:19 Rea akava napamuviri zvakare akabereka mwana mukomana wechitanhatu. 
Genesis30:20 Rea akati, “Mwari andipa chipo chakanaka. Rwendo runo murume wangu ndiye ava kuzogara neni zvino, nokuti ndamuberekera majaya matanhatu.” Saka akamutumidza zita rokuti Zebhuruni." 
Genesis30:21 Rea akazobereka mwana musikana akamutumidza zita rokuti Dhina. 
Genesis30:22 Mwari akarangarirawo Rakeri. Mwari akanzwa munamato wake ndokubva amupawo mbereko. 
Genesis30:23 Rakeri akava napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana akati, “Mwari abvisa kuzvidzwa kwangu.”" 
Genesis30:24 Akamutumidza zita rokuti Josefi achiti, “Dai Tenzi akandipazve mumwe mwana mukomana!”" 
Genesis30:25 Rakeri paakabereka Josefi, Jakobho akati kuna Rabhani, “Chiregai ndichidzokera kumusha kwangu, kunyika kwangu." 
Genesis30:26 Saka chindipai zvenyu madzimai angu andakaitira ugariri, navana vangu, ndiende nokuti imi munoziva kushanda kwandakakuitirai.”" 
Genesis30:27 Asi Rabhani akamuti, “Ndapota zvangu, dai wagara. Ndakanyatsoongorora ndikaona kuti, Tenzi akandikomborera pamusana pako." 
Genesis30:28 Reva zvako mubayiro waunoda kuti ndipote ndichikupa.” 
Genesis30:29 Jakobho akati, “Imi munoziva kukushandirai kwandakaita, munozivawo machengetero andakaita zvipfuwo zvenyu." 
Genesis30:30 Pandakasvika pano maiva nezvipfuwo zvishomanana, zvikazowanda kwazvo. Tenzi akakukomborerai pose pandaibata. Ko munoti mhuri yangu ndichazoishandirawo rini?”" 
Genesis30:31 Rabhani ndokuti, “Zvino chii chandingakupe?” Jakobho akati, “Regai zvenyu kundipa chinhu. Kana mabvuma zvandinokukumbirai, ndiregei zvenyu ndichifudza zvipfuwo zvenyu." 
Genesis30:32 Ini ndichacherechedza zvipfuwo zvenyu nhasi, ndichitsaura hwai nehwayana dzina mavara mavara nedzina makamba makamba nenhema. Ndichatsaurawo mbudzi dzose dzina makamba makamba nedzina mavara mavara. Zvipfuwo izvozvo ndizvo zvingave mubayiro wangu." 
Genesis30:33 Pamunouya kuzoongorora mubayiro wangu muchazoziva kuti ndiri munhu akadii pakutendeka. Kana mukawana ndiine mbudzi zvayo isina mavara mavara kana makamba makamba zvawo, kunyange hwai isiri nhema munobva maziva kuti ndakukorovherai.”" 
Genesis30:34 Rabhani akati, “Zvakanaka, ngatiite zvawareva.”" 
Genesis30:35 Musi iwoyo, Rabhani akatsaura mbudzana nezvikotora nenhunzvi dzose dzembudzi dzakanga dzina mavara mavara nedzaiva namakamba makamba neyose zvayo yaiva nevara jena, akatsaurawo hwayana nhema dzose akapa vana vake kuti vadzichengete." 
Genesis30:36 Rabhani akati vana vake vabve pana Jakobho vaende kunzvimbo yerwendo rwamazuva matatu. Jakobho akasara achifudza zvipfuwo zvaRabhani zvakanga zvasara. 
Genesis30:37 Jakobho akatora tumapango tunyoro twomupopura nomuarimondi nomupureni, akakwatura makanda acho achiti apa kwaturei apa siyei apa kwaturei apa siyei, tuchisara twava nemitsetse mitsetse mitema nemichena." 
Genesis30:38 Akaisa tumapango twacho pedyo nemidziyo madzainwira mvura, patwaionekwa nezvipfuwo pazvaiuya kuzonwa mvura nokuti zvaiti zvikasvikapo, mikono yotandana nehadzi dzichibva dzaita mazamu." 
Genesis30:39 Zvino iyoyo yakanga iri nguva yokutandana kwezvipfuwo, saka zvipfuwo zvakaita mazamu zvichitarisa tumapango twuya zvakabereka vana vane mitsetse mitsetse, navana mavara mavara navana makamba makamba." 
Genesis30:40 Jakobho akatsaura hwayana, zvipfuwo zvose zvakasara akazviisa pazvo zvoga zvakatarisana nezvipfuwo zvaRabhani zvaiva nemitsetse mitsetse nezvakanga zviri zvitema. Ndokutanga kwakaita Jakobho kuita matanga ezvipfuwo zvavo pachavo vasisasanganise nedanga rezvipfuwo zvaRabhani." 
Genesis30:41 Kwaiti kana zvipfuwo zvakasimba zvabindura, Jakobho aitora tumapango tuya otuisa, pedyo nemidziyo yokunwira mvura iya, patwaionekwa nezvipfuwo kuti zviite zamu pakatarisana notumapango tuya." 
Genesis30:42 Asi kana zvipfuwo zvacho zvainge zviri ndonda, akanga asingatandarike tumapango twacho. Saka zvipfuwo zvakanga zvakaondoroka zvaiva zvaRabhani, asi zvakasimba zviri zvaJakobho." 
Genesis30:43 Naizvozvo Jakobho akava mupfumi, akava nezvipfuwo zvizhinji navaranda vechirume nevechikadzi nengamera namadhongi." 
Genesis31:1 Jakobho akanzwa vanakomana vaRabhani vachiti, “Jakobho akatora zvinhu zvose zvakanga zviri zvababa vedu. Upfumi hwose uhwu akahuwana pazvinhu zvaiva zvababa vedu.”" 
Genesis31:2 Jakobho akaonawo muuso kuti Rabhani akanga asisamufarire sapakutanga. 
Genesis31:3 Tenzi akataurira Jakobho kuti, “Chidzokera kunyika yamadzibaba ako, kunyika yokwako. Ini ndichava newe.”" 
Genesis31:4 Jakobho akatuma munhu kundodaidza Rakeri naRea kuti vauye kumafuro kwaiva nezvipfuwo zvake. 
Genesis31:5 Akavati, “Ndava kuona muuso hwababa venyu kuti havachandifarira sapakutanga. Asi Mwari wababa vangu anga achingova neni." 
Genesis31:6 Munozviziva kuti ini ndakashandira baba venyu nesimba rangu rose," 
Genesis31:7 kunyange zvakadaro ivo vakandinyengedza. Vakaramba vachisandura mubayiro wangu kagumi kagumi. Asi Mwari haana kuvabvumidza kuti vasvike pokunditsvata nokuti 
Genesis31:8 baba venyu pavaiti, ‘Zvipfuwo zvine makamba makamba zvichava mubayiro wako,’ zvipfuwo zvose zvaibva zvabereka vana vane makamba makamba. Pavaizotiwo, ‘Zvine mitsetse mitsetse ndizvo zvichava mubayiro wako,’ zvipfuwo zvose zvaibva zvabereka vana vaiva nemitsetse mitsetse." 
Genesis31:9 Nokudaro Mwari akatorera baba venyu zvipfuwo zvavo achindipa. 
Genesis31:10 “Nguva iya yokunge mikono yezvipfuwo yava kutanda hadzi, ndakarota ndichiona kuti mikono yazvo yakanga ichitanda hadzi yaiva ine mitsetse mitsetse namavara mavara namakamba makamba." 
Genesis31:11 Mukurota ikoko mutumwa waMwari akanditi, ‘Jakobho!’ Ini ndikati, ‘Ndiri pano!’" 
Genesis31:12 Iye akati, ‘Tarisa uone mikono yose yezvipfuwo iri kutanda hadzi ine mitsetse mitsetse namakamba makamba namavara mavara. Chikonzero ndechokuti ndakaona zvose zvauri kuitirwa naRabhani." 
Genesis31:13 Ndini Mwari wokuBhetieri kuya kwawakadira ibwe mafuta, ukaita mhiko kwandiri. Saka chirongedza ubve munyika ino udzokere kunyika yawakaberekerwa.’ ”" 
Genesis31:14 Rakeri naRea vakati, “Ko munoti tichine cheduwo here pamusha wababa vedu kunyange nhaka zvayo?" 
Genesis31:15 Tangova vatorwa isu. Handiti vakatitengesa here vakadya mari yose yatakaroorwa nayo. 
Genesis31:16 Upfumi ihwohu hwakatorerwa baba vedu naMwari ndochedu chatakatoburawo isu navana vedu. Saka chiitai zvenyu chiri chose chamakaudzwa naMwari.” 
Genesis31:17 Jakobho akarongedza, ndokukwidza vana vake namadzimai avo panghamera." 
Genesis31:18 Akatorawo upfumi hwake hwose. Vakatinha zvipfuwo zvavo zvose zvavakanga vawana kuMesopotamia, vakaenda nazvo kunyika yeKanani, kuna baba vavo Isaki." 
Genesis31:19 Rabhani akanga aenda kundoveura makushe ehwai dzake, Rakeri sarei oba tumwari twokuveza twababa vake Rabhani." 
Genesis31:20 Jakobho akanyengedza Rabhani muAramu, nokurega kumuudza kwaakaita kuti akanga afunga zvokuenda." 
Genesis31:21 Nokudaro akatiza nezvose zvaakanga anazvo akayambuka rwizi rwaYufuratesi, akafamba akananga kunyika yeGireadhi yamakomo." 
Genesis31:22 Kuzoti kwapera mazuva matatu, Rabhani akaudzwa kuti Jakobho akatiza." 
Genesis31:23 Rabhani akatorana nehama dzake akamuronda kwerwendo rwamazuva manomwe, akamubatira kumakomo eGireadhi." 
Genesis31:24 Kuzoti hwave usiku, Mwari akauya mukurota kuna Rabhani muAramu akamuyambira achiti, “Usambotaura zvako kana chii zvacho chakaipa kuna Jakobho.”" 
Genesis31:25 Rabhani akasvika paiva naJakobho akanga adzika matendhe ake mumakomo. Rabhani nehama dzake akadzikawo matendhe ake mumakomo eGireadhi. 
Genesis31:26 Rabhani akati kuna Jakobho, “Ndicho chii ichochi chawandiitira, kundinyengedza kudai, uchitutana navabvana vangu senhapwa dzokubatira mapfumo?" 
Genesis31:27 Sei waita zvokusvova uchindinyengedza kudai, usinganditaurire? Ko unoti ndingadai ndisina kukuitirawo mabiko takafara tichipembera, tichiimba zvedu tichiridza ngoma nezvipendani?" 
Genesis31:28 Ungabva watorega nokundiwanisa kana mukana wokuti nditsvode vazukuru vangu navabvana vangu ndichionekana navo? Zvawaita izvi ndezvoupenzi. 
Genesis31:29 Izvozvi ndinogona zvangu kukuita chimwe chinhu, dai pasina Mwari wababa vako ataura neni usiku hwanhasi achiti, ‘Usambotaura zvako kana chii zvacho chakaipa kuna Jakobho.’" 
Genesis31:30 Ko zvawakatiza pamusana pokuda kudzokera kumusha kwababa wako, wakagobireiko vamwari vangu?”" 
Genesis31:31 Jakobho akati kuna Rabhani, “Ndaitya kuti zvimwe mungandibvutire vanasikana venyu." 
Genesis31:32 Kana mukawana paine munhu ane vamwari venyu ngaaurayiwe. Zvino, hama dzenyu dzichizviona kudai, nyatsotsvakai chenyu chandinacho, mutore.” Asi Jakobho akanga asingazive kuti Rakeri ndiye akanga aba vamwari ivavo." 
Genesis31:33 Rabhani akatsvaka mutendhe raJakobho nomutendhe raRea nomutendhe ravaranda vechikadzi vaviri vaya, asi haana chaakawana. Akabuda mutendhe raRea akandotsvaka mutendhe raRakeri." 
Genesis31:34 Rakeri akanga atora vamwari vacho akavaviga muchityaro chengamera ndokubva agara pamusoro pacho. Rabhani akaparapatika kutsvaga pose pose mutendhe umu, asi hapana chaakawana." 
Genesis31:35 Rakeri ndokutaurira baba vake achiti, “Musanditsamwire zvenyu shewe. Ini handisi kukwanisa kukusumukirai nokuti ndiri panguva yangu yokutevera.” Rabhani akatsvakisisa asi haana kuwana vamwari vake." 
Genesis31:36 Jakobho akabva atsamwa kwazvo akapopotera Rabhani achiti, “Ko chandakakutadzirai chii? Ko chakaipa chandakaita ndechipi, zvamanditevera muchitoita zvokuvhima kudai?" 
Genesis31:37 Zvamaparapatika mukagwedebudza mikwende yangu yose, zvino chenyu chamawana ndechipi? Tiratidzei pano apa, hama dzedu nemi dzichionewo, dzititonganise." 
Genesis31:38 Ndakagara nemi makumi maviri amakore, hwai nembudzi dzenyu hadzina kumbosvodza. Handina kubaya hondohwe dzamatanga enyu ndichidya." 
Genesis31:39 Zvipfuwo zvainge zvarumwa nezvikara handaikuudzai imi, asi ndaizvitsiva nezvangu pachangu. Zvipfuwo zvainge zvabiwa masikati kana usiku maindiripisa." 
Genesis31:40 Masikati ndaitsva nezuva, usiku ndichidedera nechando ndichirara ndakasvunura." 
Genesis31:41 Kwamakore makumi maviri aya, ndakagara mumusha menyu. Ndakakushandirai kwamakore gumi namana ndichiitira vana venyu vaviri ava ugariri. Kwamakore matanhatu ndakachengeta zvipfuwo zvenyu kuti ndiwanewo ufudzi, asi mairamba muchisandura mubayiro wangu kagumi kagumi." 
Genesis31:42 Dai Mwari wababa wangu, Mwari waAbhurahamu, Mwari anonamatwa naIsaki akanga asineni, chokwadi chokwadi mungadai makandirega ndichienda zvangu ndisina nechii chose. Mwari akaona kutambura kwangu nokushanda kwandakaita, saka akuyambirai usiku hwanhasi.”" 
Genesis31:43 Rabhani akapindura Jakobho achiti, “Vabvana ava vana vangu ini, vana ava vazukuru vangu, zvipfuwo izvi zvipfuwo zvangu. Zvose zvazvo zvauri kuona ndezvangu. Ko zvino chii chandingaonekwe ndoita nhasi uno kuvabvana vangu kana kuvana vavo vokubereka." 
Genesis31:44 Iwe neni ngatichiitai chitenderano, tigoitawo chinhu chichagara chichitiyeuchidza zvatatenderana.”" 
Genesis31:45 Jakobho akatora ibwe akarimisa kuti rive ibwe rechiyeuchidzo. 
Genesis31:46 Iye Jakobho akaudzawo vanhu vake kuti, “Unganidzai mabwe.” Vakaunganidza mabwe akaita murwi. Vakadyira pamurwi ipapo." 
Genesis31:47 Rabhani akautumidza zita rokuti Jegarisahudhuta. Asi Jakobho akautumidza zita rokuti Gareedhi. 
Genesis31:48 Rabhani akati, “Nhasi uno murwi uyu wava chiyeuchidzo pakati pedu.” Saka vakatumidza murwi iwoyo zita rokuti Gareedhi." 
Genesis31:49 Rimwe zita rawo rakanzi Mizipa nokuti Rabhani akati, “Zvako iwe neni ngatichizvisiya mumaoko aTenzi, patinenge takati uyu kwake uyu kwake Mwari ndiye anenge achiona." 
Genesis31:50 “Kana ukazoshusha vabvana vangu kana kuroora vamwe vakadzi, kunyange vamwe vose vakasazviona, Mwari ndiye chapupu chedu.”" 
Genesis31:51 Rabhani akatizve, “Tarisa chitata chemurwi wamatombo ichi, neibwe iri randamisa pakati pangu newe." 
Genesis31:52 Murwi wamatombo uyu neibwe iri ndiyo micherechedzo ichatipupurira kuti ini handizoidarika ndichiuya kuzokurwisa, newewo hauzodarikawo murwi wamatombo iwoyu neibwe irori uchiuya kuzondirwisa." 
Genesis31:53 Mwari waAbhurahamu naMwari waNahori naMwari wababa wavo ngavave ivo vatongi pakati pangu newe.” Jakobho ndokupika naMwari anonamatwa nababa vake Isaki. 
Genesis31:54 Jakobho akapira chibayiro kuna Mwari mugomo muya, akadaidza hama dzake kuzodya mabiko. Vakadya vakapedza usiku hwose vari mugomo imomo." 
Genesis31:55 Rabhani akafumomuka ndokutsvoda vazukuru vake navabvana vake vachionekana navo, akavakomborera ndokusimuka odzokera kumusha kwake." 
Genesis32:1 Jakobho akasimudzirawo rwendo rwake, vatumwa vaMwari ndokusangana naye." 
Genesis32:2 Jakobho paakavaona akati, “Inga ihondo yaMwari chaiyo!” Saka nzvimbo iyoyo akaitumidza zita rokuti Mahanaimu." 
Genesis32:3 Jakobho akafanotuma nhume kuna Esau mukoma wake aigara kuSeiri munyika yeEdhomu. 
Genesis32:4 Akadzirayira achiti, “Endai kuna changamire wangu Esau mumutaurire kuti, ‘Zvanzi nomuranda wenyu Jakobho, ndanga ndiri kwaRabhani kwandanga ndigere kusvikira iye zvino." 
Genesis32:5 Ndava nemombe namadhongi nehwai nembudzi, navaranda vechikadzi nevechirume. Zvino ndatuma nhume kunemi changamire wangu kuti mundiitire tsiye nyoro.’ ”" 
Genesis32:6 Nhume idzi padzakadzokera kuna Jakobho dzakamutaurira kuti, “Takasvika kune mukoma wenyu, Esau. Zvino naiyewo ava munzira namazana mana avarume kuzosangana nemi.”" 
Genesis32:7 Jakobho akabva atya akatambudzika mumwoyo zvikuru, akakamura vanhu vavaiva navo nezvipfuwo nemombe nengamera ndokuita mapoka maviri," 
Genesis32:8 achifunga kuti kana Esau akauya kune rimwe boka akariparadza, rimwe iri rinogona kutiza." 
Genesis32:9 Jakobho ndokuti, “Mwari wavasekuru vangu Abhurahamu, imi Mwari wababa vangu Isaki imi Tenzi ndimi makanditi, ‘Chidzokera zvako kunyika yako, kune hama dzako ndichaita kuti zvinhu zvikufambire zvakanaka.’" 
Genesis32:10 Ini handikodzeri kuwana kunyange kai zvako kwomwoyochena wenyu, nokutendeseka kwenyu kwamakandiitira, ini muranda wenyu nokuti pandakayambuka Jorodhani urwu ndaingova iyeni ndoga netsvimbo yangu. Asi nhasi uno ndava namapoka maviri." 
Genesis32:11 Ndapota ndinunureiwo mumaoko emukoma wangu Esau. Ndava kutya ini kuti angauye akatiuraya tose akauraya madzimai navana. 
Genesis32:12 Ndimi makambonditsidzira muchiti, ‘Ndichaita kuti zvinhu zvikufambire zvakanaka. Ndichakupa vana vakawanda sejecha regungwa vasingaverengeki nokuwanda kwavo.’ ”" 
Genesis32:13 Jakobho akararapo usiku ihwohwo. Pazvinhu zvaaiva nazvo akasarudza chipo chokupa mukoma wake Esau 
Genesis32:14 chamazana maviri enhunzvi dzembudzi, namakumi maviri emakotora, namazana maviri enhunzvi dzehwai, namakumi maviri ehondohwe," 
Genesis32:15 namakumi matatu enghamera hadzi nemhuru dzadzo, namakumi mana emhou dzemombe, negumi rehandira, namadhongi echikadzi makumi maviri, negumi remikono yamadhongi." 
Genesis32:16 Jakobho akaisa izvi mumaoko avaranda vake kuti vatinhe zvipfuwo zvacho zviri mumapoka azvo, boka rimwe nerimwe riri paro roga. Akati, “Chifanoendai, asi musiye chinhambwe chakati kuti pakati peboka rimwe nerimwe.”" 
Genesis32:17 Akarayira veboka repamberimberi achiti, “Kana mukoma wangu Esau akasangana nemi akakubvunzai achiti, ‘Muri vekwaani? Ko muri kuenda kupiko? Zvamuri kutinha ndezvaani?’" 
Genesis32:18 Imi itii, ‘Ndezvomuranda wenyu Jakobho, chipo ichi chatumirwa kunemi changamire, Esau, asi iye Jakobho pachake ari mumashure.’ ”" 
Genesis32:19 Akarayirawo boka rechipiri nerechitatu navose vaitevera mapoka achiti, “Kana mukasangana naEsau muudzei zvimwechetezvo." 
Genesis32:20 Uye muudzei kuti, ‘Muranda wenyuwo Jakobho ari mushure,’ ” nokuti aifunga kuti, “Regai ndimufadze nokufanotumira chipo ichi ndigozoti ndosangana zvangu naye, zvimwe angandigamuchire.”" 
Genesis32:21 Naizvozvo akafanotumira zvipo izvozvo mberi, iye ndokusara usiku ihwohwo ari pamatendhe." 
Genesis32:22 Usiku ihwohwo Jakobho akamuka akatora madzimai ake ari maviri navaranda vake vechikadzi vaviri navana vake gumi nomumwechete, ndokundoyambuka Jabhoku napazambuko." 
Genesis32:23 Akavayambutsa rwizi, pamwechete nezvinhu zvose zvavaiva nazvo." 
Genesis32:24 Jakobho ndokusarako oga. Mumwe murume akaita tsimba naye kusvikira utonga hwabuda. 
Genesis32:25 Murume uyu paakaona kuti atadza kukurira Jakobho akamurova nechepahudyu, hudyu yake ikasvodogoka." 
Genesis32:26 Murume uyu ndokuti, “Chindirega ndiende! Utonga hwatsvuka!” Asi Jakobho akati, “Handikurege uchienda kunze kwokunge wandikomborera!”" 
Genesis32:27 Murume uyu akati, “Zita rako ndiani?” Iye ndokuti, “Ndinonzi Jakobho!”" 
Genesis32:28 Murume uyu ndokuti, “Zita rako harichanzi Jakobho, rava kunzi Isiraeri nokuti wakakwikwidzana naMwari navanhu ukakunda.”" 
Genesis32:29 Jakobho akamubvunza achiti, “Iwe ndiudzeiwo zita rako.” Iye akati, “Unondibvunzireiko zita rangu?” Akamukomborera ipapo." 
Genesis32:30 Jakobho ndokubva apatumidza zita rokuti Penueri achiti, “Ndaonana naMwari uso nouso, asi ndaramba ndiri mupenyu!”" 
Genesis32:31 Zuva rakamubudira muPenueri ava kubvamo achikamhina pamusana pehudyu yake. 
Genesis32:32 Ndokusaka nanhasi uno vaIsiraeri vasingadye runda rwepahudyu runogara mumbiya yepfupa rapahudyu, nokuti murume iyeyo akarova Jakobho parunda rwapahudyu." 
Genesis33:1 Jakobho akatarisa akaona Esau achiuya namazana mana avarume. Akakamura vana vake achiti Rea navake, Rakeri navake, varanda vechikadzi vaye vaviri navavowo." 
Genesis33:2 Akatungamidza varanda vaye navana vavo pamberi, vachiteverwa naRea navana vake, kuchizouya Rakeri naJosefi kwokupedzesera." 
Genesis33:3 Iye Jakobho akavatungamirira, achiswedera kune mukoma wake akamugwadamira pasi kanomwe kudzamara azosvika kwaaiva." 
Genesis33:4 Asi Esau akamhanyira kundomuchingura, akasvikomumbundira, akati koche mutsipa wake akamutsvoda, ndokubva vose vasvimha kuburitsa misodzi." 
Genesis33:5 Esau akatarisa akaona vakadzi navana akati, “Ko ava vaunavo ndivanaani?” Jakobho ndokuti, “Vana vangu ini muranda wenyu vandakapiwa naMwari nokuda kwenyasha dzake." 
Genesis33:6 Varanda navana vavo vakaswederawopo vakamugwadamira. 
Genesis33:7 Kwakatevera Rea navana vake vakauyapowo vakamugwadamira. Pakupedzesera, Josefi naRakeri vakauyawo vakamugwadamira.”" 
Genesis33:8 Esau akati, “Ko matanga namatanga ezvipfuwo andasangana nawo ndeeiko?” Jakobho akati, “Ndeokukutetai changamire kuti mundiitirewo tsiye nyoro.”" 
Genesis33:9 Esau akati, “Munun'una, ini ndinazvowo zvakawanda! Chengeta zvako zvinhu zvako!”" 
Genesis33:10 Jakobho akati, “Kweteka. Kana mandiitira mwoyo munyoro, ndinokumbira kuti mugamuchire zvenyu zvipo zvandiri kukupai. Pandaona chiso chenyu ndaita sendaona chiso chaMwari nokuti mandifarira zvikuru." 
Genesis33:11 Gamuchirai zvenyu zvipo zvandakuigirai nokuti Mwari akaita zvokundiwodzvorera kwazvo. Chinondipa kudaro ndechokuti ndine zvose.” Akaramba achimunyengetedza kusvikira azvigamuchira. 
Genesis33:12 Esau akazoti, “Ngatichisimukai tiende zvedu, ini ndichakutungamirirai pamberi.”" 
Genesis33:13 Asi Jakobho akamuti, “Changamire munoziva kuti vapwere havana kusimba. Uye ndinotyirawo hwai nemombe dzandinadzo dziri kuyamwisa. Kana zvikanyanya kumhanyiswa kwezuva rimwechete zvaro matanga ose ezvipfuwo zvinopera kufa." 
Genesis33:14 Zvino dai mukatungamira zvenyu pamberi pomuranda wenyu changamire. Ini ndichatevera zvangu zvishoma nezvishoma kudzamara ndasvika kwamuri kuSeiri sokufamba kwezvipfuwo zvandiri kutinha izvi nokufambawo kwavana, changamire.”" 
Genesis33:15 Esau ndokuti, “Kana zvakadaro rega ndikusiyire vamwe varume vandinavo.” Jakobho akati, “Ko munenge muchadarirei nhai changamire? Inga mandiitira mwoyo munyoro wani.”" 
Genesis33:16 Nokudaro Esau akabvapo zuva iroro odzokera zvake kuSeiri. 
Genesis33:17 Asi Jakobho akaenda kuSukoti akambovaka musha wake namatanga ezvipfuwo zvake ikoko. Ndokusaka vakatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rokuti Sukoti. 
Genesis33:18 Jakobho akasvika zvakanaka kuShikemu munyika yeKanani achibva kuMesopotamia, akasvikodzika matendhe ake pedyo neguta reShikemu." 
Genesis33:19 Jakobho akatenga katunhu ikako kaakadzika matendhe ake kuna Hamori baba waShikemu. Akabvisa zana remari yamapesita yesirivha. 
Genesis33:20 Akavaka atari ipapo akaitumidza zita rokuti Erieroheisiraeri. 
Genesis34:1 Dhina mwanasikana waRea waakaberekera Jakobho akashanyira vasikana vomunyika iyoyo. 
Genesis34:2 Ipapo Shikemu mwanakomana waHamori wechiHivhi aiva muchinda wenyika iyoyo akamuona ndokumufumura nokumubata chibharo kwaakaita. 
Genesis34:3 Akatorwa mwoyo naDhina mwana waJakobho, akamuda, akamutaurirawo nyaya dzorudo." 
Genesis34:4 Shikemu akataura nababa vake Hamori achiti, “Ndiroorereiwo Dhina ave mukadzi wangu.”" 
Genesis34:5 Jakobho akanzwa kuti mwana wake Dhina akanganiswa, izvozvo vana vake vakomana vakanga vari kumafuro vachifudza zvipfuwo. Jakobho akanyarara zvake kudzamara vauya." 
Genesis34:6 Hamori baba waShikemu akaenda kuna Jakobho kundokurukura naye. 
Genesis34:7 Vanakomana vaJakobho vakadzoka musango mavaiva nokuti vakanga vazvinzwa. Varume ava vakaviruka nehasha, vakashatirwa kwazvo nokuti Shikemu akanga aita chinhu chisina nomusoro wose muIsiraeri chokutadza nomwanasikana waJakobho nokuti hazvifanire kunzarwo." 
Genesis34:8 Hamori akataurirana naye achiti, “Mwana wangu Shikemu ari kuda Dhina mwana wenyu chaizvo. Ko hamungabvume here kuti amuroore zvake ave mukadzi wake?" 
Genesis34:9 Ngatirooreranei. Regai zvenyu tiroore vana venyu, imi muchiroorawo vedu." 
Genesis34:10 Ngatigarei pamwechete, nyika ndiyo yose iyi, muite zvenyu mhindu dzinokuwanisai mari, muve noupfumi.”" 
Genesis34:11 Shikemu akataurirana nababa vaDhina nehanzvadzi dzake achiti, “Kana mafadzwa nechikumbiro changu ndinokupai zvose zvamunenge mareva." 
Genesis34:12 Revai zvenyu roora pamunodira nezvirehwarehwa ndinokupai sokutaura kwamunenge maita, chandinongoda chete kuti mundipe musikana iyeyu kuti ave mukadzi wangu.”" 
Genesis34:13 Vana vaJakobho vakapindura Shikemu nababa vake Hamori vachivaita zvokunyengedza nokuti akanga akanganisa hanzvadzi yavo Dhina. 
Genesis34:14 Vakavati, “Hatingabvume zvakadaro, zvokupa hanzvadzi yedu kumunhu asina kudzingiswa nokuti chinhu chinoshoreka kwatiri." 
Genesis34:15 Isu tingabvumirane nazvo chete kana imi maitawo sesu, vanhurume vose vokwenyu vatodzingiswa." 
Genesis34:16 Kana matodaro ndopatingazokupai vanasikana vedu, isuwo tichitora vanasikana venyu. Ndopatingazogara pamwechete tichiva rudzi rumwe chete." 
Genesis34:17 Asi, kana maramba kuteerera zvatareva zvokudzingiswa izvi, tichatora mwana wedu, tobva taenda zvedu.”" 
Genesis34:18 Zvavakataura izvi zvakafadza Hamori nomwana wake Shikemu. 
Genesis34:19 Jaya irori harina kumboita chinono chokuzviita nokuti raida chaizvo mwana waJakobho. Shikemu aiva mukuru mukuru mumhuri yababa vake. 
Genesis34:20 Nezvo Hamori nomwana wake Shikemu vakaenda kudare ravanhu kusuo guru reguta ravo vakandotaurirana navanhu vemo vachiti," 
Genesis34:21 “Vanhu ava vagere nesu zvakanaka kwazvo, dai vagara zvavo munyika ino vachiita zvavo mhindu dzinovawanisa mari nokuti tarisai muone nyika ihuru iyi. Ngatirooreranei navo, ivo vatore vanasikana vedu isu tichivapawo vedu." 
Genesis34:22 Kuti vanhu ava vabvume kugara nesu tichiva rudzi rumwe chete navo ndokunge vanhurume vedu vose vabvuma kudzingiswa sezvavakaita. 
Genesis34:23 Ko upfumi hwavo nezvipfuwo zvavo, handiti zvichazova zvedu here? Ngatichingotenderanai navo, vagare nesu.”" 
Genesis34:24 Vanhu vose vomuguta imomo vakabvumirana nezvakataurwa naHamori nomwana wake Shikemu. Vanhu vose vomuguta iroro vakabva vadzingiswa, vechirume vose, vose zvavo vomuguta iroro." 
Genesis34:25 Kwakati kwapera mazuva matatu maronda avarume ava orwadza, vana vaviri vaJakobho, Simeoni naRevhi, hanzvadzi dzaDhina vakatora mapakatwa avo, vakapinda muguta umu zvechiverevere ndokubva vauraya varume vose vaivamo." 
Genesis34:26 Vakauraya namapakatwa Hamori nomwana wake Shikemu, ndokubva vatora Dhina mumba maShikemu, vakaenda naye." 
Genesis34:27 Vana vaJakobho vakaenda kuzvitunha zviye vakapamba guta iri nemhaka yokukanganiswa kwakanga kwaitwa hanzvadzi yavo. 
Genesis34:28 Vakapamba hwai dzavo nemombe dzavo namadhongi nezvose zvaiva mugutamo nezvaiva kunze kwaro. 
Genesis34:29 Vakatorawo upfumi hwavo hwose nezvinhu zvose zvaiva mudzimba dzavo pamwe chete navana navakadzi vachizviita zvavo. 
Genesis34:30 Jakobho akati kuna Simeoni naRevhi, “Mandipa nhamo mandiparira moto muziso. Iye zvino vanhu vomunyika ino, vaKanani nevaPerizi vachandivenga. Ini ndinongova navanhu vashoma. Kana vakandikomberana vachandiparadza, ini nemhuri yangu.”" 
Genesis34:31 Simeoni naRevhi vakati, “Ko munoti tairega hanzvadzi yedu ichibatwa sepfambi here?”" 
Genesis35:1 Mwari akataurira Jakobho kuti, “Chisimuka uende kuBhetieri ugareko, undigadzirire atari ikoko ini Mwari nyakuzviratidza kwauri panguva yawakatiza mukoma wako Esau.”" 
Genesis35:2 Jakobho ndokuudza mhuri yake navose vaaive navo kuti, “Rasai vamwari vamunavo vasirivo, mushambe mupfeke dzimwe hanzu." 
Genesis35:3 Tichaenda kuBhetieri kundogadzira atari yokunamatira Mwari akandinzwa akandibatsira pandaitambudzika. Aiva neni kwose kwandaienda.” 
Genesis35:4 Vakabva vapa Jakobho vamwari vasirivo vavakanga vainavo, nemhete dzaiva munzeve dzavo. Jakobho akazvicherera pasi pomuti womuoku waiva pedyo neShikemu akazvifushira." 
Genesis35:5 Kuzoti vapinda munzira, vanhu vamaguta omunharaunda iyoyo vakabatwa nokutya kwakabva kuna Mwari zvokuti havana kudzingirira vanakomana vaJakobho." 
Genesis35:6 Jakobho navanhu vake vose vaaiva navo vakazosvika kuguta rainzi Ruzi kana kuti Bhetieri riri munyika yeKanani. 
Genesis35:7 Akavaka atari ipapo akapatumidza zita rokuti Eribhetieri nokuti Mwari akanga azviratidza kwaari ipapo panguva iya yaakatiza mukoma wake. 
Genesis35:8 Ipapo ndipo pakafira Dhebhora akarera Ribheka. Akavigwa pasi pomuoku kumaodzanyemba kweBhetieri. Saka muti wacho wakatumidzwa zita rokuti Muoku Wokuchema. 
Genesis35:9 Jakobho paakanga adzoka kuMesopotamia Mwari akazviratidzazve kwaari akamukomborera. 
Genesis35:10 Mwari akati kwaari, “Handiti zita rako ndiJakobho, kubvira zvino hauchanzi Jakobho, wava kunzi Isiraeri.” Naizvozvo akatumidzwa zita rokuti Isiraeri." 
Genesis35:11 Mwari akamutizve, “Ndini iye Aripagomo. Bereka vana, muwande. Mumhuri yako muchabuda ndudzi dzavanhu muchabudawo madzimambo." 
Genesis35:12 Nyika yandakanga ndapa Abhurahamu naIsaki ndinokupa iwe, ndinopawo nyika iyoyo kuzvizvarwa zvako zvichauya.”" 
Genesis35:13 Mwari akazobva paakanga achitaura naye oenda zvake kudenga. 
Genesis35:14 Jakobho akamisa ibwe refu rechiyeuchidzo panzvimbo apa pakataura Mwari naye, akadururira pamusoro paro mupiro wechokunwa akadururirawo mafuta pariri." 
Genesis35:15 Jakobho akatumidza nzvimbo iyi zita rokuti Bhetieri. 
Genesis35:16 Vakabva kuBhetieri vosimudzira rwendo rwavo voenda. Asi vachiri chinhambwe nokusvika munyika yeEfurati nguva yaRakeri yokusununguka yakasvika. Rakeri akatambura chaizvo pakusununguka kwake. 
Genesis35:17 Zvaakanga ari pahata akatambura zvikuru, vanyamukuta vakati, “Usatye zvako wapiwa zvakare chimwe chikomana.”" 
Genesis35:18 Rakeri akataura achitandadza kuti zita romwana rinonzi Bhenoni. Asi baba vake vakamutumidza zita rokuti Bhenjamini. 
Genesis35:19 Rakeri akafirapo akavigwa panzira inoenda kuEfurati kana kuti Bheterehemu. 
Genesis35:20 Jakobho akamisa ibwe refu kumusoro kweguva rake. Ndiro ibwe refu repaguva raRakeri riripo nanhasi uno. 
Genesis35:21 Isiraeri wakareyo Jakobho akabvapo osimudzira rwendo rwake akandodzika matendhe ake ave panzvimbo yokunge tapfuura shongwe yeEdheri. 
Genesis35:22 Isiraeri paaiva agereko Rubheni dangwe rake rakatadza naBhiriha murongo wababa vake, Isiraeri ndokuzvinzwa. Jakobho aiva navana vakomana gumi navaviri." 
Genesis35:23 Vanakomana vaRea ndiRubheni dangwe rake, naSimeoni naRevhi naJudha naIsakari naZebhuruni." 
Genesis35:24 Vanakomana vaRakeri ndiJosefi naBhenjamini. 
Genesis35:25 Vanakomana vaBhiriha muranda wechikadzi waRakeri ndiDhani naNafutari. 
Genesis35:26 Vanakomana vaZiripa muranda wechikadzi waRea ndiGadhi naAsheru. Ivava ndivo vanakomana vaJakobho vakaberekerwa kuMesopotamia. 
Genesis35:27 Jakobho akandoona baba vake Isaki kuMamure kana kuti guta reAribha ndiro rimwechetero rinonzi Hebhuroni. Kwakambogara Abhurahamu naIsaki. 
Genesis35:28 Isaki akagara zana namakumi masere amakore. 
Genesis35:29 Isaki akazochembera zvake akakwegura zvokugutsikanawo ndokufa zvake oendawo kwakaenda vamwe vokwake vachakabvu. Esau naJakobho vana vavo vakavaviga. 
Genesis36:1 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvokwaEsau ainziwo Edhomu. 
Genesis36:2 Esau akaroora madzimai echiKanani vaiti; Adha mwana waEroni werudzi rwavaHiti naOhoribhama mwana waAna, mwanakomana waZibheoni worudzi rwavaHivhi," 
Genesis36:3 naBhasimati hanzvadzi yaNebhayoti mwana waIshimaeri. 
Genesis36:4 Adha akaberekera Esau Erifazi, Bhasimati akaberekawo Rueri." 
Genesis36:5 Ohoribhama akabereka Jeushi naJaramu naKora. Ivava ndivo vanakomana vaEsau vakaberekerwa munyika yeKanani. 
Genesis36:6 Esau akasiya munun'una wake Jakobho ndokubva atamira kure. Akaendako namadzimai ake navana vake vakomana navasikana navanhu vake vose. Akaendawo nemombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvake noupfumi hwake hwose hwaakanga awana munyika yeKanani. 
Genesis36:7 Esau akatama nokuti iye naJakobho vakanga vava nezvipfuwo noupfumi hwakawanda, vasisinawo mafuro anovakwanira kuti vagare pamwechete." 
Genesis36:8 Esau akandogara mumakomo mudunhu reSeiri. Esau uyu ndiye akarevo Edhomu. 
Genesis36:9 Hezvinoi zvizukuru zvokwaEsau tateguru weEdhomu aigara munyika yamakomo yeEdhomu. 
Genesis36:10 Aya ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaEsau. Adha mudzimai waEsau akabereka Erifazi. Bhasimati mukadzi waEsau akaberekawo Rueri. 
Genesis36:11 Vanakomana vaErifazi ndiTemani naOmari naZefo naGatamu naKenazi. 
Genesis36:12 Timuna akanga ari murongo waErifazi mwanakomana waEsau, naiyewo akaberekera Erifazi mwana mukomana ainzi Amareki. Ivava ndivo vanakomana vaAdha mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:13 Avawo ndivo vanakomana vaRueri kwaiti, Nahati naZera naShama naMiza. Ivava ava ndivo vanakomana vaBhasimati mukadzi waEsau." 
Genesis36:14 Mudzimai waEsau ainzi Ohoribhama mwanasikana waAna, mwanakomana waZibheoni, akabereka Jehushi naJaramu naKora." 
Genesis36:15 Dangwe raEsau rainzi Erifazi, rakabereka vanakomana vakazova madzishe. Madzishe acho ndiwo ano aya: Temani naOmari naZefo naKenazi," 
Genesis36:16 naKora naGatamu naAmareki. Ndiwo madzishe okwaErifazi aigara munyika yeEdhomu akaberekwa naAdha. 
Genesis36:17 Mwana waEsau ainzi Rueri akaberekawo vanakomana vakazova madzishe munyika yeEdhomu. Madzishe acho ndeaya: Nahati naZera naShama naMiza ivava ndivo madzishe okwaRueri aigara munyika yeEdhomu akaberekwa naBhasimati mukadzi waEsau. 
Genesis36:18 Ohoribhama mudzimai waEsau akaberekawo vanakomana vakazova madzishe munyika yeEdhomu. Madzishe acho ndiwo anowo aya anoti: Jeushi naJaramu naKora. Ivava ndivo madzishe akaberekwa nomudzimai waEsau mwanasikana waAna. 
Genesis36:19 Saka ivava ndivo vanakomana vaEsau kana kuti Edhomu pamwechete namadzishe avo. 
Genesis36:20 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaSeiri vorudzi rwechiHori vagari vomunyika iyoyo. Kwaiti Rotani naShobharu naZibheoni naAna," 
Genesis36:21 kwoti Dhishoni naEzeri naDhishani. Ivava ndivo vaiva madzishe evaHori munyika yeEdhomu. 
Genesis36:22 Vanakomana vaRotani ndevano ava Hori naHemamu. Timina ndiyo yaiva hanzvadzi yaRotani. 
Genesis36:23 Vanakomana vaShobharu ndivo avawo, Arivhani naManahati naEbhari naShefo naOnamu." 
Genesis36:24 Vanakomana vaZibheoni ndaava vanoti Aiya naAna. Ndiye Ana uya akawana zvitubu zvemvura inopisa musango, achifudza madhongi ababa vake Zibheoni." 
Genesis36:25 Ana akabereka mwana mukomana ainzi Dhishani akaberekawo mwanasikana ainzi Ohoribhama. 
Genesis36:26 Vanakomana vaDhishani ndiHemudhani naEshibhani naItirani naKerani. 
Genesis36:27 Vanakomana vaEzeru ndiBhirihani naZaavhani naAkani. 
Genesis36:28 Vanakomana vaDhishani ndiUzi naArani. 
Genesis36:29 Haanoi mazita amadzishe evaHori, kwaiti Rotani naShobharu naZebheoni naAna," 
Genesis36:30 kwouya Dhishani naEzeri. Ivava ndiwo madzishe echiHori vaigara munyika yeSeiri namadzinza awo. 
Genesis36:31 Haanoi madzimambo akatonga muEdhomu vaIsiraeri vasati vava namadzimambo. 
Genesis36:32 Paiti Bhera mwanakomana waBheori akatonga muEdhomu. Zita reguta rake rainzi Dhinihabha. 
Genesis36:33 Kuzoti Bhera afa, Jobhabhu mwanakomana waZera wokuBhozera ndiye akasara akatonga pachinzvimbo chake." 
Genesis36:33 Kuzoti Bhera afa, Jobhabhu mwanakomana waZera wokuBhozera ndiye akasara akatonga pachinzvimbo chake." 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhu akazofa ndokubva Hushamu wedunhu revaTemani atonga panzvimbo yake. 
Genesis36:34 Jobhabhu akazofa ndokubva Hushamu wedunhu revaTemani atonga panzvimbo yake. 
Genesis36:35 Pakafa Hushamu, Hadhadhi mwanakomana waBhedhadhi akatonga pachinzvimbo chake. Ndiye Hadhadhi uya akakurira Midhiani kusango reMoabhu. Zita reguta rake rainzi Avhiti." 
Genesis36:36 Hadhadhi akazofa, Samira wokuMasareka akabva atonga pachinzvimbo chake." 
Genesis36:37 Samira akazofa, Shauro weRehobhoti naYufuratesi ndokutonga pachinzvimbo chake." 
Genesis36:38 Shauro akafa Bhaarihanani mwanakomana waAkabhori ndokutonga pachinzvimbo chake. 
Genesis36:39 Bhaarihanani, mwanakomana waAkabhori akafa, Hadhari akatonga pachinzvimbo chake. Zita reguta rake rainzi Pau. Zita romudzimai wake rainzi Mehetabheri, aberekwa naMatiredhi, mwanasikana waMezahabhi." 
Genesis36:40 Mazita amadzishe okwaEsau, nedzimba dzavo, namaguta avo, ndaaya anoti: Timina" 
Genesis36:41 naArivha naJeteti naOhoribhama, naEra naPinoni," 
Genesis36:42 kwouya Kenazi naTemani," 
Genesis36:43 naMibhuzari, naMagidhieri naIramu. Iwaya ndiwo madzishe okwaEdhomu namatunhu avo. Esau ndiye tateguru wavaEdhomu." 
Genesis37:1 Jakobho aigara munyika yeKanani maimbogara baba vake achiti apa garei tamei apa garei. 
Genesis37:2 Heinoi nhoroondo yemhuri yaJakobho. Josefi paakanga ava jaya rine makore gumi namanomwe aienda navakoma vake kundofudza zvipfuwo. Vakoma vake ava vaiva vana vaBhiriha naZiripa vakadzi vababa vake. Josefi aigarovachera kuna Isiraeri baba vake. 
Genesis37:3 Isiraeri aida Josefi chaizvo kupfuura vamwe vana vake vose nokuti akazoberekwa ivo vakwegura. Akasonera Josefi hanzu yakanga yakareba, yemaoko marefu." 
Genesis37:4 Vakoma vake vakazviona kuti baba vavo vaimuda kupfuura vamwe vose, vakamuvenga vakatadzawo kunyatsotauriranawo naye zvakanaka." 
Genesis37:5 Rimwe zuva Josefi akarota hope dzake. Paakadziudza vakoma vake, vakabva vatonyanya kumuvenga." 
Genesis37:6 Akati, “Donzwai hope dzangu dzandarota." 
Genesis37:7 Tanga tichisunga zvisote zvekoroni mumunda, wanei chisote changu chakanyatsoti twi-i kumira. Zvisote zvenyu zvakomberedza changu zvikabva zvazochikotamira.”" 
Genesis37:8 Vakoma vake vakati, kwaari “Heya! Saka unofunga kuti uchava ishe wedu ugotitonga tose nhai!” Vakanyanya kumuvengera zviroto zvake nezvaaitaura." 
Genesis37:9 Akazorota zvakare dzimwe hope, ndokuudza vakoma vake achiti, “Ndarotazve dzimwe hope. Ndaona zuva nomwedzi nenyenyedzi gumi neimwe zvichindikotamira.”" 
Genesis37:10 Asi paakaudza baba vake navakoma vake izvozvo, baba vake vakamutsiura vachiti, “Ko iwe dzako ihopei dzaunongoti ndarota ndarota? Heya unoreva kuti ini namai vako navakoma vako, chaizvoizvo tichazogwadamira iwe nhai?”" 
Genesis37:11 Vakoma vake ndokubva vava kumuitira shanje, asi baba vake vakazvipfundira mumwoyo mavo." 
Genesis37:12 Vakoma vaJosefi vakandofudzira hwai dzababa vavo kuShikemu. 
Genesis37:13 Zvino Isiraeri akati kuna Josefi, “Handiti vakoma vako vari kufudzira zvipfuwo kuShikemu? Uya ndikutume kwavari.” Josefi akati, “Zvakanaka, nditumei henyu.”" 
Genesis37:14 Jakobho akati, “Enda kuna vakoma vako vari kufudza zvipfuwo undoona kuti kwakadii, ugodzoka wondiudza.” Saizvozvo akamutuma achibva kubani reHebhuroni achienda kuShikemu." 
Genesis37:15 Ipapo mumwe murume akaona Josefi achipukaira musango. Murume uyu akati, “Uri kutsvakei?”" 
Genesis37:16 Josefi akati, “Ndiri kutsvaka vakoma vangu vari kufudza zvipfuwo. Ko mungandiudzewo kwavari here?”" 
Genesis37:17 Murume uyu ndokuti, “Vakabva pano, nokuti ndakavanzwa vachiti, ‘Ngatiendei kuDhotani.’ ” Josefi akatevera vakoma vake ikoko akandovawanira kuDhotani." 
Genesis37:18 Zvino vakoma vake vakamuona achiri kure, asati asvika pedyo navo, vakarangana kuti vamuuraye." 
Genesis37:19 Vakataurirana vachiti, “Heyo shasha iye yokurota yauya." 
Genesis37:20 Ngatimuurayei, timukande mune rimwe gomba, tozoti akadyiwa nechikara, tigoona kuti kurota kwake kwacho kuchasvikepi.”" 
Genesis37:21 Rubheni paakazvinzwa, akanunura Josefi mumaoko avo achiti, “Ngatiregei kumuuraya.”" 
Genesis37:22 Rubheni akatizve, “Ngatiregei kudeura ropa. Mukandei zvenyu mugomba iri riri pano murenje muno asi musawane chamunoita kwaari.” Akareva izvozvo achida kununura Josefi mumaoko avo kuti azomudzosera kuna baba vake." 
Genesis37:23 Kuzoti Josefi asvika kuvakoma vake, vakamukatanura hanzu yake aya yaakanga akapfeka, yakanga yakareba, yemaoko marefu." 
Genesis37:24 Vakamubata vakamukanda mugomba risina mvura. 
Genesis37:25 Vakagara pasi vava kudya zvavo, ndokubva vaona dungwerungwe revaIshimaeri vaibva kuGiriadhi vachienda kuIjipiti. Vakanga vaine ngamera dzavo dzakanga dzakatakura zvokuzora zvinonhuhwira zvinoti, gamu neBharimu tunonhuhwirira." 
Genesis37:26 Zvino Judha akati, kuvakoma navanun'una vake, “Kuuraya munun'una wedu, tichizoramba mhosva yacho kunobatsireiko?" 
Genesis37:27 Uyai timutengese kuvaIshimaeri tirege kumukuvadza nokuti munun'una wedu chaiye, tiri veropa rimwechete.” Vakoma navanunun'una vake vakabva vamuteerera." 
Genesis37:28 Kuzoti vashambadzi vorudzi rwevaMidhiani ava vasvikapo, vakoma vake vakakweva Josefi vachimuburitsa mugomba umu, vakabva vamutengesa kuvaIshimaeri ndokupiwa mari yesirivha makumi maviri, vaIshimaeri ava ndokuenda naye kuIjipiti." 
Genesis37:29 Rubheni paakazodzokera kugomba kuya, akaona Josefi musisina, ndokubva abvarura hanzu dzake neshungu." 
Genesis37:30 Akadzokera kuvanun'una vake, ndokusvikoti, “Vakomana, inga mwana haasisimo mugomba. Zvino ini ndinoenda kupiko ini!”" 
Genesis37:31 Vakabva vauraya mbudzi ndokunyika hanzu yaJosefi iya muropa rayo. 
Genesis37:32 Vakatumira hanzu yake yemaoko marefu iya kuna baba vavo vachiti, “Onai zvatanonga izvi. Tarisaiwo muone kana iri hanzu yomwana wenyu kana kuti kwete.”" 
Genesis37:33 Jakobho akaiziva ndokubva ati, “Inga ihanzu yomwana wangu! Akadyiwa nechikara chete! Chokwadi Josefi akaparara!”" 
Genesis37:34 Jakobho akabvarura hanzu dzake neshungu. Akapfeka masaga akabva achema mwana wake kwamazuva mazhinji. 
Genesis37:35 Vana vake vose vakomana navasikana vakaedza kumunyaradza, asi mwoyo wake wakaramba kusununguka. Akati, “Ndichadzamara kufa ndichizoenda kunzvimbo yavachakabvu ndichichema mwana wangu.” Ndokuchema kwaiita baba vake zuva nezuva." 
Genesis37:36 Izvo vaMidhiani vaye vakanga vatotengesa Josefi kuIjipiti, kuna Potifari, jinda raFarao raiva mukuru mukuru wavachengeti vokwamambo." 
Genesis38:1 Panguva iyoyo Judha akasiya vakoma navanun'una vake akaenda kuno mumwe murume ainzi Hira wechiAdhuramu. 
Genesis38:2 Ikoko Judha akaona mwanasikana womumwe murume wechiKanani ainzi Shua akabva amuroora, akagara naye." 
Genesis38:3 Mukadzi uyu akava nepamuviri, akabereka mwana mukomana ndokumutumidza zita rokuti Eru." 
Genesis38:4 Akazovazve napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana waakatumidza zita rokuti Onani. 
Genesis38:5 Akazoberekazve mumwe mwana mukomana akamutumidza zita rokuti Shera. Akanga ari kuKezibhi paakamubereka. 
Genesis38:6 Judha akazoroorera Eru dangwe rake mukadzi ainzi Tamari. 
Genesis38:7 Asi pana Tenzi, Eru dangwe raJudha rakanga rakaipa mwoyo, saka Tenzi akabva amuuraya." 
Genesis38:8 Judha akazoti kuna Onani, “Gara nhaka mukadzi womukoma wako umuberekere vana.”" 
Genesis38:9 Onani akaziva kuti vana vaizoberekwa havaizonzi ndevake. Saka aiti kana osangana naTamari, aidururira simba rake pasi kuti arege kuberekera mukoma wake vana." 
Genesis38:10 Kuita kwaOnani hakuna kufadza Tenzi, ndokubva amuurayawo zvakare." 
Genesis38:11 Judha akataura nomuroora wake Tamari achiti, “Dai machimbondogara kumusha kwababa venyu, muri chirikadzi kudai kusvikira Shera mwanakomana wangu akura.” Izvozvo Judha aifunga mumwoyo make kuti zvimwe Shera angafewo sezvakaita vakoma vake. Tamari akandogara zvake kumusha kwababa vake." 
Genesis38:12 Kwapera nguva yakati rebei, mudzimai waJudha, mwana waShua akafa. Judha akati apedza nguva yokuchema mudzimai wake, akaenda kuTimina kwaiva navanhu vaiveura hwai dzavo. Akaenda pamwechete naHira shamwari yake yechiAdhuramu." 
Genesis38:13 Kuzoti Tamari audzwa kuti, “Vatezvara vako vachaenda kuTimina kundoveura hwai dzavo,”" 
Genesis38:14 akabvisa hanzu dzouchirikadzi dzaaipfeka, ndokupfeka dzimwewo. Akazvifukidza nedhuku rake, ndokundogara pamusuo weguta rainzi Enaimi raiva panzira yaienda kuTimina. Tamari akanga aona kuti Shera akura, asi haana kunge amupiwa kuti amugare nhaka." 
Genesis38:15 Judha akaona Tamari akafunga kuti zvimwe ipfambi zvayo nokuti akanga akazvifukidza uso. 
Genesis38:16 Judha akatsaukira kwaari akataurirana naye kuti aite chakaipa naye, asingazivi kuti muroora wake. Tamari akati, “Munondipeiko kana maita izvozvo neni?”" 
Genesis38:17 Judha ndokuti, “Ndichasarudza mbudzana pazvipfuwo zvangu ndigokutumira.” Tamari ndokuti, “Ndipei chandinofanobata kudzamara maitumira.”" 
Genesis38:18 Judha akati, “Ndingagokupa chiiko?” Iye ndokuti, “Ndipei mhete yenyu yechidhindo netambo yayo pamwechete nomudonzvo wenyu.” Judha akamupa zvinhu izvozvo, ndokutadza zvake naye akabva ava napamuviri." 
Genesis38:19 Tamari akasimuka ndokuenda zvake ndokusvikobvisa dhuku rake riya pauso, ndokupfekazve hanzu dzake dzouchirikadzi." 
Genesis38:20 Judha akazotuma shamwari yake yechiAdhuramu kuenda nembudzana iya achiti andodzorerwa zvinhu zviya zvakanga zvafanobatwa, asi akasvikomushaya." 
Genesis38:21 Hira akabvunza vanhu vomuEnaimi achiti, “Ko pfambi yaigara panzira muEnaimu iripiko?” Vanhu ndokuti, “Hakuna pfambi yakanga iri kuno.”" 
Genesis38:22 Hira akadzokera kuna Judha akasvikoti, “Handina kuiona, uye vanhu vokowo vati hakugari pfambi uku.”" 
Genesis38:23 Judha ndokubva ati, “Ngaasva agara zvake nazvo, zvingatinyadzise izvi. Tarisa uone ndatumira mbudzana asi iwe wasvikomushaya.”" 
Genesis38:24 Kuzoti kwapera mwedzi inenge mitatu, Judha akaudzwa kuti, “Muroora wako Tamari akaita upombwe, atova napamuviri paakabata muunzenza ihwohwo.” Judha akati, “Uyai naye apiswe afe.”" 
Genesis38:25 Pavakandoti vauye naTamari kudaro, iye Tamari akatuma shoko kuna vatezvara vake rokuti, “Ndava napamuviri pomuridzi wezvinhu izvi. Doongororai nyembe nomudonzvo mugoona kuti ndezvaani.”" 
Genesis38:26 Judha akaziva zvinhu zvake zviye akati, “Tamari haana mhosva. Ini ndini ndine mhosva. Handina kuzoti Shera mwana wangu amutore.”" 
Genesis38:27 Tamari paakanga osununguka, pakaoneka kuti aiva namapatya." 
Genesis38:28 Kuzoti ava pahata achisununguka, mumwe mwana akabudisa ruoko. Ipapo vanyamukuta vaibatsira pakusununguka vakatora shinda tsvuku ndokusunga ruoko rwomwana vachiti, “Uyu ndiye atanga kubuda.”" 
Genesis38:29 Asi mwana uyu akadzosera ruoko rwake mukati, akanga ari mukati akabva abuda. Vanyamukuta ava ndokubva vati, “Inga wazvipeurira nzira yako!” Ndokusaka akatumidzwa zita rokuti Ferezi." 
Genesis38:30 Mumwe wacho akazobuda akasungwa neshinda tsvuku ruoko rwake, akatumidzwa zita rokuti Zera." 
Genesis39:1 Vanhu vechiIshimaeri vaye vakaenda naJosefi kuIjipiti. Akatengwa nomuIjipiti ainzi Potifari kuvaIshimaeri vainge vadzika ikoko. Potifari aiva jinda raFarao ari mukuru mukuru wavachengeti vokwamambo. 
Genesis39:2 Tenzi aiva naJosefi. Naizvozvo akabudirira kwazvo agere mumba matenzi wake wechiIjipiti. 
Genesis39:3 Potifari akaona kuti Tenzi akanga aina Josefi. Akaonawo kuti Tenzi ndiye aibatsira Josefi pazvinhu zvose zvaaiita, kuti zvibudirire." 
Genesis39:4 Potifari akafadzwa naJosefi. Akamuita mutariri wezvemba yake zvose, akaturirawo mumaoko ake zvose zvaaiva nazvo." 
Genesis39:5 Kubva panguva iyoyo yaakamuita mutariri wezvemba yake zvose, nezvose zvaaiva nazvo, Tenzi akakomborera mhuri yaPotifari pamusana paJosefi. Tenzi akakomborerawo upfumi hwake hwose hwaiva mumusha nehwaiva muminda." 
Genesis39:6 Naizvozvo akaisa zvinhu zvake zvose mumaoko aJosefi. Nokudaro Potifari zvaaiva naye kudai akanga asisazvinetse nokufunga chokuita kusara kwezvokudya zvake chete. Josefi akanga ane chimiro chakanaka, aine chiso chakarurama."
