Genesis39:7 Gare gare mudzimai waPotifari akachiva Josefi, akamukumbira kuti aite chakaipa naye." 
Genesis39:8 Asi Josefi akaramba akati kumudzimai watenzi wake, “Tarisai muone, tenzi wangu aineni kudai, hapana chinhu chaanombozvinetsa nacho mumba, uye vakaisa zvinhu zvose zvavanazvo mumaoko angu." 
Genesis39:9 Hakuna munhu ane simba kudarika ini pamba pano. Tenzi wangu akandipa masimba pamusoro pezvinhu zvose, kunze kwenyu imi moga nokuti muri mudzimai wake. Zvino ndingagoita sei chinhu chakaipa kudaro ndichitadzira Mwari?”" 
Genesis39:10 Kunyange zvake mudzimai uyu akanyengetedza Josefi zuva nezuva, Josefi akaramba kumuteerera akaramba kuita chakaipa naye kana kutandara naye." 
Genesis39:11 Mumwe musi Josefi akapinda mumba achindoita basa rake, vamwe varanda vakanga vasimo." 
Genesis39:12 Pakarepo mudzimai uyu akamuti ndu-u hanzu yake achiti, “Rara neni.” Ipapo Josefi akapukunyura akabva asiya hanzu yake muruoko rwomudzimai uyu ndokutizira panze." 
Genesis39:13 Mudzimai uyu paakaona kuti Josefi apukunyura akasiya hanzu yake muruoko rwake achitizira panze," 
Genesis39:14 akadaidza varanda vepamba pake vechirume akavati, “Mazvionaka! MuHebheru uyu watakaunzirwa ava kutivirimira. Auya achida kurara neni, ndikabva ndaridza mhere." 
Genesis39:15 Zvaanzwa mhere yandaridza asiya hanzu yake akabva atizira panze.” 
Genesis39:16 Mudzimai uyu akachengeta hanzu yaJosefi kusvikira tenzi wake vadzokera kumba. 
Genesis39:17 Akamutaurira kuti, “Muranda uyu wechiHebheru wamakatiunzira pano, auya kuzondivirimira." 
Genesis39:18 Asi pandaridza mhere abva asiya hanzu yake akatizira panze.” 
Genesis39:19 Tenzi wake akatsamwa zvikuru paakanzwa zvakataurwa achiti, “Ndizvo zvandakaitirwa nomuranda wenyuka izvi.”" 
Genesis39:20 Akabva aisa Josefi mujeri maisipfigirwa vasungwa vamambo. Nokudaro Josefi akapfigirwa mujeri akagaramo. 
Genesis39:21 Asi Tenzi aiva naJosefi, akaramba achimuitira mwoyochena, akaita kuti mutariri wejeri amuitire mwoyo wakanaka." 
Genesis39:22 Mutariri wejeri akaisa vasungwa vose vakanga vari mujeri mumaoko aJosefi. Zvose zvaiitwa mujeri zvaitariswawo naJosefi. 
Genesis39:23 Mutariri wejeri haaimbozvinetsa nezvinhu zvaitariswa naJosefi nokuti Tenzi aiva naJosefi achimubatsira kuti zvose zvaaiita zvibudirire. 
Genesis40:1 Kwakati kwapera nguva yakati kuti, mukuru mukuru wamambo weIjipiti wokuona nezvewaini, nomukuru mukuru wavabiki vakatadzira tenzi wavo, mambo weIjipiti." 
Genesis40:2 Farao akashatirirwa vashandi vake vaviri ava vanoti mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini nomukuru mukuru wavabiki. 
Genesis40:3 Akavasunga akavapfigira mumba yomukuru mukuru wavachengeti vokwamambo, mujeri makanga makaiswawo Josefi muya." 
Genesis40:4 Mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi iyeyo akaudza Josefi kuti avashandire. Vakagara mujeri kwenguva ndefu. 
Genesis40:5 Rimwe zuva vashandi vamambo weIjipiti vaviri vaya, vaiti mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini nomukuru mukuru wavabiki vachiri mujeri kudaro, vakarota hope usiku humwechete. Mumwe nomumwe wavo akarota hope dzake dzaiva nezvadzaireva." 
Genesis40:6 Ava mangwanani Josefi akauya akavaona vakasuruvara. 
Genesis40:7 Akabvunza vashandi vaFarao ava vaiva mujeri pamwechete naye muimba yatenzi wake achiti, “Ko nhasi uno zviso zvenyu zvakati hurududu kusuwa seiko?”" 
Genesis40:8 Vakamuti, “Tarota hope dzedu, asi tashaya munhu anogona kudzidudzira.” Josefi ndokuti kwavari, “Ko handiti kududzira hope ndokwaMwari here? Dondirondedzerai henyu ndinzwe.”" 
Genesis40:9 Ipapo mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini akarondedzera Josefi hope dzake achiti, “Ndarota ndichiona mugirepisi." 
Genesis40:10 Mugirepisi wacho wanga una mapazi matatu. Pawangoti bukirei, wabva waburitsa tumaruva. Matsumbu awo akabva aita magirepisi akaibva." 
Genesis40:11 Ndanga ndakabata mukombe waFarao muruoko rwangu. Ndatora magirepisi ndikasvinira muto wacho mumukombe ndikapa Farao.” 
Genesis40:12 Josefi akamuti, “Hezvinoi zvadzinoreva: Mapazi matatu anoreva mazuva matatu." 
Genesis40:13 Kana mazuva matatu apera, Farao achatonga mhosva yenyu, agokudzoserai kubasa renyu. Ipapo muchagamuchidzazve mambo mukombe wake sezvamaiita kare somukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini." 
Genesis40:14 Asi ndinokumbira kuti muzondiyeukawo kana zvazokufambirai zvakanaka. Mundinzwire tsitsi, mundirevererewo kuna Farao, kuti ndibudiswe muno," 
Genesis40:15 nokuti zvechokwadi ini ndakabiwa kunyika yavaHebheru. Kunyange kuno hapana chandakatadza chingasakise kuti ndiiswe mujeri.” 
Genesis40:16 Kuzoti mukuru mukuru wavabiki anzwa dudziro yakanaka yakanga yapiwa naJosefi akati, “Neniwo ndarota ndakatakura pamusoro tswanda nhatu dzakaturikidzana dzanga dziine chingwa." 
Genesis40:17 Mutswanda yapamusoro manga muine mhando nemhando dzezvokudya zvaFarao, asi zvanga zvichidyiwa neshiri zviri mutswanda yanga iri pamusoro pangu.”" 
Genesis40:18 Josefi ndokupindura achiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvinoreva hope dzenyu: Tswanda nhatu dzinoreva mazuva matatu." 
Genesis40:19 Kana mazuva matatu apera, Farao achatonga mhosva yenyu, agokusungirirai mumuti shiri dzichizodya mutumbi wenyu.”" 
Genesis40:20 Kuzoti kwapera mazuva matatu, mambo Farao akaitira varanda vake mabiko okupemberera zuva rokuberekwa kwake. Akaunza padare mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini pamwechete nomukuru mukuru wavabiki uya paiva namakurukota ake." 
Genesis40:21 Mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini akadzorerwa pabasa rake rakare rokugamuchidza mambo waini. 
Genesis40:22 Asi mukuru mukuru wavabiki akamusungirirwa mumuti, sokududzirwa kwazvakanga zvaitwa naJosefi." 
Genesis40:23 Mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini uya haana kuzorangarira Josefi, asi akatomukanganwa." 
Genesis41:1 Kwakati kwapera makore maviri, Farao akarota hope dzake. Akarota amire muna Nairi," 
Genesis41:2 achiona mhou nomwe dzemombe dzakanaka, dzakakora dzichibuda murwizi, dzichindofura mutsanga." 
Genesis41:3 Akaonazve dzimwe mhou nomwe dzakaipa, dzakaonda dzichibudawo murwizi, dzikandomira paiva nedzimwe mhou dziya dzakanaka pamahombekombe erwizi." 
Genesis41:4 Mhou dzakaonda dzakadya mhou dzakakora. Farao ndokubva apepuka. 
Genesis41:5 Akavatazve, ndokurota dzimwe hope. Akaona hura nomwe dzekoroni dzakasvika dzakanaka dzaiva padzinde rimwechete." 
Genesis41:6 Akaona hura nomwe dzekoroni nhete dzakanga dzisina kusvika, dzakanga dzakaomeswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva." 
Genesis41:7 Hura nhete dzakamedza hura dziya dzakasvika, Farao akapepuka, wanei kuti kwaiva kurota chete." 
Genesis41:8 Kuzoti kwaedza Farao akanetseka zvikuru. Akatuma vanhu kundodaidza n'anga dzose dzomuIjipiti navachenjeri vose. Akavarondedzera hope dzake, asi havana kugona kudzidudzira kuna Farao." 
Genesis41:9 Ipapo mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvewaini akataura kuna Farao achiti, “Nhasi uno ndayeuchidzwa kutadza kwangu." 
Genesis41:10 Handiti imi mambo makambotishatirirwa isu varanda venyu, ini nomukuru mukuru wevabiki, makatisunga tikaiswa mujeri, mumba yomukuru wavachengeti vokwamambo." 
Genesis41:11 Tose tiri vaviri takarota hope usiku humwechete. Hope dzomumwe nomumwe wedu dzaiva nezvedzaireva. 
Genesis41:12 Takanga tiine rimwe jaya rechiHebheru raiva muranda womukuru wavachengetedzi iyeyo. Takamurondedzera hope dzedu, iye akabva adudzira chiroto chimwe nechimwe." 
Genesis41:13 Zvose zvaakadudzira, ndizvo zvakazoitika kwatiri. Ini ndakadzorerwa pabasa rangu, mubiki akasungirirwa akafa.”" 
Genesis41:14 Ipapo Farao akatuma munhu kundodaidza Josefi. Vakamukurumidzisa kubuda mujeri muya. Akaveura ndebvu dzake vakamupfekedza dzimwe hanzu, ndokuenda naye kuna Farao." 
Genesis41:15 Farao akataura kuna Josefi achiti, “Ndakarota hope, asi hakuna munhu agona kudzidudzira. Zvino ndanzwa nezvako zvichinzi kana munhu akakurondedzera hope dzake, iwe unogona kudzidudzira.”" 
Genesis41:16 Josefi akapindura Farao achiti, “Kwete ini, changamire, asi Mwari ndiye angakupei dudziro chaiyo.”" 
Genesis41:17 Farao ndokuti, “Ndakarota ndimire pamahombekombe aNairi," 
Genesis41:18 ndikaona murwizi muchibuda mhou nomwe dzakanaka, dzakakora dzichifura zvadzo mutsanga." 
Genesis41:19 Kwakazobudazve dzimwe mhou nomwe, dzakaondoroka, zvokusara dzava marangwanda chaiwo zvandisati ndamboona munyika yeIjipiti yose." 
Genesis41:20 Mhou dzakaondoroka dziye dzakadya mhou dzakakora dziya. 
Genesis41:21 Asi dzakasara dziya padzakadzidya hakuna aigona kuzviona kuti dzadya dzimwe nokuti dzakaramba dzakangoondoroka sapakutanga paya. Pakarepo ndakapepuka. 
Genesis41:22 Ndakarotazve ndichiona hura nomwe dzembesanwa dzaiva padzinde rimwechete dzine hura dzakasvika. 
Genesis41:23 Pakazobudawo dzimwe hura nomwe nhete dzisina kusvika dzakanga dzakaomeswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva. 
Genesis41:24 Hura nhete dzakamedza hura nomwe dziya dzakanga dzakasvika. Ndakarondedzera kun'anga hope dzangu, asi hakuna kana imwechete yadzo yakagona kudzidudzira.”" 
Genesis41:25 Ipapo Josefi akati kuna Farao, “Changamire, hope dzenyu dziri mbiri dziri kunanga chinhu chimwechete. Mwari akuratidzai imi Farao zvaava kuda kuita." 
Genesis41:26 Mhou nomwe dzakakora zvinoreva makore manomwe. Hura nomwe dzakasvika zvinorevawo makore manomwe. Hope dzacho dzinongova dzimwechetedzo. 
Genesis41:27 Mhou nomwe dziye dzakaondoroka dzakazogumisira kubuda nehura nomwe dzembesanwa dzakanga dzisina kusvika dziya, dzakanga dzakaomeswa nemhepo yokumabvazuva, achava makore manomwe emvemve yenzara huru." 
Genesis41:28 Ndizvo zvandambotaura wani kwamuri Farao, kuti Mwari akuratidzai zvaava kuda kuita." 
Genesis41:29 Kuri kuuya makore manomwe emaguta chaiwoiwo munyika yose yeIjipiti. 
Genesis41:30 Asi kuchazouyawo makore manomwe enzara huru zvokuti vanhu vachakanganwa makore ose emaguta nokuti nyika yose yeIjipiti ichaparara nenzara. 
Genesis41:31 Makore emaguta achakanganikwa nokuti nzara yacho ichanyanyisa kuipa. 
Genesis41:32 Chiroto chenyu chapamhidzwa ruviri nokuti Mwari ndizvo zvaatoronga. Iye Mwari achakurumidza kuzviita. 
Genesis41:33 Zvino imi dai mukasarudza munhu akangwara anoziva kunyatsoronga zvingaitwe, mumuite mukuru mukuru anotarisa zvomunyika yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:34 Musarudzewo vamwe vatariri munyika ino. Pamasaga mashanu embesanwa, imi mambo mutore rechishanu mumakore manomwe emaguta." 
Genesis41:35 Ngavaunganidze zvokudya zvose zvamakore akanaka achauya, vazvitutire pamunenge mavarayira, vazvichengetere mumaguta mavanogara." 
Genesis41:36 Ndizvo zvichachengeterwa nyika ino kuitira makore manomwe enzara huru ichabaya nyika yeIjipiti, nyika irege kuparara nenzara.”" 
Genesis41:37 Farao namakurukota ake ose vakafadzwa nezano raJosefi, vakaribvuma." 
Genesis41:38 Farao akataura namakurukota ake achiti, “Ndokupi kwatingawane munhu anokunda uyu Josefi ane mweya waMwari?”" 
Genesis41:39 Farao akatiwo, kuna Josefi, “Mwari zvaadai kukuratidza izvozvo zvose, hapana munhu mumwe akangwara sewe angazive kunyatsoronga zvokuita." 
Genesis41:40 Ndiwe wava mutongi mukuru wezvapamuzinda wangu. Vanhu vangu vose vanosungirwa kuita sokutaura kwaunenge waita. Asi kana zvava zvoumambo ndipo poga pandiri mukuru kwauri.” 
Genesis41:41 Farao akataurirawo Josefi kuti, “Chionaka, ndakugadza kuti utonge nyika yose yeIjipiti.” Farao akabvisa mhete yake youmambo pamunwe wake akaipfekedza pamunwe waJosefi." 
Genesis41:42 Akamupfekedzawo hanzu dzerineni dzakanaka kwazvo nenyembe yecheni dzendarama muhuro make. 
Genesis41:43 Mambo akati Josefi akwire mungoro yechipiri youmambo. Mberi kwake kukagotungamidzwa vaidaidzira vachiti, “Gwadamai muchimuremekedza.” Ndiko kugadzwa kwakaitwa Josefi kuti atonge nyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis41:44 Farao akatiwo kuna Josefi, “Ini ndini mambo munyika yose yeIjipiti. Hapana munhu achaita chinhu kunyange chipi zvacho asina kubvumirwa newe.”" 
Genesis41:45 Farao akatumidza Josefi zita rokuti Zafenatipanea, akamupawo mukadzi ainzi Asinati, mwana waPotifera mupristi weguta reOni. Naizvozvo Josefi akabuda akafamba neIjipiti achiona." 
Genesis41:46 Josefi akanga ava namakore makumi matatu nguva yaakapiwa basa naFarao mambo weIjipiti. Ndopaakandeya nenyika yose yeIjipiti. 
Genesis41:47 Pamakore manomwe emaguta nyika yakabereka mbesa zhinji kwazvo. 
Genesis41:48 Josefi akaunganidza zvokudya zvose zvamakore manomwe amaguta munyika yeIjipiti achiunganidza zvokudya izvo. Muguta rimwe nerimwe aitutira mbesa dzaikohwiwa muminda yakapoteredza guta racho iroro. 
Genesis41:49 Saizvozvo Josefi akaunganidza mbesanwa zhinji kwazvo, dzakawanda sejecha regungwa kusvikira arega zvokuverenga mbesanwa dzacho nokuti dzakanga dzawandisa." 
Genesis41:50 Makore enzara asati asvika, Josefi akaita vana vakomana vaviri, vaakaberekerwa naAsenati mwana waPotifera mupristi wokuOni." 
Genesis41:51 Josefi akatumidza mwana wake wedangwe zita rokuti Manase achiti, “Mwari andibatsira kukanganwa nhamo dzangu nemhuri yababa vangu yose.”" 
Genesis41:52 Josefi akatumidza mwana wake wechipiri zita rokuti Efuremu, akati, “Mwari andipa vana ndiri munyika yenhamo yangu mandiri.”" 
Genesis41:53 Makore manomwe emaguta muIjipiti akazopera. 
Genesis41:54 Makore manomwe enzara ndokubva atanga sezvakanga zvarehwa naJosefi. Panyika pose pakava nenzara asi muIjipiti yose maiva nezvokudya. 
Genesis41:55 Kuzoti nyika yose yeIjipiti yarumwawo nenzara vanhu vakachema kuna Farao vachichemera chokudya. Farao akataurira vaIjipiti vose achiti, “Endai kuna Josefi, muite zvaanokuudzai.”" 
Genesis41:56 Pakanga zvino nzara yaruma panyika pose, Josefi akazozarura matura embesanwa akavamba kutengesera vaIjipiti vose zvokudya nokuti Ijipiti yakanga yaparara nenzara." 
Genesis41:57 Vanhu vedzimwe nyika dzose vakauya kuIjipiti kwaiva naJosefi kuzotenga zvokudya nokuti nzara yakanga yabaya pasi pose. 
Genesis42:1 Jakobho paakazviziva kuti kuIjipiti kune mbesanwa, akabvunza vana vake achiti, “Maita seiko kungotarisana kudai?" 
Genesis42:2 Inga ndakanzwa kuti kuIjipiti kune mbesanwa. Dai mukaendawo ikoko mundotitengera zvokudya tipone, tirege kufa.”" 
Genesis42:3 Ipapo vakoma vaJosefi gumi vakaenda kuIjipiti kundotenga zvokudya. 
Genesis42:4 Asi Jakobho haana kuendesa Bhenjamini munun'una waJosefi pamwechete navo, aiti zvimwe angawane chinomuwana." 
Genesis42:5 Nokudaro vanakomana vaJakobho vakauya kuzotenga zvokudya pamwechete navamwe vanhu vakanga vachiuyawo ikoko nokuti muKanani makanga mave nenzara. 
Genesis42:6 Josefi aiva changamire munyika yeIjipiti. Ndiye aitengesera vanhu vose venyika iyoyo zvokudya. Vakoma vaJosefi vakasvikomugwadamira uso vakati pasi kota kota vachimuremekedza. 
Genesis42:7 Josefi akaona vakoma vake akavaziva, asi akavabata sevatorwa akataura navo achivajinyura achiti, “Mabva kupiko?” Ivo vakati, “Tabva kunyika yeKanani, tauya kuzotenga zvokudya.”" 
Genesis42:8 Josefi akaziva zvake vakoma vake, asi ivo havana kumuziva." 
Genesis42:9 Josefi akayeuka hope dziye dzaakarota dzaitaura nezvavo ndokuti, “Muri vasorika imi, mauya kuzoongorora nyika ino kuti muone payakaita zinyekenyeke mugoirwisa.”" 
Genesis42:10 Ivo vakati, “Kwete changamire! Isu varanda venyu tauya kuzotenga zvokudya chete." 
Genesis42:11 Tose tiri vana vomunhu mumwechete. Tiri vanhu vakavimbika. Isu varanda venyu hatisiri vasori kwete.” 
Genesis42:12 Josefi akati, “Aiwa, chamavinga imi kuzoongorora nyika ino kuti muone payakaita zinyekenyeke mugoirwisa.”" 
Genesis42:13 Ivo vakati, “Isu varanda venyu tiri vana gumi navaviri. Tiri vana vomunhu mumwechete. Tinogara kunyika yeKanani. Munun'una wedu wokupedzesera akasara nababa asi mumwechete akatisiya.”" 
Genesis42:14 Josefi akati, “Ndokusaka ndati muri vasori." 
Genesis42:15 Ndinopika namambo Farao! Imi hamubve pano kana munun'una wenyu muduku asina kuuya pano. Ndipo pandichaziva kuti muri kutaura chokwadi. 
Genesis42:16 Tumai mumwe wenyu andotora munun'una wenyu, asi imi vamwe mose muchasara muusungwa. Ndipo patichazoziva kuti muri kureva chokwadi here kana kuti kwete. Kana zvisina kudaro, ndinopika naFarao, muri vasori.”" 
Genesis42:17 Josefi akabva avaisa vose mujeri kwamazuva matatu. 
Genesis42:18 Kuzoti mazuva matatu apera Josefi akati, “Ini ndinotya Mwari. Kana muchida kurarama chiitai zvandichareva." 
Genesis42:19 Kana muri vanhu vanovimbika mumwe wenyu ngaasare ari mujeri. Vamwe vose moenda zvenyu nezvokudya zvokundopa mhuri dzenyu dzine nzara," 
Genesis42:20 mozouya kwandiri nomunun'una wenyu wokupedzesera ndipo pachaonekwa kana zvamuri kutaura zviri zvechokwadi, murege kufa.” Vakaita saizvozvo." 
Genesis42:21 Vakataurirana pachavo vachiti, “Mazvionaka! Isu takapara mhaka pamusana pomunun'una wedu wataiona achitambudzika achiteterera isu tikarega kuita hanya naye. Saka nhasi uno zvatiwirawo.”" 
Genesis42:22 Ipapo Rubheni akavati, “Muchiri kuyeuka here zuva riya randakati kwamuri regai kuitira mwana zvakaipa, mukaramba kunditeerera? Zvino maonaka ropa romunun'una wedu rava kutipfukira.”" 
Genesis42:23 Vakanga vasingazivi kuti Josefi ainzwa zvavaitaurirana nokuti Josefi akanga achiturikirwa. 
Genesis42:24 Josefi akasuduruka akandosvimha misodzi. Akadzokazve akataura navo, akazotora Simeoni ndokumusunga, vamwe vose vachizviona." 
Genesis42:25 Josefi akarayira kuti tsapo dzavo dzizadzwe nembesanwa. Akatiwo mari yomumwe nomumwe idzoserwe mutsapo yake, vapiwewo mbuva yaparwendo. Vakaitirwa saizvozvo." 
Genesis42:26 Ipapo vakatakudza madhongi avo tsapo dzembesanwa vakapinda munzira. 
Genesis42:27 Kuzoti vasvika pavakarara, mumwe wavo akasunungura tsapo yake kuti ape dhongi rake zvokudya, wanei mari yake iri pamuromo wetsapo yake." 
Genesis42:28 Akataurira vamwe vake, achiti, “Ndadzoserwa mari yangu iyi, tarisai muone iyi iri pamuromo wetsapo yangu.” Vakarohwa nehana vakadedereswa nazvo. Vakataurirana vachiti, “Ko Mwari aitireiko kudai?”" 
Genesis42:29 Pavakasvika kuna baba wavo Jakobho kuKanani vakavarondedzera zvose zvakanga zvaitika kwavari vachiti," 
Genesis42:30 “Murume watakaona'ku, changamire wenyika iyoyo akatijinyura achititi, tiri vasori vauya kuzoongorora nyika iyoyo." 
Genesis42:31 Asi isu takamuti, ‘Tiri vanhu vanovimbika hatisi vasori." 
Genesis42:32 Tiri vakomana gumi navaviri, vana vomunhu mumwechete. Asi mumwe wedu akatisiya. Munun'una wedu wokupedzesera akasara nababa vedu kuKanani.’ ”" 
Genesis42:33 Ipapo murume iyeyo, changamire wenyika iyoyo akatiti, “Ini ndichaziva kuti muri vanhu vanovimbika kana masiya mumwe wenyu kuno. Imi vamwe mose motora zvenyu mbesanwa muende kundopa mhuri dzenyu dziri munzara." 
Genesis42:34 Mukauya nomunun'una wenyu wokupedzesera, ndipo pandichaziva kuti hamusi vasori, asi kuti muri vanhu vakavimbika. Ipapo ndichazokudzoserai mumwe wenyu, mozoita zvenyu mhindu dzokushava nadzo mari munyika ino.”" 
Genesis42:35 Pavakanga vodurura mbesanwa dzavo, vakawana mutsapo yomumwe nomumwe muine mari yake yakapfundirwa papfundo. Ivo nababa wavo pavakaona mapfundo emari yavo vakarohwa nehana vakatya." 
Genesis42:36 Baba vavo, Jakobho vakati, “Zvino mandipedzera vana vangu. Josefi haasisipo. Simeoni haasisipo zvakare. Zvino munoda kutorazve Bhenjamini! Izvi zvose zvandiwira!”" 
Genesis42:37 Rubheni akapindura baba vake achiti, “Kana ndikasadzoka naBhenjamini, urayai zvenyu vana vangu vakomana vari vaviri. Muisei mumaoko angu, ndini ndinodzoka naye kwamuri.”" 
Genesis42:38 Asi Jakobho akati, “Mwana wangu haamboenda nemi. Mukoma wake akafa. Ndiye oga angosara. Dzimwe nguva angawane chinomuwana munzira. Kana mukadaro muchaita kuti ini ndachena musoro kudai ndisvike pakufa ndiine shungu mumwoyo.”" 
Genesis43:1 Nzara yakaruma zvakanyanya panyika. 
Genesis43:2 Kuzoti zvokudya zvavakanga vabva nazvo kuIjipiti zvapera, baba vavo vakati kwavari, “Endaizve mundotitengera twokudya.”" 
Genesis43:3 Asi Judha akavati, “Murume wacho akatikohomedza kuti, ‘Handidi kana kumbokuonai pano pandiri kana musina munun'una wenyu.’" 
Genesis43:4 Kana mukatibvumira kuenda nomunun'una wedu tichandokutengerai zvokudya. 
Genesis43:5 Asi mukaramba naye, isu hatingaende nokuti murume iyeyo akati, ‘Hamuzotenderwi kundiona kana musina munun'una wenyu.’ ”" 
Genesis43:6 Iye Isiraeri ndokuti, “Makaitireiko zvakaipa zvikadai? Makanga muchamuudzireiko kuti mune munun'una?”" 
Genesis43:7 Ivo vakati, “Murume iyeyo akatibvunzisisa kwazvo nezvedu nezvehama dzedu achiti, ‘Baba venyu vapenyu here? Mune mumwe munun'una here? Isu taingopindura zvatainge tabvunzwa chete. Ko taigoziva seiko kuti achazotiti uyai nomunun'una wenyu.’ ”" 
Genesis43:8 Judha akati kuna baba vake Isiraeri, “Dai mukandipa zvenyu mwana uyu tipinde munzira tiende kuti tose imi nesu navana vedu tipone tirege kufa." 
Genesis43:9 Ini pachangu ndichamuchengeta. Chinenge chamuwana chawana ini. Kana ndikasadzoka naye ndichikupai ari mupenyu, mhosva ichava yangu upenyu hwangu hwose." 
Genesis43:10 “Dai tisina kunonoka, pari zvino tingadai takatodzokerako ruviri rwese.”" 
Genesis43:11 Baba wavo Isiraeri vakavati, “Kana zvakadaro chidai izvi, mochitorawoka zvinhu zvakanaka zvatinazvo kuno motakura mutsapo dzenyu, moenda nazvo kundopa changamire iyeyo. Motakurawo twokuzora tunonhuhwira notuuchi namasiriridzi nemura neshomwe dzokudya namaarimondi." 
Genesis43:12 Takurai mari yakapetwa kaviri kuwanda. Dzokeraiko nemari yamakadzorerwa iya yakaiswa pamuromo wetsapo dzenyu, zvimwe vangadaro vakakanganisa," 
Genesis43:13 mutorewo munun'una wenyu musimuke muende, mudzokere zvenyu kumurume iyeyo zvakare." 
Genesis43:14 Iye Aripagomo ngaakubatsirei, murume wacho agokuitirai tsiye nyoro abvume kuti Simeoni naBhenjamini vadzoke pamwechete nemi. Kana ndarasikirwa navana vangu ndarasikirwawo.”" 
Genesis43:15 Varume ava vakatora chipo ichi nemari yakapetwa kaviri kuwanda, pamwe chete naBhenjamini, vakasimuka vakaenda kuIjipiti kwavakasvika vakaonana naJosefi." 
Genesis43:16 Kuzoti Josefi aona vaina Bhenjamini, akaudza mutariri wezvemba yake achiti, “Enda navarume ava kumba kwangu undobaya chipfuwo ugadzire zvokudya. Varume ava vachadya neni masikati ano.”" 
Genesis43:17 Mutariri uyu akaita zvaakaudzwa naJosefi, ndokuenda navo kumba kwaJosefi." 
Genesis43:18 Varume ivavo vakatya pavakaunzwa kumba kwaJosefi. Vakati, “Taunzwa kuno nokuda kwemari iya yakadzoserwa mutsapo dzedu parwendo rwokutanga. Atiunza muno achida kuwana manzvengeredzero okutipomera mhosva achibva atisunga otiita varanda vake achibva atitorera madhongi edu.”" 
Genesis43:19 Nokudaro vakaenda kumutariri wezvemba yaJosefi vakataura naye vari pamusuo wemba. 
Genesis43:20 Vakati, “Tapota changamire, takambouya kuno kuzotenga zvokudya" 
Genesis43:21 asi takati tichisvika patakavata usiku, takasunungura tsapo dzedu, wanei mari iya yakanga yabviswa nomumwe nomumwe wedu iri pamuromo wetsapo yake yakangodaro nomwero wayo chaiwo. Zvino heinoi mari yacho tadzoka nayo. Asi hatizivi akaisa mari yacho mutsapo dzedu." 
Genesis43:22 Izvozvi totouya neimwe mari mumaoko kuzotenga zvokudya. Asi iya iya hatimboziva akaiisa mutsapo dzedu.” 
Genesis43:23 Mutariri uyu ndokuti, “Regai zvenyu kutambudzika. Musatye zvenyu. Mwari wenyu, iye Mwari wababa wenyu, ndiye chete akakuisirai mari mutsapo dzenyu. Mari yenyu ndini ndakanga ndaigamuchira.” Ipapo akabva avaunzira Simeoni." 
Genesis43:24 Mutariri uyu akapinda navo mumba maJosefi. Akavapa mvura, vakashamba tsoka dzavo. Akapawo madhongi avo zvokudya." 
Genesis43:25 Varume ivavo vakafanogadzirira zvipo zvavo vachimirira Josefi akanga anzi achauya masikati kuzodya navo. 
Genesis43:26 Josefi akazosvika mumba umu, varume ava vakandomugwadamira vachimupa zvipo zvavo." 
Genesis43:27 Josefi akavabvunza zvokumusha kwavo achiti, “Ko baba venyu vaya vamakati vakwegura vakadii zvavo? Vachiri vapenyu here?”" 
Genesis43:28 Ivo vakati, “Muranda wenyu ivo baba vedu varipo zvavo, vapenyu vaya.” Vakagwadamira Josefi vachimuremekedza." 
Genesis43:29 Josefi akatarisa ndokuona Bhenjamini munun'una wake, buda ndibudewo naye akati, “Saka uyu ndiye munun'una wenyu wokupedzesera wamakandiudza nhai? Mwari ngaakunzwire nyasha mwanangu!”" 
Genesis43:30 Pakarepo Josefi akanzwa mwoyo wake kurwadza pamusoro pomunun'una wake, akabva akurumidza kupinda mumba yomukati kundosvimha misodziari imomo." 
Genesis43:31 Akashamba kumeso kwake akabudamo. Akazvisimbisa ndokuti, “Pakurai zvokudya.”" 
Genesis43:32 Vakapira Josefi zvokudya pake oga. Hama dzake dzakadyirawo padzo dzoga. VaIjipiti vaivamo vakadyirawo pavo voga, nokuti vaIjipiti pachavo vaiti kudya nevaHebheru, chinhu chakashoreka." 
Genesis43:33 Vakagara pakatarisana naJosefi vakanyatsorongwa namazero avo kubvira kudangwe kusvikira kugotwe zvokuti vakatotarisana vachishamiswa nazvo. 
Genesis43:34 Zvokudya zvaipakurwa zvichibva patafura yaJosefi. Asi Bhenjamini akapakurirwa zvokudya zvaidarika zvavamwe kakapetwa kashanu. Vakadya vakanwa vakafara pamwechete naye. 
Genesis44:1 Josefi akaraira mutariri wezvemba yake achiti, “Zadza tsapo dzavarume ava nezvokudya zvavanokwanisa kutakura, uise mari yomumwe nomumwe mumuromo wetsapo yake," 
Genesis44:2 uisewo kapu yangu iya yesirivha mumuromo wetsapo yegotwe racho pamwechete nemari nembesanwa dzake.” Mutariri akaita zvaakaudzwa naJosefi. 
Genesis44:3 Fume mangwana varume ava vakanzi vachienda zvavo namadhongi avo. 
Genesis44:4 Vachangobuda muguta vasati vaenda kure, Josefi akataurira mutariri wezvemba yake akati, “Tevera varume vaya, kana wavabata uti, ‘Seiko mandidzorera nechakaipa pane zvandakuitirai zvakanaka? Ko mazobireiko kapu yesirivha yatenzi wangu?" 
Genesis44:5 Hamuzivi here kuti ndoinonwira tenzi wangu uye anoishandisawo pakuona zvichazoitika? Matopara mhosva huru kwazvo!’ ” 
Genesis44:6 Mutariri paakavabata akavaudza mashoko iwaya. 
Genesis44:7 Varume ava vakati, “Ko changamire, ishe wedu anotaurireiko mashoko akadaro? Isu varanda venyu hatingaite chinhu chakadaro." 
Genesis44:8 Inga wani mari yatakawana mumiromo yetsapo dzedu takadzoka nayo tichibva kunyika yeKanani. Ko taizoba seiko sirivha kana ndarama mumba matenzi wenyu? 
Genesis44:9 Ani naani wedu isu varanda venyu, anenge awanikwa anayo, ngaafe. Isu vamwe tichava varanda vatenzi wenyu.”" 
Genesis44:10 Mutariri akati, “Ndizvozvo, tichaita zvamataura. Munhu wandichawana ane kapu iyoyo mutsapo yake, ndiye achava muranda wangu. Asi vamwe mose hamuzovi nemhosva.”" 
Genesis44:11 Ipapo mumwe nomumwe akaburutsa tsapo yake, akaisunungura." 
Genesis44:12 Mutariri akatanga kutsvaka mutsapo yomukuru akazogumisira neyorugotwe. Kapu yakazowanikwa mutsapo yaBhenjamini. 
Genesis44:13 Izvozvi zvakaita kuti vabvarure hanzu dzavo. Mumwe nomumwe akatakudza dhongi rake vakabva vadzokera kuguta kuya. 
Genesis44:14 Judha navamwe vake vakasvikowana Josefi achiri mumba make, vakamugwadamira vachimuremekedza." 
Genesis44:15 Josefi akavati, “Ko ndicho chii chamaita ichochi? Ko manga musingazive here kuti munhu akaita seni anogona kuziva zvakavanzika.”" 
Genesis44:16 Judha akati, “Tingati kudiiko kwamuri changamire? Ko tingataureiko iyo mhosva iri yedu? Mwari aisa pachena mhosva yedu. Saka isu tatova varanda venyu, iyesu pamwechete naiye awanikwa ane kapu yenyu.”" 
Genesis44:17 Asi Josefi akati, “Handizi munhu angaite izvozvo. Munhu awanikwa ane kapu yangu ndiye chete achava muranda wangu. Imi vamwe mose endai zvenyu kuna baba venyu mufambe zvakanaka.”" 
Genesis44:18 Judha akaswedera kuna Josefi akati, “Pamusoroi. Changamire regai zvenyu ini muranda wenyu ndimbotaurawo shoko muchinzwa nenzeve dzenyu, changamire. Musanditsamwire zvenyu nokuti imi makaita saFarao pachavo." 
Genesis44:19 Changamire, ndimi makatibvunza muchiti, ‘Muna baba here? Muno munun'una here?’" 
Genesis44:20 Isu ndokuti kwamuri changamire, ‘Tina baba vedu vave harahwa. Tine munun'una wedu akaberekwa baba vedu vatokwegura, asi mukoma wake akafa. Zvino uyu ndiye angosara ari oga mumba mamai vake. Baba vake vanomuda.’" 
Genesis44:21 Imi makatiudza isu varanda venyu kuti, ‘Uyai naye kwandiri ndinoda kumuona.’" 
Genesis44:22 Isu tikakupindurai changamire tichiti, ‘Mukomana iyeyo haangasiyane nababa vake nokuti kana akasiyana navo vangafe.’" 
Genesis44:23 Ipapo makatitaurira isu varanda venyu kuti, ‘Kana munun'una wenyu wokupedzesera asina kuuya nemi, handidi kana kukuonai pano pandiri.’" 
Genesis44:24 “Kuzoti tasvika kuna baba vedu, muranda wenyu, takavaudza zvamakanga mareva." 
Genesis44:25 Baba vedu pavakazoti, ‘Endaizve munotitengera twokudya,’" 
Genesis44:26 isu takati, ‘Hatingakwanise kuendako. Tingatoenda chete kana munun'una wedu achitoendawo nesu. Asi kana tisinaye, murume iyeyo haadi zvake kana kutiona pameso pake.’" 
Genesis44:27 Baba vedu, muranda wenyu, vakatiti, ‘Munoziva kuti mudzimai wangu Rakeri akandiberekera vana vaviri," 
Genesis44:28 mumwe akandisiya, ndikati akaparadzwa nezvikara chete kubvira ipapo handina kuzombomuonazve." 
Genesis44:29 Zvino kana mukanditorera zvakare Bhenjamini, kana akawana chinomuwana munenge maita kuti ini ndachena musoro ndisvike pakufa ndiine shungu mumwoyo.’" 
Genesis44:30 “Naizvozvo kana ndikadzokera kune muranda wenyu, ivo baba vangu, ndisina mukomana iyeyu wepamwoyo pavo wavanodisa zvikuru," 
Genesis44:31 pavanongoona kuti isu tinenge tisina mukomana iyeyu vanofa. Ivo varanda venyu tinobva takonzera kuti baba wedu, ivo muranda wenyu, vachena musoro vasvike pakufa vaine shungu mumwoyo." 
Genesis44:32 Ndinodaro nokuti muranda wenyu ini ndakatsidzira baba vangu kuti, ‘Kana ndisina kudzoka naye kwamuri ndini wacho ndichava nemhosva upenyu hwangu hwose.’" 
Genesis44:33 Saka ndinokumbira kuti ini muranda wenyu nditore nzvimbo yomwana uyu ndisare somuranda wenyu tenzi wangu, asi murege mukomana uyu aende zvake navakoma vake." 
Genesis44:34 Ko ndingaende seiko kuna baba vangu ndisina mukoma iyeyu? Handidi zvangu kuona kutambudzika kuchaita baba wangu.” 
Genesis45:1 Josefi akatadza kuzvisimbisa ari mberi kwavanhu vaivapo akadaidzira achiti, “Vamwe vanhu mose chimbobudai zvenyu panze.” Josefi akasara achizivisa kuvakoma navanun'una vake kuti iye ndiani." 
Genesis45:2 Akachema nezwi guru zvokuti vaIjipiti navanhu vomumuzinda waFarao vakamunzwa. 
Genesis45:3 Josefi akaudza vakoma navanun'una vake kuti, “Ndini Josefi! Baba vangu vachiri vapenyu here?” Vakoma navanun'una vake vakashaya romuromo nazvo ndokuti tuzu voshamiswa kuti inga chokwadi ndiye." 
Genesis45:4 Josefi akataurira vakoma navanun'una vake achiti, “Chiswederai zvenyu kuno.” Ivo ndokuswedera. Akati, “Ndini Josefi munun'una wenyu, wamakatengesa kuno kuIjipiti." 
Genesis45:5 Zvino regai zvenyu kusuruvara kana kuzvishatirirwa pamusana pokuti makanditengesa nokuti Mwari akafanondiunza kuno kuti ndibatsire kuchengetedza upenyu hwavanhu. 
Genesis45:6 Izvozvi tava mugore rechipiri renzara, asi kwasara mamwe makore mashanu achange asina munhu anozorima kana kukohwa." 
Genesis45:7 Asi Mwari akafanonditumira kuno kuti akuchengetedzerei chitsama chavanhu chinosara pasi pano uye, kuti pakati penyu vazhinji vapunyuke rufu zvinoshamisa." 
Genesis45:8 Saka hamusirimi makandiunza kuno, asi zvakaitwa naMwari. Ndiye akandigadza ndikava jinda guru raFarao. Ndini changamire mumuzinda wamambo. Ndini ndinotonga nyika yake yose yeIjipiti." 
Genesis45:9 “Chikurumidzai kuenda kuna baba vangu mundoti, ‘Zvanzi nomwana wenyu Josefi, Mwari akandiita changamire weIjipiti yose, uyai zvenyu kuno kwandiri, musanonoke." 
Genesis45:10 Mungazogara zvenyu mudunhu reGosheni, muve pedyo neni munozogarako navana navazukuru venyu nemombe dzenyu nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvenyu nezvose zvamunazvo." 
Genesis45:11 Ndichakuchengetai muri kuGosheni ikoko nokuti kuchine mamwe makore mashanu enzara. Mungadaro mukapinda muurombo imi nemhuri dzenyu nezvipfuwo zvenyu.’ 
Genesis45:12 “Handiti muri kuzvionera nameso enyu newewo Bhenjamini munun'una wangu kuti ndini Josefi chaiye ndiri kutaura nemi nomuromo wangu. 
Genesis45:13 Endai mundoudza baba wangu zvose zvoushe hwangu hwomuIjipiti. Vaudzeiwo zvose zvamaona mozokurumidza kuuya navo baba kuno.” 
Genesis45:14 Josefi akambundirana naBhenjamini munun'una wake akabva ahwihwidza kuchema, Bhenjamini ndokuhwihwidzawo." 
Genesis45:15 Ipapo Josefi akatsvoda vakoma vake vose achihwihwidza kuchema. Vakoma vake vakazokurukura naye. 
Genesis45:16 Shoko rakazosvikawo kumuzinda waFarao rokuti vakoma vaJosefi vakasvika. Farao namachinda ake vakafara kwazvo. 
Genesis45:17 Farao akati kuna Josefi, “Taurira vakoma vako kuti, ‘Chidaii izvi, takudzai madhongi enyu mudzokere kuKanani," 
Genesis45:18 mundotora baba venyu nemhuri dzenyu muuye kuno kwandiri ndichakupai pokugara pakanakisisa muno muIjipiti, mugowana zvokudya mugere zvakanaka.’" 
Genesis45:19 Uvatiwo, ‘Daii. Torai ngoro dzimwe dzomunyika ino yeIjipiti dzokutakurisa vana namadzimai enyu mundotora baba venyu muuye." 
Genesis45:20 Regai zvenyu kuita hanya nezvezvinhu zvenyu zvichasarako, nokuti muchawana zvinhu zvakanyanya kunaka zvomuno muIjipiti.’ ”" 
Genesis45:21 Vanakomana ivava vaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo. Josefi akavapa ngoro sezvaakanzi naFarao aite, akavapawo mbuva yaparwendo." 
Genesis45:22 Josefi akapa vakoma vake mumwe nomumwe hanzu itsva. Asi akapa Bhenjamini hanzu shanu itsva, nemari yamashekeri yesirivha inokwana mazana matatu." 
Genesis45:23 Akatumira baba vake madhongi gumi makono akanga akatakura zvinhu zvakanaka zvomuIjipiti. Akatakudzawo mamwe madhongi makadzi gumi mbesanwa nechingwa nezvokudya zvababa wake zvaparwendo. 
Genesis45:24 Josefi akaonekana nehama dzake, asi pavakasimuka akavati, “Regai kukakavadzana munzira.”" 
Genesis45:25 Ipapo vakabva muIjipiti vakandosvika kunyika yeKanani kuna baba wavo Jakobho. 
Genesis45:26 Vakasvikoti, “Josefi achiri mupenyu! Ndiye ari kutonga nyika yose yeIjipiti!” Zvakaomesa Jakobho mate mukanwa nokuti haana kubvuma zvaakataurirwa." 
Genesis45:27 Jakobho akarondedzerwa zvose zvakanga zvarehwa naJosefi. Paakazoona ngoro dzakanga dzatumirwa naJosefi kuzovatakura, ndipo pakadzokazve simba rake." 
Genesis45:28 Isiraeri akati, “Zvatokwana izvozvi mwana wangu Josefi mupenyu! Ndinoda kuenda chete ndindomuona ndisati ndafa.”" 
Genesis46:1 Isiraeri akarongedza zvose zvaakanga anazvo ndokupinda munzira. Paakasvika kuBheerishebha akapira chibayiro kuna Mwari waIsaki baba wake. 
Genesis46:2 Usiku ihwohwo Mwari akaratidza Jakobho chiratidzo, akamudaidza achiti, “Jakobho Jakobho!” Jakobho akati, “Ndiri pano.”" 
Genesis46:3 Mwari ndokuti, “Ndini Mwari, Mwari wababa vako. Usatye hako kuenda kuIjipiti nokuti vana vako ndichavaita rudzi rukuru ikoko." 
Genesis46:4 Ndichaenda newe kuIjipiti, ndichazodzosazve vana vako kuno. Pakufa kwako Josefi ndiye achakudzora maziso achikupeta.”" 
Genesis46:5 Jakobho akabva kuBheerishebha ndokupinda munzira. Vana vaJakobho vakakwidza baba wavo pamwechete namadzimai avo navana vavo mungoro dzakanga dzatumirwa naFarao kundovatakura. 
Genesis46:6 Vakaenda nezvipfuwo zvavo noupfumi hwose hwavakanga vawana munyika yeKanani, vakandosvika kuIjipiti. Jakobho akasvikako nemhuri yake yose," 
Genesis46:7 aine vana vake vakomana navasikana navazukuru vake vakomana navasikana. Akaenda nemhuri yake yose kuIjipiti. 
Genesis46:8 Haanoi mazita avana vaIsiraeri, Jakobho navanakomana vake vaakasvika navo kuIjipiti. Dangwe raJakobho ndiRubheni." 
Genesis46:9 Vanakomana vaRubheni ndiHanoki naParu naHezironi naKarumi. 
Genesis46:10 Vanakomana vaSimeoni ndiJemueri naJamini naOhadhi naJakini naZohari naShauru mwana womukadzi wechiKanani. 
Genesis46:11 Vanakomana vaRevhi ndiGerishoni naKohati naMerari. 
Genesis46:12 Vanakomana vaJudha ndiEru naOnani naShera naFerezi naZera. Asi Eru naOnani vakafira kunyika yeKanani. Vanakomana vaFerezi ndiHezironi naHamuri. 
Genesis46:13 Vanakomana vaIsakari ndiTora naPuwa naJobhu naShimuroni. 
Genesis46:13 Vanakomana vaIsakari ndiTora naPuwa naJobhu naShimuroni. 
Genesis46:14 Vanakomana vaZebhuruni ndiSeredhi naEroni naJahireeri. 
Genesis46:15 Ivava ndivo vanakomana vaRea vaakaberekera Jakobho achiri kuMesopotamia. Rea akaberekawo mwanasikana ainzi Dhina. Vana vaRea navazukuru vake vaiva makumi matatu navatatu. 
Genesis46:16 Vanakomana vaGadhi ndiZefoni naHagi naShuni naEzibhoni naEri naArodhi naAreri. 
Genesis46:17 Vanakomana vaAsheru ndiImuna naIshivha naIshivhi naBheria nehanzvadzi yavo Sera. Vanakomana vaBheria ndiHebheru naMarikieri. 
Genesis46:18 Ava ndivo vana navazukuru vaZiripa, uya akapiwa naRabhani kuna Rea mwanasikana wake. Ziripa akaberekera Jakobho vana navazukuru gumi navatanhatu." 
Genesis46:19 Zvino vanakomana vaRakeri mudzimai waJakobho ndiJosefi naBhenjamini. 
Genesis46:20 Josefi ava munyika yeIjipiti akabereka Manase naEfuremu. Amai vavo ndiAsinati mwana waPotifera mupristi aigara muguta reOni. 
Genesis46:21 Vanakomana vaBhenjamini ndiBhera naBhekeri naAshibheri naJera kwouya Naamani naEhi naRoshi naMupimu naHupimu naAridhi. 
Genesis46:22 Ava ndivo vana navazukuru vaRakeri mudzimai waJakobho vose vari gumi navana. 
Genesis46:23 Mwanakomana waDhani ndiHushimu. 
Genesis46:24 Vanakomana vaNafutari ndiJazieri naJuni naJezeri naShiremu. 
Genesis46:25 Ivava ndivo vana vaBhiriha, uya akapiwa naRabhani kuna Rakeri mwanasikana wake. Vose pamwechete akaberekera Jakobho vana vanomwe." 
Genesis46:26 Vanhu vose vokwaJakobho vakaenda Ijipiti, zvizvarwa zvake zvaiva makumi matanhatu ane vatanhatu kusingaverengwi varoora vaJakobho." 
Genesis46:27 Vanakomana vaJosefi vakaberekerwa kuIjipiti vaviri. Saka vanhu vose vemba yaJakobho vakatanga kugara muIjipiti vaiva makumi manomwe. 
Genesis46:28 Jakobho akafanotuma Judha kuna Josefi achiti Josefi azondosangana navo kuGosheni ndokubva vaenda zvavo kudunhu reGosheni. 
Genesis46:29 Ipapo Josefi akapinda mungoro yake akaenda kuGosheni kundochingura baba vake, Isiraeri. Akasvikoona baba vake akatora nguva ndefu akavambundira achihwihwidza kuchema." 
Genesis46:30 Isiraeri akazoti kunaJosefi, “Zvino ndingachifa zvangu nokuti ndakuona uri mupenyu!”" 
Genesis46:31 Josefi akataura navakoma navanun'una vake navamwe vose vemba yababa vake achiti, “Ini ndava kundoudza Farao kuti, ‘Vakoma navanun'una vangu nemhuri yababa vangu vaye vaigara kunyika yeKanani vauya kwandiri.’" 
Genesis46:32 Basa rehama dzangu idzodzo nderokupfuwa zvipfuwo. Zvino vauya nemombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvavo nezvose zvavaiva nazvo. 
Genesis46:33 Kana imi mazodaidzwa naFarao achikubvunzai kuti, ‘Basa renyu ndereiko?’" 
Genesis46:34 Imi itii, ‘Isu varanda venyu takagara tichingova vanhu vokupfuwa zvipfuwo kubvira pahuduku hwedu kusvikira zvino iyesu tose namadzibaba edu.’ Kana madaro Farao achakubvumirai kugara mudunhu reGosheni,” nokuti vaIjipiti vakanga vakarimirana kumuganho nomunhu wose anoita basa rokupfuwa zvipfuwo." 
Genesis47:1 Josefi andozvisvitsa kuna Farao achiti, “Baba vangu navakoma navanun'una vangu vasvika vachibva kunyika yeKanani, vaine zvipfuwo zvavo nezvinhu zvavo zvose. Iye zvino vava kuGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:2 Josefi akatora vamwe vakoma vake vashanu, akenda navo kuna Farao." 
Genesis47:3 Farao akabvunza vakoma vaJosefi achiti, “Ko basa renyu ramunoziva kuita nderei?” Ivo vakati kuna Farao, “Basa redu isu varanda venyu nderokupfuwa zvipfuwo. Ndiro raiitwawo namadzibaba edu.”" 
Genesis47:4 Vakatiwo kuna Farao, “Isu varanda venyu tauya kuzombogarawo munyika menyu muno nokuti hatichisina mafuro ezvipfuwo zvedu, kuKanani kwaita nzara huru kwazvo, zvino tinokumbirawo kuti tigare zvedu mudunhu reGosheni.”" 
Genesis47:5 Farao akati kuna Josefi, “Baba vako navakoma vako vauya kwauri." 
Genesis47:6 Nyika yeIjipiti ndiyoyi yose yauri kuona iyi. Hama dzako ngadzigare zvadzo padzinoda pakadzinakira munyika ino. Ngavagare zvavo kudunhu reGosheni. Kana uchiziva kuti pane vamwe vavo nyanzvi dzamabasa vape ukuru pabasa rokuchengeta zvipfuwo zvangu.” 
Genesis47:7 Josefi akazoenda nababa vake Jakobho kundovaratidza kuna mambo Farao. Jakobho akakomborera Farao achimukwazisa. 
Genesis47:8 Mambo akabvunza Jakobho achiti, “Ko imi mava namakore manganiko?”" 
Genesis47:9 Jakobho akati kuna Farao, “Ini ndagara panyika ndiri munhu wokuti zvangu apa garei tamei apa garei tamei kwezana namakumi matatu amakore. Makore anga ari okutambura asi mashoma zvawo pane amadzimababa angu vakanga vari vanhu vokutama-tamawo.”" 
Genesis47:10 Jakobho akakomborera mambo akamuoneka ndokuenda zvake. 
Genesis47:11 Josefi akaita zvakarehwa naFarao, akapa baba vake nehama dzake pokugara munyika yeIjipiti. Akavapa matunhu akanaka kwazvo pedyo neguta rainzi Ramasesi." 
Genesis47:12 Josefi akariritira baba vake navakoma vake navanhu vose vemba yababa vake nepwere dzavo achivapa zvokudya zvaikwanirana nemhuri imwe neimwe. 
Genesis47:13 Zvino munyika yose makanga musisina zvokudya nokuti nzara yakanga yazotsviriridza kwazvo. Nyika yeIjipiti nenyika yeKanani dzakanga dzapera nenzara. 
Genesis47:14 Zvino nokutenga kwavakaita mbesanwa kudai, Josefi akakukuta mari yose yaiwanikwa muIjipiti nomuKanani achiitutira kumba kwaFarao." 
Genesis47:15 Kuzoti vanhu vomuIjipiti nevemuKanani vapererwa nemari, vaIjipiti vose vakauya kuna Josefi vakati, “Tipeiwo zvokudya, mari yedu yapera. Tofa here imi makatarisa?”" 
Genesis47:16 Josefi akati, “Kana mari yenyu yapera uyai nemombe dzenyu tigotsinhana nezvokudya.”" 
Genesis47:17 Saizvozvo vakauya nezvipfuwo zvavo zvaiti mabhiza nehwai nemombe namadhongi kuna Josefi, Josefi akavapawo zvokudya. Naizvozvo akakwanisa kuvapa zvokudya gore iroro rose achitsinhanisana navo nezvipfuwo zvavo." 
Genesis47:18 Gore iroro parakapera, ramangwana racho vanhu vakauyazve kwaari vachiti, “Changamire, hatingakuvanzirei kuti mari yedu yose yapera. Matanga edu ose ezvipfuwo ava enyu changamire. Hatichisina chokutenga nacho isu, chasara kwatiri miviri yedu neminda yedu." 
Genesis47:19 Ko tofa here imi makatarisa? Ko minda yedu yoparara zvayo here pamwe chete nesu? Chititengai zvenyu, mutengewo minda yedu mutipe zvokudya tive zvedu varanda vaFarao, minda yedu ive yake. Chenyu imi tipeiwo zvokudya tirege kufa. Mutipewo mbeu dzokudyara muminda yedu, irege kuita renje.”" 
Genesis47:20 Nokudaro Josefi akatenga nyika yose yeIjipiti ikabva yava yaFarao nokuti vaIjipiti vose vakatengesa minda yavo pamusana penzara yakanga yavabaya chaizvo nyika ndokubva yava yaFarao. 
Genesis47:21 Josefi akabvisa vanhu mumisha yavo munyika yose yeIjipiti achiti vagare mumaguta. 
Genesis47:22 Asi minda yavapristi ndiyo chete yaasina kutenga nokuti Farao aivapa nguva nenguva mugove wavo wavakatemerwa. Mugove uyu wavaipiwa naFarao ndiwo wavairarama nawo. Ndosaka vapristi vasina kutengesa minda yavo. 
Genesis47:23 Josefi akazotaurira vanhu achiti, “Nhasi uno ndakutengai imi neminda yenyu kuti muve varanda vamambo. Hedzino mbeu dzokudyara muminda." 
Genesis47:24 Kana mazokohwa, pamasaga mashanu munozounza saga rimwechete kuna mambo. Asi masaga mana achasara acho ndeenyu. Ndimo mamuchazowana mbeu dzokudyara nezvokudya zvenyu nezvemhuri dzenyu nepwere dzenyu.”" 
Genesis47:25 Vanhu vakati, “Changamire ndimi matotiponesa. Tiitirei zvenyu tsiye nyoro tive zvedu varanda vaFarao.”" 
Genesis47:26 Naizvozvo Josefi akaisa mutemo munyika yeIjipiti uripo nanhasi wokuti kana munhu akohwa masaga mashanu, rechishanu nderamambo. Asi minda yavapristi ndiyo yoga isina kutengwa namambo." 
Genesis47:27 VaIsiraeri vakagara munyika yeIjipiti mudunhu reGosheni, mhuri yavo yakawana upfumi huzhinji varimo, vakabereka vana vakawanda kwazvo." 
Genesis47:28 Jakobho akagara munyika yeIjipiti makore gumi namanomwe. Akazofa ava namakore zana namakumi manomwe ana makore manomwe. 
Genesis47:29 Nguva yaIsiraeri yokufa payakanga yava kuda kusvika, akadaidza mwana wake Josefi akati, “Ndapota kana uchindida isa ruoko rwako pasi pechidya changu utsidze kuti uchava wakatendeka kwandiri uvewo pachokwadi neni, usandivige muno muIjipiti," 
Genesis47:30 asi ndivige pakavigwa madzibaba angu. Unonditakura kubva muIjipiti muno wondondiviga kunzvimbo yavo yokuviga vakafa.” Josefi akati, “Ini ndichaita sokureva kwenyu.”" 
Genesis47:31 Jakobho akati, “Nditsidzire izvozvo.” Josefi ndokuvatsidza. Ipapo Jakobho akanga ari pamubhedha wake akabva atsikitsira musoro." 
Genesis48:1 Kuzoti kwati perei chinguva Josefi akaudzwa kuti baba vake varwara, nokudaro akaendako navanakomana vake vaviri Manase naEfuremu." 
Genesis48:2 Jakobho paakanzwa kuti mwana wake Josefi auya akazvisimbaradza akamuka akaita zvokugara pamubhedha. 
Genesis48:3 Jakobho akataurira Josefi achiti, “Iye Aripagomo akazviratidza kwandiri paRuzi kuKanani akandikomborera." 
Genesis48:4 Akanditiwo, ‘Ndichakupa vana vazhinji, ndigokuitai kuti muwande zvokuita madzinza namadzina avanhu. Ndichapa zvizvarwa zvako zvichauya nyika ino kuti ive yavo nokusingaperi.’" 
Genesis48:5 “Zvino vanakomana vako vaviri vakaberekerwa muno muIjipiti ndisati ndauya kuno vava vana vangu. Vana vako ava Efuremu naManase, vava vana vangu chaivo zvakangoita Rubheni naSimeoni." 
Genesis48:6 Asi vawakazoberekerwa mushure mavo, ndivo vachava vana vako. Nhaka yavo vanotozoiwana muzita ravakoma vavo ivavo." 
Genesis48:7 Ndinodaro nokuti pandaibva kuMesopotamia, amai vako Rakeri vakandifira panzira munyika yeKanani tava kuda kundosvika kuEfurati, ndiyowo Bheterehemu, ndikavaviga ipapo.”" 
Genesis48:8 Isiraeri paakaona vana vaJosefi vakomana akati, “Ko ava ndivananaaniko ava?”" 
Genesis48:9 Josefi akati kuna baba vake, “Ava ndivo vana vangu vandakapiwawo naMwari muno umu.” Iye akati, “Chiuya navo kuno ndivakomborere.”" 
Genesis48:10 Meso aIsiraeri akange oonera madzerere asisaone zvakanaka nokuti akanga akwegura. Josefi akaswededza vana vake pana baba vake. Jakobho akavatsvoda achivafungatira. 
Genesis48:11 Jakobho akataurira Josefi achiti, “Handina kufunga kuti ndichazokuonazwe. Asi Mwari akandibatsira ndikatoonawo navana vako.”" 
Genesis48:12 Josefi akazovabvisa pamakumbo ababa vake akabva apfugama akakotamisa musoro. 
Genesis48:13 Josefi akauya navana vake vari vaviri akati Efuremu kurudyi, Manase kuruboshwe. Akavaisa pana baba vake Isiraeri akati Efuremu kuruboshwe rwavo Manase kurudyi rwavo." 
Genesis48:14 Isiraeri akapesanisa maoko ake achiisa ruoko rwake rworudyi pamusoro waEfuremu aiva muduku, akaisa ruoko rwake rworuboshwe pamusoro waManase aiva dangwe." 
Genesis48:15 Jakobho akakomborera Josefi achiti, “Mwari aiteverwa namadzibaba angu Abhurahamu naIsaki, Mwari akava mufudzi wangu muupenyu hwangu hwose kusvikira zuva ranhasi," 
Genesis48:16 iye mutumwa waMwari aindinunura pose pandainge ndawirwa nenjodzi, ngaakomborerewo vakomana ava. Zita rangu namazita amadzibaba angu Abhurahamu naIsaki ngaarege kurova pavana ivava. Mwari ngaavape vana vazhinji.”" 
Genesis48:17 Josefi paakaona baba vake vaisa ruoko rwavo rworudyi pamusoro waEfuremu, hazvina kumufadza. Akabata ruoko rwababa vake achida kurubvisa pamusoro waEfuremu kuti aruise pamusoro waManase" 
Genesis48:18 Josefi akati, “Handizvo baba, uyu ndiye dangwe. Dai maisa ruoko rwenyu rworudyi pamusoro wake.”" 
Genesis48:19 Asi baba vake vakaramba vakati, “Ndinoziva zvandiri kuita mwanangu. Iye achazovawo dzinza guru ravanhu. Asi munun'una wake ndiye achava mukuru kupinda iye. Vana vaEfuremu vachava ndudzi zhinji dzavanhu.”" 
Genesis48:20 Jakobho akavakomborera pamusi iwoyo achiti, “VaIsiraeri vachakomborerana vachiti, ‘Mwari ngaakuitei saEfuremu naManase.’ ” Naizvozvo Jakobho akapa Efuremu ukuru hunopfuura hwaManase." 
Genesis48:21 Jakobho akarayira Josefi achiti, “Ini ndava kufa, asi Mwari achava nemi, achakudzoserai kunyika yemadzibaba enyu." 
Genesis48:22 Iwe ndinokupa mumwe mugove wandisingape vakoma nevanun'una vako. Ndinokupawo dunhu reShikemu randakatora pandakarwisa vaAmori nebakatwa rangu nouta hwangu.” 
Genesis49:1 Jakobho akakokorodza vanakomana vake akati, “Chiunganai pano mose ndikuudzei zvichazoitika kwamuri mune ramangwana." 
Genesis49:2 Unganai nuteerere imi vana Jakobho, munzwe zvandava kutaura ini Isiraeri baba wenyu." 
Genesis49:3 Rubheni, ndiwe dangwe rangu, chiratidzo chokutanga chesimba rangu, wandakabereka ndichiri kuzvinzwa. Pasimba napakukudzwa ndiwe wapamusoro." 
Genesis49:4 Unovhaira semvura iri kuvira, asi hauzovi mukuru nokuti wakapinda iwe mumba mangu, ini baba ukan'oresa pandinorara, uchitoenda zvako pauriri hwangu." 
Genesis49:5 “Simeoni naRevhi mukoma nomun'una, zvombo zvehondo zvavo ndezvokumutsisa musindo chete." 
Genesis49:6 Pabangano ravo handitsikipo, handina chandinoronga navo, nokuti vakauraya vanhu vakashatirwa. Vakacheka marunda emombe, vachiita zvoutsinye zvavo." 
Genesis49:7 Mwari ngaarange kutsamwa kwavo, nokuti kunotyisa. Ngaarange hasha dzavo nokuti dzinovaitisa utsinye. Ndichati mumwararire zvenyu muzvizvarwa zvaJakobho muti mwarara zvenyu mukati mavaIsiraeri." 
Genesis49:8 “Iwe Judha, ndiwe ucharumbidzwa nehama dzako. Uchadzipa huro dzavavengi vako uchivakurira, vana vababa vako vachakugwadamira." 
Genesis49:9 Judha mwana weshumba chaiyo, anobata nyama achibva adzokera kubako rake, ondozorora zvake akazvambarara. Seshumba hadzi hakuna angashinge kumumutsa." 
Genesis49:10 Tsvimbo youshe haizobvi pana Judha. Haazotorerwa nyembe youmambo, kusvikira muridzi wenyembe asvika. Ndudzi dzose dzavanhu dzichamuteerera." 
Genesis49:11 Achasungirira dhongi rake pamugirepisi achasungirira chigondora chake chedhongi pamugirepisi wakanaka kwazvo, hanzu dzake achisuka zvake muwaini, zvipfeko zvake achisuka muwaini yakati piriviri kutsvuka." 
Genesis49:12 Meso ake achatsvuka kunge waini, meno ake agochena kuti mbe-e somukaka." 
Genesis49:13 “Zebhuruni achava mugari wokumahombekombe kwegungwa. Nyika yake ichava yokusvikira ngarava, muganhu wake uchisvika kuSidhoni." 
Genesis49:14 “Isakari idhongi chairo kusimba, sedhongi riri pakati pemitoro yaro." 
Genesis49:15 Paachaona kuti agere panyika yakanaka nyika inomufadza kwazvo, achabvuma zvake kutakura mutoro pamapfudzi." 
Genesis49:16 “Dhani achavawo mutongi wavanhu vake, sezvichangoitawo mamwe madzinza evaIsiraeri." 
Genesis49:17 Dhani achaita senyoka iri panzira, senyoka inouturu iri panofamba vanhu, inoruma bhiza nechepazondo raro, mutasvi waro achiwira pasi negotsi." 
Genesis49:18 Tenzi we-e ini ndamirira ruponeso rwenyu. 
Genesis49:19 “Gadhi acharwiswa namagandanga, asi iye achatsikirirana nawo kutevera." 
Genesis49:20 “Asheru achawana zvokudya, zvokudya zvakawanda zvakanaka, zvinotodyiwawo kwazvo namadzimambo." 
Genesis49:21 “Nafutariwo ungati isheshe yenondo inotamba-tamba zvayo, inoberekawo mhuru dzakanaka." 
Genesis49:22 “Josefi akaita sembizi imire pachisipiti, ungati imbizi iri mujinga megomo." 
Genesis49:23 “Mhandu dzake dzinomurwisa zvinotyisa, dzichimudzingirira nouta nemiseve." 
Genesis49:24 Asi uta hwaJosefi hunoramba hwakatsigirwa. Maoko ake achiramba akasimbaradzwa, nesimba raiye Samasimbaose, waJakobho ndiye mufudzi ndiye bako raIsiraeri." 
Genesis49:25 Mwari wababa vako ngaakubatsire, iye Aripagomo akukomborere. Akukomborere nokukunayisira mvura, akupewo mvura inobva muvhu. Ngaakomborere madzimai enyu agobereka vana vavanozoyamwisa, akomborerewo zvipfuwo zvenyu zvigobereka vana vokuyamwisa." 
Genesis49:26 “Makomborero andakupa ini baba vako anopfuura makomborero anobva mumakomo epasi chigare. Anopfuura zvinokosha zviri mumakomo okugara nokugara. Ndiwo makomborero achava aJosefi, akasarudzwa naMwari kutungamirira vakoma vake." 
Genesis49:27 “Bhenjamini mhumhi chaiyo inorura, inobata nyama mangwanani, manheru yogara pasi kuigovanisa.”" 
Genesis49:28 Iwaya ose ndiwo madzinza gumi namaviri evaIsiraeri. Mashoko aya ndiwo akataurwa nababa wavo achivakomborera, achipa mumwe nomumwe chikomborero chakakodzerana naye." 
Genesis49:29 Jakobho akazorongera vana vake achiti, “Nguva yangu yokuti ndichiendawo kwakaenda vamwe vokwangu yava kusvika. Munofanira kuzondiviga pane madzibaba angu, mubako riya riri mugura raEfuroni worudzi rwechiHiti.”" 
Genesis49:30 Ndiro bako riya riri mugura kuMakipera riri nechokumabvazuva kweMamure, munyika yeKanani, rakatengwa naAbhurahamu pamwechete nomunda wacho kuna vaEfuroni muHiti ikava nzvimbo yavo yokuviga vanhu." 
Genesis49:31 Ipapo ndipo pakavigwa Abhurahamu nomudzimai wake Sara. Isaki nomudzimai wake Ribheka vakavigwawo ipapo. Rea ndakazomuvigwawo ipapo. 
Genesis49:32 Munda wacho nebako ririmo zvakatengwa kuvaHiti. 
Genesis49:33 Kuzoti Jakobho apedza kurongera vana vake akarara pamubhedha wake, ndiye sarai oendawo kwakaenda vamwe." 
Genesis50:1 Pakarepo Josefi akazviwisira pamubhedha paiva nababa vake akavatsvoda achihwihwidza kuchema. 
Genesis50:2 Josefi akarayira vanhu vaiita basa rokuomesa zvitunha kuti vanyatsoomesa chitunha chababa vake Isiraeri. Vanhu ivavo vakaita saizvozvo. 
Genesis50:3 Basa rokuomesa chitunha raida mazuva makumi mana. Saka ava vakaomesa chitunha chaIsiraeri vakapedza mazuva makumi mana vachiita basa racho. VaIjipiti vakachema Jakobho mazuva makumi manomwe. 
Genesis50:4 Kuzoti mazuva okuvachema apera, Josefi akataura namachinda aFarao achiti, “Kana mandinzwirawo tsitsi ndisvitsireiwo shoko kuna mambo Farao muchiti," 
Genesis50:5 baba vangu vakati, ‘Ini ndava kufa. Ndine guva rangu randakagadzira riri kunyika yeKanani. Zvino iwe nditsidzire kuti uchazondiviga muguva iroro.’ Saka zvino ndibvumireiwo kuti ndiende kundoviga baba vangu ndigozodzoka zvangu kuno.”" 
Genesis50:6 Farao akati, “Enda zvako undoviga baba vako sokutsidzirana kwawakaita navo.”" 
Genesis50:7 Josefi akaenda kundoviga baba vake. Akwirako namakurukota ose aFarao namachinda ake navakuru vakuru vose vemuIjipiti. 
Genesis50:8 Akaendawo navanhu vose vemba yake nehama dzake navamwe vemhuri yababa vake. Asi vana vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo zvose ndizvo zvakasara kuGosheni. 
Genesis50:9 Vakaenda vaine ngoro dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi, vari boka guru guru kwazvo." 
Genesis50:10 Vakasvika paburiro repaAtadhi riri kumhiri kwaJorodhani, vakachema vari ipapo vachiungudza nokuchema kukuru. Josefi akapedza mazuva manomwe ari ipapo achingochema baba vake." 
Genesis50:11 Vanhu venyika iyoyo, vaKanani pavakaona muchemero iwoyo waiitwa paburiro repaAtadhi, vakati, “Aiwa kuchema kuri kuitwa navaIjipiti kwakakura zvisingatauriki.” Naizvozvo vakatumidza buriro racho zita rokuti Kuchema kwavaIjipiti. Buriro iroro riri kumhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Genesis50:12 Vana vaJakobho vakaita zvavakanga varayirwa nababa wavo. 
Genesis50:13 Vakavatakura vakaenda navo kunyika yeKanani. Vakandovaviga nechokumabvazuva kweMamure mubako romugura repaMakipera, guru rakatengwa naAbhurahamu kuna Efuroni muHiti riri pakatarisana nokuMamure kuti rive nzvimbo yavo yokuviga vanhu." 
Genesis50:14 Josefi akaviga baba vake ndokudzokera kuIjipiti pamwechete nehama dzake navose vakanga vaenda naye. 
Genesis50:15 Vakoma vaJosefi zvavakaona kuti baba vavo vafa vakakurukurirana vachiti, “Zvimwe Josefi achiri kutivenga, zvimwe ari kuronga twaanoronga kutsiva zvakaipa zvose zvatakamuitira, hatizive.”" 
Genesis50:16 Naizvozvo vakatumira Josefi shoko vachiti, “Baba venyu vakasiya vati" 
Genesis50:17 mundoudza Josefi kuti, ‘Ndinokumbira kuti uregererewo vakoma vako zvitadzo nezvakaipa zvavakaita nokuti vakakuitira zvakaipa.’ Saka isu varanda vaMwari wababa venyu tinoti, tapota tiregerereiwo zvatakutadzirai.”" 
Genesis50:18 Vakoma vake vakazouyawo vakamugwadamira vachiti, “Onai isu tiri varanda venyu.”" 
Genesis50:19 Josefi akavati, “Musatye zvenyu. Ko munoti ini ndiri Mwari here?" 
Genesis50:20 Kunyange zvazvo imi makandiitira bangano rakaipa, Mwari akarishandisa kuita zvakanaka zvaaida zvokuponesa vanhu vazhinji, sezvazviri nhasi uno." 
Genesis50:21 Naizvozvo musatye zvenyu. Ini ndichakuchengetai mose navana venyu.” Josefi akavanyaradza achitaura mashoko okuvadzikamisa mwoyo. 
Genesis50:22 Josefi nemhuri yababa vake vakagara muIjipiti, akazofa ava nezana ramakore rina makore gumi." 
Genesis50:23 Josefi akaona vana navazukuru vaEfuremu. Akaonawo vana vaMakiri mwanakomana waManase vakaberekwa achiripo. 
Genesis50:24 Josefi akazotaurira hama dzake kuti, “Ini ndava kufa. Asi Mwari achakushanyirai, achazokutamisai munyika ino agoenda nemi kunyika yaakapikira Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho.”" 
Genesis50:25 Josefi akataurira vaIsiraeri kuti, “Ichokwadi kuti Mwari achakushanyirai. Saka imi tsidzai kuti muchatakura mutumbi wangu muchiendawo nawo.”" 
Genesis50:26 Josefi akafa ava nezana ramakore rine makore gumi. Vanhu vakaomesa chitunha chake vakachiisa mubhokisi muIjipiti imomo. 
Exodus1:1 Haanoi mazita avaIsiraeri vakaenda kuIjipiti naJakobho, mumwe nomumwe nemhuri yake." 
Exodus1:2 Kwaiti Rubheni naSimeoni naRevhi naJudha," 
Exodus1:3 kwoti Isakari naZebhuruni naBhenjamini 
Exodus1:4 naDhani, kwouya Nafutari naGadhi, naAsheru." 
Exodus1:5 Vana vose vaJakobho pamwechete navazukuru vake, vaikwana makumi manomwe. Josefi akatenge avako kuIjipiti kare." 
Exodus1:6 Josefi akazofa, vakoma vake vose vakafawo pamwechete navamwe vose vechizvarwa chavo." 
Exodus1:7 Asi vana vokwaIsiraeri vakaramba vachingoberekana vachiwanda zvikuru, vakazova rudzi rune simba vakatekeshera nenyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus1:8 Kwakazomuka mambo mutsva aitonga muIjipiti akanga asingazivi nezvaJosefi. 
Exodus1:9 Akayambira vanhu vake achiti, “Tarisai muone vaIsiraeri vanyanyisa kuwanda uye vava nesimba rawandisa kudarika isu." 
Exodus1:10 Zvino ngatitsvakei zano rokuti varege kuramba vachiwanda kudai. Ndinodaro nokuti musi unomuka hondo yokutirwisa, vachazoita rimwe navavengi vedu voita chirwirangwe chokutirwisa vakazotiza munyika ino.”" 
Exodus1:11 Naizvozvo vaIjipiti vakazoisa vanhu vokushandisa vaIsiraeri basa rinorema rechibharo rokuvarwadzisa. VaIsiraeri vakabatwa zvakaipa vachimanikidzwa kuita mabasa airema zvikuru. Vakavakira Farao maguta ematura. Maguta acho ainzi Pitomu neRamesesi. 
Exodus1:12 VaIsiraeri pavaioneswa ndondo kudaro, ndipo pavakatonyanya kuwanda nokutekeshera nenyika yose iyoyo. Pamusana paizvozvi vaIjipiti vakatya vaIsiraeri zvikuru," 
Exodus1:13 vakavaendesa kuchibharo. 
Exodus1:14 Vakavaomesera upenyu pabasa ravo rezvidhina nerokukanya ivhu namabasa akasiyana-siyana omuminda. Pamabasa ose iwayo, vaivashandisa zvechibharo." 
Exodus1:15 Mambo weIjipiti akataurira Shifura naPua vanyamukuta vaigamuchira vana paipona madzimai echiHebheru 
Exodus1:16 kuti, “Kana mava kubatsira madzimai echiHebheru anenge ava pakusununguka, mukaona kuti mwana wacho mukomana, ibvai mamuuraya. Asi kana ari musikana, musamuuraye.”" 
Exodus1:17 Vananyamukuta ivava vaiva vanhu vaitya Mwari. Havana kuita zvavakanga vaudzwa namambo weIjipiti, asi vakarega vana vakomana vari vapenyu." 
Exodus1:18 Mambo weIjipiti akazodaidza vananyamukuta ava akati, “Nhai imi! Ko makaitirei zvakadai izvi? Makaregerereiko vana vakomana vari vapenyu?”" 
Exodus1:19 Vananyamukuta ava vakapindura Farao vachiti, “Madzimai echiHebheru haana kufanana namadzimai echiIjipiti, nokuti madzimai echiHebheru akagwinya kwazvo zvokuti vananyamukuta vanozosara zvavo vosvika, ivo vatosununguka kare.”" 
Exodus1:20 Naizvozvo Mwari akaitira vananyamukuta ava zvakanaka. VaIsiraeri vakaramba vachiwanda vakasimba. 
Exodus1:21 Pamusana pokuti vananyamukuta ivava vaitya Mwari, Mwari akavapa mhuri." 
Exodus1:22 Farao akabva audza vanhu vake vose achiti, “Mwana mukomana upi noupi anenge aberekwa mukati mavaHebheru, mukandei murwizi, muna Nairi, asi vana vasikana vose, varegei vari vapenyu.”" 
Exodus2:1 Nguva iyoyo mumwe murume wemba yokwaRevhi akaroora mwana womuRevhi. 
Exodus2:2 Mudzimai wake akava napamuviri ndokubereka mwana mukomana. Paakaona kuti mwana wake mwana akanaka kwazvo, akamuhwandisa kwemwedzi mitatu." 
Exodus2:3 Paakazoona kuti haachagona kuramba akamuvanza, akatora tswanda yakarukwa nenhokwe, akainama netara nenamo, ndokuisa mwana wake imomo, akandoisa tswanda iyi mutsanga, kumahombekombe aNairi." 
Exodus2:4 Hanzvadzi yomwana uyu yaimutarisa iri chinhambwe kuti ione chingangoitika kwaari. 
Exodus2:5 Zvino mukunda waFarao akadzika kurwizi kuzoshamba muviri. Vasikana vaimushandira vaiva naye vaifamba munyasi memahombekombe erwizi. Mukunda waFarao akaona tswanda iya iri mutsanga, akatuma mumwe musikana aimushandira kundoitora." 
Exodus2:6 Mukunda waFarao paakakudubura tswanda iyi akaona mune mwana mucheche akanga achichema. Akamunzwira tsitsi akati, “Mwana uyu mwana womuHebheru chete.”" 
Exodus2:7 Ipapo hanzvadzi yomwana uyu yakauyapo ikati kumukunda waFarao, “Ko ndingakudaidzirei zvangu here mureri pavakadzi vechiHebheru wokukuyamwisirai mwana uyu?”" 
Exodus2:8 Mukunda waFarao akati, “Ee, enda zvako.” Musikana uyu akaenda akandodaidza amai chaivo vomwana iyeyo vokumubereka." 
Exodus2:9 Mukunda waFarao akati kwavari, “Torai mwana uyu, mundiyamwisirewo ndichakupai mubayiro wenyu woureri.” Ivo vakatora mwana vakandomurera." 
Exodus2:10 Mwana akakura, vakaenda naye kumukunda waFarao, akabva amuita mwana wake. Akamutumidza zita rokuti Mosesi nokuti aiti, “Mwana uyu ndakamunyurura mumvura.”" 
Exodus2:11 Rimwe zuva, Mosesi akura, zvakaitika kuti akaenda kundoona vanhu verudzi rwake vaHebheru. Akaona mabasa anorema avaiitiswa, akaonawo muIjipiti achirova muHebheru." 
Exodus2:12 Mosesi akaringa-ringa ndokuona kuti hapana mumwe munhu akanga aripo, ndokubva auraya muIjipiti uyu ndokumufushira mujecha." 
Exodus2:13 Mangwana acho, Mosesi akaenda kwakare, ndokuona vaHebheru vaviri vachirwa. Mosesi akatsiura akanga akanganisa achiti, “Ko uri kurovereiko hama yako?”" 
Exodus2:14 Murume iyeyo akati, “Ndiani akakuita ishe nomutongi wedu iwe? Heya unoda kundiuraya sezvawakaita muIjipiti uya nhai!” Mosesi akatya akati, “Inga zvandakaita zviya zvava kutozikanwa!”" 
Exodus2:15 Farao akazozvinzwa akada kuuraya Mosesi. Asi Mosesi akatiza, akandogara munyika yeMidhiani. Akasvika pakanga paine tsime, ndokugara zvake pasi." 
Exodus2:16 Zvino muMidhiani maiva nomupristi, akanga ana vana vake vasikana vanomwe. Vasikana ivava vakauya vakateka mvura vakaizadza mainwira zvipfuwo kuitira kuti zvinwe." 
Exodus2:17 Kwakauyawo vamwe vafudzi vakavadzinganisa. Asi Mosesi akasimuka akandonunura vasikana ava, akanwisa zvipfuwo zvavo." 
Exodus2:18 Pavakadzokera kuna baba vavo Reueri baba ivavo vakati, “Ko nhasi makurumidziswa nei kudai?”" 
Exodus2:19 Vakati, “Tanunurwawo nomumwe muIjipiti, adzinga vafudzi. Atotitekerawo mvura akapa zvipfuwo zvedu kuti zvinwe.”" 
Exodus2:20 Baba vakati kuvana vavo, “Ko zvino munhu wacho ari kupi? Mamusiyireiko? Endai mumudaidze awane chokudya.”" 
Exodus2:21 Mosesi akagutsikana kugara nomurume uyu. Iye akazopa Mosesi mwana wake Zipora kuti ave mukadzi wake. 
Exodus2:22 Zipora akabereka mwana mukomana, Mosesi akatumidza mwana wake zita rokuti Gerishomu achiti, “Ini ndiri mutorwa zvangu munyika yavamwe.”" 
Exodus2:23 Nokufamba kwamazuva mambo weIjipiti akafa. VaIsiraeri vakaramba vachidandaura nenhamo youranda. Vakachema vachida kununurwa. Kuchema kwavo nhamo youranda kwakasvika kudenga kuna Mwari. 
Exodus2:24 Mwari akanzwa kudandaura kwavo nenhamo ndokurangarira chitenderano chaakaita naAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho. 
Exodus2:25 Mwari akatarisa vaIsiraeri akaita hanya navo. 
Exodus3:1 Mosesi aifudza hwai nembudzi dzavatezvara vake vainzi vaJetero vaiva mupristi wokuMidhiani. Rimwe zuva Mosesi akaenda nezvipfuwo izvozvo kumadokero kwerenje akandosvika kugomo raMwari rinonzi Horebhu. 
Exodus3:2 Ipapo mutumwa waTenzi akazviratidza ari murimi romoto raiva mugwenzi. Mosesi akatarira akaona kuti gwenzi raibvira moto, asi rakanga risingaroti." 
Exodus3:3 Mosesi ndokuti, “Regai ndiendepo ndione chishamiso chikuru chakadai chokuti seiko gwenzi richibvira moto asi risingabva rarota.”" 
Exodus3:4 Tenzi paakaona kuti Mosesi ari kuswederapo kuzoona, Mwari akadaidzira kwaari ari mugwenzi iroro achiti, “Mosesi! Mosesi!” Iye akati, “Ndiri pano!”" 
Exodus3:5 Mwari ndokuti, “Rega kuswedera pedyo. Chitobvisa shangu dzako nokuti paumire ipapo inzvimbo inoera." 
Exodus3:6 Ndini Mwari wamadzitateguru ako. Ndini Mwari waAbhurahamu, ndini Mwari waIsaki, ndini Mwari waJakobho.” Mosesi akabva afukidza chiso chake achitya kutarisa Mwari." 
Exodus3:7 Tenzi ndokuti, “Ndanyatsoona kutambudzwa kwavanhu vangu vari muIjipiti. Ndanzwa kuchema kwavo nokuti vari kuoneswa nhamo navanhu vari kuvashandisa. Ndinoziva nhamo dzavo dzose." 
Exodus3:8 Zvino ndaburuka kuzovanunura mumaoko evaIjipiti. Ndichavabvisa muIjipiti ndichindovaisa kunyika huru yakanaka, nyika yomukaka nouchi, kunyika yavaKanani navaHiti navaAmori navaPerizi navaHivhi navaJebhusi." 
Exodus3:9 Zvino chinzwa, kuchema kwevaIsiraeri ndakunzwa, uye ndaona kutambudzwa kwavari kuitwa navaIjipiti." 
Exodus3:10 Saka zvino chiuya ndikutume kuna Farao, kundoburitsa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri muIjipiti.”" 
Exodus3:11 Asi Mosesi akati kuna Mwari, “Pangu pano! Ndiri aniwo zvangu ndingabva ndaenda kuna Farao kundoburitsa vaIsiraeri muIjipiti?”" 
Exodus3:12 Mwari akati, “Ini ndichava newe. Hechino chiratidzo chinoratidza kuti ndini ndakutuma. Kana wandoburitsa vanhu vangu muIjipiti, muchauya monamateni Mwari pano pagomo rino irori.”" 
Exodus3:13 Mosesi ndokuti kuna Mwari, “Hongu kuenda kuvaIsiraeri ndingaende zvangu ndichisvikovaudza kuti Mwari wamadzibaba enyu andituma kwamuri. Ko vakandibvunza kuti, ‘Zita raMwari iyeyo ndiani?’ Ndichavapindura ndichiti kudii?”" 
Exodus3:14 Mwari akapindura Mosesi achiti, “Ndiri iye wandiri. Unofanira kutaurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ndiri ndiye andituma kwamuri.”" 
Exodus3:15 Mwari akataurirazve Mosesi achiti, “Unofanira kutaurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Tenzi, Mwari wamadzitateguru enyu, Mwari waAbhurahamu, Mwari waIsaki, Mwari waJakobho andituma kwamuri.’ Iri ndiro zita rangu narini narini. Zvizvarwa zvenyu zvose zvichandidaidza nezita irori." 
Exodus3:16 “Enda undokokorodza vakuru vakuru vevaIsiraeri uvati, ‘Tenzi Mwari wamadzibaba enyu, Mwari waAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho, akazviratidza kwandiri. Akati ndakakushanyirai ndikaongorora zvose zvamuri kuitwa navaIjipiti.’" 
Exodus3:17 Ndinotsidza kuti, ‘Ndichakuburitsai muIjipiti mamuri muuranda ndichikuendesai kunyika yakanaka inoerera mukaka nouchi, kunyika yavaKanani navaHiti navaAmori navaPerizi navaHivhi navaJebhusi.’" 
Exodus3:18 “VaIsiraeri vachateerera zvaunoreva. Iwe navakuru vakuru vevaIsiraeri mozoenda kuna mambo weIjipiti, mundoti, ‘Tenzi, Mwari wavaHebheru, akasangana nesu. Saka tinokumbira kuti mutibvumirewo kufamba rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, kundopira Tenzi, Mwari wedu mupiro.’" 
Exodus3:19 Ndinoziva zvangu kuti mambo weIjipiti haakubvumirei kuti muende, kusatoti aita zvokumanikidzwa." 
Exodus3:20 Naizvozvo ini noruoko rwangu ndichatoita zvokushandisa simba ndichirova Ijipiti namanenji ose andichaita mukati mavo. Mambo ndopaachazobvuma kuti muende zvenyu. 
Exodus3:21 “Ndichaita kuti vaIjipiti vakuitirei zvakanaka, nokudaro pamunozoenda, hamuzoendi musina chamunacho." 
Exodus3:22 Ipapo mudzimai mumwe nomumwe ngaakumbire zvishongo zvesirivha nezvendarama nehanzu apiwe nomudzimai wechiIjipiti waanogarisana naye mumba kana pamana, apfekedze vana vake vose zvinhu izvozvo. Ndiko kupamba kwamuchaita upfumi hwevaIjipiti.”" 
Exodus4:1 Mosesi akapindura achiti, “Ko, kana vaIsiraeri vakaramba kubvuma zvandichareva vasinganditeereri vachiti, ‘Inhema, Tenzi haana kuzviratidza kwauri, panozoitwa sei?’ ”" 
Exodus4:2 Tenzi akamuti, “Ko chii chaunacho muruoko icho?” Akati, “Itsvimbo.”" 
Exodus4:3 Mwari ndokuti, “Ikande pasi.” Akaikanda pasi ikasanduka ikava nyoka Mosesi ndokubva ava kuitiza." 
Exodus4:4 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Tambanudza ruoko rwako uibate nokumuswe kwayo.” Mosesi akaibata ikava tsvimbo zvakare." 
Exodus4:5 Mwari ndokuti, “Kana ukandoita izvozvi vaIsiraeri vachabvuma kuti ndakazviratidza kwauri ini Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu. Ndini Mwari waAbhurahamu naMwari waIsaki, naMwari waJakobho.”" 
Exodus4:6 Tenzi akatizve, “Isa ruoko rwako muhanzu dzako nechapadundundu pako.” Mosesi akaisa ruoko rwake muhanzu nechapadundundu. Paakaruburitsa, akaona rwangoti mbe-e kuchena, rwava namaperembudzi." 
Exodus4:7 Mwari akati, “Isazve ruoko rwako muhanzu dzako nechapadundundu pako.” Mosesi akaita saizvozvo, akazoruburitsa wanei rwanyatsopora, rwaita sezvakangoitawo muviri wake." 
Exodus4:8 Mwari akati, “Kana vachinge varamba kubvuma zvauchareva, kana kugamuchira chiratidzo chokutanga, zvimwe vachanzwa zvinoreva chiratidzo chechipiri." 
Exodus4:9 Kana vakaramba kugamuchira zviratidzo izvi zviri zviviri, kana kuramba kunzwa zvauchareva, teka mvura muna Nairi uidururire pasi pakaoma mvura iyoyo yaunenge wateka muna Nairi ichasanduka kuva ropa pasi ipapo.”" 
Exodus4:10 Mosesi akati kuna Tenzi, “Tenzi wangu, ini handigoni kunyatsotaura. Hazvisi zvanhasi chete, ndakangobvira kare ndakadai, kanawo pamanga muchitaura neni ndizvo ndizvo. Ini ndinondandama nokutaura ndichikakama.”" 
Exodus4:11 Tenzi akati kwaari, “Ko ndianiko akasika muromo womunhu? Ko ndiani anoita kuti munhu ave mbeveve kana matsi? Ndiani anopa munhu maziso, kana kumupofomadza? Handiti ndini iyeni Tenzi here?" 
Exodus4:12 Saka zvino chienda. Ini ndichakubatsira pakutaura kwako. Ndichakurayiridza zvokutaura.” 
Exodus4:13 Asi Mosesi akati, “Ndapota zvangu Tenzi wangu, tumai zvenyu mumwe munhu!”" 
Exodus4:14 Ipapo Tenzi akashatirirwa Mosesi akati, “Inga mukoma wako Aroni, muRevhi, ariko wani! Ndinoziva kuti iye anogona kutaura zvakanaka. Chiteerera unzwe, izvozvi ari kutouya kuzokuchingura, paachakuona achafara zvikuru." 
Exodus4:15 Iwe unofanira kumuudza zvokundotaura. Paunenge uchitaura iwe, napaanenge achitaurawo iye, ndichakubatsirai ndichikurayiridzai zvokuita." 
Exodus4:16 Ndiye anenge achikusvitsira mashoko kuvanhu, ari iye muromo wako. Iwe unenge wakaita saMwari kwaari." 
Exodus4:17 Chienda wakabata tsvimbo iyi, ndiyo yauchaita nayo zviratidzo zvinoshamisa.”" 
Exodus4:18 Mosesi akadzokera kuna vatezvara vake vaJetero ndokusvikoti, “Ndibvumireiwo kudzokera kuIjipiti kundoona hama dzangu kuti vapenyu here.” Jetero akati kuna Mosesi, “Zvakanaka, enda hako.”" 
Exodus4:19 Mosesi paakanga achiri kunyika yeMidhiani, Tenzi akataura kwaari achiti, “Chidzokera zvako kuIjipiti nokuti vanhu vose vaida kukuuraya vakafa.”" 
Exodus4:20 Nokudaro Mosesi akatora mudzimai wake navana vake vakomana akavakwidza padhongi, ndokubva vapinda munzira kudzokera kuIjipiti. Mosesi akatora tsvimbo yaMwari akaenda akaibata muruoko." 
Exodus4:21 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Zvino kana wadzokera kuIjipiti, ibva wandoitira Farao pameso pake zvishamiso zviya zvose zvandakakupa simba rokuita. Asi ndichaita kuti Farao aomese mwoyo, arege kubvumira vaIsiraeri kubva munyika make." 
Exodus4:22 Iwe unofanira kundotaurira Farao kuti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi: Isiraeri ndiye mwanakomana wangu wedangwe." 
Exodus4:23 Zvino ndinoti rega mwanakomana wangu Isiraeri aende kundondinamata. Asi iwe uri kuramba. Chinzwa, ini ndichaurayawo mwanakomana wako wedangwe.’ ”" 
Exodus4:24 Vari pane imwewo nzvimbo pavakavata vachiri murwendo, Tenzi akasangana naMosesi akada kumuuraya." 
Exodus4:25 Ipapo Zipora mudzimai waMosesi akatora ibwe rinopinza akadzingisa mwanakomana wake. Akagunzva kumakumbo kwaMosesi nenhengo yaakanga abvisa pakudzingisa ikoku achiti, “Zvechokwadi ndichinemi somurume wangu nokuda kweropa iri.”" 
Exodus4:26 Mwari ndokubva amuregera. Chakakonzera mudzimai uyu kuti ati, “Ndichinemi somurume wangu nokuda kweropa iri,” kwaiva kudzingisa ikoku." 
Exodus4:27 Tenzi akataurira Aroni kuti, “Enda undochingura Mosesi kurenje.” Aroni akandosangana naMosesi pagomo raMwari, akamukwazisa achimutsvoda." 
Exodus4:28 Mosesi akaudza Aroni mashoko aTenzi aakatumwa nawo kuIjipiti, akamutaurirawo zviratidzo zvose zvaakaudzwa kundoita." 
Exodus4:29 Mosesi naAroni vakaenda vakandokokorodza vakuru vakuru vose vavaIsiraeri. 
Exodus4:30 Ipapo Aroni akavaudza mashoko ose akanga ataurirwa Mosesi naTenzi, akaita zviratidzo zvose zviya vaIsiraeri vachiona," 
Exodus4:31 Vanhu vakabva vabvuma. Pavakanzwa kuti Tenzi akashanyira vaIsiraeri, akaonawo kutambudzika kwavo, vakakotamisa misoro kwaari vakapfugama kumunamata." 
Exodus5:1 Mosesi naAroni vakazoenda kuna Farao vakapira nyaya yavo vachiti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari vavaIsiraeri, regai vanhu vangu vaende kurenje kundondiitira mabiko.”" 
Exodus5:2 Asi Farao akati, “Ko Tenzi iyeyo ndiani chaizvoizvo wandinganzi ini nditeerere, ndigorega vaIsiraeri vachienda? Tenzi wacho handimuzivi. Saka ini handibvumirewo vaIsiraeri kuenda.”" 
Exodus5:3 Ivowo vakapindura vachiti, “Mwari wevaHebheru akasangana nesu. Dai mukatirega zvenyu tifambe rwendo rwamazuva matatu tichienda kurenje tindopira Tenzi, Mwari wedu mipiro. Kana tikarega kuzviita angatiuraye nedenda kana kutiparadza nehondo.”" 
Exodus5:4 Mambo weIjipiti akati, “Ko iwe Mosesi newe Aroni, imhaka yei muchifurira vaIsiraeri kuti varege kuita basa ravo? Imi dzokerai kubasa.”" 
Exodus5:5 Farao akati, “Imi muri kuona kuti iye zvino vanhu vechirudzi mawanda muno ndopamava kutoda zvenyu kutadzisa vanhu kuita basa.”" 
Exodus5:6 Musi iwoyo Farao akaudza vaIjipiti vaishandisa vaIsiraeri basa, navamwe vaIsiraeri vaitungamirira vamwe pabasa achiti," 
Exodus5:7 “Chiregai kunge muchapa vanhu ava mashanga okukanyisa zvidhina sezvamanga muchiita. Varegei vazvitsvakire mashanga voga. 
Exodus5:8 Asi mugwazo wezvidhina wavakatemerwa ngaurambe wakadaro, musautapudze kunyange napaduku pose. Vanhu ava itsimbe, ndokusaka vachichema vachiti, ‘Regai tiende kundopira Mwari wedu zvibayiro.’" 
Exodus5:9 Remedzai vanhu ava nebasa kuti vaite basa varege kuteerera zvokunyepa izvo.” 
Exodus5:10 VaIjipiti vaya vaishandisa vaIsiraeri basa pamwechete navamwe vaIsiraeri vaitungamirira vamwe pabasa vakandotaurira vaIsiraeri kuti, “Zvanzi naFarao, ‘Handichakupai mashanga." 
Exodus5:11 Endai mundozvitsvakira moga chero kupi zvako kwamungaawanire. Asi mugwazo wenyu uchangoramba wakadaro.’ ” 
Exodus5:12 Saizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakaita fararira nenyika yose yeIjipiti vachitsvaka zvidzitsi zvamashanga muminda. 
Exodus5:13 Vaya vaishandisa vaIsiraeri vakaramba vachivaomesera vachiti, “Pedzai mugwazo wenyu wezuva roga roga sezvamaingoita muchapiwa mashanga.”" 
Exodus5:14 VaIjipiti vaya vaishandisa vaIsiraeri vakarova vaIsiraeri vaye vakanga vasarudzwa kutungamirira vamwe pabasa vachiti, “Chii chakutadzisai kupedza mugwazo wenyu wezvidhina wanhasi sezvamaimboita?”" 
Exodus5:15 VaIsiraeri ava vaitungamirira vamwe pabasa vakandochema kuna Farao vachiti, “Changamire, ko matifungira zvipiko?" 
Exodus5:16 Isu varanda venyu hatichapiwi mashanga, asi kunyange zvakadaro, tinongonzi, ‘Kanyai zvidhina!’ Chionaika kuti tiri kurohwa isu, asi mhosva iri yavanhu venyu.”" 
Exodus5:17 Mambo akati, “Muri nyope chaidzo, tsimbe dzavanhu. Ho-o-o, ndosaka muchiti, ‘Regai tiende tindopira zvibayiro kuna Tenzi nhai.’" 
Exodus5:18 Chibvai pano! Dzokerai kubasa! Mashanga hamupiwe! Mugwazo wezvidhina wamakapiwa unofanira kupera.” 
Exodus5:19 VaIsiraeri ava vokutungamirira vamwe pabasa, vakaona kuti vatova munjodzi huru pavakanzi, “Mugwazo wenyu wezvidhina wamazuva ose hauzotapudzwa.”" 
Exodus5:20 Pakarepo vakasangana naMosesi naAroni vakanga vakavamirira kuti vaonane navo pakubuda kwavo vachibva pana Farao. 
Exodus5:21 Vakavati, “Tenzi ngaakuonei, aone zvaangaite nemi nokuti imi mazotivengesa kwazvo naFarao namakurukota ake. Makaisa bakatwa mumaoko avo kuti vatiuraye zvavo naro.”" 
Exodus5:22 Mosesi akaendazve kuna Tenzi akandoti, “Nhai Tenzi, ko makaitira vanhu venyu zvakaipa zvikadai nemhosva yeiko? Ko zvino makanditumireiko kuno?" 
Exodus5:23 Tarisai muone kubvira pamusi wandakaenda kuna Farao kundomuudza zvamakareva, Farao akabva atangawo kuitira vanhu venyu utsinye. Asi imi hamuna zvenyu kana kumbonunura vanhu venyu.”" 
Exodus6:1 Asi Tenzi akapindura Mosesi achiti, “Zvino chirega zvako uone zvandichaita kuna Farao iyeyu. Achavaburitsa aona simba roruoko rwangu. Pamusana pesimba rangu iroro achatoita zvokuvadzinga munyika yake.”" 
Exodus6:2 Mwari akazotaurirazve Mosesi achiti, “Ndini Tenzi," 
Exodus6:3 ndakazviratidza kuna Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho ndichizviti Aripagomo, asi handina kunge ndavaudza zita rangu rokuti Yahweh." 
Exodus6:4 Ini ndakaitawo chitenderano changu navo ndichiti, ‘Ndichavapa nyika yeKanani mavaimboita zvokugara vachiti apa garei, tamei apa garei tamei.’" 
Exodus6:5 Ndanzwawo kudandaura nenhamo kuri kuita vaIsiraeri vari kuitiswa uranda navaIjipiti ndokubva ndarangarira chitenderano changu. 
Exodus6:6 Naizvozvo udza vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Ini ndini Tenzi uye ndini ndichakusunungurai pajoko rinorema ramuri kutakudzwa navaIjipiti.’ Ndichakununurai muuranda ihwohwo. Ndichakudzikinurai nesimba rangu guru, ndichiranga vaIjipiti zvinorwadza." 
Exodus6:7 Ndichakuitai vanhu vangu, ini ndichivawo Mwari wenyu. Kana ndakununurai muuranda muIjipiti, ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu." 
Exodus6:8 Ndichakuunzai kunyika yandakatsidzira Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho ndichiti ndichazovapa, naizvozvo ndichakupai nyika iyoyo kuti ive nhaka yenyu. Ndini Tenzi.”" 
Exodus6:9 Mosesi akandoudza vaIsiraeri saizvozvo, asi havana kumuteerera nokuti mwoyo yavo yakanga yasviba pamusana penhamo yavaioneswa muuranda." 
Exodus6:10 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti," 
Exodus6:11 “Enda undotaurazve namambo weIjipiti kuti ngaarege vaIsiraeri vabude munyika yake vaende zvavo.” 
Exodus6:12 Asi Mosesi akataura pana Tenzi achiti, “Ko inga vaIsiraeri chaivo havana kunditeerera wani? Zvino iye Farao ndopaangabva anditeererawo iyeniwo zvangu ndisingagoni kutaura!”" 
Exodus6:13 Tenzi ndokutaurira Mosesi naAroni achiti, “Udzai vaIsiraeri namambo weIjipiti kuti ndini ndakakutumai kuzoburitsa vaIsiraeri muIjipiti.”" 
Exodus6:14 Ava ndivo vakuru vakuru vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, vanakomana vaRubheni dangwe raJakobho ndiHanoki naParu naHezironi naKarimi. Iwaya ndiwo madzitateguru omudzinza rokwaRubheni." 
Exodus6:15 Vanakomana vaSimeoni ndiJemueri naJamini naOhadhi naJakini naZohari naShauro mwanakomana womudzimai wake wechiKanani. Ndivo madzitateguru omudzinza rokwaSimeoni. 
Exodus6:16 Haanoi mazita avanakomana vaRevhi vakazova madzitateguru omudzinza ravo: Kunoti Gerishoni naKohati naMerari. Revhi akazofa ava namakore zana namakumi matatu ana manomwe. 
Exodus6:17 Vanakomana vaGerishoni ndiRibhini naShimei vari mhuri nemhuri. 
Exodus6:18 Vanakomana vaKohati ndiAmuramu naIzhari naHebhuroni naUzieri. Kohati akagara zana ramakore rina makore makumi matatu ana matatu. 
Exodus6:19 Vanakomana vaMerari ndiMahiri naMushi. Ivava ndivo madzitateguru omudzinza rokwaRevhi. 
Exodus6:20 Amuramu akaroora Jokebhedhi vatete vake. Ndivo vakamuberekera Aroni naMosesi. Amuramu akagara zana ramakore rina makore matatu ana manomwe. 
Exodus6:21 Vanakomana vaIzhari ndiKora naNefegi naZikiri. 
Exodus6:22 Vanakomana vaUzieri ndiMishaeri naErizafani naSitiri. 
Exodus6:23 Aroni akaroora Erishebha, hanzvadzi yaNahishoni mwana waAminadhabhu. Ndiye akamuberekera Nadhabhu naAbhihu naEreazari naItamaru." 
Exodus6:24 Vanakomana vaKora ndiAsiri naErikana naAbhiasafu. Ivava ndivo madzitateguru omumhuri yokwaKora. 
Exodus6:25 Ereazari mwanakomana waAroni akaroora mwana waPutieri ndokubereka Finehasi. Ivava ndivo madzitateguru omudzinza rokwaRevhi mhuri nemhuri. 
Exodus6:26 Ivava ndivo vanaAroni naMosesi vacho vakatumwa naTenzi kundoburitsa vaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti. 
Exodus6:27 Ivava, ndivo vanyakutaura naFarao, mambo weIjipiti kuti aregedze vaIsiraeri vaende, Mosesi iyeyu naAroni wakareyu." 
Exodus6:28 Tenzi paakataura naMosesi munyika yeIjipiti," 
Exodus6:29 akati, “Ndini Tenzi! Enda undoudza Farao mambo weIjipiti zvinhu zvose zvandinokutaurira.”" 
Exodus6:30 Asi Mosesi akataura ipapo pana Tenzi achiti, “Tarisaika muone kuti ini kutaura handinyatsogona. Zvino munoti Farao anganditeererewo here?”" 
Exodus7:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Ini ndakuita saMwari kuna Farao. Mukoma wako Aroni achava somuporofita wako." 
Exodus7:2 Iwe uchange uchitaurira mukoma wako Aroni zvose zvandinokuudza, iye achitaurirawo Farao, kuti arege vaIsiraeri vabude muIjipiti." 
Exodus7:3 Ini ndichaita kuti Farao aomese mwoyo wake zvokuti kunyange ndikaita zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvakawanda zvikadii zvazvo munyika yeIjipiti," 
Exodus7:4 Farao acharamba kunzwa zvamunoreva. Ndipo pandicharova Ijipiti ndichiiranga neshamhu inorwadza kwazvo ndichizoburitsa muIjipiti hondo dzangu dzavanhu, vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri." 
Exodus7:5 Pandinorova Ijipiti ndichibvisa vaIsiraeri pakati pavo, vaIjipiti ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi.”" 
Exodus7:6 Mosesi naAroni vakaita sokuudzwa kwavakanga vaitwa naTenzi, vakaita naimomo chaimo." 
Exodus7:7 Mosesi akanga ava namakore makumi masere, Aroni aina makumi masere namatatu panguva yavakataura naFarao." 
Exodus7:8 Tenzi akataurirazve Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Exodus7:9 “Kana Farao akati, ‘Itai chishamiso chinoratidza kuti matumwa naMwari,’ iwe iti Aroni akande tsvimbo yake pasi, isanduke igova nyoka, ipapo pana Farao achizviona.”" 
Exodus7:10 Naizvozvo Mosesi naAroni vakaenda kuna Farao vakaita zvavakanga varayirwa naTenzi. Aroni akakanda tsvimbo yake pasi, tsvimbo ikasanduka ikava nyoka, Farao namachinda ake vachizviona." 
Exodus7:11 Farao akadaidzawo magodobori ake, nyanzvi dzamapipi nen'anga. Magodobori omuIjipiti aya akabva aitawo izvozvo zvamapipi." 
Exodus7:12 Mumwe nomumwe akakanda tsvimbo yake pasi, ikasanduka ikava nyoka. Asi tsvimbo yaAroni yakamedza tsvimbo dzavo dzose." 
Exodus7:13 Kunyange zvakadaro, Farao akaomesa mwoyo wake akaramba kuteerera Mosesi naAroni sokutaura kwakanga kwamboita Tenzi."
