Exodus7:14 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Farao aomesa mwoyo ari kuramba kuti vaIsiraeri vaende." 
Exodus7:15 Iwe enda kuna Farao mangwanani undosangana naye paachaenda kurwizi kuna Nairi. Umumirire pamahombekombe arwo wakabata mumaoko tsvimbo yako iya yakambosanduka ikava nyoka. 
Exodus7:16 Undoti kwaari, ‘Tenzi, Mwari wavaHebheru, akandituma kwamuri neshoko rinoti rega vanhu vangu vaende kundondinamata murenje. Asika, kusvikira pari nhasi hauna kunditeerera.’" 
Exodus7:17 Zvino, zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Muchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi nokuda kwezvandichaita zvino. Ndicharova mvura iri muna Nairi netsvimbo yandakabata, mvura ichasanduka ichiva ropa." 
Exodus7:18 Hove dzose dzirimo dzichafa, mvura yacho ichanhuhwa kuti kutu. Saka vaIjipiti vachasema kunwa mvura yomuna Nairi.’ ”" 
Exodus7:19 Tenzi akatiwo kuna Mosesi, “Iti kuna Aroni, ‘Tora tsvimbo yako uitambanudzire pamusoro pemvura yose yeIjipiti, pamusoro penzizi dzavo nemigero yavo namadhamu avo namadziva avo ose isanduke ive ropa. Richava ropa chete munyika yose yeIjipiti, mumidziyo yakavezwa nomumidziyo yamabwe.’ ”" 
Exodus7:20 Mosesi naAroni vakaita zvakanga zvataurwa naTenzi. Aroni akasimudza tsvimbo iya akarova mvura yomuna Nairi Farao namachinda ake vachiona, mvura yose yomurwizi ikasanduka ikava ropa." 
Exodus7:21 Hove dzaiva muna Nairi dzakafa, Nairi rukava gutukutu kunhuhwa vaIjipiti vakatadza kunwa mvura yacho. Munyika yose yeIjipiti rakanga rangove ropa chete." 
Exodus7:22 Asi n'anga dzeIjipiti dzakagonawo kuita izvozvo namashiripiti adzo. Naizvozvo Farao akaramba akaomesa mwoyo, achiramba kuteerera Mosesi naAroni, sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi." 
Exodus7:23 Farao akabva adzokera zvake kumba kwake asina hanya kunyange nezvizvi. 
Exodus7:24 VaIjipiti vose vakandochera matsime munhivi dzaNairi vachitsvaka mvura yokunwa. Mvura yomurwizi yakanga isisanwiki. 
Exodus7:25 Kwakapera mazuva manomwe ose Tenzi arova mvura yomuna Nairi. 
Exodus8:1 Tenzi ndokubva ataurira Mosesi achiti, “Enda kuna Farao undoti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Rega vanhu vangu vaende vandondinamata." 
Exodus8:2 Chinzwa, kana ukavarambidza kuenda, ndichapa nyika ino dambudziko rebvakanyira ramatafi." 
Exodus8:3 Nairi urwu ruchazara kuti shutu namatafi. Achabudamo achindopinda mumba mako nomumba mako mokuvata, napamubhedha wako nomudzimba dzamachinda ako nedzavanhu vako nemaunokanyira zvingwa nemaunozvibikira." 
Exodus8:4 Matafi achakwakukira pauri iwe napavanhu vako napamachinda ako ose.’ ” 
Exodus8:5 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Iti kuna Aroni, ‘Tambanudzira tsvimbo yako pamusoro penzizi nemigero namadziva kuti matafi auye panyika yeIjipiti.’ ”" 
Exodus8:6 Naizvozvo Aroni akatambanudzira tsvimbo yake pamusoro pemvura yeIjipiti, matafi akabuda akabva aita bvakapfaka kuzara nyika yeIjipiti yose." 
Exodus8:7 Asi n'anga dzakaitawo izvozvo namashiripiti adzo dzikaburitsa matafi mumvura akaenda munyika yeIjipiti. 
Exodus8:8 Farao akadaidza Mosesi naAroni akati, “Ndikumbirireiwo kuna Tenzi kuti andibvisirewo zvangu ini navanhu vangu, matafi aya, ini ndigobvumidzawo vaIsiraeri kundopira zvavo Tenzi chibayiro.”" 
Exodus8:9 Mosesi akataurira Farao achiti, “Ndichaita zvamareva. Ko ndokunamatirai rini, imi namachinda enyu navanhu venyu kuti mubvisirwe matafi, abve mudzimba dzenyu, asare muna Nairi chete?”" 
Exodus8:10 Iye ndokuti, “Ita izvozvo mangwana!” Mosesi akati, “Tichaita saizvozvo. Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti hakuna mumwe mwari angafananidzwe naTenzi, Mwari wedu." 
Exodus8:11 Matafi achabviswa kwamuri. Achabviswa mudzimba dzenyu, nedzamachinda enyu nedzavanhu venyu. Achangosara muna Nairi chete.”" 
Exodus8:12 Mosesi naAroni vakabva pana Farao paya. Mosesi akachema kuna Tenzi sokubvumirana kwaakanga aita naFarao achimukumbira kuti abvise matafi aakanga aunza kuna Farao. 
Exodus8:13 Tenzi akaita zvakanga zvakumbirwa naMosesi. Matafi akapera kufa mudzimba nomuzvivanze nomuminda. 
Exodus8:14 VaIjipiti vakaaunganidza vachiita matutu matutu, nyika ikati kutu kunhuhwa." 
Exodus8:15 Sokutaura kwakanga kwamboita Tenzi, Farao paakaona kuti dambudziko iri rapera, akaomesa mwoyo akaramba kuteerera Mosesi naAroni." 
Exodus8:16 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti, “Iti Aroni atambanudze tsvimbo yake arove nayo pasi patibuke guruva rive umhutu munyika yose yeIjipiti.”" 
Exodus8:17 Vakaita saizvozvo. Aroni akatambanudza ruoko rwake rwaiva netsvimbo yake ndokurova ivhu pasi, umhutu hukati uya tiende pavanhu nemhuka. Guruva rose rakanga rava umhutu munyika yose yeIjipiti." 
Exodus8:18 N'anga dzakaita mashiripiti adzo. Dzakaedzawo kuita umhutu dzikatadza. Umhutu ihwohwo hwaiva pose pose huchimomotera vanhu nezvipfuwo. 
Exodus8:19 N'anga idzi dzakanyevera Farao dzichiti, “Changamire, Mwari bedzi ndiye aita izvi.” Sokureva kwakanga kwaitwa naTenzi, Farao akaomesa mwoyo akaramba kuteerera Mosesi naAroni." 
Exodus8:20 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Mangwana, fumoenda kuna Farao undosangana naye paanenge achienda kurwizi, uti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Rega vanhu vangu vaende vandondinamata." 
Exodus8:21 Kana ukavarambidza kuenda, ndichaunza bute renhunzi, dzichamomera pauri iwe namachinda ako, navanhu vako, dzichizaridzana mudzimba dzavaIjipiti, dzichiitawo fararira napasi." 
Exodus8:22 Asi musi iwoyo, zvandichaita kudunhu reGosheni kugere vanhu vangu ndichazvisiyansisa nokumwe. Mapute enhunzi acho haasviki ikoko. Ndipo pauchazoziva kuti ini Tenzi ndiri mukati menyika ino." 
Exodus8:23 Zvandichaitira vanhu vangu zvichasiyana nezvandichaita kuvanhu vako. Chiratidzo ichi ndichachiita mangwana.’ ” 
Exodus8:24 Tenzi akaita izvozvo. Nhunzi dzakazaridzana mumba maFarao nomudzimba dzamachinda ake nomunyika yose yeIjipiti. Nyika yose ikasemesa namapute enhunzi. 
Exodus8:25 Farao akadaidza Mosesi naAroni akati, “Endai zvenyu mupire Mwari wenyu zvibayiro, asi muri munyika muno.”" 
Exodus8:26 Asi Mosesi akati, “Hatingadaro nokuti zvibayiro zvatichapira Tenzi, Mwari wedu, hazvidiwi navaIjipiti. Zvino tikapira Tenzi zvibayiro vaIjipiti vachiona, handiti vangatishatirirwe vakatitema namabwe tikafa." 
Exodus8:27 Regai tiende rwendo rwamazuva matatu murenje, tindopira Tenzi, Mwari wedu zvibayiro nokuti ndizvo zvaakatirayira.”" 
Exodus8:28 Farao akati, “Ndinokubvumirai kundopira Tenzi, Mwari wenyu muri murenje, asi regai kuenda kure. Mundinamatirewo.”" 
Exodus8:29 Mosesi akati, “Zvakanaka, ini ndichabva pano ndichindokumbira Tenzi kuti mangwana mapute enhunzi abve pana Farao namakurukota ake navanhu vake. Asi dai mambo mukarega kuita zvakare zvokutibata zvenyu kumeso imi muchizorambidza zvenyu vaIsiraeri kundopira Tenzi zvibayiro zvavo.”" 
Exodus8:30 Mosesi akabva pana Farao akandonamata kuna Tenzi. 
Exodus8:31 Tenzi akaita zvakakumbirwa naMosesi akabvisa mapute enhunzi pana Farao namachinda ake navanhu vake. Hakuna kana nenhunzi imwechete yakasara. 
Exodus8:32 Kunyange ipapa, Farao akaomesa mwoyo akaramba kuti vaIsiraeri vaende." 
Exodus9:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Enda kuna Farao uti kwaari, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari wavaHebheru, rega vanhu vangu vaende, vandondinamata.’" 
Exodus9:2 Kana ukasavabvumidza, uchirambira zvako navo," 
Exodus9:3 ini Tenzi noruoko rwangu ndicharova nedenda rinorwadza kwazvo zvipfuwo zvako zvinoti, mabhiza namadhongi nengamera nemombe nembudzi nehwai." 
Exodus9:4 Asi ini Tenzi, handizoita kuzvipfuwo zvavaIsiraeri zvandichaita kuzvipfuwo zvavaIjipiti. Hapana kana chipfuwo chavaIsiraeri chichafa.”" 
Exodus9:5 Tenzi akatema nguva yacho achiti, “Mangwana ndiro zuva randichaita izvozvo munyika ino.”" 
Exodus9:6 Mangwana acho Tenzi akafumoita zvaakareva, mombe dzose dzavaIjipiti dzakapera kufa, asi mombe dzavaIsiraeri hapana kana imwechete yakafa." 
Exodus9:7 Farao akatuma vanhu kundoona mombe dzavaIsiraeri, wanei pasina kunyange neimwechete yadzo yakafa. Asi Farao akaramba akaomesa mwoyo, asingadi kuti vaIsiraeri vaende." 
Exodus9:8 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti, “Endai munokore dota muchoto, Mosesi arimwaye mudenga Farao achiona." 
Exodus9:9 Dota racho richambumuka richipararira nenyika yose yeIjipiti. Vanhu nezvipfuwo vachaita mamota anoputika achiita maronda anotyisa.” 
Exodus9:10 Saizvozvo vakatora dota pachoto vakaenda naro kuna Farao. Mosesi akamwaya dota riya mudenga rikabva raitisa vanhu nemhuka mamota. 
Exodus9:11 N'anga dziya dzakatadza kusvika paiva naMosesi nokuti naidzowo n'anga dzacho pamwechete navaIjipiti vose vakanga vanyenga mamota. 
Exodus9:12 Asi Tenzi akaita kuti Farao aomese mwoyo. Farao akaramba kuteerera Mosesi naAroni sokutaura kwakamboita Tenzi kuna Mosesi. 
Exodus9:13 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti, “Mangwana, fumira kuna Farao undoti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari wevaHebheru rega vanhu vangu vaende kundondinamata" 
Exodus9:14 nokuti rwendo runo kana ukasadaro ndichakuonesa nhamo dzinokurwadza mwoyo iwe pamwechete namachinda ako navanhu vako. Ndipo pauchazoziva kuti pasi pano pose, hapana mumwe akaita seni." 
Exodus9:15 Pari zvino ndingadai ndakatounza zvangu denda raizorova iwe navanhu vako muchitodai makapera mose pasi pano. 
Exodus9:16 Asi ini ndakakurega uri mupenyu ndichida kukuratidza simba rangu, uye kuti mukurumbira wangu unzwike pasi pose." 
Exodus9:17 Iwe uri kuramba uchingozvikudza zvako, hausiri kuda kubvumidza vanhu vangu kuenda." 
Exodus9:18 Chinzwa, mangwana nenguva dzino ndichanayisa chimvuramahwe chinotyisa, chisati chamboonekwazve muIjipiti kubvira pakuvamba kwayo kusvikira iye zvino." 
Exodus9:19 Saka zvino tuma vanhu vakokorodze zvipfuwo zvako, vaunganidzewo zvinhu zvako zvose zviri kunze. Vanhu vose nezvipfuwo zvose zvichazenge zviri kunze, zvisina kuiswa mudzimba, zvicharohwa nechimvuramahwe zvikafa.’ ”" 
Exodus9:20 Mamwe machinda aFarao akatya zvakarehwa naTenzi, akaudza varanda vawo kuti vatenhere zvipfuwo mudzimba naivowo vauye kumba kuzohwanda." 
Exodus9:21 Asi vamwe vakanga vasina hanya nezvakarehwa naTenzi, vakarega zvavo varanda vavo nezvipfuwo zvavo zviri kumafuro." 
Exodus9:22 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Simudza ruoko rwako unongedze kudenga chimvuramahwe chinaye munyika yose yeIjipiti, chichiwira pavanhu napazvipfuwo napasora rose romunyika yeIjipiti.”" 
Exodus9:23 Mosesi ndokubva anongedza tsvimbo yake kudenga. Tenzi akaunza kutinhira kukuru nechivhuramahwe, mheni dzikarova pasi. Tenzi akanayisa chimvuramahwe panyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus9:24 Kwakaita chivhuramahwe ipapo, mheni ichingovaima mukati mechivhuramahwe imomo, chivhuramahwe chakawanda kwazvo, chisati chambonaya kudaro munyika yose yeIjipiti kubvira payakavamba kuva norudzi rwaigaramo." 
Exodus9:25 Chivhuramahwe chakarova munyika yose yeIjipiti. Chakarova zvinhu zvose zvaiva kumafuro, vanhu nezvipfuwo nezvirimwa zvose muminda nokutyoranisa miti yose musango." 
Exodus9:26 Asi kudunhu reGosheni kwaigara vaIsiraeri, ndiko kwoga kusina kusvika chivhuramahwe." 
Exodus9:27 Ipapo Farao akatuma vanhu kundodaidza Mosesi naAroni achiti, “Rwendo runo, ndakatadza zvikuru. Tenzi ndiye mururami, ini navanhu vangu ndisu vatadzi." 
Exodus9:28 Tikumbirireiwo kuna Tenzi nokuti kutinhira kwemheni yaMwari nechimvuramahwe zvanyanya. Zvino ndava kukubvumirai kuenda, handichakurambidzai.”" 
Exodus9:29 Mosesi akati kwaari, “Kana ndangobuda muguta muno, ndichasimudza maoko angu kuna Tenzi. Ipapo kutinhira kwemheni kuchanyarara, chimvuramahwe chichibva chapera. Ndipo pamunozoziva kuti pasi pano pose ndepaTenzi." 
Exodus9:30 Asi ndinoziva kuti imi namachinda enyu hamusati zvenyu mava kutya.” 
Exodus9:31 Minda yebhari yakanga yatumbuka, nemindawo yekamuti kanosvuurwa shinda yefurakisi yakanga yava namaruva, zvose zvakaparadzwa." 
Exodus9:32 Asi koroni neimwe iya yesipereti haina kuparadzwa nokuti yakanga isati yatumbuka. 
Exodus9:33 Mosesi akabva paiva naFarao, akabuda muguta umu, ndokusimudza maoko ake kuna Tenzi. Kutinhira kwemheni nechivhuramahwe zvakabva zvanyarara, mvura ichibva yakasa." 
Exodus9:34 Asi Farao paakaona kuti mvura nechivhuramahwe zvakasa uye kutinhira kwemheni kwanyarara, akaita chitadzo zvakare iye namachinda ake vakaramba vakaomesa mwoyo." 
Exodus9:35 Sokureva kwakaita Tenzi nomuromo waMosesi, Farao akaomesa mwoyo akaramba kubvumidza vaIsiraeri kuti vaende." 
Exodus10:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Enda kuna Farao nokuti ndaita kuti aomese mwoyo, iye namachinda ake kuti ndiite zviratidzo zvangu pakati pavo." 
Exodus10:2 Ndinodawo kuti imi vaIsiraeri muzokwanisa kukurukurira vana venyu navazukuru venyu, vachinzwa nenzeve dzavo kupusisa kunorwadza kwandakaita vaIjipiti nezviratidzo zvandakaita pakati pavo, mugoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.”" 
Exodus10:3 Mosesi naAroni vakaenda kuna Farao vakandoti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari wevaHebheru, ‘Iwe ucharamba kuzvirereka kwandiri kusvikira riniko? Rega vanhu vangu vaende vandondinamata" 
Exodus10:4 nokuti kana ukaramba kuti vanhu vangu vaende, ndichaunza mhashu munyika mako mangwana." 
Exodus10:5 Mhashu dzacho dzichazara zvokufukidza nyika yose zvokuti pasi hapazoonekwa. Dzichadya zvakasara muminda zvisina kuparadzwa nechimvuramahwe, dzichidyawo miti yenyu yose yomuminda." 
Exodus10:6 Mhashu dzichati farara mumba mako nomudzimba dzamachinda ako, nedzevaIjipiti vose, zvisina kumboonekwa namadzibaba kana namadzisekuru ako chingo chavakauya panyika kusvikira pari nhasi.’ ” Ipapo Mosesi akafuratira Farao ndokuenda." 
Exodus10:7 Machinda aFarao akamuti, “Munhu uyu acharamba achititambudzisa kusvikira riniko? Zviri nani kuti murege vaIsiraeri vaende zvavo vandonamata Tenzi, Mwari wavo. Ko nazvino wose hamusi kuonawo here kuti kutoparara kuri kuita nyika yeIjipiti ikoku?”" 
Exodus10:8 Ipapo Mosesi naAroni vakabva vadzorwa kuna Farao. Iye akavati, “Chiendai zvenyu mundonamata Tenzi, Mwari wenyu. Ko zvino vachaenda ndivanaaniko?”" 
Exodus10:9 Mosesi akati, “Tichaenda tose vakuru navaduku. Tichatakura vana vedu vakomana navasikana. Tichaendawo nemombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvedu zvose nokuti tiri kundoita mabiko chaiwo okupemberera Tenzi.”" 
Exodus10:10 Mambo akavatsanangurira achiti, “Kana zvikaitika kuti ndikubvumidzei kuenda zvenyu navana venyu, kubva Tenzi wacho iyeyo ngaave nemika. Chionaika zvamuri kuronga zvakaipa kwazvo." 
Exodus10:11 Hazvimboitika! Vanhurume chete ndivo vachaenda kundonamata Tenzi. Inga ndizvo zvamanga muchida wani!” Pakarepo Mosesi naAroni vakadzingwa pana Farao. 
Exodus10:12 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Simudzira ruoko rwako pamusoro penyika yose yeIjipiti kuti mhashu dziuye, muIjipiti dzidye zvose zvisina kuparadzwa nechimvuramahwe.”" 
Exodus10:13 Mosesi akatambanudza tsvimbo yake pamusoro penyika yose yeIjipiti. Tenzi akaunza mhepo yakabva kumabvazuva, yakaswerera ikararira ichivhuvhuta. Kuzoti kwaedza mhepo yokumabvazuva iyi yakaunza mhashu." 
Exodus10:14 Mhashu dzacho dzakauya dzakawanda kwazvo munyika yose yeIjipiti, dzikamhara zvokuti tsvete nyika yose zvayo yeIjipiti. Mhashu dzakadai hadzina kumboonekwa kubvira pasi chigare uye hadzizombofi dzakaonekwazve." 
Exodus10:15 Dzakamomotera nyika yose, zvokuti pasi pakati ndo-o kusviba. Dzakadya zvose zvaiva munyika iyi. Dzakadyawo michero yose yomumiti yakanga yasiyiwa nechimvuramahwe. Hadzina kusiya kana shizha zvaro nyoro pamuti kana pane kai zvako muminda munyika yose zvayo yeIjipiti." 
Exodus10:16 Ipapo Farao akakurumidza kudaidza Mosesi naAroni akati, “Ndakatadzira Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndikakutadziraiwo imi." 
Exodus10:17 Zvino chindiregereraiwo chitadzo changu rwendo runo bedzi mukumbire Tenzi, Mwari wenyu kuti andibvisirewo nhamo yorufu iyi.”" 
Exodus10:18 Mosesi akabva pana Farao akandoteterera Tenzi. 
Exodus10:19 Tenzi akabva adzora mhepo iya, ndokuiunza ichibva nechokumadokero yava nesimba kwazvo. Yakatakura mhashu idzi ikandodzikanda muGungwa Dzvuku. Hakuna kunyange nemhashu imwechete yakasara munyika yeIjipiti yose." 
Exodus10:20 Asi Tenzi akaita kuti Farao aomese mwoyo, naizvozvo akarambidza vaIsiraeri kuenda." 
Exodus10:21 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Simudzira ruoko rwako mudenga kuti muIjipiti muve nerima rakati kwindindi.”" 
Exodus10:22 Mosesi akasimudzira ruoko rwake kudenga, rima guru ndokufukidza Ijipiti yose kwamazuva matatu." 
Exodus10:23 Ipapo vaIjipiti vakanga vasisaonani. Hakuna munhu akaedza kubuda mumba make pamazuva iwayo ose. Asi kwaiva navaIsiraeri kwakanga kuine chiedza. 
Exodus10:24 Farao akadaidza Mosesi akati, “Chiendai zvenyu mundonamata Tenzi, vana venyu vangaendewo zvavo nemi, asi mombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvenyu ngazvisare.”" 
Exodus10:25 Mosesi akati, “Zvinoreva here kuti imi ndimi muchatipa zvipfuwo zvokundobaya tichipisira kuna Tenzi, Mwari wedu?" 
Exodus10:26 Tichaendawo nezvipfuwo zvedu, hapana kana nechimwechete chinofanira kusara. Muzvipfuwo zvedu ndimo matichasarudza zvatichazobaya tichipisira Tenzi, Mwari wedu. Hatingazivizve kuti ndechipi chatichabayira Tenzi tisati tasvikako.”" 
Exodus10:27 Tenzi akaita kuti Farao aomese mwoyo akaramba kuti vaIsiraeri vaende. 
Exodus10:28 Farao akati, “Iwe Mosesi chibva pandiri! Zvingwarire! Handidi kuzokuonazve mumaziso mangu! Zuva randinongokuona pano mumaziso mangu chako kufa!”" 
Exodus10:29 Mosesi akati, “Zvamareva ndizvozvo, handichazoona uso hwenyu zvakare.”" 
Exodus11:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Zvino kwasara dambudziko rimwechete randichaunzira Farao nenyika yeIjipiti ozokuregai zvenyu moenda. Farao paachanyatsoti muende achaita zvokukudzingai muno." 
Exodus11:2 Saka taurira vaIsiraeri vose vazvinzwe kuti munhu wese murume kana mukadzi ngaakumbire muIjipiti waakavakidzana naye kuti amupe zvinhu zvesirivha nezvendarama.” 
Exodus11:3 Tenzi ndokuitawo kuti vaIjipiti vaitire vaIsiraeri mwoyochena. Zvakarewo Mosesi aiva munhu anoremekedzwa kwazvo munyika yeIjipiti airemekedzwa namachinda aFarao navanhu vake. 
Exodus11:4 Mosesi akati, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Nhasi uno pakati pousiku ndichapfuura nomuIjipiti." 
Exodus11:5 Matangwe ose echirume omunyika yeIjipiti achafa, kubvira pamwanakomana waFarao wedangwe achazogara nhaka youmambo kusvikira kumwanakomana wedangwe womuranda wechikadzi anoita basa rokukuya pamwechete namatangwe ose ezvipfuwo achafa." 
Exodus11:6 Munyika yose yeIjipiti muchava nokuchema kukuru kusati kwambovamo, uye hakuchazombofi kwakanzwikazve." 
Exodus11:7 Asi kuvaIsiraeri nezvipfuwo zvavo uchange uri muchete, kusina kunyange imbwa zvayo ichahukura kwavari. Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini Tenzi ndinobata vaIsiraeri navaIjipiti zvakasiyana.’ ”" 
Exodus11:8 Mosesi akazopedzesa achiti, “Machinda enyu ose aya achazopfugama pasi achinditeterera kuti ini ndiende navanhu vangu vose. Ndipo pandichasimuka ndopinda munzira ndoenda.” Ipapo Mosesi akabva pana Farao akashatirwa kwazvo." 
Exodus11:9 Tenzi akanga amboudza Mosesi achiti, “Farao acharamba asinganzwi zvauchamutaurira kuitira kuti ini ndiite zviratidzo zvangu zvakawanda zvinoshamisa munyika yeIjipiti.”" 
Exodus11:10 Mosesi naAroni vakaita zviratidzo zvose izvozvi zvinoshamisa Farao achiona. Tenzi akaita kuti Farao aomese mwoyo akaramba kuti vaIsiraeri vabve munyika yake. 
Exodus12:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni vachiri munyika yeIjipiti achiti," 
Exodus12:2 “Kwamuri imi mwedzi uno uyu ndiwo uchave mwedzi wokutangatanga pane mwedzi yose. Ndiwo uchava mwedzi wenyu wokutanga kwegore. 
Exodus12:3 Taurirai gungano rose ravaIsiraeri kuti, pamwedzi uno, pazuva regumi, saimba woga woga ngaatsvakire mhuri yake hwayana kana mbudzana. Mhuri nemhuri, imba nemba ive nehwayana yayo." 
Exodus12:4 Kana mhuri iri duku, hwayana yacho yakavakurira, ngaibatane neimwe mhuri yayakavakidzana nayo. Munofanira kufanoona kuti hwayana yacho inokwaniranawo navanhu varimo." 
Exodus12:5 Chipfuwo ichocho ngachive chisina chinoshoreka pachiri, chiri chikono chine gore rimwechete, chingave hwayana kana mbudzana." 
Exodus12:6 Ichengetei kusvikira pazuva regumi nechina romwedzi iwoyu. Ipapo gungano rose ravaIsiraeri ndipo parichauraya hwayana dzacho, zuva richangodoka." 
Exodus12:7 Ngavatore rimwe ropa, varizore pamagwatidziro maviri apamusuo napachivivo pamusoro pemisuo yomudzimba mavachaidyira." 
Exodus12:8 Ngavadye nyama yacho usiku ihwohwo yakaita zvokugochwa, vaidye pamwechete nechingwa chisina mbiriso nemiriwo inovava." 
Exodus12:9 Ngavarege kuidya iri mbishi kana kuita yokubika nemvura, asi ngavaite yokugocha. Ngavaigoche yakadaro nomusoro wayo namakumbo ayo nezvomukati zvayo." 
Exodus12:10 Ngavarege kusiya imwe nyama yamangwana. Kana pane inenge yasara kusvikira mangwana acho ngaipiswe. 
Exodus12:11 Aya ndiwo madyiro amuchaiita: Idyei makasunga zviuno zvenyu, mune shangu dzenyu mumakumbo, makabata tsvimbo mumaoko. Muidye nechimbichimbi, iPasika yaTenzi." 
Exodus12:12 “Usiku ihwohwo, ndichapfuura nomuIjipiti ndichiuraya kubvira kumatangwe avanhu kusvikira kune emhuka, ndichirangawo vamwari vose veIjipiti. Ndini Tenzi." 
Exodus12:13 Ropa repadzimba dzamuchange muri ndorichava chiratidzo chenyu. Kana ndikaona ropa iroro, ndichakudarikai kuti murege kuwirwa nenhamo ingakuparadzei pandicharova nyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus12:14 Kwamuri imi zuva iri rinofanira kuva zuva guru rokuyeuka, ramunoitira Tenzi mabiko pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose, muchengete murao iwoyu nokusingaperi.”" 
Exodus12:15 Tenzi akati, “Kwamazuva manomwe, muchadya chingwa chisina mbiriso chete. Pazuva rokutanga, bvisai mbiriso yose mudzimba dzenyu nokuti kana munhu akazodya chingwa chine mbiriso pamazuva manomwe iwayo, munhu iyeyo ngaachekaniswe ukama navaIsiraeri." 
Exodus12:16 Pazuva rokutanga napazuva rechinomwe, itai musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata. Pamazuva iwaya, kusambova zvako kana nebasa zvaro ramunoita, asi zvokudya zvenyu ndizvo bedzi zvamungabike." 
Exodus12:17 Munofanira kuchengeta mazuva echingwa chisina mbiriso nokuti ndiro zuva randakaburitsa madzinza enyu muIjipiti. Saka chengetai zuva guru irori pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose somurao wenyu unogara uripo narini narini. 
Exodus12:18 Mumwedzi wokutanga kubvira pazuva regumi nechina manheru, kusvikira pazuva ramakumi maviri nechiposhi manheru, imi regai kudya chingwa chine mbiriso." 
Exodus12:19 Kwamazuva manomwe, mudzimba dzenyu ngamurege kuonekwa mbiriso nokuti kana munhu akadya chinhu chine mbiriso munhu iyeyo ngaachekaniswe ukama negungano ravaIsiraeri, kunyange zvake ari muenzi kana mugari womo." 
Exodus12:20 Musambodya zvenyu chingwa chine mbiriso. Mose mamunenge mugere munofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso.” 
Exodus12:21 Mosesi akakokorodza vakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri akati, “Endai mutorere mhuri dzenyu hwayana kana mbudzana mubayire Pasika." 
Exodus12:22 Munotora katsama ketumapazi twomuhisopu monyika muropa ramunenge maisa mumbiya, morizora pamagwatidziro omumativi maviri epamusuo napachivivo pamusoro pawo. Vanhu vose ngavarege kubuda panze usiku ihwohwo hwose kudzamara kuedze." 
Exodus12:23 Tenzi paachapfuura nomunyika muno achiuraya vaIjipiti, achaona ropa pamagwatidziro okumativi maviri epamusuo napachivivo pamusoro pawo, obva apfuura zvake musuo iwoyo. Haazobvumidza muparadzi kupinda mudzimba dzenyu kuzouraya." 
Exodus12:24 Imi navana venyu, chengetai izvozvi somurao wenyu narini narini." 
Exodus12:25 Kana mazosvika kunyika yamakatsidzirwa kupiwa naTenzi, chengetai zuva guru irori." 
Exodus12:26 Vana venyu vakazokubvunzai kuti, ‘Ko mabiko aya anoreveiko?’" 
Exodus12:27 imi muti, ‘Ichi chibayiro chePasika chatinoita tichirumbidza Tenzi nokuti akapfuura dzimba dzavaIsiraeri muIjipiti achiuraya vaIjipiti, asi achisiya vemhuri dzedu vari vapenyu.’ ” Ipapo vaIsiraeri vakabva vapfugama vakanamata Tenzi." 
Exodus12:28 VaIsiraeri vakaenda vakandoita zvakanga zvarehwa naTenzi kuna Mosesi naAroni. 
Exodus12:29 Kuzoti pava pakati pousiku Tenzi akauraya matangwe echirume ose omunyika yeIjipiti, kubvira pamwanakomana waFarao wedangwe raizogara nhaka youmambo kusvikira kudangwe romusungwa akanga ari mujeri namatangwe ose ezvipfuwo." 
Exodus12:30 Usiku ihwohwo Farao namachinda ake ose navaIjipiti vose vakamuka rikave zhowezhowe kuchema muIjipiti nokuti kwakanga kusina musha wakanga usina rufu. 
Exodus12:31 Farao akadaidza Mosesi naAroni usiku ihwohwo akati, “Imi navaIsiraeri venyu chimukai mubve mukati mavanhu vangu muende kundonamata Tenzi sezvamaireva!" 
Exodus12:32 Torai zvipfuwo zvenyu nemombe dzenyu sezvamakareva muende. Mundikomborerewo.” 
Exodus12:33 VaIjipiti vakakurudzira vaIsiraeri kuti vakurumidze kubuda munyikamo vachiti, “Kana mukasaenda tose tingapere kufa.”" 
Exodus12:34 VaIsiraeri vakarongedza midziyo iyoyo yaiva nemikanyiwa yechingwa yakanga isina mbiriso. Vakaputira midziyo muhanzu dzavo vakaitakura pamapfudzi avo. 
Exodus12:35 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvavakaudzwa naMosesi. Vakakumbira vaIjipiti zvinhu zvesirivha nezvendarama nehanzu. 
Exodus12:36 Tenzi akaita kuti vaIjipiti vaitire vaIsiraeri mwoyochena wokuvapa zvavakakumbira. Naizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakarozva upfumi hwevaIjipiti. 
Exodus12:37 VaIsiraeri vaisvika zviuru mazana matanhatu pasingaverengerwe vana navanhukadzi vakapinda murwendo rwavo. Vakabva kuRamasesi vakafamba netsoka kundosvika kuSukoti. 
Exodus12:38 Vanhu vazhinji vedzimwe ndudzi vakaendawo navaIsiraeri. Vakaenda nemombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvakawanda kwazvo. 
Exodus12:39 Vakazobika chingwa chisina mbiriso nemikanyiwa iya yavakabva nayo kuIjipiti. Vakatadza kana kuisa mbiriso mumikanyiwa yechingwa nokuti vakaita zvokudzingwa muIjipiti. Pakanga pasina zvokunonoka, havana kana kuzvigadzirira mbuva yerwendo rwavo." 
Exodus12:40 VaIsiraeri vakanga vagara muIjipiti mazana mana amakore namakore makumi matatu. 
Exodus12:41 Pazuva chairo rakakwana mazana mana amakore namakore makumi matatu, ndiwo musi wakabuda hondo dzose dzavanhu vaTenzi munyika yeIjipiti." 
Exodus12:42 Usiku ihwohwo, Tenzi akarindira kuitira kuti anunure vaIsiraeri. Naizvozvo usiku ihwohwu vaIsiraeri vanofanira kugaririrawo vachipembererera Tenzi pazvizvarwa nezvizvarwa zvavo zvose." 
Exodus12:43 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni kuti, “Heinoi mirao yePasika. Mutorwa haabvumirwi kudya Pasika." 
Exodus12:44 Asi muranda wamakaita zvokutenga nemari, ngaatange adzingiswa ndipo paangazobvumirwa zvake kuidya." 
Exodus12:45 Muenziwo zvake kana mushandi wamarikicho haafanire kudya Pasika. 
Exodus12:46 Chirariro chePasika ngachidyirwe mumba makaremo machagadzirirwa. Musabude zvenyu kana nakanyama kayo mumba iyoyo. Regai kutyora kunyange pfupa rimwechete zvaro rehwayana yacho. 
Exodus12:47 Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rinosungwa nomutemo wokuchengeta Pasika. 
Exodus12:48 Kana mutorwa agere nemi achidawo kuchengeta Pasika yokupemberera Tenzi, vanhurume vose vaanenge anavo ngavadzingiswe. Ndipo paangazofemerawo kuichengeta nokuti anenge angoitawo somuIsiraeri. Asi hakuna munhu asina kudzingiswa anobvumidzwa kuichengeta." 
Exodus12:49 Mutemo iwoyu unosunga zvimwechetezvo vaIsiraeri navatorwa vagere mukati menyu.” 
Exodus12:50 Tenzi zvaakanga audza Mosesi naAroni, ndozvakaitwa izvozvo navaIsiraeri." 
Exodus12:51 Pazuva iroro chairo Tenzi akaburitsa vaIsiraeri muIjipiti vari hondo nehondo dzavanhu. 
Exodus13:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Exodus13:2 “Matangwe ose echirume anofanira kupiwa kwandiri sechinhu chinozogara chichinzi ndechangu. Chii zvacho chevaIsiraeri chinenge chatanga kuberekwa, pavanhu kana pazvipfuwo, ndechangu.”" 
Exodus13:3 Mosesi akataurira vaIsiraeri achiti, “Rangarirai zuva ramakabuda muIjipiti kwamaiva muuranda nokuti Tenzi akakubvisaimo nesimba rake guru, naizvozvo hamubvumirwe kudya chingwa chine mbiriso." 
Exodus13:4 Nhasi mumwedzi uno waAbhibhi, mava kuzobuda muIjipiti." 
Exodus13:5 “Kana Tenzi akazokusvitsai kunyika yaakatsidzira madzitateguru enyu kuzokupai, nyika yavaKanani navaHiti navaHivhi navaJebhusi, nyika yakanaka, nyika yomukaka nouchi, kupemberera ikoku ngakuitwe mumwedzi iwo uno." 
Exodus13:6 Kwamazuva manomwe munofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso chete, pazuva rechinomwe muchiita mabiko okupemberera Tenzi." 
Exodus13:7 Mumazuva manomwe iwayo idyai chingwa chisina mbiriso, ngamurege kuva nomunhu anowanikwa aine mbiriso kana chingwa chine mbiriso munyika yenyu yose." 
Exodus13:8 Munozofanira kuudza vana venyu pazuva iroro kuti, ‘Zvinhu izvi, tiri kuzviita pamusana pezvatakaitirwa naTenzi patakabva kuIjipiti.’" 
Exodus13:9 Mabiko iwayo achaita sechiratidzo chakasungirirwa paruoko rwako kana kuti sechiyeuchidzo chakasungirirwa pahuma yako kuti mutemo waTenzi usabve pamuromo pako nokuti Tenzi akakuburitsai muIjipiti nesimba rake guru. 
Exodus13:10 Nokudaro chengetai murao iwoyu gore negore panguva yawo yakatarwa. 
Exodus13:11 “Kana Tenzi azokuunzai kunyika yevaKanani sokutsidza kwaakaitira imi namadzibaba enyu achiipa kwamuri," 
Exodus13:12 imi munofanira kuzoturira kuna Tenzi chose zvacho chinenge chatanga kuberekwa. Pazvipfuwo zvenyu zvose, mikono yose inotanga kuberekwa ndeyaTenzi." 
Exodus13:13 Asi kana iri mhuru yedhongi hono, inenge iri yokutanga kuberekwa, inunurei nehwayana. Kana mukarega kuinunura imonyei mutsipa ife. Matangwe ose avanhu echirume ngaanunurwe." 
Exodus13:14 Kana mwanakomana wako akazokubvunza mune ramangwana achiti, ‘Ko izvi zvinoreveiko?’ Iwe iti, ‘Tenzi akatiburitsa nesimba rake guru muIjipiti mataitambura tiri muuranda." 
Exodus13:15 Farao paakaomesa mwoyo achitirambidza kubuda, Tenzi akauraya matangwe echirume ose munyika yeIjipiti kubvira kumatangwe avanhu kusvikira kumatangwe ezvipfuwo. Ndokusaka ndichitora zvipfuwo zvose zvinotanga kuberekwa ndichizviita chibayiro kuna Tenzi. Asi vana vedu vakomana vanenge vari matangwe tinotovanunura." 
Exodus13:16 Izvozvi zvichaita sechiyeuchidzo chiripamaoko enyu kana kuti pahuma dzenyu chokuti Tenzi akatiburitsa muIjipiti nesimba rake guru.’ ” 
Exodus13:17 Kuzoti Farao abvumira vaIsiraeri kuti vaende, Mwari haana kuvatungamirira kuenda nenzira inopfuura nomunyika yevaFirisitia kunyange zvayo yakanga iri iyo pfupi nokuti Mwari akati, “Vangasangane nehondo vakafunga napamwe vakadzokera kuIjipiti.”" 
Exodus13:18 Saka Mwari akavatungamirira vakaenda nenzira inopoterera inoenda nokurenje yakananga kuGungwa Dzvuku. VaIsiraeri vakabuda muIjipiti vakapakata zvombo zvavo zvehondo. 
Exodus13:19 Mosesi akatora mapfupa aJosefi akaenda nawo nokuti iye Josefi akanga ati vaIsiraeri vapike kuzoita izvozvi achiti, “Ndinoziva kuti Mwari achauya kuzokununurai, zvino kana moenda takurai mapfupa angu muendewo nawo.”" 
Exodus13:20 VaIsiraeri vakasimudzira rwendo rwavo vobva paSukoti vakandodzika matendhe avo vave kuEtamu, nzvimbo iri kumucheto werenje." 
Exodus13:21 Masikati Tenzi aivatungamirira neshongwe yegore, usiku achivatungamirirawo nezirimi romoto raivavhenekera nzira kuti vagone kufamba masikati kana usiku." 
Exodus13:22 Shongwe yegore yairamba ichivatungamirira masikati, zirimi romoto richivatungamirira usiku." 
Exodus14:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Exodus14:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri vadzoke mundodzika matendhe enyu pakatarisana neguta rePihahiroti, pakati peMigidhori negungwa, pedyo neguta reBhaarizefoni, mudzike matendhe enyu ipapo pedyo negungwa." 
Exodus14:3 Farao achafunga kuti vaIsiraeri vari kudzungaira munyika, rerenje ravakomberedza." 
Exodus14:4 Ini ndichaita kuti Farao aomese mwoyo akuteverei. Ini ndichawana mbiri nokukurira kwandichaita Farao nehondo yake yose. VaIjipiti ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.” VaIsiraeri vakabva vaita saizvozvo. 
Exodus14:5 Mambo weIjipiti paakaudzwa kuti vanhu vaye vatiza, iye namachinda ake vakasanduka mwoyo vakati, “Ko chiiko chatakaita? Takakanganisa, takarega vaIsiraeri vachienda zvavo vachisiya kutiitira basa.”" 
Exodus14:6 Farao akarongedzera ngoro yake akakukuchana nehondo yake. 
Exodus14:7 Akatevera vaIsiraeri ane ngoro dzake dzose dzehondo. Paiva nengoro mazana matanhatu, dzino chaidzo dzamandiriri nedzimwe ngoro dzehondo dzose dzeIjipiti, pangoro paine varwi vano chaivo vatatu vatatu." 
Exodus14:8 Tenzi akaita kuti Farao mambo weIjipiti aomese mwoyo, akabva atevera vaIsiraeri, asi vaIsiraeri vakanga vatoenda zvavo iyo misoro iri mudenga vasingakatari." 
Exodus14:9 VaIjipiti vakaronda vaIsiraeri. Vakanga vaine ngoro dzose dzaFarao dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo nehondo yake. Vakabatira vaIsiraeri vave kuPihahiroti pakatarisana neBhaarizefoni vari pamatendhe avo pedyo negungwa. 
Exodus14:10 Farao paakanga oswedera pedyo navo, vaIsiraeri vakacheuka, onei vaIjipiti vakarongana vachivatevera, vakatya kwazvo vakachema kuna Tenzi." 
Exodus14:11 Vakati kuna Mosesi, “Ko iko kuIjipiti kwakanga kusina makuva here zvawakatitora ikoko kuti tifire murenje muno? Iyewe ndiwe wakatiburitsa muIjipiti, zvino chawakatiitira chii ipapa?" 
Exodus14:12 Handiti ndizvozvi here zvatakakuudza tichiri muIjipiti kuti siyana nesu, utirege tishandire vaIjipiti. Zvaitova nani kuti tishandire vaIjipiti pano kufira murenje.”" 
Exodus14:13 Asi Mosesi akati kuvanhu, “Musatye zvenyu, batai mwoyo. Nhasi uno muchaona kununurwa kwamuchaitwa naTenzi. Ivava vaIjipiti vamuri kuona nhasi, hamuchazovaonizve." 
Exodus14:14 Tenzi ndiye achakurwirai, chenyu imi chete kubata hana.”" 
Exodus14:15 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Uri kuchemereiko kwandiri? Udza vaIsiraeri kuti varambe vachifamba." 
Exodus14:16 Iwe usimudzire tsvimbo yako pamusoro pegungwa, ukamuranise mvura napakati vaIsiraeri vayambuke gungwa napakaoma." 
Exodus14:17 Asi ndichaita kuti vaIjipiti vakakavare mumwoyo, vakuteverei. Ini ndichawana mbiri nokukurira kwandichaita Farao nehondo yake nengoro dzake dzehondo navachairi vadzo, ndichazoremekedzwa kwazvo." 
Exodus14:18 Kana ndichinge ndakurira Farao nengoro dzake navachairi vadzo, vaIjipiti vachazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.”" 
Exodus14:19 Mutumwa waMwari akanga akatungamirira vaIsiraeri, vari hondo yavanhu, akabva pamberi paakanga ari akaenda shure kwavo. Shongwe yegore yakabvawo mberi ikandomira yave shure kwavo." 
Exodus14:20 Yakandomira pakati pehondo yavaIjipiti nehondo iya yavaIsiraeri. Gore iroro rakanga rakati rima kwindi. Usiku ihwohwo hwose hwakapera vaIjipiti navaIsiraeri vasina kukwanisa kurwisana. 
Exodus14:21 Mosesi akasimudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, Tenzi akaunza mhepo ine simba yaibva kumabvazuva, ikavhuvhuta usiku ihwohwo hwose, ikamisa mvura yomugungwa kuenda kwayaiyererera, ikaikamuranisa pakave napasi pakaoma mugungwa." 
Exodus14:22 VaIsiraeri vakabva vayambuka gungwa vachifamba napasi pakaoma, mvura yakamira samadziro emba kurudyi nokuruboshwe kwavo." 
Exodus14:23 VaIjipiti vakatevera nengoro dzavo dzose dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo vakapindawo mukati megungwa imomo. 
Exodus14:24 Mambakwedza Tenzi akatarisa hondo yavaIjipiti ari muzirimi romoto mushongwe yegore akakangaidza hondo yavaIjipiti 
Exodus14:25 achiita kuti ngoro dzavo dzehondo dzinyure. VaIjipiti vakazoti, “Varume, ngatitizei vaIsiraeri avo nokuti Tenzi ari kuvarwira achitirwisa.”" 
Exodus14:26 Pakarepo Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Simudzira ruoko rwako pamusoro pegungwa mvura idzokere pakare, inyudze vaIjipiti vose nengoro dzavo dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo.”" 
Exodus14:27 Mosesi akasimudzira ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa. Kwava kuedza, mvura yegungwa ndiye dhuma kudzokerana pakare somugariro wayo. VaIjipiti ndokuti gumbo ndibereke votiza, mvurawo ikati uya tiende yochingurana navo, Tenzi ndokuvati fuse fuse nemvura pakati pegungwa." 
Exodus14:28 Mvura yakadzokera pakare ikanyudza ngoro dzehondo navachairi vadzo nehondo yose yaFarao yakanga yapinda mugungwa ichivatevera. Hakuna kunyange mumwechete zvake akapunyuka. 
Exodus14:29 Asi vaIsiraeri vakafamba napasi pakaoma mukati megungwa. Mvura yakanga yakamira samadziro emba kurudyi nokuruboshwe kwavo. 
Exodus14:30 Pazuva iroro, Tenzi ndiko kuponesa kwaakaita vaIsiraeri vakanga vateverwa navaIjipiti. VaIsiraeri vakazoona zvitunha zvavaIjipiti vaya kumahombekombe kwegungwa." 
Exodus14:31 VaIsiraeri pavakaona simba guru raTenzi richiparadza vaIjipiti vakatya Tenzi. Vakadavira munaTenzi, uye Mosesi muranda wake." 
Exodus15:1 Mosesi navaIsiraeri vakabva vaimbira Tenzi rwiyo urwu vachiti: “Ndichaimbira Tenzi nokuti akurira zvino mukurumbira, ngoro dzehondo navachairi vadzo, azviti mugungwa bvuva bvuva." 
Exodus15:2 Tenzi ndiye simba rangu, ndiye rwiyo rwangu, ndiye mununuri wangu, iyeyu Mwari wangu wandinorumbidza, Mwari wababa vangu wandinopemberera." 
Exodus15:3 Tenzi igamba rehondo, Tenzi ndiro zita rake." 
Exodus15:4 “Akakandira mugungwa ngoro dzehondo, ngoro dzaFarao nehondo yake, nyanzvi dzamasoja ake mugungwa Dzvuku akadzindondomesa" 
Exodus15:5 mvura zhinji ikavanyudza vakanyura pasi pasi kuti vido sebwe! 
Exodus15:6 Rudyi rwenyu Tenzi, ruoko rune simba rinotyisa. Rudyi rwenyu Tenzi, runopwanya-pwanya vavengi." 
Exodus15:7 “Noumambo hwenyu huno mukurumbira, munobwadutsira pasi mhandu dzenyu. Hasha dzenyu dzinovavirukira dzichivaroromesa samashanga." 
Exodus15:8 Nehasha dzenyu makangoti furidzei, mvura ndiye unga unga kuungana. Mvura yegungwa yakati dzuu kumira sechidziro. Mvura zhinji pakati pegungwa yakanyatsoti twi kumira." 
Exodus15:9 Muvengi akati, ‘Regai ndivatevere ndivabate, ndigoveranise zvandinenge ndapamba, ndichitorawo zvandinoda. Ndichavaburitsira muhara bakatwa rangu, ndivakatakazhe noruoko rwangu, vanyatsopera kuti dhuu.’" 
Exodus15:10 Asi imi makafuridza gungwa rikanyudza vaIjipiti, vakanyura somutobvu mumvura zhinji." 
Exodus15:11 Pana vamwari vose, ndiani angaenzaniswe nemi Tenzi? Ndianiko ano mukurumbira woutsvene semi, ano mukurumbira unotyisa ukadai, muiti wamabasa anoshamisa?" 
Exodus15:12 Makatambanudza ruoko rwenyu rworudyi, nyika ikamedza vavengi vedu." 
Exodus15:13 Vanhu vamakanunura munovatungamirira, munovatungamirira nomwoyochena wenyu. Munovatungamirira nesimba renyu munovaperekedza kunyika yenyu inoera." 
Exodus15:14 Ndudzi dzavanhu dzakazvinzwa dzikadedera zvikuru, vaFirisitia vabatwa nokutya kukuru." 
Exodus15:15 Vakuru vakuru veEdhomu vadumbirwa nokutya. Machinda avaMoabhu ari kudedera, vanhu vomuKanani vaparara nokutya." 
Exodus15:16 Zvava kungoti kutya zvikati kudedera vadumbirwa nazvo vachiti nazvo papata sedombo nokutya, pamusana pesimba renyu guru, kusvikira vanhu venyu Tenzi vapfuura pavari, kusvikira vanhu venyu vamakanunura muuranda, vapfuura pavari." 
Exodus15:17 Muchaenda navo mugovasima pagomo renyu. Ndiyo nzvimbo yamakasarudza imi Tenzi kuti ive musha wenyu, Nzvimbo Inoera yamakagadzirira namaoko enyu." 
Exodus15:18 Tenzi achatonga kusvikira narini narini.” 
Exodus15:19 Ngoro dzehondo dzaFarao dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo padzakapinda mugungwa, Tenzi akavati fuse fuse nemvura, asi vaIsiraeri vakayambuka vachitsika zvavo pasi pakaoma." 
Exodus15:20 Muprofita Miriamu, hanzvadzi yaAroni, akatora katambureni kake, vanhukadzi vose vakabva vamutevera vachiridzawo tambureni dzavo vachitamba." 
Exodus15:21 Miriamu akashaura vachiti; “Imbirai Tenzi nokuti akurira, akurira zvino mukurumbira, ngoro dzehondo navachairi vacho azviti mugunwa bvuva bvuva.”" 
Exodus15:22 Mosesi akatungamirira vaIsiraeri kubva paGungwa Dzvuku vachienda kurenje reShuru. Vakafamba mazuva matatu vari murenje iroro vasina pavakawana mvura. 
Exodus15:23 Vakazosvika kuMara asi vakatadza kunwa mvura yepo nokuti yaikarakata kuvava. Saka pakatumidzwa zita rokuti Mara. 
Exodus15:24 Ipapo vaIsiraeri vakapopotera Mosesi vachiti, “Zvino tonwei?”" 
Exodus15:25 Mosesi akanamata kuna Tenzi. Tenzi akamuratidza chimwe chigwenzi Mosesi akachikanda mumvura, mvura iya ikabva yanaka. Ipapo Tenzi akavapa murao nomutemo achida kuona kuti vaIsiraeri vanoteerera here" 
Exodus15:26 akati, “Kana mukazogara muchinyatsonditeerera ini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu muchiita zvinondifadza, muchichengeta mitemo nemirao yangu, handizokurovai neshamu yezvirwere yandakarova nayo vaIjipiti nokuti ini Tenzi ndini murapi wenyu.”" 
Exodus15:27 Vakazondosvika kuErimu paiva namatsime gumi namaviri. Paivawo nemiti yomurara makumi manomwe. VaIsiraeri vakadzika matendhe avo ipapo paiva nemvura. 
Exodus16:1 Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakasimudzira rwendo kubva kuErimu vakandosvika murenje reSini riri nechepakati peErimu negomo reSinai. Vakasvikapo pazuva regumi nechishanu, romwedzi wechipiri wokubva kwavo kuIjipiti." 
Exodus16:2 Vari murenje imomo, mhomho yose yavaIsiraeri yakapopotera Mosesi naAroni ichiti," 
Exodus16:3 “Dai Tenzi akatiuraya hake tichiri kuIjipiti kwataiita zvedu mabhodho enyama okupfachura, chingwa tichidya zvedu pataidira. Hezvi makatiunza murenje muno kuzotiurayisa zvenyu isu tose nenzara.”" 
Exodus16:4 Tenzi ndokuti kuna Mosesi, “Ndichakunayisirai chingwa chinobva kudenga. Zuva nezuva vanhu vose ngavabude vanonge chingwa chinovakwanira kudya pazuva iroro chete. Ndipo pandichaona kuti vaIsiraeri vanoteerera mutemo wangu here kana kuti kwete." 
Exodus16:5 Asi pazuva rechitanhatu pavanogadzirira zvokudya ngavanonge mwero wepazuva wakapetwa kaviri.” 
Exodus16:6 Mosesi naAroni vakaudza vaIsiraeri vose vachiti, “Nhasi manheru muchaziva kuti Tenzi ndiye akakuburitsai muIjipiti." 
Exodus16:7 Mangwana mangwanani muchaona kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi. Izvo zviya, ndiye wamanga muchinyunyutira achizvinzwa, isu tiri vanaaniwo zvedu vamungapopotere.”" 
Exodus16:8 Mosesi ndokuti, “Manheru Tenzi achakupai nyama yokudya, mangwanani achikupai chingwa chamunodya muchiguta. Tenzi akakunzwai pamakamunyunyutira. Izvo zviye kana muchipopota, munenge musingapopoteri isu. Ko isu tiri vanaaniwo zvedu? Wamunenge muchipopotera chaiye ndiTenzi.”" 
Exodus16:9 Mosesi akati kuna Aroni, “Kokorodza gungano rose ravaIsiraeri, uti, ‘Uyai pedyo naTenzi nokuti kumunyunyutira kwamakaita akakunzwa.’ ”" 
Exodus16:10 Aroni paakanga achitaura negungano rose ravaIsiraeri, vakatarira kurenje ndokuona kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kuri mugore." 
Exodus16:11 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Exodus16:12 “Ndanzwa kunyunyuta kwavaIsiraeri. Vaudze kuti manheru muchange muchidya nyama, mangwanani muchidya chingwa muchiguta. Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu.”" 
Exodus16:13 Ava manheru kwakauya zvihuta zvizhinji zvikazara pamatendhe avo, mangwana acho dova rikafuma rakati ware ware panharaunda yamatendhe avo." 
Exodus16:14 Kuzoti dova riya raoma, kwakaonekwa zvimwe zvinhu zvidikidiki zvakaita samafefenhwa, zvakasara zvakati ware ware pasi murenje imomo zvichinge chando." 
Exodus16:15 VaIsiraeri pavakazviona, vakabvunzana vachiti, “Ko nhaimi, zvinhui izvozvi” Vakadaro nokuti vakanga vasingamboziva kuti chii. Mosesi akati, “Ndicho chingwa chamapiwa naTenzi kuti mudye." 
Exodus16:16 Zvino chinzwai zvarehwa naTenzi, ati, ‘Mumwe nomumwe ngaanonge chaanokwana kudya pazuva marita maviri pamunhu zvichienderana nokuwanda kwakaita vanhu vaanavo mutendhe rake.’ ”" 
Exodus16:17 VaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo, vamwe vakanonga chizhinji, vamwe chishoma." 
Exodus16:18 Asi pavakachiera mumudziyo wamarita maviri, vakaona kuti vaya vakanga vanonga chakawanda chakanga chisina kupfuuridza, vayawo vakanga vanonga chishoma chakanga chisina kushomekesa. Mumwe nomumwe akanga anonga chakakwanirana naye." 
Exodus16:19 Mosesi akavati, “Hapana anofanira kusiya chimwe kusvikira mangwana mangwanani.”" 
Exodus16:20 Asi vanhu havana kuteerera Mosesi. Vamwe vakasiya chimwe kusvikira mangwana mangwanani, asi chakaora chikaita honye. Mosesi akavashatirirwa." 
Exodus16:21 Vaichinonga achiri mangwanani zuva nezuva mumwe nomumwe achinonga chaanokwana kudya pazuva. Asi chaiti kana zuva ropisa chonyakatika. 
Exodus16:22 Pazuva rechitanhatu vakanonga chingwa chamazuva maviri, mumwe nomumwe marita mana. Vatungamiriri vose vevaIsiraeri vakauya vakazvisvitsa kuna Mosesi." 
Exodus16:23 Mosesi akati kwavari, “Ndizvozvo wani zvakarehwa naTenzi mangwana izuva rokuzorora, iSabata rinoereserwa Tenzi. Saka nhasi uno gochai zvenyu chamunoda kugocha, mubike chamunoda kubika. Chose chinenge chasara chichengeterei mangwana.”" 
Exodus16:24 Vakachichengeta kusvikira mangwana sezvavakanga vaudzwa naMosesi, asi hachina kufuma chakaora kana kuita honye." 
Exodus16:25 Mosesi akati, “Nhasi idyai zvenyu ichochi nokuti nhasi iSabata, izuva raTenzi, hakuna chokunonga kunze'ku." 
Exodus16:26 Munofanira kunonga chokudya ichocho kwamazuva matanhatu zuva nezuva. Asi zuva rechinomwe nderokuzorora, kuchange kusina chokunonga.”" 
Exodus16:27 Pazuva rechinomwe vamwe vakaenda vachida kundononga chingwa chiya asi hapana chavakawana. 
Exodus16:28 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Muchasvika riniko muchiramba kuteerera mitemo nemirao yangu?" 
Exodus16:29 Inga ini Tenzi ndakakupai zuva rokuzorora saka ndichikupaiwo zvokudya zvinokwanirana namazuva maviri pazuva rechitanhatu. Musi wechinomwe, munhu wose ngaarege kubva paanenge ari.”" 
Exodus16:30 Saka vanhu vakazorora pazuva rechinomwe. 
Exodus16:31 VaIsiraeri vakatumidza chokudya ichocho zita rokuti mana. Mana iyi zvaiva zviri zvinhu zvidikidiki zvichena zvainge mhodzi yomukorianda zvichitapira sechingwa chakabikwa nouchi. 
Exodus16:32 Mosesi akati, “Tenzi akatirayira kuti tichengetere zvizvarwa zvedu zvichauya mana iyi inokwana mumarita maviri zvizoona chingwa chatakapiwa naTenzi kuti tidye tichiri murenje panguva yaakatiburitsa muIjipiti.”" 
Exodus16:33 Mosesi akataurira Aroni achiti, “Tora hari uisemo mana iyi inokwana mumarita maviri uigadzike pana Tenzi muichengete pazvizvarwa nezvizvarwa zvenyu zvose.”" 
Exodus16:34 Aroni akaita sokuudzwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. Akandogadzika hari iyi panyasi pebhokisi rechitenderano, kuti ichengeterwe ipapo." 
Exodus16:35 VaIsiraeri vakadya mana iyi kwamakore makumi mana kudzamara vazosvika munyika yaigona kugarwa navanhu. Mana iyi vakaidya kusvikira vasvika pamuganhu wenyika yeKanani. 
Exodus16:36 Chiereso chaiereswa mana iyoyo nacho chinonzi omeri chaizara nemarita maviri, chaipinda kagumi mune chimwe chiereso chikuru chainzi efa." 
Exodus17:1 Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakasimudzira rwendo rwaro kubva muRenje reSini vakafamba vachiti apa garei vosimudzira, apa garei vosimudzira sezvainge zvataurwa naTenzi. Vakazondodzika matendhe avo paRefidhimu. Asi pakanga pasina mvura yokuti vanhu vanwe." 
Exodus17:2 Vanhu ndokubva vapopotera Mosesi vachiti, “Tipe mvura yokunwa!” Mosesi akati, “Nemhosva yeiko imi muchindipopotera? Ko munoedzereiko Tenzi muchidaro?”" 
Exodus17:3 Vanhu vose vakanzwa nenyota yemvura, vakapopotera Mosesi vachiti, “Makatibvisirei kuIjipiti? Heya makatibvisira kuzotiurayisa zvenyu nenyota nhai? Saka munoda kutiurayisa nenyota isu navana vedu nezvipfuwo zvedu nhai?”" 
Exodus17:4 Mosesi akachema kuna Tenzi achiti, “Ndoita seiko navanhu ava? Vachanditema zvino uno namabwe.”" 
Exodus17:5 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Tora tsvimbo yako iye yawakamborova nayo mvura yomuna Nairi uende mberi kwegungano ravanhu uine vamwe vakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri." 
Exodus17:6 Ini ndichamira mberi kwako ikoko padombo riri kuHorebhu, urove dombo iroro, mvura ibude, vanhu vanwe.” Mosesi akaita saizvozvo vakuru vakuru vevaIsiraeri vachiona." 
Exodus17:7 Nzvimbo iyoyo yakatumidzwa zita rokuti, Masa neMeribha, pamusana pokupopota kwavaIsiraeri nokuedza kwavakaita Tenzi vachiti, “Ko Tenzi achinesu here kana kuti kwete?”" 
Exodus17:8 VaAmareki vakauya vakarwisa vaIsiraeri paRefidhimu. 
Exodus17:9 Mosesi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Tisarudzire varume mundorwisa vaAmareki. Mangwana ndichandomira pamusoro pechikomo ndakabata tsvimbo yaTenzi muruoko.”" 
Exodus17:10 Joshuwa akaita zvaakanga audzwa naMosesi, akandorwisa vaAmareki. Mosesi naAroni naHuri vakakwira pamusoro pechikomo." 
Exodus17:11 Zvaiitika ndezvokuti painge Mosesi akasimudza maoko ake mudenga, vaIsiraeri vaibva vava kukunda; asi paingewo Mosesi adzorera maoko ake pasi, vaAmareki vaibvawo vava kukunda." 
Exodus17:12 Mosesi akazoneta akatadza kuramba akasimudza maoko ake. Aroni naHuri vakakungurutsa ibwe rokuti Mosesi agare, Mosesi akagara pabwe. Aroni naHuri vakabata maoko ake vakati mumwe uku mumwe uku, vakaasimudzira mudenga. Maoko ake akanga akatsigirwa kusvikira zuva radoka." 
Exodus17:13 Naizvozvo Joshuwa akakatakazha nebakatwa vaAmareki navarwi vavo. 
Exodus17:14 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Nyora nyaya yehondo yarwiwa pano mubhuku kuitira kuti zvizorangarirwa. Taurira Joshuwa izvi azvinzwe nenzeve dzake kuti ndichaparadza vaAmareki zvachose zvokutsakatisa zita ravo panyika.”" 
Exodus17:15 Mosesi akavaka atari akaitumidza zita rokuti, “Tenzi ndiye anondipa simba rokukunda naro.”" 
Exodus17:16 Akati, “Pamusana pokuti ruoko rwanga rwakasimudzirwa kuchigaro chaTenzi, choumambo Tenzi achagarawo achirwisa vaAmareki pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose.”" 
Exodus18:1 Vatezvara vaMosesi vainzi Jetero, aiva mupristi wokuMidhiani akanzwa zvose zvakaitwa naTenzi kuna Mosesi navaIsiraeri paakavaburitsa muIjipiti." 
Exodus18:2 Vatezvara vaMosesi, vaJetero vakagamuchira zvavo Zipora mudzimai waMosesi akanga ambodzorerwa kumusha" 
Exodus18:3 pamwechete navanakomana vake vaviri. Mumwe ainzi Gerishomu nokuti Mosesi aiti, “Ndiri mutorwa munyika yavamwe.”" 
Exodus18:4 Mumwe ainzi Eriezero, nokuti aiti, “Mwari wababa vangu ndiye akava mubatsiri wangu, akandinunura kuna Farao akasandiuraya.”" 
Exodus18:5 Vatezvara vaMosesi, vaJetero, nomudzimai waMosesi navana vake vaviri vakaenda kurenje kwaiva naMosesi kugomo raMwari pavakanga vakadzika matendhe." 
Exodus18:6 Jetero akanga afanotuma shoko kuna Mosesi rokuti, “Ini, vatezvara vako, ndiri kuuyako nomudzimai wako navanakomana vake vaviri.”" 
Exodus18:7 Mosesi akandochingura vatezvara vake akavakwazisa achivaremekedza kwazvo akavatsvoda. Vakabvunzana mufaro vakapinda zvavo mutendhe. 
Exodus18:8 Mosesi akarondedzera vatezvara vake zvose zvakanga zvaitwa naTenzi achirwadzisa Farao navaIjipiti pamusana pevaIsiraeri. Akaudzawo vatezvara vake nezvamatambudziko ose avakaona murwendo rwavo nezvakaitwa naTenzi achivanunura. 
Exodus18:9 Jetero akafara kwazvo paakanzwa zvinhu zvose zvakanaka zvakaitirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi paakavanunura mumaoko avaIjipiti. 
Exodus18:10 Jetero akati, “Tenzi ngaarumbidzwe akakununurai mumaoko avaIjipiti nomumaoko aFarao, akanunura vanhu mumaoko evaIjipiti." 
Exodus18:11 Zvino ndazoziva kuti Tenzi ndiye mukuru kudarika vamwari vose zvavo nokuti akanunura vanhu kuvaIjipiti pavaizvikudza zvikuru vachivatambudza.” 
Exodus18:12 Ipapo vatezvara vaMosesi vaJetero vakapira Mwari chibayiro chinopiswa vakapirawo mimwe mipiro. Aroni navakuru vakuru vose vavaIsiraeri vakauya kuzodya pamwechete navatezvara vaMosesi ipapo pana Mwari. 
Exodus18:13 Ava mangwana Mosesi akagara padare achitonga mhosva dzevaIsiraeri. Vanhu vakaswera padare, kubvira mangwanani kudzamara manheru." 
Exodus18:14 Vatezvara vaMosesi vakaona mabatiro ose aaiita vanhu, vakati, “Ko ndicho chii chauri kuitira vanhu ichochi? Pamusana pei uriwe woga woga chete wokutonga mhosva dzavanhu uchiswedza vanhu vakangokumirira padare?”" 
Exodus18:15 Mosesi akapindura vatezvara vake achiti, “Vanhu vanouya kwandiri vachida kuziva kuti Mwari anoti kudii pamhosva dzavo," 
Exodus18:16 kana vanhu vatadzirana, vakauya kwandiri ndinovatonganisa mhosva yavo ndichivaudza mitemo nemirao yaMwari.”" 
Exodus18:17 Vatezvara vake vakamuti, “Zvauri kuita izvozvi hazvina kunaka." 
Exodus18:18 Iwe uchazviuraya nebasa, uchitambudzisawo vanhu vanouya kudare. Basa irori ibasa guru kwazvo haungariiti uri oga oga." 
Exodus18:19 Zvino chirega ndikupe zano, dai Mwari akakubatsira. Iwe chiva mumiriri wavaIsiraeri kuna Mwari, wokuturira mhosva dzavo kwaari," 
Exodus18:20 uvewo wokuvatsanangurira mitemo nemirao, uchivadzidzisa mugariro wakanaka nezvavanosungirwa kuita." 
Exodus18:21 Zvaungaitewo kusarudza mukati mavanhu ava varume vanoziva basa, vanotya Mwari. Vanofanira kuva varume vari pachokwadi, vanovenga zvepfumbamuromo, uvape basa rokutungamirira mapoka akasiyana-siyana avanhu. Vamwe vave vatungamiriri vamapoka anenge aine chiuru chavanhu, mukati macho vamwe vave vatungamiriri vetumapoka tunenge tuine zana ravanhu, tumwe tuine makumi mashanu, tumwewo tuine gumi ravanhu." 
Exodus18:22 Vatungamiriri ivavo ndivo vova vokutonga mhosva dzavanhu mazuva ose. Kana pazoita mhosva huru ndidzo dzavangauye nadzo kwauri, asi mhosva nduku dzose vachidzitonga ivo pachavo. Naizvozvo iwe ucharerukirwa nebasa nokuti vanenge votakudzana newe mutoro iwoyu." 
Exodus18:23 Dai kuri kuti Mwari anotiwo uite zvandareva, uchakwanisa kuita basa rako, vanhuwo ava vose vachadzokera kwavo vasingagunun'uni mumwoyo.”" 
Exodus18:24 Mosesi akabvuma zano raakapiwa navatezvara vake akaita zvose zvavakareva. 
Exodus18:25 Mosesi akasarudza mukati mavaIsiraeri vose varume vanoziva basa. Akavapa basa rokutungamirira mapoka akasiyana-siyana. Vamwe akaita vatungamiriri vamapoka aiva nechiuru chavanhu. Mukati macho vamwe vachitungamirira mapoka ezana ravanhu, vamwe makumi mashanu, vamwewo gumi ravanhu." 
Exodus18:26 Ndivo vakazenge vava vokutonga mhosva dzavanhu mazuva ose. Mhosva dzainge dzanetsa ndidzo dzavaipira kuna Mosesi. Nduku dzose vaingotongawo ivo pachavo. 
Exodus18:27 Mosesi akaonekana navatezvara vake. Vatezvara ava vakadzokera kunyika kwavo. 
Exodus19:1 Pazuva chairo rakapera mwedzi mitatu yokubva kwavo kuIjipiti vaIsiraeri vakasvika murenje ReSinai. 
Exodus19:2 VaIsiraeri vakanga vabva kuRefidhimu vakasvika murenje reSinai vakadzika matendhe avo pakatarisana negomo. 
Exodus19:3 Mosesi akakwiramo kundosangana naMwari. Tenzi ari mugomo imomo akadaidzira kuna Mosesi achiti, “Taurira vanhu vemba yaJakobho, uudze vaIsiraeri kuti," 
Exodus19:4 ‘Makaonaka zvandakaita kuvaIjipiti, mukaonawo matakuriro andakakuitai segondo riri kubhururuka rine charakatakura ndichikuunzai kwandiri." 
Exodus19:5 Zvino mukanditeerera nomwoyo wose, muchichengeta chitenderano changu, pamarudzi ose muchava soupfumi hunokosha kwazvo kwandiri, nokuti pasi pose ndepangu." 
Exodus19:6 Kwandiri ini, imi muchava nyika yavapristi, rudzi runoera. Izvi ndizvo zvaunofanira kutaurira vaIsiraeri.’ ”" 
Exodus19:7 Mosesi akaburuka mugomo, akakokorodza vakuru vakuru vose vavaIsiraeri akavapirawo mashoko iwayo ose aakanga audzwa naTenzi." 
Exodus19:8 Ipapo vanhu vose vakapindura pamwechete vachiti, “Zvose zvarehwa naTenzi tichazviita.” Mosesi akandoudza Tenzi zvakanga zvataurwa navanhu." 
Exodus19:9 Tenzi akaudza Mosesi kuti, “Ndichauya kwamuri ndiri mugore rakasviba kuti ndindo-o, kuitira kuti vanhu vandinzwe ndichitaura newe, naizvozvo vachazogara vachiti rawareva ndiroro.” Mosesi akandoudza Tenzi zvakanga zvataurwa navanhu." 
Exodus19:10 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Enda undoti vaIsiraeri ngavazvinatse nhasi namangwana, vasuke hanzu dzavo," 
Exodus19:11 vange vagadzirira pazuva retatu nokuti pazuva retatu ini Tenzi ndichauya pamusoro peGomo reSinai vanhu vose vachiona. 
Exodus19:12 Iwe unofanira kutarira vanhu muganho unoripoteredza kuti varege kudarika muganho iwoyo vachikwira mugomo kana kuswedera mujinga maro. Kuwana anorigunzva anotourayiwa chete. 
Exodus19:13 Asaite kana zvokubatwa namaoko. Ngaaite zvokutemwa namabwe kana kupfurwa nomuseve, ingave mhuka kana munhu chaiye urayai chete. Vanhu vanotozouya kugomo kana hwamanda yaridzwa zvakati rebei.”" 
Exodus19:14 Mosesi akaburuka mugomo umu oenda kuvanhu. Akandotaurira vaIsiraeri kuti vazvinatse; vakasuka hanzu dzavo. 
Exodus19:15 Mosesi akaudza vanhu kuti, “Gadzirirai kubvira nhasi kusvikira pazuva retatu, pasava naanopinda mumba nomukadzi.”" 
Exodus19:16 Pazuva retatu, mangwanani, mugomo makafumonzwikwa kutinhira nemheni, pagomo pakava negore rakati kwirindindi, kwakanzwikwawo kurira kukuru kwehwamanda, vanhu vose vakadedera nokutya mumatendhe." 
Exodus19:17 Mosesi akabva navanhu kumatendhe akauya navo kuzosangana naMwari, vanhu vakasvikomira mujinga megomo." 
Exodus19:18 Gomo rose reSinai rakati gude gude kufukidzwa noutsi, nokuti Tenzi akanga aburukira pamusoro paro ari mumoto. Utsi hwakati togo-o sokunge huri kubva muvira romoto. Gomo rose rakandengendeka zvikuru." 
Exodus19:19 Kuzoti ruzha rwehwamanda rwanyanya kuramba ruchikura, Mosesi akataura. Tenzi akamupindura nezwi raiita zvokutinhira." 
Exodus19:20 Ipapo Tenzi akaburukira pamusoro peGomo reSinai, akadaidzira kuna Mosesi kuti akwire pamusoro pegomo, Mosesi ndokukwira." 
Exodus19:21 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti, “Buruka undoyambira vanhu kuti varege kudarika muganho vachida kundiona nokuti vakangodaro vazhinji pakati pavo vangafe." 
Exodus19:22 Kunyangewo vapristi vanouya pedyo neni Tenzi vanofanira kunge vatozvinatsawo. Kana vakarega kudaro iyeni Tenzi ndinovaparadza.” 
Exodus19:23 Mosesi akapindura Tenzi achiti, “Vanhu havangagoni kukwira mugomo muno reSinai nokuti imi pachenyu makatiti tiripoteredze nomuganho, tirierese.”" 
Exodus19:24 Tenzi akamuti, “Chiburuka undouya naAroni. Vapristi navanhu ngavarege kudarika muganho, kana kukwira kuno kwandiri. Kana vakadaro ndichavaparadza.”" 
Exodus19:25 Mosesi akaburuka akandoudza vanhu izvozvo. 
Exodus20:1 Mwari akataura mashoko ose ano aya 
Exodus20:2 achiti, “Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wako ndakakuburitsa kuIjipiti kwawaiva muuranda." 
Exodus20:3 “Usave navamwe vamwari kunze kwangu. 
Exodus20:4 Usazvigadzirire chifananidzo chokunamata kana kuita chinhu chakafanana nechii zvacho chiri kumusoro kudenga, kana chiri panyika pasi pano, kana chiri mumvura pasi pasi penyika." 
Exodus20:5 Usapfugamire zvifananidzo izvozvo kana kuzvinamata nokuti ini Tenzi, Mwari wako ndiri Mwari aneshanje. Ndinoranga vose vanondivenga, shamhu yangu ichirova vana vavo ndichivarangira zvitadzo zvamadzibaba avo kusvikira kuchizvarwa chavo chechitatu nechechina." 
Exodus20:6 Asi ndinogara ndichiitira mwoyochena kuzviuru nezviuru zvavanondida, vanochengeta mitemo yangu." 
Exodus20:7 “Usataure zita raTenzi, Mwari wako zvisina maturo nokuti Tenzi haangaregi kupa mhosva munhu anotaura zita rake zvisina maturo." 
Exodus20:8 “Yeuka zuva reSabata urierese. 
Exodus20:9 Kwamazuva matanhatu shanda zvako, uite basa rako rose," 
Exodus20:10 asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata raTenzi, Mwari wako. Pazuva iroro usaite kana basa zvaro, iwe kana mwana wako mukomana kana musikana, kunyange munhu anokushandira murume kana mukadzi, kana chipfuwo chako, kunyange muuyi agere nemi." 
Exodus20:11 Ndinodaro nokuti mumazuva matanhatu, ini Tenzi ndakasika denga nenyika negungwa nezvose zviri mazviri, ndikazorora pazuva rechinomwe. Naizvozvo Tenzi akakomborera zuva reSabata akariita zuva rinoera." 
Exodus20:12 “Remekedza baba naamai vako, kuti mazuva ako awande munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi, Mwari wako." 
Exodus20:13 “Usauraye. 
Exodus20:14 Usaite upombwe. 
Exodus20:15 Usabe. 
Exodus20:16 Usapupurire mumwe wako zvenhema. 
Exodus20:17 Usachive imba yomumwe wako. Usachive mudzimai womumwe, kana munhu anomushandira, murume kana mukadzi, kunyange mombe yake, kana dhongi rake, kana chii zvacho chomumwe wako.”" 
Exodus20:18 VaIsiraeri vose vakanzwa kudhiriridza, nemheni nokurira kwehwamanda. Vakaona utsi huchipwititika mugomo. Vanhu vakati kanha nazvo vakadedera nokutya, vakamirira kure." 
Exodus20:19 Vakataurira Mosesi vachiti, “Dai imi murimi mataura kwatiri isu tinokuteererai. Dai Tenzi arega zvake kutaura kwatiri, tingafe.”" 
Exodus20:20 Mosesi akati kuvanhu, “Musatye henyu nokuti Mwari auya kuzoona kuti muri vanhu vakadii. Anodawo kuti kumutya kukupindei muropa, murege kumutadzira.”" 
Exodus20:21 Vanhu vakamirira kure, asi Mosesi ndiye akaswedera kugore dema dema kuya kwaiva naMwari." 
Exodus20:22 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti, “Iti kuna vaIsiraeri, ‘Mazviona imi pachenyu kuti ndataura nemi ndiri muchadenga.’" 
Exodus20:23 Saka musazvigadzire vamwari vesirivha kana vendarama vokundiita zvenyu madirativhange navo. 
Exodus20:24 Atari yamunondivakira ngaive yevhu mupire kwandiri zvibayiro zvenyu zvokupisa nemipiro yenyu yokuwadzana yehwai nemombe. Pose pose pandichasarudza kuti mundinamatirepo ndichauya kwamuri kuzokukomborerai. 
Exodus20:25 Kana muchindivakira atari yamabwe musaivake namabwe akavezwa nokuti kana mukatora nhemo muchiveza mabwe matoan'oresa. 
Exodus20:26 Musaite madanho okukwirisa kuatari yangu kuti parege kuva nokunyadzisira woonererwa uripo.” 
Exodus21:1 “Iyi ndiyo mitemo yaunofanira kundopa vaIsiraeri. 
Exodus21:2 Kana uchinge watenga muranda wechiHebheru, ngaakushandire kwamakore matanhatu. Asi mugore rechinomwe, muranda iyeyo murege aende zvake pasina chaanoripa." 
Exodus21:3 Kana munhu akatengwa achingova iye oga ngaaende zvake ari oga, asi kana akatengwa aine mudzimai ngaaende pamwechete nomudzimai wake." 
Exodus21:4 Kana tenzi wake akamupa mukadzi, mukadzi iyeyo akabereka vana vakomana navanasikana, mukadzi iyeyo navana vake vanofanira kupiwa kuna vatenzi vomudzimai iyeyo, murume uya oenda zvake ari oga." 
Exodus21:5 Asi kana muranda akatengwa wacho akati, ‘Ini ndinoda tenzi wangu, ndinodawo mudzimai wangu navana, musandisunungure zvenyu kuti ndiende," 
Exodus21:6 pakadaro, tenzi wake ngaauye naye kuna Mwari, amumise negwatidziro romusuo, atore mutsunda amuboore nzeve yake, achava muranda watenzi wake upenyu hwake hwose.’" 
Exodus21:7 “Kana munhu akatengesa mwanasikana wake kuti ave muranda, haazosunungurwa muuranda sezvinoitwa munhurume." 
Exodus21:8 Kana murume iyeyu akamutengera kuroora asisamudi, ngaamurege achidzikinurwa pamusana pokuti haana mvumo yokumutengesa kuvatorwa nokuti haana kuvimbika kwaari." 
Exodus21:9 Kana murume akamutengera kupa mwanakomana wake, ngaamuitire zvaangaitire mwanasikana wake." 
Exodus21:10 Kana akatora mumwe mukadzi ngaarambe achipa mukadzi wake zvaanga achimupa zvezvokudya nezvokupfeka, aregewo kushomekesa mazuva aaipinda naye mumba." 
Exodus21:11 Kana akarega kumuitira zvinhu zvitatu izvozvi, mukadzi iyeyo ngaaende zvake pasina mari inoripwa." 
Exodus21:12 “Ani naani zvake anorova munhu zvokumuuraya, ngaaurayiwewo." 
Exodus21:13 Asi kana akauraya munhu asina kuita zvokumuhwandira, zvangoitikawo iri tsaona, ngaatize andopotera kunzvimbo yandichasarudza kwaasingazourayiwa." 
Exodus21:14 Asi kana munhu akaita maune okuvirukira mumwe nehasha, akamuuraya noujarijari, mutorei paatari yangu paanenge andopotera ipapo aurayiwe." 
Exodus21:15 “Ani naani zvake anorova baba vake kana amai vake, anofanira kutofa." 
Exodus21:16 “Ani naani zvake anoba munhu achimutengesa, kana kuwanikwa ainaye, anofanira kuuraiwa." 
Exodus21:17 “Ani naani zvake anoti rushambwa ngaruwire baba vake kana amai vake, anofanira kuuraiwa." 
Exodus21:18 “Ngatiti vanhu vaviri vaitirana nharo, mumwe ozomutema mumwe nedombo kana kuti nechibhakera, nyakurohwa orega kufa, asi ongosara achirwara," 
Exodus21:19 ozoita nani okwanisawo kutora mudonzvo achifamba zvake panze, nyakurova mumwe anenge asisapiwi mhosva, asi anosungirwa kuripa waakarova nguva yaakarasikirwa nayo achirwara, uyewo amurapise kusvikira apora." 
Exodus21:20 “Kana munhu akatora mubhadha akarova muranda wake wechirume kana kuti wechikadzi muranda achibva afa pakarepo, munhu iyeyo ngaarangwe." 
Exodus21:21 Asi kana muranda iyeyo akazorarama zuva rimwechete kana maviri zvawo, tenzi wake haazorangwa nokuti muranda wacho anenge ari wake." 
Exodus21:22 “Ngatiti varume vorwisana, vokuvadza mukadzi anenge akazvitakura obva abva pamuviri, asi osara asina kukuvadzwa zvakanyanya; murume anenge amukuvadza ngaaripiswe zvinenge zvarehwa nomurume womukadzi iyeyu, zviri zvinhu zvinobvumwawo nedare." 
Exodus21:23 Asi kana mukadzi uyu achinge akuvadzwa, murume amukuvadza ngaarangwe sezvinoreva mutemo unoti, upenyu ngahutsiviwe noupenyu," 
Exodus21:24 ziso neziso, zino ritsiviwewo nezino, ruoko noruoko, gumbo richitsiviwawo negumbo," 
Exodus21:25 apisa mumwe ngaapiswewo, akuvadza mumwe ngaakuvadzwewo, arova mumwe ngaarohwewo." 
Exodus21:26 “Kana munhu akarova ziso romuranda wake, wechirume kana wechikadzi akaritushura, ngaasunungure muranda wacho aende zvake pamusana peziso rake." 
Exodus21:27 Kana munhu akarova zino romuranda wake, wechirume kana wechikadzi, zino racho rikaguka, ngaasunungure muranda iyeyo pamusana pezino rake." 
Exodus21:28 “Kana mombe ikatunga munhu, murume kana mukadzi, akafa, mombe yacho ngaitemwe namabwe. Nyama yayo ngairege kudyiwa. Asi muridzi wayo ngaarege kupiwa mhosva." 
Exodus21:29 Asi kana mombe yacho yaiva nomusambo wokutunga vanhu, muridzi wayo akamboyambirwa akarega kuichengeta, kana ikazouraya munhu, murume kana mukadzi, mombe iyoyo ngaitemwe namabwe ife. Muridzi wayo ngaaurayiwewo." 
Exodus21:30 Asi kana muridzi wemombe iyoyo akanzi aripe, ngaaripe zvose zvinotemwa nedare kuti iye agorega kuurayiwa." 
Exodus21:31 Kunyange mombe ikatunga mwana mukomana kana musikana ikamuuraya, mutongero wacho mumwechetewo." 
Exodus21:32 Kana mombe ikatunga muranda wechirume kana wechikadzi, muridzi wayo ngaaripe tenzi womuranda iyeyo mari yamashekeri esirivha makumi matatu. Mombe yacho ngaitemwe namabwe ife." 
Exodus21:33 “Kana munhu akasiya zvake mugodhi usina kukwidibirwa, kana kuti ochera mugodhi osiya usina kukwidibirwa, mombe kana dhongi rowira imomo," 
Exodus21:34 muridzi womugodhi ngaaripiswe. Ngaape mari kumuridzi wechipfuwo chafa, iye achitore chive chake." 
Exodus21:35 Kana mombe yomunhu ikatunga mombe yomumwe ikafa ngavatengese mombe yatunga imwe vagoverane mutengo wacho. Ngavagovanewo nyama yemombe yafa iya. 
Exodus21:36 Kana mombe yacho yanga iinomusambo wokutunga dzimwe, muridzi wayo akasaichengeta, muridzi wayo ngaabvise mombe chaiyo inotsika yokuripa inenge yaurayiwa. Asi mombe inenge yafa yacho ichava yanyakuripa mombe uya." 
Exodus22:1 “Kana munhu akaba mombe kana hwai akaiuraya, kana kuti akaitengesa, ngaaripiswe mombe shanu pamombe imwechete; pahwai imwechete ngaaripiswe hwai ina." 
Exodus22:2 Kana mbavha ikabatwa ichipaza, ikarohwa ikafa, munhu anenge aiuraya haapiwe mhosva yokuponda munhu." 
Exodus22:3 Asi kana zvikaitika ari masikati machena, ane mhosva yokuponda munhu. “Mbavha ngairipiswe zvakakwana, kana isina chainacho, ngaitengeswe pawanikwe muripo wezvayakaba." 
Exodus22:4 Kana akanga aba mombe kana kuti dhongi kana hwai, akazowanikwa ainayo iri mhenyu, ngaaripe muripo wakapetwa kaviri." 
Exodus22:5 “Kana munhu achingunofudza zvipfuwo zvake mumunda wake wembesa kana kuti wemichero, akarega zvipfuwo zvake zvichindodya mumunda womumwe wembesa, ngaaripiswe mbesa nemichero yakanyatsosvika yomumunda make." 
Exodus22:6 “Kana moto ukabatidzwa ukaenderera nomuminzwa kumunda womumwe, ukandopisa mbesa dzake dzakaunganidzwa kana kuti dzimire, munhu anenge atungidza moto iwoyo ngaaripiswe chaizvo." 
Exodus22:7 “Kana munhu akachengeteswa mari kana kuti zvinhu zvinokosha, zvobva zvabirwa mumba make, kana mbavha ikazozikanwa, ngairipiswe kanopetwa kaviri." 
Exodus22:8 Kana mbavha ichinge isina kuzikanwa, muridzi wemba iyeyu nyakubirwa ngaaunzwe kuna Mwari kudare azopika mhiko yokuti haana kuba zvinhu zvaakanga akachengeteswa." 
Exodus22:9 “Ngatitii vanhu vaitirana nharo pamusoro pechinhu chisiri kuzikanwa kuti ndechaani, ingave mombe kana dhongi kana kuti hwai kana hanzu chero chinhu chipi zvacho chakarasika. Vanhu vanenge vachiitirana nharo ivavo ngavaunzwe kuna Mwari kudare. Anenge anzi ane mhosva naMwari, ngaaripe mumwe wake kakapetwa kaviri." 
Exodus22:10 “Kana munhu achinge achengetesa mumwe wake dhongi kana mombe, kana kuti hwai yake, kana chimwe zvacho chipfuwo chake, chikazofa, kana kukuvara, kana kupambwa, pasina mumwe akazviona," 
Exodus22:11 munhu iyeyo ngaapike nezita raTenzi kune muridzi wacho kuti haana kuchitsakatisa. Muridzi wacho ngaagamuchire zvinenge zvarehwa. Nyakuchengeteswa haazosungirwa kuripa. 
Exodus22:12 Asi kana zviri zvechokwadi kuti chakabiwa, nyakuchichengeteswa ngaaripe muridzi wacho." 
Exodus22:13 Kana chipfuwo chacho chichinge chakaparadzwa nechikara, ngaauye aratidze dare zvakasiyiwa nechikara, haazoripiswa." 
Exodus22:14 “Kana munhu achinge akumbira chipfuwo kuno mumwe, chikakuvara, kana kufa, muridzi wacho asipo, uya anga achikumbira anofanira kutoripa." 
Exodus22:15 Asi kana zvaitika muridzi wacho aripo, haaripiswe. Kana changa chichishandisirwa mari, chinongoripwa mari yebasa rachaita chete." 
Exodus22:16 “Kana murume akanyengetedza mhandara inenge isati yatumirwa mari yokuroora, akatadza naye, ngaabvise pfuma yose yokumuroora ave mukadzi wake." 
Exodus22:17 Kana baba vomusikana varambisisa kuti murume iyeyo amuroore, ngaangobvisiswa muripo unokwanirana neroora rinobvisirwa mhandara." 
Exodus22:18 “Usamborega zvako munhukadzi anenge ari muroyi ari mupenyu. 
Exodus22:19 “Munhu anenge aita chakaipa nemhuka ngaaurayiwe. 
Exodus22:20 “Munhu anopira chibayiro kuna vamwe vamwari, vasirini Tenzi ngaaurayiwe." 
Exodus22:21 “Usaitire mutorwa zvakaipa kana kumubata nenzira isina kunaka nokuti imi maivawo vatorwa munyika yeIjipiti. 
Exodus22:22 Musatambudze chirikadzi kana nherera. 
Exodus22:23 Kana ukavatambudza vakachema kwandiri, chokwadi ndichanzwa kuchema kwavo." 
Exodus22:24 Ndichaviruka nehasha ndigokuurayisai muhondo nebakatwa. Madzimai enyu achasara ava chirikadzi, vana venyu vachivawo nherera." 
Exodus22:25 “Kana ukakweretesa mari kune mumwe wavanhu vangu vaugere navo, anenge ari murombo usazoita zvinoitwa navanhu vane basa rokukweretesa mari, usaite chimbadzo." 
Exodus22:26 Kana ukabatira jasi romunhu anenge akakukwereta, mudzosere jasi rake zuva risati radoka" 
Exodus22:27 nokuti ndiro chete raanaro rokufuka. Ko angavate akafukeiko kana asina jasi rake? Kana akazochema kwandiri ndichamunzwa nokuti ndine tsitsi. 
Exodus22:28 “Usashore Mwari, usamboti mutongi wako dai awana chinomuwana." 
Exodus22:29 “Usanonoke kupira kwandiri mipiro yako yezvinhu zvako zvose zvinoti mbesanwa newaini neyamafuta eorivhi. Unofanira kunditurira vanakomana vako vamatangwe. 
Exodus22:30 Itawo zvimwechetezvo nedangwe remombe yako kana rechimwe chipfuwo, ngariregwe riina amai varo kwamazuva manomwe mozoripira kwandiri pazuva rorusere." 
Exodus22:31 “Imi munofanira kuva vanhu vatsvene vakatsaurirweni, saka musadye nyama yechinhu chipi zvacho chinenge chaurayiwa nezvikara zvesango, asi ipai imbwa." 
Exodus23:1 “Usafambise makuhwa. Usarangane nomunhu ane mhosva kuti uzomupupurira zvenhema. 
Exodus23:2 Usaite chinhu chakaipa pamusana pokuti chiri kuitwa navanhu vazhinji, kana kungotevera ruzhinji mukupupurira zvisiri zvechokwadi padare." 
Exodus23:3 Tonga mhosva yomurombo nomazvo usingamupembedzi nokuda kwokuti murombo. 
Exodus23:4 “Kana ukaona mombe kana kuti dhongi romuvengi wako rarasika unofanira kuridzorera kwaari. 
Exodus23:5 Kana ukaona dhongi romuvengi wako rawira pasi rakatsitsirirwa nomutoro waro, mubatsire kurimutsa, usangosiya zvakadaro." 
Exodus23:6 “Usaminamise mhosva yomurombo padare uchirega kuitonga nomazvo. 
Exodus23:7 Siyana nokupomera vanhu mhosva dzavasina, urege kuti munhu asina mhosva, mururami aurayiwe. Ndinodaro nokuti muipi handingati haana mhosva." 
Exodus23:8 Usagamuchire pfumbamuromo nokuti pfumbamuromo inopofomadza vari pazvigaro zvoukuru, ichitadzisawo mururami kutaura chokwadi." 
Exodus23:9 “Usabate mutorwa zvakaipa. Imi munoziva wani upenyu hwomutorwa nokuti imi maivawo vatorwa kunyika yeIjipiti. 
Exodus23:10 “Rima zvako munda wako kwamakore matanhatu, uchikohwa mbesa dzawo." 
Exodus23:11 Asi pagore rechinomwe, rega usaruke usina kuurima uchiuzorodza kuitira kuti varombo vokwenyu vadye zvavo mahoko acho. Uye mhuka dzesango dzidyewo zvaunosiya. Itai zvimwechetezvo neminda yenyu yemigirepisi neyemiorivhi." 
Exodus23:12 “Kwamazuva matanhatu ita zvako basa rako rose, asi pazuva rechinomwe zorora kuitira kuti mombe namadhongi ako azorore, vana vavaranda vako navatorwa vambofurwawo nemhepo." 
Exodus23:13 Chenjererai kuita zvose zvandakuudzai, musambodoma zvenyu vamwe vamwari nezita, kunyange zvako kuvati muromo bufu." 
Exodus23:14 “Munofanira kuchengeta mazuva makuru okundipemberera, katatu pagore." 
Exodus23:15 Munochengeta mazuva makuru echingwa chisina mbiriso sezvandakakuudzai, mudye chingwa chisina mbiriso kwamazuva manomwe panguva yawo yakatemwa mumwedzi waAbhibhi nokuti mumwedzi iwoyo makabuda muIjipiti. Hakufanire zvako kuva nomunhu anouya kwandiri akangobata maoko chete." 
Exodus23:16 “Uyewo munochengeta zuva rokupemberera kukohwa muchipemberera zvirimwa zvokutanga kukohwa zvebasa ramunenge maita muminda yenyu. “Pakupera kwegore, chengetai zuva rokupemberera kuunganidza mbesa, pamunenge maunganidza mbesa dzenyu nezvamaikohwa muminda." 
Exodus23:17 Vanhu venyu vose varume vanofanira kuuya kuneni Tenzi Mwari, katatu pagore." 
Exodus23:18 “Musapire kwandiri ropa rechibayiro pamwechete nechingwa chine mbiriso. Mafuta ezvibayiro zvamunondibayira pamazuva makuru musaasiye kusvikira mangwana. 
Exodus23:19 “Mbesanwa dzinotanga kuibva dzokutangatanga dzacho, uya nadzo kuimba yaTenzi, Mwari wako. Usabike hwayana kana mbudzana nomukaka wamai vayo." 
Exodus23:20 “Chinzwai, ndava kutuma mutumwa wangu achakutungamirirai, achikuchengetai murwendo, anondokusvitsai kunyika yandakakugadzirirai." 
Exodus23:21 Muteererei muite zvaanoreva, regai kumupandukira, haazokuregererai zvamunenge makanganisa nokuti ndini ndamutuma muzita rangu." 
Exodus23:22 Asi imi mukanyatsoteerera zvaanoreva, muchiita zvose zvandinoreva, ini ndichava muvengi wavavengi venyu, nemhandu yemhandu dzenyu." 
Exodus23:23 Ndinodaro nokuti mutumwa wangu achakutungamirirai, achikusvitsai kuvaAmori, navaHiti navaPerizi navaKanani navaHivhi navaJebhusi, vandichaparadza." 
Exodus23:24 Musapfugamire vamwari vavo, kana kuvanamata, kunyange kutevedzera zviito zvavanhu ivavo. Asi nyatsoputsai zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata, muparadze shongwe dzamabwe dzakamisirwa vamwari vavo." 
Exodus23:25 Namatai ini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu. Ini ndinozokukomborerai ndichikupai zvokudya nemvura, ndichibvisa zvirwere pakati penyu." 
Exodus23:26 Hapachazova nomukadzi anobva pamuviri, kana kushaya mbereko. Ndichakupai upenyu hurefu." 
Exodus23:27 Kwamunoenda kwose, ndichaita kuti vafanova mbwende nokukutyai, ndichadzungaidza ndudzi dzoko. Vavengi venyu vose ndichaita kuti vakufuratirei vati ware kutiza." 
Exodus23:28 Ndichatyisidzira vavengi vaHivhi navaKanani navaHiti vagoti ware kukutizai savanhu varumwa namago. 
Exodus23:29 Handizovadzinga vose negore rimwechete nokuti kana ndikadaro nyika ingasare isina vanhu, zvikara zvikakuwandirai." 
Exodus23:30 Kashoma nakashoma ndichafanokudzingirai vanhu ivava kudzamara imi mazova vazhinji, nyika maiita yenyu." 
Exodus23:31 Miganho yenyu ichatangira pagungwa Dzvuku kundosvika kugungwa ravaFirisitia, ichitangirawo murenje kundosvika muna Yufuratesi, nokuti ndichaisa vagari venyika iyoyo mumaoko enyu." 
Exodus23:32 Musaite chitenderano navo, kana navamwari vavo." 
Exodus23:33 Musarege vanhu ivavo vachigara munyika menyu, vangadaro vakazokufurirai mukazonditadzira nokuti kana mukanamata vamwari vavo kuteyiwa chaiko kwamatoitwa.”" 
Exodus24:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Tora Aroni naNadhabhu naAbhihu navakuru vakuru makumi manomwe vevaIsiraeri, mukwire muno mugomo mandiri. Musati masvika pandiri pfugamai mundiremekedze." 
Exodus24:2 Iwe Mosesi ndiwe woga uchasvika pedyo neni Tenzi, asi vamwe ngavarege kuswedera pedyo, vamwe vanhu ngavarege kukwira muno newe.”" 
Exodus24:3 Mosesi akandoudza vaIsiraeri zvose zvakarehwa naTenzi nemirao yose. Vanhu vose vakapindura pamwechete vachiti, “Tichaita zvose zvataurwa naTenzi.”" 
Exodus24:4 Mosesi akanyora mashoko ose aTenzi. Kuzoti kwaedza akafumomuka ndokuvaka atari mujinga megomo. Akamisa mabwe gumi namaviri anomirira madzinza evaIsiraeri gumi namaviri. 
Exodus24:5 Ipapo Mosesi akatuma mamwe majaya echiIsiraeri, akandopira zvibayiro zvokupisa, akapirawo zvibayiro zvemipiro yokuwadzana zvemombe kuna Tenzi." 
Exodus24:6 Mosesi akatora rimwe ropa rezvibayiro ndokuriisa mumidziyo. Rimwe racho akasasa naro atari. 
Exodus24:7 Akazotora bhuku rechitenderano akariverenga vanhu vachinzwa. Vanhu vakati, “Zvose zvarehwa naTenzi tichazviita, tichava vanhu vanoteerera.”" 
Exodus24:8 Mosesi akatora ropa riya ndokurisasa pavanhu, achiti, “Ropa iri, nderechitenderano chaTenzi chaaita nemi maererano nemirao yaakupai.”" 
Exodus24:9 Mosesi naAroni naNadhabhu naAbhihu navakuru vakuru vevaIsiraeri makumi manomwe vakakwiramo," 
Exodus24:10 vakaona Mwari weIsiraeri. Pasi petsoka dzake painge pane ruware rwakaita samabwe anokosha esafaya, rwakati ngwerewere sokunze sezvakangoita mudenga'mu." 
Exodus24:11 Asi haana kuparadza vakuru vakuru vevaIsiraeri ivavo. Vakaona Mwari, kudya vakadya, kunwa vakatonwawo zvavo." 
Exodus24:12 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Kwira mugomo muno mandiri umbogaramo, ndizokupa mafendefa maviri amabwe ane mitemo nemirao yandakanyorera kudzidzisa vaIsiraeri.”" 
Exodus24:13 Mosesi naJoshuwa, mubatsiri wake, vakasimuka. Mosesi akakwira mugomo raMwari." 
Exodus24:14 Akasiya audza vatungamiriri vaya kuti, “Imi imbotimirirai pano, kudzamara tadzoka kuno kwamuri. Zvavapo ndezvizvi, Aroni naHuri ndivo vamuchasara navo. Anenge ane chanyanya kunetsa ngaaende kundoona ivava.”" 
Exodus24:15 Mosesi akakwira mugomo, gore ndokubva rati gude gude kufukidza gomo iroro." 
Exodus24:16 Kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakauya pagomo reSinai, gore rikafukidza gomo iroro kwamazuva matanhatu. Pazuva rechinomwe, iye ari mukati megore akadaidzira kuna Mosesi." 
Exodus24:17 Kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakanga kwakaita somoto wairirima pamusoro pegomo pakuona kwavaIsiraeri. 
Exodus24:18 Mosesi akapinda mugore muya, akakwira mugomo. Akagaramo siku nesikati, kwamazuva makumi mana." 
Exodus25:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Exodus25:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri vapire zvipo kwandiri. Munhu mumwe nomumwe ngaapire kwandiri chipo chaanoda nomwoyo wakasununguka, iwe uchindigamuchirira." 
Exodus25:3 Zvipo zvaungagamuchire kwavari ndezvizvi zvinoti; ndarama nesirivha nendarira," 
Exodus25:4 kwouya machira erineni akanakisisa nezvivhimbo zveruvara rwedenga nezveruvara rwehute nezvitsvuku nemvere dzembudzi," 
Exodus25:5 kwoti matehwe ehondohwe akatsvukiswa kwotiwo matehwe etahashi, namapango omuunga," 
Exodus25:6 uyewo mafuta okuisa mumarambi netunonhuhwirira twamafuta okuzodzesa notwomurusenzi," 
Exodus25:7 ndokuzotiwo tumabwe tunokosha tweonikisi notumwe tumabwe tunokosha twokuisa pahanzu yeefodhi napanyembe yapadundundu. 
Exodus25:8 VaIsiraeri ngavandigadzirire nzvimbo inoera kuti ndigare pakati pavo. 
Exodus25:9 Unofanira kugadzira tendhe rinoera iroro pamwechete nemidziyo yaro nomutoo chaiwo wandinokuratidza. 
Exodus25:10 “Vanofanira kugadzira bhokisi rechitenderano ramapuranga omuunga. Urefu hwaro huri masendimita zana rine gumi, upamhi hwaro huite masendimita makumi matanhatu, kudzika kwaro ngakuitewo masendimita makumi matanhatu namatanhatu." 
Exodus25:11 Ngarinamirirwe nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa mukati nokunze, uritenderedze kumusoro kwaro nomukombero wendarama." 
Exodus25:12 Unorigadzirira maringi mana endarama ugoaisa pamakumbo mana ebhokisi. Maringi maviri ngaaiswe kurutivi rumwe, mamwe maviri aiswewo kurutivi rumwe." 
Exodus25:13 Unoveza mapango omuunga, woanamirira ndarama," 
Exodus25:14 wopinza mapango iwayo mumaringi aya ari pamativi ebhokisi kuti uwane chokuritakurisa nacho. 
Exodus25:15 Mapango iwayo anofanira kugara ari mumaringi ebhokisi, arege kubviswamo." 
Exodus25:16 Unozoisa mafendefa echitenderano andichakupa mubhokisi imomo. 
Exodus25:17 “Unofanirawo kugadzira hwidibiro yendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa. Urefu hwayo huite masendimita zana rine gumi. Upamhi hwayo huite masendimita makumi matanhatu ane matanhatu. 
Exodus25:18 Unofanira kutora ndarama wogadzira mifananidzo miviri yezvisikwa zvinonzi makerubhu, woita zvokuzvipfura wozviisa pamativi maviri ehwidibiro." 
Exodus25:19 Unoita makerubhu pahwidibiro iyoyo akati uku rimwe uku rimwe, uagadzire akabatana nayo ari kumapeto maviri ehwidibiro. Ndiko kuagadzira kwauchaaita." 
Exodus25:20 Makerubhu iwayo ngaasimudzire mapapiro awo kumusoro akafukidza hwidibiro namapapiro awo akatarisana iwo akatarisa pahwidibiro," 
Exodus25:21 woisa mafendefa echitenderano andichakupa mubhokisi, uripfige nehwidibiro." 
Exodus25:22 Ipapo ndipo pandichauya kuzosangana newe. Ndichataura newe ndiri pakati pamakerubhu maviri anenge ari pahwidibiro yebhokisi rechitenderano, ndichikuudza zvandinoda kuti vaIsiraeri vaite." 
Exodus25:23 “Unofanira kugadzira teburu yamapuranga omuunga. Kureba kwayo ngakuite masendimita makumi masere ana masendimita masere, kufara kwayo kuchiita masendimita makumi mana ana masendimita mana, udzami hwayo huite masendimita makumi matanhatu ana masendimita matanhatu." 
Exodus25:24 Ngarinamirirwe nendarama chaiyo yakaisvonaka, uitenderedze nomukombero wendarama." 
Exodus25:25 Unoigadzirira mupendero unoipoteredza une upamhi sehwechanza, uise kamutsetse kendarama kunze kwawo kakapoteredza mupendero iwoyo." 
Exodus25:26 Unogadzira maringi mana endarama woaisa pamakona mana ari pamakumbo ayo. 
Exodus25:27 Maringi anopfekerwa mapango okutakurisa teburu ngaaiswe pedyo nomupendero uyu. 
Exodus25:28 Unozoveza mapango omuunga okutakurisa teburu yacho woanamirira nendarama," 
Exodus25:29 woigadzirira ndiro dzayo namadhishi ayo orusenzi, namajagi ayo nemidziyo yayo yokushandisa pamupiro wokuteura. Midziyo yose iyoyi ngaigadzirwe nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa." 
Exodus25:30 Pateburu ipapo, ndipo paunozoisa chingwa chepandinenge ndiri chinogara chiri pandichange ndiri misi yose."
