Exodus25:31 “Unofanira kugadzira minora, chigadzikiro chomwenje chendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa. Chigadzikiro ichocho pamwechete negaro racho nehunde yacho, ngazvigadzirwe nendarama yakapfurwa. Ugadzire makapu acho namaruva acho akazaruka namamwe asati azaruka, uanamire pachigadzikiro zvibatane." 
Exodus25:32 Pamativi acho ngapave namapazi matanhatu, achiti uku matatu, uku matatu." 
Exodus25:33 Bazi rokutanga kune rumwe rutivi, ngarigadzirirwe makapu matatu anenge maruva omuarimondi akazaruka nemamwewo asati azaruka. Bazi rechipiri kune rumwe rutivi, ngarigadzirirwewo makapu anenge maruva akazaruka neasati azaruka. Ngazviitwe zvimwechetezvo pamapazi ose ari matanhatu." 
Exodus25:34 Hunde yechigadzikiro ngainamirwe makapu mana anenge maruva omuarimondi akazaruka neasati azaruka. 
Exodus25:35 Pose pose panosangana hunde namapazi maviri nechepasi pawo ose ari matanhatu, ngapanamirwe ruva rimwechete rendarama risati razaruka." 
Exodus25:36 Chigadzikiro namapazi acho namaruva acho, ngazvinamirwe zvive chinhu chimwechete chakapfurwa nendarama chaiyo." 
Exodus25:37 Unozogadzira marambi manomwe echigadzikiro uanamire pachiri kuti avhenekere mberi kwacho. 
Exodus25:38 Unofanira kugadzira zvigero zvokuchekesa tambo dzacho, ugadzirewo tireyi dzacho duku, ngazvive zvendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa." 
Exodus25:39 Chigadzikiro chomwenje nemimwe midziyo yacho yose, ngazvigadzirwe nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa inorema makirogiramu makumi matatu namashanu." 
Exodus25:40 Unofanira kugadzira zvinhu izvozvi usingasiyanisi nezvandakuratidza mugomo muno. 
Exodus26:1 “Unofanira kugadzira tendhe rinoera sezvizvi: unotora machira gumi makuru okudzikatirisa ugadzire tendhe rinoera. Machira ngaave erineni akanaka akarukirirwa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku worukira mifananidzo yamakerubhu pamachira iwayo. 
Exodus26:2 Machira acho ose ngaave akaenzana, kureba kwejira rimwe nerimwe ngakuite mamita gumi namaviri, kufara kwaro kuite mamita maviri." 
Exodus26:3 Pamachira okudzikatirisa iwayo, mashanu acho ngaasonanidzwe pawo oga, mamwewo mashanu asonanidzwewo ari pawo oga." 
Exodus26:4 Usungewo zvishwe zvomucheka woruvara rwedenga pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira aye okutanga, uite saizvozvo pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira echipiri aya." 
Exodus26:5 Unosunga makumi mashanu ezvishwe pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira okutanga aya, wosungawo zvimwe zvishwe makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira aye echipiri, zvishwe izvozvo zvisungirirwe zvakatarisana." 
Exodus26:6 Unozogadzira zvokukochekeresa zvendarama makumi mashanu, ukochekedze machira maviri aya okudzikatirisa ave tendhe rimwechete." 
Exodus26:7 “Denga retendhe unorigadzirira machira makuru emvere dzembudzi okuisapo, unoagadzira ari machira okudzikatirisa gumi nerimwechete." 
Exodus26:8 Machira acho ose ari gumi nerimwechete, ngaave akaenzana. Kureba kwejira rimwe nerimwe ngakuite mamita gumi namatatu, kufara kwaro kuite mamita maviri." 
Exodus26:9 Pamachira iwayo, mashanu acho ngaasonanidzwe pawo oga, matanhatu acho asonanidzwewo ari pawo oga. Jira rechitanhatu rinopfuurira nechepamusuo petendhe ngaripeterwe padenga ruviri." 
Exodus26:10 Unosunga makumi mashanu ezvishwe pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira okutanga aya, usungewo zvimwe zvishwe makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira aya echipiri." 
Exodus26:11 Unozogadzira zvokukochekeresa nazvo makumi mashanu zvendarira, ukochekedze machira maviri aye muzvishwe ave rimwechete." 
Exodus26:12 Rimwe jira riya rinosara rakapfuurira mamwe ngarirembere necheseri kwetendhe. 
Exodus26:13 Jira rapadenga rinofanira kupfuurira hwasha hwedenga richiti uku ropfuurira namasendimita makumi mashanu, ukuwo ropfuurira namasendimita makumi mashanu rorembera kumativi maviri kuti rifukidze tendhe rinoera." 
Exodus26:14 “Uyewo wozoita madahunha maviri, rimwe racho riite ramatehwe ehwai akasukwa akatsvukiswa, rimwe riri ramatehwe etahashi." 
Exodus26:15 “Unofanira kuveza mapango omuunga okumisa chengo chetendhe rinoera. 
Exodus26:16 Mapango acho ngaave mamita mana kureba, aine upamhi makumi matanhatu amasendimita ane masendimita matanhatu." 
Exodus26:17 Unotema zviga zviviri pabango roga roga zvinobatsira kuti mapango anyatsoti gedye gedye kubatana. Ndizvo zvaunofanira kuita namapango ose etendhe rinoera. 
Exodus26:18 Unogadzirawo mapango makumi maviri okumisisa tendhe rinoera kumaodzanyemba," 
Exodus26:19 woita zvigadzikiro zvesirivha makumi mana zvokumisa mapango iwayo. Pabango rimwe nerimwe ngapave nezvigadzikiro zviviri. Zvigadzikiro izvozvo ngazvigumane musana pasi pezviga zviya zvamapango. 
Exodus26:20 Kudivi rechipiri, kuchamhembe kwetendhe rinoera, ngakumiswe mapango makumi maviri" 
Exodus26:21 ane zvigadzikiro zvawo zvesirivha zvinokwana makumi mana, pabango roga roga zvigadzikiro zviviri." 
Exodus26:22 Kuseri kwetendhe rinoera nechokumadokero ngakuvezerwewo mapango matanhatu. 
Exodus26:23 Unofanira kuveza mapango maviri maviri okuisa pamakona maviri okuseri kwetendhe. 
Exodus26:24 Pamakona iwayo, mapango maviri epo, nechepasi, ngaarege kuti kwati kwati, kumusoro kwawo ngaabatane paringi rokutanga, ndozvaachange akaita ose ari maviri, ndiwo achave pamakona ose iwayo ari maviri." 
Exodus26:25 Saka kuseri kwetendhe kuchava namapango masere ane zvigadzikiro zvawo zvesirivha gumi nezvitanhatu akati, bango iri nezvigadzikiro zvaro zviviri, iriwo nezvigadzikiro zvaro zviviri." 
Exodus26:26 “Unofanira kugadzira mbariro dzomuunga, shanu ngadzive dzokubatanidza mapango orutivi rumwechete rwetendhe," 
Exodus26:27 dzimwe shanu dzive dzokubatanidza mapango orumwe rutivi, kwouyawo dzimwe shanu dzokubatanidza mapango okumadokero kuseri kwetendhe." 
Exodus26:28 Rumbariro rwapakati ngarutenderere namapango ose nechapakati napakati pawo, kusvika kunze nokunze." 
Exodus26:29 Mapango ose nembariro dzose ngazvinamirirwe nendarama. Maringi endarama anopfekerwa mbariro ngaaiswe pamapango iwayo. 
Exodus26:30 Saka unofanira kugadzira tendhe rinoera iroro usingasiyanise nezvandakuratidza mugomo muno. 
Exodus26:31 “Unofanira kutora machira erineni yakanakisisa ugadzire jira rechidzikatiro, urirukire uchirishongedza newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku. Ushongedze jira iroro uchirirukira zvakanakisisa makerubhu." 
Exodus26:32 Jira rechidzikatiro unoriturika pamapango mana omuunga akanamatidzwa ndarama, ane zvipikiri zvendarama nechokumusoro, dzinomiswa pazvigadzikiro zvina zvesirivha." 
Exodus26:33 Unorembedza jira rechidzikatiro pane zvokukochekera izvozvo, uise bhokisi rechitenderano mutendhe rinoera munzvimbo iri kuseri kwejira rechidzikatiro. Jira rechidzikatiro ndiro richakamuranisa tendhe kuita nzvimbo mbiri dzinoti: nzvimbo inoera nenzvimbo inoeresesa." 
Exodus26:34 Unozoisa hwidibiro pabhokisi rechitenderano riri munzvimbo inoeresesa," 
Exodus26:35 woisawo teburu munzvimbo inoera nechokuchamhembe. Chigadzikiro chomwenje uchiise pakatarisana neteburu iyoyo nechokumaodzanyemba. 
Exodus26:36 “Unofanira kugadzira jira rokudzikatirisa rokuisa pamusuo wetendhe. Ngarigadzirwe namachira erineni akanakisisa akarukirwa achishongedzwa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku. 
Exodus26:37 Unogadzira mapango mashanu omuunga okubata jira iroro, wonamirira mapango acho ndarama. Ngaave nezvipikiri zvawo zvendarama nezvigadzikiro zvishanu zvendarira." 
Exodus27:1 “Unofanira kuita atari namapango omuunga akavezwa. Kureba kwayo ngakuite mamita maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri, upamhi hwayo huve mamita maviri ane masendimita makumi maviri, kukwira kwayo kuve mita imwechete ina masendimita makumi matatu. Mativi mana eatari iyoyo ngaave akaenzana." 
Exodus27:2 Unofanira kuveza zvinenge nyanga zvina zvepamusoro pemakona mana eatari, izvozvo ngazvive zvakavezwa zvakabatana neatari iyoyo. Atari ngainamirirwe noutare hwendarira." 
Exodus27:3 Wozogadzirawo migomo yokubvisira dota, namafoshoro nembenge namaforogo okubayisa nyama namagwati okugokesa moto. Unofanira kugadzira midziyo iyoyi yose nendarira." 
Exodus27:4 Uyezve uigadzirire sefa yendarira. Pasefa iyoyo isa maringi mana endarira pamakona ayo mana," 
Exodus27:5 uiise nechepasi pomupendero wapamusoro peatari, irembere zvokusvika pakati napakati peatari." 
Exodus27:6 Unofanira kuveza mapango omuunga epaatari, anamirirwe nendarira." 
Exodus27:7 Pakutakura atari, mapango iwayo ndookuitakurisa, ngaapfekerwe mumaringi ari mumativi ayo maviri akati uku rimwe uku rimwe." 
Exodus27:8 Atari ngaigadzirwe namapuranga iine zimhango risina chinhu. Ngaiitwe sezvawaratidzwa mugomo. 
Exodus27:9 “Unofanira kugadzira nhandare yetendhe rinoera. Kurutivi rwokumaodzanyemba rwenhandare iyoyo ngakuve namachira okudzikatirisa erineni akanakisa ose pamwechete aite mamita makumi mana ana mana kureba. 
Exodus27:10 Ngapave namapango awo makumi maviri ane zvigadzikirowo zvawo zvendarira makumiwo maviri. Zvipikiri zvapamapango okupfekera machira iwayo ngazvive zvesirivha. 
Exodus27:11 Saizvozvo kuchamhembe kwayo ngakuvewo namachira okudzikatirisa aitewo makumi mana amamita ana mamita mana kureba. Mapango awo ngaave makumi maviri nezvokugadzikirawo zvawo zvendarira makumi maviri, asi zvipikiri zvacho nomupendero wacho ngazvive zvesirivha." 
Exodus27:12 Hwasha hwenhandare iyoyo kumadokero, ngakuve namachira okudzikatirisa ana mamita makumi maviri namaviri kureba namapango gumi ane zvigadzikiro zvawo gumi." 
Exodus27:13 Hwasha hwenhandare iyoyo kumabvazuva, kune musuo wayo, ngakuite mamita makumi maviri ana maviri." 
Exodus27:14 Machira okudzikatirisa orutivi rumwechete rwokumusuo ngaave mamita matanhatu ana masendimita makumi matanhatu. Ngapavewo namapango matatu ane zvigadzikiro zvawo zvitatu. 
Exodus27:15 Rimwe divi, machira iwayo okumusuo ngaave namamita matanhatu ana masendimita makumi matanhatu, kuine mapango matatu ane zvigadzikiro zvawo zvitatu." 
Exodus27:16 Pasuo guru rokupinda munhandare ngapave nejira rokudzikatirisa rine upamhi mamita mapfumbamwe rakagadzirwa namachira erineni akanakisisa, akarukirwa achishongedzwa newuru yoruvara rwedenga neyoruvara rwehute netsvuku, rine mapango mana ane zvigadzikiro zvina." 
Exodus27:17 Mapango ose akapoteredza ruvanze ngaabatanidzwe nembariro dzesirivha. Zvipikiri zvokukochekera machira ngazvive zvesirivha, zvigadzikiro zvawo zvive zvendarira." 
Exodus27:18 Kureba kwenhandare ngakuite mamita makumi mana ana mamita mana, kufara kwayo, kuite mamita makumi maviri ana mamita maviri, nokukwira kwejira ngakuitewo mamita maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri, unamachira okudzikatirisa erineni yakanakisisa, namapango nezvigadzikiro zvendarira." 
Exodus27:19 Zvinhu zvose zvamunoshandisa mutendhe rinoera, nehoko dzose dzetendhe, nehoko dzose dzamachira okukomberedza ruvanze, ngazvive zvendarira." 
Exodus27:20 “Iti vaIsiraeri vakupe mafuta akanakisisa eorivhi, okudira mumarambi echigadzikiro chomwenje achagara akatungidzwa," 
Exodus27:21 mutendhe rokusanganira kuseri kwechidzikatiro pakatarisana nebhokisi rechitenderano, Aroni navanakomana vake vaagadziridze arare achivhenekera paneni Tenzi kubvira manheru kudzamara kwaedza. VaIsiraeri ngavachengete murao wangu iwoyu narini wose pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose." 
Exodus28:1 “Unozofanira kuti mukoma wako Aroni navanakomana vake Nadhabhu naAbhihu naEreazari naItamaru vauye kwauri, unditsaurire ivavo pakati pavaIsiraeri vandishandire savapristi." 
Exodus28:2 Unogadzirira mukoma wako Aroni hanzu dzinoera dzakanaka dzinopa chiremera," 
Exodus28:3 utaurirewo vanhu vose vandakapa unyanzvi hwokuita mabasa, vasonere Aroni hanzu agadzwe basa rokundishandira roupristi." 
Exodus28:4 Hanzu dzavachagadzira ndedzidzi: nyembe yapadundundu nehanzu yeefodhi negemenzi nehanzu yakarukwa inenge yoda kusvika mumabvi, ina mavara mavara, nengundu nomundya. Ngavasonere mukoma wako Aroni, navana vake vakomana hanzu idzodzi dzinoera kuti vandishandire basa roupristi." 
Exodus28:5 Ngavashandise machira erineni akanakisisa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku pamwechete neyendarama. 
Exodus28:6 “Hanzu yeefodhi ngaigadzirwe namachira erineni akanakisisa akanyatsogadzirwa zvakanakisisa, irukirwe newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku neyendarama." 
Exodus28:7 Ngaive nezvipenga zviviri zvapamapfudzi zvakasonererwa pairi kuti ikwanise kukoperwa. 
Exodus28:8 Unofanira kuiitira mundya wakanyatsorukwa wejira rimwechetero rakagadzirwa zvimwechetezvo wakarukirirwa neshinda yendarama newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku nerineni yakanakisisa. 
Exodus28:9 Uyewo unozotora mabwe anokosha maviri eonikisi, unyore paari mazita avana vavaIsiraeri vakomana gumi navaviri." 
Exodus28:10 Unonyora mazita matanhatu pane rimwe ibwe, wonyorawo mamwe mazita matanhatu pane rimwe racho. Mazita iwayo ngaanyorwe achitevedza mazero okuberekwa kwavo." 
Exodus28:11 Unonyora pamabwe iwayo sezvinoita nyanzvi inonyora pamabwe anokosha, unyore mazita avana vaIsiraeri vakomana, uise mabwe maviri iwayo patusefa twesimbi twendarama." 
Exodus28:12 Unoisa mabwe iwayo ari maviri pazvipenga zvapamapfudzi eefodhi kuti ave mabwe anomirira marudzi ose avaIsiraeri. Naizvozvo Aroni achatakura mazita iwayo pamapfudzi ake, pana Tenzi kuti ave chiyeuchidzo." 
Exodus28:13 Uyewo unogadzira tusefa twesimbi tuviri twendarama twokunamatidzira mabwe," 
Exodus28:14 wozogadzira tucheni tuviri twakakoswa twendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa unamatidze tucheni twakakoswa itwotwo patusefa twesimbi twacho. 
Exodus28:15 “Unofanira kugadzira nyembe yepadundundu yokutonga nayo, yakanakisisa yakaitwa sezvakaitwa efodhi yakagadzirwa nejira rerineni rakanakisisa, rakarukirwa neshinda ine ruvara rwendarama newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku." 
Exodus28:16 Ngaive yakapetwa ruviri iine mativi mana akaenzana. Kureba nokufara kwayo ngakuite masendimita makumi maviri ana maviri. 
Exodus28:17 Unoisa pairi mitsara mina yetumabwe tunokosha. Mutsara wokutanga ngauve nekatombo kerubhi netopazi neganeti. 
Exodus28:18 Mutsara wechipiri ngauve nekeemeradhi nesafaya nedhaimondi. 
Exodus28:19 Mutsara wechitatu ngauve neketekoizi, neagati, neamatesiti." 
Exodus28:20 Mutsara wechina ngauve nebherini neonikisi nejasipa. Tumabwe itwotwo ngatuiswe patusefa twesimbi twendarama twokuisa paturi mabwe. 
Exodus28:21 Panofanira kuva notumabwe gumi notuviri tune mazita atwo twakangoenzanirana namazita avana vaIsiraeri vakomana. Kamwe nekamwe kaine zita rako, twakamirira madzinza gumi namaviri avaIsiraeri twakanyorwa sechidhindo." 
Exodus28:22 Unozogadzira tucheni tuviri twakakoswa twendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa twokuisa panyembe yepadundundu," 
Exodus28:23 wozogadzirawo maringi maviri endarama anosonerwa pamakona maviri ekumusoro kwenyembe yepadundundu. 
Exodus28:24 Unofanira kusungirira tucheni tuviri twakakoswa twendarama itwotwo pamaringi maviri ekwokupedzesera kwenyembe yepadundundu. 
Exodus28:25 Unobatanidza mumwe muromo wetucheni tuviri twokumusoro itwotwo notusefa twesimbi twendarama tuya twepamapfudzi, mberi kweefodhi." 
Exodus28:26 Uyewo unozogadzira maringi maviri endarama, woasonerera nechomukati menyembe yapadundundu, pamakona ezasi, pedyo neefodhi." 
Exodus28:27 Unozogadzirawo mamwe maringi maviri endarama, woasonerera pamindya yeefodhi nechapamusoro pomundya uya wakanyatsorukwa womuchiuno nechapadumbu." 
Exodus28:28 Vanofanira kusungirira nyembe yepadundundu nomundya weruvara rwedenga vachisunganidza maringi ari panyembe yepadundundu namaringi ari paefodhi, kuitira kuti nyembe yepadundundu igare yakasimba iri pamusoro pomundya wakanyatsorukwa uya womuchiuno." 
Exodus28:29 “Saka Aroni paanozopinda munzvimbo inoera achapfeka padundundu nyembe yokutonga nayo iya ina mazita avanakomana vavaIsiraeri gumi navaviri sechiyeuchidzo pana Tenzi. 
Exodus28:30 Unoisawo Urimu neTumimu munyembe yapadundundu yokutonga nayo, kuti Aroni, paanouya kuneni Tenzi ange ainazvo akazvipfeka pamwoyo kuitira kuti vaIsiraeri vagoziva chido chaTenzi." 
Exodus28:31 “Unofanira kugadzira hanzu yeefodhi nejira roruvara rwedenga chete. 
Exodus28:32 Ngaive nehuro pakati payo pokupinza napo musoro. Ngapave nomupendero wakarukwa uchipoteredza huro iyoyo sezvakangoita yehembe kuti irege kubvaruka. 
Exodus28:33 Pamupendero wayo wose wezasi unosonera zvinenge michero yamapomegiraneti zvoruvara rwedenga nezvoruvara rwehute nezvitsvuku, usonererewo tumadare twendarama pamupendero iwoyo wose." 
Exodus28:34 Unozvisonerera zvichitsinhana zvichiti: apa kadare kendarama apa kanenge muchero wepomegiraneti, apa kadare kendarama apa kanenge muchero wepomegiraneti, zvakatenderera nomupendero wose." 
Exodus28:35 Naizvozvo Aroni anofanira kupfeka hanzu iyoyo paanoita basa roupristi achiuya kwandiri. Tudare twacho tuchange tuchirira paanopinda napaanobuda muNzvimbo Inoera muneni Tenzi kuti arege kufa. 
Exodus28:36 Uyezve ugadzire karata kakanaka kendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa unyore pakari sechidhindo mazwi anoti; Nyakutsaurirwa Tenzi," 
Exodus28:37 ukasungirire pangundu nomucheka weruvara rwedenga, kari pamberi payo." 
Exodus28:38 Kachange kari pahuma yaAroni. Mhaka dzinenge dzaparwa navaIsiraeri pavanopira mipiro yavo mitsvene dzichange dzichitakurwa naAroni. Ngakarambe kari pahuma yake kuti igamuchirwe naTenzi. 
Exodus28:39 “Unofanira kugadzira jira rerineni rakanakisisa rina mavara mavara, usone hembe nengundu nomundya womuchiuno wakarukirwa uchishongedzwa." 
Exodus28:40 “Uye ugadzirirewo vanakomana vaAroni hanzu ndefu dzinoda kusvika mumabvi nemindya yokusunga muchiuno, nenguwani kuti vave nehanzu dzakanaka dzinopa chiremera." 
Exodus28:41 Unozopfekedza mukoma wako Aroni pamwechete navana vake vakomana hanzu idzodzo, wovazodza namafuta, uvagadze uchivateketerera kwandiri kuti vandiitire basa roupristi." 
Exodus28:42 Unovagadzirirawo mabhurukwa erineni anobva muchiuno achisvika mumabvi kuti miviri yavo irege kuonekwa pachena navanhu. 
Exodus28:43 Aroni navanakomana vake vanofanira kupfeka mabhurukwa iwayo pavanouya mutendhe rokusanganira napavanosvika paatari munzvimbo inoera kuzoita basa roupristi, kana vakasaapfeka vangadaro vakaparara vakafa. Aroni nezvizvarwa zvake zvose zvichauya ngavachengete mutemo iwoyo narini wose.”" 
Exodus29:1 “Izvi ndizvo zvauchaita kuna Aroni navanakomana vake paunovateketerera kwandiri kuti vandiitire basa roupristi. Unotora handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe mbiri dzisina chinoshoreka padziri," 
Exodus29:2 wotorawo chingwa chisina mbiriso, nechimwe chingwa chisina mbiriso choupfu hwakakanywa namafuta, nechingwa chakati fatata chisina mbiriso chakazorwa mafuta. Ngachive chakabikwa noupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa." 
Exodus29:3 Unozviisa mutswanda, wouya nazvo zviri mutswanda imomo, uuyewo nehandira nehondohwe mbiri dziya." 
Exodus29:4 “Unofanira kuzounza Aroni navanakomana vake kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira uvati vashambe nemvura," 
Exodus29:5 utore hanzu dziya upfekedze Aroni hanzu inoda kusvika mumabvi negemenzi reefodhi, neefodhi, nenyembe yapadundundu, umusunge muchiuno nomundya wakanyatsorukwa uya weefodhi." 
Exodus29:6 Unomupfekedza ngundu iya mumusoro, womoneredza ngundu iyoyo nekarata kanoera kaya," 
Exodus29:7 utore mafuta okuzodza woadira pamusoro wake, uchimuzodza." 
Exodus29:8 “Unofanira kuunzawo vana vake vakomana uvapfekedze hanzu dzinoda kusvika mumabvi," 
Exodus29:9 usunge vanakomana ivavo mindya muchiuno uvapfekedze nguwani. Basa iroro roupristi richava ravo narini narini. Uku ndiko kugadza kwauchaita Aroni navanakomana vake. 
Exodus29:10 “Unofanira kuzounza handira iya kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, Aroni navanakomana vake vaise maoko avo pamusoro wayo," 
Exodus29:11 ubayire handira iyoyo paneni Tenzi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. 
Exodus29:12 Unozotora rimwe ropa rehandira iyoyo, unyike munwe wako urizore pane zvinenge nyanga zviri paatari. Ropa rose rinenge rasara ngaridururirwe pasi munyasi meatari." 
Exodus29:13 Mafuta ari pane zvomukati mehandira atore pamwechete nechinyama chepachiropa netsvo dziri mbiri pamwechete namafuta ari padziri, uzvipise paatari." 
Exodus29:14 Asi nyama yehandira iyoyo nedehwe rayo nechinzvinzvi chayo, ngazvipisirwe kunze kwamatendhe nokuti chibayiro ichochi chibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo." 
Exodus29:15 “Unozotorawo imwe yehondohwe dziya, Aroni navana vake vakomana vaise maoko avo pamusoro wayo." 
Exodus29:16 Unouraya hondohwe iyoyo, wotora ropa rayo, worisasa paatari yose uchiitenderera." 
Exodus29:17 Unocheka-cheka hondohwe iyoyo, wosuka zvose zvomukati mayo namazondo ayo, woisa izvozvo zvose pamwechete namapandi enyama pamusoro wayo." 
Exodus29:18 Hondohwe yose iyoyo woipisa paatari, chibayiro ichochi, chibayiro chokupisireni Tenzi, chinonhuwira zvinondifadza, chinopirwa kuna Tenzi chichiita zvokupiswa nomoto." 
Exodus29:19 “Imwe hondohwe iya, unozofanira kuitora, Aroni navana vake vakomana vaise maoko avo pamusoro wayo." 
Exodus29:20 Unobaya hondohwe iyoyo, wotora rimwe ropa rayo, woriisa kwokupedzisira kwenzeve yokurudyi yaAroni, nekwokupedzisira kwenzeve dzavanakomana vake dzokurudyi, woisawo ropa pazvara zvavo zvokurudyi napazvigunwe zvavo zvikuru zvokurudyi. Ropa rose rinenge rasara unorisasa paatari yose uchiitenderera." 
Exodus29:21 Unozotora rimwe ropa riri paatari namamwe mafuta okuzodza, wozvisasa Aroni napahanzu dzake, wozvisasawo vanakomana vake vaanavo napahanzu dzavo. Aroni navanakomana vake vaanavo vacho vanobva vava vatsvene pamwechete nehanzu dzavo." 
Exodus29:22 “Unofanirawo kutora mafuta ehondohwe, nomuswe wayo wakakora, namafuta ezvomukati nechinyama chapachiropa netsvo dziri mbiri pamwechete namafuta ari padziri nechidya chokurudyi nokuti (hondohwe iyoyo ndiyo inopirwa pakugadzwa kwavapristi.)" 
Exodus29:23 Mutswanda ine zvingwa zvisina mbiriso zvakapirwa kuneni Tenzi, unotora chingwa zvacho chimwechete nechimwe chakabikwa namafuta, nechimwe chakati fatata." 
Exodus29:24 Zvose izvozvo unozviisa mumaoko aAroni navana vake vakomana, vazvivheyese vachiita mupiro wokuvheyesa kwandirini Tenzi," 
Exodus29:25 wozozvitora mumaoko avo wozvipisira paatari kuwedzera chibayiro chokupisa chiya. Chibayiro ichochi chinonhuhwira zvinofadzeni Tenzi, chinopirweni Tenzi chichiita zvokupiswa nomoto." 
Exodus29:26 “Unofanira kutora chityu chehondohwe yokugadzwa kwaAroni, wochivheyesa uchiita mupiro wokusimudzira kuna Tenzi, ichocho ndiwo mugove wako." 
Exodus29:27 “Unoteketerera kwandiri chityu chehondohwe yokugadza ichocho chinenge chavheyeswa chomupiro wokusimudzirwa kuna Mwari nechidya chayo chomugove wavapristi nokuti ndezvaAroni navana vake vakomana. 
Exodus29:28 Zvichava zvaAroni navanakomana vake somugove wavo narini narini unobva kuvaIsiraeri nokuti mupiro unopirwa uchiita zvokusimudzirwa unobva pane zvinopirwa navaIsiraeri pamipiro yavo yokuwadzana, iwoyu mupiro wavo kuna Tenzi." 
Exodus29:29 “Hanzu dzinoera dzaAroni dzaanenge asiya, afa, dzichava dzavanakomana vake kuti vadzipfeke pavanozodzwa vachigadzwa upristi." 
Exodus29:30 Mwanakomana waAroni anenge azotora nzimbo yake youpristi, anenge achizopinda mutendhe rokusanganira kuti ashande ari munzvimbo inoera, anofanira kupfeka hanzu idzodzo kwamazuva manomwe." 
Exodus29:31 “Unofanira kutora nyama yehondohwe inopirwa pakugadzwa kwavapristi uibikire panzvimbo inoera," 
Exodus29:32 Aroni navanakomana vake vadyire nyama iyoyo pamwechete nechingwa chiya chakasara chiri mutswanda, kumusuo kwetendhe rokusanganira." 
Exodus29:33 Vanodya zvokudya izvozvo zvomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo unopirwa pavanoteketererwa kwandiri vachigadzwa. Mumwe munhuwo zvake haabvumirwi kuzvidya nokuti zvinoera. 
Exodus29:34 Kana nyama nechingwa zvapaugadzo ihwohwo zvikafuma mangwana zvichiripo, ngazvipiswe nomoto. Ngazvirege kudyiwa nokuti zvinoera." 
Exodus29:35 “Ndozvauchaita pakugadza Aroni navanakomana vake uchitevera zvose zvandakuudza. Kuvagadza kwaunoita kunofanira kutora mazuva manomwe. 
Exodus29:36 Unopira handira yechibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo pazuva roga roga, uyezve mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo wokunatsa atari, woizodza mafuta okuieresa." 
Exodus29:37 Kwamazuva manomwe, pira zvibayiro zvokupfupira atari uchiitira kuti ive inoera. Atari ichava inoera kwazvo. Chii zvacho chinenge chazogunzvana neatari chinobva chava chinoera." 
Exodus29:38 “Zvamunofanira kuramba muchipira paatari ndezvizvi: hwayana mbiri dzine gore rimwechete pazuva roga roga. 
Exodus29:39 Imwe unoipira mangwanani, imwewo wozoipira kumanheru." 
Exodus29:40 Hwayana yokutanga unoipira pamwechete noupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hunorema kirogiramu rimwechete, hunenge hwakakanyiwa namafuta okusvina eorivhi anoita rita rimwechete, udire rita rimwechete rewaini uve mupiro wokuteura." 
Exodus29:41 Hwayana yechipiri unoipira manheru pamwechete noupfu hwomupiro wembesanwa newaini yomupiro wokuteura sezvinenge zvaitwa pamupiro wamangwanani nokuti mupiro iwoyu unonhuhwirira zvinofadza, unopirwa kuna Tenzi uchiita zvokupiswa nomoto." 
Exodus29:42 Garai muchipira mupiro wokupisa wakadai pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose muchiuitira kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira paneni Tenzi kwandichasangana nemi kuzotaura newe. 
Exodus29:43 Ndikowo kwandichasangana navaIsiraeri, ichava nzvimbo inoera pamusana pokupenya kwokuvapo kwangu." 
Exodus29:44 Ndichaita kuti tendhe rokusanganira neatari zvive zvinhu zvinoera. Ndichaitawo kuti Aroni navanakomana vake vave vanhu vanoera, vandishandire savapristi." 
Exodus29:45 Ini ndichagara pakati pavaIsiraeri, ndiri Mwari wavo." 
Exodus29:46 Ipapo vachazoziva kuti ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wavo akavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti kuti ndigare pamwechete navo. Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wavo." 
Exodus30:1 “Unofanira kuveza mapango omuunga, ugadzire atari panopisirwa rusenzi." 
Exodus30:2 Ngaive nourefu noupamhi hwakaenzana, kureba kwayo ngakuite masendimita makumi mana namashanu, upamhi hwayo ngahuitewo masendimita makumi mana namashanu, kukwira kwayo mudenga ngakuite masendimita makumi mapfumbamwe. Zvitanda zvina zvinenge nyanga zviri nechepamusoro pamakona ayo ngazvivezwe zvakabatana nayo," 
Exodus30:3 unamirire nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, atari iyoyo napamusoro payo nenhivi dzayo dzose nezvinenge nyanga zviri pamusoro pemakona ayo zviya. Pamusoro peatari ngapapenderwe nomukombero wendarama." 
Exodus30:4 Unozoigadzirira maringi mana endarama uanamatidze panyasi pomukombero wayo uya, uchiti uku maviri uku maviri. Maringi iwayo ndeokupfekera mapango okuitakurisa," 
Exodus30:5 woveza mapango omuunga unamirire nendarama. 
Exodus30:6 Unozogadzika atari iyoyo pakatarisana nejira rechidzikatiro rokudzikatidza bhokisi rechitenderano rine hwidibiro paya pandichasangana newe. 
Exodus30:7 Mazuva ose, Aroni paanofumira kundogadziridza marambi, ngaapise rusenzi runonhuhwira paatari iyoyo." 
Exodus30:8 Manheru, paanouya kuzogadziridza marambi, ngaapise rusenzi zvakare, ruve rusenzi runogaropiswa paneni Tenzi pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose." 
Exodus30:9 Paatari iyoyo pasapirwe rusenzi rusirirwo, kana kupira mupiro wokupisa, kunyange upfu hwomupiro wembesanwa, kana kudururirapo mupiro wokuteura." 
Exodus30:10 Kamwechete pagore, Aroni ngaapire mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. Ngaatore ropa rechibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo arizore pazvinhu zviye zvinenge nyanga zviri pamusoro peatari. Ngazvigaroitwa gore negore pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose. Atari iyoyo ngaive inoeresesa iatari kuneni Tenzi.”" 
Exodus30:11 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Exodus30:12 “Kana mava kuverenga vaIsiraeri, munhu wose ngaabvise mari yokununura upenyu hwake pana Tenzi pamunovaverenga kuti varege kuzowirwa nedenda pamunovaverenga." 
Exodus30:13 Munhu wose anenge averengwa ngaabvise hafu yeshekeri, iri pamwero weshekeri romuNzvimbo Inoera. (Shekeri rinorema magiramu matanhatu.) Mari iyoyo ichava mupiro unopirwa kuna Tenzi nomunhu wose." 
Exodus30:14 Munhu wose wose anenge averengwa ana makore makumi maviri kana anoraudza ipapo ngaabvise mupiro iwoyo weni Tenzi. 
Exodus30:15 Pamunobvisa chikamu chepakati nepakati chemari yesirivha yeshekeri iyoyo, mupfumi ngaarege kubvisa mari inopfuura ipapo, murombo aregewo kubvisa shoma pane iyoyo." 
Exodus30:16 Unofanira kupiwa navaIsiraeri mari yokununura iyoyo uiendese kundoshandiswa mutendhe rokusanganira kuti ive yokundiyeuchidza vaIsiraeri ini Tenzi kuitira kuti igokununurai upenyu.” 
Exodus30:17 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti," 
Exodus30:18 “Unozofanira kugadzira dhishi rokushambira rendarira rine chigadzikirowo charo chendarira, worigadzika pakati petendhe rokusanganira neatari, woriisa mvura" 
Exodus30:19 yokuti Aroni navanakomana vake vazoshamba maoko netsoka dzavo. 
Exodus30:20 Kana vava kupinda mutendhe rokusanganira kana kuenda kuatari kundopireni Tenzi mupiro unopiswa nomoto, ngavashambe nemvura iyoyo, vakarega kudaro vanofa." 
Exodus30:21 Vanofanira kushamba maoko netsoka dzavo kuti varege kufa. Iwoyu uchava mutemo wokugara nokugara kwavari nokuna Aroni nokuzvizukuru zvake pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose.” 
Exodus30:22 Tenzi akatiwo kuna Mosesi," 
Exodus30:23 “Unofanira kutora tunonhuhwirira tunoti: mura yemvuramvura inorema makirogiramu matanhatu, nesinamoni inonhuhwira zvakanaka inorema makirogiramu matatu, nouswa hunonzi karamosi hunonhuhwira hunorema makirogiramu matatu," 
Exodus30:24 namakwati omuunga anorema makirogiramu matanhatu. Unoera zvose izvozvi nomwero wakatemwa weshekeri romuNzvimbo Inoera. Unotorawo marita mana amafuta eorivhi," 
Exodus30:25 wosanganisa zvose izvozvo wogadzira mafuta anoera okuzodza sokugadzirwa kunoitwa twokuzora tunonhuhwira. Iwaya achava mafuta anoera okuzodza nawo. 
Exodus30:26 Namafuta iwayo unofanira kuzodza tendhe rokusanganira nebhokisi rechitenderano," 
Exodus30:27 neteburu pamwechete nemidziyo yayo, nechigadzikiro chomwenje pamwechete nemidziyo yacho, neatari yokupisira rusenzi," 
Exodus30:28 uzodzewo atari yomupiro wokupisa pamwechete nemidziyo yayo, nedhishi rokushambira nechigadzikiro charo." 
Exodus30:29 Kana mukateketerera kuna Mwari zvinhu izvozvo nomutoo iwoyu zvichava zvinoera kwazvo. Chii zvacho chichagunzvana nazvo chichava chinoera. 
Exodus30:30 Uyewo unofanira kuzodza Aroni navanakomana vake uchivateketera kwandiri kuti vandishandire savapristi. 
Exodus30:31 Unofanira kutaurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose, aya ndiwo mafuta angu anoera okuzodza.’" 
Exodus30:32 Ngaarege kungodirwa pamunhu wose wose. Musaite mamwe mafuta enyu akafana nawo. Mafuta aya, mafuta anoera, anoerawo kwamuri." 
Exodus30:33 Kuwana anogadzira mafuta akaita saiwaya kana kudira mafuta anoera aya pamunhu asiri mupristi, munhu iyeyo ngaachekaniswe ukama navaIsiraeri.”" 
Exodus30:34 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Tora mwero wakaenzana-enzana wetunonhuhwira tunoti: sitakite neonika negaribhanumu, tunofanira kuva tunonhuhwirira tune furanginisenzi chaiyo yakanakisisa." 
Exodus30:35 Sanganisa tunonhuhwira itwotwo ugadzire rusenzi sokugadzirwa kunoitwa mafuta okuzora anonhuhwira, rusenzi irworwo ngaruve rwakarungwa nomunyu, ruve rwakanakisisa ruve runoera." 
Exodus30:36 Parusenzi irworwo bvisa rumwe urudzvure kusvikira rwaota, uende narwo kutendhe rokusanganira undoruisa pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano paya pandichasangana newe. Rusenzi irworwo ngaruve chinhu chinoera kwazvo kwamuri." 
Exodus30:37 Musambozvigadzirira rumwe rusenzi rwakadai. Kwamuri imi, rusenzi uru runoera, runoereserwa Tenzi." 
Exodus30:38 Kuwana anozvigadzirira rumwe rusenzi rwakaita sairworwu kuti arushandisewo zvake ngaachekaniswe ukama navaIsiraeri.” 
Exodus31:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Exodus31:2 “Chionaka ndasarudza ndikadomawo nezita Bhezarieri mwanakomana waUri, muzukuru waHuri, wedzinza rokwaJudha," 
Exodus31:3 ndikamuzadza nomweya waMwari. Ndamupa kunzwisisa uye njere kuti agone kuita mabasa ose oumhizha anoti," 
Exodus31:4 kufanotara mifananidzo yezvinhu zvingade kuzopfurwa zvendarama nezvesirivha nezvendarira 
Exodus31:5 nokuveza tumabwe tunokosha twokuisa pazvinhu nokuvezawo miti nokuita mamwewo mabasa oumhizha. 
Exodus31:6 Ndasarudzawo Ohoriabhu mwanakomana waAhisamaki, wedzinza rokwaDhani kuti abatsirane naBhezareri. Ndapa dzimwe mhizha ungwaru hwokuti dzigone kugadzira zvose zvandakarayira kuti zviitwe zvinoti," 
Exodus31:7 tendhe rokusanganira, nebhokisi rechitenderano, nehwidibiro yaro yokurikwidibirisa kwouya zvose zvomutendhe rokusanganira zvinoti," 
Exodus31:8 teburu nemidziyo yayo, nechigadzikiro chomwenje chakagadzirwa nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa pamwechete nemidziyo yacho yose neatari yokupisira rusenzi," 
Exodus31:9 kwoti atari yokupisira zvibayiro pamwechete nemidziyo yayo yose, nedhishi rokushambira pamwechete nechigadzikiro charo," 
Exodus31:10 kwouyawo hanzu dzinoera dzakanyatsorukwa dzomupristi Aroni nehanzu dzavanakomana vake dzavanopfeka pavanoita basa roupristi," 
Exodus31:11 kwozoti mafuta okuzodza, norusenzi runonhuhwira rwomunzvimbo inoera, ngazviitwe sokukurayira kwandakuita.”" 
Exodus31:12 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti," 
Exodus31:13 “Iwe taurira vaIsiraeri uchiti, ‘Chengetai maSabata angu nokuti ndiwo mucherechedzo wangu nemi uchagara uripo pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose, wokuratidza kuti ini Tenzi ndini ndakakusarudzai kuti muve vanhu vangu vatsvene.’" 
Exodus31:14 Munofanira kuchengeta Sabata nokuti izuva rinoera kwamuri. Anorin'oresa ngaaurayiwe, kuwana anoshanda pazuva iroro, ngaachekaniswe ukama navanhu wokwakwe." 
Exodus31:15 Basa ngariitwe zvaro mumazuva matanhatu, asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata rokunyatsozorora, izuva rinoera rinoereserwa Tenzi. Kuwana anoita basa pazuva irori, anofanira kutourayiwa." 
Exodus31:16 Saka vaIsiraeri ngavachengete Sabata pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose ngavachengete sechitenderano chokugara nokugara. 
Exodus31:17 Iwoyo mucherechedzo wechitenderano changu navaIsiraeri narini wose wokuti ini Tenzi ndakasika denga napasi pamazuva matanhatu, pazuva rechinomwe ndikarega kuita basa ndikafurwa zvangu nemhepo.”" 
Exodus31:18 Mwari akapedza kutaura naMosesi pagomo reSinai, akabva amupa mafendefa maviri echitenderano, matombo maviri akanyorwa noruoko rwaMwari." 
Exodus32:1 VaIsiraeri pavakaona kuti Mosesi agarisa muGomo reSinai anonoka kudzoka, vakaunganira Aroni vachiti, “Dai mukachitigadzirirawo vamwari vangatitungamirire nokuti zvaMosesi uyu, nyakutiburitsa muIjipiti, hatichamboziva kuti chii chakamuwira.”" 
Exodus32:2 Aroni ndokuvati, “Endai mubvise mhete dzendarama dziri panzeve dzamadzimai enyu nedzavana venyu vakomana navasikana, muuye nadzo kwandiri.”" 
Exodus32:3 Saka vanhu vose vakabvisa mhete dzavo dzendarama dzaiva panzeve dzavo vakauya nadzo kuna Aroni. 
Exodus32:4 Aroni akadzitambira akadzinyungurutsa, ndokugadzira nadzo chimhuru chendarama. Ivo ndokuti, “Onai vaIsiraeri! Havanoi vamwari venyu vakakuburitsai muIjipiti.”" 
Exodus32:5 Aroni achiona izvi akavaka atari pamberi pechimhuru chiye, akadaidzira shoko rokuti, “Mangwana tichaitira Tenzi mabiko.”" 
Exodus32:6 Mangwana acho vakafumouya nezvipfuwo, vakapira mipiro yokupisa, nemipiro yokuwadzana. Vanhu vakagara pasi vakadya, vakanwa, ndokusimuka votamba." 
Exodus32:7 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Chiburuka mugomo muno nokuti vanhu vako vawakaburitsa kunyika yeIjipiti vaipa, vaenda mutome;" 
Exodus32:8 nokuti vachimbidzosiya gwara randakati vatevere. Vakatora ndarama vakagadzira chimhuru chavari kunamata. Vatopira handira yacho mipiro vachiti, ‘VaIsiraeri havanoi vamwari vedu vakatiburitsa munyika yeIjipiti.’ ”" 
Exodus32:9 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Ndaona zvino kuti vaIsiraeri ava itsvuuramuromo dzavanhu." 
Exodus32:10 Chirega zvako uone ndichivavirukira nehasha ndivaparadze, asi ndozoita kuti iwe uve rudzi rukuru.”" 
Exodus32:11 Asi Mosesi akateterera kuna Tenzi, Mwari wake achiti, “Nhai Tenzi mungagodarireiko kuvirukira vanhu venyu nehasha? Vanhu vamakaburitsa muIjipiti nesimba renyu guru!" 
Exodus32:12 Munodirei kuti vaIjipiti vazoti, ‘Tenzi akabvisa vaIsiraeri muIjipiti kuti andovaurayira mumakomo achivatsakatisa panyika zvachose?’ Ndapota zvangu, regai zvenyu kushatirwa. Dai mukarega kuita zvamareva. Musaitire vanhu venyu zvakaipa zvikadaro." 
Exodus32:13 Rangarirai varanda venyu Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho, vamakapikira mhiko nezita renyu pachenyu muchivati, ‘Ndichakupai vana vakawanda senyenyedzi dzedenga. Ndichavapa nyika yose yandakareva kuti ive nhaka yavo narini narini.’ ”" 
Exodus32:14 Naizvozvo Tenzi akabva azorega kuita zviya zvaakanga ambofunga kuita kuvanhu vake. 
Exodus32:15 Mosesi akazoburuka mugomo akabata mumaoko mafendefa maviri okupupurira, akanyorwa mativi ose ari maviri." 
Exodus32:16 Mwari ndiye akanga agadzira mafendefa iwayo, ndiye pachake akanyora mitemo paari. Mazwi acho akanga akaita zvokutemerwa pabwe." 
Exodus32:17 Joshuwa akanzwa vanhu vachiita mheremhere akataura naMosesi achiti, “Ndiri kunzwa mheremhere kumatendhe, inenge yavanhu vari kurwa hondo.”" 
Exodus32:18 Mosesi ndokuti, “Haasi mazwi avanhu vakunda. Haasi mazwi avanhu vakundwa, mazwi okuimba ndoandiri kunzwa.”" 
Exodus32:19 Paakazosvika pedyo namatendhe Mosesi akaona chimhuru chiya navanhu vakanga vachitamba, ndokubva aviruka nehasha. Pakarepo akakanda pasi mafendefa aakanga akatakura ndokubva apwanyika mujinga megomo imomo." 
Exodus32:20 Mosesi akatora chimhuru chavakanga vagadzira, akachipisa nomoto akachikuya-kuya akaisa zviupfu zvacho mumvura, ndokuita kuti vaIsiraeri vanwe mvura yacho." 
Exodus32:21 Mosesi akabvunza Aroni achiti, “Vanhu ava vakaitei chaizvo kwauri chakakuita kuti uvapinze muchitadzo chakaipa chikadai?”" 
Exodus32:22 Aroni ndokuti, “Musandivirukire zvenyu nehasha changamire. Imi munoziva kuti vanhu ava vanhu vane mwoyo wakaipa." 
Exodus32:23 Ndivo vakatonditi, ‘Tigadzirire vamwari vangatitungamirire nokuti zvaMosesiwo uyu nyakutiburitsa muIjipiti hatichamboziva chakamuwira.’" 
Exodus32:24 Ini ndokuvati, ‘Ani naani ane zvishongo zvendarama ngaandipe.’ Naizvozvo vakandipa, ini ndikazvikanda mumoto, ndopazobva chimhuru ichochi.”" 
Exodus32:25 Mosesi paakaona kuti vanhu varasika, vaenda mutome nokuti Aroni akanga avarega vachipanduka zvinovashoresa navavengi vavo," 
Exodus32:26 Mosesi akabva amira pasuo guru rapamatendhe akadaidzira achiti, “Vose vanosimbira kudivi raTenzi uyai kuno kwandiri.” VaRevhi vose vakaungana kwaiva naMosesi." 
Exodus32:27 Mosesi ndokuti kwavari, “Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri anoti, ‘Mose torai mapakatwa enyu, mubvongodze mumatendhe ose, muchiuraya hama dzenyu neshamwari dzenyu navamanga makagarisana navo, mubvire pasuo guru rino iri kusvikira kusuo guru rouko.’ ”" 
Exodus32:28 VaRevhi vakaita zvakanga zvarehwa naMosesi, musi iwoyo kwakafa vanenge zviuru zvitatu." 
Exodus32:29 Mosesi akati, “Nhasi imi vaRevhi manyatsozvipira kuita basa raTenzi nokuti mateerera shoko rake pamauraya vanakomana venyu nehama dzenyu kuti akukomborerei nhasi uno.”" 
Exodus32:30 Mangwana acho Mosesi akataurira vaIsiraeri kuti, “Imi makatadzira Mwari, nechitadzo chikuru kwazvo, zvino ini ndichadzokera kuna Tenzi, pamwe, ndingagone kumuteta pachitadzo chenyu.”" 
Exodus32:31 Saizvozvo Mosesi akadzokera kuna Tenzi akasvikoti, “VaIsiraeri vakapara chitadzo chikuru kwazvo. Vakazvigadzirira vamwari vendarama vakavanamata." 
Exodus32:32 Ndapota varegerereiwo chitadzo chavakaita. Asi kana musingade kuvaregerera, chidzimai zvenyu zita rangu mubhuku renyu mamakarinyora.”" 
Exodus32:33 Asi Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Anenge anditadzira ndiye wandinodzima mubhuku rangu." 
Exodus32:34 Zvino chienda undotungamirira vanhu vaende kunyika iya kwandakakuudza. Mutumwa wangu achakutungamirira. Asi zuva randichavabvakachira ndichavarangira chitadzo chavo ichochi.” 
Exodus32:35 Tenzi akazorova vaIsiraeri neshamhu yedenda nokuti vakanga vaumba chimhuru chavakagadzirirwa naAroni. 
Exodus33:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Iwe navaIsiraeri vawakaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti, chisimukai muende kunyika yandakapikira Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho kuti ndichazopa vana vavo." 
Exodus33:2 Ini ndichatoita zvokutotuma mutumwa wangu akutungamirirei, ndigodzinga vaKanani navaAmori navaHiti navaPerizi navaHivhi navaJebhusi." 
Exodus33:3 Chiendai zvenyu kunyika yakanaka, nyika yomukaka nouchi nokuti ini handichaenda ndiri pakati penyu. Ndingadaro ndikazokuparadzai nokuti imi muri tsvuuramuromo dzavanhu.”" 
Exodus33:4 Vanhu vakati vachinzwa mashoko akaipa kudai, vakachema. Vose vakarega kupfeka zvishongo zvavo zvendarama." 
Exodus33:5 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Iti kuvaIsiraeri, ‘Imi muri tsvuuramuromo dzavanhu, kana ndikaenda ndiri pakati penyu, kunyange kwakanguva kaduku ndingakutsakatisei.’ Zvino chibvisai zvishongo zvenyu zvendarama, ndigozoona zvangu zvandichaita nemi.”" 
Exodus33:6 Kubvira panguva yakabva vaIsiraeri pagomo reSinai havana kuzopfekazve zvishongo zvendarama. 
Exodus33:7 Mosesi aiti kana vasvika pavaidzika matendhe, aitora rimwe tendhe achindoridzika chinhambwe riri paro roga. Tendhe iroro akaritumidza zita rokuti tendhe rokusanganira. Ani naani ainge aine zvaanoda kuna Tenzi aienda kutendhe rokusanganira iroro rainge riri kunze kwamatendhe." 
Exodus33:8 Paienda Mosesi kutendhe iroro vanhu vose vaimira pamisuo yamatendhe avo vachiramba vakatarisa Mosesi, kudzamara apinda mutendhe rokusanganira." 
Exodus33:9 Mosesi aiti kana apindamo, shongwe yegore yaiuya yomira pamusuo wetendhe iroro, Tenzi otaura naMosesi." 
Exodus33:10 Vanhu vose vaiti nyandu kusumuka kana vaona shongwe yegore iyoyo yamira pamusuo wetendhe iroro, vobva vazoti pasi gwadagwa munhu woga woga ari pamusuo wetendhe rake vonamata." 
Exodus33:11 Saizvozvo Tenzi aitaurirana naMosesi vakatarisana uso nouso somunhu anokurukurirana neshamwari yake. Painge Mosesi odzokera zvake kumatendhe, Joshuwa, mwanakomana waNunu, jaya raibatsira Mosesi, akanga asingasiyane netendhe iroro." 
Exodus33:12 Mosesi akataura kuna Tenzi achiti, “Hongu makandituma kutungamirira vanhu ava, asi hamuna kuzondiudza kuti achandibatsira kuenda navo ndiani, kunyange zvazvo makati munonyatsondiziva nezita uyewo muchifadzwawo neni." 
Exodus33:13 Naizvozvo ndapota zvangu kana zvichikufadzai ndiratidzeiwo nzira dzenyu kuti ndikuzivei kuitira kuti ndikufadzei, murangarirewo kuti rudzi urwu rwavanhu, vanhu venyu.”" 
Exodus33:14 Mwari akapindura achiti, “Ndichaenda ndichiratidza kuti ndinemi, ndigokupai rugare.”" 
Exodus33:15 Mosesi akati kwaari, “Kana imi musingaende nesu musatirege tichibva pano" 
Exodus33:16 nokuti zvingagozozikanwa seiko kuti imi munofadzwa neni uye navanhu venyu? Handiti iko kuenda nesu ndiko kunonyatsoratidza kuti ini navanhu venyu tiri vanhu vakasiyana namamwe marudzi ose apasi pano here?” 
Exodus33:17 Tenzi akapindurawo Mosesi achiti, “Zvawataura ndichaita izvozvo chaizvo ndozvandichaita nokuti ndinofadzwa newe uye ndinokuziva nezita.”" 
Exodus33:18 Mosesi akati, “Ndapota, ndiratidzeiwo mbiri yenyu inopenya.”" 
Exodus33:19 Mwari ndokuti, “Ndichapfuura napauri uone kunaka kwangu kwose ndigodoma zita rangu rokuti ‘Yahweh’. Ndinoitira mwoyochena kune wandinenge ndada zvangu kuitira mwoyochena, ndichiitirawo tsitsi kune wandinenge ndada zvangu kuitira tsitsi.”" 
Exodus33:20 Asi akati, “Haugone kuona chiso changu nokuti hakuna munhu angandione akaramba ari mupenyu.”" 
Exodus33:21 Tenzi akati, “Chinzwa, pane imwe nzvimbo iri kuno kwandiri ndopauchamira padombo." 
Exodus33:22 Saka kupenya hwokuvapo kwangu pakuchapfuura nepo, mubako redombo iroro ndichakufukidza noruoko rwangu kudzamara ndapfuura." 
Exodus33:23 Ndichabvisa ruoko rwangu, undione nechokumusana kwangu chete. Asi chiso changu hachionekwi.”" 
Exodus34:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Veza mafendefa maviri akafanana nookutanga aye, ndinyore paari mazwi akanga ari pamafendefa okutanga aye awakaputsa." 
Exodus34:2 Gadzirira mangwanani, ukwire mangwanani iwayo mugomo reSinai, uuye pandiri pamusoro pegomo ipapo." 
Exodus34:3 Usakwiremo nomumwe. Hapana munhu anofanira kuonekwa ari mugomo imomo mose. Musarege mombe kana zvimwe zvipfuwo zvichifura mujinga megomo iroro.” 
Exodus34:4 Zvino Mosesi akaveza mafendefa maviri akafanana nookutanga aye. Akafumomuka akakwira mugomo reSinai sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi, akatakurawo mafendefa maviri aye mumaoko." 
Exodus34:5 Tenzi akaburuka ari mugore ndokusvikomira naye. Pakarepo Tenzi akadoma zita rake rokuti, “Yahweh.”" 
Exodus34:6 Tenzi akazopfuura napaiva naMosesi akadetemba zita rake achiti: “Yahweh, Yahweh Mwari ane tsitsi, ane mwoyo wakanaka, ane mwoyo murefu, azere nomwoyochena wakawanda wakavimbika, azere kutendeseka." 
Exodus34:7 Anoitira zviuru nezviuru zvavanhu mwoyochena anoregerera zvitadzo, achiregererawo kukanganisa nouipi, asi haamborega zvake munhu anokodzera kurangwa asina kurangwa. Anoranga vana navana vavo, achivarangira zvakaipa zvamadzibaba avo, achitevedza zvizvarwa zvavo, kunyange kusvikira kune chechitatu nechechina.”" 
Exodus34:8 Ipapo Mosesi akakurumidza kugwadama pasi akanamata. 
Exodus34:9 Akati, “Tenzi kana muchifadzwa neni, ndinokumbira kuti imi Tenzi tiende muri pakati pedu kunyange zvazvo vari tsvuuramuromo dzavanhu, tiregerereiwo zvitadzo zvedu, nouipi hwedu mutigamuchire senhaka yenyu.”" 
Exodus34:10 Mwari akati, “Chinzwa ndava kuita chitenderano nemi. Ndichaita zvishamiso vanhu vako vachiona, zvishamiso zvisina kumboitwa pasi pose kunyange pakati pendudzi dzipi nedzipi zvadzo. Vanhu vose vamuchange mugere pakati pavo vachaona basa rangu ini Tenzi nokuti zvandichaita newe zvinhu zvinotyisa." 
Exodus34:11 Chengeta zvandinokuudza nhasi. Chinzwa, ndichaita kuti vaAmori navaKanani navaHiti navaPerizi navaHivhi navaJebhusi vakutizei." 
Exodus34:12 Chenjerai kuti murege kuita chitendarano navanhu vagere kunyika iyoyo kwamuri kuenda kungadaro kukava kuzviteyera musungo pakati penyu. 
Exodus34:13 Munofanira kuputsa atari dzavo, muparadzewo shongwe dzavo, mutemere pasi micherechedzo yamwari wavo, Ashera." 
Exodus34:14 “Ndinodaro nokuti hamufanire kunamata mumwe mwari, nokuti Tenzi zita rake ndiNyashanje; ndiMwari aneshanje." 
Exodus34:15 Mungadaro mukaita chitenderano navanhu vagere munyika iyoyo, pavanenge voita unzenza hwokupira zvibayiro zvavo kuna vamwari vavo mumwe angadaro akakukokai mukazodya chibayiro chake," 
Exodus34:16 uye moroorera vana venyu vakadzi kuvanasikana vavo. Varoora venyu ivavo vanozoita unzenza hwokunamata vamwari vavo vachizokwezverawo vana venyu kunamata vamwari vavo. 
Exodus34:17 “Usatore utare uchizviumbira vamwari. 
Exodus34:18 “Unofanira kuchengeta mazuva makuru echingwa chisina mbiriso. Mumwedzi waAbhibhi unofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso kwamazuva manomwe sokukuudza kwandakaita nokuti imi makabuda muIjipiti mumwedzi waAbhibhi. 
Exodus34:19 “Dangwe rose rechikomana nderangu. Zvipfuwo zvose zvikono zvinotanga kuberekwa zvingave zvemombe kana zvezvimwe zvipfuwo ndezvangu. 
Exodus34:20 Dangwe redhongi unofanira kurinunura nehwayana. Kana usina kurinunura unofanira kurityora mutsipa waro. Matangwe enyu ose echirume avanhu ngaanunurwe. “Ngaparege kuva nomunhu anouya kwandiri akangobata zvake maoko. 
Exodus34:21 “Kwamazuva matanhatu, shanda zvako, asi pazuva rechinomwe unofanira kuzorora, pangave pakurima kana pakukohwa." 
Exodus34:22 “Chengeta mazuva makuru anonzi mazuva aMavhiki, mazuva ekoroni yokutanga. Chengetawo mazuva okupemberera kukohwa pakupera kwegore." 
Exodus34:23 Vanhurume vose vanofanira kuuya katatu pagore kuna Tenzi Mwari, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
Exodus34:24 Ndinodaro nokuti ndichaita kuti ndudzi dzavanhu dzikutizei ndigokudza-kudza nyika yenyu zvokuti pamunouya katatu kwandiri hapana anozoita ruchiva rwokuda kukutorerai. 
Exodus34:25 “Rega kupira ropa rechibayiro changu pamwechete nechingwa chine mbiriso. Nyama inosara pazuva guru rePasika ngairege kufuma mangwana acho ichiripo. 
Exodus34:26 “Pambesa dzenyu dzokutanga kukohwa munofanira kutora dzokutangisisa dzacho muuye nadzo kuimba yaTenzi, Mwari wenyu. Musabike mbudzana nomukaka waamai vayo.”" 
Exodus34:27 Tenzi akaudza Mosesi kuti, “Nyora mashoko aya andareva nokuti ndiwo hwaro hwechitenderano chandakaita newe neIsiraeri.”" 
Exodus34:28 Mosesi akagara mugomo reSinai siku nesikati kwamazuva makumi mana aina Tenzi, asina chaainwa kana kudya. Mwari akanyora pamafendefa mitemo gumi yechitenderano." 
Exodus34:29 Mosesi akazoburuka mugomo reSinai, paaiburuka mugomo akanga akatakura mumaoko mafendefa maviri eMitemo gumi. Asi haana kuziva kuti chiso chake chakanga chava kupenya pamusana pokutaura kwaakanga aita naMwari." 
Exodus34:30 Aroni navaIsiraeri vose vakatarisa Mosesi, onei ganda rouso hwake riri kupenya, vakabva vatya kusvika pedyo naye." 
Exodus34:31 Asi Mosesi akavadaidza. Aroni navakuru vakuru vose vegungano vakadzokera kwaari, Mosesi ndokutaura navo." 
Exodus34:32 VaIsiraeri vose vakazouyawo pedyo, Mosesi ndokuvapa mitemo yose yaakanga apiwa naTenzi mugomo reSinai." 
Exodus34:33 Mosesi akati apedza kutaura navo akatora mucheka akafukidza chiso chake. 
Exodus34:34 Mosesi aiti kana opinda kundotaura naTenzi, aibvisa mucheka uyu kusvikira abudamo. Paaibuda aiudza vaIsiraeri zvose zvaainge audzwa naTenzi." 
Exodus34:35 VaIsiraeri vaiona kuti chiso chaMosesi chiri kupenya, naizvozvo Mosesi aitora mucheka ofukidza chiso chake pakare kusvikira, nguva yaaindotaura naMwari zvakare." 
Exodus35:1 Mosesi akakokera musangano wegungano rose ravaIsiraeri akati, “Hezvinoi zvinhu zvanzi naTenzi muite:" 
Exodus35:2 Kwamazuva matanhatu ita zvako basa rako rose, asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata rinoera rokunyatsozorora rinoereserwa Tenzi. Kuwana anoshanda pazuva iroro ngaaurayiwe." 
Exodus35:3 Musabatidze moto mumisha yenyu pazuva reSabata.” 
Exodus35:4 Mosesi akataurirawo gungano rose ravaIsiraeri kuti, “Hechinoi chirevo chakatemwa naTenzi chinoti:" 
Exodus35:5 Ipai kuna Tenzi mipiro yezvinhu zvinobva kwamuri. Ani naani ane mwoyochena wokupa ngaauye zvake nechipo kuna Tenzi. Zvinhu zvaanogona kupa ndezvizvi; ndarama nesirivha nendarira," 
Exodus35:6 kwouya machira erineni akanakisisa, newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku namachira akagadzirwa nemvere dzembudzi," 
Exodus35:7 kwouyawo matehwe ehondohwe akasukwa akatsvukiswa, namatehwe etahashi, namatanda omuunga," 
Exodus35:8 kwoti mafuta omumarambi, netwokubikisa tunonhuhwira namafuta okuzodza, norusenzi runonhuhwira," 
Exodus35:9 kwozoti tumabwe tweonikisi, notumwe tumabwe twokuisa pahanzu yeefodhi, netwapanyembe yepadundundu." 
Exodus35:10 “Nyanzvi dzose dzine ruzivo rwokuita mabasa ngadziuye kuzogadzira zvose zvakanzi naTenzi zviitwe zvinoti; 
Exodus35:11 tendhe rinoera pacharo, namachira anovakiswa tendhe racho needenga raro, nezvikochekero zvaro, namapango aro akavezwa nembariro dzaro, namapango aro nezvigadzikiro zvawo," 
Exodus35:12 kwouya bhokisi rechitenderano namapango okuritakurisa, nehwidibiro yaro nejira rechidzikatiro," 
Exodus35:13 kwoti teburu namapango ayo okuitakurisa, nemidziyo yayo yose nechingwa chokuisa pana Mwari," 
Exodus35:14 kwozoti chigadzikirowo chomwenje wokuvhenekesa nemidziyo yacho, namarambi acho, namafuta awo," 
Exodus35:15 uye atari yokupisira rusenzi, namapango ayo okuitakurisa, namafuta okuzodza, norusenzi runonhuhwira, nejira rokudzikatirisa pamusuo wetendhe rinoera," 
Exodus35:16 uyezve atari yokupisira zvibayiro, namapango ayo okuitakurisa nemidziyo yayo, nesefa yayo yendarira, namapango ayo okuitakurisa nedhishi rokushambira nechigadzikiro charo," 
Exodus35:17 uyewo machira okukomberedza nhandare yayo, namapango awo, nezvigadzikiro zvamapango acho, nejira rokudzikatirisa pasuo guru renhandare," 
Exodus35:18 poti hoko dzetendhe rinoera, nehoko dzamachira okukomberedza nhandare, netambo dzacho," 
Exodus35:19 pozoti hanzu dzakanyatsorukwa dzokushanda nadzo munzvimbo inoera, hanzu dzinoera dzomupristi Aroni, nehanzu dzavanakomana vake dzokushanda nadzo savapristi.”" 
Exodus35:20 Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakazokotonoka richibva paiva naMosesi. 
Exodus35:21 Mumwe nomumwe akanga abatwa mwoyo neakanga achinzwa mumwoyo make shungu dzokupa, akaunza chipo kuna Tenzi kuti chishandiswe pabasa romutendhe rokusanganira napabasa rose remo nokushandisa pahanzu dzinoera." 
Exodus35:22 Naizvozvo vanhurume navanhukadzi vaiva nomwoyo wokupa vakaunza mabhurukwa embirichisi namakoza, nemhete namaringi omumaoko, nezvimwe zvakasiyana-siyana zvendarama, mumwe nomumwe achipira chipo chake kuna Tenzi." 
Exodus35:23 Ainge aine wuru yoruvara rwedenga kana kuti yeruvara rwehute kana kuti tsvuku, neainge aine jira rerineni rakanakisisa kwazvo nejira remvere dzembudzi, kana matehwe ehondohwe akatsvukiswa, namatehwe etahashi, akauya nazvo." 
Exodus35:24 Munhu wose aikwanisa kuunza chipo chesirivha kana chendarira akachiunza sechipo kuna Tenzi. Munhu wose ainge ane mapango omuunga aigona kuitiswa basa raimomo akauya nawo. 
Exodus35:25 Vanhukadzi vose vainge vari nyanzvi dzokuruka vakagadzira machira erineni akanyatsogadzirwa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku vakauya nazvo. 
Exodus35:26 Vanhukadzi vose vaingewo vaine chido mumwoyo mavo, uyewo vari nyanzvi dzokuruka vakagadzira machira emvere dzembudzi." 
Exodus35:27 Vakuru vakuru vakaunzawo tumabwe tweonikisi notumwe tumambwe twokuisa pahanzu yeefodhi napanyembe yapadundundu," 
Exodus35:28 vakaunzawo twokubikisa tunonhuhwira namafuta amarambi namafuta okuzodza norusenzi runonhuhwira. 
Exodus35:29 VaIsiraeri vose, varume navakadzi, vakanga vachinzwa mumwoyo mavo shungu dzokupa zvinhu zvokushandisa mubasa rose rakanga raudzwa Mosesi naTenzi kuti riitwe, vakauya nezvipo zvavo kuna Tenzi." 
Exodus35:30 Mosesi akaudza vaIsiraeri kuti, “Chinzwaika, Tenzi akadoma nezita Bhezarieri, mwanakomana waUri, muzukuru waHuru wedzinza rokwaJudha, akamusarudza." 
Exodus35:31 Akamuzadza noMweya waMwari, akamupawo kunzwisisa uye nenjere noruzivo kuti agove noumhizha hwose" 
Exodus35:32 hwokugona kufanotara mifananidzo yezvinhu zvingade kuzopfurwa zvendarama nezvesirivha nezvendarira 
Exodus35:33 uye kuveza tumabwe tunokosha twokuisa pazvinhu, nokuvezawo miti nokuitawo mamwe mabasa oumhizha." 
Exodus35:34 Akamupa, iye naOhoriabhu mwanakomana waAhisamaki wedzinza rokwaDhani, mwoyo wokuda kudzidzisa vamwe." 
Exodus35:35 Akavapa unyanzvi hwezvokupfura noumhizha mumabasa, nokugona kushongedza vachirukira wuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku uye machira erineni akanakisisa. Akavapawo unyanzvi hwokuruka nohwokuita mabasa ose zvawo, neokufanotara mamiriro ezvingade kuitwa." 
Exodus36:1 “Bhezarieri naOhoriabhu vanofanira kushanda navose vakapiwa naTenzi ruzivo noungwaru hwokuita mabasa ose okuvaka Nzvimbo Inoera, sezvakanzi naTenzi zviitwe.”" 
Exodus36:2 Mosesi akadaidza Bhezarieri naOhoriabhu nenyanzvi dzose dzakanga dzapiwa njere naTenzi dzaivawo nechido chokubatsira pabasa, kuti vazoita basa." 
Exodus36:3 Vakagamuchira zvipo zvose izvozvo kuna Mosesi zvakanga zvaunzwa navaIsiraeri kuzoitisa basa romuNzvimbo Inoera. Izvozvo vaIsiraeri vainge vachingofumouya nazvo. 
Exodus36:4 Nokudaro nyanzvi dzamabasa akasiyana-siyana dzakauya kubasa romuNzvimbo Inoera dzichibva kumabasa adzo akare. 
Exodus36:5 Nyanzvi idzodzi dzakazotaurira Mosesi kuti, “Vanhu vari kungoramba vachiunza zvipo zvebasa rakanzi naTenzi riitwe, asi zvipo zvacho zvawandisa.”" 
Exodus36:6 Mosesi akatuma chirevo mumatendhe chokuti, “Ngapachirega kunge pachave nomurume kana mukadzi anouya nechipo chokushandisa muNzvimbo Inoera.” Naizvozvo vanhu vakarega kuunza zvipo izvozvo," 
Exodus36:7 nokuti zvipo zvakanga zvaunzwa kare zvakanga zvatokwana kuitisa basa iroro, zvichitopfuuridza." 
Exodus36:8 Varume vose vaiva noruzivo rwokuita mabasa pakati penyanzvi dzakanga dzauya, vakagadzira tendhe rinoera vachiritenderedza namachira makuru okudzikatirisa gumi namaviri, erineni akanakisisa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku, akarukirirwa zvakanakisisa makerubhu." 
Exodus36:9 Machira acho ose akanga akaenzana, urefu hwawo hwaiita mamita gumi namaviri, hwasha hwawo huchiita mamita maviri." 
Exodus36:10 Pamachira iwayo, akasonanidza mashanu pawo oga, akasonanidzawo mamwe acho mashanu ari pawo oga." 
Exodus36:11 Akaita zvishwe zvomucheka weruvara rwedenga pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira aye okutanga, akaitawo saizvozvo pamupendero wokunzekunze pamachira aye echipiri." 
Exodus36:12 Akaita zvishwe makumi mashanu pamachira aye okutanga, akaitawo zvimwe zvishwe makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira echipiri. Zvishwe izvozvo zvaiva pamachira iwayo zvakanga zvakatarisana." 
Exodus36:13 Akagadzira zvikochekero zvendarama makumi mashanu, ndokubatanidza machira makuru okudzikatirisa maviri aye nezvikochekero izvozvo rikava tendhe rimwechete." 
Exodus36:14 Akagadzirawo machira okudzikatirisa gumi nerimwechete emvere dzembudzi okuisa padenga retendhe rinoera. 
Exodus36:15 Akagadzira machira acho ose akaenzana, kureba kwawo kwaiva mamita gumi nematatu, hwasha hwawo hwaiva mamita maviri." 
Exodus36:16 Akabatanidza pamwechete machira mashanu pawo oga, ndokubatanidzawo pamwechete mamwe machira matanhatu pawo oga." 
Exodus36:17 Akaita zvishwe makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira aye okutanga, akaitawo zvimwe zvishwe makumi mashanu pamupendero wejira rokunzekunze pamachira aye echipiri." 
Exodus36:18 Akagadzira zvikochekero makumi mashanu zvomundarira zvokubatanidza nazvo machira maviri iwayo pamwechete kuita zijira rimwechete. 
Exodus36:19 Akagadzira dahunha repadenga retendhe rinoera namatehwe ehondohwe akasukwa akatsvukiswa, neetahashi." 
Exodus36:20 Akaveza mapango omuunga okumisa chengo chetendhe rinoera. 
Exodus36:21 Urefu hwebango rimwe nerimwe hwaiva mamita mana, hwasha hwaro huchiita masendimita makumi matanhatu." 
Exodus36:22 Bango roga roga raiva nezviga zviviri zvokuribatanidza nerimwe. Akaita izvozvi namapango ose etendhe rinoera. 
Exodus36:23 Aya ndiwo mavezero aakaita mapango etendhe rinoera. Akaveza mapango makumi maviri okumisa divi retendhe rinoera rokumaodzanyemba. 
Exodus36:24 Akagadzirawo zvigadzikiro zvesirivha makumi mana zvokumisa mapango iwayo. Pabango rimwe nerimwe paiva nezvigadzikiro zviviri, zvakanga zvakagumana musana pasi pezviga zviya zvamapango." 
Exodus36:25 Kudivi rimwe retendhe, rokuchamhembe, akagadzira makumi maviri amapango okumisa tendhe," 
Exodus36:26 akagadzirawo zvigadzikiro zvawo zvesirivha makumi mana achiisa zvigadzikiro zviviri pasi pebango roga roga. 
Exodus36:27 Akaveza mapango matanhatu okumisa chengo chetendhe cheseri chokumadokero. 
Exodus36:28 Akaveza mapango maviri maviri okumisa mumakona maviri eshure kwetendhe. 
Exodus36:29 Mapango maviri akaamisa asina kubatana nechepasi pawo, asi kumusoro akaabatanidza necheparingi rokutanga, ndozvaakaaita ose ari maviri maviri pamakona iwayo maviri." 
Exodus36:30 Saka chengo chetendhe cheshure chaiva namapango akavezwa masere aiva nezvigadzikiro zvawo zvesirivha gumi nezvitanhatu zviri zviviri zviviri pasi pebango roga roga. 
Exodus36:31 Akagadzira mbariro dzomuunga shanu dzorumwe rutivi," 
Exodus36:32 shanu dzorumwewo rutivi, neshanu dzorumwewo rutivi rweseri kwetendhe rinoera kumadokero." 
Exodus36:33 Akagadzira rumbariro rwokuisa pakati napakati pamapango akavezwa ruchiapoteredza kusvika kunze nokunze. 
Exodus36:34 Akanamira ndarama mapango iwayo nembariro ndokuisa maringi endarama pamapango okubata mbariro idzodzo ndokunamira mbariro idzodzo ndarama. 
Exodus36:35 Akagadzira jira rokudzikatirisa nerineni yakanakisisa yeruvara rwedenga neruvara rwehute nerutsvuku yakarukirirwa makerubhu. 
Exodus36:36 Akarigadzirira mapango mana akavezwa omuunga akaanamira nendarama, nezvipikiri zvawo zvendarama akaagadzirira zvigadzikiro zvawo zvina zvesirivha." 
Exodus36:37 Akagadzirawo jira rokudzikatirisa pamusuo wetendhe rinoera, rerineni rakanakisisa rakarukirirwa zvakanakisisa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku." 
Exodus36:38 Akagadzirawo mapango aro mashanu akaanamira ndarama pane zvapamusoro pawo, zvipikiri zvawo zvaiva zvendarama. Asi zvigadzikiro zvawo zvishanu zvaiva zvendarira." 
Exodus37:1 Bhezarieri akatora mapango omuunga akagadzira bhokisi rechitenderano. Rakanga riri zana ramasendimita rina masendimita gumi kureba, hwasha hwaro huchiita makumi matanhatu amasendimita ana masendimita matanhatu, udzami hwaro huchiitawo makumi matanhatu amasendimita ana masendimita matanhatu." 
Exodus37:2 Rakanamirirwa nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa mukati nokunze ndokuriitira mukombero wendarama kumusoro kwaro. 
Exodus37:3 Akarigadzirira maringi mana endarama okuisa mumakona mana ebhokisi. Akaisa maringi iwayo pamakona mana ebhokisi akati uku maviri uku maviri. 
Exodus37:4 Akaveza mapango omuunga, akaatsvetera nendarama." 
Exodus37:5 Akapfekera mapango iwayo okutakurisa bhokisi rechitenderano mumaringi aiva pamativi aro. 
Exodus37:6 Akagadzirawo hwidibiro yaro yendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, urefu hwayo hwaiita zana ramasendimita rina masendimita gumi, hwasha hwaro huchiita makumi matanhatu amasendimita ana masendimita matanhatu." 
Exodus37:7 Akatora ndarama akapfura mifananidzo miviri yezvimwe zvisikwa zvinonzi makerubhu, akazvigadzira zviri pamativi maviri ehwidibiro." 
Exodus37:8 Akanamira makerubhu iwayo pahwidibiro akati rimwe kerubhu kwokupedzesera uku, rimwe kerubhu kwokupedzeserawo uku. Akaagadzira akabatana nayo zvokuti aiva chinhu chimwechete nehwidibiro." 
Exodus37:9 Makerubhu iwayo akanga akatarisa pahwidibiro akatarisana akasimudzira mapapiro awo kumusoro akafukidza hwidibiro. 
Exodus37:10 Akagadzirawo teburu yomuti womuunga, urefu hwayo hwaiita makumi masere amasendimita ana masendimita masere, upamhi hwayo huchiita masendimita makumi mana ana masendimita mana, udzami hwayo huchiita masendimita makumi matanhatu ana masendimita matanhatu." 
Exodus37:11 Akainamirira ndarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, ndokuipendera nendarama mativi ose." 
Exodus37:12 Akaigadzirira mupendero waiipoteredza waiva noupamhi sehwechanza, akaisa kamutsetse kendarama kunze kwawo kakapoteredza mupendero iwoyo." 
Exodus37:13 Akaigadzirira maringi endarama mana okupfekera mapango okuitakurisa, akaaisa pamakona mana apamakumbo ayo." 
Exodus37:14 Maringi anopfekerwa mapango okutakurisa teburu akaaisa pedyo nomupendero uya. 
Exodus37:15 Akaveza mapango omuunga okutakurisa teburu yacho, akaanamira nendarama." 
Exodus37:16 Akaigadzirira midziyo yendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa yokushandisa patafura ipapa. Akagadzira ndiro nembiya namajagi omupiro wokuteura. 
Exodus37:17 Akagadzirawo chigadzikiro chomwenje, cheminora chendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, pamwechete negaro racho nehunde yacho akazvigadzira achiita zvokupfura. Maruva acho akazaruka namamwe asati azaruka, akanga akabatanidzwa nacho kuita chinhu chimwechete." 
Exodus37:18 Chaiva namapazi matanhatu aibva pachiri, chaiti uku matatu, uku matatu." 
Exodus37:19 Bazi rokutanga, kune rumwe rutivi, rakanga rakanamatidzwa maruva matatu ainge maruva omuarimondi akazaruka neasati azaruka. Bazi rechipiri kune rumwewo rutivi rakanga rakanamirirwa maruva akazaruka neasati azaruka. Zvakaitwa zvimwechetezvo pamapazi ose ari matanhatu." 
Exodus37:20 Hunde yechigadzikiro pachayo pakanamatidzwa maruva mana ainge maruva omuarimondi akazaruka naasati azaruka. 
Exodus37:21 Pose pose paisangana hunde namapazi maviri maviri nechepasi pawo, ose ari matanhatu, pakange pakanamatidzwa ruva rimwechete risati razaruka." 
Exodus37:22 Chigadzikiro ichocho namapazi acho namaruva acho zvaiva zvendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, zvakabatanidzwa zviri chinhu chimwechete." 
Exodus37:23 Akagadzira marambi manomwe okuisa pachigadzikiro ichi, nezvigero zvokuchekesa tambo dzamarambi netireyi dzendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa." 
Exodus37:24 Akachigadzira pamwechete, nemimwe midziyo yacho yose nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa yairema makumi matatu amakirogiramu ana makirogiramu mashanu." 
Exodus37:25 Akaveza mapango omuunga ndokugadzira atari yokupisira rusenzi. Yakanga yakaenzana mativi ose ari mana. Urefu hwayo hwaiva masendimita makumi mana ana masendimita mashanu, upamhi hwayo huchiita masendimita makumi mana ana masendimita mashanu. Kukwira kwayo mudenga kwaiita masendimita makumi mapfumbamwe. Zvinenge nyanga zviri pamusoro pamakona ayo zvakavezwa zvakabatanidzwa nayo." 
Exodus37:26 Atari iyoyo yakanamirirwa nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa nenhivi dzayo dzose nezvinenge nyanga zviya zvapamusoro pamakona ayo. Pamusoro peatari pakapenderwa nomukombero wendarama. 
Exodus37:27 Akagadzira maringi mana endarama akaanamatidza panyasi pomukombero wayo uya, achiti uku maviri uku maviri, ndimo mukupfekera mapango aye okuitakurisa nawo." 
Exodus37:28 Akaveza mapango omuunga, akaanamirira ndarama." 
Exodus37:29 Akagadzira mafuta anoera okuzodza nawo. Akagadzirawo rusenzi runonhuhwirira zvakanaka sezvinoita vagadziri vamafuta anonhuhwira. 
Exodus38:1 Akaveza mapango omuunga akagadzira atari. Kureba kwayo kwaiita mamita maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri, upamhi hwayo hwaiva mamita mazana maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri, kukwira kwayo kwakanga kuchiita mita imwechete, ina masendimita makumi matatu. Mativi mana eatari akanga akaenzana." 
Exodus38:2 Akaveza zvainge nyanga zvina zvapamusoro pamakona mana eatari, zvakanga zvakavezwa zvakabatana neatari yacho. Akanamirira atari iyoyo noutare hwendarira." 
Exodus38:3 Akagadzirawo midziyo yose yokushandisa paatari inoti: migomo yokubvisira dota namafoshoro nembenge namaforogo okubayisa nyama namagwati okutapisa moto nemimwe midziyo yayo yose. Midziyo iyoyi yose yakagadzirwa nendarira. 
Exodus38:4 Akagadzirira atari sefa yendarira yakaita somumbure. Akaisa sefa yacho pazasi pomupendero wapamusoro peatari, ichirembera kusvika pakati." 
Exodus38:5 Akagadzirawo maringi mana endarira akaaisa pamakona mana esefa iyoyo yendarira mokupfekera mapango okutakurisa atari. 
Exodus38:6 Akaveza mapango omuunga akaanamirira nendarira. 
Exodus38:7 Akapfekera mapango iwayo mumaringi apamativi maviri eatari okuwana matakuriro. Akaigadzira namapuranga iine zimhango risina chinhu. 
Exodus38:8 Akagadzira dhishi rendarira rokushambira rine chigadzikiro charo chendarira yaibva kuzviringiriro zvavakadzi vaishanda kusuo guru retendhe rinoera. 
Exodus38:9 Akagadzira nhandare: machira okuikomberedza nawo okuchamhembe erineni akanakisisa aiva noupamhi hunoita mamita makumi mana ana mamita mana. Iwayo aiita mamita makumi mana ana mana. 
Exodus38:10 Akaita mapango awo makumi maviri nezvigadzikiro zvawo zvendarira makumiwo maviri. Asi zvipikiri nembariro dzokupfekera machira iwayo zvakanga zviri zvesirivha. 
Exodus38:11 Kuchamhembe, kwaiva nourefu hwaiita mamita makumi mana ana mamita mana, akaita mapango awo makumi maviri, nezvigadzikiro zvawo zvendarira makumiwo maviri. Asi zvipikiri nembariro dzokupfekera machira iwayo zvakanga zviri zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:12 Kumadokero, kwaiva namachira ane upamhi hunoita mamita makumi maviri ana mamita maviri, namapango awo gumi ane zvigadzikiro zvawo gumi; mbariro nezvipikiri zvawo zvaiva zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:13 Kumusuo wayo, kumabvazuva kwaiva neane mamita makumi maviri ana mamita maviri." 
Exodus38:14 Machira okudzikatirisa edivi rimwechete rokusuo guru aiva mamita matanhatu ana masendimita makumi matanhatu namapango awo matatu nezvigadzikiro zvawo zvitatu," 
Exodus38:15 rimwewo divi raikoko raivawo namachira akanga aina mamita matanhatu ana masendimita matanhatu nemapango awo matatu nezvigadzikiro zvawo zvitatu. 
Exodus38:16 Machira ose okudzikatirisa aikomberedza nhandare yacho akanga akagadzirwa namachira erineni akanakisisa. 
Exodus38:17 Zvigadzikiro zvemapango zvaiva zvendarira. Asi zvipikiri zvemapango nembariro dzawo zvaiva zvesirivha, pamusoro pawo pakaputirwawo nesirivha. Mapango ose omunhandare yaro akanga akabatanidzwa nembariro dzesirivha." 
Exodus38:18 Jira rokudzikatirisa pasuo rokupinda muruvanze macho rakanga rakarukwa namachira erineni akanakisisa. Rakanga rakarukirirwa richishongedzwa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku urefu hwaro huchiita mamita mapfumbamwe, kureba kwaro mudenga kuchiita mamita maviri sezvakangoita machira okudzikatirisa enhandare iyoyo." 
Exodus38:19 Mapango awo akanga ari mana, aine zvigadzikirowo zvawo zvendarira zvina. Zvipikiri zvawo zvaivawo zvesirivha, zvapamusoro dzawo nembariro dzawo zviri zvesirivha." 
Exodus38:20 Hoko dzose dzetendhe rinoera nedzenhandare yakanga yakaripoteredza dzaiva dzendarira. 
Exodus38:21 Zviri pano apa ndizvo zvose zvakashandiswa mutendhe rinoera, tendhe rechitenderano, sokuverengwa kwazvakaitwa zvichitungamirirwa naItamaru, mwanakomana womupristi Aroni, sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naMosesi." 
Exodus38:22 Bhezarieri, mwanakomana waUri, muzukuru waHuri wedzinza rokwaJudha, akagadzira zvose zvakanga zvarehwa naTenzi kuna Mosesi" 
Exodus38:23 aina Ohoriabhu, mwanakomana waAhisamaki wedzinza rokwaDhani. Ohoriabhu aiva nyanzvi yokunyora pasimbi napazvivezwa, aiziva kufanotara mifananidzo yezvinhu zvingade kuzoitwa. Aigona kurukirira machira erineni newuru yoruvara rwedenga neyoruvara rwehute netsvuku." 
Exodus38:24 Ndarama yose yakashandiswa pabasa rokuvaka Nzvimbo Inoera yakanga yapirwa kuna Mwari, yairema chiuru chamakirogiramu maererano neshekeri romuNzvimbo Inoera." 
Exodus38:25 Sirivha yakaunzwa negungano ravanhu vakanga vaverengwa yairema zviuru zvitatu zvamakirogiramu zvina mazana mana ana makumi matatu amakirogiramu ari pamwero wemari yeshekeri yomuNzvimbo Inoera," 
Exodus38:26 bheka pamunhu, zvichireva hafu yeshekeri romuNzvimbo Inoera pamunhu mumwe nomumwe akanga averengwa pakuverenga vanhu ikoku, kubvira kuna vaiva namakumi maviri amakore zvichikwira. Yaiva yavarume mazana matanhatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvitatu namazana mashanu ane makumi mashanu avanhu." 
Exodus38:27 Pasirivha iyoyo, makirogiramu akagadziriswa zvigadzikiro zvamapango eNzvimbo Inoera, needzejira rechidzikatiro, zviuru zvitatu namazana mana." 
Exodus38:28 Pamakirogiramu makumi matatu esirivha akasara, Bhezarieri akaagadzirisa zvipikiri zvamapango nokunamirira misoro yamapango dzokushandisa pambariro." 
Exodus38:29 Ndarira yomupiro wokuvheyeswa yairema makirogiramu zviuru zviviri zvine mazana mana ana makumi maviri amakirogiramu namakirogiramu mashanu. 
Exodus38:30 Ndiwo aakatora akagadzira zvigadzikiro zvamapango dzapamusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, akagadzirawo nawo atari yendarira nesefa yayo yendarirawo nemidziyo yose yeatari iyoyo;" 
Exodus38:31 kwouyawo zvigadzikiro zvaitenderedza nhandare yose, nezvigadzikiro zvapasuo guru raro nehoko dzose dzetendhe rinoera, nedzamachira okudzikatirisa aikomberedza nhandare yaro yose." 
Exodus39:1 Vakatora wuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku vakagadzira hanzu dzavapristi dzaipfekwa pakuita basa romunzvimbo inoera. Vakagadzira hanzu dzinoera dzaAroni, sokuudzwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Exodus39:2 Akagadzira hanzu yeefodhi namachira erineni akanakisisa. Akairukira newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku neshinda yendarama. 
Exodus39:3 Vakapfura ndarama vachiita mapape. Vakacheka-cheka mapape endarama iwayo vachiita tutseta tutetetete, twakazorukirwa mumachira erineni akanakisisa newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku." 
Exodus39:4 Vakagadzirira efodhi zvipenga zviviri zvepamapfudzi zvikasonererwa pairi," 
Exodus39:5 nomundya wayo wokuisungisa wakanga wakanyatsorukwa nejira rakafanana nerayo, rerineni rakanakisisa, wakarukirwa neshinda yendarama newuru neyeruvara rwedenga noruvara rwehute netsvuku, sezvakanga zvaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Exodus39:6 Akatora mabwe eonikisi, akaaisa patusefa twesimbi twendarama akanyora paari sezvinoitwa pachidhindo, mazita avanakomana vaVaIsiraeri." 
Exodus39:7 Akaisa mabwe iwayo pazvipenga zvapamapfudzi peefodhi kuti ave okuyeuka nawo vanakomana vaIsiraeri, sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Exodus39:8 Akagadzira nyembe yepadundundu yakanyatsogadzirwa yakaitwa sezvakaitwa efodhi. Yakagadzirwa nejira rerineni rakanakisisa, rakarukirirwa neshinda yendarama newuru yeruvara rwedenga neyeruvara rwehute netsvuku." 
Exodus39:9 Yaive yakapetwa ruviri, iine mativi mana akaenzana. Kureba nokufara kwayo kuchiita masendimita makumi maviri ana masendimita maviri." 
Exodus39:10 Akaisa pairi mitsara mina yetumabwe tunokosha. Mutsara wokutanga wakanga uine katombo kerubhi netopazi neganeti. 
Exodus39:11 Mutsara wechipiri waiva nekeemeradhi nesafaya nedhaimondi. 
Exodus39:12 Mutsara wechitatu waiva neketekoizi neagati neametesiti. 
Exodus39:13 Mutsara wechina waiva nekebheriri neonikisi nejasipa. Twakanga twakaiswa patusefa twesimbi twendarama. 
Exodus39:14 Paiva notumatombo gumi netuviri tune mazita anofambirana namazita avanakomana vavaIsiraeri. Twakanga twakanyorwa mazita amadzinza gumi namaviri evaIsiraeri, katombo koga koga kaine zita rako." 
Exodus39:15 Vakagadzira tucheni tuviri twakakoswa twendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa vakatuisa panyembe iye yapadundundu. 
Exodus39:16 Vakagadzirawo tusefa twesimbi tuviri twendarama twokunamatidza mabwe, namaringi endarama maviri, vakasonera maringi maviri iwayo pamakona maviri okumusoro kwenyembe yepadundundu." 
Exodus39:17 Vakasungirira tucheni tuviri twendarama twakakoswa tuye pamaringi maviri epanyembe yepadundundu. 
Exodus39:18 Vakasungirira tucheni tuviri twokumusoro tuye patusefa twesimbi twendarama twuya twapamapfudzi tukava nechepamberi pezvipenga zviviri zveefodhi zvapamapfudzi. 
Exodus39:19 Vakagadzirawo maringi maviri endarama vakaasonera nechomukati menyembe yapadundundu pamakona ezasi pedyo neefodhi. 
Exodus39:20 Vakagadzirawo mamwe maringi maviri endarama vakaasonera nechemberi, pamakona ezasi ezvipenga zviviri zvepamapfudzi zviya zveefodhi pedyo nomupendero wayo pamusoro pomundya uya wakanyatsorukwa." 
Exodus39:21 Vakasunga nyembe yapadundundu nomumaringi acho, nomundya weruvara rwedenga vachisunganidza maringi epanyembe yapadundundu namaringi epaefodhi. Nokudaro nyembe yapadundundu yakagara yakasimba iri nechokumusoro kwomundya womuchiuno, kuitira kuti nyembe irege kubva paefodhi, sezvakanga zvaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Exodus39:22 Akagadzirawo gemenzi reefodhi, rakarukwa rose zvaro riri rweruvara rwedenga." 
Exodus39:23 Raiva nehuro pakati paro pokupinza napo musoro. Paiva nomupendero wakarukwa uchipoteredza huro iyoyo kuti rirege kubvaruka. 
Exodus39:24 Pamupendero wegemenzi iroro wose wezasi vakasonera zvinenge michero yemapomegiraneti zveruvara rwedenga nezveruvara rwehute nezvitsvuku nejira rerineni rakanakisisa. 
Exodus39:25 Vakagadzirawo tumadare twendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa. Pamupendero wakatenderedza gemenzi iroro vakasonerera kadare pakati peainge mapomegiraneti maviri oga oga. 
Exodus39:26 Vakazvisonerera zvichitsinhanha zvichiti apa kadare apa kanenge muchero wemapomegiraneti; apa kadare apa kanenge muchero wemapomegiraneti zvakatenderera mupendero wose wegemenzi rokushandisa pabasa raMwari, sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Exodus39:27 Vakagadzirirawo Aroni navanakomana vake hanzu dzinenge dzoda kusvika mumabvi dzejira rerineni rakanakisisa," 
Exodus39:28 kwouya ngundu yejira rerineni rakanakaisisa nenguwani dzejira rerineni rakanakisisa kwazvo, namabhurukwa ejira rerineni rakanakisisa," 
Exodus39:29 kwoti mundya wejira rerineni rakanakisisa rakarukirirwa newuru neyeruvara rwedenga neruvara rwehute netsvukutsvuku, sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Exodus39:30 Vakagadzira karata kechiremba kanoera kendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa vakanyorapo sezvinoitwa pachidhindo mazwi anoti, “Nyakutsaurirwa Tenzi.”" 
Exodus39:31 Vakasungirira tambo yebhuruu pakarata ikako yokukasungirira nayo pangundu iya, nechapamusoro payo sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Exodus39:32 Ndokupedza kwakaitwa basa rose rokugadzira tendhe rokusanganira. VaIsiraeri vakagadzira izvozvo zvose sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Exodus39:33 Vakaunza kuna Mosesi izvi zvinoti: tendhe rinoera, machira etendhe racho nemidziyo yaro yose, nezvikochekero zvaro namapango aro akavezwa, nembariro dzaro namapango aro nezvigadzikiro zvawo," 
Exodus39:34 kwouya dahunha repadenga ramatehwe ehondohwe akasukwa akatsvukiswa uye nerimwe dahunha repo ramatehwe etahashi, nejira rechidzikatiro," 
Exodus39:35 kwouyawo bhokisi rechitenderano namapango aro, nehwidibiro yaro;" 
Exodus39:36 kwoti teburu nemidziyo yayo yose, nechingwa chokuisa pana Mwari," 
Exodus39:37 nechigadzikiro chomwenje chendarama chaiyo namarambi acho, nemidziyo yacho yose namafuta emarambi;" 
Exodus39:38 kuchizoti atari yendarama namafuta okuzodza nawo, norusenzi runonhuhwirira, namachira okudzikatirisa pamusuo wetendhe rinoera;" 
Exodus39:39 kwozouya atari yendarira nesefa yayo yendarira namapango ayo nemidziyo yayo yose nedhishi rokushambira nechigadzikiro charo; 
Exodus39:40 kwozouyawo machira okukomberedza nhandare yayo namapango aro nezvigadzikiro zvawo, namachira okudzikatirisa pasuo raro guru, netambo dzaro nehoko dzaro nemidziyo yaro yokushandisa mutendhe rinoera rokusanganira;" 
Exodus39:41 pachizouya hanzu dzinoera dzokushandisa munzvimbo inoera dzakanyatsorukwa, dzomupristi Aroni, nehanzu dzavanakomana vake dzokushandisa savapristi." 
Exodus39:42 VaIsiraeri vakaita basa iroro rose maererano nezvakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Exodus39:43 Mosesi akatarisa zvose zvakanga zvagadzirwa akaona kuti zvakanga zvaitwa naimomo chaimo makanga manzi naTenzi muitwe nomo. Mosesi akavapa chikomborero. 
Exodus40:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Exodus40:2 “Pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wokutanga, unofanira kumisa tendhe rinoera rokusanganira," 
Exodus40:3 uise bhokisi rechitenderano mutendhe imomo; uisewo jira rechidzikatiro rokudzikatidza bhokisi rechitenderano. 
Exodus40:4 Unofanira kuuya neteburu iya mutendhe imomo, urongedze pairi midziyo yayo. Uunzewo chigadzikiro chomwenje uise marambi acho pachiri." 
Exodus40:5 Unouyawo neatari yendarama yokupisira rusenzi uiise pakatarisana nebhokisi rechitenderano, uise jira rokudzikatirisa pamusuo wetendhe rinoera." 
Exodus40:6 Unofanira kuisa atari yokupisira zvibayiro kumusuo, mutendhe rinoera rokusanganira;" 
Exodus40:7 ugadzike dhishi rokushambira pakati petendhe rinoera neatari inopisirwa zvibayiro uriise mvura. 
Exodus40:8 Unozomisa machira okudzikatirisa ukomberedze nhandare yose yetendhe rinoera, uturike machira okudzikatirisa pasuo guru rokupinda munhandare." 
Exodus40:9 “Ndopaunozotora mafuta okuzodza wozodza tendhe rinoera nezvose zvirimo, uriteketerere kwandiri pamwechete nemidziyo yaro yose, richabva rava chinhu chinoera." 
Exodus40:10 Unofanirawo kuzodza atari yemipiro yokupisa nemidziyo yayo uriteketerere kwandiri. Atari iyoyo ichabva yave inoeresesa kwazvo," 
Exodus40:11 uzodzewo dhishi rokushambira nechigadzikiro charo, uriteketerere kwandiri." 
Exodus40:12 “Unofanira kuzouya naAroni navana vake vakomana kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira uvati vashambe nemvura," 
Exodus40:13 wobva wapfekedza Aroni hanzu dzinoera, umuzodze mafuta aye, umuteketerere kwandiri kuti andishandire basa roupristi." 
Exodus40:14 Vanakomanawo vake uuye navo, uvapfekedze hanzu dzinenge dzoda kusvika mumabvi," 
Exodus40:15 uvazodzewo sokuzodza kwaunenge waita baba vavo, kuti vandiitire basa roupristi. Nokuzodzwa ikoku vachava vapristi nokusingaperi pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose.”" 
Exodus40:16 Ndozvakazoitwa naMosesi, akaita zvose naimomo chaimo maakanga audzwa naTenzi." 
Exodus40:17 Naizvozvo pazuva rokutanga, romwedzi wokutanga, wegore rechipiri rokubuda kwevaIsiraeri muIjipiti, tendhe rinoera rakamiswa." 
Exodus40:18 Mosesi akamisa tendhe rinoera, akaronga zvigadzikiro zvaro, akamisa mapango aro akavezwa, akaisawo mbariro dzaro, akamisa mbiru dzaro." 
Exodus40:19 Akawarira tendhe padenga retendhe rinoera, akazoisawo tendhe rokufukidza pamusoro paro sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi." 
Exodus40:20 Mosesi akatora mafendefa amabwe echitenderano aye akaaisa mubhokisi rechitenderano. Akapfekera mapango okutakurisa bhokisi iroro ndokuripfiga nehwidibiro yaro. 
Exodus40:21 Akaunza bhokisi iri mutendhe rinoera ndokuturika jira rechidzikatiro rikadzikatidza bhokisi rechitenderano, sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi." 
Exodus40:22 Mosesi akaisa teburu mutendhe rokusanganira kuchamhembe kwetendhe rinoera, nechekunze kwejira rechidzikatiro." 
Exodus40:23 Akarongawo chingwa pana Tenzi sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi. 
Exodus40:24 Mosesi akaisa chigadzikiro chomwenje mutendhe rokusanganira, chakatarisana neteburu iye kumaodzanyemba, mutendhe rinoera." 
Exodus40:25 Akagadzikira marambi acho pana Tenzi sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi. 
Exodus40:26 Mosesi akaisa atari yendarama mutendhe rinoera nechepamberi pejira rechidzikatiro," 
Exodus40:27 ndokupisa rusenzi runonhuhwira pairi sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi. 
Exodus40:28 Akaturika jira rokudzikatirisa pamusuo wetendhe rinoera. 
Exodus40:29 Akaisa atari yokupisira mipiro yokupisa kumusuo kwetendhe rinoera rokusanganira, akapira pairi mupiro wokupisa akapirawo upfu hwomupiro wembesanwa, sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi." 
Exodus40:30 Mosesi akagadzika dhishi rokushambira pakati petendhe rokusanganira neatari, akariisa mvura yokushamba" 
Exodus40:31 yokuti iye Mosesi kwouya Aroni navanakomana vake vapote vachishamba maoko namakumbo avo,"
