Exodus40:32 pakupinda mutendhe rokusanganira napakuenda paatari, vaishamba sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi." 
Exodus40:33 Mosesi akamisa machira aye okudzikatirisa akakomberedza nhandare yetendhe rinoera, neatari ndokumisawo machira okusuo guru rokupinda munhandare. Naizvozvo Mosesi akapedza kuita basa iroro rose." 
Exodus40:34 Ipapo gore rakakwidibira tendhe rokusanganira, kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kukazadza tendhe rinoera." 
Exodus40:35 Mosesi haana kukwanisa kupinda mutendhe rokusanganira pamusana pegore rakanga rakati kwidiba pariri uyewo nokupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakanga kwakazadza tendhe rinoera. 
Exodus40:36 Murwendo rwavo rwose, vaIsiraeri vaiti kana gore rasimuka, rabviswa patendhe rinoera, vaibva vasimudzirawo rwendo rwavo." 
Exodus40:37 Asi kana gore iroro rainge risina kubviswapo, havaizosimudzira rwendo rwavo kusvikira zuva rarainge rabviswapo," 
Exodus40:38 nokuti vaIsiraeri vose murwendo rwavo irworwo rwose vaiona gore raTenzi rainge riri pamusoro petendhe rinoera masikati, usikuwo painge paine moto." 
Leviticus1:1 Tenzi akadaidza Mosesi mutendhe rokusanganira akataura kwaari achiti," 
Leviticus1:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Kana munhu achida kuunza mupiro kuna Tenzi, ngaaunze chibayiro chake chezvipfuwo, chingave mombe kana hwai kana mbudzi.’" 
Leviticus1:3 “Kana mupiro wake wokupisa iri mombe, ngaaunze yomukono, isina chinoshoreka pairi. Ngaauye nayo kumusuwo wetendhe rinoera kuti Tenzi amugamuchire." 
Leviticus1:4 Munhu iyeyo ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wechibayiro chokupisa ichocho. Chibayiro ichocho chichatora nzvimbo yake kuti chipfupire zvitadzo zvake. 
Leviticus1:5 Munhu iyeyo ngaaurayire handira yake pamberi paTenzi. Vapristi vemhuri yokwaAroni ngavapire ropa rayo kuna Tenzi, vachirisasa pamativi mana eatari yokumusuwo wetendhe rokusanganira." 
Leviticus1:6 Muridzi wemupiro wokupisa iwoyo ngaaivhiye, aiteme-teme." 
Leviticus1:7 Vana vaAroni mupristi, vachaisa moto paatari varonge huni pamoto iwoyo." 
Leviticus1:8 Vana vaAroni vapristi ngavaronge nyama iya yatemwa-temwa zvose nomusoro wayo, namafuta ayo pamusoro pehuni dziri kubvira paatari." 
Leviticus1:9 Muridzi wayo ngaaisuke nemvura, zvomukati zvayo nemazondo ayo. Muprisiti ngaapisire zvose izvozvo paatari, somupiro wokupisa, mupiro unoitwa zvokupisa nomoto, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Leviticus1:10 “Kana chipo chake chemupiro wokupisa chiri hwai kana kuti mbudzi, ngaive hono isina chinoshoreka pairi." 
Leviticus1:11 Ngaaiurayire kuchamhembe kweatari, pana Tenzi. Vapristi vemhuri yokwaAroni ngavasase ropa rayo pamativi mana ose eatari." 
Leviticus1:12 Munhu iyeyo ngaaiteme-teme nomusoro wayo namafuta ayo, mupristi ngaaironge paatari, ayo pamusoro pehuni dziri kubvira moto paatari." 
Leviticus1:13 Muridzi wayo ngaasuke nemvura zvomukati zvayo nemazondo ayo. Mupristi ngaapisire zvose izvozvo somupiro wokupisa, mupiro unoitwa zvokupisa nomoto, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Leviticus1:14 “Kana munhu achida kupira kuna Tenzi somupiro wake wokupisa weshiri ngaaunze chipo chenjiva kana kuti hangaiwa duku. 
Leviticus1:15 Mupristi ngaaiunze paatari, aimonye mutsipa, idimuke musoro, aipise paatari. Ropa rayo ngariregwe richibuda richiyerera, richidzika neparutivi rweatari." 
Leviticus1:16 Ngaabvise chihururu neminhenga yayo azvirasire panorasirwa dota kumabvazuva kweatari. 
Leviticus1:17 Ngaabate mapapiro ayo aitsemure nepakati, asi ngaarege kuikwachura. Mupristi iyeyo ngaaipisire paatari, pahuni dziri kubvira moto paatari, somupiro wokupisa, unoitwa zvokupisa, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi.”" 
Leviticus2:1 Kana munhu achida kupa kuna Tenzi chipo chembesanwa, mupiro wake ngauve upfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa, ngaahudirewo mafuta ahumwaye rusenzi pamusoro," 
Leviticus2:2 aunze izvozvo kuna vapristi vemhuri yokwaAroni. Ngaanokore chanza chizere choupfu hwekoroni huna mafuta norusenzi rwaho hwose. Mupristi ngaapisire tsama iyoyo paatari ive chirango chokupirwa kwaitwa upfu ihwohwo hwose kuna Tenzi, mupiro unoitwa zvokupisia, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza." 
Leviticus2:3 Zvinenge zvasara pamupiro wembesanwa ndezvaAroni navanakomana vake, ichi chikamu chinoera kwazvo chomupiro wokupisa unopirwa kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus2:4 Kana uchinge uchiunza mupiro wembesanwa wechingwa chakabikwa muovhoni, ngachive chisina mbiriso, chakabikwa noupfu hwakanyatsokuyiwa, chakakanyiwa namafuta kana kuti chingwa chakati fatata chisinawo mbiriso chakazorwa mafuta." 
Leviticus2:5 Kana mupiro wako wembesanwa uri wechingwa chakabikwa chichiita zvokubikwa mupani, ngachive choupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa, chisina mbiriso, chakakanyiwa nemafuta." 
Leviticus2:6 Chimedure-medure uchidire mafuta, iwoyu mupiro wembesanwa." 
Leviticus2:7 Kana mupiro wako wembesanwa uri wechingwa chakabikirwa mupani, ngachibikwe noupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwakakanyiwa namafuta." 
Leviticus2:8 Uya nomupiro wembesanwa wakagadzirwa nezvinhu izvozvi kuna Tenzi, uzvipe mupristi auye nazvo kuatari." 
Leviticus2:9 Mupristi ngaanokore tsama yechirango youpfu ihwohwo hwose hwemupiro wembesanwa apise paatari, mupiro unoitwa zvokupisa, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Leviticus2:10 Zvinosara pamupiro iwoyo ndezva Aroni navanakomana vake, ichi chikamu chinoera kwazvo chomupiro wokupisa kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus2:11 Ngakurege zvako kuva nomupiro wembesanwa waunounza kuna Tenzi uine mbiriso nokuti haufanire kupira kuna Tenzi mbiriso kana uchi zvahwo somupiro unoitwa zvokupisa kuna Tenzi. 
Leviticus2:12 Mupiro wezvinotanga kukohwewa ngauunzwe zvawo kuna Tenzi, asi ngaurege kupirwa kuna Tenzi paatari somupiro uya unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Leviticus2:13 Mipiro yako yose yembesanwa ngairungwe nomunyu. Munyu wechitenderano chako naMwari wako ngaurege kushaikwa mumupiro wako wembesanwa. Mupiro wako wose unofanira kuti uve nemunyu. 
Leviticus2:14 Kana wouya kuna Tenzi nomupiro wembesanwa dzezvinotanga kukohwewa unofanira kupira mupiro wembesanwa dzakadzurwa dzinotorwa patsanga itsva dzikakangwa. 
Leviticus2:15 Dziise mafuta norusenzi, iwoyuzve mupiro wembesanwa." 
Leviticus2:16 Mupristi ngaapise katsama kechirango kembesanwa dzakadzvurwa dzina mafuta, ngaadzipise pamwechete norusenzi rwose, somupiro unoitwa zvokupisirwa Tenzi." 
Leviticus3:1 Kana munhu achida kupira Tenzi chibayiro chake kuti chive mupiro wokuwadzana, ingave mombe yomukono kana hadzi, asi ngaive isina chinoshoreka." 
Leviticus3:2 Munhu iyeyo ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wayo, aiurayire kumusuwo wetendhe rokusanganira. Vana vaAroni ngavasase ropa rayo pamativi ose eatari." 
Leviticus3:3 Pachibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana unopirwa kuna Tenzi uchiitwa zvokupiswa ngaabvise mafuta ose anoputira zvomukati namafuta ari pazviri," 
Leviticus3:4 neitsvo mbiri namafuta ari pakatinginika petsvo nedivi rechiropa rakareba nechinyama chepachiropa chaachabvisa pamwechete netsvo. 
Leviticus3:5 Vanakomana vaAroni ngavapisire zvose izvozvo paatari pamwechete nomupiro wokupisa, pahuni dziri kubvira moto, iwoyu mupiro unoitwa zvokupisa, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Leviticus3:6 Kana mupiro wake wokuwadzana kuna Tenzi uri wehwai kana mbudzi, hono kana hadzi, ngaive isina chinoshoreka." 
Leviticus3:7 Kana munhu achida kupira hwai, ngaauye nayo kuna Tenzi," 
Leviticus3:8 aise ruoko rwake pamusoro pechibayiro chake aiurayire kumusuwo wetendhe rokusanganira. Vanakomana vaAroni ngavasase ropa rayo pamativi ose eatari. 
Leviticus3:9 Pachibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana, unopirwa kuna Tenzi uchiita zvokupiswa, ngaapire mafuta acho, neemuswe wacho wose, wakakora, wakachekwa nepaunosangana nomusana, namafuta ose anoputira zvomukati, neari pazviri," 
Leviticus3:10 neitsvo mbiri, namafuta ari pakatinginika petsvo, nedivi rechiropa rakareba." 
Leviticus3:11 Mupristi ngaapisire Tenzi nyama idzodzo dzose paatari, somupiro wezvokudya unoitwa zvokupiswa." 
Leviticus3:12 Kana chibayiro chake kuna Tenzi chiri chembudzi," 
Leviticus3:13 ngaauye nayo kuna Tenzi aise ruoko rwake pamusoro wayo, aiurayire kumusuwo wetendhe rokusanganira. Vanakomana vaAroni ngavasase ropa rayo pamativi ose eatari." 
Leviticus3:14 Pachibayiro ichocho, ngaabvise mafuta anoputira zvomukati neari pazviri, apire kuna Tenzi mupiro unoitwa zvokupisa," 
Leviticus3:15 neitsvo namafuta ari padziri nechinyama chepachiropa. 
Leviticus3:16 Mupristi ngaapisire nyama idzodzo dzose paatari, achipira Tenzi mupiro wezvokudya unoitwa zvokupiswa unonhuhwirira zvinomufadza. Mafuta ose ndeaTenzi." 
Leviticus3:17 Uyu murao uchagara uripo pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose wokuti: kose kwamuchagara musadye mafuta kana ropa. 
Leviticus4:1 Mwari akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus4:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Zvingaitike kuti munhu anotadzira Tenzi, mukusaziva, achityora mutemo wake achiita zvinorambidzwa nomutemo.’" 
Leviticus4:3 “Kana ari mupristi akazodzwa atadzira Mwari achiita kuti vanhu vave nemhosva, ngaapire kuna Tenzi handira ichiri duku isina chinoshoreka pairi, achiripira chitadzo chake." 
Leviticus4:4 Ngaaunze handira iyoyo kuna Tenzi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, aise ruoko rwake pamusoro wayo, aiurayire pana Mwari ipapo." 
Leviticus4:5 Mupristi akazodzwa ngaatore rimwe ropa rehandira iyoyo apinde naro mutendhe rokusanganira. 
Leviticus4:6 Mupristi ngaanyike munwe wake muropa iroro arisase kanomwe pamberi paTenzi pakatarisana nejira rokudzikatirisa, munzvimbo inoera." 
Leviticus4:7 Mupristi ngaaise rimwe ropa pane zvinenge nyanga zviri pamusoro peatari yokupisira rusenzi runonhuhwirira iya iri mutendhe rokusanganira. Ngaadururire rimwe ropa rose nechepasi peatari yokupirira mupiro yokupisa iri kuumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira rinoera. 
Leviticus4:8 Pahandira iyoyo yemupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo ngaabvise mafuta akaputira zvomukati, neose ari pazviri," 
Leviticus4:9 netsvo mbiri namafuta ari pakatinginika petsvo nedivi rechiropa rakareba," 
Leviticus4:10 sokubviswa kwazvinoitwa mumombe yechibayiro chemupiro wokuwadzana. Mupristi ngaapisire zvose izvozvo paatari yomupiro wokupisa. 
Leviticus4:11 Asi ngaatore dehwe rehandira iyoyo nenyama yayo yose nomusoro wayo namazondo ayo nezvomukati nechinzvinzvi chayo. 
Leviticus4:12 Ngaatakure handira iyoyo yose aende nayo kunze kwematendhe pakachena panorasirwa dota. Ngaapise pamoto wehuni panorasirwa dota. 
Leviticus4:13 “Kana riri gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rinenge ratadzira Tenzi mukusaziva asi zviri zvakavandika kumaziso egungano vapara mhosva yokuita chimwe chezvakarambidzwa naTenzi," 
Leviticus4:14 chitadzo chavakaita chikazozivikanwa, gungano rinofanira kupira handira ichiri duku somupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira." 
Leviticus4:15 Ipapo vatungamiriri vose vevaIsiraeri ngavaise maoko avo pamusoro wehandira iyoyo pana Tenzi vaiurayire ipapo pana Tenzi. 
Leviticus4:16 Mupristi akazodzwa ngaatore rimwe ropa rehandira iyoyo aende naro mutendhe rokusanganira. 
Leviticus4:17 Mupristi ngaanyike munwe wake muropa iroro arisase kanomwe pamberi paTenzi pakatarisana nejira rokudzikatirisa. 
Leviticus4:18 Ngaaise rimwe ropa pane zvinenge nyanga zviya zviri pamusoro pemakona eatari yokupisira iri mutendhe rokusanganira. Ngaadururire rimwe ropa rose pasi peatari yokupisira zvibayiro iri kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. 
Leviticus4:19 Ngaabvise mafuta ayo ose aapisire paatari. 
Leviticus4:20 Zvaanoita nehandira iya yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo ndizvo zvaanofanira kuitawo nehandira yechibayiro chezvitadzo. Ipapo mupristi anobva apfupira chitadzo chavo chichibva charegererwa. 
Leviticus4:21 Ngaatore handira iyoyo aende nayo kunze kwematendhe aipisire ikoko sokupisa kwaakaita handira yokutanga iya. Ichi chibayiro chegungano ravaIsiraeri chokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Leviticus4:22 “Kana mutongi ari iye atadzira Mwari mukusaziva apara mhosva yokuita zvinorambidzwa naTenzi Mwari wake, chitadzo chaakapara ozochiziviswa hake," 
Leviticus4:23 ngaaunze mupiro wegotora risina chinoshoreka. 
Leviticus4:24 Ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wembudzi iyoyo aiurayire pana Tenzi panourayirwa zvibayiro zvokupisa. Iwoyu mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Leviticus4:25 Mupristi ngaanyike munwe wake muropa rechibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo ichocho, ariise pane zvinenge nyanga zviri pamusoro peatari yomupiro wokupisa. Ngaadururire rimwe ropa rose nechapasi peatari yomupiro wokupisa." 
Leviticus4:26 Ngaapisire mafuta ayo ose paatari sezvinoita pamupiro wokuwadzana. Saka mupristi anopfupira chitadzo chomutongi iyeyo mutongi achibva aregererwa. 
Leviticus4:27 “Kana ari mumwe munhuwo zvake atadzira Mwari mukusaziva, apara mhosva yokuita zvakarambidzwa naTenzi," 
Leviticus4:28 akange aziviswa chitadzo chaakaita ngaaunze mbudzi hadzi yokuripa chitadzo isina chinoshoreka. 
Leviticus4:29 Ngaaise ruoko rwake pachibayiro chake chokupfupira zvitadzo achiurayire panourayirwa mipiro yokupisa. 
Leviticus4:30 Mupristi ngaanyike munwe wake muropa racho ariise pane zvinenge nyanga zviri pamusoro peatari yomipiro wokupisa. Ngaadururire rimwe ropa rose nechepasi peatari iyoyo. 
Leviticus4:31 Ngaabvise mafuta ayo ose sokubviswa kunoitwa mafuta ezvibayiro zvokuwadzana. Mupristi ngaapisire mafuta iwayo paatari, kunhuhwirira kwawo kufadze Tenzi. Saka mupristi acharipira chitadzo chake iye anobva aregererwa." 
Leviticus4:32 “Kana iri hwayana yaanounza kuita chibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo, ngaive sheshe isina chinoshoreka." 
Leviticus4:33 Ngaaise ruoko rwake pamusoro wayo, aiurayire panourayirwa mipiro yokupisa." 
Leviticus4:34 Mupristi ngaanyike munwe wake muropa rayo, ariise pane zvinenge nyanga zviri pamusoro peatari yomupiro wokupisa. Ngaadururire rimwe ropa rose nechepasi peatari iyoyo." 
Leviticus4:35 Ngaabvise mafuta ayo ose sokubviswa kunoitwa mafuta ehwayana dzezvibayiro zvemipiro yokuwadzana. Mupristi ngaapisire mafuta iwayo paatari pamwechete nomupiro wokuwadzana unopirwa kuna Mwari uchiitwa zvokupiswa. Saka mupristi achapfupira chitadzo chemunhu iyeyo chaakapara chichibva charegererwa. 
Leviticus5:1 “Munhu anenge anzi nedare, ngaapupure nezvemhosva yaanoziva kana kuti yaakaona, kana akarega kudaro apara mhosva." 
Leviticus5:2 “Munhu anenge abata chinhu chakan'ora chingave chitunha chemhuka yakan'ora kana kuti chechipfuwo chakan'ora kana tumwewo tupukanana twakan'ora twakawandawanda twakafa asingazivi, munhu iyeyo akan'oreswa atopara mhosva." 
Leviticus5:3 “Kana kuti munhu abata chinon'oresa munhu chingave chin'orwa chipi nechipi zvacho chin'oresa munhu mukusaziva, paanozongoziva zvaaita anobva ava nemhosva." 
Leviticus5:4 “Munhu anovhurumukira kupika mhiko yokuita zvakaipa kana zvakanaka, kana kuita chipikepike zvacho chemhiko chingaitwe nomunhu akazonyatsoziva mhiko yaakaita pakarepo atova nemhosva yechimwe chazvo." 
Leviticus5:5 “Kana munhu aine mhosva yechimwe chezvinhu izvozvi ngaareurure chitadzo ichocho. 
Leviticus5:6 Anofanira kuunza kuna Tenzi mupiro wokuripa mhosva yokupfupira chitadzo chaakaita. Ngaaunze sheshe yehwai kana yembudzi yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. Mupristi ngaaite mupiro wokuripira chitadzo chake. 
Leviticus5:7 “Kana asingakwanisi kuwana hwayana, ngaaunze mupiro wokuripa mhosva kuna Tenzi yechitadzo chaakaita yenjiva mbiri kana hangaiwa dzichiri diki. Imwe njiva ndeyo mupiro wokupfupira chitadzo, imwe ndeyomupiro wokupisa." 
Leviticus5:8 Anofanira kuuya nadzo kumupristi atange kupira shiri yomupiro wokupfupira chitadzo. Ngaaimonye mutsipa aibvise musoro, arege kuitsemura." 
Leviticus5:9 Ngaasase rimwe ropa rayo parutivi rweatari, rimwe ropa rose riregwe richidonhera nechepasi peatari. Iwoyu mupiro wokupfupira chitadzo." 
Leviticus5:10 Mupristi ngaapire shiri yechipiri ive mupiro wokupisa maererano nomurao. Mupristi ngaapire mupiro wokupfupira chitadzo ichocho pamusana pechitadzo chakaitwa nomunhu iyeyo, anobva aregererwa." 
Leviticus5:11 “Kana asingakwanisi kuwana njiva mbiri kana hangaiwa dzichiri diki mbiri, ngaaunze mupiro wokupfupira chitadzo chaakaita weupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hunorema kirogiramu rimwechete hwemupiro wokupfupira. Ngaarege kuisa mafuta eorivhi kana rusenzi muupfu ihwohwo nokuti mupiro iwoyo ndowekupfupira chitadzo." 
Leviticus5:12 Ngaauye nahwo kumupristi. Mupristi ngaanokore chanza chizere chahwo chechirango apise paatari pamwechete nemipiro inoitwa zvokupisira kuna Tenzi. Iwoyu mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Leviticus5:13 Naizvozvo mupristi anofanira kumuitira mupiro wokupfupira chitadzo, chaakapara pane chimwe chaizvozvo, anobva aregererwa. Zvinosara ipapo ndezvemupristi, sezvinoitwa pamupiro wembesanwa.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus5:15 “Kana munhu akakanganisa mukusaziva aita udyire hokusapa zvinhu zvinoera zvinofanira kuripwa kuna Tenzi, anofanira kuunza mupiro wokuripa mhosva kuna Tenzi wehondohwe yomudanga make, isina chinoshoreka pairi. Iwe ndiwe unotema mutengo wayo wemari yesirivha inowirirana nemari yesirivha iya yeShekeri yomuNzvimbo Inoera. Ichochi chibayiro chemupiro wokuripa mhosva." 
Leviticus5:16 Anofanira kudzosera pakare zvinhu zvinoera zvaaifanira kunge akapa. Pazvikamu zvishanu zvakaenzana, ngapapamhidzirwe chimwechete, achipe kumupristi. Mupristi ngaamupirire chibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo nehondohwe iya yemupiro wokuripa mhosva. Chitadzo chake chonobva charegererwa." 
Leviticus5:17 “Ani naani anenge atadza mukusaziva, apara zvakarambidzwa naTenzi apara mhosva, anofanira kutakura mutoro wemhosva yake," 
Leviticus5:18 ngaaunze kune mupristi hondohwe yomudanga make, isina chinoshoreka pairi, yomutengo waunotema iwe, ive chibayiro chokuripa mhosva. Mupristi ngaamupirire chibayiro chokupfupira kukanganisa kwaakaita mukusaziva, anoregererwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Ichocho chibayiro chokuripa mhosva. Munhu iyeyo ane mhosva pana Tenzi.” 
Leviticus6:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus6:2 “Ngatiti munhu atadzira Tenzi, akatadza kuve munhu anovimbika kwaari nokunyengedza kwaanoita mumwe wake panyaya dzokubatiswa zvinhu, kana dzokuchengeteswa zvinhu, kana dzokupamba zvinhu, kana dzokuwana zvinhu kune mumwe wako nomutoo usina kunaka," 
Leviticus6:3 kana kuti owana chinhu chomumwe chakarashika, onyepa achipika zvenhema zvake nezvacho, kana sezvinongoitwa navanhu mune zvimwe zvizhinji zvavanoita vachizotadza," 
Leviticus6:4 kana munhu akanganisa achipara mhosva mukudaro, ngaadzosere zvaakapamba, kana zvaawana nechisimba, kana zvaakanga abatiswa achichengeteswa, kana chakanga charasika chaakanhonga," 
Leviticus6:5 kunyange chiya chaakatopika nezvacho zvenhema. Ngaachidzosere chakanyatsokwana, anofanira kuwedzera chikamu cheshanu pachiri achipe kumuridzi wacho musi wokupira chibayiro chake chokupfupira zvitadzo." 
Leviticus6:6 Anofanira kuuya kumupristi nomupiro wake wokuripa mhosva kuna Tenzi wehondohwe yomudanga make, isina chinoshoreka uteme mutengo wayo womupiro wenhendamurandu." 
Leviticus6:7 Mupristi anofanira kumupirira mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo pana Tenzi aregererwe.” Munhu iyeyo anoregererwa chaakakanganisa panyaya dzezvinhu zvingakanganiswe navanhu vachipara mhosva. 
Leviticus6:8 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus6:9 “Udza Aroni navanakomana vake kuti, ‘Mutemo womupiro wokupisa ndouyu: Mupiro wokupisa unofanira kurara uri pamoto, paatari, usiku hwose kusvikira mangwanani. Moto wepaatari unofanira kugara uchipfuta nguva dzose.’" 
Leviticus6:10 Mupristi anofanira kuzopfeka gemenzi rake rerineni, apfekewo bhurukwa rake romukati rerineni, ahworere dota remoto womupiro wokupisa rinenge riri paatari, ariise munyasi meatari." 
Leviticus6:11 Anozofanira kuzobvisa hanzu dzake idzodzo, apfeke dzimwe, atakure dota riya aende naro kunze kwaatendhe kunzvimbo yakachena." 
Leviticus6:12 Moto wapaatari ngaugare uchipfuta nguva dzose, musaurege uchidzima. Mupristi ngaaise huni pamoto iwoyo mangwanani oga oga, aronge nyama yomupiro wokupisa pauri, apisirepo mafuta emupiro wokuwadzana." 
Leviticus6:13 Moto wapaatari ngaurambe uchipfuta, haufanire kudzima." 
Leviticus6:14 “Mutemo womupiro wembesanwa ndouyu: vanakomana vemhuri yekwaAroni vanofanira kupira mupiro wembesanwa pana Tenzi pamberi peatari. 
Leviticus6:15 Mumwe wavo anofanira kunokora chanza chizere choupfu hwekoroni, hwakatsetseka, hwemupiro wembesanwa hwechirango, namafuta ahwo, norusenzi rwose rwuri pamupiro wembesanwa, apise paatari, kunhuhwirira kwawo kunofadza Tenzi." 
Leviticus6:16 Aroni navanakomana vemhuri yake ndovachadya zvinenge zvasara zvinofanira kudyiwa panzvimbo inoera zvisina mbiriso. Ngavadyire muruvanze rwetendhe rokusanganira. 
Leviticus6:17 Ngazvirege kubikwa nembiriso. Ndazvipa kwaari somugove wavo kubva pamipiro yangu inoitwa zvokupiswa nomoto, chinhu chinoera kwazvo sezvakaita mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, nomupiro wokuripa mhosva." 
Leviticus6:18 Varume vose vemhuri yekwaAroni ndovanobvumirwa kuzvidya, somurao unogara uripo pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose chichibva pamipiro yaTenzi inoita zvokupiswa. Ani naani anenge azvibata anobva ava munhu anoera.”" 
Leviticus6:19 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus6:20 “Mupiro uchapirwa kuna Tenzi naAroni navanakomana vemhuri yake pazuva raanogadzwa ndouyu: ngaapire marita maviri eupfu hwekoroni, hwakatsetseka semupiro wembesanwa wezuva nezuva, ahukamure nepakati, apire humwe mangwanani humwe manheru." 
Leviticus6:21 Chingwa ichocho ngachive choupfu hwakakanyiwa pamwechete namafuta, chakabikwa mupani. Ngaachimedure-medure chisasikirwe Tenzi somupiro wembesanwa, unonhuhwirira zvinomufadza." 
Leviticus6:22 Mupristi pakati pavana vaAroni anenge azodzwa kuva mupristi kutsiva Aroni, ngaaupire kuna Tenzi sechinhu chakatemwa nokusingaperi, mupiro wose iwoyo ngaupiswe." 
Leviticus6:23 Mupiro wembesanwa iwoyo womupristi ngaupiswe wose, haufaniri kudyiwa.”" 
Leviticus6:24 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus6:25 “Udza Aroni navanakomana vake kuti, ‘Mutemo womupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo ndouyu: chibayiro chemupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo ngachiurayirwe panourayirwa zvibayiro zvokupisa pamberi paTenzi.’ Mupiro iwoyo unoera kwazvo." 
Leviticus6:26 Mupristi anenge apira chibayiro ichochi chokupfupira zvitadzo ngaachidye panzvimbo inoera, muruvanze rwetendhe rokusanganira." 
Leviticus6:27 Chii zvacho chinenge chagunzvana nenyama yechibayiro ichocho chichava chinoera. Kana ropa rechibayiro ichocho rikadonhera pahanzu ngaisukirwe panoera. 
Leviticus6:28 Hari yevhu inenge yabikirwa nyama iyoyo ngaiputswe. Asi kana yabikirwa mupoto yondarira kweshai poto iyoyo muisukurudze nemvura. 
Leviticus6:29 Vanhurume vose vemhuri dzavapristi vanobvumirwa kuidya, mupiro iwoyo unoera kwazvo." 
Leviticus6:30 Hapana chibayiro chemupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo chinofanira kudyiwa kana ropa racho rambounzwa mutendhe rokusanganira kuzopfupira zvitadzo. Chibayiro ichocho chose zvacho ngachipiswe. 
Leviticus7:1 “Mutemo womupiro wokuripa mhosva ndouyu: mupiro iwoyu unoera kwazvo," 
Leviticus7:2 Panourayirwa chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa ndipo panourairwa chibayiro chomupiro wokuripa mhosva. Ropa racho ngarisaswe pamativi ose eatari. 
Leviticus7:3 Mafuta acho ose ngaapirwe pamwechete namafuta omuswe wayo, namafuta akaputira zvomukati" 
Leviticus7:4 netsvo mbiri namafuta ari pakatinginika petsvo nedivi rechiropa rakareba, nechinyama chapachiropa chaachabvisa pamwechete netsvo." 
Leviticus7:5 Mupristi ngaazvipise paatari kuna Tenzi somupiro unoita zvokupiswa, iwoyu mupiro wokuripa mhosva." 
Leviticus7:6 Vanhurume vose, vapristi ndovanobvumirwa kuudya. Ngaudyirwe panzvimbo inoera unoera kwazvo." 
Leviticus7:7 “Mupiro wokuripa mhosva, sezvakangoitawo mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, mutemo wayo mumwechete wokuti: mupristi anenge apira mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo ndiye muridzi wenyama." 
Leviticus7:8 Mupristi anenge apira munhu mupiro wokupisa, ndiye muridzi wedehwe rechipfuwo chaapira." 
Leviticus7:9 Chingwa chinenge chakabikirwa muovhoni kana chakabikirwa mupani kana kuti chinenge chakaitwa zvokusasika pamoto, chemupiro wembesanwa wose wose zvawo, ndechemupristi anenge apira mupiro iwoyo." 
Leviticus7:10 Mupiro wose wose zvawo wembesanwa, ungave zvawo weupfu hwakakanyiwa namafuta kana hwakaoma, ndewevanakomana vose vekwaAroni pasina zvokusarudza." 
Leviticus7:11 “Mutemo wezvibayiro zvemipiro yokuwadzana ingaunzwe nomunhu kuna Tenzi ndouyu: 
Leviticus7:12 Kana mupiro iwoyo uri wokutenda, ngaapire pamwechete nechibayiro chokutenda chingwa chisina mbiriso choupfu hwakakanyiwa namafuta, nechimwe chingwa chakati fatata chisina mbiriso, chakazorwa mafuta, nechimwewo chingwa cheupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa chakanyatsokanyiwa namafuta." 
Leviticus7:13 Paanounza chibayiro chake chomupiro wokuwadzana, wokutenda, ngaauyewo nechingwa chine mbiriso." 
Leviticus7:14 Pane chingwa ichocho ngaapire kuna Tenzi chingwa chimwechete pamhando, ichocho chichava chomupristi anenge asasa paatari ropa rechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana." 
Leviticus7:15 Nyama yechibayiro chomupiro wake wokuwadzana, wokutenda ngaidyiwe zuva rakarero rainenge yapirwa. Ngaarege kusiya nyama yayo kusvikira mangwana." 
Leviticus7:16 “Asi kana chibayiro chake chiri chezvaakambotsidza kupa, kana kuti uri mupiro waakasarudza kupira nomwoyo wake, ngachidyiwe musi wakarewo wachaurayiwa. Nyama inenge yasara inogona zvayo kudyiwa ramangwana acho." 
Leviticus7:17 Asi nyama yechibayiro ichocho inosara kusvikira zuva retatu ngaipiswe nomoto. 
Leviticus7:18 Kana nyama yechibayiro ichocho chomupiro wake wokuwadzana, ikangodyiwa zvayo pazuva retatu, munhu anenge aupira haazogamuchirwa, uyewo haazoonekwa sepane chaaita chakanaka, asi anenge atoita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo. Ani naani anoudya imhosva yake." 
Leviticus7:19 Nyama inenge yagunzvana nechinhu chipi nechipi zvacho chakan'ora haifanire kudyiwa, ngaipiswe nomoto. “Ani naani asina kun'ora anobvumirwa zvake kudya nyama," 
Leviticus7:20 asi munhu anodya nyama iyoyo yechibayiro chaTenzi chomupiro wokuwadzana iye aine chinhu chinon'oresa munhu, anofanira kuchekaniswa ukama novokwake." 
Leviticus7:21 Munhu anobata chinhu chakan'ora chingave chinhu chinon'oresa chiri pamunhu, kana chiri pamhuka yakan'ora kana chii zvacho chinon'oresa, chakaipa kwazvo, ozodya nyama yechibayiro chaTenzi chemipiro yokuwadzana, munhu iyeyo atozvichekanisa ukama novokwake.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Mwari akataurira Mosesi kuti," 
Leviticus7:23 “Iti kuvaIsiraeri musadye mafuta api neapi zvawo, kana emombe, kana ehwai, kana embudzi." 
Leviticus7:24 Mafuta emhuka yakafa yoga neemhuka inenge yakabvamburwa nechikara munogona zvenyu kuaitisa mamwe mabasa, asi musambofa zvenyu makaadya." 
Leviticus7:25 Ani naani anodya mafuta echibayiro chomupiro waTenzi unoita zvokupiswa atozvichekanisa ukama nevokwake. 
Leviticus7:26 Kwose kwose zvako kwamuchandogara musadye ropa, ringave reshiri kana remhuka." 
Leviticus7:27 Munhu wose zvake anodya ropa ripi neripi zvaro anofanira kuchekaniswa ukama novokwake.” 
Leviticus7:28 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus7:29 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Munhu anopira kuna Tenzi zvibayiro zvemipiro yake yokuwadzana, ngaauye nomupiro wake kuna Tenzi.’ Pachibayiro chake chokuwadzana," 
Leviticus7:30 ngaatore zvemupiro waTenzi unoita zvokupiswa, auye akazvibata mumaoko iye pachake. Ngaauye nemafuta pamwechete nechityu, avheyese chityu, achisimudzire kuna Tenzi, somupiro unosimudzirwa uchipirwa kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus7:31 Mupristi ngaapise mafuta iwayo paatari, asi chityu ndechaAroni navanakomana vemhuri yekwake." 
Leviticus7:32 Pamipiro yenyu yokuwadzana, torai chidya chorudyi mupe sechipo mupristi." 
Leviticus7:33 Chidya chorudyi ichocho ndechemwanakomana waAroni anenge apira ropa rechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana, nemafuta." 
Leviticus7:34 Ndinodaro nokuti pamipiro yavaIsiraeri yokuwadzana ndatora chityu kwaari chinenge chasimudzirwa mudenga kupa kuna Mwari, nechidya chomupiro unovheyeswa uchipirwa kwaari ndikapa mupristi Aroni navanakomana vemhuri yekwake, semugove wavo wavanofanira kugara vachipiwa navaIsiraeri.”" 
Leviticus7:35 Pakugadzwa kunoitwa Aroni navanakomana vemhuri yekwake, iwoyu ndiwo mugove wavo pamipiro yaTenzi inoita zvokupiswa musi wavanopirwa kuna Tenzi kuita basa roupristi," 
Leviticus7:36 ndizvo zvakarehwa naTenzi kuti avape zvichibva kuvaIsiraeri musi wavanogadzwa, somugove wavo wavanofanira kugara vachipiwa pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose." 
Leviticus7:37 Iwoyu ndiwo mutemo wemupiro wokupisa, nowemupiro wembesanwa, newemupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, nemupiro wokuripa mhosva, nowokugadza, nemipiro yokuwadzana," 
Leviticus7:38 wakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi pagomo reSinai, pazuva raakati vaIsiraeri vaunze mipiro yavo kuna Tenzi, zvavainge vari murenje reSinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus8:2 “Tora Aroni navanakomana vake pamwechete nehanzu namafuta okuzodza nehandira yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo nehondohwe mbiri netswanda ine chingwa chisina mbiriso," 
Leviticus8:3 uunganidze gungano rose ravanhu kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira.” 
Leviticus8:4 Mosesi akaita zvaakaudzwa naMwari, gungano rose rikaungana kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira." 
Leviticus8:5 Mosesi akataurira gungano rose achiti, “Zvandava kuita izvi, ndozvakanzi naTenzi zviitwe.”" 
Leviticus8:6 Mosesi akaunza Aroni navanakomana vake, akavashambidza nemvura." 
Leviticus8:7 Akamupfekedza hanzu refu inoda kusvika mumabvi, akamusunga mudya muchiuno. Akamupfekedzawo gemenzi, nehanzu yeefodhi akamusunga mudya wakarukwa zvakanaka kwazvo weefodhi, achimusunga muchiuno nawo." 
Leviticus8:8 Akamupfekedza nyembe dzapadundundu, akaisa machiri Urimu neTumimu." 
Leviticus8:9 Akamupfekedza ngundu mumusoro, akaisa karata kendarama, kechiremba, kanoera pangundu iyoyo nechapahuma sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Leviticus8:10 Mosesi akatora mafuta okuzodza ndokuzodza tendhe rinoera nezvose zvaivemo, achizvipira kuna Mwari." 
Leviticus8:11 Akatora mamwe acho akasasa kanomwe paatari nemidziyo yayo yose, nedhishi rokushambira nechigadzikiro charo, achizvikomborera." 
Leviticus8:12 Akadira mamwe mafuta okugadza pamusoro waAroni kumugadza achimuteketera kuna Mwari. 
Leviticus8:13 Mosesi akazounza vanakomana vaAroni akavapfekedza hanzu refu dzinoda kusvika mumabvi, akavasunga midya muchiuno, akavapfekedzawo tunguwani sokutaurirwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi." 
Leviticus8:14 Akazounza handira yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wehandira iyoyo yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Leviticus8:15 Mosesi akaiuraya, akatora ropa rayo, akanyika munwe wake muropa iroro akariisa pane zvinenge nyanga achizvitenderedza, akanatsa atari, akadururira ropa nechepasi peatari achiikumikidza kuna Mwari achiichenura." 
Leviticus8:16 Mosesi akatora mafuta ose ayo pane zvomukati nechinyama chepachiropa netsvo mbiri namafuta ari padziri, akazvipisa paatari." 
Leviticus8:17 Asi handira iyoyo nedehwe rayo, nenyama yayo, nechinzvinzvi chayo, Mosesi akandozvipisa nomoto kunze kwematendhe sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi." 
Leviticus8:18 Akazounza hondohwe yemupiro wokupisa. Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisa maoko avo pamusoro wehondohwe iyoyo. 
Leviticus8:19 Mosesi akaiuraya, akasasa ropa rayo pamativi ose eatari." 
Leviticus8:20 Mosesi akadimura-dimura hondohwe iyoyo, akapisa musoro wayo nezvidimbu izvozvo, namafuta." 
Leviticus8:21 Mosesi akasuka nemvura zvomukati nemazondo ayo, akapisa hondohwe iyoyo yose zvayo paatari somupiro wokupisa, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza, mupiro unoita zvokupiswa kuna Tenzi, sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi." 
Leviticus8:22 Mosesi akaunzawo hondohwe imwe yokugadza vapristi nayo. Aroni navanakomana vake vakaisawo maoko avo pamusoro wehondohwe iyoyo. 
Leviticus8:23 Mosesi akaiuraya akatora ropa rayo akarizora kwokupedzisira kwenzeve yokurudyi yaAroni, napachara choruoko rwake rworudyi, napachigunwe chegumbo rake rorudyi." 
Leviticus8:24 Vanakomana vaAroni vakaunzwawo, Mosesi akavazora ropa kwokupedzisira kwenzeve dzavo dzokurudyi, napazvara zvamaoko avo okurudyi, nepazvigunwe zvemakumbo avo okurudyi. Mosesi akasasa ropa pamativi ose eatari." 
Leviticus8:25 Akatora mafuta nemuswe, wakakora, nemafuta ose akaputira zvomukati, nechinyama chepachiropa nemafuta ari padziri, netsvo mbiri nechidya chokurudyi." 
Leviticus8:26 Mutswanda yezvingwa zvisina mbiriso zvaiva pana Tenzi, akatora chingwa chimwe chisina mbiriso, nechimwe cheupfu hwakakanywa nemafuta, nechimwe chakati fatata akazviisa pamusoro pemanda napamusoro pechidya chokurudyi." 
Leviticus8:27 Mosesi akapa Aroni navanakomana vake izvozvo zvose. Vakazvibata mumaoko avo, vakazvisimudza vachizviita mupiro unosimudzirwa kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus8:28 Mosesi akazvitora mumaoko avo akazvipisa paatari pamwechete nomupiro wokupisa somupiro wokugadza mupristi, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza, iwoyu mupiro unoita zvokupiswa kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus8:29 Mosesi akatora chityu akachisimudza achiita mupiro unosimudzirwa kuna Tenzi. Ichochi ndochaiva chityu chehondohwe chakapiwa Mosesi pamugove wehondohwe yokugadza, sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi." 
Leviticus8:30 Mosesi akatora mamwe mafuta okuzodza nerimwe ropa raiva paatari akasasa Aroni nehanzu dzake, akasasawo vanakomana vake nehanzu dzavo. Naizvozvo akazvipira kuna Mwari, Aroni nehanzu dzake, pamwechete navanakomana vake." 
Leviticus8:31 Mosesi akataurira Aroni navanakomana vake achiti, “Bikirai nyama yehondohwe iyi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, muidyire ikoko pamwechete nechingwa chiri mutswanda yemipiro yokugadza sokutaura kwandakamboita ndichiti, ‘Aroni navanakomana vake vanofanira kuidya.’" 
Leviticus8:32 Zvinenge zvasarapo, nyama nechingwa, ngazvipiswe nomoto." 
Leviticus8:33 Musambobuda zvenyu pamusuo wetendhe rokusanganira kwamazuva manomwe, kusvikira mazuva okugadzwa kwenyu apera nokuti kugadzwa kwenyu kunotora mumazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus8:34 Zvaitwa nhasi uno izvi, ndozvakanzi naTenzi zviitwe, kupfupira zvitadzo zvenyu." 
Leviticus8:35 Munofanira kuramba muri kumuso wetendhe rokusanganira, siku nesikati, kwamazuva manomwe, muchiita zvinorehwa naTenzi, mungadaro mukafa nokuti ndozvandakaudzwa.”" 
Leviticus8:36 Naizvozvo Aroni navanokomana vake vakaita zvose zvakarehwa naTenzi achizvitaura nomuromo waMosesi. 
Leviticus9:1 Pazuva rorusere Mosesi akakokera Aroni navanakomana vake, navakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri kuti vauye," 
Leviticus9:2 akati kuna Aroni, “Zvitorere chimhuru chomukono yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, nehondohwe yomupiro wokupisa, dzose dziri mbiri ngadzive dzisina chinoshoreka padziri, udzipire kuna Tenzi," 
Leviticus9:3 utaurire vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Torai gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo nemhuru, nehwayana dzose dziri mbiri dzive dzine gore rimwechete, dzisina chinoshoreka padziri dzomupiro wokupisa.’" 
Leviticus9:4 Mutorewo nzombe nehondohwe zvomupiro wokuwadzana, zvokubayira kuna Tenzi pamwechete nomupiro wembesanwa wakasanganiswa nemafuta, nokuti nhasi uno Mwari achazviratidza kwamuri.”" 
Leviticus9:5 VaIsiraeri vakaunza zvose zvakarayirwa naMosesi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, vose vakauya vakasvikomira pana Tenzi." 
Leviticus9:6 Mosesi akati, “Izvozvi ndizvo zvakanzi naTenzi muite. Kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kuchazviratidza kwamuri.”" 
Leviticus9:7 Mosesi akati kuna Aroni, “Chienda kuatari upire mupiro wako wokupfupira zvitadzo, nomupiro wako wokupisa upfupire zvitadzo zvako, nevemba yako, upirire vanhu mupiro, sokureva kwaTenzi.”" 
Leviticus9:8 Aroni akaenda kuatari akandouraya chimhuru chomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvake. 
Leviticus9:9 Vanakomana vaAroni vakamuigira ropa rayo. Akanyika munwe wake muropa iroro akarizora pane zvinenge nyanga zviri paatari, akateurira ropa iroro nechapasi peatari." 
Leviticus9:10 Mafuta ayo neitsvo nechinyama chapachiropa zvomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo akazvipisa paatari sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Leviticus9:11 Nyama nedehwe rayo akandozvipisa nomoto kunze kwematendhe. 
Leviticus9:12 Aroni akauraya chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa. Vanakomana vake vakamuigira ropa racho akarisasa pamativi ose eatari. 
Leviticus9:13 Vakamugamuchidza chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa, chidimbu nechidimbu chacho, nomusoro wacho akazvipisa paatari." 
Leviticus9:14 Akasuka zvomukati namazondo akazvipisa paatari pamwechete nomupiro wokupisa. 
Leviticus9:15 Akauya nomupiro wavanhu. Akatora mbudzi iyoyo yavanhu yezvitadzo, akaiuraya achiipira kupfupira zvitadzo, seyokutanga iya." 
Leviticus9:16 Akaunzazve chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa akachipira maererano nezviri pamurao. 
Leviticus9:17 Akauya noupfu hwomupiro wembesanwa, akanokora chanza chizere chahwo, akapisa paatari, kunyange zvazvo kwainge kwapirwa mupiro wokupisa wamangwanani." 
Leviticus9:18 Akauraya nzombe iya nehondohwe iya, zvibayiro zvemipiro yokuwadzana yavanhu, vanakomana vaAroni vakamuvigira ropa, akarisasa pamativi ose eatari." 
Leviticus9:19 Mafuta enzombe neehondohwe pamwechete nomuswe wayo wakakora namafuta akaputira zvomukati, netsvo, nechinyama chepachiropa" 
Leviticus9:20 akaisawo mafuta pamusoro pezvityu, akapisa paatari." 
Leviticus9:21 Asi zvityu nechidya chokurudyi akazvisimudzira somupiro kuna Tenzi sezvakanga zvarehwa naMosesi. 
Leviticus9:22 Aroni akasimudzira maoko ake kuvanhu, akavapa chikomborero, akaburuka paaipira mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, nomupiro wokupisa nomupiro wokuwadzana." 
Leviticus9:23 Mosesi naAroni vakapinda mutendhe rokusanganira, pavakabudamo vakapa vanhu chikomborero, kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kukaonekwa navanhu vose." 
Leviticus9:24 Pakarepo moto wakabva kuna Tenzi ukaroromesa mupiro wokupisa pamwechete namafuta aiva paatari. Vanhu vose pavakazviona vakadaidzira vakati pasi zvambarara. 
Leviticus10:1 Nadhabhu naAbhihu vanakomana vaAroni vakatora mabisiro avo vakaisa maari moto, vakamwaya rusenzi pamusoro pawo vakapira kuna Tenzi, moto usiri pamutemo, usiriwo wakanga wanzi naTenzi upirwe." 
Leviticus10:2 Pakarepo moto wakabva kuna Tenzi ukavaparadza, vakafira pana Tenzi ipapo." 
Leviticus10:3 Mosesi akataurira Aroni achiti, “Hezvoka! Handiti ndizvo zvakamboreva Mwari achiti, ‘Ndicharatidza vanhu vose vanouya kwandiri kuti ini ndinoera uyewo vanhu vose vachandiremekedza.’ ” Asi Aroni akadumbirwa nazvo akapererwa neromuromo." 
Leviticus10:4 Mosesi akadaidza Mishaeri naErizafani vanakomana vaUzieri babamudiki waAroni akati, “Uyai kuno mubvise vakoma venyu munzvimbo inoera muende kunze kwematendhe.”" 
Leviticus10:5 Naizvozvo vakauya vakavatakura vakapfeka hanzu dzavo dzinenge dzoda kusvika mumabvi, vakaenda navo kunze kwematendhe." 
Leviticus10:6 Mosesi akarayira Aroni navanakomana vake Ereaza naItama achiti, “Musarege vhudzi renyu richiti bvuru-bvuru, kana kubvarura zvako hanzu dzenyu mungadaro mukafa, uyewo gungano rose ringavirukirwe nehasha dzaMwari. Kana zviri zvehama dzenyu idzi, gungano rose ravaIsiraeri, ngaricheme zvaro kuparadzwa kwavakaitwa nomoto wakapiswa naTenzi." 
Leviticus10:7 Musambobva pamusuo wetendhe rokusanganira mungadaro mukafa nokuti imi makagadzwa pamakazodzwa mafuta aTenzi.” Naizvozvo vakaita sokuudzwa kwavakaitwa naMosesi. 
Leviticus10:8 Tenzi akataurira Aroni achiti," 
Leviticus10:9 “Iwe navanakomana vako musanwe waini kana doro kana mopinda mutendhe rokusanganira, mungadaro mukafa. Iwoyu murao uchagara uripo pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose." 
Leviticus10:10 Munofanira kusiyanisa zvinhu zvinoera nezvinhu zvisingaeri, zvinhu zvakan'ora nezvinhu zvisina kun'ora." 
Leviticus10:11 Dzidzisai vaIsiraeri mirao yose yandakataura kwavari nomuromo waMosesi.” 
Leviticus10:12 Mosesi akataurira Aroni navanakomana vake vaviri vakanga vasara vainzi Ereaza naItamaru achiti, “Torai zvokudya zvomupiro wembesanwa zvinenge zvasara pamupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto kuna Tenzi, muzvidyire pedyo neatari zvisina mbiriso nokuti zvinoera kwazvo." 
Leviticus10:13 Udyirei panzvimbo inoera, nokuti ndiwo mugove wako, navanakomana vako wakatorwa pamupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto kuna Tenzi, nokuti ndizvo zvandakaudzwa naMwari." 
Leviticus10:14 Asi chityu chomupiro unosimudzirwa uchipirwa kuna Tenzi, nechidya chinenge chapirwa, iwe navana vako vakomana navasikana unogona zvako, kuzvidyira panzvimbo inoera, nokuti izvozvi zvakapiwa iwe navanakomana vako somugove wenyu, zvichibva pamipiro yokuwadzana yavaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus10:15 Chidya chinopirwa Mwari, nechityu chemupiro unosimudzwa mudenga uchipirwa kuna Tenzi, ngavauye nazvo pamwechete nomupiro wamafuta unoita zvokupiswa nomoto kuna Tenzi kuzopira mupiro unosimudzirwa kuna Tenzi. Ndozvinozova mugove wako pamwechete navanakomana vako, uchagara uripo narinhi wose sezvakarehwa naTenzi.”" 
Leviticus10:16 Mosesi akafeya-feya nezvembudzi yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, wanei kuti yakanga yatopiswa kare, akabva ashatirirwa Ereaza naItamaru akati," 
Leviticus10:17 “Seiko musina kudyira mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo panzvimbo inoera? Inga iwoyu mupiro unoera kwazvo. Handiti makaupirwa kuti mubvise zvakaipa zvegungano irori muchizvipfupira pana Tenzi. 
Leviticus10:18 Hamuonewo here kuti ropa rayo harina kunge raunzwa mukati munzvimbo inoera, mungadai matodyira munzvimbo inoera, sezvandakareva.”" 
Leviticus10:19 Aroni ndokuti kana Mosesi, “Inga nhasi uno chaiye vanhu vapira kuna Tenzi mupiro wavo wokupfupira zvitadzo nomupiro wavo wokupisa kunyange zvavo vadaro, hezvika izvi zvandiwira izvi. Zvino dai ndadya mupiro iwoyo wokupirira zvitadzo nhasi, ndopazvaizogamuchirwawo naTenzi here?”" 
Leviticus10:20 Mosesi akazvinzwa akagutsikana nazvo. 
Leviticus11:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti kwavari," 
Leviticus11:2 “Taurirai vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Idzi ndidzo mhuka dzamungadye zvenyu pamhuka dzose dziri panyika.’" 
Leviticus11:3 Mungadye zvenyu mhuka ine tsimba rakanyatsopararana, dzinenge dziri mhuka dzinozeya." 
Leviticus11:4 Asi dzinongozeya chete kana dzinongova netsimba rakapararana chete musadzidye sengamera inozeya asi haina matsimba akapararana. 
Leviticus11:5 Musadye nembirawo kunyange zvayo ichizeya haina tsimba rakapararana, yakan'ora kwamuri," 
Leviticus11:6 netsuro, kunyange zvayo ichizeya haina tsimba rakapararana, yakan'ora kwamuri," 
Leviticus11:7 nenguruve kunyange zvayo iine tsimba rakanyatsopararana haizeye, yakan'ora kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:8 Musadye mhuka idzodzi kana kubata zvitunha zvadzo nokuti dzakan'ora kwamuri. 
Leviticus11:9 “Pana zvose zvomumvura zvine zvimbi namakwande zvingave zvomugungwa kana murwizi mungadye zvenyu. 
Leviticus11:10 Asi zvose zvisina zvimbi namakwande zvomugungwa nomurwizi zvose zvazvo zvinoita bvakanyira mumvura nezvipenyu zvose zviri mumvura musadye zvose izvozvo, zvakaipa kwazvo kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:11 Kwamuri, zvakaipa kwazvo, musadye nyama yazvo kana kubata zvako zvitunha zvazvo." 
Leviticus11:12 Zvose zvomumvura zvisina zvimbi namakwande zvakaipa kwazvo kwamuri. 
Leviticus11:13 “Pashiri dzose, idzi ndidzo shiri dzakan'ora kwamuri, hadzifanire kudyiwa, dzakaipa kwazvo kwamuri, kunoti: gondo negora nechapungu" 
Leviticus11:14 nenjerere nakarukodzi nemhando dzako 
Leviticus11:15 nemhando dzose dzemakunguo," 
Leviticus11:16 jichidza, nemazizi neshiri yegungwa namarudzi ose oruvangu," 
Leviticus11:17 kouya zizi nekondo, nejambwa" 
Leviticus11:18 nenhapata nesvorenyama nehungwe," 
Leviticus11:19 neshuramurove nemhando dzose dzeshirichena nemhupupu nomuremwaremwa. 
Leviticus11:20 Tupukanana twose tunobhururuka, tunogara turi gurusvusvu tuine makumbo mana twakan'ora kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:21 Asi tunhu twose tunobhururuka tuine makumbo mana tune mamwe makumbo eshure okusvetukisa idyai zvenyu. 
Leviticus11:22 Mungadye zvenyu mhando dzose dzehwiza, nemhando dzose dzemhashumapfunde nedzemakurwe nedzezvitaunhau." 
Leviticus11:23 Asi tumwewo tupukanana twose tunenge tuchingova namakumbo mana chete twakan'ora kwamuri. 
Leviticus11:24 “Zvinhu zvinon'oresa munhu ndeizvi: munhu anenge agunzva zvitunha zvazvo achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. 
Leviticus11:25 Ani naani zvake anenge atakura kai zvako kechitunha chazvo ngaasuke hanzu dzake; achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. 
Leviticus11:26 Mhuka yose zvayo inenge iine tsimba rakapararana asi asina kubva anyatsopararana kana kuti isingazeyi yakan'ora kwamuri. Asi ani naani anobata chitunha chayo achava munhu akan'ora. 
Leviticus11:27 Mhuka dzose dzina makumbo mana, dzina matsimba akapfava dzakan'ora kwamuri. Munhu anenge abata zvitunha zvadzo, achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke." 
Leviticus11:28 Ani naani anotakura chitunha chadzo, anofanira kusuka hanzu dzake, achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. Izvozvo zvakan'ora kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:29 “Utwu nditwo tupuka twakan'ora kwamuri pakati petupuka twose tunoita bvakanyira panyika, kunoti nhuta nembeva nomupurwa nemarudzi awo ose nechipotanemadziro," 
Leviticus11:30 gwavava, nedzvinyu, chipfira nerwaivhi." 
Leviticus11:31 Izvozvi zvakan'ora kwamuri pakati pezvose zvinoita bvakanyira. Ani zvake anenge abata zvitunha zvazvo, achava akan'ora kudzamara zuva ridoke." 
Leviticus11:32 Kana chitunha chazvo chikaputsikira pane chinhu chipi nechipi zvacho, chinhu ichocho chaton'ora chingave chakaitwa mudziyo upi noupi wokuitisa basa. Ngachinyikwe mumvura, chichava chakan'ora kudzamara manheru chazova chachenurwa." 
Leviticus11:33 Mumudziyo wevhu upi noupi zvawo machinenge chadonhera, zvose zvinenge zvirimo zvaton'ora, putsai mudziyo iwoyo." 
Leviticus11:34 Zvokudya zvinenge zvadirwa mvura yabva mumudziyo iwoyo zvaton'ora chero chokunwa chinenge chirimo chaton'orawo. 
Leviticus11:35 Chinhu chipi nechipi zvacho chinenge chinowirwa nekai zvako kechitunha chazvo chaton'ora, kunyange ikava hari kana choto ngachiputswe-putswe, chan'ora, ngachive chinhu chakan'ora kwamuri." 
Leviticus11:36 Asi chitubu kana tsime rine mvura harin'ore, asi chipi nechipi zvacho chinobatana nechitunha chacho chichava chinhu chakan'ora." 
Leviticus11:37 Kana kai zvako kechitunha chazvo kakadonhera pambeu dzokudyara dzipi nedzipi zvadzo dzinodyarwa hadzin'ore. 
Leviticus11:38 Asi kana kai zvako kechitunha chazvo kakadonhera pambeu dzakaiswa mvura dzichava dzakan'ora. 
Leviticus11:39 “Kana mhuka inodyiwa ikafa, ani naani anoibata chitunha chayo, achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke," 
Leviticus11:40 Munhu anodya nyama yayo, ngaasuke hanzu dzake, achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. Munhu anotakura chitunha chayo ngaasuke hanzu dzake, achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke," 
Leviticus11:41 tupuka twose tunomomana panyika twakaipa kwazvo, ngaturege kudyiwa." 
Leviticus11:42 Zvose zvinozvova napasi, nezvose zvinofamba namakumbo mana kana zvina makumbo akawanda, zvose zvazvo zvinomomana panyika, musadye nokuti zvakaipa kwazvo." 
Leviticus11:43 Musazviipise nezvinhu zvakawanda-wanda izvi zvinomomana. Musazvisvibise nazvo nokuti mungadaro mukazvin'oresa. 
Leviticus11:44 Ndinodaro nokuti ini Tenzi, ndini Mwari wenyu zvisarudzei kuva vangu, muve vatsvene nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene. Musazvin'orese nezvipi nezvipi zvazvo zvakawanda-wanda zvinomomana panyika." 
Leviticus11:45 Ndinodaro nokuti ndini Tenzi ndakakuuyisai kuno, kubva kunyika yeIjipiti, kuti ndive Mwari wenyu. Saka ivai vatsvene nokuti ini ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus11:46 “Iwoyu ndiwo mutemo wezvemhuka neshiri nezvose zvipenyu zvinofamba mumvura nezvose zvinoita gurusvusvu panyika," 
Leviticus11:47 wokuti mugone kusiyanisa nawo zvakan'ora nezvisina kun'ora nokusiyanisawo zvinhu zvipenyu zvingadyiwe nezvinhu zvipenyu zvisingadyiwi.” 
Leviticus12:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti, “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti," 
Leviticus12:2 ‘Kana munhukadzi akabata pamuviri, akapona mwana mukomana, achava munhu akan'ora kwamazuva manomwe, sezvaanongoita kana ari panguva yake yokutevera achava akan'ora.’" 
Leviticus12:3 Pazuva rorusere, mwana iyeyo ngaadzingiswe." 
Leviticus12:4 Zvinotora makumi matatu emazuva ane mazuva matatu kuti makadzi iyeyo achenurwe pauzvere hwake. Ngaarege kubata chinhu chinoera kana kupinda mutendhe rinoera kusvikira mazuva okuchenurwa kwake apera. 
Leviticus12:5 Kana mudzimai apona mwana womusikana achava munhu akan'ora kwamazuva gumi namana, sezvinoita mukadzi kana ari panguva yake yokutevera. Zvinotora makumi matanhatu emazuva ane mazuva matanhatu kuti mukadzi iyeyo achenurwe pauzvere hwake." 
Leviticus12:6 “Kana mazuva okuchenurwa kwake apera mukadzi akapona mwana mukomana kana musikana, ngaaunze kumupristi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira hwayana ine gore rimwechete yomupiro wokupisa, naman'ana ehangaiwa kana njiva yemupiro wokupirira zvichitadzo." 
Leviticus12:7 Mupristi ngaapire kuna Tenzi mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvomukadzi iyeyo, achabva achenurwa pauzvere hwake. Iwoyu ndiwo mutemo wezvemukadzi anenge asununguka mwana mukomana kana musikana." 
Leviticus12:8 Kana asingakwanisi kuwana hwayana, ngaauye nenjiva mbiri, kana man'ana ehangaiwa. Imwe ngaive yemupiro wokupisa, imwe yacho ive yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. Ipapo mupristi ngaapire kuna Mwari mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvomukadzi iyeyo, achabva achenurwa.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Leviticus13:2 “Kana paganda romunhu paine pakazvimba kana kuti paine pakatushuka kana kuti paine vara zvigozobvapo zvoita zvisasa pamuviri wake, ngaaunzwe kune mupristi wemhuri yekwaAroni." 
Leviticus13:3 Mupristi ngaaongorore pakazvimba ipapo. Kana aona mvere dzakachenuruka chirwere chacho chakadzika kupfuura ganda rake, chirwere chamapere. Kana mupristi apedza kuongorora ganda romunhu iyeyo, ngaachimuti ava munhu akan'ora." 
Leviticus13:4 Asi kana pakazvimba ipapo pakangochenuruka, pachingova muganda rake chete pasina kupinda munyama, uyewo mvere dzapo dzisina kuchenuruka, mupristi ngaise munhu iyeyo ane chirwere pake oga kwemazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:5 Pazuva rechinomwe mupristi ngaamuongororezve, mumaonero ake kana akaona kuti chirwere chiya chichiripo hachinawo kupararira neganda rake, mupristi ngaaise murwere iyeyo pake oga kwemamwe mazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:6 Pazuva rechinomwe mupristi ngaamuongorore zvakare. Kana paiva nechirwere pacho pasviba-sviba, chirwere chisina kupararira neganda, mupristi ngaachimuti wachenurwa, kwanga kuri kuzvimbawo zvako. Munhu iyeyo ngaasuke hanzu dzake ave munhu akachenurwa." 
Leviticus13:7 Asi kana matuzu acho apararira neganda iye akambozvirakidza kumupristi kuti achenurwe, ngaazviratidze zvakare kumupristi." 
Leviticus13:8 Mupristi ngaongororezve kana akaona kuti matuzu acho apararira neganda, ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora, chinenge chiri chirwere chamapere." 
Leviticus13:9 “Kana munhu aine chirwere chamapere ngaaunzwe kumupristi," 
Leviticus13:10 mupristi aongorore. Kana paganda rake paine pakazvimba pakachenuruka, uyewo mvere dzepo dzakachenuruka paine urwa," 
Leviticus13:11 chinenge chiri chirwere chamapere chendambirira. Mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora. Ngaachirega zvake kumuisa pake oga achida kuzomuongorora nokuti atova munhu akan'ora. 
Leviticus13:12 Kana chirwere chamapere ichocho chapararira neganda rake, muviri wake wose kubvira kumakumbo kusvika kumusoro, somuonero omupristi," 
Leviticus13:13 mupristi ngaaongorore. Kana mupristi akaona kuti chirwere ichocho chezvisasa chapararira nomuviri wose ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akachenurwa pachirwere ichocho. Mapere acho ose anenge achena, saka ava munhu akachenurwa." 
Leviticus13:14 Asi paanoonekwa aine ronda rakati nyechu, munhu iyeyo munhu akan'ora." 
Leviticus13:15 Mupristi ngaaongorore ronda rakanyechuka iroro, ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora. Ronda rinenge ranyechuka rakan'ora nokuti chirwere chamapere." 
Leviticus13:16 Asi kana ronda racho rikazosanduka zvakare, rochenuruka, ngaauye kumupristi." 
Leviticus13:17 Mupristi ngaamuongorore, kana pane chirwere pacho pakachenuruka mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti murwere iyeyo achenurwa ava munhu akachenurwa." 
Leviticus13:18 “Kana paganda romunhu pakamboita mota, rikapora zvaro," 
Leviticus13:19 asi paiva nemota ipapo pakazochenuruka nokuzvimba, kana kuti pakava nevara rakatsvukuruka nokuchenuruka, izvozvo ngazviratidzwe kumupristi." 
Leviticus13:20 Mupristi ngaaongorore. Kana akaona kuti rakadzika kupfuura ganda mvere dzepo dzachenuruka, mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora. Ichocho chirwere chamapere chinenge chanyuka nepamota." 
Leviticus13:21 Asi kana mupristi akaongorora akaona mvere dzepo dzisina kuchenuruka, pasinawo kudzika kupfuura ganda pakangosvibasviba kuchenuruka, mupristi ngaamugarise kwake oga kwamazuva monomwe." 
Leviticus13:22 Asi kana zvapararira neganda, mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora, chirwere ichocho." 
Leviticus13:23 Asi kana zvikaramba zviri panzvimbo imwechete zvisingapararire zvinenge zviri vanga rakasiyiwa nemota chete. Mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akachenurwa. 
Leviticus13:24 “Kana muviri une ronda rokutsva paganda kana ronda rokutsva iroro rikazova duzu rakachenuruka kana rakatsvukuruka," 
Leviticus13:25 mupristi ngaariongorore. Kana mvere dzepo dzakachenuruka richiratidza kuti rakadzika kupfuura ganda chinenge chava chirwere chamapere chanyuka nomuronda routsva. Mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora chirwere chamapere ichocho. 
Leviticus13:26 Asi kana mupristi akariongorora akaona mvere dzepo dzisina kuchenuruka pasina kudzika kupfuura ganda asi pakangosvibasviba, mupristi ngaamugarise pake onga kwamazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:27 Pazuva rechinomwe mupristi ngaadzokorore kumuongorora. Kana zvichipararira neganda, mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora; chirwere chamapere ichocho." 
Leviticus13:28 Asi kana vara iroro rakachenuruka rikaramba riri panzvimbo imwechete risina kupararira neganda rakangozvibasviba, kunenge kuchingova zvako kuzviiba kwakasiyiwa neronda routsva. Mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo haana kun'ora nokuti rinongova vanga rakasiyiwa neronda rokutsva." 
Leviticus13:29 “Kana munhurume kana munhukadzi aine chironda mumusoro kana pachirebvu," 
Leviticus13:30 mupristi ngaaongorore chironda ichocho. Kana chichinge chakadzika kupfuura ganda, vhudzi repo rakachenuruka rakaserekana chisasa chacho chirwere chamapere, chomumusoro kana kuti chapachirebvu. Mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora." 
Leviticus13:31 Kana mupristi akaongorora chisasa ichocho akaona kuti hachina kudzika kupfuura ganda vhudzi repo risina kuserekana, ngaamugarise pake oga kwamazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus13:32 Pazuva rechinomwe mupristi ngaadzokorore kuongorora chisasa ichocho. Kana akaona chisina kupararira, vhudzi repo risina kutsvukuruka, chisina kudzika kupfuura ganda," 
Leviticus13:33 munhu iyeyo ngaazviveure kusiya riri pachisasa. Mupristi ngaamugarisezve kwake oga kwamazuva manomwe. 
Leviticus13:34 Pazuva rechinomwe mupristi ngaaongororezve chisasa chiya. Kana chichinge chisina kupararira, chisina kudzika kupfuura ganda ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo achenurwa. Munhu iyeyo ngaasuke hanzu dzake, achave munhu akachenurwa." 
Leviticus13:35 Asi kana akambonzi haana kun'ora chisasa chiya chikazopararira neganda," 
Leviticus13:36 mupristi ngaamuongororezve. Kana chisasa ichocho chapararira neganda, mupristi ngaarege zvake kuswerombotsvaka vhudzi rakatsvukuruka, munhu iyeyo akan'ora." 
Leviticus13:37 Asi pakuona kwake kana chisasa chiya chisina kupararira, paine vhudzi dema rakamerapo anobva aziva kuti chisasa ichocho chakapora. Mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akachenurwa." 
Leviticus13:38 “Ngatitii murume kana mukadzi ana mavara akachenuruka paganda romuviri wake," 
Leviticus13:39 mupristi ngaaongorore. Kana mavara iwayo apaganda romuviri wake asina kunyatsochenuruka anongova mavara zvawo anenge anyuka paganda. Munhu iyeyo haana kun'ora. 
Leviticus13:40 “Kana vhudzi romunhu richipera kudonha mumusoro wake ava nemhanza asi haana kun'ora. 
Leviticus13:41 Kana vhudzi romunhu rikapera kudonha nechepahuma kana pamapfeka, munhu iyeyo anongova nemhanza chete, haana kun'ora." 
Leviticus13:42 Asi kana pamhanza iyoyo kana pamapfeka pakaita kavara kakatsvukuruka nokuchenuruka chirwere chamapere chiri kutangisa pamhanza yake kana kuti pamapfeka. 
Leviticus13:43 Mupristi ngaamuongorore kana akaona pakazvimba paine vara rakatsvukuruka nokuchenuruka pamhanza yake kana pamapfeka zvinenge zvakaita sechirwere chamapere paganda romuviri womunhu," 
Leviticus13:44 munhu iyeyo anenge ava nechirwere chamapere, ava munhu akan'ora. Mupristi ngaanyatsotaura pachena kuti munhu iyeyo ava munhu akan'ora, chirwere chacho chiri mumusoro wake." 
Leviticus13:45 “Munhu ane chirwere chamapere ngaapfeke marengenya, arege vhudzi rake rakaita jakuchichi, afukidze chirebvu chake adaidzire achiti, ‘Ndakan'ora! Ndakan'ora!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Achagara ari munhu akan'ora panguva yose yaanenge aine chirwere ichocho. Munhu akan'ora kwaanogara ngaagare ari oga, kwaanogara kunze kwematendhe." 
Leviticus13:47 “Kana pahanzu yomunhu paine mavara echiundudzi ingave hanzu yewuru kana yerineni," 
Leviticus13:48 kana pajira rakarukwa nerineni kana newuru kana padehwe, kana pachinhu chipi zvacho chakagadzirwa nedehwe," 
Leviticus13:49 kana mavara acho akasvibira kana kutsvukuruka achioneka pahanzu yakarukwa nerineni kana newuru, kana kutsvukuruka, chiundudzi. Mupristi ngaaratidzwe mavara iwayo." 
Leviticus13:50 Mupristi ngaaongorore chiundudzi ichocho agoisa chinhu ichocho chine chiundudzi pacho choga kwamazuva manomwe. 
Leviticus13:51 Pazuva rechinomwe ngaadzokorore kuongorora chiundudzi chiya. Kana mavara echiundudzi chiya apararira nehanzu yakarukwa nerineni kana newuru kana yedehwe kunyange richishandiswa basa rei zvaro, chiundudzi chendambirira chakan'ora." 
Leviticus13:52 Mupristi ngaapise hanzu iyoyo yakarukwa yewuru kana yejira nerineni kana chinhu chakagadzirwa nedehwe nokuti chine chiundudzi chakaipisisa kwazvo chinopararira. Ngachipiswe nomoto. 
Leviticus13:53 “Asi kana mupristi akaiongorora akaona kuti chiundudzi chiya hachina kupararira nehanzu iya yakarukwa nerineni kana newuru kana chii zvacho chedehwe 
Leviticus13:54 mupristi ngaati hanzu iyoyo isukwe imboiswa payo yoga kwamamwe mazuva manomwe. 
Leviticus13:55 Mupristi ngaaongorore hanzu iya yakambosukwa. Kana akaona chiundudzi chacho chisina kupararira, uye ruvara rwacho rusina kusanduka, hanzu iyoyo yakan'ora. Kunyange chiundudzi chacho chiri nechemberi kana seri kwehanzu iyoyo ngaipiswe nomoto." 
Leviticus13:56 “Asi kana mupristi paanochiongorora, akaona chiundudzi ichocho chakambosukwa chabhuruvara ngaabvarure abvise panga paine chiundudzi, pahanzu yakarukwa nerineni kana newuru, kana padehwe." 
Leviticus13:57 Asi kana chiundudzi ichocho chikamukirira pahanzu iyoyo, yakarukwa kana yedehwe chichipararira nehanzu iyoyo ipisei nomoto." 
Leviticus13:58 Asi hanzu iyoyo yakarukwa nerineni kana newuru kana chimwe chinhu zvacho chedehwe chamuchasuka chichisara chisisina chiundudzi ngachisukwe rwechipiri chichava chisina kun'ora. 
Leviticus13:59 “Uyu ndiwoyu murao wezvechiundudzi chinenge chava pahanzu yakarukwa yewuru kana yerineni, kana pane chii zvacho chakagadzirwa nedehwe kuti pagoonekwa kana chiri chakan'ora kana chisina kun'ora.”" 
Leviticus14:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus14:2 “Uyu ndiwo murao wemunhu ane chirwere chamapere pazuva raanochenurwa, ngaaunzwe kumupristi." 
Leviticus14:3 Mupristi ngaaende naye kunze kwematendhe amuongorore kana chirwere chamapere chiya chapora," 
Leviticus14:4 mupristi ngaati paunzwe shiri mbiri dzisina kun'ora nechimuti chomusidhari netambo tsvuku nekabazi komuhisopi. 
Leviticus14:5 Mupristi ngaati shiri imwe iurayirwe nechapamusoro pehari yevhu ine mvura yakanaka yakachena. 
Leviticus14:6 Ngaatore shiri mhenyu pamwechete nechimuti chomusidhari netambo tsvuku nekabazi komuhisopi azvinyike pamwechete muropa reshiri iya yaurayirwa pamusoro pehari yevhu ine mvura yakanaka yakachena. 
Leviticus14:7 Mupristi ngaasase ropa iroro kanomwe pamunhu uya anenge achenurwa pachirwere chamapere. Mupristi ngaataure pachena kuti haachisina kun'ora. Ipapo ngaabhururutse shiri mhenyu iya itetereke zvayo nesango. 
Leviticus14:8 Nyakuchenurwa iyeyo ngaasuke hanzu dzake aveure vhudzi nemvere dzomuviri wose ashambe nemvura. Saka achava munhu akachenurwa. Angachizodzokera hake kumatendhe asi anofanira kugara kunze kwetendhe rake kwamazuva manomwe. 
Leviticus14:9 Pazuva rechinomwe ngaaveurezve musoro wake nendebvu netsiye nevhudzi rose romuviri wake. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake nomuviri wake, ipapo achava munhu achenurwa." 
Leviticus14:10 “Pazuva rorusere ngaaunze hwayana, hono mbiri nedunzvi rehwai dzisina chinoshoreka padziri dzine gore rimwechete namakirogiramu matatu eupfu hwakanywa namafuta eorivhi uye mafuta eorivhi anokwana chikamu chepakati nepakati cherita." 
Leviticus14:11 Mupristi iyeyo ari kuchenura munhu ngaaise munhu iyeyo nezvinhu izvi pana Tenzi pamusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. 
Leviticus14:12 Mupristi ngaatore hwayana hono pamwechete namafuta anokwana chikamu chepakati nepakati cherita apire Mwari mupiro wokutsiva chakatadzwa. Ngaaite mupiro unosumudzwa uchipirwa Mwari. 
Leviticus14:13 Ngaaurayire hwayana iyoyo panzvimbo paya panourayirwa zvibayiro zvomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo nomupiro wokupisa panzvimbo inoera. Chibayiro chomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo ndechomupristi sezvakangoitawo chibayiro chomupiro wokuripa mhosva. Chinoera kwazvo. 
Leviticus14:14 Mupristi ngaatore ropa rehwayana yomupiro wokuripa mhosva arizore kwokupedzesera kwenzeve yokurudyi yomunhu ari kuchenurwa nepachara chechanza chake chokurudyi nepachigunwe chake chikuru chetsoka yake yokurudyi. 
Leviticus14:15 Mupristi ngaadururire mafuta eorivhi muchanza chake iye pachake choruboshwe. 
Leviticus14:16 Ngaanyike munwe wake wokurudyi mumafuta iwayo ari muchanza chake choruboshwe, aasase kanomwe mutendhe rinoera pana Tenzi." 
Leviticus14:17 Mafuta anenge asara ari muchanza chomupristi ngaazore kuwedzera paropa romupiro wokuripa mhosva kwokupedzesera kwenzeve yokurudyi yomunhu ari kuchenurwa nepachigunwe chake chokurudyi. 
Leviticus14:18 Mafuta ose anenge asara ari muchanza chake ngaadire pamusoro pemunhu ari kuchenurwa. Mupristi anobva apfupira zvitadzo zvaiyeyo pana Tenzi, zvomunhu akanga aine chirwere chamapere." 
Leviticus14:19 “Mupristi ngaaite mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, achiripira munhu ari kuchenurwa pakun'ora kwake. Kana aita izvozvo, ngaauraye chibayiro chemupiro wokupisa." 
Leviticus14:20 Mupristi ngaapire mupiro wokupisa nomupiro wembesanwa paatari. Nokudaro mupristi achamuripira, munhu iyeyo anobva achenurwa." 
Leviticus14:21 “Kana munhu iyeyo ari murombo asingakwanisi kuwana izvi zvose ngaaunze hwayana hono imwechete yomupiro wake wokuripa mhosva unosimudzirwa uchipirwa Mwari wokumuripira. Ngaaunzewo upfu hwemupiro wembesanwa hunorema kirogiramu rimwechete hwakakanywa nemafuta eorivhi pamwechete nechikamu chepakati nepakati cherita remafuta eorivhi. 
Leviticus14:22 Ngaaunzewo njiva mbiri kana man'ana maviri ehangaiwa dzaangakwanise kuwana yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo neyomupiro wokupisa. 
Leviticus14:23 Pazuva rorusere ngaauye nadzo kumupristi kuti ichenurwe kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. 
Leviticus14:24 Mupristi ngaatore hwayana yomupiro wokuripa mhosva nechikamu chepakati nepakati perita ramafuta eorivhi aite mupiro unosimudzirwa uchipirwa Tenzi. 
Leviticus14:25 Ngaauraye hwayana yomupiro wokuripa mhosva, atore ropa rayo arizore kwokupedzesera kwenzeve yokurudyi yomunhu ari kuchenurwa nepachara chake chokurudyi napachigunwe chake chikuru chokurudyi." 
Leviticus14:26 Mupristi ngaadururire mafuta muchanza chake iye pachake chokuruboshwe," 
Leviticus14:27 Mupristi ngaanyike munwe wake worudyi mumafuta ari muchanza chake choruboshwe aasase kanomwe pana Mwari ipapo mutendhe rinoera. 
Leviticus14:28 Mupristi ngaazorewo mafuta paya paazora ropa, romupiro wokuripa mhosva kwokupedzesera kwenzeve yomunhu ari kuchenurwa yokurudyi nepachara chake chokurudyi napachigunwe chake chikuru chokurudyi." 
Leviticus14:29 Mafuta ose anenge asara muchanza chomupristi ngaadire pamusoro womunhu ari kuchenurwa achimuripira pana Tenzi. 
Leviticus14:30 Mupristi ngaapire njiva kana hangaiwa dzichiri duku, dzaangakwanise kuwana," 
Leviticus14:31 imwe ive yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, imwe ive yomupiro wokupisa pamwechete noupfu hwemupiro wembesanwa. Nokudaro mupristi achapira mupiro wokuripira pana Tenzi wokuitira munhu ari kuchenurwa." 
Leviticus14:32 Uyu ndiwo murao womunhu anenge aine chirwere chamapere asi asingakwanisi kuwana chokuti achenurwe nacho.” 
Leviticus14:33 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni kuti," 
Leviticus14:34 “Kana masvika munyika yeKanani yandiri kukupai kuti ive yenyu, ndikaita kuti imba yomunhu ive nechiundudzi chechirwere munyika yenyu imomo," 
Leviticus14:35 muridzi wayo ngaauye kumupristi amutaurire kuti, ‘Ndiri kuona zvinenge chiundudzi chechirwere mumba mangu.’" 
Leviticus14:36 Mupristi ngaati zvose zviri muimba yacho zviburitswe panze asati apindamo kundoongorora chiundudzi chacho nokuti akasadaro zvose zvirimo zvingazonzi zvakan'ora. Mushure maizvozvo mupristi ngaapindemo kundoongorora imba iyoyo. 
Leviticus14:37 Ngaaongorore chiundudzi chacho, kana akaona chisiri pamusoro chete, chakapinda mukati memadziro, chiine ruvara rwamashizha kana kuti rwakatsvukuruka," 
Leviticus14:38 mupristi ngaabude mumba imomo aipfige igare yakapfigwa kudaro kwamazuva manomwe. 
Leviticus14:39 Pazuva rechinomwe mupristi ngaadzokere kuimba iya kundoiongororazve. Kana akaona chiundudzi chapararira madziro emba iyoyo," 
Leviticus14:40 mupristi ngaati vabvise mabwe ane chiundudzi andokandwa kunze kweguta kunorasirwa marara. 
Leviticus14:41 “Mupristi ngaati madziro ose omukati memba iyoyo aparwe. Zvakwakwanuka zvacho ngazvindorasirwa kunze kweguta kunorasirwa marara. 
Leviticus14:42 Ngavatore mamwe mabwe vaaise pakabviswa mabwe aye, vadzurure madziro iwayo patsva." 
Leviticus14:43 “Kana chiundudzi ichocho chikadzokazve mumba muya makambobviswa mabwe mukaparwa mukadzururwa patsva," 
Leviticus14:44 mupristi ngaandoiona. Kana mavara echiundudzi ichocho apararira, nemba iyoyo, chinenge chiri chiundudzi chechirwere chinoparadza, imba iyoyo yaton'ora." 
Leviticus14:45 Ngaapaze imba iyoyo. Mabwe ayo namapango ayo nevhu rayo ngazvitakurwe zviendwe nazvo kunze kweguta kunorasirwa marara. 
Leviticus14:46 Ani naani anopinda mumba iyo panguva yainombonzi igare yakapfigwa achava akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. 
Leviticus14:47 Ani naani anorara mumba imomo uye ani naani anodyiramo ngaasuke hanzu dzake. 
Leviticus14:48 “Asi kana mupristi akauya kuzoongorora akaona chiundudzi chisina kupararira nemba iya ngaataure pachena kuti haina kun'ora nokuti chiundudzi chose chinenge chapera. 
Leviticus14:49 Mupristi ngaatore man'ana maviri nechimuti chemusidhari netambo tsvuku nakabazi kemuhisopu zvokundochenurisa imba iyoyo. 
Leviticus14:50 Ngaaurayire shiri imwe pamusoro pehari yevhu ine mvura yakanaka yakachena. 
Leviticus14:51 Ngaatore chimuti chomusidhari nekabazi komuhisopi netambo tsvuku pamwechete neshiri mhenyu azvinyike muropa reshiri yauraiwa mumvura yakanaka yakachena arisase kanomwe mumadziro emba iya. 
Leviticus14:52 Nokudaro achachenura imba iyoyo neropa reshiri iya, nemvura iya yakanaka yakachena, neshiri mhenyu nechimuti chemusidhari nakabazi kemuhisopi netambo tsvuku." 
Leviticus14:53 Ngaaende kunze kweguta aibhururutse itetereke zvayo nesango. Ndiko kuchenura kwaachaita imba iyoyo, ichibva yava isina kun'ora." 
Leviticus14:54 “Iwoyu ndiwo murao wechirwere chamapere chingave chezvisasa 
Leviticus14:55 kana chiundudzi chepahanzu kana chomumba 
Leviticus14:56 kana chokuzvimba kana chamatuzu, kana chevara." 
Leviticus14:57 Murao iwoyo unobatsira kuziva kuti chinhu ichi chakan'ora here kana kuti kwete. Uyu ndiwo murao wechirwere chamapere.” 
Leviticus15:1 Mwari akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Leviticus15:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Kana munhurume anezvinobuda maari kubuda kwazvo ikoko kwakan'ora.’" 
Leviticus15:3 Uyu ndiwo mutemo pamusoro pokun'ora kunokonzerwa nokuzvirotera: kunyange zvinobuda izvozvo zvichibuda kamwechete kana kuramba zvichibuda, zvose zvinongomun'oresa." 
Leviticus15:4 Uvato hwose hunovatwa nomunhu anobudisa izvozvo hunon'ora. Chinhu chose chaanogara chinobva chan'ora. 
Leviticus15:5 Ani naani anobata uvato hwake anobva an'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. Ngaatogeza zvipfeko zvake nomuviri wake. 
Leviticus15:6 Ani naani anogara pambogarwa nomunhu ane zviri kubuda maari, atova munhu akan'ora. Achaswera zuva rose ari munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake ashambe muviri wake. Achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira manheru." 
Leviticus15:7 Ani naani anobata muviri womunhu ane zvinobuda maari izvozvo anofanira kusuka hanzu dzake ashambe nemvura achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira manheru. 
Leviticus15:8 Kana munhurume uya ane zviri kubuda maari akapfira mate pamunhu asina kun'ora, apfirwa mate wacho atova munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke." 
Leviticus15:9 Chityaro chose chose zvacho chinenge changogarwa nomunhurume ane zviri kubuda maari chaton'ora. 
Leviticus15:10 Ani naani anobata chinenge chambogarwa nomunhu iyeyo atova munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. Anenge atakura chinhu chakadaro, ngaasuke hanzu dzake ashambe muviri wake nemvura. Achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira manheru." 
Leviticus15:11 Kana munhu abatwa nomurume ane zviri kubuda maari asina kushamba maoko nemvura ngaasuke hanzu dzake, ashambe muviri wake nemvura achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke." 
Leviticus15:12 Hari yevhu inenge yabatwa nomunhu ane zviri kubuda maari ngaipwanywe, kana uri upi zvawo mudziyo womuti ngausukwe nemvura." 
Leviticus15:13 “Kana munhurume uya ane zvanga zvichibuda maari zvamira kubuda, ngaagare mazuva manomwe okuchenurwa. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake, ashambe muviri wake mumvura yakanaka yakachena achava munhu akachenurwa." 
Leviticus15:14 Pazuva rorusere ngaatore njiva mbiri kana hangaiwa mbiri dzichiri duku aende nadzo kuna Tenzi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira adzipe mupristi. 
Leviticus15:15 Mupristi ngaadzipire kuna Tenzi, imwe ive yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, imwe yacho ive yomupiro wokupisa. Naizvozvo mupristi anobva achenura pana Tenzi munhurume uya anenge ane zviri kubuda maari." 
Leviticus15:16 “Kana munhurume akaburitsa mbeu dzomuviri wake, atova munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake, ashambe muviri wake." 
Leviticus15:17 Kana mbeu yake ikadonhera pachinhu chipi nechipi zvacho, chingave jira kana dehwe ngachigezwe. Chichava chakan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke." 
Leviticus15:18 Kana murume akarara nomukadzi, akaburitsa mbeu dzomuviri wake vose vari vaviri ngavashambe miviri yavo vachava vanhu vakan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke." 
Leviticus15:19 “Kana mukadzi ari panguva yake yokutevera kuri kutevera samazuva ose achava munhu akan'ora kwamazuva manomwe. Ani naani anomugunzwa achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. 
Leviticus15:20 Chinhu chipi nechipi zvacho chaanovata kana chaanogara panguva yaanenge akan'ora chichava chakan'ora. 
Leviticus15:21 Ani naani anobata uvato hwake ngaasuke hanzu dzake ashambe muviri wake. Achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. 
Leviticus15:22 Ani zvake anobata chii zvacho chaanogara ngaasuke hanzu dzake ashambe muviri wake nemvura. Achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. 
Leviticus15:23 Chingava chaanovata kana chii zvacho chaanogara kana munhu akangochibata chete atova munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. 
Leviticus15:24 Kana munhurume akavata nomukadzi iyeyo akatapukirwa nezvinomun'oresa achapedza mazuva manomwe ari munhu akan'ora. Chii zvacho chaanovatawo chinon'orawo. 
Leviticus15:25 “Kana akaramba achibuda ropa kwamazuva mazhinji isiri nguva yake yokutevera kana kuramba achibuda ropa nguva yake yokutevera yapfuura, achava munhu akan'ora nguva yose yaanenge achibuda ropa. Akangon'ora sezvaanoita ari panguva yake yokutevera." 
Leviticus15:26 Uvato upi noupi zvahwo hwaanovata mazuva ake ose okutevera uye chigaro chose chose zvacho chaanogara chichava chakan'ora sezvazvinongoita panguva yake yokutevera. 
Leviticus15:27 Ani naani anobata zvinhu izvozvo anon'ora, achava munhu akan'ora ngaasuke hanzu dzake, ashambe muviri wake nemvura. Achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke." 
Leviticus15:28 Kana ropa rake ramira kubuda ngaambogara kwamazuva manomwe, kana mazuva iwayo apera, achava munhu akachenurwa." 
Leviticus15:29 Pazuva rorusere ngaatore njiva mbiri kana hangaiwa mbiri dzichiri duku aende nadzo kumupristi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. 
Leviticus15:30 Mupristi ngaapire imwe ive yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, imwe yacho ive yomupiro wokupisa. Nokudaro mupristi anobva achenura pana Tenzi mukadzi iyeyo pakutevera kwake kunenge kuchimun'oresa." 
Leviticus15:31 “Ndiko kutsauranisa kwauchaita vanenge van'ora nevanenge vasina pakati pavaIsiraeri, kuti varege kufa pamusana pokun'ora kwavanenge vanako, vachin'oresa tendhe rinoera riri pakati pavo." 
Leviticus15:32 “Iwoyu ndiwo murao unosunga murume anozvirotera neanoburitsa mbeu yomuviri wake achizvin'oresa," 
Leviticus15:33 ndiwo unosungawo mukadzi ari kurwara panguva yake yokutevera angave munhurume kana munhukadzi anezvinobuda maari nomurumewo anovata nomukadzi akan'ora.” 
Leviticus16:1 Tenzi akataura kuna Mosesi shure kwokufa kwavanakomana vaviri vaAroni pavakapira kuna Tenzi vakafa. 
Leviticus16:2 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi, “Udza mukoma wako Aroni kuti arege kuita chipindepinde munzvimbo inoera kuseri kwejira rokudzikatirisa achisebera pahwidibiro yebhokisi rechitenderano, angadaro akafa nokuti ini ndichazviratidza ndiri mugore nechapamusoro pehwibidiro iyoyo." 
Leviticus16:3 Kana Aroni apinda munzvimbo inoera, ngauye nehandira ichiri duku yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo nehondohwe yomupiro wokupisa." 
Leviticus16:4 Ngaauye akapfeka hanzu yerineni inoera inenge yoda kusvika mumabvi, nebhurukwa rerineni, akasunga mudya werineni akapfeka ngundu yerineni, ndohanzu dzinoera. Ngaatange ashamba muviri wake nemvura, agozoti odzipfeka." 
Leviticus16:5 Aroni ngaapiwe negungano ravaIsiraeri makotora embudzi maviri omupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo pamwechete nehondohwe yomupiro wokupisa. 
Leviticus16:6 “Aroni ngaapire handira iya somupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvake iye pachake achiripira zvitadzo zvake iye pachake nezvemba yake. 
Leviticus16:7 Ngaatore mbudzi mbiri dziya aende nadzo kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, adzimise pana Tenzi." 
Leviticus16:8 Aroni ngaaitire mbudzi dziya mbiri chin'ange, imwe ive yaTenzi imwe ive yaAzazeri yokurasirira." 
Leviticus16:9 Aroni ngaauye nembudzi inenge yaratidzwa nechin'ange kuti ndeyaTenzi, aiite mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo." 
Leviticus16:10 Asi mbudzi iya inenge yaratidzwa nechin'ange kuti ndeyokurasirira ngaiuyiwe nayo pana Tenzi iri mhenyu ive yokuripira nayo zvitadzo kuti indorasirirwa kurenje kuna Azazeri. 
Leviticus16:11 “Aroni ngaapire handira iya somupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvake iye pachake achiripira zvitadzo zvake iye pachake nezvemba yake. Ngaauraye handira ive yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvake iye pachake. 
Leviticus16:12 Ngaatore kabisiro kazere mazimbe omoto unobva paatari iri pana Tenzi, nezvanza zviviri zvizere zvorusenzi runonhuhwirira rwakadzvurwa, auye nako apinde kuseri kwejira rokudzikatirisa." 
Leviticus16:13 Ngaaise rusenzi mumoto uri pana Tenzi kuitira kuti bwititi routsi hworusenzi riputire hwidibiro iyi yebhokisi rechitenderano, arege kufa." 
Leviticus16:14 Ngaatore rimwe ropa rehandira iya, arisase nomunwe wake pamberi pehwidibiro kumabvazuva, arisasewo pamberi pehwidibiro iyoyo kanomwe." 
Leviticus16:15 “Ngaachiuraya mbudzi yemupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvavanhu, aunze ropa rayo munzvimbo inoera, arisase pahwidibiro yebhokisi rechitenderano, arisasewo pasi pamberi paro sezvaanenge aita zviya neropa rehandira." 
Leviticus16:16 Nokudaro achachenura nzvimbo inoera pamusana pokun'ora kwavaIsiraeri, uye nokuda kwezvikanganiso zvavo, nezvitadzo zvavo zvose. Ngaaite zvimwechetezvo kutendhe rokusanganira riri pakati pavo; mukati mokun'ora kwavo." 
Leviticus16:17 Hakuna munhu anobvumirwa kunge ari mutendhe rokusanganira. Kubvira nguva inopinda Aroni munzvimbo inoera kundoripira zvitadzo zvake iye pachake nezvemhuri yake nezvegungano rose ravaIsiraeri kusvikira nguva yaanobudamo, hakuna munhu anobvumirwa kunge ari mutendhe rokusanganira." 
Leviticus16:18 Ngaabude imomo andopira Tenzi mupiro wokupisa paatari ichenurwe. Ngaatore ropa rehandira iya pamwechete neropa rembudzi iya arizore pane zvose zvinenge nyanga zviri paatari. 
Leviticus16:19 Nomunwe wake, ngaasase ropa kanomwe pamusoro payo, aichenure pakun'oreswa kwayakaitwa navaIsiraeri." 
Leviticus16:20 “Kana Aroni apedza kuchenura nzvimbo inoera netendhe rokusanganira neatari ngaapire, mbudzi mhenyu iya." 
Leviticus16:21 Aroni ngaaise maoko ake ose ari maviri pamusoro wayo areurure pairi uipi hwose hwavaIsiraeri, noumhandupandu hwavo hwose nezvitadzo zvavo zvose, aise zvose pamusoro payo. Ngaaise mumaoko omumwe munhu anenge asarudzwa andoirasirira mugwenga." 
Leviticus16:22 Mbudzi iyoyo ichatakura uipi hwavo hwose. Munhu uya achandoirasirira kugwenga. 
Leviticus16:23 “Aroni ngaapinde mutendhe rokusanganira abvise hanzu dzerineni dzaanga akapfeka paya paambopinda munzvimbo inoera adzisiye dziri imomo. 
Leviticus16:24 Ngaashambe muviri ari panzvimbo inoera apfeke hanzu dzake dzamazuva ose, ozobuda imomo ondopira mupiro wake iye wokupisa, nokuitira vanhu mupiro wavowo wokupisa aripire zvitadzo zvake iye pachake nezvavanhu." 
Leviticus16:25 Ngaapise mafuta echibayiro chomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo paatari. 
Leviticus16:26 Munhu uya anenge andorasirira mbudzi kugwenga ngaasuke hanzu dzake ashambe muviri, ozoti odzokera kumatendhe." 
Leviticus16:27 Handira iya nembudzi iya dzomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo dzine ropa rinenge rakaunzwa munzvimbo inoera kuti riripire zvitadzo, ngadziendwe nadzo kunze kwematendhe. Matehwe adzo nenyama, yadzo nechinzvinzvi chadzo, ngazvipiswe nomoto." 
Leviticus16:28 Munhu anondopisa zvinhu izvozvo ngaasuke hanzu dzake, ashambe muviri, nemvura ozodzokera zvake kumatendhe." 
Leviticus16:29 “Kwamuri imi murao uyu, murao uchagara uripo narini wose wokuti mumwedzi wechinomwe pazuva regumi romwedzi munofanira kuzvirwadzisa musaite basa imi kana vatorwa vamugere navo." 
Leviticus16:30 Ndinodaro nokuti pazuva irori ndipo panoripirwa zvitadzo zvenyu kuti muchenurwe kuzvitadzo zvenyu zvose, munobva macheneswa pana Tenzi." 
Leviticus16:31 Sabata, zuva rokuzorora, munofanira kuzvirwadzisa. Uyu murao uchagara uripo narini wose." 
Leviticus16:32 Mupristi anenge azodzwa akagadzwa kuva mupristi panzvimbo yababa vake, ndiye acharipira akapfeka hanzu dzerineni dzinoera." 
Leviticus16:33 Ndiye achachenura nzvimbo inoera netendhe rokusanganira neatari, nokuripira zvitadzo zvevapristi nezvegungano." 
Leviticus16:34 Murao iwoyu uchagara uripo narini wokuti zvitadzo zvose zvevaIsiraeri zvinofanira kuripirwa kamwechete pagore.” Naizvozvo Mosesi akaita sezvaakaudzwa naTenzi. 
Leviticus17:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus17:2 “Taurira Aroni navanakomana vake navaIsiraeri vose uti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvakatemwa naTenzi zvokuti:" 
Leviticus17:3 muIsiraeri upi noupi zvake kana akabaya mombe kana hwai kana mbudzi pamatendhe kana kunze kwenharaunda yematendhe iyoyo," 
Leviticus17:4 asingachiunze kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira kuzochipira kuna Tenzi pamberi petendhe raTenzi munhu iyeyo imhondi, ane mhosva yakudeura ropa naizvozvo atozvicheka ukama nevokwake." 
Leviticus17:5 Chakaisirwa mutemo uyu ndechokuti vaIsiraeri vose vagounza kuna Tenzi zvibayiro zvavo zvavari kungoitira zvavo kwose kwose, vazviunze kuna Tenzi kumupristi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira vazviuraye sezvibayiro zvemipiro yokuwadzana yokupira kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus17:6 Mupristi ngaasase ropa pamativi ose eatari yaTenzi iri kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. Ngaapise mafuta paatari kuti anhuwirire zvinofadza Tenzi. 
Leviticus17:7 Saka havafanire kuramba vachipira zvibayiro kuna Mwari zvakaita sembudzi zvavari kuteveredza vachiita senzenza. Murao iwoyu uchagara uripo narini pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose.’ 
Leviticus17:8 “Vaudze kuti munhu wose wemba yaIsiraeri kana nomutorwawo wose ari mukati mavo anopira mupiro kana chibayiro 
Leviticus17:9 asingauye nacho kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira kuzochipira kuna Tenzi munhu iyeyo atochekwa ukama nevokwake. 
Leviticus17:10 “MuIsiraeri wose kana mutorwa upi zvake agere pakati pavo anodya ropa, ndichaonana nomunhu iyeyo anodya ropa ndichamuchekanisa ukama nevokwake." 
Leviticus17:11 Ndinodaro nokuti muropa rezvipenyu zvose ndimo mune upenyu hwazvo. Ndakaripa kwamuri kuti murishandise paatari kupfupira zvitadzo zvenyu. Ropa ndiro rinoripira zvitadzo pamusana poupenyu huri mariri. 
Leviticus17:12 Ndokusaka ndakataurira vaIsiraeri kuti hapana munhu pakati penyu anofanira kudya ropa kunyange mutorwa agere nemi haafaniri kudya ropa. 
Leviticus17:13 “MuIsiraeri wose nomutorwawo upi noupi zvake agere navo anoenda kundovhima mhuka kana shiri inodyiwa anofanira kusinza ropa rayo arifusire nevhu.
