Leviticus17:14 Chandinodariro ndechokuti muropa rezvipenyu zvose zvazvo ndimo mune upenyu hwazvo. Ndokusaka ndichiudza vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Musambodya zvenyu ropa rechinhu chipi nechipi zvacho, nokuti muropa rezvipenyu zvose ndimo mune upenyu hwazvo. Ani naani anoridya ngaachekaniswe ukama naye.’" 
Leviticus17:15 “Munhu wose zvake angave chizvarwa chomuno muIsiraeri kana mutorwa anodya nyama yakafa yoga kana yakaita zvokurumwa nezvikara atova munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva ridoke. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake ashambe muviri, achava munhu asisina kun'ora." 
Leviticus17:16 Asi kana akarega kudzisuka kana kushamba muviri, ane mhosva.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus18:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wavo." 
Leviticus18:3 Musatevedzere tsika dzinoitwa navanhu vokuIjipiti kwamaigara kunyange kutevedzera tsika dzinoitwa navanhu vokuKanani kwandiri kukuendesai. Musatevedzere maitiro avo. 
Leviticus18:4 Munofanira kuchengeta mitemo yangu nokuteerera mirao yangu, ive gwara renyu ramunofamba naro, Ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus18:5 Saka chengetai mirao yangu nemitemo yangu nokuti munhu anoichengeta, inomupa upenyu, ndini Tenzi.’" 
Leviticus18:6 “Hakuna munhu anobvumirwa kutorana nehama yepedyo achiifukura, ndini Tenzi." 
Leviticus18:7 Usazvidze baba wako uchitorana naamai vako, ndaamai, usatadze navo." 
Leviticus18:8 Usatorane nomukadzi wababa wako, kuzvidza baba ikoko." 
Leviticus18:9 Usatorane nahanzvadzi yako, angave mwana wababa wako nomumwe mukadzi kana mwana wamai vako nomwe murume, kunyange yakazvarirwa mumusha menyu kana kuti yakaberekerwa kumwewo." 
Leviticus18:10 Usatorane nomuzukuru wako angave mwana womwanakomana wako kana mwana womwanasikana wako kutozvifumura ikoko. 
Leviticus18:11 Usatorane nomwana akaberekwa nababa wako nomumwe mukadzi, ihanzvadzi yako." 
Leviticus18:12 Usatorane navatete vako, ihama yababa vako yomumba chaiyo." 
Leviticus18:13 Usatorane nomukoma kana munun'una waamai vako nokuti ihama yaamai vako yomumba chaiyo. 
Leviticus18:14 Usatorane nomudzimai womukoma kana wemunun'una wababa vako kuzvidza babamudiki kana kuti babamukuru wako ndimaiguru kana mainini vako. 
Leviticus18:15 Usatorane nomuroora wako, mudzimai womwana wako saka usatorane naye." 
Leviticus18:16 Usatorane nomudzimai wemukoma kana munun'una wako kuzvidza mukoma kana munun'una wako. 
Leviticus18:17 Usatorane nomukadzi pedzepo wozotoranazve nemwanamusikana wake, kana kutorona nemwana womwanakomana wake kana nemwana womwanasikana wake. Vane ukama newe zvakaipa izvozvo." 
Leviticus18:18 Kana mudzimai wako achiri mupenyu usatorane nomukoma kana munun'una wake chero mukadzi wako achiri mupenyu. 
Leviticus18:19 “Rega kutorana nomukadzi panguva yake yokutevera. 
Leviticus18:20 Usatorane nomudzimai wemumwe wako uchizvin'oresa naye. 
Leviticus18:21 Usape mwana wako kuti apisirwe Moreki mumoto uchiipisa zita raMwari wenyu, ndini Tenzi." 
Leviticus18:22 Rega kutorana nomumwe munhu wechirume sokutorana kwaungaite nomukadzi, chinhu chinosemesa kwazvo." 
Leviticus18:23 Murume ngaarege kuita chakaipa nemhuka achizvin'oresa nazvo. Mukadziwo ngaarege kuita chakaipa nemhuka, ndokurasika chaikoiko." 
Leviticus18:24 “Usazvin'orese nezviito zvakadaro nokuti ndudzi dzavanhu vomunyika yamuchandogara dzandichadzinga dzakazvin'oresa nezviito izvozvo. 
Leviticus18:25 Nyika yavo yakan'oreswa nezviito zvavo saka ndakairanga pamusana pouipi hwayo, nyika iyoyo ikaita zvokurutsa vanhu vemo." 
Leviticus18:26 Asi imi mose zvizvarwa zvemo navatorwa vagere nemi, chengetai mitemo nemirao yangu, murege kuita chii zvacho chakaipa chikadai." 
Leviticus18:27 Ndinodaro nokuti vanhu vakanga varimo, imi musati mavemo vakaita zvinhu zvakaipisisa izvozvi vakan'oresa nyika iyoyo." 
Leviticus18:28 Kana imi mukan'oresa nyika, ingadaro ikakurutsai somurutsiro wayakaita vanhu vaimbogaramo imi musati mavemo." 
Leviticus18:29 Ani naani anoita tsika dzakaipa dzikadai achachekwa ukama nevokwake. 
Leviticus18:30 “Naizvozvo, chengetai zvandinoreva musambofa zvenyu makaita tsika idzodzi dzakaipa dzikadaro dzaiitwa navanhu vaigaramo imi musati mavemo. Musambozvin'oresa netsika idzodzo. Ini Tenzi, ndini Mwari wenyu.”" 
Leviticus19:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus19:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Ivai vatsvene nokuti ini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndiri mutsvene." 
Leviticus19:3 Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaaremekedze amai vake nababa vake, achengete maSabata angu. Ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu.’" 
Leviticus19:4 “Musapindukire kuzvifananidzo. Musagadzire vamwari vokuumba noutare. Ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu. 
Leviticus19:5 “Kana mopira chibayiro chemipiro yokuwadzana kuna Tenzi chipirei nomutoo unoita kuti chive chinogamuchirwa. 
Leviticus19:6 Ngachidyiwe musi wakarewo wachinenge chapirwa, kana mangwana acho. Zvose zvinenge zvasara zvichiripo kusvikira pazuva retatu ngazvipiswe nomoto." 
Leviticus19:7 Kana chikazodyiwa pazuva retatu kunenge kwava kuita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo, hachizogamuchirwa." 
Leviticus19:8 Ani naani anochidya imhosva yake nokuti anenge an'oresa chinhu chaTenzi chinoera, munhu iyeyo ngaachekwe ukama nevokwake." 
Leviticus19:9 “Kana mokohwa minda yenyu regai kukohwa kusvikira kumichetocheto, kana kufuhwa muchitora mbesanwa dzinosaririra muminda yenyu pakukohwa." 
Leviticus19:10 Musabva mafuhwiridza munda wamagirepisi kana kubva manhongerera magirepesi anenge adonhera pasi. Ngazvisiyirwe varombo navatorwa. Ini Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndini ndinodaro. 
Leviticus19:11 “Musabe kana kunyengedzana kana kureva nhema. 
Leviticus19:12 Musapike nhema nezita rangu muchiipisa zita raMwari wenyu, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:13 “Musabate mumwe wenyu zvakaipa kana kupamba zvinhu zvake. Regai kurara muine mubayiro womushandi usiku hwose kusvikira mangwanani. 
Leviticus19:14 Musati kune matsi dai ukawana chinokuwana. Usaisire bofu chinhu chokuripingirisha, unofanira kutya Mwari wako, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:15 “Pakutonga mhosva tonga usingatsaudzire, usinganyari murombo kana kuremekedza mupfumi, asi unofanira kutonga mhosva nomazvo." 
Leviticus19:16 Usafambe-fambe uchiita makuhwa pakati pevekwako. Usapupurire mumwe zvenhema kuti aurayiwe, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:17 Usaite daka uchivenga hama yako mumwoyo mako, asi gara pasi unyatsotaurirana naye urege kuita chitadzo pamusana pake." 
Leviticus19:18 Usatsive kana kuita daka uchivenga vamwe vako. Asi ida mumwe wako sokuda kwaunozviita iwe pachako, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:19 “Chengetai mirao yangu. Zvipfuwo zvenyu ngazvirege kuberekeswa nerumwe rudzi rwezvipfuwo. Musadyare mhando mbiri dzembeu mumunda mumwechete. Musapfeke chipfeko chakagadzirwa pachisanganisirwa machira emhando mbiri. 
Leviticus19:20 “Kana murume akaita chakaipa nomuranda wechikadzi iye achangobva mukuroorwa nomumwe murume, asi asati abvisirwa mari yokumutenga kana kumusunungura muuranda, ngavapiwe chirango, asi ngaarege kuurayiwa nokuti mukadzi iyeyo anga achiri muranda." 
Leviticus19:21 Murume iyeyo ngaaunze hondohwe yomupiro wake wokuripa mhosva yake kuna Tenzi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, hondohwe yokubvuma mhosva." 
Leviticus19:22 Nehondohwe iyoyo yomupiro wokuripa mhosva mupristi ngaaripire kuna Tenzi chitadzo chomunhu iyeyo chaakaita. Chitadzo chaakaita chinobva charegererwa. 
Leviticus19:23 “Kana mazosvika kunyika iyoyo mukasima miti yemichero inodyiwa michero iyoyo ichava inorambidzwa kwamuri, hamubvumirwe kuidya kwemakore matatu, ngairege kudyiwa." 
Leviticus19:24 Michero yose yainobereka mugore rechina inenge yava michero inoera inenge yava yomupiro wokurumbidza nawo Tenzi. 
Leviticus19:25 Asi mugore rechishanu mungadye zvenyu michero yayo. Izvozvi zvose zvinoitirwa kuti michero yenyu iwe. Ndini Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndinodaro. 
Leviticus19:26 “Musadye nyama isina kusinzwa. Musaite un'anga hwokududzira mashura kana kubvunza anosvikirwa. 
Leviticus19:27 Musachekerere vhudzi renyu reparushaya kana kugera mativi endebvu dzenyu. 
Leviticus19:28 Kana mafirwa, musazvichekechekere kana kuzvitaratadzira miviri yenyu izvozvo. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:29 “Usabvisise mwana wako musikana chimiro uchimuita kuti ave pfambi, nyika ingadaro ikapindwa nomweya woufeve, ikazara kuti kabu nouipi." 
Leviticus19:30 Chengetai maSabata angu, muremekedze nzvimbo yangu inoera. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:31 “Musaende kundobvunza vanosvikirwa kana kundoshopera. Musavatsvake kuti murege kun'oreswa navo. Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:32 “Unofanira kuremekedza vachena musoro, ukudze harahwa nechembere, uchitya Mwari wako, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:33 Musabata zvakaipa mutorwa agere munyika yenyu. 
Leviticus19:34 Zvaunoita kune chizvarwa chomunyika yenyu ndozvamunofanira kuita kune mutorwa. Unofanira kumuda sokuda kwaunozviita iwe pachako nokuti imiwo maiva vatorwa munyika yeIjipiti. Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:35 “Musambotsaudzira zvenyu pakutonga kana pakuera ukuru hwechinhu, kana kurema kwacho, kana uwandi hwezvinhu." 
Leviticus19:36 Munofanira kuva nezvokueresa zviri pamwero, zvingave zvokueresa kurema kwechinhu, kana bhagidhi rokueresa musvo, kana zvokuera zvinhu zvakaita mvura mvura. Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndakakuburitsai kunyika yeIjipiti ndinodaro." 
Leviticus19:37 Munofanira kuchengeta mirao yangu yose nezvirevo zvangu zvose muzviite. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro.” 
Leviticus20:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus20:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Ani naani wenyu muIsiraeri kana mutorwa agere nemi muIsiraeri anenge apira mwana wake kuna Moreki, ngaaurayiwe. Vanhu venyika iyoyo ngavamuteme namabwe afe." 
Leviticus20:3 Ini pachangu ndichaonana nomunhu iyeyo, ndichamucheka ukama nevokwake nokuti akapira mwana wake kuna Moreki akan'oresa nzvimbo yangu inoera, akashonhawo zita rangu rinoera." 
Leviticus20:4 Kana vanhu venyika iyoyo vakamuona achipira mwana wake kuna Moreki vakanyarara zvavo, vakarega kumuuraya," 
Leviticus20:5 ini pachangu ndichaonana nomunhu iyeyo pamwechete nemhuri yake yose ndichavacheka ukama nevokwavo, iye pamwechete nevanomutevera pakuita senzenza dzokuteveredza Moreki.’" 
Leviticus20:6 “Kana munhu akaenda kundobvunza vanosvikirwa kana vanoshopera achiita senzenza kuvateveredza, ini pachangu ndichaonana nomunhu iyeyo, ndichamucheka ukama nevokwake." 
Leviticus20:7 Naizvozvo zvitsaurei kuva vangu, muve vatsvene nokuti ini Tenzi ndini, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus20:8 Chengetai mirao yangu muite zvainoreva ini Tenzi ndini ndinokuitai kuti muve vatsvene. 
Leviticus20:9 “Ani naani zvake anoti dai baba wake kana amai vake vawana chinovawana, ngaaurayiwe nokuti anenge achida kuti baba wake kana kuti amai vawirwe norushambwa. Rufu rwake ndorwokuzviparira." 
Leviticus20:10 “Kana murume aita upombwe nomudzimai womumwe, mhombwe iyoyo nomukadzi aita ufeve iyeyo, vose vari vaviri, vanofanira kutouraiwa." 
Leviticus20:11 Murume anotorana nomukadzi wababa wake atozvidza baba wake. Murume iyeyo nomukadzi wacho vose zvavo vari vaviri vanofanira kutouraiwa Rufu rwavo nderwokuzviparira. 
Leviticus20:12 Murume anotorana nomuroora wake, vose zvavo vari vaviri, vanofanira kuti vatouraiwa nokuti vaita makunakuna. Rufu rwavo nderwekuzviparira." 
Leviticus20:13 Kana murume akatorana nomumwe murume akagara naye sokunge murume nomukadzi, vose zvavo vari vaviri vatoita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo, ngavaurayiwe. Rufu rwavo nderwekuzviparira." 
Leviticus20:14 Kana murume akatorana nomukadzi achizotoranawo navambuya vake, uipi ihwohwo, iye naivo vanofanira kupiswa nomoto kuti pakati penyu parege kuva nouipi." 
Leviticus20:15 Murume akaita chakaipa nemhuka ngaaurayiwe, Mhuka iyoyo ngaiurayiwewo." 
Leviticus20:16 Mukadziwo akaita chakaipa nemhuka ngaurayiwe. Mhuka iyoyo ngaiurayiwewo. Mukadzi iyeyo anofanira kuuraiwa pamwechete nemhuka iyoyo. Rufu rwavo nderwokuzviparira. 
Leviticus20:17 “Kana murume akatorana nehanzvadzi yake, angave mwanasikana wababa wake nomumwe mukadzi kana kuti wamai vake nomumwe murume vakaonererana, chinhu chinonyadzisa, ngavachekwe ukama novokwavo nokuti akatorana nehanzvadzi yake, ndiye atozviparira." 
Leviticus20:18 Kana murume akarara nomukadzi ari panguva yake yokutevera amunyadzisa nokumuonerera achiri kutevera uye achizviratidza panobva kutevera kwake. Vose zvavo vari vaviri ngavachekwe ukama nevokwavo. 
Leviticus20:19 “Usatorane navatete vako, kana kutorana nomukoma kana munun'una waamai vako nokuti makunakuna iwayo, vanozviparira." 
Leviticus20:20 Kana murume akatorana naamainini kana namaiguru vake, azvidza babamudiki kana kuti babamukuru wake, chitadzo chavo ichocho ndechokuzviparira vachafa vasina mwana." 
Leviticus20:21 Kana murume akatorana nomukadzi womukoma kana womunun'una wake atoita chinhu chakan'ora, ashora mukoma kana munun'una wake, vachashaya mbereko." 
Leviticus20:22 “Munofanira kuteerera mirao yangu yose, nezvirevo zvangu zvose muzvichengete kuitira kuti nyika yekwandirikukuendesai kundogara irege kukurutsai." 
Leviticus20:23 Musatevedzere tsika dzerudzi rwavanhu vandiri kufanokudzingirai imomo nokuti vaiita zvinhu zvose izvozvi, saka ndakavasema." 
Leviticus20:24 Asi ini ndakakuudzai kuti, ‘Muchatora nyika yavo muchiita yenyu, nyika yakanaka inoerera uchi nomukaka. Ini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndini ndakakutsaurai mukati medzimwe ndudzi.’" 
Leviticus20:25 Naizvozvo imi zivai kusiyanisa mhuka dzakan'ora nedzisina kun'ora, neshiri dzakan'ora nedzisina kun'ora. Musazvin'orese nemhuka kana neshiri kana nezvinhu zvipi nezvipi zvazvo zvizere panyika, dzandakakutsaurirai mudzizive kuti dzakan'ora." 
Leviticus20:26 Ivai vatsvene kwandiri nokuti ini Tenzi ndiri mutsvene uyewo ndakakutsaurai mukati mendudzi dzevanhu kuti muve vangu. 
Leviticus20:27 “Munhurume kana munhukadzi ari svikiro kana muroyi ngaauraiwe, ngavatakwe nemabwe. Rufu rwavo nderwokuzviparira.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Udza vapristi vanakomana vemhuri yokwaAroni kuti, ‘Hapana anofanira kun'oreswa nezvitunha pakati pevekwake," 
Leviticus21:2 kunze kwokutoti chiri chitunha chehama yake yomumba. Vangave amai kana baba vake, kana kuti mwana wake mukomana kana musikana, kana mukoma kana munu'una vake," 
Leviticus21:3 kana hanzvadzi yake mhandara, womumba, asati aroorwa, pamusana pake angazvin'orese zvake.’" 
Leviticus21:4 Iye somutungamuriri wavanhu ngaarege kuzvin'oresa. 
Leviticus21:5 Havafanire kuveura musoro yavo vachizviita mhanza kana kugera ndebvu dzaparushaya, kana kuzvicheka muviri." 
Leviticus21:6 Vachava vanhu vaMwari, vatsvene, havafanire kusvibisa zita raMwari wavo nokuti ndovanopira mupiro inoita zvokupiswa nomoto kuna Tenzi, nechokudya kuna Mwari saka vanofanira kuva vanhu vatsvene." 
Leviticus21:7 Ngavarege kuroora pfambi kana mukadzi akambokanganiswa kunyangwe mukadzi akarambwa nomurume wake, nokuti mupristi munhu mutsvene akatsaurirwa Mwari." 
Leviticus21:8 Mubatei somunhu akateketerwa kwandiri nokuti ndiye anopira chokudya chinopirwa kuna Mwari. Kwamuri ngaave munhu akateketerwa kuna Mwari nokuti ini Tenzi ndinokuitai kuti muve vatsvene ndiri mutsvene. 
Leviticus21:9 Kana mwanasikana womupristi upi noupi zvake akazviipisa achiita upfambi, atofumura baba vake ngaapiswe nomoto." 
Leviticus21:10 “Mupristi anenge akazodzwa musoro namafuta kuva mupristi mukuru pakati pevokwake, iye akagadzwa kuti apfeke hanzu dzoupristi, haafaniri kurega vhudzi rake rakaiita jakuchichi kana kubvarura hanzu dzake" 
Leviticus21:11 kana kuzvin'oresa nokusvika pedyo nechitunha, chingave chitunha chababa kana chaamai vake." 
Leviticus21:12 Haafanire kumbosiya nzvimbo inoera kana kun'oresa nzvimbo yaMwari wake inoera nokuti kuteketerwa kwaakaitwa kuna Mwari achizodzwa mafuta kuri paari, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus21:13 Anofanira kuroora mhandara. 
Leviticus21:14 Ngaarege kuroora chirikadzi, kana mukadzi akarambwa kana mukadzi akakanganiswa kana pfambi. Asi ngaaroore musikana achiri mhandara kune vokwake," 
Leviticus21:15 kuti vana vake varege kuva vana vakan'ora pakati pevokwake. Ini Tenzi ndini ndinomuita kuti ave mutsvene.” 
Leviticus21:16 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus21:17 “Taurira Aroni kuti, ‘Pazvizvarwa zvako zvose hapana munhu womhuri yekwako ane pakaremara anobvumirwa kuuya nechokudya kuzopira Mwari.’" 
Leviticus21:18 Ndinodaro nokuti hakuna munhu ane pakaremara anobvumirwa kupirira vanhu mipiro angave bofu kana mhetamakumbo, kana ane chakaremara pauso kana pamuviri wake," 
Leviticus21:19 kwouya akatyoka ruoko kana gumbo," 
Leviticus21:20 kana ane nhutwa, kana mandionerepi, kana ane chirwere chamaziso kozoti ane chirwere chezvisasa kana chemhezi kana munhu akagadzirwa." 
Leviticus21:21 Hakuna munhu wemhuri yokumupristi Aroni ane pakaremara anobvumirwa kuuya kuzopirira vanhu mipiro inoita zvokupiswa nomoto kuna Tenzi. Ane pakaremara haabvumirwi kuzopirira vanhu chokudya chinopirwa kuna Mwari wake 
Leviticus21:22 Munhu akadaro anobvumirwa zvake kudya chingwa chaMwari wake chemipiro inoeresesa kana yezvinhu zvinoera. 
Leviticus21:23 Asi haabvumidzwe kuenda seri kwejira rokudzikatirisa kana kusvika pedyo neatari nokuti ane pakaremara angan'orese nzvimbo dzangu dzinoera. Ini Tenzi ndini ndinovaita kuti vave vanhu vatsvene.” 
Leviticus21:24 Ndizvo zvakataurwa naMosesi kuna Aroni navanakomana vake nokuvanhu vose veIsiraeri. 
Leviticus22:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus22:2 “Taurira Aroni navanakomana vake kuti varege kuita zvokutamba nezvinhu zvinoera zvavaIsiraeri zvavanopira kwandiri kuitira kuti varege kusvibisa zita rangu rinoera. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro. 
Leviticus22:3 Uvati, ‘Ani naani zvake anenge aine chinomun'oresa wemhuri dzenyu dzose, pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose anosvika pazvinhu zvinoera zvinopirwa navaIsiraeri kuna Tenzi iye akan'ora, munhu iyeyo ngaarege kubvumirwa kusvika pandiri. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro.’" 
Leviticus22:4 “Hakuna munhu wemhuri yekwaAroni anenge aine chirwere chamapere, kana anenge ane chirwere chezvinobuda maari anobvumidzwa kudya zvinhu zvinoera, kusvikira achenurwa. Ani naani anenge agunzva chinhu chakambogunzvana nechitunha, kana chinhu chakagumana nomurume azvirotera, atova munhu akan'ora." 
Leviticus22:5 Ani naani anobata chinhu chinokambaira chinon'oresa munhu kana kubata munhu ane chinon'oresa, angave aine chinon'oresa chipi nechipi zvacho," 
Leviticus22:6 munhu anobata zvinhu zvakadaro, achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva radoka. Haafaniri kudya zvinhu zvinoera asi kutoti ashamba muviri." 
Leviticus22:7 Kana zuva radoka achava munhu akachenurwa, ndopaachazodya zvake zvinhu zvinoera nokuti ndiko kudya kwake ikoko." 
Leviticus22:8 Ngaarege kudya chinhu chinofa choga kana chinorumwa haafaniri kudya, achizvin'oresa nacho. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus22:9 “Saka ngavateerere mirao yangu nokuti vangadaro vakaita chitadzo chokuizvidza, vakafa. Ini Tenzi, ndini ndinovaita kuti vave vatsvene." 
Leviticus22:10 “Mutorwa haafanire kudya zvinhu zvinoera, angave munhu ari kumbogara nomupristi kana munhu ari kumbomushandira ngaarege kudya zvinhu zvinoera." 
Leviticus22:11 Asi kana mupristi akatenga muranda nemari kana muranda iyeyo anogona kuzvidya uye vakaberekwa mumusha make vangadye zvavo chokudya chaanodya iye. 
Leviticus22:12 Kana mwanasikana womupristi akaroorwa nomutorwa haazobvumirwi kudya zvinhu zvemupiro inoera. 
Leviticus22:13 Asi kana mwanasikana womupristi asina vana ari chirikadzi kana kuti akarambwa nomurume akadzokera kundogara kumusha kwake kuna baba wake, sapausikana hwake angadye zvake chokudya chinodyiwa nababa wake. Asi hakuna munhu, wokunze anobvumirwa kudya izvozvo." 
Leviticus22:14 “Kana munhu akadya zvinhu zvinoera mukusaziva, ngaaripe chaanenge adya, awedzere pachiri makumi maviri pazana roga roga raanofanira kuripa, ape mupristi zvinhu zvinoera izvozvo." 
Leviticus22:15 Vapristi ngavarege kun'oresa zvinhu zvinoera zvavaIsiraeri zvavanopira kuna Tenzi," 
Leviticus22:16 vachivarega vachipara mhosva inotoripwa yokudya zvinhu zvavo zvinoera nokuti ini Tenzi ndini ndinovaita kuti vave vatsvene.” 
Leviticus22:17 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus22:18 “Taurira Aroni navanakomana vake navaIsiraeri vose kuti, ‘Kana mumwe munhu, muIsraeri kana mutorwa agere munyika yeIsiraeri, aunza mupiro wake wokupisa kuna Tenzi, ungave mupiro wezvaakambotsidza kana mupiro wokupa nechido chake unopirwa kuna Tenzi somupiro wokupisa," 
Leviticus22:19 kuti mupiro wake ugamuchirwe anofanira kupira chibayiro chikono chisina chinoshoreka pachiri, chehandira kana hondohwe kana makotora.’" 
Leviticus22:20 Regai zvenyu kupira chinhu chipi nechipi zvacho chine chinoshoreka pachiri nokuti hamumbochigamuchirirwa. 
Leviticus22:21 Kana munhu achipira Tenzi chibayiro chomombe, kana chomupiro wokuwadzana kuna Tenzi kana mune zvimwe zvipfuwo zvemipiro yokuwadzana achiita mupiro wezvaakambotsidza ungave mupiro wechido chake, kuti mupiro iwoyo ugamuchirwe, chibayiro chake chinofanira kuva chakanaka chaizvo, chisina chinoshoreka pachiri." 
Leviticus22:22 Musapire Tenzi chipfuwo chakapofomara kana chakaremera kana chakaremadzwa kane chine ronda riri kubuda urwa kana chine chisasa kana chine mapezi. Musambopira izvozvo zvakadaro kuna Tenzi kana kuita nazvo mupiro wokupiswa paatari kuna Tenzi. 
Leviticus22:23 Mombe kana hwai ine imwe nhengo yakaremara zvokuti yakarebesa kana kuti yakapfupikisa, munogona zvenyu kupira mupiro wokupa nechido chenyu, asi haigamuchirwe pamupiro wezvinenge zvakambotsidzwa." 
Leviticus22:24 Chipfuwo chipi nechipi zvacho chinenge chakasvuurwa, kana kupwanywa kana kuchekwa kana kubvarurwa musachipire kuna Tenzi kana kuchiita chibayiro munyika menyu." 
Leviticus22:25 Musambopira zvenyu kuna Mwari zvakadai zvinenge zvakabva kumutorwa nokuti zvine chinoshoreka pazviri, uyewo zvakaremadzwa, hamumbozvigamuchirirwa.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus22:27 “Kana kwaberekwa mhuru yemombe kana hwayana kana mbudzana ngaimboregerwa iina amai vayo kwamazuva manomwe, kubvira pazuva rorusere inenge yogamuchirika somupiro unoita zvokupiswa kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus22:28 Musapire chipfuwo nemwana wacho pazuva rimwechete, mhou nemhuru yayo kana hwayana naamai vayo kana mbudzana naamai vayo." 
Leviticus22:29 Kana munhu achipira chibayiro chomupiro wokutenda Tenzi pirai chibayiro ichocho nomutoo unoita kuti mugamuchirwe. 
Leviticus22:30 Nyama ngaidyiwe pazuva rakarero. Ngaparege kusara imwe inosvika mangwana ichiripo Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro. 
Leviticus22:31 “Munofanira kuteerera mitemo yangu muichengete. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro. 
Leviticus22:32 Musan'orese zita rangu rinoera asi kutoti vaIsiraeri ngavandiremekedze somutsvene. Ini Tenzi, ndini ndinoita kuti muve vanhu vatsvene," 
Leviticus22:33 ndiniwo ndakakuburitsai munyika yeIjipiti kuti ndive Mwari wenyu. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro.” 
Leviticus23:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus23:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Mazuva makuru aTenzi andakasarudza amunofanira kuti ave mazuva emusangano mutsvene ezvokunamata ndeaya." 
Leviticus23:3 Basa ngariitwe mumazuva matanhatu, asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata, zuva guru rokuzorora romusangano mutsvene wezvokunamata musaite basa pazuva iroro iSabata naTenzi kwose kwose kwamunenge mugere." 
Leviticus23:4 Aya ndiwo mazuva makuru akasarudzwa naTenzi nemisangano mitsvene yezvokunamata amunofanira kuudza vanhu kana nguva yawo yasvika.’ 
Leviticus23:5 “Zuva rechigumi nemana romwedzi wokutanga zuva rodoka, ndiro zuva rePasika yaTenzi." 
Leviticus23:6 Zuva rechigumi nemashanu remwedzi wakarewo izuva guru raTenzi reChingwa chisina mbiriso. Munofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso kwamazuva manomwe. 
Leviticus23:7 Pazuva rechiposhi munofanira kuita musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, musaite basa rinorema." 
Leviticus23:8 Asi kwamazuva manomwe pirai Tenzi mupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto. Pazuva rechinomwe itai musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, murege kuita basa rinorema." 
Leviticus23:9 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus23:10 Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Kana masvika kunyika yandiri kukupai mukakohwa mbesa dzayo torai chisumbu chembesa dzamunotanga kukohwa mupe mupristi.’" 
Leviticus23:11 Ngaapire chisumbu ichocho aite mupiro unovheyeswa uchipirwa kuna Tenzi kuti akugamuchirei. Pazuva rinotevera Sabata, mupristi ndipo paanosimudza achiupira kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus23:12 Pazuva ramunoita mupiro unosimudzirwa uchipirwa Mwari, munofanira kupira Tenzi hwayana hono, ine gore rimwechete, isina chinoshoreka yomupiro wokupisa." 
Leviticus23:13 Toraiwo makirogiramu maviri eupfu muhukanye namafuta eorivhi mupire kuna Tenzi mupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza, pamwechete nawo pirai mupiro wezvokunwa wewaini inokwana rita rimwechete." 
Leviticus23:14 Musambodya zvenyu chingwa kana mbesanwa dzakakangwa kana kudya zvomumunda zvinyoro, kusvikira pazuva rakarero kusvikira matounza mupiro waTenzi iwoyu. Murao iwoyu uchagara uripo pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose kwose kwose kwamunenge mugere narini wose." 
Leviticus23:15 “Kubvira pazuva rinotevera Sabata rechinomwe pamunounza chisumbu chembesanwa chinosimudzirwa chichipirwa verengai mavhiki manomwe azere. 
Leviticus23:16 Kana kwapera maSabata manomwe, zuva ramangwana racho rinobva rakwanisa mazuva makumi mashanu ipapo pirai Tenzi mumwe mupiro wembesanwa itsva." 
Leviticus23:17 Muchaunza kubva kudzimba dzenyu zvingwa zviviri zvinosimudzirwa zvichipirwa kuna Mwari. Chingwa choga choga ngachibikwe noupfu hunorema makirogiramu maviri, huri hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa, chibikwe chiine mbiriso sembesa dzokutanga kuibva dzinopirwa Tenzi." 
Leviticus23:18 Pamwechete nechingwa ichocho munofanira kupira hwayana nomwe dzine gore rimwechete dzisina chinoshoreka padziri, nehandira imwechete nembudzi mbiri. Ngazvive zvomupiro wokupisa pamwechete nemupiro wazvo wembesanwa nemupiro yazvo yezvokunwa. Iwoyu mupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Leviticus23:19 Munofanira kupira mbudzi hono imwechete, yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo nehwayana mbiri, hono, dzine gore rimwechete sechibayiro chomupiro wekuwadzana." 
Leviticus23:20 Mupristi ngaazvisimudze achizvipira nechingwa chiya chembesanwa dzinotanga kukohwiwa somupiro unosimudzwa uchipirwa kuna Tenzi nehwayana mbiri. Zvinhu izvozvi zvinenge zvapirwa kuna Tenzi, zvinoera, zvinozopihwa vapristi." 
Leviticus23:21 Pazuva rakarero daidzirai musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata. Musaite basa rinorema. Iwoyu, mutemo uchagara uripo, narini wose, kwose kwamunenge mugere, pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose." 
Leviticus23:22 “Kana mokohwa minda yenyu regai kukohwa kumuchetocheto kana kufuhwa mbesanwa dzinosaririra muminda yenyu. Ngazvisiyirwe varombo navatorwa. Ndini Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndinodaro.” 
Leviticus23:23 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus23:24 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti ‘Zuva rokutanga romwedzi wechinomwe, izuva guru rokuzorora, zuva romusangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, rinopembererwa nokuridza mupururu." 
Leviticus23:25 Musamboita zvenyu basa rinorema, munofanira kupira mupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto kuna Tenzi.’ ”" 
Leviticus23:26 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus23:27 “Zuva rechigumi remwedzi iwoyu wechinomwe, izuva rokuripira zvitadzo nokuwadzana naTenzi. Kwamuri inguva yamunofanira kuita musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata. Munofanira kuzvinyima mupire Tenzi mupiro wokupisa nomoto." 
Leviticus23:28 Musamboita zvenyu basa pazuva iroro nokuti izuva rokuripira zvitadzo nokuwadzana naTenzi, Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus23:29 Ani naani anorega kuzvinyima pazuva iroro achachekwa ukama novokwake. 
Leviticus23:30 Ani naani anotoita zvake basa pazuva iroro munhu iyeyo ndichamuparadza pakati pevokwake. 
Leviticus23:31 Musamboita zvenyu basa. Murao iwoyu uchagara uripo narini wose pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose, kwose kwamunenge mugere." 
Leviticus23:32 Kwamuri, zuva iri, iSabata guru rokuzorora. Munofanira kuzvinyima kubvira manheru ezuva rechipfumbamwe romwedzi iwoyo. Chengetai Sabata kubvira manheru iwayo kusvikira mangwana manheru.”" 
Leviticus23:33 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus23:34 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Kubvira pazuva rechigumi namashanu romwedzi wechinomwe chengetai mazuva makuru amatumba okupemberera Tenzi.’" 
Leviticus23:35 Zuva rokutanga racho izuva romusangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, hamufaniri kuita basa rinorema." 
Leviticus23:36 Kwamazuva manomwe iwayo pirai Tenzi mipiro wokupisa nomoto. Pazuva rorusere ngapaitwe musangano mukuru mutsvene wezvokunamata, mupire kuna Tenzi mupiro wokupisa, musangano mukuru, musaite basa rinorema." 
Leviticus23:37 Iwaya ndomazuva makuru akasarudzwa naTenzi amunofanira kuita misangano mitsvene yezvokunamata, amunopira Tenzi mipiro yokupisa nomoto, nemipiro yokupisa nemipiro wembesanwa nezvibayiro nemipiro yezvokunwa, zuva nezuva riine mipiro yaro" 
Leviticus23:38 tisingaverengeri maSabata aTenzi, kana zvipo zvenyu, kana mupiro yezvakambotsidzwa kana mipiro yokupa nechido chenyu, yamunopira kuna Tenzi." 
Leviticus23:39 “Kubvira pazuva rechigumi nemashanu romwedzi wechinomwe, pamunenge mapedza kukohwa minda yenyu, chengetai mazuva makuru iwayo okupemberera Tenzi, kwamazuva manomwe, Zuva rokutanga ngarive zuva guru rokuzorora." 
Leviticus23:40 Zuva rorusere ngarive zuva guru rokuzorora rokutanga, tanhai michero yakanaka yemiti yenyu yamakasima. Toraiwo mapazi omurara neemimwe miti ine mashizha mazhinji, neemushambangwena yomurwizi, mufare muchipemberera pamberi paTenzi Mwari wenyu kwamazuva manomwe." 
Leviticus23:41 Chengetai mazuva makuru iwaya okupemberera Tenzi kwamazuva manomwe pagore. Iwoyu, murao uchagara uripo narini wose, pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose. Uchengetei mumwedzi wechinomwe." 
Leviticus23:42 Garai mumatumba kwamazuva manomwe. Munhu wose, muIsiraeri, ngaagare mumatumba," 
Leviticus23:43 kuitira kuti zvizvarwa zvenyu zvizive kuti ini ndakagarisa vaIsiraeri mumatumba, pandakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti. Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndinodaro.”" 
Leviticus23:44 Saizvozvo Mosesi akaudza vaIsiraeri mazuva makuru akasarudzwa okupemberera Tenzi. 
Leviticus24:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus24:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti, vakuigire mafuta akanakisisa, emaorivhi akadzvurwa, okuisa mumarambi, kuitira kuti mwenje ugare uchipfuta," 
Leviticus24:3 nechedivi rokunze kwejira rokudzikatirisa bhokisi rechitenderano, mutendhe rokusanganira. Manheru oga oga, Aroni ngaatungidze marambi iwayo ave pana Tenzi achipfuta kusvikira mangwana mangwanani. Iwoyu murao uchange uripo narini wose pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose." 
Leviticus24:4 Nguva dzose ngaachengetedze marambi iwayo, epachigadzikiro chemwenje chendarama chaiyo chiya achivheneka pana Tenzi." 
Leviticus24:5 “Unofanira kutora upfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa ubike zvingwa gumi nezviviri, chingwa choga choga chibikwe noupfu hunorema makirogiramu maviri." 
Leviticus24:6 “Rongai zvingwa izvozvo patafura yakaputirwa nendarama chaiyo. Ngazvirongwe mumitsara miviri, mumwe uve nezvitanhatu." 
Leviticus24:7 Pamitsara iyoyo ngapave norusenzi rwakanakisisa runozova mupiro wechirango wezvokudya unoita zvokupiswa nomoto uchipirwa kuna Tenzi. 
Leviticus24:8 Pamusi weSabata woga woga, Aroni ngaarongere vaIsiraeri chingwa ichocho pana Tenzi. Ichochi, chitendherano chichagara chiripo narini wose." 
Leviticus24:9 Chingwa ichocho ndechaAroni navanakomana vemhuri yekwake. Kana vochidya ngavachidyire panzvimbo inoera nokuti ndomugove wake unoera kwazvo unotorwa pamipiro yaTenzi inoita zvokupiswa nomoto. Iwoyu murao uchagara uripo.” 
Leviticus24:10 Mumwe murume aiva naamai vechiIsiraeri, baba wake ari wechiIjipiti, akaenda mukati mavaIsiraeri akamutsana pamatendhe nomumwe murume aiva nababa naamai vechiIsiraeri." 
Leviticus24:11 Murume uya aingova naamai vechiIsiraeri, amai vake vainzi Sheromiti vaiva mwanasikana waDhibhiri vedzinza rokwaDhani akashonha Mwari nezita achinyomba. Vakaenda naye kuna Mosesi." 
Leviticus24:12 Vakamubata vakamuchengeta vachida kuti Tenzi avaudze zvokuita naye. 
Leviticus24:13 Tenzi ndokuti kuna Mosesi," 
Leviticus24:14 “Buritsai akanyomba Mwari uya kunze kwematendhe. Vanhu vose vakamunzwa achishonha Mwari ngavaise maoko avo pamusoro womurume iyeyo, gungano rose ravaIsiraeri ngarimutake namabwe afe." 
Leviticus24:15 Iwe ibva waudza vaIsiraeri kuti ani naani anonyomba Mwari anozviparira. 
Leviticus24:16 Munhu anoshonha Tenzi nezita anofanira kuuraiwa. Gungano rose ngarimutake nemabwe, chingave zvacho chizvarwa chomuIsiraeri kana kuti mutorwa ngaaurayiwe." 
Leviticus24:17 “Ani naani anouraya munhu ngaaurayiwewo. 
Leviticus24:18 Ani naani anouraya chipfuwo chomumwe ngaachiripe. Upenyu hunoripwa noupenyu. 
Leviticus24:19 “Kana munhu akakuvadza mumwe ngaakuvadzwewo sokukuvadza kwaakaita mumwe. 
Leviticus24:20 Kana akatyora bvupa romumwe, bvupa rake ngarityorwewo, ziso rinoripwa neziso, zino rinoripwa nezino. Munhu sokukuvadza kwaanenge aita mumwe ndiko kuvadzwa kwaanofanira kuitwa" 
Leviticus24:21 Ani naani anouraya chipfuwo chomumwe ngaachiripe. Asi ani naani anouraya munhu ngaaurayiwewo. 
Leviticus24:22 Mutemo mumwechete iwoyu ndiwo unosunga zvimwechetezvo muIsiraeri nomutorwa nokuti ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu.” 
Leviticus24:23 Saka Mosesi akataurira vaIsiraeri izvozvo. Vakatora murume uya akashonha Mwari vakaenda naye kunze kwematendhe vakamutaka namabwe ndokubva afa. Saka vaIsiraeri vakaita zvakataurirwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Leviticus25:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi, mugomo reSinai achiti," 
Leviticus25:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti, kana masvika munyika yandiri kukupai, nyika ngaivewo neSabata rayo pamusana paTenzi." 
Leviticus25:3 Kwamakore matanhatu rimai zvenyu minda yenyu, muchipemhena migirepisi yenyu kwamakore matanhatu, muchikohwa zvenyu zvirimwa zvenyu." 
Leviticus25:4 Asi gore rechinomwe ngarive gore reSabata rokuzorodza minda, negore rakapirwa Tenzi. Musarime minda yenyu kana kupemhena migirepisi yenyu." 
Leviticus25:5 Regai kukohwa zvirimwa zvenyu zvamahoko. Regai kutanha magirepisi emigirepisi yenyu yamusina kumbopemhena iya, igore rokusarutsa minda isina kurimwa." 
Leviticus25:6 Zvirimwa zvamahoko nemichero inoibva gore iroro rokusarutsa minda, ndozvichava chokudya chenyu imi, navaranda venyu vechirume nevechikadzi, navashandi venyu, navatorwa vagere nemi," 
Leviticus25:7 nezvipfuwo zvenyu nemhuka dzomunyika yenyu. Zvose zvinoibva gore iroro ndozvichava chokudya. 
Leviticus25:8 “Mukachengeta makore okusabata basa muminda kanomwe munenge matokwanisa makumi mana amakore ana makore mapfumbamwe. 
Leviticus25:9 Pazuva rechigumi remwedzi wechinomwe pazuva rokuripira zvitadzo nokuwadzana naMwari, hwamanda ngadziridzwe munyika yenyu yose." 
Leviticus25:10 Eresai gore ramakumi mashanu, muparidze kuvanhu vose vomunyika yenyu nezvorusununguko. Kwamuri, igore rehwamanda, gore rokuti munhu wose anofanira kudzokera pamunda pake, munhu wose achidzokera kumhuri yokwake." 
Leviticus25:11 Gore rechimakumi mashanu kwamuri, igore rokupemberera Jubhiri iroro, mugore iro regai kurima minda yenyu, kana kukohwa zvemahoko kana kutanha magirepisi pamigirepisi yamusina kupemhena iya." 
Leviticus25:12 Ndinodaro nokuti igore rehwamanda, kwamuri igore rinoera. Muchadya zvamahoko omuminda yenyu." 
Leviticus25:13 “Mugore iroro rehwamanda, munhu wose ngaadzokere pamunda pake." 
Leviticus25:14 Kana muchitengeserana kana kutengerana, vaIsiraeri pachenyu, musabiridzirane." 
Leviticus25:15 Kana munhu otenga munda womumwe, ngapaverengwe makore apfuura kubvira pagore rehwamanda, munda ngautengeswe pachiverengiwa makore okurima asara." 
Leviticus25:16 Kana kuchine makore mazhinji mutengo wacho ngaukwidzwe. Asi kana kwasara makore mashoma mutengo wacho ngauderedzwe nokuti chaanokutengesera chaicho huwandi hwamakore auchazorima. 
Leviticus25:17 Musabiridzirane pachenyu, asi ityai Mwari wenyu nokuti ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndinodaro." 
Leviticus25:18 “Chengetai mirao yangu nemitemo yangu muite zvainoreva kuti mugare munyika yenyu makagarika makagarikana. 
Leviticus25:19 Nyika yenyu ichava nyika yamaguta ezvirimwa. Muchadya zvenyu muchiita zvokutorasa, mugere murugare." 
Leviticus25:20 “Kuda mumwe wenyu angati, ‘Ko tichadyeiko mugore rechinomwe patisingabvumirwi kurima minda kana kukohwa mbesa?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Ndichakutumirai chikomborero changu pagore rechitanhatu zvokuti minda yenyu ichabereka mbesa dzakaenzana nedzemakore matatu. 
Leviticus25:22 Pamunodyara minda yenyu mugore rechisere munenge muchiri kudya zvamakakohwa kusvikira mugore rechipfumbamwe. Pamunenge muchikohwa zvegore iroro munenge muchitodya zvakare. 
Leviticus25:23 “Nyika haitengeserwe munhu zvachose nokuti nyika ndeyangu, imi muri vaenzi pairi vandinotombopawo zvangu pokugara." 
Leviticus25:24 “Munyika yenyu yose zvayo, munhu akambotengesa munda, ane mvumo yokuutenga zvakare." 
Leviticus25:25 Kana mumwe muIsiraeri apindwa nourombo akasvika pakutengesa munda wake hama yake yomumba ngaiuye idzikinure munda iwoyo wakatengeswa nehama yake. 
Leviticus25:26 Kana munhu asina hama yomumba yokudzikinura munda wake, asi iye ozopfuma zvokuti anowana mari yokuudzikinura nayo," 
Leviticus25:27 ngaaverenge makore akapera kubvira panguva yaakautengesa, amudzosere muripo unokwanirana namakore anenge asara kusvika pagore rehwamanda, ozobva odzokera pamunda pake." 
Leviticus25:28 Asi kana asina chokuudzikinura nacho kuti uve wake zvakare, uchagara zvawo uri mumaoko emunhu akautenga kusvikira gore rehwamanda. Mugore rehwamanda unenge usisiri womunhu uya akautenga. Muridzi wawo ndopaachadzokera zvake pamunda pake." 
Leviticus25:29 “Kana munhu akatengesa imba yake iri muguta rakakomberedzwa norusvingo, ane mvumo yokuidzikinura kusati kwapera gore rokuitengesa kwake. Gore iroro rose ane mvumo yokuidzikinura." 
Leviticus25:30 Asi kana gore rikapera asina kuidzikinura, imba yakadai, iri muguta rakakomberedzwa norusvingo, ichazogara iri yomunhu akaitenga iyeyo pazvizvarwa zvake zvose, haasungirwi kuidzosera kumuridzi pagore rehwamanda." 
Leviticus25:31 Asi dzimba dzomumaruwa, kusina kukomberedzwa norusvingo, dzine murao mumwechete noweminda. Varidzi vadzo vane mvumo yokudzidzikinura, uyewo pagore rehwamanda dzinodzoserwa kune varidzi vadzo." 
Leviticus25:32 Mumaguta avaRevhi, vaRevhi vane mvumo yokudzikunura dzimba dzavo dzomumaguta avo nguva ipi neipi zvayo." 
Leviticus25:33 Kana muRevhi akarega kudzikinura imba yakatengeswa muguta ravo inodzokera kwaari mugore rehwamanda. Nokuti dziri mumaguta avaRevhi ndedzavo mukati mavaIsiraeri. 
Leviticus25:34 Asi mafuro akapoteredza maguta avaRevhi ngaarege kutengeswa nokuti ndeavo narini wose. 
Leviticus25:35 “Kana mumwe wako muIsiraeri agere newe akawirwa nourombo, zvokutoshayisisa chokubata, mutore ugare naye umubatsire, sezvaungangoitira mutorwa kana munhu anokumbira pokugara mumusha mako." 
Leviticus25:36 Usareve imwe mari yokuwedzera pamusoro peyawakamukweretesa, asi itya Mwari wako urege mumwe wako muIsiraeri agare zvake newe." 
Leviticus25:37 Usamukweretese mari uchida kuti azokudzosera yabereka imwe pamusoro, kana kumutengesera zvokudya uchida kuti uwane zvako imwe mari pamusoro pomutengo wazvo." 
Leviticus25:38 Ini Tenzi ndinodaro, ndini Mwari wenyu ndakakuburitsai munyika yeIjipiti kuzokupai nyika yeKanani kuti ndive Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus25:39 “Kana mumwe wako muIsiraeri agere newe, apindwa nourombo, akazvitengesa kwauri rega kumubata somuranda." 
Leviticus25:40 Ngaagare newe uchimubata somushandi zvake kana kuti muenzi ari kumbogara zvake newe. Ngaakuitire basa somushandi kusvikira gore rehwamanda," 
Leviticus25:41 ndopaachazobva zvake pauri iye navana vake, odzokera zvake kumusha kwake, kunyika yemadzibaba ake." 
Leviticus25:42 Ndinodaro nokuti vaIsiraeri varanda vangu vandakaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti, havafanire kutengeswa savaranda." 
Leviticus25:43 Usamubate zvakaipa uchimuitira zvehasha asi itya Mwari wako. 
Leviticus25:44 Kana muchida varanda vechirume kana vechikadzi munogona zvenyu kuvatenga kundudzi dzavanhu dzakakupoteredzai. 
Leviticus25:45 Munogonawo kuvatenga kubva kumhuri dzavatorwa vagere nemi nemhuri dzinemi dzakaberekerwa munyika menyu vachiva venyu. 
Leviticus25:46 Vanogona kuva nhaka yamunosiyira vana venyu ichiva yavo nokusingaperi. Mungavaite zvenyu varanda venyu, asi vamwe venyu vaIsiraeri musavabate zvakaipa muchivaitira zvehasha." 
Leviticus25:47 “Mutorwa agere nemi kana kuti mupfuuri agere nemi akapfuma asi mumwe wenyu, muIsiraeri obva apindwa nourombo ozvitengesa kumutorwa kana kumupfuuri agere nemi kana kune mumwe wemhuri yomutorwa iyeyo," 
Leviticus25:48 shure kwokuzvitengesa kwaakaita, zvinobvumirwa kumudzikunura. Anogona zvake kudzikunurwa nomumwe wake muIsiraeri," 
Leviticus25:49 angave sekuru wake kana babamukuru kana babamudiki wake, kana kuti mukoma kana munun'una wake, kana imwe hama yake yomudzinza rokwake. Dai kuri kuti iye apfumawo anogona kuzvidzikinura pachake." 
Leviticus25:50 Ngaaverengerane makore nomunhu akamutenga, kubvira pagore raakazvitengesa kwaari kusvikira pagore rehwamanda. Mari yacho inofanira kuwirirana nemakore acho. Makore aakanga aina vatenzi vake anofanira kutorwa semakore aakanga achiita zvake basa somushandi." 
Leviticus25:51 Kana kuchine makore mazhinji asara ngaaripe chikamu chemari inosara pamari yaakatengwa nayo pabviswe mari yamakore aakamushandira. 
Leviticus25:52 Kana pasara makore mashomanana, ngaaverengerane naye makore asara kusvika kugore rehwamanda abvise muripo wake unowirirana namakore iwayo asara okuzvinunura." 
Leviticus25:53 Zvaanenge achimushandira gore negore ngaarege kumuomesera upenyu imi makatarisa zvenyu. 
Leviticus25:54 Kana asina kudzikunurwa nenzira iyoyi ngaapiwe rusununguko rwake mugore rehwamanda iye navana vake. 
Leviticus25:55 Ndinodaro nokuti vaIsiraeri varanda vangu. Ndevangu nokuti ndini ndakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti. Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndini ndinodaro." 
Leviticus26:1 “Regai kuzvigadzirira zvifananidzo zvokunamata kana kumisa zvifananidzo zvokuveza, kana matombo okuyeuka nawo vamwe vamwari. Regai kumisa matombo munyika yenyu muchianamata nokuti ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu." 
Leviticus26:2 Chengetai maSabata angu, muchiremekedza nzvimbo yangu inoera. Ndini Tenzi ndinodaro." 
Leviticus26:3 “Kana mukatevedza mitemo yangu mukateerera mirao yangu nokuichengeta," 
Leviticus26:4 ndichakunayisirai mvura nenguva yayo, nyika ichabereka zvibereko zvayo. Miti yemichero yomuminda yenyu ichabereka michero yayo." 
Leviticus26:5 Mbesa dzenyu dzichawanda zvokuti nguva yokutanha michero yamagirepisi ichasvika musati mapedza kupura mbesa. Munodzamara musvike pakudyara mbesa dzenyu musati mapedza kutanha magirepisi. Muchadya zvokudya zvenyu muchiguta mugere munyika yenyu makagarikana. 
Leviticus26:6 “Ndichakupai rugare munyika yenyu, muchanyatsovata musingavhundutswi nomunhu. Ndichabvisa zvikara munyika yenyu, hamuzovizve nehondo munyika imomo." 
Leviticus26:7 Muchadzingirira vavengi venyu, muchivarizha nebakatwa." 
Leviticus26:8 Vashanu venyu, vachadzingirira zana ravanhu. Zana ravanhu venyu, richadzingirira zviuru gumi zvavanhu. Vavengi venyu vachapera kuurayiwa nehondo yenyu." 
Leviticus26:9 Ndichakucheukai, ndikupei chikomborero chokuti muberekane muwande. Ndichachengeta chitendherano changu nemi." 
Leviticus26:10 Mbesanwa dzenyu dzichasaruka nokusarukazve mumatura enyu, muchidya, zvokutozodzirasa moisa dzimwe itsva." 
Leviticus26:11 Ndichaita musha wangu pakati penyu, Handizombofi ndakakufuratirai." 
Leviticus26:12 Ndichaenda nemi, ndichava Mwari wenyu imi muri vanhu vangu." 
Leviticus26:13 Ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu akakuburitsai munyika yeIjipiti kuti murege kuva varanda vavo. Ndakatyora zvikei zvejoko rouranda hwenyu ndikaita kuti mufambe makasununguka. 
Leviticus26:14 “Kana mukarega kunditeerera, mukarega kuchengeta mitemo iyoyo," 
Leviticus26:15 kana mukaramba mirao yangu, imi nemwoyo yenyu mofuratira zvirevo zvangu, morega kuchengeta mitemo yangu, mochityora zvenyu chitenderano changu nemi," 
Leviticus26:16 zvandichaita kwamuri ndezvizvi: ndichakutsvatai nenhamo dzinodederesa, muchaperezeka muchipisa muviri nechirwere chinokupofomadzai muchizoondoroka zvokufa. Muchadyarira mbeu dzenyu pasina, nokuti vavengi venyu ndovachadzidya." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndichaonana nemi, vavengi venyu vachakurakashai; vanokuvengai ndivo vachakutongai muchatiza pasina anokutandanisai." 
Leviticus26:18 “Ngatiti maoneswa nhamo idzodzo, asi imi moramba musinganditeereri ini ndichakurangirai zvitadzo zvenyu kakapetwa kanomwe." 
Leviticus26:19 Chinokuinzvai chacho ndichachityora-tyora. Ndicharambidza denga kunaya, richaita serakadzivirirwa nesimbi, ivhu raunotsika richaomarara somundarira." 
Leviticus26:20 Simba renyu richaperera pasina nokuti hapana chamuchazokohwa muminda yenyu, miti yemichero yomunyika yenyu haina kana muchero wainozokupai." 
Leviticus26:21 “Kana mukaramba muchipikisana neni, muchirega kunditeerera, ndichakupinzai mune dzimwe njodzi, ndichikurangirai zvitadzo zvenyu kakapetwa kanomwe." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndichatupfunura zvikara zvesango zvigoonana nemi, zvichakuurayirai vana venyu, zvichaparadzawo zvipfuwo zvenyu. Zvichakusiyai mava vashomanana, nzira dzenyu dzisisina anofamba." 
Leviticus26:23 “Kana kuranga ikoku kukatadza kukudzorerai kwandiri asi motoramba zvenyu muchipikisana neni," 
Leviticus26:24 ini pachangu ndichapikisanawo nemi ndichikurangirai zvitadzo zvenyu kakapetwa kanomwe. 
Leviticus26:25 Ndichakuunzirai hondo ichakurangirai kutadza kuchengeta chitenderano. Kana mukaunganidzana mumaguta enyu, ndichaunza denda pakati penyu, ndichakuisai mumaoko avavengi venyu vachakutongai." 
Leviticus26:26 Ndichashomekesa chokudya chenyu zvokuti madzimai gumi achatokwanisa kubikira chingwa chavo muhovhoni imwechete. Pachaerwa mwero wokupa munhu woga woga, muchadya zvenyu asi mucharara muine nzara." 
Leviticus26:27 “Kana izvozvi zvikatadza kuita kuti munditeerere, muchiramba muchingopikisana neni," 
Leviticus26:28 ini pachangu ndichapikisana nemi ndakashatirwa. Iyeni pachangu ndichakurangirai zvitadzo zvenyu kakapetwa kanomwe. 
Leviticus26:29 Muchadya vana venyu vakomana navasikana. 
Leviticus26:30 Ndichaparadza nzvimbo dzenyu dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira. Ndichapaza atari dzenyu dzokupisira rusenzi uye zvitunha zvenyu ndichazviti katakata pamusoro pezvifananidzo zvenyu izvozvo zvakafa zvokunamata. Ini pachangu ndichakusemai. 
Leviticus26:31 Maguta enyu ndichaaita kuti ave matongo, nzvimbo dzenyu dzinoera dzichisara dzisisina chinhu. Handizombofadzwa nomunhuhwi wemipiro yenyu." 
Leviticus26:32 Ndichasiya nyika yenyu yangova nyika, zvichakatyamadza vavengi venyu vageremo." 
Leviticus26:33 Ndichakumwararidzai mukati mendudzi dzavanhu, ndichakutumirai hondo yebakatwa ikoko. Nyika yenyu ichasara yangova nyika, maguta enyu achisara angova matongo." 
Leviticus26:34 Nyika yenyu ichafarawo kuwana zororo remaSabata, mazuva ose aichange isina vanhu. Imi muri kunyika yavavengi venyu, nyika ndopaichawanawo zororo ichifanirawo kuva namaSabata ayo." 
Leviticus26:35 Zororo raisina kuwana pamaSabata enyu muchigeremo, ichazoriwana pamazuva ose aichange yasara isina munhu." 
Leviticus26:36 “Chitsama chavanhu vanenge vasara ikoko kunyika dzevavengi venyu ndichachipa mwoyo woumbwende zvokuti kunyange mhepo ikapeperetsa shizha rikati shwakata vachati pfocho kutiza. Vachamhanya savanhu vari kutiza hondo yebakatwa. Vachaputsika pasina munhu ari kuvadzingirira. 
Leviticus26:37 Vachatsitsirirana kwazvo iko kusina ari kuvadzingirira. Hakuna mhandu yenyu yamuchagona kumirisana nayo. 
Leviticus26:38 Muchatsakatikira mukati medzimwe ndudzi. Nyika yavavengi venyu ichakupedzai. 
Leviticus26:39 Chitsama chenyu chinenge chasara sezvakangoita madzibaba avo, vacharamba vachipera vari munyika yavavengi venyu pamusana pouipi hwavo uyewo nouipi hwamadzibaba avo." 
Leviticus26:40 Asi kana vakarewurura zvakaipa zvavo nezvamadzibaba avo zvavakanditadzira nazvo vakandipandukira 
Leviticus26:41 zvokuti ini ndakazovapandukirawo, ndikavaendesa kunyika yevavengi vavo, kana vakapindura mwoyo yavo youmhandupandu, vakagamuchira chirango," 
Leviticus26:42 ndicharangarira chitenderano changu chandakaita naJakobho nechitenderano chandakaita naIsaki nechitenderano chandakaita naAbhurahamu, ndigorangarira nyika yavo." 
Leviticus26:43 Asi nyika yavo, vachaisiya ichimbofarirao maSabata ayo okuzorora paichasara isina munhu, vachimbondoripira zvakaipa zvavo nokuti mirao yangu vakaiona sechinhu chisina maturo, mwoyo yavo ikasema mitemo yangu." 
Leviticus26:44 Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo, kana vava kunyika yevavengi vavo ini handizochekani ukama navo, kana kuvavenga zvokuvatsakatisa, ndichityora chitenderano changu navo nokuti ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wavo." 
Leviticus26:45 Ndipo pandichazoyeuka chitenderano changu chandakaita namadzitateguru avo andakaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti ndudzi dzose dzichiona, kuti ndive Mwari wavo, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Izvi ndozvirevo nemirao nemitemo yakaitwa naTenzi pakati pake navaIsiraeri ikapiwa nokuna Mosesi pagomo reSinai. 
Leviticus27:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Leviticus27:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Kana munhu akanyatsotsidza kuna Tenzi zvakaenzana nomutengo womunhu kana achida kuzadzisa zvaakatsidza imi ndimi mungaone kutema muripo ungabviswe.’" 
Leviticus27:3 Matemero amuchaita muripo wacho ndeaya kana ari murume ana makore makumi maviri kusvikira ane makumi matanhatu emakore ngaabvisirwe makumi mashanu emari yesirivha, maererano nemari iri pamwero, yomunzvimbo inoera," 
Leviticus27:4 kana ari mukadzi makumi matatu emari yesirivha. 
Leviticus27:5 Mukomana wemakore mashanu kusvikira ave namakore makumi maviri, anobvisirwa makumi maviri emari yesirivha yemashekeri, kana ari musikana gumi remari yesirivha yemashekeri." 
Leviticus27:6 Pwere yechikomana yegore rimwechete kusvikira ine makore mashanu inobvisirwa mari yesirivha yemashekeri mashanu, kana iri pwere yechisikana mari dzesirivha nhatu." 
Leviticus27:7 “Kuvanhu vanenge vave namakumi matanhatu emakore kana anopfuura ipapo, murume anobvisirwa gumi remari yesirivha namasirivha mashanu, kana ari mukadzi gumi remari yesirivha." 
Leviticus27:8 “Kana munhu akaita mhiko ari munhu murombo asingakwanisi kubvisa mari iri pamurao, ngaaende kumupristi nomunhu iyeyo waakapira kuna Tenzi. Mupristi ndiye anofanira kutema muripo achionawo kuti munhu akapira munhu kuna Mwari angabvise muripo wakadii." 
Leviticus27:9 “Kana mhiko yacho iri yechipfuwo chinobvumirwa kupira kuna Tenzi, chipfuwo chipi nechipi zvacho chinenge chichikodzera chinenge chapirwa kuna Tenzi chava chinhu chinotoera." 
Leviticus27:10 Munhu akaita mhiko iyoyo haabvumirwi kuunza chimwe chipfuwo chokudzikinura kana kuchitsivanisa nacho kana kutsinhanisa. Hazvinei kuti chakanaka nechakaipa kana chakaipa nechakanaka chokuchitsinhanisa nacho, zvose zviri zviviri zvava zvaTenzi zvavakuera." 
Leviticus27:11 Asi kana chipfuwo chaakatsidza kupira kuna Mwari chiri chipfuwo chakan'ora, nyakutsidza ngaaende nechipfuwo ichocho kumupristi." 
Leviticus27:12 Mupristi ngaaone kuti chakaipa here kana kuti chakanaka. Mutengo waanenge atema ndiwoyo. 
Leviticus27:13 Kana muridzi wacho ada kuchinunura ngaabvise mutengo wacho achiwedzera makumi maviri pazana roga roga rawo. 
Leviticus27:14 “Kana munhu achiturira imba yake kuna Tenzi, mupristi ngaandoona imba yacho kuti yakanaka here kana kuti kwete ateme mutengo wayo. Mutengo waanenge atema ndiwoyo." 
Leviticus27:15 Kana nyakumboiturira kuna Mwari oda kudzikinura, ngaabvise mutengo wacho wemari achiwedzera makumi maviri pazana roga roga, igobva yava yake zvakare." 
Leviticus27:16 “Kana munhu akaturira chidimbu chomunda wake wenhaka kuna Tenzi, mutengo wacho ngautemwe maererano nouwandi hwembeu dzinogona kudyarwamo, ngaabvise gumi remari yesirivha yamashekeri pakoroni inorema makirogiramu makumi maviri." 
Leviticus27:17 Kana aturira Mwari munda iwoyo gore rehwamanda richangopera, ngaabvise mutengo wawo wose." 
Leviticus27:18 Asi kana munhu akazoturira Mwari munda wake kwapera makore akati kuti, gore rehwamanda rapfuura, mupristi ngaateme mutengo wawo unokwanirana namakore asara kusvika pagore rehwamanda achibvisa mari yawo yamakore akapfuura." 
Leviticus27:19 Munhu anenge aturira Mwari munda wake, kana oda kuudzikinura ngaabvise mutengo wawo achiwedzera makumi maviri pazana roga roga ucharamba uri wake." 
Leviticus27:20 Asi kana asisadi kuudzikinura outengesa asina kutanga aununura kuna Tenzi akazoutengesera mumwe munhu, munhu wakadaro haazobvumirwi kuununurazve." 
Leviticus27:21 Pagore rehwamanda paunofanira kudzoserwa muridzi wawo, unenge wava munda unoera wakakumikidzwa kuna Tenzi, uchava wavapristi." 
Leviticus27:22 “Kana munhu akaturira Tenzi munda waakatenga, usiri wake wenhaka," 
Leviticus27:23 mupristi ngaateme mutengo wawo unoenderana namakore asara kusvika kugore rehwamanda. Ngaabvise mari iyoyo pazuva rakarero, sechinhu chinoera chakatsaurirwa Tenzi." 
Leviticus27:24 Pagore rehwamanda munda iwoyo ngaudzoserwe kumunhu uya kwawakatengwa, kumuridzi wawo wenhaka." 
Leviticus27:25 “Mutengo upi noupi zvawo ngautemwe maererano nemari yesirivha yemashekeri iri pamurao yomunzvimbo inoera. Magera makumi maviri anoita shekeri rimwechete. 
Leviticus27:26 “Pamusana pokuti chipfuwo choga choga chinotanga kuberekwa ndechaTenzi, hakuna munhu anofanira kupira dangwe rechipfuwo, chingave mombe kana hwai nokuti ndechaTenzi nakare." 
Leviticus27:27 Asi dangwe rechipfuwo chakan'ora rinofanira kudzikinurwa. Ngaaridzikinure nomutengo waunenge watema. Ngaaubvise achiwedzera mukumi maviri pazana roga roga rawo. Kana dangwe iroro rechipfuwo risina kudzikinurwa, ngaritengeswe nomutengo waunenge watema." 
Leviticus27:28 “Hakuna munhu angatengese kana angadzikinure chinhu chanyatsotsidzwa kupiwa kuna Tenzi pazvinhu zvose zvaanazvo angave munhu, kana chipfuwo kana munda wenhaka. Chinhu ichocho ndechaTenzi, chinhu chinenge chanyatsotsidzirwa Tenzi chinhu chinoera kwazvo." 
Leviticus27:29 Kana zvatemwa chaizvo kuti munhu apirwa kuna Tenzi haanunurwe anofanira kutourayiwa. 
Leviticus27:30 “Chegumi chembesa kana chemichero yamunorima chinoera chakatsaurirwa Tenzi. 
Leviticus27:31 Kana munhu akada kununura chegumi chake, ngaabvise mutengo wacho achiwedzera makumi maviri pazana roga roga." 
Leviticus27:32 Chegumi chose zvacho chemombe nechezvimwe zvipfuwo zvichireva kuti kana muchiverenga zvipfuwo, chipfuwo chipi nechipi chechigumi chinoera, chakatsaurirwa Tenzi." 
Leviticus27:33 Muridzi wacho ngaarege kutinha zvipfuwo zvake achizvironga nomutoo wokuti zvipfuwo zvisina maturo zvisarudzirwe Tenzi. Ngaaregewo kuzvitsinhanisa nezvimwe zvipfuwo. Kana akatsinhanisa chipfuwo ichocho nechimwe chipfuwo zvose zviri zviviri nechatsinhaniswa nacho zvatova zvinoera. Hazvifaniri kana kumbodzikinurwa.” 
Leviticus27:34 Iyi ndomirao yakatemerwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi, ikapiwa Mosesi pagomo reSinai." 
Numbers1:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi murenje reSinai mutendhe rokusanganira pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wechipiri, pagore rechipiri rokubuda kwavo muIjipiti akati," 
Numbers1:2 “Verengai vaIsiraeri vose imba nemba, dzinza nedzinza. Nyorai mazita avanhurume vose" 
Numbers1:3 vane makore makumi maviri nevane anopfuura iwayo vangakwanise kuenda kuhondo muIsiraeri yose. Iwe naAroni munofanira kuvaverenga muzvikwata nezvikwata. 
Numbers1:4 Padzinza rimwe nerimwe torai murume mumwechete wokukubatsirai anenge ari mukuru weimba yamadzibaba ake.” 
Numbers1:5 Mazita avarume vokukubatsirai ndiwo aya: mudzinza raRubheni, torai Erizuru mwanakomana waShedheuru;" 
Numbers1:6 mudzinza raSimeoni, torai Sherumieri mwanakomana waZurishadhai;" 
Numbers1:7 mudzinza raJudha, torai Nashoni mwanakomana waAminadhabhu;" 
Numbers1:8 mudzinza raIsakari, torai Netaneri mwanakomana waZuaru;" 
Numbers1:9 mudzinza raZebhuruni, torai Eriabhu mwanakomana waHeroni;" 
Numbers1:10 pavana vaJosefi mudzinza raEfuremu, torai Erishama mwanakomana waAmihudhi; mudzinza raManase, torai Gamarieri mwanakomana waPedhazuru;" 
Numbers1:11 mudzinza raBenjamini, torai Abhidhani mwanakomana waGidheoni;" 
Numbers1:12 mudzinza raDhani, torai Ahiezeru mwanakomana waAmishadhai;" 
Numbers1:13 mudzinza raAsheri, torai Pagieri mwanakomana waOkirani;" 
Numbers1:14 mudzinza raGadhi, torai Eriasafu mwanakomana waDheueru;" 
Numbers1:15 mudzinza raNafutari, torai Ahira mwanakomana waEnani." 
Numbers1:16 Ivava ndivo vakasarudzwa mugungano rose, vaiva vatungamiriri mumadzinza avo, variwo vakuru vakuru mudzimhuri dzavaIsiraeri." 
Numbers1:17 Mosesi naAroni vakagamuchira varume ivavo vakadomwa namazita. 
Numbers1:18 Vakandokokorodza vaIsiraeri vose pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wechipiri, ndokunyora vanhu mumadzinza avo nomumhuri dzavo. Vakanyora mazita vachiverenga mumwe nomumwe varume vose vaiva namakore makumi maviri navaiva namakore anopfuura iwayo," 
Numbers1:19 sokurayirwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. Saka akavaverenga vari kurenje reSinai. 
Numbers1:20 Mudzinza rokwaRubheni dangwe raIsiraeri makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:21 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raRubheni vose vaisvika makumi mana ezviuru ane zviuru zvitanhatu namazana mashanu. 
Numbers1:22 Mudzinza raSimeoni makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:23 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raSimeoni vose vaisvika makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvipfumbamwe namazana matatu. 
Numbers1:24 Mudzinza raGadhi makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:25 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raGadhi vose vaisvika makumi mana ezviuru ane zviuru zvishanu namazana matanhatu ana makumi mashanu. 
Numbers1:26 Mudzinza raJudha makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:27 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raJudha vose vaisvika makumi manomwe ezviuru ane zviuru zvina namazana matanhatu. 
Numbers1:28 Mudzinza raIsakari makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:29 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raIsakari vose vaisvika makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvina namazana mana avanhu. 
Numbers1:30 Mudzinza raZebhuruni makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:31 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raZebhuruni vose vaisvika makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvinomwe namazana mana. 
Numbers1:32 Mudzinza raJosefi, dzinza rokwaEfuremu vakaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo." 
Numbers1:33 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raEfuremu vose vaisvika makumi mana ezviuru ana mazana mashanu. 
Numbers1:34 Mudzinza raManase makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:35 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raManase vose vaisvika makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri namazana maviri. 
Numbers1:36 Mudzinza raBhenjamini makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:37 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raBhenjamini vose vaisvika makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvishanu namazana mana. 
Numbers1:38 Mudzinza raDhani makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:39 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raDhani vose vaisvika makumi matanhatu ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri namazana manomwe. 
Numbers1:40 Mudzinza raAsheri makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:41 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raAsheri vose vaisvika makumi mana ezviuru ane chiuru chimwechete namazana mashanu. 
Numbers1:42 Mudzinza raNafutari makaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo uye pauwandi hwamazita avo mumwe nomumwe wavarume vose vaiva namakumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
Numbers1:43 Vakaverengwa mudzinza raNafutari vose vaisvika makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvitatu namazana mana. 
Numbers1:44 Ivava ndivo vanhu vakaverengwa naMosesi naAroni vachibatsirwa navatungamiriri vavaIsiraeri gumi navaviri, mumwe nomumwe achimiririra dzinza rake." 
Numbers1:45 Saka vaIsiraeri vose vakaverengwa vaiva varume vane makumi maviri amakore navaipfuura iwayo vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo, muIsiraeri." 
Numbers1:46 Vose pamwechete vaikwana mazana matanhatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvitatu namazana mashanu ana makumi mashanu avanhu. 
Numbers1:47 Asi vaRevhi havana kuverengwa pamwechete namamwe madzinza," 
Numbers1:48 nokuti Tenzi akanga ataura naMosesi achiti," 
Numbers1:49 “Asi vedzinza raRevhi usaverenge, usavaverengere mukati mavanhu veIsiraeri." 
Numbers1:50 Asi vaRevhi ndivo vauchapa basa rapatendhe rechitenderano nazvose zvirimo. Ndivo vacharitakura pamwechete nazvose zvirimo. Ndivo vachashandamo. Vachadzika matendhe avo akaripoteredza. 
Numbers1:51 Pamunenge motamisa tendhe rinoera, vaRevhi ngavaripete vachindoridzikazve kwamuchazombogara. Mumwe munhuwo zvake asiri muRevhi anenge asvika padyo naro ngaaurayiwe." 
Numbers1:52 Vamwe vaIsiraeri vose ngavadzike matendhe avo vagare vari mumapoka avo, mumwe nomumwe ari muchikwata chake nomureza wacho." 
Numbers1:53 Asi vaRevhi ngavadzike matendhe avo vakapoteredza tendhe rechitenderano kuti ndirege kuitira hasha gungano ravanhu veIsiraeri. VaRevhi vanofanira kuchengeta tendhe rechitenderano.” 
Numbers1:54 Saizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakaita zvose zvakanga zvatemerwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers2:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni kuti," 
Numbers2:2 vaIsiraeri pavanodzika matendhe avo mumwe nomumwe ngaagare pane mureza wake ari mudzinza rake, rine mureza warowo. Matendhe ngaadzikwe akapoteredza tendhe rinoera." 
Numbers2:3 Vachadzika matendhe avo nechokumabvazuva ndovomureza wamatendhe edzinza rokwaJudha, vachange vari muzvikwata nezvikwata zvavo. Mutungamiriri wedzinza rokwaJudha iri anenge ari Nahishoni mwanakomana waAminadhabhu," 
Numbers2:4 chikwata chake sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chine vanhu mazana makumi manomwe ezviuru ane zviuru zvina, zvina mazana matanhatu." 
Numbers2:5 Vachadzika matendhe avo padyo nevokwaJudha ndevedzinza raIsakari. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raIsakari anenge ari Netaneri mwanakomana waZuaru," 
Numbers2:6 chikwata chake sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chine vanhu makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvina namazana mana. 
Numbers2:7 Kouyawo vedzinza raZebhuruni, mutungamiriri wedzinza raZebhuruni anenge ari Eriabhu mwanakomana waHeroni," 
Numbers2:8 chikwata chake sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chine vanhu makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvinomwe zvina mazana mana. 
Numbers2:9 Vomumatendhe edzinza rokwaJudha, chikwata nechikwata, vose pamwechete vaisvika zana rimwechete rina makumi masere ezviuru ane zviuru zvitanhatu zvina mazana mana avanhu. Ivava ndivo dzinza rokutanga kusumuka kana moita rwendo." 
Numbers2:10 Vachadzika matendhe avo nechokumaodzanyemba ndowomureza wamatendhe edzinza raRubheni, vachange vari muzvikwata nezvikwata zvavo. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raRubheni iri anenge ari Erizuru mwanakomana waShedheuru." 
Numbers2:11 Chikwata chake sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chine vanhu makumi mana ezviuru ane zviuru zvitanhatu zvina mazana mashanu. 
Numbers2:12 Vachadzika matendhe avo pedyo naye ndevedzinza raSimeoni. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raSimeoni anenge ari Sherumieri, mwanakomana waZurishadhai." 
Numbers2:13 Hondo yake sokuverengwa kwayakaitwa inenge iri vanhu makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvipfumbamwe zvina mazana matatu. 
Numbers2:14 Kouyawo vedzinza raGadhi, mutungamiriri wedzinza raGadhi iri, anenge ari Eriasafu mwanakomana waReueri." 
Numbers2:15 Chikwata chake sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chine vanhu makumi mana ezviuru ane zviuru zvishanu zvina mazana matanhatu ana makumi mashanu. 
Numbers2:16 Vomumatendhe edzinza raRubheni vachange vari muzvikwata zvavo, vose pamwechete vaisvika zana rimwechete rina makumi mashanu ezviuru ane chiuru chimwechete china mazana mana ana makumi mashanu avanhu. Ivava ndivo dzinza rechipiri kusumuka kana moita rwendo." 
Numbers2:17 Tendhe rokusanganira rinobva ratevera rakatakurwa nevematendhe edzinza rokwaRevhi richange riri nechapakati pamatendhe amadzinza ose, sokudzika kwavanenge vakaita matendhe avo, ndokusumuka kwavanoitawo kana voita rwendo, vanenge vakati iri dzinza paro, iri dzinza paro, rimwe nerimwe riine mureza warowo." 
Numbers2:18 Vachadzika matendhe avo nechokumadokero, ndovomureza wedzinza raEfuremu, vachange vari muzvikwata zvavo. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raEfuremu anenge ari Erishama, mwanakomana waAmihudhi." 
Numbers2:19 Chikwata chake, sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chiri vanhu makumi mana ezviuru ana mazana mashanu." 
Numbers2:20 Vachadzika matendhe avo pedyo navo ndevedzinza raManase. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raManase iri anenge ari Gamarieri, mwanakomana waPedhazuru." 
Numbers2:21 Chikwata chake, sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa, chinenge chiri vanhu makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri zvina mazana maviri." 
Numbers2:22 Kouyawo vedzinza raBhenjamini, mutungamiriri wedzinza raBhenjamini iri, anenge ari Abhidhani mwanakomana waGidheoni." 
Numbers2:23 Chikwata chake, sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chiri vanhu makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvishanu zvina mazana mana." 
Numbers2:24 Vomumatendhe edzinza raEfuremu, vari muzvikwata zvavo, vose pamwechete izana rezviuru nezviuru zvisere zvina zana rimwechete ravanhu. Ivava ndivo dzinza rechitatu kusumuka kana moita rwendo." 
Numbers2:25 Vachadzika matendhe avo nechokuchambembe ndowomureza wedzinza raDhani vachange vari muzvikwata zvavo. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raDhani iri, anenge ari Ahiezeri mwanakomana waAmishadhai." 
Numbers2:26 Chikwata chake, sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chiri vanhu makumi matanhatu ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri zvina mazana manomwe." 
Numbers2:27 Vachadzika matendhe avo pedyo naye ndevedzinza raAsheri. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raAsheri iri anenge ari Pagieri mwanakomana waOkirani. 
Numbers2:28 Chikwata chake, sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa chinenge chiri vanhu makumi mana ezviuru ane chiuru chimwechete china mazana mashanu." 
Numbers2:29 Kouyawo vedzinza raNafutari. Mutungamiriri wedzinza raNafutari iri, anenge ari Ahira mwanakomana waEnani." 
Numbers2:30 Chikwata chake, sokuverengwa kwachakaitwa, chinenge chiri vanhu makumi mashanu ezviuru ane zviuru zvitatu zvina mazana mana." 
Numbers2:31 Vomumatendhe okwaDhani, vari muzvikwata zvavo, vose pamwechete vaisvika zana rina makumi mashanu ezviuru nezviuru zvinomwe zvina mazana matanhatu avanhu. Ivava ndivo dzinza richasumuka kokupedzisera vari mureza nomureza." 
Numbers2:32 Ivava ndivo vaIsiraeri vose vakaverengwa nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, mumatendhe avo. Vakaverengwa muzvikwata nezvikwata zvavo vaisvika mazana matanhatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvitatu zvina mazana mashanu ana makumi mashanu avanhu." 
Numbers2:33 Asi vaRevhi havana kuverengerwa mumadzinza mamwe ose avaIsiraeri sokurayirwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers2:34 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvose zvakanga zvarayirwa Mosesi naTenzi. Vaidzika matendhe pane mireza yavo saizvozvo vaisimudzira rwendo munhu wose ari mumhuri yokwake nemba yokwababa vake. 
Numbers3:1 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaAroni naMosesi panguva yakataura Tenzi naMosesi pagomo reSinai. 
Numbers3:2 Aya ndiwo mazita avanakomana vaAroni. Wedangwe aiva ari Nadhabhu achiteverwa naAbhihu naEreazari naItamaru. 
Numbers3:3 Aya ndiwo mazita avana vaAroni vakagadzwa upristi vachiita zvokuzodzwa mafuta. 
Numbers3:4 Asi Nadhabhu naAbhihu vakafa pavakapisira Tenzi rusenzi pamoto usingabvumirwe vari kurenje reSinai. Vakafa vasina kumboita vana. Saka Ereazari naItamaru ndivo vaiita basa roupristi pamwechete naAroni, baba wavo." 
Numbers3:5 Mwari akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers3:6 “Unganidza vanhu vedzinza raRevhi uvaise pana Aroni uvape basa rokubatsira Aroni mupristi. 
Numbers3:7 Ngavaite mabasa ose omutendhe rinoera vachishandira Aroni negungano rose. 
Numbers3:8 Ngavachengete zvose zvomutendhe rokusanganira vachiitira vaIsiraeri mabasa ose omutendhe rinoera. 
Numbers3:9 Kubva mukati mavaIsiraeri vose unofanira kuturira vaRevhi mumaoko aAroni navanakomana vake vanofanira kunyatsopirwa kwaari. 
Numbers3:10 Gadza Aroni navanakomana vake kuti vaite mabasa avo oupristi, asi kana mumwe munhu zvake akaswedera ngaaurayiwe.”" 
Numbers3:11 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers3:12 “Chinzwa, ndasarudza vaRevhi kuti vave vanhu vangu panzvimbo yavose vanotanga kuberekwa, matangwe, pakati pavaIsiraeri. Saka vaRevhi vava vangu." 
Numbers3:13 Ndinodaro nokuti kubvira musi wandakarakasha matangwe ose eIjipiti ndakanga ndazvitsaurira matangwe ose omuIsiraeri kuti ave angu, kubvira matangwe avanhu neemhuka, ndeangu. Ndini Tenzi.”" 
Numbers3:14 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi murenje reSinai achiti," 
Numbers3:15 “Verenga vanakomana vaRevhi nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo, mhuri nemhuri, munhurume wose kubvira parusvava rune mwedzi mumwechete zvichikwira.”" 
Numbers3:16 Naizvozvo Mosesi akavaverenga sezvakanga zvataurwa naMwari. 
Numbers3:17 Ava ndivo vana vaRevhi, kunoti Gerishoni naKohati naMerari." 
Numbers3:18 Aya ndiwo mazita avana vaGerishoni nemhuri dzavo kune yaRibhini neyaShimei. 
Numbers3:19 VokwaKohati nemhuri dzavo ndevaAmuramu naIzhari naHebhuroni naUzieri. 
Numbers3:20 Vana vokwaMerari nemhuri dzavo ndevaMahiri naMushi. Idzi ndidzo mhuri dzavaRevhi, mudzimba dzamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers3:21 VokwaGerishoni vaisanganisira mhuri yavaRibhini neyavaShimei. Idzodzi ndidzo mhuri dzokwaGerishoni. 
Numbers3:22 Uwandi hwavanhurume vavo vakaverengwa vaye kubvira parusvava runo mwedzi mumwechete zvichikwira, vaisvika zviuru zvinomwe zvina mazana mashanu." 
Numbers3:23 Vemhuri yaGerishoni ndivo vaizodzika matendhe avo kuseri kwetendhe rinoera nechokumadokero. 
Numbers3:24 Eriasafu mwanakomana waRaeri anenge ari mutungamiriri wemhuri yaGerishoni. 
Numbers3:25 Patendhe rokusanganira, basa remhuri yaGerishoni nderokuchengeta tendhe rinoera, namachira okudzikatirisa nejira rokudzikatirisa pamusuo wetendhe rokusanganira," 
Numbers3:26 namachira okudzikatirisa ruvanze rwomukati metendhe rinoera, nejira rokudzikatirisa pamusuo weparuvanze rwakatenderera tendhe rinoera, neatari, netambo dzaro, nebasa rose repo." 
Numbers3:27 VokwaKohati vaisanganisira mhuri yaAmuramu nemhuri yaIzhari neyaHebhuroni neyaUzira. Idzodzi ndidzo mhuri dzaKohati. 
Numbers3:28 Uwandi hwavanhurume vose vakaverengwa vaye kubvira parusvava rune mwedzi mumwechete zvichikwira, vaisvika zviuru zvisere zvina mazana matanhatu. Ava ndivo vaiva vachengeti vetendhe." 
Numbers3:29 Vemhuri yaKohati ndivo vaizodzika matendhe avo kumaodzanyemba kwetendhe rinoera. 
Numbers3:30 Erizafani mwanakomana waUzieri anenge ari mutungamiriri wemhuri yaKohati. 
Numbers3:31 Ndivo vaiva nebasa rokuchengeta bhokisi rechitenderano netafura nechigadziko chomwenje nedziatari mbiri nemidziyo yaishandiswa mumupanda unoera neketeni rechidzikatiro nezvose zvebasa razvo. 
Numbers3:32 Ereazari mwanakomana womupristi Aroni, ndiye aiva mutungamiriri wavaRevhi vose. Ndiye aiva mutariri wevose vaiita mabasa mutendhe rinoera." 
Numbers3:33 Merari ndiye tateguru wemhuri yaMahiri neyaMushi. Iwaya ndiwo madzinza okwaMerari. 
Numbers3:34 Uwandi hwavanhurume vavo vaikwana zviuru zvitanhatu namazana maviri kubvira pavana vano mwedzi mumwechete. 
Numbers3:35 Vanhu vose vemhuri yaMerari ngavadzike matendhe avo zvichienda nechokuchamhembe kwetendhe rinoera. Zurieri mwana waAbhihairi ndiye aiva mutungamiriri wemhuri dzamadzibaba avo. 
Numbers3:36 Vemhuri yaMerari ndivo vakapiwa basa rokuchengeta zvemapango etendhe rinoera nembariro, nembiru dzaro nezvigadzikiro nezvose zvinofambirana nazvo. Ndivo vaiita basa rose raienderana nezvinhu izvozvi." 
Numbers3:37 Ndivo vaichengetawo mbiru nezvigadzikiro nehoko netambo zvokukomberedza ruvanze. 
Numbers3:38 Vaizodzikawo matendhe avo pamberi petendhe rinoera, kumabvazuva pakatarisana netendhe rokusanganira nechokumabvazuva ndiMosesi naAroni navanakomana vake. Zvemipiro yomunzvimbo inoera zvaiva mumaoko avo zvose zvaifanira kuitirwa vaIsiraeri. Mumwewo munhuwo zvake anofemera kuita basa iroro ngaaurayiwe." 
Numbers3:39 Vose vedzinza rekwaRevhi vakaverengwa naMosesi naAroni mhuri nemhuri sokurayirwa kwavakaitwa naTenzi. Uwandi hwavanhurume kubvira pavana vano mwedzi mumwechete zvichienda mberi vaiva makumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri. 
Numbers3:40 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Verenga matangwe ose echirume pakati pavaIsiraeri, kubvira parusvava runo mwedzi mumwechete zvichikwira, unyore mazita avo ose." 
Numbers3:41 Zvino panzvimbo yamatangwe avaIsiraeri iwaya namatangwe ezvipfuwo zvavo, nditsaurire vaRevhi kuti vave vanhu vangu, ini Tenzi.”" 
Numbers3:42 Naizvozvo Mosesi akaverenga matangwe iwaya ose pakati pavaIsiraeri sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi. 
Numbers3:43 Matangwe echirume ose akaverengwa kubvira parusvava runo mwedzi mumwechete zvichikwira, aisvika makumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri zvina mazana maviri ana makumi manomwe navatatu." 
Numbers3:44 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers3:45 “Zvino panzvimbo yamatangwe avaIsiraeri, nditsaurire vaRevhi. Panzvimbowo yamatangwe ezvipfuwo zvavo, nditsaurire matangwe ezvipfuwo zvavaRevhi. VaRevhi vachava vangu ini Tenzi." 
Numbers3:46 Zvino kuti udzikinure matangwe mazana maviri namakumi manomwe avaIsiraeri huri ihwo uwandi hwavanopfuura nahwo kuwanda kwakaita vaRevhi makumi manomwe navanhu vatatu. Naizvozvo vana vakapfuuridza ivavo ngavadzikinurwe. 
Numbers3:47 Mumwe nomumwe wevana ivavo anofanira kudzikinurwa nemari yesirivha iri pamurao yomunzvimbo inoera. 
Numbers3:48 Mari yokudzikunura vanhu vakapfuuridza ivava, ngaipiwe Aroni navanakomana vake.”" 
Numbers3:49 Saka Mosesi akatora mari yakadzikinuriswa vaya vakanga vapfuuridza pauwandi hwavaRevhi. 
Numbers3:50 Akaunganidza mari inoita chiuru chimwechete china mazana matatu ana makumi matanhatu ane shanu emari yesirivha iri pamurao yomunzvimbo inoera. 
Numbers3:51 Mosesi akapa mari iya yavakadzikinuriswa nayo kuna Aroni navanakomana vake sokutaurirwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi. 
Numbers4:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Numbers4:2 “Verengai vaRevhi vemhuri yokwaKohati, muverenge vanhu, vose mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers4:3 Verengai vanhurume vose vana makore makumi matatu neanopfuura kune vane makore makumi mashanu vanobvumirwa kushanda mutendhe rinoera. 
Numbers4:4 Iri ndiro basa revanakomana vaKohati mutendhe rokusanganira nderezvezvinhu zvinoeresesa zvomo.” 
Numbers4:5 Kana nguva yokutamisa matendhe yasvika, Aroni nevanakomana vake ngavapinde mutendhe iroro, vaturure jira rokudzikatirisa riri pakatarisana nebhokisi rechitenderano, vafukidze naro bhokisi rechitenderano." 
Numbers4:6 Ngavatore dehwe retahashi vafukidze naro pamusoro pejira iroro, vawaridze jira reruvara rwedenga pamusoro pedehwe iroro, vapfekere mapango okutakurisa bhokisi rinoera." 
Numbers4:7 Ngavawarire jira reruvara rwedenga patafura yechingwa chepana Mwari, varongedzere pajira iroro ndiro namadhishi orusenzi nemidziyo yokuisa zvinopirwa, nemidziyo yomupiro nezvokunwa. Chingwa chepana Mwari chinofanira kuva ipapo nguva dzose." 
Numbers4:8 Ngavatore jira dzvuku vafukidze naro midziyo iyoyo yose, vaise dehwe retahashi pamusoro payo, vapfekere mapango okutakurisa tafura iyoyo." 
Numbers4:9 Ngavatore jira reruvara rwedenga vaputire chigadzikiro chomwenje pamwechete namarambi acho nezvokuadzimisa netireyi dzesimbi, nemidziyo inochengeterwa mafuta eorivhi." 
Numbers4:10 Ngavachiputire pamwechete nemidziyo yacho yose mudehwe retahashi, vagadzikire zvose pamapango okutakurisa." 
Numbers4:11 Ngavawarire jira reruvara rwedenga paatari yendarama, vaiputirewo nedehwe retahashi, vapfekere mapango okutakurisa atari iyoyo." 
Numbers4:12 Ngavatore jira reruvara rwedenga vaputire midziyo yose inoshandiswa munzvimbo inoera vaise dehwe rakanyatsosukutwa pamusoro payo, vagadzike izvozvo pamapango okutakurisa." 
Numbers4:13 Ngavabvise dota paatari, vawarire jira dzvuku pairi," 
Numbers4:14 varongedze pajira iroro midziyo yose yepaatari inoti mabisiro neforogo nefoshoro nembenge nemidziyo yose yepaatari. Ngavaifukidze nedehwe retahashi, vapfekere mapango okuitakurisa." 
Numbers4:15 Kana Aroni navanakomana vake vapedza kurongedza nokuputira zvose panotamiswa tendhe rinoera, vanhu vemhuri yokwaKohati vanozouya kuzotakura zvinhu zvinoera. Asi ngavarege kubata zvinhu zvinoera nokuti vangadaro vakafa. Ndiwo mabasa anoitwa navanhu vemhuri yokwaKohati mutendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers4:16 Ereazari mwanakomana womupristi Aroni, ndiye ane basa rezvemafuta okuisa mumarambi, norusenzi noupfu hwomipiro yembesanwa, namafuta okuzodzesa nezvimwe zvose zvomutendhe rinoera nemidziyo yemo." 
Numbers4:17 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Numbers4:18 “Musaite kuti vemba yokwaKohati vatsakatike pakati pedzinza raRevhi. 
Numbers4:19 Zvino, kuti vararame varege kufa pavanouya pedyo nezvinhu zvinoera zvamuchaita kwavari ndezvizvi; Aroni navanakomana vake vachapindamo vovagovera mabasa okuita." 
Numbers4:20 Asi ngavarege kupindamo vachitarisa zvinhu zvinoera kana kwekanguva kaduku zvako kuti varege kufa.” 
Numbers4:21 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers4:22 “Verenga vanhu vemhuri yokwaGerishoni verenga vanhu vose, mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:23 vanhurume vose kubvira pana vana makore makumi matatu zvichikwira kusvikira pana vana makumi mashanu, vanokwanisa kushanda mutendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers4:24 Iri ndiro basa remhuri dzokwaGerishoni pavanoshanda nokutakura zvinhu. 
Numbers4:25 Ndivo vanotakura machira maviri okudzikatirisa tendhe rokusanganira needenga rayo, romukati nerapamusoro, nedehwe rembudzi rokufukidza padenga paro nejira rokudzikatirisa repamusuo," 
Numbers4:26 namachira okudzikatirisa ruvanze rwomukati metendhe rinoera, nejira rokudzikatirisa pamusuo wokupinda muruvanze mune atari, netambo dzayo, nemidziyo yose yebasa ravo. Vanofanira kuita basa rose rinodiwa pazviri." 
Numbers4:27 Basa rose richaitwa nevekwaGerishoni ibasa ravanenge vatumwa naAroni nevana vake, zvose zvavanotakura nazvose zvavanoita. Ndimi muchavapa basa rokutakura." 
Numbers4:28 Saka mabasa iwaya ndiwo avanhu vemhuri yokwaGerishoni avanoita mutendhe rinoera. Vachaaita vachitungamirirwa naItamaru mwanakomana womupristi Aroni. 
Numbers4:29 “Verenga vaRevhi vemhuri yokwaMerari uchiverenga vanhu vose mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo. 
Numbers4:30 Verenga vanhurume vose kubvira pana vana makore makumi matatu zvichikwira kusvikira pana vana makumi mashanu vanokwanisa kushanda mutendhe rokusanganira. 
Numbers4:31 Iri ndiro basa ravo rokutakura ndiro basa rose mutendhe rokusanganira basa rokutakura mbiru nezvigadziko namapango nembariro zvetendhe rokusanganira," 
Numbers4:32 nembiru dzenhandare yose kuitenderedza nezvigadzikiro zvadzo nehoko netambo nenhumbi dzavo nezvose zvadzinoshanda nadzo. 
Numbers4:33 Iri ndiro basa revemba yokwaMerari, basa rose ravanoita mutendhe rokusanganira. Vachariita vachitungamirirwa naItamaru mwanakomana womupristi Aroni.”" 
Numbers4:34 Mosesi naAroni navatungamiriri vegungano ravaIsiraeri vakaverenga vanhurume vemba yokwaKohati, mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:35 kubvira pana vana makumi matatu amakore zvichikwira kusvikira kuna vana makumi mashanu, vose vaikwanisa kuita basa romutendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers4:36 Pamhuri dzavo dzose vaikwana zviuru zviviri namazana manomwe ana makumi mashanu avanhu.
