Numbers4:37 Ihwohwu ndihwo uwandi hwevemba yokwaKohati, vose vaiita basa remutendhe rokusanganira vaya vakaverengwa naMosesi naAroni sokuudzwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Numbers4:38 Vechirume vemba yokwaGerishoni vakaverengwa, mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:39 kubvira pana vana makumi matatu amakore zvichikwira kusvikira kuna vana makumi mashanu, vose vaikwanisa kuita basa romutendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers4:40 Pamhuri dzavo dzose nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo vaikwana zviuru zviviri namazana matanhatu ana makumi matatu avanhu. 
Numbers4:41 Ihwohwu ndihwo uwandi hwevemba yokwaGerishoni, vose vaiita basa romutendhe rokusanganira vakaverengwa naMosesi naAroni sokuudzwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Numbers4:42 Vanhurume vemba yokwaMerari vakaverengwa, mhuri nemhuri nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo," 
Numbers4:43 kubvira pana vana makumi matatu amakore zvichikwira kusvikira kuna vana makumi mashanu, vose vaikwanisa kuita basa romutendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers4:44 Pamhuri dzavo dzose nedzimba dzemadzibaba avo vaikwana zviuru zvitatu namazana maviri. 
Numbers4:45 Ihwohwu ndihwo uwandi hwevechirume hwevemba yokwaMerari vakaverengwa naMosesi naAroni sokuudzwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers4:46 VaRevhi vose zvavo vakaverengwa naMosesi naAroni navatungamiriri vavaIsiraeri, vaiverengwa mhuri nemhuri, nedzimba dzamadzibaba avo." 
Numbers4:47 Vaibvira kuverenga pana vana makumi matatu amakore zvichikwira kusvikira kuna vana makumi mashanu, vose vaikwanisa kupinda basa rokushanda nokutakura mitoro yomutendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers4:48 Vose vakaverengwa vaikwana zviuru zvisere namazana mashanu ana makumi masere avanhu. 
Numbers4:49 Vose vakaverengwa sokutaurirwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. Mumwe nomumwe akapiwa basa rokuita kana kuudzwa zvokutakura, ndokuverengwa kwavakaitwa sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Numbers5:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers5:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti ngavaburitse kunze kwamatendhe munhu ane chirwere cheganda chakaipisisa naane zvinobuda mumuviri wake naanenge an'oreswa nokubata chitunha. 
Numbers5:3 Vanhu vakadai, varume kana vakadzi vaburitsei kunze kwematendhe kuti varege kun'oresa nzvimbo yake yose yematendhe mandinogara.”" 
Numbers5:4 VaIsiraeri vakaita saizvozvo vakavaburitsa kunze kwematendhe avo sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers5:5 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers5:6 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti kana munhu atadzira mumwe, munhu iyeyu atopesana naTenzi." 
Numbers5:7 Munhu akadaro ngaareurure chitadzo chake aripe mhosva yacho nokubvisa muripo wayo agowedzera makumi maviri pazana roga roga raanofanira kuripa. 
Numbers5:8 Kana munhu anogamuchira muripo iwoyo akafa pasinawo hama yake yomumba ingaugamuchira, ngaupiwe Tenzi kuti uzoshandiswa navapristi. Muripo iwoyo ndowokuwedzera pahondohwe inourayiwa panoitwa mupiro wokuripira chitadzo chake." 
Numbers5:9 Zvipo zvose zvavaIsiraeri nezvose zvavanenge vaturira kuna Mwari vachizviunza kumupristi ndezvomupristi. 
Numbers5:10 Chinhu chipi nechipi zvacho chinenge chaturirwa kuna Mwari nomunhu, chose chose zvacho chinenge chapiwa mupristi nomunhu ndechomupristi iyeyo pachake.”" 
Numbers5:11 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers5:12 “Udza vaIsiraeri izvi: Ngatiti mukadzi womunhu aita unzenza hwokusatendeka kumurume wake," 
Numbers5:13 mumwe murume akarara naye zvikasazivikanwa nomurume wake, pasina amuona, asiye akazvin'oresa. Saka hakuna angamupomere mhosva uye panenge pasina chapupu nokuti anenge asina kubatwa achizviita." 
Numbers5:14 Ngatiti murume iyeyo afungidzira mukadzi wake akazvin'oresa, kana kuti mweya wokufungira unouya paari asi mukadzi wake asina kuzvin'oresa," 
Numbers5:15 pakadaro murume ngaaende nomukadzi wake kumupristi. Ngaauye nechibayiro chinodiwa kuti chipirwe iye cheupfu hwebhari hunorema kirogiramu rimwechete. Asi ngaarege kuisa mafuta eorivhi muupfu ihwohwo, kana kuhuisa rusenzi nokuti iwoyo mupiro wembesanwa weshanje, unoreva kuti pakaparwa mhosva inofanira kuyeukwa." 
Numbers5:16 “Mupristi ngaaunze mukadzi iyeyo andomumisa pamberi paTenzi. 
Numbers5:17 Mupristi ngaadire mvura inoera mumudziyo wevhu, anokore ivhu romutendhe rinoera ariise mumvura iya." 
Numbers5:18 Mupristi ngaamise mudzimai iyeyo pamberi paTenzi ngaarudunure vhudzi romukadzi iyeyo, amubatise mumaoko upfu hwemupiro wembesanwa weshanje unoreva kuti paparwa mhosva inofanira kuyeukwa. Mupristi ngaabate mumaoko ake mbiya iya ine mvura inozhurungunda kuvava yokurengeresa rushambwa." 
Numbers5:19 Mupristi iyeyo ngaaite kuti mukadzi uya apike mhiko yokuti, ‘Kana usina kutorana nomumwe murume kana usina kutsaukira kunezvakan'ora uri mumaoko omurume wako mvura iyoyi yokurengeresa nayo rushambwa ngairege kuwana chainokuita.’" 
Numbers5:20 Asi kana wakaita zvako zvounzenza, iwe uri mumaoko omurume wako, uyezve kana iwe wakazvin'oresa uchitorana nomumwe murume asiri murume wako," 
Numbers5:21 pakadai mupristi ngaatsidzire mukadzi iyeyo rushambwa achiti kumudzimai, ‘Tenzi ngaaite kuti urengererwe pakati pavanhu vakwako uzvimbe dumbu, upfudzike pamuviri.’ Mukadzi iyeyo ngaadaire achiti, ‘Ameni, ngazvive saizvozvo.’" 
Numbers5:22 “Mvura iyi inopa rushambwa ngaipinde nomudumbu mako, muviri wako uzvimbe, upfudzike pamuviri. “Mukadzi iyeyo ngaati, ‘Ameni, ngazvive saizvozvo.’" 
Numbers5:23 “Mupristi ngaanyore kurengerera rushambwa ikoku, mubhuku asukire zvanyorwa zviya mumvura iya inozhurungunda kuvava." 
Numbers5:24 Mupristi ngaamwise mudzimai mvura iyoyo inozhurungunda yokurengeresa. Mvura iyoyo yokurengeresa rushamba ichapinda maari igomurwadzisa zvakanyanya. 
Numbers5:25 Mupristi ngaatore upfu hwemupiro weshanje pamaoko emudzimai iyeyo ahusumudzire kuna Tenzi achipira mupiro wembesanwa paatari. 
Numbers5:26 Mupristi ngaanokore tsama yahwo yechirango ahupise paatari. Shure kwaizvozvo ngaanwise mukadzi iyeyo mvura iya. 
Numbers5:27 “Mupristi kana achinge amunwisa mvura iya, kana mukadzi iyeyo achinge akazvin'oresa asina kutendeka kumurume wake, mvura yokurengeresa rushambwa ichamupinda igomurwadza zvakaipisisa. Ichafufumisa muviri wake kuzvimba, achazvimba dumbu agopfudzika pamuviri; achave munhu akarengererwa rushambwa pakati pavanhu vokwake." 
Numbers5:28 Asi kana mukadzi iyeyo asina kuzvin'oresa akachena, hapana chinomuwana, uye achava nembereko zvake." 
Numbers5:29 “Uyu ndiwo murao wakanangana nezveshanje, kana mudzimai achinge atsauka aita zvounzenza zvake achizvin'oresa, iye ari mumaoko omurume wake," 
Numbers5:30 uye kana murume apindwawo nomweya weshanje, oitira mukadzi wake shanje. Ngaaunze mukadzi wake pana Tenzi, mupristi aite kune mukadzi iyeyo zvose zvinorehwa nomurawo uyu." 
Numbers5:31 Murume wake achashamba mhosva iyi maoko, asi mukadzi iyeyo achawana mubairo wouipi hwake.”" 
Numbers6:1 Tenzi akati," 
Numbers6:2 “Iti kuvaIsiraeri kana munhurume kana munhukadzi akaita mhiko inokosha achipikira kuva muNaziri achizviturira kunaTenzi," 
Numbers6:3 ngaarege kunwa waini kana doro. Ngaarege kunwa vhiniga yakaitwa newaini kana nedoro kana kunwa muto kana kudya magirepisi manyoro kana akaomeswa. 
Numbers6:4 Mazuva aanenge ari muNaziri ngaarege kudya chinobva pamuti womugirepisi kunyange mhodzi dzamagirepisi kana ganda rawo. 
Numbers6:5 “Mazuva ose aanenge akazvipikira kuva muNaziri ngaarege kuveurwa vhudzi, kana ndebvu dzake nokuti akazviturira kuna Tenzi. Saka ngaarege vhudzi rake richireba." 
Numbers6:6 Pamazuva iwayo ose aakazvipira kuna Tenzi ngaarege kusvika pedyo nechitunha," 
Numbers6:7 chingave chitunha chababa vake kana amai vake kana chomukoma kana munun'una wake, kana chehanzvadzi yake kana vakafa haafaniri kunzvin'oresa chiratidzo chokuzvipira kwake chiri pamusoro wake." 
Numbers6:8 Mazuva ake ose ouNaziri anenge ari munhu akaturirwa kuna Tenzi. 
Numbers6:9 “Kana munhu akakaruka afira pedyo nomuNazari musoro womuNaziri iyeyo unobva wan'oreswa. Ngaaveure musoro wake pazuva rake rokuzvichenura pazuva rechinomwe. 
Numbers6:10 Pazuva rorusere, ngaaunze njiva mbiri kana hangaiwa mbiri kumupristi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers6:11 Mupristi ngaapire imwe yadzo achiita chibayiro chokupirira zvitadzo; imwe yadzo yove yechibayiro chokupisa achichenura muNaziri mukun'oreswa kwaanenge aitwa nechitunha. Pamusi iwoyo ngaaturire zvakare musoro wake kuna Tenzi. 
Numbers6:12 Ngaazvitsaurire Tenzi kwamazuva ose aakanga ati anozvitsaurira Mwari. Ngaaunze hwayana ine gore rimwechete yomupiro wokuripa mhosva. Mazuva ake aye okutanga haana basa, nokuti kuzvipira kwake kouNaziri kwakan'oreswa." 
Numbers6:13 “Uyu mutemo unosunga muNaziri kana mazuva ake okuzvipira asvika kumagumo, ngaauye kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira," 
Numbers6:14 apire zvipo zvake kuna Tenzi hwayana hono ine gore rimwechete isina chinoshoreka yomupiro wokupisa, nehwayana hadzi ine gore rimwechete isina chinoshoreka yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, nehondohwe isina chinoshoreka yechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana." 
Numbers6:15 Ngaapirewo tswanda yezvingwa zvisina mbiriso, nezvingwa zvikobvu zveupfu hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwekoroni hwakakanywa namafuta eorivhi, nezvingwa zvitete zvakazorwa mafuta eorivhi pamwechete nomupiro wembesanwa nomupiro wezvokunwa." 
Numbers6:16 “Mupristi ngaauye nazvo zvose kuna Tenzi apire nomupiro wake wokupfupira zvitadzo zvake mupiro wake wokupisa. 
Numbers6:17 Ngaapire hondohwe yechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana kuna Tenzi netswanda yezvingwa zvisina mbiriso. Mupristi ngaapire nomupiro wembesanwa nemupiro wawo wezvokunwa kuna Tenzi," 
Numbers6:18 kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, aveure vhudzi rake rakamboturirwa kuna Mwari atore vhudzi mumusoro wake wakapirwa kuna Mwari ariise mumoto unenge uri pasi pechibayiro chokuwadzana." 
Numbers6:19 “Kana bandauko rehondohwe iya rabikwa mupristi ngaaritore pamwechete nechingwa chisina mbiriso nechingwa chitete chomutswanda chiya, ape zvose muNazari uya aveura vhudzi rake rokuzvipira kuna Tenzi." 
Numbers6:20 Mupristi ngaazviite mupiro unosimudzirwa uchipirwa kuna Tenzi. Mugove unoera womupristi pamwechete nechityu chinosimudzwa nechidya chinopirwa. Kana zvose izvozvo zvapera muNazari angachinwa zvake waini. 
Numbers6:21 “Iwoyu ndiwo murao unonangana nomuNazari anenge apika mhiko. Kuzvipira kwake kuna Tenzi somuNazari ngakuchengetwe maererano nemhiko yake. Asi kana pane zvimwewo zvaanokwanisa kuita ngaaite zvake. Asi zvouNazari hwake ihwohwo anofanira kuzvichengeta nomazvo.” 
Numbers6:22 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers6:23 “Taurira Aroni navanakomana vake kuti kana vava kukomborera vaIsiraeri ngavataure vachiti: 
Numbers6:24 “Tenzi ngaakukomborerei akuchengetei 
Numbers6:25 Tenzi ngaakucheukei akunzwirei tsitsi 
Numbers6:26 Tenzi ngaakutarisei akupei rugare. 
Numbers6:27 “Kana vakadoma zita rangu pavanokomborera vaIsiraeri, ini ndichavakomborera.”" 
Numbers7:1 Mosesi akati apedza kumisa tendhe rinoera akarizodza akariturira kuna Mwari pamwechete nezvose zvomo akazodza akaturirawo atari nemidziyo yayo. 
Numbers7:2 Vatungamiriri vavaIsiraeri navatungamiriri vavo vedzimhuri nevemadzinza vaitungamirira kuverengwa kwavanhu," 
Numbers7:3 vakauya nezvipo zvavo kuna Tenzi. Zvaiva ngoro nhanhatu dzakafukidzwa uyewo nzombe gumi nembiri. Vatungamiriri vaviri vaiunza ngoro imwechete, mumwe nomumwe wavo achiunza nzombe imwechete. Vakazviunza kutendhe rinoera" 
Numbers7:4 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers7:5 “Gamuchira izvi kwavari zvishandiswe pabasa romutendhe rinoera. Upe zvinhu izvozvo mumwe nomumwe wavaRevhi maererano nebasa raanoita.” 
Numbers7:6 Naizvozvo Mosesi akatora ngoro dziya nenzombe akapa vaRevhi. 
Numbers7:7 Akapa vemhuri yokwaGerishoni ngoro mbiri, nenzombe ina maererano nebasa ravaiita." 
Numbers7:8 Akapa vemhuri yokwaMerari ngoro ina nenzombe tsere maererano nebasa ravaiita vachitungamirirwa naItamaru mwanakomana womupristi Aroni. 
Numbers7:9 Asi hapana chaakapa vemhuri yokwaKohati nokuti ndivo vaiva nebasa rezvinhu zvinoera zvaifanira kutakurwa pamafudzi. 
Numbers7:10 Vatungamiriri vakauyawo nezvipo zvokupira nazvo atari kuna Mwari pazuva rayakazodzwa, vakauya nazvo kuatari." 
Numbers7:11 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti vanhu ivavo, ngavauye kuzopira zvipo zvavo zvokuturira atari kuna Mwari vachiita mumwechete, mumwechete pazuva." 
Numbers7:12 Akapira mupiro wake zuva rokutanga ndiNahishoni mwanakomana waAminadhabhu wedzinza rokwaJudha. 
Numbers7:13 Mupiro wake waiva neizvi zvinoti: mbenge yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu, kwouya ndiro yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera, dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa;" 
Numbers7:14 kwoti dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu rina magiramu gumi rizere rusenzi; 
Numbers7:15 kwotiwo handira ichiri duku, imwechete, nehondohwe imwechete yomupiro wokupisa;" 
Numbers7:16 uye gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:17 kuchizoti zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waNahishoni mwanakomana wavaAminadhabhu. 
Numbers7:18 Pazuva rechipiri racho, Nataneri mwanakomana waZuaru, mutungamiriri wevokwaIsakari, akapirawo mupiro." 
Numbers7:19 Mupiro wake waakapira waiva wezvizvi zvinoti: mbenge yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwouya ndiro yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu, maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera, dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta omupiro wembesanwa;" 
Numbers7:20 kwoti dhishi rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu rina magiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi;" 
Numbers7:21 kwotiwo handira ichiri duku imwechete, nehondohwe imwechete, nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa;" 
Numbers7:22 uye gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:23 kwozoti zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu, dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waNataneri mwanakomana wavaZuaru." 
Numbers7:24 Pazuva retatu racho, akauya ndiEriabhu mwanakomana waHeroni, aiva mutungamiriri wavanhu govero rokwaZebhuruni." 
Numbers7:25 Mupiro wakewo waiva weizvi zvinoti: mbenge yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu, kwouya ndiro yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera; dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa;" 
Numbers7:26 kwouyawo dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu rina magiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi," 
Numbers7:27 kwoti handira ichiri duku imwechete, nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa;" 
Numbers7:28 kukati gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo," 
Numbers7:29 kuchizoti zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waEriabhu mwanakomana wavaHeroni. 
Numbers7:30 Pazuva rechina racho, kwakauyawo Erizuru mwanakomana wavaShedheuru, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaRubheni." 
Numbers7:31 Mupiro wake waiva wezvizvi zvinoti: mbenge yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwoti ndiro yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera, dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere upfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta, hwomupiro wembesanwa," 
Numbers7:32 kukati dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu rina magiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi," 
Numbers7:33 kwotiwo handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete, ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa;" 
Numbers7:34 kwotizve gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo 
Numbers7:35 kuchizouya zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu, dzine gore rimwechete. Iwoyu ndiwo mupiro waErizuru mwanakomana waShedheuru." 
Numbers7:36 Pazuva rechishanu racho, kwakauyawo Sherumieri mwanakomana waZurishadhai, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaSimeoni." 
Numbers7:37 Mupiro wake waiva wezvizvi zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha, yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; uye ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera, dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere upfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa;" 
Numbers7:38 kwouya dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu rina magiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi;" 
Numbers7:39 uyewo handira ichiri duku, imwechete nehondohwe imwechete, nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa;" 
Numbers7:40 uyezve gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:41 kukati zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Iwoyu ndiwo mupiro waSherumieri mwanakomana waZurishadhai. 
Numbers7:42 Pazuva rechitanhatu racho, kwakauya Eriasafu mwanakomana waDheueri, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaGadhi." 
Numbers7:43 Mupirowo wake waiva weizvi zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwouya ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera, dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa;" 
Numbers7:44 kwoti dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi;" 
Numbers7:45 kukati handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa; 
Numbers7:46 kukachiti gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:47 kukatiwo zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waEriasafu mwanakomana waDheueri. 
Numbers7:48 Pazuva rechinomwe racho, kwakauyawo Erishama mwanakomana waAmihudhi, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaEfuraimu." 
Numbers7:49 Mupiro wake waiva wezvizvi zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwouya ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera; dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere upfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta omupiro wembesanwa; 
Numbers7:50 kwouyazve dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi;" 
Numbers7:51 kwoti handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa; 
Numbers7:52 kwotiwo gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:53 kukati zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyuwo ndiwo mupiro waErishama mwanakomana waAmihudhi. 
Numbers7:54 Pazuva rechisere racho, kwakauya Gamarieri mwanakomana waPedhahizuru, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaManase." 
Numbers7:55 Mupiro wakewo waiva wezvizvi zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwouya ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera, dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa;" 
Numbers7:56 kukati dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi;" 
Numbers7:57 kukachiti handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana honho imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa; 
Numbers7:58 kuchiti gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:59 kuchizoti zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Iwoyu ndiwo mupiro waGamarieri mwanakomana waPedhahizuru. 
Numbers7:60 Pazuva rechipfumbamwe racho, kwakauya Abhidhani mwanakomana waGidheoni, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaBhenjamini." 
Numbers7:61 Mupiro wake waiva weizvi zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; uye ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera; dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa; 
Numbers7:62 uyewo dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi rizere rusenzi; 
Numbers7:63 uyezve handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa; 
Numbers7:64 kwouya gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:65 kwozouya zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waAbhidhani mwanakomana waGidheoni. 
Numbers7:66 Pazuva rechigumi racho, kwakauyawo Ahiezero mwanakomana wavaAmishadhai, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaDhani." 
Numbers7:67 Mupiro wake waiva wezvizviwo zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwouya ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu namagiramu gumi maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera; dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere upfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa; 
Numbers7:68 uyewo dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi rizere rusenzi; 
Numbers7:69 uyezve handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa; 
Numbers7:70 kwouyawo gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:71 kwozouya zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waAhiezero mwanakomana waAmishadhai. 
Numbers7:72 Pazuva rechigumi nerimwe, kwakauya Pagieri mwanakomana waOkirani aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaAsheru." 
Numbers7:73 Mupiro wakewo waiva wezvizvi zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwouya ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera, dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere noupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa;" 
Numbers7:74 kukati dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi;" 
Numbers7:75 kuchitiwo handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa; 
Numbers7:76 kuchiti gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:77 kuchizoti zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waPagieri mwanakomana waOkirani. 
Numbers7:78 Pazuva rechigumi namaviri racho, kwakauya Ahira mwanakomana waEnani, aiva mutungamiriri wevedzinza rokwaNafutari." 
Numbers7:79 Mupirowo wake waiva wezvizvi zvinoti: mbenge imwechete yesirivha yairema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; kwouya ndiro imwechete yesirivha yairema mazana masere amagiramu maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera; dzose dziri mbiri dzakanga dzizere upfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka hwakakanyiwa namafuta hwomupiro wembesanwa; 
Numbers7:80 kwoti dhishi rimwechete rendarama rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi, rizere rusenzi;" 
Numbers7:81 kwouya handira ichiri duku imwechete nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono imwechete ine gore rimwechete zvomupiro wokupisa; 
Numbers7:82 kwotiwo gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:83 kwozouya zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvinoti: nzombe mbiri nehondohwe shanu namakotora mashanu nehwayana hono shanu dzine gore rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro waAhira mwanakomana waEnani. 
Numbers7:84 Uyu ndiwo mupiro wakaunzwa wokuteketerera atari kuna Mwari pazuva rayakazodzwa wakabviswa navakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri. Kwakaunzwa izvi zvinoti mbenge dzesirivha gumi nembiri nendiro dzesirivha gumi nembiri; 
Numbers7:85 mbenge imwe neimwe ichirema kirogiramu rimwechete namagiramu makumi mashanu; ndirowo imwe neimwe ichirema mazana masere amagiramu. Naizvozvo pamwechete, midziyo yose yesirivha yakaita mwero wokurema unosvika makumi maviri amakirogiramu ana makirogiramu manomwe namagiramu makumi matanhatu, maererano nomwero weshekeri romunzvimbo inoera;" 
Numbers7:86 kwouya madhishi endarama gumi namaviri aye azere rusenzi, dhishi rimwechete rairema zana ramagiramu namagiramu gumi; pamwechete, madhishi ose endarama akaita mwero wokurema unosvika kirogiramu rimwechete rina makumi matatu amagiramu namagiramu maviri;" 
Numbers7:87 kwoti zvipfuwo zvose zvechibayiro chomupiro wokupisa zvinoti: handira gumi nembiri nehondohwe gumi nembiri nehwayana gumi nembiri hono dzine gore rimwechete pamwechete noupfu hwadzo hwomupiro wembesanwa; kwotiwo makotora gumi namaviri omupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo; 
Numbers7:88 kwochiti zvipfuwo zvose pamwechete zvechibayiro chomupiro wokuwadzana zvakaita: handira makumi maviri ane ina namakumi matanhatu ehondohwe namakotora makumi matanhatu namakumi matanhatuwo ehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete. Iwoyu ndiwo mupiro wokuteketera atari kuna Mwari wakaunzwa iyo yazodzwa. 
Numbers7:89 Mosesi paakapinda mutendhe rokusanganira kundotaura naTenzi, akanzwa izwi raitaura kwaari richibva pahwidibiro yakanga yakakwidibira bhokisi rechitenderano, nechapakati pamakerubhu. Izwi iri rakataura kwaari iye." 
Numbers8:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers8:2 “Udza Aroni kuti paanondogadzika marambi, marambi manomwe anofanira kuvheneka akatarisa mberi kwechigadzikiro chomwenje.”" 
Numbers8:3 Aroni akaita saizvozvo akagadzika marambi akatarisa mberi kwechigadzikiro chomwenje sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers8:4 Chigadzikiro chomwenje ichocho chakanga chakagadzirwa sezvizvi chakanga chakagadzirwa nendarama yakapfurwa kubvira pagaro racho kusvikira kumapazi acho ose. Mosesi akaita chigadziko chomwenje ichocho achitevedzera mufananidzo waakanga aratidzwa naTenzi. 
Numbers8:5 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers8:6 “Tsaura vaRevhi mukati muvaIsiraeri uvachenure. 
Numbers8:7 Zvauchaita kwavari kuti uvachenure ndezvizvi vasase mvura yokuchenura munhu. Uvati vaveure vhudzi remiviri yavo rose nokusuka hanzu dzavo vazvishambidze ivo pachavo. Naizvozvo vanobva vava vanhu vachenurwa. 
Numbers8:8 Ipapo ngavatore handira ichiri duku neupfu hwekoroni hwomupiro wembesanwa hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi. Iwe unozotora imwe handira ichiri duku yomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Numbers8:9 Ukokorodze vaIsiraeri vose umise vaRevhi mberi kwetendhe rinoera. 
Numbers8:10 Paunoturira vaRevhi kwandiri Tenzi, vaIsiraeri ngavaise maoko avo pamusoro pavaRevhi," 
Numbers8:11 Aroni obva asimudzira maoko ake achiturira vaRevhi kwandiri Tenzi. 
Numbers8:12 VaRevhi ngavaise maoko avo pamisoro yehandira dziya. Imwe ndeyechibayiro chomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. Imwe yacho ichava yomupiro wokupisa inoitirwa kuchenura vaRevhi. 
Numbers8:13 Ita kuti vaRevhi vabatsire Aroni navanakomana vake. Naizvozvo vaite somupiro unosimudzirwa uchipirwa kuna Tenzi. 
Numbers8:14 Aya ndiwo matsauriro auchaita vaRevhi muvaIsiraeri vachibva vava vangu. 
Numbers8:15 Kana wachenura vaRevhi nokuvaturira kwandiri somupiro unosimudzirwa uchiturirwa Mwari vachava vanhu vanobvumirwa kuita basa romutendhe rokusanganira. 
Numbers8:16 Zvamakatsaura vaRevhi muvaIsiraeri muchivapa kwandiri zvachose vachitora nzvimbo yamatangwe evaIsiraeri, vaRevhi ndavasarudza kuti vave vangu." 
Numbers8:17 Matangwe ose mukati mavaIsiraeri ndeangu, ose avanhu neemhuka paya pandakauraya matangwe ose omuIjipiti ndipo pandakavatsaurira ini pachangu." 
Numbers8:18 Zvino ndava kuzotora vaRevhi panzvimbo yamatangwe avaIsiraeri. 
Numbers8:19 Ndakapa vaRevhi sechipo kuna Aroni navanakomana vake chakabva muvaIsiraeri kuti vaite basa mutendhe rokusanganira vachishandira vaIsiraeri nokuvadzivirira munjodzi dzingavawire kana vakaswedera munzvimbo inoera.” 
Numbers8:20 Saka Mosesi naAroni navaIsiraeri vose vakaturira vaRevhi kuna Tenzi sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers8:21 VaRevhi vakazvichenura kuzvitadzo, vakasuka hanzu dzavo. Aroni akasimudza maoko ake achivaturira kuna Tenzi. Aroni akapira mipiro yokuchenura vaRevhi." 
Numbers8:22 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvose zvakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi pamusoro pavaRevhi. Mushure maizvozvo vaRevhi vakaenda kundoita basa ravo rokubatsira Aroni navanakomana vake mutendhe rokusanganira. 
Numbers8:23 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers8:24 “Iri ndiro basa ravaRevhi vose vanenge vava namakore makumi maviri namashanu navane anopfuura iwayo ngavaende kundoita basa romutendhe rokusanganira. 
Numbers8:25 Kana vava namakore makumi mashanu ngavazorodzwe kuita basa iroro vachirega kuita basa iroro. 
Numbers8:26 Ngavabatsire vamwe vavo vaRevhi kuita basa romutendhe rinoera. Asi ngavarege kuita basa iroro vari vose. Ndiwo murongero waunofanira kuita mabasa avaRevhi.” 
Numbers9:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi murenje reSinai pamwedzi wokutanga wegore rechipiri rokubuda kwavaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti achiti," 
Numbers9:2 “VaIsiraeri ngavachengete zuva guru rePasika panguva yayo yakatemwa. 
Numbers9:3 Richengetei pazuva regumi nechina romwedzi uno, kubvira zuva rodoka muchitevedza mirao nezvirongwa zvaro zvose.”" 
Numbers9:4 Naizvozvo Mosesi akandoudza vaIsiraeri kuti vachengete zuva guru rePasika. 
Numbers9:5 VaIsiraeri vakachengeta zuva guru rePasika pamwedzi wechiposhi murenje reSinai kubvira zuva rodoka pazuva regumi nechina romwedzi iwoyo. Vakaita zvose zvakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers9:6 Asi kwakava navamwe varume vakanga van'ora nokuti vakanga vabata chitunha. Varume ivavo vakanga vasisakwanisi kuchengeta Pasika pazuva iroro. Vakaenda kuna Mosesi naAroni 
Numbers9:7 vakandoti, “Isu takan'ora nokuti takabata chitunha. Asi tinorambidzirweiko kupira Tenzi mipiro panguva yakatemwa pamwechete navamwe vedu vaIsiraeri.”" 
Numbers9:8 Mosesi ndokuti, “Chimbomirai kusvikira ndanzwa zvandichapiwa naTenzi.”" 
Numbers9:9 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers9:10 “Taurira vaIsiraeri uchiti ani naani wenyu kana mumwe wechizvarwa chenyu anenge abata chitunha chikamun'oresa, nyangwe anenge ari kure, ari parwendo, kana achida kuchengeta Pasika yaTenzi," 
Numbers9:11 anofanira kuzoichengeta. Ngavaichengete mumwedzi wechipiri pazuva regumi nechina zuva rodoka, vaidye pamwechete nemiriwo inovava nechingwa chisina mbiriso," 
Numbers9:12 havafanire kusiya kana chii zvacho chayo kusvikira mangwana. Hapana pfupa rechibayiro rayo rinofanira kutyorwa. Ngavaichengete vachitevedza mirao yayo yose. 
Numbers9:13 Asi ani naani anenge asina kun'ora anenge asiri parwendo anenge arega kuchengeta Pasika atozvichekanisa ukama novokwake nokuti haana kundipa mupiro wake panguva yakatemwa, acharangirwa chitadzo chake." 
Numbers9:14 “Kana mutorwa wamugere naye akada kuchengeta zuva guru rePasika, ngaachengetewo mirao nezvirongwa zvayo zvose. Murao iwoyo ngauchengetwe nemunhu wose, muIsiraeri kana mutorwa.”" 
Numbers9:15 Pazuva rakadzikwa tendhe rinoera gore rakauya rikafukidza tendhe rouchapupu. Usiku gore raitarisika somoto kusvikira kwaedza. 
Numbers9:16 Saka nguva dzose tendhe iroro rainge rakafukidzwa negore masikati, usiku nechainge moto." 
Numbers9:17 Paingosimuka gore iroro patendhe, vaIsiraeri vaibva vatama vachindodzika matendhe avo paraindomirira." 
Numbers9:18 Kutama kwavaIsiraeri panzvimbo nokudzika matendhe kwavo pane imwe nzvimbo kwaitoitwa kana kwabva shoko kuna Tenzi. Kwaiti gore rikaramba rakafukidza tendhe rinoera, vaIsiraeri vairambawo vakadzika matendhe avo ipapo." 
Numbers9:19 Kunyange gore parairamba rakafukidza tendhe rinoera kwenguva ndefu vaiteerera Tenzi vachiramba varipo. 
Numbers9:20 Dzimwe nguva gore raifukidza tendhe rinoera kwamazuva mashoma; vaIsiraeri vaitama kana kuramba varipo maererano neshoko rainge rabva kuna Tenzi. 
Numbers9:21 Dzimwe nguva gore raingorifukidza kubvira manheru kusvikira mangwanani. Paisimuka gore mangwanani vaibva vasimudzirao rwendo rwavo, kana rainge raramba riripo masikati nousiku; parainge razosimuka, ndopavaibva vasimudzirawo rwendo rwavo." 
Numbers9:22 Kana dai kwaipera mazuva maviri, kana mwedzi, kana gore kana nguva ndefu gore rakafukidza tendhe rinoera, vaIsiraeri vairamba vari pamatendhe avo, vasingasimudzire rwendo rwavo. Asi paraisimuka vaibva vasimudzira rwendo rwavo." 
Numbers9:23 Kudzika matendhe kwavo nokutama kwavo, kwaitoitwa kana kwabva shoko kuna Tenzi vachiteerera zvainge zvatemwa naTenzi sokutaurirwa kwainge kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Numbers10:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers10:2 “Pfurai mabhosvo esirivha maviri anoridzirwa vaIsiraeri kuti vaungane uyewo panguva yokuti vachitama. 
Numbers10:3 Kana kwaridzwa mabhosvo maviri vaIsiraeri vose ngavaungane kwaunenge uri kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. 
Numbers10:4 Asi kana kwaridzwa bhosvo rimwechete, vakuru vakuru vatungamiriri vamadzinza avaIsiraeri ngavaungane kwaunenge uri." 
Numbers10:5 Kana mabhosvo aridzwa setsuri, madzinza akadzika matendhe awo kumabvazuva kwetendhe rinoera ngaasimuke atange rwendo." 
Numbers10:6 Kana mabhosvo aridzwa setsuri kechipiri, madzinza akadzika matendhe awo kumaodzanyemba kwetendhe rinoera ngaapinde munzira. Tsuri ngairidzwe nguva dzose dzavanosungirwa kutama." 
Numbers10:7 Asi kana zviri zvokuti vanhu vaungane ngakuridzwe mabhosvo asingaridzwi setsuri. 
Numbers10:8 Mabhosvo ngaaridzwe navanakomana vaAroni vapristi. “Kwamuri, murao wangu wezvemabhosvo, murao uchagara uripo pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose." 
Numbers10:9 Kana mava kuenda kundorwisa vavengi venyu vanenge vakudenhai munyika yenyu, chamunozivisa nacho kuti tava kundorwa, kuridza bhosvo kuti ini Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndigokuyeukai ndikununurei pavavengi venyu." 
Numbers10:10 Pamazuva enyu okufara, napamazuva enyu makuru, napakupemberera kugara kwemwedzi mitsva, namamwewo mazuva enyu makuru, ridzai mabhosvo iwayo. Aridzeiwo pamunouya nemipiro yokuwadzana. Ipapo ini Mwari ndichakuyeukai. Ndini Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndinodaro.”" 
Numbers10:11 Pazuva ramakumi maviri romwedzi wechipiri mugore rechipiri rokubva kwavaIsiraeri kuIjipiti; gore riya rakanga rakafukidza tendhe rechitenderano rakasimudzwa. 
Numbers10:12 VaIsiraeri vakasimuka pagwenga reSinai, vakafamba rwendo rwavo vachimbomira, nzvimbo nezvimbo. Gore riya rakandomira murenje reParani." 
Numbers10:13 Vanhu vakatangisa kufamba sokuudzwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers10:14 Vanhu vomureza wedzinza raJudha ndivo vakatanga kufamba vari mumapoka avo. Vaitungamirirwa naNahishoni mwanakomana waAminadhabhi. 
Numbers10:15 Aitungamirira dzinza rokwaIsiraeri ndiNetaneri mwanakomana waZuari. 
Numbers10:16 Aitungamirira dzinza rokwaZebhuruni ndiEriabhu mwanakomana waHeroni. 
Numbers10:17 Paibviswa tendhe rinoera mhuri yokwaGerishoni neyokwaMerari vaitakura tendhe rinoera vaitakura vachibva vatangisa kufamba. 
Numbers10:18 Vaiteverwa nevanhu vedzinza rokwaRubheni vari mumapoka avo. Vaitungamirirwa naErizuru mwanakomana waShedheuri. 
Numbers10:19 Sherumieri mwanakomana waZurishadhai ndiye aitungamirira dzinza rokwaSimeoni. 
Numbers10:20 Eriasafi mwanakomana waDheueri ndiye aitungamirira dzinza rokwaGadhi. 
Numbers10:21 Vemhuri yokwaKohati vaibva vapindawo munzira vakatakura zvinhu zvinoera. Tendhe rinoera raifanodzikwa vasati vasvika. 
Numbers10:22 Vanhu vomureza wedzinza rokwaEfuremu, vaiteverawo vari mumapoka avo. Vaitungamirirwa naErishama mwanakomana waAmihudhi." 
Numbers10:23 Dzinza rokwaManase raitungamirirwa naGamarieri mwanakomana waPedhazuru. 
Numbers10:24 Dzinza rokwaBhenjamini raitungamirirwa naAbhidhana mwanakomana wokwaGideoni. 
Numbers10:25 Vanhu vomureza wedzinza raDhani, ndivo vaipedzisera kusimuka, vachitsigira vari shure, vari mumapoka avo. Ahiezeri mwanakomana waAmishadhai ndiye aivatungamirira." 
Numbers10:26 Pagieri mwanakomana waOkirani ndiye aitungamirira dzinza rokwaAsheri. 
Numbers10:27 Dzinza rokwaNafutari raitungamirirwa naAhira mwanakomana waEnani. 
Numbers10:28 Aya ndiwo mafambiro aiita vaIsiraeri vari mumapoka avo pavainge vopinda murwendo rwavo. 
Numbers10:29 Mosesi akataura naHobhabhi mwanakomana waReueri, vatezvara vake vorudzi rwavaMidhiani achiti, “Zvino tava kuzopinda murwendo rwokuenda kunyika yatakanzi naTenzi tichazopiwa. Mwari akatsidzira vaIsiraeri kuti vachabudirira. Saka handei tose. Tichazokupaiwo pfuma yatichawana taveko.”" 
Numbers10:30 Hobhabhi ndokuti, “Kwete! Handiendi nemi. Asi ndichadzokera kunyika yangu kune hama dzangu.”" 
Numbers10:31 Mosesi akati, “Ndapota musatisiye. Imi munoziva kwatingandodzika matendhe murenje. Ndimi mungatotitungamirira." 
Numbers10:32 Kana mukaenda nesu tichazokamurirana makomborero ose atichapiwa naTenzi.” 
Numbers10:33 VaIsiraeri pavakabva pagomo raTenzi riya vakafamba mazuva matatu. Bhokisi rechitenderano chaTenzi rakafanotungamira mazuva matatu kundovatsvakira pokudzika matendhe avo. 
Numbers10:34 Masikati gore raTenzi rainge riri pamusoro pavo pavaibva panzvimbo imwe neimwe yavainge vadzika matendhe avo. 
Numbers10:35 Paitangisa bhokisi rechitenderano kufamba, Mosesi aiti, “Tenzi wee! Simukai vavengi venyu vaite chimwandamwanda, vanokuvengai vakutizei.”" 
Numbers10:36 Parainge razomira Mosesi aiti, “Tenzi! Chidzokai kune zviuru nezviuru zvavaIsiraeri.”" 
Numbers11:1 VaIsiraeri vakanyunyuta pamusana penhamo dzavo Tenzi achizvinzwa. Tenzi paakazvinzwa akaviruka nehasha. Akavatumira moto wakaita chibvurebvure uchipisa matendhe avo okumucheto. 
Numbers11:2 Vanhu ndokubva vachema kuna Mosesi. Mosesi akanamata kuna Tenzi moto ukadzima. 
Numbers11:3 Naizvozvo nzvimbo iyoyo yakanzi Tabhera nokuti moto waTenzi wakanganduma pakati pavo. 
Numbers11:4 VaIsiraeri pavaifamba rwendo rwavo vaivao mvongamutititi yavanhu. Vanhu ivavo vaikara nyama zvikuru. VaIsiraeri ndokunyunyutawo vachiti, “Dai tangowanawo zvedu nyama!" 
Numbers11:5 Tinorangarira hove dzamahara dzataidya kuIjipiti, namagaka namanwiwa namarikisi nehanyanisi negariki." 
Numbers11:6 Zvino miviri yedu yarukutika. Hapana chimwe chokudya kana chii zvacho kunze kwemana iyoyi yatangotarisana nayo.” 
Numbers11:7 Mana yakanga yakafanana netsanga dzamapfunde, yakaita sepfuta kuchenuruka." 
Numbers11:8 Vanhu vaienda muruvanze vachindonongera mana. Vaiikuya, kana kuidzvura, voifashaidza mupoto vozoibika chingwa chainaka sechingwa chakabikwa chakakanywa namafuta." 
Numbers11:9 Dova paraidonha usiku muruvanze rwamatendhe mana yaidonhawo pamwechete naro. 
Numbers11:10 Mosesi akanzwa vanhu vemhuri dzose vachinyunyuta vamire mutumapoka pamisuo yematendhe avo. Tenzi akavirukira vanhu zvikuru nehasha. Mosesi akasuwa zvikuru. 
Numbers11:11 Mosesi akati, “Nhai Tenzi! Imhaka yeiko makandiitira zvakaipa zvakadai? Seiko musingandinzwire tsitsi? Ko zvamatondipazve basa rokutungamirira vanhu vose ava?" 
Numbers11:12 Ko ndini ndakavabereka kana kuvasika here zvamunoti ndivarere ndichivatakura mumaoko angu somureri anotakura mwana mucheche ndichienda navo kunyika yamakatsidzira madzibaba avo? 
Numbers11:13 Ko nyama yandingape vanhu vose ava ndingaiwane kupiko, zvavari kuchema vachiti tipe nyama tidye?" 
Numbers11:14 Ini handichagoni kuita basa rokutungamirira vanhu ava ndiri ndoga, zvandiremera." 
Numbers11:15 Kana mukaramba muchiti ndidaro, ndinzwireiwo tsitsi mundiuraye zvenyu kuti ndirege kuramba ndakatsunga imi muchindirwadzisa.”" 
Numbers11:16 Tenzi akati Mosesi, “Ndiunganidzire vanhu varume makumi manomwe vechikuru navatungamiriri vavaIsiraeri. Uya navo kwandiri kutendhe rokusanganira vasvikomira newe." 
Numbers11:17 Ndichaburuka ndichauya ndizotaura newe ikoko. Pamweya wandakakupa, ndichatora mumwe waunawo ndichiupa kwavari. Naizvozvo ivo vachazokubatsira kuita basa rokutungamirira vanhu. Ipapo hauzotakuri basa iroro oga." 
Numbers11:18 Zvino chiudza vanhu uchiti, ‘Zvichenurei nokuti mangwana muchapiwa nyama yokudya. Tenzi akazvinzwira kunyunyuta kwenyu, muchiti ndiani angatipewo zvedu nyama yokudya muchiti taiva nani zvedu kuIjipiti.’ Zvino Tenzi achakupai nyama kuti mudye." 
Numbers11:19 Hamuzoidya kwezuva rimwechete, kana maviri kana mashanu, kana gumi, kunyange makumi maviri." 
Numbers11:20 Asi muchadya mwedzi wose, kusvikira yava kubuda nomumhuno dzenyu, yava kukufinhai. Izvozvo zvichaitika nokuti makaramba Tenzi ari pakati penyu. Makamunyunyutira muchiti takabudirei zvedu Ijipiti.”" 
Numbers11:21 Mosesi ndokuti kuna Tenzi, “Ini ndiri kutungamirira mazana matanhatu ezviuru zvavanhu. Ndovamungati imi mungavape nyama yavanokwana kudya mwedzi wose?" 
Numbers11:22 Ko mombe nehwai dzakakwana dzinowanika kupi dzingabayiwe kuti vawane nyama yavanokwana? Ko hove dzose dzomugungwa kunyange vakadziunganidzirwa vangakwane here?” 
Numbers11:23 Tenzi ndokuti, “Ko kune chii chingatadze kuitwa nesimba rangu? Zvino muchaona kuti zvandataura zvinoitika here kana kuti kwete.”" 
Numbers11:24 Mosesi akabuda akandoudza vanhu zvaakanga audzwa naTenzi. Akakokorodza vatungamiriri makumi manomwe avarume vechikuru vavaIsiraeri ndokuvamisa vakapoteredza tendhe iroro. 
Numbers11:25 Ipapo Tenzi akauya ari mugore akataura naMosesi. Akatora mweya pamweya waiva muna Mosesi akaupa vatungamiriri vaya vaiva makumi manomwe. Mweya iwoyo pawakapinda mavari, vakatangisa kuporofita asi havana kuzoramba vachiporofita." 
Numbers11:26 Zvino vamwe varume vaviri vakasara vari kumatendhe, mumwe ainzi Eridhadhi, mumwe achinzi Medhadhi. Mweya waTenzi wakauya pavari. Varume ivava vakanga vachiverengerwa pavakuru vakuru vaya, asi vakanga vasina kuenda kutendhe ikoko. Vakatanga kuporofita vari kumatendhe ikoko." 
Numbers11:27 Rimwe jaya rakamhanya kundoudza Mosesi kuti Eridhadhi naMedhadhi vari kuporofita mumatendhe. 
Numbers11:28 Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni mubatsiri waMosesi akati kuna Mosesi, “Changamire dzivisai vanhu avo!”" 
Numbers11:29 Mosesi akati, “Ko wava kuvaitira shanje nemhaka yangu here? Ini ndinodisa kuti dai vanhu vose vaTenzi vave vaporofita vose zvavo. Dai Tenzi angoisa Mweya wake pavari.”" 
Numbers11:30 Mosesi navatungamiriri vavaIsiraeri vakazodzokera kumatendhe avo. 
Numbers11:31 Tenzi akatumira mhepo yakaunza zvihuta kubva kugungwa. Yakazvisvitsa pamatendhe nenharaunda yepo yose zvokuti uchibva pamatendhe uchienda kumativi ose zvawo kuti undosvika kwazvaiperera zvaitoda rwendo rwomuswere wose wezuva. Zvakanga zvakatsikirirana zvokuita murwi unokwana mita rimwechete kubva pasi. 
Numbers11:32 Vanhu vakaswerera vakararira vakaswerera zvakare zuva rechipiri vachituta zvihuta. Hakuna munhu akatuta zvihuta asina kusvitsa chiuru chimwechete chamakirogiramu. Vakasasika zvihuta muruvanze rwamatendhe ose. 
Numbers11:33 Asi nyama vachinayo mukanwa isati yapera Tenzi akavavirukira nehasha akavarova nedenda rakaipa. 
Numbers11:34 Naizvozvo nzvimbo iyoyo yakatumidzwa zita rokuti Makuvaovukukara nokuti pakavigwa vanhu vaikara nyama. 
Numbers11:35 Vakatama kuKibhurotihatiaavha vakaenda kuHazeroti, vakambogara kuHazeroti." 
Numbers12:1 Miriamu naAroni vakatsoropodza Mosesi pamusana pomukadzi waakanga aroora, nokuti akanga aroora mukadzi wechiKushi." 
Numbers12:2 Vakati, “Ko Mosesi ndiye oga akangotaurirwa zvinhu naTenzi here? Ko isu hatina kutaurirwawo zvinhu naTenzi here?” Tenzi akanzwa zvavaitaura." 
Numbers12:3 Mosesi akanga ari munhu akazvirereka kupfuura vanhu vose vapanyika. 
Numbers12:4 Pakarepo Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni naMiriamu achiti, “Uyai mose muri vatatu kutendhe rangu rokusanganira.” Vakabuda vari vatatu." 
Numbers12:5 Ipapo Tenzi akauya ari mugore rakasvikomira kumusuo wetendhe iroro. Mwari akadaidza achiti, “Aroni! Miriamu!” Vakaenda mberi vose vari vaviri." 
Numbers12:6 Iye ndokuti, “Chinzwai zvandinoreva! Kana mumwe wenyu ari muporofita ini Tenzi pachangu ndinozviratidza kwaari, kana kutaura naye muchiroto." 
Numbers12:7 Asi handidaro nomuranda wangu Mosesi nokuti zvinhu zvangu zvose ndakazviisa mumaoko ake. 
Numbers12:8 Ndinokurukura naye takatarisana tichinyatsotaurirana pasina zvamadimikira achiona chimiro changu ini Tenzi. Ko makarega sei kutya kutsoropodza muranda wangu Mosesi?” 
Numbers12:9 Tenzi akavashatirirwa ndokubva aenda. 
Numbers12:10 Gore rakanga rakafukidza tendhe iroro rakasimuka. Miriamu akava nechirwere chamapere akachena samazaya echando. Aroni akatarisa Miriamu wanei ava nechirwere chamapere. 
Numbers12:11 Aroni ndokutaura naMosesi achiti, “Changamire ndapota! Regai kutirwadzisa muchitirangira kutadza kwatakaitira muupenzi hwedu." 
Numbers12:12 Musarege Miriamu achiita sowakafa, somwana anoberekwa ane muviri wakadyiwadyiwa.”" 
Numbers12:13 Mosesi akachema kuna Tenzi achiti, “Nhai Mwari! Ndapota! Muporesei zvenyu!”" 
Numbers12:14 Asi Tenzi ndokuti kuna Mosesi, “Dai vanga vari baba vake vamusvipira pauso angadai asina kunyara here kwamazuva manomwe achindogariswa kunze kwamatendhe ari oga here? Saka ngaandogara ari oga kunze kwamatendhe kwamazuva manomwe agozodzoserwa mumatendhe.”" 
Numbers12:15 Naizvozvo Miriamu akanzi agare kunze kwamatendhe kwemazuva manomwe. VaIsiraeri havana kutama ipapo kusvikira Miriamu adzokera mumatendhe. 
Numbers12:16 Vakazobva paHezoroti vakandodzika matendhe avo murenje reParani. 
Numbers13:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers13:2 “Tuma varume vanoenda kundosora nyika yeKanani, yandiri kupa vaIsiraeri. Padzinza rimwe nerimwe ravaIsiraeri tora mumwe wavatungamiriri vavo.”" 
Numbers13:3 Mosesi akatuma vose vakanga vari vatungamiri vavaIsiraeri sokuudzwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi. Vakanga vakadai: Aya ndiwo mazita avo," 
Numbers13:4 Mudzinza rokwaRubheni, mutungamiriri akatorwamo ndiShamua mwanakomana waZakuri." 
Numbers13:5 Mudzinza rokwaSimeoni, makatorwa Shafati mwanakomana waHoru." 
Numbers13:6 Mudzinza rokwaJudha, makatorwa Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune." 
Numbers13:7 Mudzinza rokwaIsakari, makatorwa Igari mwanakomana waJosefi." 
Numbers13:8 Mudzinza rokwaEfuremu, makatorwa Hoshea mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers13:9 Mudzinza rokwaBhenjamini, makatorwa Pariti mwanakomana waFaru." 
Numbers13:10 Mudzinza rokwaZebhuroni, makatorwa Gadhieri mwanakomana waSodhi." 
Numbers13:11 Mudzinza rokwaJosefi, dzinza rokwaManase, makatorwa Gadhi mwanakomana waSusi." 
Numbers13:12 Mudzinza rokwaDhani, makatorwa Amieri mwanakomana waGemari." 
Numbers13:13 Mudzinza rokwaAsheri, makatorwa Seturi mwanakomana waMikaeri." 
Numbers13:14 Mudzinza rokwaNafutari, makatorwa Nahibhi mwana waVhofusi." 
Numbers13:15 Mudzinza rokwaGadhi, makatorwa Geueri mwanakomana waMachi." 
Numbers13:16 Ndiwo mazita avasori vakatumwa naMosesi kundosora nyika iyoyo. Mosesi akatumidza Hosea mwanakomana waNuni kuti Joshuwa. 
Numbers13:16 Ndiwo mazita avasori vakatumwa naMosesi kundosora nyika iyoyo. Mosesi akatumidza Hosea mwanakomana waNuni kuti Joshuwa. 
Numbers13:17 Mosesi akavatuma kundosora nyika yeKanani akati kwavari, “Endai nokuNegevhu uko mukwire kunyika yamakomo." 
Numbers13:18 Endai mundoona kuti nyika iyoyo yakaita sei, navanhu vageremo kuti vane simba here kana kwete, kuti vazhinji here kana kuti vashoma." 
Numbers13:19 Endai mundoona kuti nyika yavagere inyika yakanaka here kana kuti yakaipa. Muonewo kuti maguta avagere akakomberedzwa nerusvingo here kana kuti kwete. 
Numbers13:20 “Ongororai ivhu reko kuti rakanaka here kana kuti rakaipa, kuti kune miti here kana kuti hakuna. Itai chivindi muuye nemichero yomunyikamo.” Yakanga yava nguva yokutanga kuibva kwamagirepisi." 
Numbers13:21 Varume vaya vakaenda vakandosora nyika iyoyo, kubvira parenje reZini, kundosvika kuguta rainzi Rehobhu tavakuda kupinda muguta reHamati." 
Numbers13:22 Vakatanga kusora kumaodzanyemba kwayo ndokuzosvika kuguta reHebhuroni kwaigara marudzi aAhimani naSheshai naTarumai zvizukuru zverudzi rwehofori dzavanhu dzainzi vaAnaki. Guta reHebhuroni rakavakwa makore manomwe guta rokuIjipiti rainzi Zoani risati ravakwa. 
Numbers13:23 Vakasvika kubani reEshikoru vakatanha bazi raiva nesumbu ramagirepisi yaitoitwa zvokutembedzanwa pamafudzi navarume vaviri pamutanda. Vakauyawo nemichero yamapomugiraneti namaonde. 
Numbers13:24 Nzvimbo iyoyo yakatumidzwa kuti bani reEshikoru pamusana pesumbu remagirepisi rakachekwapo navaIsiraeri. 
Numbers13:25 Shure kwamazuva makumi mana vachimema nyika iyoyo vakazodzokera. 
Numbers13:26 Vakafamba vakasvika kwaiva naMosesi naAroni navaIsiraeri vose kunzvimbo inonzi Kadheshi iri kurenje reParani. Vakavataurira zvavakanga vaona ivo negungano rose vakavaratidza michero yenyika iyoyo. 
Numbers13:27 Vakarondedzera Mosesi vachiti, “Takasvika kunyika yamakatituma. Ichokwadi kuti nyika iyoyo yakapfuma inoerera uchi nomukaka. Heino michero yayo yatauya nayo." 
Numbers13:28 Asi vanhu vageremo vane simba. Maguta avo makuru kwazvo akanyatsokomberedzwa netsvingo. Kunyange hofori dzorudzi rwavaAnaki takadziona ikoko. 
Numbers13:29 Rudzi rwaAmareki rugere nechokumaodzanyemba kwayo. VaHiti navaJebhusi navaAmori vanogara mumakomo. VaKanani vari kumadokero pedyo negungwa nepedyo perwizi rwaJorodhani.” 
Numbers13:30 Asi Karebhu akanyaradza vanhu vaiva pana Mosesi achiti, “Handeiko izvozvi, tindoitora. Chokwadi, tinokwanisa kuzviita.”" 
Numbers13:31 Varume vaya vakanga vaenda naye vakati, “Hatikwanisi kundomirisana navo nokuti vakasimba kupinda isu.”" 
Numbers13:32 Naizvozvo shoko ravakauya vava naro kuzopa vaIsiraeri, vadzoka kundosora nyika iya, raiti, “Nyika yatakasora haikwanise kupa vagari vemo zvokudya zvakakwana. Vanhu vose vatakaonako varefu chaizvo." 
Numbers13:33 Takaonawo hofori dzavanhu vorudzi rwaAnakimu. Isu takanga takaita sehwiza ndiko kutiona kwavaitiita.” 
Numbers14:1 Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakaridza mhere usiku ihwohwo vakarara vachichema. 
Numbers14:2 Gungano rose rakanyunyutira Mosesi naAroni vachiti, “Dai takafira zvedu kunyika yeIjipiti kana kuti tifire zvedu murenje muno!" 
Numbers14:3 Seiko Mwari achida kuenda nesu kunyika iyoyo kundotiurayisa nehondo? Madzimai edu navana vedu vachatapwa. Hazvingatinakire here kana tikadzokera zvedu kuIjipiti?” 
Numbers14:4 Saka vakataurirana vachiti, “Ngatisarudzei mutungamiriri tidzokere kuIjipiti!”" 
Numbers14:5 Ipapo Mosesi naAroni vakati pasi zvambarara pamberi pegungano rose ravaIsiraeri. 
Numbers14:6 Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni naKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune, vamwe vavaya vakandosora nyika iya vakabvarura zvipfeko zvavo." 
Numbers14:7 Vakataurira mhomho yose yavaIsiraeri vachiti, “Nyika yatakaenda kundosora inyika yakanaka kwazvo kwazvo." 
Numbers14:8 Kana Tenzi achida, achatisvitsa ikoko achindotipa nyika iyoyo yakapfuma inoerera uchi nomukaka." 
Numbers14:9 Asi musapandukire Tenzi. Musatye vanhu venyika iyoyo. Tichavaita kanyama kanyama. Chinovadzivira chakabviswa asi Tenzi anesu. Saka musavatye!” 
Numbers14:10 Asi mhomho yose yavaIsiraeri yakada kuvatema namabwe. Pakarepo vaIsiraeri vose vakaona kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kutendhe rinoera. 
Numbers14:11 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Ko vanhu ava vachandizvidza kusvikira riniko? Vachasvikira riniko vasingavimbe neni kunyange ndakaita zvishamiso pakati pavo?" 
Numbers14:12 Ndichavarakatisa nedenda ndigovaita kuti vave vanhu vasingakodzere kuwana nhaka. Ndigokuita iwe rudzi rukuru rune simba guru kupfuura ivo.” 
Numbers14:13 Asi Mosesi akateterera Tenzi achiti, “VaIjipiti vachazvinzwa nokuti imi makabvisa vanhu ava nesimba renyu vachibva mukati mavo." 
Numbers14:14 Vachazviudza vanhu vomunyika ino vakanzwa kuti imi Tenzi muri pakati pavo, muchinyatsoonekwa uso nouso! Gore renyu rinomira riri pamusoro pavo, muchivatungamirira neshongwe yegore masikati, usiku muchivatungamirira nezirimi romoto." 
Numbers14:15 Zvino kana mukauraya vanhu venyu vose ndudzi dzakanga dzanzwa mukurumbira wenyu dzichati," 
Numbers14:16 ‘Tenzi akakundikana kusvitsa vanhu ava kunyika yaakanga avatsidzira, saka akavaurayira murenje.’" 
Numbers14:17 Zvino ndapota! Chiratidzai ukuru hwesimba renyu sokutsidza kwamakaita muchiti," 
Numbers14:18 ‘Imi Tenzi hamukurumidze kushatirwa. Mune mwoyo wakachena. Munoregerera zvitadzo, munoregererawo kukanganisa. Kunyange zvakadaro hamuzorega kuranga vana nezvizukuru pamusana pezvitadzo zvavabereki vavo kusvikira kuchizvarwa chavo chechitatu nechechina.’" 
Numbers14:19 Ndapota regererai waro zvitadzo zvavanhu venyu ava nokuti mune tsitsi dzakawanda. Chiitirai vanhu ava mwoyo murefu sezvamakavaitira kubvira vachiri Ijipiti kusvikira iye zvino.” 
Numbers14:20 Tenzi akati, “Ndavaregerera sokukumbira kwako." 
Numbers14:21 Asi ndinopika neni pachangu. Ndinopika nembiri yangu izere pasi pose ndichiti," 
Numbers14:22 ‘Hakuna nomumwe wavanhu ava achapinda munyika iyoyo. Vakaona mbiri yangu nezvishamiso zvandakaita kuIjipiti nomurenje, asi vakandiedza kagumi kagumi vasinganditeerere." 
Numbers14:23 Hakuna nomumwe wavo achapinda munyika yandakapikira madzitateguru avo, kana vose vakandishora havambofa vakakutsika.’" 
Numbers14:24 Asi muranda wangu Karebhu ane mwoyo wakasiyana navamwe anonditeerera nomwoyo wose ndiye wandichasvitsa kunyika iyoyo yaakasvika ichava nhaka yezvizukuru zvake. 
Numbers14:25 Pamusana pokuti vaAmareki navaKanani vagere mumapani. Mangwana, imi tendeukirai kurenje mutore nzira inoenda kuGungwa Dzvuku.”" 
Numbers14:26 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Numbers14:27 “Ko vanhu ava vakaipa vacharamba vachindinyunyutira kusvikira riniko? Kundinyunyutira kwavaIsiraeri ndakunzwa. 
Numbers14:28 Chivaudza kuti, Tenzi ati, ‘Ndinopika neni pachangu, zvamataura ndichinzwa ndizvo zvandichakuitirai." 
Numbers14:29 Zvitunha zvenyu zvichaita murakatira murenje rino. Vose vamakaverenga vaiva namakore makumi maviri navaiva naaipfuura iwayo, vakandinyunyutira" 
Numbers14:30 hakuna nomumwe wavo achazopinda munyika yandakakupikirai kuti muzogaramo kusiya Karebhu mwana waJefune naJoshuwa mwana waNuni. 
Numbers14:31 Asi vana venyu vamati vachaitwa kanyama kanyama, ndivo vandichasvitsa ikoko. Vachaziva nyika yamakaramba." 
Numbers14:32 Asi imi zvitunha zvenyu zvichaita murakatira murenje muno. 
Numbers14:33 Vana venyu vachava vafudzi murenje kwamakore makumi mana vachatambudzika nokuda kwokusatendeka kwenyu kusvikira chitunha chenyu chokupedzisira chati rabada murenje muno. 
Numbers14:34 Muchaona ndondo kwamakore makumi mana nokuti manditadzira. Handiti makapedza mazuva makumi mana muchisora nyika iyoyo? Saka zuva roga roga richava gore muchirangirwa zvitadzo zvenyu. Kwamakore makumi mana muchanyatsoziva kuti rushambwa rwokufuratirwa neni rwakaita sei. 
Numbers14:35 Ini Tenzi, ndinotsidza kuti zvandataura ndizvozvo zvandichaita kwamuri; mhomho yavanhu vakaipa vaunganidzana kuzondipandukira. Imo murenje muno, ndimo mavachaperera. Imo muno ndimo mavachafira.’ ”" 
Numbers14:36 Naizvozvo varume vakatumwa naMosesi kundosora nyika vakadzoka vakakonzera kuti gungano rose rimunyunyutire nokutaura kwavo zvakaipa nezvenyika iyoyo. 
Numbers14:37 Vanhu ivavo vakataura zvakaipa vakafa nedenda panaTenzi. 
Numbers14:38 Asi pavarume vaye vakandosora nyika Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni naKarebhi mwanakomana waJefune vakasara vari vapenyu. 
Numbers14:39 Mosesi akataurira vaIsiraeri vose mashoko iwayo vakabva vachema zvikuru. 
Numbers14:40 Vakafumomuka vakaenda kumusoro kunyika yamakomo vachiti, “Asi zvatava pano kudai ngatichiendai kunzvimbo yatakapikirwa naTenzi nokuti takatadzira Mwari.”" 
Numbers14:41 Asi Mosesi ndokuti, “Ko munorambireiko zvataurwa naTenzi? Hazvimbobudirira izvi!" 
Numbers14:42 Regai kuendako nokuti Tenzi haasi nemi. Muchandokundwa navavengi venyu! 
Numbers14:43 Kana vaAmareki navaKanani vouya kuzokurwisai vachakuurayai namapakatwa nokuti makafuratira Tenzi. Tenzi haazovi nemi.” 
Numbers14:44 Asi ivo vakangoenda kunyika yokumakomo, kunyange bhokisi rechitenderano raTenzi rakasara mumatendhe naMosesi asinawo kuenda navo." 
Numbers14:45 VaAmareki navaKanani vakanga vagere munyika yamakomo vakaburuka vakabva vavakunda ndokuvadzingirira kusvikira kuHorima. 
Numbers15:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers15:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti, kana mava munyika yandichakupai kuti mugaremo," 
Numbers15:3 kana munhu achiuya kuzopira mupiro wake kuna Tenzi wezvipfuwo, zvemombe kana hwai, kana mbudzi, achiita mupiro unoita zvokupiswa kana mupiro wokupisa nomoto kana mupiro wezvaakambotsidza, kana wechido chake, kana pamunochengeta enyu mazuva makuru kuti kunhuhwirira kwayo kundifadze, zvamunoita ndezvizvi:" 
Numbers15:4 munhu anenge auya nomupiro ngaaunze mupiro wembesanwa woupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hunorema kirogiramu rimwechete, hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi anokwana rita rimwechete," 
Numbers15:5 newaini yomupiro wezvokunwa inokwana chikamu chapakati napakati cherita. Zvose izvozvo ngazvipirwe pamwechete nomupiro wokupisa, nechibayiro chehwayana imwe neimwe." 
Numbers15:6 Kana iri hondohwe, pirai pamwechete nayo upfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hunorema makirogiramu maviri, hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi anokwana rita rimwechete nechikamu chapakati napakati perita," 
Numbers15:7 pamwechete newaini inokwana rita nechikamu charo chapakati napakati. Kunhuhwirira kwemipiro iyoyi kunofadza Tenzi. 
Numbers15:8 Pamunopira Tenzi handira ichiri duku yomupiro wokupisa, kana chibayiro chomupiro wezvakatsidzwa kana mipiro yokuwadzana kuna Tenzi" 
Numbers15:9 unzaiwo mupiro wembesanwa woupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hunorema makirogiramu matatu, hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi anokwana marita maviri," 
Numbers15:10 pamwechete newaini inokwana marita maviri somupiro inopiswa nomoto. Kunhuhwirira kwomupiro iwoyu kunofadza ini Tenzi. 
Numbers15:11 “Saka ndizvo zvamunoita pamupiro mumwe nomumwe wehandira, kana hondohwe, kana hwayana hono kana mbudzana hono." 
Numbers15:12 Chibairo choga choga chamunopira, hazvinei kuti zvingani, chimwe nechimwe chazvo ngachiitiwe zvimwechetezvo." 
Numbers15:13 Chizvarwa choga choga cheIsiraeri, ngachiite saizvozvo pakupira mupiro unoita zvokupiswa kuti kunhuhwirira kwawo kunofadza Tenzi." 
Numbers15:14 Kana pachinge paine mutorwa agere nemi zvachose, kana kuti agere nemi kwechinguva achida kupira mupiro unoita zvokupiswa kuti kunhuhwirira kwawo kufadze ini Tenzi, anofanirawo kuita sezvamunoita." 
Numbers15:15 Murao mumwechete ndiwo uchasunga imi navatorwa vamugere navo. Uchagara uripo kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa zvenyu. Pana Tenzi imi navatorwa hapana mutsauko. 
Numbers15:16 Imi navatorwa vamugere navo muchava nemitemo nemirao mimwechete.” 
Numbers15:17 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers15:18 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti kana mava munyika yandichakusvitsai," 
Numbers15:19 mukange modya zvokudya zvemo, torai zvimwe mupire Tenzi mupiro." 
Numbers15:20 Pamunokanya upfu hwembesanwa dzenyu dzokutanga muchibika chingwa, chingwa chokutanga ngachipirwe kuna Tenzi chive mupiro wenyu wezvamunotanga kupura paburiro, ndiwo mapiriro amuchauita." 
Numbers15:21 Pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose torai mupiro, pamukanyiwa wenyu wokutanga, mupire kuna Tenzi." 
Numbers15:22 “Asi kana mukakanganisa mukarega zvenyu kuchengeta mirao iyoyi yakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi," 
Numbers15:23 zvose zvazvo zvakatemwa naTenzi zvamakaudzwa naMosesi, kubvira pazuva rakapiwa mutemo naTenzi pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose zvichauya," 
Numbers15:24 kukanganisa ikoko kana kwaitwa negungano mukusaziva, gungano rose ngariite mupiro wokupisa wehandira ichiri duku, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza ini Tenzi pamwechete nomupiro wembesanwa newaini yomupiro wezvokunwa. Ngavapirewo gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo maererano nezvakatemwa naTenzi." 
Numbers15:25 Mupristi ngaaite mupiro wokuripira zvitadzo zvegungano rose ravaIsiraeri. Vacharegererwa nokuti vakazviita mukusaziva vakapirawo Tenzi mipiro yavo inopiswa nomoto nemupiro wokuzvichenura kuzvitadzo vachiripa kukanganisa kwavo. 
Numbers15:26 Mhuri yose yeIsiraeri navatorwa vagere navo vacharegererwa nokuti munhu wose akanga arimo mukuvhiya katiyo. 
Numbers15:27 “Kana munhu mumwechete akatadza mukusaziva ngaapire mbudzi hadzi ine gore rimwechete uve mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Numbers15:28 Mupristi ngaapire mupiro kuna Tenzi wokuripira zvitadzo zvomunhu iyeyo. Munhu iyeyo anenge akakanganisa mukusaziva acharegererwa. 
Numbers15:29 Ani naani anotadza mukasaziva kunyange ari chizvarwa chomuIsiraeri kana mutorwa agere nemi anosungwa nomutemo mumwechetewo. 
Numbers15:30 “Asi ani naani anotadza maune kunyange ari chizvarwa cheIsiraeri kana mutorwa, ashora Tenzi ngaachekaniswe ukama novokwake," 
Numbers15:31 nokuti akaramba kuteerera Tenzi akatyora mutemo wake. Munhu iyeyo ngaabviswe murudzi rwake zvachose. Ndiye akazviparira.” 
Numbers15:32 Zvino vaIsiraeri vachiri murenje, vakawana mumwe murume achitsvaka huni musi weSabata." 
Numbers15:33 Vaya vakamuona achitsvaka huni vakamuunza kuna Mosesi naAroni negungano rose ravaIsiraeri. 
Numbers15:34 Vakamubata vakamuchengetedza nokuti vakanga vasati vaziva kuti vangaitei naye. 
Numbers15:35 Tenzi ndokuzoudza Mosesi achiti, “Murume iyeyo ngaaurayiwe. Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri ngarindomutema namabwe kunze kwemunharaunda yamatendhe.”" 
Numbers15:36 Saka gungano rose rakaenda naye kunharaunda yokunze kwamatendhe ndokumutemerako namabwe akafa sezvakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers15:37 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers15:38 “Iti vaIsiraeri vasonere masa pakona yoga yoga yehanzu dzavo vazviite pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose. Vasungire shinda yeruvara rwedenga pamasa dzacho. 
Numbers15:39 Masa idzodzo dzichava chiyeuchidzo chokuti mukadzitarisa muyeuke mitemo yangu muichengete, murege kungoita zvamunoda muchifurirwa noruchiva, rwemwoyo yenyu noruchiva rwemeso enyu, sezvamakajairira." 
Numbers15:40 Saka muchayeuka mitemo yangu yose muchiichengeta. Muchava vanhu vangu vandakazvisarudzira vatsvene. 
Numbers15:41 Ndini Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti kuti ndive Mwari wenyu. Ini ndini Tenzi Mwari wenyu.” 
Numbers16:1 Kora mwanakomana waIzhari mwanakomana waKohati, mwanakomana waRevhi pamwechete naDhatani naAbhiramu vanakomana vaEriabhu vose naOni mwanakomana waPereti vedzinza rokwaRubheni," 
Numbers16:2 vakafurirana navamwe varume vakapandukira Mosesi. Vanhu vacho vaikwana mazana maviri namakumi mashanu. Vaiva vamwe vevatungamiriri vakanga vasarudzwa kutungamirira vaIsiraeri, vari vanhu vanozivikanwa chaizvo." 
Numbers16:3 Vakaunganidzana ndokupandukira Mosesi naAroni vachiti, “Varume mazopindiridza! Inga gungano rose rakasarudzwawo naMwari idzvene nemunhu woga woga arimo. Tenzi arimowo mavari. Ko munozozvikwidziridza muchizviisa pamusoro pegungano raTenzi sei?”" 
Numbers16:4 Mosesi paakazvinzwa akati pasi zvambarara. 
Numbers16:5 Akazotaurira Kora navamwe vake achiti, “Mangwana Tenzi achafumotiratidza kuti vake ndavapi vaakazvisarudzira vagouya kwaari. Vaanenge asarudza achavaunza kwaari." 
Numbers16:6 Chidai izvi! Iwe Kora neboka rako mangwana torai mabisiro orusenzi 
Numbers16:7 muisemo mavhunze omoto norusenzi moisa mabisiro iwayo paatari panopisirwa rusenzi. Saka ipapo asarudzwa naTenzi ndiye mutsvene. Imi vana vaRevhi mapindiridza.” 
Numbers16:8 Mosesi ndokupamhidza kutaurira Kora achiti, “Chinzwai vana vaRevhi!" 
Numbers16:9 Ko munoti chinhu chiduku here chamakaitirwa naTenzi waIsiraeri? Heya munoti chinhu chiduku nhai chaakaita chokukusarudzai muvaIsiraeri vose kuti mukwanise kusvika paari muchiita basa romutendhe raTenzi, akakuisai mberi kuti muitire vanhu basa remo." 
Numbers16:10 Akakuswededza pedyo naye, iwe nehama dzako dzose, vanakomana vokwaRevhi. Ko zvino woda basa roupristi here?" 
Numbers16:11 Saka wamaunganira iwe neboka rako rose ndiTenzi wamunenge muchinyunyutira. Ko Aroni chiiwo zvake wamuri kunyunyutira.” 
Numbers16:12 Mosesi akatumira shoko rokuti Dhatani naAbhiramu vanakomana vaEriabhu vauye. Ivo vakati, “Kwete hatisi kukwira ikoko." 
Numbers16:13 Ko unoti chinhu chiduku here chawakaita chokuti wakatibvisa munyika yakanaka inoerera uchi nomukaka kuzotiurayisa muno murenje, zvawava kutoda kuzviita mutongi wedu." 
Numbers16:14 Haunawo kutisvitsa kunyika yakanaka inoerera uchi nomukaka, kana kutipa nhaka yeminda zvayo neyeminda yemigirepisi. Ko unodireiko kubata vanhu kumeso? Hatizi kuuyako.”" 
Numbers16:15 Mosesi akashatirwa zvikuru akati kuna Tenzi, “Musaite hanya nomupiro wavanokupai. Ini handina kumbovatorera kunyange dhongi rimwechete zvaro, handina kana mumwechete wavo wandakakanganisira.”" 
Numbers16:16 Mosesi akataurira Kora achiti, “Iwe neboka rako rose mangwana muuye kuna Tenzi, iwe neboka rako naAroni." 
Numbers16:17 Mumwe nomumwe ngaauye nebisiro rake rorusenzi, aisemo rusenzi. Mose muuye nawo kuna Tenzi, mabisiro akwane mazana maviri ana makumi mashanu. Iyewe naAroni muuyewo namabisiro enyu orusenzi.”" 
Numbers16:18 Naizvozvo mumwe nomumwe akatora bisiro rake rorusenzi, ndokuisamo moto ndokuisawo rusenzi, vakandomira kumusuo wetendhe rinoera vaina Mosesi naAroni." 
Numbers16:19 Kora akaunganidza gungano rose ravanhu kumusuo wetendhe rinoera kuzopikisana navo. Ipapo kupenya kwaTenzi kwakaonekwa negungano rose. 
Numbers16:20 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Numbers16:21 “Sudurukai pagungano iri ndiriparadze kamwe kamwe.” 
Numbers16:22 Asi Mosesi naAroni vakati pasi zvambarara vakati, “Nhai Tenzi, inga ndimi muridzi woupenyu hwose. Ko mungabva mashatirirwa vanhu vose pamusana pomunhu mumwechete here?”" 
Numbers16:23 Tenzi ndokutaurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers16:24 “Udza vanhu vose kuti vabve pedyo namatendhe aKora naDhatani naAbhiramu.” 
Numbers16:25 Mosesi akasimuka akaenda kuna Dhatani naAbhiramu. Vakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri vakamuteverawo. 
Numbers16:26 Akataurira gungano rose achiti, “Ndapota ibvai pedyo namatendhe evarume vakaipa ava. Musabate chinhu chavo mungadaro mukaparadzwa pamusana pezvitadzo zvavo.”" 
Numbers16:27 Vanhu vose vakabva pedyo panharaunda yamatendhe aKora naDhatani naAbhiramu. Dhatani naAbhiramu vakabuda pamwechete namadzimai avo navana vavo vose navacheche vakamira pamisuo yamatendhe avo. 
Numbers16:28 Mosesi ndokuti, “Zvino muchazoziva kuti Tenzi ndiye akandituma kuzoita mabasa ose aya andinoita hazvisiri zvokungozvisarudzira. Zvamuchaziva nazvo ndezvizvi zvokuti," 
Numbers16:29 kana varume ava vakaita mafiro anongoitawo vamwe vose kana kuwirwa nenhamo dzinongowirawo vamwe vose, Tenzi haana kundituma." 
Numbers16:30 Asi kana Tenzi akaita chimwe chinhu chitsva, nyika ikashama muromo wayo ikavamedza pamwechete nezvinhu zvavo zvose, vakatozomokeramo vachienda kunzvimbo yavachakabvu, ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti varume ava vakashora Tenzi.”" 
Numbers16:31 Achangopedza kutaura mashoko iwayo pavakanga vamire pakati bamu kutsemuka. 
Numbers16:32 Nyika yakashama muromo wayo, ikavamedza nedzimba dzavo navose vokwaKora nezvinhu zvavo zvose." 
Numbers16:33 Saka vose vakati ririri imomo, vari vapenyu kunzvimbo yavachakabvu nezvinhu zvavo zvose. Pasi ndokuti gwibha kuvakwidibira. Ndiko kuparadzwa kwavakaitwa pakati pegungano ravaIsiraeri." 
Numbers16:34 VaIsiraeri vose vakanga varipo vakanzwa kuchema kwavo vakatiza vachiti, “Nyika ingadaro ikatimedzawo nesu tose.”" 
Numbers16:35 Ipapo moto wakabva kuna Tenzi ukaroromesa varume vaya vaikwana mazana maviri namakumi mashanu vakanga vauya kuzopira rusenzi. 
Numbers16:36 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers16:37 “Chiudza Ereazari mwanakomana womupristi Aroni kuti andobvisa mabisiro orusenzi mumoto, arasire mavhunze acho kure nokure nokuti mabisiro iwayo ava kuera." 
Numbers16:38 Tora mabisiro avarume vaya vakatadza vakabva vaurayiwa, uapfure ave mapepa okukwidibirisa paatari nokuti vakauya nawo kuzopira Tenzi, saka ava kuera. Achava mucherechedzo wokuyambira vaIsiraeri.”" 
Numbers16:39 Ipapo Ereazari mupristi akatora mabisiro omundarira aye evaye vakaurayiwa. Vakaapfura vakagadzira chokukwidibirisa nacho atari 
Numbers16:40 kuti chive chiyeuchidzo kuvaIsiraeri chokuti munhu wose asiri mupristi asiriwo wechizvarwa chokwAroni arege kuuya kuzopira Tenzi rusenzi nokuti zviya zvakawira Kora navamwe vake zvingavawirewo. Ndiwo mashoko akaudzwa Ereazari naTenzi achibva nokuna Mosesi. 
Numbers16:41 Ramangwana racho gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakanyunyutira Mosesi naAroni vachiti, “Makaurayisa vanhu vaTenzi.”" 
Numbers16:42 Gungano rose rakati rauya kuzopikisana naMosesi naAroni, rakatarisa kutendhe rokusanganira, onei gore ratorifukidza kupenya kwembiri yaTenzi kuchioneka." 
Numbers16:43 Mosesi naAroni vakauya kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira. 
Numbers16:44 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers16:45 “Sudurukai pagungano iri, ndivaparadze, ndivati bvu kamwechete.” Mosesi naAroni vakati pasi zvambarara." 
Numbers16:46 Mosesi ndokutaurira Aroni achiti, “Tora bisiro rako rerusenzi uisemo moto wapaatari norusenzi, umhanyire naro kugungano upfupire mhosva yavo nokuti vatomutsa hasha dzaTenzi. Vanhu vatotanga kurakashwa nedenda.”" 
Numbers16:47 Aroni akaita zvaakaudzwa naMosesi akamhanyira mukati mavanhu. Wanei denda ratotanga kare muvanhu. Akaisa rusenzi mumoto achipfupira mhosva dzavanhu. 
Numbers16:48 Akamira pakati pavanhu vakanga vafa navapenyu ndokubva denda ramiswa. 
Numbers16:49 Vanhu vakaurayiwa nedenda iroro vaiva zviuru gumi nezvina zvina mazana manomwe tisingaverengi vaya vakaurayiwa paya pakapanduka Kora. 
Numbers16:50 Aroni akadzokera kwaiva naMosesi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira paya pakamiswa denda. 
Numbers17:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers17:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri vakupe tsvimbo imwe neimwe ichimirira dzimba dzamadzitateguru avo dzichibva kuvatungamiriri vavo vose nedzimba dzamadzitateguru avo dziri tsvimbo gumi nembiri. Nyora zita romutungamiriri patsvimbo yake. 
Numbers17:3 Asi patsvimbo yedzinza rokwaRevhi nyora zita raAroni nokuti mutungamiriri wedzinza roga roga ngaave netsvimbo yake. 
Numbers17:4 Tora tsvimbo dzacho udziise mutendhe rokusanganira pamberi pebhokisi rouchapupu paya pandinosangana nemi. 
Numbers17:5 Tsvimbo yemunhu wandichasarudza ichabukira. Ndipo pandichapedza kunyunyuta kwaunoitirwa navaIsiraeri.” 
Numbers17:6 Mosesi akataurira vaIsiraeri mumwe nomumwe wavatungamiriri vemadzinza akaunza tsvimbo zvichitevedza dzamadzitateguru avo. Dzaiva gumi nembiri, tsvimbo yaAroni yakaiswa pamwechete nadzo." 
Numbers17:7 Mosesi akatora tsvimbo dzacho akandodziisa mutendhe rouchapupu pana Tenzi. 
Numbers17:8 Mangwana acho Mosesi akapinda mutendhe rouchapupu wanei tsvimbo yaAroni wedzinza raRevhi yabukira yava nematungirwa yava nemaruva namaarimondi akaibva. 
Numbers17:9 Mosesi akatora tsvimbo dziya dzose dzaiva pana Tenzi, pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano, ndokudziunza kuzoratidza vaIsiraeri vose. Vakadzitarisa. Varume vaya vose vakatora tsvimbo dzavo." 
Numbers17:10 Tenzi ndokutaurira Mosesi achiti, “Dzorera tsvimbo yaAroni pamberi pebhokisi rouchapupu, ichengeterwe kuyambira vapanduki kuti upedze kunyunyuta kwavo varege kufa.”" 
Numbers17:11 Mosesi akaita zvaakarayirwa naTenzi. 
Numbers17:12 VaIsiraeri vakataurira Mosesi vachiti, “Onaika, tava kufa, taparara, chokwadi ndiko kupera kwedu tose uku!" 
Numbers17:13 Munhu wose anoswedera kutendhe raTenzi ari kufa zvino topera kufa here?” 
Numbers18:1 Tenzi akataurira Aroni achiti, “Kana pane chinokanganiswa pakushanda munzvimbo inoera, mhosva ndeyako iwe navanakomana vako vemhuri yokwako. Asi kana zvava zvebasa roupristi ndiwe navanakomana vemhuri yokwako bedzi muchava nemhosva." 
Numbers18:2 Uya nehama dzako dzedzinza rokwaRevhi kuti vaite basa vachibatsira iwe navanakomana vako pamunenge muchishanda mutendhe reuchapupu. 
Numbers18:3 Vachava vashandiri venyu uye vachaitawo mabasa ose omutendhe iroro. Asi ngavarege kubata zvemidziyo yomunzvimbo inoera kana kusvika pedyo neatari kuti ivo newe murege kufa. 
Numbers18:4 Vachauya kuzobatana newe vari vashandi vomutendhe rinoera vachiita mabasa omo, mumwe munhuwo zvake, ngaarege kuuya kuzokubatsira." 
Numbers18:5 Mabasa omunzvimbo inoera, neepaatari, achaitwa nemi chete kuti hasha dzangu dzirege kumukirazve vaIsiraeri." 
Numbers18:6 Chinzwa, ini ndini ndasarudza hama dzako vaRevhi pakati pavaIsiraeri, vava chipo chawapiwa. Vapirwa kwandiri kuti vaite basa romutendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers18:7 Asi iwe navanakomana vako ndimi moga muchaita basa roupristi nerezvose zvepaatari neremumupanda unoeresesa museri mejira rokudzikatirisa. Ndiro basa rako. Ndinokupa chipo choupristi. Asi mumwe munhuwo zvake anoedza kuita basa iroro ngaaurayiwe.” 
Numbers18:8 Tenzi akataurira Aroni achiti, “Chinzwa, ndakupa zvose zvinosiyiwa zvemipiro yandinopirwa. Zvose zvazvo zvandinoturirwa navaIsiraeri ndazvipa iwe navanakomana vako. Iwoyu ndiwo mugove wako narini narini." 
Numbers18:9 Izvozvi ndizvo zvaunopiwa zvinenge zvasiyiwa pamipiro inoeresesa yandinopisirwa navaIsiraeri pamipiro yembesanwa nemipiro yokuchenura munhu nemipiro yokupfupira mhosva. Ndiwo mugove wako navanakomana vako. 
Numbers18:10 Zvinhu izvozvi zvinoera, zvidyirei panzvimbo inoera. Ngazvidyiwe navanhurume chete." 
Numbers18:11 “Zvimwe zvamuchapiwa navaIsiraeri ndeizvi: zvipo zvemipiro yavo, nemipiro yavo yose inovheyeswa ichipirwa kuna Mwari. Zvinhu izvozvi ndapa iwe navanakomana navanasikana vako. Ndezvenyu narini narini. Ani naani wemhuri yako anenge asina kun'ora anobvumirwa kuzvidya." 
Numbers18:12 Ndakupa mafuta ose akanaka eorivhi, newaini yose yakanaka nembesanwa dzose dzakanaka, nemichero yokutanga yavanopa Tenzi." 
Numbers18:13 Zvose zvinotanga kuibva zvomuminda yavo zvavanopa Tenzi ndezvako. Munhu wose anenge asina kun'ora wemhuri yako anobvumirwa kuzvidya. 
Numbers18:14 “Zvose zvinenge zvatemwa chaizvo kuti zvava zvaTenzi ndezvako. 
Numbers18:15 Matangwe ose, chose chinotanga kuzarura nhumbu, angava avanhu kana emhuka avanouya nawo, kuzopira kuna Tenzi, ndeako. Asi dzikinurisa matangwe avanhu neemhuka dzakanora." 
Numbers18:16 Matangwe iwayo ngaadzikinurwe mumwedzi wawo wokutanga nemari yesirivha inokwana mashekeri mashanu, shekeri racho rine mwero weshekeri remunzvimbo inoera iine uremu hwamagiramu gumi nemaviri." 
Numbers18:17 Asi usadzikinurise matangwe emombe kana ehwai kana embudzi. Anoera. Sasa ropa rawo paatari upire mafuta awo uite mupiro unoita zvokupiswa nemoto, kunhuhwirira kwawo kufadze ini Tenzi." 
Numbers18:18 Asi nyama yacho ndeyako sezvakaita chityu nechidya chokurudyi zvomupiro unosimudzirwa uchipirwa kuna Tenzi, ndezvako." 
Numbers18:19 Mipiro yose inoera inosimudzirwa ichipirwa kuna Tenzi navaIsiraeri ndapa iwe navana vako vakomana navasikana narini narini. Ichocho chitenderano chomunyu, chaTenzi nemi, ndochitenderano chinozadziswa nokudya chichagara chiripo pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose.”" 
Numbers18:20 Tenzi akati kuna Aroni, “Iwe hauwani nhaka munyika yavaIsiraeri kana kupiwa mugove pakati pavo. Ini ndini mugove wako nenhaka yako muvaIsiraeri." 
Numbers18:21 “Ndapa vaRevhi nhaka yechegumi chose chandinopiwa navaIsiraeri. Ndiwo mugove wavanopiwa pamusana pebasa ravanoita mutendhe rokusanganira. 
Numbers18:22 VaIsiraeri ngavachirega kusvika pedyo netendhe rokusanganira nokuti vangadaro vakapara mhosva vakafa," 
Numbers18:23 asi vaRevhi ndivo vachaita basa romutendhe rokusanganira, ivo vangapare mhosva. Murao iwoyu uchagara uripo kusvikira kuzvizvarwa nezvizvarwa zvenyu. Pakati pavaIsiraeri vose vaRevhi havana nhaka." 
Numbers18:24 Chegumi chavaIsiraeri chavanounza kuzopira kuna Tenzi ndachipa kuvaRevhi senhaka yavo ndokusaka ndati havana nyika yenhaka mukati mavaIsiraeri.” 
Numbers18:25 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers18:26 “Udza vaRevhi kuti, kana magamuchira chegumi chinobviswa navaIsiraeri chandinokupai chichibva kwavari senhaka bvisai mupiro pachiri mupire kuna Tenzi, chiri chegumi pane chegumi ichocho." 
Numbers18:27 Chegumi ichocho chamunobvisa chichanzi ndicho mupiro wenyu wakafanana nemupiro wembesanwa dzinotanga kupurwa paburiro, newewaini itsva inotanga kusvinwa muchisviniro." 
Numbers18:28 Saka imi bvisaiwo chipo chokupira Tenzi chichibva pane zvegumi zvose zvamunogamuchira zvinobva kuvaIsiraeri. Pane zvegumi izvozvo bvisai mugove waMwari mupe Aroni mupristi. 
Numbers18:29 Pamipiro yose inounzwa kwamuri, sarudzai zvaTenzi zvakanakisisa zvazvo zvive zvinoera zvinopirwa kuna Tenzi." 
Numbers18:30 Saka taurira vaRevhi kuti, kana mapira Tenzi chakanakisisa pazviri, zvinenge zvasara ndezvevaRevhi, sezvinoita murimi anopira mupiro wake wembesanwa dzokutanga, newewaini inotanga kusvinwa muchisviniro." 
Numbers18:31 Imi nemhuri dzenyu dyirai zvinenge zvasara pose pose pamunoda nokuti mubairo wenyu wamunopiwa wokushanda mutendhe rokusanganira kwamunoita. 
Numbers18:32 Hamuzovi nemhosva yacho kana mukatanga mapira zvakanakisisisa zvacho. Ipapo hamuzon'oresi mipiro inoera yavaIsiraeri, uye hamuzofi.”" 
Numbers19:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Numbers19:2 “Iyi ndiyo mirao yakatemwa naTenzi: taurirai vaIsiraeri kuti vakuvigirei tsiru dzvuku risina kuremara risinawo chinoshoreka risati rambosungwa pajoki. 
Numbers19:3 Ipai tsiru iroro kumupristi Ereazari. Tsiru iroro ngaritorwe riendwe naro kunze kwenharaunda yamatendhe, riurayirweko, Ereazari aripo." 
Numbers19:4 Ipapo Ereazari ngaanyike munwe wake muropa retsiru riya arisase kudivi kune tendhe rokusanganira kanomwe. 
Numbers19:5 Tsiru iroro ngaripiswe Ereazari achiona. Ngaripiswe rose, nyama yaro, nedehwe raro, neropa raro pamwechete nendove yaro." 
Numbers19:6 Mupristi ngaatore chimuti chomusidhari nekabazi komuhisopi neshinda tsvuku akande izvozvo mumoto mune tsiru riya. 
Numbers19:7 Kana mupristi apedza kuita izvozvo atova munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva radoka. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake, ashambe muviri nemvura adzokere zvake kumatendhe." 
Numbers19:8 Munhu uya apisa tsiru riya atovawo munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva radoka. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake nemvura, ashambe muviri nemvura." 
Numbers19:9 Ipapo mumwe murume anenge asina kun'ora ngaaunganidze madota etsiru riya rakapiswa andoaisa kunze kwenharaunda yematendhe panzvimbo isina kun'ora. Madota iwayo ngaachengeterwe vaIsiraeri kuti vazoaisa mumvura iya inosaswa pakuchenura zvinhu napakubvisa zvitadzo. 
Numbers19:10 Murume uya atakura madota etsiru riya atovawo munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva radoka. Ngaasuke hanzu dzake, ashambe muviri. Murao iwoyu uchagara uripo unofanira kuchengetwa navaIsiraeri navatorwa vagere navo." 
Numbers19:11 “Ani naani anobata chero chitunha chomunhu, achapedza mazuva manomwe akan'ora." 
Numbers19:12 Ngaazvinatse nemvura iya yokuchenurisa zvinhu pazuva retatu napazuva rechinomwe. Ipapo achava munhu achenurwa. Asi kana asina kuzvinatsa saizvozvo pazuva retatu napazuva rechinomwe achange ari munhu akan'ora. 
Numbers19:13 Ani naani anobata chero chitunha chomunhu asingazozvinatsi anon'oresa tendhe raTenzi rinoera. Munhu iyeyo ngaachekaniswe ukama navaIsiraeri. Acharamba akan'ora nokuti haana kusaswa nemvura yokuchenurisa. 
Numbers19:14 “Uyu ndiwo murao kana munhu afira mutendhe. Ani naani anenge ari mutendhe iroro, uye ani naani zvake achapindamo achapedza mazuva manomwe akan'ora." 
Numbers19:15 Midziyo yose inenge yakashama isina chokukwidibirisa inobva yan'ora. 
Numbers19:16 Ani naani anobata chitunha chomunhu akaita zvokuurayiwa nebakatwa kana chitunha chomunhu akangofawo zvake achifira kunze, kunyange anobata bvupa romunhu, kana anobata guva, achapedza mazuva manomwe akan'ora." 
Numbers19:17 “Pakuchenura munhu iyeyo torai madota aye emupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, muaise mumudziyo, mudiremo mvura yakachena." 
Numbers19:18 Munhu anenge asina kun'ora ngaatore kabazi komuhisopi, akanyike mumvura iya, asase tendhe racho chairo nepazvinhu zvose navanhu vaiva mutendhe muya makafira munhu. Mvura iyoyo ngaisaswewo saizvozvi pamunhu anenge akabata chitunha chomunhu angofawo zvake kana munhu akaurayiwa, kana pamunhu akabata bvupa romunhu, kana pamunhu akabata guva." 
Numbers19:19 Munhu asina kun'ora ngaasase mvura pamunhu uya akan'ora pazuva retatu napazuva rechinomwe. Saka ndiwo machenuriro aanomuita pazuva rechinomwe. Ipapo nyakuchenurwa iyeyo ngaasuke hanzu dzake ashambe muviri wake mumvura. Achazochenurwa kana zuva radoka. 
Numbers19:20 “Asi kana munhu achinge an'ora akarega kuzvichenura gungano renyu rose ngarichekane ukama naye nokuti akan'oresa tendhe rinoera raTenzi zvaasina kusaswa mvura yokuchenurisa munhu anenge akan'ora. 
Numbers19:21 Kwamuri imi murao iwoyu, murao uchagara uripo narini wose. Munhu anosasa mvura yokuchenurisa ngaasuke zvipfeko zvake. Ani naani anobata mvura iyi yokuchenurisa achaswera akan'ora kusvikira zuva radoka."
