Numbers19:22 Chinhu chose chinobatwa nomunhu akan'ora chinon'ora kusvika manheru. Ani naani anobata chinhu chakan'ora achava munhu akan'ora kusvikira zuva radoka.” 
Numbers20:1 Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakazosvika murenje reZini mumwedzi wokutanga, vakagara paKadheshi. Miriamu akafa akavigirwapo." 
Numbers20:2 Ipapo gungano rakashaya mvura. Vakabva vaunganidzana kuzonetsa Mosesi naAroni. 
Numbers20:3 Vanhu vakapopotera Mosesi vachiti, “Dai takafira zvedu paya pakafira hama dzedu kumusuo wetendhe raTenzi rinoera!" 
Numbers20:4 Ko makaunzireiko gungano raTenzi murenje muno? Kuti tizofira muno here isu nezvipfuwo zvedu. 
Numbers20:5 Ko makatiburitsireiko muIjipiti muchitiunza kunzvimbo ino yakaipa kudai, isina pokurima mbesa? Haina maonde. Haina michero yamagirepisi kana yamapomigiraneti! Kunyange mvura yokunwa zvayo hakuna!”" 
Numbers20:6 Ipapo Mosesi naAroni vakabva pane vanhu ivavo vakaenda kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira, vakasvikoti pasi zvambarara, ndokubva vaona kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi." 
Numbers20:7 Tenzi ndokutaurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers20:8 “Tora tsvimbo iya, uunganidze gungano ravanhu. Iwe nomukoma wako Aroni udzai dombo vaIsiraeri vakatarisa kuti riburitse mvura. Ipapo muchavabudisira mvura padombo. Naizvozvo muchawanisa gungano rose pamwechete nezvipfuwo zvavo mvura yokunwa.”" 
Numbers20:9 Mosesi akatora tsvimbo yakanga iri pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi. 
Numbers20:10 Mosesi naAroni vakaunganidza vanhu kudombo riya ndokuvati, “Chinzwai mhandupandu dzavanhu, imi! Ko tokubudisirai mvura padombo iri here?”" 
Numbers20:11 Mosesi akasimudza ruoko rwake akarova dombo kaviri netsvimbo yake. Mvura zhinji zhinji ikabuda, vanhu vakanwa pamwechete nezvipfuwo zvavo." 
Numbers20:12 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti, “Nokuti hamuna kuvimba neni, hamuna kuratidza vaIsiraeri kururama nokuera kwangu imi hamuchandosvitsi vaIsiraeri kunyika yandakavapa.”" 
Numbers20:13 Apa ndipo pamvura yenharo, paMeribha, pakaitira vaIsiraeri Tenzi nharo, asi Tenzi akavaratidza kuera kwake." 
Numbers20:14 Mosesi akatuma nhume kubva kuKadheshi dzichienda kuna mambo weEdhomu kundoti, “Zvanzi nehama yenyu Isiraeri, munoziva nhamo dzose dzakatiwira." 
Numbers20:15 Madzitateguru edu akaenda kuIjipiti kwatakagara kwenguva ndefu. VaIjipiti vakaonesa nhamo isu namadzitateguru edu. 
Numbers20:16 Patakachema kuna Tenzi akanzwa kuchema kwedu, akatitumira mutumwa wake, akatibudisa muIjipiti. Iye zvino tiri paKadheshi, guta riri kumucheto kwenyika yenyu." 
Numbers20:17 Zvino mungatibvumirewo here kupfuura nomunyika yenyu. Isu hatizobudi munzira tichipinda nomuminda yenyu yembesanwa kana yemigirepisi, kana kunwa mvura yetsime renyu zvaro. Ticharamba tiri Mumugwagwa Mukuru Wamambo, hatizotsaukiri kurudyi kana kuruboshwe kusvikira tabuda munyika yenyu.”" 
Numbers20:18 Asi Edhomu akati, “Haupfuuri nomangu muno. Kana ukangodaro ndinokuvinga nehondo yangu.”" 
Numbers20:19 VaIsiraeri vakati, “Ticharamba tiri mumugwagwa mukuru chete. Kana isu nezvipfuwo zvedu tikanwa mvura yenyu, tinoiripa. Tiregei tingotsikawo nomunyika yenyu. Ndicho chichemo chedu choga.”" 
Numbers20:20 Asi Edhomu akati, “Hazviitiki kuti mupfuure nomuno.” Akabva avabudira nehondo yake yakasimba, ina varwi vazhinji zhinji." 
Numbers20:21 Ndiko kuramba kwakaita Edhomu kuti vaIsiraeri vapfuure nomunyika yake, vaIsiraeri vakasiya zveEdhomu vakaenda nokumwe." 
Numbers20:22 Chita chose chavaIsiraeri chakasimuka paKadheshi, chikandosvika pagomo reHoru." 
Numbers20:23 Pagomo reHoru ipapo pamuganhu wenyika yaEdhomu, Tenzi akataurira Mosesi naAroni achiti," 
Numbers20:24 “Nguva yokuti Aroni afe, achienda kune vamwe vake vachakabvu yasvika. Haasiri kuzopinda munyika yandakapa vaIsiraeri nokuti makapikisana nezvandakareva paMeribha." 
Numbers20:25 Tora Aroni nomwanakomana wake Ereazari, ukwire navo mugomo reHoru." 
Numbers20:26 Bvisa Aroni hanzu dzake dzoupristi, upfekedze mwana wake Ereazari. Aroni achafira ipapo achibva aenda kune vamwe vake vachakabvu.”" 
Numbers20:27 Mosesi akaita zvaakaudzwa naTenzi. Vakakwira mugomo reHoru vaIsiraeri vose vakatarisa. 
Numbers20:28 Mosesi akabvisa Aroni hanzu dziya, ndokudzipfekedza Ereazari mwanakomana waAroni. Aroni akabva afira pamusoro pegomo ipapo. Mosesi naEreazari vakaburuka mugomo." 
Numbers20:29 Gungano rose rakaona kuti Aroni afa. Vose vemhuri yaIsiraeri vakamuchema kwamazuva makumi matatu. 
Numbers21:1 Mambo weAradhi muKanani akanga agere kuNegevhu, kumaodzanyemba kweKanani akanzwa kuti vaIsiraeri vari kuuya nenzira yokuAtarimu. Akandorwisa vaIsiraeri akatapa vamwe vavo." 
Numbers21:2 Ipapo vaIsiraeri vakapika mhiko kuna Tenzi vachiti, “Kana mukatiita kuti tikunde vanhu ava, maguta avo tinoaita chibayiro, tichiaparadza zvachose.”" 
Numbers21:3 Tenzi akanzwa zvakataurwa neIsiraeri akavabatsira kukunda vaKanani. VaIsiraeri vakavaparadza zvachose pamwechete namaguta avo. Ipapo pakazotumidzwa zita rokuti Horima. 
Numbers21:4 VaIsiraeri vakabva pagomo reHoru vakafamba nenzira inoenda kuGungwa Dzvuku kuti vanyenyeredze nyika yaEdhomu. Asi vari munzira kudaro vanhu vakaora mwoyo," 
Numbers21:5 vakanyunyutira Mwari naMosesi vachiti, “Ko makatiburitsireiko kuIjipiti? Heya maida kuti tifire mugwenga muno! Hamuna chokudya kana mvura. Tafinhwa notuchingwa utwu tusina maturo!”" 
Numbers21:6 Tenzi akatumira vaIsiraeri nyoka dzinouturu hunopisa somoto, dzikavaruma, vanhu vazhinji veIsiraeri vakafa." 
Numbers21:7 Vanhu vakauya kuna Mosesi vakati, “Takatadza nokuti takanyunyutira Tenzi nemi. Tinamatireiwo kuna Tenzi kuti atibvisire nyoka idzi.” Naizvozvo Mosesi ndokuvakumbirira." 
Numbers21:8 Tenzi ndokutaurira Mosesi achiti, “Pfura nyoka inouturu hunopisa somoto, uiturike pabango, saka ani naani anenge arumwa, kana akatarisa nyoka yaunopfura, achararama.”" 
Numbers21:9 Mosesi akapfura nyoka yendarira akaiturika pabango. Naizvozvo ani naani ainge arumwa, aiti akangotarisa nyoka yendarira obva ararama." 
Numbers21:10 VaIsiraeri vakafamba vakandodzika matendhe avo kuObhoti. 
Numbers21:11 Vakazobva kuObhoti vakandodzika matendhe avo paIyeabharimu, murenje rakatarisana nenyika yaMoabhu nechokumabvazuva." 
Numbers21:12 Vakazobvapo vakandodzika matendhe avo kubani reZeredhi. 
Numbers21:13 Vakazobvapo vakandodzika matendhe avo mhiri kwerwizi Arinoni ruri murenje rinosvika kunyika yavaAmori. Arinoni ndirwo runoganhura nyika yavaMoabhu navaAmori. 
Numbers21:14 Ndokusaka zvakanyorwa mubhuku rinonzi Bhuku reHondo dzaTenzi zvinonzi; Guta reWahebhu riri muSufa namapani aArinoni 
Numbers21:15 namawere amapani anosvika kuAru akatsamirana nemiganhu yeMoabhu. 
Numbers21:16 Vakasimudzira rwendo rwavo vakasvika patsime reBheeri ndipo patsime paya pakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi kuti, “Unganidza vanhu ndivape mvura.”" 
Numbers21:17 VaIsiraeri vakaimba rwiyo urwu runoti; Iwe tsime, buritsa mvura. Riimbirei rumbo." 
Numbers21:18 Tsime rakacherwa namachinda rafukunurwa navatungamiriri vavanhu. Rakacherwa netsvimbo youshe rakacherwawo nemidonzvo yavo. Vakabva murenje vakaenda kuMatana. 
Numbers21:19 Vakabva paMatana vakaenda kuNaharieri. Vakabva Naharieri vakaenda kuBhamoti. 
Numbers21:20 Vakazobva kuBhamoti vakaenda kumupata uri kubani reMoabhu pamusoro pegomo rePisiga pakatarisana nerenje. 
Numbers21:21 VaIsiraeri vakatuma nhume kuna Sihoni, mambo wavaAmori, vachiti," 
Numbers21:22 “Dotibvumiraiwo kuti tipfuure nomunyika yenyu. Hatizobudi munzira tichipinda muminda yenyu yembesa kana yemivhaini, kana kunwa mvura yetsime renyu zvaro. Ticharamba tiri muMugwagwa Mukuru Wamambo kudzamara tabuda munyika yenyu.”" 
Numbers21:23 Asi Sihoni haana kubvumira vaIsiraeri kuti vapfuure nomunyika yake. Akatounganidza hondo yake yose, akandorwisa vaIsiraeri kurenje," 
Numbers21:24 vaIsiraeri vakavarakasha namapakatwa, vakavatorera nyika yavo kubvira muna Arinoni kundosvika muna Jabhoko, vachindogumira kunyika yavaAmoni nokuti muganho wavaAmoni wakanga wakanyatsodzivirirwa." 
Numbers21:25 Saka vaIsiraeri vakatorera vaAmori maguta avo ose, vakagaramo vakatora kunyange Heshibhoni nemisha yakanga yakaripoteredza." 
Numbers21:26 MuHeshibhoni ndimo maiva mumuzinda waSihoni mambo wavaAmori, akarwa naakanga ari mambo wavaMoabhu akamubvutira nyika yake yose kundosvika muna Arinoni." 
Numbers21:27 Ndokusaka vadetembi venziyo dzengondo vachiti “Uyai kuHeshibhoni, rivakwe patsva, guta raSihoni rinyatsoti dzuu kumira." 
Numbers21:28 Moto wakatombobudawo muHeshibhoni, uchibva muguta raiye mambo Sihoni. Wakaroromesa Aru guta ravaMoabhu, ukaparadza machinda okuArinoni." 
Numbers21:29 Zvakuwana nhasi Moabhu, maororwa imi vanamati vaKemoshi. Kemoshi akarega vanakomana vachiva vapoteri, vanasikana vake vachiva nhapwa. Vakava nhapwa dzaSihoni mambo wavaAmori." 
Numbers21:30 Vana vavo vose vakaparadzwa Vakaparadzwa kubvira kuHeshibhoni kusvikira Dhibhoni, kubvira kuNashimu kusvikira kuNofa, pedyo neMadhebha.”" 
Numbers21:31 Naizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakabva vagara munyika yavaAmori," 
Numbers21:32 Mosesi ndokutuma vanhu kundosora guta reJazeri. VaIsiraeri vatora misha yakanga yakaripoteredza, vakadzingawo vaAmori vaigaramo." 
Numbers21:33 Vakazotsauka vakaenda nokuBhashani. Ogi mambo weBhashani akavavinga nehondo yake akavarwisa kuEdhirei. 
Numbers21:34 Asi Tenzi akataurira Mosesi kuti, “Usambomutya zvako. Ndamuisa mumaoko ako navanhu vake vose nenyika yake. Zviya zvawakaita kuna Sihoni mambo wavaAmori aigara kuHeshibhoni ndizvo zvaunofanira kuita kwaari.”" 
Numbers21:35 Naizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakazomuuraya pamwechete navanakomana vake navanhu vake vose. Kusvikira pasisina nomumwe wavo akapunyuka. Nyika yake yakabva yava yavo. 
Numbers22:1 VaIsiraeri vakazoenda vakandodzika matendhe avo mumapani aMoabhu mhiri kwaJorodhani pakatarisana neJeriko. 
Numbers22:2 Ipapo Bharaki mwana waZipori mambo weMoabhu akaona zvakanga zvaitwa navaIsiraeri kuvaAmori," 
Numbers22:3 VaMoabhu vakavatya zvikuru nokuti vakanga vakawanda kwazvo. VaMoabhu vakadedera vaIsiraeri zvikuru. 
Numbers22:4 VaMoabhu ndokutaurira vakuru vakuru vavaMidhiani vachiti, “Zvino gurumwandira ravanhu ava richaparadza zvose zvakatipoteredza semombe dzapinda mumunda.” Naizvozvo Bharaki mwana waZipori akanga ari mambo wavaMoabhu panguva iyoyo" 
Numbers22:5 akatuma nhume kuna Bhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori, aigara kuPetori pedyo norwizi munyika yeAmawu kundomudaidza achiti, “Inzwaiwo zvava kuno, kune rumwe rudzi rwavanhu vakabva Ijipiti, vakawanda zvokuzadza nyika, vagere pakatarisana nemi." 
Numbers22:6 Zvino ndapota uyai muzondirengererawo, vanhu ava rushambwa nokuti vane simba kupinda isu. Zvimwe ndingavakunde ndikavadzinga munyika. Ndinoziva kuti ani naani wamunokomborera anokomborerwa, uye wamunorengerera rushambwa anobva aona chinomuwana.”" 
Numbers22:7 Vakuru vakuru vavaMoabhu, navakuru vakuru vavaMidhiani vakaenda vakabata mari yomuripo wokurengerera rushambwa mumaoko. Vakasvika kuna Bhiriamu vakamuudza shoko raBharaki." 
Numbers22:8 Bhiriamu ndokuti, “Imi chirarai zvenyu pano, mangwana ndinozokuudzai zvandinenge ndataurirwa naTenzi.” Saka machinda aMoabhu akararapo paBhiriamu." 
Numbers22:9 Mwari akauya kuna Bhiriamu akati, “Ko varume ava vaunavo ndivanaani?”" 
Numbers22:10 Bhiriamu ndokupindura Mwari achiti, “Bharaki mwanakomana waZipori mambo weMoabhu akanditumira shoko achiti," 
Numbers22:11 kune rumwe rudzi rwavanhu vakabva Ijipiti, vakawanda zvokuzadza nyika. Ndapota uyai muzovarengerera rushambwa nokuti vane simba kupinda ini. Zvimwe tingavakunde tikavadzinga munyika yedu.”" 
Numbers22:12 Mwari akati kuna Bhiriamu, “Usaende navanhu ava. Rega kundorengerera rushambwa kuvanhu ivavo nokuti vakakomborerwa.”" 
Numbers22:13 Mangwana acho Bhiriamu akafumoudza machinda aBharaki kuti, “Dzokerai zvenyu kunyika yenyu. Tenzi aramba kuti ndiende nemi.”" 
Numbers22:14 Machinda avaMoabhu akasimuka akaenda kuna Bharaki akasvikoti, “Bhiriamu aramba kuuya nesu.”" 
Numbers22:15 Bharaki akatumazve mamwe machinda akapfuura aya aya uwandi nechiremera," 
Numbers22:16 vakaenda kuna Bhiriamu vakandoti, “Zvanzi naBharaki mwana waZipori pasava nechinokutadzisai kuuya kwandiri," 
Numbers22:17 nokuti ndichakupai mubairo mukuru kwazvo. Chero chamunoreva ndichachiita. Saka chiuyai zvenyu muzondirengererera rushambwa vanhu ava.” 
Numbers22:18 Bhiriamu akapindura varanda vaBharaki achiti, “Kunyange Bharaki akandipa imba yake izere sirivha nendarama, handingatsaudziri shoko raTenzi Mwari wangu ndichiritapudza kana kuriwedzera." 
Numbers22:19 Zvino ndapota imiwo raraiwo pano nhasi kuti ndigoziva kuti Tenzi achandiudza zvimwe here.” 
Numbers22:20 Mwari akauya kuna Bhiriamu usiku ihwohwo akati, “Kana varume ava vakauya kuzokudaidza, simuka zvako uende navo. Asi zvandinokuudza ndizvo chete zvauchaita.”" 
Numbers22:21 Naizvozvo Bhiriamu akamuka mangwanani ndokusungirira chityaro padhongi ndokuenda namachinda eMoabhu. 
Numbers22:22 Asi kuenda kwake kwakashatirisa Mwari. Zvaaifamba akatasva dhongi rake aina varanda vake vaviri, mutumwa waTenzi akandomira munzira kumudzivisa." 
Numbers22:23 Dhongi parakaona mutumwa waMwari akamira munzira akabata mumaoko bakatwa rakavhomorwa, rakabva ratsauka roenda musango. Bhiriamu ndokurirova achiridzorera munzira." 
Numbers22:24 Mutumwa waTenzi akandomira pakanzira kakanga kari pakati peminda yemigirepisi paiti uku rusvingo uku rusvingo. 
Numbers22:25 Dhongi parakaona mutumwa waTenzi rakasebera nokurusvingo rikadzvanyidzira gumbo raBhiriamu kurusvingo rwuya. Ndokubva arirova zvakare. 
Numbers22:26 Mutumwa waTenzi akaenda mberi akandomira pakamanikana pakanga pasina nzvimbo yokutsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe. 
Numbers22:27 Dhongi parakaona mutumwa waTenzi, rakarara pasi, Bhiriamu akaritasva kudaro. Bhiriamu akaviruka nehasha akarova dhongi netsvimbo yake." 
Numbers22:28 Ipapo Tenzi akapa dhongi kuti ritaure richiti, “Ko ndaiteko kuzondirova kudai katatu kose?”" 
Numbers22:29 Bhiriamu ndokuti kwariri, “Nokuti uri kutoita zvako zvokutamba neni. Dai ndanga ndiine bakatwa rangu ndingadai ndakuuraya iye zvino uno.”" 
Numbers22:30 Dhongi rakapindura Bhiriamu richiti, “Handisiri ini dhongi renyu here ramakatasva upenyu hwenyu hwose kusvikira nhasi? Makambondiona ndichikuitirai zvakadai here?” Akati, “Kwete.”" 
Numbers22:31 Tenzi akabva apengenutsa meso aBhiriamu akaona mutumwa waMwari amire munzira, akabata mumaoko bakatwa rakavhomorwa. Bhiriamu akakotamisa musoro wake ndokubva azvambarara." 
Numbers22:32 Mutumwa waTenzi ndokuti, “Waroverei dhongi rako katatu kose? Chinzwa, ini ndauya kuzokudzivisa nokuti zvauri kufambira zvakaipa.”" 
Numbers22:33 Asi dhongi randiona rikandinyenyeredza katatu kose. Dai risina kundinyenyeredza ndingadai ndatokuuraya iro ndarirega riri benyu. 
Numbers22:34 Bhiriamu ndokupindura mutumwa waTenzi achiti, “Inga ndaita chitadzo. Ndanga ndisingazivi kuti imi manga mumire munzira muchindidzivisa. Zvino kana muchiona zvakaipa, ndodzokera zvangu.”" 
Numbers22:35 Mutumwa waTenzi ndokupindura Bhiriamu achiti, “Enda zvako navo. Asi chandinenge ndakuudza ndicho chete chauchataura.” Naizvozvo Bhiriamu akaenda zvake namachinda aya aBharaki." 
Numbers22:36 Bharaki zvaakanzwa kuti Bhiriamu ari kuuya, akaenda kundomuchingura kuguta reMoabhu riri kuna Arinoni rwizi ruri pamuganhu wenyika yake." 
Numbers22:37 Bharaki akati kuna Bhiriamu, “Ko inga ndakakutumirai nhume kuzokudaidzai wani, makaregererei kuuya? Chokwadi handikwanisi here ini kukupai mubairo?”" 
Numbers22:38 Bhiriamu akati kuna Bharaki, “Hezvinoka ndauya. Asi ndingataure here chero chandingangoda kutaura? Shoko randinenge ndapiwa naMwari ndiro chete randichataura.”" 
Numbers22:39 Bhiriamu ndokuenda naBharaki vakasvika kuKiriatihuzoti. 
Numbers22:40 Bharaki akapira mombe nehwai akabvisawo chokupa Bhiriamu namachinda aakanga anawo. 
Numbers22:41 Ramangwana racho Bharaki akatora Bhiriamu akakwira naye kunzvimbo yakakwirira yeBhamotibhaari, ari ipapo aikwanisa kuona chikamu chavaIsiraeri." 
Numbers23:1 Bhiriamu akati kuna Bharaki, “Ndivakire atari nomwe, ugounza nzombe nomwe nehondohwe nomwe pano apa.”" 
Numbers23:2 Bharaki ndokuita sezvakanga zvataurwa naBhiriamu. Bharaki naBhiriamu Vakapira mupiro wehandira newehondohwe imwechete paatari imwe neimwe. 
Numbers23:3 Ipapo Bhiriamu akati kuna Bharaki, “Mirai pedyo nechibayiro chenyu chokupisa. Ini ndomboti sudurukei, zvimwe Tenzi angauye kuzosangana neni. Zvose zvaanenge andiratidza ndichakuudzai.” Akaenda pamhene pakakwirira." 
Numbers23:4 Mwari ndokusangana naBhiriamu. Bhiriamu akati, “Ndagadzira atari nomwe, ndikapira handira nehondohwe paatari imwe neimwe.”" 
Numbers23:5 Tenzi akaudza Bhiriamu zvokundotaurira Bharaki achiti, “Chidzokera kuna Bharaki umuudze izvozvo.”" 
Numbers23:6 Bhiriamu akadzokera kwakare, wanei Bharaki achakamira pane chibayiro chake chokupisa, iye namachinda ose avaMoabhu." 
Numbers23:7 Bhiriamu ndokutanga kutaura shoko rake achiti, “Bharaki akandiunza kubva kuSiria. Mambo wavaMoabhu akandibvisa kunyika yamakomo yokumabvazuva, achiti, ‘Uya kuno undirengererewo Jakobho Uya uzoshora vaIsiraeri.’" 
Numbers23:8 Ndingarengerere sei rushambwa vanhu vasina kurengererwa naMwari? Ndingashore sei vanhu vasina kushorwa naTenzi. 
Numbers23:9 Ndiri pamusoro pamakomo pano ndinovaona, ndiri pazvikomo pano ndinovatarisa, onei vari vanhu vanoda kugara voga, vasingazviverengeri mukati mamamwe marudzi." 
Numbers23:10 Ndiani angaverenge guruva rakadai kuwanda, saJakobho, kana kuverenga katsama zvako kavaIsiraeri. Regai ndife zvangu rufu rwavakarurama, kuguma kwangu kufananewo nokwavo.”" 
Numbers23:11 Bharaki ndokutaurira Bhiriamu achiti, “Ko chiiko chawandiitira ichi? Ndakakuunza kuti uzorengerera rushambwa vavengi vangu, asi iwe watonyatsovakomborera zvako!”" 
Numbers23:12 Bhiriamu akati, “Handiti zvandinenge ndaudzwa naTenzi ndizvo chete zvandinofanira kutaura?”" 
Numbers23:13 Bharaki akamutaurira kuti, “Handei kune imwe nzvimbo kwamungakwanise kuvatarisa muri, muchivaona. Munenge musingaoni zvenyu vose, asi vashoma chete, mundirengererere vanhu ivavo rushambwa muriko.”" 
Numbers23:14 Akaenda naye kuTsofimu pamusoro pegomo rePisiga. Akavaka atari nomwe ipapo ndokupira handira nehondohwe paatari imwe neimwe. 
Numbers23:15 Bhiriamu ndokutaurira Bharaki achiti, “Mirai pano pane chibayiro chenyu chokupisa. Ini ndichambondosangana naMwari uko.”" 
Numbers23:16 Tenzi akasangana naBhiriamu, ndokumupa zvokundotaura achiti, “Chidzokera kuna Bharaki undomuudza izvozvo.”" 
Numbers23:17 Akadzokera kuna Bharaki kuya wanei achakangomira pane chibayiro chake chokupisa chiya aina machinda eMoabhu. Bharaki akati kwaari, “Zvanzi kudii naTenzi?”" 
Numbers23:18 Bhiriamu akaenderera mberi kuporofita achiti, “VaBharaki wee simukai munzwe, dombondinzwaiwo imi mwanakomana waZipori," 
Numbers23:19 Mwari haazi munhu, haangarevi nhema, haazi munhu, haasanduki sanduki mukutaura. Ko munoti angataure chinhu pedzepo orega kuchiita here? Angatsidze chinhu chaasingazoita here?" 
Numbers23:20 Chinzwai, ini ndanzi ndivakomborere, iye atovapa chikomborero ini handingachibvisi." 
Numbers23:21 Uipi hahuna kuonekwa muna Jakobho, kukanganisa hakuna kuonekwa muvaIsiraeri. Tenzi Mwari wavo anavo, kupemberera Tenzi samambo wavo kunonzwika pakati pavo." 
Numbers23:22 Mwari akavaburitsa muIjipiti, achivarwira nesimba semvumba." 
Numbers23:23 Zvoun'anga Jakobho hazvimukuvadzi, kana zvokurengerera vaIsiraeri hazvipe rushambwa. Vanhu vachataura zvaJakobho nezvavaIsiraeri vachiti, hezvoka zvakaitwa naMwari." 
Numbers23:24 Tarisai muone rudzi rwavaIsiraeri! Runoti kwanyanu seshumba hadzi. Rugonyatsoti kangarara somukono weshumba isingarari pasi kusvikira yadya chainovhima, kana kunwa ropa rechayauraya.”" 
Numbers23:25 Bharaki ndokuti kuna Bhiriamu, “Chisva warega zvako kuvarengerera kana kumbovakomborera.”" 
Numbers23:26 Asi Bhiriamu akati, “Handina kukuudzai here kuti zvose zvandinenge ndaudzwa naTenzi ndizvo zvandichaita?”" 
Numbers23:27 Bharaki akataurira Bhiriamu achiti, “Handei kune imwe nzvimbo. Zvimwe Mwari angafare kuti uvarengerere uriko.”" 
Numbers23:28 Saka Bharaki akaenda naBhiriamu kugomo rePeori rakatarisana nerenje. 
Numbers23:29 Bhiriamu akati kuna Bharaki, “Ndivakirei atari nomwe pano, mundipe handira nomwe nehondohwe nomwe.”" 
Numbers23:30 Bharaki akaita zvaakaudzwa naBhiriamu. Akapira handira nehondohwe paatari imwe neimwe. 
Numbers24:1 Bhiriamu paakaona kuti Tenzi aifadzwa nokukomborera vaIsiraeri haana kuzombondotsvaka chiratidzo sezvaaimboita. Asi akatarisa kurenje," 
Numbers24:2 akaona vaIsiraeri vakadzika matendhe avo dzinza nedzinza, Mweya waMwari ndokuuya paari." 
Numbers24:3 Akaenderera mberi nokuporofita kwake achiti, “Chirevo chaBhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori, chirevo chomurume akapengenutswa meso ake." 
Numbers24:4 Chirevo chomunhu anonzwa mashoko aMwari, anoona chiratidzo chaSamasimbaose, anoti pasi zvambarara meso ake achipengenutswa." 
Numbers24:5 A-a manakiroi akaita matendhe ako Jakobho, naiwoka madzikiro ako matendhe iwe Isiraeri!" 
Numbers24:6 Akaita samapani anoenda uko nokoko, samapindu ari munhivi dzerwizi samagavakava, akasimwa naTenzi, semisidhari iri padeketeke remvura." 
Numbers24:7 Zvirongo zvavo zvichafashukira nemvura, mbesa dzavo dzichawana mvura yakawanda. Kukudzwa kwamambo wavo kuchadarika kwaAgagi, ushe hwake huchaita mukurumbira." 
Numbers24:8 Mwari akavaburitsa kuIjipiti, achivarwira nesimba semvumba, ndudzi dzavanhu dzinovavenga vachadziparadza, mapfupa avavengi vavo vachaati bwabwabwa vachivabvoora nemiseve yavo." 
Numbers24:9 Seshumba vaIsiraeri vanoti hwata vachivata pasi, vanoita seshumba hadzi, ndianiko angavadenhe. Wose anokukomborera, ngaakomborerwe. Wose anokurengerera rushambwa ngaawire norushambwa.”" 
Numbers24:10 Bharaki akashatiriswa naBhiriamu, ndokurovanisa maoko ake pamwechete. Bharaki ndokuti kuna Bhiriamu, “Ndakakudaidzira kuzorengerera rushambwa vavengi vangu, asi zvino watovakomborera zvako katatu kose." 
Numbers24:11 Zvino chitiza, dzokera kumusha kwako. Ndakamboti ndichakupa mubairo, asi Tenzi akunyimisa mubairo wacho.”" 
Numbers24:12 Bhiriamu ndokuti kuna Bharaki, “Ko handina kuudza nhume dzenyu dzamakanditumira kuti," 
Numbers24:13 ‘Kunyange Bharaki akandipa imba yake izere sirivha nendarama, handingambotsaudziri shoko raTenzi ndichiita zvakanaka kana zvakaipa zvandinoda pachangu.’ Zvinenge zvataurwa naTenzi ndizvo zvandichataura." 
Numbers24:14 “Zvino ndava kudzokera kwedu, kuna vanhu vorudzi rwangu. Asi regai ndifanokuudzai zvichaitwa navaIsiraeri kuvanhu venyu mune ramangwana.”" 
Numbers24:15 Bhiriamu ndokuenderera mberi nokuporofita achiti, “Chirevo chaBhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori, chirevo chomurume akapengenutswa meso ake." 
Numbers24:16 Chirevo chomunhu anonzwa mashoko aMwari, anopiwa ruzivo noWokumusorosoro, anoona chiratidzo chaSamasimbaose, anoti pasi zvambarara, meso ake achipengenutswa." 
Numbers24:17 Ndinomuona, asi zvandinoona hazvisi zvanhasi, ndinomutarisa asi haasi pedyo. Nyenyedzi ichauya ichibva muna Jakobho, muvaIsiraeri muchava nomubati wetsvimbo youshe, huma yaMoabhu achaitekeshura achaparadza vanakomana vaSheti." 
Numbers24:18 Achakunda Edhomu muvengi wake, makomo avo eSeiri achaatora. Isiraeri acharamba achikunda." 
Numbers24:19 Muna Jakobho muchava nomutongi achaparadza vaya vakasara vari vapenyu mumaguta.” 
Numbers24:20 Bhiriamu akaona vaAmareki, ndokuporofita nezvavo achiti, “Simba ravaAmareki raidarika ramarudzi ose, asi vachaguma vaparadzwa zvachose.”" 
Numbers24:21 Bhiriamu akaona vaKeni, ndokuporofita nezvavo achiti; “Paugere hapana chichakuwana, dendere rako rakavakirwa mudombo." 
Numbers24:22 Kunyange zvakadaro vaKeni vachaparadzwa. Muchagara muri nhapwa dzavaAsiria kusvikira riniko?” 
Numbers24:23 Bhiriamu akazoporofita achiti; “Ndiani angararame kana Tenzi achiita zvakadai? 
Numbers24:24 Asi ngarava dzichabva kuSaipurasi dzichaonesa nhamo Asiria naEbheru. Asi ivo pachavo vachaparadzwawo.” 
Numbers24:25 Bhiriamu akazosimuka akadzokera kumusha kwake. Bharaki akaendawo kwake. 
Numbers25:1 VaIsiraeri pavakanga vagere mubani remibayamhondoro reShitimu, varume vakatanga kuita unzenza navakadzi vorudzi rwavaMoabhu." 
Numbers25:2 Vakadzi ivavo vakavakoka kuzvibairo zvavamwari vavo. Vanhu vakadya vakapfugamira vamwari vavo ivavo. 
Numbers25:3 Naizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakazvipinza muuranda hwokunamata Bhaari mwari wokuPeori. Tenzi akashatiriswa navaIsiraeri," 
Numbers25:4 akabva ataurira Mosesi kuti, “Tora vatungamiriri vose vavaIsiraeri uuye navo pana Tenzi, uvasungirire vafe pamberi paTenzi masikati machena kuti hasha dzaTenzi dzinotyisa dzichirega kuvirukira vaIsiraeri.”" 
Numbers25:5 Mosesi akataurira vatongi vavaIsiraeri achiti, “Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaauraye ani naani akazvipinza muuranda hwokunamata Bhaari, mwari wokuPeori.”" 
Numbers25:6 Ipapo mumwe murume muIsiraeri akauya nomukadzi worudzi rwavaMidhiani akapinda naye mutendhe rake, achionekwa naMosesi negungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakanga richichema riri kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira." 
Numbers25:7 Finiyasi mwanakomana waEreazari, muzukuru womupristi Aroni, paakazviona, akabva paiva negungano riya, akandotora pfumo rake," 
Numbers25:8 ndokutevera murume uya mutendhe muya, ndokusvikosonanidza nepfumo nechapadumbu murume muIsiraeri nomukadzi uya. Ndiko kumiswa kwakaitwa denda pavaIsiraeri." 
Numbers25:9 Asi vanhu vakanga vatofa nedenda iroro vaiva zviuru makumi maviri nezvina. 
Numbers25:10 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers25:11 “Finiyasi mwanakomana waEreazari, muzukuru womupristi Aroni, apodza kutsamwira vaIsiraeri kwandanga ndaita. Atsamwira vanhu vasina kundiremekedza ini, sokuvatsamwira kwandinoitawo ini pachangu. Saka ndisina kuzoramba ndichiparadza vaIsiraeri pandanga ndavatsamwira." 
Numbers25:12 Naizvozvo mutaurire kuti, ndichaita chitenderano chorugare naye." 
Numbers25:13 Chitenderano ichi chokuti vava vapristi nokusingapere ndechake iye nezvizvarwa zvake nokuti akatsamwira vanhu vasina kuremekedza Tenzi wake akayananisa vaIsiraeri naTenzi.” 
Numbers25:14 Zita romurume muIsiraeri uya akaurayiwa pamwechete nomukadzi worudzi rwavaMidhiani rainzi Zimuri mwanakomana waSaru, aiva mutungamiriri weimwe mhuri yomudzinza rokwaSimeoni." 
Numbers25:15 Zita romukadzi wechiMidhiani akaurayiwa uya ainzi Kazibhi, aiva mukunda waZuri akanga ari mukuru wedzinza rimwe ravaMidhiani." 
Numbers25:16 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers25:17 “Rwisai vaMidhiani muvaparadze," 
Numbers25:18 panyaya iya yaKazibhi hanzvadzi yavo, mukunda wejinda romuMidhiani, yakaurayiwa panguva iya yedenda rakauraya vanhu paPeori.”" 
Numbers26:1 Denda riya rakati rapera, Tenzi akazotaurira Mosesi naEreazari mwanakomana womupristi Aroni achiti," 
Numbers26:2 “Verengai gungano rose ravaIsiraeri vanhurume vana makore makumi maviri, navane anopfuura iwayo, verengai dzinza nedzinza vaIsiraeri vose vanokwanisa kuenda kuhondo.”" 
Numbers26:3 Mosesi nomupristi Ereazari vakandotaurirana navanhu kumapani eMoabhu mhiri kwaJorodhani paJeriko vachiti," 
Numbers26:4 vaverenge vanhurume vana makore makumi maviri navana anopfuura iwayo, sokuudzwa kwakaita Mosesi naTenzi. VaIsiraeri vakabuda kuIjipiti vaiti:" 
Numbers26:5 mudzinza raRubheni, dangwe raJakobho maiva nemhuri dzavanakomana vake vaiti: mhuri yokwaHanoki tateguru wayo ari Hanoki, mhuri yokwaParu, tateguru wayo ari Paru," 
Numbers26:6 mhuri yokwaHezironi tateguru wayo ari Hezironi, mhuri yokwaKarumi tateguru wayo ari Karumi." 
Numbers26:7 Vose vakaverengwa mudzinza raRubheni, vaikwana makumi mana ezviuru nezviuru zvitatu namazana manomwe ana makumi matatu avanhu." 
Numbers26:8 Mwanakomana waParu aiva Eriabhu. 
Numbers26:9 Vanakomana vaEriabhu vaiva Nemueri naDhatani naAbhiramu. Ndivo Dhatani naAbhiramu vatungamiriri vaya vakanga vasarudzwa mugungano ravaIsiraeri. Asi vakazopikisana naMosesi naAroni, vakaita rimwe naKora paya pavakapikisa Tenzi." 
Numbers26:10 Ndipo pakashama nyika muromo wayo ikavamedza pamwechete naKora neboka rake, pakaparadzwa varume mazana maviri anamakumi mashanu, chikava chiratidzo chokuyambira vanhu." 
Numbers26:11 Asi vana vaKora havana kuurayiwa. 
Numbers26:12 Mudzinza rokwaSimeoni makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaNemueri tateguru wayo ari Nemueri, mhuri yokwaJamini tateguru wayo vari Jamini, mhuri yokwaJakini tateguru wayo ari Jakini," 
Numbers26:13 mhuri yaZera tateguru wayo ari Zera, mhuri yaShauri tateguru wayo ari Shauri." 
Numbers26:14 Vose vakaverengwa mudzinza rokwaSimeoni, vaikwana makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zviviri namazana maviri." 
Numbers26:15 Mudzinza rokwaGadhi makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaZefoni tateguru wayo ari Zefoni, mhuri yaHagi tateguru wayo ari Hagi, mhuri yaShuni tateguru wayo ari Shuni," 
Numbers26:16 mhuri yaOzini tateguru wayo ari Ozini, mhuri yaEri tateguru wayo ari Eri," 
Numbers26:17 mhuri yaArodhi tateguru wayo ari Arodhi, mhuri yaAreri tateguru vayo vari Areri." 
Numbers26:18 Vose vakaverengwa mudzinza rokwaGadhi, vaikwana makumi mana ezviuru namazana mashanu avanhu." 
Numbers26:19 Judha aivawo navanakomana vainzi Eri naOnani, asi vakanga vatofa kare munyika yeKanani." 
Numbers26:20 Saka vakaverengwa mudzinza rokwaJudha mhuri nemhuri, ndevemhuri yaShera tateguru wayo ari Shera, mhuri yaPerezi tateguru wayo ari Perezi, mhuri yaZera tateguru wayo ari Zera." 
Numbers26:21 Vanakomana vaPerezi nemhuri dzavo ndivo ava vanoti; mhuri yaHezironi tateguru wayo ari Hezironi, mhuri yokwaHamuri tateguru wayo ari Hamuri." 
Numbers26:22 Vose vakaverengwa mudzinza rokwaJudha vaikwana makumi manomwe ezviuru nezviuru zvitanhatu namazana mashanu avanhu. 
Numbers26:23 Mudzinza rokwaIsakari makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaTora tateguru wayo ari Tora, mhuri yokwaPuni tateguru wayo ari Puvha," 
Numbers26:24 mhuri yokwaJashubhi tateguru wayo ari Jashubhi, mhuri yokwaShimuroni tateguru wayo ari Shimuroni." 
Numbers26:25 Vose vakaverengwa mudzinza rokwaIsakari vaikwana makumi matanhatu ezviuru nezviuru zvina, namazana matatu avanhu." 
Numbers26:26 Mudzinza rokwaZebhuroni makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaSeredhi tateguru wayo ari Seredhi, mhuri yokwaEroni tateguru wayo ari Eroni, mhuri yokwaJareeri tateguru wayo ari Jareeeri." 
Numbers26:27 Vose vakaverengwa mudzinza rokwaZebhuroni vaikwana makumi matanhatu ezviuru, namazana mashanu avanhu." 
Numbers26:28 Mudzinza rokwaJosefi makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, dzaManase nedzaEfuremu." 
Numbers26:29 Mumhuri dzokwaManase kwaiti mhuri yokwaMakiri tateguru wayo ari Makiri. Makiri ndiye baba vaGiriadhi. Mhuri yokwaGiriadhi tateguru vayo ndiGiriadhi. 
Numbers26:30 Giriadhi akavawo navanakomana vake nemhuri dzavo dzinoti mhuri yokwaJezeri tateguru wayo ari Jezeri, mhuri yokwaHereki tateguru wayo ari Hereki," 
Numbers26:31 mhuri yokwaAsirieri tateguru wayo ari Asirieri, mhuri yokwaShikemu tateguru wayo ari Shekemu," 
Numbers26:32 mhuri yokwaShemidha tateguru wayo ari Shemidha, mhuri yokwaHeferi tateguru wayo ari Heferi." 
Numbers26:33 Asi Zerofehadhi mwanakomana waHeferi akanga asina vanakomana, asi aiva navanasikana. Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vainzi Mahira naNowa naHogira naMirika naTiriza." 
Numbers26:34 Vose vakaverengwa mudzinza raManase vaikwana makumi mashanu ezviuru nezviuru zviviri, namazana manomwe avanhu." 
Numbers26:35 Mudzinza rokwaEfuremu makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaShutera tateguru wayo ari Shutera, mhuri yokwaBhekeri tateguru wayo ari Bhekeri, mhuri yokwaTahani tateguru wayo ari Tahani." 
Numbers26:36 Shutera ndiye baba waErani tateguru wemhuri yavaErani. 
Numbers26:37 Vose vakaverengwa mumhuri yaEfuremu vaikwana makumi matatu ezviuru nezviuru zviviri, namazana mashanu. Ivava ndivo vomudzinza rokwaJosefi vakaverengwa mhuri nemhuri." 
Numbers26:38 Mudzinza rokwaBhenjamini makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaBhera tateguru wayo ari Bhera, mhuri yokwaAshibheri tateguru wayo ari Ashibheri, mhuri yokwaAhiramu tateguru wayo ari Ahiramu," 
Numbers26:39 mhuri yokwaShefufamu tateguru wayo ari Shefufamu, mhuri yokwaHufamu tateguru wayo ari Hufamu." 
Numbers26:40 Vanakomana vaBhera ndiAridhi naNaamani. Mhuri yakwaAridhi tateguru wayo ndiAridhi, mhuri yokwaNaamani tateguru wayo ndiNaamani." 
Numbers26:41 Vose vakaverengwa mhuri nemhuri mudzinza rokwaBhenjamini vaikwana makumi mana ezviuru nezviuru zvishanu, namazana matanhatu." 
Numbers26:42 Mudzinza raDhani makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaShuhamu tateguru wayo ari Shuhamu. Ndidzo mhuri dzomudzinza rokwaDhani dzakaverengwa mhuri nemhuri." 
Numbers26:43 Vanhu vakaverengwa vose mhuri nemhuri dzokwaShuhamu vakakwana makumi matanhatu ezviuru nezviuru zvina, namazana mana." 
Numbers26:44 Mudzinza raAsheri makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaImuna tateguru wayo ari Imuna, mhuri yokwaIshivhi tateguru wayo ari Ishivhi, mhuri yaBheria tateguru wayo ari Bheria." 
Numbers26:45 Bheria ndiye tateguru waHebheri naMarikieri, mhuri yokwaHebheri tateguru wayo ari Hebheri, mhuri yaMarikieri tateguru wayo ari Marikieri." 
Numbers26:46 Zita romwanasikana waAsheri rainzi Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Ndidzo mhuri dzomudzinza raAsheri, vose vakaverengwa vakakwana makumi mashanu ezviuru nezviuru zvitatu, namazana mana avanhu." 
Numbers26:48 Mudzinza rokwaNafutari makaverengwa mhuri nemhuri, mhuri yokwaJahizeeri tateguru wayo ari Jahizeeri, mhuri yaGuni tateguru wayo ari Guni," 
Numbers26:49 mhuri yokwaJezeri tateguru wayo ari Jezeri, mhuri yokwaShiremu tateguru wayo ari Shiremu." 
Numbers26:50 Idzodzi ndidzo mhuri dzomudzinza rokwaNafutari, vose vakaverengwa vakakwana makumi mana ezviuru nezviuru zvishanu, namazana mana avanhu." 
Numbers26:51 Uhu ndiwo uwandi hwavaIsiraeri vakaverengwa. Vakakwana mazana matanhatu ezviuru nechiuru chimwechete, chine mazana manomwe namakumi matatu avanhu." 
Numbers26:52 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers26:53 “Vanhu ivavo ngavagoverwe nyika kuti ive nhaka yavo maererano nouwandi hwavo. 
Numbers26:54 Dzinza rina vanhu vazhinji ngaripiwe mugove wenhaka mukuru. Dzinzawo rina vanhu vashoma, ngaripiwe mugove wenhaka muduku. Dzinza nedzinza ngaripiwe mugove wenhaka maererano nouwandi hwevemo." 
Numbers26:55 Nyika ngaigoviwe nechin'ange, vagogaramo mhuri nemhuri, dzinza nedzinza." 
Numbers26:56 Nhaka iyoyi inofanira kugoverwa nechin'ange maererano nouwandi kana ushoma hwavanhu vari mudzinza iroro.” 
Numbers26:57 Mudzinza rokwaRevhi ava ndivo vakaverengwa mhuri nemhuri; makaverengwa mhuri yokwaGerishoni tateguru wayo ari Gerishoni, nemhuri yokwaKohati tateguru wayo ari Kohati, nemhuri yokwaMerari tateguru wayo ari Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Mhuri dzomudzinza rokwaRevhi dzaiva mhuri yokwaRibhini, nemhuri yokwaHebhuroni, nemhuri yokwaMaari nemhuri yokwaMushi nemhuri yaKora. Kohati aiva baba vaAmuramu." 
Numbers26:59 Zita romudzimai waAmuramu rainzi Jokebhedhi, mwanasikana waRevhi akaberekerwa Ijipiti. Ndiye akabereka Aroni naMosesi nehanzvadzi yavo Miriamu." 
Numbers26:60 Aroni ndibaba vaNadhabhu naAbhihu naEreazari naItamaru. 
Numbers26:61 Asi Nadhabhu naAbhihu vakafa paya pavakapira Tenzi moto usingabvumirwi. 
Numbers26:62 Vose vakaverengwa vaikwana makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zvitatu. Vaiva vanhurume vose, kubvira pavacheche vane mwedzi mumwechete, wokuberekwa zvichikwira, vakanga vasina kuverengwa pamwechete navaIsiraeri nokuti vakanga vasingagoverwi nhaka pakati pavo." 
Numbers26:63 Ivava ndivo vakaverengwa naMosesi nomupristi Ereazari. Vakaverenga gungano ravaIsiraeri vari mumapani eMoabhu pedyo naJorodhani kuJeriko. 
Numbers26:64 Asi pane vakaverengwa ipapo pakanga pasisina kunyange murume mumwechete zvake wavaya vakamboverengwa naMosesi nomupristi Aroni, pavakamboverenga gungano ravaIsiraeri kurenje reSinai," 
Numbers26:65 nokuti Tenzi akanga avapikira achiti, “Vanotofira murenje.” Saka hakuna kana munhu wavo wechirume akasara kunze kwaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune, naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni." 
Numbers27:1 Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vakauya kuna Mosesi. Zerofehadhi uyu aiva mwanakomana waHeferi, mwanakomana waGiriadhi, mwanakomana waMakiri, mwanakomana waManase, saka aiva womudzimhuri dzokwaManase mwanakomana waJosefi. Vanasikana ivavo vainzi Mahara naNowa naHogira naMirika naTiriza." 
Numbers27:2 Vakaenda kuna Mosesi naEreazari mupristi navatungamiriri negungano rose kumusuo wetendhe rokusangana vakati," 
Numbers27:3 “Baba vedu isu vakafira kurenje. Asi vakanga vasiri muboka raKora riya rakaungana kuzopikisa Tenzi. Vakafawo nezvitadzo zvavo. Asi vakanga vasina mwana mukomana. 
Numbers27:4 Ko zvino zita rababa vedu rorovawo here mumhuri yavo, pamusana pokuti vakanga vasina mwana mukomana? Tipei nhaka pamwechete nehama dzababa vedu.”" 
Numbers27:5 Mosesi akandoisa chichemo chavo kuna Tenzi. 
Numbers27:6 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers27:7 “Zvataurwa navanasikana vaZerofehadhi ndizvo chaizvo. Vape mugove wenhaka pamwechete nehama dzababa vavo. Ita kuti vapiwe nhaka yababa wavo. 
Numbers27:8 Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti kana murume akafa asina kusiya mwana mukomana, nhaka yake ngaipiwe vanasikana vake." 
Numbers27:9 Kana asina kusiya mwanasikana nhaka yake ngaipiwe vakoma kana vanun'una vake. 
Numbers27:10 Kana asina vakoma kana vanun'una, nhaka yake ngaipiwe vakoma kana vanun'una vababa vake." 
Numbers27:11 Kana baba wake asina mukoma kana munun'una nhaka yake ngaipiwe hama yake yepedyo, kuti ive yake. Iwoyu uve murao unochengetwa navaIsiraeri sokurayira kwandaita ini Tenzi iwe Mosesi.”" 
Numbers27:12 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Kwira mugomo iri reAbharimu uone nyika yandakapa vaIsiraeri." 
Numbers27:13 Kana waiona uchaendawo kune hama dzako vachakabvu, sezvakaita mukoma wako Aroni." 
Numbers27:14 Ndinodaro nokuti hamuna kuteerera zvandakakuudzai kurenje reZini. Gungano rose ravaIsiraeri parakandinyunyutira paMeribha, hamuna kuratidza vanhu kururama nokuera kwangu.” Ndiyo mvura iya yepaMeribha paKadheshi murenje reZini." 
Numbers27:15 Mosesi akanamata kuna Tenzi achiti," 
Numbers27:16 “Imi Tenzi, Mwari muridzi woupenyu hwose, ndapota, sarudzai munhu anozotungamirira vanhu venyu ava." 
Numbers27:17 Ndiye achavatungamirira pane zvose zvavanoita vari mukati nokunze ndiye achavatungamirira pavanoenda kuhondo napavanodzoka kuti vanhu venyu varege kuzoita sehwai dzisina mufudzi.” 
Numbers27:18 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Tora Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni murume ane mweya wangu maari, uise maoko ako pamusoro pake." 
Numbers27:19 Mumise pamberi paEreazari mupristi negungano rose, umuturire basa iri vachizviona." 
Numbers27:20 Mupe rimwe simba rako kuti gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rimuteerere. 
Numbers27:21 Achapota achiuya kuzobatsirwa nomupristi Ereazari. Ereazari ndiye achashandisa Urimu neTumimu kubvunza Tenzi kana Joshuwa achida kuziva zvaangaite. Joshuwa navaIsiraeri vose vanotoenda kuhondo kana ati vaende, vanotozodzoka kana ati vadzoke.”" 
Numbers27:22 Mosesi akaita zvaakaudzwa naTenzi. Akatora Joshuwa ndokumumisa pamberi pomupristi Ereazari negungano rose 
Numbers27:23 ndokuisa maoko ake pamusoro pake, ndokumuturira basa sokurongerwa kwakanga kwaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Numbers28:1 Tenzi akati kuna Mosesi," 
Numbers28:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti vangwarire kundipa, mipiro yangu panguva dzakatemwa, mipiro yangu yezvokudya inoita zvokupiswa nomoto inonhuhwirira zvinondifadza." 
Numbers28:3 Vaudze kuti zuva nezuva vagare vachipira Mwari mupiro wokupisa wehwayana mbiri, dzine gore rimwechete dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers28:4 Ngavapire Mwari hwayana imwechete mangwanani, vozopira imwe yacho manheru." 
Numbers28:5 Ngavapirewo upfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hunorema kirogiramu rimwechete, hwakakanywa namafuta eorivhi akanakisisa anokwana rita rimwechete." 
Numbers28:6 Uyu ndiwo mupiro wokupisa pazuva roga roga wakarayirwa vaIsiraeri pagomo reSinai unopiswa pamoto kuti kunhuhwirira kwawo kufadze Tenzi. 
Numbers28:7 Piraiwo mupiro wayo wezvokunwa unokwana rita rimwechete, nechibayiro chehwayana yokutanga, muteurire Tenzi zvokunwa, zvinoraradzisa munzvimbo inoera." 
Numbers28:8 Ngavapire hwayana yechipiri manheru nomupiro wayo wembesanwa nomupiro wayo wezvokunwa sezvinenge zvamboitwa mangwanani. Mupiro iwoyo uitei zvokuupisa nomoto kunhuhwirira kwawo kufadze ini Tenzi. 
Numbers28:9 “Musi weSabata pirai hwayana hono mbiri, dzine gore rimwechete, dzisina chinoshoreka, pamwechete noupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hunorema makirogiramu maviri, hwomupiro wembesanwa, hwakakanywa namafuta, pamwechete nomupiro wawo wezvokunwa." 
Numbers28:10 Iwoyu ndiwo mupiro wokupisa wokuita paSabata rimwe nerimwe, uchiwedzerwa pamupiro wokupisa wamazuva ose nomupiro wawo wezvokunwa." 
Numbers28:11 “Mwedzi woga woga pakugara kwawo, pirai Tenzi mupiro wokupisa, wehandira mbiri dzichiri duku nehondohwe imwechete, nehwayana hono nomwe dzine gore rimwechete dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers28:12 Pirai mupiro wembesanwa weupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi. Pahandira imwe neimwe torai upfu hunorema makirogiramu matatu, pahondohwe, mutore makirogiramu maviri," 
Numbers28:13 Pahwayana imwe neimwe torai kirogiramu rimwechete. Uyu ndiwo mupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto kuti kunhuhwirira kwawo kufadze Tenzi. 
Numbers28:14 Mipiro yezvokunwa inopirwa pamwechete nayo ndeiyi: pahandira imwe neimwe torai, waini inokwana marita maviri, pahondohwe torai waini inokwana rita rimwechete nechikamu charo chapakati napakati, pahwayana imwe neimwe torai waini inokwana rita rimwechete. Iwoyu ndiwo mupiro wokupisa unoitwa pazuva rokutanga romwedzi nomwedzi gore rose." 
Numbers28:15 Piraiwo Tenzi gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo uchiwedzerwa pamupiro wokupisa uya unogaroitwa pamwechete nomupiro wewaini. 
Numbers28:16 “Zuva regumi nechina romwedzi wokutanga, ndiro zuva rePasika yaTenzi." 
Numbers28:17 Zuva regumi nechishanu romwedzi iwoyu izuva guru. Ngakudyiwe chingwa chisina mbiriso kwamazuva manomwe. 
Numbers28:18 Zuva rokutanga racho ngapaitwe musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, musaite basa rinorema." 
Numbers28:19 Asi pirai Tenzi mupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto wehandira mbiri dzichiri duku pamwechete nehondohwe imwechete, nehwayana hono nomwe, dzine gore rimwechete. Dzose ngadzive dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers28:20 Piraiwo mupiro wembesanwa weupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi, pahandira imwechete torai makirogiramu matatu, pahondohwe torai makirogiramu maviri," 
Numbers28:21 pirai kirogiramu rimwechete pahwayana imwe neimwe dzose dziri nomwe. 
Numbers28:22 Piraiwo Tenzi gotora rimwechete romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo kuve kuripira kwenyu. 
Numbers28:23 Mipiro iyoyi ngaiwedzerwe pamupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa mangwanani. 
Numbers28:24 Kwamazuva manomwe itai saizvozvo zuva nezuva muchipira zvokudya zvomupiro unoita zvokupiswa nomoto, kunhuhwirira kwawo kufadze ini Tenzi. Mipiro iyoyi ngaiwedzere mupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zuva nezuva pamwechete nomupiro wezvokunwa." 
Numbers28:25 Pazuva rechinomwe kokorodzanaizve muite musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, musaite basa rinorema." 
Numbers28:26 “Pazuva rokupira mupiro wembesanwa dzinotanga kukohwiwa, pamunouya kuzopira Tenzi mupiro wembesanwa dzinotanga, mazuva makuru amavhiki okukohwa, itai musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata musaite basa rinorema." 
Numbers28:27 Asi pirai Mwari mupiro wokupisa unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi. Pirai handira mbiri dzichiri duku nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono nomwe dzine gore rimwechete. 
Numbers28:28 Piraiwo mupiro wembesanwa weupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi. Pahandira imwe neimwe pirai makirogiramu matatu oupfu, pahondohwe makirogiramu maviri," 
Numbers28:29 pahwayana imwe neimwe kirogiramu rimwechete. 
Numbers28:30 Piraiwo gotora rokupfupira zvitadzo zvenyu kuve kuripira kwenyu. 
Numbers28:31 Pirai mipiro iyoyi pamwechete nemipiro yayo yezvokunwa tisingaverengere mupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa nomupiro wawo wembesanwa. Nyatsoonai kuti zvipfuwo zvacho zvive zvipfuwo zvisina chinoshoreka. 
Numbers29:1 “Pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wechinomwe ngakuitwe musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, musaite basa rinorema. Ndiro zuva renyu ramunoridza tsuri," 
Numbers29:2 muchipira mupiro wenyu wokupisa unonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi. Pirai handira ichiri duku imwechete, nehondohwe imwechete nehwayana hono nomwe dzine gore rimwechete. Dzose ngadzive dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:3 Piraiwo mupiro wawo wembesanwa weupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi. Pahandira pirai makirogiramu matatu oupfu, hwakanyatsokuyiwa pahondohwe makirogiramu maviri," 
Numbers29:4 pahwayana imwe neimwe kirogiramu rimwechete. 
Numbers29:5 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo kuve kuripira kwenyu. 
Numbers29:6 Mipiro iyoyi ngaiwedzerwe pamusoro pemupiro wokupisa unopirwa pakugara kwomwedzi, nomupiro wawo wembesanwa unogaropirwa mazuva ose. Mipiro yacho ngaive nemipiro yayo yezvokunwa, sezvakatemwa. Ndiyo mipiro inopirwa ichiita zvokupiswa nomoto, inonhuhwirira zvinofadza Tenzi." 
Numbers29:7 “Pazuva regumi romwedzi wechinomwe ngakuitwe musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata, mutsanye, murege kuita basa." 
Numbers29:8 Asi pirai Tenzi mupiro wokupisa unonhuhwirira zvinomufadza, mupiro wehandira ichiri duku, nehondohwe imwechete, nehwayana hono nomwe dzine gore rimwechete. Dzose ngadzive dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:9 Pirai mupiro wembesanwa unopirwa pamwechete nawo unenge uri weupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa, hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi. Pahandira yoga yoga pirai makirogiramu matatu oupfu, pahondohwe makirogiramu maviri," 
Numbers29:10 pahwayana imwe neimwe kirogiramu rimwechete. 
Numbers29:11 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo nomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zuva nezuva nomupiro wembesanwa unopirwa pamwechetewo nawo pamwechete nemipiro yayo yezvokunwa. 
Numbers29:12 “Pazuva regumi nechishanu romwedzi wechinomwe itai musangano mutsvene, wozvokunamata murege kuita basa renyu ramazuva ose. Asi chengeterai Tenzi mazuva makuru manomwe." 
Numbers29:13 Pirai mupiro wokupisa unoita zvokupiswa nomoto unonhuhwirira zvinofadza ini Tenzi. Pirai handira dzichiri duku gumi nenhatu, nehondohwe mbiri, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete gumi neina. Dzose ngadzive dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:14 Piraiwo mupiro wembesanwa unopirwa nawo weupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwakakanyiwa namafuta eorivhi. Pahandira imwe neimwe makirogiramu matatu oupfu, pahandira dzose dziri gumi nenhatu. Pahondohwe mbiri pirai makirogiramu maviri pahondohwe." 
Numbers29:15 Pahwayana gumi neina, pirai kirogiramu rimwechete pahwayana." 
Numbers29:16 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo wokuwedzera pamusoro pomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zuva nezuva pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa, nomupiro wawo wezvokunwa." 
Numbers29:17 “Pazuva repiri, pirai handira dzichiri duku gumi nembiri, nehondohwe mbiri, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete gumi neina dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:18 Piraiwo handira dziya nehondohwe dziya nehwayana dziya pamwechete nemipiro yembesanwa neyezvokunwa inokwanirana nouwandu hwadzo sezvakatemwa nomurayiro. 
Numbers29:19 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamusoro pomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa, nemipiro yayo yezvokunwa." 
Numbers29:20 Pazuva retatu, pirai handira dzichiri duku gumi neimwechete nehondohwe mbiri, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete gumi neina. Dzose ngadzive dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:21 Piraiwo handira dzacho nehondohwe dzacho nehwayana dzacho pamwechete nemipiro yembesanwa yezvokunwa inokwanirana nouwandu hwadzo sezvakatemwa nomurao. 
Numbers29:22 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamusoro pomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zuva nezuva pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa nomupiro wawo wezvokunwa. 
Numbers29:23 “Pazuva rechina pirai handira dzichiri duku gumi, nehondohwe mbiri, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete gumi neina dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:24 Pamwechete nehandira dzacho nehondohwe dzacho nehwayana dzacho mupirewo mipiro yembesanwa neyewaini inokwanirana nouwandu hwadzo sezvakatemwa nomurao. 
Numbers29:25 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamusoro pomupiro wawo wokupisa unogaroitwa pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa newezvokunwa. 
Numbers29:26 “Pazuva reshanu pirai handira dzichiri duku pfumbamwe, nehondohwe mbiri, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete gumi neina dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:27 Piraiwo handira dziya nehondohwe dziya, nehwayana dziya pamwechete nemipiro yembesanwa neyewaini inokwanirana nouwandu hwadzo, sezvakatemwa nomurao." 
Numbers29:28 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamusoro pomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zuva nezuva pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa newezvokunwa. 
Numbers29:29 “Pazuva rechitanhatu pirai handira dzichiri duku tsere, nehondohwe mbiri, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete, gumi neina dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:30 Piraiwo handira dzacho, nehondohwe dzacho, nehwayana dzacho pamwechete nemipiro yembesanwa neyewaini inokwanirana nouwandi hwadzo, sezvakatemwa nomurao." 
Numbers29:31 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamusoro pomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zuva nezuva pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa nowezvokunwa. 
Numbers29:32 “Pazuva rechinomwe pirai handira dzichiri duku nomwe, nehondohwe mbiri, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete, gumi neina dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:33 Pirai nehandira dzacho nehondohwe dzacho, nehwayana dzacho, pamwechete nemipiro yembesanwa neyezvokunwa inokwanirana nouwandu hwadzo, sezvakatemwa nomurao." 
Numbers29:34 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa nomupiro wawo wezvokunwa. 
Numbers29:35 “Pazuva rorusere unganidzanai muite musangano mukuru mutsvene wozvokunamata, musaite basa rinorema." 
Numbers29:36 Asi pirai mupiro wokupisa unoita zvokupiswa nomoto, unonhuhwirira zvinofadza ini Tenzi. Pirai handira nehondohwe, nehwayana hono dzine gore rimwechete nomwe, dzisina chinoshoreka." 
Numbers29:37 Piraiwo handira yacho nehondohwe yacho nehwayana dzacho pamwechete nemipiro yembesanwa neyewaini inokwanirana nouwandu hwadzo sezvakatemwa nomurao. 
Numbers29:38 Piraiwo gotora romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo muchiwedzera pamusoro pomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zuva nezuva pamwechete nomupiro wawo wembesanwa nomupiro wawo wezvokunwa. 
Numbers29:39 “Iyi ndiyo mipiro yamunofanira kupira kuna Tenzi pamazuva enyu makuru akatemwa ichiwedzerwa pamusoro pemipiro yamunopira nechido chenyu nomupiro wokuzvisarudzira neyokupisa neyembesanwa neyezvokunwa neyokuwadzana.” 
Numbers29:40 Mosesi akaudza vaIsiraeri zvose zvaakanga audzwa naTenzi. 
Numbers30:1 Mosesi akataurira vatungamiriri vamadzinza avaIsiraeri achiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvandakarayirwa naTenzi." 
Numbers30:2 Kana munhurume akatsidza kuitira Tenzi chinhu, kana kupika mhiko yokuregedza kuita chimwe chinhu, ngaaite zvaakapika, asambozviregedzi, ngaaite zvose zvaakataura nomuromo wake." 
Numbers30:3 Kana munhukadzi, achiri kugara mumusha wababa vake, akatsidza kuitira Tenzi chinhu, kana kupika mhiko yokuregedza kuita chimwe chinhu," 
Numbers30:4 kana baba vake vakanzwa chitsidzo kana mhiko yake vasina chavanotaura nazvo, zvose zvaakatsidza nezvaakapika ngaazviite." 
Numbers30:5 Asi kana baba vake vakazvinzwa, vakamurambidza zuva rakarero, zvose zvaakatsidza kana zvaakapika hazvisisina maturo. Tenzi anobva amuregerera nokuti baba vake havana kuzvibvumira." 
Numbers30:6 Kana mukadzi uya akaroorwa, achine mhiko kana chitsidzo chaakataura asina kumbonyatsofunga, murume wake akazvinzwa asi akasava nechaakataura zuva rakarero, zvaakatsidza nezvaakapika ngaazviite." 
Numbers30:7 Asi kana murume wake akazvinzwa akarega kumutsiura zuva iroro raakazvinzwa mhiko yake nezvaakatsidza kuzvisunga nazvo zvicharamba zviripo. 
Numbers30:8 Asi kana murume wake akazvinzwa achibva amurambidza zuva rakarero, zvose zvaakapika nezvaakataura, asina kumbonyatsofunga hazvisisina maturo. Tenzi anobva amuregerera." 
Numbers30:9 “Asi chitsidzo nemhiko yechirikadzi kana yomukadzi akarambana nomurume wake chose chaanozvisunga nacho chichamusunga. 
Numbers30:10 Ngatiti mukadzi akatsidza achiri mumba momurume wake kana kupika mhiko 
Numbers30:11 murume wake akazvinzwa, asi akaramba akanyarara asingamutsiure zvose zvaakatsidza nezvaakapika, zvinomusunga." 
Numbers30:12 Asi kana murume wake akazviramba zuva rakarero raanozvinzwa, zvose zvaakatsidza kana zvaakapika achitaura nomuromo nezvemhiko dzake nezvitsidzo zvake, murume wake akazvishaisa basa. Tenzi anomuregerera." 
Numbers30:13 Murume wake ane mvumo yokumubvumidza kana yokumurambidza kuita zvose zvaanotsidza kana zvaanopika. 
Numbers30:14 Asi kana murume wake akanyarara asina chaanotaura kwaari nazvo zuva nezuva, zvinoreva kuti anomubvumidza kuita zvose zvaanotsidza nezvose zvaanopika. Murume wake anenge abvumirana nazvo nokuti anenge asina kutaurira mukadzi wake zuva raanozvinzwa." 
Numbers30:15 Asi kana murume akazvinzwa, kukapera mazuva asina kumurambidza, mhosva yanga iri yomukadzi iyeyo ichava yomurume wake.”" 
Numbers30:16 Iyi ndiyo mirao yakarayirwa Mosesi naTenzi yemhiko dzinoitwa nomunhukadzi muduku achiri mumba mababa vake nedzinoitwa nomukadzi ane murume wake. 
Numbers31:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers31:2 “Tsiva vaMidhiani pane zvavakakanganisira vaIsiraeri. Kana waita izvozvo uchatorwa uchindosanganiswa nehama dzako, vachakabvu.”" 
Numbers31:3 Mosesi akataurira vaIsiraeri achiti, “Vamwe varume pakati penyu ngavapakate zvombo zvokundorwisa vaMidhiani kuti vavarange vachitsiva kukanganisira Tenzi kwakaitwa navaMidhiani." 
Numbers31:4 Dzinza rimwe nerimwe ravaIsiraeri ngaritumire chiuru chimwechete chavarwi.” 
Numbers31:5 Ipapo muzviuru nezviuru zvavaIsiraeri makaunzwa chiuru chimwechete chavarwi padzinza roga roga. Saka varwi vakagadzirira kuenda kuhondo vakakwana zviuru gumi nezviviri. 
Numbers31:6 Mosesi akatumira kuhondo chiuru chimwe nechimwe chavarwi vemadzinza ose avaIsiraeri pamwechete naFiniyasi mwanakomana womupristi, Ereazari. Finiyasi akaenda navo aine midziyo yomutendhe rinoera netsuri dzairidzirwa kurongera varwi zvokuita." 
Numbers31:7 Vakarwisa vaMidhiani sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers31:8 Vakauraya varume vose pamwechete namadzimambo mashanu vaMidhiani aiti: Evhi naRekemu naZuri naHuri naRebha. Vakaurayawo Bhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori vachimubaya nebakatwa. 
Numbers31:9 VaIsiraeri vakatapa vanhukadzi navana vavaMidhiani. Vakatorawo zvipfuwo zvavaMidhiani nepfuma yavo yose. 
Numbers31:10 Vakapisa maguta mavaigara namatendhe avo. 
Numbers31:11 Vakatora vanhu vavakatapa nezvipfuwo noupfumi hwose hwavakapamba vakaenda nazvo. 
Numbers31:12 Vakauya nenhapwa dziya nezvipfuwo zviya nepfuma iya vakasvika kuna Mosesi nomupristi Ereazari negungano rose ravaIsiraeri vaiva pamatendhe avo kumapani eMoabhu muna Jorodhani pakatarisana neJeriko. 
Numbers31:13 Mosesi nomupristi Ereazari navatungamiriri vose vegungano ravaIsiraeri vakandochingura varwi kunze kwamatendhe. 
Numbers31:14 Ipapo Mosesi akashatiriswa navakuru vakuru vehondo vaya vaiva vatungamiriri vamapoka ezviuru nevemazana avarwi vakanga vadzoka vachibva kuhondo. 
Numbers31:15 Mosesi akati, “Ko magorega vakadzi vose vari vapenyu sei?" 
Numbers31:16 Ndivoka ivava vakarasikisa vaIsiraeri, panyaya iya yaBhiriamu. VaIsiraeri vakabva vatadzira Tenzi panyaya iya yokuPeori yakarakatisa gungano raTenzi nedenda." 
Numbers31:17 Zvino ndinoti chiurayai vanakomana vavo vose navanhukadzi vose vakamborara navarume. 
Numbers31:18 Asi vanasikana vavo vose vasina kumbozivana nomurume nokurara naye varegei vari vapenyu, muzvichengetere imi pachenyu." 
Numbers31:19 Ani naani wenyu akauraya munhu kana ani naani akabata chitunha ngaambogara kunze kwenharaunda yamatendhe kwamazuva manomwe. Zvichenurei imi pachenyu nenhapwa dzenyu pazuva retatu napazuva rechinomwe. 
Numbers31:20 Chenuraiwo hanzu dzenyu dzose, nezvose zvamunazvo zvakagadzirwa namatehwe kana nemvere dzembudzi kana nemapuranga.”" 
Numbers31:21 Mupristi Ereazari akataurira varwi vaya vakanga vadzoka vachibva kuhondo, achiti, “Uyu ndiwo murao wakapiwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Numbers31:22 Ndarama nesirivha nendarira noutare nesimbi inomutobvu ndizvo 
Numbers31:23 chete zvamuchanatsa nomoto nezvose zvisingaparadzwe nomoto ngazvinatswe mumoto. Zvichabva zvachenurwa kunyange mukazvidaro zvinatseiwo nemvura yokunatsisa zvinhu. Zvinhu zvisingagoni kunatswa mumoto ngazvinatswe nemvura. 
Numbers31:24 Sukai hanzu dzenyu pazuva rechinomwe kuti muve vanhu vakachenurwa, shure kwaizvozvo mozopinda mumatendhe.”" 
Numbers31:25 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers31:26 “Iwe naEreazari navakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri, verengai zvinhu zvamakapamba kuhondo nhapwa nezvipfuwo." 
Numbers31:27 Kamurai zvamakapamba kuhondo napakati. Chimwe chikamu ngachipiwe kuvarwi vakadzoka vachibva kuhondo. Chimwe chikamu ngachipiwe gungano ravaIsiraeri. 
Numbers31:28 Pamugove wavarwi vakadzoka kuhondo torai chikamu chakatarwa chokupa Tenzi. Pazvinhu zvinenge zviri mazana mashanu torai chinhu chimwechete. Zvitorei panhapwa napamombe napamadhongi napahwai napambudzi. 
Numbers31:29 Torai chikamu chazvo pamugove uya wevarwi mupe mupristi Ereazari kuti uve mupiro unopirwa kuna Tenzi. 
Numbers31:30 Pamugove uya wavaIsiraeri vose pazvinhu makumi mashanu, torai chinhu chimwechete. Zvitorei panhapwa napamombe napamadhongi napahwai napambudzi napazvipfuwo zvose mupe vaRevhi vane basa rokuchengeta tendhe rinoera raTenzi.”" 
Numbers31:31 Mosesi nomupristi Ereazari vakaita zvakanga zvaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers31:32 Zvino zvinhu zvose zvaiva zvapambwa navarwi kuhondo zvakanga zvakamira zvakadai: hwai dzaiva mazana matanhatu ezviuru nezviuru makumi manomwe nezvishanu. 
Numbers31:33 Mombe makumi manomwe ezviuru nezviuru zviviri. 
Numbers31:34 Madhongi makumi matanhatu ezviuru nechiuru chimwechete. 
Numbers31:35 Nhapwa dzechikadzi makumi matatu ezviuru nezviuru zviviri, vose vakanga vasati vambozivana nomurume." 
Numbers31:36 Saka chikamu chazvo chakapiwa varwi chaiva: mazana matatu ana makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvinomwe zvine mazana mashanu ehwai. 
Numbers31:37 Hwai dzakapiwa kuna Tenzi dzaiva mazana matanhatu ana makumi manomwe ehwai nehwai shanu. 
Numbers31:38 Mombe makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvitanhatu. Mombe dzakapiwa kuna Tenzi dzaiva mombe makumi manomwe nembiri. 
Numbers31:39 Madhongi zviuru makumi matatu ana mazana mashanu. Madhongi akapiwa kuna Tenzi makumi matanhatu nerimwechete amadhongi. 
Numbers31:40 Vanhu vaiva zviuru gumi nezvitanhatu; vakapihwa kuna Tenzi makumi matatu navaviri. 
Numbers31:41 Naizvozvo Mosesi akapa mupristi Ereazari chikamu chiya chakatarwa chomugove waTenzi sezvaakanga audzwa naTenzi. 
Numbers31:42 Mosesi paakapa varwi mugove wavo akatsaura chimwe chikamu chawo chiya ndokupa vaIsiraeri. 
Numbers31:43 Saka mugove wakapiwa gungano rose waiti: mazana matatu ana makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvinomwe zvina mazana mashanu ehwai. 
Numbers31:44 Mombe makumi matatu ezviuru nezviuru zvitanhatu," 
Numbers31:45 madhongi aiva zviuru makumi matatu ana mazana mashanu," 
Numbers31:46 vanhu vaiva gumi rezviuru nezviuru zvitanhatu. 
Numbers31:47 Pazvinhu makumi mashanu zvoga zvoga zvomugove wakapiwa vaIsiraeri. Mosesi akatsaura chinhu chimwechete pamakumi mashanu pavanhu napazvipfuwo ndokupa vaRevhi vaiva nebasa rokuchengeta tendhe rinoera raTenzi sezvaakarayirwa naTenzi. 
Numbers31:48 Ipapo vakuru vakuru vekuhondo vaitungamirira mapoka ezviuru namapoka amazana vakauya kuna Mosesi. 
Numbers31:49 Vakati kuna Mosesi, “Changamire, isu varanda venyu takaverenga varwi vatinotungamirira tikaona kuti hakuna nomumwe wavo asipo." 
Numbers31:50 Zvino tauya nezvinhu zvendarama zvatakawana zvatinoda kupa Tenzi sechipo. Tauya namakoza nemhete nemarin'i nezvishongo zvomuhuro zvomupiro wedu kuna Tenzi wokuripira.” 
Numbers31:51 Mosesi nomupristi Ereazari vakagamuchira ndarama iyoyo, zvinhu zvakanga zvakagadzirwa kare." 
Numbers31:52 Ndarama yose yechipo chakapiwa Tenzi navaitungamirira mapoka ezviuru namapoka amazana avarwi yakaita mari yamashekeri yakasvika gumi rezviuru nezviuru zvitanhatu zvina mazana manomwe ana makumi mashanu. 
Numbers31:53 Mumwe nomumwe wavarwi aiva nezvinhu zvaakanga apambawo iye pachake. 
Numbers31:54 Mosesi nomupristi Ereazari vakagamuchira ndarama iya yavakapiwa navaitungamirira mapoka ezviuru namapoka amazana avarwi, ndokuiunza mutendhe rokusanganira kuti ive chiyeuchidzo chevaIsiraeri pana Tenzi." 
Numbers32:1 Madzinza aRubheni naGadhi aiva nemombe dzakawanda kwazvo. Akaona nyika yeJazeri neyeGiriadhi dziri nyika dzina mafuro emombe," 
Numbers32:2 Naizvozvo vokwaGadhi nevekwaRubheni vakaenda kuna Mosesi nomupristi Ereazari navatungamiriri vegungano, ndokusvikoti," 
Numbers32:3 “KuAtaroti nokuDhibhoni nokuJazeri nokuNimura nokuHeshibhoni nokuEreare nokuSebhamu nokuNebho nokuBheoni 
Numbers32:4 kunyika dziya dzakakundwa naTenzi tichizviona, kuna mafuro emombe akanaka kwazvo. Zvino isu varanda venyu tine mombe.”" 
Numbers32:5 Saka vakati, “Kana muchida tipei zvedu isu varanda venyu nyika iyoyi kuti ive nhaka yedu, murege zvenyu kuti tiyambuke kumhiri kwaJorodhani.”" 
Numbers32:6 Asi Mosesi akapindura vokwaGadhi novokwaRubheni achiti, “Ko imi mungati hama dzenyu dziende dzoga kuhondo, imi mugere zvenyu kuno here?" 
Numbers32:7 Ko munodireiko kuoresa mwoyo yavaIsiraeri kuti varege kuyambukira kunyika yavakapiwa naTenzi? 
Numbers32:8 Ndizvo zvakaitwa namadzibaba enyu pandakavatuma kubva kuKadheshibhanea kundoona nyika iyi. 
Numbers32:9 Vakandosvika kumapani eEshikoru vakaona nyika iyoyo, dzokei vooresa mwoyo yavaIsiraeri kuti varege kuyambukira kunyika yavakanga vapiwa naTenzi." 
Numbers32:10 Izvozvo zvakashatirisa Tenzi pazuva iroro akapika achiti," 
Numbers32:11 ‘Chokwadi hakuna mumwe wavarume vakabva kuIjipiti vane makore makumi maviri kana anopfuura iwayo vachaona nyika yandakapikira Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho nokuti havana kunditevera nomwoyo wose," 
Numbers32:12 kunze kwaKarebhu chete mwanakomana waJefune muKenezi naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni nokuti vakatevera Tenzi nomwoyo wose.’ 
Numbers32:13 Tenzi akashatirirwa vaIsiraeri, akaita kuti vadzungaire murenje kwamakore makumi mana, kusvikira chizvarwa chose chakanga chatadzira Tenzi chapera kufa." 
Numbers32:14 Hezvika imi magara nhaka yamadzibaba enyu, muri chizvarwa chakaipa chinotonyanya kuti Tenzi ashatirirwe vaIsiraeri zvikuru." 
Numbers32:15 Kana imi mukatsauka pakumutevera achavasiyazve murenje. Ndimi muchaparadzisa vanhu ivava.” 
Numbers32:16 Vakasebera kwaari vakati, “Regai timbovakira pano zvipfuwo zvedu matanga, navana vedu maguta," 
Numbers32:17 tozotora zvombo zvedu tichienda kuhondo navaIsiraeri, tiri mberi kusvikira tavasvitsa kunzvimbo dzichava nhaka yavo. Izvozvo vana vedu vachange vagere mumaguta akakomberedzwa netsvingo vakadzivirwa kuvanhu vomuno." 
Numbers32:18 Hatizodzokeri kumisha yedu kusvikira muIsiraeri wose awana nyika ichava nhaka yake. 
Numbers32:19 Isu hatizopiwi nhaka pamwechete navo kumhiri kwaJorodhani zvichienda zvakadaro nokuti nhaka yedu taiwanira mhiri kuno kumabvazuva kwaJorodhani.” 
Numbers32:20 Mosesi akavapindura achiti, “Kana muchizoita saizvozvo zvokutora zvombo muchienda kuhondo norubatsiro rwaTenzi," 
Numbers32:21 mumwe nomumwe wenyu akapakata zvombo achiyambuka Jorodhani achitungamiririrwa naTenzi kusvikira adzinga iye vavengi vake," 
Numbers32:22 kusvikira nyika iyoyi yakundwa yava pasi paTenzi, mungachizodzoka zvenyu musisina mhosva pana Tenzi navaIsiraeri. Naizvozvo nyika ino ichava yenyu nemvumo yaTenzi." 
Numbers32:23 “Asi mukasaita saizvozvi, matotadzira Tenzi. Saka zivai izvi zvokuti chitadzo chenyu chichakupfukirai." 
Numbers32:24 Chivakirai zvenyu pwere dzenyu maguta, nezvipfuwo zvenyu matanga, muzoita zvamavimbisa.”" 
Numbers32:25 Vedzinza rokwaGadhi nevedzinza rokwaRubheni vakataura kuna Mosesi vachiti, “Isu varanda venyu tichaita zvamareva changamire wangu." 
Numbers32:26 Pwere dzedu namadzimai edu nembudzi nehwai nemombe dzedu dzose, zvichasara zviri mumaguta kuno kuGiriadhi." 
Numbers32:27 Asi isu varanda venyu tichayambuka, munhu wose ane zvombo zvehondo achitungamirirwa naTenzi tichienda kuhondo sokutaura kwenyu changamire.”" 
Numbers32:28 Mosesi akaudza mupristi Ereazari naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni navatungamiriri vamadzinza avaIsiraeri zvokuita navanhu ava 
Numbers32:29 akavati, “Kana vedzinza rokwaGadhi nevedzinza rokwaRubheni vakayambuka Jorodhani nemi, mumwe nomumwe wavo akapakata zvombo zvehondo vachitungamirirwa naTenzi, mukakunda nyika iyoyo, vapei zvenyu nyika yeGiriadhi kuti ive yavo." 
Numbers32:30 Asi vakasayambuka nemi kundorwa hondo, vachazowana mugove wavo pamwechete nemi munyika yeKanani.”" 
Numbers32:31 Vedzinza rokwaGadhi nevedzinza rokwaRubheni vakapindura vachiti, “Zvataurwa naTenzi kwatiri varanda venyu ndizvo zvatichaita." 
Numbers32:32 Isu tichayambuka takapakata zvombo zvedu zvehondo kunyika yeKanani tichitungamirirwa naTenzi kuitira kuti nhaka yedu ive mhiri kuno kwaJorodhani.” 
Numbers32:33 Saka Mosesi akapa vedzinza rokwaGadhi nevedzinza rokwaRubheni nechikamu chapakati napakati chevedzinza raManase mwanakomana waJosefi, nyika yaSihoni mambo wavaAmori, nenyika yaOgu mambo wavaBhashani. Akavapa nyika iyoyo namaguta ayo ose nemiganho yacho, kunyange namaguta ose ari munharaunda macho." 
Numbers32:34 Vedzinza rokwaGadhi vakavakirira tsvingo maguta aya anoti: Dhibhoni neAtaroti neAroeri 
Numbers32:35 neAtarotishofani neJazeri neJogubheha 
Numbers32:36 neBhetinimura neBhetiharani. Maguta aya namatanga ehwai akakomberedzwa netsvingo. 
Numbers32:37 Vedzinza rokwaRubheni vakavaka maguta aya anoti: Heshibhoni neEreare neKiriataimu 
Numbers32:38 neNebho neBhaarimeoni (mazita awo akazosandurwa) neSibhuma. Maguta avakavaka vakatumidza mazita. 
Numbers32:39 Vemhuri yaMakiri wedzinza raManase vakaenda kuGiriadhi vakaikunda ndokuibvutira vaAmori vakanga vageremo. 
Numbers32:40 Mosesi akapa nyika yaGiriadhi kuna Makiri mwanakomana waManase akagaramo. 
Numbers32:41 Jairi wedzinza raManase akandopamba misha yavo akaitumidza kuti misha yaJairi. 
Numbers32:42 Nobha akandopamba guta reKenati nemisha yavo, akaitumidza nezita rake kuti Nobha." 
Numbers33:1 Urwu ndirwo rwendo rwavaIsiraeri pavakabuda muIjipiti namapoka avo vachitungamirirwa naMosesi naAroni. 
Numbers33:2 Murwendo rumwe norumwe rwavainge vafamba, Mosesi ainyora zita renzvimbo yavainge vasvika pakusimuka kwavo vopinda munzira sezvaakaudzwa naTenzi. Idzi ndidzo nzendo dzavakafamba nenzvimbo dzavakatangira." 
Numbers33:3 Vakatangira rwendo rwavo paguta reRamasesi mumwedzi wokutanga pazuva regumi nechishanu romwedzi iwoyo. Pazuva rakatevera rePasika, vaIsiraeri vakanyatsobuda zvavo vaIjipiti vose vachiona." 
Numbers33:4 Izvozvo vaIjipiti vaingunoviga matangwe avo ose akanga auraiwa naTenzi. Ipapo Tenzi akabudisa pachena kuti vamwari vavo vamwari vakaita sei. 
Numbers33:5 Saka vaIsiraeri vakabva paRamesesi vakandodzika matendhe avo paSukoti. 
Numbers33:6 Vakabva paSukoti vakandodzika matendhe avo paEtamu pamuganho nerenje. 
Numbers33:7 Vakabva paEtamu vakadzokera kuPihahiroti, pakatarisana nepaBhaarizefoni vakadzika matendhe avo pedyo napaMigidhori." 
Numbers33:8 Vakabva paPihahiroti vakayambuka nomuGungwa Dzvuku, vakapinda nomurenje vakafamba rwendo rwamazuva matatu nomurenje reEtamu vakazodzika matendhe avo paMara." 
Numbers33:9 Vakabva paMara vakandosvika paErimu. PaErimu paiva nezvisipiti zvemvura gumi nezviviri, nemiti yomurara makumi manomwe. Vakadzika matendhe avo ipapo." 
Numbers33:10 Vakabva paErimu vakandodzika matendhe avo munyasi meGungwa Dzvuku. 
Numbers33:11 Vakabva paGungwa Dzvuku vakandodzika matendhe avo murenje reSini. 
Numbers33:12 Vakabva murenje reSini vakandodzika matendhe avo kuDhofuka. 
Numbers33:13 Vakabva kuDhofuka, vakandodzika matendhe avo kuArushi." 
Numbers33:14 Vakabva kuArushi, vakandodzika matendhe avo kuRefidhimu pakanga pasina mvura yokuti vanhu vanwe." 
Numbers33:15 Vakazobva paRefidhimu vakandodzika matendhe avo murenje reSinai. 
Numbers33:16 Ndokubva murenje reSinai vakandodzika matendhe avo kuKibhurotihataavha. 
Numbers33:17 Vakabvawo paKibhurotihataavha vakandodzika matendhe avo paHazeroti. 
Numbers33:18 Vakabvawo paHazeroti vakandodzika matendhe avo paRitima. 
Numbers33:19 Vakazobva paRitima vakandodzika matendhe avo kuRimoniperezi. 
Numbers33:20 Vakabvazve paRimoniperezi vakandodzika matendhe avo paRibhina. 
Numbers33:21 Ndokubva paRibhina vakandodzika matendhe avo paRisa. 
Numbers33:22 Vakazobva paRisa vakandodzika matendhe avo paKeherata. 
Numbers33:23 Ndokubva paKeherata vakandodzika matendhe avo vava pagomo reShaferu. 
Numbers33:24 Ndokubva pagomo reShaferu vakazondodzika matendhe avo paHaradha. 
Numbers33:25 Ndokubvawo paHaradha vakandodzika matendhe avo Makeroti. 
Numbers33:26 Vakabva Makeroti vondodzikira matendhe avo Tahati. 
Numbers33:27 Vakazobva paTahati ndokundodzikira matendhe avo kuTera. 
Numbers33:28 Ndokuzobvawo kuTera vakandodzika matendhe avo kuMitika. 
Numbers33:29 Vakabva paMitika ndokundodzika matendhe avo kuHashimona. 
Numbers33:30 Vakabvawo paHashimona vondodzika matendhe avo kuMoseroti. 
Numbers33:31 Vakazobva paMoseroti vakandoadzika vave Bhenejaakani. 
Numbers33:32 Ndokubva Bhenejaakani vakandodzika matendhe avo vava Horihagidhigaadhi. 
Numbers33:33 Ndokubvawo paHorihagidhigaadhi vakazondodzika matendhe avo paJotibhata. 
Numbers33:34 Ndokuzobva paJotibhata vondodzika matendhe avo vava Abhurona. 
Numbers33:35 Vakabva paAbhurona vakazodzikira matendhe avo kuEzionigebheri. 
Numbers33:36 Vakazobva paEzionigebheri vakandodzika matendhe avo murenje reZini, ndipo paKadheshi." 
Numbers33:37 Ndokuzobvawo paKadheshi vakandodzika matendhe avo pagomo reHoru munyasi menyika yeEdhomu. 
Numbers33:38 Aroni mupristi audzwa naTenzi, akakwira mugomo reHoru akafiramo. Iri raiva gore ramakumi mana kubvira kubuda kwavaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti mumwedzi wechishanu pazuva rokutanga romwedzi iwoyo." 
Numbers33:39 Aroni akanga ava namakore zana namakumi maviri ana matatu okuzvarwa kwake paakafa mugomo reHoru. 
Numbers33:40 Mambo Aradhi worudzi rwavaKanani aigara kuNegevhu munyika yeKanani akanzwa zvokuuya kwavaIsiraeri. 
Numbers33:41 VaIsiraeri vakabva kugomo reHoru vondodzika matendhe avo vava Zarimona. 
Numbers33:42 Vakabva Zarimona vondodzika matendhe avo vava kuPunoni. 
Numbers33:43 Vakazobva Punoni vakazodzika matendhe avo kuObhoti. 
Numbers33:44 Vakabvawo kuObhoti vondodzika matendhe avo kuIyeabharimu kumuganho neMoabhu. 
Numbers33:45 Vakazobvawo paIyimu ndokundodzika matendhe avo vava Dhibhonigadhi. 
Numbers33:46 Ndokubva paDhibhonigadhi vakazondodzika matendhe avo vava Arumonidhibhurataimu. 
Numbers33:47 Ndokuzobva Arumonidhibhurataimu vakandodzika matendhe avo vava kumakomo eAbharimu munyasi megomo reNebho. 
Numbers33:48 Vakabva pamakomo eAbharimu vondodzika matendhe avo mumapani eMoabhu munyasi maJorodhani, kuJeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Vakazodzika matendhe avo munyasi maJorodhani kubvira kuBhetihejeshimoti kusvikira kuAbheroshitimu mumapani eMoabhu imomo. 
Numbers33:50 Mumapani eMoabhu imo munyasi maJorodhani kuJeriko, Tenzi akataurira Mosesi zvokuita achiti," 
Numbers33:51 “Taurira vaIsiraeri uti kwavari, kana mayambuka Jorodhani muchipinda munyika yeKanani," 
Numbers33:52 munofanira kudzinganisa vagari vemo, mupwanye zvimifananidzo zvavakazvigadzirira zvamabwe nezvifananidzo zvavo zvesimbi, mupaze nzvimbo dzavo dzemipiro dzavakavakira pakatunhumara." 
Numbers33:53 Torai nyika iyoyo mugaremo nokuti ndakupai nyika iyoyo kuti ive yenyu. 
Numbers33:54 Muchagovana nyika iyoyo nechin'ange dzinza nedzinza, muchipa nyika huru kune vakawanda, diki kuna vashoma. Nzvimbo inenge yapiwa munhu nechin'ange ndiyo ichava yake. Muchagovana nyika dzinza nedzinza vanhu nedzinza rababa wavo." 
Numbers33:55 Asi kana mukasadzinganisa vagari vemo vachakufurusai sechinhoi muziso vachiva sekabayo komunzwa parutivi. Vachakuonesai nhamo munyika yamuchange mugere. 
Numbers33:56 Ipapo zvandinofunga kuita kwavari ndizvo zvandichaita kwamuri.” 
Numbers34:1 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers34:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti, kana masvika kunyika yeKanani, nyika ichava yenhaka yenyu, nyika yeKanani nemiganho yayo ndeiyi inoti:" 
Numbers34:3 rutivi rwenyika iyoyo rwokuchamhembe ruchatangira kurenje reZini, ruchitevedza nokurutivi rweEdhomu. Muganho wayo wokumaodzanyemba uchatangisira kunoperera gungwa Romunyu nechokumabvazuva." 
Numbers34:4 Muganho wayo uchapota napamukwidza weAkirabhimu uchipfuura nokurenje reZini, uchizondosvika kumaodzanyemba kweKadheshibharinea wozoenda kuHazariadhari, uchizondosvika kuAzimoni." 
Numbers34:5 Muganho wacho uchabva kuAzimoni wopota nokukakova kanonzi KakovakeIjipiti wozondogumira kugungwa. 
Numbers34:6 “Muganho wavo wokumadokero uchava gungwa Dzvuku nemahombekombe aro. Iwoyu ndiwo muganhu wenyu wokumadokero. 
Numbers34:7 “Muganho wenyu wokuchamhembe ndouyu, muchautara uchibva kugungwa guru uchienda kugomo reHoru," 
Numbers34:8 wozobva kugomo reHoru, woita sewava kupinda muguta reHamati. Muganho iwoyu unozosvika kuZedhadhi." 
Numbers34:9 Wozobvapo woenda kuZifuroni, wondoperera wava Hazarenani. Iwoyu ndiwo uchava muganho wavo wokuchamhembe." 
Numbers34:10 “Muchatara muganho wenyu wokumabvazuva kubva paHazarenani kusvika kuShefamu. 
Numbers34:11 Wozodzika uchibva Shefamu wosvika kuRibhura nechokumabvazuva kweAini. Wodzikazve kundosvika kumateru egungwa reKinereti kuri kumabvazuva. 
Numbers34:12 Wozodzika kuna Jorodhani uchindoperera kuGungwa roMunyu. Iyoyi ndiyo nyika yenyu nemiganhu yayo inoipoteredza.” 
Numbers34:13 Mosesi akaudza vaIsiraeri kuti, “Iyoyi ndiyo nyika yenhaka yenyu yamuchagovana nechin'ange sekutemwa kwayakaitwa naTenzi, ichipiwa madzinza mapfumbamwe nechikamu chapakati napakati cherimwe dzinza" 
Numbers34:14 nokuti vedzinza rokwaRubheni nemhuri dzavo, nevedzinza rokwaGadhi nemhuri dzavo pamwechete nechikamu chapakati napakati chevedzinza rokwaManase vanenge vatowana kare nhaka yavo." 
Numbers34:15 Vamadzinza iwaya maviri, nechikamu chepakati nepakati cherimwe dzinza vanenge vatowana kare nhaka yavo kumhiri kwaJorodhani kwakatarisana neJeriko kunobuda nezuva kumabvazuva.”" 
Numbers34:16 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers34:17 “Aya ndiwo mazita avanhu vachakugovanisai nyika yenyu kunoti: Mupristi Ereazari naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni. 
Numbers34:18 Munofanira kusarudza mutungamiriri mumwechete padzinza roga roga wokugova nyika. 
Numbers34:19 Aya ndiwo mazita avarume vacho: “Wedzinza rokwaJudha ndiKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune. 
Numbers34:20 Wedzinza rokwaSimeoni ndiShemueri mwanakomana waAmihudhi. 
Numbers34:21 Wedzinza rokwaBhenjamini ndiEridhadhi mwanakomana waKisironi. 
Numbers34:22 Wedzinza rokwaDhani ndiBhuki mwanakomana waJongiri. 
Numbers34:23 VokwaJosefi, wedzinza rokwaManase ndiHanieri mwanakomana waEfodhi." 
Numbers34:24 Wedzinza rokwaEfuremu ndiKemueri mwanakomana waShifutani. 
Numbers34:25 Wedzinza rokwaZebhuruni ndiErizafani mwanakomana waParinaki. 
Numbers34:26 Wedzinza rokwaIsakari ndiParitieri mwanakomana waAzani. 
Numbers34:27 Wedzinza rokwaAsheri ndiAhihudhi mwanakomana waSheromi. 
Numbers34:28 Wedzinza rokwaNafutari ndiPedhaheri mwanakomana waAmihudhi.” 
Numbers34:29 Ava ndivo varume vakapiwa naTenzi basa rokugovanisa vaIsiraeri nyika yeKanani. 
Numbers35:1 Mumapani eMoabhu mhiri kwaJorodhani kwakatarisana neJeriko, Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers35:2 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti munyika dzavanenge vagoverwa vazopawo vaRevhi mamwe maguta okugara. Muchavapawo mafuro munharaunda dzamaguta iwayo. 
Numbers35:3 Naizvozvo vaRevhi vachava namaguta okugara namafuro okuti mombe nehwai nembudzi dzavo nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvavo zvose zvive nopokufurira. 
Numbers35:4 Mafuro iwayo amaguta amuchapa vaRevhi achatangira kuerwa kubvira parusvingo rweguta zvichienda kunze kwechinhambwe chinokwana mamita mazana mana namakumi mashanu mativi ose. 
Numbers35:5 Kumabvazuva kweguta, erai chinhambwe chinokwana mamita mazana mapfumbamwe. Kumaodzanyemba erai chinhambwe chinokwana mamita mazana mapfumbawe, kumadokero mamita mazana mapfumbamwe, kuchamhembe mamita mazana mapfumbamwe guta riri pakati. Ndiwo achava mafuro akapoteredza maguta avo." 
Numbers35:6 Munozopa vaRevhi maguta matanhatu okuti kana munhu akonzera rufu rwomumwe andopoteramo. Pamusoro pamaguta iwaya vapei mamwe maguta makumi mana namaviri. 
Numbers35:7 Saka maguta ose amuchapa vaRevhi, achava makumi mana namasere pamwechete nenharaunda dzawo dzamafuro." 
Numbers35:8 Kana mavakupa vaRevhi maguta mumatunhu akagovaniswa vaIsiraeri, onai kuti mune vane nyika huru motorawo maguta akati wandei. Mune vane nyika diki motorawo mashoma muchivapa, zvichienderana noukuru hwenhaka yavakagoverwa.”" 
Numbers35:9 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Numbers35:10 “Udza vaIsiraeri kuti kana mayambuka Jorodhani muchipinda nyika yeKanani 
Numbers35:11 sarudzai maguta okupotera, okuti munhu anenge auraya munhu mukusaziva atizireko." 
Numbers35:12 Kwamuri maguta aya achava okupotera, kuitira kuti hama yomufi inenge yoda kutsividza irege kuuraya muurayi asati atongwa nedare." 
Numbers35:13 Maguta matanhatu iwayo amuchatsaura ndiwo achava maguta enyu okupotera. 
Numbers35:14 Tsaurai maguta matatu kumhiri kwaJorodhani namamwe maguta matatu muKanani kuti ave okupotera. 
Numbers35:15 Maguta matanhatu iwaya ndookuti vaIsiraeri, kana mutorwa, kana mupfuuri agere nemi anenge auraya munhu mukusaziva andopoteramo." 
Numbers35:16 “Asi kana munhu akarova mumwe nechinhu chesimbi akafa, imhondi. Mhondi inofanira kutoti iuraiwe." 
Numbers35:17 Kana akatora dombo ringauraye munhu akamutema naro akafa, imhondi. Mhondi inofanira kutoti iuraiwe" 
Numbers35:18 Kana akabatira mumwe tsvimbo ingauraye munhu akarova mumwe nayo akafa, imhondi. Mhondi inofanira kutoti iuraiwe." 
Numbers35:19 Hama yomufi pachayo ndiyo ine basa rokutsiva ropa romufi. Akangosangana nayo ngaaiuraye. 
Numbers35:20 “Kana munhu akadyunga mumwe pamusana poruvengo kana kumupotsera chinhu aita zvokumuhwandira akamuuraya," 
Numbers35:21 kana kuti akamurova nechibhakera achizviita pamusana poruvengo akafa, nyakumurova uya ngaaurayiwe, imhondi. Hama yomufi ine basa rokutsiva ropa romufi, ikangosangana nemhondi yacho ngaaiuraye." 
Numbers35:22 “Asi kana akangoerekana amudyunga pasina ruvengo, kana kuerekana amupotsera chinhu asina kumbenge akamuhwandira" 
Numbers35:23 kana dombo ringauraye munhu raakamudonhedzera asingamuoni achibva amuuraya kunyange akanga asiri muvengi wake asingadi kumukuvadza," 
Numbers35:24 dare ngaritonge mhosva yanyakuuraya munhu nanyakuda kutsiva ropa romufi maererano nemirao iyi: 
Numbers35:25 Dare ngarinunure nyakuuraya munhu mumaoko anyakuda kutsiva ropa romufi, ngarimudzosere kuguta rake rokupotera kwaakanga atizira. Nyakuuraya munhu uya ngaagaremo kusvikira rufu rwomupristi mukuru akazodzwa namafuta anoera." 
Numbers35:26 Asi kana nyakuuraya munhu uya akangobuda kunze kwemiganhu yeguta maakanga andopotera," 
Numbers35:27 nyakuda kutsiva ropa romufi akangomuwana ari kunze ikoko, akamuuraya, haazovi nemhosva yokuuraya munhu." 
Numbers35:28 Izvi zvinonzarwo nokuti nyakuuraya munhu iyeyo angadai akagara muguta rake rokupotera kusvikira mupristi mukuru afa. Kana mupristi mukuru afa ndipo paaizokwanisa zvake kudzokera kumusha kwake. 
Numbers35:29 Iyi ndiyo mirao nezvirongwa zvamuchachengeta pazvizvarwa zvenyu zvose kwose kwamunenge mugere. 
Numbers35:30 “Ani naani anouraya munhu, anogona kuurayiwa chete kana paine zvapupu. Asi hakuna munhu anofanira kuurayiwa noumboo hwechapupu chimwechete." 
Numbers35:31 Uyezve musagamuchire mari yokununura upenyu hwemhondi inenge yatongerwa kufa. Anotofanira kutouraiwa. 
Numbers35:32 Musagamuchire mari yokuti munhu anenge atizira muguta rokupotera, adzokere kundogara kumusha kwake, mupristi mukuru asati afa." 
Numbers35:33 Musan'orese nyika yamugere nomutoo iwoyu nokuti kudeura ropa kunon'oresa nyika. Hakuna chinogona kununura nyika ine ropa rakadeurwamo kunze kwokuuraya munhu wacho akadeura ropa. 
Numbers35:34 Musan'orese nyika yamugere mandinogarawo ini nokuti ini Tenzi ndinogara mukati mavaIsiraeri.” 
Numbers36:1 Vakuru vakuru vomumhuri dzaGireadhi mwanakomana waMakiri, wedzinza rokwaManase, wemhuri dzokwaJosefi vakataura pana Mosesi navatungamiriri vamadzinza avaIsiraeri" 
Numbers36:2 vachiti, “Changamire, Tenzi akuudzai kuti mugovere vaIsiraeri nyika dzenhaka yavo nechin'ange. Makaudzwawo naTenzi kuti mupe nhaka yehama yedu Zerofehadhi kuvanasikana vake." 
Numbers36:3 Zvino kana vakazoroorwa navakomana vamamwe madzinza avaIsiraeri, nhaka yavo ichazotorwa panhaka yamadzibaba edu yoendeswa kudzinza ravanenge vaenda. Ipapo tichatorerwa nhaka yamadzibaba edu yatakagoverwa."
