Numbers36:4 Naizvozvo panozosvika gore ravaIsiraeri reHwamanda nhaka yavanenge vapiwa ichawedzerwa kunhaka yedzinza kwavanezenge varoorwa. Saka nhaka yavo ichabviswa munhaka yedzinza ramadzibaba edu.” 
Numbers36:5 Mosesi akapa vaIsiraeri murao waTenzi achiti, “Zviri kutaurwa nevedzinza revana vaJosefi ndizvo chaizvo." 
Numbers36:6 Zvataurwa naTenzi panyaya yavanasikana vaZerofehadhi ndezvizvi: zvokuti ngavaroorwe zvavo navarume vavanoda, asi vanovaroora ngavave vomudzinza rababa vavo." 
Numbers36:7 Naizvozvo nhaka yavaIsiraeri ngairege kuzobva kune rimwe dzinza ichienda kune rimwe nokuti mumwe nomumwe wavaIsiraeri anofanira kuramba akati kwati nenhaka yamadzibaba ake. 
Numbers36:8 Mwanasikana wose ane nhaka mudzinza ripi neripi ravaIsiraeri ngaaroorwe nomurume wemhuri yomudzinza rababa vake kuitira kuti muIsiraeri wose agare ari munhaka yamadzibaba ake. 
Numbers36:9 Saka hakuna nhaka inozobva kune rimwe dzinza ichienda kune rimwe, nokuti dzinza rimwe nerimwe ravaIsiraeri richaramba rakati kwati nenhaka yaro pacharo.”" 
Numbers36:10 Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi vakaita zvakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Numbers36:11 Vanasikana vaZerofehadhi ava vaiti Mahara naTiriza naHogira naMirika naNowa vakaroorwa nehanzvadzi dzavo dzokumadzibabamukuru namadzibabamudiki avo. 
Numbers36:12 Vakaroorwa kumhuri dzedzinza raManase mwanakomana waJosefi, nhaka yavo ikaramba ichingova mudzinza remhuri yababa wavo." 
Numbers36:13 Iyi ndiyo mitemo nemirao yakatemerwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi ichipiwa nokuna Mosesi vari mumapani eMoabhu pana Jorodhani pakatarisana neJeriko. 
Deuteronomy1:1 Aya ndiwo mashoko akataurwa naMosesi kuvaIsiraeri vose vachiri mhiri kwaJorodhani, murenje reArabha pakatarisana neSufu, vari pakati pamaguta aya anoti: Parani neToferu neRabhani neHazeroti neDhizahabhu." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Kubva kuGomo reHorebhu uchienda nokugomo reSeiri kundosvika kuKadheshibharinea rwendo rwamazuva gumi nerimwechete. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Mugore ramakumi mana pazuva rokutanga romwedzi wegumi nechiposhi vabva Ijipiti, Mosesi akarondedzera vaIsiraeri zvose zvaakarayirwa naTenzi pamusoro pavo." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Akavarondedzera izvi abva mukukunda Sihoni mambo wevaAmori aigara muHeshibhoni naOgu mambo weBhashani aigara muAshitaroti nomuEdhirei. 
Deuteronomy1:5 Vachiri mhiri kwaJorodhani ikoko, munyika yeMoabhu, Mosesi akatanga kutsanangura mutemo uyu." 
Deuteronomy1:6 Akati, “Tichiri kuHorebhu Tenzi Mwari wedu akatiti, ‘Nguva yamagara pagomo pano, yareba." 
Deuteronomy1:7 Zvino chisumukai munange nechokumakomo kunyika yevaAmori namatunhu ose akaipoteredza anoti: renje reArabha namakomo namapani neNegevhu namatunhu anotevedza gungwa, nenyika yevaKanani neyeRebhanoni kusvikira kurwizi rukuru rwaYufuratesi." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Iyoyi ndiyo nyika yandinokupai. Chipindai muitore muiite yenyu. Ndiyo nyika yakatsidzirwa naTenzi kupa madzibaba enyu vanaAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho nezvizvarwa zvavo.’ ” 
Deuteronomy1:9 Mosesi akaenderera mberi achiti, “Panguva iyoyo ndakakutaurirai kuti, ‘Ini handichakwanisi kukutongai ndiri ndoga." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Tenzi Mwari wenyu akakuitai kuti muwande. Zvino tarisai muone pari nhasi mawanda senyenyedzi dzedenga. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Tenzi Mwari wamadzibaba enyu ngaakuwanzei kazana kakazanirana. Ngaakukomborerei sokukutsidzirai kwaakaita. 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ndakati ko zvino ini ndoga ndingakwanise seiko kutakura nhuna dzenyu nemitoro yenyu nokukakavadzana kwenyu? 
Deuteronomy1:13 Chisarudzai varume vane ungwaru vanonzwisisa mumadzinza enyu, vanoziva zvoupenyu ndigovaita vakuru vakuru venyu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ipapo imi makanditi, ‘Zvamataura zvakanaka kuti tiite.’" 
Deuteronomy1:15 Saka ndakatora vakuru vakuru vomumadzinza enyu vane ungwaru vagara noupenyu ndikavaita vatungamiriri venyu vemapoka mamwe ezviuru mamwe amazana mamwe emakumi mashanu mamwe egumi ravanhu. Ndakagadzawo makurukota mumadzinza enyu. 
Deuteronomy1:16 “Panguva iyoyo ndakarayira vatongi venyu ndichiti, ‘Inzwai mhosva dzehama dzenyu mutonge zviri pamwero kunyange iri mhosva iri pakati pehama nehama kana mhosva iri pakati pehama kana nomutorwa waagere naye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Musaite chizivano pakutonga. Teererai mhosva yomudiki kana yomukuru zvimwechetezvo. Musanyare munhu uso nokuti kutonga ndokwaMwari. Asi kana kuine mhosva yakaoma yamusingakwanisi kutonga uyai nayo kwandiri ndiinzwe.’ 
Deuteronomy1:18 Panguva iyoyo ndakakurayirai zvinhu zvose zvamunofanira kuita. 
Deuteronomy1:19 “Takasimuka tichibva paHorebhu tikapfuura nomuzigwenga guru rinotyisa riya ramakaona munzira yokumakomo omunyika yavaAmori sokurayirwa kwatakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wedu. Takazosvika kuKadheshibharinea. 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ipapo ndakati kwamuri, ‘Zvino mazosvika kumakomo omunyika yavaAmori yatinopiwa naTenzi Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Chitarisai muone nyika yamapiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu. Chiendai mundoitora sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi Mwari wamadzibaba enyu. Regai kutya kana kuzeza.’ 
Deuteronomy1:22 Mose makauya kwandiri mukati, ‘Ngatitumei varume vanoenda kundotisorera nyika iyoyo, vanozodzoka votiudza nzira yokuenda nayo namaguta atingasvikire.’" 
Deuteronomy1:23 “Ndakafadzwa nazvo, ndikasarudza varume gumi navaviri ndichitora murume mumwechete mudzinza roga roga." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Vakasumuka vakaenda nokunyika yemakomo, vakandosvika kubani reEshikoru vakarisora." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Vakadzoka vakabata mumaoko mimwe michero yenyika iyoyo yavakativigira. Vakatiunzirawo shoko rokuti, ‘Nyika yatiri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wedu yakanaka.’" 
Deuteronomy1:26 “Asi makaramba kuendako mukatoita zvenyu zvakapesana nezvakarayirwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy1:27 Makanyunyuta muri mumatendhe enyu muchiti, ‘Tenzi anotivenga, saka akatiburitsa kuIjipiti kuzotiisa mumaoko avaAmori kuti vatiparadze." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Zvino toendepiko? Hama dzedu dzatiodza mwoyo dzichiti, Vanhu veko ihofori dzavanhu, vakareba kupfuura isu. Maguta avo makuru ane nhungamakore dzamasvingo. Takaonawo hofori dzokwaAnakimu dziriko.’" 
Deuteronomy1:29 “Asi ini ndakakutii, regai kuvazeza kana kuvatya." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Tenzi Mwari wenyu anokutungamirirai, ndiye achakurwirai sezvaakakuitirai muIjipiti muchizviona nameso enyu." 
Deuteronomy1:31 Achakuitirai sezvaakaita kurenje kwamakaona Tenzi Mwari wenyu achikutakurai kwose kwose kwamakaenda somunhu anotakura mwana wake kudzamara musvike pano. 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kunyange zvakadaro, hamuna kutenda naTenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy1:33 Murwendo rwenyu ndiye aifanotungamira kundokutsvakirai pokudzika matendhe enyu achikutungamirirai nzira yokuenda nayo usiku nomoto, masikati negore." 
Deuteronomy1:34 “Tenzi akanzwa zvamakareva zvikamutsamwisa. Akapika achiti," 
Deuteronomy1:35 ‘Hakuna nomumwe wechizvarwa ichi chakaipa achazoona nyika yakanaka yandakatsidzira kupa madzibaba enyu 
Deuteronomy1:36 kunze kwaKarebhu mwanakomana waJefune, ndiye achaiona. Iye navana vake, ndichavapa nyika yaakambotsika nokuti akateerera Tenzi nomwoyo wake wose.’" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Kunyange neni, Tenzi akanditsamwirawo pamusana penyu akati, ‘Newewo hauchambomupinda.’" 
Deuteronomy1:38 Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni waunaye, ndiye achapindamo. Mukurudzire nokuti ndiye achatungamirira vaIsiraeri pakutora nhaka iyoyo." 
Deuteronomy1:39 “Asi pwere dzenyu dzamakati dzichatapwa pamwechete navana venyu vasati vaziva chakanaka kana chakaipa pari nhasi, ndivo vachapindamo, uye ndivo vandichapa nyika iyoyo kuti ive yavo." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Zvino imimi chisimukai mupindukire kurenje, munopinda munzira yokuGungwa Dzvuku." 
Deuteronomy1:41 “Imi makandipindura muchiti, ‘Tatadzira Tenzi. Zvino tava kuenda zvedu kundorwa sokuudzwa kwatakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wedu.’ Ipapo mumwe nomumwe wenyu akapakata zvombo zvake, muchitofunga zvenyu kuti inyore kukwira kunyika yamakomo." 
Deuteronomy1:42 “Tenzi akanditi, ‘Vaudze kuti; regai zvokuenda kundorwa nokuti handinemi mungandokurirwa navavengi venyu.’" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Ndakakuudzai asi makaramba kunzwa. Makatoita zvenyu zvakapesana nezvavakaudzwa naTenzi, mukaita zvokuzvikudza muchienda kunyika yokumakomo." 
Deuteronomy1:44 VaAmori vagere munyika yamakomo vakakubudirai vakakudzingirirai senyuchi, vakakurizhai kubvira paSeiri kundosvika kuHoruma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Makadzoka mukachema kuna Tenzi, asi Tenzi haana kunzwa kuchema kwenyu kana kuteerera kwamuri." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Ndokusaka makagara paKadheshi kwenguva ndefu, iya yamakagarapo." 
Deuteronomy2:1 “Takazosimudzira rwendo rwedu topinda murenje. Takapinda munzira yokuGungwa Dzvuku sokuudzwa kwandakaitwa naTenzi. Takadzengerera tiri mumakomo eSeiri kwamazuva mazhinji. 
Deuteronomy2:2 Tenzi akanditi," 
Deuteronomy2:3 ‘Kudzengerera kwamaita munyika ino yamakomo kwakwana. Chinangai nechokuchamhembe. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Udzai vanhu kuti iye zvino izvi mava kupfuura nomunyika yehama dzenyu vana vaEsau vagere munyika yeSeiri. Vachakuzezai, saka itai makachenjera." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Musadenhana navo nokuti handisi kuzokupai kunyange kadimbu kenyika yavo, kwete, kunyange kanzvimbo kanokwana kutsika rutsoka zvarwo nokuti ndakapa gomo reSeiri kuna Esau senhaka yake." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Zvokudya zvenyu muchatoita zvokutotenga nemari kwavari kana mvura yenyu yokunwa muchatoita zvokutenga nemari kwavari.’ 
Deuteronomy2:7 “Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu akakukomborerai pane zvose zvamakaita namaoko enyu. Akakuchengetai pamaidzungaira muzigwenga guru iri. Kwamakore makumi mana aya Tenzi Mwari wenyu akanga achingova nemi. Hapana chamakashaya. 
Deuteronomy2:8 “Takazobva paiva nehama dzedu vana vaEsau vaigara munyika yeSeiri panzira yeArabha kuErati pakadziva kuEzionigebheru. Takazonanga nenzira yokurenje reMoabhu. 
Deuteronomy2:9 Tenzi akanditi, ‘Musambonetsa vaMoabhu, kana kurwisana navo nokuti handisi kuzokupai kunyange kadimbu kenyika yavo kuti ive nhaka yenyu nokuti ndakapa guta reAru kuvana vaRoti kuti ive nhaka yavo.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Kare rudzi rwavaEmimu ndirwo rwaigaramo. Vaiva rudzi rukuru, rune vanhu vakawanda, vakareba sehofori dzerudzi rwavaAnakimu." 
Deuteronomy2:11 SevaAnakimu ivo vainziwo vaRefaimu asi vaMoabhu vaivatumidza kuti vaEmimu. 
Deuteronomy2:12 Kareko vaHori vaigara kuSeiri. Asi vana vaEsau vakavatorera nyika yavo vakavaparadza ndokubva vagaramo ivo sezvakaitwa navaIsiraeri munyika yavakapiwa naTenzi kuti ive nhaka yavo). 
Deuteronomy2:13 “Takazonzi chisumukai muyambuke karukova Zeredhi, tikayambuka." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kwakapera makore makumi matatu namasere kubvira musi watakabva paKadheshibharinea kusvikira musi watakayambuka Zeredhi, kudzamara chizvarwa chose chavarume vose vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo chapera kufa vasisimo mumatendhe sokupikirwa kwavakaitwa naTenzi." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Tenzi nesimba rake akaramba achingovapedza nokufa kudzamara vose vapera. 
Deuteronomy2:16 “Kuzoti varume vaya vezero raikwanisa kuenda kuhondo vapera kufa pakati pevaIsiraeri," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Tenzi akanditi," 
Deuteronomy2:18 ‘Nhasi uno munofanira kudimura muganho weMoabhu paAru. 
Deuteronomy2:19 Mukange masvika munyika yavaAmoni musambovanetsa kana kudenhana navo nokuti handisi kuzokupai kunyange kadimbu kenyika yavaAmoni kuti ive nhaka yenyu nokuti ndakaipa vana vaRoti kuti ive yavo.’ ” 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Nyika iyoyo inonziwo nyika yavaRefaimu. VaRefaimu ndivo vaimbogaramo kare, asi vaAmoni vaivatumidza kuti maZamuzumimu." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Vakanga vari rudzi rukuru rune vanhu vakawanda, vakareba sehofori dzorudzi rwavaAnakimu. Asi Tenzi akavaparadza, vaAmoni ndokutora nyika iyoyo ndokubva vazogara panzvimbo pavo." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Tenzi ndizvo zvaakanga aitirawo vana vaEsau vagere munyika yeSeiri. Akaparadza vaHori, ivo ndokuvatorera nyika yavo ndokubva vagaramo. Vachiri kugaramo nanhasi." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ndizvo zvakaitwawo nevaKafutorimu vanobva kuKafutori, vakaparadza vaAvhimu vaiva nemisha yavo yaisvika kuguta reGaza, ndokubva vagaramo ivo)." 
Deuteronomy2:24 “Takazonzi chisumudzirai rwendo rwenyu muyambuke Arinoni. Onai ndaisa Sihoni muAmori mambo weHeshibhoni nenyika yake mumaoko enyu. Mudenhei mumurwise muchitanga kumutorera nyika yake. 
Deuteronomy2:25 Kubvira nhasi uno ndichaita kuti marudzi ose apanyika avhunduke akutyei. Vose vachazonzwa nezvenyu vachadedera vachikutyai. 
Deuteronomy2:26 “Ndakatuma nhume kuna Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni tiri kurenje reKedhemoti namashoko orugare okuti," 
Deuteronomy2:27 ‘Tibvumireiwo kuti tipfuure nomunyika menyu. Tichangoramba takati tande nenzira chete. Hatimbotsaukiri kurudyi kana kuruboshwe. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Zvokudya zvedu tichatoita zvokutenga nemari kwamuri, kana mvura yokuti tinwe tichatoita yokutenga nemari kwamuri. Tibvumireiwo kutsika nomunyika menyu" 
Deuteronomy2:29 sezvatakaitirwa navana vaEsau vagere kuSeiri, nevaMoabhu vagere kuAru kusvikira tayambuka Jorodhani tichindopinda munyika yatinopiwa naTenzi Mwari wedu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:30 “Asi Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni akatirambidza kutsika nomo nokuti Tenzi Mwari wedu akamusindimadza akamuomesa mwoyo wake kuti amuise mumaoko enyu sezvaari nhasi. 
Deuteronomy2:31 “Tenzi akati kwandiri, ‘Chionai, ndava kuisa Sihoni nenyika yake mumaoko enyu. Chitangai kutora nyika yake muiite yenyu.’" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Ipapo Sihoni akativinga nevanhu vake vose vakatirwisa paJahazi. 
Deuteronomy2:33 Asi Tenzi Mwari wedu akamuisa mumaoko edu tikamukurira navanakomana vake navanhu vake vose. 
Deuteronomy2:34 Takatora maguta ake ose panguva iyoyo tikanyatsoparadza maguta ose navarume navakadzi navapwere. Hakuna kunyange nomumwe wavo watakasiya ari mupenyu. 
Deuteronomy2:35 Mombe chete ndidzo dzatakatora sechinhu chedu isu chokupamba nezvinhuwo zvokuzogovana zvomumaguta atakatora. 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kubvira kuguta reAroero riri nechokumucheto webani reArinoni neguta riri munyasi morukova imomo kundosvika kuGireadhi, kwakanga kusina maguta akanga ane tsvingo dzakareba zvokuti taitadza kukwira. Tenzi Mwari wedu akaaisa ose mumaoko medu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Asi hatina kuenda kunyika yavaAmoni, kana kumapani aJabhoku kana kumaguta enyika yamakomo, kana kuenda kune dzimwe nzvimbo kwatakarambidzwa naTenzi Mwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy3:1 “Takazosimudzira rwendo toenda kuBhashani. Ogu mambo weBhashani, akativinga navanhu vake vose kuzotirwisa kuEdhirei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Asi Tenzi akanditi, ‘Usamutye nokuti iye navanhu vake vose, nenyika yake yose, ndavaisa mumaoko ako. Uchaita kwaari zvawakaita kuna Sihoni mambo wavaAmori aigara kuHeshibhoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:3 “Saka Tenzi Mwari wedu akaisawo Ogu mambo weBhashani navanhu vake vose mumaoko edu. Takavarakasha zvokuti hakuna nomumwe wavo watakasiya ari mupenyu. 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ipapo takatora maguta ake ose, hakuna guta ratisina kuvatorera. Takatorera Ogu nyika yaaitonga muBhashani, maguta makumi matanhatu, ari munyika yeArigobhu." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Maguta ose iwaya aiva akakomberedzwa netsvingo ndefu, nemisuo mikuru ine zvihuri, nemimwewo misha yakanga isina tsvingo." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Takanyatsoaparadza sezvatakaita kuna Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni. Takaparadza maguta ose navarume navakadzi nepwere. 
Deuteronomy3:7 Mombe nezvinhu zvomumaguta ndizvo zvatakapamba. 
Deuteronomy3:8 “Panguva iyoyo takatora nyika dzamadzimambo maviri avaAmori, vaigara mhiri kwaJorodhani, kubvira kubani reArinoni kundosvika kugomo reHerimoni." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (VaSidhoni vanoriti Sirioni, vaAmori vachiriti Seniri.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Takatora maguta ose apamutunhu neGireadhi yose neBhashani yose kusvikira kuSareka neEdhirei maguta omuBhashani nyika inotongwa naOgu. 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ogu mambo weBhashani ndiye woga worudzi rwehofori dzavaRefaimu akanga achiri mupenyu. Zvinongooneka neguva rake resimbi riri kuRabha guta revaAmoni. Guva racho rakareba mamita mana, upamhi hwaro hwakaita mamita anenge maviri nomwero chaiwo wamamita)." 
Deuteronomy3:12 “Patakatora nyika iyoyi, ndakapa vedzinza raRubheni nevedzinza raGadhi nyika inobvira kuguta reAroero riri pedyo nebani raArinoni nechidimbu chenyika yeGireadhi nemaguta ayo." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Chimwe chidimbu cheGireadhi chakasara, nenyika yeBhashani yose yaitongwa naOgu ndakaipa kuchidimbu chedzinza raManase. (Zvinoreva kuti nyika yose yeArigobhu kusvikira kuBhashani inotumidzwa kuti nyika yehofori dzavaRefaimu." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Jairi wedzinza raManase akatora nyika yose yeArigobhu inonzi Bhashani kundosvika kumuganho wavaGeshuri navaMaaka, ndokutumidza maguta iwayo nezita rake kuti maguta aJairi, zvaari nanhasi)." 
Deuteronomy3:15 “Ndakapa nyika yeGireadhi kuna Makiri. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Vedzinza raRubheni nevedzinza raGadhi ndakavapa kubvira kuGireadhi kusvikira kubani raArinoni, muganho wenyika yavo uri pakati pebani iroro kundosvika kuna Jabhoko runovaganhuranisa nevaAmoni." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Muganho wayo wokumadokero irenje reArabha naJorodhani kubvira kuchamhembe kugungwa reKinereti zvichienda kumaodzanyemba kuGungwa reMunyu kusvikira mujinga meGomo rePisiga kumabvazuva. 
Deuteronomy3:18 “Ipapo ndakakuudzai kuti, ‘Tenzi Mwari wenyu akakupai nyika iyoyo kuti muiite yenyu. Varwi venyu ngavapakate zvombo zvavo vayambuke Jorodhani vatungamire mberi kwehama dzavo vaIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Asi madzimai enyu nepwere dzenyu nemombe dzenyu, zvose zvichasara zviri mumaguta andakakupai. (Ndinozviziva kuti mune mombe zhinji.)" 
Deuteronomy3:20 Muchaita izvozvi kudzamara Tenzi apawo hama dzenyu nzvimbo dzokuchizorora sezvaakakuitiraiwo imi. Kusvikira vatora nyika yavari kupiwa naTenzi mhiri kwaJorodhani. Mumwe nomumwe wenyu ndipo paachazodzokera kunhaka yake yandakamupa.’ 
Deuteronomy3:21 Panguva iyoyo ndakaudza Joshuwa kuti, ‘Wakaona nameso ako zvose zvakaitwa naTenzi kuna madzimambo maviri aya. Ndizvo zvichaitwa naTenzi kuna madzimambo ose amuchayambukira." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Musambovatya nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiye anokurwirai.’ 
Deuteronomy3:23 “Panguva iyoyo ndakateterera kuna Tenzi ndichiti," 
Deuteronomy3:24 ‘Nhai Tenzi Mwari ndinozviziva kuti zvose zvamakandiratidza zvinongova mavambo oukuru hwenyu nesimba renyu nokuti ariko here Mwari kudenga kana pasi pano angaite mabasa akadaro namasimba angaenzaniswa neenyu? 
Deuteronomy3:25 Ndapota ndibvumireiwo kuyambukira mhiri kwaJorodhani ndingondoonawo nyika iyoyo yakanaka ikadai, nyika yamakomo yakanakisisa neRebhanoni.’" 
Deuteronomy3:26 “Asi Tenzi akandishatirirwa nokuda kwenyu, akasandinzwa. Ipapo Tenzi akanditi, ‘Zvakwana, chirega kutaurazve nezvenyaya iyi kwandiri." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Chikwira pamusoro pegomo utarise kumadokero nokuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba nokumabvazuva uione nameso ako nokuti iwe hausi kuzoyambuka Jorodhani. 
Deuteronomy3:28 Asi taurira Joshuwa umukurudzire nokumushingisa nokuti ndiye achatungamirira vanhu ava kuyambuka vachindotora nyika iyoyo yauchaona kuti ive yavo.’ 
Deuteronomy3:29 “Naizvozvo takaramba tiri mubani rakatarisana neBhetipeori.” 
Deuteronomy4:1 Mosesi akati, “Imi vaIsiraeri, chinzwai zvino mitemo nemirao yandava kukudzidzisai kuti muichengete, mugorarama. Ndiko kuti muyambuke mutore nyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wamadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Musambowedzera zvenyu kana kutapudza chinhu pamitemo yandichakupai. Chengetai mitemo yaTenzi Mwari wenyu yandava kukuudzai. 
Deuteronomy4:3 Makaona nemeso enyu zvakaitwa naTenzi kuBhaaripeori kuvanhu vaitevera mwari wepagomo rokuPeori. Tenzi Mwari wenyu akavaparadza pakati penyu. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Asi imi makaramba makati kwati kwati naTenzi Mwari wenyu mose muchiri vapenyu nanhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy4:5 “Chionaika, ndakakudzidzisai mitemo nemirao sokuudzwa kwandakaitwa na Tenzi Mwari wangu kuti muichengete munyika yamava kupinda kuti mutore." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Iteererei muichengete nokuti kwamuri, ndihwo ungwaru nokunzwisisa kune ndudzi dzavanhu vachakuonai. Pavachanzwa mitemo iyoyi vachati, ‘Chokwadi rudzi urwu rudzi rukuru, rwavanhu vakangwara vanonzwisisa.’" 
Deuteronomy4:7 “Ko, kune rudzi here rukuru runa mwari ari pedyo narwo sezvakaita isu naTenzi Mwari wedu ari pedyo nesu patinomudaidza?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Pane rudzi here rukuru rune mitemo nemirao yakarurama sebumbiro rose romutemo randiri kukupai nhasi uno? 
Deuteronomy4:9 Chasara kwamuri ndechichi, chingwarirai kuti murege kukanganwa muupenyu hwenyu hwose, zvamakaona zvirege kubuda muhana dzenyu. Taurirai vana venyu navana vavana venyu" 
Deuteronomy4:10 nezvezuva riya ramakamira pamberi paTenzi Mwari wenyu pagomo reHorebhu. Tenzi akanditi, ‘Ndiunganidzire vanhu. Ndinoda kuvaudza mashoko angu kuti vadzidze kunditya upenyu hwavo hwose vagodzidzisawo vana vavo kuitawo saizvozvo.’" 
Deuteronomy4:11 “Imi makaswedera pedyo, mukasvikomira mujinga megomo rainganduma moto une murazvo waisvika mudengadenga, iro gomo rakati kwirindindi, rakaputirwa negore rakasviba kuti ndoo." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Tenzi akataura nemi ari mukati memoto, mukanzwa izwi rake asi hamuna kuona chimiro chake. Makangonzwa izwi rake chete." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Akakuisirai pachena chitenderano chake chezvaanoti muite chemitemo gumi yaakanyora pamafendefa amabwe maviri. 
Deuteronomy4:14 Panguva iyoyo Tenzi akandiudza kuti ndikudzidzisei mitemo nemirao yamunofanira kuchengeta munyika yamava kuyambukira kundotora kuiita yenyu. 
Deuteronomy4:15 “Tenzi paakataura kwamuri paGomo reSinai ari mumoto, hamuna kuona chimiro chake. Saka imi zvichenjererei" 
Deuteronomy4:16 mungazodaro mukatadzira Tenzi mava kuzvigadzirira chifananidzo chine chimiro chakafanana nomurume kana mukadzi," 
Deuteronomy4:17 kana mhuka zvayo iri panyika, kana shiri inobhururuka mudenga," 
Deuteronomy4:18 kana mifananidzo yechii zvacho chinokambaira napasi, kana chehove dzomumvura pasi penyika." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Ngwarirai kuti, mungazoti kana matarisa mudenga mukaona zuva nomwedzi nenyenyedzi negurusvusvu radzo mudenga umu, motorwa mwoyo, moda kuzvipfugamira nokuzvinamata, izvo zviri zvinhu zvakapiwa ndudzi dzose dziri pasi pedenga." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Asi Tenzi akakununurai muIjipiti yainge vira romoto kuzokuitai vanhu vake sezvamuri nhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy4:21 Uye Tenzi akandishatirirwa nokuda kwenyu akandipikira kuti handizoyambuki Jorodhani ndichipinda munyika yakanaka yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ive nhaka yenyu. 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ndinodaro nokuti ini ndichafira munyika ino, handichayambuki Jorodhani. Asi imi ndimi muchayambuka kundotora nyika yakanaka iyoyo." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Chenjererai kuti murege kukanganwa chitenderano chamakaitirana naTenzi Mwari wenyu, mozvigadzirira zvifananidzo zvakafanana nechii zvacho chamakarambidzwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu" 
Deuteronomy4:24 nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu moto unopisa, Mwari weshanje." 
Deuteronomy4:25 “Kana mukazobereka vana magara kwenguva ndefu munyika iyoyo mava navazukuru, musazotadzira Tenzi momushatirisa muchizvigadzirira chifananidzo chakafanana nechii zvacho." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Nhasi uno denga nenyika ngazvindipupurirewo chokwadi chokuti, kana mangodaro imi muchapera kuti nhoo munyika iyoyo yamuri kuyambukira Jorodhani kundoitora. Hamuzombogara mazuva akawanda, munopera imi kuti dhu." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Tenzi achakuparadzirai kune dzimwe ndudzi. Muchasara mava vashoma kudzimwe ndudzi ikoko kwamunenge maendeswa naTenzi. 
Deuteronomy4:28 Muri ikoko muchanamata vamwari vokuveza nevamabwe zvakagadzirwa namaoko avanhu. Vamwari vacho havaoni kana kunzwa kana kudya kana kunhuhwidza. 
Deuteronomy4:29 Asi muri ikoko muchatsvaka Tenzi Mwari wenyu, kana mukazvipira kumutsvaka nomwoyo wenyu wose muchamuwana." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Kana mava mumatambudziko, zvose izvozvi zvakuwanai muchadzokera zvenyu kuna Tenzi Mwari wenyu moteerera izwi rake" 
Deuteronomy4:31 nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiMwari ane tsitsi. Haakufuratirei kana kukuparadzai kana kukanganwa chitenderano chaakaita namadzitateguru enyu. 
Deuteronomy4:32 “Imbobvunzaiwo zvepasi chigare, pamakange musati maberekwa kubvira pazuva rakasika Tenzi, munhu panyika. Bvunzai kubvira kumugumo mumwe wenyika kusvikira kune mumwe kana kwakamboitika kana kunzwika chinhu chakadai." 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ndorupiko rudzi rwavanhu vakambonzwa izwi raMwari achitaura ari mumoto samanzwiro amakaita vakaramba vari vapenyu? 
Deuteronomy4:34 Ko kune mumwe mwari here akambotora rumwe rudzi achirubvisa mune rumwe rudzi achiruita rwake sezvakaitwa imi naTenzi Mwari wenyu muIjipiti? Tenzi akaratidza simba rake guru akaita zviedzo nezviratidzo nezvishamiso nehondo nezvimwe zvinotyisa zvaakaita muchiona. 
Deuteronomy4:35 Akakuratidzai izvozvo kuti muzive kuti Tenzi ndiye Mwari oga, hakuna mumwezve kunze kwake." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Akakuregai muchinzwa izwi rake richibva kudenga kuti akudzidzisei, akakuitai kuti muone moto wake mukuru pasi pano, mukanzwa izwi rake richibva mukati memoto." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Tenzi zvaakada madzitateguru enyu, akazosarudza vana vavo, akakubudisai muIjipiti achikuratidzai kuvapo kwake." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Akadzinga ndudzi huru dzavanhu dzakanga dzakasimba kupfuura imi, kuti akupinzei imomo, akupei nyika yavo kuti ive yenyu sezvairi nanhasi." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Naizvozvo nhasi chibatisisai izvi muzviise mumwoyo yenyu zvokuti Tenzi ndiye Mwari, kumusoro kudenga napasi pano hakuna mumwezve kunze kwake." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Saka chiteererai mitemo nemirao yandinokuudzai nhasi kuti zvikunakirei imi nezvizvarwa zvenyu, mazuva enyu agowanda amuchagara munyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu nokusingaperi.”" 
Deuteronomy4:41 Zvino Mosesi akatsaura maguta matatu mhiri kumabvazuva kwaJorodhani 
Deuteronomy4:42 okuti kana munhu anenge auraya mumwe mukusaziva ivo vanga vasingavengane kare, awane kwokutizira achindopotera nokuponesa upenyu hwake." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Munyika yevedzinza raRubheni akasarudza guta reBhezeru riri pakakwirira murenje. MuGireadhi nyika yevedzinza raGadhi akasarudza guta reRamoti. MuBhashani nyika yevedzinza raManase akasarudza guta reGorani. 
Deuteronomy4:44 Iri ndiro bumbiro romutemo rakapiwa vaIsiraeri naMosesi. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Izvi ndizvo zvirevo nemitemo nemirao yakaudzwa vaIsiraeri naMosesi pavakabuda muIjipiti. 
Deuteronomy4:46 Izvozvi vakanga vari mhiri kwaJorodhani mubani rakatarisana neBhetipeori munyika yaSihoni, mambo wavaAmori aigara kuHeshibhoni. Ndiye uya akakurirwa naMosesi navaIsiraeri pavakabva kuIjipiti." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Vakatora nyika yake, nenyika yaOgu mambo weBhashani. Madzimambo aya maviri evaAmori aigara kumabvazuva kumhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Deuteronomy4:48 Nyika iyoyi yaibvira kuAroero mubani reArinoni ichikwidza kusvikira kuGomo reSirioni (ndiro gomo reHerimoni)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ichitandira matunhu ose okurenje reArabha ari kumabvazuva kwaJorodhani. Kumaodzanyemba inosvika kuGungwa roMunyu, kumabvazuva ichindosvika mujinga megomo rePisiga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Mosesi akaunganidza vaIsiraeri vose akati kwavari, “Teererai munzwe imi vaIsiraeri mitemo nemirao yandava kutaura nhasi muchinzwa. Idzidzei munyatsoichengeta." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Tenzi Mwari wedu akaita chitenderano nesu pagomo reHorebhu. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Tenzi haana kuita chitenderano ichi namadzibaba edu chete, asi nesu tose iyesu vapenyu kudai ipo pano nhasi." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Tenzi akataura nemi makatarisana naye uso nouso pagomo riya, iye ari mukati memoto." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Panguva iyoyo ini ndaiva munyai pakati penyu naTenzi, ndichikuzivisai shoko raTenzi nokuti imi maitya. Maitya nokuda kwemoto, saka musina kukwira mugomo. “Tenzi akati," 
Deuteronomy5:6 ‘Ndini Tenzi Mwari wenyu. Ndakakubudisai munyika yeIjipiti kwamaiva muuranda.’ 
Deuteronomy5:7 “Usave navamwe vamwari kunze kwangu. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Usazvigadzirire chifananidzo chokunamata chokuveza, kana kuita chinhu chakafanana nechii zvacho chiri kumusoro kudenga, kana chiri panyika pasi pano, kana chiri mumvura pasi pasi penyika." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Usapfugamire zvifananidzo izvozvo kana kuzvinamata nokuti ini Tenzi Mwari wako ndiri Mwari aneshanje. Ndinoranga vose vanondivenga, shamhu yangu ichirova vana vavo, ndichivarangira zvitadzo zvamadzibaba avo kusvikira kuchizvarwa chavo chechitatu nechechina." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Asi ndinogara ndichiitira mwoyochena zviuru nezviuru zvavanhu vanondida vanochengeta mitemo yangu. 
Deuteronomy5:11 “Usataure zita raTenzi Mwari wako zvisina maturo nokuti Tenzi haangaregi kupa mhosva munhu anotaura zita rake zvisina maturo. 
Deuteronomy5:12 “Chengeta zuva reSabata urierese sokuudzwa kwawakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy5:13 Kwamazuva matanhatu, shanda zvako uite basa rako rose." 
Deuteronomy5:14 Asi zuva rechinomwe iSabata raTenzi Mwari wako. Pazuva iroro usaite basa, iwe kana mwana wako mukomana, kana musikana, kunyange munhu anokushandira, murume kana mukadzi, kana nzombe yako, kana dhongi rako, kana chipfuwo chako chipi nechipi zvacho, kunyange muuyi agere nemi kuitira kuti munhu anokushandira murume kana mukadzi azororewo sewe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Rangarira kuti iwe waiva muranda munyika yeIjipiti, Tenzi Mwari wako akakubudisamo noukuru hwake nesimba rake guru. Naizvozvo Tenzi Mwari wako akakuudza kuti uchengete Sabata." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “Remekedza baba vako namai vako, sezvawakaudzwa naTenzi Mwari wako, kuti mazuva ako awande zvigokunakira munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Usauraye. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Usaite upombwe. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Usabe. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Usapupurire mumwe nhema. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Usachive mukadzi womumwe wako. Usachive imba yake, kana munda wake, kana munhu anomushandira murume kana mukadzi, kunyange nzombe yake, kana dhongi rake, kana chii zvacho chomumwe wako.”" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Mitemo iyoyi Tenzi akaitaura nezwi rake guru kugungano renyu rose ari mukati memoto negore riya rakanga rakasviba kuti ndoo, haana kuenderera mberi. Akainyora pamafendefa maviri emabwe, akandipa." 
Deuteronomy5:23 “Imi pamakanzwa izwi richibva muzarima, iro gomo richinganduma moto imi navatungamiriri vamadzinza enyu navakuru vakuru venyu makauya kwandiri" 
Deuteronomy5:24 mukati, ‘Tarisai muone kuti Tenzi Mwari wedu aratidza mbiri yake noukuru hwake. Tanzwa izwi rake richibva mukati memoto, tikabva tazvionera nhasi kuti Mwari anogona kutaura nomunhu, munhu agokwanisa kuramba ari mupenyu." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Zvino tofireiko? Moto mukuru iwoyu uchatiroromesa, kana tikazonzwazve izwi raTenzi Mwari wedu tinofa" 
Deuteronomy5:26 nokuti pavanhu vose zvavo ndianiko akambonzwa izwi raMwari mupenyu achitaura ari mumoto sezvatakaita akaramba ari mupenyu? 
Deuteronomy5:27 Chiendai imi munotinzwira zvose zvinotaurwa naTenzi Mwari wedu. Zvose zvamunenge mataurirwa naTenzi Mwari wedu tiudzei, tizviteerere tigozviita.’" 
Deuteronomy5:28 “Tenzi paakanzwa zvamakareva, akati kwandiri, ‘Zvataurwa navanhu ava ndazvinzwa. Zvavataura kwauri zvose zvakanaka," 
Deuteronomy5:29 dai waro vakangoramba vane mwoyo wakadaro wokundiremekedza, nokuchengeta mitemo yangu zvinhu zvose zvingavanakire ivo navana vavo narini narini!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Chienda undovaudza kuti vadzokere zvavo kumatendhe. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Asi iwe sara kuno neni. Ndichakutaurira zvirevo nemitemo nemirao yose yauchavadzidzisa kuti vandoichengeta munyika yandiri kuvapa kuti ive yavo.’ 
Deuteronomy5:32 “Zvino chenjererai kuita zvose zvamakaudzwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu, musingatsaudzire moita zvomusoro wenyu." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Munofanira kutevedza zvose zvamakaudzwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti murarame, zvikunakirei, mazuva enyu awande munyika iyoyo ichazova yenyu." 
Deuteronomy6:1 “Izvi ndizvo zvirevo nemitemo nemirao yandakataurirwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ndikudzidzisei mugoichengeta munyika yamava kuyambukira kundotora. 
Deuteronomy6:2 Ndinodaro kuitira kuti muremekedze Tenzi Mwari wenyu. Imi navana venyu navazukuru venyu ndinokuudzai kuti muchengete mitemo nemirao yake yose, mazuva ose oupenyu hwenyu kuti mazuva enyu awande." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Saka imi vaIsiraeri iteererei muichengete, kuti zvikunakirei, muwande zvakanyanya munyika yakanaka yomukaka nouchi sokuvimbisa kwamakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wamadzibaba enyu." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Teerera unzwe iwe Isiraeri. Tenzi Mwari wedu ndiye Mwari oga. 
Deuteronomy6:5 Ida Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose, nesimba rako rose." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Mitemo iyoyi yandinokuudza nhasi ngaigare mumwoyo mako. 
Deuteronomy6:7 Nyatsoidzidzisa vana vako. Uitaure wataurazve ugere mumba mako, napaunenge uchifamba munzira, napaunenge urere pasi, napaunomuka." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Uisungirire paruoko rwako chive chiratidzo, uisungirirewo pahuma yako netsungare." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Inyore pamagwatidziro emba yako napamisuo yako mikuru. 
Deuteronomy6:10 “Tenzi Mwari wako paachazenge akuunza munyika yaakatsidzira kumadzibaba ako vanaAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho kuzokupa nyika ina maguta makuru akanaka amusina kumbovaka 
Deuteronomy6:11 ane dzimba dzizere zvinhu zvakanaka, zvausina kuisamo, namatsime ausina kumbochera, neminda yemagirepisi neyemiorivhi yausina kumbosima, wadya zvokuguta," 
Deuteronomy6:12 chenjerera kuti urege kukanganwa Tenzi akakubudisa munyika yeIjipiti kwamaiva muuranda. 
Deuteronomy6:13 Remekedza Tenzi Mwari wako, umushandire, upike nezita rake." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Usatevere vamwe vamwari, kana vamwari vendudzi dzavanhu vagere munharaunda yako," 
Deuteronomy6:15 nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako ndiMwari weshanje. 
Deuteronomy6:16 “Usaedze Tenzi Mwari wako sezvawakamboita kuMasa. 
Deuteronomy6:17 Unofanira kunyatsochengeta mitemo yaTenzi Mwari wako, nechitenderano chake, nemirao yaakakupa." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Zvinonzi naTenzi zvakarurama nezvakanaka, ndizvo zvaunofanira kuita, kuti zvikufambire zvakanaka, ukwanise kundotora nyika yakanaka yakatsidzirwa naTenzi kupa madzitateguru ako," 
Deuteronomy6:19 nokukudzingira vavengi vako sokuvimbisa kwaakaita. 
Deuteronomy6:20 “Panguva ichauya kana mwana wako ozokubvunza achiti, ‘Ko zvakambouya seiko kuti tive nechitenderano nemitemo nemirao yamakapiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu?’" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Ipapo uchamutaurira kuti, ‘Taiva varanda vaFarao muIjipiti ndokubva Tenzi atiburitsa muIjipiti nesimba guru," 
Deuteronomy6:22 Tenzi, akaita zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvikuru zvairwadza vaIjipiti naFarao nemhuri yake yose tichizviona." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Akatiburitsamo kuti atiunze nokutipa nyika yaakatsidzira madzibaba edu. 
Deuteronomy6:24 Saka Tenzi akatiudza kuchengeta mirao iyoyi yose, nokuremekedza Tenzi Mwari wedu kuti zvitinakire nguva dzose, uye kuti atichengete tiri vapenyu sezvatiri iye nhasi uno." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Kwatiri isu ndohuchava ururami kana tikanyatsochengeta mitemo iyoyi yose pana Tenzi Mwari wedu sokutiudza kwaakaita.’ 
Deuteronomy7:1 “Kana Tenzi Mwari wenyu azokuunzai munyika yamuri kundotora, achakudzingirai marudzi aya avanhu akasimba anoti: vaHiti navaGirigashi navaAmori navaKanani navaPerizi navaHivhi navaJebhusi." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Kana Tenzi Mwari wenyu avaisa mumaoko enyu, mukavakunda, vaparadzei zvachose. Musaite chitenderano navo kana kuvanzwira tsitsi." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Imi navana venyu, musaroorerane navo" 
Deuteronomy7:4 nokuti vachatsautsa vana venyu pakunditevera vondoshandira vamwe vamwari. Ipapo muchashatirisa Tenzi achibva akuparadzai nokukasika. 
Deuteronomy7:5 Izvi ndizvo zvamuchaita navo: muchapaza atari dzavo, moputsa mbiru dzamabwe akateketerwa, mopwanya zvifananidzo zvavo zvezvimiti zvinomiririra Ashera nokupisa nomoto zvifananidzo zvavo zvakavezwa." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ndinodaro nokuti imi muri vanhu vatsvene vakatsaurirwa Tenzi Mwari wenyu. Tenzi Mwari wenyu akakusarudzai pakati pamarudzi ose, apasi pano pose, kuti muve vanhu vake pachake." 
Deuteronomy7:7 “Hakusi kuwanda kwenyu kupfuura vamwe kwakaita kuti Tenzi akudei nokukusarudzai nokuti maiva vashoma kwazvo pana mamwe marudzi ose. 
Deuteronomy7:8 Asi nokuti Tenzi anokudai, aidawo kuchengetedza chitsidzo chake chaakaita namadzitateguru enyu. Tenzi akakubudisai nesimba guru, akakununurai muuranda hwaFarao mambo weIjipiti." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Naizvozvo zivai kuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiye Mwari iyeyo. NdiTenzi akavimbika anochengetedza chitenderano chake, ane mwoyochena kune vanomuda, navanochengeta mitemo yake kusvikira kuzvizvarwa zvavo zvamazana akazanirana." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Asi vanomuvenga anovaranga ivo pachavo achivaparadza. Haambozengurira kuparadza vanomuvenga ivavo. 
Deuteronomy7:11 Naizvozvo chengetai zvirevo izvi nemitemo nemirao iyoyi yandinokuudzai nhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy7:12 “Zvino kana mukanzwa mirao iyoyi, mukaiteerera muchiichengeta, Tenzi Mwari wenyu achachengeta chitenderano chaakaita nemi, acharamba achikuitirai mwoyochena sokutsidzira kwaakaita madzitateguru enyu." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Achakudai, achakukomborerai, achakuitai kuti muwande. Achakupai chikomborero chevana vakawanda. Achakupai makomborero emichero yeminda yenyu, neembesanwa dzenyu, neewaini neemafuta neemombe dzakawanda, neezvipfuwo zvizhinji, munyika yaakapika kumadzitateguru enyu kuti azopa imi." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Imi ndimi muchakomborerwa kupfuura marudzi ose avanhu. Pakati penyu hapachazovi nomurume asingabereki, kana mukadzi anoshaya mbereko, kana nezvipfuwo zvisingaite vana." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Tenzi achakudzivirirai kuzvirwere zvose. Zvirwere zvose zvokuIjipiti zviya zvamakaona haazoiti kuti zvikubatei. Asi achaita kuti zvibate vavengi venyu. 
Deuteronomy7:16 Paradzai marudzi ose anoiswa mumaoko enyu naTenzi Mwari wenyu. Musavanzwire tsitsi. Musambonamata vamwari vavo nokuti chichava chinhu chokukuteyai nacho. 
Deuteronomy7:17 “Saka usati nechomumwoyo mako, ‘Ndudzi idzi dzine vanhu vakawanda kupfuura isu. Tingavadzinge seiko munyika iyoyi?’" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Musavatye, asi rangarirai zvakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuna Farao nevaIjipiti vose." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Imi nameso enyu, makaona zviedzo zvikuru nezviratidzo nezvishamiso zvakaitwa nesimba guru raTenzi Mwari wenyu paakakuburitsaimo. Ndizvo zvichaitwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kumarudzi ose amuri kutya." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Tenzi Mwari wenyu achavaitisa kuti vaparadzwe savanhu varumwa namago kusvikira vose vanenge vasara vari vapenyu nevanenge vakahwanda vaparadzwa. 
Deuteronomy7:21 Musavatye, nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu anemi ndiMwari mukuru anotyisa." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Tenzi Mwari wenyu achadzinga ndudzi idzodzo paduku paduku. Hamungavaparadze nenguva nduku nduku nokuti zvikara zvingazokuwandirai. 
Deuteronomy7:23 Asi Tenzi Mwari wenyu achaisa vavengi venyu mumaoko menyu achivavhiringidza kusvikira vose vapera kuti nho-o. 
Deuteronomy7:24 Achaisa madzimambo avo mumaoko menyu. Imi munofanira kuita kuti mazita avo arove pasi pano. Hakuna nomumwe wavo achakwanisa kumirisana nemi kusvikira mavaparadza. 
Deuteronomy7:25 Pisai nomoto zvifananidzo zvokuveza zvavamwari vavo. Musaite ruchiva nesirivha kana nendarama iri pazviri. Musaitore moita yenyu nokuti ingazova chinhu chokukuteyai, Tenzi Mwari wenyu haazvidi." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Musaunze chinhu chisingadiwi naMwari mumba menyu, kana mukadaro munotoparadzwa saicho. Chisemei muvengane nacho nokuti chinhu chinenge chakanzi naMwari chiparadzwe." 
Deuteronomy8:1 “Ngwarirai kunyatsochengeta mitemo yose yandiri kukupai nhasi uno, kuti murarame, muwande, muzokwanisa kuenda kunyika yakatsidzirwa madzitateguru enyu naTenzi, mundoitora kuti ive yenyu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Rangarira zvose zvawakaona murwendo rwawakatungamirirwa naTenzi Mwari wako nomurenje kwamakore makumi mana, akaitira kuti akuninipise. Akakuedza achida kuona paumire, kuti unochengeta here mitemo yake kana kuti kwete." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Akakuninipisa, akaita kuti unzwe nzara. Akakupa mana yokudya, yawakanga usingazivi, yakanga isingazikanwi namadzitateguru ako kuti uzive kuti munhu haararame nechokudya chete, asi anorarama nezvose zvinotaurwa nomuromo waTenzi." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Hanzu dzako dzaive dziri pauri hadzina kusakara, tsoka dzako hadzina kuzvimba pamakore makumi mana aya." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Chiziva nomumwoyo mako kuti sokurayira kunoitwa munhu mwana wake, ndiko kurayira kunoita naTenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Naizvozvo chengeta mitemo yaTenzi Mwari wako, uite zvaanoda, umutye" 
Deuteronomy8:7 nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako ava kuzokuendesa kunyika yakanaka, nyika ine hova dzemvura nezvisipiti nezvitubu zvemvura inotubuka ichibva pasi pasi mumapani nomuzvikomo." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Nyika yekoroni nebhari nemichero yamagirepisi nemionde nemipomogiraneti. Nyika yemiorivhi namafuta nouchi. 
Deuteronomy8:9 Nyika yausingashaye chinhu, mauchadya chingwa usingaiti zvokupara. Simbi ndomabwe enyikayo, mumakomo ayo unozochera mhangura." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Uchadya uchiguta, ucharumbidza Tenzi Mwari wako nokuti akakupa nyika yakanaka." 
Deuteronomy8:11 “Chenjerera kuti ungadaro ukazokanganwa Tenzi Mwari wako, worega kuchengeta zvirevo nemitemo nemirao yake yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Ungazoti kana wadya ukaguta, ukavaka dzimba dzakanaka uchigaramo," 
Deuteronomy8:13 kana zvipfuwo zvako zvawanda, wava nesirivha nendarama yakawanda, zvose zvaunazvo zvikange zvawanda," 
Deuteronomy8:14 wova nomwoyo wokuzvikudza, wokanganwa Tenzi Mwari wako akakuburitsa muIjipiti muuranda." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Ari iye akakutungamirira nomuzigwenga guru rinotyisa, makaoma, musina mvura, mune nyoka dzino uturu, mune marize. Akakubudisira mvura pabwe regwenya." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Mugwenga imomo ari iye, akakupa mana yokudya, yakanga isingazikanwi namadzitateguru ako. Aida kukuninipisa nokukuedza kuti pakupedzisira azokuitira zvakanaka." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Chenjerera kuti urege kufunga mumwoyo mako woti, ‘Upfumi uhu hwakabva musimba ramaoko angu.’" 
Deuteronomy8:18 Naizvozvo unofanira kurangarira Tenzi Mwari wako nokuti ndiye anokupa simba rinokuwanisa upfumi. Anoita izvi kuti achengete chitenderano chaakapika kumadzitateguru ako sezvazviri pari nhasi. 
Deuteronomy8:19 Kana zvikazoitika kuti unokanganwa zvako Tenzi Mwari wako wotevera vamwe vamwari uchivashandira nokuvapfugamira, ndinokutsidzirai nhasi kuti muchapera mose kuti dhu." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Samaparadziro amuri kuitirwa mamwe marudzi naTenzi, ndokuparadzwa kwamuchaitwawo naTenzi Mwari wenyu, nokuti makaramba kuteerera izwi raTenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 “Teerera unzwe iwe Isiraeri; wava kuzoyambuka Jorodhani nhasi uno, uchindotorera ndudzi huru dzakasimba kupfuura iwe, nyika dzadzo dzina maguta makuru akakomberedzwa nenhungamakore dzetsvingo." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Vanhu voko ihofori dzakareba dzorudzi rwevaAnaki vamunoziva, vane mbiri yamakanzwa yokunzi, ‘Ndiani angamirisane navaAnaki?’" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Asi chiziva nhasi uno kuti Tenzi Mwari wako ndiye anokutungamirira somoto unororomesa. Achavaparadza achavaisa pasi pako zvokuti uchavadzinga uchibva wavaparadza nokukasika, sokutaurirwa kwawakaitwa naTenzi." 
Deuteronomy9:4 “Kana Tenzi Mwari wako akudzingira vanhu ivavo, usazofunga mumwoyo mako woti, ‘Tenzi akandiunza munyika ino kuti ndiitore ive yangu nokuda kwokururama kwemwoyo wangu.’ Asi kutoti Tenzi Mwari wako ari kuvadzinga nokuda kwekuipa kwavo." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Hausi kuzondotora nyika yavo uchiita yako pamusana pokururama kwako kana kunaka kwemwoyo wako. Asi Tenzi Mwari wako ari kudzingamo ndudzi idzodzo pamusana pohuipi hwadzo nokuchengeta shoko raakatsidzira madzitateguru ako vana Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho. 
Deuteronomy9:6 Saka zvizive kuti Tenzi Mwari wako haasi kuzokupa nyika iyi yakanaka nokuda kwekururama kwako nokuti uri rudzi rwetsvuuramuromo. 
Deuteronomy9:7 “Yeuka urege kukanganwa kushatirisa kwawakaita Tenzi Mwari wako murenje, kubvira musi wawabuda muIjipiti kusvikira pano, waigara wakapikisana naTenzi." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Kunyange paGomo reHorebhu wakashatirisa Tenzi, Tenzi akaratidza kushatirwa kwake akada kukuparadza." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Zviya zvandakakwira mugomo kundopiwa mafendefa amabwe, mafendefa echitenderano chandakatemerana nemi, ndakagara mugomo imomo siku nesikati kwamazuva makumi mana. Handina kuisa chinhu kumuromo kana kunwa mvura zvayo." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Tenzi ndipo paakandipa mafendefa maviri amabwe akanga akanyorwa noruoko rwake iye Mwari. Pakanga pakanyorwa mitemo yose yakanga yataurwa naTenzi kwamuri pagomo riya, yaakataura ari mukati memoto, pazuva riya romusangano." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Mazuva makumi mana akati apera ndiriko, siku nesikati, Tenzi akandipa mafendefa maviri amabwe, mafendefa echitenderano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 “Tenzi akanditi, ‘Sumuka ubve pano, ukurumidze kuburuka nokuti vanhu vako vawakaburitsa muIjipiti vaita zvakaipa. Vakurumidza kutsauka panzira yandakavaudza. Vazviumbira chifananidzo choutare hwakanyungurutswa.’" 
Deuteronomy9:13 “Tenzi akataurazve kwandiri achiti, ‘Ndazviona kuti vanhu ava zvechokwadi itsvuuramuromo dzavanhu." 
Deuteronomy9:14 Chirega ndivaparadze, nditsakatise zita ravo panyika, ndimutse mauri rudzi rukuru rwakasimba kupinda ivo.’" 
Deuteronomy9:15 “Ndopandakazotendeuka ndoburuka mugomo imomo, iro gomo richinganduma moto, ndakabata mafendefa maviri echitenderano mumaoko." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ndakatarisa ndikaona kuti makanga matadzira Tenzi Mwari wenyu. Makanga mazviumbira chimhuru. Makanga matotsauka kare panzira yamakaudzwa naTenzi. 
Deuteronomy9:17 Naizvozvo ndakatora mafendefa andakanga ndakabata mumaoko, ndikaapwanyira pasi muchiona." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ndakazoti pasi zvambarara pana Tenzi siku nesikati kwamazuva makumi mana, handina kumboisa chinhu kumuromo kana kunwa mvura zvayo sezvandakamboita pamusana pezvitadzo zvenyu zvamakapara muchiita zvakaipa pana Tenzi zvokumushatirisa," 
Deuteronomy9:19 nokuti kukutsamwirai kwakaita Tenzi nokushatirwa kwaakakuitirai panguva iyoyo oda kukuparadzai, kwakandityisa. Asi panguva iyoyowo Tenzi akandinzwa." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Tenzi akashatirirwa Aroni zvikuru zvokuda kumuparadza. Asi panguva iyoyo ndakanamatira Aroni. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Ndakatora chitadzo chacho, chimhuru chacho ichocho chawakanga waumba, ndikachipisa nomoto, ndikachipwanya-pwanya ndikachikuya kusvikira chaita mupfumbwe. Ndakarasira mupfumbwe wacho mukakova kaibva mugomo imomo." 
Deuteronomy9:22 “Makashatirisa Tenzi zvakare paTabhera napaMasa nepaKibhurotihataavha. 
Deuteronomy9:23 Tenzi paakakutumai kubva kuKadheshibharinea achiti, ‘Chiendai mundotora nyika yandakakupai kuti ive yenyu,’ imi makasindimara, mukaramba zvakanga zvataurwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu. Hamuna kuvimba naye, kana kuteerera zvaakareva." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Kubvira musi wandakakuzivai, makagara makapandukira Tenzi." 
Deuteronomy9:25 “Saka ndakazvambarara pana Tenzi siku nesikati kwamazuva makumi mana nokuti Tenzi akanga afunga zvokukuparadzai. 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ipapo ndakanamata kuna Tenzi ndichiti, ‘Regai kuparadza nhaka yenyu, vanhu vamakanunura noukuru hwenyu. Makavaburitsa muIjipiti nesimba renyu guru." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Rangarirai varanda venyu VaAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho. Musaite hanya noumhandupandu hwavanhu ava, kana huipi hwavo, kana nechitadzo chavo,’" 
Deuteronomy9:28 nokuti vokunyika kwamakatibvisa vangati, ‘Tenzi akavaburitsa kuti andovaurayira kurenje nokuti akakundikana kuvaendesa kunyika yaakavavimbisa uye aivavenga.’" 
Deuteronomy9:29 Vanhu ava inhaka yenyu, vanhu venyu vamakaburitsa noukuru hwenyu nesimba renyu guru." 
Deuteronomy10:1 “Panguva iyoyo Tenzi akanditi, ‘Veza mafendefa maviri amabwe akafanana naaye okutanga ukwire nawo muno mugomo kwandiri ugadzire bhokisi ramapuranga." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Pamafendefa iwayo ndichanyora zvakanga zvakanyorwa pamafendefa okutanga awakaputsa, ugozoaisa mubhokisi rechitenderano.’" 
Deuteronomy10:3 “Naizvozvo ndakagadzira bhokisi racho, ramapuranga omuunga. Ndakavezawo mafendefa maviri amabwe akafanana naaye okutanga, ndokukwira nawo mugomo ndakaabata mumaoko." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Sapakutanga, Tenzi akanyora pamafendefa iwayo mitemo gumi yamakanga mataurirwa naTenzi ari pagomo paya paya, ari mukati memoto pazuva riya riya romusangano, Tenzi ndokuapa kwandiri." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ndakatendeuka ndokuburuka mugomo. Sokuudzwa kwandakanga ndaitwa, ndakaisa mafendefa aye mubhokisi riya randakanga ndagadzira, arimo nanhasi uno.”" 
Deuteronomy10:6 VaIsiraeri vakabva pamatsime avanhu vokwaJaakani ndokundosvika kuMosera. Ndiko kwakafira Aroni akavigwa ikoko, ndokubva Ereazari mwanakomana wake ava mupristi panzvimbo yababa vake." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Vakasimudzira rwendo rwavo vakaenda kuGudhigodha. Vakazobva paGudhigodha, vakandosvika kuJotibhata nyika yetukova twemvura." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Panguva iyoyo Tenzi akatsaura dzinza raRevhi kuti rive rokutakura bhokisi rechitenderano chaTenzi, nokumushandira nokukomborera vanhu muzita rake kusvikira nhasi uno." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ndokusaka vedzinza raRevhi vasina kupiwa chikamu chenyika kana nhakawo yavo sokutaurirwa kwavakanga vaitwa naTenzi Mwari wavo. 
Deuteronomy10:10 “Sapakutanga paya ndakagara mugomo siku nesikati kwamazuva makumi mana. Tenzi akandinzwawo panguva iyoyo, ndokubva arega kukuparadzai." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Tenzi akanditi chienda utungamirire vanhu kuti vandopinda vatore nyika yandakatsidzira kupa madzitateguru avo.” 
Deuteronomy10:12 “Zvino nhai Isiraeri, Tenzi anoda kuti uiteiko? Anoda kuti utye Tenzi Mwari wako, ufambe nomunzira dzake dzose, umude. Ushandire Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose, nomweya wako wose." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Uteerere mitemo yaTenzi, nemirao yake yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno, kuti zvikunakirei." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Chinzwa, denga kusvikira kwose kwarinoperera chaiko, nenyika nezvose zvirimo, ndezvaTenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Asi Tenzi Mwari wako akafadzwa namadzitateguru ako, akavada. Akazosarudza imi vana vavo mukati memarudzi ose avanhu sezvazviri nhasi uno." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Saka chibvisai mumwoyo menyu zvose zvoumhandupandu izvi, mukande pasi zvose zvoundambakuudzwa," 
Deuteronomy10:17 nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu, “NdiMwari wavamwari, ndiMambo wamadzimambo, mukuru ane simba. NdiMwari anotyisa asina rusaruro, anosema zvepfumbamuromo." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Nherera nechirikadzi anoona kuti dzaitirwa zvine ruenzaniso. Mutorwa anomuda anomupawo zvokudya nezvokupfeka. 
Deuteronomy10:19 “Naizvozvo imi idai mutorwa nokuti makambovawo vatorwa muIjipiti. 
Deuteronomy10:20 “Itya Tenzi Mwari wako umushandire, urambe wakati kwati kwati naye, upike nezita rake." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Ndiye waunofanira kurumbidza, ndiye Mwari wako akakuitira zvinhu zvikuru zvinokatyamadza zvawakaona iwe nameso ako." 
Deuteronomy10:22 “Madzitateguru ako akaenda kuIjipiti vari makumi manomwe avanhu. Asi zvino Tenzi Mwari wako akakuitai kuti muwande senyenyedzi dzedenga.” 
Deuteronomy11:1 “Naizvozvo ida Tenzi, Mwari wako, uteerere zvaakatema, uteerere zvirevo zvake, nemitemo yake, nemirao yake misi yose." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Nhasi uno, (sezvandisiri kutaura kuvana venyu vasingazvizivi vasina kumbozviona;) imimi munoziva kukudzidzisai kwakaita Tenzi Mwari wenyu, munozivawo ukuru hwake nesimba rake," 
Deuteronomy11:3 nezviratidzo zvake, nezvaakaita muIjipiti kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti, nokunyika yake yose;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 nezvaakaita kuhondo yeIjipiti, nokumabhiza avo nengoro dzavo, nokuyeredza kwaakaita hondo yaikuteverai nemvura yeGungwa Dzvuku, namaparadziro avakaitwa naTenzi kusvikira pari nhasi." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Munozivawo zvaakakuitirai murenje musati masvika pano," 
Deuteronomy11:6 nezviya zvakaitwa pakati pavaIsiraeri kuna Dhatani naAbhiramu vanakomana vaEriabhu, wedzinza raRubheni. Munozivawo mubamukiro wakaita nyika, ikashama muromo wayo, ikavamedza ivo nemhuri dzavo, namatendhe avo, nezvipfuwo zvavo zvose zvavaiva nazvo." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Imi makazvionera nameso enyu basa guru rose rakaitwa naTenzi. 
Deuteronomy11:8 “Teererai mitemo yose yandiri kukupai nhasi uno kuti muwane simba mupinde mundotora nyika yamava kuyambukira kwairi kuti muiite yenyu," 
Deuteronomy11:9 uye ndokuti murarame kwenguva ndefu munyika yakatsidzirwa naTenzi kupa madzitateguru enyu navana vavo, nyika yakanaka yomukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ndinodaro nokuti nyika yauri kuenda kundotora haina kufanana nenyika yeIjipiti kwamakabva, kwete, kwamaidyara mbeu muchiita zvokudiridza namaoko sebindu romuriwo." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Asi nyika yamava kuyambukira kundotora kuita yenyu, inyika yezvikomo namapani, inonyoroveswa nemvura inoita zvokunaya mudenga," 
Deuteronomy11:12 inyika inonyatsochengetwa naTenzi, ziso rake haribvi pairi kubvira pakutanga kwegore kusvikira pakupera kwaro." 
Deuteronomy11:13 “Kana machengeta mitemo yandiri kukupai nhasi uno, mukada Tenzi Mwari wenyu, nokumushandira nomwoyo wose, nomweya wenyu wose," 
Deuteronomy11:14 achakunayisirai mvura yomunhuruka neyematsutso nemwaka wayo chaiwo munyika yenyu, kuti unyatsokohwa mbesanwa dzako, newaini yako namafuta." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Achameresa uswa mumafuro ezvipfuwo zvako. Uchawana zvokudya zvakakwana. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Chenjerera kuti ungadaro ukazozvifurira mumwoyo mako, wozvirasisa nzira yako, woshandira vamwe vamwari, wovanamata." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Ukadaro unozvinyandurira hasha dzaTenzi, achapfiga matenga, mvura yorega kunaya, nyika yoshaya kana chainobereka, mobva maparadzwa pasina nenguva yose munyika yakanaka yamunopiwa naTenzi." 
Deuteronomy11:18 “Naizvozvo pfundirai mazwi angu aya, mumwoyo menyu nomumweya wenyu, muasungirire paruoko rwenyu chive chiratidzo, muasungirirewo pahuma dzenyu netsungare." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Adzidzisei vana venyu. Taura nezvawo ugere mumba yako, napaunenge uchifamba munzira, napaunenge uvete, napaunomuka." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Anyore pamagwatidziro epamba yako napamisuo yako mikuru," 
Deuteronomy11:21 kuitira kuti imi navana venyu murarame mazuva akawanda munyika yakatsidzirwa naTenzi kupa madzitateguru enyu nokusingaperi. 
Deuteronomy11:22 “Mukanyatsoteerera mitemo yose iyi yandiri kukupai, mukaichengeta, mukada Tenzi Mwari wenyu nokufamba munzira dzake, nokuramba makangoti kwati kwati naye," 
Deuteronomy11:23 Tenzi achakudzingirai ndudzi dzose idzi munyika dzadzo kuti imi muzotonga ndudzi huru dzakasimba kupinda imi. 
Deuteronomy11:24 Pose pachatsika rutsoka rwenyu pachava penyu. Muganho wenyu uchabvira kurenje kundosvika kuGomo reRebhanoni, kubvirawo kurwizi rukuru rwaYufuratesi kundosvika kugungwa rokumadokero." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Hapana achagona kumirisana nemi, Tenzi achapa kuti kwose kwamuchasvika vanhu voko vachadedera nokukutyai sokutaura kwaakaita." 
Deuteronomy11:26 “Teerera unzwe, nhasi uno ndakuisira zvokusarudza, chikomborero kana rushambwa." 
Deuteronomy11:27 Unowana chikomborero kana ukateerera mitemo yaTenzi Mwari wako yandiri kukupa nhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy11:28 Asi unowana rushambwa kana ukasateerera mitemo yaTenzi Mwari wako wotsauka panzira yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno, wotevera vamwe vamwari vausina kumboziva." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Kana Tenzi Mwari wako azokusvitsa munyika yawava kundoita yako, unofanira kupa chikomborero uri paGomo reGerizimu, worengerera uchishurikidza rushambwa uri paGomo reEbhari.”" 
Deuteronomy11:30 Inga wani makomo iwayo ari munyika yevaKanani vanogara kuArabha, kwakatarisana neGirigari, kumhiri kwaJorodhani kumadokero munyasi momuti womuoku weMore." 
Deuteronomy11:31 “Zvino mava kuyambuka Jorodhani, kundotora nyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu, kana maitora maiita yenyu magara mairi," 
Deuteronomy11:32 chenjererai kuchengeta mirao nezvirevo zvose zvandiri kuisa pamberi penyu nhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy12:1 “Iyi ndiyo mirao nezvirevo zvamunofanira kungwarira kuchengeta, mazuva ose oupenyu hwenyu pasi pano, munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wamadzitateguru ako." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Ndudzi dzamuri kundotorera nyika yadzo dzine nzvimbo dzadzinonamatira vamwari vadzo dziri mumakomo marefu nomuzvikomo nomunyasi momuti wose wakasvibira mashizha. Nzvimbo idzodzo dzose dziparadzei zvokuparadza zviya. 
Deuteronomy12:3 Pazai atari dzavo, muputswe-putswe shongwe dzavo dzamabwe akamiswa, muroromese nomoto zvifananidzo zvakavezwa zvinomiririra mwari wavo Ashera, muteme-teme vamwari vavo vakavezwa, murovese zvachose mazita avo panzvimbo idzodzo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 “Zvakadaro izvozvo, musazviite kuna Tenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Asi muchandonamata Tenzi Mwari wenyu kunzvimbo imwechete yaachasarudza pakati pamadzinza enyu ose, kuisa zita rake achiita musha wake, ndokwamuchaenda ikoko." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Ikoko ndiko kwamuchaunza mipiro yokupisa, nezvibayiro nemipiro yezvegumi, nezvimwe zvipo zvamunopira, nemipiro yezvamunenge makambotsidzira, nemipiro yokupa nokuda kwenyu, nemipiro yamatangwe emombe neezvimwe zvipfuwo zvenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Ipapo pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndipo pamuchadyira, muchifara, imi nemhuri dzenyu pane zvose zvamunoita nesimba ramaoko enyu nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu akakukomborerai." 
Deuteronomy12:8 “Regai kuzoita maitiro atiri kuita pano aya okuti munhu anoita napaanofunga kuti ndipo pakanaka. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Iye zvino hamusati masvika zvenyu kwamuchanyatsogara, kunyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Asi kana mazoyambuka Jorodhani magara munyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ive yenyu, akuzorodzai kuvavengi venyu vose, mava norugare," 
Deuteronomy12:11 munofanira kuunza zvose zvandiri kukurayirai kunzvimbo imwechete ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuisa zita rake pairi. Ndiko kwamuchaunza mipiro yokupisa nezvibayiro nemipiro yezvegumi nezvimwe zvipo zvamunopira, nemipiro yamunenge makambotsidzira kupa kuna Tenzi." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Muchafara muriko pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu, imi navana venyu, vakomana navasikana, navaranda venyu, vechikadzi nevechirume, nevaRevhi vagere mumaguta enyu zvavasina kupiwa nhaka pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Chenjerera kuti urege kungopira panzvimbo pose pose paunenge wangoda mipiro yako yokupisa. 
Deuteronomy12:14 Asi pira panzvimbo imwechete inenge yasarudzwa naTenzi munyika yerimwe dzinza renyu. Ikoko ndiko kwaunofanira kupira mipiro yokupisa nokuita zvose zvandiri kukuudza. 
Deuteronomy12:15 “Asi baya zvako nyama udyire chero muguta rako ripi zvaro sokuda kwako, sokukomborerwa kwaunenge waitwa naTenzi Mwari wako. Inogona kudyiwa zvayo nomunhu anenge an'ora neasina kun'ora sezvamunongoitawo nemhara nemhembwe." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Asi ropa rayo ndiro bedzi ramusingabvumirwi kudya, riregei rirasikire pasi semvura." 
Deuteronomy12:17 “Rega kudyira mumaguta ako mipiro yezvegumi kana yembesanwa kana yewaini, kana yamafuta, kana yamatangwe emombe neezvimwe zvipfuwo zvako kana mupiro zvawo wako wezvawakambotsidzira Mwari kana mipiro yokupa nokuda kwako, kunyange zvimwe zvipo zvaunopira." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Asi zvidyire pana Tenzi Mwari wako, iwe navana vako vakomana navasikana, navaranda vako vechikadzi nevechirume nevaRevhi vanenge vagere mumaguta ako, mufare muchipembera nebasa ramaoko enyu." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Usazorega kuva nehanya nevaRevhi nguva dzose dzaunogara munyika iyoyo. 
Deuteronomy12:20 “Kana Tenzi Mwari wako achinge azokudza-kudza nyika yaari kukupa sokukuvimbisa kwaakaita, ukazoti, ‘Ndava kuda nyama,’ wava nenhomba yenyama, idya zvako nyama yaunoda." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Kana nzvimbo ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wako kuti zita rake rinamatirwe ipapo iri kure newe, ungabaye zvako mombe kana chimwe chipfuwo chako chawakapiwa naTenzi, asi zviite sokurayira kwandakakuita. Idye hako napaunodira mumaguta ako." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Samadyiro anoitwa mhara kana anenge mhembwe, ndiwo madyiro aunoiita. Munhu wose anobvumirwa kuidya zvake, anenge an'ora kana asina." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Asi chenjerera chete kuti urege kudya ropa nokuti ropa ndohupenyu nezvo usadye upenyu pamwechete nenyama yacho. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Rega kudya ropa, asi rirege rirasikire pasi semvura." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Usaridye kuti zvose zvikunakire iwe nezvizvarwa zvako nokuti unenge uchiita zvinofadza Tenzi. 
Deuteronomy12:26 Asi zvinhu zvaunenge watsaurira kuturira Mwari, nezvawakatsidzira kupa kuna Mwari, tora uende nazvo kunzvimbo ichazosarudzwa naTenzi." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Ikoko ndiko kwaunopira mipiro iya yokupisa chibayiro chose zvacho, ropa nenyama yacho zvichiiswa paatari yaTenzi Mwari wako. Asi kana zviri zvimwe zvibayiro, ropa dururira paatari yaTenzi Mwari wako, nyama yacho uchidya zvako." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Nyatsoteerera mitemo yandiri kukupa kuti zvizokunakira iwe nezvizvarwa zvako nokusingaperi nokuti unenge uchiita zvakanaka, zvinofadza Tenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy12:29 “Kana Tenzi Mwari wako aparadza achikudzingira ndudzi munyika yauri kundotora kuita yako, wagara mairi," 
Deuteronomy12:30 chenjerera kuti urege kuteyiwa woda kudzitevedzera. Rega kufeya-feya uchiti, ‘Ko ndudzi idzodzi dzainamata sei vamwari vadzo kuti ndiiteo zvimwechetezvo?’" 
Deuteronomy12:31 Usaite zvakadaro kuna Tenzi Mwari wako nokuti ivo vanoita kuna vamwari vavo zvisingadiwi naTenzi, nezvaanovenga. Vanotopisa mumoto kunyange vana vavo vakomana navasikana vachivapira kuna vamwari vavo." 
Deuteronomy12:32 “Nyatsochengeta zvose zvandiri kukuudza, usambowedzera kana kutapudza chinhu." 
Deuteronomy13:1 “Ngatitii pakati penyu pomuka muporofita kana muroti wehope, anofanokuudzai nechiratidzo nenenji," 
Deuteronomy13:2 achifembera zvichazoitika, zvichizoitika, asi achizoti ngatinamate vamwe vamwari vausingambozivi, tivashandire." 
Deuteronomy13:3 Rega kuteerera zvinotaurwa nomuporofita iyeyo kana muroti wehope iyeyo nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako anenge achitokuedza zvake achida kuona kuti unoda Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose here. 
Deuteronomy13:4 Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiye wamunofanira kutevera, ndiye wamunofanira kuremekedza. Mitemo yake ndiyo yamunofanira kuchengeta. Teererai izwi rake, mumushandire, murambe makati kwati naye." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Asi muporofita iyeyo kana muroti wehope iyeyo ngaaurayiwe, nokuti akafurira vanhu kupandukira Tenzi Mwari wenyu akakuburitsai kuIjipiti, akakununurai muuranda, achikutsautsa munzira yawakanzi naTenzi Mwari wako utevere naizvozvo unobva waita kuti huipi hwakadai hupere pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 “Zvingaitike kuti ungafurirwewo nomukoma kana munun'una wako womumba, kana nomwanasikana wako, kana nomudzimai wako, muswerawakaringa chaiye, kana sahwira, shamwari yako yepamwoyo, ingakutaurire muchivande kuti, ‘Handei tindoshandira vamwe vamwari,’ vasingambozikanwa newe kana madzitateguru ako," 
Deuteronomy13:7 vangave vamwe vamwari vendudzi dzavanhu vagere munharaunda yenyu kana vari chinhambwe, kusvikira kwakaperera nyika," 
Deuteronomy13:8 usabvume kana kuteerera zvaanoreva. Rega kumunzwira tsitsi. Usamurege ari mupenyu. Usamuhwandise uchimunzvengesa kuvanhu. 
Deuteronomy13:9 Asi iwe muuraye chete! Pakumuuraya iwe noruoko rwako ndiwe unotanga kwozotevera vamwe vose. 
Deuteronomy13:10 Muteme namabwe afe nokuti aida kukutsautsa pana Tenzi Mwari wako akakuburitsa munyika yeIjipiti, muuranda." 
Deuteronomy13:11 VaIsiraeri vachazvinzwa vachatya, vakarega kuzoitazve chinhu chakaipa chikadaro pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 “Zvingaitikewo kuti unganzwe kuti mune rimwe guta renyu ramuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu rokugara 
Deuteronomy13:13 mamuka vamwe vanhu vasina maturo vari kukwezvera vanhu vemo kusiriko vachiti, ‘Handei tindoshandira vamwe vamwari,’ vausingambozivi." 
Deuteronomy13:14 Nyatsotsvakiridzai mufeye-feye nokunyatsobvunzisisa nyaya iyoyo. Kana zvikaonekwa kuti ichokwadi, kuti chinhu chakaipa chikadaro chakaitika pakati pavo," 
Deuteronomy13:15 paradzai namapakatwa vanhu vagere muguta iroro zvokuparadza zviya. Munyatsoriparadzawo nezvose zvirimo pamwechete nezvipfuwo zvaimomo. 
Deuteronomy13:16 Zvinhu zvose zvamunowana zvirimo zvitutirei panhandare yomo yakakura muroromese guta iroro nomoto nezvinhu zvaro zvose, Tenzi Mwari wenyu azvione. Riregei rive dongo rakati murwi tuku risina anozorivaka zvakare." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Zvinhu izvozvo zvose zvinenge zvanzi zviparadzwe, usazombobata zvako kunyange chimwe chazvo kuti upodze hasha dzaTenzi, dzinotyisa, akunzwirei nyasha akuitirei tsitsi aite kuti muwande sokutsidzira kwaakaita kumadzitateguru ako." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Ndokunge wateerera izwi raTenzi Mwari wako uchichengeta mitemo yake yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno, kuti uite zvinofadza Tenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy14:1 “Imi muri vana vaTenzi Mwari wenyu. Musazvicheke-cheke kana kuzviveura vhudzi rapahuma dzenyu pamunenge mafirwa. 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ndinodaro nokuti muri rudzi rwavanhu vatsvene vakatsaurirwa Tenzi Mwari wenyu. Tenzi akakusarudza pakati pemarudzi ose epasi pano pose akati muve vanhu vake pachake. 
Deuteronomy14:3 “Usadye chinhu chinosemesa Mwari. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Mhuka dzamungadye ndedzidzi: mombe nehwai nembudzi 
Deuteronomy14:5 nenondo nemhara nemhembwe nembudzi dzomusango nemharapara nengururu. 
Deuteronomy14:6 Mukati memhuka yose ine zondo rakapararana richiita mativi maviri, iriwo mhuka inozeya, ndiyo yamungadye zvenyu." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Musadye dzose dzinozeya asi dziine zondo risina kupararana kana kuti dzine zondo rakapararana asi dzisingazeyi. Musadye nghamera netsuro nembira nokuti kunyange dzichizeya zvadzo, zondo radzo harina kupararana, dzinokun'oresai." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Musadye nguruve nokuti kunyange zvadzo dziine zondo rakapararana hadzizeyi, dzakan'ora kwamuri. Musadye nyama yadzo kana kubata zvitunha zvadzo." 
Deuteronomy14:9 “Pane zvomumvura zvamungadye ndezvizvi zvinoti: zvine zvimbi nezvina makwande. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Asi musadye chose chisina zvimbi namakwande, chakan'ora kwamuri." 
Deuteronomy14:11 “Shiri dzose dzisina kun'ora mungadye zvenyu. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Asi idzi ndidzo shiri dzausingabvumirwi kudya dzinoti; gondo negora nechapungu 
Deuteronomy14:13 norukodzi nenjerere namarudzi ayo 
Deuteronomy14:14 nemhando dzose dzamakunguo 
Deuteronomy14:15 nemhou nedahwa neshiri yegungwa, namarudzi ose oruvangu" 
Deuteronomy14:16 napotono nezizi guru nenhapata 
Deuteronomy14:17 nedhadha romusango, nehungwe nekanyurira" 
Deuteronomy14:18 neshuramurove namarudzi ose ezimudo nemhupupu nomuremwaremwa. 
Deuteronomy14:19 “Zvipembenene zvine mapapiro, zvose zvazvo zvakan'ora kwamuri, hazvidyiwe." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Idyai zvenyu zvose zvine mapapiro zvisina kun'ora. 
Deuteronomy14:21 “Musadye mhuka inenge yafa yoga, ipe zvako mutorwa waugere naye adye hake, kana kuitengesera mubvakure nokuti imi muri rudzi rwavanhu rutsvene rwakatsaurirwa Tenzi Mwari wenyu. Musabike mbudzana mumukaka wamai vayo." 
Deuteronomy14:22 “Unosungirwa kubvisa chegumi pambesanwa dzaunokohwa mumunda mako gore negore," 
Deuteronomy14:23 uchindozvidyira pana Tenzi Mwari wako, panzvimbo yaachasarudza kuisa zita rake. Ipapo ndipo pauchadyira chegumi chembesanwa dzako nechewaini yako nechemafuta ako eorivhi, pamwechete nematangwe emombe dzako nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvako, kuitira kuti udzidze kuremekedza Tenzi Mwari wako nguva dzose." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Kana nzvimbo iyoyo ichinge iri kure nomusha wako zvokuti haugoni kutakura zvegumi zvawakakomborerwa nazvo naTenzi Mwari wako uchienda nazvo ikoko zvaungaite ndezvizvi: 
Deuteronomy14:25 Tengesa zvegumi izvozvo, mari yacho uende nayo kunzvimbo imwechete ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wako," 
Deuteronomy14:26 uzondotenga zvose zvaunoda, mombe kana hwai kana waini kana doro rinodhaka, chero chaunoda zvako udyire pana Tenzi Mwari wako iwe nemhuri yako mupembere muchifara." 
Deuteronomy14:27 “Usazorega kuva nehanya nevaRevhi vaugere navo mumaguta enyu, sezvovasina kupiwa mugove kana nhaka pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy14:28 “Panenge pangopera makore matatu, unganidzai mumaguta enyu chegumi chezvamakawana gore iroro." 
Deuteronomy14:29 VaRevhi sezvo vasina mugove kana nhaka pakati penyu saka ivo pamwechete navatorwa nenherera nechirikadzi dzigere mumaguta enyu vangauye zvavo kuzodya vachiguta, kuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu akukomborerei pabasa ramunobata namaoko enyu." 
Deuteronomy15:1 “Pose panongoti perei gore rechinomwe usareve chikwereti. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Zvamuchaita ndezvizvi: munhu wose anenge akakweretesa mumwe wake chinhu ngaarege kuchireva. Ngaarege kuchibvunza kuhama yake kana kuno mumwe muIsiraeri nokuti zvakataurwa naTenzi zviya zvokusazoreva chikwereti zvinenge zvatovapo. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Ungareve zvako chikwereti kumutorwa, asi rega kuchireva kune mumwe wako muIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy15:4 “Hapachazovi nomurombo pakati penyu nokuti Tenzi achanyatsokukomborerai munyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ive nhaka yenyu. 
Deuteronomy15:5 Ndokunge wanyatsoteerera zvinorehwa naTenzi Mwari wako, uchingwarirawo kuchengeta mitemo yose yandinokupa nhasi uno." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Chandinodariro ndechichi chokuti, Tenzi Mwari wako achakukomborerai sokukutsidzirai kwaakaita. Muchakweretesa dzimwe ndudzi dzavanhu zhinji, asi imi musingambokwereti. Imi muchatonga ndudzi dzavanhu zhinji, asi idzo hadzizokutongii." 
Deuteronomy15:7 “Kana pakati penyu pane murombo ari hama yako muIsiraeri muguta renyu ripi zvaro munyika yenyu yamunopiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu musaomesere mwoyo, kana kutadza kutambanudzira ruoko muchipawo hama yenyu murombo iyeyo." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Asi muitire tsiyenyoro ugomupa chikwereti chinokwanirana nechose chaanenge achida chacho. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Chenjerera kuti urege kufunga zvakaipa mumwoyo mako uchiti, ‘Zvino gore rechinomwe, gore rokusazoreva chikwereti hero rosvika,’ woomesera mwoyo hama yako murombo uchimunyima. Achachema newe kuna Tenzi chikazova chitadzo kwauri." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Mupe zvako wakasununguka usinganyunyuti mumwoyo mako pakumupa kwaunoita nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako anozokukomborera pabasa rako rose nezvose zvaunoti ndoita. 
Deuteronomy15:11 Varombo havazomboperi munyika, naizvozvo ndinokuudza kuti uve noruoko rwakatambanuka runopa hama yako, murombo naasina chokubata ari munyika yenyu." 
Deuteronomy15:12 “Kana watengeserwa hama yako, muHebheru, murume kana mukadzi ngaakushandire kwamakore matanhatu. Kana gore rechinomwe rasvika murege abve kwauri aende zvake murusununguko." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Paunomurega achibva kwauri achienda zvake murusununguko, usamurege achienda asina chokubata." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Mupewo dzimwe mbudzi dzako nehwai dzako nembesanwa dzako neimwe waini yako, usingaite kanyimiramundiro. Mupe maererano nokukomborerwa kwawakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Rangarira kuti wakanga uri muranda kuIjipiti, ukazonunurwa naTenzi Mwari wako, saka ndichikuudza mutemo iwoyu nhasi uno." 
Deuteronomy15:16 “Asi kana muranda wako akati, ‘Handidi zvangu kusiyana nemi,’ achidaro nokuti anofarira iwe nemhuri yako achigarawo newe zvakanaka zvichimunakirawo kugara newe," 
Deuteronomy15:17 pakadaro apo tora mutsunda, uboorere nzeve yake pagonhi, anobva ava muranda wako narini, kana ari muranda wechikadzi itawo saizvozvo kwaari." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Paunopa rusununguko muranda wako kuti aende zvake, ngachirege kuva chinhu chakakuomera nokuti basa raakakuitira kwamakore matanhatu rinopfuura basa rinoitwa nomushandi anotambiriswa mari rwakapetwa ruviri. Pakadaro Tenzi Mwari wako achakukomborera kakapetwa ruviri pane zvose zvaunoita." 
Deuteronomy15:19 “Matangwe ose emombe dzako neezvimwe zvipfuwo zvako anenge ari mikono, atsaurire Tenzi Mwari wako. Usaitise basa matangwe emombe kana kuveura makushe amatangwe ezvimwe zvipfuwo zvako." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Gore negore enda nemhuri yako undoadyira kuna Tenzi Mwari wako panzvimbo yaanenge asarudza. 
Deuteronomy15:21 Asi kana chipfuwo ichocho chine chinoshoreka pachiri, sezvakaita kuremara kana kupofomara kana chimwe chakaipa zvikuru, usachiite chibayiro kuna Tenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Chidyirei zvenyu mumaguta enyu. Munhu wose angachidye zvake, anenge an'ora kana asina, semadyiro anoitwa mhara kana mhembwe." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Asi ropa racho ndiro chete ramusingadye riregei rirasikire pasi semvura. 
Deuteronomy16:1 “Rangarira mwedzi waAbhibhi ugoita Mabiko ePasika yaTenzi Mwari wako nokuti mumwedzi waAbhibhi Tenzi Mwari wako akakuburitsa muIjipiti nousiku. 
Deuteronomy16:2 Unofanira kupira chibayiro chePasika kuna Tenzi Mwari wako chichibva mumatanga ezvimwe zvipfuwo kana emombe dzako undopira panzvimbo yaachasarudza kuti aise zita rake. 
Deuteronomy16:3 Mabiko acho usaadye nechingwa chine mbiriso. Pedza mazuva manomwe uchiadya nechingwa chisina mbiriso, chingwa chomunhamo, kuitira kuti muupenyu hwako hwose urangarire zuva rawakabuda muIjipiti uchiita zvechimbichimbi kutiza." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Mumazuva manomwe iwayo ngakurege kuva nomunhu anoonekwa aine mbiriso munyika yenyu yose. Nyamawo yechibayiro chamunopira manheru ezuva rokutanga ngairege kusvika mangwana ichiripo. 
Deuteronomy16:5 “Pamaguta ose aunopiwa naTenzi Mwari wako, haubvumirwi kupira chibayiro chePasika muguta rose rose zvaro," 
Deuteronomy16:6 asi panzvimbo ichasarudzwa naiye Tenzi Mwari wako kuti aise zita rake. Ipapo ndipo pauchapira chibayiro chePasika manheru zuva rovira, panguva yawakabuda muIjipiti." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Nyama yacho bikira nokuidyira panzvimbo ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wako. Mangwanani acho wofumodzokera zvako kwauri kugara. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Unofanira kudya chingwa chisina mbiriso kwamazuva manomwe. Pazuva rechinomwe unganidzanai pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu muite musangano mukuru. Regai kuita basa musi iwoyo. 
Deuteronomy16:9 “Unofanira kuverenga mavhiki manomwe, utange kuaverenga kubvira panguva yaunotanga kusimudzira jeko kucheka mbesa dzako mumunda," 
Deuteronomy16:10 wozoitira Tenzi Mwari wako zuva guru rokupemberera kukohwa wakabata chipo chomupiro wokupa nokuda kwako waunopa maererano nokukomborerwa kwawakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy16:11 Pembera uchifara pana Tenzi Mwari wako panzvimbo yaakasarudza kuisa zita rake iwe navana vako vakomana navasikana, nomuranda wako wechikadzi newechirume nomuRevhi agere muguta rako, nomutorwa nenherera nechirikadzi vari pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Rangarira kuti waiva muranda muIjipiti, saka chenjerera kuchengeta mirao iyoyi." 
Deuteronomy16:13 “Munofanira kuchengeta Mazuva Makuru aMatumba kwamazuva manomwe mapedza kupura nokusvina magirepisi enyu. 
Deuteronomy16:14 Pembera uchifara pamazuva ako iwayo, iwe navanakomana vako navanasikana vako navaranda vako vechikadzi nevechirume pamwechete navaRevhi nenherera nechirikadzi vari mumaguta enyu." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Mazuva manomwe ngaaperere mukupemberera Tenzi Mwari wako muri panzvimbo yaachasarudza nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako achakukomborera pane zvaunokohwa zvose nebasa rose ramaoko ako, mugonyatsofara zvenyu." 
Deuteronomy16:16 “Vanhu venyu vose vechirume vanofanira kuuya kuna Tenzi Mwari wenyu katatu pagore, kunzvimbo yaachasarudza. Ngavauye paMazuva eChingwa Chisina Mbiriso, napaMazuva Makuru aMavhiki oKupemberera Kukohwa napaMazuva Makuru aMatumba. Hapana anouya akangobata maoko chete." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Munhu wese anofanira kupa sokugona kwake maererano nokukomborerwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wako kwaanenge akupa. 
Deuteronomy16:18 “Unofanira kusarudza vatongi namakurukota mumaguta ako ose aunopiwa naTenzi Mwari wako mudzinza nedzinza. Ngavaite ruenzaniso pakutonga kwavanoita vanhu. 
Deuteronomy16:19 Usatsaudzire pakutonga. Rega kunyara maziso avanhu. Usagamuchire pfumbamuromo nokuti pfumbamuromo inodzimaidza munhu ane ungwaru, inopa kuti munhu akarurama ataure zvake zvisizvo." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Saka ruenzaniso, ruenzaniso chete ndirwo rwaunosungirwa kutevedza kuitira kuti urarame ugogara nhaka yenyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy16:21 “Rega kudzika chimuti chinomiririra Ashera pedyo neatari yaTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy16:22 Regawo kumisa chero chimufananidzo zvacho chisingadiwi naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy17:1 “Usape Tenzi Mwari wako chibayiro chemombe kana chehwai ine chimwe chinoshoreka pairi kana ine chimwe chakaremara nokuti zvakadaro izvo zvinhu zvisingambodiwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy17:2 “Zvingaitike kuti unganzwe kuti pakati penyu, mune rimwe guta renyu ramuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu mune mumwe murume kana mukadzi anoita chinhu chakaipa pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu" 
Deuteronomy17:3 achityora chitenderano chaMwari. Munhu iyeyo akandoshandira vamwe vamwari achivapfugamira zvandisina kumboti muite, vamwari vacho vangava zuva kana mwedzi kana nyenyedzi dzegwara ravatonga," 
Deuteronomy17:4 kana zvabuda pachena, wazvinzwa, nyatsozvitsvakiridzawo ukachiona chiri chokwadi chaichoicho kuti chinhu chakaipa chikadai chakaitika muIsiraeri, murume kana mukadzi iyeyo akaita chinhu chakaipa chikadai ngaaendwe naye kusuo renyu guru." 
Deuteronomy17:5 Murume kana mukadzi iyeyo akaita chinhu chakaipa chikadai ngaaendwe naye kusuo renyu guru. Murume wacho kana mukadzi wacho ngaatemwe namatombo afe. 
Deuteronomy17:6 Munhu anenge achifanira kufa angaurayiwe chete kana paine umboo hwezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu. Munhu haaurayiwe kana pachingova nechapupu chimwechete. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Zvapupu, namaoko azvo, ndizvo zvinotanga kumutema pakumuuraya, kwozoteverawo vamwe vose. Naizvozvo munobva maita kuti huipi hwakadai hupere pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy17:8 “Mumaguta enyu mungangoparwa mhosva pakati penyu dzamunenge musingakwanisi kunyatsopatsanura, ingave mhosva yokuti akaponda munhu here kana kuti akamuuraya mukusaziva, kana kuti imwe mhosva inodarika mutemo uyu kana uyu, kana kuti kukuvadzwa kwakaitwa munhu kwakaitwa sei, kana kuti ndiani ane mhosva kana asina, pakadaro endai kunzvimbo ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu" 
Deuteronomy17:9 kuvapristi, vechiRevhi nokumutongi anenge ariko mazuva iwayo, muvasumire nyaya iyoyo vachatema chirango kana kukutaurirai kuti pane mhosva here kana kuti hapana." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Zvose zvinotemwa kunzvimbo ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu munosungirwa kuzviita nomazvo. Munyatsoita zvose zvavanenge vakutaurirai nomazvo. 
Deuteronomy17:11 Tevedzai zvavanokurongerai nomazvo, muite zvavanenge vati muite musingatsaudzire moita zvomusoro wenyu." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Munhu anenge azvitutumadza asingateerere mupristi anenge ari ipapo pabasa raTenzi Mwari wako kana kuteerera mutongi, munhu iyeyo ngaafe naizvozvo unobva wabvisa huipi hwakadai muIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Vanhu vose vachazvinzwa vakatya vakarega kuzozvitutumadzazve. 
Deuteronomy17:14 “Kana uchinge wazosvika munyika yaunopiwa naTenzi Mwari wako waitora wagarikana ukazoti, ‘Regai tichigadza mambo wedu anotitonga sezvakaita mamwe marudzi ari munharaunda yedu,’" 
Deuteronomy17:15 gadzai zvenyu umambo munhu anenge asarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wako. Gadzai umambo munhu worudzi rwenyu. Musagadze mutorwa, munhu asiri worudzi rwenyu kuti akutongei." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Asi chete ngaarege kuwanza mabhiza ake, kana kuita kuti vanhu vadzokere kuIjipiti kundotsvaka mamwe mabhiza okuwedzera sezvo Tenzi akakutii, ‘Musazodzokerazve nokwakareko.’" 
Deuteronomy17:17 Ngaarege kuva navakadzi vazhinji nokuti vangazomurasisa. Ngaarege kuita matutu matutu emari yesirivha kana ndarama. 
Deuteronomy17:18 Paanenge agadzwa umambo munyika yake, ngaazvinyorere bhuku romutemo kubva mubhuku rawo rinochengetwa navapristi vechiRevhi," 
Deuteronomy17:19 agare naro, ariverenge mazuva ose oupenyu hwake. Ndizvo zvinozoita kuti adzidze kutya Tenzi Mwari wake, achengete zvinorehwa nomutemo uyu nemirao iyi azviite." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Saka haazozvikudza pakati pehama dzake, otsauka pamutemo oita zvomusoro wake. Saizvozvo anozogara upenyu hwakareba munyika yaanotonga, iye navana vake, muIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy18:1 “Vapristi vechiRevhi vose zvavo vedzinza raRevhi havafaniri kuva nomugove kana nhaka yenyika pakati pevaIsiraeri. Chokudya chavo chinobva pamipiro inoita zvokupiswa kuna Tenzi nezvimwe zvaanopirwa. 
Deuteronomy18:2 Ngavarege kuva nenhaka yenyika pakati pehama dzavo, Tenzi ndiye nhaka yavo sezvaakavatsidzira." 
Deuteronomy18:3 “Izvi ndizvo zvinofanira kupiwa vapristi zvichibva pane zvinopirwa navanhu ingave iri mombe kana hwai, ngavape mupristi bandauko neshaya mbiri nenyama yamakuru." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Mupe mbesa dzako dzokutanga, newaini yako yokutanga, namafuta ako eorivhi aunotanga kusvina, nemvere dzehwai dzako dzaunotanga kuveura." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako akasarudza iye navana vake pamadzinza enyu ose kuti vamiririre Tenzi vachishanda muzita rake. 
Deuteronomy18:6 “Kana muRevhi achida zvake angabve mune rimwe guta reIsiraeri yose maagere, achiuya kunzvimbo ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy18:7 Ipapo angashande zvake muzita raTenzi Mwari wake sezvinoita vamwe vake vaRevhi vanomiririra pana Tenzi vachishandapo. 
Deuteronomy18:8 Pane zvokudya ngavapiwe migove yakaenzana tisingataure zvavanowana panotengeswa zvinhu zvenhaka dzamadzibaba avo. 
Deuteronomy18:9 “Kana wazosvika munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako rega kutevedzera tsika dzinosemesa dzinoitwa namarudzi avanhu ivavo. 
Deuteronomy18:10 Pakati penyu ngaparege kuva nomunhu anopisa mumoto mwana wake, mukomana kana musikana somupiro. Hapafanire kuva nomunhu anoshopera, kana anofembera nemaminimini, kana anoita un'anga hwokududzira mashura, kana munhu akaromba mishonga," 
Deuteronomy18:11 kana anoita mapipi, kana kuva svikiro, kana ane shave rouroyi, kana anobvunzira kumidzimu" 
Deuteronomy18:12 nokuti Tenzi haambodi zvake ani naani anoita zvakaipa zvakadai. Pamusana pezviito zvinosemesa izvozvi Tenzi Mwari wenyu ari kufanokudzingirai marudzi avanhu iwayo. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Saka imi rambai muri pachokwadi muchitevera Tenzi Mwari wenyu musina chinongo.
