Deuteronomy18:14 “Ndinodaro nokuti ndudzi dzavanhu dzamuri kuzodzinga munyika dzadzo dzinovimba navanofembera vachiita zvemaminimini nevanoshopera, asi imi Tenzi Mwari wenyu haakubvumidzei kuita izvozvo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Tenzi Mwari wenyu achakumutsirai muporofita akaita seni achibva mukati menyu, hama yenyu chaiyo, iyeyo ndiye wacho wokuteerera." 
Deuteronomy18:16 “Handiti musi uya, takaungana paGomo reSinai makakumbira Tenzi Mwari wenyu muchiti, ‘Dai waro tachirega zvedu kunge tichanzwa Tenzi achitaura, kana kuramba tichiona zimoto iri nokuti tingafe.’" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Tenzi ndokunditi, ‘Zvavataura zvose izvi zvakanaka." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndichavamutsira muporofita akaita sewe achibva mavari paukama hwavo. Ndichamupa mashoko angu. Achavataurira zvose zvandinoti avaudze. 
Deuteronomy18:19 Munhu asingateerere mashoko angu aachataura anozviona neni. 
Deuteronomy18:20 Asi muporofita anotaura mashoko muzita rangu, ini ndisina kumutuma kana anotaura mashoko muzita ravamwe vamwari, muporofita iyeyo anofanira kufa.’" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Mungadaro mukazvibvunza mumwoyo menyu kuti, ‘Tingazoziva sei shoko rinenge risina kunge rataurwa naTenzi?’" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Kana muporofita akataura chinhu muzita raTenzi, chinhu chacho chikarega kuzoitika kana kuzovapo, ndicho chinhu chinenge chisina kutaurwa naTenzi. Muporofita iyeyo anenge akangotaura zvomusoro wake, regai kumutya." 
Deuteronomy19:1 “Kana Tenzi Mwari wako akudzingira marudzi ane nyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako, ukange wavatorera nyika wogara mumaguta avo nomudzimba dzavo," 
Deuteronomy19:2 munofanira kuzvitsaurira maguta matatu munyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ive yenyu. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Ganhurai nyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu muzvikamu zvitatu, mugadzire nzira dzinoenda kumaguta acho kuitira kuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe atizire kundopoterako." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Iwoyu ndiwo murao wokuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe mukusaziva pasina ruvengo akange atizirako apunyuke rufu. 
Deuteronomy19:5 Zvingaitike kuti munhu oenda musango kundotema miti aine mumwe wake, poti achitema muti kudaro, demo rake roguka rotema mumwe wake obva afa. Nyakuuraya mumwe ngaatizire kune rimwe ramaguta iwayo kundopoterako apunyuke rufu." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Kana kokutizira kukaita kure, mutsivi weropa rehama angadaro akamuronda akamubata panzira, nehasha dzaanenge anadzo akamuuraya iye asingakodzere kuurayiwa nokuti anga asingavenge mumwe wake." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ndokusaka ndichikutii munofanira kuzvitsaurira maguta matatu. 
Deuteronomy19:8 “Kana Tenzi Mwari wako azokudza-kudza nyika sokutsidza kwaakaitira madzitateguru ako achikupa nyika yose yaakati achavapa 
Deuteronomy19:9 ndokungewoka watochengeta mitemo iyoyi yose yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno uchida Tenzi Mwari wako, uchifamba munzira dzake dzose nguva dzose. Ipapo ndopaunofanira kunge wowedzera mamwe maguta matatu pamatatu aye aye" 
Deuteronomy19:10 nokuti ropa risina mhaka ringangoteurwa mukati menyika yenyu yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ive nhaka yenyu mukazova nemhosva yokudeura ropa. 
Deuteronomy19:11 “Asi kana munhu achivenga mumwe wake akamuhwandira akamurwisa akamukuvadza zvakaipisisa akafa, nyakumuuraya akatizira kune rimwe ramaguta aya," 
Deuteronomy19:12 vakuru vakuru vomuguta rake ngavatume vanhu kundomutora ikoko vamuise mumaoko meanofanira kutsiva ropa rehama yake kuti aurayiwe. 
Deuteronomy19:13 Rega kumuitira tsiyenyoro asi bvisa mhosva yeropa risina mhaka muIsiraeri kuti zvikufambire zvakanaka. 
Deuteronomy19:14 “Usasudurudze chitata chamabwe chomuganho womunda womumwe wako chakaiswa navakuru vekare mumana rako munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy19:15 “Munhu haanganzi ane mhosva noumboo hwechapupu chimwechete pamhosva ipi neipi yaanonzi akapara kana akakanganisa. Panotosungirwa kuva nezvapupu zviviri kana zvitatu kuti anzi ane mhosva. 
Deuteronomy19:16 Kana chapupu chenhema chikasimuka chichipomedzera munhu kuti akakanganisa," 
Deuteronomy19:17 pakadaro vose vari vaviri ngavandomira pana Tenzi padare ravapristi navatongi vari pabasa mazuva iwayo. 
Deuteronomy19:18 Vatongi ngavanyatsobvunzurudza. Kana zvikabuda pachena kuti uchapupu hwake ndohwenhema anga achingopomera mhosva mumwe wake zvisizvo," 
Deuteronomy19:19 ngaapiwe chirango chakarecho chaanga achida kuti mumwe wake apiwe. Nokudaro uchabvisa huipi hwakadai pakati penyu. 
Deuteronomy19:20 Vamwe vose vachazvinzwa, vakatya vakarega kuzoitazve chakaipa chakadai mukati menyu." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Usamuitire tsiyenyoro upenyu ngahutsiviwe noupenyu, ziso neziso, zino ngaritsiviwe nezino, ruoko noruoko, gumbo richitsiviwawo negumbo." 
Deuteronomy20:1 “Kana moenda kuhondo kundorwa navavengi venyu musazoti kana maona mabhiza mazhinji nengoro nehondo yakakura kupinda yenyu mobva mavatya nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu akakuburitsai kuIjipiti, anemi." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Kana moda kumirisana kurwa hondo, mupristi ngaauye azotaura kuvarwi achiti," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ‘Teererai munzwe imi vaIsiraeri! Nhasi uno mava kuenda kundorwa navavengi venyu. Musaite umbwende kana mwoyo wokutya. Regai kubvunda kana kuvazeza 
Deuteronomy20:4 nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiye ari kuenda nemi kundokurwisirai vavengi venyu achiita kuti muvakunde.’ 
Deuteronomy20:5 “Vatungamiriri vehondo vanozoti, ‘Pane munhu here akavaka imba yaasati aturira kuna Mwari? Ngaadzokere kuimba yake angadaro akafa muhondo iyi imba yake ikatozoturirwa nomumwewo munhu kuna Mwari." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Pane munhu here akasima munda wake wamagirepisi aasati adya michero yayo? Ngaadzokere kumusha angadaro akafa muhondo iyi michero yacho ikazodyiwa hayo nomumwe. 
Deuteronomy20:7 Pane munhu here achangobva mukuroora asati apiwa mudzimai wake? Ngaadzokere kumusha angadaro akafa muhondo iyi, mudzimai wake akazotorwa nomumwe murume.’" 
Deuteronomy20:8 “Vatungamiriri vehondo ngavazobvunzawo varwi vachiti, ‘Pane munhu here ari kutya kana ane ruzazu? Ngaadzokere kumusha nokuti angazadze vamwe mweya woumbwende.’" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Kana vatungamiriri vapedza kutaura mozosarudza vatungamiriri vezvikwata zvakasiyana-siyana zvavarwi. 
Deuteronomy20:10 “Kana masvika paguta romoda kurwisa tangai mambovapa mukana wokuti muwirirane navo murege kurwa. 
Deuteronomy20:11 Kana vada zvokuwirirana nemi, vakakuzarurirai misuo mikuru yeguta ravo, vanhu vose veguta iroro vatova varanda venyu, vachakushandirai chibharo." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Asi kana vakaramba kuwirirana nemi, vakada zvehondo nemi kombai guta ravo murigaririre." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Kana Tenzi Mwari wenyu aisa guta iroro mumaoko menyu urayai vanhu vechirume vose vemo nebakatwa. 
Deuteronomy20:14 Asi vakadzi navana nemombe nezvimwe zvose zvomugutamo pamwechete nezvose zvaunenge wapamba, tora zvako. Idya zvako upfumi hwaunenge watorera vavengi vako vakaiswa mumaoko mako naTenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Izvozvo ndizvo zvauchaita namaguta anenge ari kure kure newe asiri amarudzi avanhu vokuno. 
Deuteronomy20:16 “Kana zviri zvemaguta amarudzi avanhu vomunyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako kuti ive yako, usambosiya zvako kana chinhu chinofema chiri chipenyu." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Paradza zvokuparadza chaizvo vanhu ava vanoti: vaHiti nevaAmori nevaKanani nevaPerizi nevaHivhi nevaJebhusi sokuudzwa kwawakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy20:18 Izvozvo kunenge kuri kuitira kuti varege kuzokudzidzisa maitiro ose avo anosemesa avanoita pakunamata vamwari vavo ukazotadzira Tenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy20:19 “Kana mukakomba guta, mukarigaririra kwenguva ndefu muchirirwisa muchida kurikurira, musateme miti yaro nokuti munogona kudya michero yayo. Regai kuparadza miti. Ko miti ndovanhu here vamungakomberane kurwisa?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Asi miti yaunoziva kuti haidyiwi ndiyo yaungaparadze uchiitemera kuvaka matanho okurwisa nawo guta raunenge uchirwisana naro kudzamara warikurira. 
Deuteronomy21:1 “Ngatiti munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako kuti ive yako mowanikwa chitunha chomunhu akaurayiwa chiri musango pasingazikanwi munhu akamuuraya," 
Deuteronomy21:2 vakuru vakuru venyu navatongi ngavauye vaere kubvira pane chitunha kuenda kumaguta ose ari pedyo nacho. 
Deuteronomy21:3 Vakuru vakuru vomuguta rinenge riri pedyo nacho kupinda mamwe ose, ngavatore tsiru risina kumboitiswa basa kana kusungwa pajoko." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Vakuru vakuru ivavo ngavaende netsiru racho kubani kukakova kane mvura inoerera kusina kumborimwa kana kudyarwa, vosvikorityorera mutsipa kukakova ikoko." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Vapristi vechiRevhi ngavaendeko nokuti ndivo vakasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti vamushandire nokukomborera muzita raiye Tenzi. Zvavanenge vatema ivo ndizvo zvinopedza mhosva dzose dzokukakavadzana nedzokupondana. 
Deuteronomy21:6 Ipapo vakuru vakuru vose vomuguta riri pedyo nepakaurayirwa munhu iyeyo ngavashambire maoko avo pamusoro petsiru riya rinenge ratyorwa mutsipa mubani 
Deuteronomy21:7 vachiti, ‘Isu hatizisu takadeura ropa iri, uye isu kana nameso edu kuriona richideurwa." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Tenziwe-e, regereraiwo vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri vamakanunura. Musape vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri mhosva yokudeura ropa romunhu asina mhaka.’ Mhosva yokudeura ropa romunhu ngairege kuva pavari." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Naizvozvo munobva mashamba mhosva yokudeura ropa romunhu asina mhaka mukati menyu nokunge maita zvakanaka zvinofadza Tenzi. 
Deuteronomy21:10 “Kana ukaenda kuhondo kundorwa navavengi vako, Tenzi Mwari wako akaisa vavengi vako mumaoko ako ukavatapa," 
Deuteronomy21:11 kana ukaona mukadzi ane chimiro chakanaka pakati penhapwa idzodzo waungade kuroora," 
Deuteronomy21:12 enda naye kumba kwako. Ngaaveure vhudzi rake, achekewo nzara dzake," 
Deuteronomy21:13 abvise hanzu yake yaakanga akapfeka paakatapwa. Achaita mwedzi wose achichema baba namai vake agere mumba mako, wozobva wopinda naye mumba, iwe wova murume wake iye achivawo mukadzi wako." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Kana usisamude murege zvake aende kwaanoda. Haubvumirwi kumutengesa nemari kana kumutora somuranda nokuti wakamukanganisa. 
Deuteronomy21:15 “Kana murume ane vakadzi vaviri mumwe waanoda nomumwe waasisadi vakamuberekera vana vakomana vaviri dangwe riri rouya waasingadi," 
Deuteronomy21:16 pazuva raanogovera vana vake nhaka ngaarege kutora mwana womukadzi waanoda omuti ndiye dangwe achisiya mwana womukadzi waasisadi anenge ariye dangwe. 
Deuteronomy21:17 Ngaatore dangwe sedangwe, iye mwana womukadzi waasisade wacho. Ngaaratidze izvozvo nokumupa chikamu chenhaka chakapetwa yezvaanazvo zvose kaviri nokuti ndiye mwana wake waakatanga-tanga kubereka, ane mvumo yokuwana zvose zvoudangwe." 
Deuteronomy21:18 “Kana munhu ane mhandupandu netsvuuramuromo yemwana asingateereri baba namai vake kunyange vachimurayira zvavo, iye asingavanzwi," 
Deuteronomy21:19 baba namai vake ngavamutore vaende naye kuvakuru vakuru veguta, rake raanogara pasuo raro." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Ngavataurire vakuru vakuru veguta vachiti, ‘Mwana wedu uyu imhandupandu netsvuuramuromo yomwana, haatiteerere anokara uye chidhakwa.’" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Varume vose vomuguta rake ngavamuteme namabwe afe. Nokudaro muchabvisa huipi hwakadai pakati penyu zvokuti vaIsiraeri vose vachazvinzwa vakatya. 
Deuteronomy21:22 “Kana munhu apara mhosva inokodzera rufu, imi mukamuuraya mukazomuturika pamuti," 
Deuteronomy21:23 chitunha chake ngachirege kurara usiku hwose chiripo. Chivigei zuva rakarero nokuti munhu anenge aturikwa pamuti anenge ashorwa zvakanyanyisisa, naTenzi. Regai kun'oresa nyika yenyu yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ive nhaka yenyu." 
Deuteronomy22:1 “Rega kuti ukaona mombe kana hwai yehama yako muIsiraeri ichitetereka woita sousingaioni, idzorere kwaari." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Kana asiri pedyo newe usingamuzivi enda nayo undoichengeta kumusha kwako kusvikira mumwe wako uya aibvunza, unofanira kumudzosera." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Izvozvo ndozvauchaita kana waona dhongi rake kana hanzu yake kana chimwe chinhu zvacho chomumwe wako chaanenge arasa. Usaite sousina hanya nacho. 
Deuteronomy22:4 “Kana ukaona mombe kana dhongi romumwe wako muIsiraeri rawira pasi pamugwagwa usaite sousina hanya naro. Mubatsire kurimutsa. 
Deuteronomy22:5 “Munhukadzi ngaarege kupfeka hanzu dzinopfekwa nomunhurume. Munhurume ngaarege kupfeka hanzu dzinopfekwa navakadzi. Ani naani anoita izvozvo anosemesa Tenzi Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy22:6 “Kana ukaona dendere reshiri mumuti kana pasi zvapo munenge muine shiri yakavhumbamira manyana ayo, kana kurindira mazai ayo, usabate mai vacho nokutorawo manyana ayo kana mazai ayo." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Rega mai vacho vaende zvavo, ugotora zvako manyana kuti zvikufambire zvakanaka urarame panyika kwamazuva mazhinji." 
Deuteronomy22:8 “Kana wavaka imba itsva ine denga rakati sandara vakira kumucheto kwaro chinodzivirira kuti vanofambapo varege kutozomoka. Kana wadaro hauzovi nemhosva yeropa romunhu angangotozomokapo. 
Deuteronomy22:9 “Usadyare mbeu mbiri mumunda wako wemagirepisi. Kana ukangodaro, mbeu dzawakadyaramo nemichero yemagirepisi zvava kuera kwauri." 
Deuteronomy22:10 “Usarime nemombe nedhongi zvakasungwa pajoko rimwechete. 
Deuteronomy22:11 “Usapfeke hanzu yakarukwa neshinda dzemhando dzakasiyana yewuru neyerineni pamwechete. 
Deuteronomy22:12 “Sonerera masa pamakona mana echari yaunofuka. 
Deuteronomy22:13 “Kana murume akaroora mukadzi akagara naye akazoti haachamuda," 
Deuteronomy22:14 achimufumura nezvaanomupomera nokuipisa zita rake achiti, ‘Ndakatora mukadzi uyu asi ndakamuwana asisina umhandara.’" 
Deuteronomy22:15 “Zvino baba namai vomukadzi iyeyo ngavaunze zvinoratidza kuti paiva noumhandara kuvakuru vakuru kusuo reguta. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Baba vomukadzi iyeyo vachaudza vakuru vakuru vachiti, ‘Ini ndakaroodza mwana wangu kumurume uyu. Zvino haachamuda." 
Deuteronomy22:17 Hezvo akamufumura achimupomera kuti haana kuwana umhandara pamwana wangu. Asi zvinoratidza umhandara hwake ndezvizvi.’ Vachabva vatambanudza jira pameso avakuru vakuru veguta. 
Deuteronomy22:18 Vakuru vakuru vaya ngavatore murume wacho vamurove. 
Deuteronomy22:19 Ngavamuripise mari inokwana zana remari yesirivha, vaipe baba womukadzi wake nokuti akasvibisa zita remhandara yeIsiraeri. Acharamba ari mukadzi wake uye murume iyeyo haabvumirwi kuzoramba mukadzi iyeyo upenyu hwake hwose." 
Deuteronomy22:20 “Asi kana chiri chokwadi chokuti zvinoratidza umhandara hwomusikana iyeyo hazvina kuonekwa," 
Deuteronomy22:21 ngaaunzwe kumusuo wemba yababa vake. Varume vomuguta iroro ngavamuteme namatombo afe nokuti akaita unzenza muIsiraeri nokuita ufeve ari pamba pababa vake. Nokudaro muchaita kuti huipi hwakadai hupere pakati penyu. 
Deuteronomy22:22 “Kana murume abatwa akarara nomukadzi womuridzi, gombarume iroro nomukadzi iyeyo vose vari vaviri ngavaurayiwe kuitira kuti mubvise huipi hwakadai pakati pevaIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy22:23 “Ngatiti mhandara ichangobva mukuroorwa yaonekwa nomumwe murume muguta obva arara nayo. 
Deuteronomy22:24 Vatorei muende navo kugedhi kusuo guru romuguta iroro muvateme namabwe vafe, vose vari vaviri. Musikana anofira nyaya yokuti kunyange zvake aiva muguta haana kuridza mhere. Murume anofirawo nyaya yokufumura mukadzi womuridzi. Naizvozvo muchaita kuti huipi hwakadai upere pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 “Asi kana murume akaona mhandara musango ichangobva kuroorwa akaibata chibharo, murume iyeyo chete akavata naye, ndiye anofanira kuurayiwa." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Asi musikana iyeyo musamurange. Haana mhosva inokodzera rufu. Mhosva yakadai yakafanana nemhosva yemunhu anomukira mumwe wake achimuuraya. 
Deuteronomy22:27 Ndinodaro nokuti murume uyu akasangana nemhandara iyi musango, kunyange dai yakaridza zvayo mhere hapana aiinunura." 
Deuteronomy22:28 “Kana murume akaona mhandara isati yaroorwa akaibata chibharo kana vakawanikidzwa," 
Deuteronomy22:29 murume iyeyo ngaape baba vomusikana makumi mashanu emari yesirivha. Musikana iyeyo achava mukadzi wake nokuti akamufumura. Haabvumirwi kurambana nomukadzi iyeyo upenyu hwake hwose. 
Deuteronomy22:30 “Hakuna munhu anobvumirwa kutorana nomukadzi wababa wake nokuti anenge azvidza baba vake nokupinda mumba mavo kwaanenge aita. 
Deuteronomy23:1 “Hakuna munhurume ane zvombo zvake zvakakuvadzwa kana zvakachekwa anobvumirwa kuva nhengo yesangano raTenzi. 
Deuteronomy23:2 “Mwana womudondo haabvumirwi kuva nhengo yesangano raTenzi, iye kana vana vake kudzamara kuchizvarwa chake chechigumi." 
Deuteronomy23:3 “Hakuna muAmoni kana muMoabhu anobvumirwa kuva nhengo yesangano raTenzi narini wose, iye kana vana vake kusvikira kuchizvarwa chake chechigumi" 
Deuteronomy23:4 nokuti havana kukuchingurai nechokudya kana nemvura yokunwa pamaibva kuIjipiti, uye nokuti vakakudaidzirawo Bhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori wokuguta rePetori riri kuMesopotamia kuzokurengererai rushambwa." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Asi Tenzi Mwari wako haana kuteerera Bhiriamu, akasandura kurengererwa rushambwa ikoko akaita kuti kuve chikomborero nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako akakuda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Usambotsvaka kuwirirana navo kana kuvabatsira muupenyu hwako hwose narini wose. 
Deuteronomy23:7 “Usashore muEdhomu nokuti ihama yako. Usashore muIjipiti nokuti iwe wakambovawo mutorwa munyika yake. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Vana vavo vechizvarwa chechitatu, ndivo vanozobvumirwa zvavo kuva nhengo yesangano raTenzi." 
Deuteronomy23:9 “Kana maenda kundorwa navavengi venyu muri pamusasa muzvichengetedze imi pachenyu kuzvinhu zvakaipa. 
Deuteronomy23:10 Kana pakati penyu pane mumwe akan'ora nokuzvirotera anofanira kundogara kunze kwomusasa amborega kupindamo. 
Deuteronomy23:11 Kana ava manheru anofanira kushamba muviri. Kana zuva ravira, ngaachidzokera zvake mumisasa." 
Deuteronomy23:12 “Iva nenzvimbo kunze kwomusasa kwokuendera. 
Deuteronomy23:13 Pazvombo zvokuhondo zvaunenge unazvo unofanira kuvawo nomuchogodo wokucheresa kuitira kuti paunoenda kunze, ndowaunochera nawo chikomba, kana wapedza zvaunoita wozofusira." 
Deuteronomy23:14 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu anofamba-famba mumusasa wenyu kuti akununurei achiisa vavengi venyu mumaoko menyu. Naizvozvo musasa wenyu ngaugare wakachena kuti asazoona tsvina dzakadaro pakati penyu akazokufuratirai. 
Deuteronomy23:15 “Kana muranda akatiza tenzi wake, achizopotera kwamuri musamudzosere kuna tenzi wake." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Ngaagare nemi kwaanenge asarudza chero muguta ripi zvaro renyu kwaanoda zvake. Regai kumubata zvakaipa. 
Deuteronomy23:17 “Ngakurege kuva nomuIsiraeri anova mhombwe kana chifeve chetemberi. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Kunyange mari yamunobvisa kuripa zvemhiko dzenyu kuimba yaTenzi Mwari wenyu, regai kuiunza ichibva pamari inowanikwa noufeve kana nezvowumbwa uhwu hwemhombwe nokuti zviito izvozvi zvinosemesa pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu zvose zviri zviviri." 
Deuteronomy23:19 “Kana wakweretesa mumwe wako muIsiraeri chinhu, usamuripise mubereko, ingave mari kana chokudya kana chimwewo chinhu chaungangomukweretesa." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Kana ari mutorwa ungamuripise zvako mubereko pane zvaunomukweretesa, asi mumwe wako muIsiraeri usamuripise mubereko kuitira kuti Tenzi Mwari wako akukomborere pane zvose zvaunoita munyika yauri kundotora kuti ive yako." 
Deuteronomy23:21 “Kana watsidzira Tenzi Mwari wako mhiko usazorega kuita zvaunenge watsidza nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako anotarisira kuti utoita chete zvawakatsidza ukarega kuzviita chatova chitadzo. 
Deuteronomy23:22 Asi ukarega kupika mhiko hachisi chitadzo kwauri. 
Deuteronomy23:23 Nyatsoita nomazvo zvaunenge wataura nomuromo wako nokuti wakatsidzira Tenzi Mwari wako mhiko nomuromo wako pasina kumanikidzwa. 
Deuteronomy23:24 “Kana ukapinda nomumunda womumwe wako wemagirepisi, idya zvako magirepisi pamadiro ugute, asi rega kuisa mamwe mumudziyo wokutakurira." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Kana ukapinda nomumunda womumwe wako uchiine mbesanwa dzisati dzakohwiwa tanha zvako hura dzadzo namaoko asi usazoita zvokumweta nejeko. 
Deuteronomy24:1 “Zvingaitike kuti murume oroora mukadzi ozowana chinhu chisingamufadzi maari nokuti anenge aona chinhu chisina kufanira maari, obva omupa mumaoko tsamba yegupuro achimudzinga pamba pake," 
Deuteronomy24:2 kana akabvapo ondoroorwa nomumwe murume," 
Deuteronomy24:3 murume iyeyo akasafadzwawo naye akamupawo mumaoko tsamba yegupuro achibva amudzinga pamba pake, kana kuti murume wacho ofa," 
Deuteronomy24:4 pakadaro murume wake uya akatanga kumuramba haabvumirwi kudzokerana nomukadzi iyeyo anenge ambon'oreswa kudaro nokuti kudzokerana kwakadai marutsi chaiwo pana Tenzi. Usamboparamurana nechitadzo chakadai chinosvibisa nyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako kuti ive yako. 
Deuteronomy24:5 “Kana murume apiwa mukadzi waachangobva mukuroora ngaarege kuenda kuhondo, kana kupiwa mutoro webasa renyika yake rinofanira kuitwa. Ngaagare zvake pamusha kwegore rose achivaraidzana nomudzimai waakaroora." 
Deuteronomy24:6 “Kana ukakweretesa munhu usambofanomubatira guyo, kana huyo yake kuti azokudzosera nokuti unenge wamutorera chinomuraramisa." 
Deuteronomy24:7 “Kana munhu akawanikidzwa achiba mumwe wake wechiIsiraeri, achimuita muranda wake kana kumutengesa, nyakuba munhu ngaaurayiwe. Naizvozvo muchabvisa huipi hwakadai pakati penyu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 “Kana chirwere chamapere chabata munhu, nyatsoitai nomazvo zvose zvamunodzidziswa navapristi vechiRevhi zvandakavataurira mobva manyatsozviita." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Yeuka zvakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuna Miriamu pamaiva murwendo muchibva kuIjipiti. 
Deuteronomy24:10 “Paunokweretesa mumwe wako chero chinhu chipi zvacho usapinde mumba make kundotora chinhu chokumbofanobata. 
Deuteronomy24:11 Asi mira panze munhu waunokweretesa abude nacho kuzokupirapo. 
Deuteronomy24:12 Kana ari murombo usarare usina kumudzosera chinhu chake. 
Deuteronomy24:13 Mudzosere chinhu chake kana zuva rodoka kuti awane chokurara akafuka agokutenda iwewe unenge watoita zvakarurama kuna Tenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy24:14 “Usabate zvakaipa mushandi murombo asina chokubata angave mumwe wako muIsiraeri, kana vatorwa vari mumaguta enyu munyika yenyu." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Mubhadhare basa raaita pazuva iroro kusati kwadoka nokuti murombo, uye ndopanenge pane mwoyo wake ipapo. Angadaro akachema newe kuna Tenzi chikazova chitadzo kwauri." 
Deuteronomy24:16 “Madzibaba haafanire kuurayirwa mhosva dzavana vavo. Vana havafanirewo kuurayirwa mhosva dzamadzibaba avo. Munhu pachake anofira mhosva yake iye pachake. 
Deuteronomy24:17 “Rega kuti kana wotonga mutorwa kana nherera, wosiya zviri pamutemo. Kana ukakweretesa chirikadzi, rega kuitorera hanzu yayo yokumbofanobata." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Unofanira kurangarira kuti wakambova muranda muIjipiti, Tenzi Mwari wako akazokununurako ndokusaka ndakupa murao uyu." 
Deuteronomy24:19 “Paunokohwa mbesa mumunda wako, ukakanganwa chisumbu chadzo usadzokere kundochitora. Ngachisarire vatorwa nenherera nechirikadzi kuitira kuti Tenzi Mwari wako akukomborere pane zvaunoita." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Paunokuzhumura michero yako yamaorivhi usaudzokerere mapazi awo zvakare. Ngaisarire vatorwa nenherera nechirikadzi. 
Deuteronomy24:21 Paunokohwa magirepisi mumunda wako wamagirepisi usaudzokerere uchifuhwa. 
Deuteronomy24:22 Ngaasarire vatorwa nenherera nechirikadzi. Rangarira kuti wakambova muranda muIjipiti ndokusaka ndakupa murao uyu. 
Deuteronomy25:1 “Kana vanhu vaviri vakaitirana nharo, vakaenda kudare, dare rotaura kuti, ‘Uyu ane mhosva, uyu haana mhosva,’" 
Deuteronomy25:2 nyakubatwa nemhosva onzi ngaarohwe, mutongi achamuti azvambarare pasi arohwe shamhu dzinokodzerana nemhosva yake iye aripo." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Angarohwe shamhu makumi mana asi ngadzirege kupfuura ipapo, nokuti kana akarohwa shamhu dzinopfuuridza ipapa ingadaro hama yako ikafumurwa iwe uchiona." 
Deuteronomy25:4 “Usaise mombe matomhu paunenge uchiipurisa mbesanwa. 
Deuteronomy25:5 “Kana vanakomana vomunhu mumwe vagere pamwechete, mumwe obva afa asina mwana mukomana, chirikadzi yaanosiya haifaniri kuroorwa nomutorwa. Muramu wake ngaamugarire nhaka achengetedzewo murao wenhaka." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Mwana mukomana waanotanga kubereka achapiwa zita romuchakabvu kuitira kuti rirege kutsakatika muIsiraeri. 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kana muramu uya asingadi kugara nhaka mukadzi womukoma kana munun'una wake ngaaende kuvakuru vakuru kuzambara kundomhan'ara achiti, ‘Muramu wangu ari kuramba kumutsiridza zita rehama yake muIsiraeri muno. Ari kuramba kuita basa rake rokundigarira nhaka.’" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Ipapo vakuru vakuru vomuguta rake ngavamudaidze vataure naye. Kana akarambisisa achiti, ‘Handidi kutora mukadzi iyeyo.’" 
Deuteronomy25:9 Mukadzi uya ngaaende kumuramu wake omubvisa shangu yake, omupfira mate kuuso, vakuru vakuru varipo obva ati, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoitwa kumunhu asingadi kuti musha womukoma kana munun'una wake ukure." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Zita rake muIsiraeri muno richanzi; Imbayanyakubviswashangu.’ 
Deuteronomy25:11 “Kana varume vaviri vachirwisana, mukadzi womumwe akauya kuzokutsira achibatsira murume wake, akakata zvombo zvomumwe wacho," 
Deuteronomy25:12 dimurai ruoko rwomukadzi iyeyo musingamunzwiri tsitsi. 
Deuteronomy25:13 “Usave nezviereso zviviri zvine mwero yakasiyana, zvinoti chimwe chikuru chimwe chiduku muchijosaka chako." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Mumba mako usave nezviereso zviviri zvine mwero isina kuenzana zvinoti chimwe chikuru chimwe chiduku. 
Deuteronomy25:15 Unosungirwa kuva nezviereso nezvokupimisa zvechokwadi zviri pamwero kuti mazuva ako awande munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi Mwari wako haambodi zvake vanhu vanoita izvozvi zvoujarijari hwokubiridzira. 
Deuteronomy25:17 “Rangarira zvakaitwa naAmareki kwamuri muri murwendo rwokubva kuIjipiti. 
Deuteronomy25:18 Zviya zvaakakuvinga panzira nehondo akakufuta neshure pawakanga waneta warukutika, akauraya vamwe venyu vose vakanga vaneta vasaririra shure asingambotya zvake Mwari." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Naizvozvo, kana Tenzi Mwari wako azokupa zororo kuvavengi vako vose vari munharaunda yenyika yako yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako kuti ive yako, tsakatisa rudzi rwaAmareki pasi pano, usakanganwe." 
Deuteronomy26:1 “Zvino kana uchinge wasvika munyika yaunopiwa naTenzi Mwari wako kuti ive yako, waitora wagaramo," 
Deuteronomy26:2 pamhando dzose dzembesa dzako kana odzikohwa unofanira kutora dzokutanga dzacho uise mutswanda uende nadzo kunzvimbo ichasarudzwa naTenzi Mwari wako kuisa zita rake kuti rivepo," 
Deuteronomy26:3 uende kumupristi anenge ariko panguva iyoyo uti, ‘Nhasi uno ndinoreva pachena kuna Tenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ndakakwanisawo kuva munyika ino iyi makatsidzirwa madzitateguru edu naTenzi kuti tinozopiwa.’" 
Deuteronomy26:4 “Mupristi ngaatambire tswanda iyoyo andoigadzika paatari yaTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy26:5 Pana Tenzi Mwari wako ipapo taura uchiti, ‘Baba vangu vaiva muAramu, vaiva munhu aingoti apa garei tamei apa garei tamei, vakaenda kuIjipiti vakagarako nemhuri yavo yavanhu vashomashoma. Vari ikoko vakazova rudzi rukuru, runa simba, runa vanhu vazhinji." 
Deuteronomy26:6 VaIjipiti vakatibata zvakaipa vakationesa nhamo vachitiitisa basa rechibharo. 
Deuteronomy26:7 Takazochema kuna Tenzi Mwari wamadzibaba edu, Tenzi ndokunzwa kuchema kwedu, ndokuonawo kutambura kwedu nomutoro wedu webasa nokusabatwa zvakanaka kwataiitwa." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Tenzi akatiburitsa muIjipiti nesimba rake guru namabasa ake makuru anotyisa nezviratidzo nezvishamiso. 
Deuteronomy26:9 Akatiunza kunzvimbo ino akatipa nyika ino, nyika yakanaka yomukaka nouchi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Zvino, hedzinoi mbesa dzokutanga dzomumunda wamakandipa imi Tenzi dzandauya nadzo.’ Unofanira kudziisa pana Tenzi Mwari wako upfugamire Tenzi Mwari wako ipapo." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Iwe nemhuri yako nomuRevhi nomutorwa pemberai muchifarira zvinhu zvawakapiwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy26:12 “Gore rechitatu roga roga, igore rokubvisa chegumi chezvose zvaunowana uchipa muRevhi nomutorwa nenherera nechirikadzi kuti dzidye dzigute mumaguta enyu. Kana wapedza" 
Deuteronomy26:13 enda undotaura pana Tenzi Mwari wako kuti, ‘Ndatora mumba mangu chikamu chamakatema kuti ndechenyu ndikapa muRevhi nomutorwa nenherera nechirikadzi sokundirayira kwamakaita, handina kumbodarika kana kukanganwa mirao yenyu." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Handina kudya chegumi pandaingunochema nhamo yokufirwa, kana kuchibata pandainge ndan'ora, kana kuchipira kumidzimu. Ndakateerera izwi raTenzi Mwari wangu ndikaita zvose sokundirayira kwamakaita." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Titarireiwo muri kudenga, kumusha wenyu mutsvene mukomborere vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri nenyika iyi yakanaka yomukaka nouchi yamakatipa sokutsidzira kwamakaita madzibaba edu.’" 
Deuteronomy26:16 “Nhasi uno Tenzi Mwari wako anoti teerera mitemo nemirao iyoyi, uichengete nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Nhasi wabvuma zvataurwa naTenzi kuti ndiye Mwari wako uye kuti uchafamba munzira dzake, uchichengeta zvirevo nemitemo nemirao yake, nokuteerera izwi rake." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Tenzi abvumawo nhasi kuti imi ndimi vanhu vake chaivoivo sokukutaurirai kwaakaita uye kuti muchachengeta mitemo yake yose. 
Deuteronomy26:19 Akati achakusimudzirai pamusoro pendudzi dzavanhu dzose dzaakasika. Muchakudzwa, zita renyu rigorumbidzwa, mugova nomukurumbira, imi mugova rudzi rutsvene rwaTenzi Mwari wenyu sokureva kwake.”" 
Deuteronomy27:1 Mosesi pamwechete navakuru vakuru vevaIsiraeri vakataurira vanhu kuti, “Chengetai mirao yose yandiri kukuudzai nhasi uno." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Musi wauchayambuka Jorodhani uchipinda munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako unofanira kumisa mhitsa dzamabwe uadzurure," 
Deuteronomy27:3 unyore paari zvirevo zvose zviri mumutemo uyu pauchayambuka uchipinda munyika yakanaka yomukaka nouchi yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako sokutsidzira kwawakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wamadzibaba ako. 
Deuteronomy27:4 Kana wayambuka Jorodhani wava paGomo reEbhari ndopaunomisa mabwe iwayo andiri kukurayira nhasi uno, woadzurura." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Uvakire ipapo Tenzi Mwari wako atari yematombo. Usaabate-bate kana kuaveza nesimbi. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Vakira Tenzi Mwari wako atari yematombo asina kuvezwa, ugopira mipiro yokupisa kuna Tenzi Mwari wako." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Upire mupiro wokuwadzana uudyire ipapo pana Tenzi Mwari wako uchifara zvako. 
Deuteronomy27:8 Unofanira kunyora zvinonyatsoonekwa mazwi ose omutemo iwoyu, pamabwe aye.”" 
Deuteronomy27:9 Ipapo Mosesi navapristi vechiRevhi vakataurira vaIsiraeri vose kuti, “VaIsiraeriwe-e, nyararai munzwe, nhasi mava vanhu vaTenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Naizvozvo teererai izwi raTenzi Mwari wenyu muchengete mitemo nemirao yake yandiri kukuudzai nhasi uno.” 
Deuteronomy27:11 Musi iwoyo Mosesi akakomekedza vanhu achiti," 
Deuteronomy27:12 “Kana mayambuka Jorodhani vokwaSimeoni naRevhi naJudha naIsakari naJosefi naBhenjamini, vachamira paGomo reGerizimu vachikomborera vanhu." 
Deuteronomy27:13 VokwaRubheni naGadhi naAsheri naZebhuruni naDhani naNafutari, vachamirawo paGomo reEbhari, varengerere nokushurikidza." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Ipapo vaRevhi vachadaidzira vachitaurira vanhu vose vaIsiraeri kuti: 
Deuteronomy27:15 “ ‘Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anoveza kana kugadzira chifananidzo chesimbi, chinhu chisingambodiwi naTenzi chakatoitwa zvacho namaoko emhizha, chikamiswa muchivande.’ Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anoshora baba vake kana amai vake. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “Ngaave norushambwa munhu anosudurudza chitata chamabwe chomuganho womumwe wake. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anorasikisa bofu nzira yaro. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anoti kana otonga mhosva yomutorwa kana yenherera kana yechirikadzi osiya zviri pamurao. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anotorana nomukadzi wababa wake nokuti anenge azvidza baba wake nokupinda mumba mavo kwaanenge aita. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anoita zvoupombwe nemhuka. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anoita upombwe nehanzvadzi yake. Ingave hanzvadzi yake yokuti baba chete ndivo vamwechete naye kana kuti amai chete ndivo vamwechete naye. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anovata navambuya vake. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anoponda mumwe muchivande. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anotengwa kuti auraye munhu asina mhosva. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu asingabvume zvatemwa nomurao uyu kuti auchengete. Vanhu vose vachabvumira vachiti, ‘Ameni.’" 
Deuteronomy28:1 “Kana mukateerera zvinorehwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu mukanyatsochengeta mirao yose yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno, Tenzi Mwari wako achakusimudzirai pamusoro kupfuura ndudzi dzose dzavanhu dzapasi pano." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Kana ukateerera zvinorehwa naTenzi Mwari wako, makomborero ose aya achauya kwauri achiita zvokunaya pauri." 
Deuteronomy28:3 “Muchakomborerwa mumaguta menyu nomumaruwa menyu. 
Deuteronomy28:4 “Muchakomborerwa nokupiwa vana vakawanda, nembesa zhinji muminda yenyu, nemhuka dzakawanda. Zvipfuwo zvako zvichaita matanga namatanga, vana vezvimwe zvipfuwo zvako vachiita gumi nefararira." 
Deuteronomy28:5 “Muchakomborerwa zvokuti matengu enyu achagara akati pamu pamu kuzara, mutsero dzenyu hamuzomboshayikwa chirimo." 
Deuteronomy28:6 “Muchakomborerwa mune zvose zvamuchaita. 
Deuteronomy28:7 “Tenzi achaita kuti vavengi venyu vanenge vakumukirai vakurirwe. Vachakuvingai vakatungamidzana, asi muchavaitisa chimwandamwanda." 
Deuteronomy28:8 “Tenzi achakomborera basa rako. Achazadza matura ako. Achakukomborera munyika yauri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wako. 
Deuteronomy28:9 “Tenzi achakuitai rudzi rwavanhu vake pachake vatsvene maererano nemhiko yaakakuitirai, ndokungewo machengeta mirao yaTenzi Mwari wenyu nokufamba munzira dzake." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Naizvozvo ndudzi dzose dzavanhu vapasi pano vachaona kuti munodaidzwa nezita raTenzi. Vachakutyai. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Tenzi achakupfumisa achikupa vana vakawanda, nezvipfuwo zvizhinji nembesa zhinji, munyika yakatsidzirwa madzibaba ako naTenzi kuzokupa." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Tenzi achakuzarurira matura oupfumi hwake hwakanaka hwokumatenga achikunayisira mvura mumunda mako nenguva yayo chaiyo nokukomborera basa rose raunobata. Uchakweretesa ndudzi zhinji dzavanhu, asi iwe usina chaunokwereta kwavari." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Tenzi achakuitai musoro, kwete muswe. Ucharamba uchibudirira chete, usingakundikane, ndokunge wateerera mirao yaTenzi Mwari wako yandiri kukupa nhasi uno wanyatsoichengetawo." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Regawo kutsautsira pane murao upi noupi zvawo pamirao yandiri kukuudza nhasi, woita zvomusoro wako wotevedza vamwe vamwari uchivashandira." 
Deuteronomy28:15 “Asi kana mukarega kuzoteerera zvataurwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu, kana kuchengeta mitemo nemirao yandiri kukupai nhasi uno, rushambwa irworwu rwose ruchakutibikirai." 
Deuteronomy28:16 “Muchawirwa norushambwa mumaguta enyu nomumaruwa enyu. 
Deuteronomy28:17 “Muchawirwa norushambwa rwokushaya kana chokuisa mumatengu enyu kana mutsero dzenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:18 “Muchava norushambwa rwokusava navana vakawanda, norwokuva nezvokukohwa zvishomashoma, uye mombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo zvenyu zvichange zviri zvishomanana." 
Deuteronomy28:19 “Muchava nekashambwa kwokuti zvose zvamunoita hazvibudirire. 
Deuteronomy28:20 “Tenzi achakupai rushambwa, achakuonesai ndondo achakutsiudzai pane zvose zvamuchaita kudzamara maparadzwa matsakatika pasina nenguva yose zvakonzerwa nezviito zvenyu zvakaipa zvamunenge maita muchindiramba." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Tenzi achakutumirai denda richakurakatisai kusvikira mose mapera kuti dhu munyika yamuri kundotora kuti ive yenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Tenzi achakurovai nedenda rechikosoro chorurindi neromuviri unopinda chando, namaronda anonyeka, nokupisa muviri nenhamo yokushaya mvura zvokuti mbesa dzenyu dzichaita zvikukuve dzichiita chakuvhuvhu nezuva. Zvichakunonoresai kudzamara mapera kuti nho-o." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Denga richaramba kunaya serakadzivirirwa nendarira. Pasi paunotsika pachaomarara sesimbi. 
Deuteronomy28:24 Panze pokuti Tenzi anayise mvura, jecha neguruva ndizvo zvichanaya. Zvichabva kudenga zvichikunaya kusvikira waparara." 
Deuteronomy28:25 “Tenzi achaita kuti mukundwe navavengi venyu. Muchavavinga nenzira imwechete makatungamidzana asi munozodzokako rava bararamhanya kuvatiza. Ndudzi dzose dzavanhu vapasi pano dzichadedereswa nazvo. 
Deuteronomy28:26 Zvitunha zvenyu zvichadyiwa neshiri dzedenga nezvikara zvesango pasina anozvidzinga. 
Deuteronomy28:27 Tenzi achaita kuti uve nedenda ramamota aye okuIjipiti, muviri uchiva namaronda maronda nemhezi, muviri wose uchingova negwenyukwenyu risingarapike." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Tenzi achakupa chirwere chokupenga nechoupofu nechokuzungaira. 
Deuteronomy28:29 Sebofu rinofamba richiita zvokutsvanzvadzira murima, uchaita kufamba kwokutsvanzvadzira masikati machena. Hauzombobudiriri pane zvaunoita. Vanokukurira vachazogara vachikubata zvakaipa nokukupambira zvinhu zvako pasina anokununura." 
Deuteronomy28:30 “Uchangoti roorei mukadzi wako, gombarume robva rarara zvaro naye. Uchavaka imba asi hauzogaramo. Ucharima munda wamagirepisi, asi haumboruma kana girepisi rayo." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Mombe yako ichaurayiwa wakatarisa, asi nyama yacho haumboiisa kumuromo. Dhongi rako richapambwa mumaziso mako, usingazoridzoserwi. Hwai dzako dzichaiswa mumaoko mavavengi vako pasina anokununudzira." 
Deuteronomy28:32 “Vana vako vakomana navasikana vachatapwa navanhu veimwe ndudzi, uchavatsvokorera meso zuva nezuva uchivatarisira kuti vachadzoka pasina chaunokwanisa kuita." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Rudzi rwavanhu vausingazivi zvako, ndirwo ruchadya mbesa dzawakadikitira kurima. Vacharamba vachikutonga nechisimba chete" 
Deuteronomy28:34 zvokuti nhamo yauchaona nameso ako ichakupengesa. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Tenzi achakupa rushambwa rwokuve namazironda pamabvi napamakumbo ako. Maronda acho enhuta asingarapiki anobvira pasi petsoka yako kusvikira panhongonya yomusoro wako. 
Deuteronomy28:36 “Tenzi achaita kuti imi namambo wenyu wamunenge magadza kukutongai mutapwe norudzi rwavanhu vasingazikanwi nemi kana namadzibaba enyu. Ikoko muchandonamata vamwari vezvimiti navamabwe. 
Deuteronomy28:37 Marudzi ekwauchange waendeswa achakatyamadzwa nazvo zvokuti uchava chinhu chinokatyamadza, chiseko zvacho netsumo yavo." 
Deuteronomy28:38 “Uchadyara mbeu dzakawanda mumunda, asi zvokukohwa zvichava zvishomanana nokuti zvichapera kudyiwa nehwiza." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Uchasima minda yamagirepisi ugobindikita kuichengetedza, asi hapana chaunotanhamo, kana kumbonwawo waini yomo nokuti zvose zvichapera kudyiwa namakonye." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Uchava nemiti yemiorivhi munyika yako yose, asi hapana kana futa rayo rauchazora nokuti maorivhi acho achakurumuka." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Uchabereka vana vakomana navasikana, asi hauzogari navo nokuti vachatapwa." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Miti nemichero yomunyika mako ichava yehwiza. 
Deuteronomy28:43 “Mutorwa wauchange ugere naye acharamba achingokwirira chete pamusoro pako iwe uchingoderera. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Iye ndiye achatokukweretesa, asi iwe usingakwanise kumukweretesawo. Iye ndiye achava musoro, iwe uriwe muswe." 
Deuteronomy28:45 “Rushambwa rwenhamo dzose idzi ruchakuwira rwugoramba rwakangoti nama nama newe kudzamara wakwana narwo rwakuparadza nokuti unenge usina kuteerera zvakarehwa naTenzi Mwari wako, usina kuchengeta mitemo nemirao yake yaakakuudza." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Izvozvi izvi zvichava chiratidzo nezvinhu zvichakushamisa iwe navana vako. 
Deuteronomy28:47 Pamusana pokuti unenge usina kushandira Tenzi Mwari wako norufaro nomwoyo wakasununguka panguva yaunenge uchakapfuma," 
Deuteronomy28:48 nokudaro uchashandira vavengi vako, vachakuvinga vatumwa naTenzi iwe uine nzara nenyota, usina zvokupfeka zvakakwana, zvinhu zvose zvichingova zvenhamonhamo kwauri vachizokuisa joko resimbi pamutsipa wako kudzamara vakuparadza." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Tenzi achatuma rudzi rwavanhu vanobva kure, pasi kwenyika; uchaerekana wavhungwa sezvinoita gondo rodo kubata huku. Vachange vari rudzi rwavanhu vane mutauro wamusinganzwi," 
Deuteronomy28:50 rudzi rune zviso zvinodederesa rusina zviya zvokunyara vakura kana kunzwira vana vaduku tsitsi. 
Deuteronomy28:51 Vachadya mhuru dzezvipfuwo zvako, nembesa dzomumunda wako kusvikira vakurozva. Havambokusiyiri kana tsanga yembesanwa zvayo kana kukusiyira waini kana mafuta eorivhi, kana mwana zvake wezvimwe zvipfuwo zvako, kana kachipfuwo kako zvako kudzamara vakutsakatisa." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Vachakukombai mumaguta enyu kudzamara nhungamakore dzetsvingo dzawo dzamunovimba nadzo dzakoromoka munyika yenyu yose. Vachakomba maguta enyu ose omunyika yenyu yose yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:53 “Pamunenge makakombwa kudaro, matambudzwa navavengi venyu, muchasvika pakutodya vana venyu vokubereka, nyama yavana venyu chaivo vakomana navasikana vamunenge mapiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu, munhamo iyoyo yokukombwa kwamaguta enyu navavengi venyu." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Kunyange murume ane mwoyo munyoro wokuziva hama, haazonzwira tsitsi mukoma kana munun'una wake kunyange mudzimai wake, chido chomwoyo wake, kana vana vake vanenge vachiripo" 
Deuteronomy28:55 zvokuti anotovanyima nyama yavana vake vaanenge achidya nokuti anenge asisina chokubata munhamo iyoyo yokukombwa mumaguta enyu navavengi venyu. 
Deuteronomy28:56 Kanawo mukadzi ane mwoyo munyoro wokuziva hama, anenge akapfuma zvokuti haasati ambofunga mumwoyo make kuti rutsoka rwake ruchatsika pasi, haazonzwira tsitsi murume wake, chido chemwoyo wake, kana mwana wake mukomana kana musikana." 
Deuteronomy28:57 Achangobva mukusununguka, achadya muchivande mwana wake mucheche pamwechete nechavakuru chake pamusana pokuti panenge pasisina chokubata munhamo iyoyo yokukombwa kwemaguta enyu navavengi venyu." 
Deuteronomy28:58 “Kana ukarega zvako kunyatsoteerera nokuchengeta zvose zvinorehwa nomutemo uyu zvakanyorwa mubhuku rino, uchitorega zvako kutya zita iri rokuti Tenzi Mwari wako rine mukurumbira rinoremekedzwa," 
Deuteronomy28:59 Tenzi achaita kuti matambudziko ako akure ave ndambirira chaiyo. Achakurwarisa, iwe navana vako namatenda asingapere nezvirwere zvinosiririsa zvisina mugumo." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Achaunzawo pauri zvirwere zvose zviya zvawaitya zvokuIjipiti zvicharamba zvakati pauri momote. 
Deuteronomy28:61 Tenzi achauyisa pauri zvirwere nenhamo dzose dzisina kunyorwa mubhuku romutemo irori kusvikira maparadzwa. 
Deuteronomy28:62 Muchasara mava vanhu vashomanana asi imi maimbova senyenyedzi kuwanda nokuti munenge musina kuteerera zvinorehwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu. 
Deuteronomy28:63 Sokufara kwakaita Tenzi kukupfumisai nokuita kuti muwande, Tenzi achafarirawo kukuparadzai achikupedzai achikutipurai kubva munyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kuti ive yenyu." 
Deuteronomy28:64 “Tenzi achakumwararisai mukati memarudzi avanhu kubvira kwakaperera nyika kusvika kwainoperera, ikoko muchandonamata vamwari vasingambozikanwi nemi kana namadzibaba vezvimiti navamabwe." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Uri mukati memarudzi evanhu ivavo haumbogadzana mwoyo, unenge usinawo paungati apa ndopahoko yangu. Tenzi achakupa mwoyo wokungova zimbwende romunhu. Ucharasa mwoyo pakutarisira kwako uchigara wakasuruvara." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Uchagara wakabatira upenyu hwako mumaoko, uchitya kuti zvimwe haridoke uri mupenyu, kana kuti hakuedze uchafema." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Pako uchapashaya, mangwanani mwoyo wako unenge wongoti dai kwachidoka zvako, kana kwazodoka wochemera kuti dai zuva rachibuda zvaro. Izvozvo unenge wava nebapu mumwoyo mako rokutya chose chose chawaona." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Kunyange ndakambotaura kuti hamuchazoita rwendo irworwo zvakare, Tenzi achakudzosera kuIjipiti nengarava. Muchandozvishambadza mose varume navakadzi kuti mutengwe navavengi venyu savaranda, asi muchashaya neangadewo kukutengai.”" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Iri ndiro bumbiro remitemo yechitenderano chakataurwa naTenzi kuna Mosesi kuti aitise vaIsiraeri naye munyika yavaMoabhu pamusoro pechimwe chitenderano chiya chaakavaitisa pagomo reHorebhu. 
Deuteronomy29:2 Mosesi akadaidza vaIsiraeri vose akati kwavari, “Makazvionera pachenyu zvose zvakaitwa naTenzi munyika yeIjipiti kuna Farao navaranda vake vose munyika yake yose." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Makazvionera nameso enyu zviedzo zvikuru nezviratidzo nezvishamiso zvikuru zviya. 
Deuteronomy29:4 Kunyange pari nhasi Tenzi haasati akupai mwoyo wokunzwisisa kana maziso okuona nawo kana nzeve dzokunzwa nadzo. 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndakakutungamirirai kwamakore makumi mana murenje, mbatya dzenyu hadzina kubvaruka pamuviri penyu, shangu dzenyu hadzina kumbosakara mutsoka dzenyu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Hamuna kumbodya chingwa kana kumbonwa waini kana doro, kuti muzive kuti ndini Tenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Pamakasvika muno Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni, naOgu mambo weBhashani, vakativinga kuzotirwisa, tikavakurira." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Takavatorera nyika yavo tikaipa vedzinza raRubheni nevedzinza raGadhi nechikamu chevedzinza raManase kuti ive nhaka yavo. 
Deuteronomy29:9 Naizvozvo nyatsochengetai zvose zvinorehwa muchitenderano ichi kuti zvikufambirei zvakanaka pane zvose zvamuchaita. 
Deuteronomy29:10 “Nhasi uno imi mose mumire pano pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu muina vatungamiriri vamadzinza enyu navakuru vakuru venyu namakurukota enyu navanhurume vose vevaIsiraeri," 
Deuteronomy29:11 navana venyu navakadzi venyu, navatorwa vagere nemi mumatendhe enyu, kusvikira kuna anokutemerai huni dzenyu naanokutekerai mvura." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Nhasi uno maunganira kuzoita chitenderano pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu chaari kuda kuti atsidzirane nemi nemhiko 
Deuteronomy29:13 kuitira kuti nhasi uno akuitei vanhu vake, iye achiva Mwari wenyu sokukutaurirai kwaakaita uye sokutsidzira kwaakaita madzitateguru enyu vana Abhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Handisi kuitisa chitenderano ichi imi moga," 
Deuteronomy29:15 asi ndiri kuchiitisa vamwe vasati vava nesu pari nhasi navamire nesu pano pamberi paTenzi Mwari wedu nhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy29:16 “Imi munoziva upenyu hwatakagara munyika yeIjipiti, nokupfuura kwatakaita nomundudzi dzavanhu vomunyika dzatakapfuura nadzo." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Makazvionera zvinhu zvavo zviye zvisingadiwe zvazvo naMwari nezvifananidzo zvavamwari vavo vezvimiti navamabwe nevesirivha nevendarama zvavaiva nazvo. 
Deuteronomy29:18 Chichenjerai kuti nhasi uno, pakati penyu pangadaro pakava nedzinza kana mhuri, kunyange murume kana mukadzi anoita mwoyo wokufuratira Tenzi Mwari wedu achindonamata vamwari vendudzi idzodzo. Pakati penyu pangadaro pakava nomudzi unobereka muchero womuchetura unovava unouraya." 
Deuteronomy29:19 Munhu akadaro angati kana anzwa mazwi aya echitenderano ichi chakaitwa nemhiko otozvipa chikomborero nechomumwoyo achiti, ‘Zvose zvichandifambira zvakanaka, kunyange zvangu ndichizvitutumadza mukupanduka kwangu.’ Izvozvi zvichakusvitsai pakuti kana morangwa, mokukurwa mose vakanaka navakaipa." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Tenzi haamboregerera munhu iyeyo, asi kutoti hasha dzaTenzi dzichamuvirukira. Majambwa ose aye akanyorwa mubhuku rino iri achamuwira. Tenzi achatsakatisa zita rake panyika pano." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Pakati pamadzinza ose evaIsiraeri, Tenzi achamutsaurira nhamo yokuti awirwe nemajambwa ose omuchitenderano akanyorwa mubhuku rino iri romutemo." 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Zvizvarwa zvenyu zvichaberekwa zvichatarisa pamwechete nomutorwa anobva pasi kwenyika, zvichiona nhamo nezvirwere munyika yenyu zvichange zvaunzwa naTenzi." 
Deuteronomy29:23 Nyika yose ichatsva igosara yangova sarufa nomunyu chete isina chakadyarwamo isingamere chinhu, kana uswa zvahwo. Zvichangofanana nokuparadzwa kwakaitwa Sodhomu neGomora neAdhima neZebhoimu, maguta akaparadzwa naTenzi akatsamwa aine hasha." 
Deuteronomy29:24 Heeka, ndudzi dzose dzevanhu dzichati, ‘Seiko Tenzi akaitira nyika iyoyi zvakadai? Ko kuviruka nehasha zvakadai kunorevei?’" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Vanhu vachati, ‘Pamusana pokuti vakakanda pasi chitenderano chaTenzi Mwari wamadzibaba avo, chaakaita navo paainge achivaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Vakandonamata nokupfugamira vamwe vamwari, vamwari vavasingamboziva, vasina kumbovapa kana nhaka yenyika." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ndokusaka hasha dzaTenzi, dzakavirukira nyika iyoyi, akaita kuti majambwa akanyorwa mubhuku rino iri aiwire." 
Deuteronomy29:28 Tenzi akabva avadzipura munyika yavo akatsamwa, aine hasha, akagumbuka zvikuru. Akandovakandira kune imwe nyikawo sezvazviri nhasi uno.’" 
Deuteronomy29:29 “Zvinhu zvinenge zvakavanzika ndezvaTenzi Mwari wedu, asi zvakaburitswa pachena ndozveduwo navana vedu nokusingaperi kuti tichengete zvose zvinorehwa nomutemo uyu." 
Deuteronomy30:1 “Kana makomborero aye nemajambwa andakakuudza azoitika kwauri, wazviyeuka uri pakati pamarudzi avanhu okwauchaendeswa naTenzi," 
Deuteronomy30:2 ukadzokera kuna Tenzi Mwari wako, iwe navana vako mukamuteerera mochengeta zvose zvandiri kukuudzai nhasi uno nomwoyo wenyu wose nomweya wenyu wose," 
Deuteronomy30:3 ipapo Tenzi Mwari wenyu achashandura nhamo yenyu youtapwa, achakunzwirai tsitsi agokukokorodzai zvakare kubva kumarudzi avanhu ose kwamakamboparadzirwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Kunyange vamwe venyu vakaendeswa kure kure kwakaperera nyika, Tenzi Mwari wenyu achakukokorodzai achikudzorai kubva ikoko." 
Deuteronomy30:5 Tenzi Mwari wako achakuunza munyika yemadzibaba ako kuti ive yako zvakare. Achakupfumisa agoita kuti muwande kupfuura madzibaba enyu. 
Deuteronomy30:6 Tenzi Mwari wako achaita kuti iwe navana vako muve nomwoyo wakatendeseka kwaari kuitira kuti ude Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose ugorarama. 
Deuteronomy30:7 Tenzi Mwari wako achazoisa majambwa ose aya pavavengi vako nemhandu dzako dziya dzaikutambudza. 
Deuteronomy30:8 Unofanira kuzoteererazve Tenzi Mwari wako uchengete mitemo yake yose yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy30:9 Tenzi Mwari wako achakupfumisa kwazvo pane zvose zvauchaita namaoko ako, achakupa vana vazhinji, nemombe dzakawanda nezvokukohwa zvizhinji nokuti Tenzi achakufarira achikuita kuti ubudirire sokufarira kwaakaita madzibaba ako," 
Deuteronomy30:10 ndokunge wateerera zvinorehwa naTenzi Mwari wako, uchichengeta mitemo nemirao yake yakanyorwa mubhuku iri romutemo, uye ndokungewo wadzokera kuna Tenzi Mwari wako nomwoyo wako wose nomweya wako wose." 
Deuteronomy30:11 “Ndinodaro nokuti mutemo uyu wandiri kukupa nhasi uno hausi mutemo wakanyanya kukuomera, uye hausi kure newe." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Hausiri kudenga zvokuti ungati, ‘Ndiani angakwire kudenga kundotitorera murao wacho kuti tiunzwe tiuchengete?’" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Hausiri kumhiri kwegungwa zvokuti ungati, ‘Ndianiko angatiyambukire gungwa kundotiunzira murao wacho tiunzwe tiuchengete?’" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Asi murao wacho unawo pauri ipapo, uri parurimi rwako, uri mumwoyo mako kuti uuchengete." 
Deuteronomy30:15 “Chinzwa, nhasi uno ndaisa pamberi pako, uku upenyu nezvakanaka uku rufu nezvakaipa." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Kana ukachengeta mitemo yaTenzi Mwari wako yandiri kukuudza nhasi uno, ukada Tenzi Mwari wako nokufamba munzira dzake uchichengeta zvirevo nemitemo nemirao yake, muchagara zvenyu mugowanda, ipapo Tenzi Mwari wenyu achakukomborerai munyika yamuri kundotora kuti ive yenyu." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Asi iwe ukatsauka zvako nomwoyo wako uchiramba kuteerera uchizokweverwa kundopfugamira vamwe vamwari uchivashandira," 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndinokuudzai nhasi uno kuti muchaparadzwa hamuzogara mazuva mazhinji munyika yamuri kuyambukira Jorodhani kundotora kuti ive yenyu. 
Deuteronomy30:19 Denga nenyika ngazvindipupurirewo nhasi uno kwauri kuti ndakuisira uku upenyu, uku rufu uyewo uku chikomborero, uku rushambwa kuti uzvisarudzire. Saka chisarudza upenyu kuti urarame iwe navana vako," 
Deuteronomy30:20 ude Tenzi Mwari wako, umuteerere, uti kwati kwati naye nokuti ndiye upenyu hwako nezvo achakupa mazuva mazhinji okuti ugare munyika yakatsidzwa naTenzi kupa madzitateguru ako vanaAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho.”" 
Deuteronomy31:1 Zvino Mosesi akaenderera mberi achitaura mazwi aya kuvaIsiraeri vose 
Deuteronomy31:2 achiti, “Pari nhasi uno, ndava namakore zana namakumi maviri okuberekwa. Handichakwanisa kumhanya-mhanya nebasa. Tenziwo akanditi, ‘Iwe hauyambuke Jorodhani iyeyu.’" 
Deuteronomy31:3 Tenzi Mwari wenyu pachake achakutungamirirai pakuyambuka. Ndiye achakuparadzirai ndudzi idzodzi kuti muvatorere nyika yavo. Joshuwa ndiye achakutungamirirai sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi. 
Deuteronomy31:4 Tenzi achaita kwavari zviya zvaakaita kuna Sihoni naOgu madzimambo avaAmori nenyika yavo paakavaparadza. 
Deuteronomy31:5 Tenzi achavaisa mumaoko enyu, saka imi itai kwavari zvose zvandakakuudzai kuti muite." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Shingai, mutsunge mwoyo, murege kuvatya kana kuvadedera nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiye ari kukuperekedzai, haambokufuratirai kana kukusiyai moga.”" 
Deuteronomy31:7 Mosesi akadaidza Joshuwa pamberi pevaIsiraeri vose akamutaurira achiti, “Shinga utsunge mwoyo, nokuti ndiwe wava kuzoenda navanhu ava munyika yakatsidzirwa madzitateguru avo naTenzi kuti vapiwe. Ndiwe uchavabatsira kutora nyika kuti ive yavo." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Tenzi ndiye achakutungamirira, achava newe, haazokufuratira kana kukusiya woga. Usatye kana kuzeza.”" 
Deuteronomy31:9 Mosesi akanyora mutemo uyu akaupa vapristi, vaRevhi, vaitakura bhokisi rechitenderano chaTenzi, navakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Mosesi akavati, “Pakupera koga koga kwamakore manomwe, panguva yakatemwa yegore rerusununguko pamazuva makuru amatumba," 
Deuteronomy31:11 panounganidzana vaIsiraeri vose pana Tenzi Mwari wenyu panzvimbo ichasarudzwa naTenzi, unofanira kuverengera vaIsiraeri vose mutemo uyu vachinzwa." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Unganidza vanhu varume navakadzi navana navatorwa vaunenge unavo mumaguta ako kuti vanzwe, vadzidze kuremekedza Tenzi Mwari wenyu, nokunyatsochengeta zvinorehwa nomutemo uyu." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Uyewo kuti vana vavo vasingauzivi vaunzwe, vadzidzewo kuremekedza Tenzi Mwari wenyu mazuva ose amuchagara munyika yamuri kuyambukira kundotora kuti ive yenyu kumhiri kwaJorodhani.”" 
Deuteronomy31:14 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Chitarisa uone kuti mazuva ako okuti uchifa ava kusvika. Chidaidza Joshuwa muende kutendhe rokusanganira kuti ndimuturire basa.” Mosesi naJoshuwa vakaenda kutendhe rokusanganira." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Ipapo Tenzi akazviratidza mushongwe yegore mutendhe iroro. Shongwe yegore iyoyo yakandomira kumusuo wetendhe. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti, “Chinzwa, nguva yako yokuti uchizorora namadzibaba ako, vachakabvu, yava padyo. Asi vanhu ava vachasara vopindwa nounzenza hwokundonamata vamwe vamwari venyika dziri kwavari kundogara mukati madzo. Vachasiyana neni vachityora chitenderano changu chandakaitirana navo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Pazuva iroro ndichavavirukira nehasha dzangu. Ndichavasiya ndovafuratira vagoparadzwa. Nhamo namatambudziko zvichavawira zvokuti vachati, ‘Hatina kuwirwa nenhamo idzi here pamusana pokuti Mwari wedu haachisiri pakati pedu?’" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Asi ini pazuva iroro ndichanyatsokuvafuratira nokuda kwezvakaipa zvavanenge vaita zvokunamata vamwe vamwari. 
Deuteronomy31:19 “Saka zvino chinyora rwiyo urwu, urwudzidzise vaIsiraeri, rugare ruri parurimi rwavo kuti ruve chapupu changu kuvaIsiraeri ivava." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ndinodaro nokuti kana ndavasvitsa munyika yakanaka, nyika yomukaka nouchi yandakatsidzira madzibaba avo, vadya vakora vachapanduka votevera vamwe vamwari. Ndivo vavachashandira ini vachindishora zvavo, nokutyora chitenderano changu." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Kana nhamo namatambudziko zvazovamomotera, rwiyo urwu rwuchamira sechapupu changu kwavari nokuti haruzombobva parurimi rwavana vavo. Ndiri kuziva zvangu zvavari kuronga kuita, izvozvi, ndisati ndavayambutsira munyika yandakavatsidzira.”" 
Deuteronomy31:22 Saka Mosesi akanyora rwiyo urwu pazuva rakarero akarudzidzisa vaIsiraeri. 
Deuteronomy31:23 Ipapo Tenzi akaudza Joshuwa mwana waNuni achiti, “Shinga utsunge mwoyo, nokuti ndiwe uchasvitsa vaIsiraeri munyika yandakavatsidzira. Ini ndichava newe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Kuzoti Mosesi anyatsopedza kunyora bumbiro rose mutemo uyu mubhuku," 
Deuteronomy31:25 akataurira vaRevhi vaitakura bhokisi rechitenderano chaTenzi achiti," 
Deuteronomy31:26 “Torai bhuku romutemo iri muriise parutivi pebhokisi rechitenderano kuti rigarepo sechapupu kwamuri. 
Deuteronomy31:27 Ndinodaro nokuti ndinoziva umhandupandu hwenyu, noundambakuudzwa hwenyu. Zvamakatopandukira Tenzi ndichiri mupenyu nemi kudai kokutozoti ndafa!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Ndiunganidzirei vakuru vakuru vose vamadzinza enyu, nemakurukota enyu kuti ndivaudze mashoko iwaya vachizvinzwira, ndiite kuti denga nenyika zvive chapupu changu kwavari." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ndinozviziva ini kuti kana ndafa muchasara zvenyu moipa zvokuipa zviya, muchitsauka munzira yandakakuudzai. Asi pamazuva achauya nhamo dzichakuwirai nokuti munenge maita zvakaipa kuna Tenzi muchimushatirisa netwamunobata namaoko enyu.”" 
Deuteronomy31:30 Mosesi akadetemba mazwi erwiyo urwu kusvikira apedza, gungano rose revaIsiraeri richizvinzwa." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Akati, “Matenga we-e teyai nzeve munzwe ndimbotaura newewo nyika teerera unzwe mazwi omuromo wangu." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Chidzidziso changu chichaita zvokunaya semvura, nhauro yangu ichinyava pasi sedova, zviite semvura iri kunaya paruswiswi, serupfunhavachembere pazvimerwa zvose," 
Deuteronomy32:3 nokuti ndava kuparidza zita raTenzi, nokupembedza ukuru hwaMwari wedu." 
Deuteronomy32:4 Iye iDombo chairo kusimba! Pabasa rake hapana chinganatsiridzwe nokuti maitiro ake ane ruenzaniso. Mwari ndiMwari anotendeseka asina chakaipa maari; ndiMwari akarurama, Mwari ari pachokwadi." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Asi imi hamuna kutendeseka kwaari, hamukodzeri kuva vanhu vake." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Ko ndomatsiviro amungaite Tenzi iwaya here? Imi mazipenzi avanhu, vanhu vasina pfungwa. Ko haasi iye here baba vako, vakakusika? Haasi iye here akaita kuti muve rudzi?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Rangarira mazuva aye ekare, uyeuke makore aye ezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa; bvunza baba vako, vachakurondedzera, ubvunzewo vechikuru-chikuru, vachakutsanangurira." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Wokumusorosoro paaigovera ndudzi nhaka dzadzo, achipa rudzi norudzi nyika nomuganho wayo; aipa maererano nouwandi hwavatumwa vaMwari." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Asi iye Tenzi mugove waakazvisarudzira vanhu vake, Jakobho sorudzi, ndiye nhaka yake." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Akamuwana munyika yegwenga, ari murenje riya rinongova maungira oga; Akavaunganidza, akavariritira, achivachengeta sezai regondo." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Segondo rinogaririra manyana aro, richibhururuka zvaro nechepamusoro pedendere, richitambanudza mapapiro aro, nokutakura manyana aro," 
Deuteronomy32:12 Tenzi pachake akamutungamirira, pasina vamwe vamwari." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Akamupa nyika iri pakakwirira, akadya zvirimwa zvomuminda; akamuita kuti asvete zvake uchi hwomudombo, achiwana mafuta parukangarahwe." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Kumombe, mukaka wakakora, kune zvimwe zvipfuwo, mukaka chete, vaine hwayana nehondohwe dzakakora, nemombe nembudzi dzokuBhashani, nekoroni ine hura dzakasvika chaizvo, wakanwa mhanga yewaini." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Asi Jeshuruni, iwe Isiraeri, wakati wakora, wakatanga kupfacha. Wakati wakora, wafuta zvokupenya muviri, wakafuratira Mwari akakusika ukatsvinyira Dombo, ruponeso rwako." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Zvokuva navamwe vamwari zvakamutsa shanje yaMwari, zvakaipa zvavakaita zvakanyandura hasha dzaMwari." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Vakapira zvibayiro kumweya yakaipa, kumweya yakaipa isiri mwari kune vamwari vavasingamboziva; vamwari vanonzi vachangosvikawo mazuva ano vasina kana kumboremekedzwa namadzibaba avo." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Wakarega kuita hanya naiyeyu Dombo akakubereka, ukakanganwa zvako Mwari akakuumba." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Tenzi akazviona akabva achekana ukama navo, nokuti akashatiriswa navana vake vakomana navasikana," 
Deuteronomy32:20 akati regai ndivafuratire, ndione kuti pavo pachaperera papi; nokuti chizvarwa chakapanduka, vana vasingatendeseki." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Vakandipa kuitira shanje zvinhu zvisiri mwari, vakavirutsa hasha dzangu navamwari vavo vokuveza. Saka ndichaitawo kuti vave neshanje navanhu vasiri rudzi. Ndichavashatirisa norudzi rwamadzenga." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Hasha dzangu dzichaita somoto, uchapisa kusvikira pasi pasi munzvimbo yavakafa. Ucharoromesa nyika nezvinhu zvayo. Uchatungidza moto paugaro hwamakomo." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndichaita kuti nhamo dzivamomotere, miseve yangu ichaperera pavari." 
Deuteronomy32:24 Vachasara vaondoroka nenzara, vachaparadzwa nedenda rokupisa muviri. Vachapera nezvirwere zvinouraya, ndichavatumira zvikara zvinoruma; nenyoka dzinozvongonyoka napasi dzine uturu." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Pachena zvapo chaipo bakatwa, richaita kuti vapinde nhamo mudzimba umu kuchingova kutya koga koga. Nhamo iyoyo haina waichasiya ari mupenyu, jaya kana mhandara, mucheche nowachena musoro." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndakazviti regai ndivamwararitsire kure kure, pasave naanovayeukazve mukati mavanhu." 
Deuteronomy32:27 Asi ndakazeza zvangu kuzvikudza kwaizoita vavengi vavo, vofunga kuti, ‘Takavakurira nesimba redu pachedu.’ Vachiti, ‘Tenzi haasiri iye akaita zvose izvi, asi kuti isu nesimba redu ndisu takakurira.’" 
Deuteronomy32:28 “Nokuti vanhu ivava rudzi rwakatenderera musoro, vanhu vasinganzwisisi." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Dai vakachenjera vangadai vakanzwisisa izvi, vangadai vakaziva kuti izvozvi zvichavasvitsa kupi." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Ko munhu mumwe angadzinge sei chiuru chavanhu? Ko vanhu vaviri vangakwanise kudzinga gumi rezviuru zvevanhu here? Zvingaitike chete kana iye Dombo ravo avaisa mumaoko evavengi vavo; uyewo kana Tenzi avaramwira mumaoko avavengi vavo. 
Deuteronomy32:31 Nokuti iye dombo ravo akasiyana naMwari Dombo redu kana vavengi vedu vanotonyatsozviona. 
Deuteronomy32:32 Vanhu ivava vakaromba mbeu dzomugirepisi younzenza kuSodhomu, neyokuminda yeGomora. Magirepisi avo muchetura chaiwo, zvisumbu zvemagirepisi avo indye chaiyo kuvava." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Waini yavo ichepfu yenyoka chaiyo, uturu chaihwo hwemhakure." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Heya munoti izvozvi handina kuzvichengeta mudura remwoyo wangu here, ndikanyatsozvipfundira?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kutsiva ndokwangu, kudzosera ndokwangu. Nguva ichasvika yokuti rutsoka rwavo rwutsvedzemuke, nokuti zuva renjodzi yavo rava kusvika, kuparara kwavo kuchaitika nokukurumidza." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Asi Tenzi achanunura vanhu vake, achanzwira tsitsi varanda vake, vakatapwa kana vasina paanenge aona kuti varukutika havachisina simba, havachaziva chokuita." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Ndopaachati, ‘Ko vamwari vavo varipiko, dombo ravoka ravaipotera naro;’" 
Deuteronomy32:38 vamwari vaidya mafuta ezvibayiro zvavo, vachinwa waini yemipiro yezvokunwa? Ngavachisimukaka vakubatsire, ngavachikudziviriraka!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 Zvino chizivai kuti Ini Iyeni pano ndini iye. Hakuna mumwe mwari kunze kwangu. Ndini ndinouraya, uye ndini ndinopa upenyu. Ndinokuvadza uye ndinoporesa, hakuna anganunure chinhu chiri mumaoko angu." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ndinosumudza ruoko rwangu kudenga ndichiti, ‘Chokwadi ndinopika neni pachangu, ini Mwari mupenyu.’" 
Deuteronomy32:41 Pandicharodza bakatwa rangu rinohwituka kupenya, ndinenge ndongoda kuona kuti ruenzaniso rwaitwa here! Ndichatsividza vavengi vangu, ndigoranga vanondivenga." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ndichaita kuti miseve yangu iyerere ropa, renhapwa nerevanenge vaurayiwa, vakuru vakuru vanondivenga, bakatwa rangu richivaita kanyama kanyama." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Imi ndudzi dzose pemberai mufare navanhu vaMwari, nokuti achatsividza ropa ravaranda vake. Achatsiva vavengi vake, nokuchenura nyika yavanhu vake.”" 
Deuteronomy32:44 Mosesi akauya akadetemba mazwi ose erwiyo urwu vanhu vachizvinzwa, aiva naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Mosesi paakapedza kutaura mashoko ose aya kuvaIsiraeri vose 
Deuteronomy32:46 akati, “Pfundirai mumwoyo yenyu mashoko ose aya andakupai nhasi uno kuti muti vana venyu vanyatsochengeta zvose zvinorehwa nomutemo uyu." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Ndinodaro nokuti haasi mashoko asina maturo, asi ndiwo upenyu hwenyu. Mashoko iwaya ndiwo achakuraramisai kwenguva ndefu munyika yamuri kuyambukira Jorodhani kundotora kuti ive yenyu.”" 
Deuteronomy32:48 Musi iwoyo Tenzi akataurira Mosesi achiti," 
Deuteronomy32:49 “Chienda kumakomo eAbharimu ari munyika yeMoabhu, undokwira mugomo reNebho, rakatarisana neJeriko, uone nyika yeKanani yandiri kupa vaIsiraeri kuti ive yavo." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Uchandofira ikoko mugomo raunenge wakwira, uchienda zvako kune hama dzako vashakabvu, sezvakaita mukoma wako Aroni akafira mugomo reHoru akaenda kwakaenda vamwe vokwake," 
Deuteronomy32:51 nokuti hamuna kuvimba neni pane vanhu paye pamvura yeMeribha kuKadheshi murenje reZini. Hamuna kundieresa pakati pevaIsiraeri. 
Deuteronomy32:52 Naizvozvo uchaona nyika iyoyo iri mhiri, asi hausiri kuzondopinda munyika yandiri kupa vaIsiraeri.”" 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ichi ndicho chikomborero chakakumbirirwa vaIsiraeri naMosesi munhu waMwari asati afa. Akati; 
Deuteronomy33:2 “Tenzi akabva kuSinai akanyuka patiri achibva Seiri. Akazviratidza ari paGomo reParani. Akanga ane zviuru nezviuru zvevatsvene, kurudyi kwake kuine rimi romoto." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Honguka Tenzi anoda vanhu vake. Vose vatsvene vaiva muruoko rwake, saka vakatevera mutsoka dzake, zvokuita vachitozvitaurirwa nemi." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mosesi akatipa mutemo, ndiyo nhaka yemhuri yaJakobho." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Naizvozvo Tenzi akava mambo muIsiraeri, muJeshuruni, paye pakaungana vatungamiriri vavanhu, pamwechete namadzinza aIsiraeri." 
Deuteronomy33:6 “Rubheni ngaararame arege kufa, kunyange vanhu vake vachiverengeka zvavo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Akakomborera Judha achiti, “Tenzi inzwai waro chichemo chaJudha. Mumuunze kwakare kuvanhu vokwake. Murwirei imi Tenzi noruoko rwenyu.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Revhi akamukomborera achiti, “Ipai Tumimu neUrimu kuvaRevhi, vanhu venyu vakatendeka vamakaedza paMasa vamakaita mapitse navo pamvura yepaMeribha." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Pakuchengeta chirevo chenyu nechitenderano chenyu havana kumbokatara kuti ava ndiamai kana baba vavo kana zvokuti ava vakoma kana vanun'una vavo kunyange vana vavo chaivo. 
Deuteronomy33:10 Vachadzidzisa mhuri yaJakobho mirao yenyu, vachidzidzisa mhuri yaIsiraeri mutemo wenyu. Vachapisira rusenzi imi Mwari, vachikupirai chibayiro chinopiswa chose zvacho paatari." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Tenzi komborerai dzinza rake kuti risimbe, mufadzwe nebasa ramaoko ake; mutyore misana yavavengi vake, vavengi vake varege kumukazve.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Akakomborera Bhenjamini achiti, “Iri ndiro dzinza raTenzi repamwoyo, muswerandakaringa wake chaiye. Anomuchengeta sezai regondo, asingambosuduruki zvake pakati pavo.”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Akakomborera Josefi achiti, “Nyika yake ngaikomborerwe naTenzi, matenga ngaamupe mvura inonaya zvakanaka, neimwe inobvinina ichibva pasi." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ngaawane zvose zvakanaka zvinoibviswa nezuva, nezvinoibva mwedzi nomwedzi." 
Deuteronomy33:15 Ngaawane gomborero remichero yokutanga mumakomo ekare, zvakanakisisa zvechinyakare." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Ngaakomborerwe nezvose zvakanyanya kunaka zvinowanika panyika. Mwoyochena wouya aitaura ari mugwenzi. Makomborero aya ngaadurururukire pana Josefi, nokuti aiva mutungamiriri pakati pavakoma vake." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Achava mukono wenzombe pakati pavo, nyanga dzake dzichinge dzenyati, imwe yacho ndizvo zviuru nezviuru zvedzinza raManase, imwe yacho ndiwo mazana akazanirana edzinza raEfuremu; nadzo achatunga marudzi avanhu kusvikira kwakaperera nyika.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Akakomborera Zebhuruni achiti, “Zebhuruni pembera ufare zvako pane zvaunoita, newewo Isakari fara zvako uri pamatendhe ako." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Vachakokera ndudzi dzavanhu kugomo, kuzopira zvibayiro zviri pamutemo, nokuti vachawana upfumi huzhinji hwomugungwa, noupfumi hwuzhinji hwakavanzwa mujecha.”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Akakomborera Gadhi achiti, “Akakomborerwa zvake Gadhi akawana nyika huru! Achagaramo akati hwatata seshumba, achibvambura ruoko nokutsemura dehenya." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Akazvisarudzira pachake nyika yakanakisisa, yakanga yakachengeterwa mutungamiriri wehondo; akauya somutungamiriri wavanhu, achinyatsochengeta zvirevo nemitemo yaTenzi navaIsiraeri.”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Akakomborera Dhani achiti, “Dhani mwana weshumba chaiye anoita zvokuuruka achibva kuBhashani.”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Akakomborera Nafutari achiti, “Nafutari akagutsikana nomwoyochena waakaitirwa, azere namakomborero aTenzi; gungwa nenyika yokumaodzanyemba ndezvake.”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Akakomborera Asheri achiti, “Asheri ngaakomborerwe kupfuura mamwe madzinza ose. Ngaave wapamwoyo kuvakoma navanun'una vake aite mafuta okutsika netsoka." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Zvihuri zvapamisuo yako ngazvive zvesimbi nezvomundarira kusimba, urarame upenyu hwako hwose uri chirambakusakara." 
Deuteronomy33:26 Chinzwa Isiraeri, iyewe Jeshuruni, hakuna mumwe akaita saMwari anofamba nomumatenga, anofamba nechiremera chake nomumakore kuzokubatsira." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Mwari, Nyakugaraaripo ndiye bako rako, anokutakura mumaoko ake nokusingaperi. Anofanokudzingira vavengi vako achiti, ‘Vaparadze.’" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Saka Isiraeri agere zvake murugare oga, vana vaJakobho vagere zvavo pavo voga, munyika yomaguta embesa newaini, ina matenga anonayisa dova." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Zvako iwe Isiraeri wakakomborerwa! Ndianiwo zvake angaenzaniswe newe, rudzi rwakaponeswa naTenzi ndiye nhoo yako inokubatsira, ndiye bakatwa rinokuita kuti ukunde. Vavengi vako vachauya vachiteterera kwauri. Nzvimbo dzavo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira uchaita zvokudzitsikirira zvako.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Mosesi akabva mumapani eMoabhu akaenda kumakomo eNebho akandokwira pamusoro peGomo rePisiga rakatarisana neJeriko. Tenzi ndokumuratidza nyika yose iyoyo kubvira kuGireadhi kusvikira kwaDhani," 
Deuteronomy34:2 naNafutari yose nenyika yose yaEfuremu naManase, nenyika yose yaJudha kusvikira kuGungwa rokumadokero" 
Deuteronomy34:3 nokuNegevhu, nebani reJeriko, guta remiti yemirara kudzamara kuZoari." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Tenzi akamutaurira achiti, “Ndiyoyi nyika yandakatsidzira vanaAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho ndichiti, ‘Ndichaipa kuzvizvarwa zvako. Ndati uione nameso ako, asi hausiri kuzoyambukirako.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy34:5 Naizvozvo Mosesi muranda waTenzi akafira ikoko munyika yeMoabhu sokureva kwaTenzi. 
Deuteronomy34:6 Akamuviga mubani munyika yeMoabhu pakatarisana neBhetipeori. Asi hakuna anoziva nzvimbo yaakavigwa kusvikira nhasi uno. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Mosesi akafa ava namakore zana namakumi maviri. Muviri wake wakanga uchakagwinya, maziso ake achinyatsoona zvakanaka." 
Deuteronomy34:8 VaIsiraeri vakachema Mosesi kwamazuva makumi matatu mumapani eMoabhu kusvikira nguva yokuchema nhamo yorufu rwake yapera. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Zvino Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni aiva azere nomweya woungwaru nokuti Mosesi akanga aisa maoko ake pamusoro wake. VaIsiraeri vaimuteerera vachiita zvakanga zvataurirwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Deuteronomy34:10 Hakuna kana kuzomuka muporofita muIsiraeri akaita saMosesi aizivana naTenzi uso nouso," 
Deuteronomy34:11 kana totarisa zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvakatumwa Mosesi naTenzi kundoita munyika yeIjipiti kuna Farao, nokumakurukota ake, nokunyika yake yose." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Uye kana totarisawo masimba makuru aaiva nawo namabasa makuru anotyisa akaitwa naMosesi vaIsiraeri vose vachiona. 
Joshua1:1 Kuzoti Mosesi muranda waTenzi afa, iye Tenzi akataurira Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni mubatsiri waMosesi achiti," 
Joshua1:2 “Muranda wangu Mosesi akafa saka iwe, chisimuka uyambuke Jorodhani urwu, iwe navanhu ava vose, muende munyika yandiri kupa vaIsiraeri ivava." 
Joshua1:3 Pose zvapo pamuchatsika norutsoka rwenyu, ndinokupai sokutsidza kwandakaita kuna Mosesi." 
Joshua1:4 Kubvira kurenje kusvikira kuRebhanoni uku, kubvirawo kurwizi rukuru rwaYufuratesi nenyika yose yavaHiti kusvikira kugungwa guru rokumadokero, ndiyo ichava nyika yenyu." 
Joshua1:5 Hakuna achagona kumirisana newe, mazuva oupenyu hwako hwose. Ndichava newe sezvandaingoita naMosesi. Handimbokusiyi uri woga, kana kukurega uchikundikana." 
Joshua1:6 Shinga, utsunge mwoyo nokuti ndiwe uchaita kuti vanhu ava vagare nhaka yenyika yandakatsidza kumadzibaba avo kuvapa." 
Joshua1:7 Chako iwe chete kushinga mwoyo nokuva nomwoyo wechivindi chaiwo, uchenjerere kuita zvose maererano nomutemo wawakaudzwa naMosesi muranda wangu. Usawane chimwe chaunotsaudzira pauri uchienda uku kana uku, kuti unyatsobudirira kwose kwaunoenda." 
Joshua1:8 Bhuku romutemo iri ngarirege zvaro kumbobva pamuromo pako, ufungisise zviri mariri siku nesikati, kuti unyatsoita maererano nezvose zvakanyorwamo, ndopazvichakufambira zvakanaka ugonyatsobudirirawo." 
Joshua1:9 Handiti ndakuudza kuti shinga utsunge mwoyo. Usambotya zvako, kana kuzeza nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wako achava newe kwose kwauchaenda.”" 
Joshua1:10 Joshuwa akataurira vatungamiriri vavanhu achiti," 
Joshua1:11 “Endai mutevedze nomumatendhe muchiudza vanhu kuti, ‘Gadzirirai mbuva yenyu nokuti mushure memazuva matatu muchayambuka Jorodhani muchindotora nyika yamuri kupiwa naTenzi, Mwari wenyu kuti ive yenyu.’ ”" 
Joshua1:12 Joshuwa akataurira vedzinza rokwaRubheni neraGadhi nechikamu chepakati napakati chevedzinza rokwaManase achiti," 
Joshua1:13 “Yeukai zvamakaudzwa naMosesi, muranda waTenzi achiti, ‘Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ari kukupaiwo pokugara uye kuti ari kukupai nyika iyi." 
Joshua1:14 Madzimai nepwere dzenyu vachasara pamwechete nemombe dzenyu munyika ino yamakapiwa naMosesi kumabvazuva kwaJorodhani. Asi varwi venyu vose vachayambuka, vakapakata zvombo zvokurwa, vatungamire mberi kwehama dzenyu, muvabatsire," 
Joshua1:15 kudzamara Tenzi apawo hama dzenyu pokugara, sezvaakakuitiraiwo imi, vandotorawo nyika yavari kupiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu. Ndopamungazodzokawo zvenyu mogara munyika yenhaka yenyu yamakapiwa naMosesi muranda waTenzi, kumhiri kwaJorodhani kunobuda nezuva moiita yenyu.’ ”" 
Joshua1:16 Ivo vakati kuna Joshuwa, “Zvose zvamatiudza, ndozvatichaita, kwose kwamunotituma tinoenda." 
Joshua1:17 Sokuteerera kwataingoita Mosesi pazvinhu zvose, ndokuteerera kwatichakuitaiwo. Chete, dai Tenzi, Mwari wenyu angovawo nemi sezvaiita naMosesi!" 
Joshua1:18 Ani naani zvake anopanduka achiramba zvamunenge mareva, kana asingateereri zvamunomuudza, chingave chii zvacho chamunenge mamutemera kuita, ngaaurayiwe. Chenyu imi rambai makashinga, makatsunga mwoyo.”" 
Joshua2:1 Joshuwa, mwanakomana waNuni, akatuma varume vaviri vachibva kuShitimu kundosora muchiverevere achiti, “Endai mundoongorora nyika iyo, zvikurukuru muongorore Jeriko.” Vakaenda, vakasvikira mumba mepfambi yainzi Rahabhu, vakararamo." 
Joshua2:2 Mambo weJeriko akataurirwa kuti, “Kune vamwe varume vechiIsiraeri vauya muno kuzosora nyika ino.”" 
Joshua2:3 Ipapo mambo weJeriko akatuma shoko kuna Rahabhu rokuti, “Buritsa varume vauya kwauri vapinda mumba mako nokuti vauya kuzosora nyika yose.”" 
Joshua2:4 Asi mukadzi uyu akatora varume ava akavahwandisa akati, “Ichokwadi, varume ivavo vauya kwandiri, asi handina kuziva kwavanobva nako." 
Joshua2:5 Kuzoti kwasviba, tave kupfiga suo guru reguta, varume ivavo vabva vaenda. Zvino handisi kuziva kwavaenda nako. Vateverei nokukurumidza, munotovabata.”" 
Joshua2:6 Asi iye akanga avakwidza padenga remba akavahwandisa mumashanga efurakisi aakanga arongerera pamusoro pemba. 
Joshua2:7 Saka varume vaya vakabvapo vachironda vasori vaya, vakaenda nenzira yokunaJorodhani vakasvika kumazambuko. Pavakangoti budeimo, suo guru reguta rakabva rapfigwa." 
Joshua2:8 Vasati vavata, mukadzi uyu akakwira padenga pavaiva vari," 
Joshua2:9 akati kuvarume ivavo, “Chandinoziva ndechokuti, Tenzi akakupai nyika ino uye tiri kukutyai chaizvo, vanhu vose vomunyika ino vari kukutyai." 
Joshua2:10 Chandinodariro ndechichi chokuti, takanzwa zvokuomesa kwakaitwa mvura yeGungwa Dzvuku naTenzi mberi kwenyu pamaibva kuIjipiti, tikanzwawo zvokuparadza kwamakaita Sihoni naOgu, madzimambo maviri avaAmori, kumhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Joshua2:11 Patakazvinzwa takadedera, tikarasa mwoyo pamusana penyu nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndiye Mwari kudenga kumusoro, napanyika pasi pano." 
Joshua2:12 Saka chinditsidziraiwo mupike naTenzi kuti zvandakuitirai mwoyochena, imi muchaitirawo vemba yababa wangu mwoyochena, mundipe chiratidzo chinovimbika chemhiko iyoyo." 
Joshua2:13 Tsidzai kuti muchararamisa baba naamai vangu, nehanzvadzi, uye vakoma navanun'una vangu, navose vemhuri dzavo, mutinunure kurufu.”" 
Joshua2:14 Varume ava vakapika vachimutsindidzawo kuti, “Tinosarudza zvedu kufa pane kuti imi mufe! Kana mukarega kuudza vanhu nezvenyaya yedu, tichakuitirawo mwoyochena tichichengeta shoko redu kwamuri patichapiwa nyika ino naTenzi.”" 
Joshua2:15 Mukadzi uyu akavaburitsa napawindo, akavadzikisa pasi netambo nokuti imba yake yakanga yakavakirwa murusvingo rweguta iri, saka aitogara murusvingo chaimo." 
Joshua2:16 Mukadzi uyu akavati, “Endai kumakomo kuti murege kuwanikwa novokuronda. Vandai ikoko kwamazuva matatu kusvikira vokuronda vacho vadzoka mozoenda zvenyu.”" 
Joshua2:17 Varume ava vakamuti, “Hatimbokunyengedza pamhiko yawatipikisa." 
Joshua2:18 Chinzwa kana tava kuzopinda munyika ino sungirira kamucheka katsvuku aka pawindo paunotiburitsa napo uchitidzikisa pasi. Unganidza vana baba naamai vako, nehanzvadzi dzako nemhuri yose yababa wako, mumba mako." 
Joshua2:19 Kuwana anobuda mumba mako imomo achitoenda zvake panze munzira, rufu rwake ndorwokuzviparira, haizovi mhosva yedu. Asi kana kukangourayiwa ani zvake anenge anewe mumba mako, mhosva ndeyedu." 
Joshua2:20 Asi ukangoudza munhu nezvenyaya yedu iyoyi, zvemhiko yako iyi zvatibva, haichatisunga.”" 
Joshua2:21 Mukadzi akapindura achiti, “Ndizvozvo, ngazviitwe saizvozvo.” Ndokubva avarega voenda zvavo, iye ndokusungirira kamucheka katsvuku kaya pawindo." 
Joshua2:22 Varume ava vakabvapo, vakananga kumakomo vakagarako mazuva matatu kudzamara vaivaronda vadzoka, vakanga vavatsvaka munzira yose vakavashaya." 
Joshua2:23 Varume vaviri vaya vakaburuka mumakomo, vakayambuka, vakasvika kuna Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni, vakamuudza zvose zvavakasangana nazvo." 
Joshua2:24 Vakataurira Joshuwa vachiti, “Chokwadi chaicho ndechokuti, Tenzi atoisa nyika iyoyo mumaoko edu, vose vageremo vapera nokutitya.”" 
Joshua3:1 Joshuwa akafumomuka mangwanani akasimuka kuShitimu akaenda kuna Jorodhani pamwechete navaIsiraeri vose, vakambogarapo vasati vayambuka." 
Joshua3:2 Kwakati kwapera mazuva matatu, vatungamiriri vakapinda mumatendhe," 
Joshua3:3 vachiudza vanhu vachiti, “Kana mukaona vapristi, vaRevhi vatakura bhokisi rechitenderano raTenzi, Mwari wenyu, imiwo ibvai masimuka mubve pamunenge muri muritevere," 
Joshua3:4 ndokuti muzive kwokuenda nako nokuti hamusati mambosvika nokuno. Chiripo chete ndechokuti pakati penyu naro panofanira kuva nechinhambwe chekiromita rimwechete, musasvike pedyo naro.”" 
Joshua3:5 Joshuwa akataurira vanhu achiti, “Zvichenurei nokuti mangwana Tenzi achaita zvinhu zvinoshamisa pakati penyu.”" 
Joshua3:6 Joshuwa akataurira vapristi achiti, “Chitakurai bhokisi rechitenderano mutungamirire vanhu muende mberi kwavo.” Vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano vakatungamirira vanhu." 
Joshua3:7 Tenzi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Ndichatangisa nhasi uno kukusimudzira pamusoro mukati mavaIsiraeri vagoziva kuti ndinewe sezvandaingova naMosesi." 
Joshua3:8 Udza vapristi vanenge vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano kuti pavanosvika kumahombekombe kwaJorodhani, vamire vakati dzororo muna Jorodhani.”" 
Joshua3:9 Joshuwa akataurira vaIsiraeri achiti, “Uyai kuno munzwe zvarehwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu.”" 
Joshua3:10 Joshuwa akati, “Mwari mupenyu, ari pakati penyu uye haambokundikani kukudzingirai vaKanani navaHiti navaHivhi navaPerizi navaGirigashi navaAmori navaJebhusi. Zvamuchazviziva nazvo ndezvizvi zvokuti:" 
Joshua3:11 bhokisi rechitenderano raTenzi wepasi pose richakutungamirirai kuyambuka Jorodhani. 
Joshua3:12 Saka chisarudzai varume gumi navaviri, mumadzinza ose avaIsiraeri, murume mumwechete panzinza roga roga." 
Joshua3:13 Tsoka dzavapristi vanenge vakatakura bhokisi raTenzi, Tenzi wepasi pose padzichatsika mumvura yaJorodhani, mvura iyoyo yaJorodhani ichaganhuka kuerera mvura, inenge ichierera ichibva kumusoro ichaita murwi kumira.”" 
Joshua3:14 Naizvozvo vanhu pavakasimuka paiva namatendhe avo, vachindoyambuka Jorodhani vakatungamirirwa mberi kwavo navapristi vakanga vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano."
