Joshua3:15 Jorodhani urwu runozara mhiri nemhiri panguva yose yokukohwa. Vaprisiti vakanga vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano pavakasvika pana Jorodhani, tsoka dzavo padzakangoti tsikei mumvura," 
Joshua3:16 mvura yaibva nechokumusoro kwarwo yakati murwi tuku ndokusundana yakati fuse fuse kusvikura kuAdhamu, guta riri pedyo neZaretani. Mvura iya yaierera ichidzika narwo ichienda kugungwa reArabha, gungwa romunyu, yakabva yanyatsopararaniswa, vanhu vakayambuka pakatarisana neJeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Vapristi vainge vakatakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano vakanyatsomira zvavo pasi pakaoma, pakati paJorodhani, vaIsiraeri vose vachivapfuura kusvikira rudzi rwavo rwose rwayambuka napakaoma." 
Joshua4:1 Vanhu vose pavakapedza kuyambuka Jorodhani, Tenzi akati kuna Joshuwa," 
Joshua4:2 “Sarudza varume gumi navaviri muvanhu, murume mumwechete padzinza," 
Joshua4:3 uvati, ‘Torai mabwe gumi namaviri apano apa pakati paJorodhani panga pamire vapristi chaipo, muatakure muende nawo, mundoaisa pamucharara usiku hwanhasi.’ ”" 
Joshua4:4 Joshuwa akadaidza varume gumi navaviri muvaIsiraeri, vaakanga asarudza achitora murume mumwechete padzinza." 
Joshua4:5 Zvino Joshuwa akati kwavari, “Endai mberi kwebhokisi rechitenderano chaTenzi Mwari wenyu, pakati paJorodhani, mumwe nomumwe wenyu atore ibwe aritakure papfudzi rake, maererano nouwandi hwamadzinza avaIsiraeri." 
Joshua4:6 Itai izvozvi kuti chigova chiratidzo; pakati penyu chokuti mangwana, kana vana venyu vobvunza kuti, ‘Ko kwamuri imi mabwe ayo anorevei’?" 
Joshua4:7 Imi muvataurire kuti, ‘Mvura yaJorodhani yakamboganhurwa pamberi pebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano pakuyambuka kwarakaita Jorodhani. Mvura yaJorodhani yakaganhurwa. Saka mabwe iwaya achava chiyeuchidzo kuvaIsiraeri nokusingaperi.’ ”" 
Joshua4:8 Saizvozvo vaIsiraeri ivavo vakaita zvavakaudzwa naJoshuwa. Vakatora mabwe gumi namaviri pakati paJorodhani maererano nouwandi hwamadzinza avaIsiraeri sokuudziwa kwakaitwa Joshuwa naTenzi. Vakaatakura vakayambukira nawo kwavakandorara, vakaaisa ikoko." 
Joshua4:9 Joshuwa akarongawo mabwe gumi namaviri pakati paJorodhani, pakanga pamire vapristi paya, vainge vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano. Mabwe iwayo achiripo nanhasi uno," 
Joshua4:10 nokuti vapristi vainge vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano vakaramba vamire pakati paJorodhani kusvikira zvose zvakanga zvaudzwa Joshuwa naTenzi kuti ataurire vanhu zvapera kuitwa, maererano nezvose zvakanga zvaudzwa Joshuwa naMosesi. Vanhu vakaita chipitipiti kuyambuka." 
Joshua4:11 Kuzoti vanhu vose vapedza kuyambuka, vapristi vakayambukawo nebhokisi rechitenderano vanhu vachiona." 
Joshua4:12 Vedzinza rokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi nechikamu chapakati napakati chevedzinza rokwaManase vakayambuka vakapakata zvombo zvehondo vari mberi kwavaIsiraeri, sokuudzwa kwavakanga vaitwa naMosesi." 
Joshua4:13 Kwakayambuka zviuru zvinenge makumi mana zvavanhu vakanga vakapakata zvombo zvehondo pana Tenzi vakandosvika kumapani eJeriko. 
Joshua4:14 Musi iwoyo Tenzi akasimudzira Joshuwa pamusoro vaIsiraeri vose vachiona, vakamuremekedza sokuremekedza kwavaiita Mosesi upenyu hwake hwose." 
Joshua4:15 Tenzi akataurira Joshuwa achiti," 
Joshua4:16 “Chiudza vapristi vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano vachibuda muna Jorodhani.” 
Joshua4:17 Saka Joshuwa akati kuvapristi, “Chibudai muna Jorodhani!”" 
Joshua4:18 Vapristi vainge vakatakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano pavakakwira vachibva muna Jorodhani, pavakangoti simudzei tsoka dzavo vachitsika pasi pakaoma, mvura yaJorodhani yakabva yadzokera pakare ikafashukira mhiri nemhiri sezvayakanga yakaita." 
Joshua4:19 VaIsiraeri vakabuda muna Jorodhani pazuva rechigumi romwedzi wokutanga, vakandodzika matendhe avo vava kuGirigari, kumuganhu wokumabvazuva weJeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Joshuwa akaronga matombo gumi namaviri iwayo avakatora muna Jorodhani kuGirigari. 
Joshua4:21 Akataurira vaIsiraeri kuti, “Kana mangwana, zvizukuru zvenyu zvozobvunza madzibaba azvo kuti, ‘Matombo aya anorevei?’" 
Joshua4:22 Ipapa izotaurira vana venyu kuti, ‘VaIsiraeri vakayambuka Jorodhani urwu napakaoma.’" 
Joshua4:23 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu akakuomeserai mvura yaJorodhani kusvikira mayambuka, sezvakaitawo iye Tenzi, Mwari wenyu kugungwa Dzvuku raakatiomesera kusvikira tayambuka," 
Joshua4:24 kuitira kuti ndudzi dzose dzapasi pose dzigoziva kuti Tenzi ane simba guru kwazvo, uyewo kuti mutye Tenzi Mwari wenyu wose narini narini.”" 
Joshua5:1 Madzimambo ose avaAmori akanga ari kumhiri kwaJorodhani nechokumadokero, namadzimambo ose avaKanani aigara munyasi megungwa, pavakanzwa kuti Tenzi akaomesera vaIsiraeri mvura yaJorodhani kusvikira vayambuka, mwoyo yavo yakati papata nokutya, vakapererwa nesimba pamusana pavaIsiraeri." 
Joshua5:2 Panguva iyoyo Tenzi akataurira Joshuwa achiti, “Gadzira mapanga amabwe omusarara udzingise vaIsiraeri zvakare.”" 
Joshua5:3 Saka Joshuwa akagadzira mapanga amabwe egwenya, ndokudzingisa vaIsiraeri kuGibheatihaararoti." 
Joshua5:4 Chikonzero chokuti Joshuwa avadzingise ndechokuti, pavanhu vose vakabuda muIjipiti vechirume, varwi vose vehondo vakanga vatofira murenje vachiri murwendo, vabva kuIjipiti." 
Joshua5:5 Kunyange zvazvo vanhu vose vakabuda muIjipiti vakanga vadzingiswa, asi vanhu vose vakaberekerwa munzira murenje vabva kuIjipiti vakanga vasina kudzingiswa." 
Joshua5:6 Zviripo ndezvokuti vaIsiraeri vakafamba murenje kwamakumi mana amakore kudzamara vanhu vose ivavo varwi vehondo vakanga vabva kuIjipiti vaparara nokuti havana kuteerera Tenzi. Tenzi akavapikira kuti havazombofa vakaona nyika iyoyo yakatsidzwa naiye Tenzi kumadzibaba avo kuti tizopiwa, nyika yakanaka nyika yomukaka nouchi." 
Joshua5:7 Saka vana vavo, vaakaisa panzvimbo yavo, ndivo vakadzingiswa naJoshuwa. Vakanga vari vanhu vasina kudzingiswa nokuti vakanga vasina kudzingiswa munzira." 
Joshua5:8 Vanhu vose pavakapedza kudzingiswa vakambogara munzvimbo dzavo, mumatendhe imomo kusvikira vapora." 
Joshua5:9 Tenzi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Nhasi uno ndabvisa kwamuri kuzvidzwa kwenyu kwokuIjipiti.” Ndosaka zita renzvimbo iyoyo richinzi Girigari kusvikira pari nhasi." 
Joshua5:10 VaIsiraeri pavakanga vakadzika matendhe avo kuGirigari, vakadyirapo Pasika pazuva regumi nechina remwedzi iwoyo kumanheru mumapani eJeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Mangwana acho, pasika yapera pazuva rimwechetero vakadya zvirimwa zvenyika iyoyo, chingwa chisina mbiriso nembesanwa dzakakangwa." 
Joshua5:12 Rava ramangwana acho, zvemana zviya zvakabva zvapera, pavakadya mbesa dzenyika iyoyo. VaIsiraeri havana kuzopiwa mana zvakare, asi vakadya zvirimwa zvenyika yeKanani mugore iroro." 
Joshua5:13 Joshuwa paakanga ava pedyo neJeriko, akatarisa akaona mumwe murume amire mberi kwake muruoko rwake aiine bakatwa rakazvomhorwa muhara. Joshuwa akamuvinga akamuti, “Ko iwe uri wedu here, kana kuti uri mumwe wavavengi vedu?”" 
Joshua5:14 Iye akati, “Kwete. Asi ndauya somutungamiriri wehondo yaTenzi.” Ipapo Joshuwa akati pasi zvambarara, achimuremekedza achiti, “Changamire, chiiko chamunoda kutaura neni muranda wenyu?”" 
Joshua5:15 Mutungamiriri wehondo yaTenzi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Bvisa shangu mutsoka dzako nokuti paumire inzvimbo inoera,” Joshuwa ndokuita saizvozvo." 
Joshua6:1 Guta reJeriko rakanga ranyatsonzi ndendende kupfigwa mukati nokunze pamusana pavaIsiraeri. Hakuna aibudamo kana kupindamo. 
Joshua6:2 Tenzi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Chinzwa, ndaisa Jeriko mumaoko ako zvose namambo waro navarwi varo vehondo vakasimba." 
Joshua6:3 Varwi vose vehondo munofanira kufamba muchitenderera guta irori, muritenderere kamwechete. Ndozvamuchaita kwamazuva matanhatu." 
Joshua6:4 Vapristi vanomwe vachange vane hwamanda dzenyanga dzehondohwe vari mberi kwebhokisi rechitenderano. Pazuva rechinomwe forai muchitenderera guta irori kanomwe, vapristi vachiridza hwamanda." 
Joshua6:5 Pavanozoti rebesei kuridza hwamanda yorunyanga rwehondohwe pamunongonzwa hwamanda iyoyo, vanhu vose ngavazhambe nezwi guru. Rusvingo rweguta iri ruchakoromokera pasi kuti warara, munhu wose ngaabva ati karakata napakanangana naye.”" 
Joshua6:6 Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni akadaidza vapristi akavati, “Takurai bhokisi rechitenderano, vapristi vanomwe vatakure hwamanda nomwe dzenyanga dzehondohwe vari mberi kwebhokisi raTenzi.”" 
Joshua6:7 Akati kuvanhu, “Chifambai muchitenderera guta iri, varume vakapakata zvombo zvehondo vaende mberi kwebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano.”" 
Joshua6:8 Joshuwa paakaudza vanhu izvozvo, vapristi vanomwe vakanga vane hwamanda nomwe dzenyanga dzehondohwe dziya pana Tenzi vakatungamira vachiridza hwamanda idzodzo vachiteverwa nebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano." 
Joshua6:9 Varume vakanga vakapakata zvombo vakaenda pamberi pavapristi vairidza hwamanda, shure kwebhokisi rechitenderano kwaiteverawo vamwe vokuchengetedzako iyo hwamanda ichingodandaura chete." 
Joshua6:10 Asi Joshuwa akayambira vanhu achiti, “Musambozhamba zvenyu kana kuwana mumwe wenyu anoti chwe kana kuti zvako muromo bufu kusvikira musi wandichakutii zhambai. Ndopamuchazhamba ipapo.”" 
Joshua6:11 Saka aiti bhokisi raTenzi ritenderere guta iroro kamwechete vachidzokera zvavo kumatendhe kundorara pamatendhe. 
Joshua6:12 Joshuwa aifumomuka rungwanani, vapristi votakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano," 
Joshua6:13 vapristi vanomwe vaya vehwamanda nomwe dzenyanga dzehondohwe, vaienda mberi kwebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano, vachingoridza chete hwamanda. Varume vainge vakapakata zvombo zvehondo vaifamba vari mberi kwavo, shurewo kwebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano kuchitevera vokuchengetedza shure, iyo ngondo yehwamanda ichingodandaura chete." 
Joshua6:14 Nezuva rechipiri vakafamba vachitenderera guta iroro kamwechete, vakadzokera kumatendhe. Ndozvavakaita kwamazuva matanhatu." 
Joshua6:15 Pazuva rechinomwe vakamuka mambakwedza, vakafamba vachitenderera guta irori sezvavaichiita zvimwechetezvo kanomwe. Asi musi iwoyu chete ndiwo wavakatenderera guta iri kanomwe." 
Joshua6:16 Vakati zvino vatenderera kechinomwe, vapristi varidzawo hwamanda, Joshuwa akati kuvanhu “Daidzirai nokuti Tenzi aisa guta irori mumaoko enyu." 
Joshua6:17 Guta rose nezvose zviri mariri zvaturirwa kuna Tenzi kuti zviparadzwe kuna Tenzi kusiya chete Rahabhu, pfambi iya pamwechete navose vaanavo mumba make, ndivo vachararama nokuti akahwandisa vasori vaya vatakatuma." 
Joshua6:18 Asi siyanai zvenyu nezvinhu zvaturirwa kuparadzirwa Mwari imi mambozviturira kuparadzirwa Mwari mungadaro mukatora chinhu chipi nechipi chakadai, gungano ravaIsiraeri rikavawo chinhu chakaturirwa kuparadzirwa Mwari, mutiunzire nhamo." 
Joshua6:19 Asi sirivha yose yomo nendarama, nemidziyo yendarira neyesimbi zvava zvinhu zvinoera zvaTenzi, ngazviiswe munochengeterwa upfumi hwaTenzi.”" 
Joshua6:20 Saka vanhu vakazhambarara, iyo hwamanda yichiridzwa. Vanhu pavakangonzwa kurira kwehwamanda vakazhambarara zvikuru, rusvingo rukakoromokera pasi rukati warara, vanhu vose vakati karakata kupinda muguta nepakanangana naye, vakabva vakurira guta irori." 
Joshua6:21 Vakaparadza zvose zvomuguta iroro nebakatwa, zvose zvazvo varume navakadzi, vakuru navaduku, nemombe nehwai namadhongi." 
Joshua6:22 Joshuwa akati kuvarume vaviri vaya vaakatuma kundosora nyika, “Endai mumba mepfambi iya muburitse mukadzi iyeyo navose vokwake, sokutsidza kwamakaita kwaari.”" 
Joshua6:23 Saka majaya akambouya kuzosora aya akapindamo akaburitsa Rahabhu nababa vake naamai vake nehanzvadzi dzake navose vokwake nehama dzake dzose, akavapa pokugara kunze kwamatendhe avaIsiraeri." 
Joshua6:24 Vakaroromesa guta iroro nomoto nazvose zvaivamo. Asi sirivha nendarama nemidziyo yendarira neyesimbi, vakazviisa munochengeterwa upfumi hwemba yaTenzi." 
Joshua6:25 Joshuwa akararamisa Rahabhu, pfambi iya, nevemhuri yababa wake navose vokwake, nanhasi uno mukadzi iyeyu agere mukati mavaIsiraeri nokuti akahwandisa nhume dzakanga dzatumwa naJoshuwa kundosora Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Panguva iyoyo Joshuwa akayambira vanhu achiti: “Munhu achasimuka zvake ovaka guta iri reJeriko, Tenzi ngaamuone. Kuchera kwake ugaro hwaro, kutange norufu rwomwanakomana wake wedangwe. Kumiswa kwemisuo yaro kupere nokufa, kunyangwe kwomwanakomana wake wegotwe.”" 
Joshua6:27 Saka Tenzi akava naJoshuwa, mukurumbira wake ukapararira nenyika yose." 
Joshua7:1 Asi vaIsiraeri havana kuva vanhu vakatendeka panyaya yezvinhu zvakaturirwa kuparadzirwa Mwari. Chakaitika ndechokuti, Akani mwanakomana waKarumi, muzukuru waZabhudhi, mwanakomana waZeraha, wedzinza rokwaJudha akatora zvimwe zvinhu pazvinhu zviya zvakanga zvaturirwa kuparadzirwa Mwari, hasha dzaTenzi dzikavirukira vaIsiraeri." 
Joshua7:2 Joshuwa akatuma vamwe varume vachibva kuJeriko kuenda kuAi, guta riri pedyo neBhetihavheni nechokumabvazuva kweBheteri, akavati, “Kwirai uku mundosora nyika.” Varume ivavo vakakwira ikoko, vakasora guta reAi." 
Joshua7:3 Vakadzoka kuna Joshuwa vakati kwaari, “Regai kuti vanhu vose vakwireko, ingotii chete varume zviuru zviviri kana zvitatu vakwire ikoko, varwise guta reAi. Regai zvenyu kutambudza vanhu nokuendesa vose ikoko nokuti vanhu voko vashoma.”" 
Joshua7:4 Saka vanhu vainge zviuru zvitatu vakabva mugungano vakaendako. Asi vakamhanyiswa navarume vokuAi. 
Joshua7:5 Varume vokuAi vakauraya ainge makumi matatu avanhu ane vanhu vatanhatu. Vakadzingirirana kubvira pasuo guru reguta ravo kusvikira kuShebhurimu vachivauraya mumateru imomo. VaIsiraeri vakadedera, mwoyo yavo ikazanga nokutya." 
Joshua7:6 Joshuwa akabvarura hanzu dzake neshungu, akandoti pasi zvambarara pamberi pebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano kusvikira manheru, iye pamwechete navakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri, vakazvidira dota mumusoro." 
Joshua7:7 Ndopakazonamata Joshuwa achiti: “O babawe kani! Nhai Tenzi Mwari, makagoyambutsireiko vanhu ava Jorodhani. Kuzotiisa here chokwadi mumaoko avaAmori, kuti vatiparadze zvavo? Inga, dai takangosva tagara zvedu kumhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Joshua7:8 Zvino ndingagoti kudii chaizvo, nhai Tenzi kana vaIsiraeri vachidai kutiza vavengi vavo?" 
Joshua7:9 Handiti vaKanani navagari vose vomunyika ino vachazvinzwa, vakatikomberana zvavo, vakatitsakatisa panyika zvokusazombonzwika zvedu kana zita. Zvino imi noukuru hwezita renyu, muchava papi ipapa?”" 
Joshua7:10 Tenzi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Simuka apo! Ko ndochii ichocho kuzvambarara kudaro." 
Joshua7:11 VaIsiraeri vaita chitadzo, vatyora chitenderano changu navo, nokutora kwavaita zvimwe zvinhu zvakashorwa kuti zviparadzwe. Vaba, vakareva nhema, vakabatanidza zvavo zvinhu izvozvo nezvinhu zvavo." 
Joshua7:12 Ndokusaka vaIsiraeri vasisakwanisi kumirisana navavengi vavo vachitovapa gotsi kuvatiza. Izvozvi ivo ndivo vatova chinhu chakaturirwa kuneni kuti chiparadzwe. Kubvira iye zvino zvokuva nemi ndarega kusatoti matoparadza pakati penyu chinhu ichocho chakaturirweni kuti chiparadzwe. 
Joshua7:13 Simuka, uchenure vanhu uti, zvichenurei mugadzirire mangwana nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri ati, ‘Mukati menyu mune zvinhu zvakuturirwa kuna Mwari kuti zviparadzwe. Saka imi vaIsiraeri, hamungakwanise kumirisana navavengi venyu kusvikira mabvisa zvinhu izvozvo pakati penyu zvakaturirwa kwandiri kuti zviparadzwe." 
Joshua7:14 Naizvozvo mangwanani munofanira kuuya kuno muri dzinza nedzinza. Dzinza rinenge rabatwapo naTenzi richapinda mudariro mhuri nemhuri. Kwozotiwo mhuri yomo inenge yabatwapo naTenzi, inofanira kupindawo mudariro imba nemba. Vembawo inenge yabatwa naTenzi vachapinda mudariro vachiteverana munhu nomunhu." 
Joshua7:15 Munhu anobatwa aine zvinhu izvozvo zvakaturirwa kuti zviparadzwe Mwari, anosungirwa kupiswa nomoto pamwechete nezvinhu zvake zvose nokuti atyora chitsidzirano chawakanzi naTenzi chichengetwe, uyewo nokuti akaita zvinonyadza muIsiraeri.’ ”" 
Joshua7:16 Joshuwa akamuka rungwanangwana akati vaIsiraeri vauye mberi dzinza nedzinza, ndokubva kwabatwa dzinza rokwaJudha." 
Joshua7:17 Akapinza dzinza rokwaJudha mudariro, kukabatwa vemhuri yokwaZera. Akapinza vemhuri yokwaZera mudariro, vachiteverana munhu nomunhu kukabatwa vemba yokwaZabhudhi." 
Joshua7:18 Akapinza mudariro vemba yake iyeyu vachiteverana munhu nomunhu kukabatwa Akani mwanakomana waKarumi, mwanakomana waZera wedzinza rokwaJudha." 
Joshua7:19 Joshuwa akati kuna Akani, “Mwanangu pano apaka, chiremekedza Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri umurumbidze, ureurure kwandiri zvawakaita usandivanzire.”" 
Joshua7:20 Akani akapindura Joshuwa achiti, “Chokwadi ndakatadzira Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri. Zvandakaita ndezvizvi." 
Joshua7:21 Pandakaona hanzu yegemenzi yamandiriri kunaka yokuShinari pazvinhu zvakanga zvapambwa, nemari yamashekeri yesirivha inorema makirogiramu maviri, nechidimbu chendarama chino uremu hunopfuura chikamu chapakati napakati chekirogiramu, ndakazvichiva ndikazvitora. Zvino zvinhu izvozvo ndakazviviga muvhu, mutendhe yangu, pakati, sirivha ndiyo iri nechapasi pazvo.”" 
Joshua7:22 Joshuwa akatuma nhume dzikamhanya kutendhe iroro, wanei zvakavigwa mutendhe rake imomo, sirivha iri nechepasipasi." 
Joshua7:23 Vakazviburitsa mukati metendhe imomo, vakaenda nazvo kwaiva naJoshuwa navaIsiraeri vose, vakazviti ware ware pasi pana Tenzi." 
Joshua7:24 Joshuwa pamwechete navaIsiraeri vose vakatora Akani mwanakomana waZera, nesirivha iya nehanzu iya nechidimbu chendarama chiya, vakatorawo vana vake vakomana navasikana, pamwechete nemombe dzake namadhongi nehwai dzake netendhe rake netwake twose, vakaenda nazvo kubani reAkori." 
Joshua7:25 Joshuwa akati, “Ko iwe wakatipinzirei munhamo yakadai? Nhasi uno, Tenzi akupinzawo munhamo.” VaIsiraeri vose vakamutema namabwe, pamwechete navaaiva navo, vakavapisa nomoto." 
Joshua7:26 Vakatutira murwi wamatombo mukuru pamusoro pake, uchiripo nanhasi uno, hasha dzaTenzi dzakanga dzaviruka dzikanyevenuka. Saka nanhasi uno zita rebani iroro richinzi, Bani reAkori." 
Joshua8:1 Tenzi akataurira Joshuwa achiti, “Usatye kana kuzeza, tora vanhu vehondo vose vaunavo usimuke ukwire kuAi. Zviripo ndezvizvi, ndaisa mumaoko ako mambo wokuAi navanhu vake, neguta rake nenyika yake." 
Joshua8:2 Zvawakaita kuguta reJeriko namambo waro, ndozvauchaita kuguta reAi namambo waro. Asi torai zvenyu zvinhu zvomo nemombe zvamunenge mapamba zvive zvenyu. Itai zvokurihwandira necheshure kwaro.”" 
Joshua8:3 Joshuwa akasimuka aine varwi vehondo vose, vakakwira kuguta reAi. Joshuwa akasarudza zviuru makumi matatu zvavarwi, vano vakasimba chaizvo akavatumako nousiku." 
Joshua8:4 Akavaudza achiti, “Endai mundohwandira guta iroro necheshure kwaro. Regai kundova kure kure neguta, asi garai makagadzirira." 
Joshua8:5 Ini navanhu vandinavo tichafamba kusvika paguta iroro. Pavachabuda kuzotirwisa sezvavakamboita tichavatiza. 
Joshua8:6 Ivo vachatidzingirira kusvikira tavakwezvera kunze kweguta nokuti ivo vachati, ‘Vari kutitiza sapakutanga paya.’ Saka isu tichavatiza, imi mosimuka pamunenge manga makahwanda paya" 
Joshua8:7 muchindotora guta iroro nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu achariisa mumaoko menyu." 
Joshua8:8 Kana matora guta iroro ripisei nomoto muite zvatakaudzwa naTenzi. Chinzwai, ndiri kutokutumai izvozvi.”" 
Joshua8:9 Joshuwa akavati vachienda. Ivo ndokubva vaenda kunzvimbo yavo yokuhwanda iri pakati peBhetieri neAi, kuri kumadokero kweAi. Asi Joshuwa akarara usiku ihwohwo ari mukati mavanhu." 
Joshua8:10 Joshuwa akafumomuka akaunganidza vanhu vachibva vakwira kuenda kuAi, iye navakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri vakatungamira pamberi pavanhu." 
Joshua8:11 Varwi vehondo vose vaakanga anavo vakaendako vakasvika pedyo neguta, vakadzika matendhe avo kuchamhembe kweAi. Pakati pavo neguta irori paiva nenhika yakadzika." 
Joshua8:12 Akatora varume vainge zviuru zvishanu, akavati vahwande vari pakati peBhetieri neguta reAi kumadokero kweAi." 
Joshua8:13 Saka vakaronga varwi, vakaisa boka ravo guru nechokuchamhembe kweguta iroro, rimwe boka ravo reshure kumadokero kweguta iroro. Asi usiku ihwohwo Joshuwa akarara ari munhika muya." 
Joshua8:14 Mambo weguta reAi paakaona izvi iye navanhu vake vose vomuguta imomo vakabuda, vakamhanyira kumateru, vakananga kugan'a reArabha, vachida kundorwisana navaIsiraeri ikoko. Asi haana kuziva kuti kuseri kweguta irori kwaiva navakanga vakamuhwandira." 
Joshua8:15 Joshuwa navaIsiraeri vose vakaita sokunge vakundwa navo, ndokutiza vakananga kurenje." 
Joshua8:16 Vanhu vose vaiva muguta iri vakakokorodzwa kuti vavadzingirire. Vachidzingirira Joshuwa kudaro vakatenge vachikwezverwa kure neguta. 
Joshua8:17 Hakuna murume akasara ari muguta reAi kana muBhetiere asina kundodzingirira vaIsiraeri. Vakasiya guta iri rakashama vachitandanisa vaIsiraeri. 
Joshua8:18 Tenzi ndokuti kuna Joshuwa, “Tondeka kuguta reAi nepfumo riri muruoko rwako nokuti ndichaisa guta irori mumaoko ako.” Joshuwa akanongedzera kuguta iroro nepfumo raiva muruoko rwake." 
Joshua8:19 Joshuwa paakangosimudza ruoko rwake, vaya vakanga vakahwandira, vakabva vasimuka pavakanga vari nokukurumidza. Vakamhanya, vakapinda muguta, rikabva rava mumaoko avo, vakachimbidza kuripisa." 
Joshua8:20 Zvino varume vokuAi vakati cheu, vakaona guta changova chamupwititi utsi, huchingotogoka mudenga. Zvakavapedza simba rokuti vatizire uku, kana uku nokuti vaya vokutizira kurenje vakadzoka kuzorwisa vaivadzingirira vacho." 
Joshua8:21 Kuzoti Joshuwa navaIsiraeri vose vaona kuti guta riya rava mumaoko avaya vakanga vakahwandira, uye kuti guta rakanga rangova utsi chete mudenga, vakabva vadzoka kuzouraya varwi veAi." 
Joshua8:22 VaIsiraeri vokupinda muguta vaya vakavabudirawo, saizvozvo ivo vakanga vava pakati, vachiti uku vaIsiraeri uku vaIsiraeri. VaIsiraeri vakavauraya zvokuti hakuna akasara ari mupenyu kana akapunyuka." 
Joshua8:23 Asi vakabata mambo weAi ari mupenyu vakaenda naye kuna Joshuwa. 
Joshua8:24 Kuzoti vaIsiraeri vapedza kuuraya vagari vose vokuAi kugan'a kuya kurenje kwavakanga vachivadzingira, vapedza kuuraya munhu wose zvake nebakatwa, vaIsiraeri vose vakadzokera kuAi vakandouraya vose vaivamo namapakatwa." 
Joshua8:25 Pazuva iroro vanhu vose vokuAi vakaurayiwa vaiva zviuru gumi nezviviri zvavanhu varume navakadzi," 
Joshua8:26 nokuti Joshuwa haana kudzosa ruoko rwake ruya rwaiva rwakabata pfumo kusvikira aparadza vagari vose vomuAi. 
Joshua8:27 VaIsiraeri chavakangotora chete imombe nezvinhu zvomuguta iroro zvavakapamba, sokutaurirwa kwakanga kwaitwa Joshuwa naTenzi." 
Joshua8:28 Saka Joshuwa akapisa Ai, rikasara rangova murwi kusvikira narini wose sezvariri nanhasi uno." 
Joshua8:29 Akasungirira mambo weAi mumuti kusvikira manheru. Kuzoti zuva rodoka Joshuwa akaudza vanhu zvokuita, vanhu vakaturura chitunha chake mumuti vakachikanda panzira, pasuo guru reguta iroro, ndokubva vatutira murwi mukuru wamatombo pamusoro pacho. Pari nhasi murwi iwoyo uchiripo." 
Joshua8:30 Joshuwa akavakira Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri atari pagomo reEbhari 
Joshua8:31 sokuudzwa kwakaitwa vaIsiraeri naMosesi muranda waTenzi, sokunyorwawo kwazvakaitwa mubhuku raMosesi remitemo zvichinzi, “Inofanira kuva atari yamatombo asina kuvezwa nesimbi,” vakapira Tenzi zvibayiro zvemipiro yokupisa neyokuwadzana." 
Joshua8:32 Ipapo vanhu vechiIsiraeri vachiona kudaro Joshuwa akanyora pamatombo mutemo uya waMosesi waakanga anyora. 
Joshua8:33 VaIsiraeri vose zvavo, vatorwa pamwechete nezvidza zvomo, pamwechete navakuru vakuru vavo, namakurukota avo, navatongi vavo, vakandomira vakati vamwe uku, vamwe uku kumativi ebhokisi rechitenderano vakatarisana navapristi vaRevhi vokutakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano. Chimwe chikamu chavo chakandomira pamberi pegomo reGerizimu, chimwe chikandomira pamberi pegomo reEbhari sokuudzwa kwavakanga vaitwa naMosesi muranda waTenzi pakutanga kuti vanofanira kupa vaIsiraeri chikomborero." 
Joshua8:34 Shure kwaizvozvo, akaverenga mazwi ose omutemo okukomborera munhu, nookupinza munhu murushambwa maererano nezvose zvakanyorwa mubhuku romutemo." 
Joshua8:35 Hakuna chinhu pane zvose zvakanga zvakataurwa naMosesi chisina kuverengwa naJoshuwa kugungano rose ravaIsiraeri, navakadzi navana navatorwa vaigara navo." 
Joshua9:1 Kuzoti izvozvi zvanzwikwa namadzimambo ose akanga agere kumhiri kwaJorodhani munyika yamakomo nenyika yamapani nokumahombekombe kwose kweGungwa guru kwakatarisana neRebhanoni, vaHiti navaAmori navaKanani navaPerezi navaHivhi navaJebhusi vakazvinzwa," 
Joshua9:2 vakakokorodzana vakaita rimwe rokurwisa Joshuwa navaIsiraeri. 
Joshua9:3 Asi vanhu veGibheoni pavakanzwa zvakaitwa naJoshuwa kuguta reJeriko nereAi naivowo vakaita zvounyengedzi. 
Joshua9:4 Zvavakaita ndezvokuti vakaenda vachiita sokunge nhumwa dzenyika. Vakatora masaga matsaru vakaisa pamadhongi avo, nezvigubhu zvewaini zvamatehwe zvasakara zvakabvaruka-bvaruka zvakaitwa zvokusoneredzwa." 
Joshua9:5 Vakapfeka mutsoka shangu dzasakara dzine zvigamba. Vakapfekawo marengenya. Chingwa chembuva yavo chakanga chachiti papata kuoma chava nechiundudzi. 
Joshua9:6 Vakaenda kuna Joshuwa pamatendhe kuGirigari, vakataurira iye navaIsiraeri vachiti, “Tabva kunyika iri kure kwazvo. Zvino tinokumbirawo kuti muite chitenderano nesu.”" 
Joshua9:7 Asi varume vechiIsiraeri vakati kuvaHivhi, “Ko zvimwe mungadaro muri vanhu vagere pakati pedu, tingagoita sei chitenderano nemi pakadaro?”" 
Joshua9:8 Ivo vakati kuna Joshuwa, “Tiri varanda venyu.” Joshuwa akati kwavari, “Ko ndimi vanaani? Munobva kupi?”" 
Joshua9:9 Vakati kwaari, “Isu varanda venyu tabva kunyika iri kure kure. Chatisvitsa kuno izita raTenzi Mwari wenyu nokuti, takanzwa nezvomukurumbira wake nezvose zvaakaita kuIjipiti," 
Joshua9:10 nezvose zvaakaita kumadzimambo maviri avaAmori aiva kumhiri kwaJorodhani, aiti Sihoni mambo weHeshibhoni naOgu mambo weBhashani aigara kuAshitaroti." 
Joshua9:11 Naizvozvo vakuru vakuru vedu navanhu vose vomunyika medu vakatiti, ‘Torai mbuva mupinde munzira mundochingudzana navo, muvati, tiri varanda venyu, tiri kukumbirawo kuti tiite chitenderano nemi.’" 
Joshua9:12 Tarisai muone chingwa chedu chembuva. Izvozvi musi watakasimuka tichiuya kwamuri, chakanga chichitopisa patakachitora mumba. Asi iye zvino chionai chaoma kuti papata, chatova nechiundudzi." 
Joshua9:13 Zvigubhu zvedu zvewaini zvematehwe izvi zvaiva zvitsva patakazvizadza, asi chitarisai muone zvatomwauka. Hanzu dzedu neshangu dzedu idzi dzatosakara pamusana perwendo rwacho rwakareba zvikuru.”" 
Joshua9:14 Ipapo varume veIsiraeri vakadya zvavo zvokudya zvavanhu ivavo vasina kumbobvunza kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nenyaya yacho. 
Joshua9:15 Joshuwa akabva awirirana navo ndokuita chitenderano navo chokuti achavarega vari vapenyu. Vatungamiri vegungano vakavavimbisawo saizvozvo. 
Joshua9:16 Kwakati kwapera mazuva matatu mushure mokuita chitenderano navo, vakazonzwa kuti vakanga vari vavakidzani navo, vakanga vagere pedyo navo." 
Joshua9:17 VaIsiraeri vakafamba kwamazuva matatu vakandosvika kumaguta evanhu ivavo. Maguta acho aiti Gibheoni neKefira neBheeroti neKiriatijearimu. 
Joshua9:18 Asi vaIsiraeri havana kuvauraya nokuti vatungamiriri vegungano vakanga vapika naTenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri. Vanhu vose vakabva vanyunyutira vatungamiriri. 
Joshua9:19 Vatungamiriri vose vakaudza gungano rose kuti “Takavapikira naTenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri. Zvino hatikwanisi kana kumbovabata-bata zvedu. 
Joshua9:20 Zvatichaita kwavari ndezvizvi, tichavarega zvedu vari vapenyu kuti tirege zvedu kuvirukirwa nehasha pamusana pemhiko yatakapika kwavari.”" 
Joshua9:21 Vatungamiriri vakati kuvanhu, “Varegei vari vapenyu.” Saka vanhu ivava vakava vokutemera gungano huni nokuvatekera mvura sokutaura kwakaita vatungamiriri kwavari." 
Joshua9:22 Joshuwa akavadaidza akati kwavari, “Ko makatinyengedzererei muchiti, ‘Tinogara kure kwazvo nemi.’ Nyamba imi munogara zvenyu pedyo nesu kudai." 
Joshua9:23 Saka naizvozvo matopinda rushambwa, vamwe venyu muchagara muri varanda vokutemera huni, nokutekera mvura imba yaMwari wangu.”" 
Joshua9:24 Vakapindura Joshuwa vachiti, “Takaita izvozvi nokuti isu varanda venyu takanga tanyatsorondedzerwa zvakatemwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu akazvipa kuna Mosesi muranda wake zvokuti ari kukupai nyika iyi yose achifanokuurayirai vanhu vose vomo. Takabva tatyira upenyu hwedu ndokubva taita izvozvi." 
Joshua9:25 Zvino isu tiri mumaoko enyu. Itai zvenyu nesu zvamunoona kuti ndizvo zvakanaka zvakakodzera.” 
Joshua9:26 Ndizvozvo zvaakaita kwavari akavanunura mumaoko avaIsiraeri vakarega kuvauraya. 
Joshua9:27 Kubvira pamusi iwoyo kusvikira pari nhasi, Joshuwa akavaita vatemi vehuni navateki vemvura vegungano neveatari yaTenzi pose pose paainge asarudza." 
Joshua10:1 Adhonizedheki mambo weJerusaremu akanzwawo kuti Joshuwa akatora guta reAi rikava mumaoko ake, uye kuti akanga anyatsoriparadza achinzwawo kuti Joshuwa akaita kuguta reAi namambo waro zvaakanga aita kuguta reJeriko namambo waro. Akanzwawo kuti vanhu vokuGibheoni vakanga vava kutowirirana zvavo navaIsiraeri uye kuti vava kutogarisana navo savavakidzani." 
Joshua10:2 Zvakamutyisa zvikuru nokuti guta reGibheoni raiva guta guru kwazvo, rakatoita seguta guru ramambo, rakakura zvokupfuura guta reAi. Varume vose vomo vakanga vari mvumba chaidzo dzokurwa hondo." 
Joshua10:3 Naizvozvo Adhonizedheki mambo weJerusaremu akatuma nhume kuna Hohamu, mambo weHebhuroni, nokuna Piramu, mambo weJarimuti, nokuna Jafia, mambo weRakishi, nokuna Dhebhiri, mambo weEgironi achiti," 
Joshua10:4 “Uyai muzondibatsirawo tirwise guta reGibheoni nokuti rakatowirirana zvaro naJoshuwa navaIsiraeri.” 
Joshua10:5 Madzimambo mashanu iwaya avaAmori aiti mambo weJerusaremu namambo weHebhuroni, namambo weJarimuti namambo weRakishi namambo weEgironi vakaunganidzana ndokukwira nehondo dzavo dzose kundokomberana kurwisa guta reGibheoni." 
Joshua10:6 Vanhu vokuGibheoni vakatuma nhume kuna Joshuwa kuGirigari kwavakanga vakadzika matendhe vachiti, “Matiregerera kuno isu varanda venyu. Uyai kuno nokukurumidza muzotinunura, mutibatsirewo nokuti madzimambo ose avaAmori vanogara munyika yamakomo vakokorodzana kuzotirwisa.”" 
Joshua10:7 Joshuwa akabva kuGirigari akakwira ikoko. Akaendako nehondo yake yose, varume vose vaya vaiva mvumba dzokurwa hondo." 
Joshua10:8 Tenzi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Usambovatya zvako nokuti ndatovaisa mumaoko ako. Hakuna nomumwe wavo achagona kumirisana newe.”" 
Joshua10:9 Joshuwa akaerekana ati pfacha kusvika pavari, avavinga kubva kuGirigari nousiku." 
Joshua10:10 Tenzi akavapinza mweya wokutya vaIsiraeri. VaIsiraeri vakavaita murakatira kuuraya paGibheoni ipapo vakavadzingirira kusvikira kumukwidza weBhetihoroni vachingovakatakazha kudzamara vasvika kuAzeka nokuMakedha. 
Joshua10:11 Pavaingunotiza vaIsiraeri kudai, voteremuka zvino nomutenure weBhetihoroni, Tenzi akanayisa mhitsa dzechivhuramahwe pavari kusvikira kuAzeka, vakafa. Vanhu vakaurayiwa nechivhuramahwe ichi vakanga vakawanda kupfuura vanhu vakaurayiwa navaIsiraeri namapakatwa." 
Joshua10:12 Pazuva iroro rakaiswa vaAmori mumaoko avaIsiraeri naTenzi, Joshuwa akataurira Tenzi vaIsiraeri vachinzwa achiti, “Iwe zuva pano paGibheoni iti mbikiti kumira, newe mwedzi iti ndi kumira padunhu rino reAjaroti." 
Joshua10:13 Zuva rakati mbikiti kumirapo. Mwedzi ukatiwo ndi kumira kusvikira vaIsiraeri vapedza vavengi vavo kutsividza.” Handiti izvozvi zvakanyorwa muBhuku raJashari here? Zuva rakaramba rakati mbikiti panguva yarinorova nhongonya, rikarega kukurumidza kudoka, kwezuva rose." 
Joshua10:14 Hakuna kumbova nezuva rakadai kubvira pasi chigare kana shure kwaizvozvo rokuti Tenzi akateerera munhu, nokuti Tenzi akarwira vaIsiraeri." 
Joshua10:15 Joshuwa akadzokera zvake navaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo kumatendhe kuGirigari. 
Joshua10:16 Madzimambo iwayo mashanu akatiza akandohwanda mubako rokuMakedha. 
Joshua10:17 Joshuwa akaudzwa kuti, “Madzimambo mashanu aya awanikwa akahwanda mubako rokuMakedha.”" 
Joshua10:18 Joshuwa akati, “Kungurutsirai mabwe makuru pamuromo webako iroro, mugoisa vanhu vanogaririra ipapo." 
Joshua10:19 Asi imi pachenyu regai kumirapo, rondai vavengi venyu, vateverei muchivarwisa, vanenge vasarira muchiuraya, musavarege vachindopinda mumaguta avo nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu avaisa mumaoko enyu.”" 
Joshua10:20 Kuzoti Joshuwa navaIsiraeri vapedza kuvauraya vachivaita murakatira kusvikira vanhu ava vaparadzwa, uye kusvikira chitsama chakasara chandopinda mumaguta akanga aine tsvingo," 
Joshua10:21 vanhu vose vakadzokera zvakanakanaka kuna Joshuwa kumatendhe avo kuMakedha. Hakuna kuwanika munhu ane chaakati bufu kuvaIsiraeri. 
Joshua10:22 Joshuwa akati, “Chizarurai bako muburitse madzimambo mashanu aya, muuye navo kwandiri.”" 
Joshua10:23 Vanhu vakaita izvozvo, vakaunza kwaari madzimambo mashanu aya kubva mubako aiti mambo weJerusaremu namambo weHebhuroni, namambo weJarimuti namambo weRakishi namambo weEgironi." 
Joshua10:24 Pavakaburitsa madzimambo aya vakauya navo kuna Joshuwa. Joshuwa akadaidza vaIsiraeri vose akati kuvakuru vakuru vose vehondo vaakanga aenda navo, “Uyai pano mutsike netsoka dzenyu mutsipa yamadzimambo iwaya.” Vakauya vakatsika mitsipa yamadzimambo aya." 
Joshua10:25 Joshuwa akati kwavari, “Musatye zvenyu kana kuzeza, shingai mutsunge mwoyo nokuti ndizvo zvichaita Tenzi kuvavengi venyu vose vamucharwisa.”" 
Joshua10:26 Joshuwa akabva avaponda vakafa akavasungirira mumiti mishanu. Vakaswera vakaremberapo kusvikira manheru. 
Joshua10:27 Kuzoti zuva rodoka Joshuwa akati vatururwe pamuti paya ndokuvakanda mubako muya mavakanga vahwanda ndokuisa mabwe pamuromo waro achiripo kusvikira pari nhasi. 
Joshua10:28 Pamusi iwoyo Joshuwa akatora guta reMakedha rikava mumaoko ake. Akariparadza nebakatwa, iro namambo waro. Akanyatsoparadza vanhu vose zvavo vakanga varimo. Hapana kana munhu mumwechete waakasiyamo. Akaita kuna mambo weMakedha zvaakaita kuna mambo weJeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Joshuwa akabva kuMakedha navaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo akaenda kuguta reRibhuna, akarirwisa." 
Joshua10:30 Tenzi akaisawo guta iroro namambo waro mumaoko avaIsiraeri. Vakauraya vanhu vaivamo vose zvavo namapakatwa. Hapana kana munhu mumwechete wavakasiyamo. Vakaita kuna mambo waro sezvavakanga vaita kuna mambo weJeriko. 
Joshua10:31 Joshuwa akabva kuRibhuna navaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo akadimura oenda kuguta reRakishi. Vakarikomba vakarirwisa. 
Joshua10:32 Tenzi akaisa guta reRakishi mumaoko avaIsiraeri. Vakaritora pazuva rechipiri, vakaparadza guta iroro vakauraya vanhu vaivamo vose zvavo namapakatwa sezvavakaita kuguta reRibhuna." 
Joshua10:33 Horamu mambo weguta reGezeru akauya kuzobatsira vokuRakishi. Joshuwa akamuuraya, iye navanhu vake, kusara pasisina asara." 
Joshua10:34 Joshuwa akabva kuRakishi navaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo akadimura oenda kuguta reEgironi. Vakarikomba, vachirirwisa." 
Joshua10:35 Musi iwoyo vakaritora rikava mumaoko avo. Vakaparadza guta iri vakanyatsouraya nebakatwa vanhu vaivamo vose zvavo musi wakarewo sezvavakaita kuguta reRakishi. 
Joshua10:36 Joshuwa akabva kuEgironi navaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo vakaenda kuguta reHebhuroni, vakabva varirwisa." 
Joshua10:37 Vakaritora rikava mumaoko avo. Vakaparadza guta iroro nebakatwa namambo waro nemisha yaro. Vakauraya munhu wose akanga arimo. Hapana kana munhu mumwechete zvake wavakasiyamo. Vakanyatsoriparadza vakauraya munhu wose zvake akanga arimo sezvavakaita kuguta reEgironi. 
Joshua10:38 Joshuwa akadzokera navaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo kuDhebhiri, vakarirwisa." 
Joshua10:39 Vakaritora rikava mumaoko avo, iro namambo waro nemisha yaro yose. Vakauraya namapakatwa vanhu vaivamo vakanyatsouraya vanhu vose vaivamo. Hapana wavakasiyamo. Zvavakaita kuguta reHebhuroni namambo waro ndozvavakaitawo guta reDhebhiri namambo waro." 
Joshua10:40 Saka Joshuwa akakurira nyika yose zvayo inoti: nyika yamakomo neNegevhu nenyika yokumanhika namateru ayo. Akakurirawo madzimambo ose enyika idzodzo. Hapana kana munhu mumwechete zvake waakasiya, asi akatouraya vose zvokusambosiya kana chinhu chipenyu zvacho, sokureva kwakaita Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri." 
Joshua10:41 Joshuwa akakurira vanhu kubvira kuKadheshibharinea zvichienda nokuGaza nenyika yose yeGosheni kusvikira kuGibheoni. 
Joshua10:42 Joshuwa akakurira madzimambo ose iwaya, nyika dzawo dzikava mumaoko ake nenguva imwecheteyo nokuti Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri, aivarwira." 
Joshua10:43 Joshuwa akazodzokera navaIsiraeri vaaiva navo kwavakanga vakadzika matendhe kuGirigari. 
Joshua11:1 Jabhini mambo weguta reHazori paakanzwawo izvi, akatumira shoko kuna Jobhabhu mambo weguta reMadhoni nokuna mambo weguta reShimuroni nokuna mambo weguta reAkishafu." 
Joshua11:1 Jabhini mambo weguta reHazori paakanzwawo izvi, akatumira shoko kuna Jobhabhu mambo weguta reMadhoni nokuna mambo weguta reShimuroni nokuna mambo weguta reAkishafu." 
Joshua11:2 Akatumirawo shoko kumadzimambo okuchamhembe kunyika yemakomo, nokuArabha kumaodzanyemba kwegungwa reKineroti, nokunyika yakumanhika nokuNafotidhori kumadokero," 
Joshua11:3 nokuvaKanani vokumabvazuva novokumadokero, nokuvaAmori navaHiti navaPerizi navaJebhusi vomunyika yamakomo, nokuvaHivhi vari mujinga regomo reHerimoni kudunhu reMizipa." 
Joshua11:4 Vakauya nehondo dzavo dzose vari gurusvusvu kuwanda sejecha regungwa, vaine bvakapfaka ramabhiza nengoro." 
Joshua11:5 Madzimambo iwaya akaunganidza pamwechete hondo dzavo dzose akadzika matendhe avo kubani remvura rokuMeromu kundorwisana navaIsiraeri. 
Joshua11:6 Tenzi akati kuna Joshuwa, “Usavatye nokuti mangwana panguva idzo dzino idzi ndinenge ndatovaisa mumaoko avaIsiraeri, vanenge vatofa. Munofanira kutema mabhiza avo matatira, muroromese nomoto ngoro dzavo dzehondo.”" 
Joshua11:7 Naizvozvo Joshuwa akavavinga nehondo yake ivo vari mubani remvura rokuMeromu akaita zvokungoerekana avafuta. 
Joshua11:8 Tenzi akavaisa mumaoko avaIsiraeri. VaIsiraeri vakavauraya vakadzingirirana navo kudzamara vatopinda muguta reSidhoni nomuguta reMisirefotimaimu nokusvikira kubani reMizipa kumabvazuva. Vakavauraya zvokuti hapana kusara kana munhu mumwechete zvake. 
Joshua11:9 Joshuwa akaita kwavari zvaakanga audzwa naTenzi. Akatema mabhiza avo matatira, akaroromesa nomoto ngoro dzavo dzehondo." 
Joshua11:10 Joshuwa akadzoka ikoko panguva iyoyo, akakurira guta reHazori akauraya nebakatwa mambo waro nokuti guta reHazori iri ndoraiva guta guru raitungamirira nyika dzamadzimambo ose iwayo." 
Joshua11:11 Akauraya namapakatwa vanhu vose vaiva muguta imomo zvokuuraya zviya munhu wose. Hapana kana chinofema chaakasiya. Akapisa nomoto guta irori reHazori. 
Joshua11:12 Joshuwa akakurira maguta ose iwayo namadzimambo awo akava mumaoko ake, akaaparadza namapakatwa zvokusambosiya kana chinhu, sezvaakanga anzi aite naMosesi muranda waTenzi." 
Joshua11:13 Asi vaIsiraeri havana kupisa maguta akanga akavakirwa pakatunhumara, kusiya guta reHazori rakapiswa naJoshuwa." 
Joshua11:14 VaIsiraeri vakatora zvipfuwo nezvinhu zvose zvaiva mumaguta iwayo, zvavakanga vapamba. Asi wose ainzi munhu vakauraya namapakatwa vakavaparadza kusiya pasisina kana mupenyu." 
Joshua11:15 Tenzi sokuudza kwaakanga aita Mosesi muranda wake, Mosesi akataurirawo Joshuwa, Joshuwa ndokuitawo saizvozvo. Haana kana chaakasiyidzira pane zvose zvakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Joshua11:16 Saka Joshuwa akatora nyika yacho yose iyoyo. Akatora nyika yamakomo neNegevhu yose nenyika yose zvayo yeGosheni nenyika yokumanhika nenyika yeArabha nenyika yeIsiraeri yemakomo, namapani ayo" 
Joshua11:17 kubvira kugomo reHaraka rinokwira nokuSeiri kusvikira kuBhaarigadhi kubani reRebhanoni mujinga megomo reHerimoni. Akabata madzimambo adzo ose, akavaponda kuuraya" 
Joshua11:18 Joshuwa akarwa namadzimambo iwayo kwenguva ndefu. 
Joshua11:19 Hakuna kana rimwe guta zvaro rakawirirana navaIsiraeri kusiya vaHivhi voga, vanhu vokuGibheoni. VaIsiraeri vakatora maguta ose iwayo nehondo akava avo." 
Joshua11:20 Chaivadariso ndechokuti Tenzi ndiye aivakonzera kuomesa musoro kuti vaende kundorwisa vaIsiraeri achiitira kuti vanhu ivavo vabve vanyatsoparadzwa uye kuti varege kunzwirwa tsitsi, asi kutoti vatsakatiswe sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi." 
Joshua11:21 Panguva iyoyo Joshuwa akandoparadza vaAnakimu vomunyika yamakomo vaiti vokuHebhuroni novukuDhebhiri novokuAnabhu novokunyika yaJudha yamakomo, novokunyika yeIsiraeri yamakomo. Joshuwa akavaparadza pamwechete namaguta avo." 
Joshua11:22 Hakuna kusara kana muAnakimu munyika yavaIsiraeri, kunze kwevaiva kuGaza nokuGati nokuAshidhodhi chete." 
Joshua11:23 Ndokutora kwakaita Joshuwa nyika yose sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi kuna Mosesi. Joshuwa akaipa kuvaIsiraeri senhaka yavo maererano namadzinza avo. Nyika ndokubva yazorora hondo. 
Joshua12:1 Aya ndiwo madzimambo enyika iyi akakurirwa navaIsiraeri vakavatorera nyika yawo vakaiita yavo kumhiri kwaJorodhani nechokumabvazuva, kutangira kubani raArinoni kusvikira kugomo reHerimoni nekwose kuArabha nechokumabvazuva:" 
Joshua12:2 Kunoti Sihoni mambo wavaAmori aigara kuHeshibhoni, aitonga kubvira kuAroero pamucheto webani raArinoni achibvira pakati pebani iroro kusvikira kurwizi rwaJabhoku, muganhu wavaAmoni runovaganhuranisa nechidimbu chenyika yeGireadhi." 
Joshua12:3 Yaibvirawo kuArabha kusvikira kugungwa reKinereti kumabvazuva takananga kuBhetijeshimoti kugungwa reArabha, gungwa roMunyu, yonanga kuBhetijeshimoti kumaodzanyemba kusvikira mujinga megomo rePisiga." 
Joshua12:4 Kwouyawo Ogu mambo weBhashani aiva mumwe wehofori dzechiRefaimu akanga asara, aigara kuAshitaroti nokuEdhirei." 
Joshua12:5 Aitongawo kubvira kugomo reHerimoni zvichienda nokuSareka nenyika yose yeBhashani achindoganhurana navaGeshuri navaMaaka, achitongawo chimwe chidimbu chenyika yeGireadhi achindoganhurana naSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni." 
Joshua12:6 Mosesi muranda waTenzi navaIsiraeri, vakakurira madzimambo iwayo, iye Mosesi muranda waTenzi ndokupa nyika yavo kuti ive yevedzinza rokwaRubheni nerokwaGhadhi nechikamu chapakati napakati chedzinza raManase." 
Joshua12:7 Aya ndiwo madzimambo enyika iyoyo akazokurirwa naJoshuwa navaIsiraeri kumadokero kumhiri kwaJorodhani, kubvira kuBhaarigadhi mubani reRebhanoni kusvikira kugomo reHaraku rinokwira rakananga kuSeiri. (Joshuwa akapa nyika yemadzimambo iwayo kumadzinza avaIsiraeri somugove wavo wenhaka." 
Joshua12:8 Akavapa nyika dzinoti nyika yemakomo nenyika yokumanhika, nenyika yeArabha nenyika yemateru, nenyika yerenje nenyika yeNegevhu, nenyika yavaHiti neyavaAmori neyavaKanani neyavaPerizi neyavaHivhi neyavaJebhusi)." 
Joshua12:9 Madzimambo akakurirwa acho ndeaya: kunoti mambo wokuJeriko nowokuAi, guta riri pedyo nereBhetieri," 
Joshua12:10 nowokuJerusarema; kwouya mambo wokuHebhuroni 
Joshua12:11 nowokuJarimuti, nowokuRakishi," 
Joshua12:12 nowokuEgironi nowokuGezeru; 
Joshua12:13 kwoti mambo wokuDhebhiri nowokuGedheru," 
Joshua12:14 nowokuHoruma nowokuAradhi; 
Joshua12:15 kwozoti mambo wokuRibhuna nowokuAdhuramu," 
Joshua12:16 nowokuMakedha nowokuBheteri; kuchitiwo," 
Joshua12:17 wokuTapua mambo wokuHeferi," 
Joshua12:18 nowokuAfeki nowokuReshironi," 
Joshua12:19 nowokuMadhoni nowokuHazori," 
Joshua12:20 kuchizoti mambo wokuShimuronimeroni nowokuAkishafu," 
Joshua12:21 nowokuTanaki nowokuMegidho; 
Joshua12:22 ndokuuyawo wokuKedheshi, mambo womuJokineamu kuKarimeri" 
Joshua12:23 nowokuDhori riri kuNafatidhori nowomuGoiimu kuGirigari; 
Joshua12:24 ndokuzoti mambo wokuTiriza. Vose pamwechete vaiva madzimambo makumi matatu ane mumwechete. 
Joshua13:1 Zvino Joshuwa akanga akwegura zvokunyatsochemberawo, Tenzi ndokumutaurira achiti, “Wakwegura, makore ako oupenyu ayendedzana, asi kuchine nyika huru kwazvo yokutora kuti ive yenyu." 
Joshua13:2 Kuchine nyika huru yamusati matora: kunoti matunhu ose zvawo avaFirisitia, nenyika yose yavaGeshuri namatunhu ose avaGeshuri," 
Joshua13:3 (zvichitangira kuShihori kumabvazuva kweIjipiti kusvikira kuchamhembe kumuganho weEkironi, inonzi ndeyevaKanani. Kune vatongi vashanu vechiFirisitia vanoti wokuGaza nowokuAshidhodhi nowokuAshikeroni nowokuGati nowokuEkironi navaAvhimu.)" 
Joshua13:4 Kumaodzenyemba, inotangira kunyika yavaKanani yose zvichienda nokuMeara kunyika yavaSidhoni kusvikira kuApeki kumuganhu wavaAmori." 
Joshua13:5 Kwouya nyika yavaGebaru nenyika yeRebhanoni mujinga megomo reHerimoni kudzamara toda kupinda muHamati," 
Joshua13:6 vanhu vose zvavo vomunyika yemakomo kubvira kuRebhanoni kusvikira kuMisirefotimaimu kunyangewo nevaSidhoni vose zvavo. Ini pachangu ndichadzingira vaIsiraeri vanhu ivavo chako iwe chete govanisa vaIsiraeri nyika iyi senhaka, sezvandakakuudza." 
Joshua13:7 Saka chigovera nyika iyoyi madzinza mapfumbamwe nechikamu chevedzinza raManase senhaka yavo.” 
Joshua13:8 Vedzinza raRubheni nerokwaGadhi nechimwe chikamu chevedzinza raManase, vanotova kare nenhaka yavo yavakapiwa naMosesi kumhiri kwaJorodhani kumabvazuva, sokupiwa kwavakaitwa naiye Mosesi muranda waTenzi." 
Joshua13:9 Kubvira kuguta reAroeru kumucheto webani raArinoni, neguta riri pakati pebani renyika yakatumhumara yeMadhebha zvichienda nokuDhibhoni," 
Joshua13:10 namaguta ose aSihoni mambo wavaAmori aitonga kuHeshibhoni ichindosvika kumuganhu navaAmori. 
Joshua13:11 Akavapawo nyika yeGireadhi namatunhu ose avaGeshuri neavaMaaka, nokugomo reHerimoni kwose, nenyika yeBhashani yose zvichisvika kuSareka," 
Joshua13:12 nyika yose zvayo yamambo Ogu kuBhashani aimbotonga Ashitaroti neEdhirei. (Iyeyu ndiye aiva hofori imwechete yechiRefaimu yakanga yasara.) Mosesi akakurira ivava akaavadzingamo. 
Joshua13:13 VaIsiraeri havana kudzingamo vaGeshuri navaMaaka, asi kutoti vokwaGeshuri novokwaMaaka vagere pakati pavaIsiraeri kusvikira pari nhasi." 
Joshua13:14 Dzinza raRevhi chete ndiro risina kupiwa nhaka naMosesi nokuti mipiro inopirwa kuna Tenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri ichiita zvokupiswa nomoto ndiyo nhaka yaro sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa." 
Joshua13:15 Mosesi akagovera vedzinza rokwaRubheni nhaka yemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:16 Kubvira kuAroero pamucheto webani raArinoni ichibvira muguta riri pakati pebani, nenyika yose yakatunhumara yokuMedhebha" 
Joshua13:17 zvichienda kuHeshibhoni namaguta ose omunyika yakatunhumara aya anoti: Dhibhoni neBhamotibhaari neBhetibhaarimeoni 
Joshua13:18 neJahazi neKedhimoti neMefaati 
Joshua13:19 neKiriataimu neSibhuma neZeredhishahari riri pachikomo chomubani chiya," 
Joshua13:20 neBhetipeori nemateru okubva mujinga megomo rePisiga neBhetijeshimoti," 
Joshua13:21 zvichireva kuti maguta ose zvawo omunyika yakatunhumara, nenyika yose yaSihoni mambo wavaAmori aitonga kuHeshibhoni uya wokukundwa naMosesi pamwechete navatungamiriri vavaMidhiani vanaEvhi naRekemu naZuru naHuru naRebha, vakanga vari madzishe aiva pasi pamambo Sihoni, vachigara munyika iyoyo." 
Joshua13:22 Bhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori uya aiita maminimini uya akaurayiwawo navaIsiraeri pamwechete navamwe vavakauraya namapakatwa. 
Joshua13:23 Saka nyika yevedzinza rokwaRubheni yaindosvika muna Jorodhani ndiwo waiva muganhu wavo. Maguta iwaya nemisha yawo ndiyo yaiva nhaka yevedzinza rokwaRubheni irori nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:24 Mosesi akagoverawo vedzinza rokwaGadhi nhaka yemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:25 Nyika yavo yaiva yeGazeri zvichienda nokumaguta ose omuGireadhi nechidimbu chenyika yevaAmoni ichisvika kuAroeru kumabvazuva eRabha. 
Joshua13:26 Yaibvirawo kuHeshibhoni kundosvika kuRamatimizipe nokuBetonimu, ichibvirawo kuMahanaimu kusvikira kunyika yaDhebhiri" 
Joshua13:27 zvichienda nokubani kuBhetiharamu nokuBhetinimura nokuSukoti nokuZafoni ndochimwewo chidimbu chenyika yaSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni, Jorodhani ruriwo muganhu wenyika yacho inosvika kumahombekombe egungwa reKinereti kumabvazuva kumhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Joshua13:28 Maguta iwaya nemisha iyi ndiyo yaiva nhaka yevedzinza rokwaGadhi nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:29 Mosesi akagovera nhaka kune chimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase. Akapa nhaka iyi kune chikamu ichi chevedzinza raManase nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua13:30 Nyika yavo yaibvira kuMahanaimu zvichienda nokuBhashani kwose zvako, zvichireva kuti nyika yose zvayo yaOgu mambo weBhashani, namaguta ose aJairi omuBhashani, ose pamwechete aiva makumi matanhatu amaguta," 
Joshua13:31 kwouya chidimbu chenyika yeGireadhi neguta reAshitaroti nereEdhirei, maguta omunyika yaOgu yeBhashani, ndozvechikamu chemhuri dzokwaMakiri mwanakomana waManase." 
Joshua13:32 Ndidzodzi nhaka dzakagoverwa naMosesi mumapani eMoabhu kumhiri kwaJorodhani nechokumabvazuva kweJeriko. 
Joshua13:33 Asi Mosesi haana kugovera vedzinza rokwaRevhi nhaka, Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri ndonhaka yavo, sezvaakavaudza." 
Joshua14:1 Idzi ndidzo nhaka dzakagoverwa vaIsiraeri munyika yeKanani, vachidzigoverwa nomupristi Ereazari naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNunu navakuru vakuru vemhuri dzemadzinza avaIsiraeri." 
Joshua14:2 Madzinza mapfumbamwe nechimwe chikamu chedzinza chiya akagoverwa nhaka nechin'ange sokuudzwa kwakaitwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Joshua14:3 Chakadariso ndechokuti Mosesi akanga atogovera kare nhaka madzinza maviri nechimwe chikamu chedzinza kumhiri kwaJorodhani, vaRevhi chete ndivo vaasina kugovera nhaka pakati pavo." 
Joshua14:4 Chiripo ndechokuti vokwaJosefi vakave madzinza maviri anoti rokwaManase nerokwaEfuraimu, asi hapana nhaka yakagoverwa vaRevhi munyikamo. Vakangogoverwa chete maguta okugara nenharaunda dzawo dzokuisa zvinhu zvavo nokuita mafuro ezvipfuwo zvavo." 
Joshua14:5 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi, vakagoveranisa nyika iyoyo." 
Joshua14:6 Vedzinza rokwaJudha vakauya kuna Joshuwa paGirigari. Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune muKenizi akataura nhuna dzake kwaari achiti, “Muchiri kuyeuka here zviya zvakataurwa naTenzi kuna Mosesi munhu waMwari kuKadheshibharinea, paakataura nezvangu uye nezvenyu." 
Joshua14:7 Ini ndakanga ndichine makumi mana amakore pandakatumwa paya naMosesi kuzosora nyika ino ndichibva kuKadheshibharinea. Ndakadzoka ndikamuudza chaizvo zvandainzwa mumwoyo mangu. 
Joshua14:8 Asi vamwe vangu vandakanga ndaenda navo vakasvikoodza vanhu mwoyo. Asi ini ndakati kwati naTenzi nomwoyo wangu wose. 
Joshua14:9 Pamusi iwoyo Mosesi akapika nemhiko achiti, ‘Chokwadi nyika iyoyo yawakatsika norutsoka rwako ichava nhaka yako nezvizvarwa zvako narini narini nokuti iwe wakati kwati naTenzi, Mwari wangu.’" 
Joshua14:10 Zvino chionai, Tenzi akandichengeta sokutaura kwake makore aya makumi mana ana mashanu kubvira musi waataura izvozvi kuna Mosesi, vaIsiraeri vachangunofamba murenje. Hezvino nhasi uno ndava namakore makumi masere ana makore mashanu okuberekwa." 
Joshua14:11 Kusimba kwandakanga ndakaita musi wandakatumwa naMosesi, ndokusimba kwandakaita pari nhasi uye simba rangu rokuenda kuhondo kundorwa richiripo." 
Joshua14:12 Saka ndipei zvangu nyika yamakomo yakataurwa naTenzi musi uya. Imi makangozvinzwirawo moga musi uya kuti hofori dzokwaAnakimu dziriko, dzina maguta adzo ane tsvingo. Pamwe Tenzi angangondibatsira, ndikavatorera nyika yavo, sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi.”" 
Joshua14:13 Joshuwa akakomborera Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune ndokumupa guta reHebhuroni senhaka. 
Joshua14:14 Saka Hebhuroni yakabva yava nhaka yokwaKerebhu mwanakomana waJefune muKenizi kusvikira pari nhasi nokuti akaramba akati kwati kwati naTenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri." 
Joshua14:15 Hebhuroni iyi yaimbonzi Kiriatiaribha. Aribha iyeyu uyu aiva munhu mukuru kwazvo pavaAnakimu. Nyika ndokubva yazorora hondo. 
Joshua15:1 Nyika yakagoverwa vedzinza rokwaJudha nemhuri dzavo yakanga yakamira yakadai: Kumaodzanyemba kwokupedzesera chaiko yaindosvika kumuganhu neEdhomu, kurenje reZini." 
Joshua15:2 Muganhu wayo wokumaodzanyemba ikoko waitangira kumahombekombe kwegungwa roMunyu, mahombekombe eko okumaodzanyemba." 
Joshua15:3 Woenda wakananga kumaodzanyemba kwemukwidza weAkirabhimu wopfuura wosvika kuZini, wokwidza wakananga kumaodzanyemba kweKadheshibharinea. Wonopfuura nokuHezironi wosvika kuAdhari, wopoterera nokuKarika," 
Joshua15:4 wozondosvika kuAzimoni, wotevedza Kakova keIjipiti kusvikira kwakanodira kugungwa reMedhiterenieni uko. Ndomuganhu wenyu wokumaodzanyemba." 
Joshua15:5 Muganhu wayo wokumabvazuva igungwa roMunyu, kunosvika kumadiro aJorodhani. Kuchamhembe, muganhu wayo unotangira kumahombekombe kwegungwa iroro pamadiro aJorodhani," 
Joshua15:6 wokwira nokuBhetihogira wopfuura nechokuchamhembe kweBhetiarabha kusvikira paDombo raBhohani mwanakomana wokwaRubheni. 
Joshua15:7 Muganhu wacho wozobvira ipapo mubani reAkori wokwidza wakananga kuDhebhiri uchienda kuchamhembe wakananga nechekuGirigari wakatarisana nomukwidza weAdhumimu uri kumaodzanyemba kwebani iroro. Muganhu iwoyu waizopfuura woenda kubani remvura yeEnishemeshi uchindosvika kuEnirogeri. 
Joshua15:8 Muganhu uyu waikwidza uchibva ipapo wakananga kubani romwanakomana waHinomu uchipfuura napamateru okumaodzanyemba kweguta reJebhusi ndiro Jerusaremu, wokwidza napamusoro pegomo rakavambirana nebani iri rokwaHinomu nechokumadokero, kusvikira kumucheto wokuchamhembe webani rokuvaRefaimu." 
Joshua15:9 Muganhu iwoyo unozobvira pamusoro pegomo iroro wakananga kukasipiti keNafutoa, wokwidza kumaguta okugomo reEfuroni wonanga nokuguta reBhaara ndiro Kiriatijearimu." 
Joshua15:10 Muganhu iwoyu waizobva kuBhaara wopindukira kumadokero, wakananga kugomo reSeiri uchipfuura nokumawere okuchamhembe kwegomo reJearimu ndiro Kesaroni wodzika nokuBhetishemeshi uchipfuura nokuTimuna." 
Joshua15:11 Muganhu iwoyu waizoenda nokumawere echikomo chiri kuchamhembe kweEkironi wopinduka wonanga kuShikeroni wopfuura wakananga kugomo reBhaara wosvika kuJabhuneeri wondogumira kugungwa. 
Joshua15:12 Muganhu wayo wokumadokero iGungwa guru namahombekombe aro. Iyoyi ndiyo miganhu yakapoteredza vemhuri dzokwaJudha. 
Joshua15:13 Mukati mevedzinza rokwaJudha, Joshuwa akapa Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune guta reKiriatiaribha, ndirowo reHebhuroni, sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa naTenzi. (Aribha iyeyu aiva baba waAnaki.)" 
Joshua15:14 Karebhu akadzingamo vanakomana vavaAnaki vatatu ava vanoti: Sheshai naAhimani naTarimai munyika yavo. 
Joshua15:15 Achibva ipapo akandorwisa vagari vokuDhebhiri. Kare guta reDhebhiri raimbonzi Kiriatiseferi. 
Joshua15:16 Karebhu akati, “Anenge andorwisa akakurira guta reKiriatisefari ndichamupa Akesa mwanasikana wangu kuti ave mukadzi wake.”" 
Joshua15:17 Otinieri mwanakomana waKenazi munun'na waKarebhu akandorikurira. Ndokubvawo amupawo mwanasikana wake kuti ave mukadzi wake. 
Joshua15:18 Akesa paakauya kwaari akamukurudzira kuti akumbire baba vake munda. Akesa akaburuka padhongi rake. Karebhu ndokumubvunza achiti, “Unodeiko mwanangu?”" 
Joshua15:19 Iye ndokupindura achiti, “Zvamakandipa nyika yokuNegevhu, ndiitireiwo mwoyochena mundipewo nezvisipiti zvemvura.” Karebhu ndokumupa zvisipiti zvoko zvokumusoro nezvisipiti zvoko zvezasi." 
Joshua15:20 Ino iyi ndiyo nhaka yevedzinza rokwaJudha nemhuri dzavo. 
Joshua15:21 Maguta evedzinza rokwaJudha, kumaodzanyemba takananga kumuganhu neEdhomu ndeaya: Kwaiti guta reKabhuzeeri neEdheru neJaguri," 
Joshua15:22 neKina neDhimona neAdhadha," 
Joshua15:23 neKedheshi neHazori neItinani," 
Joshua15:24 kwouya Zifu neTeremu neBhearoti," 
Joshua15:25 neHazorihadatita neKiriatihezironi, kana kuti Hazori." 
Joshua15:26 Kwouyawo reAmamu neShema neMoradha," 
Joshua15:27 neHazarigadha neHeshmoni neBhetipereti," 
Joshua15:28 neHazarishuari neBheerishebha, neBhiziotia" 
Joshua15:29 neBhaara neIimu neEzemu," 
Joshua15:30 kwoti Eritoradhi neKesiru neHoruma," 
Joshua15:31 neZikiragu neMadhimana neSanisana," 
Joshua15:32 kwozoti Rebhaoti neShirihimu neAini neRimoni, ose pamwechete aiva makumi maviri amaguta ana maguta mapfumbamwe ane misha yawo." 
Joshua15:33 Maguta okunyika yokumanhika ndeaya: kwaiti guta reEshitaori neZora neAshina," 
Joshua15:34 neZanoa neEniganimu neTapua neEnamu," 
Joshua15:35 kwoti Jarimuti neAdhuramu neSoko neAzeka," 
Joshua15:36 neSharaimu neAdhitiaimu neGedhara neGedherotiaimu, ose pamwechete aiva maguta gumi namana ane misha yawo." 
Joshua15:37 Kuchitiwo reZenani neHadhasha neMigidharigadhi," 
Joshua15:38 neDhireani neMizipe neJoktieeri," 
Joshua15:39 kukati Rakishi neBhozikati neEgironi," 
Joshua15:40 neKabhoni neRahimasi neKitishi," 
Joshua15:41 kwouya Gedheroti neBhetidhagoni neNaama neMakedha, ose pamwechete aiva maguta gumi namatanhatu ane misha yawo." 
Joshua15:42 Kwouyawo guta reRibhuna neEteri neAshani," 
Joshua15:43 nereIfuta neAshina nereNezibhu," 
Joshua15:44 neKeira neAkizibhu neMaresha, ose pamwechete aiva maguta mapfumbamwe ane misha yawo." 
Joshua15:45 Kwaizoti Ekironi notumaguta twaro nemisha yaro yaibvira kuEkironi kusvikira kugungwa," 
Joshua15:46 neose zvawo aiva pedyo neguta reAshidhodhi nemisha yawo. 
Joshua15:47 Iro Ashidhodhi notumaguta twaro nemisha yaro, neGaza notumaguta twaro nemisha yaro kusvikira kukakova keIjipiti nekumahombekombe kwegungwa Guru." 
Joshua15:48 Kwozotiwo omunyika yemakomo aiti: guta reShamiri neJatiri neSoko 
Joshua15:49 neDhana neKiriatisana, ndiro Dhebhiri," 
Joshua15:50 kwotiwo Anabhu neEshitemo neAnimu," 
Joshua15:51 neGosheni neHoroni neGiro ose pamwechete aiva maguta gumi nerimwechete aine misha yawo. 
Joshua15:52 Kwouyawo Arabhu neDhuma neEshani," 
Joshua15:53 neJanimu neBhetitapua neAfeka neHumuta," 
Joshua15:54 neKiriatiaribha ndiro Hebhuroni, neZiori ose pamwechete aiva maguta mapfumbamwe aine misha yawo." 
Joshua15:55 Kwochiti Maoni neKarimeri neZifu neJuta," 
Joshua15:56 neJezireeri neJokidheamu neZanoa," 
Joshua15:57 neKaini neGibhea neTimuna ose pamwechete aiva maguta gumi aine misha yawo. 
Joshua15:58 Kuchizoti Harihuru neBhetizuru neGedhori," 
Joshua15:59 neMaarati neBhetianoti neEritekoni, ose pamwechete aiva maguta matanhatu ane misha yawo." 
Joshua15:60 Ndokuzouya reKiriatibhaari, ndiro Kiriatijearimu, kwoti reRabha aya aiva maguta maviri aine misha yawo." 
Joshua15:61 Ndokuzotiwo maguta okurenje aiti Bhetiarabha neMidhini neSekaka 
Joshua15:62 neNibhushani rainziwo, “Guta roMunyu neguta reEnigedhi,” ose pamwechete aiva maguta matanhatu aine misha yawo." 
Joshua15:63 Vedzinza rokwaJudha havana kukwanisa kudzinga vaJebhusi vagari vomuJerusaremu. Saka vaJebhusi ivava vagere nevokwaJudha muJerusaremu kusvikira pari nhasi. 
Joshua16:1 Nyika yakagoverwa vokwaJosefi, yaibvira muna Jorodhani pedyo neJeriko kumabvazuva kwematsime emvura yeJeriko zvichienda kugwenga rinobvira kuJeriko richienda kunyika yamakomo kusvikira kuBhetieri." 
Joshua16:2 Yaizobvira kuBhetieri yonanga nokuguta reRuzi yoenda kuAtaroti, nyika yevokwaAki." 
Joshua16:3 Yozodzika yakananga kumadokero kumuganhu nevaJafureti kusvikira kumuganhu weBhetihoroni yezasi, yoenda kuGezeru yondosvika kugungwa reMedhiterenieni." 
Joshua16:4 Saka vedzinza rokwaManase nerokwaEfuraimu, vokwaJosefi vakagoverwa nhaka yavo." 
Joshua16:5 Nyika yevedzinza rokwaEfuraimu nemhuri dzavo yakanga yakamira yakadai: Muganhu wenhaka yavo iyi kumabvazuva waiva Atarotiadha kusvikira kuBhetihoroni yokumusoro," 
Joshua16:6 wobva wananga kugungwa reMedhiterenieni wakaisa Mikimetati kuchamhembe, wopota nokuTaanatishiro wakananga kumabvazuva wopfuurapo uchingoenda kumabvazuva wosvika kuJanoa." 
Joshua16:7 Waizobva kuJanoa wodzika kuAtaroti nokuNaara wobva wasvika kuJeriko uchindosvika muna Jorodhani. 
Joshua16:8 Kubvirawo kuTapua, muganhu uyu waienda kumadokero kundosvika kukakova keKana uchindosvika kugungwa reMedhiterenieni. Iyoyi ndiyo nhaka yevedzinza rokwaEfuraimu nemhuri dzavo." 
Joshua16:9 Zvaisanganisirawo maguta akanga apiwa vedzinza rokwaEfuraimu mukati menhaka yakagoverwa vedzinza raManase, maguta iwayo ose nemisha yawo." 
Joshua16:10 VokwaEfuraimu ava havana zvavo kudzinga vaKanani vaigara muGezeru. Saka vaKanani vagere pakati pevokwaEfuraimu kusvikira pari nhasi, asi vava kungogara vachivaitira basa zvechibharo." 
Joshua17:1 Nyika yakagoverwawo vedzinza rokwaManase nokuti iyeyu ndiye aiva dangwe raJosefi. Makiri dangwe raManase baba waGireadhi vakapiwa nyika yeGireadhi neyeBhashani nokuti akanga ari munhu wehondo. 
Joshua17:2 Dzimwe mhuri dzosewo dzedzinza rokwaManase dzakagoverwawo nyika dzaiti: mhuri yokwaAbhihezeri naHereki naAsirieri naShikemu naHeferi naShemidha. Ndovechirume vedzinza rokwaManase mwana waJosefi mhuri nemhuri. 
Joshua17:3 Zvino Zerofehadhi mwanakomana waHeferi mwanakomana waGireadhi mwanakomana waMakiri mwanakomana waManase, akanga asina vana vakomana achingova navasikana chete vaiti: Mahira naNowa naHogira naMirika naTiriza." 
Joshua17:4 Vakaenda kuna vava vaiti: mupristi Ereazari naJoshuwa mwana waNunu navatungamiri vakati, “Tenzi akaudza Mosesi kuti tinofanira kupiwa nhaka pakati pehanzvadzi dzedu.” Naizvozvo sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi akavapa nhaka pakati pavakoma navanun'una vababa vavo." 
Joshua17:5 Zvakazoitika ndezvokuti dzinza rokwaManase rakazowana migove gumi tisingaverengere nyika yeGireadhi neyeBhashani iri kumhiri kwaJorodhani," 
Joshua17:6 pari pamusana pokuti vanasikana ivava vokwaManase vakagoverwawo nhaka pakati pavana vokwaManase vechikomana. Nyika yeGireadhi ndiyo yakagoverwa vamwe vokwaManase. 
Joshua17:7 Muganhu wenyika yokwaManase iyi unobvira Asheru kusvikira kuMikimetati kumabvazuva kweShekemu wodzika kumaodzanyemba kuvanhu vokuEnitapua. 
Joshua17:8 Nyika yeTapua ndeyevokwaManase asi guta reTapua riri pamuganhu waManase nderevokwaEfuraimu. 
Joshua17:9 Muganhu iwoyu waizodzika wosvika kukakova keKana. Maguta ose okumaodzanyemba kwekakova ikaka ndokwaEfuraimu kunyange zvazvo ari mukati memaguta okwaManase. Muganhu uyu wokwaManase waizokwidza nokuchamhembe kwekakova ikaka uchindoperera kugungwa reMediterenieni. 
Joshua17:10 Nyika yokumaodzanyemba kwako ndeyokwaEfuraimu yokuchamhembe kwako ndeyokwaManase, ukuwo gungwa ririwo muganhu, kuchamhembe kwayo inondosvika kunyika yevokwaAsheru, kumabvazuva ichindoganhurana novokwaIsakari." 
Joshua17:11 VokwaManase ivava vaivawo namaguta munyika yevokwaIsakari neyokwaAsheru aiti: Bhetisheani nemisha yaro, nereIbhureamu nemisha yaro. Vagotiwo maguta ano aya navagari vawo anoti: guta reDhoru nemisha yaro nereEndori nemisha yaro neTaanaki nemisha yaro neMegidho nemisha yaro pane aya rechitatu rawo ndiro Nafati." 
Joshua17:12 Asi vokwaManase havana kukwanisa kukurira maguta iwayo nokuti vaKanani vakarambira munyika iyoyo. 
Joshua17:13 VaIsiraeri pavakazenge vava namasimba vakazovaitisa basa rechibharo, asi havana kubva vavadzinga zvokuvapedzeredza." 
Joshua17:14 Vemba yokwaJosefi vakati kuna Joshuwa, “Ko madarireiko kungotipa mugove wenhaka mumwechete chete kudai isu takawanda kwazvo kudai mudzinza medu nokukomborerwa kwatakaitwa naTenzi.”" 
Joshua17:15 Joshuwa akavati, “Kana zvirizvo kuti makawanda kudaro, nyika iyoyo yemakomo yokwaEfuraimu yakuitirai duku duku, chiendai zvenyu kumasango kunyika yavaPerizi neyavaRefaimu muzvitemere makombo.”" 
Joshua17:16 Vedzinza raJosefi vakati, “Nyika yemakomo haitikwaniri. Chimwewo ndechokuti vaKanani vagere kubani vane ngoro dzehondo dzesimbi, kunoti: vamwe vagere kuBhetisheani nemisha yaro kwouya vamwe vari kubani reJezireeri.”" 
Joshua17:17 Joshuwa akaudza vemba yokwaJosefi, vedzinza reEfuraimu neraManase achiti, “Makawanda imi uye mune simba guru. Hazvingaiti kuti muve nomugove wenhaka mumwechete chete." 
Joshua17:18 Zvino nyika yemakomo ichava yenyu. Kunyange zvazvo iri sango kudaro, ritemei muiite yenyu kusvikira kwokupedzesera chaiko kwemiganhu yavo nokuti munofanira kudzinga vaKanani kunyange zvazvo vakasimba vaine ngoro dzehondo dzesimbi.”" 
Joshua18:1 Zvino gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakaungana kuShiro, rikadzika tendhe rokusanganira ikoko, nyika iyoyo yakanga yatova mumaoko avo." 
Joshua18:2 Asi kwakange kuchine madzinza manomwe avaIsiraeri akanga asati atora nyika yawo yenhaka. 
Joshua18:3 Joshuwa akataurira vaIsiraeri achiti, “Kusvikira riniko muchingoverengera kudai, musingandotora nyika iyi yamakapiwa naTenzi Mwari wamadzibaba enyu kuti ive yenyu?" 
Joshua18:4 Ndipei varume vatatu vatatu padzinza ndivatume kuti vasimuke vandomema nyika iyi yose, vanyore vachiitsanangudza maererano nenhaka ichava yedzinza nedzinza, vozodzokera kuno kwandiri." 
Joshua18:5 Ngavaikamure muzvikamu zvinomwe. VokwaJudha ngavarambe vari kumaodzanyemba, vokwaJosefiwo vari kwavo kuchamhembe." 
Joshua18:6 Munonyora muchitsanangudza zvikamu izvozvo zvinomwe mouya nazvo kuno kwandiri, ndikuitirei chin'ange pana Tenzi, Mwari wedu." 
Joshua18:7 Asi vaRevhi havana mugove wenyika wavanowana pakati penyu nokuti upristi hwaTenzi ndonhaka yavo. Kana vari vokwaGadhi nevokwaRubheni nechimwe chikamu chevokwaManase vakatogoverwa kare nhaka yavo naMosesi muranda waTenzi, kumabvazuva kumhiri kwaJorodhani.”" 
Joshua18:8 Varume vokundomema nyika vakasimuka vakapinda munzira. Joshuwa akavakomera achiti, “Chiendai mufambe nyika yose iyoyo muchiimema, muchinyora mamiriro ayakaita mugozodzoka kuno kwandiri ndikuitirei chin'ange pano paShiro pana Tenzi.”" 
Joshua18:9 Saka varume ava vakaenda, vakafamba nyika yose iyoyo vachiimema, vachinyora mubhuku mamiriro ayakaita, guta neguta. Vakaiisa muzvikamu zvinomwe, ndokudzokera kwaiva naJoshuwa kumatendhe kuShiro." 
Joshua18:10 Joshuwa akavaitira chin'ange chiya kuShiro pana Tenzi, akagovera vaIsiraeri nyika ipapo achipa dzinza nedzinza nyika yaro." 
Joshua18:11 Mugove wakapiwa vedzinza rokwaBhenjamini mhuri nemhuri ndiwo wakatanga kubuda pachin'ange. Vakagoverwa nyika iri pakati penyika yedzinza rokwaJudha neyedzinza rokwaJosefi. 
Joshua18:12 Muganhu wayo wokuchamhembe waibvira muna Jorodhani woenda nokumateru okuchamhembe kweJeriko. Hoyo wokwidza nomunyika yemakomo nechokumadokero kusvikira kurenje reBhetiavheni. 
Joshua18:13 Waizobva ipapo wakananga kumateru okumaodzanyemba kweguta reRuzi ravakunzi Bhetieri wodzika wakananga kuAtarotiadhori pamakomo okumaodzanyemba kweBhetihoroni yezasi. 
Joshua18:14 Muganhu wayo wokumadokero unotangira pachikomo chakatarisana neguta reBhetihoroni chiri kumaodzanyemba kwaro. Wozobvapo wakananga kumaodzanyemba kusvikira, kuKiriatibhaari ndiro guta reKiriatijearimu, guta revedzinza rokwaJudha. Iwoyu ndomuganhu wayo wokumadokero." 
Joshua18:15 Muganhu wayo wokumaodzanyemba waibvira kunoperera guta reKiriatijearimu wombonanga kumadokero wosvika kutsime remvura reNefutoa. 
Joshua18:16 Waizondosvika mujinga megomo rakatarisana nebani romwanakomana waHinomu kuchamhembe kwebani ravaRefaimu. Waizoti tande nebani iroro wopfuura nokumateru okumaodzanyemba kwavaJebhusi uchidzika kusvikira kuEnirogeri. 
Joshua18:17 Waibva ipapo wonanga kuchamhembe kusvika kuEnishemeshi, woramba uchienda kudzamara wasvika kuGeriroti rakatarisana nomupata weAdhumimu, wozondosvika kuDombo raBhohani mwanakomana waRubheni." 
Joshua18:18 Muganhu iwoyu unopfuura wakananga kumateru okuchamhembe kweBhetiarabha, kusvikira kunyika yeArabha." 
Joshua18:19 Waizopfuurapo wakananga kumateru okuchamhembe kweguta reBhetihogira, wondosvika kumahombekombe okuchamhembe kwegungwa roMunyu, kumaodzanyemba kwaJorodhani pamadiro arwo. Iwoyu ndomuganhu wayo wokumaodzanyemba." 
Joshua18:20 Rwizi rwaJorodhani ndiwo munganhu wayo wokumabvazuva. Iyoyi ndiyo nhaka yemhuri yedzinza rokwaBenjamini mhuri nemhuri nemiganhu yayo kumativi ose. 
Joshua18:21 Maguta evedzedzinza rokwaBhenjamini mhuri nemhuri ndiwo aya. Kunoti guta reJeriko neBhetihogira neEmekikezizi," 
Joshua18:22 neBhetiarabha neZemaraimu neBhetieri," 
Joshua18:23 neAvhimu nePara neOfura," 
Joshua18:24 neKefariamoni neOfuni neGebha, ose pamwechete aiva maguta gumi namaviri nemisha yawo;" 
Joshua18:25 kwouya reGibheoni neRama neBheeroti," 
Joshua18:26 neMizipa neKefira neMoza," 
Joshua18:27 neRekemu neIripeeri neTarara neZera; 
Joshua18:28 Kwozoti guta reZera neHaerefu neJebhusi rakazonzi Jerusaremu, ndokuzouya guta reGibhea neKiriatijearimu. Ose pamwechete aiva gumi ramaguta rina maguta mana. Iyoyi ndiyo nhaka yemhuri dzedzinza rokwaBhenjamini." 
Joshua19:1 Mugove wakapiwa vedzinza rokwaSimeoni mhuri nemhuri ndiwo wakatevera kubuda pachin'ange. Vakagoverwa nyika yenhaka yavo mukati menyika yedzinza rokwaJudha. 
Joshua19:2 Maguta omunyika yenhaka yavo ndeaya: kunoti reBheerishebha neMoradha," 
Joshua19:3 kwoti reHazorishuarinebhara," 
Joshua19:4 kwozoti reEritoradhi neBheturu neHoruma. 
Joshua19:5 Kwouyawo reZikiragi neBhetimarikabhoti neHazarisusa," 
Joshua19:6 kwotiwo Bhetirebhaoti neSharuheni pamwechete aiita maguta gumi namatatu nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:7 Kwaizotiwo guta reAini neRimori neEteri neAshani pamwechete aita maguta mana nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:8 Nemisha yomunharaunda memaguta iwayo kusvikira kuBhaaratibheeri neguta reRama, rokuNegevhu. Iyoyo ndiyo nyika yenhaka yedzedzinza rokwaSimeoni mhuri nemhuri." 
Joshua19:9 Nyika yenhaka yevedzinza rokwaSimeoni yaiva mukati menyika yenhaka yevokwaJudha nokuti mugove wevokwaJudha wakanga wakakurisa kwavari. Saka vedzinza rokwaSimeoni vakazowana nhaka yenyika mukati menyika yenhaka yevokwaJudha. 
Joshua19:10 Mugove wakapiwa vedzinza rokwaZebhuruni mhuri nemhuri ndowakava wechitatu kubuda pachin'ange. Muganhu wenyika yavo yenhaka yaindosvika kuSaridhi. 
Joshua19:11 Waizobva wonanga nokumadokero kusvikira kuMareari uchindobatana neDhabhesheti wondosvika kukakova kari kumabvazuva kweJokuneamu. 
Joshua19:12 Waibvirawo kuSaridhi wonanga nechokumabvazuva kusvikira kumuganhu neKisirotitabhori wopfuura wosvika kuDhabherati hoyo wokwidza kuJafia. 
Joshua19:13 Waizobva ipapo woti tande wakananga kumabvazuva kusvikira kuGatiheferi nokuEtikazini wonanga kuRimoni uchipota nokuNea. 
Joshua19:14 Kuchamhembe, muganhu wayo unopinduka wakananga kuHamatoni uchindoperera kubani reIfutaheri." 
Joshua19:15 Guta reKatati nereNaharari neShimuroni neIdhara neBheterehemu aivawo avo, ose pamwechete aiva maguta gumi namaviri nemisha yawo." 
Joshua19:16 Iyoyi ndiyo nhaka yevedzinza rokwaZebhuruni mhuri nemhuri maguta iwayo nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:17 Mugove wakagoverwa vedzinza rokwaIsakari mhuri nemhuri ndiwo wakava wechina kubuda. 
Joshua19:18 Maguta omunyika yavo ndeaya: Kunoti guta reJezireeri neKesuroti neShunemu; 
Joshua19:19 kwouya reHafaraimu neShioni neAnaharoti; 
Joshua19:20 kwoti reRabhiti neKishioni neEbhezi. 
Joshua19:21 Kwozoti reRemeti neEniganimu neEnihadha neBhetipazezi. 
Joshua19:22 Muganhu wayo waindosvika napaTabhori napaShahazuma napaBhetishemeshi wondoperera muna Jorodhani. Ose pamwechete aiva maguta gumi namatanhatu nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:23 Iyoyi ndonhaka yevedzinza rokwaIsakari mhuri nemhuri maguta acho nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:24 Mugove wakagoverwa vedzinza rokwaAsheru mhuri nemhuri ndiwo wakava wechishanu kubuda. 
Joshua19:25 Maguta omunyika yavo ndeaya: Kunoti guta reHerikati neHari neBheteni neAkishafu," 
Joshua19:26 kwouya reAramumereki neAmadhi neMishari. Kumadokeri, yaindosvika kuKarimeri nokuShihoriribhunati." 
Joshua19:27 Kumabvazuva yaitenderera yondosvika kuBhetidagoni nokuZebhuruni heyo kubani raIfutaeri yonanga kuchamhembe yosvika kuBhitiemeki nokuNeieri yoramba ichienda kuchamhembe kusvikira kuKabhuru," 
Joshua19:28 neEbhuroni neRehobhu neHamoni neKana kudzamara muSidhoni romukurumbira. 
Joshua19:29 Muganhu wayo waizotendeuka wonanga kuRama uchindosvika kuguta retsvingo, reTire wopinduka wosvika kuHosa ichindosvika kugungwa reMedhiterenieni." 
Joshua19:30 Kwouyawo guta reMaharabhu neAkizibhu neUma neAfeki neRehobhu. Ose pamwechete aiva makumi maviri amaguta ana maguta maviri nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:31 Iyoyi ndonhaka yevedzinza rokwaAsheru mhuri nemhuri maguta iwaya nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:32 Mugove wakagoverwa vedzinza rokwaNafutari mhuri nemhuri ndiwo wakava wechitanhatu kubuda. 
Joshua19:33 Muganhu wenyika yavo waibvira kuHerefu pamuti womuoku wokuZaananimu uchienda nokuAhaminekebhu nokuJabhuneeri kusvikira kuRakumu uchindosvika muna Jorodhani. 
Joshua19:34 Waizobvapo wonanga kumadokero kuAzinotitabhori, wobva ipapo wondosvika kuHukoki wosvika kumaodzanyemba kumuganhu nevokwaZebhuruni. Kumadokero yaiganhurana nevokwaAsheu, kumabvazuva ichiganhurwa naJorodhani." 
Joshua19:35 Maguta acho ane tsvingo ndeaya: kunoti guta reZidhimu neZeri neHamati neRakati neKinereti; 
Joshua19:36 Kwoti reAdhama neRama neHazori 
Joshua19:37 neKedheshi neEdhirei neEnihazori," 
Joshua19:38 kwouya reYironi neMigidhareri neHoremu neBhetianoti neBhetishemeshi. Ose pamwechete aiva gumi ramaguta rina maguta mapfumbamwe nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:39 Iyoyi ndiyo nhaka yevedzinza rokwaNafutari mhuri nemhuri maguta acho nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:40 Mugove wakagoverwa vemhuri dzedzinza rokwaDhani ndiwo wakava wechinomwe. 
Joshua19:41 Maguta omunyika yavo yenhaka ndiwo aya kunoti: guta reZora neEshitaori neguta reIrishemeshi. 
Joshua19:42 Kwoti reShaarabhini neAijaroni neItira. 
Joshua19:43 Kwoti reEroni neTimuna neEkironi," 
Joshua19:44 neEriteke neGibheoni neBhaarati," 
Joshua19:45 neJehudhi neBhenebheraki neGatirimoni. 
Joshua19:46 Ndokuzouya guta reMejarikoni neRakoni pamwechete nenyika yakatarisana neJopa. 
Joshua19:47 Vedzinza rokwaDhani pavakarasikirwa nenyika yavo, vakandorwisa guta reReshemu. Vakarikurira vakauraya namapakatwa vanhu vomo, vakariita ravo. Vakatumidza guta iri reReshemu zita ratateguru wavo rokuti Dhani." 
Joshua19:48 Iyoyi ndiyo nhaka yevedzinza rokwaDhani mhuri nemhuri namaguta iwaya nemisha yawo. 
Joshua19:49 VaIsiraeri vakati vapedza kugovera nyika, vakapawo Joshuwa mwanakomana waNunu nhaka mukati mavo." 
Joshua19:50 Sokuudzwa kwavakanga vaitwa naTenzi vakamupa guta raakanga akumbira reTimunatisera romunyika yaEfuraimu yemakomo. Akarivaka patsva ndokubva agaramo. 
Joshua19:51 Idzi ndidzo nhaka dzakagoverwa nomupristi Ereazari naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni navakuru vakuru vamadzinza avaIsiraeri. Vakaigoveranisira kuShiro, nechin'ange pana Tenzi kumusuo wetendhe rokusanganira vakabva vapedza zvavo kugoveranisa nyika iyoyo." 
Joshua20:1 Tenzi akataurira Joshuwa achiti," 
Joshua20:2 “Taurira vaIsiraeri kuti vasarudze maguta okupotera andakati Mosesi akuudzei. 
Joshua20:3 Ndeekuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe zvetsaona kana mukusaziva atizire ikoko. Achava nzvimbo dzenyu dzokupotera kuti mudzivirirwe kuhama yomufi ine basa rokutsividza ropa romushakabvu. 
Joshua20:4 Anofanira kutizira kune rimwe ramaguta iwayo agondomira kusuo guru reguta iroro orondedzera mhosva yake kudare ravakuru vakuru veguta iroro. Ipapo vanofanira kumugamuchira muguta imomo vagomupa pokugara, agare zvake navo." 
Joshua20:5 Kana uya ane basa rokutsividza ropa romushakabvu akamuronda, havafanire kuisa nyakuuraya mumwe mumaoko ake nokuti akauraya mumwe wake mukusaziva asina kumbenge achivengana naye kare." 
Joshua20:6 Acharamba ari muguta imomo kudzamara mhosva yake yapinda mudare atotongwa kana kuti kusvikira panofa mupristi mukuru wenguva iyoyo. Panenge padaro, nyakuuraya mumwe uya anogona zvake kuzodzokera kuguta rokwake, kumusha kwake kuguta kuya kwaakambotiza.”" 
Joshua20:7 Saka maguta avakasarudza ndeaya kunoti Kadheshi rokuGarireya riri munyika yamakomo yokwaNafutari kwouya reShikemu riri munyika yemakomo yokwaEfuraimu kwoti reKiriatiaribha ndiro Hebhuroni riri munyika yemakomo yokwaJudha. 
Joshua20:8 Mudzinza rokwaRubheni kumabvazuva kweJeriko kumhiri kwaJorodhani vakasarudza guta reBhezeri riri munyika yerenje yakatunhumara. Mudzinza rokwaGadhi vakasarudza guta reRamoti riri muGireadhi. Mudzinza rokwaManase vakasarudzawo guta reGorani riri muBhashani. 
Joshua20:9 Maguta iwaya ndiwo akasarudzirwa vaIsiraeri vose pamwechete navatorwa vavagere navo okuti munhu anouraya mumwe mukusaziva awane kwokupotera arege kuurayiwa nouya ane basa rokutsividza ropa romuchakabvu kusvikira mhosva yake yapinda mudare yatongwa. 
Joshua21:1 Vakuru vakuru vemhuri dzokwaRevhi vakaenda kune vanhu ava vanoti; mupristi Ereazari naJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni navakuru vakuru vemhuri dzavaIsiraeri. 
Joshua21:2 Vakataura navo vari kuShiro munyika yeKanani vachiti, “Tenzi akaudza Mosesi kuti isu tinofanira kupiwa maguta okugara ana mafuro emombe dzedu.”" 
Joshua21:3 Saka sokutaura kwaTenzi vaIsiraeri vakapa vaRevhi nhaka yavo yamaguta ano aya namafuro awo. 
Joshua21:4 Mugove wakagoverwa vokwaKohati mhuri nemhuri ndiwo wakatanga kubuda pachin'ange. Saka vaRevhi vemba yomupristi Aroni vakapiwa maguta gumi namatatu omudzinza rokwaJudha nerokwaSimeoni nerokwaBhenjamini. 
Joshua21:5 Vamwe vose zvavo vemhuri yokwaKohati vakapiwa gumi ramaguta omunyika yokwaEfuraimu neyokwaDhani neyechimwe chikamu chevokwaManase. 
Joshua21:6 VokwaGerishoni vakagoverwa nechin'ange maguta gumi namatatu omunyika yokwaIsakari neyokwaAsheru neyokwaNafutari neyechimwe chikamu chevokwaManase vokuBhashani. 
Joshua21:7 VokwaMerari vakapiwa mhuri nemhuri maguta gumi namaviri omunyika dzevedzinza rokwaRubheni nerokwaGadhi nerokwaZebhuruni. 
Joshua21:8 Saka vaIsiraeri vakagovera vaRevhi nechin'ange maguta iwayo namafuro awo sezvakanga zvaudzwa Mosesi naTenzi. 
Joshua21:9 Mudzinza rokwaJudha neraSimeoni vakapiwa maguta akaita zvokudomwa namazita. 
Joshua21:10 Maguta iwayo akapiwa vemhuri yokwaAroni, vaRevhi vemba yokwaKohati nokuti mugove wavo ndowakatanga kubuda pachin'ange." 
Joshua21:11 Vakavapa Kiriatiaribha, ndiro guta reHebhuroni. (Aribha uyu aiva baba waAnaki.) Vakapiwa guta irori riri munyika yamakomo yokwaJudha pamwechete namafuro akaripoteredza." 
Joshua21:12 Asi minda yaro nemisha yaro zvakanga zvapiwa kare kuna Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune kuti zvive zvake. 
Joshua21:13 Vakapa vemhuri yomupristi Aroni maguta aya anoti Hebhuroni, guta rokuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe awane kwokupotera, pamwechete namafuro aro vakavapawo guta reRibhuna namafuro aro;" 
Joshua21:14 kwouyawo reJatiri namafuro aro nereEshitemoa namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:15 neHoroni namafuro aro neDhebhiri namafuro aro; 
Joshua21:16 kwoti guta reAini namafuro aro neJuta namafuro aro neBhetishemeshi namafuro aro. Ose pamwechete aiva maguta mapfumbamwe omudzinza rokwaJudha nerokwaSimeoni. 
Joshua21:17 Maguta avakapiwa omudzinza rokwaBhenjamini ndeaya kunoti guta reGibheoni namafuro aro neGebha namafuro aro; 
Joshua21:18 kwouya Anatoti namafuro aro neArimoni namafuro aro pamwechete aiva maguta mana. 
Joshua21:19 Saka maguta akapiwa vapristi vemba yokwaAroni ose pamwechete aiva gumi namatatu, namafuro awo." 
Joshua21:20 Kune vamwe vose vokwaKohati vakanga vasara vemhuri dzevokwaKohati vomudzinza rokwaRevhi wakapiwa maguta omudzinza rokwaEfuraimu. 
Joshua21:21 Vakapiwa maguta aya anoti: Shikemu guta romunyika yaEfuraimu yemakomo, namafuro aro rokuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe awane kwokupotera, kwouya Gezeri namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:22 neKibhuzaimu namafuro aro, neBhetihoroni namafuro aro, ose pamwechete aiva maguta mana." 
Joshua21:23 Maguta avakapiwa omudzinza rokwaDhani ndeaya: kunoti guta reEriteke namafuro aro, neGibhetoni namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:24 kwoti Aijaroni namafuro aro, neGatirimoni namafuro aro, Ose pamwechete aiva maguta mana." 
Joshua21:25 Maguta avakapiwa mune chimwe chikamu chedzinza rokwaManase ndeaya. Kunoti guta reTanaki namafuro aro neGatirimoni namafuro aro, aiva maguta maviri." 
Joshua21:26 Maguta emhuri idzi dzokwaKohati dzakanga dzasara ose zvawo pamwechete aiva gumi, aiva namafuro awo." 
Joshua21:27 VaRevhi vemhuri yokwaGerishoni vakagoverwa maguta mune chimwe chikamu chevedzinza raManase anoti: guta reGorani rokuBhashani namafuro aro, rokuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe awane kwokupotera kwouya Beeshitera namafuro aro, aiva maguta maviri." 
Joshua21:28 Mudzinza rokwaIsakari vakapiwa maguta aya anoti guta reKishioni namafuro aro, nereDhabherati namafuro aro," 
Joshua21:29 neJarimuti namafuro aro, neEniganimu namafuro aro, ose pamwechete aiva maguta mana." 
Joshua21:30 Mudzinza rokwaAsheri vakapiwa maguta aya anoti: guta reMishori namafuro aro, neAbhudhoni namafuro aro." 
Joshua21:31 Kwouya reHerikati namafuro aro, neRehobhu namafuro aro, ose pamwechete aiva maguta mana." 
Joshua21:32 Mudzinza rokwaNafutari vakapiwa maguta aya anoti: Kedheshi riri kuGarirea namafuro aro, rokuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe awane, kwokupotera, kwouya guta reHamatidhori namafuro aro, neKaritani namafuro aro, ose pamwechete aiva maguta matatu." 
Joshua21:33 Maguta emhuri dzose dzokwaGerishoni ose zvawo pamwechete aiva gumi namatatu aivawo namafuro awo. 
Joshua21:34 Kune vose vaRevhi vakanga vasara vemhuri dzokwaMerari vakapiwa maguta mudzinza rokwaZebhuruni aya anoti: guta reJokineamu namafuro aro neKarita namafuro aro; 
Joshua21:35 Kwoti Dhimuna namafuro aro neNaharara namafuro aro ose pamwechete aiva maguta mana. 
Joshua21:36 Mudzinza rokwaRubheni vakapiwa maguta aya anoti: guta reBhezeri namafuro aro neJahazi namafuro aro 
Joshua21:37 kwouya Kedhemoti namafuro aro neMefaati namafuro aro. Ose pamwechete aiva maguta mana. 
Joshua21:38 Mudzinza rokwaGadhi vakapiwa maguta aya anoti: guta reRamoti riri kuGireadhi namafuro aro, rokuti munhu anenge auraya mumwe awane kwokupotera." 
Joshua21:39 Kwouya reMahanaimu namafuro aro neHeshibhoni namafuro aro neJazeri namafuro aro; ose pamwechete aiva maguta mana. 
Joshua21:40 Saka maguta emhuri dzavamwe vaRevhi vose, vakanga vasara vemhuri dzokwaMerari ose pamwechete aiva gumi namaviri." 
Joshua21:41 Naizvozvo maguta avaRevhi avakapiwa pamwechete namafuro awo mukati menyika yavaIsiraeri yenhaka aiva makumi mana ana masere. 
Joshua21:42 Pamaguta ose iwaya, guta roga roga rakanga rakapoteredzwa namafuro; ndozvakanga zvakaita maguta iwayo ose."
