Joshua21:43 Nokudaro Tenzi akapa vaIsiraeri nyika yose yaakatsidzira kupa kumadzibaba avo. Vakaitora ikava yavo ndokubva vagaramo. 
Joshua21:44 Tenzi akavapa runyararo kumative ose sokutsidza kwaakaita kumadzibaba avo. Hakuna kana nomumwe wavavengi vavo akagona kumirisana navo nokuti Tenzi akaisa vavengi vavo vose mumaoko avo. 
Joshua21:45 Hakuna kana chinhu chimwechete chakanaka chakanga chatsidzirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi chisina kuzoitika, zvose zvakaitika." 
Joshua22:1 Joshuwa akadaidza vedzinza rokwaRubheni nerokwaGadhi nechimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase 
Joshua22:2 akavati, “Makachengeta zvose zvamakaudzwa naMosesi muranda waTenzi, mukanditeerera pane zvose zvandakakuudzai." 
Joshua22:3 Hamuna kana kumbosiyana zvenyu nehama dzenyu nguva yose iyi yanga yakareba kudai kusvikira nhasi uno, asi kutoti manga muchinyatsochengeta zvamakaudzwa naTenzi, Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua22:4 Zvino Tenzi Mwari wenyu apa hama dzenyu runyararo sokuvatsidzira kwaakaita. Saka imimi chidzokerai zvenyu kumusha kwenyu, kunyika yenyu yamakapiwa naMosesi muranda waTenzi kumhiri kwaJorodhani, kuti ive yenyu." 
Joshua22:5 Nyatsongwarirai kuchengeta mutemo nomurao wamakaudzwa naMosesi muranda waTenzi, wokuti mude Tenzi, Mwari wenyu, mufambe munzira dzake dzose muteerere mirao yake muti kwati kwati naye, muchimushandira nomwoyo wenyu wose, nomweya wenyu wose.”" 
Joshua22:6 Saka Joshuwa akavapa chikomborero ndokuvati vaende zvavo, vakaenda kumisha yavo." 
Joshua22:7 Zvakanga zvaitika ndezvokuti Mosesi akanga apa chimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase nyika yavo kuBhashani, Joshuwa ndokupawo chimwe chikamu chevedzinza irori nyika, pedyo nehama dzavo yokumadokero kwaJorodhani. Pakuonekana navo, Joshuwa akavapa chikomborero" 
Joshua22:8 achiti kwavari, “Chidzokerai zvenyu kumisha yenyu muine upfumi hwenyu hwakawanda kwazvo, hwamatanga namatanga ezvipfuwo nesirivha nendarira nesimbi, namatutu matutu ehanzu, musvikogoverana nehama dzenyu zvamakapamba kuvavengi venyu." 
Joshua22:9 Naizvozvo vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi nechimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase vakadzokera kumusha. Vakaonekedzana navamwe vavo vaIsiraeri kuShiro, munyika yeKanani, voenda zvavo kuGireadhi kunyika yavo yavakatora vakaiita yavo sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi nokuna Mosesi.”" 
Joshua22:10 Pavakasvika kunharaunda yokuna Jorodhani munyika yeKanani, vokwaRubheni novokwaManase vakavaka atari huru kwazvo munyasi maJorodhani." 
Joshua22:11 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzavamwe vavo vaIsiraeri zvichinzi, “Hezvoka, vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi vaya nechimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase chiya vavaka atari kumuganhu wenyika yeKanani kunharaunda yokunaJorodhani kumhiri ino munyika yavaIsiraeri.”" 
Joshua22:12 VaIsiraeri pavakazvinzwa, gungano rose ravaIsiraeri rakakokorodzana kuShiro kundovarwisa." 
Joshua22:13 VaIsiraeri vakatumira Finehasi mwanakomana womupristi Ereazari kune vedzinza rokwaRubheni nerokwaGadhi nokune chimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase riya kunyika yeGireadhi. 
Joshua22:14 Akaenda navatungamiriri gumi, mutungamiriri mumwechete mumwechete pamadzinza gumi avaIsiraeri. Mumwe nomumwe wavo aiva mukuru mukuru wemhuri mumadzinza avaIsiraeri." 
Joshua22:15 Vakasvika kune vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi nevechimwe chikamu chiya chevokwaManase kunyika yeGireadhi, vakati kwavari," 
Joshua22:16 “Chinzwai zvarehwa negungano rose raTenzi, zvanzi, ‘Ko madarirei kupandukira Mwari wavaIsiraeri kudai, motsauka kuna Tenzi nhasi nokutozvivakira zvenyu atari muchipandukira Tenzi?" 
Joshua22:17 Ko mhosva iya yechitadzo chokuPeori munoti haina kukwana here? Inga mhosva yacho hatisati taishamba wani kusvikira pari nhasi uno. Ndiyo yakaunza denda pagungano raTenzi. 
Joshua22:18 Zvamava kutosiyana zvenyu nhasi uno naTenzi. Zvino kana imi mukapandukira Tenzi nhasi uno, mangwana achashatirirwa gungano rose ravaIsiraeri." 
Joshua22:19 Ko, kana maona kuti nyika yenyu ino yakan'ora madii kusva mayambukira zvenyu kunyika yaTenzi kune tendhe raTenzi muwane nyika mukati medu. Asi chete musapandukire Tenzi, kana kupandukira isu muchitozvivakira zvenyu atari isiri atari yaTenzi, Mwari wedu." 
Joshua22:20 Handiti Akani mwanakomana waZera akapara chitadzo panyaya yezvinhu zvakanga zvaturirwa kuna Tenzi kuti zviparadzwe. Chitadzo chacho hachina here kupfukira gungano rose ravaIsiraeri? Haasiri iye woga akafa pamusana pechitadzo chake.’ ” 
Joshua22:21 VokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi nechimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase ndokupindura vatungamiriri vaya vemhuri dzavaIsiraeri vachiti," 
Joshua22:22 “Tenzi, Samasimbaose, ndiye Mwari! Iye Tenzi, Samasimbaose, ndiye Mwari. Ndiye anoziva navaIsiraeri pachavo ngavazivewo kana izvozvi takazviita noumhandupandu kana kuti nokusatendeka kuna Tenzi musatirege tiri vapenyu nhasi uno." 
Joshua22:23 Kana takazvivakira atari iyi kuti tikande pasi zvokutevera Tenzi kana kuti tipire pairi mupiro wokupisa, kana kupira pairi mipiro yembesanwa kana mipiro yokuwadzana, Tenzi pachake ngaatitsividze." 
Joshua22:24 Aiwa. Takangozviita tichityira kuti, mune ramangwana vana venyu vanozokonora vana vedu vachiti, ‘Muneiwo zvenyu naTenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri." 
Joshua22:25 Handiti Tenzi akaisa Jorodhani urwu kuti ruve muganhu pakati pedu nemi vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi, chenyu muna Tenzi hapana.’ Saka vana venyu vangazoregesa vana vedu kunamata Tenzi." 
Joshua22:26 Ndokusaka takati, ‘Ngatidai izvi, ngativakei atari isiri yomupiro wokupisa kana yechibayiro," 
Joshua22:27 asi kuti ive chapupu pakati pedu nemi, uyewo chigozova chapupu pakati pezvizvarwa zvedu zvichauya.’ Chive chinhu chokutipupurira kuti isuwo tinonamata Tenzi kunzvimbo yake tsvene nemipiro yedu yokupisa nezvibayiro zvedu nemipiro yedu yokuwadzana tichiitira kuti mangwana vana venyu vanozoti ‘Chenyu muna Tenzi hapana.’" 
Joshua22:28 Takati kana vakawana zvavanozotaura kwatiri, isu tichazoti, ‘Onaika atari iyo yakaita seyaTenzi yakavakwa namadzibaba edu isiri yemipiro yokuwadzana kana yechibayiro asi kuti ive chapupu pakati pedu nemi.’" 
Joshua22:29 Hazvimbofa zvakaitika kuti isu tipandukire Tenzi tokanda pasi nhasi zvokumutevera Tenzi tava kutovaka zvedu atari yomupiro wokupisa kana mupiro wembesanwa kunyange yechibayiro tichisiya atari yaTenzi, Mwari wedu iri kumusuo wetendhe rinoera!”" 
Joshua22:30 Mupristi Finehasi navatungamiriri vegungano, navakuru vakuru vemhuri dzavaIsiraeri vaaiva navo pavakanzwa zvakataurwa nevokwaRhubheni nevokwaGadhi nevokwaManase, vakafadzwa nazvo." 
Joshua22:31 Finehasi mwanakomana womupristi Ereazari akataurira vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi nevokwaManase achiti, “Nhasi tazoziva kuti Tenzi ari pakati pedu nokuti hamuna kuzviita muchipandukira Tenzi. Zvino mazonunura vaIsiraeri mumaoko aTenzi." 
Joshua22:32 Finehasi mwanakomana womupristi Ereazari navatungamiriri vaya vakadzokera zvavo kunyika yeKanani neshoko kuvaIsiraeri vachibva kunyika yeGereadhi kune vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi. 
Joshua22:33 Shoko iroro rakafadza vaIsiraeri. VaIsiraeri vakarumbidza Tenzi uye havana kana kuzotaura nezvokuvarwisa muhondo kuti vaparadze nyika yaigara vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi. 
Joshua22:34 VokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi vaya vakatumidza atari iya kuti chapupu vachiti, ‘Ndiyo chapupu pakati pedu chokuti Tenzi ndiMwari.’ ”" 
Joshua23:1 Kwakati kwapera nguva ndefu mushure nokunge Tenzi apa vaIsiraeri runyararo kumativi ose vasisina kana mhandu zvayo yaivanetsa, iye Joshuwa akwegura makore ake aendedzana." 
Joshua23:2 Joshuwa akadaidza vaIsiraeri vose navakuru vakuru vavo navatungamiriri navatongi namachinda akati kwavari, “Ini ndachembera, mazuva angu aendedzana." 
Joshua23:3 Imi makaona zvose zvakaitwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu kumarudzi ose aya pamusana penyu nokuti iye Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiye aikurwirai. 
Joshua23:4 Chionai ndakakugoverai senhaka yamadzinza enyu, nyika dzose dzendudzi dzavanhu dzisati dzakurirwa pamwechete nedzandakakurira kubvira kuna Jorodhani kusvikira kuGungwa guru kumadokero." 
Joshua23:5 Tenzi Mwari wenyu achakudzingirai achikutandanisira vanhu ivavo imi muchizotora nyika iyoyo sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi Mwari wenyu kwamuri. 
Joshua23:6 Naizvozvo ivai nomwoyo wechivindi chaiwo muchengete nokuita zvose zvakanyorwa mubhuku romutemo waMosesi. Musawane chimwe chamunotsaudzira pauri muchienda uku kana uku. 
Joshua23:7 Ndinodariro kuti murege kufambidzana nokudyidzana namarudzi akasara kuno ari mukati menyu modoma mazita avamwari vavo kana kupika navo kana kuvanamata kana kuvapfugamira. 
Joshua23:8 Asi imi munofanira kuramba makati kwati kwati naTenzi Mwari wenyu sezvamaita kusvikira nhasi uno," 
Joshua23:9 nokuti Tenzi akakudzingirai ndudzi dzavanhu huru dzine simba uye hapana munhu akagona kumirisana nemi kusvikira pari nhasi. 
Joshua23:10 Munhu mumwechete pakati penyu anomhanyisa chiuru chavanhu nokuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu ndiye anokurwirai sokukutsidzirai kwaakaita. 
Joshua23:11 Saka nyatsongwarirai kuda Tenzi Mwari wenyu. 
Joshua23:12 Asi mukapinduka mowirirana namarudzi aya akasara mukati menyu moroorerana navo vakadzi," 
Joshua23:13 nyatsozivai zvechokwadi kuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu haazoramba achikudzingirai marudzi, asi ivo vachava riva nechinhu chinokuteyai neshamhu inokurovai mativi neminzwa mumaziso enyu kudzamara matsakatika munyika ino yakanaka yamapiwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua23:14 “Chionai ini ndava kuendawo kunoenda vamwe imi mose munonyatsozviziva mumwoyo menyu mose iyemi pachenyu kuti hakuna kana chinhu chimwechete zvacho chakanaka chakavimbiswa pamusoro penyu chisina kuitika, zvose zvakaitirwa imi, hapana chakakundika." 
Joshua23:15 Sokuzadzikisirwa kwakangoitwa zvinhu zvakanaka zvose zvamakavimbiswa naTenzi, saizvozvowo Tenzi achazongoitawo kuti zvakaipa zvose zvikuwirei kusvikira akutsakatisai munyika ino iyi yakanaka yamakapiwa naiye Tenzi, Mwari wenyu." 
Joshua23:16 Nokudaro mukatyora chitenderano chaTenzi, Mwari wenyu chaakakuudzai, mukandonamata vamwe vamwari muchivapfugamira, Tenzi ndopaachakuvirukirai nehasha, mugokurumidza kutsakatika munyika yakanaka yaakakupai.”" 
Joshua24:1 Joshuwa akaunganidza madzinza ose avaIsiraeri kuShikemu. Akadaidzawo vakuru vakuru vavo navatungamiriri vavo navatongi namachinda eIsiraeri, vakauya pana Mwari." 
Joshua24:2 Joshuwa akataurira vanhu vose ivava achiti, “Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri, ‘Madzitateguru enyu aigara kumhiri kwaYufuratesi, Tera baba waAbhurahamu naNahori vainamata vamwe vamwari." 
Joshua24:3 Ndakazotora tateguru wenyu Abhurahamu kumhiri kwerwizi ndikamufambisa nenyika yose yeKanani ndikamupa vana vakawanda. Ndakamupa Isaki," 
Joshua24:4 Isaki ndikamupawo Jakobho naEsau. Ndakapa nyika yeSeiri yamakomo kuna Esau kuti ive yake, asi Jakobho navana vake vakadzika kuIjipiti." 
Joshua24:5 Ndakatumirako Mosesi naAroni, ndikaonesa Ijipiti nhamo nezvandakaita mukati mayo shure kwaizvozvo, ndikazokuburitsaiko." 
Joshua24:6 Ndakaburitsa madzibaba enyu muIjipiti mukasvika kugungwa. VaIjipiti vakaronda madzibaba enyu nengoro dzavo dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo kusvikira kugungwa Dzvuku. 
Joshua24:7 Vakachema kuna Tenzi kuti avabatsire, akabva aisa rima rakati ndo-o pakati penyu navaIjipiti. Akaunza gungwa akavafushira naro. Imi nameso enyu makaona zvandakaita kuIjipiti. Makazogara murenje kwenguva ndefu." 
Joshua24:8 Ndakakuunzai kunyika yavaAmori vaigara kumhiri kwaJorodhani. Vakakurwisai, asi ndakavaisa mumaoko enyu, ndakakuparadzirai vanhu ivavo, imi mukavatorera nyika yavo kuti ive yenyu." 
Joshua24:9 Kwakazomuka mambo weMoabhu, Bharaki mwanakomana wavaZipori akarwisa vaIsiraeri akatumira nhume kundodaidza Bhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori kuti arengererei rushambwa." 
Joshua24:10 Asi ndakaramba kuteerera Bhiriamu, akatokukomborerai kwazvo kwazvo ndikakununurai mumaoko ake." 
Joshua24:11 Makazoyambuka Jorodhani mukasvika kuJeriko. Machinda okuJeriko akakurwisai sezvakazoitwawo navaAmori navaPerizi navaKanani navaHiti navaGirigashi navaHivhi navaJebhusi ndakavaisa mumaoko enyu. 
Joshua24:12 Ndakafanotumira madzimambo maviri aya avaAmori mweya wokutyai imi samago, vakafanokutizai. Haasi mapakatwa enyu kana miseve yenyu yakaita izvozvi." 
Joshua24:13 Ndakakupai minda yamusina kumbounda namaguta amusina kuvaka mamugere, muchidya zvenyu michero yeminda yemigirepisi neyemiorivhi yamusina kumbosima.’" 
Joshua24:14 “Saka zvino ityai Tenzi mumunamate nomwoyo wose muchokwadi, rasai vamwari vainamatwa namadzitateguru enyu kumhiri kwerwizi kuya nokuIjipiti, munamate Tenzi." 
Joshua24:15 Kana imi musingadi kunamata Tenzi chisarudzai nhasi uno wamunoda kunamata pana vamwari vainamatwa namadzibaba enyu kumhiri kwerwizi kana vamwari vavaAmori vomunyika ino yamugere. Asi ini nemhuri yangu tichanamata Tenzi.” 
Joshua24:16 Vanhu ndokuti, “Hatimbofa takafuratira Tenzi tichindonamata vamwe vamwari" 
Joshua24:17 nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wedu ndiye akatiburitsa isu namadzibaba edu munyika yeIjipiti muuranda, akaita zviratidzo zvikuru zviya tichiona nameso edu. Akatichengeta murwendo rwedu rwose nomukati memarudzi mataipfuura namo." 
Joshua24:18 Tenzi akafanotidzingira marudzi ose navaAmoriwo vaigara munyika ino. Naizvozvo kana nesuwo tichanamata Tenzi nokuti ndiye Mwari wedu.” 
Joshua24:19 Asi Joshuwa akavati, “Hamungambokwanisi kushandira Tenzi imi nokuti iye ndiMwari mutsvene. NdiMwari weshanje. Haazokuregererai zvikanganiso nezvitadzo zvenyu." 
Joshua24:20 Chandinodariro ndechokuti mukazofuratira Tenzi mondonamata vamwari vasirivo achakupindukirai wokuitirai zvakaipa achakuparadzai iye ambenge achikukuitirai zvakanaka.” 
Joshua24:21 Vanhu vakati kuna Joshuwa, “Kwete. Tenzi ndiye watichanamata.”" 
Joshua24:22 Joshuwa ndokuti kwavari, “Iyemi ndimi matova zvapupu zvokuzvipupurira pachenyu kuti masarudza kuti Tenzi ndiye wamuchanamata.” Vakati, “Hongu ndisu zvapupu zvacho.”" 
Joshua24:23 Joshuwa ndokuti, “Saka chirasai vamwari vasirivo vamunavo, muise mwoyo wenyu kuna Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri.”" 
Joshua24:24 Vanhu vakati kuna Joshuwa, “Tenzi Mwari wedu ndiye watichanamata, izwi rake ndiro ratichateerera.”" 
Joshua24:25 Naizvozvo Joshuwa akaita chitenderano navanhu musi iwoyo, akavapa mitemo nemirao kuShikemu." 
Joshua24:26 Ipapo Joshuwa akanyora zvinhu izvozvi mubhuku romutemo waMwari. Akatora zidombo guru akaridzimikira pasi pomuti womuoku, pedyo nenzvimbo yaTenzi inoera." 
Joshua24:27 Joshuwa akataurira vanhu vose achiti, “Chionai, zidombo iri richava chapupu chokutipisa mhosva nokuti ranzwa zvose zvataurwa naTenzi kwatiri. Naizvozvo richava chapupu chokukupisai mhosva zvimwe mungadaro mukazoita zvokunyengedza Mwari wenyu.”" 
Joshua24:28 Joshuwa akazoti vanhu vachienda zvavo kunyika dzenhaka dzavo vachiti uyu kwake uyu kwake. 
Joshua24:29 Mushure mezvinhu izvi, Joshuwa mwanakomana waNuni muranda waTenzi akafa ava nezana ramakore rina makore gumi." 
Joshua24:30 Vakamuviga munyika yenhaka yake kuTimunatisera munyika yaEfuraimu yemakomo kuchamhembe kwegomo reGaashi. 
Joshua24:31 VaIsiraeri vakanamata Tenzi panguva yose yaJoshuwa, napamazuva avakuru vakuru vakasiirwa naJoshuwa variko, vakanga vaona basa rose rakanga raitirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi." 
Joshua24:32 Mapfupa aJosefi akanga aunzwa navaIsiraeri pavakabva kuIjipiti vakaaviga kuShikemu munzvimbo yakatengwa naJokobho kuna vaHamori baba waShikemu nezana remari yesirivha. Nzvimbo yacho yakazova nhaka yezvizvarwa zvokwaJosefi. 
Joshua24:33 Ereazari mwanakomana waAroni akafawo, vakamuviga kuGibhea muguta raFinehasi mwanakomana wake raakapiwa munyika yemakomo yeEfuraimu." 
Judges1:1 Zvino kuzoti Joshuwa afa, vaIsiraeri vakabvunza kuna Tenzi vachiti, “Ndivanaani pakati pedu vanofanira kutanga kundorwisa vaKanani?”" 
Judges1:2 Tenzi akapindura achiti, “VokwaJudha ndivo vanoenda. Izvozvi ndakatoisa nyika iyoyo mumaoko avo.”" 
Judges1:3 VokwaJudha vakati kuhama dzavo dzokwaSimeoni, “Hendei tose kunyika yatakagoverwa, tindorwisa vaKanani, isu tizondorwawo saizvozvo pamwechete nemi kunyika yenyu yamakagoverwa.” VokwaSimeoni ndokubva vaenda navo." 
Judges1:4 VokwaJudha vakaenda, Tenzi akaisa mumaoko avo vaKanani navaPerizi. Vakauraya varume gumi rezviuru kuBhezeki." 
Judges1:5 Vakasvikira Adhonibhezeki ari kuBhezeki vakamurwisa vakakurira vaKanani navaPerizi. 
Judges1:6 Adhonibhezeki ndokuti ware kutiza, asi vakamudzingirira, vakamubata, vakamudimura zvara zvake nezvigunwe zvake zvikuru." 
Judges1:7 Adhonibhezeki akati, “Ndaiva namakumi manomwe amadzimambo andakanga ndakadimura zvara zvawo mumaoko nezvigunwe zvawo zvikuru, chokudya vachiita chokutonongerera pasi petafura yangu yandaidyira. Nhasi uno Mwari anditsiva zvandakavaitira.” Vakaenda naye kuJerusaremu akandofirako." 
Judges1:8 Varume vokwaJudha vakarwisawo Jerusaremu vakarikurira vakauraya vanhu vomo namapakatwa, vakaripisa nomoto." 
Judges1:9 Shure kwaizvozvo varume vokwaJudha vakadzika, vakandorwisa vaKanani vaigara kunyika yamakomo, kuNegevhu nokunyika yokumanhika." 
Judges1:10 Vakavinga vaKanani vaigara muguta reHebhuroni, raimbonzi Kiriatiaribha, vakakurira Sheshai naAhimani naTarimai." 
Judges1:11 Vakabva ipapo vakavinga vanhu vaigara muguta reDhebhiri raimbonzi Kiriatiseferi. 
Judges1:12 Karebhu akanga ati, “Anenge arwisa Kiriatiseferi akarikurira ndinomupa mwana wangu Akesa kuti ave mukadzi wake.”" 
Judges1:13 Otinieri mwanakomana waKenazi munun'una waKarebhu ndiye akarikurira. Karebhu ndokumupa mwanasikana wake Akesa kuti ave mukadzi wake. 
Judges1:14 Akesa paakauya kwaari, akamukurudzira kuti akumbire baba vake munda. Mukadzi iyeye akajitika padhongi rake, baba vake vakati, “Unodeiko mwanangu.”" 
Judges1:15 Mukadzi uyu akati, “Zvamakandipa munda kuNegevhu, ndiitireiwo mwoyochena, mundipe zvisipiti zvemvura.” Karebhu ndokumupa zvisipiti zvemvura zveko zvokumusoro nezvisipiti zvezasi." 
Judges1:16 VaKeni zvizvarwa zvokwavatezvara vaMosesi vakabva kuguta remirara pamwechete nevokwaJudha, vakaenda kurenje rokwaJudha riri kuNegevhu pedyo neAradhi vakandogara pamwechete navanhu voko." 
Judges1:17 VokwaJudha vakaenda nehama dzavo dzokwaSimeoni vakakurira vaKanani vaigara muguta reZefati, vakariparadza zvokuparadza zviya. Saka guta iroro rakazonzi Horuma." 
Judges1:18 VokwaJudha ivava vakakurirawo guta reGaza namatunhu aro neAshikeroni namatunhu aro, neEkironi namatunhu aro." 
Judges1:19 Tenzi akava nevokwaJudha vakatora nyika yamakomo ikava yavo. Asi vakatadza kudzinga vanhu vokumapani nokuti vakanga vaine ngoro dzehondo dzesimbi. 
Judges1:20 Guta reHebhuroni rakapiwa kuna Karebhu sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Mosesi. Karebhu akadzingamo vanakomana vaAnaki vatatu. 
Judges1:21 Asi vokwaBhenjamini vakatadza kudzinga vaJebhusi vaigara muguta reJerusaremu. Saka vaJebhusi vagere muJerusaremu pamwechete nevokwaBhenjamini nanhasi uno. 
Judges1:22 Vemba yokwaJosefi vakakwira kundorwisa Bhetieri Tenzi aiva navo. 
Judges1:23 Vemba yokwaJosefi ivava vakatuma vanhu kundosora muguta reBhetieri. Kare zita reguta irori raimbonzi Ruzi. 
Judges1:24 Vasori ivavo vakaona murume akanga achibuda muguta imomo vakati kwaari, “Tiratidzewo panopindwa napo muguta, isu tigozokunzwirawo tsitsi.”" 
Judges1:25 Akavaratidza paipindwa napo muguta iroro. Vakauraya vomuguta imomo namapakatwa. Asi vakarega murume uya kuti aende zvake nemhuri yake. 
Judges1:26 Murume uyu akaenda kunyika yavaHiti. Akavaka guta ikoko, akaritumidza zita rokuti Ruzi ndiro zita raro nanhasi uno." 
Judges1:27 VokwaManase havana kudzinga vagari vomumaguta aya anoti: Bhetisheani nemisha yaro, kwouya Taanaki nemisha yaro, kwochiti Dhori nemisha yaro kwoti Ibhereamu nemisha yaro kwozoti Megidho nemisha yaro. Asi vaKanani vakaramba vangotsungisawo mwoyo kugara munyika imomo." 
Judges1:28 VaIsiraeri pavakanga vava vanhu vane simba vakaitisa vaKanani basa rechibharo. Asi havana kubva vavadzinga zvokuvapedzeredza. 
Judges1:29 VokwaEfuraimu havanawo kudzinga vaKanani vaigara muGezeri. Asi vaKanani vakagara zvavo muGezeri mukati mavo. 
Judges1:30 VokwaZebhuruniwo havana kudzinga vagari vomuKitironi, kana vagari vomuNaharori. Asi vaKanani vakagara mukati mavo vokwaZebhuruni vakavabatisa chibharo." 
Judges1:31 VokwaAsheri havanawo kudzinga vagari vomuAko kana vagari vomuSidhoni, kanawo vagari vomuAhirabhu, kanawo vomuAkizibhu, kana vomuHeribha kana vomuAfiki, kunyange vomuRehobhu." 
Judges1:32 Asi vokwaAsheri ivava vakatogara zvavo mukati mavaKanani, vagari vomunyika iyoyo nokuti havana kuvadzinganisa." 
Judges1:33 VokwaNafutari havana kudzinga vagari vomuguta iri reBhetishemeshi, kana vagari vomuBhetianati, asi vakatogara zvavo mukati mavaKanani, vagari vomunyika iyoyo. Asi ivo vagari vomuBhetishemeshi nevomuBhetianati vaibatiswa chibharo." 
Judges1:34 VaAmori vakasundira vokwaDhani kunyika yamakomo nokuti havana kuvabvumidza kuburuka kubani. 
Judges1:35 VaAmori vakaramba vakatsungisa mwoyo kugara kugomo reHeresi nomuAijaroni nomuShaaribhimu. Asi vemba yokwaJosefi vakavakurira vakavabatisa chibharo. 
Judges1:36 Muganho wenyika yevaAmori waibvira kumupata weAkirabhimu woenda nokuSera zvichingokwira zvakangodaro. 
Judges2:1 Mutumwa waTenzi akabva kuGirigari akakwidza kuBhokimu. Akati, “Ndakakubvisai kuIjipiti ndikauya nemi kunyika yandakatsidzira kupa kune madzibaba enyu. Ndakati, ‘Handimbozofi ndakatyora chitenderano changu nemi." 
Judges2:2 Imiwo regai kuita chitenderano navanhu vomunyika ino. Munofanira kupwanya atari dzavo.’ Asi imi hamuna kuteerera zvandakareva. Ko ndochii ichochi chamaita? 
Judges2:3 Zvino ini ndinoti, ‘Handichafanokudzingirai vanhu ivava, asi vachava vavengi venyu uye vamwari vavo vari chinhu chakakuteyai.’ ”" 
Judges2:4 Mutumwa waTenzi akati apedza kutaurira vaIsiraeri vose, vanhu vakaridza mhere kuchema." 
Judges2:5 Vakatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rokuti Kuchema, vakabva vapira Tenzi zvibayiro ipapo." 
Judges2:6 Joshuwa paakati vaIsiraeri vachienda zvavo, vakati ava kwavo ava kwavo vachienda kunyika dzavo dzenhaka kundodzitora vachidziita dzavo." 
Judges2:7 Vanhu ivava vakanamata Tenzi panguva yose yakanga Joshuwa achiri mupenyu, nenguva yose yavakuru vakuru vakasiyiwa naJoshuwa variko vakanga vaona basa guru rose rakaitirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi." 
Judges2:8 Joshuwa mwanakomana waNunu muranda waTenzi akafa ava nezana ramakore ana makore gumi. 
Judges2:9 Vakamuviga munyika yake yenhaka kuTimunatiheresi kunyika yaEfuraimu yamakomo kuchamhembe kwegomo reGaashi. 
Judges2:10 Chizvarwa ichocho chose chakapera kufa, kukazomukawo chimwe chizvarwa mushure mavo chakanga chisingamboziva Tenzi kana basa raakanga aitira vaIsiraeri." 
Judges2:11 VaIsiraeri vaiita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi. Vainamata vanaBhaari. 
Judges2:12 Vaizvicheka ukama naTenzi Mwari wamadzibaba avo akavaburitsa kunyika yeIjipiti, voteveredzana zvavo navamwe vamwari vavanhu vakanga vari munharaunda yavo vachivapfugamira, vachivirutsa hasha dzaTenzi." 
Judges2:13 Vakachekana ukama naTenzi vonamata vanaBhaari naAshitaroti. 
Judges2:14 Saka hasha dzaTenzi dzaivirukira vaIsiraeri ovaisa mumaoko avapambi, vachivapamba, achivati kuche mumaoko avavengi vavo vomunharaunda yavo yose. Havaizogona kana kumirisana navavengi vavo." 
Judges2:15 Nguva dzose dzavaiti vondorwa, Tenzi aitenge orwisana navo kuti zvivaipire, sokuyambira kwakanga kwaita Tenzi nokuvatsidzira kwaakanga aita. Zvose izvozvo zvaivatambudza kwazvo mumwoyo." 
Judges2:16 Tenzi aizovamutsira vatongi vaivanunura mumaoko avanhu ivavo vaivapamba. 
Judges2:17 Kunyange zvakadaro vakange vasingateereri vatongi vavo ivavo nokuti vairamba vachingoita unzenza hwokuteveredzana navamwe vamwari vachivapfugamira. Vakanga vasingatani kutsauka nzira yaifambwa namadzibaba avo vaiteerera mitemo yaTenzi. Ivo havana kuita izvozvo. 
Judges2:18 Tenzi aiti kana avamutsira mutongi, aibva ava nomutongi iyeyo ovaponesa mumaoko avavengi vavo upenyu hwose hwomutongi iyeyo nokuti Tenzi ainzwa tsitsi nokugunguzika kwavo pamusana pavanhu ivavo vaivabata zvisina kunaka." 
Judges2:19 Asi painge mutongi iyeyo afa, vaipinduka votoita zvinhu zvakaipa kwazvo kupinda zvamadzibaba avo, votevera vamwe vamwari vachivanamata vachivapfugamira. Vaizongoramba vangoti dzvemere namabasa avo iwayo vasisasiyane nomusikanzwa wavo." 
Judges2:20 Naizvozvo Tenzi aizovirukira vaIsiraeri nehasha. Aizotiwo, “Vanhu ava zvavatyora chitenderano changu chandakatemera madzibaba avo vachirega kuteerera zvandinoreva," 
Judges2:21 neniwo kubvira zvino handichafanovadzingira marudzi api zvawo akasiyiwa arimo naJoshuwa, paakafa." 
Judges2:22 Navo ndichaedza vaIsiraeri kuti ndione kuti vachachengeta here gwara raTenzi raifamba madzibaba avo kana kuti kwete.” 
Judges2:23 Saizvozvo Tenzi akarega marudzi iwayo arimo, haana kubva akurumidza kuvadzinga vose pamwechete, haanawo kuvaisa mumaoko aJoshuwa." 
Judges3:1 Zvino aya ndiwo marudzi avanhu akaregwa naTenzi arimo okuedza nawo vaIsiraeri vose zvavo vakanga vasina kumbenge vaona hondo ichirwiwa muKanani. 
Judges3:2 Zvaingoitirwa kuti vezvizvarwa zvaIsiraeri vagoziva hondo, uye kuti adzidzise kurwa vaya vainge vasati vaziva hondo." 
Judges3:3 Marudzi anoti: madzishe mashanu avaFirisitia kwouya vaKanani vose navaSidhoni naHivhi vaigara kumakomo okuRebhanoni kubvira kugomo reBhaariherimoni kusvikira toda kupinda kuHamati. 
Judges3:4 Vakaregwa varimo kuedza vaIsiraeri kuti kugoonekwa kuti vachateerera here mitemo yaTenzi yakaudzwa madzibaba avo nomuromo waMosesi. 
Judges3:5 Saka vaIsiraeri vakatogara zvavo mukati mavaKanani navaHiti navaAmori navaPerizi navaHivhi navaJebhusi. 
Judges3:6 Vaitoroorerana navo vachitonamata zvavo vamwari vavo. 
Judges3:7 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi. Vakakanganwa Tenzi, Mwari wavo, vakanamata vanaBhaari naAsheroti." 
Judges3:8 Naizvozvo hasha dzaTenzi dzakavirukira vaIsiraeri akabva avaisa mumaoko amambo Kushanirishataimu wokuMesopotamia. VaIsiraeri vakapedza makore masere vachimushandira. 
Judges3:9 VaIsiraeri vakazochema kuna Tenzi. Tenzi akavamutsira mununuri akavaponesa, ainzi Otinieri mwanakomana waKenazi, munun'una waKarebhu." 
Judges3:10 Mweya waTenzi wakauya paari akatonga Isiraeri. Akaenda kuhondo, Tenzi akaisa mumaoko ake mambo Kushanirishataimu wokuMesopotamia akamukurira. Nyika ikabva yava norunyararo." 
Judges3:11 Nyika yakabva yava norunyararo kwamakumi mana amakore, ndokubva Otinieri mwanakomana wavaKenazi azofawo zvake." 
Judges3:12 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakare zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi, Tenzi ndokupa Egironi mambo weMoabhu simba rokuvakurira nokuti vakanga vaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi." 
Judges3:13 Akakoka vaAmoni navaAmareki akandorwisa vaIsiraeri, vakakurira guta remirara rikava ravo." 
Judges3:14 VaIsiraeri vakapedza gumi ramakore rina makore masere vachishandira Egironi mambo weMoabhu. 
Judges3:15 VaIsiraeri vakazochemazve kuna Tenzi. Tenzi akavamutsira mumwezve mununuri ainzi Ehudhi mwanakomana wavaGera wedzinza rokwaBhenjamini aiva namaboshwe. VaIsiraeri vakamutuma nomutero kuna Egironi mambo weMoabhu. 
Judges3:16 Zvino Ehudhi uyu akazvigadzirira bakatwa rake, muchekakwose chaiwo rakanga rakareba masendimita makumi mashanu. Akaripfekera muhanzu dzake, kuchidya chake chokurudyi." 
Judges3:17 Akasvitsa mutero iwoyu kuna Egironi mambo weMoabhu. Egironi uyu aiva rume dindimutibvu chairo kufuta. 
Judges3:18 Ehudhi paakati pedzei kuturira mutero uya, akati vanhu vakanga vauya vakatakura mutero iwoyu vachidzokera zvavo." 
Judges3:19 Asi iye pachake akadzoka vava kuzvifananidzo zvokuveza zvamatombo zviya zvokuGirigari, akasvikoti, “Mambo wangu, ndine nyaya yandiri kuda kumbotaurawo zvangu nemi kazevezeve.” Mambo ndokuti, “Chimbonyararai.” Vose vaimushandira vakabva vabuda panze vachimusiya." 
Judges3:20 Ehudhi aswedera kuna mambo, iye akanga agere zvake ari oga mumba yepanhurikidzwa yapamusoro inotonhorera. Ehudhi akati “Ndine shoko renyu rabva kuna Tenzi.” Mambo akasimuka muchigaro chake." 
Judges3:21 Ehudhi akati we-e bakatwa rake noruboshwe kuchidya chokurudyi kuya ndokuti naro bhofo mudumbu ramambo. 
Judges3:22 Rakabva rati bherevere zvose nomupakato waro. Mafuta akariti fushe fushe nokuti haana kuribvisa mudumbu make, tsvina ikabva yabuda." 
Judges3:23 Ehudhi akati bwa kubuda muberere, zarirei misuo yemba yapanhurikidzwa yapamusoro iya ndokubva asiya ayikiya." 
Judges3:24 Kuzoti aenda, varanda vakabva vasvikawo, vakaona misuo yemba yapamusoro yapanhurikidzwa iya yakakiyiwa vakati, “Zvimwe mambo anodaro achizvibatsira zvake mumba yake inotonhorera.”" 
Judges3:25 Vakamirira kusvikira zvava kutovashayisa mazano, asi paasina kuzarura misuo, vakazotora kiyi vakazarura misuo iya, onei tenzi wavo akati rabada pasi atofa." 
Judges3:26 Ehudhi akapunyuka pavaingunomirira paya. Akapfuura pazvifananidzo zvokuveza zvamatombo zviya akatizira kuSeira. 
Judges3:27 Paakasvika ikoko akaridza hwamanda munyika yaEfuraimu yamakomo. VaIsiraeri vakaburuka naye munyika yamakomo iyoyi iye achivatungamirira. 
Judges3:28 Akavati, “Nditeverei. Tenzi atoisa vavengi venyu vaMoabhu mumaoko enyu.” Vakamutevera vakandogaririra kumazambuko aJorodhani okuenda kuMoabhu hapana wavaibvumira kuyambuka nepo." 
Judges3:29 Panguva iyoyo vakauraya mikweshwa yavarume vechiMoabhu vanosvika zviuru gumi. Hakuna kana mumwechete akapunyuka. 
Judges3:30 Nokudaro vaMoabhu vakakurirwa navaIsiraeri musi iwoyo. Nyika yakava norunyararo kwamakumi masere amakore. 
Judges3:31 Shure kwaEhudhi kwakauya Shamugari mwanakomana wavaAnati. Iyeyu uyu akauraya mazana matanhatu avaFirisitia, nemhayo yokutinhisa mombe naiyewo akanunura Isiraeri." 
Judges4:1 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakare zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi mushure mokufa kwaEhudhi," 
Judges4:2 naizvozvo Tenzi akavaisa mumaoko amambo Jabhini mumwe mambo womuKanani aitonga Hazori. Mutungamiriri wehondo yake ainzi Sisera aigara kuHaroshetihagoiimu. 
Judges4:3 Aiva namazana mapfumbamwe engoro dzehondo dzesimbi. Akabata vaIsiraeri zvakaipa kwazvo kwamakumi maviri amakore, ndokubva vaIsiraeri vachema kuna Tenzi kuti avanunure." 
Judges4:4 Panguva iyoyo Dhebhora muporofita wechikadzi, mudzimai waRapidhoti ndiye aitonga vaIsiraeri." 
Judges4:5 Aitongera mhosva pamuti womurara wokwaDhebhora munyika yamakomo pakati peRama neBhetieri munyika yamakomo yokwaEfuraimu. VaIsiraeri vaitoenda ikoko kwaari kundotongwa mhosva dzavo. 
Judges4:6 Dhebhora akatuma shoko rokuti Bharaki mwanakomana wavaAbhinoamu auye kwaari kubva kuKedheshi kwaNafutari akati kwaari, “Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri ari kukutuma, ari kuti, ‘Enda utore zviuru gumi zvavarume vedzinza rokwaNafutari neraZebhuruni uvatungamirire kugomo reTabhori." 
Judges4:7 Ndichakwezvera Sisera mutungamiriri wehondo yaJabhini, kuzosangana newe pedyo norwizi rwaKishoni nengoro dzake dzehondo, nezvikwata zvake zvavarwi ndigomuisa mumaoko ako.’ ”" 
Judges4:8 Bharaki akamuti, “Kana imi mukaenda neni ndinoenda, asi kana imi musingaende neni, iniwo handiende.”" 
Judges4:9 Dhebhora ndokuti, “Zvokuenda newe ndinoenda, asi namaitiro awada kuzviita nawo aya, iwe hausiwe uchava nembiri nokuti Tenzi achaisa Sisera mumaoko omunhukadzi.” Nokudaro Dhebhora akasimuka akaenda pamwechete naBharaki kuKedheshi." 
Judges4:10 Bharaki akakokorodza vedzinza rokwaZebhuruni nevokwaNafutari kuKedheshi. Varume vanosvika zviuru gumi vakamutevera. Dhebhora akaenda pamwechete naye. 
Judges4:11 Hebheri muKeni akanga apararana navaKeni, zvizvarwa zvokwaHobhabhu madzitezvara aMosesi. Akanga akandodzika matendhe ake kumuoku wokuZaananimu, uri pedyo nokuKedheshi." 
Judges4:12 Kwakasvitswa shoko kuna Sisera rokuti Bharaki mwanakomana waAbhinoamu aenda kugomo reTabhori. 
Judges4:13 Sisera akaunganidza ngoro dzake dzose dzehondo, mazana mapfumbamwe engoro dzehondo dzesimbi, navarume vose vaaiva navo kuHaroshetihagoiimu akaenda navo kurwizi rwaKishoni." 
Judges4:14 Dhebhora akati kuna Bharaki, “Chivavinga. Ndozuva raiswa Sisera mumaoko ako naTenzi. Handiti izvozvi Tenzi ari kukutungamirirai here?” Saka Bharaki akadzika mugomo reTabhori aine gumi rezviuru zvavarume vaimutevera." 
Judges4:15 Tenzi akaita kuti Sisera nengoro dzake dzose dzehondo, nehondo yake dzose vati ware kutiza Bharaki ovarwisa namapakatwa. Sisera akajitika mungoro yake yehondo ndokuti gumbo ndibereke otiza netsoka." 
Judges4:16 Bharaki akadzingirirana nengoro dzehondo dzacho nehondo yacho kusvikira kuHaroshetihagoiimu. Hondo yose yaSisera yakaurayiwa namapakatwa, hapana kana nomumwe akapunyuka." 
Judges4:17 Asi Sisera akatizira netsoka kutendhe raJaeri mukadzi waHebheri wechiKeni nokuti Jabhini mambo weHazori ainzwanana nevemhuri yokwaHebheri muKeni. 
Judges4:18 Jaeri akabuda akachingura Sisera akamuti, “Changamire, uyai zvenyu muno, uyai zvenyu muno, musatye.” Akabva apinda mutendhe, ndokumufugidza negumbeze." 
Judges4:19 Akati kwaari, “Ndipeiwo mvura yokunwa ndafa nenyota!” Akabva amuzarurira chigubhu chomukaka akanwa, ndokumufukidza pakare." 
Judges4:20 Akamuti, “Chimira pamusuo wetendhe apa. Kana kukasvika munhu akabvunza kuti ‘Pano pane munhu here? Iwe iti hapana.’ ”" 
Judges4:21 Asi Jaeri akatora hoko yetendhe nenyundo ndokuenda paari achiverevedza, iye akakotsira kudaro, aneta. Akasvikoroverera hoko iya pachawowo kusvikira yabayirira muvhu, ndokubva afa." 
Judges4:22 Ndiye Bharaki tutururu achironda Sisera, ndokubva Jaeri abuda achichingurana naye akamuti, “Uyai ndikuratidzei munhu wamuri kutsvaka.” Akapinda mutendhe make muya, wanei Sisera akati rabada pasi, akafa, akarovererwa hoko yetendhe pachawowo." 
Judges4:23 Musi iwoyo Tenzi akaita kuti vaIsiraeri vakurire Jabhini. 
Judges4:24 VaIsiraeri vakaramba vati tsvome tsvome kurwisa Jabhini mumwewo mambo weKanani kusvikira vamuparadza chaizvo. 
Judges5:1 Musi iwoyo Dhebhora naBharaki mwanakomana wavaAbhinoamu vakaimba rwiyo urwu vachiti: 
Judges5:2 “Tenzi ngaarumbidzwe nokuti vakuru vakuru vakatungamirira muIsiraeri uye vanhu vakazvipira nomwoyo unoda. 
Judges5:3 Teererai imi Madzimambo, munzwe imi machinda. Ini, iyeni pachangu ndomboimbira Tenzi. Ndava kuimbira rwiyo Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri." 
Judges5:4 Tenzi imi pakubva kwenyu kugomo reSeiri, pamaikanyaira mobva mumasango eEdhomu, nyika yakadedera, denga rikanaya, makore akadonha mvura." 
Judges5:5 Makomo akandengendeka pamberi paTenzi, makomo eSinai pana Mwari wavaIsiraeri." 
Judges5:6 Panguva yaShamugari mwanakomana waAnati, panguva yaJaeri, zvedungwerungwe mumigwagwa kwakanga kusisina. Venzendo vaitofamba notunzira twomusango." 
Judges5:7 Shasha dzokutungamirira muIsiraeri makanga musisina kusvikira kwamuka ini Dhebhora. Kwazomuka ini amai veIsiraeri. 
Judges5:8 Vanhu pavaisarudza vamwari vatsva, hondo yaibvawo yagogodzera pamusuo. Pamakumi mana ezviuru zvavaIsiraeri kwaimboonekwa nhoo kana pfumo zvaro nhai?" 
Judges5:9 Mwoyo wangu unofadzwa navatungamiriri veIsiraeri unofadzwa navakazvipira nomwoyo unoda. Tenzi ngaarumbidzwe. 
Judges5:10 Zviparidzei, Imi vananyakutasva pamadongi echikadzi machena, iyemi vokugara pazvityaro zvina machira anokosha iyemi vanyakupfuura nenzira." 
Judges5:11 Ngavadaidzire kupfuura vanogova mvura, vanoigova panonwiwa mvura. Zvinoshamisa zvakaitwa naTenzi ngavazviimbe, zvokutungamirira kwaakaita Isiraeri zvinoshamisa. Vanhu vaTenzi vakaunganidzana kumisuwo mikuru yamaguta." 
Judges5:12 Mukai, mukai mushaure vaDhebhora! Mukai, mukai mushaure rumbo! Simuka Bharaki, mwana waAbhinoamu, vakambokuita nhapwa, nhasi uvaite nhapwa." 
Judges5:13 Vakanga vasara pakati pavakuru vakuru vakauya, vanhu vaTenzi vakaburukira kwandiri, vovinga vane simba guru." 
Judges5:14 VokwaEfuraimu kubvira kuAmareki vatopinda kare mubani, mushure menyu, vokwaBhenjamini navanhu vokwenyu. Vatungamiriri vokwaMakiri vaburukawo vatovamo, nenhungamiri dzokwaZebhuruni dzarovererawo." 
Judges5:15 Machinda okwaIsakari aita rimwe naDhebhora, vaita mwoyo mumwechete naBharaki. Heyo mhute, vanhu kutevera Bharaki. Vemhuri dzokwaRubheni vashaya rokubata nokufunga." 
Judges5:16 Muchagomirireiko kumatanga ehwai? Kutonakidzwa zvenyu nhai nenyere dzokuridzira zvipfuwo. Vemhuri dzokwaRubheni vashaya rokubata nokufunga. 
Judges5:17 VokuGireadhi vagere zvavo kumhiri kwaJorodhani iwe. Ko naivowo vokwaDhani ndochiikowo ichochi chokuramba vakangoti nezvikepe dzvemere? Kana naivowo vokwaAsheri nhaimi, votoramba zvavo vakati tendhe mumahombekombe kutonyatsoti mbwe-e zvavo make imomo." 
Judges5:18 VokwaZebhuruni vakazvipinza munjodzi yokunge vachafa. Ndozvimwechetezvo nevokwaNafutari panzvimbo yakakwirira yakasandarika. 
Judges5:19 Madzimambo akauya akarwa hondo. Madzimambo eKanani akarova hondo, kuTaanaki pedyo netsime rokuMegidho. Asi hapana kana sirivha kana chokupamba zvacho chavakabura." 
Judges5:20 Nyenyedzi dzokudenga dzakarwawo hondo dzakarwisa Sisera mumakwara adzo. 
Judges5:21 Mapopopo aKishoni akavakukura, mapopopo akati vata, mapopopo aKishoni. Regai ndichikanyaira nesimba." 
Judges5:22 Mabhiza akaridza pasi pakatinhira, nokukakatika orimbinyuka mabhiza ehondo." 
Judges5:23 Mutumwa waTenzi anoti, ‘Rengererai vokuMerozi vawirwe norushambwa, nyatsoshurikidzai rushambwa vagari veko, nokuti havana kuzobatsira Tenzi kubatsira Tenzi hondo yake nemikweshwa.’" 
Judges5:24 Jaeri akakomborerwa kwazvo pavakadzi vose. Mudzimai waHebheri muKeni, akakomborerwa kwazvo pavakadzi vose vagari vomumatendhe." 
Judges5:25 Murume uya akamukumbira mvura, iye akamupa mukaka. Akamuigira mukaka wakakora mumbiya yamadzimambo." 
Judges5:26 Akati chachapu muruoko hoko yetendhe, ndokuti nyundo yavashandi dzvi. Akaiti mbetete muna Sisera achipwanya musoro wake akabvoora akatekesha musoro wake." 
Judges5:27 Akati nyerekete ndiye pasi rapata, ndiye tonho patsoka dzake, patsoka dzakepo akati nyekete, ndiye pasi rabada. Paakati rikiti ipapo ndipo paakafira." 
Judges5:28 Ukuwo uku amai vaSisera vari shishi napahwindo kudongorera, vari shishi napahwangwadza yehwindo kupena. Voti, ‘Nhai vedu! Ko chii chanonotsa ngoro yake kudai? Sei kuriridza kwengoro dzake dzehondo kusati kwonzwika?’ ”" 
Judges5:29 Vakadzi vokumbahuru voungwaru ndokuvadzikamisa mwoyo vovataurira zvavaingofungawo izvozvo voti," 
Judges5:30 “Pamwe vari kutounganidza zvavo nokugovana zvavapamba, munhu achitopiwa zvake mukadzi kana vaviri, izvozvi pamwe Sisera atowana machira ane manyerekete, machira okudhaya ana mavara mavara akanyatsorukirwa. Kana iniwo ndichatoigirwa mavhoiri maviri omuhuro.”" 
Judges5:31 Saizvozvo Tenzi vavengi venyu vose ngavaparare. Asi vanokudai vaite sezuva rinobuda rine simba. Nyika yakava norunyararo makumi mana amakore. 
Judges6:1 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi, Tenzi akabva avaisa mumaoko avaMidhiani kwamakore monomwe." 
Judges6:2 VaMidhiani vaibata vaIsiraeri zvechisimba. Pamusana pavaMidhiani ivavo, vaIsiraeri vakazvigadzirira pokugara mumakomo, nomumapako, napane dzimwe nzvimbo dzokuzvidzivirira." 
Judges6:3 Kwaiti kana vaIsiraeri vakadyara mbeu dzavo vaMidhiani navaAmareki namamwewo marudzi okumabvazuva vaiuya kuzovarwisa. 
Judges6:4 Vaisvikodzika matendhe avo pedyo navo, voparadza zvirimwa zvavo muminda kusvikira kuGaza. Havaisiya kana chokubata muIsiraeri. Vaituta zvose hwai nemombe namadhongi." 
Judges6:5 Chaiitika ndechokuti vaiuya vaine zvipfuwo zvavo namatendhe vakawanda semhashu, vanhu nengamera dzavo zvisingaverengeki. Vaiti kana vauya vaisiya nyika yaparara." 
Judges6:6 VaIsiraeri vaisara vangovawo vanhu zvavo, vasisina chokubata pamusana pevaMidhiani. VaIsiraeri vakachema kuna Tenzi kuti avanunure." 
Judges6:7 VaIsiraeri pavakachema kuna Tenzi pamusana pavaMidhiani," 
Judges6:8 Tenzi akavatumira muporofita akati, “Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri, ‘Ndakakuburitsai kuIjipiti, ndichikununurai muuranda." 
Judges6:9 Ndakakununurai mumaoko avaIjipiti nomumaoko avose vaikubatai uranda. Ndakafanokudzingirai vanhu ivavo ndikakupai nyika yavo.’ 
Judges6:10 Ndakakutaurirai kuti, ‘Ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu. Musambonamata vamwari vavaAmori vane nyika yamugere, asi imi hamuna kunditerera.’ ”" 
Judges6:11 Mutumwa waTenzi akauya akagara pasi pomuoku wokuOfura wokwaJoashi muAbhieziri. Ipapo Gidheoni mwanakomana wake aingunopurira koroni muchisviniro chewaini achiihwandisa kuvaMidhiani. 
Judges6:12 Mutumwa waTenzi akazviratidza kuna Gidheoni ndokuti, “Tenzi anewe, iyewe mvumba chaiyo yokurwa.”" 
Judges6:13 Gidheoni akati kwaari, “Changamire, ko izvi zvose zvaizoitika sei kana Tenzi ainesu? Ko zvinhu zviya zvose zvinoshamisa zviri kupi zvatairondedzerwa namadzibaba edu kuti ndizvo zvaiitwa naTenzi maburutsiro aakavaita kuIjipiti? Asi iye zvino Tenzi akatirasa akatiti chi-i mumaoko evaMidhiani.”" 
Judges6:14 Tenzi akamucheuka akamuti, “Enda nesimba irori raunaro ununure vaIsiraeri mumaoko avaMidhiani. Ndini ndiri kukutuma.”" 
Judges6:15 Akati kwaari, “Changamire, ndinganunure sei vaIsiraeri? Mudzinza rokwaManase, mhuri yedu ndiyo duku duku uye mumba medu ndinongova munhuwo zvangu.”" 
Judges6:16 Tenzi ndokuti, “Pamusana pokuti ndinenge ndinewe uchauraya vaMidhiani sokunge uri kuuraya munhu mumwechete.”" 
Judges6:17 Akati kwaari, “Kana muchindida ndapota ndiitireiwo chokuratidza kuti imi pachenyu ndimi muri kutaura neni." 
Judges6:18 Ndapota imboregai kuenda kusvikira ndadzoka ndakuigirai mupiro wangu, ndauturira kwamuri.” Iye akati, “Ndinokumirira kusvikira wadzoka.”" 
Judges6:19 Gidheoni akapinda mumba make akauraya mbudzana akaibika akatora upfu hwekoroni hwairema makirogiramu gumi akabika chingwa chisina mbiriso. Akaisa nyama yacho mutswanda, akaisa muto wayo mupoto. Akaenda nazvo kumunhu uya pasi pomuoku akasvikomuturira." 
Judges6:20 Mutumwa waMwari ndokuti, “Tora nyama iyo nechingwa chisina mbiriso icho uzviise padombo iri, udire muto pamusoro pazvo.” Iye akaita saizvozvo." 
Judges6:21 Mutumwa waTenzi akasveerera mhuro yakanga iri muruoko rwake akagunzva nyama iya nechingwa chisina mbiriso ndokubva moto wanganduka uchibva mudombo, ukaroromesa nyama iya nechingwa. Mutumwa waTenzi ndokunyangarika." 
Judges6:22 Gidheoni ndokubva aziva kuti mutumwa waTenzi. Ndokukanuka achiti, “Hezvo hezvo! Nhai Tenzi Mwari, zvandaonanazve nomutumwa waTenzi uso nouso.”" 
Judges6:23 Asi Tenzi akati kwaari, “Rugare ngaruve newe, usatye, haufi.”" 
Judges6:24 Gidheoni akavakira Tenzi atari ipapo akaitumidza zita rokuti “Tenzi ndiye rugare.” Ichiriko nanhasi kuOfura, dunhu raAbhieziri." 
Judges6:25 Usiku ihwohwo Tenzi akamuti, “Tora handira yababa wako yechipiri ine makore manomwe. Pwanya atari yaBhaari, yababa wako, utemeteme chitanda chinomiririra Ashera, chiri pedyo nayo," 
Judges6:26 uvakire Tenzi Mwari wako atari pamusoro penzvimbo iyi yokuzvidzivirira muhondo iri pano, matombo ayo anyatsorongwa. Unofanira kutora handira iyoyo yechipiri woita mupiro wokupisa, uupise nomoto wehuni dzechitanda chiya chinomiririra Ashera chaunenge watema-tema.”" 
Judges6:27 Gidheoni akatora varanda vake gumi mukati mevaranda vake, akaita sezvaakanga audzwa naTenzi. Asi pamusana pokuti aitya vemhuri yake navanhu vaigara mugutamo haana kuzviita masikati, akazviita nousiku." 
Judges6:28 Varume vemuguta vakamuka, mangwanani wanei atari yaBhaari yapwanyiwa, chitanda chinomiririra Ashera chatemwa-temwa, handira yechipiri yapirwa paatari itsva yakanga yavakwapo." 
Judges6:29 Vakabvunza vachiti, “Chaizvoizvo ndiani aita izvi?” Vakabvunzisisa vachitsvagurudza vakazoti, “NdiGidheoni mwanakomana waJoashi akaita izvi.”" 
Judges6:30 Varume vemuguta imomo vakati kuna Joashi, “Uya nomwanakomana wako timuuraye nokuti ndiye akapwanya atari yaBhaari, akatema-tema Ashera aiva pedyo nayo.”" 
Judges6:31 Asi Joashi akabvunza mhomho yakanga yakamukomba achiti, “Heya mafunga kurwira Bhaari nhai, kana kuti motoda zvenyu kumununura? Anenge achirwira Bhaari ngaaurayiwe mangwana kusati kwaedza. Kana Bhaari ari mwari regai azvirwire pachake nokuti atari yake yakapwanywa.”" 
Judges6:32 Naizvozvo musi iwoyo Gidheoni akatumidzwa zita rokuti Jerubhaari zvinoreva kuti, “Regai Bhaari arwisane naye” nokuti akapwanya atari yake." 
Judges6:33 VaMidhiani vose nevaAmareki navanhu vokumabvazuva vakaunganidzana vakayambuka Jorodhani vakandodzika matendhe avo mubani reJezireeri. 
Judges6:34 Mweya waTenzi wakazadza Gidheoni, akaridza hwamanda, vaAbhiezeri vakaunganidzana vomutevera." 
Judges6:35 Akatumira nhume munyika yose yokwaManase, ivowo vakaunganidzana vakamutevera. Akatumirawo nhume kune vedzinza rokwaAsheri neraZebhuruni neraNafutari vakakwira kuzosangana navo." 
Judges6:36 Gidheoni akataura naMwari achiti, “Kana imi muchida kundishandisa kununura vaIsiraeri sokutaura kwamakaita," 
Judges6:37 zvino ndavakuisa mhombwa yewuru paburiro apa, kana dova rikava pawuru chete, pamwe pose, pasi pachingova pakaoma ndopandichaziva kuti muri kuda kundishandisa kununura vaIsiraeri, sezvamakareva.”" 
Judges6:38 Zvakabva zvaita saizvozvo. Mangwana acho akamuka rungwanangwana, akasvina dova muwuru iya rikazadza ndiro yemvura." 
Judges6:39 Gidheoni akatetererazve Mwari achiti, “Ndapota regai zvenyu kundishatirirwa ndigotaurawo kamwechete kano. Regai ndiedze zvakare nemhombwa yewuru kamwechete. Ndinokumbira kuti wuru iyi ive ndiyo yakaoma, pamwe pose pasi pave nedova.”" 
Judges6:40 Mwari akabva aita saizvozvo usiku ihwohwo. Pawuru chete ndopakanga pakaoma, asi pamwe pose, pasi paine dova." 
Judges7:1 Jerubhaari, iye Gidheoni, navanhu vose vaaiva navo vakamuka rungwanangwana vakandodzika matendhe pedyo nechisipiti cheHarodhi. Matendhe evaMidhiani aiva ari nechokuchamhembe kwavo, mubani, pedyo nechikomo cheMore." 
Judges7:2 Tenzi akataurira Gidheoni achiti, “Vanhu vaunavo vakawandisa kuti ndiise vaMidhiani mumaoko enyu nokuti vaIsiraeri vangazozvizuwidza vachiti, ‘Takazvinunura nesimba redu isu pachedu.’" 
Judges7:3 Naizvozvo chiudza vanhu vachizvinzwira nenzeve dzavo uchiti, ‘Anenge achidedera nokutya, ngaadzokere zvake kumusha.’ ” Gidheoni akavaedza; varume vaisvika makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zviviri vakadzokera, kukasara zviuru gumi zvavarume." 
Judges7:4 Tenzi akataurira Gidheoni zvakare achiti, “Vanhu ava vakawandisa nazvino wese. Enda navo kumvura, ndikuudze waungasarudze. Wandinenge ndati ngaaende newe, ndiye achaenda newe. Wandinengewo ndati haaende newe, ngaarege kuenda newe.”" 
Judges7:5 Saka Gidheoni akaenda nevanhu ivavo kumvura. Tenzi ndokuti kuna Gidheoni, “Vanhu vanenge vachinwa mvura vachiita zvokukasva sembwa vaise pavo voga, uisewo pavo vanenge vachiinwa vakapfugama.”" 
Judges7:6 Mazana matatu avarume vakaita zvokuikasva namaoko avo, asi vamwe vose vakapfugama pakunwa mvura iyoyo." 
Judges7:7 Tenzi akati kuna Gidheoni, “Namazana matatu avarume vaita zvokukasva mvura, ndichakununurai, ndigoisa vaMidhiani mumaoko enyu. Rega vamwe vose vaende mumwe nomumwe kumusha kwake.”" 
Judges7:8 Saka Gidheoni akadzosera vamwe vaIsiraeri vose kumatendhe avo, kusiya mazana matatu aya. Akatora mbuva nehwamanda dzavamwe vaya. Matendhe evaMidhiani akanga ari nechenyasi mubani." 
Judges7:9 Usiku hwakarehwo Tenzi akamuti, “Simuka uende kumatendhe avo nokuti ndaaisa mumaoko ako." 
Judges7:10 Kana uchitya kudzikako, chiperekedzanai nomuranda wako Pura," 
Judges7:11 mundonzwa zvavari kutaura, unobva wasimba mwoyo, wozodzika kundorwisa hondo yavo.” Saka iye nomuranda wake Pura vakaenda kumapeto kwamatendhe kwaiva navarume vehondo." 
Judges7:12 VaMidhiani nevaAmareki navanhu vose vokumabvazuva vakanga vagara vachitevedzana nebani iroro vakaita semhashu kuwanda. Ngamera dzavo dzakanga dzisingaverengeki dzakangoita sejecha repamahombekombe pegungwa. 
Judges7:13 Gidheoni paakasvikako, mumwe murume akanga achirondedzera mumwe wake hope dzake achiti, “Mufungeka ndarota hope. Ndarota ndichiona chingwa chebhari chauya kumatendhe avaMidhiani chichiita zvokukunguruka. Chasvikorova rimwe tendhe rikati pasi bvu-u.”" 
Judges7:14 Mumwe wake ndokuti, “Hakuna chimwe. Ibakatwa raGidheoni mwanakomana waJoashi muIsiraeri. Tenzi atoisa vaMidhiani nehondo yavo yose mumaoko ake.”" 
Judges7:15 Gidheoni paakanzwa hope idzi nokududzirwa kwadzo akapfugama akanamata. Akadzokera kumatendhe avaIsiraeri akati, “Handei nokuti Tenzi atoisa hondo yavaMidhiani mumaoko enyu.”" 
Judges7:16 Akaisa mazana matatu aya avarume muzvikwata zvitatu. Akapa munhu wose hwamanda, nechirongo chisina chinhu, nemwenje muzvirongo." 
Judges7:17 Akavati, “Monyatsonditarisa mutevedzere zvandinoita. Kana ndasvika kumucheto wamatendhe, zvandinenge ndaita, imi moitawo saizvozvo." 
Judges7:18 Mukanzwa ini navandinenge ndinavo taridza hwamanda, imi mobva maridzawo hwamanda, mativi ose akakomberedza tendhe, muzhambe muchiti, ‘Hondo yaTenzi, hondo yaGidheoni.’ ”" 
Judges7:19 Gidheoni navarume zana vaaiva navo, vakasvika kumucheto wamatendhe avo nguva yomurira kamwe vaMidhiani vachangobva mukutsinhana kugaririra. Vana Gidheoni vakaridza hwamanda vakabwadura-bwadura zvirongo zvavakanga vakatakura." 
Judges7:20 Vezvikwata zvitatu zviya vakaridza hwamanda, vakabwadura-bwadura zvirongo zviya. Kuruboshwe vainge vakabata mwenje, kurudyi vakabata hwamanda dzokuridza. Vakazhamba vachiti, “Hondo yaTenzi, hondo yaGidheoni!”" 
Judges7:21 Munhu wose akamira panzvimbo yake vakatenderedza matendhe iwayo. Hondo yavaMidhiani ndokuti ware kutiza ichiridza mhere. 
Judges7:22 Pavakaridza mazana matatu ehwamanda, Tenzi akaita kuti vaMidhiani vabayane pachavo nokurwisawo hondo yose. Hondo yavo yakatiza kusvikira kuBhetishita yakananga kuZerera kudzamara kumuganho weAbherimehora pedyo neTabhati." 
Judges7:23 Kwakadaidzwa vaIsiraeri varume vedzinza rokwaNafutari neraAsheri navose vedzinza raManase vakadzingirira vaMidhiani. 
Judges7:24 Gidheoni akatuma nhumwa kunyika yaEfuraimu yamakomo neshoko rokuti, “Uyai muzochingudzira vaMidhiani, mufanovadzivirira pose pokuyambuka napo Jorodhani kusvikira kuBhetibhara.” Saka varume vose vokwaEfuraimu vakakokorodzwa vakafanodzivirira pokuyambuka napo Jorodhani kusvikira kuBhetibhara." 
Judges7:25 Vakabata vatungamiriri vaviri vechiMidhiani vanoti, Orebhu naZeebhu. Vakaurayira Orebhu paruware, Zeebhu akaurayirwawo kuchisviniro chewaini chokwaZeebhu, pavaidzingirira vaMidhiani. Vakauya nomusoro waOrebhu newaZeebhu kuna Gidheoni kumhiri kwaJorodhani." 
Judges8:1 Varume vokwaEfuraimu vakamubvunza kuti, “Ndochii ichochi chawatiitira ichi? Kuenda here chokwadi kundorwa navaMidhiani usina zvako kana kutidaidzawo?” Vakamupopotera vakagumbuka kwazvo." 
Judges8:2 Iye akavati, “Chiiko zvino chandaita chingaenzaniswe nezvamakaita imi? Ko magirepisi amanofuhwa imi vokwaEfuraimu haasiri mazhinji here pane atinokohwa isu vokwaAbhiezeri?" 
Judges8:3 Mwari akaisa mumaoko enyu vatungamiriri vevaMidhiani vanaOrebhu naZeebhu. Zvino chiiwo chandakaita chingabangoenzaniswa nezvamakaita, imi?” Ipapo kumugumbukira kwavakanga vakaita kwakabva kwapera paakavataurira izvozvi." 
Judges8:4 Kunyange Gidheoni navarume mazana matatu vaya, vakanga vaneta, vakasvika kuna Jorodhani vakayambuka vachingovadzingirira chete." 
Judges8:5 Paakasvika kuSukoti akakumbira vanhu veko achiti, “Ndapota ndipireiwo vanhu vandinavo zvingwa nokuti vave nenzara. Ndiri pakuronda Zebha naZarimuna, madzimambo evaMidhiani.”" 
Judges8:6 Vakuru vakuru vomuSukoti vakati, “Ko ivo vana Zebha naZarimuna vacho wati wavabata here zvaunoti tipe hondo yako iyi chokudya?”" 
Judges8:7 Gidheoni ndokuti, “Zvakanaka, kana Tenzi angoisa Zebha naZarimuna mumaoko angu, ndichakupurai neminzwa yomurenje norukato.”" 
Judges8:8 Akabva ipapo akaenda kuPenueri akavakumbira zvimwechetezvo. Varume vokuPenueri vakamupindurawo zvimwechetezvo zvakapindurwa navarume vokuSukoti. 
Judges8:9 Akataurira varume vomuPenueri achiti, “Kana ndadzoka zvakanaka, ndichakoromora shongwe iyi.”" 
Judges8:10 Izvozvo Zebha naZarimuna vakanga vava muKarikori navarwi vavo vehondo yavarume vainge zviuru gumi nezvishanu. Ndovose vakanga vasara pavarwi vehondo vokumabvazuva nokuti kwakanga kwafa varume varwi vehondo zana namakumi maviri ezviuru. 
Judges8:11 Gidheoni akakwira nenzira yavanogara mumatendhe kumabvazuva kweNobha neJogibheha, akabva afuta hondo iyoyo oirwisa nokuti hondo iyoyo yakanga yavarayirwa." 
Judges8:12 Zebha naZarimuna vakagoti gumbo ndibereke. Iye akadzingirirana navo ndokubata madzimambo maviri evaMidhiani vanaZebha naZarimuna. Akaitisa hondo yose yevaMidhiani chimwandamwanda. 
Judges8:13 Gidheoni mwana waJoashi akadzoka kundorwa kumakata okuHeresi. 
Judges8:14 Akabata rimwe jaya rokuSukoti ndokuribvunzisisa. Rakamunyorera mazita amachinda neavakuru vakuru vomuSukoti anosvika makumi manomwe namanomwe avarume. 
Judges8:15 Gidheoni akasvika kuvarume vaya vomuSukoti akati, “Chionaika kuti Zebha naZarimuna vamakambondidadira muchiti, ‘Ko iye Zebha naZarimuna wacho wati wavabata here zvaunoti tipe varwi vako vafa nenzara chokudya?’ ”" 
Judges8:16 Akabata vakuru vakuru veguta reSukoti akavarova norukato neminzwa achiitira kuti vanhu vemuSukoti vawane chidzidzo pavari. 
Judges8:17 Akandoputsa shongwe yePenueri ndokuuraya varume vomuguta iroro. 
Judges8:18 Gidheoni akabvunza Zebha naZarimuna kuti, “Varume vamakauraya kuTabhori vakanga vakaita sei?” Ivo vakati, “Vakanga vakaita semi, vose vachinge vanakomana vamambo chaivo.”" 
Judges8:19 Akati, “Vakoma navanun'una vangu, vomumba chaivo. Ndinopika naTenzi mupenyu kuti dai makavarega vari vapenyu handaikuurayai.”" 
Judges8:20 Ipapo akati kuna Jeteri dangwe rake, “Simuka uvauraye.” Asi mukomana uyu haana kuvaburitsira bakatwa rake muhara, aitya nokuti akanga achiri muduku." 
Judges8:21 Zebha naZarimuna vakati, “Simukai mutiuraye iyemi pachenyu nokuti ndimi mabve zano, mune simba.” Gidheoni akasimuka ndokuuraya Zebha naZarimuna, ndokubva atora nyembe dzaiva muhuro mengamera dzavo." 
Judges8:22 Varume veIsiraeri vakataurira Gidheoni vachiti, “Zvamakatinunura mumaoko avaMidhiani dai mukachiva zvenyu mutongi wedu iyemi muchiteverwa nomwanakomana wenyu kwozouya muzukuru wenyu mukomana.”" 
Judges8:23 Asi Gidheoni akavati, “Ini handisi kuzova mutongi wenyu, mwanakomana wangu haasi kuzovawo mutongi wenyu, asi Tenzi ndiye achava mutongi wenyu.”" 
Judges8:24 Gidheoni akatiwo kwavari, “Chinhu chimwechete chandinokukumbirai ndechokuti mumwe nomumwe wenyu ngaandipe mhete dzomunzeve dziri muzvinhu zvaakapamba.” Akadaro nokuti vaiva nemhete dzendarama dzomunzeve, zvavakanga vari vechiIshimaeri." 
Judges8:25 Ivo vakati, “Zvokukupai, tinokupai zvedu.” Vakawaridza jira murume woga woga ndokubva atora mhete muzvinhu zvaakapamba, achikandapo." 
Judges8:26 Uremo hwemhete dzendarama dzaakanga avakumbira dziya hwakaita chiuru chimwechete chamashekeri endarama namazana manomwe awo, tisingaverengei zvedu nyembe namakoza nehanzu dzeruvara rwehute dzaipfekwa namadzimambo evaMidhiani uye ngetani dzaiva mumitsipa yengamera dzavo." 
Judges8:27 Gidheoni akagadzira nazvo hanzu yeefodhi akandoiisa muguta rake reOfura. VaIsiraeri vose vakaita unzenza hwokuinamata ikoko ikabva yava chinhu chakateya Gidheoni nemhuri yake. 
Judges8:28 Naizvozvo vaMidhiani vakakurirwa navaIsiraeri, havana kana kuzombosimudza musoro. Panguva yaGidheoni, nyika yakava norunyararo kwamakumi mana amakore." 
Judges8:29 Jerubhaari mwanakomana waJoashi akandogara kumusha kwake. 
Judges8:30 Zvino Gidheoni uyu aiva navana vakomana makumi manomwe vake vokubereka nokuti aiva navakadzi vazhinji. 
Judges8:31 Murongo wake aigara kuShikemu akamuberekerawo mwana mukomana. Iye akamutumidza zita rokuti Abhimereki. 
Judges8:32 Gidheoni mwanakomana waJoashi akazofawo anyatsokwegura, akavigwa muguva rababa vake kuOfura ravaAbhiezeri." 
Judges8:33 Zvakazoitika kuti Gidheoni paakangofa vaIsiraeri vakapanduka vakaita unzenza hwokunamata vanaBhaari. Vakazvigadzirira Bhaaribheriti kuti ave mwari wavo. 
Judges8:34 VaIsiraeri vakakanganwa Tenzi, Mwari wavo akanga avanunura mumaoko avavengi vavo vakanga vakavakomberedza." 
Judges8:35 Havana zvakare kana kumboita hanya nevemhuri yaJerubhaari, (Gidheoni uya uya) maererano nezvakanaka zvose zvaakaitira vaIsiraeri." 
Judges9:1 Abhimereki mwanakomana waJerubhaari akaenda kuShikemu kwanasekuru vake, hanzvadzi dzaamai vake akataurirana navo pamwechete nehama dzose dzokwaamai vake achiti," 
Judges9:2 “Mubvunzo uyu usvitsei munzeve dzavanhu vose vomuShikemu wokuti, ‘Chiiko chamunosarudza pane izvi? Mungade here kuti makumi manomwe avanakomana vaJerubhaari ndivo vova vatongi venyu kana kuti munhu mumwechete chete ave mutongi wenyu? Zivaiwo kuti imi neni tiri hama nehama, tiri veropa rimwechete chairo.’ ”" 
Judges9:3 Madzisekuru ake okwaamai vake vakasuma zvose izvozvi kuvatungamiriri vose vokuShikemu. Vakasarudza kutungamirirwa naAbhimereki nokuti vaiti, “Muzukuru wavo.”" 
Judges9:4 Vakatora zvidimbu makumi manomwe zvemari yesirivha mutemberi yaBhaaribheriti, vakapa Abhimereki, nemari iyoyo akatsvaga madzenga avanhu asingakatari aakaenda nawo." 
Judges9:5 Akaenda kumusha kwababa vake kuOfura, akauraya vakoma navanun'una wake makumi manomwe, padombo rimwechete. Asi Jotamu, gotwe raJerubhaari ndiye oga akapunyuka nokuti akanga ahwanda." 
Judges9:6 Varume vokuShikemu vakaunganidzana nevokuBhetimiro, vakagadza Abhimereki umambo pamuoku wokuShikemu wakatsigirwa." 
Judges9:7 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzaJotamu, iye akaenda akandokwira pamusoro pegomo reGerizimu, akataura kwavari achiita zvokudaidzira kwazvo achiti, “Varume veShikemu, teererai munzwe zvandava kutaura kuti Mwari agokunzwaiwo." 
Judges9:8 Rimwe zuva miti yakaenda kundogadza mambo wokuitonga. Yakati kumuti womuorivhi, ‘Iva mambo wedu.’" 
Judges9:9 Asi muorivhi wakati kwairi, ‘Heya munoti ndisiye mafuta angu anoshandiswa kupa rukudzo vamwari namadzimambo ndichienda kundosweropepera pamusoro pemiti here?’" 
Judges9:10 Miti iya ndokuti kumuonde, ‘Uya zvako uve mambo wedu.’" 
Judges9:11 Asi muonde wakati kwairi, ‘Heya munoti ndisiye kutapira kwangu nemichero yangu iyi yakanaka kudai ndichienda kundosweropepera pamusoro pemiti here?’" 
Judges9:12 Miti yakati kumugirepisi, ‘Uya zvako uve mambo wedu.’" 
Judges9:13 Asi mugirepisi wakati, ‘Heya munoti ndisiye waini yangu inofadza vamwari navanhu, ndichienda kundosweropepera pamusoro pemiti here.’" 
Judges9:14 Miti yose yakazoti kurukato, ‘Uya zvako uve mambo wedu.’" 
Judges9:15 Rukato rwakati kwairi, ‘Kana zviri zvechokwadi kuti muri kuda kundigadza kuti ndive mambo wenyu, uyai mupotere mumumvuri wangu. Kana zvisizvo, moto ngaubve murukato uroromese miti yemisidhari yokuRebhanoni.’" 
Judges9:16 “Naizvozvo hameno kana zvokugadza Abhimereki umambo makazviita muchiti muri kuita zvakanaka, uye maifunga kuti muri kuita zvinhu kwazvo, zvimwe munofungawo kuti zvamakaitira Jerubhaari nemhuri yake zvinokodzerana nezvaakaita." 
Judges9:17 Chandinodariro ndechichi chokuti, baba vangu vakakurwirai, vakazvipinza munjodzi yokuti vaigona kufa, vakakununurai mumaoko avaMidhiani." 
Judges9:18 Asi nhasi uno iyemi ndimi mamukira imba yababa wangu, mukauraya vana vake, varume makumi manomwe padombo rimwechete, mukatora Abhimereki mwana waakabereka zvake nomuranda wake, mukamugadza kuti ave mambo wavanhu vomuShikemu nokuti muzukuru wenyu." 
Judges9:19 Zvino kana zvamaitira Jerubhaari nemhuri yake nhasi uno mazviita muri pachokwadi uye nomazvo, farai zvenyu mupemberere Abhimereki, iye ngaakufarireiwo kwazvo." 
Judges9:20 Asi kana zvisizvo moto ngaubve muna Abhimereki uroromese vanhu vomuShikemu nevomuBhetimiro. Moto ngaubvewo mune vanhu vemuShikemu nevomuBhetimiro uroromese Abhimereki.” 
Judges9:21 Jotamu akabva atiza ndokumhanya oenda kuBheeri. Akagarako nokuti aitya Abhimereki mukoma wake. 
Judges9:22 Abhimereki akatonga vaIsiraeri kwamakore matatu. 
Judges9:23 Mwari akapinza mweya usina kunaka pakati paAbhimereki navanhu vomuShikemu ndokubva vanhu vomuShikemu ivava vapandukira Abhimereki. 
Judges9:24 Mwari akaitira izvozvi kuti mhosva youtsinye hwakaitwa naAbhimereki hwokuuraya vakoma navanun'una vake, vanakomana vaJerubhaari makumi manomwe, iripwe, ropa ripfukire iye Abhimereki navanhu veShikemu vakamutsigira kuuraya vakoma navanun'una vake." 
Judges9:25 Varume vokuShikemu vakaisa varume vokumuhwandira pamusoro pamakomo. Vaiita ugandanga hwokupamba zvinhu zvevaipfuura neko, zvikagosvika munzeve dzaAbhimereki." 
Judges9:26 KuShikemu kwakazouyiwa naGaari mwanakomana waEbhedhi nehama dzake, vanhu vemo ndokuvimba naye." 
Judges9:27 Vakaenda kuminda vakatanha magirepisi muminda yavo yomugirepisi, vakaasvina. Vakaita mabiko ndokuenda mumba yamwari wavo, ndokudya nokunwa vachinyomba Abhimereki." 
Judges9:28 Gaari mwanakomana waEbhedhi akati, “Abhimereki chiiwo zvake? Naiyesuwo vanhu veShikemu tiri vanhu rudzii chaizvo zvatinozvirega tichingotongwa nomunhu uyu? Handiti Jerubhaari naZebhuri muchinda wake vaitoshandira Hamori baba vaShikemu. Zvino tinofanira kumushandira pamusana pei?" 
Judges9:29 Dai kuri kuti ndini ndaitwa mutungamiriri wenyu, ndaibvisa Abhimereki pachigaro. Ndaiti kuna Abhimereki, ‘Kukuchana zvako nehondo yako yose, uuye tionane.’ ”" 
Judges9:30 Zebhuri mutungamiriri weShikemu paakanzwa zvakanga zvataurwa naGaari mwanakomana waEbhedhi akatutuma nehasha. 
Judges9:31 Akatumira nhume kuna Abhimereki kuAruma muchiverevere achiti, “Hevo, kuno kuShikemu kwakauyiwa naGaari mwanakomana waEbhedhi nehama dzake varikuisa muvanhu veguta mweya wokukupandukirai." 
Judges9:32 Saka imi dai machiuya nousiku, iyemi navanhu venyu vamunavo, muzovahwandira musango." 
Judges9:33 Kana ava mangwanani, zuva robuda, mokurumidzawo kumuka, mobva mauya muguta. Kana Gaari navanhu vaanenge anavo vouya kuzokurwisai, moita zvamunokwanisa navo.”" 
Judges9:34 Abhimereki navanhu vose vaaiva navo vakasimuka nousiku vakandohwandira guta reShikemu vari muzvikwata zvina. 
Judges9:35 Gaari mwanakomana waEbhedhi akabuda akandomira kusuo guru reguta iri. Abhimereki navanhu vaaiva navo vachibva vabuda pavakanga vakahwanda. 
Judges9:36 Gaari paakavaona akati kuna Zebhuri, “Tarisai muone! Vanhu avo vari kuburuka pamusoro pamakomo avo.” Zebhuri ndokumuti, “A-a, muchidaro! Haisi mimvuri zvayo yamakomo yamuri kuona muchiti vanhu?”" 
Judges9:37 Asi Gaari akatizve, “Tarisai muone! Vanhu avo vari kubva parukuvhute chaipo rwenyika. Chimwe chikwata chiri kubva kumuti wemuoku panofemberwa.”" 
Judges9:38 Ipapo Zebhuri akati kwaari, “Zvino wava kupi? Hausiwe here wokumbotaura muromo wokuti, ‘Abhimereki chii zvake, zvatinozvirega tichitongwa nomunhu uyu? Havasivo here vanhu vawaishora ivava? Chiendaka zvino uvarwise.’ ”" 
Judges9:39 Gaari akatungamirira varume veShikemu akandorwisa Abhimereki. 
Judges9:40 Abhimereki akavadzingirira Gaari akamutiza, vazhinji vakakuvadzwa kusvikira kusuo guru reguta iri." 
Judges9:41 Abhimereki akandogara kuAruma. Zvino Zebhuri akadzinga Gaari nehama dzake, vakasazokwanisa kugaramo." 
Judges9:42 Ramangwana racho vanhu vakaenda zvavo kuminda, Abhimereki ndokuzvinzwa." 
Judges9:43 Saka akatora vanhu vake, akavaisa muzvikwata zvitatu, ndokuvahwandira kuminda ikoko. Akatarisa akaona vanhu vachibuda muguta muya. Akavavinga akavauraya." 
Judges9:44 Abhimereki nechikwata chaaiva nacho, vakamhanyira kusuo guru reguta vakamirapo. Zvimwe zvikwata zviviri zviya zvakavinga vanhu vaiva muminda zvikavauraya." 
Judges9:45 Musi iwoyo Abhimereki akaswera achirwisa guta iroro, kusvikira arikurira, akauraya vanhu vaivamo. Akariparadza, akarimwaya munyu." 
Judges9:46 Vanhu vose vomushongwe yomuShikemu vakazvinzwa, vakapinda munhare mutemberi yaEribheriti." 
Judges9:47 Abhimereki paakanzwa kuti vomushongwe yomuShikemu vaunganidzana imomo," 
Judges9:48 iye navanhu vose vaakanga anavo vakakwira mugomo reZarimoni, akatora demo mumaoko akatema masanzu omutsvairo akaatakura pamapfudzi. Akaudza vaaiva navo kuti, “Chimbidzoitai zvamaona ndichiita.”" 
Judges9:49 Saka vanhu vake vose vakatemawo masanzu vakatevera Abhimereki vakaarongerera akakwamirana nenhare iyoyo, ndokutungidza moto pamusoro pavanhu vaiva mukati. Saka vanhu vose vomushongwe yomuShikemu vakafa, vanhurume navanhukadzi vaikarosvitsa chiuru chavanhu." 
Judges9:50 Abhimereki akavinga guta reTebhezi. Akakomba Tebhezi iri, akarikurira." 
Judges9:51 Asi muguta iri maiva neshongwe yakasimba kwazvo. Varume vose navakadzi navatungamiriri vose veguta iroro vakatizirako vakazvizaririramo vakabva vakwira kudenga reshongwe iyoyo. 
Judges9:52 Abhimereki akasvika pashongwe iyi akairwisa. Akaswedera pamusuo chaipo peshongwe iyi kuti aipise nomoto. 
Judges9:53 Mumwe mukadzi akapotsera huyo pamusoro waAbhimereki, ikamutekesha dehenya rake." 
Judges9:54 Akabva akurumidza kudaidza rimwe jaya raimutakurira zvombo zvake, akariti, “Buritsa bakatwa rako muhara undipfuudze, vanhu vangazonditi akaurayiwa nomukadzi.” Jaya rake riya rakamubaya akabva afa." 
Judges9:55 Varume vechiIsiraeri pavakaona kuti Abhimereki afa vakadzokera kumisha yavo. 
Judges9:56 Ndomatsiviro akaita Mwari Abhimereki mhosva yokutadzira baba vake, yokuuraya vakoma navanun'una vake." 
Judges9:57 Mwari akaitawo kuti vanhu vokuShikemu vapfukirwe nouipi hwavo hwose, kurengererwa rushambwa kwavakaitwa naJotamu mwanakomana waJerubhaari." 
Judges10:1 Shure kwaAbhimereki kwakazomukawo mumwe wokununura Isiraeri ainzi Tora mwana waPuwa, mwanakomona waDhodho wedzinza rokwaIsakari. Aigara kuShamiri munyika yamakomo yokwaEfuraimu." 
Judges10:2 Akatonga vaIsiraeri makumi maviri ana makore matatu, akazofa, akavigwa kuShamiri." 
Judges10:3 Mushure maTora makazomuka Jairi wokuGireadhi, akatonga vaIsiraeri kwamakumi maviri amakore ana makore maviri." 
Judges10:4 Akanga ane makumi matatu avana vakomana, vaitasva madhongi makumi matatu, vaine makumi matatu amaguta anonzi Havhotijairi nanhasi uno, ari munyika yeGireadhi." 
Judges10:5 Jairi akazofa akavigwa kuKamoni. 
Judges10:6 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakare zvisingadiwi naTenzi. Vakatangazve kunamata vanaBhaari naAshitaroti, vamwari vokuSiria, navamwari vokuSidhoni, navamwari vokuMoabhu, navamwari vevaAmoni, navamwari vavaFirisitia. Vakazvicheka ukama naTenzi." 
Judges10:7 Vakakanda pasi zvokumunamata. Tenzi akavirukira vaIsiraeri nehasha akabva avaisa mumaoko evaFirisitia nomumaoko evaAmoni. 
Judges10:8 Gore iroro, vakaonesa vaIsiraeri ndondo, vachivabata zvakaipa. Kwakapera makore gumi namasere vachibata zvakaipa kwazvo vaIsiraeri vokumhiri kwaJorodhani, kunyika yavaAmori, kuGireadhi." 
Judges10:9 VaAmoni vakayambukawo Jorodhani kundorwisa vedzinza rokwaJudha nerokwaBhenjamini nerokwaEfuraimu zvokuti vaIsiraeri vakapinda pfumvu isingatauriki. 
Judges10:10 VaIsiraeri vakachema kuna Tenzi vachiti, “Takakutadzirai nokuti takakufuratirai imi Mwari wedu tikandonamata vanaBhaari.”" 
Judges10:11 Tenzi akapindura vaIsiraeri achiti, “Handina kukununurai here kuvaIjipiti, nokuvaAmori nokuvaAmoni, nokuvaFirisitia?" 
Judges10:12 Makabatwa zvakaipa navaSidhoni navaAmareki navaMaoni, mukachema kwandiri ndikakununurai mumaoko avo." 
Judges10:13 Kunyange zvakadaro makandifuratira mukandonamata vamwe vamwari, saka handichakununurai zvakare." 
Judges10:14 Chiendaika zvenyu mundochemera vamwari vamakasarudza ivavo, vakununurei panguva yamunenge mava munhamo.”" 
Judges10:15 Asi vaIsiraeri vakati kuna Tenzi, “Takatadza isu! Itai zvenyu zvamunoda nesu. Tateterera, chatinongokumbira chete kuti mutinunurewo nhasi uno.”" 
Judges10:16 Saka vakabvisa pakati pavo vamwari vasingazikanwi, vakatangisa kunamata Tenzi, akabva atangawo kuva nehanya nenhamo dzavo." 
Judges10:17 VaAmoni vakaunganidzirana hondo, vakandodzika matendhe kuGireadhi. VaIsiraeri vakaunganidzanawo vakandodzika matendhe kuMizipa." 
Judges10:18 Vanhu, vatungamiriri vokuGireadhi, vechiIsiraeri, vakataurirana vachiti, “Ndiani angatange kurwisa vaAmoni? Ndiye achava mutungamiriri wavanhu, vose vokuGireadhi.”" 
Judges11:1 Zvino kwaiva naJefuta wokuGireadhi murume aiva mvumba chaiyo yokurwa, asi akanga ari mwana wepfambi, baba vake ari Gireadhi." 
Judges11:2 Gireadhi akabereka vamwe vana vakomana nomudzimai wake. Vana ivavo pavakanga vakura vakadzinga Jefuta vachimuti, “Panhaka yababa vedu, iwe hapana chako nokuti uri mwana womumwewo mukadzi.”" 
Judges11:3 Jefuta akatiza vakoma navanun'una vake akandogara kunyika yeTobhu. Akabatana namamwe madzenga akati unga unga kwaari kufamba naye vachipamba vanhu. 
Judges11:4 Kwati perei chinguva, Amoni akandorwisa vaIsiraeri." 
Judges11:5 Amoni paakarwisa vaIsiraeri kudaro vatungamiriri vokuGireadhi vakandotora Jefuta kunyika yeTobhu. 
Judges11:6 Vakati kuna Jefuta, “Uya uite mutungamiriri wedu tirwise vaAmoni.”" 
Judges11:7 Asi Jefuta akapindura vatungamiriri vokuGireadhi ava achiti, “Handiti imi makandivenga here, mukandidzinga mumusha mababa vangu? Nhasi mava mumatambudziko, mavakuuya kwandiri pamusana pei?”" 
Judges11:8 Vakuru vakuru veGireadhi vakamupindura vachiti, “He-ekaka ndokusaka tauya kwauri. Tati uende nesu kundorwisa vaAmoni somutungamiriri wavanhu vose vokuGireadhi.”" 
Judges11:9 Jefuta akapindurawo vakuru vakuru ava achiti, “Mukandidzorerazve kumusha kundorwisa vaAmoni, Tenzi akavaisa mumaoko angu ndichava mutongi wenyu.”" 
Judges11:10 Vakuru vakuru vokuGireadhi vakati kuna Jefuta, “Tenzi ngaave chapupu pakati pedu, tichaita zvawataura.”" 
Judges11:11 Jefuta akaenda navakuru vakuru vokuGireadhi ava. Vanhu vakamuita mutongi nomutungamiriri wavo Jefuta akadzokerera kutaura mashoko ake aya pana Tenzi kuMizipa. 
Judges11:12 Jefuta akatumira nhume kuna mambo wavaAmoni, achiti, “Chandakakutadzira chaicho chii kundivinga kudai kuzorwisa nyika yangu?”" 
Judges11:13 Mambo wevaAmoni akapindura nhume dzaJefuta dziya achiti, “Chikonzero ndechokuti vaIsiraeri pavaibva kuIjipiti, vakatora nyika yangu kubvira kuna Arinoni kusvikira kuna Jabhoku nokuna Jorodhani. Zvino idzore zvichakanaka.”" 
Judges11:14 Jefuta akatumira zvakare nhume kuna mambo wevaAmoni, akati kwaari," 
Judges11:15 “Zvanzi naJefuta, vaIsiraeri havana kutora nyika yavaMoabhu kana yavaAmoni. Kwete." 
Judges11:16 Asi vaIsiraeri pavakabva kuIjipiti, vakapfuura nokugungwa Dzvuku vakasvika kuKadheshi." 
Judges11:17 Ipapo vaIsiraeri vakatumira nhume kuna mambo weEdhomu vachiti, ‘Tapota, tibvumireiwo kupfuura nomunyika yenyu.’ Asi mambo weEdhomu haana kana kuda kumbozvinzwa. Vakaitawo saizvozvo kuna mambo weMoabhu asi akaramba. Naizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakaita zvokutombogara zvavo kuKadheshi." 
Judges11:18 Vakabva ipapo vakapfuura nomurenje vachiita zvokutopoterera nyika yeEdhomu neyeMoabhu vari nechokumabvazuva kweMoabhu, vakazodzika matendhe avo kumhiri kwaArinoni. Asi havana kupinda munyika yeMoabhu nokuti Arinoni ndorwaiva muganhu weMoabhu." 
Judges11:19 “VaIsiraeri vakazotuma nhume kuna Sihoni mambo wevaAmori, mambo weHeshibhoni. VaIsiraeri vakati kwaari, ‘Tibvumureiwo kupfuura nomunyika yenyu tichienda zvedu kunyika yedu.’" 
Judges11:20 Asi Sihoni haana kugutsikana nezvokuti vaIsiraeri vapfuure nomunyika yake. Naizvozvo Sihoni akaunganidza vanhu vake vose, vakandodzika matendhe avo kuJahazi, vakarwisa vaIsiraeri." 
Judges11:21 Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri akaisa Sihoni navanhu vake vose mumaoko avaIsiraeri vakabva vavakurira. Nokudaro vaIsiraeri vakatorera vaAmori vaigaramo nyika yavo yose." 
Judges11:22 Vakatorera vaAmori nyika yavo yose kubvira muna Arinoni kusvikira muna Jabhoku, uye kubvira kugwenga kusvikira muna Jorodhani." 
Judges11:23 “Naizvozvo Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri ndiye akatorera vaAmori nyika, achiipa vaIsiraeri. Zvino mavawo kuda kuvatorera here?" 
Judges11:24 Ko imimi, zvamunenge mapiwa namwari wenyu Kemoshi, hamutore here? Zvino nesuwo zvose zvatinenge tapiwa naTenzi, Mwari wedu, tinozvitora." 
Judges11:25 Munokunda Bharaki mwanakomana waZipori mambo weMoabhu here? Ko iye akambokakavadzana navaIsiraeri here, kana kurwisana navo muhondo?" 
Judges11:26 VaIsiraeri vakagara muHeshibhoni nemisha yaro, nomuAroero nemisha yaro, nomumaguta ose ari munyasi merwizi rwaArinoni, kwamazana matatu amakore. Nguva yose iyoyi makaregereiko kuatorazve?" 
Judges11:27 Naizvozvo hapana chandakakutadzirai. Ndimi mava kutonditadzira nokuita hondo neni. Tenzi ndiye Mutongi, ndiye achaenzanisa nhasi uno mhosva iri pakati pavaIsiraeri navaAmoni.”" 
Judges11:28 Asi mambo wavaAmoni haana kuita hanya neshoko raakanga atumirwa naJefuta. 
Judges11:29 Mweya waTenzi wakauya pana Jefuta, akapfuura nomuGireadhi nomaManase, ndokusvika kuMizipa muGireadhi. Akazovinga vaAmoni achibva kuMizipa kuGireadhi." 
Judges11:30 Jefuta akapika mhiko kuna Tenzi achiti, “Kana mukaisa vaAmoni mumaoko angu" 
Judges11:31 chinenge changotanga kubuda chete mumba mangu chichiuya kuzochingurana neni, pandinenge ndodzoka kuvaAmoni ndavakurira, chichava chaTenzi uye ndichachiita chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa.”" 
Judges11:32 Saka Jefuta akayambukira kundorwisa vaAmoni, Tenzi akavaisa mumaoko ake." 
Judges11:33 Akavakuya kubvira kuna Aroero kusvikira kunharaunda yokuMiniti zvichienda nokuAbherokeramimu akavauraya zvokuuraya zviya, mumaguta avo makumi maviri. VaAmoni vakabva vakurirwa navaIsiraeri." 
Judges11:34 Jefuta paakadzokera kumusha kwake kuMizipa mwanasikana wake akabuda kumuchingura achiridza hosho achidzana. Ndiye aingova mwana wake mumwechete, akanga asina kana mumwe mwana, mukomana kana musikana." 
Judges11:35 Achingomuona akabvarura hanzu dzake achiti, “Baba-iwe kani, mwanangu! Inga wandiparadza, wandipinza nhamo chaiyo nokuti ndakasimudza muromo kuita mhiko kuna Tenzi yandisingagoni kutyora.”" 
Judges11:36 Musikana uyu ndokuti, “Baba, kana makasimudza muromo wokupika mhiko kuna Tenzi, itai zvenyu kwandiri zvamakapika izvozvo nokuti Tenzi akakubatsirai kutsividza vavengi venyu vaAmoni.”" 
Judges11:37 Akakumbira baba wake kuti, “Asi chandinongokumbira ndechichi chokuti dai mukambondirega kwemwedzi miviri, ndimbofamba-famba zvangu mumakomo neshamwari dzangu, ndichichema kuti ndichafa ndiri mhandara kudai.”" 
Judges11:38 Baba vakati, “Enda zvako.” Vakamubvumidza kuenda kwemwedzi miviri. Iye neshamwari dzake vakaenda kumakomo kundochema kuti achafa ari mhandara." 
Judges11:39 Kuzoti mwedzi miviri iya yapera akadzokera kuna baba vake, vakabva vazadzikisa paari mhiko yavakanga vapika. Musikana uyu akanga asati aziva murume. Yakabva yava tsika yechiIsiraeri," 
Judges11:40 yokuti vasikana vechiIsiraeri vaienda gore negore kundochema vachirangarira mwanasikana waJefuta wokuGireadhi, kwamazuva mana pagore." 
Judges12:1 Vanhu vokwaEfuraimu vakaunganirana hondo, vakayambukira kuZafoni vakati kuna Jefuta, “Wakayambukireiko kundorwisa vaAmoni usina kutidaidza kuti tiende pamwechete newe? Tinoda kukupisira mumba mako nomoto.”" 
Judges12:2 Jefuta akati kwavari, “Ini navanhu vangu takava negakava redaka chairo navaAmoni. Ndakakudaidzaika imi, asi hamuna kuzondinunura mumaoko avo." 
Judges12:3 Pandakaona imi musina kuzondinunura, ndakangoti chauya chauya ndotozvionera chokuita, ndikayambukira vaAmoni, Tenzi akavaisa mumaoko angu. Zvino chamazouyira nhasi uno kuzondirwisa chii?”" 
Judges12:4 Jefuta akaunganidza vanhu vose vomuGireadhi akarwisana nevokwaEfuraimu akavarakasha nokuti vokwaEfuraimu vakanga vaburitsa muromo wokuti “Imi vaGireadhi muri vapanduki vakatobva zvavo kwaEfuraimu, vasokeri, makangoti bvochowo kugara pakati pevokwaEfuraimu nevokwaManase!”" 
Judges12:5 VokuGireadhi vakandomira kumazambuko aJorodhani okuenda kwaEfuraimu. Munhu wokwaEfuraimu ainge apunyuka muhondo akati, “Ndingayambukewo here?” Vanhu vokuGireadhi vaimuti, “Uri wedzinza rokwaEfuraimu here?” Kana aipindura achiti, “Kwete.”" 
Judges12:6 Ivo vaimuti iti, “Shibhoreti.” Iye aikanganisa kuritaura oti, “Sibhoreti” achitadza kuridudza, vaibva vamubata, vomuuraya pazambuko pakarepo. Zviuru makumi mana nezviviri zvekwaEfuraimu zvakaurayiwa nguva iyoyo." 
Judges12:7 Jefuta akatonga vaIsiraeri kwamakore matanhatu. Jefuta wokuGireadhi akazofawo ndokuvigwa muguta rake muGireadhi. 
Judges12:8 Mushure maJefuta, Ibhuzani wokuBheterehemu ndiye akatonga Isiraeri." 
Judges12:9 Akanga aina vana vakomana makumi matatu navana, vasikana makumi matatu. Akaroodza vanasikana vake kune vamwe vasiri vedzinza rake. Akaroorera vanakomana vake vakadzi makumi matatu vasiri vedzinza rake. Ibhuzani akatonga Isiraeri makore manomwe." 
Judges12:10 Ibhuzani akazofa akavigwa kuBheterehemu. 
Judges12:11 Mushure maIbhuzani, Eroni wokwaZebhuruni ndiye akatonga Isiraeri kwegumi ramakore." 
Judges12:12 Eroni wokwaZebhuruni akazofa, akavigwa kuAijaroni munyika yakwaZebhuruni." 
Judges12:13 Shure kwaEroni, Abhudhoni mwanakomana waHireri wokuPiratoni ndiye akatonga Isiraeri." 
Judges12:14 Aiva navana vakomana makumi mana, navazukuru vechikomana makumi matatu vaitasva makumi manomwe amadhongi. Akatonga Isiraeri kwamakore masere." 
Judges12:15 Abhudhoni mwanakomana waHireri, wokuPiratoni, akazofa, akavigwa kuPiratoni kunyika yokwaEfuraimu, munyika yamakomo yavaAmareki." 
Judges13:1 VaIsiraeri vakaita zvakare zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi. Tenzi akavaisa mumaoko avaFirisitia kwamakore makumi mana. 
Judges13:2 Kwaiva nomumwewo murume ainzi Manoa wedzinza rokwaDhani aigara muguta reZora. Aiva momudzimai akanga asina mbereko, asina mwana." 
Judges13:3 Mutumwa waTenzi akazviratidza kwaari akati, “Chinzwa, iwe hauna mbereko, hauna mwana, asi uchazova napamuviri, ugobereka mwana mukomana." 
Judges13:4 Naizvozvo uchenjerere kuti usanwe waini kana doro, uregewo kudya chinhu chakan'ora," 
Judges13:5 nokuti uchava napamuviri, ugobereka mwana mukomana. Haafaniri kumbofa akaveurwa vhudzi rake, nokuti achava muNaziri waMwari kubvira pakuberekwa kwake. Achatanga kununura vaIsiraeri mumaoko avaFirisitia.”" 
Judges13:6 Mudzimai uyu akaenda akandotaurira murume wake achiti, “Munhu waMwari auya kwandiri. Uso hwake hwakafana nouso hwomutumwa waMwari, hunotyisa kwazvo. Handina kumubvunza kuti anobvepi naiyewo haana kundiudza zita rake." 
Judges13:7 Asi anditi, ‘Chinzwa, uchava napamuviri ugobereka mwana mukomana. Naizvozvo usanwe waini kana kunwa doro, uregewo kudya chinhu chakan'ora nokuti mukomana achava muNaziri waMwari kubvira pakuberekwa kwake kusvikira musi waanofa.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Manoa akanamata kuna Tenzi achiti, “Tenzi wangu, ndinokumbira kuti munhu waMwari uya wamatuma auyezve kwatiri, atidzidzise marerero atinofanira kuita mukomana iyeyo achaberekwa.”" 
Judges13:9 Mwari akanzwa chichemo chaManoa. Mutumwa waMwari akasvikazve kumukadzi uyu agere zvake mumunda. Asi murume wake Manoa akanga asipo. 
Judges13:10 Mudzimai uyu akamhanyira kundoudza murume wake achiti, “Imi we-e, munhu uya wokuuya kwandiri musi uya wazviratidzazve kwandiri.”" 
Judges13:11 Manoa akasimuka akatevera mudzimai wake. Paakasvika kumurume iyeyo akati, “Ndimi makambotaura nomudzimai uyu here?” Iye akati, “Ndini.”" 
Judges13:12 Manoa akati, “Zvino kana zvamakareva zvazoitika, mhiko yaanofanira kuchengeta nezvaanofanira kuita ndezvipiko?”" 
Judges13:13 Mutumwa waTenzi akati kuna Manoa, “Mudzimai iyeyu ngaangwarire kuita zvose zvandakamuudza." 
Judges13:14 Ngaarege kudya chinhu chipi zvacho chinobva pamuti womuvhaini. Ngaarege kunwa waini kana doro, kana kudya chinhu chakan'ora. Mudzimai iyeyu, ngaaite zvose zvandakamuudza.”" 
Judges13:15 Manoa akati kumutumwa waTenzi, “Dai mamboti mirei zvishoma ndikubayirei kambudzana.”" 
Judges13:16 Mutumwa waTenzi akati kuna Manoa, “Kana mukandimisa zvenyu, zvokudya zvenyu handisikuzodya. Asi kana zviri zvomupiro wokupisa, upirei kuna Tenzi.” (Manoa haana kunge aziva kuti mutumwa waTenzi.)" 
Judges13:17 Manoa akabvunza mutumwa waTenzi achiti, “Ko zita renyu ndiani, kuti tigozokukudzai kana zvamakataura zvazoitika?”" 
Judges13:18 Mutumwa waTenzi akati kwaari, “Chaunobvunzira zita rangu chii, ko zvariri zitazve rinoshamisa zvisingatauriki?”" 
Judges13:19 Manoa akatora mbudzana nomupiro wembesanwa akazvipira paruware kuna Tenzi anoita zvishamiso. Manoa nomudzimai wake vachingunotarisa kudaro," 
Judges13:20 murazvo womoto wepaatari wakakwira kudenga, mutumwa waTenzi ndokubva akwirawo nomurazvo womoto iwoyo. Vakabva vati pasi zvambarara." 
Judges13:21 Mutumwa waTenzi haana kuzozviratidzazve kuna Manoa nomudzimai wake. Ndipo pakabva paziva Manoa kuti mutumwa waTenzi. 
Judges13:22 Manoa akati kumudzimai wake, “Uku ndiko kufa chaiko kwatavakuita uku, pamusana pokuti taona Mwari.”" 
Judges13:23 Asi mudzimai wake akati kwaari, “Dai Tenzi anga achida kutiuraya, angadai asina kugamuchira mupiro wedu wokupisa newembesanwa wabva mumaoko edu, kana kutizivisa zvinhu zvose izvi zvaakatiudza.”" 
Judges13:24 Mudzimai wake akabereka mwana mukomana, akamutumidza zita rokuti Samusoni. Mukomana uyu akakura, Tenzi akamukomborera." 
Judges13:25 Mweya waTenzi wakatangisa kushanda maari, iye ari kuMahanedhani pakati peZora neShitaori." 
Judges14:1 Samusoni akaenda kuTimuna akaona mumwe musikana wechiFirisitia. 
Judges14:2 Akadzoka kuna baba naamai vake ava kuti, “Ndakaona mumwe musikana wechiFirisitia kuTimuna. Zvino ndiroorereiwo musikana iyeyo.”" 
Judges14:3 Asi baba naamai vake vakati kwaari, “Ko washaya mukadzi wokuroora here pakati pehama dzako kana kuti parudzi rwedu rwose zvowoda kundoroora mukadzi kuvanhu vasina kudzingiswa, vaFirisitia?” Asi Samusoni akati kuna baba wake, “Ndiroorerei iyeyo chete, ndiye wandada.”" 
Judges14:4 Baba naamai vake vakanga vasiri kuziva kuti Tenzi ndiye aimuitisa izvozvo kuti pazova nechimwe chinokonzera kuti vaFirisitia varwiswe. Izvozvo vaFirisitia ndovaitonga vaIsiraeri.
