Judges14:5 Samusoni akadzika kuTimuna pamwechete nababa naamai vake. Paakasvika kuminda yemigirepisi yokuTimuna, akavingwa neshumba ichirikuzvinzwa ichidzvova." 
Judges14:6 Mweya waTenzi wakauya paari nesimba guru kwazvo akabva atsemura shumba yacho napakati kunge munhu ari kutsemura mbudzana chaiyo. Asi akanga asina chimwe chinhu mumaoko. Haana kutaurira baba kana amai vake zvaakanga aita. 
Judges14:7 Samusoni akadzikako akandokurukurirana nomukadzi uya. Mukadzi uyu aidiwa naSamusoni. 
Judges14:8 Kwakati perei chinguva, Samusoni akadzokera ikoko kundotora mukadzi wake. Akambotsauka munzira achida kundoona chitunha cheshumba chiya wanei mukati meshumba iya mune bumha renyuchi nouchi." 
Judges14:9 Akahukwaturira muruoko rwake ndokupfuura nerwendo rwake, oenda zvake achihudya. Akasvika kuna baba naamai vake, akavapawo humwe, ndokubva vadya zvavo. Asi haana kuvaudza kuti hwabva muchitunha cheshumba." 
Judges14:10 Baba waSamusoni akadzikawo kumusha kwomuroora wavo. Samusoni akaita mabiko ikoko, setsika yaiitwa navakuwasha." 
Judges14:11 Veko pavakamuti bha kumuona, vakamupa vaperekedzi, varume makumi matatu." 
Judges14:12 Samusoni akati kwavari, “Regai ndikuitirei chirahwe changu, kana mukagona kundiudza zvachinoreva mumazuva manomwe aya amabiko, mukachidudzira, ini ndichakupai makumi matatu epesa dzamachira erineni namakumiwo matatu ehanzu dzapamabiko." 
Judges14:13 Asi mukatadza kuchirapanura imi ndimi muchandipa pesa dzamachira erineni makumi matatu namakumiwo matatu ehanzu dzapamabiko.” Vakamuti, “Tiitire chirahwe chako tinzwe.”" 
Judges14:14 Akavati, “Mune chinodya makabva chokudya, mune chine simba mukabva dapurahunanzva.” Mazuva matatu ose vakakoniwa kurapanura chirahwe chake." 
Judges14:15 Pazuva rechina vakati kumukadzi waSamusoni, “Nyengetedza murume vako, atiudze zvinoreva chirahwe ichi, nokuti tingatokupisai nomoto imi mose nemhuri yababa wako. Heya makatikoka kuno kuti muzotipinza urombo nhai?”" 
Judges14:16 Mukadzi waSamusoni akamuchemera achiti, “Unondivenga chete, haundidi. Wakaitira chirahwe vanhu vorudzi rwangu, asi hauna kundiudza zvachinoreva.” Samusoni ndokuti, “Chinzwaka! Baba wangu naamai vangu, handina kumbovataurira! Chandingazoudzirawo iwewe chii?”" 
Judges14:17 Mukadzi uyu akamuchemera kwamazuva manomwe mazuva ose amabiko avo. Kuzoti rava rechinomwe Samusoni akazomuudza nokuti mukadzi wake akangoramba ati naye nanga nanga, akabva andoudza vanhu vorudzi rwake zvachinoreva." 
Judges14:18 Zuva risati radoka pazuva rechinomwe iroro, vanhu vomuguta iri vakati kuna Samusoni, “Chii chinotapira kupinda uchi? Chii chine simba kupinda shumba?” Iyewo akavati, “Heede, dai musina kutorima netsiru rangu mungadai musina kuziva chirahwe changu.”" 
Judges14:19 Mweya waTenzi wakauya paari nesimba guru kwazvo. Akadzika kuAshikeroni akauraya makumi matatu avarume vomuguta iroro, akapamba zvinhu zvavo, akandopa hanzu dzamabiko kune vaya vakanga varapanura chirahwe chiya. Akagumbuka kwazvo, akadzokera kumusha kwababa vake." 
Judges14:20 Mukadzi waSamusoni akazova mukadzi womumwe wake, aiva muperekedzi wake." 
Judges15:1 Kwati perei chinguva, yave nguva yokukohwa koroni, Samusoni akaenda kundobvakachira mukadzi wake akamuigira mbudzana. Akasvikoti, “Ndava kudawo kuchipinda mumba nomukadzi wangu.” Asi vatezvara vake vakaramba." 
Judges15:2 Vakati, “Ndakatosvika pokunyatsofunga kuti, imi hamuchambomuda zvenyu, ndikabva ndamupa zvangu kune muperekedzi wenyu uya. Inga munun'una wake akatonaka kupinda mukoma wake wani. Dai matora zvenyu iyeyo pachinzvimbo chake.”" 
Judges15:3 Samusoni akati kwavari, “Kuwana chii zvacho chandinenge ndaita kumaFirisitia chokuvatsvata, rwendo runo mhosva haisi yangu.”" 
Judges15:4 Saka Samusoni akandobata makava mazana matatu, ndokuasunganidza miswe yawo ari maviri maviri. Pakati pemiswe miviri yawo yakanga yakasunganidzwa akaisa zhenje romoto." 
Judges15:5 Paakatungidza mazhenje omoto aya, akabva ati makava iwayo muminda yavaFirisitia isati yakohwiwa, sunde. Ndokupisa kwaakaita zvisote zvekoroni nembesanwa dzakanga dzakamira muminda, pamwechete neminda yemagirepisi neyemiorivhi." 
Judges15:6 VaFirisitia vakabvunzana vachiti, “Ndianiko aita izvi?” Zvikanzi, “NdiSamusoni, mukuwasha womuTimuna uya nokuti vatezvara vake vakatora mukadzi wake vakamupa kune mumwe aiva muperekedzi wake.” VaFirisitia vakaendako, vakapisa nomoto mukadzi iyeyo nababa wake." 
Judges15:7 Samusoni akavati, “Kana ariwo maitiro enyu aya chokwadi ndinotsidza kuti ndichatokutsividzai ndokuzoenda zvangu.”" 
Judges15:8 Akavauraya chaizvo gumi nefararira, ndokubva aenda kundogara mubako rokuEtamu." 
Judges15:9 VaFirisitia vakakwira vakandodzika matendhe avo munyika yaJudha. Vakabva vaita fararira kurwisa guta rose reRehi. 
Judges15:10 Varume vomudzinza raJudha vakabvunza kuti, “Chamavinga kuzotirwisira chii?” Ivo vakati, “Tauya kuzosunga Samusoni kuti timutsividze zvaakatiitira.”" 
Judges15:11 Varume zviuru zvitatu vedzinza rokwaJudha vakadzika kubako rokuEtamu vakandoti kuna Samusoni, “Hauzivi kuti vaFirisitia ndivo vanotitonga here? Zvino chii chawakatiparira ichi?” Iye akati, “Ndiri kuvatsividza zvavakandiitira.”" 
Judges15:12 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Tadzika kuno kuzokusunga kuti tikuise mumaoko evaFirisitia.” Samusoni akati kwavari, “Nditsidzirei kuti hamuzondiuraya imi pachenyu.”" 
Judges15:13 Ivo vakati, “Kwete, tichangokusunga chete tokuisa mumaoko avo, hatizokuuraya.” Vakamusunga netambo mbiri itsva, ndokumubvisa pabako apa." 
Judges15:14 Kuzoti asvika kuguta reRehi, vaFirisitia vakauya kuzomuchingura vachipemberera. Mweya waTenzi wakauya paari nesimba. Tambo dzakanga dzakasunga maoko ake dzakadambuka seshinda yefurakisi yatsva nomoto. Tambo dzakanga dzakamusunga ndokubva dzananauka kubva mumaoko ake." 
Judges15:15 Akawana rushaya rwedhongi rwakanga ruchakasimba, akarutora akauraya narwo chiuru chavarume." 
Judges15:16 Samusoni akati, “Norushaya rwedhongi ndakavaita matutu matutu norushaya rwedhongi ndakauraya chiuru chavanhu.”" 
Judges15:17 Paakapedza kutaura akakanda pasi rushaya rwedhongi rwuya. Nzvimbo iyoyo yakapiwa zita rokuti Ramatirehi. 
Judges15:18 Samusoni akanga afa chaizvo nenyota, akachema kuna Tenzi achiti, “Makasevenzesa ini muranda wenyu kuunza ruponeso urwu rukuru. Ndofa here zvangu nenyota ndichizova mumaoko avanhu vasina kudzingiswa?”" 
Judges15:19 Mwari ndokutsemura guvi raiva muRehi makaremo mvura ndokubudamo. Samusoni akamwa akabva anzwa pano moyo, simba rake rikabva radzoka. Zita rechisipiti ichocho rakabva ranzi Enihakore, chichiriko kuRehi nanhasi uno." 
Judges15:20 Samusoni akatonga vaIsiraeri munguva dzavaFirisitia kwamakore makumi maviri. 
Judges16:1 Zvino Samusoni akazoenda kuGaza kwaakaona pfambi akatadza nayo. 
Judges16:2 Vanhu vokuGaza vakaudzwa kuti “Samusoni akauya kuno.” Vakapoteredza paakanga ari, vakamugaririrawo pasuwo guru reguta. Vakaramba vakati mwiro usiku hwose, vachiti, “Ngatimumirirei kusvikira kwaedza, tozomuuraya.”" 
Judges16:3 Asi Samusoni akarara kusvikira pakati pousiku. Akazomuka pakati pousiku ipapo akadzura misuo miviri pamwechete namapango acho emumativi namazariro okuzaririsa, ndokuzvibipitira pamapfudzi oenda nazvo kugomo rakatarisana neHebhuroni." 
Judges16:4 Gare gare Samusoni akadanana nomumwe mukadzi ainzi Dheraira wokumanhika ekuSoreki. 
Judges16:5 Madzishe avaFirisitia akauya kwaari akati, “Munyengetedze uone panobva simba rake nenzira dzatingamukurire nadzo kuti timusunge tichizomukunda. Mumwe nomumwe wedu achakupa mari yesirivha inoita chiuru chimwechete nezana.”" 
Judges16:6 Dheraira akati kuna Samusoni, “Ndiudzeiwo kunobva simba renyu guru, nokusungwa kwamungaitwe kuti mukurirwe nomunhu.”" 
Judges16:7 Samusoni akamupindura achiti, “Kana vakandisunga netsembwe itsva dzouta nomwe, tambo dzichiri nyoro, ndichava munhu asina simba ndigoitawo sezvakangoitawo munhu wose wose.”" 
Judges16:8 Madzishe avaFirisitia vakamuunzira tsembwe dziya dzouta, tambo itsva nomwe dzichiri nyoro, iye akabva amusunga nadzo." 
Judges16:9 Izvozvo muimba yomukati ainge ane varume vakanga vakahwandira Samusoni. Akazoti kwaari, “Samusoni, hokoyo nevaFirisitia!” Asi Samusoni akadambura tsembwe dziya dzouta sokudambuka kunoita shinda yanzi vave nomoto. Saka kwaibva simba rake hakuna kuziikanwa." 
Judges16:10 Dheraira akati kuna Samusoni, “Uri kuzvionaka izvi! Wandiita zvako rema nokundiudza nhema. Ndiudzewo kuti ungasungwe sei.”" 
Judges16:11 Samusoni akati kwaari, “Kana vakandisunga netambo dzavo itsva dzisina kumboshandiswa, ndichava munhu asina simba ndigoitawo sezvakangoitawo munhu wose wose.”" 
Judges16:12 Saka Dheraira akatora tambo mbiri itsva, akamusunga nadzo ndokumuti, “Samusoni, hokoyo nevaFirisitia!” Izvozvo muimba yomukati makanga muine varume vakanga vakamuhwandira. Asi akadambura tambo dziya mumaoko ake sokunge ari kudambura shinda." 
Judges16:13 Dheraira akati kuna Samusoni, “Kusvikira parizvino, wandiita zvako rema chairo nokundiudza nhema! Ndiudzewo kuti ungasungwe sei?” Iye akati kwaari, “Kana ukaruka mhotsi nomwe revhudzi romusoro wangu neshinda zvakasimbarara nechipeneti. Ipapo ndichashaya simba ndigoitawo zvakangoita vamwe vanhu.”" 
Judges16:14 Samusoni akati avete, Dheraira akarukira mapfundo evhudzi rake manomwe pamwechete nejira riya akaroverera hoko, ndokuti, “Samusoni, hokoyo nevaFirisitia.” Akati vharavhazhu kumuka, ndiye hoko iya nechokurukisa pamwechete nejira racho dzipu." 
Judges16:15 Dheraira akati kwaari, “Ungagoti unondida seiko, iwe mwoyo wako uri kurekure neni? Rwendo runo rwava rwechitatu, uchindiita zvako rema, usingandiudze kunobva simba rako guru rakadai.”" 
Judges16:16 Dheraira akaramba achimunetsa zuva nezuva nezvaaitaura kusvikira Samusoni aneta zvokukungura kufa. 
Judges16:17 Ndipo paakazodura pachena zvaiva mumwoyo make achiti, “Musoro wangu uyu hausati wamboveurwa nechisvo nokuti ndiri muNaziri akatsaurirwa Mwari kubvira pakuberekwa kwangu. Kana ndikangoveurwa musoro chete, simba rangu rinobva raenda ndichibva ndasara ndisisina simba ndigoitawo sezvakangoitawo munhu wose wose.”" 
Judges16:18 Dheraira paakangoona kuti Samusoni azomudurira pachena zvaiva mumwoyo make chaizvo, akatumira nhume kumadzishe avaFirisitia achiti, “Chibvai mauya, nokuti rwendo runo andifushunurira pachena zviri mumwoyo make.” Madzishe evaFirisitia akabva auya kwaari, vakabata mari iya mumaoko." 
Judges16:19 Dheraira akavatisa Samusoni pamakumbo. Akadaidza mumwe murume, akamugera musoro mapfundo manomwe evhudzi ndokutanga kuita zvinhu zvokumurwadzisa, simba rake richabva rapera." 
Judges16:20 Akadaidzira achiti, “Samusoni, hokoyo navaFirisitia.” Samusoni akati vharavhazhu kumuka ndokuti, “Ndichazvizunza ndigopunyuka sezvandanga ndichingoita,” asingazivi kuti Tenzi akanga atomusiya." 
Judges16:21 VaFirisitia vakamuti dzvi vakamusvukunura maziso ake. Vakaenda naye kuGaza, ndokumusunga nesimbi dzendarira. Ndokumuitisa basa rokugaya upfu ari mujeri." 
Judges16:22 Asi vhudzi rake romusoro rakatanga kukura. 
Judges16:23 Madzishe avaFirisitia akakokorodzana kuzopira Dhagoni mwari wavo chibayiro chomupiro mukuru kwazvo vachipembera nokufara nokuti vaiti, “Mwari wedu aisa mumaoko edu Samusoni muvengi wedu.”" 
Judges16:24 Vanhu pavakangomuona, vakarumbidza mwari wavo vachiti, “Mwari wedu aisa muvengi wedu, mumaoko edu. Mharadzi yenyika yedu, nyakuuraya vazhinji vedu.”" 
Judges16:25 Vakati zvino vafarisa, ndokuti, “Tidaidzirei zvedu Samusoni ativaraidze.” Nokudaro vakandotora Samusoni mujeri maakanga ari, akatamba achivavaraidza. Vakamumisa pakati pembiru dzaivamo." 
Judges16:26 Samusoni ndokutaurira mukomana aimutungamirira achiti, “Ndisvitsewo pane mbiru dzakatsigira imba ino iyi, undirege ndimbozembera zvangu padziri.”" 
Judges16:27 Zvino mumba iyoyo makanga makaita zvokutsikana kuwanda, varume navakadzi. Madzishe ose evaFirisitia akanga arimowo. Nechomudenga memba iyoyo makanga mune zviuru zvitatu zvavanhu, varume navakadzi vakanga vachitarisa zvavo Samusoni achivavaraidza nokutamba." 
Judges16:28 Ipapo Samusoni akachema kuna Tenzi achiti, “Tenzi Mwari, ndiyeukeiwo, ndateterera mundisimbisewo kwanhasi uno chete Mwari, ndapota zvangu ndibve ndangotsividza kamwechete vaFirisitia maziso angu ari maviri.”" 
Judges16:29 Samusoni akabata mbiru mbiri dziya dzapakati dzakanga dzakatsigira imba iyoyo, imwe akaibata noruoko rwake rorudyi imwe noruboshwe achidzisunda." 
Judges16:30 Ndokubva Samusoni, ati, “Chiregai ndichifa zvangu pamwechete navaFirisitia.” Akakotama nesimba rake rose, imba ikabva yati ririri kuwira pamusoro pamadzishe ose navanhu vose vaivamo. Nokudaro vanhu vaakauraya pakufa kwake vakanga vakawanda kwazvo kupfuura vaakambouraya achiri mupenyu." 
Judges16:31 Vakoma navanun'una vake navose vemhuri yokwababa wake vakadzikako vakamutora vakauya naye vakamuviga pakati peZora neEshitaori muguva rababa wake Manoa ravaiviga vanhu vavo. Samusoni uyu akatonga vaIsiraeri kwamakumi maviri amakore. 
Judges17:1 Munyika yokwaEfuraimu yamakomo makanga muine mumwe murume ainzi Mika. 
Judges17:2 Akati kuna amai vake, “Chiuru chiya nezana rimwechete remari yesirivha zvamakabirwa, mukarengerera rushambwa nyakuitora wacho ndichinzwa mufungeka, ndini ndakaitora.” Amai vake ndokuti, “Mwanangu, dai Tenzi akachikukomborera zvake.”" 
Judges17:3 Akadzosera amai vake chiuru chiya nezana rimwechete rezvidimbu zvesirivha. Amai vake vakati, “Ini nemwoyo wangu wose ndinoturira kuna Tenzi sirivha iyi ndichireverera mwana wangu kuti kugadzirwe chifananidzo chokuveza chakaumbiridzwa nesirivha. Zvino ndochikudzosera sirivha iyoyo.”" 
Judges17:4 Paakadzosera amai vake mari iyi, vakatora mazana maviri ezvidimbu zvesirivha ndokupa kune mupfuri wesirivha. Iye akagadzira chifananidzo chokuveza chakaumbiridzwa nesirivha, chikaiswa mumba maMika." 
Judges17:5 Mika uyu aiva nemba yebanya mokunamatira vamwari. Akagadzira hanzu yeEfodhi namwari wake anonzi terafimu, akagadza mumwe mwana wake mukomana kuti ave mupristi wake." 
Judges17:6 Panguva iyoyo muIsiraeri makanga musina mambo. Yaingova njake njake, munhu wose achingoita zvake zvomusoro wake." 
Judges17:7 Zvino kwaiva nomumwe murume aiva wechidiki wedzinza rokwaRevhi aimbogara muguta reBheterehemu rokwaJudha. 
Judges17:8 Akatama kuBheterehemu rokwaJudha ikoko achindotsvaka pokugara. Ari munzira akasvika mumusha waMika kunyika yaEfuraimu yamakomo. 
Judges17:9 Mika akamubvunza achiti, “Unobva kupiko?” Murume uyu ndokuti, “Ndiri muRevhi wokuguta reBheterehemu rokwaJudha. Ndiri kufamba zvangu ndichitsvakawo pokugara.”" 
Judges17:10 Mika akamuti, “Dai wachigara zvako neni ugova baba nomupristi kwandiri ini ndichikutambirisa zvidimbu zvesirivha gumi pagore, ndichikupawo sutu yokupfeka nechokudya.” Ndokubva muRevhi apinda mumba." 
Judges17:11 Saka muRevhi uyu akagutsikana zvake kugara naye. Jaya iri raingoita somumwe wevana vake. 
Judges17:12 Mika akagadza jaya iri muRevhi iyeyo, rakava mupristi wake, akagara mumusha maMika." 
Judges17:13 Mika akachiti, “iye zvino ndava nechokwadi chokuti Tenzi achaita kuti zvinhu zvindifambire zvakanaka nokuti ndava nomupristi wangu wechiRevhi.”" 
Judges18:1 Panguva iyoyo muIsiraeri makanga musina mambo. Panguva iyoyowo vedzinza rokwaDhani vakanga vachitsvaka nyika yokugara yokuti ive yavo yenhaka. Vaidaro nokuti kusvikira nguva iyoyo vakanga vasati vawana nyika yavo yenhaka pakati pamamwe madzinza evaIsiraeri. 
Judges18:2 VokwaDhani vakasarudza varume vashanu nyanzvi chaidzo dzokurwa mumhuri dzavo dzose, vakavatuma kundosora nokumema nyika iyoyo vachibva kuZora nokuEshitaori. Vakavati, “Endai mundomema nyika iyoyo.” Vakaenda kunyika yokwaEfuraimu yamakomo, vakasvikira mumusha waMika vakararamo." 
Judges18:3 Vakatsaukira nomumusha maMika nokuti pavakanga vava pedyo nawo vakanzwa mutauriro wejaya rechiRevhi riya vakauziva vakati kwaari, “Ndiani akakuunza kuno? Chii chauri kuita kuno? Basa rako chairo kuno nderei?”" 
Judges18:4 MuRevhi uyu akavapindura achivarondedzera kuti, “Zvandakaitirwa naMika ndezvizvi nezvizvi nezvizvi, akandikumbira kuti ndimushandire somupristi wake.”" 
Judges18:5 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Tibvunzireiwo kuna Mwari tizive kuti zvatiri kufambira zvichabudirira here?”" 
Judges18:6 Mupristi ndokuvati, “Fambai zvenyu zvakanaka, ziso raTenzi riri pamuri nzira yose.”" 
Judges18:7 Varume vashanu ava vakasimudzira rwendo rwavo, vakasvika kuRaishi. Vakaona vanhu veko vari mumutambaratede zvavo, savanhu vokuSidhoni, vari murunyararo zvavo vasina chavanombofungira, vasina nechinhu chapanyika pano chavanoshaya, vaino upfumi vachigara kure nevaSidhoni uye vasina wavaidyidzana navo." 
Judges18:8 Kuzoti vadzokera kuhama dzavo kuZora nokuEshitaori, hama dzavo dzakavati, “Tinyepei tinzwe zvamakandoona.”" 
Judges18:9 Ivo vakati, “Ngatichitosimukai tiende kundorwisa vanhu ava nokuti nyika iyoyo takaimema tikaona iri nyika yakanaka kwazvo. Chinono chinengwe bere rakadya richifamba. Regai zvenyu kumboita zvokuverengera kuenda kundopinda munyika iyoyo muitore ive yenyu." 
Judges18:10 Kana nemiwo mukaendako muchatoonawo kuti vanhu vasina chavanombofungira zvavo. Nyika iyoyo ziendanakuenda mativi ose. Tenzi aisa mumaoko enyu nyika isina chainoshaya chinowanikwa pasi pano.” 
Judges18:11 Ipapo mazana matanhatu avarume vakapakata zvombo zvehondo vakasimuka vachibva kuZora nokuEshitaori. 
Judges18:12 Vakakwira vakandodzika matendhe avo munyika yokwaJudha kuKiriatijearimu. Ndokusaka pakazonzi Matendheokwadhani kusvikira pari nhasi. Zvino nzvimbo iyoyo iri kumadokero kweKiriatijearimu. 
Judges18:13 Vakabva ipapo vakasimudzira rwendo rwavo voenda kunyika yokwaEfuraimu yamakomo vakandosvika kumusha waMika. 
Judges18:14 Varume vashanu vaya vakamboenda kundosora nyika yeRaishi vakati kune vamwe vavo, “Munomboziva here kuti mudzimba idzi mune efodhi navamwari vanonzi materafimu nechifananidzo chokunamata chokuveza nechimwe chakaumbwa nesimbi? Saka mongozivawoka zvokuita.”" 
Judges18:15 Vakatsaukiramo vakapinda mumba mejaya riya rechiRevhi mumusha waMika vakakwazisana. 
Judges18:16 Izvozvo mazana matanhatu avarume vokwaDhani vakanga vakapakata zvombo zvavo zvehondo vamire kusuo guru remo. 
Judges18:17 Varume vashanu vaya vakambondosora nyika iyoyo vakandopinda vakatora chifananidzo chiya chokuveza neefodhi navamwari vaya, materafimu nechifananidzo chakaumbwa nesimbi. Izvozvo mupristi akanga amire kusuo guru, namazana matanhatu akanga akamirawoko akapakata zvombo zvawo zvehondo." 
Judges18:18 Pavakapinda mumusha waMika vakatora chifananidzo chokuveza neefodhi namaterafimu vamwari vaya nechifananidzo chokunamata chakaumbwa nesimbi, mupristi akati kwavari, “Chii ichochi chamava kuita?”" 
Judges18:19 Vakamuti, “Nyarara, usawane chaunomboti bufu, uya tiende tose uve baba nomupristi kwatiri. Chingava nani kwauri ndechipi pane izvi zvokuti, uve mupristi wemhuri yomunhu mumwechete, kana kuti uve mupristi wemhuri dzerimwe dzinza revaIsiraeri?”" 
Judges18:20 Mupristi akanzwa mwoyo wake kufara, akatora efodhi namaterafimu vamwari vaya nechifananidzo chiya chokuveza ndokuenda ari mukati mavo." 
Judges18:21 Vakadzokera munzira vakasimudzira rwendo rwavo ndokutungamidza vana nezvipfuwo nemidziyo yavo. 
Judges18:22 Kuzoti vafamba chinhambwe chaicho, vabva pamusha waMika, vavakidzani vaMika vakaunganidzwa vakatevera vokwaDhani, vakavabata." 
Judges18:23 Vakadaidzira kune vokwaDhani, vokwaDhani vakacheuka, vakati kuna Mika, “Chii chaicho chakusvota iwe, kutoita zvokutikokerana kudai?”" 
Judges18:24 Iye akapindura achiti, “Aika, manditorera vamwari vangu vandakagadzira, mukanditorera mupristi mukaenda. Zvino chandasara nacho chii pamungatobvunza zvenyu kuti, ‘Chii chakusvota?’ ”" 
Judges18:25 VokwaDhani vakati kwaari, “Usatinyaudze, mhoti ungatovingwa izvozvi navane hasha dzisinganonoki vakakupfuudza, ukafa, iwe navanhu vapamana pako ivavo.”" 
Judges18:26 VokwaDhani ndokubva vati zvakare munzira pindei voenda zvavo. Mika paakaona kuti vane simba kupinda iye, akadzokera zvake kumusha kwake." 
Judges18:27 VokwaDhani vakaenda vaine zvifananidzo zviya zvakaumbwa naMika pamwechete nomupristi wake uya. Vakasvika kuRaishi, kuvanhu vane runyararo, vasina zvavo chavanofungidzira, vakavarakatisa namapakatwa vakapisa guta iroro nomoto." 
Judges18:28 Hakuna kuwanikwa wokuvanunura nokuti kwaiva kure kwazvo neSidhoni, vakanga vasina wavaidyidzana navo. Guta irori raiva kubani reBhetirehobhu. Vakarivaka patsva, vakagaramo." 
Judges18:29 Vakatumidza guta iri zita rokuti Dhani, zita ratateguru wavo Dhani akaberekwa navaIsiraeri. Asi pakutanga, raimbonzi Raishi." 
Judges18:30 VokwaDhani ava vakazvimisira chifananidzo chokuveza chiya. Zvino Jonatani mwanakomana waGerishomu mwanakomana waMosesi navana vake vakomana, vaiva vapristi vedzinza rokwaDhani kusvikira zuva rakatapwa vanhu munyika iyoyi." 
Judges18:31 Saka vakamisa chifananidzo chiya chokuveza chakagadzirwa naMika chikavapo nguva yose yakanga imba yaMwari iri kuShiro. 
Judges19:1 Mazuva iwayo pakanga muIsiraeri musina mambo, mumwe muRevhi aigara kumuchetocheto kwenyika yamakomo yokwaEfuraimu, akaparika mumwe mukadzi wokuBheterehemu rokwaJudha." 
Judges19:2 Murongo uyu akashatirirwa murume wake akapomoka pamurume akaenda kumusha kwababa wake kuBheterehemu rokwaJudha, akagarako mwedzi mina." 
Judges19:3 Murume wake akasimuka akamutevera kundomunyengetedza kuti adzoke. Zvaakamutevera aiva nomuranda wake namadhongi maviri. Akasvika kwavatezvara vake. Vatezvara vake pavakamuona, vakamuchingura norufaro." 
Judges19:4 Vatezvara vake, baba womusikana uyu vakati mukuwasha wavo ambogara zvake navo. Mukuwasha uyu ndokumbogarawo zvake mazuva naye. Saka vakambodya zvavo vachinwa vachirarapo kwamazuva." 
Judges19:5 Pazuva rechina vakafumomuka, mukuwasha uyu ndokugadzirira kuenda, asi baba vomusikana uyu vakati kumukuwasha wavo, “Madii mambowana kachingwa kwokukanda mukanwa mudzore mwoyo, mugoti moenda zvenyu.”" 
Judges19:6 Saka varume ava vari vaviri vakagara zvavo pasi vakadya vakanwa pamwechete. Baba womusikana uyu vakati kumukuwasha wavo, “Dai wachirara zvako pano uchifara.”" 
Judges19:7 Ava mangwana acho, mukuwasha paakamuka oda kuenda, vatezvara vake vakamugombedzera kudzamara ararapo zvakare." 
Judges19:8 Pazuva rechishanu akafumomukazve mangwanani kuti aende, ndokubva baba vomusikana uyu vati, “Dai mambowana chokudya mudzore mwoyo muchimbomirira kuti zuva rirereke. Saka vakadya zvavo vari vose.”" 
Judges19:9 Paakati achipinda munzira pamwechete nomukadzi wake nomuranda wake, vatezvara vake, baba vomusikana uyu vakati, “Chitarisai muone kunze kwaendaka uku. Zuva rava kutodoka iri. Chirarai zvenyu pano mupedzere usiku huno pano muchifara. Mangwana mofumomuka muchipinda zvenyu murwendo rwenyu muchienda kumusha kwenyu.”" 
Judges19:10 Murume uyu haana kuda kuzoita humwe usiku aripo. Akasimuka ndokupinda munzira. Akasvika pakatarisana neguta reJebhusi (ndiro Jerusaremu.) Aiva nomurongo wake namadhongi maviri akanga aine zvityaro. 
Judges19:11 Pavakanga vava padyo neguta reJebhusi, zuva rakanga rava kutodoka. Muranda akati kuna tenzi wake, “Tadii kuchitsaukira zvedu muguta revaJebhusi iri tiraremo.”" 
Judges19:12 Tenzi wake akati kwaari, “Aiwa, hatingatsaukire muguta ravatorwa vasiri vaIsiraeri, saka ngatipfuurirei kuGibhea.”" 
Judges19:13 Akati kumuranda wake, “Uya tiende uku kune dzimwe nzvimbo tindorara tava kuGibhea kana kuti kuRama.”" 
Judges19:14 Saka vakapfuurira vakazodokerwa nezuva vava pedyo neGibhea riri munyika yokwaBenjamini. 
Judges19:15 Ndimo mavakazotsaukira vorara. Akaenda akandogara panze panhandare. Hapana akanga avatorawo kundovapa pokurara kumba kwake. 
Judges19:16 Ndipo pakazotiwo nepo tutururu imwe harahwa ichibva kumunda kwayo manheru. Harahwa iyoyi yaibva kunyika yamakomo yokwaEfuraimu aitova muuyi zvake kuGibhea. Asi vanhu vomo vaiva vedzinza rokwaBenjamini. 
Judges19:17 Harahwa iyi yakatarisa ikaona murume uyu aiva parwendo ari panze zvapo panhandare ikati, “Uri kuenda kupi? Unobva kupiko?”" 
Judges19:18 Akati kwaari, “Tiri kupfuurawo zvedu tichibva kuBheterehemu rokwaJudha, tiri murwendo kuenda kumuchetocheto kwenyika yamakomo yokwaEfuraimu kwandinobva. Rwanga ruri rwendo rwokuenda kuBheterehemu rokwaJudha, zvino ndava kuenda kumba kwangu. Asi iye zvino hapana atipinzawo mumba make." 
Judges19:19 Uswa nechokudya chamadhongi edu tinazvo. Tine chingwawo newaini. Isu varanda venyu zviri zvokudya tinazvo zvinokwanira ini nemwanasikana wenyu nejaya iri ratinaro. Hapana chatisina.” 
Judges19:20 Harahwa iya ndokuti, “A zvakanaka wani. Iniwo ndichakupai zvose zvamungadaro musina. Chete, zvokuti murare panze pano apa panhandare aiwa.”" 
Judges19:21 Nokudaro akaenda navo kumba kwake, akapa madhongi zvokudya, ivo vakashamba makumbo avo vakadya vakamwa." 
Judges19:22 Pavaingunofara zvavo ndokubva madzenga avanhu asvika ndokukomba imba iyi vachigogodza pamusuo ndokuti kuharahwa iya, muridzi vemba, “Buritsa pano panze murume apinda mumba mako, timuite mukadzi wedu.”" 
Judges19:23 Murume uyu, muridzi wemba, akabuda panze pavaiva akavati, “Aiwaka, hama dzangu regai kuita chakaipa chikadaro, zvamunongoonawo kuti muenzi auya muimba mangu. Regai kushinhwa zvakadai." 
Judges19:24 Chinzwaika, pane mwana wangu achiri mhandara nomukadzi womurume iyeyo ndovondoburitsa panze iye zvino, muite zvenyu chakaipa navo chamunoda. Asi kune murume uyu regai kuita unzenza hwakadaro.”" 
Judges19:25 Asi varume vacho vakaramba kumunzwa. Murume uyu akati murongo wake ndu, ndiye sunde panze kwavari. Vakamubata chibharo vachiita kwaari zvavaida usiku hwose kusvikira mangwanani. Kuzoti ava mambakwedza ndopavakazomurega kuti aende zvake." 
Judges19:26 Kwava kuti ngu-u kuedza mukadzi uya akasvikowira pasi pamusuo wemba iya maiva natenzi wake. Akaramba akati rapata ipapo kusvikira zuva rabuda. 
Judges19:27 Tenzi wake akamuka mangwanani ndokuzarura misuo yemba iye ava kuda kupinda murwendo wanei murongo wake akati rapata pamuso wemba ipapo, maoko ake ari pachiguvare." 
Judges19:28 Akati kwaari, “Simuka tiende.” Asi haana kudaira. Murume uyu akamuisa padhongi ndokusimuka oenda kumusha kwake." 
Judges19:29 Murume uyu akati apinda mumba make akatora banga ndokucheka-cheka mukadzi wake iyeyu, muzvidimbu gumi nezviviri, ndokutumira kumativi ose eIsiraeri." 
Judges19:30 Vose zvavo vakazviona vakati, “Zvinhu zvakadai hazvisati zvamboitika kana kumbooneka muIsiraeri kubvira zuva rakabuda vaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti kusvikira nhasi uno. Nyatsozvifungai, murangane zvokuita mutiudze.”" 
Judges20:1 VaIsiraeri vose vakabudidzana vachibva kuDhani kusvikira kuBheerishebha pamwechetewo novokuGireadhi, gungano iri rikandoungana somunhu mumwechete pana Tenzi kuMizipa." 
Judges20:2 Vatungamiriri vavanhu vose vamadzinza ose avaIsiraeri vakauyawo pamwechete negungano revanhu vaMwari, vari zviuru zvina zvavarume vetsoka vanorwa nomapakatwa." 
Judges20:3 (VokwaBhenjamini vakanzwa kuti vaIsiraeri vakaenda kuMizipa.) VaIsiraeri vakati, “Tipire tinzwe kuti uhwu hwakaitika sei?”" 
Judges20:4 MuRevhi uya, murume womukadzi akaurayiwa akati, “Ini ndakasvika nokuGibhea kunyika yokwaBhenjamini kuti ini nomurongo wangu tiwane pokurara." 
Judges20:5 Varume vokuGibhea vakandimukira vakandikomba mumba mandakanga ndiri usiku vachida kundiuraya. Vakabata murongo wangu chibharo, akafa." 
Judges20:6 Ndakatora murongo wangu ndikamudimura-dimura, ndikatumira zvidimbu zvacho kunyika dzose dzavaIsiraeri dzenhaka yavo. Chandakadariro ndechokuti vakapara zvinonyadzisa mhosva yakaipa younzenza muIsiraeri." 
Judges20:7 Hezvoka vaIsiraeri, muri mose zvenyu, zano renyu rinoti kudii, poitwa sei ipapa?”" 
Judges20:8 Vanhu vose vakasunga rimwe rokuti, “Pakati pedu hapana munhu achadzokera kutendhe rake, kana mumwechete zvake achadzokera kumba." 
Judges20:9 Zvatichaita kuGibhea ndezvizvi, tichasarudza nechin'ange vanhu vachandorirwisa." 
Judges20:10 Pazana roga roga ravanhu, mudzinza nedzinza ravaIsiraeri tichasarudza gumi ravarume, pachiuru tichisarudza zana, pagumi rezviuru tichisarudza chiuru. Ndovachaigira vanhu zvokudya. Kana ngavatsividze kuGibhea kwaBhenjamini votsividza mhosva inonyadzisa yakaparwa muIsiraeri.”" 
Judges20:11 Saka varume vose veIsiraeri vakaunganidzana vakaita chirwirangwe kurwisa guta irori. 
Judges20:12 Madzinza avaIsiraeri akatuma nhume kudzinza rose rokwaBhenjimini kundoti, “Kushinhwai kwakaitwa pakati penyu?" 
Judges20:13 Zvino unzai vanamatatapure vokuGibhea ivavo vasina musoro tivauraye, tibvise uipi hwakadai uhwu muIsiraeri.” Asi vokwaBhenjamini havana kumboteerera zvavo zvakanga zvataurwa nehama dzavo vaIsiraeri." 
Judges20:14 Asi kutoti vokwaBhenjamini ava vakabva mumaguta avo ose vakaunganidzana kuGibhea kuti varwe navaIsiraeri. 
Judges20:15 Pamusoro pamazana manomwe avarwi vokurwa namapakatwa vakanga vaitwa zvokusarudzwa kuGibhea, vokwaBhenjamini vakaunganidzawo makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zvitanhatu zvavarwi vakanga vatoitwa zvokutosarudzwa mumaguta avo, nguva iyoyo." 
Judges20:16 Mukati mevose ivava makanga muine mazana manomwe avarwi vaiva namaboshwe vasina mhosva vaigona kukanda dombo kuruvhudzi rumwechete vachirutema. 
Judges20:17 Tisingaverenge vedzinza rokwaBhenjamini, vaIsiraeri vakaunganidza mazana mana avarume vokurwa namapakatwa vari varwi vehondo vose." 
Judges20:18 VaIsiraeri vakakwira kuenda kuBhetieri kundobvunza Tenzi kuti, “Nderipi dzinza redu richatanga kundorwisa vokwaBhenjamini?” Tenzi akati, “VokwaJudha ndovachatanga kuenda.”" 
Judges20:19 Mangwana acho vaIsiraeri vakamuka mangwanani vakandodzika matendhe avo pedyo neGibhea. 
Judges20:20 VaIsiraeri vakasimuka kurwisana nevokwaBhenjamini. VaIsiraeri vakarongana kurwisa Gibhea. 
Judges20:21 VokwaBhenjamini vakavabudira muGibhea, vakarakatisa kuuraya vaIsiraeri zviuru zviviri musi iwoyo." 
Judges20:22 Zvakadaro zvazvo, vaIsiraeri vakazvisimbaradza vakaronga hondo zvakare panzvimbo yakare yavakanga vakaronga zuva rokutanga." 
Judges20:23 VaIsiraeri vakaenda kuna Tenzi vakachema kwaari kudzamara ava manheru. Vakabvunza Tenzi kuti, “Toendazve here kundorwa nehama dzedu dzokwaBhenjamini?” Tenzi ndokuti, “Endai mundovarwisa.”" 
Judges20:24 Zuva rechipiri vaIsiraeri vakasebera kuzorwisana novokwaBhenjamini. 
Judges20:25 VokwaBhenjamini vakavabudira muGibhea zuva rechipiri irori, vakarakatisa varume gumi rezviuru nezviuru zvisere zvavaIsiraeri, ivava vose vakanga vari varwi vokurwa namapakatwa." 
Judges20:26 Ipapo vaIsiraeri vose, hondo yavo yose zvayo, vakaenda kuBhetieri vakachema. Vakagara pana Tenzi, vakatsanya kusvikira manheru zuva iroro. Vakaita mipiro yokupisa neyokuwadzana kuna Tenzi." 
Judges20:27 VaIsiraeri vakabvunza Tenzi zvokuita nokuti mazuva iwayo bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano ndoparaiva. 
Judges20:28 Finehasi mwanakomana waEreazari mwana waAroni ndiye aiita basa roupristi ipapo. VaIsiraeri vakabvunza kuti, “Ko tingaendezve here kundorwisana nehama dzedu dzokwaBhenjamini, kana kuti kwete?” Tenzi ndokuti, “Endai nokuti mangwana ndinovaisa mumaoko enyu.”" 
Judges20:29 VaIsiraeri vakaronga vamwe vanhu kuti vahwandire vakakomberedza Gibhea. 
Judges20:30 VaIsiraeri vakaenda kundorwisa vokwaBhenjamini nezuva retatu. Sezvavakamboita pakutanga, vakaronganazve kurwisa Gibhea." 
Judges20:31 VokwaBhenjamini vakavavinga, ivo ndokuvakwezvera kure neguta. Sezvavaimboita pakutanga, vakatanga kurova vachiuraya vaIsiraeri mumigwagwa inoti wokuenda kuBhetieri nowokuenda kuGibhea nomusango nomusango, kukafa vaIsiraeri makumi matatu." 
Judges20:32 VokwaBhenjamini vakafunga kuti, “Vari kutiza sapakutanga.” Asi vaIsiraeri vaiti, “Regai titize timbovakwezvera kumigwagwa mikuru vabve muguta.”" 
Judges20:33 VaIsiraeri vose vakanyanduka vachibva pavakanga vari, vakarongana zvokuti vachirwa kuBhaaritamari. VaIsiraeri vakanga vakahwandira vakadzumbunukawo kumadokero kweGebha vomhanya." 
Judges20:34 Varume vanosvika gumi rezviuru vakanga vaitwa zvokusarudzwa muIsiraeri vakanangana neGibhea kurirwisa. Kwakarwisanwa zvinotyisa, izvozvo vokwaBhenjamini vakanga vasingatomboziva zvavo kuti kwatova kuparara kwavo." 
Judges20:35 Tenzi akaita kuti vokwaBhenjamini vakurirwe navaIsiraeri. Zuva iroro vaIsiraeri vakauraya varume makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zvishanu nezana rimwechete ravanhu vokwaBhenjamini ivavo vose vari varwi vokurwa namapakatwa. 
Judges20:36 VokwaBhenjamini vakazviona kuti vatokurirwa. VaIsiraeri vakapa vokwaBhenjamini mukana vachivimba navaya vavakanga vati vahwandire Gibhea. 
Judges20:37 Vaya vakanga vakahwandira vakamhanya kundorwisa Gibhea. Vakanga vakahwandira ivava vakadzumbunuka vakauraya guta rose iroro namapakatwa. 
Judges20:38 Pakanga pavimbisanwa kuti vakanga vakahwandira vaya vanofanira kuzopwititisa gore routsi muguta," 
Judges20:39 varume veIsiraeri ndopavaizopinduka votanga kurwisa. Pakanga vokwaBhenjamini vatangisa zvino kuuraya varume makumi matatu veIsiraeri, votofunga kuti, “A-a zvino tazonyatsovakurira sezvatakambovaita pakutanga.”" 
Judges20:40 Ipapo ndopakatanga kutogoka gore routsi muguta. VokwaBhenjamini vakazoti cheu, onei guta rose rangova moto wonjenjema mudenga." 
Judges20:41 Ndopakabva papinduka vaIsiraeri, zvikakangaidza vokwaBhenjamini nokuti vakanga votoona kuti kwava kupera uku." 
Judges20:42 Naizvozvo vakapishinuka votiza vaIsiraeri vonanga kurenje, hondo ikagoti tsvome tsvome navo ikoko, vokomberanwa navamwe vaibva nokumaguta vachivakatakazha." 
Judges20:43 VokwaBhenjamini vakakomberanwa zvokuti kuvaronda kwakanga kwava nyore nyore kudzamara kuGebha kumabvazuva. 
Judges20:44 Kwakafiwa nemikweshwa chaiyo yavarume vokwaBhenjamini, gumi rezviuru nezviuru zvisere." 
Judges20:45 Vakapishinuka zvakare votizira kurenje kubako rokwaRimoni, vaIsiraeri vakangouraya vokungonhonga-nhongawo vanokwana zviuru zvishanu zvavarume mumigwagwamo. Vakatsikirirana navo kuvaronda kusvikira kuGidhomu vakauraya zviuru zviviri zvavanhu." 
Judges20:46 Saka vokwaBhenjamini vakafa musi iwoyo vaikwana makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zvishanu zvemikweshwa yavarume vokurwa namapakatwa. 
Judges20:47 Asi mazana matanhatu avarume vakatizira kurenje kubako rokwaRimoni, vakagara mubako rokwaRimoni iri mwedzi mina." 
Judges20:48 VaIsiraeri vakachidzokera, vamwe vokwaBhenjamini vaiva muguta vakavauraya namapakatwa, vachiuraya vanhu nezvipfuwo nezvose zvazvo zvavaisangana nazvo. Vakapisa nomoto maguta ose avakawana acho." 
Judges21:1 KuMizipa, vaIsiraeri vakanga vapika kuti, “Hapana mumwe wedu acharoodza mwana wake kune vokwaBhenjamini.”" 
Judges21:2 Zvino vaIsiraeri vakaenda kuBhetieri vakaswera vagere pana Mwari kusvikira manheru vachiridza mhere 
Judges21:3 vachiti, “Nhai Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri zvamboitika seiko izvi muvaIsiraeri kuti rimwe dzinza ravaIsiraeri ritsakatike nhasi uno?”" 
Judges21:4 Mangwana acho vakafumomuka vakavaka atari vakapira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana. 
Judges21:5 VaIsiraeri vakati, “Ndiani pakati pamadzinza avaIsiraeri asina kuuya kuna Tenzi kumusangano?” Vakadaro nokuti vakanga vanyatsosimbisisa kupika nezvomunhu anenge asina kuuya kuna Tenzi kuMizipa vachiti, “Anofanira kutourayiwa chete.”" 
Judges21:6 VaIsiraeri vakanga vonzwira urombo hama dzavo dzokwaBhenjamini, voti, “Inga nhasi uno rimwe dzinza ratotsakatika muIsiraeri." 
Judges21:7 Ko zvatakapika naTenzi kuti hatiroodzi vana vedu kwavari, zvino tichagoita sei kuti vaya vakasara vawane vakadzi?”" 
Judges21:8 Vakati, “Nderipiko dzinza ravaIsiraeri risina kuuya kuna Tenzi kuMizipa? Zvakabuda pachena kuti hakuna vokuJabheshigireadhi akanga auya kumusangano," 
Judges21:9 nokuti pakaverengwa vanhu kwakabva kwaoneka kuti hakuna wokuJabheshigireadhi vose navakadzi navana. 
Judges21:10 Naizvozvo gungano rakatumira zviuru gumi nezviviri nemvumba dzavo dzavarwi vachivati endai mundouraya vagari vekuJabheshigireadhi namapakatwa uye vakadzi navana. 
Judges21:11 Zvamuchaita ndezvizvi, urayayi varume vose mugourayawo mukadzi wose akambozivana nomurume.”" 
Judges21:12 Pavagari vose vomuJabheshigireadhi vakawana kune mazana mana emhandara dzisati dzazivana nomurume vakauya nadzo kumatendhe avo kuShiro munyika yeKanani. 
Judges21:13 Gungano rose rakatuma kune vokwaBhenjamini kubako rakwaRimoni shoko rokuti pachiva nokunzwanana navo. 
Judges21:14 Panguva iyoyo vokwaBhenjamini vakadzoka ndokuvapa vakadzi vaye vavasina kuuraya kuJabheshigireadhi, asi havana kuvawanira vanokwanirana navo." 
Judges21:15 VaIsiraeri vakanzwira vokwaBenjamini urombo nokuti pakanga pava nevende pamadzinza avaIsiraeri. 
Judges21:16 Vakuru vakuru vegungano ndokuti, “Vakadzi vomudzinza rokwaBhenjamini zvavakapera kufa, zvino tichagoita sei kuti varume vasara ava vawanewo vakadzi?”" 
Judges21:17 Vakati, “Padzinza iri rokwaBhenjamini panofanira kuva navana vanoita kuti dzinza iri riendere mberi rigorega kutsakatika muIsiraeri." 
Judges21:18 Asi isu hatingagone kuroodza vana vedu kwavari kuti vave vakadzi vavo.” VaIsiraeri vakadaro nokuti vakanga vapika kuti, “Anenge angoroodza mwana wake kune vokwaBhenjamini, ngaawirwe norushambwa.”" 
Judges21:19 Saka vakati, “Inga kune zuva guru wani rokupemberera Tenzi rinochengetwa gore negore kuShiro kuchamhembe kweBhetieri kumabvazuva pedyo nomugwagwa mukuru unobva kuBhetieri uchienda kuShikemu kuri kumaodzanyemba kweRebhona.”" 
Judges21:20 Vakaudza vokwaBhenjamini vaya kuti, “Chiendai mundohwandira muri muminda yamagirepisi," 
Judges21:21 mugaririre. Kana vasikana vokuShiro ivavo vobuda kuzotamba mudariro imi ibvai mabuda muminda yamagirepisi mumwe nomumwe wenyu atore mukadzi pavasikana ivavo vokuShiro, aende kunyika yokwaBhenjamini.”" 
Judges21:22 Madzibaba avo kana kuti hanzvadzi dzavo dzikauya kuzomhan'ara kwatiri, isu tichati kwavari, “Tapota vedu we-e! Chingotiitiraiwo mwoyochena mutipewo zvenyu nokuti vanhu ava hatina kuvawanira vakadzi kuhondo, nemiwo hamuna kuita zvokuvapa, dai makadaro mungadai muine mhosva.”" 
Judges21:23 VokwaBhenjamini vakaita izvozvo, vakandozvitorera vakadzi zvakangoenzanirana nokuwanda kwavo muvasikana vaitamba vakaenda navo. Vakaenda vodzokera kunyika yenhaka yavo. Vakavakazve maguta vakagaramo." 
Judges21:24 Munguva iyoyo vaIsiraeri vakapararana, munhu wese akaenda kudzinza rake kumhuri yake. Vakabva ipapo mumwe nomumwe achienda kunyika yenhaka yake." 
Judges21:25 Panguva iyoyo muIsiraeri makanga musina mambo yaingova njake njake, munhu wose achingoita zvake zvomusoro wake." 
Ruth1:1 I: RUTE NANAOMI Mumazuva aitungamirirwa navatungamiriri vainzi vatongi kwakaitika nzara munyika yeIsiraeri. Mumwe murume wokuBheterehemu rokwaJudha, akaenda kumbondogara kunyika yeMoabhu nomukadzi wake navana vake vaviri vakomana." 
Ruth1:2 Murume uyu ainzi Erimereki, mukadzi wake achinzi Naomi, vana vake vachinzi Mahironi naKirioni. Vaiva vemhuri yekwaEfurati, vokuBheterehemu rokwaJudha. Vakaenda kune rimwe dunhu reMoabhu vakamboita musha ikoko." 
Ruth1:3 Zvino Erimereki, murume waNaomi akafa, Naomi ndokusiyiwa aine vana vake vakomana vaviri." 
Ruth1:4 Vanakomana ivava vakaroora vakadzi vechiMoabhu. Mumwe mukadzi wacho ainzi Oripa, mumwe achinzi Rute. Vakapedza makore anenge gumi vagereko," 
Ruth1:5 ndokubva Mahironi naKirioni vazofawo. Saka Naomi akarasikirwa navana vake vakomana vaviri nomurume wake. 
Ruth1:6 Naomi navaroora vake vakagadzirira zvokudzokera kuti vachibva zvavo munyika yeMoabhu nokuti vari munyika yeMoabhu imomo vakanzwa zvichinzi Tenzi akanga azoshanyira vanhu vake akavawanisa chokudya. 
Ruth1:7 Iye navaroora vake vaviri vakasimuka vakabva kwavaigara, vakapinda munzira vodzokera kunyika yokwaJudha." 
Ruth1:8 Asi Naomi akataurira varoora vake vaviri vaya achiti, “Zvino imi mochitodzokera zvenyu kumusha kwanaamai venyu. Tenzi ngaakuratidzei kutendeseka mwoyochena wake sezvamakaitira vakatisiya nezvamakaitawo kwandiri." 
Ruth1:9 Tenzi ngaakubatsirei kuti muroorwezve mugogara zvenyu zvakanaka mudzimba dzavarume venyu.” Naomi akavatsvoda, ivowo vakahwihwidza kuchema" 
Ruth1:10 vakati, “Aiwa, chiripo ndechokuti tinofanira kudzokerawo nemi kuvanhu vokwenyu.”" 
Ruth1:11 Asi Naomi akati, “Dzokerai zvenyu vanangu, chii chamuchaenderawo neni? Munoti ndichine vana vakomana vandingabereke vokuzokuroorai here?" 
Ruth1:12 Dzokerai vanangu muende zvenyu nokuti ikoku uku kutochembera kwandaita, hazvichaiti kuti ndiroorwe zvakare. Kunyange dai ndanga ndichine chitarisiro chembereko uye kunyange ndikava nomurume usiku hwanhasi ndikabereka vana vakomana," 
Ruth1:13 ndopamungazovamirira here kusvikira vakura? Ndozvamungazvimisire kuroorwa navamwe here? Kweteka vanangu, nhamo yenyu inondirwadza mumwoyo chaizvo nokuti zvenhamo yangu iyi ndiTenzi akazvida.”" 
Ruth1:14 Vakahwihwidza kuchema zvakare ndokubva Oripa atsvoda vamwene vake achionekedzana navo, asi Rute akaramba angoti dzvemere navo." 
Ruth1:15 Naomi akati, “Tarira uone mukadzin'ina wako adzokera kune vokwake nokune vamwari vake. Iwe dzokerawo sezvaita mukadzin'ina wako.”" 
Ruth1:16 Asi Rute akapindura achiti, “Regai zvenyu kunditeterera kuti ini ndikusiyei kana kuti ndidzokere. Kwamuchaenda ndokwandichaendawo, kwamuchange mugere ndokwandichagarawo, vanhu vokwenyu vachavawo vokwangu, Mwari wenyu ndiye achavawo Mwari wangu." 
Ruth1:17 Kwamunofira ndokwandichafirawo, ikoko ndokwandichavigwawo. Kunyange rufu chairwo harufanire kutiparadzanisa; kana ndadaro Tenzi ngaandione, ngaandirege ndichiwirwa, nezvakatoomesesa.”" 
Ruth1:18 Naomi paakaona kuti Rute atsungirira kuenda naye akabva anyarara zvake. 
Ruth1:19 Saka vose vari vaviri vakaramba vachienda kudzamara vasvika kuBheterehemu. Pavakasvika kuBheterehemu, guta rose rakazevezana nezvavo. Vakadzi vaiti, “NdiNaomi here uyu chokwadi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Ivo vakati kwavari, “Regai zvenyu kunditi Naomi, isvai zvenyu manditi Mara nokuti Samasimbaose akaita kuti upenyu hundiipire." 
Ruth1:21 “Ndakaenda ndakapfumawo Asi Tenzi andidzora ndachiti dano, ndisisina kana chinhu muchanza. Chamunonditi Naomi, ndechipi ipapa, kana Tenzi achindipa nhamo kudai, kana iye Samasimbaose achitondirwadzisa kudai?”" 
Ruth1:22 Ndiwo madzokero akaita Naomi kubva kuMoabhu aina Rute muroora wake wechiMoabhu. Vakasvika kuBheterehemu iri nguva yokutanga kukohwa bhari. 
Ruth2:1 Naomi uyu aiva nehama yomurume wake Erimereki yomumba, yainzi Bhoazi yaiva shoroma chaiyo yomurume." 
Ruth2:2 Zvino Rute muMoabhu uyu akati kuna Naomi, “Regai ndiende zvangu kundofuhwa mbesanwa mumunda womunhu anenge andinzwirawo tsitsi.” Naomi akati, “Enda zvako mwanangu.”" 
Ruth2:3 Akasimuka akabva aenda kune mumwe munda akandofuhwa achitevera vakohwi. Zvakangoitikawo kuti munda iwoyo wakanga uri waBhoazi aiva wemhuri imwechete naErimereki. 
Ruth2:4 Ndiyo nguva yakabva yasvikawo Bhoazi achibva kuBheterehemu. Akakwazisa vakohwi ivava achiti, “Tenzi ngaave nemi!” Ivo vakatiwo, “Tenzi ngaakukomborereiwo!”" 
Ruth2:5 Bhoazi akabvunza mushandi wake aitungamirira vakohwi kuti, “Ko mukadzi uyu ndowokwaani?”" 
Ruth2:6 Mushandi wake wokutungamirira vakohwi ndokuti, “Mukadzi wechiMoabhu akauya naNaomi paakadzoka achibva kuMoabhu," 
Ruth2:7 akati, ‘Mungandibvumirewo here kufuhwa zvangu ndichitevera panenge pabva vakohwi, napane zvisote.’ Saka auya akashanda kubvira mangwanani-ngwanani kusvikira iye zvino, angozorora kwekanguva kaduku mudumba umo.”" 
Ruth2:8 Bhoazi akati kuna Rute, “Chinzwa mwanangu, chirega zvako kuzvinetsa nokusweroenda kundofuhwa kune mimwe minda, asi ramba wakati kwati navasikana ava." 
Ruth2:9 Ziso rako ngarirege kubva pamunda wavanenge vachikohwa urambe uchingovatevera. Ndaudza vakomana ava kuti varege kuwana chakaipa chavanoita kwauri. Kana wava nenyota woendawo kumidziyo uko wondonwa mvura inenge yatekwa navashandi ava.” 
Ruth2:10 Rute akapfugama ndokutyora uso akati, “Zvandibvira nepiko kuti mundiitirewo mwoyochena wakadai wokundicheukawo kudai ini zvangu mutorwa?”" 
Ruth2:11 Bhoazi akamupindura achiti, “Zvose zvawakaitira vamwene vako kubvira panguva yakafa murume wako ndakanyatsozvirondedzerwa. Ndakaudzwawo nezvokusiya kwawakaita baba wako naamai vako, nokusiyawo kwawakaita nyika yokwako ukauya kuvanhu vawakanga usingazivi kare." 
Ruth2:12 Tenzi ngaakupe mubayiro wezvawakaita, upiwe mubayiro wakakwana chaiwo naTenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri mumapapiro ake mawakauya kuzopotera.”" 
Ruth2:13 Iye ndokuti, “Maita mwoyo wakanaka chaizvo kwandiri changamire nokuti mandigadzanisa mwoyo, uye mataura neni zvakanaka kwazvo kunyange zvazvo ndisiri mumwe wavasikana ava, vanokushandirai.”" 
Ruth2:14 Panguva yokudya, Bhoazi akati kuna Rute, “Chimbouya kuno udye chingwa uchichiseva muwaini.” Rute akauya akagara pedyo navakohwi. Bhoazi akamupa mbesanwa dzakakangwa, akadya akaguta zvokutosiyawo zvimwe." 
Ruth2:15 Rute paakadzokera kundofuhwa, Bhoazi akataurira vakomana vake achiti, “Regai zvenyu mukadzi uyu afuhwe kunyange pazvisote murege kuita chakaipa kwaari chingamufumure." 
Ruth2:16 Asi musvomhorerei dzimwe hura pazvisote izvozvo, muchimusiyira kuti afuhwe asi musamutsiure.”" 
Ruth2:17 Saka akafuhwa kusvikira manheru ndokubva apura bhari yaakanga afuhwa akawana bhari inorema makirogiramu ainge oda kusvika gumi. 
Ruth2:18 Akaitakura akaenda nayo kuguta akandoratidza vamwene vake zvaakanga afuhwa. Akavaigirawo zvokudya zviya zvakasara paakadya akaguta. 
Ruth2:19 Vamwene vake vakati kwaari, “Wafuhwa kupiko nhasi? Waita basa kupi? Ndiani zvake akucheukawo iyeyo?” Akataurira vamwene vake kuti ndokwavani kwaakanga ashanda. Akati, “Zita romurume wokwandashanda nhasi ndiBhoazi.”" 
Ruth2:20 Naomi akati kumuroora wake, “Tenzi ane mwoyochena usingaperi kuvapenyu kana vakafa, ngaakomborere murume iyeyo!” Naomi akatiwo, “Mufungeka murume iyeyo ihama yedu chaiyo yepedyo, mugariwo wedzinhaka dzomumusha medu.”" 
Ruth2:21 Rute muMoabhu uyu akati, “Murume iyeyo anditiwo, ‘Ramba wakati kwati navashandi vangu kusvikira vapedza kukohwa mbesanwa dzangu dzose.’ ”" 
Ruth2:22 Naomi akataurira muroora wake Rute achiti, “Zviri nani mwanangu kuti ushande navasikana vanomushandira ivavo nokuti ukaenda kumunda mumwewo, kungadaro kukawana chakaipa chingaitwe kwauri.”" 
Ruth2:23 Naizvozvo Rute akaramba achifuhwa akati kwati navasikana vaimushandira vacho kudzamara vapedza kukohwa bhari nekoroni, iye achigara zvake navamwene vake." 
Ruth3:1 Naomi akataurira muroora wake achiti, “Mwanangu ndafunga zvokukutsvakira kuti uitewo imba yako uwanewo pokunyatsogara." 
Ruth3:2 Handiti Bhoazi uyu ane varandasikana vawaiva navo; ihama yedu chaiyo. Chiteerera unzwe, usiku hwanhasi achange achiurutsa bhari paburiro riya." 
Ruth3:3 Naizvozvo zvishambidze, uzore mafuta, uende kuburiro wakapurira hanzu dzako dzakanakisisa. Asi chenjerera kuti iye arege kuziva kuti uripo kusvikira apedza kudya nokunwa." 
Ruth3:4 Kana Bhoazi ondorara, nyatsocherechedza paanenge arara, ugozoendapo womufukura kumakumbo ake, uvatepo iye achakuudza zvokuita.”" 
Ruth3:5 Rute akapindura achiti, “Ndichaita zvose zvamandiudza.”" 
Ruth3:6 Saizvozvo Rute akaenda kuburiro kuya akaita zvose zvaakaudzwa navamwene vake. 
Ruth3:7 Kuzoti Bhoazi apedza kudya nokunwa akati zvino ofara, akaenda zvake kundorara munyasi memurwi wembesanwa. Rute akauyapo chinyararire, akamufukura kumakumbo ake akavatapo." 
Ruth3:8 Pakati pousiku, Bhoazi akapatika, ndokubva atendeuka onei kune mukadzi arere kumakumbo kwake!" 
Ruth3:9 Akati, “Ndiwe ani?” Iye akati, “Ndini Rute muranda wenyu. Regai zvenyu gumbeze renyu rindifukidzewo nokuti ndimi munofanira kundigara nhaka.”" 
Ruth3:10 Iye akabva amuti, “Tenzi ngaakukomborere mwanangu, waratidza kutendeseka, nomwoyochena wawazoita rwendo runo unotopfuura wawakaita pakutanga nokuti hauna kuchiva kuroorwa neachiri mukomana, mupfumi kana murombo." 
Ruth3:11 Zvino mwanangu, usatye zvako ndichakuitira zvose zvawakumbira nokuti vamwe vangu vose vomuguta rino vanozviziva kuti iwe uri mudzimai ane chiremera." 
Ruth3:12 Zvino ichokwadi kuti ndiri hama chaiyo yomumba, asi kune mumwe anotova wepedyo kupinda ini." 
Ruth3:13 Chipedza zvako usiku hwanhasi uri pano. Kana akakugarira nhaka, zvakanaka rega aite saizvozvo, asi kana akaramba kugara nhaka, ndinopika naTenzi mupenyu kuti ini ndinokugara nhaka yacho. Chirara zvako kusvikira mangwana.”" 
Ruth3:14 Saka iye akarara zvake kumakumbo kwake kusvikira mangwanani. Asi akamuka nguva yokuti hawainyatsoziva kuti munhu wauri kuona ndiani nokuti Bhoazi akanga asingade kuti zvizikanwe kuti pane mukadzi akasvika paburiro usiku. 
Ruth3:15 Akamuti, “Uya nechari yawakafuka uitambanudze.” Rute akabva aitambanudza, Bhoazi akadira mairi bhari inorema makirogiramu anenge makumi maviri. Akamutsiga, akaenda zvake muguta." 
Ruth3:16 Paakasvika kuna vamwene vake, vakamubvunza kuti, “Zvafamba sei mwanangu?” Iye ndokuvataurirawo zvose zvaakanga aitirwa nomurume iyeyo" 
Ruth3:17 achiti, “Andipa bhari inotokwana makirogiramu anenge makumi maviri achiti, ‘Haungadzokere kuna vamwene vako usina chawakabata mumaoko.’ ”" 
Ruth3:18 Ivo vakati, “Chimira zvako mwanangu kusvikira waona kuti nyaya iyoyi ichasvika papi nokuti murume iyeyu haasiri kuzogara pasi asi achatoigadzirisa chete iye nhasi uno.”" 
Ruth4:1 Bhoazi akaenda kusuo guru reguta akasvikogara zvake pasi. Sezvineiwo hama yepedyo muridzi wenhaka uya akambotaurwa naBhoazi ndiye vhu achipfuura zvake nepo. Bhoazi akamuti, “Chimbotsaukira nepano apa, umbogara apa.” Murume uyu akatsaukirapo ndokugara pasi." 
Ruth4:2 Bhoazi akatora vakuru vakuru gumi vomuguta iri akavati, “Ngatimbogarai dare pano apa.” Vakagara pasi zvavo." 
Ruth4:3 Bhoazi akasuma nyaya kune hama yake iya, muridzi wenhaka achiti, “Naomi uya akadzoka achibva kuMoabhu ari kutengesa munda waiva waErimereki." 
Ruth4:4 Zvino ndati ndikurume nzeve nezvawo, saka ndinoti dai wautenga dare richizviona, vakuru vakuru vedu varipo. Kana uchida kuununura, ununure zvako, asi kana usingadi nditaurirewo ndizive nokuti hakuna mumwe ane mvumo yokuununura kusiya iwe neni. Iwe ndiwe wokutanga, ini ndiri wechipiri.” Iye uya ndokuti, “Ndinoda kuununura.”" 
Ruth4:5 Bhoazi ndokuti, “Musi waunotenga munda iwoyo kuna Naomi ndiwe unenge wotogara nhaka Rute muMoabhu chirikadzi yomufi kuti umutsiridze zita romufi panhaka yake.”" 
Ruth4:6 Hama yake iya muridzi wenhaka ndokuti, “Kana zvakadaro handichakwanisa kuununura nokuti ndingazokanganisa nhaka yavana vangu. Ununure zvako iwe, ini handichakwanisa kuununura.”" 
Ruth4:7 Zvino kareko muIsiraeri maiva netsika yaiitwa pakununura zvinhu napakutengeserana. Chiratidzo chavaiita chokusimbisa kuti paitwa chibvumirano ndechichi chokuti nyakutengesa aibvisa shangu yake oipa kuna nyakutenga. Ndiko kusimbisa kwaiitwa chibvumirano muIsiraeri. 
Ruth4:8 Saka hama iya muridzi wenhaka paakati kuna Bhoazi, “Utenge zvako iwe.” Akabva abvisa shangu yake." 
Ruth4:9 Bhoazi ndokuti kuna vakuru vakuru vaya navanhu vose, “Nhasi uno ndimi mava zvapupu zvangu zvokutenga kwandaita munda kuna Naomi nezvose zvaiva zvaErimereki pamwechete nezvose zvaiva zvaKirioni nezvaMahironi." 
Ruth4:10 Kunyangewo chirikadzi iya yakasiyiwa naMahironi, Rute muMoabhu, ndini ndatovawo wokugara nhaka nokudaro zita romufi richaramba richidaidzwa panhaka yaakasiya kuti zita rake rirege kurova mumhuri yake kana muguta rake. Ndimi zvapupu zvacho iye nhasi uno.”" 
Ruth4:11 Vanhu vose navakuru vakuru vaiva padare kusuo reguta vakati, “Hongu, tiri zvapupu zvacho. Dai Tenzi akaita kuti mukadzi iyeyu ari kuuya mumba mako, aite saRakeri naRea, vose vari vaviri vakabereka mhuri yaIsiraeri. Dai ukava zvako mupfumi akabudirira muEfurati, zita rako rive nomukurumbira muBheterehemu." 
Ruth4:12 Dai vana vomukadzi uyu achiri muduku kudai vamuchapiwa naTenzi vangoita waro sezvakangoita mhuri yaPerezi akaberekwa naTamari mumba maJudha.” 
Ruth4:13 Bhoazi akatora Rute akagara nhaka yacho. Akapinda mumba naye, Tenzi akamubatsira akava napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana." 
Ruth4:14 Vakadzi vakati kuna Naomi, “Tenzi ngaarumbidzwe, iye asina nhasi uno kukunyima hama chaiyo, mugari wenhaka. Zita rake ngarive nomukurumbira muIsiraeri!" 
Ruth4:15 Ndiye achamutsiridza upenyu hwenyu, achakuchengetaiwo kana makwegura nokuti muroora wenyu anokudai, ari nani kwamuri pane vanakomana vanomwe, akuberekerai mwana mukomana.”" 
Ruth4:16 Naomi akagumbatira mwana uyu pachipfuva chake ndokubva ava mureri wake. 
Ruth4:17 Vakadzi vavakanga vakavakidzana navo vakamutumidza zita. Vaiti, “Naomi aberekerwa mwana mukomana.” Vakamutumidza zita rokuti Obhedhi. Ndiye akazova baba waJese, Jese akazovawo baba waDhavhidhi." 
Ruth4:18 Izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvokwaPerezi; Perezi akabereka Hezironi," 
Ruth4:19 Hezironi akabereka Ramu. Ramu akabereka Aminadhabhu," 
Ruth4:20 Aminadhabhu akabereka Nahishoni. Nahishoni akabereka Sarimoni," 
Ruth4:21 Sarimoni akabereka Bhoazi. Bhoazi akabereka Obhedhi," 
Ruth4:22 Obhedhi akabereka Jese, Jese akabereka Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel1:1 Muguta reRamataimuzofimu, munyika yamakomo yokwaEfuremu maiva nomumwe murume ainzi Erikana mwana waJeroharamu. Jeroharamu akaberekwa naErihu, Erihu akaberekwawo naTohu mwanakomana waZufu wedzinza rokwaEfuremu." 
1Samuel1:2 Erikana aiva navakadzi vaviri, wokutanga ainzi Hana wechipiri achinzi Penina. Penina aiva navana asi Hana akanga asina vana." 
1Samuel1:3 Murume iyeyu aipota achienda kuShiro kundonamata nokundopira zvibayiro kuna Tenzi Samasimbaose gore negore achibva kuguta rokwake. Vanakomana vaEri vana Hofuni naFinehasi ndovaiva vapristi vaTenzi ikoko. 
1Samuel1:4 Zuva raipira Erikana chibayiro aipa migove kune mukadzi wake Penina navana vake vose vakomana navasikana. 
1Samuel1:5 Kunyange zvazvo Erikana aida Hana aizongomupawo mugove mumwechete bedzi nokuti Tenzi akanga asina kumupa mbereko. 
1Samuel1:6 Uyewo mukadzin'ina wake aimudadira kwazvo kumusvotesa nokuti Tenzi akanga asina kumupa mbereko. 
1Samuel1:7 Zvaingoramba zvichingodaro nguva nenguva gore negore paingoenda chete Hana kumba yaTenzi aingodadirwa naPenina. Naizvozvo Hana akazochema akaramwa zvokudya. 
1Samuel1:8 Murume wake Erikana akamuti, “Nhai Hana, unochemeiko? Uri kurambirei chokudya? Washaiswa neiko rufaro mumwoyo? Kwauri handiti ndinotokunda gumi ravana vakomana?”" 
1Samuel1:9 Kuzoti apedza kudya nokunwa ari kuShiro ikoko, Hana akasimuka zvake, izvozvo mupristi Eri akanga agere pachigaro pedyo nebango rapamusuo weTemberi yaTenzi." 
1Samuel1:10 Hana akanga achitoshungurudzwa kwazvo mumwoyo achinamata kuna Tenzi achichema zvinosiririsa. 
1Samuel1:11 Akapika mhiko achiti, “Tenzi Samasimbaose! Kana imi mukanyatsoongorora zvenyu kutambura kwandiri kuita ini muranda wenyu, uye mukandiyeuka mukarega kundikanganwa, mukandipawo zvenyu mwana mukomana, ndinomupa kwamuri imi Tenzi upenyu hwake hwose, haazombofa akaveurwa musoro.”" 
1Samuel1:12 Paainamata kuna Tenzi kwenguva ndefu kudaro Eri akaongorora muromo wake. 
1Samuel1:13 Hana akanga achinamata nechomumwoyo, miromo yake ndiyo chete yaaimengenyedza, izwi rake risinganzwiki, nezvo Eri akabva afunga kuti Hana araradza." 
1Samuel1:14 Eri ndokumuti, “Unosvikira rini wakararadza kudai? Siyana newaini yako iyi.”" 
1Samuel1:15 Asi Hana akapindura achiti, “Aiwa changamire. Ini ndiri mudzimai ari kushungurudzika kwazvo mumwoyo. Handina kana kunwa waini kunyange doro zvaro. Chiripo ndechokuti ndanga ndichidurura nhuna dzomwoyo wangu kuna Tenzi." 
1Samuel1:16 Musafungire kuti muranda wenyu ndiri mukadzi asina maturo nokuti ndanga ndichigurukuta zvinondinetsa nokusvoteswa kwandinoitwa.” 
1Samuel1:17 Eri akamupindura achiti, “Enda zvako norugare. Mwari wavaIsiraeri ngaakupe zvawamukumbira.”" 
1Samuel1:18 Hana akati, “Dai imi mukaramba muchindiyeukawo ini muranda wenyu.” Mudzimai uyu akaenda zvake akandodya, uso hwake hwakanga hwatosununguka?" 
1Samuel1:19 Akafumomuka mangwanani akanamata ari pana Tenzi, ndokuzodzokera zvake kumusha kwake kuRama. Erikana akazogara nomudzimai wake Hana, Tenzi ndokubva ayeuka Hana." 
1Samuel1:20 Nokufamba kwenguva Hana vakabata pamuviri akasununguka mwana mukomana, akamutumidza zita rokuti Samueri nokuti akati, “Ndakamukumbira kuna Tenzi.”" 
1Samuel1:21 Murume uyu Erikana pamwechete nemhuri yake yose akakwira kundopira kuna Tenzi mupiro wechibayiro wegore negore nowokuripa zvaakatsidza. 
1Samuel1:22 Asi Hana haana kukwirawo ikoko nokuti akanga ati kumurume wake, “Mwana uyu akange angorumurwa ndichaenda nayeko kuti anovawo pana Tenzi, agareko narini wose.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Murume wake, Erikana ndokumuti, “Ita zvako zvaunoonawo kuti zvakanaka umirire kudzamara arumurwa. Chete dai Tenzi akakubatsira kuti uzadzise mhiko yako.” Saka mudzimai uyu akasara achirera mwana wake kusvikira amurumura." 
1Samuel1:24 Kuzoti arumura mwana wake akaenda naye pamwechete nechihandira chine makore matatu, noupfu hwekoroni hunorema makirogiramu gumi, nechigubhu chewaini chedehwe ndokuenda naye kumba yaTenzi kuShiro achiri ndumurwa kudaro." 
1Samuel1:25 Vakati vauraya handira, vakaenda nomwana kuna Eri." 
1Samuel1:26 Hana uyu ndokuti, “Changamire ndinopika zvechokwadi kuti ndini mudzimai uya changamire akambomira pano pamaiva achinamata kuna Tenzi." 
1Samuel1:27 Ndaikumbira mwana uyu. Tenzi akanzwa chichemo chandakasvitsa kwaari. 
1Samuel1:28 Naizvozvo mwana uyu ndamupa kuna Tenzi. Upenyu hwake hwose zvahwo ava munhu apiwa kuna Tenzi.” Vakanamata Tenzi ikoko. 
1Samuel2:1 Hana akadetemba kunamata achiti: “Mwoyo wangu unofara naTenzi naiye Tenzi ndasimbaradzwa nomuromo wangu ndavakutotafurirawo vavengi vangu nokuti ndinofara nokununura kwenyu. 
1Samuel2:2 Hapana anoera saTenzi. Hakuna mumwe kusiya imi. Hakuna rimwe bako kunze kwaMwari wedu. 
1Samuel2:3 Musambotaura zvenyu namazwi okuzvikudza. Mukanwa menyu ngamurege kubuda mazwi okuzvitutumadza, nokuti Tenzi ndiMwari anoziva zvose, ndiye ane basa rokuera zviito zvomunhu." 
1Samuel2:4 Uta hwezvikakarara zvavanhu hwakatyorwa, vakarukutika ndivo zvino vagwinya kusimba." 
1Samuel2:5 Vaiva hurudza ndivo vave kuita chokudya chokuruvira vaiva vomunzara, nzara yapera. Mukadzi asina mbereko ndiye obereka vana gumi nefararira. Asi mai vokubereka rudende rwavana, vava karikoga." 
1Samuel2:6 Tenzi anouraya uye ndiye anopa upenyu. Ndiye anoendesa vanhu kunzvimbo yavashakabvu, kana kumutsa munhu." 
1Samuel2:7 Tenzi ndiye anopa munhu urombo kana upfumi. Ndiye anodukupisa munhu kana kumukudziridza. 
1Samuel2:8 Anosimudzira varombo kubva pamhukutu pavagere, navasina zvavanazvo kubva pazaradota, achindovagarisa navana vokumba huru, vachitowana zvavo nhaka yezvigaro zvapamusorosoro. Mbiru dzenyika ndedzaTenzi padziri ndipo paakamisa nyika." 
1Samuel2:9 Ndiye anochengeta vatsvene vake, asi vakaipa vachitsakatiswa murima nokuti simba romunhu harisiro rinoita kuti abudirire." 
1Samuel2:10 Vanopikisana naTenzi vachapwanywa-pwanywa, Wokumusorosoro paanotinhira kumatenga. Tenzi ndiye mutongi wapasi pose, anopa simba mambo wake, anosimbaradza munhu wake waakazodza.”" 
1Samuel2:11 Erikana akadzokera zvake kumusha kwake kuRama. Asi mukomana uya akasara ari mumaoko omupristi Eri achishandira Tenzi. 
1Samuel2:12 Zvino vanakomana vaEri vakanga vari vanhu vasina maturo vaiva vasingaremekedzi Tenzi. 
1Samuel2:13 Zvaiitwa navapristi kuvanhu ndezvizvi zvokuti: painge munhu auya kuzopira chibayiro, mushandi womupristi aiuya neforogo ine mhandi nhatu iyo nyama ichiri kubikwa," 
1Samuel2:14 obaya nayo mupani kana muketero kana mubhodho kana mupoto. Nyama yose yaibuda yakabayiwa neforogo yaitorwa nomupristi yova yake. Ndizvo zvavaiita kuvaIsiraeri vose vaiuya kuShiro. 
1Samuel2:15 Zvakazenge zvava kuitikawo ndezvizvi zvokuti: mushandi womupristi aiuya kumunhu ainge achipira chibayiro iwo mafuta asati ambopiswa woti, “Ndipei nyama yokugochera mupristi nokuti mupristi haadi kuti mumupe nyama yakabikwa, asi mbishi chete.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Kwaiti kana munhu iyeyo akati, “Iye zvino izvi, chimbomiraka vatange vanyatsopisa mafuta atsve apere ugoti wotora zvako paunodira.” Mushandi uya aiti, “Aiwa. Chitondipa iye zvino uno. Kana ukaramba, ndava kuita zvechisimba.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Saizvozvo chitadzo chavanakomana vaEri chakanga chakaipa kwazvo chisingambofadzi Tenzi nokuti varume ivava vakanga vasingaremekedzi mupiro waTenzi. 
1Samuel2:18 Izvozvo Samueri aishandira Tenzi achiri chikomana achipfeka hanzu yeefodhi yerineni. 
1Samuel2:19 Gore negore amai vake vaimusonera kagemenzi vachimuigira pavaienda nomurume wavo kundopira chibayiro chepagore. 
1Samuel2:20 Ipapo Eri aikomborera Erikana nomudzimai wake achiti, “Tenzi ngaakupei vana nomudzimai uyu kutsiva iyeyu waakambokumbira sechikwereti kuna Tenzi.” Vakuzobva vodzokera zvavo kumusha kwavo." 
1Samuel2:21 Tenzi akazoshanyirazve Hana. Akava nembereko zvakare akabereka vana vakomana vatatu navasikana vaviri. Mukomana uyu Samueri akakura aina Tenzi. 
1Samuel2:22 Eri akanga ava harahwa chaiyo. Akanzwa zvaiitwa navana vake kuvaIsiraeri vose zvokutorana navakadzi vaishanda kumusuwo wetendhe rokusanganira vachiita navo choupombwe. 
1Samuel2:23 Akavatsiura achiti, “Munoitireiko zvinhu zvakadai? Ndinonzwa vanhu vose vachindiudza zvakaipa zvamunoita." 
1Samuel2:24 Kweteka vanangu, zvandiri kunzwa izvi hazvina kunaka. Muri kuita kuti vanhu vaMwari vakanganise." 
1Samuel2:25 Kana munhu akatadzira mumwe munhu, Mwari anomumiririra. Zvino kana munhu akatadzira Tenzi ndiani anomureverera?” Havana zvavo kana kumboteerera baba wavo nokuti Tenzi akanga achida zvake zvokuvaparadza." 
1Samuel2:26 Izvozvo mukomana uyu Samueri akaramba achikura mhumhu, uye kudiwa kwake naTenzi navanhu kwakaramba kuchikura." 
1Samuel2:27 Munhu waMwari akauya kuna Eri akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Ndakazviratidza pachena kuna tateguru wemba yako pavaiva kuIjipiti mumaoko aFarao," 
1Samuel2:28 ndikatomusarudza ini pakati pamadzinza ose avaIsiraeri kuti ave mupristi wangu wokundishandira paatari kuti apise rusenzi akapfeka efodhi pandiri. Ndakapa vemba yababa wako zvemipiro yose yavaIsiraeri inoita zvokupiswa nomoto. 
1Samuel2:29 Zvino sei mava kuita mwoyo wokudokwairira zvibayiro nemipiro yandakatema kuti iitwe? Heya, wava kutoremekedza zvako vana vako kupinda ini nhai, muchizvikodza zvenyu nenyama dzakanakisisa dzepamipiro yose yavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri?’" 
1Samuel2:30 Naizvozvo Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri anoti, ‘Ndakanga ndatema kuti vemba yako nevemba yababa vako vafambise basa rapandinenge ndiri narini wose.’ Asi zvino Tenzi anoti, ‘Zvino zvandibva. Vanondiremekedza ndinovaremekedzawo, vanondishonha vachavawo vanhu vasina maturo.’" 
1Samuel2:31 Chinzwa, kuchasvika nguva yandichashomekesa simba rako nesimba revemba yababa vako kuti mumhuri yokwako murege kuzova nomunhu anorarama zvokuchembera." 
1Samuel2:32 Uchatsvokorera neshanje zvinhu zvose zvakanaka zvandichaitira vaIsiraeri iwe uine nhamo, uye mumba mako hamuchazovi nomunhu anorarama kusvika akwegura narini wose." 
1Samuel2:33 Asi murume wandinenge ndasiya kuti andishandire paatari achava kambudzi kasarira rushamhu zvokuti kana iwe uchatomuchemawo uchitoshayiswawo mazano nazvo. Vana vako vachauraiwa navanhu. 
1Samuel2:34 Chichakuratidza kuti zvandiri kutaura zvichaitika ndechichi chokuti vanakomana vako Hofini naFinehasi vachafa musi mumwechete vose vari vaviri. 
1Samuel2:35 Ini pachangu ndichazvimutsira mupristi akatendeka achaita zvinoda mwoyo wangu nezvandinofunga. Ndichatsigira imba yake, ndiye achashandira muzodzwa wangu narini narini." 
1Samuel2:36 Ani naani zvake anenge asara wemhuri yako achazomugwadamira kumuteterera kuti apiwe chidimbu chemari yesirivha kana kuti chingwa chimwechete zvacho achiti, ‘Ndapota ndiwaniseiwo rimwe basa roupristi randingangoita kuti ndigowanawo chimwe chokuisa mukanwa.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:1 Mukomana Samueri aishandira Tenzi ari mumaoko aEri. Mazuva iwayo Tenzi akanga asisataure-taure kuvanhu. Kunyeverawo vanhu nezviratidzo kwakanga kwava kushoma chaizvo. 
1Samuel3:2 Panguva iyoyo zvakaitika kuti mumwe musi Eri akanga arere mumba make, izvozvo meso ake akanga ava kuonera madzerere asisanyatsoona." 
1Samuel3:3 Rambi raMwari rakanga risati radzima. Samueri akanga arerewo muTemberi yaTenzi maiva nebhokisi raMwari reChitenderano. 
1Samuel3:4 Ipapo Tenzi ndopaakadaidza Samueri achiti, “Samueri! Samueri!” Samueri akapindura achiti, “Ndiri pano.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Samueri akamhanyira kuna Eri akasvikoti, “Ndanzwa muchindidaidza, zvino ndauya.” Asi Eri akati, “Handina kukudaidza, dzokera undorara zvako.” Akabva adzokera zvake kundorara." 
1Samuel3:6 Tenzi akadaidzazve achiti, “Samueri!” Samueri akasimuka akaenda kuna Eri akandoti, “Ndanzwa muchindidaidza, zvino ndauya.” Asi Eri akati, “Handina kukudaidza, mwanangu, dzokera undorara zvako.”" 
1Samuel3:7 Samueri akanga asati amboziva Tenzi, nokuti Tenzi akanga asati ambotaura naye." 
1Samuel3:8 Tenzi akadaidzazve Sumueri kechitatu. Samueri akasimuka akaenda kuna Eri akasvikoti, “Ndanzwa muchindidaidza, zvino ndauya.” Eri akazoziva kuti ndiTenzi aidaidza mwana uyu." 
1Samuel3:9 Saka Eri akati kuna Samueri, “Chidzokera zvako undorara, kana akakudaidzazve unodaira uchiti, ‘Taurai zvenyu imi Tenzi, ini muranda wenyu ndakateerera.’ ” Samueri akaenda zvake akarara panzvimbo yake." 
1Samuel3:10 Tenzi akauya akamira ndokudaidza sezvaakamboita padzimwe nguva dziya achiti, “Samueri! Samueri!” Samueri ndokuti, “Taurai zvenyu, muranda wenyu ndakateerera.”" 
1Samuel3:11 Ipapo Tenzi akataurira Samueri achiti, “Chinzwa ndava kuzoita chimwe chinhu muIsiraeri chokuti munhu wose anochinzwa anounga nzeve." 
1Samuel3:12 Pazuva iroro ndichaitira zvose zvandakayambira veimba yake kubvira pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzisira. 
1Samuel3:13 Ndinenge ndichimuudza pachena kuti ndicharanga imba yake narini, ndinenge ndichimurangira zvitadzo zvaanoziva nokuti vana vake vakaita unhubu, asi iye haana kuvadzora." 
1Samuel3:14 Saka ini ndakapika kune veimba yaEri ndichiti, ‘Kana narini zvake chitadzo chavo hachizofi chakapfupirwa nezvibayiro kana kuripwa nomupiro.’ ”" 
1Samuel3:15 Samueri akarara zvake kusvikira kwaedza ndokuzondozarura misuo yeimba yaTenzi. Izvozvo Samueri akanga achitya kutaurira Eri zvaakanga aoneswa. 
1Samuel3:16 Eri akadaidza Samueri achiti, “Nhai Samueri mwanangu.” Iye ndokudavira achiti, “Ndiri pano.”" 
1Samuel3:17 Eri akati, “Chii chawataurirwa naMwari? Rega zvako kundivanza. Mwari ngaawane zvaanoita newe kana ukandivanzira chimwe chinhu pane zvaakakutaurira.”" 
1Samuel3:18 Saka Samueri akavataurira zvose, hapana chaakamuvanzira. Eri akati, “NdiTenzi, anoita zvaanoona kuti ndizvo zvakanaka kwaari.”" 
1Samuel3:19 Samueri akakura. Tenzi akanga ainaye zvokuti muromo wake wakanga usingawiri pasi. 
1Samuel3:20 Isiraeri yose zvayo, kubvira kuDhani kundosvikira kuBheerishebha vakaziva zvisina ani angapokane, kuti Samueri aiva muprofita waTenzi." 
1Samuel3:21 Tenzi akaramba achizvionesa paShiro; Tenzi aizviratidza kuna Samueri kushiro nomushoko rake. 
1Samuel4:1 VaIsiraeri vakaenda kundorwisa vaFirisitia akanga vadzika matendhe avo kuAfeki. Ivo vakandodzika matendhe avo kuEbhenezeru. 
1Samuel4:2 VaFirisitia vakarongana kuti vachirwisa vaIsiraeri. Pavakanga vavakurwisana vaIsiraeri vakakundwa navaFirisitia. VaFirisitia vakauraya vaIsiraeri vaikwana zviuru zvina mukurwisana kwavakaita. 
1Samuel4:3 Pakadzokera varwi kumatendhe, vakuru vakuru vavaIsiraeri vakati, “Ko seiko Tenzi atikundisa navaFirisitia nhasi? Ngatiendei tindotora Bhokisi raTenzi reChitenderano kubva kuShiro kuti rive pakati pedu Tenzi atinunure mumaoko avavengi vedu.”" 
1Samuel4:4 Kwakatumwa vanhu kuShiro kundotora Bhokisi reChitenderano raTenzi Samasimbaose ane chigaro chake pakati pamaKerubhu. Uyewo vanakomana vaEri, Hofini naFinehasi vaiveko vaine Bhokisi reChitenderano raMwari iroro." 
1Samuel4:5 Pakasvika Bhokisi reChitenderano raTenzi mumatendhe, vaIsiraeri vose vakadaidzira nezwi guru zvokuti pasi pakandengendeka." 
1Samuel4:6 VaFirisitia pavakanzwa ruzha rwokuzhamba ikoko vakati, “Ruzha rukuru mumatendhe ava Hebheru ndorwei?” Pavakanzwa kuti Bhokisi raTenzi raunzwa kumatendhe," 
1Samuel4:7 vaFirisitia vakatya, zvokuti vakati, “Kune mumwe mwari uku auya mumatendhe.” Vakati, “Pedu papera! Hatisati tamboona zvakadai." 
1Samuel4:8 Pedu patiperera! Ndiani angatinunura mumaoko avamwari vakasimba vakadai? Ndivo vamwari vaya vakarova vaIjipiti neshamhu yenhamo dzakasiyana-siyana murenje. 
1Samuel4:9 VaFirisitia, tsungai mwoyo. Ivai varume, mukasadaro munoswera mava varanda vavaHebheru sezvavakanga vari kwamuri. Ivai varume, murwe.”" 
1Samuel4:10 Saka vaFirisitia vakarwisa, vaIsiraeri vakakundwa. Mumwe nomumwe wavaIsiraeri akatizira kumba kwake. Pakafiwa zvokufiwa zviya. Pakafa varwi vetsoka vavaIsiraeri zviuru makumi matatu." 
1Samuel4:11 Bhokisi raMwari rakapambwa. Vanakomana vaEri Hofini naFinehasi vakauraiwa. 
1Samuel4:12 Musi iwoyo mumwe murume muBhenjamini akatiza achibva kuhondo, akamhanyira kuShiro. Akanga abvarura-bvarura hanzu dzake aine ivhu mumusoro." 
1Samuel4:13 Paakasvika Eri akanga agere pachigaro chake parutivi penzira akatarisa nzira nokuti mwoyo wake waityira Bhokisi raMwari. Murume uya paakapinda muguta, akataurira vanhu zvakanga zvaitika, guta rose ndokubva rati mhere kwetsu." 
1Samuel4:14 Eri paakanzwa mhere iya akati, “Ko mhere iyoyi ndeyei?” Murume iyeyu akamhanyira kundoudza Eri." 
1Samuel4:15 Eri akanga ava namakumi mapfumbamwe amakore namakore masere okuberekwa. Maziso ake akanga apera, asisaoni." 
1Samuel4:16 Murume uya akati kuna Eri, “Ndini ndabva kuhondo uko. Ndatiza hondo nhasi uno.” Eri akabvunza achiti, “Ko zvafamba seiko ikoko mwanangu?”" 
1Samuel4:17 Nyakuuya neshoko uya akapindura achiti, “VaIsiraeri vaita rumwe rumwe kutiza vaFirisitia. Hondo yedu yakatakazhwa. Uyewo vanakomana venyu Hofini naFinehasi vafa, uyezve Bhokisi raMwari rapambwa.”" 
1Samuel4:18 Paakangodoma Bhokisi raMwari, Eri akanga agere pachigaro munyasi mesuo guru akabva ati namanhede re-ezu pasi gwajara, mutsipa ndokubva wati pipfu, ndiye sarai. Zviripo ndezvokuti vakanga akwegurawo, uye akanga akafuta. Akanga atonga vaIsiraeri kwamakumi mana amakore." 
1Samuel4:19 Muroora wavo mudzimai waFinehasi akanga akazvitakura ava padyo nokusununguka, paakanzwa shoko rokuti Bhokisi raMwari rapambwa, uye kuti vatezvara vake nomurume wake vafa, mimba yakarwadza akati bvucha akasungukuka nokuti mimba yakarwadza." 
1Samuel4:20 Paakanga ava kufa, vakadzi, vananyamukuta vaimubatsira pakusununguka vakamuti, “Tsunga mwoyo, wapiwa mwana mukomana.” Asi iye haana chaakapindura kana kuratidza kuita mwoyo nazvo." 
1Samuel4:21 Akatumidza mwana iyeyo zita rokuti Ikabhodhi, achiti “Mbiri yeIsiraeri yaenda,” pamusana peBhokisi raMwari rakapambwa, uyewo napamusana pavatezvara vake nomurume wake." 
1Samuel4:22 Akati, “Mbiri yabva muIsiraeri nokuti Bhokisi raMwari ratorwa.”" 
1Samuel5:1 VaFirisitia vakatora Bhokisi raMwari reChitenderano, paEbhenezeru vakaenda naro kuAshidhodhi." 
1Samuel5:2 Vakatakura Bhokisi raMwari vakaenda naro kutemberi yaDhagoni, vakandorigadzika munyasi mechifananidzo chaDhagoni." 
1Samuel5:3 Vagari veAshidhodhi vakafumomuka, wanei chifananidzo chaDhagoni chakati pasi zvambarara nouso pamberi peBhokisi raTenzi. Vakachisimudza vakachimisa panzvimbo yacho." 
1Samuel5:4 Mangwana acho vakafumomukazve ndokuona chifananidzo chaDhagoni chakawirazve pasi pamberi peBhokisi raTenzi. Musoro wacho namaoko acho ari maviri akanga ari pachikumbaridzo akatyoka. Muviri wacho chete ndiwo wakanga wasara. 
1Samuel5:5 Pamusana paizvozvi vapristi vaDhagoni navanhu vose vanopinda mutemberi yaDhagoni nanhasi uno havatsike pachikumbaridzo chaDhagoni chiri muAshidhodhi. 
1Samuel5:6 Shamhu yaTenzi yakarova zvikuru vanhu vokuAshidhodhi navakavapoteredza, akavaonesa ndondo nedenda ramamota." 
1Samuel5:7 Vanhu vokuAshidhodhi pavakazvionawo vakati, “Bhokisi Rechitenderano raMwari wavaIsiraeri harifaniri kuramba riinesu nokuti shamhu yake yanyanya kurwadza isu naDhagoni mwari wedu.”" 
1Samuel5:8 Vakatuma shoko rokukokorodza vatungamiriri vose vavaFirisitia rokuti, “Toiteiko nebhokisi raMwari wavaIsiraeri?” Ivo vakati, “Bhokisi raMwari wavaIsiraeri ngariendeswe kuGati.” Saka vakaenda nebhokisi raMwari wavaIsiraeri ikoko." 
1Samuel5:9 Pavakaenda naro ikoko, Tenzi akarova guta irori neshamhu, kuranga kwacho kwaiva kwokuparadza chaiko. Akarova varume vomuguta iroro kubvira kuvakuru kusvikira kuvaduku, nedenda ramamota." 
1Samuel5:10 Vakazoendesa bhokisi raMwari reChitendarano kuEkironi. Parakangosvika kuEkironi vanhu veko vakachemedzeka vachiti, “Vaunza bhokisi reChitenderano raMwari wavaIsiraeri kwatiri kuzotiurayisa isu navanhu vedu.”" 
1Samuel5:11 Saka vakabva vatumazve shoko ndokukokorodza vatungamiriri vose vechiFirisitia, vakati, “Bhokisi reChitendarano raMwari wavaIsiraeri ngariendeswe kumusha kwaro. Ngaridzorerwe kunzvimbo yaro kuti rirege kutiuraya isu navanhu vedu.” Vakadaro nokuti guta irori rose rakanga rayaura nokutya rufu. Tenzi akanga arirova shamhu inorwadza kwazvo." 
1Samuel5:12 Vanhu vakanga vasina kufa vakarohwa nedenda ramamota, kuchemedzeka kweguta iri kwakasvika kudenga." 
1Samuel6:1 Bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano rakagara munyika yavaFirisitia mwedzi minomwe. 
1Samuel6:2 VaFirisitia vakadaidza vapristi nen'anga ndokubvunza vachiti, “Toita sei nebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano? Tiudzeiwo kuti tingaridzosere kwarakabva riinei?”" 
1Samuel6:3 Ivo ndokuti, “Kana mava kudzosera bhokisi rechitenderano raMwari wavaIsiraeri, musaridzosere risina chinhu. Asi edzai napose pamunogona napo kumutumira mupiro wokuripa mhosva. Ndipo pamuchazorapwa, mobvawo maziva chikonzero changa chichiita kuti shamhu yake yokuranga irege kubva pamuri.”" 
1Samuel6:4 Ivo vakapindurawo vachiti, “Ko tomutumira mupiro wokuripa mhosva worudzii?” Ivo vakapindura vachiti, “Mamota endarama mashanu, nembeva dzendarama shanu, zvakaenzana nokuwandawo kwamadzishe avaFirisitia nokuti imi namadzishe enyu makawirwa nedenda rimwechetero." 
1Samuel6:5 Saka gadzirai zvifananidzo zvamamota nezvembeva zvaparadza nyika muremekedze Mwari avaIsiraeri. Zvimwe angakurerutsirei akabvisa shamhu yake yechirango chake pamuri imi navamwari venyu nomunyika yenyu. 
1Samuel6:6 Ko zvinobatsirei kuti imi muomese mwoyo sokuomesa mwoyo kwakaita Farao navaIjipiti? Mwari paakazenge avapusisa havana here kuzobvumira vaIsiraeri kuenda vakabva vasimuka vakaenda? 
1Samuel6:7 Zvino gadzirai chikochikari chitsva mutore mhou dzichiri kuyamwisa dzisati dzambobopwa pajoko mudzisunge pachikochikari ichocho, mhuru dzadzo mudzibvise mumudzinge pana amai vadzo dzidzoserwe kumusha." 
1Samuel6:8 Munotora bhokisi iroro raTenzi rechitenderano moriisa pachikochikari, motorawo zvinhu zviya zvakaumbwa nendarama zvamuri kumutumira zvomupiro wokuripa mhosva, mozviisa mune rimwe bhokisi, moisawo rimwe bhokisi iroro muchikochikari panyasi pebhokisi rechitenderano motinha mombe dzacho dziende nechikochikari dzoga," 
1Samuel6:9 imi motarisa moona. Kana dzikadzokera naro kunyika kwaro kuBhetishemeshi zvinobva zvaratidza kuti ndiye akatipinza munhamo huru yakadai. Asi dzikarega kudaro tinobva taziva kuti haasiri iye akatiranga neshamhu yake, zvakangoitikawo zvazvo kwatiri.”" 
1Samuel6:10 Varume ivavo vakaita saizvozvo, vakatora mhou mbiri dzichiri kuyamwisa vakadzisunga pachikochikari vakapfigira mhuru dzadzo mudanga." 
1Samuel6:11 Vakaisa bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano chikochikari. Vakaisawo rimwe bhokisi raiva nembeva dzendarama nezvifananidzo zvamamota zvendarama. 
1Samuel6:12 Mhou idzi dzakati tande nomugwagwa chete ndokuramba dzakangoti nawo dzakananga kuBhetishemeshi dzikafamba dzichikuma. Asi hadzina kutsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe. Madzishe avaFirisitia akadzitevera kusvikira kumuganho neBhetishemeshi. 
1Samuel6:13 Izvozvo vanhu vokuBhetishemeshi vaingunokohwa koroni yavo mubani. Pavakatarisa vakaona bhokisi rechitenderano vakapembera vachifarira kuriona. 
1Samuel6:14 Chikochikari ichi chakasvikira kumunda waJoshuwa wokuBhetishemeshi chikasvikomira pamunda wake. Ipapo paiva noruware rukuru kwazvo. Vakatsemura mapuranga echikochikari ichocho vakapira mhou dziya kuna Tenzi sechibayiro chokupisa. 
1Samuel6:15 VaRevhi vakaburutsa bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano pamwechete nerimwe bhokisi raiva pedyo naro maiva nezvifananidzo zvendarama ndokuzviisa paziware riya. Musi iwoyo varume vomuBhetishemeshi vakapira zvibayiro zvokupisa nemipiro kuna Tenzi. 
1Samuel6:16 Madzishe echiFirisitia mashanu akaonawo izvozvi ndokubva adzokera zvavo kuEkironi musi wakareyo. 
1Samuel6:17 Izvi ndizvo zvifananidzo zvamamota endarama zvakatumirwa kuna Tenzi somupiro wokuripa mhosva navaFirisitia: chimwe chaimiririra Ashidhodhi, chimwe Gaza chimwe Ashikeroni, chimwe Gati, chimwe Eikroni." 
1Samuel6:18 Zvifananidzo zvembeva zvendarama zvakanga zvakakwaniranawo namaguta ose amadzishe mashanu avaFirisitia, ose ari maguta akavakirirwa tsvingo pamwechete nemisha yakanga isina tsvingo. Ziware riya, ravakaisa bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano ririko sechapupu nanhasi uno riri kwaJoshuwa wokuBhetishemeshi mumunda wake." 
1Samuel6:19 Asi Mwari akauraya vamwe varume vomuBhetishemeshi nokuti vakanga vadongorera mubhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano. Akauraya makumi manomwe avanhu pamakumi mashanu ezviuru. Vanhu vakachema nokuti Tenzi akanga arakatisa kuuraya vamwe vavo. 
1Samuel6:20 Varume vomuBhetishemeshi vakachemedzeka vachiti, “Ndianiko angafemerewo zvake kuva pana Tenzi, Mwari mutsvene iyeyu? Ko zvino toritumira kunaaniko kuti abve zvake kuno kwatiri?”" 
1Samuel6:21 Vakatumira nhume kuvagari vokuKiriatijearimu kundoti, “VaFirisitia vakadzora bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano. Dzikai kuno muritore mukwire naro kwenyu ikoko.”" 
1Samuel7:1 Varume vokuKiriatijearimu vakauya vakatora bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano vakaenda naro kumba kwaAbhinadhabhu pachikomo. Vakagadza mwana wake Ereazari kuti achengete bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano. 
1Samuel7:2 Bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano rakagara muKiriatijearimu kwenguva ndefu kubvira musi waraiswa ikoko. Rakasvitsa makore makumi maviri, vaIsiraeri vose vakachema kuna Tenzi." 
1Samuel7:3 Samueri akataurira vaIsiraeri vose achiti, “Kana mada zvokudzokera kuna Tenzi nomwoyo wose motorasa vamwari vasirivo pamwechete nezvifananidzo zvavamwari vanaAshitaroti zvamunazvo, muise mwoyo yenyu kuna Tenzi munamate iye oga. Iye achakununurai mumaoko avaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel7:4 Naizvozvo vaIsiraeri vakarasa vamwari ivavo vanaBhaari navanaAshitaroti vakanamata Tenzi chete. 
1Samuel7:5 Ipapo Samueri akazoti, “Unganidzai vaIsiraeri vose kuMizipa, ndigokunamatirai kuna Tenzi.”" 
1Samuel7:6 Nokudaro vakaungana kuMizipa vakateka mvura vakaidururira pasi pamberi paTenzi, vakatsanya musi iwoyoyo vakareurura vachiti, “Takatadzira Tenzi.” Samueri akatonga vaIsiraeri ari kuMizipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Kuzoti vaFirisitia vanzwa kuti vaIsiraeri vakanga vaunganidzana kuMizipa, madzishe echiFirisitia akakwira ikoko kundorwisa vaIsiraeri. Izvozvi pazvakasvikawo munzeve dzavaIsiraeri vakatya vaFirisitia." 
1Samuel7:8 VaIsiraeri vakati kuna Samueri, “Musamborega zvenyu kuramba muchitinamatira kuna Tenzi Mwari wedu kuti atinunure mumaoko avaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel7:9 Samueri akatora hwayana ichiri kuyamwa akaipira kuna Tenzi sechibayiro chinopiswa mutumbi wose. Samueri uyu akateterera kunamatira vaIsiraeri kuna Tenzi, Tenzi ndokumupindura." 
1Samuel7:10 Samueri achingunopira chibayiro ichocho kudaro, nokokowo vaFirisitia ndiye tutururu vhu kusvika kuzorwisa vaIsiraeri. Asi musi iwoyo Tenzi akatinhira nomutinhiro mukuru kwazvo nechepamusoro pavaFirisitia akavakangaidza, vaFirisitia vakadzvamutswa navaIsiraeri." 
1Samuel7:11 VaIsiraeri vakabudira vaFirisitia muMizipa vakadzingirirana navo vachivaita rumwe rumwe kuuraya nzira yose kusvikira munyasi meBhetikari. 
1Samuel7:12 Samueri akatora dombo akarimisa pakati peMizipa neSheni akaritumidza zita rokuti, “Dombo rerubatsiro” achiti, “Tenzi atibatsira kusvikira pari nhasi.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Nokudaro vaFirisitia vakakundwa vakarega kuzopindazve munyika yavaIsiraeri. Paupenyu hwose hwaSamueri ruoko rwaMwari rwairwisa vaFirisitia. 
1Samuel7:14 VaIsiraeri vakatorazve maguta avakanga vatorerwa navaFirisitia kubvira kuEkironi kusvikira kuGati. VaIsiraeri ava vakatorazve nyika yavo mumaoko avaFirisitia. Pakati pavaIsiraeri navaAmori paivawo norugare. 
1Samuel7:15 Samueri akatonga Isiraeri upenyu hwake hwose. 
1Samuel7:16 Gore negore aipota achishanyira Bhetieri neGirigari neMizipa achitonga Isiraeri munzvimbo dzose idzodzi. 
1Samuel7:17 Aizodzokera zvake kuRama nokuti ndokwaiva nomusha wake achitongawo mhosva dzavaIsiraeri ari ikoko. Akavakira Tenzi atari ikoko. 
1Samuel8:1 Kuzoti Samueri akwegura, akagadza vanakomana vake kuti vave vatongi veIsiraeri." 
1Samuel8:2 Dangwe racho aiva mukomana ainzi Joeri, wechipiri ari Abhiya, vaiva vatongi kuBheerishebha." 
1Samuel8:3 Asi vanakomana vake havana kutevedzera tsika dzababa vako. Asi kutoti vakatsauka mugwara racho vapindwa nomweya wokuda kupfuma nenzira dzisina kunaka. Vakagamuchira pfumbamuromo, vachirega kutonga zviri pamurao." 
1Samuel8:4 Ipapo vakuru vakuru vose veIsiraeri vakakokorodzana vakaenda kuna Samueri kuRama 
1Samuel8:5 vakasvikoti kwaari, “Chionaika imi makwegura. Uye chimwe nechichi ndechokuti vanakomana venyu havasi kutevedzera tsika dzenyu. Zvino chitisarudzirai mambo wokutitonga sezvakangoitawo mamwe marudzi ose.”"
