1Samuel8:6 Asi chichemo chavo chokuti, “Tisarudzirei mambo wokutitonga,” hachina kufadza Samueri, ndokubva anamata kuna Tenzi." 
1Samuel8:7 Tenzi akati kuna Samueri, “Gamuchira zvako zvose zvavari kukumbira nokuti haasiri iwe wavari kuramba, asi wavari kuramba chaiye kuti ave mambo wavo, ndini." 
1Samuel8:8 Sezvavaingoita kubvira pandakavaburitsa muIjipiti kusvikira pari nhasi zvokundiramba vachindonamata vamwe vamwari ndizvozviwo zvavava kuita kwauri. 
1Samuel8:9 Zvino gamuchira zvako chichemo chavo. Asi chete, nyatsovayambira chaizvo uvaisire pachena zvichaitwa namambo achavatonga.”" 
1Samuel8:10 Saizvozvo Samueri akarondedzera zvose zvaakanga audzwa naTenzi kuvanhu vaimukumbira mambo. 
1Samuel8:11 Akati, “Zvichaitwa namambo achakutongai ndezvizvi: achatora vana venyu achivaita varwi vengoro dzake dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo, vamwe vari vokumhanya vachitungamirira ngoro yake." 
1Samuel8:12 Achazvisarudzira vamwe kuti vaite vatungamiriri vake pachake vezvikwata zvina varwi chiuru vamwewo chavarwi makumi mashanu mashanu. Vamwe vachange vari vokurima nokukohwa mumunda make, nokugadzira zvombo zvake zvehondo nemidziyo yose yengoro dzake dzehondo." 
1Samuel8:13 Achatora vanasikana venyu achivapa basa rokugadzira mafuta okuzora anonhuhwirira nokubika chingwa nezvimwewo zvokudya. 
1Samuel8:14 Achatora minda yenyu yakanakisisa pamwechete neminda yemigirepisi neyemiorivhi achiipa zvake machinda ake. 
1Samuel8:15 Achakubvisisaiwo mutero wechegumi chakewo zvake chembesanwa dzenyu nechewaini achichipa makurukota ake namachinda ake. 
1Samuel8:16 Achatorawo zvake varanda venyu vechirume nevechikadzi, navana venyu majaya, namadhongi enyu kuti aitise basa rake." 
1Samuel8:17 Achatorawo mutero wechegumi pahwai nembudzi dzenyu. Iyemi pachenyu muchava varanda vake. 
1Samuel8:18 Panguva iyoyo muchazochema pamusana pamambo wenyu iyeyo wamunenge mambozvisarudzira iyemi pachenyu.” Asi Tenzi haakupindurei pazuva iroro. 
1Samuel8:19 Asi vanhu vakaramba kunzwa zvavakaudzwa naSamueri. Vakati, “Kwete! Tiri kuda kutongwa namambo" 
1Samuel8:20 kuti tiitewo samamwe marudzi ose aya, titongwewo namambo wedu iyeyo apote achititungamirira nokuzotirwirawo muhondo.”" 
1Samuel8:21 Samueri akati anzwa zvose zvakataurwa navanhu akandozvitaurirawo kuna Tenzi. 
1Samuel8:22 Tenzi akati kuna Samueri, “Gamuchira zvako chichemo chavo uvape mambo.” Samueri akaudza vaIsiraeri vose kuti, “Munhu wose ngaadzokere kuguta rokwake.”" 
1Samuel9:1 Kwaiva nomumwe murume wokwaBhenjamini ainzi Kishi mwanakomana waAbhieri mwanakomona waZerori mwanakomana waBhekorati mwanakomana waAfia wedzinza rokwaBhenjamini. Aiva munhu aizikanwa kwazvo. 
1Samuel9:2 Munhu iyeyu akanga ane mwanakomana wake ainzi Sauro akanga ari jaya rine chimiro chakanakisa kwazvo. PavaIsiraeri pakanga pasina mumwe munhu aikwanisa kuenzaniswa naye parunako. Aiva akapfuura vanhu vose kureba, vamwe vose vachingomirira mumapendekete ake." 
1Samuel9:3 Rimwe zuva madhongi aKishi, baba waSauro akarasika. Kishi ndokutaurira mwana wake Sauro achiti, “Tora mumwe muranda musimuke muende kundotsvaka madhongi.”" 
1Samuel9:4 Sauro akapfuura nomunyika yamakomo yokwaEfuremu, akapfuurawo nomudunhu rokuSharisha, asi haana kuawana. Akaendawo nomudunhu rokuShaarimu asi haana kuawana. Akazoendawo nomudunhu rokuZufu asi haana kuawana." 
1Samuel9:5 Sauro paakasvika kudunhu reZufu akati kumuranda wake waaiva naye, “Ngatichidzokai! Baba vangazodaro vakarega kufunga nezvamadhongi vakatozonetseka mumwoyo voshushikana nezvedu.”" 
1Samuel9:6 Muranda akamupindura achiti, “Muguta iri mune munhu waMwari, munhu anoremekedzeka. Zvose zvaanotaura zvinoitika. Zvino dai tikaendako, zvimwe angatiudze zvatiri kufambira.”" 
1Samuel9:7 Sauro akati kumuranda wake, “Hongu kuendako tingaende zvedu, asi tingandomupeiko? Chandinodariro ndechichi chokuti, chingwa chapera mutsapo dzedu. Hatina kana rechii chokupa munhu waMwari iyeyu. Chii chatinacho?”" 
1Samuel9:8 Muranda uyu ndokupindurazve Sauro achiti, “Tarisai muone, ndine mari shoma iyi inouremu hunokwana chidimbu chechina chemari yesirivha yemashekeri. Ndichaipa kune munhu waMwari kuti atiudze kwokuenda nako.”" 
1Samuel9:9 (Kare vaIsiraeri vaiti kana munhu oda zvokundobvunza kuna Mwari aiti, “Handei kumuoni,” nokuti ava kunzi muporofita mazuva ano, kare ainzi muoni.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Sauro akati kumuranda wake, “Zvakanaka, handei.”" 
1Samuel9:11 Saka vakaenda zvavo kuguta kwaiva nomunhu waMwari. Pavakanga vachikwira chikomo paiva neguta iroro, vakasangana navasikana vaiendawo kundoteka mvura, vakavati, “Ko muoni aripo here?”" 
1Samuel9:12 Ivo vakati, “Ee, aripo. Inga wani anotova pamberi penyu apa. Zvino kurumidzai. Auya nhasi muguta medu nokuti iye nhasi uno vanhu vachapira chibayiro kunzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira." 
1Samuel9:13 Mukangoti pindei muguta, muchamuwana asati akwira kunzvimbo yacho yakatunhumara yokuteurira kundodya nokuti vanhu havazotanga kudya asati asvikako zvaariye anofanira kutanga atombokomborera chibayiro, ndopachazodyawo vakakokwa. Kwiraiko zvenyu nokuti munobva mangomuwana izvozvi.”" 
1Samuel9:14 Saka vakabva vakwira kuguta. Pavakanga vava kupinda mukati meguta, onei Samueri hoyo ochingudzana navo achienda kunzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira." 
1Samuel9:15 Zuro racho, Sauro asati aendako, Tenzi akanga afanoudza Samueri kuti," 
1Samuel9:16 “Mangwana, panguva ino iyoyi ndichakutumira mumwe murume wokunyika yakwaBhenjamini. Unofanira kumuzodza kuti ave mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri. Ndiye achanunura vanhu mumaoko avaFirisitia nokuti ndakaona nhamo yavanhu vangu, ndikanzwawo kuchema kwavo.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Kuzoti Samueri aona Sauro, Tenzi akabvawo amuti, “Ndiyeyu murume wandakakuudza uyu! Iyeyu ndiye achatonga vanhu vangu.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Sauro akaenda kuna Samueri pasuo guru reguta akati, “Mungandiudzewo here kune imba yomuoni?”" 
1Samuel9:19 Samueri akapindura Sauro achiti, “Ndini muoni wacho. Chitungamirai tiende tose kunzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira nokuti iye nhasi uno muchadya neni. Ndichazokuregai zvenyu moenda mangwana mangwanani. Ndichakuudzaiwo nhuna dzemwoyo wenyu dzose." 
1Samuel9:20 Asi kana zviri zvamadhongi ako akarasika mazuva matatu apfuura chirega zvako kuzvinetsa nezvawo, nokuti akatowanikwa. Ko unoti chido chavanhu vose muIsiraeri muno chiri kupiko? Chiri pauri iyewe navose vemba yababa wako.”" 
1Samuel9:21 Sauro akapindura chiti, “Inga ini ndiri wokwaBhenjamini, dzinza rouko kwokupedzesera chaiko muIsiraeri? Ko mhuri yedu haisiri iyo here yokupedzesera mudzinza rokwaBhenjamini? Zvino zvamuri kutaura kwandiri izvi zvinorevei?”" 
1Samuel9:22 Samueri akaenda naSauro pamwechete nomuranda wake akapinda navo mumba huru akavapa zvigaro zvapamusorosoro kupfuura vamwe vose vakanga vakokwa vaikarosvika makumi matatu avanhu. 
1Samuel9:23 Samueri ndokuti kumubiki, “Chiuya nenyama yechirango iya yandakati uise payo yoga.”" 
1Samuel9:24 Saka mubiki uyu akandotora chidya, nyama yapamusoro pechidya akazvigadzika pamberi paSauro, Samueri ndokuti, “Zvaurikuona izvi zvagadzikwa pamberi pako zvanga zvakachengeterwa iwe. Idya zvako nokuti ndochirango chawanga wakachengeterwa kusvikira nguva ino iyi yakatarwa kuti udye pamwechete navanhu vakakokwa.” Naizvozvo Sauro akadya naSamueri musi iwoyo." 
1Samuel9:25 Pavakadzika kubva kunzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira kuya, vapinda Muguta, Samueri akataura naSauro ari padenga remba." 
1Samuel9:26 Vakafumomuka mambakwedza Samueri akadaidza Sauro padenga remba paya achiti, “Chimuka ndikuperekedze.” Sauro akamuka vakabva vapinda munzira vose vari vaviri." 
1Samuel9:27 Vachingunofamba kudaro voda kusvika kwokupedzesera kweguta, Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Taurira muranda ambofanotungamira zvake. Kana achinge atungamira iwe wombomira pano, kwechinguva ndigokutaurira shoko raMwari.”" 
1Samuel10:1 Zvino Samueri akatora chinu chamafuta akadururira mumusoro waSauro akamutsvoda akati, “Handiti Tenzi, izvozvi atokuzodza achikugadza kuti uve mutungamiriri wavanhu vake vaIsiraeri? Ndiwe uchatonga vanhu vaTenzi uchivanunurawo kuvavengi vavo vari munharaunda yavo. Chiratidzo chauchaziva nacho kuti Tenzi akuzodza achikugadza kuti uve mutungamiriri wavanhu vake ndechichi chokuti," 
1Samuel10:2 paunobva pano pandiri iye nhasi uno uchandosangana navarume vaviri pedyo neguva raRakeri kumuganho wenyika yokwaBhenjamini kuZeriza vachakutaurira kuti, ‘Madhongi awakanga uchitsvaka akawanikwa.’ Asi zvino baba vako havasisiri kunetseka nezvemadhongi vava kutotambudzika mumwoyo pamusoro pako vachiti, ‘Ndoita waaniko nezvemwana wangu?’" 
1Samuel10:3 Kana wabva ipapo uchienda mberi uchasvika napamuoku wokuTabheri. Ipapo uchasangana navarume vatatu vanenge vachienda kuna Mwari kuBhetieri. Mumwe achange akatakura mbudzana nhatu, mumwe akatakura zvingwa zvitatu, mumwewo achange akatakura chigubhu chematehwe chewaini." 
1Samuel10:4 Vachakukwazisa vagokupa zvingwa zviviri. Iwe unofanira kuzvigamuchira. 
1Samuel10:5 Uchazosvikawo kugomo rinonzi Gibheatierohimu ikoko kune kachikwata kavarwi vechiFirisitia. Wava kupinda muguta iroro uchasangana nedungwerungwe ravaporofita vachiburuka kunzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira vachitungamirirwa navanhu vanenge vachiridza madimbwa nengoma nenyere nezvipendani, vachiporofita." 
1Samuel10:6 “Mweya waTenzi achabva auyawo zvine simba guru kwazvo pauri iwe ugoporofita pamwechete navo. Iwe uchasanduka ukava mumwe munhu akasiyana nezvauri izvi. 
1Samuel10:7 Ukange waona zviratidzo izvozvi zvaitika uite zvaunoona kuti zvinodiwa kuitwa nokuti Mwari anewe. 
1Samuel10:8 Zvino iwe unozofanotungamira kuGirigari. Ini ndichakutevera kuzopira mipiro yokupisa nokupirawo zvibayiro zvokuwadzana. Unondimirirako kwamazuva manomwe kudzamara ndasvika ndigokuratidza zvokuita.” 
1Samuel10:9 Sauro paakafuratira Samueri oenda zvake, Mwari akamupa mumwe mwoyo zviratidzo zvose izvi zvikabva zvaitika zuva iroro." 
1Samuel10:10 Pavakasvika kuGibhea boka ravaporofita rakabvawo rasangana naye. Mweya waMwari wakabva wauyawo paari zvine simba guru kwazvo ndokubva ava kuporofita. 
1Samuel10:11 Vose vaimbomuziva kare pavakamuona achiporofita kudaro navaporofita vakabvunzana vachiti, “Ko mwanakomana waKishi apindwa nei? Sauro avawo mumwe wavaporofita nhai?”" 
1Samuel10:12 Mumwewo murume weko akati, “Ko Baba vavo ndiani? Munoti iwo mweya wokuporofita unobva kunaaniko?” Ndokusaka kwakabva kwava netsumo yokuti, “Sauro avawo mumwe wavaporofita nhai?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Sauro paakapedza kuporofita akaenda kunzvimbo yepo yakatunhumara yokuteurira. 
1Samuel10:14 Baba mudiki vaSauro vakabvunza iye Sauro nomuranda wake kuti, “Makanga muri kupiko?” Sauro ndokuti, “Takanga tichitsvaka madhongi. Asi patakaona kuti haasi kuwanikwa taashaya takazoenda kuna Samueri.”" 
1Samuel10:15 Baba mudiki vaSauro vakati, “Tipirewoka tinzwe zvamakaudzwa naSamueri?”" 
1Samuel10:16 Sauro akapindura baba mudiki wake achiti, “Akanyatsotizivisa pachena kuti madhongi akawanikwa.” Asi nenyaya yezvoumambo yaakanga audzwa naSamueri, hapana kana chaakavataurira." 
1Samuel10:17 Samueri akakokera kuti vanhu vaungane kuna Tenzi kuMizipa akataurira vaIsiraeri achiti," 
1Samuel10:18 “Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri, ‘Ndakaburitsa vaIsiraeri muIjipiti ndikakununurai mumaoko avaIjipiti nomumaoko amadzimambo ose aikubatai zvakaipa.’" 
1Samuel10:19 Asi imi nhasi uno maramba Mwari wenyu anokununurai munjodzi dzenyu nomunhamo dzenyu dzose. Asi imi mati, ‘Kwete, itotigadzirai mambo wokutitonga!’ Saka zvino chiuyai pana Tenzi muri dzinza nedzinza, imba nemba.”" 
1Samuel10:20 Samueri paakapinza madzinza ose avaIsiraeri mudariro, dzinza rokwaBhenjamini ndorakabva rabatwa nechin'ange." 
1Samuel10:21 Vakazopinza dzinza rokwaBhenjamini mudariro imba nemba, imba yokwaMatiri ikabatwa nechin'ange. Vakazopinza vemba yokwaMatiri mudariro mumwechete mumwechete, chin'ange chikabata Sauro mwanakomana waKishi. Asi zvino pavakati vamutsvake vakamushaya." 
1Samuel10:22 Saka vakabvunzazve kuna Tenzi vachiti, “Ko munhu iyeyo ambouya here?” Tenzi ndokupindura achiti, “Ehe auya. Akahwanda zvake mukati memikwende.”" 
1Samuel10:23 Vakamhanya vakandomutora ikoko. Paakamira pakati pavanhu akanga akapfuura vanhu vose kureba, vamwe vose vachingomirira mumapendekete make." 
1Samuel10:24 Samueri akati kuvanhu vose, “Mamuonaka munhu akasarudzwa naTenzi? Hakuna mumwe angaenzaniswe naye.” Vanhu vose vakadaidzira vachiti, “Mambo! Hekani waro, ngazvigare zvakadaro!”" 
1Samuel10:25 Samueri akataurira vanhu mitemo inofanira kutevedzwa munyika inenge ichitongwa namambo. Akanyora bumbiro remitemo iyoyi akandoisa bhuku racho pana Tenzi. Samueri akati vanhu vose vachienda zvavo kumisha yavo. 
1Samuel10:26 Sauro akaendawo kumusha kwake kuGibhea. Akaendawo navamwe varume, mvumba chaidzo dzokurwa vakanga vabatwa mwoyo naMwari." 
1Samuel10:27 Asi vamwewo vanhu vasina namaturo ese vakati, “Munoti iyeyu akadai ndiye angatiponese iyeyu?” Vakamushora vakarega kumupa zvipo. Asi Sauro haana zvake zvaakataura." 
1Samuel11:1 Nahashi muAmoni akakwira kuJabheshigireadhi akarikomba. Varume vose vomuJabheshi vakati kuna Hahashi, “Madii zvenyu kuita chitenderano nesu tigokushandirai?”" 
1Samuel11:2 Asi Nahashi muAmoni akavati, “Ndingatozoita chitenderano nemi kana ndichinge ndatotanga ndaita izvi zvokuti ndokusvukunurai mose maziso enyu okurudyi ndigonyadzisa vaIsiraeri vose nazvo.”" 
1Samuel11:3 Vakuru vakuru vomuJabheshi vakati kwaari, “Tipeiwo mazuva manomwe tiwanewo nguva yokumbotumira nhume munyika yose yeIsiraeri. Kana kwashayika wokuzotinunura ndopatichazviisa zvedu mumaoko enyu.”" 
1Samuel11:4 Nhume dzacho padzakasvika kuGibhea kwaSauro dzakasvitsa shoko iri munzeve dzavanhu, vanhu ndokuita zhwerendende kuchema." 
1Samuel11:5 Izvozvo Sauro akanga achibva zvake kumunda achitotinha nzombe dzake. Sauro ndokuti, “Ko vanhu vari kuchema, vari kuchemei?” Vakamutaurira nyaya dzakanga dzasvika nenhume dzokuJabheshi." 
1Samuel11:6 Sauro paakazvinzwa Mweya waMwari wakauya paari nesimba guru kwazvo akaviruka kwazvo nehasha. 
1Samuel11:7 Akabaya nzombe mbiri ndokudzicheka-cheka, ndokutumira nhindi dzenyama nenhume munyika yose yeIsiraeri achiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvichaitwa nzombe yomunhu wose anenge asina kubuda naSauro naSamueri!” Vanhu vakatya Tenzi vakabuda vose pamwechete." 
1Samuel11:8 Sauro akavaronganisa kuBhezeki. Paiva navarwi vokwaIsiraeri mazana matatu ezviuru vokwaJudha vari zviuru makumi matatu. 
1Samuel11:9 Vakaudza nhume dziya dzokutumwa dziya kuti, “Munondoti kuvarume vokuJabheshigireadhi, ‘Mangwana, panguva yorudziyakamwe muchange matonunurwa.’ ” Nhume idzi padzakasvikotaurira varume vokuJabheshi izvozvi vakafara kwazvo." 
1Samuel11:10 Varume vokuJabheshi ndokuti kuvaAmoni, “Mangwana tichazviisa zvedu mumaoko enyu mugoita zvenyu zvamunoda nesu.”" 
1Samuel11:11 Ramangwana racho, Sauro akakamuranisa varwi vake akavaisa muzvikwata zvitatu. Kwava kuda kuti ngwee kuedza vakabva vaverera vati vhu kusvika mumatendhe evaAmoni vakavakatakazha kusvikira panguva yorudziyakamwe. Vakanga vapunyuka vakaitiswa rumwe rumwe kupararana zvokushaya kana vaviri zvavo vakakwanisa kusara vari vose." 
1Samuel11:12 Vanhu ndopavakati kuna Samueri, “Ndivanaani vaya vaitadza kutaura vachiti, ‘Tingatongwe naSauro here isu?’ Ngavaunzwe pano varume ivava tivapfuudze.”" 
1Samuel11:13 Asi Sauro akati, “Hapana anofanira kuurayiwa nhasi uno nokuti iye nhasi uno Tenzi anunura nyika yeIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel11:14 Samueri akazoti kuvanhu, “Handei kuGirigari tindopemberera kugadzwa kwakaitwa mambo.”" 
1Samuel11:15 Saka vanhu vose vakaenda kuGirigari vakagadza Sauro pachigaro chake choumambo pana Tenzi kuGirigariko. Vakapira mipiro yokuwadzana vari ikoko pana Tenzi, Sauro navaIsiraeri vose vakaita mabiko vakapembera vachifara zvikuru." 
1Samuel12:1 Samueri akati kuvaIsiraeri vose, “Chinzwai munzwe, ndakateerera zvose zvamakanditaurira ndikakugadzirai mambo wokukutongai." 
1Samuel12:2 Zvino chinzwai, mambo ndiye ava kukutungamirirai. Ini ndakwegura, ndachena musoro, muri kungozvionerawo navana vangu vari mukati menyu. Kubvira ndichiri jaya kusvikira pari nhasi, ndanga ndichikutungamirirai." 
1Samuel12:3 Ini ndiri pano wandakatadzira ngaareve pachena pano pana Tenzi nomuzodzwa wake. Pane wandakatorera mombe yake here? Aripo here wandakatorera dhongi rake? Pane wandakabiridzira here? Ndiani akambobatwa zvakaipa neni? Aripo here ane pfumbamuromo yake yandakagamuchira kuzvipofomadza zvangu meso nayo? Kana aripo ngaandiudze pachena, ndinoda kuzviripa.”" 
1Samuel12:4 Ivo vakati, “Hapana chamakatibiridzira. Hamuna kumbotibata zvakaipa, kana kutora chimwe chinhu chomunhu.”" 
1Samuel12:5 Samueri ndokuti kwavari, “Tenzi ndiye achava chapupu kwamuri, muzodzwa wake ari chapupu nhasi uno kuti hapana chomunhu chamaona ndinacho.” Ivowo vakati, “E-e ndiye chapupu.”" 
1Samuel12:6 Samueri akati kuvanhu, “Tenzi ndiye akasarudza Mosesi naAroni vakaburitsa madzibaba enyu munyika yeIjipiti." 
1Samuel12:7 Saka zvino chimbomirai ndikutsanangurirei pano pana Tenzi zvinhu zvakaitwa naTenzi zvokuvanunura, zvaakaitira imi namadzibaba enyu." 
1Samuel12:8 Jakobho paakaenda kuIjipiti, madzibaba enyu akazobatwa zvakaipa navaIjipiti vakazochema kuna Tenzi. Tenzi akavatumira Mosesi naAroni vakaburitsa madzibaba enyu muIjipiti akavaunza kuzogara muno." 
1Samuel12:9 Asi vakazokanganwa Tenzi Mwari wavo, iye akagovati kuche mumaoko aSisera mukuru mukuru wehondo yaJabhini mambo weHazori nomumaoko avaFirisitia nomumaoko amambo weMoabhu vakarwisa madzibaba enyu." 
1Samuel12:10 Madzibaba enyu akachema kuna Tenzi achiti, ‘Takatadza nokuti takasiyana nemi Tenzi tikanamata vamwe vamwari vanaBhaari nanaAshitaroti. Zvino dai mukachitinunurawo zvenyu mumaoko avavengi vedu tigokunamatai imi.’" 
1Samuel12:11 Tenzi akatuma Jerubhaari naBharaki kwouya Jefuta neni Samueri vakakununurai mumaoko avavengi venyu vokumativi ose mukagara zvenyu norunyararo. 
1Samuel12:12 Asi pamakaona kuti Nahashi, mambo wevaAmoni auya kuzokurwisai makanditi, ‘Chatava kuda apa kutongwawo namambo, hapana chimwe,’ asi Tenzi ari iye mambo wenyu." 
1Samuel12:13 “Zvino mambo wamakada ndiyeyu, wamakakumbira. Chionaika Tenzi agadza mambo wokukutongai." 
1Samuel12:14 Kana mukatya Tenzi muchimunamata nokumuteerera musingarambe kuchengeta mitemo yaTenzi, kana imi mose namambo anokutongai mukati kwati naTenzi Mwari wenyu, zvichakunakirai." 
1Samuel12:15 Asi kana mukarega kuteerera Tenzi, moramba zvenyu kuchengeta mitemo yaiye Tenzi, iye Tenzi noruoko rwake achakurangai neshamhu yake sezvaakaita madzibaba enyu." 
1Samuel12:16 Zvino chimbomirai zvenyu muone chimwe chinhu chikuru chichaitwa naTenzi imi muchiona. 
1Samuel12:17 Handiti iye zvino chirimo ichi nguva yokukohwa koroni? Ndichakumbira Tenzi kuti anayise mvura ine mabhanan'ana. Ndopamuchaziva mugoonawo kuti makaita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo pana Tenzi zvamakakumbira kuti munodawo mambo wenyu pachenyu.” 
1Samuel12:18 Samueri akabva anamata kuna Tenzi. Tenzi ndokunayisa mvura ine mabhanan'ana zuva rakarero. Vanhu vose vakatya Tenzi naSamueri zvikuru kwazvo. 
1Samuel12:19 Vanhu vose vakati kuna Samueri, “Tinamatireiwo isu varanda venyu kuna Tenzi Mwari wenyu kuti tirege kufa nokuti nokuzvikumbirira kwatakaita mambo isu takatopamhidzira uipi pane zvimwe zvitadzo zvedu zvose.”" 
1Samuel12:20 Samueri akati kuvanhu, “Chiregai kunge muchatya. Kutadza kwose uku makatotadza kare. Asi chavapo ndechichi, chiregai kunge muchatsaukana naTenzi. Chinamatai Tenzi nomwoyo wenyu wose," 
1Samuel12:21 murege kutsauka nokuti kudaro kutevera zvifananidzo zvisina maturo, zvisingabatsire, zvisinganunure nokuti hazvina kana chazvinazvo mazviri." 
1Samuel12:22 Chandinodariro ndechichi chokuti Tenzi haamborasa vanhu vake pamusana pezita rake guru nokuti chido chake zvake Tenzi kuti akuitei vanhu vake pachake. 
1Samuel12:23 Uyewo kana ndiri ini hazvimbofa zvakaitika kuti nditadzire Tenzi nechitadzo chokurega kukunamatirai, ndichikudzidzisai zvakanaka zvakarurama." 
1Samuel12:24 Chenyu imi, kutya Tenzi, mumunamate nomwoyo wose, makatendeka nokuti munofanira kuyeuka zvinhu zvikuru zvaakakuitirai." 
1Samuel12:25 Asi kana mukaramba muchiita zvakaipa muchaparadzwa mose iyemi pamwechete namambo wenyu.” 
1Samuel13:1 Sauro akanga ava namakore... paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga Isiraeri kwamakore... namaviri. 
1Samuel13:2 Sauro akasarudza zviuru zvitatu zvavarume muIsiraeri. Zviuru zviviri zvaivavo zvaiva naSauro kuMikimashi munyika yamakomo yeBhetieri. Vamwe vacho chiuru chimwechete vaingewo vaina Jonatani kuGibhea rokwaBhenjamini. Vamwe vose akavati vadzokere kwavo vaende zvavo kumisha yavo. 
1Samuel13:3 Jonatani akakurira chikwata chavarwi vavaFirisitia chaiva kuGibhea, vaFirisitia ndokuzvinzwa. Sauro ndokuridza hwamanda munyika iyi yose achitiwo, “VaHebheru vose ngavanzwe zviri kuno!”" 
1Samuel13:4 VaIsiraeri vose ndokunzwa kuti Sauro akarwisa chikwata chavarwi vavaFirisitia uyewo kuti vaFirisitia vatova nedaka navaIsiraeri. Vanhu vakakokorodzwa kuna Sauro kuGirigari. 
1Samuel13:5 VaFirisitia vakaunganidzana kuti vachirwisa vaIsiraeri. Vaiva nezviuru makumi matatu engoro dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo zviuru zvitanhatu, varwi vavo vachinge jecha rokumahombekombe kwegungwa kuwanda. Vakakwira vakadzika matendhe avo kuMikimashi kumabvazuva kweBhetiavheni." 
1Samuel13:6 Varume vomuIsiraeri pavakaona kuti vava parumano, (izvozvo vakanga zvino vakokeranwa) vakahwanda mumapako nomudzininga nomumatombo nomumakomba nomudzinhare." 
1Samuel13:7 Vamwe vaHebheru vakayambuka Jorodhani vakapinda munyika yokwaGadhi neGireadhi. Sauro akanga achiri kuGirigari vose vaaiva navo vakanga vachidedera nokutya. 
1Samuel13:8 Akamirira Samueri mazuva manomwe, nokuti ndiyo nguva yakanga yatarwa naSamueri. Asi Samueri haana kunge asvika kuGirigari. Vanhuwo vakanga voita rumwe rumwe kusiya Sauro." 
1Samuel13:9 Sauro ndokuti, “Uyai nechibayiro chomupiro wokupisa pano pandiri pamwechete nechibayiro chemipiro yokuwadzana.” Sauro akabva apira mupiro wokupisa." 
1Samuel13:10 Achangoti pedzei kupira mupiro wokupisa iwoyo, Samueri ndiye vhu. Sauro akaenda kundomuchingura nokumukwazisa." 
1Samuel13:11 Samueri akati, “Ko ndochii ichochi chawaita?” Sauro akati, “Pandakaona varwi vangu vava kuita rumwe rumwe kundisiya, imiwo usina kuuya mumazuva atakanga tatarirana kuuya uye hondo yavaFirisitia yaungana kuMikimashi," 
1Samuel13:12 ndakati, ‘Zvino vaFirisitia vachadzamara vondivinga kuGirigari kuno ndisati ndakumbira rubatsiro kuna Tenzi,’ ndozvakandisvitsa pakupira mupiro wokupisa.”" 
1Samuel13:13 Samueri ndokuti kuna Sauro, “Waita zvoupenzi, hauna kuchengeta mutemo waTenzi, Mwari wako waakakupa. Dai wanga wauchengeta Tenzi angadai azotsigisa umambo hwako hweIsiraeri kuti huvepo narini wose." 
1Samuel13:14 Asi zvino umambo hwako hauchaenderera mberi. Tenzi atotsvaka mumwe murume wepamwoyo pake. Saka Tenzi atomusarudza kuti ave mutungamiriri wavanhu vake nokuti iwe hauna kuchengeta zvawakanzi naTenzi uite.” 
1Samuel13:15 Samueri akasimuka kuGirigari ndokuenda kuGibhea kwaBhenjamini. Sauro akaverenga vanhu vaiva naye vakasvika mazana matanhatu avarume. 
1Samuel13:16 Sauro nomwanakomana wake, Jonatani, pamwechete navanhu vavaiva navo vakanga vari kuGibhea kwaBhenjamini, izvozvo vaFirisitia vakanga vakadzika matendhe avo kuMikimashi." 
1Samuel13:17 Mumatendhe evaFirisitia makabuda zvikwata zvitatu zvavarwi vokundopamba. Chimwe chakaenda kuOfura kudunhu reShuaru," 
1Samuel13:18 chimwe chikwata chikananga kuBhetihoroni. Chimwewo chikananga kumuganhu wakatarisana nenyika yebani reZebhoimu chakananga kurenje. 
1Samuel13:19 Izvozvo munyika yose yeIsiraeri makanga musina kana mhizha yokupfura simbi nokuti vaFirisitia vaityira kuti vaHebheru vangadaro vakazvigadzirira mapakatwa namapfumo. 
1Samuel13:20 MuIsiraeri wose aitodzika kuvaFirisitia kundorodzerwa muromo wegejo rake kana badza rake kana demo rake kanawo jeko rake. 
1Samuel13:21 Kuti muromo wegejo rake kana kuti badza rake rirodzwe aitobvisiswa mari yesirivha yamashekeri inorema magiramu masere. Kutiwo demo rirodzwe kana kuti mhayo yokutinhisa zvipfuwo iiswe muromo wesimbi aitobvisa mari yesirivha yamashekeri inorema magiramu mana. 
1Samuel13:22 Naizvozvowo musi wehondo iyi pavanhu vaiva naSauro naJonatani hakuna kana nomumwe wavo aiva nebakatwa kana pfumo zvaro muchanza. Asi Sauro nomwana wake, Jonatani ndivo chete vaiva nazvo." 
1Samuel13:23 Chimwe chikwata chavarwi vechiFirisitia chakandogaririra chiri kumupata wokuMikimashi. 
1Samuel14:1 Mumwe musi Jonatani mwanakomana waSauro akati kujaya raitakura zvombo zvake zvehondo, “Uya tiende kune chikwata chavarwi vechiFirisitia.” Asi Jonatani haana kuudza baba vake." 
1Samuel14:2 Izvozvo Sauro akanga achigara kumucheto kweguta reGibhea, munyasi momuti womupomegiraneti kuMigironi aiva navarume vaikaroda kusvika mazana matanhatu avanhu." 
1Samuel14:3 Abhiya aipfeka hanzu yeefodhi. Abhiya uyu aiva mwanakomana waAhitubhu mukoma nomunun'una naIkabhodhi, mwanakomana waFinehasi mwanakomana waEri mupristi waTenzi wokuShiro. Asi vanhu havana kunge vaziva kuti Jonatani akanga aenda." 
1Samuel14:4 Zvino pamupata ipapo paida kupfuura napo Jonatani kuti aende kwaiva nechikwata ichi chavarwi vechiFirisitia paiti uku zidombo uku zidombo. Rimwe racho rainzi Bhozezi, rimwewo richinzi Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Rimwe racho raiva nechokuchamhembe kwomupata iwoyo kwakatarisana neguta reMikimashi, rimwewo nechokumaodzanyemba kwakatarisana neGebha." 
1Samuel14:6 Jonatani akati kujaya riya raitakura zvombo zvake zvehondo, “Uya tiende kune chikwata chavarwi ava vasina kudzingiswa. Dzimwe nguva Tenzi angawane chaangatiitire nokuti hapana chingarambidze Tenzi kuponesa vanhu achishandisa vanhu vazhinji kana vashoma.”" 
1Samuel14:7 Uya aitakura zvombo zvake akati, “Itai zvenyu chamunenge mafunga mumwoyo menyu. Kana ndirini ndinemi, zvamunenge mangosarudza nemwoyo wenyu ndozvandinoda.”" 
1Samuel14:8 Jonatani ndokuti, “Chiregai tiende kwavari tindomira pavanotiona." 
1Samuel14:9 Kana vakatiti, ‘Miraipo, tiuye ikoko,’ isu ticharamba timire patinenge tiri torega kukwira tichienda kwavanenge vari." 
1Samuel14:10 Asi kana vakati, ‘Kwirai kuno kwatiri,’ isu tinobvawo takwirako nokuti ndicho chichava chiratidzo chedu chokuti Tenzi atovaisa mumaoko edu.”" 
1Samuel14:11 Ipapo vose vari vaviri vakaenda vakandomira pavaikwanisa kuonekwa nechikwata chiya chavarwi vavaFirisitia. VaFirisitia vakati, “Onai onai, vaHebheru vaya vava kudzumbunuka zvino mumakomba mavanga vakahwanda.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Varwi vaya vakadaidzira kuna Jonatani nouya aimutakurira zvombo zvake zvehondo vachiti, “Uyai kuno tikudzidzisei.” Jonatani ndokuti kune wokumutakurira zvombo zvake zvehondo, “Nditevere nokuti Tenzi atovaisa mumaoko eIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel14:13 Jonatani akakwira achiita zvokukambaira, mutakuri wezvombo zvake zvehondo akati sika-sika mushure kutevera. Jonatani akavarakatisa, mutakuri wezvombo zvake zvehondo achitevera achivapupura." 
1Samuel14:14 Pakuuraya vaFirisitia ikoku kwokutanga kwakaitwa naJonatani nomutakuri wezvombo zvake zvehondo uyu kwakafa varume vaikarosvika makumi maviri. Vakaurayirwa pakanzvimbo kanoda kukwana muforo mumwechete. 
1Samuel14:15 Hondo yose yavaFirisitia yakazengezana kutya. Kwaiti vapamatendhe avo navaiva musango nezvimwe zvikwata zvavarwi nezvevarwi vokundopamba vose vakadedera nokutya. Nyika yakandengendeka, kukava nokutya kukuru kwazvo kwaibva kuna Mwari." 
1Samuel14:16 Nharirire dzaSauro dzaiva kuGibhea kwaBhenjamini dzakatarisa onei hondo yose yevaFirisitia rangove besanwa kutiza. 
1Samuel14:17 Sauro akati kuvanhu vaakanga anavo, “Verengai varwi muone kuti asipo ndiani.” Vakavaverenga, wanei kuti Jonatani nomutakuri wezvombo zvake zvehondo havapo." 
1Samuel14:18 Sauro akati kuna Ahiya, “Uya neefodhi nokuti ndiye aitakura efodhi muIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel14:19 Sauro achitaura nomupristi kudaro bongozozo rokumatendhe evaFirisitia rakabva ratonyanya kwazvo. Sauro akati kumupristi, “Chiregai zvenyu zvamuri kuita.”" 
1Samuel14:20 Sauro navanhu vose vaaiva navo vakaungana vakaenda kundorwa. Izvozvo vaFirisitia vakanga vachitobayana pachavo, kukaita manyongori akaipisisa kwazvo." 
1Samuel14:21 Kunyange vamwe vaHebheru vaimbova navaFirisitia vakanga vauyawo navo kuhondo vakapandukira vaFirisitia vakaenda kudivi revaIsiraeri vaiva naSauro naJonatani. 
1Samuel14:22 Zvino vaIsiraeri vose, varume vakanga vakahwanda munyika yamakomo yaEfuremu vakanzwa zvichinzi vaFirisitia vaya vava mushishi rokutiza, vakabva vapindawo muhondo vakadzingirirana navo kwazvo." 
1Samuel14:23 Naizvozvo Tenzi akanunura vaIsiraeri zuva iroro. Hondo iyoyi yakarwiwa kudzamara kupfuura kuBhetiavheni. 
1Samuel14:24 VaIsiraeri vose varume vakasuruvara kwazvo musi iwoyo nokuti Sauro akanga apikira vanhu mhiko achiti, “Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anenge angowana chaanodya zuva risati radoka ini ndisati ndatsividza vavengi vangu.” Saka hakuna kana munhu akaisa chinhu mukanwa." 
1Samuel14:25 Vanhu ivava vose vakasvika mune rimwe sango makanga mune uchi hwaiva pachena. 
1Samuel14:26 Vanhu pavakapinda musango iroro onei mune uchi huchitoita zvokuerera zvahwo. Asi hakuna kana munhu akahunomborera mukanwa kuhudya nokuti vanhu vaitya mhiko iya. 
1Samuel14:27 Asi Jonatani haana kunge anzwa kuti baba vake vakanga vatsidzira vanhu nemhiko. Akasveerera nomudonzvo waaiva nawo mumaoko, ndokunyika kwokupedzesera kwawo muzinga rouchi, ndokuhunomborera mukanwa akabva abengenuka meso." 
1Samuel14:28 Asi mumwe wavo akamuti, “Baba venyu vanyatsosimbisisa kwazvo kutsidzira vanhu nemhiko vachiti, ‘Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anenge angowana chaanodya nhasi uno.’ ” Vanhu vakaziya nenzara." 
1Samuel14:29 Jonatani ndokuti, “Inga baba vangu vapa vanhu mutoro chaiwo. Asi ini tarisai muoneka, ndatobengenuka meso nokuravira kwandangoita tuuchi utwu." 
1Samuel14:30 Ko kutozoti dai nhasi vanhu vanga vanyatsodya zvavo zvavapamba kuvavengi vavo, zvavatoita zvavo zvokuwanikidza kudai iye zvino vaFirisitia vangadai vasina kunge vatoparadzwa zvakanyanya here?”" 
1Samuel14:31 Musi iwoyo vakarakatisa vaFirisitia kubvira kuMikimashi kudzamara kuAijaroni, asi vanhu vakaziya nenzara." 
1Samuel14:32 Vanhu vakawirirana kutora zvakanga zvapambwa. Vakatora hwai nemombe nemhuru vachidziurayira pose pose pasi, vakadya nyama isina kusinzwa ropa." 
1Samuel14:33 Vamwe vakataurira Sauro kuti, “Zvamunoonaka, vanhu vari kutadzira Tenzi nokudya nyama isina kusinzwa ropa.” Iye ndokuti, “Ndokusatendekaka ikoko. Chikungurutsirai zidombo guru pano pandiri.”" 
1Samuel14:34 Sauro akabvawo ati, “Chipararirai nomuvanhu muvati, ‘Munhu wose ngaauye nemombe yake kana kuti hwai yake kuno kwandiri mudzibayire pano, mozodya zvenyu murege kutadzira Tenzi nokudya nyama isina kusinzwa ropa.’ ” Usiku ihwohwo munhu wose akaendako nemombe yake vakadziurayira ikoko." 
1Samuel14:35 Sauro akavakira Tenzi atari. Ndiyo atari yake yokutanga kuvakirawo Tenzi. 
1Samuel14:36 Sauro akazoti, “Ngatirondei vaFirisitia nousiku huno, tivapambe, tirege kusiya kana nomumwe wavo ari mupenyu.” Ivo vakati, “Itai zvenyu zvamunenge mada.” Asi mupristi akati, “Ngatimbonzwai kuna Mwari.”" 
1Samuel14:37 Sauro akabvunza kuna Mwari kuti, “Ndoronda here vaFirisitia kana kuti kwete? Ko, muchavaisa mumaoko evaIsiraeri here?” Asi musi iwoyo Mwari haana kumupindura." 
1Samuel14:38 Sauro akati, “Uyai pano imi mose vatungamiriri vavanhu muongorore mugoona kuti zvechitadzo ichi zvauya sei nhasi." 
1Samuel14:39 Chokwadi ndinopika naTenzi mupenyu, iye mununuri weIsiraeri, kunyange zvazvo akava Jonatani mwana wangu chaiye, anotopafa chete.” Asi pavanhu vose ivavo hapana nomumwe akamupindura chinhu." 
1Samuel14:40 Sauro akati kuvaIsiraeri vose, “Imi mirai uku, ini nomwana wangu Jonatani timirewo uku.” Vanhu vakati kuna Sauro, “Itai zvamunenge muchida.”" 
1Samuel14:41 Naizvozvo Sauro akati kuna Tenzi Mwari wavaIsiraeri, “Ndiisireiwo pachena zvechokwadi zvacho.” Jonatani naiye Sauro vakabva vabatwa nechin'ange chikasiya vamwe vose." 
1Samuel14:42 Sauro ndokuti, “Itai chin'ange pakati pangu ini nomwanakomana wangu Jonatani.” Jonatani ndokubva abatwa." 
1Samuel14:43 Sauro akati kuna Jonatani, “Ndiudze zvawaita?” Jonatani akamuti, “Ndangoti nomborei tuuchi nomuromo wetsvimbo yangu. Ndinofanira zvangu kufa.”" 
1Samuel14:44 Sauro akati, “Mwari ngaandione kana iwe Jonatani ukarega kufa!”" 
1Samuel14:45 Asi vanhu vakarambira Sauro vachiti, “Munoti Jonatani afe? Anunura Isiraeri zvakakura zvikadai! Hazvimboitika! Tinopika naTenzi mupenyu, haambofanira kana kubatwa-batwa zvake kunyange ruvhudzi rwake nokuti ashanda naMwari nhasi.” Naizvozvo vanhu vakanunura Jonatani akarega kufa." 
1Samuel14:46 Sauro akabva aregera kuronda vaFirisitia. VaFirisitia ndokubva vadzokerawo kwavo. 
1Samuel14:47 Sauro akati agara umambo hwomuIsiraeri, akarwisa vavengi vake vose kumativi ose vaiti: vaMoabhu nevaAmoni nevaEdhomu kwoti madzimambo okuZobha kwozouya vaFirisitia. Kwose kwose kwaaienda aisiya avashura mare." 
1Samuel14:48 Aiva gamba chairo mukurwa, akakurira vaAmareki akanunura Isiraeri mumaoko avanhu vaivapamba." 
1Samuel14:49 Vana vaSauro vakomana vaiva Jonatani naIshivhi naMarikishua, vasikanawo vaiva vaviri, wedangwe ainzi Merabhi, muduku achinzi Mikari." 
1Samuel14:50 Mudzimai waSauro ainzi Ahinoamu mwana waAhimaazi. Mutungamiriri wehondo yake ainzi Abhuna mwanakomana waNeri, babamudiki waSauro." 
1Samuel14:51 Baba waSauro ainzi Kishi. Neri baba waAbhuna akaberekwa naAbhueri. 
1Samuel14:52 Paupenyu hwose hwaSauro paigara pakarwiwa chete zvakaomarara navaFirisitia. Iyewo Sauro aiti akaonawo munhu ane simba, kana wose aiva nechivindi, aibva amupinza muhondo yake." 
1Samuel15:1 Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Ndakatumwaka ini naTenzi kuti ndikuzodze, kuti uve mambo wavanhu vake vaIsiraeri. Saka zvino chinzwa zvarehwa naiye Tenzi." 
1Samuel15:2 Zvanzi naTenzi, Samasimbaose, ‘Ndinoda kuranga Amareki nezvavakaitira Isiraeri zvokuvagariridza munzira pavaibva kuIjipiti." 
1Samuel15:3 Zvino enda urwise vaAmareki unyatsoparadza zvose zvavanazvo, usavanzwire tsitsi, asi unofanira kutouraya kubvira kuvarume kusvikira kuvakadzi nokubvira pamwana kudzamara kurusvava ruchiri kuyamwa, kubvirawo pamombe kusvikira kuhwai uyewo kubvira pangamera kudzamara kudhongi.’ ”" 
1Samuel15:4 Nokudaro Sauro akakoka vanhu kuti vaungane akavaverenga paTeraimu vakakwana mazana maviri ezviuru zvavarume vokufamba netsoka kwouyawo vokwaJudha gumi rezviuru zvavarume. 
1Samuel15:5 Sauro akaenda kuguta revaAmareki akasvikoti vamwe vaite zvokuhwandira mumupata. 
1Samuel15:6 Sauro akaruma vaKeni nzeve achiti, “Ibvai pano budai mukati mevaAmareki, ndingadaro ndikakubatanidzirai nevaAmareki. Ndinodaro nokuti makaitira vaIsiraeri vose tsiye nyoro pavaibva kuIjipiti.” VaKeni vakabva vabva mukati mevaAmareki." 
1Samuel15:7 Sauro akabva akurira vaAmareki kubvira kuHavhira kusvikira kuShuru, kumabvazuva kweIjipiti." 
1Samuel15:8 Akabata Agagi mambo wevaAmareki ari mupenyu. Asi vamwe vanhu vose akanyatsovauraya namapakatwa. 
1Samuel15:9 Asi iye Sauro navanhu vake vakaitira Agagi tsiye nyoro vakarega kumuuraya. Vakaregawo kuuraya hwai nemombe dzakanga dzakanakisisa, nehwayana nezvigondora zvakanga zvakakora nezvose zvakanga zvakanaka izvozvo zvose havana kana kuzviparadza asi zvimwe zvose zvaiva nechinoshoreka pazviri zvakanga zvisina maturo ndizvo zvavakanyatsoparadza chaizvo." 
1Samuel15:10 Shoko raTenzi rakasvika kuna Samueri rikati," 
1Samuel15:11 “Ndava kutokungura kuti dai zvangu ndisina kugadza Sauro umambo nokuti zvokunditevera asiya, atondifuratira arega zvake kuteerera mitemo yangu.” Zvakatsamwisa Samueri akararirochema usiku hwose kuna Tenzi." 
1Samuel15:12 Samueri akafumomuka mangwanani kundoonana naSauro. Samueri akaudzwawo kuti, “Sauro anga ari kuKarimeri. Mufungeka akazvidzikira shongwe ikoko ndokusimudzira zvake rwendo rwake odzika akananga kuGirigari.”" 
1Samuel15:13 Samueri akazosvika kuna Sauro, Sauro akakwazisana navo achiti, “Tenzi ngaakukomborerei! Ndakaita zvakataurwa naTenzi.”" 
1Samuel15:14 Samueri ndokuti, “Ko chandiri kunzwa kuti bhererere hadzisi hwai here? Ko chiri kunzwika kukuma hadzizi mombe here?”" 
1Samuel15:15 Sauro akati, “Dzakauya navanhu kubva kuvaAmareki nokuti mombe nehwai idzodzi dzakanakisisa kwazvo havana kudziuraya vachiitira kuzobayira Tenzi, Mwari wenyu zvibayiro. Asi zvimwe zvose takanyatsozviparadza.”" 
1Samuel15:16 Samueri ndokuti kuna Sauro, “Chinyarara! Rega ndikutaurire zvandakaudzwa naTenzi usiku hwapfuura.” Iye akavati, “Ee taurai zvenyu.”" 
1Samuel15:17 Samueri akati, “Kunyange zvazvo waizviona sokunge munhu pasina asika ndiwe mutungamiriri wamadzinza evaIsiraeri. Tenzi akakuzodza achikugadza umambo hwomuIsiraeri." 
1Samuel15:18 Tenzi ane basa raakakutuma. Akati, ‘Enda undotsakatisa vatadzi ava vaAmareki uvarwise kusvikira vapera kuti nho.’" 
1Samuel15:19 Wakagoregererei kuteerera zvakanzi naTenzi uite? Ko wakabhururukira zvinhu zvokupamba sei, uchitadzira Tenzi nechakaipa chakadaro?”" 
1Samuel15:20 Sauro akapindurawo Samueri achiti, “Ko inga ndakaita wani zvakanzi naTenzi zviitwe. Ndakaitaka ini basa randakatumwa naTenzi. Ndakangouya naAgagi mambo weAmareki asi ndakatsakatisa vamwe vaAmareki vose." 
1Samuel15:21 Asi vanhu vakatoraka mombe nehwai idzi pazvinhu zvaiva zvapambwa. Vakatora zvaiva zvakanakisisa kwazvo pazvinhu zvakanga zvakaturirwa kuna Mwari kuti zviparadzwe kuti vazopira izvozvo kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu kuGirigari.”" 
1Samuel15:22 Samueri ndokutiwo, “Tenzi anofarira here mipiro yokupisa kana kuti zvibayiro? Handiti Tenzi anotofarira kuti izwi rake riteererwe? Chinzwa! Kuteerera kuri nani pane kupira chibayiro, kuva unonzwa kuri nani pane kupira mafuta ehondohwe;" 
1Samuel15:23 nokuti kupanduka chitadzo chimwechetecho nokushopera, kuzvitutumadzawo chiri chimwecho nouipi nokunamata zvifananidzo. Zvawaramba kuteerera Tenzi, naiyewo akurambawo paumambo.”" 
1Samuel15:24 Sauro akati, “Inga ndakatopara chitadzo nokuti ndakatyora mutemo waTenzi, ndakatadzawo kuchengeta mashoko enyu pamusana pokuti ndakatya vanhu, nokuteerera kwandakaita zvavaireva." 
1Samuel15:25 Saka zvino ndinokumbirisawo ndiregerereiwo chitadzo changu, tidzokere tose kwakare ndindonamata Tenzi pakare.”" 
1Samuel15:26 Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Handiende newe ini nokuti wakaramba shoko raTenzi, naiyewo Tenzi akurambawo paumambo hwomuIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel15:27 Zvino Samueri paakangoti furatirei oda kuenda, Sauro ndiye dzvi kumubata, hanzu ikabva yabvaruka." 
1Samuel15:28 Samueri ndokumuti, “Tenzi abvarurawo umambo hwomuIsiraeri kwauri nhasi uno, akahupa mumwe wako ari nani panewe." 
1Samuel15:29 Uyewo iye Mbiri yeIsiraeri haanyepi, chaanenge ataura ndichocho, haasanduke-sanduke nokuti haasiri munhu, munhu anosanduka-sanduka iye haadaro.”" 
1Samuel15:30 Sauro akati, “Ndakaita chitadzo. Asi dai ukandinyarawo ukandiremekedzawo zvako pana makurukota avanhu vangu napamberi peIsiraeri tidzokere tose ndindonamata Tenzi, Mwari wako.”" 
1Samuel15:31 Saka Samueri akadzokera naSauro, Sauro akandonamata Tenzi." 
1Samuel15:32 Samueri akati, “Ndiunzirei pano Agagi mambo wevaAmareki.” Agagi akauyapo achifara zvake. Izvozvo Agagi aiti, “Zvorufu hapachisina.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Asi Samueri akati, “Bakatwa rako raisiya vakadzi vasisina vana. Saizvozvo amai vako vava kusarawo pakati pavakadzi vasisina mwana.” Samueri akaita Agagi kanyama kanyama pana Tenzi kuGirigari." 
1Samuel15:34 Samueri akaenda kuRama, asi Sauro akaenda kumusha kwake kuGibhea rokwaSauro." 
1Samuel15:35 Samueri haana kumbozoonanazve naSauro kusvikira kufa kwake. Asi Samueri akachema Sauro, uku Tenzi achitokungura kuti dai zvake asina kumbogadza Sauro umambo hwomuIsiraeri." 
1Samuel16:1 Tenzi akati kuna Samueri, “Uchasvika riniko uchingochema Sauro iwe uchiona zvako kuti ndamuramba kuti ave mambo weIsiraeri? Zadza nyanga namafuta ndikutume uende kuna Jese muBheterehemu nokuti ndazviwanira mambo mukati mavana vake.”" 
1Samuel16:2 Samueri akati, “Ndingagoenda sei? Sauro akazvinzwa anondiuraya.” Tenzi ndokuti, “Tora tsiru mudanga uende naro unoti iwe, ‘Ndauya kuzopira chibayiro kuna Tenzi.’" 
1Samuel16:3 Zvino iwe ukoke Jese kuchibayiro, ndichakuratidza zvokuita. Unozofanira kundizodzera wandinenge ndakuudza nezita.”" 
1Samuel16:4 Samueri akaita zvaakanga audzwa naTenzi, akaenda kuBheterehemu. Vakuru vakuru vomuguta iri vakauya kuzochingurana naye vachidedera nokutya. Vakuru ava vakati, “Ko kwakanaka here?”" 
1Samuel16:5 Samueri akati, “Aiwa kwakanaka zvako. Ndauya kuzopira chibayiro kuna Tenzi. Zvichenurei tiende tose kuchibayiro.” Samueri akachenura Jese navanakomana vake akavakoka kuchibayiro." 
1Samuel16:6 Pakusvika kwavakaita, Samueri akatarisa Ereabhu akazviti nechomumwoyo, “Chokwadi uyu ari pana Tenzi ndiye muzodzwa wake.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Asi Tenzi akati kuna Samueri, “Usatarise chimiro chake kana mhumhu wake nokuti ndamuramba. Chikonzero ndechokuti maonero angu ini Tenzi akasiyana namaonero omunhu, nokuti munhu anotarisa munhu maziso, asi ini Tenzi ndinotarisa mumwoyo.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Jese akadaidza Abhinadhabhu akati apfuure napana Samueri. Samueri akati, “Kana naiyeyuwo Tenzi haana kumusarudza.”" 
1Samuel16:9 Jese akati Shama apfuurewo napo. Samueri akati, “Kunyangewo naiyeyu Tenzi haana kumusarudza.”" 
1Samuel16:10 Jese akati vana vake vakomana vose vari vanomwe vapfuure napaiva naSamueri. Asi Samueri akati kuna Jese, “Tenzi haana kumbosarudza ivava.”" 
1Samuel16:11 Samueri akazoti kuna Jese, “Vari pano ava ndivo vanakomana vako vose here?” Jese akapindurawo achiti, “Kune mumwe gotwe racho, asi zvino ari kufudza hwai.” Samueri akati kuna Jese, “Tumai munhu andomutora nokuti hatimbogara pakudya asati asvika.”" 
1Samuel16:12 Nokudaro akatumira munhu akauya naye. Wakanga akati tsvukurukei aine maziso anoyevedza ane chimiro chakanaka kwazvo. Tenzi ndokuti, “Simuka uzodze iyeyu ndiyeyu wacho.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Samueri akatora nyanga izere mafuta akamuzodza pakati pavakoma vake. Mweya waTenzi wakabvawo wauya zvine simba guru kwazvo pana Dhavhidhi kubvira musi iwoyo zvichienda mberi. Samueri akasimuka ndokudzokera zvake kuRama. 
1Samuel16:14 Zvino Mweya waTenzi wakabva pana Sauro, ndokubva otambudzwa nomweya wakaipa wakabva kuna Tenzi." 
1Samuel16:15 Varanda vaSauro vakati kwaari, “Chionaika pava nomweya wakabva kuna Mwari uri kukutambudzai." 
1Samuel16:16 Changamire. Dai zvenyu mukati isu varanda venyu, iyesu vokukushandirai, tikutsvakirei munhu anonyatsogona kuridza dimbwa wokuti kana mweya wakaipa wakabva kuna Tenzi uchinge wauya pamuri apote achiriridza imi mova zvenyu nani.”" 
1Samuel16:17 Sauro akati kuvaranda vake, “Nditsvakirei zvenyu munhu anonyatsogona kuridza wacho muuye naye kwandiri.”" 
1Samuel16:18 Mumwe muranda akapindura achiti, “Mufunge zvenyu, ndakaona mumwe mwanakomana waJese muBheterehemu shasha chaiyo yokuridza, munhu ane chivindi, mvumba chaiyo yokurwa hondo. Inyanzvi pakutaura, murume ane chimiro chakanaka kwazvo. Tenzi anaye.”" 
1Samuel16:19 Naizvozvo Sauro akatumira nhume kuna vaJese achiti, “Nditumire kuno mwana wako mukomana ari kufudza hwai.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Jese akatora dhongi ndokuritakudza chingwa nechigubhu chewaini nembudzana, akati mwana wake Dhavhidhi aigire Sauro." 
1Samuel16:21 Dhavhidhi akasvika kuna Sauro akatanga kumushandira. Sauro akamuda kwazvo akabva ava munhu wokumutakurira zvombo zvake zvehondo. 
1Samuel16:22 Sauro akatumira Jese shoko rokuti, “Regai zvenyu Dhavhidhi arambe achindishandira nokuti ini ndamuda.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Zvino kwaiti kana Sauro agarwa nomweya wakaipa uya waibva kuna Mwari, Dhavhidhi aitora dimbwa mumaoko oriridza, Sauro aibva afefeterwa omboita nani, mweya wakaipa uya wobva paari." 
1Samuel17:1 VaFirisitia vakaunganidza hondo dzavo kuSoko guta rokwaJudha kuti varwe hondo vakadzika matendhe pakati peSoko neAzeka muEfesidhamimu. 
1Samuel17:2 Izvozvo Sauro akanga aunganawo navarwi veIsiraeri vadzikawo matendhe avo mubani reEra vatoronganirana kuchirwisa vaFirisitia. 
1Samuel17:3 VaFirisitia vakanga vamire mugomo kune rumwe rutivi, vaIsiraeri vamirewo mugomo kune rumwewo rutivi bani riri pakati pavo." 
1Samuel17:4 Zvino kumatendhe evaFirisitia, kwakabuda imwe shasha yokuGati yainzi Goriati yakanga yakareba mamita anenge oda kusvika matatu." 
1Samuel17:5 Akanga akadzika nguwani yendarira mumusoro akapfeka chidemautare chendarira chokuzvidzivirira nacho chairema makirogiramu ainge oda kusvika makumi mashanu ana manomwe. 
1Samuel17:6 Uyezve akanga ana mapatisi endarira pamipimbiri, akatanhika pfumo rendarira pamapfudzi." 
1Samuel17:7 Rwiriko rwepfumo rake rwakanga rwakaita somutandariko wechinoshandiswa nomuruki. Chese yesimbi yepfumo rake yairema makirogiramu manome. Mutakuri wenhoo yake aiva mberi kwake. 
1Samuel17:8 Akamira akadaidzira kuhondo dzavaIsiraeri achiti, “Mavingei kutoronganirana hondo kudai? Hezvinoka ini ndiri muFirisitia, imi muri varanda vaSauro. Chizvisarudzirai munhu murege auye kuno kwandiri." 
1Samuel17:9 Kana akagona kurwa neni akandiuraya, isu tichava varanda venyu. Asi ndikange ndamukurira, ndikamuuraya imi ndimi muchava varanda vedu vokutishandira.”" 
1Samuel17:10 MuFirisitia uyu ndokuti, “Nhasi ndiri kushora hondo dzavaIsiraeri. Ndipei munhu, ndirwe naye.”" 
1Samuel17:11 Sauro navaIsiraeri vose vakati vachinzwa izvi zvaitaurwa nomuFirisitia uyu vakakangaidzwa nazvo vakatya zvikuru. 
1Samuel17:12 Dhavhidhi aiva mwanakomana womumwe muEfurati wokuBheterehemu kwaJudha ainzi Jese aiva navana vakomana vasere. Panguva dzaSauro, Jese uyu, akanga akwegura uye ava namakore akawanda." 
1Samuel17:13 Asi vana vake, vakomana vakuru vatatu, ndivo vakaenda kuhondo naSauro. Mazita avana vavo vakomana vatatu vokuenda kuhondo ndeaya: kunoti Eriabhu, dangwe rake, achiteverwa naAbhinabhabhu, kwozoti Shama, ariye wechitatu." 
1Samuel17:14 Dhavhidhi ndiye aiva gotwe. Vakuru vacho vatatu vaya vakaenda naSauro. 
1Samuel17:15 Dhavhidhi aipota achibva kwaSauro achimbondofudza hwai dzababa vake kuBheterehemu. 
1Samuel17:16 MuFirisitia uya akapedza mazuva makumi mana achiuya ipo paya kuzozvionesa mangwanani namanheru oga oga. 
1Samuel17:17 Jese akati kuna Dhavhidhi mwanakomana wake, “Igira vakoma vako makirogiramu gumi embesanwa dzakakangwa idzi nezvingwa izvi gumi ukurumidze kuenda nazvo kumatendhe kuvakoma vako." 
1Samuel17:18 Endawo nezvimedu izvi gumi zvechizi undopa mutungamiriri wavo wechiuru chavarwi. Enda undoona kuti vakoma vako vakadii, utivigirewo zvimwe zvinobva kwavari." 
1Samuel17:19 Sauro navakoma vako navaIsiraeri vose vari kurwisana navaFirisitia kubani reEra izvozvi.” 
1Samuel17:20 Dhavhidhi akafumomuka akasiya hwai dziine mumwe wokudzichengeta. Akatora mbuva iya woenda sokuudzwa kwaangakanga aitwa naJese. Akasvika pamatendhe izvozvo varwi vakanga vachitobuda vachienda kundoronganirana hondo, ngondo ichirira." 
1Samuel17:21 VaIsiraeri navaFirisitia vakanga zvino vamirisana chikwata nechikwata chavarwi zvakatarisana. 
1Samuel17:22 Dhavhidhi akasiya zvinhu zvake mumaoko omuchengeti wezvinhu, akamhanyira kwaiva navarwi akandobvunzana upenyu navakoma vake." 
1Samuel17:23 Paaitaura kudaro murume uya, shasha yavaFirisitia yainzi Goriati, akabuda mukati mehondo yechiFirisitia ndokupamhidza kutaura twake twuya. Dhavhidhi ndokunzwa achitaura." 
1Samuel17:24 Varwi vose zvavo veIsiraeri pavakamuona vakamutiza vachitya kwazvo. 
1Samuel17:25 Varwi veIsiraeri vakataurirana vachiti, “Muri kuona here murume uyo? Uyu ndiye munhu ari kuzovirimira Isiraeri kwazvo. Munhu anenge amuuraya, mambo achamupa upfumi hwakawanda kwazvo nokumupawo mukunda wake. Achatiwo mhuri yokwake igare zvayo isina chainomanikidzwa kuita muIsiraeri.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Dhavhidhi akati kuvarume vaiva vamire naye, “Munhu anenge auraya muFirisitia uyu achibvisa nyadzi pavaIsiraeri achaitirweiko nokuti ndiani muFirisitia iyeyu asina zvake kudzingiswa anobva atodai kudhadhairira hondo yaMwari mupenyu?”" 
1Samuel17:27 Ivavowo vakamupindura zvimwechetezvo vakati, “Ndizvo zvichaitirwa anenge amuuraya.”" 
1Samuel17:28 Zvino paitaura Dhavhidhi navamwe varume vaya, mukoma wake mukuru Eriabhu akazvinzwa akamuvirukura nehasha achiti, “Ko wavingei kuno? Hwai dziya shoma wadzisiya nani musango ndinoziva kushaya matyira kwako nokuipa mwoyo kwako, izvozvi kuuya zvako kuzoyeva chete hondo iri kurwiwa.”" 
1Samuel17:29 Dhavhidhi akapindura achiti, “Ko zvino ndatadzei? Kazwi kamwechete chete kandati nditaure?”" 
1Samuel17:30 Akatendeuka kubva kuno uya obvunza mumwewo zvimwechetezvo, vanhu vakapindura zvimwechetezvo." 
1Samuel17:31 Mazwi akataurwa naDhavhidhi paakanzwikwa navanhu vakaasvitsa kuna Sauro. Sauro ndokumutumira nhume kuti auye. 
1Samuel17:32 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Ngaparege kuwana munhu anorasa mwoyo pamusana pomunhu uyu. Ini muranda wenyu ndichaenda ndindorwisa muFirisitia uyu.”" 
1Samuel17:33 Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Haungakwanisi kundorwisana nomuFirisitia uyu. Uri mwana muduku iwe. Iye murume wezvokurwa chikuriro chake chose.”" 
1Samuel17:34 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Ini muranda wenyu ndaimbova mufudzi wehwai dzababa vangu. Kwaiti kana kukauya bere kana shumba ikabata hwayana mudanga," 
1Samuel17:35 ndaiironda ndigoiuraya ndichinunura hwayana yacho mukanwa mayo. Yaiti ikange yandimukira ndoiti hetu nendebvu dzayo ndoirova ndoiuraya. 
1Samuel17:36 Ini muranda wenyu ndaiuraya zvose shumba kana bere, kana naiyeyuwo muFirisitia uyu asina kudzingiswa achavawo sezvikara izvozvo zvaari kutovirimira zvake hondo yaMwari mupenyu.”" 
1Samuel17:37 Dhavhidhi akati, “Tenzi nyakumbondinunura mukanwa meshumba nebere achandinunurawo mumaoko omuFirisitia iyeyu.”. Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Enda zvako Tenzi ngaave newe.”" 
1Samuel17:38 Sauro akapfekedza Dhavhidhi hanzu dzokurwisa nadzo dzake iye pachake. Akamupfekedza nguwani yendarira mumusoro akamupfekedzawo chidemautare chokuzvidzivirira nacho. 
1Samuel17:39 Dhavhidhi akakwaikira bakatwa rake pahanzu dzake dzokurwisa nadzo. Dhavhidhi zvaakanga asina kujairirana nadzo akatadza kufamba nadzo. Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Handikwanise kuenda nadzo nokuti handina kudzijaira.” Dhavhidhi akabva adzipfekenura." 
1Samuel17:40 Akatora tsvimbo yake mumaoko ndokusarudza tunhombo twakaurungana tushanu mukakova ndokutuisa muhomwe yomunhava yake ndokunanairira muFirisitia uya aine chimviriri chake mumaoko. 
1Samuel17:41 MuFirisitia uya akabva auya chaizvo kuna Dhavhidhi ikoko, wokumutakurira nhoo uya ari mberi kwake." 
1Samuel17:42 MuFirisitia akatarisa akaona Dhavhidhi akamushora nokuti aingovawo zvake jaya rakatsvukuruka rine chimirowo zvacho chakanaka. 
1Samuel17:43 MuFirisitia akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Ndiri mbwa here yaunouya wakabatira shamhu? MuFirisitia akarengerera achishurikidzira Dhavhidhi rushambwa runobva kuna vamwari vake.”" 
1Samuel17:44 MuFirisitia akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Uya kwandiri! Nyama yako ndichaipa kushiri dzedenga nokumhuka dzesango.”" 
1Samuel17:45 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kumuFirisitia, “Iwe uri kundivinga nebakatwa nepfumo nemharu, asi ini ndiri kukuvinga muzita raTenzi Samasimbaose, Mwari wehondo dzavaIsiraeri waunoshora." 
1Samuel17:46 Nhasi uno Tenzi achakuisa mumaoko angu, ndichakuuraya ndokudimura musoro. Iye nhasi uno wakare ndichapa zvitunha zvehondo yavaFirisitia kushiri dzedenga nokuzvikara zvapasi pano zvigozivikanwa pasi pose kuti muIsiraeri muna Mwari." 
1Samuel17:47 Uyewo kuti gungano iri rose rizive kuti Tenzi haanunure vanhu nebakatwa kana nepfumo nokuti hondo iri mumaoko aTenzi. Atokuisai mumaoko medu.” 
1Samuel17:48 MuFirisitia uyu akabva amuka wokanyaira kuvinga Dhavhidhi. Dhavhidhi akakasika akadididzawo kundosangana nomuFirisitia uya munhandare yokurwa. 
1Samuel17:49 Dhavhidhi akapinza ruoko munhava yake akatora kanhombo akakavheyesa nechimviriri ndokukobora muFirisitia pahuma. Dombo ndokubva rati vido kunyura muhuma yake. MuFirisitia uya ndokubva awira pasi nouso. 
1Samuel17:50 Dhavhidhi akakurira muFirisitia nechimviriri nekabwe; akakobora muFirisitia akamuuraya asi Dhavhidhi akanga asina bakatwa mumaoko. 
1Samuel17:51 Dhavhidhi akamhanya akasvikomira pamuFirisitia uya ndokuti bakatwa raGoriati wee kuriburitsa mumuhara maro. Akamupupura ndokumudimura musoro naro. VaFirisitia pavakaona kuti shasha yavo yafa vakabva vati ware kutiza. 
1Samuel17:52 Varwi vokwaIsiraeri novokwaJudha vakabva vanyandukawo vachiitawo ruzha vodzingirirana navaFirisitia kudzamara vava kuda kusvika kuguta uye kusuo guru reGati nereEkironi. Ruzhinji rwavaFirisitia rwakanga rwakuvara rwakaita murakatira kufa munzira kubvira kuSharaimu kusvikira kuGati neEkironi. 
1Samuel17:53 VaIsiraeri pavakadzoka vabva kundodzingirira vaFirisitia vakapamba matendhe avo. 
1Samuel17:54 Dhavhidhi akatora musoro womuFirisitia uyu akaenda nawo kuJerusaremu. Asi zvombo zvake akazviisa mutendhe rake. 
1Samuel17:55 Sauro, paakaona Dhavhidhi achienda kundorwa nomuFirisitia uya akabvunza Abhuneru mutungamiriri mukuru wehondo kuti, “Nhai Abhuneru, mukomana uyu, mwana waani?” Abhuneru ndokuti, “Mambo! Ndinopika chaizvo, handimboziva ini!”" 
1Samuel17:56 Mambo akati, “Bvunza kuti jaya iri mwana waani.”" 
1Samuel17:57 Pakadzoka Dhavhidhi kundouraya muFirisitia uya, Abhuneru akamutora akaenda naye kuna Sauro, musoro womuFirisitia uri mumaoko ake." 
1Samuel17:58 Sauro akamubvunza kuti, “Nhai zijaya, uri mwana wani?” Dhavhidhi akati, “Ndiri mwana womuranda wenyu Jese vokuBheterehemu.”" 
1Samuel18:1 Pakapedza Dhavhidhi kutaura naSauro, pakabva pamuka ushamwari chaihwoihwo hwapamwoyo pakati paJonatani naDhavhidhi. Jonatani akamuda sokuda kwaaizviita iye pachake." 
1Samuel18:2 Sauro akamutora zuva iroro akamurambidza kudzokera kumusha kwababa vake. 
1Samuel18:3 Jonatani akaita chitsidzirano naDhavhidhi pamusana pokuti aimuda sokuda kwaaizviita iye pachake. 
1Samuel18:4 Jonatani akabvisa gemenzi rake raaiva akapfeka, akapa Dhavhidhi nechidemataure chokuzvidzivirira nacho muhondo kunyangewo nebakatwa rake nouta hwake nebhande rake." 
1Samuel18:5 Dhavhidhi aibudirira kupi nokupi zvako kwaainge atumwa naSauro. Saurowo ndokubva amuita mutungamiriri wavarwi vehondo. Izvi zvakafadza vanhu vose namakurukota aSauro. 
1Samuel18:6 Pavakanga vachidzokera kumusha, Dhavhidhi abva mukuuraya muFirisitia uya, vakadzi vakabuda mumaguta ose eIsiraeri vachiimba vaine vamwe vaitamba kuzochingura mambo Sauro vaine ngoma, vachipembera kufara vaine zvimwewo zvairidzwa." 
1Samuel18:7 Vakadzi ava vachidairana vachipembera kufara vachiti, “Sauro wakauraya zviuru asi Dhavhidhi makumi namakumi ezviuru.”" 
1Samuel18:8 Izvi hazvina kufadza Sauro, akatsamwa kwazvo nezvaitaurwa. Akati, “Heya vava kutopa zvavo Dhavhidhi makumi namakumi ezviuru nhai? Ini vachindipa zviuru chete? Chavasara kumupa zvino ipapa chii, umamboka chete?”" 
1Samuel18:9 Kubvira musi iwoyo Sauro akabva avakuitira Dhavhidhi shanje. 
1Samuel18:10 Ramangwana racho mweya wakaipa wakabva kuna Mwari ukawira Sauro ukamupengesa mumba make imomo. Dhavhidhi akanga achiridza dimbwa samazuva ose, izvozvo Sauro pfumo riri mumaoko." 
1Samuel18:11 Sauro akakanda Dhavhidhi pfumo achiti regai ndimubayirire naro kumadziro, Dhavhidhi akaita zvokurinzvenga ruviri rwose." 
1Samuel18:12 Sauro akanga ava kutya Dhavhidhi nokuti Tenzi akanga aina Dhavhidhi, asiya Sauro." 
1Samuel18:13 Nokudaro Sauro akaendesa Dhavhidhi kure naye akamuita mutungamiriri wechiuru. Dhavhidhi ndiye aitungamirira vanhu vacho. 
1Samuel18:14 Aibudirira mune zvose zvaaiita nokuti Tenzi aiva naye. 
1Samuel18:15 Sauro paakaona kuti Dhavhidhi ari kubudirira zvikuru kwazvo, akamutya." 
1Samuel18:16 Asi vaIsiraeri vose novokwaJudha vaimuda nokuti aivatungamirira. 
1Samuel18:17 Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Chinzwa, pane mukunda wangu Merabhu ndichakupa zvangu kuti ave mukadzi wako, ndokunge chete waita chivindi chokundirwirira hondo dzaTenzi,” nokuti Sauro aiti, “Chiregai ini ndirege kubata ropa rake achiurayiwa zvake navaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel18:18 Dhavhidhi akapindurawo Sauro achiti, “Ndiri aniwo zvangu ini kana iyowo mhuri yedu nemba yokwababa wangu muIsiraeri kuti ndinziwo mukuwasha wamambo?”" 
1Samuel18:19 Asi panguva yainge Merabhu, mukunda waSauro aifanira kupiwa kuna Dhavhidhi akabva apiwa kuna Adhirieri muMehorati kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel18:20 Mikari mukunda waSauro akadanana naDhavhidhi vanhu vakazvisvitsawo kuna Sauro, akafadzwa nazvo." 
1Samuel18:21 Sauro akazviti mumwoyo, “Regai ndichimupa zvangu iyeyu. Ndiye wondomuteya naye kuitira kuti aurayiwe navaFirisitia.” Naizvozvo Sauro akataurira Dhavhidhi rwechipiri kuti, “Zvazvinoka, wochiva zvako mukuwasha wangu.”" 
1Samuel18:22 Sauro akasimbisa kurayira makurukota ake achiti, “Taurirai Dhavhidhi muchivande kuti, ‘Onaka iwe, mambo ari kufadzwa newe, uye makurukota ake ose anokuda. Zvino chiva zvako mukuwasha wamambo.’ ”" 
1Samuel18:23 Makurukota aSauro akataurira Dhavhidhi shoko iri. Dhavhidhi akati, “Heya munoti chinhu chidiki kuva mukuwasha wamambo nhai, pangu panowo iyeni murombo ndakadai?”" 
1Samuel18:24 Makurukota aSauro akamutaurira kuti, “Ndozviri kutaurwa naDhavhidhi izvi.”" 
1Samuel18:25 Sauro ndokuti, “Zvamuchaudza Dhavhidhi ndezvizvi, ‘Mambo haana mhosva zvake nezvokusweropiwa roora. Chaanongoda chete kupiwa zana rezvikanda zvapamberi zvavaFirisitia kuti atsividze vavengi vake.’ ” Chaivavarirwa naSauro chaicho, chaiva chokuti aurayise Dhavhidhi navaFirisitia." 
1Samuel18:26 Makurukota ake paakataurira Dhavhidhi shoko iri Dhavhidhi akafadzwa nazvo kuti avewo mukuwasha wamambo. Nguva yakanga yatemwa isati yambopera," 
1Samuel18:27 Dhavhidhi navarwi vake vakasimuka vakaenda vakandouraya vaFirisitia mazana maviri. Dhavhidhi akauya nezvikanda zvavo zvapamberi zvikapiwa kuna mambo zviri zvose zvazvo kuitira kuti ave mukuwasha wamambo. Sauro akamupa Mikari mukunda wake kuti ave mukadzi wake. 
1Samuel18:28 Asi Sauro paakaona nokunzwa kuti Tenzi ana Dhavhidhi, kuti Isiraeri yose yaimuda," 
1Samuel18:29 Sauro akatonyanya kutya Dhavhidhi. Naizvozvo Sauro akaramba ava muvengi waDhavhidhi. 
1Samuel18:30 Vatungamiriri vehondo dzavaFirisitia vaiuya kuhondo, pose pavaiendako Dhavhidhi ndiye aibudirira zvakanyanya kupfuura vamwe vatungamiriri vose vokwaSauro zita rake rikava nomukurumbira kwazvo." 
1Samuel19:1 Sauro akataurira mwanakomana wake Jonatani namakurukota ake ose kuti vanofanira kuuraya Dhavhidhi. Asi Jonatani, mwana wake aifarira Dhavhidhi kwazvo." 
1Samuel19:2 Jonatani akanyevera Dhavhidhi kuti, “Baba vangu, Sauro vanoda kukuuraya. Saka iwe uzozvichenjerera mangwanani undohwanda pamwe pausingaonekwe, ugarepo." 
1Samuel19:3 Ini ndichabuda ndigoenda kundomira zvangu nababa wangu mumunda maunenge uri. Ndichakurukura nababa vangu nezvako, kana paine chandinenge ndanzwa ndichakutaurira.”" 
1Samuel19:4 Jonatani akakurukura nababa wake Sauro achirumbidza Dhavhidhi achiti kwavari, “Dai mambo marega zvenyu kukanganisira muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi nokuti iye haana kumbokutadzirai, uyewo nokuti zvaanga achikuitirai, zvakanaka kwazvo." 
1Samuel19:5 Chandinodariro ndechokuti akaisa upenyu hwake munjonzi yorufu akauraya muFirisitia uya, Tenzi akanunura chaizvo Isiraeri yose. Inga imi makazvionawo wani mukapembera kufara. Seiko muchida kutadzira munhu asina mhosva, muchida kuuraya Dhavhidhi pasina chikonzero?”" 
1Samuel19:6 Sauro akateerera zvaitaurwa naJonatani akabva apika achiti, “NaTenzi mupenyu chaiye, haambofa akaurayiwa.”" 
1Samuel19:7 Jonatani akadaidza Dhavhidhi akamutaurira zvose izvozvi. Jonatani akaenda naDhavhidhi kuna Sauro, Dhavhidhi akamushandira sezvaasiita." 
1Samuel19:8 Kwakamuka zvakare imwe hondo, Dhavhidhi akaenda akandorwa navaFirisitia akauraya vakawanda kwazvo pakati pavo vamwe vakadzvamuka kumutiza." 
1Samuel19:9 Mweya wakaipa wakabva kuna Tenzi wakauya pana Sauro agere mumba make pfumo rake riri mumaoko, Dhavhidhi achiridza zvake dimbwa." 
1Samuel19:10 Sauro akati regai ndibayirire Dhavhidhi kumadziro nepfumo. Asi Dhavhidhi akanzvenga Sauro akandobayirira pfumo rake kumadziro, Dhavhidhi akatiza akapunyuka." 
1Samuel19:11 Sauro akatumira vanhu kumba kwaDhavhidhi kuti vamugarire vazomuuraya mangwanani acho. Zvino mukadzi waDhavhdhi, Mikari akamubayira zani achiti, “Kana ukarega kuzviponesa zvako usiku hwanhasi, mangwana uri kuurayiwa.”" 
1Samuel19:12 Mikari akaburitsa Dhavhidhi napahwindo ndokubva atiza akapunyuka. 
1Samuel19:13 Mikari akatora chifananidzo akachirarisa pamubhedha akaisa chichira chemvere dzembudzi kumusoro kwacho akachifugidza nejira. 
1Samuel19:14 Sauro paakatuma vanhu kuzobata Dhavhidhi Mikari akati, “Ari kurwara.”" 
1Samuel19:15 Sauro akadzosera vanhu ivava kundoona Dhavhidhi achiti, “Uyai naye kwandiri ari pamubhedha ipapo, ndimuuraye.”" 
1Samuel19:16 Kuzoti vanhu vaya vasvikako wanei chifananidzo ndochiri pamubhedha nechichira chemvere dzembudzi chiri kumusoro. 
1Samuel19:17 Sauro akabvunza Mikari kuti, “Wandinyengedzerei kudai kurega zvako muvengi wangu achipunyuka?” Mikari akapindura Sauro achiti, “Aiwa, iye akanditi, ‘Chitondirega ndiende, ungapafe pano.’ ”" 
1Samuel19:18 Dhavhidhi akatiza akapunyuka akasvika kuna Samueri kuRama, akamurondedzera zvose zvaakaitirwa naSauro. Iye naSamueri vakaenda kundogara zvavo kuNaioti." 
1Samuel19:19 Shoko rakasvika kuna Sauro rokuti Dhavhidhi ari paNaioti kuRama. 
1Samuel19:20 Sauro ndokutuma nhume kundobata Dhavhidhi. Asi pavakasvikoona boka ravaporofita richiporofita, richitungamirirwa naSamueri akanga amirepo, Mweya waMwari wakauyawo panhumwa dzaSauro dziya dzikabva dzaporofitawo." 
1Samuel19:21 Shoko irori parakasvika kuna Sauro, akatumirazve dzimwe nhumwa ikoko, naidzowo dzakasvikowirawo mukuporofita. Sauro akatumirako dzimwe nhumwa rwechitatu ivowo vakasvikowirawo mukuporofita." 
1Samuel19:22 Akazoenda iye pachake kuRama ikoko. Akasvika patsime guru kwaSeku akabvunza kuti, “Samueri naDhavhidhi vari kupi?” Mumwewo akati, “Vari paNaioti kuRama uku.”" 
1Samuel19:23 Naizvozvo akabvapo ndokuenda kuNaioti kuRama. Mweya waMwari wakauyawo paari akafamba nzira yose achiporofita kudzamara asvika paNaioti kuRama. 
1Samuel19:24 Iye akakatanurawo hanzu dzake, akaporofitawo ari paiva naSamueri, akanga akati umburu kurara asina chaakapfeka muswere wose wezuva nousiku hwose. Ndokusaka kune tsumo inoti, “Sauro avawo mumwe wavaporofita nhai?”" 
1Samuel20:1 Dhavhidhi akatiza kuNaioti kuRama akaenda kuna Jonatani akandoti, “Chandakaita chaizvo chii? Chandakakanganisa chii? Mhosva yandakapara nababa vako ndeyei zvavanototsvaka kundiuraya kudai?”" 
1Samuel20:2 Iye akamupindura achiti, “Hazvimboitika! Haumbofa. Inzwa unzwe, baba vangu hapana chinhu chavanondivanzira kana kai zvako. Vangazondivanzira izvozvi kuti kwauyei? Hazviitike izvo.”" 
1Samuel20:3 Asi akasimbisisa zvakare achiti, “Baba vako vakanyatsozviona kuti iwe unondida. Saka ivo vanototi, ‘Dai Jonatani akarega kuzviziva nokuti zvingamushungurudze kwazvo. Chaizvo naTenzi mupenyu kana newe uri kutozvionawo kuti upenyu hwangu huri parumano.’ ”" 
1Samuel20:4 Jonatani ndokuti kuna Dhavhidhi, “Chose chaunenge wandikumbira ndichakuitira.”" 
1Samuel20:5 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Jonatani, “Unoona, mangwana kugara kwomwedzi, izuva guru randinofanira kunge ndigere pakudya namambo. Zvino chirega ini ndiende kundohwanda zvangu mumunda kusvikira zuva retatu mauro." 
1Samuel20:6 Kana baba vako vakazviona chaizvo kuti handipo, wovataurira kuti, ‘Dhavhidhi andikumbirisa chaizvo kuti ambomhanyira kuBheterehemu kuguta rokwake nokuti kuri kuitwa chibayiro chavo chomusha wose chepagore,’" 
1Samuel20:7 kana vakati, zvakanaka, zvinenge zvatondinakirawo ini, muranda wenyu. Asi kana zvikavavirutsa nehasha, wobva watoziva zvako kuti rokuda kundiparadza riya vanaro mumwoyo." 
1Samuel20:8 Ndiitirewo mwoyochena ini muranda wenyu nokuti wakandisvitsa pakuitirana newe chitsidzirano pana Tenzi. Asi kana ini ndiine mhosva chisva wandiuraya iyewe, nokuti chii chaungandiisira mumaoko ababa vako?”" 
1Samuel20:9 Jonatani akati, “Hazvimboitika kwauri izvo! Dai ndichinyatsoziva chaizvo kuti baba vangu vari kuda kukuparadza, ndairega here ini kukutaurira.”" 
1Samuel20:10 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Jonatani, “Kana baba vako vakakujinyura, ndiani achazondiudzawo izvozvo?”" 
1Samuel20:11 Jonatani ndokuti kuna Dhavhidhi, “Handei zvedu mumunda.” Vose vari vaviri vakaenda zvavo musango." 
1Samuel20:12 Jonatani akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “NaTenzi chaiye Mwari wavaIsiraeri, kana baba vangu ndichinge ndavanzwa iyo nguva ino iyi, mangwana kana kuti pazuva retatu handimborega kukutaurira." 
1Samuel20:13 Kana baba vangu vachinge vachida kukuparadza, ini ndikarega kukutaurira kuitira kuti iwe uende zvako usina chinokuwana, Tenzi ngaandione iyeni Jonatani ndiwirwe zvangu nezvimwe zvikuru kwazvo. Tenzi ngaave newe sezvaaiva nababa vangu." 
1Samuel20:14 Ndiitire mwoyochena waTenzi ndichiri mupenyu uye ndafa 
1Samuel20:15 usasudurukane nemhuri yangu narini wose, kunyangewo panenge Tenzi oparadza vavengi vose vako iwe Dhavhidhi pasi pano" 
1Samuel20:16 zita raJonatani ngarirege kupfudzwa kumba yaDhavhidhi uye kuti Tenzi ngaatsividze vavengi vaDhavhidhi.” 
1Samuel20:17 Jonatani akaita kuti Dhavhidhi amutsurudze chitsidzirano chake naye pamusana pokuti iye Jonatani aimuda sokuda kwaaizviita iye pachake. 
1Samuel20:18 Jonatani akati kwaari, “Mangwana kugara kwemwedzi izuva guru asi zvichaoneka kuti iwe haupo nokuti chigaro chako chinenge chisina munhu." 
1Samuel20:19 Ko kutozoti pazuva retatu racho, wotoita zvokukurumidza zvako kundohwanda kwacho uende panzvimbo paya pawakambohwanda pakambomuka nyaya iyoyi urambe uri kuseri kwedombo reEzeri." 
1Samuel20:20 Ndichapfura nouta miseve mitatu ndakananga kune rumwe rutivi rwaro ndichinge ndine chandakananga. 
1Samuel20:21 Chinzwaka, ndichatuma mumwe mukomana ndichiti, ‘Enda kundotsvaka miseve yacho.’ Ndikamutaurira chaizvo kuti, ‘Iwe, miseve iri kurutivi uku, itore,’ iwewo wouya zvako nokuti naTenzi mupenyu chaizvo, hakuna chichange chichakuwana, unenge uri muchete." 
1Samuel20:22 Asi kana ndikati kumukomana wacho, ‘Iwe, miseve iri mberi uko,’ iwewo pakadaro apo, ibva waenda zvako, nokuti Tenzi anenge achikuti uende zvako." 
1Samuel20:23 Kana zviri zvenyaya yatakurukurirana iyi, chinzwaka, Tenzi anesu narini wose.”" 
1Samuel20:24 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akandohwanda mumunda. Zuva riya rokugara kwomwedzi rakasvika, mambo ndokugara zvake pakudya." 
1Samuel20:25 Mambo akagara pachigaro chake sezvaaisiita, pachigaro chake chokumadziro. Jonatani akagara pakatarisana naye, Abhuneru akagara parutivi rwaSauro, asi nzvimbo yaDhavhidhi yakanga isina munhu." 
1Samuel20:26 Kunyange zvakanga zvakadaro Sauro haana chaakataura zuva iroro, nokuti akangotiwo, “Hamheno zvaitika kwaari, akan'ora, kun'ora chete uku.”" 
1Samuel20:27 Asi zuva rechipiri rokunge mwedzi wagara, nzvimbo yaDhavhidhi yakanga isina munhu. Sauro akati kuna Jonatani mwana wake, “Seiko uyu mwanakomana waJese asina kuuya kuzodya nezuro kana nhasi?”" 
1Samuel20:28 Jonatani akapindura Sauro achiti, “Dhavhidhi akandikumbirisa kwazvo kuti ndimurege aendewo kuBheterehemu." 
1Samuel20:29 Akati ‘Ndapota ndiregei ndiendeko nokuti vomumusha medu vari kuita chibayiro muguta imomo. Uyewo mukoma wangu pachake ndiye anditi ndinofanira kuendawoko. Kana muchida zvenyu, ndapota ndiregei zvangu ndiende kundoona vakoma vangu.’ Ndokusakawo asina kuuya kuzodya namambo.”" 
1Samuel20:30 Sauro akavirukira Jonatani nehasha akati kwaari “Tsvuuramuromo, mhandupandu yomwana. Unoti handizvizive nhai kuti wapfekwa chaizvo nomwana waJese iwe zvinonyadzisa kwazvo zvinotofumurisa amai vako chaivo vokukubereka?" 
1Samuel20:31 Hauone here kuti kana mwana waJese uyu ari mupenyu pasi pano, iwe noumambo hwako haumbofa hwakadzika midzi, kana iwe pakopo haumbofa wakahunhuhwa. Chitobva watomutumira vanhu vauye naye kwandiri chake chete rufu.”" 
1Samuel20:32 Jonatani akapindura baba wake Sauro achiti, “Chaanourayirwa chaicho chii? Chii chaakapara?”" 
1Samuel20:33 Asi Sauro akamuregedzera pfumo zvokutoda kumupfuudza zviya. Iyewo Jonatani ndokubva aziva kuti baba wake vatsunga mwoyo kuponda Dhavhidhi. 
1Samuel20:34 Jonatani akabva apomoka pakudya, apaka chaizvo kushatirwa, ndokubva aramwa zvokudya zuva rechipiri iroro rokugara kwemwedzi nokuti akanga arwadziwa mwoyo nezvaDhavhidhi, uyewo nokuti baba wake akanga amunyadzisa." 
1Samuel20:35 Mangwana acho mangwanani, Jonatani akaenda mumunda muya kwavakanga varangana kusangana naDhavhidhi aine kamwe kakomana." 
1Samuel20:36 Akataurira kakomana kake kaya kuti, “Mhanyira kundononga miseve yandichakanda.” Kakomana aka pakakanga kakumhanya akakanda museve mberi kwako." 
1Samuel20:37 Kakomana pakakasvika kwakanga kwawira museve wakanga wakandwa naJonatani, Jonatani akadaidzira kukakomana aka achiti, “Inga wani museve wacho uri mberi kwako uko?”" 
1Samuel20:38 Jonatani akadaidzira kukakomana kaya achiti, “Ita zvokukurumidza, kasika! Rega kuramba wakangoti tumbi ipapo.” Kakomana kaJonatani kaya kakabvawo kanonga miseve iya ndokudzokera kuna vatenzi vako." 
1Samuel20:39 Asi kakomana ikaka hakana zvakakanga kachiziva, Jonatani naDhavhidhi chete ndovakanga vaine zvavaiziva." 
1Samuel20:40 Jonatani akapa kakomana aka zvombo zvake, akati kwakari, “Takura izvi uende nazvo kuguta.”" 
1Samuel20:41 Pakangoti kakomana aka endei, Dhavhidhi ndokubva akwanyanukawo kuchamhembe kwedombo riya ndokusvikoti pasi gwadagwa, akatsikitsira uso ndokumukotamira katatu. Vakatsvodana vakahwihwidza kuchema. Dhavhidhi akachema zvakanyanya kwazvo." 
1Samuel20:42 Jonatani ndokuti kuna Dhavhidhi, “Ufambe zvakanaka, maererano nokutsidzirana kwatakaita muzita raTenzi tichiti, ‘Tenzi ngaave nesu pauviri hwedu, avewo nezvizvarwa zvedu narini narini.’ ” Dhavhidhi akasimuka ndokuenda, Jonatani ndokudzokera zvake kuguta." 
1Samuel21:1 Dhavhidhi akasvika kuNobhu kumupristi Ahimereki. Ahimereki akachingurana naDhavhidhi achidedereswa nazvo, akati kwaari, “Zvaita seiko kuuya uri woga woga kudai usina nomumwe wose wawauya naye?”" 
1Samuel21:2 Dhavhidhi akapindura mupristi Ahimereki achiti, “Pane zvandinazvo zvandatsindidzwa namambo. Vanditi, ‘Rega zvako kuwana waunotaurira kana kai zvako pane zvandakutuma kundoita.’ Ndaronga kuti ndionane namamwe majaya kune imwewo nzvimbo." 
1Samuel21:3 Ko zvino imi mune chokubatawo here pano apa? Ndipeiwo zvingwa zvishanu kana chimwewo chokudya chamunacho pano?” 
1Samuel21:4 Mupristi uyu akapindura Dhavhidhi achiti, “Chingwa zvacho handina, asi ndine chingwa chinoera chete, ndokungewo majaya enyu acho anga achizvibata asingapinde mumba navakadzi.”" 
1Samuel21:5 Dhavhidhi akapindurawo mupristi kuti, “Ichokwadi kuti zvavakadzi izvo hatina kuzvibvumirwa semhiko yedu yatinochengeta nguva dzose patinenge toda kuenda kundorwa. Havazvin'oresewo muviri, kunyange parwendo runenge ruri rwendowo zvarwo. Ndoda kutozoti rwendo runo uru havana kumbozvin'oresa miviri.”" 
1Samuel21:6 Naizvozvo mupristi uyu akamupa chingwa chinoera zvapakanga pasina chimwe chingwawo zvacho kuchingova chete nechingwa chapana Mwari, chaiti kana chabviswa pana Tenzi chobva chatsiviwawo nechimwe chingwa chinenge chichiri kudziya musi wakareyo wachabviswa." 
1Samuel21:7 Musi iwoyo paiva nomumwe muranda waSauro akanga aine chokuita pana Tenzi. Ainzi Dhoegi muEdhomu ariye mukuru wavafudzi vokwaSauro. 
1Samuel21:8 Dhavhidhi akati kuna vaAhimereki, “Ko mune pfumowo here kana bakatwa, nokuti ini handina kumbouya nebakatwa rangu kana nechimwe chombo zvacho nokuti zvandatumwa namambo ndezvechimbichimbi?”" 
1Samuel21:9 Mupristi ndokuti, “Panongova nebakatwa raGoriati muFirisitia wavakauraya uya kubani reEra, ndoriri pano rakaita zvokuputirwa mujira, riri kuseri kweefodhi. Kana uchida kutora iroro, tora zvako nokuti hakuna chimwe chandinacho pano, kusiya iroro.” Dhavhidhi akati, “Hakuna rimwe rakaita sairoro, ndipei zvenyu iroro.”" 
1Samuel21:10 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akasimudzira rwendo rwake musi iwoyo rwokutiza Sauro, akaenda kuna Akishi, mambo wokuGati." 
1Samuel21:11 Asi makurukota aiye Akishi akati, “Haasiri iye here Dhavhidhi mambo wenyika iya uyu? Haasiye here wavanoimba vachitamba vachiti, “Sauro wakauraya zviuru. Asi Dhavhidhi makumi namakumi ezviuru?”" 
1Samuel21:12 Mazwi aya akarovesa hana Dhavhidhi akabva ava kutya kwazvo Akishi mambo weGati. 
1Samuel21:13 Nokudaro akabva apindura maitiro ake woita zvake somunhu anopenga vachitoita wokutobata. Akamara-mara magonhi esuo guru, achirwedza rute pandebvu dzake." 
1Samuel21:14 Akishi ndokuti kumakurukota ake, “Inga muri kuzvionawo kuti munhu uyu, munhu anopenga uyu, zvino chamauyira naye kwandiri chii?" 
1Samuel21:15 Manzwa kuti ndine nhamo yevanhu vanopenga here zvamauya naye kuzondiitira musara wake pano? Izvozvi muri kuda kuti iyeyu apinde mumba mangu nhai?” 
1Samuel22:1 Dhavhidhi akabva ipapo ndokutizira kubako raAdhuramu. Kuzoti vakoma vake nemhuri yose yokwababa vake vazvinzwa vakadzika ikoko kwaaiva. 
1Samuel22:2 Munhu wose akanga akasuwa naakanga ari muchikwereti naakanga asingagutsikane noupenyu vakandounganidzana kwaari, akabva ava mutungamiri wavo. Aiva navarume vanoda kukwana makumi mana." 
1Samuel22:3 Dhavhidhi akabvapo akaenda kuMizipe yokuMoabhu. Akati kuna mambo weMoabhu, “Ndinokumbira kuti mundichengeterewo baba vangu naamai vangu kusvikira ndaona zvandichaitirwa naMwari?”" 
1Samuel22:4 Akavaitira musha kwamambo weMoabhu, vakagarako naye nguva yose yakanga iye Dhavhidhi achigara mubako." 
1Samuel22:5 Asi muporofita Gadhi akataurira Dhavhidhi kuti, “Chirega kunge ucharamba ugere mubako iri. Ibva zvako pano uende kunyika yokwaJudha.” Saka Dhavhidhi akabvapo ndokuenda kusango reHereti." 
1Samuel22:6 Shoko rakasvika kuna Sauro rokuti Dhavhidhi pamwechete navanhu vake vaaiva navo vava kuzikanwa kwavari. Izvozvo Sauro aigara kuGibhea pamuti womutamarisiki, pfumo riri mumaoko, akakutwa namakurukota ake ose." 
1Samuel22:7 Sauro akati kumakurukota ake aya akanga akamukuta, “Teererai munzwe imi vaBhenjamini! Heya munoti, iye mwanakomana waJese angabva akutii mose mukwane minda nemimwewo yemigirepisi nhai? Munofunga kuti achakupai mose zvigaro zvokutungamirira zvikwata zvezviuru nezvikwata zvamazana here," 
1Samuel22:8 zvamadai kundimukira mose? Hezvi mwanakomana wangu anoita bangano nomwanakomana waJese, hapana kana mumwechete wenyu anondiudza. Hakuna ane hanya neni, kana anondirumawo nzeve kuti mwana wangu akasoka gurukota rangu zano rokundihwandira zviripo nhasi izvi!”" 
1Samuel22:9 Dhoegi muEdhomu akanga amirewo namakurukota aSauro akapindura achiti, “Ndakaona mwanakomana waJese achisvika kuNobhu kwaAhimereki mwanakomana waAhitubhu." 
1Samuel22:10 Abhimereki akamunzwira kuna Tenzi akamupa chokudya ndokumupawo bakatwa raGoriati muFirisitia.” 
1Samuel22:11 Mambo akatumira vanhu kundodaidza mupristi Ahimereki mwanakomana waAhitubhu pamwechete nevemhuri yokwababa vake vose vaiva vapristi kuNobhu, vose ndokubva vauya kwamambo." 
1Samuel22:12 Sauro akati, “Imi mwana waAhitubhu chimbonzwai!” Ahimereki akati, “Ndokuno changamire.”" 
1Samuel22:13 Sauro ndokuti kwaari, “Ko iyemi mapindwa neiko kutoita zvenyu bangano rokundimukira nomwana waJese, zvokutosvika zvenyu pakumupa chingwa nebakatwa nokutomunzwira zvenyu kuna Mwari mamiriro ezvinhu, zvava kutomupa nhasi kundipandukira nokutondihwandira.”" 
1Samuel22:14 Ahimereki akapindura mambo achiti, “Pamakurukota enyu ose zvawo ndiani akatendeka saDhavhidhi, anotova mukuwasha wenyu imi mambo, mukuru mukuru wavanokuchengetedzai, anoremekedzwa kwazvo mumuzinda menyu?" 
1Samuel22:15 Ko iye nhasi ndopandatanga here kunzwira Dhavhidhi zvinhu kuna Mwari? Aiwaka! Regai zvenyu kundipa mhosva ini muranda wenyu kana kupa mhosva vose vemhuri yekwababa vangu nokuti hapana kana kai zvako kandiri kuziva panyaya iyi.” 
1Samuel22:16 Mambo akati, “Ahimereki unotofa chete iwewe nevemhuri yokwababa vako vose.”" 
1Samuel22:17 Mambo ndokuti kune vokumuchengetedza vakanga vakamukuta vaya, “Navoi vapristi vaTenzi ava, vaurayei nokuti naivowo vane rimwe naDhavhidhi vakatozviziva zvavo kuti ari kutiza asi zvokuti vasvitsewo shoko irori munzeve dzangu havana.” Asi makurukota ake iye mambo zvakavapata mumwoyo kuti vasimudze ruoko kuuraya vapristi vaTenzi." 
1Samuel22:18 Mambo ndokuti kuna Dhoegi, “Zvino iwe chiita izvozvi uraya vapristi ava.” Dhoegi muEdhomu akabva angotiwo navo vapristi kuuraya. Musi iwoyo akauraya makumi masere avarume, navarume vashanu vapfeki veefodhi dzerineni." 
1Samuel22:19 Kozotiwo Nobhu, guta ravapristi, akaripedza namapakatwa kubvira kuvarume kusvikira kuvakadzi navana pamwechete navachiri kuyamwa nemombe namadhongi nehwai nembudzi. Akazvipedza namapakatwa." 
1Samuel22:20 Asi mumwe mwana waAhimereki mukomana ainzi Abhiatari akapunyuka akatizira kuna Dhavhidhi. 
1Samuel22:21 Abhiatari akataurira Dhavhidhi kuti, “Sauro akauraya vapristi vaTenzi.”" 
1Samuel22:22 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhiatari, “Ndakazviziva zvangu musi iwo uya pandakaona Dhoegi ariko kuti achaudza chete Sauro. Ndini ndakaurayisa vanhu vose vemhuri yokwababa vako." 
1Samuel22:23 Chigara zvako neni, usatye nokuti mumwecheteyo ari kutsvaka zvokundiuraya ndiye ari kutsvaka zvokukuurayawo, uri mumaoko angu unotonyatsochengeteka.”" 
1Samuel23:1 Pane vamwe vakataurira Dhavhidhi kuti, “Zvinhu zviri kuguta reKeira ndezvokuti vaFirisitia vari kurirwisa vachipamba zviri pamaburiro.”" 
1Samuel23:2 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akada kunzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii akati, “Ndoenda here kundorwisa vaFirisitia?” Tenzi akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Vinga vaFirisitia uvarwise ununure Keira.”" 
1Samuel23:3 Asi varume vaiva naDhavhidhi vakamuti, “Tarisai muone kuhuta kwatiri kuita kutya tiri makare muno maJudha, ko kutozoti tikaenda kuKeira kundorwisa hondo dzavaFirisitia?”" 
1Samuel23:4 Dhavhidhi akadazve kunzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii. Tenzi ndokumupindura achiti, “Simuka udzike kuKeira nokuti ndichaisa vaFirisitia mumaoko ako.”" 
1Samuel23:5 Saka Dhavhidhi navarume vaaiva navo, vakadzika kuKeira, vakarwisa vaFirisitia vakapamba mombe dzavo vakauraya vanhu vazhinji kwazvo pakati pavo. Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akanunura vagari vokuKeira." 
1Samuel23:6 Abhiatari mwana uya waAhimereki paakandopotera kuna Dhavhidhi kuKeira akaendako aine hanzu yeefodhi mumaoko. 
1Samuel23:7 Shoko rakazosvika kuna Sauro rokuti Dhavhidhi ava muKeira. Sauro ndokuti, “Zvino Mwari amuisa mumaoko mangu. Kupinda kwaaita muguta rine misuo mikuru ine zvihuri kutozvipfigira kwaaita ikoko.”" 
1Samuel23:8 Sauro akabva akokera vanhu vose kuhondo kuti vadzike kuKeira kundoita zvokundokomberana kwazvo Dhavhidhi navarume vaaiva navo. 
1Samuel23:9 Dhavhidhi akazviziva kuti pane chiri kurongwa naSauro chakaipa chaari kuda kuita kwaari ndokuti kuno mupristi Abhiatari, “Uyai neefodhi kuno.”" 
1Samuel23:10 Dhavhidhi akati, “Tenzi Mwari weIsiraeri ini muranda wenyu ndanyatsozvinzwa kuti Sauro ari kuronga zvokuuya kuKeira kuzoparadza guta irori pamusana pangu." 
1Samuel23:11 Ko varume vomuKeira vachandiisa here mumaoko ake? Sauro achadzikawo here kuno sokunzwa kwandakaita ini muranda wenyu? Ndinokukumbirisai Tenzi Mwari weIsiraeri kuti munditaurirewo.” Tenzi akati, “Ee achadzikako.”" 
1Samuel23:12 Dhavhidhi ndokuti, “Ko varume vomuKeira vachanditurira here mumaoko aSauro, ini navanhu ava vandinavo?” Tenzi akati, “Ee vachakuisa mumaoko ake.”" 
1Samuel23:13 Dhavhidhi navarume vaikarosvika mazana matanhatu vaaiva navo vakasimuka vakaenda kwose kwose kwavainge vangokwanisa kuenda. Sauro paakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi atiza kuKeira akabva arega kuendako. 
1Samuel23:14 Dhavhidhi akabva ava kugara murenje, mumapako munyika yamakomo kurenje reZifu. Izvozvo Sauro aingunomuvhima zuva nezuva, asi Mwari haana kumuisa mumaoko ake." 
1Samuel23:15 Dhavhidhi akazviona kuti Sauro ari kutsvaka kumuuraya. Izvozvo Dhavhidhi aiva zvake kurenje reZifu paHoreshi. 
1Samuel23:16 Jonatani, mwana waSauro akasimuka akaenda kuna Dhavhidhi kuHoreshi, akamusimbisa muna Mwari." 
1Samuel23:17 Akamuti, “Usatye zvako nokuti baba vangu havambofa vakakunonga. Iwe ndiwe uchatova mambo weIsiraeri iniwo ndiri mutevedzeri wako. Baba vangu Sauro vanotozvizivawo.”" 
1Samuel23:18 Pauviri hwavo kudaro vakaita chitsidzirano pana Tenzi. Dhavhidhi akasara kuHoreshi, Jonatani akaenda zvake kumusha." 
1Samuel23:19 Kune vamwe vanhu vokuZifu vakaenda kuna Sauro kuGibhea vakati, “Ko inga iye Dhavhidhi ariko wani kwedu uku kwaari kuhwanda zvake mumapako kuHoreshi muchikomo cheHakira chiri kuchamhembe kweJeshimoni?" 
1Samuel23:20 Ko zvino manga madii zvenyu kuuyako nhai mambo chero pamunenge madira kuuya. Chedu isu kunezenge kwangova kumuisa mumaoko enyu mambo.” 
1Samuel23:21 Sauro akati, “Tenzi ngaakukomborerei nokuti ndimi vanhu vazondiitirawo tsiye nyoro." 
1Samuel23:22 Chiendai mundonyatsotarisa muone chaipo paanohwanda mupazive, muzivewo nyakumuonapo wacho nokuti zvinonzi Dhavhidhi akasvinuka kwazvo." 
1Samuel23:23 Naizvozvo imika monyatsocherechedzawo kwose kwaanohwanda, mudzoke kwandiri mava kunyatsozviziva. Ndipo pandichazoendawo nemi, kana iye achinge ari mudunhu iroro, ndichamuvhima mumhuri dzose dzokwaJudha ndikamunonga chete.”"
