1Samuel23:24 Ivava vakabva pana Sauro vakasimuka vakafanoenda kuZifu. Izvozvo Dhavhidhi navarume vaaiva navo vakanga vari kurenje reMaoni, kuArabha, kuchamhembe kweJeshimoni." 
1Samuel23:25 Sauro navarume vaaiva navo vakaenda kundomuvhima. Vamwewo ndokunyevera Dhavhidhi, iye ndokubva adzika kumangondo kurenje reMaoni. Shoko iri parakasvika munzeve dzaSauro, akabva aronda Dhavhidhi kurenje reMaoni ikoko." 
1Samuel23:26 Sauro akaenda nokune rimwe divi regomo, uyuwo Dhavhidhi ari kune rimwe diviwo regomo iroro. Pakanga Dhavhidhi ari mushishi rokutiza Sauro, Sauro navanhu vake vakanga zvino vakwinyirirawo kubata Dhavhidhi navanhu vake." 
1Samuel23:27 Ndopakabva pasvikawo nhumwa kuna Sauro dzichiti, “Chitokurumidzai zvenyu kudzoka. Uku nyika yapindwa nevaFirisitia.”" 
1Samuel23:28 Sauro akabva adzoka mukuronda Dhavhidhi ovinga vaFirisitia. Naizvozvo nzvimbo iyoyo yakatumidzwa zita rokuti, “Chikomochopatsana.”" 
1Samuel23:29 Dhavhidhi akakwidza obva ipapo akandogara kumapako okuEnigedhi. 
1Samuel24:1 Sauro akati adzoka mukuronda vaFirisitia shoko rakasvika kwaari raiti, “Dhavhidhi ari kurenje reEnigedhi uku.”" 
1Samuel24:2 Sauro akatora zviuru zvitatu zvavarume vano, vakanyatsosarudzwa muIsiraeri yose, ndokuenda kundotsvaka Dhavhidhi navanhu vake kwakatarisana namatombo engururu." 
1Samuel24:3 Sauro akasvika napamatanga ehwai aiva pedyo nenzira paiva nebako. Sauro akapindamo kuti ambozvibatsira zvake. Izvozvo Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vaitova zvavo mukatikati chaimo mebako. 
1Samuel24:4 Vanhu vake iye Dhavhidhi vakamuti, “Zuva riya riya razosvika nhasi rakanzi naTenzi, ‘Ndichaisa muvengi wako mumaoko ako ugoita zvako zvaungade kuita naye.’ ” Dhavhidhi akaverevedza akacheka chipenga chehanzu yaSauro." 
1Samuel24:5 Hana yaDhavhidhi yakarova nokucheka kwaakanga aita chipenga chehanzu yaSauro. 
1Samuel24:6 Akati kuvanhu vake, “Norubatsiro rwaTenzi, chinhu chakadai hachifanire zvacho kana kumbondipinda mumwoyo chokuti ndisimudze ruoko rwangu kuita chinhu chakaipa kuna tenzi wangu, muzodzwa waTenzi. Kwete. Muzodzwaka waTenzi uyu.”" 
1Samuel24:7 Dhavhidhi akadzora vanhu vake namazwi iwaya akavarambidza kurwisa Sauro. Sauro akasimuka akabuda mubako muya oenda zvake. 
1Samuel24:8 Mushure macho Dhavhidhi akabudawo mubako muya akadaidzira kuna Sauro achiti, “Nhai mambo, changamire!” Sauro paakati cheu, Dhavhidhi akabva azvityora achikotamira pasi kumuremekedza." 
1Samuel24:9 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Sauro, “Munodirei kunzwa zvavanhu vanoti, ‘Dhavhidhi ari kuvavarira kukukuvadzai.’" 
1Samuel24:10 Nhasi mazvionerawo moga kuti Tenzi anga atokuisai zvake mumaoko angu mubako umu, vamwe vanga vatoti ndikuurayei asi handina kukukuvadzai ndichiti, ‘Handidi kusimudza ruoko rwangu kuita chinhu chisina kunaka kuna tenzi wangu, nokuti muri muzodzwa waTenzi.’" 
1Samuel24:11 Chinzwaika baba, tarisai muone chipenga chehanzu yenyu ichi chandakabata mumaoko. Nokucheka kwandaita chipenga chehanzu yenyu ichochi ndichirega zvangu kukuurayai muri kutoonawo zvinonyatsokuratidzai kuti hapana chakaipa kana upanduki mandiri, uye hapana chandakakutadzirai kunyange zvazvo imi muchindihwandira kuda kundiuraya." 
1Samuel24:12 Mhosva iri pakati pangu nemi, Tenzi ndiye achatoziva zvake kuitonga kwaachaiita. Tenzi ndiye achatotsividza kunditadzira kwamakaita. Asi ini nouruoko rwangu urwu handidi zvangu kana kumbokubatai." 
1Samuel24:13 Inga wani vakuru vane tsumo inoti, ‘Mumunhu akaipa munobuda uipi,’ asi ini noruoko rwangu urwu handidi zvangu kana kumbokubatai." 
1Samuel24:14 Ko izvozvo nhai mambo weIsiraeri wamavinga chaiye ndiani chaizvo? Ndiani wamuri kurondawo kudai? Iyeniwo zvangu imbwa yakafa, nhata zvayo!" 
1Samuel24:15 Naizvozvo Tenzi ngaave mutongi, aenzanise mhosva yedu, aone zvaangaite andipipirirewo aburitse pachena kuti handina mhosva.”" 
1Samuel24:16 Dhavhidhi achangoti pedzei kutaura izvi, kuna Sauro, Sauro akabva ati, “Ndiwe here mwanangu Dhavhidhi uri kutaura nomuromo wako?” Sauro akabva azhamba kuchema." 
1Samuel24:17 Akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Uri munhu akarurama kwazvo paneni nokuti iwe wakandiitira zvakanaka asi ini ndikakuitira zvakaipa." 
1Samuel24:18 Wanyatsozviratidza izvi nhasi nokundiitira zvakanaka kwawaita, Tenzi paanga atondiisa zvake mumaoko ako, warega kundiuraya." 
1Samuel24:19 Nokuti munhu akawana muvengi wake angamurege achienda zvake here? Saka Tenzi ngaakupe mubayiro wakapetwa pamusana pezvakanaka zvawandiitira nhasi uno. 
1Samuel24:20 Chinzwaka, ndazoziva zvino kuti chaizvoizvo iwe, ndiwe uchava mambo, uye kuti newe umambo hweIsiraeri huchatonyatsodzika midzi." 
1Samuel24:21 Zvino chipika kwandiri nezita raTenzi kuti hauzotsakatisa zvizvarwa zvangu zvichauya, uye kuti hauzorovesa zita rangu mudzinza rokwababa vangu.”" 
1Samuel24:22 Dhavhidhi akapika izvozvo kuna Sauro. Sauro akadzokera kumusha, asi Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakakwidza kubako." 
1Samuel25:1 Samueri akazofa, vaIsiraeri vose vakaungana kuzomuchema vakamuviga pamusha pake kuRama. Dhavhidhi akasimuka odzika kuenda kurenje reParani." 
1Samuel25:2 Kwaiva nomumwewo murume wokuMaoni aiva nebasa rake kuKarimeri, akanga akapfuma kwazvo. Akanga aine zviuru zvitatu zvehwai nechiuru chembudzi. Akanga achiveura hwai dzake kuKarimeri ikoko." 
1Samuel25:3 Murume iyeye ainzi Nabhari, mudzimai wake achinzi Abhigairi. Aiva mukadzi anonzwisisa ane chimiro chakanaka. Asi murume iyeyo akanga aine mwoyo mukukutu. Aiva wokwaKarebhu." 
1Samuel25:4 Pakanga Dhavhidhi ari kurenje akanzwa zvichinzi Nabhari ari kuveura hwai dzake kuKarimeri. 
1Samuel25:5 Akatuma majaya gumi achiti, “Endai kuKarimeri mundondikwazisirawo Nabhari." 
1Samuel25:6 Muti kwaari zvanzi, ‘Rugare ngaruve nemi. Zvanzi kufara kwamuri imi mose nemhuri yenyu. Makadiiko nezvose zvamunazvo?’" 
1Samuel25:7 Ndiri kunzwa kuti muri mukuveura zvipfuwo zvenyu. Zvino vafudzi venyu vakanga vanesu kuno, asi hapana chakaipa chatakaita kwavari. Hapana chavakarasikirwa nacho nguva yose iyi yavanga vari kuKarimeri." 
1Samuel25:8 Kana mukabvunza zvenyu varanda venyu, vanokuudzaiwo izvozvi. Naizvozvo dai mukaitira zvenyu majaya angu ayo tsiye nyoro zvatauyawo kuno zuva guru rakadai. Dai mukawanawo zvimwe zvamunazvo zvamungape varanda venyu neni mwana wenyu Dhavhidhi.”" 
1Samuel25:9 Kuzoti majaya aDhavhidhi asvikako akapira kuna Nabhari zvose izvi achiti tatumwa naDhavhidhi, ndokumira zvavo." 
1Samuel25:10 Nabhari akapindura varanda vaDhavhidhi achiti, “Dhavhidhi iyeyo ndiani? Chii mwana waJese iyeyo? Kune varanda vazhinji kwazvo mazuva ano vari kutiza vatenzi vavo." 
1Samuel25:11 Nditore chingwa changu, nemvura yangu, nenyama yandabayira vaveuri vangu, ndichipa zvangu kuvanhu vandisingamboziva kana nokwavanobva here?”" 
1Samuel25:12 Majaya aDhavhidhi akadzokera zvawo akasvikotaurira Dhavhidhi zvose izvozvi. 
1Samuel25:13 Dhavhidhi akati kuvanhu vake, “Varume, munhu wose ngaapakate bakatwa rake!” Munhu wose akapakata bakatwa rake, Dhavhidhi akapakatawo rake. Mazana mana avanhu akaenda naDhavhidhi, kukasara mazana maviri vakachengeta zvinhu." 
1Samuel25:14 Asi mumwe muranda akaruma nzeve mudzimai waNabhari, Abhigairi kuti, “Dhavhidhi akatuma nhumwa dzakasvika kuna tenzi wedu dzichibva kurenje kuzovakwazisa, asi ivo vakadzijinyura." 
1Samuel25:15 Asi mufunge zvenyuka, vanhu ivava vakatiitira zvakanaka kwazvo. Havana chakaipa chavakaita kwatiri. Hapana chatakarasikirwa nacho kumafuro nguva yose iyi yatakanga tiinavo." 
1Samuel25:16 Vakanga vari rusvingo chairwo kutichengetedza, siku nesikati nguva yose iyi zvayo yatanga tichifudza hwai." 
1Samuel25:17 Zvino dai mukambopafungawo zvenyu apa muone zvokuita, nokuti tenzi wedu atova munyatwa chaiyo izvozvi pamwechete navanhu vose vemhuri yake. Asi tenzi wedu uyu munhu ane mwoyo wakaipa kwazvo haatiuriki.”" 
1Samuel25:18 Abhigairi akabva aita chimbichimbi kutora mazana maviri ezvingwa nezvigubhu zviviri zvewaini nehwai shanu dzakavhiyiwa, namabhagidhi maviri embesanwa dzakakangwa, nezana rezvisumbu zvamagirepisi akaomeswa namazana maviri ezvambwa zvamakuyu, akazvitakudza pamadhongi." 
1Samuel25:19 Akati kuvaranda vake, “Chitungamirai, ini ndiri kutevera!” Asi mudzimai waNabhari haana kutaurira murume wake." 
1Samuel25:20 Paaifamba kudaro ari padhongi rake, akati pindei mumupata wegomo, onei Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vari kuuya vakananga kwaari, ndokusangana navo." 
1Samuel25:21 Dhavhidhi akanga achitoti, “Chaizvoizvo ini ndakatamburira nhando nhai kuchengeta zvinhu zvose zvomunhu uyu murenje, pasina chimwechete chake chaakarasikirwa nacho. Ini ndakamuitira zvakanaka kudaro, ndopaava kunditsiva nezvakaipa kudai." 
1Samuel25:22 Kana ramangwanani rikabuda kuchine wechirume wemhuri yake wandinenge ndasiya ari mupenyu, iyeni Dhavhidhi, Tenzi ngaandione.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Abhigairi paakaona Dhavhidhi akabva akurumidza kuburuka padhongi rake akapfugamira Dhavhidhi akatsikitsira uso akamukotamira. 
1Samuel25:24 Akasvikoti bvucha mumakumbo aDhavhidhi ndokuti, “Changamire, mhosva iyi ngaive zvayo yangu. Ndibvumireiwo zvangu ini muranda wenyu kumbotaurawo nemi mumbonzwawo zvandichakurondedzerai ini muranda wenyu." 
1Samuel25:25 Ndapota changamire, regai zvenyu kuita hanya nezvomuipi uyo Nabhari, vakamugona wani vakamutumidza zita rokuti Nabhari, rinoreva kuti benzi, nokuti iyewo ibenzi romunhu. Chete, ini muranda wenyu pachezvangu, handina kunge ndamboona varume ivavo vamakatuma changamire." 
1Samuel25:26 “Changamire, zvino chionaiwo zvenyu kuti Tenzi ndiye aita kuti murege kupara mhosva yokudeura ropa kana kuti imi pachenyu noruoko rwenyu mutsividze zvamakaitirwa. Ndinopika naTenzi mupenyu, imi muchitozvionawo ndichiti, vavengi venyu navose zvavo vanoda kukuitirai zvakaipa ngavaitirwe sezvichaitirwa Nabhari." 
1Samuel25:27 Changamire, ipai zvenyu majaya aya anokuteverai chipo ichi chandauyawo nacho ini muranda wenyu." 
1Samuel25:28 Ndateterera zvangu ndiregerereiwo kukutadzirai kwandakaita ini muranda wenyu, changamire, nokuti Tenzi achanyatsoita kuti umambo hudzike midzi mumba menyu, nokuti muri kurwa hondo dzaTenzi. Hapana chakaipa chichawanikwa muupenyu hwenyu." 
1Samuel25:29 Kana munhu akada kukurondai achida kukuurayai, upenyu hwenyu huchasungirirwa pachisote chavapenyu pahunochengetwa naTenzi Mwari wenyu. Asi upenyu hwavavengi venyu achahupotsera sedombo rechimviriri." 
1Samuel25:30 Kana Tenzi achingewo azoita zvakanaka zvose zvaakatsidza nezvenyu imi changamire akakuitai mutongi weIsiraeri," 
1Samuel25:31 imi hamuzovi nechinokunetsai mumwoyo kana kuzodemba nechikonzero chokuti imimi changamire munenge madeura ropa risina mhosva kana kuti mazvitsivira moga. Kana Tenzi achinge akuponesai aitawo kuti zvikufambirei zvakanaka muzondirangarirawo imi changamire, ini muranda wenyu.”" 
1Samuel25:32 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhigairi, “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri akutuma kuti usangane neni nhasi." 
1Samuel25:33 Mwari ngaakukomborere nepfungwa yako yokugona kunzwisisa kudai. Mwari ngaakukomberere nokundidzora kwawandiita nhasi ndikarega kupara mhosva yokudeura ropa kana kuzvitsivira ndoga. 
1Samuel25:34 Ndinopika naTenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri mupenyu aita kuti ndirege kukukuvadza, ndichiti dai wanga usina kukurumidza kuchingurana neni, chokwadi mangwana kwaNabhari kwaifuma kusisina kana munhu wechirume mumwechete zvake!”" 
1Samuel25:35 Dhavhidhi akagamuchira zvakanga zvauya nomukadzi uyu kwaari, akamuti, “Chidzokera zvako kumusha kwako zvawataura ndazvinzwa uye ndichaita zvawareva.”" 
1Samuel25:36 Abhigairi akasvika kuna Nabhari wanei Nabhari ari pakati pamabiko mumba make, aitenge mabiko amambo chaiwo. Izvozvo Nabhari akanga ofara kwazvo apera zvake kudhakwa. Saka haana kana kumutaurira chinhu kusvikira kwaedza." 
1Samuel25:37 Mangwanani acho waini yapera muna Nabhari, mudzimai wake akamutaurira izvozvi izvi akarohwa nehana akaoma kuti papata nokutya." 
1Samuel25:38 Kuzoti kwangoti perei mazuva anenge gumi, Tenzi akazovinga Nabhari nedenda, akabva afa." 
1Samuel25:39 Dhavhidhi paakanzwa kuti Nabhari afa akati, “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi anditsivira Nabhari kutsvinya kwaakandiitira, akaitawo kuti ini muranda wake ndirege kuita chakaipa. Tenzi akaita kuti Nabhari apfukirwe nouipi hwake.” Dhavhidhi akabva atumira vanhu kundotaurirana naAbhigairi kuti ave mukadzi wake." 
1Samuel25:40 Vanhu vaDhavhidhi pavakasvika kuna Abhigairi kuKarimeri vakati kwaari, “Dhavhidhi atitumira kwamuri kuti tizokutorai muve zvenyu mukadzi wake.”" 
1Samuel25:41 Akasimuka akakotama ndokutyora uso akati, “Aiwa, regai zvenyu ndichiva wokushambidza tsoka dzavaranda vatenzi wangu.”" 
1Samuel25:42 Abhigairi akakurumidza kusimuka ndokuti padhongi rake karakata ndokuenda oteverana nenhumwa dzaDhavhidhi dziya aina vasikana vashanu vokumuperekedza. 
1Samuel25:43 Dhavhidhi akanga aroorawo Ahinoami wechiJezireeri akavaparika vose vari vaviri. 
1Samuel25:44 Sauro akatenge apawo Mikari mukunda wake mukadzi waDhavhidhi kuna Pariti mwana wavaRaishi vokuGarimu. 
1Samuel26:1 Vamwe vanhu vechiZifu vakaenda kuna Sauro kuGibhea vakati, “Ko inga iye Dhavhidhi akahwanda wani kuchikomo cheHakira kumabvazuva kweJeshimoni?”" 
1Samuel26:2 Sauro akabvawo asimuka oenda kurenje reZifu aine zviuru zvitatu zvavarwi vano vakanyatsosarudzwa kundotsvaka Dhavhidhi murenje reZifu. 
1Samuel26:3 Sauro akasvikodzika matendhe pachikomo cheHakira chiri munyasi momugwagwa kumabvazuva kweJeshimoni. Dhavhidhi akarambawo ari murenje paakanga aona kuti Sauro ari kumutsvaka murenje reZifu," 
1Samuel26:4 Dhavhidhi akatuma vasori akabva anyatsoziva kuti zvechokwadi Sauro akauyako. 
1Samuel26:5 Dhavhidhi akasimuka ndokuenda kuya kwakanga kune matendhe aSauro, akaona pakanga parere Sauro uyewo Abhuneru mukuru mukuru wehondo yake, mwanakomana waNeri. Izvozvo Sauro akanga arere pakati pematendhe akakomberedzwa nehondo yake." 
1Samuel26:6 Dhavhidhi aikurukura naAhimereki muHiti naAbhishai munun'una waJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruia ndokuti, “Ndiani angade kuenda neni kumatendhe aSauro?” Abhishai akati, “Ini zvangu, ndini ndichaenda nemi.”" 
1Samuel26:7 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi naAbhishai vakaenda kwaiva navanhu vaya nousiku wanei Sauro ari kusi kwehope arere pakati pematendhe, pfumo rake rakabayirirwa pasi kumusoro kwake. Abhuneri nehondo yose vakanga varere vakamutenderera." 
1Samuel26:8 Abhishai akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Mwari aisa muvengi wenyu mumaoko enyu nhasi. Saka chiregai zvenyu ndimubayirire pasi nepfumo kamwechete chete. Handimbosweroita ruviri!”" 
1Samuel26:9 Asi Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhishai, “Usamuuraya, ndiani chaizvo angasimudzire ruoko rwake muzodzwa waTenzi akasara asina nemhosva yose?”" 
1Samuel26:10 Dhavhidhi akapika achiti, “NaTenzi mupenyu iye Tenzi ndiye achamuuraya, kana kuti zuva rake rokufa ratosvikawo zvaro, kana kuti achangoendawo muhondo ondopararirawo ikoko." 
1Samuel26:11 Norubatsiro rwaTenzi, chinhu chakadai hachifanire zvacho kana kumbondipinda mumwoyo chokuti ndisimudzire ruoko rwangu muzodzwa waTenzi. Ingotora chete pfumo riri kumusoro kwake nechigubhu chemvura tiende.”" 
1Samuel26:12 Dhavhidhi akatora pfumo riya nechigubhu chemvura zvaiva kumusoro kwaSauro ndokuenda. Hapana akazviona kana akazviziva kana kuwana akapepuka nokuti vose vakanga vakakotsira. Uyewo nokuti vakanga vakabatwa nehope dzamandiriri dzakanga dzaita zvokubva kuna Tenzi. 
1Samuel26:13 Dhavhidhi akayambukira kune imwe mhiri ndokundomira pamusoro pechimwe chikomo chakanga chiri chinhambwe. Chinhambwe chacho chakanga chakati kureiwo kwazvo. 
1Samuel26:14 Dhavhidhi akadaidzira kuhondo iya kuna Abhuneri mwana waNeri achiti, “Haudaire here iwe Abhuneri?” Abhuneri akadaira achiti, “Ndiwe ani unodaidza mambo iwe?”" 
1Samuel26:15 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kuna Abhuneri, “Hausi mukono here iwe? Ndiani angamboenzaniswa newe muIsiraeri? Zvino warega seiko kuchengeta mambo, tenzi wako? Zvakuine mumwe munhu wani asvikako achida kuparadza mambo, tenzi wako." 
1Samuel26:16 Izvi zvawaita izvi hazvina kunaka. NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu munofanira kufa nokuti hamuna kuchengeta mambo tenzi wenyu, muzodzwa waTenzi. Chimbotarisa uone pfumo ramambo nechigubhu chake chemvura zvanga zviri kumusoro kuti zviri kupi?”" 
1Samuel26:17 Sauro akabva aziva izwi raDhavhidhi akati, “Ndiwe here mwanangu Dhavhidhi uri kutaura nomuromo wako?” Dhavhidhi akati, “Ee ndini ndiri kutaura nomuromo wangu chaiwo mambo changamire.”" 
1Samuel26:18 Akatizve, “Changamire, chii chamarambira makati tsvome tsvome neni kundironda kudai ini muranda wenyu? Chii chandakaita? Ndeipi mhosva yandakapara?" 
1Samuel26:19 Naizvozvo Mambo, chimbonzwaiwo zvandava kutaura ini muranda wenyu kwamuri changamire. Kana ari Tenzi ari kukupai mweya wokundimukira uyu, dai angogamuchira zvake mupiro, asi kana vari vanhu Tenzi ngaavaone nokuti ndokutondidzinga kwavakaita ikoku zvandiri nhasi vachinditadzisa kuti ndiwanewo chandingawana panhaka yatakapiwa naTenzi vachiti ndibve ndiende kundonamata vamwe vamwari vasirivo." 
1Samuel26:20 Zvino dai ropa rangu rarega zvaro kudeurirwa kure nenzvimbo yaTenzi inoera. Ndinodaro nokuti mambo weIsiraeri abudira ini zvangu nhata zvayo, sehombarume iri kuvhima hwerekwere mumakomo.”" 
1Samuel26:21 Sauro akati, “Ndakanganisa chidzoka zvako mwanangu Dhavhidhi. Handina chimwe chakaipa chandichaita kwauri nokuti waona upenyu hwangu huri chinhu chakakosha kwauri nhasi. Hezvika ndaita zvoupenzi chaizvo, ndatadza kwazvo!”" 
1Samuel26:22 Dhavhidhi akapindura achiti, “Pfumo ramambo iri. Rimwe jaya ngariuye kuno kuzoritora." 
1Samuel26:23 Tenzi anopa mubayiro munhu akarurama akatendeka. Nhasi uno Tenzi akuisai mumaoko angu asi ini ndarega zvangu kusimudzira ruoko rwangu muzodzwa waTenzi. 
1Samuel26:24 Nhasi uno ndaona upenyu hwenyu sechinhu chakakosha. Dai Tenzi akaonawo upenyu hwangu sechinhu chakakosha akandinunura munhamo dzangu dzose.” 
1Samuel26:25 Sauro akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Mwari ngaakukomborere zvako mwanangu Dhavhidhi. Uchanyatsoita zvinhu chaizvo, uchibudirira kwazvo.” Dhavhidhi akaenda zvake Sauro akadzokera kwake." 
1Samuel27:1 Dhavhidhi akazviti nechomumwoyo, “Pangu pachandiperera chete rimwe zuva naSauro uyu. Hapana chimwe chandingaite asi kutokurumidza kutizira kunyika yevaFirisitia. Sauro achabva anetawo nazvo zvokundivhima izvi munyika yose yeIsiraeri, ndigopunyuka mumaoko ake.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi navanhu vake mazana matanhatu vaaiva navo akasimuka akayambukira kwaAkishi mambo wokuGati, mwanakomana waMaoki." 
1Samuel27:3 Dhavhidhi akaita musha kuGati achigara naAkishi, iye pamwechete navanhu vake, mumwe nomumwe nemhuri yake. Aiva navakadzi vake vaviri, Abhinoamu wokuJezireeri naAbhigairi wokuKarimeri, chirikadzi yaNabhari." 
1Samuel27:4 Shoko parakasvika kuna Sauro rokuti Dhavhidhi akatizira kuGati, Sauro akabva aregera zvokumutsvaka." 
1Samuel27:5 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Akishi, “Kana muchida zvenyu, ndipeiwo nzvimbo yokugara mune rimwe guta renyu rokumaruwa ndigare zvangu ikoko. Zvinenge zvisina kunaka kuti ini muranda wenyu ndigare pamwechete nemi mumuzinda wenyu.”" 
1Samuel27:6 Musi iwoyo, Akishi akamupa guta reZikiragi, nokudaro Zikiragi rakabva rava guta ramadzimambo okwaJudha kusvikira pari nhasi." 
1Samuel27:7 Dhavhidhi akagara munyika yavaFirisitia gore nemwedzi mina. 
1Samuel27:8 Dhavhidhi navarwi vake vakakwira kundopamba vaGeshuri nevaGeziri navaAmereki nokuti vanhu ivava kubvira pasichigare ndivo vaigara kumatunhu okunge tava kuenda kuShuru nokuIjipiti. 
1Samuel27:9 Dhavhidhi paakarwisa matunhu iwayo, haana kumbosiya munhu, murume kana mukadzi, ari mupenyu. Aituta hwai nemombe namadhongi nenghamera nezvokupfeka obva adzokera kuna Akishi." 
1Samuel27:10 Akishi aizomubvunza kuti, “Ko wanga waenda kundorwisa kupiko nhasi?” Dhavhidhi aiti, “Ndandorwisa Negevhu yokwaJudha,” kana kuti “Negevhu yokwaJerahimeeri neNegevhu yokuvaKeni.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Dhavhidhi haaimbosiya munhu ari mupenyu, murume kana mukadzi kuitira kuti pasawane anounza shoko kuGati rokuti ndizvo zviri kuitwa naDhavhidhi izvi. Ndiko kaiva katsika kaDhavhidhi ikaka nguva yose yaaigara mumatunhu avaFirisitia." 
1Samuel27:12 Akishi akavimba naDhavhidhi achiti, “Dhavhidhi anyatsozvivengesa chaizvo navanhu vake vechiIsiraeri, saka achagara ari muranda wangu narini.”" 
1Samuel28:1 Pamazuva iwayo vaFirisitia vakakokorodza hondo dzavo kundorwisa Isiraeri. Akishi akataurira Dhavhidhi achiti, “Unozvizivaka kuti iwewe navanhu vako mucharwa muri kudivi rokwangu.”" 
1Samuel28:2 Dhavhidhi akapindura Akishi achiti, “Zvakanaka, muchangoonawo zvenyu zvandichaita ini muranda wenyu.” Akishi akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Heekaka! Ndichakuita muchengeti wangu narini narini.”" 
1Samuel28:3 Izvozvo Samueri akatenge afa, vaIsiraeri vamuchema vatomuviga kuRama, guta rokwake. Saurowo akanga adzinga munyikamo n'anga navanosvikirwa." 
1Samuel28:4 VaFirisitia vakakokorodzana vakasvikodzika matendhe avo kuShunemu. Sauro akaunganidzawo vaIsiraeri vose vakadzika matendhe avo kuGiribhoa. 
1Samuel28:5 Sauro paakaona hondo yavaFirisitia akadedera kwazvo nokutya. 
1Samuel28:6 Akada kunzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo, asi Tenzi haana kumupindura kana muzviroto kana neurimu kunyange nokuvaporofita." 
1Samuel28:7 Sauro akati kuvaranda vake, “Nditsvakirei mukadzi anosvikirwa ndiende kundobvunzira kwaari.” Ivo vakati, “Kuno mumwe anosvikirwa ari kuEndori.”" 
1Samuel28:8 Naizvozvo akapfeka dzimwe hanzu kuti asaziikanwe ndokuenda nousiku kumukadzi iyeyo aine vamwe varume vaviri. Akati, “Ndibvunzireiwo vari kumhepo mundidaidzirewo wandinenge ndadoma nezita.”" 
1Samuel28:9 Mukadzi uyu akamuti, “Inga kana nemi munonyatsozviziva wani zvakaitwa naSauro. Handiti akaparadza n'anga navanosvikirwa munyika ino. Ko seiko muchida kuteya upenyu hwangu kuda kundiurayisa zvenyu?”" 
1Samuel28:10 Sauro, akapika kwaari naTenzi achiti, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu hamumbofa makarangirwa izvozvi izvi.”" 
1Samuel28:11 Mukadzi ndokuti, “Zvino ndokudaidzirai ani?” Iye akati, “Ndidaidzireiwo Samueri.”" 
1Samuel28:12 Mukadzi uyu paakaona Samueri, akachema, akati kuna Sauro, “Ko mandinyengedzereiko kudai! Inga ndiwe Sauro wani.”" 
1Samuel28:13 Mambo akamuti, “Rega zvako kutya, chete chauri kumboona chii?” Mukadzi akati kuna Sauro, “Ndiri kuona mumwe mudzimu uri kunyuka pasi.”" 
1Samuel28:14 Akati kwaari, “Chimiro chawo chakadii?” Mukadzi uyu ndokuti, “Murume, harahwa iri kunyuka yakafukidzwa gemenzi.” Sauro akabva aziva kuti ndiSamueri, akakotamisa uso ndokumugwadamira." 
1Samuel28:15 Samueri akati kuna Sauro, “Ko wandinetsereiko nokundidaidza?” Sauro akati, “Ndapinda pfumvu chaiyo ini nokuti vaFirisitia vari kundirwisa, ukuwo Mwari andifuratira. Haachambondipa mhinduro kunyange navaporofita kana muzviroto. Ndokusaka ini ndakudaidzai kuti mundiudze zvokuita.”" 
1Samuel28:16 Samueri ndokuti, “Kana Tenzi akakufuratira kudaro akava mhandu yako, ko ini unogondibvunzireiwo?" 
1Samuel28:17 Tenzi pachake ari kuita kwauri sokutaura kwaakaita nomuromo wangu nokuti Tenzi akabvarura umambo kwauri akahupa mumwe wako, Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel28:18 Chiripo ndechokuti hauna kuteerera Tenzi. Wakarega iwe kutsividza vaAmereki kuvaratidza hasha dzake dzinotyisa, ndokusaka Tenzi aita izvozvi kwauri nhasi uno." 
1Samuel28:19 Chimwezve ndechokuti Tenzi achaisa vaIsiraeriwo pamwechete newe mumaoko avaFirisitia. Mangwana chaiwo iyewe navana vako vakomana muchange muineni. Tenzi achaisawo hondo yeIsiraeri mumaoko evaFirisitia.” 
1Samuel28:20 Pakarepo Sauro akati pasi rabada nokutya zvakataurwa naSamueri. Simba rake rakanga rapera nokuti akanga apedza muswere wose iwoyo nousiku ihwohwo hwose asina chaadya. 
1Samuel28:21 Mukadzi uyu akaenda pana Sauro, paakaona kuti zvakanga zvamutyisa kwazvo akamuti, “Chinzwai, ini ndambokuteererai. Ndamboita zvokutobatira ura mumaoko ini muranda wenyu, ndikateerera zvamandiudza." 
1Samuel28:22 Zvino chimbonditeereraiwo ini muranda wenyu, ndimbokuunzirai kachingwa mudye mukoke simba mugoenda zvenyu.”" 
1Samuel28:23 Sauro akaramba achiti, “Zvokudya, aiwa. Asi varanda vake nomukadzi uyu vakamunyengetedza ndokubva azovateerera zvake. Ipapo akamuka pasi, akagara pamubhedha." 
1Samuel28:24 Mukadzi uyu aiva nemhuru yaingunokodzwa mumba. Pakarepo akabva angoiuraya akatora upfu kwekoroni akahukanya ndokubva abika chingwa chisina mbiriso.” 
1Samuel28:25 Akazvipa kuna Sauro navaranda vake vakadya. Vakazosimuka ndokuenda zvavo usiku ihwohwo. 
1Samuel29:1 VaFirisitia vakaunganidza hondo dzavo dzose kuAfeki. VaIsiraeri vakadzikawo matendhe pedyo nechisipiti chokuJezireeri. 
1Samuel29:2 Madzishe evaFirisitia akati achifamba aine zvikwata zvavarwi zvezviuru zvakasiyana-siyana, vachipfuura vari zana zana, Dhavhidhi navarwi vakewo vari necheshure vaina Akishi," 
1Samuel29:3 vatungamiri vavaFirisitia vakabvunza kuti, “Ko vaHebheru ava ndevei?” Akishi akapindura vatungamiriri vaFirisitia ava achiti, “NdiDhavhidhi wani uyu, muranda waSauro mambo weIsiraeri. Atova namazuva chaiwo wani kana kutoti makore aineni. Kubvira zuva raakapomoka kwaSauro, ini handina kuona chakaipa maari ini kusvikira nhasi uno.”" 
1Samuel29:4 Asi vatungamiriri vavaFirisitia vakamushatirirwa vakati, “Dzoserai murume uyu kwakare kuguta ramakamuti agare. Ngaarege kuenda nesu kundorwa nokuti anotipandukira uyu, kana tasvika pakurwa. Munoti angagotsvaka sei kuwirirana zvakare natenzi wake? Handiti anotozviita nemisoro yavarume vokwedu ava?" 
1Samuel29:5 Handiti ndiye Dhavhidhi here uyu wavaiimba vachidavirana vachitamba vachiti, “Sauro wakauraya zviuru Asi Dhavhidhi makumi namakumi ezviuru?”" 
1Samuel29:6 Akishi akadaidza Dhavhidhi ndokuti kwaari, “NaTenzi mupenyu, iwe wanga uri munhu akatendeka, uye sokuona kwangu unenge uchifanira chaizvo kuenda neni mutendhe nokuti mauri iwe handina kuona chakaipa kubvira musi wawakauya kwandiri kusvikira pari nhasi. Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo madzishe aya haasi kugutsikana newe." 
1Samuel29:7 Zvino wochidzokera zvako zvakanaka kuti urege kugumbura madzishe aya avaFirisitia.” 
1Samuel29:8 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Akishi, “Ko chii chandakaita? Chakaipa chamakaona mandiri ini muranda wenyu chii chaizvo kubvira musi wandakatangisa kukushandirai kusvikira nhasi uno chingazonditadzisa kuendawo kundorwa navavengi venyu changamire?”" 
1Samuel29:9 Akishi akapindura Dhavhidhi achiti, “Ini ndinozviziva zvangu kuti kwandiri ini wakanaka mwoyo somutumwa waMwari. Asi vatungamiriri vavaFirisitia vati, ‘Haaende nesu kundorwa.’" 
1Samuel29:10 Saka wofumomuka pamwechete navaranda vatenzi vako vakauya newe moenda mangwanani mambakwedza.” 
1Samuel29:11 Saka Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakamuka mangwanani-ngwanani vodzokera kunyika yavaFirisitia, vaFirisitia vakaenda kuJezireeri." 
1Samuel30:1 Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakasvika kuZikiragi, rava zuva retatu. Vakasvikowana vaAmareki vapamba zvinhu mudunhu reNegevhu nomuguta reZikiragi. Vakanga varwisa Zikiragi variroromesa nomoto." 
1Samuel30:2 Vakatapa vakadzi navamwe vose vaivamo kubvira kuvaduku kusvikira kuvakuru. Havana wavakauraya asi vakangokukuchana navo ndokuenda. 
1Samuel30:3 Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakati vachisvika muguta umu wanei raroromeswa nomoto, madzimai avo navana vavo vakomana navasikana wanei vatapwa." 
1Samuel30:4 Dhavhidhi navanhu vaaiva navo vakazhamba kusvikira vasisina simba rokuchema. 
1Samuel30:5 Vakadzi vaDhavhidhi vaviri, Ahinoamu wokuJezireeri naAbhigairi chirikadzi yaNabhari vokuKaremeri vakanga atapwawo." 
1Samuel30:6 Dhavhidhi akasuruvara kwazvo nokuti vamwe vakanga votoda zvokumutaka namabwe pamusana pokuti vanhu vose vakanga vasuruvara kwazvo vofunga zvino vana vavo vakomana navasikana. Asi Dhavhidhi akawana simba rake muna Tenzi, Mwari wake." 
1Samuel30:7 Dhavhidhi akati kumupristi Abhiatari mwanakomana waAhimereki, “Uya kuno neefodhi.” Abhiatari akabva auya neefodhi kuna Dhavhidhi." 
1Samuel30:8 Dhavhidhi akada kunzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nezvinhu izvi akati, “Ndoronda here chikwata ichi? Ndichavabata here?” Mwari ndokumuti, “Varonde zvako unovabata chete ugovanunura.”" 
1Samuel30:9 Dhavhidhi akabva asimukawo namazana matanhatu avarwi vaakanga ainawo. Vakasvika kukakova keBhesori vamwe vavo vakasara ipapo. 
1Samuel30:10 Asi iye Dhavhidhi navamwe vavo mazana mana vakaramba vachironda. Vamwe mazana maviri vakasarapo, vakanga vaneta kwazvo, vakatadza kuyambuka kakova keBhesori." 
1Samuel30:11 Kune vamwe vakawana mumwe muIjipiti musango vakauya naye kuna Dhavhidhi. Vakamupa chingwa akadya, vakamupawo mvura yokunwa." 
1Samuel30:12 Vakamupawo chimedu chechambwa chamakuyu nechisumbu chamagirepisi akaomeswa. Paakanga apedza kudya kudaro, simba rake rakabva radzoka pakare nokuti akanga apedza mazuva matatu, siku nesikati asina kana kuisa chinhu mukanwa kana kunwa mvura zvayo." 
1Samuel30:13 Dhavhidhi akamubvunza kuti, “Uri wokwaaniko iwe? Unobva kupi?” Iye ndokuti, “Ndiri mukomana wokuIjipiti. Ndiri muranda womumwe muAmareki. Tenzi wangu akangonditiwo njo pano apa ndarwara mazuva matatu apera aya." 
1Samuel30:14 Takanga tatorwisa dunhu reNegevhu rokuvaKereti, nedunhu reNegevhu rokwaJudha nedunhu reNegevhu rokwaKarebhu, tikapisawo Zikiragi nomoto.”" 
1Samuel30:15 Dhavhidhi akamuti, “Ungakwanise here kundisvitsa kune chikwata ichochi.” Iye akati, “Chimbonditsidziraiwo naMwari kuti hamundiuraye kana kundiisa mumaoko atenzi wangu ndigokusvitsai zvenyu kune chikwata ichocho.”" 
1Samuel30:16 Akadzika naye ikoko wanei vaAmareki vakaita zvavo rurasademo, vakapararira nenzvimbo iyoyo yose vachiti uku runodya, uku runonwa, uku runotamba pamusana pezvose zvavakanga vapamba kunyika yavaFirisitia nokunyika yokwaJudha." 
1Samuel30:17 Dhavhidhi akavarakatisa kuuraya kubvira parubvunzavaeni kusvikira manheru eramangwana racho. Hakuna akapunyuka kusara kwamajaya mazana mana akatasva ngamera akatiza. 
1Samuel30:18 Dhavhidhi akadzosa zvose zvakanga zvapambwa navaAmareki, akanunura vakadzi vake vaviri." 
1Samuel30:19 Hapana chakashayikwa, kana kai zvako kubvira kuvana vakomana navasikana kusvikira kune zvakanga zvapambwa kunyange nezvakanga zvatorwa. Dhavhidhi akadzoka nazvo zvose." 
1Samuel30:20 Dhavhidhi akavatorerawo mombe dzose nezvimwe zvipfuwo izvozvo. Vanhu vakatinha zvipfuwo izvozvo zviri mberi kwake vachiti, “Izvi ndizvo zvakapambwa naDhavhidhi.”" 
1Samuel30:21 Dhavhidhi akasvika pana varume vaya mazana maviri vakanga vaneta zvokuti vakanga vasisakwanise kuenda naDhavhidhi, vakanga vambosiyiwa vaya pakakova keBhesori. Vakauya kuzochingurana naDhavhidi pamwechete navanhu vaiva naye. Dhavhidhi paakasvika kwavari akavakwazisa." 
1Samuel30:22 Asi kwaiva navamwe vakaipa mwoyo vomuchokoto pavanhu vakanga vaenda naDhavhidhi vakakonora vachiti, “Pamusana pokuti vanhu ava havana kuenda nesu, hapana chatinovapa pazvinhu zvatakapamba zvatakadzosa izvi asi kuti munhu ngaangotora mukadzi wake navana vake aende.”" 
1Samuel30:23 Asi Dhavhidhi akati, “Kweteka hama dzangu, hamungadaro nezvinhu zvatakangopiwa zvedu naTenzi. Inga Mwari akatichengeta wani akaisa chikwata chavavengi vedu mumaoko edu." 
1Samuel30:24 Ndiani angabangoteerera zvamuri kutaura? Chiripo chaicho ndechokuti chawana aenda kundorwa ndicho chichawanawo anosara pazvinhu, mugove wavo mumwechete.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Kubvira musi iwoyo zvichienda mberi Dhavhidhi akabva ati uve murao nomutemo weIsiraeri kusvikira pari nhasi. 
1Samuel30:26 Dhavhidhi paakasvika kuZikiragi akatumira zvimwe zvaakanga apamba kushamwari dzake, vakuru vakuru vokwaJudha achiti, “Hecho chikomborero chezvakapambwa kuvavengi vaTenzi.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Vaakatumira ndeava vanoti: vokuBhetieri, novokudunhu reNegevhu rokuRamoti, kwouya vokuJatiri," 
1Samuel30:28 novokuAroeri, novokuSifumoti, novokuEshitemoa," 
1Samuel30:29 kwoti vokuRakari, novokumaguta okuJerahimeeri, novokumaguta okuvaKeni," 
1Samuel30:30 kwouyawo vokuHoruma, novokuBhorashani, novokuAtaki," 
1Samuel30:31 kwozoti vokuHebhuroni nokumwe kwose zvako kwaimboshanyirwa naDhavhidhi navarwi vake. 
1Samuel31:1 VaFirisitia vakarwisana navaIsiraeri, vaIsiraeri vakatiza vaFirisitia vakarakatiswa kufa kugomo reGiribhoa." 
1Samuel31:2 VaFirisitia vakati tsvome tsvome kudzingirirana naSauro navanakomana vake. VaFirisitia ava vakauraya Jonatani naAbhinadhabhu naMarikishua vana vaSauro vakomana. 
1Samuel31:3 Hondo yakanga zvino yaomera Sauro, vemiseve vakabva vamuwana vakamukuvadza zvakaipisisa kwazvo." 
1Samuel31:4 Sauro akati kune wokumutakurira zvombo zvehondo, “Buritsa bakatwa rako mumuhara undibaye naro, vangadaro vanhu ava vasina kudzingiswa vakauya vakandibaya, ivo, vachindiita zvavo chiseko.” Asi wokumutakurira zvombo zvehondo uyu akaramba nokuti akatya kwazvo. Sauro ndokubva atora bakatwa rake pachake ndokuzviwisira pariri." 
1Samuel31:5 Uya aimutakurira zvombo zvehondo achionawo kuti Sauro afa, naiyewo akazviwisira pabakatwa rake, akafawo pamwechete naye." 
1Samuel31:6 Uku ndokufa kwakaita Sauro navana vake vakomana vatatu, neaimutakurira zvombo zvehondo zvake, navarwi vake vose musi wakarewo pamwechete." 
1Samuel31:7 VaIsiraeri vaiva mhiri kwebani navaiva kumhiri kwaJorodhani pavakaona kuti varwi veIsiraeri vakanga vatiza uyewo kuti Sauro navana vake vakomana vatatu vakanga vafa, vakasiya maguta avo vakatiza. VaFirisitia vakaenda vakagaramo." 
1Samuel31:8 Ramangwana racho vaFirisitia vakaenda kundotora zvaiva pazvitunha. Vakawana Sauro navana vake vakomana vatatu vakati kan'an'a kugomo reGiribhoa. 
1Samuel31:9 Vakamudimura musoro vakakatanura chidemautare chake chokuzvidzvivirira Nacho muhondo. Vakatumira nhumwa kunyika yose yavaFirisitia nedama rakanaka kwazvo kutemberi yavamwari vavo nokuvanhu vokwavo. 
1Samuel31:10 Vakaisa chidemautare chake chokuzvidzivirira nacho mutemberi yaAshitaroti. Vakaroverera chitunha chake pamadziro erusvingo rweBhetishani. 
1Samuel31:11 Vanhu vokuJabheshi Gireadhi pavakanzwa zvakanga zvaitwa navaFirisitia kuna Sauro," 
1Samuel31:12 varume vokwavo vose magamba vakasimuka vakafamba usiku hwose vakasvikotora chitunha chaSauro nezvevanakomana vake pamadziro erusvingo rweBhetishani vakadzokera nazvo kuJabheshi vakazvipisa ikoko. 
1Samuel31:13 Vakatora mapfupa avo vakaaviga pasi pomuti womutamarisiki kuJabheshi, vakatsanya mazuva manomwe." 
2Samuel1:1 Mushure mokufa kwaSauro, Dhavhidhi adzoka kwaakanga andorakatisa kuuraya vaAmareki Dhavhidhi akambogara mazuva maviri muZikiragi." 
2Samuel1:2 Pazuva rechitatu racho, ndiye vhu mumwe murume achibva kumatendhe okwaSauro, aine hembe dzakabvaruka, nehuruva mumusoro. Paakasvika kuna Dhavhidhi, akati pasi gwadagwa achimuremekedza." 
2Samuel1:3 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Unobva kupi?” Iye akamupindudra achiti, “Ndapunyuka kumatendhe eIsiraeri.”" 
2Samuel1:4 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Tipire tinzwe, zvafamba sei?” Iye akapindura achiti, “Vanhu vatiza kuhondo. Uye vamwe vavo vakawanda kwazvo varakatiswa, vafa. Sauro nomwanakomana wake Jonatani vafawo.”" 
2Samuel1:5 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kujaya iri rokuuya neshoko kwaari, “Ko wazviziva sei kuti Sauro nomwanakomana wake Jonatani vafa?”" 
2Samuel1:6 Jaya rakamuudza rikati kwaari, “Ndakangosvikawo zvangu nokugomo reGiribhoa, onei, Sauro aripo akazendamira pfumo rake ukuwo ngoro dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo vachiti tsvome tsvome naye.”" 
2Samuel1:7 Paakati cheu kutarisa shure, akandiona ndokubva andidaidza, ini ndokuti, “Ndokuno changamire.”" 
2Samuel1:8 Iye ndokunditi, “Ndiwe aniko iwe?” Ini ndikati, “Ndiri muAmareki.”" 
2Samuel1:9 Iye akanditi, “Uya umire pandiri pano uchindipedzisa zvako nokuti ndatambura ini asi mweya wangu warambirira mandiri." 
2Samuel1:10 Saizvozvowo ndakandomira paakanga ari ndokubva ndamupedzisa nokuti ndakanga ndanyatsoona kuti haamborarama namawiro aakanga akaita pasi kudaro. Ndakatora ngundu yakanga iri mumusoro make netsambo yaiva muruoko rwake. Ndauya nazvo kwamuri changamire.” 
2Samuel1:11 Dhavhidhi akati ndu hembe dzake akadzibvarura neshungu, ndozvakaitawo vamwe varume vose vaaiva navo." 
2Samuel1:12 Vakachema Sauro nomwanakomana wake Jonatani navanhu vaTenzi nemhuri yose yeIsiraeri nokuti vakanga varakatiswa kuuraiwa namapakatwa. Vakahwihwidza kuchema vakatsanya kusvikira manheru. 
2Samuel1:13 Dhavhidhi akati kujaya riya rokumutaurira, “Ko iwe unobva kupi?” Iye akati, “Ini ndiri mwana womumwe muuyi, muAmareki.”" 
2Samuel1:14 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kwaari, “Chakakupa kurega kutya kusimudzira ruoko rwako kuparadza muzodzwa waTenzi chii?”" 
2Samuel1:15 Dhavhidhi akabva adaidza rimwe jaya akati, “Naye munhu uyu, mupfuudze.”" 
2Samuel1:16 Akabva amuponda akafa. Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Rufu rwako ndorwokuzviparira nokuti muromo wako wawataura wokutoti zvako, ‘Ndakauraya muzodzwa waTenzi’ wakuparira.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Dhavhidhi akagurukuta kuchema Sauro nomwana wake Jonatani achiimba rwiyo rwengondo. 
2Samuel1:18 Akati rudzidziswe vedzinza rokwaJudha. Zvino ngondo yacho ino iyi yakanyorwa muBhuku raJashari, rinoti:" 
2Samuel1:19 “Vanodadisa Isiraeri vacho vachiti kata kata kufa, vachiti kata kata pamitunhu yenyu yakatunhumara. Zvauya sei chokwadi, magamba kuti rakata kudai?" 
2Samuel1:20 Dai mangorega zvenyu kuzvitaura kuGati, kunyange zvako kuzviparidzira muAshikeroni. Vanasikana vavaFirisitia vangadaro vakapembera kufara. Vanasikana vavanhu vasina kudzingiswa vakazvitutumadza." 
2Samuel1:21 “Imi makomo eGiribhoa pamusoro penyu, dova ngarirege kudonherapo, kana mvura ngairege kunayapo, parege kuva neminda inopa mbeswa zhinji; nokuti nhoo dzamagamba dzakafumurirwa ipapo. Nhoo yaSauro, zvokuzorwa mafuta zvakapera." 
2Samuel1:22 Museve waJonatani wakanga usingadzoke, usina ropa rewainge wauraya. Bakatwa raSauro haraidzoka risina mafuta amagamba." 
2Samuel1:23 “Sauro naJonatani kuvanhu, vaiva vepamoyo chaivo. Naivowo pachavo vari vanhu vakanaka. Upenyu hwavo hwose kusvikira parufu, havana kumbopararana. Pakumhanya gondo raisara pasi, pasimba dziri mvumba chaidzo kupfuura shumba." 
2Samuel1:24 “Imi vanasikana veIsiraeri, chemai Sauro ndiye aikupfekedzai hanzu tsvuku dzamandiriri, aiisa zvishongo zvendarama pazvipfeko zvenyu." 
2Samuel1:25 “Zvauya sei chokwadi, magamba kuti rakata mukati mehondo kudai? Jonatani chaiye achiti rashu, kufa pamitunhu yenyu yakatunhumara." 
2Samuel1:26 “Zvako zvandishungurudza mwoyo, mukoma wangu Jonatani kwandiri, wanga uri wapamwoyo chaiye. Kundida kwako kwanga kusingatauriki, kwaikunda rudo rwavanhukadzi." 
2Samuel1:27 “Zvauya sei chokwadi, magamba kuti rakata kudai, zvombo zvenyu zvehondo kuparara kudai?”" 
2Samuel2:1 Mushure maizvozvi Dhavhidhi akandobvunza kuna Tenzi kuti “Ndoenda here kune rimwe ramaguta aJudha?” Tenzi ndokumuti, “Enda zvako.” Dhavhidhi ndokuti, “Ndoenda kune ripi?” Tenzi akati, “kuHebhuroni.”" 
2Samuel2:2 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi akakwidza kuendako pamwechetewo namadzimai ake maviri, vana Ahinoamu wokuJezireeri naAbhigairi chirikadzi iya yaNabhari wokuKarimeri." 
2Samuel2:3 Dhavhidhi akaendako navanhu vake vaaiva navo munhu wose aine mhuri yake. Vakagara mumaguta okuHebhuroni. 
2Samuel2:4 Varume vokwaJudha vakauyako vakagadza Dhavhidhi umambo hwokwaJudha. Pavakataurira Dhavhidhi kuti, “Varume vokuJabheshigireadhi ndivo vakaviga Sauro,”" 
2Samuel2:5 Dhavhidhi akatuma nhumwa kuvarume ava vokuJabheshigireadhi akati kwavari, “Tenzi ngaakukomborerei nokuti makaitira Sauro, changamire wenyu mwoyo wakanaka nokumuviga kwamakaita." 
2Samuel2:6 Tenzi ngaachikuitirai mwoyochena avewo zvake akatendeseka. Iniwo ndichakuitirai zvakanaka pamusana pokuti makaita izvozvi. 
2Samuel2:7 Saka zvino chishingai mwoyo, muve vanhu vane chivindi, changamire wenyu, Sauro zvaakafa uyewo vokwaJudha zvavakandigadza umambo hwokwawo kuti ndivatonge.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Izvozvo Abhuneru mwanakomana waNeru mutungamiriri wehondo yaSauro akanga atora Ishibhosheti mwanakomana waSauro akaenda naye kuMahanaimu. 
2Samuel2:9 Akamuita mambo wokuGireadhi newevaAsheru nokuJezirieri nokwaEfuraimu nokwaBhenjamini neIsiraeri yose zvayo. 
2Samuel2:10 Ishibhosheti mwanakomana waSauro akanga ava namakumi mana amakore paakatangisa kutonga Isiraeri. Akatonga kwamakore maviri. Asi vokwaJudha vainge vachitevera Dhavhidhi. 
2Samuel2:11 Dhavhidhi aiva mambo wokwaJudha kwamakore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu kuHebhuroni. 
2Samuel2:12 Abhuneru mwanakomana waNeru namakurukuta aIshibhosheti mwanakomana waSauro vakabva kuMahanaimu vakaenda kuGibheoni. 
2Samuel2:13 Joabhu mwanakomana waZeruya namakurukuta okwaDhavhidhi vakabuda vakandosangana navo kudziva rokuGibheoni. Vakagara pasi vakati vamwe kumhiri uku vamwe kumhiri uku padziva ipapo. 
2Samuel2:14 Abhuneru akati kuna Joabhu, “Regai mamwe majaya edu amirisane ativaraidze.” Joabhu akati, “Ngavamirisane zvavo.”" 
2Samuel2:15 Ivo vakandomirisana vakati uku gumi navaviri vokwaBhenjamini naIshibhosheti mwanakomana waSauro; uku gumi navaviri vokumakurukota aDhavhidhi. 
2Samuel2:16 Munhu oga oga akati dzvi musoro womumwe waakanga akamirisana naye, akati nebakatwa zwi parutivi pewaakanga akamirisana naye vachibva vati pamwechete pasi rikiti. Naizvozvo nzvimbo iyi yakatumidzwa zita rokuti “Guraramapakatwa.” Iri kuGibheoni." 
2Samuel2:17 Zuva irori kwakarwiwa hondo inotyisa. Abhuneru navarume vokwaIsiraeri vakakurirwa nevokumakurukota okwaDhavhidhi. 
2Samuel2:18 Ipapo paiva navanakomana vaZeruya vatatu vaiti: Joabhu naAbhishai naAsaheri. Zvino Asaheri uyu aiva mhene chaiyo pakumhanya. 
2Samuel2:19 Asaheri akadzingirirana naAbhuneru akaramba akati naye tande asina kwaaitsaukira, achitevera Abhuneru chete." 
2Samuel2:20 Abhuneru akacheuka ndokuti, “Ndiwe here Asaheri?” Iye akati, “Ndini.”" 
2Samuel2:21 Abhuneri akamuti, “Tsaukira zvako kurudyi kana kuruboshwe uwane rimwe jaya raungabate uripambe.” Asi Asaheri akaramba angoti tsvome tsvome naye chete." 
2Samuel2:22 Abhuneru ndokutizve kuna Asaheri, “Rega zvokundidzingira izvi. Unodirei kuti ndikupatitsire pasi? Ndingazotarisana sei nomukoma wako Joabhu?”" 
2Samuel2:23 Asi Asaheri akaramba angoti naye naye chete. Naizvozvo Abhuneru akabva amuti neshure dhuvhu nomusisi zvokuti pfumo rakati bherevere ndokubuda nokumusana, achibva ati pasi mbonye mbonye, ndiye pakarepo fatata kufa. Vose vakanga vati unga unga paakawira vakamira vakati kanha kutarira." 
2Samuel2:24 Asi Joabhu naAbhishai vakaramba vachingodzingirirana naAbhuneru. Kuzoti zuva rodoka vakasvika kuchikomo cheAma chokunge tava kuda kusvika kuGia munzira yokurenje reGibheoni. 
2Samuel2:25 VokwaBhenjamini vakaunganidzana kuna Abhuneru vakaita chikwata chimwechete, vakandomira pamusoro pechikomo." 
2Samuel2:26 Abhuneru akadaidzira kuna Joabhu achiti, “Ko iro bakatwa rokuuraya vanhu risisakandwe pasi, ndohwava upenyu here? Hauzive here kuti magumo acho anorwadza kwazvo? Kusvikira rini chaizvo usati wati vanhu vokwako vadzoke varege kuronda hama dzavo?”" 
2Samuel2:27 Joabhu akati, “NaMwari chaiye mupenyu, dai wanga usina kutaura saizvozvo chokwadi varume ava vaitosvikira mangwana mangwanani vachingoronda chete hama dzavo idzodzo.”" 
2Samuel2:28 Nokudaro Joabhu akaridza hwamanda vanhu vose vakamira vakabva varega kuronda vokwaIsiraeri ndokubva varega kuramba vachirwa. 
2Samuel2:29 Abhuneru navanhu vake vakararirofamba usiku ihwohwo nomuArabha vakayambuka Jorodhani vakafamba mangwanani ose vakasvika kuMahanaimu. 
2Samuel2:30 Joabhu akadzoka mukuronda Abhuneru. Paakaunganidza vanhu vose pamwechete pakaonekwa kuti kuvanhu vokwaDhavhidhi, varume gumi navapfumbamwe pakanga pasina tisingaverengere Asaheri." 
2Samuel2:31 Asi ivo vokumakurukota okwaDhavhidhi vakanga vauraya vanhu vokwaBhenjamini mazana matatu avarume ana varume makumi matanhatu evokwaAbhuneru. 
2Samuel2:32 Vakatora Asaheri vakamuviga muguva rababa vake kuBheterehemu. Joabhu navanhu vake vakararirofamba usiku hwose vakaedzerwa vava kuHebhuroni. 
2Samuel3:1 Kwakaitika hondo kwenguva ndefu kwazvo pakati pemhuri yokwaSauro neyokwaDhavhidhi. Dhavhidhi akaramba achisimbarara, uku vemhuri yokwaSauro vakaramba vachiderera." 
2Samuel3:2 Dhavhidhi wakabereka vana vakomana kuHebhuroni. Dangwe rake ndiAmoni waakaberekerwa naAhinoamu wokuJezireeri. 
2Samuel3:3 Wechipiri ndiKireabhu waakaberekerwa naAbhigairi, chirikadzi yaNabhari wokuKarimeri. Wechitatu ndiAbhusharomu waakaberekerwa naMaaka, mukunda waTarimai, mambo weGeshuri." 
2Samuel3:4 Wechina ndiAdhoniya waakaberekerwa naHagiti. Wechishanu ndiShefatiya waakaberekerwa naAbhitari. 
2Samuel3:5 Wechitanhatu ndiItireamu wokuEgira mudzimai waDhavhidhi Ivava ndovana vaDhavhidhi vakomana vakaberekerwa muHebhuroni. 
2Samuel3:6 Hondo payaingunotsviriridza kudaro pakati pemhuri yokwaSauro nemhuri yokwaDhavhidhi, Abhuneru akanga achitoita kuti ukuru hwake hudzike midzi mumhuri yokwaSauro." 
2Samuel3:7 Zvino Sauro aiva nomurongo wake ainzi Rizipa mwanasikana waAiya. Ishibhosheti akabvunza Abhuneru kuti, “Wapindwa nei kubva wapinda mumba nomurongo wababa vangu?”" 
2Samuel3:8 Abhuneru akashatiriswa kwazvo nezvakataurwa naIshibhosheti izvi akati, “Heya unoti ndiri mbwaka ini, yokwaJudha? Iye nhasi uno ndiri munhu ano mwoyochena kumhuri yokwaSauro, baba vako nokuvakoma navanun'una vavo, neshamwari dzavo. Handina kukuisa mumaoko aDhavhidhi. Asi zvino wava kundipa mhosvaka iwe yezvomukadziwo zvake." 
2Samuel3:9 Mwari ngaandione, asve andiomesera kwazvo iyeni Abhuneru kana ndikarega kuchiitira Dhavhidhi zvaakamutsidzira," 
2Samuel3:10 zvokubvisa umambo mumba yokwaSauro agoita kuti umambo hwaDhavhidhi hudzike midzi muIsiraeri nokwaJudha, kubvira kwaDhani kusvikira kuBheerishebha.”" 
2Samuel3:11 Ishibhosheti haana kana kuzokwanisa kumupindura chinhu nokuti akanga ava kumutya. 
2Samuel3:12 Abhuneru akatumira nhume kuna Dhavhidhi kuHebhuroni kundoti, “Muridzi wenyika ino ndiani? Imi neni ngatiitei chibvumirano. Zviripo ndezvizvi ini ndichakubatsirai kuunganidza Isiraeri yose kwamuri.”" 
2Samuel3:13 Akati, “Zvakanaka, ngatiitei zvedu chibvumirano. Asi chinhu chimwechete chandinokumbira kwauri ndechichi chokuti: handidi kuonana newe kusatoti wauya naMikari, mukunda waSauro paunouya kuzondiona.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Dhavhidhi akabva atumirawo nhume kuna Ishibhosheti mwanakomana waSauro kundoti, “Ndipe kuno mukadzi wangu, Mikari wandakaroora nezana rezvikanda zvapamberi zvavaFirisitia.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Ishibhosheti akatumirawo nhume akamutora kumurume wake Paritieri mwana wavaRaishi. 
2Samuel3:16 Asi murume wake akaendawo naye achimutevera achichema nzira yose kusvikira kuBhahurimu. Abhuneru akazomuti, “Chienda, chidzokera.” Iye ndokudzokera." 
2Samuel3:17 Abhuneru akataurirana navakuru vakuru vokwaIsiraeri kuti, “Kwenguva yapera iyi manga muchingunotsvaka kuti Dhavhidhi ave mambo wenyu." 
2Samuel3:18 Zvino dai machiita zvenyu kudaro nokuti Tenzi akatotsidzira Dhavhidhi kuti, ‘Ndichashandisa muranda wangu, Dhavhidhi kununura vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri mumaoko avaFirisitia nomumaoko avavengi vavo vose.’ ”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abhuneru akataurawo nevokwaBhenjamini akandosvitsawo munzeve dzaDhavhidhi kuHebhuroni, zvinhu zvose zvakanga zvakanaka mukuona kwevokwaIsiraeri nomukuonawo kwavose vedzinza rokwaBhenjamini." 
2Samuel3:20 Abhuneru akasvika kuna Dhavhidhi kuHebhuroni aina makumi maviri avarume. Dhavhidhi akaitira Abhuneru navarume vaaiva navo mabiko. 
2Samuel3:21 Abhuneru akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Chiregai ndisimuke ndiende zvangu ndindounganidza Isiraeri yose pasi penyu mambo, changamire kuti vaite chibvumirano nemi uyewo kuti mugotonga nyika yose imi muchifadzwawo nazvo.” Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akati Abhuneru aende zvake, Abhuneru ndokuenda zvake zvakanaka." 
2Samuel3:22 Pakarepo makurukota okwaDhavhidhi akabva ati tutururu vhe vaina Joabhu vachibva kundopamba vakagukuchira zvinhu zvakawanda kwazvo zvavakanga vapamba. Asi Abhuneru akanga atobva kare pana Dhavhidhi kuHebhuroni nokuti akanga ati aende zvake iyewo ndokuendawo zvake zvakanaka. 
2Samuel3:23 Pakasvika Joabhu nehondo yose yaaiva nayo, vanhu vakataurira Joabhu kuti, “Abhuneru mwanakomana waNeru auya kuna mambo, ivo vatomurega zvavo akaenda, akatoendawo zvake zvakanaka.”" 
2Samuel3:24 Joabhu akabva aenda kuna mambo akati, “Ko ndochii ichochi chamaita? Abhuneru kutouya zvake kwamuri kuno, sei imi mamurega achienda? Kuendaka kwaatoita ikoku." 
2Samuel3:25 Zivai kuti Abhuneru mwana waNeru chaichoicho chaanga avinga kuno kuzokunyengedzai nokuongorora mafambiro enyu nokuzivurura zvose zvamuri kuita.” 
2Samuel3:26 Joabhu paakangoti ibvei pana Dhavhidhi, akatuma nhume kutevera Abhuneru. Dzakadzoka naye kubva kutsime repaSira. Asi Dhavhidhi haana kuzviziva." 
2Samuel3:27 Pakadzoka Abhuneru kuHebhuroni, Joabhu akamutora akaenda naye parutivi munhandare yesuo guru reguta kuti ambotaurirana zvake kazevezeve naye. Ipapo ndopaakamubhovhora mudumbu akabva afa kuri kutsividza ropa romunun'una wake Asaheri raakadeura." 
2Samuel3:28 Kuzoti Dhavhidhi paakazvinzwa akati, “Ini nevokwangu tichagara nariini wose tisina mhosva pana Tenzi yokudeura ropa raAbhuneru mwanakomana waNeru." 
2Samuel3:29 Ngaipfukire iye Joabhu navose vemba yokwababa vake. Mumhuri yokwaJoabhu ngamurege kushayikwa vanhu vanotambura neizvi zvinoti: chirwere chezvinobuda mumuviri, namaperembudzi navanotoda mudonzvo kuti vafambe navanoita zvokuurayiwa nebakatwa kana vanofa nenzara!”" 
2Samuel3:30 Ndozvakaita Joabhu nomunun'una wake Abhishai, vakauraya Abhuneru nokuti Abhuneru akanga auraya munun'una wavo Asaheri muhondo kuGibheoni." 
2Samuel3:31 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Joabhu nokuvanhu vose vaiva naye, “Bvarurai hanzu dzenyu mupfeke masaga mucheme Abhuneru.” Mambo Dhavhidhi pachavo vakatevera banda raiva nechitunha." 
2Samuel3:32 Vakaviga Abhuneru kuHebhuroni. Mambo vakaridza mhere vakahwihwidza kuchema vari paguva raAbhuneru, vanhu vose vakahwihwidzawo kuchema." 
2Samuel3:33 Dhavhidhi akaimba rwiyo rwengondo kuchema Abhuneru achiti: “Abhuneri kufa here chokwadi serema kudai. 
2Samuel3:34 Haunaka iwe kumbosungwa maoko; makumbo ako ngetani hadzizivi. Mufiro wako ndowa avo chete, vanofa mumaoko avakaipa.” Vanhu vose vakahwihwidza kumuchema." 
2Samuel3:35 Vanhu vose vakauya kuzonyengetedza Dhavhidhi kuti awane chaangadye zuva risati radoka. Asi Dhavhidhi akatsidza kuti, “Mwari ngaandione asve andiomesera kwazvo kana ndikaruma chingwa mukanwa mangu kana chimwewo zvacho zuva risati radoka!”" 
2Samuel3:36 Vanhu vakazviona zvikavafadza. Zvose zvakaitwa namambo zvakafadza vanhu vose. 
2Samuel3:37 Naizvozvo vanhu vose nevokwaIsiraeri vose vakazviziva zuva iroro kuti chakanga chisiri chido chamambo chokuti Abhuneru mwanakomana waNeru aurayiwe. 
2Samuel3:38 Mambo akati kumakurukota ake, “Hamuzive here kuti nhasi uno muIsiraeri tashayikirwa nachangamire chaivo, gamba chairo?" 
2Samuel3:39 Kunyange zvazvo ndakagadzwa umambo, zvanhasi uno izvi ini zvandipedza simba ini. Zvavana Zeruya ava zvandiomera. Tenzi ngaarange munhu wakaipa zvakakodzerana nouipi hwake.”" 
2Samuel4:1 Kuzoti Ishibhosheti mwanakomana waSauro anzwa kuti Abhuneru akafira kuHebhuroni zvakamupedza simba, zvikakangaidzawo vokwaIsiraeri vose." 
2Samuel4:2 Zvino mwana waSauro uyu aiva navarume vaviri vaiva vokutungamirira zvikwata zvavapambi. Mumwe ainzi Bhaana, mumwe achinzi Rekabhu vanakomana vaRimoni mumwe murume wokwaBhenjamini wokuBheeroti (nokuti Bheeroti iyi inonzi ndeye vokwaBhenjamini." 
2Samuel4:3 Bheeroti akatizira kuGitaimu, nanhasi wose achiri kugarako somutorwa)." 
2Samuel4:4 Jonatani mwanakomana waSauro akanga aine mwana wake mukomana akaremara makumbo. Zvakanga zvaitika ndezvizvi: mwana uyu aine makore mashanu pakauya shoko riya rezvaSauro naJonatani richibva kuJezirieri; mureri wake akangoti nho mwana ndokutiza. Achingunotiza kudaro zvechimbichimbi, mwana ndiye pasi pu achibva aremara. Mwana uyu ainzi Mefibhosheti." 
2Samuel4:5 Zvino vana vaRimoni wokuBheeroti vanaRekabhu naBhaana vakasimuka vakandosvika kumba kwaIshibhosheti zuva richirova nhongonya iye akanga ari panguva yake yamasikati yokuzorora. 
2Samuel4:6 Vakapinda mumba yomukati vachiita sokunge vari kuda kundotora koroni vakabva vamubhovhora padumbu. Rekabhu nomunun'una wake Bhaana ndokubva vatiza. 
2Samuel4:7 Vakapinda mumba make, iye ari kutsi kwehope pamubhedha pake kudaro, vakamubaya vakamuuraya vakamudimura musoro. Vakatakura musoro wake vakararirofamba usiku hwose nomunzira yokuArabha." 
2Samuel4:8 Vakasvika nomusoro waIshibhosheti kuna Dhavhidhi kuHebhuroni. Vakati kuna mambo, “Hounoi musoro waIshibhosheti mwanakomana waSauro, muvengi wenyu aida kukuurayai. Mambo changamire, Tenzi akutsivirai Sauro navana vake nhasi uno.”" 
2Samuel4:9 Asi Dhavhidhi akapindura Rekabhu nomunun'una wake Bhaana vanakomana vaRimoni vokuBheeroti achiti, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu akandinunura munjodzi dzose" 
2Samuel4:10 kuti mumwe paakandiudza kuti, ‘Sauro afa uku,’ achifunga kuti ari kutondiunzira dama rakanaka, ndakamubata ndikamuuraya kuZikiragi. Ndiwo mubayiro wandakamupa." 
2Samuel4:11 Ndoda kutozoti apa, vanhu vakaipa vatouraya zvavo mururami mumba make ari pamubhedha wake; imi ndimi vandichaita kuti muripe ropa romunhu iyeyo nokukutsakatisai panyika kwandichaita.”" 
2Samuel4:12 Dhavhidhi akabva atuma majaya ake, akavauraya akavadimura maoko netsoka, vakavasungirira pedyo nedziva kuHebhuroni. Asi musoro waIshibhosheti vakautora vakauviga muguva raAbhuneru kuHebhuroniko." 
2Samuel5:1 Madzinza ose okwaIsiraeri akauya kuna Dhavhidhi kuHebhuroni akati, “Zvamuchione, izvozvi tiri hama nehama, vanhu veropa rimwechete chairo nemi." 
2Samuel5:2 Nezuro uno, Sauro achiri mambo wedu, ndimi maimhanya-mhanya nebasa rokutungamirira Isiraeri kuhondo uyewo Tenzi akakutii, ‘Iwe ndiwe uchava mufudzi wavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri uchava ishe weIsiraeri.’ ”" 
2Samuel5:3 Ndizvo zvakaunza vakuru vakuru vokwaIsiraeri vose kuna mambo kuHebhuroni ndokubvawo mambo Dhavhidhi aita chibvumirano navo kuHebhuroni ikoko, pana Tenzi. Vakagadza Dhavhidhi umambo hwokwaIsiraeri." 
2Samuel5:4 Dhavhidhi akanga ava namakore makumi matatu paakatanga kutonga, akatonga kwamakumi mana amakore." 
2Samuel5:5 Akatonga vokwaJudna kwamakore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu ari kuHebhuroni. Akazotongawo kwaIsiraeri kwose nokwaJudha kwamakore makumi matatu namatatu ari kuJerusaremu. 
2Samuel5:6 Mambo navarwi vake vakaenda kuJerusaremu vachivinga vaJebhusi vagari venyika iyoyo ivo vakati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Muno haumupindi unodzingwa iwe kunyange namapofu nezvirema chaizvo,” vachifunga kuti Dhavhidhi haambofa akamupinda." 
2Samuel5:7 Zvakadaro zvazvo Dhavhidhi akakurira Guta retsvingo reZioni ndorakarewo rinonzi guta raDhavhidhi. 
2Samuel5:8 Musi iwoyo Dhavhidhi akati, “Anenge achida kuuraya vaJebhusi ngaakwidze nomumugero wemvura uyu arwise zvirema namapofu vandiri kuvenga kwazvo ini Dhavhidhi.” Ndokusaka zvichinzi, “Mapofu nezvirema havafaniri kupinda muTembere.”" 
2Samuel5:9 Dhavhidhi akagara nhare yokuzvidzivirira muhondo akaitumidza zita rokuti Guta raDhavhidhi. Dhavhidhi akavaka guta iri kuritenderedza kubvira pakaitwa zvokuzadzwa mavhu zvichienda mukati. 
2Samuel5:10 Ukuru hwaDhavhidhi hwakaramba hwongoenderera mberi nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wegurusvusvu rehondo aiva naye." 
2Samuel5:11 Hiramu, mambo weTire akatumira Dhavhidhi nhume nemapango omusidhari pamwechete navanhu vokuveza miti namatombo vakavakira Dhavhidhi muzinda." 
2Samuel5:12 Dhavhidhi akazviona kuti Tenzi akanga aita kuti umambo hwake hwokwaIsiraeri hudzike midzi, uye kuti akanga asimudzira umambo hwake pamusana pavanhu vake vaIsiraeri." 
2Samuel5:13 Dhavhidhi akaroorazve vamwe vakadzi navarongo kuJerusaremu mushure mokunge atama kuHebhuroni. Dhavhidhi akaberekazve vamwe vana vakomana navasikana. 
2Samuel5:14 Mazita avana vake vakaberekerwa kuJerusaremu ndeaya anoti: Shamua naShobhabhu naNatani naSoromoni; 
2Samuel5:15 kwouya Ibhari naErishua naNefegi naJafia; 
2Samuel5:16 ndokuzouya Erishama naEriyadha naErifareti. 
2Samuel5:17 VaFirisitia pavakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi agadzwa umambo hwokwaIsiraeri, vaFirisitia vose vakaenda kundovhima Dhavhidhi, asi zvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi. Dhavhidhi akabva aenda kunzvimbo yokuzvidzivirira muhondo." 
2Samuel5:18 VaFirisitia vakauya ndokuita zararira nebani revaRefaimu. 
2Samuel5:19 Dhavhidhi akada kunzwa kuti Tenzi anotii nazvo, akati, “Ndoenda here kundorwisa vaFirisitia ava? Muchavaisa mumaoko angu here?” Tenzi akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Enda zvako, nokuti zviri zvokuvaisa mumaoko ako, ndichavaisa mumaoko ako.”" 
2Samuel5:20 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akaenda kuBhaariperizimu. Dhavhidhi akavakurira ikoko akati, “Tenzi andieredzera vavengi vangu sokueredza kunoita mafashamo emvura.” Naizvozvo akatumidza nzvimbo iyoyo zita rokuti Bhaariperazimu." 
2Samuel5:21 VaFirisitia vakasiya zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata; Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakazvitakura vakaenda nazvo. 
2Samuel5:22 VaFirisitia vakauya zvakare ndokuita zararira nebani rokuvaRefaimu. 
2Samuel5:23 Dhavhidhi paakada kunzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo, Mwari akati, “Rega kubva wananga pavari. Asi ita zvokuvanyangira neseri kwavo uvafute nokumiti yemibharisamu." 
2Samuel5:24 Paunozongonzwa chete mutsindo wokufamba pamusoro pemiti yemibharisamu mobvawo mati navo koke koke kuvarwisa nokuti Tenzi anenge atotungamira mberi kwenyu kundorwisa hondo dzavaFirisitia.” 
2Samuel5:25 Dhavhidhi akaita zvaakaudzwa naTenzi akarakatisa kuuraya vaFirisitia kubvira kuGebha kusvikira kuGezeru. 
2Samuel6:1 Dhavhidhi akaunganidzazve zviuru zvitatu zvavarume vano chaivo vakatoita zvokusarudzwa muIsiraeri. 
2Samuel6:2 Dhavhidhi akasimuka akaenda navanhu vose vaaiva navo vachibva kuBhaarijudha kuti vandouya nebhokisi raMwari rechitenderano rinodaidzwa nezita, zita raTenzi wehondo nehondo anogara pane makerubhu ari pamusoro paro." 
2Samuel6:3 Vakatakurira bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano pachikochikari chitsva. Vakariburitsa mumba maAbhinadhabhu yaiva pachikomo. Vanakomana vaAbhinadhabhu, vanaUza naAhio ndovaichaira chikochikari chitsva ichi." 
2Samuel6:4 Chaiva nebhoksi raMwari rechitenderano Ahio ndiye ainge akatungamirira mberi kwebhokisi rechitenderano. 
2Samuel6:5 Dhavhidhi nemhuri yose yeIsiraeri vaifara vachipemberera Tenzi napose pavaigonera nedzimbo vaine zvokuridza zvakavezwa zvomuti womusaipurasi kuchiti: uku runoridza zvipendani, uku rumwe runoridza madimbwa, vamwe vachiridza ngoma, vamwe vachiridza makwakwakwa omuti neesimbi." 
2Samuel6:6 Kuzoti vasvika paburiro rokwaNakoni, Uza akabata bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano kurigamha nokuti nzombe dzakanga dzati dzadzarikei." 
2Samuel6:7 Tenzi akavirukira Uza nehasha. Mwari akabva amuuraya. 
2Samuel6:8 Kuurayiwa kwakaitwa Uza naTenzi kwakashungurudza Dhavhidhi. Nzvimbo iyi inonzi Pereziuza nanhasi uno. 
2Samuel6:9 Musi iwoyu, Dhavhidhi akatya Tenzi akati, “Zvino bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano, kwangu uku, ringasvike sei pakadai?”" 
2Samuel6:10 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akaramba kuenda nebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano kuGuta raDhavhidhi. Asi Dhavhidhi akatsaukira naro mumusha waObhedhiedhomu muGiti. 
2Samuel6:11 Bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano rakagara mumba maObhedhiedhomu muGiti kwemwedzi mitatu. Tenzi akabvawo akomborera Obhedhiedhomu nemhuri yake yose. 
2Samuel6:12 Shoko rakasvika munzeve dzamambo Dhavhidhi rokuti, “Uku Tenzi akatokomborera mhuri yaObhedhiedhomu pamwechete nezvose zvaaiva nazvo pamusana pebhokisi raMwari rechitenderano.” Ipapo Dhavhidhi akadzikako akandotora bhokisi raMwari mumba maObhedhiedhomu, akaenda naro kuGuta raDhavhidhi achipembera kufara." 
2Samuel6:13 Vakanga vakatakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano pavakangoti fambei nhanho nhanhatu, akabvawo apira chibayiro chemombe nechimhuru chakakodzwa." 
2Samuel6:14 Dhavhidhi akatamba achipemberera Tenzi napose paaigonera. Izvozvo Dhavhidhi akanga akapfeka efodhi yerineni. 
2Samuel6:15 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi nemhuri yose yeIsiraeri ndokuunza kwavakaita bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano kuchipururudzwa, hwamanda ichidandaura." 
2Samuel6:16 Kuzoti zvino bhokisi raTenzi ropinda muguta raDhavhidhi, Mikari mukunda waSauro akatarisa napahwindho. Akaona mambo Dhavhidhi chiri chamuchachari chaicho kutamba achipemberera Tenzi, Mikari uyu akabva amushora chaizvo nechomumwoyo." 
2Samuel6:17 Vakaunza bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano vakariisa panzvimbo yaro mukati metendhe rarakanga ragadzirirwa naDhavhidhi. Dhavhidhi akapira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana kuna Tenzi. 
2Samuel6:18 Pakapedza Dhavhidhi kupira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana akakomborera vanhu nezita raTenzi wehondo nehondo. 
2Samuel6:19 Akazogoveranisa vanhu vose, gungano rose zvaro reIsiraeri, varume navakadzi zvokudya zvinoti: chingwa nenyama yechirango nechitsumbu chamagirepisi akaomeswa pamunhu. Vanhu vose vakati uyu kwake, uyu kwake voenda zvavo kumisha yavo." 
2Samuel6:20 Dhavhidhi akadzokera kundokomborera mhuri yake. Mikari mukunda waSauro akauya kuzochingurana naDhavhidhi, ndokubva ati, “Mambo weIsiraeri nhasi uno ashamisira zvinogara zvakadaro, kupfekenura here chokwadi pane varanda vechikadzi vemakurukota ake kudaro, sedzenga romunhu rinonyatsozvifumura zvaro pachenachena!”" 
2Samuel6:21 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kuna Mikari, “Heekaka. NdiTenzi wazvanga zvichiitirwa akasarudza ini kutsiva baba wako navose zvavo vemhuri yokwake achindisarudzira kuva ishe wavaIsiraeri, vanhu vaTenzi. Zvokupemberera Tenzi izvozvo, ndozvandichaita zvacho." 
2Samuel6:22 Ndichatofumuka kwazvo kupfuura ipapa kuri kuzvidukupisa. Asi varanda vechikadzi vawareva ivavo, ndivo vacho vachandiremekedza.”" 
2Samuel6:23 Mikari mukunda waSauro akadzamara kusvika pazuva rake rokufa asina mwana. 
2Samuel7:1 Mambo paakanga zvino anyatsogarawo mumuzinda wake, Tenzi amupawo runyararo kuvavengi vake kumativi ose," 
2Samuel7:2 akataurira muporofita Natani kuti, “Tarisai muone ini ndachidai kugara mumba yakashongedzwa nomusidhari asi uku bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano rakangoti njo mutendhe zvamo.”" 
2Samuel7:3 Natani akati kuna mambo, “Endai zvenyu muite zvose zviri mumwoyo menyu nokuti Tenzi anemi.”" 
2Samuel7:4 Asi usiku hwakarehwo, shoko raTenzi rakasvika kuna Natani richiti," 
2Samuel7:5 “Enda utaurire muranda wangu Dhavhidhi kuti zvanzi naTenzi, ndiwe here ungandivakire imba yokugara?" 
2Samuel7:6 Handinaka ini kumbogara mumba kubvira pandakaburitsa vaIsiraeri kuIjipiti kusvikira pari nhasi. Asi kwose kwandanga ndichienda, tendhe ndoyanga ichingova imba yangu yokugara." 
2Samuel7:7 Kwose kwandakafamba navaIsiraeri vose ndakambotaurawo here chinhu kuvatongi vevaIsiraeri vandaipa basa rokufudza vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri kuti, uri kuregerei kundivakira imba yakashongedzwa nomusidhari?" 
2Samuel7:8 Zvino chienda utaurire muranda wangu Dhavhidhi kuti zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, ndakakutora kumafuro kwawaifudza zvipfuwoka iwe kuti uve ishe wavanhu vangu, vaIsiraeri." 
2Samuel7:9 Ndaiva newe kwose kwawaifamba, ndikakutsakatisira vavengi vako vose. Zvino ndichaita kuti zita rako rive nomukurumbira mukuru kwazvo sezvakangoita mazita avakuru vakuru vapanyika." 
2Samuel7:10 Ndinotsvakira vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri pokugara, ndovasimapo kuti vagarewo pavo vasisambofuruswa, vaipi vasisambovatambudza sezvavaivaita kare" 
2Samuel7:11 kubvira panguva yandaisarudzira vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, vatongi. Ndichakupawo zororo kuvavengi vako vose. Uyewo Tenzi anoti kwauri iye Tenzi ndiye achatokuvakira imba." 
2Samuel7:12 Mazuva ako akange akwana, wafa waendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzibaba ako, ndichamutsa mushure mako mumwe mwana wako wauchabereka iyewe pachako. Ndichaita kuti umambo hwake hudzike midzi." 
2Samuel7:13 Iyeyo ndiye anofanira kuvaka imba yacho yokuisa zita rangu. Ndichaita kuti umambo hwake hurambe huripo narini wose. 
2Samuel7:14 Ini ndichange ndiri baba kwaari, iyewo ari mwana kwandiri. Kana akaita zvakaipa, ndichamutumira shamhu yavanhu yokumuranga achidakarirwa kurohwa navanhu." 
2Samuel7:15 Asi handizobvisa mwoyo wangu paari sezvandakaita kuna Sauro wandakabvisa kuti iwe upinde. 
2Samuel7:16 Imba yako hairove kwandiri, umambo hwako huchavako narini wose. Umambo hucharamba huri mumba mako.”" 
2Samuel7:17 Natani akarondedzera Dhavhidhi mashoko iwaya ose achimutaurirawo chiratidzo ichochi chose. 
2Samuel7:18 Mambo Dhavhidhi akapinda akagara pana Tenzi akanamata achiti: “Ndiri aniwo zvangu nhai Tenzi Mwari? Kana iyowo mhuri yokwangu, chiiwo zvayo, kundisvitsawo pakadai?" 
2Samuel7:19 Sokunge izvozvi zvisina kukwana kwamuri imi Tenzi Mwari; masvika pokutotaura nezvichazoitika mangwana, namangwana ayo kumhuri yeni muranda wenyu. Ndiwo maitiro enyu here iwaya kuvanhu, nhai Tenzi Mwari?" 
2Samuel7:20 “Pakadai apa, ko ini Dhavhidhi chii chimwewo chandingataure kwamuri? Munondiziva wani ini muranda wenyu imi Tenzi wangu Tenzi Mwari." 
2Samuel7:21 “Chido chenyu zvenyu kuti muite chinhu chikuru chakadai uye kuti muzvizivisewo kuneni muranda wenyu. 
2Samuel7:22 “Naizvozvo muri mukuru mukuru chaiye imi Tenzi Mwari nokuti hakuna angamboenzaniswe nemi uye hakuna mumwe Mwari kunze kwenyu imi maererano nezvose zvatakanzwa nenzeve dzedu. 
2Samuel7:23 “Ndorupi rudzi panyika rwakaita savanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, runa Mwari akaenda kundovanunura kuti vave vanhu vake uye kuti azviwanire zita, achivaitira mabasa makuru anotyisa nokudzingira kunze marudzi navamwari vavo, kutiira vanhu vake ivavo vaakanunura kuIjipiti?" 
2Samuel7:24 “Makaitawo kuti vaIsiraeri vave vanhu venyu chaivo nokusingaperi imiwo Tenzi muchiva Mwari wavo. 
2Samuel7:25 “Zvino imi Tenzi Mwari chizadzikisai waro nokusingaperi zvamakareva nezvangu ini muranda wenyu nemhuri yangu, muite sokuvimbisa kwamakaita;" 
2Samuel7:26 kuti zita renyu riende mbiri nokusingaperi zvichinzi, ‘Tenzi wehondo nehondo ndiye Mwari weIsiraeri;’ uye imba yangu ini Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu imire." 
2Samuel7:27 “Pamusana pokuti imi Tenzi wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri mandidurira pachena kuti, muchandivakira imba, ndokusakawo ini muranda wenyu ndaita simba rokuita munamato wakadai kwamuri." 
2Samuel7:28 “Zvino Tenzi Mwari, imi ndimi Mwari wangu. Zvamunoreva zvichaitika zvechokwadi, uyewo mavimbisa zvinhu izvi zvakanaka kudai kuneni muranda wenyu." 
2Samuel7:29 “Zvino chikomborerai waro imba yangu ini muranda wenyu kuti irambe yakangoti nemi kwati kwati nokuti imi Tenzi Mwari ndimi mazvireva, naizvozvo namakomborero enyu iwayo, mhuri yangu ini, muranda wenyu ichava mhuri yakakomborerwa chaizvo narini wose.”" 
2Samuel8:1 Gare gare Dhavhidhi akakurira vaFirisitia akavaisa pasi pake, akatorera vaFirisitia Metehagama." 
2Samuel8:2 Akakurirawo Moabhu akati vanhu vacho vati rare rare pasi. Akatora tambo akavaera katatu katatu nourefu hwayo vakangodaro achiuraya vomuchikamu chokutanga nechechipiri, vomuchikamu chechitatu akavarega vari vapenyu. VaMoabhu vakava varanda kuna Dhavhidhi vakatera mutero kwaari." 
2Samuel8:3 Dhavhidhi akakurirawo Hadhadhiezeri, mwanakomana waRehobhu mambo wokuZobha paakanga achienda kundorwisa nyika yokuna Yufuratesi kuti idzokere mumaoko ake." 
2Samuel8:4 Dhavhidhi akamutorera vachayiri vengoro dzehondo, chiuru chimwechete chavachayiri navachayiri mazana manomwe pamwechete navarwi vetsoka makumi maviri echuru. Dhavhidhi akadimura matatira amabhiza ose engoro dzehondo ndokungosiya anokwanirana nezana rengoro dzehondo." 
2Samuel8:5 VaSiria vokuDhamasikusi vakauya kuzobatsira Hadhadhiezeri mambo wokuZobha. Dhavhidhi akauraya varume makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zviviri zvavaSiria. 
2Samuel8:6 Munyika yeAramu kuDhamasikusi, Dhavhidhi akaisa zvikwata zvikwata zvavarwi, vaSiria vakava varanda kuna Dhavhidhi vachitotera mutero. Tenzi akaita kuti Dhavhidhi akurire kwose kwose kwaaienda." 
2Samuel8:7 Dhavhidhi akatora nhoo dzendarama dzakanga dzakatakurwa namakurukota aHadhadhiezeru akadziunza kuJerusaremu. 
2Samuel8:8 Mambo Dhavhidhi akakukuchawo ndarira yakawanda kwazvo kuBheta nokuBherotai maguta aHadhadhiezeru. 
2Samuel8:9 Mambo Toi paakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi akakurira hondo yose yaHadhadhiezeru," 
2Samuel8:10 Toi akatuma mwanakomana wake Joramu kuna Mambo Dhavhidhi kundomukwazisa nokumukorokotedza nokuti akanga arwisa Hadhadhiezeru akamukurira. Chaivapo ndechokuti Hadhadhiezeru aigarorwisana naToi. Joramu uyu akauya nezvinhu zvesirivha nendarama nendarira. 
2Samuel8:11 Mambo Dhavhidhi akatsaurirawo zvinhu izvozvi kupira kuna Tenzi pamwechete nesirivha nendarama yaakatsaurira kupira kuna Mwari yabva kunyika dzose dzaakakurira 
2Samuel8:12 dzinoti: Edhomu neMoabhu nevaAmoni nevaFirisitia neAmareki neyepazvinhu zvakapambwa zvaHadhadhiezeru mwanakomana waRehobhu mambo wokuZobha. 
2Samuel8:13 Dhavhidhi akazviwanira zita paakadzoka kwaakanga andorakatisa gumi rezviuru rine zviuru zvisere zvavaSiria mubani romunyu. 
2Samuel8:14 MuEdhomu akaisamo zvikwata zvikwata zvavarwi. Munyika yose zvayo yeEdhomu akaisa zvikwata zvavarwi. VaEdhomu vose zvavo vakava varanda kuna Dhavhidhi. Tenzi akaita kuti Dhavhidhi akurire kwose kwose kwaaienda. 
2Samuel8:15 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akatonga Isiraeri yose zvayo. Dhavhidhi uyu aitonga vanhu vake zvine ruenzaniso uye nomazvo chaimo. 
2Samuel8:16 Izvozvo Joabhu mwanakomana waZeruya ainge ari mutungamiriri wehondo, Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAhirudhu ariye samunyori." 
2Samuel8:17 Zadhoki mwanakomana waAhitubhu naAhimereki mwanakomana waAbhiyatari ndovaiva vapristi, Seraya ari munyori." 
2Samuel8:18 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoiadha aiva mukuru mukuru wevokuchengeta mambo, maKereti nemaPereti, ukuwo vana vaDhavhidhi vakomana vari vapristi." 
2Samuel9:1 Dhavhidhi akati, “Kuchino mumwe here wemba yokwaSauro achiripo wandingaitire mwoyochena pamusana paJonatani?”" 
2Samuel9:2 Zvino kwakanga kuno mumwe muranda weimba yaSauro ainzi Zibha, vakamudaidza kuti auye kuna Dhavhidhi. Mambo akamubvunza kuti, “Ndiwe Zibha here? Iye akati, ‘Ndiye uno muranda wenyu changamire.’ ”" 
2Samuel9:3 Mambo akati, “Kuchino mumwe here wemba yokwaSauro achiripo wandingaitire mwoyochena waMwari?” Zibha akati kuna mambo, “Hongu kuchino mwanakomana waJonatani akaremara tsoka dzose dziri mbiri.”" 
2Samuel9:4 Mambo Dhavhidhi ndokubva ati kwaari, “Zvino ari kupiko?”" 
2Samuel9:5 Zibha ndokuti kuna mambo, “Ari kuRodhebhari, kumba kwaMakiri, mwanakomana waAmieri.”" 
2Samuel9:6 Mefibhosheti, mwanakomana waJonatani mwana waSauro, akauya kuna Dhavhidhi akasvikomugwadamira achimuremekedza. Dhavhidhi akati, “Mefibhosheti,” Iye akati, “Ndini muranda wenyu changamire.”" 
2Samuel9:7 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Usatye zvako nokuti zvokukuitira mwoyochena ndinofanira kukuitira mwoyochena chaizvo pamusana pababa wako Jonatani. Ndichadzosera kwauri minda yose yokwaSauro vasekuru vako, uyezve uchange uchidya pamwechete neni pateburu yangu nguva dzose.”" 
2Samuel9:8 Iye akamugwadamira kumuremekedza akati, “Ko iyeni muranda wenyu ndiri chiiwo zvangu, kwamuri iyemi, imbwawo zvangu yakafa kudai, wamungabva matarisawo kudai.”" 
2Samuel9:9 Mambo akadaidza Zibha muranda waSauro akamuti, “Zvose zvokwaSauro nemhuri yake yose ndazvipa kumwanakomana watenzi wako." 
2Samuel9:10 Zvino iwe navanakomana vako navaranda vako munofanira kumurimira munda muchimuigira zvinobva mumundamo kuitira kuti mwanakomana watenzi wako awane chokudya. Asi Mefibhosheti uyu mwanakomana watenzi wako achange achidya chokudya pamwechete neni pateburu yangu nguva dzose.” Zvino Zibha aiva navana vakomana gumi navashanu navaranda makumi maviri. 
2Samuel9:11 Zibha akati kuna mambo, “Changamire mambo, zvose zvamati ini muranda wenyu ndiite ndozvandichaita.” Nokudaro Mefibhosheti akazenge ava kudya pamwechete naDhavhidhi pateburu yake sezvakangoitawo mumwe mwanakomana wamambo." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibhosheti aiva nomwana muduku mukomana ainzi Mika. Vose vaigara mumusha waZibha vakabva vava varanda vaMefibhosheti. 
2Samuel9:13 Naizvozvo Mefibhosheti akagara muJerusaremu nokuti ainge achidya pamwechete namambo pateburu yake. Izvozvo akanga akaremara makumbo ake ose ari maviri. 
2Samuel10:1 Mushure mezvizvi mambo wevaAmoni akafa ndokubva mwanakomana wake Hanuni amutsiva pakutonga. 
2Samuel10:2 Dhavhidhi akati, “Ndicharamba ndiine mwoyo wakanaka kuna Hanuni mwanakomana wavaNahashi, mwoyo wandakaitirwawo nababa vake.” Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi akatuma makurukota ake kundomubata maoko pamusana pababa vake. Makurukota aDhavhidhi akasvika munyika yevaAmoni." 
2Samuel10:3 Asi machinda evaAmoni akati kuna changamire wavo Hanuni, “Munofunga kuti izvozvi Dhavhidhi kukutumirai nhume kuzokubatai maoko kwaaita uku kuremekedza baba venyu nhai? Dhavhidhi haana here kutumira makurukota ake kuzoongorora guta rino nokurisora kuti varikurire.”" 
2Samuel10:4 Saka Hanuni akabata makurukota aDhavhidhi akaaveura rumwe rutivi rwose rwendebvu mumwe nomumwe, akacheka napakati hanzu dzavo nechapahudyu akavati vachienda." 
2Samuel10:5 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi akatuma vanhu kundovachingura nokuti vakanga vachinyara zvikuru kwazvo. Mambo akati, “Imborambai muri kuJeriko kudzamara ndebvu dzenyu dzamera mugozoti modzoka zvenyu kuno.”" 
2Samuel10:6 VaAmoni pavakaona kuti vatomutsa ruvengo naDhavhidhi, vaAmoni ava vakatuma nhume kundokumbira varwi vachiita zvokutobhadhara mari kuvaSiria vokuBhetirehobhu nevaSiria vokuZobha. Vakawana makumi maviri ezviuru zvavarwi vetsoka vakati mambo wokuMaoka auyewo navarume chiuru chimwechete uyewo varume vokuTobhu gumi rezviuru rine zviuru zviviri." 
2Samuel10:7 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi, akatuma Joabhu nehondo yose yavarume vano chaivo." 
2Samuel10:8 VaAmoni vakauya vakaronganirana hondo pasuo guru. VaSiriawo vokuZobha nevokuRehobhu navarume vokuTobhu novokuMaaka vakanga vari pavowo voga musango. 
2Samuel10:9 Pakaona Joabhu kuti hondo yavavinga, yatoita zvokuvakomba mberi neshure, akasarudza vamwe varwi mukati mevakanga vasarudzwa muIsiraeri vaya, akavaronga kuti varwisane nevaSiria." 
2Samuel10:10 Vamwe varwi vake vose akavaisa mumaoko omunun'una wake Abhishai akavaronga kuti varwisane nevaAmoni. 
2Samuel10:11 Akabva ati, “Kana ndichinge ndava kukurirwa navaSiria iwe unouya kuzondibatsira. Asi kana vaAmoni vava kukukurira ini ndichauya kuzonunura." 
2Samuel10:12 Tsunga mwoyo tiite zvechirume tichiitira vanhu vedu namaguta aMwari wedu. Mwari ngaaite kuda kwake.” 
2Samuel10:13 Saizvozvo Joabhu navarwi vaaiva navo vakatanga kuvinga vaSiria kundovarwisa vakabva vamutiza. 
2Samuel10:14 VaAmori pavakangoona kuti vaSiria vatiza vakaitawo zvimwechetezvo vakatiwo ware kutiza Abhishai, vakapinda muguta. Joabhu akadzoka kwaakanga andorwisana nevaAmoni akaenda kuJerusaremu." 
2Samuel10:15 Asi vaSiria pavakaona kuti vakurirwa neIsiraeri, vakaunganidzana pamwechete." 
2Samuel10:16 Hadhadhiezeru akatumira nhume dzikauya nevaSiria vokumhiri kwaYufuratesi. Vakauya kuHeramu vachitungamirirwa naShobaki mutungamiriri wehondo yaHadhadhiezeru. 
2Samuel10:17 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi, akakokorodza Isiraeri yose pamwechete akayambuka Jorodhani akaenda kuHeramu. VaSiria vakaronganirana kurwisa kuHeramu. VaSiria vakaronganirana kurwisa Dhavhidhi vakarwa naye." 
2Samuel10:18 VaSiria vakabva vaparamuka kutiza Isiraeri. Dhavhidhi akarakatisa kuuraya vachairi vechiSiria vengoro dzehondo mazana manomwe pamwechete navarwi vemabhiza makumi mana ezviuru. Vakakuvadzawo Shobaki mutungamiriri wehondo akabva afira ipapo. 
2Samuel10:19 Madzimambo ose akanga ari makurukota aHadhadhiezeru paakaona kuti vakurirwa neIsiraeri, vakaita chibvumirano kuti pave nokuwirirana neIsiraeri vakabva vava varanda vavo. Naizvozvo vaSiria vakazenge vava kutya kununura vaAmoni." 
2Samuel11:1 Muchirimo, nguva yepfumvudza, nguva yaiwanzoenda madzimambo kuhondo, Dhavhidhi akatuma Joabhu namakurukota ake pamwechete neIsiraeri yose. Vakandokurira vaAmoni, vakabva vorwisa Rabha. Asi Dhavhidhi akasara zvake kuJerusaremu." 
2Samuel11:2 Zvakaitika kuti manheru zuva rarereka Dhavhidhi akamuka pamubhedha wake ofamba-famba zvake padenga remba yamambo, ari padengapo akaona mukadzi aishamba muviri. Mukadzi uya akanga aine chimiro chakanaka kwazvo." 
2Samuel11:3 Dhavhidhi akatuma munhu kundobvunza kuti mukadzi iyeyo ndiani. Mumwe akati, “Haasi Bhatishebha here, mwana waEriamu mudzimai waUriya muHiti?”" 
2Samuel11:4 Dhavhidhi ndokutuma nhume dzakandomutora. Mukadzi uyu akauya kwaari. Dhavhidhi akapinda mumba nomukadzi uyu. (Izvozvo mukadzi uyu ainge achitozvichenura pakun'ora kwaakanga aita.) Mukadzi uyu akazodzokera zvake kumba kwake. 
2Samuel11:5 Akabata pamuviri akabva atumira shoko kuna Dhavhidhi rokuti, “Ndava napamuviri.”" 
2Samuel11:6 Dhavhidhi ndokutumira shoko kuna Joabhu rokuti, “Nditumire kuno Uriya muHiti.” Joabhu akatumira Uriya kuna Dhavhidhi." 
2Samuel11:7 Pakasvika Uriya kwaari, Dhavhidhi akamubvunza kuti zviri kufamba sei kuna Joabhu uye kuti vanhu vakadii zvavo uyewo kuti hondo iri kurwiwa zvakadii." 
2Samuel11:8 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Uriya, “Chimboenda zvako kumba kwako umbondoshamba tsoka dzako uzorore.” Uriya akabuda mumuzinda wamambo achiteverwa pakarepo nechipo chakabviswa namambo." 
2Samuel11:9 Asi Uriya akarara kumusuo womuzinda wamambo pamwechete navamwe vavaranda vatenzi wake. Haana kudzika kumba kwake. 
2Samuel11:10 Pavakataurira Dhavhidhi kuti Uriya haana kudzika kumba kwake, Dhavhihdi akati kuna Uriya, “Ko hauna kubva parwendo here? Chawaregerera kudzika kumba kwako chii?”" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriya akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Mungati uku bhokisi rechitenderano nevokwaIsiraeri nevokwaJudha, vagere kudaro mumisasa, uye changamire wangu Joabhu pamwechete namakurukota enyu changamire wangu vagere panze pachena kudaro, ini ndopondoenda zvangu kumba kwangu kundodya nokunwa nokutopinda zvangu mumba nomukadzi wangu here? Kana ndimiwo zvenyu munongozvionawo kuti ini pachangu handimbofa ndakaita chinhu chakadai.”" 
2Samuel11:12 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kuna Uriya, “Chiramba zvako uri pano nhasi, mangwana ndopandichakurega woenda zvako.” Saizvozvo Uriya akaramba ari muJerusaremu zuva iroro namangwana acho." 
2Samuel11:13 Dhavhidhi akamukoka, iye akadya nokunwa pamwechete naye akasvika pakutomuraradzisa. Asi manheru acho Uriya akaenda akandorara pauriri hwake pamwechete navaranda vatenzi wake. Haana kudzika kumba kwake." 
2Samuel11:14 Mangwanani acho Dhavhidhi akanyorera Joabhu tsamba akaitumira naiye Uriya. 
2Samuel11:15 Mutsamba iyoyo akanyora kuti, “Isa Uriya kumberimberi chaiko kunenge kuchipisa hondo kwazvo mugodududza momusiya ari oga kuitira kuti auraiwe afe.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Joabhu paaingunorwisa guta iroro akatuma Uriya kwaaiziva kuti kune shasha chaidzo dzokurwa hondo. 
2Samuel11:17 Varume vomuguta iri vakabuda vakarwisa Joabhu. Mukati mavanhu, mamwe makurukota aDhavhidhi akafa. Uriya muHiti akaurayiwawo." 
2Samuel11:18 Joabhu akatuma shoko kuna Dhavhidhi rezvekurwa ikoku. 
2Samuel11:19 Akarayira nhume iyi kuti, “Ukange wapedza kusvitsa shoko rezvekurwa iri kuna mambo," 
2Samuel11:20 kana mambo akaviruka nehasha akati kwauri, ‘Pakurwa kwenyu makasvikirei pedyo neguta kudaro? Hamaizviziva here kuti vaizopfura vari parusvingo?’" 
2Samuel11:21 Ko akauraya Abhimereki mwanakomana waJerubhesheti ndiani? Haasiri mukadzi here akamudonhedzera huyo pamusoro kubva parusvingo akafira kuTebhezi? Chamakanga moenderawo pedyo norusvingo chii? Imi mobva mati, ‘Muranda wenyu Uriya muHiti uya akafawo wani.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Saizvozvo nhume iyi yakaenda ikasvika ikataurira Dhavhidhi zvose zvayakanga yatumwa naJoabhu kundotaura. 
2Samuel11:23 Nhume yakati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Vanhu ivavo vakambotikurira vakatibudira vachitivinga musango. Asi takazodzingirirana navo kusvikira kusuo guru reguta." 
2Samuel11:24 Vemiseve vakapfura kwatiri isu varanda venyu kubva parusvingo. Mamwe makurukota enyu mambo akafa. Muranda wenyu Uriya muHiti uya akafawo.” 
2Samuel11:25 Dhavhidhi akati kunhume iyi, “Enda undoti kuna Joabhu izvi, ngazvirege kukutambudza zvako nokuti hondo inotora wayada. Rwisai nesimba muparadze guta iroro, umutaurire uchimusimbaradza.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Mukadzi waUriya paakanzwa kuti murume wake Uriya akafa akachema murume wake. 
2Samuel11:27 Kuzoti nguva yokuchema kuya yapera, Dhavhidhi akati aunzwe kumba kwake, akava mukadzi wake akamuberekera mwana mukomana. Asi zvakanga zvaitwa naDhavhidhi izvi hazvina kufadza Tenzi." 
2Samuel12:1 Tenzi akatuma Natani kuna Dhavhidhi. Paakasvika kwaari akamuti, “Kwaiva navamwe varume vaviri mune rimwe guta. Mumwe aiva mupfumi mumwe ari murombo." 
2Samuel12:2 Mupfumi wacho aiva nemombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo namatanga. 
2Samuel12:3 Asi murombo akanga asina nechinhu chose achingova chete nehwayana sheshe yaakanga atenga. Akairera ikakura ainayo pamwechete navana vake. Chaaidya ndochayaidyawo ichinwirawo mumukombe wake, ichitorara zvayo mumaoko ake, ichinge mwanasikana kwaari." 
2Samuel12:4 Zvino mupfumi uyu akasvikirwa nomweni. Haana kuda kubayira mweni uya akanga amushanyira mombe kana chimwe chipfuwo chomudanga make. Asi kutoti akatora hwayana iya yomurombo akabayira muenzi uya akanga amushanyira.” 
2Samuel12:5 Dhavhidhi akavirukira munhu iyeyo nehasha akati kuna Natani, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu, munhu iyeyo anofanira kufa." 
2Samuel12:6 Anofanira kuripa hwayana iyoyo kakapetwa kana pamusana pezvaakaita izvozvo uye pamusana pokuti haana kuita tsitsi.” 
2Samuel12:7 Natani ndokuti kuna Dhavhidhi, “Iyemi ndimi munhu wacho. Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Ndakakugadza umambo hweIsiraeri ndikakununura mumaoko aSauro." 
2Samuel12:8 Ndakakupa ini imba yaiva yatenzi wako, ndakaita kuti vakadzi vatenzi wako vave vako ndikaisa mumaoko ako mhuri yokwaIsiraeri neyokwaJudha, dai izvozvo zvanga zviri zvishoma ndingadai ndakakupa zvakapetwa kaviri."
