2Samuel12:9 Wazvidzireiko zvakarehwa naTenzi uchiita zvisingadiwe naTenzi? Wakaurayisa Uriya muHiti nebakatwa, ukatora mukadzi wake uchimuita wako. Asi iye ukamuuraya nebakatwa revaAmoni." 
2Samuel12:10 Saka naizvozvo hondo yebakatwa haibve mumba mako nokuti wandizvidza ukatora zvako mukadzi waUriya muHiti uchimuita wako.’ 
2Samuel12:11 Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Chinzwa unzwe ndichakumutsira zvimwe zvakaipa mumba mako chaimo. Ndichakutorera vakadzi vako iwe wakatarisa nameso ako ndovapa kune mumwe wako. Iye acharara navakadzi vako masikati machena" 
2Samuel12:12 nokuti wakazviita muchivande. Asi ini ndichazviita Isiraeri yose ichizviona, masikati machena.’ ”" 
2Samuel12:13 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Natani, “Ndakatadzira Tenzi.” Natani ndokuti kuna Dhavhidhi, “Tenzi akuregererai chitadzo chenyu hamuchafa." 
2Samuel12:14 Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo, pamusana pokuti makatoshora Tenzi zvikuru kwazvo nezvamakaita izvozvo, mwana mukomana wamuchaberekerwa anofanira kutoti afe.”" 
2Samuel12:15 Natani akaenda zvake kumba kwake. Tenzi akazorova nedenda mwana uye akaberekerwa Dhavhidhi nomukadzi waUriya akabva arwara. 
2Samuel12:16 Dhavhidhi akanamata kuna Tenzi achikumbirira mwana iyeyu. Dhavhidhi akatsanya akapinda mumba akapedza usiku akati pasi zvambarara. 
2Samuel12:17 Vakuru vakuru vemumuzinda wake vakamira paaiva vachida kuti asimuke, asi akaramba, akarambawo kudya navo." 
2Samuel12:18 Pazuva rechinomwe mwana uyu ndiye sarai. Makurukota aDhavhidhi akatya kumutaurira kuti mwana wafa vachiti, “Tarisai muone mwana paakanga achiri mupenyu takataura naDhavhidhi asi akaramba kutinzwa. Ko kuzoti iyezvino, tingamutaurire sei kuti mwana afa. Angadaro akazvikuvadza.”" 
2Samuel12:19 Asi Dhavhidhi paakaona makurukota ake achiita zevezeve vari pamwechete, Dhavhidhi akabva azivawo kuti mwana wafa. Dhavhidhi akati kumakurukota ake, “Mwana wafasu?” Ivo vakati, “Watisiya uya.”" 
2Samuel12:20 Dhavhidhi akati pasi kwanyanu akashamba akazvizora mafuta akapfeka dzimwe hanzu. Akapinda mumba yaTenzi akanamata. Akadzokera zvake kumba kwake. Akakumbira vakamugadzikira chokudya akadya. 
2Samuel12:21 Makurukota ake akati kwaari, “Zvamaita izvi zvinorevei? Manga muchitsanya muchichema mwana paanga achiri mupenyu. Asi pazofa mwana masimuka mukadya.”" 
2Samuel12:22 Iye akati, “Mwana paanga achiri mupenyu, ndanga ndichitsanya ndichichema ndichiti hazvizikanwe zvimwe Tenzi angandinzwire tsitsi mwana akararama." 
2Samuel12:23 Asi zvino zvaashaya kudai chii chandichatsanyira? Ndingakwanise here kumuti adzokere kuno zvakare? Ini ndini ndichatoenda kwaari, asi iye kwandiri kuno haadzokeri.”" 
2Samuel12:24 Dhavhidhi akanyaradza mukadzi wake Bhatishebha akapindazve mumba naye vakagara vose akazobereka mwana mukomana. Dhavhidhi akamutumidza zita rokuti Soromoni, Tenzi akamuda." 
2Samuel12:25 Akatumako muporofita Natani kuti amutumidze zita rokuti Yedhidhiya, akadariso ndiTenzi." 
2Samuel12:26 Izvozvo Joabhu akarwisa Rabha guta revaAmoni. Akatanga akurira muzinda wamambo waivamo. 
2Samuel12:27 Joabhu ndokubva atuma nhume kuna Dhavhidhi kundoti, “Ndakarwisa Rabha, ndikarikurira guta remvura." 
2Samuel12:28 Saka zvino chiunganidzai vamwe varwi vose mukombe guta iri murikurire. Ndingazodaro ndikarikurira ndiri ini, guta rikazodaidzwa nezita rangu.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi akaunganidza varwi vose pamwechete. Akaenda kuRabha akarirwisa akarikurira. 
2Samuel12:30 Akatorera mambo weko ngundu youmambo mumusoro yairema makumi matatu amakirogiramu ane makirogiramu mana endarama yakanga iine dombo rinokosha. Yakadzikwa mumusoro waDhavhidhi. Akakukucha zvinhu zvaakapamba mugutamo zvakawanda kwazvo. 
2Samuel12:31 Akatinha vanhu vakanga varimo akavaendesa kuchibharo kundoshanda namajeko namapiki namatemo esimbi. Akavakanyisa zvidhinha. Ndozvaakaita kumaguta ose evaAmoni. Dhavhidhi navarwi vose vakazodzokera zvavo kuJerusaremu. 
2Samuel13:1 Mushure maizvozvi zvakazoitika ndezvokuti Abhusharomu mwanakomana waDhavhidhi aiva nehanzvadzi yakanaka kwazvo yainzi Tamari yakadiwa nomumwewo mwanakomana waDhavhidhi ainzi Amunoni. 
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni uyu akarwadziwa mwoyo chaizvo zvokutosvika pakurwara pamusana paTamari hanzvadzi yake. Zvakanga zviripo ndezvokuti sokuona kwaAmunoni hapana chaaigona kuita nokuti Tamari akanga achine umhandara hwake. 
2Samuel13:3 Zvino Amunoni akanga aine shamwari yake yechikomana yainzi Jonadhabhu mwana waShimea mukoma waDhavhidhi. Jonadhabhu uyu akanga ari munhu akasvinuka zvikuru kwazvo. 
2Samuel13:4 Akati kuna Amunoni, “Mwana wamambo kudai unosuruvarirei mangwanani oga oga? Haundiudzewo here?” Amunoni akati kwaari, “Mwoyo wangu uri pana Tamari, hanzvadzi yomukoma wangu Abhusharomu.”" 
2Samuel13:5 Jonadhabhu akamurunya kuti, “Enda pamubhedha wako urare unge munhu arwara. Kana baba vako vazokutaurira woti kwavari, madii kuti hanzvadzi yangu Tamari auye kuzondipawo zvokudya, andibikirewo zvokudya ndiripo ndichiona, ndidye iye akandibatira.”" 
2Samuel13:6 Amunoni akandorara akanyepera kurwara. Pakauya mambo kuzomumaira, Amunoni akati kwaari, “Madii kuti hanzvadzi yangu Tamari auye kuzondibikira zvingwa zviviri ndichiona, ndidye akandibatira.”" 
2Samuel13:7 Dhavhidhi akabvawo atumira shoko kumba kuna Tamari rokuti, “Enda kumba kwehanzvadzi yako Amunoni umubikire zvokudya.”" 
2Samuel13:8 Tamari akaenda kumba kwehanzvadzi yake Amunoni kuya kwaakanga ari, arere. Akakanya mukanyiwa akaumba zvingwa iye achiona akabva abika zvingwa izvi." 
2Samuel13:9 Tamari akatora pani akamuperekera chingwa asi akaramba kudya. Amunoni akati, “Vamwe vose ngavabude muno mandiri!” Saizvozvowo munhu wose akabudamo maaiva." 
2Samuel13:10 Amunoni ndokuti kuna Tamari, “Ndiigirewo zvokudya mumba muno kuti ndidye wakandibatirawo.” Tamari akatorawo zvingwa zvaakanga abika zviye ndokuigira hanzvadzi yake Amunoni mumba make." 
2Samuel13:11 Asi paakati achisvika nazvo pedyo naye kuti achidya, akabva amuti kachi akamuti, “Hanzvadzi uya tirare tose.”" 
2Samuel13:12 Tamari akamuti, “Aiwa hanzvadzi! Rega kundibata chibharo. Zvakadai hazvifaniri kuitwa muIsiraeri. Usaite urombe hwakadai." 
2Samuel13:13 Ko unoti ndinganyarire kupi? Kana uriwe ndopauchabva wava rimwe zirombe chairo muIsiraeri. Zvinoka ndateterera zvangu, dai wataura zvako namambo nokuti haangarambe kuti ndive wako.”" 
2Samuel13:14 Asi akaramba kumunzwa uye aiva ane simba kupfuura iye akamumanikidza akatadza naye. 
2Samuel13:15 Amunoni akabva amuvenga zvokuvenga zviya zvokuti kumuvenga kwaakanga ava kuita kwakanga kwakura kupfuura kumuda kwaaita. Amunoni uyu ndokumuti, “Simuka, chibva pano.”" 
2Samuel13:16 Asi iye akati, “Kweteka hanzvadzi, nokuti kundidzinga kwawava kuita uku chinhu chakaipa kutopinda zvawaita kwandiri.” Asi haana kumunzwa." 
2Samuel13:17 Amunoni akadaidza jaya akati “Buritsa mukadzi uyu muno mandiri uise chihuri.” 
2Samuel13:18 Izvozvo akanga akapfeka mujiza wake murefu una maoko marefu nokuti vakunda vamambo vainge vachine umhandara vaipfeka mijiza yakadaro. Muranda wake akabva amuburitsa panze ndokuisa chihuri. 
2Samuel13:19 Tamari akazvidira dota mumusoro akabvarura mujiza uye waakanga akapfeka akabata gotsi ndokuti mhere povo kuchema achienda kudaro. 
2Samuel13:20 Hanzvadzi yake, Abhusharomu akamuti, “Asi Amunoni hanzvadzi yako atorana newe here? Chinyarara zvako hanzvadzi, inga ihanzvadzi yako wani. Rega zvako kuzvidya mwoyo nazvo.” Nokudaro Tamari akazogara ari munhu akasuruvara kwazvo pamba pehanzvadzi yake Abhusharomu." 
2Samuel13:21 Zvose izvi pazvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi akaviruka nehasha. 
2Samuel13:22 Asi Abhusharomu haana chakaipa kana chakanaka chaakatara kuna Amunoni nokuti akanga atoita daka naAmunoni nokuti akanga abata hanzvadzi yake, Tamari chibharo." 
2Samuel13:23 Mushure memakore maviri azere, Abhusharomu akanga ana vaveuri vake vehwai kuBhaarihazori pedyo nokwaEfuraimu. Abhusharomu akakokako vanakomana vamambo." 
2Samuel13:24 Abhusharomu akasvika kuna Mambo akati, “Changamire, ini muranda wenyu ndine vaveuri vehwai. Zvino ndiri kukumbira kuti imi mambo namakurukota enyu tiende tose ikoko neni muranda wenyu.”" 
2Samuel13:25 Asi akati kuna Abhusharomu, “Kwete, mwanangu hatingaendiko tose tose, tingadaro tikakuremedza.” Abhusharomu akaramba ongovavarira kumukumbira; asi iye akaramba kuenda akamuti afambe zvake zvakanaka." 
2Samuel13:26 Abhusharomu ndokuti, “Kana musingaende chiregai tiende nomunun'una wangu, Amunoni.” Mambo akamuti, “Chaunodira kuenda naye chacho chii?”" 
2Samuel13:27 Asi Abhusharomu akaramba avavarira kumukumbira kusvikira abvumira Amunoni navamwe vanakomana vamambo vose kuti vaende zvavo naye. 
2Samuel13:28 Abhusharomu akati kuvaranda vake, “Munofanira kucherechedza Amunoni, kana zvino afarisa newaini, ini ndikakutii pfuudzai Amunoni, mobva mamupfuudza. Musatye, ndini ndinenge ndakutumai, muite chivindi, muite mwoyo wechirume.”" 
2Samuel13:29 Saizvozvo varanda vaAbhusharomu vakaita kuna Amunoni sezvavakanga vaudzwa naAbhusharomu. Ipapo vanakomana vose vamambo vakati dzvamu warandanda votasva manyurusi avo votiza. 
2Samuel13:30 Vachiri munzira, kuna Dhavhidhi kwakasvika shoko raiti, “Abhusharomu auraya vanakomana vose vamambo hakuna nomumwe wavo asara.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Mambo akabvarura hanzu dzake akati pasi zvambarara. Makurukota ake ose akanga akamukuta akabvarurawo hanzu dzawo. 
2Samuel13:32 Asi Jonadhabhu mwanakomana waShimea mukoma waDhavhidhi akati, “Changamire regai zvenyu kufunga kuti vauraya majaya enyu ose, vana venyu mambo, nokuti Amunoni chete ndiye afa. Honzeri yacho ndiAbhusharomu anga ane pfundipfundi naye kubvira zuva raakabata hanzvadzi yake Tamari chibharo." 
2Samuel13:33 Saka zvino, mambo changamire, regai zvenyu kuzvidya mwoyo muchifunga kuti vanakomana venyu mambo vose vafa, nokuti Amunoni ndiye chete afa.”" 
2Samuel13:34 Izvozvo Abhusharomu akanga atotiza. Rimwe jaya rakanga richichengetedzapo rakatarisa onei mhomho yavanhu ichiuya nokunzira yeseri kwake ichiteremuka mugomo. 
2Samuel13:35 Jonadhabhu akati kuna mambo, “Havoka vanakomana vamambo vari kuuya avo sezvandamboreva ini muranda wenyu, ndozvabva zvaitika izvi.”" 
2Samuel13:36 Achangoti pedzei kutaura vanakomana vamambo vaya vakabva varoverera kusvika, ndiye mhere povo. Mambowo namakurukota ake vakachema zvakanyanya kwazvo." 
2Samuel13:37 Izvozvo Abhusharomu akanga atotizira kuna Tarimai mambo wokuGeshuri mwanakomana waAmihudhi. Dhavhidhi akaita mazuva achichema mwanakomana wake. 
2Samuel13:38 Naizvozvo Abhusharomu akatizira kuGeshuri akagarako makore matatu. 
2Samuel13:39 Mambo Dhavhidhi akava nechisuwo chokuona Abhusharomu nokuti shungu yake yokuchema Amunoni yakanga zvino yapera nokuti akanga azvionawo kuti kufa kwaakatoita uku. 
2Samuel14:1 Joabhu mwanakomana waZeruya akazviziva kuti mwoyo wamambo wava kuna Abhusharomu. 
2Samuel14:2 Joabhu akabva atumira munhu kuTekowa kundouya nomumwe mukadzi akangwara. Akati kwaari “Ndapota unofanira kuita somunhu anochema nhamo yorufu upfeke hanzu dzinopfekwa nomunhu ari pakuchema urege kuzora muviri mafuta, uite somukadzi ava namazuva mazhinji achichema munhu akafa," 
2Samuel14:3 wozoenda kuna mambo utaure kwaari uchidaizvi.” Nokudaro Joabhu akamusoka mazwi okutaura. 
2Samuel14:4 Mudzimai wokuTekowa uyu paakasvika kuna mambo akati pasi bvurugwada akatyora uso, achimuremekedza, akati, “Ndinunureiwo mambo.”" 
2Samuel14:5 Mambo akati kwaari, “Chakunetsa chii?” Iye akati, “Zvamunoona kudai, ndiri chirikadzi. Murume wangu akafa." 
2Samuel14:6 Ini muranda wenyu, ndaiva navana vangu vaviri vakamutsana musango pasina wokuvatakanutsa. Mumwe akarova mumwe wake akamuuraya." 
2Samuel14:7 Zvino mhuri yose yandimukira, ini muranda wenyu vari kuti, ‘Tipe kuno munhu akauraya mumwe wake timuuraye pamusana peropa romumwe wake waakauraya. Nokudaro vanenge votourayawo mugari wenhaka. Ipapo vanenge votondidzimira chitsiga chomoto changa chasara, zita romurume wangu rigorova, pobva porega kuwanika nowakewo anozosara panyika.’ ”" 
2Samuel14:8 Mambo ndokubva ati kumukadzi uyu, “Chimbodzokera zvako kumusha kwako, ini ndichataura zvinofanira kuti zviitwe panyaya yako iyi.”" 
2Samuel14:9 Mudzimai wokuTekowa akati kuna mambo, “Mhosva iyi ngaive zvayo yangu, mambo changamire neyemhuri yokwababa vangu. Ngairege zvayo kunhanhira imi mambo nevemba yenyu.”" 
2Samuel14:10 Mambo akati, “Kuwana anenge angotaura kana chii zvacho, muunze kuno kwandiri haazombofa akakugunzva zvakare.”" 
2Samuel14:11 Iye akati, “Ndapota zvangu, dai mambo mukapika zvenyu naTenzi, Mwari wenyu muti mutsividzi weropa arege kunge achauraya munhu, mwanakomana wangu arege kuparara.” Iye ndokuti, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu, hakuna kana ruvhudzi zvarwo rwomwana wako ruchadonhera pasi.”" 
2Samuel14:12 Mukadzi uyu akabva ati, “Mambo ndapota ndingapamhidzewo here kutaura zvimwe kwamuri changamire.” Iye akati, “Taura zvako.”" 
2Samuel14:13 Mukadzi akati, “Madarirei kurongera vanhu vaTenzi zvinhu zvakadai nokuti nomutemero wamaita nyaya iyi matozvipa mhosva, sezvo imi, mambo musina kuti mwana wenyu arovera musango adzoke kuno zvakare?" 
2Samuel14:14 Chedu isu tose kwava kungofa chete, tangova semvura yarasikira pasi isina angaihorere asi Mwari haangambouraya munhu anoronga kuti nyakurova wenyu iyeyo arege kuramba ari munhu akaraswa kudaro." 
2Samuel14:15 Zvino ndauya kuzotaura izvi kwamuri, mambo changamire, pamusana pokuti vanhu vakaita kuti nditye ndokubva ini muranda wenyu ndati regai nditaure namambo, zvimwe vanganzwe chichemo changu, ini muranda wake." 
2Samuel14:16 Ndaiti zvimwe mambo vanganzwe vakandinunura mumaoko omunhu anoda kundiuraya pamwechete nomwana wangu munhaka yedu iyi yatakapiwa naMwari. 
2Samuel14:17 Ini muranda wenyu ndakazvitiwo nechomumwoyo, zvichataurwa namambo changamire wangu ndozvichandigadzanisa mwoyo nokuti, mambo changamire wangu vakaita somutumwa waMwari pakusiyanisa chakanaka nechakaipa. Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ngaave nemi.”" 
2Samuel14:18 Mambo akazoti kumukadzi uyu, “Rega kundivanza pane zvandava kukubvunza zvino.” Mukadzi uyu ndokuti, “Bvunzai zvenyu, mambo changamire.”" 
2Samuel14:19 Mambo akati, “Hauna kutumwa naJoabhu here iwe?” Mukadzi akadavira achiti, “Chokwadi chaicho ndichocho sezvamuripo kudai, mambo changamire. Kana imi mabvunza munhu haawane pokunzvenga-nzvenga napo. Ndiro gurukota renyu Joabhu randituma. Ndiye akandisoka zvose zvandataura, ini muranda wenyu." 
2Samuel14:20 Gurukota renyu Joabhu ndiro rakaita izvi kuti mamiriro ezvinhu asanduke. Asi, changamire muri munhu akangwara somutumwa waMwari pakuziva zvinhu pasi pano.”" 
2Samuel14:21 Mambo akazoti kuna Joabhu, “Chinzwa, ndakubvumidza, enda undodzosa mukomana uyu Abhusharomu uuye naye kuno.”" 
2Samuel14:22 Joabhu akati pasi gwadagwa achimuremekedza. Joabhu akarumbidza mambo achiti, “Nhasi uno, ini muranda wenyu, ndazoona kuti munondida, mambo changamire nokunzwa kwamaita chichemo changu, ini muranda wenyu.”" 
2Samuel14:23 Saizvozvo Joabhu akasimuka akaenda kuGeshuri akaunza Abhusharomu kuJerusaremu. 
2Samuel14:24 Zvakadaro zvazvo mambo akati, “Ngaaende kumba kwake. Kwandiri kuno uku ngaarege kutsika.” Saizvozvo Abhusharomu akaenda kumba kwake, kwamambo akaregawo kusvika." 
2Samuel14:25 MuIsiraeri yose makanga musina munhu airumbidzwa saAbhusharomu pachimiro. Kubvira pasi petsoka dzake kusvikira panhongonya yomusoro wake akanga asina chinoshoreka. 
2Samuel14:26 Aiti kana ogera musoro wake, bvudzi raaigera kupera kwegore roga roga rava kumuremera airiera. Uremo hwaro hwaiita makirogiramu maviri maererano nomwero wokwamambo." 
2Samuel14:27 Abhusharomu akabereka vana vakomana vatatu nemwana musikana mumwechete ainzi Tamari aive akanaka kwazvo. 
2Samuel14:28 Abhusharomu akagara muJerusaremu makore maviri chaiwo azere, kwamambo asingambokutsika." 
2Samuel14:29 Abhusharomu akati Joabhu auye amutume kuna mambo, asi Joabhu akaramba kuuya kwaari. Akatumirazve nhume kwaari rwechipiri asi Joabhu akaramba." 
2Samuel14:30 Abhusharomu akazoti, “Handiti munda waJoabhu uri kumuganho nowanguka, ane bhari irimo, endai muupise nomoto.” Nokudaro varanda vakandoupisa nomoto." 
2Samuel14:31 Joabhu ndokubva asimuka oenda kuna Abhusharomu kumba kwake ikoko. Akamuti, “Ko, varanda vako vapisireiko munda wangu?”" 
2Samuel14:32 Abhusharomu ndokuti kuna Joabhu, “Ndakakutumiraka shoko iwe kuti uuye kuno ndikutume kuna mambo kundoti, ‘Ko, ndakabvireiko kuGeshuri? Zvaitova nani kuti ndinge ndichiriko nazvino.’ Saka zvino regai ndisvike kwamambo. Kana ndiine mhosva andiuraye zvake.”" 
2Samuel14:33 Joabhu akaenda kuna mambo akamutaurira. Mambo akabva ati Abhusharomu auyeko. Saka akauya kuna mambo ndokuti gwadagwa pasi pana mambo, mambo ndokubva atsvoda Abhusharomu." 
2Samuel15:1 Mushure mezvo Abhusharomu akazvigadzirira ngoro yehondo namabhiza akava navarume makumi mashanu vokumhanya mberi kwake. 
2Samuel15:2 Aifumomuka mangwanani achindomira parutivi rwenzira yokusuwo guru. Aiti kana munhu auya kuzoenzanisirwa mhosva yake namambo," 
2Samuel15:3 Abhusharomu aimudaidza omubvunza kuti, “Wabva kuguta ripi iwe?” Iyewo kana aiti, “Ini muranda wenyu ndiri wedzinza rokwanhingi muIsiraeri muno,” Abhusharomu aiti kwaari, “Chinzwa iwe nyaya yako yakanaka kwazvo uye inonzwika, asi hapana akaiswa namambo kuti anzwe nyaya yako.”" 
2Samuel15:4 Abhusharomu aibva ati, “Dai zvangu ndirini mutongi wenyika ino ndaiti kana munhu akauya kwandiri nenyaya kana nechichemo chake ini ndaibva ndamuenzanisira.”" 
2Samuel15:5 Aitiwo kana munhu ouya kwaari kuzomugwadamira aibva amuchingidzira kwazvo maoko omubata achimutsvoda. 
2Samuel15:6 Ndozvaiita Abhusharomu kuvaIsiraeri vose vaiuya kuzotongwa namambo. Ipapo vanhu veIsiraeri vakatorwa mwoyo naAbhusharomu. 
2Samuel15:7 Mushure memakore mana, Abhusharomu akati kuna mambo, Chimbondiregai zvenyu ndiende kuHebhuroni kundozadzisa zvandakapika nemhiko kuna Tenzi." 
2Samuel15:8 Ndinodaro nokuti ini muranda wenyu pandanga ndiri kuGeshuri kuAramu ndakanyatsopika nemhiko ndichiti, “Chokwadi chokwadi kana Tenzi akaita kuti ndidzokere kuJerusaremu uku ndichazvipira kunamata Tenzi.”" 
2Samuel15:9 Mambo akamuti, “Enda zvako ufambe zvakanaka.” Nokudaro akasimuka akaenda kuHebhuroni." 
2Samuel15:10 Abhusharomu ndopaakabva zvino atuma nhume kumadzinza ose eIsiraeri neshoko rokuti, “Pamunongonzwa chete kurira kwehwamanda imi itii, ‘KuHeburoni Abhusharomu ava mambo.’ ”" 
2Samuel15:11 Abhusharomu akaenda namazana maviri avarume vaakanga akoka kuJerusaremu, vakaenderamo zvavo vasina chavaiziva." 
2Samuel15:12 Abhusharomu paaingunopira zvibayiro kudaro akatumira shoko rokuti VaAhitoferi muGati jinda raDhavhidhi riuye kubva kuguta rokwaro reGiro. Kupanduka uku kwakaramba kuchingokura, uye vateveri vaAbhusharomu vakaramba vachiwanda." 
2Samuel15:13 Imwe nhume yakasvika pana Dhavhidhi ikati, “Uku mwoyo yavanhu yava pana Abhusharomu.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Dhavhidhi akabva ati kumakurukota ake ose aaiva navo muJerusaremu. “Ngatisimukei titize hatingambopunyuki pana Abhusharomu. Ngatikurumidzei, nokuti angakurumidze akativinga akatibata akatipinza munyatwa akaparadza guta namapakatwa.”" 
2Samuel15:15 Makurukota amambo akati kwaari, “Isu makurukota enyu mambo takagadzirira kuita zvose zvamunenge, imi mambo changamire mati zviitwe.”" 
2Samuel15:16 Nokudaro mambo akabuda, mhuri yake yose ikamutevera. Akasiya varongo vake gumi vakachengeta muzinda." 
2Samuel15:17 Mambo akabuda vanhu vose vakamutevera, vakandomira vava paimba yokupedzisira." 
2Samuel15:18 Makurukota ake ose akapfuura paakanga ari vakaenda mberi pamwechete nevaKereti vose nevaPereti vose namakumi matanhatu ose avaGiti vakanga vamutevera kubva kuGati. 
2Samuel15:19 Mambo vakati kuna Itai muGiti, “Ko, chawava kuenderawo nesu chiiko? Dzokera iwe, undogaraka zvako namambo uyu, nokuti iwe uri mutorwaka iwe uye uri kutopotera zvako kuno pawakatiza kumusha kwako." 
2Samuel15:20 Iwe wakangosvikawo nezuro uno, ndiwe here wandingati utunhaire nesu ndisingazvizivi kudai kuti kwatiri kuenda ndokupi. Dzokera utorewo hama dzako uende nadzo, nemwoyo wakanaka uye nekutendeseka.”" 
2Samuel15:21 Asi Itai akapindura mambo achiti, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu nemiwo sezvamuripo kudai mambo changamire, kungave kufa kana kurarama, mambo changamire, kwamunenge muri, ini muranda wenyu ndokwandichave.”" 
2Samuel15:22 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kuna Itai, “Ko chipfuuraka zvako.” Itai muGiti akabva apfuura navanhu vokwake nepwere dzaakanga anadzo." 
2Samuel15:23 Nyika yose yakahwihwi kuchema pavaingunopfuura nepo. Mambo akayambuka kakova keKidhironi vanhu vose vakafamba vachienda kurenje. 
2Samuel15:24 Abhiatari akakwidzawo ikoko, Zadhoki ndokuendawoko nevaRevhi vose vakanga vakatakura bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano. Vakaisa pasi bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano kusvikira vanhu vose vabuda muguta imomo." 
2Samuel15:25 Mambo akazoti kuna Zadhoki, “Takurai bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano mudzokere muguta. Kana Tenzi akandiitira mwoyochena wake achandidzosa ndigoriona, iro nenzvimbo yaanogara." 
2Samuel15:26 Asi kana akati, handichafadzwa newe, inga ndiri pano wani regai aite zvake kwandiri zvaanenge aona kuti zvakanaka.”" 
2Samuel15:27 Mambo akatiwo kumupristi Zadhoki, “Chionaika, imi mochidzokera zvenyu zvakanaka muguta imi naAbhiatari navana venyu vakomana ava, Ahimaazi mwana wenyu imimi naJonatani mwana waAbhiatari." 
2Samuel15:28 Chinzwaika, ini ndichandomira ndiri pokuyambuka napo kuenda kurenje kusvikira ndanzwa shoko ramuchanditumira.”" 
2Samuel15:29 Saizvozvo Zadhoki naAbhiatari vakadzokera nebhokisi raMwari rechitenderano kuJerusaremu vakabva vasaramo zvavo. 
2Samuel15:30 Asi Dhavhidhi akakwira makata echikomo cheMiorivhi, akafamba achisvimha misodzi akafukidza musoro asina kana shangu mumakumbo. Vanhu vose vaaiva navo vakafukidzawo musoro vakakwira vakafamba vachihwihwidza kuchema." 
2Samuel15:31 Kuna Dhavhidhi kwakasvika shoko richiti, “Ahitoferi atovawo mumwe wavapanduki pamwechete naAbhusaromu.” Dhavhidhi akati, “Ndapota zvangu Tenzi. Dai zvenyu mukasandura ungwaru hwaAhitoferi mukahuita upenzi.”" 
2Samuel15:32 Pakasvika Dhavhidhi pamusoro pacho painamatirwa Mwari, ndipo pakabvawo pati Hushai muAriki vhu kusvika kuzoonana naye vaine hanzu yakabvaruka ivhu riri mumusoro." 
2Samuel15:33 Dhavhidhi akati kwaari, “Ndikati ndiende newe kutozvipa nhamo kwandingaite." 
2Samuel15:34 Asi kutoti iwe wochidzokera zvako kuguta wondoti kuna Abhusharomu, mambo regai zvenyu ndive gurukota renyu sezvo ini ndanga ndiri gurukota rababa venyu mazuva apera aya. Saka zvino regai zvenyu ndichivawo gurukota renyu zvangu. Ndopaungatozondipazanisira Ahitoferi mazano ake." 
2Samuel15:35 Inga wani Zadhoki naAbhiatari vapristi vanenge vanewe ikoko. Saka zvose zvamunenge manzwa nezvokumba kwamambo mobvawo mataurira Zadhoki naAbhiatari vapristi. 
2Samuel15:36 Ikoko vane vana vavo vakomana vaviri, vana Ahimaazi mwana waZadhoki naJonatani waAbhiatari. Ndovamuchapota muchituma neshoko kwandiri kuwana chose chamunenge mangonzwa chete.”" 
2Samuel15:37 Nokudaro Hushai shamwari yaDhavhidhi akadzokera kuguta akasanganidzana naAbhusharomu achitopindawo muJerusaremu. 
2Samuel16:1 Dhavhidhi paakangoti pfuurei zvishoma pamusoro paye ndiye Zibha muranda waMefibhosheti nepo pfacha namadhongi aiva nezvityaro akatakudzwa zvingwa mazana maviri, nezana rezvitsumbu zvamagirepisi akaomeswa nemichero zana yomuzhizha neguchu rewaini redehwe." 
2Samuel16:2 Mambo akati kuna Zibha, “Ko wauyirei nezvinhu izvi?” Zibha akati, “Madhongi aya ndeokuti mhuri yamambo iwane chokufambisa. Zvingwa izvi nemichero yezhizha iyi ndechokudya chamajaya enyu. Waini ndeyokuti vanenge vaziya nenyota murenje muno vanwe.”" 
2Samuel16:3 Mambo ndokuti, “Ko mwanakomana watenzi wako ari kupiko?” Zibha akati kuna mambo, “Asara zvake muJerusaremu umu. Ari kutoti nhasi mhuri yeIsiraeri ichandidzosera ushe hwababa vangu.”" 
2Samuel16:4 Mambo akabva ati kuna Zibha, “Chinzwa, zvose zvanga zviri zvaMefibhosheti zvava zvako.” Zibha akati, “Ndinokuremekedzai mambo changamire. Dai mwoyochena wenyu kwandiri wangoramba wakadaro.”" 
2Samuel16:5 Mambo Dhavhidhi paakasvika kuBhahurimu, akavingwa nomumwe murume wekumhuri yokwaSauro ainzi Shimei mwanakomana waGera. Akanyatsomubudira achimutuka," 
2Samuel16:6 achikanda matombo kuna Dhavhidhi nokumakurukota ose amambo Dhavhidhi nokuvanhu vose. Izvozvo varwi vehondo vano chaivo vokwamambo vakanga vakamukuta kurudyi nokuruboshwe. 
2Samuel16:7 Shimei aimutuka achiti, “Iwe! Ibva kuno! Ibva! Mhondi yomunhu! Munhu pasina!" 
2Samuel16:8 Tenzi akatsividza ropa remba yokwaSauro wawakatorera chigaro chokutonga. Tenzi azopa umambo mwanakomana wako Abhusharomu. Yhaa! Wazozviona. Waparara iwe nokuti uri mhondi yomunhu.” 
2Samuel16:9 Abhishai mwanakomana waZeruya akati kuna mambo, “Ko uyu imbwa zvayo yakafa kudai angatukireiko mambo changamire? Regai ndimuvinge ndimudimure musoro.”" 
2Samuel16:10 Asi mambo akati, “Munei nazvo nhaimi vana vaZeruya? Zvimwe kudaro ari kundituka pamusana pokuti Tenzi amuti, tuka Dhavhidhi, ndiani zvino angabvunze kuti, ‘Ko izvozvi uri kuitirei?’ ”" 
2Samuel16:11 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhishai nokumakurukota ake ose, “Hamuoniwo here kuti mwana wangu chaiye wokubereka ari kuda kuparadza upenyu hwangu. Ko kutozoti uyu wokwaBhenjamini zvake? Muregei akadaro. Regai atuke zvake nokuti Tenzi ndiye aita kuti adaro." 
2Samuel16:12 Zvichida Tenzi achaona dambudziko rangu akandiitira zvakanaka pamusana pokunyombwa kwandiri kuitwa.” 
2Samuel16:13 Dhavhidhi navanhu vake vakapinda zvavo munzira, uku Shimei achifambawo nomujinga mechikomo akavambirana naye achingomunyomba achimupotsera matombo nokumumbumurira guruva." 
2Samuel16:14 Mambo navanhu vose vakasvika kuna Jorodhani vaneta akambozorora ipapo. 
2Samuel16:15 Izvozvo Abhusharomu navanhu vose, varume vokwaIsiraeri vakasvika kuJerusaremu, Ahitoferi aivawo naye." 
2Samuel16:16 Pakasvika Hushai, muAriki, shamwari yaDhavhidhi iya kuna Abhusharomu yakati, “Zvoumambo hwenyu ngazvigare zvakadaro, ngazvirambe zvakadaro mambo!”" 
2Samuel16:17 Abhusharomu akati kuna Hushai, “Ndiko kuvimbika here kushamwari yako nhai ikoku? Waregerei kuenda neshamwari yako?”" 
2Samuel16:18 Hushai akati kuna Abhusharomu, “Bodo, nokuti anenge asarudzwa naTenzi navanhu ivava pamwechete navarume vose vokwaIsiraeri ndiye wangu iyeyo, uye ndiyewo wandinogara naye." 
2Samuel16:19 Uyezve ndiani wandingashandirewo kusatoti mwanakomana wake? Sokushandira kwandaingoita baba venyu ndokushandirawo kwandichaitira imi.” 
2Samuel16:20 Abhusharomu ndokuchizoti kuna Ahitoferi, “Tipewo zano, toitei?”" 
2Samuel16:21 Ahitoferi akati kuna Abhusharomu, “Torana navarongo vababa vako vavakasiya kuti vachengete musha ugare navo savakadzi vako. Isiraeri yose ichazvinzwa kuti wakazvimutsira daka nababa vako. Izvozvo zvinobva zvasimbaradza vanhu vaunavo”" 
2Samuel16:22 Vanhu vakabva vadzikira Abhusharomu tendhe padenga remba, Abhusharomu akatorana navarongo vababa vake vaIsiraeri vose vachiona." 
2Samuel16:23 Pamazuva iwayo mazano aipiwa naAhitoferi aifanana nomunhu ainge abvunza kuna Mwari. Ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita mazano aAhitoferi kuna Dhavhidhi naAbhusharomu. 
2Samuel17:1 Zvimwewo zvakataurwa naAhitoferi kuna Abhusharomu ndezvokuti, “Regai ndisarudze varume zviuru gumi nezviviri ndiende usiku hwanhasi kundoronda Dhavhidhi," 
2Samuel17:2 ndimusvikire akaneta arasa mwoyo ndigomupazamisa musoro, vanhu vose vaanavo vamudzvamuke kutiza. Iye mambo wacho chete ndiye wandichapfuudza," 
2Samuel17:3 ndigodzoka navanhu vacho vose kwamuri somuroora ari kuuya kumusha kwomurume wake. Chenyu imimika kupfuudza munhu mumwechete chete, vanhu vose vobva vapinda zvavo murunyararo.”" 
2Samuel17:4 Zano iri rakafadza Abhusharomu navakuru vakuru vokwaIsiraeri. 
2Samuel17:5 Abhusharomu akabva ati, “Chimbotidaidziraiwo Hushai wokuAriki tinzwewo zvaanoreva.”" 
2Samuel17:6 Pakauya Hushai kuna Abhusharomu, Abhusharomu akati kwaari, “Zano ratapiwa naAhitoferi nderiri toritevera here? Kana risiri iro, ko iwe unotiwo kudii?”" 
2Samuel17:7 Hushai akati kuna Abhusharomu, “Zano rapiwa naAhitoferi rwendo runo harina kunaka.”" 
2Samuel17:8 Hushai akatizve, “Inga kana nemiwo munongozvizivawo wani kuti baba venyu navanhu vavo magamba chaiwo ehondo uye kuti izvozvi vane ukasha seingwe yatorerwa vana vayo musango. Izvozvi, usiku havamborara vaya pamwechete navamwe." 
2Samuel17:9 Kutaura kuno, izvozvi vakatohwanda mune rimwe gomba kana kuti pane imwe nzvimbowo. Baba venyu vakazongotanga kuvarwisa, ani naani anozvinzwa anobva ati, ‘Hakuzi kuurayiwa ikoko kwaitwa vanhu vokwaAbhusharomu.’" 
2Samuel17:10 Pakadaro apo kunyange gamba chairo rine mwoyo weshumba rinobva rava mbwende chaiyo achibweka nokutya. Chandinodariro ndechokuti Isiraeri yose inozviziva kuti baba venyu igamba chairo rehondo uye kuti vavanavo vacho magambawo chaiwo ehondo. 
2Samuel17:11 Saka zvino zano rangu nderokuti, Isiraeri yose ngaikokorodzwe kubvira kuDhani kusvikira kuBheerisheba vaite sejecha repamahombekombe egungwa kuwanda, imimi pachenyu muendewo kuhondo," 
2Samuel17:12 tigomusvikira paanenge ari ipapo toti paari ware ware sedova riri kudonhera pasi zvokuti iye navanhu vose vaanavo parege kuwanikwa kunyange nomumwe anopunyuka. 
2Samuel17:13 Kana akapotera mune rimwe guta, pakadaro apo Isiraeri yose inoti tambo kokoto kuvinga guta racho torikwekweretsera mubani kudzamara pasara pasisina kunyange katombo zvako.”" 
2Samuel17:14 Abhusharomu navarume vose vokwaIsiraeri vakatoti, “Zano raHushai wokuAriki riri nani pane raAhitoferi,” nyamba izvozvo Tenzi akanga aronga zvokupazanisa zano raAhitoferi kuti apinze Abhusharomu munyatwa." 
2Samuel17:15 Hushai akazonyevera Zadhoki naAbhiatari vapristi achiti, “Zano ranga rapiwa naAhitoferi kuna Abhusharomu navakuru vakuru vokwaIsiraeri nderiri, iniwo randazopa nderiri." 
2Samuel17:16 Naizvozvo chikurumidzai kutumira Dhavhidhi shoko rokuti usiku hwanhasi ngaarege kurara pokuyambuka napo kurenje, asi kutoti napose paanogonera ayambuke. Mambo navanhu vaanavo vangadaro vakamedzwa.”" 
2Samuel17:17 Izvozvo Jonatani naAhimaazi vakanga vakamira kuEnirogeri. Mumwe muranda wechikadzi ndiye aitopota achindovanyevera, ivowo vachindozvisvitsa kuna mambo Dhavhidhi nokuti ivo havaifanira kuonekwa vachipinda muguta." 
2Samuel17:18 Asi mumwe mukomana akavaona akandozvisvitsa kuna Abhusharomu, vakomana vaye vari vaviri vakakurumidza kubvapo vakaenda kumba kwomumwe murume akanga ane mugodhi wemvura muchivanze chake kuBhaurimu vakapindamo." 
2Samuel17:19 Mudzimai akafukidza pamuromo wemugodhi wemvura akabva ayanika mbesanwapo nokudaro hazvina akaziva. 
2Samuel17:20 Makurukota aAbhusharomu paakasvika kumudzimai uyu pamusha apa vakati, “Ahimazi naJonatani vari kupi?” Mukadzi uyu ndokuvati, “Vayambuka kakova ako.” Vakavatsvaka vakavashaya vakadzokera Jerusaremu." 
2Samuel17:21 Pavakangoti endei, varume vaye vakabva vabuda mumugodhi wemvura uya vakandotaurira mambo Dhavhidhi. Vakabaira Dhavhidhi zanhi, vachiti, “Chitosimukai mukurumidze kuyambuka rwizi nokuti uku vaAhitoferi vapa vanhu zano kuti pawane chinoitwa kwamuri.”" 
2Samuel17:22 Dhavhidhi akabva asimuka navanhu vose vaaiva navo vakayambuka Jorodhani. Kunze kwakazosara kwoedza kusisina kana nomumwe akanga asara kumhiri asina kuyambuka. 
2Samuel17:23 Ahitoferi paakaona kuti zano rake harina kuteverwa, akati padhongi rake kata achibva aenda kumusha, kuguta rokwake. Akasiya aronga zvomumusha make ndokubva azvisungirira akafa, ndokuvigwa muguva rababa vake." 
2Samuel17:24 Dhavhidhi akasvika kuMahanaimu. Abhusharomuwo akayambuka Jorodhani navarume vose vokwaIsiraeri. 
2Samuel17:25 Abhusharomu akanga asarudza Amasa kuti ave mutungamiriri wehondo panzvimbo yaiva yaJoabhu. Amasa uyu akanga ari mwanakomana womumwe murume wechiIshimaeri ainzi Itira akanga akaroora Abhigari mwana wavaNahashi aiva mukoma nomunun'una naZeruya amai vaJoabhu. 
2Samuel17:26 VokwaIsiraeri vakadzika matendhe avo mudunhu rokwaGireadhi. 
2Samuel17:27 Pakasvika Dhavhidhi kuMahanaimu, Shobhi mwanakomana wavaNahashi wokuRabha muAmoni naMakiri mwanakomana waAmieri wokuRodhebhari pamwechete naBharizirai muGireadhi wokuRogerimu" 
2Samuel17:28 vakaunza mibhedha namadhishi, nehari nekoroni nebhari nembesanwa dzakakangwa nebhinzi nenyemba" 
2Samuel17:29 kwouya uchi nomukaka wakakora nehwai nechizi yavakawana kuzvipfuwo zvavo zvokuti Dhavhidhi navanhu vaaiva navo vawane chokudya, nokuti vaiti kurenje uku vanhu vava nenzara, vaneta uye vava nenyota." 
2Samuel18:1 Dhavhidhi akaronga varume vaaiva navo muzvikwata zvezviuru zviuru mukati mazvo zvikwata zvezana zana, ndokuisa vatungamiriri pachikwata choga choga." 
2Samuel18:2 Pazvikwata zvitatu zvaakatumira chimwe chaitungamirirwa naJoabhu, chimwe naAbhishai munun'una waJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya, chimwewo chichitungamirirwa naItai muGiti. Mambo akati kuvanhu, “Iniwo ndiri kuzoenda nemi.”" 
2Samuel18:3 Vanhu vakati, “Hamufaniri kuenda, nokuti kana isu tikatiza havana hanya nesu. Kunyange vamwe vedu chikamu chepakati napakati chaicho chikafa, havanei nazvo. Asi imi ndimi makatokosha kupfuura isu tiri zviuru gumi. Zviri nani ndezvokuti imi munge muri muguta muchititumira rubatsiro.”" 
2Samuel18:4 Mambo akati kwavari, “Zvamunenge maona kuti ndizvo zvakanaka ndizvo zvandichaita.” Nokudaro mambo akamira padivi kusuwo guru, varwi vose vachibuda vari mazana mazana nezviuru zviuru." 
2Samuel18:5 Mambo akaudza Joabhu naAbhishai naItai kuti, “Pamusana pangu ndibatirei zvakanaka mukomana uyu, Abhusharomu.” Mambo paaiudza vatungamiri vehondo vose nezvaAbhusharomu vanhu vose vaizvinzwa." 
2Samuel18:6 Saizvozvo hondo yakabudira vokwaIsiraeri kunze, ikarwisana navo musango rokwaEfuraimu." 
2Samuel18:7 Hondo yokwaIsiraeri yakakurirwa navanhu vokwaDhavhidhi, kwakafiwa kwazvo musi iwoyo, nezviuru makumi maviri." 
2Samuel18:8 Hondo yakapararira nenyika iyoyo yose. Sango rakaparadza vanhu vakawanda kupinda vakauraiwa namapakatwa zuva iroro. 
2Samuel18:9 Abhusharomu akaita mahwekwe navanhu vokwaDhavhidhi. Izvozvo Abhusharomu akanga akatasva nyurisi rake. Nyurusi rakasenerera napasi pamapazi makobvu ezimuoku, musoro wake wakabatirira zvakasimba kumuoku uyu. Akasara ongoti renga renga mumhepo nyurisi rati svorododo kupfuurira napasi pake." 
2Samuel18:10 Mumwe murume akazviona akataurira Joabhu kuti, “Ndaona Abhusharomu akarembera mumuoku.”" 
2Samuel18:11 Joabhu akati kuna nyakumuudza, “Watii, watomuona zvako. Ko waregerereiko kumupfuudza awira pasi? Zvingadai zvandifadza ndokupa zvino gumi rezvidimbu zvemari nebhanhire resirivha nomudya.”" 
2Samuel18:12 Murume uyu ndokuti kuna Joabhu, “Kunyange zvazvo zvikanzi ndini uyo ndachibata muruoko chiuru chezvidumbu zvemari yesirivha nouremo hwacho handimbofa ndakasimudzira rwangu ruoko kuuraya mwanakomana wamambo nokuti takanzwaka isu mambo vachikuudzai iyemi naAbhishai naItai kuti pamusana pangu mundichengetedzerewo zvakanaka mukomana uyu Abhusharomu." 
2Samuel18:13 Chimwewo ndechokuti dai izvozvi ndanga ndawana chimwe chandaita kwaari, kuna mambo, rina manyanga hariputirwe, imi iyemi chaiye maizongoti zvionere.”" 
2Samuel18:14 Joabhu akati, “Regai ndirege kupedza nguva yangu newe zvakadai.” Akatora mapfumo matatu mumaoko akandobaya Abhusharomu pamwoyo. Izvozvo Abhusharomu akanga achiri mupenyu ari mumuoku muya." 
2Samuel18:15 Majaya gumi aitakurira Joabhu zvombo zvehondo akakomba Abhusharomu vakamuuraya akafa. 
2Samuel18:16 Joabhu akaridza hwamanda, zvikwata zvavarwi zvikabva zvadzoka zvorega kuronda vokwaIsiraeri pamusana pokuti Joabhu akanga zvino avadzivisa." 
2Samuel18:17 Vakazotora Abhusharomu vakamukanda mugomba guru mudondomo. Vakatutiramo pamusoro pake zimurwi guru guru ramabwe. VokwaIsiraeri vose vakaita rumwe rumwe kutizira kumisha yavo. 
2Samuel18:18 Zvakanga zvaitika ndezvokuti Abhusharomu paaiva achiri mupenyu akanga atora shongwe yebwe akazvimisira shongwe iyoyo mubani rokwaMambo nokuti aiti handina mwana mukomana angazomutsiridza zita rangu. Akatumidza shongwe iyoyo nezita rake, ndokusaka ichinzi Shongwe yaAbhusharomu nanhasi uno." 
2Samuel18:19 Ahimaazi mwanakomana wavaZadhoki akati, “Regai ndimhanyire kuna mambo ndisvitse shoko iri rakanaka kudai rokuti Tenzi avanunura mumaoko avavengi vavo.”" 
2Samuel18:20 Joabhu akamuti, “Haungaende neshoko iri iye nhasi uno asi kutoti ungazoenda neshoko racho rimwe zuva zvaro. Asi nhasi haufaniri kuenda neshoko nokuti afa uyu mwanakomana wamambo.”" 
2Samuel18:21 Joabhu akabva ati kune mumwe wechiKushi, “Iwe chienda undotaurira mambo zvawaona.” MuKushi uya akakotamira Joabhu kumuremekedza ndokubva amhanyirako." 
2Samuel18:22 Ahimaazi mwana wavaZadhoki akatizve kuna Joabhu, “Chauya chauya, regai zvangu ndimhanye nditevere muKushi uyu.” Joabhu akati, “Uchamhanyireiko mwanangu iwe uchitoonawo zvako kuti hapana mubayiro waunowana neshoko irori.”" 
2Samuel18:23 Iye ndokuti, “Chauya chauya regai ndimhanye.” Saizvozvo iye akamuti, “Chimhanya.” Ahimaazi akamhanya nokunzira iri kwakati sandara akabva apfuura muKushi uye." 
2Samuel18:24 Izvozvo Dhavhidhi akanga akagara pakati pemisuwo mikuru miviri yeguta. Munhu aichengetedzapo akakwira pamusoro pesuo guru reparusvingo. Paakati tarisei akabva aona mumwe murume achimhanya ari oga oga. 
2Samuel18:25 Wokuchengetedzapo uya akadaidzira kutaurira mambo. Mambo akati, “Kana ari oga oga kudaro munhu ane shoko rakanaka.” Murume uya akaramba achiuya kudzamara asvika pedyo." 
2Samuel18:26 Muchengetedzi wepo uyu akaona zvakare mumwe murume achimhanya. Muchengetedzi akadaidzira kune aiva pasuo guru achiti, “Ona mumwezve uyo ari kumhanya ari oga oga.” Mambo ndokuti, “Naiyeyowo ari kuuya neshoko rakanaka.”" 
2Samuel18:27 Muchengetedzi akati, “Mumhanyiro weari mberi wacho ndiri kuona kunge mumhanyiro waAhimaazi mwana wavaZadhoki.” Mambo akati, “Uyo munhu ane mwoyo wakanaka uyo uyewo anounza shoko rakanaka.”" 
2Samuel18:28 Ahimaazi akadaidzira kuna mambo achiti, “Uku zvose muchete.” Akakotamira mambo achimuremekedza akati, “Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ngaarumbidzwe aisa mumaoko enyu vanhu vanga vakakupandukirai mambo changamire.”" 
2Samuel18:29 Mambo akati, “Ko mukomana uyu Abhusharomu akadii?” Ahimaazi akati, “Ini muranda wenyu pandatumwa negurukota renyu Joabhu, ndangoona vanhu vachiita bvongonyera asi handizive kuti paitikei.”" 
2Samuel18:30 Mambo ndokuti, “Chimboenda umire apo.” Akabvapo akandoti mbikiti kumira pakadaro apo." 
2Samuel18:31 WechiKushi uye akabva asvikawopo. MuKushi uyu akati, “Ndauya neshoko rakanaka mambo changamire. Tenzi aisa mumaoko enyu vose vanga vakakupandukirai.”" 
2Samuel18:32 Mambo akabvunza muKushi uyu kuti, “Ko mukomana, Abhusharomu akadii?” MuKushi ndokupindura achiti, “Mambo changamire dai vavengi venyu navose vanokupandukirai vachida kukuitirai zvakaipa vakaita hwomukomana iyeyu.”" 
2Samuel18:33 Mambo akabatwa neshungu akakwira akandopinda mumba yaiva pamusoro pesuo guru akahwihwidza kuchema akaendako achiti, “Ho Baba iwe, mwanangu Abhusharomu. Mwanangu kani. Mwanangu Abhusharomu. Dai ndiri ini zvangu ndafa iwe wasara. Nhai Abhusharomu mwanangu mwanangu.”" 
2Samuel19:1 Joabhu akataurirwa kuti mambo vari kuhwihwidza kuchema Abhusharomu. 
2Samuel19:2 Nokudaro kukurira kwakanga kwaita hondo musi iwoyo kwakasanduka kukava kusuruvara kwavanhu vose sezvo musi iwoyo vanhu vakanzwa zvichinzi mambo vari kutorwadziwa mwoyo kwazvo nezvemwanakomana wavo. 
2Samuel19:3 Varwi vakapinda muguta vachiita zvokuverevedza musi iwoyo sezvinongoita varwi vari kunyara vanenge vachitiza muhondo. 
2Samuel19:4 Izvozvo mambo akanga akabata uso achiridza mhere achiti, “Yowe, mwanagu Abhusharomu, Abhusharomu kani, mwana wangu. Nhai mwanangu we-e.”" 
2Samuel19:5 Ndokubva Joabhu apinda mumba muna mambo ndokuti, “Inga nhasi manyadzisa makurukota ose enyu ari kukununurai upenyu noupenyu hwavanakomana navanasikana venyu noupenyu hwavakadzi venyu nohwavarongo venyu" 
2Samuel19:6 nezvamuri kuita izvi zvokuda vari kukuvengai muchivenga vari kukudai nokuti muri kutoratidzaka pachena imi kuti hamuna basa navatungamiriri vehondo kana namakurukota. Ndinodaro nokuti dai nhasi Abhusharomu anga ari mupenyu isu tose tirisu tafa, kwamuri ndozvanga zvakanaka." 
2Samuel19:7 Saka zvino chisimukai mubude mundonyengetedza makurukota enyu nokuti ndinopika naTenzi kuti kana musina kubuda, vanhu vose vanokudzvamukai nhasi uno mosara musisina wamunaye usiku hwanhasi. Izvi ndozvingazova zvakaipisisa kwazvo pane zvose zvakambokuwirai kubvira pauduku hwenyu kusvikira pari nhasi.”" 
2Samuel19:8 Mambo akasimuka akandogara pasuo guru reguta kwakasvitswa shoko kuvanhu rokuti mambo agere kusuo guru. Vanhu vose vakauya kuna mambo. Izvozvo vokwaIsiraeri vakanga vaita rumwe rumwe kutizira kumisha yavo. 
2Samuel19:9 Vanhu vose vaiitirana nharo mumadzinza ose eIsiraeri vachiti, “Mambo akatinunura kuvavengi vedu. Iye pachake akatinunura kuvaFirisitia asi zvino akatiza munyika muno pamusana paAbhusharomu." 
2Samuel19:10 Asika Abhusharomu watakanga tagadza umambo akafa muhondo. Ko zvino morambirei makangoti zi-i zi-i musingataure nezvokuti mambo achidzoka zvake?” 
2Samuel19:11 Mambo Dhavhidhi akatumira Zadhoki naAbhiatari vapristi shoko rokuti, “Taurirai vakuru vakuru vokwaJudha kuti madirei kuva ndimi vokupedzesera kuti mambo achidzokera zvake kumba kwake?" 
2Samuel19:12 Imi vacho ndimi hama dzangu. Muri hama dzangu chaidzo, vanhu veropa rimwechete neni. Madirei kuva imi ndimi vokupedzesera kuti mambo achidzokera zvake?" 
2Samuel19:13 Iti kuna Amasa, ko zvauriwezve muzukuru wangu chaiye wani weropa rimwechete neni? NaMwari chaiye ngapave nechinondiwana kana iwe usiri mutungamiriri wehondo yangu kubvira iyezvino zvichienda mberi panzvimbo yanga iri yaJoabhu.”" 
2Samuel19:14 Vanhu vose vokwaJudha vakatorwa mwoyo nazvo vakaita mwoyo mumwechete vakatumira kuna mambo shoko rokuti chidzokai zvenyu kuno iyemi mose namakurukota enyu ose. 
2Samuel19:15 Saizvozvowo mambo akadzoka akasvika muna Jorodhani. Vanhu vokwaJudha vakaenda kuGirigari kundochingura mambo nokuyambutsa mambo Jorodhani. 
2Samuel19:16 Shimei mwanakomana waGera wokwaBhenjamini wokuBhahurimu akakurumidzawo kudzikako pamwechete nevokwaJudha kundochingurawo mambo Dhavhidhi. 
2Samuel19:17 Shimei uyu aivawo pamwechete navarume chiuru chimwechete vokwaBhenjamini. Zibha muranda wokwaSauro pamwechete navanakomana vake gumi navashanu navaranda vake makumi maviri vakakurumidza kudzikawo kuna Jorodhani kuna mambo. 
2Samuel19:18 Vakayambuka zambuko kundotora mhuri yokwamambo yomumba nokuitawo zvainge zvichidiwa namambo. Shimei mwana wavaGera akati pasi gwadagwa pana mambo pakanga mambo oda kuyambuka Jorodhani. 
2Samuel19:19 Akati kuna mambo, “Mambo, dai mukandiregererawo mhosva yangu changamire muregewo zvenyu kufunga kukanganisa kwandakaita kwamuri zuva riya ini muranda wenyu mambo changamire pamaibva kuJerusaremu. Regai zvenyu kana kuzviisa mumwoyo" 
2Samuel19:20 nokuti ini muranda wenyu ndinoziva kuti ndakatadza. Chionai kuti ndabva ndava ndini wokutanga kumhuri yose yokwaJosefi kudzika kuno kuzochingurana nemi mambo changamire.” 
2Samuel19:21 Abhishai mwanakomana waZeruya akapindura achiti, “Pamusana paizvozvo, Shimei haafanire kufa here zvaakatuka muzodzwa waTenzi?”" 
2Samuel19:22 Asi Dhavhidhi akati, “Munei nazvo nhaimi vana vokwaZeruya zvamava kuita sokunge muri kuda kutorwisana neni nhasi uno? Ndiro zuva here ringaurayiwe munhu muIsiraeri irori randava kuziva racho kuti ini ndini mambo weIsiraeri?”" 
2Samuel19:23 Saka mambo akati kuna Shimei, “Iwe hausi kuzofa,” mambo akatomutsidzira nemhiko." 
2Samuel19:24 Mefibhosheti muzukuru waSauro akadzikawo kundochingura mambo. Kubvira zuva rakaenda mambo kusvikira zuva raakadzoka zvakanaka, Mefibhosheti uyu haana kumboshamba makumbo ake kana kudimurira ndebvu dzake kana kusuka mbatya dzake." 
2Samuel19:25 Paakabva kuJerusaremu akasvika pana mambo akati kwaari, “Wakaregerereiko kuenda neni nhai Mefibhosheti?”" 
2Samuel19:26 Iye ndokuti, “Mambo wangu changamire, ini muranda wenyu ndakaremara. Saka ndakati kumuranda wangu, sungira chityaro padhongi rangu nditasve ndiendewo namambo. Asi muranda wangu Zibha akandinyengedza." 
2Samuel19:27 Akauya kwamuri imi mambo changamire akandireva ini muranda wenyu. Zvino imi mambo wangu changamire makaita somutumwa waMwari, naizvozvo, imi, itai zvamunenge muchida zvenyu." 
2Samuel19:28 Mhuri yose yokwababa vangu, chavo chavaifanira kuwana kwamuri mambo changamire rufu chete. Asi imi makatoita zvenyu kuti ini muranda wenyu ndivewo pakati pevanodya pamwechete nemi patafura. Pakadaro chii chingandipe kunge ndichakumbira zvimwe kuna mambo?”" 
2Samuel19:29 Mambo akati kwaari, “Chaucharamba uchitaurira nyaya yako iyi chii? Chandinotaura ndechokuti: iwe naZibha govanai munda.”" 
2Samuel19:30 Mefibhosheti akabva apindura mambo achiti, “Chiregai zvake atore wose imi mambo changamire zvamangodzoka zvakanaka kudai kumusha.”" 
2Samuel19:31 Bharizirai wokuGireadhi akanga adzika kubva kuRogerimu kuzoperekedza mambo kusvika muna Jorodhani nokumuyambutsa Jorodhani irworwu. 
2Samuel19:32 Bhazirai akanga ave harahwa chaiyo, ava namakumi masere amakore. Ndiye akambopa mambo zvokudya paakanga ari kuMahanaimu akanga ari shoroma chaiyo." 
2Samuel19:33 Mambo akati kuna Bhazirai, “Handei tose kuJerusaremu ndini ndichandokuchengeta.”" 
2Samuel19:34 Asi Bhazirai akadaira mambo achiti, “Mukati ndichagarawo makore mangani amungati ndichange ndichaenderawo namambo kuJerusaremu?" 
2Samuel19:35 Ini ndave harahwa yemakumi masere amakore kudai nhasi uno, chandichazivawo chii, chakaipa kana chakanaka? Munofunga here kuti ini muranda wenyu chokudya chandinodya nechokunwa chandinonwa zvichiri kundinakira here? Zvokuteera varume nevakadzi vanoimba munoti ndichazvigonawo nhai? Madirei zvenyu kuti ini muranda wenyu ndive mumwe mutoro wokukuremedzai mambo changamire?" 
2Samuel19:36 Ini muranda wenyu ndichayambuka Jorodhani nemi mambo ndozongoti fambe-fambei. Ko mambo muchadirei kunditsiva nomuripo wakadai? 
2Samuel19:37 Ndapota regai zvenyu ini muranda wenyu ndidzokere ndindofira zvangu kuguta rokwangu kuna makuva ababa naamai vangu. Asi muranda wenyuka uyu Kimhamu, ngaayambuke nemi mambo changamire. Ndiye wamungandoitira zvenyu zvamunenge muchida.”" 
2Samuel19:38 Mambo akati, “Kimhamu ndiye achayambuka neni. Ndiye wandichaitira zvamunenge muchida ndichakuitiraiwo zvose zvamunenge muchida.”" 
2Samuel19:39 Vanhu vose vakayambuka Jorodhani, mambo akayambukawo. Mambo akatsvoda Bharizirai akamukomborera akabva adzokera zvake kumusha kwake." 
2Samuel19:40 Pakayambukira mambo kuGirigari, Kimhamu akaendawoko naye navanhu vose vokwaJudha nechimwe chikamu chevokwaIsiraeri. Ndivo vakayambutsa mambo." 
2Samuel19:41 Varume vose vokwaIsiraeri vakauya kuna mambo vakabvunza mambo kuti, “Ko idzo hama dzenyu idzi dzokwaJudha dzaizoita zvokukubai sei kutounza imi mambo kuno nokuyambutsa Jorodhani mhuri yokwamambo navarume vamaiva navo vokwaDhavhidhi vose?”" 
2Samuel19:42 Varume vokwaJudha vose vakati kune vokwaIsiraeri, “Chatadariro ndechokuti ukama hwedu namambo iyeyuka ndohwepedyo chaizvo. Ko zvino chii chaicho chakushatirisai panyaya iyoyi? Pane chamambo chatakadya here isu, kana kuti pane chaakatipa here?”" 
2Samuel19:43 Varume vokwaIsiraeri vakati kune varume vokwaJudha, “Isu tinotova nemigove gumi muumambo uhu uyewo chedu muna Dhavhidhi tinacho kutopinda imi kwazvo. Ko zvino chamakatishora chii? Hatiziri isu here takava vokutanga kutaura kuti mambo achidzoka?” Asi mhinduro yavarume vokwaJudha yakanga yakaomarara kupfuura mhinduro yavarume vokwaIsiraeri." 
2Samuel20:1 Zvakangoitikawo kuti paiva nomumwe matatapure womunhu ainzi Shebha mwanakomana waBhikiri wokwaBhenjamini. Akaridza hwamanda akati, “Isu muna Dhavhidhi, mugove hatina. Hatina nhaka mumwana waJese isu. VokwaIsiraeri we-e, munhu wese ngaazive nzira aende kwake.”" 
2Samuel20:2 Ipapo varume vose vokwaIsiraeri, zvokutevera Dhavhidhi vakabva vakanda pasi ndokubva votevera Shebha mwana waBhikiri. Asi varume vokwaJudha vakaramba vakati kwati kwati namambo wavo kubvira muna Jorodhani kusvikira kuJerusaremu." 
2Samuel20:3 Dhavhidhi akasvika mumuzinda wake muJerusaremu. Mambo akatora varongo vaye gumi vaakanga asiyira kuchengeta musha. Akavaisa mune imwe imba mavaichengetedzwa achivariritira asi haana kumbozopinda mumba navo. Naizvozvo vakazogara vakapfigirwa upenyu hwavo hwose vachigara sechirikadzi. 
2Samuel20:4 Mambo akazoti kuna Amasa, “Ndikokoredzere vanhu vokwaJudha vave pano mushure memazuva matatu iwe unge uri panowo.”" 
2Samuel20:5 Amasa akaenda kundokokorodza vokwaJudha. Asi akanonoka nguva yaakanga anzi auye. 
2Samuel20:6 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Abhishai, “Zvino Shebha uyu mwana waBhikiri achatipinza nhamo kupfuura Abhusharomu. Chitora makurukota okwachangamire wako umuronde angadaro akapinda mumaguta etsvingo akazotinzvenga.”" 
2Samuel20:7 Varume vokwaJoabhu navaichengetedza mambo, maKereti nemaPereti nemvumba dzose chaidzo dzokurwa hondo, vakaenda vakatungamirirwa naAbhishai. Vakabuda muJerusaremu vakandoronda Shebha mwanakomana waBhikiri." 
2Samuel20:8 Pavakasvika kuzidombo guru rokuGibheoni, Amasa akasanganidzana navo. Izvozvo Joabhu akanga akapfeka hanzu dzake dzehondo, pamusoro padzo akasungira bhande muchiuno raiva nebakatwa muhara. Paakati achiti fambei bakatwa rakasvotokera pasi," 
2Samuel20:9 Joabhu ndokuti kuna Amasa, “Ko, wakadiiko munun'una?” Joabhu akabva amuti ndebvu kweshu norudyi rwake kunge kuda kumutsvoda." 
2Samuel20:10 Asi Amasa haana kucherechedza bakatwa raiva muroko rwaJoabhu. Joabhu akabva amuti naro dhuvhu mudumbu, ura hwake hukati pasi wodzvo asina kumubaya rwechipiri akabva afa. Joabhu nomunun'una wake Abhishai vakabva voronda Shebha mwana waBhikiri." 
2Samuel20:11 Mumwe murume wokwaJoabhu akamira pedyo nechitunha chaAmasa ndokusheedzera achiti, “Munhu wese anenge achida Joabhu neanenge ari wokwaDhavhidhi, ngaatevere Joabhu.”" 
2Samuel20:12 Izvozvo Amasa akanga achitoumburuka muropa pakati pomugwagwa mukuru. Ani naani aisvika nepo aiti akangomuona ombomira. Murume uya paakaona kuti munhu wese ari kumbomirapo akabvisa Amasa pamugwagwa apa akandomuisa musango akamufukidza neimwewo hanzu. 
2Samuel20:13 Paakabvisa Amasa mumugwagwa vanhu vose vakanga vava kungopfuura vachienda naJoabhu kundoronda Shebha mwana waBhikiri. 
2Samuel20:14 Shebha akafamba achidevanisa nemadzinza okwaIsiraeri ose kusvika kuAbheri nokuBhetimaaka nokuvaBheri vose vakaungana vakamutevera. 
2Samuel20:15 Varwi vose vaiva naJoabhu vakauya vakamukomba muAbheri kuBhetimaaka. Vakaunganidza ivhu rikaita chinenge musana wenzou chakatsamirana norusvingo ndokubva vava kutigimura rusvingo kuti rukoromokere pasi. 
2Samuel20:16 Mumwe mukadzi akanga akangwara akadaidzira ari mugutamo achiti, “Nditeerereiwo munzwe. Itii vaJoabhu vauye apo ndimbotaurawo navo.”" 
2Samuel20:17 Joabhu akaenda kwaari, iye ndokuti, “Ndimi vaJoabhu?” Joabhu akati, “Ndini.” Mukadzi akabva ati, “Chimbonzwai zvandavakutaura ini muranda wenyu.” Akati “Ndipire ndizwe.”" 
2Samuel20:18 Iye ndokuti, “Makarekare vakuru vaiti, ukangobvunza zano kuAbheri, nyaya yaibva yapera." 
2Samuel20:19 Ini ndiri mumwe wavanhu vanoda rugare uye vakatendeka muIsiraeri. Asi imi muri kuda kuparadza guta rakaita saamai muIsiraeri. Chamadira kumedza nhaka yaTenzi chii?” 
2Samuel20:20 Joabhu akabva ati, “Handimbofa ndakaita zvakadaro. Zvokumedza izvo kana kuparadza kwandiri hazvimboitika izvo." 
2Samuel20:21 Hazvisiri izvo. Chiripo chete ndechokuti kune mumwe murume anonzi Shebha mwana waBhikiri wokunyika yokwaEfuraimu yamakomo akapandukira mambo Dhavhidhi. Ingoturirai murume iyeyo mumaoko medu ndinobva ndatosiyana neguta rino.” Mukadzi uyu akati, “Chiregai zvenyu muone, muchakandirwa musoro wake napamusoro porusvingo.”" 
2Samuel20:22 Nouchenjeri hwake ihwohu mukadzi uyu akaenda kuvanhu vose, vakazodimura Shebha mwana waBhikiri musoro vakaukanda kuna Joabhu. Joabhu ndokubva aridza hwamanda, vanhu vake vakabva vakotonoka paguta iri munhu wese akadzokera kumusha kwake. Joabhu akabva adzokera kuJerusaremu kuna mambo." 
2Samuel20:23 Joabhu ndiye aiva ari mukuru mukuru wehondo yose zvayo yeIsiraeri. Bhenaya mwanakomana waVaJehoyadha akanga ariye mutungamiri wevaichengetedza mambo, maKereti nemaPereti." 
2Samuel20:24 Adhoramu aiva mukuru mukuru wezvebasa rechibharo, Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAhirudhi ariye samunyori mukuru mukuru." 
2Samuel20:25 Shevha ndiye aiva munyori. Zadhoki naAbhiatari ndovaiva vapristi. 
2Samuel20:26 Ira wokuJairi aivawo mupristi waDhavhidhi. 
2Samuel21:1 Kwakaitika nzara mumazuva aDhavhidhi yakapedza makore matatu akasusukidzana. Dhavhidhi akabva ada kunzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo. Tenzi akati, “Pane mhosva yokudeura ropa yakaparwa naSauro nevemba yokwake nokuti akauraya vanhu vekuGibheoni.”" 
2Samuel21:2 Mambo ndokubva adaidza Gibheoni akataura naye. Gibheoni akanga asiri werudzi rumwechete nevaIsiraeri asi ndovamwe vakanga vasara kurudzi rwechiAmoni. VaIsiraeri vakanga vavatsidzira nemhiko kuti vachavasiya vari vapenyu, asi Sauro pamusana peshungu dzake dzokushingairira vanhu vokwaIsiraeri novokwaJudha akanga zvino avauraya." 
2Samuel21:3 Dhavhidhi akabvunza vechiGibheoni kuti, “Chii chandingakuitirei? Ndingakuripei nei kuti mugokomborera nhaka yaTenzi?”" 
2Samuel21:4 Gibheoni akamupindurawo achiti, “Mhosva yedu isu naSauro kana nemhuri yake haisi yokuripwa nesirivha kana ndarama, uyezve hatina mvumo yokuti titi munhu ngaaurayiwe muIsiraeri muno.” Dhavhidhi akati, “Chamunoda kuti ndikuitirei chii?”" 
2Samuel21:5 Ivo vakati kuna mambo, “Kumunhu akaparadza vamwe vedu achironga zvokutitsakatisa achitishayisa pokugara munyika yose muno yeIsiraeri," 
2Samuel21:6 tipei vazukuru vake vechikomana vanomwe tigovasungirira mudenga kuGibhea kwaSauro musarudzwi waTenzi.” Mambo akati, “Ndichavapa kwamuri.”" 
2Samuel21:7 Asi mambo akararamisa Mefibhosheti mwanakomana waJonatani, muzukuru waSauro pamusana pemhiko yaDhavhidhi naJonatani mwanakomana waSauro yavakapikirana pana Tenzi." 
2Samuel21:8 Mambo akatora Arimoni naMefibhosheti vanakomana vaviri vaRizipa mwanasikana waAya waabereka naSauro pamwechete navana vakomana vashanu vaMerabhu mwanasikana waSauro vaakabereka naAdhirieri mwanakomana waBhazirai wokuMehorati. 
2Samuel21:9 Dhavhidhi akavapa kune vechiGibheoni vakavasungirira mudenga pagomo pana Tenzi vakabva vaparara pamwechete vari vanomwe kudaro. Vakaurayiwa mazuva okutanga enguva yokukohwa, nguva yokutanga-tanga kukohwa bhari." 
2Samuel21:10 Rizipa mwanasikana waAya akatora saga akariwarira paruware kuti awane pokugara kubvira panguva yokutanga kukohwa kusvikira panguva yomunhuruka. Masikati, aisvokodzera shiri dzedenga kuti dzirege kumharapo, usiku achidzingapo zvikara zvesango." 
2Samuel21:11 Dhavhidhi akati ataurirwa zvakanga zvaitwa naRizipa mwanasikana waAya murongo waSauro," 
2Samuel21:12 Dhavhidhi uyu akaenda akatora mapfupa aSauro neemwana wake Jonatani aiva navanhu vokuJabheshi kwaGireadhi. VokuJabheshi ava vakanga vaita zvomuchiverevere vakandoatora panhandare yokuBhetishani paakanga aiswa kumadziro nevaFirisitia panguva yavakauraya Sauro paGiribhaa. 
2Samuel21:13 Dhavhidhi akatorako mapfupa aSauro neemwanakomana wake Jonatani. Vakaisa pamwechete mapfupa avaye vakanga vaita zvokusungirirwa. 
2Samuel21:14 Vakaviga mapfupa aSauro neemwana wake Jonatani muguva rababa vake Kishi kunyika yokwaBhenjamini muZera. Vakaita zvose zvakanzi namambo zviitwe. Mushure mezvo Mwari ndopaazodzora zvake mwoyo kunzwa minamato yaiitirwa nyika iyi. 
2Samuel21:15 VaFirisitia vakazorwazve neIsiraeri ndokubva Dhavhidhi adzikako pamwechete namakurukota ake. Vakarwisana navaFirisitia, Dhavhidhi ndokubva arukutika muviri." 
2Samuel21:16 Ishibhibhenobhu mumwe wechizvarwa chehofori aiva nepfumo rairema makirogiramu anoda kukwana mana, akasungirira bakatwa idzva akafunga zvokuuraya Dhavhidhi." 
2Samuel21:17 Asi Abhishai mwanakomana waZeruya akauya kuzomununura akarwisa muFirisitia uyu akamuuraya. Varwi vaDhavhidhi vakapika kwaari kuti, “Hazvimbofa zvakafanira kuitika zvakare kuti imimi mutosimukawo nesu kuenda kuhondo kundorwa kuti murege kudzimisa mwenje weIsiraeri.”" 
2Samuel21:18 Mushure maizvozvo kwakamukazve hondo navaFirisitia kuGobhu ndokubva Sibhekai wokuHusha auraya Safi aiva mumwe wechizvarwa chehofori. 
2Samuel21:19 Kwakaita zvakare imwe hondo navaFirisitia kuGobhu. Erihanani mwanakomana waJaareoregimu wokuBheterehemu akauraya Goriati muGiti, rwiriko rwepfumo rake rwakanga rwakaita somutandariko wechinoshandiswa nomuruki." 
2Samuel21:20 Kwakaitikazve imwe hondo kuGati, ikoko kwaiva nerimwe zirume rino chairo. Mumaoko raiti uku minwe mitanhatu uku mitanhatu, kutsokawo rakati uku zvigunwe zvitanhatu uku zvitanhatu pamwechete makumi maviri nezvina. Aivawo mumwe wechizvarwa chehofori." 
2Samuel21:21 Paakatafurira Isiraeri, Jonatani mwanakomana waShimei aiva mukoma nomunun'una naDhavhidhi, akamuuraya." 
2Samuel21:22 Ivava vari vana kudai vakanga vari vamwe vechizvarwa chehofori dzomuGati. Vakaurayiwa naDhavhidhi navanhu vake. 
2Samuel22:1 Dhavhidhi akadetemba mazwi erwiyo urwu kuna Tenzi paakununurwa naTenzi mumaoko avavengi vake vose nomumaoko aSauro achiti: 
2Samuel22:2 Tenzi ndiye bako rangu, ndiye nhare nomununuri wangu." 
2Samuel22:3 Mwari wangu ndiye bako rangu, maari ndimo mandinopotera. Ndiye nhoo yangu, simba noruponeso rwangu. Ndiye shongwe yangu yakakwirira, muponesi wokundinunura mumadzudzo." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndinodaidzira kuna iye anofanira kurumbidzwa, Tenzi; ndinobva ndatonunurwa ini kune vanondivenga." 
2Samuel22:5 Nokuti masundesunde orufu akandikomberedza, mharadzi dzikati neni momoto semafashamo emvura." 
2Samuel22:6 Tambo dzenzvimbo yavachakabvu dzakanditi koche koche, mariva orufu akandigaririra." 
2Samuel22:7 Munhamo yangu iyi ndakachema kuna Tenzi. Ndakachema kuna iye Mwari wangu, muTemberi yake iye akanzwa izwi rangu, kuchema kwangu kukasvika munzeve dzake." 
2Samuel22:8 Nyika yakadedera ikandengendeka, nheyo dzedenga dzikazunguzika dzikatetemera nokuti akanga ashatirwa." 
2Samuel22:9 Akafemeruka utsi mumhuno dzake, rimi romoto rikavavaya, mukanwa make, mukabuda mazimbe anobvira moto." 
2Samuel22:10 Akabvarura denga akaburuka, gore dema riri pasi petsoka dzake." 
2Samuel22:11 Akati pakerubhu karakata akabhururuka, akaonekwa achibhururuka mumhepo." 
2Samuel22:12 Rima raive rakamutenderedza, akariita chokuhwanda nacho, makute edenga matematema chaiwo emvura aya." 
2Samuel22:13 Pamusana pokupenya kwaiva mberi kwake, mazhenje omoto wemheni aivaima." 
2Samuel22:14 Tenzi akadhiriridza mudenga umu, izwi raNyadenga rikariridza." 
2Samuel22:15 Akakanda miseve vakati dzvamu kutiza, nayo mheni vakati ware kutiza." 
2Samuel22:16 Makoronga omugungwa akaoneka, pagere nyika pakanyatsoti pachena yacha." 
2Samuel22:17 Akandisveerera ruoko ari kumusoro akanditora, akandinyurura mumvura zhinji." 
2Samuel22:18 Akandinunura kuvavengi vangu vane simba kuna vaindivenga, nokuti vaiva nesimba kupinda ini." 
2Samuel22:19 Vakandivinga pazuva renhamo dzangu, asi Tenzi ndiye akava musimboti wangu." 
2Samuel22:20 Akandiburitsamo akanditi panhandare tendhe, akandinunura nokuti anondifarira." 
2Samuel22:21 Tenzi akandipa mubayiro, maererano nokururama kwandinako, akandidzorera zvinofambiranawo, nokuchena kwandakaita maoko;" 
2Samuel22:22 nokuti ndakarambira ndiri mumakwara aTenzi; handina kuita chakaipa chokusiyana naMwari," 
2Samuel22:23 nokuti chainditungamirira, zvirongwa zvake zvose, mirawo yake ndisingaifuratire." 
2Samuel22:24 Kwaari iye handina chinoshoreka. Ndakazvichengeta ndisina mhosva. 
2Samuel22:25 Ndokusaka andidzorerawo maererano nokururama kwandinako zvichifambiranawo nokuchena kwangu mukuona kwake. 
2Samuel22:26 Kune akatendeka, imi makatendeka, kune akarurama, imi makarurama." 
2Samuel22:27 Kune ane mwoyo wakanaka imi makanaka, asi kune ane muitiro wakakombama, imiwo munobva mavava." 
2Samuel22:28 Munonunura vanotambudzika, asi munotsvukisira meso vanozvikudza, kuti muvaorore." 
2Samuel22:29 Sezvo imi Tenzi murimi mwenje wangu, imi Mwari wangu ndimi munondivhenekera murima;" 
2Samuel22:30 nokuti nemi ndinoparadza chikwata chavarwi, ndiina Mwari wangu, rusvingo ndinosvetuka." 
2Samuel22:31 Mwari uyu, nzira dzake dzakarurama, zvinotaurwa naTenzi ndezvechokwadi, inhoo yevose vanopotera kwaari." 
2Samuel22:32 Ndiani Mwari, kunze kwaTenzi? Ndiani bako, kunze kwaMwari wedu?" 
2Samuel22:33 Mwari iyeyu ndiye diziro rangu akaita kuti nzira yangu ive yakarurama. 
2Samuel22:34 Makumbo angu anoaita seengururu, kunyange pamangoringori ndinomira." 
2Samuel22:35 Anondidzidzisa kurwa hondo zvokuti kunyange uta hwendarira maoko angu anogona kutatamura. 
2Samuel22:36 Ruponiso rwenyu ndonhoo yamakandipa, nokuzvirereka kwenyu makaita kuti ndive mukuru mukuru." 
2Samuel22:37 Pokutsika netsoka dzangu, makandipa pakuru zvokuti tsoka dzangu kutsvedzemuka hadzina." 
2Samuel22:38 Ndakaronda vavengi vangu ndikavaparadza, kufuratira, ndakatozofuratira vapera kuti dhu." 
2Samuel22:39 Ndakavazhanya ndikavapwanya-pwanya zvokutadza kana kumuka, vakati rakata pasi petsoka dzangu." 
2Samuel22:40 Nokuti simba rokurwa hondo makandipa mukaita kuti vavengi vangu vandigwadamire. 
2Samuel22:41 Vanondivenga makaita kuti vanditi ware kutiza vanondivenga ndikavaparadza. 
2Samuel22:42 Vakaparapatika kutsvaka vokuvanunura vakamushaya, kuna Tenzi kwanga kusinawo mhinduro." 
2Samuel22:43 Ndakavakuya-kuya vakaita sehuruva yevhu Ndikavatsika-tsika ndikavakanya-kanya sedhaka munzira 
2Samuel22:44 Makandinunura mumhirizhonga yevekwangu mukaita kuti ndirambe ndiri musoro wendudzi dzavanhu, vanhu vandakanga ndisingambozivi vakandishandira." 
2Samuel22:45 Vatorwa vaiuya kwandiri vachitodemba, vachiti vakangonzwa chete nezvangu vonditeerera." 
2Samuel22:46 Vatorwa vakarasa mwoyo, nokukurumidza vakauya vachidedera." 
2Samuel22:47 Tenzi mupenyu iye bako rangu, ngaarumbidzwe, ngaatunhidzwe Mwari wangu, ndiye bako rinondiponesa." 
2Samuel22:48 Mwari anonditsivira anondiisira ndudzi pasi pangu. 
2Samuel22:49 Makandipunyutsa kuvavengi vangu. Makandisumudzira pamusoro pevavengi vangu, mukandinunura kuvanhu vehondo." 
2Samuel22:50 Naizvozvo ndinokurumbidzai iyemi Tenzi mukati mendudzi dzisingakuzivei ndichaimba ndichirumbidza zita renyu. 
2Samuel22:51 Anopa mambo wake kukunda kukuru kwazvo, anoitira mwoyochena muzodzwa wake Dhavhidhi nezvizvarwa zvokwake narini wose." 
2Samuel23:1 Aya ndiwo mazwi okupedzesera aDhavhidhi. Shoko raDhavhidhi mwana waJese shoko romurume akakwidziridzwa pamusoro muzodzwa waMwari waJakobho muimbi weIsiraeri wepamwoyo. 
2Samuel23:2 Mweya waTenzi ari kutaura nomandiri shoko rake riri mumuromo mangu. 
2Samuel23:3 Mwari weIsiraeri ataura iye Bako reIsiraeri anditi: “Kana munhu achitonga vanhu zvine ruenzaniso achitonga achitya Mwari," 
2Samuel23:4 anoita sechiedza chemambakwedza sokupenya kunoita zuva, semangwanani asina kana kakore nechiedza chacho nemvura yokunaya ruswiswi runobva rwamera pasi.”" 
2Samuel23:5 Handiti ndiwo mamiriro akaita imba yangu naMwari here nokuti akaita neni chitenderano chinogara nokusingapere? Zvinhu zvose akatozvironga kare akatozvisimbisa. Angazorega here kuti ndibudirire achindiitirawo zvido zvangu? 
2Samuel23:6 Asi vasina hanya naMwari vose vachakukurwa seminzwa, isingaitwi zvokubatwa namaoko." 
2Samuel23:7 Asi kana munhu oibata anotozviita nesimbi kana nerwiriko rwepfumo. Pairi ipapo ndopainororomeserwa nomoto. 
2Samuel23:8 Aya ndomazita emagamba aiva naDhavhidhi okurwa: kunoti Jashebhabhashebheti wokuTakemoni, pautatu hwavo ndiye aiva mukuru mukuru. Akarwisa mazana masere avarume akavauraya nepfumo rake muhondo imwechete." 
2Samuel23:9 Aitevedzerwa naEreazari mwanakomana waDhodho mwanakomana waAhohi. Ndiye akanga aina Dhavhidhi pavaitafurira vaFirisitia vakanga vaunganidzanako kuzorwa hondo ndokubva varwi veIsiraeri vatiza. 
2Samuel23:10 Iye akamira akauraya vaFirisitia kusvikira ruoko rwake rwaneta asisagone kurega bakatwa rake muchanza pamusana pechinyamunhari. Tenzi akaita basa guru kwazvo rokuti vakunde zuva iroro asi vakazodzokerazve kuzopamba zvinhu pazvitunha. 
2Samuel23:11 Aimutevera wacho ndiShama, mwanakomana waAgee wokuHarari. Pakanga vaFirisitia vaunganidzana pamwechete kuRehi paiva nomunda uzere nyemba, vamwe vaIsiraeri vakatiza vaFirisitia." 
2Samuel23:12 Asi Shama akamira mukati momunda iwoyo achiudzivirira akauraya vaFirisitia. Tenzi akaita basa guru rokuti vakunde. 
2Samuel23:13 Munguva yokukohwa, pavakuru vakuru makumi matatu, vamwe vavo vatatu vakasvika kuna Dhavhidhi kubako reAdhuramu izvozvo chimwe chikwata chavarwi vechiFirisitia chakanga chadzika matendhe mubani rokuvaRefaimu." 
2Samuel23:14 Izvozvo Dhavhidhi akanga achiri munhare yakavakirirwa chimwe chikwata chavarwi vechiFirisitia chakanga chiri kuBheterehemu. 
2Samuel23:15 Dhavhidhi akanzwa nenyota akati, “Dai pangowana mumwe anondonditekera mvura yokunwa kutsime rokuBheterehemu riri pedyo nesuo guru raro.”" 
2Samuel23:16 Magamba okurwa aye ari matatu akatyoredzera nomumatendhe avaFirisitia imomo akandoteka mvura kutsime rekuBheterehemu riri pedyo nesuo guru racho. Vakaichera vakauya nayo kuna Dhavhidhi. Asi akaramba kuinwa, akaiteurira pasi kuna Tenzi" 
2Samuel23:17 achiti, “Tenzi we-e handifanire kumbofa ndakaita chinhu chakadai iropaka iri ravanhu vaendako vachitopinza upenyu hwavo munjodzi.” Naizvozvo kuinwa akaramba. Izvozvi izvi ndizvo zvinhu zvakaitwa nemagamba matatu aya." 
2Samuel23:18 Abhishai munun'una waJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya ndiye aiva mukuru mukuru wavo vari makumi matatu. Akarwisa varume mazana matatu nepfumo rake akavauraya akazviwanira mbiri yakada kuita seyevatatu vaye. 
2Samuel23:19 Ndiye aiva nomukurumbira kwazvo pamakumi matatu avo ndokubva ava mukuru mukuru wavo. Asi pavatatu vaya, haana kupasvika." 
2Samuel23:20 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha wokuKabhuzeri ndiyewo aiva rimwe gamba rokurwa, nyakuita mabasa makuru kwazvo. Akauraya shumba chaidzo dzavanhu vaviri vokuMoabhu. Akapindawo mugomba akauraya shumba musi wakanga wadonha chando." 
2Samuel23:21 Akaurayawo mumwe muIjipiti, murume chaiye akasvika. MuIjipiti uyu akanga akabata pfumo muruoko, asi Bhenaya akamuvinga netsvimbo. Akatorera muIjipiti pfumo ndokubva amuuraya nepfumo rake iroro." 
2Samuel23:22 Izvozvi izvi ndizvo zvakaitwa naBhenaya mwana waJehoyadha akazviwanira mbiri yakada kuita seyemagamba matatu aya. 
2Samuel23:23 Iyeyu uyu aivawo nomukurumbira pamwechete navaya vaya makumi matatu. Asi pavatatu vaya, haana kupasvika Dhavhidhi akamuita mukuru mukuru wevokumuchengetedza iye mambo." 
2Samuel23:24 Asaheri munun'una waJoabhu aivawo mumwe wamakumi matatu iwaya uye Erihanani mwanakomana waDhodho wokuBheterehemu: 
2Samuel23:25 kwouya Shama wokuHarodhi naErika wokuHarodhi 
2Samuel23:26 naHerezi wokuPariti naIra mwanakomana waIkeshi wokuTekoa 
2Samuel23:27 kwouyawo Abhiezeru wokuAnatoti naMebhunai wokuHusha 
2Samuel23:28 naZarimoni muAhohi uye Maharai wokuNetofa 
2Samuel23:29 uyewo Herebhu mwanakoma waBhaana wokuNetofa naItai mwanakomana waRibhai wokuGibhea kwaBhenjamini 
2Samuel23:30 kwoti Bhenaya wokuPireatoni naHidhai wokumakoronga okuGaashi 
2Samuel23:31 naAbhiaribhoni wokuAribha naAzimavheti wokuBhahurimu," 
2Samuel23:32 kwotiwo Eriyahibha wokuShaaribhoni kwouya vanakomana vaJasheni naJonatani 
2Samuel23:33 mwanakomana waShama wokuHarari naAhihamu mwanakomana waSharari wokwakare kuHarari," 
2Samuel23:34 kuchizoti Erifereti mwanakomana waAhashibhai wokuMaaka naEriamu mwanakomana waAhitoferi wokuGiro 
2Samuel23:35 naHeziro wokuKarimeri naPaarai wokuAribhu," 
2Samuel23:36 kuchitiwo Igari mwanakomana waNatani wokuZobha naBhani wokwaGadhi 
2Samuel23:37 naZereki muAmoni naNaharai wokuBheeroti ndiye aiva wokutakurira Joabhu mwanakomana wavaZeruya zvombo zvehondo 
2Samuel23:38 kwozoti Ira wokuItira naKarebhu wokwakareko kuItira 
2Samuel23:39 naUriya muHiti. Vose pamwechete vaiva vanhu makumi matatu navanomwe. 
2Samuel24:1 Tenzi akashatirirwa Isiraeri zvakare akaisa muna Dhavhidhi mumwewo mweya wokuti zvivaipire achiti, “Enda uverenge vokwaIsiraeri novokwaJudha.”" 
2Samuel24:2 Mambo akataurira Joabhu navatungamiriri wehondo yake, waaiva naye achiti, “Chienda ubvongodze nomumadzinza okwaIsiraeri neokwaJudha kubvira kwaDhani kusvikira kuBheerishebha uchiverenga vanhu ndigoziva kuti kune vanhu vangani.”" 
2Samuel24:3 Asi Joabhu akapindura mambo achiti, “Hongu zvazvo dai Tenzi, Mwari wenyu akawedzera vanhu kazana kakazanirana kupfuura zvavari kuri zvino mugotozvionawo nameso enyu imi mambo changamire. Asi nhai mambo changamire, ko, madireiko kuita chinhu chakadai?”" 
2Samuel24:4 Zvakataurwa namambo ndizvo zvakatozobudirira pane zvaJoabhu nezvavatungamiriri vehondo. Ipapo Joabhu navatungamiriri vehondo vakabva pana mambo voenda kundoverenga varwi veIsiraeri. 
2Samuel24:5 Vakayambuka Jorodhani vakadzika matendhe avo kuguta reAroero kubvira kuguta riri mukati mebani vakananga kwaGadhi nokuJazeri. 
2Samuel24:6 Vakazosvika kuGireadhi nokunyika yavaHiti kuHodhishi, vakasvikawo kwaDhanijaani. Vakabva muDhanijaani vakapota nokuSidhoni." 
2Samuel24:7 Vakazosvika kuguta retsvingo reTire nokumaguta ose avaHivhi navaKanani. Vakabvamo vakaenda kuNegevhu kwaJudha kuBheerishebha. 
2Samuel24:8 Kuzoti vabvongodza nyika iyi yose vakadzokera zvavo Jerusaremu, izvozvo kwapera mwedzi mipfumbamwe namazuva makumi maviri." 
2Samuel24:9 Joabhu akataurira mambo uwandi hwavanhu hwakadai izvi: KwaIsiraeri kwaiva nezviuru mazana masere zvavarume vano chaivo vokurwa namapakatwa. Varume vokwaJudha vaivawo mazana mashanu ezviuru. 
2Samuel24:10 Asi Dhavhidhi apedza kuverenga vanhu kudaro hana yakamutambudza ndokubva ati kuna Tenzi, “Ndakatadza zvikuru kwazvo nezvandakaita. Zvino ndateterera Tenzi we-e. Ndiregerereiwo chitadzo changu ini muranda wenyu nokuti zvandakaita izvi ndezvoupenzi chaizvo.”" 
2Samuel24:11 Kuzoti Dhavhidhi amuka mangwanani acho, izwi raTenzi rakauya kumuporofita Gadhi, muoni wokwaDhavhidhi rikati," 
2Samuel24:12 “Enda uti kuna Dhavhidhi, zvanzi naTenzi sarudza chandingaite kwauri pazvitatu izvi zvandiri kukupa.”" 
2Samuel24:13 Nokudaro Gadhi akaenda kuna Dhavhidhi akamuti, “Mungade here kuti muno munyika yenyu muve namakore manomwe enzara, kana kuti mupedze mwedzi mitatu muchingotiza vavengi venyu vachikurondai, kana kuti muno munyika yenyu murohwe nedenda kwamazuva matatu? Zvino dai mukapafunga mundipewo mhinduro yokundopa andituma.”" 
2Samuel24:14 Dhavhidhi akati kuna vaGadhi, “Inga ndazotambura zvino. Regai zvenyu ndisve ndarangwa zvangu naTenzi nokuti ngoni dzake dzakanyanya kwazvo. Asi zvokuti munhu ave iye wokundiranga, aiwa.”" 
2Samuel24:15 Saizvozvo Tenzi akarova Isiraeri nedenda kubvira mangwanani kusvikira panguva yakanga yarehwa, kukafa vaIsiraeri zviuru makumi manomwe kubvira kwaDhani kudzamara kundosvika kuBheerishebha." 
2Samuel24:16 Mutumwa waMwari paakanga zvino oda kuti achiparadza Jerusaremu, Tenzi akanyevenuka mwoyo akarega kuwana chakaipa chaakazoita. Akati kumutumwa akanga achiita basa rokuparadza vanhu, “Zvakwana, chirega.” Izvozvo mutumwa waTenzi akanga ava paburiro ravaArauna vechiJebhusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Dhavhidhi paakaona mutumwa uyu akanga achirakatisa vanhu akanamata kuna Tenzi achiti, “Inga ndakatadza ndakaita zvakaipa. Ko hwai idzi dzakapareiwo? Ndateterera dai maranga zvenyu ini nevemba yokwababa vangu.”" 
2Samuel24:18 Gadhi akasvika kuna Dhavhidhi musi wakarewo akati kwaari, “Kwirai kuruware rwavaArauna vechiJebhusi muvakire Tenzi atari ipapo.”" 
2Samuel24:19 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akaendako sokutaura kwakanga kwaitwa naGadhi sezvakanga zvanzi naTenzi zviitwe. 
2Samuel24:20 Arauna akati tarisei akaona mambo namakurukota ake vachidimura kuuya kwaari. Arauna akabuda akakotamira mambo akatyora uso. 
2Samuel24:21 Arauna akati, “Mambo changamire mavingeiko kwandiri ini muranda wenyu?” Dhavhidhi akati, “Kuzotenga ruware rwako ndivakepo atari yaTenzi kuti denda rimiswe kuvanhu.”" 
2Samuel24:22 Arauna akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Mambo changamire torai zvenyu mupire kuna Mwari zvamunoda, nzombe ndidzodzi idzi, dzomupiro wokupisa, majoki emombe nezvirhei ndizvozvi izvi ndozvehuni." 
2Samuel24:23 Mambo, ini Arauna, zvose izvozvi ndozvandapa kwamuri mambo.” Arauna akati kuna mambo, “Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ngaakugamuchirei.”" 
2Samuel24:24 Asi mambo akati kuna vaArauna, “Bodo, nokuti zvokutenga ndinofanira kutenga chete nemari kwauri. Handifanire kupira mupiro zvepachena kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu.” Nokudaro akatenga ruware rwacho nenzombe namakumi mashanu emari yesirivha yemashekere." 
2Samuel24:25 Dhavhidhi akavakira Tenzi atari ipapo akapira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana. Naizvozvo Tenzi akagamuchira minamato yakaitirwa nyika, denda rikabva ramiswa muIsiraeri." 
1Kings1:1 Mambo Dhavhidhi paakanga achembera, makore ake aendedzana, kunyange zvazvo vaimufukidza namagumbeze, akanga asisanzwe kudziya." 
1Kings1:2 Nokudaro makurukota ake akati kwaari, “Mambo changamire, dai patsvakwa musikana, mhandara, ive yokushandira mambo nokumuchengeta, avate pedyo nechifuva chenyu kuti munzwe kudziya, mambo changamire.”" 
1Kings1:3 Saizvozvo vakabva vatsvaka musikana, mhandara, ino, yakanaka munyika yose yeIsiraeri. Vakawana Abhishagi wokuShunamu, vakauya naye kuna mambo." 
1Kings1:4 Mhandara iyoyi yakanga yakanaka kwazvo. Ndiye akabva ava wokuchengeta mambo nokumushandira. Asi mambo haana kuzivana naye. 
1Kings1:5 Adhoniya mwanakomana womukadzi ainzi Hagiti akazvikudza achiti ndinoda kuva mambo, akazvigadzirira ngoro dzehondo navachayiri navanhu makumi mashanu vokumhanya vari mberi kwake." 
1Kings1:6 Baba vake havana kumbenge vambomutsiudza zvavo vachiti, “Unoitirei zvauri kuita izvi?” Iyeyu akanga akanakawo kwazvo chimiro uye ndiye aitevedzera Abhusharomu." 
1Kings1:7 Akataurirana naJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya nomupristi Abhiyatari. Vakabvuma kubatsirana naAdhoniya. 
1Kings1:8 Asi mupristi Zadhoki naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha nomuporofita Natani naShimei naRei nemagamba ehondo aiva naDhavhidhi haana kuwirirana naAdhoniya. 
1Kings1:9 Adhoniya akapira zvibayiro zvehwai nemombe namagondora akakodzwa ari kuDombo reNyoka pedyo nokuEnirogeri. Akakokako vakomana navanun'una vake vose, vanakomana vamambo nevokwaJudha vose vaiva makurukota amambo." 
1Kings1:10 Asi haana kukoka muporofita Natani kana Bhenaya kunyange magamba aye omuhondo kana Soromoni. 
1Kings1:11 Natani vakabvunza Bhatishebha amai vaSoromoni kuti, “Hamuna kunzwa here kuti Adhoniya mwana waHagiti atova mambo asi changamire wedu Dhavhidhi havasi kumbozviziva." 
1Kings1:12 Saka zvino chiregai ndikupei zano muzviponese upenyu imi nomwana wenyu Soromoni. 
1Kings1:13 Ibvai maenda kuna mambo Dhavhidhi mumuti, mambo changamire, hamuna here kunditsidzira ini muranda wenyu kuti Soromoni mwana wako ndiye achatonga mushure mangu, achizogara pachigaro changu choumambo? Ko zvauya sei kuti Adhoniya ava kutonga?" 
1Kings1:14 Paunenge uchitaura namambo kudaro ndipo pandinobva ndatevera mushure ndozotsinhira mazwi ako.” 
1Kings1:15 Saka Bhatishebha akaenda kuna mambo mumba make. Izvozvo mambo akanga ava Harahwa chaiyo, Abhishagi muShunami ndiye aichengeta mambo ivava." 
1Kings1:16 Bhatishebha akati pasi gwadagwa kuremekedza mambo, mambo akati, “Tipirei tinzwe nhuna dzenyu.”" 
1Kings1:17 Akati kwaari, “Changamire imi makatsidza kwandiri ini muranda wenyu naTenzi, Mwari wenyu muchiti Soromoni mwanakomana wako ndiye achatonga mushure mangu achizogara pachigaro changu choumambo." 
1Kings1:18 Asi zvino chitarisai muone Adhoniya atova mambo kunyange zvazvo imi mambo changamire musiri kuzviziva. 
1Kings1:19 Atopira zvibayiro zvemombe nezvigondora zvakakodzwa nezvehwai zvakawanda kwazvo. Akagokokawo vanakomana vose vamambo nomupristi Abhiyatari naJoabhu mutungamiriri wehondo. Asi Soromoni muranda wenyu haana kumukoka. 
1Kings1:20 Zvino mambo changamire meso eIsiraeri yose akatotarisa kwamuri kuvaudza kuti ndiani achagara pachigaro chenyu choumambo mushure menyu mambo changamire. 
1Kings1:21 Dzimwe nguva kana imi mambo changamire mukazenge mavata maendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru enyu ini nemwana wangu Soromoni tichaonekwa savanhu vakapara mhosva.” 
1Kings1:22 Pavaingunotaura namambo kudaro muporofita Natani ndiyewo vhu ipapo. 
1Kings1:23 Vakazivisa mambo kuti, “Muporofita Natani ava pano.” Paakapinda maiva namambo akati pasi gwadagwa, akatyora uso pana mambo." 
1Kings1:24 Natani akati, “Mambo changamire ndimi here imi mati Adhoniya atonge mushure menyu uye agare pachigaro chenyu choumambo?" 
1Kings1:25 Ndiri kudaro nokuti iye nhasi uno adzika uko akapira zvibayiro zvemombe nezvigondora zvakakodzwa nehwai zvizhinji kwazvo. Akoka vanakomana venyu mambo naJoabhu mukuru wehondo nomupristi Abhiyatari, kurizvino vari kutodya vachinwa naye vachitomuti, ‘Zvigare zvakadaro, mambo Adhoniya!’" 
1Kings1:26 Asi ini muranda wenyu nomupristi Zadhoki naBhenaya mwana wavaJehoyadha nomuranda wenyu Soromoni haana kutikoka. 
1Kings1:27 Izvi ndimi here, makaronga mambo changamire musina kutinyeverawo isu varanda venyu kuti ndiani achagara pachigaro chenyu choumambo mushure menyu, mambo changamire?”" 
1Kings1:28 Mambo Dhavhidhi akapindura achiti, “Ndidaidzirei Bhatishebha.” Akapindamo makanga muna mambo akasvikomira pana mambo." 
1Kings1:29 Mambo akatsidza nemhiko achiti, “NaTenzi mupenyu akandinunura munhamo dzangu dzose" 
1Kings1:30 sokupika chaiko kwandakamboita kwamuri naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri ndichiti, ‘Soromoni mwana wako ndiye achatotonga chete mushure mangu iye ndiye achagara pachigaro changu choumambo panzvimbo pangu, izvozvo ndozvandiri kutoita iye nhasi uno.’ ”" 
1Kings1:31 Bhatishebha akakotamira mambo uso hwakatarisa pasi achimuremekedza akati, “Changamire mambo Dhavhidhi raramai nokusingaperi!”" 
1Kings1:32 Mambo Dhavhidhi akati, “Ndidaidzirei mupristi Zadhoki nomuporofita Natani naBhenaya mwana waJehoyadha.” Vakasvika pana mambo." 
1Kings1:33 Mambo akavati, “Endai namakurukota angu ini changamire muti Soromoni mwanakomana wangu atasve nyurisi rangu ini mudzike naye kuGihoni," 
1Kings1:34 ikoko regai mupristi Zadhoki nomuporofita Natani vamugadze umambo hweIsiraeri varidze hwamanda vachidaidzira vachiti, ‘Zvigare zvakadaro mambo Soromoni!’" 
1Kings1:35 Munozomutungamidza mouya naye kuno asvikogara pachigaro changu choumambo nokuti ndiye achava mambo panzvimbo pangu. Ndatomusarudza kuti ave mutongi weIsiraeri naJudha.” 
1Kings1:36 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha akapindura mambo achiti, “Ndizvozvo chaizvo! Dai Tenzi, Mwari wenyu mambo changamire adarowo." 
1Kings1:37 Dai Tenzi sokuva nemi mambo changamire kwaanga achiita avavo naSoromoni saizvozvo aite kuti umambo hwake hukurekure kupinda hwenyu changamire mambo Dhavhidhi.” 
1Kings1:38 Saizvozvo mupristi Zadhoki nomuporofita Natani naBhenaya mwana waJehoyadha nowokuchengetedza mambo, Kereti naPereti vakadzika vakakwidza Soromoni panyurusi ramambo Dhavhidhi vakaenda naye kuGihoni." 
1Kings1:39 Mupristi Zadhoki akatora chinu chamafuta mutendhe akazodza Soromoni. Vakaridza hwamanda, vanhu vose vakadaidzira vachiti, “Zvirambe zvakadaro mambo Soromoni!”" 
1Kings1:40 Vanhu vose vakakwidza vachimutevera, nyere dzichirira kuchipemberwa kufara zvikuru kwazvo zvokutotsemura pasi." 
1Kings1:41 Adhoniya navose vakakokwa vaaiva navo vakazvinzwa vachingunopedzesa mabiko avo. Joabhu paakanzwa kurira kwehwamanda akabvunza kuti, “Ko mheremhere iyi iri muguta umu ndeyei?”" 
1Kings1:42 Achiri kutaura kudaro Jonatani mwana womupristi Abhiyatari ndiye vhu ipapo. Adhoniya akati, “Pinda zvako nokuti uri munhu anovimbika unofanira chete kunge uchitotiigira shoko rakanaka.”" 
1Kings1:43 Jonatani akapindura Adhoniya kuti, “Zviri kupiko nhaimi. Zvaitika uku, changamire mambo Dhavhidhi vatogadza Soromoni umambo." 
1Kings1:44 Mambo vamutuma nomupristi Zadhoki nomuporofita Natani naBhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha pamwechete newokuchengetedza mambo Kereti naPereti vandomukwidza panyurusi ramambo. 
1Kings1:45 Mupristi Zadhoki nomuporofita Natani vatomugadza umambo kuGihoni. Vabva ikoko vachipembera kufara zvokuti muguta umu rangova zhwerendende. Ndiyo mheremhere iyi yamuri kunzwa. 
1Kings1:46 Soromoni atogara pachigaro choumambo. 
1Kings1:47 Uyewo makurukota amambo asvika kuzokorokotedza changamire mambo Dhavhidhi vachitoti, Mwari wenyu ngaaite kuti zita raSoromoni riende mbiri kupinda imi aitewo kuti umambo hwake hukurekure kupfuura hwenyu. Mambo akamukotamira, pamubhedha wake." 
1Kings1:48 Iye mambo atotiwo ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri apa kuti pave nomwana wangu wokugara pachigaro changu choumambo nhasi uno ini ndichizvionawo nameso angu.”" 
1Kings1:49 Zvakadederesa vose vaiva vakakokwa naAdhoniya vakati dzvamu uyu kwake uyu kwakwe. 
1Kings1:50 Asi Adhoniya akatya Soromoni akasimuka akaenda akandobata zvinenge nyanga zvepaatari. 
1Kings1:51 Shoko rakasvika kuna Soromoni rokuti, “Adhoniya ari kutya mambo Soromoni. Izvozvi ndozvaakatobatira zvinenge nyanga zvepaatari achiti mambo Soromoni ngaatange apika kwandiri kuti haazondiuraya nebakatwa ini muranda wake.”"
