1Kings1:52 Soromoni akati, “Kana akaratidzawo kuti munhu kwaye, hakuna kana rubvudzi rwake rumwechete zvarwo ruchadonhera pasi. Asi kana uipi hukawanikwa maari anotopafa chete.”" 
1Kings1:53 Mambo Soromoni akatumira shoko, vakandomuburutsa paatari. Akauya akasvikoremekedza mambo Soromoni. Soromoni akamuti, “Chienda zvako kumba kwako.”" 
1Kings2:1 Kuzoti nguva yokufa kwaDhavhidhi yoswedera akasiya audza mwanakomana wake Soromoni kuti," 
1Kings2:2 “Ini ndava kuda kuendawo kwakaenda vamwe. Tsunga mwoyo uite somurume 
1Kings2:3 uchengete zvakarehwa naTenzi, Mwari wako, ufambe mumakwara ake uchichengeta mitemo yake nemirao yake nezvirongwa zvake nezvirevo zvake sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo waMosesi kuitira kuti zvose zvaunoita zvikufambire zvakanaka kwose kwaunoenda," 
1Kings2:4 Tenzi agozadzisa zvaakareva nezvangu achiti, ‘Kana vanakomana vako vakachenjerera muitiro wavo vakafamba vakatendeseka kwandiri nomwoyo wose nomweya wavo wose, pachigaro choumambo hweIsiraeri hapazogara pasina murume wokwako.’" 
1Kings2:5 Uyewo unozivaka iwe dzandakaparirwa naJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya. Zvaakaita zviye kune vatungamiriri vaviri vehondo yeIsiraeri kuna Abhuneru mwanakomana waNeru naAmasa mwanakomana waJeteru waakaponda kuuraya iyo yava nguva yorunyararo achitsividza ropa revanhu vakaurayiwa muhondo, akazviisira ropa pabhande rake raiva muchiuno napashangu dzake dzaiva mumakumbo." 
1Kings2:6 Wozivawo zvokuita. Asi usati nokuchena kwaaita musoro kudai womurega achienda kuvachakabvu zvakanaka. 
1Kings2:7 “Asi vanakomana vaBhazirai vokuGireadhi uvaitire mwoyochena vavewo pakati pevanodya pamwechete newe pateburu yako nokuti ndozvavakandiitirawo pavakauya kwandaiva ndiri pandaitiza mukoma wako Abhusharomu. 
1Kings2:8 “Kwouyawo Shimei mwanakomana waGera wokwaBhenjamini wokuBhahurimu akandishura mare kundituka musi wandaienda kuMahanaimu. Asi paakadzika kuzondichingura kuna Jorodhani ndakamupikira naTenzi ndichiti, ‘Handimbokuuraya nebakatwa.’" 
1Kings2:9 Asi zvino iwe usati haane mhosva. Iwe uri munhu ane ungwaru. Uchazivawo zvokuita naye. Kunyange zvazvo achena musoro kudaro kuenda kwakwe kuvachakabvu ngakuve kwerufu rweropa.” 
1Kings2:10 Dhavhidhi akazovatawo oenda kwakaendawo vamwe, madzitateguru ake akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi." 
1Kings2:11 Dhavhidhi akatonga Isiraeri kwemakore makumi mana. Akatonga kwemakore manomwe ari kuHebhuroni. Akazotonga kwemakumi matatu amakore ana makore matatu ari kuJerusaremu. 
1Kings2:12 Soromoni akagara pachigaro choumambo chababa vake Dhavhidhi umambo hwake hukanyatsodzika midzi. 
1Kings2:13 Adhoniya mwanakomana waHagiti akauya kuna Bhatishebha amai vaSoromoni. Ivo vakati, “Kutsvene here kuuya kudai?” Iye akati, “Kutsvene zvako.”" 
1Kings2:14 Ndokubva ati, “Ndingambotaurawo zvangu kanyaya nemi here?” Ivo vakati, “Taura zvako.”" 
1Kings2:15 Iye akati, “Handiti munozviziva kuti umambo hwanga huri hwangu uyewo kuti Isiraeri yose yaitotarisira kuti ini ndini ndichatonga. Asi zvakazouya nepamwe, umambo hukabva hwava hwomunun'una wangu nokuti ndohwake hwokupiwa naTenzi." 
1Kings2:16 Asi ndine chichemo chimwechete ichi kwamuri. Dai mukarega zvenyu kundirambidza.” Ivo vakamuti, “Taura zvako.”" 
1Kings2:17 Iye akati, “Ndikumbirireiwo kuna mambo Soromoni havangambokurambirai kuti vandipewo Abhishagi wokuShunamu achiva zvake mukadzi wangu.”" 
1Kings2:18 Bhatishebha akati, “Zvakanaka. Ndichakusvitsira chichemo chako kuna mambo.”" 
1Kings2:19 Bhatishebha akabva aenda kuna mambo Soromoni kundosvitsa chichemo chaAdhoniya. Mambo akasimuka akavachingura akavakotamira kuvaremekedza akagara pachigaro chake choumambo. Akaisirawo amai vake chigaro choumambo vakagara kurudyi rwake. 
1Kings2:20 “Ndine kamwe kanhu kandanga ndichida kutaurawo kwamuri. Dai mukarega zvenyu kundirambira.” Mambo akati kwavari, “Kumbirai zvenyu amai handikurambidzii.”" 
1Kings2:21 Ivo vakati, “Dai mukarega Abhishagi wokuShunamu apiwe zvake kune mukoma wenyu Adhoniya ave mukadzi wake.”" 
1Kings2:22 Mambo Soromoni vakati kuna amai vavo, “Mazokumbirirei kuti Abhishagi wokuShunamu apiwe kuna Adhoniya? Mukumbirireiwoka umambo. Inga mukoma wangu wani. Handiti mupristi Abhiyatari naJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya ndevokwake.”" 
1Kings2:23 Mambo Soromoni akapika naTenzi kuti, “Mwari ngaandione andiomesere kwazvo kana zvataurwa naAdhoniya izvi zvikarega kupinza upenyu kwake murufu." 
1Kings2:24 Saka zvino naTenzi mupenyu nyakuita kuti ndidzike midzi pachigaro choumambo chababa vangu Dhavhidhi, akaita kuti imba yangu ive imba youmambo sokuvimbisa kwakaita Adhoniya anotopafa chete iye nhasi uno wakare.”" 
1Kings2:25 Naizvozvo mambo Soromoni akamutumira Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha akamuuraya akafa. 
1Kings2:26 Mambo akati kumupristi Abhiyatari, “Chiendai zvenyu kuAnatoti kupurazi yenyu nokuti chenyu imi manga muchifanira kufa. Asi pari zvino handikuurayei nokuti ndimi maitakura bhokisi rechitenderano chaTenzi Mwari muchitungamirira baba wangu Dhavhidhi mukaonerana nhamo pamwechete nababa vangu.”" 
1Kings2:27 Saizvozvo Soromoni akadzinga Abhiyatari pabasa raTenzi roupristi zvikabva zvazadzisa zvakanga zvarehwa naTenzi pamusoro pemhuri yokwaEri kuShiro. 
1Kings2:28 Nyaya iyi payakasvika kuna Joabhu, zvaivapo ndezvokuti Joabhu uyu akanga aita mukumbumumwechete naAdhoniya kunyange zvazvo asina kumbenge aita saizvozvo naAbhusharomu, Joabhu akatizira kutendhe raTenzi akandobata zvinenge nyanga zvepaatari." 
1Kings2:29 Mambo Soromoni paakazvitaurirwa kuti, “Joabhu akatizira kutendhe raTenzi izvozvi anotoa paatari.” Soromoni akatumira Bhenaya mwana waJehoyadha achiti, “Enda undomuuraya.”" 
1Kings2:30 Bhenaya akasvikopinda mutendhe raTenzi akamuti, “Mambo vari kuti, ‘Buda imomo.’ Asi iye akati, ‘Aiwa ndinofira zvangu muno.’ ” Bhenaya akadzokera neshoko kuna mambo rokuti, “Joabhu andipindura achidai izvi.”" 
1Kings2:31 Mambo ndokumuti, “Ita zvaareva. Muuraye umuvige kuti ubvisire ini nemba yababa vangu mhosva yeropa ravanhu vasina mhaka rakadeurwa naJoabhu." 
1Kings2:32 Tenzi achaita kuti ropa raakadeura rimupfukire iye akauraya nebakatwa vanhu vaviri vakarurama kupinda iye vaitova nani pana iye vanaAbhuneru mwanakomana waNeru mutungamiriri wehondo yevokwaIsiraeri, naAmasa mwanakomana waJeteru mutungamiriri wehondo yokwaJudha uyezve akazviita baba vangu Dhavhidhi vasingazvizivi." 
1Kings2:33 Imomo ropa ravo richapfukira Joabhu nezvizvarwa zvake nokusingaperi asi kuna Dhavhidhi nezvizvarwa zvake nokumhuri yake noumambo hwokwake kuve norugare runobva kuna Tenzi narini wose.” 
1Kings2:34 Saizvozvo Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha akakwirako akamuuraya akafa. Akavigwa kumusha kwake kurenje. 
1Kings2:35 Mambo akaisa Bhenaya mwana waJehoyadha pakutungamirira hondo panzvimbo paJoabhu, akaisawo mupristi Zadhoki panzvimbo paAbhiyatari." 
1Kings2:36 Mambo akatumira shoko rokuti Shimei auye akamuti, “Zvivakire imba muJerusaremu muno ugare imomo usambobva zvako ipapo uchienda kumwe." 
1Kings2:37 Zvichazoitika ndezvizvi zvokuti zuva rauchabva ipapo uchiyambuka kakova keKidhironi nyatsoziva zvako kuti chako iwe kufa, rufu rwako nderwokuzviparira.”" 
1Kings2:38 Shimei akadaira kuna mambo achiti, “Zvamareva zvakanaka. Ini muranda wenyu ndichaita sokureva kwenyu mambo changamire.” Saizvozvo Shimei akagara muJerusaremu kwenguva ndefu." 
1Kings2:39 Mushure memakore matatu zvakazongoitikawo kuti vamwe varanda vaShimei vaviri vakatizira kuGati kuna mambo Akishi mwanakomana waMaaka. Shimei paakazvitaurirwa kuti, “Inga varanda venyu vari kuGati.”" 
1Kings2:40 Shimei akasimuka akasunga dongi rake akaenda kuGati kuna Akishi kundotsvaka varanda vake. Shimei akasvikotora varanda vake kuGati akadzoka navo. 
1Kings2:41 Pazvakasvitswa munzeve dzaSoromoni kuti Shimei akambobva muJerusaremu akatoenda kuGati akadzoka," 
1Kings2:42 mambo akatumira shoko rokuti Shimei auye, akati kwaari, “Handina here kuti upike naTenzi ndikanyatsokudurira kuti pazuva raunongobuda uchienda kupi zvako unofanira kunyatsoziva kuti chako iwe kufa? Iwe ukandipindura uchiti zvamareva zvakanaka ndichateerera." 
1Kings2:43 Zvino wakaregererei kuchengeta mhiko yawakapika naTenzi nomutemo wandakakupa?” 
1Kings2:44 Mambo akatiwo kuna Shimei, “Handiti mumwoyo uri kutoziva zvakaipa zvose zvawakaitira baba wangu Dhavhidhi. Zvino Tenzi achaita kuti uipi hwako hukupfukire." 
1Kings2:45 Asi mambo Soromoni achakomborerwa, umambo hwokwaDhavhidhi huchadzikiswa midzi naTenzi narini wose.”" 
1Kings2:46 Mambo akamutumira Bhenaya mwana waJehoyadha, akabuda akamuuraya akafa. Naizvozvo umambo hwakabva hwanyatsova chaizvo mumaoko aSoromoni." 
1Kings3:1 Soromoni akaita ukama naFarao mambo weIjipiti hwokuroorerana, akaroora mukunda waFarao. Akamboenda naye muGuta raDhavhidhi kusvikira apedza kuvaka imba yake nembawo yaTenzi nokukomberedza Jerusaremu norusvingo." 
1Kings3:2 Izvozvo vanhu vainge vachipirira zvibayiro panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira nokuti hakuna imba yakanga yati yavakwa yokuisa zita raTenzi. 
1Kings3:3 Soromoni aida Tenzi achitevedza mirao yababa wake Dhavhidhi, kutongoti chete aipira zvibayiro nokupisira rusenzi panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira." 
1Kings3:4 Mambo uyu akaenda kuGibheoni kundopira chibayiro ikoko nokuti ndiyo yakanga iri nzvimbo huru yakatunhumara yokuteurira. Soromoni aiwanzopira mipiro yokupisa chiuru paatari. 
1Kings3:5 Kwakareko kuGibheoni Tenzi akazviratidza kuna Soromoni mukurota usiku. Mwari akati, “Kumbira chaungade kuti ndikupe.”" 
1Kings3:6 Soromoni akati, “Makaitira baba wangu Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu mwoyochena mukuru kwazvo pamusana pokuti vaiva munhu akatendeka kwamuri akarurama ari pachokwadi mwoyo wake uri kwamuri. Mwoyochena wenyu mukuru kwazvo makaramba uinaye mukamupawo mwanakomana wokugara pachigaro choumambo nhasi uno." 
1Kings3:7 Zvino Tenzi Mwari wangu, imi ndimi makaita kuti ini muranda wenyu ndive mambo panzvimbo pababa wangu Dhavhidhi, asi ini ndiri mwana muduku handigoni kutungamira." 
1Kings3:8 Ini muranda wenyu ndiri pakati pavanhu venyu vamakasarudza rudzi rukuru kwazvo runa vanhu vasingaverengeki kana kuverengetwa. 
1Kings3:9 Dai mukachindipawo ini muranda wenyu mwoyo unonzwisisa kuti ndiwane matongero vanhu venyu ndichanyatsoona pakanaka nepakaipa nokuti ndiani angakwanise kutonga vanhu venyu ava vakawanda kudai?” 
1Kings3:10 Tenzi akafadzwa nezvakanga zvakumbirwa naSoromoni. 
1Kings3:11 Mwari akati kwaari, “Pamusana pokuti wakumbira izvi ukarega kuzvikumbirira upenyu urefu kana upfumi kana kukumbira kuti vavengi vako vafe, ukazvikumbirira kunzwisisa kuti uwane matongero," 
1Kings3:12 chinzwa zvawakumbira ndozvandava kukuitira. Ndinokupa ungwaru nomwoyo unonzwisisa zvokuti hapana kumboita mumwe akaita sewe kana kuzovazve nomumwe akaita sewe. 
1Kings3:13 Uye ndinokupawo zvimwe zvausina kukumbira zviviri izvi zvinoti upfumi nechiremera zvokuti hapana mumwe mambo angazomboenzaniswawo newe upenyu hwako hwose. 
1Kings3:14 Kana ukafamba mumakwara angu ukachengeta mirao nemitemo yangu sezvaiita baba wako Dhavhidhi ndichakupa upenyu urefu.” 
1Kings3:15 Soromoni ndiye kwake pepu, ndokuti, “A-a inga kurota zvako.” Akaenda kuJerusareu akandomira pamberi pebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano akapira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana. Akazoitirawo makurokota ake ose mabiko." 
1Kings3:16 Pfambi mbiri dzakauya kuna mambo dzikamira paari. 
1Kings3:17 Imwe yadzo yakati, “Changamire ini nomukadzi uyu tigere tose mumba imwechete. Ndakasununguka mwana iye aineni mumba imomo." 
1Kings3:18 Mazuva matatu akati apera ini ndasununguka, mukadzi uyu akasunungukawo. Takanga tiri toga pauviri hwedu mumba imomo musina mumwe." 
1Kings3:19 Mukadzi uyu mwana wake mukomana akafa usiku nokuti iye akamutsitsirira. 
1Kings3:20 Iye akamuka pakati pousiku ndokutora mwana wangu mukomana parutivi pangu, ini muranda wenyu ndiri kutsi kwehope akamurarisa mumaoko ake. Akararisa mwana wake mukomana akafa parutivi pangu." 
1Kings3:21 Ndakati mukei mangwanani kuti ndichiyamwisa mwana wangu wanei akafa. Asi ndakazonyatsomutarisa kwaedza ndikaona kuti haasiri iye mwana wangu wandakabereka.” 
1Kings3:22 Asi mumwewo wacho akabva ati, “Aiwa, mupenyu uyu ndiye mwana wangu, wako ndiye wafa.” Mumwe ndokuti, “Kwete kani wako ndiye wafa, wangu mupenyu.” Ndokukakavadzana kwavaiita pana mambo." 
1Kings3:23 Mambo akati, “Uyu ari kuti, ‘Mwana wangu mupenyu wako ndiye wafa,’ uyuwo achiti, ‘Aiwa wako ndiye wafa wangu mupenyu.’ ”" 
1Kings3:24 Mambo ndokuti, “Nditorerei bakatwa!” Saka vakauya nebakatwa kwaari." 
1Kings3:25 Mambo akati, “Chekai mwana iyeyo nepakati muvape, muti uyu chidimu uyu chidimu.”" 
1Kings3:26 Pamusana pokunzwa mwoyo kurwadza amai vomwana mupenyu uyu vakati kuna mambo, “Changamire chimupai zvenyu mwana mupenyu iyeyu musambomuuraya zvenyu.” Asi mumwe wacho akati, “Ngaarege kuva wako kana wangu ngaatodimurwa.”" 
1Kings3:27 Mambo akati, “Mwana mupenyu uyu ngaapiwe mukadzi uyu, musamuuraye, ndivo amai vake ivava.”" 
1Kings3:28 Isiraeri yose yakanzwa mutongero wainge waitwa namambo zvikaita kuti vatye mambo, nokuti vakanga vaona kuti aiva noungwaru hwaMwari pakutonga." 
1Kings4:1 Mambo Soromoni aitonga Isiraeri yose zvayo. 
1Kings4:2 Aiva makurukota ake ndeaya anoti: Muprisiti aiva Azariya mwanakomana waZadhoki 
1Kings4:3 samunyori ari Erihorefu naAhiya vanakomana vaShisha samunyori mukuru aiva Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAhirudhi. 
1Kings4:4 Mutungamiri wehondo aiva Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha vamwe vapristi vaiva Zadhoki naAbhiyatari. 
1Kings4:5 Mukuru mukuru wamasadunhu aiva Azariya mwanakomana waNatani. Jinda ramambo neshamwari yamambo aiva mupristi Zabhudhi mwanakomana waNatani. 
1Kings4:6 Mukuru mukuru wapamuzinda wamambo aiva Ahisha. Mukuru mukuru webasa rechibharo aiva Adoniramu mwanakomana waAbhudha. 
1Kings4:7 Soromoni aiva namasadunhu gumi namaviri ndoaiva okuwanira chokudya mambo navose vomumuzinda make. Mumwe nomumwe aiva nebasa rokuwanira mambo zvokudya kwomwedzi wose pagore. 
1Kings4:8 Mazita avo ndeaya, kwaiti: Bhenihuri kunyika yokwaEfuraimu yemakomo" 
1Kings4:9 Bhenidhekeri kuMakazishaaribhimu nokuBhetishemeshi neEronibhetihanani 
1Kings4:10 Bhenihesedhi kuArubhoti sadunhu wokuSoko noruwa rweHeferu rwose 
1Kings4:11 Bheniabhinadhabhu kuNafatidhori uyu akanga akaroora Tafati mukunda waSoromoni 
1Kings4:12 Bhaana mwanakomana waAhirudhi sadunhu wokuTaanaki nokuMegidho nokuBhetishani yose pedyo nokuZaretani kumaodzanyemba kweJezirieri, kubvira kuBhetishani kundosvika kuAbherimehora kundoyambukira kuJokimeamu" 
1Kings4:13 Abherimehora sadunhu wokuRamatigireadhi nemisha yomuGireadhi yevemhuri yokwaJairi mwanakomana wokwaManase noruwa rwose rwokwaArigobhu kuBhashani namaguta aro makuru makumi matanhatu ane tsvingo ane zvihuri zvemisuo mikuru zvendarira 
1Kings4:14 Abhinadhabhu mwanakomana waIdho sadunhu wokuMahanaimu 
1Kings4:15 Ahimaazi sadunhu wokwaNafutari (uyu akanga akaroorawo mukunda waSoromoni, Bhasimati)" 
1Kings4:16 Bhaana mwanakomana waHushai sadunhu wokwaAsheri nokuAroti 
1Kings4:17 Jehoshafati mwanakomana waParua sadunhu wokwaIsakari 
1Kings4:18 Shimei mwanakomana waEra sadunhu wokwaBhenjamini 
1Kings4:19 Gebheri mwanakomana waUri sadunhu wokuGireadhi nyika yaSihoni mambo wavaAmori nenyika yaOgu mambo weBhashani ndiye oga aiva sadunhu. 
1Kings4:20 VokwaJudha nevokwaIsiraeri vaiva vakawanda sejecha romumahombekombe egungwa. Vaidya vachinwa upenyu huchivafadza. 
1Kings4:21 Soromoni aitonga nyika dzose kubvira muna Yufuratesi kusvikira kunyika yevaFirisitia nokumuganhu weIjipiti. Vaitera mutero vachishandira Soromoni upenyu hwake hwose. 
1Kings4:22 Pazuva, kwaSoromoni kwaidiwa zvokudya zvakadai izvi, kwaiti: makumi mashanu amasaga oupfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka, nezana ramasaga oupfu" 
1Kings4:23 nemombe gumi dzakakodzwa nedzimwe mombe makumi maviri uye mbudzi nehwai zana kwouyawo nondo nemhara nemhembwe nehuku dzakakodzwa. 
1Kings4:24 Chaidariso ndechokuti aitonga dunhu rose rokumadokero kwaYufuratesi kubvira kuTifusa kusvikira kuGaza achitonga madzimambo ose kumadokero aYufuratesi aine runyararo mativi ose akanga akamupoteredza. 
1Kings4:25 Panguva yose yaSoromoni kwaJudha nokwaIsiraeri kwakanga kuine runyararo kubvira kwaDhani kundosvika kuBheerishebha munhu wose ari pamutambarakede pamuvhaini nepamukuyu wake. 
1Kings4:26 Soromoni aivawo notumatanga twemabhiza zviuru makumi mana navachairi vawo zviuru gumi nezviviri. 
1Kings4:27 Masadunhu aye aye ndiwo aiwanira mambo Soromoni zvokudya nevose vaidya pamwechete namambo Soromoni pateburu yake, mumwe nomumwe mwedzi wake, ndiwowo aiwona kuti hapana here chiri kushayikwa." 
1Kings4:28 Vaiunzawo bhari nemashanga amabhiza namanyurusi kwazvainge zvanzi zviunganidzirwe maererano nezvirongwa zvasadunhu woga woga. 
1Kings4:29 Mwari akapa Soromoni ungwaru nomwoyo unonzwisisa zvakanyanyisisa kwazvo noruzivo rwakawanda chaizvo sejecha romumahombekombe egungwa 
1Kings4:30 zvokuti ungwaru hwaSoromoni hwaipfuura ungwaru hwevanhu vose vokumabvazuva noungwaru hwose hwokuIjipiti. 
1Kings4:31 Uyezve akanga aine ungwaru kupinda munhu wose, kupfuura Etani vokwaEzira naHemani naKarikorai naDharidha vanakomana vaMahori. Akaenda mbiri munyika dzose dzaiva dzakapoteredza." 
1Kings4:32 Akaita tsumo zviuru zvitatu nenziyo chiuru chimwechete chine shanu. 
1Kings4:33 Aigona kukurukura nezvemiti kubvira kumushidhari uri kuRebhanoni kusvikira pakamuti komuhisopi kanomera pamadziro. Aikwanisawo kukurukura nezvemhuka neshiri nezvezvinozvova napasi uye nezvehove. 
1Kings4:34 Vanhu vaiuyako vachibva kundudzi dzose kuzonzwa ungwaru hwaSoromoni vachibvawo kumadzimambo ose apasi pano akanga anzwa nezvoungwaru hwake. 
1Kings5:1 Hiramu mambo wokuTire paakanzwa kuti vakagadza Soromoni umambo panzvimbo yababa vake, akatuma makurukota ake kwaari nokuti Hiramu uyu, chigariro chake chose akanga achinzwanana naDhavhidhi." 
1Kings5:2 Soromoni akatumirawo Hiramu shoko rokuti," 
1Kings5:3 “Munozvizivawo kuti baba vangu Dhavhidhi havana kuzokwanisa kuvaka imba yokuisa zita raTenzi, Mwari wavo pamusana pedzihondo dzaiva dzakavakomba kumativi ose. Zvaitozoitika Tenzi aisa vavengi vavo pasi petsoka dzavo." 
1Kings5:4 Asi pari zvino, Tenzi akandipa runyararo kumativi ose, hakusisina kana mhandu zvayo kunyange chimwe chakaipa zvacho." 
1Kings5:5 Zvino ndanga ndati ndichivakira Tenzi, Mwari wangu imba yokuisa zita rake sokureva kwakaita Tenzi kuna baba vangu Dhavhidhi achiti, ‘Mwanakomana wako wandichaisa pachigaro chako choumambo panzvimbo pako ndiye achandivakira imba yacho yokuisa zita rangu.’" 
1Kings5:6 Zvino dai mati vashandi venyu vanditemerewo miti yemisidhari yokuRebhanoni. Vashandi vangu vachashanda pamwechete nevashandi venyu. Ini ndichakubhadharai mari yokutambirisa vashandi venyu sokutema kwamunenge maita. Sokuzivawo kwamunongoita isu hatina munhu anoziva kutema miti sezvinoita vaSidhoni.” 
1Kings5:7 Pakasvika shoko raSoromoni munzeve dzaHiramu akafara kwazvo akati, “Tenzi ngaarumbidzwe adai nhasi kupa Dhavhidhi mwanakomana ano ungwaru kuti atonge rudzi rwavanhu uru rukuru kudai.”" 
1Kings5:8 Hiramu akadzorawo shoko kuna Soromoni achiti, “Shoko ramakanditumira ndakarinzwa. Zvamakareva panyaya yemapango omusidhari neemusaipurasi ndozvandichaita." 
1Kings5:9 Vashandi vangu vachaabvisa kuRebhanoni vachindoaisa kugungwa. Ndichaasunga masvinga masvinga agoita zvokuyeredzerwako nomugungwa asvikire kwamunenge muchida. Ikoko ndokwandichazoasunungura moatorerako zvenyu. Chandingadewo kwamuri kuti mundipirewo chokudya vomumuzinda mangu.” 
1Kings5:10 Saizvozvo Hiramu aipa Soromoni mapango ose aaida omusidhari neemusaipurasi. 
1Kings5:11 Soromoni aipawo Hiramu masaga ekoroni makumi mana ezviuru echokudya chomumuzinda make pamwechete namafuta eorivhi okusvina anokwana mazana mana ezviuru zvamarita. Soromoni aipa Hiramu izvozvi izvi gore negore. 
1Kings5:12 Tenzi akapa Soromoni uchenjeri sokumuvimbisa kwaakanga aita. Soromoni naHiramu vainzwanana vakatosvika pakuita chibvumirano pauviri hwavo. 
1Kings5:13 Mambo Soromoni akati muIsiraeri mose munyorwe vanhu vebasa rechibharo kukawanikwa varume makumi matatu ezviuru vebasa racho rechibharo. 
1Kings5:14 Akavatumira kuRebhanoni. Aivatumira vari muchikwata chine vanhu gumi rezviuru pamwedzi woga woga. Vaipedza mwedzi vari kuRebhanoni mimwe miviri vaipedzera vari kumusha. Adhoniramu ndiye aiva mukuru mukuru wokuona nezvebasa rechibharo. 
1Kings5:15 Soromoni aivawo namakumi manomwe ezviuru zvevatakuri vezvinhu navavezi vamatombo makumi masere ezviuru zvavanhu vaiva kunyika yokumakomo. 
1Kings5:16 Soromoni aivawo navakuru vakuru vokutungamirira basa vaitarisa vanhu vaishanda basa irori vaikwana zviuru zvitatu zvine mazana matatu. 
1Kings5:17 Mambo akapa chirevo, ivo vakakwakwanura mazibwe anokosha okuvakisa ugaro hwemba yacho namabwe akavezwa." 
1Kings5:18 Naizvozvo vavaki vokwaSoromoni nevokwaHiramu navarume vokuGebhari ndivo vaitema miti nokuveza mapango namabwe okuvakisa imba yacho. 
1Kings6:1 Mugore remazana mana nechimakumi masere racho vaIziraeri vabva kunyika yeIjipiti, mugore raSoromoni rechina rokutonga Isiraeri, mumwedzi waZivhi mwedzi wechipiri ndimo maakatanga kuvakira Tenzi imba." 
1Kings6:2 Imba yacho yakavakirwa Tenzi namambo Soromoni, urefu hwayo hwaiita makumi maviri amamita ana mamita manomwe, upamhi hwayo huri mamita mapfumbamwe, kukwira kwayo mudenga kuchiita mamita gumi namatatu ane chidimbu." 
1Kings6:3 Kamba kepamusuo usati wapinda mukati memba yacho, kaiva nourefu hwaita mamita mapfumbamwe sezvaiva zvakangoitawo upamhi hwemba yacho. Upamhi hwekamba kepamusuo pemba iyi hwaiva mamita mana nechidimbu." 
1Kings6:4 Imba iyoyi akaiitirawo mahwindo ezvitanda zvakachinjikwa-chinjikwa. 
1Kings6:5 Akavakawo chimwe chengo chakatendererana nemba iyi yose nechokunze, chakatendererana nemba iyoyi yose nenzvimbo yayo inoera achikamura-kamura mukati kuita dzimba." 
1Kings6:6 Paunhurikidzwa hwayo, yapasi yaiva noupamhi hwaiita mamita maviri ane masendimita makumi maviri. Yapakati yacho yaiita mamita maviri ane masendimita makumi manomwe upamhi. Yokumusoro yaivawo noupamhi hwaiva mamita matatu ane masendimita gumi. Chakadariso ndechokuti nechokunze kwemba iyoyo pamadziro, akavaka zvinenge zviga kuitira kuti mapango emwamba yenhurikidzwa dzacho arege kuita zvokupfekerwa mumadziro emba iyoyo." 
1Kings6:7 Paivakwa imba iyoyi, yaivakwa namabwe akanga akatovezwa kare kwaaikwakwanurirwa ikoko zvokuti kunyange kugogodza kwenyundo kana kwedemo kana kweimwewo simbi zvayo hakuna kunzwikwa muTemberi imomo payainge ichivakwa." 
1Kings6:8 Musuo womunhurikidzwa yapasi waiva kumaodzanyemba kwemba iyoyi. Painge paine manera okuenda nawo kunhurikidzwa yapakati namamwewo okuenda kunhurikidzwa yechitatu yacho. 
1Kings6:9 Saizvozvo Soromoni akavaka imba iyi akaipedza. Akaita denga remba iyoyi namapango omusidhari akanyatsorongwa. 
1Kings6:10 Akavaka nhurikidzwa yaiva yakatendererana nemba yacho yose, chengo chenhurikidzwa yoga yoga kukwira mudenga chakanga chichiita mamita maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri, chaiva chakabatanidzwa kumba iyoyi namapango omusidhari." 
1Kings6:11 Zvakabva zvazoitika kuti shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Soromoni richiti," 
1Kings6:12 “Panyaya yemba yauri kuvaka iyi, kana ukatevedza mirao yangu uchichengeta zvirevo zvangu nokuteerera mitemo yangu yose uchiitevedza, ndopandichaita kwauri zvandakavimbisa baba vako Dhavhidhi." 
1Kings6:13 Ndichaita musha wangu mukati mavaIsiraeri ndisingazomborasa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.” 
1Kings6:14 Nokudaro Soromoni akavaka imba yacho akaipedza. 
1Kings6:15 Soromoni akaroverera kumadziro omukati emba iyoyo mapuranga omusidhari akavezwa kubvira pasi kusvikira mudenga panoperera chengo zvokuti madziro emukati iwayo akati namapuranga chechetere. Akanyatsotiwo pasi apa namapuranga omusaipuresi ware ware. 
1Kings6:16 Akaita kamwe kamba kuseriseri kwemba iyi nechomukati kaiva namamita mapfumbamwe. Akakaita namapuranga akavezwa emusidhari kubvira pasi kusvikira mudenga panoperera chengo. Akakavakira nechomukati imomo senzvimbo inoera yomukatikati, nzvimbo inoeresesa." 
1Kings6:17 Tisati tasvika kune ikaka aka, imba yacho chaiyo yaiva nourefu hunoita mamita gumi namasere, tichireva Temberi yacho chaiyo." 
1Kings6:18 Mapuranga acho omusidhari omukati memba imomu akanga akavezerwa paari zvimwe zvinenge mapudzi namaruva akazaruka. Imba yose yaingova musidhari chete, pasingaonekwe kana ibwe." 
1Kings6:19 Nzvimbo inoera iya yomukati akaigadzirira nechomukatikati memba iyoyi kuti aisemo bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano. 
1Kings6:20 Nzvimbo iyi inoera yomukatikati yaiva nourefu hwaiita mamita mapfumbamwe, upamhi hwayo huri mamita mapfumbamwe, kukwira kwayo mudenga kuchiita mamita mapfumbamwe, akaitsvetera ndarama chaiyo yakanakisisa. Pamberi payo akagadzirawo atari yakaitwa nomusidhari." 
1Kings6:21 Soromoni akatsvetera mukati memba yacho nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa. Akachingamisa cheni dzendarama pamberi penzvimbo inoera yomukatikati akaitsvetera ndarama. 
1Kings6:22 Akatsvetera imba iyoyo yose nendarama kusvikira imba iyoyo yapera yose. Atari yomukatikati kunzvimbo inoera akaitsveterawo yose nendarama. 
1Kings6:23 Munzvimbo inoera yomukatikati iyi akagadzira mifananidzo miviri yezvisikwa zvinonzi makerubhu zvakaitwa nomuti womuorivhi. Kerubhu roga roga rakanga riine urefu hunoita mamita mana ana masendimita makumi mana. 
1Kings6:24 Bapiro rimwechete rekerubhu raiva rakareba mamita maviri namasendimita makumi maviri. Saizvozvo rimwe bapiro rekerubhu rakanga rakarebawo mamita maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri. Nokudaro kubvira kunoperera rimwe kusvikira kunopererawo rimwe racho paiita mamita mana ane masendimita makumi mana kureba. 
1Kings6:25 Rimwewo kerubhu rakanga rakangorebawo mamita mana ane masendimita makumi mana. Makerubhu iwayo ose ari maviri akanga aine urefu humwechetehwo nechimiro chimwechetecho. 
1Kings6:26 Marebero akanga akaita kerubhu rimwechete kuenda mudenga ndomarebero akanga akaita rimwe racho. 
1Kings6:27 Akamisa makerubhu aya mukatikati chaimo memba iyoyo. Mapapiro emakerubhu akanga akatambanudzwa zvokuti bapiro rerimwe kerubhu raiva rakaguma madziro okuku, bapiro rerimwewo kerubhu rakagumawo madziro okuku; mamwewo mapapiro aya akagumana nechepakati pemba iyi." 
1Kings6:28 Akatsvetera makerubhu iwaya ndarama. 
1Kings6:29 Akavezera mufananidzo yemakerubhu neyemiti yemirara namaruva akazaruka pamadziro ose emba iyoyo kuatenderera omukamba kaye kwomukati nedzimwe dzimba dzokunze dzacho. 
1Kings6:30 Uriri hwemba iyi akahutsvetera nendarama, hwekamba kaya kwomukati nehwedzimwe dzimba dzacho." 
1Kings6:31 Musuo womukati munzvimbo inoera akaugadzirira magonhi omuti womuorivhi. Magwatidziro omusuo iwoyo nerepamusoro pacho akanga akagadzirwa zvokuti aiita mativi mashanu. 
1Kings6:32 Pamagonhi maviri aya omuorivhi akati tsvete nemifanidzo yemakerubhu neyemirara neyamaruva akazaruka akaitwa zvokuvezerwapo. Akazvitsvetera ndarama, akatsveterawo ndarama makerubhu nemifananidzo iya yemirara." 
1Kings6:33 Ndizvozvo zvaakaita pamusuo weTemberi, akaugadzirira magwatidziro omuti womuorivhi zvokuti musuo wakava namativi mana." 
1Kings6:34 Akaita magonhi maviri omuti womusaipurasi. Rimwechete raigona kugonya richipeteka, rimwewo racho richigona kugonyawo richipetekawo." 
1Kings6:35 Akavezera paari mifananidzo yemakerubhu neyemiti yemirara neyamaruva akazaruka. Akatsvetera paari nepane zvakavezerwapo zviye ndarama achizora zvakaenzanirana. 
1Kings6:36 Akavakira ruvanze chidziro chamabwe akavezwa akarongwa mitsara mitatu kukwira nomutsara mumwechete wamapango omusidhari. 
1Kings6:37 Mugore rechina iroro ugaro hwemba iyoyo yaTenzi hwakavambwa mumwedzi waZivhi iwoyo. 
1Kings6:38 Kuzoti mava mugore regumi nechiposhi mumwedzi waBhuru, mwedzi wechisere, imba iyoyi yakapera kuvakwa nezvayo zvose zvaifanira kuvakwa maererano nezvakanga zvakarongwa pairi kuti zviitwe. Akapedza makore manomwe achiivaka." 
1Kings7:1 Soromoni akazvivakirawo muzinda wake. Akaita makore gumi namatatu achiuvaka akaupedza kuuvaka wose. 
1Kings7:2 Akavaka imba yainzi Imbayesangorerebhanoni. Urefu hwayo hwaiita makumi mana emamita anamamita mana, upamhi hwayo mamita makumi maviri ane maviri kureba kwayo kuenda mudenga ina mamita gumi namatatu ane masendimita makumi mashanu. Yaiva yakavakwa nemitsara mina yemhanda dzomuti womusidhari, mapango omusidhari akatandarikwa pamhanda idzi." 
1Kings7:3 Dzimba dziya dzaiva pamusoro pemhanda makumi mana ane shanu, mumutsara woga woga muine mhanda gumi neshanu, dzakanga dzakawarikwa mapango omusidhari." 
1Kings7:4 Yaive nemitsara mitatu yamafuremu emahwindo, mahwindo acho akatarisana ari pamba yenhurikidzwa ine nhurikidzwa nhatu." 
1Kings7:5 Magwatidziro emisuo yose akanga aina mativi mana akaenzana, mafuremu ose amahwindowo akanga aine mativi mana akaenzana. Mahwindo acho akanga akatarisana ari pamba yenhurikidzwa ine nhurikidzwa nhatu." 
1Kings7:6 Akavakawo zimba rainzi Imba yemhanda. Urefu hwayo hwaiita mamita makumi maviri namaviri, upamhi hwayo huri gumi ramamita rina mamita matatu ana masendimita makumi mashanu. Kumusuo kwayo, usati wapindamo, yaiva nakamba kepamusuo kane berere." 
1Kings7:7 Akavaka rimwe zimba mainzi muDare maaitongera, ndomaiva muDare imomo. Yakanga yakanzi chechetere nomusidhari kubvira pauriri hwayo kusvikira panoperera chengo." 
1Kings7:8 Dzimbahwe, imba yake chaiyo yokugara, yaiva munzvimbo yeseri kwezimba reDare yakanga iine muvakirwo mumwechetewo. Soromoni akavakirawo mukunda waFarao waakaroora, imba yakafanana nezimba irori." 
1Kings7:9 Dzose idzodzi dzakanga dzakavakwa namabwe anokosha aiva akavezwa nomwero wakatemwa achiita zvokunyatsochekwa nasaha amatombo kunze nomukati, kubvira paugaro hwemba iyoyo kusvikira kunoperera chengo, kubvirawo kunze kusvikira munhandare huru." 
1Kings7:10 Ugaro hwemba iyi hwakanga huri kwemazibwe makuru kwazvo, mamwe aiva nemamita matatu ana masendimita makumi mashanu kureba mamwe aine mamita mana." 
1Kings7:11 Pamusoro pahwo paiva namabwe anokosha akaita zvokuvezwa zviri pamwero Wakatemwa, painewo mapango omusidhari." 
1Kings7:12 Nhandare huru yaiva nechengo chemitsara mitatu yamabwe akavezwa kuitenderera, nomutsara mumwechete wamapango omusidhari. Ndozvakanga zvakaitawo nhandare yomukati yemba yaTenzi nekamba kapamusuo." 
1Kings7:13 Mambo Soromoni akatumira shoko kundodaidza Hiramu kuTire, akabva auya." 
1Kings7:14 Akanga ari mwanakomana wechirikadzi yedzinza rokwaNafutari. Baba vake vaiva munhu wokuTire webasa rendarira. Vaiva munhu azere noungwaru nokunzwisisa noumhizha hwebasa rose zvaro rendarira. Hiramu akauya kuna Soromoni akasvikomuitira basa rake rose. 
1Kings7:15 Akagadzira misimboti miviri yendarira. Mumwechete waiva mamita masere kureba uri mamita matatu ane masendimita makumi matatu kufuta uine mhango pakati kukobvuka kwawo kuine upamhi hweminwe mina. Musimboti wechipiri wakanga wakangofananawo nawo. 
1Kings7:16 Akagadzirawo zvepamusoro payo zviviri zvendarira achiita zvokuinyungurutsa, zvokushongedza pamusoro pemisimboti iyoyo. Kukwira mudenga, urefu hwezvepamusoro zvacho chimwe nechimwe hwaiva mamita maviri ane masendimita makumi maviri." 
1Kings7:17 Akagadzirazve necheni mambure maviri anenge sefa okushongedza nawo zvepamusoro pemisimboti iyi achiti pamusimboti uyu mhaswa nomwe, pamusimboti uyu mhaswa nomwe." 
1Kings7:18 Saizvozvo akagadzirira misimboti iyi mitsara miviri yezvinenge michero yamapomegiraneti kutenderera mambure acho achishongedza zvimwechetezvo zvepamusoro pemusimboti iyi yose iri miviri. 
1Kings7:19 Zvepamusoro zvacho zvakanga zviri pamusoro pemisimboti iyi yaiva pamberi pekamba kapamusuo zvaiva zvakaitwa samaruva amahapa zvichiita mita rimwechete rina makumi masere amasendimita kureba. 
1Kings7:20 Pane zvinhu zviya zvepamusoro pemisimboti iyi uyewo napamwe pakanga pakafutumara kuitenderera; munyasi memambure aye aye paiva namapomegiraneti mazana maviri akanga ari mumitsara miviri kuitenderera ndozvakanga zvakaita zvinhu zviye zvepamusoro pacho zvose zviri zviviri. 
1Kings7:21 Akamisa misimboti iyoyi pamberi pekamba kepamusuo weTemberi. Akamisapo musimboti nechokumaodzanyemba kwepo akautumidza zita rokuti Jakini, akamisawopo musimboti nechokuchamhembe akautumidza zita rokuti Bhoazi." 
1Kings7:22 Pamusoro pemisimboti yacho iyi paiva pakaitwa samaruva ejongwe. Saizvozvo basa rokugadzira misimboti rakabva rapera. 
1Kings7:23 Akagadzira zibhavhu ziguruguru kwazvo noutare hwaakaita zvokunyungurutsa. Rakanga rakatenderera richiita mamita mana ana masendimita mana kubva pamuromo kuyambuka kune mumwe muromo. Udzamu hwaro hwaiita mamita maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri, upamhi hwaro huchiita mamita mana ana masendimita makumi mana. Kuritenderedza rose raiita mamita gumi nematatu ana masendimita makumi maviri." 
1Kings7:24 Nechepasi pomupendero waro pakanga pakaitwa zvinenge mapudzi zviri makumi maviri pamita yoga yoga. Zvainge mapudzi izvi zvakanga zvakaita zvokuumbirwa pazibhavhu iri pamwechete naro parakagadzirwa zviri mumitsara miviri. 
1Kings7:25 Rakanga rakagara pahandira gumi nembiri, nhatu dzacho dzakaringira kuchamhembe, dzimwe nhatu dzakaringa kumadokero dzimwe dzacho nhatu dzakaringira kumaodzanyemba, dzimwewo nhatu dzakaringa kumabvazuva, shure kwadzo dzose kwakanga kuri nechomukati, zibhavhu iri riri pamusana padzo." 
1Kings7:26 Ukobvu hwaro hwakanga hwakaita sechanza. Mupendero waro wakanga wakaita somupendero wekapu, seruva ramahapa. Zibhavu iri raipinda mazana maviri amadhiramu ane madhiramu makumi matanhatu namaviri emvura." 
1Kings7:27 Hiramu akagadzirawo nendarama mitumbi yengoro gumi. Mutumbi woga woga wakanga uchiita mita rimwechete rina masendimita makumi masere kureba, upamhi hwacho huchiitawo mita rimwechete rina masendimita makumi masere urefu hwacho kuenda mudenga hwaiva mita rimwechete rina masendimita makumi matatu." 
1Kings7:28 Magadziriro akanga akaitwa mitumbi yengoro idzi ndaaya: yaiva namapanga okumisa endarira. Pakati pamapango iwayo pakaiswa marata endarira. 
1Kings7:29 Pamarata iwayo akanga akaiswa pakati pamapango okumisa acho, pakanga pakaitwa mifananidzo yeshumba neyehandira neyezvimwe zvisikwa zvinonzi makerubhu. Pamusoro pamapango okumisa pari pamusoro nepasiwo peshumba nehandira dziye paiva nounyerekete hwomurongorongo wamaruva." 
1Kings7:30 Ngoro imwe neimwe yaiva namavhiri mana nemitanda yendarira. Ngoro yoga yoga yaiva nebhavhu. Mumakona ayo maiva nezvokutsigira bhavhu. Zvokutsigira nazvo izvi pazvakaitwa noutare hwokunyungurutsa zvakaumbwa zviine tumirongorongowo twazvo twamaruva mativi ose. 
1Kings7:31 Muromo wemaraigadzikirwa waiva uchiita masendimita makumi mashanu udzamu. Muromo iwoyo wakanga wakatenderera sezvainge zvakangoitawo pasi pechigadzikiro ichi. Kubvira pamuromo wacho kusvikira pasi pagaro racho paiita masendimita makumi manomwe ana mashanu. Kumuromo kwacho kwakanga kwakanyatsonyorwapo zvimwe zvokushongedza. Marata aya engoro akanga aina mativi mana akaenzana aiva asiri madenderedzwa. 
1Kings7:32 Mavhiri mana aya akanga ari nechepasi pamarata aya. Mitanda yacho yemavhiri adzo yaiva yakabatanidzwa nemitumbi yengoro idzi. Upamhi hwevhiri rimwechete hwaiva huchiita masendimita makumi manomwe namashanu. 
1Kings7:33 Mavhiri iwayo akanga akagadzirwa semavhiri engoro dzehondo. Mitanda yacho namavhiri acho nezvipokisi zvawo namadura acho zvaiva zvakaumbwa noutare hwokunyungurutsa. 
1Kings7:34 Makanga muine zvokutsigira zvina mumakona mana engoro imwe neimwe. Zvokutsigira izvozvi zvaiva zvakabatana nengoro idzi. 
1Kings7:35 Pamusoro pengoro yoga yoga paiva nebhande rakaitenderera richiita masendimita makumi maviri ana maviri kureba. Pamusoro pengoro mbariro dzayo namarata ayo zvakanga zvakangobatana kuita chinhu chimwechete nayo. 
1Kings7:36 Pakapamhama pembariro napamarata napose paiwanika kanzvimbo, akaita mifananidzo yemakerubhu neyeshumba neyemiti yemirara nounyerekete hwomurongorogo wamaruva kuitenderera." 
1Kings7:37 Ndomugadziriro waakaita ngoro idzi dziri gumi. Dzose idzodzi dzakaforomwa muforoma dzimwechetedzo dziine mwero mumwechete dzakangoitawo zvimwechetezvo. 
1Kings7:38 Akagadzirawo mabhavhu gumi endarira. Bhavhu rimwe nerimwe raipinda madhiramu mashanu emvura. Bhavhu roga roga raiita mita rimwechete rina masendimita makumi masere upamhi. Dziri gumi kudaro, ngoro yoga yoga yaiva nebhavhu rayo." 
1Kings7:39 Akandomisa ngoro shanu kumaodzanyemba kwemba yacho iyi, akandomisawo dzimwe shanu kuchamhembe kwemba iyoyo, akaisawo zibhavhu ziguruguru riye kumaodzanyemba kwakadziva kumabvazuva kwemba iyoyo." 
1Kings7:40 Hiramu akagadzirawo mapoto nefoshoro namadhishi. Saizvozvo Hiramu uyu akapedza basa rose ramambo Soromoni repamba paTenzi. 
1Kings7:41 Akagadzira misimboti miviri nezvinhu zviviri zvaiva zvakafutumara zvapamisoro yemisimboti iyi, kwouya mambure maviri okushongedza pazvinhu zviya zvaiva pamisoro yemisimboti iyi" 
1Kings7:42 uye zvainge michero yemapomegiraneti mazana mana zvokuisa pamambure aya maviri, mumbure woga woga uine mitsara miviri yemapomegiraneti zvokushongedza pazvinhu zviya zviviri zvakafutumara zvepamisoro pemisimboti," 
1Kings7:43 kwouyawo ngoro gumi namabhavhu adzo gumi," 
1Kings7:44 kwozouya zibhavhu ziguruguru riye nehandira gumi nembiri dzaiva pasi paro. 
1Kings7:45 Mapoto nefoshoro namadhishi, midziyo yose iyi yomumba maTenzi yakagadzirirwa mambo Soromoni naHiramu yakanga iri yendarira yakanyatsokwenenzverwa." 
1Kings7:46 Mambo akaforomera izvozvi mubani romuna Jorodhani panzvimbo yomunyakwe iri pakati peSukoti neZaretani. 
1Kings7:47 Soromoni haana kuera kurema kwemidziyo iyoyi pamusana pokuti yakanga yakawanda zvikuru kwazvo nezvo hapana akazokwanisa kuwana kuti ndarira yacho yairema zvakadii. 
1Kings7:48 Soromoni akagadzira midziyo yose yaive mumba yaTenzi yaiti: atari yendarama, neteburu yendarama yechingwa chokuisa pana Mwari," 
1Kings7:49 kwouya zvigadzikiro zvemwenje zvendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, zvaiti zvishanu kurutivi rwokumaodzanyemba zvimwe zvishanuwo kuchamhembe tisati tapinda munzvimbo inoera yomukatikati, kwouyawo maruva namarambi nembato dzendarama," 
1Kings7:50 kwoti makomichi nezvigero namadhishi namabisiro orusenzi namagwati okutapisa moto zvendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, kwotiwo mahinjisi endarama amagonhi omukatikati memba iyoyi, omunzvimbo inoeresesa uyewo namahinjisi emagonhi emba yacho chaiyo, eTemberi." 
1Kings7:51 Sokudaro basa rose rakaitwa namambo Soromoni remba yaTenzi rakapera, Soromoniwo akuya nezvinhu zvababa vake Dhavhidhi zvakanga zvakapirwa kuna Mwari zvaiti sirivha nendarama nemidziyo, akazvirongedza mumatura emba yaTenzi." 
1Kings8:1 Soromoni akazokokorodza vakuru vakuru veIsiraeri navakuru vakuru vose vamadzinza avo, vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzimambo evanhu vechiIsiraeri, vakaungana kuna mambo Soromoni muJerusaremu kuti vaende kundotakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano kuGuta raDhavhidhi, guta reZioni." 
1Kings8:2 Saizvozvo varume vose vechiIsiraeri vakaungana kuna mambo Soromoni pamazuva makuru emwedzi waEtanimu, mwedzi wechinomwe." 
1Kings8:3 Vakuru vakuru vose veIsiraeri pavakasvika, vapristi vakandotakura bhokisi rechitenderano." 
1Kings8:4 Vakaunza bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano netendhe rokusanganira nemidziyo yose inoera yaiva mutendhe iroro rokusanganira. Vapristi navaRevhi ndovakauya nazvo. 
1Kings8:5 Mambo Soromoni negungano rose ravaIsiraeri vakanga vaungana kwaari vakanga vainaye paiva nebhokisi rechitenderano ipapo, vakapira hwai nemombe zhinji dzisingaverengeki kana kugona kuverengetwa." 
1Kings8:6 Vapristi vakazondoisa bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano panzvimbo paro munzvimbo inoera mukamba kwomukatikati kemba iyoyi, munzimbo inoeresesa nechepasi pamapapiro emakerubhu aye." 
1Kings8:7 Chaivapo ndechokuti makerubhu iwayo akanga akatambanudza mapapiro pamusoro penzvimbo yebhokisi rechitenderano zvokuti makerubhu iwayo aiva akafugidza bhokisi rechitenderano iri namapango aro okuritakurisa. 
1Kings8:8 Mapango aya aiva akareba zvokuti kwokupedzesera kwawo kwaitoonekwawo kunyange nomunhu ari munzvimbo inoera tisati tapinda munzvimbo inoera. Asi akanga asingaonekwe nomunhu ari kunze, achiriko nanhasi uno." 
1Kings8:9 Mubhokisi rechitenderano makanga musisina chimwe chinhu kunze kwamafendefa amabwe maviri aye akaiswamo naMosesi kuHorebhu kwakaita Tenzi chitenderano navanhu veIsiraeri pavakapinda munyika yeIjipiti. 
1Kings8:10 Vapristi pavakabuda munzvimbo inoera muya gore rakazadza imba yaTenzi 
1Kings8:11 zvokuti vapristi vakatadza kuita basa ravo pamusana pegore iri nokuti kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakazadza imba yaTenzi iyi. 
1Kings8:12 Soromoni akati, “Kunyange zvazvo Tenzi ariye akaisa zuva kumatenga uku asi Tenzi akazvisarudzira zvake kugara mugore rakati kwirindindi." 
1Kings8:13 Iniwo ndakanyatsokuvakirai imba, ino chaiyo, inomukurumbira, musha wokuti imi mugare zvenyu nokusingaperi.”" 
1Kings8:14 Mambo akazotendeuka akabva akomborera gungano rose reIsiraeri iro gungano reIsiraeri rose rakati ji kumira. 
1Kings8:15 Akati, “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri akadai kuzadzikisa zvaakatsidzira baba vangu Dhavhadhi achiti," 
1Kings8:16 ‘Kubvira pandakaburitsa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri muIjipiti, handina kusarudza guta mumadzinza ose eIsiraeri mokuti muvakwe imba yokuisa zita rangu. Asi ndakasarudza Dhavhidhi kuti atonge vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.’" 
1Kings8:17 “Baba vangu Dhavhidhi akanga ainazvo mumwoyo zvokuvakira zita raTenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri imba." 
1Kings8:18 Asi Tenzi akati kuna baba vangu Dhavhidhi, ‘Zvokuti mumwoyo mako muve nepfungwa yokuvaka imba yokuisa zita rangu, changa chiri chinhu chakanaka chawanga unacho mumwoyo." 
1Kings8:19 Chete, iwewe hausiriwe wokundivakira imba yacho asi kutoti mwana wako mukomana wauchaberekerwa ndiye achavaka imba ichaiswa zita rangu.’" 
1Kings8:20 Zvino Tenzi akazadzisa chitsidzo chaakatsidza, kukazomuka ini panzvimbo yababa vangu vaDhavhidhi, hezvi ndigere pachigaro choumambo hwokwaIsiraeri sokutsidza kwakaita Tenzi, ndikazovakirawo zita raTenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri imba iyi." 
1Kings8:21 Ndimo mandati mugare bhokisi raMwari rine chitenderano chaTenzi chaakaita namadzimambo edu paakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti.” 
1Kings8:22 Soromoni akamira pamberi peatari yaTenzi gungano rose reIsiraeri riripo akasimudzira maoko ake mudenga akanamata 
1Kings8:23 achiti, “Imi Tenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri, hakuna Mwari akaita semi, kumusoro kudenga kana panyika pasi pano anochengeta chitenderano achiitira mwoyochena varanda vake vanofamba vakatendeseka kwaari nomoyo wose," 
1Kings8:24 semi makachengeta zvamakataurira muranda wenyu baba vangu Dhavhidhi. Makataura imi nomuromo wenyu noruoko rwenyu mukazvizadzisa sezvazviri nhasi uno. 
1Kings8:25 Zvino Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri chengetedzai waro zvamakatsidzira muranda wenyu baba vangu Dhavhidhi zvaakavataurira achiti, ‘Hazvichafa zvakamboitika kuti ini ndishaye munhu womumba mako wokuzogara pachigaro choumambo hwokwaIsiraeri. Ndokungewo vana vako vachenjerera mafambiro avo vafambawo mberi kwangu sokufamba mberi kwangu kwawakaitawo iwe." 
1Kings8:26 Saka zvino imi Mwari wevaIsiraeri shoko renyu ramakatsidzira muranda wenyu baba vangu Dhavhidhi ngarichiitika.’ 
1Kings8:27 “Chaizvo chaizvo Mwari angaite panyika pano kuti pave musha wake nhai! Inga wani denga kana iwo matengatenga haakwane kuti ave musha wake. Ko kutozoti imba iyi yakavakwawo neniwo zvangu. 
1Kings8:28 Kunyange zvazvo zvakadaro Tenzi, Mwari wangu rerekerai nzeve dzenyu kumunamato wangu ini muranda wenyu nokuchichemo changu, munzwewo chichemo nomunamato wandiri kuita kwamuri nhasi uno" 
1Kings8:29 kuti ziso renyu rirambe riri pamba iyoyi siku nesikati panzvimbo iyi yamakati, ‘Ichadaidzwa nezita rangu,’ kuitira kuti mugozonzwawo munamato wangu ini muranda wenyu wandiri kuitira nzvimbo ino." 
1Kings8:30 Inzwaiwo chichemo ichi changu ini muranda wenyu nechevanhu venyu vaIsiraeri pavanonamata vakaringira kunzvimbo ino, vanzwei muri kudenga kwamunogara, pamunenge manzwa muvaregerere." 
1Kings8:31 “Kana munhu akatadzira mumwe wake, akange anzi apike mhiko, akauya akasvikopika mhiko yake pamberi peatari yenyu mumba muno," 
1Kings8:32 pakadaro apo imi teererai muri kudenga ikoko muwane chamungaite nazvo. Muteme zvinowirirana nemhosva yacho, ane mhosva muti apfukirwe nemhosva yake anengewo asina mhosva mudure pachena kuti haana mhosva maererano nokururamawo kwake." 
1Kings8:33 “Kana vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri vakakundwa navavengi pamusana pokuti vakakutadzirai vakange vadzokerazve kwamuri, vokuzivaizve zvino nezita, vakanamata vachiisa zvichemo zvavo kwamuri mumba muno," 
1Kings8:34 vanzwei kudenga ikoko muregerere vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri chitadzo ichocho, muvadzorere kunyika yamakapa madzitateguru avo." 
1Kings8:35 “Kana denga richinge rapfigwa rarega kunaya mvura pamusana pokuti vakakutadzirai, vakanamata vakaringa kunzvimbo ino, vavakukuzivai zvino nezita vakakanda pasi chitadzo chavo, imi manga mambovaonesa nhamo," 
1Kings8:36 vanzwei kudenga ikoko, muregerere muranda wenyu, navanhu venyu vaIsiraeri chitadzo chavo, muvadzidzise makwara akanaka okuti vafambe nawo, mupe mvura nyika yenyu yamakapa vanhu venyu senhaka yavo." 
1Kings8:37 “Kana munyika ino mukaita nzara kana kuti mukaita denda kana zvikukuve kana chiundudzi, kanawo kukauya mhashu kana rukonye kana kuti vavengi vavo vakavatambudza munyika muno muguta ravo ripi zvaro kunyange nyatwa ipi zvayo kana kukava nechirwere chipi nechipi zvacho," 
1Kings8:38 vanhu venyu vose vaIsiraeri kana kuti ani naani zvake anenge aine nhuna dzaari kunzwa mumwoyo make akazotambanudza maoko akaringa kumba ino achiita munamato upi zvawo kana kuisa chichemo chipi nechipi zvacho," 
1Kings8:39 munzwei kudenga ikoko kunzvimbo yenyu kwamunogara, mumuregerewo muwane chimwe chamungaite nazvo sezvo muchiziva zviri mumwoyo make, mubatsirei zvichienderanawo namaitiro ake (nokuti imi moga ndimi munoziva zviri mumwoyo womunhu)" 
1Kings8:40 kuitira kuti vagare vachikutyai misi yose yavachagara munyika yamakapa madzitateguru avo. 
1Kings8:41 “Pamusana pezita renyu muitewo zvimwechetezvo nomutorwa, wechirudzi kuvanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, mubvakure" 
1Kings8:42 nokuti vachanzwa nezvezita renyu guru nezvoukuru hwenyu nezvesimba renyu guru, akauya kuzonamata akaringa kumba ino," 
1Kings8:43 imi munzweiwo kudenga ikoko kunzvimbo yenyu kwamunogara muitire mutorwa iyeyo zvose zvaanenge akukumbirai kuitira kuti marudzi ose avanhu vapanyika pano vagoziva zita renyu vakutyei sezvinoita vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri uyewo vagoziva kuti imba ino yandavaka yakaiswa zita renyu. 
1Kings8:44 “Kana vanhu venyu vakaenda kundorwisa vavengi vavo kwamunenge mati vaende, vakanamata kunemi Tenzi vakaringa kuguta rino ramakasarudza vakaringawo kumba iyi yandakavakira zita renyu," 
1Kings8:45 vanzwei munamato wavo nechichemo chavo kudenga ikoko muvaitire zvavanenge vachichemedzeka nazvo. 
1Kings8:46 “Kana vakaita chitadzo kwamuri, sezvo kusina munhu asingapari chitadzo, imi mukavashatirirwa mukavaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo kuti vatapwe vaendwe navo kunyika yavavengi vavo iri kure kana pedyo," 
1Kings8:47 kunyange zvazvo zvakadaro vakazviti kunun'unu mumwoyo mavo vari munyika youtapwa imomo vakapinduka voturira chichemo chavo kwamuri vari munyika youtapwa iyoyo vachiti, ‘Takatadza tikaita zvakaipa tikave vasina kururama;’" 
1Kings8:48 kana vakapindukira kwamuri nomwoyo wavo wose vachinge vanyatsozvipira kupinduka ivo pachavo vari munyika yavavengi vavo vanyakuvatapa, vakanamata kwamuri vakaringa kuno kunyika yavo yamakapa madzitateguru avo kuguta ramakasarudza kumba ino yandakavakira zita renyu;" 
1Kings8:49 vanzwei munamato wavo nechichemo chavo kudenga ikoko kunzvimbo yenyu kwamunogara muvaitire zvavanenge vachichemedzeka nazvo 
1Kings8:50 muregererewo vanhu venyu vanenge vakutadzirai, muvaregererewo zvikanganiso zvavakakukanganisirai nazvo mupe kuti vanyakuvatapa vacho vavaitire tsiye nyoro," 
1Kings8:51 nokuti vanhu venyu, inhaka yenyu iyi, vanhu vamakaburitsa kuIjipiti mukati mevira nomoto wesimbi." 
1Kings8:52 Meso enyu atarise misodzi yezvichemo zvomuranda wenyu atarisewo misodzi yezvichemo zvevanhu venyu vaIsiraeri murerekere nzeve dzenyu kwavari pose pavanochema kwamuri 
1Kings8:53 nokuti imi Tenzi Mwari makavatsaura mukati memarudzi ose apanyika pano kuti vave nhaka yenyu sokutaura kwamakaita nomuromo waMosesi muranda wenyu pamakaburitsa madzitateguru edu kuIjipiti.” 
1Kings8:54 Soromoni paakapedza kunamata munamato uyu wose nokuturira chichemo ichi kuna Tenzi, akasimuka pamberi peatari yaTenzi paakanga akapfugama akasimudzira maoko ake mudenga." 
1Kings8:55 Akamira akakomborera gungano rose reIsiraeri nezwi riri pamusoro achiti," 
1Kings8:56 “Tenzi ngaarumbidzwe akazorodza vanhu vake vaIsiraeri akaita zvose zvaakatsidza pasina kana chimwe zvacho chisina kuitika pazvinhu zvose zvakanaka zvaakatsidza nomuromo womuranda wake Mosesi. 
1Kings8:57 Tenzi, Mwari wedu ngaave nesu sokuva kwaaimbovawo namadzitateguru edu. Dai akarega kutisiya kana kutifuratira" 
1Kings8:58 aite kuti titorwe mwoyo naye tifambe mumakwara ake tichengete mitemo yake nemirao yake nezvirevo zvake zvaakaudza madzibaba edu kuti zvichengetwe. 
1Kings8:59 Dai mazwi angu aya andataura pakuisa chichemo changu kuna Tenzi angoramba waro ari paari iye Tenzi, Mwari wedu siku nesikati uyewo muitire muranda wenyu navanhu vake vaIsiraeri zvavanenge vachichemedzeka nazvo zvavanenge vamuturira pazuvaro" 
1Kings8:60 kuitira kuti marudzi ose apasi pano azive kuti Tenzi ndiye Mwari, hakuna mumwe." 
1Kings8:61 Dai imi nomwoyo wose mangova mukombe nechirongo naTenzi, Mwari wedu mutevedze mirao yake muchengete mitemo yake sezvazviri nhasi uno.”" 
1Kings8:62 Mambo navaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo vakazopira zvibayiro kunaTenzi. 
1Kings8:63 Soromoni akapira kuna Tenzi mipiro yokuwadzana yemombe zviuru makumi maviri zvine zviuru zviviri uyewo zviuru zvehwai zvaiita zana rina makumi maviri. Saizvozvo mambo navanhu vose veIsiraeri vakateketera imba iyoyi kuna Tenzi. 
1Kings8:64 Musi wakarewo mambo akaturira kuna Mwari chimwe chidzengerere chapakati poruvanze pokunge toda kupinda mumba yaTenzi macho. Ndipo paakapirira mupiro wokupisa nomupiro weupfu hwembesanwa namafuta emipiro yokuwadzana. Chakanetsa ndechokuti atari iya yendarira yaiva ipapo paiva naTenzi yakaita diki kuti ipirirwepo mupiro wokupisa nomupiro weupfu hwembesanwa namafuta emipiro yokuwadzana. 
1Kings8:65 Naizvozvo, panguva iyoyo, Soromoni nevaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo gungano guru kwazvo vakaita mabiko okupemberera kwamazuva manomwe ndokuitazve mamwe mazuva manomwe, ose pamwechete akaita mazuva gumi namana vari pana Tenzi, Mwari wedu. Vakanga vari gungano guru kwazvo ravanhu vokubva pokunge tava kuda kusvika kuHamati kusvikira kukakova keIjipiti." 
1Kings8:66 Pazuva rechisere mambo akaparadza musasa oonekana navanhu. Vanhu vakarumbidza mambo vakaenda kumisha yavo mwoyo yavo isingagone nokufarira zvinhu zvakanaka zvakanga zvakaitwa naTenzi kune muranda wake Dhavhidhi nokuvanhu vake vaIsiraeri. 
1Kings9:1 Soromoni paakapedza kuvaka imba yaTenzi nomuzinda wamambo nezvose zvaaida kuvaka," 
1Kings9:2 Tenzi akazviratidza kuna Soromoni rwechipiri sokuzviratidza kwaakamboita kuGibheoni. 
1Kings9:3 Tenzi akati kwaari, “Munamato wako wawakaita nechichemo chako chawakasvitsa kwandiri ndazvinzwa. Imba iyi yawakavaka ndaiita kuti ive imba inoera uye ndaisa zita rangu pairi nokusingaperi ziso rangu harichabva pairi, uyewo mwoyo wangu ucharamba uri pairi." 
1Kings9:4 Chako iwe dai zvako ukangofamba nemandakatema sezvaiita baba vako Dhavhidhi wakatendeseka uri pachokwadi uchiita naimomo mandakati uite uchichengeta mirao nezvirevo zvangu 
1Kings9:5 kana wadaro ndichaita kuti umambo hwako hwokwaIsiraeri hudzike midzi narini wose. Sokutsidzira kwandakaita baba vako Dhavhidhi ndichiti, ‘Hazvichafa zvakamboitika kuti ini ndishaye munhu womumba mako wokuzogara pachigaro choumambo.’" 
1Kings9:6 Asi kana mukazotsauka, zviye zvokunyatsoenda mutome zvenyu, vangave iyemi kana vana venyu morega zvenyu kuchengeta mitemo yangu nemirao yangu yandakakupai mava kundonamata vamwe vamwari muchivapfugamira," 
1Kings9:7 iniwo ndopandichaparadza vaIsiraeri panyika yandakavapa. Kanawo iyo imba iyoyi yandaeresera nezita rangu ndichaiparadza zvokusamboda kuzoionazve mumaziso angu. Isiraeri inozova tsumo yavanhu nechiseko chenyika mukati memarudzi ose. 
1Kings9:8 Kunyangewo imba iyoyi yakati dzu-u kureba, vapfuuri venzira vachanyatsoti kanha kunana vachishamiswa. Vachatozvimvunzawo vachiti, ‘Ko Tenzi chakaadariro nyika ino nemba iyi chii?’" 
1Kings9:9 Ivo vachati, ‘Pamusana pokuti vakafuratira Tenzi, Mwari wavo akaburitsa madzitateguru avo kuIjipiti ndokuti memete navamwe vamwari vovapfugamira vachivanamata. Ndokusaka Tenzi akavapinza munyatwa yose iyi.’ ”" 
1Kings9:10 Mushure memakore makumi maviri okunge Soromoni avaka dzimba idzi dziri mbiri, imba yaTenzi nomuzinda wamambo," 
1Kings9:11 Hiramu mambo weTire awanisa Soromoni zvose zvaaida mapango omusidhari neemusaipurasi nendarama; mambo Soromoni akapa Hiramu maguta makumi maviri mudunhu reGarireya. 
1Kings9:12 Asi pakabva Hiramu kuTire achiuya kuzoona maguta aakanga apiwa naSoromoni haana kufadzwa nawo. 
1Kings9:13 Naizvozvo akati, “Nhai hama yangu maguta awandipa aya maguta erudzii? Ipapo kusvikira pari nhasi dunhu iroro rinonzi Kabhuru.”" 
1Kings9:14 Hiramu akanga atumira mambo Soromoni ndarama inopfuura zviuru zvina zvemakirogiramu. 
1Kings9:15 Iyi ndiyo nhoroondo yebasa rechibharo chakaitwa namambo Soromoni kuitira kuti avake imba yaTenzi nomuzinda wake nechimudhuri chemavhu norusvingo rweJerusaremu, neHazori neMegidho neGezeru." 
1Kings9:16 Zvakanga zvaitika kuGezeru ndezvokuti Farao mambo weIjipiti akanga akwirako akarikurira ndokuripisa nemoto akauraya vaKanani vaigaramuguta imomo ndokuripa mukunda wake mudzimai waSoromoni sechipo chokuenda nacho kwaakaroorwa 
1Kings9:17 ndokusaka Soromoni akavakazve Gezeru. Akavakawo guta reBhetihoroni rezasi racho 
1Kings9:18 neBhaarati neTamari kurenje munyika yokwake 
1Kings9:19 uye maguta ake ose amatura namaguta engoro dzake dzehondo dzamabhiza namaguta avachairi vadzo uyewo nezvimwe zvose zvaaida kuvaka muJerusaremu nokuRebhanoni nomunyika yose yaaitonga. 
1Kings9:20 Vanhu vose vasiri vechiIsiraeri vakasara pakati pavaAmoni nevaHiti navaPerezi nevaHivhi nevaJebhusi," 
1Kings9:21 zvizukuru zvakazosara zvovapo munyika imomo mushure mavo vasina kukwanisa kutsakatiswa nevaIsiraeri, ivava ava ndivo vakapinzwa naSoromoni muuranda hwechibharo, ndozvavari nanhasi uno." 
1Kings9:22 Asi vechiIsiraeri Soromoni haana kuvaita varanda. Ndovaiva varwi vehondo namakurukota ake navatungamiriri vehondo navakuru vakuru vehondo navakuru vakuru vemungoro dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo. 
1Kings9:23 Ivava ava ndivo makurukota makuru aitungamirira basa raSoromoni iri, vari mazana mashanu ane makumi mashanu avanhu vokuona kuti vanhu vechirudzi ava vari kuita basa racho zvakadii." 
1Kings9:24 Soromoni akatozovaka chimudhuri chamavhu chacho, mukunda waFarao atobva kuguta raDhavhidhi akwira kuenda kumba yake yaakanga avakirwa naSoromoni." 
1Kings9:25 Soromoni aigaropira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana katatu pagore paatari yaakavakira Tenzi achipirawo rusenzi kuna Tenzi. Ndokupedza kwaakaita kuvaka imba yaTenzi. 
1Kings9:26 Mambo Soromoni akagadzira chitsama chengarava kuEzionigebheru pedyo nokuEroti kumahombekombe kwe Gungwadzvuku kunyika yeEdhomu. 
1Kings9:27 Hiramu akatumirawo nengarava idzi machinda ake akanga ari vanhu vomugungwa, nyanzvi dzezvokufamba mugungwa kuenda pamwechete namachinda aSoromoni." 
1Kings9:28 Vakaenda kuOfiri vakandounza ndarama inorema makirogiramu anopfuura zviuru gumi nezvina. Izvozvi izvi vakauya nazvo kuna mambo Soromoni. 
1Kings10:1 Mumwe mukadzi aiva mambo wokuShebha paakanzwa nezvomukurumbira waSoromoni panyaya yezita raTenzi akauya kuzomuedza nemibvunzo yakaoma. 
1Kings10:2 Akaenda kuJerusaremu akakutwa nezanzwe chairo ravanhu vaine nghamera dzakatakura tunonhuwirira nendarama yakawanda kwazvo namatombo anokosha. Paakasvika kuna Soromoni akamutaurira zvose zvaaifunga mumwoyo make. 
1Kings10:3 Soromoni akamupindura mibvunzo yake yose. Hapana kana nechimwechete chakanga chakavanzika kuna mambo chaakatadza kumutsanangurira. 
1Kings10:4 Mukadzi uyu, mambo wokuShebha paakaona ungwaru hwese hwaSoromoni nemba yaakanga avaka," 
1Kings10:5 kwoti pateburu apa chokudya chaaidya kwozoti mugariro waiita makurukota ake naiwo munekairiro waiita vashandi vake nomupfekero wacho wavaiva vakaita kwotiwo nevaimuperekera waini kwozoti mipiro yake yokupisa yaaipira kumba kwaTenzi, zvakamushayisa romuromo." 
1Kings10:6 Akati kuna mambo, “Zvandakanzwa ndiri kunyika kwangu nezvenyu uye nezvoungwaru hwenyu ndezvechokwadi." 
1Kings10:7 Asi ini handina kunge ndazvibvuma kusvikira ndauya ndikatozvionera ndoga nameso angu. Chokwadi kutaurirwa hunyimwa, muto wokupungurirwa haupedzese sadza, zvandakanzwa hazvimbosvika napaduku pose pane ungwaru hwenyu nokupfuma kwenyu." 
1Kings10:8 Zvavo vanhu venyu, chokwadi machinda enyu anogara ainemi vachinzwa zvavo ungwaru hwenyu hwakadai!" 
1Kings10:9 Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari wenyu akasarudza zvake kugadza imi umambo hweIsiraeri! Rudo rwaTenzi kuIsiraeri harupere, ndokusaka akakugadzai umambo kuti mutonge zvine ruenzaniso uye zviri pamutsetse kuitwe.”" 
1Kings10:10 Mukadzi uyu akazopa mambo ndarama yaikwana makirogiramu zviuru zvina, nemikwende yakawanda kwazvo yetunonhuwirira neyematombo anokosha. Hapana kuzombouyazve tunonhuwirira twakawanda saitwotu twakapiwa mambo Soromoni namambokadzi wokuShebha." 
1Kings10:11 Chitsama chengarava dziya dzaHiramu dzokundotora ndarama kuOfiri dzakaunzawo mapango mazhinji kwazvo omuti omuarimugu namatombo anokosha. 
1Kings10:12 Mambo Soromoni akaita mitandariko yemapango omuarimugu yomumba maTenzi neyomumuzinda wamambo akavezawo zvipendani namadimbwa zvevaimbi. Hapana mapango omuarimugu akadai akazombouya kana kuonekwazve kusvikira pari nhasi. 
1Kings10:13 Mambo Soromoni akapa kumukadzi uya, mambo wokuShebha, zvose zvaaida zvaainge akumbira tisingaverengere zvaakanga anopiwa zvake naSoromoni. Iye akakotonoka akadzokera kunyika kwake pamwechete namakurukota ake." 
1Kings10:14 Ndarama yaiuyiswa kuna Soromoni pagore, yairema makirogiramu makumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zvitatu" 
1Kings10:15 pasingaverengerwe yemitero yaibvisiswa navamwe vemhindu dzokutengesa navashambadzi namadzimambo okuArabhia nokuvatongi vomumatunhu omunyika make. 
1Kings10:16 Mambo Soromoni akagadzira mazana maviri enhoo huru dzendarama yakaitwa zvokupfurwa. Nhoo huru imwechete yaiva yendarama makirogiramu ainge oda kuita manomwe. 
1Kings10:17 Akaitawo mazana matatu edzimwe nhoo ndiki dzendarama yakaitwa zvokupfurwa. Nhoo diki imwechete yaiva yendarama yairema makirogiramu aida kuita maviri. Mambo akandodzirongedza mumba iya yainzi Imbayesangorerebhanoni. 
1Kings10:18 Mambo akagadzirawo chigaro choumambo chomunyanga wenzou akaunamira nendarama yakanakisisa. 
1Kings10:19 Kundosvika pachigaro choumambo paiva namadanho matanhatu. Kuseri kwechigaro choumambo ichi kwaiva nomusoro wemombe. Kumativi uku chaiva nepokuisa maoko. Pakavambiranawo nepokuisa maoko paiva neshumba mbiri uku nouku kwechigaro choumambo chacho 
1Kings10:20 paine shumba gumi nembiri dzakamira pamadanho aye ose ari matanhatu dzakati imwe uku imwe uku padanho roga roga. Hapana mune imwe nyika makamboitwa zvakadai. 
1Kings10:21 Midziyo yose zvayo yokunwira yokwaSoromoni yaiva yendarama. Midziyowo yose yokuImbayesangorerebhanoni yaivawo yendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa pasina yesirivha, sirivha hapana aimboiverengawo sechinhu panguva yaSoromoni" 
1Kings10:22 pamusana pokuti mambo akanga aine chitsama chengarava dzokuTashishi kugungwa pamwechete nedzaHiramu. Ngarava dzacho dzokuTashishi dzaiunza ndarama nesirivha nemunyanga wenzou netsoko namakudo. 
1Kings10:23 Nokudaro mambo Soromoni aikunda mamwe madzimambo ose apasi pano muupfumi noungwaru. 
1Kings10:24 Pasi pose vanhu vaidisa kwazvo kuona Soromoni kuti vanzwe ungwaru hwake hwakanga hwaiswa mumwoyo make. 
1Kings10:25 Gore negore vose ivava, munhu wose aiunza chipo chake chechinhu chesirivha kana chamachira kana chendarama kana mura kana chinonhuwirira kana mabhiza namanyurusi." 
1Kings10:26 Soromoni akaunganidza ngoro dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo. Aive nechiuru chimwechete chengoro dzehondo dzamabhiza dzine ngoro mazana mana navachairi vadzo gumi rezviuru rine zviuru zviviri vaakati vave mumaguta engoro dzehondo vamwe vari muJerusaremu namambo. 
1Kings10:27 Mambo akaita kuti muJerusaremu imomo sirivha iyi inge matombowo zvawo. Musidhariwo uyu wakanga wava kungewo zvawo mukuyu wokunyika yokumanhika kuwanda. 
1Kings10:28 Mabhiza okwaSoromoni aiatora kuIjipiti nokuKue. Vanhu vokwamambo vaiita mhindu dzokutengesa ndovaiatengera kuKue. 
1Kings10:29 Kuti munhu atenge ngoro yehondo kuIjipiti, paidiwa mazana matanhatu emari yesirivha yamashekeri, bhizawo richiita zana namakumi mashanu emari yesirivha yamashekeri. Vanhu ivavo vemhindu dzokutengesa vokwamambo ndovaitozondotengeserawo madzimambo evaHiti nemadzimambo okuSiria zvinhu izvozvo." 
1Kings11:1 Mambo Soromoni akada vakadzi vakawanda kwazvo vechirudzi, kwaiti mukunda waFarao navakadzi vechiMoabhu nevechiAmoni nevechiEdhomu nevechiSidhoni nevechiHiti." 
1Kings11:2 Marudzi iwaya ndiwo akanga afanoyambirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi achiti, “Hamufaniri kuroorerana navo. Chiripo chaicho ndechokuti vachakukwezverai mwoyo kuna vamwari vavo.” Asi Soromoni ndiye akaramba angoti kwati navo." 
1Kings11:3 Aiva navakadzi mazana manomwe vakanga vari vakunda vamadzimambo aivawo navarongo mazana matatu. Vakadzi vake ivava vakamukwezvera mwoyo kusiriiko 
1Kings11:4 nokuti Soromoni paakanga zvino akwegura vakadzi vake ivava vakamukwezvera mwoyo kuna vamwari vavo. Akanga asisatevere Tenzi, Mwari wake nomwoyo wose sababa vake Dhavhidhi." 
1Kings11:5 Mwoyo waSoromoni wakanga zvino wavavo kune zvokunamata Ashitoreti, mwari wevaSidhoni wechikadzi, nokunamatawo chinhu chinosemesa kwazvo chainzi Mirikomu, mwari wavaAmoni." 
1Kings11:6 Ipapo Soromoni akaita zvakaipa pana Tenzi asisatevere Tenzi zvizere sababa vake Dhavhidhi. 
1Kings11:7 Soromoni akavakira pane chimwe chikomo kumabvazuva kweJuraseremu nzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira kune chimwe chinhu chinosemesa kwazvo chainzi Kemoshi mwari wevaMoabhu nechimwe chinhu chinosemesa kwazvo chainzi Moreki mwari wevaAmoni. 
1Kings11:8 Izvozvi ndozvaakaitira vakadzi vake vose vechirudzi, vaipisira rusenzi vachipira zvibayiro vamwari vavo." 
1Kings11:9 Tenzi akashatirirwa Soromoni pamusana pokuti mwoyo wake wakanga zvino wakwezverwa kure naTenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri akambozviratidza ruviri rwese kwaari" 
1Kings11:10 akanga amuudzawo nezvenyaya iyoyi kuti arege kutevera vamwe vamwari. Asi haana kumbochengeta zvakanga zvanzi naTenzi zviitwe. 
1Kings11:11 Naizvozvo Tenzi akati kuna Soromoni, “Pamusana pokuti ndozvawava nazvo izvi zvokurega kuchengeta chitenderano changu nemirao yangu yandakati uchengete, zvino ndichabvarura chete umambo hwaunahwo ndigopa rimwe gurukota rako." 
1Kings11:12 Asi handisi kuzoita izvozvo munguva yako pamusana pababa vako Dhavhidhi. Asi ndichazohubvarura mumaoko emwanakomana wako. 
1Kings11:13 Chete handisi kuzobvarura umambo hwacho hwose. Asi ndichapa dzinza rimwechete kumwanakomana wako pamusana pomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi uyewo pamusana peguta reJerusaremu randakasarudza.” 
1Kings11:14 Tenzi akazomutsira Soromoni mhandu, mumwe muEdhomu ainzi Hadhadhi aiva wechizvarwa chokwamambo weEdhomu." 
1Kings11:15 Zvakanga zvaitika ndezvizvi zvokuti Dhavhidhi paaiva kuEdhomu, Joabhu mutungamiriri wehondo uya akaenda kundoviga vamwe vakanga vaurayiwa akauraya varume vose muEdhomu imomo." 
1Kings11:16 Chakadariso ndechokuti, Joabhu nevaIsiraeri vose vakagarako mwedzi mitanhatu kusvikira vapedza kuuraya varume vose muEdhomu imomo." 
1Kings11:17 Asi Hadhadhi akatizira kuIjipiti nevamwe vaEdhomu vemhuri dzamachinda ababa vake. Izvozvo Hadhadhi akanga achiri mwana mudiki. 
1Kings11:18 Rwendo rwavo vakarutangira kuMidhiani vakaenda nokuParani kwavakatora vamwe varume vavakaenda navo kuIjipiti kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti akamupa imba, akati apote achipiwa mugove wake wechokudya akamupawo nyika." 
1Kings11:19 Hadhadhi akadiwa chaizvo naFarao zvokuti akamupa mukadzi, munun'una womukadzi wake munun'una wavahosi vamambo, Tahipenesi." 
1Kings11:20 Munun'una waTahipenesi uyu akamuberekera mwana mukomana ainzi Gemubhati. Tahipenesi akaita kuti asvike pakutorumurwa achiri mumuzinda maFarao. Gemubhati aitogara zvake mumuzinda waFarao ari pamwechete navanakomana vaFarao. 
1Kings11:21 Hadhadhi achiri muIjipiti imomo paakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi akavata akaendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake uyewo kuti Joabhu mutungamiriri wehondo uya akafa, Hadhadhi uyu akati kuna Farao, “Chiregai zvenyu ndiende kunyika yokwangu.”" 
1Kings11:22 Asi Farao akamuti, “Chawashaya chii uineni kudai zvawava kutsvaka zvokudzokera kunyika yokwako?” Asi hapana mhinduro yaakamupa aingoti, “Ndiregei ndiende zvangu.”" 
1Kings11:23 Mwari akamumutsirawo imwe mhandu yainzi Rezoni mwanakomana waEriyadha, akanga atiza kwatenzi wake Hadhadhiezeru mambo weZobha." 
1Kings11:24 Akaunganidza varume vaaiva navo akabva ava mutungamiriri wechikwata chokupamba mushure mokunge Dhavhidhi arakatisa kuuraya vanhu. Vakaenda kuDhamasikusi vakagarako vakaita Rezoni mambo muDhamasikusi imomo. 
1Kings11:25 Akanga akarimirana kumuganhu neIsiraeri panguva yose yaSoromoni, achiita umhandupandu sezvaingoita Hadhadhi, achivenga Isiraeri kwazvo izvozvo achitonga nyika yeSiria." 
1Kings11:26 Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati wedzinza rokwaEfuremu wokuZeredhi, gurukota raSoromoni ana amai vainzi Zerua aiva chirikadzi akapandukirawo mambo." 
1Kings11:27 Nyaya yakamupa kupandukira mambo ndeiyi: Soromoni akavaka chimudhuri chiya chamavhu napamwe pakanga papazika rusvingo rweguta raDhavhidhi baba vake. 
1Kings11:28 Jerobhoamu uyu aiva murume chaiye akasvika. Pakaonawo Soromoni kuti jaya irori iri raiva munhu webasa akamuita mukuru mukuru webasa rechibharo rose revemba yokwaJosefi. 
1Kings11:29 Panguva iyoyo Jerobhoamu paakabuda muJerusaremu, muporofita Ahiya wokuShiro akamuona panzira. Ipapo Ahiya akanga akapfeka hanzu itsva izvozvo vainge vari voga voga pauviri hwavo musango imomo." 
1Kings11:30 Ahiya akabata hanzu itsva yaaiva akapfeka akaibvarura-bvarura muzvipenga gumi nezviviri. 
1Kings11:31 Akati kuna Jerobhoamu, “Tora zvako zvipenga gumi izvi nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Zvavapo ndezvizvi, ndava kuzomwaura kuna Soromoni umambo ndichikupa madzinza gumi." 
1Kings11:32 Asi iye achangozova nedzinza rimwechete kuri kuitira muranda wangu Dhavhidhi uyewo pamusana peguta reJerusaremu guta randakasarudza mukati memadzinza ose avaIsiraeri. 
1Kings11:33 Ndiri kuita izvi pamusana pokuti vakandifuratira vavakundopfugamira zvavo Ashitoreti mwari weSidhoni wechikadzi naKemoshi mwari wevaMoabhu uye Mirikomu mwari wevaAmori vakasiya kufamba mumakwara angu. Zvokuita zvakanaka izvi zvandinoda vakakanda pasi. Zvaiita baba vake Dhavhidhi zvokuchengeta mirao yangu nezvirevo zvangu vakakandawo pasi. 
1Kings11:34 Zvakadaro zvazvo handisi kuzomutorera nyika yacho yose, asi ndichaita kuti ave mutongi upenyu hwake hwose, kuitira murunda wangu Dhavhidhi wandakasarudza akachengetawo mirao yangu nemitemo yangu." 
1Kings11:35 Asi ndichatorera mumaoko emwanakomana wake umambo hwaanahwo ndigopa kwauri iwe umambo hwemadzinza gumi. 
1Kings11:36 Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo, kumwanakomana wake iyeyo ndichapa dzinza rimwechete kuitira kuti muranda wangu Dhavhidhi awanewo kamoto kanoramboti roi roi mazuva ose pandiri muJerusaremu guta randakasarudzira kuisa zita rangu," 
1Kings11:37 ndichitorawo iwe kuti utonge pamadiro ako ose uri mambo wokwaIsiraeri. 
1Kings11:38 Kana ukateerera zvose zvandinokuudza, ukafamba nomumakwara angu, uchiita zvinhu zvakanaka kwandiri uchichengeta mirao yangu nemitemo yangu sezvaiita muranda wangu Dhavhidhi, ndichava newe. Ndichaitawo kuti umambo hupinde mumba mako hubatirire sokuvaka kwandakaita imba yaDhavhidhi iwe ndigokupa vokwaIsiraeri." 
1Kings11:39 Pamusana paizvozvi ndichambodukupisa zvizvarwa zvokwaDhavhidhi, asi kwete zvokubva zvangogara zvakadaro.’ ”" 
1Kings11:40 Ipapo Soromoni akatsvaka nzira yokuuraya nayo Jerobhoamu. Asi Jerobhoamu akasimuka akatizira kuIjipiti kuna Shishaki mambo weIjipiti, akagara kuIjipiti ikoko kusvikira rufu rwaSoromoni." 
1Kings11:41 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaSoromoni nezvinhu zvose zvaakaita uye nezvoungwaru hwake zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reMabasa aSoromoni. 
1Kings11:42 Nguva yakatonga Soromoni muJerusaremu ari mambo weIsiraeri yose, yaiva makore makumi mana." 
1Kings11:43 Soromoni akazovata woendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi baba vake. Mwanakomana wake Rehobhoamu ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Kings12:1 Rehobhoamu akaenda kuShikemu kwakanga kwaunganwa neIsiraeri yose kundomugadza umambo. 
1Kings12:2 Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati paakazvinzwa, akaramba zvake ari kuIjipiti (sezvo akanga achiri kuIjipiti ikoko kwaakaenda atiza mambo Soromoni)." 
1Kings12:3 Vakamutumira nhume kundomudaidza. Jerobhoamu uyu negungano rose rokwaIsiraeri vakasvikopira nyaya yavo kuna Rehobhoamu vachiti," 
1Kings12:4 “Baba venyu vakatiremedza nejoko rinorema. Zvino dai mukarerutsa basa rababa venyu rakaoma kudai nejoko ravo rinorema ravakaisa patiri tigokushandirai zvedu.” 
1Kings12:5 Iye akavati, “Chimboendai mugozodzoka zvenyu kwandiri kwapera mazuva matatu.” Nokudaro vanhu ava vakaenda zvavo." 
1Kings12:6 Mambo Rehobhoamu akandobvunza mazano kune vechikuru chikuru vaimbova makurukota kuna Soromoni baba vake pavakanga vachiri vapenyu achiti, “Zano ramunondipa kuti ndipindure vanhu ava nderipi?”" 
1Kings12:7 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Zvanhasi uno izvi kana mukabvuma zvenyu kuva muranda wokuvashandira mukavataurirawo zvakanaka pamunovapindura, naivowo vachava varanda kwamuri mazuva ose.”" 
1Kings12:8 Asi iye akasiya zano raakapiwa nevechikuru chikuru ava akandobvunza mazano kune vechidiki vaakakura navo vakanga vava zvino makurukota ake. 
1Kings12:9 Akati kwavari, “Ko zano ramunondipa kuti ndipindure vanhu ava nderipi vakanditi, ‘Tirerutsireiwo joko rakaiswa nababa venyu patiri.’ ”" 
1Kings12:10 Vechidiki vaakakura navo ava vakamuti, “Udzai vanhu ivavo vakakutii, ‘Baba venyu vakatiremedza nejoko rinorema dai mukachitirerutsirawo,’ kuti kasiyanwa kangu kakobvu pane chiuno chababa vangu." 
1Kings12:11 Zvino baba vangu vakakuremedzai nejoko rinorema handiti, ini ndichatoripamhidzira. Baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu handiti, ini ndichakurovai netyava ine minzwa yorukato.”" 
1Kings12:12 Saizvozvo Jerobhoamu navanhu vose vakadzokera kuna Rehobhoamu pazuva retatu racho sokutaura kwakanga kwaita mambo kuti mugozodzoka zvenyu kwandiri kwapera mazuva matatu. 
1Kings12:13 Mambo akapindura vanhu ava nehasha achisiya zano raakanga apiwa nevechikuru vaye. 
1Kings12:14 Akataura kwavari achitevera zano riye raakapiwa nevechidiki achiti, “Baba vangu vakakuremedzai nejoko rinorema handiti, ini ndichatoripamhidzira. Baba vangu vakakurovai neshamhu handiti, ini ndichakurovai netyava ine minzwa yorukato.”" 
1Kings12:15 Nokudaro mambo haana kunzwa chichemo chavanhu ivava nokuti maitikiro aya ezvinhu akanga auyiswa naTenzi kuti azadzikise shoko rake raakanga ataura nomuromo waAhija okuShiro kuna Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati. 
1Kings12:16 VokwaIsiraeri vose pavakaona kuti mambo haana kuvanzwa, vanhu vakapindura mambo vachiti, “Isu muna Dhavhidhi, mugove wedu ndowei chaizvo? Hatina isu nhaka mumwana waJese. VokwaIsiraeri, kumusha! Iwe Dhavhidhi, zvomumba mako wochizvionera.”" 
1Kings12:17 VaIsiraeri ndiye shapu kuenda kumisha yavo. Asi vaIsiraeri vaigara mumaguta okwaJudha ndivo vaitongwa naRehobhoamu. 
1Kings12:18 Mambo Rehobhoamu akatuma Adhoramu mumwe mukuru mukuru wezvebasa rechibharo. Vose vokwaIsiraeri vakamutema namatombo akabva afa. Mambo Rehobhoamu ndopaakabva ati nokuchimbidza ngoro yake yehondo karakata ndiye kuJerusaremu ware. 
1Kings12:19 Saizvozvo vokwaIsiraeri vakapandukira imba yokwaDhavhidhi kusvikira pari nhasi. 
1Kings12:20 VokwaIsiraeri vose pavakanzwa kuti Jerobhoamu akadzoka vakamutumira shoko rokuti auye kumusangano vakamugadza umambo hwevokwaIsiraeri vose. Zvokumba yokwaDhavhidhi hapana akanga achazvinzwa kunze kwevedzinza rokwaJudha chete. 
1Kings12:21 Rehobhoamu paakasvika kuJerusaremu akaunganidza vose vemba yokwaJudha nevedzinza rokwaBhenjamini. Vakanga vari zana namakumi masere ezviuru zveshasha chaidzo dzokurwa hondo kundorwisa vokwaIsiraeri kuitira kuti vadzorere nyika kuna Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni. 
1Kings12:22 Shoko raMwari rakauya kuna Shemaya munhu waMwari," 
1Kings12:23 rikati, “Iti kuna Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni mambo wokwaJudha nokuimba yose yokwaJudha neyokwaBhenjamini nevamwe vanhu vose" 
1Kings12:24 zvanzi naTenzi, regai kuenda uye musarwisana nehama dzenyu vanhu vokwaIsiraeri. Munhu wese ngaadzokere kumusha nokuti zvinhu izvi zvakabva kwandiri.” Saizvozvo vakateerera zvakarehwa naTenzi ndokudzokera zvavo voenda sokutaura kwaTenzi." 
1Kings12:25 Jerobhoamu akazovaka guta reShikemu munyika yokwaEfuraimu yamakomo akandogaramo. Akazobvapo akandovaka guta rePenueri. 
1Kings12:26 Jerobhoamu uyu akazviti nechemumwoyo, “Zvavapo zvino ndezvokuti umambo hwava kuzodzokera kumba yokwaDhavhidhi" 
1Kings12:27 kana vanhu ava vachienda kundopira zvibayiro muimba yaTenzi kuJerusaremu. Mwoyo yavanhu ava ichapindukira kuna tenzi wavo Rehobhoamu mambo weJudha. Vachandiuraya ava vodzokera kuna Rehobhoamu mambo weJudha.” 
1Kings12:28 Mambo akabvunza mazano akabva agadzira zvimhuru zviviri zvendarama, ndokubva azoti kuvanhu “Zvokuramba muchienda kuJerusaremu izvi zvakwana. VaIsiraeri we-e ava ndivo vamwari venyu vakakuburitsai muIjipiti.”" 
1Kings12:29 Chimwe akandochiisa kuBhetieri chimwe chacho akandochiisa kwaDhani. 
1Kings12:30 Ichochi chakave chitadzo nokuti vanhu vakanga vava kutoenda kune chokuBhetieri chiya vachitondosvikawo kunyange nokwaDhani. 
1Kings12:31 Akavakawo dzimba panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira akapa basa roupristi kuvanhuwo zvavo vasiri vemba yokwaRevhi. 
1Kings12:32 Jerobhoamu uyu akasarudza zuva guru mumwedzi wechisere musi wechigumi neshanu kutevedzera zuva guru raichengetwa kwaJudha. Akapira zvibayiro paatari. Izvozvi ndozvaakaita kuBhetieri achipira zvibayiro kuzvimhuru zvaakanga aumba. Akaisawo muBhetieri imomo vapristi venzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dziye dzaakanga agadzira. 
1Kings12:33 Aienda kuatari yaakavaka kuBhetieri pazuva regumi nechishanu racho remwedzi wechisere mumwedzi waakanga angosarudza iye zvomusoro wake. Ndiye zvake akarongera vanhu vokwaIsiraeri zuva. Aipota achikwira ikoko kundopisa rusenzi paatari iyoyo. 
1Kings13:1 Ndiye munhu waMwari nepo vhu achibva kwaJudha neshoko raTenzi. Izvozvo Jerobhoamu akanga amire padyo neatari kuti achipisa rusenzi. 
1Kings13:2 Murume uyu akadaidzira kuatari iyoyi namazwi aakafemerwa naTenzi achiti, “Atari, iwe atari, zvanzi naTenzi, chinzwa kuchaberekwa mwana mukomana womumba yokwaDhavhidhi ane zita rokuti Josiya. Iyeyo achapira pauri iyewe sezvibayiro vapristi venzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira vachipisa rusenzi pauri. Vachapisa pauri iwe mapfupa avanhu.”" 
1Kings13:3 Akabva apa chiratidzo musi wakarewo achiti, “Hechinoi chiratidzo chinoratidza kuti Tenzi ndiye azvitaura. Teererai munzwe, atari iyoyi iyi ichakoromorerwa pasi, rota riri pairi iri richakuhumurirwa pasi.”" 
1Kings13:4 Mambo Jerobhoamu paakanzwa zvaitaurwa nomunhu waMwari nezveatari yapaBhetieri, akatambanudza ruoko kumunongedza ari paatari ipapo achiti, “Batai munhu uyo.” Ruoko irworwo rwaakatambanudza kunongedza rwakabva rwati papata kuoma zvokuti haana kukwanisa kurugonyesa." 
1Kings13:5 Atariwo yakabva yati pasi tsetsemu tsemu tsemu. Rotawo raiva paatari ndiye pasi ririri maererano nechiratidzo chakanga chapiwa nomunhu waMwari sokufemerwa kwaaiva aitwa naTenzi. 
1Kings13:6 Mambo ndokuti kumunhu waMwari, “Ndateterera ndikumbirireiwo kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu mundinamatirewo kuti ndiporeswe ruoko rwangu.” Munhu waMwari akakumbira kuna Tenzi, mambo akaporeswa ruoko rwake ndokubva rwaita sezvarwakanga rwakaita kare." 
1Kings13:7 Mambo akati kumunhu waMwari, “Uyai tiende tose kumba muwane chokumboti mudzore mwoyo ini ndigokupaiwo kachipo kangu.”" 
1Kings13:8 Munhu waMwari akati kuna mambo, “Kunyange zvenyu mukandikamurira napakati zvemba yenyu, handiende nemi uye handisi kuzodya chokudya kanawo kunwa zvako mvura yokuno" 
1Kings13:9 nokuti ndakanzi neshoko raTenzi ndisadye chokudya kana kunwa mvura kana kudzokera nenzira yandambofamba nayo pakuuya.” 
1Kings13:10 Saka akaenda neimwe nzira, akarega kudzokera nenzira yaakanga auya nayo kuBhetieri." 
1Kings13:11 Zvino kuBhetieri ikoku kwaigara mumwe muporofita wechikuru. Mumwe mwana wake mukomana akauya akamutaurira zvose zvaiva zvaitwa nomunhu waMwari musi iwoyo muBhetieri imomo, shokowo raakanga ataura kuna mambo vakaritaurira baba wavo." 
1Kings13:12 Baba wavo vakati kwavari, “Aenda nokupi?” Vana vake vakomana vakamuratidza nzira yaakanga aenda nayo munhu waMwari aibva kwaJudha." 
1Kings13:13 Iye akati kuvana vake, “Ndisungirei dhongi.” Vakavasungira dhongi ndokubva vati padhongi riye karakata" 
1Kings13:14 votevera munhu waMwari uya vakamuwana agere zvake pasi pomuti womuoku. Vakamuti, “Ndimi here munhu waMwari abva kwaJudha?” Iye ndokuti, “Ndini.”" 
1Kings13:15 Ivo vakamuti, “Handei kumba mumbowana chokuisa mukanwa.”" 
1Kings13:16 Iye ndokuti, “Handikwanisi kudzokera nemi kana kuenda nemi kunyange kudya chokudya kana kunwa mvura zvayo nemi kuno uku" 
1Kings13:17 nokuti ndakanzi neshoko raTenzi ndisadye chokudya kana kunwa zvako mvura yeko kana kudzokera nenzira yandakambofamba nayo pakuuya.” 
1Kings13:18 Vakamuti, “Ini ndiri muporofitawo semi. Mutumwa anditaurirawo shoko raTenzi achiti, ‘Dzokera naye kumba kwako kuti adye chokudya amwewo mvura,’ ” asi akanga achimunyepera zvake." 
1Kings13:19 Nokudaro akadzokera navo akatodya mumba mavo, akatonwawo mvura." 
1Kings13:20 Vachingunodya kudaro pateburu shoko raTenzi rakauya kumuporofita uya nyakumudzora 
1Kings13:21 akazivisa munhu waMwari uyu aibva kwaJudha kuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Pamusana pokuti hauna kuteerera shoko raTenzi ukarega kuchengeta chirevo, nomutemo wawakapiwa naTenzi, Mwari wako," 
1Kings13:22 ukadzoka ukatodya zvako chokudya nokunwa zvako mvura yokuno’ kunzvimbo yaakakuti, ‘Rega kudya chokudya kana kunwa mvura, nezvo chitunha chako hachichazovigwa muguva rababa vako.’ ”" 
1Kings13:23 Kuzoti apedza kudya chokudya nokunwa mvura, akasungira dhongi muporofita waakanga adzora." 
1Kings13:24 Iye akaenda ndokubva asangana neshumba panzira ikamuuraya, chitunha chake ndokunzi panzira ipapo rabada. Dhongi neshumba ndokumira zvazvo pedyo nechitunha chacho." 
1Kings13:25 Ndokubva vamwe vanhu vaipfuura nepo vaona chitunha chiya chakati rapata munzira. Shumbawo yakati mbikiti zvayo kumira pedyo nechitunha. Vakasvika vakataura izvozvi muguta maigara muporofita wechikuru uya. 
1Kings13:26 Muporofita uya, nyakumbomudzora munzira paakazvinzwa akati, “Munhu waMwari uya chete asina kuteerera shoko raTenzi. Naizvozvo ndokusaka Tenzi akamuisa mukanwa meshumba yakamubvambura ikamuuraya sokutaura kwaita Tenzi.”" 
1Kings13:27 Akati kuvana vake, “Ndisungirei dhongi.” Vakabva vari sunga." 
1Kings13:28 Akaenda ndokuwanawo chitunha chakati munzira rapata, dhongi neshumba zvakangotiwo mbikiti zvazvo kumira pedyo nechitunha chacho. Shumba haina kudya chitunha kana kubvambura dhongi." 
1Kings13:29 Muporofita uyu akasimudza chitunha chomunhu waMwari ndokuchiisa padhongi odzokera nacho muguta rake iye muporofita wechikuru uya kundomuchema nokumuvigamo. 
1Kings13:30 Akaviga chitunha muguva rake iye pachake. Vakamuchema vachiti, “Munun'una wangu maiwe!”" 
1Kings13:31 Kuzoti amuviga akarongera vana vake kuti, “Kana ndafa ndivigei muguva rakavigwa munhu waMwari. Mapfupa angu muaradzike pedyo namapfupa ake." 
1Kings13:32 Chandadariro ndechichi chokuti shoko raTenzi raakazivisa nezveatari iri muBhetieri muno nezvaakareva nezvedzimba dzepanzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dziri mumaguta eSamaria zvinofanira kutoti zviitike.” 
1Kings13:33 Mushure maizvozvi Jerobhoamu haana kukanda pasi uipi hwake. Akadzokera makare mukupa vanhuwo zvavo basa roupristi hwenzvimbo dziya dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira achitoteketerera zvake kuna Mwari munhu wose wose ainge angodawo zvake kuti ave mupristi wenzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira. 
1Kings13:34 Izvozvi zvakava chitadzo mumba yaJerobhoamu zvokutoiparadza nokutoitsakatisa pasi pano. 
1Kings14:1 Panguva iyoyo Abhiya, mwana waJerobhoamu mukomana, akarwara."
