1Kings14:2 Jerobhoamu akataurira mukadzi wake kuti, “Dai mukachizvivanziridza kuti vanhu varege kukuzivai kuti ndimi mudzimai waJerobhoamu, musimuke muende kuShiro. Ikoko kuna Ahiya muporofita akafanonditaurira kuti ndichava mambo wavanhu ivava." 
1Kings14:3 Muigireiwo gumi rezvingwa notupapata nechirongo chouchi. Iye achakuzivisai zvichazoitika kumwana.” 
1Kings14:4 Mudzimai waJerobhoamu akaita saizvozvo ndokusimuka oenda kuShiro akasvikopinda mumusha waAhiya. Izvozvo Ahiya akanga asisakwanisi kuona nokuti maziso ake aiva oonera madzerere nokukwegura kwaakanga aita. 
1Kings14:5 Tenzi akanyevera Ahiya achiti, “Chinzwa, mudzimai waJerobhoamu ari kuuya kuzobvunza nezvomwana wake mukomana nokuti ari kurwara. Unomuudza zvokuti nezvokuti. Mukadzi uyu paachapinda muno achazvivanziridza achizviita sokungewo mumwe mukadzi zvake.”" 
1Kings14:6 Kuzoti Ahiya paakanzwa mutsindo wake achipinda kumusuo akati, “Pindai zvenyu vadzimai vaJerobhoamu. Seiko muchizviita sokunge mumwewo mukadzi asirimi? Nyaya yandanzi ndikunyeverei yakaomarara kwazvo." 
1Kings14:7 Endai mundotaurira Jerobhoamu kuti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, pamusana pokuti ndakakukwidziridzaka iwe mukati mavanhu ava ndikakuitaka mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri" 
1Kings14:8 ndikabvarurawo umambo hwemba yaDhavhidhi ndichipa iwe, zvakadaro zvazvo hauna kuva somuranda wangu Dhavhidhi aichengeta mitemo yangu achinditevera nomwoyo wose achiita zvakarurama chete zvandinoda." 
1Kings14:9 Asi iwe wakaita zvakaipa kupfuura vamwe vose vakakutangira. Wakatetereka ukandozvigadzirira vamwe vamwari nezvifananidzo zvakaumbwa noutare kutondishatirisa zvako uchindipa gotsi. 
1Kings14:10 Saka zvino, chinzwa, ndichapinza imba yaJerobhoamu munyatwa. Vanhurume vose vokwaJerobhoamu ndichavapedza nokuuraya, vose zvavo vokumba huru kana varanda muIsiraeri muno. Imba yaJerobhoamu ndichanyatsoitsakatisa kuti nho somunhu ari kupisa ndove zvokusara pasisina." 
1Kings14:11 Munhu ari wose zvake wokwaJerobhoamu anofira muguta achadyiwa nembwa, nouyowo anofira musango achadyiwa neshiri dzedenga nokuti Tenzi ndiye azvireva.’" 
1Kings14:12 “Chisimuka uende zvako kumusha kwako. Paunongoti pindei muguta mukomana iyeyo anobva afa. 
1Kings14:13 Isiraeri yose ichamuchema yomuviga nokuti iyeye chete ndiye wokwaJerobhoamu achaiswa muguva pamusana pokuti mumba maJerobhoamu muna iyeyu chete ndimo mune chimwe chinofadza Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
1Kings14:14 Chimwezve ndechichi chokuti Tenzi achazvimutsira mambo wokutonga Isiraeri achaparadza imba yaJerobhoamu. Zuva racho ndinhasi, kwete kumboti rinhi, izvozvi kutaura kuno." 
1Kings14:15 Kubvira ipapo Tenzi acharova Isiraeri sokuzunzwa kunoitwa rutsanga ruri mumvura agotipura Isiraeri munyika ino yakanaka kudai yaakapa kumadzitateguru avo agovamwayanisa kumhiri kwaYufuratesi nokuti vakaita zviAshera zvokunamata vakashatirisa Tenzi. 
1Kings14:16 Iyewo acharamwa Isiraeri pamusana pezvitadzo zvakaitwa naJerobhoamu zvaakaitisawo Isiraeri.” 
1Kings14:17 Mudzimai waJerobhoamu akasimuka akabva paye akandosvika kuTiriza. Paakangoti pindei munhandare yapamusha uyu mwana ndiye sarai. 
1Kings14:18 Isiraeri yose yakamuviga vachimuchema sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi nomuromo womuranda wake, muporofita Ahiya." 
1Kings14:19 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJerobhoamu dzehondo dzaakarwa nomutongero wake zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzamadzimambo eIsiraeri. 
1Kings14:20 Nguva yakatonga Jorobhoamu, makumi maviri amakore ana makore maviri akabva ovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake. Mwanakomana wake Nadhabhu ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Kings14:21 Izvozvo Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni aitongawo kwaJudha. Rehobhoamu akatangisa kutonga ava namakumi mana amakore ane gore rimwechete. Akatonga kwamakore gumi namanomwe ari muJerusaremu guta rakanga rasarudzwa naTenzi mukati memadzinza ose avaIsiraeri kuti zita rake ariise ipapo. Amai vake vainzi Naama vechiAmoni. 
1Kings14:22 VokwaJudha vakaitawo zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi vakamudenha kurwa shanje nezvitadzo zvavo zvavakange voita zvaitodarika zvose zvakamboitwa namadzibaba avo 
1Kings14:23 pamusana pokuti vakangawo vazvivakira nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira namatombo akamiswa anomiririra vamwe vamwari nezviAshera pachikomo choga choga nomunyasi memiti yose minyoro. 
1Kings14:24 Kwakanga zvino kwava navarume vezvoupombwe hwavaiita mukunamata. Vakaita zvose zvinosemesa zvaiitwa namarudzi aye akadzingirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi. 
1Kings14:25 Mugore rechishanu rokutonga kwamambo Rehobhoamu, Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akauya kuzorwisa Jerusaremu" 
1Kings14:26 akapamba upfumi hwomumba yaTenzi akapambawo upfumi hwomumuzinda wamambo akakukucha zvose. Nhoo dzose dzendarama dzakanga dzagadzirwa naSoromoni akadzitora. 
1Kings14:27 Kutsiva idzodzi mambo Rehobhoamu akazogadzirawo nhoo dzendarira akadzipa kuna vakuru vakuru vokuchengetedza pasuo guru repamuzinda wamambo. 
1Kings14:28 Nguva dzose paienda mambo kumba yaTenzi vachengetedzi ivavo vaidzipakata vachizodzidzosera mumba yavachengetedzi. 
1Kings14:29 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaRehobhoamu nezvinhu zvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku raMadzimambo okwaJudha. 
1Kings14:30 Hondo yakaramba ichingovapo pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu. 
1Kings14:31 Rehobhoamu akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake akavigwa pamwechete namadzibaba ake muGuta raDhavhidhi. Amai vake vainzi vaNaama vechiAmoni. Mwanakomana wake Abhiyamu ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
1Kings15:1 Mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati, Abhiyamu akava mambo wokwaJudha." 
1Kings15:2 Akatonga kwamakore matatu ari muJerusaremu. Amai vake vainzi vaMaaka mwana waAbhisharomu. 
1Kings15:3 Akatevera nzira yezvitadzo zvose zvababa vake zvavakaita iye asati avapo, asingatevere Tenzi, Mwari wake nomwoyo wose semwoyo waiva navasekuru vake Dhavhidhi." 
1Kings15:4 Asi pamusana paDhavhidhi, Tenzi, Mwari wake akamupa kamoto kanoramba kachibvira muJerusaremu nokumupa mwana mukomana mushure make kuitira kuti Jerusaremu idzike midzi" 
1Kings15:5 nokuti Dhavhidhi akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi asingambotsauka kune zvose zvaakanga amutemera kuita upenyu hwake hwose kusiya chete panyaya iya yaUriya muHiti. 
1Kings15:6 Hondo yakaramba ichingovapo pakati paAbhiyamu naJerobhoamu. 
1Kings15:7 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAbhiyamu nezvinhu zvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha. Hondowo yakaramba ichingovapo pakati paAbhiyamu naJerobhoamu. 
1Kings15:8 Abhiyamu akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake vakamuviga muguta raDhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake Asa ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
1Kings15:9 Mugore rechimakumi maviri rokutonga kwaJerobhoamu mambo wokwaIsiraeri, Asa akava mambo wokwaJudha." 
1Kings15:10 Akatonga kwamakumi mana amakore ane gore rimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Amai vake vainzi Maaka mwana waAbhisharomu. 
1Kings15:11 Asa uyu akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi sezvakaitwa navasekuru vake Dhavhidhi. 
1Kings15:12 Akadzinga munyika iyi varume vezvoupombwe hwaiitwa mukunamata akabvisa zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvose zvakanga zvagadzirwa nababa vake. 
1Kings15:13 Akabvisawo amai vake vaMaaka pachinzvimbo chouhosi nokuti vakanga vagadzira chimufananidzo chokunamata chakanyangara kwazvo chokumiririra Ashera mwari wechikadzi. Asa akatema chimufananidzo chavo akachipisa kukakova keKidhironi. 
1Kings15:14 Chete akarega nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dziripo. Chakanga chiripo chete ndechokuti, Asa aitevera Tenzi nomwoyo wose upenyu hwake hwose." 
1Kings15:15 Akaunza zvinhu mumba yaTenzi zvakanga zvateketererwa kuna Mwari nababa vake nezvaakanga ateketerera kuna Mwari iye pachake, zvaiti: sirivha nendarama nemidziyo." 
1Kings15:16 Hondo yakaramba ichingovapo pakati paAsa naBhaasha mambo wokwaIsiraeri upenyu hwavo hwose. 
1Kings15:17 Bhaasha mambo wokwaIsiraeri akakwira kundorwisa vokwaJudha akabva avakirira guta reRama kuitira kuti awane marambidziro vanhu kubva kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha kana kuendako. 
1Kings15:18 Asa akatora sirivha yose nendarama yakanga yasiyiwa paupfumi hwemba yaTenzi nehwomumuzinda wamambo akapa makurukota ake. Mambo Asa akazvitumira kuna Bhenihadhadhi mwanakomana waTabhirimoni, muzukuru waHezioni, mambo weSiria aigara muDhamasikusi achiti," 
1Kings15:19 “Ngatiitei chibvumirano imi neni sezvakanga zvakaita baba venyu nababa vangu. Onai ndakutumira chipo icho chendarama nesirivha. Imi moendawoka muparadze chibvumirano chenyu naBhaasha mambo wokwaIsiraeri kuitira kuti kwangu kuno uku abve.” 
1Kings15:20 Bhenihadhadhi akabvumirana namambo Asa akabva atumira vakuru vakuru vehondo yake kundorwisa maguta okwaIsiraeri akakurira Iyoni neDhani neAbherobhetimaaka neKineroti yose nenyika yose yokwaNafutari. 
1Kings15:21 Bhaasha paakazvinzwa akabva aregedza kuvakirira Rama akandogara kuTiriza. 
1Kings15:22 Mambo Asa akatumira vose vokwaJudha chirevo pasina aisara kuti vatakure mabwe okuRama namapango acho ainge achivakiswa naBhaasha. Mambo Asa akandovaka nazvo Gebha kwaBhenjamini neMizipa. 
1Kings15:23 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAsa nougamba hwake nezvinhu zvose zvaakaita uye maguta aakavaka, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha. Chaingovapo chete ndechokuti akwegura akaita chirwere chomutsoka." 
1Kings15:24 Asa akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake, akavigwa pamwechete namadzibaba ake muguta ravasekuru vake VaDhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake Jehoshafati ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Kings15:25 Nadhabhu mwanakomana waJerobhoamu akatanga kutonga kwaIsiraeri mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha. Akatonga kwaIsiraeri kwamakore maviri. 
1Kings15:26 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi, akatevera mugwara rababa vake nechitadzo chavo chavakapinza nacho vokwaIsiraeri muchitadzo." 
1Kings15:27 Bhaasha mwanakomana waAhiya wedzinza rokwaIsakari, akamupandukira. Bhaasha akamuuraya kuGibhetoni guta revaFirisitia sezvo Nadhabhu nevokwaIsiraeri vakanga vakakomba Gibhetoni." 
1Kings15:28 Nokudaro Bhaasha akamuuraya mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
1Kings15:29 Paakangova mambo akabva auraya vose vemba yaJerobhoamu. Hapana nomumwechete wemba yaJerobhoamu waakasiya ari mupenyu kusvikira atoiparadza sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi nomuromo womuranda wake Ahiya wokuShiro. 
1Kings15:30 Izvozvi izvi zvakauyiswa nezvitadzo zvakaitwa naJerobhoamu nokupinza kwaakaita vokwaIsiraeri muchitadzo uyewo pamusana pokushatirisa kwaakaita Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
1Kings15:31 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaNadhabhu nezvinhu zvose zvaakaita, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
1Kings15:32 Hondo yakaramba ichingovapo pakati paAsa naBhaasha mambo wokwaIsiraeri upenyu hwavo hwose. 
1Kings15:33 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha Bhaasha mwanakomana waAhiya akatanga kutonga vokwaIsiraeri ari kuTiriza. Akatonga kwamakumi maviri amakore ana makore mana. 
1Kings15:34 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi akatevera mugwara raJerobhoamu nechitadzo chake chaakapinza nacho vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza. 
1Kings16:1 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jehu mwanakomana waHanani rakananga Bhaasha richiti," 
1Kings16:2 “Pamusana pokuti chingo chandakukwidziridza ndichikubvisa pasi apa pavhu ndikakuita mutungamiriri wavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, iwe wakatotevera zvako gwara raJerobhoamu ukapinza vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri muchitadzo vakandishatirisa nezvitadzo zvavo izvozvo," 
1Kings16:3 chinzwa, ndichanyatsotsvaira Bhaasha nevemba yake ndichiita kuti imba yake iite semba yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati." 
1Kings16:4 Wose wokwaBhaasha anofira muguta achadyiwa nembwa, wokwake anofirawo musango achidyiwawo neshiri dzedenga.”" 
1Kings16:5 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaBhaasha nezvinhu zvaakaita nougamba hwake zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
1Kings16:6 Bhaasha akazovata akaenda kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake akavigwa kuTiriza. Mwanakomana wake Era ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
1Kings16:7 Chakaitisawo kuti shoko raTenzi riuye kumuporofita Jehu rakananga Bhaasha nemba yake kwaiva kutadza kwaakaita kusingadiwi naTenzi achimushatirisa netwaakabata namaoko ake, achitevedzera zvaiitwa nemba yaJerobhoamu uyewo pamusana pokuiparadza kwaakaita." 
1Kings16:8 Mugore remakumi maviri nechitanhatu rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha, Era mwanakomana waBhaasha akatanga kutonga vokwaIsiraeri ari kuTiriza; akatonga kwamakore maviri." 
1Kings16:9 Asi gurukota rake rainzi Zimuri raiva mutungamiriri wechimwe chikamu chechikwata chevengoro dzehondo akamupandukira. Ari kuTiriza ikoko akati zvake achinwira-nwira iwe zvokutoraradza mumba maAriza mukuru mukuru aiona zvomumuzinda muTiriza imomo," 
1Kings16:10 Zimuri akapindamo akamurova akamuuraya muri mugore ramakumi maviri nechinomwe rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha ndokubva ava kutonga panzvimbo pake. 
1Kings16:11 Paakatanga kutonga, achangoti garei pachigaro chake choumambo, akauraya vemba yaBhaasha vose zvavo asingamusiyire kana munhurume mumwechete akadai kuhama dzake kana kushamwari dzake." 
1Kings16:12 Ikoku ndokuuraya kwakaita Zimuri vose vemba yaBhaasha maererano neshoko raTenzi rakauya nokumuporofita Jehu rakananga Bhaasha 
1Kings16:13 pamusana pezvitadzo zvaBhaasha nezvomwana wake zvavakapara zvavakapinzawo nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza vachishatirisa Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri uyewo nezvifananidzo zvokunamata." 
1Kings16:14 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaEra nezvinhu zvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
1Kings16:15 Mugore ramakumi maviri nechinomwe rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha, Zimuri akatonga kwamazuva manomwe ari muTiriza. Izvozvo hondo dzake dzakanga dzakakomba kurwisa guta ravaFirisitia reGibhetoni." 
1Kings16:16 Hondo idzi dzakanga dziri mumatendhe iwayo dzakanzwa kuti Zimuri akamukira mambo akamuuraya naizvozvo vokwaIsiraeri vose vakabva vatora Omuri mutungamiriri wehondo vakamugadza umambo hwokwaIsiraeri zuva iroro kumatendhe avo ikoko. 
1Kings16:17 Nokudaro Omuri akabva kuGibhetoni vokwaIsiraeri vose vainaye vakandokomba Tiriza vorirwisa. 
1Kings16:18 Pakaona Zimuri kuti guta rakurirwa akatizira mumuzinda wamambo. Akapisa imba yamambo nomoto akatsviramo akafa 
1Kings16:19 pamusana pezvitadzo zvake zvaakapara zvokuita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi achitevera zvake gwara raJerobhoamu, uyewo pamusana pechitadzo chake chaakaita chaakapinza nacho vokwaIsiraeri muchitadzo." 
1Kings16:20 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaZimuri nokupanduka kwaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaIsraeri. 
1Kings16:21 Vanhu vokwaIsiraeri vakabva vakamukana kuita mapato maviri. Chimwe chikamu chakatevera Tibhini mwanakomana waGinati kuti vamuite mambo chimwewo chakatevera Omuri. 
1Kings16:22 Asi vaitevera Omuri vakakurira vaitevera Tibhini mwana waGinati, Tibhini ndokufa, Omuri ndokubva ava mambo." 
1Kings16:23 Mugore ramakumi matatu nechiposhi rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha, Omuri akatanga kutonga kwaIsiraeri. Akatonga kwamakore gumi namaviri. Makore matanhatu, akatonga ari kuTiriza." 
1Kings16:24 Akatenga kuna Shemeru chikomo cheSamaria nezviuru zvitanhatu zvemari yesirivha akavakirira chikomo ichochi norusvingo. Pamusana paShemeru, aimbova muridzi wechikomo ichi, akatumidza guta racho raakavaka zita rokuti Samaria." 
1Kings16:25 Omuri akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi zvokuita zvakaipa kupinda vose vakamutangira 
1Kings16:26 achitevera makwara ose aJerobhoamu mwana waNebhati nezvitadzo zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri muchitadzo vakashatirisa Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata." 
1Kings16:27 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaOmuri dzezvinhu zvaakaita nougamba hwaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
1Kings16:28 Omuri akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake, akavigwa muSamaria. Mwanakomana wake Ahabhu ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Kings16:29 Mugore ramakumi matatu nechisere rokutonga kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha, Ahabhu mwanakomana waOmuri akatanga kutonga kwaIsiraeri. Ahabhu uyu mwana waOmuri akatonga kwaIsiraeri ari muSamaria kwamakumi maviri amakore ana makore maviri." 
1Kings16:30 Ahabhu mwana waOmuri akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi kupinda vose vakamutangira. 
1Kings16:31 Akaona kutevera gwara raJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati sokunge chinhu chidikidiki, akatoroora zvake Jezebhero mukunda waEtibhaari mambo wevaSidhoni, akatoenda kundonamata Bhaari achimupfugamira." 
1Kings16:32 Akavakira Bhaari atari mutemberi yaBhaari yaakanga amuvakira kuSamaria. 
1Kings16:33 Ahabhu akagadzira chimufananidzo chinomiririra Ashera, mumwe mwari wechikadzi. Ahabhu uyu akaita zvakawanda zvokushatirisa Tenzi kupinda mamwe madzimambo ose okwaIsiraeri akamutangira." 
1Kings16:34 Mumazuva ake Hieri wokuBhetieri akavaka Jeriko. Kuvaka ugaro hwaro akatokuripa norufu rwomwana wake mukomana wedangwe ainzi Abhiramu. Kumisawo misuo mikuru yaro akakuripa negotwe rake rechikomana sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi nomuromo waJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni. 
1Kings17:1 Mumwe mugari wokuTishibhi kuGireadhi anonzi Eriya akati kuna Ahabhu, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu, Mwari weIsiraeri wandinonamata kuti hakuchaita dova kana kunaya zvako makore ano kusatoti ndataura.”" 
1Kings17:2 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwaari rikati," 
1Kings17:3 “Chibva pano unange kumabvazuva unohwanda kukakova keKeriti kumabvazuva kweJorodhani. 
1Kings17:4 Mukakova ikako ndimo mauchanwa mvura. Ndaudza makunguwo kuti apote achikupa chokudya ikoko.” 
1Kings17:5 Saizvozvo akaenda akaita sokutaura kwakanga kwaitwa naTenzi. Akandogarawo kukakova keKeriti kari kumabvazuva kwaJorodhani. 
1Kings17:6 Makunguwo aimuigira chingwa nenyama kumangwanani, kumauro achimuigirawo chingwa, achinwa mvura mukakova kacho." 
1Kings17:7 Kwakati perei chinguva kakova aka kakabva kapwa nokuti munyika umu makanga musisanayi mvura. 
1Kings17:8 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwaari rikati," 
1Kings17:9 “Chisimuka uende kuZarefati guta rokuSidhoni ugareko. Ndakaudza imwe chirikadzi ikoko kuti ikupe zvokudya.” 
1Kings17:10 Naizvozvo Eriya akasimuka akaenda Zarefati akasvika pasuo guru reguta iri wanei pane chirikadzi ichitsvaka huni. Akadaidzira kwairi achiti, “Ndiigireiwo tumvura mumudziyo ndingonwawo.”" 
1Kings17:11 Mudzimai uyu paakanga oenda kundoitora, Eriya akadaidzira kwaari achiti, “Mundiigirewo chimedu chechingwa mumaoko.”" 
1Kings17:12 Mudzimai akati, “NaTenzi chaiye, Mwari wenyu mupenyu hakuna chandati ndabika. Chiriko, katsama bedzi koupfu mumudziyo notumafuta tushomanana muguchu. Chandiri kungoita, kunonga-nonga tukuni utwu kuti ndizondobikira ini nomwana wangu mukomana tidye tichifa zvedu.”" 
1Kings17:13 Eriya akamuti, “Musatye zvenyu Endai zvenyu muite zvamareva, asi tangai mandigadzirira kachingwa paupfu ihwohwo mundiigirewo kuno mozoti mozvibikirawo imi nomwana wenyu," 
1Kings17:14 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Upfu hwomumudziyo iwoyo hauchambopera uye mafuta omuguchu racho haachambokwengurwa kusvikira musi uchanayiswa mvura naTenzi panyika.’ ”" 
1Kings17:15 Akaenda akandoita zvakanga zvataurwa naEriya, mudzimai uyu nevemba yake naEriya vakadya kwamazuva mazhinji." 
1Kings17:16 Upfu hwomumudziyo muya hauna kumbopera, mafutawo, muguchu muya haana kukwenguka sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi nomuromo waEriya." 
1Kings17:17 Zvakazoitikawo kuti mushure maizvozvi mukomana uya mwana womudzimai uya muridzi wemba, akarwara. Chirwere chake chakakura zvokuti upenyu pakanga pasisina." 
1Kings17:18 Mudzimai uyu akati kuna Eriya, “Ko chandakakutadzirai chiiko nhai, munhu waMwari? Heya kuuya kwenyu kwandiri kwaiva kwokuti uipi hwangu huyeukwe nhai nokuurayisa mwana wangu!”" 
1Kings17:19 Eriya akamuti, “Ndipei kuno mwana wenyu.” Eriya akamutora mumaoko avo ndokumutakura oenda naye kumba yapamusoro maaigara akamuradzika pamubhedha wake chaiwo." 
1Kings17:20 Akachema kuna Tenzi achiti, “Nhai Tenzi, Mwari wangu, mungauyise here chokwadi nhamo yakadai kunyange kuchirikadzi yandigere nayo nokuuraya mwanakomana wayo?”" 
1Kings17:21 Akazvambarara pamusoro pomwana katatu achichema kuna Tenzi achiti, “Nhai Tenzi, Mwari wangu itai waro kuti mweya womwana uyu udzokere maari.”" 
1Kings17:22 Tenzi akanzwa chichemo chaEriya, mweya womwana wakadzokera mumwana uyu. Nokudaro akava mupenyu pakare." 
1Kings17:23 Eriya akatora mwana ndokuburuka naye mumba yapamusoro iya opinda mumba, akamupa kuna amai vake. Eriya ndokuti, “Hoyuka mwana wenyu, ava mupenyu.”" 
1Kings17:24 Mudzimai uyu ndokuti kuna Eriya “Ndazoziva zvino kuti muri munhu waMwari uyewo kuti shoko raTenzi ramunotaura nomuromo wenyu nderechokwadi.” 
1Kings18:1 Shure kwamazuva akawanda, shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Eriya mava mugore rechitatu richiti, “Chienda uchindozviratidza kuna Ahabhu, ini ndichazonayisa mvura panyika.”" 
1Kings18:2 Saizvozvowo Eriya akandozviratidza kuna Ahabhu. Nzara yakanga zvino yatsviriridza muSamaria. 
1Kings18:3 Ahabhu akadaidza Obhadhiya mukuru mukuru wepamuzinda. Zvino Obhadhiya aiva munhu aitya Tenzi zvikuru kwazvo. 
1Kings18:4 Nokudaro Jezebhero paaiuraya vaporofita vaTenzi, Obhadhiya akatora vaporofita zana akavahwandisa mumapako vachiti umu makumi mashanu umu makumi mashanu achipota achivapa chingwa nemvura." 
1Kings18:5 Ahabhu akati kuna Obhadhiya, “Wochifamba nenyika ino kumatsime ose nomumapani ose zvimwe tingawane pachine mafuro tikararamisa mabhiza namanyurusi tirege kurasikirwa nezvimwe zvipfuwo.”" 
1Kings18:6 Pauviri hwavo vakabvawo vapana mativi enyika iyi okundomema. Ahabhu akaenda nokwake ari oga, Obhadhiya akaendawo nokwake ari oga." 
1Kings18:7 Vakati zvino Obhadhiya ava munzira, ndiye mahwekwe naEriya, Obhadhiya ndokumuziva ndokubva ati nouso pasi gwadagwa akati, “Ndiwe here chokwadi Eriya changamire?”" 
1Kings18:8 Akamudaira achiti, “Ndini zvangu. Iwe chienda undotaurira tenzi wako kuti Eriya uya ari pano.”" 
1Kings18:9 Iye akati, “Chandakatadza chaizvo chii kundiisa zvenyu ini muranda wenyu mumaoko aAhabhu kuti ndiurayiwe?" 
1Kings18:10 NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu, hakuna rudzi kana nyika, changamire vangu yavasina kutumira vanhu vokukutsvakai. Kana paine vaiti haako kuno, kwaitoita munhu weko aitopika nemhiko akamiririra rudzi irworwo kuti havana kukuwanai." 
1Kings18:11 Zvino imi ndopomonditi, ‘Enda utaurire vatenzi vako kuti Eriya uyu ari pano.’" 
1Kings18:12 Pandinongoti ibvei pano pamuri Mweya waTenzi unokutututsirai kumwe kwandisingamboziva zvangu ndinozosara zvangu ndotaurira Ahabhu wokushayai pano, anondiuraya kunyange zvazvo ini muranda wenyu kubvira paudiki hwangu ndanga ndichingova munhu anotya Tenzi." 
1Kings18:13 Zvandakaita hamusati mazvinzwa here zvokuti Jezebhero paaiuraya vaporofita vaTenzi ini ndakahwandisa vaporofita zana vaTenzi mumapako, ndichivati umu makumi mashanu, umu makumi mashanu ndichivapa chingwa nemvura?" 
1Kings18:14 Zvino imi ndopamungati, ‘Enda utaurire vatenzi vako’ kuti, ‘Eriya uya ari pano’ anondiuraya uye.”" 
1Kings18:15 Eriya ndokuti, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu wehondo nehondo wandinonamata kuti ndichatozviratidza chete kwaari iye nhasi uno.”" 
1Kings18:16 Ipapo Obhadhiya akandoonana naAhabhu akamutaurira, Ahabhu akandoonanawo naEriya." 
1Kings18:17 Ahabhu paakaona Eriya, Ahabhu uyu akati kwaari, “Ndiwe here mutambudzi weIsiraeri?”" 
1Kings18:18 Eriya akati, “Ini handisirini mutambudzi weIsiraeri, asi kutoti iyemi nevemba yababa venyu nokuti makakanda pasi mitemo yaTenzi mukanamata vana Bhaari." 
1Kings18:19 Saka zvino tumai vanhu muunganidze Isiraeri yose kuno kwandiri kuGomo reKarimeri, muunzewoko mazana mana avaporofita vaBhaari uye mazana mana avaporofita vamwari vechikadzi, Ashera vanodya pamwechete naJezebhero patebhuru.”" 
1Kings18:20 Ahabhu akabvawo atumira nhume kuvanhu vose vokwaIsiraeri akaunganidza vaporofita pamwechete kuGomo reKarimero. 
1Kings18:21 Eriya akaenda pedyo navanhu vose akati, “Munoda kusvikira riniko muchingova nemwoyo miviri? Kana Tenzi, ari iye Mwari wenyu muteverei, kana ari Bhaari teverai iyeyo.” Vanhu havana chavakamupindura." 
1Kings18:22 Eriya ndokuti kuvanhu ava, “Ini ndini ndoga muprofita waTenzi asara. Asi kune vaporofita vaBhaari mazana mana namakumi mashanu." 
1Kings18:23 Ngatipiwei handira mbiri, ivo vazvisarudzire handira imwechete vaicheke-cheke vaiise pamusoro pehuni, asi varege kutungidzapo moto. Iniwo ndichadarowo neimwe handira yacho ndoiisawo pamusoro pehuni ndorega kutungidza moto." 
1Kings18:24 Imi mudaidzire nezita kuna mwari wenyu, iniwo ndigodaidzirawo nezita kuna Tenzi. Ipapa Mwari anenge apindura nomoto ndiye Mwari.” Vanhu vose vakapindura vachiti, “Zvamataura zvakanaka.”" 
1Kings18:25 Eriya akati kuvaporofita vaBhaari, “Chizvisarudzirai handira mutange ndimi kudaro nokuti makawanda, modaidzira nezita kuna mwari wenyu asi musatungidzepo moto.”" 
1Kings18:26 Vakatora handira yavakanga vapiwa vakaigadzirira vakadaidzira nezita kuna Bhaari kubvira mangwanani kusvikira masikati vachiti, “Bhaari we-e tidaireiwo!” Asi hapana chakambonzwika kana kuwana akadaira. Vakayavaya kutamba vachitenderera atari yavakanga vavaka." 
1Kings18:27 Kuzoti zvino ava masikati zuva rorova nhongonya, Eriya akavaseka zvake achiti, “Zhambai nokuti ndimwari zvimwe mheno zvaari kumbofunga hake kana kuti hameno paangotiwo zvake nzve-e. Zvimwe angadaro akafamba rwendo kana kuti ari akakotsira zvake anenge achifanira kutomutsvaka.”" 
1Kings18:28 Ivo vakazhambatatawo maererano netsika yavo vakazvicheka-cheka namapakatwa nezvisvo kudzamara ropa royerera nomuviri wavo. 
1Kings18:29 Zuva rakarereka vachingopengereka kusvikira panguva yokupira chibayiro asi hapana chakambonzwika kana kuwana akapindura kana akambozviteerera. 
1Kings18:30 Eriya akati kuvanhu vose zvavo, “Chiswederai kuno kwandiri.” Vanhu vose vakaswederawo kwaari akabva avakiridza atari yaTenzi yakanga yapunzwa." 
1Kings18:31 Eriya akatora matombo gumi namaviri anoenderana namadzinza avanakomana vaJakobho vaya vokunzi neshoko raTenzi, “Zita rako rava kunzi Isiraeri.”" 
1Kings18:32 Namatombo iwayo akavakira Tenzi atari. Akachera mugero kutenderera atari iyi waiva wakakura zvokutokwana bhagidhi rembesanwa. 
1Kings18:33 Akaronga huni akachekacheka handira iyoyo ndokuironga pamusoro pehuni dziya akati, “Zadzai zvirongo zvina nemvura mudire pamupiro wokupisa napahuni.”" 
1Kings18:34 Akatizve, “Dirai rwechipiri” ndokubva vadirazve rwechipiri. Akati “Itaizve kechitatu. Ndokubva vadirawo rwechitatu.”" 
1Kings18:35 Mvura yakaerera kutenderera atari yose mugero ukati tuba kuzara nemvura. 
1Kings18:36 Kuzoti zvino nguva yokupira chibayiro yasvika muporofita Eriya asvederapo ndokuti, “Tenzi, Mwari waAbhurahamu naIsaki naIsiraeri, ngazvizivike nhasi uno kuti ndimi Mwari muIsiraeri uye kuti ini ndiri muranda wenyu uyewo kuti zvose zvandakaita ndatozviita zvabva mumuromo menyu." 
1Kings18:37 Ndipindureiwo Tenzi mundidavire kuitira kuti vanhu ava vazive kuti imi Tenzi ndimi Mwari uyewo kuti ndimi munotendeutsa mwoyo yavo.” 
1Kings18:38 Moto waTenzi wakatozomoka ukaroromesa chibayiro chokupisa ichocho, ukaroromesa huni, namatombo nevhu, ukananzva mvura yakanga iri mumugero." 
1Kings18:39 Vanhu vose pavakazviona vakati pasi gwadagwa nouso vachiti, “Tenzi ndiye Mwari, Tenzi ndiye Mwari.”" 
1Kings18:40 Eriya akavati, “Batai vaporofita vaBhaari. Musarege kunyange nomumwe chete wavo achipunyuka.” Vakavabata, Eriya akadzika navo kukakova keKishoni akavaurayira ikoko." 
1Kings18:41 Eriya akati kuna Ahabhu, “Chikwirai zvenyu mundodya nokunwa nokuti kune kuwunga kwemvura yomudenga zhinji kwazvo.”" 
1Kings18:42 Saizvozvowo Ahabhu akakwira zvake kundodya nokunwa, Eriya akakwirawo pamusoro peGomo reKarimero. Akati pasi gwadagwa uso huri pakati pamabvi." 
1Kings18:43 Akati kune aimushandira, “Chikwira utarise kugungwa.” Iye akakwira akatarisako akati, “Hakuna chiriko.”" 
1Kings18:44 Iye akati, “Endako kanomwe.” Kechinomwe kacho akati, “Kuri kuoneka kakore kanenge chanza chomunhu kari kukwira kachibuda mugungwa.” Iye ndokuti, “Chikwira kuna Ahabhu undoti, sungai ngoro dzenyu dzehondo mutodzika zvenyu mungadaro mukadzivirirwa nemvura.”" 
1Kings18:45 Nenguva shoma shoma matenga akasviba kuti ndo-o namakore nemhepo mvura ikapurana kwazvo kunaya. Ahabhu akati mungoro kata ndokubva aenda kuJezirieri. 
1Kings18:46 Simba raTenzi rakava naEriya; akakunya hanzu dzake muchiuno akamhanya ari pamberi paAhabhu kusvikira tava kundopinda muJezirieri. 
1Kings19:1 Ahabhu akataurira Izebhero zvose zvakanga zvaitwa naEriya nokuuraya kwaakaita vaporofita vose nebakatwa. 
1Kings19:2 Jezebhero ndokubva atumira nhume kuna Eriya achiti, “Chokwadi chaizvo, vamwari ngavandione kana mangwana panguva yakare ino iyi ndikarega kunge ndaita kuti upenyu hwako huite sehwemumwe wavo.”" 
1Kings19:3 Pamusana pokutyira upenyu hwake akasimuka akatiza akaenda kuBheerishebha kwaJudha akasiya mushandi wake ikoko. 
1Kings19:4 Asi iye akafamba rwendo rwomuswere wose wezuva achienda mugwenga. Akasvika akagara zvake munyasi mechigwenzi chomutsvairo achitokumbira kuti dai achisva afa zvake achiti, “Zvakwana zvino izvi Tenzi, chitonditorai zvenyu ndife nokuti chandazovawo nani kumadzibaba angu hapana.”" 
1Kings19:5 Akabva ati zvake umburu kurara munyasi mechigwenzi chomutsvairo ndiye rororo kukotsira. Mutumwa ndiye pakarepo vhu ndokumuzunza achiti, “Muka udye.”" 
1Kings19:6 Eriya akatarisa onei kumusoro kwake kune mupotohayi wakabikirwa pamatombo anopisa, kwaivawo neguchu remvura. Akadya akanwira mvura ndokurarazve." 
1Kings19:7 Mutumwa waTenzi akauyazve rwechipiri akamuzunza akati, “Muka udye, rwendo urwu rurefu kwauri.”" 
1Kings19:8 Akamuka akadya akanwira mvura. Nesimba rembuva iyoyo akagona kufamba siku nesikati kwamazuva makumi mana kuHorebhu, gomo raMwari." 
1Kings19:9 Ikoko akasvikira mubako ndokumbogaramo. Shoko raTenzi ndokubva rauya kwaari. Akati kwaari, “Uri kuiteiko pano Eriya?”" 
1Kings19:10 Akati, “Mumwoyo mangu ndakashungurudzwa zvokushungurudzwa zviye ndichishungurudzirwa imi Tenzi, Mwari wehondo nehondo nokuti vanhu veIsiraeri vakakanda pasi chitenderano chenyu, vakapunza atari dzenyu vakauraya vaporofita venyu namapakatwa. Iyeni kudai ndini ndoga ndasara, vari kutondivhima kuti vaparadze upenyu hwangu.”" 
1Kings19:11 Akati, “Buda undomira pagomo apo pana Tenzi.” Tenzi akapfuura nepo, dutu guru remhepo, rine simba rikatsemuranisa makomo rikapwanyanisa matombo pana Tenzi. Asi Tenzi akanga asiri mudutu imomo. Mushure medutu iri kwakave nokundengendeka kwenyika, asi Tenzi akanga asiri mukundengendeka ikoku." 
1Kings19:12 Mushure mokundengendeka kwakauya moto, asi Tenzi akanga asiri moto. Mushure memoto kwakanzwika izwi dete raitaura zvinyoronyoro." 
1Kings19:13 Eriya paakarinzwa akafugidza uso nehanzu yake akabuda ndokundomira pamusuo pebako. Izwi rikauya kwaari richiti, “Uri kuiteiko pano Eriya?”" 
1Kings19:14 Iye akati, “Mumwoyo mangu ndakashungurudzwa zvokushungurudzwa zviye ndichishungurudzirwa imi Tenzi, Mwari wehondo nehondo nokuti vanhu veIsiraeri vakakanda pasi chitenderano chenyu vakapunzira pasi atari, dzenyu vakauraya vaporofita venyu namapakatwa. Iyeni kudai ndini ndoga ndasara vari kutondivhima kuti vaparadze upenyu hwangu.”" 
1Kings19:15 Tenzi akamuti, “Chienda udzokere nokurenje reDhamasikusi ukange wasvikako unofanira kuzodza Hazaeri kuti ave mambo weSiria" 
1Kings19:16 uzodzewo Jehu mwanakomana waNimushi kuti ave mambo wokwaIsiraeri. Unofanirawo kuzodza Erisha mwanakomana waShafati wokuAbheromehora kuti ave muporofita panzvimbo pako. 
1Kings19:17 Anenge apunyuka mumapakatwa aHazaeri achaurayiwa naJehu, anopunyukawo bakatwa raJehu achiurayiwawo naErisha." 
1Kings19:18 Kunyange zvazvo zvakadaro ndichasiya zviuru zvinomwe zvavanhu muIsiraeri, vose zvavo vane mabvi asina kumbopfugamira Bhaari nomunhu wose ane muromo usina kumbomutsvoda.”" 
1Kings19:19 Saizvozvo Eriya akabva ipapo akandowana Erisha mwanakomana waShafati achirima aine nzombe dzakabopwa pamajoko gumi namaviri iye ari pane regumi nerechipiri racho. Eriya akapfuura nepaari akapaikira hanzu yake pana Erisha. 
1Kings19:20 Erisha akabva asiya nzombe dzacho ndokumhanyira kuna Eriya akati, “Regai ndimbondotsvoda ndichionekana nababa naamai vangu ndigoti ndokuteverai.” Akati kwaari, “Dzokera zvako, ko chii chandaita kwauri?”" 
1Kings19:21 Akati dzokei kwaakanga achimutevera ndokutora chipani chenzombe dzake mbiri ndokudziuraya ndokubika nyama yadzo joko ririro huni dzokubikisa ndokupa vanhu vakadya ndokusimuka otevera Eriya omushandira. 
1Kings20:1 Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria akaunganidza hondo yake yose akanga ana madzimambo makumi matatu namaviri aine mabhiza nengoro dzehondo. Akakwira kundokomba achirwisa Samaria. 
1Kings20:2 Akatumira nhume muguta kuna Ahabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri achimuti, “Zvanzi naBhenihadhadhi," 
1Kings20:3 ‘Sirivha yako nendarama yako ndezvangu. Vakadzi vako vakanakisisa ivavo pamwechete navana ndevangu.’ ” 
1Kings20:4 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akapindurawo achiti, “Hongu sokutaura kwamaita mambo changamire wangu, ini ndiri wenyu nazvose zvandinazvo ndezvenyu.”" 
1Kings20:5 Nhumwa dzakauyazve dzava kuti, “Zvanzi naBherihadhadhi, ‘Ndakakutumira nhume dzokuti undipe sirivha yako nendarama yako navakadzi vako navana vako.’" 
1Kings20:6 Kunyange zvakadaro mangwana panguva yakare ino iyi ndichatumira machinda angu achazotsvaga mumuzinda mako nomudzimba dzamakurukota ako vachikutorera zvinhu zvako zvepamwoyo.” 
1Kings20:7 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akadaidza vakuru vakuru vose venyika iyoyi akati, “Zvino cherechedzaiwo apa muone, muromo ndowaari kutsvaga munhu uyu nokuti akatumira nhume dzokuzonditorera vakadzi vangu navana vangu nesirivha yangu nendarama yangu, ini handina kuramba nazvo.”" 
1Kings20:8 Vakuru vakuru vose navanhu vose vakamuti, “Regai kuzviteerera kana kuzvibvuma.”" 
1Kings20:9 Ipapo Ahabhu akati kunhume dzaBhenihadhadhi, “Mondotaurira mambo changamire wangu kuti zvose zviya zvamataura pakutanga ndichazviita. Asi izviwo izvi handizviiti.” Nhumwa idzi dzakabvapo ndokumuigira mhinduro yacho." 
1Kings20:10 Bhenihadhadhi akatumirazve nhume kwaari dzichiti, “Chokwadi chaizvo vamwari ngavandione kana ndikasiya muSamaria muchine ivhu rokuti mumwe nomumwe wavanhu vanonditevera awane chanza chizere chevhu.”" 
1Kings20:11 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akapindurawo achiti “Mumuudze kuti, ‘Munhu anenge achipfeka hanzu yokuhondo yokuzvidzivirira nayo, ngaarege kuzvitutumadza somunhu abvako ava kutoikatanura.’ ”" 
1Kings20:12 Bhenihadhadhi paakanzwa mhinduro iyi achingunonwira-nwira zvake namadzishe mudumba, akati kuvarwi vake, “Mirai pamunofanira kuva.” Ivowo ndokundomira pavaifanira kuva kuti vachirwisa guta iri." 
1Kings20:13 Mumwe muporofita akabva asvikawo kuna Ahabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Uri kuona here mhomho yavanhu iyi?’ Chinzwa, ndichavaisa mumaoko ako nhasi uno kuti uzvizive kuti ndini Tenzi.”" 
1Kings20:14 Ahabhu akabva ati “Ndiani achatakudzwa basa iroro?” Iye akati, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ngariitwe nevechidiki vezvikwata zvavatongi vamatunhu.” Iyewo ndokuti, “Ndiani wacho achatanga kurwisa?” Iye akati, “Ndimi imimi.”" 
1Kings20:15 Ahabhu akaunganidza vechidiki vezvikwata zvavatongi vamatunhu, vaiva mazana maviri avanhu ane vanhu makumi matatu navaviri. Mushure maivava akaunganidza vanhu vose veIsiraeri zviuru zvinomwe zvavanhu." 
1Kings20:16 Vakaendako masikati zuva richirova nhongonya. Izvozvo Bhenihadhadhi achinwa zvake doro kutoraradza ari kumatendhe, iye namadzimambo aye makuni matatu ana vaviri aimubatsira." 
1Kings20:17 Vechidiki vezvikwata zvinotungamirirwa namasadunhu ndivo vakatanga kubuda. Bhenihadhadhi akatuma vanhu vakamutaurira kuti kuna vanhu vari kuuya uku vachibva kuSamaria. 
1Kings20:18 Iye akati, “Kana vachinge vavinga zvorugare uyai navo vari vapenyu, kunyange vari vavinga zvehondo uyai navo vari vapenyu.”" 
1Kings20:19 Saka vechidiki ivava vezvikwata zvinotungamirirwa namasadunhu vakabuda muguta vachiteverwa navarwi vehondo. 
1Kings20:20 Mumwe nomumwe akauraya wake. VaSiria ndokuti ware kutiza vaIsiraeriwo ndokudzingirirana navo. Asi Bhenihadhadhi akati kata pabhiza ndokupunyuka navamwewo vatasvi vamabhiza. 
1Kings20:21 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akavabudira akaparadza mabhiza nengoro dzehondo akakatakazha kuuraya vaSiria. 
1Kings20:22 Muporofita uya akaenda kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kwaari, “Chisungai dzisimbe munyatsoona zvimwe zvamungaite nokuti muchirimo, panguva yepfumvudza, mambo wokuSiria uyu achakudzokerai.”" 
1Kings20:23 Makurukota amambo wokuSiria akakurukurira mambo wavo vachiti, “Vamwari wavo ndavamwari vomumakomo ndokusaka vakaita simba kupinda isu. Asi dai kuri kuti tarwisana navo mubani, hatimborega kuvakurira." 
1Kings20:24 Chomoita ndechichi dai mukabvisa mambo oga oga pakutungamirira. Panzvimbo pavo muise vatungamiriri vehondo," 
1Kings20:25 mounganidzawo hondo yakangoita seyamakarasikirwa nayo, muchitsivanisa bhiza nebhiza, ngorowo nengoro tondorwisana navo mubani. Pakadaro hatimborega kuvakurira.” Akabvumirana nezvavakataura akaita saizvozvo." 
1Kings20:26 Kuzoti chava chirimo, panguva yepfumvudza, Bhenihadhadhi akaunganidza vaSiria akakwira kuApeki kundorwisa vokwaIsiraeri." 
1Kings20:27 Vanhu vokwaIsiraeri vakaunganidzwawo vakapiwa mbuva vakaenda kundovarwisa. VokwaIsiraeri vakadzika matendhe avo pakatarisa navo vachinge tumatanga tuviri twembudzi. Asi vaSiria vakazara nyika yose. 
1Kings20:28 Munhu waMwari akaenda kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kwaari, “Zvanzi naTenzi, pamusana pokuti vaSiria vakati, ‘Tenzi ndimwari womumakomo haasiri mwari womumapani, saka naizvozvo ndichaisa gurumwandira irori mumaoko ako kuti uzvizive kuti ndini Tenzi.’ ”" 
1Kings20:29 Vakapedza mazuva manomwe vari kumatendhe avo vakangotarisana. Pazuva rechinomwe racho vakabva vatanga kurwa. VokwaIsiraeri vakauraya zana rezviuru zvavarwi vetsoka vechiSiria pazuva rimwechete. 
1Kings20:30 Vamwe vose vakatizira muguta reAfeki, rusvingo rukawira makumi maviri ezviuru zvavarume zvina varume zviuru zvinomwe vokusara vaya. Bhenihadhadhi akatiza akandopinda mune imwe imba yomukati muguta umu." 
1Kings20:31 Makurukota ake akati kwaari, “Zvamunoonaka takanzwa zvichinzi madzimambo okwaIsiraeri madzimambo ane tsitsi. Ngatipfekei mitikisha yamasaga muchiuno netsungare dzetambo mumusoro tondozviturira kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri angangodaro akakuregai muri vapenyu.”" 
1Kings20:32 Saizvozvo vakapfeka mitikisha yamasaga muchiuno netsungare dzetambo mumusoro vakaenda kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri vakati, “Muranda wenyu Bhenihadhadhi ati, ‘Ingondiregaiwo zvenyu ndiri mupenyu.’ ” Iye ndokuti, “Achiri mupenyu here? Ihama yangu uye.”" 
1Kings20:33 Izvozvo varume ava vakanga vachicherechedza chiratidzo vakachiwana mukutaura kwake vakabva vakurumidza kuchishandisa vakati, “E-e Bhenihadhadhi ihama yenyu?” Iye ndokuti, “Endai muuye naye.” Akamuti akwire mungoro yehondo." 
1Kings20:34 Bhenihadhadhi akatiwo kwaari, “Maguta akatorerwa baba venyu nababa vangu ndichaadzosera kwamuri, muite zvenyu zvitoro muDhamasikusi sezvakaita baba vangu muSamaria.” Ahabhu akati, “Nezvatarongerana pano izvi, ndinokuregera zvako uende.” Naizvozvo akaita chibvumirano naye akabva amurega oenda zvake." 
1Kings20:35 Mumwe weboka ravaporofita, atumwa naTenzi, akati kune mumwe wake, “Ndirove.” Asi munhu iyeyo akaramba." 
1Kings20:36 Iye ndokubva amuti, “Chinzwa, pamusana pokuti waramba kuteerera zvarehwa naTenzi paunongobva chete pandiri pano uchaurayiwa neshumba.” Paakangobva paiva nomunhu uya shumba yakasangana naye ikamuuraya." 
1Kings20:37 Muporofita uya akasanganazve nomumwe munhu akati, “Ndapota ndirovewo.” Murume uyu akamurova akamukuvadza." 
1Kings20:38 Muporofita uyu akabva ipapo akandomirira mambo panzira akazvivanziridza kuita sokunge mumwewo munhu ane bhandhiji rakasungwa pamusoro pemaziso. 
1Kings20:39 Pakanga pava kupfuura mambo akadaidzira kuna mambo achiti, “Ini muranda wenyu ndakapinda mukati mayo hondo ichirwiwa, ndiye onei murwi wehondo auya kwandiri nomunhu akanditi, ‘Chengeta munhu uyu, akangoshayikwa chete upenyu hwake hunotoripwa norufu rwako kana kuti unoripa zviuru zvitatu zvemari yesirivha.’" 
1Kings20:40 “Pandakanga ndati batikanei nebasa munhu uye ndopaakandiverera.” Mambo wokwaIsiraeri ndokumuti, “Kutongwa kwako kuchava ndikoko, sokutaura kwawaita.”" 
1Kings20:41 Akabva akurumidza kubvisa bhandhiji riye pamusoro pamaziso ake pakarepo mambo wokwaIsiraeri akabva amuziva kuti mumwe wavaporofita. 
1Kings20:42 Akabva ati kuna mambo, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Pamusana pokuti wakatorega zvako iwe munhu wandakanga ndatemera kuparadzwa akatoenda zvake, naizvozvo kuva mupenyu kwake kuchatoripwa norufu rwako vanhuwo vake vachiripwa noupenyu hwavanhu vako.’ ”" 
1Kings20:43 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akaenda kumuzinda kwake atsamwa ashatirwa akasvika kuSamaria. 
1Kings21:1 Mushure maizvozvi chakazoitikawo ndechokuti, mumwe murume womuJezirieri ainzi Nabhoti aiva nomunda wemagirepisi muJezirieri imomo wakanga wakaganhurana nomuzinda waAhabhu mambo weSamaria." 
1Kings21:2 Ahabhu akazoti kuna Nabhoti uyu, “Munda wako zvauri pedyo nomuzinda wangu, dai wandipa munda iwoyo ndachiuita munda wangu womuriwo ndigokupa mumwe munda wemagirepisi wakapinda iwoyu kunaka, kana wada ndokupa iri mari yokuutenga.”" 
1Kings21:3 Asi Nabhoti ndokuti kuna Ahabhu, “Tenzi ngaandibatsire. Hazvingamboitika kuti ndikupei nhaka yamadzibaba angu.”" 
1Kings21:4 Ahabhu akapinda mumuzinda make atsamwa ashatirwa pamusana pemhinduro yaakapiwa naNabhoti wokuJezirieri nokuti akanga ati, “Hazvingamboitika kuti ndikupei nhaka yamadzibaba angu.” Ndokubva andoti pamubhedha wake bhi-i kurara akatarisa rutivi ndokuramwa zvokudya." 
1Kings21:5 Asi mukadzi wake Jezebhero akaenda paari akamuti, “Ko kutsamwa kudai zvaita sei? Kubva matoramwa chokudya!”" 
1Kings21:6 Ahabhu akamupindura achiti, “Ndataura ini naNabhoti uyu womuJezirieri muno. Ndokumuti nditengesere munda wako nemari. Kana kuti ndokupa mumwe munda wemagirepisi kana uchida. Nabhoti anditi, ‘Handikupei munda wangu.’ ”" 
1Kings21:7 Mudzimai wake Jezebhero akamuti “Muchiri kutonga Isiraeri iyemi? Timukirei zvedu apa mudye zvokudya, mwoyo wenyu usununguke. Ndichakupai ini munda wemagirepisi iwoyo waNabhoti womuJezirieri muno.”" 
1Kings21:8 Ipapo mukadzi uyu akanyora tsamba muzita raAhabhu ndokudzidhindha nechidhindho chake iye Ahabhu. Akatumira tsamba idzodzo kuvakuru vakuru nokune vokumba huru vakanga vagere kumwechete naNabhoti muguta rokwako. 
1Kings21:9 Mutsamba idzodzi akanyora kuti, “Itii vanhu vatsanye muti Nabhoti agare mberi kwevanhu," 
1Kings21:10 mugarisewo mamwewo madzenga maviri pakadarowo apo akatarisana naye amupomere mhosva achiti, ‘Nabhoti akashora Mwari akashorawo mambo. Munozobuda naye kunze momutema namabwe afe.’ ”" 
1Kings21:11 Varume vomuguta rokwake navakuru vakuru nevokumba huru vaigara muguta rokwake iri vakaita sokutaurirwa kwavakanga vaitwa naJezebhero. Saizvozvowo sokunyorwa kwazvakanga zvakaita mutsamba dzavakatumirwa nomukadzi uyu," 
1Kings21:12 vakati vanhu vatsanye vakagarisa Nabhoti mberi kwevanhu. 
1Kings21:13 Madzenga maviri aya akapinda akagara akatarisana naye. Madzenga aya akapomera Nabhoti mhosva vanhu vachinzwa achiti, “Nabhoti akashonha Mwari, akashora mambo.” Ndokubva vamuburitsa kunze kweguta vakamutema namabwe akafa." 
1Kings21:14 Vakavatumira shoko kuna Jezebhero rokuti, “Nabhoti atemwa namatombo afa.”" 
1Kings21:15 Jezebhero akati achinzwa kuti Nabhoti akatemwa namabwe akafa, Jezebhero akati kuna Ahabhu, “Chisimukai zvenyu mundotora munda wemagirepisi waNabhoti womuJezirieri muno waakaramba kukupai kukutengeserai nemari.”" 
1Kings21:16 Ahabhu paakangonzwa kuti Nabhoti afa, akasimuka ndokudzika kumunda uya waNabhoti womuJezirieri imomo kundoukambira." 
1Kings21:17 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Eriya wokuTishibhi richiti," 
1Kings21:18 “Simuka udzike undosangana naAhabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri ari kuSamaria. Kutaura kuno ari mumunda waNabhoti waaenda kundokambira. 
1Kings21:19 Unofanira kumuudza kuti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Waurayaka munhu iwe ukakambira munda wake?’ Umutaurire kuti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Panzvimbo iyoyo pananzwa ropa raNabhoti nembwa, imbwa dzichananzwawo ropa rako.’ ”" 
1Kings21:20 Ahabhu akati kuna Eriya, “Heya muvengi wangu wandiwana panoka iwe!” Iye akapindura achiti, “Heeka ndakuwanikidzai, matozvitengesaka izvozvi nokuita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi." 
1Kings21:21 Chinzwa, ndava kutoita kuti iwe uwirwe nenhamo ndikutsakatise ndipedze muIsiraeri nokuuraya munhurume wose womumba mako iwe Ahabhu, muranda kana asiri muranda." 
1Kings21:22 Imba yako ndichaiita hwemba yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati uye hwemba yaBhaasha mwanakomana waAhiya pamusana pokundivirutsa nehasha kwawakaita uyewo nokuparisa kwawakaita Isiraeri chitadzo.” 
1Kings21:23 Tenzi akataurawo nezvaJezebhero achiti, “Imbwa dzichadya Jezebhero munharaunda yomuJezirieri muno." 
1Kings21:24 Munhu ari wose zvake wokwaAhabhu anofira muguta, achadyiwa nembwa; nouyowo anofira musango, achadyiwa neshiri dzedenga.”" 
1Kings21:25 Hakuna mumwe munhu akambozvitengesa nokuita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi saAhabhu achirunzirwa nomukadzi wake Jezebhero. 
1Kings21:26 Akaita zvinosemesa kwazvo zvokuteveredza zvifananidzo zvokunamata sezvaimboitwa nevaAmori vaya vanyakudzingirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi. 
1Kings21:27 Pakanzwa Ahabhu mazwi aya, akabvarura hanzu dzake akapfeka pamuviri masaga ndokutsanya orara zvino akapfeka masaga ongomhemhaira kufamba akati una una kuzvirereka." 
1Kings21:28 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Eriya wokuTishibhi richiti," 
1Kings21:29 “Waonawo here kuzvirereka kwandava kuitirwa naAhabhu? Pamusana pokuzvirereka uku kwaaita kwandiri, nhamo iya handichaiunza pamazuva oupenyu hwake, asi ndichaunza nhamo yacho mumba make pamazuva emwanakomana wake.”" 
1Kings22:1 Kwakapera makore matatu ose nyika yeSiria neyeIsiraeri dzisina kurwisana. 
1Kings22:2 Asi mugore rechitatu racho Jehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha akadzika kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri. 
1Kings22:3 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akakurukura namakurukota ake achiti, “Zviye munoziva here kuti guta reRamotigireadhi nderedu. Asi isu toramba here takangonyarara tisingaritorere mambo weSiria.”" 
1Kings22:4 Ahabhu akabva ati kuna Jehoshafati, “Hamungaende here neni kuhondo kundorwisa guta reRamotigireadhi?” Jehoshafati akapindura achiti, “Inga tiri vamwechete wani, vanhu vangu vanongovawo vanhu venyu uye mabhiza angu anongovawo mabhiza enyu.”" 
1Kings22:5 Jehoshafati ndokuti kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri, “Madii kutanga manzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo?”" 
1Kings22:6 Ipapo mambo wokwaIsiraeri akaunganidza vaporofita vainge voda kusvika mazana mana akavati, “Ndoenda here kundorwisa guta reRamotigireadhi kana kuti ndorega zvangu?” Ivo ndokuti, “Endai zvenyu nokuti Tenzi achariisa mumaoko amambo.”" 
1Kings22:7 Asi Jehoshafati akati, “Hapana here mumwe muporofita waTenzi watingabvunze?”" 
1Kings22:8 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Pachine mumwe murume mumwechete watinganzwe naye kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo. NdiMikaya mwanakomana waImura. Asi ini ndinomuvenga nokuti haamboporofita zvakanaka nezvangu asi zvakaipa chete.” Jehoshafati ndokuti, “Dai mukarega kutaura muchidaro mambo.”" 
1Kings22:9 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akadaidza rimwe gurukota ndokuriti, “Kurumidza kuunza pano Mikaya mwanakomana waImura.”" 
1Kings22:10 Izvozvo mambo wokwaIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha vakanga vagere pazvigaro zvavo zvoumambo vakapfeka magemenzi avo oumambo, panhandare pasuo guru rokupinda muSamaria. Izvozvo vaporofita vose vainge vachitoporofita vari pamberi pavo." 
1Kings22:11 Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaana akazvigadzirira nyanga dzesimbi ndokuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Nenyanga idzi uchatunga nadzo vaSiria kusvikira vaparadzwa.’ ”" 
1Kings22:12 Vaporofita vose ndozvavakaporofitawo izvozvo vachiti, “Kwidzai zvenyu kuguta reRamotigireadhi mundokurira. Tenzi achariisa mumaoko amambo.”" 
1Kings22:13 Nhumwa yakaenda kundodaidza Mikaya yakamuti, “Chinzwaika, vaporofita vose shoko ravari kutaura rimwechete rokuti zvinhu zvichandonakira mambo uku. Saka imimi dai zvamuchandotaura zvikafananawo nezviri kutaurwa ikoko zvivewo zvakanaka.”" 
1Kings22:14 Asi Mikaya akati, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu kuti zvandinenge ndaudzwa naTenzi izvozvo ndozvandichataura.”" 
1Kings22:15 Paakasvika pana mambo, mambo akamubvunza kuti, “Nhai Mikaya toenda here kundorwisa guta reRamotigireadhi kana kuti torega zvedu?” Iye akapindura achiti, “A endai zvenyuka mundokundaka, Tenzi achariisaka mumaoko amambo.”" 
1Kings22:16 Mambo ndokumuti, “Unoda kuti ndikupikise kangani kunditaurira chokwadi muzita raTenzi.”" 
1Kings22:17 Iye ndokuti, “Ndaona Isiraeri yose yaita bararamhanya mumakomo sehwai dzisisina mufudzi. Tenzi akati, ‘Ivava ava, havasisina vanatenzi vavo. Munhu wose ngaadzokere zvake kumusha kwake murugare.’ ”" 
1Kings22:18 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Ndozvandambokuudzai wani kuti haaporofite zvakanaka nezvangu, asi zvakaipa chete.”" 
1Kings22:19 Mikaya akati, “Chinzwai zviri kutaurwa naTenzi. Ndaona Tenzi agere pachigaro chake choumambo akakutwa negurusvusvu rehondo dzose dzokudenga kurudyi nokuruboshwe." 
1Kings22:20 Tenzi ati, ‘Ndiyani angaende zvake akafurira Ahabhu kuti aende kuguta reRamoti kuGireadhi andopararirako?’ Vadomatoma vachitaura twakasiyana-siyana." 
1Kings22:21 Ndokubva kwauya mumwe mweya ukamira pana Tenzi ukati, ‘Ini zvangu ndinondomufurira.’" 
1Kings22:22 Tenzi akabva auti, ‘Unondomufurira sei?’ Iwo ndokuti, ‘Ndinoenda zvangu ndondova mweya wokunyepa mumuromo yavaporofita vake vose.’ Iye ndokuti, ‘Enda undomufurira uchazvigona. Chienda uite saizvozvo.’" 
1Kings22:23 Naizvozvo chinzwai Tenzi aisa mweya wokunyepa mumuromo yavaporofita venyu vose. Pamatemerwa naTenzi pakaoma.” 
1Kings22:24 Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaana akaswedera munyasi maMikaya ndokumudzemura nembama padama akati, “Mweya waTenzi wabva sei mandiri uchiuya kuzotaura kwauri?”" 
1Kings22:25 Mikaya akati, “Chinzwaka, uchazvionera zvako musi wauchatizira mumba yomukati kundohwanda.”" 
1Kings22:26 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri ndokuti, “Batai Mikaya uyu mudzokere naye kuna Amoni mutongi weguta rino, kuna Joashi mwanakomana wamambo muti," 
1Kings22:27 zvanzi namambo, pfigirai muchinda uyu mujeri mumupe chokudya nemvura zvokudzora mwoyo chete kudzamara ini ndadzokawo zvakanaka.”" 
1Kings22:28 Mikaya akati, “Kana mukadzoka zvakanaka, Tenzi anenge asina kutaurawo nemandiri.” Ndokubvawo ati, “Zvinzweiwo vanhu mose!”" 
1Kings22:29 Saizvozvo mambo wokwaIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha vakakwidza kuguta reRamotigireadhi. 
1Kings22:30 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Ndichazvivanziridza kuita sokunge mumwewo munhu ndipindewo mukati mokurwa asi imi mopfeka magemenzi enyu oumambo.” Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akazvivanziridza akaita sokunge mumwewo munhu, ndokubva apindawo mukati mehondo." 
1Kings22:31 Izvozvo mambo weSiria akanga afanoudza vakuru vakuru makumi matatu ana vaviri vengoro dzehondo kuti, “Regai zvenyu kuzvinetsa kuswerorwisa vakuru vakuru kana vadiki zvavo asi ingonanganai namambo wokwaIsiraeri.”" 
1Kings22:32 Vakuru vakuru vengoro dzehondo vaya pavakaona Jehoshafati vakati, “Ndiyeyu chete mambo wokwaIsiraeri.” Ndokubva vati naye tande kumurwisa, Jehoshafati ndokubva aridza mhere." 
1Kings22:33 Pakaona vakuru vakuru vaye kuti haasiriye mambo wokwaIsiraeri vakabva varega kumudzingirira. 
1Kings22:34 Asi mumwe murume akangokandawo museve ukabaya mambo wokwaIsiraeri nechepakati pedemautare rapadundundu rokuzvidzivirira naro, naizvozvo akati kumuchairi wengoro yake yehondo, “Chitendeuka unditakurire kunze hwehondo. Ndakuvadzwa ini!”" 
1Kings22:35 Hondo yakatsviriridza musi iwoyo, mambo ndokuramba akatsigirirwa ari mungoro yake yehondo akatarisa kuvaSiria kusvikira kumanheru ndokubva afa. Ropa reronda iri rakayererera pasi mungoro yehondo imomo." 
1Kings22:36 Kuzoti zuva rodoka kwakadaidzirwa muhondo imomo zvichinzi, “Munhu wose ngaazive kuguta rokwake, munhu wose kunyika kwake.”" 
1Kings22:37 Saizvozvo mambo akafa akaendwa naye kuSamaria vakaviga mambo muSamaria. 
1Kings22:38 Vakasukira ngoro yacho yehondo pane rimwe dziva romuSamaria, imbwa dzikananzva zvadzo ropa rake, pfambi dzikazvishambidza zvadzo imomo maererano neshoko raTenzi raakanga afanotaura." 
1Kings22:39 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAhabhu nezvinhu zvose zvaakaita nemba yomunyanga wenzou yaakavaka namaguta ose aakavaka, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
1Kings22:40 Naizvozvo Ahabhu akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake, Ahaziya mwanakomana wake ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Kings22:41 Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAsa akatangisa kutonga kwaJudha mugore rechina rokutonga kwaAhabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri. 
1Kings22:42 Jehoshafati akanga ava namakore makumi matatu namashanu paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore makumi maviri namashanu ari muJerusaremu. Amai vake vainzi Azubha mwanasikana waShirihi. 
1Kings22:43 Jehoshafati uyu akatevera makwara ose ababa vake Asa asingambotsaukamo achiita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi. Zvakadaro zvazvo nzvimbo dziye dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira hadzina kubviswa, vanhu vakaramba vachingopira zvibayiro nokupisawo rusenzi panzvimbo idzodzo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira." 
1Kings22:44 Pakati paJehoshafati namambo wokwaIsiraeri paiva norunyararo. 
1Kings22:45 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehoshafati nougamba hwake hwaaiita nokurwa hondo kwaaiita, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha." 
1Kings22:46 Mhombwe dzaiita basa radzo irori mune zvokunamata dzakanga dzasaririra panguva yababa vake Asa akadzipedza kuuraya munyika. 
1Kings22:47 Izvozvo kuEdhomu kwaiva kusina mambo kuchingova nomumiririri. 
1Kings22:48 Jehoshafati akagadzira ngarava dzokuTarishishi dzokuenda nadzo kundotora ndarama kuOfiri. Asi havana kuzoendako nokuti ngarava dzakapararira kuEzionigebheru. 
1Kings22:49 Ahaziya mwanakomana waAhabhu ndokuti kuna Jehoshafati, “Regai zvenyu machinda angu aende namachinda enyu mungarava idzi,” asi Jehoshafati haana kuda." 
1Kings22:50 Jehoshafati akazovata oendawo kwakenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake, akavigwa pakavigwa madzibaba ake muguta ratateguru wake Dhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake Jehoramu akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Kings22:51 Ahaziya mwanakomana waAhabhu akatanga kutonga kwaIsiraeri ari muSamaria mugore regumi nechinomwe rokutonga kwaJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha. Akatonga kwaIsiraeri kwamakore maviri. 
1Kings22:52 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi akafamba mugwara rababa vake uye mugwara raamai vake uyewo mugwara raJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati akaparisa Isiraeri chitadzo. 
1Kings22:53 Ainamata Bhaari achimupfugamira akashatirisa Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri nezvinhu zvose zvaiitwa nababa vake." 
2Kings1:1 Mushure morufu rwaAhabhu, Moabhu yakapandukira Isiraeri." 
2Kings1:2 Zvino Ahaziya akadonha pamba yake yepamusoro muSamaria napaiva namapango akarukaniswa akaitwa zvokupiyaniswa akabva arwara, nezvo akatuma nhume akadziti, “Endai mundibvunzirewo kuna Bhaarizebhubhu mwari weEkironi ndizive kuti ndichapora here paurwere uhu.”" 
2Kings1:3 Asi mutumwa waTenzi akati kuna Eriya wokuTishibhi, “Simuka ukwidze kundosangana nenhume dzamambo weSamaria uti kwavari, ‘Zvareva kuti muIsiraeri hamusisina Mwari here zvomoenda kundobvunzira kuna Bhaarizebhubhu mwari weEkironi?’" 
2Kings1:4 Saka naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Hausi kuzoburuka pamubhedha pacho pawava uchatofa chete.’ ” Eriya ndokuenda zvake." 
2Kings1:5 Nhume dzakadzokera kuna mambo, iye ndokuti kwadziri, “Ko madzokerei?”" 
2Kings1:6 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Kwauya mumwe murume asangana nesu akatiti, ‘Dzokerai kuna mambo akutumai mumuti,’ zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Zvareva kuti muIsiraeri hamusisina Mwari here zvomoenda kundobvunzira kuna Bhaarizebhubhu mwari weEkironi? Naizvozvo hausi kuzoburuka pamubhedha pacho pawava, unotofa chete.’ ”" 
2Kings1:7 Iye akavati, “Ko anga ari murume akaita sei asangana nemi akakutaurirai izvozvi?”" 
2Kings1:8 Ivo vakamupindura vachiti, “Anga akapfeka nguo dzine mvere nebhande reganda muchiuno.” Mambo ndokuti, “NdiEriya chete wokuTishibhi.”" 
2Kings1:9 Mambo akabva atuma kwaari mutungamiriri wechikwata chamakumi mashanu avarwi aine varwi vake vacho makumi mashanu. Akakwira kuna Eriya akanga agere pamusoro pechikomo akati kwaari, “Iwe munhu waMwari mambo ati, ‘Buruka apo.’ ”" 
2Kings1:10 Asi Eriya akapindura mutungamiri uyu wechikwata chamakumi mashanu avarwi achiti, “Kana ini ndiri munhu waMwari moto ngautozomoke kudenga uparadze iyewe namakumi mashanu ako.” Moto ndokutozomoka kudenga ndokumuroromesa iye namakumi mashanu ake." 
2Kings1:11 Mambo akatumazve kwaari mumwe mutungamiriri wechikwata chamakumi mashanu avarwi aine varwiwo vake vacho makumi mashanu. Uyu akandomutaurira achiti, “Iwe munhu waMwari iwe, zvanzi namambo, ‘Buruka nokukurumidza.’ ”" 
2Kings1:12 Asi Eriya akavapindura achiti, “Kana ini ndiri munhu waMwari, moto ngautozomoke kudenga uparadze iyewe namakumi mashanu ako.” Moto waMwari wakatozomoka kudenga ndokumuroromesa iye namakumi mashanu ake." 
2Kings1:13 Mambo akatuma zvakare kwaari mumwe mutungamiriri wechitatu namakumi akewo mashanu. Mutungamiriri wechitatu uyu wechikwata chamamwewo makumi mashanu akakwira akasvikopfugama mberi kwaEriya akamuteterera achiti kwaari, “Ndapota munhu waMwari, ndiri kukumbirawo kuti mubatewo upenyu hwangu noupenyu hwavaranda venyu ava makumi mashanu sechinhu chine maturo kwamuri." 
2Kings1:14 Hezvi moto wakatozomoka kudenga ukaroromesa vatungamiriri vaye vaviri vezvikwata zvavarwi zvaiva makumi mashanu makumi mashanu pamwechete navanhu vavo, zvino ingobataiwo waro upenyu hwangu sechinhu china maturo kwamuri.”" 
2Kings1:15 Mutumwa waTenzi ndokubva ati kuna Eriya, “Dzika zvako naye, usamutye.” Saizvozvo akasimuka akadzika naye kuna mambo" 
2Kings1:16 akati kuna mambo, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Wakatumaka iwe nhume kundobvunzira kuna Bhaarizebhubhu mwari weEkironi, zvinoreva here kuti muIsiraeri muno hamusisina Mwari wokunzwa kuti anoti kudii nazvo? Naizvozvo hausi kuzoburuka pamubhedha pacho pawava, uchatopafa chete.’ ”" 
2Kings1:17 Saizvozvo akafa sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi nomuromo waEriya, munun'una wake Jehoramu ndiye akava mambo panzvimbo pake sezvo Ahaziya uyu akanga asina mwana mukomana. Izvozvo makanga muri mugore rechipiri rokutongawo kwaJehoramu mwanakomana waJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha." 
2Kings1:18 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAhaziya dzezvaakaita dzakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo raMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
2Kings2:1 Kuzoti zvino Tenzi oda kukwidza Eriya kudenga nechinyamupupuri, Eriya naErisha vakanga vari murwendo rwokubva kuGirigari." 
2Kings2:2 Eriya akati kuna Erisha, “Wombosara zvako pano nokuti Tenzi andituma kuBhetieri uko.” Asi Erisha akati, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu kana ndimiwo zvenyu muripo kudai hazvimboitika kuti ndikusiyei.”" 
2Kings2:3 Nokudaro vakadzika kuBhetieri. Vaporofita vaiva kuBhetieri vakauya kuna Erisha vakati kwaari, “Muri kuzviziva here kuti Tenzi achakutorerai tenzi wenyu nhasi uno?” Iye akati, “E-e ndiri kuzviziva zvangu. Dai mukanyarara zvenyu.”" 
2Kings2:4 Eriya akamutizve, “Wombosara zvako pano nokuti Tenzi andituma kuJeriko.” Asi iye akati, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu kana ndimiwo zvenyu muripo kudai, kukusiyai hazvimboitiki.” Vakabva vaenda kuJeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Vaporofita vaiva muJeriko vakauya kuna Erisha vakati kwaari, “Muri kuzviziva here kuti Tenzi achakutorerai tenzi wenyu nhasi?” Iye akati, “E-e ndiri kuzviziva zvangu. Dai mukanyarara zvenyu.”" 
2Kings2:6 Eriya akabva amuti, “Wombosara zvako pano nokuti Tenzi andituma kuna Jorodhani.” Asi iye akati, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu kana ndimiwo zvenyu muripo kudai, kukusiyai hazvimboitiki.” Nokudaro vakaenda vari vose pauviri hwavo." 
2Kings2:7 Kwakaendawo makumi mashanu eveboka avaporofita vakamira vari chinhambwe navo ivo vakamirawo pamahombekombe aJorodhani. 
2Kings2:8 Eriya akatora hanzu yake ndokuimona ndokurova pamvura nayo. Mvura yakabva yakamukana zvokuti imwe uku imwe uku, vose vari vaviri vakayambuka vachitsika pasi pakaoma." 
2Kings2:9 Kuzoti vayambuka Eriya akati kuna Erisha, “Nditaurire chaungade kuti ndikuitire ndisati ndatorwa kubva kwauri.” Erisha akati, “Ndapota zvangu dai mukangondisiirawo senhaka mweya wenyu uine simba rakapetwa kaviri.”" 
2Kings2:10 Iye ndokuti, “Chawakumbira ichi chinhu chakaoma. Zvisinei zvazvo kutorwa kwandichaitwa kana ndikatorwa uchiona zvichaitwa saizvozvo kwauri, asi kana ndikatorwa usiri kuona hazvizoitika saizvozvo.”" 
2Kings2:11 Pavakanga vachifamba vachitaura kudaro, ngoro yehondo yomoto namabhiza omoto ndiye vhu vakabva vaparadzaniswa vose vari vaviri. Eriya ndokubva atututswa nechinyamupupuri kuenda kudenga." 
2Kings2:12 Erisha akazviona ndokudaidzira achiti, “Baba wangu, baba wangu! Ngoro dzemabhiza dzehondo dzeIsiraeri navachairi vadzo!” Erisha haana kuzomuonazve. Erisha akabata hanzu dzake pachake ndokubva adzibvarura napakati." 
2Kings2:13 Akanonga hanzu yakanga yadonhedzwa naEriya ndokudzoka ondomira pamahombekombe aJorodhani. 
2Kings2:14 Akatora hanzu yakanga yadonhedzwa naEriya iya ndokurova nayo mvura achiti, “Tenzi, Mwari waEriya aripi?” Paakarova mvura iyi, mvura yacho yakabva yakamukana zvokuti imwe uku imwe uku, ndokubva Erisha ayambuka." 
2Kings2:15 Zvino vechikwata chavaporofita vaiva paJeriko vaimuona vari mhiri vakati, “Mweya waEriya wava pana Erisha.” Vakaenda kundochingurana naye vakamugwadamira." 
2Kings2:16 Vakati kwaari, “Onaika, isu varanda venyu tine makumi mashanu avanahu, dai mukarega zvenyu vaende kundotsvaga tenzi wenyu, dzimwe nguva Mweya waTenzi wamusimudza ukasiya wamukanda pamusoro pegomo kana mumupata.” Akati, “Regai zvenyu kuvatuma.”" 
2Kings2:17 Asi pavakaramba vachigombedzera akazoti, “Vatumei zvenyu.” Saizvozvo vakatumira makumi mashanu avarume. Vakamutsvaga kwamazuva matatu, asi havana kumuwana." 
2Kings2:18 Vakaenda kuna Erisha kuJeriko kwaakanga amboti zvake mire mirei ariko, akati kwavari, “Handina kukuudzai here kuti regai kuenda?”" 
2Kings2:19 Vanhu veguta iroro vakati kuna Erisha, “Changamire, sezvamunongoonawo, guta redu iri rakavakirwa pakanaka kwazvo asi chakaipa imvura yacho, uye ivhu racho harina charinopa.”" 
2Kings2:20 Erisha akati, “Ndiunzirei kuno ndiro itsva muise munyu mairi.” Saka vakaenda nayo kwaari." 
2Kings2:21 Akaenda kuchisipiti chemvura yacho ndokudira munyu mairi achiti, “Zvanzi naTenzi ndarapa mvura iyi. Kubvira zvino, hapana rufu kana kushaika kwezvinoberekwa kuchazobva mairi.”" 
2Kings2:22 Mvura iyoyo yakabva yarapwa kusvikira pari nhasi, maererano nezvakataurwa naErisha." 
2Kings2:23 Erisha akabvapo okwidza kuenda kuBhetieri. Paakanga ari munzira kuendako, vakomana vadikidiki vakabuda muguta vakamusveeredza vachiti, “Tibvire pano nyamhanza! Tibvire pano nyamhanza!”" 
2Kings2:24 Akatendeuka, paakavaona akarengerera rushambwa nezita raTenzi. Mapere maviri makadzi akabuda musango akabvambura-bvambura makumi mana navaviri avakomana ivavo." 
2Kings2:25 Abva ipapo akaenda kugomo reKarimero, ndokubva azodzokera kuSamaria." 
2Kings3:1 Mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwaJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha Jehoramu mwanakomana waAhabhu akava mambo kuSamaria. Akatonga kwamakore gumi namaviri. 
2Kings3:2 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi, chete hazvina kunge zvakaipa sezvababa naamai vake nokuti akabvisa dombo raimiririra Bhaari rakanga rakavezwa nababa vake." 
2Kings3:3 Asi akazongoramba ongoti kwatiwo nechitadzo chaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati chaakanga apinza nacho vokwaIsiraeri muchitadzo, haana kuchikanda pasi." 
2Kings3:4 Izvozvo Mesha mambo weMoabhu aipfuya hwai. Zvino aifanira kuendesa kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri zviuru zvinokwana zana zvehwayana newuru yaiveurwa pahondohwe zviuru zana. 
2Kings3:5 Asi mambo weMoabhu pakangofa Ahabhu, akabva apandukira mambo wekwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings3:6 Mambo Jehoramu akabva abuda muSamaria panguva iyoyo akaunganidza vokwaIsiraeri vose. 
2Kings3:7 Akandotumira shoko kuna Jehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha rokuti, “Kuno uku mambo weMoabhu akandipandukira. Hamungaendewo here neni kuhondo kundorwisa Moabhu?” Iye akati, “Handei zvedu. Inga tiri vamwechete wani, vanhu vangu vanongovawo vanhu venyu uye mabhiza angu, mabhiza enyu.”" 
2Kings3:8 Akatiwo, “Toenda nokupi?” Jehoramu ndokuti, “Nokugwenga rokuEdhomu.”" 
2Kings3:9 Saizvozvo mambo wokwaIsiraeri akaenda namambo wokwaJudha namambo weEdhomu. Kuzoti vapotereka kwamazuva manomwe hondo yavarwi nezvipfuwo zvayaitinhana nazvo yakashaya mvura. 
2Kings3:10 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri ndokuti, “O babawe kani! Tenzi aunganidza madzimambo matatu aya kuzoaisa mumaoko eMoabhu nhai.”" 
2Kings3:11 Jehoshafati akabva ati, “Ko kuno uku hakuna here muporofita waTenzi watinganzwe kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo?” Rimwe jinda ramambo wokwaIsiraeri rakapindura richiti, “Kuno uku kuna Erisha mwanakomana waShafati aiva wokuchingidza Eriya mvura.”" 
2Kings3:12 Jehoshafati ndokubva ati, “Iyeyo ndiye munhu wacho ane dama raTenzi.” Saizvozvo mambo wokwaIsiraeri naJehoshafati namambo weEdhomu vakadzika ikoko kwaari." 
2Kings3:13 Erisha akati kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri, “Ndinei newe iwe! Endaka kuvaporofita vokwababa vako nokuvaporofita vokwaamai vako.” Mambo wokwaIsiraeri ndokupindura achiti kwaari, “A-a hapana kani! Chatauyisirwa kuno naTenzi iyesu madzimambo matatu kuti tiiswe mumaoko eMoabhu chete!”" 
2Kings3:14 Erisha akati, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu ane gurusvusvu rehondo wandinonamata kuti dai, kusiri kuti ndatonyara zvangu mambo wokwaJudha uyu Jehoshafati, ndingadai ndatorega zvangu kukucheuka kana kukutarisa zvako." 
2Kings3:15 Chindiunziraiwo pano munhu wokuridza chipendani.” Munhu wechipendani wacho paaichiridza kudaro simba raTenzi rakauya pana Erisha. 
2Kings3:16 Erisha akati, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Ndichaita kuti kakova aka kakati papata kuoma kudai kati pamupamu kuzara namadziva emvura.’" 
2Kings3:17 Nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Mvura yokunaya kana mhepo hamusi kuzozviona asi kakova ikaka kachati pamupamu kuzara nemvura zvokuti munwe imi nemombe dzenyu nezvipfuwo zvenyu.’" 
2Kings3:18 Asi kanhu kadiki kwazvo pana Tenzi. Achaisawo vanhu veMoabhu mumaoko enyu 
2Kings3:19 mugokurira guta rimwe nerimwe rakavakirirwa norusvingo neguta rose rose ravo repamwoyo, muti wose zvawo wakanaka muchirizha, matsime ose emvura muchifushira, ndimo dzose mudzitutire matombo.”" 
2Kings3:20 Ramangwana acho mangwanani, panguva yokupira chibayiro, heino mvura ikati youya ichiyerera nokuEdhomu kusvikira nyika yose iyoyo yachiti fasha nemvura." 
2Kings3:21 VaMoabhu vose pavakanzwa kuti madzimambo iwayo akanga akwira ikoko kuzovarwisa, vakakokorodza wose aigona kupfeka chidemautare kubvira kuvadukuduku kusvikira kuvakuru vakavaronganisa kumuganhu wenyika iyoyo." 
2Kings3:22 Pavakafumomuka mangwanani acho zuva rakavheneka pamvura paya, vaMoabhu vakatarisa kumvura iyi iri pakatarisana napavaiva onei yakati piriviri kutsvuka seropa" 
2Kings3:23 vakati, “Inga iropa iro. Madzimambo aye arwisana chete akaurayana. Saka zvino vaMoabhu we-e, handei kundopamba zvinhu!”" 
2Kings3:24 Asi pavakasvika kumatendhe eIsiraeri, vaIsiraeri vakamuka vakarwisa vaMoabhu kusvikira vavatiza. Vakabva vati navo navo vachirakatisa kuuraya vaMoabhu mukudzingirirana navo ikoku." 
2Kings3:25 Vakakurira maguta acho. Pandimo yose zvayo munhu wose akakandapo dombo, pakasara pati ware ware nawo, vakafushira matsime ose vakarizha miti yose yakanaka kusvikira matombo eko angosara kuguta reKirihareseti. Varwi vokurwisa nezvimviriri vakarikomberana vakarikurira." 
2Kings3:26 Pakaona mambo weMoabhu kuti hondo yamuipira akatorana namazana manomwe avarwi vemapakatwa woda kupukunyuka nepana mambo weEdhomu asi havana kuzvigona. 
2Kings3:27 Ndopaakazobata mwana wake mukomana akanga ariye wokuzotonga pachinzvimbo pake akamupira parusvingo sechibayiro chokupisa. Izvozvi zvakashayisa kwazvo vaIsiraeri romuromo vakabva vamurega vakadzokera kunyika kwavo. 
2Kings4:1 Mumwe mudzimai womumwe wavaporofita akachema kuna Erisha achiti, “Ini muranda wenyu murume wangu akafa. Sezvamunongoziva wani muranda wenyu iyeyo aiva munhu anotya Tenzi. Asi zvinoka mumwe munhu waakanga ane chikwereti naye auya kuzotora vana vangu vakomana vaviri kuti vave varanda vake.”" 
2Kings4:2 Erisha akamuti, “Chiiko chandingakuitirei? Dondiudzaiwo, ko kumba munei chamuchinacho?” Mudzimai uyu akati, “Ini muranda wenyu kumba uku handisisina chokubata, changosara chete kaguchu kamafuta.”" 
2Kings4:3 Ndokubva ati, “Potererai muchikumbira vamakavakidzana navo vose midziyo, midziyo isina chinhu irege kuva mishomanana." 
2Kings4:4 Mozopinda mumba mozvipfigira musuo murimo iyemi navanakomana venyu moadururira mumidziyo yacho yose. Mudziyo unenge wazara uisei parutivi.” 
2Kings4:5 Saizvozvo mudzimai uyu akabva pana Erisha akandozvipfigira mumba iye navanakomana vake. Iye aiadururiramo vana vake vachimutambidza midziyo. 
2Kings4:6 Kuzoti midziyo yacho yazara akati kumwana wake, “Nditambidzewo mumwe mudziyo.” Mwana akati, “Hapasisina mumwe.” Mafuta aye ndiye gwa kubuda." 
2Kings4:7 Mudzimai uyu akaenda akandoudza munhu waMwari iye akabva ati, “Chiendai mutengese mafuta iwayo muripe zvikwereti zvenyu, imi navanakomana venyu munozoraramiswa nezvinenge zvasara.”" 
2Kings4:8 Rimwe zuva Erisha akapfuura nokuShunemu kwaigara mumwe mukadzi aiva mupfumi. Mudzimai iyeyu akamunyengetedza kuti ambowana chimwe chokuisa mukanwa. Saizvozvo Erisha pose paaipfuura neko aitsaukirapo kundodya zvokudya. 
2Kings4:9 Akati kumurume wake, “Zvamunoona, ndiri kuona kuti munhu uyu munhu mutsvene waMwari ari kuramba achingopfuura zvake nepano." 
2Kings4:10 Ngatigadzirei kamba kaduku kane chengowo chako padenga remba apa tigomuisiramo mubhedha neteburu nechigaro nerambi kuitira kuti pose paanenge atishanyira awanewo pokugara.” 
2Kings4:11 Rimwe zuva Erisha akasvika nepo akabva atsaukira mumba iyoyi ozorora zvake. 
2Kings4:12 Akati kumushandi wake ainzi Gehazi, “Daidza muShunemu uyu.” Paakamudaidza mudzimai uyu akasvikomira pana Erisha." 
2Kings4:13 Erisha akati kuna Gehazi, “Iti kuna mai ava, chionaika imi makazvitakudza mutoro unorema kudai muchiitiresu, zvino chii chamungaitirwewo imi? Hamuna here nyaya yamunoda kusvitsirwa kuna mambo kana kuti kumutungamiriri wehondo?” Mai ava ndokuti, “Ini ndakanyatsogara zvangu navanhu vokwangu ava.”" 
2Kings4:14 Erisha akati, “Zvino chii chaicho chaangaitirwe?” Gehazi akabva ati, “Chiripo apa ndechichi chokuti, mai ava havana mwana mukomana uye murume wavo akwegura.”" 
2Kings4:15 Iye akati, “Vadaidze.” Paakadaidza mai ava, vakasvikomira pamusuo." 
2Kings4:16 Erisha ndokuti kwavari, “Pamwaka iwo uno uyu, gore rinouya muchava nomwana mukomana pamaoko.” Ivo vakati, “Aiwaka changamire! Nhaimi munhu waMwari, dai marega zvenyu kunditaurira nhema dzakadai ini muranda wenyu.”" 
2Kings4:17 Asi mudzimai uyu akazova napamuviri, akasununguka mwana mukomana panguva yakare iya yepfumvudza ramangwana racho sezvaakanga ataurirwa naErisha." 
2Kings4:18 Mwana uyu akati akura, rimwe zuva akaenda kunze kuna baba vake vaiva navakohwi." 
2Kings4:19 Akazoti kuna baba vake, “Yuwi, musoro wangu, musoro wangu!” Baba vakati kumuranda wavo, “Mutakure uende naye kuna amai vake.”" 
2Kings4:20 Kuzoti murume uyu amutakura, aenda naye kuna amai vake, mwana akagara pamakumbo pavo vakamuti mumaoko mbunde kudzamara masikati zuva rorova nhongonya ndokubva mwana afa." 
2Kings4:21 Mai ava vakakwira padenga vakandomuradzika pamubhedha uya womunhu waMwari. Vakamupfigiramo vakabuda panze. 
2Kings4:22 Vakadaidzira kumurume wavo vachiti, “Nditumireiwo mumwe muranda kuno nedhongi rimwe ndigokurumidza kuenda kumunhu waMwari uya ndidzokezve kuno.”" 
2Kings4:23 Iye akati, “Zvaita sei kuendako nhasi uno? Inga wani harizi Zuva Guru roKugara Kwemwedzi kana reSabata zvaro!” Ivo vakati, “Kutsvene zvako!”" 
2Kings4:24 Mai ava vakasunga dhongi ravo vakaudza muranda wavo kuti, “Tinha dhongi iri rirambe richifambisa usambondimisa-misa zvako munzira asi kutoti ndakuudza.”" 
2Kings4:25 Mai ava vakapinda murwendo rwavo vakasvika kumunhu uya waMwari kugomo reKarimero. Munhu waMwari paakaona vachiuya, akati kumushandi wake Gehazi, “Tarisa uone uko, muShunemu uya uyo." 
2Kings4:26 Ibva wamhanyira kundotambira mai avo uvati, ‘Kwakanaka here? Murume wenyu akadii zvake? Ko mwana akadii?’ ” Mai ava vakapindura vachiti, “Kutsvene zvako.”" 
2Kings4:27 Pavakazosvika pagomo kumunhu waMwari, vakasvikobata tsoka dzake. Gehazi akauya woda kuvatakanurapo, asi munhu waMwari akati, “Varege vakadaro. Vari kushungurudzwa kwazvo mumwoyo. Zvino Tenzi andivanzira nhuna dzavo haana kunditaurirawo.”" 
2Kings4:28 Mai ava vakazoti, “Changamire, ini ndakambokukumbirai mwana mukomana here? Handina here kuti musandinyengedze?”" 
2Kings4:29 Iye akati kuna Gehazi, “Chisunga dzisimbe ubate tsvimbo yangu iyi muruoko uende. Kana ukasangana naani zvake rega kumukwazisa, anenge akukwazisa rega kumupindura, undoisa tsvimbo yangu pauso hwomwana wacho.”" 
2Kings4:30 Amai vomwana ndokubva vati, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu nemi muripo kudai kuti handimbokusiyai.” Nokudaro Erisha akasimukawo akabva avatevera." 
2Kings4:31 Gehazi akafanotungamira akasvikoisa tsvimbo pauso hwomwana uya, asi hapana chakanzwika kana chiratidzo choupenyu. Naizvozvo akadzokera kundosangana naErisha akamutaurira kuti, “Mwana haana kumuka.”" 
2Kings4:32 Pakapinda Erisha mumba muya akaona mwana uyu akati rabada kufa pamubhedha pake. 
2Kings4:33 Ndokubva apindamo ndokuzvipfigiramo iye nomwana ndokunamata kuna Tenzi. 
2Kings4:34 Akakwirapo, akatsivama pamusoro pomwana uyu akaisa muromo pamuromo wake, maziso pamaziso ake, maoko akaaisa pamaoko ake. Paakanga akatsivama pamusoro pake kudaro, muviri womwana wakatanga kudziya." 
2Kings4:35 Erisha akasimuka zvakare akafamba mumba umu achiti endei mberi, dzokei shure. Akakwirapozve, akatsivama pamusoro pake, mwana akahotsira kanomwe, akabva asvinura meso." 
2Kings4:36 Erisha akatuma Gehazi kuti, “Daidza muShunemu uya.” Akabvawo andomudaidza. Mai ava pavakasvika kuna Erisha iye akati, “Chitakurai zvenyu mwanakomana wenyu uyu.”" 
2Kings4:37 Ivo ndokuti bvucha mumakumbo aErisha vakati pasi kota kota. Vakazotakura mwana wavo ndokubva vabuda zvavo. 
2Kings4:38 Erisha akaendazve kuGirigari, izvozvo shangwa yenzara yakanga iri munyika umu. Iye paaingunotandara zvake neboka ravaporofita akati kumushandi wake, “Gadza bhodho guru ubikire boka ravaporofita ava usavi.”" 
2Kings4:39 Mumwe wavo akaenda musango kundotsvaka muriwo. Akadimbura muvhaini womusango akautanha akasungira pamberi muhanzu yake kuzadza nezvipudzi zvomusango. Akauya akazvichekerera mupoto yousavi iyi asingazive kuti zvaiva zvii. 
2Kings4:40 Vakapakurira varume ava kuti vadye. Asi pavakangoti idyei usavi uhwu vakadaidzira voti, “Imi munhu waMwari, mupoto umu mune rufu umu.” Saka havana kukwanisa kuhudya." 
2Kings4:41 Iye akabva ati, “Chiunzai upfu.” Akahuisa mupoto umu ndokuti, “Chipakurirai vanhu vadye zvavo.” Mupoto umu makanga musisina chinokuvadza." 
2Kings4:42 Kwakauya mumwe murume wokuBhaarisharisha achiigira munhu waMwari chingwa chembesanwa dzokutanga, aiva makumi maviri ezvingwa zvebhari nechibage chinyoro mutsapo yake. Erisha akati, “Ipa varume ava vadye zvavo.”" 
2Kings4:43 Asi mushandi wake akati, “Ndingazvigovanisa sei chaizvo kuzana revanhu iri?” Erisha ndokutizve, “Ipa varume ava vadye zvavo nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Vachadya vakatozvisiya.’ ”" 
2Kings4:44 Saizvozvo akavaperekera zvokudya zvacho. Vakadya vakatozvisiya sezvakanga zvarehwa naTenzi. 
2Kings5:1 Mutungamiriri wehondo yamambo weSiria ainzi Naamani aiva munhu airemekedzwa zvikuru nachangamire vake, ari munhu wavo wapamwoyo nokuti naiyeyu uyu Tenzi akaita kuti vakurire vaSiria muhondo. Aiva murume uno, nyanzvi chaiyo yokurwa, asi akanga aine maperembudzi." 
2Kings5:2 VaSiria mune kumwe kupamba nehondo kwavaiita vakanga vatapa kamwe kasikana kokunyika yokwaIsiraeri kakava muranda womukadzi waNaamani. 
2Kings5:3 Musikana uyu akati kuna tenzi wake, “Dai kuri kuti changamire vamboonawo mumwe muporofita ari kuSamaria. Aivarapa chirwere chavo ichi chemaperembudzi.”" 
2Kings5:4 Nokudaro Naamani akaendamo akasvitsa izvi kuna changamire wake achiti, “Izvozvo ndozvandaudzwa nomusikana akabva kunyika yokwaIsiraeri.”" 
2Kings5:5 Mambo weSiria akabva ati, “Chitoendai zvino, ndichatumirawo mambo wokwaIsiraeri rugwaro.” Saizvozvo akaenda akatakura zviuru makumi matatu zvesirivha, nendarama zviuru zvitanhatu nehanzu gumi dzamachira, akanakisisa kwazvo." 
2Kings5:6 Akaenda norugwaro rwacho kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri rwaiti: “Rugwaro urwu rwasvika kwamuri nderwokukuzivisai kuti ndatumirako gurukota rangu Naamani kuti mumurapewo maperembudzi ake.” 
2Kings5:7 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri paakaverenga rugwaro irworwu akabvarura hanzu dzake akati, “Ndiri Mwari here anouraya nokupawo upenyu wokuti muchinda uyu anganditumire shoko rokuti ini ndirape munhu maperembudzi ake? Maonawoka kuti uku kutsvaka kupopotedzana neni chete.”" 
2Kings5:8 Asi pakanzwa munhu waMwari Erisha kuti mambo wokwaIsiraeri akanga abvarura hanzu dzake akatumira mambo shoko rokuti, “Madarireiko kubvarura hanzu dzenyu? Regai zvenyu auye kwandiri kuno iye zvino azoziva kuti muIsiraeri mune muporofita.”" 
2Kings5:9 Nokudaro Naamani akaenda namabhiza ake nengoro dzehondo akasvikomira pamusuo pamba paErisha. 
2Kings5:10 Erisha akamutumira nhume kundoti, “Enda undoshamba kanomwe kuna Jorodhani muviri wako uchapora woita sezvawaimbova uchibvawo wachenurwa.”" 
2Kings5:11 Asi Naamani akashatirwa ndokubva apomoka kuenda oti, “Chionaika, ndanga ndichiti achatoita zvokunyatsobuda panze pandiri, omira pakadarowo apo, odaidza zita Tenzi, Mwari wake achivheyesa maoko ake pamusoro penzvimbo iyoyo obva arapa maperembudzi acho!" 
2Kings5:12 Ko, Abhana naFapari nzizi dzokuDhamasikusi, hadzisiri nani here pane mvura yose yomuIsiraeri. Kwangu kutadza here kushamba madziri ndichenurwe?” Akabva afuratira oenda zvake akashatirwa." 
2Kings5:13 Varanda vake vakaswedera paari vakati kwaari, “Nhai baba, dai muporofita uyu anga ati muite chimwe chinhu chikuru mungadai musina kuchiita here? Ndoda zvapo apa paangokutii shambai muchenurwe!”" 
2Kings5:14 Ipapo akadzika akandozvinyika kanomwe muna Jorodhani sezvaakanga audzwa nomunhu waMwari, muviri wake ukapora ukaita sezvawaimbenge uri ukanaka sewemwana mudiki akabva achenurwa." 
2Kings5:15 Akadzokera kumunhu waMwari iye nechikwata chake chavanhu. Akasvika akamira paari akati, “Ndazoziva zvino kuti muIsiraeri chete ndimo muna Mwari pasi pano pose zvapo, saka dai imi mangochindigamuchirirawo ini muranda wenyu chipo ichi.”" 
2Kings5:16 Asi Erisha akati, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu wandinonamata hapana chandiri kuzogamuchira.” Naamani akamunyengetedza kuti achitore asi iye akaramba." 
2Kings5:17 Naamani ndokuti, “Kana zvakona ndapota zvangu chiregai zvenyu ini muranda wenyu nditakurirwe namanyurusi mikwende miviri yevhu. Ndinodaro nokuti ini muranda wenyu handichazopira mupiro wokupisa kana chibayiro kune mumwe mwari zvake asi kuna Tenzi chete." 
2Kings5:18 Panyaya iyi, dai Tenzi angondiregererawo ini muranda wenyu changamire wangu paanopinda mumba mokunamatira Rimoni kundomupfugamiramo akazendama kuruoko rwangu iniwo ndichikotamira Rimoni mumba make, pandinokotamira Rimoni mumba make dai Tenzi angondiregererawo ini muranda wenyu panyaya iyi.”" 
2Kings5:19 Erisha akati kwaari, “Wochifamba zvako zvakanaka.” Asi Naamanai paakangoti fambei chinhambwe chidiki abva pana Erisha," 
2Kings5:20 Gehazi mushandi womunhu waMwari uya Erisha akazviti, “Ho-o-o tenzi wangu atorega zvake vaNaamani muSiria uya akaenda zvake achirega kugamuchira chipo chaanga auya akabata mumaoko. NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu, regai ndimhanye ndimutevere ndiwane chinhu chandingawane kwaari.”" 
2Kings5:21 Nokudaro Gehazi akatevera Naamani. Naamani paakaona munhu aimutevera akabva ajitika mungoro yake yehondo ondosangana naye akati, “Kwakanaka here?”" 
2Kings5:22 Iye akati, “Zvose zvakanaka hazvo. Asi vatenzi vangu ndivo vandituma neshoko rokuti, ‘Ndasvikirwawo iyezvinouno namajaya maviri eboka ravaporofita vokunyika yaEfuremu yemakomo. Dai zvenyu mukapa ivavo zviuru zvitatu zvesirivha nehanzu mbiri dzamachira akanakisisa.’ ”" 
2Kings5:23 Naamani akati, “Tora zvako zviuru zvitanhatu zvesirivha.” Uyewo akamukurudzira, akasungira sirivha yacho mutsapo mbiri nehanzu mbiri dzamachira akanakisisa dziye akazvitakudza varanda vake vaviri. Vakazvitakura vari mberi kwaGehazi." 
2Kings5:24 Kuzoti asvika kugomo kuya akazvitora akaisa mumba akati varume ava vaende zvavo ndokubvawo vaenda. 
2Kings5:25 Akapindamo zvake akamira pana tenzi wake, Erisha akati kwaari, “Nhai Gehazi wanga uri kupiko?” Iye akapindura achiti, “Handina kwandanga ndaenda ini muranda wenyu.”" 
2Kings5:26 Asi Erisha akati, “Tanga tisiri tose here mumweya newe padzoka murume uya mungoro yake yehondo kuzosangana newe? Ndonguva here iyoyi yokugamuchira mari nehanzu neminda yemagirepisi neminda yemivhaini nehwai nemombe navaranda vechikadzi nevechirume?"
