2Kings5:27 Saka naizvozvo maperembudzi aNaamani atobatirira pauri iwe nezvizvarwa zvako nokusingapere.” Naizvozvo Gehazi akabuda obva paari muviri wake wati zvino mbuu kuchenuruka kunge aumburuka murota namaperembudzi. 
2Kings6:1 Chikwata chavaporofita chiya chakati kuna Erisha, “Onaika, panzvimbo pano patinogara tiri mumaoko enyu, patidupikira kwazvo." 
2Kings6:2 Regai zvenyu tiende kuna Jorodhani mumwe nomumwe wedu atsvake bango ikoko tizvivakire pokugara ikoko.” Erisha akati, “Endai zvenyu!”" 
2Kings6:3 Mumwe wavo akabva ati, “Dai mukaendawo pamwechete nesu varanda venyu!” Erisha akapindurawo achiti, “Ndinoendawo.”" 
2Kings6:4 Nokudaro akaenda navo. Pavakasvika muna Jorodhani, vakatanga kutema miti." 
2Kings6:5 Asi mumwe wavo achitema bango kudaro chese yedemo rake yakasvotokera mumvura. Akazhamba kuchema achiti, “Babaiwe kani! Changamire, demo iri rakatoita zvokukumbirwa.”" 
2Kings6:6 Munhu waMwari akati, “Rawira nepapi?” Paakamuratidza parakawira napo akatema chimuti akachikanda ipapo ndokuita kuti chese iya yesimbi iyangarare." 
2Kings6:7 Erisha ndokuti, “Chiisimudza zvako.” Iye akasvitsa ruoko rwake payaiva akabva aitora." 
2Kings6:8 Kwakati kwamuka hondo pakati pamambo weSiria nevokwaIsiraeri, mambo akarangana namakurukota ake achiti, “Kwanhingi kuya kuya ndokwandichandoti matendhe angu dzii kumisa.”" 
2Kings6:9 Asi munhu waMwari akatumira shoko kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri rokuti, “Chenjererai kuti murege zvenyu kupfuura nokunzvimbo iyoyi nokuti vaSiria vari kutodzika ikoko.”" 
2Kings6:10 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akatumira nhume kunzvimbo kwaakanga ataurirwa nomunhu waMwari uya. Ikoku ndokumubayira zani kwaaiita zvokuti akatozviponesa ruviri kana kuti rutatu rwese. 
2Kings6:11 Izvozvi izvi zvakashungurudza mwoyo kwazvo mambo weSiria akadaidza makurukota ake akaati, “Hamungandiratidzewo here mumwe wedu ane rimwe namambo wokwaIsiraeri?”" 
2Kings6:12 Rimwe gurukota rake rakati, “Changamire mambo, hapana, asi kutoti Erisha muporofita womuIsiraeri ndiye anonyevera mambo wokwaIsiraeri zvamunotaura imi kunyange muri mumba menyu mokurara chaimo.”" 
2Kings6:13 Iye ndokuti, “Chiendai mundomutsvaka kwaari kuti nditume vokundomubata.” Akataurirwa kuti, “Ari kuDotani.”" 
2Kings6:14 Akabva atumirako ngoro dzehondo dzamabhiza nehondo huru yavarwi vakasvikokomberedza guta iroro nousiku. 
2Kings6:15 Kuzoti ava mangwanani mushandi womunhu waMwari akafumomuka akabuda, onei guta rakakombwa nehondo yavarwi nengoro dzehondo dzamabhiza. Mushandi uya akati, “Tapera changamire! Todiiko?”" 
2Kings6:16 Erisha ndokuti, “Rega zvako kutya nokuti vatinavo vakawanda kupinda vavanavo.”" 
2Kings6:17 Erisha ndokunamata achiti, “Imi Tenzi ndapota pengenutsaiwo meso ake kuti aone.” Saizvozvo Tenzi akapengenutsa jaya iri meso rikabva raona. Ndiye onei gomo rakati shutu kuzara nengoro dzehondo dzamabhiza dzakakomberedza Erisha." 
2Kings6:18 VaSiria pavakamudzikira ikoko, Erisha akanamata kuna Tenzi achiti, “Imbondiroveraiwo vanhu ava nechidzimira.” Akavarova nechidzimira maererano nomunamato waErisha." 
2Kings6:19 Erisha akabva ati kwavari, “Iyi haisiriyo nzira yacho uye guta racho harisi rino iri. Chinditeverai zvenyu ndindokusvitsai kumurume wamuri kutsvaka.” Akaenda navo kuSamaria." 
2Kings6:20 Vachangoti pindei muSamaria, Erisha akati, “Nhai Tenzi chipengenutsai vanhu ava meso kuti vachiona.” Tenzi ndokupengenutsa meso avo vakabva vava kuona, vakatenge vava mukati meSamaria." 
2Kings6:21 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri achivaona akati kuna Erisha, “Ndovauraya here nhai baba? Ndovauraya here?”" 
2Kings6:22 Iye akapindura achiti, “Regai kuvauraya! Mungauraye here nhapwa dzamunenge zvenyu matapa namapakatwa enyu nouta hwenyu? Vapei zvenyu chokudya nemvura vadye, vanwe vaende zvavo kuna tenzi wavo.”" 
2Kings6:23 Ipapo akavaitira mabiko makuru kwazvo. Kuzoti vadya vanwa, akavaperekedza vakabva vadzokera kuna tenzi wavo. VaSiria ndokubvawo vapfidza kuita zvokupamba munyika yokwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings6:24 Mushure mezvizvi Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria akaunganidza hondo yake akandokomba Samaria. 
2Kings6:25 MuSamaria makaita shangwa yenzara vakarikomba kudaro zvikasvitsa pakuti musoro wedhongi zvawo utengeswe makumi masere emari yesirivha uye zimowa danga rainge richirema magiramu mazana maviri ritengeswewo mazana mashanu emari yesirivha. 
2Kings6:26 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati achipfuura ari pamusoro porusvingo, mumwe mukadzi akadaidzira kwaari achiti, “Ndiyamureiwo changamire, nhai mambo!”" 
2Kings6:27 Iye akati, “Kana Tenzi akarega kutokuyamura unoti ini ndingagokuyamurawo nei? Nezvekuburiro here kana kuti zvomumudziyo unosvinirwa waini.”" 
2Kings6:28 Mambo ndokumuti, “Wanetswa nei?” Mudzimai uyu akati, “Mukadzi uyu akanditi, ‘Unza mwana wako mukomana timudye nhasi, mangwana tozodyawo mwanakomana wangu.’" 
2Kings6:29 Saizvozvo takabika mwana wangu tikamudya. Ramangwana acho ndakamuti chiunza mwana wako mukomana timudye, iye ndopaava kutohwandisa zvake wake mwana.”" 
2Kings6:30 Mambo achinzwa nyaya yomukadzi uyu akabva abvarura hanzu dzake. Izvozvo mambo ainge achipfuura napamusoro porusvingo paya. Vanhu ndokuti ji kutarisa, onei mukati, mambo akapfeka hanzu dzemasaga pamuviri pake." 
2Kings6:31 Akati, “Mwari ngaandione asve atondiomesera zvake kana ndikasiya musoro waErisha mwanakomana waShafati uripo ndikarega kuudimura iye nhasi uno.”" 
2Kings6:32 Izvozvo Erisha ainge ari mumba make, vakuru vakuru vachitandara zvavo naye. Zvino mambo akatenge afanotuma mumwe murume akabva paaiva. Asi murume uyu asati asvikako, Erisha akafanoti kuvakuru vakuru vacho, “Muri kuona here zvarongwa nomwana womuurayi uyu, kutumira munhu kuzondidimura musoro nhai? Chinzwai, kana nhumwa yacho yasvika imi pfigai musuo, moramba makamubatira gonhi zviya zvokuti ndi chaizvo. Uyo hausiri mutsindo watenzi wake ari kumutevera here?”" 
2Kings6:33 Achiri kutaura navo kudaro nhumwa iya yakasvika kwaari ikati, “Nhamo iyi inhamo iri kuunzwa naTenzi. Ko ndichagorambirei ndakangomirira Tenzi?”" 
2Kings7:1 Asi Erisha akati, “Inzwai zvinotaurwa naTenzi; zvanzi naTenzi, mangwana nenguva idzo dzino idzi, upfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hunorema makirogiramu matatu huchazenge hwava kutengeswa mari imwechete yesirivha uyewo bhari inorema makirogiramu matanhatu yotengeswa mariwo imwechete yesirivha kusuo guru reSamaria.”" 
2Kings7:2 Mukuru mukuru aiva wepedyopedyo kwazvo namambo akati kumunhu waMwari, “Kunyange iye Tenzi, kuri kuti aita mahwindo mudenga umu ndopazvingaitike izvozvo here?” Asi Erisha akati, “Iyewe uchatozviona nameso ako aya asi hausi kuzombozvidya.”" 
2Kings7:3 Izvozvo kwaiva navamwe varume vana vakanga vaina maperembudzi vaigara kwokunge toda kupinda pasuo guru riya. Vakataurirana vachiti, “Tadirei kuti tisvike pakufa takangoti pwasha kugara pano apa." 
2Kings7:4 Kana tikati tipinde zvedu muguta, nzara iri kubaya muguta umu, tingafire imomo. Kana tikati zunye kugara pano tinopafazve. Saka iye zvino uyai tiyambukire kumatendhe evaSiria uku. Kana vakatirega tiri vapenyu tatorarama, asi kana vakatiuraya tafawoka zvedu.”" 
2Kings7:5 Vakabva vasimuka rubvunzavaeni voenda kumatendhe avaSiria. Kuzoti vasvika kwaitangira matendhe evaSiria aya wanei pakati n'ono pasina nomunhu wose. 
2Kings7:6 Chakadariso ndechokuti Tenzi akanga aita kuti hondo inzwe maungira engoro dzehondo neemabhiza namaungira ehondo huru kwazvo zvokuti vakataurirana vachiti, “Zvamunoonaka mambo wokwaIsiraeri akandotenga madzimambo evaHiti nemadzimambo evaIjipiti kuti vatirwise.”" 
2Kings7:7 Ipapo rubvunzavaeni irworwo vakati ware kutiza vachisiya matendhe avo namabhiza avo namadhongi avo vakasiya pamatendhe pavo pakangodaro vakatiza kuponesa upenyu hwavo. 
2Kings7:8 Pakasvika vana maperembudzi ava kwaitangira matendhe aya vakapinda mutendhe rimwe vakadya vakanwa vakabva vatora sirivha nendarama nehanzu vakandozviviga. Vakadzoka vakapinda mune rimwe tendhe ndokutakuramo zvimwe zvinhu vakandozviviga. 
2Kings7:9 Vakazotaurirana vachiti, “Zvatiri kuita izvi hazvina kunaka. Nhasi izuva redama rakanaka. Kana tikaramba takanyarara kusvikira mangwanani kwaedza tingazorangwa. Saka naizvozvo ngatichibvai taenda kundotaurira vokumuzinda kwamambo.”" 
2Kings7:10 Vakabva vaenda vakasvikodaidza vachengetedzi vapasuo guru repaguta iri. Vakavati, “Isu tasvika pamatendhe evaSiria. Mufungeka hapana nomunhu wose wataonapo kana kunzwa zvako kana chii zvacho asi kutoti mabhiza akasungwa namadhongi akasungirirwa namatendhe akangodaro sezvaaingova.”" 
2Kings7:11 Vachengetedzi vepasuo guru ava vakashevedzera zvikabva zvasvitswa mukati kune vomumuzinda wamambo. 
2Kings7:12 Mambo uyu akamuka usiku ihwohwo akati kumakurukota ake, “Chiregai ndikutaurirei zvarongwa kuitwa navaSiria ava kwatiri. Chavari kutoziva zvavo izvozvi ndechokuti isu tabayiwa nenzara. Ndokusaka vabva pamatendhe avo vandohwanda kunze vachiti panongoti vaIsiraeri budei muguta isu tinobva tavabata vari vapenyu topinda zvedu muguta umu.”" 
2Kings7:13 Rimwe gurukota rake rakati, “Regai vamwe varume vatore mabhiza mashanu pane aye akasiyiwa sezvo muri kutoonaka kuti ava vakasara muno ava vachangoitawo segungano rose reIsiraeri ratodai kupera kutsakatika. Ngativatume tione.”" 
2Kings7:14 Saizvozvo vakatora varume vaviri vachairi vengoro dzehondo dzemabhiza, mambo akavatuma kuti varonde hondo yevaSiria achiti, “Endai mundoona.”" 
2Kings7:15 Vakavaronda kudzamara kuna Jorodhani uko, onei mugwara macho mose makati mwarara nehanzu midziyo zvairaswa navaSiria pavakanga voita zvechimbichimbi. Nhume idzi dzakadzoka dzikazvisvitsa kuna mambo." 
2Kings7:16 Vanhu vakabuda vakandopamba zvinhu pamatendhe evaSiria. Nokudaro makirogiramu matatu oupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa akabva ava kutengeswa nemari imwechete yesirivha uye makirogiramu matanhatu ebhari ava kutengeswa nemari imwechete yesirivha sezvakanga zvarehwa naTenzi. 
2Kings7:17 Izvozvo mambo akanga asarudza mukuru mukuru uya wokuva pedyopedyo kwazvo naye kuti ave ndiye wokuchengeta pasuo guru. Zvino vanhu vakamutsikirira pasi pasuo guru pacho zvokuti akabva afa sokutaura kwakanga kwaita munhu waMwari uya paya pakasvika mambo kwaari. 
2Kings7:18 Sezvo munhu waMwari paakanga ati kuna mambo, “Makirogiramu matanhatu ebhari achazenge ava kutengeswa mari imwechete yesirivha, uye makirogiramu matatu oupfu kwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa achazenge otengeswawo mangwana nguva ino iyi mari imwechete yesirivha kusuo guru reSamaria,”" 
2Kings7:19 mukuru mukuru iyeyu akapindura munhu waMwari uya achiti, “Kunyange zvazvo iye Tenzi kuri kuti aita mahwindo mudenga umu, zvakadaro ndopazvingaitike here izvozvo?” Iye akanga amuti, “Iyewe uchatozviona nameso ako, asi hausi kuzombozvidya.”" 
2Kings7:20 Izvozvi ndizvo zvakazoitika kwaari, vanhu vakabvawo vamutsikirira pasi pasuo guru pacho akafa." 
2Kings8:1 Erisha akanga ati kumudzimai uya ane mwanakomana waakaita kuti ave mupenyu pakare, “Simukai mutame nemhuri yenyu iyi mumbondogara kwose kwose kwamunenge mawana nokuti Tenzi aronga kuti kuite shangwa yenzara munyika muno kwamakore manomwe.”" 
2Kings8:2 Saizvozvo mudzimai uyu akasimuka akaita sezvaakanga ataurirwa nomunhu waMwari. Akaenda nemhuri yake akambondogara kunyika yevaFirisitia kwamakore manomwe. 
2Kings8:3 Kuzoti makore manomwe apera pakadzoka mudzimai uyu kunyika yavaFirisitia, akandosvitsa nyaya yake kuna mambo yokuti adzoserwe musha wake namakura ake." 
2Kings8:4 Izvozvo mambo aingunotaura naGehazi mushandi womunhu waMwari achiti, “Ndiudze ndinzwe mabasa makuru ose akaitwa naErisha.”" 
2Kings8:5 Akati achirondedzera kuna mambo zvakaitwa naErisha zvokuita kuti munhu akanga afa ave mupenyu pakare, mudzimai uya akamutsirwa mwanakomana wake naErisha ndiye nepo wotopira nyaya yake kuna mambo yokuti adzoserwe musha wake namakura ake. Gehazi ndokuti, “A changamire mambo ndiyeyuka mudzimai wacho, hoyuka mwanakomana wake nyakuitwa mupenyu pakare naErisha.”" 
2Kings8:6 Mambo paakabvunzawo mudzimai uyu, iye akamurondedzera. Mambo akabva amusarudzira mumwe mukuru mukuru akamuti, “Dzoserai mudzimai uyu zvinhu zvake zvose pamwechete nembesa dzose dzaibuda mumunda wacho kubvira pamusi waakasiya dunhu iroro kusvikira iye zvino.”" 
2Kings8:7 Zvino Erisha akaenda kuDhamasikusi. Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria airwara. Paakataurirwa kuti, “Munhu waMwari akauya kuno,”" 
2Kings8:8 mambo akati kuna Hazaeri, “Takura chipo ichi undosangana nomunhu waMwari, undinzwire kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nokwaari, uti, ‘Ko ini ndichararama here paurwere hwangu ihwohu?’ ”" 
2Kings8:9 Saizvozvo Hazaeri akaenda kundosangana naye akamutakurira chipo chezvinhu zvose zvakasiyana-siyana zvomuDhamasikusi zvaitotakurwa namakumi mana engamera. Paakasvika akamira paaiva akati, “Mwanakomana wenyu, Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria andituma kwamuri neshoko rokuti, ‘Ko ini ndichararama here paurwere hwangu ihwohu?’ ”" 
2Kings8:10 Erisha akati kwaari, “Enda undomutaurira kuti zvanzi, ‘Zvokupora muchanyatsorarama zvenyu, asi Tenzi andiratidza kuti zvechokwadi muchafa.’ ”" 
2Kings8:11 Erisha ndokuramba akamuti ndee kumutarisa kusvikira ava kunyara ndokubva munhu waMwari ahwihwidza kuchema. 
2Kings8:12 Hazaeri akati, “Zvaita seiko changamire kuzohwihwidza kuchema kudai?” Iye akati, “Nokuti ndiri kuziva zvakaipa zvauchaita kuvanhu veIsiraeri. Uchapisa nomotoka iwe nzvimbo dzavo dzakavakirirwa netsvingo. Uchaurayaka iwe majaya avo namapakatwa, pwere dzavo uchipwatitsira kurovera pasi, uchitumbura madzimai avo ane pamuviri.”" 
2Kings8:13 Hazaeri ndokuti, “Pangu panowo iyeni muranda wenyu, imbwa zvayo ndingasvikewo pakuita chinhu chikuru chakadaro.” Erisha akati, “Tenzi andiratidza kuti ndiwe uchava mambo weSiria.”" 
2Kings8:14 Akazobva pana Erisha akadzokera kuna tenzi wake akamuti, “Erisha ati kudiiko kwauri.” Iye akati, “Zvandataurirwa naErisha ndezvizvi zvokuti kupora muchanyatsopora.”" 
2Kings8:15 Asi mangwana acho akatora chimwe chokufukidza nacho akachinyika mumvura akati gude kupfumbira uso nacho kusvikira afa. Hazaeri akava mambo pachinzvimbo pake. 
2Kings8:16 Mugore rechishanu rokutonga kwaJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri, Jehoramu mwanakomana waJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha akatangisa kutonga." 
2Kings8:17 Akanga ava namakumi matatu amakore namakore maviri paakava mambo, akatonga muJerusaremu kwamakore masere." 
2Kings8:18 Iye akatevedzera makwara amadzimambo okwaIsiraeri sezvakanga zvaitwa nevemba yaAhabhu nokuti mudzimai wake akanga ari mukunda waAhabhu. Akaitawo zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi. 
2Kings8:19 Zvakadaro zvazvo Tenzi haana kuparadza vokwaJudha achiitira muranda wake Dhavhidhi, sezvo akanga amutsidzira kumupa mwenje unogara uchipfuta nokusingapere navanakomana vake." 
2Kings8:20 Panguva yake Edhomu yakapanduka ikaramba zvokutongwa nevokwaJudha, ikazvigadzirawo mambo wayo." 
2Kings8:21 Joramu ndokuyambukira kuZairi aine ngoro dzake dzose dzehondo, akamuka nousiku iye navakuru vakuru vake vengoro dzehondo akarakatisa kuuraya vaEdhomu vakanga vamukomberana. Asi hondo yake yakatizira kumusha." 
2Kings8:22 Nokudaro Edhomu yakapanduka ikaramba zvokutongwa nevokwaJudha kusvikira pari nhasi, panguva yakareyo guta reRibhuna rakapandukawo." 
2Kings8:23 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJoramu nezvose zvaakaita, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha." 
2Kings8:24 Joramu akazovatawo oenda kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake akavigwa pamwe chete namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi, mwanakomana wake Ahaziya akazotonga pachinzvimbo pake." 
2Kings8:25 Mugore regumi nechipiri rokutonga kwaJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhu mambo wokwaIsairaeri, Ahaziya mwanakomana waJehoramu mambo wakwaJudha akatangisa kutonga." 
2Kings8:26 Ahaziya akanga ava namakore okuberekwa makumi maviri namaviri paakatangisa kutonga, akatonga gore rimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Amai vake vainzi Atariya vaiva muzukuru waOmuri mambo wokwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings8:27 Iyeyuwo akatevedzera makwara emba yaAhabhu achiita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi sezvakanga zvaitwa nemba yaAhabhu sezvo aiva mukuwasha kumba yaAhabhu. 
2Kings8:28 Ahaziya akaenda naJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhu kuhondo kundorwisa Hazaeri mambo weSiria kuRamoti kuGireadhi kwakakuvadzirwa Joramu navaSiria. 
2Kings8:29 Mambo Joramu akadzokera kuJezirieri kundorapwa maronda aakanga akuvadzwa nevaSiria kuRama paakarwisa Hazaeri mambo weSiria. Ahaziya mwana waJehoramu mambo wokwaJudha akadzikako kundotarira Joramu mwanakomana waAhabhu kuJezirieri sezvo ainge achirwara. 
2Kings9:1 Muporofita Erisha akadaidza mumwe weboka ravaporofita akati kwaari, “Pfeka utore chinu chamafuta mumaoko, uende kuRamoti kuGireadhi." 
2Kings9:2 Kana wasvikako, tsvaka mumwe munhu anonzi Jehu akaberekwa naJehoshafati mwana waNimushi, pindamo umuti asumuke pana vamwe vake, uende naye mumba yomukati" 
2Kings9:3 wotora chinu chamafuta chiya, wodira mafuta mumusoro make uchiti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi ndakuzodza mafuta kukugadza umambo hwokwaIsiraeri.’ Wobva wazarura musuo wotiza usambomira zvako.”" 
2Kings9:4 Naizvozvo muporofita wacho, jaya iri rakaenda kuRamoti kuGireadhi." 
2Kings9:5 Akasvikako, wanei vatungamiriri vehondo vari mudare. Akati, “Ndine kamwe kanyaya nemi mutungamiriri wehondo.” Jehu akati, “Naani wacho pakati pedu tose?” Iye akabva ati, “Naiyemi mutungamiriri wehondo.”" 
2Kings9:6 Ipapo akasimuka akapinda mumba, muporofita uyu, jaya riye rikadira mafuta mumusoro make rikati kwaari, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Ndakugadza kuva mambo wavanhu vaTenzi, vaIsiraeri." 
2Kings9:7 Unofanira kuparadza imba yaAhabhu, changamire wako kuitira kuti nditsividze Jezebhero ropa revaranda vangu vaporofita neropa revaranda vose vaTenzi" 
2Kings9:8 nokuti imba yose yaAhabhu inofanira kuparara. Ndichaparadza vokwaAhabhu, munhu wose wechirume muranda kana asiri muranda muIsiraeri." 
2Kings9:9 Imba yaAhabhu ndichaiita hwemba yaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati uye hwemba yaBhaasha mwanakomana waAhiya. 
2Kings9:10 Imbwa dzichadya zvadzo Jezebhero mudunhu reJezirieri hapana neanozomuviga.’ ” Akabva azarura musuo ndokutiza. 
2Kings9:11 Jehu paakabudamo akapinda muna machinda achangamire wake, iwo akati kwaari, “Kwakanaka here? Ko iri benzi romunhu ranga ravingei kwamuri?” Iye akati kwavari, “Inga munhu akadai uyu munongomuzivawo wani uye nezvaanotaura.”" 
2Kings9:12 Ivo vakati, “Kweteka, hazvisizvo, chitiudza.” Akabva ati, “Zvaanditaurira ndezvizvi izvi: ati, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi, ndakugadza paumambo hwokwaIsiraeri.’ ”" 
2Kings9:13 Munhu wose pavari ivava akaita chipatapata kutora hanzu yake akamuwaridzira pasi pamanera chaipo. Vakaridza hwamanda vachizivisa kuti, “Jehu ndiye mambo.”" 
2Kings9:14 Jehu mwanakomana waJehoshafati muzukuru waNimishi akabva apandukira mambo Joramu. Izvozvo Joramu nevokwaIsiraeri vose vakanga vandodzivirira guta reRamoti kuGireadhi rairwiswa naHazaeri mambo weSiria. 
2Kings9:15 Zvino mambo Joramu akanga adzokera kuJezirieri kundorapwa maronda aakanga akuvadzwa navaSiria paakarwisa Hazaeri mambo weSiria. Ipapo Jehu akati, “Kana zvirizvo zvakupindaiwo mumwoyo ngapachirega kuva naanoverera muguta muno kundosvitsa shoko irori kuJezirieri.”" 
2Kings9:16 Jehu ndokuti mungoro yake yehondo kata akaenda kuJezirieri sezvo Joramu akanga arere ikoko. Izvozvo Ahaziya mambo wokwaJudha akanga adzikako kundotarira Joramu. 
2Kings9:17 Mugaririri akanga amire panharire muJezirieri, akaona chikwata chaJehu chichiuya akati, “Ndiri kuona chikwata chavanhu.” Joramu akati, “Tuma munhu nebhiza anochingurana navo, avabvunze kuti kwakanaka here?”" 
2Kings9:18 Saizvozvo mumwe munhu akaenda nebhiza kundochingurana naye akati, “Mambo vati kwakanaka here?” Jehu akati, “Unei nazvo zvokunaka zvacho? Chitendeutsa bhiza rako unditevere.” Mugariri uyu akataura achiti, “Nhume iyo yasvika kwavari, asi hayizi kudzoka.”" 
2Kings9:19 Akabva atumirako kechipiri munhu nebhiza, akasvika kwavari akati, “Mambo vati kwakanaka here?” Jehu akati, “Zvokunaka unei nazvo? Chitendeutsa bhiza rako unditevere.”" 
2Kings9:20 Mugaririri akataurazve achiti, “Nhume iyo yasvika kwavari, asi hayizi kudzoka. Asi muchairiro wacho unenge muchairiro waJehu mwana waNimishi nokuti ari kupengereka chaizvo.”" 
2Kings9:21 Joramu akati, “Gadzirirai.” Vakabvawo vagadzirira ngoro yake yehondo. Joramu mambo wokwaIsiraeri naAhaziya mambo wokwaJudha ndokubva vati uyu mungoro yake, uyu mungoro yake vopinda munzira kundochingurana naJehu ndiye dhuma dhuma naye pamunda waNabhoti womuJezirieri." 
2Kings9:22 Joramu paakaona Jehu akati, “Kwakanaka heren Jehu?” Iye akapindurawo achiti, “Kuchinakei ihwo hunzenza hwokunamata zvifananidzo hwaamai vako Jezebhero nouroyi hwavo hwakadai kuwanda?”" 
2Kings9:23 Joramu akatendeutsa bhiza rake otiza achiti kuna Ahaziya, “Kwapandukwa Ahaziya we-e!”" 
2Kings9:24 Jehu akatatamura uta hwake nesimba rake rose akapfura Joramu pakati pamapendekete ake zvokuti museve wakabaya mwoyo wake akabva ati bvucha mungoro make. 
2Kings9:25 Jehu akauudza Bhidhikari mumwe mukuru mukuru wehondo yake kuti, “Musimudze umukande mumunda waNabhoti womuJezirieri. Handiti uchiri kuyeuka shoko riya rakataurwa naTenzi nezvake paye paye pataifamba tose tiri pamabhiza takavambirana, iwe neni tiri mushure maAhabhu, baba vake pakanzi," 
2Kings9:26 ‘Tenzi ati chokwadi chokwadi sokuona kwandakaita nezuro ropa raNabhoti nerevanakomana vake ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi ndichaita kuti iyewe uriripe pamunda ipo pano, ndini Tenzi ndinodaro. Saka zvino mutore umukande mumunda maererano neshoko raTenzi.’ ”" 
2Kings9:27 Ahaziya mambo wokwaJudha paakaona izvozvi akati ware kutiza onanga kuBhetihagani. Jehu akamudzingirira achiti, “Kana iyeyo uyo, mupfurei!” Vakamupfura ari mungoro iya okwira makata okuGuru pedyo neIbhereamu iye ndiye ware kutizira kuMegidho akafirako." 
2Kings9:28 Makurukota ake akamutakura mungoro yehondo vakaenda naye kuJerusaremu vakamuviga muguva rake pamwechete namadzibaba ake muGuta raDhavhidhi. 
2Kings9:29 Ahaziya uyu akanga atangisa kutonga kwaJudha mugore regumi nechiposhi rokutonga kwaJoramu mwanakomana waAhabhu. 
2Kings9:30 Jehu paakasvika kuJezirieri, Jezebhero akazvinzwa. Jezebhero akanyatsozvizora maziso ake ndokuzvishongedza musoro. Akadongorera napahwindo." 
2Kings9:31 Jehu akati achipinda pasuo guru, Jezebhero akati, “Kutsvene here nhai Zimuri, munhu anouraya tenzi wake?”" 
2Kings9:32 Akatarisa mudenga kuhwindo kwacho akati, “Ndiani aneni? Ndiani?” Mayuniki maviri kana matatu akadongorera kunze kwaari." 
2Kings9:33 Iye ndokuti, “Mukandidzirei pano pasi.” Vakamukandidzira pasi, rimwe ropa rake rikachatikira kumadziro nepamabhiza akabva amutsikirira pasi." 
2Kings9:34 Jehu ndokupinda, akadya nokunwa zvake ndokuzoti, “Dai mukaona kuti mukadzi worushambwa uyu avigwa nokuti mukunda wamambo.”" 
2Kings9:35 Asi pavakachizoti voenda kundomuviga hapana chavakazowana kunze kwomusoro namakumbo nezvanza zvamaoko ake chete. 
2Kings9:36 Pavakadzoka kuzomutaurira iye akati, “Izvozvi ndizvo wani zvakarehwa naTenzi nomuromo womuranda wake Eriya wokuTishibhi paakati, ‘Imbwa dzichadya zvadzo mutumbi waJezebhero mudunhu reJezirieri." 
2Kings9:37 Chitunha chaJezebhero chichaita sendove kuti kata kata pasi mumunda womudunhu reJezirieri, kushaye anoziva kuti uyu ndiIzebhero uyu.’ ”" 
2Kings10:1 Ahabhu aiva navanakomana makumi manomwe kuSamaria. Jehu akanyora tsamba akadzitumira kune vokuSamaria kuvatongi veJezirieri nokuvakuru vakuru vacho nokune vaiva vokuchengeta vana ivava vaAhabhu achiti," 
2Kings10:2 “Sezvamunongoonawo kuti vana vatenzi venyu munavo, nengoro dzehondo munadzo namabhiza uye mune maguta ane tsvingo nezvombowo zvokurwisa nazvo saka panongosvika chete tsamba iyoyi kwamuri" 
2Kings10:3 mobva matosarudza mwana watenzi wenyu murume uno chaiye akasvika mumugadze pachigaro chababa wake choumambo, mutorwira umambo hwemba yababa wenyu.”" 
2Kings10:4 Asi vakabva vabatwa nokutya kwakanyanyisa kwazvo vakati, “Onaika kuti madzimambo maviri aya akakundika kumirisana naJehu ko kutozoti isusu?”" 
2Kings10:5 Nokudaro mukuru mukuru womuzinda nomutongi weguta pamwechete navakuru vakuru vacho navachengeti vaya, vakatumira Jehu shoko rokuti, “Tiri varanda venyu zvose zvamunenge mangotiudza tinoita. Hakuna munhu watinogadza umambo kuno. Itai zvenyu zvamunoda.”" 
2Kings10:6 Iye akavanyorera tsamba yechipiri achiti, “Kana muri kudivi kwangu uye kana makagadzirira kunditeerera mochidaizvi. Bvisai vanakomana vatenzi wenyu misoro muuye kwandiri kuJezireeri mangwana panguva idzo dzino idzi.” Izvozvo vanakomana vamambo makumi manomwe vakanga vaine varume vomuguta iroro vaivarera." 
2Kings10:7 Pakasvika tsamba iyi kwavari, vakabata vanakomana vamambo, makumi manomwe avanhu vakavauraya vakaisa misoro yavo mudzitswanda vakaitumira kuna Jehu kuJezirieri." 
2Kings10:8 Pakasvika nhume ikamupira kuti, “Vauya nemisoro yavanakomana vamambo,” iye akati, “Iitei mirwi miviri kumberi kwesuo guru kusvikira mangwanani.”" 
2Kings10:9 Mangwanani acho akabuda akamirapo akataurira vanhu vose kuti, “Imi hamuna mhosva. Ini ndini ndakapandukira tenzi wangu ndikamuuraya. Ko akaurayawo vose ava ndiani?" 
2Kings10:10 Chizivai kuti muromo waTenzi hauwire pasi waakataura iye Tenzi nezvemba yaAhabhu nokuti Tenzi aita zvaakareva nomuromo womuranda wake Eriya.” 
2Kings10:11 Saizvozvo Jehu akauraya vose vemba yaAhabhu vakanga vasara kuJezirieri, akaurayawo vakuru vakuru vake vose neshamwari dzake navapristi vake akasara asisina nomunhu wose." 
2Kings10:12 Jehu akasimuka akaenda kuSamaria, ari munzira kudaro ava kuBhetiekedhi yavafudzi" 
2Kings10:13 akasangana nehama dzaAhaziya mambo wokwaJudha akati, “Ndimi vanaaniko?” Ivo vakati, “Isu tiri hama dzokwaAhaziya tauya kuzoshanyira vanakomana vamambo nevanakomana vaamai vamambo.”" 
2Kings10:14 Iye ndokuti, “Vabatei vari vapenyu kudai.” Vakavabata vari vapenyu kudaro vakavaurayira kumugodhi wokuBhetiekedhi vaiva makumi mana avanhu ana vanhu vaviri hapana waakasiya ari mupenyu." 
2Kings10:15 Paakabva ipapo akasangana naJehonadhabhu mwanakomana waRekabhu achiuya kuzosangana naye. Jehu akamukwazisa akamuti, “Uri papi? Ini ndiri wako ini. Ko iwe uri wangu here?” Iye akati, “Ndizvozvo.” Jehu akati, “Kana zvakadaro ndibate,” iye ndokumukwazisa. Jehu akamukwidza mungoro yake yehondo" 
2Kings10:16 akati, “Handei undoona shungu dzangu naTenzi.” Vakabva vamukwidza mungoro make." 
2Kings10:17 Kuzoti asvika kuSamaria akauraya vose vokwaAhabhu vakanga vasara muSamaria kudzamara aparadza sokutaurawo kwaTenzi nomuromo waEriya. 
2Kings10:18 Jehu akazounganidza vanhu vose akati kwavari, “Kunamata Bhaari kwaiita Ahabhu kwaiva kushoma kuye, ini Jehu ndichamunamata zvikuru kwazvo." 
2Kings10:19 Saka naizvozvo chindidaidziraiwo vaporofita vose vaBhaari navose vanomunamata navapristi vake vose kurege kuwana asingauyeko. Hapafanire kuva neanoshayikwapo. Ndinodaro nokuti ndine chibayiro chikuru kwazvo chokupira kuna Bhaari. Kuwana anoshayikwapo pake pamuperera.” Asi Jehu aiita izvozvo kuri kunyengedza achida zvake kuparadza vanamati vaBhaari. 
2Kings10:20 Jehu akati, “Itirai Bhaari musangano,” vakabvawo vaukokera." 
2Kings10:21 Jehu akatumira shoko kwaIsiraeri kwose, vanamati vaBhaari vose vakauya zvokuti hapana asina kuuya. Vakapinda mumba yaBhaari ikazara kunze nokunze." 
2Kings10:22 Jehu akati kune aichengeta maichengeterwa magemenzi, “Buritsira magemenzi vanamati vaBhaari vose.” Saizvozvo akavaburitsira magemenzi aye." 
2Kings10:23 Jehu akapinda mumba maBhaari aina Jehonadhabhu mwanakomana waRekabhu akati kuvanamati vaBhaari, “Nyatsotsvakai muone kuti hapana munamati waTenzi pakati penyu asi kuti vanamati vaBhaari voga.”" 
2Kings10:24 Vakapinda kundopira zvibayiro nemipiro yokupisa. 
2Kings10:25 Paakangopedza chete kupira chibayiro chokupisa, Jehu akati kune vakanga vakagaririra vaye nokuvakuru vakuru, “Pindai muvauraye! Hapana anofanira kupunyuka!” Vokugaririra vaye navakuru vakuru pavakapedza kuvauraya namapakatwa, vakakanda zvitunha panze vakapinda mumba yomukati memba yaBhaari." 
2Kings10:26 Vakaburitsa chifananidzo chokunamata chaiva mumba maBhaari vakachipisa. 
2Kings10:27 Vakapwanya chifananidzo chaBhaari ichocho, vakapwanya imba yaBhaari vakaiita chimbuzi kusvikira pari nhasi." 
2Kings10:28 Nokudaro Jehu zvaBhaari muIsiraeri akazviparadza kuti nho. 
2Kings10:29 Asi Jehu haana kukanda pasi zvechitadzo chaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati chaakapinza nacho vokwaIsiraeri muchitadzo, zvezvimhuru zvendarama zvaiva kuBhetieri nokwaDhani." 
2Kings10:30 Tenzi akati kuna Jehu, “Pamusana pokuti waita zvakanaka kumba yaAhabhu zvandinoda zvose zvanga zviri pamwoyo pangu, vana vako vakomana vechizvarwa chechina vachagara paumambo hwokwaIsiraeri.”" 
2Kings10:31 Asi Jehu haana kuchenjerera kutevedza murao waTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri nomwoyo wose. Haana kukanda pasi zvechitadzo chaJerobhoamu chaakapinza nacho vokwaIsiraeri muchitadzo." 
2Kings10:32 Pamazuva iwayo Tenzi akatangisa kutapudza nyika yeIsiraeri. Hazaeri akavakurira munyika yose zvayo yeIsiraeri," 
2Kings10:33 kubvira muna Jorodhani zvichienda kumabvazuva munyika yose yeGireadhi neyokwaGadhi neyokwaRubheni neyokwaManase; kubvirawo kuguta reAroero pedyo nebani romuna Arinoni zvichireva kuti Gireadhi neBhashani. 
2Kings10:34 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehu nezvose zvaakaita nougamba hwake hwose zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
2Kings10:35 Jehu akazoenda kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake, vakamuviga muSamaria. Jehoahazi mwanakomana wake ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings10:36 Jehu akatonga vokwaIsiraeri ari muSamaria kwamakore makumi maviri namasere. 
2Kings11:1 Amai vaAhaziya, Ataria pavakaona kuti mwanakomana wavo afa vakasimuka vakauraya vose vokumba huru." 
2Kings11:2 Asi Jehoshebha mukunda wamambo Joramu hanzvadzi yaAhaziya akatora Joashi mwanakomana waAhaziya akamusvovesera mumba mokurara iye nomureri wake pakati pavanakomana vamambo vakange voda kuurayiwa. Ndokumuhwandisa kwaakaita kuna Ataria akabva apunyuka kuurayiwa. 
2Kings11:3 Akava naye kwamakore matanhatu akazvihwandisa mumba yaTenzi, Ataria achitonga nyika iyi." 
2Kings11:4 Asi kuzoti mava mugore rechinomwe Jehoyadha akatumira shoko kuvakuru vakuru vavachengetedzi vamambo Karite nevokuchengetedza muzinda. Akavati vaunzwe kwaari kumba yaTenzi. Akaita chitsidzirano navo, akavati vapike mhiko muimba yaTenzi, akabva avaratidza mwanakomana wamambo." 
2Kings11:5 Akavaudza kuti, “Zvamuchaita ndezvizvi: pazvikwata zvenyu zviri zvitatu, chiye chinouya kuzoita basa musi weSabata china mapokawo acho matatu anoti boka rokuchengetedza muzinda," 
2Kings11:6 neboka rokuchengetedza pasuo guru reSuru, neboka rokuchengetedza kuseri kweboka rinochengetedza pasuo guru, chikwata ichochi ndicho chichachengetedza muzinda." 
2Kings11:7 Zvimwewo zvikwata zvenyu zviviri zvisingawanzoita basa musi weSabata zviya zvine basa rokuchengetedza imba yaTenzi vakakuta mambo 
2Kings11:8 ndivo vachakomberedza mambo vakapakata zvombo zvavo zvehondo. Kuwana anenge angofemera kupindira pakarongana vachengetedzi ngaaurayiwe. Kwese kunenge kuchienda mambo vanofanira kunge vainaye.” 
2Kings11:9 Vakuru vakuru ava vakaita sezvakanga zvanzi nomupristi Jehoyadha zviitwe. Mumwe nomumwe wavo akauya navanhu vake vakanga vasingafaniri kuva pabasa musi weSabata navaye vakanga vachifanira kuva pabasa musi weSabata vakauya kumupristi Jehoyadha. 
2Kings11:10 Mupristi akapa vakuru vakuru ava mapfumo nenhoo zvaiva zvamambo Dhavhidhi zvaiva zviri mumba yaTenzi. 
2Kings11:11 Vachengetedzi ava vakamira vakapakata zvombo zvavo zvehondo kubvira kumaodzanyemba kusvikira kuchamhembe kutenderedza atari nemba yamambo. 
2Kings11:12 Akabva aburitsa mwanakomana wamambo akamudzika ngundu youmambo akamupa bumbiro romutemo vakazivisa kuti ndiye mambo. Vakamuzodza mafuta vakarova makwa vachiti, “Mambo! Ngazvirambe zvakadaro.”" 
2Kings11:13 Pakanzwa Ataria zhowezhowe revachengetedzi nerevanhu akaenda kuimba yaTenzi kuvanhu. 
2Kings11:14 Paakatarisa akaona, mambo amire pedyo nomusimboti maererano netsika yaifanira kuitwa, vakuru vakuru vehondo nevokuridza mabhosvo vamire namambo, vanhu vose venyika iyi vachipembera kufara, hwamanda ichidandaura. Ataria akabvarura hanzu dzake akadaidzira achiti, “Kwapandukwa! Kwapandukwa!”" 
2Kings11:15 Mupristi Jehoyadha akaudza vakuru vakuru vaitungamirira hondo kuti, “Mubvisei mumitsetse yevachengetedzi mumuburitse, muuraye nebakatwa ani naani anenge woda kutsigirana naye.” Mupristi aiti haafanire kuurayirwa mumba yaTenzi." 
2Kings11:16 Nokudaro vakabata vakapfuura navo pasuo ramabhiza wokupinda nawo mumuzinda wamambo vakavaurayirapo. 
2Kings11:17 Jehoyadha akaitisa chitenderano pakati paTenzi namambo navanhu kuti vave vanhu vaTenzi uyewo pakati pamambo navanhu. 
2Kings11:18 Vanhu vose venyika iyi vakaenda kumba yaBhaari vakaipaza, neatari dzake. Zvifananidzo zvake vakazvipaza vakauraya Matani mupristi waBhaari pamberi peatari dzacho. Vapristi vaye vakabva vaisa vachengetedzi pamba paTenzi." 
2Kings11:19 Vakatora vakuru vakuru vehondo navachengetedzi vamambo nevokuchengetedza muzinda nevanhu vose venyika iyi ndokuunza mambo kubva kumba yaTenzi vachienda nepasuo guru revachengetedzi kusvika kumba yamambo. Akasvikogara pachigaro chake choumambo, chigaro chemadzimambo." 
2Kings11:20 Vanhu vose venyika iyi vakapembera kufara, muguta mukava norunyararo mushure mokunge Ataria aurayiwa nebakatwa kumuzinda wamambo." 
2Kings11:21 Joashi akatanga kutonga ava namakore manomwe. 
2Kings12:1 Mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwaJehu, Jehoashi akatangawo kutonga. Akatonga ari muJerusaremu kwamakumi mana amakore. Zita raamai vake rainzi Zibhiya vokuBheerishebha." 
2Kings12:2 Jehoashi uyu akaita zvaidiwa naTenzi mazuva ose oupenyu hwake nokuti mupristi Jehoyadha ndiye aimudzidzisa. 
2Kings12:3 Zvakadaro zvazvo nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira hadzina kubviswa. Vanhu vakaramba vachipira zvavo zvibayiro vachipisawo rusenzi panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira idzodzo. 
2Kings12:4 Jehoashi akati kuvapristi, “Pamari yose yezvinhu zvinoera zvinofanira kuunzwa kumba yaTenzi, mari yomutero wapamunhu, mari yakatemwa pamunhu woga woga, nemari inobviswawo nomunhu sokuda kwake achiuya nayo mumba yaTenzi," 
2Kings12:5 vapristi ngavatore mumwe nomumwe kuna sahomwe wake vagadzire imba iyoyi panenge pachidikanwa kugadzira.” 
2Kings12:6 Asi gore ramakumi maviri nechitatu rokutonga kwamambo Jehoashi rakadzamara kusvika vapristi vasati vambogadzira imba yacho. 
2Kings12:7 Naizvozvo mambo Jehoashi akadaidza mupristi Jehoyadha navamwe vapristi akavati, “Muri kuregererei kugadzira imba yaTenzi. Saka zvino, zvokutora mari kunanasahomwe venyu chizviregai, muendese mari iyoyo kubasa rayo rokugadzira imba iyoyo.”" 
2Kings12:8 Vapristi vakabvuma kuti zvokutora mari kuvanhu varege, ivo varegewo kugadzira imba iyoyo." 
2Kings12:9 Mupristi Jehoyadha akazotora zibhokisi guru akaboora buri pahwidibiro yaro. Akariisa pedyo neatari kurudyi topinda mumba yaTenzi. Vapristi vaichengetedza kumusuo, vaiisa mariri mari yose yaiunzwa mumba yaTenzi." 
2Kings12:10 Vaiti vakangoona kuti muzibhokisi umu mari yawanda, munyori wokwamambo nomupristi mukuru aiuya overenga vosungira mari yacho inenge yawanikwa mumba yaTenzi mututsapo." 
2Kings12:11 Mari yainge yayerwa vaipa vashandi vaiona nezvebasa remba yaTenzi, ivavo vaitambirisa vavezi navavaki vaiita basa pamba paTenzi," 
2Kings12:12 uye vokuvaka namatombo navacheki vamatombo nokutenga mapuranga nematombo akakwakwanurwa zvokugadzirisa imba yaTenzi uye nokubhadhara basa rose zvaro rokugadzira imba iyoyo. 
2Kings12:13 Asi havana kugadzirisa midziyo kana makomichi kana zvigero kana madhishi kana mabhosvo kunyange midziyo zvayo yendarama kana yesirivha zvomuimba yaTenzi 
2Kings12:14 nokuti yakapiwa vaiti vebasa vaiishandisa pakugadzira imba yaTenzi. 
2Kings12:15 Havaimbobvunzurudza vanhu vavainge vapa mari iyoyo yokutambirisa vanhu nokuti vakanga vari vanhu vakavimbika. 
2Kings12:16 Mari yemipiro yokuripa mhosva neyemipiro yokupfupira zvitadzo hayaiuyiswa mumba yaTenzi, yaiva yavapristi." 
2Kings12:17 Panguva iyoyo Hazaeri mambo weSiria akakwira kundorwisa guta reGati akarikurira. Asi Hazaeri paakati zvino oda kuvinga Jerusaremu," 
2Kings12:18 Jehoashi mambo wokwaJudha akatora mipiro yose yakanga yaturirwa kuna Mwari yezvinhu zvakatsidzirwa kupa Mwari naJehoshafati naJehoramu naAhaziya, madzibaba ake madzimambo okwaJudha pamwechete nemipiro yake yaakanga akatsidzirawo kupa Mwari uye nendarama yose yaiva mokuchengetera upfumi hwemba yaTenzi neyemumuzinda wamambo. Akatumira zvose izvozvi kuna Hazaeri mambo weSiria. Hazaeri ndokubva asiya Jerusaremu oenda zvake." 
2Kings12:19 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJoashi nezvose zvaakaita, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaJudha." 
2Kings12:20 Makurukota aJoashi akamumukurira akamupandukira akamuuraya mumba iya yapachimudhuri chamavhu munzira inodzika kuSira. 
2Kings12:21 Jozakari mwanakomana waShimeati naJehozabhadhi mwanakomana waShomeru, makurukota ake ndivo vakamuuraya akafa. Vakamuviga pamwechete namadzibaba ake muGuta raDhavhidhi. Amaziya mwanakomana wake ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings13:1 Mugore regumi nechitatu rokutonga kwaJoashi mwanakomana waAhaziya mambo wokwaJudha, Jehoahazi mwanakomana waJehu akatangisa kutonga kwaIsiraeri kuSamaria. Akatonga kwegumi ramakore rina makore manomwe." 
2Kings13:2 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi akatevedzera zvitadzo zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza, haana kusiyana nazvo." 
2Kings13:3 Tenzi akavirukira Isiraeri nehasha akaramba ovaisa mumaoko aHazaeri mambo weSiria nomumaoko aBhenihadhadhi mwanakomana waHazaeri. 
2Kings13:4 Jehoahazi akateterera kukumbira kuna Tenzi, Tenzi akamunzwa nokuonawo kubatwa zvakaipa kwaiitwa vaIsiraeri namambo weSiria." 
2Kings13:5 Naizvozvo Tenzi akapa Isiraeri mununuri zvokuti vakapunyuka mumaoko avaSiria, vanhu vokwaIsiraeri vakagara mumisha yavo samazuva ose." 
2Kings13:6 Zvakadaro zvazvo havana kusiyana nezvitadzo zvemba yaJerobhoamu zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza, akatozvitevedzera uyewo chifananidzo chokunamata Ashera chakaramba chiri muSamaria." 
2Kings13:7 Chakanga chavepo ndechokuti Jehoahazi akanga angosara namakumi mashanu avachairi vemabhiza nengoro dzehondo gumi nezviuru gumi zvavarwi vetsoka nokuti mambo weSiria akanga avaparadza avawotesa seguruva repaburiro. 
2Kings13:8 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehoahazi nezvose zvaakaita nougamba hwake, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzemadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings13:9 Jehoahazi akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake. Joashi mwanakomana wake ndiye akazotonga. 
2Kings13:10 Mugore ramakumi matatu ane rechinomwe rokutonga kwaJoashi mambo wokwaJudha, Jehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi akatanga kutonga Isiraeri muSamaria. Akatonga kwamakore gumi namatanhatu." 
2Kings13:11 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi haana kusiyana nezvitadzo zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza achitozvitevedzera zvake. 
2Kings13:12 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehoashi nezvose zvaakaita nougamba hwake pakurwa naAmaziya mambo wokwaJudha, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings13:13 Jehoashi akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, kumadzitateguru ake. Jerobhoamu ndiye akazogara pachigaro chake choumambo. Joashi akavigwa muSamaria pamwechete namadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings13:14 Erisha paakawirwa nedenda raizomutora, Joashi mambo weIsiraeri akadzikako kwaari akasvikochema paari achiti, “Baba vangu! Baba vangu kani! Ngoro dzamabhiza dzehondo dzeIsiraeri navachairi vadzo!”" 
2Kings13:15 Erisha akati kwaari, “Torai uta nemiseve,” iye ndokutorawo uta nemuseve." 
2Kings13:16 Akati kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri, “Torai uta hwenyu mutatamure.” Akahutatamura. Erisha ndokuisa maoko ake pamusoro pamaoko amambo" 
2Kings13:17 akati, “Chizarurai hwindo rokumabvazuva.” Iye akarizarura. Erisha ndokuti, “Chipfurai.” Iye ndokupfuura. Erisha akabva ati, “Museve waTenzi wokununura, museve wokununura kuvaSiria! Ndinodaro nokuti mucharwisa vaSiria muAfeki kusvikira mavaparadza.”" 
2Kings13:18 Erisha akati, “Torai miseve iyi.” Iye akaitora. Akati kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri, “Rovai pasi nayo.” Iye akarova pasi nayo katatu ndokubva arega." 
2Kings13:19 Munhu waTenzi akamushatirirwa akati, “Mungadai matoparova kashanu kana katanhatu kese. Ndopamaizokwanisa kurova Siria kusvikira maiparadza. Asi zvino muchangorova Siria katatu chete.”" 
2Kings13:20 Erisha akafa zvake vakamuviga. Zvikwata zvokupamba zvevaMoabhu zvaipota zvichiuya munyika umu mumwaka wepfumvunza. 
2Kings13:21 Zvino kwakati mumwe murume achindovigwa ndokuona hecho chikwata chokupamba. Vakangokanda murume uyu muguva raErisha akaenda akaguma mapfupa aErisha akabva amuka ndokumira chaizvo namakumbo ake. 
2Kings13:22 Hazaeri mambo weSiria akabata zvakaipa vokwaIsiraeri mazuva ose oupenyu hwaJehoahazi. 
2Kings13:23 Asi Tenzi akavaitira mwoyochena akavanzwira tsitsi akavacheuka pamusana pechitenderano chake chaakaita naAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho akarega kuvaparadza kunyange nazvino wese haana kumbovarasa paari iye. 
2Kings13:24 Pakafa Hazaeri mambo weSiria, mwanakomana wake Bhenihadhadhi ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings13:25 Jehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi akatorera pakare Bhenihadhadhi mwanakomana waHazaeri maguta akanga atorerwa baba vake Jehoahazi muhondo. Jehoashi akamukurira rutatu akabva adzosa maguta eIsiraeri. 
2Kings14:1 Mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaJoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mambo wokwaIsiraeri, Amaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo wokwaJudha akatangisa kutonga." 
2Kings14:2 Akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakumi maviri amakore ane makore mapfumbamwe ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Jehoadhini vokuJerusaremu. 
2Kings14:3 Iye akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi zvisingabva zvaenzana zvazvo nezvababa wake Dhavhidhi. Zvose zvaakaita akaita samaitiro aitwa nababa vake Joashi. 
2Kings14:4 Asi nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira hadzina kubviswa. Vanhu vainge vachingopira zvavo zvibayiro nokupisa rusenzi panzvimbo idzodzo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira. 
2Kings14:5 Umambo pahwakanga zvino hwava mumaoko ake chaizvo akauraya makurukota vanyakuuraya mambo, baba vake." 
2Kings14:6 Asi haana kuuraya vana vevaurayi ava sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mubhuku romutemo waMosesi panonzi naTenzi, “Madzibaba haafanire kuurayirwa mhosva dzavana vavo. Vanawo havafanire kuurayirwa mhosva dzamadzibaba avo. Munhu anofira mhosva yake iye pachake.”" 
2Kings14:7 Akauraya vaEdhomu gumi rezviuru muBani roMunyu, akavatorera guta reSera nehondo akaritumidza zita rokuti Jokitieri raririkudaidzwa nanhasi uno." 
2Kings14:8 Amaziya akatuma nhume kuna Jehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mwanakomana waJehu achiti, “Uya timirisane.”" 
2Kings14:9 Jehoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri akatumawo nhume kuna Amaziya mambo wokwaJudha achiti, “Rukato rwapaRebhanoni rwakatumira nhume kumuti womusidhari wapaRebhanoni rwuchiti, ‘Rega mwanasikana wako aroorwe nomwanakomana wangu ave mukadzi wake.’ Chimwe chikara chomuRebhanoni chakapfuura nepo chikakatsikirira pasi." 
2Kings14:10 Wakakurira Edhomu chaizvo ukabva waita zenze. Gutsikana nomukurumbira wako iwoyo ugare pamba nokuti unodirei kuzvidenhera nhamo inokuridibura iwe pamwechete naJudha?” 
2Kings14:11 Asi Amaziya haana kumbozviteerera. Jehoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri akakwirako, iye naAmaziya mambo wokwaJudha vakamirisana kurwa hondo kuBhetishemeshi rokwaJudha." 
2Kings14:12 VokwaJudha vakakurirwa nevokwaIsiraeri munhu wose rikava bararamhanya kutizira kumusha. 
2Kings14:13 Jehoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri akabata Amaziya mambo wokwaJudha mwanakomana waJehoashi mwanakomana waAhaziya kuBhetishemeshi. Akaenda kuJerusaremu akapaza mbimbi yorusvingo rweJerusaremu inoita mamita mazana maviri kubvira paSuo Guru raEfuremu kusvikira pasuo guru rapaKona. 
2Kings14:14 Akapamba ndarama yose nesirivha nemidziyo yose yaiva mumba yaTenzi nomudzimba dzokuchengetera upfumi hwomumuzinda wamambo. Akatorawo nhapwa ndokubva adzokera kuSamaria. 
2Kings14:15 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehoashi dzezvaakaita nougamba hwake namarwiro aakaita naAmaziya mambo wokwaJudha, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings14:16 Jehoashi akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake. Akavigwa muSamaria pamwechete namadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. Mwanakomana wake Jerobhoamu ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings14:17 Amaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo wokwaJudha akagara makore gumi namashanu shure kwokufa kwaJehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mambo wokwaIsiraeri. 
2Kings14:18 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAmaziya dzakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzamadzimambo okwaJudha. 
2Kings14:19 Vakaita bangano rokumupandukira muJerusaremu, iye akabva atizira kuRakishi. Asi vakatuma vanhu kuRakishi vakamuurayira ikoko." 
2Kings14:20 Vakauya naye vakamutakura namabhiza akavigwa muJerusaremu pamwechete namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi. 
2Kings14:21 Vanhu vose vokwaJudha vakatora Azaria akanga ava namakore gumi namatanhatu vakamugadza umambo panzvimbo pababa wake Amaziya. 
2Kings14:22 Akavaka Erati akaridzosera kune vokwaJudha mushure mokunge mambo avata aendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru. 
2Kings14:23 Mugore regumi nechishanu rokutonga kwaAmaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo wokwaJudha, Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waJoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri akatangisa kutonga muSamaria. Akatonga kwamakore makumi mana negore rimwechete." 
2Kings14:24 Iyeyu akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi. Haana kumbosiyana nezvitadzo zvose zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza. 
2Kings14:25 Akadzosera pakare muganhu yeIsiraeri kubvira tava kuda kundopinda kuHamati kusvikira kuGungwa reArabha sokutaura kwakanga kwamboita Tenzi nomuromo womuranda wake Jona, muporofita aibva kuGatiheferu mwanakomana waAmitai." 
2Kings14:26 Sezvo Tenzi akaona kuti nhamo yevokwaIsiraeri yakanga yanyanya chaizvo nokuti kwakanga kusisina kuti uyu muranda kana kuti uyu haasi muranda, wokununura Isiraeri pasisina." 
2Kings14:27 Asi Tenzi haana kumbenge ati achatsakatisa zita raIsiraeri panyika nokudaro akavanunura achishandisa Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waJoashi. 
2Kings14:28 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJerobhoamu nezvose zvaakaita nougamba hwake namarwiro ake nokudzosa pakare kwaakaita Dhamasikusi neHamati maguta akanga atorwa nevokwaJudha, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings14:29 Jerobhoamu akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake namadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. Mwanakomana wake Zekariya ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings15:1 Mugore ramakumi maviri nechinomwe rokutonga kwaJerobhoamu mambo wokwaIsiraeri, Azariya mwanakomana waAmaziya mambo wokwaJudha akatangisa kutonga." 
2Kings15:2 Akanga ava namakore gumi namatanhatu paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore makumi mashanu namaviri ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Jekoriya vomuJerusaremu. 
2Kings15:3 Iyeyu akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi sezvakaitwa nababa vake Amaziya. 
2Kings15:4 Zvakadaro zvazvo nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira hadzina kubviswa. Vanhu vainge vachingopira zvavo zvibayiro nokupisa rusenzi panzvimbo idzodzo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira. 
2Kings15:5 Tenzi akarova mambo nechirwere chemaperembudzi chikaramba chakamubata kusvikira pazuva raakafa. Izvozvo ainge ongogara mumba make ari oga oga. Jotamu mwanakomana wamambo ndiye akanga abata zvomumuzinda wamambo achitonga vanhu. 
2Kings15:6 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAzariya nezvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha. 
2Kings15:7 Azariya akazovatawo oendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake. Vakamuviga pamwechete namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake Jotamu ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings15:8 Mugore ramakumi matatu nechisere rokutonga kwaAzariya mambo wokwaJudha, Zekariya mwanakomana waJerobhoamu akatonga vokwaIsiraeri ari muSamaria kwemwedzi mitanhatu." 
2Kings15:9 Iyeyu akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi sezvakaita madzibaba ake haana kusiyana nezvitadzo zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza. 
2Kings15:10 Sharumu mwanakomana waJabheshi akaronga zvokumumukira akamuponda pane vanhu akafa. Iye ndokutonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings15:11 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaZekariya zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
2Kings15:12 (Ichochi ndicho chitsidzo chaTenzi chaakaita kuna Jehu achiti, “Vana vako vakomana vachagara pachigaro choumambo hwokwaIsiraeri kusvikira kuchizvarwa chechina,” zvikabva zvaitika saizvozvo)." 
2Kings15:13 Sharumu mwanakomana waJabheshi akatangisa kutonga mugore ramakumi matatu nechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaUziya mambo wokwaJudha. Akatonga kwemwedzi mumwechete ari muSamaria. 
2Kings15:14 Menahemu mwanakomana waGadhi akabva kuTiriza akakwira kuSamaria akaponda Sharumu mwana waJabheshi muSamaria akamuuraya ndokutonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings15:15 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaSharumu nokuronga kwaakaita zvokupanduka zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
2Kings15:16 Panguva iyoyo Menahemu akaparadza Tifusa navose vaivemo nedunhu raro, kubvira kuTiriza zvichienda mberi nokuti havana kumuzarurira guta irori ndokusaka akariparadza achitumbura madzimai aiva nepamuviri vakanga varimo." 
2Kings15:17 Mugore ramakumi matatu nechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaAzaria mambo wokwaJudha, Menahemu mwanakomana waGadhi akatangisa kutonga kwaIsiraeri. Akatonga kwegumi ramakore ari muSamaria." 
2Kings15:18 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi. Pamazuva ake ose haana kusiyana nezvitadzo zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza. 
2Kings15:19 Puru mambo weAsiria akauya kuzorwisa nyika iyi, ndokubva Menahemu apa Puru mari yesirivha inorema makirogiramu zviuru makumi matatu nezvina achida kuti abatsirwe kuita kuti umambo hwake hudzike midzi." 
2Kings15:20 Menahemu akawana mari iyoyi nokuteresa vokwaIsiraeri. Akaitora kuna vapfumi achibvisisa makumi mashanu emari yesirivha yamashekeri pamunhu, yokupa kuna mambo weAsiria. Nokudaro mambo weAsiria akadzokera zvake. Haana kuzoramba ari munyika umu." 
2Kings15:21 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaMenahemu nezvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
2Kings15:22 Menahemu akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake. Mwanakomana wake Pekahiya ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings15:23 Mugore regumi nechishanu rokutonga kwaAzariya mambo wokwaJudha, Pekahiya mwanakomana waMenahemu akatangisa kutonga kwaIsiraeri ari muSamaria. Akatonga kwamakore maviri." 
2Kings15:24 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi. Haana kusiyana nezvitadzo zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza. 
2Kings15:25 Mumwe mukuru mukuru wehondo yake ainzi Peka, mwanakomana waRemariya akaronga kumupandukira navarume makumi mashanu vokwaGireadhi vakamuuraya kuSamaria mumba yokuhwanda hondo yomumuzinda wamambo, akabva ava kutonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings15:26 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaPekahiya nezvose zvaakaita, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings15:27 Mugore ramakumi mashanu nechipiri rokutonga kwaAzariya mambo wokwaJudha, Peka mwanakomana waRemariya akatanga kutonga kwaIsiraeri ari muSamaria. Akatonga kwamakumi maviri amakore." 
2Kings15:28 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi. Haana kusiyana nezvitadzo zvaJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati zvaakapinza nazvo vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza. 
2Kings15:29 Pamazuva aPeka mambo wokwaIsiraeri, Tigiratipireseru mambo weAsiria akauya akakurira Iyoni neAbherobhetimaaka neJanoa neKedheshi neHazori nokwaGireadhi neGarirea nenyika yose yokwaNafutari. Akatapa vanhu ivavo akaenda navo kuAsiria." 
2Kings15:30 Hoshea mwanakomana waEra akaronga kupandukira Peka mwanakomana waRemariya akamuponda akamuuraya akatonga panzvimbo pake. Izvozvo raiva gore rechimakumi maviri rokutonga kwaJotamu mwanakomana waUziya. 
2Kings15:31 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaPeka nezvose zvaakaita, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzemadzimambo okwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings15:32 Mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaPeka, mwanakomana waRemariya, mambo wokwaIsiraeri, Jotamu mwanakomana waUziya, mambo wokwaJudha akatanga kutonga." 
2Kings15:33 Akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwemakore gumi namatanhatu ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Jerusha, mwanasikana waZadhoki." 
2Kings15:34 Akaita zvakarurama, zvinodiwa naTenzi, sezvakaitwawo nababa wake Uziya." 
2Kings15:35 Zvakadaro zvazvo, nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira hadzina kubviswa. Vanhu vainge vachingopira zvavo zvibayiro nokupisa rusenzi panzvimbo idzodzo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira. Akavaka Suo Guru roKumusoro repamba paTenzi." 
2Kings15:36 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJotamu nezvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha. 
2Kings15:37 Mumazuva iwayo Tenzi akatanga kutuma Rezini mambo weSiria naPeka mwanakomana waRemariya kuti varwise vokwaJudha. 
2Kings15:38 Jotamu akazovatawo oenda kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake. Akavigwa pamwechete namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi tateguru wake. Mwanakomana wake Ahazi ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings16:1 Mugore regumi nechinomwe rokutonga kwaPeka mwanakomana waRemariya, Ahazi mwanakomana waJotamu mambo wokwaJudha akavamba kutonga." 
2Kings16:2 Ahazi akanga ava namakore makumi maviri paakatangisa kutonga, akatonga kwamakore gumi namatanhatu ari muJerusaremu. Haana kuita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi, Mwari wake sezvakaitwa natateguru wake Dhavhidhi" 
2Kings16:3 asi akatevedzera gwara ramadzimambo okwaIsiraeri akatosvika pakupisa mwana wake mukomana sechibayiro, maererano netsika yakaipisisa kwazvo yaiitwa namarudzi akadzingirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi." 
2Kings16:4 Akapira zvibayiro akapisa rusenzi panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira napamwe pakatunhumara pasi pemiti yose minyoro. 
2Kings16:5 Rezini mambo weSiria naPeka mwanakomana waRemariya mambo wokwaIsiraeri vakakwira kundorwisa Jerusaremu. Vakakomba Ahazi asi havana kumukurira. 
2Kings16:6 Panguva iyoyo Rezini mambo weSiria akatora guta reErati pakare, ndokudzinga vokwaJudha muErati. VechiSiria vakauya vakagara muErati kusvikira nhasi uno." 
2Kings16:7 Ahazi akama nhume kuna Tigiratipiriesa mambo weAsiria kundoti, “Ndiniwo muranda wenyu mwana wenyu. Dai mangouya zvenyu mandinunurawo mumaoko amambo weSiria nomumaoko wokwaIsiraeri vamuka kundirwisa kuno.”" 
2Kings16:8 Ahazi akatora sirivha nendarama yaiva iri mumba yaTenzi nomudzimba dzokuchengetera upfumi hwomumuzinda wamambo akatumira sechipo kuna mambo weAsiria. 
2Kings16:9 Mambo weAsiria akanzwa chichemo chake. Akasimuka kundorwisa guta reDhamasikusi akarikurira akatapa vanhu vaivamo akaenda navo kuKiri akauraya Rezini. 
2Kings16:10 Pakaenda mambo Ahazi kuDhamasikusi kundosangana naTigiratipiriesa mambo weAsiria akaona atari yaiva muDhamasikusi. Mambo Ahazi akatumira mupristi Uria purani yeatari iyoyo namamiriro ayo noudorongoshwa hwose hwezvayakaita. 
2Kings16:11 Mupristi Uria akavaka atari achitevedza zvaakafanotumirwa namambo Ahazi kubva kuDhamasikusi. Mupristi Uria akaita saizvozvo mambo Ahazi asati asvika kubva kuDhamasikusi. 
2Kings16:12 Mambo paakadzoka kuDhamasikusi akaenda kundoona atari iyi, akasvika pedyo nayo ndokukwira payakanga iri." 
2Kings16:13 Akapisa mupiro wake wokupisa nomupiro wake wembesanwa, akapirawo mupiro wake wokuteura ndokusasa ropa remipiro yokuwadzana paatari iyoyo." 
2Kings16:14 Atari yendarira yakanga iri pana Tenzi akaibvisa pamberi pemba panzvimbo yayo pakati peatari yake nemba yaTenzi. Akandoiisa kuchamhembe kweatari yake. 
2Kings16:15 Mambo Ahazi akarongera mupristi Uriya achiti, “Paatari huru iyi ndipo pamunofanira kupirira mupiro wamangwanani wokupisa nomupiro wamanheru wembesanwa nomupiro wokupisa wamambo nomupiro wake wembesanwa. Ndipo pamunopirawo mipiro yokupisa yavanhu vose venyika nemipiro yavo yembesenwa nemipiro yavo yokuteura. Pana iyoyi ndipo pamunosasa ropa rose rezvibayiro zvokupisa neropa rose rezvibayiro. Asi atari yendarira ndeyangu ini, ndipo pandichapota ndichinzwa kuti zvinhu zvingafambe sei.”" 
2Kings16:16 Mupristi Uriya akaita zvose izvozvi sezvakanga zvanzi namambo Ahazi zviitwe. 
2Kings16:17 Mambo Ahazi akacheka ndokubvisa mapango okumisasa mitumbi yengoro, akabvisa padziri mabhavhu akabvisawo zibhavhu ziguruguru riya pahandira parakanga rakagadzikirwa. Akarigadzikira pachidzikiro chamatombo." 
2Kings16:18 Pamusana pamambo weAsiriya, akabvisa nzira yaiva nedenga rayo yakanga yakavakwa mumuzinda wamambo yokushandisa musi weSabata ndokubvisawo musuo wokunze wokupinda namambo mumba yaTenzi." 
2Kings16:19 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAhazi zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaJudha. 
2Kings16:20 Ahazi akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake, akavigwa pamwechete namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake Hezekiya ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings17:1 Mugore regumi nechipiri rokutonga kwaAhazi mambo wokwaJudha, Hoshea mwanakomana waEra akatanga kutonga kwaIsiraeri ari muSamaria, akatonga kwamakore mapfumbamwe." 
2Kings17:2 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi zvisina kubva zvaita zvazvo sezvemadzimambo okwaIsiraeri akamutangira. 
2Kings17:3 Kwakauya Sharumanesa mambo weAsiria kuzomurwisa. Hoshea akabva ava kutongwa naye achitera mutero. 
2Kings17:4 Asi mambo weAsiria akazozviziva kuti Hoshea apanduka pamusana pokuti Hoshea akanga atumira nhume kuna So mambo weIjipiti uyewo akanga asina kubvisa mutero waaisibvisa kuna mambo weAsiria gore negore. Naizvozvo mambo weAsiria akamuzaririra mujeri akamusunga imomo. 
2Kings17:5 Mambo weAsiria akauya kuzorwisa nyika iyi yose. Akasvika muSamaria, akakomba Samaria kwamakore matatu." 
2Kings17:6 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaHoshea, mambo weAsiria akakurira Samaria akatapa vaIsiraeri akaenda navo kuAsiria. Akandovagarisa kuHara nomuna Habhori rwizi rwokuGozani nomumaguta avaMidhi." 
2Kings17:7 Izvi zvakaitika pamusana pokuti vaIsiraeri vakanga vatadzira Tenzi, Mwari wavo nyakuvaburitsa kunyika yeIjipiti kwavaitongwa vari mumaoko aFarao mambo weIjipiti vakangawo voremekedza vamwe vamwari" 
2Kings17:8 votevedzera tsika dzemarudzi aya akadzingirwa vanhu vechiIsiraeri naTenzi notutsika twakanga twaunzwa namadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. 
2Kings17:9 Vanhu vokwaIsiraeri vaiitira Tenzi Mwari wavo zvinhu zvisina kururama muchivande. Vaizvivakira nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira mumaguta avo ose kubvira kunharire kusvika kumaguta aiva namasvingo. 
2Kings17:10 Vaizvimisira zvifananidzo zvokunamata nezvimwe zvifananidzo zviAshera pazvikomo zvose zvirefu napasi pomuti wose munyoro. 
2Kings17:11 Munzvimbo idzodzi ndomavaipisira rusenzi sezvaingoita marudzi avakabvisirwa naTenzi. Vakaita zvakaipa kwazvo zvakavirutsa Tenzi nehasha. 
2Kings17:12 Vakanamata zvifananidzo zvavakanga vanzi naTenzi musaite izvozvo. 
2Kings17:13 Asi Tenzi akanga achiyambira vokwaIsiraeri nevokwaJudha nomuromo wavaporofita navaoni achiti, “Tendeukai musiye nzira dzenyu dzakaipa muchengete mitemo yangu nemirao yangu maererano nemirao yose yandakapa madzibaba enyu yandakakutumirai nokuvaporofita varanda vangu.”" 
2Kings17:14 Asi havana kuteerera, vakaramba vari ndambakuudzwa samadzibaba avo vasingavimbi naTenzi, Mwari wavo." 
2Kings17:15 Vakashora mirao yake nechitenderano chaakaita namadzibaba avo nokuyambira kwese kwaaivaita. Vakateveredzana nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zvisina namaturo ese ivo vakabva vava vanhu vasina namaturo ese. Vakateverana namarudzi akanga akavapoteredza avakanga vanzi naTenzi musaatevedzere. 
2Kings17:16 Vakakanda pasi mitemo yose yaTenzi Mwari wavo vakazviumbira noutare hwakanyungurutswa zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvezvimhuru zviviri. Vakagadzirawo chifananidzo chokunamata chinonzi Ashera vakanamata gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvomudenga, vakanamatawo Bhaari." 
2Kings17:17 Vakapisa vana vavo vakomana navasikana sechibayiro. Vaishopera vachiromba mishonga vakazvipinza chaizvo mukuita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi, vachimuvirutsa nehasha." 
2Kings17:18 Naizvozvo Tenzi akashatirirwa kwazvo vokwaIsiraeri, akavabvisa pameso pake. Hapana vakasara kunze kwevedzinza rokwaJudha chete." 
2Kings17:19 VokwaJudhawo havana kuchengeta mitemo yaTenzi, Mwari wavo vakatevedzawo tutsika twakanga twaunzwa nevokwaIsiraeri." 
2Kings17:20 Tenzi akaramba zvizvarwa zvose zvokwaIsiraeri akavarwadzisa akavaisa mumaoko avapambi kusvikira avarasira kure nemeso ake. 
2Kings17:21 Paakamwaura vokwaIsiraeri achivabvisa kune vemba yaDhavhidhi ivo vakagadza Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati paumambo. Jerobhoamu akatinhira vaIsiraeri kure naTenzi akavapinza muchitadzo chikuru kwazvo. 
2Kings17:22 Vanhu vokwaIsiraeri vakatevedzawo zvitadzo zvose zvakaitwa naJerobhoamu. Havana kusiyana nazvo 
2Kings17:23 kusvikira Tenzi abvisa vokwaIsiraeri pameso pake sokutaura kwaakanga aita nomuromo wavaranda vake vaporofita. Saizvozvo vokwaIsiraeri vakatapwa munyika mavo vakaendwa navo kuAsiria kusvikira pari nhasi. 
2Kings17:24 Mambo weAsiria akatuta vanhu vokuBhabhironi nokuKuta nokuAva nokuHamatisefarivhaimu akavaisa mumaguta eSamaria pachinzvimbo pevechiIsiraeri. Samaria vakaiita yavo vakagara mumaguta ayo. 
2Kings17:25 Pavakatanga kugarako havana kunge vachitya Tenzi. Naizvozvo Tenzi akavatumira shumba dzikauraya vamwe vavo. 
2Kings17:26 Ndokubva zvasvitswa kuna mambo weAsiria zvichinzi, “Marudzi amakatuta mukaendesa kumaguta eSamaria haazive mutemo wamwari wenyika iyoyo. Naizvozvo akavatumira shumba. Zvino dzava kuvauraya nokuti havazive mutemo wamwari wenyika iyoyo.”" 
2Kings17:27 Mambo weAsiria akabva ati, “Tumiraiko mumwe wavapristi vamakatapa ikoko, vaendeko vagareko vavadzidzise mutemo wamwari wenyika iyoyo.”" 
2Kings17:28 Saizvozvo mumwe wevapristi wavakanga vatapa kuSamaria akauya kuzogara muBhetieri akavadzidzisa kuti vanganamate sei Tenzi. 
2Kings17:29 Asi marudzi ose, rudzi norudzi vakaramba vachingogadzira vamwari vavo vachivaisa mudzimba dzepanzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzakanga dzagadzirwa nevaSamaria mumaguta mavaigara." 
2Kings17:30 Varume vokuBhabhironi vakagadzira mwari wavo ainzi Sukotibenoti, vokuKuti vakagadzirawo Nerigari. VokuHamati vakagadzira Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 vaAvha vakagadzira Nibhehazi naTaritaki. VaSefarivha vaipisira vana vavo sechibayiro kuna Adhiramereki naAnamereki vamwari vomuSefarivhaimu. 
2Kings17:32 Vainamatawo Tenzi vachizvisarudzira vapristi pakati pavo pavanhu vakasiyana-siyana vachivapa basa munzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira, vaiva ndivo vokuvapirira zvibayiro mudzimba dzepanzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzacho." 
2Kings17:33 Vainamata Tenzi ukuwo vachinamata vamwari vavo maererano netsika yerudzi rwavanhu rwekwavainge vatapwa. 
2Kings17:34 Kusvikira pari nhasi vachiri kungoita zvavaiita kare. Havanamate Tenzi uye havachengete mirao iya kana zvirongwa kana mitemo iya kana zvirevo zvaTenzi zvaakatemera vana vaJakobho vaakati zita ravo rinzi Isiraeri. 
2Kings17:35 Tenzi akaita chitenderano navo akavati, “Musambonamata zvenyu vamwe vamwari kana kuvapfugamira kana kuvashandira kunyange kuvapira zvibayiro." 
2Kings17:36 Asi munofanira kunamata Tenzi nyakukuburitsai munyika yeIjipiti noukuru hwake nesimba guru. Ndiye wamunofanira kunamata, ndiye wamunofanira kugwadamira nokupira zvibayiro." 
2Kings17:37 Muchenjerere nguva dzose kuchengeta mirao nezvirongwa nemitemo nezvirevo zvaakakunyorerai. Musanamata vamwe vamwari. 
2Kings17:38 Musakanganwe chitenderano chandakaita nemi. Musanamate vamwe vamwari. 
2Kings17:39 Asi Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndiye wamunofanira kunamata. Iyewo achakununurai mumaoko avavengi venyu vose.”" 
2Kings17:40 Ivo havana kuteerera, asi vakaramba vachingoita zvavaiita kare." 
2Kings17:41 Marudzi iwaya ainamata Tenzi ukuwo vachinamata zvifananidzo zvavo zvokugadzira. Vana vavo navana vevana vavo zvaingoitwa namadzibaba avo, ndozvavari kungoita kusvikira pari nhasi." 
2Kings18:1 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwaHoshea mwanakomana waEra mambo wokwaIsiraeri, Hezekiya mwanakomana waAhazi mambo wokwaJudha akatangisa kutonga." 
2Kings18:2 Akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakumi maviri amakore ana makore mapfumbamwe ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Abhi mukunda waZekariya. 
2Kings18:3 Akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi sezvakaitwa naDhavhidhi tateguru wake. 
2Kings18:4 Akabvisa nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira akapwanya zvifananidzo zvokunamata akatemera pasi zvifananidzo zvaAshera. Akadimura-dimura nyoka yendarira iya yakanga yaumbwa naMosesi nokuti pamazuva iwayo vaIsiraeri vakanga vava kuipisira rusenzi semupiro ichinzi Nehushitani. 
2Kings18:5 Hezekiya aivimba naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri zvokuti hapana angamboenzaniswa naye pakati pamadzimambo ose okwaJudha vakatevera mushure make kana pane vakamutangira." 
2Kings18:6 Akaramba akati kwati naTenzi asingatsauki pakumutevera achichengeta mitemo yaTenzi yaakatemera Mosesi kuti ichengetwe. 
2Kings18:7 Tenzi aiva naye, kwose zvako kwaaienda aibudirira. Akaramba zvokutongwa namambo weAsiria akarega kumushandira." 
2Kings18:8 Akauraya vaFirisitia kusvikira kuGaza nedunhu rayo kubvira panharire kusvikira muguta rine rusvingo. 
2Kings18:9 Zvakazoitika kuti mugore rechina rokutonga kwamambo Hezekiya ipapo makanga muri mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwaHoshea mambo wokwaIsiraeri mwanakomana waEra, Sharumanesa mambo weAsiria akauya kuzorwisa Samaria ndokurikomba." 
2Kings18:10 Kurikurira akazorikurira pakupera kwegore rechitatu muri mugore rechitanhatu rokutonga kwaHezekiya izvozvowo muri mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaHoshea mambo wokwaIsiraeri, ndopakakurirwa Samaria ipapo." 
2Kings18:11 Mambo weAsiria akatapa vaIsiraeri akaenda navo kuAsiria. Akandovagarisa kuHara nomuna Habhori rwizi rwokuGozani nomumaguta evaMidhi 
2Kings18:12 nokuti havana kuteerera zvakanga zvataurwa naTenzi, Mwari wavo, vakatyora chitenderano chake, kunyange zvose zvavakaudzwa naMosesi muranda waTenzi, havana kumbozviteerera kana kuzviita." 
2Kings18:13 Mugore regumi nechina rokutonga kwamambo Hezekiya, Senakeribhu mambo weAsiria akauya kuzorwisa maguta ose okwaJudha akanga akavakirirwa netsvingo akaakurira." 
2Kings18:14 Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha akatuma nhume kuna mambo weAsiria kuRakishi achiti, “Ndakatadza. Dai mukachitisiya muende zvenyu. Chamunenge mati ndiite ndinoita.” Mambo weAsiria akapa Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha mutoro wokubvisa mari yesirivha inorema gumi rezviuru zvamakirogiramu nendarama inorema makirogiramu chiuru." 
2Kings18:15 Hezekiya akamupa sirivha yose yaiva mumba yaTenzi nomudzimba dzokuchengetera upfumi hwomumuzinda wamambo. 
2Kings18:16 Panguva iyoyo Hezekiya akakwatanura ndarama yaiva pamagonhi eTemberi yaTenzi napamagwatidziro yaakanga anamirapo, akaipa kuna mambo weAsiria." 
2Kings18:17 Mambo weAsiria akatumira mutungamiriri mukuru wehondo yake nerimwe jinda rake guru nomutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda make vaine hondo huru kwazvo kuna mambo Hezekiya kuJerusaremu kubva kuRakishi. Vakakwira vakasvika kuJerusaremu. Pavakasvika vakasvikomira kumugero wemvura wedziva rokumusoro pamugwagwa mukuru wokunhandare yomusuki wamachira. 
2Kings18:18 Pavaidaidza mambo, kwakabuda Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikiya aiva mukuru mukuru womumuzinda nasamunyori mukuru Shebhuna nomunyori Joa mwanakomana waAsafu." 
2Kings18:19 Mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda uya akati kwavari, “Itii kuna Hezekiya, zvanzi namambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria, ‘Unovimba neiko?’" 
2Kings18:20 Unofunga kuti kutaura pamuromo apa ndiko kuronga hondo here ikoko kana kuti simba rokurwa hondo iroro? Ndiani wawava kuinzva naye zvawava kutondipandukira kudai? 
2Kings18:21 Zvino chinzwa, uri kuvimba norutsanga zvarwo rwakatyoka, Ijipiti, runobaya muchanza munhu anenge ada kuti agamwe narwo. Ndozvakaita Farao mambo weIjipiti kuna vose vanovimba naye." 
2Kings18:22 “Asi kana zvako ukati kwandiri, ‘Tinovimba naTenzi, Mwari wedu,’ haasi ndiye here ane nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira neatari dzacho dzakabviswa naHezekiya achitaurira Judha neJerusaremu kuti, ‘Munofanira kunamata muri paatari iyi muJerusaremu umu.’" 
2Kings18:23 Mupikirane natenzi wangu mambo weAsiria, ndikupeka mabhiza zviuru zviviri. Pakopo ungaawanirewo vachayiri here iwe?" 
2Kings18:24 Kunyange akava mukuru mukuru wehondo pakati pamakurukota okupedzisira chaiwo atenzi wangu ungabva wafemera kumumhanyisawo here iwe, iwe uchidaro kutovimba neIjipiti kuti utowanawo ngoro dzehondo navachairi." 
2Kings18:25 Uyewo kuuya kwandaita kuzorwisa ndichiparadza nzvimbo ino, ndangouyawo here zvisina Tenzi mukati? Tenzi ndiye akanditi, ‘Vinga nyika iyoyi uiparadze.’ ”" 
2Kings18:26 Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikiya naShebhuna naJoa vakati kumutariri wezvomumuzinda wacho, “Dai mukataura zvenyu kwatiri isu varanda venyu nechiSiria nokuti tinochinzwa. Murege zvenyu kutaura nesu nechiJudha vanhu vari parusvingo apo vachinzwa.”" 
2Kings18:27 Asi mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda uyu akavati, “Munoti tenzi wangu andituma kuzotaura izvozvi kuna tenzi wenyu nokwamuri nhai ndichirega kutaurirawo varume vagere parusvingo apo vapinda nyatwa pamwechete nemi yokudya ndove yavo nemvura yavo.”" 
2Kings18:28 Mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda ndopaakasimuka kwazvo odaidzira chaizvo muchiJudha achiti, “Tererai munzwe shoko ramambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria." 
2Kings18:29 Zvanzi namambo, regai kunyengedzwa naHezekiya nokuti haakwanise kukununurai mumaoko angu." 
2Kings18:30 Musarege Hezekiya achikutii muvimbe naTenzi achiti Tenzi anonyatsokununurai uye kuti guta rino harimboiswa mumaoko avaAsiria. 
2Kings18:31 “Musateerere Hezekia nokuti zvanzi namambo weAsiria ngatinzwananei ubude kuno kwandiri. Mukadaro mumwe nomumwe achadya muchero womugirepisi wake, munhu wose achidya michero yomuonde wake; munhu wose uchinwa mvura yomutsime rake," 
2Kings18:32 kusvikira ndauya kuzokutorai ndoenda nemi kunyika yakangoita senyika yenyu iyi. “Nyika yembesanwa newaini nyika yechingwa nemigirepisi nyika yemiti yemuorivhi nouchi kuitira kuti murarame murege kufa. Musateerere Hezekiya achikufurirai achiti, ‘Tenzi achatinunura.’" 
2Kings18:33 Pamarudzi ose pana mwari here ati ambonunura nyika yake mumaoko amambo weAsiria? ‘Ko vamwari vokuHamati nokuAripadhi varipi?’ 
2Kings18:34 Ko vamwari vokuSefarivhaimu novokuHena nokuIvha varipiko? Vakanunura Samaria mumaoko angu here? 
2Kings18:35 Pakati pavamwari vose venyika idzodzo ndivanaani vakanunura nyika dzavo mumaoko angu zvingazonzi Tenzi achanunura Jerusaremu mumaoko angu?” 
2Kings18:36 Asi vanhu vakati mwiro kunyarara vakarega nokumupindura kwose nokuti chirevo chamambo chaiti, “Regai kumupindura.”" 
2Kings18:37 Ipapo Eriakimu mwanakomana waHirikiya aiva mukuru mukuru womumuzinda naShebhuna samunyori mukuru nomunyori Joa mwanakomana waAsafu vakaenda kuna Hezekiya hanzu vabvarura. Vakamusvitsa zvakanga zvataurwa nomutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda. 
2Kings19:1 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzamambo, Hezekiya akabvarura hanzu dzake akapfeka masaga akapinda mumba yaTenzi." 
2Kings19:2 Akabva atuma Eriakimu mukuru mukuru womumuzinda wake naShebhuna samunyori mukuru navakuru vakuru vavapristi kumuporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi vakapfeka masaga. 
2Kings19:3 Vakandomuti, “Zvanzi naHezekiya, ‘Nhasi uno izuva rokusuruvara, zuva rokutsiurwa, zuva rokufumurwa, nokuti nguva yokuti vana vachiberekwa yasvika, asi simba rokuvasununguka hapasisina." 
2Kings19:4 Zvingangoitika kuti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu anzwa zvataurwa nomutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda uya atumwa natenzi wake mambo weAsiria kuzonyomba Mwari mupenyu; iye Tenzi, Mwari wenyu angadaro akatsiudza zvaanzwa izvi. Naizvozvo dai mukanamatirawo chitsama chavanhu ichi chasara.’ ”" 
2Kings19:5 Pakasvika makurukota amambo Hezekiya kuna Isaya," 
2Kings19:6 Isaya akavati, “Endai mundotaurira tenzi wenyu kuti, zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Usatye zvako pamusana pomuromo wataurwa namakurukota amambo weAsiria wokundinyomba." 
2Kings19:7 Chiripo ndechichi ichi, ndichapinza mweya maari wokuti achangonzwa runyerekupe rwamarehwarehwa agopishinuka kudzokera kunyika kwake kwandichandomupinza murufu rwokuurayiwa nebakatwa munyika make imomo.’ ”" 
2Kings19:8 Mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda uye akadzokera nokuti akanga anzwa kuti mambo weAsiria abva kuRakishi akatomuwana achirwisana neRibhuna. 
2Kings19:9 Mambo weAsiria paakanzwa nezvaTirihaka mambo weItiopia akanga ari munzira kuuya kuzomurwisa, akatumazve nhume kuna Hezekiya achiti:" 
2Kings19:10 “Endai mundoti kuna Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha zvanzi, ‘Usanyengedzwe naMwari wako waunovimba naye achiti, Jerusaremu haichaiswa mumaoko amambo weAsiriya." 
2Kings19:11 Iwe wakangozvinzwirawo woga zvakaitwa namadzimambo eAsiria kunyika dzose zvokunyatsodziparadza chaizvo. Ko iwe ndopaunganunurwe nhai? 
2Kings19:12 Ko vedzimwe ndudzi dzakaparadzwa namadzibaba angu idzi dzinoti: dzokuGozani nokuHarani neRezevhu navanhu vokuEdheni vaiva kuTeresari, vamwari vadzo vakadzinunura here?" 
2Kings19:13 Ko mambo weHamati aripi zvino? Ko mambo weAripadhi? Ko mambo weguta reSefarivhaimu? Ko mambo weHena namambo weIvha varipi?’ ” 
2Kings19:14 Hezekiya akagamuchira tsamba iya mumaoko enhumwa akaiverenga akaenda nayo kumba yaTenzi ndokundoti ware ware pana Tenzi. 
2Kings19:15 Hezekiya akanamata kuna Tenzi achiti, “Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, imi mugere pamusoro pamakerubhu. Imi moga ndimi Mwari wenyika dzose dzapasi pano pose. Ndimi makasika denga napasi." 
2Kings19:16 Rerekai nzeve yenyu Tenzi munzwe. Zarurai meso enyu Tenzi muone, munzwe mashoko aSenakeribhu aatumira kuzonyomba nawo Mwari mupenyu." 
2Kings19:17 Ichokwadi Tenzi kuti madzimambo eAsiria akaparadza marudzi nenyika dzawo. 
2Kings19:18 Akapisa vamwari vavo nomoto. Akadaro hongu nokuti vakanga vasiri Mwari asi kuti zvaingova zvinhu zvakagadzirwa namaoko avanhu, miti zvayo namatombo. Ndokusakaka akazviparadza." 
2Kings19:19 Zvino Tenzi, Mwari wedu ndateterera tinunureiwo mumaoko ake, nyika dzose dzepasi pano dzizive kuti imi Tenzi ndimi moga Mwari.”" 
2Kings19:20 Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akatuma shoko kuna Hezekiya rokuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Munamato wako kwandiri nezvaSenakeribhu mambo weAsiria ndaunzwa.’ ”" 
2Kings19:21 Zvataurwa naTenzi nezvake ndezvizvi: Iri kukushora inokuzvidza mhandara yeZioni. Ari kutozunguza zvake musoro shure kwako mukunda weJerusaremu. 
2Kings19:22 Wawanyomba ukatuka ipapa ndiani? Wauri kuzhambira ipapa ndiani chaizvo? Waunodzvondorera maziso uchizvikudza kudaro ndiani? Wauri kudaro ndiye Mutsvene weIsiraeri 
2Kings19:23 nenhumwa dzako uchitonyombaka Tenzi iwe. Uchitoti zvako: Negurusvusvu rangu rengoro dzehondo, ndakakaramata makomo ini kusvika pamusoro, nadzo ndikasvika kwakaperera Rebhanoni, miti yeko yakarebesesa yemisidhari ndikairizhanisa, miti yeko yemisaipurasi yakanakisisa ndikaitema, ndikapinda ini chaimo mukatikati mayo, chaimo mumasango ayo matema;" 
2Kings19:24 ndikatocheramo matsime ndikanwa ini mvura imwewo. Ndakatsika ini netsoka yangu tukova twose tweIjipiti twukaoma kuti gwa. 
2Kings19:25 Zvaive mumwoyo mangu kwenguva ndefu hazvisati zvakusvika munzeve nhai, zvandakaronga kare kare pasichigare zvandava kutozoita zvangu iye nhasi zvokuti maguta ane tsvingo uaite mirwi yamatongo." 
2Kings19:26 Vagari vemo vachiti rukutu kupera simba, vakangaidzwa vazvishaira pazvo vaita sezvinhu zvinomera musango soruswiswi, souswa hunomera padenga remba hunoshwauruka kuoma husati hwambokura." 
2Kings19:27 Asi mugariro wako ndinouziva kwaunofamba ndinokuziva twaunobata ndinotuziva kunyange kundipunyairira kwako nehasha ndinokuziva 
2Kings19:28 nokuti uri kundipunyairira nehasha iwe kuzvitutumadza kwako kwasvika munzeve dzangu. Ndichaisa chikochekero changu pamhuno dzako ndichakuisa zvako matomu mukanwa ndikupishunutsire nokwakare kunzira kwawakauya nako kuno. 
2Kings19:29 “Ichi ndicho chichava chiratidzo chako, mwaka uno zvamuchadya zvichamera zvoga, gore ramakei zvichava zvamahoko, mugore rechitatu muchadyara mukatokohwa, muchatosima zvenyu minda yemigirepisi, mukatodyawo zvenyu michero yayo." 
2Kings19:30 Chitsama chavanhu vokwaJudha chichasara chichadzika midzi pasi, mudenga chichibereka michero" 
2Kings19:31 nokuti chitsama chinosara chichabuda muJerusaremu chikwata chevanopunyuka rufu chichabuda muGomo reZioni. Shungu dzina Tenzi ndidzo dzichaita izvozvi. 
2Kings19:32 “Naizvozvo panyaya yamambo weAsiria uyu zvanzi naTenzi: ‘Haambopinda muguta rino kana museve, haamboukanda. Hapana nhoo yaanomborivheyesera, kana kuriumbira nevhu kurusvingo chimusana chenzou kuita pokupindamo napo." 
2Kings19:33 Nzira yaakauya nayo yacho ndiyo yaachadzokera nayo. Kupinda muguta rino haambomupinda ndiTenzi anodaro kutaura. 
2Kings19:34 Ndichadzivirira guta rino ndigoriponesa. Izvozvo ndichiitira iyeni pachangu pamusana pomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi.’ ” 
2Kings19:35 Usiku ihwohwo mutumwa waTenzi akaenda akauraya vanhu zana rezviuru rine zviuru makumi masere nezvishanu. Pakafumomuka vanhu mangwanani, onei ivava vose zvangova zvitunha." 
2Kings19:36 Senakeribhu mambo weAsiria ndokusimuka oenda kumusha akandogara muNinevhe. 
2Kings19:37 Zvino akati achinamata ari mumba maNisiroki mwari wake, vanakomana vake Adhiramereki naSharezeru vakamuuraya nemapakatwa vakatizira kunyika yeArarati. Mwanakomana wake Esarihadhoni ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings20:1 Mumazuva iwayo Hezekiya akarwara zvokuti upenyu pakanga pasisina. Muporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akaenda kwaari akamuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, chirongai zvomusha wenyu nokuti mava kuzofa zvoupenyu kwamuri hapasisina.”" 
2Kings20:2 Ipapo Hezekiya akatendeukira kumadziro ndokunamata kuna Tenzi achiti: 
2Kings20:3 “Ndakutetererai zvangu Tenzi! Dai mangoyeukawo waro kuwadzana kwandakaita nemi mumafambiro angu ndakatendeseka nomwoyo wose ndichiita zvakarurama zvamunoda.” Hezekiya akaungudza achichema zvikuru kwazvo. 
2Kings20:4 Izvozvo Isaya akanga asati apfuura ruvanze rwepakati ndokubva izwi raTenzi rauya kwaari richiti," 
2Kings20:5 “Dzokera kuna Hezekiya ishe wavanhu vangu uti zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari watateguru wako Dhavhidhi, ndanzwa munamato wako ndikaona misodzi yako. Chiteerera unzwe, ndichakuporesa. Pazuva retatu uchakwira kumba yaTenzi." 
2Kings20:6 Uye ndichawedzera upenyu hwako namakore gumi namashanu. Ndichanunura iwe neguta iro rino iri mumaoko amambo weAsiria. Ndichadzivirira guta rino iri ndichiitira ini pachangu pamusana pomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi.” 
2Kings20:7 Isaya ndokuti, “Unzai chambwa chamakuyu vachitore vachiise pamota racho kuti apore.”" 
2Kings20:8 Hezekiya akati kuna Isaya, “Chichandiratidza kuti ndichapora chii? Uye chii chichandiratidzawo kuti ndichakwira zvangu kumba yaTenzi pazuva retatu?”" 
2Kings20:9 Isaya ndokuti, “Chiratidzo chamunoitirwa naTenzi chamuchaziva nacho kuti Tenzi achaita zvaakuvimbisai ndechichi. Mumvuri woenda mberi here nhanho gumi kana kuti wodzokera shure nhano gumi?”" 
2Kings20:10 Hezekiya akati, “Zviri nyore kuti mumvuri uende mberi nhanho gumi pano kuti udzokere shure nhano gumi.”" 
2Kings20:11 Muprofita Isaya akachema kuna Tenzi akadzosera mumvuri wacho shure nhanho gumi dzawakanga wafamba pachiringazuva chiya chakavakwa naAhazi. 
2Kings20:12 Panguva iyoyo Merodhakibharadhani mwanakomana waBharadhani mambo weBhabhironi, akatumira nhume netsamba nechipo kuna Hezekiya nokuti akanga anzwa kuti Hezekiya akanga amborwara." 
2Kings20:13 Hezekiya akavagamuchira akavaratidza dzimba dzake dzose dzokuchengetera upfumi hwomumuzinda hunoti sirivha nendarama netwokubikisa tunonhuwirira namafuta anokosha nezvombo zvake zvehondo nezvose zvaiva mudzimba dzake dzokuchengetera zvinhu. Chinhu chaiva mumuzinda make kana zvose zvoumambo hwake, Hezekiya hapana chaakasiya kuvaratidza." 
2Kings20:14 Muporofita Isaya akaenda kuna Hezekiya akati kwaari, “Ko shoko rauya navarume ava ndereyi? Vakakubvirai nepi?” Hezekiya akati, “Vabva kunyika iri kure kwazvo kuBhabhironi.”" 
2Kings20:15 Iye akati, “Chiiko chavaona mumuzinda menyu?” Hezekiya akapindura achiti, “Vaona zvose zviri mumuzinda mangu. Hapana chandasiya kuvaratidza mudzimba dzangu dzokuchengetera zvinhu.”" 
2Kings20:16 Isaya ndokuti kuna Hezekiya, “Chiteererai munzwe zvarehwa naTenzi." 
2Kings20:17 Kuchasvika mazuva okuti zvose zviri mumuzinda menyu nezvakachengetwa namadzibaba enyu kusvikira pari nhasi zvitutwe kuendwa nazvo kuBhabhironi pasina chinozosara, ndiTenzi anodaro kutaura." 
2Kings20:18 Vamwe vana vako vakomana vawakabereka vachatapwa vakasvikogadzirwa kuitwa vayuniki mumuzinda wamambo weBhabhironi.” 
2Kings20:19 Hezekiya akati kuna Isaya, “Shoko raTenzi ramataura ishoko rakanaka, nokuti aiti hazvinei zvazvo chero kune rugare nokugadzikana kwezvinhu mumazuva angu.”" 
2Kings20:20 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaHezekiya nougamba hwake hwose nokugadzira kwaakaita dziva riya nomugero uya akaunza mvura muguta iroro, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha."
