2Kings20:21 Hezekiya akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, kumadzitateguru ake. Mwanakomana wake Manase ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings21:1 Manase akanga ava namakore gumi namaviri paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore makumi mashanu ana mashanu ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi aHefizibha. 
2Kings21:2 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi achitevedzera tsika dzinosemesa kwazvo dzaiitwa namarudzi akadzingirwa vanhu vechiIsiraeri naTenzi 
2Kings21:3 nokuti akavakazve nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dziya dzakanga dzamboparadzwa nababa wake Hezekiya. Iye akavakirawo Bhaari atari akagadzirawo chimufananidzo chokunamata chiAshera sezvakaitwawo naAhabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri. Akapfugamirawo gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvose zvomudenga achizvinamata. 
2Kings21:4 Akavakawo atari mumba yaTenzi yakanga yanzi naTenzi, “PaJerusaremu ndipo pandichaisa zita rangu.”" 
2Kings21:5 Akavakira atari gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvose zvomudenga muzvivanze zviviri zvemba yaTenzi. 
2Kings21:6 Akapisa mwana wake mukomana sechibayiro. Manase akanga apindawo mune zvokufembera namaminimini nezvoun'anga hwokududzira mashura obvunzirawo kumasvikiro nokun'anga. Akaita zvakaipa zvakanyanya kwazvo zvisingadiwi naTenzi akamuvirutsa nehasha. 
2Kings21:7 Chifananidzo chokuveza chokunamata chiAshera chacho chaakagadzira chiya akachimisa mumba iya yakanga yanzi naTenzi kuna Dhavhidhi nokumwanakomana wake Soromoni, “Pamba iyi neJerusaremu pandakasarudza mumadzinza ose eIsiraeri ndipo pandichaisa zita rangu narini wose" 
2Kings21:8 uyewo kuti handizoita kuti tsoka yomuIsiraeri ibude kunze vadzungaire vari kunze kwenyika yandakapa madzibaba avo. Ndokunge chete vachenjerera kutevedza zvose zvandakati vaite uye nezvose zviri pamutemo wavakaudzwa naMosesi muranda wangu.” 
2Kings21:9 Asi havana kuteerera uyewo Manase akavafurira kuita zvakaipa zvaitopfuura zvakaitwa namarudzi aye akaparadzwa naTenzi achiadzingira vanhu veIsiraeri. 
2Kings21:10 Tenzi akataura nomuromo wavaranda vake vaporofita kuti," 
2Kings21:11 “Pamusana pokuti Manase mambo wokwaJudha akaita zvinosemesa kudai achiita zvinhu zvakaipa kupinda zvaiitwa navaAmori vakamutangira kuvapo akapinza vokwaJudha mukutadza nokunamata zvifananidzo zvake izvi," 
2Kings21:12 naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Chinzwai, ndava kuzopinza Jerusaremu novokwaJudha munyatwa yokuti ani naani anoinzwa anowunga nzeve." 
2Kings21:13 Urefu hwemwero hwandakaranga nahwo Samaria noudzamu hwandakaranga nahwo imba yaAhabhu ndiwo mwero wandicharanga nawo Jerusaremu. Sokukokota kunoita munhu ndiro, kuikokota zvokuti anogona kuitaridza pasi, ndiko kukokotedza kwandichaita Jerusaremu." 
2Kings21:14 Chitsama ichochi chenhaka yavanhu vangu chakasara ndichachiti kuche mumaoko avavengi vavo vachave vokuitwa kanyama kanyama nokuva vanhu vokupambwa navavengi vavo vose. 
2Kings21:15 Ndinodaro nokuti vakaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi vakandivirutsa nehasha kubvira zuva rakabuda madzibaba avo muIjipiti kusvikira pari nhasi.’ ” 
2Kings21:16 Uyewo Manase uyu akadeura ropa rakanyanya kwazvo ravanhu vasina nemhosva yese zvokuti akazadza Jerusaremu naro kunze nokunze kuwedzera pachitadzo chaakapinza nacho vokwaJudha mukutadza vakaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi. 
2Kings21:17 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzaManase nezvose zvaakaita nechitadzo chaakapara, zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha." 
2Kings21:18 Manase akazovatawo oenda kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake. Akavigwa mubindu romumuzinda make mubindu raUza. Mwanakomana wake Amoni ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Kings21:19 Amoni akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namaviri paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwemakore maviri ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Meshuremeti mwanasikana waHaruzi wokuJotibha. 
2Kings21:20 Iye akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi sezvakangoita baba vake Manase. 
2Kings21:21 Mune zvose akatevedza nzira yakafamba nababa vake. Akanamata zvifananidzo zvainamatwa nababa vake akazvipfugamira. 
2Kings21:22 Akafuratira Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba ake akarega kutevedza gwara raTenzi." 
2Kings21:23 Makurukota aAmoni akaita bangano rokumupandukira. Vakauraya mambo iyeyu mumuzinda make. 
2Kings21:24 Asi vanhu vomunyika iyi vakauraya vose ivavo vakanga vapandukira mambo Amoni. Vanhu ivavo venyika iyi vakagadza Josiya mwana wake mukomana umambo panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings21:25 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAmoni dzezvaakaita, dzakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo okwaJudha." 
2Kings21:26 Akavigwa muguva rake mubindu raUza. Mwana wake mukomana Josiya ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings22:1 Josiya akanga ava namakore masere paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwemakumi matatu amakore ane gore rimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Jedhidha mwanasikana waAdhaya wokuBhozikati. 
2Kings22:2 Akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi. Mune zvose akatevedza gwara raDhavhidhi tateguru wake. Haana kutsaukira uku kana uku. 
2Kings22:3 Mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwamambo Josiya, mambo iyeyu akatuma samunyori mukuru Shafani mwanakomana waAzariya mwanakomana waMeshuramu kumba yaTenzi achiti," 
2Kings22:4 “Chienda kumupristi mukuru Hirikiya averenge mari yakaunzwa mumba yaTenzi yakaunganidzwa navachengetedzi vokumusuo yakabviswa navanhu. 
2Kings22:5 Ngaiiswe mumaoko evashandi vanoona nezvebasa remba yaTenzi, ivo vaitambirise vashandi vari kumba yaTenzi vari kugadzira imba iyoyo," 
2Kings22:6 vavezi navavaki novokuvaka namatombo nokutengawo mapuranga namatombo akakwakwanurwa kuti imba yacho igadzirwe. 
2Kings22:7 Asi pamari iyoyo inenge yaiswa mumaoko avo havafanire kuzobvunzurudzwa nokuti ivo vanhu vakavimbika.” 
2Kings22:8 Mupristi mukuru Hirikiya akati kuna samunyori mukuru Shafani, “Ndawana bhuku romutemo mumba yaTenzi!” Hirikiya akapa bhuku iroro kuna Shafani akabva ariverenga." 
2Kings22:9 Samunyori mukuru Shafani akaenda kundotaurira mambo achiti, “Varanda venyu vakadurura mari yaiva muTemberi vakaiisa mumaoko avashandi vanoona nezvebasa remba yaTenzi.”" 
2Kings22:10 Munyori mukuru Shafani akataurira mambo achiti, “Hirikiya mupristi andipa bhuku.” Shafani akariverenga pana mambo." 
2Kings22:11 Mambo paakanzwa zvakanga zvakanyorwa mubhuku romutemo akabvarura hanzu dzake neshungu. 
2Kings22:12 Mambo akaudza mupristi Hirikiya naAhikamu mwanakomana waShafani naAkibhori mwanakomana waMikaya nasamunyori mukuru Shafani naAsiya gurukota ramambo kuti," 
2Kings22:13 “Endai mundotibvunzirawo kuna Tenzi ini navanhu, nevokwaJudha vose nezvakanyorwa mubhuku iri rakawanikwa, nokuti hasha dzaTenzi dzatakamutsirwa dzakakura, pari pamusana pokuti madzibaba edu haana kuteerera zvakanyorwa mubhuku iri kuti vaite maererano nazvose zvatakanyorerwa.”" 
2Kings22:14 Naizvozvo mupristi Hirikiya naAhikamu naAkibhori naShafani naAsaiya vakaenda kumuporofita Huridha mudzimai waSharumu mwanakomana waTikivha mwanakomana waHarinhasi, muchengeti wezvipfeko (akanga ava kugara kurutivi rutsva rweguta reJerusaremu), vakataura naye." 
2Kings22:15 Akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri, ‘Udza munhu akutumira kwandiri kuti," 
2Kings22:16 zvanzi naTenzi, chinzwai, ndichaunza nyatwa panzvimbo ino napavanhu vayo, sokunyorwa kwose kwakaitwa mubhuku rakaverengwa namambo wokwaJudha." 
2Kings22:17 Pamusana pokuti vakandifuratira vakapisira vamwe vamwari rusenzi, vachida kundishatirisa nezvose zvavakaita namaoko avo. Naizvozvo hasha dzangu dzichamukira nzvimbo ino dzisingazopodzwi." 
2Kings22:18 Asi panyaya yamambo wokwaJudha akutumai kuzobvunza kuna Tenzi, muti kwaari zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri pane zvawanzwa izvo, pamusana pokuti wakapfidza mumwoyo mako" 
2Kings22:19 ukazvirerekawo pana Tenzi, pamakanzwa zvandakataura zvandichaita kunzvimbo ino nokuvagari vayo kuti ichava renje nenzvimbo yakarengererwa rushambwa. Wakabvarura hanzu dzako ukachema pandiri, uye Tenzi anoti, chichemo chako ndakachinzwa." 
2Kings22:20 Naizvozvo ndichakuendesa kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ako, uchapinda muguva mako norugare, uye zvakaipa zvandichaita kunzvimbo ino, iwe namaziso ako hauchazozvioni.’ ” Vakandosvitsa shoko iroro kuna mambo." 
2Kings23:1 Mambo akatuma shoko, vakuru vakuru vose vokwaJudha neveJerusaremu vakaungana kwaari." 
2Kings23:2 Mambo akakwira kumba yaTenzi navanhu vose vokwaJudha, navagari vose veJerusaremu navapristi navaporofita navanhu vose vaduku navakuru. Akavavengera vachinzwa mashoko aiva mubhuku rechitenderano rakanga rawanikwa mumba yaTenzi." 
2Kings23:3 Mambo akamira pedyo nomusimboti akapika mhiko pana Tenzi yokuti anozomutevera achichengeta mitemo yake, zvirevo zvake nemirao yake nemwoyo wake wose nemweya wake wose kuchengeta zvisungo zvechitenderano ichochi zvanga zvakanyorwa mubhuku irori. Vanhu vose vakatsinhira chitenderano chacho." 
2Kings23:4 Mambo akaudza mupristi mukuru Hirikiya navapristi vaimutevedzera paukuru navatariri vepamusuo kuti vabudise mumba yaTenzi midziyo yose yakanga yakagadzirirwa Bhaari nechimufananidzo chokunamata, chiAshera neinomirira gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvose zvomudenga, akazvipisira kunze kweJerusaremu muminda yokuKidhironi vakaenda namadota acho kuBhetieri." 
2Kings23:5 Akadzinga pabasa vapristi vainamata zvifananidzo, vakanga vagadzwa namadzimambo okwaJudha kuti vapisire rusenzi munzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira mumaguta okwaJudha nomunharaunda yeJerusaremu. Akadzingawo pabasa vaya vaipisira rusenzi kuna Bhaari nokuzuva nokune mwedzi nezvidzengerere zvenyenyedzi nokugurusvusvu rezvinhu zvose zviri mumatenga." 
2Kings23:6 Akaburitsa chifananidzo chokumiririra Ashera mumba yaTenzi akaenda nacho kunze kweJerusaremu kukakova keKidhironi akachipisira mukakova ikako keKidhironi. Akachikuya-kuya kuita dota akandomwaya dota racho pamakuva avanhuwo zvavo. 
2Kings23:7 Akapaza dzimba dzemhombwe dzaiitirwa basa roupombwe pakunamata kwavo mumba yaTenzi maigadzirirwa namadzimai chifananidzo chiAshera chifananidzo. 
2Kings23:8 Akaburitsa vapristi vacho vose kunze mumaguta okwaJudha. Akan'oresa nzvimbo dzacho dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira maimbopisirwa rusenzi navapristi kubvira kuGebha kusvikira kuBheerishebha. Akaparadzawo nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzepamisuo mikuru dzaiva kwokupinda nako kusuo guru raJoshuwa mutongi weguta iroro dzakanga dziri kuruboshwe rwomunhu paanenge achipinda pasuo guru reguta iri. 
2Kings23:9 Zvakadaro zvazvo vapristi vepanzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira havana kukwira kuJerusaremu kuatari yaTenzi, asi vaitodya zvavo chingwa chisina mbiriso pachavo." 
2Kings23:10 Akan'oresa kwavari Tofeti nzvimbo iri mubani revanakomana vaHinomu kuitira kuti parege kuva nomunhu anozopira mwana wake mukomana kana musikana sechibayiro kuna Moreki. 
2Kings23:11 Akaparadza mabhiza akanga ateketererwa namadzimambo wokwaJudha kuzuva, kwokupinda nako mumba yaTenzi pedyo nemba yaNatanimereki mukuru mukuru wacho muberere, akapisa nomoto ngoro dzehondo dzezuva dzacho." 
2Kings23:12 Atari dzaiva padenga remba yaAhazi yapamusoro dzakanga dzagadzirwa namadzimambo okwaJudha neatari dzakanga dzakagadzirwa naManase muzvivanze zviviri zvemba yaTenzi, akadzikoromorera pasi akadzipwanya-pwanya akandokanda mavhu acho mukakova keKidhironi." 
2Kings23:13 Mambo akan'oresa kwavari nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzaiva kumabvazuva kweJerusaremu kumaodzanyemba kwegomo roUipi dzakavakwa naSoromoni kuitira chimwe chinosemesa chainzi Ashitoreti, mwari wevaSidhoni nechimwe chinosemesa chainzi Kemoshi mwari wevaMoabhu uyewo chimwe chinosemesa chainzi Mirikomu mwari wevaAmoni." 
2Kings23:14 Akapwanya-pwanya zvifananidzo, zvacho zvokunamata akatemera pasi zvifananidzo zviAshera akazadza panzvimbo pazvo nemapfupa avanhu." 
2Kings23:15 Chimwe ndechokuti atari iya yokuBhetieri panzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira yakavakwa naJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati nyakupinza vokwaIsiraeri mukutadza uya, atari iyoyo nenzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira akazvikoromorera pasi akazvipwanya-pwanya kuita mavhu. Akapisawo chifananidzo chiAshera." 
2Kings23:16 Josiya akacheuka akaona makuva mugomo imomo, akatumira vanhu kundotora mapfupa mumakuva iwayo. Akaapisira paatari akain'oresa maererano neshoko raTenzi rakataurwa nomunhu waMwari uya akanga afanozvitaura izvozvi." 
2Kings23:17 Akazoti, “Ko icho chakavakwa apo chiiko icho?” Varume vomuguta imomo vakamutaurira kuti, “Iguva romunhu waMwari akabva kwaJudha akafanozvitaura izvozvi zvamaita kuatari iyi yepaBhetieri pano.”" 
2Kings23:18 Iye akati, “Regai akadaro. Hapana anofanira kubata-bata mapfupa ake.” Saizvozvo mapfupa ake vakangoregawo akangodaro pamwechete namapfupa omuporofita aibva kuSamaria." 
2Kings23:19 Dzimbawo dziya dzose dzepanzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzaiva mumaguta eSamaria dzakavakwa namadzimambo okwaIsiraeri vachivirutsa Tenzi nehasha, Josiya akadzibvisa. Akaita kwadziri zvaakanga aita zvose kuBhetieri." 
2Kings23:20 Akauraya vapristi vose vomunzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira vakanga vari ikoko paatari dzacho, akapisira mapfupa avanhu pamusoro padzo ndokubva adzokera kuJerusaremu." 
2Kings23:21 Mambo akaudza vanhu vose zvavo kuti, “Chengetai Pasika yaTenzi Mwari wenyu sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa muBhuku rino reChitenderano.”" 
2Kings23:22 Zvaivapo ndezvokuti, kubvira pamazuva evatongi vakatonga Isiraeri kana pamazuva ose emadzimambo okwaIsiraeri kunyange emadzimambo okwaJudha, hakuna Pasika yakadai yakanga yaitwa." 
2Kings23:23 Asi mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwamambo Josiya, Pasika iyoyi yakaitirwa Tenzi muJerusaremu." 
2Kings23:24 Chimwezve ndechokuti Josiya akabvisa masvikiro nen'anga, nevamwari vanonzi materafimu, nezvifananidzo zvokunamata, nezvose zvakaipisisa kwazvo zvakaonekwa munyika yokwaJudha nomuJerusaremu achiitira kuti zviri mumutemo zvakanyorwa mubhuku rakawanikwa mumba yaTenzi nomupristi Hirikiya zviitwe." 
2Kings23:25 Hakuna kumbenge kwaita mambo akaita saiyeyu akapindukira kuna Tenzi nomwoyo wake wose nomweya wake wose nesimba rake rose, aitevedza zvose zvomutemo waMosesi kunyange kuzomuka mumwe akaita saiyeyu mushure make." 
2Kings23:26 Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo, Tenzi haana kupora hasha dzake dzinotyisa dzaakanga aviruka nadzo, dzaakanga avirukira nadzo vokwaJudha pamusana pokushatiriswa kwose kwaakaitwa naManase." 
2Kings23:27 Tenzi akati, “Ndichabvisa vokwaJudhawo pameso pangu, sokubvisa kwandakaita vokwaIsiraeri, guta iri reJerusaremu randakambosarudza nemba yacho yandakanga ndati ndiise zita rangu ndairamba.”" 
2Kings23:28 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJosiya nezvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaJudha. 
2Kings23:29 Mumazuva aFarao, Neko, mambo weIjipiti akakwira kuna mambo weAsiria kurwizi rweYufuratesi, Mambo Josiya akamuchingudzira. Farao Neko paakamuona akamuuraya kuMegidho." 
2Kings23:30 Makurukota ake akamutakura mungoro yehondo chava chitunha kuMegidho akauya naye kuJerusaremu akamuviga muguva rake. Vanhu venyika iyi vakatora Jehoahazi mwanakomana waJosiya vakamuzodza vakamugadza umambo panzvimbo yababa vake. 
2Kings23:31 Joahazi akanga ava namakore makumi maviri ana matatu paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwemwedzi mitatu ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Hamutari mwanasikana waJeremiya wokuRibhuna. 
2Kings23:32 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi achitevedzera zvose zvakaitwa namadzibaba ake. 
2Kings23:33 Farao Neko akamubata ari mambo kudaro muJerusaremu akandomuisa muubatwa kuRibhura kunyika yeHamati. Ndokubva ateresa nyika yacho mari yesirivha inorema zviuru zvitatu zvamakirogiramu zvina makirogiramu mazana mana nendarama yairema makirogiramu makumi matatu ane mana. 
2Kings23:34 Farao Neko akaita Eriyakimu mwanakomana wamambo Josiya mambo panzvimbo pababa wake akamusandura zita ndokumutumidza zita rokuti Jehoyakimu. Asi akatora Joahazi akaenda naye kuIjipiti, Joahazi akafira ikoko." 
2Kings23:35 Jehoyakimu akapa Farao sirivha nendarama. Asi akatenge ateresa nyika kuti awane mari yokutera sezvakanga zvanzi naFarao zviitwe. Aibvisisa vanhu venyika mutero wesirivha nendarama munhu wose achibvisiswa paainge atemerwa kuti ape kuna Farao Neko. 
2Kings23:36 Jehoyakimu akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore gumi nerimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Zebhidha mwanasikana waBhedhaya wokuRuma. 
2Kings23:37 Iye akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi achitevedzera zvose zvakaitwa namadzibaba ake. 
2Kings24:1 Panguva yaJehoyakimu Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akauya, ndokubva Jehoyakimu ava muranda wake kwamakore matatu. Asi akazodzoka omupandukira." 
2Kings24:2 Tenzi akamutumira zvikwata zvavaKaridhea nezvikwata zvevaSiria nezvikwata zvavaMoabhu nezvikwata zvavaAmoni. Akazvitumira kundorwisa kwaJudha kuti vaparadze sokumbotaura kwakaita Tenzi nomuromo wavaranda vake vaporofita. 
2Kings24:3 Izvozvi zvinofanira kunge chete zvakawira vokwaJudha ari Tenzi ainge atotema kuti zviitike kuti avabvise pameso pake pamusana pezvitadzo zvaManase maererano nezvose zvaakanga aita 
2Kings24:4 uye napamusana peropa risina mhosva raakadeura nokuti akanga azadza Jerusaremu neropa risina mhosva. Zvino Tenzi akaramba kuregerera izvozvi. 
2Kings24:5 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehoyakimu nezvose zvaakaita zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo okwaJudha. 
2Kings24:6 Jehoyakimu uyu akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ake. Mwanakomana wake Jehoyakini ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Kings24:7 Mambo weIjipiti haana kuzobudazve munyika make nokuti mambo weBhabhironi akanga zvino atorera mambo weIjipiti zvose zvaaiva nazvo kubvira kukakova keIjipiti kusvikira kurwizi rwaYufuratesi. 
2Kings24:8 Jehoyakini akanga ava namakore gumi namasere paakava mambo. Akatonga kwemwedzi mitatu ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Nehushita mwanasikana waErinatani wokuJerusaremu. 
2Kings24:9 Iye akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi achitevedzera zvakaitwa nababa vake. 
2Kings24:10 Panguva iyoyo machinda aNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akakwira kuJerusaremu akarikomba. 
2Kings24:11 Nebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi akavinga guta irori, machinda ake akarikomba." 
2Kings24:12 Jehoyakini mambo wokwaJudha akazviisa mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi, iye naamai vake namakurukota navanakomana vake navakuru vakuru vomumuzinda make. Mambo weBhabhironi akamuita mubatwa wake mugore rechisere rokutonga kwake." 
2Kings24:13 Akatakura upfumi hwose hwomumba yaTenzi noupfumi hwomumuzinda wamambo. Akajajada midziyo yose yendarama yaiva mumba yaTenzi kuita zvidimbu zvidimbu. Ndiyo midziyo iya yakanga yagadzirwa naSoromoni mambo weIsiraeri sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi. 
2Kings24:14 Akatapa Jerusaremu yose vaiti: vana vamambo vose namagamba ose okurwa vari nhapwa dzaisvika gumi rezviuru, kwoti nyanzvi dzokugadzira zvinhu nemhizha dzoutare. Hapana akasara kusiya chete varombowo zvavo vokupedzesera chaivo vomunyika imomo." 
2Kings24:15 Akatakura Jehoyakini kuBhabhironi naamai vake iye mambo navakadzi vamambo namakurukota ake namadzishe omunyika iyi akavatapa muJerusaremu akaenda navo kuBhabhironi. 
2Kings24:16 Mambo weBhabhironi akatapa magamba ose okurwa aisvika zviuru zvinomwe nenyanzvi dzokugadzira zvinhu nemhizha dzoutare vaisvika chiuru akaenda navo kuBhabhironi. Vose ivava vaiva vanhu vakasimba vakasvikawo chaivo vaigona kurwa muhondo. 
2Kings24:17 Mambo weBhabhironi akaita Mataniya babamudiki waJehoyakini mambo panzvimbo pake akamusandura zita omutumidza rokuti Zedhekiya. 
2Kings24:18 Zedhekiya akanga ava namakore makumi maviri nerimwechete paakava mambo. Akatonga kwemakore gumi nerimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Hamutari mwanasikana waJeremiya wokuRibhuna. 
2Kings24:19 Iye akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi achitevedzera zvose zvakanga zvaitwawo naJehoyakimu. 
2Kings24:20 Zvakazosvitsa pokuti Tenzi abvise Jerusaremu nenyika yevokwaJudha pameso pake pamusana pokushatirwa kwaakanga aita. Zedhekiya akazopandukira mambo weBhabhironi. 
2Kings25:1 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaZedhekiya mumwedzi wegumi pazuva regumi romwedzi iwoyo, Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhuroni akauya nehondo yake yose akakomba Jerusaremu vakatutira mavhu kurusvingo kuritenderedza kuita chokupindamo nacho." 
2Kings25:2 Nokudaro guta rakakombwa kusvikira mugore regumi nechiposhi rokutonga kwamambo Zedhekiya. 
2Kings25:3 Pazuva rechipfumbamwe romwedzi wechina wacho nzara yakabaya zvinorwadza muguta zvokuti vanhu vomunyika imomo vakanga vasisina chokudya. 
2Kings25:4 Kwakapazwa rusvingo muguta umu hondo yose yavarwi ikasvova nousiku nokunzira yokusuo guru pakati petsvingo mbiri pedyo nebindu ramambo vaKaridhea vakarikomba kudaro. Vakananga nokuArabha. 
2Kings25:5 Asi hondo yevaKaridhea yakaronda mambo ikamubatira kumapani okuJeriko. Hondo yake yose yakapararira ichimusiya," 
2Kings25:6 ivo vakabata mambo vakauya naye kuna mambo weBhabhironi kuRibhura akamutemera chirango chemhosva yake. 
2Kings25:7 Vakauraya vanakomana vaZedhekiya iye akatarisa. Vakamusvukunura maziso vakamusunga nengetani vakaenda naye kuBhabhironi. 
2Kings25:8 Mumwedzi wechishanu pazuva rechinomwe romwedzi iwoyo riri gore regumi nechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwamambo Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo, gurukota ramambo weBhabhironi akauya kuJerusaremu." 
2Kings25:9 Akapisa imba yaTenzi nomuzinda wamambo nedzimba dzose dzeJerusaremu nedzimba dzakanga dzakati kurei dzose akadzipisa. 
2Kings25:10 Hondo yose yevaKaridhea yakanga ino mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo yakakoromorera pasi tsvingo dzakanga dzakapoteredza Jerusaremu. 
2Kings25:11 Vamwe vanhu vose vakanga vasara mugutamo navakanga vapandukira kuna mambo weBhabhironi pamwechete navamwe vose voruzhinji vakanga vasara, Nebhuzaradhani akaenda navo muutapwa." 
2Kings25:12 Mukuru mukuru wevaichengetedza mambo akasiyawo vamwe varombowo zvavo vokupedzesera chaivo kuti vave vachengeti veminda yemigirepisi navarimi veminda. 
2Kings25:13 VaKaridhea vakadimura-dimura misimboti yendarira yaiva pamba paTenzi nengoro nezibhavhu ziguruguru riya zvaiva pamba yaTenzi vakatakura ndarira yacho kuBhabhironi. 
2Kings25:14 Vakatakura mapoto namafoshoro nezvigero nembenge dzorusenzi nemidziyo yose yendarira yokushandisa muTemberi 
2Kings25:15 namagwati okugokesa moto nendiro. Mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo, akatakura, zvendarama sendarama, zvesirivha sesirivhawo." 
2Kings25:16 Kana zviri zvemisimboti iye miviri nengoro dziya zvakanga zvagadzirirwa imba yaTenzi, ndarira yacho hakuzi kurema ikoko kwayaiita." 
2Kings25:17 Musimboti mumwechete waiva mamita masere kureba uine chepamusoro pawo chaiita mita rimwechete namasendimita makumi matatu kureba chakashongedzwa nekasefa kane zvinenge michero yamapomegiraneti zvose zviri zvendarama zvakatenderedza mbiru. Musimboti wechipiri wacho wakanga wakangoitawo zvimwechetezvo uine kasefa ikaka. 
2Kings25:18 Mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo iyeyo akatapa mupristi mukuru Seraya nomutevedzeri wake Zefaniya navachengetedzi vatatu vokumusuo. 
2Kings25:19 Maguta, akatapa mumwe mukuru mukuru aimbenge ari mutungamiriri wavarwi kuhondo namachinda amambo mashanu vaiva muguta umu nasamunyori womutungamiriri wehondo aitungamirira vanhu venyika iyi. Akatapawo makumi matanhatu avarume venyika yacho vaiva mugutamo." 
2Kings25:20 Nebhuzaradhani mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo akaenda navo kuna mambo weBhabhironi kuRibhura. 
2Kings25:21 Mambo weBhabhironi akavaponda vakafa kuRibhura kunyika yeHamati. Ndiko kutapwa kwakaitwa vokwaJudha vachibviswa munyika mavo. 
2Kings25:22 Kune vokwaJudha vakasara vasiyiwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi, Nebhuzaradhani akasarudza Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu mwanakomana waShafani kuva mutongi." 
2Kings25:23 Pakanzwa vakuru vakuru vose vezvikwata zvehondo navarwi vavo kuti mambo weBhabhironi akasarudza Gedhariya kuva mutongi, vakauya kuna Gedhariya kuMizipa. Kwaiti Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya naJohanani mwanakomana waKarea, kwoti Seraya mwanakomana waTanihumeti wokuNetofa naJaazaniya mumwe murume wechizvarwa chokwaMaaka." 
2Kings25:24 Gedhariya akatsidzira ivo navarwi vavo kuti, “Musatye zvenyu vakuru vakuru vechiKaridhea ava. Chenyu imi kugara munyika muno muchishandira zvenyu mambo weBhabhironi zvichakunakirai.”" 
2Kings25:25 Asi mumwedzi wechinomwe, Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya mwanakomana waErishama wokumba huru akauya negumi ravarume vakauraya Gedhariya navaJudha navaKaridhea vaakanga anavo muMizipa." 
2Kings25:26 Ipapo vanhu vose vakuru navadiki navakuru vakuru vezvikwata zvehondo vakasimuka vakaenda kuIjipiti nokuti vaitya vaKaridhea. 
2Kings25:27 Mugore ramakumi matatu nechinomwe routapwa hwaJehoyakini mambo wokwaJudha mumwedzi wegumi nechipiri pazuva remakumi maviri nechinomwe romwedzi iwoyo, Evhirimerodhaki mambo weBhabhironi mugore raakatangisa kutonga akaita mwoyochena wokuburitsa Jehoyakini mujeri." 
2Kings25:28 Akataura naye zvakanaka akamupa chigaro chapamusoro kupinda madzimambo aaiva nawo muBhabhironi. 
2Kings25:29 Naizvozvo Jehoyakini akabvisa hanzu dzake dzousungwa. Mazuva ose oupenyu hwake akazenge ava kudya namambo pateburu nguva dzose. 
2Kings25:30 Panyaya yezvaaifanira kutambiriswa, aitambiriswa mugove wezvinobva kwamambo nguva dzose, mugove pazuva, upenyu hwake hwose." 
1Chronicles1:1 Zitateguru ndiAdhamu kwouya Seti kwoti Enoshi 
1Chronicles1:2 kwotiwo Kenani kwouya Mahararieri kwouyawo Jaredhi 
1Chronicles1:3 kwozouya Enoki tevere Metusharaki kwozotiwo Rameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 kwozoti Nowa: kwouya Shemu naHamu naJafeti. 
1Chronicles1:5 Vana vaJafeti vakomana ndiGomeri naMagogu naMadhai naJavhani naTubhari naMesheki naTirasi. 
1Chronicles1:6 Vana vaGomeri: vakomana ndiAshikenazi naRifati naTogarima. 
1Chronicles1:7 Vana vaJavhani: vakomana ndiErisha naTarishishi naKitimu naDhodhanimu. 
1Chronicles1:8 Vanakomana vaHamu: ndiKushi naIjipiti naPuti naKanani. 
1Chronicles1:9 Vana vaKushi: vakomana ndiSebha naHavhira naSabhuta naRama naSabhuteka. Vana vaRaama: vakomana ndiShebha naDhedhani. 
1Chronicles1:10 Kushi ndiye baba: waNimurodhi uya akava mambo wokutanga pasi pano. 
1Chronicles1:11 Ijipiti: ndivo baba vaRudhimu naAnamimu naRehabhimu kwouya Nafutuhimu 
1Chronicles1:12 naPatirusimu naKasiruhimu (tateguru kwakabva vaFirisitia) kwozouya Kafutorimu. 
1Chronicles1:13 Kanani: akabereka Sidhoni dangwe rake naHeti," 
1Chronicles1:14 ndivo tateguru wavaJebhusi navaAmori navaGirigashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 kwoti wavaHivhi nevaAriki navaSini," 
1Chronicles1:16 kwozoti vaArivhadhi navaZemari navaHamati. 
1Chronicles1:17 Vana vokwaShemu: vakomana ndiEramu naAshuri naAripakishadhi naRudhi naAramu vanakomana vaAramu ndiUzi naHuru naGeteri naMesheki. 
1Chronicles1:18 Aripakishadhi akabereka Shera, Shera akabereka Ebheru." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebheru akabereka vana vakomana vaviri: mumwe ndiPeregi (nokuti panguva yake nyika yakanga yakamuraniswa.) Munun'una wake ainzi Jokitani. 
1Chronicles1:20 Jokitani akabereka: Arimodhadhi naSherefu naHazimavheti naJera," 
1Chronicles1:21 kwozouya Hadhoramu naUzari naDhikira 
1Chronicles1:22 naEbhari naAbhimaeri naShebha 
1Chronicles1:23 kwozouya Ofiri naHavhira naJobhabhu. Vose ivava ndivo vanakomana vaJokitani. 
1Chronicles1:23 kwozouya Ofiri naHavhira naJobhabhu. Vose ivava ndivo vanakomana vaJokitani. 
1Chronicles1:24 Kwaiva naShemu kwouya Aripakishadhi kwoti Shera 
1Chronicles1:25 kwouyawo Ebheru kwozouya Peregi kwoti Reu 
1Chronicles1:26 kwozoti Serugi kwouya Nahori kwozouya Tera 
1Chronicles1:27 kwozoti Abhuramu ndiye Abhurahamu iyeye. 
1Chronicles1:28 Vanakomana vaAbhurahamu ndiIsaki naIshimaeri. 
1Chronicles1:29 Zvizvarwa zvavo ivava ndezvizvi: Dangwe rechikomana raIshimaeri ndiNebhayoti tevere Kedhari naAdhibhieri naMibhusamu," 
1Chronicles1:30 kwouya Mishima naDhuma naMasa naHadhadhi naTema," 
1Chronicles1:31 kwoti Jeturi naNafishi naKedhima. Ivava ndivo vanakomana vaIshimaeri. 
1Chronicles1:32 Vanakomana vaKetura: mumwe mukadzi waAbhurahamu akabereka Zimurani naJokishani naMedhani naMidhiani naIshibhaki naShua. Vanakomana vaJokishani ndiShebha naDhedhani. 
1Chronicles1:33 Vanakomana vaMidhiani: ndiEfa naEferu naHanoki naAbhita naEridhaa. Vose ivava zvizukuru zvokwaKetura. 
1Chronicles1:34 Abhurahamu: ndiye baba waIsaki. Vanakomana vaIsaki: ndiEsau naIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles1:35 Vanakomana vaEsau: ndiErifazi naRueri naJeushi naJairamu naKora. 
1Chronicles1:36 Vanakomana vaErifazi: ndiTemani naOmari naZefi naGatamu naKenazi naTimuna naAmareki. 
1Chronicles1:37 Vanakomana vaReueri: ndiNahati naZera naShama naMiza. 
1Chronicles1:38 Vanakomana vaSeiri: ndiRotani naShobharu naZibheoni naAna naDhishoni naEzeru naDhishani. 
1Chronicles1:39 Vanakomana vaRotani: ndiHori naHomamu. Hanzvadzi yaRotani ndiTimuna. 
1Chronicles1:40 Vanakomana vaShobharu: ndiAriani naManahati naEbharu naShefi naOnamu. Vanakomana vaZibheoni: ndiAya naAna. 
1Chronicles1:41 Vanakomana vaAna ndiDhishoni. Vanakomana vaDhishoni ndiHamurani naEshibhani naItirani naKerani. 
1Chronicles1:42 Vanakomana vaEzeru: ndiBhirihani naZaavhani naJaakani. Vanakomana vaDhishani ndiUzi naArani. 
1Chronicles1:43 Kusati kwambova zvako namambo wokutonga vaIsiraeri, madzimambo akatonga munyika yeEdhomu ndeaya: kwaiti Bhera mwanakomana waBheori. Muzinda wake waiva guta reDhinihabha." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bhera paakafa, Jobhabhu mwanakomana waZera wokuBhozira ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Chronicles1:44 Bhera paakafa, Jobhabhu mwanakomana waZera wokuBhozira ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Chronicles1:45 Pakafa Jobhabhu, Hushamu wokudunhu revokwaTemani ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Chronicles1:45 Pakafa Jobhabhu, Hushamu wokudunhu revokwaTemani ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Chronicles1:46 Pakafawo Hushamu, Hadhadhi mwanakomana waBhedhadhi akakurira vaMidhiani vaya kunyika yeMoabhu ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake. Zita reguta rake rainzi Avhiti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadhadhi paakafa, Samira wokuMasireka ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Chronicles1:48 Pakafa Samira, Shauro weRehobhoti kuna Yufuratesi ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shauro paakafa, Bhaarihanani mwanakomana waAkori ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
1Chronicles1:50 Pakafawo Bhaarihanani, Hadhadhi ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake. Zita reguta rake rainzi Pai. Zita romudzimai wake rainzi Mehetabhieri aberekwa naMatiredhi mwanasikana waMezahabhu." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hadhadhi akazofa. Madzishe okuEdhomu: ndishe Timuna naAriya naJeteti 
1Chronicles1:52 naOhoribhama naEra naPinoni," 
1Chronicles1:53 kwouya Kenazi naTemani naMibhuzari 
1Chronicles1:54 kwozouya Magidhieri naIramu. Ivava ava ndivo madzishe okuEdhomu. 
1Chronicles2:1 Vana vakomana vaIsiraeri ndiRubheni naSimeoni naRevhi naJudha naIsakari naZebhuruni," 
1Chronicles2:2 kwouya Dhani naJosefi naBhenjamini naNafutari naGadhi naAsheri. 
1Chronicles2:3 Vanakomana vaJudha ndiEru naOnani naShera. Ivava vatatu kudaro ndovavakaberekerwa naBhatishua mukadzi wechiKanani. Asi pana Tenzi, Eru aiva munhu akanga akaipa mwoyo nezvo Tenzi akamuuraya." 
1Chronicles2:4 Judha akaberekawo nomuroora wake vana vanoti Feresi naZera. Vana vaJudha ava vakomana, vose pamwechete vashanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Vana vakomana vaPeresi: ndiHezironi naHamuri. 
1Chronicles2:6 Vanakomana vaZera: ndiZimuri naEtamu naHemani naKarikoru naDhara, vose pamwechete vashanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Vana vakomana vaKarumi: ndiAkari wokuparira Isiraeri nhamo uya nyakuita chitadzo panyaya yezvinhu zvakanga zvaturirwa kuparadzirwa Mwari sechipo. 
1Chronicles2:8 Vanakomana vaEtani: ndiAzariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Vanakomana vakaberekwa naHezironi ndiJerahimieri naRamu naKerubhai. 
1Chronicles2:10 Ramu ndiye baba: waAminadhabhu. Aminadhabhu ndiye baba waNahishoni jinda rezvizvarwa zvokwaJudha. 
1Chronicles2:11 Nahishoni ndiye baba waSarima, Sarima ariye baba waBhoazi. Bhoazi akabereka Obhedhi," 
1Chronicles2:12 Obhedhi akabereka Jese. 
1Chronicles2:13 Jese akabereka dangwe rake Eriyabhu wechipiri ari Abhinadhabhu wechitatu ari Shimea," 
1Chronicles2:14 Natanieri ndiye wechina Radhai ari wechishanu," 
1Chronicles2:15 Ozemu ariwo wechitanhatu Dhavhidhi ari iye wechinomwe. 
1Chronicles2:16 Hanzvadzi dzavo ndiZeruya naAbhigairi. Vanakomana vaZeruya ndiAbhishai naJoabhu naAsaheri vari vatatu kudaro. 
1Chronicles2:17 Abhigairi akabereka Amasa. Baba vaAmasa uyu ndiJeteru wechiIshimaeri. 
1Chronicles2:18 Karebhu mwanakomana waHezironi: akabereka vana vakomana nomukadzi wake ainzi Azubha nomumwe mukadzi wake ainzi Jerioti. Vana vacho ndiJesheru naShobhabhu naAridhoni. 
1Chronicles2:19 Pakafa Azubha, Karebhu akaroora Efurati akamuberekera Huru." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huru ndiye baba waUri. Uri ndiye baba waBhezarieri. 
1Chronicles2:21 Mushure maizvozvi, Hezironi akapinda mumba nomwanasikana waMakiri waakaroora ava namakore makumi matanhatu. Iye akamuberekera Segubhu." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segubhu aiva baba waJairi, uya aiva namaguta makumi maviri namatatu mudunhu reGireadhi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Asi Geshuri naAramu vakavatorera Havhotijairi neKenati nemisha yaro maguta makumi matanhatu. Vose ivava zvaiva zvizvarwa zvokwaMakiri baba waGireadhi. 
1Chronicles2:24 Mushure mokufa kwaHezironi, Karebhu akapinda mumba nomudzimai wababa vake akamuberekera Ashihuru baba waTekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Vanakomana vaJerahimieri dangwe raHezironi ndavava: dangwe rake ndiBhuna kwouya Oreni naOzemu naAhiya. 
1Chronicles2:26 Jerahimieri uyu aiva nomumwewo mukadzi ainzi Atara ndiye amai vaOnamu. 
1Chronicles2:27 Vana vakomana vaRamu dangwe raJerahimieri ndiMaazi naJamini naEkeri. 
1Chronicles2:28 Vana vaOnamu: vakomana ndiShamai naJadha. Vanakomana vaShamai ndiNadhabhu naAbhishuru. 
1Chronicles2:29 Zita romudzimai waAbhishuru ndiAbhikairi, akamuberekera Ahibhani naMoridhi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Vana vakomana vaNadhabhu: ndiSeredhi naApaimu. Seredhi akafa asina mwana. 
1Chronicles2:31 Vanakomana vaApaimu: ndiIshi. Vanawo vakomana vaIhi ndiSheshani. Vanakomanawo vaSheshani ndiAhirayi. 
1Chronicles2:32 Vanakomana vaJadha: mukoma nomunun'una naShama ndavava vana Jeteri naJonatani. Jeteri akafa asina mwana. 
1Chronicles2:33 Vana vaJonatani: vakomana ndiPereti naZaza. Ivava ndivo zvizvarwa zvokwaJerahimueri. 
1Chronicles2:34 Zvino Sheshani akanga asina vana vakomana asi vanasikana chete. Asi Sheshani uyu aiva nomuranda wake wechiIjipiti ainzi Jariha. 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshani akaroodza mumwe mwanasikana wake kuna Jariha muranda wake. Iye akamuberekera Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Atai: ndiye abereka Natani baba waZabhadhi. 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabhadhi uyu ndiye aberekawo Efurari baba waObhedhi," 
1Chronicles2:38 Obhedhi ndiye azoberekawo Jehu baba waAzariya. 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya akazoberekawo Herezi, Herezi akaberekawo Eriyasa." 
1Chronicles2:40 Eriyasa ndiye abereka Sisimai baba waSharumu. 
1Chronicles2:41 Sharumu akaberekawo Jekaniya baba waErishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Vanakomana vaKarebhu mukoma nomunun'una naJerahimieri ndavava: dangwe rake ndiMesha baba waZifu. Vanakomana vaMesha ndibaba waHebhuroni. 
1Chronicles2:43 Vanakomana vaHebhuroni: ndiKora naTapua naRekemu naShema. 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema ndiye abereka Rahamu, baba waJorikeamu. Rekemu ndiye baba waShamai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Vanakomana vaShamai ndiMaoni, baba waBhetizuru." 
1Chronicles2:46 Uyewo Efa murongo waKarebhu: akabereka Harani naMoza naGazezi. Harani ndiye baba waGazezi. 
1Chronicles2:47 Vanakomana vaJaidhai: ndavava ava vana Regemu naJotamu naGeshani naPereti naEfa naShaafu. 
1Chronicles2:48 Maaka murongo waKarebhu: ndiye akabereka Shebheru naTirihana. 
1Chronicles2:49 Akaberekawo Shaafu baba waMadhimana naShebha baba waMakibhena nababa waGibhea. Mwanasikana waKarebhu ndiAkisa. 
1Chronicles2:50 Izvozvi izvi ndizvo zvizvarwa zvokwaKarebhu. Vanakomana vaHuru: dangwe raEfurati ndiShobhari baba waKiriatijearimu 
1Chronicles2:51 naSarima baba waBheterehemu: naHerefu baba waBhetijadheru. 
1Chronicles2:52 Shobhari baba waKiriatijearimu vaiva navamwe vanakomana vokwaHaroe chikamu chevokwaMenuhoti. 
1Chronicles2:53 Mhuri dzokwaKiriatijearimu ndedzidzi idzi, kunoti vokwaItira nevokwaPuti nevokwaShumati nevokwaMishira kwakabva vokwaZorati nevokwaEshitaori." 
1Chronicles2:54 Vanakomana vaSarima: ndiBheterehemu nevokwaNetofati naAtirotibhetijoabhu nechikamu chevokwaManahati vechiZora. 
1Chronicles2:55 Mhuriwo dzavanyori vaiva vagari vokuJabhezi ndedzidzi idzi, kunoti vokwaTirati nevokwaShimeati nevokwaSukati. Ivava ndivo vaKani vokwaHamati tateguru wemba yokwaRekabhu." 
1Chronicles3:1 Vanakomana vaDhavhidhi: vakaberekerwa kuHebhuroni ndeava. Wokutanga wacho ndiAmunoni waakabereka nomukadzi wake vaAhinoamu vokuJezirieri wechipiri ari Dhanieri waakabereka naAbhigairi vokuKarimeri 
1Chronicles3:2 wechitatuwo ari Abhusharomu, amai vake uyu ainzi Maaka mukunda waTarimai mambo weGeshuri. Wechina ndiAdhoniya amai vake ari Hagiti." 
1Chronicles3:3 Wechishanu ndiShefatiya waakabereka naAbhitari wechitanhatu ari Itireamu waakabereka nomukadzi wake Egira. 
1Chronicles3:4 Vatanhatu ava akavaberekera kuHebhuroni kwaakatonga ari kwamakore manomwe nemwedzi mitanhatu. Akazotonga kwamakore makumi matatu namatatu ari muJerusaremu. 
1Chronicles3:5 Vanakomana vaakazoberekerwa muJerusaremu ndevava: kunoti Shemea naShobhabhu naNatani naSoromoni vari vana kudai vaakaberekerwa naBhatishua mwanasikana waAmieri," 
1Chronicles3:6 kwoti Ibhari naErishama naErifereti," 
1Chronicles3:7 kwouya Noga naNefegi naJafiya 
1Chronicles3:8 kwouyawo Erishama naEridha naErifereti pamwechete vapfumbamwe. 
1Chronicles3:9 Vose ivava ndivo vana vaDhavhidhi vakomana tisingaverenge vanakomana vevarongo. Tamari ndiye hanzvadzi yavo. 
1Chronicles3:10 Mwanakomana waSoromoni ndiRehobhoamu waRehobhoamu ndiAbhiya waAbhiya ndiAsa waAsa ndiJehoshafati. 
1Chronicles3:11 Mwanakomana waJehoshafati ndiJoramu waJoramu ndiAhaziya waAhaziya ndiJoashi. 
1Chronicles3:12 Mwanakomanawo waJoashi ndiAmaziya waAmaziya ndiAzariya waAzariya ndiJotamu. 
1Chronicles3:13 Mwanakomana waJotamu ndiAhazi waAhazi ndiHezekiya waHezekiya ndiManase. 
1Chronicles3:14 Mwanakomana waManase ndiAmoni waAmoni ndiJosiya. 
1Chronicles3:15 Vanakomana vokwaJosiya ndavava: dangwe rake ndiJohanani wechipiri ndiJehoyakimu wechitatu ndiZedhekiya wechina ndiSharumu. 
1Chronicles3:16 Vanakomana vokwaJehoyakimu ndovava ava: mwana wake Jekoniya waJekoniya ndiZedhekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Vanakomana vokwaJekoniya nyakutapwa uya ndavava: paiti, mwana wake Shearitieri" 
1Chronicles3:18 kwouya Marikiramu naPedhaya naShenazari naJekaniya naHoshama naNedhabhiya. 
1Chronicles3:19 Vanakomana vokwaPedhaya: ndiZerubhabheru naShimei. Vanakomana vokwaZerubhabheru ndiMeshuramu naHananiya, Sheromuti ndiyo hanzvadzi yavo" 
1Chronicles3:20 kwouyawo Hashubha naOheri naBherikiya naHasadhiya naJushabhihesedhi vari vashanu kudaro. 
1Chronicles3:21 Vanakomana vaVaHananiya: ndiPeratiya, waPeratiya ndiJeshaya waJeshaya ndiRefaya waRefaya ndiArinani waArinani ndiObhadhiya waObhadhiya ndiShekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Vanakomana vokwaShekaniya: ndiShemiya. Vana vaShemiya vakomana ndiHatushi naIgari naBhariya naNeariya naShafati vari vatanhatu. 
1Chronicles3:23 Vanakomana vokwaNeariya: ndiErioenai naHizikiya naAzirikamu pautatu hwavo. 
1Chronicles3:24 Vanawo vakomana vokwaErioenai: ndiHodhavhiya naEriyashibhu naPeraya naAkubhu naJohanani naDheraya naAnani vari vanomwe kudaro. 
1Chronicles4:1 Vanakomana vaJudha: ndiPerezi naHezironi naKarumi naHuru naShobhabhu. 
1Chronicles4:2 Reaya mwanakomana waShobharu: akabereka Jahati baba waAhumai naRahadhi. Ivava ndidzo mhuri dzokwaZora. 
1Chronicles4:3 Vana vakomana vaEtamu: ndaava vanoti; Jezirieri naIshima naIdhibhashi. Zita rehanzvadzi yavo ndiHazireriponi. 
1Chronicles4:4 Penueri ndiye baba waGedhori, Ezeru ariye baba waHusha. Ivava ava ndizvo zvizvarwa zvokwaHuru dangwe raEfurata baba waBheterehemu." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ashuru baba waTekoa: vaiva nebarika ravakadzi vaviri, mumwe ainzi Hera mumwe achinzi Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara akamuberekera: Ahuzamu naHefa naTemeni naHaahashitari. Ivava ndivo vaiva vana vaNaara. 
1Chronicles4:7 Vanakomana vaHera: ndiZereti naIzihari naEtinanai. 
1Chronicles4:8 Kozi ndiye baba vaAnubhu naZobhebha nemhuri dzokwaAhariheri mwanakomana waHarumu. 
1Chronicles4:9 Jabhezi uyu aiva munhu anoremekedzwa kwazvo navakoma navanun'una vake. Amai vake vakamutumidza zita rokuti Jabhezi vachiti pakumubereka ndakaona nhamo. 
1Chronicles4:10 Jabhezi akanamata Mwari weIsiraeri achiti: “Dai mandikomborerawo zvenyu nyika yangu muikudze-kudzewo ruoko rwenyu rurambe ruchindisesedza, mundidzivirirewo kune zvakaipa kuti zvirege kundikuvadza.” Mwari akamuitira zvaakakumbira." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kerubhu mukoma nomunun'una naShuha ndiye akabereka Mehiri baba waEshitoni. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshitoni ndiye baba waBhetirafa naPasea naTehina uya baba waIrinahashi. Ivava ava ndivo vanhu vokuReka. 
1Chronicles4:13 Vanakomana vaKenazi: ndiOtinieri naSeraya. Vana vaOtinieri vakomana ndiHatati 
1Chronicles4:14 kwouya Meonotai baba waOfura. Seraya ndiye abereka Joabhu baba wevokwaGeharashimu vainzarwo nokuti vaiva mhizha. 
1Chronicles4:15 Vanakomana vaKerebhu mwanakomana waJefune: ndiIru naEra naNaamu. Vanawo vaEra vakomana ndiKenazi. 
1Chronicles4:16 Vana vakomana vaJeharerieri: ndiZifu naZifa naTiria naAsareri. 
1Chronicles4:17 Vanakomana vaEzira: ndiJeteru naMeredhi naEferu naJaroni. Ivava ndivo vanakomana vaBhitia mukunda waFarao akaroorwa naMeredhi. Akavawo napamuviri akabereka Miriamu naShamai naIshibha baba waEshitemoa. 
1Chronicles4:18 Mudzimai wake wechiJudha, akamuberekera Jeredhi baba waGedhori kwouya Hebheru baba waSoko kwouyawo Jekutieri baba waZanoa." 
1Chronicles4:19 Vanakomana vaHodhiya nomudzimai wake uya hanzvadzi yaNahamu ndivo madzibaba aKeira wokuGarima naEshitemoa wokwaMaaka. 
1Chronicles4:20 Vana vakomana vaShimoni ndiAmunoni naRina naBhenihanani naTironi. Vanawo vaIshi vakomana ndiZoheti naBhenizoheti. 
1Chronicles4:21 Vanakomana vaShera, mwanakomana waJudha: ndevava ava kunoti Eru baba waReka, kwouya Raadha baba waMaresha, kwouyawo mhuri dziya dzemba yevagadziri vemicheka yerineni vokuBhetiashibhea" 
1Chronicles4:22 kwozouya Jokimu navanhu vokwaKozebha naJoashi naSarafu akandoita mukuwasha wevaMoabhu akazodzokera kuRakemu (Nyaya dzachowo idzi ndedzakarekare kwazvo). 
1Chronicles4:23 Ivava ava ndivo vaumbi vehari nevagari vokuNetaimu neGedhera. Vaigarako pamwechete namambo vari vokumushandira. 
1Chronicles4:24 Vanakomana vaSimeoni: ndiNemueri naJamini naJaribhu naZera naShauru. 
1Chronicles4:25 Mwanakomana waShauru ndiSharumu, waSharumu ndiMibhishamu, waMibhishamu ndiMishima." 
1Chronicles4:26 Vanakomana vaMishima ndiHamueri, waHamueri ndiZakuri, waZakuri ndiShimei." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimei akanga ana vanakomana gumi navatanhatu navanasikana vatanhatu. Asi vakoma navanun'una vake vakanga vasina vana vakawanda kunyangova mhuri yake yose haina kuwanda sevana vokwaJudha. 
1Chronicles4:28 Vaigara kuBheerishebha nokuMoradha nokuHazarishuaru 
1Chronicles4:29 nokuBhiriha nokuEzemu nokuTorati 
1Chronicles4:30 nokuBhetieri nokuHoruma nokuZikiragi 
1Chronicles4:31 nokuBhetimarikabhoti nokuHazarisuzimu nokuBhetibhiri nokuShaaraimu. Iwayo ndiwo aiva maguta avo kusvikira kutonga kwaDhavhidhi. 
1Chronicles4:32 Misha yavo yaiva iyi inoti Etamu neAini neRimoni neTokeni neAshani ari maguta, mashanu kudaro" 
1Chronicles4:33 nemisha yakanga yakapoteredza maguta iwayo kusvikira kuBhaari, imomo ndomavaigara. Mamiriro akaita mhuri dzavo ndeaya aya:" 
1Chronicles4:34 kuna Meshobha naJamureki naJosha mwanakomana waAmaziya 
1Chronicles4:35 kwouya Joeri naJehu. Mwanakomana waJehu ndiJoshibhiya, waJoshibhiya ndiSeraya waSerayawo ndiAsieri" 
1Chronicles4:36 kwozouya Erioenai naJoakobha naJeshohaya naAsaya naAdhieri naJesimeri naBhenaya 
1Chronicles4:37 kwoti Ziza aberekwa naShifi mwanakomana waAroni aberekwa naJedhaya mwanakomana waShimiri aberekwa naShemaya. 
1Chronicles4:38 Ivava ava vadai kudomwa namazita vaiva madzishe mudzimhuri dzavo mudzimba dzamadzibaba avo mukawandwawo chaizvo. 
1Chronicles4:39 Vakatamira kwokunge tava kuda kundosvika kuGedhori kumabvazuva kwebani kundotsvaka mafuro ezvipfuwo zvavo. 
1Chronicles4:40 Ikoko vakawana mafuro chaiwo akanaka kwazvo, nyika iri huru ichisvika zvayo uko nokokoko kwakati zi-i kuine runyararo pamusana pokuti ndokwainge kugere vokwaHamu." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ivava vakadai kunyorwa namazita, vakasvikako mumazuva aHezekiya mambo wokwaJudha vakaparadza misha yavo pamwechete nevaMenuimu vainge varikowo. Vakavatsakatisa sezvazviri pari nhasi, panzvimbo pavo ivo vakabva vaita misha yavo nokuti kwaiva namafuro ezvipfuwo zvavo." 
1Chronicles4:42 Mazana mashanu evamwe varume vokwaSimeoni vakaenda kuGomo reSeiri vachitungamirirwa naPeratiya naNeariya naRefaya naUzieri vanakomana vaIshi. 
1Chronicles4:43 Vakaparadza marimbirimbi evokwaAmareki vakanga vapunyuka. Zvino vagere ikoko nanhasi uno. 
1Chronicles5:1 Zvino ndopouyawo vanakomana vaRubheni dangwe raIsiraeri nokuti iye ndiye dangwe asi pari pamusana pokuti akan'oresa pairara baba vake udangwe hwake hwakapiwa vanakomana vaJosefi mwanakomana waIsiraeri. Nokudaro zita rake harisi kudomwa panzvimbo paro pakuberekwa kwake sedangwe. 
1Chronicles5:2 Kunyange zvazvo Judha ariye akazova nesimba chaizvo pakati pavakoma navanun'una vake maari mukatova ndimo makabuda mambo. Zvakadaro zvazvo udangwe ndohwaJosefi. 
1Chronicles5:3 Vanakomana vaRubheni mwana waIsiraeri ndiHanoki naParu naHezironi naKarumi. 
1Chronicles5:4 Vana vakomana vokwaJoeri: ndiShemaya waShemaya ndiGogu waGogu ndiShimei 
1Chronicles5:5 mwanakomana waShimei ndiMika waMika ndiReaya waReaya ndiBhaari 
1Chronicles5:6 waBhaari ndiBheera. Iyeyu ndiye nyakutapwa naTigiratipiriesari mambo weAsiria akaenda naye kuutapwa. Akanga ari mumwe wamadzishe okwaRubheni. 
1Chronicles5:7 Hama dzake dzokune dzimwe dzimba pazvizvarwa zvavo dzakanga dzakamira dzakadai izvi: kunoti ishe Jeieri naZakariya 
1Chronicles5:8 naBhera aberekwa naAzazi mwanakomana waShema aberekwa naJoeri, vagari vokuAroeri kusvikira kuNebho nokuBhaarimeoni." 
1Chronicles5:9 Vaigarawo kumabvazuva uku tava kusvika kurenje mhiri ino yaYufuratesi pamusana pokuti zvipfuwo zvavo zvakanga zvawanda munyika yeGireadhi. 
1Chronicles5:10 Mumazuva aSauro vakarwiswa nehondo, vechiHagiri ndokuvarakatisa kuuraya ndokubva vaita misha mumisha yavo mudunhu rose rokumabvazuva kweGireadhi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Vanakomana vokwaGadhi vaigara pakatarisana navo munyika yeBhashani kusvikira kuSareka: 
1Chronicles5:12 Joeri ndiye aiva changamire achitevedzerwa naShafamu kwouya Janai naShafati muBhashani. 
1Chronicles5:13 Hama dzavo imba nemba ndevava ava: kunoti Mikaeri naMeshuramu naShebha naJorai naJakana naZiya naEbheri, vari vanomwe kudaro." 
1Chronicles5:14 Ivava ndivo vanakomana vokwaAbhihairi: mwana waHuru aberekwa naJaroya mwanakomana waGireadhi ari mwanakomana waMikaeri mwanakomana Jeshishai aberekwa naJadho mwanakomana waBhuzi. 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi mwanakomana waBhidhieri mwana waGuni akanga ari mutungamiri wedzimhuri dzemba yokwake. 
1Chronicles5:16 Vaigara kuGireadhi nokuBhashani nemaguta awo nomumafuro ose eSharoni kusvika kwaanoperera. 
1Chronicles5:17 Vose ivava vakanyorwa nokuberekwa kwavo panguva yaJotamu mambo wokwaJudha napanguva yaJerobhoamu mambo wokwaIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles5:18 VokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi nechimwe chikamu chevokwaManase vaiva namagamba chaiwo avarume venhoo namapakatwa nevaigona kukanda miseve nyanzvi dzokurwa hondo vaiva vari zviuru zvina zvine mazana manomwe namakumi matanhatu. 
1Chronicles5:19 Vakandorwisa vokwaHagiri novokwaJeturi nevokwaNapishi nevokwaNodhabhu. 
1Chronicles5:20 Pavakabatsirwa kuvarwisa vakabvawo vakurira vaHagiri navose vavakanga vanavo nokuti mukurwa kwavo ikoku vakanga vachema kuna Mwari nokuti vaivimba naye. 
1Chronicles5:21 Vakavatorera zvipfuwo zvavo zvaiti zviuru makumi mashanu zvengamera dzavo kwouya hwai mazana maviri ezviuru ane zviuru makumi mashanu, kwouyawo zviuru zviviri zvamadhongi, kwozoti zana rechiuru chavanhu vavakatapa vari vapenyu" 
1Chronicles5:22 sezvo ruzhinji rwavo rwakanga rwarakatiswa kufa nokuti hondo yacho yakanga iri hondo yaMwari. Vakagara munyika yaivavo kusvikira pakatapwa vanhu. 
1Chronicles5:23 Chimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase vaigara munyika umu kubvira kuBhashani kusvikira kuBhaariherimoni nokuSeniri nokuGomo reHerimoni, vakanga vakawanda kwazvo." 
1Chronicles5:24 Vatungamiriri vomudzimhuri dzemba yokwavo ndevava ava: 
1Chronicles5:25 Kunoti Eferu naIshi naErieri naAzirieri naJeremiya naHodhavhiya naJadhieri. Ivava vaiva magamba chaiwo okurwa vari vanhu vane mukurumbira vari vatungamiriri vomudzimhuri dzemba yokwavo. 
1Chronicles5:26 Asi vakatadzira Mwari wamadzibaba avo vachiita unzenza hwokuteveredza kunamata vamwari vechirudzi venyika iyi vaye vavakaparadzirwa naMwari. Naizvozvo Mwari weIsiraeri akapinza mweya muna Puru mambo weAsiria nomuna Tigiratipiriesari mambo weAsiria wokuti atape vokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi nechimwe chikamu chevokwaManase akavaendesa kuHara nokuHabhori nokuHara nokurwizi rweGozani kusvikira pari nhasi. 
1Chronicles6:1 Vanakomana vaRevhi: ndiGerishoni naKohati naMerari. 
1Chronicles6:2 Vana vakomana vaKohati: ndiAmuramu naIzhari naHebhuroni naUzieri. 
1Chronicles6:3 Vanawo vaAmuramu: ndiAroni naMosesi naMiriamu. Vanakomana vaAroni: ndavanaNadhabhu naAbhihu naEreazari naItamaru. 
1Chronicles6:4 Ereazari ndiye baba waFinehasi, Finehasi ndibaba waAbhishua," 
1Chronicles6:5 Abhishua abereka Bhuki," 
1Chronicles6:6 Bhuki azobereka Uzi, Uzi ndiye baba waZerahiya." 
1Chronicles6:7 Zerahiya ndibaba waMeraioti, Meraioti vari baba waAmariya, Amariya abereka Ahitubhu." 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahitubhu akaberekawo Zadhoki Zadhoki ari baba waAhimaazi," 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahimaazi ari baba waAzariya. 
1Chronicles6:10 Azariya ndibaba waJohanani, Johanani ndiye baba waAzariya. Iye Azariya uyu ndiye uya aiva mupristi muTemberi iya yakavakwa naSoromoni muJerusaremu." 
1Chronicles6:11 Azariya ndiye baba waAmariya. Amariya akabereka Ahitabhu," 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahitubhu akazobereka Zadhoki, Zadhoki akazobereka Sharumu," 
1Chronicles6:13 Sharumu akabereka Hirikiya, Hirikiya akazobereka Azariya." 
1Chronicles6:14 Azariya ndibaba waSeraya, Seraya ari baba waJehozadhaki." 
1Chronicles6:15 Jehozadhaki uyu akatapwawo Mwari paakaendesa vokwaJudha neJerusaremu muutapwa ari mumaoko aNebhukadhinezari. 
1Chronicles6:16 Vanakomana vaRevhi: ndiGerishomu naKohati naMerari. 
1Chronicles6:17 Vanawo vaGerishomu vakomana: ndavanaRibhuni naShimei. 
1Chronicles6:18 Vana vaKohati: vakomana ndiAmuramu naIzhari naHebhuroni naUzieri. 
1Chronicles6:19 Vanakomana vaMerari: ndiMahiri naMushi. Ivava ava ndivo mhuri dzokwaRevhi imba nemba. 
1Chronicles6:20 VokwaGerishomu: vakamira vakadai izvi: mwanakomana wake ndiRibhuni waRibhuni ndiJahati waJahati ndiZima waZima ndiJoa. 
1Chronicles6:21 Mwanakomana waJoa ndiIdho waIdho ndiZera waZera ndiJeatierai. 
1Chronicles6:22 VokwaKohati vakamirawo vakadai: mwanakomana wake ndiAminadhabhu waAminadhabhu ndiKora waKora ndiAsiri. 
1Chronicles6:23 Mwanakomana waAsiri ndiErikana waErikana ndiEbhiasafu waEbhiasafu ndiAsiri waAsiri ndiTahati. 
1Chronicles6:24 Mwanakomana waTahati: ndiUrieri waUrieri ndiUziya waUziya ndiShauru. 
1Chronicles6:25 Vana vaErikana vakomana: ndiAmasai naAhimoti. 
1Chronicles6:26 Mwanakomana waAhimoti ndiErikana waErikana ndiZofai waZofai ndiNahati 
1Chronicles6:27 waNahati ndiEriyabhu waEriyabhu ndiJerohamu waJerohamu ndiErikana. 
1Chronicles6:28 Vanakomana vaSamueri: ndiJoeri dangwe rake wechipiri ndiAbhiya. 
1Chronicles6:29 Vanakomana vaMerari: ndiMahiri waMahiri ndiRibhuni waRibhuni ndiShimei 
1Chronicles6:30 waShimei ndiUza waUza ndiShimea waShimea ndiHagiya waHagiya ndiAsaya. 
1Chronicles6:31 Havanoi varume vakaiswa naDhavhidhi pabasa rokuona nezvokuimba mumba yaTenzi pakazenge zvino bhokisi rechitenderano razororamo. 
1Chronicles6:32 Vaiva vokuimba nziyo pamberi petendhe rinoera mutendhe rokusanganira kusvikirawo Soromoni apedza kuvaka imba yaTenzi muJerusaremu. Basa ravo vairiita vachitevedza zvavakanga vakarongerwa. 
1Chronicles6:33 Varume vacho vaiita basa iroro pamwechete navana vavo vakomana vakamira vakadai izvi, kuvanakomana vokwaKohati kunoti: Hemani aiva muimbi ari mwanakomana waJoeri uya mwanakomana waSamueri uye aberekwa naErikana" 
1Chronicles6:34 mwanakomana waJerohamu aberekwa naErieri mwanakomana waToa ari mwana waZufu 
1Chronicles6:35 wokuberekwa naErikana akaberekwa naMahati, mwanakomana waAmasai aberekawo Erikana" 
1Chronicles6:36 mwana waJoeri iye ari mwana waAzariya aberekwa naZefaniya mwanakomana waTahati 
1Chronicles6:37 azoberekwa naAsiri mwana waEbhiyasafu aberekwawo naKora, mwanakomana waIzhari" 
1Chronicles6:38 mwana waKohati waberekwa naRevhi, mwanakomana waIsiraeri" 
1Chronicles6:39 kwouya munun'una wake Asafu aimira kurudyi kwake: Asafu uyu mwanakomana waBherekiya akaberekwa naShimea mwana waMikaeri 
1Chronicles6:40 uyu ari mwanakomana waBhaaseya akaberekwa naMarikiya mwana waEtini mwana waZera aberekwa naAdhaya 
1Chronicles6:41 mwanakomana waEtani akaberekwa 
1Chronicles6:42 naZima mwana waShimei 
1Chronicles6:43 mwanakomana waJahati aberekwa naGerishomu mwanakomana waRevhi. 
1Chronicles6:44 Kuruboshwe kwaiva nehama dzavo vanakomana vokwaMerari: vakanga vari vanaEtani mwanakomana waKishi mwana waAbhudhi aberekwa naMaruki okuberekwa 
1Chronicles6:45 naHashabhiya mwana waAmaziya mwanakomana waHirikiya aberekwa naAmuzi ariwo mwana waBhani mwanakomana waShemeru 
1Chronicles6:46 aberekwa naMahiri uyu ari mwana waMushi 
1Chronicles6:47 mwanakomana waMerari aberekwa naRevhi. 
1Chronicles6:48 Hama dzavo dzokwaRevhi dzakasarudzwa kuita basa romunzvimbo inoera mumba yaMwari. 
1Chronicles6:49 Asi Aroni navanakomana vake ndivo vaiva vokupira mipiro paatari yomupiro wokupisa napaatari yorusenzi pamwechete nebasa rose romunzvimbo inoeresesa nokupfupirirawo vaIsiraeri zvitadzo maererano nezvose zvakanzi naMosesi zviitwe. 
1Chronicles6:50 Vanakomana vaAroni: ndiEreazari waEreazari ndiFinehasi waFinehasi ndiAbhishua 
1Chronicles6:51 mwanawo waAbhishua: ndiBhuki waBhuki ndiUzi waUzi ndiZerahiya 
1Chronicles6:52 mwanakomana waZerahiya ndiMeraioti waMeraioti ndiAmariya waAmariya ndiAhitubhu 
1Chronicles6:53 mwanawo waAhitubhu ndiZadhoki waZadhoki ndiAhimaazi. 
1Chronicles6:54 Uku ndiko kugara kwavakanga vakaita zvichienderana nemamana avo mudunhu rokwavo. Vanakomana vaAroni vemhuri dzokwaKohati vakapiwa kwavo nechin'ange. 
1Chronicles6:55 Vakagoverwa Hebhuroni munyika yokwaJudha namafuro aro akaripotoredza. 
1Chronicles6:56 Asi minda yeguta racho nemisha yaro vakapa kuna Karebhu mwanakomana waJefune. 
1Chronicles6:57 Maguta okundopotera akapiwa vanakomana vokwaAroni ndaaya aya: kunoti Hebhuroni neRibhuna namafuro aro neJatiri neEshitemoa namafuro awo 
1Chronicles6:58 kwouya Hireni namafuro aro 
1Chronicles6:59 uye Dhebhiri namafuro aro neAshani namafuro aro neBhetishemeshi namafuro aro. 
1Chronicles6:60 Avakapiwa kwaBhenjamini ndeaya anoti: Gebha namafuro aro neAremeti namafuro aro uye Anatoti namafuro aro. Ose pamwechete maguta avo mudzimhuri dzokwavo aiva gumi namatatu. 
1Chronicles6:61 Vamwe vose vokwaKohati vakagoverwawo maguta gumi nechin'ange mumhuri yedzinza racho uye nomuchikamu chimwe chevokwaManase. 
1Chronicles6:62 VokwaGerishomi mhuri nemhuri vakagoverwa maguta gumi namatatu mune vedzinza rokwaIsakari nerokwaAsheri nerokwaNafutari nerokwaManase muBhashani. 
1Chronicles6:63 VokwaMerari mhuri nemhuri vakagoverwawo maguta gumi namaviri mudzinza rokwaRubheni nerokwaGadhi nerokwaZebhuruni. 
1Chronicles6:64 Saizvozvo vanhu veIsiraeri vakapa vaRevhi maguta iwayo namafuro awo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Vakagoverwawo nechin'ange mune vedzinza rokwaJudha nerokwaSimeoni nerokwaBhenjamini maguta iwaya ataurwa nemazita. 
1Chronicles6:66 Vamwe vemhuri dzevanakomana vokwaKohati vaivawo namaguta omudunhu ravo mune vedzinza rokwaEfuremu. 
1Chronicles6:67 Vakagoverwa maguta okundopotera aya anoti Shikemu namafuro aro munyika yokwaEfuremu yamakomo, kwouya Gezeru namafuro aro" 
1Chronicles6:68 kwoti Jokimeamu namafuro aro neBhetihoroni namafuro aro 
1Chronicles6:69 kwozoti Aijaroni namafuro aro neGatirimoni namafuro aro 
1Chronicles6:70 kwouyawo mune vechimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase ndeaya: kunoti Aneru namafuro aro neBhireamu namafuro aro edzimwe mhuri dzose dzokwaKohati. 
1Chronicles6:71 VokwaGerishomu: vakagoverwa mune chimwewo chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase vakapiwa: Gorani muBhashani namafuro aro, neAshitaroti namafuro aro." 
1Chronicles6:72 Mune vedzinza rokwaIsakari vakagoverwa: Kedheshi namafuro aro neDhabherati namafuro aro 
1Chronicles6:73 kwouya Ramoti namafuro aro neAnemu namafuro aro. 
1Chronicles6:74 Mune vedzinza rokwaAsheri vakapiwa: Mashari namafuro aro neAbhudhoni namafuro aro 
1Chronicles6:75 kwouya Hukoki namafuro aro neRehobhu namafuro aro. 
1Chronicles6:76 Mune vedzinza rokwaNafutari vakagoverwa: Kedheshi muGarirea namafuro aro neHamoni namafuro aro neKiriatiaimu namafuro aro. 
1Chronicles6:77 Vamwe vose vokwaMerari: vakagoverwa mune vedzinza rokwaZebhuruni. Rimoni namafuro aro neTabhori namafuro aro. 
1Chronicles6:78 Kumhiri kwaJorodhani: kuJeriko mune vedzinza rokwaRubheni vakapiwa Bhezeri riri pamutunhu namafuro aro neJahiza namafuro aro 
1Chronicles6:79 kwouya Kedhemoti namafuro aro neMefaati namafuro aro. 
1Chronicles6:80 Mune vedzinza rokwaGadhi vakagoverwa: Ramoti muGireadhi namafuro aro neMahanaimu namafuro aro 
1Chronicles6:81 kwouya Heshibhoni namafuro aro kwozoti Jazeru namafuro aro. 
1Chronicles7:1 Vanakomana vaIsakari ndavava, kunoti: Tora naPua naJashubhu naShimuroni vari vana kudaro." 
1Chronicles7:2 Vanakomanawo vaTora: ndiUzi naRefaya naJerieri naJahimai naJibhusamu naShemueri vari vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo dzokwaTora. Magamba okurwa hondo ezvizvarwa zvokwavo mumazuva aDhavhidhi vainge vari vanhu makumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri namazana matanhatu. 
1Chronicles7:3 Vanakomana vaUzi: ndiIzirahiya. Vanawo vaIzarahiya vakomana: ndiMikaeri naObhadhiya naJoeri naIshiya vari vashanuwo kudaro vose vari madzichangamire. 
1Chronicles7:4 Pamwechete naivava ava chizvarwa nechizvarwa imba nemba paivawo nezvikwata zvavarwi vehondo zvina vanhu makumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvitanhatu nokuti vaiva navakadzi navana vakomana vakawanda. 
1Chronicles7:5 Hama dzavo dzomudzimhuri dzekwaIsakari dzose pamwechete vaiva makumi masere ezviuru ane zviuru zvinomwe zvavanhu variwo magamba okurwa hondo vakanyorwa chizvarwa nechizvarwa. 
1Chronicles7:6 Vanakomana vaBhenjamini: ndiBhera naBhekeri naJedhiaeri pautatu hwavo kudaro. 
1Chronicles7:7 Vana vakomana vaBhera: ndiEzibhoni naUzi naUzieri naJerimoti naIri vashanu. Vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo vari magamba okurwa hondo, vakanyorwa chizvarwa nechizvarwa vari vanhu makumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zviviri namakumi matatu ane vana." 
1Chronicles7:8 Vana vaBhekeri: vakomana ndiZemira naJoashi naEriezeri naErioenai naOmuri naJerimoti naAbhiya naAnatoti naArameti. Vose ivava ava ndivo vanakomana vaBhekeri. 
1Chronicles7:9 Kunyorwa kwavakaita sokuberekwa kwavo chizvarwa nechizvarwa vari vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo, magamba okurwa hondo aiva makumi maviri ezviuru ane mazana maviri." 
1Chronicles7:10 Vanakomana vaJedhiaeri: ndiBhirihani. Vanawo vaBhirihani vakomana: ndiJeushi naBhenjamini naEhudhi naKenaana naZetani naTarishishi naAhishahari. 
1Chronicles7:11 Vose ivava ndovanakomana vaJedhiaeri imba nemba, magamba okurwa hondo aiva vanhu gumi rezviuru rine zviuru zvinomwe namazana maviri vaigona kuenda kuhondo." 
1Chronicles7:12 Vana Shupimu naHupimu: ndivo vanakomana vaIru, vokwaHushimu ndivo vanakomana vaAheri." 
1Chronicles7:13 Vana vaNafutari vakomana: ndiJahizieri naGuni naJezeru naSharumu vomumba maBhiriha. 
1Chronicles7:14 Vanakomana vaManase: ndiAsirieri waakabereka nomurongo wake wechiAramu, ndiye akaberekawo Makiri baba vaGireadhi." 
1Chronicles7:15 Makiri akaroorera Hupimu naShupimu vakadzi. Hanzvadzi yake ndiMaaka. Mumwe mwana wake ainzi Zerofehadhi, Zerofehadhi aingova navanasikana." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka mudzimai waMakiri akabereka mwana mukomana akamutumidza zita rokuti Pereshi, munun'una wake ainzi Shereshi. Vanakomana vaPereshi ndiUramu naRakemu." 
1Chronicles7:17 Vanawo vaUramu vakomana: ndiBhedhani. Vose ivava ndivo vana vakomana vaGireadhi mwanakomana waMakiri mwana waManase. 
1Chronicles7:18 Hanzvadzi yake Hamorehedhi akabereka Ishihodhi naAbhiezeru naMahira. 
1Chronicles7:19 Vana vaShemidha vakomana: ndiAhiani naShikemu naRiki naAniamu. 
1Chronicles7:20 Vanakomana vaEfuremu: ndiShutera mwanawo waShutera ndiBheredhi waBheredhi ndiTahati waTahati ndiEreadha waEreadha ndiTahati 
1Chronicles7:21 mwana waTahati ndiZabhadhi waZabhadhi ndiShutera waShutera ndiEzeru naEreadhi vanyakuurayiwa navarume vokuGati vakaberekerwa munyika iyoyo, nokuti vakanga vauya kuzopamba zvipfuwo zvavo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Baba vavo vakavachema kwamazuva akawanda vakoma navanun'una vake vakauya kuzonyaradzana naye. 
1Chronicles7:23 Efuremu akapinda mumba nomudzimai wake akava napamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana. Iye akamutumidza zita rokuti Bheriya nokuti imba yavo yakanga yawirwa nenhamo. 
1Chronicles7:24 Mwanasikana wake ndiShera nyakuvaka Bhetihoroni rokumusoro neBhetihoroni rezasi ose ari maviri kudaro uyewo Uzenishera. 
1Chronicles7:25 Mwanakomana waBheriya ndiRefa: waRefa ndiReshefu waReshefu ndiTera waTera ndiTahani 
1Chronicles7:26 mwana waTahani ndiRadhani waRadhani ndiAmihudhi waAmihudhi ndiErishama 
1Chronicles7:27 mwana waErishama ndiNunu waNunu ndiJoshuwa. 
1Chronicles7:28 Kwavowo ivava namamana avo kwaiva kuBhetieri nemisha yoko tonanga kumabvazuva kuNaarani nokumadokero kuGezeru nemisha yoko kwouya Shikemu nemisha yaro neAya nemisha yaro. 
1Chronicles7:29 Kumuganhu nokwaManase kwaivawo neBhetisheani neBhetisheani nemisha yaro neTaanaki nemisha yaro neMigidho nemisha yaro neDhoni nemishawo yaro. Imomu umu ndimo maigara vezvizvarwa zvaJosefi mwanakomana waIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles7:30 Vanakomana vaAsheru: ndiImuna naIshivha naIshivhi naBheriya nehanzvadzi yavo Sera. 
1Chronicles7:31 Vanakomanawo vaBheriya: ndiHebheru naMarikieri baba waBhirizaiti. 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebheru: ndibaba waJafureti naShomeru naHotamu nehanzvadzi yavo Shua. 
1Chronicles7:33 Vanakomana vaJafureti: ndiPasaki naBhimuhari naAshivhati. Ivava ava ndivo vanakomana vaJafureti. 
1Chronicles7:34 Vanawo vakomana vaShameru: mukoma nomunun'una naye ndiRohiga naJehubhabhu naAramu. 
1Chronicles7:35 Vanakomana vaHeremu mukoma nomunun'una naye: ndiZofa naImuna naShereshi naAmaru. 
1Chronicles7:36 Vanawo vaZofa vakomana: ndiSua naHarineferu naShuari naBheeri naImura," 
1Chronicles7:37 naBhezeru naHodhi naShama naShirisha naItirani naBheera. 
1Chronicles7:38 Vanakomana vaJeteru: ndiJefune naPisipa naAra. 
1Chronicles7:39 Vana vakomana vaUra: ndiArah naHanieri naRiziya. 
1Chronicles7:40 Vose ivava vaiva vokwaAsheri vari vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo vachizikanwa ari magamba okurwa hondo, madzichangamire emachinda. Vanhu vakaverengwa pazvizvarwa zvavo vari vanhu vaigona kuenda kundorwa hondo vaisvika zviuru makumi maviri nezvitanhatu." 
1Chronicles8:1 Bhenjamini ndibaba waBhera dangwe rake, wechipiri ndiAshibheri, wechitatu ndiAhara" 
1Chronicles8:2 wechina ndiNoha, wechishanu ari Rafa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Vanawo vaBhera vakomana: ndiAdha naGera naAbhihudhi 
1Chronicles8:4 naAbhishua, kwouya Naamani naAhoa" 
1Chronicles8:5 kwozoti Gera naShefufani naHuramu. 
1Chronicles8:6 Ava ndivo vanakomana vaEhudhi: vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo dzavagari vokuGebha vakazoendwa navo kuutapwa kuManahati," 
1Chronicles8:7 kwaiti Naamani naAhiya naGera anonziwo Hegiramu baba waUza naAhihudhi. 
1Chronicles8:8 Mumwewo ainzi Shaharaimu akabereka vana vakomana munyika yeMoabhu mushure mokunge aramba vakadzi vake vaHushimu navaBhaara. 
1Chronicles8:9 Akazobereka vana vakomana nomukadzi wake ainzi Hodheshi vanoti: 
1Chronicles8:10 Jobhabhu naZibhia naMesha naMarikanu naJeuzi naSakia naMirima. Ivava ndivo vanakomana vake, vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo." 
1Chronicles8:10 Jobhabhu naZibhia naMesha naMarikanu naJeuzi naSakia naMirima. Ivava ndivo vanakomana vake, vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo." 
1Chronicles8:11 Akaberekawo vana vakomana navaHushimu ava vanoti Abhitubhu naEripaari. 
1Chronicles8:12 Vanakomana vaEripaari: ndiEbheru naMishamu naShemedhi nyakuvaka Ono neRodhi nemisha yaro 
1Chronicles8:13 Bheriya naShema vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo dzavagari vokuAiyaroni: vakaitisa chimwandamwanda vagari vokuGati; 
1Chronicles8:14 kwozouya Ahio: naShashaki naJeremoti," 
1Chronicles8:15 kwoti Zebhadhia naAradhi naEdheru," 
1Chronicles8:16 kwotiwo Mikaeri naIshipa naJoha ndovaiva vanakomana vaBheriya. 
1Chronicles8:17 Zebhadhiya: naMeshuramu naHiziki naHebheru 
1Chronicles8:18 naIshimerai naIsiriya naJobhabhu ndivowo vanakomana vaEripaari. 
1Chronicles8:18 naIshimerai naIsiriya naJobhabhu ndivowo vanakomana vaEripaari. 
1Chronicles8:19 Jakimu: naZikiri naZabhudhi 
1Chronicles8:20 naErienai naZiretai naErieri 
1Chronicles8:21 naAdhaya naBheraya naShimurati ndivo vanakomana vaShimei. 
1Chronicles8:22 Ishipani: naEbheru naErieri 
1Chronicles8:23 naAbhudhoni naZikiri naHanani 
1Chronicles8:24 naHananiya naEramu naAnitotiya 
1Chronicles8:25 naIfedhiya naPenueri, ndivo vanakomanawo vaShashaki." 
1Chronicles8:26 Shamusherai: naShehariya naAtariya 
1Chronicles8:27 naJaareshiya naEriya naZikiri, ndivowo vanakomana vaJorohamu." 
1Chronicles8:28 Ivava ava vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo chizvarwa nechizvarwa vari madzichangamire. Ivava vaigara muJerusaremu. 
1Chronicles8:29 Jeieri: baba waGibheoni vaigara kuGibheoni. Zita romukadzi wavo rainzi Maaka. 
1Chronicles8:30 Mwanakomana wavo dangwe rainzi Abhudhoni kwouya Zuru naKishi naBhaari naNadhabhu," 
1Chronicles8:31 kwouya naGedhori naAhio naZekeru," 
1Chronicles8:32 uyewo Mikiroti baba waShimea. Zvino vose ivava vaigara pakatarisana nehama dzavo muJerusaremu pamwechete nehama dzacho. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neru ndiye baba waKishi Kishi ari baba waSauro Sauro ariye baba Jonatani naMarikushua naAbinadhabhu naEshibhaari. 
1Chronicles8:34 Mwana waJonatani: ndiMeribhaari Meribhaari ndiye baba waMika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Vanakomana vaMika: ndiPitoni naMereki naTariya naAhazi. 
1Chronicles8:36 Ahazi: ndibaba waJehoyadha. Jehoyadha ari baba waAremeti naAzimavheti naZimuri Zimuri ndiye baba waMoza. 
1Chronicles8:37 Moza ndiye babawo waBhinea mwanakomana waBhinea ndiRafa waRafa ndiEreasa waEreasa ndiAzeru. 
1Chronicles8:38 Azeru aiva navanakomana vatanhatu. Mazita avo ndiAzirikamu naBhokeru naIshimaeri naSheariya naObhadhiya naHanani vose ivava ndivo vanakomana vaAzero. 
1Chronicles8:39 Vanakomana vomunun'una wake Asheki: ndiUramu dangwe rake wechipiri ndiJeushi wechitatu ndiErifereti. 
1Chronicles8:40 Vanakomana vokwaUramu vaiva magamba okurwa hondo yokupfura nemiseve aiva navana vakomana navazukuru vazhinji zana namakumi mashanu, vose ivava vari vokwaBhenjamini." 
1Chronicles9:1 Saizvozvo Isiraeri yose yakanyorwa chizvarwa nechizvarwa izvozvo zvakanyorwa muBhuku reNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo eIsiraeri. VokwaJudha vakatapwa vakaendwa navo kuBhabhironi pamusana pokusatendeka kwavo. 
1Chronicles9:2 Vakazotanga kugarazve mavo nomumaguta avo vakanga vari vaIsiraeri vaiva vapristi navaRevhi novokushanda muTemberi. 
1Chronicles9:3 Vamwe vaiva vokwaJudha nevokwaBhenjamini nevokwaEfuremu nevokwaManase vakagara muJerusaremu. 
1Chronicles9:4 Ndi Utai mwanakomana waAmihudhi mwana waOmuri aberekwa naImuri mwana waBhani mwanakomana wokwaFeresi mwanakomana waJudha. 
1Chronicles9:5 VokuShiro: kwaiva naAsaya dangwe racho navana vake vakomana. 
1Chronicles9:6 Vanakomana vokwaZera: paiva naJeueri nehama dzavo vari mazana matanhatu ana makumi mapfumbamwe. 
1Chronicles9:7 VokwaBhenjamini: kunoti Sharu mwanakomana waMeshuramu mwana waHodhavhiya mwanakomana waHasenua 
1Chronicles9:8 kwouya Ibhuneya mwanakomana waJerohamu uyewo Era mwanakomana waUzi mwana waMikiri kwoti Meshuramu mwanakomana waShefatiya mwana waRueri mwanakomana waIbhuniya. 
1Chronicles9:9 Pamwechete nehama dzavo chizvarwa nechizvarwa vaiva mazana mapfumbamwe ana makumi mashanu navatanhatu. Vose ivava vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo imba nemba. 
1Chronicles9:10 Pavapristi: paiti Jedhaya naJehoyaribhu naJakini 
1Chronicles9:11 kwouya Azariya mwanakomana waHirikiya mwana waMeshuramu mwanakomana waZadhoki mwana mukomana waMerayoti mwanakomana waAhitubhu mukuru mukuru wapamba paMwari 
1Chronicles9:12 kwouyawo Adhaya mwanakomana waJerohamu mwana mukomana waPashihuri mwanakomana waMarikiya kwoti Maasai mwanakomana waAdhieri mwanakomana waJahizera aberekwa naMeshuramu mwana waMeshiremiti mwanakomana waImeru. 
1Chronicles9:13 Hama dzavo vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo vaiva chiuru chimwechete namazana manomwe ana makumi matanhatu vari vanhu vainyatsoziva kwazvo basa romumba yaMwari. 
1Chronicles9:14 Kuna vaRevhi: kwaiti Shemaya mwanakomana waHashubhu mwanakomana waAzirikamu aberekwa naHashabhiya wechizvarwa chokwaMerari 
1Chronicles9:15 kwouya Bhakibhakari naHereshi naGararu naMataniya mwanakomana waMika mwanakomana waZikiri mwanakomana waAsafu 
1Chronicles9:16 kwoti Obhadhiya mwanakomana waShemaya mwanakomana waGararu mwana waJedhutuni kwouyawo Bherekiya mwanakomana waAsa mwana mukomana waErikana aigara mumisha yokwaNetofa. 
1Chronicles9:17 Vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru: ndiSharumu naAhubhu naTarimoni naAhimani nehama dzavo, Sharumu ariye changamire wacho." 
1Chronicles9:18 Vaimbenge vari vokugaririra pasuo guru raMambo kumabvazuva. Ivava ndivo vaiva vachengetedzi vokumusuo kwepaigara vaRevhi. 
1Chronicles9:19 Sharumu mwanakomana waKore mwana waEbhiasafu mwanakomana waKora nehama dzake dzemba yababa vake yokwaKora ndivo vaiona nezvebasa repo nerokuchengetedza pokupinda napo mutendhe rinoera sezvaiitwa namadzibaba vakanga vaine basa rokuona nezvetendhe raTenzi. 
1Chronicles9:20 Finehasi mwanakomana waEreazari ndiye akanga ariye mutungamiriri wavo kareko, Tenzi ainaye." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekariya mwanakomana waMesheremiya akanga ari muchengetedzi wokusuo guru rokunopinda napo mutendhe rokusanganira. 
1Chronicles9:22 Vose ivava vakasarudzwa kuti vave vachengetedzi vokumusuo kwaipindwa nako vaiva mazana maviri ane gumi navaviri. Vakanyorwa chizvarwa nechizvarwa mumisha yavo. Dhavhidhi nomuoni Samueri ndivo vakavagadza pabasa ravo irori. 
1Chronicles9:23 Naizvozvo ivo navanakomana vavo ndivo vaiona nezvepamisuo mikuru yemba yaTenzi zvichireva kuti imba iya, tendhe rinoera vari vagaririri." 
1Chronicles9:24 Vachengetedzi vokumusuo vaiva vari kumativi mana acho anoti kumabvazuva nokumadokero nokuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba. 
1Chronicles9:25 Hama dzavo dzokumusha kwavo dzaipota dzichiravana kuuya nguva nenguva kwamazuva manomwe kuzombova navo pabasa. 
1Chronicles9:26 Chaivapo ndechokuti vachengetedzi vana vokumusuo vakanga vari vakuru vakuru vokwaRevhi vaiona nezvedzimba dzepo noupfumi hwepamba yaMwari. 
1Chronicles9:27 Vairara pamba yaTenzi nokuti ndivo vaiva nebasa rokuichengeta. Ndivo vaivawo nebasa rokuizarura mangwanani oga oga. 
1Chronicles9:28 Vamwe vavo ndivo vaichengeta midziyo yaishandiswamo nokuti vainzi vaiverenge payaitorwa nepayaidzoswa. 
1Chronicles9:29 Vamwewo vavo vakaiswa pakuona nezvemimwe midziyo yemo nemidziyo yose inoera uyewo nezvoupfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa newaini namafuta eorivhi norusenzi netwokubikisa tunonhuwirira. 
1Chronicles9:30 Vamwewo vemba yavapristi vaiva nebasa rokusanganisa twokubikisa tunonhuwirira twacho. 
1Chronicles9:31 Matatiya dangwe raSharumu wokwaKora ndiye aiva wokuona nezvokubikwa kwechingwa chakati fatata," 
1Chronicles9:32 kwouyawo dzimwe hama dzavo dzokwaKohati ndidzo dzaiona nezvechingwa chokuisa pana Mwari nokubika chingwa cheSabata yoga yoga. 
1Chronicles9:33 Zvino paitiwo vaimbi ivava vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo dzokwaRevhi vachigara mudzimba dzepaTemberi vasina rimwe basa ravaiita nokuti basa ravo vairiita siku nesikati. 
1Chronicles9:34 Ivava vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo dzevaRevhi chizvarwa nechizvarwa vari vatungamiriri vaigara muJerusaremu. 
1Chronicles9:35 MuGibheoni maigara Jeieri baba waGibheoni. Zita romukadzi wake rainzi Maaka 
1Chronicles9:36 mwana wavo mukomana dangwe ndiAbhudhoni kwouya Zuru naKishi naBhaari naNeru naNadhabhu 
1Chronicles9:37 kwozouya Gedhori naAhio naZekariya naMikirodhi. 
1Chronicles9:38 Mikirodhi ndiye baba waShimeamu. Ivava vose vaigara pakatarisana nehama dzavo muJerusaremu pamwechete nehama dzacho. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neru ndiye baba waKishi, Kishi ariwo baba waSauro, Sauro ariye baba waJonatani naMarikishua naAbhinadhabhu naEshibhaari." 
1Chronicles9:40 Mwanakomana waJonatani: ndiMeribhaari, Meribhaari ari baba waMika." 
1Chronicles9:41 Vanakomana vaMika: ndiPitoni naMereki naTahirea naAhazi. 
1Chronicles9:42 Ahazi ndibaba waJara, Jara ari baba waEremeti naAzimavheti naZimuri. Zimuri ndiye baba waMoza." 
1Chronicles9:43 Moza ndiyewo baba waBhinea. Mwanakomana waBhinea ndiRefaya waRefaya ndiEreasa waEreasa ndiAzeru. 
1Chronicles9:44 Azeru aiva navanakomana vatanhatu: mazita avo ndeaya aya: kunoti Azirakamu naBhokeru naIshimaeri naSheariya naObhadhiya naHanani. Ivava ava ndivo vana vaAzeri. 
1Chronicles10:1 VaFirisitia vakarwisana navaIsiraeri, varwi veIsiraeri vakatiza, vaIsiraeri vakarakatiswa kufa kuGomo reGiribhoa." 
1Chronicles10:2 VaFirisitia vakati tsvome tsvome kudzingirirana naSauro navanakomana vake. VaFirisitia vakauraya Jonatani naAbhinadhabhu naMarikishua vana vaSauro vakomana. 
1Chronicles10:3 Hondo yakanga zvino yaomera Sauro, vemiseve vakabva vamuwana vakamukuvadza." 
1Chronicles10:4 Naizvozvo Sauro akati kune wokumutakurira zvombo zvehondo, “Buritsa bakatwa rako muhara undibaye naro, vangadaro vanhu ava vasina kudzingiswa vakauya vakandiita zvavo chiseko.” Asi wokumutakurira zvombo zvehondo uyu akaramba nokuti akatya kwazvo. Sauro ndokubva atora bakatwa rake pachake ndokuzviwisira pariri." 
1Chronicles10:5 Uya aimutakurira zvombo zvehondo achionawo kuti Sauro afa, naiyewo akazviwisira pabakatwa rake akafawo." 
1Chronicles10:6 Uku ndokufa kwakaita Sauro iye navana vake vakomana vatatu navose vemhuri yake vakafa pamwechete. 
1Chronicles10:7 Vanhu vose veIsiraeri vaiva mubani pavakaona kuti vatiza kudaro uyewo kuti Sauro navana vake vakomana vafa, vakasiya maguta avo vakatiza. VaFirisitia vakaenda vakagaramo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ramangwana racho vaFirisitia pavakaenda kundotora zvaiva pazvitunha vakawana Sauro navana vake vakomana vakati kan'an'a kuGomo reGiribhoa. 
1Chronicles10:9 Vakamukatanura, vakatora musoro wake nedemautare rokuzvidzivirira muhondo naro. Vakatumira nhumwa kunyika yose yevaFirisitia nedama rakanaka kwazvo kuzvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata nekuvanhu vokwavo." 
1Chronicles10:10 Vakaisa demautare rake rokuzvidzivirira naro muhondo mumba yavamwari vavo, musoro wake vakauroverera mumba yaDhagoni." 
1Chronicles10:11 Vose vokuJabheshi kwaGireadhi pavakanzwa zvakanga zvaitwa nevaFirisitia kuna Sauro," 
1Chronicles10:12 varume vokwavo vose magamba ehondo, vakasimuka vakasvikotora chitunha chaSauro nezvavanakomana vake vakadzokera nazvo kuJabheshi. Vakaviga mapfupa avo pasi pomuti womuoku muJabheshi vakatsanya kwamazuva manomwe." 
1Chronicles10:13 Nokudaro Sauro akafa pamusana pokusatendeka kwake. Paasina kutendeka kuna Tenzi ndeapa pokuti haana kuchengeta mutemo waTenzi uyewo akandobvunzira kune anosvikirwa 
1Chronicles10:14 achitsvaka mazano asingatsvake mazano kuna Tenzi. Naizvozvo Tenzi akamuuraya umambo ndokuhuisa pana Dhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese. 
1Chronicles11:1 VokwaIsiraeri vose vakauya kuna Dhavhidhi kuHebhuroni vakati, “Zvamunoona izvozvi tiri hama nehama, vanhu veropa rimwechete chairo nemi." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kare kaya, kunyange Sauro paakanga achiri mambo, ndimi maimhanya-mhanya nebasa rokutungamiririra Isiraeri kuhondo uyewo Tenzi, Mwari wenyu akakutii, ‘Imi ndimi muchava mufudzi wavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, muchava ishe weIsiraeri.’ ”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Ndizvo zvakaunza vakuru vakuru vokwaIsiraeri vose kuna mambo kuHebhuroni ndokubvawo Dhavhidhi aita chibvumirano navo kuHebhuroni, ikoko pana Tenzi. Vakagadza Dhavhidhi umambo hwokwaIsiraeri sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi nomuromo waSamueri." 
1Chronicles11:4 Dhavhidhi neIsiraeri yose vakaenda kuJerusaremu ndiro guta rimwechetero rinonzi Jebhusi, kwaiva navaJebhusi vagari vomunyika iyoyo." 
1Chronicles11:5 Vagari vomuJebhusi vakati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Muno haumupindi.” Zvakadaro zvazvo Dhavhidhi akakurira guta retsvingo reZioni ndorakarero rinonzi Guta raDhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Dhavhidhi akati, “Anenge angoita wokutanga kurwisa vaJebhusi ndiye achava changamire nomutungamiriri wehondo.” Joabhu mwanakomana waZeruya ndiye akabva ava wokutanga kukwirako nokudaro akabva ava changamire." 
1Chronicles11:7 Dhavhidhi akagara munzvimbo yokuhwanda hondo, ndokusaka rakatumidzwa zita rokuti Guta raDhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles11:8 Akavaka guta iri kuritenderedza kubvira pachimudhuri chemavhu kutenderera rose. Joabhu akagadzira kumwe kwose kweguta iri kwakanga kwasara. 
1Chronicles11:9 Ukuru hwaDhavhidhi hwakaramba hwongoenderera mberi nokuti Tenzi, wehondo nehondo aiva naye." 
1Chronicles11:10 Zvino vano ava ndivo vakuru vakuru vemagamba aDhavhidhi okurwa hondo vaimutsigira kwazvo muumambo hwake pamwechete neIsiraeri yose kuti ave mambo sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Tenzi nezveIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles11:11 Iyi ndiyo nhoroondo yemagamba aDhavhidhi okurwa hondo: kunoti Jashobheamu wokuHakimoni. Pautatu hwavo ndiye aiva mukuru. Akarwisa mazana matatu avarume akavauraya nepfumo rake muhondo imwechete. 
1Chronicles11:12 Aitevedzerwa naEreazari mwanakomana waDhodho wokuAhohi. 
1Chronicles11:13 Ndiye akanga aina Dhavhidhi kuPasidhamimu kwakanga kwaunganwa nevaFirisitia kuzorwa hondo. Pakanga paine munda waiva nekoroni. Varwi ndopavakadzvamuka kutiza vaFirisitia. 
1Chronicles11:14 Ivo vakamira nomunda iwoyo vachiudzivirira vakauraya vaFirisitia. Tenzi akaita basa guru rokuvanunura. 
1Chronicles11:15 Pavakuru — vakuru makumi matatu vamwe vavo vatatu vakasvika kudombo kuna Dhavhidhi kubako reAdhuromu. Izvozvo matendhe evaFirisitia akanga akadzikwa mubani revaRefaimu. 
1Chronicles11:16 Izvozvo Dhavhidhi akanga achiri munhare yakavakirirwa. Chimwe chikwata chavarwi vechiFirisitia chakanga chiri kuBetirehemu. 
1Chronicles11:17 Dhavhidhi akanzwa nenyota akati dai waro pangowana mumwe anonditekera mvura yokunwa kutsime rokuBetirehemu riri pedyo nesuwo guru raro. 
1Chronicles11:18 Magamba okurwa aye ari matatu akatyoredzera nomumatendhe evaFirisitia imomo akandoteka mvura kutsime rokuBetirehemu riri pedyo nesuo guru racho. Vakaichera vakauya nayo kuna Dhavhidhi asi Dhavhidhi akaramba kuinwa akaiteurira pasi kuna Tenzi 
1Chronicles11:19 achiti, “NaMwari wangu chaiye, handifanire kumbofa ndakaita chinhu chakadai. Iropaka iri upenyuka uhu hwavanhu vaendako, nokuti vatopinzaka ava upenyu hwavo munjodzi.” Naizvozvo akaramba kuinwa. Izvozvi izvi ndizvo zvakaitwa namagamba matatu aya." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abhishai munun'una waJoabhu ndiye aiva mukuru mukuru wavo vari makumi matatu. Akarwisa varume mazana matatu nepfumo rake akavauraya akazviwanira zita pamwechete navatatu vaya. 
1Chronicles11:21 Ndiye aiva nomukurumbira kwazvo pamakumi matatu avo ndokubva ava mukuru-mukuru wavo, asi pavatatu vaya haana kupasvika." 
1Chronicles11:22 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha wokuKabhuzieri ndiyewo aiva rimwe gamba rokurwa, nyakuita mabasa makuru kwazvo. Akauraya shumba chaidzo dzavanhu vaviri vokuMoabhu. Akapindawo mugomba akauraya shumba musi wakanga wadonha chando." 
1Chronicles11:23 Akaurayawo mumwe muIjipiti, murume chaiye akasvika. MuIjipiti uyu akanga akabata pfumo muruoko asi Bhenaya akamuvinga netsvimbo. Akatorera muIjipiti pfumo, ndokubva amuuraya nepfumo rake iroro." 
1Chronicles11:24 Izvozvi izvi ndizvo zvakaitwa naBhenaya mwana waJehoyadha akazviwanira zita pamwechete namagamba matatu aya. 
1Chronicles11:25 Iyeyu uyu aivawo nomukurumbira pamwechete navaya makumi matatu. Asi pavatatu vaya haana kupasvika. Dhavhidhi akamuita mukuru-mukuru wevokuchengetedza iye mambo. 
1Chronicles11:26 Magamba okurwa muzvikwata zvavo zvehondo ndeaya anoti: Asheri munun'una waJoabhu naErihanani mwanakomana waDhodho wokuBetirehemu 
1Chronicles11:27 naShamoti wokuHarodhi naHerezi wokuPeroni 
1Chronicles11:28 naIra mwanakomana waIkeshi wokuTekowa naAbhiezeru wokuAnatoti 
1Chronicles11:29 naSibhekai muHushati naIrai muAhohi 
1Chronicles11:30 naMaharai wokuNetofa naHeredhi mwanakomana waBhaana wokuNetofa 
1Chronicles11:31 naItai mwanakomana waRibhai wokuGibheya kwaBhenjamini naBhenaya wokuPiratoni 
1Chronicles11:32 naHurai wokumakoronga wokuGaashi naAbhieri muAribhati 
1Chronicles11:33 naAzimavheti wokuBhaharumu naEriyabha wokuShaoribhoni
