1Chronicles11:34 navanakomana vaHashemu wokuGizoni naJonatani mwanakomana waShage wokuHarari 
1Chronicles11:35 naAhiyamu mwanakomana waSakari wokuHarari naErifari mwanakomana waUru 
1Chronicles11:36 naHeferu muMumekeri naAhiya muPeroni 
1Chronicles11:37 naHeziro wokuKarimeri naNaarai mwanakomana waEzibhai 
1Chronicles11:38 naJoeri mukoma nomunun'una naNatani naMibhari mwanakomana waHagiri 
1Chronicles11:39 naZereki muAmoni naNaharai wokuBheroti mutakuri wezvombo zvehondo zvaJoabhu mwanakomana waZeruya 
1Chronicles11:40 naIra wokuItira naGarebhu wokuItira 
1Chronicles11:41 naUriya muHiti naRabhadhi mwanakomana waAhirai 
1Chronicles11:42 naAdhina mwanakomana waShiza wokuRubheni aiva mutungamiriri wokwaRubheni, chikwata chake chiri makumi matatu avanhu" 
1Chronicles11:43 naHanani mwanakomana waMaaka naJoshafati muMitini 
1Chronicles11:44 naUziya wokuAshiteroti Shama naJeieri vanakomana vaHotamu wokuAroero 
1Chronicles11:45 naJedhiyaeri mwanakomana waShimiri nomunun'una wake Jaha muTizi 
1Chronicles11:46 naErieri wokuMahavhi naJeribhai naJoshavhiya vanakomana vaErinaamu naItima wokuMoabhu 
1Chronicles11:47 naErieri naObhedhi naJaasieri wokuMezobha. 
1Chronicles12:1 Ava ndivo varume vakaenda kuna Dhavhidhi kuZikiragi paye paakanga asingakwanise kufamba pamadiro pamusana paSauro mwanakomana waKishi. Ndivo vamwe vemagamba okurwa hondo vaimubatsira muhondo. 
1Chronicles12:2 Vaiva vokurwa nouta nemiseve vaigona kupfura nemiseve kana kukanda matombo noruoko rwose rwose, rudyi kana ruboshwe. Vaiva vokwaBhenjamini hama dzaSauro." 
1Chronicles12:3 Mukuru wavo ndiAhiezeru kwouya Joashi vari vanakomana vaShemaa wokuGibhea uyewo Jezieri naPereti vanakomana vaAzimavheti kwouya Bheraka naJehu wokuAnatoti 
1Chronicles12:4 naIshimaya wokuGibheoni akanga ari gamba rokurwa hondo pamwechete naaye makumi matatu aivawo mutungamiriri wamakumi matatu paivawo naJeremiya naJahazieri naJohanani naJozabhadhi wokuGedhera 
1Chronicles12:5 kwouya Eruzai naJerimoti naBheariya naShemariya naShefatiya wokuHarufu 
1Chronicles12:6 kwoti Erikana naIshiya naAzareri naJoezeru naJoshebheamu wokwaKora 
1Chronicles12:7 kwozoti Joera naZebhadhiya vanakomana vaJehoramu wokuGedhori. 
1Chronicles12:8 Kune vokwaGadhi vakapomokerawo kuna Dhavhidhi kunhare yakavakirirwa kurenje vaiva magamba agara nayo hondo, panhoo apa nepapfumo dziri nyanzvi chaidzo, uso uhwu dziri shumba chaidzo, pakumhanya apa dzichinge ngururu chaidzo mumakomo." 
1Chronicles12:9 Mukuru wavo aiva Ezeru achiteverwa naObhadhiya wechitatu ari Eriyabhu 
1Chronicles12:10 wechina Mishimana wechishanu Jeremiya 
1Chronicles12:11 wechitatu ari Atai wechinomwe ari Erieri 
1Chronicles12:12 wechisere ari Johanani, Erizabhadhi ariye wechipfumbamwe" 
1Chronicles12:13 wegumi ari Jeremiya, Makibhanai ari wegumi nechiposhi." 
1Chronicles12:14 Ivava vokwaGadhi ava ndivo vaiva vakuru vakuru vomuhondo, vadiki vacho vaitungamira zana vakuru vacho nechiuru." 
1Chronicles12:15 Ivava ndivo varume vakayambuka Jorodhani mumwedzi wokutanga rwakazara mhiri nemhiri vakasvikodzvamutsa vaive kumanhika kumabvazuva nokumadokero. 
1Chronicles12:16 Vamwewo varume vokwaBhenjamini nevokwaJudha vakapomokerawo kuna Dhavhidhi kunhare yakavakirirwa. 
1Chronicles12:17 Dhavhidhi akabuda kundosangana navo akavati, “Kana zvamauyira kuno kwandiri zvakanaka, ini nemi tichaita mwoyo mumwechete. Asi kana mavinga kuti muwane mandiisiro mumaoko evavengi vangu, ini maoko angu akachena, Mwari wemadzibaba edu ngaakuonei akudzorei.”" 
1Chronicles12:18 Ipapo Mweya wakaputira Amasai mutungamiriri wamakumi matatu avanhu aya iye ndokuti, “Tiri venyu isu vaDhavhidhi Tinemi isu mwana waJese! Rugare ngaruve nemi! Uye dai rugare rwangovawo nemi, navanokubatsirai ngavavewo norugare, nokuti Mwari wenyu anokubatsirai!” Dhavhidhi akazovagamuchira akavaita vakuru vakuru vezvikwata zvehondo yake." 
1Chronicles12:19 Vamwe varume vokwaManase vakapomokerawo kuna Dhavhidhi paakanga oti auye nevaFirisitia kuzorwisa Sauro. Zvakadaro zvazvo haana kuvabatsira nokuti vatongi vevaFirisitia vakazowirirana zvokuti adzoke zvake vachiti, “Kana zvikazotiipira munhu uyu anotisiya opomokera kuna tenzi wake Sauro.”" 
1Chronicles12:20 Paaidzokera kuZikiragi ava ndivo varume vokwaManase vakapomokera kwaari panoti: Adhina naJozabhadhi naJedhiyaeri naMikaeri naJozabhadhi naErihu naZiretai vatungamiriri vezviuru kune vokwaManase. 
1Chronicles12:21 Vakakutsirana naDhavhidhi kurwisa chikwata chiya chevapambi nokuti vose vakanga vari mvumba dzemagamba okurwa hondo vari vatungamiriri vehondo. 
1Chronicles12:22 Chaivapo ndechokuti, zuva nezuva vanhu vaingoramba vachikurumukira kuna Dhavhidhi kusvikira paita hondo huru kwazvo sehondo yaMwari." 
1Chronicles12:23 Uhwu ndouwandi hwezvikwata zvehondo zvakauya kuna Dhavhidhi kuHebhuroni kuzobvisa umambo kuna Sauro vachihuisa kuna Dhavhidhi sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi. 
1Chronicles12:24 Varume vokwaJudha: vokurwa nenhoo nepfumo vaiva zviuru zvitanhatu zvina mazana masere avarwi. 
1Chronicles12:25 VokwaSimeoni: mvumba dzemagamba okurwa hondo, vakanga vari zviuru zvinomwe zvine zana." 
1Chronicles12:26 VokwaRevhi: vaiva zviuru zvina zvine mazana matanhatu," 
1Chronicles12:27 muchinda Jehoyadha wemba yokwaAroni aine zviuru zvitatu namazana manomwe. 
1Chronicles12:28 Zadhoki: mvumba chaiyo, gamba rechidikii rokurwa hondo aiva navatungamiriri vehondo makumi maviri vemba yokwababa vake." 
1Chronicles12:29 VokwaBhenjamini: hama dzokwaSauro vari zviuru zvitatu vazhinji vavo vakanga vachitsigirana nevemba yokwaSauro. 
1Chronicles12:30 VokwaEfuremu: zviuru makumi maviri, mvumba chaidzo dzokurwa hondo, varume vaiva nomukurumbira mudzimba dzemadzibaba avo." 
1Chronicles12:31 Chimwe chikamu chokwaManase: zviuru gumi nezvisere vakanga vasarudzwa kuti vauye kuzogadza Dhavhidhi paumambo. 
1Chronicles12:32 VokwaIsakari: varume vainzwisisa mamiriro ezvinhu panguva iyoyo, vaiziva zvinofanira kuti zviitwe navaIsiraeri, madzishe anosvika mazana maviri pamwechete nehama dzavo dzose dzaiva pasi pavo." 
1Chronicles12:33 VokwaZebhuruni: vaiva makumi mashanu ezviuru vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo, vakapakata zvombo zvehondo zvemhando nemhando vaine mwoyo mumwechete kuzoita chirwirangwe kubatsira Dhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles12:34 VokwaNafutari: vaiva nechiuru chavatungamiriri chaiva namakumi matatu ezviuru ane zviuru zvinomwe zvavarume vaingewo vakapakata nhoo namapfumo. 
1Chronicles12:35 VokwaDhani: kwaiva namakumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zvisere zvine mazana matanhatu avarwi vaiva vakapakata zvombo zvehondo. 
1Chronicles12:36 VokwaAsheri: vaiva makumi mana ezviuru zvavarwi vaikwanisa kuenda kuhondo. 
1Chronicles12:37 VokwaRubheni nevokwaGadhi: nevechimwe chikamu chevedzinza rokwaManase vokumhiri kwaJorodhani vari zana rezviuru rine zviuru makumi maviri zvavarwi vakapakata zvombo zvehondo zvemhando dzose. 
1Chronicles12:38 Varume ivava vose vokurwa vakauya kuHebhuroni vakarongana zvehondo vachida nomwoyo wose kugadza Dhavhidhi umambo hweIsiraeri yose. Vamwe vose veIsiraeri vaiva nepfungwa imwecheteyo yokugadza Dhavhidhi umambo. 
1Chronicles12:39 Vakaita mazuva matatu vaina Dhavhidhi ikoko vachidya nokunwa nokuti hama dzavo dzakanga dzavagadzirira. 
1Chronicles12:40 Vavakangawo vakabatana navo kunyange vokwaIsakari, nokwaZebhuroni nokwaNafutari uko, vakauya nechokudya chakatakurwa namadhongi, nenghamera namanyurusi nemombe zviri zvokudya zvakawanda kwazvo pachiti upfu nezvambwa zvemakuyu nezvitsumbu zvamagirepisi akaomeswa newaini nemafuta eorivhi nenyama yemombe neyehwai nokuti hakusi kufara ikoko kwaiva muIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles13:1 Dhavhidhi akabvunza mazano kuvatungamiriri vezviuru nevemazana navatungamiriri vose zvavo. 
1Chronicles13:2 Dhavhidhi akati kugungano rose reIsiraeri, “Kana imi muchizviona kuti zvakanaka uye kuti kana chiricho chido chaTenzi, Mwari wedu, ngatitumirei shoko kuhama dzedu dzakasara munyika yeIsiraeri yose nokuvapristi navaRevhi vari mumaguta ane mafuro awo kuti vauye tiungane pamwechete," 
1Chronicles13:3 tidzosere bhokisi raMwari wedu rechitenderano kuno nokuti pamazuva aSauro takaita sokurishaira hanya.” 
1Chronicles13:4 Gungano rose rakabvuma kuita saizvozvo nokuti zvakafadza vanhu vose. 
1Chronicles13:5 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi akaunganidza vanhu vose kubvira kuShihori yokuIjipiti kusvikira tava kuda kusvika kuHamati kuti bhokisi raMwari rindotorwa kuKiriatijearimu. 
1Chronicles13:6 Dhavhidhi neIsiraeri yose vakakwira kuBhaara, Bhaara ndiro Kiriatijearimu kwaJudha kundotora ikoko bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano rine zita raTenzi anogara pana makerubhu." 
1Chronicles13:7 Vakatakura bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano racho pachikochikari chitsva kubva kumba yokwaAbhinadhabhu, vanaUza naAhio ndovaichayira chikochikari chitsva ichi." 
1Chronicles13:8 Dhavhidhi neIsiraeri yose vaifara vachipemberera Mwari napose pavaigonera kuchiti uku runoimba, ukuwo runoridza zvipendhani, uku madimbwa ukuwo tambureni namakwakwakwa outare namabhosvo." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kuzoti vasvika paburiro rokwaKidhoni, Uza akabata bhokisi rechitenderano kurigamha nokuti nzombe dzakanga dzati dzadzarikei." 
1Chronicles13:10 Tenzi akavirukira Uza nehasha akabva amuuraya nokuti akabata bhokisi rechitenderano. Akabva afira ipapo pana Tenzi. 
1Chronicles13:11 Kuurayiwa kwakaitwa Uza uku naTenzi kwakashungurudza Dhavhidhi. Nzvimbo iyi ichiri kungonzi Perezuza nanhasi uno. 
1Chronicles13:12 Musi iwoyu, Dhavhidhi akatya Mwari akati, “Zvino bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano, kwangu uku, ringasvike sei pakadai?”" 
1Chronicles13:13 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi haana kuzoenda nebhokisi rechitenderano kumba kuguta raDhavhidhi, asi akatsaukira naro pamba paObhedhi muGiti." 
1Chronicles13:14 Bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano rakagara mumba maObhedhiedhomu muGiti kwemwedzi mitatu. Tenzi akabvawo akomborera mhuri yaObhedhiedhomu nezvaaiva nazvo zvose. 
1Chronicles14:1 Hiramu mambo weTire akatumira Dhavhidhi nhume namapango omusidhari pamwechete navanhu vokuveza miti namatombo vakavakira Dhavhidhi muzinda. 
1Chronicles14:2 Dhavhidhi akazviona kuti Tenzi akanga aita kuti umambo hwake hwokwaIsiraeri hudzike midzi, uye kuti akanga asimudzira zvikuru kwazvo umambo hwake pamusana pavanhu vake vaIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles14:3 Dhavhidhi akaroorazve vamwe vakadzi muJerusaremu. Dhavhidhi akabereka vamwe vana vakomana navasikana. 
1Chronicles14:4 Mazita avana vake vakaberekerwa kuJerusaremu ndeaya anoti: Shamua naShobhabhu naNatani naSoromoni; 
1Chronicles14:5 kwouya Ibhari naErishua naErifereti 
1Chronicles14:6 kwoti Noga naNefegi naJafia naErishama 
1Chronicles14:7 kwozoti Erishama naBheeriyadha naErifereti. 
1Chronicles14:8 VaFirisitia pavakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi agadzwa umambo hwokuIsiraeri yose, vaFirisitia vose vakaenda kundovhima Dhavhidhi. Asi zvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi akabva abuda kundovarwisa." 
1Chronicles14:9 Izvozvo vaFirisitia vakanga vauya vakapamba zvinhu mubani rokuvaRefaimu. 
1Chronicles14:10 Dhavhidhi akada kuziva kuti Mwari anotii nazvo akati, “Ndoenda here kundorwisa vaFirisitia ava? Muchavaisa mumaoko angu here?” Tenzi akamuti, “Enda zvako nokuti ndichaisa vaFirisitia mumaoko ako.”" 
1Chronicles14:11 Dhavhidhi akakwidza kuenda kuBhaariperezimu, akavakurira ipapo. Dhavhidhi akati, “Sokupozhora nokuita mafashamo, Mwari apozhora vavengi vangu achindishandisa.” Naizvozvo pakatumidzwa zita rokuti Bhaariperazimu." 
1Chronicles14:12 Vakasiya vamwari vavo ipapo, Dhavhidhi akati ngavapiswe vakabva vapiswa." 
1Chronicles14:13 VaFirisitia vakapamba zvakare zvinhu mubani riya. 
1Chronicles14:14 Dhavhidhi paakadazve kunzwa kuti Mwari anotii nazvo, Mwari akati kwaari, “Rega kubva waita zvokutandanisana navo; asi ita zvokuvanyangira uvafute nokumiti yemibharisamu." 
1Chronicles14:15 Paunozongonzwa chete mutsindo wokufamba pamusoro pemiti yemibharisamu mobva mati navo koke koke kuvarwisa nokuti Tenzi anenge atotungamira mberi kwenyu kundorwisa hondo dzavaFirisitia.” 
1Chronicles14:16 Dhavhidhi akaita zvaakaudzwa naTenzi akarakatisa kuuraya hondo yevaFirisitia kubvira kuGibheoni kusvikira kuGezeru. 
1Chronicles14:17 Zita raDhavhidhi rakaenda mbiri nyika dzose, uyewo Tenzi akapinza mweya wokumutya mundudzi dzose." 
1Chronicles15:1 Dhavhidhi akazvivakira muzinda muGuta raDhavhidhi ndokugadzira nzvimbo yeBhokisi raMwari rechitenderano akaridzikira tendhe. 
1Chronicles15:2 Dhavhidhi ndokuti, “Hapana anofanira kutakura bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano kusiya chete vaRevhi nokuti Tenzi akavasarudza kutakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano nokumushandira narini wose.”" 
1Chronicles15:3 Dhavhidhi akakokorodza Isiraeri yose kuJerusaremu kuti vandounza bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano panzvimbo yaro yaakanga arigadzirira. 
1Chronicles15:4 Dhavhidhi akaunganidza pamwechete vanakomana vokwaAroni nevokwaRevhi vaiti: 
1Chronicles15:5 vokwaKohati mutungamiriri wavo ari Urieri nehama dzake zana namakumi maviri; 
1Chronicles15:6 kwouya vokwaMerari, mutungamiriri wavo ari Asaya nehama dzake mazana maviri namakumi maviri;" 
1Chronicles15:7 kwoti vokwaGerishomu, mutungamiriri wavo aiva Joeri nehama dzake zana namakumi maviri;" 
1Chronicles15:8 kuchiti vokwaErizafani, mutungamiriri ari Shemaya nehama dzake mazana maviri;" 
1Chronicles15:9 kukati vokwaHebhuroni, mutungamiririwo ari Erieri nehama dzake makumi masere;" 
1Chronicles15:10 ndokuzotiwo vokwaUzieri, mutungamiriri wacho ari Aminadhabhu nehama dzake zana rine gumi navaviri." 
1Chronicles15:11 Dhavhidhi akazounganidza vapristi vaiti Zadhoki naAbhiyatari kwozouya vaRevhi vaiti Urieri naAsaya naJoeri naShemaya naErieri naAminadhabhu," 
1Chronicles15:12 akati kwavari, “Imika ndimi vatungamiriri vedzimba dzedzinza rokwaRevhi chizvichenurai imimi nehama dzenyu kuitira kuti mundotakura bhokisi rechitenderano raTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri muuye naro panzvimbo yandakarigadzirira" 
1Chronicles15:13 pamusana pokuti pakutanga paye hamuna kuritakura imi, Tenzi, Mwari wedu akatipinza mudambudziko nokuti hatina kunge taribata nomutoo waro wakatemwa kuti uitwe.”" 
1Chronicles15:14 Saizvozvo vapristi nevaRevhi vakazvichenura kuitira kuti vandounza bhokisi rechitenderano raTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles15:15 VaRevhi vakatanhika bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano pamapfudzi namapango aro aye sezvakanzi naMosesi zviitwe sokutaurawo kwakanga kwaita Tenzi. 
1Chronicles15:16 Dhavhidhi akaudzawo vatungamiriri vevaRevhi kuti vasarudze dzimwe hama dzavo dzive vaimbi vanofanira kuridza chaizvo zvokuimba nazvo zvinoti madimbwa nezvipendhani nemakwakwakwa outare paite mutinhimira wokufara. 
1Chronicles15:17 VaRevhi vakabva vasarudza Hemani mwanakomana waJoeri, kuhama dzake uku vakasarudza Asafu mwanakomana waBherekiya, kwoti kuvanakomana vokwaMerari hama dzavo, Etami mwanakomana waKushaya" 
1Chronicles15:18 pamwechete nehama dzavo dzaivatevedzera vanaZekariya naJaazieri naShemiramoti naJehieri naUni naEriyabhu naBhenaya naMaaseya naMatitiya naEriferehu naMikineya naObhedhiedhomu naJeieri vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru. 
1Chronicles15:19 Vaimbi vaiti: Hemani naAsafu naEtani ndivo vaiva vokuridza makwakwakwa endarira. 
1Chronicles15:20 Vaiva vokuridza madimbwa eAramoti okushaura ndiZekariya naAzieri naShemiramoti naJehieri naUni naEriyabhu naMaaseya naBhenaya. 
1Chronicles15:21 Asi Matitiya naEriferehu naMikineya naObhedhiedhomu naJeieri naAzaziya ndovaiva vatungamiriri vokushaura nezvipendani zveSheminiti zvezwi rapasipasi. 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya aiva mutungamiriri wevaRevhi mune zvokuimba achidzidzisa kuimba nokuti aizviziva. 
1Chronicles15:23 Bherekiya naErikana vaiva vokuchengetedza kusuo remaiva nebhokisi rechitenderano. 
1Chronicles15:24 Shebhaniya naJoshafati naNetaneri naAmasai naZekariya naBhenaya, vapristi, vaiva vokuridza mabhosvo pamberi pebhokisi raMwari rechitenderano. Obhedhiedhomu naJehiya vaivawo vachengetedzi vokusuo remaiva nebhokisi rechitenderano." 
1Chronicles15:25 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi navakuru vakuru veIsiraeri navatungamiriri vezviuru vaye vakandotora bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano kumba kwaObhedhiedhomu vachipembera kufara. 
1Chronicles15:26 Pamusana pokuti Mwari akabatsira vaRevhi kutakura bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano, vakapira zvibayiro zvehandira nomwe nehondohwe nomwe." 
1Chronicles15:27 Izvozvo Dhavhidhi aiva akapfeka hanzu yejira rerineni rakanakisisa ndizvozvowo zvakanga zvakaita vaRevhi vakanga vakatakura bhokisi rechitenderano navaimbi naKenaya mutungamiriri wezvokuimba. Dhavhidhi akanga akapfeka hanzu yeefodhi yerineni. 
1Chronicles15:28 Saizvozvo Isiraeri yose yakaunza bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano iri: mipururu nemhere zvichidairana nokurira kwehwamanda namabhosvo namakwakwakwa outare, vachiridzisa kwazvo madimbwa nezvipendani." 
1Chronicles15:29 Pakasvika bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano kuguta raDhavhidhi, Mikari mukunda waSauro akatarisa napawhindo akaona mambo Dhavhidhi achitamba nokufara achacharika, Mikari akabva amushora nechomumwoyo." 
1Chronicles16:1 Vakaunza bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano vakariisa mukati metendhe rarakanga ragadzirirwa naDhavhidhi vakapira zvibayiro zvokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana pana Mwari. 
1Chronicles16:2 Dhavhidhi paakapedza kupira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana, akakomborera vanhu nezita raTenzi" 
1Chronicles16:3 akagoveranisa vanhu vose veIsiraeri varume navakadzi zvokudya zvinoti chingwa nenyama yechirango nezvitsumbu zvamagirepisi akaomeswa. 
1Chronicles16:4 Chimwewo ndechokuti, akasarudza vamwe vaRevhi kuti vashande pamberi pebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano vapote vachinamata nokutenda nokurumbidza Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles16:5 Asafu ndiye aiva mutungamiriri wacho achitevedzerwa naZekariya naJeieri naShemiramoti naJehieri naMatitiya naEriyabhu naBhenaya naObhedhiedhomu naJeieri vaiva vokuridza madimbwa nezvipendani. Asafu ndiye aiva wokuridza makwakwakwa outare," 
1Chronicles16:6 Bhenaya naJahazieri vapristi, vari vokuramba vachiridza mabhosvo pamberi pebhokisi raMwari rechitenderano." 
1Chronicles16:7 Musi iwoyo Dhavhidhi akazoudza Asafu nehama dzake kuti vaimbire Tenzi rwiyo rwokutenda Tenzi vachiti: 
1Chronicles16:8 “Tendai Tenzi munamate kwaari nezita, muzivise mabasa ake kundudzi dzavanhu!" 
1Chronicles16:9 Muimbirei, mumurumbidze nenziyo, mutaure zvishamiso zvaakaita!" 
1Chronicles16:10 Pururudzai muzita rake rinoera, mwoyo yavanotsvaka Tenzi ipembere nokufara." 
1Chronicles16:11 Nekairai kutsvaka Tenzi mutsvakewo simba rake, shungu yokuda kuva pana Tenzi ngaive mugariro." 
1Chronicles16:12 Rangarirai zvishamiso zvaakaita, zviratidzo nemirao zvakabuda mumuromo make." 
1Chronicles16:13 Imi chizvarwa chaAbhurahamu muranda wake, imi vana vaJakobho vasarudzwi vake." 
1Chronicles16:14 Iyeyu Tenzi ndiye Mwari wedu mirao yake hakuna kwaisiri pasi pose. 
1Chronicles16:15 Rangarirai nokusingapere chitenderano chake, shoko raakati richengetwe kunyange, kusvikira kuchizvarwa chavanhu chechiuru," 
1Chronicles16:16 chitenderano chaakaita naAbhurahamu, chitsidzo chaakaita kuna Isaki;" 
1Chronicles16:17 chaakazvisunga nacho somurao kuitira Jakobho, sechitenderano chake naIsiraeri, chokugara nokugara" 
1Chronicles16:18 achiti: ‘Ndichakupa nyika yeKanani somugove wako wenhaka.’ 
1Chronicles16:19 Ipapo vakanga vachiri katsama chete, vanhu vashomanana, vatorwa zvavo;" 
1Chronicles16:20 vachidzunga nawo marudzi akasiya-siyana vachideva namo mumadzimambo nomumarudzi avanhu akasiyana-siyana. 
1Chronicles16:21 Zvokuti pave neanovabata zvakaipa akaramba, pamusana pavo aitsiura madzimambo" 
1Chronicles16:22 achiti: ‘Musambobata-bata zvenyu vangu vandakazodza, vaporofita vangu musawane chamunoita kwavari.’" 
1Chronicles16:23 Pasi pose zvapo ngapaimbire Tenzi. Paridzai ruponeso rwake zuva nezuva. 
1Chronicles16:24 Rondedzerai marudzi avanhu zvembiri yake, nokundudzi dzose zvishamiso zvaakaita," 
1Chronicles16:25 nokuti Tenzi mukuru anofanira kurumbidzwa chaizvo. Pavamwari vose zvavo ndiye chete anofanira kutyiwa 
1Chronicles16:26 nokuti vamwari vose vamarudzi ndavamwari vechipameso. Asi Tenzi ndiye akasika matenga," 
1Chronicles16:27 chiremera nembiri ndezvake, musha wake wakasimba, musha werufaro." 
1Chronicles16:28 Ipai Tenzi imi mhuri dzose dzavanhu, ipai Tenzi mbiri noukuru." 
1Chronicles16:29 Mbiri ngaiende kuna Tenzi, mbiri inokodzerana nezita rake. Takurai chipo muuye nacho paari. Pfugamirai Tenzi mune hanzu dzoutsvene." 
1Chronicles16:30 Pasi pose zvapo ngapadedere mberi kwake, nyika yakanyatsosimba haitsukunyuki." 
1Chronicles16:31 Matenga ngaafare, nyika izare nokufara, marudzi adure pachawo kuti, ‘Tenzi ndiye mutongi!’" 
1Chronicles16:32 Gungwa ngaritinhire nezvosewo zvizeremo, sango ngarifare kwazvo nezvosewo zvirimo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Miti yomusango ichadaidzira nokufara, kufarira Tenzi nokuti anouya kuzotonga nyika." 
1Chronicles16:34 Tendai Tenzi nokuti akanaka mwoyochena wake hauperi. 
1Chronicles16:35 Itiiwo, ‘Tiponeseiwo nhai Mwari ndimi Mwari anotiponesa. Tikokorodzeiwo mutinunure mukati mamarudzi tikwanise kutenda zita renyu rinoera tipembere kufara mukukurumbidzai kwatinoita" 
1Chronicles16:36 Tenzi ngaarumbidzwe, narini narini Mwari weIsiraeri.’ ” Vanhu vose vakati, “Ameni,” vakarumbidza Tenzi." 
1Chronicles16:37 Dhavhidhi akazosiya Asafu nehama dzake ikoko pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano raTenzi kuti vagare vachishanda pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano basa rainge richifanira kuitwa zuva nezuva. 
1Chronicles16:38 Akasiyawo Obhedhiedhomu nehama dzake makumi matanhatu navasere. Obhedhiedhomu mwanakomana waJedhutuni naHosa ndivo vaifanira kuva vachengetedzi vokusuo guru. 
1Chronicles16:39 Akasiyawo mupristi Zadhoki nehama dzake vapristi patendhe rinoera raTenzi panzvimbo iya yakatunhumara yokuteurira yaiva kuGibheoni 
1Chronicles16:40 kuti vapire mipiro yokupisa kuna Tenzi paatari pokupisira mipiro nguva dzose kumangwanani nokumanheru maererano nezvakanyorwa mumutemo waTenzi waakapa Isiraeri. 
1Chronicles16:41 Vaivawo naHemani naJedhutumu navamwe vakanga vasarudzwa vachiita zvokudomwa namazita kuti vapote vachitenda Tenzi nokuti mwoyochena wake hauperi. 
1Chronicles16:42 Hemani naJedhutumu vaiva namabhosvo nemakwakwakwa midziyo yokuridza nokuimbisa, nziyo dzinoera. Vana vokwaJedhutumu ndivo vakapiwa basa rokuchengeta pasuo guru." 
1Chronicles16:43 Vanhu vose vakati uyu kwake uyu kwake kuenda kumisha yavo. Dhavhidhi akadzokera kumuzinda wake kundokomborera mhuri yake. 
1Chronicles17:1 Dhavhidhi paakanga zvino anyatsogarawo mumuzinda wake akati kumuporofita Natani, “Tarisai muone, ini ndachidai zvangu kugara mumba yakashongedzwa nomusidhari, asi uku bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano rakangoti njo mutendhe zvamo.”" 
1Chronicles17:2 Natani akati kuna Dhavhidhi, “Endai zvenyu muite zvose zviri mumwoyo menyu nokuti Mwari anemi.”" 
1Chronicles17:3 Asi usiku hwakarehwo shoko raTenzi rakasvika kuna Natani richiti," 
1Chronicles17:4 “Enda utaurire muranda wangu Dhavhidhi kuti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi, iwe hausiriwe unondivakira imba yokugara." 
1Chronicles17:5 Ndinodaro nokuti handina kumbogaraka mumba ini kubvira pandakatungamirira vaIsiraeri kusvikira pari nhasi. Asi changu ini kwanga kuri kugara mutendhe pose painge pambogarwa. 
1Chronicles17:6 Kwose kwandakafamba nevaIsiraeri vose ndakambobvunzawo here ini vatongi vavo vandaipa basa rokufudza vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri kuti, uri kuregerei kundivakira imba yakashongedzwa nomusidhari?’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Zvino chienda utaurire muranda wangu Dhavhidhi kuti zvanzi naTenzi wegurusvusvu rehondo, ‘Ndakakutora kumafuro kwawaifudza zvipfuwoka iwe kuti uve ishe wevanhu vangu vaIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles17:8 Ndaiva ndinewe kwose kwawaifamba ndikafanoparadza vavengi vako vose. Zvino ndichaita kuti zita rako rive nomukurumbira sezvakangoita mazita avakuru vakuru vepanyika. 
1Chronicles17:9 Ndinotsvakira vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri pokugara ndovasimapo kuti vagarewo zvavo pavo, vasisambofuruswa vaipi vasisambovapfuvisa sezvavaiita kare" 
1Chronicles17:10 kubvira panguva yandaisarudzira vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri vatongi. Ndichaisa vavengi vako vose pasi pako. Uyewo Tenzi anoti kwauri iye Tenzi ndiye achatokuvakira imba. 
1Chronicles17:11 Mazuva ako akanga azokwana, wavata woendawo kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ako, ndichamutsa mushure mako mumwe mwana wako pavana vako vakomana, mwana wako chaiye. Ndichaita kuti umambo hwake hudzike midzi." 
1Chronicles17:12 Iyeyo ndiye anofanira kundivakira imba. Ndichaita kuti umambo hwake hurambe huripo narini wose. 
1Chronicles17:13 Ini ndichange ndiri baba kwaari, iyewo ari mwana kwandiri. Handizobvisa mwoyo wangu paari sokubvisa kwandakauita pane mumwe akakutangira." 
1Chronicles17:14 Asi kutoti ndichaita kuti ukuru hwake hudzike midzi ari mumba mangu narini wose, ari muumambo hwangu nokusingapere. Umambo hwake hauperi narini wose.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Natani akarondedzera Dhavhidhi mashoko iwaya ose achimutaurirawo chiratidzo ichochi chose. 
1Chronicles17:16 Mambo Dhavhidhi akapinda akagara zvake pana Tenzi akanamata achiti: “Ndiri aniwo zvangu nhai Mwari, Tenzi. Kana iyowo mhuri yokwangu, chiiwo zvayo, kundisvitsawo pakadai?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Sokunge izvozvi zvisina kukwana kwamuri imi Mwari, masvika pokutotaura nezvichazoitika mangwana, namangwana ayo kumhuri yeni muranda wenyu. Ndiwo maitiro enyu here iwaya kuvanhu nhai Tenzi Mwari!" 
1Chronicles17:18 “Pakadai apa, ini Dhavhidhi, chii chimwewo chandingataure kwamuri nokuremekedza kwamaiteni muranda wenyu? Munondiziva wani ini muranda wenyu." 
1Chronicles17:19 Muchiitireni muranda wenyu Tenzi, chiri chido chenyu zvenyu; makaita chinhu chikuru chakadai muchiita kuti zvinhu zvikuru zvose izvozvi zvizikanwe." 
1Chronicles17:20 Hakuna angamboenzaniswa nemi Tenzi, uye hakuna mumwe Mwari kunze kwenyu imi, maererano nezvose zvatakanzwa munzeve dzedu." 
1Chronicles17:21 “Ndiani pasi pano akaita savanhu venyu vaIsiraeri rudzi runoti Mwari anoenda kundozvinunurira zvake kuti vave vanhu vake uye kuti mbiri yezita renyu idhume achivaitira mabasa makuru anotyisa nokudzingira kunze marudzi kuitira vanhu vake ivavo vaakanunura kuIjipiti. 
1Chronicles17:22 Makaitawo kuti vaIsiraeri vave vanhu venyu nokusingapere, imiwo Tenzi mukava Mwari wavo." 
1Chronicles17:23 “Zvino imi Tenzi chizadzikisai waro zvamakareva nezvangu ini muranda wenyu nemhuri yangu zvirambe zvakadaro, muite sokuvimbisa kwamakaita;" 
1Chronicles17:24 kuti zita renyu rizivikanwe riende mbiri nokusingaperi zvichinzi, ‘Tenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri ndiye Mwari weIsiraeri.’ Uye kwamuri imba yangu ini Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu imire." 
1Chronicles17:25 Pamusana pokuti imi Mwari wangu mandidudzira pachena, ini muranda wenyu kuti muchandivakira imba ndokusakawo ini muranda wenyu ndaita simba rokuita munamato wakadai kwamuri." 
1Chronicles17:26 “Zvino Tenzi, imi ndimi Mwari mavimbisa zvinhu izvi zvakanaka kudai kuneni muranda wenyu," 
1Chronicles17:27 zvino chikomborerai waro mhuri yangu ini muranda wenyu kuti irambe yakangoti nemi kwati kwati nokuti imi Tenzi chamakomborera chakomborerwa nokusingapere.” 
1Chronicles18:1 Gare gare Dhavhidhi akakurira vaFirisitia akavaisa pasi pake, akatorera vaFirisitia Gati nemisha yaro." 
1Chronicles18:2 Akakurirawo Moabhu, vaMoabhu vakava varanda kuna Dhavhidhi vakatera mutero kwaari." 
1Chronicles18:3 Dhavhidhi akakurirawo Hadhadhiezeri mambo wokuZobha pedyo nokuHamati paakanga achienda kundodzikawo umambo hwake kurwizi rwaYufuratesi. 
1Chronicles18:4 Dhavhihdi akamutorera vachairi vengoro dzehondo chiuru chimwechete chavachairi navachairi mazana manomwe pamwechete navarwi vetsoka. Dhavhidhi akadimura matatira amabhiza ose engoro dzehondo ndokungosiya anokwanirana nezana rengoro dzehondo. 
1Chronicles18:5 VaSiria vokuDhamasikusi vakauya kuzobatsira Hadhadhiezeru mambo wokuZobha. Dhavhidhi akauraya varume makumi maviri ezviuru nezviuru zvevaSiria. 
1Chronicles18:6 Munyika yeSiria kuDhamasikusi Dhavhidhi akaisa zvikwata zvikwata zvavarwi, vaSiria vakava varanda kuna Dhavhidhi vachitotera mutero. Tenzi akaita kuti Dhavhidhi akurire kwose kwose kwaaienda." 
1Chronicles18:7 Dhavhidhi akatora nhoo dzendarama dzakanga dzakatakurwa namakurukota aHadhadhiezeru akadziunza kuJerusaremu. 
1Chronicles18:8 Dhavhidhi akakukuchawo ndarira yakawanda kwazvo kuTibhati nokuKuni, maguta aHadhadhiezeru. Ndiyo yakazogadziriswa naSoromoni zibhavhu rendarira riya ziguruguru nembiru nemidziyo yendarira." 
1Chronicles18:9 Tou mambo weHamati paakanzwa kuti Dhavhidhi akakurira hondo yose yaHadhidhiezeru, mambo weZobha," 
1Chronicles18:10 akatuma mwanakomana wake Hadhoramu kuna mambo Dhavhidhi kundomukwazisa nokumukorokotedza nokuti akanga arwisa Hadhadhiezeru akamukurira. Chaivapo ndechokuti, Hadhadhiezeru aigarorwisana naTou. Akatumira zvinhu zvakasiyasiyana zvinoti zvendarama nezvesirivha nezvendarira." 
1Chronicles18:11 Mambo Dhavhidhi akatsaurirawo zvinhu izvozvi kupira kuna Tenzi pamwechete nesirivha nendarama yaakanga akapamba kundudzi dzose idzi dzinoti: Edhomu neMoabhu nokuva Amoni nokuvaFirisitia neAmareki. 
1Chronicles18:12 Abhishai mwanakomana waZeruya akauraya vaEdhomu vanokwana zviuru gumi nezvisere muBani roMunyu. 
1Chronicles18:13 MuEdhomu imomo akaisa zvikwata zvikwata zvavarwi. VaEdhomu vose vakava varanda kuna Dhavhidhi. Tenzi akaita kuti Dhavhidhi akurire kwose kwose kwaaienda. 
1Chronicles18:14 Dhavhidhi uyu aitonga vanhu vake zvine ruenzaniso uye nomazvo chaimo. 
1Chronicles18:15 Izvozvo Joabhu mwana waZeruya aiva ari mutungamiriri wehondo, Jehoshafati mwanakomana waAhirudhi ariye samunyori." 
1Chronicles18:16 Zadhoki mwanakomana waAhitubhu, naAhimereki mwanakomana waAbhiyatari ndivo vaiva vapristi, Shavhusha ari samunyori" 
1Chronicles18:17 Bhenaya mwanakomana waJehoyadha aiva mukuru mukuru wevokuchengetedza mambo, maKereti namaPereti, ukuwo vana vaDhavhidhi vakomana vari machinda amambo." 
1Chronicles19:1 Mushure mezvizvi, Nahashi mambo wavaAmoni akafa, ndokubva mwanakomana wake amutsiva pakutonga." 
1Chronicles19:2 Dhavhidhi akati, “Ndicharamba ndiine mwoyo wakanaka kuna Hanani mwanakomana waNahashi nokuti baba vake vakandiitirawo mwoyo wakanaka.” Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi akatuma nhume kundomubata maoko pamusana pababa vake. Makurukota aDhavhidhi akasvika kuna Hanuni munyika yavaAmoni kuzomubata maoko." 
1Chronicles19:3 Asi machinda avaAmoni akati kuna Hanuni, “Munofunga kuti izvozvi Dhavhidhi kukutumirai nhume kuzokubatai maoko kwaaita uku kuremekedza baba venyu nhai? Makurukota ake haana here kuuya kwamuri kuzoongorora nokukurira nokusora nyika ino?”" 
1Chronicles19:4 Saka Hanuni akabata makurukota aDhavhidhi akavaveura, akacheka napakati hanzu dzavo nechapahudyu akavati vaende, ivo ndokubva vaenda." 
1Chronicles19:5 Zvavanhu ivavo, pazvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi, akatuma vanhu kundovachingura nokuti vakanga vachinyara zvikuru kwazvo. Mambo akati, “Imborambai muri kuJeriko ikoko kudzamara ndebvu dzenyu dzamera mugozoti modzoka kuno.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 VaAmoni pavakaona kuti vatomutsa ruvengo naDhavhidhi Hanuni navaAmoni vakatumira mari yesirivha inorema makirogiramu zviuru makumi matatu ane zvina yokukwereta nayo ngoro dzehondo dzokumboshandisa pamwechete navachairi vadzo kuMesopotamia nokuAramaaka nokuZobha. 
1Chronicles19:7 Vakakwereta ngoro dzehondo zviuru makumi matatu ane zviviri, vakati mambo wokuMaaka auyewo nehondo yake. Vakauya vakadzika matendhe avo pakatarisana neMedhebha. VaAmoni vakakokorodzwa mumaguta avo vakauya kuhondo." 
1Chronicles19:8 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi, akatuma Joabhu nehondo yose yavarume vano chaivo." 
1Chronicles19:9 VaAmoni vakauya vakaronganirana hondo pasuo guru reguta, madzimambo akanga auya vakanga vari pavo voga musango." 
1Chronicles19:10 Pakaona Joabhu kuti hondo yavavinga yatoita zvokuvakomba mberi neshure, akasarudza vamwe varwi mukati mavakanga vasarudzwa muIsiraeri vaya, akavaronga kuti varwise vaSiria." 
1Chronicles19:11 Vamwe varwi vake vose akavaisa mumaoko omunun'una wake Abhishai akavaronga kuti varwisane navaAmoni. 
1Chronicles19:12 Akabva ati, “Kana ndichinge ndava kukurirwa navaSiria, iwe unouya kuzondibatsira, asi kana vaAmoni vava kukukurira, ini ndichazokubatsira." 
1Chronicles19:13 Tsunga mwoyo tiite zvechirume tichiitira vanhu vedu namaguta aMwari wedu. Mwari ngaaite kuda kwake.” 
1Chronicles19:14 Saizvozvo Joabhu navanhu vaaiva navo vakatanga kuvinga vaSiria kundovarwisa, ivo vakabva vati ware kumutiza." 
1Chronicles19:15 VaAmoni pavakangoona kuti vaSiria vatiza, vakaitawo zvimwechetezvo ndiye ware kutiza Abhishai munun'una waJoabhu vakapinda muguta. Joabhu akazosvika kuJerusaremu." 
1Chronicles19:16 Asi vaSiria pavakaona kuti vakurirwa neIsiraeri, vakatumira nhume dzikauya navaSiria vokumhiri kwaYufuratesi vachitungamirirwa naShofaki mutungamiriri wehondo yaHadhadhiezeru." 
1Chronicles19:17 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzaDhavhidhi, akakokorodza Isiraeri yose pamwechete akayambuka Jorodhani akasvika kwavari, akaronga hondo yake kuti achivarwisa, Dhavhidhi paakanga aronga hondo yake kurwisa vaSiria, vakarwa naye." 
1Chronicles19:18 VaSiria vakabva vaparamuka kutiza Isiraeri. Dhavhidhi akarakatisa kuuraya mazana manomwe avachairi vengoro nezviuru makumi mana avarwi vetsoka. Akaurayawo Shofaki mutungamiri wehondo yavo. 
1Chronicles19:19 Makurukota aHadhadhiezeru paakaona kuti vakurirwa neIsiraeri, vakaita chibvumirano neIsiraeri. Vakaita chibvumirano kuti pave nokuwirirana naDhavhidhi vakabva vava varanda vake. Naizvozvo vaSiria vakazenge vava kutya kubatsirazve vaAmoni." 
1Chronicles20:1 Mumwaka wepfumvudza panguva inoenda madzimambo kuhondo, Joabhu akabuda nehondo vakandopamba munyika yevaAmoni vakaendawo vakakomba guta reRabha. Izvozvo Dhavhidhi aiva asara ari muJerusaremu. Joabhu akarwisa Rabha akarikurira." 
1Chronicles20:2 Dhavhidhi akatorera mambo wavo ngundu youmambo mumusoro. Akaona kuti yainge ichirema makirogiramu aikarosvika makumi matatu nemana iri yendarama. Yaive nerimwe dombo raikosha kwazvo. Yakadzikwa mumusoro maDhavhidhi. Akakukucha muguta imomo zvinhu zvakawanda kwazvo zvokupamba. 
1Chronicles20:3 Akatapamo vanhu vaivamo akavaisa pabasa rechibharo rokushanda namajeko namapadza namatemo. Ndozvakaitwa naDhavhidhi kumaguta ose avaAmoni. Dhavhidhi navanhu vose vakazodzokera zvavo kuJerusaremu. 
1Chronicles20:4 Mushure maizvozvo kwakazomuka hondo nevaFirisitia kuGezeru. Sibhekai wokuHusha uya ndopaakauraya Sipai aiva mumwe wechizvarwa cheHofori, vaFirisitia vakabva vava kutongwa navamwe." 
1Chronicles20:5 Kwakazoita zvakare imwe hondo nevaFirisitia ndokubva Erihanani mwanakomana waJairi auraya Rahimi mukoma nomunun'una naGoriyati wechiGiti. Rwiriko rwepfumo rake rwainge mutandariko womuruki. 
1Chronicles20:6 Kwakazoitazve imwe hondo kuGati, ikoko kwaiva nerimwe zirume rino chairo. Mumaoko raiti uku minwe mitanhatu, uku mitanhatu, kutsokawo rakati uku zvigunwe zvitanhatu, uku zvitanhatu, pamwechete makumi maviri namana. Aivawo mumwe wechizvarwa chehofori." 
1Chronicles20:7 Paakatafurira Isiraeri, Jonatani mwanakomana waShimei aiva mukoma nomunun'una naDhavhidhi akamuuraya." 
1Chronicles20:8 Ivava ava vaiva zvizvarwa zvehofori dzomuGati. Vakaurayiwa naDhavhidhi navanhu vake. 
1Chronicles21:1 Satani akamirisana neIsiraeri akaisa muna Dhavhidhi mumwewo mweya wokuverenga vaIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles21:2 Ipapo Dhavhidhi akati kuna Joabhu mutungamiriri wehondo yake, “Enda uverenge vaIsiraeri kubvira kuBheerishebha kusvikira kwaDhani uzonditaurira ndigoziva kuti kune vanhu vangani.”" 
1Chronicles21:3 Asi Joabhu akati, “Hongu zvazvo, dai Tenzi awedzera vanhu kazana kakazanirana kupfuura zvavari kuri zvino! Asi nhai changamire mambo, ko inga vanhu vose ivava varanda venyu wani, changamire. Zvino madireiko kuita chinhu chakadai? Madirei kuparira Isiraeri mhosva yakadai?”" 
1Chronicles21:4 Zvakataurwa namambo ndizvo zvakatozobudirira pane zvaJoabhu. Ipapo Joabhu akabva paye akabvongodza Isiraeri yose akazodzokera kuJerusaremu. 
1Chronicles21:5 Joabhu akataurira Dhavhidhi uwandi hwavanhu hwakadai izvi: KwaIsiraeri kwose kwaiva nemiriyoni imwechete ine zana rezviuru zvavarume vokurwa namapakatwa, kwaJudha kuine mazana ezviuru ane zviuru makumi manomwe avarume vokurwa namapakatwa." 
1Chronicles21:6 Asi haana kunge averenga vokwaRevhi nevokwaBhenjamini pamwechete navo nokuti chirevo chamambo chakaramba kunyatsopinda Joabhu mumwoyo. 
1Chronicles21:7 Asi Mwari haana kufadzwa naizvozvi izvi akabva arova Isiraeri neshamhu yokuranga. 
1Chronicles21:8 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Mwari, “Ndakatadza zvikuru kwazvo nezvandakaita izvi. Zvino ndateterera, ndiregerereiwo chitadzo changu ini muranda wenyu nokuti zvandakaita izvi ndezvoupenzi chaizvo.”" 
1Chronicles21:9 Mwari akati kuna Gadhi muoni wokwaDhavhidhi," 
1Chronicles21:10 “Enda uti kuna Dhavhidhi zvanzi naTenzi sarudza chaungaite pazvitatu izvi zvandiri kukupa.” 
1Chronicles21:11 Nokudaro Gadhi akaenda kuna Dhavhidhi akamuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, sarudzai chamungade; mungade here kuti muno munyika yenyu muve namakore matatu enzara," 
1Chronicles21:12 kana kuti mupedze mwedzi mitatu muchingotiza vavengi venyu vachikurondai, kana kuti mazuva matatu muine pfumvu yebakatwa raTenzi muno munyika yenyu murohwe nedenda, mutumwa waTenzi abvongodze nyika yose yeIsiraeri achiparadza. Zvino dai mukapafunga mundipewo mhinduro yokundopa andituma.”" 
1Chronicles21:13 Dhavhidhi ndokuti kuna Gadhi, “Inga ndazotambura zvino. Rega zvako ndirangwe zvangu naTenzi nokuti ngoni dzake dzakawanda kwazvo. Asi zvokuti munhu ave iye wokundiranga, aiwa.”" 
1Chronicles21:14 Saizvozvo Tenzi akarova Isiraeri nedenda, kukafa varume vokwaIsiraeri zviuru makumi manomwe." 
1Chronicles21:15 Mwari akatuma mutumwa wacho kuJerusaremu kundoriparadza. Paakanga zvino oda kuti achiriparadza, Tenzi achizvionawo, akanyevenuka mwoyo akarega kuwana chakaipa chaakazovaita. Akati kumutumwa akanga achiita basa rokuparadza wacho, “Zvakwana chirega.” Izvozvo mutumwa iyeyo akanga amire pedyo neburiro raOrinani wechiJebhusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Dhavhidhi akatarisa akaona mutumwa waTenzi amire muchadenga, pakati pedenga napasi muruoko akabata bakatwa rakatoburitswa muhara akarinangisa paJerusaremu, ndokubva iye Dhavhidhi navakuru vakuru vapfeka hanzu dzamasaga ndiye nouso pasi zvambarara." 
1Chronicles21:17 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Mwari, “Inga wani ndini ndakati kuverengwe vanhu. Ndini ndakatadza ndakaita zvakaipa kwazvo. Ko hwai idzika dzakapareiwo? Ndapota zvangu nhai Tenzi, Mwari wangu. Dai mukachiranga ini nevemba yokwababa vangu, murege zvenyu kuonesa nhamo vanhu ava.”" 
1Chronicles21:18 Mutumwa waTenzi akatuma Gadhi kundotaurira Dhavhidhi kuti iye Dhavhidhi akwire andovakira Tenzi atari paburiro raOrinani wechiJebhusi. 
1Chronicles21:19 Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akaendako sokutaura kwakanga kwaitwa naGadhi achizvitaura nezita raTenzi. 
1Chronicles21:20 Izvozvo Orinani akanga achipura zvake koroni. Akati tarisei onei mutumwa, vana vavo vakomana vavaiva navo vakabva vandohwanda." 
1Chronicles21:21 Dhavhidhi akasvika kuna Orinani. Orinani akati tarisei ndokuona Dhavhidhi akabva paburiro akandoti pana Dhavhidhi uso pasi kota kota kuri kuombera mambo. 
1Chronicles21:22 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Orinani, “Ndipewo chidzengerere ichi choruware urwu kuti ndivakirepo Tenzi atari munditengesere zvenyu nemari yacho chaiyo yakakwana kuitira kuti denda rimiswe kuvanhu.”" 
1Chronicles21:23 Orinani ndokuti kuna Dhavhidhi, “Torai zvenyu changamire mambo muite zvenyu zvamunoda. Chionaika ndinokupaiwo mombe dzomupiro wokupisa nehuni dzacho nezvirhei zvokupirisa izvi nekoroni yomupiro wembesanwa. Zvose izvozvo ndini ndichabvisa.”" 
1Chronicles21:24 Asi mambo Dhavhidhi akati kuna Orinani, “Kwete, nokuti zvokutenga ndinofanira kutotenga nemari yakakwana. Handifanire kupira kuna Tenzi zvenyu zvandinenge ndakutorerai kana kupira mipiro yokupisa yepachena.”" 
1Chronicles21:25 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi akapa Orinani mazana matanhatu emari yemashekeri yendarama yakaerwa yokutenga chidzengerere ichocho. 
1Chronicles21:26 Dhavhidhi akavakira Tenzi atari ipapo akapira mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana akanamata kuna Tenzi. Tenzi akamupindura nomoto wakabva kudenga akatungidza mupiro wokupisa paatari. 
1Chronicles21:27 Tenzi akabva audza mutumwa uya, mutumwa akadzorera bakatwa rake muhara maro." 
1Chronicles21:28 Panguva iyoyo Dhavhidhi paakaona kuti Tenzi amupindura paruware rwaOrinani muJebhusi akapirapo zvibayiro zvake. 
1Chronicles21:29 Chaivapo ndechichi chokuti, tendhe rinoera raTenzi riya rokugadzirwa naMosesi murenje neatari yemipiro yokupisa zvakanga zvichiri kuGibheoni panzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira panguva iyoyo." 
1Chronicles21:30 Asi Dhavhidhi apa haana kukwanisa kuendako kundonzwa kuti Mwari anoti kudii nazvo pamusana pokuti aitya bakatwa romutumwa waTenzi. 
1Chronicles22:1 Dhavhidhi ndopaakati, “Pano apa ndopachava nemba yaTenzi Mwari, ipo pano ndopachava neatari yomupiro weIsiraeri wokupisa.”" 
1Chronicles22:2 Dhavhidhi akati kuunganidzwe pamwechete vatorwa vaiva munyika yeIsiraeri akabva aronga vokuveza mabwe kuti vaveze mabwe okuvakisa imba yaMwari. 
1Chronicles22:3 Dhavhidhi akaunganidzawo mirwi nemirwi yesimbi dzokupfura zvipikiri zvamagonhi emisuo mikuru nesimbi dzokubatisapo pamwechete nendarira isingambozivana kuwanda 
1Chronicles22:4 namapango omuti womusidhari asingaverengeki nokuti vokuSidhoni nevokuTire vakaigira Dhavhidhi musidhari wakawanda kwazvo 
1Chronicles22:5 pamusana pokuti Dhavhidhi aiti, “Mwanangu Soromoni uyu achiri muduku haasati agara nebasa, zvino imba yacho iyi ichavakirwa Tenzi inofanira kuva imba chaiyo yamandiriri, idhume mbiri nomukurumbira nyika yose. Naizvozvo ndichafanoigadzirira.” Nokudaro Dhavhidhi akaunganidza mirwi nemirwi yezvinhu zvokuvakisa asati afa." 
1Chronicles22:6 Akazodaidza mwanakomana wake Soromoni akamuti anofanira kuvakira Tenzi imba, yaTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles22:7 Dhavhidhi akati kuna Soromoni, “Mwanangu ndakanga ndine pfungwa mumwoyo mangu yokuvaka imba yokuisa zita raTenzi, Mwari wangu." 
1Chronicles22:8 Asi shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti, ‘Wakadeura ropa rakawanda ukarwa hondo dzakakura saka iwe haufaniri kundivakira imba yokuisa zita rangu nokuti wakadeura ropa rakawanda kwazvo mumeso mangu panyika." 
1Chronicles22:9 Chinzwa, uchabereka mwana mukomana achava munhu worunyararo. Ndichaita kuti ave norugare navavengi vake nokuti zita rake richanzi Soromoni. Ndichapa rugare norunyararo kuIsiraeri mumazuva ake." 
1Chronicles22:10 Ndiye achavaka imba yokuisa zita rangu. Achava mwana kwandiri ini ndiri baba kwaari. Ndichaita kuti umambo hwake hudzike midzi muIsiraeri narini wose.’ 
1Chronicles22:11 “Zvino Tenzi ngaave newe ugobudirira kuvaka imba yaTenzi, Mwari wako sokutaura kwaakaita nezvako." 
1Chronicles22:12 Chete dai Tenzi akupa ungwaru nokunzwisisa kuitirawo kuti paanozokuti utonge Isiraeri uzochengeta mutemo waTenzi, Mwari wako." 
1Chronicles22:13 Ndopauchabudirira ukange wachenjerera kuchengeta zvirevo nemirao yakatemerwa Mosesi naTenzi kuti ape vaIsiraeri. Shinga utsunge mwoyo usatye kana kurasa mwoyo. 
1Chronicles22:14 Ndakatambudzika kwazvo ini kuunganidza zvinhu zvemba yaTenzi zvinoti: zviuru zvitatu zvematani endarama zvina matani mazana mana nesirivha inorema matani zviuru makumi matatu namana, kwouya ndarira nesimbi isingambozivana nokuti yakawanda kwazvo kwozouya mapango namatombo andakaunganidzawo. Iwe unofanira kuwedzerawo pana izvozvi." 
1Chronicles22:15 Vanhu vokushanda unavo vakawanda vanoti vavezi vamatombo nevokuvaka namatombo navavezi nenyanzwi dzemabasa akasiyana-siyana dzisingaverengeki, mhizha" 
1Chronicles22:16 dzendarama nesirivha nendarira nesimbi. Wochiita izvozvo! Tenzi ngaave newe!” 
1Chronicles22:17 Dhavhidhi akaudzawo vatungamiriri vose veIsiraeri kuti vanofanira kubatsira mwanakomana wake Soromoni achiti," 
1Chronicles22:18 “Handiti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu anemi here? Haana kukupai here runyararo kumativi ose? Ndinodaro nokuti akaisa vomuno munyika ino mumaoko angu. Nyika iyoyi yava pasi paTenzi navanhu vake." 
1Chronicles22:19 Zvino pfungwa dzenyu nomwoyo yenyu ngazvichiva pakutsvaka Tenzi, Mwari wenyu. Imi mochitomira muvake nzvimbo inoera yaTenzi Mwari kuitira kuti bhokisi rechitenderano raMwari nemidziyo inoera yaMwari iiswe mumba yakavakirwa kuisa zita raTenzi.”" 
1Chronicles23:1 Dhavhidhi paakanga zvino akwegura mazuva ake aendadzanawo kwazvo, akagadza mwanakomana wake Soromoni umambo hweIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles23:2 Dhavhidhi akaunganidza vatungamiriri vose veIsiraeri navapristi nevaRevhi. 
1Chronicles23:3 Kwakaverengwa vokwaRevhi, kubvira pane vane makumi matatu amakore zvichikwira pakaita makumi matatu ezviuru zvavarume ane zviuru zvisere." 
1Chronicles23:4 Dhavhidhi akati, “Makumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zvina zvaivava ava ngavave vokuona nezvebasa repamba yaTenzi, zviuru zvitanhatu vova vakuru vakuru navatongi," 
1Chronicles23:5 zviuruwo zvina vave vachengetedzi vokumisuo mikuru, vamwe zviuru zvinawo vari vokurumbidza Tenzi nezvokuridzisa mumhanzi zvandakagadzirira kurumbidza.”" 
1Chronicles23:6 Dhavhidhi akavaronga mumapoka zvichifambirana navanakomana vokwaRevhi achiti vokwaGerishomu nevokwaKohati nevokwaMerari. 
1Chronicles23:7 Vanakomana vokwaGerishomu paiti Radhani naShimei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Vanakomana vaRadhani ndiJehieri mukuru wacho, naZetamu naJoeri, vatatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Vana vaShimei vakomana ndiSheromoti naHazieri naHarani pautatu hwavo kudaro. Ivava ndivo vaiva vatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwaRadhani. 
1Chronicles23:10 Vanakomana vaShimei ndiJahati naZina naJeushi naBheriya. Ivava vari vana kudai ndovanakomana vaShimei. 
1Chronicles23:11 Johati ndiye mukuru wacho, wechipiri ari Ziza. Asi Jeushi naBheriya vaiva vasina vana vakomana vazhinji nokudaro vakazongozikanwa savanhu vemhuri imwechete." 
1Chronicles23:12 Vanakomana vaKohati ndiAmuramu naIzhari naHebhuroni naUzieri vari vana kudaro. 
1Chronicles23:13 Vanakomana vaAmuramu ndiAroni naMosesi. Aroni akatsaurwa kuti ave ndiye wokuteketera kuna Mwari zvinhu zvinoera kwazvo kuti iye navanakomana vokwake vave vokupisa rusenzi pana Tenzi narini wose uye kumushandira nokukomborera vanhu muzita rake nokusingaperi. 
1Chronicles23:14 Asi vanakomana vaMosesi munhu waMwari mazita avo aitaurwa mukati mevedzinza rokwaRevhi. 
1Chronicles23:15 Vana vaMosesi vakomana ndiGerishomu naEriezeru. 
1Chronicles23:16 Vanakomana vaGerishomu ndiShebhueri mukuru wacho. 
1Chronicles23:17 Vanawo vakomana vaEriezeru ndiRehabhiya mukuru wacho. Eriezeru uyu aiva asina vamwe vana vakomana, asi Rehabhiya aiva nezanzwe ravanakomana kuwanda." 
1Chronicles23:18 Vanakomana vaIzhari ndiSheromiti mukuru wacho. 
1Chronicles23:19 Vanakomanawo vaHebhuroni ndiJeriya mukuru wacho wechipiri ndiAmariya, wechitatu ari Jahazieri, Jekameamu ariye wechina wacho." 
1Chronicles23:20 Vanakomana vaUzieri ndiMika mukuru wacho wechipiri ari Ishiya. 
1Chronicles23:21 Vana vaMerari vakomana ndiMahiri naMushi. Vanakomana vaMahiri ndiEreazari naKishi. 
1Chronicles23:22 Ereazari akafa asina vana vakomana aingova navana vasikana chete. Hama dzavo, vanakomana vaKishi ndivo vakavaroora." 
1Chronicles23:23 Vanakomana vaMushi ndiMahiri naEdheru naJerimoti pautatu hwavo kudaro. 
1Chronicles23:24 Ivava ndivo vanakomana vokwaRevhi imba nemba vari vatungamiriri mudzimhuri dzokwavo. Ndouwandi hwavo sokunyorwa kwavo mazita munhu nomunhu vachiverengwa kubvira vane makumi maviri amakore okuberekwa navaipfuura ipapa vokuzoita basa romumba yaTenzi 
1Chronicles23:25 nokuti Dhavhidhi akareva paakati, “Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri aita kuti vanhu vake vave norunyararo uyewo iye aita Jerusaremu musha wake narini wose." 
1Chronicles23:26 Chimwezve ndechokuti kuvaRevhi, basa rokutakura tendhe rinoera kana mumwe mudziyo zvawo wokushandisamo hapachisina.”" 
1Chronicles23:27 Pamusana pemazwi aya aDhavhidhi okupedzesera, vaRevhi vakaverengwa vaibvira pamakore makumi maviri zvichikwira." 
1Chronicles23:28 Saka basa ravo rakanga rava kuzova rokubatsira vanakomana vokwaAroni kushanda pamba yaTenzi nokuchengetedza zvivanze zvacho, nedzimba dzepo nokuchenura zvose zvinoera nokuita basa rose rose zvaro repamba yaMwari;" 
1Chronicles23:29 nokubatsirawo pachingwa chokuisa pana Tenzi uye upfu hwekoroni hwakanyatsokuyiwa hwomupiro wembesenwa nechingwa chakati fatata chisina mbiriso nomupiro wokubika nomupiro waikanyiwa namafuta eorivhi uyewo kupima uwandi nokuera mwero yemhando nemhando dzose dzezvinhu. 
1Chronicles23:30 Ndivo zvino vakanga vava vokumira mangwanani oga oga vachitenda Tenzi vachimurumbidza, manheru voitawo zvimwechetezvo;" 
1Chronicles23:31 napose paipirwa kuna Tenzi mipiro yokupisa pamisi yeSabata neyokugara kwemwedzi namamwe mazuva makuru zvichifambiranawo nouwandi hwavo sezvavakanzi vagare vachiita pana Tenzi. 
1Chronicles23:32 Uyewo ndobasa ravainge vofanira kuita rokuonawo nezvetendhe rokusanganira nenzvimbo inoera vachitumwa navanakomana vaAroni hama dzavo kuitira basa repamba yaTenzi. 
1Chronicles24:1 Zvikwata zvavanakomana vokwaAroni ndezvizvi izvi: vanakomana vaAroni ndiNadhabhu naAbhihu naEreazari naItamaru. 
1Chronicles24:2 Asi Nadhabhu naAbhihu vakatangira baba wavo kufa. Vakafa vasina vana. Saka Ereazari naItamaru ndivo vakava vapristi. 
1Chronicles24:3 Dhavhidhi akabatsirwa naZadhoki mumwe wavanakomana vokwaEreazari naAhimereki mumwe wavanakomana vokwaItamaru akavaronganisa maererano namabasa avo pabasa ravo. 
1Chronicles24:4 Mumhuri yokwaEreazari maiva navatungamiriri vakawanda kupfuura vokwaItamaru. Ipapo vokwaEreazari vakarongwa muzvikwata gumi nezvitanhatu, vokwaItamaru vakarongwa muzvikwata zvisere." 
1Chronicles24:5 Pamusana pokuti muvanakomana vokwaEreazari navokwaItamaru makanga muine vakuru vakuru vepanzvimbo inoera navakuru vakuru vokwaMwari, kuti vavaise muzvikwata izvozvo vakashandisa nzira imwecheteyo yechin'ange." 
1Chronicles24:6 Munyori Shemaya mwanakomana waNetaneri muRevhi ndiye aivanyora pana vanhu ava vanoti: mambo namakurukota ake nomupristi Zadhoki naAhimereki mwanakomana waAbhiyatari navatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo dzavapristi nedzavaRevhi vachimboti torei mutungamiriri kumhuri yokwaEreazari vozotizve torei mutungamiriri kumhuri yokwaItamaru. 
1Chronicles24:7 Akatanga kubuda pachin'ange ndiJehoyaribhu tevere Jedhaya 
1Chronicles24:8 wechitatu ari Harimu wechina ndiSeorimu 
1Chronicles24:9 wechishanu Marikiya wechitanhatu Miyamini 
1Chronicles24:10 wechinomwe ari Hakozi wechisere ndiAbhiya 
1Chronicles24:11 wechipfumbamwe ndiJeshua wegumi ariwo Shekaniya 
1Chronicles24:12 wegumi nechiposhi Eriyashibhu wegumi nechipiri ndiJakimu 
1Chronicles24:13 wegumi netatu ari Hupa wegumi nechina ariwo Jeshebheamu 
1Chronicles24:14 wegumi nechishanu ndiBhiriga wegumi nechitanhatu ari Imeru 
1Chronicles24:15 wegumi nechinomwe ndiHeziri wegumi nechisere ari Hapizezi 
1Chronicles24:16 wegumi nechipfumbamwe ndiPetahiya wechimakumi maviri ari Jehezikeri 
1Chronicles24:17 wemakumi maviri nechiposhi ariwo Jakini wamakumi maviri nechipiri ndiGamuri 
1Chronicles24:18 wamakumi maviri nechitatu ari Dheraya wemakumi maviri nechina ndiMaaziya. 
1Chronicles24:19 Ivava ndivo vakapiwa basa rokupota vachipinda mumba yaTenzi namazoro avo avakaitirwa nababa wavo Aroni sezvaakanzi aite naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
1Chronicles24:20 Vamwe vose vavanakomana vokwaRevhi ndavava ava: kuvana vokwaAmuramu ndiShubhaeri kuvana vaShubhaeri ndiJedheya. 
1Chronicles24:21 Pavana vokwaRehabhiya ndiIshiya mukuru wacho. 
1Chronicles24:22 Kune vokwaIzhari ndiSheromoti. Vana vokwaSheromoti ndiJahati. 
1Chronicles24:23 Kuvana vakomana vaHebhuroni ndiJeriya mukuru wacho wechipiri ndiAmariya wechitatu ari Jahazieri Jekameamu ariye wechina. 
1Chronicles24:24 Kuvanakomana vaUzieri ndiMika vanawo vaMika ndiShamiri. 
1Chronicles24:25 Ishiya mukoma nomunun'una naMika havanoi vanakomana vake. Pavana vaIshiya ava ndiZekariya. 
1Chronicles24:26 Kuvanakomana vaMerari vanaMahiri naMushi. Muvanawo vaJaaziya ndiBheno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Pavanawo vaMerari aberekwa naJaaziya vakatorwa ndiBheno naShohamu naZakuri naIbhuri. 
1Chronicles24:28 Kwotiwo kwaMahiri ndiEreazari, akanga asina vana vakomana." 
1Chronicles24:29 Kwozoti kune vokwaKishi ndiJerahimieri. 
1Chronicles24:30 Mwanakomana waMushi ndiMahiri naEdheru naJerimoti. Ivava ava ndivo vanakomana vokwaRevhi imba nemba. 
1Chronicles24:31 Vakaitawo chin'ange sezvakaitawo hama dzavo dzokwaAroni paiva navanhu ava vaiti mambo Dhavhidhi naZadhoki naAhimereki navatungamiriri vavo vedzimhuri dzokwavo dzavapristi nedzevaRevhi. Vakoma navanun'una mumhuri idzodzi vakangoitirwa zvimwechetezvo. 
1Chronicles25:1 Dhavhidhi navakuru vakuru vebasa racho vakasarudzawo vokuita basa, vamwe vevanakomana vokwaAsafu nevokwaHemani nevokwaJedhutuni kuti vave vokuporofita kana kwaridzwa zvipendani namadimbwa namakwakwakwa outare. Mazita avanhu vakanyorwa vokuita basa iri namabasa avo akamira akadai izvi:" 
1Chronicles25:2 kuvanakomana vokwaAsafu paiti Zakuri naJosefi naNetaniya naAsharera. Vana vaAsafu vaitungamirirwa naiye Asafu vachizviita vari mumaoko amambo," 
1Chronicles25:3 kune vokwaAjedhutuni, vana vaiye Jedhutuni paiti Gedhariya naZeri naJeshaya naShimei naHashabhiya naMatitiya vari vatanhatu kudaro. Vaingewo vachitungamirirwa nababa wavo Jedhutuni vaiporofitawo kwaridzwa zvipendani vachitenda nokurumbidza Tenzi;" 
1Chronicles25:4 kune vokwaHemani, vanakomana vaHemani paiva naBhukiya naMataniya naUzieri kwouya Shubhaeri naJerimoti naHananiya naHanani kwoti Eriyata naGidhariti naRomamitiezeru kwozouya Joshibhekasha naMaroti naHotiri naMahazioti." 
1Chronicles25:5 Vose ivava vaiva vanakomana vaHemani muoni wokwamambo maereranowo nechitsidzo chaMwari chokuvakwidziridza nokuti Mwari aiva apa Hemani vana vakomana gumi navana navana vasikana vatatu. 
1Chronicles25:6 Vose ivava vaitungamirirwa nababa wavo mune zvokuimba izvi mumba yaTenzi vaine makwakwakwa outare namadimbwa nezvipendhani pane zvainge zvichiitwa mumba yaMwari. Zvaiitwa naAsafu naJedhutuni naHemani vaizviita vari mumaoko amambo. 
1Chronicles25:7 Uwandi hwavo pamwechete nehama dzavo hwevakanga vadzidziswa kuimbira Tenzi, vose zvavo vaiva noumhisha hwacho vakanga vari mazana maviri ane makumi masere ane vanhu vasere." 
1Chronicles25:8 Vakavagovanisa mabasa avo nechin'ange zvimwechetezvo mukuru nomudiki, mudzidzisi nomudzidzi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Kune vokwaAsafu, pakutanga chin'ange chakaenda kuna Josefi pechipiri kuna Gedhariya iye nehama dzake navanakomana vake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:10 pechitatu kuna Zakuri, iye navanakomana vake, nehama dzakewo, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:11 pechina kuna Iziri navanakomana vake, nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:12 pechishanu kuna Netaniya navanawo vake vakomana nehama dzakewo, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:13 pechitanhatu kuna Bhukiya navanakomana vakewo nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:14 pechinomwe kuna Jesharera navanakomana vake nehamawo dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:15 pechisere kuna Jeshaya navanakomanawo vake nehama dzake, vari gumiwo navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:16 pechipfumbamwe kuna Mataniya navana vakewo vakomana nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:17 pechigumi kuna Shimei navana vakomana vake nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:18 pegumi nechiposhi kuna Azareri navana vake vakomana nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:19 pegumi nechipiri kuna Hashabhiya navanakomana vakewo nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:20 pegumi nechitatu kuna Shubhaeri navanawo vakomana vake nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:21 pegumi nechina kuna Matitiya navanakomana vake nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:22 pegumi nechishanu kuna Jeremoti navanakomanawo vake nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:23 pegumi nechitanhatu kuna Hananiya navanakomana vakewo nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:24 pegumi nechinomwe kuna Joshibhekasha navanakomana vake nehamawo dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:25 pegumi nechisere kuna Hanani navana vake vakomana nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:26 pegumi nechipfumbamwe kuna Maroti navanawo vake vakomana nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:27 pechimakumi maviri kuna Eriyata navanakomana vake nehamawo dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:28 pemakumi maviri nechiposhi kuna Hotiri navanawo vake vakomana nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:29 pemakumi maviri nechipiri kuna Gidhariti navanakomana vakewo nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:30 pemakumi maviri nechitatu kuna Mahazioti navana vake vakomana nehamawo dzake, vari gumi navaviri;" 
1Chronicles25:31 pemakumi maviri nechina kuna Romamutiezeru navanakomanawo vake nehama dzake, vari gumi navaviri." 
1Chronicles26:1 Zvikwata zvevachengetedzi vokumisuo mikuru zvakanga zvakamira zvakadai izvi: kune vokwaKora paiti Mesheremiya mwanakomana waKore wevana vokwaAsafu. 
1Chronicles26:2 Mesheremiya aiva navana vake vakomana ava vanoti: Zekariya dangwe racho achitevedzerwa naJedhieri wechitatu ari Zebhadhiya wechina ndiJatinieri Eramu ari wechishanu 
1Chronicles26:3 wechitanhatu ndiJehohanani wechinomwe ari Eriehoenai. 
1Chronicles26:4 Obhedhiedhomu aiva navanakomanawo vaiti: dangwe racho Shemaya tevere Jehozabhadhi wechitatu ndiJoa wechina ari Sakari wechishanu ndiNetaneri 
1Chronicles26:5 wechitanhatu ari Amieri Isakari ariye wechinomwe wechisere ndiPeuretai nokuti Mwari akavakomborera. 
1Chronicles26:6 Uyewo mwanakomana wake Shemaya akaberekawo vana vakomana vakava vatungamiriri vomudzimhuri dzokwavo nokuti vaiva mvumba chaidzo dzamagamba. 
1Chronicles26:7 Vanakomana vaShemaya ndiOtini naRefaeri naObhedhi naErizabhadhi vaiva nehama dzaiva noushasha pakuita zvinhu vana Erihu naSemakiya. 
1Chronicles26:8 Vose ivava ava vaiva vanakomana vokwaObhedhiedhomu navana vavo vakomana nehama dzavo vari shasha chaidzo dzinogona kuita basa radzo. Vose pamwechete vokwaObhedhiedhomu vaiva makumi matanhatu navaviri. 
1Chronicles26:9 Mesheremiya aiva navanakomana nehama dzake shasha chaidzo, vose vari gumi navasere." 
1Chronicles26:10 Hosa mumwe wavanakomana vokwaMerari aivawo navana vakomana vaiti: Shimuri, mukuru wacho, kunyange zvazvo akanga asiriye dangwe baba vake ndivo vakamuita mukuru." 
1Chronicles26:11 Aitevedzerwa naHirikiya wechitatu ndiTebheriya, wechina ari Zekariya. Vanakomana vaHosa nehama dzake vose vaiva gumi navatatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Zvikwata izvi zvavachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru zvichifambiranawo navakuru vakuru vazvo vaivawo namabasa sezvaingoitawo hama dzavo rokushanda mumba yaTenzi. 
1Chronicles26:13 Suo guru roga roga raipiwa vanhu varo vaigovaniswa nechin'ange zvimwechetezvo imba nemba mukuru nomudiki. 
1Chronicles26:14 Rokumabvazuva kwacho chin'ange chakaenda kuna Sheremiya. Vakaitirawo mwanakomana wake Zekariya muchinda ane ungwaru chin'ange chikaratidza kuti ndowekuchamhembe. 
1Chronicles26:15 Chin'ange chakaratidza kuti Obhedhiedhomu ndowekumaodzanyemba chikapa vanakomana vake basa rokudzimba dzaichengeterwa zvinhu. 
1Chronicles26:16 Kuna Shupimu naHosa chakaratidza kuti ndowekumadokero pasuo guru reShareketi pamugwagwa unokwira uya, vaiita mazoro kupachengetedza." 
1Chronicles26:17 Kumabvazuva kwainge kuna vaRevhi vatanhatu pazuva kuchamhembe, vana pazuva, kumaodzanyemba, vana pazuva vaviri vaviri padzimba dzokuchengetera zvinhu," 
1Chronicles26:18 panzvimbo yemo yainzi Paribhari kumadokero vari vana pamugwagwa, kwouya vaviri paParibhari." 
1Chronicles26:19 Izvozvi izvi ndizvo zvikwata zvavachengetedzi vokumisuo mikuru wokwaKora navanakomana vokwaMerari. 
1Chronicles26:20 PavaRevhi, Ahiya aiva nebasa rokuona nezvedzimba dzaichengeterwa upfumi hwemba yaMwari nomaichengeterwa zvipo zvainge zvateketerwa kuna Mwari." 
1Chronicles26:21 Kune vanakomana vokwaRadhani, vana vokwaGerishoni vakaberekwa naRadhani vaiva vatungamiriri vokumba yokwaRadhani wokwaGerishoni iyeyu ndewekwaJehieri." 
1Chronicles26:22 Vanakomana vaJehieri ndiZetamu muJoeri munun'una wake, vaiva nebasa rokuona nezvedzimba dzaichengeterwa upfumi hwemba yaTenzi." 
1Chronicles26:23 Kune vokwaAmuramu vaiti vokwaIzhari nevokwaHebhuroni nevokwaUzieri: 
1Chronicles26:24 Akasarudzwa kuva changamire mukuru wokuona nezvemaichengeterwa upfumi ndiShebhueri mwanakomana wokwaGerishomu mwana waMosesi. 
1Chronicles26:25 Hama dzake vokwaEriezeru vakanga vakamira vakadai izvi: mwanakomana waEriezeru ndiJeshaya waJeshaya ndiJoramu waJoramu ari Zikiri waZikiri ariwo Sheromoti. 
1Chronicles26:26 Sheromoti uyu nehama dzake vaiva vokuona nezvemaichengeterwa zvipo zvainge zvakateketererwa kuna Mwari. Zvakanga zvateketererwa kuna Mwari namambo Dhavhidhi navatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzokwavo navatungamiriri vezviuru nevemazana navatungamiriri vehondo. 
1Chronicles26:27 Vakatora zvimwe zvinhu pane zvakanga zvapambwa kuhondo vakazvipa sechipo chokuchengetedza nacho imba yaTenzi. 
1Chronicles26:28 Maivawo nezvakanga zvateketerwa kuna Mwari naSamueri muoni naSauro mwana waKishi naAbhuneru mwana waNeru, naJoabhu mwana wavaZeruya nezvose zvakanga zvateketerwa kuna Mwari zvaive mumaoko aSheromoti nehama dzake." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kune vokwaIzhari Kenaniya nevana vake vakomana akapiwa basa rokunze savanyori navatongi. 
1Chronicles26:30 Kune vokwaHebhuroni, Hashabhiya nehama dzake chiuru nemazana manomwe vari vanhu vanoushasha pakuita zvinhu ndivo vaiva vatariri veIsiraeri kumadokero kwaJorodhani mune zvose zvainangana nebasa raMwari nezvainangana nebasa ramambo." 
1Chronicles26:31 Pane vokwaHebhuroni, Jeriya ndiye waiva changamire wavo pazvizvarwa zvavo zvose mumba yekwavo. Mugore rechimakumi mana rokutonga kwaDhavhidhi kwakatsvangwa kukaonekwa mvumba dzemagamba okurwa hondo kuvanhu vokuJazeru kuGireadhi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Mambo Dhavhidhi akasarudza iyeyu nehama dzake vari zviuru zviviri zvine mazana manomwe zvavarume shasha chaidzo dzebasa vari vatungamiriri vokumhuri dzokwavo kuti vave vokutungamirira vekwaRubheni, nevekwaGadhi nevechimwe chikamu chedzinza rokwaManase mune zvose zvainangana nezvaMwari nezvainanganawo nenyaya dzokwaMambo." 
1Chronicles27:1 Aya ndiwo mazita avanhu veIsiraeri, vakuru vakuru vedzimhuri dzamadzibaba navatungamiriri vezviuru navamazana namakurukota aishandira mambo mune zvose achitsivana pabasa mwedzi woga woga. Chikwata choga choga chaiva nezviuru makumi maviri nezvina." 
1Chronicles27:2 Chikwata chokutanga, chaiva chomwedzi wokutanga chaitungamirirwa naJashobheamu mwanakomana waZabhudhieri. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:3 Aiva wechizvarwa chokwaFeresi, ari mukuru wavatungamiriri vehondo vose vemwedzi wokutanga wacho." 
1Chronicles27:4 Chikwata chechipiri, chaiva chomwedzi wechipiri chaitungamiririrwa naDhodhai muAhohi. Mikiroti ndiye aiva mukuru wechikwata chake. Chikwata ichi chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:5 Chikwata chechitatu, chaiva chomwedzi wechitatu chaitungamirirwa naBhenaya mwanakomana womupristi Jehoyadha ariye changamire. Chikwata chake chaivawo navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:6 Iyeyu ndiye Bhenaya uya aiva rimwe gamba rokurwa hondo mukati memakumi matatu aye ari mutungamiriri wamakumi matatu acho. Mwanakomana wake Amizabhadhi ndiye aiva mukuru wechikwata chake. 
1Chronicles27:7 Chikwata chechina, chaiva chomwedzi wechina chaitungamirirwa naAsaheri munun'una waJoabhu achitevedzerwa nomwanakomana wake Zebhadhiya. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:8 Chikwata chechishanu, chaiva chemwedzi wechishanu chaitungamirirwa naShamuhuti wokwaIzhari. Chikwata chakewo chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:9 Chikwata chechitanhatu, chaiva chomwedzi wechitanhatuwo; chaitungamirirwa naIra mwanakomana waIkeshi wokuTekoa. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:10 Chikwata chechinomwe, chaiva chomwedzi wechinomwe; chaitungamirirwa naHerezi wokuPeroni wokwaEfuremu. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:11 Chikwata chechisere, chaiva chomwedzi wechisere; chaitungamirirwa naSibhekai wokuHusha wokuZera. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:12 Chikwata chechipfumbamwe, chaiva chomwedzi wechipfumbamwe, chaitungamirirwa naAbhiezeru wokuAnatoti wokwaBhenjamini. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri." 
1Chronicles27:13 Chikwata chegumi, chaiva chomwedzi wegumi; chaitungamirirwa naMaharai wokuNetofati wokwaZera. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:14 Chikwata chegumi nechiposhi, chaiva chomwedzi wegumi nechiposhi, chaitungamirirwa naBhenaya wokuPiratoni. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:15 Chikwata chegumi nechipiri, chaiva chomwedzi wegumi nechipiri, chaitungamirirwa naHeridhai wokuNetofa wokwaOtinieri. Chikwata chake chaiva navanhu zviuru makumi maviri ane zvina." 
1Chronicles27:16 Vatungamiriri vemadzinza avaIsiraeri ndevava ava: wokwaRubheni ndiEriezeru mwanakomana waZikiri ari mukuru wevatungamiriri wokwaSimeoni ndiShafatiya mwanakomana waMaaka 
1Chronicles27:17 wokwaRevhi ndiHashabhiya mwanakomana waKemueri wokwaAroni, ndiZadhoki" 
1Chronicles27:18 wokwaJudha ndiErihu mukoma waDhavhidhi wokwaIsakari ndiOmuri mwanakomana waMikaeri 
1Chronicles27:19 wokwaZebhuruni ndiIshimaya mwanakomana waObhadiya wokwaNafutari ndiJeremoti mwanakomana waAzirieri 
1Chronicles27:20 wokwaEfuremu ndiHoshea mwanakomana waAzaziya wechimwe chikamu chokwaManase ndiJoeri mwanakomana waPedhaya 
1Chronicles27:21 wechimwewo chikamu chokwaManase kuGireadhi ndiIdho mwanakomana waZekariya wokwaBhenjamini ndiJaasieri mwanakomana waJerohamu. 
1Chronicles27:22 Ivava ndivo vakanga vari vatungamiriri vamadzinza evaIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles27:23 Pakuverenga vanhu, Dhavhidhi haana kuverenga vaiva vasingasvitse makumi maviri amakore pazera nokuti Tenzi akanga atsidzira Isiraeri kuti achavawanza senyenyedzi dzedenga." 
1Chronicles27:24 Joabhu mwanakomana wavaZeruya akatangisa kuverenga vanhu, asi haana kupedza. Kunyange zvakadaro Mwari akavirukira Isiraeri nehasha pamusana paizvozvi nezvo uwandi hwavo hauna kuzonyorwa muNhoroondo dzaMambo Dhavhidhi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Aiva wokuona nezvemaichengeterwa upfumi hwokwamambo ndiAzimavheti mwanakomana waAdhieri. Jonatani mwanakomana waUziya ndiye aiva wokuona nezvemaichengeterwa upfumi hwomumaruwa nomumaguta nomumisha nomunhare dzakavakirirwa. 
1Chronicles27:26 Aiona nezvavanhu vaiita basa romuminda rokurima ndiEziri mwanakomana waKerubhu. 
1Chronicles27:27 Aiona nezveminda yamagirepisi ndiShimei wokuRama. Aiona nezvezvinhu zvaikohwewa muminda yemagirepisi, zvamaichengeterwa magirepisi ewaini ndiZabhadhi wokwaShifumu." 
1Chronicles27:28 Aiva wokuonawo nezvemiti yemiorivhi neyemikuyu mumanhika kuShefera akanga ari Bhaarihanani wokuGedheru. Aiona nezvemaichengeterwa mafuta eorivhi ndiJoashi. 
1Chronicles27:29 Aiva wokuona nezvamatanga emombe aifudzirwa kuSharoni ndiShitirai wokuSharoni ikoko. Wokumatanga emombe dzaiva kumakan'a ndiShafati mwanakomana waAdhirai. 
1Chronicles27:30 Aionawo nezvenghamera ndiObhiri wokwaIshimaeri. Aiva wokuona nezvamadhongi ndiJehidheya wokuMeronoti. Wokuonawo nezvehwai nembudzi ndiJazizi wokuHagiri. 
1Chronicles27:31 Vose ivava ndivo vaiva vakachengeteswa upfumi hwokwamambo Dhavhidhi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Babamudiki vaDhavhidhi, Jonatani, vaiva jinda rake vakanga vari munhu anonzwisisa vari munyori. Ivo naJehieri mwanakomana waHakimoni aidzidzisa vanakomana vamambo." 
1Chronicles27:33 Ahitoferi aivawo jinda ramambo, uye Hushai wokuAriki akanga ari shamwari yamambo." 
1Chronicles27:34 Ahitoferi akazotsiviwa panzvimbo yake naJehoyadha mwanakomana waBhenaya uyewo naAbhiyatari. Joabhu ndiye aiva mutungamiriri mukuru wehondo yamambo. 
1Chronicles28:1 Dhavhidhi akaunganidza kuJerusaremu vakuru vakuru vose veIsiraeri vaiti: vakuru vakuru vamadzinza navakuru vakuru vezvikwata zvaishandira mambo navatungamiriri vezviuru navamazana nevokuchengeteswa upfumi nezvipfuwo zvamambo navanakomana vake pamwechete navakuru vakuru vomumuzinda nemagamba aye okurwa hondo navarume vose nyanzvi dzehondo. 
1Chronicles28:2 Mambo Dhavhidhi akasimuka akati, “Chimbondinzwaiwo hama dzangu nemi vanhu vangu, ndakanga ndine pfungwa mumwoyo mangu yokuti ndivakire bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano imba yokuti rizorore ivewo pokuisa tsoka dzake. Zvino ndakatogadzirira zvokuvaka." 
1Chronicles28:3 Asi Mwari akati kwandiri, ‘Haungandivakire imba nokuti iwe uri murwi wehondo uyezve wakadeura ropa.’" 
1Chronicles28:4 Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri akasarudza ini mumhuri yose yababa wangu kuti ndive mambo weIsiraeri narini wose nokuti akasarudza vokwaJudha kuti vave vokutungamirira. Mumba maJudha imomo akasarudza mhuri yokwababa vangu, muvanakomana vababa vangu akafadzwa neni akandigadza umambo hweIsiraeri yose." 
1Chronicles28:5 Pavanakomana vangu vose (nokuti Tenzi akandipawo vana vakomana vakawanda) akasarudza mwana wangu Soromoni kuti agare pachigaro choumambo hwaTenzi muIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles28:6 “Akati kwandiri, ‘Mwanakomana wako Soromoni ndiye achavaka imba yangu nenhandare dzangu nokuti ndamusarudza kuti ave mwana kwandiri ini ndive baba kwaari." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ndichaita kuti umambo hwake hudzike midzi narini narini, ndokunge chete iye aramba akachengeta zvirevo zvangu nemirao yangu sezvazviri nhasi uno.’" 
1Chronicles28:8 “Saka zvino pamberi peIsiraeri yose, gungano rose raTenzi, Mwari weduwo achizvinzwa, chengetai munyatsodzidza mirao yose yaTenzi, Mwari wenyu kuti nyika ino yakanaka ive yenyu mugoisiyirawo senhaka kuvana venyu vachauya mushure menyu nokusingaperi." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Zvino Soromoni mwanangu, ziva Mwari wababa vako umushandire nomwoyo wose uye nomwoyo unoda nokuti Tenzi anoonyatsoongorora mwoyo yose uye anoziva pane mwoyo womunhu nezviri mupfungwa. Ukanyatsotsvaka Mwari unomuwanawo, asi kana ukamufuratira iye achakurasa narini wose." 
1Chronicles28:10 Zvino wochichenjera pamusana pokuti Tenzi akakusarudza kuti umuvakire imba yenzvimbo inoera. Chishinga uite izvozvo.” 
1Chronicles28:11 Dhavhidhi ndokubva apa mwanakomana wake Soromoni mufananidzo wakanyorwa wamavakirwo ekamba kepamusuo peTemberi nedzimba dzayo nemokuchengetera upfumi nedzimba dzayo dzenhurikidzwa nedzimba dzayo dzomukati nemumba mokupfupirira zvitadzo. 
1Chronicles28:12 Akamutaurirawo zvose zvaiva mundangariro yake nezvezvivanze zvemba yaTenzi nedzimba dzose dzakaipoterera nomokuchengetera upfumi hwepamba yaMwari nemaichengeterwa zvipo zvainge zvapirwa kuna Mwari. 
1Chronicles28:13 Akamutaurirawo mamiriro ezvikwata zvavapristi nevaRevhi nebasa rose raifanira kuitwa mumba yaTenzi nezvemidziyo yose yokushandisa yaTenzi. 
1Chronicles28:14 Akamutaurirawo kurema kwendarama inodiwa pamidziyo yose yemo yendarama yebasa roga roga, uyewo kurema kwesirivha yemidziyo yesirivha yebasa roga roga;" 
1Chronicles28:15 nouremu hwezvigadzikiro zvemwenje zvendarama namarambi azvo kurema kwendarama yechigadzikiro chomwenje choga choga nemarambi acho uyewo uremu hwesirivha yechigadzikiro chomwenje nemarambi acho maererano nebasa rachaizoitiswa; 
1Chronicles28:16 kwouya kurema kwendarama yetebhuru yechingwa chokuisa pana Tenzi nesirivha yetebhuru dzesirivha; 
1Chronicles28:17 kwoti ndarama chaiyo yakanakisisa yokugadzirisa maforogo nembenge nemakomichi kwotiwo nendiro dzendarama imwe neimwe nouremu hwayo; 
1Chronicles28:18 kukati atari yorusenzi yokugadzirwa nendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa nokuremawo kwayo. Akamuzivisawo mamiriro aizoita chikochikari chendarama chemakerubhu aizenge akatambanudza mapapiro awo akafukidza bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano. 
1Chronicles28:19 Zvose izvi ndakazvinyora ndiri mumaoko aTenzi akandiita kuti ndinzwisise zvirongwa namamiriro aizoita basa raakaronga. 
1Chronicles28:20 Dhavhidhi akati kumwanakomana wake Soromoni, “Shinga utsunge mwoyo uzviite. Usatye kana kupazamiswa musoro nokuti Tenzi Mwari, iye Mwari wangu anewe. Haambokusiya uri woga kana kukurega uchikundikana kusvikira basa rose rinofanira kuitwa remba yaTenzi rapera." 
1Chronicles28:21 Zvikwata zvavapristi nevaRevhi zvokuita basa rose remba yaTenzi ndizvozvi izvi. Munhu wose ane chido nebasa, nyanzvi pabasa ripi neripi zvaro ndovaunavoka iwe. Vakuru vakuru navanhu vose chaunenge wangoda kuti vaite, vanoita.”" 
1Chronicles29:1 Mambo Dhavhidhi akati kugungano rose, “Mwanangu Soromoni uyu, nyakusarudzwa naMwari, achiri mudiki. Haasati agara nebasa asi basa iguru nokuti muzinda wacho hausi womunhu asi ndewaTenzi Mwari." 
1Chronicles29:2 Nokudaro ndakaunganidzira nepandinogonawo napo imba yaMwari ndarama yokugadzirisa zvinhu zvendarama nesirivhawo yokugadzirisa zvinhu zvesirivha nendarira yokugadzirisa zvinhu zvendarira nesimbi yokugadzirisa zvesimbi namapango okugadzirisa zvinhu zvamapango. Ndakaunganidzawo mirwi nemirwi yamatombo eonikisi neokuisa pazvinhu namatombo eandimoni nematombo amavara mavara nemhando nemhando dzamatombo anokosha nedombo romunyakwe. 
1Chronicles29:3 Chimwewo ndechokuti, kuwedzera pane izvozvi zvandakaunganidzira imba inoera yacho, ndine upfumiwo hwangu hwendarama nesirivha. Zvino pamusana pechido chandinacho nemba yaMwari wangu ndinohupa kuimba yaMwari wangu." 
1Chronicles29:4 Hunoti: ndarama inopfuura zana ramatani, ndarama yokuOfiri nesirivha chaiyo yakanakisa inokarosvika matani mazana maviri ana makumi mana yokudzurura nayo madziro emba iyoyo," 
1Chronicles29:5 neyokuzoshandiswa nemhizha dzokugadzira zvinhu; ndarama iri yokugadzirisa zvinhu zvendarama, sirivha iri yokugadzirisawo zvesirivha. Zvino ndiani anonyatsozvipira nomwoyo unoda kuita basa raTenzi nhasi uno?”" 
1Chronicles29:6 Vakuru vakuru vedzimhuri dzamadzibaba navakuru vakuru vamadzinza avo navakuru vakuru vezviuru nevemazana namakurukota aishandira mambo vakabvisa zvipo nomwoyo unoda. 
1Chronicles29:7 Vakabvisa zvokushandisa pabasa remba yaMwari zvinoti: ndarama inopfuura zana ramatani rina matani makumi manomwe, kwouya sirivha inodarika matani mazana matatu ane makumi mana, kwoti ndarira inokarosvika matani mazana matanhatu ana makumi maviri kwozoti simbi inopfuura matani zviuru zvitatu zvina mazana mana." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ani naani aiva nematombo anokosha akaaendesa maichengeterwa upfumi hwemba yaTenzi achichengetwa naJeieri wokwaGerishoni. 
1Chronicles29:9 Vanhu vakapembera kufara nokuti ivava ava vakanga vapa nomwoyo unoda. Kanawo mambo Dhavhidhiwo akafara zvikuru kwazvo. 
1Chronicles29:10 Naizvozvo Dhavhidhi akarumbidza Tenzi ari pamberi pegungano rose; Dhavhidhi akati, “Mwari ngaarumbidzwe, iyemi Tenzi, Mwari wavaIsiraeri baba wedu nokusingapere." 
1Chronicles29:11 Ukuru nesimba nembiri nokukunda noumambo ndezvenyu imi Tenzi nokuti zvose zviri mumatenga napasi pano ndezvenyu. Umambo ndohwenyu imi Tenzi uye ndimi munokudzwa somusoro wezvose. 
1Chronicles29:12 “Zvose zvazvo kupfuma nokukudzwa zvinobva kwamuri, ndimi munotonga zvose. Simba noukuru zviri mumaoko enyu, zviriwo mumaoko enyu kugadza paukuru nokupawo zvose simba." 
1Chronicles29:13 Zvino tinokutendai imi Mwari wedu tichirumbidza zita renyu rine mbiri. 
1Chronicles29:14 “Ko ndiri aniwo zvangu panguwo pano? Kana ivo vanhu vangu chiiwo zvavo, kubva tatokwanisawo kubvisa zvipo kudai nomwoyo unoda; nokuti zvinhu zvose zvinobva kwamuri. Tangotorawo pane zvenyu tikakupaiwo." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ndinodaro nokuti kwamuri imimi isu tinongovawo zvedu vatorwa vanhu vokutama-tama sezvaingoitawo madzibaba edu ose. Mazuva edu apasi pano anoita somumvuri usingarambe uripo. 
1Chronicles29:16 “Imi Mwari wedu Tenzi, zvose izvi zvakawanda kudai zvataunganidza zvokukuvakirai nazvo imba yokuisa zita renyu rinoera zvinobva mumaoko enyu uye zvose zvazvo ndezvenyu." 
1Chronicles29:17 “Mwari wangu ndinoziva kuti munoongorora mwoyo womunhu uye kuti munofarira kururama; nokururama ikoko mumwoyo mangu ndapa zvinhu zvose izvi nomwoyo unoda. Iye zvino ndaonawo vanhu venyu ava vari pano vachikupaiwo zvipo nomwoyo unoda vachifara. 
1Chronicles29:18 “Tenzi, Mwari waVaAbhurahamu naVaIsaki navaIsiraeri madzitateguru edu, chengetedzai waro zvinangwa zvakadai narini wose nepfungwa idzodzi muhana dzevanhu venyu muite kuti mwoyo wavo urambe uri kwamuri." 
1Chronicles29:19 Itaiwo kuti mwanakomana wangu Soromoni achengete mitemo yenyu nezvirevo zvenyu nemirao yenyu nomwoyo wose azviite zvose uyewo kuti avake muzinda wandakaunganidzira zvinhu zvokuvakisa.” 
1Chronicles29:20 Dhavhidhi akazoti kugungano rose, “Rumbidzai Tenzi, Mwari wenyu!” Saizvozvowo gungano rose rakarumbidza Tenzi, Mwari wemadzibaba avo vakati kota kota pasi vachigwadamira Tenzi vakaremekedzawo mambo." 
1Chronicles29:21 Vakapira zvibayiro kuna Tenzi. Pazuva ramangwana racho vakapira zvibayiro zvokupisa kuna Tenzi zvehandira chiuru, nechiuru chehondohwe nechiuruwo chehwayana nemipiro yazvo yokuteura kwouya zvibayiro zvizhinji zveIsiraeri yose." 
1Chronicles29:22 Vakadya vakanwa pana Tenzi musi iwoyo vachifara zvikuru kwazvo. Vakadzokerera kugadza umambo Soromoni mwanakomna waDhavhidhi vakamuzodza mutungamiriri wokwaTenzi, Zadhoki ari iye mupristi wacho." 
1Chronicles29:23 Saizvozvo Soromoni akagara pachigaro choumambo chaTenzi samambo panzvimbo yababa vake Dhavhidhi akabudirira, Isiraeri yose ikamuteerera." 
1Chronicles29:24 Vatungamiriri vose nemagamba ose evarume vokurwa hondo nevanakomanawo vose vamambo Dhavhidhi vakabvuma kutongwa namambo Soromoni. 
1Chronicles29:25 Tenzi akamupa mukurumbira chaiwo muvaIsiraeri nechiremera choumambo chisina kumbenge chiine mumwe mambo akamutangira muIsiraeri. 
1Chronicles29:26 Saizvozvo Dhavhidhi mwanakomana waJese akatonga Isiraeri yose. 
1Chronicles29:27 Akatonga kwamakore makumi manomwe ari kuHebhuroni. Akazotonga kwamakumi matatu amakore ana makore matatu ari Jerusaremu. 
1Chronicles29:28 Akanyatsochembera akakwegura ndokuzofawo zvake aine upfumi nomukurumbira, mwanakomana wake Soromoni akatonga panzvimbo yake." 
1Chronicles29:29 Inga nyaya dzezvamambo Dhavhidhi kubvira pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzesera, dzakanyorwa wani muNhoroondo dzoMuoni vaSamueri nomuNhoroondo dzaMuporofita Natani nomuNhoroondo dzoMuoni Gadhi" 
1Chronicles29:30 dzichirondedzera zvose zvokutonga kwake nougamba hwake nezvakaitika kwaari nokuIsiraeri nokuumambo hwose hwenyika dzeko. 
2Chronicles1:1 Soromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi akanyatsodzika midzi muumambo hwake, izvozvo Tenzi, Mwari wake aiva naye achimuita kuti ave namasimba makuru kwazvo." 
2Chronicles1:2 Soromoni akataurira Isiraeri yose navatungamiriri vezviuru navamazana navatongi navatungamiriri vose muIsiraeri yose navakuru vamadzinza avo. 
2Chronicles1:3 Soromoni negungano rose vakaenda kunzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira yaiva kuGibheoni nokuti ndiko kwaiva netendhe raMwari rokusanganira riya rakagadzirwa kurenje naMosesi muranda waMwari. 
2Chronicles1:4 (Asi chaivapo ndechokuti Dhavhidhi akanga atotora bhokisi raMwari rechitenderano kuKiriatijearimu akaenda naro kunzvimbo yaakanga arigadzirira nokuti akanga arimisira tendhe muJerusaremu.) 
2Chronicles1:5 Chimwewo ndechokuti, atari iya yendarira yakagadzirwa naBhezarieri mwanakomana waUri, muzukuru waHuri yaiva ikoko kumusuo kwetendhe rinoera raTenzi. Soromoni negungano iri vakandonzwa kuti Mwari anoti kudii." 
2Chronicles1:6 Soromoni akakwirako kwaiva neatari yendarira pana Tenzi yaiva mutendhe rokusanganira akapira chiuru chemipiro yokupisa pairi. 
2Chronicles1:7 Usiku ihwohwo Mwari akazviratidza kuna Soromoni akati kwaari, “Kumbira chaungade kuti ndikupe.”" 
2Chronicles1:8 Soromoni akapindura Mwari achiti, “Makaitira baba vangu Dhavhidhi mwoyochena mukuru kwazvo mukandiitawo kuti ndive mambo panzvimbo yavo." 
2Chronicles1:9 Nhai Tenzi Mwari, dai mukachizadzisa waro zvamakatsidzira baba wangu Dhavhidhi sezvo makandiita mambo werudzi rwavanhu vakawanda seguruva renyika kudai." 
2Chronicles1:10 Zvino ndipeiwo ungwaru noruzivo kuti ndigone kutungamirira vanhu ava nokuti ndiani angakwanise kutonga vanhu venyu ava vakawanda kudai.” 
2Chronicles1:11 Mwari akati kuna Soromoni, “Pamusana pokuti izvi ndozvawada nemwoyo wako ukarega kukumbira kuti uve nezvinhu kana upfumi kana ukuru kana kuti vanokuvenga vafe kunyange kuzvikumbirira upenyu hurefu, asi wazvikumbirira ungwaru noruzivo kuti utonge vanhu vangu vandakati iwe uve mambo wavo," 
2Chronicles1:12 naizvozvo ungwaru noruzivo watozvipiwa. Ndichakupawo upfumi nezvinhu zvakowo noukuru zvisina ati akambova nazvo pamadzimambo akakutangira kana achauya mushure mako achava nezvakadaro.” 
2Chronicles1:13 Soromoni akabva kunzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira kuya kuGibheoni kwaiva netendhe rokusanganira akadzokera kuJerusaremu akatonga zvake Isiraeri.
