2Chronicles1:14 Soromoni akaunganidza pamwechete ngoro dzehondo navachairi vadzo. Akanga ane chiuru chimwechete chengoro dzehondo chine mazana mana navachairi vadzo zviuru gumi nezviviri vaakaisa kuti vagare mumaguta engoro dzehondo, iye mambo ari muJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles1:15 Mambo akapa kuti muJerusaremu imomo, sirivha iyi nendarama zvinge matombo zvawo. Musidhari uyu wakanga wava kungewo mukuyu wokunyika yokumanhika, kuShefera kuwanda." 
2Chronicles1:16 Mabhiza okwaSoromoni aiatenga kuIjipiti nokuKue. Vanhu vokwamambo vaiita mhindu dzokutengesa ndovaiatengera kuKue. 
2Chronicles1:17 Kuti munhu atenge ngoro yehondo kuIjipiti paidiwa mazana matanhatu emari yesirivha yemashekeri, bhizawo richiita zana namakumi mashanu emari yesirivha yemashekeri. Vanhu ivavo vemhindu vaye vaiitawo zvimwechetezvo ndovaitozondotengeserawo ose madzimambo evaHiti namadzimambo eSiria zvinhu izvozvo." 
2Chronicles2:1 Soromoni akafunga kuvaka imba yokuisa zita raTenzi nokuzvivakirawo muzinda wake. 
2Chronicles2:2 Soromoni akapa basa zviuru makumi manomwe zvavarume kuti vave vokutakura zvinhu, zviuru makumi masere vave vokukwakwanura matombo mumakomo, nezviuru zvitatu zvina mazana matanhatu vokuona kuti basa riri kuitwa here nokushandisa vanhu basa." 
2Chronicles2:3 Soromoni akatumira shoko kuna Huramu mambo wokuTire rokuti, “Sezvamakaita kuna baba wangu Dhavhidhi kuvatumira misidhari yokuvakisa imba yokuti vagare," 
2Chronicles2:4 zvino iniwo ndava kuvaka imba yokuisa zita raTenzi, Mwari wangu yandichateketera kwaari mokupisira paari rusenzi rwetwunonhuwirira, mokugara makaiswa chingwa chepana Mwari, mokupirirawo mipiro yokupisa yamangwanani neyamanheru pamaSabata napakugara kwomwedzi napamazuva makuru aTenzi, Mwari wedu akatemerwa Isiraeri narini wose." 
2Chronicles2:5 Imba yacho yandava kuzovaka, ihuru nokuti Mwari wedu mukuru pana vamwari vose." 
2Chronicles2:6 Asi ndianiwo chaizvo angakwanise kumuvakira imba, ipo panototi matenga chaiwo kunyange denga rokumatenga-tenga chairo harikwane kuti agaremo. Panguwo pano, ndiri aniwo zvangu kuti ndimuvakire imba, asi kuti kuvaka pokungomupisira rusenzi chete here?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Nditumireiwo mhizha yezvendarama nezvesirivha nezvendarira nezvesimbi nezvamachira eruvara rwehute namatsvuku neeruvara rwedenga. Anounyanzvi hwokunyora pazvinhu achiita zvokutemerapo, kuti azova pamwechete navanhu vanoziva basa vaneni kwaJudha kuno nomuJerusaremu vakatsvakwa nababa vangu Dhavhidhi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Munditumireiwo musidhari nomusaipurasi nomuarugamu okuRebhanoni nokuti ndinoziva kuti vashandi venyu vanoziva zvokutema mapango kuRebhanoni. Vashandi venyu vachava pamwechete navashandi vangu 
2Chronicles2:9 kuti vandigadzirire mapango akawanda nokuti imba yandichavaka ihuru uye yakanaka. 
2Chronicles2:10 Vashandi venyu vokutema miti ndichavapa zviuru zviviri zvematani ekoroni nezviuru mazana mana emarita ewaini namafuta eorivhi anoita zviuru mazana mana zvamarita.” 
2Chronicles2:11 Huramu mambo wokuTire akapindura Soromoni netsamba yaiti, “Pamusana pokuti Tenzi anoda vanhu vake akakuitai mambo wavo.”" 
2Chronicles2:12 Huramu akatiwo, “Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri ngaarumbidzwe. Musiki wedenga napasi akapa Dhavhidhi mwanakomna ane ungwaru anonyatsooona zvinhu nomazvo, anonzwisisa achavakira imba Tenzi uye achazvivakirawo muzinda." 
2Chronicles2:13 “Zvino ndatumira mhizha inonzwisisa inonzi Huramuabhi," 
2Chronicles2:14 mwanakomana womumwe mudzimai wokwaDhani, baba vake vari munhu wokuTire. Inyanzvi yezvendarama nezvesirivha nezvendarira nesimbi namabwe nezvamapango nezvamachira eruvara rwehute neeruvara rwedenga namatsvuku nezverineni yakanakisisa, nemhando nemhando dzokunyorawo kwokutemera pazvinhu nokufanonyora mifananidzo yezvose zvose zvingade kuzoitwa pamwechete navanhu vokwenyu vanoziva basa, nyanzvi dzebasa dzachangamire wangu Dhavhidhi baba venyu." 
2Chronicles2:15 Saka koroni nebhari namafuta eorivhi newaini zvamakataura mambo changamire titumirei zvenyu isu varanda venyu. 
2Chronicles2:16 Isu tinokutemeraiwo mapango ose amunenge muchida kuRebhanoni toauyisa kwamuri tichiayeredzera kuJopa nomugungwa akasungwa masvinga masvinga kuitira kuti muzoatorawo imi mugokwira nawo kuJerusaremu.” 
2Chronicles2:17 Soromoni akazovenga vatorwa vose vaiva munyika yeIsiraeri mushure mokuverenga vanhu kwakanga kwamboitwa nababa vake Dhavhidhi. Kwakawanikwa kuti kwaiva navanhu vanosvika zviuru zana namakumi mashanu nezvitatu zvine mazana matanhatu avanhu. 
2Chronicles2:18 Vamwe vavo vanokwana zviuru makumi manomwe akavapa basa rokutakura zvinhu, zviuru makumi masere rokukwakwanura matombo mumakomo nezviuru zvitatu zvina mazana matanhatu rokuwona kuti basa riri kuitwa here nokushandisa vanhu basa." 
2Chronicles3:1 Soromoni akatangisa kuvaka imba yaTenzi muJerusaremu paGomo reMoriya, paya pakanga pazviratidza Tenzi kuna Dhavhidhi baba wake panzvimbo yakanga yasarudzwa naDhavhidhi paburiro raOrinani wechiJebhusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Akatangisa kuvaka mumwedzi wechipiri mugore rake rokutonga rechina. 
2Chronicles3:3 Uyu ndiwo mwero waSoromoni wamamiriro ougaro hwose hwemba yaMwari. Urefu hwayo hwaiita makumi maviri emamita, upamhi hwayo huri mamita mapfumbamwe." 
2Chronicles3:4 Kamba kepamusuo, usati wapinda mukati memba yacho, kaiva nourefu hwaiita mamita mapfumbamwe sezvaiva zvakangoitawo upamhi hwemba yacho. Kukwira kwayo mudenga yakareba mamita makumi mashanu nemana. Mukati mako, kumadziro, akanamirira ndarama." 
2Chronicles3:5 Mumba macho kumadziro akanyatsoiti namapuranga omusaipurasi chechetere, akaanamirira ndarama chaiyo yakanakisisa akaita pazviri mifananidzo yemiti yomurara neyemirongorongo yecheni." 
2Chronicles3:6 Akashongedza imba yacho nematombo anokosha okunamatidza pazvinhu. Ndarama yacho yaiva ndarama yeParivhaimu. 
2Chronicles3:7 Nokudaro akanamirira ndarama kumadziro mumba imomo namapango ayo edenga okutandarika nezviguvare zvayo namadziro acho namagoni ayo. Akavezera pamadziro ipapo mifananidzo yezvisikwa zvinonzi makerubhu. 
2Chronicles3:8 Akavakawo nzvimbo inoeresesa imomo. Urefu hwayo hwakanga hwakaenzana noupamhi hwemba yacho huchiita mamita mapfumbamwe, upamhiwo huri mamita mapfumbamwe. Kumadziro akainamirirawo ndarama yakanakisisa yairema matani anopfuura makumi maviri." 
2Chronicles3:9 Uremu hwezvipikiri zvendarama hwaiita magiramu mazana mashanu ane makumi manomwe. Akanamirawo ndarama mudzimba dzenhurikidzwa. 
2Chronicles3:10 Munzvimbo inoeresesa akagadzira mifananidzo miviri yemakerubhu okuveza omuti akaanamira nendarama. 
2Chronicles3:11 Mapapiro amakerubhu pamwechete aiita mamita mapfumbamwe. Bapiro rimwechete rekerubhu raiita mamita maviri nemasendimita makumi maviri, rainoguma kumadziro kwemba iyoyo. Rimwe bapiro racho raiitawo mamita maviri nemasendimita makumi maviri raigumana nebapiro rerimwe kerubhu." 
2Chronicles3:12 Bapirowo rerimwe kerubhu raiitawo mamita maviri nemasendimita makumi maviri rakanga richiguma kumadziro kwemba iyoyo. Bapiro rimwe riri mamita maviri namasendimita makumi maviri raigumanawo mapapiro nekerubhi rokutanga riye. 
2Chronicles3:13 Mapapiro emakerubhu iwayo akanga akatambanudzwamo achiita mamita mapfumbamwe. Makerubhu aya akanga akamira nemakumbo akaringira kumba kwacho. 
2Chronicles3:14 Akagadzira jira rechidzikatiro namachira eruvara rwedenga neruvara rwehute nematsvuku neerineni akanakisisa akarukirira makerubhu pachiri. 
2Chronicles3:15 Pamusuo pemba yacho, akaita misimboti miviri yaisvika mamita gumi namashanu ane masendimita makumi mashanu. Mumwe nomumwe wayo uine chepamusoro pawo chaiita mamita maviri ane masendimita makumi maviri kureba." 
2Chronicles3:16 Akaita cheni dzinenge dziye dzokushonga muhuro akadziisa pamisoro yemisimboti. Akagadzirawo zvinenge michero yemapomegiraneti zana akazviisa pacheni idzodzo. 
2Chronicles3:17 Akamisa misimboti iyi pamusuo weTemberi achiti mumwe kumaodzanyemba, mumwe kuchamhembe. Waiva kumaodzanyemba akautumidza zita rokuti Jakini, wokuchamhembe akautumidza zita rokuti Bhoazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Soromoni akaitawo atari yendarira yaiva mamita mapfumbamwe kureba, upamhi hwayo huchiitawo mamita mapfumbamwe, kukwira kwayo mudenga yakareba mamita mana ana masendimita makumi mashanu." 
2Chronicles4:2 Akazogadzira zibhavhu ziguru-guru kwazvo rakanga rino utare hwakaita zvokunyungurutswa. Udzame hwaro hwaiita mamita maviri namasendimita makumi maviri, upamhi hwaro huchiita mamita mana namasendimita makumi mana. Kuritenderedza rose raiita mamita gumi namatatu namasendimita makumi maviri." 
2Chronicles4:3 Pasi paro nechokunzekunze pakanga pakaitwa zvinenge mapudzi, zviri makumi maviri pamita yoga yoga. Zvainge mapudzi izvi, zvakanga zvakaita zvokuumbirwa pazibhavhu iri pamwechete naro parakagadzirwa zviri mumitsara miviri." 
2Chronicles4:4 Rakanga rakagara pahandira gumi nembiri, nhatu dzacho dzakaringira kuchamhembe, dzimwe nhatu dzakaringa kumadokero, dzimwewo dzacho nhatu dzakaringira kumaodzanyemba, dzimwewo nhatu dzakaringa kumabvazuva, shure kwadzo dzose kwakanga kuri nechomukati, zibhavhu iri riri pamusoro padzo." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ukobvu hwaro hwakanga hwakaita sechanza, mupendero waro wakanga wakaita somupendero wekapu, seruva ramahapa. Zibhavhu iri raipinda madhiramu aikarosvika mazana matatu namakumi mashanu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Akagadzirawo mabhavhu gumi okushambira, akandoisa mashanu acho kumaodzanyemba, mamwe acho mashanu kuchamhembe. Maari iwaya ndimo mavaisukira zvainge zvashandiswa pamupiro wokupisa, muzibhavhu ziguru guru ndimo maishambira vapristi." 
2Chronicles4:7 Akagadzirawo gumi rezvigadzikiro zvemwenje zvendarama sokuudzwa kwaakaitwa, akazviisa muTemberi achiti zvishanu kumaodzanyemba, zvishanu kuchamhembe." 
2Chronicles4:8 Akagadzirawo matebhuru gumi akaaisa muTemberi achiti mashanu kumaodzanyemba mamwe mashanu kuchamhembe. Akagadzira mbhenge dzendarama zana. 
2Chronicles4:9 Akagadzira nhandare yavapristi nenhandarewo huru namagonhi munhandaremo akanamirira magonhi acho ndarira. 
2Chronicles4:10 Akaisawo zibhavhu ziguruguru riya kumaodzanyemba kwakadziva kumabvazuva kwemba iyoyo. 
2Chronicles4:11 Huramu akagadzirawo mapoto namafoshoro nembhenge. Saizvozvo Huramu akapedza basa raaiitira mambo Soromoni repamba yaMwari. 
2Chronicles4:12 Akagadzira misimboti miviri nezvinhu zvaiva zvakafutumara zvaiva zvepamisoro yemisimboti iyi kwouya mambure maviri okushongedza pazvinhu zvaiva pamisoro yemisimboti; 
2Chronicles4:13 uye zvainge michero yamapomegiraneti mazana mana, zvokuisa pamambure iwayo ari maviri, mumbure woga woga uine mitsara miviri yezvinenge mapomegiraneti zvokushongedza pazvinhu zviya zviviri zvakafutumara zvapamisoro yemisimboti." 
2Chronicles4:14 Akagadzirawo ngoro namabhavhu, pangoro idzodzo," 
2Chronicles4:15 kwouya zibhavhu ziguru riya nehandira gumi dzaiva pasi paro. 
2Chronicles4:16 Mapoto namafoshoro namaforogo nemidziyo yose iyi yomumba yaTenzi yakagadzirirwa mambo Soromoni naHuramabhi, yakanga iri yendarira yakanyatsokwenenzverwa." 
2Chronicles4:17 Mambo akaforomera izvozvi mubani romuna Jorodhani panzvimbo yomunyakwe iri pakati peSukoti neZeredha. 
2Chronicles4:18 Soromoni akagadzira mirwi nemirwi yezvinhu izvozvo zvokuti hapana akazokwanisa kuwana kuti ndarira yacho yairema zvakadii. 
2Chronicles4:19 Soromoni akagadzira zvinhu zvose zvaiva mumba yaMwari zvaiti: atari yendarama netebhuru dzechingwa chokuisa pana Mwari," 
2Chronicles4:20 kwouya zvigadzikiro zvemwenje namarambi azvo endarama chaiyo yakanakisisa okuvheneka pamberi penzvimbo inoera yomukatikati macho sezvakanga zvarehwa," 
2Chronicles4:21 kwouyawo maruva namarambi nembato dzendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa," 
2Chronicles4:22 kwozoti zvigero nembhenge namabisiro orusenzi namakoni emba yacho, pachiti makonhi omukati okupinda munzvimbo inoeresesa namagonhi emba yacho chaiyo yeTemberi, zvaiva zvendarama." 
2Chronicles5:1 Sokudaro basa rose rakaitwa naSoromoni remba yaTenzi rakapera. Soromoniwo akauya nezvinhu zvababa wake Dhavhidhi zvakanga zvapirwa kuna Mwari zvaiti: sirivha nendarama nemidziyo yose akazvirongedza maichengeterwa upfumi hwemba yaMwari. 
2Chronicles5:2 Soromoni akazokokorodza vakuru vakuru veIsiraeri navakuru vakuru vose vamadzinza avo, vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba avanhu vechiIsiraeri kuJerusaremu kuti vaende kundotora bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano kuGuta raDhavhidhi, guta reZioni." 
2Chronicles5:3 Saizvozvo varume vose veIsiraeri vakaungana kuna mambo pamazuva makuru muri mumwedzi wechinomwe. 
2Chronicles5:4 Vakuru vakuru vose veIsiraeri pavakasvika, vaRevhi vakandotakura bhokisi rechitenderano." 
2Chronicles5:5 Vakaunza bhokisi rechitenderano netendhe rokusanganira nemidziyo yose inoera yaiva mutendhe racho. Vapristi nevaRevhi ndovakauya nazvo. 
2Chronicles5:6 Mambo Soromoni negungano rose reIsiraeri rakanga raungana kwaari vaiva pamberi pebhokisi rechitenderano ipapo vachipira hwai nemombe zhinji dzisingaverengeki kana kugona kuverengetwa. 
2Chronicles5:7 Vapristi vakazondoisa bhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano panzvimbo paro, munzvimbo inoera mukamba komukatikati kemba iyoyi, munzvimbo inoeresesa munyasi memapapiro amakerubhu aye." 
2Chronicles5:8 Chaivepo ndechokuti, makerubhu acho akanga akatambanudzira mapapiro pamusoro penzvimbo yebhokisi rechitenderano zvokuti makerubhu iwayo aiva akafugidza bhokisi rechitenderano iri namapango aro okuritakurisa." 
2Chronicles5:9 Mapango iwayo akanga akareba zvokuti kwokupedzesera kwawo kwaitoonekwawo kunyange neari munzvimbo inoera, tisati tapinda munzvimbo inoera, kamba komukatikati kaye. Asi akanga asingaoneke nomunhu ari kunze, achiriko nanhasi uno." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mubhokisi rechitenderano makanga musina chimwe chinhu kunze kwamafendefa maviri aye akaiswamo naMosesi kuHorebhu, kwakaita Tenzi chitenderano navanhu veIsiraeri pavakabuda muIjipiti." 
2Chronicles5:11 Pakazobuda vapristi munzvimbo inoera, vapristi vose ivava vaivapo vakatenge vambozvichenura pasina kuti uyu ndowebato ripi," 
2Chronicles5:12 vaimbi vose vekwaRevhi vanaAsafu naHemani naJedhutuni navanakomana vavo nehama dzavo vakanga vakapfeka hanzu dzerineni dzakanakisisa kwazvo vaina makwakwakwa outare namadimbwa nezvipendami vakamira kumabvazuva kweatari pamwechete navapristi zana namakumi maviri vokuridza mabhosvo; 
2Chronicles5:13 basa revokuridza mabhosvo ivava navaimbi ava riri rokuburitsa mumhanzi pamwechete vachirumbidza Tenzi vachimutenda. Rwiyo ndokubva rwanzi povo kukagoridzwa mabhosvo namakwakwakwa acho nezvimwewo zvokuridzisa mumhanzi vachirumbidza Tenzi vachiti, “Nokuti wakanaka uye mwoyochena wake haupere,” imba iyoyo, imba yaTenzi yakazadzwa negore." 
2Chronicles5:14 Zvokuti vapristi vakatadza kuita basa ravo pamusana pegore iroro nokuti kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakanga kwazadza imba yaMwari. 
2Chronicles6:1 Soromoni akati, “Tenzi, akazvisarudzira zvake kugara makati kwirindindi." 
2Chronicles6:2 Iniwo ndakanyatsokuvakirai imba ino chaiyo ino mukurumbira musha wokuti mugare zvenyu imi nokusingaperi.” 
2Chronicles6:3 Mambo akazotendeuka akabva akomborera gungano rose reIsiraeri, iro gungano reIsiraeri rose rakati ji kumira." 
2Chronicles6:4 Akati, “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, akadai kuzadzikisa zvaakatsidzira baba vangu Dhavhidhi achiti," 
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kubvira pandakaburitsa vanhu vangu munyika yeIjipiti, handina kusarudza guta mumadzinza ose eIsiraeri mokuti ndivakire imba inodaidzwa nezita rangu uye handina munhu wandakasarudza kuti ave mutongi wavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles6:6 Asi kuti ndakasarudza Jerusaremu kuti zita rangu riiswepo uye ndikasarudza Dhavhidhi kuti atonge vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.’ 
2Chronicles6:7 Baba vangu Dhavhidhi vakanga ainazvo mumwoyo zvokuvaka imba inodaidzwa nezita raTenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles6:8 Asi Tenzi akati kuna baba vangu Dhavhidhi, ‘Zvokuti mumwoyo mako muve nepfungwa yokundivakira imba yokuisa zita rangu changa chiri chinhu chakanaka." 
2Chronicles6:9 Chiripo chete ndechokuti, iwe hausiriwe wokundivakira imba yacho asi mwana wako mukomana wauchabereka.’" 
2Chronicles6:10 Zvino Tenzi akazadzikisa chitsidzo chaakatsidza, kukazomuka ini panzvimbo yababa vangu Dhavhidhi, hezvi ndigere pachigaro choumambo hwokwaIsiraeri sokutsidza kwaakaita Tenzi ndikazovakawo imba iyi, yokuisa zita raTenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ndimo mandati mugare bhokisi rechitenderano riine chitenderano chaTenzi chaakaita navanhu veIsiraeri.” 
2Chronicles6:12 Soromoni akamira pamberi peatari yaTenzi gungano rose reIsiraeri riripo, akasimudza maoko ake." 
2Chronicles6:13 Soromoni akanga agadzira nendarira chimwe chokumira pachiri chaiita mamita maviri namasendimita makumi maviri kureba, upamhi hwacho huchiitawo mamita maviri namasendimita makumi maviri, kukwira kwacho mudenga chichiita mita rimwechete namasendimita makumi matatu akachiisa mukati menhandare, akamira pamusoro pacho. Akapfugama namabvi pamberi pegungano rose reIsiraeri akasimudzira maoko ake mudenga akanamata achiti," 
2Chronicles6:14 “Imi Tenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri, hakuna Mwari akaita semi, kumusoro kudenga kana panyika pasi pano anochengeta chitenderano achiitira mwoyochena varanda vake vanofamba vakatendeseka kwaari nomwoyo wose," 
2Chronicles6:15 semi makachengeta zvamakataurira muranda wenyu baba vangu Dhavhidhi. Makataura imi nomuromo wenyu, noruoko rwenyu mukazvizadzikisa sezvazviri nhasi uno." 
2Chronicles6:16 Zvino Tenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri chengetedzai waro zvamakatsidzira zvenyu baba vangu Dhavhidhi, zvamakavataurira muchiti, hazvichafa zvakamboitika kuti ini ndishaye munhu womumba mako wokuzogara pachigaro choumambo hwokwaIsiraeri. Ndokungewo vana vako vachenjerera mafambiro avo vachitevedza mutemo wangu sokufamba mberi kwangu kwawakaitawo iwe." 
2Chronicles6:17 Saka zvino imi Tenzi, Mwari wevaIsiraeri shoko renyu ramakatsidzira muranda wenyu Dhavhidhi ngarichiitika." 
2Chronicles6:18 Chaizvo chaizvo, Mwari angaite panyika kuti pave musha wake here! Inga wani matenga kana iro denga rokumatengatenga haakwane kuti ave musha wake. Ko, kutozotiwo imba iyi yakavakwawo neniwo zvangu!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Kunyange zvazvo zvakadaro Tenzi, Mwari wangu rerekerai nzeve dzenyu kumunamato wangu ini muranda wenyu nokuchichemo changu, munzwewo chichemo nomunamato wandiri kuita kwamuri" 
2Chronicles6:20 kuti ziso renyu rirambe riri pamba iyoyi siku nesikati panzvimbo iyi yamakavimbisa kuzoisa zita renyu, kuitira kuti mugozonzwawo munamato wangu ini muranda wenyu wandava kuitira nzvimbo ino." 
2Chronicles6:21 Inzwaiwo chichemo ichi changu ini muranda wenyu nechevanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, pavanonamata vakaringira kunzvimbo ino. Vanzwei muri kudenga kwamunogara, pamunenge manzwa muvaregererewo." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Kana munhu akatadzira mumwe wake, akange anzi apike mhiko, akauya akasvikopika mhiko yake pamberi peatari yenyu mumba muno," 
2Chronicles6:23 pakadaro imi teererai muri kudenga uku muwane chamungaite nazvo, muteme zvinowirirana nemhosva yacho, Ane mhosva muti apfukirwe nemhosva yake, anengewo asina mhosva mudure pachena kuti haana mhosva maererano nokururamawo kwake." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Kana vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri vakakundwa navavengi pamusana pokuti vakakutadzirai, vakange vadzokerazve kwamuri, vokuyeukai zvino nezita, vakanamata vachiisa zvichemo zvavo kwamuri mumba muno," 
2Chronicles6:25 vanzwei kudenga ikoko muregererewo vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri chitadzo ichocho, muvadzorere kunyika yamakapa madzitateguru avo." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Kana denga richinge rapfigwa, kurega kunaya mvura pamusana pokuti vakakutadzirai, vakanamata vakazvirereka vakaringa kuno uku vakakuyeukai nezita, vakakanda pasi chitadzo chavo imi manga mambovaonesa nhamo" 
2Chronicles6:27 vanzwei kudenga ikoko, muregererewo muranda wenyu navanhu venyu vaIsiraeri chitadzo chavo muvadzidzise makwara akanaka okuti vafambe nawo mupe mvura nyika yenyu yamakapa vanhu venyu senhaka yavo." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Kana munyika ino mukaita nzara kana kuti mukaita denda kana zvikukuve kana chiundudzi, kanawo kukauya mhashu kana rukonye kana kuti vavengi vavo vakavatambudza munyika muno, muguta ravo ripi zvaro, kunyange nyatwa ipi zvayo kana kukava nechirwere chipi nechipi zvacho;" 
2Chronicles6:29 vanhu venyu vose vaIsiraeri kana kuti ani naani zvake anenge aine nhuna dzaari kunzwa mumwoyo wake kana chimwe chinomutambudza akazotambanudza maoko akaringa kumba ino achiita munamato upi zvawo kana kuisa chichemo chipi nechipi zvacho 
2Chronicles6:30 munzwei kudenga ikoko kunzvimbo yenyu kwamunogara, mumuregererewo sezvo muchiziva zviri mumwoyo make mubatsirei zvichienderanawo namaitiro ake (nokuti imi moga ndimi munoziva zviri mumwoyo womunhu)" 
2Chronicles6:31 kuitira kuti vagare vachikutyai vachitevedza makwara enyu misi yose yavachagara munyika yamakapa madzitateguru avo. 
2Chronicles6:32 “Pamusana pezita renyu guru noukuru hwenyu nezvesimba renyu guru, muitewo zvimwechetezvo nomutorwa wechirudzi kuvanhu venyu vaIsiraeri, mubvakure, akauya kuzonamata akaringa kumba ino," 
2Chronicles6:33 imi munzweiwo kudenga ikoko, kunzvimbo yenyu kwamunogara, muitire mutorwa iyeyo zvose zvaanenge akukumbirai, kuitira kuti marudzi ose avanhu vepanyika pano vagoziva zita renyu, vakutyei sezvinoita vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri uyewo vagoziva kuti imba ino yandakavaka inodaidzwa nezita renyu." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Kana vanhu venyu vakaenda kundorwisa vavengi vavo kwamunenge mati vaende, vakanamata kwamuri vakaringawo kuguta rino ramakasarudza uye kumba ino yandakavakira zita renyu;" 
2Chronicles6:35 vanzwei munamato wavo nechichemo chavo kudenga ikoko, muvaitire zvavanenge vachichemedzeka nazvo." 
2Chronicles6:36 “Kana vakaita chitadzo kwamuri sezvo kusina munhu asingapari chitadzo, imi mukavashatirirwa mukavaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo kuti vatapwe vaendwe navo kunyika iri kure kana kuti iri pedyo" 
2Chronicles6:37 kunyange zvazvo zvakadaro vakazviti kunun'unu mumwoyo mavo vari munyika mavakavatapa macho, vakapinduka voturira chichemo chavo kwamuri vari munyika yavakavatapa iyoyo vachiti, takaita chitadzo tikaita zvouipi tikapara mhosva," 
2Chronicles6:38 kana vakapindukira kwamuri nomwoyo wavo wose, vachinge vanyatsozvipira kupinduka ivo pachavo, vari munyika yevavengi vavo, vanyakuvatapa, vakanamata vakaringa kuno kunyika yavo yamakapa madzitateguru avo, kuguta ramakasarudza kumba ino yandakavakira zita renyu;" 
2Chronicles6:39 vanzwei munamato wavo nechichemo chavo kudenga ikoko kunzvimbo yenyu kwamunogara muvaitire zvavanenge vachichema nazvo, muregererewo vanhu venyu vanenge vakutadzirai ivavo." 
2Chronicles6:40 Zvino imi Mwari wangu meso enyu ngaatarise murerekere nzeve dzenyu kumunamato uyu wandaita pano. 
2Chronicles6:41 “Zvino chisimukai zvenyu Tenzi Mwari muende mundogara munzvimbo yenyu yokuzorora, imi nebhokisi rechitenderano rine simba renyu. Vapristi venyu imi Tenzi Mwari ngavafukidzwe noruponeso, muregewo zvenyu vatsvene venyu vafare mune zvakanaka zvenyu." 
2Chronicles6:42 Tenzi Mwari, dai waro mangorega kufuratira muzodzwi wenyu, murangarire mwoyochena wenyu kuna Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu.”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Zvino kuzoti Soromoni apedza kunamata, moto wakatozomoka kudenga ukaroromesa mupiro wokupisa nezvibayiro, kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kukazadza Temberi yacho." 
2Chronicles7:2 Vapristi havana kugona kupinda mumba yaTenzi pamusana pokuti kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakazadza imba yaTenzi iyoyo. 
2Chronicles7:3 Pakaona vanhu vose veIsiraeri kutozomoka kwakaita moto nokupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi paTemberi, vakati kota kota pasi nouso panhandare yakanga yakagadzirwa, vakanamata vakatenda Tenzi vachiti, “Nokuti wakanaka, uye mwoyochena wake hauperi.”" 
2Chronicles7:4 Mambo navanhu vose veIsiraeri vakapira zvibayiro kuna Tenzi. 
2Chronicles7:5 Mambo Soromoni akapira zvibayiro zviuru makumi maviri emombe, nehwai zviuru zana namakumi maviri, nokudaro mambo navanhu vose vakateketerera imba iyoyo kuna Mwari." 
2Chronicles7:6 Vapristi vakamira munzvimbo dzavo, vaRevhiwo vaine zvokuridzisa mumhanzi waTenzi zvakagadzirwa namambo Dhavhidhi kuitira kurumbidza Tenzi pamusana pokuti mwoyochena wake hauperi. Dhavhidhi paaivarumbidzisa Mwari, vapristi vairidza mabhosvo vakatarisana navo, vaIsiraeri vose vakamira." 
2Chronicles7:7 Soromoni akaturira kuna Mwari chimwe chidzengerere chapakati poruvanze pokunge toda kupinda mumba yaTenzi. Ndipo paakapirira mupiro wokupisa namafuta omupiro wokuwadzana. Chakanetsa ndechokuti atari iya yendaira yakagadzirwa naSoromoni, yakanga isingakwane kuisa pairi mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yeupfu hwembeswana namafuta." 
2Chronicles7:8 Panguvawo iyoyo Soromoni nevaIsiraeri vose vaaiva navo, vakaita mabiko okupemberera kwamazuva manomwe. Vakanga vari gungano guru kwazvo ravanhu vokubva pokunge tava kuda kusvika kuHamati kusvikira kuKakova keIjipiti." 
2Chronicles7:9 Pazuva rechisere vakaita musangano mukuru wezvokunamata nokuti vakanga vateketerera atari kuna Mwari kwemazuva manomwe, vakachengetawo mazuva makuru kwamazuva manomwe." 
2Chronicles7:10 Pazuva rechimakumi maviri nechitatu romwedzi wechinomwe akaparadza musasa woonekana navanhu kuti vaende kumisha yavo. Vakaenda vasisazive pokuisa mwoyo nokufarira zvinhu zvakanaka zvakanga zvaitwa naTenzi kune muranda wake Dhavhidhi nokuna Soromoni nokuvanhu vake vaIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles7:11 Saizvozvo Soromoni akapedza kuvaka imba yaTenzi nomuzinda wamambo nezvose zvaaiva nazvo mumwoyo zvokuita mumba yaTenzi nomumuzinda make akanyatsozviita. 
2Chronicles7:12 Tenzi akazviratidza usiku kuna Soromoni akamuti, “Munamato wako ndaunzwa, ndasarudza nzvimbo ino kuti ive yangu kuti ive imba yokupirira zvibayiro." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ndikange ndapfiga matenga kuti arege kunayisa mvura kana kuti ndikatuma mhashu kuti dzirozve nyika ino kunyange kutuma denda mukati mavanhu vangu; 
2Chronicles7:14 kana vanhu vanodaidzwa nezita rangu vakazvirereka, vakanamata vava kutsvaka kuti ndivacheukewo, vakasiya nzira dzavo dzakaipa; pakadaro ini ndichavanzwa kudenga uku, ndigovaregerera chitadzo chavo ndigoporesawo nyika yavo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Zvino meso angu achange akatarisa, nzeve dzangu dzakanyatsoteerera munamato unoitwa panzvimbo ino." 
2Chronicles7:16 Zvino ndasarudza imba ino ndikaiita kuti iere, kuitira kuti zita rangu rive pairi nokusingapere. Ziso rangu nomwoyo wangu zvichange zviri pairi narini wose." 
2Chronicles7:17 Kana uriwe, dai zvako ukaita mufambiro wandinoda sezvaiita baba vako Dhavhidhi uchiita zvose sokuudza kwandakakuita uchichengeta murao yangu nezvirevo zvangu." 
2Chronicles7:18 Kana wadaro ndichaita kuti umambo hwako hudzike midzi, sokutsidzirana kwandakaita nababa vako Dhavhidhi ndichiti, ‘Hazvichafa zvakamboitika kuti ini ndishaye munhu womumba mako wokuzotonga Isiraeri.’" 
2Chronicles7:19 “Asi kana mukazotsauka zviye zvokutofuratira zvenyu mirao yangu nemitemo yangu yandakakupai moenda kundonamata vamwe vamwari muchivapfugamira," 
2Chronicles7:20 ini ndopandichakutipurai munyika ino yandakupai. Kanawo imba iyoyi yandaeresera zita rangu, ndichaibvisa zvokusambodazve kuzoiona mumaziso mangu. Ndichaita kuti izvozvi izvi zvive setsumo yavanhu nechiseko chenyika mukati memarudzi ose." 
2Chronicles7:21 “Kunyangewo pamba iyoyi iyi ine mukurumbira kudai, vapfuuri nenzira vose vachanyatsoti kanha kunana vachishamiswa nazvo, vachitozvimvunzawo vachiti, ‘Ko Tenzi chaadariro nyika ino nemba iyi chii?’" 
2Chronicles7:22 Ivo vachati, ‘Pamusana pokuti vakafuratira Tenzi, Mwari wavo, nyakuburitsa madzitateguru avo kuIjipiti ndokusimba navamwe vamwari vovapfugamira vachivanamata, ndokusaka akavapinza munyatwa yose iyi.’ ”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Mushure memakore makumi maviri okunge Soromoni avaka dzimba idzi dziri mbiri dzinoti imba yaTenzi nomuzinda wake," 
2Chronicles8:2 iye Soromoni akavaka maguta aakanga apiwa naHuramu akandogarisa vanhu veIsiraeri maari. 
2Chronicles8:3 Soromoni akazoenda kuHamatizobha akarikurira. 
2Chronicles8:4 Akavaka Tadhimori kurenje, namaguta ose okuchengetera zvinhu aakavaka muHamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Akavakawo Bhetihoroni rokumusoro neBhetihoroni renyasi ari maguta akavakirirwa netsvingo aine misuo mikuru nezvihuri. 
2Chronicles8:6 Akavakawo Bhaarati namamwe maguta ose okuchengetera zvinhu aakanga ainawo iye Soromoni namaguta ose engoro dzake dzehondo dzamabhiza namaguta avachairi vadzo uyewo nezvimwe zvose zvaaida kuvaka muJerusaremu nokuRebhanoni nomunyika yose yaaitonga. 
2Chronicles8:7 Vanhu vose vasiri vechiIsiraeri vakasara pakati pevaHiti navaAmori navaPerizi navaHivhi navaJebhusi," 
2Chronicles8:8 zvizukuru zvakasara zvaivapo munyika imomo mushure mavo zvisina kutsakatiswa nevaIsiraeri, ivava ava ndivo vakapinzwa mubasa rechibharo naSoromoni, ndozvavari nanhasi uno." 
2Chronicles8:9 Asi vechiIsiraeri Soromoni haana kuvaita varanda vebasa rake. Ndivo vaiva varwi vehondo namakurukota ake navatungamiriri vehondo navakuru vakuru vomungoro dzake dzehondo dzamabhiza navachairi vadzo. 
2Chronicles8:10 Ivava ndiwo makurukota makuru okwamambo Soromoni vari mazana maviri namakumi mashanu vaiva nebasa rokutonga vamwe. 
2Chronicles8:11 Soromoni akatamisa mukunda waFarao kuguta raDhavhidhi akamuendesa kumba yaakanga amuvakira. Raaiva naro nderokuti, “Mudzimai wangu uyu haangagare mumuzinda waDhavhidhi mambo weIsiraeri pamusana pokuti pose pakambosvikwa nebhokisi raTenzi rechitenderano, panoera.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Soromoni aipira mipiro yokupisa kuna Tenzi paatari yaTenzi yaakanga avakira pamberi pekamba kapamusuo petembere 
2Chronicles8:13 maererano nezvaidiwa zuva nezuva achitevedza mutemo waMosesi wemaSabata nowokugara kwemwedzi newemazuva makuru matatu aya anoti mazuva makuru echingwa chisina mbiriso, nezuva guru rokupemberera mavhiki namazuva makuru amatumba." 
2Chronicles8:14 Sezvirongwa zvababa wake akarongera mapato avapristi basa rawo rokuita. Akarongerawo vaRevhi basa ravo rokurumbidza nerokushanda navapristi sezvaidikanwa zuva nezuva. Akarongerawo vokuchengetedza misuo mukuru muzvikwata zvavo zvokuchengetedza misuo mukuru yacho nokuti ndozvakanga zvanzi nomunhu waMwari Dhavhidhi zvizoitwa. 
2Chronicles8:15 Hapana chavakatsaudzira kuita pane zvakanzi namambo vapristi nevaRevhi vaite zvainangana nechipi nechipi zvacho kana nezvemaichengeterwa upfumi. 
2Chronicles8:16 Ndiko kupedzeswa kwakaitwa basa rose raSoromoni iri kubvira zuva rakatangwa kuvakwa ugaro hwemba yaTenzi kusvikira yapera. Saka imba yaTenzi yakabva yapera kuvakwa. 
2Chronicles8:17 Soromoni akaenda kuEzionigebheru nokuEroti riri mumahombekombe megungwa kunyika yeEdhomu. 
2Chronicles8:18 Huramu akamutumira machinda ake nengarava namachinda nyanzvi dzezvokufamba mugungwa vakaenda kuOfiri pamwechete namachinda aSoromoni. Vakandounza ndarama inorema makirogiramu anopfuura zviuru gumi nezvishanu vakauya nayo kuna mambo Soromoni. 
2Chronicles9:1 Mumwe mukadzi aiva mambo wokuShebha paakanzwa nezvomukurumbira waSoromoni, akauya kuJerusaremu kuzoedza Soromoni nemibvunzo yakaoma akakutwa nezanzwe chairo ravanhu vaine nghamera dzakatakura twunonhuwirira nendarama yakawanda kwazvo namatombo anokosha. Paakasvika kuna Soromoni, akamutaurira zvose zvaiva mumwoyo make." 
2Chronicles9:2 Soromoni akamupindura mibvunzo yake yose. Hapana kana chimwechete chakanga chakavanzika kuna Soromoni chaakatadza kumutsanangurira. 
2Chronicles9:3 Mambokadzi uyu wokuShebha paakaona ungwaru hwaSoromoni nemba yaakanga avaka," 
2Chronicles9:4 kwoti patebhuru apa chokudya chaaidya, kwozoti mugariro waiita makurukota ake, iwo munekairiro waiita vashandi vake nomupfekero wacho wavaive vakaita kwotiwo navaimuperekera waini nomupfekero wachowo wavaiva vakaita, kwozoti nemipiro yake yokupisa yaaipira kumba yaTenzi, zvakamushayisa romuromo." 
2Chronicles9:5 Akati kuna mambo, “Zvandakanzwa ndiri kunyika kwangu nezvenyu uye nezvoungwaru hwenyu ndezvochokwadi," 
2Chronicles9:6 asi ini handina kunge ndazvibvuma kusvikira ndauya ndikatozvionera ndoga namaziso angu. Inga kutaurirwa hunyimwa! Zvandakanzwa hazvimbosvika napaduku pose pamakuriro akaita ungwaru hwenyu. Zvamuri zvinopfuura zvandakanzwa. 
2Chronicles9:7 Zvavo, vanhu venyu! Zvavo chokwadi machinda enyu, anogara ainemi achinzwa zvawo ungwaru hwenyu hwakadai." 
2Chronicles9:8 “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari wenyu akasarudza zvake kukugadzai umambo pachigaro chake choumambo kuitira iye Tenzi, Mwari wenyu. Pamusana pokuti Mwari wenyu akada Isiraeri akadawo kuti varambe varipo narini wose ndosaka akakugadzai umambo hwavo kuti kutonga zvine ruenzaniso uye zviri pamutsetse kuitwe.”" 
2Chronicles9:9 Mukadzi uyu akazopa mambo ndarama yairema makirogiramu anopfuura zviuru zvina netwokubikisa tunonhuhwirira twakawanda namatombo anokosha. Hakuna kumboita tunonhuwirira twakadaro setwakapuwa mambo Soromoni namambokadzi weShebha. 
2Chronicles9:10 Makurukota aHuramu namakurukota aSoromoni akandotora ndarama kuOfiri, akaunzawo mapango omuti womuarugumu namatombo anokosha." 
2Chronicles9:11 Mambo akagadzira mitandariko yamapango omuarugumu yemumba yaTenzi neyomumuzinda wamambo. Akavezawo zvipendani namadimbwa avaimbi. Hakuna kumboonekwa zvakadai munyika yeJudha. 
2Chronicles9:12 Mambo Soromoni akapa mambokadzi uyu wokuShebha zvose zvaaida zvaainge akumbira tisingaverengi zvaakauya nazvo kuzopa mambo. Iye akakotonoka akadzokera zvake kunyika kwake namakurukota ake. 
2Chronicles9:13 Ndarama yaiuyiswa kuna Soromoni pagore, yairema makirogiramu makumi maviri ezviuru ane zviuru zvitatu" 
2Chronicles9:14 pasingaverengwe yaiunzwa navamwe vemhindu dzokutengesa navashambadzi. Madzimambo ose okuArabhia navatongi vamatunhu vaiunzawo ndarama nesirivha kuna Soromoni. 
2Chronicles9:15 Mambo Soromoni akagadzira mazana maviri enhoo huru dzendarama yakaita zvokupfurwa nhoo huru imwechete yaiva yendarama yakaita zvokupfurwa yairema makirogiramu ainge oda kuita manomwe. 
2Chronicles9:16 Akaitawo mazana matatu edzimwe nhoo dzendarama yakaitwa zvokupfurwa. Nhoo imwechete yaiva nendarama yairema makirogiramu ainge oda kuita matatu. Mambo akandodzirongedza mumba iya yainzi Imbayesangorerebhanoni. 
2Chronicles9:17 Mambo akagadzirawo chigaro choumambo chomunyanga wenzou akaunamira ndarama chaiyo yakanakisisa. 
2Chronicles9:18 Kundosvika pachigaro choumambo paiva nemadanho matanhatu nechokuisa tsoka chendarama zvaiva zvakabatanidzwa nechigaro choumambo. Kumativi uku chigaro ichi chaiva nepokuisa maoko. Paiva neshumba mbiri dzakamira parutivi pezvokuisa maoko," 
2Chronicles9:19 paine shumba gumi nembiri dzakamira pamadanho aya ose ari matanhatu dzakati imwe uku, imwe uku padanho roga roga. Hapana mune imwe nyika makamboitwa zvakadai." 
2Chronicles9:20 Midziyo yose zvayo yokunwira yamambo Soromoni yaiva yendarama. Midziyo yose yokuImbayesangorerebhanoni yaivawo yendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, sirivha hapana aimboiverengawo sechinhu panguva yaSoromoni." 
2Chronicles9:21 Pamusana pokuti ngarava dzamambo dzaienda kuTarishishi namachindawo aHuramu. Kamwechete pamakore matatu, ngarava idzodzo dzokuTarishishi dzaiunza ndarama nesirivha nomunyanga wenzou etsoko namakudo." 
2Chronicles9:22 Nokudaro mambo Soromoni aikunda mamwe madzimambo ose apasi pano muupfumi nomungwaru. 
2Chronicles9:23 Madzimambo apasi pose aidisa kwazvo kuona Soromoni kuti vanzwe ungwaru hwake hwakanga hwaiswa naMwari mumwoyo make. 
2Chronicles9:24 Gore negore vose ivava, munhu wose aiunza chipo chake chechinhu chesirivha kana chendarama kana chamachira kana kuti mura nechimwe chinonhuwirira kana mabhiza namanyurusi." 
2Chronicles9:25 Soromoni aiva nezviuru zvina zvetumatanga twamabhiza nengoro dzehondo dzamabhiza nezviuru gumi nezviviri zvavachairi vadzo, vaakati vave mumaguta engoro dzehondo vamwe vari muJerusaremu namambo." 
2Chronicles9:26 Aitonga madzimambo ose kubvira muna Yufuratesi zvichienda kunyika yavaFirisitia kundosvika kumuganhu neIjipiti. 
2Chronicles9:27 Mambo akaita kuti muJerusaremu imomo, sirivha iyi inge matombowo zvawo. Musidhariwo uyu wakanga wava kungewo zvawo mukuyu wokunyika yokumanhika kuShefera kuwanda." 
2Chronicles9:28 Mabhiza aSoromoni aitengwa kuIjipiti nokune dzimwe nyika dzose ouyiwa nawo. 
2Chronicles9:29 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaSoromoni kubvira pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzesera, dzakanyorwa wani mubhuku reNhoroondo dzomuporofita Natani nomune zvakaporofitwa naAhiya wokuShiro noMuzviratidzo Zvakaonekwa noMuoni Idho zvichinangana naJerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati." 
2Chronicles9:30 Soromoni akatonga Isiraeri yose kwemakore makumi mana ari muJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles9:31 Soromoni akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, kumadzitateguru ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi baba vake. Robhamu mwana wake mukomana ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Chronicles10:1 Rehobhoamu akaenda kuShikemu kwakanga kwakaunganwa neIsiraeri yose kundomugadza umambo. 
2Chronicles10:2 Jerobhohamu mwanakomana waNebhati paakazvinzwa zvake achiri kuIjipiti sezvo akanga achiri kuIjipiti ikoko kwaakaenda atiza mambo Soromoni," 
2Chronicles10:3 vakamutumira nhume kundomudaidza. Jerobhoamu uyu nevokwaIsiraeri vose vakasvikopira nyaya yavo kuna Rehobhoamu vachiti," 
2Chronicles10:4 “Baba venyu vakatiremedza nejoko rinorema. Zvino dai mukatirerutsirawo basa rababa venyu rakaoma kudai nejoko ravo rinorema ravakaisa patiri tigokushandirai zvedu.” 
2Chronicles10:5 Iye akati, “Mozodzoka zvenyu kwandiri kwapera mazuva matatu.” Nokudaro vanhu ava vakaenda zvavo." 
2Chronicles10:6 Mambo Rehobhoamu akandobvunza mazano kune vechikuru chikuru vaimbova makurukota kuna Soromoni baba vake pavakanga vachiri vapenyu achiti, “Zano ramunondipa kuti ndipindure vanhu ava nderipi?”" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ivo vakati kwaari, “Zvanhasi uno izvi kana mukabvuma zvenyu kuitira vanhu ava tsiye nyoro, mukavafadza mukataura navo zvakanaka naivowo vachava varanda kwamuri mazuva ose.”" 
2Chronicles10:8 Asi iye akasiya zano raakapiwa nevechikuru chikuru ava akandobvunza mazano kune vechidiki vaakakura navo vakanga vava zvino makurukota ake. 
2Chronicles10:9 Akati kwavari, “Ko zano ramunondipa kuti ndipindure vanhu ava nderipi vakanditi, ‘Tirerutsireiwo joko rakaiswa nababa venyu patiri.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:10 Vechidiki vaakakura navo ava vakamuti, “Udzai vanhu ivavo vakakutii, ‘Baba venyu vakatiremedza nejoko rinorema dai mukachitirerutsirawo, kuti kasiyanwa kangu kakobvu pane chiuno chababa vangu.’" 
2Chronicles10:11 ‘Zvino baba vangu vakakuremedzai nejoko rinorema, handiti! Ini ndichatoripamhidzira. Baba vangu vaikurovai neshamhu, handiti! Ini ndichakurovai netyava ine minzwa yerukato.’ ”" 
2Chronicles10:12 Saizvozvo Jerobhoamu navanhu vose vakadzokera kuna Rehobhoamu pazuva retatu racho sokutaura kwakanga kwaita mambo kuti mugozodzoka kwandiri kwapera mazuva matatu. 
2Chronicles10:13 Mambo akavapindura nehasha achisiya zano revechikuru vaya. 
2Chronicles10:14 Akataura kwavari achitevera zano riya raakapiwa nevechidiki achiti, “Baba vangu vakakuremedzai nejoko rinorema, handiti! Ini ndichatoripamhidzira. Baba vangu vakakurovai neshamu, handiti! Ini ndichakurovai netyava ine minzwa yekananga.”" 
2Chronicles10:15 Nokudaro mambo haana kunzwa chichemo chavanhu ivava nokuti maitikiro aya ezvinhu akanga auyiswa naMwari kuti Tenzi azadzikise shoko rake raakanga ataura nomuromo waAhiya wokuShiro kuna Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati. 
2Chronicles10:16 VokwaIsiraeri vose pavakaona kuti mambo haana kunzwa chichemo chavo, vanhu vakapindura mambo vachiti, “Isu muna Dhavhidhi, mugove wedu ndowei chaizvo? Hatina isu nhaka mumwana waJese. VokwaIsiraeri, munhu wose kumusha. Iwe Dhavhidhi, zvomumba mako wochizvionera.” VakwaIsiraeri ndiye shapu kuenda kumusha." 
2Chronicles10:17 Asi vaIsiraeri vaigara mumaguta okwaJudha ndivo vaitongwa naRehobhoamu. 
2Chronicles10:18 Mambo Rehobhoamu akatuma Adhoramu mumwe mukuru mukuru wezvebasa rechibharo. Vanhu vokwaIsiraeri vakamutema namatombo akabva afa. Mambo Rehobhoamu ndopaakabva ati nokuchimbidza ngoro yake yehondo karakata ndiye kuJerusaremu ware kutiza. 
2Chronicles10:19 Saizvozvo vokwaIsiraeri vakapandukira imba yokwaDhavhidhi kusvikira pari nhasi. 
2Chronicles11:1 Rehobhoamu paakasvika kuJerusaremu, akaunganidza vemba yokwaJudha nevokwaBhenjamini zana namakumi masere ezviuru zveshasha chaidzo dzokurwa hondo kundorwisa vokwaIsiraeri kuitira kuti vadzorere nyika kuna Rehobhoamu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Asi shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Shemaya munhu waMwari," 
2Chronicles11:3 rikati, “Iti kuna Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni mambo wokwaJudha nokuvaIsiraeri vose vari kwaJudha nokwaBhenjamini," 
2Chronicles11:4 zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Regai kuenda uye musarwisane nehama dzenyu. Munhu wose kumusha nokuti zvinhu izvi zvakabva kwandiri.’ ” Saizvozvo vakateerera zvakarehwa naTenzi ndokudzokera zvavo, vakarega kundorwisa Jerobhoamu." 
2Chronicles11:5 Rehobhoamu aigara muJerusaremu. Akavakirira muJudhamo maguta okuzvidzivirira muhondo. 
2Chronicles11:6 Akavaka Bheterehemu neEtamu neTekoa 
2Chronicles11:7 neBhetizuri neSoko neAdhuramu 
2Chronicles11:8 neGati neMaresha neZifu 
2Chronicles11:9 neAdhoraimu neRakishi neAzeka 
2Chronicles11:10 neZora neAiyaroni neHebhuroni, maguta etsvingo ari kwaJudha nokwaBhenjamini." 
2Chronicles11:11 Akasimbisa tsvingo dzacho akaisamo vatungamiriri vehondo namatura ezvokudya namafuta newaini. 
2Chronicles11:12 Akaisawo nhoo namapfumo mumaguta ose iwayo akaasimbisa zvikuru kwazvo. Iwaya ndiwo makwanisiro aakaita kutonga kwaJudha nokwaBhenjamini. 
2Chronicles11:13 Vapristi nevaRevhi vaiva muIsiraeri yose zvayo vakaunganidzana kwaari kubva kumatunhu avo ose 
2Chronicles11:14 nokuti vaRevhi vakanga vatobva kumaruwa nokumisha yavo vatamira kwaJudha nokuJerusaremu pamusana pokuti Jerobhoamu navana vake vakomana vakavadzinga basa roupristi rokushandira Tenzi," 
2Chronicles11:15 akazvisarudzira vanhu kuti vave vapristi vomunzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira, vezvifananidzo zvembudzi zvokunamata nezvimhuru zvaakanga agadzira." 
2Chronicles11:16 Vamwewo vaiva nemwoyo wokutsvaka Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri vakavateverawo kubva kumadzinza ose eIsiraeri vakaenda kuJerusaremu kundopira zvibayiro kuna Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Vakasimbisa umambo hwokwaJudha kwemakore matatu vakatsigirana naRehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni vakapedza makore matatu vachitevera gwara raDhavhidhi naSoromoni. 
2Chronicles11:18 Rehobhoamu akaroora mukadzi ainzi Maharati aberekwa naJerimoti mwanakomana waDhavhidhi amai vake vari Abhihairi vaberekwa naEriabhu mwanakomana waJese. 
2Chronicles11:19 Iye akamuberekera vana vakomana ava vanoti: Jeushi naShemariya naZahamu. 
2Chronicles11:20 Mushure maiyeyu akaroorawo Maaka mwana waAbhusharomu iyewo akamuberekera Abhiya naAtai naZiza naSheromiti. 
2Chronicles11:21 Rehobhoamu aida Maaka mwanasikana waAbhusharomu kupinda vamwe vose vakadzi vake navarongo. (Akaroora vakadzi gumi navasere navarongo makumi matanhatu uye aiva navana vakomana makumi maviri navasere vana vasikana makumi matanhatu.) 
2Chronicles11:22 Rehobhoamu akapa Abhiya mwanakomana waMaaka ukuru hwokutonga vakoma nevanun'una vake achiitira kuti azomugadza umambo. 
2Chronicles11:23 Rehobhoamu akaita zvine ungwaru akagovanisa vamwe vanakomana vake mumatunhu okwaJudha neekwaBhenjamini mumaguta ose etsvingo achivawanisa zvokudya zvakawanda nokuvaroorera vakadzi vazhinji. 
2Chronicles12:1 Umambo hwaRehobhoamu hwakati zvino hwasimba hwanyatsodzika midzi akakanda pasi zvomutemo waTenzi pamwechete neIsiraeri yose. 
2Chronicles12:2 Mugore rechishanu rokutonga kwamambo Rehobhoamu pamusana pokuti vakanga vasina kutendeseka kuna Tenzi, Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akauya kuzorwisa Jerusaremu" 
2Chronicles12:3 aine ngoro dzehondo dzamabhiza chiuru chimwechete chine mazana maviri navachairi vadzo zviuru makumi matanhatu. Varwi vaakauya navo vakanga vasingaverengeki vaakabva navo kuIjipiti vaiti vaRibhiya navaSuki navaEtiopia. 
2Chronicles12:4 Akakurira maguta etsvingo okwaJudha ndokuenda akananga kuJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles12:5 Zvino muporofita Shemaya akasvika paiva pakaunganidzana Rehobhoamu navatungamiriri vokwaJudha vakanga vari muJerusaremu pamusana paShishaki, akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Imi makandiramwaka imi! Zvino iniwo ndakuramwirai mumaoko aShishaki.’ ”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Vatungamiriri veIsiraeri namambo vakazvirereka vakati, “Mwari ndiye mururami.”" 
2Chronicles12:7 Tenzi paakaona kuti vazvirereka shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Shemaya richiti, “Zvavazvirereka kudai ini handichavaparadza ndichavanunura. Zvokunge ndichashandisa Shishaki kuratidza kuvirukira kwangu Jerusaremu nehasha, handichaita." 
2Chronicles12:8 Asi zvokuva varanda vake, vachava varanda vake vagoona kusiyana kwakaita kushandireni nokushandira madzimambo edzinyika.”" 
2Chronicles12:9 Ipapo Shishaki mambo weIjipiti akasvikorwisa Jerusaremu akapamba upfumi hwepamba yaTenzi noupfumi hwomumuzinda wamambo, akakukucha zvose. Akapambawo nhoo dzendarama dzakanga dzagadzirwa naSoromoni." 
2Chronicles12:10 Mambo Rehobhoamu akagadzira nhoo dzendarira panzvimbo yadzo. Akadziisa mumaoko avakuru vakuru vaichengetedza pamusuo womuzinda wamambo. 
2Chronicles12:11 Nguva dzose dzaipinda mambo mumba yaTenzi vokuchengetedza ava vaiuya vodzibatira mumaoko vozodzidzosera zvavo mumba yevokuchengetedza. 
2Chronicles12:12 Paakazvininipisa Tenzi akarega kumuvirukira nehasha; saizvozvo, haana kubva amuparadza. Naichowo chiri chokwadi kuti maJudha zvinhu zvakanga zvakanaka." 
2Chronicles12:13 Mambo Rehobhoamu akadzika midzi muJerusaremu akatonga. Rehobhoamu akanga ava namakore makumi mana nerimwechete paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore gumi nemanomwe ari muJerusaremu, guta rakasarudzwa naTenzi pamadzinza ose kuti aisepo zita rake. Zita raamai vake ndiNaama, muAmoni." 
2Chronicles12:14 Akaita zvakaipa nokuti haana kutsvaka Tenzi nomwoyo wose. 
2Chronicles12:15 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaRehobhoamu kubvira pakutanga kusvika pokupedzisira dzakanyorwa muBhuku reNhoroondo dzomuporofita Shemaya nomuoni Idho. Hondo yakaramba ichingovapo pakati paRehobhoamu naJerobhoamu. 
2Chronicles12:16 Rehobhoamu akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake, akavigwa muguta raDhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake Abhiya ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Chronicles13:1 Mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwaMambo Jerobhoamu, Abhiya akava mambo wokwaJudha." 
2Chronicles13:2 Akatonga kwamakore matatu ari muJerusaremu. Amai vake vainzi Mikaya mwana waUrieri vokuGibheya. Paiva nehondo pakati paAbhiya naJerobhoamu. 
2Chronicles13:3 Abhiya akaenda kundorwa aina magamba chaiwo okurwa hondo namazana mana ezviuru zveshasha chaidzo dzokurwa hondo. Jerobhoamu akaronga varwi vake kuti achirwa naye, vaive vari mazana masere ezviuru zvamagamba chaiwo eshasha dzokurwa hondo." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abhiya akamira pamusoro pegomo reZemaraimu riri munyika yokwaEfuremu yamakomo, akadaidzira achiti, “Iwe Jerobhoamu nemi vaIsiraeri mose chimbonditeererai munzwe!”" 
2Chronicles13:5 “Hamuzive here kuti Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri akapa narini wose umambo hwokwaIsiraeri kuna Dhavhidhi nokuvanakomana vokwake achizviita nepfirapo yechitenderano chomunyu?" 
2Chronicles13:6 “Kunyange zvakadaro gurukota raSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, Jerobhoamu mwanakomana waNebhati akasimuka akapandukira tenzi wake." 
2Chronicles13:7 Mamwewo madzenga avanhu vasina maturo vakaunganidzana kwaari, vakazvidza Rehobhoamu mwanakomana waSoromoni, izvozvo akanga achiri mudiki asina chivindi haana kugona kumirisana navo." 
2Chronicles13:8 Zvino ndopamungatiwo mumirisane nenyika yaTenzi yaarikutonga navanakomana vokwaDhavhidhi muchivimba nokuwanda kwamakaita uku nezvimhuru zvendarama zvamunazvo zvamakagadzirirwa naJerobhoamu kuti zvive vamwari venyu here. 
2Chronicles13:9 Hamuna here imi kudzinga vapristi vaTenzi, vanakomana vokwaAroni navaRevhi, mukazviitira vapristi sezvinongoitawo mamwe marudzi edzimwe nyika? Anoti nomunhu wose anenge angouyawo zvake nehandira ichiri duku kana nehondohwe nomwe ndizvozvo obva anzi atova mupristi wezvinhu zvisiri Mwari." 
2Chronicles13:10 Asi kwatiri isu, Tenzi ndiye Mwari wedu, uye hatina kumufuratira. Tine vapristi vanoshandira Tenzi, vari vanakomana vokwaAroni navaRevhi pabasa ravo irori." 
2Chronicles13:11 Mangwanani oga oga namanheru oga oga, vanopira kuna Tenzi mipiro yokupisa norusenzi runonhuwirira vachironga chingwa chepana Mwari patebhuru yendarama yakachenurwa, vanoonawo nezvechigadzikiro chemwenje chendarama kuti marambi acho avheneke manheru oga oga nokuti isu tinochengeta zvakanzi naTenzi, Mwari wedu zviitwe, asi imi makamuramba." 
2Chronicles13:12 Chinzwai, Mwari anesu, ndiye ari kutungamirira, uye vapristi vake nemabhosvo engondo okurudzira kuti tichikurwisai. VaIsiraeri we-e regai kurwisa Tenzi, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu nokuti hamumbozvikwanisa.”" 
2Chronicles13:13 Izvozvo Jerobhoamu akanga atotumira vokundovahwandira necheseri. Nokudaro vokwaJudha vakanga voti mberi vatarisana nehondo, shure kune vokuvahwandira vaye." 
2Chronicles13:14 VokwaJudha vakati cheu, onei kwachiti hondo mberi, nehondo shure." 
2Chronicles13:15 Vakachema kuna Tenzi, vapristi vakaridza mabhosvo. Kuvarwi vokwaJudha ngondo ikati yarira. Varwi vokwaJudha pavakaridza ngondo kudaro, Mwari akakurira Jerobhoamu nevokwaIsiraeri vose, Abhiya novokwaJudha vachiona." 
2Chronicles13:16 Varwi vokwaIsiraeri vakati ware kutiza vokwaJudha. Mwari ndokuvaisa mumaoko avo. 
2Chronicles13:17 Abhiya navarwi vakavaita murakatira kuuraya, kukafiwa nevokwaIsiraeri mazana mashanu ezviuru zveshasha chaidzo dzokurwa hondo." 
2Chronicles13:18 Saizvozvo vokwaIsiraeri vakakurirwa. Panguva iyoyo vokwaJudha vakakunda nokuti vakavimba naTenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abhiya akaronda Jerobhoamu akamutorera maguta aya anoti Bhetieri nemisha yaro, neJeshama nemisha yaro neEfuroni nemisha yaro." 
2Chronicles13:20 Jerobhoamu haana kuzovazve nesimba panguva yaAbhiya. Tenzi akazomurova akafa. 
2Chronicles13:21 Asi Abhiya akava nesimba, akaroora vakadzi gumi navana aivawo nevanakomana makumi maviri ana vaviri navanasikana gumi navatanhatu." 
2Chronicles13:22 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAbhiya namaitiro ake nezvaakataura zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku romuporofita Idho. 
2Chronicles14:1 Saizvozvo Abhiya akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake. Mwanakomana wake Asa ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. Mumazuva ake nyika yakava norunyararo kwegumi ramakore. 
2Chronicles14:2 Asa akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles14:3 Akabvisa zveatari dzisiridzo nenzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira akapwanya zvifananidzo zvokunamata, zvemabwe akatema-tema zvifananidzo zvokunamata zviAshera." 
2Chronicles14:4 Akaudza vokwaJudha kuti vachitsvaka Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo nokuchengeta mutemo nomurao." 
2Chronicles14:5 Akabvisawo mumaguta ose okwaJudha nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira. Mumaoko ake, nyika yakaita runyararo." 
2Chronicles14:6 Akavaka maguta etsvingo okwaJudha nokuti nyika yaiva murunyararo. Hakuna kumboitika hondo kwaari mumakore iwaya nokuti Tenzi akamupa zororo. 
2Chronicles14:7 Akati kune vokwaJudha, “Ngativakiridzei maguta aya tiapoteredze netsvingo nenharire nemisuo mikuru nezvihuri. Nyika iyi ichiri yedu pamusana pokuti takatsvaka Tenzi, Mwari wedu. Takamutsvaka akabva atipa runyararo kumativi kwose.” Naizvozvo vakavaka, vakabudirira." 
2Chronicles14:8 Asa uyu aiva nezviuru mazana matatu zvavarwi vaiva nezvombo zvehondo, namapfumo nenhoo, navarwi zviuru mazana maviri namakumi masere vokwaBhenjamini vari vokutakura nhoo nokupfura nemiseve. Vose ivava vaiva mvumba chaidzo dzamagamba okurwa hondo." 
2Chronicles14:9 Mumwe muEtiopia ainzi Zera akauya kuzovarwisa aine varwi vehondo zviuru zvinokwana chiuru chaicho, nengoro dzehondo mazana matatu akasvika kuMaresha ikoko." 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa akamubudira vakaronga hondo dzavo kuti vachirwa mubani rokwaZefata kuMaresha. 
2Chronicles14:11 Asa akachema kuna Tenzi, Mwari wake achiti, “Tenzi we-e! Hakuna akaita semi angabatsire panenge pasangana vane simba navasina simba kudai. Tibatsireiwo Tenzi, Mwari wedu nokuti tinovimba nemi. Tauya kuzorwisa gurusvusvu ravanhu iri muzita renyu. Imi Tenzi ndimi Mwari wedu. Regai kuti munhu akukurirei.”" 
2Chronicles14:12 Naizvozvo Tenzi akapa kuti vaEtiopia vakundwe naAsa nevokwaJudha. VaEtiopia vakati ware kutiza. 
2Chronicles14:13 Asa navanhu vaaiva navo akadzingirirana navo kusvikira kuGerari. VaEtiopia vakaita murakatira kufa pakasara pasisina mupenyu. VaEtiopia vakaitiswa chimwanda-mwanda naTenzi nehondo yake. VokwaJudha vakakukucha zvinhu zvizhinji zvokupamba. 
2Chronicles14:14 Vakarasha maguta ose emudunhu reGerari nokuti kutya Tenzi kwakanga kwavabata. Vakapamba zvinhu mumaguta ose iwayo. Zvokupamba zvakanga zvakawanda imomo. 
2Chronicles14:15 Vakaparadzawo matendhe avafudzi vemombe. Vakatakura matanga namatanga ehwai, nenghamera, ndokudzokera Jerusaremu." 
2Chronicles15:1 Mweya waMwari wakauya pana Azariya mwanakomana waOdhedhi. 
2Chronicles15:2 Akaenda kundosangana naAsa akati kwaari, “Iwe Asa nemi mose vokwaJudha novokwaBhenjamini imbonditeereraiwo munzwe, Tenzi anemi kana imi muinaye. Mukamutsvaka manomuwana. Asi imi mukamufuratira, anokufuratiraiwo." 
2Chronicles15:3 Kwakamboitika nguva ndefu Isiraeri isina Mwari wechokwadi isina mupristi wokuvadzidzisa isinawo mutemo. 
2Chronicles15:4 Asi pavakanga vava munhamo yavo vakatendeukira kuna Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri vomutsvaka zvino, vakamuwana." 
2Chronicles15:5 Mumazuva iwayo kwakanga kusina rugare zvokuti kufamba chaiko kwakanga kwava nenjodzi nokuti pakava namanyongori asingatauriki muvanhu vose venyika idzodzi. 
2Chronicles15:6 Umharadzi hwakanga hwapinda, rudzi rwakamukirana norudzi, guta richimukirana nerimwe guta pamusana pokuti Mwari aivapinza mumhando nemhando dzenhamo." 
2Chronicles15:7 Asi imi tsungai mwoyo musaregedzere maoko nokuti pabasa renyu iroro, muchapiwa mubayiro.”" 
2Chronicles15:8 Asa paakanzwa mashoko iwaya okuporofita kwomuporofita wokwaOdhedhi, akatsunga mwoyo akabva abvisa zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvisingadiwi naMwari munyika yose yokwaJudha nokwaBhenjamini nokumaguta aakanga akurira kunyika yokwaEfuremu yamakomo. Akagadzira atari yaTenzi iya yaiva pamberi pekamba kepamusuo wemba yaTenzi." 
2Chronicles15:9 Akaunganidza vose vokwaJudha nevokwaBhenjamini nevokwaEfuremu nevokwaManase nevokwaSimeoni vakanga vava kugara kwake nokuti vanhu vazhinji vakatizira kwaari vachibva kwaIsiraeri paya pavakaona kuti Tenzi, Mwari wake anaye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Vakaunganidzwa muJerusaremu mumwedzi wechitatu wegore regumi nechishanu rokutonga kwaAsa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Vakapira zvibayiro kuna Tenzi musi iwoyo zvavakatora pazvinhu zvokupamba zvavakanga vauya nazvo zvamazana manomwe emombe nezviuru zvinomwe zvehwai. 
2Chronicles15:12 Vakaita chibvumirano chokutsvaka Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo nomwoyo wavo wose nomweya wavo wose" 
2Chronicles15:13 uye kuti: kuwana asingatsvake Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri anofanira kuurayiwa angave mukuru kana mudiki murume kana mukadzi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Vakatsidza nemhiko kuna Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri nezwi riri pamusoro vachiita zvokudaidzira, uye nebhosvo nehwamanda." 
2Chronicles15:15 VokwaJudha vose vakafarira mhiko iyi nokuti vakanga vatsidza nomwoyo wavo wose vamutsvaka nomwoyo unoda akawanikwa. Tenzi ndokubvawo avapa runyararo kumativi ose. 
2Chronicles15:16 Kunyange ambuya vake Maaka, mambo Asa akavabvisa pachigaro chavo chouhosi hwokwamambo nokuti vakanga vagadzira chifananidzo chokunamata chokumiririra Ashera chisingambodiwa zvacho naMwari. Asa akatemera pasi chifananidzo chavo ichocho akachityora-tyora akachipisira kukakova keKidhironi." 
2Chronicles15:17 Asi nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira hadzina kubviswa muIsiraeri. Zvakadaro zvazvo, Asa uyu aiva munhu ane mwoyo wakarurama mazuva ohupenyu hwake hwose." 
2Chronicles15:18 Akaunza mumba yaMwari zvipo zvakanga zvatsidzwa nababa vake kupa kuna Mwari nezvipowo zvake zvaakanga atsidza kupa kuna Mwari zvesirivha nendarama nemidziyo. 
2Chronicles15:19 Zvehondo zvakamboti zii kudzamara gore ramakumi matatu nechishanu rokutonga kwaAsa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Mugore ramakumi matatu nechitanhatu rokutonga kwaAsa, mambo wokwaIsiraeri akandorwisa kwaJudha akavakirira guta reRhama kuitira kuti awane marambidziro vanhu kubva kwaAsa mambo wokwaJudha kana kuendako." 
2Chronicles16:2 Asa akatora sirivha nendarama upfumi hwepamba yaTenzi nehwemuzinda wamambo akazvitumira kuna Bhenihadhadhi mambo weSiria aigara muDhamasikusi 
2Chronicles16:3 achiti, “Ngatiitei chibvumirano, imi neni, sezvakanga zvakaita baba venyu nababa vangu. Onai ndakutumirai sirivha nendarama iyo, imi moendawo muparadze chibvumirano chenyu naBhaasha mambo wokwaIsiraeri kuitira kuti kwangu kuno uku abve.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Bhenihadhadhi akabvumirana namambo Asa akabva atumira vakuru vakuru vehondo yake kundorwisa maguta okwaIsiraeri. Vakakurira Iyoni neDhani neAberomaimu nemaguta ose ematura okwaNafutari. 
2Chronicles16:5 Bhaasha paakazvinzwa akabva arega kuvakirira Rhama akabva amisa basa rake. 
2Chronicles16:6 Mambo Asa akatora vokwaJudha vose akandotakura mabwe okuRama namapango acho ainge achivakiswa. Akandovakirira nazvo Gebha neMizipa. 
2Chronicles16:7 Panguva iyoyo, muoni Hanani akasvika kuna Asa mambo wokwaJudha akati kwaari, “Pamusana pokuti iwe wakavimbaka iwe namambo weSiria ukarega kuvimba naTenzi, Mwari wako, hondo yamambo weSiria yakupunyuka mumaoko." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ko vaItiopia nevaRibhiya vakanga vasiri hondo huru kwazvo here vaine zararira chairo rengoro dzehondo dzemadzibaba nevachairi vadzo? Asi pamusana pokuti makavimba naTenzi, iye akavaisa mumaoko menyu." 
2Chronicles16:9 Chiripo ndechokuti ziso raTenzi rinotarisa kwose kwose pasi pano kuti asimbise nokunyaradza vasina chinovarovesa hama pana iye Tenzi. Zvamaita ipapa apa ndezvoupenzi nokuti kubvira nhasi, hondo hadzichazokubvai.”" 
2Chronicles16:10 Asa akashatirirwa muoni uyu akamupfigira mujeri nokuti akanga amuvirukira nehasha pamusana paizvozvi. Panguva imwecheteyo Asa akabata vamwe vanhu noutsinye. 
2Chronicles16:11 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAsa kubvira pakutanga kusvika pakupedzesera, dzakanyorwa wani muBhuku ramadzimambo okwaJudha neokwaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles16:12 Mugore ramakumi matatu nechipfumbamwe Asa akaita chirwere chomutsoka, urwere hwake hwakazonyanyisa kwazvo. Kunyange nomuurwere hwake ihohu haana kutsvaka Tenzi, asi kuti akandotsvaka rubatsiro kun'anga." 
2Chronicles16:13 Asa akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake akafa mugore ramakumi mana nechiposhi rokutonga kwake. 
2Chronicles16:14 Vakamuviga muguva rake raakazvicherera padombo muguta raDhavhidhi. Vakamuradzika pane chokurara chakanga chakazadzwa mhando nemhando dzetunonhuwirira twakagadzirwa nenyanzvi dzokugadzira mafuta okuzora. Vakaita zimoto guru kwazvo vachimuremekedza. 
2Chronicles17:1 Jehoshafati mwanakomana wake akatonga panzvimbo pake akazvigadzirira kurwisana nevokwaIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles17:2 Akaisa varwi vehondo mumaguta ose etsvingo okwaJudha, akaisa zvikwata zvavarwi munyika yokwaJudha nomumaguta okwaEfuremu akanga akurirwa nababa wake Asa." 
2Chronicles17:3 Tenzi aiva naJehoshafati nokuti aitevedza makwara okutanga ababa vake. Haana kutsvaka vanaBhaari," 
2Chronicles17:4 asi aitsvaka Mwari wamadzibaba ake achitevedza mirao yake asingaite somuitiro wevokwaIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles17:5 Naizvozvo Tenzi akaita kuti umambo hudzike midzi mumaoko ake vokwaJudha; vose vaiunza mutero kuna Jehoshafati, iye akava noupfumi huzhinji achikudzwa kwazvo." 
2Chronicles17:6 Akanga akaisa mwoyo wake mune zvokunamata, Tenzi uyewo akabvisa maJudha nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zviAshera." 
2Chronicles17:7 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwake akatuma machinda ake aya anoti Bhenihairi naObhadhiya naZekariya naNetaneri naMikaya kundodzidzisa mumaguta okwaJudha. 
2Chronicles17:8 Akavatuma pamwechete nevaRevhi ava vaiti Shemaya naNataniya naZebhadhiya naAsaeri naShemiramoti naJehonatani naAdhoniya naTobhiya naTobhadhoniya, pamwechete nevaRevhi ivava akatuma vapristi ava vanoti Erishama naJehoramu." 
2Chronicles17:9 Vakadzidzisa munyika maJudha vaine Bhuku roMutemo waTenzi. Vakatenderera nomumaguta ose okwaJudha vachidzidzisa muvanhu. 
2Chronicles17:10 Kutya Tenzi kwakawira madzimambo enyika dzakapoteredza Judha akarega kuzorwisa Jehoshafati. 
2Chronicles17:11 Vamwe vechiFirisitia vakaigira Jehoshafati zvipo nesirivha yomutero. VaArabhu vakaunzawo kwaari zviuru zvinomwe zvina mazana manomwe ehondohwe nezviuru zvinomwe zvine mazana manomwe amakotora. 
2Chronicles17:12 Ukuru hwaJehoshafati hwakaramboenda mberi. Akavaka maJudha imomu maguta etsvingo neematura. 
2Chronicles17:13 Aiva nemirwi nemirwi yezvaakachengeta mumaguta okwaJudha. Aivawo nevarwi vehondo, magamba chaiwo okurwa hondo muJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles17:14 Mamiriro avakanga vakaita, dzinza nedzinza ndeaya: VokwaJudha: vatungamiriri vezviuru, paiti Adhina mutungamiriri wacho mukuru aina mazana matatu ezviuru zvavarume, mvumba chaidzo dzokurwa hondo" 
2Chronicles17:15 achitevedzerwa nomumwe mutungamiriri mukuru, Johohanani aina mazana maviri anamakumi masere ezviuru." 
2Chronicles17:16 Achitevedzerwawo naAmasiya mwanakomana waZikiri aiva munhu akazvipira zvake kuita basa raTenzi aivawo namazana maviri ezviuru, mvumba chaidzo dzokurwa hondo." 
2Chronicles17:17 Kune vokwaBhenjamini: kwaiva naEriyadha mvumba chaiyo, gamba chairo rokurwa hondo aine mazana maviri ezviuru zvevarume vokurwa nemiseve nenhoo;" 
2Chronicles17:18 achitevedzerwa naJehozabhadhi; aine vanhu zana rine makumi masere ezviuru vane zvombo zvehondo. 
2Chronicles17:19 Ivava vaishandira mambo pasingaverengerwe vaya vakanga vaiswa namambo mumaguta etsvingo munyika mose maJudha. 
2Chronicles18:1 Jehoshafati akati zvino ava noupfumi huzhinji achikudzwa kwazvo akaita ukama hwokuroorerana naAhabhu. 
2Chronicles18:2 Kwapera makore akati kuti akadzika kwaAhabhu kuSamaria. Ahabhu akamuurayira hwai nemombe dzakawanda pamwechete navanhu vaaiva navo, akamukurudzira kukwira kuRamoti kuGireadhi kundorirwisa." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ahabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha, “Hamungaendewo neni here kuguta reRamoti rokuGireadhi?” Akamupindura achiti, “Inga tiri vamwechete wani. Vanhu vangu vanongovawo vanhu venyu. Tichange tinemi muhondo yacho.”" 
2Chronicles18:4 Jehoshafati ndokuti kuna mambo wokwaIsiraeri, “Madii kutanga manzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo?”" 
2Chronicles18:5 Ipapo mambo wokwaIsiraeri akaungaidza vaporofita mazana mana akavati, “Toenda here kundorwisa guta reRamoti kuGireadhi kana kuti ndorega zvangu?” Ivo ndokuti, “Endai zvenyu nokuti Mwari achariisa mumaoko amambo.”" 
2Chronicles18:6 Asi Jehoshafati akati, “Hapana here mumwe muporofita waTenzi watingabvunze?”" 
2Chronicles18:7 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Pachine mumwe murume mumwechete watinganzwe naye kuti Tenzi anoti kudii nazvo. NdiMikaya mwanakomana waImura. Asi ini ndinomuvenga nokuti haamboporofita zvakanaka nezvangu asi zvakaipa mazuva ese.” Jehoshafati ndokuti, “Dai mukarega kutaura muchidaro mambo.”" 
2Chronicles18:8 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akadaidza rimwe gurukota ndokuriti, “Kurumidza kuunza pano Mikaya mwanakomana waImura.”" 
2Chronicles18:9 Izvozvo mambo wokwaIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha vakanga vagere pazvigaro zvavo zvoumambo vakapfeka magemenzi avo oumambo vagere panhandare pasuo guru rokupinda muSamaria. Izvozvo vaporofita vose vaingunoporofita vari pamberi pavo. 
2Chronicles18:10 Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaana akazvigadzirira nyanga dzesimbi ndokuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Nenyanga idzi uchatunga nadzo vaSiria kusvikira vaparadzwa.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Vaporofita vose ndozvavakaporofitawo izvozvo vachiti, “Kwirai zvenyu kuguta reRamoti rokuGireadhi mundokurira. Tenzi achariisa mumaoko amambo.”" 
2Chronicles18:12 Nhume yakaenda kundodaidza Mikaya, yakamuti, “Chinzwaika, uku vaporofita vose shoko ravari kutaura rimwechete rokuti zvinhu zvichandonakira mambo. Saka imimi dai zvamuchandotaura zvikafananawo nezviri kutaurwa nomumwe nomumwe wavo zvivewo zvakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:13 Asi Mikaya akati, “Ndinopika naTenzi chaiye mupenyu kuti zvinenge zvarehwa naMwari wangu izvozvo ndozvandichataura.”" 
2Chronicles18:14 Paakasvika pana mambo, mambo akamubvunza kuti, “Nhai Mikaya, toenda here kundorwisa guta reRamoti rokuGireadhi kana kuti ndorega zvangu?” Iye akapindura achiti, “A, endai zvenyuka mundokunda, vachaiswaka mumaoko enyu.”" 
2Chronicles18:15 Asi mambo ndokumuti, “Unoda kuti ndikuudze kangani kundipikira kutaura chokwadi muzita raTenzi.”" 
2Chronicles18:16 Iye ndokuti, “Ndaona Isiraeri yose yaita bararamhanya mumakomo sehwai dzisisina mufudzi. Tenzi akati, ‘Ivava ava havasisina vanatenzi vavo. Munhu wose ngaadzokere zvake kumusha kwake.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Ndozvandambokuudzai wani kuti haaporofite zvakanaka nezvangu asi zvakaipa.”" 
2Chronicles18:18 Mikaya akati, “Chinzwai zviri kutaurwa naTenzi. Ndaona Tenzi agere pachigaro chake choumambo akakutwa negurusvusvu rehondo dzose dzokudenga kurudyi nokuruboshwe." 
2Chronicles18:19 Tenzi ati, ‘Ndiani angaende zvake akafurira Ahabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri kuti aende kuguta reRamoti kuGireadhi andopararirako?’ Vakadoma-toma vachitaura twakasiya-siyana," 
2Chronicles18:20 ndokubva kwauya mumwe mweya ukamira pana Tenzi ukati, ‘Ini zvangu ndinondomufurira.’ Tenzi akabva auti, ‘Unondomufurira sei?’" 
2Chronicles18:21 Iwo ndokuti, ‘Ndinoenda zvangu kundova mweya wokunyepa mumuromo yavaporofita vake vose.’ Iye ndokuti, ‘Enda undomufurira, uchazvigona. Chienda uite saizvozvo.’ ”" 
2Chronicles18:22 Naizvozvo chinzwai, “Tenzi aisa mweya wokunyepa mumuromo yavaporofita venyu ivava. Pamatemerwa naTenzi pakaoma.”" 
2Chronicles18:23 Zedhekiya mwanakomana waKenaana akaswedera munyasi naMikaya ndokumudzemura nembama padama akati, “Mweya waTenzi wabva sei mandiri uchiuya kuzotaura wavamauri?”" 
2Chronicles18:24 Mikaya akati, “Chinzwaka, uchazvionera zvako musi wauchatizira mumba yomukati kundohwanda.”" 
2Chronicles18:25 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri ndokuti, “Batai Mikaya uyu mudzokere naye kuna Amoni mutongi weguta rino, kuna Joashi mwanakomana wamambo muti," 
2Chronicles18:26 zvanzi namambo, pfigirai muchinda uyu mujeri, mumupe chokudya nemvura zvokudzora mwoyo chete kudzamara ini ndadzokawo zvakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles18:27 Mikaya akati, “Kana mukadzoka zvakanaka Tenzi anenge asina kutaurawo nemandiri.” Ndokubvawo ati, “Zvinzwei vanhu mose!”" 
2Chronicles18:28 Saizvozvo mambo wokwaIsiraeri naJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha vakakwidza kuguta reRamoti rokuGireadhi. 
2Chronicles18:29 Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akati kuna Jehoshafati, “Ndichazvivanziridza kuita somumwewo munhu ndipindewo mukati mokurwa, asi imi mopfeka magemenzi enyu oumambo.” Mambo wokwaIsiraeri akazvivanziridza kuita somumwewo munhu ndokubva apindawo mukati mehondo." 
2Chronicles18:30 Izvozvo mambo weSiria akanga afanoudza vakuru vakuru vengoro dzake dzehondo kuti, “Regai zvenyu kuzvinetsa kuswerorwisa vakuru vakuru kana vadiki zvavo asi ingonanganai namambo wokwaIsiraeri.”" 
2Chronicles18:31 Vakuru vakuru vengoro dzehondo vaya pavakaona Jehoshafati vakati, “Ndiyeyu chete mambo wokwaIsiraeri.” Ndokubva vati naye tande kumurwisa, Jehoshafati ndokubva aridza mhere, Tenzi ndokumubatsira." 
2Chronicles18:32 Mwari akavabvisa kwaari nokuti pakaona vakuru vakuru vaye kuti haasiriye mambo wokwaIsiraeri vakabva varega kumudzingirira. 
2Chronicles18:33 Asi mumwe murume akangokandawo zvake museve wake ukabaya mambo wokwaIsiraeri nechepakati panosangana mabandiko amademautare rapadundundu nereruoko kuzvidzivirira naro muhondo. Naizvozvo akati kumuchairi wengoro yake yehondo, “Chitendeuka unditakurire kunze kwehondo. Ndakuvadzwa ini!”" 
2Chronicles18:34 Hondo yakatsviriridza musi iwoyo mambo wokwaIsiraeri ndokuramba akatsigirirwa ari mungoro yehondo akatarisa kuvaSirira kusvikira kumanheru ndokuzobva afa zuva rodoka. 
2Chronicles19:1 Jehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha akadzokera kumuzinda kwake kuJerusaremu zvakanaka. 
2Chronicles19:2 Asi Jehu mwanakomana waHanani muoni akaenda kundosangana namambo Jehoshafati akati kwaari, “Ndizvo here kubatsira wakaipa muchida vanovenga Tenzi? Pamusana paizvozvi Tenzi akuvirukirai nehasha." 
2Chronicles19:3 Kunyange zvakadaro, kune zvimwe zvakanaka zvinowanika mamuri nokuti makaparadza zvifananidzo zvokunamata zviAshera munyika ino mukaisa mwoyo wenyu pakutsvaka Mwari.”" 
2Chronicles19:4 Jehoshafati aigara muJerusaremu achiendazve muvanhu kubvira kuBheerishebha kusvikira kunyika yokwaEfuremu yemakomo achivadzosera kuna Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Akasarudza vatongi munyika umu mumaguta ose okwaJudha aiva netsvingo guta neguta. 
2Chronicles19:6 Akati kuvatongi, “Nyatsofungai zvamunoita nokuti hamutongere kufadza munhu asi Tenzi. Iye anemi pamunenge muchitonga." 
2Chronicles19:7 Saka zvino ivai vanhu vanotya Tenzi. Chenjererai zvamunoita nokuti muna Tenzi, Mwari wedu hamuna unyengedzi kana rusaruro kana kugamuchira pfumbamuromo.”" 
2Chronicles19:8 NomuJerusaremuwo Jehoshafati akasarudza muvaRevhi nomuvapristi nomuvatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzeIsiraeri vamwe vavo kuitira kuti murao waTenzi uchengetwe nokugadziridza zvinenge zvanetsa. Vaigara muJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles19:9 Zvaakavatemera ndezvokuti, “Izvozvi ndizvo zvamuchaita mukutya Tenzi nomukutendeseka nomwoyo wose." 
2Chronicles19:10 Panenge mhosva yapirwa kwamuri ichibva kuhama dzenyu dzigere mumaguta adzo iri yokudeura ropa kana yokutyora mutemo kana murao nezvirevo nezvirongwa; munofanira kuvadzidzisa kuitira kuti varege kupara mhosva pana Tenzi uye kuti arege kuvirukira nehasha imi nehama dzenyu. Izvozvo ndozvamunofanira kuita mugorega kupara mhosva. 
2Chronicles19:11 Chinzwai, mupristi mukuru Amariya ndiye anokutungamirirai mune zvinhu zvose zvaTenzi. Wokutarisa zvose zvokwamambo ndiZebhadhiya mwanakomana waIshimaeri mutongi wedzinza rokwaJudha. VaRevhi vachange varivo machinda enyu. Shingai muzviite, Tenzi ngaave zvake nomururami.”" 
2Chronicles20:1 Mushure maizvozvi, vaMoabhu navaAmoni vaine vamwe vechiMeuni vakauya kuzorwisa Jehoshafati." 
2Chronicles20:2 Kwakauya vanhu kuna Jehoshafati vakamuudza kuti, “Kuri kuuya gurusvusvu ravanhu uku kuzokurwisai richibva kumhiri kwegungwa, richibva kuEdhomu. Kutaura kuno vatova kuHazazonitamari” (ndiko kunonzi kuEngedhi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Jehoshafati akapindwa nokutya akazvipira kutsvaka Tenzi, akatumira chirevo chokuti vanhu vatsanye munyika yose yaJudha." 
2Chronicles20:4 VokwaJudha vakaunganidzana kutsvaka kubatsirwa naTenzi. Vakakotonoka mumaguta ose okwaJudha kuzotsvaka kubatsirwa naTenzi. 
2Chronicles20:5 Jehoshafati akamira mugungano revokwaJudha novemuJerusaremu, mumba yaTenzi paruvanze rutsva ruya," 
2Chronicles20:6 akati, “Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba edu, imi hamusirimi Mwari here mudenga'mu? Inga wani umambo hwose hwamarudzi avanhu huri mumaoko enyu. Uyewo ukuru nesimba zviri mumaoko enyu, zvokuti hapana angamirisane nemi." 
2Chronicles20:7 Imi Mwari wedu hamusirimi here makadzingira kunze vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri vagari venyika ino mukaipa narini wose kuzvizvarwa zvaAbhurahamu shamwari yenyu. 
2Chronicles20:8 Mavakadai kugara vakatokuvakirai mairi nzvimbo inoera, nzvimbo ine zita renyu, vachiti" 
2Chronicles20:9 kana dai kuri kuti tawirwa nenyatwa, ingave hondo iri shamhu yokuranga, kana denda, kana nzara, kana tikamira pamberi pemba ino, mberi kwenyu, pamusana pokuti zita renyu riri pamba iyoyi tikachema kwamuri tiri munhamo dzedu, imi muchateerera motiponesa." 
2Chronicles20:10 “Chionaiwo zvino, vanhu vokuAmnoni nevokuMoabhu nezvokugomo reSeiri vaya vane nyika dzamakarambidza kupinda pavakabuda kunyika yeIjipiti vaye vavakanyenyeredza vakarega kuvaparadza." 
2Chronicles20:11 Hezvi vauya kuzotitsiva nokutiburitsa munhaka yenyu yamakatipa kuti tigare. 
2Chronicles20:12 Nhai Mwari wedu mucharega here kuvaranga? Nokuti isu simba rokumirisana negurusvusvu revanhu riri kuuya kuzotirwisa hatina. Chokuita hatichaziva, chedu isu kwava kungotarisira kwamuri.”" 
2Chronicles20:13 Izvozvo vanhu vokwaJudha vose vakanga vamire mberi kwaTenzi nepwere dzavo namadzimai avo navana vavo. 
2Chronicles20:14 Mweya waTenzi wakauya pana Johazieri mwanakomana waZekariya, Zekariya aberekwa naBhenaya, Bhenaya mwanakomana waJeieri, Jeieri aberekwa nomurevhi Mataniya mumwe wavana vokwaAsafu ari mukati megungano ravanhu." 
2Chronicles20:15 Akati, “Teererai munzwe, imi mose vaJudha nemi vagari vomuJerusaremu nemi mambo Jehoshafati! Tenzi ari kuti kwamuri musatye henyu, musapazamiswe musoro negurusvusvu revanhu racho nokuti hamusirimi mucharwisa, asi kuti Mwari ndiye acharwisa." 
2Chronicles20:16 Mangwana dzikai mundovarwisa. Izvozvo vachakuvingai nokumukwidza weZizi. Muchavawana vava kwakaperera bani racho, kumabvazuva kwerenje reJerueri." 
2Chronicles20:17 Zvokurwa, hamutomborwa zvenyu ipapa. Chenyu imi kurongana mongomira zvenyu muone kukurira kwaTenzi achiitiremi, iwe Judha newe Jerusaremu. Musatye, musapazamiswe musoro nazvo. Mangwana chaiwo vabudirei, Tenzi achava nemi.”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Jehoshafati ndokubva atsikitsira pasi nouso, Judha yose navagari vomuJerusaremu vakati pasi zvambarara mberi kwaTenzi." 
2Chronicles20:19 VaRevhi vemba yokwaKohati nevokwaKora vakasimuka vachirumbidza nezwi guru Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles20:20 Vakamuka rungwanagwana vakaenda kurenje reTekoa. Pavakanga vava kuenda Jehoshafati akasimuka akati, “Judha we-e newe mugari womuJerusaremu imbonditeerai munzwe! Vimbai naTenzi, Mwari wenyu, achaita kuti mugadzikane. Vimbai navaporofita vake zvikufambirei zvakanaka.”" 
2Chronicles20:21 Kuzoti apedza kubvunza mazano kuvanhu, akasarudza vokuimbira Tenzi nokumurumbidza vakapfeka hanzu dzinoera vari mberi kwehondo vachiti, “Tendai Tenzi uye nokuti mwoyochena wake hauperi.”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Pavakatanga kuimba nokurumbidza, Tenzi akaisa vokuhwandira vaAmoni navaMoabhu nevokuGomo reSeiri vakanga vauya kuzorwisa vokwaJudha ndokubva vakurirwa." 
2Chronicles20:23 Chakaitika ndechokuti, vechiAmoni nevechiMoabhu vakamukira vagari vokuGomo reSeiri vakavatsvaira. Pavakapedza kuuraya vagari vokuSeiri ava, vose vakatobatsira nokuurayana." 
2Chronicles20:24 VokwaJudha pavakasvika pokuongorora vari panharire yomurenje vakatarisa kugurusvusvu ravanhu riya onei wangova murakatira wezvitunha pasi pasina nomumwechete akanga apunyuka. 
2Chronicles20:25 Pakaenda Jehoshafati navanhu vake kundotora zvinhu zvokupamba kwavari, vakasvikowana kuna matanga namatanga emombe nemidziyo nehanzu nezvinhu zvinokosha kwazvo zvavakatora zvavo kuita zvavo, kusvikira pokuti kutakura zvimwe vakanga vasisagoni. Vakaita mazuva matatu ese vachitora zvavo zvinhu zvokupamba, zvakanga zvakawanda." 
2Chronicles20:26 Pazuva rechina vakaungana muBani rokurumbidza nokuti imomo ndomavakarumbidza Tenzi ndokusaka pakatumidzwa zita rokuti Bani rokurumbidza kusvikira pari nhasi. 
2Chronicles20:27 Vakazodzoka, munhu wose zvake wokwaJudha nowomuJerusaremu, izvozvo Jehoshafati achivatungamirira vachidzokera Jerusaremu, vasingagone nokufara nokuti Tenzi akanga aita kuti vafarire zvakanga zvaitwa vavengi vake." 
2Chronicles20:28 Vakasvika kuJerusaremu kumba yaTenzi madimbwa achiridzwa, zvipendani zvichidandaura, iwo mabhosvo achirira." 
2Chronicles20:29 Umambo hwenyika dzose hwakabatwa nokutya Mwari, pavakanga vanzwa kuti uku Tenzi akarwisa vavengi veIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles20:30 Nokudaro umambo hwaJehoshafati hwakava norunyararo nokuti Mwari wake akamupa runyararo kumativi ose. 
2Chronicles20:31 Uku ndokutonga kwakaita Jehoshafati kwaJudha. Akanga ava namakore makumi matatu namashanu paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore makumi maviri namashanu ari muJerusaremu. Amai vake vainzi Azubha mwanasikana waShirihi. 
2Chronicles20:32 Akatevera makwara ose ababa vake Asa asingambotsaukamo achiita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi. 
2Chronicles20:33 Zvakadaro zvazvo, nzvimbo dziye dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira hadzina kubviswa. Vanhu vakanga vasati vaisa mwoyo yavo kuna Mwari wemadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles20:34 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehoshafati kubvira pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzesera, dzakanyorwa wani muNhoroondo dzaJehu mwanakomana waHanani, munhoroondo dziri muBhuku reMadzimambo eIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles20:35 Mushure maizvozvi Jehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha akaita rimwe naAhaziya mambo wokwaIsiraeri aiita zvakaipa. Akabatana naye mukugadzira ngarava dzokuenda kuTarishishi. 
2Chronicles20:36 Vakagadzira ngarava idzodzo kuEzionigebheru. 
2Chronicles20:37 Ndopakaporofita Eriezeru, mwanakomana waDhodhavhawu wokuMaresha Jehoshafati achiti, “Pamusana pokuti maita rimwe naAhaziya Tenzi achaparadza zvamagadzira.” Ngarava dzacho dzakaparadzwa dzikatadza kusvika kuTarishishi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Jehoshafati akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake akavigwa pamwechete namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake Jehoramu ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Chronicles21:2 Jehoramu aiva nevanun'una, vana vaJehoshafati ava vanoti: Azariya naMikaeri naJehieri naZekariya naAzariya naShefatiya. Vose ivava vana vaJehoshafati mambo wokwaJudha." 
2Chronicles21:3 Baba wavo vakavapa zvipo zvikuru zvesirivha nendarama nezvimwewo zvinhu zvakakosha pamwechete namaguta ane tsvingo okwaJudha. Asi umambo akapa kuna Jehoramu nokuti ndiye aiva dangwe. 
2Chronicles21:4 Jehoramu paakagara pachigara choumambo chababa vake zvino adzika midzi, akauraya nebakatwa vanun'una vake vose uyewo mamwe machinda eIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoramu akanga ava namakumi matatu amakore namakore maviri paakava mambo, akatonga ari muJerusaremu kwamakore masere." 
2Chronicles21:6 Iye akatevedzera makwara amadzimambo okwaIsiraeri sezvakanga zvaitwa nevemba yaAhabhu nokuti mudzimai wake aiva mukunda waAhabhu. Akaitawo zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi. 
2Chronicles21:7 Zvakadaro zvazvo Tenzi haana kuparadza imba yaDhavhidhi pamusana pechitenderano chaakanga aita naDhavhidhi sezvo akanga atsidzira kumupa mwenje unogara uchipfuta nokusingapere iye navanakomana vokwake. 
2Chronicles21:8 Panguva yake Edhomu yakapanduka ikaramba zvokutongwa nevokwaJudha ikazvigadzirawo mambo wayo. 
2Chronicles21:9 Uyu Jehoramu ndokuyambukirako aina vakuru vake vehondo nengoro dzose dzehondo. Akamuka nousiku akauraya vaEdhomu vakanga vamukomba iye navakuru vakuru vake vehondo. 
2Chronicles21:10 Nokudaro Edhomu yakapanduka ikaramba zvokutongwa nevokwaJudha kusvikira pari nhasi. Panguva iyoyo guta reRibhuna rakapandukawo rikarambawo zvokutongwa naye pamusana pokuti akanga afuratira Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:11 Uyewo akagadzira nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira munyika yokwaJudha yamakomo akakwezvera vagari vomuJerusaremu muunzenza hwokunamata zvinhu zvisiri Mwari akaendesa vokwaJudha mutome. 
2Chronicles21:12 Kwakauya tsamba kwaari ichibva kumuporofita Eriya ichiti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari watateguru wenyu Dhavhidhi, ‘Pamusana pokuti hauna kutevedza makwara ababa wako Jehoshafati kana makwara aAsa mambo wokwaJudha" 
2Chronicles21:13 ukatotevedza zvako gwara remadzimambo okwaIsiraeri ukakwezvera Judha nevagari vomuJerusaremu muunzenza hwokunamata zvinhu zvisiri Mwari sokutungamirira kwakaita imba yaAhabhu vokwaIsiraeri mukusatendeka uyewo ukaurayaka iwe vanun'una vako vomumba vaitova vanhu vari nani kunewe," 
2Chronicles21:14 chinzwa, Tenzi achaunza denda guru kwazvo pavanhu vako nepavana vako nepavakadzi vako nepaupfumi hwako hwose." 
2Chronicles21:15 Iyewewo uchava nechirwere chakaipisisa kwazvo, chirwere chomudumbu kudzamara ura hwako hwongoramba kuchibuda pamusana pechirwere chacho zuva nezuva.’ ”" 
2Chronicles21:16 Tenzi akaita kuti vaFirisitia nevaArabhu vari pedyo nevaItiopia vaite hasha vamukire Jehoramu. 
2Chronicles21:17 Vakavinga Judha vakairwisa vakakukucha zvinhu zvose zvavakawana zvomumuzinda wamambo uyewo nevana vake vakomana navakadzi vake zvokuti hapana mwana waakasiyirwa kunze kwaJehoahazi mwanakomana wake mudiki. 
2Chronicles21:18 Mushure mezvose izvozvi, Tenzi akamurova nedenda romudumbu risingarapiki." 
2Chronicles21:19 Nokufamba kwenguva, kwapera makore maviri, ura hwake hwakabuda pamusana pechirwere ichochi akafa achirwadziwa zvikuru. Vanhu vake havana kumuitira moto wokumuremekedza nawo semoto yaiitirwa madzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles21:20 Paakatangisa kutonga akanga ava namakore makumi matatu namaviri. Akatonga kwemakore masere ari muJerusaremu. Paakashaya hapana akamuchema. Vakamuviga muGuta raDhavhidhi, kwete mumakuva emadzimambo." 
2Chronicles22:1 Vagari vomuJerusaremu vakagadza Ahaziya mwanakomana wake muduku umambo panzvimbo pake nokuti chikwata chavanhu chiya chokuuya navaArabhu kuzorwisa chakanga chauraya vana vacho vakomana vakuru. Ipapo Ahaziya mwanakomana waJehoramu mambo wokwaJudha ndiye akatonga. 
2Chronicles22:2 Ahaziya akanga ava namakore makumi mana namaviri paakatanga kutonga, akatonga kwegore rimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Atariya muzukuru waOmuri."
