2Chronicles22:3 Ahaziya akatevedzerawo makwara evemba yaAhabhu nokuti amai vake ndivo vaimurunya uipi. 
2Chronicles22:4 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi sezvaiitwa nevemba yaAhabhu. Chaidariso ndechokuti ndivo vakasara vava vokumupa mazano baba wake afa, zvikamusvitsa mukuparadzwa." 
2Chronicles22:5 Akatevedza mazano avo kusvikira pakutozoenda zvake naJehoramu mwanakomana waAhabhu mambo wokwaIsiraeri kundorwisa Hazaeri mambo weSiria kuRamoti rokuGireadhi. VaSiria vakakuvadza Joramu," 
2Chronicles22:6 akabva adzokera kuJezirieri kundorapwa maronda aakanga akuvadzwa kuRama paakarwisa Hazaeri mambo weSiria. Ahaziya mwana waJehoramu mambo wokwaJudha akadzika kuJezirieri kundoona Jehoramu mwana waAhabhu sezvo ainge achirwara. 
2Chronicles22:7 Asi izvi zvakanga zvava chinhu chabva kuna Mwari kuti Ahaziya uyu pake pachimuperera nokushanyira Joramu kwaainge aita nokuti chakazoitika ndechokuti, paakasvikako akazobudawo pamwechete naJehoramu kundosangana naJehu mwanakomana waNimishi uya wokuzodzwa naTenzi kuti aparadze imba yaAhabhu." 
2Chronicles22:8 Jehu paakanga achiranga vemba yaAhabhu akasangana nemachinda okwaJudha navanakomana vevakoma navanun'una vaAhaziya, vaishandira Ahaziya, ndokubva avauraya." 
2Chronicles22:9 Akavhima Ahaziya, akazobatwa akahwanda kuSamaria. Akauyiwa naye kuna Jehu akaurayiwa. Vakamuviga nokuti vaiti uyu muzukuru waJehoshafati uya akatsvaka Tenzi nomwoyo wake wose. Kwakasara kusisina munhu wemba yaAhaziya aikwanisa kutonga nyika iyi." 
2Chronicles22:10 Amai vaAhaziya, Atariya pavakaona kuti mwanakomana wavo afa, vakasimuka vakauraya vose vokumba huru vedzinza rokwaJudha." 
2Chronicles22:11 Asi Jehoshebha mukunda wamambo, akatora Joashi mwanakomana waAhaziya akamusvovesera mumba mokurara, iye nomureri wake pakati pevanakomana vamambo vakanga voda kuurayiwa. Ndozvakaitwa naJehoshebha mukunda wamambo Jehoramu mudzimai womupristi Jehoyadha nokuti vaiva hanzvadzi yaAhaziya vachimuhwandisa kuna Atariya naizvozvo haana kumuuraya." 
2Chronicles22:12 Akava navo kwamakore matanhatu akahwanda mumba yaMwari, Atariya achitonga nyika iyi." 
2Chronicles23:1 Kuzoti mava mugore rechinomwe, Jehoyadha akatsunga mwoyo akaita chitsidzirano navatungamriri vezana ava vanoti Azariya mwanakomana waJerohamu naIshimaeri mwanakomana waJehohanani naAzariya mwanakomana waObhedhi naMaaseya mwanakomana waAdhaya naErishafati mwanakomana waZikiri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Vakabvongodza nyika yokwaJudha vachikokorodza vaRevhi mumaguta okwaJudha ose navakuru vakuru vemadzinza eIsiraeri vakauya kuJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles23:3 Gungano rose rakaita chibvumirano namambo vari mumba yaMwari. Jehoyadha akati kwavari, “Hoyu mwanakomana wamambo! Regai achitonga sokutaura kwakaita Tenzi pamusoro pevanakomana vaDhavhidhi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Zvamunofanira kuzoita ndezvizvi: vapristi nevaRevhi vaya pazvikwata zvitatu zvinouya kuzoita basa musi weSabata; chikwata chimwechete ngachichengetedze pamisuo mikuru," 
2Chronicles23:5 chimwe chive pamuzinda wamambo, chimwe chiri paSuo Guru roUgaro, vanhu vose vave muzvivanze zvepamba yaTenzi." 
2Chronicles23:6 Ngakurege kuva nomunhu anopinda mumba yaTenzi kunze kwevapristi nevaRevhi vanoshandamo, vangapinde zvavo nokuti vanhu vakatsaurwa vatsvene. Asi vanhu vose ngavachengete zvakatemwa naTenzi." 
2Chronicles23:7 VaRevhi vanofanira kukuta vakatenderedza mambo mumwe nomumwe akabata mumaoko zvombo zvake zvehondo. Kuwana anenge angofemera kupinda mumba macho ngaauraiwe. Ivai namambo paanopinda napaanobuda.” 
2Chronicles23:8 VaRevhi nevose vokwaJudha vakaita zvose zvakanga zvanzi nomupristi Jehoyadha zviitwe. Mumwe nomumwe wavo akauya navanhu vake vakanga vasingafanire kuuya pabasa musi weSabata navaye vakanga vachifanira kuva pabasa musi weSabata pamusana pokuti mupristi Jehoyadha haana kunga ati zvikwata zvacho zviende. 
2Chronicles23:9 Mupristi Jehoyadha akaisa mumaoko avakuru vakuru vehondo nenhoo huru nediki dzaimbenge dziri dzamambo Dhavhidhi dzaiva mumba yaMwari. 
2Chronicles23:10 Akaronga vanhu vose kuti vachengetedze mambo, munhu wose akabata mumaoko chombo chake chehondo kubvira kumaodzanyemba kwemba kusvikira kuchamhembe kutenderedza atari nemba yamambo." 
2Chronicles23:11 Akabva aburitsa mwanakomana wamambo akamudzika ngundu youmambo akamupa bumbiro romutemo akazivisa kuti ndiye mambo. Jehoyadha navanakomana vake vakabva vamuzodza mafuta vachimugadza vakati, “Mambo ngazvirambe zvakadaro!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Pakanzwa Atariya zhowezhowe ravanhu vaimhanya vachirumbidza mambo akaenda kumba yaTenzi kuvanhu. 
2Chronicles23:13 Paakatarisa akaona hoyo mambo amire pedyo nomusimboti wake kumusuo, vakuru vakuru vehondo nevokuridza mabhosvo vamire namambo, vanhu vose venyika iyi vachipembera kufara, mabhosvo achirira, vaimbi vachiridza midziyo yokuimbisa vachitotungamirira pakupemberera kwacho; Atariya akabvarura hanzu neshungu dzake akadaidzira achiti, “Kwapandukwa! Kwapandukwa!”" 
2Chronicles23:14 Mupristi Jehoyadha akaudza vakuru vakuru vokutungamirira hondo kuti, “Mubvisei mumitsetse yevachengetedzi mumuburitse muuraye nebakatwa ani naani anenge woda kutsigirana naye.” Izvozvo mupristi aiti haafaniri kuurayirwa mumba yaTenzi." 
2Chronicles23:15 Nokudaro vakamubata akapfuura nepaSuo Guru reMabhiza repamuzinda wamambo vakamuurayirapo. 
2Chronicles23:16 Jehoyadha akaitisa chibvumirano pakati pake navanhu vose namambo chokuti vave vanhu vaTenzi. 
2Chronicles23:17 Vanhu vose ivavo vakaenda kumba yaBhaari vakaipaza. Atari dzake nezvifananidzo zvake vakazvipwanya-pwanya vakauraya Matani mupristi waBhaari pamberi peatari dzacho. 
2Chronicles23:18 Jehoyadha akabva aisa vokugaririra pamba paTenzi vachitungamirirwa navapristi vechiRevhi navaRevhi vakanga varongwa naDhavhidhi kuti vave vokuona nezvemba yaTenzi kuti vapote vachipira mipiro yokupisa kuna Tenzi sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo waMosesi vachipembera kufara nokuimba maererano nezvakanga zvanzi naDhavhidhi zviitwe. 
2Chronicles23:19 Akaisa vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru pamisuo mikuru yepamba paTenzi kuti parege kupinda ani zvake anenge akan'ora nenzira ipi neipi zvayo. 
2Chronicles23:20 Akatora vakuru vakuru vehondo navamwe vakuru vakuru namasadunhu avanhu navanhu vose venyika iyi vakandotora mambo kumba yaTenzi vakadzika naye vakapfuura napasuo guru roKumusoro rokumuzinda wamambo. Vakagarisa mambo pachigaro choumambo. 
2Chronicles23:21 Vanhu vose venyika iyi vakapembera kufara, muguta mukava norunyararo mushure mokunge Atariya aurayiwa nebakatwa." 
2Chronicles24:1 Joashi akanga ava namakore manomwe paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakumi mana emakore ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Zibhiya vokuBheerishebha. 
2Chronicles24:2 Joashi akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi mazuva ose oupenyu hwomupristi Jehoyadha. 
2Chronicles24:3 Jehoyadha akamuroorera vakadzi vaviri ndokubva ava navana vakomana navasikana. 
2Chronicles24:4 Shure kwaizvozvi Joashi akaronga kugadzira imba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles24:5 Akakokorodza vapristi nevaRevhi akavati, “Endai kumaguta omunyika maJudha muunganidze mari yokugadzirisa imba yaMwari wenyu gore negore, mukurumidze kuita izvozvo.” Asi vaRevhi havana kuchimbidzika." 
2Chronicles24:6 Mambo akadaidza mukuru wacho Jehoyadha akamuti, “Ko makazoregereiko kuti vaRevhi vaunze maJudha umu nomuJerusaremu mutero womutendhe rechitenderano wakatemwa naMosesi muranda waTenzi negungano reIsiraeri?”" 
2Chronicles24:7 Zvaiva zvaitika ndezvokuti vanakomana vaAtariya mukadzi wokuipa mwoyo uya vakanga vapaza vakapinda mumba yaTenzi uyewo vakanga vashandisira vanaBhaari zvinhu zvose zvaiva zvateketererwa kuna Mwari zvepamba paTenzi. 
2Chronicles24:8 Ipapo mambo akapa chirevo vakagadzira zibhokisi guru rikaiswa nechokunze pasuo guru remba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles24:9 Kwakaziviswa maJudha mose nomuJerusaremu kuti kuna Tenzi kuunzwe mutero wakatemerwa vaIsiraeri vachiri murenje naMosesi muranda waMwari. 
2Chronicles24:10 Machinda ose navanhu vose vakafara kwazvo vakaunza mutero wavo vachikanda muzibhokisi iri kusvikira vazopedza. 
2Chronicles24:11 Zibhokisi guru iri parakaunzwa navaRevhi kumachinda amambo ivo vaiti vakaona kuti mune mari yawanda; samunyori mukuru wokwamambo nomuchinda womupristi mukuru vaiuya voibvisa muzibhokisi racho voritakura voridzosera panzvimbo paro. Ndozvavaiita zuva nezuva vakaunganidza mari yakawanda. 
2Chronicles24:12 Mambo naJehoyadha vaizoipa kune vaiva vokuona nezvebasa remba yaTenzi; ivavowo vaizobhadhara vokuvaka namatombo navavezi kugadzira imba yaTenzi uyewo nemhizha dzezvinhu zvesimbi nezvendarira kuti imba yaTenzi igadzirwe. 
2Chronicles24:13 Nokudaro vanhu vaiva vokuita basa irori vakashanda. Mumaoko avo, basa iri rakaramboitwa vakagadzira imba yaMwari kudzosera voiita zvayakanga yakaita vachiisimbisa." 
2Chronicles24:14 Pavakapedza, imwe mari yose yakanga yasara vakaiendesa kuna mambo navaJehoyadha ikagadziriswa midziyo yomumba yaTenzi yokushandisamo neyepamipiro yokupisa uye nemadhishi orusenzi nemidziyo yendarama neyesirivha. Vakazogara zvino vachipira mipiro yokupisa mumba yaTenzi mazuva ose oupenyu hwavaJehoyadha." 
2Chronicles24:15 Asi kwakati zvino vaJehoyadha akwegura aita ndaramo chaiyo, akafa. Akafa ava nezana remakore rine makore makumi matatu." 
2Chronicles24:16 Vakamuviga muguta raDhavhidhi maivigwawo madzimambo pamusana pokuti akanga aita zvakanaka muIsiraeri kuna Mwari nokutemberi yake. 
2Chronicles24:17 Mushure mokufa kwaJehoyadha, machinda okwaJudha akaenda akandogwadamira mambo, mambo akabvumirana nezvavakataura." 
2Chronicles24:18 Vakafuratira imba yaTenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo vakandonamata zvifananidzo zviAshera nezvimwe zvifananidzo zvokunamata. Mhaka iyoyi yakapfukira vokwaJudha nevomuJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles24:19 Mwari akatuma vaporofita mukati mavo kuti vavadzorere kuna Tenzi, ivava ava vakavayambira asi havana kumboteerera." 
2Chronicles24:20 Mweya waMwari wakafukidza Zekariya mwanakomana wavaJehoyadha mupristi akamira pakadaro apo akatarisa pavanhu akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naTenzi munodarikirei mitemo yaTenzi zviri kukusakisai kudai kuti mutadze kubudirira? Pamusana pokuti mafuratira Tenzi iyewo akufuratiraiwo.”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Asi ivo vakamuitira bangano. Mambo akamuurayisa navanhu vakamutema namatombo muchivanze chemba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles24:22 Mambo Joashi haana kumborangarira mwoyochena waakaitirwa nababa vaZakaria vaJehoyadha asi kuti akatouraya mwanakomana wake iyeyu. Paakanga ava kufa akati, “Tenzi ngaakuonei awane zvaangaite nemi.”" 
2Chronicles24:23 Kuzoti gore ropera hondo yavaSiria yakauya kuzorwisa Joashi. Yakauya kwaJudha nokuJerusaremu ikaparadza mukati mevanhu machinda ose avanhu ikatumira zvinhu zvayo zvose zvayakapamba kuna mambo weDhamasikusi. 
2Chronicles24:24 Kunyange zvazvo hondo yavaSiria iyi yakanga yauya navarume vokurwa vashomanini, Tenzi akaisa mumaoko avo hondo huru kwazvo nokuti vakanga vafuratira Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo. Ndozvakaita vaSiria kuranga Joashi." 
2Chronicles24:25 Pavakabva paari vakamusiya akuvara kwazvo. Makurukota ake akarangana kumupandukira pamusana peropa raakadeura ravanakomana vokwaJehoyadha mupristi vakabva vamuuraya pamubhedha wake akafa. Vakamuviga muguta raDhavhidhi, asi havana kumuviga mumakuva emadzimambo." 
2Chronicles24:26 Vananyakumupandukira ava ndivanaZabhadhi mwanakomana wavaShimea mumwe mukadzi wechiAmoni naJehozabhadhi mwanakomanawo womumwe mukadziwo wechiMoabhu ainzi Shimuriti. 
2Chronicles24:27 Nyaya dzezvevana vake vakomana nokutsiurwa kwose kwaaiitwa naMwari nokugadzira kwaakaita imba yaMwari zvakanyorwa Mubhuku Rokutsanangura zviri muBhuku reMadzimambo. Mwanakomana wake, Amaziya, ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amaziya akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakumi maviri amakore ana makore mapfumbamwe ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Jehoadhani vomuJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles25:2 Iye akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi asi akanga asina kunyatsoti tsvikiti pamwoyo pake. 
2Chronicles25:3 Umambo pahwakanga zvino hwava mumaoko ake chaizvo akauraya makurukota akauraya mambo, baba vake." 
2Chronicles25:4 Asi haana kuuraya vana vavaurayi ava sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mubhuku romutemo waMosesi panonzi naTenzi, “Madzibaba haafaniri kuurayirwa mhosva dzavana. Vanawo havafaniri kuurayirwa mhosva dzamadzibaba. Munhu wose anofira mhosva yake iye pachake.”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amaziya akazokokorodza varume vokuhondo vokwaJudha akavaronga imba nemba vari pasi pevatungamiriri vezviuru nevemazana vari vose zvavo vokwaJudha nevokwaBhenjamini. Akaverenga vaiva namakore makumi maviri zvichikwira akawana vari zviuru mazana matatu zvavarume chaivo vakanyatsosarudzwa vanogona kuenda kuhondo vaigona kutakura nhoo nemapfumo. 
2Chronicles25:6 Akakokawo varwi vokwaIsiraeri mvumba chaidzo, magamba okurwa hondo zana rezviuru vaakaita zvokubvisira mari yesirivha inorema matani mana." 
2Chronicles25:7 Asi mumwe munhu waMwari akauya kwaari akati, “Mambo! Regai zvenyu kuendako nehondo yokwaIsiraeri nokuti Tenzi haasi nevokwaIsiraeri, uye haasiri navose vekwaEfuremu ava." 
2Chronicles25:8 Kunyange mukati ndoita chivindi chokurwa hondo, asi Mwari achakuputsirai pasi pamberi pevavengi vacho nokuti Mwari ane simba rokubatsira kana rokuumburudza munhu pasi.”" 
2Chronicles25:9 Amaziya ndokuti kumunhu waMwari, “Zvino toita sei namatani mana esirivha andakapa kuhondo yokwaIsiraeri.” Munhu waMwari akapindura achiti, “Tenzi anogona kukupai yakawanda kutopinda iyoyo.”" 
2Chronicles25:10 Ipapo Amaziya akakotonotsa hondo yakanga yauya kwaari yabva kwaEfuremu kuti vaende zvavo kumusha. Ivo vakabva vavirukira vokwaJudha nehasha kwazvo vakadzokera kumusha vakapaka kwazvo nadzo. 
2Chronicles25:11 Asi Amaziya akatsunga mwoyo akabuda otungamirira vanhu vake akaenda kuBani roMunyu akauraya gumi rezviuru zvevanhu vokuSeiri. 
2Chronicles25:12 Varume vokwaJudha vakabata vamwe gumi rezviuru vari vapenyu vakaenda navo pamusoro peibwe, ndokuvatozomotsera pasi vose vakapwatikira pasi." 
2Chronicles25:13 Asi varwi vaye vehondo iya yokudzorwa naAmaziya asisavabvumire kuenda naye kuhondo vakarwisa maguta okwaJudha kubvira kuSamaria kudzamara kuBhetihoroni vakauraya zviuru zvitatu zvavanhu. Vakakukucha kupamba zvinhu. 
2Chronicles25:14 Kuzoti Amaziya adzoka kuya kwaakandouraya vaEdhomu akauya navamwari vokuSeiri akavamisa savamwariwo vake akabva ovanamata otopira zvake mipiro kwavari. 
2Chronicles25:15 Naizvozvo Tenzi akashatiririrwa Amaziya akamutumira muporofita akasvikoti kwaari, “Chawavakuendera kune vamwari vevanhu vechirudzi vasinakukwanisa kununura vanhu vavo mumaoko avo chii?”" 
2Chronicles25:16 Asi achingunotaura kudaro mambo akamugamha achiti, “Zviye takakusarudza kuti uve jinda ramambo nhai? Chinyarara! Chowofirawo zvako chii ipapa?” Muporofita ndiye zii zvake asi akangoti, “Chandinoziva ini ndechokuti Mwari afunga zvokukuparadzai pamusana pezvamakaita uye nokusateerera zano rangu.”" 
2Chronicles25:17 Amaziya mambo wokwaJudha akabvunza mazano akatuma nhume kuna Jehoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mwanakomana waJehu mambo wokwaIsiraeri achiti, “Uya timirisane.”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Jehoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri akatumawo nhume kuna Amaziya mambo wokwaJudha achiti, “Kananga kepaRebhanoni kakatumira nhume kumuti womusidhari wepaRebhanoni kachiti, ‘Rega mwanasikana wako aroorwe nomwanakomana wangu ave mukadzi wake.’ Chimwe chikara chomuRebhanoni chakapfuura nepo chikakatsikirira pasi." 
2Chronicles25:19 Unotika iwe wakakurira Edhomu chaizvo ukabva waita zenze kuzvikudza. Zvino iwe gara zvako kumba. Unodirei kuzvidenhera nhamo inokuridibura iwe pamwechete naJudha?” 
2Chronicles25:20 Asi Amaziya haana kumbozviteerera nokuti zvaiva zvaMwari aida kuvaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo pamusana pokuti vakanga vavakunamata vamwari vechiEdhomu. 
2Chronicles25:21 Jehoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri akakwirako, iye naAmaziya mambo wokwaJudha vakamirisana kurwa hondo kuBhetishemeshi rokwaJudha." 
2Chronicles25:22 VokwaJudha vakakurirwa novokwaIsiraeri munhu wose rikava bararamhanya kutizira kumusha. 
2Chronicles25:23 Jehoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri akabata Amaziya mambo wokwaJudha mwanakomana waJoashi mwanakomana Ahaziya kuBhetishemeshi. Akaenda naye kuJerusaremu akapaza mbimbi yorusvingo rweJerusaremu inoita mamita mazana maviri kubvira pasuo guru raEfuremu kusvikira pasuo guru rapaKona. 
2Chronicles25:24 Akapamba ndarama yose nesirivha nemidziyo yose yaiva mumba yaMwari zvainge zviri mumaoko aObhedoedhomu. Akapambawo upfumi hwomumuzinda wamambo. Akatorawo nhapwa ndokubva adzokera kuSamaria. 
2Chronicles25:25 Amaziya mwanakomana waJoashi mambo wokwaJudha akagara makore gumi namashanu mushure mokufa kwaJoashi mwanakomana waJehoahazi mambo wokwaIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles25:26 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaAmaziya kubvira pakutanga kusvikira pokupedzesera dzakanyorwa wani muBhuku raMadzimambo okwaJudha neokwaIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles25:27 Kubvira paakafuratira Tenzi, vakaita bangano rokumupandukira muJerusaremu, iye akabva atizira kuRakishi. Asi vakatuma vanhu kuRakishi vakamuurayira ikoko." 
2Chronicles25:28 Vakauya naye vakamutakura nemabhiza akavigwa pamwechete namadzibaba ake muguta raDhavhidhi. 
2Chronicles26:1 Vanhu vose vokwaJudha vakatora Uziya akanga ava namakore gumi namatanhatu vakamugadza umambo panzvimbo pababa vake Amaziya. 
2Chronicles26:2 Akavaka guta reEroti akaridzosera kune vokwaJudha mushure mokunge mambo aendawo kwakaenda vamwe madzitatuguru ake. 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya akanga ava namakore gumi namatanhatu paakatanga kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore makumi mashanu namaviri ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi vaJekoriya vomuJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles26:4 Iyeyu akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi sezvakaitwa nababa vake Amaziya. 
2Chronicles26:5 Akaisa mwoyo mune zvokutsvaka Mwari mumazuva oupenyu hwavaZekariya vaimudzidzisa kutya Mwari achitsvaka Tenzi kudaro, Mwari akaita kuti abudirirewo." 
2Chronicles26:6 Akabudira vaFirisitia akandovarwisa akapaza rusvingo rweguta reGati norusvingo rweguta reJabhune norusvingo rweguta reAshidhodhi. Akavaka maguta mudunhu reAshidhodhi nokumwewo mukati mevaFirisitia. 
2Chronicles26:7 Mwari akamubatsira kurwisa vaFirisitia nevaArabhu vaigara kuGurubhaari uye kurwisa vechiMeuni. 
2Chronicles26:8 VaAmoni vaitera mutero kuna Uziya, mukurumbira wake ukasvika kumuganhu neIjipiti kwose nokuti akanga azova nemasimba kwazvo." 
2Chronicles26:9 Chimwe ndechokuti, Uziya akavaka nharire muJerusaremu pasuo guru repaKona nesuo guru rokuBani napakona pacho akadzivakirira norusvingo." 
2Chronicles26:10 Akavakawo nharire kurenje akafonon'ona mabwe kuita magaringiro mazhinji okuchengetedza mvura nokuti aiva namatanga namatanga emombe makuru kwazvo kunyika yamanhika yeShefera nokubani. Aivawo navarimi nevokuchengetedza migirepisi muzvikomo nomuminda ine vhu chairo rakanaka pamusana pokuti zvourimi izvi aizvida. 
2Chronicles26:11 Chimwewo ndechokuti Uziya uyu akanga aine hondo yevarwi vaigona kuenda kuhondo vari chikwata nechikwata sokuverengwa kwavakaitwa vachirongwa nasamunyori mukuru Jeieri nerimwe jinda rainzi Maaseya vachitungamirirwa naHananiya mumwe wevatungamiriri vokwamambo. 
2Chronicles26:12 Vakuru vakuru vedzimhuri vaiva mvumba chaidzo, magamba okurwa hondo vose pamwechete vaiva zviuru zviviri zvine mazana matanhatu avanhu." 
2Chronicles26:13 Vaitungamirira hondo yavarwi yaiita zviuru mazana matatu ane zvinomwe ane vanhu mazana mashanu vaikwanisa kurwa hondo nesimba guru kwazvo vokubatsira mambo kurwisa muvengi. 
2Chronicles26:14 Uziya akagadzirira hondo yose nhoo nemapfumo nenguwani dzoutare nemademautare okuzvidzivirira nawo nouta namatombo okukanda nezvimviriri. 
2Chronicles26:15 MuJerusaremu akagadzirira michini yakanga yafungwa ikagadzirwa nedzimwe ngwazi dzavanhu kuti ishandiswe panharirire nepamakona yokukandisa miseve namatombo. Mukurumbira wake wakapararira kure kure nokuti akabatsirwa zvisina akamboona kudakara ava namasimba. 
2Chronicles26:16 Pakanga zvino Uziya ava namasimba kudaro akatanga kuzvikudza zvikazomuparadza. Chakaitika ndechokuti haana kuva pachokwadi naTenzi, Mwari wake. Akapinda mutemberi yaTenzi kundopisa rusenzi paatari yourusenzi." 
2Chronicles26:17 Asi mupristi Azariya pamwechete nevapristi vaTenzi vane chivindi makumi masere vakamuteveramo. 
2Chronicles26:18 Vakasvikira mambo Uziya vakamuti, “Uziya iwe zvokupisira rusenzi kuna Tenzi hazvisi zvenyuka izvi, asi ndezvevapristi vanakomana vokwaAroni vakateketererwa kuna Mwari kuti vapise rusenzi. Ibva munzvimbo inoera nokuti watotadzira Tenzi Mwari haambokuremekedza nazvo.”" 
2Chronicles26:19 Uziya akashatirwa, izvozvo akanga akabata mumaoko bisiro rokupisira rusenzi. Ashatirirwa vapristi kudaro, akabva abuda maperembudzi pahuma pake, pana vapristi ipapo mumba yaTenzi pedyo neatari yorusenzi." 
2Chronicles26:20 Azariya mupristi mukuru navapristi vose vakatarisa kwaari, onei atova nemaperembudzi pahuma. Vakamuburitsa nokukurumidza. Iyewo akakasika kubuda nokuti Tenzi akanga amurova neshamhu." 
2Chronicles26:21 Mambo Uziya akazogara ava munhu ana maperembudzi kudzimara musi wokufa kwake. Somunhuwo aiva nemaperembudzi kudaro aigara ari kwake oga mumba, pamusana pokuti akanga asisabvumirwe mumba yaTenzi. Mwanakomana wake Jotamu ndiye akava samusha womumuzinda wamambo achitonga vanhu munyikamo." 
2Chronicles26:22 Dzimwe nyaya dzezvaUziya kubvira pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzesera dzakanyorwa nomuporofita Isaya, mwanakomana waAmozi." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uziya akazovatawo oenda kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake. Vakamuviga pamwechete nemadzibaba ake kunzvimbo yemakuva aivigwa madzimambo nokuti vakati, “Ane maperembudzi.” Mwana wake Jotamu ndiye akatonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Chronicles27:1 Jotamu akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore gumi namatanhatu ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Jerusha mwanasikana waZadhoki. 
2Chronicles27:2 Jotamu akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi sezvakaitwawo nababa vake Uziya, chete uyu haana kuzopindira mune zvomuTemberi yaTenzi. Asi vanhu vakanga vachiri kungoita zvakaipa." 
2Chronicles27:3 Akavaka Suo Guru roKumusoro repamba paTenzi. Akavakiridza zvakanyanya kwazvo Madziro eOfero. 
2Chronicles27:4 Akavakawo maguta kunyika yokwaJudha yamakomo, mumasango akavaka maguta etsvingo nenharire." 
2Chronicles27:5 Akarwisana namadzimambo avaAmoni akavakurira. Gore iroro vaAmoni vakatera mutero wamatani mana esirivha, nechiuru chamatani ekoroni nechiuruwo chematani ebhari. VaAmoni vakabvisa mutero mumwechetewo mugore rechipiri nerechitatu racho." 
2Chronicles27:6 Saizvozvo Jotamu akava namasimba pamusana pokuti akaruramisa makwara ake pana Tenzi, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles27:7 Dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJotamu nehondo dzaakarwa namaitiro ake, zvakanyorwa muBhuku reMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri newokwaJudha. Akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatangisa kutonga." 
2Chronicles27:8 Akatonga kwemakore gumi namatanhatu ari muJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles27:9 Jotamu akazovatawo oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake. Vakamuviga muguta raDhavhidhi. Mwanakomana wake, Ahazi ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo yake." 
2Chronicles28:1 V: KUSANDURA ZVIKURU KWAKAITWA NEHEZEKIYA NAJOSIYA A: ZVITADZO ZVAAHAZI, BABA WAHEZEKIYA. Ahazi akanga ava namakore makumi maviri paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore gumi namatanhatu ari muJerusaremu. Haana kuita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi sezvakaitwa natateguru wake Dhavhidhi," 
2Chronicles28:2 asi akatevedza gwara remadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. Akatosvika pakugadzira zvifananidzo zvaBhaari zvoutare hwokunyungurutsa. 
2Chronicles28:3 Akapisira rusenzi mubani romwanakomana wokwaHinoni. Akapisawo vanakomana vake sechibayiro samaitiro akaipisisa kwazvo aiitwa namarudzi aye akadzingirwa vaIsiraeri naTenzi. 
2Chronicles28:4 Akapira zvibayiro akapisa rusenzi panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzacho napamwe pakatunhumara nomumimvuri yose yemiti minyoro. 
2Chronicles28:5 Naizvozvo Tenzi, Mwari wake akamuisa mumaoko amambo weSiria akamukurira akatapa gurusvusvu chairo revanhu vake akaenda navo kuDhamasikusi. Akaiswawo mumaoko amambo wokwaIsiraeri akamukurira zvokumuparadza chaizvo," 
2Chronicles28:6 nokuti nezuva rimwechete chairo, Peka mwanakomana waRemariya akauraya vanhu zviuru zana nemakumi maviri maJudha vose vakanga vari mvumba chaidzo dzokurwa hondo pamusana pokuti vakanga vafuratira Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles28:7 Zikiri gamba rokwaEfuremu rakauraya Maaseya mwanakomana wamambo, naZirikamu mukuru mukuru womumuzinda naErikana mutevedzeri wamambo." 
2Chronicles28:8 Varwi vokwaIsiraeri vakatora nhapwa dzaikwana mazana maviri ezviuru nehama dzavo, vakadzi, nevana, vakomana navasikana. Vakavapambawo zvinhu zvakawanda vakaenda nazvo kuSamaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Asi kwakanga kuine muporofita waMwari ainzi Obhedhi akabuda kundosangana nehondo yacho yaienda kuSamaria akati kwavari, “Chinzwai, pamusana pokuti Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu akashatirirwa vokwaJudha, akavaisa mumaoko menyu. Asi imi mavauraya noutsinye hwasvika nokudenga kwose," 
2Chronicles28:10 Zvino mava kuda kuisa pasi penyu vanhu vokwaJudha neveJerusaremu, varume navakadzi, kuvaita varanda venyu. Iyemi hamunawo here zvitadzo zvenyu zvamakatadzira nazvo Tenzi, Mwari wenyu?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Saka chindinzwai mudzosere nhapwa idzi dzamatapa kuhama dzenyu nokuti Tenzi atokushatirirwai zvakanyanya.” 
2Chronicles28:12 Vamwe vakuru vakuruwo vevanhu vokwaEfuremu vanoti Azariya mwanakomana waJohanani naBherekiya mwanakomana waMeshiremoti naJehizikiya mwanakomana waSharumu naAmasa mwanakomana waHadhirai vakamira vopikisana nevainge vachiuya vachibva kuhondo vachivati," 
2Chronicles28:13 “Regai kuunza nhapwa idzo muno nokuti mava kuda kutipinza mumhosva naTenzi topara dzimwe pamusoro pemhosva dzedu nezvitadzo zvatinazvo izvozvi, nokuti mhosva yedu yakatokura kare uye yatoipa kwazvo kupfukira vokwaIsiraeri.”" 
2Chronicles28:14 Nokudaro varwi vaya vakanga vakapakata zvombo zvehondo vakasiya nhapwa nezvinhu zvavakanga vapamba paiva nemachinda negungano rose. 
2Chronicles28:15 Varume vakanga vadomwa namazita vakasimuka ndokutora nhapwa dziya, dzakanga dzisina chadzakapfeka vakadzipfekedza hanzu neshangu mumakumbo vachitora pane zvakanga zvapambwa. Vakavapa chokudya nechokunwa vakavazora mafuta. Vakatakura vose vakanga vaneta pakati pavo pamadhongi, vakaenda navo kuJeriko guta romurara, kuhama dzavo. Ndipo pavakazodzokera kuSamaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Panguva iyoyo, mambo Ahazi akatumira shoko kuna mambo weAsiriya achida rubatsiro." 
2Chronicles28:17 Zvakaitika ndezvokuti, vaEdhomu vakauya zvakare kuzorwisa, vakabva vakurira vokwaJudha ndokutapa nhapwa vachienda nadzo." 
2Chronicles28:18 VaFirisitia vakanga varwisa maguta omunyika yamanhika yeShefera nomuNegevhu yokwaJudha. Vakanga vakurira maguta eBhetishemeshi neAijaroni neGedheroti neSoko nemisha yaro neTimuna nemisha yaro neGimuza nemisha yaro, ndokubva vagara ikoko." 
2Chronicles28:19 Sezvo Tenzi akadupikisa Judha pamusana paAhazi mambo wokwaIsiraeri nokuti akanga aita zvisina nomusoro wese uye atorega kuva munhu ari pachokwadi naTenzi. 
2Chronicles28:20 Nokudaro Tirigatipirieseru mambo weAsiria akauya kuzomurwisa akamuonesa nhamo panzvimbo pokumutsigira 
2Chronicles28:21 nokuti Ahazi akatora zvinhu muimba yaTenzi nomumuzinda wamambo nokumachinda, akatera nazvo kuna mambo weAsiria asi hazvina kumubatsira." 
2Chronicles28:22 Panguva yake yokutambudzika ndopaakatonyanya kuva munhu asiri pachokwadi naTenzi, iye mambo Ahazi wakareyu." 
2Chronicles28:23 Pamusana pokuti akapira zvibayiro kuvamwari veDhamasikusi vakamukurira achiti, “Pamusana pokuti vamwari vamadzimambo eSiria akavabatsira regai ndichipirawo zvibayiro kwavari vagondibatsirawo.” Asi ndovakava mharadzi yake neyevose vokwaIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ahazi akaunganidza pamwechete midziyo yomumba yaMwari, akadimura-dimura midziyo yomumba yaMwari. Akapfiga misuo yepamba yaTenzi akazvigadzirira atari pakona yose yose muJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles28:25 Mumaguta ose okwaJudha akagadzira nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzokupisira rusenzi kune vamwari vasirivo akavirutsa nehasha Tenzi, Mwari wemadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles28:26 Dzimwe nyaya dzezvake namaitiro ake ose kubvira pokutanga kusvikira pokupedzesera dzakanyorwa muBhuku raMadzimambo okwaJudha newokwaIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles28:27 Ahazi akazovatawo oenda kwakaenda vamwe, kumadzitateguru ake. Vakamuviga muguta reJerusaremu nokuti havana kuenda naye mumakuva emadzimambo okwaIsiraeri. Mwanakomana wake Hezekiya ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
2Chronicles29:1 Hezekiya akatanga kutonga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu, akatonga kwamakore makumi maviri namapfumbamwe ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake rainzi Abhiya mwanasikana waZekariya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Hezekiya akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi sezvakaitwawo navasekuru vake Dhavhidhi. 
2Chronicles29:3 Mugore rake rechiposhi rokutonga, mumwedzi wokutanga akazarura misuo yapamba paTenzi akaigadzira." 
2Chronicles29:4 Akaunzawo vapristi navaRevhi akavaunganidza munhandare kumabvazuva 
2Chronicles29:5 akati kwavari, “Nditeererei munzwe imi vaRevhi! Chizvichenurai muchenurewo imba yaTenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu mutakure tsvina iyi muibvise munzvimbo inoera." 
2Chronicles29:6 Nokuti madzibaba edu anga ari vanhu vasiri pachokwadi naMwari'ka vanga vachiita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi, Mwari wedu. ZvaMwari, vakakanda pasi vakafuratira ugaro hwaTenzi vakamupa gotsi." 
2Chronicles29:7 Vakapfigawo misuo yakamba kepamusuo wokupinda muno, vakadzima marambi vakarega kupisira kuna Mwari weIsiraeri rusenzi kana kupira mipiro yokupisa munzvimbo inoera." 
2Chronicles29:8 Ndokusaka Tenzi akavirukira nehasha Judha neJerusaremu akabva adziita kuti dzive sechinhu chokuti ukaona unodedera nokutya, chinokatyamadza chichikushayisa neromuromo sezvamuri kungozvionerawo nameso enyu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Chitarisaika muone kuti madzibaba edu navana vedu vakomana navasikana vakaurayiwa namapakatwa uye vakadzi vedu vari kuhutapwa naizvozvi izvi. 
2Chronicles29:10 “Zvino chandafunga mumwoyo mangu ini kuita chitenderano naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri kuitira kuti achirega kutivirukira nehasha dzake dzinotyisa." 
2Chronicles29:11 Vanangu regai kuva nechamuchaitira nungo nokuti Tenzi akasarudzemi kuti mupote muchimira paari muchimushandira muri vashandi vake muchimupisira rusenzi.” 
2Chronicles29:12 VaRevhi ava vakazosimuka, paiti: Mahati mwanakomana waAmasai naJoeri mwanakomana waAzariya vokuvanakomana vokwaKohati, pouya kuvanakomana vokwaMerari Paiti: Kishi mwanakomana waAbhudhi naAzariya mwanakomana waJeharereri poti kuvanakomana vokwaGerishoni Joa mwanakomana vaZima naEdheni mwanakomana waJoa" 
2Chronicles29:13 kune vokwaErizafani paiti Shimuri naJeueri pozoti kuvanakomana vokwaAsafu paiva naZekariya naMataniya 
2Chronicles29:14 pachizoti kuvanakomana vokwaHemani paivawo naJehueri naShimei kuvanakomana vokwaJedhutuni paiti Shemaya naUzieri. 
2Chronicles29:15 Vakaunganidza hama dzavo vakazvichenura vakapinda sokutaurawo kwakanga kwaita mambo maererano neshoko raTenzi kundonatsa imba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles29:16 Vapristi vakapinda mukati memba yaTenzi kundoinatsa. Vakaburitsa muruvanze rwemba yaTenzi zvose zvaiva zvakan'ora zvavakawana muTemberi yaTenzi. VaRevhi vakazvitora vakaenda nazvo kukakova keKidhironi. 
2Chronicles29:17 Vakatanga kuchenura uku musi wokutanga wemwedzi wechiposhi ndokubva pamusi wechisere wacho vasvika kukamba kaye kaTenzi, kwokumusuo, tichangobuda mumba yomukati. Vakazoita mamwe mazuva masere okuchenura imba yaTenzi, vakazopedza rava zuva regumi nechitanhatu romwedzi wechiposhi." 
2Chronicles29:18 Vakapinda maiva namambo Hezekiya vakamupira kuti, “Tanatsa imba yose yaTenzi neatari yokupirira mipiro yokupisa nemidziyo yayo yose netebhuru yechingwa chepana Mwari nemidziyo yayo yose." 
2Chronicles29:19 Midziyo yose yakanga yaraswa namambo Ahazi paakanga achiri kutonga ava munhu asisiri pakutendendeka taigadzira tikaichenura. Kutaura kuno zviri pamberi peatari yaTenzi.” 
2Chronicles29:20 Mambo Hezekiya akamuka rungwanani akaunganidza vakuru vakuru veguta akakwira kuimba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles29:21 Vanhu vakaunza handira nomwe nehondohwe nomwe nehwayana nomwe namakotora manomwe omupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zvoumambo nenzvimbo inoera nenyika yokwaJudha, akati vapristi, vanakomana vokwaAroni vazviite zvibayiro paatari yaTenzi." 
2Chronicles29:22 Saizvozvowo vakauraya handira dziye, vapristi vakasasa ropa radzo paatari. Vakaurayawo hondohwe dziye vakamwayawo ropa radzo kuatari vakazourayawo hwayana dziye vakasasa ropa radzo kuatari." 
2Chronicles29:23 Makotora aye omupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo akauyiwa nawo kuna mambo negungano, vakaisa maoko avo paari." 
2Chronicles29:24 Vapristi vakaauraya vakaita mupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo neropa rawo paatari kuripira Isiraeri yose nokuti mambo akanga atema kuti, mipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokupfupira zvitadzo ipirirwe Isiraeri yose." 
2Chronicles29:25 Akaisa vaRevhi mumba yaTenzi vaine makwakwakwa outare nemadimbwa nezvipendani sokutemwa kwazvakaitwa naDhavhidhi nomuoni wokwamambo nomuporofita Natani pamusana pokuti mutemo wakanga wabva kuna Tenzi uchitaurwa navaporofita. 
2Chronicles29:26 VaRevhi vakamira vaine zvokuimbisa zvokuridza zvaDhavhidhi, vapristi vaine mabhosvo." 
2Chronicles29:27 Hezekiya ndokubva ati mipiro yokupisa ichipirwa paatari. Pakatanga kuitwa mupiro wokupisa ndopakabvawo patangwa kuimbira Tenzi rwiyo mabhosvo oridzwa zvino pamwechete nezvokuimbisa zvokuridza zvaDhavhidhi mambo weIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles29:28 Gungano rose rakati pasi gwadagwa kupfugama, vaimbi mumhanzi vachiimba, uku mabhosvo achidandaura kudzamara mupiro wokupisa wapera kuti nho." 
2Chronicles29:29 Pakazoti perei mupiro, mambo nevaaiva navo vakatiwo pasi gwadagwa kupfugamira." 
2Chronicles29:30 Mambo Hezekiya namachinda vakati vaRevhi vaimbe nziyo dzokurumbidza Tenzi vachiimba namazwi aDhavhidhi neomuoni Asafu. Vakaimba dzimbo dzokurumbidza vachifara vakati pasi kota-kota vachipfugamira. 
2Chronicles29:31 Hezekiya akazoti, “Zvino zvamazviteketerera kuna Tenzi kudai, chiuyai muunze zvibayiro nemipiro yokutenda kumba yaTenzi.” Gungano iroro rakaunza zvibayiro nemipiro yokutenda nevamwewo vose vaiva nemwoyo wokupa vakaunza zvibayiro zvokupisa." 
2Chronicles29:32 Uwandi hwemipiro yokupisa yakaunzwa negungano zvaiva makumi manomwe ehandira nehondohwe zana namazana maviri ehwayana. Dzose idzodzi dzaiva dzomupiro wokupisa wokupira kuna Tenzi. 
2Chronicles29:33 Mipiro yakanga yakateketererwa kuna Mwari yaiva mazana matanhatu ehandira nezviuru zvitatu zvehwai. 
2Chronicles29:34 Asi vapristi vaiva vashomanini zvokuti havana kugona kuvhiya mipiro yokupisa yose. Naizvozvo kusvikira vamwe vapristi vazozvichenurawo, ivo vainge vachitobatsirwa nehama dzavo dzokwaRevhi kusvikira basa iroro rapera pari pamusana pokuti vaRevhi ndovakanga vane mwoyo uri pachokwadi kupinda vapristi panyaya yokuzvichenura." 
2Chronicles29:35 Tisingaverengere zvedu mipiro yokupisa yakawanda kwazvo paiva namafuta emipiro yokuwadzana paivawo nezvomupiro wokuteura nezvomupiro wokupisa. Ndokugadzirisa kwakaitwa kunamata pamba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles29:36 Hezekiya navanhu vose vakafara kwazvo nezvakanga zvaitirwa vanhu naMwari nokuti izvozvo zvakanga zvaitika nenguva isipi. 
2Chronicles30:1 Hezekiya akatumira shoko kwaIsiraeri kwose nokwaJudha akanyorerawo matsamba kwaEfuremu nokwaManase kuti vanhu vauye kumba yaTenzi kuJerusaremu kuzochengta Pasika yokupemberera Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles30:2 Chakanga chaitika ndechokuti, mambo namachinda ake negungano rose romuJerusaremu, vakanga varangana kuchengeta Pasika mumwedzi wechipiri" 
2Chronicles30:3 pamusana pokuti havaikwanisa kuichengeta panguva yayo nechikonzero chokuti uwandi hwavapristi vaifanira kuzvichenura hwakanga husati hwakwana uyewo vanhu vakanga vasina kuungana kuJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles30:4 Mambo negungano rose iroro vakaonawo zano irori riri zano rakanaka. 
2Chronicles30:5 Nokudaro vakasunga chisungo chokuti shoko riende muIsiraeri yose kubvira kuBheerishebha kusvikira kwaDhani rokuti vanhu vose vanofanira kuuya kuzochengeta Pasika yokupemberera Tenzi Mwari weIsiraeri kuJerusaremu sezvo vakanga vasina kuichengeta nouwandi hwakanga hwatemwa. 
2Chronicles30:6 Sokutema kwakanga kwaita mambo, vanhu vokumhanya vakaenda kwaIsiraeri kwose nokwaJudha namatsamba aibva kuna mambo namachinda achiti, “Vanhu veIsiraeri dzokerai kuna Tenzi, Mwari waAbhurahamu, Mwari waIsaki, Mwari waIsiraeri kuti iyewo acheukezve katsama kenyu kavanhu vakasara vakapunyuka mumaoko amadzimambo eAsiria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Musaite samadzibaba enyu nehama dzenyu vakarega kutendeka kunaTenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo zvokuti akazovaita sechinhu chokuti ukaona chinokudederesa nokutya." 
2Chronicles30:8 Zvino chiregai kuomesa musoro sezvakanga zvakaita madzibaba enyu asi zviisei pasi paTenzi muuye kunzvimbo yake inoera yaakaeresa nokusingapere munamate Tenzi, Mwari wenyu kuti achirega kukuvirukirai nehasha." 
2Chronicles30:9 Chinondidariso ndechokuti kana imi mukadzokera kuna Tenzi, hama dzenyu navana venyu vachanzwirwa tsitsi navakavatapa vakadzokera kunyika ino nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ane mwoyochena netsiye nyoro uye haazokufuratirai kana imi madzokerawo kwaari.”" 
2Chronicles30:10 Saka vokumhanya neshoko vaya vakabvongodza maguta nyika yose yokwaEfuremu naManase kusvikira kwaZebhuruni asi ivo vakatovapfida kuseka vakavazvidza nokuvasveeredza. 
2Chronicles30:11 Vanhu vashomanini vokwaAsheru nevokwaManase nevokwaZebhuruni vakazvidukupisa vakauya kuJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles30:12 Simba raMwari rakavawo nevokwaJudha rikavapa mwoyo mumwechete vakaita zvakarehwa namambo namachinda ake sokutaura kwaTenzi. 
2Chronicles30:13 Vanhu vazhinji vakaungana muJerusaremu kuzochengeta Mazuva Makuru eChingwa Chisina Mbiriso, mumwedzi wechipiri. Gungano racho raiva gungano guru kwazvo." 
2Chronicles30:14 Vakatangisa basa, vakabvisa atari dzaiva muJerusaremu neatari dzokupisira rusenzi vakandodzikanda mukakova keKidhironi." 
2Chronicles30:15 Vakauraya hwayana yePasika pazuva regumi nechina remwedzi wechipiri. Vapristi nevaRevhi vakanyara nazvo zvikazoita kuti vazvichenurewo vakatozouyawo nemipiro yokupisa mumba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles30:16 Vakandomira panzvimbo dzavo dzavanofanira kumira maererano nomurawo waMosesi, munhu waMwari. Vapristi vakasasa ropa ravakatambidzwa nevaRevhi" 
2Chronicles30:17 nokuti kwakanga kuine vazhinji mukati megungano, vakanga vasina kuzvichenura. Ipapo vaRevhi ndivo vakatenge votourayira hwayana yePasika vose vakanga vasina kuzvichenura kuti iereserwe Tenzi." 
2Chronicles30:18 Zvakadaro zvazvo vanhu vakawanda, vazhinji vavo vari vokwaEfuremu nokwaManase nokwaIsakari nokwaZeburuni havana kunge vazvichenura, asi havana kudya Pasika samanyorerwo azvakanga zvakaitwa. Bva Hezekiya akavanamatira achiti, “Tenzi makanaka regereraiwo munhu wose" 
2Chronicles30:19 aita mwoyo wokutsvaka Tenzi Mwari, Mwari wemadzibaba ake kunyange zvazvo asina kutevedza murao yokuchenurwa yomunzvimbo inoera.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Tenzi akanzwa Hezekiya akabva aporesa vanhu ivavo. 
2Chronicles30:21 Vanhu veIsiraeri vakanga vari muJerusaremu vakachengeta Mazuva Makuru eChingwa Chisina Mbiriso kwemazuva manomwe vachifara kwazvo. Izvozvo vaRevhi navapristi vainorumbidza Tenzi zuva nezuva vachiimbira Tenzi vaine zvokuridzira Tenzi nazvo mumhanzi zvine simba. 
2Chronicles30:22 Hezekiya akataurawo zvakafadza mumwoyo vaRevhi vose vainge vari vanhu vainyatsonzwisisa zvokwaTenzi. Vanhu vakadya chokudya cheMazuva Makuru iwayo kwemazuva manomwe vachipira zvibayiro zvokuwadzana vachitenda Tenzi, Mwari wemadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles30:23 Gungano rose rakazowirirana kuchengeta mamwe mazuva manomwe seMazuva Makuru nokudaro vakaita mamwe mazuva manomwe vachichengeta Mazuva Makuru iwayo. 
2Chronicles30:24 Chakavadariso ndechokuti Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha akapa gungano iroro ravanhu chiuru chehandira nezviuru zvinomwe zvehwai dzokupira. Machindawo akapawo kugungano chiuru chehandira nehwai gumi rezviuru. Vapristi vakazozvichenura vakawanda kwazvo. 
2Chronicles30:25 Gungano rose rokwaJudha rakapembera kufara pamwechete navapristi nevaRevhi negungano rose raibvawo kwaIsiraeri nevaigara kwaJudha navatorwa vose vaibva kwaIsiraeri, navatorwa vaibva kwaJudha vakafara kwazvo." 
2Chronicles30:26 Saizvozvo kwakafarwa zvikuru kwazvo muJerusaremu zvokuti kubvira panguva yaSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi mambo weIsiraeri hazvina kumboitika muJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles30:27 Vapristi nevaRevhi vakasimuka vakakomborera vanhu, chichemo chavo chakanzwikwa, munamato wavo ukasvika kumuzinda unoera wokudenga." 
2Chronicles31:1 Kuzoti zvose izvozvi zvapera vaIsiraeri vose vaivepo vakaenda kumaguta ose okwaJudha vakapwanya mabwe ose aiva akamisirwa kunamata, vakatemera pasi zvifananidzo zvokunamata zviAshera. Vakapaza nzvimbo dzokatunhumara dzokuteurira neatari dzacho maJudha mose nokwaBhenjamini nokwaEfuremu nokwaManase kusvikira vazviparadza zvose. Vanhu vose veIsiraeri vakadzokera kumaguta avo munhu wose achienda kumusha kwake." 
2Chronicles31:2 Hezekiya akaronga vapristi nevaRevhi muzvikwata maerano nebasa romunhu woga woga, vapristi navaRevhi vemipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana kwouya vokushanda pamisuo mikuru yepamana paTenzi kwozouya vokutenda nokumurumbidza." 
2Chronicles31:3 Zvakanga zvabviswa namambo zviya zvaakatora pazvinhu zvake zvaiva zvemipiro yokupisa iri mipiro yokupisa yamangwanani neyamanheru nemipiro yokupisa yepamaSabata neyoKugara kweMwedzi neyemamwewo mazuva makuru akatemwa sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo waTenzi. 
2Chronicles31:4 Hezekiya akatemera vanhu vaigara muJerusaremu chirevo chokuti vabvise mugove unofanira kupiwa vapristi navaRevhi kuitira kuti ivo vagone kuisa mwoyo pamutemo waTenzi. 
2Chronicles31:5 Pakangopararira chirevo ichocho vanhu veIsiraeri vakapa zvinhu zvakawanda kwazvo zvembesanwa dzokutanga newaini namafuta eorivhi nouchi nezvimwe zvose zvomuminda. Vakauya nezvinhu zvakawanda kwazvo zvechegumi chezvinhu zvose. 
2Chronicles31:6 Vanhu vokwaIsiraeri nevokwaJudha vaigara mumaguta okwaJudha vakauyawo nezvegumi zvemombe nehwai nezvimwe zvakateketerwa kuna Mwari zvakanga zvaturirwa kuna Tenzi, Mwari wavo, vakazviunganidza kuita mirwi." 
2Chronicles31:7 Mumwedzi wechitatu ndomavakatanga kuzviunganidza kuita mirwi vakabva vazopedza mumwedzi wechinomwe. 
2Chronicles31:8 Hezekiya nemachinda aye pavakauya vakaona mirwi iyoyi vakarumbidza Tenzi vakakomborerawo vanhu vake veIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles31:9 Hezekiya akabvunza vapristi nevaRevhi nezvemirwi iyoyo. 
2Chronicles31:10 Azariya mupristi mukuru vaiva vemba yokwaZadhoki vakamupindura vachiti, “Kubvira pakatanga vanhu kuunza zvipo zvavo kumba yaTenzi, takadya tikaguta tikatosiya zvimwe zvakawanda nokuti Tenzi akakomborera vanhu vake zvokuti tine dura iri guru rezvakasara.”" 
2Chronicles31:11 Hezekiya ndokuvaudza kuti vagadzire dzimba mumba yaTenzi. Ivo ndokubva vadzigadzira. 
2Chronicles31:12 Vanhu vaiunza zvavaibvisa izvi vari pachokwadi pamwechete nezvegumi nezvimwe zvakateketererwa kuna Mwari. Mukuru mukuru wavo vose aiva Konaniya muRevhi, achitevedzerwa naShimei mukoma nomunun'una naye." 
2Chronicles31:13 Izvozvo Jehieri naAzaziya naNahati naAsaheri naJerimoti naJozabhadhi naErieri naIsimakiya naMahati naBhenaya ndovaiva vatariri vachibatsira Konaniya naShimei mukoma nomunun'una naye uya, vakanga vatoita zvokusarudzwa namambo Hezekiya naAzariya mukuru mukuru wapamba paTenzi." 
2Chronicles31:14 Kore mwanakomana waImuna muRevhi uya wokuchengetedza kusuo guru rokuMabvazuva ndiye akapiwa basa rokutarira mipiro iya yokupa kuna Tenzi nechido nokugovera zvinenge zvapirwa kuna Tenzi nemipiro inoeresesa. 
2Chronicles31:15 Edheni naMiniyamini naJeshua naShemaya, naAmariya naShekaniya vaivawo vanhu vari pachokwadi naTenzi vachimubatsira mumaguta avapristi kugova migove kuhama dzavo, kumukuru nomudiki zvimwechetezvo, chikwata nechikwata," 
2Chronicles31:16 tisingaverengi zvedu vaya vakanyorwa mazita chizvarwa nechizvarwa vechirume, kubvira pamakore matatu okuberekwa zvichikwira, vose vari vokupinda mumba yaTenzi maererano nebasa rainge richidiwa zuva iroro pabasa ravo zvichienderanawo nebasa ravo chikwata nechikwata." 
2Chronicles31:17 Manyorerwo aiitwa vapristi mazita, aiva okutevedza dzimba dzamadzibaba avo. VaRevhi kubvira pamakumi maviri amakore zvichikwira, vainyorwa maererano namabasa avo muzvikwata zvavo." 
2Chronicles31:18 Vapristi vainyorwa pamwechete navana vavo vaduku namadzimai avo navana vavo vakomana navasikana gungano rose pamusana pokuti vaifanira kuva vanhu vari pachokwaki vanogara vakazvichenura kuitira zvinhu zvinoera. 
2Chronicles31:19 Kune vanakomana vokwaAroni, vapristi vaigara kumafuro amaguta avo kwaiva navarume vakadomwa namazita vakapiwa basa mumaguta akasiyana-siyana rokugova mugove kune wose wechirume mukati mavapristi nokune munhu wose mukati mavaRevhi vose vainge vanyorwa." 
2Chronicles31:20 Hezekiya akaita saizvozvi maJudha mose. Pana Tenzi, Mwari wake akaita zvakanaka zvakarurama nezviri pachokwadi." 
2Chronicles31:21 Basa rose raaiitira imba yaMwari maererano nomutemo nemirao achitsvaka Mwari wake, aiita nomwoyo wose zvichibva zvabudirira." 
2Chronicles32:1 Mushure mezviito zvakatendeka kudai Senakeribhu mambo weAsiria akauya kuzorwisa Judha akakomba maguta etsvingo aine pfungwa yokuakurira kuti aaite ake. 
2Chronicles32:2 Pakaona Hezekiya kuti Senakeribhu akanga auya achida kuzorwisa Jerusaremu," 
2Chronicles32:3 akarangana namakurukota ake navarume vokwake, magamba okurwa hondo kuti vamise mvura yezvisipiti zvaiva kunze kweguta vakamubatsira." 
2Chronicles32:4 Vanhu vazhinji kwazvo vakaungana vakamisa zvisipiti zvose nekakova kaiyerera nomunyika umu vachiti, “Iwo madzimambo eAsiria angasvikowanirei paine mvura yakawanda kudai?”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Hezekiya akatsunga mwoyo akavakiridza rusvingo rwose rwakanga rwapazika pamusoro pedzinharire akapasimudza. Kunze kwarwo akavaka rumwe rusvingo akabva asimbisa Chimudhuri cheMavhu chiya chomuguta raDhavhidhi. Akagadzirawo zvombo zvehondo nenhoo zvakawanda kwazvo. 
2Chronicles32:6 Akasarudza vakuru vakuru vokuhondo akavakokorodzera kwaari panhandare yepasuo guru reguta iri akataura navo zvakavafadza mumwoyo achiti," 
2Chronicles32:7 “Shingai mutsunge mwoyo! Musambotya zvenyu kana kuzeza mambo weAziriya kana gurusvusvu ravanhu raauya naro. Watinaye mukuru pane wavanaye. 
2Chronicles32:8 Simba raanaro isimba ravanhu asi watinaye isu ndiTenzi, Mwari wedu wokutibatsira nokutirwira hondo dzedu.” Vanhu vakasimbaradzwa mwoyo nemazwi aHezekiya mambo wokwaJudha." 
2Chronicles32:9 Mushure mezvizvi, Senakeribhu mambo weAsiria ainge akakomba guta reRakishi nehondo yake yose, akatumira makurukota ake kuna Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha nokuvanhu vose vokwaJudha vaiva muJerusaremu achiti," 
2Chronicles32:10 “Senakeribhu mambo weAsiria ati, ‘Unoinzwa neiko chaicho chaungamire nacho pakukombwa kweJerusaremu uku?’" 
2Chronicles32:11 Hakusi kufurirwa zvenyu here naHezekiya kwamuri kuitwa uku kuti akuurayisei zvenyu nenzara nenyota achikutii, ‘Tenzi, Mwari wedu achatinunura mumaoko amambo weAsiria?’" 
2Chronicles32:12 Haasiye here Hezekiya mumwecheteyo akabvisa nzvimbo dzake dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira akatemera Judha neJerusaremu chirevo chokuti, ‘Pamberi peatari imwechete iyoyi iyi ndopamava kufanira kuzopfugamira nokupisira zvibayiro zvenyu pairi iyoyi iyi?’" 
2Chronicles32:13 Hamuzive here zvakaitwa neni nemadzibaba angu kumarudzi ose edzimwe nyika? Vamwari vamarudzi acho enyika idzodzo vakanga vachimbokwanisa here kununura nyika dzavo mumaoko angu? 
2Chronicles32:14 Pana vamwari vemarudzi iwayo akanyatsoparadzwa nemadzibaba angu, ndoupi akakwanisa kununura vanhu vake mumaoko mangu zvokuti Mwari wenyu angazokwanisawo kutokununurai mumaoko angu?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Saka zvino regai kunyengedzwa kana kufurirwa naHezekiya kudai. Regai kuvimba naye nokuti hakuna mwari worumwe rudzi rwevanhu kana weimwe nyika ipi zvayo akagona kununura vanhu vake mumaoko angu kana mumaoko emadzibaba angu. Ndoda, kutozoti iye Mwari wenyu pakepowo, ndiye angazokununurai iyeyo mumaoko angu?”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Makurukota ake akatopfuura ipapo kutafurira Tenzi Mwari nomuranda wake Hezekiya. 
2Chronicles32:17 Iye akatonyora tsamba dzokushora Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri achimutafurira achiti, “Sezvakangoitawo vamwari vevanhu vedzimwe nyika vasina kugona kununura vanhu vavo mumaoko mangu ndozvimwechetezvo naMwari waHezekiya haagone kununura vanhu vake mumaoko mangu.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Vakazhamba nomutauro wechiJudha kuvanhu vomuJerusaremu vakanga vari parusvingo kuvatyisidzira nokuvapinza mweya wokutya kuitira kuti vatore guta iroro variite ravo. 
2Chronicles32:19 Vakataura nezvaMwari weJerusaremu samatauriro avaingaitewo zvavo nezvevamwari vamarudzi evanhu vepasi pano vokugadzirwa zvavo namaoko avanhu. 
2Chronicles32:20 Mambo Hezekiya nomuporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi vakanamata naizvozvi vachitsvitsa chichemo ichocho kumatenga. 
2Chronicles32:21 Tenzi akatuma mutumwa akauraya magamba okurwa hondo navatungamiriri vehondo navakuru vakuru vokuhondo vose kumatendhe amambo weAsiria. Naizvozvo akadzokera kunyika kwake adonha uso nokunyara. Paakapinda mumba yamwari wake vana vake chaivo vokubereka vakabva vamuuraira imomo nebakatwa. 
2Chronicles32:22 Tenzi akanunura Hezekiya navagari vomuJerusaremu mumaoko aSenakeribhu mambo weAsiria uye mumaoko evavengi vake vose akavapa vamwe kumativi ose. 
2Chronicles32:23 Vazhinji vakaunza zvipo kuna Tenzi kuJerusaremu nezvinhu zvinokosha kuna Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha zvokuti akaremekedzwa pane marudzi ose mushure maizvozvo. 
2Chronicles32:24 Namazuva iwayo Hezekiya akarwara zvokuda kufa. Akanamata kuna muTenzi. Iye akamupindura nechiratidzo. 
2Chronicles32:25 Asi Hezekiya haana kutirimuka kutendawo zvakanaka zvaakanga aitirwa nokuti akanga ava nemwoyo wokuzvikudza. Naizvozvo Mwari akamushatirirwa iye nenyika yokwaJudha neJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles32:26 Asi Hezekiya, pakuzvikudza kwake kuye akazozvidukupisa pamwechete navagari vomuJerusaremu zvokuti Tenzi haanawo kuzovavirukira nehasha pamazuva oupenyu hwaHezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Hezekiya aiva noupfumi hwakawanda kwazvo achiremekedzwa zvikuru kwazvo. Akazvigadzirira dzimba dzokuchengetera upfumi hwesirivha nendarama nematombo akakosha nemetunonhuwirira nemenhoo nememhando nemhando dzemidziyo yakakosha 
2Chronicles32:28 namaturawo embesanwa dzinenge dzabva muminda nemokuchengetera waini namafuta eorivhi namatanga okuchengetera zvipfuwo zvemhando nemhando dzakasiyana nezvirugu zvehwai. 
2Chronicles32:29 Akazvigadzirirawo maguta akava nezvipfuwo nemombe dzakawanda kwazvo nokuti Mwari akanga amupa upfumi hwakawanda. 
2Chronicles32:30 Hezekiya wakareyu ndiyezve akadzivirira mvura yokuGihoni paye payaibuda napo nechokumusoro, akaiendisa kumadokero kweGuta raDhavhidhi. Hezekiya akabudirira kwazvo pamabasa ake ose." 
2Chronicles32:31 Panyaya yenhumwa dzamakurukota okuBhabhironi vaiva vatumwa kwaari kuzonzwa nezvechiratidzo chakanga chaitika munyika imomo, Mwari akambomusiya kuti azvionere achimuedza kuti aone chaizvoizvo kuti munhu ane mwoyo wakadii." 
2Chronicles32:32 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaHezekiya nezviito zvake zvakanaka zvakanyorwa wani mune zvakazarurirwa muporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi zviri muBhuku reMadzimambo okwaJudha neokwaIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles32:33 Hezekiya akazovata oendawo kwakaenda vamwe, madzitateguru ake. Vakamuviga pamukwidza pane makuva evanakomana vokwaDhavhidhi. Parufu rwake, vokwaJudha vose navagari vomuJerusaremu vakamuviga zvine chiremera. Mwanakomana wake Manase ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo yake." 
2Chronicles33:1 Manase akanga ava namakore gumi namaviri paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore makumi mashanu ane mashanu ari muJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles33:2 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi achitevedzera tsika dzinosemesa kwazvo dzaiitwa namarudzi akadzingirwa vanhu vechiIsiraeri naTenzi 
2Chronicles33:3 nokuti akavakazve nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dziye dzakanga dzamboparadzwa nababa wake Hezekiya. Iye akavakirawo vanaBhaari atari akagadzirawo zvifananidzo zvokunamata zviAshera. Akapfugamira gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvose zvomudenga achizvinamata. 
2Chronicles33:4 Akavakawo dziatari mumba yaTenzi yakanga yanzi naTenzi, “PaJerusaremu ndipo pachava nezita rangu nokusingaperi.”" 
2Chronicles33:5 Akavakira atari gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvose zvomudenga muzvivanze zviviri zvemba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles33:6 Akapisa vana vake vakomana sezvibayiro mubani remwanakomana wokwaHinomu. Manase akanga apindawo mune zvokufembera nemaminimini nezvoun'anga hwokududzira mashura nokuromba mishonga kumasvikiro nokun'anga. Akaita zvakaipa zvakanyanya kwazvo zvisingadiwe naTenzi akamuvirutsa nehasha. 
2Chronicles33:7 Chifananidzo chokunamata chaakagadzira chiya akachimisa mumba yaMwari iya yakanga yanzi naMwari kuna Dhavhidhi nokumwanakomana wake Soromoni, “Pamba iyi neJerusaremu pandakasarudza mumadzinza ose eIsiraeri ndipo pandichaisa zita rangu narini wose" 
2Chronicles33:8 uyewo kuti handizoita kuti tsoka yomuIsiraeri ibude kunze vadzungairezve vari kunze, kwenyika yandakasarudzira madzibaba avo. Ndokunge chete vachenjerera kuita zvose zvandakati vaite uye nezvose zviri pamutemo nemirao nezvirevo zvavakapiwa nokuna Mosesi.”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Manase akafurira vokwaJudha pamwechete nevagari vomuJerusaremu zvokuti vakaita zvakaipa zvaitopfuura zvakaitwa namarudzi aye akaparadzwa naTenzi achiadzingira vanhu veIsiraeri. 
2Chronicles33:10 Tenzi akataura kuna Manase nokuvanhu, asi havana kuzviteerera." 
2Chronicles33:11 Naizvozvo Tenzi akavaunzira vatungamiriri vehondo vokwamambo weAsiria. Vakasvikobata Manase nezvikochekero vakamusunga nengetani dzendarira vakaenda naye kuBhabhironi. 
2Chronicles33:12 Ari munhamo yake iyoyi akateterera kuna Tenzi, Mwari wake kuti amucheukewo. Akazvidukupisa kwazvo pana Tenzi, Mwari wemadzibaba ake." 
2Chronicles33:13 Akanamata kwaari, Mwari akagamuchira chichemo chake akanzwa chikumbiro chake akabva amudzosera kuJerusaremu paumambo hwake. Ndopakazoziva Manase kuti Tenzi ndiye Mwari." 
2Chronicles33:14 Mushure macho akavakira Guta raDhavhidhi rumwe rusvingo nechokunze kumadokero kweGihoni mubani, uye rwekumusuo wokupinda kusuo guru reHove. Akapoterera narwo nokuOfero. Akarurebesa kwazvo kuenda mudenga. Akaisa vatungamiriri vehondo mumaguta ose etsvingo okwaJudha." 
2Chronicles33:15 Akabvisa mumba maTenzi, vamwari vasirivo nechifananidzo chokunamata chiya neAtari dzose dzaakambenge avaka pagomo reimba yaTenzi nomuJerusaremu. Akazvirasira kunze kweguta." 
2Chronicles33:16 Akagadziridzawo atari yaTenzi akapirirapo zvibayiro zvomipiro yokuwadzana neyokutenda. Akatemera vokwaJudha kuti vanamate Tenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles33:17 Kunyange zvakadaro vanhu vakaramba vachipira zvibayiro panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dziya asi vachipira kuna Tenzi, Mwari wavo chete." 
2Chronicles33:18 Inga dzimwe nyaya dzezvaManase nomunamato wake waakaita kuna Mwari wake nemazwi avaoni vakataura kwaari muzita raTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri dzirimo muNhoroondo dzaMadzimambo eIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kwouyawo munamato wake nokugamuchirwa kwakaitwa chichemo chake naMwari, nechitadzo chaakapara, nokusava munhu ari pachokwadi kwaakaita nemaakavakira nzvimbo dzokuteurira dzokunamatira akamisa zvifananidzo zviAshera nezvimwewo zvifananidzo zvokunamata asati azvidukupisa, zvakanyorwa wani muNhoroondo dzavaoni." 
2Chronicles33:20 Saizvozvo Manase akavata oenda kwakaenda vamwe madzitateguru ake vakamuviga mumba make. Mwanakomana wake Amoni ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake. 
2Chronicles33:21 Amoni akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namaviri paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwemakore maviri ari muJerusareumu. 
2Chronicles33:22 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naTenzi sezvakaitwa nababa wake Manase. Amoni akapira zvibayiro kuzvifananidzo zvose zvokunamata zvakanga zvagadzirwa naManase baba vake akazvinamata. 
2Chronicles33:23 Haana kuzvidukupisa pana Tenzi sezvakaita Manase baba vake akazvidukupisa. Amoni iyeyu akaramba achingopara dzimwe mhosva. 
2Chronicles33:24 Makurukota ake akaita bangano rokumupandukira vakamuuraya mumba make. 
2Chronicles33:25 Vanhuwo venyika iyoyo vakauraya vose vakanga vapandukira mambo Amoni wacho. Vanhu vomunyika imomo vakagadza Josiya mwanakomana wake umambo panzvimbo pake. 
2Chronicles34:1 Josiya akanga ava namakore masere paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore makumi matatu ane gore rimwechete ari muJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles34:2 Akaita zvakarurama zvinodiwa naTenzi akatevedza makwara atateguru wake Dhavhidhi. Haana kutsaukira uku kana uku. 
2Chronicles34:3 Zvaakatoita ndezvokuti mugore rake rechisere rokutonga, izvozvo akanga achiri mukomana, akatanga kutsvaka Mwari watateguru wake Dhavhidhi. Mugore regumi nechipiri racho akavamba kuchenura nyika yokwaJudha neJerusaremu achibvisa nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira nezvifananidzo zvokunamata, zviAshera nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zvokuumba noutare nezvokuveza." 
2Chronicles34:4 Vakapunza atari dzavanaBhaari iye aripo, akatemera pasi atari dzorusenzi dzaiva pamusoro padzo. Akapwanya-pwanya zvifananidzo zvokunamata, zviAshera nezvifananidzo zvokuumba noutare nezvokuveza. Akazvikuya-kuya akazvimwaya pamakuva evakanga vachipira zvibayiro kwazviri." 
2Chronicles34:5 Akapisawo mapfupa avapristi vacho paatari dzazvo akachenura nazvo Judha neJerusaremu," 
2Chronicles34:6 nokumaguta okwaManase nokwaEfuremu nokwaSimeoni kusvikira kwaNafutari kumatongo kwavo nharaunda yose. 
2Chronicles34:7 Akapunza atari dzacho akapwanya-pwanya zvifananidzo zvokunamata zviAshera nezvimwe zvifananidzo zvokunamata achizvikuya-kuya, akatemera pasi atari dzorusenzi munyika yose yokwaIsiraeri, ndokubva adzokera kuJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles34:8 Kuzoti mava zvino mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwaJosiya, mushure mokunge achenura nyika nemba yaMwari, akatuma Shafani mwanakomana waAzariya naMaaseya mutongi weguta iroro nomunyori Joa mwanakomana waJehoahazi kundogadzira imba yaTenzi, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles34:9 Vakaenda kumupristi mukuru, Hirikiya vakandoturira mari yakanga yaunzwa mumba yaMwari yakanga yaunganidzwa navaRevhi vachengetedzi vokumusuo vaye ichibva kwaManase nokwaEfuremu uye nokune chitsama chevokwaIsiraeri vakanga vasara neyaibvawo kwaJudha kwose nokwaBhenjamini nomuvagari veJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles34:10 Vakaipa kuvashandi vaiona nezvebasa remba yaTenzi. Vashandi ava vaiona nezvebasa remba yaTenzi vakaishandisa kugadzira imba iyoyi vachiita kuti ive sezvayaiva. 
2Chronicles34:11 Vakaipa kuvavezi nokuvavaki kuti vatenge nayo matombo akakwakwanurwa namapango edenga emharuparu neokuwarika edzimba dzakaregererwa namadzimambo okwaJudha dzichiparara zvadzo. 
2Chronicles34:12 Varume ivavo vakaita basa ravo nomwoyo wose. Vaitungamirirwa naJahati naObhadhiya, vaRevhi, vanakomana vokwaMerari, uye naZekariya naMeshuramu vanakomanawo vokwaKohati varivo vokuvatarira. VaRevhi, vose vakanga vari nyanzvi chaidzo dzokuridza zvokuimbisa mumhanzi" 
2Chronicles34:13 ndivo vaitarisa vokutakura zvinhu vachitungamira vanhu mumabasa ose akasiyana-siyana. Vamwe vaRevhi vaiva vanyori, vamwe vari vakuru vakuru, vamwewo vari vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru." 
2Chronicles34:14 Pavakanga vachiburitsa mari yakanga yaunzwa mumba yaTenzi, mupristi Hirikiya akawana bhuku romutemo waTenzi wakapiwa nokuna Mosesi." 
2Chronicles34:15 Hirikiya akati kuna samunyori Shafani, “Ndawana bhuku romutemo mumba yaTenzi!” Hirikiya akapa bhuku iroro kuna Shafani." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafani akaenda nebhuku racho kuna mambo akataura achiti, “Zvamakati zviitwe navaranda venyu zvaitwa." 
2Chronicles34:17 Vakadurura mari yaiva mumba yaTenzi vakaiisa mumaoko avanhu vanoona nezvebasa nomumaoko evashandi.” 
2Chronicles34:18 Munyori mukuru Shafani akataurira mambo achiti, “Vamupristi Hirikiya andipa bhuku.” Shafani akariverenga pana mambo." 
2Chronicles34:19 Mambo paakanzwa zvakanga zvakanyorwa mumutemo akabvarura hanzu dzake neshungu. 
2Chronicles34:20 Mambo akaudza Hirikiya naAhikamu mwanakomana waShafani naAbhudhoni mwanakomana waMika nasamunyori Shafani naAsaya gurukota ramambo kuti," 
2Chronicles34:21 “Endai mundondibvunzirawo kuna Tenzi ini navanhu navakasara maIsiraeri nemaJudha vose nezvakanyorwa mubhuku iri rakawanikwa, nokuti kutivirukira nehasha kwakaita Tenzi kukuru kwazvo, pari pamusana pokuti madzibaba edu haana kuchengeta shoko raTenzi kuti vaite maererano nezvose zvakanyorwa mubhuku irori.”" 
2Chronicles34:22 Naizvozvo Hirikiya navakanga vatumwa namambo vakaenda kumuporofita Huridha, mudzimai waSharumu mwanakomana waTokihati mwanakomana waHasira, muchengeti wezvipfeko (akanga ava kugara kurutivi rutsva rweguta reJerusaremu), vakataura naye izvozvo." 
2Chronicles34:23 Akati kwavari, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri, udza munhu akutumirai kwandiri kuti," 
2Chronicles34:24 zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Chinzwai, ndichaunza nyatwa panzvimbo ino napavanhu vayo, majambwa ose akanyorwa mubhuku rakaverengerwa mambo wokwaJudha." 
2Chronicles34:25 Pamusana pokuti vakandifuratira vakapisira vamwe vamwari rusenzi, vachida kundishatirisa nezvose zvavakaita namaoko avo. Naizvozvo ndichavirukira nzvimbo ino nehasha dzangu dzisingazopodzwi." 
2Chronicles34:26 Asi panyaya yamambo wokwaJudha akutumai kuzobvunza kuna Tenzi, muti kwaari zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri pane zvawanzwa izvo," 
2Chronicles34:27 pamusana pokuti wakapfidza mumwoyo mako ukazvirerekawo pana Mwari, pawakanzwa shoko raakataura rakanangana nenzvimbo ino nokuvagari vayo, ukabva wazvirereka kwandiri, ukabvarura hanzu dzako neshungu ukachema pandiri, Tenzi anotiwo, chichemo chako ndakachinzwa." 
2Chronicles34:28 Chinzwa unzwe, ndichakuendesa kwakaenda vamwe kumadzitateguru ako, uchapinda muguva mako norugare, uye zvakaipa zvandichaita kunzvimbo ino nevagari vemo iwe namaziso ako hauchazozvioni.’ ” Vakandosvitsa shoko iroro kuna mambo." 
2Chronicles34:29 Mambo akatuma shoko, vakuru vakuru vose vokwaJudha neveJerusaremu vakaungana kwaari." 
2Chronicles34:30 Mambo akakwira kumba yaTenzi navanhu vose vokwaJudha, navagari vose veJerusaremu navapristi navaRevhi navanhu vose vaduku navakuru. Akavaverengera vachinzwa mashoko aiva mubhuku rechitenderano rakanga rawanikwa muimba yaTenzi." 
2Chronicles34:31 Mambo akamira panzvimbo pake akaitazve chitenderano naTenzi chokumutevera nokuchengeta mitemo yake, nezvirevo zvake nemirao yake nemwoyo wake wose nemweya wake wose kuchengeta zvisungo zvechitenderano ichochi zvakanga zvakanyorwa mubhuku irori." 
2Chronicles34:32 Akaita kuti vose vaiva muJerusaremu nokwaBhenjamini vazvisungewo nacho. Vagari vomuJerusaremu vakachengeta nomo chitenderano chaMwari, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles34:33 Josiya akabvisa mumatunhu ose avanhu veIsiraeri zvose zvisingadiwi naMwari akaita kuti vose vaiva muIsiraeri vanamate Tenzi, Mwari wavo. Mumazuvawo ose oupenyu hwake, havana kutsauka pakutevera Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo." 
2Chronicles35:1 Josiya akachengeta Pasika yaTenzi muJerusaremu. Vakauraya hwayana yePasika pazuva regumi nechina romwedzi wechiposhi. 
2Chronicles35:2 Akaronga vapristi mumabasa avo akavakurudzira mumabasa iwayo omumba yaTenzi. 
2Chronicles35:3 Akati kuvaRevhi vaidzidzisa Isiraeri yose vakateketererwa kuna Tenzi vaye, “Isai bhokisi rechitenderano rinoera mumba yakavakwa naSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo weIsiraeri. Inga zvokunge mucharitakura pamapfudzi enyu hapasisina wani. Zvino mochishandirawoka Tenzi, Mwari wenyu nevanhu vake vaIsiraeri" 
2Chronicles35:4 machironganawo maererano nedzimba dzamadzibaba enyu muzvikwata zvenyu sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa naDhavhidhi mambo weIsiraeri uye sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa naSoromoni mwanakomana wake. 
2Chronicles35:5 Munofanira kuzomira munzvimbo inoera makamiririra dzimhuri dzakasiyana-siyana dzavanhu, hama dzenyu. Chikwata choga choga chenyu vaRevhi chakamiririra mhuri yacho." 
2Chronicles35:6 Munozofanira kuuraya hwayana yePasika, iyemiwo pachenyu muzvichenurewo mugadzirirewo hama dzenyu kuti muchengete shoko rakarehwa naTenzi nokuna Mosesi.”" 
2Chronicles35:7 Josiya akabvisira vanhu zvipo zvePasika kuitira vanhu vose vaivapo, zviri zvehwayana nembudzana dzaakabvisa muzvipfuwo zvake dzaisvika makumi matatu ezviuru pamwechete nezviuru zvitatu zvehandira. Zvose izvozvi zvakabva muupfumi hwamambo." 
2Chronicles35:8 Machinda ake akabvisirawo vanhu navapristi nevaRevhi nomwoyo unoda. Hirikiya naZakariya naJehieri vatungamiriri vakuru vakuru vomumba yaTenzi vakapawo kuvapristi zvemipiro yePasika hwayana nembudzana zviuru zviviri zvine mazana matanhatu nehandira mazana matatu. 
2Chronicles35:9 Uyewo Konaniya naShemaya naNetaneri vakoma navanun'una naye, kwouya Hashabhiya naJeieri naJozabhadhi vari vakuru vakuru vevaRevhi, vakapawo kuvaRevhi zviuru zvishanu zvehwayana nembudzana pamwechete namazana mashanu ehandira." 
2Chronicles35:10 Urongwa uhu pahwakanga hwapera, vapristi vakandomira panzvimbo dzavo, vaRevhiwo muzvikwata zvavo maererano nechirevo chamambo." 
2Chronicles35:11 Vakauraya hwayana yePasika, vapristi vakasasa ropa ravakagamuchira kwavari. Izvozvo vaRevhi ndovainge vachivhiya dzainge dzaurayiwa." 
2Chronicles35:12 Mipiro yokupisa vakaiisa payo yoga kuti vagozoigoveranisa mudzimhuri dzakasiyana-siyana dzemadzibaba evanhu ivava kuti vapire kuna Tenzi sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mubhuku raMosesi. Ndozvavakaita nehandira idzodzo. 
2Chronicles35:13 Vakagocha pamoto hwayana yePasika sezviri mumurao. Vakabika mipiro inoera mumapoto nomumazibhodho nomudzipani, vakadzitakurira kuvanhu vose nokukurumidza." 
2Chronicles35:14 Mushure macho vakazozvibikirawo ivo pachavo nezvevapristi nokuti vapristi vanakomana vokwaAroni vakanga vakabatikana kudzamara usiku nebasa rokupira mipiro yokupisa nokupisa nhindi dzamafuta. Ndokusaka vaRevhi vakazvibikira ivo pachavo nezvevapristi vanakomana vokwaAroni. 
2Chronicles35:15 Vaimbi vanakomana vokwaAsafu vakanga vari panzvimbo pavo sokutaura kwakanga kwaitwa naDhavhidhi naAsafu naHemani naJedhutuni muoni wokwamambo. Vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru vakanga vari pasuo guru roga roga. Chavaibvira pamabasa avo pakanga pasina, nokuti vaRevhi hama dzavo ndidzo dzakavagadzirira." 
2Chronicles35:16 Saizvozvo musi iwoyo basa rose raTenzi rokuchengeta Pasika nerokupira mupiro wokupisa paAtari yaTenzi rakagadzirirwa maererano nechirevo chamambo Josiya. 
2Chronicles35:17 Vanhu veIsiraeri vaivepo vakachengeta Pasika panguva iyoyo pamwechete namazuva makuru manomwe echigwa chisina mbiriso kwamazuva manomwe. 
2Chronicles35:18 Hakuna kumboita imwe Pasika yakaita saiyoyo muIsiraeri kubvira mazuva omuprofita Samueri. Hakuna mumwe mambo akamboita Pasika seyakaitwa naJosiya pamwechete navapristi, nevaRevhi nevokwaJudha nevokwaIsiraeri vaivapo navagari veJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwaJosiya ndopakaitwa Pasika iyoyi. 
2Chronicles35:20 Mushure mezvose izvozvi, Josiya apedza kugadzira Temberi, Neko mambo weIjipiti akakwidza kundorwisa Karikemishi kuna Yufuratesi, Josiya ndokubva amubudira." 
2Chronicles35:21 Asi iye akamutumira nhume achiti, “Nhai mambo wokwaJudha! Chatatadziranawo chaicho ipapa chii? Handina kuuya kuzokurwisa nhasi uno, asi ndavinga imwewo imba yandiri kurwisana nayo. Mwari atonditi ndiite zvechimbichimbi. Regai kupikisana naMwari aneni, angadaro akakuparadza.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Zvakadaro zvazvo Josiya akaramba kudzokera achimusiya, akatozvivanziridza kuti arege kuzikanwa kuitira kuti andomurwisa. Haana kumboteerera zvakarehwa naNeko zvichibva mumuromo waMwari asi akatopindawo muhondo mubani reMegidho." 
2Chronicles35:23 Vokukanda miseve vakapfura mambo Josiya ndokubva iye mambo ati kumachinda ake, “Ndibvisei pano. Ndakuvadzwa zvakanyanya.”" 
2Chronicles35:24 Nokudaro machinda ake akamubvisa mungoro yehondo iyoyi, vakamutakura nengoro yake yehondo yechipiri. Vakaenda naye kuJerusaremu. Akafa akavigwa mumakuva emadzibaba ake, Judha yose neJerusaremu yakachema Josiya." 
2Chronicles35:25 Jeremiya akaitirawo Josiya nhetembo yokumuchema navamwe vaimbi vose vechirume navekadzi vanotaura nezvaJosiya munhetembo dzavo dzokuchema kusvikira pari nhasi, ndowakabva wava muitiro muIsiraeri. Inga dzakanyorwa wani munhetembo dzokuchema." 
2Chronicles35:26 Dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJosiya nezviito zvake zvakanaka zvaienderana nezvakanyorwa mumutemo waTenzi 
2Chronicles35:27 nezvaakaita kubvira pakutanga kusvikira pakupedzesera zvakanyorwa zviye muBhuku reMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri nokwaJudha. 
2Chronicles36:1 Saka vanhu venyika iyoyo vakazotora Jehoahazi mwanakomana waJosiya vakamugadza umambo muJerusaremu panzvimbo yababa vake. 
2Chronicles36:2 Jehoahazi akanga ava namakore makumi maviri ana matatu paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwemwedzi mitatu ari muJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles36:3 Mambo weIjipiti akamubvisa paumambo muJerusaremu akateresa nyika mutero wematani matatu esirivha ane makirogiramu mazana mana nendarama yaiita makirogiramu makumi matatu ane mana. 
2Chronicles36:4 Neko mambo weIjipiti akaita Eriyakimu munun'una waJehoahazi mambo weJudha neJerusaremu akabva amusandura zita omupa rimwe rokuti Jehoyakimu, asi akatakura mukoma wake Jehoahazi akaenda naye kuIjipiti." 
2Chronicles36:5 Jehoyakimu akanga ava namakore makumi maviri namashanu paakatangisa kutonga. Akatonga kwamakore gumi nerimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi, Mwari wake." 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akauya kuzomurwisa. Akamusunga nengetani akaenda naye kuBhabhironi. 
2Chronicles36:7 Nebhukadhineza akatakurawo mimwe midziyo yepamba paTenzi akaenda nayo kuBhabhironi akandoiisa mumuzinda wake muBhabhironi. 
2Chronicles36:8 Dzimwe nyaya dzezvaJehoyakimu nezvimwe zvakaipisisa kwazvo zvaakaita netumwewo twaaiita twakazobuda zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku raMadzimambo okwaIsiraeri neokwaJudha. Mwanakomana wake Jehoyakini ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo yake. 
2Chronicles36:9 Jehoyakini akanga ava namakore gumi namasere paakava mambo, akatonga kwemwedzi mitatu negumi ramazuva ari muJerusaremu. Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi." 
2Chronicles36:10 Muchirimo panguva yepfumvudza mambo Nebhukadhineza akatumira shoko rokuti aunzwe kuBhabhironi pamwechete nemidziyo inokosha yomumba yaTenzi akabva aita munun'una wake Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha neJerusaremu. 
2Chronicles36:11 Zedhekiya akanga ava namakore makumi maviri nerimwechete paakava mambo, akatonga kwemakore gumi nerimwechete ari muJerusaremu." 
2Chronicles36:12 Akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi, Mwari wake. Haana kuzvininipisa pamberi pomuporofita Jeremiya, aitaura zvaibva mumuromo waTenzi." 
2Chronicles36:13 Akapandukira mambo Nebhukadhineza akanga aita kuti apike naTenzi mhiko. Akaomesa musoro akaomesa mwoyo wake pane zvokudzokera kuna Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
2Chronicles36:14 Vakuru vakuru vose pavapristi pamwechete navanhu zvakanga zvangova zvimwechetezvo zvokurega kuva pachokwadi zvatonyanyisa kwazvo votevedza zviito zvakaipisisa kwazvo zvaiitwa nevechirudzi vachin'oresa imba yaTenzi yaakanga aeresa muJerusaremu 
2Chronicles36:15 Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba avo akatuma-atumazve nhume dzake kwavari neshoko pamusana pokuti ainzwira tsitsi vanhu vake nenzvimbo yake yokugara." 
2Chronicles36:16 Asi vakaramba vachinyomba nhume dzaMwari vachitozvidza zvavo mashoko ake vachitafurira vaporofita vake kudzamara Tenzi amukira vanhu vake nehasha kusvikira pasisina chokuzvigadziridza nacho. 
2Chronicles36:17 Naizvozvo akavamutsira mambo wavanhu vechiKaredhea vakauraya namapakatwa majaya avo mumba yavo macho menzvimbo inoera pasina kana zvokumbonzwira tsitsi kuti majaya here kana kuti mhandara kunyange kuti murume mukuru kana kuti munhu achembera; akaisa vose mumaoko ake. 
2Chronicles36:18 Midziyo yose yomumba yaMwari mikuru nemidiki noupfumi hwomumba yaTenzi noupfumi hwamambo nehwemachinda ake akakukucha zvose izvozvi akaenda nazvo kuBhabhironi. 
2Chronicles36:19 Vakapisa imba yaTenzi vakapazira pasi rusvingo rweJerusaremu vakapisa mizinda chaiyo yose yedzimba vachiparadza midziyo yose yakakosha yaivamo. 
2Chronicles36:20 Akatapa vakanga vapunyuka mapakatwa vakabva vava varanda kwaari iye navanakomana vake kusvikira pakazomirawo umambo hwokuPezhiya. 
2Chronicles36:21 Nyika yakambofara kuwana maSabata okutombozororawo zvayo nguva yose iyoyo yamakanga munyika makati hwa musina munhu kusvikira makore makumi manomwe akwana kuzadzikisa shoko raTenzi rakataurwa nomuromo waJeremiya. 
2Chronicles36:22 Mugore rechiposhi rokutonga kwaKoreshi mambo wePezhiya, zvichizadzikisa shoko raTenzi raakataura nomuromo waJeremiya, Tenzi akapinza imwe pfungwa mumwoyo waKoreshi mambo wePezhiya zvokuti akatemera vanhu chirevo nyika dzose dzoumambo hwake; akaitawo zvokuchinyora chokuti," 
2Chronicles36:23 “Zvanzi naKoreshi mambo wePezhiya, Tenzi, Mwari Wedenga akandipa umambo hwenyika dzose dzapasi pano akandipawo basa rokuti ndimuvakire imba kuJerusaremu maJudha. Ani naani pakati penyu anenge ari wavanhu vake vose zvavo, Tenzi, Mwari wake ngaave naye akwireko.”" 
Ezra1:1 Mugore rechiposhi rokutonga kwaSairosi mambo wePezhiya, zvichizadzikisa shoko raTenzi raakataura nomuromo waJeremiya, Tenzi akapinza imwe pfungwa mumwoyo wamambo wePezhiya zvokuti akatemera vanhu chirevo nyika dzose dzoumambo hwake akaitawo zvokuchinyora chokuti:" 
Ezra1:2 “Zvanzi naSairosi mambo wePezhiya, Tenzi, Mwari Wedenga akandipa umambo hwenyika dzose dzapasi pano uye akandipawo basa rokuti ndimuvakire imba kuJerusaremu kwaJudha." 
Ezra1:3 Ani naani pakati penyu anenge ari wevanhu vake, Mwari wake ngaave naye akwire kuJerusaremu guta riri kwaJudha andovakazve imba yaTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri. Iyeyo ndiye Mwari ari muJerusaremu." 
Ezra1:4 Mumwe nomumwe akasara ari mupenyu ari kugara munzvimbo ipi neipi zvayo, ngaabatsirwe navanhu venzvimbo yake iyoyo nesirivha nendarama nezvimwe zvinhu nezvipfuwo pamwechete nezvinhu zvemipiro yokupa nechido zvemba yaMwari iri kuJerusaremu.”" 
Ezra1:5 Ndopakasimuka vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba okwaJudha novokwaBhenjamini navapristi nevaRevhi, nomunhu wose zvake akanga amutswa mwoyo naMwari kuti akwire kundovakazve imba yaTenzi iri kuJerusaremu." 
Ezra1:6 Vose vaiva munharaunda dzavo vakavabatsira nemidziyo yesirivha nendarama nezvimwe zvinhu nezvipfuwo nezvimwewo zvakakosha tisingaverengeri zvose zvaiti munhu aipawo zvake nechido. 
Ezra1:7 Mambo Sairosi akaunzawo midziyo iya yomumba yaTenzi yakanga yambokukuchwa muJerusaremu naNebhukadhineza akasvikoiisa mumba yavamwari vake. 
Ezra1:8 Sairosi mambo wePezhiya akaburitsa izvi zvichitungamirirwa nasahomwe Mitiredhati akaiverengera Sheshibhaza jinda rokwaJudha. 
Ezra1:9 Kuwanda kwayo ndikoku uku, kwaiti madhishi endarama makumi matatu mbenge dzendarama chiuru kwouya mabisiro: makumi maviri namapfumbamwe" 
Ezra1:10 kwouyawo ndiro dzendarama: dzaiita makumi matatu ndiro dzesirivha: zviuru zviviri zvine mazana mana nechiuru chemimwewo midziyo. 
Ezra1:11 Midziyo yose yendarama neyesirivha yakanga iri zviuru zvishanu namazana mana ane makumi matanhatu nepfumbamwe. Sheshibhaza akatakura zvose izvozvo pakabva nhapwa kuBhabhironi dzichidzoserwa kuJerusaremu. 
Ezra2:1 Zvino ava ndivo vanhu vedunhu iroro vakabva kuutapwa pane vakanga vatamiswa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi vaendeswa kuutapwa kuBhabhironi. Vakadzokera kuJerusaremu kwaJudha mumwe nomumwe kuguta rokwake. 
Ezra2:2 Vakauya navo ndiZerubhabhero naJeshua naNehemiya naSeraya naReeraya naModhekai naBhirishani naMisipari naBhigivhai naReumu naBhaana. Pavanhu veIsiraeri, uwandi hwavarume vacho hwaiva hwakamira hwakadai izvi:" 
Ezra2:3 vanakomana vakwaParoshi vaiva zviuru zviviri zvine zana nemakumi manomwe ane vaviri," 
Ezra2:4 kwouya vokwaShefatiya vari mazana matatu namakumi manomwe navaviri," 
Ezra2:5 kwoti vokwaAra variwo mazana manomwe ane makumi manomwe ane vashanu," 
Ezra2:6 kwotiwo vakwaPahatimoabhu vari vokwaJeshua naJoabhu vari zviuru zviviri zvine mazana masere negumi navaviri," 
Ezra2:7 kwouyawo vokwaEramu vari chiuru chine mazana maviri ane makumi mashanu avanhu," 
Ezra2:8 kwoti vokwaZatu vaiva mazana mapfumbamwe ane makumi mana navashanu," 
Ezra2:9 kwozouya vokwaZakai variwo mazana manomwe ane makumi matanhatu," 
Ezra2:10 kukati vokwaBhani vari mazana matanhatu ane makumi mana navaviri," 
Ezra2:11 kukatiwo vokwaBhebhai mazana matanhatu ane makumi maviri navatatu," 
Ezra2:12 kuchitiwo vokwaAzigadhi chiuru chine mazana maviri namakumi maviri ane vaviri," 
Ezra2:13 kwouya vokwaAdhonikamu vaiva mazana matanhatu ane makumi matanhatu navatanhatu," 
Ezra2:14 kwouyawo vokwaBhigivhai vari zviuru zviviri zvina makumi mashanu navatanhatu," 
Ezra2:15 kwozoti vokwaAdhini mazana mana namakumi mashanu navana," 
Ezra2:16 kwozotiwo vokwaAtero vari vokwaHezekiya makumi mapfumbamwe ana vasere," 
Ezra2:17 kwouya vokwaBhezai mazana matatu nemakumi maviri ana vatatu," 
Ezra2:18 kwouyawo vokwaJora vaiva zana negumi navaviri," 
Ezra2:19 kwoti vokwoHashumu vari mazana maviri ana makumi maviri navatatu," 
Ezra2:20 kwotiwo vokwaGibhari mazana mapfumbamwe ana vashanu. 
Ezra2:21 Vanakomana vokwaBheterehemu vaiva zana namakumi maviri ana vatatu," 
Ezra2:22 kwouya vokwaNetofa vari makumi mashanu ana vatanhatu," 
Ezra2:23 navarume vokwaAnatoti zana namakumi maviri navasere," 
Ezra2:24 vanakomana vokwaAzimavheti makumi mana navaviri," 
Ezra2:25 kwouya nevokuKiriyatijearimu, Kefira naBheeroti mazana manomwe ana makumi mana navatatu," 
Ezra2:26 kwouyawo vokuRama nokuGebha vaiva mazana matanhatu ana makumi maviri nomumwechete," 
Ezra2:27 uye vokwaMikimashi vari zana namakumi maviri navaviri," 
Ezra2:28 uyewo varume vokuBhetieri nokuAi mazana maviri ana makumi maviri navatatu 
Ezra2:29 uyezve varume vokwaNebho makumi mashanu navaviri," 
Ezra2:30 uye varume vokwaMagibhishi zana namakumi mashanu ane vatanhatu," 
Ezra2:31 uyewo vanakomana vokune imwe Eramu vaiva chiuru namazana maviri namakumi mashanu ana vana," 
Ezra2:32 kwouya vokwaHarimu vari mazana matatu namakumi maviri," 
Ezra2:33 kwouyawo vokwaRodhi nokwaHadhidhi okwaOno mazana manomwe ana makumi maviri nevashanu," 
Ezra2:34 kwoti vokuJeriko mazana matatu ana makumi mana navashanu," 
Ezra2:35 kwotiwo vokwaSenaa zviuru zvitatu zvine mazana matanhatu namakumi matatu. 
Ezra2:36 Vapristi: vanakomana vokwaJedhaya vari vemba yokwaJeshua vaiva mazana mapfumbambwe ana makumi manomwe nevatatu," 
Ezra2:37 kwouya vokwaImero vari chiuru chine makumi mashanu ane vaviri," 
Ezra2:38 kwouyawo vokwaPashihuru chiuru china mazana maviri ana makumi mana navanomwe 
Ezra2:39 kwozouya vokwaHarimu chiuru chine gumi navanomwe. 
Ezra2:40 VaRevhi, vanakomana vokwaJeshua nevokwaKadhimieri vechizvarwa chokwaHodhavhiya vaiva makumi manomwe ane vana." 
Ezra2:41 Vaimbi vana vokwaAsafu vaivawo zana namakumi maviri navasere. 
Ezra2:42 Vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru vaiva vanakomana vevava vanoti: Sharumu naAtero naTarimoni naAkubhu naHatita naShobhari. Pamwechete vaiva zana namakumi matatu navapfumbamwe. 
Ezra2:43 Vashandi vomuTemberi: vaiva vanakomana vavavawo vanoti: Ziha naHashupa naTabhahodhi 
Ezra2:44 naSairosi naSiaha naPadhoni 
Ezra2:45 naRebhana naHagabha naAkubhu 
Ezra2:46 naHagabhu naSharimai naHanani 
Ezra2:47 naGidhero naGahari naReaya 
Ezra2:48 naRezini naNekodha naGazamu 
Ezra2:49 naUza naPaseya naBhesai 
Ezra2:50 naAsina naMeunimu naNefisimu 
Ezra2:51 naBhakibhu naHakufa naHarihuru 
Ezra2:52 naBhazirati naMehidha naHarisha 
Ezra2:53 naBharikosi naSisera naTema 
Ezra2:54 naNezia naHatifa. 
Ezra2:55 Vanakomana vavaranda vaSoromoni: vakanga vakamira vakadai, paiti: vanakomana vokwaSotai naHasofereti naPerudha" 
Ezra2:56 naJaara naDharikoni naGidhero 
Ezra2:57 naShefatiya naHitiri naPokeretihazibhaimu naAmi. 
Ezra2:58 Ivava vepaTemberi pamwechete navaranda vaSoromoni vose vaiva mazana matatu ana makumi mapfumbamwe navaviri. 
Ezra2:59 Kune vamwe vaibva kuTerimera nokuTeriharisha nokuKerubhu nokuAdhani nokuImero, asi havana kukwanisa kurondedzera dzimba dzamadzibaba avo kuti ivo pachavo ndevechiIsiraeri here kana kuti kwete." 
Ezra2:60 Vakanga vari vanakomana vaava vanoti: Dheraya naTobhiya naNekodha. Ivava ava vaiva vari mazana matanhatu ane makumi mashanu navaviri. 
Ezra2:61 Pakati pavapristiwo: paivawo navanakomana veava vanoti: Habhaya naHakozi naBhazirai (Bhazirai uya wokuroora mwana waBhazirai wokuGireadhi akazenge ava kudaidzwa nezita ravo) 
Ezra2:62 Ivava ava vakatsvaka mazita avo pamazita akanga akanyorwa chizvarwa nechizvarwa asi haana kuwanikwapo. Ipapo paupristi vakanzi vakan'ora. 
Ezra2:63 Sadunhu akavati varege kudya zvokudya zvinoeresesa kusvikira patova nomupristi wokunzwa Mwari kuti anoti kudii achishandisa Urimu neTumimu. 
Ezra2:64 Gungano racho rose pamwechete rakanga riina vanhu zviuru makumi mana ane zviviri namazana matatu ane makumi matanhatu avanhu
