Ezra2:65 tisingaverengere varanda vavo vechirume nevechikadzi vakangawo vari zviuru zvinomwe zvavanhu zvina vanhu mazana matatu ana makumi matatu navanomwe. Vakangawo vaine vaimbi varume navakadzi vaiita mazana maviri. 
Ezra2:66 Vaive namabhiza mazana manomwe ane makumi matatu ana matanhatu nemanyurusi mazana maviri ana makumi mana namashanu," 
Ezra2:67 kwozouya ngamera mazana mana ana makumi matatu ane shanu namadhongi zviuru zvitanhatu zvine mazana manomwe namakumi maviri. 
Ezra2:68 Vamwe vatungamiriri vedzimhuri pavakasvika kumba yaTenzi yakanga iri kuJerusaremu vakabvisira imba yaMwari mipiro yokupa nechido yokuivakisa panzvimbo payo. 
Ezra2:69 Vakabvisa sokugonawo kwavo vachipa kune vokuchengeta maigara upfumi hwakanangana nebasa iroro ndarama yaiita mazana mashanu amakirogiramu nesirivha yainge yoda kuita matani maviri ana makirogiramu mazana masere nezana rehanzu dzavapristi. 
Ezra2:70 Vapristi navaRevhi navanhu vamwe navaimbi navachengetedzi vemisuo mikuru navashandi vepatemberi vakagara mumaguta ekwavo. VaIsiraeri vosewo vakagara mumaguta ekwavo. 
Ezra3:1 Pakazosvika mwedzi wechinomwe vaIsiraeri vakanga vatova mumaguta. Vanhu vakaungana muJerusaremu vaine pfungwa imwe. 
Ezra3:2 Ndopazosimuka Jeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki nevamwe vake vapristi naZerubhabhero mwanakomana waShearitieri pamwechete nehama dzake vakandovaka atari yaMwari weIsiraeri yokupirira mipiro yokupisa pairi sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo waMosesi, munhu waMwari." 
Ezra3:3 Vakagadzira atari panzvimbo payo nokuti vaitya vanhu vomunyikamo. Vakapirapo mipiro yokupisa kuna Mwari, iri mipiro yokupisa mangwanani nemanheru." 
Ezra3:4 Vakachengeta Mazuva Makuru eMatumba sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa vachipira mipiro yokupisa yemazuva ose. Uwandi hwayo huchifambiranawo nezviri pamurao sezvainge zvichidiwa pazuva nepazuva. 
Ezra3:5 Vakazopirawo mipiro yokupisa inoramba iripo nemipiro yepakugara kwemwedzi nepamazuva makuru ose akatemwa aTenzi nemipiro yomunhu wose zvake yokupa kuna Tenzi nechido. 
Ezra3:6 Kubvira pamusi wokutanga wemwedzi wechinomwe vakabva vatangisa kupira kuna Tenzi mipiro yokupisa. Izvozvo ugaro hwemba yaTenzi hwakanga husati hwavakwa. 
Ezra3:7 Nokudaro vakapa mari kune vokuvaka nemabwe nokuvavezi. Vakapawo chokudya nechokunwa namafuta eorivhi kune vokuSidhoni nevokuTire kuti vatore mapango omusidhari kuRebhanoni vachiaunza kugungwa oendeswa kuJopa maererano nemvumo yavakanga vapiwa naSairosi mambo wePezhiya. 
Ezra3:8 Mugore rechipiri rokuuya kwavo kumba yaMwari kuJerusaremu, mumwedzi wechipiri, Zerubhabhero mwanakomana waShearitieri naJeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki vakatanga kuvaka pamwechete nehama dzavo vapristi nevaRevhi nevamwe vose vakanga vadzoka kuJerusaremu vachibva kuutapwa. Vakasarudza vamwe vevaRevhi vaibvira pamakore makumi maviri zvichikwira kuti vave vakuru vakuru vokuona nezvebasa remba yaTenzi." 
Ezra3:9 Jeshua navanakomana vake nehama dzake pamwechete naKadhimieri navanakomanawo vake, vechizvarwa chokwaJudha, ndivo vakasimuka vova vokuona nezvevashandi vebasa remba yaMwari pamwechete navanakomana vokwaHenadhadhi nevaRevhi navanawo vavo vakomana nehama dzavo." 
Ezra3:10 Vokuvaka pavakavaka ugaro hweTemberi yaTenzi, ndopazosimukawo vapristi vakapfeka magemenzi avo nemabhosvo ukuwo vaRevhi navanakomana vaAsafi vaine makwakwakwa outare kuzorumbidza Tenzi semarongerwo azvakanga zvaitwa naDhavhidhi mambo weIsiraeri." 
Ezra3:11 Vakaimba vachidairana vachitenda nokurumbidza Tenzi vachiti “Nokuti wakanaka uye nokuti mwoyochena wake hauperi kuvaIsiraeri.” Izvozvo vanhu vose vaidaidzira kwazvo vachirumbidza Tenzi nokuti ugaro hwemba yaTenzi hwakanga hwavakwa. 
Ezra3:12 Asi vazhinji vevapristi nevaRevhi navatungamiriri vedzimba dzemadzibaba avo pavakaona ugaro hwemba iyoyi huchivakwa, vakahwihwidza kuchema zvinotonzwika kunyange zvazvo vamwe vaichema nokufara" 
Ezra3:13 zvokuti vanhu havana kumbogona kuziva kuti kuchema uku ndokwekufara here kana kuti vari kuchema nokuti paizhambwa ipapo izwi richinzwika nokoko kure. 
Ezra4:1 Vavengi vavanhu vokwaJudha nokwaBhenjamini pavakanzwa zvino kuti vanhu vokumbotapwa vakadzoka vaye vari kuvakira Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri Temberi," 
Ezra4:2 vakaenda kuna Zerubhabhero nevatungamiriri vaye vedzimba dzamadzibaba vakati kwavari, “Hatingavakewo here nemi nokuti isu tinotsvakawo Mwari wenyu kungoitawo imi uye tanga tichingopira zvibayiro kwaari kubvira panguva yaEsarihadhoni mambo weAsiria nyakutiuyisa kuno.”" 
Ezra4:3 Asi Zerubhabhero naJeshua navamwe vose vatungamiriri vaye vedzimba dzamadzibaba omuIsiraeri vakati kwavari, “Hazvinei nemi kuti isu tiri kuvakira Mwari wedu imba! Asi kutoti iyesu toga ndisu iyesu tichavakira Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri sokuudzwa kwatakaitwa namambo Sairosi, mambo wePezhiya.”" 
Ezra4:4 Vanhu vomunyika umu vakaodza mwoyo vanhu vokwaJudha vachivapinza mukutya kuvaka 
Ezra4:5 vachivakokera mamwe makurukota okuita zvokubhadhara kuti zvavaida zviparare mazuva ose aSairosi mambo wePezhiya kunyangovawo nomumazuva aDhariosi mambo wePezhiya. 
Ezra4:6 Kuzoti Ahashieroshi ava kutonga, achangotangisa kutonga vakanyora mhosva dzokupomera vagari vemaJudha neJerusaremu." 
Ezra4:7 Panguva yaAtakizesesi, Bhishiramu naMitiredhati naTabhieri navamwe vavo vose vechikwata chavo vakanyorera Atakizesesi mambo wePezhiya tsamba yakanyorwa nomutauro wechiArameiki ikaturikirwa." 
Ezra4:8 Mumwe mutongi ainzi Rehumu nomunyori Shimushai vakanyorera mambo Atakizesesi tsamba yokupomera Jerusaremu mhosva sezvizvi vachiti; 
Ezra4:9 “Ndisu vanaRehumu mutongi nomunyori, Shimushai nevamwe vose vechikwata chedu pamwechete navatongi namasadunhu navakuru vakuru vechiPezhiya navarume vokuEreki novokuBhabhironi uye varume vokuSusa, ndivo vaEramu ivavo," 
Ezra4:10 pamwechete navemamwe marudzi ose aye vakatapwa navakuru vakuru vokumba huru Osinaparu akagariswa kuSamaria nokuna mamwe maruwa ose enyika dziri Mhiri kweRwizi.” 
Ezra4:11 (Iyoyi ndiyo tsamba yavakatumira vachiti), “Ndisu varanda venyu vokuMhiri kwoRwizi rwaYufuratesi tanyorera imi mambo Atakizesesi tichikukwazisai." 
Ezra4:12 “Tingade kuti imi mambo muzive kuti vaJudha vakabva kwamuri vachiuya kwatiri vakasvikoenda kuJerusaremu. Vari kutovaka guta riye roumhandupandu nouipi. Vava kutopedza tsvingo dzacho nokugadziridzawo ugaro hwaro. 
Ezra4:13 Tati tikurumei nzeve mambo muzive zvenyu kuti guta irori rikangovakwa chete, tsvingo dzaro dzapera, havasi kuzobvisa mutero kana zvirehwarehwa zvokwamambo kunyange mutero wenzira nezvoupfumi hwokwamambo hauzowanika." 
Ezra4:14 Zvino pamusana pokuti tinodya zvomumuzinda tinozviona zvisinganake kuzotarisa zvedu mambo achishorwa. Ndokusaka tati tifane takurumai nzeve," 
Ezra4:15 kuitira kuti nyaya iyi imbotariswa muBhuku reZvinyorwa zvamadzibaba enyu. Muchazviwana muBhuku reZvainyorwa iroro mugoziva kuti guta irori iguta rechimurenga, munzwa zvawo chaiwo uri mundove kumadzimambo nokunyika dzaiva pasi paro. Vanhu vakangogara nokugara vari kusokana mweya woupanduki. Ndochakapawani kuti guta irori riparadzwe." 
Ezra4:16 Ndokusaka tati izvozvi zvisvikewo munzeve dzamambo, zvokuti guta iroro rikavakwa, tsvingo dzaro dzikapera, chenyuwo munyika dziri pasi penyu Mhiri kuno kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi, panenge pasisina.”" 
Ezra4:17 Mambo akatumira mhinduro achiti, “Netsamba yangu iyi imi mutongi Rehumu nomunyori Shimushai navamwe vose vechikwata chenyu vanogara kuSamaria nokumwe kwose mumaruwa enyika iri kuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi, ndinokukwazisai." 
Ezra4:18 Zvino tsamba yamakatitumira ndakanyatsoiverengerwa 
Ezra4:19 ndikatema chirevo kukatsvakwa zvikawanika kuti guta irori chingo nechingo rakangogara riri rokumukira madzimambo uye kuti imomo zvechimurenga nokusokana mweya zvoupanduki zvakatoitwa. 
Ezra4:20 Uye muJerusaremu makamboita madzimambo ane simba guru kwazvo vakatombotongawo maruwa ose enyika dziri kuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi kwavari kuchitoendeswawo mutero nezvirehwarehwa zvokwamambo pamwechete nomutero wenzira. 
Ezra4:21 Saka chitemerai vanhu ivavo chirevo chokuti vabva vamiswa uye kuti guta irori rirege kuvakwa kusvikira ini ndatozotema chirevo. 
Ezra4:22 Mochichenjera, murege zvechinono panyaya iyoyi. Umharadzi hwakadaro hungaregererweiko huchikura zvokuzosiya hwarozva mambo?”" 
Ezra4:23 Kuzoti tsamba yamambo Atakizesesi payakazoverengerwa Rehumu naShimushai munyori nevechikwata chavo vakabva vaita zvechimbichimbi kuenda kuJerusaremu kuvaJudha. Vakabva vaita zvokuvamanikidza nechisimba kuvamisa. 
Ezra4:24 Basa remba yaMwari iri kuJerusarmu rakabva rambomira rakadaro. Rakamira rakadaro kusvikira gore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi mambo wePezhiya. 
Ezra5:1 Ndipo pakazoporofita vaporofita vanaHagai naZekariya mwanakomana waIdho kuvaJudha vaiva kwaJudha neJerusaremu muzita raMwari weIsiraeri akanga ari pavari. 
Ezra5:2 Ndipo pakazosimuka Zerubhabhero mwanakomana waShearitieri naJeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki votangazve kuvaka imba yaMwari iri muJerusaremu vachibatsirwa navaporofita vaMwari vavaiva navo. 
Ezra5:3 Panguva yakareyo kwakauya Tatenai zisadunhu remaruwa ose enyika dziri kumhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi naShetaribhozenai pamwechete nevechikwata chavo vakavavinga vakataura kwavari vachiti, “Chirevo chokuti imi muvake imba iyi nezvamava kuvaka izvi chabva kuna ani?" 
Ezra5:4 Saizvozvo tinodawo kunzwa kuti mazita evarume vari kuvaka imba iyoyi iyi ndivanaani?” 
Ezra5:5 Asi ziso raMwari wavo rakanga riri pavakuru vakuru vevaJudha zvokuti havana kumbovamisa kusvikira shoko ratosvitswa kuna Dhariusi uye iyewo atotumira tsamba yokuvapindura panyaya iyoyi. 
Ezra5:6 Ino iyi ndotsamba yakanyorwa naTatenai zisadunhu renyika yokuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi naShetaribhozenai nevechikwata chavo nevatongi vokunyika yokuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi ikoko ikatumirwa kuna mambo Dhariusi. 
Ezra5:7 Vakamutumira tsamba yakanga yakanyorwa kunzi, “Netsamba yeduwo iyi mambo Dhariusi tinokukwazisai." 
Ezra5:8 Tingade kuti imi mambo muzivewo kuti takaenda kunyika yokwaJudha pamba yaMwari mukuru. Iri mukuvakwa izvozvi namabwe makuru, mapango akatowarikwa mumadziro umu. Basa irori riri kunyatsoenderera mberi kuri kuitwa chipatapata." 
Ezra5:9 Takabvunza vakuru vakuru ivavo tikataura navo tichiti, ‘Ndiani akakutemerai chirevo chokuti imi muvake imba iyi uye kuti mupedzese zvamuri kuvaka izvi chabva kuna ani?’" 
Ezra5:10 Takavabvunzawo mazita avo, tichiitira kuti imi muzive tigonyora mazita avarume vari kutungamirira vacho." 
Ezra5:11 Mhinduro yavakatipindura ndeyiyi vakati, ‘Isu tiri varanda vaMwari Wedenga napasi. Tiri kuvaka zvakare imba yakambovakwa nomumwe mambo weIsiraeri makore mazhinji akapfuura ikatopera." 
Ezra5:12 Asi pamusana pokuti madzibaba edu akashatirisa Mwari Wedenga akabva avaisa mumaoko aNebhukadhinezari mambo weBhabhironi wechiKaradhia. Iye akaparadza imba iyoyi akatuta vanhu kuendesa kuBhabhironi. 
Ezra5:13 Zvakadaro zvazvo, mugore rechiposhi rokutonga kwaSairosi mambo weBhabhironi, mambo Sairosi wakareyu akatema chirevo chokuti imba yaMwari iyoyi ivakwe zvakare." 
Ezra5:14 Izvozvo midziyo yendarama neyesirivha yomumba yaMwari yakanga yatorwa naNebhukadhineza muTemberi yaiva muJerusaremu ikaendwa nayo kuTemberi yokuBhabhironi, mambo Sairosi vakaiburitsa mutemberi yeBhabhironi ikaiswa mumaoko omumwe ainzi Sheshibhaza waakanga aita sadunhu wacho.’" 
Ezra5:15 Akamuti, ‘Tora midziyo iyi unoiisa muTemberi iri kuJerusaremu imba yaMwari ivakwe payakanga iri.’" 
Ezra5:16 Ndipo pakauya Sheshibhaza iyeyu akavaka ugaro hwemba yaMwari iri muJerusaremu. Kubvira panguva iyoyo kusvikira pari nhasi ichiri mukuvakwa haisati yapera. 
Ezra5:17 Naizvozvo kana imi mambo maonawo kuti pakanaka, ngakutsvakwe mumba mokuchengetera zvinyorwa zvokwamambo kuBhabhironi ikoko kuonekwe kuti mambo Sairosi akapa here chirevo chokuti imba yaMwari iyoyi iri muJerusaremu ivakwezve. Titumireiwo mhinduro yezvamunoda kuti zviitwe panyaya iyoyi.”" 
Ezra6:1 Mambo Dhariusi akabva azopawo chirevo, kukatsvakwa muBhabhironi mumba mokuchengetera zvinyorwa macho makanga machengeterwa zvinyorwa izvozvo." 
Ezra6:2 Zvakazowanika muEkibhatana guta guru renyika yeMedhia bhuku rokumunonora pakanga pakanyorwa kunzi, “Chiyeuchidzo!" 
Ezra6:3 Mugore rechiposhi rokutonga kwamambo Sairosi akatema chirevo chakanangana nezvemba yaMwari iri kuJerusaremu. Imba iyoyo ngaivakwe zvakare, nzvimbo yokupirira zvibayiro kuna Mwari kunounzwawo mipiro yokupisa. Kureba kuenda mudenga makumi maviri amamita anamamita manomwe, kufara kwayo kuchiita mamita makumi maviri anamamita manomwe." 
Ezra6:4 Inofanira kuva nemitsara inoravana ichiti mitsara mitatu yamabwe makuru yoteverwa nomutsara mumwechete wamapango. Mari inodiwa ikoko inofanira kubva munochengeterwa upfumi hwamambo. 
Ezra6:5 Pamusoro paizvozvo midziyo yendarama neyesirivha yomumba maMwari iya yakambotorwa naNebhukadhineza muTemberi iri kuJerusaremu ikaendeswa kuBhabhironi inofanira kudzoserwa iendeswe kwakare kutemberi iri Jerusaremu mumwe nomumwe panzvimbo pawaiva muirongedze mumba yaMwari imomo.” 
Ezra6:6 “Zvino imi vana Tatenai, zisadunhu renyika iri Mhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi naShetaribhozenai navamwe venyu masadunhu echikwata chenyu muri kunyika iri Mhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi, siyanai nazvo." 
Ezra6:7 Zvebasa remba yaMwari izvo siyanai nazvo. Regai sadunhu wavaJudha navakuru vakuru vavaJudha vavake zvakare imba yaMwari payaiva. 
Ezra6:8 Chimwe ndechokuti ndatotema chirevo chezvinofanira kuitirwa vakuru vakuru vavaJudha maererano nokuvakwazve kwemba yaMwari chokuti mari yacho inodiwapo inofanira kubhadharwa varume ivava yose zvayo yakadaro pasina zvokunonoka ichibva kumari yokwamambo pamutero wenyika yokuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi. 
Ezra6:9 Chose zvacho chinenge chichizodiwa sezvakaita handira dzichiri duku nehondohwe kana hwai dzemipiro yokupisira Mwari Wedenga kunyange koroni nomunyu newaini kana mafuta eorivhi, zvichadiwa zvacho navapristi kuJerusaremu; izvozvi izvi vanofanira kuti vapiwe zuva nezuva pasina zvokukundikana," 
Ezra6:10 kuitira kuti vapire zvibayiro zvinofadza Mwari Wedenga, vagonamatirawo upenyu hwamambo nohwevana vake." 
Ezra6:11 Ndatotemazve chimwe chirevo chokuti: Kuwana anongosandura chirevo ichochi, pamba pake ngapavhomorwe bango apaikirwe pariri, imba yake iitwe murwi wamarara." 
Ezra6:12 Iye Mwari akaita kuti zita rake riiswe ipapo ngaaparadze mambo kana vanhu vanenge vane chavangaite kusandura izvi kana kuparadza imba yaMwari iri muJerusaremu. Izvozvi ngazvinyatsoitwa nomazvo chaimo. Chirevo ichochi chatemwa neni. Ndini Dhariusi.” 
Ezra6:13 Tatenai zisadunhu renyika dzokuMhiri kwoRwizi rwaYufuratesi naShetari Bhozenai nevechikwata chavo vakanyatsoita naimomo chaimo makarehwa neshoko rakatumirwa naDhariusi. 
Ezra6:14 Izvozvo vakuru vakuru vevaJudha vainge vachivaka zvavo zvichibudirira nokuporofita kwomuporofita Hagai naZekariya mwanakomana waIdho. Vakapedza kuvaka imba yavo sezvakanga zvanzi zviitwe naMwari weIsiraeri uye maererano nechirevo chaSairosi naDhariusi naAtakizesesi mambo wePezhiya. 
Ezra6:15 Imba iyoyi yakapedzeswa pazuva rechitatu romwedzi waAdhari, muri mugore rechitanhatu rokutonga kwamambo Dhariusi." 
Ezra6:16 Vanhu veIsiraeri, vapristi nevaRevhi navamwe vose vokudzoka kuutapwa, vakaita zuva guru rokuteketerera kuna Mwari imba yaMwari iyi vachipembera kufara." 
Ezra6:17 Pakuteketerera imba yaMwari uku vakapira zana rehandira nehondohwe mazana maviri uye hwayana mazana mana pamwechete nomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo zveIsiraeri yose zvayo wamakotora gumi namaviri zvichienderanawo nouwandu hwamadzinza avaIsiraeri. 
Ezra6:18 Vakabvawo varonga vapristi muzvikwata zvavo, vaRevhiwo namajana kuitira basa raMwari muJerusaremu sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa muBhuku raMosesi." 
Ezra6:19 Pazuva regumi nechina romwedzi wokutanga, vokudzoka vaye vokumbenge vatamiswa vachiendeswa kusiri kwavo vakachengeta Pasika" 
Ezra6:20 nokuti vapristi navaRevhi pamwechete vakanga vazvinatsa vose vava vanhu vakazvichenura. Saka vakazviurayira ivo pachavo hwayana yePasika navaye vokudzoka vaya vokumbotamisirwa kusi kwavo nevamwe vavo vapristi. 
Ezra6:21 Yakadyiwa navanhu vechiIsiraeri vakanga vadzoka kwavakanga vatamisirwa kusi kwavo pamwechete nomunhu wose akanga abatanawo navo achizvitsaura mune zvakan'ora zvavanhu vechirudzi vomunyika imomu kuitira kuti vazotsvaka Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
Ezra6:22 Vakachengeta mazuva makuru echingwa chisina mbiriso kwemazuva manomwe vachifara nokuti Tenzi akanga avafadza kwazvo aitawo kuti mambo weAsiria apinduke mwoyo, uve kwavari avabatsire basa remba yaMwari, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
Ezra7:1 Mushure maizvozvi izvi, panguva yokutonga kwaAtakizesesi mambo wePezhiya, Ezira mwanakomana waSeraya Seraya aberekwa naAzariya Azariya ari mwana waHirikiya" 
Ezra7:2 Hirikiya mwanakomana waSharumu Sharumu wokuberekwa naZadhoki Zadhoki mwana waAhitubhu 
Ezra7:3 Ahitubhu ari mwana waAmariya Amariya ari mwanawo waAzariya Azariya aberekwa naMeraoti 
Ezra7:4 Mearaoti wokuberekwa naZerahiya Zerahiya mwanakomana waUzi Uzi aberekwa naBhuki 
Ezra7:5 Bhuki wokuberekwa naAbhishua Abhishua mwana waFinehasi mwana waErizeri mwana waAroni mupristi mukuru. 
Ezra7:6 Ezira wacho iyeyu akasimukawo kubva kuBhabhironi. Akanga ari munyori nyanzvi chaiyo yomutemo waMosesi wakapiwa naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri. Mambo akamupa zvose zvaakanga akumbira pamusana pokuti ruoko rwaTenzi, Mwari wake rwaiva paari." 
Ezra7:7 Kwakasimukawo vamwe vanhu vechiIsiraeri navapristi nevaRevhi navaimbi navachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru navashandi vomutemberi vakaendawo kuJerusaremu, mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwamambo Atakizesesi." 
Ezra7:8 Zvino iye akasvika Jerusaremu mumwedzi wechishanu muri mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwamambo uyu. 
Ezra7:9 Nokuti pazuva rechiposhi romwedzi wokutanga ndipo paakatangisa rwendo rwokubva kuBhabhironi; kuzoti pava pazuva rechiposhi remwedzi wechishanu, akasvika muJerusaremu pamusana pokuti ruoko rutsvene rwaMwari wake rwaiva paari" 
Ezra7:10 nokuti Ezira akanga azvipira nomwoyo wose kudzidza mutemo waTenzi nokuuchengeta nokudzidzisawo zvirevo zvake nemirao yake muIsiraeri. 
Ezra7:11 Tsamba yakapiwa namambo Atakizesesi kumupristi Ezira munyori uya, muzivisisi wezvemitemo nemirao yaTenzi yaakapa Isiraeri; ndeyiyi yaiti:" 
Ezra7:12 “Ini Atakizesesi mambo wemadzimambo ndiri kukunyorera iwe Ezira mupristi nyanzvi yomutemo waMwari Wedenga. 
Ezra7:13 Zvino ndatema chirevo chokuti: Ani naani zvake wechiIsiraeri kunyange mupristi kana muRevhi munyika mangu anozvipira zvake kuenda kuJerusaremu ngaaende zvake newe. 
Ezra7:14 Sezvo ini namakurukota angu manomwe tirisu tiri kukutumai kundoongorora nezvemutemo waMwari wenyu uri mumaoko enyu kwaJudha nomuJerusaremu 
Ezra7:15 uye muendewo nesirivha nendarama yakapiwa zvayo namambo namakurukota ake sechipo kuna Mwari weIsiraeri ane musha wake muJerusaremu 
Ezra7:16 pamwechete nesirivha nendarama yamuchawana munyika yose yeBhabhironi pamwechetewo nomupiro wokupa zvavanotsidza zvavo kupirira imba yaMwari wavo iri kuJerusaremu. 
Ezra7:17 “Munyatsoona kuti nemari iyoyi manyatsotengawo handira nehondohwe nehwayana pamwechete nemipiro yazvo yembesanwa nemipirowo yazvo yokuteura. Munofanira kupira izvozvo paatari yepaimba yaMwari wenyu iri muJerusaremu. 
Ezra7:18 Zvamunenge maonawo imi nehama dzenyu kuti zvakanaka kuitwa nesirivha nendarama inenge yasara, itai zvenyu maererano nezvinenge zvichidiwa naMwari wenyu." 
Ezra7:19 Midziyo yamakapiwa yokushandisa mumba yaMwari wenyu, mundozviturira kuna Mwari weJerusaremu." 
Ezra7:20 Kana pane chimwezve chingadiwe pamba yaMwari wenyu chinenge chichifanira kuti imi mubvise munotora zvenyu mudzimba dzinochengeterwa upfumi hwokwamambo. 
Ezra7:21 “Zvino ini mambo Atakizesesi ndatemera chirevo vanasahomwe vose vari kunyika yokuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi chokuti: chose zvacho chinenge charehwa kwamuri nomupristi vaEzira, nyanzvi yomutemo waMwari wedenga nyatsochiitai nomazvo chaimo;" 
Ezra7:22 sirivha ngaive ingasvike zvayo matani mana ane makirogiramu mazana mana chete; koroni ivewo ingasvike gumi rezviuru zvemakirogiramu chete; waini ive zvayo inosvika zviuru zviviri zvemarita chete; mafuta eorivhi avewo zvawo angasvike zviuru zviviri zvemarita chete; munyu uve usina muganhu. 
Ezra7:23 Chose chinenge charehwa naMwari wedenga chepamba yaMwari iyeyo nyatsochiitai nokukurumidza angadaro akavirukira umambo hwangu nehwavanakomana vangu nehasha. 
Ezra7:24 Tinokuzivisaiwo kuti vapristi nevaRevhi kana vaimbi kana vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru kunyange vashandi vepaTemberi kana vamwe vashandi zvavo vepaTemberi yaMwari hamuchabvumirwa nomurao kuvabvisisa mutero kana zvirehwarehwa zvokwamambo kunyange mutero wenzira. 
Ezra7:25 Zvino iwe Ezira maererano noungwaru hwaMwari hwako hwaunahwo, sarudza vokutonga dzimhosva navatongi vakuru vanotongera vanhu vose venyika iri Mhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi, vose zvavo vanoziva mitemo yaMwari wako, vasingaizive wovadzidzisawo." 
Ezra7:26 Ani naani zvake anongorega chete kuteerera mutemo waMwari wako nomutemo wamambo ngaatongwe zvakaomarara kungave kunzi aurayiwe kana kudzingwa munyika kunyange kunzi atorerwe zvinhu zvake zvaanazvo kana kuiswa muusungwa.” 
Ezra7:27 “Ngaarumbidzwe Tenzi, Mwari wemadzibaba edu akaisa izvozvi zvakadai izvi mupfungwa dzamambo zvokushongedza imba yaTenzi iri muJerusaremu" 
Ezra7:28 akaita kuti mwoyochena wake usvikewo kwandiri ndionekwewo somunhu namambo namakurukota ake ndionekwewo somunhu nevakuru vakuru chaivo vepamusoro vokwamambo. Zvakabva zvandikurudzirawo nokuti ruoko rwaTenzi Mwari wangu rwaiva pandiri ndikakokorodza varume vechiIsiraeri vakuru vakuru ndikakwira kuenda navo.” 
Ezra8:1 Vanakomana vevatungamiriri vedzimhuri dzemadzibaba avo nezvizvarwa zvevakasimuka vakabva kuBhabhironi neni pakutonga kwamambo Atakizesesi ndeava ava, paiti:" 
Ezra8:2 vokwaFinehasi: ndiGerishomu vokwaItamaru: ndiDhanieri vokwaDhavhidhi: ndiHatushi 
Ezra8:3 wokumhuri yokwaShekaniya. Vanakomana vokwaParoshi: ndiZekariya aiva nezana revanhu rine varume makumi mashanu vaakanyorwa ainavo 
Ezra8:4 vokwaPahatimoabhu: ndiErihoenai wokumhuri yokwaZeraya aine mazana maviri evarume 
Ezra8:5 vanakomana vokwaShekaniya mwanakomana waJahazieri aine mazana matatu avarume. 
Ezra8:6 VokwaAdhini: ndiObhedhi mwanakomana waJonatani akanga aina varume makumi mashanu 
Ezra8:7 vokwaEramu: ndiJeshaya mwanakomana waAtariya aivawo namakumi manomwe avarume 
Ezra8:8 vokwaShefatiya: ndiZebhadhiya mwanakomana waMikaeri aina makumi masere evarume 
Ezra8:9 vokwaJoabhu: ndiObhadhiya mwanakomana waJehieri namazana maviri evarume navarume gumi navasere 
Ezra8:10 vokwaBhani: ndiSherumiti mwanakomana waJosifiya akanga aine zana namakumi matanhatu evarume 
Ezra8:11 vokwaBhebhai: ndiZekariya mwanakomana wokwaBhebhai aine varume makumi maviri ane vasere. 
Ezra8:12 VokwaAazigadhi: ndiJohanani mwanakomana wokwaHakatani akangawo aine zana revarume rine varume gumi 
Ezra8:13 vokwaAdhonikamu: vokupedzisira vacho mazita avo ndeaya anoti Erifereti naJeueri naShemaya vaivawo namakumi matanhatu evarume 
Ezra8:14 vokwaBhigivhai: ndiUtai naZakuri vaine makumi manomwe evarume. 
Ezra8:15 Ndakavaunganidza parwizi runoerera ruchienda kuAhavha tikamboita musasa wedu ipapo kwamazuva matatu. Pandakawongorora vanhu navapristi, handina kuwana paina vanakomana vokwaRevhi." 
Ezra8:16 Ndopandakatumira shoko rokuti kuuye Eriezero naArieri naShemaya naErinatani naJaribhu kwouya Erinatani naNatani naZekariya naMeshuramu vakuru vakuru, kwozouya Joyaribhu naErinatani vakanga vari vanhu vainzwisisa" 
Ezra8:17 ndikavatuma kuna Idho mukuru mukuru aiva kunzvimbo inonzi Kasifia. Ndakavaudza zvokundotaura kuna Idho nehama dzavo vashandi vepatemberi kuKasifia kwacho ndichiti vatitumire vokushanda mumba yaMwari wedu. 
Ezra8:18 Pamusana pokuti ruoko rwaMwari rutsvene rwaiva pamusoro pedu, ivo vakatiunzirawo murume anoungwaru kwazvo wokuvanakomana vokwaMahiri mwanakomana waRevhi mwana waIsiraeri anonzi Sherebhiya pamwechete navanakomana vake nehama dzake vari gumi navasere." 
Ezra8:19 Uyewo naHashabhiya aina Jeshaya vanakomana vokwaMerari pamwechete nehama dzavo navana vavo vakomana vari makumi maviri. 
Ezra8:20 Apa tinenge tisingaverengere zvedu mazana maviri ana makumi maviri avashandi vepaTemberi vakanzi naDhavhidhi namakurukota ake vave pavo voga kuitira kuti vashandire vaRevhi. Ivava vose zvavo vakatodomwa namazita. 
Ezra8:21 Ndakazodaidzira kuti kutsanywe ipapo parwizi rweAhavha kuitira kuti tizvidukupise kuna Mwari wedu kuti atiwanisewo kufamba kwakanaka isu navana vedu nezvedu zvose zvataiva nazvo. 
Ezra8:22 Chakandidariso kwaiva kunyara kukumbira mambo chikwata chavarwi vehondo navachairi vamabhiza vokutidzivirira kuvavengi murwendo rwedu sezvo takanga tati kuna mambo, “Ruoko rwaMwari wedu ruri pane vose vanomutsvaka kuti zvivanakire, uku, simba rehasha dzake richivirukira vose vanomufuratira.”" 
Ezra8:23 Ipapo isu takatsanya tichiteterera kuna Mwari wedu naizvozvi izvi, iye ndokunzwawo chichemo chedu." 
Ezra8:24 Ndakazosarudza vapristi gumi navaviri vakuru vakuru ava vanoti: Sherebhiya naHashabhiya nedzimwe hama dzavo gumi dzavaiva nadzo. 
Ezra8:25 Ndakavaerera sirivha nendarama nemidziyo yechipo chiya chokubvisirwa imba yaMwari wedu namambo namakurukota ake namadzishe ake pamwechete navaIsiraeri vose vaivepo. 
Ezra8:26 Ndakaera ndikaisa mumaoko avo, sirivha inoita matani makumi maviri nezana remidziyo yesirivha inorema makirogiramu makumi manomwe uye ndarama inorema matani matatu ana makirogiramu mazana mana" 
Ezra8:27 nemakumi maviri endiro dzendarama dzinorema makirogiramu masere ana magiramu mazana mana uyewo midziyo miviri yendarira yakangokosha zvimwechetezvo sendarama. 
Ezra8:28 Ndakavati, “Imi muri vanhu vakatsaurirwa Tenzi vatsvene uye midziyo iyoyi iyi, midziyo inoera. Sirivha nendarama iyi chipo chokupa kuna Tenzi, Mwari wemadzibaba enyu yomupiro wokupawo zvawo nechido." 
Ezra8:29 Itarirei muichengetedze kusvikira maiera pameso pavapristi vakuru vakuru navaRevhi navatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba muIsiraeri kuJerusaremu mudzimba dzomutemberi yaTenzi.” 
Ezra8:30 Saizvozvo vapristi navaRevhi vakagamuchira mutoro wesirivha iyoyi nendarama nemidziyo vakaenda nayo Jerusaremu kumba yaMwari wedu. 
Ezra8:31 Takazosimuka kubva parwizi rwaAhavha pazuva regumi nechipiri remwedzi wokutanga toenda Jerusaremu, ruoko rwaMwari wedu ruri patiri. Akatinunura mumaoko avavengi nokune vaitihwandira munzira." 
Ezra8:32 Takasvika kuJerusaremu tikaita mazuva edu matatu tirimo. 
Ezra8:33 Pazuva rechina racho, mukati memba yaMwari imomo, sirivha iya nendarama nemidziyo yakaerwa ikaiswa mumaoko omupristi Meremoti mwanakomana waUriya aivawo naEreazari mwanakomana wokwaFinehasi vaine vaRevhi ava vanoti Jozabhadhi mwanakomana waJeshua naNoadhiya mwanakomana wokwaBhinui." 
Ezra8:34 Zvose zvakaverengwa zvikaerwa uremu hwazvo zvose hukanyorwa pasi. 
Ezra8:35 Panguva iyoyo vokudzoka kuutapwa vakanga vatapwa vakatamisirwa kusi kwavo vaye vakapira mipiro yokupisa kuna Mwari weIsiraeri zvaiti gumi rehandira dzokupirira Isiraeri yose nehondohwe makumi mapfumbamwe nenhanhatu nehwayana makumi manomwe nenomwe namakotora gumi namaviri omupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo. Zvose izvozvi zvaiva zvomupiro wokupisira kuna Tenzi. 
Ezra8:36 Vakasvitsawo zvirevo zvamambo kuna madzishe okwamambo nokumasadunhu enyika iyi yokuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi, ivo ndokubva vabatsira vanhu uye nezvemba yaMwari." 
Ezra9:1 Mushure mokunge izvi zvaitwa, vakuru vakuru vakauya kwandiri vakati, “Vanhu vechiIsiraeri navapristi nevaRevhi havana kuzvitsaura kune vechirudzi vedzinyika idzi nokune zvakaipa zvadzo zvisingadiwe naMwari kune vechiKanani nevaHiti nevaPerizi nevaJebhusi nevaAmoni nevaMoabhu nevechiIjipiti nevaAmori" 
Ezra9:2 nokuti vakatora zvavo vakadzi pane vamwe vevanasikana vavo vavanhu ava vakatoroorerawo vanakomana vavo, zvokuti rudzi rutsvene urwu rwangova mvenge-mvenge nevechirudzi. Panyaya yokurega kuva pachokwadi iyika, makurukota acho nevakuru vakuru vacho chaivo ndovakanga vava nhungamiri.”" 
Ezra9:3 Pandakazvinzwa ndakabvarura neshungu hembe yangu negemenzi rangu ndikazvigera ndebvu nevhudzi rangu mumusoro ndikati pasi go ndadumbirwa nazvo. 
Ezra9:4 Zvino vose vaye vaidedera shoko raMwari weIsiraeri pamusana pokurega kuva pachokwadi kwevokudzoka vaye vakanga vatapwa vakatamisirwa kusi kwavo vakaunganidzana pandiri ini ndigere ndadumbirwa nazvo kudaro kusvikira panguva yechibayiro chemanheru. 
Ezra9:5 Panguva yechibayiro chemanheru ndakasimuka kubva pandaitsanya nehanzu dzangu nejasi rangu zvakabvaruka. Ndakapfugama ndikasumudza maoko angu kuna Tenzi, Mwari wangu" 
Ezra9:6 ndichiti, “Mwari wangu ndinonyara, zvabva zvandishayisa pokuda kuti ndisumudzewo uso kutarisa kwamuri Mwari wangu pamusana pokuti uipi hwedu hwareba pamusoro zvokutotipfuurira. Mhosva dzedu dzavirikidzana kusvika kudenga chaiko iko." 
Ezra9:7 Kubvira mumazuva amadzibaba edu, kusvikira pari nhasi tanga tichingova mumhosva huru. Zvino pamusana pouipi hwedu ihwohwo, isu nemadzimambo edu navapristi vedu takaiswa mumaoko amadzimambo edzinyika idzi kumapakatwa nokuutapwa nomukupambwa nomukunyadziswa chaiko sezvazviri nhasi uno." 
Ezra9:8 Asi zvino tanga tambonzi itirwei mwoyo wakanaka kwechinguva nemi Tenzi, Mwari wedu mukatisiyirawo chitsama chevanhu vakasara nokutipawo hoko yepokugara pakachengeteka munzvimbo yenyu inoera kuitira kuti imi Mwari wedu mutivhenekere meso edu nokutimutsirudza muutapwa hwedu" 
Ezra9:9 nokuti tanga tiri varanda asi Mwari wedu hamuna kutisiya tiri varanda kudaro. Asi makaratidza mwoyochena wenyu kwatiri pamberi pemadzimambo ePezhiya mukatimutsurudza mwoyo kuti timise imba yaMwari wedu nokuvakiridza matongo ayo mukaita sorusvingo kwatiri muJudhea nomuJerusaremu. 
Ezra9:10 “Ko zvino nhai Mwari wedu tingange tichati kudii pakadai apa nokuti takafuratiraka isu mitemo yenyu 
Ezra9:11 yamakareva nomuromo wevaranda venyu vaporofita muchiti, ‘Nyika yamava kupinda kundoita yenyu iyi, inyika yakan'oreswa nouipi hwevanhu venyika idzodzo nezviito zvavo zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naMwari zvakazara kunze nokunze nokun'ora kwavo." 
Ezra9:12 Naizvozvo musaroodze vanasinaka venyu kuvanakomana vavo kana kuroorera vanakomana venyu vanasikana vavo. Musambofa makatsvaka zvenyu kuwirirana navo kana kuvabatsira kubudirira kuitira kuti musimbe mudyewo zvakanaka zvomunyika iyoyo muchizoisiyirawo vana venyu senhaka narini wose.’ 
Ezra9:13 Mushure meizvozvi zvose zvakadai kutiwira pamusana pezviito zvedu zvakaipa uye nemhosva yedu huru tichionawo kuti imi Mwari wedu hamuna kutiranga sezvataikodzera uye makatotipawo zvenyu chitsama chavanhu vakasara sechichi; 
Ezra9:14 ndipo here patingatyore zvakare mitemo yenyu tichiroorerana nevanhu vanoita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe nemi Mwari? Hazvingakushatirisei here mukatosvika pakutiparadza zvokutozosara pasisina chitsama chevanhu vanosara kana kuwana anopunyuka? 
Ezra9:15 Imi Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, imi makarurama nokuti takatosiyirwawo chitsama chevanhu vakasara chakatopunyuka sezvazviri nhasi. Hezvika takadai kuva pamuri kunyange pasina angagone kumira pamuri tiine mhosva pamusana paizvozvi.”" 
Ezra10:1 Ezira paakanga achinamata achireurura nokuhwihwidza kuchema nokuzvirovera pasi pamberi pemba yaMwari, chita chikuru kwazvo chavarume navakadzi navana chakaungana kwaari chichibva muIsiraeri nokuti vanhu vaichema kwazvo." 
Ezra10:2 Shekaniya mwanakomana waJehieri wokuvanakomana vokwaEramu akataura kuna Ezira achiti, “Hatina kutendeka kuna Mwari wedu, takaroora vakadzi vechirudzi vendudzi dzomunyika ino. Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo Isiraeri ichine chitarisiro." 
Ezra10:3 Naizvozvo ngatiitei chitenderano naMwari wedu tirambe vakadzi vacho navana vavo maererano nezano renyu changamire uye maererano nezano ravanhu vanodedera mutemo waMwari wedu, zviitwewo maererano nezviri mumutemo." 
Ezra10:4 Chisumukai nokuti irori ibasa renyu, isu tinokutsigirai simbai mwoyo muzviite.”" 
Ezra10:5 Ezira akasimuka akaitisa vakuru vakuru navapristi navaRevhi neveIsiraeri vose chitsidzo chokuti vachaita zvakanga zvarehwa zvacho. Nokudaro vakaita chitsidzo. 
Ezra10:6 Ezira akabva pamberi pemba yaMwari akaenda kumba kwaJehohanani mwanakomana waEriyashibhu. Ndokwaakaenda akandorarako asingadye kana kunwa mvura nokuti akanga achichema kusatendeka kwevaye vakatandanisirwa kusiri kwavo. 
Ezra10:7 Kwakatumwa chirevo kwaJudha yose neJerusaremu kune vose vakanga vatamisirwa kusi kwavo vaye kuti vaungane kuJerusaremu 
Ezra10:8 uye kuti kana munhu akarega kuuyako mazuva matatu asati apera, sezvanga zvatemwa namakurukota navakuru vakuru kuti abvutirwe zvinhu zvaanazvo iye pachake agodzingwa mugungano revaye vokunga vatapwa vachiendeswa kusi kwavo." 
Ezra10:9 Varume vose vokwaJudha nevokwaBhenjamini vakaungana kuJerusaremu mumazuva matatu uri mwedzi wechipfumbamwe musi wechimakumi maviri womwedzi iwoyo. Vanhu vose vakaungana munhandare yepamusuo wemba yaMwari vachidedera kutya nyaya iyoyi uyewo pamusana pemvura zhinji yainaya. 
Ezra10:10 Mupristi Ezira akasimuka akati kwavari, “Makakanganisa nokuroora kwamakaita vakadzi vechirudzi mukaita kuti mhosva yeIsiraeri ikure." 
Ezra10:11 Zvino reururai kuna Tenzi, Mwari wamadzibaba enyu muite kuda kwake muzvitsaure kuvanhu vomunyika muno navakadzi vechirudzi.”" 
Ezra10:12 Vanhu vose vakapindura nezwi guru vachiti, “Ndizvozvo chaizvo! Tinofanira kuita sezvamareva." 
Ezra10:13 Asika vanhu vakawanda ava uye inguva yokuwanda kwemvura yokunaya. Hatigone kuramba takamira panze pano uye harisi basa rezuva rimwechete kana maviri nokuti kukanganisa kwedu panyaya iyoyi kukuru chaizvo. 
Ezra10:14 Mochirega makurukota edu amiririre gungano rose, maguta edu ose ana vakadzi vacho vechirudzi vazouya panguva dzakatemwa. Vanofanira kuuya navakuru vakuru navotongi veguta iroro kusvikira hasha dzaMwari wedu dzinotyisa kwatiri panyaya iyoyi dzapora.”" 
Ezra10:15 Jonatani mwanakomana waAsaheri naJahizeya mwanakomana waTikivha vakapikisana nazvo. Asi Meshuramu naShebhetai vaRevhi vakatsigirana navo. 
Ezra10:16 Vokudzoka vaye vokunga vatapwa vachiendeswa kusiri kwavo vaye vakaita saizvozvo. Mupristi Ezira akasarudza varume vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo imba nemba mumwe nomumwe achidomwa nezita. Pazuva rechiposhi romwedzi wegumi vakagara pasi vakatangisa kuongorora nyaya iyoyi. 
Ezra10:17 Nezuva rechiposhi romwedzi wokutanga vakatenge vatopedzerana nevarume vose vakanga vane vakadzi vechirudzi. 
Ezra10:18 Pakati pevanakomana vokuvapristi: vanhu vakawanika vakaroora vakadzi vechirudzi ndevava ava: kuvanakomana vokwaJeshua: nokwaJozadhaki nehama dzavo, ndiMaaseya naEriezero naJaribhu naGedhariya." 
Ezra10:19 Vakazvisunga nemhiko kuramba vakadzi vavo. Mupiro wokuripa mhosva wavakabvisira mhosva yavo ndowehondohwe yepazvipfuwo zvomudanga. 
Ezra10:20 Kuvanakomana vokwaImero: kukawanikawo Hanani naZebhadhiya 
Ezra10:21 Kuvanakomana vokwaHarimu: kukawanika kuina Maaseya naEriya naShemaya naJehieri naUziya 
Ezra10:22 kuvanakomana vokwaPashuri: kukawanikawo Erioenai naMaaseya naIshimaeri naNetaneri naJozabhadhi naErasa. 
Ezra10:23 KuvaRevhi: kwakawanika kuina Jozabhadhi naShimei naKeraya (Keraya uyu ndiye wakareyo Kerita) uye Petahiya naJudha naEriezero 
Ezra10:24 Kuvaimbi: uku kuna Eriyashibhu Kuvachengetedzi vepamisuo: mikuru kwaivawo naSharumu naTeremu naUri. 
Ezra10:25 Kune vokwaIsiraeri: kuvanakomana vokwaParoshi: ndiRamia naIzia naMarukiya naMijamini naEreazari naMarukiya naBhenaya. 
Ezra10:26 Kuvanakomana vokwaEramu: kuna Mataniya naZekariya naJehieri naAbhudhi naJeremoti naEriya. 
Ezra10:27 Kuvanakomana vokwaZatu: kwaiva naErioenai naEriyashibhu naMataniya naJeremoti naZabhadhi naAziza 
Ezra10:28 kuvanakomana vokwaBhebhai: ndiJehohanani naHananiya naZabhai naAtirai 
Ezra10:29 Kuvanakomana vokwaBhani: ndiMeshuramu naMaruki naAdhaya naJashubhu naSheari naJeremoti 
Ezra10:30 Kuvanakomana vokwaPahatimoabhu: kwakawanikwa kuina Adhina naKerari naBhenaya naMaaseya naMataniya naBhezarieri naBhinui naManase 
Ezra10:31 Kuvanakomanawo vokwaHarimu: kwaiva naEriezero naIshiya naMarukiya naShemaya naShimeoni 
Ezra10:32 naBhenjamini naMaruki naShemariya 
Ezra10:33 Kuvanakomana vokwaHashumu: kuna Matenai naMatata naZabhadhi naErifereti naJeremai naManase naShimei 
Ezra10:34 Kuvanakomana vokwaBhani: kwaivawo naMaadhai naAmuramu naUeri 
Ezra10:35 naBhenaya naBhedheya naKeruhi 
Ezra10:36 naVhaniya naMeremoti naEriyashibhu 
Ezra10:37 naMataniya naMatenai naJaasu 
Ezra10:38 Kuvanakomana vokwaBhinui: kwaiva naShimei 
Ezra10:39 naSheremiya naNatani naAdhaya 
Ezra10:40 naMakinadhebhu naShashai naSharai 
Ezra10:41 naAzareri naSheremiya naShemariya 
Ezra10:42 naSharumu naAmariya naJosefi 
Ezra10:43 Kuvanakomana vokwaNebho: kukawanikwa kuna Jeieri naMatitiya naZabhadhi naZebhina naJadhai naJoeri naBhenaya. 
Ezra10:44 Vose ivava vakanga varoora vakadzi vechirudzi vakavapa vana. 
Nehemiah1:1 Zvino idzi ndidzo nyaya dzaNehemiya mwanakomana waHakariya. Zvino zvakaitika kuti mumwedzi waKisirevhu mugore rechimakumi maviri ndiri muguta guru reSusa," 
Nehemiah1:2 hama yangu Hanani akasvikako achibva kwaJudha aina vamwe varume. Ini ndakamubvunza nezvevaJudha vakanga vachiri vapenyu vaye vakapunyuka muutapwa uyewo nezveJerusaremu. 
Nehemiah1:3 Iye akandipindura achiti, “Vapenyu vacho vari uku kunyika iyoyo vakapunyuka muutapwa vaye, vari munhamo huru kwazvo inonyadzisa. Rusvingo rweJerusaremu rwakapazirwa pasi, misuo yaro mikuru ikaroromeswa nomoto.”" 
Nehemiah1:4 Pandakanzwa mazwi iwaya ndakagara pasi ndikahwihwidza kuchema ndichiungudza kwamazuva akati kuti. Ndakaramba ndichitsanya ndichinamata kuna Mwari Wedenga 
Nehemiah1:5 ndichiti, “Tenzi, Mwari Wedenga. Muri Mwari mukuru anotyisa anochengeta chitenderano chake navanomuda vanochengeta mitemo yenyu." 
Nehemiah1:6 Tarisaiwo nemeso enyu muone, murerekere zvenyu nzeve yenyu munzwe munamato wangu ini muranda wenyu wandava kuita mberi kwenyu siku nesikati ndichinamatira vanhu veIsiraeri varanda venyu ndichireurura zvitadzo zvavanhu veIsiraeri zvatakakutadzirai nazvo, zviri zvokutadza izvi ini namadzibaba emhuri yokwangu, takatadza." 
Nehemiah1:7 Takakutadzirai zvokutadza zviya. Hatina kuchengeta mitemo nemirao nezvirevo zvamakaudza muranda wenyu Mosesi. 
Nehemiah1:8 Moyeukawo chirevo chamakareva kune muranda wenyu Mosesi muchiti, ‘Kana imi mukazova vanhu vasina kutendeka, ini ndichazokumwararidzai mukati memarudzi." 
Nehemiah1:9 Asi mukange mazotendeukira kwandiri mukateerera mitemo yangu moichengeta kunyange zvazvo manga makamwararidzirwa kure kwakaperera denga chaiko; ndichazovakokorodza ikoko ndouya navo kunzvimbo yandakasarudza kuti ndiise zita rangu ipapo.’ 
Nehemiah1:10 Varanda venyu ava, vanhu venyu vamakanunura namasimba enyu makuru noruoko rune simba." 
Nehemiah1:11 Nhai Tenzi rerekeraiwo nzeve yenyu kumunamato weni muranda wenyu nokumunamato wavaranda venyu vanofarira kutya zita renyu. Muitewo kuti ini muranda wenyu ndibudirire nhasi uno, mupewo kuti ndiitirwe tsiye nyoro nomurume iyeyu.” Izvozvo ndini ndaiva wokuona nezvewaini yokwamambo." 
Nehemiah2:1 Mumwedzi waNisani mugore rechimakumi maviri rokutonga kwamambo Atakizesesi, akagadzikirwa waini ini ndakachera waini ndikaiperekera kuna mambo. Zvino ndakanga ndisati ndambosuruvara paari." 
Nehemiah2:2 Mambo akanditi, “Uso hwako hwakangosuwa-suwa neiko kudai? Inga hausi kurwara wani? Hapana chimwe apa asi kusuruvara mwoyo uku.” Ndakatya zvikuru kwazvo." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ndakapindura mambo ndichiti, “Mambo zvoumambo hwenyu ngazvirambe zvakadaro. Chingatadzise uso hwangu kusuruvara chii iro guta rina makuva amadzibaba angu rakadaro kuita dongo. Misuwo yaro mikuru yakaroromeswa kutsva nomoto kudaro.”" 
Nehemiah2:4 Mambo akanditi, “Chichemo chako ipapa ndechei?” Ini ndakati namatei zvangu kuna Mwari Wedenga," 
Nehemiah2:5 ndokupindura mambo ndichiti, “Kana zvichikufadzai, mambo uye kana manzwireni muranda wenyu tsitsi nditumirei zvangu kwaJudha kuguta remakuva amadzibaba angu ndindorivakazve.”" 
Nehemiah2:6 Mambo akati kwandiri, izvozvo vahosi vakanga vagere zvavo munyasi mavo, “Uchaveko kwenguva yakadii? Kudzoka uchadzoka rini?” Mambo akazviona zviri zvinhu zvakanaka akandituma, ndikatarirana naye nguva yacho." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ndakati kuna mambo, “Kana zvichikufadzai mambo dai mukati ndipiwe matsamba anonyorerwa magavhuna enyika yokuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuretesi kuti vandirege ndichipfuura nomavo kudzamara ndasvika kwaJduha" 
Nehemiah2:8 netsambawo inonyorerwa Asafu, muchengeti wesango rokwamambo yokuti andipe matanda okugadzirisa mapango epamusuwo enhare yeTemberi uye erusvingo rweguta neemba yandichagara.” Mambo akandipa zvandakakumbira nokuti ruoko rutsvene rwaMwari wangu rwakanga rwuri pandiri." 
Nehemiah2:9 Ndakaenda kumagavhuna okunyika yekuMhiri kweRwizi rwaYufuratesi ndikavapa matsamba amambo. Izvozvo mambo akandituma navakuru vakuru vekuhondo navachairi vamabhiza. 
Nehemiah2:10 Izvozvi pazvakasvika munzeve dzaSanibharati muHoroni nerimwewo jinda rainzi Tobhiya muAmoni zvakavatsamwisa kwazvo kuti kune mumwe atouya achivavarira kuti zvinhu zvifambire vanhu vechiIsiraeri zvakanaka vabudirire. 
Nehemiah2:11 Saizvozvo ndakasvika kuJerusaremu ndikagarako mazuva matatu. 
Nehemiah2:12 Ndakamuka usiku ini navamwe varume vashomanini. Hapana wandainge ndaudza zvakanga zvaiswa mupfungwa dzangu naMwari wangu kuti ndiitire Jerusaremu. Ndakanga ndisina chimwe chipfuwo kusiya chandakanga ndakatasva. 
Nehemiah2:13 Ndakabuda usiku ihwohwo napasuo rokuBani ndakananga kutsime reMakava nokusuo rokuMarara ndichiongorora tsvingo dzeJerusaremu dzakanga dzakoromorwa nemisuo yaro mikuru yakanga yaparadzwa nomoto. 
Nehemiah2:14 Ndakazoenda kusuo guru reChisipiti nokuDziva raMambo asi pakanga pasina mukana wokuti chipfuwo chandakanga ndakatasva chipfuure napo. 
Nehemiah2:15 Ndopandakazokwira nebani usiku ihwohwo ndichiongorora rusvingo. Ndakadzoka ndokupinda nepasuo guru rokuBani ndokudzoka zvangu. 
Nehemiah2:16 Makurukota haana kuziva kwandakanga ndaenda kana zvandaiita. Ndakanga ndisati ndataurira vaJudha kana vapristi nevekumbahuru, kunyange machinda kana vamwe vose vaizoita basa iro." 
Nehemiah2:17 Ndopandakazovataurira kuti murikungoonawo dambudziko ratinaro rokuti Jerusaremu rangova dongo kudai, Misuo yaro mikuru yakapiswa. Uyai tivakire Jerusaremu rusvingo tirege kunge ticharamba tiri vanhu vakafumuka." 
Nehemiah2:18 Ndakavataurira nezveruoko rwaMwari wangu rwaiva pandiri kuti zvindifambire zvakanaka namazwiwo andakataurirwa namambo. Ivo vakati, “Ngatisimukei tivake.” Vakagwinyisa maoko avo kuita basa rakanaka." 
Nehemiah2:19 Asi Sanibharati muHoroni nejinda riya Tobhiya muAmoni naGeshemu muArabhu pavakazvinzwa vakatisveeredza vachitishora vachiti, “Chamuri kuita ndochii ichochi? Kupandukira mamboka uku?”" 
Nehemiah2:20 Ndakavapindura ndichiti, “Mwari wedenga ndiye achaita kuti tibudirire. Isu varanda vake tichasimuka tivake, chenyu imi muJerusaremu hapana, ungave mugove zvawo kana chamungatiwo zvacho chenyu kunyange chirangaridzo zvacho.”" 
Nehemiah3:1 Eriyashibhi mupristi mukuru akasimuka nehama dzake dzechipristi vakandovakazve suo guru reHwai. Vakariteketerera kuna Mwari vakariisa magoni. Chimbimbi chavakateketerera ichi chaibvira pariri chichisvika kunharirire yeZana chichindosvikawo kuNharirire yeHananero. 
Nehemiah3:2 Vakagamhwa navarume vokuJeriko kuvaka kumberi kwacho ndokugamhwawo kuvaka kumberi naZakuri mwanakomana wokwaImuri. 
Nehemiah3:3 Vanakomana vokwaHasenaa vakavaka suo guru reHove. Vakaisa magwatidziro aro vakaisawo magonhi aro nezvihuri zvaro namazariro aro. 
Nehemiah3:4 Kubva ipapo, Meremoti mwanakomana wokwaUriya mwana waHakozi ndiye akagadzira zvichienda mberi. Mberi kwaiyeyu kukavakwa naMeshuramu mwanakamana waBherekiya mwana wokwaMeshezabheri. Pamberi pacho pakagadzirwa naZadhoki mwanakomana waBhaana." 
Nehemiah3:5 VokuTekoa ndovakavakawo chidimu chaitevera uyu asi vakuru vakuru veko havana kutakura basa ravakapiwa namadzishe avo. 
Nehemiah3:6 Joyadha mwanakomana waPaseya naMeshuramu mwanakomana waBhesodheya ndivo vakagadziridza suo guru reChinyakare. Vakaisa magwatidziro aro vakaisa magonhi aro nezvihuri zvaro namazariro aro. 
Nehemiah3:7 Mberi kwaivava kwakagadzirwa naMeratiya wokuGibheoni naJadhoni wechiMeroni navarumewo vokuGibheoni nevokuMizipa vakanga vachitongwa nagavhuna wenyika yokuMhiri kwerwizi rwaYufuratesi. 
Nehemiah3:8 Uzieri mwanakomana waHarihaya mhizha yendarama ndiye akagadzirawo mberi kwake. Akagamhwawo kuvaka mberi kwake naHananiya mumwe wavagadziri vemafuta anonhuwirira. Vakagadziridza Jerusaremu kusvikira kuRusvingo rwaKapamhama. 
Nehemiah3:9 Mberi kwaivava kwakaitwawo naRefaya mwanakomana waHuru mutongi wechimwe chikamu cheJerusaremu. 
Nehemiah3:10 Jedhaya mwanakomana waHarumafu ndiye akagadzira mberi kwavo pakanangana nepamba pake. Ndokuteverwawo naHatushi mwanakomana waHashabhuneya. 
Nehemiah3:11 Marikiya mwanakomana waHarimu naHashubhu mwanakomana waPahatimoabhu vakavakazve chimwe chimbimbi chacho neNharirire yeZvoto. 
Nehemiah3:12 Akateverwa naSharumu mwanakomana waHaroheshi mutongi wechimwe chikamu cheJerusaremu kugadzira kwacho iye navakunda vake. 
Nehemiah3:13 Hanuni navagari vokuZanoa vakagadziridza suo guru rokuBani. Vakarivakazve vakariisa magonhi aro nezvihuri zvaro nomazariro aro. Vakagadzira chimbimbi chorusvingo chinoita mazana mana emamita ane mamita makumi mana kusvikira pasuo guru roKumarara. 
Nehemiah3:14 Marikiya mwanakomana wokwaRekabhu mutongi wedunhu reBhetihakeremu akagadziridza suo guru rokuMarara. Akarivakazve akariisa magonhi aro nezvihuri zvaro namazariro aro. 
Nehemiah3:15 Sharumu mwanakomana wokwaKoruhoze mutongi wedunhu reMizipa akagadziridza suo guru reChisipiti. Akarivakazve akariturika denga akaisawo magonhi aro nezvihuri zvaro namazariro aro. Akavakawo rusvingo rwokudziva reShera romubindu ramambo kusvikira kumadanho anodzika kuburuka muguta raDhavhidhi. 
Nehemiah3:16 Akagamhwawo kuvaka naNehemiya mwanakomana waAzibhuku mutongi wechimwe chikamu chedunhu reBhetitsuru akagadzirawo kusvika pakatarisana namakuva okwaDhavhidhi kudzamara kundosvika kuDziva riya rakaitwa navanhu kusvikawo kumba yemagamba. 
Nehemiah3:17 VaRevhi vakagadzira chimbimbi chaitevera uyu ndeava vanoti: Rehumu mwanakomana waBhani tevere Hashabhiya mutongi wedunhu reKeira akavaka akamiririra dunhu rake. 
Nehemiah3:18 Ndopanouyawo hama dzavo idzi dzaiti Bhavhai mwanakomana waHenadhadhi mutongi wechimwe chikamu chedunhu reKeira 
Nehemiah3:19 kwouya Ezero mwanakomana waJeshua mutongi weMizipa. Ndiye akagadziridza chimwe chimbimbi chepakatarisana nokunochengeterwa zvombo zvehondo pamukwidza kana kuti kona. 
Nehemiah3:20 Achiteverwa kuvaka chimwewo chacho naBharuki mwanakomana waZabhai akagadziridza kubvira paKona ipapo kusvikira kumusuo wemba yaEriyashibhi mupristi mukuru. 
Nehemiah3:21 Akateverwawo naMerimoti mwanakomana wokwaUriya mwanakomana waHakozi akagadziridza chimwe chidimu kutangira kumusuo wemba yaEriyashibhi kusvikirawo panoperera imba yacho yaEriyashibhu. 
Nehemiah3:22 Aiteverwawo pakugadziridza uku navapristi vakanga vakamira vakadai izvi: paiti varume vomunharaunda iyoyo 
Nehemiah3:23 kwouya Bhenjamini naHashubhu, ava vakagadziridza pakanga pakatarisana nepane dzimba dzavo tevere Azariya mwanakomana waMaaseya mwanakomana waAnaniya akagadzirawo parutivi pemba yake" 
Nehemiah3:24 achiteverwawo naBhinai mwanakomana waBhenadhadhi akagadzirawo chimwewo chidimu chacho kubvira pamba paAzariya kudzamara paKona paye kusvikirawo paye panotenderera. 
Nehemiah3:25 Pararu mwanakomana waUzai akagadzirawo pakatarisana napaKona pacho nepanharirire iya inooneka pamusoro pemba yamambo yapamusoro iya munhandare yavachengetedzi. Aiteverwa naPedhaya mwanakomana waParoshi 
Nehemiah3:26 nevashandi vepatemberi vainge vachigara kuOferu, vakagadziridzawo kubva ipapo kusvikira pakatarisana nesuo guru rokumvura kumabvazuva nenharire iya inoonekwa nepamusoro." 
Nehemiah3:27 Ndopanozouyawo vanhu vokuTekoa, vakagadziridza chimwewo chimbimbi kubvira pakatarisana nezinharirire guru riye raionekwa nepamusoro kusvika kuRusvingo rwaOferu." 
Nehemiah3:28 Kumusoro kwesuo guru reMabhiza kwakagadziridzwa navapristi mumwe nomumwe pakatarisana nepamba pake. 
Nehemiah3:29 Vaiteverwa naZadhiki mwanakomana waImeru vakagadziridza pakanga pakatarisana nepamba pake. Vaiteverwawo naShemaya mwanakomana waShekaniya muchengetedzi wepasuo guru rokuMabvazuva akagadziridzawo. 
Nehemiah3:30 Akagamhwawo naHaniya mwanakomana waSheremiya naHanu mwanakomana wechitanhatu waZarafu kugadziridza chimwewo chikamu. Aiteverwa naMeshuramu mwanakomana waBherekiya akagadziridzawo pakatarisana nepaaigara. 
Nehemiah3:31 Aimutevera ndiMarikiya mumwe wemhizha dzezvendarama akagadziridzawo kubvirapo kusvikira kudzimba dzavashandi vepatemberi nedzevanhu vemhindu dzokutengesa zvinhu pakatarisana nesuo guru rokuOngororera vanhu nokukamba kepamusoro kekukona. 
Nehemiah3:32 Mhizha dzezvendarama nevemhindu dzokutengesa zvinhu vaye vakagadzirawo chimbimbi chokubva pakamba kepamusoro kekukona kuya kusvikira kusuo guru reHwai. 
Nehemiah4:1 Zvino pakanzwa Sanibharati kuti tavakuvaka rusvingo akashatirwa akapaka nehasha akashora vaJudha. 
Nehemiah4:2 Akataura pameso pehama dzake nehondo yeSamaria achiti, “Ko tundonda twechiJudha twavakuiteiko izvozvi? Tungagadziredzewo chinhu here? Kutozopirawo nhai chaizvo chibayiro chaicho? Vanozvipedza nezuva rimwechete izvozvi? Vangagadziridze nhai mabwe akangoti pamwechete nemarara mirwi chu namamwe akatsva aya?”" 
Nehemiah4:3 Tobhiya muAmoni waakanga anaye akati, “Zvavari kuvaka zvachoka kana gava zvaro rikakwirapo rinotokoromotsera pasi masvingo iwayo.”" 
Nehemiah4:4 “Nhai Mwari wedu, chinzwaiwoka munzwe. “Kushorwa kwatiri kuitwa. Itai kuti rushambwa rwacho rwavareva ruvapfukire ivo vakare muite kuti vapambwe kunyika yavanenge vari muutapwa." 
Nehemiah4:5 Regai kuti mhosva dzavo dzifusirwe kana kumbodzima zvako pameso penyu chitadzo chavo nokuti zvavaita izvi kutodenha hasha dzenyu ikoku pana vavaki.” 
Nehemiah4:6 Takazovaka isu rusvingo. Rusvingo rwacho rwose rwakazobatanidzwa pamwechete, kureba kwarwo kukwira mudenga rwakanga rwatosvitswa pahafu chaipo nokuti zvebasa izvi vanhu vakanga vanyatsozvida." 
Nehemiah4:7 Kuzoti Sanibharati naTobhiya navaArabhu navaAmoni navokuAshidhodhi vanzwa kuti basa rokugadziridza masvingo eJerusaremu riri kufambira mberi uye kuti makanga mapazika muri kutodzivirwa-dzivirwa, vakaviruka kwazvo nehasha." 
Nehemiah4:8 Vose pamwechete vakaita bangano rokundorwisa Jerusaremu nokumutsa manyongori imomo. 
Nehemiah4:9 Takanamata kuna Mwari wedu tikaisa vagariri siku nesikati vokudzivirira. 
Nehemiah4:10 Asi Judha yakati: “Vabasa vokutakura, simba rava kuita shoma, ukuwo mavhu okukoromoka aye kuungana hewo matutu matutu, kuti tivake rusvingo, tava kutozvitadzirira isu.”" 
Nehemiah4:11 Vavengi vedu vaiti, “Ngativasvikirei pasina chavari kuziva vasingatione tingoerekana tava pakati pavo chaipo tigovauraya basa rimire.”" 
Nehemiah4:12 Kuzoti kwauya vaJudha vainge vari vavakidzani navo vakatiudza kagumi kagumi vachiti, “Chero kupi nokupi zvako kwamunotendeukira vanotimukira.”" 
Nehemiah4:13 Ipapo ndakaisa vanhu vokugaririra kuseri kwerusvingo panzvimbo dzorusvingo dzakanga dzakanyanyisa kuderera vaina mapakatwa avo namapfumo avo nouta hwavo. 
Nehemiah4:14 Ndakati nde-e kutarisa ndikasimuka ndokutaurira vokumba huru namakurukota navamwewo vanhu vose kuti, “Regai zvenyu kumbovatya. Rangarirai kuti Tenzi, iyeyu mukuru, anotyisa murwire hama dzenyu navana venyu vakomana navasikana navakadzi venyu nemisha yenyu.”" 
Nehemiah4:15 Vavengi vedu pavakanzwa kuti bangano racho takange tariziva uye kuti Mwari akanga arikangaidza, takadzokera tose kurusvingo munhu wose pabasa rake." 
Nehemiah4:16 Kubvira musi iwoyo chimwe chikamu chavashandi vokwangu vechirume ndovakange vava vokuita basa rokuvaka chimwewo chikamu chavo vava vokunge vakabipitira mapfumo nenhoo nouta namademautare zvokuzvidzivirira nazvo muhondo. Vatungamiriri vakatsigira vose vemba yokwaJudha vainge vachivaka parusvingo. 
Nehemiah4:17 Vaye vebasa rokutakura zvinhu vainge vakati uku ruoko rumwe ruri pabasa rokuvaka uku rumwe rwakabata chombo chokurwa. 
Nehemiah4:18 Muvaki wose ainge aine bakatwa rake mumuhara muchiuno. Achivaka wokuridza hwamanda aingewo ari parutivi pangu. 
Nehemiah4:19 Ndakataurira vokuimbahuru namakurukota navamwewo vanhu vose kuti, “Basa iguru iri uye takatarangana kwazvo tiri kure nakure parusvingo pacho apa takati uyu uko uyu uko." 
Nehemiah4:20 Kwamunenge manzwa kuti ndokuri kurira hwamanda imi unganai ikoko kwatinenge tiri. Mwari wedu achatirwira.” 
Nehemiah4:21 Saizvozvo takaita basa chimwe chikamu chavo chaiswera chakabipitira mapfumo kubvira mambakwedza kudzamara nyenyedzi dzabuda. 
Nehemiah4:22 Panguva iyoyo ndakataurirawo vanhu kuti, “Munhu ngaarare mukati meJerusaremu nomushandiwo wake kuitira kuti usiku huve hwokuchengetedza, masikati ave okushanda.”" 
Nehemiah4:23 Sokudaro ini nehama dzangu navashandi vangu navarume vokundichengetedza vaya vainditevera hapana akabvisa hanzu dzake munhu wese aigara akabatira muruoko zvombo zvokurwa nazvo. 
Nehemiah5:1 Zvino kwakazvomuka kuchema-chema kukuru kwazvo vanhu navakadzi vavo vachigunun'unira hama dzavo dzechiJudha. 
Nehemiah5:2 Kwaiva navamwe vaiti, “Pamwechete navana vedu vakomana navasikana kudai, tawanda isu. Dai tawanawo mbesanwa dzokudya tidyewo tigorarama.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Kukava nevamwewo vaiti, “Minda yedu nemisha yedu neminda yedu yemugirepisi tiri kutoiita rubatso kuti tiwanewo mbesanwa pamusana penzara iyoyi iyi.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Kwaivawo navamwe vaitiwo, “Isu takatokwereta mari yeminda yedu neyemindawo yedu yemigirepisi kundoteresa mutero wokwamambo." 
Nehemiah5:5 Isu tiri vanhu veropa rimwechete nehama dzedu idzodzo. Vana vedu vanongovawo vana vavo. Asi tava kutomanikidzira vana vedu vakomana navasikana kutopinda muuranda. Vamwe vanasikana vedu vakatopinda muuranda. Asi isu chokuti tiite hapana nokuti minda yedu nemindawo yedu yemigirepisi yatova zvayo yevamwe.” 
Nehemiah5:6 Ndakashatirwa kwazvo pandakanzwa kugunun'una kwavo pamwechete namazwi iwaya. 
Nehemiah5:7 Ndakazvibvunza mumwoyo zano rokuita, ndikatongesa vokumba huru namakurukota. Ndakati kwavari, “Muri kuita chimbadzo imi kuhama dzenyu, mose zvenyu iyemi.” Ndakavaunganidzira dare guru kwazvo ravanhu," 
Nehemiah5:8 ndikavati, “Isu takaedzawo napatinogona kununura hama dzedu dzechiJudha dzakanga dzatengeswa kune vechirudzi, asi imi ndopamava kutotengesa zvenyu hama dzenyu kuti isu titoita zvokuvatenga zvakare!” Vakati mwiro-o romuromo vakarishaya." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ndokubva ndati, “Zvamuri kuita izvi hazvina kunaka. Hamufaniri here kutevedza gwara rokutya Mwari kuitira kuti tirege kushorwa neveChirudzi vavengi vedu." 
Nehemiah5:10 Ini nehama dzangu nevashandi vangu tinovakweretesawo wani mari nembesanwa. Zvechimbadzo izvi, ngatiregei." 
Nehemiah5:11 Vadzoserei iye nhasi uno chaiye minda yavo nemindawo yavo yemigirepisi neminda yavo yemiorivhi nemisha yavo pamwechete nechikamu chechizana chemari nechembesanwa nechewaini namafuta eorivhi zvechimbadzo chamanga muchireva kwavari.” 
Nehemiah5:12 Ivo vakati, “Tichadzosera izvozvo pasina nechatichareva kwavari. Zvamareva ndozvatichaita.” Ndakadaidza vapristi ndichiitisa vatungamiri ivavo mhiko yokuti vaizoita sezvavakanga vatsidza." 
Nehemiah5:13 Ndakazunzawo hanzu yangu ndikati, “Mwari ngaazunze saizvozvi munhu wose anenge asina kuchengeta chitsidzo ichochi achimubvisa pamba pake nepane twake twose twaakashanda. Ngaazunzwe saizvozvo asare asisina nechinhu chose.” Dare rose rakati, “Ameni,” rikarumbidza Tenzi. Vanhu vakaita sezvavakanga vatsidza." 
Nehemiah5:14 Chimwe ndechokuti kubvira panguva yandakasarudzwa kuva gavhuna wavo munyika yokwaJudha kubvira pagore rechimakumi amviri kusvikira pagore rechimakumi matatu nepiri rokutonga kwamambo Atakizesesi; kwamakore gumi namaviri iwayo ini nehama dzangu hatina kumbenge tichidya zvokudya zvainge zvichifanira kupiwa gavhuna. 
Nehemiah5:15 Magavhuna akanditangira akanga achitakudza vanhu mitoro inorema vachitovatorera zvokudya newaini pamwechete namakumi mana emari yesirivha yamashekeri. Kunyangova vashandi vavo, vaitoremedzawo kwazvo vanhu. Asi ini handaiita saizvozvo pamusana pokutya Mwari." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ndakangotiwo sika sika nebasa rorusvingo urwu ndikarega kuzviwanirawo munda. Vashandi vokwangu vose vakangawo vakaunganidzana ikoko kubasa iroro. 
Nehemiah5:17 Chimwewo ndechokuti vaidya pamwechete neni pateburu yangu, vaiva varume zana namakumi mashanu vechiJudha namakurukota pamwechete navaiuya kwatiri vokumarudzi akanga akatipoteredza." 
Nehemiah5:18 Zvino pazuva paibayiwa izvi zvinoti: mombe imwechete nehwai nhanhatu dzakakora. Ndaibayirwawo huku ndichiwaniswa maguchu amatehwe ewaini yakawanda kwazvo pazuva roga roga rechigumi. Asi kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo handina kumboti nditopiwawo chete zvokudya zviya zvainge zvichifanira kupiwa gavhuna pamusana pokuti vanhu vainge vachitova kare nemutoro inorema. 
Nehemiah5:19 Ndiyeukeiwo ini Mwari kuti zvinhu zvindifambirewo zvakanaka pamusana pezvandakaitira vanhu ava. 
Nehemiah6:1 Zvino pazvakasvitswa munzeve dzaSanibharati naTobhiya naGeshemu muArabhu nomunzeve dzavamwe vavengi vedu vose kuti ndakavaka rusvingo, uye kuti pakanga pasisina kana gwanza zvaro (kunyange zvazvo ndakanga ndisati ndasungirira makonhi pamisuo mikuru yeguta)," 
Nehemiah6:2 Sanibharati naGeshemu, vakanditumira shoko rokuti, “Uya tisangane kune mumwe musha uri mubani reOno.” Asi zvavakanga vafunga ndezvokundikuvadza." 
Nehemiah6:3 Asi ini ndakavatumira nhume ndichiti, “Ndiri mukuita basa guru. Handikwanise kudzika ikoko. Basa ringamirireiko? Ndosiya zvangu basa ndichiuya kwamuri here?”" 
Nehemiah6:4 Vakatumira shoko kwandiri nomutoo mumwechetewo kanosvika kana, ini ndikavapindurawo zvimwechetezvo." 
Nehemiah6:5 Nenzira imwecheteyo Sanibharati akanditumira kechishanu muranda wake netsamba muruoko yakanga yakazaruka. 
Nehemiah6:6 Mairi makanga makanyorwa kunzi “Pane runyerekupe ruri kufamba muvanhu kana Geshemu ari kuzvitaurawo kuti iwe nevaJudha munoda kupanduka, ndokusaka muri kuvaka rusvingo. Zvinonzi norunyerekupe irworwo, iwe unoda kuva mambo wavo. Uyewo wakatosarudza vaporofita." 
Nehemiah6:7 Iwe wakagadza vaporofita vokuparidza nezvako muJerusaremu vachiti, ‘Munyika yaJudha mave namambo.’ Zvino shoko irori rakaita saizvozvi rava kundosvitswa kuna mambo. Saka iwe uya titaurirane.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Ini ndakatumira shoko kwaari ndichiti, “Zvauri kutaura izvo, hapana zvakamboitika zvakadaro, ndezvomusoro wako zvauri kutoita zvako iyewe.”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Nokuti vose zvavo vaida kutityisidzira vachifunga kuti pabasa irori maoko edu anobva arengwendeka, richibva raregwa kuitwa, asi imi Mwari simbisai maoko angu, ini ndokubva ndagwinyisa maoko." 
Nehemiah6:10 Zvino pandakaenda kumba kwaShemaya mwanakomana waDheraya aberekwa naMehetabhieri akanga akapfigirwa akati, “Ngatisanganei mumba yaMwari mukati chaimo meTemberi tizarire magonhi eTemberi nokuti vari kuuya kuzokuuraya vari kuuya usiku kuzokuuraya.”" 
Nehemiah6:11 Asi ini ndakati, “Murume akaita seni kudai, kutiza here chaizvo? Pangu pano ndingapindewo muTemberi nhai ndikatorarama? Handipindemo ini.”" 
Nehemiah6:12 Ndakazvinzwisisa ndikaona kuti Mwari haana kunge amutuma, asi shoko raandiporofitira iri pamusana paTobhiya naSanibharati, vakanga vamutenga." 
Nehemiah6:13 Ndozvavakamutengera izvozvo kuti ini nditye, ndiite saizvozvo, ndiparamure chitadzo, vagondipa zita rakaipa vachindifumura." 
Nehemiah6:14 “Mwari wangu rangarirai Tobhiya naSanibharati nezvinhu zvavakaita izvi murangarirewo mukadzi uyu muporofita Noadiya navamwe vaporifita vose vanoda kundipa mweya wokutya.” 
Nehemiah6:15 Saizvozvo rusvingo rwakapera kuvakwa mumazuva anoita makumi mashanu namaviri, pazuva ramakumi maviri nechishanu remwedzi waEruru." 
Nehemiah6:16 Vavengi vedu vose pavakazvinzwa marudzi ose omunharaunda yedu, akatya, akaona kuti zvokutiwo tinzi vanhu hapasisina chaizvo, nokuti vakanga vaonawo kuti basa irori rakanga raitwa norubatsiro rwaMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Pamazuva iwayo pakavawo nokunyorerana matsamba mazhinji. Vekumba huru kwaJudha vakanyorera Tobhiya, iye Tobhiya achivanyorerawo" 
Nehemiah6:18 nokuti vazhinji maJudha imomo vakanga vakabatana naye nemhiko pamusana pokuti iye aiva mukuwasha waShekaniya mwanakomana wokwaAra. Mwanakomana wake Jehohanani akanga aroorawo mukadzi wake aiva mwanasikana waMeshuramu mwanakomana waBherekiya. 
Nehemiah6:19 Vaiita huyakwose yokuti ndiripo kudai vainditaurira zvakanaka zvaainge aita vachindomuudzawo zvandainge ndareva. Tobhiya akanditumirawo matsamba okuti nditye. 
Nehemiah7:1 Kuzoti zvino rusvingo rwavakwa kudaro, ndaisawo magonhi acho navachengetedzi vapamisuo mikuru, navaimbi navaRevhi vasarudzwa," 
Nehemiah7:2 ndakapa munun'una wangu Hanani naHananiya mutongi wakamuzinda kavarwi vehondo basa rokuona nezveJerusaremu pamusana pokuti aiva munhu ari pachokwadi uye anotya Mwari kupinda vazhinji. 
Nehemiah7:3 Ndakavati, “Misuo mikuru yeJerusaremu ngairege kuzarurwa kusvikira kwadziya. Pavanengewo vachiri kuchengetedza kudaro ngavapfige vaise mazariro kumagonhi acho. Sarudzai vokuchengetedza muvagari vomuJerusaremu mumwe nomumwe pake pokugaririra mumwe nomumwe ari pakatarisana nemba yake.”" 
Nehemiah7:4 Guta rakanga rakafara riri guru, asi vanhu vakanga varimo vaiva vashoma kusina dzimba dzakanga dzati dzavakwa." 
Nehemiah7:5 Mwari wangu akaisa pfungwa mumwoyo mangu yokuti ndiunganidze vokumba huru namakurukota navanhu kuti vanyorwe mazita chizvarwa nezvizvarwa. Ndakawana bhuku rina mazita ezvizvarwa zvavanhu zvavakatanga kuuya vaye, ndikawana makanyorwa kunzi:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Havanoi vanhu venyika ino vakakwira kuuya vachibva kuutapwa panhapwa dziya dzakanga dzambotapwa dzikatamisirwa kusi kwadzo naNebhukadhinezari mambo weBahabhironi, vakadzokera muJerusaremu nokwaJudha, munhu wose kuguta rokwake." 
Nehemiah7:7 Vakauya naZerubhabhero naJeshua naNehemiya naAzariya naRaamiya naNahamani naModhekai naBhirishani naMisipereti naBhigivhai naNehumu naBhaana. Uhu ndihwo huwandi hwavarume vokwaIsiraeri: 
Nehemiah7:8 Vanakomana vokwaParoshi zviuru zviviri zvavanhu zvina makumi manomwe ana vaviri 
Nehemiah7:9 vokwaShefatiya mazana matatu ane makumi manomwe ane vaviri 
Nehemiah7:10 vokwaAra mazana matanhatu ane makumi mashanu ana vaviri 
Nehemiah7:11 Vanakomana vokwaPahatimoabhu vari vokwaJeshua naMoabhu zviuru zviviri zvina mazana masere ane gumi navasere 
Nehemiah7:12 vokwaEramu chiuru china mazana maviri ana makumi mashanu ana vana 
Nehemiah7:13 vokwaZatu mazana masere ana makumi mana navashanu 
Nehemiah7:14 vokwaZakai mazana manomwe ana makumi matanhatu 
Nehemiah7:15 vanakomana vokwaBhinui mazana matanhatu ana makumi mana navasere 
Nehemiah7:16 vokwaBhebhai mazana matanhatu ana makumi maviri navasere 
Nehemiah7:17 vokwaAzigadhi zviuru zviviri zvina mazana matatu ane makumi maviri ana vaviri 
Nehemiah7:18 vanakomana vokwaAdhomikamu mazana matanhatu ana makumi matanhatu navanomwe 
Nehemiah7:19 vokwaBhigivhai zviuru zviviri zvina makumi matanhatu navanomwe 
Nehemiah7:20 vokwaAdhini mazana matanhatu ana makumi mashanu ane vashanu 
Nehemiah7:21 vanakomana vokwaAteri vari vokwaHezekiya makumi mapfumbamwe navasere 
Nehemiah7:22 vokwaHashumu mazana matatu ana makumi maviri ana vasere 
Nehemiah7:23 vokwaBhezai mazana matatu ana makumi maviri ana vana 
Nehemiah7:24 vokwaHarifi zana negumi navaviri 
Nehemiah7:25 vanakomana vokwaGibheoni makumi mapfumbamwe ana vashanu 
Nehemiah7:26 vokuBheterehemu nevokuNetofa zana namakumi masere ana vasere 
Nehemiah7:27 vokuAnatoti zana namakumi maviri ana vasere 
Nehemiah7:28 vokuBhetiazimavheti makumi mana ana vaviri 
Nehemiah7:29 vokuKiraitijearimu nokuKepfira nokuBheeroti mazana manomwe ane makumi mana navatatu 
Nehemiah7:30 vokuRama nokuGebha mazana matanhatu ana makumi maviri nomumwechete 
Nehemiah7:31 vokuMikimashi zana namakumi maviri ana vaviri 
Nehemiah7:32 vokuBhetieri neAi zana namakumi maviri ana vatatu 
Nehemiah7:33 vokune imwe Nebho makumi mashanu navaviri 
Nehemiah7:34 vokune imwe Eramu chiuru china mazana maviri ane makumi mashanu navana 
Nehemiah7:35 vokuHarimu mazana matatu ana makumi maviri 
Nehemiah7:36 vokuJeriko mazana matatu ane makumi mana navashanu 
Nehemiah7:37 vokuRodhi nokuHadhidhi nokuOno mazana manomwe ana makumi maviri nomumwechete 
Nehemiah7:38 vokuSenaa zviuru zvitatu namazana mapfumbamwe ana makumi matatu. 
Nehemiah7:39 Vapristi: vana vokwaJedhaya vakomana vari vemba yokwaJeshua vaiva mazana mapfumbamwe namakumi manomwe navatatu 
Nehemiah7:40 vokwaImero chiuru namakumi mashanu ana vaviri 
Nehemiah7:41 vokwaPashihuru chiuru namazana maviri ana makumi mana navanomwe 
Nehemiah7:42 vokwaHarimu chiuru negumi navanomwe. 
Nehemiah7:43 VaRevhi: vana vokwaJeshua vakomana vemba yokwaKadhimieri vari vokwaHodhevha vaiva makumi manomwe ana vana. 
Nehemiah7:44 Vaimbi: vana vokwaAsafu: zana namakumi mana ana vasere. 
Nehemiah7:45 Vachengetedzi vapamisuo mikuru: vana vokwaSharumu vakomana naAteri naTarimoni naAkubhu naHatita naShobhai vaiva zana rimwechete rine makumi matatu nevasere. 
Nehemiah7:46 Vashandi vapaTemberi vaiva vanakomana vaava vanoti: Ziha naHasufa naTabhaoti 
Nehemiah7:47 naKerosi naSiya naPadhoni 
Nehemiah7:48 naRebhana naHagabha naSharumai 
Nehemiah7:49 naHanani naGidheri naGaheru 
Nehemiah7:50 naReaya naResini naNekodha 
Nehemiah7:51 naGazamu naUza naPesea 
Nehemiah7:52 naBhesai naMeunimu naNefusimu 
Nehemiah7:53 naBhakibhuku naHakufa naHarihuru 
Nehemiah7:54 naBhaziruti naMehidha naHarisha 
Nehemiah7:55 naBharikosi naSisera naTema 
Nehemiah7:56 naNezi naHatifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Vanakomana vavaranda vokwaSoromoni paiva nevokwaSotai naSofereti naPeridha 
Nehemiah7:58 novokwaJaara naDharikoni naGidheri 
Nehemiah7:59 novokwaShefatiya naHatiri naPokeretihazibhaimu naAmoni. 
Nehemiah7:60 Ivava vashandi vapaTemberi pamwechete navaranda vaSoromoni vose vaiva mazana matatu ane makumi mapfumbamwe navaviri. 
Nehemiah7:61 Kune vamwe vaibva kuTerimera nokuTeriharisha nokuKerubhu nokuAdhoni nokuImero, asi havana kukwanisa kurondedzera dzimba dzemadzibaba avo uye kuti ivo pachavo ndevechiIsiraeri here kana kuti kwete." 
Nehemiah7:62 Vakanga vari vanakomana vaava vanoti: Deraya naTobhiya naNekodha. Ivava ava vaiva vari mazana matanhatu ane makumi mana navaviri. 
Nehemiah7:63 Pakati pavapristi paivawo navanakomana vaava vanoti: Hobaya naHakozi naBhazirai (Bhazirai uyu ndiye uya wokuroora mwana waBhazirai wokuGireadhi akazenge ava kudaidzwa nezita rake). 
Nehemiah7:64 Ivava ava vakatsvaka mazita avo pamazita akanga akanyorwa chizvarwa nechizvarwa, asi haana kuwanikwapo. Ipapo paupristi apa, vakanzi vakan'ora." 
Nehemiah7:65 Sadunhu akavati varege kudya zvokudya zvinoeresesa kusvikira patova nomupristi wokunzwa kuti Mwari anoti kudii achishandisa Urimu neTumimu. 
Nehemiah7:66 Gungano racho rose pamwechete rakanga riina vanhu zviuru makumi mana ane zviviri zvine mazana matatu ana makumi matanhatu avanhu. 
Nehemiah7:67 Tisingaverengere varanda vavo vechirume nevechikadzi vakangawo vari zviuru zvinomwe zvavanhu zvina vanhu mazana matatu ana makumi matatu navanomwe. Vakangawo vaina vaimbi varume navakadzi vaiita mazana maviri ana makumi mana navashanu. 
Nehemiah7:68 Vaiva namabhiza avo mazana manomwe ana makumi matatu ana matanhatu, nemanyurusi avo mazana maviri ana makumi mana namashanu." 
Nehemiah7:69 Kwozouya ngamera dzavo mazana mana ana makumi matatu ane shanu namadhongi zviuru zvitanhatu zvina mazana manomwe namakumi maviri. 
Nehemiah7:70 Zvino vamwe vatungamiriri vedzimba dzemadzibaba avo vakapa zvipo zvokubatsira pabasa iri. Gavhuna akabvisawo ndarama inorema makirogiramu angangoita masere nembenge makumi mashanu namagemenzi mazana mashanu ane makumi matatu avapristi zvikaendeswa maichengeterwa upfumi. 
Nehemiah7:71 Izvozvo vamwe vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo vakabvisa ndarama yainge yoda kuita zana remakirogiramu rina makirogiramu makumi matanhatu namasere, nesirivha yainge tani rimwechete rina makirogiramu mazana maviri namakumi mashanu, namagemenzi makumi matanhatu ana manomwe avapristi, vakaendesa maichengeterwa upfumi hwainge hwakanangana nebasa iroro." 
Nehemiah7:72 Zvakabviswawo nevamwe vanhu vose ndezvizvi izvi zvinoti: ndarama ingangoita zana remakirogiramu rina makirogiramu makumi matanhatu ana masere, nesirivha yainge makirogiramu zana nemakumi mana, namagemenzi makumi matanhatu namanomwe avapristi." 
Nehemiah7:73 Naizvozvo vapristi navaRevhi navachengetedzi vapamisuo mikuru navaimbi navamwewo vanhu navashandi vapaTemberi neIsiraeri yose vakagara mumaguta okwavo. Pakazosvika mwedzi wechinomwe, vaIsiraeri vakanga vatova mumaguta avo." 
Nehemiah8:1 Vanhu vose vakazoungana vaine chinangwa chimwe munhandare pamberi pesuo guru rokuMvura. Vakataurira Ezira nyanzvi yomutemo kuti aunze bhuku romutemo waMosesi wakanga wapiwa kuvaIsiraeri naTenzi. 
Nehemiah8:2 Mupristi Ezira akaunza mutemo iwoyo pamusi wechiposhi wemwedzi wechinomwe kugungano revanhu, varume navakadzi, nevaigona kunzwisisa." 
Nehemiah8:3 Akariverenga akatarisa munhandare iri pamberi pesuo guru rokumvura kubvira kuchangoedza kudzamara masikati makuru munzeve dzavarume navakadzi nevaigona kunzwisisa, izvozvo vanhu vose vakanga vakateya kwazvo nzeve kunzwa bhuku romutemo." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezira nyanzvi yomutemo akamira padara rakanga ravakirwa izvozvi izvi. Vakanga vamire naye kurudyi ndaava vanoti: Matatiya naShema naAnaya naUriya naHirikiya naMaaseya; kuruboshwe: ndiPedhaya naMishaeri naMarikiya naHashumu naHashibhadhana naZekariya naMeshuramu. 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezira akazarura bhuku racho vanhu vose vachiona, nokuti akanga ari nechapamusoro pavanhu vose. Paakangoriti zarurei vanhu vose vakabva vati nyandanu kusimuka." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezira akarumbidza Tenzi, Mwari mukuru. Vanhu vose vakapindura vachiti, “Ameni! Ngazvive saizvozvo,” vachisimudza mudenga maoko avo. Vakakotamisa misoro yavo vachipfugamira Tenzi, uso hwavo vakati pasi kota kota." 
Nehemiah8:7 Kwouya Jeshua naBhani naSherebhiya naJamini naAkubhu naShabhetai naHodhiya naMaaseya naKerita naAzariya naJozabhadhi naHanani naPeraya vokwaRevhi, vakatsanangurira vanhu mutemo iwoyo. Vanhu vakaramba vamire munzvimbo dzavo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Vakanyatsoverenga mubhuku romutemo waMwari, ndokutsanangurira vanhu kuti vanzwisise zvaiverengwa." 
Nehemiah8:9 Nehemiya aiva ari gavhuna, nomupristi Ezira nyanzvi yomutemo, nevaRevhi vaifundisa vanhu vakati kuvanhu vose, “Zuva irori izuva raTenzi, Mwari wenyu rinoera, regai kuchema kana kuungudza.” Chaivapo ndechokuti vanhu vose vakachema pavakanzwa mashoko omutemo." 
Nehemiah8:10 Akavati, “Chiendai zvenyu munodya kudya kwakanaka, munwe zvenyu waini inonaka, mupewo vasina chavanacho chakagadzirirwa, nokuti zuva ranhasi izuva raTenzi wedu rinoera. Musasuruvare nokuti rufaro rwaTenzi ndiro simba renyu.”" 
Nehemiah8:11 Saizvozvo vaRevhi vakanyaradza vanhu vose vachiti, “Nyararai zvenyu nokuti zuva ranhasi izuva rinoera, zvokusuruvara, chiregai.”" 
Nehemiah8:12 Vanhu vose vakazoenda zvavo kundodya nokunwa nokutumirana zvipo vachipembera kwazvo nokufara pamusana pokuti vakanga vanzwisisa mashoko avakanga vaudzwa. 
Nehemiah8:13 Pazuva rechipiri racho, vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba evanhu vose ivavo pamwechete navapristi nevaRevhi vakaunganidzana kuna Ezira nyanzvi yomutemo kuzodzidza zvinorehwa nomutemo." 
Nehemiah8:14 Vakawana mumutemo wakapiwa naTenzi nokuna Mosesi uya makanyorwa kuti: Vanhu veIsiraeri vanofanira kugara mumatumba panguva yemazuva makuru omumwedzi wechinomwe," 
Nehemiah8:15 uye vanofanira kutaurira vanhu nokuzivisa mumaguta avo ose nomuJerusaremu kuti, “Endai muzvikomo muuye namasanzu emiorivhi neemiorivhi yomusango neomumirite neemurara neemimwewo miti ine mashizha mazhinji okugadzirisa matumba sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa.”" 
Nehemiah8:16 Saizvozvo vanhu vakabuda vakandouya nawo, munhu woga woga akazvigadzirira dumba vamwe pamatenga emba dzavo nomunhandare yokusuo guru rokuMvura nomunhandarewo yokuSuo Guru rokwaEfuremu." 
Nehemiah8:17 Gungano rose revanhu vakadzoka vachibva kuutapwa vaye vakazvigadzirira matumba vakagara mumatumba imomo nokuti kubvira mumazuva aJoshuwa mwanakomana waNuni kusvikira musi iwoyo, vanhu veIsiraeri vakanga vasati vambozviita, pakafarwa zvokufara zviya." 
Nehemiah8:18 Zuva nezuva kubvira pamusi wokutanga kusvikira pane wokupedzesera aiverenga muBhuku roMutemo waMwari. Vakachengeta mazuva makuru iwayo kwemazuva manomwe, pazuva rechisere pakaitwa musangano mutsvene wezvokunamata maererano nezviri pamurao." 
Nehemiah9:1 Kuzoti wava musi wechimakumi maviri nechina womwedzi iwoyu, vaIsiraeri vakaungana kuzotsanya vakapfeka masaga vakazvidira ivhu." 
Nehemiah9:2 VaIsiraeri vakazvitsaura kuvanhu vechirudzi vakasimuka vakareurura zvitadzo zvavo nouipi hwamadzibaba avo. 
Nehemiah9:3 Vakamira munzvimbo dzavo vakaverenga muBhuku roMutemo waTenzi, Mwari wavo kwamaawa matatu pazuva. Kwamamwe maawa matatu acho vakareurura vakapfugamira Tenzi, Mwari wavo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Pakakwirira paya pevaRevhi, pakanga pakamira ava vanoti: Jeshua naBhani naKadhimieri naShebhaniya naBhuni naSherebhiya naBhani naKenani vakachema vachiita zvokudaidzira kuna Tenzi, Mwari wavo." 
Nehemiah9:5 VaRevhi ava vanoti: Jeshua naKadhimieri naBhani naHashabhuneya naSherebhiya naHodhiya naShebhaniya naPetahiya vakati, “Simukai murumbidze Tenzi, Mwari wenyu. Murumbidzei narini narini wose kusvikira nokusingaperi. Ngarirumbidzwe zita renyu rina mukurumbira Riri pamusorosoro chaipoipo pazvose zvinokudzwa kana kurumbidzwa.”" 
Nehemiah9:6 “Imi moga ndimi Tenzi. Ndimi makasika matenga nedenga rokumatengatenga negurusvusvu nezvinhu zvaro, nyika nezvose zviri mairi makungwa nezvose zviri maari Imi ndimi munozvichengeta, gurusvusvu romudenga rinokugwadamirai." 
Nehemiah9:7 “Imi Tenzi Mwari ndimi makasarudza Abhuramu, mukamuburitsa kuUru yevechiKaradhea mukazoti zita rake rinzi Abhurahamu." 
Nehemiah9:8 Pamakaonawo kuti iye, munhu ane mwoyo uri pachokwadi kwamuri makaita chitenderano naye chokupa vana vake nyika yavanhu vechiKanani navaHiti navaAmori navaPerizi navachiJebhusi navaGirigashi. Makazadzisa chitsidzo chenyu pamusana pokuti imi makarurama." 
Nehemiah9:9 “Makaona nhamo yakaona madzibaba edu muIjipiti mukanzwa kuchema kwavo paGungwa Dzvuku. 
Nehemiah9:10 Makaitira Farao zviratidzo nezvishamiso pamwechete namakurukota ake navanhu vomunyika make nokuti imi maizviziva kuti vaiitira madzibaba edu zenze rokuzvikudza mukabva mazviwanira zita kusvikira pari nhasi. 
Nehemiah9:11 Gungwa makariti nepakati tsemu vakatarisa vakapfuura vachitotsika zvavo pasi pakaoma pakati paro gungwa. Makakanda vaivaronda muhwenje hwemvura sedombo mumvura zhinji ine simba. 
Nehemiah9:12 Masikati makavatungamirira negore usiku mukavatungamirira neshongwe yemoto yokuvavhenekera nzira yokufamba nayo. 
Nehemiah9:13 Makaburuka imi pagomo reSinai mukataura navo imi muri kudenga. Makavapa zvirevo zvakarurama nemitemo iri pachokwadi. Makavapawo zvirongwa nemitemo yakanaka. 
Nehemiah9:14 Makavadzidzisa nezveSabata renyu dzvene, makavapa mirao nezvirongwa nemitemo nokuna Mosesi muranda wenyu." 
Nehemiah9:15 “Panzara yavo makavapa chingwa chokudya Kupodza nyota yavo, makavapfachurira mvura ichibva padombo. Makavati vapinde kundotora nyika iya, nyika yamakatsidzira kuvapa." 
Nehemiah9:16 “Asi ivo namadzibaba edu vakazvitutumadza, Vakaomesa musoro, mirao yenyu vakaramba kuchengeta." 
Nehemiah9:17 Vakaramba kuteerera, vakakangamwa zvishamiso zvenyu, zvishamiso zviya zvamakavaitira. Vakaomesa misoro vakatosarudza mutungamiriri wokudzokera naye kuIjipiti kuuranda. Asi imi muri Mwari anoregerera, Mwari ane nyasha netsitsi Muno mwoyo murefu nomwoyochena mukuru Hamuna kuda kuvafuratira." 
Nehemiah9:18 Kunyange pavakazviumbira chimhuru choutare hwokunyungurusa Vakati, ‘Uyu ndiye Mwari wenyu Akakuburitsai kuIjipiti.’ Vakakushonhai zvikuru." 
Nehemiah9:19 Asi imi pamusana petsitsi dzenyu dzakawanda hamuna kuvafuratira murenje. Shongwe yegore yaivatungamirira masikati haina kuvasiya Shongwewo yomoto yaivavhenekera mberi nzira yavaifanira kufamba nayo usiku haina kuvasiya. 
Nehemiah9:20 Makavapa Mweya wenyu wakanaka wokuvadzidzisa, Mana yenyu yokuti vadye hamuna kuvanyima Makavapawo mvura yokupodza nyota yavo." 
Nehemiah9:21 Kwamakore makumi mana makavariritira murenje. Hapana chavaishaya. Hanzu dzavo hadzina kusakara. Makumbo avo haana kuzvimba. 
Nehemiah9:22 “Makavapa ndudzi dzavanhu nenyika dzokutonga mukavagovanisa nyika, mativi ose, nezvo vakatora kuita yavo nyika yaSihoni mambo weHeshibhoni nenyikawo yaOgi mambo weBhashani." 
Nehemiah9:23 Makavapa vana vakawanda senyenyedzi dzedenga mukauya navo munyika yamakanga matsidzira madzibaba kuzopindamo vachiita yavo. 
Nehemiah9:24 “Saizvozvo vana vavo vakapinda munyika iyoyi vakaiita yavo. Makavaisira pasi pavo vagari venyika iyi vechiKanani mukavaisa mumaoko avo pamwechete namadzimambo avo navanhu vechirudzi vomunyika imomo kuti vaite zvavanoda navo. 
Nehemiah9:25 Vakakurira maguta etsvingo nenyika yakapfuma. Vakatora kuita zvavo dzimba dzizere nezvinhu zvose zvakanaka namatsime akaitwa zvokuchenwa padombo neminda yamagirepisi nemindawo yemiorivhi nemiti yemichero yakawanda kuita machiri. Zvokudya vakadya, zvakawanda chaizvo vakanyatsoguta zvokuita miviri chaiyo Vakaita mutambaratede vagere zvavo mune zvakanaka kwazvo zvamunovapa." 
Nehemiah9:26 “Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo havana kuteerera, vakakupandukirai. Mitemo yenyu vakakanda pasi, vakauraya vaporofita venyu vaivakurudzira kuti vatendeukire kwamuri; vakaita zvikuru zvokukushonhai." 
Nehemiah9:27 Naizvozvo imi makavaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo vakavaonesa nhamo. Panguva yenhamo yavo iyoyo vakachema kwamuri, muri kudenga ikoko makavanzwa. Netsiye dzenyu nyoro dzakawanda makavapa vanunuri vakavanunura mumaoko evavengi vavo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Asi vaiti vakange vava murugare vodzokerazve mukukutadzirai. Imi ndopamaivaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo kuti vagovatonga. Asi pavainge vazopinduka vochema kwamuri mainzwa kudenga ikoko. Netsiye dzenyu nyoro maivanunura kakawanda kwazvo. 
Nehemiah9:29 Makayambira kuitira kuti vadzokere kumutemo wenyu; ivo ndopavakazvitutumadza zvavo vakarega kuteerera mirao yenyu vakatoita zvitadzo zvokukanganisa zvirevo zvenyu zvokuti anenge achizvichengeta anorarama; vakava tsvuuramuromo kutogwikura mapendekete kuramba. Vakaomesa musoro vachiramba kuteerera. 
Nehemiah9:30 Kwemakore mazhinji maingovaitira mwoyo murefu muchingovayambira noMweya wenyu nomuromo wevaporofita venyu asi hazvina kumbovapinda munzeve. Naizvozvo imi makavaisa mumaoko emarudzi edzinyika idzi. 
Nehemiah9:31 Kunyange zvazvo zvakadaro netsiye dzenyu nyoro dzakawanda hamuna kubva mavatsakatisa kana kuvafuratira nokuti imi muri Mwari ane ngoni ane tsitsi. 
Nehemiah9:32 “Saka zvino Mwari wedu, iyemi mukuru Samasimbaose, Mwari anotyisa anochengeta chitenderano, Samwoyochena; musaone sechinhu chiduku nhamo dzakawira isu namadzimambo edu navatungamiri vedu navapristi vedu navaporofita vedu namadzibaba edu navanhu venyu vose kubvira panguva yamadzimambo eAsiria kusvikira pari nhasi." 
Nehemiah9:33 Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo, makangoramba muri mururami pane zvose zvakadai kutiwira pamusana pokuti imi makaita zviri pachokwadi asi isu takaita zvakaipa." 
Nehemiah9:34 Madzimambo edu navatungamiriri vedu navapristi vedu namadzibaba edu havana kuchengeta mutemo wenyu kana kumboita hanya nomurao wenyu kana yambiro dzamakavayambira nadzo. 
Nehemiah9:35 Kunyange pavainge vari muumambo hwavo havana kukushandirai, vari mune zvakanaka kwazvo zvamaivapa, muzidhandanda renyika yakapfuma yamakatovaisira zvenyu pamberi pavo kupa; asi zvokusiyana nemabasa avo akaipa, havana." 
Nehemiah9:36 Hezvi nhasi uno tiri varanda kudai munyika yamakapa madzibaba edu kuti vanakirwe zvavo nemichero yayo nezvipo zvayo zvakanaka, chionai zvino, tangova varanda." 
Nehemiah9:37 Zvakawanda kwazvo zvainobereka zvinoenda zvazvo kumadzimambo amakatiisira kuti atitonge pamusana pezvitadzo zvedu. Vanotovawo nesimba rokutonga iyesu vanhu pamwechete nezvipfuwo zvedu sepamadiro avo zvavo. Tayaura isu nenhamo.” 
Nehemiah9:38 Pamusana paizvozvi zvose tinosunga chitenderano tigochinyora, vatungamiriri vedu nevaRevhi navapristi vaise pachiri chidhindo chavo choumbo." 
Nehemiah10:1 Vakaisa chidhindo chavo, ndaava ava vanoti: gavhuna wacho Nehemiya mwanakomana waHakariya kwouya Zedhekiya" 
Nehemiah10:2 naSeraya naAzariya naJeremiya 
Nehemiah10:3 naPashuri naAmariya naMarikiya 
Nehemiah10:4 naHatushi naShebhaniya naMaruki 
Nehemiah10:5 naHarimu naMeremoti naObhadhiya 
Nehemiah10:6 naDhanieri naGinetoni naBharuki 
Nehemiah10:7 naMeshuramu naAbhiya naMiyamini 
Nehemiah10:8 naMaaziya naBhirigai naShemaya Ivava ndovaiva vapristi vacho. 
Nehemiah10:9 KuvaRevhi paiti: Jeshua mwanakomana waAzaniya naBhinui mumwe wevanakomana vokwaHenadhadhi naKadhimieri,"
