Nehemiah10:10 nehama dzavo idzi dzinoti: Shebhaniya naHodhiya naKerita naPeraya naHanani 
Nehemiah10:11 naMika naRehobhu naHashabhiya 
Nehemiah10:12 naZakuru naSherebhiya naShebhaniya 
Nehemiah10:13 naHodhiya naBhani naBheninu. 
Nehemiah10:14 Kuvakuru vakuru ivava, paiti: Paroshi naPahatimoabhu naEramu naZatu naBhani" 
Nehemiah10:15 naBhani naAzigadhi naBhebhai 
Nehemiah10:16 kwouya Adhoniya naBhigivhai naAdhini 
Nehemiah10:17 naAtero naHezekiya naAzuru 
Nehemiah10:18 naHodhiya naHashumu naBhezai 
Nehemiah10:19 kwouyawo naHarifi naAnatoti naNebhai 
Nehemiah10:20 naMagipiashi naMeshuramu naHeziri 
Nehemiah10:21 naMeshezabheri naZadhoki naJadhua 
Nehemiah10:22 kwoti Peratiya naHanani naAnaya 
Nehemiah10:23 naHoshea naHananiya naHashubhu 
Nehemiah10:24 naHaroheshi naPiriha naShobheki 
Nehemiah10:25 kwozoti Rehumu naHashabhina naMaaseya 
Nehemiah10:26 naAhiya naHanani naAnani 
Nehemiah10:27 naMaruku naHarimu naBhaana. 
Nehemiah10:28 Navamwe vanhu vosewo vaiti vapristi nevaRevhi navachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru navaimbi navashandi vomuTemberi navose vakazvitsaura mukati mavanhu vose vari munharaunda iyoyo pamusana pomutemo waMwari, ivo namadzimai avo navana vavo vakomana navasikana vose vaiva vabve zano vavakuziva," 
Nehemiah10:29 vose ivava vakabatana nehama dzavo dzokumba huru mukuzvisunga nechitsidzo chokuti ukarega kuchichengeta unopinda murushambwa chitsidzirano chacho ndechokuti vaizotevera mutemo waMwari waakapa nomuromo waMosesi muranda waMwari uye vachiteerera mirao yose yaTenzi wedu Tenzi pamwechete nezvirevo zvake nezvirongwa zvake. 
Nehemiah10:30 Isu hatisi kuzoroodza vana vedu kuvanhu vechirudzi venyika ino kana kuroorera vana vedu vanasikana vavo. 
Nehemiah10:31 Kana vanhu vechirudzi venyika ino vakauya nezvinhu zvokuzotengesa kana mbesanwa zvadzo uri musi weSabata, hatisiri kuzovatengera pamusi weSabata kana pane rimwewo zuva rinoera. Pagore rechinomwe roga roga tinorega minda yedu irarire zvayo isina kurimwa, uye vane zvikwereti hatichavabhadharisi." 
Nehemiah10:32 Tinozviisirawo mitemo yokuti: pagore roga roga munhu anofanira kubvisa magiramu mana emari yesirivha yeshekeri yokubatsira pamba paMwari. 
Nehemiah10:33 Tichabvisawo zvinhu zvebasa remba yaMwari zvinoti: chingwa chepana Mwari, mupiro wembesanwa wezuva nezuva, chibayiro chezuva roga roga neyemaSabata neyepakugara kwemwedzi neyepamazuva makuru akatemwa neyezvinhu zvinoera neyemipiro yokupfupira zvitadzo zveIsiraeri neyebasa rose repamba yaMwari wedu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Isuwo vapristi navaRevhi navanhu taita chin'ange kuti tione kuti imhuri ipi ichaunza huni dzokupisa paatari yaTenzi, panguva dzakatemwa gore negore, Mwari wedu sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo." 
Nehemiah10:35 Tinofanira kuendesa mupiro wembesa dzokutanga dzomumunda medu nemichero yokutanga yemiti yose zvayo yomuchero wose wose gore negore kumba yaTenzi 
Nehemiah10:36 nokuendasawo kumba yaMwari nokuvapristi vanoita basa romumba yaMwari wedu, matangwe echirume pavana vedu napazvipfuwo zvedu sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo nematangwewo echikono emombe dzedu neezvimwe zvipfuwo" 
Nehemiah10:37 uyewo kuendesa mikanyiwa yedu yokutanga nezvimwe zvatinobvisa nomuchero womuti wose womuchero newaini namafuta eorivhi kuvapristi kudzimba dzepamba paMwari wedu, tichiendesawo kuvaRevhi zvegumi zvezvirimwa zvedu, nokuti vaRevhi ndivo vane basa rokuunganidza zvegumi zvomumaguta ose omumaruwa medu." 
Nehemiah10:38 Mupristi mwanakomana wokwaAroni anofanira kuve nevaRevhi pavanogamuchira zvegumi izvozvo. VaRevhi ivava vanozofanira kuzoendesa chegumi chezvegumi izvozvo kumba yaMwari mumba inochengeterwa zvinhu," 
Nehemiah10:39 nokuti vanhu veIsiraeri navanakomana vokwaRevhi vanofanira kuendesa mipiro yembesanwa neyewaini itsva neyemafuta eorivhi kudzimba idzodzo kune midziyo yomunzvimbo inoera navapristi vanoita basa imomo navachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru navaimbi. Hatingashayire hanya imba yaMwari wedu. 
Nehemiah11:1 Vatungamiriri vavanhu vaigara muJerusaremu. Vamwe vanhu vose vaitoita zvokusarudza nechin'ange munhu mumwechete pagumi ravanhu wokundogara muJerusaremu raiva riri iro guta rinoera, vamwe vapfumbamwe ava vachigara muna mamwe maguta." 
Nehemiah11:2 Vanhu vakarumbidza varume vakazvipira zvavo kundogara muJerusaremu. 
Nehemiah11:3 Ava ndivo madzishe enyika iyi aigara muJerusaremu asi mumaguta okwaJudha munhu wose aigara pamusha pake mumaguta avo imomo. Paiva navaIsiraeri navapristi nevaRevhi navashandi vapaTemberi navana vavaranda vaSoromoni. 
Nehemiah11:4 MuJerusaremu maigarawo vamwe vanakomana vokwaJudha navamwe vanakomana vokwaBhenjamini. Kuvanakomana vokwaJudha paiva: naAtaya mwanakomana waUziya, Uziya mwana waZekariya, Zekariya mwanawo waAmariya, Amariya akaberekwa naShefatiya Shefatiya mwanakomana waMaharareri Mahararerei mwana waFeresi" 
Nehemiah11:5 naMaaseya mwanakomana waBharuku Bharuki akaberekwa naKoruhozeni, Koruhozeni mwana waHazaya, Hazaya mwanawo waAdhaya Adhaya mwanakomana waJoyaribhu, Joyaribhu akaberekwa naZekariya ari mwanakomana womunhu wokuShiro." 
Nehemiah11:6 Vanakomana vose vokwaPeresi, vaigara muJerusaremu vaiva varume mazana mana ana makumi matanhatu navasere dziri mvumba chaidzo dzokurwa hondo." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ava ndivo vanakomana vedzinza rokwaBhenjamini: kwaiti, Saru mwanakomana waMeshuramu Meshuramu ari mwanakomana waPedhaya, Pedhaya ari mwanakomana waKoraya Koraya mwanakomana waMaaseya Maaseya wakaberekwa naItieri, Itieri mwanakomana waJeshaya." 
Nehemiah11:8 Saru uyu aitevedzerwa naGabhai naSarai vari mazana mapfumbamwe avanhu ana vanhu makumi maviri navasere. 
Nehemiah11:9 Joeri mwanakomana waZikiri ndiye aiva mutariri mukuru wokuona nezvavo. Judha mwanakomana waHasenua aiva mutevedzeri womutongi weguta iri. 
Nehemiah11:10 Kuvapristi kwaiva naava vanoti: Jedhaya mwanakomana waJoyaribhu uye Jakini 
Nehemiah11:11 naSeraya mwanakomana waHirikiya; Hirikiya uyu mwanakomana waMeshuramu, Meshuramu akaberekwa naZadhoki, Zadhoki ari mwana waMerayoti, Merayoti mwanakomana waAhitubhu mutongi wapamba paMwari." 
Nehemiah11:12 Nehama dzavo vaiva vari vokuita basa rapamba ipapo vakanga vari mazana masere namakumi maviri ana vaviri kwouya Adhaya mwanakomana waJehoramu Jehoramu mwana waPerariya Perariya ari mwanawo waAmuzi Amuzi ari waZekariya Zekariya ariwo waPashihuru Pashihuru mwanakomana waMarikiya 
Nehemiah11:13 nehamawo dzake, vatungamiriri vedzimba dzemadzibaba acho vari mazana maviri ane makumi mana navaviri kwozouya Amashisai mwanakomana waAzareri. Azareri mwana waAhizai Ahizai ari mwana waMeshiremoti Meshiremoti akaberekwawo naImero" 
Nehemiah11:14 nehama dzavowo mvumba chaidzo dzevarume magamba chaiwo okurwa hondo vari zana namakumi maviri ana vasere, mutariri wavo ari Zabhudhieri mwanakomana waHagedhorimu." 
Nehemiah11:15 KuvaRevhi kwaivawo naava vanoti: Shemaya mwanakomana waHashubhu Hashubhu mwana waAzirikamu Azirikamu ari mwana waHashabhiya, Hashabhiya ari waBhuni" 
Nehemiah11:16 Bhuni naShabhetai naJozabhadhi vamwe vevakuru vakuru vevaRevhi vaiona nezvebasa rokunze repamba yaMwari kwouyawo Mataniya mwanakomana waMika, Mika mwana waZabhudhi" 
Nehemiah11:17 Zabhudhi mwanakomana waAsafu aiva mutungamiriri wokuvamba munamato wokutenda uyewo Bhakibhukiya mwana wechipiri pakati pehama dzake kwozouya Abhudha mwanakomana waShamua mwanakomana waGarari, Garari mwanakomana waJedhutuni." 
Nehemiah11:18 VaRevhi vomuGuta Rinoera iri vose vaiva mazana maviri namakumi masere ana vana. 
Nehemiah11:19 Vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru, vana Akubhu naTarimoni nehama dzavo, vakanga vari vokuchengetedza pamisuo mikuru, vaiva zana revanhu rine vanhu makumi manomwe navaviri." 
Nehemiah11:20 Vamwe vose veIsiraeri navamwe vose vevapristi navavaRevhi vaiva mune mamwe maguta ose amaJudha munhu wose agere pake penhaka. 
Nehemiah11:21 Asi vashandi vepaTemberi vaigara paOferu, Ziha naGishipa ndovaiva vakuru vakuru vevashandi vepaTemberi." 
Nehemiah11:22 Mutariri wevaRevhi muJerusaremu akanga ari Uzi mwanakomana waBhani Bhani mwana waHashabhiya, Hashabhiya ari mwana waMataniya, Mataniya akaberekwa naMika Mika wokuvanakomana vokwaAsafu vaimbi, aiona nezvebasa repamba yaMwari," 
Nehemiah11:23 nokuti kwakanga kwabva chirevo kuna mambo chakanangana nezvavo nomugove wakatemwa wevaimbi sezvainge zvichidiwa zuva nezuva 
Nehemiah11:24 kwoti Petahiya mwanakomana waMeshezabheri, Meshezabheri mumwe wevana vokwaZera, Zera mwanakomana waJudha aiva nhume yamambo panyaya dzose dzainangana nezvevanhu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Panyaya yemisha namafuro ayo, vamwe vanhu vamaJudha umu vaigara mumaguta aya anoti: muKiriatiaribha nemisha yaro nomuDhibhoni nemisha yaro nomuJekabhuzieri nemisha yaro" 
Nehemiah11:26 nomuJeshua nomuMoradha nomuBhetipereti 
Nehemiah11:27 nomuHazarishuaru nomuBheerishebha nemisha yaro 
Nehemiah11:28 nomuZikiragi nomuMekona nemisha yaro 
Nehemiah11:29 nomuEnirimoni nomuZora nomuJarimuti 
Nehemiah11:30 nomuZanowa neAdhuramu nemisha yawo neRakishi nemisha yaro neAzeka nemisha yaro. Saizvozvo vakadzika matendhe kubvira kuBheerishebha kusvikira kuBani rokwaHinomu. 
Nehemiah11:31 Vanhu vokwaBhenjamini vaigarawo kubvira Gebha zvichienda mberi kuMikimashi nokuAiya nokuBhetieri nemisha yaro 
Nehemiah11:32 nokuAnatoti neNobhu neAnaniya 
Nehemiah11:33 neHazori neRama neGitaimu 
Nehemiah11:34 neHadhidhi neZebhoimu neNebharirati 
Nehemiah11:35 neRodhi neOno bani remhizha dzezvoutare. 
Nehemiah11:36 Zvimwe zvikwata zvevaRevhi maJudha umu zvakanga zvakabatanidzwa kune vokwaBhenjamini. 
Nehemiah12:1 Vapristi navaRevhi vaya vakasimuka vakauya pamwechete naZerubhabhero mwanakomana waShearitieri naJeshua ndavava ava vanoti: Seraya naJeremiya naEzira 
Nehemiah12:2 naAmariya naMaruki naHatushi 
Nehemiah12:3 naShekaniya naRehumu naMeremoti 
Nehemiah12:4 naIdho naGinetoi naAbhiya 
Nehemiah12:5 naMijamini naMaadhiya naBhiriga 
Nehemiah12:6 naShemaya naJoyaribhu naJedhaya 
Nehemiah12:7 naSaru naAmoki naHirikiya naJedhaya. Ivava ndivo vaiva vakuru vakuru vavapristi nevehama dzavo mumazuva aJeshua. 
Nehemiah12:8 KuvaRevhi uku paiva navava vanoti: Jeshua naBhinui naKadhimieri naSherebhiya naJudha naMataniya iyeyu nehama dzake vaiva varivo vokuona nezvenziyo dzokutenda 
Nehemiah12:9 uku Bhakibhukiya naUno hama dzavo vainge vachimira pakadaro apo vakatarisana navo pavainge vari pabasa irori. 
Nehemiah12:10 Jeshua aiva baba vaJohakimu Johakimu ari baba vaEriyashibhu Eriyashibhu ariwo baba vaJoyadha 
Nehemiah12:11 Joyadha ariwo baba vaJonatani. Jonatani ndibaba vaJadhua. 
Nehemiah12:12 Mumazuva aJoyakimu, vapristi vakanga vari vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba avo vakamira vakadai: Seraya aiva wokwaMeraya Jeremiya ari wokwaHananiya" 
Nehemiah12:13 Ezira ari wokwaMeshuramu Amariya ari wokwaJehohanani 
Nehemiah12:14 Maruki ndewokwaJonatani Shekaniya aiva wokwaJosefi 
Nehemiah12:15 Harimu ari wokwaAdhina Meremoti ari wokwaHerikai 
Nehemiah12:16 Idho ari wokwaZekariya Ginetoni ndewokwaMeshuramu 
Nehemiah12:17 Abhiya ari wokwaZikiri Miniyamini naMoadhiya vaiva vokwaPiritai 
Nehemiah12:18 Bhiriga ari wokwaShamua Shamaya ari wokwaJehonatani 
Nehemiah12:19 Joyaribhu ndewokwaMatenai Jedhaya aiva wokwaUzi 
Nehemiah12:20 Sarai ari wokwaKarai Amoki ari wokwaEbheru 
Nehemiah12:21 Hirikiya ndewokwaHashabhiya, Jedhaya aiva wokwaNetaneri." 
Nehemiah12:22 KuvaRevhi uku, mumazuva aEriyashibhu naJohanani naJadhua, kwakanga kuna mazita akanyorwa avatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba acho pamwechetewo navapristi kusvikira mugore rokutonga kwaDhariusi muPezhiya." 
Nehemiah12:23 Vanakomana vokwaRevhi, kusvikira mumazuva aJohanani mwanakomana waEriyashibhu, vatungamiriri vedzimba dzamadzibaba acho, vakanga vakanyorwa mazita muBhuku reNhoroondo." 
Nehemiah12:24 Vakuru vakuru vevaRevhi ava vanoti: Hashabhiya naSherebhiya naJeshua mwanakomana waKadhimieri nehama dzavo vaiva vokumira pakatarisana navo vachitenda Mwari nokurumbidza maererano nezvakanga zvanzi zviitwe naDhavhidhi munhu waMwari, chikwata chichidairana nechimwe." 
Nehemiah12:25 Mataniya naBhakibhukiya naObhadhiya naMeshuramu naTarimoni naAkubhu vaiva vachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru vaimira vachigaririra padzimba dzokuchengetera zvinhu dzokumisuo mikuru yacho. 
Nehemiah12:26 Ivava ava vaivepo mumazuva aJoyakimu mwanakomana waJeshua, Jeshua mwanakomana waJozadhaki nomumazuva aNehemiya gavhuna neemupristi Ezira nyanzvi yomutemo iya." 
Nehemiah12:27 Pakuteketererwa kuna Mwari kwakaitwa rusvingo rweJerusaremu, vakakokorodza vaRevhi kunzvimbo dzavo dzose vachiunza muJerusaremu kuzopembera nokufarira kuteketerera kuna Mwari ikoku vachimutenda vachiimba vaine makwakwakwa outare namadimbwa nezvipendhani." 
Nehemiah12:28 Vanakomana vevaimbi vakaungana pamwechete vachibva munharaunda yeJerusaremu nokumisha yevanhu vokuNetofa 
Nehemiah12:29 nevaibvawo kuBhetigirigari nokuruwa rweGebha nokuAzimavheti. Chakanga chavepo ndechokuti, vaimbi vakanga vazvivakira misha munharaunda yeJerusaremu." 
Nehemiah12:30 Vapristi nevaRevhi vakazvichenura vakabva vachenurawo vanhu nemisuo mikuru norusvingo. 
Nehemiah12:31 Ndakazokwidza machinda emaJudha umu parusvingo ndikasarudza mapoka maviri evanhu vakuru vaiva vari vokuzotenda Mwari vakaita dungwerungwe kuenda. Rimwe boka rakaenda kurudyi kwacho riri pamusoro porusvingo ipapo rakananga kusuo guru rokuMarara 
Nehemiah12:32 richiteverwa mushure naHoshaya pamwechete nechimwe chikamu chamachinda emaJudha umu ava vanoti: 
Nehemiah12:33 Azariya naEzira naMeshuramu 
Nehemiah12:34 naJudha naBhenjamini naShemaya naJeremiya 
Nehemiah12:35 nevamwe vanakomana vevapristi vaine mabhosvo ava vanoti: Zekariya mwanakomana waJonatani Jonatani mwana waShemaya Shemaya ari mwana waMataniya Mataniya ariwo mwana waMikaya Mikaya akaberekwa naZakuri Zakuri aberekwa naAsafu 
Nehemiah12:36 nehama dzake dzomumba dzinoti: Shemaya naAzareri naMirarai naGirarai naMaai naNetaneri naJudha naHanani. Vaine zvokuimbisa zvinoridzwa zviya zvaDhavhidhi munhu waMwari, Ezira nyanzvi yomutemo iya, ndiye aivatungamirira." 
Nehemiah12:37 Kusuo guru reChisipiti, vakati tande kuenda vakananga kumberi kwavo vachikwidza napamadanho rapaGuta raDhavhidhi pamukwidza worusvingo nechepamusoro pemba yaDhavhidhi vachienda kusuo guru rokuMvura kumabvazuva." 
Nehemiah12:38 Rimwewo boka ravaya vokutenda Mwari rakaenda kurubhoshwe. Ndakavatevera nechimwe chikamu chavanhu pamusoro porusvingo ipapo nochokumusoro kweNharire yeZvoto takananga kurusvingo Rwakapamhama 
Nehemiah12:39 napamusoro pesuo guru rokwaEfuremu nepasuo guru reChinyakare nepasuo guru reHove nokuNharire yokwaHananeri nokunharire yeZana nokusuo guru reHwai. Vakazosvikomirira pasuo guru revaGaririri. 
Nehemiah12:40 Nokudaro mapoka maviri aye okutenda Mwari, akamira mumba maMwari, izvozvo ndakanga ndine chimwe chikamu chavakuru vakuru" 
Nehemiah12:41 chevapristi vaiva namabhosvo ava vaiti: Eriyakimu naMaaseya naMiniamini naMikaya naErieonai naZekariya naHananiya 
Nehemiah12:42 kwozouyawo Maaseya naShemaya naEreazaru naUzi naJehoHanani naMarikiya naEramu naEzero. Vaimbi vakaimba zvokunzwika zviye vachitungamirirwa naJezirahiya. 
Nehemiah12:43 Vakapira zvibayiro zvikuru musi iwoyo vakafara zvikuru kwazvo nokuti Mwari akanga aita kuti vafare chaizvo zvokufara zviya. Vakadzi navana vakazofarawo. Kufara kweJerusaremu kukanzwika kure kure. 
Nehemiah12:44 Pazuva iroro vamwe varume vakaiswa pabasa rokuona nezvedzimba dzokuchengetera zvinhu izvi zvinoti: mipiro nemichero yokutanga nezvegumi. Ndivo vaiva nebasa rokuunganidzamo migove yainzi nomutemo ive yavapristi nevaRevhi zvichibva muminda yomumaguta pamusana pokuti Judha yaifarira vapristi nevaRevhi vaishandamo. 
Nehemiah12:45 Vakaita basa raMwari wavo nebasawo rokuzvichenura sezvakangoitawo vaimbi navachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru maererano nomurao waDhavhidhi nomwanakomana wake Soromoni. 
Nehemiah12:46 Nokuti kare mumazuva aDhavhidhi neaAsafu kwaiva nomukuru mukuru wavaimbi, kwaivawo nedzimbo dzokurumbidza nokutenda Mwari." 
Nehemiah12:47 Isiraeri yose mumazuva aZerubhabhero nomumazuva aNehemiya vanhu, vaibvisa mugove wokupa vaimbi navachengetedzi vepamisuo mikuru, vaibvisawo zvevaRevhi, vaRevhiwo vachibvisawo chikamu chaifanirwa kupiwawo kuvanakomana vokwaAroni." 
Nehemiah13:1 Pazuva iroro vakaverengera vanhu bhuku raMosesi vachizvinzwa. Mubhuku iroro vakawana pakanga pakanyorwa kuti, hakuna munhu wechiAmoni kana wechiMoabhu anobvumirwa kupinda mugungano raMwari," 
Nehemiah13:2 nokuti havana kundochingura vaIsiraeri nechingwa nemvura asi kutoti vakatovakokera Bhiriamu kuti avarengerere achivashurikidzira rushambwa. Zvakadaro zvazvo Mwari wedu akapindura kurengerera nokuvarengerera rushambwa ikoko achikuita kuti kuve chikomborero. 
Nehemiah13:3 Vanhu pavakanzwa mutemo iwoyo vakabvisa muIsiraeri vanhu vose vechirudzi. 
Nehemiah13:4 Zvisati zvaiitika izvozvi, mupristi Eriyashibhu ndiye akasarudzirwa basa rokuchengetedza dzimba dzomumba yaMwari. Ainzwanana naTobhiya." 
Nehemiah13:5 Akagadzirira Tobhiya imba huru maaiisa mbesenwa dzomupiro norusenzi nemidziyo nechegumi chembesanwa nechewaini nechamafuta eorivhi zvakanga zvakatemwa nomutemo kuti zvipiwe vaRevhi navaimbi navachengeti vapamisuo mikuru nemipirowo yaipiwa kuvapristi. 
Nehemiah13:6 Paiitika zvose izvozvi, ini ndakanga ndisiri muJerusaremu, nokuti mugore ramakumi matatu nechipiri rokutonga kwaAtakizesesi, mambo weBhabhironi ndakaenda kwamambo iyeyo. Kwati perei mazuva akati kuti ndakakumbira mambo kuti ndichimbosuduruka zvangu," 
Nehemiah13:7 ndokubva ndadzokera kuJerusaremu. Ndopandakachizoziva uipi hwakanga hwaitwa naEriyashibhu hokugadzirira Tobhiya imba munhandare dzemba yaMwari. 
Nehemiah13:8 Zvakandishatirisa kwazvo, ndikakanda kunze kwemba iyoyo midziyo yose yaTobhiya yomumba." 
Nehemiah13:9 Ndakaudza vanhu kuzochenura dzimba idzodzo ndokuzodzoreramo kwandakaita midziyo yemba yamwari pamwechete nomupiro wembesanwa newerusenzi. 
Nehemiah13:10 Chimwewo chandakaona ndechokuti, vaRevhi vakanga vasina kupiwa migove yavo zvokuti vaRevhi navaimbi vanoita basa vakanga vatotizira kuminda yavo." 
Nehemiah13:11 Nokudaro ndakapopotera vakuru vakuru ndichivabvunza kuti, “Ko imba yaMwari yavakushairwa hanya kudai seiko?” Ndokubva ndaunganidza vaRevhi ndikavaisa panzvimbo dzavo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Vose vokwaJudha vakaunza zvegumi zvavo zvembesanwa nezvewaini nezvemafuta erorivhi maichengeterwa zvinhu. 
Nehemiah13:13 Ndakasarudza vanhu vandakapa basa rousahomwe ava vanoti: mupristi Sheremiya naZadhoki nyanzvi yomutemo naPedhaya muRevhi. Mutevedzeri wavo aiva Hanani mwanakomana waZakuri mwanakomana wokwaMataniya nokuti vaizivikanwa kuti vanhu vakatendeka. Basa ravo raiva rokugovera zvinhu kuhama dzavo. 
Nehemiah13:14 Mwari wangu ndiyeukeiwo pane zvizvi murege kupfudza zvandakaita zvakanaka zvandakaitira imba yaMwari wangu nebasa rake. 
Nehemiah13:15 Pamazuva iwayo ndakaona vamwe varume vokwaJudha vachisvina zvavo waini muchisviniro nomusi weSabata vachitounza zvavo mirwi yembesanwa vachidzitakudza pamadhongi avo, vaitakurawo waini namagirepisi namakuyu nemimwewo mitoro yakasiyana — siyana yavaiuya nayo muJerusaremu musi weSabata. Ndakavatsiura nezvezuva ravaitengesa zvokudya." 
Nehemiah13:16 Vamwe vanhu vokuTire vaigara muguta umu vaiuyawo nehove nezvimwewo zvinhu vachizvitengesa nemusi weSabata kuvanhu vokwaJudha muJerusaremu. 
Nehemiah13:17 Ndakapopotera vokumbahuru vokwaJudha ndikavati, “Zviiko zvamuri kuita, zvakaipa zvakadai zvinon'oresa Sabata?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Handizvo here zvakaitwa namadzibaba enyu izvozvi? Mwari wedu haana kuunza here zvose zvakaipa izvi patiri nokuguta rino, asi imi ndopamava kutopinza Isiraeri mumhosva huru nokun'oresa Sabata.”" 
Nehemiah13:19 Kwakati kwava kuda kusvipa, pamisuo mikuru yeJerusaremu, Sabata ravakusvika ndakatiwo misuo inofanira kuzarirwa; ndikati haifaniri kuzarurwa kusvikira Sabata rapera. Ndakapa vamwe vashandi vangu basa rokuchengetedza pamisuo mikuru kuitira kuti pasave nezvinhu zvinotakurwa zvichipindwa nazvo pamusi weSabata." 
Nehemiah13:20 Vemhindu dzokutengesa zvinhu navatengi vakatomborara kunze kweJerusaremu kamwechete kana kaviri kose. 
Nehemiah13:21 Ndakavayambira ndichiti, “Chamunorarira muberere memasvingo chii? Mukapamhidzazve ndinokutumirai vokukubatai.” Kubvira ipapo havana kuzouyazve nomusi weSabata." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ndakaudza vaRevhi kuti vanofanira kuzvichenura vogouya vochengetedza pamisuo mikuru kuitira kuti Sabata riereswe. Mwari wangu mundiyeukewo pamusana penyaya iyi mundiitirewo mwoyochena wenyu. 
Nehemiah13:23 Ndakaonawo pamazuva iwayo, vaJudha vakanga varoora vakadzi vokuAshidhodhi, nokwaAmoni nokuMoabhu." 
Nehemiah13:24 Chimwe chikamu chavana vavo chaitaura mutauro wokuAshidhodhi kana mumwewo mutauro wamamwe marudzi, asivasingakwanisi kutaura chiJudha." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ndakavatsiura ndikavarengerera rushambwa ndikarova vamwe varume pakati pavo, ndikavadzura vhudzi. Ndakaita kuti vapike mhiko muzita raMwari yokuti, “Hamufaniri kuroodza vanasikana venyu kuvanakomana vavo kana kuzviroorera imi pachenyu" 
Nehemiah13:26 Soromoni haana kutadza here pamusana pevakadzi vakadai? Kunyange pakati pamarudzi akawanda kwakanga kusina mambo akaita saiye uye aidiwa kwazvo naMwari wake. Mwari akamuita mambo weIsiraeri yose, asi vakadzi vechirudzi vakamuita kuti kunyange iyeyu atadze." 
Nehemiah13:27 Tinzwe here zvakare kuti, imiwo mavakuita zvinhu zvakaipa zvikadai! Hamuchatendeki kuna Mwari wedu nokuroora kwamava kuita vakadzi vechirudzika imi?”" 
Nehemiah13:28 Mumwe wavana vaJoyadha mwanakomana waEriyashibhu mupristi mukuru akanga achitova zvake mukuwasha waSanibharati muHoroni. Naizvozvo ndakamudzinga pandiri. 
Nehemiah13:29 Varangarirei, Mwari wangu pamusana pokuti vakan'oresa upristi nechitenderano choupristi nechavaRevhi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Naizvozvo ndakavachenesa kuzvinhu zvose zvisiri zvechiJudha ndikatema mabasa avapristi navaRevhi kuti mumwe nomumwe ave nebasa rake. 
Nehemiah13:31 Ndakaronga zvokuuiswa kwehuni dzomupiro panguva dzakatarwa uye nezvemichero yokutanga. Ndiyeukeiwo Mwari wangu mundizivewo. 
Esther1:1 Mumazuva aAhasuerusi, Ahasuerusi uya aitonga nyika dzinobvira kuIndia kusvikira kuItiopia achitonga zana renyika rine nyika makumi maviri nenomwe," 
Esther1:2 mumazuva iwayo, pakagara mambo Ahasuerusi pachigaro chake choumambo muguta reSusa, guta guru." 
Esther1:3 Mugore rake rechitatu rokutonga akaitira mabiko machinda ake ose namakurukota vakuru vakuru vehondo yePezhiya neMidhia nevokumbahuru namasadunhu amatunhu iwayo vari paari. 
Esther1:4 Izvozvo ainge achiratidza kuwanda kwoupfumi hwoumambo hwake norunako rwahwo nechiremera chake nomukurumbira woumambo hwake kwamazuva mazhinji, kwezana ramazuva rina mazuva makumi masere." 
Esther1:5 Kuzoti mazuva iwayo apera, mambo akaitira vanhu mabiko amazuva manomwe munhandare yomubindu romumuzinda wokwamambo. Akaitira mabiko iwayo vanhu vose vakanga vari muguta guru reSusa, guta romuzinda, vose zvavo vakuru navaduku." 
Esther1:6 Pakanga paine machira machena okudzikatirisa edonje chaiwo nezvimwe zveruvara rwedenga zvakanga zvakaturikwa zvakasungirirwa kumaringi esirivha netambo dzerineni dzakanakisisa kwazvo nedzeruvara rwehute pamisimboti yamabwe omunyakwe nezvigaro zvendarama nezvesirivha zvokugara wakanyatsozendama nezvesirivha nemabwe omunyakwe emavara matsvuku namachena nomunyakwe, namatombo emapera namatombo akakosha." 
Esther1:7 Zvokunwa izvi zvaiperekerwa mumahambarara endarama namamwewo mahambarara emhando nemhando. Waini yokwamambo yaiitwa zvokutopa negombe kwazvo sokuwandawo kwewaini yokwamambo. 
Esther1:8 Yainwiwa zviri pamurao pasina zvokumanikidza munhu nokuti mambo akanga atemera makurukota ose omumuzinda make kuti vaitire munhu nomunhu zvaanenge achida. 
Esther1:9 VaHosi vamambo, Vhashiti akaitirawo vanhukadzi mabiko mumuzinda wamambo Ahasuerusi." 
Esther1:10 Pazuva rechinomwe racho, mambo afaranuka mwoyo newaini akaudza Mehumani naBhizita naHaribhona naBhigita naAbhagita naZeta naKarikasi, vayuniki vanomwe vaishandira mambo Ahasuerusi savatariri vomumuzinda make" 
Esther1:11 kuti vauye navahosi vamambo, Vhashiti, pana mambo akapfeka ndaza yake youhosi. Chaakaitira izvi kwaiva kuti aratidze ndudzi nendudzi dzavanhu namachinda runako rwake pamusana pokuti iye akanga aine chimiro chinoyemurika." 
Esther1:12 Asi vahosi vamambo, Vhashiti, akaramba kuuya sokurayirwa kwakanga kwaitwa vayuniki ava namambo. Izvozvi izvi zvakashatirisa mambo akaviruka chaizvo nehasha." 
Esther1:13 Zvino mambo akakurukura nengwazi dzavarume vaiziva zvomukore iwoyo. Ndiwo aiva maitiro amambo kune vazivisisi vomutemo nokutonga. 
Esther1:14 Vaimutevedzera vacho ndaava vainzi Karishena naSheta naAdhimata naTarishishi naMeresi naMarisena naMemukani. Ivava vari vanomwe ndivo vaiva machinda ePezhiya neMidhia ndivo vaionana namambo uso nouso varivo vezvigaro zvokutangisisa paumambo. Akavati," 
Esther1:15 “Pamutemo, chii chinofanira kuitwa kuna vahosi Vhashiti, varega kuita zvarayirwa vayuniki namambo Ahasuerusi zvaatema kuti zviitwe?”" 
Esther1:16 Memukani ndokutaura pana mambo namachinda achiti, “Vahosi vamambo, Vhashiti, haana kutadzira mambo chete, asi atotadzirawo machinda ose namarudzi ose avanhu vari munyika dzamambo Ahasuerusi." 
Esther1:17 Ndinodaro nokuti, zvaitwa navahosi vamambo izvi zvichazikanwa navakadzi vose zvikakonzera kuti vazvidze varume vavo nokuti vachati, ‘Mambo Ahasuerusi akarayira kuti vahosi vamambo vauyiswe kwaaiva, asi ivo vakarega kuendako wani!’" 
Esther1:18 Iye nhasi uno chaiye, vakadzi vomuPezhiya umu nomuMidhia vanzwa zvaitwa navahosi vamambo izvi, vachatozvitaurirawo kumachinda ose amambo pachave nokushora noruvengo rukuru kwazvo." 
Esther1:19 Kana zvichikufadzai mambo ngapatemwe chirevo chinobva kunemi mambo chitobvawo chatonyorwa mumutemo yavaPezhiya nevaMidhia, uve mutemo usingashandurwi unoti: Vhashiti haafanire kumbobvumirwazve zvake kusvika pana mambo Ahasuerusi, uyewo chinzvimbo chake chokwamambo chipiwe kuno mumwe ari nani paari." 
Esther1:20 Saizvozvo kana chirevo ichochi chaitwa namambo chaparidzwa munyika yamambo yose namakuriro ayakaita, madzimai ose acharemekedza varume vavo. Vangave varume vane chinzvimbo chiri pamusoro kana chiri pasi zvacho.”" 
Esther1:21 Zano iri rakafadza mambo namachinda, mambo vakaita sokutaura kwakanga kwaita Memukani." 
Esther1:22 Akatumira matsamba kunyika dzose dzoumambo hwake nyika nenyika achiinyorera namanyorero ayo, rudzi nerudzi nomutaurowo warwo kuti, murume woga woga ave ndiye tenzi womusha wake achitaura norurimi rwavanhu vokwake." 
Esther2:1 Mushure maizvozvi izvi, hasha dzamambo Ahasuerusi dzaserera, akayeuka Vhashiti nezvaakanga aita uye nechirango chaakanga atemerwa." 
Esther2:2 Makurukota amambo vaimushandira vakati, “Dai mambo akatsvakirwa vasikana mhandara dzinotarisika zvakanaka." 
Esther2:3 Mambo ngaasarudze mamwe machinda munyika dzose dzoumambo hwake vaunganidze vasikana vacho, mhandara dzakanaka idzodzo kumba yavanhukadzi kuguta reSusa, guta guru romuzinda wamambo, vave mumaoko aHegai muyuniki wamambo ane basa rokuona nezvevanhukadzi vagopiwa mafuta avo okuzora." 
Esther2:4 Mhandara inenge yafarirwa namambo ngaive iyo vahosi vamambo panzvimbo yaVhashiti.” Izvi zvakafadza mambo vakaita saizvozvo. 
Esther2:5 Guta reSusa, guta guru romuzinda wamambo maiva nomumwe murume muJudha ainzi Modhekai mwana waJairi mwana waShimei ari mwanawo waKishi wedzinza rokwaBhenjamini." 
Esther2:6 Modhekai uyu akanga atakurwa kuJerusaremu mukati menhapwa dziye dzokuendwa nadzo pamwechete naJekoniya mambo wokwaJudha akatapwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi. 
Esther2:7 Modhekai ndiye akarera Hadhasa, ainziwo Esita mwanasikana wababamunini vake nokuti akanga ava nherera isina baba kana amai. Musikana iyeyu akanga ari musikana aitarisika zvakanaka ane chimiro chinoyevedza. Pakafa baba namai vake, Modhekai ndiye akasara ava kumurera ava kumuona semwanasikana wake." 
Esther2:8 Zvino pakanga pachiparidzwa chirevo chamambo chiya uye vasikana vazhinji pavakanga vaungana muguta reSusa, guta romuzinda, vava mumaoko aHegai, Esita akaendwa naye mumuzinda wamambo akaiswawo mumaoko aHegai aiva nebasa rokuona nezvevanhukadzi." 
Esther2:9 Mhandara iyi yakafarirwa naHegai akabva ava kumuitira zvakanaka. Akakurumidza kumupa mafuta akewo okuzora nomugove wake wechokudya navasikana vanomwe shasha chaidzo dzomumuzinda wamambo, akamukwiridzira iye navasikana vake akamuendesa kwakanakisisa kwazvo mumba yavanhukadzi." 
Esther2:10 Esita akanga asina kuvaudza rudzi rwake kana hama dzake nokuti Modhekai akanga amukohomedza kuti asabudise izvozvo pachena. 
Esther2:11 Zuva nezuva Modhekai aifamba-famba pamberi penhandare yemba yavanhukadzi kuti anzwe kuti Esita akadii, uye kuti zvaimufambira sei." 
Esther2:12 Musikana woga woga aiva nechijana chake chokupinda muna mambo Ahasuerusi. Pamurawo waisunga nezvavanhukadzi ivavo, kupindamo, aitozopinda kwapera mwedzi gumi nemiviri nokuti ndiyo nguva yacho yavaipedza yokuzvivandudza nayo runako, vaiita mwedzi mitanhatu namafuta emura, vozoitawo mimwezve mwedzi mitanhatu vaine twokurungisa tunonhuwirira namafuta okuzora echikadzi." 
Esther2:13 Musikana paaizopinda muna mambo saizvozvi chaainge ada kuti ave nacho aipiwa chokuenda nacho chichibva kumba yavanhukadzi achienda kumuzinda wamambo. 
Esther2:14 Aiendako manheru, mangwana mangwanani aizodzoka osvikira mumba yechipiri yavanhukadzi ova mumaoko aShaashigazi mumwe muyuniki wamambo aiva nebasa rokuona nezvevarongo vamambo. Akanga asingazobvumidzwazve kupinda muna mambo asi kutoti mambo atofadzwa zvake naye uye atoita zvokudaidzwa nezita." 
Esther2:15 Pakasvika chijana chaEsita, mwanasikana waAbhihairi babamunini vaModhekai; uya akasara omurera somwanasikana wake chokuti achindopindawo muna mambo, hapana chaakakumbira kunze kwezvaakanyeurirwa naHegai muyuniki wamambo aive nebasa rokuchengeta vakadzi. Esita aiyemurwa nomunhu wose aimuona." 
Esther2:16 Esita, paakaendwa naye kuna mambo Ahasuerusi mumuzinda waiye mambo, uri mwedzi wegumi, mwedzi waTebheti mugore rechinomwe rokutonga kwaAhasuerusi," 
Esther2:17 mambo akada Esita kupinda vakadzi vose. Akatorwa mwoyo naye akamufarira kupinda dzimwe mhandara dzose. Nokudaro akamudzika mumusoro ndaza youmambo akabva amuita vahosi vamambo panzvimbo yaVhashiti. 
Esther2:18 Mambo akaitira machinda namakurukota ake mabiko makuru kwazvo ari mabiko aEsita. Akaderedza mutero munyika dzose akapawo matutu matutu ezvipo samapiro anoita mambo. 
Esther2:19 Pakazoungana mhandara dziye kechipiri, Modhekai ndiye akanga ava wokugaririra pasuo guru ramambo." 
Esther2:20 Izvozvo Esita akanga asati ambotaurira vanhu rudzi rwake kana kuti hama dzake ndavanaani sokurayirwa kwaakaitwa naModhekai. Zvaivapo ndezvokuti, Esita uyu aizoteerera Modhekai sezvaaingoita pavaimurera." 
Esther2:21 Mumazuva iwayo ainge Modhekai ariye wokugaririra pasuo guru rokwamambo, Bhigitani naTereshi vamwe vayuniki vaigaririra kusuo guru vakashatirwa vakafunga zvokupfuudza mambo Ahasuerusi." 
Esther2:22 Nyaya iyoyi yakasvikawo munzeve dzaModhekai akabva aruma nzeve vahosi, Esita, Esita ndokubvawo abayira mambo zani muzita raModhekai." 
Esther2:23 Pazvakatsvagurudzwa zvikaonekwa kuti ndizvo, varume ivava vose vari vaviri vakaurayiwa vachiita zvokusungirirwa mumuti, zvikanyorwawo muBhuku reNhoroondo mambo aripo." 
Esther3:1 Mushure maizvozvi izvi, mambo Ahasuerusi akasumudzira pamusoro Hamani wokwaAgagi mwanakomana waHamedhata akamukwidziridza achimupa chigaro chepamusoro kudarika machinda mamwe ose aakanga anawo." 
Esther3:2 Zvino makurukota ose amambo akanga ari epasuo guru rokwamambo vaikotama vachiremekedza Hamani nokuti ndozvakanga zvatemwa namambo nezvake. Asi Modhekai haaipfugama achimugwadamira. 
Esther3:3 Makurukota amambo aive pasuo guru rokwamambo akazobvunza kuti, “Unotyorerei murao wamambo?”" 
Esther3:4 Pavakataura naye zuva nezuva iye asingateereri vakazozvisvitsa kuna Hamani vachida kuona kuti zvaitaurwa naModhekai zvaizomusvitsa kupi, nokuti akanga avaudza kuti aiva muJudha." 
Esther3:5 Hamani, paakaona kuti Modhekai akanga asingapfugami kana kumugwadamira akaviruka chaizvo nehasha." 
Esther3:6 Akaona chiri chinhu chisina maturo kungoranga Modhekai chete, naizvozvo sezvo akanga audzwa kuti rudzi rwaModhekai nderwechiJudha, akafunga zvokuparadza maJudha ose, vanhu vokwaModhekai wacho munyika dzose dzoumambo hwaAhasuerusi." 
Esther3:7 Mumwedzi wechiposhi, mwedzi waNisani, mugore regumi rechipiri rokutonga kwaAhasuerusi vakashandisa Puri, ndochin'ange ichocho pana Hamani zuva nezuva. Vaichiita mwedzi nomwedzi kudzamara pamwedzi wegumi nechipiri ndiwo mwedzi waAdhari iwoyo." 
Esther3:8 Hamani akati kuna mambo Ahasuerusi, “Kune rumwe rudzi rwavanhu rwakatekeshera rwakaita mharadzirwa mukati mendudzi dzavanhu munyika dzose dzoumambo hwenyu. Mitemo yavo yakasiyana neyedzimwe ndudzi dzose dzavanhu uye havachengete mitemo yamambo zvokuti kuvarega zvavo vakangodaro, hapana chiyamuro kwamuri mambo." 
Esther3:9 Kana muchida zvenyu mambo, panofanira kutemwa chirevo chokuti vaparadzwe. Ini ndini ndichabvisa mari yesirivha inosvika mazana matatu amatani ane matani makumi mana ane mashanu, ndoiisa mumaoko avanhu vanoona nezvebasa rokwamambo kuti vagoiisa munochengeterwa upfumi hwokwamambo.”" 
Esther3:10 Nokudaro mambo akabvisa muruoko ringi yake yechidhindo akapa kuna Hamani muvengi wevaJudha muAgagi mwanakomana wokwaHamedhata. 
Esther3:11 Mambo akati kuna Hamani, “Mari yacho unopiwa iwe uye vanhu vacho vanoiswa mumaoko mako kuti uite zvaunoda navo.”" 
Esther3:12 Vanyori vokwamambo vakadaidzwa musi wegumi nechitatu wemwedzi wechiposhi kukanyorerwa chirevo chiya madzishe namasadunhu enyika dzose namachinda endudzi dzose dzavanhu. Vakachinyora namanyorero enyika yoga yoga nomutauro wenyika imwe neimwe, maererano nezvose zvainge zvatemwa naHamani. Chirevo ichocho chakanyorwa muzita ramambo Ahasuerusi chikadhindwa nechidhidho chamambo." 
Esther3:13 Kwakatumwa vokumhanya namatsamba kunyika dzose dzamambo aiti kuparadzwe, kuurayiwe, kutsakatiswe maJudha ose zvawo; vakuru navadiki, vakadzi navana nomusi mumwechete musi wegumi nechitatu womwedzi wegumi nechipiri, mwedzi waAdhari uye kupambwe zvinhu zvavo." 
Esther3:14 Tsamba yakaita saiyoyi yaifanira kupiwa somutemo munyika dzose ichifanira kuparidzwa kundudzi dzose dzavanhu kuti musi iwoyo vange vakagadzirira. 
Esther3:15 Vokumhanya neshoko vaye vakakasika kuenda chiri chinhu chainge chatemwa namambo. Chirevo ichi chakatemwa muguta reSusa, mumuzinda wamambo. Mambo naHamani ndokugara pasi vava kunwa zvavo asi guta reSusa rakakangaidzwa nazvo." 
Esther4:1 Modhekai paakaziva zvose zvakanga zvaitwa akabvarura hanzu dzake neshungu ndokupfeka hanzu dzamasaga ndokuzvidira dota. Akabuda oenda mukati meguta iroro ndiye mhere povo wochema achiungudza zvinosiririsa kwazvo. 
Esther4:2 Akandosvika mberi kwesuo guru rokwamambo asi haana kupinda nokuti hapana aikwanisa kupinda pasuo guru rokwamambo akapfeka masaga. 
Esther4:3 Munyika dzose, kwose kwainge kwasvika zvakatemwa namambo izvi, nechirevo chake ichochi kwaibva kwava nokuchema kukuru muvaJudha nokutsanya vachihwihwidza nokuungudza; vazhinji vavo vakanga vakapfeka hanzu dzamasaga vakazvidira madota." 
Esther4:4 Vasikana vaEsita navayuniki vake pavakasvitsa shoko irori kwavari, vahosi vamambo vakarwadziwa kwazvo nazvo. Vakatumira hanzu dzokuti Modhekai agopfekenura hanzu dzake dzamasaga asi akadziramba." 
Esther4:5 Zvino Esita akadaidza Hataki mumwe muyuniki wokwamambo akanga apiwa basa rokumuchengeta vakamutuma kuna Modhekai kuti andonzwa kuti chii chaizvo uye kuti zvauya sei. 
Esther4:6 Hataki akabuda akaenda kuna Modhekai panhandare yeguta iri pamberi pesuo guru rokwamambo. 
Esther4:7 Modhekai akamurondedzera zvose zvakanga zvamuwana nouwandi chaihwo hwemari yakavimbiswa naHamani kuti aizobvisa igoendeswa maichengeterwa upfumi hwokwamambo yebasa rokuparadzisa vaJudha. 
Esther4:8 Modhekai akamupawo imwe tsamba yakanga yakaita sechirevo ichocho chakatemwa muguta reSusa chokuti vaparadzwe kuitira kuti andochiratidzawo Esita nokumutsanangurira nokumuti aende kuna mambo andomuteterera achikumbirira vanhu vokwake. 
Esther4:9 Hataki akaenda akandopira Esita zvakanga zvarehwa naModhekai. 
Esther4:10 Esita akataurira Hataki shoko rokundotaurira Modhekai kuti," 
Esther4:11 “Machinda ose navanhu vose venyika dzamambo vanoziva kuti kuwana munhu, angave murume kana mukadzi zvake, anopinda muna mambo muimba yomukati asina kutoitwa zvokudaidzwa, kune mutemo mumwechetechete wokuti, pfiro yavo imwecheteyo; vanourayiwa, kusatoti anenge aita zvokutosimudzirwa namambo tsvimbo yendarama youmambo kuitira kuti ararame. Zvino ini handina kumbodaidzwa kuti ndipinde muna mambo mumazuva makumi matatu iwaya.”" 
Esther4:12 Vakandotaurirawo Modhekai zvakanga zvarehwa naEsita. 
Esther4:13 Modhekai akavataurira mhinduro yokundopa Esita yokuti, “Chirega zvako kuzviti zvandiri mumuzinda wamambo ndini ndoga munhu achapunyuka pana vamwe vaJudha vose." 
Esther4:14 Ndinodaro nokuti kana ukatonyarara zvako panguva yakaita seiyo iyi, vaJudha vachawana ruyamuro nokununurwa kuchangonyuka kuchibva kumwewo zvako. Asi iwe nemba yababa vako muchaparara. Zvinoka, zvimwe kupinda kwawakaita paumambo uku zvakatoitirwa nguva yakaita seiyo ino iyi, zvinaani angazvizive izvozvo?”" 
Esther4:15 Esita akavaudza mhinduro yokundopawo Modhekai yokuti," 
Esther4:16 “Endai mundokokorodza vaJudha vose vamunowana muSusa muti ngakutsanywe muchitsanyireni murege kudya kana kunwa kwamazuva matatu siku nesikati. Iniwo navasikana vangu ndichatsanyawo sezvamuchaita. Ndichazoenda kuna mambo kunyange zvazvo zvisiri pamutemo. Kana ndikaparara ndapararawo zvangu.” 
Esther4:17 Modhekai akaenda akandoita zvose zvakanga zvarayirwa naEsita. 
Esther5:1 Pazuva retatu Esita akapfeka hanzu dzake dzouhosi hokwamambo akandomira munhandare yomukati yomumuzinda wamambo pakatarisana nezimba rokusanganira rokwamambo. Mambo akanga agere zvake pachigaro chake choumambo mumuzinda imomo pakatarisana nepokupinda napo mumuzinda. 
Esther5:2 Mambo paakaona vahosi vamambo Esita amire munhandare umu, akamuitira mwoyochena akabva asimudzira tsvimbo yake yendarama yaaiva nayo muruoko kuna Esita. Esita akaswedera akasvikobata pamusoro petsvimbo iyoyo." 
Esther5:3 Mambo akati kwaari, “Chiiko nhai vahosi vangu Esita? Chiiko chamuri kukumbira? Munochipihwa chete kunyange chikava zvacho chikamu chepakati napakati chaicho choumambo hwangu.”" 
Esther5:4 Esita ndokuti, “Kana zvichikufadzai mambo, dai mambo naHamani mukambouyawo nhasi uno kumabiko andaitira imi mambo.”" 
Esther5:5 Mambo akabva ati, “Kurumidzai kuunza Hamani tigoitirawo Esita zvaari kuda.” Nokudaro mambo naHamani vakasvika kumabiko akanga aitwa naEsita." 
Esther5:6 Pavaingunonwa zvavo waini, mambo akati kuna Esita, “Chichemo chako ndechipiko? Unotozviitirwa chete, chiiko chauri kukumbira? Kunyange chikava zvacho chikamu chapakati napakati chaicho choumambo hwangu zvinofanira kuti zvitoitwa.”" 
Esther5:7 Asi Esita akati, “Chichemo changu nechikumbiro changu ndechichi chokuti;" 
Esther5:8 kana imi mambo mandiitirawo tsiye nyoro uye kana zvichikufadzaiwo mambo kuti munzwe chichemo changu mundiitirewo zvandichakukumbirai, dai mambo naHamani vakazouya kumabiko andichakuitirai, mangwana ndopandichazoita zvarehwa namambo.”" 
Esther5:9 Hamani akaenda achifara zvikuru zvake musi iwoyo hakuzi kufara ikoko, mumwoyo asisagoni nokufara. Asi Hamani paakaona Modhekai kusuo guru rokwamambo kuye kuti haana kana kumbomusimukira kunyange kudedera pamberi pake, akaviruka nehasha kutsamwira Modhekai." 
Esther5:10 Zvakadaro zvazvo Hamani akazvidzora akaenda zvake kumba. Akatuma vanhu kundodaidza shamwari dzake nomudzimai wake, Zereshi." 
Esther5:11 Hamani akavazuwira nezvembiri yokupfuma kwake nokuwanda kwakanga kwaita vana vake nezvose zvokusumidzirwa pachigaro chepamusoro nechiremera chaakanga apiwa namambo nokuvakwidziridza kwaakanga avaita pamusoro pemachinda namakurukota amambo. 
Esther5:12 Hamani akatiwo, “Kana naivo vahosi vamambo chaivo, Esita haana mumwe waakati auye namambo kumabiko aakanga agadzirira kusiya inini chete. Izvozvi namagwanawo ivo vakatondikokazve pamwechete namambo." 
Esther5:13 Asi zvose izvozvi izvi hazvina maturo, kana mumaziso mangu umu ndichinge ndangoona Modhekai muJudha uya uya akagaririra pasuo guru rokwaMambo.”" 
Esther5:14 Mudzimai wake, Zereshi neshamwari dzake dzose vakati kwavari, “Ngapagadzirwe mutandarikwa wamapango unoita makumi maviri emamita ane mamita maviri kureba, mugofumosvitsa kuna mambo shoko rokuti Modhekai ngaasungirirwe pamutandarikwa iwoyo mozonyatsofara zvenyu muchienda namambo kumabiko.” Zano irori rakafadza Hamani akaita kuti mutandarikwa wacho ugadzirwe." 
Esther6:1 Usiku ihwohwo, mambo haana kumborara. Akati vanhu vamuvigire bhuku rokuyeuchidza nyaya dzakamboitika reNhoroondo, dzikaverengwa pana mambo ipapo." 
Esther6:2 Makawanika makanyorwa zvokunyevera kwakaita Modhekai nezvaBhigitana naTereshi, vayuniki vaviri vokwamambo vaya vakanga vari vokugaririra kusuo guru vakanga vafunga zvokuuraya mambo Ahasuerusi." 
Esther6:3 Mambo akati, “Chii chaizvo chakapiwa Modhekai kuitira nyaya iyoyi chokumuremekedza kana chokumukudzawo nacho?” Machinda amambo aimushandira akati, “Hapana chaakaitirwa uya!”" 
Esther6:4 Mambo akabva ati, “Ndianiko ari munhandare umu?” Izvozvo Hamani akanga achangoti pindei munhandare yokunze yomumuzinda wamambo kuzopira kuna mambo nyaya yokuti Modhekai asungirirwe pamutandarikwa uya waakanga amugadzirira." 
Esther6:5 Mamwe machinda amambo ndokuti, “NdiHamani, amire munhandare umu.” Mambo akati, “Muregei zvake apinde.”" 
Esther6:6 Nokudaro Hamani akapinda, mambo akati kwaari, “Chii chaizvo chingaitirwe munhu kuri kuti mambo ada kumuremekedza?” Ipapo nechomumwoyo Hamani akazviti, “Iye mambo ndiani chaizvo waangafarire kuremekedza kupinda ini?”" 
Esther6:7 Hamani akapindura mambo achiti, “Zvingaitirwe munhu wamunenge mada kuremekedza imi mambo ndezvokuti ngapaunzwe hanzu dzoumambo," 
Esther6:8 hanzu dzamunombopfeka imi mambo nebhiza rinotasvwa namambo rinoiswa chiremba choumambo mumusoro. 
Esther6:9 Hanzu idzodzo nebhiza racho, ngazviiswe mumaoko merimwe jinda rokwamambo rapamusoro-soro. Jinda iroro ngarishongedzwe hanzu idzodzo munhu wacho anoda kuremekedzwa namambo. Jinda iroro ngarifambe nomunhu iyeyo napamusika weguta rino achidaidzira ari mberi kwake kuti, ‘Izvi ndizvo zvinoitwa namambo kumunhu waanenge ada kuremekedza!’ ”" 
Esther6:10 Ipapo mambo akabva ati kuna Hamani, “Chitokurumidza utore hanzu idzodzo nebhiza racho sokutaurawo kwawaita. Uitire saizvozvo Modhekai muJudha anogaririra kuSuo Guru rokwaMambo. Usawane zvaunosiya pane zvawareva izvi.”" 
Esther6:11 Saizvozvo Hamani akatora hanzu dzacho nebhiza racho akashongedza Modhekai akamufambisa napamusika weguta ari pabhiza, Hamani achidaidzira achiti, “Izvi ndozvinoitwa namambo kumunhu waanenge ada kuremekedza!”" 
Esther6:12 Modhekai akazodzokera kusuo guru rokwaMambo, asi Hamani akakurumidza kudzokera kumba kwake achiungudza akafuka musoro." 
Esther6:13 Hamani akasvikotaurira mudzimai wake Zereshi neshamwari dzake dzose zvakanga zvaitika kwaari. Ngwazi dzake nomudzimai wake Zereshi, vakati kwaari, “Kana Modhekai wawatanga kukotamira ari werudzi rwechiJudhaka hamumbomukurira asi kutoti iyewe ndiwe uchatoputsika chete pamberi pake.”" 
Esther6:14 Vachingunotaura navo kudaro, pakasvika vayuniki vamambo kuzotora Hamani nokukurumidza kuenda naye kumabiko aye akaitwa naEsita." 
Esther7:1 Sokudaro mambo naHamani vakapinda mumabiko navahosi vamambo Esita. 
Esther7:2 Pazuva rechipiri racho, vachinwa zvavo waini, mambo akatizve kuna Esita, “Chichemo chenyu ndechipi nhai vahosi vangu Esita? Unozvipiwa. Chii chaizvo chauri kukumbira? Kunyange chikava chikamu chapakati napakati chaicho choumambo hwangu, zvinofanira kuti zvitoitwa.”" 
Esther7:3 Vahosi Esita vakapindura vachiti, “Kana imi mandiitirawo mwoyochena mambo, uye kana zvichikufadzai imi mambo nokukumbira kwandinenge ndaita ndinokumbira kuti mundiraramisewo uyewo nokukumbira kwangu mundiraramisirewo vanhu vokwangu;" 
Esther7:4 nokuti takatotengeswaka isu, ini pamwechete navanhu vokwangu kuti tiparadzwe, tiuraiwe uye kuti titsakatiswe. Dai kuri kuti takangotengeswa chete nhapwa dzechikadzi nedzechirume, ndingadai ndaramba ndakanyarara zvangu. Chinondidariso ndechokuti muvengi wacho iyeyo haazogona kuzogadziridza achitsiva kurasikirwa kunenge kwaita mambo.”" 
Esther7:5 Mambo Ahasuerusi akati kuna vahosi Esita, “Ndiani iyeyo? Ari kupi angafemere zvake kuita izvozvi?”" 
Esther7:6 Esita akati, “Imwe mhandu, muvengi chaiye! Muipi uyu Hamani!” Hamani akabva adumbirwa chaizvo nokutya pana mambo navahosi vake." 
Esther7:7 Mambo akabva asumuka pakudya akabva aviruka nehasha akaenda mubindu romumuzinda. Asi Hamani akasara achiteterera kuna vahosi vamambo Esita kuti vangovararamisawo nokuti akanga atozviona kuti mambo akanga atoronga kumuita chimwe chinhu. 
Esther7:8 Mambo akazodzoka kubindu romumuzinda kuya akaenda kunzvimbo kwakanga kuchinwirwa waini kuya. Izvozvo Hamani akanga achitozviwisira pachigaro paiva naEsita, Mambo vakabva ati, “Ava kutobhinya vahosi vangu mumaziso mangu nhai, mumuzinda mangu muno?” Mambo achangopedza kutaura muromo iwoyu, akabva afukidza Hamani uso hwake." 
Esther7:9 Mumwe wavayuniki vainge vachishandira mambo anonzi Habhona ndokuti, “Mutandarikwa wamapango uya wakagadzirwa naHamani kusungirira Modhekai, wokubayira mambo zanhi uya zvikazomuponesa, mutandariko wacho iwoyo wakatomira mumusha maHamani unoita makumi maviri amamita ana mamita maviri kureba.”" 
Esther7:10 Mambo akabva ati, “Indomusungirirai ipapo.” Saizvozvo vakandosungirira Hamani pamutandariko wemapango uya waakanga agadzirira Modhekai. Ndopakazoserera hasha dzamambo." 
Esther8:1 Musi iwoyo mambo Ahasuerusi akapa kuna vahosi vake Esita imba yaHamani muvengi wavaJudha Modhekai akauya kuna mambo nokuti Esita akanga amutaurira kuti chii chake. 
Esther8:2 Mambo akabvisa ringi rake rechidhindo raakatorera Hamani ndokuripa kuna Modhekai. Esita akaisa imba yaHamani mumaoko maModhekai. 
Esther8:3 Esita akataurazve kuna mambo. Akawira pasi pamakumbo ake achimuteterera nemisodzi padama kuti akonese bangano rakaipa raHamani muAgagi nezano raakanga aronga rokuparadza vaJudha. 
Esther8:4 Mambo akasumudzira tsvimbo yake yendarama kuna Esita," 
Esther8:5 Esita akabva asimuka akamira mberi kwamambo, akati, “Kana zvichikufadzai zvenyu mambo uye mandiitirawo tsiye nyoro, uyezve kana muchichionawo kuti chingave chinhu chakanaka, mandiitirawo mwoyochena; ngakunyorwe matsamba anoti: zvakanga zvakatemwa mutsamba, naHamani muchiAgagi mwanakomana waHamedhata, tsamba dzaakanga anyorera kuparadza vaJudha vari munyika dzose dzamambo." 
Esther8:6 Nokuti ndingaise kupi mwoyo kuona nyatwa iri kuwira vanhu vokwangu? Uye kuti ndingabate papi chaizvo kuona vanhu vokwangu vachiparadzwa?” 
Esther8:7 Mambo Ahasuerusi akati kuna vahosi Esita naModhekai muJudha, “Chionai kuti ndakapa Esita imba yaHamani, akasungirira Hamani pamutandarikwa pamusana pokuti aida kuzouraya vaJudha." 
Esther8:8 Zvino imi mochinyora zvamunoda nezvevaJudha muzita ramambo mugozvidhinda neringi ramambo rechidhindo nokuti chirevo chinenge chanyorwa muzita ramambo uye chikadhindwa neringi ramambo rechidhindo, hachisandurwi.”" 
Esther8:9 Vanasamunyori vamambo vakadaidzwa panguva iyoyo mumwedzi wechitatu, unonzi Sivani pari pazuva rechimakumi maviri namatatu. Kwakanyorwa chirevo chaitaura zvainge zvatemwa naModhekai pamusoro pevaJudha chichienda kumadzishe namasadunhu namachinda enyika dzaibvira kuIndia kusvika kuItiopia, dzaisvika zana namakumi maviri ane nomwe. Nyika yoga yoga ichinyorerwa nomunyorero wayo rudzi rumwe norumwe ruchinyorerwa nomutauro warwo. Uyewo nokuvaJudha nomunyorero wavo nomutauro wavo." 
Esther8:10 Chakanyorwa muzita ramambo Ahasuerusi chikadhindwa neringi ramambo rechidhindo. Tsamba idzodzo dzakatumirwa nevokumhanya nemashoko vakanga vakatasva mabhiza omudanga ramambo aimhanya kwazvo aishandiswa pabasa ramambo. 
Esther8:11 Netsamba idzi, mambo akabvumidza vaJudha vomuguta rimwe nerimwe kuunganidzana kuti vazozvidzivirira upenyu; uye kuti vaparadze nokutouraya chaiko nokutsakatisa hondo ipi neipi zvayo yavanhu inenge iine zvombo zvehondo, kana nyika inenge yafunga zvokurwisa ivo navana vavo navakadzi vavo, kana kuzopamba zvinhu zvavo;" 
Esther8:12 uye kuti zviitwe nezuva rimwechete chairo munyika dzose dzamambo Ahasuerusi musi wacho wegumi nechitatu wemwedzi wegumi nechipiri, ndomwedzi waAdhari iwoyo." 
Esther8:13 Imwe Tsamba yakangoita saiyoyi iyi yaifanira kuzoburitswa sechirevo munyika yoga yoga igonyatsoziviswa kuvanhu. VaJudha vose vaifanira kugadzirira pamusi iwoyo kutsividza vavengi vavo. 
Esther8:14 Saizvozvowo vokumhanya namashoko vaya vakabva vati karakata pamabhiza avo anomhanya kwazvo, aimboshandiswa pabasa ramambo ndokuenda nokukurumidza nokuti chaive chinhu chatemwa namambo. Chirevo ichi chakatemwa muguta reSusa, guta guru renyika iyoyo." 
Esther8:15 Modhekai akabva pana mambo ipapo, akabuda akapfeka hanzu dzokwamambo dzeruvara rwedenga nechena aine ndaza huru yendarama nejasi refu-refu rejira rerineni yakanakisisa yeruvara rwehute, guta rose reSusa riri zhwerendende kufara." 
Esther8:16 VaJudha vakava nechiedza vakapembera vachifara vakanzwa kuremekedzwa. 
Esther8:17 Munyika dzose idzodzo nomumaguta ose kwakasvikwa nechirevo chamambo nezvakanga zvatemwa namambo, makava nokufara nokupembera pakati pavaJudha. Kwakabva kwaitwa zuva guru okufara nokuzorora. Vamwewo mukati menyika iyoyi vakazviti vava vaJudha nokuti vakanga vawirwa nokutya vaJudha." 
Esther9:1 Zvino mumwedzi wegumi nechipiri, mumwedzi waAdhari, pamusi wegumi nechitatu wemwedzi wakarewo, pacho paifanira kuti zvakarehwa nomurao uya nechirevo chamambo zvichiitwa, musi wacho chaiwo waitarisirwa navavengi vevaJudha kuti vaJudha vava kuzova mumaoko medu, asi zuva iroro rakanga ratosandurwa kuti richiva zuva rokuti vaJudha vaise vavengi vavo mumaoko mavo;" 
Esther9:2 vaJudha vakaunganidzana mumaguta avo munyika dzose dzamambo Ahasuerusi kuti vakuvadze vaida kuvapinza munyatwa. Ipapo hakuna akakwanisa kumirisana navo nokuti kutya vaJudha kwakanga kwawira marudzi ose avanhu. 
Esther9:3 Machinda ose zvawo edzinyika idzi namadzishe namasadunhu namakurukota okwamambo, vakayamurawo vaJudha pamusana pokuti kutya Modhekai kwakanga kwavawira." 
Esther9:4 Nokuti Modhekai akanga ava mukuru mukuru mumuzinda wamambo mukurumbira wake ukadhuma munyika dzose idzodzo pamusana pokuti simba raModhekai rakaramba richingokura-kura. 
Esther9:5 Ipapo vaJudha vakarwisa vavengi vavo vose vachivapfuudza vachivaparadza vachitoita zvavo zvavanoda kuna vaivavenga. 
Esther9:6 Muguta reSusa makare, muguta guru romuzinda iroro, vaJudha vakauraya vakaparadza mazana mashanu avanhu" 
Esther9:7 vakaurayawo ava vanoti: Parishandata naDharifoni naAsipata 
Esther9:8 naPorata naAdharia na Andhata 
Esther9:9 naParimashita naArisai naAridhai naVhaizata," 
Esther9:10 navanakomana gumi vaHamani mwana waHamudhata, muvengi wavaJudha, asi havana chavakapamba." 
Esther9:11 Pazuva rakarero, shoko rouwandi hwavanhu vakaurayiwa muguta reSusa, guta guru romuzinda wamambo, rakasvitswa kuna mambo." 
Esther9:12 Mambo akati kuna vahosi Esita, “Muguta reSusa muno, guta guru romuzinda wamambo, vaJudha vauraya mazana mashanu avanhu uyewo gumi ravana vaHamani vakomana, ko kutozoti kune dzimwe nyika dzose dzamambo! Zvino chichemo chamuchinacho ndechipi? Munozviitirwa chete. Ko chimwe chamungade kukumbira ipapa chii? Zvinofanira kuti zviitwe.”" 
Esther9:13 Esita akati, “Kana muchida henyu mambo, regai zvenyu vaJudha vari muguta reSusa muno mangwana vabvumirwe kuzoita zviri kurehwa nechirevo ichochi chanhasi uno ichi, uye zvitunha gumi zvavanakomana vaHamani zvirembedzwe pamutandarikwa wamapango uya.”" 
Esther9:14 Ipapo mambo akatema kuti zviitwe saizvozvo, chirevo chikatemwa muSusa vanakomana gumi vaHamani vaye vakarembedzwa pamutandarikwa paye." 
Esther9:15 VaJudha vaiva muguta reSusa vakaunganidzanazve pamusi wegumi nechina wemwedzi waAdhari, vakauraya mazana matatu avarume vomuSusa asi hapana chavakapamba." 
Esther9:16 VaJudhawo vakanga vari mune dzimwe nyika dzomunyika yaMambo, vakaunganawo kuti vazvidzivirire. Vakawana zororo kuvavengi vavo nokuuraya zviuru makumi manomwe avanhu ane zviuru zvishanu vaivavenga asi havana chavakapamba." 
Esther9:17 Uyu waiva musi wegumi nechitatu wemwedzi waAdhari. Pazuva regumi nechina, vakazorora vakariita kuti rive zuva guru ramabiko nerokufara." 
Esther9:18 Asi vaJudha vaive muguta reSusa vakaunganidzana pazuva regumi nechitatu neregumi nechina vakazozorora pazuva regumi nechishanu vakariita zuva guru remabiko nerokufara. 
Esther9:19 Naizvozvo vaJudha vomumamisha vanogara mumaguta asina masvingo, vanochengeta zuva regumi nechina remwedzi waAdhari sezuva rokufara neremabiko nezuva rokuzorora zvavo vachifaranuka nezuva rokutumirana zvipo zvezvokudya zvakanakisisa." 
Esther9:20 Modhekai akanyora zvinhu izvozvi akatumirawo tsamba kuvaJudha vaiva munyika dzose dzamambo Ahasuerusi, dzose zvadzo dzokure nedzepedyo," 
Esther9:21 achivati vanofanira kuchengetawo zuva regumi nechina remwedzi waAdhari uyewo nezuva regumi nechishanu remwedzi wakarewo gore negore. 
Esther9:22 Akavati vaachengete samazuva akawana vaJudha zororo kuvavengi vavo, uye semwedzi wavakasandurirwa zvinhu, kusuruvara kukaitwa kufara, kuungudza kuchiitwa zuva rokufaranuka vagoaita mazuva emabiko neokufara, mazuva okutumirana zvipo zvezvokudya zvakanakisisa ivo pachavo nokuvarombowo." 
Esther9:23 Nokudaro vaJudha vakatanga kuita basa iri ravakanga vavamba uye sokunyorerwa kwavakanga vaitwa naModhekai 
Esther9:24 pamusana pokuti Hamani muAgagi mwanakomana waHamedhata muvengi wavaJudha waakanga aitira vaJudha bangano rokuvaparadza vatoshandisawo Puri, chin'ange ichocho kuitira kuti vavazhanye vavaparadze." 
Esther9:25 Asi pakazosvika Esita pana mambo, iye mambo akatema zvirevo zvakaita zvokunyorwa kuti bangano rake rakaipa raakanga arongera vaJudha ripfukire Hamani wakare uye kuti iye navanakomana vake vasungirirwe pamutandarikwa wamapango." 
Esther9:26 Naizvozvo vakatumidza mazuva iwaya zita rokuti Purimu zvichibva kune izwi rokuti Puri. Saka naizvozvo, pamusana pezvose zvakanga zvakanyorwa mutsamba iyoyo nedzavakanga vasangana nadzo panyaya iyoyi nezvakanga zvavawira;" 
Esther9:27 vaJudha vakazviisira murao, ivo pachavo navana vavo nevose vakanga vabatana navo wokuti: vaifanira kuzochengeta mazuva maviri iwaya gore negore pasina zvokumborega kuachengeta, vachiachengeta somunyorerwo wazvakaitwa uyewo panguva yacho yakatemwa;" 
Esther9:28 uye kuti mazuva iwaya, mazuva anofanira kurangarirwa nokuchengetwa muchizvarwa choga choga mhuri nemhuri, nyika nenyika, guta neguta; uyewo kuti mazuva iwaya ePurimu haafanire kudarikwa pakati pevaJudha kunyange kuti zvokurangarira mazuva iwaya zvipere pakati pavana vavo." 
Esther9:29 Vahosi, Esita, mwanasikana waAbhihairi nomuJudha uya Modhekai, achishandisa ukuru hwose hwaaiva nahwo, akanyora achinyatsotsigira tsamba yechipiri iyi yezvePurimu." 
Esther9:30 Matsamba akazotumirwa kuvaJudha vose kunyika zana namakumi maviri dzine nomwe dzoumambo hwaAhasuerusi dziine shoko rorugare nechokwadi 
Esther9:31 rokuti: mazuva iwaya ePurimu anofanira kuchengetwa panguva yawo yakatemwa sokutemerwa kwakanga kwaitwa vaJudha vatemerwa nomuJudha uya Modhekai, navahosi Esita, uyewo sokuzvimisira murao kwavakanga vaita ivo pachavo navana vavo panyaya dzokutsanya nokuungudza kwavo." 
Esther9:32 Chirevo ichi chavahosi vamambo Esita chakasimbisa nyaya idzodzi dzezvePurimu zvikatonyorwawo mubhuku. 
Esther10:1 Mambo Ahasuerusi aiteresa mutero nyika iyoyo nenyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa. 
Esther10:2 Noukuru hwake nesimba raaiva naro, mabasa ose aakaita nenhoroondo chaiyo izere yokududza pachena ukuru ukuru hwaModhekai hwaakapiwa naiye mambo zvakanyorwa wani muBhuku reNhoroondo dzeMadzimambo ePezhiya neeMidhia." 
Esther10:3 Ndokusaka muJudha uyu Modhekai aiva mutevedzeri wamambo Ahasuerusi pachigaro. Akanga ari mukuru mukuru chaiye pakati pevaJudha ari munhu aizikanwa noruzhinji rwehama dzake, pamusana pokuti aida kuti zvinakire hama dzake; akanga ari munhu wokutaura zvorugare kuvanhu vorudzi rwake." 
Job1:1 Kwaiva nomumwe murume munyika yeUzi ainzi Jobhu. Murume iyeyo aiva munhu akarurama, ari pachokwadi, aitya Mwari uye munhu wainzvenga zvakaipa." 
Job1:2 Akabereka vana vakomana vanomwe uye vasikana vatatu," 
Job1:3 aiva nehwai zviuru zvinomwe, nengamera zviuru zvitatu nezvipani mazana mashanu amadhonza, namazana mashanu amadhongi makadzi navaranda vazhinji kwazvo, zvokuti aiva nomukurumbira kupinda vamwe vanhu vose vokumabvazuva." 
Job1:4 Vanakomana vaJobhu vaipota vachiita mabiko mumisha yavo, mumwe nomumwe aine chijanha chezuva rake. Vaindokokawo hanzvadzi dzavo nhatu kuti vadye nokunwa pamwechete navo." 
Job1:5 Paainge mazuva iwayo amabiko apera, Jobhu aitumira nhume yokuti vazomuchenura. Aifumomuka rungwanani-ngwanani achipira zvibayiro zvokupisa maererano nouwandu hwavo, nokuti Jobhu aiti vangadaro vanakomana vake vakatadzira Mwari vachimushonha mumwoyo yavo. Jobhu aiita saizvozvo nguva dzose." 
Job1:6 Zvino nerimwe zuva zvakazoitika kuti vana vaMwari vakauya kuzozviratidza pana Tenzi. Satani akauyawo ari mukati mavo. 
Job1:7 Tenzi akati kuna Satani, “Uri kubvepi?” Satani akapindura Tenzi achiti, “Ndanga ndichingodzengerera zvangu nenyika ndichifamba-famba mairi.”" 
Job1:8 Tenzi akati kuna Satani, “Wati wambofungisisa here nezvomuranda wangu Jobhu kuti hakuna akafanana naye panyika. Munhu akarurama, ari pachokwadi anotya Mwari uye anonzvenga uipi.”" 
Job1:9 Satani akapindura Tenzi achiti, “Iye Jobhu anotya Mwari mahara here?" 
Job1:10 Handiti makamutenderedza norumhanda iye nemba yake uye zvose zvaanazvo kumativi ose? Makakomborera basa raanoita namaoko ake. Makaita kuti zvinhu zvake zviwande panyika. 
Job1:11 Ingotambanudzai ruoko rwenyu mungobata chete zvose zvaanazvo muone kuti haakushonhei here pameso penyu chaipo” 
Job1:12 Tenzi akati kuna Satani, “Zvakanaka, zvose zvaanazvo zvava mumaoko mako, asi iye pachake usambomubatabata zvako.” Saizvozvo Satani akabva abva zvake panaMwari." 
Job1:13 Rimwe zuva zvakaitika kuti vanakomana navanasikana vake vakanga vari pakudya zvavo nokunwa waini mumba yomukomana wavo mukuru," 
Job1:14 kwakauya nhume kuna Jobhu ichiti, “Nzombe dzanga dzichirima, madhongi achifura zvawo pedyo nadzo." 
Job1:15 VaSebhiya vauya vakazvitora vakauraya vashandi namapakatwa, ini ndoga ndini ndapunyuka kuzokutaurirai.”" 
Job1:16 Achiri kutaura kudaro, kwakasvika mumwe achitiwo, “Moto waMwari waburuka kudenga ukapisa hwai navashandi ukavaroromesa. Ini ndoga ndini ndapunyuka kuzokutaurirai.”" 
Job1:17 Achiri kutaurawo kudaro, kwakauyazve mumwe achiti, “VaKaradhiya vaita mapoka matatu ndokubva vaita chivhundumukira pangamera vakaenda nadzo. Vauraya vashandi namapakatwa. Ini ndoga ndini ndangopunyuka kuzokutaurirai.”" 
Job1:18 Achiri mukutaura mumwezve ndiye vhu, akati, “Vana venyu vanga vachidya nokunwa zvavo waini mumba yomukoma wavo mukuru." 
Job1:19 Kwabva dutu guru ravhuvhuta nokugwenga rikarova imba iyoyo kumativi mana ikakoromokera pavadiki ivava vakafa. Ini ndoga ndini ndapunyuka kuzokutaurirai.” 
Job1:20 Ipapo Jobhu akasimuka akabvarura gemenzi rake. Akaveura musoro wake ndokuti pasi zvambarara achinamata. 
Job1:21 Akati: “Ndakabuda mudumbu ramai vangu ndisina chandakapfeka ndichadzokerazve ndisina chandakapfeka; Tenzi ndiye akapa; Tenzi ndiye atora. Zita raTenzi ngarirumbidzwe.” 
Job1:22 Munaizvozvi zvose Jobhu haana chaakakanganisa kana kupa Mwari mhosva. 
Job2:1 Nhanho yechipiri. Pakaitazve rimwe zuva rokuti vana vaMwari vakauya kuzozviratidza pana Tenzi. Satani akauyawo ari mukati mavo kuzozviratidza kunaTenzi. 
Job2:2 Tenzi akati kuna Satani, “Uri kubvepiko?” Satani akapindura Tenzi achiti, “Ndanga ndichidzengerera nenyika ndichifamba-famba zvangu mairi.”" 
Job2:3 Tenzi akati kuna Satani, “Wakazombofungisisa here nezvomuranda wangu Jobhu kuti hakuna akafanana naye panyika. Munhu akarurama, ari pachokwadi anotya Mwari uye anonzvenga uipi?” Munhu anoramba akasimba paururami kunyange wakandiitisa kuti ndimuparadze pasina chikonzero." 
Job2:4 Satani akapindura Tenzi achiti, “Ganda ngariitwe mutengano webveni neganda. Pane zvoupenyu, munhu anoripa nazvose zvaanazvo." 
Job2:5 Ingotambanudzai zvenyu ruoko rwenyu mubate bvupa rake kana nyama yake, anokutukai imi, muripo kudai.”" 
Job2:6 Tenzi akati kuna Satani, “Hoyoka ari mumaoko mako asi upenyu hwake huchengetedze.”" 
Job2:7 Naizvozvo Satani akabva abva pana Tenzi akandorarisa Jobhu namaronda akaipa kubvira mutsoka kusvika mumusoro make. 
Job2:8 Jobhu akatora chaenga chaaizvikwenya nacho achigara zvake kumadota. 
Job2:9 Mudzimai wake akamuti, “Mucharamba makangoomererana noururami hwenyu here? Dai matoshonha zvenyu Mwari mufe.”" 
Job2:10 Asi Jobhu akati kwaari, “Inga unotaura serimwe benzi ravakadzi. Saka tinofanira kungogamuchira zvakanaka chete kuna Mwari asi zvakaipa torega nhai?” Muna zvose izvozvi Jobhu hapana chaakataura nomuromo wake chaakatadzira nacho Mwari. Shamwari dzaJobhu." 
Job2:11 Zvino kuzoti shamwari nhatu dzaJobhu padzakanzwa nhamo dzose dzakanga dzawira Jobhu, dzakauya kwaari, imwe neimwe ichibva kunzvimbo yayo. Kwaiti Erifazi muTemani naBhiridhadhi muShuhi naZofa muNaamati. Vakanga vatenderana kuuya pamwechete kuzobata maoko Jobhu vachimunyaradza." 
Job2:12 Pavakaona Jobhu nokure havana kukwanisa kumuziva. Vakahwihwidza kuchema vachisvimha misodzi. Vakabva vabvarura magemenzi avo vakazvidira ivhu mumusoro vachiritiburirira kudenga. 
Job2:13 Vakagara pasi naye siku nesikati kwamazuva manomwe pasina aimbotaura naye izwi rimwechete zvaro nokuti vakaona kuti kurwadziwa kwake kwakanga kwakanyanya kwazvo. 
Job3:1 Mushure maizvozvo Jobhu akademba kuti dai zuva rake rokuberekwa risina kumbovepo. 
Job3:2 Jobhu akati: 
Job3:3 “Dai zuva randakaberekwa ratsakatika zvaro pamwe nousiku hwakanzi kwabatwa pamuviri mwana mukomana. 
Job3:4 Dai zuva iroro rangove zvaro zarima Mwari ari kumusoro dai arega zvake kuritsvaka uye dai chiedza charega kurivhenekera. 
Job3:5 Dai rangokwidibirwa nezarima uye nerima rakati kwirindindi sorufu. Dai rangonzi gude-gude negore rive rinotyisa nokusvipa kwaro. 
Job3:6 Usiku ihwohwo ngahunzi pute nezarima. Pamazuva egore ngarirege kuva zuva rorufaro; ngarirege kuva rimwe ramazuva egore, rirege kumbopinda zvaro mukuverengwa kwemwedzi." 
Job3:7 Ngahuve usiku husina mbereko hurege kumbonzwika mupururu wokufara. 
Job3:8 Vanorengerera rushambwa dai vangorirengerera, vanokwanisa kumutsa zigaranyanya." 
Job3:9 Nyenyedzi dzamambakwedza aro ngadzisvibe. Ngaritarisire chiedza asi risambochiwana rirege kumboona kana romoromo zvaro ramambakwedza 
Job3:10 nokuti harina kupfiga misuo yemimba yaamai vangu kana kuti meso angu asatarise nhamo. 
Job3:11 Ndakaregereiko kungofa zvangu pakuberekwa, ndichingoti budei mudumbu ndichibva ndangofa zvangu." 
Job3:12 Zvakamboitikireiko kuti ndive pamakumbo uye kuti avepo mazamu okuti ini ndiyamwe? 
Job3:13 Nokuti iye zvino ndingadai ndakarara zvangu muguva, ndinyerere ndiine zororo" 
Job3:14 pamwechete namadzimambo namakurukota enyika vakazvivakira matongo," 
Job3:15 kana kuti namachinda ane ndarama, akanga akazadza dzimba nesirivha." 
Job3:16 Ko ndakaregereiko chaizvo kungovawo zvangu gavamwedzi risingazivikanwi zvaro sesvava dzisina kumboona chiedza? 
Job3:17 Ikoko vaipi zvokutambudza zviya zvinopera; ikoko vanenge vaneta nebasa vanowana zororo. 
Job3:18 Ikoko vasungwa vanozorora pamwechete; zvokukararirwa nomushandisi webasa vanenge vasisazvinzwi. 
Job3:19 Vanhuwozvavo navakuru vakuru variko uye varanda vano rusununguko kuna vatenzi vavo. 
Job3:20 Ko chiedza chinopirweiko vari munhamo zvavo uye upenyu hunopirwei vari kushushikana mumwoyo? 
Job3:21 Vanosuwira rufu asi rufu rwusingauye, vanoruchera kupinda pfuma yakavandika," 
Job3:22 vanotopembera zvikuru nokufara kana vawana zvavo guva? 
Job3:23 Chiedza chinopirwei munhu apiwa chidzimira akaiswa naMwari parumananzombe. 
Job3:24 Mafemo angu ndiwo atokunda chokudya changu. Kugomera kwangu kunoteurirwa pasi semvura. 
Job3:25 Nokuti chandinotya chacho, ndicho chinondiwana; chandinozeza ndicho chinondiwira." 
Job3:26 Handina kugadzikana mwoyo uye handina runyararo mumwoyo mangu, ndisati ndambozorora nhamho yauya.”" 
Job4:1 Hurukuro dzokutanga. Erifasi muTemani akapindura achiti," 
Job4:2 “Kuri kuti munhu ataura nemi mungashatirwe nazvo here, asi ndiani angarege kutaura?" 
Job4:3 Inga makadzidzisa vazhinji mukasimbisa maoko asina simba. 
Job4:4 Mashoko enyu akatsigira ainge odzadzarika mukasimbisa mabvi akarukutika. 
Job4:5 Asi nhasi zvakuwanaiwo, zvino motadza kugadzikana. Asi zvino zvakubatai mabva mava kurasa mwoyo." 
Job4:6 Handiti kutya kwenyu Mwari ndiko kwamunovimba nako, kuva pachokwadi mumaitiro enyu kuri iko chitarisiro chenyu?" 
Job4:7 “Chimbozvifungaiwo zvenyu kuti ndiani aiva mururami akaparara uyewo ndokupi mururami kwaakaparadzwa? 
Job4:8 Zvandakaona zvangu ndezvokuti vanorima huipi nokudyara nhamo vachakohwawo zvimwechetezvo," 
Job4:9 vanoparadzwa nefemo raMwari vachatsakatiswa nomweya wehasha dzake. 
Job4:10 Kuomba kweshumba kwapera, nenzwi rinotyisa remhondoro. Mazino eshumba dzichiri kuzvinzwa akatyorwa." 
Job4:11 Gono reshumba riri kuparara nokushaya nyama vana veshumbahadzi vapararira. 
Job4:12 “Zvino pane shoko rakaunzwa kwandiri muchivande nzeve yangu yakanzwa zevezeve raro. 
Job4:13 Pfungwa yechiroto chinotyisa vanhu paye patinobatwa chaizvo nehope. 
Job4:14 Ndakawirwa nokutya kukuru uye ndakadedera zvakaita kuti mapfupa angu angwedereke. 
Job4:15 Mhepo yakati fefefe napandiri mvere dzomuviri wangu dzikamira kuti twi. 
Job4:16 Pakamira chimwe chinhu chandisina kuona mamiriro acho chakamboti mirei pamberi pangu ndokuti ziro-o ndokuzonzwa izwi richiti. 
Job4:17 “Ko iye munhu zvake anofa angava munhu akarurama here pamberi paMwari? Munhu angave mutsvene here pamberi pomusiki wake? 
Job4:18 Haavimbi kunyange nevaranda vake kunyange vatumwa anovabata nemhosva. 
Job4:19 Ko kutozotiwo zvavo vanogara mudzimba dzevhu dzine ugaro hwadzo muvhu vanofa sebetebeswa. 
Job4:20 Pakati pamangwanani namanheru vanoparadzwa, vanotsakatika pasina anombozviona." 
Job4:21 Kunyange tambo yakatumba kavo yavhomorwa vanofa vasina kana ungwaru.” 
Job5:1 Chidanidziraka tione kana pane achakupindura ipapa ndiani pakati pavatsvene wauchazemberana naye? 
Job5:2 Kuzvidya mwoyo kunouraya munhu kuya, kushatirwa kunouraya marema." 
Job5:3 Ndakamboona ini benzi richidzika midzi. Pakarepo ndakati nzvimbo yake iwirwe norushambwa. 
Job5:4 Zvokugarika kwavana vake hapana, padare mhosva ndeyavo chete, wokuvamiririra panenge pasina." 
Job5:5 Zvaanokohwa zvichadyiwa zvazvo navane nzara vachizvitora kunyange mukati meminzwa, vane nyota vachitozvitsvira mwoyo." 
Job5:6 Uipi haumeri pavhu nhamo hainyuki pasi. 
Job5:7 Munhu ndiye anotozviparira, sezvinoita shiri ndidzo dzinotobhururuka mudenga." 
Job5:8 Kana ndirini changu kutsvaka Mwari zvose zvinondinetsa ndozviturira kuna Mwari. 
Job5:9 Anoita zvinhu zvikuru zvisingabatiki zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvisingaverengeki. 
Job5:10 Anonaisa mvura panyika anotuma mvura paminda. 
Job5:11 Anosumudzira pamusoro vanozvidukupisa vanochema anovasimudzira mwoyo norufaro 
Job5:12 anokangaidza mazano avane ujarijari kuti zvavanobata zvisabudirire. 
Job5:13 Anobata vakachenjera muujarijari hwavo, zvirongwa zvavanyengedzi hazvitani kushaiswa basa." 
Job5:14 Vanosangana naro rima zuva rakacheka nyika, vagoputaira masikati machena sokunge usiku." 
Job5:15 Asi anonunura varombo pamiromo yavo navasina chavanacho mumaoko avane simba. 
Job5:16 Nokudaro varombo vanowana chitarisiro vezvekushaisa vanhu ruenzaniso vachimbopfumbirawo muromo. 
Job5:17 Zvake munhu anotsiurwa naMwari saka usazvidze shamhu yaSamasimba. 
Job5:18 Anoruma achifuridzira, anokuvadza zvake asi maoko ake anorapa." 
Job5:19 Achakununura kunhamo runosvika rutanhatu rwose kechinomwe aka hapana nyatwa inozokubatabata. 
Job5:20 Panguva yenzara achakununura kurufu panguva yehondo achakununura kusimba rebakatwa. 
Job5:21 Achakuvanza kunhamo yavanotuka nomuromo. Hauchazotya kuparadza kana kwauya. 
Job5:22 Zvokuparadza nenzara uchazviseka zvikara zvenyika hauzombozvitya. 
Job5:23 Nokuti unenge une usahwira nematombo uye uchinzwanana nezvikara zvesango 
Job5:24 uchaziva kuti patendhe pako hapana njodzi, uchaongorora danga rako ugoona kuti hapana chisipo." 
Job5:25 Uchazvionawo kuti zvizvarwa zvako zvichawanda zvizukuru zvigoita souswa hwenyika. 
Job5:26 Uchasvika kuguva kwako wanyatsokwegura zvako. Sezvinoita tsanga yechisote chembesanwa inouya pokupurira panguva yayo. 
Job5:27 Vedu wee izvi takazvitsvaka, ndezvechokwadi. Teererai muzvizive kuti zvinokubatsirai." 
Job6:1 Jobhu akapindura achiti," 
Job6:2 “Dai kuungudzika kwangu kwaierwa! Dai nyatwa yangu yose yaiiswa muzviero. 
Job6:3 Yaitorema kupinda jecha regungwa. Pamwe ndokusaka mazwi angu arasikawo gwara. 
Job6:4 Miseve yaSamasimba yakabairira mandiri mweya wangu unonwa chepfu yawo. Kutyisa kwaMwari kwanangana neni. 
Job6:5 Mbizi kana ine uswa inokuma here? Mombe inokuma here yakatarisa uswa? 
Job6:6 Chinhu chisinganake chingadyike here chisina munyu? Ko chichena chezai chinonzwika kunaka here? 
Job6:7 Ndozvine kudya kuri mukanwa mangu kudya kunondisemesa. 
Job6:8 Dai zvangu ndaingowana zvandinokumbira. Dai Mwari aingondipawo zvandinosuwira. 
Job6:9 Dai zvaibvira kuti Mwari andiparadze. Andirove zvake andipedzisise zvake. 
Job6:10 Izvi ndizvo zvaitondinyaradza ndaitopembera kufara mukurwadziwa kusina tsitsi nokuti handina kuramba ini mashoko aiye mutsvene. 
Job6:11 Iro simba rangu nderipi zvaro zvokuti ndivi nomwoyo murefu? Iwo mugumo wangu chiiwo zvawo kuti ndiuitire mwoyo murefu kudaro? 
Job6:12 Iro simba rangu rakafanana nesimba ramatombo here? Kana kuti nyama yangu yakaita sendarira here? 
Job6:13 Chokwadi mandiri hamuna chimuko, kana chokubata chaicho hapana." 
Job6:14 Munhu anorega kunzwira tsitsi kushamwari yava kurasa mwoyo anofuratira kutya Mwari. 
Job6:15 Hama dzangu dzakandinyengedza samapopopo dzakaita somunoerera nemvura munozooma. 
Job6:16 Pasi perwizi panosvibira nemvura yakadzika inobva kuchando rwakafukidzwa namapopo emvura inobva kuchando chinonyungudika. 
Job6:17 Panguva yamadziya inonyangarika. Kana kwapisa chinonyangarika panzvimbo pawo ipapo. 
Job6:18 Dungwerungwe revenzendo rinotsaukira mvura, rinotetereka naro gwenga richitsakatika." 
Job6:19 Dungwerungwe revenzendo revokuTemani rinoitsvaka. Nedungwerungwe renzendo revokuShebha ndipowo pavanenge vakaisa mwoyo. 
Job6:20 Vanorwadziwa mwoyo nezvavanenge vakatarisira vanosvika vobva vangosvipa mwoyo. Mazwi akaomarara aJobhu. 
Job6:21 “Ndizvo zvamave kwandiri maona kutambura kwangu mukabva matya. 
Job6:22 Ndamboti ndipei chinhu here ini kana kuti mundiripire pfumbamuromo," 
Job6:23 kana kuti mundinunure mumaoko omuvengi kana kuti mumaoko avanondidzvinyirira? 
Job6:24 Dai muchitondidzidzisa ndainyarara zvangu muchindiratidzaka pandakakanganisa. 
Job6:25 Harisi simba iroro rina mazwi ari pachokwadi, zvino iko kutsiura kwenyu uku kunotsiureiko?" 
Job6:26 Munongoda zvokukakavara namashoko chete nhai muchitora mazwi okurasa mwoyo sechinhu pasina? 
Job6:27 Inga mungatoitira nherera chin'ange imi muchitoitirana nharo dzomutengo, kutengesa shamwari." 
Job6:28 “Zvino chimbonyatsonditarisai muone, ndiri munhu here ini angareva nhema pamberi penyu?" 
Job6:29 Sandukai musiyane nezvisiri izvo. Chitosandukai zvenyu nokuti hunhu hwangu hwavakuita sechinhu pasina. 
Job6:30 Pane zvandakanganisa here mukutaura kwangu? Imo mukanwa mangu mungatadze here kunzwa kuti izvi zvinhu zvinonaka?” 
Job7:1 Mazuva omunhu panyika haasi mazuva okushanda zvakaomarara here? Mazuva ake haana kuita here samazuva omushandi? 
Job7:2 Senhapwa inosuwira mumvuri, uye somushandi anosuwira mubayiro?" 
Job7:3 Saizvozvo ndakatemerwa mwedzi yandisina chokuita nousiku hwokungotambura ndihwo hwandakapiwa. 
Job7:4 Ndikarara pasi, ndinenge ndichingoti ndichamuka rinhi? Asi usiku hwakareba ndinongoshanyarika kusvikira kwoedza." 
Job7:5 Muviri wangu unongova honye dzoga uye tsvina, ganda rangu rinongoti kakata kuoma pedzepo urwa puti." 
Job7:6 Mazuva angu anenge chivhimbo chomuruki kumhanya anopera pasina chitarisiro. 
Job7:7 Yeukai kuti upenyu hwangu hwakaita sefemo. Ziso rangu, zvakanaka, harichazombozvioni." 
Job7:8 Ziso riri kundiona, harichazondionizve, muchanditarisa asi ndichange ndisisipo." 
Job7:9 Sokumwararika kunoita gore richinyangarika, munhuwo anoenda kunzvimbo yavafi haadzokeko." 
Job7:10 Haadzoke kumba kwake nzvimbo yake haizombomuzivazve. 
Job7:11 Naizvozvo handimborega kutaura ndichangotaura chete mukushungurudzika mwoyo kwangu ikoko. Ndichanyunyuta mukurwadziwa mwoyo kwangu. 
Job7:12 Ko ndava gungwa here ini kana kuti zigaranyanya romugungwa zvomondiisira vokundigaririra kudai? 
Job7:13 Pandinenge ndoti aiwa mubhedha wangu wombondipawo kakuzorora, sofa rangu rimboyerura kugurukuta kwangu," 
Job7:14 ndipo pamunotondityisidzira muhope muchindivhundutsa nezviratidzo 
Job7:15 zvokuti ndinosarudza kudzipwa zvangu kana kufa pane kuva nomuviri wangu uyu. 
Job7:16 Ndavakutovenga upenyu hwangu; zvokugara nokusingaperi handichadi. Siyanai neni, nokuti mazuva angu akangoita sefemo." 
Job7:17 Munhu chiiwo zvake zvamunotomusimudzira pamusoro kudaro, munhu zvake zvamunotomufungawo kudaro," 
Job7:18 zvamunomushanyira mangwanani oga oga muchimuedza nguva iri yose? 
Job7:19 Uko kundiringisa mucharegawo rinhi? Kana kumbondipawo kanguva kokumedza mate? 
Job7:20 Kana ndikapara zvangu chitadzo chachinokuitai chii chaizvo, nhai imi mutarisi wavanhu? Ko maramba mangoti neni nangananga sei? Nemhaka yei ndave mutoro kwamuri?" 
Job7:21 Munorega nei kundiregererawo chitadzo changu muchindibvisirawo uipi hwangu? Nokuti pari zvino ndicharara muvhu muchanditsvaka asi ndinenge ndisisiri chinhu. 
Job8:1 Mhinduro yaBhiridhadhi. Ndipo pakazopindurawo Bhiridhadhi muShuhi achiti," 
Job8:2 “Ucharamba uchitaura uchidai kusvikira riniko, mashoko ako achinge dutu remhepo kudaro?" 
Job8:3 Mwari angaite zvisina ruenzaniso here? Samasimba angaite zvisina kururama here? 
Job8:4 Kana vana vako vakamutadzira akavaisaka mujambwa rokutadza kwavo. 
Job8:5 Ukatsvaka Mwari uchinamata kuna iye Samasimba," 
Job8:6 kana uri mutsvene wakarurama, anotokusimukira achikupa mubayiro wopokugara pakanaka." 
Job8:7 Kutangisa kwako kungave kuduku zvako asi kumagumo kwazvo zvichava zvikuru. 
Job8:8 “Chimbobvunzawo zvako zvizvarwa zvakapfuura, umborangarira zvakaonekwa namadzibaba." 
Job8:9 Nokuti isu tiri vazuroka isu, zvatinoziva hapana nokuti mazuva edu panyika akangofanana nomumvuri." 
Job8:10 Havangakudzidzise here vachitaura mazwi anobva mukunzwisisa kwavo? 
Job8:11 Idzo nhokwe dzingakure nhai pasina machakwi, tsanga dzingaite zararira here pasina mvura?" 
Job8:12 Zvichina maruva hazvo uye zvisina kuchekwa zvinotangira zvimwe zvinomera kuuna. 
Job8:13 Ndiro gwara ravose vanokanganwa Mwari chitarisiro chaasiri munamati chinoparara. 
Job8:14 Chivimbo chake chinoita chimwandamwanda, chaanovimba nacho imba zvayo yebuwe." 
Job8:15 Anozendama paimba yake iyoyo asi kumira haimiri, anoti mbunde nayo asi haimiri." 
Job8:16 Muzuva anokasira kwazvo kukura achipasa kwazvo nhungiro mubindu rake rose. 
Job8:17 Midzi yake inomonererana namatombo kusvika paruware. 
Job8:18 Anogara pakati pamabwe kungodzurwa chete panzvimbo pake panoti hatimbokuziva 
Job8:19 Ndirwo chete rufarowo rwaanowana dzimwe dzinokura panyika dzotora nzvimbo yake. 
Job8:20 “Chinzwa, Mwari haarasi munhu asina mhosva. Iye haaitiwo ushamwari navanoita zvakaipa." 
Job8:21 Achakupa tsetswa zvokutoseka zvako. Nomuromo wako uchiita chikwee kuseka. 
Job8:22 Vanokuvenga vachazara nenyadzi. Tende ravaipi panenge pasisina.” 
Job9:1 Mhosva dzomunhu kuna Mwari. Zvino Jobhu akazopindurawo achiti: 
Job9:2 “Ichokwadi ndinoziva kuti ndizvo, ko munhu angazviti akarurama sei pamberi paMwari?" 
Job9:3 Dai kuri kuti munhu anoda kukakavadzana naMwari munhu haimbokwanisa kumupindura muchuru chamazana chezvinoda kutaurwa. 
Job9:4 Mwari anoungwaru mumwoyo make ane simba guru guru. Ndiani angamirisana naye akabudirira? 
Job9:5 Iye Mwari anosudurutsa makomo, iwo asingambozviziva, paanoakudubura nehasha." 
Job9:6 Iye anondengendengesa nyika achiibvisa panzvimbo payo, misimboti yayo ichizunguzika." 
Job9:7 Anotaurira zuva kuti rirege kubuda iro richitorega kubuda nyenyedzi achidzikwidibira. 
Job9:8 “Ndiye chete akatatamura denga achitsokodzera masaisai egungwa. 
Job9:9 Ndiye akasika nyenyedzi idzi dzinoti, hweva, nechinyamutatu, nechinyamutanhatu nenyenyedzi dzokuMaodzanyemba." 
Job9:10 Anoita zvinhu zvikuru zvisingabatiki zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvisingaverengeki. 
Job9:11 Tarisai muone anondipfuura napapa asi handimuoni anouya napandiri asi handizvioni. 
Job9:12 Hamuone kuti anogona kubvuta asi angamurambidze hapana. Ndiani angamuti chii chauri kuita? 
Job9:13 Mwari haachadzoka pahasha dzake kunyange vabatsiri vaRahabhu vakatokotama pasi pake. 
Job9:14 “Zvino iniwo zvangu ndingamupindurewo ndichiti kudii, ndopandingasarudzawo here ini mazwi okukakavadzana naye?" 
Job9:15 Kunyange ndisina mhosva handikwanisi kumupindura. Ndinotofanira kuteterera kuitirwa tsitsi naiye anondipa mhosva. 
Job9:16 Kunyange zvangu ndikamudaidza akadavira handifunge kuti anomboteerera zvandinotaura. 
Job9:17 Anotondipwanya-pwanya nedutu remhepo anotondivirikidza maronda pasina chikonzero. 
Job9:18 Haambondipa nguva yokutura mafemo asi anotondizadza neshungu dzinorwadza. 
Job9:19 Kana kuri kumumanikidza, ungamanikidze Mwari here? Kana kuri kukwira dare, ungakwidze Mwari dare here?" 
Job9:20 “Kunyange ndakarurama muromo wangu pachangu unondipa mhosva. Kunyange ndisina mhosva anondibata nemhosva. 
Job9:21 Handina zvangu mhosva asi handichisina hanya nezvandiri ndava kutosema upenyu hwangu. 
Job9:22 Naizvozvo chimwechete chandinotaura ndechokuti anoparadza vasina mhosva navaipi. 
Job9:23 Kana nyatwa ikayerekana yauraya munhu anotoseka zvake jambwa romunhu wakanaka. 
Job9:24 Nyika yakaiswa mumaoko avaipi, Mwari akazarira maziso avatongi vayo kana asiri iye anoita izvozvi ndiani ari kuzviita?" 
Job9:25 “Mazuva angu anomhanya kupinda mumhanyi anomhanya zvikuru, anotiza pasinawo chakanaka chaanoona." 
Job9:26 Anoyerera zvawo sehwato hwetsanga segondo ravakundohatura nyama yaro. 
Job9:27 Ndikati regai ndichikanganwa zvangu kunyunyuta kwangu ndisiyane nokuva nouso hwakati surududu ndive ndinonyemwerera," 
Job9:28 ndinongoramba ndichitya nhamo dzangu dzose. Ndinoziva kuti hamumbonditi ndiri munhu wakanaka. 
Job9:29 Ndiri munhu anonzi ane mhosva chandinotamburira zvisina maturo chii zvangu? 
Job9:30 “Kana ndikashamba zvangu nemazaya echando akanyungudika, kana ndikashamba maoko angu nesoda," 
Job9:31 munotondikanda mundove ndigosemwa nembatya dzangu. 
Job9:32 Nokuti Mwari haasi munhu seni wandingagonewo zvangu kupindura zvokuti ndingamirisanewo naye mudare. 
Job9:33 Hapana angatienzanisire nyaya yedu anogona kubata-bata kumativi ose. 
Job9:34 Ngaarege kuti mubadha wake uve pandiri, kumutya zvikuru ngakurege kundisokosa," 
Job9:35 ipapo ndingataure ndisingamutyi nokuti ndinoziva kuti hazvisizvo zvandiri.” 
Job10:1 Zvoupenyu handichazvida ndichataura kunyunyuta kwangu ndakasununguka. Ndichitaura zvinobva mukurwadziwa kwangu mwoyo. 
Job10:2 Ndichataurira Mwari kuti, “Regai kundipa mhosva ndizivisei mhosva yamunayo neni." 
Job10:3 Zvakanaka nhai kwamuri kudzvanyirira nokushora chisikwa chamakaita namaoko enyu muchifarira urongwa hwavakaipa? 
Job10:4 Muna maziso avanhu here enyama? Munoona sokuona kunoita vanhu here? 
Job10:5 Mazuva enyu akangoita here samazuva avanhu, kana kuti makore enyu akangoita samakore avanhu," 
Job10:6 zvamunototsvaka kudai uipi hwangu muchivhima kwazvo chitadzo changu 
Job10:7 imi muchiziva zvenyu kuti ini handina mhosva uye kuti wokundinunura mumaoko enyu ipapa hapana? 
Job10:8 “Imi namaoko enyu ndimi makandiumba imi, mukandisika asi zvino mavakusandukazve muchindiparadza." 
Job10:9 Yeukai kuti imi makandiumba semunyakwe zvino mondidzorera kuhuruva zvakare here? 
Job10:10 Hamuna here kundidurura somukaka mukandikodzeka somukaka wakakora? 
Job10:11 Inga makandipfekedza wani neganda nenyama mukandibatanidza mapfupa namarunda. 
Job10:12 Nomwoyochena wenyu makandipa upenyu, mukunditarira kwenyu makandichengetedza upenyu hwangu." 
Job10:13 “Asi zvinhu izvi makazvipfundirira mumwoyo menyu. Ndinozviziva kuti ndochaiva chinangwa chenyu 
Job10:14 chokuti kana ndapara chitadzo, imi mobva manyatsozviongorora; pachitadzo changu ichocho musingandipembedzi." 
Job10:15 Dai kuri kuti ndakashata, nhamo ineni kana dai kuri kuti ndakarurama, handipasimudze musoro nokuti ndizere nenyadzi uye ndakati tindindi mukurwadziwa kwangu."
