Job10:16 Ndikada kuti ndipasimuke munondivhima seshumba, ndipo pamunotoratidza masimba enyu anotyisa." 
Job10:17 Ndipo pamunotounza zvapupu zvitsva muchipamhidzira kushatirwa kwenyu hondo dzenyu ndipo padzinotovirikana samasaisai kuteverana. 
Job10:18 “Chamakandiburitsira mudumbu chii chaizvo? Dai ndakafa zvangu pasina ziso rakandiona," 
Job10:19 ndakaita zvangu somunhu asina kumbovapo ndakatakurwa kubva munhumbu ndichiendwa neni kuguva. 
Job10:20 Iwo mazuva angu haasi mashomanana here? Ko munoregereiko kumbobvisawo ziso renyu pandiri ndimbotiwo faranukei zvangu 
Job10:21 ndisati ndaenda kunzvimbo isingadzokwi, kunyika yenhamo nerima guru," 
Job10:22 nyika yenhamo nenyonganyonga, chiedza choko irima zvaro.”" 
Job11:1 Zofa muNaamati akazotaurawo achiti," 
Job11:2 “Iwo mashoko akawanda kudai haafaniri kupindurwa here? Iko kutaurisa kunoreva kuti munhu akarurama nhai? 
Job11:3 Iko kubvotomoka kwako uku kunofanira kuita kuti vanhu vanyarare nhai? Kana ukataura marara poshaya wokukutsiura here? 
Job11:4 Nokuti iwe unoti chidzidziso chako ndicho chechokwadi; woti saka ndakachena panaMwari. 
Job11:5 Dai waro Mwari akambotaura, ambozarura muromo achitaura kwauri." 
Job11:6 Ambokunyevera zvakavandika zvoungwaru hwake hunoshaisa vangwaru mazano. Ndopaungaone kuti Mwari arikutokukanganwira zvimwe zvakaipa zvako. 
Job11:7 “Ungakwanise here kuera udzamu hwaMwari? Ungakwanise here kusvika kumuganhu waSamasimba? 
Job11:8 Ko zvino zvahunopfuura matenga ungazvigone here iwe? Zvahwakadzika kupinda nzvimbo yavafi ungazivei? 
Job11:9 Hwakareba kupinda nyika wakapamhama kupfuura gungwa. 
Job11:10 Kana akakuvinga, akakusunga akakukwidza dare angamudzivise ndiani?" 
Job11:11 Vakaipa anovaziva zvakaipa zvavanoita anozviona achitonyatsozvicherechedza. 
Job11:12 Benzi romunhu ringatozonzwisisa kana mbizi yabereka munhu. 
Job11:13 “Dai kuri kuti unogadziridza hana yako ugosimudzira maoko ako kwaari," 
Job11:14 dai ukakanda pasi kure uipi hwaunaho uchirega kuita ukama nechakaipa; 
Job11:15 pakadaro, kana kusimudza musoro ungasimudze pasisina mhosva, wasimba uye usisatyi." 
Job11:16 Ungatombokanganwa nhamo, uchitodziyeuka semvura yakayerera." 
Job11:17 Upenyu hwako hunopenya kupinda masikati; rima rahwo, richiita samambakwedza." 
Job11:18 Uchava nechivimbo nokuti unenge une chitarisiro, unenge wakanyatsodzika midzi wonyatsozorora wakagadzana mwoyo." 
Job11:19 Kana worara unonorara zvakanaka pasina anokutyisidzira vazhinji vachatsvaka ushamwari newe. 
Job11:20 Maziso avakaipa acharezuka, vasina pokupunyuka napo, chavanenge vongoda kufema femo ravo rokupedzisira.”" 
Job12:1 Mhinduro yaJobhu kuna Zofa. Jobhu akapindurawo achiti," 
Job12:2 “Ichokwadi kuti imika ndimi vanhu uye kuti pamunongofa, ungwaru ndipowo pahunobva hwatoparara." 
Job12:3 Asi ndine njerewo sezvamakangoitawo imi. Ini handisi pasi kwamuri. Asingazivi zvinhu zvakadai ndiani? 
Job12:4 Ndiri chiseko zvacho chenyika kushamwari dzangu ini ndaidanidzira kuna Mwari, iye akatondipindura. Iyeni mururami, munhu ari pachokwadi ndini ndava chiseko zvacho chenyika." 
Job12:5 Kuna vagere zvavo zvakanaka, vanotambura vaya, varombo zvawo vanoshoreka. Anodzadzarika vanototi ngaasandidzirwe." 
Job12:6 Asi matendhe amakororo akagarika, vanoshatirisa Mwari hapana chinovawana vanotoita Mwari wokusevenzesa zvavo." 
Job12:7 “Pamwe ungade zvako kubvunza mhuka dzinotokudzidzisa kana kuti shiri dzedenga dzingatokutaurira," 
Job12:8 kana kuti utaure nezvinomera panyika zvichakufundisa, kana kuti hove dzegungwa dzichakutsanangurira." 
Job12:9 Chii pakati pazvo chisingazivi kuti ndiye Tenzi akazvisika? 
Job12:10 Upenyu hwechinhu chose chinofema huri mumaoko ake uye upenyu hwavanhu vose. 
Job12:11 Handiti nzeve inogona kusianisa mazwi here sezvinongoitawo mukanwa munogona kusianisa chokudya nechokudya? 
Job12:12 Ungwaru huri muna vakura kunzwisisa kunouya nokuendadzana kwenguva. 
Job12:13 “Asi Mwari ndiye ano ungwaru nesimba ana mazano nokunzwisisa. 
Job12:14 Akapaza, hapana angavake akazaririra munhu, hapana angazarure." 
Job12:15 Akamisa mvura, kunooma, akaituma inoita murove." 
Job12:16 Iye ane simba noungwaru, vanonyengedzwa navanyengedzi vacho vose ndevake." 
Job12:17 Anotorera makurukota ungwaru hwavo, vatongi achivapazanisa musoro." 
Job12:18 Anosunungura zvakasungwa namadzimambo achivasunga netambo muchiuno. 
Job12:19 Anotorera vapristi ungwaru, vakuru vakuru achivabvisa pazvigaro." 
Job12:20 Anotorera mazano vanovimbwa navo, vakuru vakuru achivatorera kunyatsoona zvinhu nemazvo." 
Job12:21 Anonyadzisa machinda, vana masimba anovatorera ukuru hwavo." 
Job12:22 Anoburitsa pachena zvakavandika zviri murima achiita kuti rima riti ngwee nechiedza. 
Job12:23 Anosimudzira marudzi avanhu pamusoro achiaparadzazve, anokudzakudza marudzi oamwararisa." 
Job12:24 Anopazamisa musoro madzimambo avanhu venyika, achivadzungaidza murenje risina nzira." 
Job12:25 Vanoputaira murima vasina mwenje, achivaita kuti vadzadzarike somunhu araradza.”" 
Job13:1 Mwari neshamwari handivaonerwi pavo. Ndakazviona ini nameso angu, ndakazvinzwa nenzeve dzangu ndikazvinzwisisa." 
Job13:2 Ndinenjerewo sezvamakangoita imi. Ini handisi pasi kwamuri. 
Job13:3 Chandingade ini, kutaura naiye Samasimba, chandinoda ini, kuzvidavirira mhosva yangu pana Mwari." 
Job13:4 Asi imi muri vokubata vanhu kumeso nenhema, mose murivarapi vasina maturo." 
Job13:5 Dai maitonyarara zvenyu, hwaitova ungwaru chaihwo kwamuri." 
Job13:6 Chinzwai zvino zvandinofunga muteerere mumbonzwawo zvandinokutaurirai nomuromo wangu. 
Job13:7 Munoda kutaura muchimiririra Mwari nemanyepo nhai, muchimumiririra nounyengedzi?" 
Job13:8 Mavakutoita zvechizivano naye nhai, ndimi mava kureverera Mwari pamhosva yakeka imi?" 
Job13:9 Munomira papi, imi, akada zvake kunyatsokuvhurumutsai?" 
Job13:10 Anotokutsiurai kana mukaratidza rusarura rwamunoita muchivande. 
Job13:11 Ukuru hwake haungakutyisei here? Kutyisa kwake hakungakudederesei here? 
Job13:12 Zvirevo zvenyu marara zvawo. Mazwi enyu okuzvidzivirira munyakwe zvawo. 
Job13:13 Chimbonyararai ndimbotaurawo. Kwandiri, chauya chauya." 
Job13:14 Ndavakutorovera mwoyo kudombo, ndichitobatira ura hwangu mumaoko." 
Job13:15 Kufa kufa zvako hapana chokuita. Ndichatongozvimiririra mhosva yangu pamberi pake. 
Job13:16 Izvozvi ndizvo zvichandinunura nokuti munhu asiri munamati haangaiti chivindi chokuenda pana Mwari. 
Job13:17 Chinzwai munzwisise mazwi angu muteererese zvandavakukutaurirai; 
Job13:18 chionai kuti ini ndanyatsogadzirira nyaya yangu ndinozviziva kuti ndichapembedzwa. 
Job13:19 Ndianiwo zvake angakwikwidzane neni, ini ndingatobva ndanyarara iye zvino ndife zvangu." 
Job13:20 Ingondibvumirai zvinhu zviviri chete handizohwanda-hwanda pamuri. 
Job13:21 Chimbobvisai shamhu yenyu pandiri uye kukutyai imi ngakurege kundidederesa. 
Job13:22 Pakadaro ndidaidzei, ini ndichapindura kana kuti regai nditange kutaura imi mundipindurewo." 
Job13:23 Zvakaipa zvangu zvingani uye zvitadzo zvangu zvingani? Ndiziviseiwo zvikanganiso zvangu nechitadzo changu. 
Job13:24 Munozvivanzireiko uso. Muchindiona somuvengi wenyu? 
Job13:25 Munoda kutyisidzira shizha riri kupupuruka here? Munoda kudzingirira hundi zvayo yakawoma here? 
Job13:26 Munonyora imi zvinorwadza pamusoro pangu muchiita kuti zvandakatadza ndichiri mudiki zvindipfukire. 
Job13:27 Mukandisunga makumbo nengetani munoongorora kwazvo mafambiro angu muchiti tsikanditsikewo muchiongorora pandatsika. 
Job13:28 Munhu anosakara sechinhu chavakuora semvemve rinodyiwa nezviundudzi. 
Job14:1 Munhu akaberekwa nomunhukadzi mazuva ake mashoma, uye azere nenhamo." 
Job14:2 Anoti bhabhanu seruva ozouna anomhanyamhanya somumvuri uye haagari. 
Job14:3 Chinhu chakadai ndicho chamungazarurirewo here maziso enyu kutarisa? Ndiye wamungakwirirana naye dare here? 
Job14:4 Ndiani angaburitse chinhu chitsvene mune chan'ora; hapana," 
Job14:5 sokuti mazuva ake akatotemwa kuwanda kwawo? Zviri kwamuri kuti mwedzi yake mingani. Imi ndimi makamuisira migano yaasingapfuuri. 
Job14:6 Chimbobvisai ziso renyu paari, murege ambopedzawo zuva rake murugare somushandi." 
Job14:7 Zvawo muti, une chitarisiro, ukatemwa unotungirazve. Madungirwa awo haashaiki." 
Job14:8 Kunyange mudzi wawo ukachembera muvhu dzinde rawo rikafa muvhu," 
Job14:9 asi kungonhuwidza mvura chete unotungira uchitoita mapazi somuti mudiki. 
Job14:10 Asi munhu anofa obva aparara achiva chinhu pasina anofema femo rake rokupedzisa; anozova papiwo pakadaro? 
Job14:11 Sezvinongoita mvura kukwenguka mudhamu rwizi rwunopwa rwooma," 
Job14:12 ndozvinoita munhu akaradzikwa haazombomuki kusvikira matenga aparara, haambomuki muhope dzake idzodzo." 
Job14:13 Dai mukangondivanza zvenyu munzvimbo yavafi, mundivige zvenyu imomo, kusvikira hasha dzenyu dzapera mugotema zvenyu nguva yokundiyeuka." 
Job14:14 Kana munhu akafa, angazova mupenyu zvakare here? Saka mazuva angu ose okushanda ndinenge ndomirira kusvikira nguva yangu yokusunungurwa yasvika." 
Job14:15 Ndipo pamunozondidaidza, ini ndodavirawo munengewo moda kuona chinhu chamakasika." 
Job14:16 Zvokuverenga nhanho nenhanho yangu mungadai musingaiti, zvokuramba mangoti nangananga nechitadzo changu morega." 
Job14:17 Maimbosungirira mhosva dzangu mutsapo uye uipi hwangu maimbohukwidibira. 
Job14:18 Asi sezvinongoita gomo kuti rinokoromoka richizoparara, sokugudumutswa kunoitwa dombo panzvimbo paro," 
Job14:19 sokudyiwa kunoitwa dombo richisvuurwa nemvura uye sokukukura ivhu kunoita mapopopo, ndiko kuparadza kwamunoita chitarisiro chomunhu." 
Job14:20 Munomukurira zvachose, ndokutoenda ikoko munomusandura uso, mobva mamupfuudza." 
Job14:21 Vana vake vakarumbidzwa, iye haambozvizivi, vakaninipiswa haazvioni." 
Job14:22 Chaanonzwa kurwadza ndochinenge chatomusvika pamuviri pake chake kuzvichema iye pachake. 
Job15:1 Erifasi muTemani ndopaakazopindurawo achiti: 
Job15:2 “Iye munhu woungwaru anofanira kuita mwando here pakupindura achitozviti shutu kudaro nemwando wokumabvazuva," 
Job15:3 achizvidzivirira namazwi asina chimuko namashoko asina maturo? 
Job15:4 Zvokuremekedza Mwari wavakuti ngazvipere uchitotadzisa anoda zvake kunamata Mwari. 
Job15:5 Uipi hwako ndihwo hunokutunza kuva napamuromo, uye unosarudza matauriro ohujarijari." 
Job15:6 Muromo wako ndiwo unokubatisa nemhosva kwete ini. Muromo wako ndiwo unopupura kuti une mhosva. 
Job15:7 “Ndiwe wokutanga kuberekwa here iwe? Wakatangira makomo kuzvarwa here? 
Job15:8 Zvinoreva here kuti wakamboteerera padare raMwari, iwe? Saka unoti ungwaru ndohwako iwe chete nhai?" 
Job15:9 Chaunoziva iwe chatisingazivi chii? Chaunonzwisisa chatisinganzwisisi isu chii? 
Job15:10 Vachena musoro navakwegura varimo mukati medu, vakuru kuna baba vako." 
Job15:11 Iwo mazwi aMwari okunyaradza aita madiki kwauri nhai, kanawo mazwi akapfava ari kutaurwa kwauri?" 
Job15:12 “Unoitirei manyawi kudai uchitoringaringa maziso kudaro," 
Job15:13 zvaunotovirukira Mwari nehasha kudaro uchingobvotomoka zvako kutaura? 
Job15:14 Munhu angave mutsvene sei chaizvo? Munhuwo zvake akaberekwa nomunhukadzi angave pachokwadi sei? 
Job15:15 Inga Mwari haavimbi navatsvene vake wani, Kunyange matenga chaiwo haana kuchena kwaari." 
Job15:16 Ko kutozotiwo zvake munhu akanyangara ane tsika dzakaora anonwa uipi semvura. 
Job15:17 Chiteerera unzwe ndikudziidzise ndichakutaurira zvandakaona," 
Job15:18 zvakataurwa navangwaru, zvisina kuvanzwa namadzibaba vavo," 
Job15:19 ivo voga vakapiwa nyika vakanga vasina mutorwa pakati pavo. 
Job15:20 Upenyu hwavakaipa inhamo yoga isingaperi, munhu anobata vamwe noutsinye makore aakapiwa ndookutoverenga." 
Job15:21 Inogara iri mhere chete munzeve dzake, akati agarike, yauya mharadzi." 
Job15:22 Haangambofunga kuti murima achamubuda. Asi chaanoziva ndechokuti chake chaatemerwa kuuraiwa nebakatwa 
Job15:23 ichiva nyama yamagora. Anoziva kuti zuva rokuparadzwa kwake rosvika. 
Job15:24 Kuzvidya mwoyo nokushungurudzika kunomurwisa, samambo aronganisa hondo kuti achirwa." 
Job15:25 Nokuti akasimudza ruoko rwake kurwisa Mwari akaita chivindi chokusaremekedza Samasimba. 
Job15:26 Anomhanya kwazvo akateya musoro nenhoo inorema," 
Job15:27 nokuti akafuta kumeso aine hutsakutsa dzezvidya. 
Job15:28 Nokuti agere mumaguta ava matongo, mudzimba dzisingafaniri kugarwa nomunhu mudzimba dzavakuda kuva matongo." 
Job15:29 Haambopfuma, uye upfumi hwake haugari kunyange mumvuri wake chaiwo hauzova panyika." 
Job15:30 Haazokwanisa kupunyuka rima, marimi omoto achaomesa mabukira ake maruva ake achapupurutswa nemhepo." 
Job15:31 Ngaarege kuvimba nezvisina maturo achizvinyengedza. Nokuti zvisina maturo ndizvo zvichava mubayiro wake. 
Job15:32 Achauna nguva yake isati yasvika, mapazi ake asati ambopfumvudza." 
Job15:33 Achazunzika magirepisi ake asina kuibva somugirepisi, achidonhedza maruva ake somuorivhi." 
Job15:34 “Gungano ravakan'ora harina michero yarinobereka. Misha yevepfumbamuromo ichaparadzwa nomoto. 
Job15:35 Mhodzi yavanodyara mumwoyo yavo unhunzvatunzva, vanotakura uipi, unyengedzi ndiye mwana wacho wavanobereka.”" 
Job16:1 Mhinduro yechipiri yaJobhu kuna Erifasi. Jobhu akazopindura achiti," 
Job16:2 “Ndakanzwa zvinhu zvizhinji zvakadaro, muri vanyaradzi vasina maturo, mose zvenyu." 
Job16:3 Ko iwo mwando pakutaura uchapera here? Chiri kukurwadzai chii kurambotaura kudaro? 
Job16:4 Ndaigonawo kutaura sezvamunoita. Dai murimi izvozvi ndingadai ndichivirikidzanisa mazwi pamuri, ndichikudzungudzirai musoro." 
Job16:5 Ndingadai ndichikusimbaradzai namazwi omuromo wangu ndichikunyaradzai zvisina mugumo. 
Job16:6 Kana ndikataura, kurwadziwa kwangu hakumiri. Ndikati ndinyarare kurwadziwa hakundisiye." 
Job16:7 “Chokwadi chokwadi zvino, Mwari mandisakadza, makandiparadzira mhuri yangu yose." 
Job16:8 Makaita kuti ndiperezeke muviri kuonda kwangu ndicho chapupu changu chinonongedza kwandiri mhosva yangu. 
Job16:9 Mwari akandibvambura-bvambura aine hasha, akandivenga, akandichenamira meno muvengi wangu akandidzvondorera maziso" 
Job16:10 vanondishamira muromo kwazvo vachindituka, vachindipamhadza padama, vose vachindimukira." 
Job16:11 Mwari akandiisa kuvanhu vasina kururama akandikanda mumaoko avaipi. 
Job16:12 Ndakanga ndigere zvangu zvakanaka akandibvambura. Akandibata pamutsipa akandipwanya-pwanya ini ndini waanangana naye. 
Job16:13 Anondibaya mativi ose nemiseve yake anondifushunurira pasi nduru zvisina tsitsi. 
Job16:14 Anondirova andirovazve, anomhanya kwandiri sezvinoita gamba rokurwa." 
Job16:15 Ndasonera ganda rangu hembe dzamasaga. Mbiri yangu ndakairega ichiti warara zvayo pasi. 
Job16:16 Uso hwangu hwatsvuka ropa. Pamaziso angu pane mumvuri worufu. 
Job16:17 Asi maoko angu akachena uye kunamata kwangu ndekwepachokwadi. 
Job16:18 “Iwe nyika rega kufushira ropa rangu kuchema kwangu ngakurege kugara pasi. 
Job16:19 Nazvino chapupu changu chiri kudenga uye anonditsigira ari kumusoro. 
Job16:20 Shamwari dzangu dzinonditarisa dzichishora, meso angu achamokotekera Mwari misodzi." 
Job16:21 Dai waro paine angareverere munhu pana Mwari, sezvingaitwe pakati pomunhu nomumwe wake?" 
Job16:22 Makore mashomanana akapfuura ini ndobva ndazoenda nenzira yandisingazodzoki.” 
Job17:1 “Mweya wangu uri kudzungaira mazuva angu avakutopera. Guva ratondimirira 
Job17:2 Vanhu vanongoramba vaneni kwazvo, ini ndinoramba ndakatarisa zvangu kubaya mwoyo kwavo." 
Job17:3 Imi Mwari chivai ndimi rubatso rwangu, nokuti ndianiwo zvake angasimudze ruoko rwake kundiitira rubatso?" 
Job17:4 Nokuti makavaputira pfungwa dzokunzwisisa, saka musavarege vachikunda." 
Job17:5 Mungaite somunhu anotaurira shamwari zvomugove wake, asi vana vake vachizvitsvokorera meso." 
Job17:6 Ndatove tsumo zvayo yenyika uye ndave munhu wokusvipirwa mate kumeso. 
Job17:7 Maziso angu aita rima pamusana pokurwadziwa kwangu mwoyo, uye nhengo dzangu dzangova mumvuri zvawo." 
Job17:8 Munhu ari pachokwadi zvinomukatyamadza vakanaka vanobva vashatirwa navakan'ora. 
Job17:9 Asi mururami anoramba akangoti kwati kwati namaitiro ake ana maoko akachena anoramba achingosimbarara chete. 
Job17:10 Zvino chidzokai zvakare mundivinge, mose zvenyu asi pakati penyu, munhu anoungwaru handimbomuwana." 
Job17:11 “Mazuva angu apfuura, zvandaifunga kuita zvakapera, zvandaida kuita zvacho zvaparara." 
Job17:12 Usiku vanohuti masikati, chiedza vachichiti chakaita serima." 
Job17:13 Kana chido changu kuri kuita nzvimbo yavafi musha wangu, kana rima riri iro randinoita uriri hwandinorara," 
Job17:14 ndava kutoti kuguva ndivo baba vangu, kuhonye ndichiti ndimi amai vangu nehanzvadzi yangu," 
Job17:15 Chitarisiro, changu chiripi ipapa? Ndianiwo zvake achaona chitarisiro changu?" 
Job17:16 Kusatoti taenda tose kunzvimbo yavafi tanyura muvhu tose pamwechete?” 
Job18:1 Hurukuro yechipiri yaBhiridhadhi. Bhiridhadhi Mushuhi akazopindurazve achiti," 
Job18:2 “Kusvikira riniko? Chimbonyararawo ufunge, isu timbotaurawo." 
Job18:3 Sei uchitiona semhuka uchititora sezvituta? 
Job18:4 Zvibvarure zvako kana uchida kunyange ukashatirwa zvako ukadii, nyika haisanduki ikava gwenga, mabwe haambobva panzvimbo pawo." 
Job18:5 “Mwenjewo wavaipi unodzimwa, murazvu womoto wake hauvheneke." 
Job18:6 Mwenje wemutendhe rake uchasviba nemwenje uri pamusoro pake uchadzimwa. 
Job18:7 Simba rokuita nhanho richaderera zvirongwa zvake zvichamuputsira pasi. 
Job18:8 “Nokuti tsoka dzake dzichamuti tindindi mumumbure achifamba pamusoro pehunza. 
Job18:9 Anobatwa chitsitsinho nechikachikiro, dhibhu rinomurapura." 
Job18:10 Musungo wakamuvanzirwa muvhu, hunza inenge yakavigwa panzira yake." 
Job18:11 Zvinotyisa zvichamukomba kumativi ose zvichingodzingirirana naye. 
Job18:12 “Nzara ndiyo ichamupedza simba nyatwa ichava parutivi pake. 
Job18:13 Chirwere chichamudya ganda honzeri chaiyo yorufu ichamudya makumbo. 
Job18:14 Achamwaurwa kubva mutendhe yaanovimba nayo agozvuzvurudzirwa kuna mambo wokutyisa. 
Job18:15 Mumwe angangogara zvake mutendhe yake asi musha wake watanga wasaswa nesarufa. 
Job18:16 Pasi midzi yake iri kuoma kumusoro mapazi ake achioma. 
Job18:17 Panyika zvokumuyeuka zvakapera. Hapana mugwagwa unodaidzwa nezita rake. 
Job18:18 Achadzingwa muchiedza achiendeswa murima achitandaniswa panyika. 
Job18:19 Haachazovi nomwana kana muzukuru zvake pakati pavanhu vokwake, kana mumwe anoraramawo paaigara." 
Job18:20 Vokumadokero vachadumbirwa nazvo vokumavirira zvichavazadza nokutya. 
Job18:21 Ndizvoka izvi, zvomusha unogara vanhu vakaipa, ndizvo zvenzvimbo yomunhu asingazivi.”" 
Job19:1 Mhinduro yaJobhu kuna Bhiridhadhi. Jobhu akapindura achiti," 
Job19:2 “Kusvikira riniko chokwadi muchindirwadzisa kudai nokundisakadza namazwi kudai? 
Job19:3 Rwatosvika rugumi rwose muchindinyomba. Hamunyari here imi kundiitira zvakaipa? 
Job19:4 Dai kuri kuti ndakakanganisa zvechokwadi mhosva yacho ndeyanguka ini. 
Job19:5 Kana imi mavakutoita zvokuzvionesa kwandiri muchitosevenzesa kuninipiswa kwangu sechinhu chokuratidza nacho kuti ndine mhosva," 
Job19:6 mochizviziva kuti Mwari ndiye akandipiya akandimbundira namambure ake. 
Job19:7 Ini ndikapopota nezveutsinye hwakadai hapana anondinzwa. Ndinodanidzira asi ruenzaniso hapana. 
Job19:8 Akavaka panzira pangu rusvingo zvokuti handikwanisi kupfuura, akakwidibira nzira yangu nerima." 
Job19:9 Akandikurumura mbiri yangu akandikutunura mumusoro ngundu yangu. 
Job19:10 Anondityoranisa kumativi ose zvokuti ndaenda ini, chitarisiro changu akachitipura somuti." 
Job19:11 Anondivirukira nehasha achinditora semuvengi wake. 
Job19:12 Hondo dzake dziri kukokana dzinouya dzakanangana neni dzichikomba tendhe rangu. 
Job19:13 “Akanditsauranisa navakomanavanun'una vangu. Hama dzangu dzakapesaniswa neni. 
Job19:14 Hama neshamwari dzangu dzapamwoyo dzakandinyengedza vanhu vokuziva chaivo vakatondikanganwa. 
Job19:15 Vari kuroja mumba mangu vakandikanganwa vasikana vebasa wava kutondiona somusevenzi. Mupfungwa dzavo ndatova mutorwa zvangu. 
Job19:16 Ndinodaidza musevenzi wangu asi haadaviri, ini ndini ndavakutoita zvokumuteterera." 
Job19:17 Kamweya kandava nako kava kunhuwa kumudzimai wangu, ndava kusemesa kuvana vamai vangu chaivo." 
Job19:18 Kunyange vana vaduku vavakundishora, ndikati ndisimukewo vanondisveeredza." 
Job19:19 Shamwari dzangu dzose chaidzo dzavakundisema chaivo vangu vapamwoyo vavakundipandukira. 
Job19:20 “Mapfupa angu aomererana neganda; aomererana nenyama yangu. Ndichatopona napaburi retsono chaipo. 
Job19:21 Ndinzwireiwo tsitsi, ndinzwireiwo tsitsi imi shamwari dzangu. Ruoko rwaMwari rwandirova." 
Job19:22 Ko munodireiko kundironda sezviri kuita Mwari? Hamugutsikani here nokundishora zita kwamunoita? 
Job19:23 “Dai mazwi angu angonyorwawo, adhindwa zvawo mubhuku." 
Job19:24 Zvinyorwe nepenzura yesimbi nomutobvu zvitemerwe pabwe nokusingaperi. 
Job19:25 “Ndinoziva kuti mununuri wangu mupenyu pakuguma achamira pamusoro payo nyika. 
Job19:26 Mushure mokunge ganda rangu raora saizvozvi ndisisiri mumuviri wangu ndichaona Mwari. 
Job19:27 Wandinozvionera iyeni, ndichamuona pachangu namaziso angu kwete mumwe. Mukati mangu umu ndapera nokuzvisuwira." 
Job19:28 Nokuti imi munoti tingamutambudze sei mhosva tingaiwane sei maari. 
Job19:29 Munofanira kutya bakatwa rakakutarisai nokuti hasha dzinounza kuranga kwebakatwa kuti muzive kuti kutongwa kuripo.” 
Job20:1 Zofa muNaamati akapindura achiti," 
Job20:2 “Pfungwa dzangu dzinondipa kuti ndipindure pamusana peshungu dzandibata. 
Job20:3 Pfungwa dzandanzwa dzinondishatirisa, mweya unopfuura kunzwisisa kwangu ndiwo unondipa minduro." 
Job20:4 “Unoziva wani kuti kubvira pasi chigare, kubvira pakaiswa munhu panyika," 
Job20:5 rufaro rwavakaipa rupfupi. Kupembera kwavakang'ora ndekwechinguvana chete. 
Job20:6 Kunyange akati dzuu kumira kusvika kumatenga, musoro wake uchisvika kumakore," 
Job20:7 anoparara sendove yake. Vakambomuona vanenge vavakutoti, ‘Aripi?’" 
Job20:8 Anobhururuka sechiroto asingazowanika, anonyangarika sechioniso chousiku." 
Job20:9 Ziso raimbomuona harizomuonazve. Haazomboonekwazve panzvimbo pake. 
Job20:10 Vana vake ndivo vanotozoripa varombo, ivo namaoko avo vachadzorera upfumi hwake." 
Job20:11 Mapfupa ake azere simba rouduku, asi richazoti rakata kurara pamwechete naye." 
Job20:12 Kunyange uipi huchimbonaka mukanwa make, achihuviga pasi porurimi rwake," 
Job20:13 achinyatsohuchengetedza asingahurasi, achihuchengetedza mukanwa make." 
Job20:14 Asi chokudya chake chinosanduka mudumbu make chichiita sechepfu yemvumbi. 
Job20:15 Anomedza upfumi asi anozohurutsa. Mwari anomurutsisa upfumi ihwohwo. 
Job20:16 Aiyamwa chepfu yemvumbi rurimi rwechiva runomuuraya. 
Job20:17 Haachazoonazve hova dzamafuta kana tukova twouchi neruomba. 
Job20:18 Achadzorera muchero webasa rake asina kumboudya. Zvaanowana pashawo dzake hazvimbomupa mufaro. 
Job20:19 Akabata varombo zvisina kunaka akavasiya vasisina chavanacho, akapamba imba yaasina kuvaka." 
Job20:20 Kudokwairira zvinhu kwaimushaisa zororo, chaainge atorwa mwoyo nacho haaichirega chichimupunyuka." 
Job20:21 Haaisiya chinhu mundiro saka zvokubudirira kunoenda mberi hapana. 
Job20:22 Paanenge ane zvose zvaanoda kuzvidya mwoyo kunobva kwamupinda ndopaanowirwa chaizvo nenhamo. 
Job20:23 Angazadze zvake dumbu asi Mwari anomuvirukira nehasha shamhu dzigonaya paari sechokudya chake. 
Job20:24 Achatiza zvako chombo chokurwa chesimbi achibva anzi mbetete nomuseve wendarira. 
Job20:25 Unonoburitsa muromo wawo neseri uchinyiminya muromo wabva nomunduru agongweda nokutya. 
Job20:26 Rima rakati kwirindindi rakamumirira, moto usingafutidzwi uchamuroromesa zvinenge zvasara mutendhe zvichaparadzwa." 
Job20:27 Denga richaratidza pachena uipi hwake, nyika ichamupandukira." 
Job20:28 Upfumi hwemba yake huchayeredzwa hugokukurwa pazuva rehasha dzaMwari. 
Job20:29 Uyu ndiwo mugove waMwari kumunhu akaipa ndiwo mubayiro waanotemerwa naMwari.” 
Job21:1 Mhinduro yechipiri yaJobhu kuna Zofa. Jobhu akapindurawo achiti," 
Job21:2 “Nyatsoteererai zvandichataura zvive ndizvo zvinokunyaradzai 
Job21:3 mombondiitirawo mwoyo murefu nditaure. Kana ndichinge ndataura mozoseka zvenyu. 
Job21:4 Munhu ndiye wandinonyunyutira here ini, ndingarege nei kuzvidya mwoyo?" 
Job21:5 Nditarirei mudumbirwe nazvo mubate muromo nazvo. 
Job21:6 Ndikazvirangarira zvinondidzongodza mwoyo muviri wangu wose unobva wadedera. 
Job21:7 “Vaipi vanoraramireiko vachitosvika pakukwegura, vachiva noukuru nesimba?" 
Job21:8 Vanotoona vana vavo vachinyatsodzika midzi zvizvarwa zvazvo zvichinyatsopasa. 
Job21:9 Dzimba dzavo hapana chadzinotya, hapana shamhu yaMwari pavari." 
Job21:10 Handira dzavo hadzikoni kuberekesa, Mhou dzavo dzinobereka hadzisvodze." 
Job21:11 Vanoburitsa vana vavo sedanga rehwai vana vacho vanochirika-chirika. 
Job21:12 Vanoimba nengoma nechipendani vachifara nokurira kwenyere. 
Job21:13 Vanopedza mazuva avo vari vakabudirira vachizoenda zvavo kuvachakabvu murugare. 
Job21:14 “Vanoti kuna Mwari tibvireipo, hatidi kuziva nzira dzenyu." 
Job21:15 Iye Samasimba ndianiwo zvake, watinonzi tishandire isu? Chatinowana chii kana tikanamata kwaari?" 
Job21:16 Handiti kubudirira kwavo kuri mumaoko avo here? Ini mazano avaipi anondipesa. 
Job21:17 Zvinombooneka here kazhinji kuti mwenje wavaipi unodzimwa, uye kuti njodzi yavo inombovawirawo here? Kangani Mwari kaakavagovera zvinorwadza akashatirwa?" 
Job21:18 Kangani kavakapeperetswa samashanga kana sehundi inotututswa nedutu," 
Job21:19 zvichinzi Mwari akachengetera vana vavo mhosva idzodzo? 
Job21:20 Vazvionere nameso kuparadzwa kwavo, vambonwawo mukombe wehasha dzaSamasimba." 
Job21:21 Vangazoita hanya dzei nemhuri dzavo kana mwedzi yavo yadimurwa? 
Job21:22 Ndiani angadziidzise Mwari ungwaru ari iye anotonga vari pazvigaro zvapamusoro? 
Job21:23 Mumwe anogona kufa achiri kuzvinzwa akagarika zvake ari pamutambaratede," 
Job21:24 akakora, mwongo wamapfupa ake wakanaka, wakanyorevera." 
Job21:25 Mumwe anofa achingorwadziwa mwoyo asina kana kumboravirawo chinhu chakanaka. 
Job21:26 Vanorara zvimwechetezvo muvhu vose havambotani kunzi momote nehonye. 
Job21:27 Zvamunoona, ndinoziva pfungwa dzenyu nekafungiro kenyu kokurwisana neni." 
Job21:28 “Imi munototi mhuri dzavakuruvakuru dziripi, tendhe raigara vaipi riri kupi?" 
Job21:29 Hamumbobvunzawosu vanofamba nzendo, hamungarambi zvavanopupura zvokuti pazuva renhamo yomuipi" 
Job21:30 anonzi wakaipa anopunyuka pazuva repfumvu, uye kuti zuva rehasha ndiro rinotomununura?" 
Job21:31 Ndiani anomutsiura zviito zvake akatarisana naye, kana anomuripisa zvaakaita?" 
Job21:32 Kana atakurwa kuendeswa kumakuva vanoisa vanhu vokugaririra paguva. 
Job21:33 Ivhu romubani rinobva ramunakira vanhu vachiita dungwerungwe kumutevera vari mberi kwake varizararira. 
Job21:34 Sei muchida kundinyararidza nezvinhu pasina, mhinduro dzenyu hadzichina chirimo kusiya nhema dzoga-dzoga.”" 
Job22:1 Erifasi muTemani akapindura achiti," 
Job22:2 “Pane munhu angave chipundutso kuna Mwari here? Kunyange mungwaru chaiye anomuwanisa chimuko here? 
Job22:3 Iye Samasimba anowana chimuko here paururami hwenyu, kana kuwana chaanowana paupenyu hwako kana husina chinoshoreka?" 
Job22:4 Ari kurangira kumutya kwako here kana kukwirirana dare newe izvozvo here? 
Job22:5 Handiti huipi hwako here hwakaipisisa uhu naizvo zvitadzo zvako zvisingaperi izvi. 
Job22:6 “Pasina chikonzero wakaita kuti hama dzako dziripe chitsidzo chadzo. Uchivasiya vava musvo, vasina kupfeka." 
Job22:7 Wainyima iwe vane nyota mvura yokunwa uchinyima vane nzara chokudya. 
Job22:8 Waipa vane simba roukuru nyika ichiva misha yechizivano newe. 
Job22:9 Waiendesa chirikadzi dzisina chinhu usingatsigire nherera. 
Job22:10 Ndokusaka wakombwa nemisungo uchibva wati mwoyo papata nezvinokuvhundutsa. 
Job22:11 Uye kuti chiedza chako chapinduka kuita rima zvokuti haukwanisi kuona, wachinzi ndondo nemafashamo emvura." 
Job22:12 Handiti Mwari ari kumusoro kudenga here? Chimbotarira uone nyenyedzi dziri mudenga-denga, kukwirira kwadzakaita mudenga." 
Job22:13 Asi imi ndopaunoti Mwari anozivei, uchiti angagone here kuona murima rakati ndoo kuti akwanise kutonga?”" 
Job22:14 Unoti akaputirwa namakore zvokuti haangakwanisi kuona paanofamba muzienda nakuenda redenga 
Job22:15 uchiri kungotevedza here maitiro evechinyakare akafambwa navaipi," 
Job22:16 vakabvutwa nguva yavo isati yasvika? Ugaro hwavo hwakukurwa nemvura. 
Job22:17 Vanoti kuna Mwari “Tibvirepo, iye Samasimba angatiitei?”" 
Job22:18 Asi ari iye akazadza dzimba dzavo nezvinhu zvakanaka ini mazano avaipi anondipesa. 
Job22:19 Varurami vanozviona vagofara vakanaka vanopfida kuvaseka," 
Job22:20 vachitoti mhandu dzedu dzakaparadzwa zvakasara zvaroromeswa nomoto. 
Job22:21 Naizvozvo wadzana naMwari uve norugare zvikunakire. 
Job22:22 Gamuchira chidzidziso chinobva mumuromo make uchengetedze mashoko ake mumwoyo wako. 
Job22:23 Ukadzokera kuna Samasimba wakazvidukupisa, uye ukabvisa uipi kure namatendhe enyu," 
Job22:24 kana ukarasa ndarama pavhu, ukarasira ndarama yokuOfiri mukati mehurungudo dzomurwizi," 
Job22:25 Samasimba achiva iye ndiye ndarama yako nesirivha yako inokosha; 
Job22:26 ipapo uchazofara una Samasimba uchizosimudza musoro wako kuna Mwari. 
Job22:27 Uchanamata kwaari, iye achakunzwa unozokwanisa kuzadzikisa mhiko dzako." 
Job22:28 Ucharonga kuita chinhu chichiitika. Nzira ichavhenekerwa nechiedza," 
Job22:29 Nokuti Mwari anodukupisa vanozvikudza achinunura vapasipasi. 
Job22:30 Anonunura vakarurama iwewo uchanunurwa kana maoko ako achena. 
Job23:1 Mhinduro yechitatu yaJobhu kuna Erifasi. Jobhu akapindura achiti," 
Job23:2 “Nanhasi uno kunyunyuta kwangu ndekwekupanduka, ruoko rwake ruri kungondiremera kunyange ndichiwuwura kudai." 
Job23:3 Dai ndaiziva kwokumuwana ndaisvika kunyange pachigaro chake. 
Job23:4 Ndaisvitsa kwaari nyaya yangu ndigozadza muromo wangu nezvokutaura. 
Job23:5 Ndipo pandichaziva zvaanondipindura ndigonzwisisa zvaanotaura kwandiri. 
Job23:6 Angaite mapitse neni here? Noukuru hwesimba rake kudaro? Kwete, anotondinzwa chete." 
Job23:7 Ipapo munhu akarurama anogona kutaura naye, mutongi wangu achitosvika pakutonditi handina mhosva zvachose." 
Job23:8 “Tarirai muone kuti ndinoenda kumabvazuva asi haako kumadokero asi handimuwane. 
Job23:9 Ndinomutsvaka kuchamhembe, asi handimuone kudoti kumaodzanyemba asi haaoneke." 
Job23:10 Anoziva wani mufambiro wangu kana akandiedza ndichabuda sendarama. 
Job23:11 Tsoka yangu yakaramba iri mugwara rake ndakaramba ndiri munzira yake ndisingatsauki. 
Job23:12 Handina kusiyana nemitemo inobva mumuromo make mazwi omumuromo make ndakaaisa mudura romumwoyo mangu. 
Job23:13 Chaanenge afunga ndichocho ndiani angamusandure? Chaanenge oda kuita anoita. 
Job23:14 Zvaakanditemera achatozviita. Hazvisi zvoga izvozvo ane zvimwe zvakawanda mupfungwa dzake zvakadaro. 
Job23:15 Ndokusaka ndichidedera nokutya pamberi pake ndikangozvifunga chete, ndinobva ndatonyanya kumutya." 
Job23:16 Mwari akaita kuti ndive mbwende, Samasimba akandityisidzira." 
Job23:17 Zvakadaro zvazvo rima harina kundipfumbira muromo akandinzvengesa kuzarima guru.” 
Job24:1 Zuva rokutonga zvarisina kuvandika kuna Samasimba sei vanomuziva vasingamboriona? 
Job24:2 Vanhu vanobvisa zvitata zvomuganhu vanobvuta matanga ezvipfuwo vachindozvifudza. 
Job24:3 Vanoteteretsa dhongi renherera vanotora dhonza rechirikadzi kuripa rubatso rwechakavimbiswa. 
Job24:4 Vanodzinga varombo munzira, varombo venyika vose vanotovanda." 
Job24:5 Varombo vanototsvaka chokudya mugwenga samadhongi omusango. Renje ndiro rinotovapa kudya kwavana vavo. 
Job24:6 Uswa hwemombe dzavo vanotonocheka musango vachitoita zvokufuhwa mumunda wavaipi 
Job24:7 vanorara usiku hwose vari musvo, vasina chavakapfeka, vasina chokufuka muchando." 
Job24:8 Vanonyorova nemvura inonaya mumakomo vachitonamatirana nedombo vachishaya pokuvanda. 
Job24:9 Vanobvuta nherera pazamu, mucheche wavarombo anobvutwa kuripa chikwereti." 
Job24:10 Vanofamba vari bunumunhu vasina chavakapfeka. Ndivo vokutakura zvisote asi nzara vainayo. 
Job24:11 Pakati pemitsara yemiorivhi yavakaipa vanoita mafuta vanosvina muguvi rewaini asi vaine nyota. 
Job24:12 Vari kufa vari kuwuwura kunze kweguta, kunonzwika kugurukuta kwavakakuvara vachitsvaka rubatsiro asi Mwari haamboteerera zvake munamato yavo." 
Job24:13 Asi kune vamwe vanopandukira chiedza vasina kujairira gwara racho vasingagari munzira dzacho. 
Job24:14 Mhondi inomuka nousiku kuti indouraya varombo navasina chavanacho, kana hwava usiku anoita sembavha." 
Job24:15 Ziso remhombwewo rinomirira ruvhunzavayeni ichiti hapana ziso rinondiona, inosandura uso." 
Job24:16 Murima vanobhovhora dzimba dzavamwe, masikati, vanozvipfigira, chiedza havachizivi" 
Job24:17 nokuti zarima hapana zvariri kwavari vose, pamusana pokuti vanoushamwari nezvinotyisa zverima." 
Job24:18 Munoti vanotakurwa nechimbichimbi pamusoro pemvura, mugove wavo wakashurikidzirwa rushambwa munyika. Hakuna mushambadzi anotsaukira kuminda yavo yemigirepisi." 
Job24:19 Kushaikwa kwemvura uye kupisa kunoomesa mvura yamazaya echando ndozvinoita nzvimbo yavachakabvu kuvanhu vanenge vatadzira Mwari. 
Job24:20 Mimba inovakanganwa, honye dzinozipirwa kuvadya, vanhu vakaipa havayeukwi asi vanotyoka somuti." 
Job24:21 Vanoita hwenda nomukadzi asina mbereko pasina mwana anoberekwapo chavanobatsira chirikadzi hapana. 
Job24:22 Asi Mwari nesimba rake anokwekweretsa vana masimba, vanogona zvavo kusimukira asi havana chivimbo chaicho choupenyu." 
Job24:23 Anovanetsa nokufunga kuti vagare zvisina njodzi asi ziso rake rinenge riri panzira dzavo. 
Job24:24 Pakanguva kadukuduku vanombosimudzirwa pamusoro vobva vaenda voti pasi mokoto vachindorongedzwa zvinongoitwa vamwe vose, vanochekwa sezvinongoitwa hura dzembeswa." 
Job24:25 Kana zvisizvo ndiani angati ndinoreva nhema aburitse pachena kuti ndinotaura nhando. 
Job25:1 Bhiridhadhi. Bhiridhadhi Mushuhi akapindurawo achiti," 
Job25:2 “Mwari ano ukuru uye anotyisa ndiye anochengetedza runyararo kwake kumusoro ikoko. 
Job25:3 Hondo yake inoverengeka here, ndiani asingavhenhekerwi nechiedza chake?" 
Job25:4 Munhu angave akarurama sei pamberi paMwari, munhu akaberekwa nomukadzi angave akachena sei?" 
Job25:5 Inga wani kwaari kunyange mwedzi zvawo haupenyi kana nyenyedzi kwaari hadzina kuchena. 
Job25:6 Ko kutozotiwo munhu, honye zvake, munhu chidukutse zvacho.”" 
Job26:1 Jobhu akapindurawo achitizve," 
Job26:2 “Ndokubatsira munhu asina simba ikoku, ndokununura here ikoku munhu anenge arukutika?" 
Job26:3 Ndokurairawo here munhu asina mazano ikoku uchimuzivisa mano ohungwaru akawanda? 
Job26:4 Ndianiko akakupa kuti utaure mashoko iwaya? Uri kuzvitauriswa nemweya wani? Bhiridhadhi akapamha kutaura achiti 
Job26:5 Vari pasi, vakafa vanodedera nokutya mvura nezvinogara mumvura zvinodedera." 
Job26:6 Nzvimbo yavafi mutwi zvayo kuna Mwari, kwaari nzvimbo yavachakabvu yakashama." 
Job26:7 Mwari ndiye akatambanudza zidandanakutanda mumhene. Akapaikira nyika pasina pokupaikira. 
Job26:8 Anosungirira mvura mumakore ake makobvu asi gore haribvaruki nokurema kwayo. 
Job26:9 Anofukidza mwedzi wejenaguru achiwarira pauri gore rake. 
Job26:10 Akatara denderedzwa pamusoro pemvura pamuganhu wechiedza nerima. 
Job26:11 Mbiru dzedenga dzinodedera dzinokangaidzwa nezwi rake rokuyambira. 
Job26:12 Akanyaradza gungwa nesimba rake nohungwaru hwake akaparadza zigaranyanya Rahabhu. 
Job26:13 Nezwi rake akaita kuti denga riti ngwee, noruoko rwake akauraya zigaranyanya parainge rotiza." 
Job26:14 Izvi zvinongova kadimbu kadiki kezvaanoita, zvatinonzwa rinongova zevezeve razvo. Ndiani anganzwisise kutinhira kwesimba rake?”" 
Job27:1 Jobhu akaenderera mberi nenyaya yake achiti," 
Job27:2 “Ndinopika naMwari mupenyu nokundinyima ruenzaniso rwangu iye Samasimbaose akandishungurudza mwoyo. 
Job27:3 Kana ndichiri kufema mweya kudai, mweya waMwari uchiri mumhuno dzangu," 
Job27:4 muromo wangu haumbotaura nhema, rurimi rwangu harumbotaura zvounyengedzi." 
Job27:5 Hazvimbofa zvakaitika kuti nditi imi muri pachokwadi. Kusvikira ndife zvangu, handisi kuzokanda pasi kuva pachokwadi kwangu, ururami hwangu handimbohukanda pasi." 
Job27:6 Hana yangu haindipire mhosva zvandakaita mazuva angu ose. 
Job27:7 Dai muvengi wangu akawana chinowana munhu akaipa. Iye anondipandukira awane chinowana asina kururama," 
Job27:8 nokuti chitarisiro chomunhu asiri munamati chii kana Mwari amuparadza, kana Mwari amutorera upenyu hwake?" 
Job27:9 Mwari achanzwa kuchema kwake here kana nhamo yamuwira," 
Job27:10 anofadzwa here naSamasimba achadaidza kuna Mwari nguva dzose here? 
Job27:11 Ndichakudzidzisai zvesimba raMwari handidi kukuvanzirai zvinofungwa naSamasimba. 
Job27:12 Ko inga mose makazviona wani, ko kutaura zvisina maturo kwabvepi?" 
Job27:13 “Uyu ndiwo mubayiro waMwari kumunhu akaipa nenhaka inowaniswa naSamasimba kune vano utsinye. 
Job27:14 Vana vavo vanogona kuwanda zvavo asi vanowandira kuuraiwa nebakatwa rehondo uye vana vavo vanenge vasina kudya kwakawanda. 
Job27:15 Vanorarama vake, denda richavaendesa kumakuva chirikadzi dzavo hadzivachemi." 
Job27:16 Kunyange zvake akaunganidza mari sevhu uye kunyange akaunganidza mbatya semunyakwe," 
Job27:17 anogona kuisona asi mururami ndiye anoipfeka, mari yake ichagovanwa navarurami." 
Job27:18 Imba yaanovaka yakaita sedandemutande sedumba rinovakwa nomutariri wenzvimbo. 
Job27:19 Anogona kundorara ari mupfumi asi hazviitiki zvakare paanoti pepu upfumi hwake panenge pasisina. 
Job27:20 Anowirwa nokutya samapopopo emvura usiku anotututswa nechamupupuri. 
Job27:21 Mhepo yokumabvazuva inomutututsa yoenda naye ichimubvisa panzvimbo yake. 
Job27:22 Inobonderera paari zvisina tsitsi iye achiita bara chairo kutiza. 
Job27:23 Inomuitira ruzha ichimufuridza panzvimbo pake.” 
Job28:1 “Inga ungwaru hunopfuura njere dzomunhu sirivha ine migodhi yayo kune nzvimbowo yokunatsa ndarama. 
Job28:2 Simbi inocherwa muvhu mhangurawo inonyungurutswa ichibva mumatombo. 
Job28:3 Munhu ndiye anotoisira rima miganhu, achichera kusvika kwakadzama chaiko, kumatombo ari kuhwenje hwerima." 
Job28:4 Munhu anogona kuchera migodhi kure nokunogara vanhu, munzvimbo dzakakanganika norutsoka rwomunhu vachiita muzeerere netambo kure navanhu" 
Job28:5 muvhu munobva chokudya asi zviri pasi apa zvinopinduka kunge moto. 
Job28:6 Mumatombo munogara matombo esafaya uye mune huruva yendarama. 
Job28:7 Nzira yacho iyoyo haisati yabhururuka neshiri kunyange ziso rorukodzi harisati ramboiona. 
Job28:8 Zvikara zvinoti ndisu pano, hazvisati zvambokutsika. Shumba haisati yambokufamba." 
Job28:9 Munhu anochera dombo romusarasara achipidigura makomo kusara aisa midzi yawo pachena. 
Job28:10 Anoita mwena mumatombo ziso rake richiona chose chakakosha. 
Job28:11 Anoita madhamu kunotangira tukova kuitira kuti zvakavandika zvibude pachena. 
Job28:12 “Asi ungwaru hunowanika kupi? Kunzwisisa kunogarepi? 
Job28:13 Munhu haazivi nzira yoko uye hauwanikwi munyika yavapenyu. 
Job28:14 Hwenje hunoti hausi mandiri, gungwawo rinoti hausi neni." 
Job28:15 Haugoni kutsinhaniswa nendarama haugone kuyerwa nomutengo wesirivha. 
Job28:16 Haugoni kuenzaniswa kukosha kwahwo nendarama yeOfiri kana nokukosha neOnikisi kana neSafaya. 
Job28:17 Ndarama kana girazi hazvingaenzaniswi naho, kana kutsinhaniswa nezvishongo zvendarama yakanakisisa," 
Job28:18 tisingamboswerozvienzanisa zvedu nekarari kana nekiristari mutengo woungwaru uri pamusoro pewemapera. 
Job28:19 Matombo eTopasi ekuEtiopia haangamboenzaniswa nahwo kana kuera kukosha kwahwo nendarama yakanakisisa. 
Job28:20 “Ko zvino hungwaru hunobva kupi? Kunzwisisa, nzvimbo yako iri kupi?" 
Job28:21 Yakavandika kuvapenyu vose yakahwanda kushiri dzedenga. 
Job28:22 Nzvimbo yavachakabvu norufu zvinoti takangonzwa chete runyerekupe rwahwo nenzeve. 
Job28:23 “Mwari ndiye anonzwisisa nzira yokuungwaru uye anoziva nzvimbo yahwo 
Job28:24 (Nokuti anoona kwakaperera nyika uye anoona chose chiri pasi pedenga.) 
Job28:25 Paakapa mhepo simba rayo achiyera mvura nechiyereso 
Job28:26 achipa mvura inonaya mitemo yayo, nemheni inodhiriridza nzira yayo" 
Job28:27 ndopaakanyatsohuongorora akahuona akahurangarira akahuera udzame hwahwo. 
Job28:28 Ndipo paakati kuvanhu kutya Mwari ndihwo hungwaru kunzvenga chitadzo ndiko kunzwisisa.” 
Job29:1 Jobhu akasimudzirazve kutaura zvakaomarara achiti," 
Job29:2 “Dai zvahwo upenyu hwaidzokororwa huchidzokera kumwedzi iya, Mwari paaiva mutariri wangu;" 
Job29:3 pandaivhenekerwa paya pamusoro, pandaifamba murima nemwenje wake" 
Job29:4 sezvandakanga ndakaita panguva yandanga ndabve zano; Mwari paaichengeta musha wangu pamusana poushamwari hwake," 
Job29:5 Samasimba paakanga achineni, vana vangu vakandikomberedza," 
Job29:6 ndichiri kuita mukaka wokutoshamba zvangu nawo tsoka mumatombo muchindibudira hova dzamafuta. 
Job29:7 “Pandaienda kudare ndichindogarawo pachigaro changu munhandare 
Job29:8 vechiduku vaindiona vaipeuka, harahwa dzaisimuka dzichitomira." 
Job29:9 Makurukota aimbomira kutaura vachizarira miromo. 
Job29:10 Mazwi evokumbahuru achimbonyarara, rurimi rwavo ruchimbonamatira kumusoro." 
Job29:11 Vanhu vaiti vakandinzwa vaindikorokotedza ziso raindiona raindinwira mvura 
Job29:12 nokuti ndaisunungura varombo munhamo nenherera dzakanga dzisina anobatsira," 
Job29:13 chikomborero chavainge vava kufa chaiuya kwandiri ndichiita kuti chirikadzi dzifare zvakadzama mumwoyo. 
Job29:14 “Ndaipfeka ururami ihwo huchindifukidza. Ruenzaniso ndirwo rwaiva gemenzi rangu nengundu. 
Job29:15 Ndaive ziso kumapofu nemakumbo kuna vakaremara 
Job29:16 Ndaiva baba wavarombo. Nyaya dzavatorwa ndaidzitsvaka padziri. 
Job29:17 Ndaityora mazino anouturu avasina kururama ndichimudonhedzesa nyama yaakabata namazino. 
Job29:18 Ndaifunga kuti ndichafirawo zvangu mumba mangu ndichiti mazuva angu achawanda sejecha. 
Job29:19 Midzi yangu ichitandavara kusvikira kumvura, iro dova rakati gudegude pamashizha angu husiku hwose." 
Job29:20 Ndaiti mbiri yangu icharamba iripo chete, uta hwangu huri hutsva ndakahubata muchanza." 
Job29:21 “Vanhu vaitondimirira vachinyarara kuti vanzwe mazano angu. 
Job29:22 Kana ndainge ndataura hapana aizotaurazve. Mazwi angu aidonha samadonhwe pavari. 
Job29:23 Vaindimirira sevanomirira mvura inonaya, vakashama muromo sevanomirira mvura yobumharutsva." 
Job29:24 Ndaiti ndikavanyemwerera havaimbofunga kuti ndini, kupenyerera kwemhanza yangu kwaivapa kusarasa mwoyo." 
Job29:25 Ndini ndaitonga ndichisarudza zvinofanira kuitwa ndichiita samambo ari pakati pehondo dzake somunhu anonyaradza vafirwa.” 
Job30:1 Nhamo yaJobhu pari zvino. “Asi iye zvino vakandiita chiseko zvacho vanhu vadiki kwandiri, vana madzibaba vandaishora zvokuti handaikwanisa kuvaisa nembwa dzangu dzokuchengetedza zvipfuwo zvangu." 
Job30:2 Simba ramaoko avo rinondibatsirei, vanhu vakapera zvavo simba" 
Job30:3 vakaonda nokushaiwa uye nenzara vanototetena midzi yakaoma yenyika ine nyota murima, munyika yakaoma yerenje" 
Job30:4 vaitanha makwenzi anovava vachirarama nemidzi yomutsvairo. 
Job30:5 Vakadzingwa mukati mavanhu vachisveveredzwa sembavha 
Job30:6 vachigara mumakoronga amapani nomumaguru, nomumapako" 
Job30:7 unotovanzwa vachikuma mumatondo vachingourungana mukati meminzwa 
Job30:8 matununu chaiwo, vanhu vasina rudzi vakadzingwa munyika." 
Job30:9 “Asi iye zvino ini ndava rumbo chairwo kwavari uye setsumo chaiyo kwavari. 
Job30:10 Vanondisema, vachimirira vakataramukana neni vasingasumbe kundisvipira mate kumeso." 
Job30:11 Nokuti Mwari akatupfunura rukungiso rwouta hwangu akandininipisa, pandiri kuzvibata vanobva vasiyana nako." 
Job30:12 Kurudyi kwangu chikwata chamadzenga chinosimuka chondidzinganisa vachindirongera nzira dzokuparadza nadzo. 
Job30:13 Vanodzivirira kwokuti nditize nako vanotowedzera njodzi yangu pamusoro peimwe, wokuvamisa hapana." 
Job30:14 Vanopinda vachiita sevanopinda napakapazika zvikuru vanouya vari mukati mehungwandangwanda. 
Job30:15 Kutya kwandibata chiremera changu chinopupurutswa sokupupurutswa nemhepo hunhu hwangu hwapfuura segore. 
Job30:16 “Upenyu hwangu hwava kukwenguka, mazuva enhamo andiwira." 
Job30:17 Usiku chirwere chinondin'ura mapfupa kurwadza kunondin'ura hakuzorore 
Job30:18 ndinobatwa hembe pahuro zveganyabvu. Hembe dzangu dzaunyanidzwa. 
Job30:19 Mwari andikanda mumatope, ndangova zvangu sehuruva nedota." 
Job30:20 Ndinochema kwamuri asi hamupinduri ndinosimuka asi munongonditarisa zvenyu. 
Job30:21 Masanduka, mave noutsinye kwandiri munondirwadzisa noruoko rwoune simba" 
Job30:22 munondibvuta mondiisa mumhepo dutu richindiita suku nasai kwose kwose. 
Job30:23 Ndinoziva zvangu kuti muri kundiendesa kurufu kunzvimbo yakatemerwa vapenyu vose.” 
Job30:24 “Asi munhu anenge ari mukati memurwi wehungwandangwanda hwemba yakoromoka, haasimudzi ruoko here munhamo yake achitsvaka rubatsiro?" 
Job30:25 Handina here kuchema navainge vaomerwa zuvaro, handina here kuchema navarombo?" 
Job30:26 Ndaitarisira zvakanaka ndopakauya zvakaipa. Ndaimirira chiedza asi rima ndiro rakauya. 
Job30:27 Mudumbu mangu munomona musinganyarari, ndasangana namazuva enhamo." 
Job30:28 Ndinofamba ndiri mukuchema kwete mukufara chandinosimukira pana vanhu kukumbira rubatsiro. 
Job30:29 Ndave shamwari yamakava nehama yemhou. 
Job30:30 Ganda rangu rasviba ravakukwatanuka mapfupa angu anotsva nokupisa. 
Job30:31 Chipendani changu chava nziyo dzokuchema nyere yangu yava yokutsinhira vanochema.” 
Job31:1 Ini ndakatsidzira maziso angu kuti haachazotarisa musikana ndichimuchiva. 
Job31:2 Pakadaro ndingawane mugove wei kubva kuna Mwari kumusoro kana nhaka yangu, kubva kuna Samasimba kumusoro." 
Job31:3 Handiti vasina kururama vanowirwa here nenhamo navaiti vezvakaipa vachiwirwawo nejambwa? 
Job31:4 Asi iye, handiti anoona magariro angu achiverengawo nhanho dzangu dzose?" 
Job31:5 Dai kuri kuti ndakashamwaridzana nenhema rutsoka rwangu ruchimhanyirirana nounyengedzi," 
Job31:6 Mwari ngaandiere muchikero chiri pachokwadi achaziva kuzvibata kwangu. 
Job31:7 Kana ndakatsauka panzira ndikatevera meso meso angu, uye kana maoko angu anechakaipa chakanamirana nawo," 
Job31:8 pakadaro regai ndidyare asi mumwe ave ndiye anochidya uye mbeswa dzangu ngadzidzipurwe zvadzo. 
Job31:9 Kana ndakatorwa mwoyo nomumwe mukadzi uye kana ndakamiramira pamusuwo womumwe wangu 
Job31:10 mudzimai wangu ngaanokuya mbeswa dzomumwe atorwe zvake nomumwe murume. 
Job31:11 Nokuti ingadai iri mhaka yakaipisisa kwazvo. Hungadai huri huipi hunofanira kurangwa navatongi. 
Job31:12 Ungadai uri moto unoparadza nokusingaperi ungadai uchitopisa zvinhu zvangu zvose kusvika pokupedzisira pazvo. 
Job31:13 Kana ndakaramba kunzwa chichemo chomuranda wangu wechirume kana wechikadzi chokundinyunyutira," 
Job31:14 ndinozoita sei kana Mwari asimuka, kana wobvunza ndichamupindurei." 
Job31:15 Ko iye akandisika munhumbu haasiriye akavasikawo here? Akatisika tose, haasiriye mumwechete here?" 
Job31:16 Kana ndarambira chaidiwa nomurombo kana kudzimaidza chirikadzi," 
Job31:17 kana kudya ndoga mukonde ndichinyima nherera 
Job31:18 nokuti kubvira pahuduku hwake ndaimurera sababa kubvirawo mudumbu mamai vake ndakamutungamirira. 
Job31:19 Dai kuri kuti ndakaona munhu achiparara pamusana pokushaya hembe kana kuti murombo asina chokupfeka 
Job31:20 kana kuti muviri wake usina chaungati ngandikomborerwe nacho pamusana pokumudziisa nemvere dzehwai dzangu. 
Job31:21 Kana dai kuri kuti ndakasimudza ruoko rwangu kurwisana nenherera ndichiziva kuti ndine simba padare," 
Job31:22 pakadaro bendekete rangu ngarikwachukire pasi ruoko rwangu rwudambuke pamasanganirano arwo 
Job31:23 nokuti ndaitya nhamo yaizobva kuna Mwari uye handaimbopamira noukuru hwake. 
Job31:24 Dai ndakaisa mwoyo wangu mundarama kuti ndichiti ndarama ndiyo yondovimba nayo. 
Job31:25 Dai ndaifarisa pamusana pokuwanda kwoupfumi hwangu kana kuti ndawana zvakawanda namaoko angu. 
Job31:26 Dai kuri kuti ndakatarisa zuva nezuva ndakambotorwawo mwoyo parino penya kana nemwedzi mukufamba kwawo kunoyevedza 
Job31:27 ndikatorwa mwoyo ndikazviombera muchivande 
Job31:28 chingadai chiri chitadzo chinofanira kurangwa navatongi nokuti ndingadai ndisina kutendeka kuna Mwari wokumusorosoro. 
Job31:29 Dai kuri kuti ndakafarira kuparara kwomuvengi wangu kana kufara paainge awirwa nenhamo. 
Job31:30 Handina kurasa muromo ndichiti dai awana chinomuwana. 
Job31:31 Pane womumusha mangu here akanga asingati, Ndiani asina kumboguta nenyama yake?" 
Job31:32 Hapana muenzi akamborara panze mukova wangu waigara wakazurukira vaenzi. 
Job31:33 Dai kuri kuti ndakavigiridza uipi hwangu kuvanhu nokuviga uipi hwangu mumwoyo 
Job31:34 pamusana pokutya uzhinji hwavanhu kana kutya kushorwa nemhuri zvokuti ndainyarara ndisingabudi mumba. 
Job31:35 Dai ndiine angandinzwewo zvake ini ndasaina; iye Samasimbaose ngaachindipindura; mupomeri wangu ngaaite mhosva yangu yokunyora," 
Job31:36 ndingatoita yokutakura pafudzi, ndaitosungirira mumusoro sendaza," 
Job31:37 ndaimurondedzera zvose zvandakaita, ndaienda kwaari somuchinda." 
Job31:38 Kana kuri kuti nyika yangu yakachema neni zvichibatsirana nemakoronga," 
Job31:39 kana ndakadya chayo pasina muripo ndikakonzera rufu rwavaridzi vayo, dai mukamera zvamo minzwa panze pekoroni uye sora panze peBhari." 
Job31:40 Ndipo pakaperera Jobhu kutaura. 
Job32:1 Varume vatatu ava ndopavakabva varega kupindurana naJobhu nokuti Jobhu aizviona saakarurama. 
Job32:2 Asi Erihu mwana waBharakieri muBhuzi wedzinza rokwaRamu akashatirwa kwazvo akashatirirwa Jobhu nokuti akazviita mururami kupinda Mwari. 
Job32:3 Akashatirirwawo shamwari dzake nhatu nokuti vakanga vasina kuwana nzira dzokupwisa nadzo Jobhu kunyange akati Jobhu ane mhosva. 
Job32:4 Erihu haana kunge ataura kuna Jobhu nokuti vamwe vaya vakanga vari vakuru kwaari. 
Job32:5 Asi paakaona kuti varume vatatu ava vakanga vasisina chokutaura, Erihu akaita hasha." 
Job32:6 Naizvozvo Erihu mwana waBharakieri muBhuzi akati, “Ini ndiri muduku imi makura, naizvozvo ndanga ndichinyara ndichitya kukuudzai zvandinoziva." 
Job32:7 Ndati regai vakura ndivo vataure vane makore aendedzana vape ungwaru. 
Job32:8 Asi chaizvoizvo Mweya waSamasimba uri mumunhu femo raMwari ndiro rinopa kunzwisisa. 
Job32:9 Vakura havasiri ivo chete vane ungwaru kana kuti vachembera vanonzwisisa zvine ruenzaniso. 
Job32:10 Naizvozvo ndinoti chimboteereraiwo ndimbotaurawo zvandinofunga. 
Job32:11 “Tarisai muone kuti ndanga ndakamirira kuti imi mumbotaura ndakateya nzeve kuhurukuro dzenyu dzoungwaru imi muchimbotsvaka zvokuti mutaure. 
Job32:12 Ndanga ndakakuteererai zvangu ndikaona kuti hapana apwisa Jobhu uye kuti hapana mumwe pakati penyu akwanisa kunyatsopindura Jobhu. 
Job32:13 Izvozvi mungati tazowana ungwaru zvino Mwari ngaave iye anomupindura kwete munhu. 
Job32:14 Havana kutaura mashoko avo kwandiri saka ini handichavapindura namashoko enyu. 
Job32:15 Varume ava vadumbirwa havachina chokupindura havachina chokureva. 
Job32:16 Zvino ndoramba ndakamirira here zvavasisataure kudai zvavangomira zvavo kudai vasisapindure chinhu? 
Job32:17 Ini ndichapindurawo chikamu changu iniwo ndichataura zvandinoziva 
Job32:18 nokuti ndizere namashoko mukati umu ndiri kumonwa neshungu. 
Job32:19 Mwoyo wangu waita sewaini isina pokubuda napo sezvigubhu zvewaini zvitsva zvava kuda kuputika. 
Job32:20 Ndinofanira kuti nditaure ndipedze shungu dzangu. Ndinofanira kuzarura muromo nditaure. 
Job32:21 Handisi kuzoita zvechizivano kana kuita zvokubata munhu kumeso. 
Job32:22 Zvokubata vanhu kumeso handizvizivi musiki wangu angadai akanditora.” 
Job33:1 “Zvino iwe Jobhu chinzwa zvandava kutaura uteere zvose zvandichareva. 
Job33:2 Hezvo ndava kuzarura muromo wangu rurimi rwangu rwava kutaura mukanwa mangu. 
Job33:3 Zvandinotaura zvinobva mukutendeseka kwemwoyo wangu. Miromo yangu ichataura iri pachokwadi zvandinoziva 
Job33:4 nokuti Mweya waMwari ndiwo wakandisika femo raSamasimba ndiro rakandipa upenyu. 
Job33:5 Kana muchikwanisa ndipindurei nyatsondirongerai mashoko enyu. 
Job33:6 Chizvigadzirirai pana Mwari ndakangoitawo semi kana neniwo ndaiumbwa nevhu. 
Job33:7 Saka hamuna chokunditya uye kwandiri hapana chingakuremerei. 
Job33:8 “Ndakunzwai imi muchitaura ndichinzwa, ndatonzwa ini maungira amazwi enyu" 
Job33:9 muchiti ndakachena ini handina chikanganiso. Ndakachena handina mhosva yandinayo 
Job33:10 asi Mwari anondipomera mhosva anondiona semhandu yake. 
Job33:11 Anondisungirira makumbo mumatanda achindigaririra munzira dzose. 
Job33:12 Mhinduro yandinokupai ndeyokuti munaizvozvi hamuna imi kururama Mwari mukuru kune munhu wose. 
Job33:13 Munoitirei nharo naye muchiti haasikupindura zvose zvandiri kutaura. 
Job33:14 “Mwari anomboti taurei odzokororazve kaviri kaviri kunyange munhu asingazvioni. 
Job33:15 Anogona kutaura muchiroto kana muchioneso chousiku munhu akabatwa chaizvo nehope achikotsira pauriri hwake. 
Job33:16 Ndipo paanozarura vanhu nzeve obva aona kuti chaanoda kuti vadziidze vachidzidza," 
Job33:17 kuti munhu apinduke pane zvaanenge achiita uye kuti munhu arege kuzvikudza. 
Job33:18 Anodzivirira munhu kuwira mugomba uye kubaiwa nepfumo. 
Job33:19 Mumwewo anomutsiura nokumurwadzisa pabonde nemapfupa anoramba achingogweda 
Job33:20 zvokuti chokudya chinosvibisa mwoyo uye anosema machikichori. 
Job33:21 Anoonda zvokusara asisaoneki nyama mapfupa akanga asingaoneki achiti pachena charavanda. 
Job33:22 Anenge oswedera kuguva uye upenyu hwake hwoswedera kuna vanouraya. 
Job33:23 Dai kuri kuti pane mutumwa, mumiriri kudivi kwake mumwechete pakati pechiuru, kutsanangurira munhu zvakamunakira." 
Job33:24 Zvino anomunzwira urombo oti mununurei arege kuwira mugomba, ndawana chokumununura nacho." 
Job33:25 Nyama yake angaiite zvayo seyapauduku adzokere kusimba rake rouduku. 
Job33:26 Ipapo munhu achanyengetera kuna Mwari Mwari agofadzwa naye munhu anouya kwaari norufaro Mwari achimudzorera ururami hwake. 
Job33:27 Ndopaachaita zvokuimba kwazvo kuvanhu achiti, ‘Ndakatadza ini ndikaipisa zvakarurama asi handina kuzvirangirwa." 
Job33:28 Akandinunura kuti ndirege kuenda mugomba upenyu hwangu huchaona chiedza.’ 
Job33:29 “Chionaika kuti Mwari anoita izvozvi zvose kumunhu kaviri kaviri kana katatu. 
Job33:30 Kuti adzose mweya wake kugomba kuya kuti awane chiedza chavapenyu. 
Job33:31 Zvino iwe Jobhu teerera undinzwe, umbonyarara nditaurewo." 
Job33:32 Kana une chokutaura ndipindure taura nokuti chandinoda kuti iwe unzi wakarurama. 
Job33:33 Kana pasina, wochimbonditeererawo wombonyarara zvako ndimbokudzidzisa ungwaru.”" 
Job34:1 Erihu akati," 
Job34:2 “Chinzwai zvandinotaura imi vangwaru munditeerere, iyemi munoziva" 
Job34:3 nokuti nzeve inoedza mazwi sokuravira kunoita mukanwa chokudya. 
Job34:4 Ngatitarisei kuti chatinoti chakarurama chinhu chakaita sei tirairidzane kuti chakanaka chii. 
Job34:5 “Nokuti Jobhu anoti ini handina mhaka asi Mwari ari kuramba kundiitira zvino ruenzaniso. 
Job34:6 Kutongwa kwangu ndekwenhema, ronda rangu haripori kunyange pasina chandakatadza." 
Job34:7 Pano mumwe munhu here akaita saJobhu anodhadhaira zvake seari kunwa mvura 
Job34:8 asi iye achifambidzana navaiti vezvakaipa, anofamba navaipi." 
Job34:9 Nokuti vanoti hapana chavanowana nokufadza Mwari. 
Job34:10 “Saka chindinzwai imi vanonzwisisa zviri kure kwazvo naMwari kuti aite zvakaipa kana kushaika kworuenzaniso pana Mwari 
Job34:11 nokuti anopa munhu mubayiro wezvaakaita achiita kuti munhu awane zvinokodzerana namaitiro ake. 
Job34:12 Ndezvechokwadi kuti Mwari haamboita zvakaipa, Samasimbaose haambominamisa ruenzaniso." 
Job34:13 Ndiani akaisa nyika mumaoko make? Ndiani akawarira pasi pose? 
Job34:14 Dai kuri kuti ambozviti mumwoyo make, regai abvise mweya wangu nefemo rangu zvidzokere kwandiri," 
Job34:15 chinhu chose chipenyu chingaparare, munhu anobva adzokerazve kuvhu." 
Job34:16 Kana muri munhu anonzwisisa inzwai izvi, teererai zvandava kutaura." 
Job34:17 Asingadi ruenzaniso angatonge here? Mungade kupa mhosva iye Mururami Samasimbaose here? 
Job34:18 Anoti kuna madzimbo vanhu pasina, kuna machinda, ovati vanhu vakaipa." 
Job34:19 Asina zvechizivano namachinda kana kuremekedza vapfumi kupinda varombo nokuti ndiye akavasika vose namaoko ake. 
Job34:20 Vanofa nenguva isipi pakati pousiku, vanhu vanozunzwa vachipfuura, vane simba vanobviswa kwete namaoko avanhu." 
Job34:21 “Nokuti ziso rake rinoongorora zvinoita munhu; anoona mafambiro ake ose. 
Job34:22 Hakuna zarima kana rima rakati kwirindindi munogona kuhwandwa navaiti vezvakaipa. 
Job34:23 Haana kurongerana nomunhu nguva yokuti apinde dare raMwari nayo. 
Job34:24 Anoparadza vana masimba, pasina zvokumbobvunza achiisa vamwe panzvimbo pavo." 
Job34:25 Saizvozvo anoziva mabasa avo anovapidigura nousiku humwechete vachibva vaparara. 
Job34:26 Anovapa shamhu pamusana pouipi hwavo vanhu vachizviona. 
Job34:27 Nokuti vakamupa gotsi, vasina kana hanya nenzira dzake." 
Job34:28 Vakakonzera kuti kuchema kwavarombo kusvike kwaari. Akanzwa chichemo chavatamburi. 
Job34:29 “Akanyarara zvake, ndiani angamupe mhosva? Akavanza huso ndiani angamuone? Rungave rudzi kana munhu mumwechete." 
Job34:30 Kuti munhu asiri munamati atonge kuti arege kuteya vanhu. 
Job34:31 Angati here kuna Mwari ndakatadza asi handichatadzazve 
Job34:32 zvandisingaoni ndidzidzisei kana ndakaita zvakaipa handichazviitazve? 
Job34:33 Zvino mubayiro waanopa pakadai anofanira kuupa samafungiro ako here iwe usingawirirane nawo? Ndiwe unofanira kusarudza, kwete ini kuti chii chamunoziva, tiudzei." 
Job34:34 Vanhu vanonzwisisa vangatoti kwandiri nevangwaruwo vanondinzwa vangati," 
Job34:35 ‘Jobhu uyu haazivi zvaanotaura zvaanotaura hazvina kunzwisisa mukati. 
Job34:36 Dai zvavo Jobhu aongororwa kusvika pokupedzisira nokuti anopindura somunhu akaipa. 
Job34:37 Anotowedzera kupanduka pamusoro pechitadzo chake achitopamhidzira uipi pakati pake achitowanziridza mashoko ake okurwisana naMwari.’ ” 
Job35:1 Erihu akatizve," 
Job35:2 “Munofunga kuti zvakanaka here zvokuti makarurama pamberi paMwari?” 
Job35:3 Muchitoti zvenyu kwaari, “Hazvinei nemi uye zvinondibatsirei kana ndikakutadzirai Mwari kana ndikarega kukutadzirai.”" 
Job35:4 Ini ndichakupindurai pamwechete neshamwari dzenyu. 
Job35:5 Tarisai kudenga muone makore ari pamusoro kupinda imi. 
Job35:6 Kana mukatadzira Mwari chamunenge momurwadzisa ipapo chii? Kana kukanganisa kwenyu kukawanda iye chamunomuita chii? 
Job35:7 Chamunomuwanisa nokururama kwenyu chii? Chaanowana kwamuri chii? 
Job35:8 Uipi hwenyu hunorwadza mumwe munhu akaita semi, ururami hwenyu hunobatsira munhu." 
Job35:9 Pamusana poudzvinyiriri kwakawanda, vanhu vanochema vanochemera rubatsiro pamusana pechisimba choruoko rwavane simba." 
Job35:10 Asi hapana anoti, “Mwari Musiki wangu aripi iye anopa kuti vanhu vaimbe usiku." 
Job35:11 Iye anodzidzisa isu vanhu kupinda mhuka dzenyika achitiita isu vakangwara kupinda shiri dzedenga. 
Job35:12 Vanhu vanochema asi haapinduri pamusana pokuzvikudza kwavanhu vakaipa. 
Job35:13 Ichokwadiwoka kuti Mwari haateereri kuchema kusina maturo iye Samasimba haambozviitira hanya. 
Job35:14 Zvinobva zvatonyanya kuipa kana imi muchitoti zvenyu hamumuoni inga nyaya iri pamberi pake wani, chenyu imi kumirira zvenyu." 
Job35:15 Asi nokuti Mwari nehasha dzake haasi kuranga achiita seasingazivi zvake kukanganisa kwacho. 
Job35:16 Jobhu ndipo paanobva amwauka zvake kutaura achiondomoka zvake kutaura twakawanda twaasingazivi.” 
Job36:1 Erihu akaenderera mberi kutaura achiti," 
Job36:2 “Chimbondiitirai zvenyu mwoyo murefu. Ndikuratidzei kuti pachine zvimwe zvokutaura ndakamiririra Mwari 
Job36:3 zvandinoziva zvinosvika nokokoko. Ndicharatidza kuti musiki wangu mururami 
Job36:4 nokuti chokwadi chaizvo zvandinoreva hazvisi nhema. Wamunaye izvozvi ndoweruzivo rwakaperera. 
Job36:5 “Chinzwai munzwe Mwari ane simba uye haana waanoshora Mwari ishasha pasimba rokunzwisisa. 
Job36:6 Havaite kuti vakaipa varambe vari vapenyu, vanotambura anovapa zvavanofanira kuva nazvo." 
Job36:7 Ziso rake haribvi pamururami asi anovagadza namadzimambo pazvigaro zvoumambo anovagadza nokusingaperi vachizorumbidzwa. 
Job36:8 Kana vari muusungwa netambo, vakasungwa netambo dzezvinorwadza." 
Job36:9 Ipapo anovazivisa zvavakaita nezvavakanganisa nokuti vanenge vachizvikudza. 
Job36:10 Anovazarura nzeve kuzvidzidziso achiti vadzoke vachibva kuuipi. 
Job36:11 Vakateerera nokumushandira, vanopedza mazuva avo mukubudirira, uye makore avo mumutambaratede." 
Job36:12 Vakarega kuteerera, vanopera nebakatwa rehondo vachifa vasina zvavanoziva." 
Job36:13 Vasiri vanamati, mumwoyo mavo vanofarira hasha, havacheme kwaari kuti avabatsire kana avasunga." 
Job36:14 Vanofa vari vadiki, ndihwo upenyu hwacho pakati pemhombwe dzepatemberi." 
Job36:15 Asi Mwari anonunura vari munhamo nenhamo iyoyo achivazarura nzeve nokutambudzika ikoko. 
Job36:16 “Kunyange imi, ari kuda kukubvisai munhamo kuti akuisei munzvimbo yakafara isina kumanikana. Tafura yenyu yakanga yakazara nokudya." 
Job36:17 Imi makazadzisa mamuri kutongwa kwavaipi kutongwa noruenzaniso zvakuwanai. 
Job36:18 Chenjerai kunyengedzwa nepfumbamuromo kana kutsautswa noupfumi. 
Job36:19 Hazvina chimuko kuti mukumbire rubatsiro. Simba renyu rose harikwanisi kukubatsirai zvino. 
Job36:20 Musasuwire kuti usiku husvike nguva inotsakatiswa marudzi avanhu kubva mumisha yavo. 
Job36:21 Chenjera kuti usapindukire kune zvakaipa ndokusaka iye zvino uchiedzwa nenhamo. 
Job36:22 Tarisai muone kuti Mwari, anokudzwa kwazvo pasimba rake. Ndiani mudzidzisi akaita saiye?" 
Job36:23 Ndiani akamutaurira maitiro aangaite. Ndiani angati kwaari wakatadza? 
Job36:24 Rangarira kurumbidza mabasa ake akaimbwa navanhu. 
Job36:25 Munhu wose anoaona, munhu anoatarisa nokure." 
Job36:26 “Chinzwai munzwe, Mwari mukuru zvokuti hatimuzivi, kuwanda kwamakore ake hakuverengeki." 
Job36:27 Nokuti anoumba madonhwe emvura, ndimo mozobva mvura inonaya kusvika kumhute." 
Job36:28 Ndiyo yacho inozonaiwa namatenga ichidururika zvakanyanya pavanhu vose. 
Job36:29 Pane munhu anganzwisise here kupararira kunoita makore uye kuti munotinhira sei mukazumba kake ikako? 
Job36:30 Hauone here kumwararisa kwaanoita mheni paari? Inozadza kunyange hwaro hwegungwa. 
Job36:31 Ndizvo zvaanotonga nazvo vanhu achipa vanhu chokudya chakawanda. 
Job36:32 Anozadza mheni muchanza achiiti irove paanoda kuti irove. 
Job36:33 Kudhiriridza kwayo kunoyambira kuuya kwedutu, kunyange mombe dzinonzwa kuti iri kuuya.”" 
Job37:1 Izvozvi zvinoita kuti mwoyo wangu udedere zvokutenge uchasvetuka panzvimbo pawo. 
Job37:2 Dotererai munzwe kutinhira kwezwi rake, maungira anobva mumuromo wake," 
Job37:3 Anoati tupfunu nedenga rose, nemheni yake inosvika kumativi ose enyika." 
Job37:4 Mushure mayo izwi rake rinotinhira anoriridza nezizwi rake rinoremekedzwa mheni haaidzore kana izwi rake ranzwika. 
Job37:5 Mwari anodzvova nezwi rinoshamisa. Anoita zvishamiso zvatisingakwanisi kunzwisisa 
Job37:6 nokuti anoti chando ngachidonhe panyika anotiwo kuhore kana mvura yokunaya ngainaye zvine simba. 
Job37:7 Anombomisa vanhu mabasa amaoko avo kuitira kuti munhu wose azive mabasa ake. 
Job37:8 Ipapo zvikara zvinotombopinda mumatanga azvo zvichitombogara imomo mumapako azvo. 
Job37:9 Dutu remhepo rinobva kumaodzanyemba nemhepo yechando inovhuvhuta ichibva kuchamhembe. 
Job37:10 Nezwi raMwari kunouya chando mvura yakapararira inogwamba nokukurumidza. 
Job37:11 Anozadza makore makobvu nemvura makorewo achiwadzura mheni uko nokoko. 
Job37:12 Makore anopidiguka-pidiguka achipishinuka kuenda nerimwe divi achitungamirirwa naMwari kuitira kuti aite zvose zvaanenge ati aite pasi pasi panogara vanhu. 
Job37:13 Anoita kuti zviitike kunyika yake, iri shamhu kana mwoyochena wake." 
Job37:14 Teerera unzwe iwe Jobhu. Dai ukamboti mirei urangarire mabasa aMwari anoshamisa. 
Job37:15 Unoziva here kuti Mwari anoatonga sei nokuita kuti mheni ipenye mumakore? 
Job37:16 “Unoziva here kuti makore anoyangarara sei mudenga umu, basa roruzivo ruzere rwaMwari." 
Job37:17 Iwe unodikitira muhembe dzako pamusana pemhepo yokumaodzanyemba. 
Job37:18 Ungakwanise here iwe kuita zvaanoita zvokutambanudza ziendanakuenda redenga, rakaomarara sechiringiriro choutare hwakaita zvokunyungurutswa?" 
Job37:19 Chitiudza zvokumutaurira, hapana chatinokwanisa kuronga nokuda kwerima ratiri." 
Job37:20 Zvandinotaura handiti zvinosvitswa kwaari, kungatova kuzvitsvagira kuparadzwa ikoko." 
Job37:21 Pane nguva dzokuti cheidza chinenge chisingaoneki chakadzivirirwa namakore kusvikira mhepo yapfuura ichiabvisa. 
Job37:22 Kuchamhembe kunobuda ruvara runenge ndarama, chiremera chinenge chiri chaMwari chinotyisa." 
Job37:23 Samasimba, asingabatiki, ari pamusorosoro apo nesimba aine ruenzaniso, noururami hwakawanda asina waanokanganisira." 
Job37:24 Ndokusaka vanhu vachimuremekedza iyewo asingambotarisi zvake munhu anozvitora.” 
Job38:1 Zvino Tenzi akazopindura Jobhu mukati medutu remhepo achiti," 
Job38:2 “Ndianikowo zvake iyeyu anopinza zano murima nokutaura kwake kusina ruzivo," 
Job38:3 chipfeka zvino uite somurume ndikubvunze, iwe unditaurire." 
Job38:4 “Wakanga uri kupi iwe pandaidzika ugaro hwenyika? Taura zvako kana uchinzwisisa. 
Job38:5 Ndiani akaisa miganhu yayo nokuti unozivaka iwe? Kana kuti ndiani akaiera netambo? 
Job38:6 Ugaro hwayo hwakadzikwa pai, ndiani akaisa dombo rapakona," 
Job38:7 Nyenyedzi dzemambakwedza padzakaimba pamwechete vana vaMwari pavakapururudza norufaro? 
Job38:8 “Ndiani akazarira gungwa nemakonhi, parakanga richangobva mukuberekwa?" 
Job38:9 Pandakaita kuti makore ave hanzu dzaro nerima rakati kwirindindi kuti riiputire 
Job38:10 ndikariisira miganhu nezvihuri nemakonhi 
Job38:11 ndikati, ‘Apa ndipo paunogumira kwete kupfuura ipapa uye kuti masaisai ako anozvitutumadza ndipo paanomirira.’" 
Job38:12 “Wati wamboti mangwanani avepo here kubvira nokubvira kwoupenyu hwako nokupa mambakwedza chinzvimbo chawo," 
Job38:13 asvike kuti abate kwakaperera nyika vakaipa vazunzwemo 
Job38:14 achiasandura kuva matsvuku sekutsvukisa kunoita chidhindo pamunyakwe ichipindurwa ruvara sehanzu? 
Job38:15 Vakaipa vanobva vambotorerwa mwenje wavo simba ramaoko avo richimbomiswa. 
Job38:16 “Wati wambopinda here muzvisipiti zvegungwa, kana kufambawo zvako muhwenje hwakadzama?" 
Job38:17 Wati wambozarurirwa here misuo yorufu kana kuona makonhi okurima rakati ndoo? 
Job38:18 Unonyatsozivisisa here iwe upamhi hwenyika? Nditaurire kana uchiziva. 
Job38:19 “Nzira inoenda kumusha wechiedza ndeipi nokunogara rima ndokupi? 
Job38:20 Waigonaka kutondozviisa kunzvimbo yazvo, unozivaka iwe nzira yokumusha kwazvo." 
Job38:21 Unoziva iwe nokuti ipapo wakanga watoberekwa, nokuti nguva youpenyu hwako yakareba." 
Job38:22 “Wakambopinda here mudura ramazaya echando, kana kudura rechivhuramahwe," 
Job38:23 zvandakachengetera nguva yokunge zvinhu zvaipa, nguva yehondo nokurwa?" 
Job38:24 Unoziva here nzira inopararaniswa nayo chiedza uye kuti mhepo yokumabvazuva inoparadzirwa sei panyika. 
Job38:25 Ndiani akachera migero yemvura yamapopopo, napanofamba namabhanan'ana?" 
Job38:26 Achinaisa mvura panyika isina ari kugarapo, mugwenga musina munhu." 
Job38:27 Achinyorovesa renje zvaro rakaoma achiita kuti ivhu rimere uswa 
Job38:28 mvura inonaya ina baba here, ndiani akabereka madonhwe edova?" 
Job38:29 Mazaya echando akabva mumimba maani? Ndiani akabereka chando chinochena chedenga? 
Job38:30 Mvura inogwamba kuita sedombo pamusoro pehwenje hwegungwa panogwamba. 
Job38:31 “Unogona here iwe kusunga tambo dzenyenyedzi dzechinyamutanhatu, kana kusunungura tambo dzenyenyedzi dzechinyamutatu?" 
Job38:32 Unogona here kutungamirira boka renyenyedzi nemakwara aro? Ungatungamirire hweva navana vayo here? 
Job38:33 Unoziva here mitemo yamatenga, ungadzike here mitemo yawo panyika?" 
Job38:34 Ungadaidzire here kumakor? uchiaudza kuti mvura zhinji ikufukidze. 
Job38:35 Unogona here kutumira mheni kuti dziende, idzo dzichiti tiri pano?" 
Job38:36 Ndiani akaisa ungwaru mumakore kana kupa kunzwisisa kumhute? 
Job38:37 Ndiani nenjere dzake angaverenge makore kana angarereke maguchu iwayo amatenga? 
Job38:38 Nyika ichibva yanyongodeka kuva chinhu chimwechete madhaka achikurumidza kubatana. Zvishamiso zvemhuka dzesango. 
Job38:39 “Ungavhimire here mhuka, shumba, kana kugutsa nhomba yeshumba dzechidiki?" 
Job38:40 Padzinoti hwatata mumapako adzo kana padzinovanda muuswa. 
Job38:41 Ndiani anopa rukodzi nyama vana varwo pavanochemera kuna Mwari vachidzungaira pamusana pokushaya chokudya?” 
Job39:1 “Unoziva here nguva inobereka ngururu? Wakamboona here mhara painobereka? 
Job39:2 Wati wamboverenga here mwedzi yadzinotora? Unoziva here nguva yadzinozobereka," 
Job39:3 padzinogodama dzavakubereka, dzichisungunuka pamutowo wadzo?" 
Job39:4 Vana vadzo vanokura musango, vanozoenda uye havazodzoka kwavari." 
Job39:5 “Ndiani akapa dhongi romusango rusununguko rwarinarwo? Ndiani akasunungura makashu embizi? 
Job39:6 Ndakaripa renje kuti rive musha waro, mapani omunyu kuti ave pokugara paro." 
Job39:7 Rinotoseka zvaro bongozozo romuguta, hariteerere kuzhamba kwomuchairi." 
Job39:8 Makomo arinombeya nawo ndiwo ufuro hwaro richitsvaka chose chinomera chinyoro. 
Job39:9 “Nyati ingabvume here kukubatira basa, ingabvume here kuve muchidyiro chako?" 
Job39:10 Ungaibope mumuforo nezvitorobho here kana iyo kukuharira bani ichikutevera? 
Job39:11 Ungavimbe here nesimba rayo guru, ungairege ichikuitira basa here?" 
Job39:12 Ungavimbe nayo here kuti inodzoka, ichiuya nembeswa dzako kuburiro?" 
Job39:13 “Mapapiro emhou anobhabhama nomufaro minhenga namanhenga ayo zvakafanana here nezveshuramurove? 
Job39:14 Inosia mazai ayo pasi kuti adziiswe pavhu," 
Job39:15 ichikanganwa kuti rutsoka rungaapwanya, mhuka dzesango dzingaatsokodzere." 
Job39:16 Inobata vana vayo zvino utsinye sokunge vasiri vana vayo kunyange zvichizoita kuti basa rayo rive risina chimuko asi haityi," 
Job39:17 nokuti Mwari akainyima ungwaru, akarega kuipa mugove wokunzwisisa." 
Job39:18 Asi ikati fukusu kutiza inotoseka zvayo bhiza nomutasvi waro. 
Job39:19 “Ndiwe unopa bhiza simba raro here? Ndiwe here unoripa mutsipa waro simba? 
Job39:20 Ndiwe here unoripa kuchirika semhashu, kufemuruka kwaro kunotyisa?" 
Job39:21 Rinogiga pasi mubani, rinozvitora nesimba raro. Rinoenda kundosangana nezvombo zvokurwa." 
Job39:22 Kutya rinokuseka, uye harivhunduki. Haridzokeri shure nokutya bakatwa." 
Job39:23 Goba remiseve rinongwerengwedza kumusana kwaro. Pamwechete nepfumo rinopenya nepfumo diki. 
Job39:24 Rinozuzuma namanyawi rigopedza pasi, harimiri kana hwamanda yarira." 
Job39:25 Panorira hwamanda harizobatiki ari kure anonzwa hondo kunhuhwa, kuriridza nokuzhamba nokukaradza kwavatungamiri vehondo." 
Job39:26 “Ungwaru hwako here hunoita kuti rukodzi rubhururuke ruchitambanudzira mapapiro arwo kuenda kumaodzanyemba? 
Job39:27 Ndiwe unoudza gondo kuti ribhururuke muchadenga here kuti rinoita dendere raro pamusoro? 
Job39:28 Rinondogara padombo richiita musha waro pamawere edombo rine man'an'a. 
Job39:29 Ndoparinonyatsocherechedza nyama yaro, ziso rinoiona riri kure." 
Job39:30 Kunyange vana varo vanosveta ropa, panenge pangofa chinhu iro riripo.”" 
Job40:1 Mwari akaenderera mberi kupindura Jobhu achiti," 
Job40:2 “Iye anoita gakava naSamasimba acharegera here? Iye anotsoropodza Mwari ngaapindure.” 
Job40:3 Jobhu akapindura Tenzi achiti: 
Job40:4 “Ndiri chiiwo zvangu, chii chandingapindurewo? Changu kungangova kungobata muromo wangu." 
Job40:5 Ndakataura kamwechete ikako ndikako, handichapinduri. Ndakaita ruviri, handichaitazve.”" 
Job40:6 Ipapo Mwari akapindura Jobhu mudutu remhepo achiti," 
Job40:7 “Chipfeka zvino uite somurume ndikubvunze, iwe unditaurire." 
Job40:8 Wava kutoti ururami hwangu hauna maturoka iwe? Wavakutondipa mhosvaka iwe kuti uzviti wakarurama? 
Job40:9 Ruoko rwako runesimba raMwari here? Ungadzvove here sezvaanoita? 
Job40:10 Ko zvino chipfekaka chiremera chako noukuru, chipfeka mbiri nokurumbidzwa kwako." 
Job40:11 Hasha dzako ngadziputike utarise munhu wose anozvikudza umuninipise. 
Job40:12 Tarisa munhu wose anozvitutumadza umudukupise utsokodzere vakaipa pavari ipapo. 
Job40:13 Vavige vose pamwechete muvhu uvapombere uso muguva. 
Job40:14 Kana iniwo ndingatozobvuma kuti nesimba roruoko rwako rworudyi unogona kuzviponesa. 
Job40:15 “Tarisa uone mvuu yandakasika sewe inofura sora semombe. 
Job40:16 Kusimba here ikoko kwayakaita muchiuno chayo! Nairo simba renyama dzepadumbu payo. 
Job40:17 Muswe wayo unoomarara somusidhari. Marunda ezvidya zvayo akanyatsorukana. 
Job40:18 Mapfupa ayo akaita sepombi dzendarira mbabvu dzayo mibhadha zvayo yesimbi. 
Job40:19 Ndiyo yokutanga pazvisikwa zvaMwari, Musiki wayo ndiye chete anogona kuisvikira nebakatwa." 
Job40:20 Makomo anoipa zvibereko zvawo munotamba mhuka dzose dzesango. 
Job40:21 Inorara pasi pomuti womunzwa yakahwanda mujakata retsanga nomumajahwi. 
Job40:22 Muti womunzwa ndiwo unoipa mumvuri yakatenderedzwa nomusambagwena. 
Job40:23 Kana rwizi rwuzere iyo haimbovhunduki. Kunyange rwizi rweJorodhani rukaisvika pamuromo, iyo haitirimuki." 
Job40:24 Munhu angaibate nechirauro kana kuboora mhuno dzayo nechokuteesa?” 
Job41:1 “Ungagone kuzapura zigaranyanya nechirauro here, kana kuribata rurimi nomusungo here?" 
Job41:2 Ungagone here kusungirira tambo mumhuno dzaro? Kana kubaya dama raro nechirauro? 
Job41:3 Ringakuteterere here? Ringaite zvokukunyengetedza here? 
Job41:4 Ringaite chitsidzirano newe here kuti rive muranda wako nokusingaperi? 
Job41:5 Ungatambe naro here sokutamba kwaungaite neshiri kana kurisungirira pambambo kuti uvaraidze vasikana naro? 
Job41:6 Vashambadzi vangaritengeserane here? Vatengesi vangarichekane here? 
Job41:7 Ungazadze here ganda raro namapfumo enzeve, kana musoro waro namapfumo okuraurisa?" 
Job41:8 Ingoribata chete uone mabimbiri aunoita naro. Hauzozvipamhidzazve. 
Job41:9 Zvokuripingudza hazviiti. Iko kungoriona chete kunokuzadza nokutya. 
Job41:10 Hapana anogona kuridenha ndiani zvino angamirisane neni? 
Job41:11 Ndiani wandine chikwereti naye? Wandinofanira kudzorera. Chinhu chose chiri pasi pedenga ndechangu. 
Job41:12 Handinganyarare nezvemakumbo ake kana nesimba rake guru kana nezvechimiro chake chakarurama. 
Job41:13 Ndiani angaripfekenure ganda raro rokunze kana kubaya ganda raro rakapetwa kaviri. 
Job41:14 Ndiani angafare kuzarura makonhi ouso hwaro panotyisa kudaro nemazino akati checheteere kutenderedza? 
Job41:15 Musana waro wakaitwa nemitsara yenhowo dzakarundana sedzakanamatidzwa. 
Job41:16 Dzikabatana zvokuti hapana mweya ungapinde pakati pawo. 
Job41:17 Akabatana-batana zvokurundana zvokuti hadzikwanisi kuparadzaniswa. 
Job41:18 Kuhetsura kwaro kunobarika moto maziso aro akaita samafungiro amangwanani. 
Job41:19 Mukanwa maro munobuda marimi emoto mapfarivari emoto anorauka imomo. 
Job41:20 Mumhuno dzaro munopfumbuka utsi sounobva muhari inovira yangandutswa netsanga. 
Job41:21 Femo raro rinobakisa moto wamasimbe rimi romoto rinobuda mumuromo maro. 
Job41:22 Simba riri mumutsipa waro pariri panotyisa. 
Job41:23 Mafinyamafinyama omuviri waro akabatana-batana zvakasimba akasimba uye haazunguziki. 
Job41:24 Mwoyo waro wedombo hautyi sokuoma kwakaita guyo. 
Job41:25 Parinosimuka kunyange vakasimba vanotya parinobvundura. 
Job41:26 Bakatwa rinorisvika harina charinoriita kunyange pfumo kana museve kana pfumo zvaro renzeve. 
Job41:27 Simbi rinoiita samashanga ndarira sehuni yakaora. 
Job41:28 Miseve hariiti kuti ritize, matombo erekeni akaita sehundi kwariri." 
Job41:29 Tsvimbo kwairi yakaita seshanga. Rinotoseka zvaro kungwerengwedza kwamapfumo. 
Job41:30 Pasi paro pakaita sezvimedu zvepoto zvakapinza. Rinoti kwandekwande pamadhaka sechirhei chokupurisa. 
Job41:31 Rinoita kuti pasi pasi pavire sehari uye gungwa sepoto yamafuta. 
Job41:32 Rinosia mushure maro mutsetse wemvura wakachena; ungafunge kuti hwenje hune mvere. 
Job41:33 Panyika hapana chakafanana naro, chisikwa chisingatyi." 
Job41:34 Rinozvidza chinhu chiri chose chakakura ndimambo wazvose zvinozvitutumadza.” 
Job42:1 Jobhu akapindura Tenzi achiti," 
Job42:2 “Ndinoziva kuti munokwanisa kuita zvinhu zvose uye kuti pazvinhu zvose hapana chingakudzivisei kuita zvamunenge muchida kuita. 
Job42:3 Munobvunza kuti ndianiwo zvake iyeyu anovandisa urongwa nokutaura kwake kusina ruzivo? Ichokwadi kuti ndakataura ndisina runzwisiso, zvinhu zvakadzamisisa kwazvo kwandiri zvandanga ndisizingazivi" 
Job42:4 chiteererai ndichitaura ndichakubvunzai imi munditaurire. 
Job42:5 Ndakanga ndichingokunzwai nenzeve asi zvino ndinokuonai namaziso. 
Job42:6 Naizvozvo zvose zvandakataura ndiri kutonyara nazvo uye ndinopinduka ndiri muhuruva namadota.” 
Job42:7 Kuzoti Tenzi apedza kutaura mazwi aya kuna Jobhu akati kuna Erifasi Mutemani, “Ndinokuvirukirai nehasha iwe neshamwari dzako mbiri nokuti hamuna kutaura zvakarurama nezvangu sezvakaitwa nomuranda wangu Jobhu." 
Job42:8 Chitotorai zvenyu handira nomwe nohondohwe nomwe muende nadzo kumuranda wangu Jobhu muzvipirire mupiro wokupisa. Muranda wangu Jobhu achakunamatirai nokuti munamato wake ndichaugamuchira kuti ndirege kukuitirai zvinowirirana noupenzi hwenyu nokuti imi hamuna kutaura zvakarurama nezvangu somuranda wangu Jobhu.” 
Job42:9 Naizvozvo Erifasi Mutemani, naBhiridhadhi muShuhi, naZofa muNaamati vakaenda vakandoita zvavakaudzwa naTenzi. Tenzi akagamuchira munamato waJobhu." 
Job42:10 Tenzi akadzorera Jobhu upfumi hwake paakanamatira shamwari dzake. Tenzi akapa Jobhu zvakapetwa kaviri pane zvaakanga anazvo. 
Job42:11 Vakomanavanun'una vake nehanzvadzi dzake navamwe vose vaimuziva vakauya kwaari kuzodya naye. Vakamunzwira urombo vakamunyaradza pane zvakaipa zvose zvakanga zvaunzwa naTenzi pavari. Mumwe nomumwe wavo akavapa mari neringi rendarama. 
Job42:12 Tenzi akakomborera mazuva aJobhu omushure kutokunda okutanga. Akazova nehwai zvihuru gumi nezvina, nengamera zvihuru zvitanhatu, nezvipani zvenzombe churu, namadhongi makadzi churu." 
Job42:13 Akaita vana vakomana vanomwe navasikana vatatu. 
Job42:14 Akatumidza wokutanga zita rokuti Jemima, wechipiri akamuti Keziya, wechitatu akamupa zita rokuti Kerenihapuku." 
Job42:15 Pasi pakanga pasina vakadzi vakanaka uso kudarika vanasikana vaJobhu. Baba vakavapa mugove pamwechete nehanzvadzi dzavo. 
Job42:16 Mushure maizvozvi Jobhu akagara zana namakumi mana amakore. Akaona vana vake, navana vavana vake kusvika kuchizvarwa chechina." 
Job42:17 Jobhu akazofa achembera anyatsokwegura. 
Psalms1:1 Akakomborerwa munhu asingafambi panorangana vakaipa. Kana kuva munzira yavatadzi, kana kugara panogara vanonyomba," 
Psalms1:2 asi kuti anotofarira mutemo waTENZI uye anorangaririra mutemo waTENZI siku nesikati. 
Psalms1:3 Akaita somuti wakasimwa pamahombekombe erwizi unobereka muchero wawo panguva yawo uri muti usingauni mashizha. Zvose zvaanoita zvinobudirira. 
Psalms1:4 Asi hazvisirizvo zvakaita vakaipa, vakaita sehundi inopeperetswa nemhepo." 
Psalms1:5 Naizvozvo padare rokutongwa, vakaipa havapamiri uye vatadzi mugungano ravakarurama havamumiri." 
Psalms1:6 Nokuti TENZI ane hanya nenzira yavakarurama asi nzira yavakaipa ichaparara. 
Psalms2:1 Ko ivo vechirudzi, vanodirei kuti ungaunga, vachiita bope marudzi avanhu achidai kuita bangano risina maturo." 
Psalms2:2 Madzimambo apasi ari kunyatsoungana, uye vatongi vari kuitira TENZI nomuzodzwa wake musangano, vachiti:" 
Psalms2:3 “Ngatidamburei zvitorobho zvavo titakanurire uko tambo dzavo.” 
Psalms2:4 Iye agere kumatenga anovaseka zvake TENZI anovaita chiseko chaicho. 
Psalms2:5 Ndipo paachazotaura kwavari zvehasha achivavhundutsira nokuviruka kwake nehasha. 
Psalms2:6 Achiti, “Ini ndini ndakagadza mambo wangu paZioni, gomo rangu rinoera." 
Psalms2:7 Ndichataura pachena chirevo chaTENZI akanditi iwe ndiwe mwanakomana wangu, nhasi ndakubereka." 
Psalms2:8 Ndikumbire zvako ndigokupa marudzi avanhu kuti ave nhaka yako kunyange nyika, kusvika nokwainoperera kuti ive yako." 
Psalms2:9 Uchavatyora netsvimbo yesimbi ugovapwanya kuti mwarara somudziyo womuumbi wehari. 
Psalms2:10 Zvino imi madzimambo, ngwarai, inzwai kuyambirwa kwamunoitwa, imi vatongi venyika." 
Psalms2:11 Shandirai TENZI muchimutya," 
Psalms2:12 mudederei pamunomuremekedza. Angadaro akashatirwa mukaparara munzira nokuti haatane kushatirwa. Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanopotera maari.” 
Psalms3:1 Rwiyo rwaDhavhidhi paaitiza mwana wake Abhusaromu. Nhai TENZI, kuwanda here ikoko kwakaita mhandu dzangu! Vazhinji vavakundimukira." 
Psalms3:2 Vazhinji vari kunditi, “Mwari haambomubatsira.” Dzepfunde" 
Psalms3:3 Asi kwandiri imi TENZI ndimi nhoo yangu. Ndimi mbiri yangu, uye ndimi munoita kuti ndisimudze musoro." 
Psalms3:4 Ndinodaidzira nezwi rangu kuna TENZI? Iye achandipindura ari mugomo rake rinoera. Dzepfunde 
Psalms3:5 Ndinongoti pasi rarei ndobva ndakotsira. Ndozomukazve nokuti TENZI anondichengeta. 
Psalms3:6 Handityi zviuru zvavanhu zvakazanirana, zvavanhu varongana vakandikomba, vanoda kundirwisa."
