Psalms3:7 Simukai TENZI, ndinunureiwo Mwari wangu nokuti imi, munorova mhandu dzangu dzose padama. Vakaipa munovagura meno." 
Psalms3:8 TENZI ndiye anonunura. Chikomborero chenyu ngachive pavanhu venyu. Dzepfunde 
Psalms4:1 Kumuimbisi ane zvokuimbisa zvine tambo dzewaya. Rwiyo rwaDhavhidhi. Pandinodanidzira, ndipindureiwo, imi Mwari anorwira zvandinokodzera. Pandakanga ndapinda nhamo, makandifaranutsa. Ndiitireiwo mwoyochena munzwe munamato wangu." 
Psalms4:2 Nhaimi vanhu, kusvikira riniko muchirerutsa chiremera changu? Kuchasvikira rini muchifarira mashoko asina maturo nokufarira kuva vanazinyepera? Dzepfunde" 
Psalms4:3 Asi zivai kuti TENZI akazvitsaurira vakarurama. TENZI anondinzwa pandinodana kwaari. 
Psalms4:4 Shushikanai zvenyu asi musatadze. Rangarirai mumwoyo menyu pauvato hwenyu munyarare. Dzepfunde 
Psalms4:5 Pirai zvibayiro kwazvo muvimbe naTENZI. 
Psalms4:6 Kuna vazhinji, vanoti, dai waro zvinhu zvatinakira, mativhenekerawo nokupenya kwouso hwenyu, imi TENZI." 
Psalms4:7 Makaisa rufaro mumwoyo mangu kupinda vanhu kana vawana matutu matutu embeswanwa nebvachapfacha rewaini. 
Psalms4:8 Zvose kurara nokukotsira ndinozviwana murugare nokuti imi moga, ndimi TENZI munoita kuti ndigare ndakagarikana." 
Psalms5:1 Kumuimbisi anezvokuimbisa zvine hungiso. Rwiyo rwaDhavhidhi. TENZI, teererai zvandinotaura, rangarirai kuungudza kwangu." 
Psalms5:2 Inzwai izwi rokuchema kwangu, Mwari wangu naMambo wangu nokuti ndinonamata kwamuri." 
Psalms5:3 TENZI, mangwanani, munonzwa izwi rangu. Kumangwanani, ndinokugadzirirai chibayiro ndomirira." 
Psalms5:4 Nokuti hamusi Mwari anofarira uipi, uipi haugone kuita musha pamwechete nemi." 
Psalms5:5 Vanozvikudza havangagoni kumira pamberi penyu, munovenga vaiti vose vezvakaipa." 
Psalms5:6 Munoparadza vanotaura nhema TENZI anovenga vanhu vanoda kudeura ropa navanhu vanonyengedza. 
Psalms5:7 Asi pamusana pemwoyochena wenyu wakawanda; ndichapinda mumba menyu. Ndichanamata ndichikuremekedzai ndakaringira kuTemberi yenyu inoera. 
Psalms5:8 Nditungamirireiwo TENZI, nokururama kwenyu, nokuti ndine mhandu. Ndijekesereiwo nzira yamunoda kuti ndifambe nayo." 
Psalms5:9 Nokuti hapana chavanotaura chechokwadi. Zviri pamwoyo pavo chaizvo ndezvokuda kuparadza; gurokuro ravo iguva rakashama vanonyengedza norurimi rwavo. 
Psalms5:10 Ngavabatwe nemhosva yavo, Mwari. Zvavakarangana izvozvo zvivaputsire pasi. Pamusana pezvikanganiso zvavo zvakawanda, vadzingei nokuti vakakupandukirai." 
Psalms5:11 Asi vanopotera mamuri ngavafare, varambe vachiimba nomufaro. Imiwo vadzivirirei, kuitira kuti vanoda zita renyu vapembere nokufara mamuri." 
Psalms5:12 Nokuti imi TENZI munokomborera mururami, munomudzivirira senhoo nemweya wenyu wakanaka." 
Psalms6:1 Muimbisi, urwu rwiyo rwunoimbwa navane zvokuimbisa zvine tambo dzewaya zvinoimba netambo yechisere yamahon'era. Rumbo rwaDhavhidhi. TENZI musanditsiure muine hasha, kana kundiranga makashatirwa." 
Psalms6:2 Ndiitireiwo tsiye nyoro, TENZI nokuti ndapera simba TENZI, ndirapeiwo nokuti mapfupa angu apera basa." 
Psalms6:3 Mweya wanguwo wapinda nhamo; asi nhai, TENZI, kusvikira rini chaizvo?" 
Psalms6:4 Dzokai TENZI mundiponese. Ndinunurei pamusana pemwoyochena wenyu. 
Psalms6:5 Nokuti kana munhu afa haakuyeukei; ndiani angakurumbidzei munzvimbo yavakafa. 
Psalms6:6 Ndaneta nokuchema, usiku hoga hoga, ndinonyorovesa mubhedha wangu nemisodzi yangu. Ndinonyorovesa uvato hwangu nokuchema kwangu." 
Psalms6:7 Maziso angu arezuka nokurwadziwa mwoyo; anoshaya simba pamusana pemhandu dzangu dzose. 
Psalms6:8 Ibvai kwandiri imi vaiti vezvakaipa nokuti TENZI akanzwa izwi rokuhwihwidza kwangu. 
Psalms6:9 TENZI akanzwa chichemo changu. TENZI akagamuchira munamto wangu. 
Psalms6:10 Vavengi vangu vose vachanyara vagotambudzwa zvinorwadza? Vachadzoka vagonyadziswa pakarepo. 
Psalms7:1 Rwiyo rwokuchema kuna Mwari. Kuungudza kwaDhavhidhi kwaakaita kuna TENZI nezvaKushi wedzinza rokwaBhenjamini. TENZI Mwari wangu, mamuri ndimo mandinopotera. Ndiponeseiwo kune vanondironda mundinunure," 
Psalms7:2 vangadaro vakandibvambura-bvambura seshumba vakandizvuzvurudza pasina anondinunura. 
Psalms7:3 TENZI Mwari wangu kana pane chandakaita, kana ndakabata chakaipa namaoko angu," 
Psalms7:4 kana ndakadzorera mumwe wangu nechakaipa kana kupamba mhandu yangu pasina chikonzero," 
Psalms7:5 muvengi ngaandironde andibate atsokodzere zvake upenyu hwangu muvhu anditi rabada muhuruva. Dzepfunde 
Psalms7:6 Simukai TENZI nehasha dzenyu; zvisimudzei murwise vavengi vangu vane hasha. Mukai Mwari wangu, ndimi makatema wani kuti pave neruenzaniso." 
Psalms7:7 Gungano ramarudzi avanhu ngarikuunganirei. Imi pamusoro pegungano iroro mugare pachigaro chenyu chapamusoro. 
Psalms7:8 TENZI ndiye anotonga marudzi avanhu. TENZI ratidzai kuti ndakarurama uye kuti ndiri pachokwadi. 
Psalms7:9 Uipi hwavakaipa ngaupere, asi vakarurama vabudirire, imi munoedza pfungwa nomwoyo yavanhu, imi Mwari akarurama." 
Psalms7:10 Mwari ndiye nhoo yangu anonunura vano mwoyo yakarurama. 
Psalms7:11 Mwari mutongi akarurama; pane mhosva anoti pane mhosva mazuva ose. 
Psalms7:12 Kana munhu akasapinduka, Mwari anorodza bakatwa rake anotatamura nokukunga uta hwake," 
Psalms7:13 anogadzirira zvombo zvake zvinouraya agoita kuti miseve yake ive moto moto. 
Psalms7:14 Wakaipa anofunga zvakaipa agoti shutu kuzara nomusikanzwa ozoburitsa nhema. 
Psalms7:15 Anochera hunza, woifonon'ona ozowira mugomba raachera iroro." 
Psalms7:16 Musikanzwa wake unomupfukira utsinye hwake hunomukoromokera. 
Psalms7:17 Ndinotenda TENZI noruenzaniso rwake. Ndicharumbidza zita raTENZI Wokumusorosoro. 
Psalms8:1 Ukuru ukuru hwezita raMwari nechiremera chomunhu TENZI Mwari wedu hakusi kukura ikoko kwakaita zita renyu pasi pose zvapo. Imi mune mbiri inorumbidzwa kumusoro kwamatenga 
Psalms8:2 nemiromo yavacheche neyepwere, makaisa chokuzvidzivirira nacho kumhandu dzenyu, kudzimura vavengi navatsividzi." 
Psalms8:3 Ndikati tarisei zvangu kumatenga enyu, amakaita neminwe yenyu, mwedzi nenyenyedzi zvamakaisamo? Ndinoti:" 
Psalms8:4 “Munhu chiiwo zvake wamunorangarira, iye munhuwo zvake wamunochengeta" 
Psalms8:5 asi imi makatoita kuti munhu asiye paduku duku kuti ave saMwari. Muchimupa chiremba chembiri norukudzo. 
Psalms8:6 Makaita kuti ave ndiye anotonga mabasa amaoko enyu, mukaisa zvinhu zvose pasi petsoka dzake," 
Psalms8:7 zvose: hwai nemombe uyewo mhuka dzomusango 
Psalms8:8 neshiri dzedenga nehove dzegungwa dzinofamba nomunzira dzomugungwa. 
Psalms8:9 TENZI Mwari wedu hakusi kukura ikoko kwakaita zita renyu.” 
Psalms9:1 Kutenda Mwari ruenzaniso rwake Ndinotenda TENZI nomwoyo wangu wose. Ndichaparidza mabasa enyu anoshamisa; 
Psalms9:2 ndichafara nokupembera mamuri. Ndicharumbidza zita renyu imi Wokumusorosoro. 
Psalms9:3 Kana mhandu dzangu dzopishinuka kudzoka, dzinodzadzarika dzoparara, mberi kwenyu." 
Psalms9:4 Nokuti makandirwira pane zvandinokodzera nezvandinochemera, makagara pachigaro chenyu chokutonga muchitonga zvakarurama." 
Psalms9:5 Makapa vechirudzi mhosva mukaparadza vakaipa, makadzimawo zita ravo narini narini." 
Psalms9:6 Vavengi vakatsvairwa; vava matongo nokusingaperi. Maguta avo angove matongo zvokurangarirwa havachamborangarirwa. 
Psalms9:7 TENZI anogara pachigaro chake chokutonga nokusingaperi, akadzika chigaro chake choumambo kuti atonge." 
Psalms9:8 Uye, anotonga pasi pose zvakarurama anotongawo marudzi avanhu pachokwadi." 
Psalms9:9 TENZI ndiye nzvimbo yokupotera yavanhu vanodzvinyirirwa ndiye nzvimbo yokupotera panguva yenhamo. 
Psalms9:10 Vanoziva zita renyu vanovimba nemi nokuti imi TENZI hamufuratiri vanokutsvakai. 
Psalms9:11 Pururudzirai TENZI anogara muZioni. Paridzirai vanhu zviito zvake. 
Psalms9:12 Nokuti, iye, anotsividza ropa radeurwa, anovayeuka. Haakanganwi kuchema kwavari munhamo." 
Psalms9:13 Ndinzwireiwo tsitsi TENZI. Tarisai muone zvandinotambudzwa nazvo navanondivenga. Imi munonditakanura pamuromo worufu 
Psalms9:14 kuti ndiparidze mbiri yenyu uye kuti pamisuo yomukunda, guta reZioni, ndifarire ruponeso rwenyu." 
Psalms9:15 Marudzi akawira mugomba ravakazvicherera vakabatwa gumbo mumambure avakaviga ivo pachavo. 
Psalms9:16 TENZI anozviratidza agotonga, vakaipa vachiteiwa nezvavanoita namaoko avo. Moimbira pasi, Dzepfunde" 
Psalms9:17 Vakaipa vachadzokera kunzvimbo yavakafa. Marudzi ose anokanganwa Mwari. 
Psalms9:18 Varombo havachakanganwiki nokusingaperi; chitarisiro chavatamburi hachiparari zvachose. 
Psalms9:19 Simukai TENZI, musakundwe nomunhu; vechirudzi ngavatongwe pamberi penyu." 
Psalms9:20 Vatyisei TENZI, marudzi azive kuti vanongova vanhu. Dzepfunde." 
Psalms10:1 Ko munomirireiko kure nhai TENZI? Ko munozvivanzireiko panguva yenhamo? 
Psalms10:2 Munhu wakaipa anototi sika sika zvake kudzingirira murombo. Itai kuti vabatwe nemisungo yavakazviteera 
Psalms10:3 nokuti munhu akaipa anotozvirovera dundundu havi dzake. Munhu ana makaro anoshonha nokuramba TENZI. 
Psalms10:4 Munhu wakaipa, nokuzvikudza kwake, muna zvose zvaanofunga haana basa naTENZI, anoti, “Hakuna Mwari.”" 
Psalms10:5 Zvose zvaanoita zvinobudirira. Matongero enyu ari kure naye; ari kokoko kumusoro kure naye; kana zviri zvavavengi vake, anovasinamisira uso." 
Psalms10:6 Anozviti nechomumwoyo, handimbotsukunyuki, pazvizvarwa zvose hapana chinondiwana." 
Psalms10:7 Kurengerera rushambwa, nounyengedzi nokutyisidzira zvinogara zviri pamuromo pake. Rurimi rwake nderwomusikanzwa nouipi." 
Psalms10:8 Anohwandira mumamisha achiuraya vasina mhosva muchivande; maziso ake anonyatsotarisa vanenge vawiramo; 
Psalms10:9 anonyangira muchivande seshumba; anonyangira kuti abate varombo; anobata murombo kana amukwevera mumambure ake. 
Psalms10:10 Vanenge vawira, vanopwanyiwa vachitoti mvuchata pasi pamusana pesimba rake." 
Psalms10:11 Anofunga kuti Mwari anokanganwa; anozarira maziso ake; haambondioni. 
Psalms10:12 Simukai, TENZI Mwari simudzai ruoko rwenyu regai kukanganwa vatamburi." 
Psalms10:13 Chii chinopa kuti wakaipa ashore Mwari, achizviti, mumwoyo make, Mwari haandiripise." 
Psalms10:14 Imi munoona zvenyu, hongu matambudziko nenhamo munozviona; munozvibata kuti muzotsividza noruoko rwenyu, nherera dzinozviisa mumaoko enyu imi mubatsiri wenherera." 
Psalms10:15 Tyorai simba roruoko rwowakaipa nomutadzi uipi hwake hutsvakei kusvikira pasisina. 
Psalms10:16 TENZI ndimambo nokusingaperi, vechirudzi vachaparara munyika make." 
Psalms10:17 TENZI imi muchanzwa chichemo chavarombo. Muchavasimbisa mwoyo muchivarerekerera nzeve yenyu 
Psalms10:18 kuti muitire nherera navatamburi ruenzaniso kuitira kuti munhu akabva zvake kuvhu arege kutyisa. 
Psalms11:1 Chivimbo chavari pachokwadi Ndinopotera kuna Mwari ko ungagoti kwandiri sei “Bhururukira kumakomo okwenyu, kunge shiri" 
Psalms11:2 nokuti tarisai muone kuti vakaipa vatotatamura uta hwavo; vatoisa museve wavo patambo kuti vapfure vakarurama murima. 
Psalms11:3 Kana ugaro hwaparadzwa wakarurama angaitei?” 
Psalms11:4 TENZI ari muTemberi yake inoera chigaro choumambo chaTENZI chiri kudenga maziso ake anoona, meso ake anoongorora vanhu." 
Psalms11:5 TENZI anoedza vakarurama navakaipa asi anovenga wakaipa anoda utsinye. 
Psalms11:6 Anonaisa pamusoro pavakaipa mazimbe omoto nesarufa, mhepo inopisa ndiyo ichava mugove womukombe wavanopiwa" 
Psalms11:7 nokuti TENZI akarurama, anoda kuita kwakarurama, vakarurama vachaona uso hwake." 
Psalms12:1 Kukumbira Mwari rubatsiro panhamo dzapanyika Tinunureiwo TENZI nokuti hapachisina mutsvene nokuti vakatendeseka vapera pakati pavanhu. 
Psalms12:2 Munhu wose ava kungotaurira nhema kune mumwe wake; vanhu vava kutaurirana zvisinganyatsonzwisisika; vanonakisa mukanwa zvenhando vachishandisa mazwi anoreva zvinhu zvakasiana. 
Psalms12:3 Dai TENZI angocheka miromo yavanonakisa mukanwa zvenhando, vanoti," 
Psalms12:4 “Nezvinobva pamuromo apa, tinokunda; miromo yedu tinayo; ndiani anotitonga.”" 
Psalms12:5 TENZI anoti, “Zvino ndichasimuka pamusana pavarombo varikupambwa nokugomera kwavatamburi, ndichavapa zvavanosuwira, zvokugara pasina chinovatambudza.”" 
Psalms12:6 Mazwi aTENZI, mazwi matsvene, akaita sesirivha yakacheneswa muvirira romoto ikagocheneswa kakapetwa kanomwe." 
Psalms12:7 Imi TENZI tichengetedzeiwo, tidzivirireiwo nokusingaperi kuchizvarwa ichi." 
Psalms12:8 Vakaipa vari kufamba kose kose uipi zvauri kurumbidzwa kudai pakati pavanhu. 
Psalms13:1 Kukumbira Mwari rubatsiro Mucharamba muchingondikanganwa kusvikira riniko, nhai TENZI? Muchandivanza chiso chenyu kusvikira riniko?" 
Psalms13:2 Ko ndichatenderedzwa musoro kusvikira riniko ndichirwadziwa mwoyo zuva rose kudai? Vavengi vangu vachandikurira kusvikira riniko? 
Psalms13:3 Nditarisei TENZI Mwari wangu mundipindure. Ndibengenutsei ndirege kukotsira hope dzorufu. 
Psalms13:4 Muvengi wangu angadaro akazoti ndakamukurira, mhandu dzangu dzikazofarira kuti ndakazunzika." 
Psalms13:5 Asi ini ndinovimba nemwoyochena wenyu; mwoyo wangu unofarira ruponeso rwenyu. 
Psalms13:6 Ndichaimbira TENZI nokuti akandiitira zvakanaka. 
Psalms14:1 Uipi hwavanhu Benzi rinoti nechomumwoyo, “Hakuna Mwari.” Vane tsika dzakaora; vanoita zvinhu zvinosemesa; hapana anoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms14:2 TENZI ari kudenga anotarisa pasi kuvanhu kuti aone kana pane vanoita zvino ungwaru; vanotsvaka Mwari. 
Psalms14:3 Vose vakatetereka; vose vakangofanana; vane tsika dzakaora. Hapana anoita zvakanaka, kana mumwechete zvake." 
Psalms14:4 “Havanzwisisi here, ivo vaiti vezvakaipa vose vanodya vanhu vangu sevanodya chingwa?” Havacheme kuna TENZI." 
Psalms14:5 Ipapo vachabatwa nokutya kukuru nokuti Mwari ari pamwe nechizvarwa chavakarurama. 
Psalms14:6 Imi munopongesa mazano omurombo asi TENZI ndiye diziro rake. 
Psalms14:7 Dai ruponeso rweIsiraeri rwangobva kugomo reZioni. Kana TENZI ava kudzosa vaIsiraeri kuutapwa, vokwaJakobho vachapembera vokwaIsiraeri vachafara." 
Psalms15:1 Ndiani angave muenzi waMwari TENZI ndiani angagare mutendhe renyu? Ndiani angagare mugomo renyu rinoera? 
Psalms15:2 Munogarwa nomunhu ano upenyu huri pachokwadi, anoita zvakarurama uye anotaura chokwadi chake chaicho chinobva mumwoyo;" 
Psalms15:3 munhu asingatauri makuhwa norurimi rwake; asingaitiri mumwe wake zvakaipa; asingatauri zvakaipa zvavamwe. 
Psalms15:4 Munhu anozvidza munhu akashata; asi anoremekedza vanoremekedza TENZI, anochengeta zvaanenge apika kuita kunyange zvichirwadza." 
Psalms15:5 Anokweretesa asingati akwereta ngaaise imwe mari pamusoro payo kana kutambira chioko muhomwe chokurwisa munhu asina mhosva. Munhu anoita zvakadai haatsukunyiki. 
Psalms16:1 Munamato wokuvimba naMwari Ndichengetei Mwari nokuti ndinopotera mamuri. 
Psalms16:2 Ndinoti kuna TENZI, “Imi ndimi TENZI wangu. Kunze kwenyu imi handina chimwe chakanaka.”" 
Psalms16:3 Varurami vari munyika ndivo vokumbahuru. Ndinofadzwa kwazvo navo. 
Psalms16:4 Vanozvisarudzira mumwe mwari, vanozviwanzira nhamo. Handisi kuzopira kwavari miteuro yeropa. Handifi ndadaidza mazita avo nomuromo wangu." 
Psalms16:5 TENZI ndiye mugove wangu nenhaka yangu. Nhaka yangu iri mumaoko ake. 
Psalms16:6 Muganhu wangu waenda napakanaka. Hakusi kunaka ikoko kwakaita nhaka yangu. 
Psalms16:7 Ndinorumbidza TENZI anondipa mazano kunyange usiku, mwoyo wangu unondinyevera." 
Psalms16:8 Ndinoisa TENZI mberi kwangu nguva dzose; nokuti ari kurudyi rwangu, handitsuduguki." 
Psalms16:9 Naizvozvo mwoyo wangu unofara, mweya wangu unopembera; kana muviri wangu uchava norugare." 
Psalms16:10 Hamungandiregi ndichienda kunzvimbo yavakafa; kana kurega mururami wenyu achipinda muguva. 
Psalms16:11 Munondiratidza nzira youpenyu; pamuri ndipo pane rufaro ruzere kurudyi kwenyu kune rufaro nokusingaperi. 
Psalms17:1 Munamato womunhu wakarurama TENZI teererai kuchemera ruenzaniso kwangu. Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunamato wangu unobva kumiromo isina unyengedzi. 
Psalms17:2 Kutongwa kwangu dai zvako kwangobva kwamuri; maziso enyu aone zviri pachokwadi. 
Psalms17:3 Kana mukaedzawo zvenyu mwoyo wangu; kana kuti mukandishanyira zvenyu usiku; kana mukaedza kuona zvandiri hamumboona uipi mandiri. Handimbokanganisa nomuromo wangu. 
Psalms17:4 Asi pane zvinoita vanhu maererano nezvamunotaura, ndakanyenyeredza nzira dzavanoutsinye." 
Psalms17:5 Makumbo angu akaramba akangoti munzira dzenyu tasa tsoka dzangu hadzina kutsvedza. 
Psalms17:6 Ndinodanidzira kwamuri Mwari nokuti munondipindura. Rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri munzwe zvandinotaura. 
Psalms17:7 Ratidzai mwoyochena wenyu unoshamisa. Imi mununuri wavanhu vanopotera mamuri, vachitiza mhandu dzavo kurudyi rwenyu." 
Psalms17:8 Ndichengeteiwo semboni yeziso renyu mundivanze mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu 
Psalms17:9 kuvaipi vanondirwisa, vavengi vangu vanouraya vakandipoteredza." 
Psalms17:10 Zvokunzwa tsitsi havana; vanotaura vachizvikudza nemiromo yavo. 
Psalms17:11 Vanondironda vachindikomba; vakafatira kuona pavangandipunzire napo pasi. 
Psalms17:12 Vakaita seshumba yakagaririra kubvambura seshumba yechidiki yakavandira. 
Psalms17:13 Simukai TENZI muvarwise muvakurire. Ndinunureiwo nebakatwa renyu kuvakaipa 
Psalms17:14 noruoko rwenyu TENZI ndinunurei kuvanhu, kuvanhu vano mugove wavo pasi pano asi vazadzei dumbu nezvamakavachengetera; vana vavo vagutswewo vave nezvimwe zvavanosiirawo vacheche vavo." 
Psalms17:15 Asi ini nokururama kwangu ndichakuonai kana ndomuka ndofara ndichikuonai mutumbi wenyu. 
Psalms18:1 Rwiyo rwaDhavhidhi rwokukunda Ndinokudai TENZI, imi simba rangu." 
Psalms18:2 TENZI ndiye bako rangu, ndiye nhare nomununuri wangu. Mwari wangu ndiye bako rangu, maari ndimo mandinopotera. Ndiye nhoo yangu, ndiye ane simba rokundiponesa ndiye nhare yangu yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo." 
Psalms18:3 Ndinodaidzira kuna TENZI; iye anofanira kurumbidzwa, ndinobva ndatonunurwa kuna vanondivenga." 
Psalms18:4 Nokuti misungo yorufu yakandikomberedza, mafashamo ohumharadzi akandirwisa." 
Psalms18:5 Tambo dzenzvimbo yavachakabvu dzakandikochekera mariva orufu akandigaririra. 
Psalms18:6 Munhamo yangu iyi ndakachema kuna TENZI. Ndakachema kuna iye Mwari wangu, kuti andibatsire muTemberi yake, iye akanzwa izwi rangu, kuchema kwangu kukasvika munzeve dzake." 
Psalms18:7 Nyika yakadedera ikandengendeka, nheyowo dzamakomo dzakazunguzika dzikatetemera nokuti akanga ashatirwa." 
Psalms18:8 Akafemeruka utsi mumhuno dzake, mukanwa make aine rimi romoto rinororomesa. Mukabuda mazimbe anobvira moto." 
Psalms18:9 Akabvarura denga akaburuka, gore dema riri pasi petsoka dzake." 
Psalms18:10 Akanga akakwira pakerubhu akabhururuka, akauya nokukurumidza achibhururuka mumhepo." 
Psalms18:11 Akaita kuti rima rimukwidibire rakamutenderedza makuti matematema chaiwo emvura akaaita chokuhwanda nacho. 
Psalms18:12 Mukupenya kwaiva mberi kwake, pakabuda nomumakore chimvuramahwe namazhenje omoto." 
Psalms18:13 TENZI akadhiriridza mumatenga'mu, izwi raNyadenga rikariridza. Kwakaita chivhuramahwe namazimbe omoto." 
Psalms18:14 Akakanda miseve yake vakati dzvamu kuparara, akapenyesa mheni vakati ware kuparara." 
Psalms18:15 Makoronga omugungwa akaoneka, pagere nyika pakanyatsoti pachena yacha nokutsiura kwenyu, TENZI nedutu rinobva mumhuno dzenyu." 
Psalms18:16 Akandisveerera ruoko ari kumusoro akanditora, akandinyurura mumvura zhinji." 
Psalms18:17 Akandinunura kuvavengi vangu vane simba nokuna vaindivenga, nokuti vaiva nesimba kupinda ini." 
Psalms18:18 Vakandivinga pazuva renhamo dzangu, asi TENZI ndiye akava musimboti wangu." 
Psalms18:19 Akandiburitsamo akanditi murusununguko tupfunu, akandinunura nokuti anondifarira." 
Psalms18:20 TENZI akandipa mubayiro, maererano nokururama kwangu, akandidzorera zvinofambiranawo, nokuchena maoko kwandakaita; akandipa mubayiro" 
Psalms18:21 nokuti ndakarambira ndiri mumakwara aTENZI; handina kuita chakaipa chokusiyana naMwari wangu," 
Psalms18:22 nokuti chainditungamirira, zvirongwa zvake zvose, mirawo yake handina kuibvisa kwandiri." 
Psalms18:23 Kwaari, handina chinoshoreka. Ndakazvichengeta ndisina mhosva." 
Psalms18:24 Ndokusaka TENZI andidzorerawo maererano nokururama kwangu zvichifambiranawo nokuchena kwamaoko angu mukuona kwake. 
Psalms18:25 Kuna akatendeka imi makatendeka, kune akarurama imi makarurama." 
Psalms18:26 Kuna ane mwoyo wakanaka imi makanaka, asi kune ane muitiro wakakombama, imiwo munobva mavava." 
Psalms18:27 Munonunura vanotambudzika, asi vanozvikudza, munovaorora." 
Psalms18:28 Sezvo imi TENZI murimi mwenje wangu, imi Mwari wangu ndimi munondivhenekera murima;" 
Psalms18:29 nokuti nemi ndinoparadza chikwata chavarwi, ndiina Mwari wangu, rusvingo ndinosvetuka." 
Psalms18:30 Mwari uyu, nzira dzake dzakarurama, zvinotaurwa naTENZI ndezvechokwadi inhoo yavose vanopotera kwaari." 
Psalms18:31 Ndiani Mwari, kunze kwaTENZI? Ndiani dombo kunze kwaMwari wedu?" 
Psalms18:32 Ndiye Mwari akandipa simba akaita kuti nzira yangu ifambike. 
Psalms18:33 Makumbo angu anoaita seengururu, kunyange pamangoringori anoita kuti ndimire." 
Psalms18:34 Anodzidzisa maoko angu kurwa hondo zvokuti kunyange uta hwendarira, maoko angu anogona kutatamura." 
Psalms18:35 Ruponeso rwenyu ndiyo nhoo yamakandipa, rudyi rwenyu rwakanditsigira. Rubatsiro rwenyu rwakaita kuti ndive mukuru mukuru." 
Psalms18:36 Pokutsika netsoka dzangu, makandipa pakuru zvokuti tsoka dzangu, kutsvedzemuka hadzina." 
Psalms18:37 Ndakaronda vavengi vangu ndikavabata, ndikatozofuratira vapera kuti dhu." 
Psalms18:38 Ndakavapwanya-pwanya zvokuti havana kukwanisa kumuka, vakati rakata pasi petsoka dzangu." 
Psalms18:39 Makandipa simba rokurwa hondo mukaita kuti vavengi vangu vandigwadamire. 
Psalms18:40 Vanondivenga makaita kuti vanditize vanondivenga ndikavaparadza. 
Psalms18:41 Vakachemera rubatsiro asi panga pasina wokuvanunura, vakachema kuna TENZI asi haana kuvapindura." 
Psalms18:42 Ndakavakuya-kuya seguruva revhu ndakavarasa sedhaka munzira. 
Psalms18:43 Makandinunura mumhirizhonga yomumba mangu makandiita musoro wendudzi dzavanhu vanhu vandakanga ndisingamboziva vakandishandira. 
Psalms18:44 Vatorwa vaiuya kwandiri vachitodemba, vaiti vakangondinzwa chete vainditeerera." 
Psalms18:45 Vatorwa vakarasa mwoyo, vakabuda munhare dzavo vachidedera." 
Psalms18:46 TENZI mupenyu, iye dombo rangu, ngaarumbidzwe, ngaatunhidzwe Mwari, muponesi wangu." 
Psalms18:47 Mwari anonditsivira anondiisira ndudzi dzavanhu pasi pangu 
Psalms18:48 akandipunyutsa kuvavengi vangu. Makandisumudzira pamusoro pavavengi vangu, mukandinunura kuvanhu vehondo." 
Psalms18:49 Naizvozvo ndinokurumbidzai imi TENZI mukati mendudzi ndichaimba ndichirumbidza zita renyu. 
Psalms18:50 Anopa mambo wake kukunda kukuru kwazvo, anoitira mwoyochena muzodzwa wake Dhavhidhi nezvizvarwa zvake narini wose." 
Psalms19:1 Kunaka kwakaita zvisikwa nemirao yaMwari Matenga anoparidza mbiri yaMwari, ziendanakuenda rinodura pachena mabasa aMwari." 
Psalms19:2 Zuva roga roga rinotaura kusvika kune rimwe, nousiku humwe hunotsvitsa kunohumwe ruzivo irworwu." 
Psalms19:3 Hapana kutaura kana mashoko kana izwi rawo rinonzwika. 
Psalms19:4 Asi izwi rawo rinosvika pasi pose, mazwi avo anosvika kwakaperera nyika, akaitira zuva musha maari" 
Psalms19:5 rinobuda somukuwasha mumba make somurume ane simba, rinomhanya nzira yaro norufaro." 
Psalms19:6 Rinobuda kwakaperera denga richifamba kundosvika kumwe kwarinogumira. Hakuna chingavande kupisa kwaro. 
Psalms19:7 Mutemo waTENZI mutemo uzere, unomutsiridza munhu. Kupupurira kwaTENZI ndokwechokwadi, kunopa ungwaru kuna vasina njere." 
Psalms19:8 Zvirongwa zvaTENZI zvakarurama, zvinofadza mwoyo. Murau waTENZI mutsvene tsvene unovhenekera maziso." 
Psalms19:9 Kutya Mwari chinhu chakachena, chinogara nokusingaperi mitemo yaTENZI iri pachokwadi uye yakarurama kwazvo." 
Psalms19:10 Inofanira kudiwa kukunda ndarama, kutopinda ndarama yakanakisisa, inotapirawo kupinda uchi kupinda musvisvi wezinga rouchi." 
Psalms19:11 Uyewo unoyambira muranda wenyu kuichengeta kunowanisa mubayiro mukuru. 
Psalms19:12 Asi ndiani angaone zvikanganiso zvake; ndicheneseiwo kunezvikanganiso zvakavanda. 
Psalms19:13 Ndidzivirireiwo ini muranda wenyu kuzvitadzo zvokuita ndichida. Ngazvirege kunditonga. Naizvozvo ndichava munhu asina mhosva uye asina kupara mhosva huru. 
Psalms19:14 Dai mazwi angu nepfungwa dzemwoyo wangu zvangove zvinogamuchirika kwamuri, imi TENZI, bako rangu nomununuri wangu." 
Psalms20:1 Kunamatira mambo Dai TENZI akangokupindurai pazuva renhamo! Dai zita raMwari waJakobho angokudzivirirai. 
Psalms20:2 Ngaakutumirei rubatsiro runobva kunzvimbo inoera norutsigiro rwake runobva kuZioni. 
Psalms20:3 Dai angoyeuka mipiro yenyu yose uye afadzwe nezvibayiro zvenyu zvose. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms20:4 Dai angokupai zvinoda mwoyo wenyu aite kuti zvirongwa zvenyu zvibudirire. 
Psalms20:5 Ipapo tichapururudzira kukunda kwenyu norufaro. Tigosimudza mureza wedu muzita raMwari wedu TENZI akuitirei zvose zvamunokumbira. 
Psalms20:6 Zvino ndavakuziva kuti TENZI achabatsira muzodzwa wake, achamupindura ari kudenga rake rinoera nesimba roruoko rwake rworudyi." 
Psalms20:7 Vamwe vanovimba nengoro dzehondo; vamwe vanovimba namabhiza asi isu tinovimba nezita raTENZI Mwari wedu. 
Psalms20:8 Ivo vachaputsikira pasi vagowa asi isu tichamuka tigomira takati twi. 
Psalms20:9 TENZI, Itai kuti mambo akunde, tipindureiwo pazuva ratinodaidzira." 
Psalms21:1 Rumbo rwokukurira Mambo anofara nesimba renyu, TENZI, anofarira zvikuru kuponesa kwenyu." 
Psalms21:2 Makamupa zvaiva pamwoyo pake uye hamuna kumunyima zvaakakumbira nomuromo wake. Dzepfunde 
Psalms21:3 Makamuchingura nezvikomborero zvakanaka mukamugadza chiremba chendarama chakanakisisa mumusoro make. 
Psalms21:4 Akakukumbirai upenyu mukamupa, mazuva akawanda nokusingaperi." 
Psalms21:5 Ano mukurumbira mukuru pamusana porubatsiro rwenyu rwunoponesa. Makamupa umambo norukudzo. 
Psalms21:6 Nokuti makaisa zvikomborero zvenyu paari nokusingaperi uye anofara nokuvapo kwenyu 
Psalms21:7 nokuti mambo anovimba naTENZI uye haambosudurutswa pamusana pemwoyochena wanyakumusorosoro. 
Psalms21:8 Ruoko rwenyu ruchabata vavengi venyu vose. Ruoko rwenyu ruchabata vanokuvengai. 
Psalms21:9 Muchavaita sevira romoto pamuchazviratidza TENZI achavamedza nehasha dzake, vacharoromeswa nomoto." 
Psalms21:10 Muchaparadza vana vavo panyika uyewo vana vavo pakati pavanhu. 
Psalms21:11 Kana zvavo vakafunga zvakaipa zvokukuitirai, kana vakaronga mazano akaipa havambobudirira" 
Psalms21:12 nokuti muchavamhanyisa makanongedza uta hwenyu kuuso hwavo. 
Psalms21:13 Munofanira kurumbidzwa zvenyu, imi TENZI, pamusana pesimba renyu. Tichaimba tichirumbidza simba renyu." 
Psalms22:1 Kurwadziwa nechivimbo chomururami Mwari wangu, Mwari wangu mandisiireiko; muri kure kure seiko pakundibatsira uye kumazwi okugomera kwangu." 
Psalms22:2 Mwari wangu, ndinochema masikati asi hamupinduri uye nousiku asi handiwani zororo" 
Psalms22:3 asi imi muri mutsvene, pakurumbidzwa, ndimi makagadzwa umambo chaihwo muIsiraeri." 
Psalms22:4 Madzibaba edu akavimba nemi, vakavimba, imi mukavanunura." 
Psalms22:5 Vakachema kwamuri vakanunurwa vakavimba nemi vakasanyadziswa. 
Psalms22:6 Asi ini ndiri honye, handisi munhu ndinoshorwa navanhu, ndinozvidzwa navanhu." 
Psalms22:7 Vose vanondiona vanondisveeredza, vanondimonyera muromo vachizunguza musoro." 
Psalms22:8 “Akazviturira kuna TENZI, ko ngaachimuponesa, ngaachimununuraka nokuti anomuda.”" 
Psalms22:9 Asi imi ndimi makandiburitsa munhumbu mukandichengeta zvakanaka pandaiyamwa. 
Psalms22:10 Ndakapirwa kwamuri kubvira pakuberekwa kwangu. Kubvira pandakaberekwa naamai vangu ndimi manga muri Mwari wangu. 
Psalms22:11 Musave kure neni nokuti nhamo iri padyo uye hapana wokundibatsira. 
Psalms22:12 Handira zhinji dzakandikomba, handira dzakasimba dzokuBhashani dzakandikomberedza." 
Psalms22:13 Dzinondishamira muromo kwazvo seshumba dzinouraya dziri kudzvova. 
Psalms22:14 Ndadururwa semvura, mapfupa angu asvodogoka, mwoyo wangu waita senamo, wanyongodeka mudundundu mangu." 
Psalms22:15 Simba rangu rakatooma kuti papata sezenga. Rurimi rwangu rwavakutonamira kumatadza, matonditi rapata muguruva rorufu." 
Psalms22:16 Imbwa dzakandikomberedza, chikwata chavakaipa chakanditenderedza; vabaya maoko angu namakumbo angu," 
Psalms22:17 ndavakutokwanisa kuverenga mapfupa angu ose; vanondinan'anidza vachinyatsondiongorora. 
Psalms22:18 Vari kugoverana zvavo zvipfeko zvangu; hanzu dzangu varikutodziitira chin'ange. 
Psalms22:19 Asi imi TENZI regai kuva kure; imi simba rangu kurumidzai kuzondibatsira. 
Psalms22:20 Ndinunureiwo kubakatwa mununure upenyu hwangu kusimba rembwa. 
Psalms22:21 Ndinunureiwo kumuromo weshumba, ndipindureiwo, ndiri parumano rwenyanga dzenyati." 
Psalms22:22 Iniwo ndichaparidza zita renyu kuhama dzangu, mukati mesangano ndichakurumbidzai." 
Psalms22:23 “Imi munotya TENZI murumbidzei, imi mose vana vokwaJakobho, murumbidzei. Mudederei imi vana vokwaIsiraeri" 
Psalms22:24 nokuti haana kuzvidza kana kusema nhamo yavatamburi. Haana kuvanza uso hwake kwaari asi akamunzwa paakachema kwaari.” 
Psalms22:25 Zvokuti ndikurumbidzei mugungano guru, zvinotobva kwamuri, zvandakatsidza ndichazviita ndiri muvanhu vanokutyai." 
Psalms22:26 Varombo vachadya vakaguta vanomutsvaka vacharumbidza TENZI, dai mukangorarama nokusingaperi." 
Psalms22:27 Nyika dzapasi pano dzicharangarira dzigodzokera kuna TENZI mhuri dzose dzamarudzi avanhu dzigwadame pamberi penyu 
Psalms22:28 nokuti umambo ndohwaTENZI uye anotonga pamusoro pevechirudzi. 
Psalms22:29 Vose vanozvikudza vapanyika vachamugwadamira vose avo vachapinda muguva navose vasingagoni kuzviraramisa vachatozomupfugamira chete. 
Psalms22:30 Zvizvarwa zvichauya zvichamushumira zvizvarwa zvinotevera zvichataurirwa nezvaTENZI 
Psalms22:31 zvichauyawo zvigoparidza ururami hwake kuvanhu vachatozozvarwa kuti, “TENZI akazviita.”" 
Psalms23:1 Mufudzi wakanaka TENZI ndiye mufudzi wangu hapana chandinoshaya 
Psalms23:2 anondirarisa mumafuro manyoro. Achinditungamirira kumvura inozorodza. 
Psalms23:3 Anondimutsiridza mwoyo achinditungamirira munzira dzoururami pamusana pezita rake. 
Psalms23:4 Kunyange ndikafamba mumupata werima rakati kwirindindi handingatyi chakaipa nokuti imi muneni. Tsvimbo yenyu nomudonzvo wenyu zvinondinyaradza. 
Psalms23:5 Munondigadzirira tafura pamberi pangu vavengi vangu vachiona, munozora musoro wangu mafuta, mukombe wangu unotofashukira." 
Psalms23:6 Chokwadi kunaka kwenyu nomwoyochena wenyu zvicharamba zvineni upenyu hwangu hwose uye ndichagara mumba maTENZI nokusingaperi. 
Psalms24:1 Kupinda kwaMwari Mambo muTemberi Nyika ndeyaTENZI nazvose zviri mairi, pasi pose zvapo navanhu vanogarapo ndezvake" 
Psalms24:2 nokuti akaidzika mumakungwa, akaimisa panzizi." 
Psalms24:3 Ndiani angakwire mugomo raTENZI? Ndiani angamire munzvimbo yake inoera? 
Psalms24:4 Munhu ana maoko akachena nomwoyo wakachena. Munhu asina kupika neni nhando kana kupika nhema. 
Psalms24:5 Achawana chikomborero chinobva kuna TENZI achanzi munhu akarurama naMwari mununuri wake. 
Psalms24:6 Ndizvo zvakaita chizvarwa chinomutsvaka chinotsvaka uso hwaMwari waJakobho. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms24:7 Imi misuo mikuru, pamusoro penyu ngapasimuke mureberere kumusoro imi misuo yechinyakare kuitira kuti mambo wembiri apinde." 
Psalms24:8 Ndiani Mambo wembiri? NdiTENZI ane simba nougamba. TENZI gamba romuhondo. 
Psalms24:9 Imi misuo mikuru pamusoro penyu ngapasimuke mureberere pamusoro imi misuo yechinyakare kuitira kuti Mambo wembiri apinde. 
Psalms24:10 Ndiani iyeyo mambo wembiri? TENZI wehondo nehondo ndiye Mambo wembiri. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms25:1 Munamato womunhu ari munhamo Ndinosimudzira mwoyo wangu kwamuri TENZI. 
Psalms25:2 Mwari wangu ndinovimba nemi, musandirege ndichinyadziswa; vavengi vangu ngavarege kunditsvinyira." 
Psalms25:3 Vose vanotarisira mamuri ngavarege kunyadziswa; asi vanonyengedza pasina chikonzero ngavanyadziswe. 
Psalms25:4 TENZI, ndiziviseiwo nzira dzenyu ndidzidziseiwo makwara enyu." 
Psalms25:5 Nditungamirireiwo muchokwadi chenyu mundidzidzise nokuti ndimi Mwari muponesi wangu. Ndinotarisira kwamuri zuva rose. 
Psalms25:6 Rangarirai, TENZI, tsitsi dzenyu uyewo mwoyochena wenyu nokuti zvaivapo kubvira pasi chigare." 
Psalms25:7 Musarangarire zvitadzo zvapauduku hwangu kana zvikanganiso zvangu. Maererano nemwoyochena wenyu, ndiyeukeiwo TENZI pamusana porunako rwenyu." 
Psalms25:8 TENZI akanaka uye akarurama saka anodzidzisa vatadzi nzira. 
Psalms25:9 Anotungamirira vanozvirereka muururami achidzidzisa vanozvirereka nzira yake. 
Psalms25:10 Nzira dzose dzaTENZI, mwoyochena nechokwadi kuna vanochengeta chitenderano chake nemitemo yake." 
Psalms25:11 Pamusana pezita renyu, TENZI ndiregerereiwo chitadzo changu nokuti chakakura." 
Psalms25:12 Ndiani anotya TENZI? Iyeyo ndiye waachadzidzisa nzira yaanofanira kusarudza. 
Psalms25:13 Iye acharamba achibudirira, vana vake vachava varidzi venyika." 
Psalms25:14 Ushamwari naTENZI ndehwevanomutya uye anovazivisa chitenderano chake. 
Psalms25:15 Meso angu anogara akatarisa kuna TENZI nokuti ndiye anotakanura makumbo angu mumambure. 
Psalms25:16 Ndicheukeiwo mundinzwire tsitsi nokuti ndiri ndoga uye ndinorwadziwa. 
Psalms25:17 Ndisunungureiwo kunhamo dziri mumwoyo mangu; ndinyurureiwo mukushushikana kwangu. 
Psalms25:18 Tarisai kutambudzika kwangu nokunetsekana kwangu mundiregererewo zvitadzo zvangu. 
Psalms25:19 Tarisai muone kuwanda kwakaita vavengi vangu uye muone kundipengera kwavanoita noruvengo vanondivenga. 
Psalms25:20 Ndichengetedzereiwo upenyu hwangu mundinunure. Musandirege ndichinyadziswa nokuti ndinopotera kwamuri. 
Psalms25:21 Kuva pachokwadi noururami ngazvindichengete nokuti ndinotarisira kwamuri. 
Psalms25:22 Mwari nunurai Isiraeri kumatambudziko ayo ose. 
Psalms26:1 Munamato womunhu asina mhosva TENZI ratidzai kuti handina mhosva nokuti ndakafamba muchokwadi uye ndakavimba nemi TENZI ndisingazunguziki 
Psalms26:2 Ndivhenekei TENZI mundiedze munyatsopenengura pfungwa dzangu nemwoyo wangu. 
Psalms26:3 Nokuti mwoyochena wenyu ndinogara ndichiuona uye ndinofamba ndakatendeka kwamuri. 
Psalms26:4 Handigare navanyengedzi kana kufambidzana navasiri pachokwadi. 
Psalms26:5 Ndinovenga gungano ravakaipa uye handitandare navakaipa. 
Psalms26:6 Ndinoshamba maoko angu ndisina mhosva. Ndigotendererawo atari yenyu TENZI 
Psalms26:7 ndichiimba rwiyo rwokutenda ndichiparidza zvamakaita zvinoshamisa. 
Psalms26:8 TENZI, ini ndinoda Imba yamunogara, nzvimbo inogara mbiri yenyu." 
Psalms26:9 Musanditsvaire pamwechete navatadzi kana kutsvaira upenyu hwangu pamwechete navaurai," 
Psalms26:10 vanhu vana maoko oujarijari, vazere muruoko rworudyi nepfumbamuromo." 
Psalms26:11 Asi kana ndirini ndinofamba pachokwadi. Ndinunurei mundinzwirewo ngoni. 
Psalms26:12 Tsoka yangu iri pakati sandara, mukati megungano guru ndicharumbidza, TENZI." 
Psalms27:1 Munamato womunhu anovimba naMwari zvakanyanya TENZI ndiye chiedza changu noruponeso rwangu. Ndiani wandingatye? Paupenyu hwangu, TENZI ndiye diziro rangu. Ndiani wandingatye?" 
Psalms27:2 Kana vakaipa vondirwisa vachitaura zvakaipa nezvangu. Mhandu navavengi vangu vachadzadzarika vagowira pasi. 
Psalms27:3 Kunyange ndikakombwa nehondo mwoyo wangu haungatyi kunyange hondo ikandimukira kuvimba kwangu nemi kucharamba kuripo. 
Psalms27:4 Ndinokumbira kuna TENZI chinhu chimwechete ichocho ndicho chandinotsvaka chokuti ndigare zvangu mumba maTENZI mazuva ose oupenyu hwangu kuitira kuti ndione kunaka kwaTENZI uye kuti ndibvunzire kwaari muTemberi yake. 
Psalms27:5 Achandivanza mudumba rake pazuva renhamo; achandiviga pakavanda mutendhe yake, achandiisa pamusoro pedombo." 
Psalms27:6 Zvino ipapo ndichapasimudza musoro pamusoro pavavengi vangu vakandikomberedza. Ndichapira zvibayiro norufaro rukuru mutendhe yake. Ndichaimba, ndichiimbira TENZI rwiyo." 
Psalms27:7 Teereraiwo izwi rangu, TENZI pandinodanidzira ndiitireiwo ngoni mundidavire." 
Psalms27:8 Imi makati, “Tsvakai uso hwangu.” Mwoyo wangu unoti kwamuri, “Uso hwenyu TENZI ndihwo hwandinotsvaka.”" 
Psalms27:9 Musavanze uso hwenyu kwandiri musandidzinge nehasha ini muranda wenyu, ndimi mangamuri mubatsiri wangu. Musandisiye, musandirase, Mwari mununuri wangu." 
Psalms27:10 Baba naamai vangandirase zvavo asi TENZI achandigamuchira. 
Psalms27:11 TENZI ndiratidzei nzira yenyu munditungamirire mugwara rakati tasa pamusana pavavengi vangu. 
Psalms27:12 Musandiise mumaoko avavengi vangu nokuti zvapupu zvenhema zvandimukira uye vanofemereka nehasha. 
Psalms27:13 Ndinovimba kuti ndichaona kunaka kwaTENZI munyika yavapenyu. 
Psalms27:14 Tarisira muna TENZI, simba ushinge mwoyo. Tarisira muna TENZI." 
Psalms28:1 Munamato wokukumbira Rubatsiro Ndinodanidzira kwamuri TENZI imi dombo rangu musandinyararire nokuti mukandinyararira ndingaite savaya vadzika kunzvimbo yavakafa. 
Psalms28:2 Inzwaiwo izwi rokunamata kwangu pandinochemera rubatsiro kwamuri; pandinosimudza maoko angu ndakananga kunzvimbo yenyu inoera. 
Psalms28:3 Musandibatanidzire pamwechete navakaipa navanhu vanoita zvakaipa vanotaura zvakanaka navamwe vavo asi mumwoyo muine zvakaipa. 
Psalms28:4 Vapei zvakaenzanirana namabasa avo uye zvakafanirana nezviito zvavo. Vapei zvinowirirana namabasa amaoko avo vapei mubayiro unokodzerana navo. 
Psalms28:5 Pamusana pokuti havana han'a namabasa aTENZI kana nebasa ramaoko ake, achavaparadza agorega kuvavakazve." 
Psalms28:6 TENZI ngaarumbidzwe nokuti akanzwa izwi rokuteterera kwangu. 
Psalms28:7 TENZI ndiye simba rangu nenhoo yangu mwoyo wangu unovimba naye; anondibatsira, saka mwoyo wangu unofara. Ndinomutenda norwiyo rwangu." 
Psalms28:8 TENZI ndiye simba ravanhu vake. Ndiye nhare yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo, yokununura nayo muzodzwa wake." 
Psalms28:9 Nunurai vanhu venyu mukomborere nhaka yenyu. Ivai mufudzi wavo muvatakure nokusingaperi. 
Psalms29:1 Izwi raTENZI rine simba guru Ipai TENZI mbiri imi vokudenga ipai TENZI mbiri nesimba. 
Psalms29:2 Ipai TENZI mbiri yezita rake gwadamirai TENZI anechiremera chinoera. 
Psalms29:3 Izwi raTENZI rinonzwika pamusoro pemvura. Mwari wembiri anotinhira TENZI ari pamusoro pemvura zhinji. 
Psalms29:4 Izwi raTENZI rine simba, izwi raTENZI rizere nechiremera." 
Psalms29:5 Izwi raTENZI rinotyora miti yomusidhari izwi raTENZI rinotyora misidhari yokuRebhanoni. 
Psalms29:6 Anoita kuti Rebhanoni, semhuru, iite chamurambamhuru uye Sirioni iite sechigondora chikono." 
Psalms29:7 Izwi raTENZI rinovaima moto. 
Psalms29:8 Izwi raTENZI rinondengendetsa renje, izwi raTENZI rinondengendetsa renje rokuKadheshi." 
Psalms29:9 Izwi raTENZI rinozunza mioku rinokwazhaura masango uye mutemberi yake vose vanodaidzira kuti, “Mbiri!”" 
Psalms29:10 TENZI anogara samambo pamusoro pamafashamo emvura. TENZI anogara samambo pachigaro chake nokusingaperi. 
Psalms29:11 Dai TENZI angopa simba kuvanhu vake. Dai TENZI angopa vanhu vake chikomborero chorugare. 
Psalms30:1 Munamato wokutenda Ndinokurumbidzai TENZI nokuti makandinyurura uye nokuti hamuna kurega vavengi vangu vachindidadira. 
Psalms30:2 TENZI, Mwari wangu ndakachema kwamuri kuti mundibatsire imi mukandirapa." 
Psalms30:3 Imi TENZI makaburitsa mweya wangu munzvimbo yavakafa, makandidzorera upenyu pakati pavakanga vaenda mugomba." 
Psalms30:4 Imbai muchirumbidza TENZI imi vakarurama vake. Tendai zita rake rinoera. 
Psalms30:5 Nokuti hasha dzake ndedzekanguvana; asi mwoyochena wake ndehweupenyu hwose. Kuchema kunombouya usiku; asi rufaro runouya namangwanani. 
Psalms30:6 Asi ini, pandainge ndichiri kubudirira, ndaizviti, “Hapana chinondizunguza.”" 
Psalms30:7 Nomwoyochena wenyu TENZI, makandimisa kuita gomo chairo kusimba, makazongoti uso hwenyu vanzei, ndakabva ndabatwa nokutya" 
Psalms30:8 Ndakachema kwamuri TENZI. Ndakanamata kwamuri TENZI. 
Psalms30:9 “Kudeuka kweropa rangu kunowaniseiko kana kudzika kwangu mugomba uye kupinda kwangu mugomba? Huruva ingakurumbidzei here? Ingataure nezvekutendeseka kwenyu here? 
Psalms30:10 Teererai TENZI mundinzwirewo ngoni TENZI ndibatsireiwo.” 
Psalms30:11 Makasandura kuungudza kwangu kukava kutamba. Makanditakanura saga mukandipfekedza rufaro 
Psalms30:12 kuitira kuti ndikuimbirei ndichirumbidza mbiri yenyu ndirege kunyarara TENZI Mwari wangu ndinokutendai nokusingaperi. 
Psalms31:1 Munamato womunhu anenge ava nenhamo Ndinopotera kwamuri TENZI, musaite kuti ndinyadziswe. Sezvamuri vakarurama kudai, ndinunureiwo." 
Psalms31:2 Rerekererai nzeve yenyu kwandiri mukurumidze kundinunura; ivai kwandiri dombo rokupotera naro, nhare yakasimba yokundinunura." 
Psalms31:3 Imi ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu pamusana pezita renyu, ndiratidzei pokufamba napo munditungamirire." 
Psalms31:4 Nditakanurei mumambure andateerwa zvakavanzika nokuti ndimi diziro rangu. 
Psalms31:5 Mumaoko enyu ndinoisa mweya wangu. Makandinunura, TENZI, Mwari wechokwadi." 
Psalms31:6 Munovenga vanoremekedza vamwari vasina maturo asi ini ndinovimba nemi TENZI. 
Psalms31:7 Ndinopururudza nokufarira mwoyochena wenyu nokuti imi makaona nhamo yangu makazivawo pfumvu yangu. 
Psalms31:8 Hamuna kundiisa mumaoko omuvengi makandiisa munzvimbo yandinogona kufamba pamadiro. 
Psalms31:9 Ndinzwireiwo tsitsi TENZI nokuti ndiri munhamo. Ziso rangu rasakara nokuchema ndizvozvowo zvine mweya wangu nomuviri wangu. 
Psalms31:10 Upenyu hwangu hwaperera mukusuwa namakore angu aperera mukutura befu simba rangu rapera pamusana pepfumvu yangu mapfupa angu asakara. 
Psalms31:11 Ndinozvidzwa navavengi vangu vose, chinhu chinoshoreka kwazvo kuva vavakidzani vangu. Vazivikanwi vangu vavakutonditya vanondiona mumugwagwa vanonditiza." 
Psalms31:12 Ndakatokanganikwa somunhu akafa. Ndaita somudziyo wakapwanyika. 
Psalms31:13 Nokuti ndiri kunzwa vazhinji vachiita kazevezeve; mativi ose zvangove zvinotyisa. Pavanorangana zvokundirwisa vachirangana zvokuda kundiuraya. 
Psalms31:14 Asi ini ndinovimba nemi TENZI ndinoti ndimi Mwari wangu. 
Psalms31:15 Upenyu hwangu huri mumaoko enyu ndinunureiwo mumaoko avavengi vangu navanonditambudza. 
Psalms31:16 Ndinyevenutsireiwo mwoyo ini muranda wenyu mundinunurewo nemwoyochena wenyu. 
Psalms31:17 Musaite kuti ndinyadziswe, TENZI nokuti ndinochema kwamuri. Vakaipa ngavave ivo vanonyadziswa ngavadzike kunzvimbo yavakafa chinyarire." 
Psalms31:18 Miromo inoreva nhema ngainyaradzwe, inotaura zvakaipa kuvarurami ichizvikudza nokuzvitutumadza nokuzvidza." 
Psalms31:19 Hakusi kuwanda ikoko kwezvakanaka zvamakaunganidzira vanokutyai, zvamunoitira vanopotera mamuri vanhu vachiona." 
Psalms31:20 Nokuvapo kwenyu munovahwandisa kune zvinorongwa navanhu, munovavanza mudumba renyu kunhamo dzavana vana pamuromo" 
Psalms31:21 TENZI ngaarumbidzwe nokuti akandiratidza zvinoshamisa mwoyochena wake pandaive ndakakombwa, seguta riri kurwiswa." 
Psalms31:22 Pandaive ndadumbirwa ndakati ndadzingirwa kure nemi asi imi makanzwa munamato wangu pandakachemera rubatsiro kwamuri. 
Psalms31:23 Idai TENZI imi vatsvene vake. TENZI anochengeta vakatendeka vake; asi anoranga zvakanyanya munhu wose anozvikudza. 
Psalms31:24 Simbai mutsunge mwoyo imi mose munotarisira muna TENZI. 
Psalms32:1 Reurura zvitadzo zvako Akakomborerwa zvake munhu akaregererwa kukanganisa kwake ane chitadzo chakafushirwa. 
Psalms32:2 Akakomborerwa munhu asingapiwe mhosva naTENZI, munhu asina mweya wounyengedzi." 
Psalms32:3 Pandakanga ndisina kureurura chitadzo changu, ndakaperezeka muviri pamusana pokuwuwura kwangu zuva rose" 
Psalms32:4 nokuti siku nesikati shamhu yoruoko rwenyu yakanga yakandiremera. Simba rangu rakapera kupwa sapachirimo. Dzepfunde 
Psalms32:5 Ndakareurura chitadzo changu kwamuri. Handina kuvanza uipi hwangu. Ndakati regai ndireurure zvikanganiso zvangu kuna TENZI. Imi makaregerera mhosva yechitadzo changu. Dzepfunde 
Psalms32:6 Naizvozvo munamati wose ngaanamate kwamuri panguva yenhamo, mapopopo emvura haambomusviki." 
Psalms32:7 Ndimi nzvimbo yangu yokuvanda. Ndimi munondidzivirira nhamo. Ndimi munoita kuti kwandiri kununurwa kuve rumbo. Dzepfunde 
Psalms32:8 Ndichakurairidza ndigokudzidzisa nzira yaunofanira kufamba nayo. Ndichakupa mazano, ziso rangu riri pauri." 
Psalms32:9 Usaite sebhiza kana nyurusi risinganzwe rinotoda kudzorwa namatomhu netambo, ukasadaro harirambe riinewe." 
Psalms32:10 Nhamo dzavakaipa dzakawanda vanovimba naTENZI, mwoyochena wake unovakomberedza." 
Psalms32:11 Farai muna TENZI, pemberai imi makarurama, pururudzai imi mose muna mwoyo wakarurama." 
Psalms33:1 Farai muna TENZI imi makarurama vari pachokwadi ndivo vanokodzera kumurumbidza. 
Psalms33:2 Rumbidzai TENZI nechipendani, muimbirei nedimbwa rine waya gumi," 
Psalms33:3 muimbirei rumbo rutsva, mumuridzirei zvakanaka, muchipururudza," 
Psalms33:4 nokuti shoko raTENZI rakatendeka uye basa rake rose rinoitwa muchokwadi. 
Psalms33:5 Anoda ururami noruenzaniso nyika izere nemwoyochena waTENZI. 
Psalms33:6 Matenga akaitwa nezwi raTENZI uyewo hondo nehondo yezvirimo zvakaitwa nefemo romuromo wake. 
Psalms33:7 Akaunganidza makungwa pamwechete akaaita semurwi, mvura yakadzika akaiisa mumatura." 
Psalms33:8 Nyika yose ngaitye TENZI, vagari vose vapasi pano ngavamudedere" 
Psalms33:9 nokuti akataura zvikaitika akati ngazvimire zvikamira. 
Psalms33:10 TENZI anoshaisa basa mazano amarudzi anoshaisa maturo zvirongwa zvavanhu. 
Psalms33:11 Zano raTENZI rinoramba riripo nokusingaperi zvaanofunga mumwoyo make zvinosvika kuzvizvarwa zvose. 
Psalms33:12 Rwakakomborerwa rudzi rwakaita TENZI Mwari warwo; vanhu vaakasarudza kuva nhaka yake. 
Psalms33:13 TENZI anotarisa pasi ari mudenga anoona vanhu vose. 
Psalms33:14 Kubva pachigaro chake chokutonga anotarisa vagari vose vapanyika. 
Psalms33:15 Iye anopa munhu nomunhu mwoyo waanawo, anoziva zvose zvavanoita." 
Psalms33:16 Mambo haanunurwe nokukura kwakaita hondo yake. Gamba rokurwa hariponeswe nesimba raro guru. 
Psalms33:17 Bhiza chinhu chisina maturo pakuponesa, Kunyange zvaro riine simba guru, harikwanisi kuponesa." 
Psalms33:18 Tarisai muone kuti ziso raTENZI riri pana vanomutya riri kune vane chitarisiro kumwoyochena wake 
Psalms33:19 kuti avanunure kurufu uye kuti avararamise panguva yenzara. 
Psalms33:20 Tinotarisira muna TENZI ndiye rubatsiro rwedu nenhoo yedu. 
Psalms33:21 Mwoyo yedu inofara naye nokuti tinovimba nezita rake rinoera. 
Psalms33:22 Mwoyochena wenyu ngauve patiri TENZI sokutarisira kwatinoita kwamuri. 
Psalms34:1 Kunaka kwakaita Mwari, ruenzaniso rwake Ndicharumbidza TENZI nguva dzose kumurumbidza hakuchabvi pamuromo pangu." 
Psalms34:2 Ini ndinodada naTENZI. Dai varombo vakazvinzwawo vafare. 
Psalms34:3 Ngatikudzei TENZI pamwechete neni, ngatirumbidzei zita rake pamwechete." 
Psalms34:4 Ndakatsvaka TENZI akandipindura; akandinunura kunazvose zvaindityisa. 
Psalms34:5 Tarisai kwaari mupenye, naizvozvo uso hwenyu hauzombonyari." 
Psalms34:6 Murombo uya akachema TENZI akamunzwa akamununura kumatambudziko ake ose. 
Psalms34:7 Mutumwa waTENZI anokomberedza vanomutya achivanunura. 
Psalms34:8 Ravirai munzwe kunaka kwaTENZI, akakomborerwa munhu anopotera kwaari." 
Psalms34:9 Ityai TENZI imi vatsvene vake; vanomutya hapana chavanoshaya. 
Psalms34:10 Zvigondora zveshumba zvinoshaya chokubata, zvinonzwa nzara; asi vanotsvaka TENZI hapana chavanoshaya." 
Psalms34:11 Uyai vana mundinzwe; ndichakudzidzisai kutya TENZI. 
Psalms34:12 Ndiani anoda zvake upenyu anoda upenyu hurefu nokuwana upenyu hwakanaka? 
Psalms34:13 Zvidzore rurumi rwako kuuipi, miromo yako irege kutaura nhema." 
Psalms34:14 Siyana nouipi uite zvakanaka, tsvaka rugare urutevere." 
Psalms34:15 Maziso aTENZI ari pavarurami, nzeve dzake dzakarerekera kuchichemo chavo." 
Psalms34:16 Uso hwaTENZI hwakanangana navakaipa kuti vakanganwike panyika. 
Psalms34:17 Kana vakarurama vakachemera rubatsiro TENZI anovanzwa achivanunura munhamo dzavo dzose. 
Psalms34:18 TENZI ari pedyo navakasuruvara anoponesa vanenge varasa mwoyo. 
Psalms34:19 Nhamo dzawakarurama dzakawanda asi TENZI anomuponesa madziri dzose. 
Psalms34:20 Anochengetedza mapfupa ake ose hapana kana rimwe rawo rinotyorwa. 
Psalms34:21 Uipi huchauraya vakaipa vanovenga varurami vachapihwa mhosva. 
Psalms34:22 TENZI anonunura upenyu hwavaranda vake. Hapana anopotera kwaari anopiwa mhosva. 
Psalms35:1 Kuipa kwakaita munhu mutadzi TENZI, navoi vanoita hondo neni, rwisai vanondirwisa." 
Psalms35:2 Torai nhoo ndiki nehuru musimuke kuzondibatsira. 
Psalms35:3 Zvuvai pfumo renyu negano renyu murwise vanondironda. Itii kwandiri, “Ndini ruponeso rwako.”" 
Psalms35:4 Ngavanyadziswe vafumurwe vanoda kundiuraya. Ngavadzorwe vadzungaidzwe vanoronga kundiitira zvakaipa. 
Psalms35:5 Ngavaite sehundi inopupurutswa nemhepo vachidzinganiswa nomutumwa waTENZI. 
Psalms35:6 Nzira yavo ngaiite rima itsvedze vachirondwa nomutumwa waTENZI. 
Psalms35:7 Nokuti vakandivanzira mambure avo pasina chikonzero vakandicherera gomba pasina chikonzero. 
Psalms35:8 Dai waro kuparadzwa kwangovawira vasingazivi. Dai waro vangobatwa namambure avakateya; ngavawiremo vaparare. 
Psalms35:9 Ipapo ndichapembera kufara muna TENZI ndichifarira zvikuru kununura kwake. 
Psalms35:10 Mapfupa angu achati, “TENZI ndiani akaita semi? Imi munonunura asina simba kune ane simba kupinda iye uye murombo naasina chaanacho kumupambi.”" 
Psalms35:11 Zvapupu zvina utsinye zvinomuka vanondibvunza mhosva dzandisingazivi. 
Psalms35:12 Vanondidzorera nezvakaipa pane zvakanaka zvandakavaitira. Mwoyo wangu unoshungurudzika. 
Psalms35:13 Asi pavairwara, ini ndakapfeka saga, ndakazvirwadzisa nokuzvinyima. Ndairamba ndichingonamata muhana mangu" 
Psalms35:14 sokunge ndiri kuchema shamwari kana hama. Ndaimhemhaira sokunge ndinochema amai vangu ndakatsikitsira musoro pasi ndichiungudza. 
Psalms35:15 Asi pandakagumhinha vakaunganidzana vachifara; vakaungana kuzondirwisa mhetamakumbo dzandakanga ndisingazivi dzakaramba dzichingotaura zvakaipa nezvangu. 
Psalms35:16 Vakandisveeredza sechirema vachindizhinyurira mazino. 
Psalms35:17 Kusvikira riniko nhai TENZI makangotarisa zvenyu kudai? Ndinunureiwo mukundirwisa kwavo mundinunurewo upenyu kushumba. 
Psalms35:18 Ndichakutendai musangano guru; ndichakurumbidzai mugungano guru. 
Psalms35:19 Ngavarege kufara pamusoro pangu vanondivenga pasina mhosva, varege kuchonyana maziso vaya vanondivenga pasina chikonzero." 
Psalms35:20 Havataure zvinorugare; vakazvinyararira zvavo munyika vanovarongera zvinhu zvounyengedzi. 
Psalms35:21 Vanondishamisira muromo kwazvo vachiti, “Toko waro, Toko waro. Tazvionera nameso.”" 
Psalms35:22 Imi mazviona TENZI, musanyarare TENZI musave kure neni." 
Psalms35:23 Zvigwinhei mumuke mundimiririre; mundirwire, imi Mwari wangu naTENZI wangu." 
Psalms35:24 Ndipembedzei TENZI Mwari wangu; maererano noururami hwenyu varege kundidadira. 
Psalms35:25 Ngavarege kuzviti, “Hauchionaka, zvataida tazviona.” Ngaverege kuti, “Takamumedza.”" 
Psalms35:26 Ngavanyadziswe vanyatsodumbirwa vanofarira nhamo dzangu. Ngavaputirwe nenyadzi nokuzvidzwa vanozviti ivo ndivo, ini vachindiisa pasi." 
Psalms35:27 Regai vanoda kuti ndipembedzwe vadaidzire norufaro varambe vachiti, “TENZI mukuru anofarira kubudirira kwomuranda wake.”" 
Psalms35:28 Ipapo rurimi rwangu ruchakurukura zvokururama kwenyu uye nezvembiri yenyu zuva rose. 
Psalms36:1 Uipi homunhu noururami hwaMwari Chitadzo chinotaura revo kune wakaipa mukatikati memwoyo wake chichiti kwaari zvokutya Mwari hapana. 
Psalms36:2 Anozvibata kumeso mukufunga kwake achiti: uipi hwake haugone kuzivikanwa nokuvengwa. 
Psalms36:3 Mazwi anobva pamuromo pake akaipa uye ndookunyengedza. Haachaiti zvina ungwaru kana zvakanaka. 
Psalms36:4 Anoronga zvinhu zvakaipa ari paanorara wotobva wozvirongera gwara risina kunaka; haavengi uipi. 
Psalms36:5 Mwoyochena wenyu, TENZI, unosvika kumatenga; uye kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumakore." 
Psalms36:6 Ururami hwenyu hwakaita samakomo aMwari; kutonga kwenyu kwaita sehwenje hwakadzika munonunura munhu nemhuka, TENZI." 
Psalms36:7 Hakusi kukosha ikoko kwakaita mwoyochena wenyu Mwari! Vanhu vanopotera mumumvuri wamapapiro enyu. 
Psalms36:8 Vanodyiririra zvakawanda zvomumba menyu. Munovanwisa parwizi rwezvinofadza zvenyu. 
Psalms36:9 Imi ndimi mune chisipiti choupenyu muchiedza chenyu ndimo matinoona chiedza. 
Psalms36:10 Rambai muchiita mwoyochena wenyu kuna vanokuzivai uye muponese vano mwoyo yakarurama. 
Psalms36:11 Rutsoka rwavanozvikudza ngarurege kunditsika kana kutinhwa noruoko rwowakaipa. 
Psalms36:12 Ipapo vakaipa vachati rakata kurara, vachati umburu pasi, vasisagoni kusimuka." 
Psalms37:1 Rwiyo rwaDhavhidhi. Usazvinetse nezvevanhu vakaipa, usaitire shanje vanoita zvakaipa" 
Psalms37:2 nokuti vachakurumidza kuuna souswa vachabhuruvara samakwenzi manyoro. 
Psalms37:3 Vimba naTENZI uite zvakanaka, naizvozvo uchagara panyika ugarike." 
Psalms37:4 Fara naTENZI iye achakupa zviri pamwoyo pako. 
Psalms37:5 Isa upenyu hwako muna TENZI vimba naye, iye achaona zvokuita." 
Psalms37:6 Achaita kuti ururami hwako hubude pachena sechiedza uye mamiriro oupenyu hwako sezuva ramasikati. 
Psalms37:7 Iti zii-i pana TENZI umumirire chinyararire. Usazvinetse zvako nezvomunhu anobudirira mune zvaanoita, munhu anoita zvinhu zvakaipa." 
Psalms37:8 Regera kuita hasha, usaite godo rega kuzvidya mwoyo zvinokupinza munezvakaipa," 
Psalms37:9 nokuti vakaipa vachaparadzwa asi vanotarisira naTENZI vachava ndivo varidzi venyika. 
Psalms37:10 Kunongoita kanguva kaduku chete, vakaipa panenge pasisina. Kana ukazonyatsotarisa panzvimbo yake anenge asisipo." 
Psalms37:11 Asi vanozvirereka vachava ndivo varidzi venyika vachazofara nokubudirira kukuru. 
Psalms37:12 Munhu akaipa anorongera mururami zano rakaipa achimuzhinyurira mazino. 
Psalms37:13 Asi TENZI anoseka wakaipa nokuti anozviona kuti zuva rake richasvika. 
Psalms37:14 Vakaipa vanozvomora mapakatwa avo nokutatamura uta hwavo kuti vauraye varombo navasina chavanacho. Kuti vauraye vanofamba zvakarurama. 
Psalms37:15 Bakatwa ravo richavabaya ivo mwoyo uye uta hwavo huchatyorwa. 
Psalms37:16 Vakarurama zvavanazvo zvishoma zvirinani pane zvakawanda zvavakaipa vazhinji. 
Psalms37:17 Maoko avakaipa achatyorwa asi TENZI anotsigira vakarurama. 
Psalms37:18 TENZI ane hanya noupenyu hwavakarurama. Nhaka yavo ichavapo nokusingaperi. 
Psalms37:19 Pamazuva akaipa havambonyadziswa pamazuva enzara ivo vanenge vane maguta. 
Psalms37:20 Asi vakaipa vachaparara mhandu dzaTENZI dzakafanana nokunaka kwamafuro anonyangarika soutsi. 
Psalms37:21 Muipi anokwereta asi haadzore asi mururami ane mwoyo wokupa uye anopa 
Psalms37:22 nokuti vanokomborerwa naTENZI nyika ichava yavo asi vaanopa rushambwa vanobva vaparara. 
Psalms37:23 Munhu kana achifamba anotungamirirwa naTENZI; anosimbisa munhu ano mugariro unomufadza 
Psalms37:24 Kunyange akawa, haabva ati mbombombo nokuti TENZI ndiye anomubata ruoko." 
Psalms37:25 Ndakanga ndiri muduku asi zvino ndakwegura, asi handina kumboona vakarurama vachiraswa kana vana vake vachikumbira chingwa." 
Psalms37:26 Anogara achipa zvakawanda uye achikweretesa vana vake vachiva chikomborero. 
Psalms37:27 Siana nouipi uite zvakanaka nokudaro uchagara nokusingaperi 
Psalms37:28 nokuti TENZI anoda ruenzaniso; haarasi varurami vake. Achavachengetedza nokusingaperi asi vana vavakaipa vachaparadzwa. 
Psalms37:29 Vakarurama ndivo vachava varidzi venyika uye vachagaramo nokusingaperi. 
Psalms37:30 Muromo womururami unotaura zvine ungwaru rurimi rwake runotaura noruenzaniso. 
Psalms37:31 Mutemo waMwari wake uri maari haadzadzariki pakufamba. 
Psalms37:32 Wakaipa anovandira wakarurama achitsvaka kumuuraya. 
Psalms37:33 TENZI haamurege achiwira mumaoko ake kana kumurega achipiwa mhosva paanotongwa. 
Psalms37:34 Mirira TENZI uchengete nzira yake. Iye achakukudza kuti nyika ive yako; unotozoona kuparadzwa kwavakaipa. 
Psalms37:35 Ndakamboona munhu wakaipa ano mukundo akati dzuu kwazvo somusidhari weRebhanoni. 
Psalms37:36 Ndakazopfuurazve napo asi akanga asisipo. Ndakamutsvaka asi akanga asisipo. 
Psalms37:37 Tarira uone munhu akarurama uone munhu ari pachokwadi, nokuti munhu worugare aneramangwana." 
Psalms37:38 Vatadzi vanofanira kuparadzwa zvachose upenyu hwavo hwamangwana huchaparadzwa. 
Psalms37:39 Ruponeso rwavakarurama runobva kuna TENZI ndiye diziro ravo panguva yenhamo. 
Psalms37:40 TENZI anovabatsira uye anovanunura. Anovanunura kuvakaipa achivaponesa nokuti vanovanda maari. 
Psalms38:1 Munamato womunhu warwara TENZI regai kunditsiura muine hasha, musandirove makashatirwa" 
Psalms38:2 nokuti miseve yenyu yanyatsondibaya kwazvo. Shamhu yoruoko rwenyu yakandirova. 
Psalms38:3 Hapana pachiri papenyu mumuviri wangu pamusana pokushatirwa kwenyu. Mumapfupa angu hamuna utano pamusana pechitadzo changu 
Psalms38:4 nokuti uipi hwanditi momote musoro, hunondiremera somutoro wandisingagoni kutakura." 
Psalms38:5 Maronda angu ava kuora uye avakunhuhwa pamusana poupenzi hwangu. 
Psalms38:6 Ndanyatsoti kokova, ndakombama ndinofamba ndichiungudza zuva rose." 
Psalms38:7 Muchiuno mangu muri kundipisa, hapana papenyu mumuviri wangu." 
Psalms38:8 Ndachiti rukutu ndapera basa ini. Ndinowuwura nokuda kwokushushika kwangu mumwoyo. 
Psalms38:9 TENZI zvandinosuwira munozviziva kugomera kwangu kuri pachena kwamuri. 
Psalms38:10 Hana yangu inorova, uye ndapera simba, maziso anguwo avakuonera madzerere." 
Psalms38:11 Hama neshamwari dzavakumirira kure neni nokuda kwechirwere changu. Vapadyo vava kutaramukana neni. 
Psalms38:12 Vanoda kundiuraya vanonditeya vanoda kundikuvadza vanotaurirana zvokundiparadza vanoswerondirangana zuva rose. 
Psalms38:13 Asi ini ndinoita zvangu samatsi asinganzwi sechimumumu chisingatauri. 
Psalms38:14 Chokwadi ndinoita samatsi anomukanwa musina gakava. 
Psalms38:15 Asi ini ndinotarisira kwamuri TENZI asi imi TENZI Mwari wangu ndimi muchapindura 
Psalms38:16 nokuti ndinoti, “Ngavarege kunditsvinyira vanondidadira kana ndatsvedza.”" 
Psalms38:17 Ndavakuda kuputsika uye ndiri kuramba ndichirwadziwa. 
Psalms38:18 Ndinoreurura zvitadzo zvangu ndine urombo nechivi changu. 
Psalms38:19 Vavengi vangu vapenyupenyu vakawanda uye vanondivenga, pasina mhosva, vazhinji." 
Psalms38:20 Vanondiitira zvakaipa, ini ndichivaitira zvakanaka, vanondivenga nokuti ndinoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms38:21 Musandirasewo TENZI, Mwari wangu musave kure neni." 
Psalms38:22 Kurumidzai kuzondibatsira Imi TENZI muponesi wangu. 
Psalms39:1 Kureurura kwemunhu ari kurwadziwa Ndakati regai ndingwarire zvandinoita kuti ndirege kutadza norurimi rwangu. Ndichabata muromo wangu kana vakaipa varipo chete. 
Psalms39:2 Ndakazviita chimumu zvangu chisingatauri ndakanyarara zvangu asi zvakanga zvisina chazvinobatsira. Kurwadziwa mwoyo kwangu kwatonyanya. 
Psalms39:3 Ndakatsva mwoyo mukati mangu pandairangarira ndakatsva neshungu. Ndipo pandakazotaura norurimi rwangu. 
Psalms39:4 TENZI ndiziviseiwo magumo angu uye kuwanda kwamazuva angu itaiwo kuti ndizive kusatana kupera kwamazuva angu. 
Psalms39:5 Tarisai muone kuti makaita kuti mazuva angu aite sezvanza zvamaoko kureba, nguva youpenyu hwangu hapana zvairi kwamuri. Chokwadi munhu wose akangoita sefemo zvaro. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms39:6 Zvirokwazvo munhu anofamba somumvuri, chokwadi vanotambudzika nhando; munhu anounganidza asi haazivi anozozvitora." 
Psalms39:7 Zvino chandinomirira ipapa chii nhai TENZI? Ndinovimba nemi. 
Psalms39:8 Ndinunureiwo kuzvitadzo zvangu. Musandirege ndichishorwa namapenzi. 
Psalms39:9 Ndakazviita chimumu chisingazarure muromo nokuti ndimi makazviita. 
Psalms39:10 Ndibvisireiwo shamhu yenyu pandiri. Ndasakara nokurohwa neruoko rwenyu. 
Psalms39:11 Kana mava kuranga munhu neshamhu muchimutsiura zvitadzo zvake, munoparadza zvaanodisisisa sechitemamachira; chokwadi munhu upi noupi ifemo zvaro. Dzepfunde." 
Psalms39:12 Inzwaiwo munamato wangu TENZI munzwe chichemo changu. Musanyararire misodzi yangu nokuti ndiri muenzi wenyu anopfuura mupfuuri zvake akafanana namadzitateguru angu. 
Psalms39:13 Musandidzvokore kuti ndifarewo ndisati ndapfuura ndichiva chinhu pasina. 
Psalms40:1 Rwiyo rwokurumbidza nokukumbira rubatsiro Ndakamira ndamirirazve TENZI, iye akarerekera kwandiri akanzwa chichemo changu." 
Psalms40:2 Akandiburitsa mugomba rinounga, kubva munhope yomunyakwe. Akanditsikisa padombo akatsigisa kufamba kwangu." 
Psalms40:3 Akaisa rwiyo rutsva pamuromo pangu, rumbo rwokurumbidza Mwari wedu; vazhinji vachazviona vakatya vachizovimba naTENZI." 
Psalms40:4 Akakomborerwa munhu anovimba naTENZI asingatsaukiri kuna vanozvikudza, kuvanhu vanoteterekera kuna vamwari vasirivo." 
Psalms40:5 TENZI Mwari makatiitira zvinhu zvizhinji, zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvamakatirongera. Hapana angaenzaniswe nemi. Dai kuri kuti ndinozviparidza ndichizvitaura hazvaiverengeka." 
Psalms40:6 Zvibayiro nemipiro hazvisizvo zvamunofarira asi chamakandipa inzeve dzinonzwa. Mupiro wokupisa nomupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo hamuikumbiri. 
Psalms40:7 Ndipo pandakati, “Tarisai ndinouya Mubhuku rokumononora makanyorwa nezvangu muchinzi:" 
Psalms40:8 ‘Ndinofarira kuita kuda kwenyu, Mwari wangu mutemo wenyu uri mumwoyo mangu.’ ”" 
Psalms40:9 Ndakaparidza shoko rinofadza roruponeso musangano guru. Handina kumbomedza mate sokuziva kwenyu TENZI. 
Psalms40:10 Handina kuvanza mumwoyo mangu kutaura zvoruponeso rwenyu runobatsira. Ndakataura nezvokutendeka kwenyu nokununura kwenyu. Handina kuvanza mwoyochena wenyu nokutendeka kwenyu kusangano renyu guru. 
Psalms40:11 Musarege henyu kundiitira tsitsi TENZI. Nomwoyochena wenyu nokutendeka kwenyu, rambai muchingondichengeta." 
Psalms40:12 Nokuti nhamo dzisingaverengeki dzandimomotera, zvitadzo zvangu zvandikunda zvokutotadza kuona. Zvakawanda kupinda vhudzi romusoro wangu. Ndarasa mwoyo ini." 
Psalms40:13 Ngazvikufadzei TENZI kundinunura Mwari chimbidzai kundibatsira. 
Psalms40:14 Vanoda kundiuraya ngavanyadziswe vadzungaire zvachose vanoda kubvuta upenyu hwangu. Ngavadzorwe vanyadziswe avo vanoda kundikuvadza. 
Psalms40:15 Ngavakatyamare pamusana pokunyara kwavo vanondisveeredza vachiti, “Tsvatu waro tsvatu waro.”" 
Psalms40:16 Asi vose vanokutsvakai ngavapembere nokufara mamuri; vanoda ruponeso rwenyu ngavarambe vachiti, “TENZI mukuru.”" 
Psalms40:17 Asi iniwo zvangu ndiri murombo nomunhu asina chaanacho. Asi TENZI anondifunga; ndimi mubatsiri wangu nomununuri wangu musanonoke Mwari wangu. 
Psalms41:1 Munamato womunhu anorwara Akakomborerwa munhu anofunga vanhu venhamo TENZI anomununura pazuva renhamo. 
Psalms41:2 TENZI anomuchengeta nokumuraramisa; achamupa rufaro panyika. Hamuisi mumaoko avavengi vake. 
Psalms41:3 TENZI achamusimbaradza paanenge arere nokurwara. Munosandura kurwara kwake muchimupa utano. 
Psalms41:4 Asi ini ndakati ndinzwirewo ngoni ndiporeseiwo nokuti ndakakutadzirai. 
Psalms41:5 Vavengi vangu vanotaura nezvangu noutsinye vachiti, “Ko anofa rinhiko iyeyu, zita rake ritsakatike.”" 
Psalms41:6 Panouya munhu kuzondiona anotaura achichema-chema zvenhando iye achitoongorora zvake zvinenge zvakaipa; kana abuda ndizvo zvaanoparidzira kose kose. 
Psalms41:7 Vose vanondivenga vanoita kazevezeve nezvangu, vanotofunga kuti ndichawirwa nezvakatoipisisa." 
Psalms41:8 Vanoti hazvimbomusiya izvi; paarere haambopamuka apa. 
Psalms41:9 Kunyange shamwari yangu chaiyo yapamwoyo yandaivimba nayo, yandaidya nayo, yakandimukira." 
Psalms41:10 Asi imi TENZI ndinzwireiwo ngoni mundisimudze ndivadzorerewo. 
Psalms41:11 Ndinobva ndaziva naizvozvo kuti munofadzwa neni zvokuti mhandu dzangu dzinenge dzisina kundikurira. 
Psalms41:12 Asi imi munenge manditsigira pamusana pokuvimbika kwangu mukandiisa pamuri nokusingaperi. 
Psalms41:13 Ngaarumbidzwe TENZI waMwari waIsiraeri narini narini. Ameni Ameni. 
Psalms42:1 Munamato womunhu ari muutapwa Sokusuwira mvura inoyerera — kunoita nondo, ndiko kukusuwirai kwandinoita, Mwari." 
Psalms42:2 Mweya wangu une nyota nemi Mwari, imi Mwari mupenyu. Ndichauya riniko ndizoona uso hwaMwari?" 
Psalms42:3 Upenyu hwangu yangova misodzi chete siku nesikati vanhu vachingonditi, “Iye Mwari wako aripi?”" 
Psalms42:4 Zvinhu izvi ndinozviyeuka ndichirwadziwa mwoyo: kuenda kwandaiita negurusvusvu ravanhu ndichitungamirira dungwerungwe ravo kuimba yaMwari nomupupuru nedzimbo dzokutenda, manyore manyore avanhu vachichengeta zuva guru." 
Psalms42:5 Ko ndasururavara neiko kudai iyeni? Ko ndadzongodzwa mwoyo mukati mangu seiko kudai? Ndinofanira kutarisira muna Mwari nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve iye rubatsiro rwangu 
Psalms42:6 naMwari wangu. Ndinosuruvara mumwoyo mangu, saka zvinondipa kukurangarirai ndiri munyika yokuJorodhani nokuHerimoni, ndiri kugomo reMiza." 
Psalms42:7 Maungira anodairana pakutinhira kunoita mapopo enyu. Masaisai enyu ose namasundesunde andifukidza. 
Psalms42:8 TENZI anoratidza mwoyochena wake masikati; usiku ndinobva ndadandaura kuimba rumbo rwake kuri kunyengetera kuna Mwari woupenyu hwangu. 
Psalms42:9 Ndinoti kuna Mwari, dombo rangu, “Makandikanganwireiko? Ndinofambireiko ndichichema nokushushwa kwandinoitwa nemhandu?”" 
Psalms42:10 Vavengi vangu vanondishora sokunge ndinodzimbirwa paronda riri mumuviri wangu. Vachingonditi, “Mwari wako aripiko?”" 
Psalms42:11 Ko ndasuruvara neiko kudai iyeni ko ndadzongodzwa mwoyo mukati mangu seiko kudai? Ndinotarisira kuna Mwari nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve iye rubatsiro rwangu naMwari wangu. 
Psalms43:1 Ndipembedzei Mwari mundidzivirirewo pamhosva yangu kuvanhu vakaipa mwoyo. Ndinunureiwo kuvanyengedzi navanhu vakaipa. 
Psalms43:2 Nokuti imi Mwari ndimi diziro rangu, mandirasireiko? Ndinofambirei ndichichema nokushushwa kwandinoitwa nemhandu?" 
Psalms43:3 Tumai mwenje wenyu nechokwadi chenyu zvinditungamirire zvinditsvitse kugomo renyu rinoera nokwamunogara. 
Psalms43:4 Ndinobva ndaenda kuatari yaMwari, kuna Mwari anondipa rufaro rusingatauriki. Ndichakurumbidzai nechipendani Mwari, Mwari wangu." 
Psalms43:5 Ko ndasuruvara neiko kudai iyeni ko ndadzongodzwa mwoyo mukati mangu seiko kudai? Ndinotarisira muna Mwari nokuti ndichamurumbidzazve iye rubatsiro rwangu naMwari wangu. 
Psalms44:1 Nyika inokumbira kudzivirirwa Mwari isu takanzwa nenzeve dzedu, madzitateguru edu akatitaurira zvamakaita pamazuva avo pasichigare." 
Psalms44:2 Imi makadzinga vechirudzi namaoko enyu, uye kuti ivo vadzikemo misha, makatambudza vechirudzi mukavatandanisa." 
Psalms44:3 Havana kukurira nyika nehondo yebakatwa kana kukunda nesimba roruoko rwavo; asi noruoko rwenyu rworudyi nesimba roruoko rwenyu uye nechiedza chouso hwenyu nokuti makafadzwa navo. 
Psalms44:4 Ndimi mambo wangu naMwari wangu itii vokwaJakobho vakunde. 
Psalms44:5 Nesimba renyu tinokurira mhandu dzedu; nezita renyu tinotsikatsika vanotirwisa. 
Psalms44:6 Handivimbi nouta hwangu kunyange bakatwa rangu harindiponesi. 
Psalms44:7 Asi imi makatinunura kumhandu dzedu mukanyadzisa vanotivenga. 
Psalms44:8 Tinovimba nguva dzose naMwari wedu uye tichatenda Mwari wedu nokusingaperi. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms44:9 Asi zvino makatirasa mukatinyadzisa uye hamuna kutsigirana nehondo dzedu. 
Psalms44:10 Mukaita kuti titize vavengi vedu mhandu dzedu dzikatowana zvadzo zvokupamba. 
Psalms44:11 Makatiita sehwai dzokubaya mukatimwararisa mukati memarudzi. 
Psalms44:12 Makatengesa vanhu venyu nomutengo usina maturo asi chamakabura ipapo hapana. 
Psalms44:13 Makatishoresa navavakidzani vedu tikave chiseko nechinhu chinonyombwa navakatipoteredza. 
Psalms44:14 Tatove tsumo pakati pevechirudzi. Mukati mavanhu, tinotodzungudzirwa musoro." 
Psalms44:15 Zuva rose ndinoswera ndichinyara ndadonha uso nokunyara 
Psalms44:16 namashoko okunyomba nokushora pamberi pomuvengi nomutsividzi. 
Psalms44:17 Zvose izvi zvakatiwira asi isu tisina kukukanganwai kana kusatendeka kuchitenderano chenyu. 
Psalms44:18 Mwoyo yedu haina kufuratira uye tsoka dzedu hadzina kutsauka pagwara renyu. 
Psalms44:19 Asi imi makatipwanya panzvimbo inogara makava, mukatifukidza nerima rakati kwirindindi." 
Psalms44:20 Dai kuri kuti takakanganwa zita raMwari wedu kana kusimudzira maoko edu kuna Mwari asiri iye," 
Psalms44:21 iye Mwari angadai asina kuzviona here? Nokuti anoziva wani zviri mumwoyo zvakavandika. 
Psalms44:22 Inga tinouraiwa zuva rose tichitorwa sehwai dzokubaya. 
Psalms44:23 Mukai TENZI, munokotsirireiko? Mukai musatirase zvachose." 
Psalms44:24 Munozvivanzirei uso? Munokanganwirei nhamo nokushushwa kwatinoitwa. 
Psalms44:25 Tazvambarara muguruva, tachiti kwati kwati pasi." 
Psalms44:26 Simukai muuye kuzotibatsira. Tinunureiwo nokuda kwomwoyochena wenyu. 
Psalms45:1 Rwiyo rwomuchato wamambo Mwoyo wangu unotutuma namashoko akanaka ndinodetemba nhetembo yangu kuna Mambo rurimi rwangu rwakaita sepenzura yenyanzvi yomunyori. 
Psalms45:2 Imi makanaka chimiro kupinda vanhu vose mune rurimi runotaura zvinonwisa mvura; saizvozvo Mwari akakukomborerai narini narini. 
Psalms45:3 Imi gamba pakatirai bakatwa renyu rinokupai mbiri nechiremera chenyu," 
Psalms45:4 mufambe nechiremera nokukunda kwenyu muchimiririra chokwadi noruenzaniso ruoko rwenyu rworudyi ruratidze zviito zvinotyisa. 
Psalms45:5 Miseve yenyu yakapinza inobaya mwoyo yavavengi venyu, mambo. Vanhu vanowira pasi penyu" 
Psalms45:6 chigaro chenyu choushe chakagadzwa naMwari chinogara nokusingaperi. Tsvimbo yenyu youshe itsvimbo yokutendeka. 
Psalms45:7 Munoda ururami muchivenga uipi, naizvozvo Mwari, Mwari wenyu akakuzodzai namafuta anoratidza kufara kuti muve pamusoro pavamwe venyu." 
Psalms45:8 Magemenzi enyu anonhuwirira mura nearosi nekasia. Mumuzinda wenyu wakashongedzwa nenyanga dzenzou, madimbwa anokufadzai." 
Psalms45:9 Vanasikana vamambo varipo pakati pavakadzi vomumuzinda, kurudzi kwenyu kwakamira mambokadzi anezvishongo zvendarama yokuOfiri." 
Psalms45:10 Chinzwa mwanasikana, nyatsopafungisisa uteerere: vanhu vokwako neveimba yokwababa vako kanganwa." 
Psalms45:11 Mambo achafadzwa norunako rwako. Zvaari tenzi wako mukotamire. 
Psalms45:12 Vanhu vokuTire vachakuunzira zvipo, ivo vapfumi chaivo" 
Psalms45:13 vachakuunzirai upfumi hworudzi norudzi. Mukunda anoshongedzwa muimba make namagemenzi akarukwa nendarama. 
Psalms45:14 Anozotungamidzwa kuna mambo akapfeka magemenzi ana mavara mavara aine mhandara dzake dzokumuperekedza mudungwerungwe rake. 
Psalms45:15 Vanotungamirirwa nomufaro vachipururudza vachipinda mumuzinda wamambo. 
Psalms45:16 Vokutsiva madzibaba enyu, mambo muchava navana muchavaita madzishe apanyika pose." 
Psalms45:17 Ndichaita kuti zita renyu rirangarirwe pazvizvarwa zvose naizvozvo marudzi avanhu achakurumbidzai narini narini. 
Psalms46:1 Mwari anesu Mwari ndiye diziro redu nesimba redu. Mubatsiri anogara ari padyo panguva yenhamo. 
Psalms46:2 Saka hatityi kunyange nyika ikasanduka kunyange makomo akazunguzika zvokuwira mukatikati megungwa," 
Psalms46:3 kunyange mvura yaro ikatinhira nokupupuma, kunyange makomo akazunguzika zvawo noruzha rwaro. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms46:4 Kune rwizi runotukova tunofadza guta raMwari; nzvimbo yokugara inoera yoWokumusorosoro. 
Psalms46:5 Mwari ari mukati maro; harichazombokurirwa. Mwari acharibatsira kumambakwedza chaiko. 
Psalms46:6 Kunyange marudzi akaita zvawo bongozozo uye umambo noumambo hukazungunutswa anongotaura chete nezwi rake, nyika ichibva yanyungudika." 
Psalms46:7 TENZI wehondo nehondo anesu Mwari waJakobho ndiye diziro redu. Dzepfunde 
Psalms46:8 Uyai muone mabasa aMwari akaita zvisingatauriki panyika. 
Psalms46:9 Anomisa hondo kusvika kwakaperera nyika, anotyora uta achityoranisa mapfumo, anopisa ngoro dzehondo nemoto." 
Psalms46:10 Nyararai muti zii muzive kuti ndiri Mwari, ndinorumbidzwa pakati pamarudzi, ndinorumbidzwa panyika." 
Psalms46:11 TENZI wehondo nehondo anesu Mwari waJakobho ndiye diziro. 
Psalms47:1 Muimbisi, urwu Rwiyo rwevekwaKora. Uchirai imi marudzi ose avanhu. Daidzirai kuna Mwari muimbe kwazvo norufaro" 
Psalms47:2 nokuti TENZI Wokumusorosoro anotyisa kwazvo. Ndiye mambo mukuru wapasi pose. 
Psalms47:3 Akaita kuti tikunde marudzi avanhu, akaisa marudzi pasi petsoka dzenyu." 
Psalms47:4 Ndiye akatisarudzira nyika yenhaka yedu, nhaka inodadisa yaJakobho wake wapamwoyo. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms47:5 Mwari anokwira pamusoro achipurudzirwa, TENZI achipembererwa nebhosvo." 
Psalms47:6 Imbirai Mwari muchimurumbidza, muimbirei muchimurumbidza. Imbai muchirumbidza Mambo wedu muimbirei muchimurumbidza" 
Psalms47:7 nokuti Mwari ndiye mambo wapasi pose muimbirei muchimurumbidza norumbo. 
Psalms47:8 Mwari ndiye anotonga vechirudzi Mwari anogara pachigaro chake chokutonga chinoera. 
Psalms47:9 Madzishe amarudzi avanhu anoungana savanhu vaMwari waAbhurahamu nokuti vachengetedzi venyika ndevaMwari anorumbidzwa zvikuru kwazvo. 
Psalms48:1 Zioni guta raMwari TENZI mukuru anofanira kurumbidzwa zvikuru muguta raMwari wedu, mugomo rake rinoera." 
Psalms48:2 Kuti dzu-u kwaro kunoyevedza, rinopa rufaro pasi pose. Iro gomo reZioni riri kuchamhembe iguta ramambo mukuru." 
Psalms48:3 Mukati nhare dzaro dzokuzvidzivirira muhondo, Mwari akaratidza kuti ndiye mudziviriri wechokwadi" 
Psalms48:4 nokuti tarisai muone madzimambo akakokorodzana, vakauya kuzoita chirwirangwe." 
Psalms48:5 Pavakazviona izvi, vakadumbirwa kwazvo zvakavatyisa ndokubva vati ware kutiza." 
Psalms48:6 Vakadedera ipapo vakarwadziwa somudzimai ari pahata. 
Psalms48:7 Makaparadza ngarava dzokuTarishishi nedutu rokumabvazuva. 
Psalms48:8 Zvatakanzwa ndizvo zvatakaonawo muguta raTENZI wehondo nehondo, muguta raMwari wedu Mwari acharisimbisa nokusingaperi. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms48:9 Mukati meTemberi yenyu, Mwari, tinorangarira nezvomwoyochena wenyu." 
Psalms48:10 Sezvakangoita zita renyu Mwari, ndizvozvo zvakaita mbiri yenyu inosvika kwakaperera nyika. Ruoko rwenyu rworudyi rwuzere nokururama ngarifare." 
Psalms48:11 Guta rapagomo reZioni ngarifare. Tumaguta twokwaJudha ngatufare pamusana pokutonga kwenyu. 
Psalms48:12 Famba fambai neguta reZioni, tendererai naro muverenge nharire dzaro." 
Psalms48:13 Nyatsoongororai tsvingo dzaro munyatsotarisa nharo dzaro dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo kuti mozoudza chizvarwa chinotevera 
Psalms48:14 nokuti Mwari uyu ndiye Mwari wedu narini narini; ndiye achatitungamirira narini narini. 
Psalms49:1 Muimbisi, urwu rwiyo rwevekwaKora Inzwai imi mose marudzi avanhu teererai imi vagari vapanyika." 
Psalms49:2 Imi voruzhinji nemi vakuru vakuru imi vapfumi navarombo pamwechete. 
Psalms49:3 Muromo wangu uchataura ungwaru zvandinorangarira mumwoyo mangu zvinonzwisisika. 
Psalms49:4 Ndicharerekera nzeve yangu kutsumo. Ndicharapanura chirahwe changu mukuimba kwangu nechipendani. 
Psalms49:5 Ndingatyirei zvangu pamazuva akaipa kana uipi hwavavengi vangu hwandikomberedza. 
Psalms49:6 Vanhu vanovimba noupfumi hwavo vachazvikudza nokuwanda kwopfuma yavo? 
Psalms49:7 Asi hapana munhu angambogona kuzvidzikinura kana kuripa Mwari mutengo woupenyu hwake. 
Psalms49:8 Nokuti muripo woupenyu hwomunhu mukuru haumbofa wakakwana 
Psalms49:9 kuti arambe ari mupenyu nokusingaperi asina kuwana kuora. 
Psalms49:10 Achatozviona kuti kunyange vangwaru vanofa. Benzi nedununu vanoparara zvimwechetezvo vachiisiira upfumi hwavo kuna vamwe. 
Psalms49:11 Makuva avo ndiwo achava misha yavo nokusingaperi. Ndiyo nzvimbo yavo yokugara pazvizvarwa zvose. Kunyange vakatumidza nyika namazita avo. 
Psalms49:12 Munhu haagoni kuramba ane mukurumbira wake; akangoitawo semhuka dzinoparara. 
Psalms49:13 Iwoyu ndiwo mugumo wavanhu vanozvitora; mugumo wavanhu vanofarisa nezvavanazvo. Dzepfunde 
Psalms49:14 Sehwai, vanotemerwa kuenda kunzvimbo yavakafa. Rufu ruchava mufudzi wavo vakarurama vachavatonga mangwanani chaiwo uye muviri wavo uchadyika. Nzvimbo yavakafa ndiyo ichava musha kwavari." 
Psalms49:15 Asi Mwari achandinunura upenyu kusimba renzvimbo yavakafa nokuti achandigamuchira. Dzepfunde 
Psalms49:16 Usakatyamare zvako kana munhu akava mupfumi kunyange mbiri yemba yake ikadhuma 
Psalms49:17 nokuti paanofa hapana chaanoenda nacho. Mbiri yake haidziki naye ichimutevera 
Psalms49:18 nokuti kunyange zvazvo paaiva mupenyu aizviti akakomborerwa uye kunyange akarumbidzwa zvake paanenge abudirira. 
Psalms49:19 Achatoenda kuchizvarwa chamadzitateguru ake vasingazombofa vakaona chiedza. 
Psalms49:20 Munhu haagoni kuramba aine mukurumbira wake akangoitawo somhuka dzinoparara. 
Psalms50:1 Kunamata kwepachokwadi Iye Samasimbaose TENZI Mwari anotaura, anodaidzira pasi pose kubvira kumabvazuva kusvikira kumadokero." 
Psalms50:2 Mwari anopenya ari mugomo reZioni, gomo rakanakisisa kwazvo." 
Psalms50:3 Mwari wedu anouya haanyarari. Pamberi pake pane moto unoririmisa akatenderedzwa nedutu remhepo. 
Psalms50:4 Anokoka matenga kusoro nenyika kuti atonge vanhu vake. 
Psalms50:5 “Ndiunganidzirei vakazvipira kwandiri vakaita chitenderano nechibayiro neni.” 
Psalms50:6 Matenga anotaura nezvoururami hwake nokuti iye Mwari ndiye mutongi. Dzepfunde 
Psalms50:7 “Teererai munzwe imi vanhu vangu ini ndichataura imi vaIsiraeri ndichakupai mhosva ndini Mwari, Mwari wenyu." 
Psalms50:8 Handikutsiurirei zvibayiro zvenyu, mipiro yenyu yokupisa inogara iri pamberi pangu." 
Psalms50:9 Handichagamuchiri handira kubva kumba yenyu kana chikotora mudanga renyu 
Psalms50:10 nokuti mhuka yose zvayo yesango ndeyangu kana idzo mombe mumakomo akazanirana. 
Psalms50:11 Shiri dzose dzomumakomo ndinodziziva uye zvose zvinofamba musango ndezvangu. 
Psalms50:12 Dai kuri kuti ndaita nzara, handaiudza iwe nokuti pasi pose nazvose zviripo ndezvangu." 
Psalms50:13 Ko ini ndinodya nyama yehandira here kana kunwa ropa rembudzi here? 
Psalms50:14 Kutenda kwako ngakuve chibayiro chako uite zvawakatsidza kuita kunoWokumusorosoro. 
Psalms50:15 Pakadaro daidzira kwandiri pazuva renhamo ndichakununura ukatozondirumbidza.” 
Psalms50:16 Kune wakaipa Mwari anoti, “Unodetemberei mitemo yangu, kana kutaura pamuromo pako chitenderano changu?" 
Psalms50:17 Zvokudzorwa haudi uye unofuratira mazwi angu. 
Psalms50:18 Ukaona mbavha unobva waita ushamwari nayo uye unoita usahwira nemhombwe. 
Psalms50:19 Unotopa muromo wako manyemwe okutaura zvakaipa. Rurimi rwako runoronga unyengedzi 
Psalms50:20 Unogara pasi uchitaura zvakaipa nezvemukoma kana munun'una wako uchinyeya mwana wamai vako chaiye. 
Psalms50:21 Wakaita izvi, asi inindikanyarara zvangu, wakafungaka iwe kuti ndakafanana newe; zvino ndinokutsiura ndichikupa mhosva." 
Psalms50:22 Nzwisisai izvi, imi munokanganwa Mwari ndingadaro ndikabvarura munhu pagoshaya anonunura." 
Psalms50:23 Chibayiro chokutenda chinondiremekedza uye munhu anogadziridza upenyu hwake ndichamuratidza ruponeso rwaMwari.” 
Psalms51:1 Munamato wokupfidza Ndinzwireiwo tsitsi Mwari pamusana pemwoyochena wenyu nokuda kwengoni dzenyu zhinji. Pfudzai kukanganisa kwangu. 
Psalms51:2 Ndishambidzei kwazvo kuuipi hwangu mundinatsewo kuchitadzo changu 
Psalms51:3 nokuti kukanganisa kwangu ndinokuziva uye chitadzo changu chinogara chiri pamwoyo pangu. 
Psalms51:4 Imi, imi chete ndimi vandakatadzira, kwamuri ndakaita zvakaipa zvokuti zvamakatema zvakarurama uye kutonga kwenyu hakuna chinoshoreka." 
Psalms51:5 Onai kuti ndakaberekwa muuipi mai vangu vakabata pamuviri pangu ndiri muchitadzo. 
Psalms51:6 Inga wani munoda chokwadi mukatikati momunhu; naizvozvo ndidzidziseiwo ungwaru mukatikati mangu makavandika. 
Psalms51:7 Ndinatsei nakapazi komuhisopu ini ndichabva ndachena ndishambidzei ndibva ndachena kupinda mazaya echando. 
Psalms51:8 Regai ndinzwe kufara, ndipembere nokufara. Ndifaranutsei pakundityora mapfupa kwamakaita." 
Psalms51:9 Dai marega tarisa zvitadzo zvangu mupfudze zvenyu uipi hwangu hose. 
Psalms51:10 Ndipei mwoyo wakachena Mwari wangu muise mandiri mweya kwawo mutsva. 
Psalms51:11 Musandidzinge pamuri uye musabvise Mweya wenyu mutsvene mandiri. 
Psalms51:12 Ndidzorerewo rufaro rworuponeso rwenyu mundichengetedze ndiine mwoyo wokuteerera. 
Psalms51:13 Ndingatozodzidziswa nzira dzenyu vanhu vanokanganisa, vatadzi vachitozodzokerawo kwamuri." 
Psalms51:14 Ndinunureiwo Mwari kumhosva yokuparadza ropa, imi Mwari mununuri wangu rurimi rwangu ruchapururudzira kununura kwenyu." 
Psalms51:15 TENZI zarurai miromo yangu muromo wangu uparidze mbiri yenyu. 
Psalms51:16 Nokuti hachisi chibayiro chamunofarira imi, kunyange zvazvo ndaipira mupiro wokupisa hamaimbofadzwa nawo," 
Psalms51:17 chibayiro changu kunemi Mwari, mwoyo wakatyoka-tyoka mwoyo wakatyoka uye wakatendeuka hamushore, Mwari." 
Psalms51:18 Itirai Zioni zvakanaka sokuda kwenyu; vakai zvakare masvingo eJerusaremu. 
Psalms51:19 Ipapo muchafadzwa nezvibayiro zvakarurama zvibayiro zvokupisa uye zvibayiro zvokupisa mutumbi wose. Ipapo handira dzichapirwa paatari yenyu. 
Psalms52:1 Mugumo wowakaipa Nhai iwe gamba unozvikudzireiko nezvakaipa uchiti Mwari akanaka misi yose. 
Psalms52:2 Saka zuva rose uchitoronga zvako zvokuparadza. Rurimi rwako rwakaita sechisvo chinopinza, iwe murongi wounyengedzi." 
Psalms52:3 Unoda zvakaipa kupinda zvakanaka, unoda nhema kupinda kutaura zvakarurama. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms52:4 Unoda mazwi anokuvadza iwe munyengedzi. 
Psalms52:5 Asi Mwari achakukoromora nokusingaperi achakubata agokubvuta mutendhe rako. Achakutipura kubva munyika yavapenyu. Dzepfunde 
Psalms52:6 Vakarurama vachizviona vachakatyamara vakamuseka vachiti,"
