Psalms52:7 “Tarisai muone munhu asina kuda kupotera muna Mwari; asi akavimba nokuwanda kwoupfumi hwake akapotera muupfumi hwake.” 
Psalms52:8 Asi ini ndakaita somuorivhi munyoro mumba maMwari. Ndinovimba nemwoyochena waMwari narini narini. 
Psalms52:9 Ndichakutendai nokusingaperi nokuti makazviita. Ndicharumbidza zita renyu pana vakarurama nokuti rakanaka. 
Psalms53:1 Munhu wakaipa Benzi rinoti nechomumwoyo, “Hakuna Mwari.” Vane tsika dzakaora vanoita zvakaipa zvinosemesa; hapana anoita zvakanaka." 
Psalms53:2 Mwari ari kudenga akatarisa pasi kuvanhu kuti aone kana pana vanoita zvine ungwaru. Vanotsvaka Mwari," 
Psalms53:3 vose vakatsauka, vose vakangofanana, vane tsika dzakaora. Hapana anoita zvakanaka kana mumwechete zvake." 
Psalms53:4 Ko havanzwisisi here, ivo vaiti vezvakaipa vanodya vanhu vangu savanodya chingwa vasingachemi kuna Mwari?" 
Psalms53:5 Ikoko vachabatwa nokutya kukuru, kutya kusati kwamboitika. Nokuti Mwari achamwararisa mapfupa ouyo anokukombai. Iwe uchatonyarawo nazvo, nokuti Mwari akavarasa." 
Psalms53:6 Dai ruponeso rweIsiraeri rwangobva kugomo reZioni, Mwari ava kudzosa vaIsiraeri kuutapwa; vokwaJakobho vachapembera kufara; vokwaIsiraeri vachafara." 
Psalms54:1 Muimbisi, urwu rumbo rwaDhavhidhi, runoimbwa nezvokuimbisa zvetambo dzewaya; nderwekuenda kwakaita Zefoni achindoudza Sauro kuti Dhavhidhi akavanda pakati pedu. Ndinunureiwo Mwari nezita renyu, nesimba renyu mundipembedze." 
Psalms54:2 Inzwaiwo munamato wangu, Mwari; teereraiwo mazwi omuromo wangu" 
Psalms54:3 nokuti madzenga avanhu andimukira mharadzi dzinoda kundiuraya. Havana hanya nezvokuti kuna Mwari. Dzepfunde 
Psalms54:4 Chinzwai, Mwari ndiye mubatsiri wangu. TENZI ndiye muchengeti woupenyu hwangu." 
Psalms54:5 Achadzorera vavengi vangu nezvakaipa. Pamusana pemwoyochena wenyu vaparadzei. 
Psalms54:6 Ini ndichapira chibayiro chokupa nomwoyo wangu; ndichatenda zita renyu nokuti rakanaka 
Psalms54:7 nokuti makandinunura kunhamo dzose. Ndikaona nameso angu kukundwa kwavavengi vangu. 
Psalms55:1 Munamato womunhu apandukirwa neshamwari Inzwaiwo munamato wangu, Mwari; musavande chikumbiro changu." 
Psalms55:2 Nditeererei mundipindurewo, nhamo yangu yandiomera." 
Psalms55:3 Ndadumbirwa ini noruzha rwavavengi pamusana poudzvinyiriri hwavakaipa vanondiunzira nhamo. Vanoita daka neni zvine hasha. 
Psalms55:4 Ndinoshunguridzika mwoyo mukati mangu, ndawirwa nokutya rufu." 
Psalms55:5 Kutya nokudedera zvauya pandiri. Ndabatwa nokutya kwakanyanya. 
Psalms55:6 Nezvo ndinoti dai zvangu ndiina mapapiro senjiva, ndaibhururuka ndikandozorora." 
Psalms55:7 Ndaibhururukira kure ndichindogara kurenje. Dzepfunde 
Psalms55:8 Ndaikurumidza kundozvitsvagira pokuvanda mhepo inovhuvhuta nesimba nedutu guru. 
Psalms55:9 TENZI paradzanisai mupesanise ndimi dzavo nokuti ndinoona utsinye nokurwisana muguta. 
Psalms55:10 Siku nesikati vanoritenderera napamusoro pemasvingo aro. Unhunzvatunzva nokunetsa zvirimo. 
Psalms55:11 Mune kuparadza mukati maro; uye udzvinyiriri nounyengedzi hazvibvi pamusika pavo. 
Psalms55:12 Dai kuri kuti muvengi anondisokosa, ndaitirira zvangu. Dai kuri kuti imhandu inondisora, ndaikwanisa kuivanda." 
Psalms55:13 Asi kuti ndiwe wezera neni, mumwe wangu shamwari yangu chaiyo." 
Psalms55:14 Taimbokurukurirana zvakanaka kwazvo. Tichifamba tose noushamwari mumba yaMwari. 
Psalms55:15 Ngavaerekane vaparara vaende kunzvimbo yavakafa vari vapenyu kudaro nokuti uipi huri mavanogara, huri pakati pavo." 
Psalms55:16 Asi ini ndinochema kuna Mwari, TENZI achandinunura." 
Psalms55:17 Manheru namangwanani uye masikati, ndinoisa chichemo changu ndichidemba; iye achanzwa izwi rangu." 
Psalms55:18 Achandinunura norugare pahondo yandiri kurwisa nokuti vanondirwisa vakawanda. 
Psalms55:19 Mwari achanzwa zvake agovaninipisa, iye ari pachigaro choushe kubvira pasi chigare nokuti havasanduki uye havatyi Mwari. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms55:20 Mumwe wangu akarwisana neshamwari dzake; akatyora chitenderano chake, kutaura kwake kwakanga kwakapfavirira kupinda dovi asi mumwoyo make iri hondo chaiyo." 
Psalms55:21 Mazwi ake akanga akapfava kupinda mafuta asi ari mapakatwa akazvomorwa. 
Psalms55:22 Turira mutoro wako kuna TENZI iye achaita kuti urambe wakagwinya. Haambobvumira kuti vakarurama vazunguzwe. 
Psalms55:23 Asi imi Mwari dzikandei mugomba rapasi pasi mhondi idzodzi, vanhu voujarijari vasati vambosvika pakati napakati poupenyu hwavo. Asi ini ndichavimba nemi." 
Psalms56:1 Munamato wokuvimba naMwari Ndinzwireiwo tsitsi, Mwari nokuti vanhu vanonditsika-tsika nokuti vavengi vangu vanondionesa nhamo zuva rose." 
Psalms56:2 Mhandu dzangu dzinonditsika-tsika zuva rose nokuti vanondirwisa vakawanda Wokumusorosoro wee! 
Psalms56:3 Wokumusorosoro pandinenge ndavakutya ndinovimba nemi. 
Psalms56:4 Ndinovimba naMwari ana mashoko andinorumbidza. Ndinovimba naMwari ndisingatyi. Vanhu vangandiiteiko? 
Psalms56:5 Zuva rose vanoisa napasipo zvandinotaura, zvavanofunga ndezvokundikuvadza chete." 
Psalms56:6 Vanoungana pamwechete kundivandira vachitarisa mafambiro angu vachigaririra kuti vandiuraye. 
Psalms56:7 Naizvozvo varangirei mhosva yavo, Mwari putsirai marudzi pasi." 
Psalms56:8 Munoziva kuyaura kwangu. Chingidzirai misodzi yangu muguchu renyu redehwe. Handiti zvakanyorwa mubhuku renyu here? 
Psalms56:9 Ipapo vavengi vangu vachadzoserwa shure pazuva randinodanidzira. Izvi ndinozviziva kuti Mwari ari kudivi kwangu. 
Psalms56:10 Ndinovimba naMwari ana mashoko andinorumbidza, naTENZI ana mashoko andinorumbidza." 
Psalms56:11 Ndinovimba naMwari ndisingatyi. Vanhu vangandiiteiko. 
Psalms56:12 Ndinofanira kuita zvakandatsidza kwamuri Mwari. Ndichapira kwamuri mupiro wangu wokutenda. 
Psalms56:13 Nokuti makandinunura kurufu uye makumbo angu kuti arege kudzadzarika kuti ndifambe pana Mwari muchiedza choupenyu. 
Psalms57:1 Munamato wokukumbira rubatsiro Ndinzwireiwo tsitsi Mwari, ndinzwireiwo tsitsi nokuti ndinopotera kwamuri. Ndinovanda nomumvuri wamapapiro enyu kusvikira dutu rokuparadza rapfuura." 
Psalms57:2 Ndinochema kwamuri, Mwari wokumusorosoro, kuna Mwari Mupedzanhamo wangu." 
Psalms57:3 Achandinunura ari kudenga ikoko; achanyadzisa vanonditsikatsika. Dzepfunde Mwari achandiitira mwoyochena uye achave akatendeka kwandiri. 
Psalms57:4 Ndirere pakati peshumba dzavanhu dzinongandukira vanhu somoto. Mazino avo mapfumo nemiseve chaiyo ndimi dzavo mapakatwa zvawo kupinza. 
Psalms57:5 Dai mangokudzwa zvenyu imi Mwari kumusoro kumatenga mbiri yenyu itekeshere pasi pose. 
Psalms57:6 Vakanditeya makumbo namambure, ndadzungaira ini. Vakachera gomba munzira mangu; asi vakawira mariri ivo pachavo. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms57:7 Mwoyo wangu wakagadzikana, Mwari, mwoyo wakagadzikana; ndichaimba ndichirumbidza." 
Psalms57:8 Muka iwe mweya wangu, mukai imi dimbwa nechipendani ndimutse mambakwedza." 
Psalms57:9 Ndichakutendai TENZI pakati pavanhu vamarudzi. Ndichaimba ndichikurumbidzai pakati pendudzi dzavanhu 
Psalms57:10 nokuti mwoyochena wenyu mukuru kusvika kumatenga uye kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumakore. 
Psalms57:11 Dai mangokudzwa zvenyu Mwari kumusoro kumatenga mbiri yenyu itekeshere pasi pose. 
Psalms58:1 Mwari mutongi wavatongi Imi madzishe zvamunotema zvine ruenzaniso here? Munotonga vanhu zviri pamutsetse here? 
Psalms58:2 Kwete, imi mumwoyo menyu munoronga zvisina kunaka; munoita utsinye panyika namaoko enyu." 
Psalms58:3 Vakaipa vanotsauka kubvira mudumbu; vanokanganisa kubvira pakuberekwa kwavo vachitaura nhema. 
Psalms58:4 Vane uturu, uturu hunenge hwenyoka sechiva chinodzivira nzeve dzacho" 
Psalms58:5 kuti chirege kunzwa izwi ravadaidzi wenyoka kana roujarijari hwamapipi okuimba. 
Psalms58:6 Mwari, tyoranisai mazino mukanwa mavo kwachurai TENZI mazino marefu eshumba dzechidiki." 
Psalms58:7 Ngavanyangarike semvura inoyerera; ngavatsikirirwe souswa vaune. 
Psalms58:8 Ngavaite sehozhwa inonyungudika kuita masiriri, semwana akaberekwa asina kusvika asingambofa akaona chiedza." 
Psalms58:9 Hari dzenyu dzisati dzambonzwa moto wetsotso dzeminzwa minyoro kana yakaoma Mwari ngaavatsvaire. 
Psalms58:10 Mururami achafara paanoona kutsividza ikoko. Achatoshamba zvake tsoka dzake muropa ravakaipa. 
Psalms58:11 Vanhu vachati chokwadi pane mubayiro wavarurami; chokwadi kuna Mwari anotonga panyika. 
Psalms59:1 Kukumbira kuchengetedzwa Ndinunureiwo Mwari kuvavengi vangu. Ndidzivirireiwo kune vari kundimukira. 
Psalms59:2 Ndinunureiwo kuvaiti vezvakaipa, ndiponeseiwo kuvanhu vanofarira kudeura ropa." 
Psalms59:3 Nokuti tarisai muone vanondihwandira vachida kundiuraya. Varume vanotyisa vanoita chirwirangwe kundirwisa pasina kukanganisa kana kutadza kwandaita, TENZI." 
Psalms59:4 Pasina mhosva yandaita vanomhanya kundogadzirira. Simukai muuye kuzondibatsira, muone zvenyu." 
Psalms59:5 Imi TENZI Mwari wehondo nehondo ndimi Mwari weIsiraeri. Simukai murange marudzi ose; musararamise kana mumwechete waavo vanoita bangano rakaipa. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms59:6 Manheru oga oga vanodzoka vachihuhudza sembwa vachipota naro guta. 
Psalms59:7 Ipapo vachihon'a nemiromo yavo vaina mazwi anobaya mwoyo pamiromo yavo nokuti vanoti, “Ndiani angatinzwe.”" 
Psalms59:8 Asi imi TENZI munovaseka zvenyu munoshora vechirudzi vose. 
Psalms59:9 Imi, simba rangu, ndinotarisa kwamuri nokuti imi Mwari ndimi nhare yandinozvidzivirira nayo muhondo." 
Psalms59:10 Mwari, nemwoyochena wake, achandichingura. Mwari wangu achaita kuti nditarise vavengi vangu vakundwa." 
Psalms59:11 Regai kubva mavauraya vanhu vokwangu vangakanganwe; vadzungaidzei nesimba renyu mozovawisira pasi, TENZI, nhowo yedu." 
Psalms59:12 Pamusana pechitadzo chemiromo yavo chavakataura nemiromo yavo, ngavakachikirwe nokuzvikudza kwavo nokuda kwokurengerera kwavo vamwe rushambwa nokureva nhema kwavanoita," 
Psalms59:13 vaparadzei nehasha; vaparadzei zvokusazovapozve kuti vanhu vazive kuti Mwari ndiye anotonga vokwaJakobho kusvikira kwakagumira nyika. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms59:14 Manheru oga oga vanodzoka vohuhudza sembwa vachipota naro guta 
Psalms59:15 vanodzengerera vachitsvaka chokudya vachihon'a kana vasina kuguta. 
Psalms59:16 Asi ini ndinoimba ndichirumbidza simba renyu. Ndichaimba ndichidaidzira ndichirumbidza mwoyochena wenyu mangwanani nokuti imi ndimi manga muri nhare yandinozvidzivirira nayo muhondo uye diziro rangu panguva yenhamo. 
Psalms59:17 Imi simba rangu ndichaimba ndichikurumbidzai nokuti imi Mwari ndimi nhare yandinozvidzivirira navo muhondo. Mwari anondiitira mwoyochena. 
Psalms60:1 Munamato wokukumbira kununurwa Mwari makatirasa imi mukaparadza zvatinozvidzivirira nazvo makashatirwa. Dai machidzokera zvenyu kwatiri. 
Psalms60:2 Makazunza nyika mukaibvarura. Namai mitswe yayo nokuti iri kundengendeka. 
Psalms60:3 Makaita kuti vanhu venyu vatambure zvikuru; makatipa waini yakatidzedzeresa. 
Psalms60:4 Makasimudzira vanokutyai mureza kuti vahwande nechokwadi. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms60:5 Kuitira kuti vapamwoyo penyu vaponeswe, tiponesei nesimba roruoko rwenyu mutipindurewo." 
Psalms60:6 Mwari akatsidza noutsvene hwake achiti, “Ndichaganhura Shikemu ndichifara ndichagovawo mapani eSukoti." 
Psalms60:7 Nyika yeGiriadhi ndeyangu Manase ndeyangu Efuremu inguwani yangu, Judha ndiyo tsvimbo yangu youmambo" 
Psalms60:8 Moabhu ndiyo mudziyo wangu wokugezera, pane yeEdhomu ndipo pandinokanda shangu dzangu Firisitia ichapururudzira kukunda kwangu.”" 
Psalms60:9 Ko zvino ndiani anonditsvitsa kuguta kunhare yokuzvidzivirira naro muhondo. Ndiani achanditungamirira kuEdhomu? 
Psalms60:10 Hamuna kutirasa here nhai Mwari? Hamuchaperekedzi hondo dzedu, Mwari." 
Psalms60:11 Tibatsireiwo kurwisa mhandu dzedu nokuti rubatsiro rwomunhu haruna maturo. 
Psalms60:12 Kana Mwari anesu tinorwisa zvine simba ndiye achatsikatsika mhandu dzedu. 
Psalms61:1 Munamato kana pane zvanetsa Mwari teererai chichemo changu munzwewo munamato wangu. 
Psalms61:2 Ndinodanidzira ndiri kwakaperera nyika ndavakurasa mwoyo. Ndikwidzei padombo rakareba kupinda ini 
Psalms61:3 nokuti ndimi diziro rangu nhare yakasimba pakurwiswana nomuvengi. 
Psalms61:4 Regai ndigare zvangu mutendhe renyu nokusingaperi ndivande zvangu pasi pamapapiro enyu. Dzepfunde 
Psalms61:5 Nokuti imi Mwari munonzwa mhiko dzangu munondipa nhaka yavanotya zita renyu. 
Psalms61:6 Pamhidzirai upenyu hwamambo makore ake ngaasvike kuzvizvarwa nezvizvarwa. 
Psalms61:7 Ngaarambe ari pachigaro chokutonga nokusingaperi pamberi paMwari mwoyochena nokutendeka ngazvive naye. 
Psalms61:8 Naizvozvo ndichaimbira zita renyu ndichikurumbidzai pandinopira pazuva nezuva zvandakatsidza. 
Psalms62:1 Kuvimba naMwari Ini ndinomirira zvangu Mwari ndakanyarara nokuti kwaari ndiko kunobva ruponeso rwangu. 
Psalms62:2 Iye chete ndiye dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu ndiye nhare yangu yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo handizobva ndazunguzwa zvakanyanya. 
Psalms62:3 Kusvikira riniko iyemi mose muchingoda kurwisana nomunhu kuti mumuparadze; munhu anongovawo zvake madziro akatsenhuka kana sewaya yava kuda kuwa. 
Psalms62:4 Vanotoronga zvokumuwisira pasi kubva pachigaro chake chapamusoro vanofarira kureva nhema vanopa chikomborero nomuromo yavo asi mukati mavo vachirengerera munhu rushambwa. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms62:5 Ini ndinomirira zvangu Mwari ndakanyarara nokuti ndinotarisira kwaari. 
Psalms62:6 Iye chete ndiye dombo rangu noruponeso rwangu ndiye nhare yangu yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo handimbozungunutswa. 
Psalms62:7 Ruponeso rwangu nokuremekedzwa kwangu zvinobva kuna Mwari Mwari ndiye dombo rangu rakasimba nediziro rangu. 
Psalms62:8 Vimbai naye nguva dzose imi vanhu, turirai kwaari zvose zviri mumwoyo menyu Mwari ndiye diziro redu. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms62:9 Voruzhinji vakangoita sefemo zvaro; vanhu vopamusoro imhute hapana zvavari, vakaiswa pachikero chinosimuka; vanotokundwa kurema nefemo zvaro." 
Psalms62:10 Musavimbe nokuita zvokumanikidza vanhu kana kutarisira kuwana zvinhu nokupamba. Kunyange upfumi hukawanda zvahwo, usaise mwoyo wako mahuri." 
Psalms62:11 Mwari akataura ndakamunzwa kaviri kaviri achiti, “Muridzi woukuru ndiMwari.”" 
Psalms62:12 Uye kuti imi TENZI ndimi mune mwoyochena nokuti munopa munhu maererano nezviito zvake. 
Psalms63:1 Kusuwira Mwari Mwari ndimi Mwari wangu ndinokutsvakai ini ndinokufirai nenyota. Nyama yangu inokutakwairirai senyika yakaoma yerenje isina mvura. 
Psalms63:2 Regai ndikuonei zvangu munzvimbo yenyu inoera, ndione simba renyu nembiri" 
Psalms63:3 nokuti mwoyochena wenyu uri nani kupinda upenyu, miromo yangu ichakurumbidzai." 
Psalms63:4 Saka ndichakurumbidzai upenyu hwangu hwose. Ndichasimudza maoko angu ndichidaidza zita renyu. 
Psalms63:5 Mweya wangu uchadyiririra sokunge ndiri kudya mwongo namafuta muromo wangu uchakurumbidzai norufaro 
Psalms63:6 pandinokurangarirai ndiri pauvato hwangu ndichikufungai zvikuru panguva dzousiku dzokunamata 
Psalms63:7 nokuti ndimi manga muri muyamuri wangu. Pasi pamapapiro enyu ndinoimba norufaro.

Psalms63:9 Asi vanoda kundiuraya vachadzika pasi pasi penyika.

Psalms64:1 Mwari ndidzivirireiwo Inzwai izwi rangu Mwari pandinonyunyuta, ndidzivirireiwo kumuvengi anotyisa." 
Psalms64:2 Ndivandisei kune zvinorongwa muchivande navakaipa kuzvinhu zvinoranganwa navakaipa. 
Psalms64:3 Vanorodza ndimi dzavo samapakatwa vachinangisa mazwi anorwadza semiseve. 
Psalms64:4 Vanopfura asina mhaka vakahwandira vachimupfura zvisina yambiro vasingatyi. 
Psalms64:5 Vanotsungirira kuita zvakaipa, vanokurukura nezvokuteya misungo muchivande vachiti, “Ndiani anotiona?”" 
Psalms64:6 Vanotsvaga mhosva dzokupara vozoti, “Tanyatsoronga kwazvo uipi uhu nokuti pfungwa nemwoyo womunhu zvakadzama.”" 
Psalms64:7 Asi Mwari achavapfura nomuseve wake achivakuvadza zvechivhurumukira. 
Psalms64:8 Rurimi rwavo ndirwo rwuchavapisa mhosva vose vachavaona vachadzungudza musoro.

Psalms65:1 Rwiyo rwokurumbidza nokutenda Mwari imi munofanira kurumbidzwa muZioni uye kuitirwa zvamakatsidzirwa. 
Psalms65:2 Imi munonzwa munamato, vanhu vose vachauya kwamuri" 
Psalms65:3 nemhaka yezvitadzo. Kana zvikanganiso zvedu zvatikurira munozviregerera. 
Psalms65:4 Akakomborerwa zvake munhu wamunosarudza muchimuunza padyo kuti agare munhandare menyu. Munotigutsa nezvakanaka zvemba yenyu, Temberi yenyu inoera." 
Psalms65:5 Munopindura muchitinunura nezviito zvenyu zvinotyisa, imi, Mwari mununuri wedu, imi chitarisiro chavanhu vose kusvikira kose kwakaperera nyika, kusvikira kumakungwa ari kwokupedzisira chaiko." 
Psalms65:6 Imi makadzika makomo nesimba renyu, makapfeka simba renyu" 
Psalms65:7 imi munonyaradza kutinhira kwamakungwa nokutinhira kwamasaisai awo namanyongori avanhu 
Psalms65:8 zvokuti vanhu vanogara kure kure kwakaperera nyika vanotya zviratidzo zvenyu. Munoita kuti mambakwedza nerubvunzavaeni zvipembere norufaro. 
Psalms65:9 Munoshanyira nyika muchiidiridza, munoipfumisa zvikuru. Rukova rwaMwari ruzere mvura ndimi munopa vanhu mbesa dzavo ndiwo marongero amakazviita." 
Psalms65:10 Munozadza mihoronga yayo nemvura zhinji nokusimbisisa mihomba yayo muchinyorovesa nokunaya kwayo nokukomborera zvinomera mairi. 
Psalms65:11 Munopedzisa gore nomukoho wakawanda. Panofamba ngoro dzenyu pachidonha mafuta. 
Psalms65:12 Mafuro omusango anenge achiyerera zvikomo zvinenge zvazara rufaro. 
Psalms65:13 Mafuro atekeshera nezvipfuwo, mapani azara nembesanwa. Zvinopembera nokuimba pamwechete norufaro." 
Psalms66:1 Rwiyo rwokurumbidza nokutenda Pururudzirai Mwari imi nyika yose. 
Psalms66:2 Imbirai mbiri yezita rake, murumbidzei zvikuru kwazvo." 
Psalms66:3 Itii kuna Mwari, “Hakusi kutyisa ikoko kunoita mabasa enyu; mabasa enyu makuru zvokuti vavengi venyu vanotokotama kwamuri." 
Psalms66:4 Nyika yose inokugwadamirai, vanokuimbirai vachikurumbidzai vachiimba vachirumbidza zita renyu.” Dzepfunde" 
Psalms66:5 Uyai muone zvakaitwa naMwari, zvaanoita pakati pavanhu zvinotyisa." 
Psalms66:6 Akasandura gungwa rikava nyika yakaoma; vanhu vakayambuka rukova rwuya netsoka. Pakadaro apo ngatipemberei nokufara maari. 
Psalms66:7 Anotonga nesimba rake nokusingaperi ziso rake rinogara riri pamarudzi avanhu. Vapanduki ngavarege kuzvikudza. Dzepfunde 
Psalms66:8 Rumbidzai Mwari wedu imi marudzi avanhu, mhururu yokumurumbidza ngainzwike." 
Psalms66:9 Akatichengeta tiri vapenyu, haana kurega tsoka dzedu dzichitsvedzemuka." 
Psalms66:10 Nokuti imi, Mwari, makatiedza; makatiedza sokuedzwa kunoitwa sirivha." 
Psalms66:11 Makatipinza mumambure mukatipa musana unorwadza. 
Psalms66:12 Makaita kuti vanhu vatitsikirire zvavo musoro. Takapinda nomumoto nomumvura asi makatiunza kunzvimbo yamaguta. 
Psalms66:13 Ndichapinda mumba menyu nezvibayiro zvokupisa ndichiita zvandakatsidza," 
Psalms66:14 zvandakareva nomuromo wangu, zvandakatsidza nomuromo wangu pandaiva munhamo." 
Psalms66:15 Ndichapira kwamuri zvibayiro zvokupisa zvakakodzwa noutsi hwezvibayiro zvehondohwe. Ndichapira mupiro wehandira nembudzi. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms66:16 Uyai munzwe imi munotya Mwari ndikutaurirei zvaakandiitira. 
Psalms66:17 Ndakachema kwaari, ndikamurumbidza norurimi rwangu." 
Psalms66:18 Dai kuri kuti ndakafarira uipi mumwoyo mangu, TENZI vangadai vasina kuteerera." 
Psalms66:19 Asi zvechokwadi Mwari akateerera akanzwa munamato wokuchema kwangu. 
Psalms66:20 Mwari ngaarumbidzwe nokuti haana kuramba munamato wangu kana kurega mwoyochena wake kwandiri. 
Psalms67:1 Rwiyo rwokutenda kukohwa kwakanaka Mwari ngaatinzwire nyasha atikomborere apenyese uso hwake patiri. Dzepfunde 
Psalms67:2 Kuti nzira yenyu izivikanwe pasi. Marudzi ose avanhu azive simba renyu rokuponesa. 
Psalms67:3 Vanhu ngavakurumbidzei Mwari; vanhu vose ngavakurumbidzei. 
Psalms67:4 Marudzi ose ngaafare aimbe norufaro; nokuti munotonga vanhu noruenzaniso muchitungamirira marudzi avanhu panyika. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms67:5 Vanhu ngavakurumbidzei Mwari; vanhu vose ngavakurumbidzei. 
Psalms67:6 Nyika yakabereka mukoho wayo Mwari, Mwari wedu atikomborera." 
Psalms67:7 Mwari atikomborera; ngaatyiwe kusvikira kose kwakagumira nyika. 
Psalms68:1 Rumbo rwenyika kana yakunda Mwari ngaasimuke vavengi vake vaparadzwe. Vanomuvenga ngavatize pamberi pake. 
Psalms68:2 Sokuvhuvhutwa kunoitwa utsi, vatinheiwo. Sokunyongodeka kunoita namo pamoto; vakaipa ngavapararewo pamberi paMwari." 
Psalms68:3 Asi vakarurama ngavafare pamberi penyu; vapembere kwazvo nokufara pamberi paMwari. Ngavafarisise kwazvo norufaro. 
Psalms68:4 Imbirai Mwari, muimbirei muchirumbidza zita rake. Shaurai rumbo kuna iye anofamba nomumakore, zita rake ndiYahweh, pemberai nokufara pamberi pake." 
Psalms68:5 Mwari, munzvimbo yake inoera, ndiBaba wenherera nomudziviriri wechirikadzi." 
Psalms68:6 Mwari anopa vasina chavanacho musha wokugara. Anoburitsa vasungwa achivaendesa mukugarika asi vapanduki vanogara murenje. 
Psalms68:7 Imi Mwari pamakatungamirira vanhu venyu, pamakafamba nomurenje, Dzepfunde" 
Psalms68:8 nyika yakandengendeka, matenga akadurura mvura nokuvapo kwenyu Mwari. Iro gomo reSinai rakandengendeka nokuvapo kwaMwari, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
Psalms68:9 Mwari makanaisa mvura yakawanda, makararamisa nhaka yenyu yakanga yavakuparara." 
Psalms68:10 Vanhu venyu vakaita musha mairi Mwari nokuda kokunaka kwenyu munowanisa varombo chokuvararamisa nacho. 
Psalms68:11 TENZI anongoti taurei chete vanotakura mashoko acho vakawanda. Vari kuti," 
Psalms68:12 “Madzimambo ehondo chaidzo anotiza, anotiza kumusha,” madzimai anenge avakutogovana zvakapambwa." 
Psalms68:13 Kunyange munhu ari mukati mezvipfuwo zvako mapapiro enjiva Isiraeri anenge achiiswa sirivha, mapapiro ayo achiiswa ndarama yeruvara rwemashizha manyoro." 
Psalms68:14 Samasimbaose paakamwararisa madzimambo, chando chakanaya paZarimoni." 
Psalms68:15 Gomo ravamwari, gomo reBhashani, gomo remisoro mizhinji, gomo reBhashani." 
Psalms68:16 Munotarisireiko neshanje imi makomo ane misoro mirefu kugomo rakasarudzwa naMwari kuti agare, TENZI paachagara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms68:17 Ngoro dzehondo dzaMwari igurusvusvu negurusvusvu kuwanda, mazana zvawo akazanirana. TENZI ari pakati padzo achibva kugomo reSinai achindopinda munzvimbo inoera." 
Psalms68:18 Makakwira gomo refu muchitungamirira nhapwa makagamuchira mutero mukati mavanhu, kunyange pakati pavanopandukira TENZI Mwari anogaramo." 
Psalms68:19 TENZI ngaarumbidzwe anotitakurira nhamo zuva nezuva. Mwari ndiye ruponeso rwedu. Dzepfunde 
Psalms68:20 Mwari wedu ndiMwari woruponeso, TENZI Mwari ndiye anonunura kurufu." 
Psalms68:21 Mwari achapwanya misoro yavavengi vake, musoro uchine vhudzi womunhu anorambirira mukutadza kwake." 
Psalms68:22 TENZI akati, “Ndichavaunza kubva kuBhashani; ndichavaudza kubva kuudzamu hwegungwa" 
Psalms68:23 kuti mushambe tsoka dzenyu muropa, rurimi rwembwa dzenyu ruwanewo chikamu charwo chomuvengi.”" 
Psalms68:24 Dungwerungwe renyu rinooneka, Mwari dungwerungwe raMwari wangu, mambo wangu, richienda munzvimbo inoera." 
Psalms68:25 Vaimbi vari mberi, vokuridza zvinoridzwa vari kokupedzisira; pakati pavo paine mhandara dzichiridza tambureni." 
Psalms68:26 Rumbidzai Mwari mugungano guru rumbidzai TENZI imi vedzinza rokwaIsiraeri. 
Psalms68:27 VokwaBhenjamini vedzinza diki ndivo vari kutungamira vakuru vakuru vokwaJudha hero zararira, vakuru vakuru vokwaZebhuroni navakuru vakuru vokwaNafutari." 
Psalms68:28 Kokai simba renyu Mwari ratidzai simba ramakambotishandisira, Mwari" 
Psalms68:29 richibva kutemberi iri kuJerusaremu. Madzimambo kwavanouya nezvipo. 
Psalms68:30 Tsiurai chikara chinogara mukati metsanga; handira dziri mukati memarudzi achiri mhuru zvadzo kusvikira vavakuhuta vachiunza sirivha, mwararisai marudzi anofarira hondo." 
Psalms68:31 Nhumwa dzokwamambo dzichabva kuIjipiti Itiopia ichasimudza maoko ayo kuna Mwari. 
Psalms68:32 Imbirai Mwari imi nyika dzapasi imbirai muchirumbidza TENZI. Dzepfunde 
Psalms68:33 Vaimbire iye anofamba ari pamatenga, matenga akare. Iye anodzvova nezwi rake, izwi rake rine simba." 
Psalms68:34 Itii Mwari ane simba, iye anobata ushe hweIsiraeri, simba rake riri mumatenga." 
Psalms68:35 Mwari anotyisa ari muNzvimbo yake inoera Mwari weIsiraeri. Anopa ukuru nesimba kuvanhu vake. Mwari ngaarumbidzwe. 
Psalms69:1 Munhu waMwari anochemera rubatsiro Ndinunureiwo Mwari nokuti mvura yandisvika mumutsipa. 
Psalms69:2 Ndavakunyura mumadhaka akadzika asina pokutsika. Ndapinda mumvura yakadzika. Mafashamo emvura avakutondifukidza. 
Psalms69:3 Ndaneta nokuchema; ndatooma pahuro. Mumaziso angu ndatoita rima nokumirira Mwari wangu. 
Psalms69:4 Vanondivenga pasina mhosva, vakawanda kupinda bvudzi romusoro wangu. Vangandiparadze vane simba; vanondirwisa namanyepo. Ndinofanira here kudzorera zvandisina kuba?" 
Psalms69:5 Mwari, imi munoziva upenzi hwangu. Mhosva dzangu dzandakapara hadzina kuvandika kwamuri." 
Psalms69:6 Imi Mwari wehondo nehondo, vanotarisira mamuri ngavarege kunyadziswa pamusana pangu. Imi Mwari weIsiraeri, vanokutsvakai ngavarege kushorwa nokuda kwangu." 
Psalms69:7 Ndinodaro nokuti ndakatirira kushorwa pamusoro penyu; ndakadonha uso nokunyara. 
Psalms69:8 Ndava muenzi kuhama dzangu, mutorwa zvake kune vomumba medu." 
Psalms69:9 Nokuti shungu nemba yenyu dzandipedza, vanokushorai vanoshora ini." 
Psalms69:10 Pandakazvityora nokutsanya zvakatondishoresa izvozvo. 
Psalms69:11 Pandakapfeka masaga ndakave chiseko chenyika kwavari. 
Psalms69:12 Handichabvi pamuromo pavagere pamatare uye ndave rumbo rwezvidhakwa. 
Psalms69:13 Asi, ini, wandinonamata ndimi TENZI. Ndipindureiwo Mwari panguva yakakodzera nemwoyochena wenyu, wakadai kuwanda nokununura kwenyu kusina chinotadzisa." 
Psalms69:14 Ndinunureiwo kuti ndirege kunyura mumadhaka, ndinunureiwo kumhandu dzangu uye kumvura yakadzika." 
Psalms69:15 Musarege mafashamo achindifukidza kana kumedzwa nemvura yakadzika gomba ngarirege kundizaririra mariri. 
Psalms69:16 Ndipindureiwo TENZI nokuti mwoyochena wenyu wakanaka. Netsiye dzenyu nyoro dzakawanda, tendeukirai kwandiri." 
Psalms69:17 Musavanze uso hwenyu kuneni muranda wenyu nokuti ndapinda nhamo; kasirai kundipindura. 
Psalms69:18 Swederai pedyo neni mundinunure ndidzikinureiwo kumhandu dzangu. 
Psalms69:19 Munoziva wani kushorwa kwangu, nokunyara kwangu nokusaremekedzwa kwangu vavengi vangu vose munovaziva." 
Psalms69:20 Kutukwa kwandiodza mwoyo zvokuti ndava kurasa mwoyo. Ndakatsvaka angandinzwirewo tsitsi asi pakanga pasina. Ndakatsvaka vangandinyaradze asi ndakavashaya. 
Psalms69:21 Vakandipa chepfu kuti ndidye; kuti ndipodze nyota vakandipa vhiniga kuti ndinwe. 
Psalms69:22 Zvokudya zvinenge zvaiswa pamberi pavo ngazvive riva kwavari. Zvibayiro zvavo zvamazuva makuru, ngazvive musungo kwavari." 
Psalms69:23 Ngavapofamadzwe maziso vatadze kuona. Ngavaite misana ine nhetemwa. 
Psalms69:24 Vavirukirei nokushatirwa kwenyu, hasha dzenyu dzinovira dzivashaise mazano." 
Psalms69:25 Pamatendhe pavo ngapaparare, matendhe avo ashaye anogara." 
Psalms69:26 Nokuti vanotambudza wamunenge mapa shamhu. Wamunenge makuvadza vanotomutambudza zvakatonyanya. 
Psalms69:27 Rambai muchingovabata nemhosva pamusoro pedzimwe mhosva, musamboti havana mhosva." 
Psalms69:28 Ngavapfudzwe mubhuku ravapenyu. Varege kunyorwa mukati mavakarurama. 
Psalms69:29 Asi ini ndiri kutambura; ndiri kurwadziwa. Ndisimudzeiwo Mwari nokuponesa kwenyu. 
Psalms69:30 Ndicharumbidza zita raMwari norumbo ndichamukudza nokumutenda. 
Psalms69:31 Izvi zvichafadza TENZI kupinda nzombe kana handira dzine nyanga namatsiko. 
Psalms69:32 Vari kudzvinyirirwa ngavazvione vagofara. Imi munotsvaka Mwari mwoyo yenyu ngaimuke. 
Psalms69:33 Nokuti Mwari anonzwa varombo uye haashori vanhu vake vanenge vari muusungwa. 
Psalms69:34 Denga napasi ngazvimurumbidze; ngaarumbidzwe namakungwa nazvose zvinofambamo. 
Psalms69:35 Mwari achanunura Zioni agovakazve maguta okwaJudha vanhu vachagaramo vachiriita ravo. 
Psalms69:36 Vana vavaranda vavo vachiriita ravo uye vanoda zita rake vachagaramo. 
Psalms70:1 Kukumbira Rubatsiro Mwari farirai kundinunura Mwari chimbidzai kundibatsira. 
Psalms70:2 Vanoda kundiuraya ngavanyadziswe vadumbirwe nazvo; ngavadzorwe vanyadziswe vanoda kundikuvadza. 
Psalms70:3 Vanondisveeredza ngavakatyamare pamusana pokunyara kwavo vanonditi tsvatu waro tsvatu waro. 
Psalms70:4 Vose vanokutsvakai ngavapembere nokufara mamuri. Vanoda ruponeso rwenyu ngavarambe vachiti, “Mwari mukuru.”" 
Psalms70:5 Asi ini ndiri murombo nomunhu asina chaanacho kurumidzai kuuya kwandiri Mwari. Ndimi mubatsiri wangu nomununuri wangu TENZI musanonoke. 
Psalms71:1 Ndinopotera kwamuri TENZI musaite kuti ndinyadziswe. 
Psalms71:2 Sezvamakarurama kudai ndinunureiwo, ndisunungureiwo, rerekerai nzeve yenyu kwandiri mundinunure." 
Psalms71:3 Ivai kwandiri bako rokupotera, nhare yakasimba yokundinunura nokuti ndimi dombo rangu nenhare yangu." 
Psalms71:4 Ndinunureiwo Mwari wangu kumaoko avanhu vakaipa; kumaoko anombandika omunhu asakarurama anoutsinye. 
Psalms71:5 Ndimi chitarisiro changu TENZI, wandinovimba naye kubvira pauduku hwangu TENZI." 
Psalms71:6 Ndakatsamira pamuri kubvira pakuberekwa kwangu, ndimi makanditora munhumbu maamai vangu, ndinoramba ndichingokurumbidzai chete." 
Psalms71:7 Ndakava chinhu chinokahadzisa kuvazhinji asi imi ndimi botero rangu rakasimba. 
Psalms71:8 Kukurumbidzai hakuchabvi pamuromo pangu uye ndichaswera muswere wose ndichikupai mbiri. 
Psalms71:9 Musandirase kana ndakwegura musandifuratire kana ndapera simba. 
Psalms71:10 Nokuti vavengi vangu vanotaura nezvangu, vanotsvaka zvokundiuraya, vanorangana" 
Psalms71:11 vachiti, “Mwari wamurasa ngatimurondei timubate, nokuti hapana anomununura.”" 
Psalms71:12 Mwari regai kuva kure neni; Mwari wangu chimbidzai kuzondibatsira. 
Psalms71:13 Vanondipa mhosva ngavanyadziswe vaparadzwe. Ngavazadzwe nokushorwa nokunyadziswa vanotsvaka zvokundirwadzisa. 
Psalms71:14 Ndicharamba ndichingotarisira uye ndichakurumbidzai kakawanda. 
Psalms71:15 Muromo wangu uchataura nezvamabasa enyu akarurama uye zuva rose nezvokununura kwenyu nokuti handikwanisi kuzviverenga. 
Psalms71:16 Ndichauya nesimba raTENZI Mwari kuzoparidza ururami hwenyu, hwenyu imi chete." 
Psalms71:17 Mwari makandidzidzisa kubva pauduku hwangu, kusvikira pari zvino ndinoparidza mabasa enyu anoshamisa." 
Psalms71:18 Saizvozvo kusvika pakukwegura kwangu napakuchena musoro, Mwari musandirase kusvikira ndaparidza simba renyu kuzvizvarwa zvose zvichauya." 
Psalms71:19 Simba renyu noururami hwenyu Mwari zvinosvika kumatenga-tenga chaiko. Imi makaita zvinhu zvikuru. Mwari ndiani akaita semi? 
Psalms71:20 Makandionesa nhamo nepfumvu dzakawanda, muchandimutsazve nokundiburitsa munzvimbo yapasi yakadzika." 
Psalms71:21 Muchapamhidzira ukuru hwangu muchindinyaradzazve. 
Psalms71:22 Ndichakurumbidzai nedimbwa ndichirumbidza kuva pachokwadi kwenyu. Mwari wangu ndichakurumbidzai nechipendani, imi mutsvene weIsiraeri." 
Psalms71:23 Miromo yangu ichapururudza norufaro pandinoimba ndichikurumbidzai uyewo iyeni nokundinunura kwamakaita. 
Psalms71:24 Rurimi rwangu ruchakurukura zuva rose nezvoururami hwenyu nokuti vaida kundikuvadza vakanyadziswa nokushorwa. 
Psalms72:1 Kunamatira Mambo Mwari itai kuti mambo ave neruenzaniso rwenyu uye ururami hwenyu kumwana wokumbahuru. 
Psalms72:2 Ngaatonge vanhu venyu noururami atonge varombo venyu noruenzaniso. 
Psalms72:3 Makomo ngaave nokubudirira kwavanhu, zvikomo zvive noururami." 
Psalms72:4 Ngaadzivirire vanhu varombo anunure vasina chavanacho. Aparadze vanodzvinyirira. 
Psalms72:5 Chero zuva richiri kupenya vanhu ngavakutyei uye chero mwedzi uchiri kuvheneka pazvizvarwa zvose. 
Psalms72:6 Ngaave semvura inonaya pauswa hwachekererwa uye semvura inonaya ichidiridza pasi. 
Psalms72:7 Panguva yake, ururami ngahutekeshere rugare rudzike midzi kusvikira mwedzi usisipo." 
Psalms72:8 Kutonga kwake ngakubve kune rimwe gungwa kusvika kune rimwe, kubva kurwizi rwaYufuretesi kusvika kwakagumira nyika." 
Psalms72:9 Vavengi vake ngavamugwadamire; mhandu dzake dzinanzviswe pasi. 
Psalms72:10 Madzimambo okuTashishi nookuzvitsuwa ngaatere mutero kwaari. Madzimambo okuShebha nokuSebha ngavauye nezvipo. 
Psalms72:11 Madzimambo ose ngaamugwadamire marudzi ose amushandire. 
Psalms72:12 Nokuti anonunura asina chaanacho kana achichema-chema, murombo naasina anomubatsira." 
Psalms72:13 Anonzwira tsitsi akarukutika naasina chaanacho achiponesa vasina chavanacho muupenyu. 
Psalms72:14 Anovanunura upenyu mukudzvinyirirwa noutsinye uye ropa ravo rakakosha kwaari. 
Psalms72:15 Ngaararame kwenguwa ndefu uye apiwe ndarama yeShebha. Ngaarambe achinamatirwa, ngaakumbirirwe makomborero zuva rose." 
Psalms72:16 Nyika ngaive nembeswa zhinji dziti nemisoro yamakomo neyaneya, michero yadzo iite seyokuRebhanoni. Maguta azare navanhu souswa hwomusango." 
Psalms72:17 Zita rake ngarigare nokusingaperi nembiri yake ivepo chero panenge zuva richirivhenekera. Nokuda kwake vanhu vachatoti, “Mwari wakomborera.” Marudzi achamuti, “Akakomborerwa.”" 
Psalms72:18 TENZI ngaarumbidzwe Mwari waIsiraeri ndiye oga anoita zvinoshamisa. 
Psalms72:19 Zita rake ngarirumbidzwe nokusingaperi. Mbiri yake ngaizare pasi pose. Ameni Ameni. 
Psalms72:20 Minamato yaDhavhidhi, mwana waJese, inoperera pano." 
Psalms73:1 Rwiyo rwaAsafu. Chokwadi Mwari wakanaka akarurama kuna vakachena mumwoyo. 
Psalms73:2 Asi ini ndakapotsa ndapingirishwa, makumbo angu akanga avakutoda kutsvedza." 
Psalms73:3 Nokuti ndaive neshanje navanozvitutumadza pandakaona kubudirira kwavakaipa. 
Psalms73:4 Nokuti havana chinovarwadza, miviri yavo yakasimba kuti gwindiri." 
Psalms73:5 Havana nhamo dzina vamwe, havatambudziki sezvinoita vamwe vanhu." 
Psalms73:6 Nokudaro kuzvitutumadza ndicho chishongo chavo chomumutsipa. Kuita zvechisimba ndiyo hanzu yavo yavanopfeka. 
Psalms73:7 Maziso avo akatozvimba nokukora, mwoyo yavo inotutumira noupenzi." 
Psalms73:8 Vanonyomba nokutaura nounyengedzi, vanotyityidzira vanhu vachizvikudza vachiti vachavatonga zvakaipa." 
Psalms73:9 Vanotuka denga vachidzongodza nyika nezvinobva pamuromo pavo. 
Psalms73:10 Nezvo vanhu vanopinduka vovarumbidza vachishaya chakaipa mavari. 
Psalms73:11 Vanototi Mwari angazvizive sei, iye Wokumusorosoro chaangazivewo chii." 
Psalms73:12 Ndizvo zvakaita vakaipa izvi, vanogara vakagarikana, upfumi vachingoita matutu matutu." 
Psalms73:13 Ndakachengetera pasina mwoyo wangu wakachena, chandakazvichengetera maoko angu asina chaakabata chakaipa hapana." 
Psalms73:14 Nokuti ndinotambudzwa zuva rose uye ndinorangwa mangwanani oga oga. 
Psalms73:15 Dai kuri kuti ndaiti regai nditaure zvangu ndichidai. Ndingadai ndisina kuva pachokwadi kuzvizvarwa zvavana venyu. 
Psalms73:16 Pandakati regai ndiedze kuzvinzwisisa izvi, chakave chinhu chakaomarara kwazvo" 
Psalms73:17 kusvika ndaenda munzvimbo yenyu inoera, ndopandakazoziva magumo avo." 
Psalms73:18 Zvirokwazvo munovaisa panotsvedza, munoita kuti vapinde mukuparadzwa." 
Psalms73:19 Vanoyerekana vaparadzwa munovatsvaira nezvinotyisa. 
Psalms73:20 Vanoita sechiroto munhu paunomuka. Pamunosimuka munovatora sechinhu pasina. 
Psalms73:21 Pandakanga ndasuruvara, ndabaiwa mwoyo," 
Psalms73:22 ndakanga ndazungaira ndisina chandinoziva ndakaita semhuka zvayo kwamuri. 
Psalms73:23 Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo ndinoramba ndinemi nguva dzose munondibata ruoko rworudyi. 
Psalms73:24 Munonditungamirira namazano enyu mushure mezvo muchandigamuchira mumbiri yenyu. 
Psalms73:25 Ndiani wangu ari kudenga kusiya imi? Uye hapana chandinoda panyika kusiya imi. 
Psalms73:26 Nyama yangu nemwoyo wangu zvingakundike zvazvo asi Mwari ndiye simba rangu uye ndiye mugove wangu nokusingaperi. Nokuti vanogara kure nemi vanoparara 
Psalms73:27 imi munoparadza vanoita unzenza hwokusava pachokwadi nemi. 
Psalms73:28 Chakandinakira ini kugara padyo naMwari. Mwari ndiye wandakaita wokupotera naye kuti ndiparidze mabasa enyu ose. 
Psalms74:1 Munamato wokukumbira kununurwa kwenyika Mwari makatirasireiko zvachose munovirukirireiko nehasha hwai dzedanga renyu? 
Psalms74:2 Yeukai sangano renyu ramakazviwanira pasi chigare, ramakanunura kuti rive rudzi rwenhaka yenyu. Yeukai gomo reZioni ramakombogara." 
Psalms74:3 Simudzai tsoka mumbofambafamba kumatongo okugara nokugara; muvengi akaparadza zvose munzvimbo inoera. 
Psalms74:4 Vavengi venyu vakadzvova mukati menzvimbo yenyu yokusanganira, vakamisa mireza yavo sechiratidzo." 
Psalms74:5 Vaiita savanhu vanovheyesa matemo, vari kutema mujokochwa remiti namatemo." 
Psalms74:6 Vakapwanya mapuranga ose ane zvivezwa vakazvipwanya namatemo nenyundo. 
Psalms74:7 Vakapisa nomoto nzvimbo yenyu inoera vakan'oresa nzvimbo inogara zita renyu. 
Psalms74:8 Vakazviti nechomumwoyo tichanyatsovakurira, vakapisa munyika nzvimbo dzose dzaMwari dzokunamatira." 
Psalms74:9 Hatichambooni zvishamiso zvedu; hatichina muporofita. Hapana anoziva kuti zvichatora nguva yakadii. 
Psalms74:10 Muvengi achadada kusvikira rini nhai Mwari? Mhandu yenyu ichatsvinyira zita renyu narini here? 
Psalms74:11 Ko munorambireiko kutambanudza ruoko rwenyu? Munorambirei makagumbata ruoko rwenyu rworudyi. 
Psalms74:12 Asi Mwari Mambo wangu ndewopasichigare, ndimi munonunura mukati menyika." 
Psalms74:13 Makaganhura gungwa nesimba renyu mukadimbura misoro yezigaranyanya mumvura. 
Psalms74:14 Makapwanya misoro wengwena; makaipa sechokudya kuzvikara zvomurenje. 
Psalms74:15 Makatubura zvisipiti netukova, makapwisa hova dzisingapwi." 
Psalms74:16 Masikati ndeenyu nousiku ndohwenyu. Ndimi makaisa mavheneko nezuva. 
Psalms74:17 Makaisa miganho yenyika, ndimi makaisa zhizha nechirimo." 
Psalms74:18 TENZI rangarirai kuti muvengi anonyomba zvakadii uye kuti mapenzi avanhu anoshora sei zita renyu. 
Psalms74:19 Regai kuisa njiva iyi, vanhu venyu, mumaoko ezvikara musakanganwe upenyu hwavarombo venyu nokusingaperi." 
Psalms74:20 Itai hanya nechitenderano chenyu nokuti nzvimbo dzine rima munyika muzere misha inoshandiswa zvechisimba. 
Psalms74:21 Vanodzvinyirirwa ngavarege kunyadziswa. Varombo navasina chavanacho ngavarumbidze zita renyu. 
Psalms74:22 Simukai Mwari muzvimiririre muyeuke kukunyombai kunoita mapenzi zuva rose. 
Psalms74:23 Musakanganwe ruzha runoitwa navavengi venyu. Mhirizhonga yemhandu dzenyu inoramba yakasimudzirwa. 
Psalms75:1 Kutonga kwaMwari Tinokutendai Mwari, tinokutendai. Tinodana zita renyu tichikurukura zviito zvenyu zvinoshamisa." 
Psalms75:2 Panguva yakatemwa yandakasarudza ndichatonga noruenzaniso," 
Psalms75:3 pachazunguzika nyika navagari vayo vose. Ndini ndichachengeta mbiru dzayo dzakagadzikana. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms75:4 Ndinoti kuna vanozvikudza, “Musazvikudze” kuvakaipa ndinoti, “Musasimudze musoro.”" 
Psalms75:5 Musasimudze musoro kana kuomesa musoro pakutaura. 
Psalms75:6 Kusimudzirwa hakubvi kumabvazuva kana kumadokero kana kubva kugwenga," 
Psalms75:7 asi Mwari ndiye anotonga, ndiye anodzikisa mumwe achisimudzira mumwe." 
Psalms75:8 Nokuti muruoko rwaTENZI mune mukombe une waini inotutuma ina masanganiswa chaiwo anoidurura vakaipa vose vapasi vagoinwa namasese ose. 
Psalms75:9 Asi ini ndinofara nokusingaperi ndichaparidza nokuimba ndichirumbidza Mwari waJakobho. 
Psalms75:10 Misoro yavakaipa achaidimbura misoro yavakarurama ichasimudzirwa. 
Psalms76:1 Mwari anokunda Mwari anozivikanwa maJudha, zita rake iguru muIsiraeri." 
Psalms76:2 Akadzika musha muJerusaremu, akazviitira pokugara muZioni." 
Psalms76:3 Imomo akatyora miseve yaivaima nenhoyo nebakatwa nezvombo zvehondo. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms76:4 Mbiri yenyu yaishamisa zvisingatauriki pamakomo ehuhombarume hwenyu. 
Psalms76:5 Magamba akatorerwa zvaainge apamba; akadzirara hope dzorufu, varwi vehondo vakatadza kushandisa maoko avo." 
Psalms76:6 Pamakangotsiura imi Mwari waJakobho, mutasvi nebhiza rake vakabva vaoma pasi kuti papata." 
Psalms76:7 Asi imi, munotyisa zvakanyanya, ndiani angamire pamuri kana maviruka nehasha?" 
Psalms76:8 Imi makatonga muri kudenga nyika yakatya ikati zii kunyarara," 
Psalms76:9 Mwari paakasimuka kuti achitema kutonga kwake achinunura vose vanodzvanyirirwa panyika. Dzepfunde 
Psalms76:10 Kushatirwa kwavanhu kunozoperera mukukurumbidzai, vanenge vasara netuhasha twavo munovaunganidza zvenyu kwamuri." 
Psalms76:11 Tsidza hako kuna TENZI Mwari wako asi uite zvawatsidza vose vari munharaunda ngavaunze zvipo kwaari, iye anofanira kutyiwa." 
Psalms76:12 Anoodza mwoyo yamachinda, anotyisa madzimambo apasi." 
Psalms77:1 Munamato kuna Mwari ane tsitsi kana zvinhu zvaipa Ndinoridza mhere kuna Mwari, mhere kuna Mwari kuti andinzwe." 
Psalms77:2 Nezuva rokutambudzika kwangu ndinotsvaka TENZI. Usiku ndinosimudza maoko angu ndisinganeti, mweya wangu unoramba kunyaradzwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ndinofunga Mwari ndigoungudza. Ndikati rangarirei mweya wangu unobva washaya simba. Dzepfunde 
Psalms77:4 Usiku munoita kuti ndirare ndakasvinura ndinobva ndatambudzika zvokutotadza kutaura. 
Psalms77:5 Ndinombofunga nezvamazuva akare, ndinoyeuka makore enguva yakare." 
Psalms77:6 Ndinozvibvunzurudza mumwoyo mangu usiku, ndinorangarira ndichitsvagurudza mumweya wangu." 
Psalms77:7 Mwari andirasa zvachose here? Haachandifaririzve here? 
Psalms77:8 Mwoyochena wake wapera zvachose here? Zvaakanditsidzira zvakabva zvapera here? 
Psalms77:9 Mwari akakanganwa kuita tsiye nyoro here? Hasha dzake dzavhiringidza tsitsi dzake here? Dzepfunde 
Psalms77:10 Ini ndinoti chinhu chinondirwadza kuti kuita kwaMwari zvine simba kwasanduka. 
Psalms77:11 Ndinoyeuka zviito zvaMwari. Hongu ndinorangarira zviito zvenyu zvepasichigare. 
Psalms77:12 Ndichanyatsofungisisa mabasa enyu ose. Ndigozvibvunzurudza nezvamabasa enyu esimba. 
Psalms77:13 Nzira yenyu Mwari itsvene ndoupi mwari mukuru saMwari wedu? 
Psalms77:14 Muri Mwari anoita zvishamiso makaratidza simba renyu pakati pavanhu. 
Psalms77:15 Makanunura vanhu venyu nesimba roruoko rwenyu vana vokwaJakobho naJosefi. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms77:16 Mvura payakakuonai Mwari, mvura payakakuonai yakatya. Hongu hwenje hwakadedera." 
Psalms77:17 Makore akadurura mvura, matenga akatinhira, miseve yenyu yakavaima mativi ose." 
Psalms77:18 Kupwatika kwemheni yenyu kwakanga kuri muchamupupuri mheni dzenyu dzaipenyesa pasi nyika yakadedera ikandengendeka. 
Psalms77:19 Mugwagwa wenyu waipfuura nomugungwa; nzira yenyu yaipfuura nomumvura zhinji, asi tsoka dzapamakatsika hadzina kuoneka." 
Psalms77:20 Makatungamirira vanhu venyu sedanga rehwai vari mumaoko aMosesi naAroni. 
Psalms78:1 Chidziidzo chinobva kunhoroondo yavaIsiraeri Teererai vanhu vangu kune zvandinokudzidzisai, rerekerai nzeve dzenyu kumazwi omuromo wangu." 
Psalms78:2 Ndichazarura muromo wangu nomufananidzo ndichataura madimikira akadzama apasichigare," 
Psalms78:3 zvinhu zvatakanzwa zvatinoziva, zvatakaudzwa namadzitateguru edu." 
Psalms78:4 Hatingazvivanziri vana vavo, asi tinozvitaurira zvizvarwa zvinotevera, zviito zvaTENZI nesimba rake nezvishamiso zvaakaita." 
Psalms78:5 Akadzika mutemo maJakobho akatema mutemo muIsiraeri yaakati madzibaba edu adzidzise vana vavo 
Psalms78:6 kuitira kuti chizvarwa chinotevera chizvizive, ichocho chichazvarwa chimuke chizotaurirawo vana vacho" 
Psalms78:7 kuti vaise chivimbo chavo muna Mwari varege kukanganwa mabasa aMwari, asi kuti vachengete mitemo yake" 
Psalms78:8 uye kuti varege kuita samadzibaba avo vaiva tsvuuramuromo nechizvarwa chakapanduka, vaiva chizvarwa chisina kugadzana mwoyo, vakanga vasina mweya wokutendeka kuna Mwari." 
Psalms78:9 VokwaEfuremu vaive vakapakata miseve nouta, vakadzokera shure pazuva rehondo." 
Psalms78:10 Havana kuchengeta chitenderano chaMwari. Vakatoramba kutevera mutemo wake. 
Psalms78:11 Vakakanganwa zvaakanga aita uye zvishamiso zvaakanga avaratidza. 
Psalms78:12 Akaita minana pamberi pamadzitateguru avo munyika eIjipiti, mumasango okuZoani." 
Psalms78:13 Akaganhura gungwa akavapfuudza nomo akamisa mvura kuita murwi. 
Psalms78:14 Kumasikati aivatungamirira negore, usiku hwose aivatungamirira nerimi romoto." 
Psalms78:15 Akatsemura matombo murenje akavapa mvura yokunwa yakawanda sokunge yaibva pasi pasi chaipo. 
Psalms78:16 Akaburitsa tukova mudombo akaita kuti mvura iyerere sehova. 
Psalms78:17 Asi vakatoramba vachimutadzira vachipandukira wokumusorosoro murenje. 
Psalms78:18 Vakaedza Mwari mumwoyo yavo nokuramba vachingokumbira chokudya chavaipanga. 
Psalms78:19 Vakapopotera Mwari vachiti, “Mwari angaisire vanhu chokudya pamberi pavo murenje here?" 
Psalms78:20 Akarova dombo wani mvura ikapozhoka, tukova tukafashukira. Angakwanise kupa chingwa here kana kupa vanhu vake nyama?”" 
Psalms78:21 Naizvozvo TENZI paakazvinzwa akazara nehasha. Akatungidza Jakobho nemoto. Hasha dzake dzakavirukira Isiraeri 
Psalms78:22 nokuti vakanga vasingatendeseki naMwari, havana kuvimba nesimba rake rokununura." 
Psalms78:23 Zvakadaro zvazvo akataurira matenga kumusoro akazarura makonhi okudenga. 
Psalms78:24 Akavanaisira mana kuti vadye akavapa chingwa chokudenga. 
Psalms78:25 Vanhu vakadya chingwa chavatumwa, akavatumira chokudya chakawanda." 
Psalms78:26 Akaita kuti mhepo yokumabvazuva ivhuvhute kumatenga. Akatungamirira nesimba mhepo yokumaodzanyemba. 
Psalms78:27 Akanaisa pavari nyama sohuruva, shiri dzina mapapiro sejecha ramakungwa." 
Psalms78:28 Akadzidonhesa pakati pamatendhe avo munharaunda yose yapavaigara. 
Psalms78:29 Vakadya vakanyatsoguta nokuti akavapa zvavaipanga. 
Psalms78:30 Asi havi yavo isati yambopera, chokudya chichiri mukanwa mavo," 
Psalms78:31 Mwari akavavirukira nehasha akauraya vakanyatsosimba vacho akarizha majaya akasvika eIsiraeri. 
Psalms78:32 Zvakadaro zvazvo vakangoramba vachitadza chete, kunyange nezvishamiso zvake havana kuvimba naye." 
Psalms78:33 Nezvo akanyangarisa mazuva avo sefemo, akanyangarisawo makore avo nepfumvu nechimbichimbi." 
Psalms78:34 Paakavauraya vakamutsvaka vakatendeuka vakatsvakisisa Mwari. 
Psalms78:35 Vakayeuka kuti Mwari ndiye dombo ravo uye kuti Mwari Wokumusorosoro ndiye mununuri wavo. 
Psalms78:36 Asi vakamubata kumeso nemiromo yavo vakamurevera nhema norurimi rwavo. 
Psalms78:37 Vakanga vasiri pachokwadi naye, havana kuita zviri pachokwadi nechitenderano chake." 
Psalms78:38 Asi iye netsiyenyoro dzake akavaregerera uipi hwavo akarega kuvaparadza, akadzora hasha dzake kazhinji, akarega kuviruka nehasha dzake dzose." 
Psalms78:39 Akayeuka kuti vanongova nyama, mhepo zvayo inopfuura isingazodzokizve." 
Psalms78:40 Kanganiko kavakamupandukira murenje vakamushatirisa mugwenga. 
Psalms78:41 Vakamuedza kakawanda vakadenha Mutsvene waIsiraeri. 
Psalms78:42 Havana kurangarira simba rake kana kurangarira zuva raakavanunura kumuvengi 
Psalms78:43 paakaita zvishamiso zvake muIjipiti paakaita minana yake mumasango ekuZoani. 
Psalms78:44 Akasandura hova dzikava ropa zvokuti havana kukwanisa kunwa mutukova twavo. 
Psalms78:45 Akavatumira bute renhunzi dzakavadya namatafi akavaparadza. 
Psalms78:46 Akapa mbeswa dzavo kumakonye uye muchero wamabasa avo kumhashu. 
Psalms78:47 Akaparadza migirepisi yavo nechimvuramahwe uye mionde yavo nechando. 
Psalms78:48 Akarova mombe dzavo nechimvuramahwe uye hwai akadzirova nemheni. 
Psalms78:49 Akavavirukira kwazvo nehasha akavashatirirwa akavatsamwira zvikuru akavapa nhamo idzi dzaiva nhumwa dzake dzokuparadza. 
Psalms78:50 Akavaputikira nehasha, haana kurega kuvauraya, akavaparadza upenyu nedenda." 
Psalms78:51 Akauraya matangwe ose muIjipiti, vana vokutanga vesimba ravo mumatumba okwaHamu." 
Psalms78:52 Iye akatungamirira vanhu vake sehwai akavatungamirira murenje sedanga. 
Psalms78:53 Akavatungamirira zvisina njodzi zvokuti havana kutya asi gungwa rakafusira vavengi vavo. 
Psalms78:54 Akavaunza kunyika yake inoera kugomo rake raakawana nesimba reruoko rwake rworudyi. 
Psalms78:55 Akafanovatandira marudzi, akavakamuranisa migove yavo, akagarisa vaIsiraeri mumatendhe avo." 
Psalms78:56 Vakaedza Mwari Wokumusorosoro, vakamupandukira uye havana kuchengeta mitemo yake." 
Psalms78:57 Asi vakatotsauka vakaiita zvisina kutendeka samadzibaba avo; vakamonyoroka souta husina kutsarukana. 
Psalms78:58 Nokuti vakamushatirisa nenzvimbo dzavo dzokunamatira dzakatunhumara; vakaita kuti aite shanje nokuda kwezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata. 
Psalms78:59 Mwari paakazvinzwa akazara nehasha, akabva aramwa Isiraeri chaizvo." 
Psalms78:60 Akafuratira nzvimbo yake yaaigara kuShiro, dumba raaigara pakati pavanhu." 
Psalms78:61 Akaisa simba rake, paArika yechitenderano, kuutapwa, akaisa mbiri yake mumaoko omuvengi." 
Psalms78:62 Akapinza vanhu vake mukuuraiwa nebakatwa rehondo akavirukira nhaka yake nehasha. 
Psalms78:63 Majaya avo akavaroromesa nemoto, mhandara dzavo dzakashaya rumbo rwomuchato." 
Psalms78:64 Vapristi vavo vakauraiwa namapakatwa chirikadzi dzavo hadzina kuvachema. 
Psalms78:65 TENZI akaita seari kupepuka muhope segamba rakundwa newaini. 
Psalms78:66 Akagarisa vavengi vake pasi, akavanyadzisa zvinogara zvakadaro." 
Psalms78:67 Akaramba vemba yokwaJosefi. Akarega kusarudza vedzinza rokwaEfuremu," 
Psalms78:68 asi paakasarudza vedzinza rokwaJudha veGomo reZioni raanoda," 
Psalms78:69 akavaka ipapo nzvimbo yake inoera, nhunga makore chaiyo ikaita senyika yaakadzika pasichigare." 
Psalms78:70 Akasarudza Dhavhidhi muranda wake akamutora kumatanga ehwai. 
Psalms78:71 Akamubvisa mukufudza nhunzvi dzaiva navana, kuti ave mufudzi wevokwaJakobho vanhu vake Isiraeri, nhaka yake." 
Psalms78:72 Akavafudza nemwoyo uri pachokwadi akavatungamirira nouchenjeri. 
Psalms79:1 Nyika inochemera Mwari kununurwa Mwari vanhu vechirudzi vakapinda munhaka yenyu vakan'oresa Temberi yenyu inoera vakaita Jerusaremu dongo. 
Psalms79:2 Vakapa zvitunha zvavaranda venyu kushiri dzedenga kuti dzidye zvadzo uye nyama yavarurami venyu kuzvikara zvenyika. 
Psalms79:3 Vakadeura ropa ravo semvura munharaunda yeJerusaremu, asi pakanga pasina wokuvaviga." 
Psalms79:4 Tinoshorwa navavakidzani nesu, tinonyombwa nokusekwa navakatipoteredza." 
Psalms79:5 Kusvikira riniko nhai TENZI? Muchashatirwa kusvikira nokusingaperi here? Shanje yenyu ichanganduma somoto here? 
Psalms79:6 Virukirai vechirudzi nehasha, vasingakuzivei uye umambo husingadaidzi zita renyu" 
Psalms79:7 nokuti vakazhanya vokwaJakobho vakaparadza musha wavo. 
Psalms79:8 Musatiyeukirewo zvitadzo zvedu zvakare. Tsitsi dzenyu ngadziuye nokukurumidza dzitichingurewo nokuti tasakara zvikuru. 
Psalms79:9 Tibatsireiwo Mwari mununuri wedu kuitira mbiri yezita renyu. Tinunurei mutiregererewo zvitadzo zvedu kuitira zita renyu. 
Psalms79:10 Vechirudzi vangarambireiko vachiti, “Mwari wavo aripi.” Ratidzai vechirudzi isu tichizviona kuti munotsiva ropa ravaranda venyu rinenge radeurwa." 
Psalms79:11 Kugomera kwomusungwa wenyu ngakusvike kwamuri, imi muchengetedze vakatongerwa kufa." 
Psalms79:12 Tsividzai kakapetwa kanomwe vatakavakidzana navo zvavakakushorai nazvo imi TENZI. 
Psalms79:13 Ipapo isu vanhu venyu, hwai dzedanga renyu tichakutendai nokusingaperi pazvizvarwa nezvizvarwa, tichakurukura mbiri yenyu." 
Psalms80:1 Munamato wokukumbirira nyika kuti idzorerwe kune zvayakanga yakaita. Teererai imi mufudzi weIsiraeri imi munotungamirira vokwaJosefi sedanga rehwai, imi mune chigaro chenyu choumambo pamaKerubhi, bwinyai" 
Psalms80:2 kune vokwaEfuremu novokwaBhenjamini nokune vokwaManase. Kokai simba renyu muuye kuzotinunura. 
Psalms80:3 Tiiteiwo zvatakanga takaita kare, Mwari, chiso chenyu ngachipenye kuti tiponeswe." 
Psalms80:4 TENZI wehondo nehondo, kusvikira rinhiko makashatirwa neminamato yavanhu venyu." 
Psalms80:5 Kuchema ndiko kwava chokudya chavo, makavapa misodzi kuti vanwe zvokutogondwa." 
Psalms80:6 Munoita kuti vavakidzani vatirwirane vavengi vedu vachitotiseka pakati pavo. 
Psalms80:7 Tiiteiwo zvatakanga takaita kare Mwari wehondo nehondo. Chiso chenyu ngachipenye kuti tiponeswe. 
Psalms80:8 Makauya nomugirepisi kubva kuIjipiti mukadzinga vechirudzi mukausima. 
Psalms80:9 Makaugoborera ukadzika midzi yawo ukazadza nyika. 
Psalms80:10 Makomo akafukidzwa nomumvuri wawo nemiti yomusidhari yakafukidzwa namapazi awo. 
Psalms80:11 Mapazi awo akatandavara kusvika kugungwa uye mabukira awo akasvika kurwizi rweYufuretesi. 
Psalms80:12 Ko zvino makagopazireiko tsvingo dzayo zvokuti vose vanopfuurawo zvavo nenzira vanotanha michero yawo. 
Psalms80:13 Nguruve yomusango inoutsika-tsika zvayo, zvose zvinofamba musango zvinoudya." 
Psalms80:14 Dzokaizve Mwari wehondo nehondo mutarire muri kudenga muone zvenyu, ivai nehanya nomugirepisi uyu." 
Psalms80:15 Nzvanzvana yomugirepisi yamakadyara nesimba roruoko rwenyu rworudyi dungira ramakaita kuti rive renyu. 
Psalms80:16 Vakaupisa nomoto; vakautema, ngavaparare nokungoona uso hwenyu hunotsiura hoga." 
Psalms80:17 Simba roruoko rwenyu ngarive pamusoro pomunhu ari kurudyi rwenyu Mwanakomana womunhu wamakazvisimbisira pachenyu. 
Psalms80:18 Ipapo hatizombofa takakufuratirai, tipeiwo upenyu isu tinodaidza zita renyu." 
Psalms80:19 Tiiteiwo zvatakanga takaita kare TENZI Mwari wehondo nehondo. Uso hwenyu ngaupenye mutiponese. 
Psalms81:1 Rumbo rwezuva guru Imbirai Mwari wedu nesimba, iye simba redu, pururudzirai Mwari waJakobho norufaro." 
Psalms81:2 Shaurai rumbo muridze tambureni, muridze chipendani nedimbwa zvinakidze." 
Psalms81:3 Ridzai hwamanda pakugara kwomwedzi, pajena guru romwedzi, pazuva redu guru," 
Psalms81:4 nokuti murawo weIsiraeri, chirevo chaMwari waJakobho." 
Psalms81:5 Akatemera mutemo muna Josefi paakaenda kundorwisa Ijipiti ndakanzwa izwi randisati ndambonzwa," 
Psalms81:6 “Ndakakurerutsira mutoro pamafudzi ako ndikaregesa maoko ako kubata tswanda. 
Psalms81:7 Pakutambudzika kwako wakadanidzira ndikakununura. Ndakakupindura ndiri pakavanda ndiri makavanda mumheni. Ndakakuedza pamvura iya yokuMeribha.” Dzepfunde. 
Psalms81:8 “Teererai munzwe vanhu vangu ndichikuyambirai. Dai mukanditeererawo zvenyu, imi vaIsiraeri." 
Psalms81:9 Hapafaniri kuva navamwari vasiriivo pakati penyu. Hamufaniri kupfugamira mwari asingazivikanwi. 
Psalms81:10 Ndini TENZI Mwari wako akakuburitsa munyika yeIjipiti, shamisisa muromo wako ndiuzadze." 
Psalms81:11 “Asi vanhu vangu havana kunditeerera, Isiraeri yakanga isinei neni." 
Psalms81:12 Saka ndakavarega vachiomesa musoro kuti vaite zvavanoda. 
Psalms81:13 Dai vanhu vachingonditeerera zvavo, vaIsiraeri vachitevera nzira dzangu." 
Psalms81:14 Ndaikurumidza kuti vavengi vavo vatevere muteto ndichirwisana nemhandu dzavo. 
Psalms81:15 Vanovenga TENZI vaitohuta pamberi pake, chirango chavo chaibva chaita firapo." 
Psalms81:16 Ndaikupai koroni yakanakisisa kuti mudye uye ndaikugutsai nouchi hwomudombo.” 
Psalms82:1 Mwari ndiye Mutongi mukuru Mwari agara pachigaro chake chokutonga, mudare rake, achitonga pakati pavamwari." 
Psalms82:2 “Muchatonga zvisina ruenzaniso kusvikira rinhiko muchirerekera kuvakaipa?” Dzepfunde 
Psalms82:3 “Miririrai varombo nenherera, itai zvine ruenzaniso kunavatamburi navasina chavanacho." 
Psalms82:4 Nunurai varombo navasina chokubata vanunurei mumaoko mavakaipa. 
Psalms82:5 “Havana ruzivo kana runzwisiso, vanofamba murima ugaro hwose hwenyika huri kuzunguzika." 
Psalms82:6 Ndinokutii zvangu vamwari vana voWokumusorosoro, mose zvenyu" 
Psalms82:7 asi muchangofa savanhu muchaputsikawo sezvinongoita mumwe wamachinda.” 
Psalms82:8 Simukai Mwari mutonge nyika ndimi muridzi wamarudzi ose. 
Psalms83:1 Kukumbira Mwari kuti vavengi veIsiraeri vakundwe Mwari regai kunyarara, regai kungoti zii-i kudaro, Mwari kana kuramba makangoti zirikiti kunyarara." 
Psalms83:2 Tarisai muone kuti vavengi venyu vari kuita bongozozo, vanokuvengai vari kusimudza musoro." 
Psalms83:3 Vanoita mazano omuchivande, okurwisa vanhu venyu, vanorangana pachavo vanhu vamunochengetedza." 
Psalms83:4 Vanoti, “Ngativatsvairei rudzi rwose, zita reIsiraeri rirege kuzomboyeukwazve.”" 
Psalms83:5 Vanobva vaita rimwe, kubatana kwazvo vachiita chitsidzirano chokurwisa imi" 
Psalms83:6 pamwechete nevemba yokwaEdhomu nevemba yokwaIshimaeri nevekwaMoabhu nevokwaHagari 
Psalms83:7 nevekwaGebhari, nevekwaAmoni nevekwaAmareki, nevechiFirisitia navagari vokuTire." 
Psalms83:8 VaAsiria vabatanawo navo ndivo vabatsiri vakuru nevokwaRoti. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms83:9 Vaitei sezvamakaita vaMidhia kana zvamakaita Sisera naJabhini kurwizi rweKishoni. 
Psalms83:10 Vakaparadzwa kuEndori, vakave mupfudze wevhu." 
Psalms83:11 Itai kumakurukota avo sezvamakaita kuna Orebhu naZeebhu; machinda avo ose sezvakaita Zebha naZarimuna 
Psalms83:12 vakati, “Ngatizvitorerei zvedu mafuro aMwari.”" 
Psalms83:13 Mwari wangu vaitei sohuruva yechamupupuri sehundi inopupurutswa nemhepo. 
Psalms83:14 Sokupisa kunoita moto sango sezvinoita rimi rinoririmisa makomo," 
Psalms83:15 saizvozvo varondei nedutu renyu muvatyisidzire nemhepo ine simba. 
Psalms83:16 Vadonhedzei uso nenyadzi kuti vatsvake zita renyu TENZI. 
Psalms83:17 Ngavanyadziswe vanyare nokusingaperi ngavaparadzwe zvinonyadzisa. 
Psalms83:18 Ngavazive kuti imi moga, mune zita rokuti Yahweh ndimi Mukurukuru pasi pose." 
Psalms84:1 Kusuwira Temberi yaMwari Hakusi kunaka ikoko kwakaita nzvimbo yenyu yamunogara imi TENZI wehondo nehondo. 
Psalms84:2 Ndinobva ndatorwa mwoyo chaizvo, ndinodisisa kwazvo mipanda yaTENZI mwoyo wangu nenyama yangu zvinoimbira Mwari mupenyu norufaro." 
Psalms84:3 Kunyange nzvidya inowanawo pokugara, kashiri kachizvivakira dendere rako pakanogona kukandirira vana vako kuatari dzenyu imi TENZI wehondo nehondo mambo wangu naMwari wangu." 
Psalms84:4 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanogara mumba menyu vachikurumbidzai. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms84:5 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanowana simba mamuri; vanodisisa migwagwa mikuru inoenda kuguta reZioni. 
Psalms84:6 Pavanopfuura nomubani reBhaka vanoriita nzvimbo ine zvisipiti, mvura yemunhuruka inorizadza namadziva." 
Psalms84:7 Vanoramba vachingosimba Mwari wavamwari achaonekwa muZioni. 
Psalms84:8 TENZI wehondo nehondo inzwai munamato wangu. Teererai imi Mwari waJakobho. Dzepfunde 
Psalms84:9 Tarisai muone Mwari nhoo yedu tarirai uso hwomuzodzwa wenyu. 
Psalms84:10 Nokuti zuva rimwechete mumipanda yenyu riri nani pane churu chawo kumwe. Zviri nani zvangu kuva muchengeti wapamusuo mumba maMwari wangu panokugara mumatendhe avakaipa. 
Psalms84:11 Nokuti Mwari izuva nenhoo, anoitira munhu mwoyochena uye anovasimudzira. TENZI hapana chaanonyima munhu anofamba pachokwadi." 
Psalms84:12 TENZI wehondo nehondo, akakomborerwa zvake munhu anovimba nemi." 
Psalms85:1 Kunamatira nyika kuti ive norugare noruenzaniso Mwari makafadzwa nenyika yenyu, makadzorera vokwaJakobho zvavakangavari." 
Psalms85:2 Makaregerera vanhu venyu uipi hwavo mukavakanganwira zvivi zvavo zvose. Dzepfunde 
Psalms85:3 Makazvipodza kuhasha dzenyu dzose mukazvidzora pakushatirwa kwenyu kwakanyanya. 
Psalms85:4 Tiiteiwo zvatanga takaita kare, Mwari mununuri wedu chiregai kuva nehasha nesu." 
Psalms85:5 Mucharamba makatishatirirwa narini here? Mucharebesa hasha dzenyu kuzvizvarwa zvose here? 
Psalms85:6 Hamuchatimutsiridzazve here kuti vanhu venyu vafare nemi? 
Psalms85:7 Tiitireiwo mwoyochena, TENZI mutiponesewo." 
Psalms85:8 Ndichanzwa zvichataurwa naTENZI Mwari nokuti achataura zvorugare kuvanhu vake, kuna vatsvene vake. Dai vakangorega zvavo kupindukira kuupenzi." 
Psalms85:9 Hongu ruponeso rwake rwuri padyo kuna vanomutya; mbiri yokuvapo kwake ichagara munyika medu. 
Psalms85:10 Mwoyochena nokutendeka zvichasangana, ururami norugare zvichambundirana." 
Psalms85:11 Kutendeka kuchakura kuchibva pasi; ururami huchatarisa pasi huri kudenga. 
Psalms85:12 TENZI achapawo zvakanaka; nyika yedu ichaberekawo zvakawanda. 
Psalms85:13 Ururami huchatungamira pamberi pake huchimugadzirira paanozofamba napo. 
Psalms86:1 Munamato waDhavhidhi. Rerekerai nzeve yenyu TENZI mundipindurewo, nokuti ndiri murombo uye handina chokubata." 
Psalms86:2 Ndichengetedzeiwo nokuti ndiri munamati wenyu. Ndinunureiwo ini muranda wenyu anovimba nemi, ndimi Mwari wangu." 
Psalms86:3 Ndinzwireiwo ngoni TENZI, nokuti ndinochema kwamuri zuva rose." 
Psalms86:4 Ndinyevenutseiwo mwoyo ini muranda wenyu, nokuti ndinochema kwamuri, TENZI" 
Psalms86:5 nokuti imi, TENZI, makanaka uye munoregerera, munoitira mwoyochena vakawanda kuna vanodana kwamuri." 
Psalms86:6 Rerekerai nzeve yenyu TENZI kumunamato wangu inzwaiwo chichemo changu. 
Psalms86:7 Pazuva rokutambudzika kwangu ndinodanidzira kwamuri nokuti imi munondipindura. 
Psalms86:8 Hapana akaita semi, TENZI pakati pavamwari, kana mabasa akaita seenyu." 
Psalms86:9 Marudzi ose amakasika achauya achizokugwadamirai TENZI achirumbidza zita renyu; 
Psalms86:10 nokuti imi muri mukuru uye munoita zvinoshamisa, imi moga ndimi Mwari." 
Psalms86:11 Ndidzidziseiwo nzira dzenyu TENZI kuti ndifambe muchokwadi chenyu; ndipeiwo mwoyo mumwechete pakutya zita renyu. 
Psalms86:12 Ndinokutendai TENZI Mwari wangu nomwoyo wangu wose uye ndicharumbidza zita renyu nokusingaperi 
Psalms86:13 nokuti mwoyochena wenyu kwandiri wakawanda; makandinunura pasi pasi munzvimbo yavakafa. 
Psalms86:14 Vanhu vanozvikudza vandimukira Mwari, chikwata chamadzenga chinoda kundiuraya havana hanya nemi." 
Psalms86:15 Asi imi TENZI muri Mwari ane tsitsi, ane mwoyo wakanaka. Mune mwoyo murefu; mune mwoyochena wakawanda uye makatendeka." 
Psalms86:16 Tendeukirai kwandiri mundinzwirewo ngoni. Ndisimbaradzeiwo ini muranda wenyu. Mundinunurewo ini mwana womurandakadzi wenyu. 
Psalms86:17 Ndiitireiwo chinoratidza kuti munofadzwa neni kuitira kuti vanondivenga vazvione vanyadziswe, nokuti imi TENZI munondibatsira nokundinyaradza." 
Psalms87:1 Jerusaremu amai venyika dzapasi pose Pagomo rinoera ndipo pane guta rakavakwa naMwari. 
Psalms87:2 Mwari anoda guta reZioni kupinda dzimwe nzvimbo dzose dzomaJakobho. 
Psalms87:3 Munorumbidzwa kwazvo imi guta raMwari. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms87:4 Ndingagone kudoma veRahabhu neveBhabhironi kwoti veFirisitia neveTire nevekuItiopia pakati pavanondiziva zvichatonzi, “Uyu newoyo akaberekwa imomo.”" 
Psalms87:5 Kana zviri zveguta reZioni, zvingatonzi, “Nyika iyi neyoyo yakaberekwa imomo,” uye kuti Wokumusorosoro achaita kuti rimire." 
Psalms87:6 TENZI anonyora mubhuku ravanhu achitoti nyika iyi neiyi yakaberekwa imomo. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms87:7 Vaimbi uyewo vatambi vose vanoti, “Takatubuka mauri.”" 
Psalms88:1 Kukumbira rubatsiro munhamo TENZI Mwari wangu, muponesi wangu ndinochema kwamuri siku nesikati." 
Psalms88:2 Gamuchiraiwo munamato wangu teererai kuchema kwangu 
Psalms88:3 nokuti ndiri kutambura zvikuru ndavakutosvika kunzvimbo yavakafa. 
Psalms88:4 Ndavakutoverengerwa pakati paavo vanodzika kunzvimbo yavakafa. Ndiri murume asisina simba 
Psalms88:5 somunhu akaraswa pakati pezvitunha savakafa varere muguva; savaya vamusisayeuki zvenyu nokuti havachisiri mumaoko menyu. 
Psalms88:6 Makandiradzika mugomba rakadzika munzvimbo yerima pasi pasi. 
Psalms88:7 Kunditsamwira kwenyu kunondiremera munonditsimbirira namasaisai enyu. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms88:8 Munoita kuti vamwe vangu vandiseme muchiita kuti ndive chinhu chinosemesa kwavari. Makandizaririra zvokuti handikwanisi kupunyuka. 
Psalms88:9 Ziso rangu rava kuonera madzerere pamusana pokutambura. Ndinodana kwamuri mazuva ose TENZI ndakasimudza maoko angu kwamuri. 
Psalms88:10 Munoda kuitira zvishamiso vakafa here? Ko ivo vava zvimuvhuri-vhuri vangamuke kuzokurumbidzai here? Dzepfunde 
Psalms88:11 Mwoyochena wenyu unoparidzwa muguva here kana kutendeka kwenyu munzvimbo yokuparadzwa? 
Psalms88:12 Zvishamiso zvenyu zvinozivikanwa munzvimbo yerima here kana ururami hwenyu munzvimbo yavasina chavanoyeuka? 
Psalms88:13 Asi ini ndinochema kwamuri TENZI; mangwanani munamato wangu unosvika pamberi penyu. 
Psalms88:14 Nhai TENZI munondirasireikowo munondivanzireiko chiso chenyu? 
Psalms88:15 Ndinotambura zvokunge ndichafa kubva pauduku hwangu. Ndinorwadziwa ini nezvamunoita zvinotyisa zvandishaisa zano. 
Psalms88:16 Hasha dzenyu dzandimomotera; kundivhundutsira kwenyu kunondiparadza. 
Psalms88:17 Zvinondikomba samapopopo emvura zuva rose; zvinondimomotera pamwechete. 
Psalms88:18 Makaita kuti vanondida neshamwari dzangu vandiseme rima ndiro rava shamwari yangu. 
Psalms89:1 Rumbo rwenyika kana yapinda nhamo Ndichaimba ndichirumbidza mwoyochena wenyu nokusingaperi, TENZI, nomuromo wangu ndichaparidza kutendeka kwenyu kwezvizvarwa zvose." 
Psalms89:2 Nokuti mwoyochena wenyu uripo nokusingaperi. Kutendeka kwenyu kwakasimba samatenga. 
Psalms89:3 Makati: “Ndakaita chitenderano changu newandakasarudza. Ndakatsidza kuna Dhavhidhi muranda wangu ndichiti," 
Psalms89:4 ‘Ndichaita kuti zvizvarwa zvako zvivepo nokusingaperi ndigosimbisa chigaro chako choumambo pazvizvarwa zvose.’ ” Dzepfunde. 
Psalms89:5 Matenga anorumbidza zvinoshamisa zvenyu TENZI uye kutendeka kwenyu mugungano ravakarurama. 
Psalms89:6 Ndiani mudenga'mu angaenzaniswe nemi TENZI? Ndiani pakati pavana vamwari angaenzaniswe naTENZI," 
Psalms89:7 Mwari anodederesa kune ungano yavatsvene. 
Psalms89:8 TENZI Mwari wehondo nehondo ndiani ane simba semi, TENZI nokutendeka kwenyu uku muna zvose." 
Psalms89:9 Imi munotonga kusimuka kwamasaisai, kana osimuka munoanyaradza." 
Psalms89:10 Imi makapwanya Rahabhu sechitunha, makaparadza mhandu dzenyu nesimba roruoko rwenyu." 
Psalms89:11 Denga nderenyu pasiwo ndepenyu, nyika nazvose zvirimo, ndimi makazvisika." 
Psalms89:12 Kuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba ndimi makakusika. Gomo reTabhori nereHeremoni anokurumbidzai norufaro. 
Psalms89:13 Muno ruoko rune simba chanza chenyu chakasimba, ruoko rwenyu rworudyi rwakasimudzwa pamusoro." 
Psalms89:14 Ururami noruenzaniso ndihwo hwaro hwechigaro chenyu chokutonga munotungamidza mwoyochena nokutendeka. 
Psalms89:15 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanoziva kupururudza vachifara, vanofamba muchiedza chokuvapo kwenyu TENZI," 
Psalms89:16 vanofara nezita renyu zuva rose uye vanorumbidza ururami hwenyu. 
Psalms89:17 Ndimi simba ravanoinzva naro; inyasha dzenyu kuti simba redu ribudirire. 
Psalms89:18 Nhowo yedu iri mumaoko aTENZI, mambo wedu ari mumaoko omutsvene waIsiraeri." 
Psalms89:19 Makazotaura ipapo muchioneso kune munhu wenyu wakatendeka muchiti, “Ndakapa rubatsiro rwangu kugamba, ndakasimudzira pamusoro mumwe wandakasarudza muvanhu." 
Psalms89:20 Wandakawana wacho ndiDhavhidhi, muranda wangu. Ndakamuzodza namafuta angu anoera," 
Psalms89:21 zvokuti simba rechanza changu richagara maari, simba roruoko rwangu richamusimbisa." 
Psalms89:22 Hapana muvengi achamukunda, vakaipa havachazomukurira." 
Psalms89:23 Ndichafanopwanya mhandu dzake ndichiuraya vanomuvenga. 
Psalms89:24 “Ndichatendeka kwaari uye ndichamuitira mwoyochena, pamusana pezita rangu simba rake richabudirira." 
Psalms89:25 Ndichaisa gungwa mumaoko ake uye nzizi dzichava muchanza chake chorudyi. 
Psalms89:26 Achandidana kuti, ‘Imi baba vangu. Mwari wangu nedombo rangu randinopona naro.’" 
Psalms89:27 Ndichamuita dangwe rangu nomukuru wamadzimambo apasi. 
Psalms89:28 “Ndicharamba ndiine mwoyochena kwaari nokusingaperi. Chitenderano changu naye chicharamba chakasimba. 
Psalms89:29 Ndichaita kuti vedzinza rake, vokutonga, varambe varipo uye chigaro chake choushe chirambe chiripo sedenga." 
Psalms89:30 “Kana vana vake vakakanda pasi mutemo wangu vakarega kutevera zvandinoronga," 
Psalms89:31 Kana kuti vakarega kuchengeta zvirevo zvangu, uye vakatyora mirao yangu," 
Psalms89:32 ndichavarangira chitadzo chavo neshamhu uye uipi hwavo netsarapu. 
Psalms89:33 Asi handiregi kuva nemwoyochena kana kusava ndakatendeka kwavari. 
Psalms89:34 Handimbotyora chitenderano changu kana kusandura zvandakataura. 
Psalms89:35 “Ndakapika noutsvene hwangu chakamwe pasina zvokurevera Dhavhidhi nhema. 
Psalms89:36 Ndichaita kuti vedzinza rake vokutonga varambe varipo uye chigaro chake choushe chirambe chiripo chero zuva richiri kuvheneka pamberi pangu. 
Psalms89:37 Chichavapo semwedzi nokusingaperi mboo yakatendeka iri mudenga.” Dzepfunde. 
Psalms89:38 Asi imi makasiya muzodzwa wenyu mukamuramba uye makamushatirirwa. 
Psalms89:39 Makaramwa chitenderano chenyu nomuranda wenyu makaumburudza ngundu yamambo muvhu. 
Psalms89:40 Makapaza tsvingo dzake dzose makaparadza nhare dzake dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo kusara ava matongo. 
Psalms89:41 Vose vanopfuura napaari vanopamba zvinhu zvake. Ava chiseko chavavakidzani vake. 
Psalms89:42 Makaratidza kuti vavengi vake vakunda nokusimudza ruoko rwavo rworudyi; mukaita kuti mhandu dzake dzifare. 
Psalms89:43 Makamininutsa bakatwa rake mukaita kuti akurirwe muhondo. 
Psalms89:44 Makamutorera mumaoko tsvimbo yake youmambo; makaputsira pasi chigaro chake choumambo. 
Psalms89:45 Makamuchembedza nokukasira, makamuzadza nenyadzi. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms89:46 Kusvikira rinhiko nhai TENZI? Mucharamba makazvivanza nokusingaperi here? Kusvika riniko hasha dzenyu dzichiviruka somoto kudai? 
Psalms89:47 Yeukai kupfupika kwakaita upenyu hwangu chamakasikira munhu unobva wachishaya. 
Psalms89:48 Ndiani angararame asingazosvika pakufa. Ndiani angazviponese kusimba renzvimbo yavakafa. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms89:49 Nhai, TENZI, ko mwoyochena wenyu uya wakare uripi wamakambotsidza kuna Dhavhidhi pamusana pokutendeka kwenyu?" 
Psalms89:50 Rangarirai TENZI kushorwa kunoitwa muranda wenyu nokutakura kwandinoita mumwoyo mangu kushorwa ikoko kunobva kuvanhu vakawanda 
Psalms89:51 kuchiitwa nemhandu dzenyu TENZI dzichishora muzodzwa wenyu pose paanofamba. 
Psalms89:52 TENZI ngaarumbidzwe nokusingaperi. Ameni, Ameni." 
Psalms90:1 TENZI ndimi manga muri musha wedu pazvizvarwa zvose. 
Psalms90:2 Makomo asati aberekwa musati masika nyika napasi pose. Muri Mwari narini narini, chingo nechingo." 
Psalms90:3 Munopindura munhu kuva huruva munongoti vanhu, “Dzokerai kune zvamakanga muri.”" 
Psalms90:4 Nokuti churu chamakore kwamuri chakangoita sazuro kana chapfuura kana sakanguvana kokugaririra usiku. 
Psalms90:5 Munotsvaira vanhu, vakaita sechiroto, vakaita souswa hunosvibirira mangwanani." 
Psalms90:6 Kumangwanani hunomuka hwakasvibirira kumanheru hunouna hwosvava. 
Psalms90:7 Nokuti hasha dzenyu dzinotiparadza. Tinobva taparara nokutya kushatirwa kwenyu. 
Psalms90:8 Munoisa uipi hwedu pamberi penyu uye zvitadzo zvedu zvapachivande munozviisa pachena pauso hwenyu. 
Psalms90:9 Mazuva edu ose anopfuura imi makashatirwa; makore edu anopera sefemo. 
Psalms90:10 Makore oupenyu hwedu makumi manomwe kune vakasimba vanoita makumi masere asi akanaka acho inongova nhamo namatambudziko, haatani kupera, isuwo tobva tobhururuka toenda." 
Psalms90:11 Ndiani anoziva panosvika hasha dzenyu. Hasha dzenyu dzakangoenzana nokutyisa kwenyu 
Psalms90:12 saka tidzidziseiwo kuverenga mazuva edu kuti tingwarire. 
Psalms90:13 Muchasvika kupiko nhai TENZI? Dzokai zvenyu muitire varanda venyu ngoni. 
Psalms90:14 Tiratidzeiwo mwoyochena wenyu mangwanani kuti tipembere kufara uye tifare mazuva edu ose. 
Psalms90:15 Tipeiwo kufara kwamazuva akaenzana namazuva amakatirwadzisa uye kwamakore atakaona nhamo. 
Psalms90:16 Ratidzai mabasa enyu kuvaranda venyu uye mbiri yenyu kuvana vavo. 
Psalms90:17 Nyasha dzatenzi Mwari wedu ngadzive patiri. Basa ramaoko edu muite kuti ribudirire. Hongu ngaribudirire basa ramaoko edu. 
Psalms91:1 Munhu anogara mudumba roWokumusorosoro, anogara mumumvuri waSamasimbaose," 
Psalms91:2 anogona kuti kuna TENZI, “Ndimi diziro rangu nhare.”" 
Psalms91:3 Nokuti achakununura kumunhu anokuteya zvakaipa uye kudenda rinoparadza. 
Psalms91:4 Achakufukidza neminhenga yake uchiwana pokuhwanda mumapapiro ake. Kutendeka kwake inhowo yakatenderedza. 
Psalms91:5 Zvinotyisa zvousiku hauzozvitya kana museve unokandwa masikati. 
Psalms91:6 Kana mharadzi dzinofamba murima, nyange zvinoparadza masikati machena." 
Psalms91:7 Kurutivi rwako kungawire zvako churu kurudyi kwako kugowira gumi rezviuru asi iwe hapana chinokusvika.

Psalms91:13 Uchatsika zvako pamusoro peshumba nechiva. Shumba, ino chaiyo, yechidiki nenyoka, uchazvitsika-tsika pasi petsoka dzako."

Psalms91:15 Akadana kwandiri ndichamupindura; ndichava naye munhamo; ndichamununura ndichimuremekedza.

Psalms92:3 nembira nedimbwa nechipendani.

Psalms92:6 Munhu akapata haangazvizivi. Dununu haringazvizivi izvi

Psalms93:2 Chigaro chenyu choushe chakamiswa kubvira pasichigare. Imi makanga muripo kubvira chingo nechingo.

Psalms94:1 TENZI muri Mwari anotsiva, imi Mwari anotsiva, zviratidzei." 
Psalms94:2 Simukai imi mutongi wapasi mupe vanozvikudza zvavanokodzerana nazvo. 
Psalms94:3 Nhai TENZI ko ivo vakaipa vachasvikira riniko kusvikira rini vakaipa vachizvitutumadza. 
Psalms94:4 Vanorutsa kutaura mashoko okuzvikudza. Vaiti vezvakaipa vose vanozvitutumadza. 
Psalms94:5 Vanopwanya vanhu venyu TENZI vanorwadzisa nhaka yenyu. 
Psalms94:6 Vanoponda kuuraya chirikadzi nomutorwa vachiuraya zvavo nherera. 
Psalms94:7 Vanoti TENZI haazvioni Mwari waJakobho haatarisi. 
Psalms94:8 Nzwisisaiwo imi matununu avanhu imi mapenzi muchangwara rinhiko? 
Psalms94:9 Ko iye akaita nzeve haakwanisi kunzwa here? Iye akaumba ziso angatadze kuona here? 
Psalms94:10 Iye anoranga marudzi haarangi here, iye anodzidzisa vanhu ruzivo?" 
Psalms94:11 TENZI anoziva pfungwa dzavanhu kuti dzinongova femo zvaro. 
Psalms94:12 Akakomborerwa zvake munhu wamunoranga TENZI, wamunodzidzisa nemitemo yenyu." 
Psalms94:13 Kumupa zororo panguva yepfumvu kusvikira guva rachererwa vakaipa. 
Psalms94:14 Nokuti TENZI haafuratiri vanhu vake haangarasi nhaka yake. 
Psalms94:15 Ruenzaniso runodzokerazve mukutonga kunoitwa, vose vari pachokwadi vanozvitevedza." 
Psalms94:16 Ndiani zvake akambosimuka kuti andirwire kuna vakaipa? Ndiani angandimiririrewo kurwisa vaiti vezvakaipa? 
Psalms94:17 Dai ndisina kutozobatsirwawo zvangu naTENZI ndingadai ndavakutogara kunyika yorunyararo. 
Psalms94:18 Pandaifunga kuti ndavakutsvedza, makandisimbisa nemwoyochena wenyu." 
Psalms94:19 Kana zvinondinetsa mumwoyo mangu zvawanda kundinyaradza kwenyu kunondifaranutsa. 
Psalms94:20 Mungaite ushamwari navatongi vakaipa here vanoita kuti zvisina ruenzaniso zvive zviri pamutemo? 
Psalms94:21 Vanoita chirwirangwe kurwisa mururami vachipa mururami asina mhosva yokuti auraiwe.

Psalms95:5 Gungwa nderake nokuti ndiye akarisika uye nyika yakaoma, nokuti maoko ake ndiwo akaiumba." 
Psalms95:6 Uyai tigwadame tikotame tichipfugamira TENZI musiki wedu 
Psalms95:7 nokuti ndiTENZI wedu isu ndisu vanhu vaanofudza uye tiri hwai dziri mumaoko ake. Dai nhasi mukangoteererawo zvenyu kuizwi rake.
