Psalms105:23 Isiraeri akazouya kuIjipiti Jakobho akambogara munyika yokwaHamu. 
Psalms105:24 TENZI akaita kuti vanhu vake vaberekane zvikuru akavapa simba kupinda vatongi vavo 
Psalms105:25 vaakasandura mwoyo kuti vavenge vanhu vake uye kuti vanyengedze varanda vake. 
Psalms105:26 Akatuma Mosesi muranda wake naAroni waakasarudza 
Psalms105:27 vakaita zviratidzo zvake pakati pavo nezvishamiso munyika yokwaHamu. 
Psalms105:28 Akatuma rima akaita kuti nyika iite rima, ikati ndoo kusviba. Akapandukira zvaakanga areva." 
Psalms105:29 Akasandura mvura yavo ikava ropa akauraisa hove dzavo. 
Psalms105:30 Nyika yavo yakazara matafi kunyange mudzimba dzamadzimambo avo. 
Psalms105:31 Akataura kukauya mhute dzenhunzi neumhutu nyika yavo yose. 
Psalms105:32 Panze pokuvapa mvura akavatumira chimvuramahwe nemheni yaipenya nyika yose 
Psalms105:33 akaparadza migirepisi yavo nemionde yavo akatyoranisa miti yenyika yavo yose. 
Psalms105:34 Akataura, hwiza dzikauya, gwatakwata radzo risingaverengeki." 
Psalms105:35 Dzakadya zvinomera zvose munyika mavo dzikadya muchero weminda yavo. 
Psalms105:36 Akauraya matangwe ose munyika mavo zvibereko zvokutanga zvesimba ravo rose. 
Psalms105:37 Akabudisa vaIsiraeri vaine sirivha nendarama, hapana kana mumwe wavo aiva noundonda." 
Psalms105:38 Ijipiti yakafara pavakaenda nokuti yakanga yawirwa nokuvatya kukuru. 
Psalms105:39 Akatambanudza gore rokuvafukidza naro nomoto wokuvavhenekera nawo usiku. 
Psalms105:40 Vakakumbira, iye akavaunzira zvihuta, akavapa chingwa chakawanda chaibva kudenga." 
Psalms105:41 Akazarura dombo mvura ikadzutuka ikayerera nomurenje serwizi 
Psalms105:42 nokuti akayeuka chitsidzo chake chinoera naAbhurahamu muranda wake. 
Psalms105:43 Naizvozvo akatungamirira vanhu vake norufaro vanhu vake vaakasarudza vakaimba nomufaro. 
Psalms105:44 Akavapa nyika dzevechirudzi vakatora zvavo muchero webasa rakanga raitwa namarudzi avanhu 
Psalms105:45 achiitira kuti ivo vazochengeta mirao yake nokuchengeta mitemo yake. Areruya. 
Psalms106:1 Areruya. Tendai TENZI nokuti wakanaka nokuti mwoyochena wake hauperi. 
Psalms106:2 Ndiani angataure mabasa aTENZI esimba kana angaparidze mukurumbira wake? 
Psalms106:3 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanoita zvino ruenzaniso; vanoita zvakarurama nguva dzose. 
Psalms106:4 Ndiyeukeiwo TENZI pamunoratidza vanhu venyu kuvada kwenyu. Ndiyamureiwo pamunovanunura 
Psalms106:5 kuti ndiwanewo kubudirira kwavasarudzwi venyu kuti ndifarewo panofara vanhu venyu. Ndigopemberawo nenhaka yenyu. 
Psalms106:6 Asi pamwechete namadzibaba edu takatadza. Takaita zvakaipa takaita zvisakarurama. 
Psalms106:7 Madzibaba edu paakanga ari muIjipiti havana kurangarira mabasa enyu anoshamisa. Havana kuyeuka kuita mwoyochena kwenyu kwakawanda asi vakatopandukira Wokumusorosoro paGungwa Dzvuku. 
Psalms106:8 Zvakadaro zvazvo akavanunura pamusana pezita rake kuti aratidze simba rake guru. 
Psalms106:9 Akakarira Gungwa Dzvuku rikava napakaoma; akavatungamirira napakadzika sokunge vaiva mugwenga. 
Psalms106:10 Nokudaro akavanunura mumaoko omuvengi akavaponesa kusimba remhandu. 
Psalms106:11 Mvura yakafukidza vaivarwisa hakuna kana mumwechete wavo akasara. 
Psalms106:12 Ndipo pavakatenda mazwi ake vakaimba vachimurumbidza. 
Psalms106:13 Asi havana kutana kukanganwa mabasa ake; havana kumirira mazano ake. 
Psalms106:14 Asi vakaita makaro murenje, vakaedza Mwari mugwenga." 
Psalms106:15 Akavapa zvavakakumbira asi akavatumira denda rinoparadza. 
Psalms106:16 Vanhu pavakaitira Mosesi shanje pamatendhe naAroni mutsvene waTENZI. 
Psalms106:17 Nyika yakabamuka ikamedza Dhatani ikafukidza vechikwata chokwaAbhiramu. 
Psalms106:18 Moto wakabaka muchikwata chavo; rimi romoto rikapisa vakaipa. 
Psalms106:19 Vakaumba chimhuru kuHorebhu vakagwadamira chifananidzo chakaumbwa. 
Psalms106:20 Mbiri yavaifanira kupa Mwari vakaipa kuchifananidzo chemombe inodya uswa. 
Psalms106:21 Vakakanganwa Mwari mununuri wavo akaita zvinhu zvikuru muIjipiti," 
Psalms106:22 mabasa anoshamisa munyika yaHamu uye zvinhu zvinotyisa paGungwa Dzvuku. 
Psalms106:23 Naizvozvo akati regai ndivaparadze pasina kuti Mosesi musarudzwi wake, akatovamiririra pamberi pake kuti adzore hasha dzake arege kuvaparadza." 
Psalms106:24 Vakazvidza nyika yakanaka vasina chivimbo nezvaakatsidzira. 
Psalms106:25 Vakanyunyuta mumatendhe avo havana kuteerera izwi raTENZI. 
Psalms106:26 Nezvo akasimudza ruoko rwake akapika kuti vachatofira murenje imomo 
Psalms106:27 uye kuti achamwararisa zvizukuru zvavo mukati mevechirudzi achivaita rumwe rumwe mudzinyika. 
Psalms106:28 Vakazvibatanidza naBhaari wokuPeori vakadya zvibayiro zvakapirwa vakafa. 
Psalms106:29 Vakavirutsa Mwari nehasha nezviito zvavo; denda rakamuka pakati pavo. 
Psalms106:30 Fineasi ndiye akatozoipindira nyaya yacho, denda rikabva ramiswa." 
Psalms106:31 Izvozvo zvakaita kuti anzi mururami pachizvarwa nechizvarwa nokusingaperi. 
Psalms106:32 Vakamushatirisa paya pamvura yokuMeribha zvikaipira Mosesi nokuda kwavo 
Psalms106:33 nokuti vakamusvibisa mwoyo akataura zvisina maturo nomuromo wake. 
Psalms106:34 Havana kuparadza marudzi avanhu sokuudzwa kwavakanga vaitwa naTENZI 
Psalms106:35 asi vakavhengana namarudzi vakadzidza kuita zvavanoita. 
Psalms106:36 Vakanamata zvifananidzo zvavo zvikava musungo kwavari 
Psalms106:37 vakaita vana vavo vakomana navasikana chibayiro kumweya yakaipa. 
Psalms106:38 Vakadeura ropa risina mhaka ropa ravanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo vavakapira kuzvifananidzo zvomuKenani nyika ikan'oreswa neropa. 
Psalms106:39 Naizvozvo vakan'oreswa nezviito zvavo; vakaita unzenza nokuita kwavo. 
Psalms106:40 Nezvowo TENZI akavirukira vanhu vake nehasha akavenga nhaka yake. 
Psalms106:41 Akavaisa mumaoko evechirudzi zvokuti vaivavenga vakavatonga. 
Psalms106:42 Vavengi vavo vakavadzvanyirira, vakapinda uranda pasi pavo." 
Psalms106:43 Akavanunura kazhinji asi ivo zvavaironga ndezvokupanduka bedzi, vakadzikira kwazvo pamusana pouipi hwavo." 
Psalms106:44 Asi aiona nhamo yavo paakanzwa kuchema kwavo. 
Psalms106:45 Akarangarira chitenderano chake navo achitoitira zvake ivo, akadzora mwoyo pamusana pokuwanda kwemwoyochena wake." 
Psalms106:46 Akaita kuti vanzwirwe tsitsi navose vakanga vavatapa. 
Psalms106:47 Tinunureiwo TENZI Mwari wedu mutikokorodze kumarudzi kuitira kuti titende zita renyu rinoera tifare nomukurumbira wenyu. 
Psalms106:48 TENZI Mwari waIsiraeri ngaarumbidzwe narini narini vanhu vose ngavati, “Ameni.” Areruya." 
Psalms107:1 Tendai TENZI nokuti akanaka mwoyochena wake hauperi. 
Psalms107:2 Vakanunurwa naTENZI ngavadaro, vaakanunura munhamo," 
Psalms107:3 vaakakokorodza kubva kudzinyika, kubva kumabvazuva nokumadokero, kuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba." 
Psalms107:4 Vamwe vakadzungaira murenje vachishaya nzira yokuenda nayo kuguta rokundogara. 
Psalms107:5 Vakaita nzara nenyota vakarasa mwoyo. 
Psalms107:6 Vakazochema kuna TENZI munhamo dzavo, iye akavanunura kupfumvu yavo." 
Psalms107:7 Akavatungamirira munzira yakati tasa vakasvika muguta rokugara. 
Psalms107:8 Ngavatende TENZI nokuda kwomwoyochena wake uye nokuda kwezviito zvake kuvanhu zvinoshamisa 
Psalms107:9 nokuti anogondwesa ane nyota uye ane nzara anomugutsa nezvinhu zvakanaka. 
Psalms107:10 Vamwe vaigara murima nomuzarima vari vasungwa vari munhamo vakasungwa nesimbi 
Psalms107:11 nokuti vakanga vapandukira mazwi aMwari vakazvidza zano roWokumusorosoro. 
Psalms107:12 Vakanga vasvipa mwoyo nebasa rakaomarara vakawira pasi pasina anovabatsira. 
Psalms107:13 Vakazochema kuna TENZI munhamo dzavo, iye akavanunura mupfumvu yavo." 
Psalms107:14 Akavaburitsa murima nomuzarima akadambura misungo yavo. 
Psalms107:15 Ngavatende TENZI mwoyochena wake uye zviito zvake kuvanhu zvinoshamisa," 
Psalms107:16 nokuti anopwanya makonhi endarira achityora napakati zvihuri zvesimbi. 
Psalms107:17 Vamwe vakarwara nokuda kwokutadza kwavo, vakapinda pfumvu pamusana pouipi hwavo." 
Psalms107:18 Vakasema zvokudya zvose vakatenge voda kufa. 
Psalms107:19 Vakazochema kuna TENZI munhamo dzavo, iye akavanunura kupfumvu yavo." 
Psalms107:20 Akavarapa nezwi rake akavanunura pakuparadzwa. 
Psalms107:21 Ngavatende TENZI mwoyochena wake uye zviito zvake kuvanhu zvinoshamisa. 
Psalms107:22 Uye ngavapire chibayiro chokutenda vaparidze mabasa ake nenziyo dzorufaro. 
Psalms107:23 Pane vamwe vakaenda kugungwa nengarava vachiita ushambadzi vari mumvura zhinji. 
Psalms107:24 Vakaona zvinoita TENZI, zviito zvake zvinoshamisa makadzika." 
Psalms107:25 Akataurira dutu kuti risimuke rikasimudza masaisai egungwa. 
Psalms107:26 Vaimboti mudenga kata vozomboti pasi pasi vido pakadzika, vakapererwa nechivindi mujambwa ravo rakaipa." 
Psalms107:27 Vakadzengedzeka vakadzadzarika savanhu vakadhakwa vapererwa nopfungwa. 
Psalms107:28 Vakazochema kuna TENZI munhamo yavo iye akavanunura kupfumvu yavo. 
Psalms107:29 Akanyaradza dutu, masaisai egungwa akabva apomhodzwa." 
Psalms107:30 Vakabva vafara nokuti vakave norunyararo uye nokuti akavaunza pokumisa ngarava pavaida. 
Psalms107:31 Ngavatende TENZI mwoyochena wake uye zviito zvake kuvanhu zvinoshamisa. 
Psalms107:32 Ngavamurumbidze mugungano ravanhu vamurumbidze musangano ravakuru vakuru. 
Psalms107:33 Anosandura nzizi kuva gwenga zvisipiti zvomvura zvichiva ivhu rine nyota 
Psalms107:34 nyika inobereka ichiva renje romunyu nechikonzero chouipi hwavagari vayo. 
Psalms107:35 Anosandura gwenga richiva madziva emvura nyika yakaoma ichiva zvisipiti zvemvura. 
Psalms107:36 Vanenzara vanotonoita musha ipapo vachitovaka guta rokugara 
Psalms107:37 vachitodyara minda, vachitosima migirepisi vachiwana kukohwa kwakanaka." 
Psalms107:38 Ivo pachavo aivakomborera vachitowanda kwazvo asingabvumiri kuti zvipfuwo zvavo zvishomeke," 
Psalms107:39 kana vainge vashomekeswa, vaitwa vanhu vasina maturo pamusana pokudzvinyirirwa kana kuti nenhamo kana nokusuruvara." 
Psalms107:40 Aizvidza machinda achiita kuti vadzengerere murenje 
Psalms107:41 asi anobvisa kunhamo vasina chavanacho achiwanza mhuri dzavo samatanga ezvipfuo 
Psalms107:42 Vakarurama vanozviona vagofara; asi vakaipa vose vachati muromo kapu nazvo. 
Psalms107:43 Munhu wose mungwaru ngaacherechedze zvinhu izvi vanhu ngavarangarire mwoyochena waTENZI. 
Psalms108:1 Nyika inokumbira rubatsiro pamusana pavavengi Mwoyo wangu wakagadzikana Mwari, mwoyo wakagadzikana. Ndichaimba ndichirumbidza; muka iwe mweya wangu." 
Psalms108:2 Mukai imi dimbwa nechipendani ndimutse mambakwedza. 
Psalms108:3 Ndichakutendai TENZI pakati pavanhu vamarudzi ndichaimba ndichikurumbidzai pakati pendudzi dzavanhu 
Psalms108:4 nokuti mwoyochena wenyu mukuru kumusoro kumatenga uye kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kumakore. 
Psalms108:5 Dai mangokudzwa zvenyu Mwari kumusoro kumatenga; mbiri yenyu idhumhe pasi pose. 
Psalms108:6 Kuitira kuti vapamwoyo penyu vaponeswe. Batsirai nesimba roruoko rwenyu mundipindurewo. 
Psalms108:7 Mwari akatsidza noutsvene hwake achiti, “Ndichagamura Shikemu ndichifara. Ndichagovawo mapani eSukoti." 
Psalms108:8 Nyika yeGiriadhi ndeyangu, neyekwaManase ndeyangu, yokwaEfuremu inguwani yangu, yokwaJudha ndiyo tsvimbo yangu youmambo," 
Psalms108:9 yokwaMoabhu ndiyo mudziyo wangu wokugezera. Pane yeEdhomu ndipo pandinokanda shangu dzangu. Firisitia ichapururudzira kukunda kwangu.” 
Psalms108:10 Ko zvino ndiani achanditsvitsa kuguta rokuzvidzivirira muhondo ndiani achanditungamirira kuEdhomu. 
Psalms108:11 Hamusirimi here makatirasa nhai Mwari? Hamuchaperekedzi hondo dzeduka, imi Mwari?" 
Psalms108:12 Tibatsireiwo kurwisa mhandu dzedu nokuti rubatsiro rwomunhu haruna maturo. 
Psalms108:13 Kana Mwari anesu tinorwisa zvine simba. Ndiye achatsikatsika mhandu dzedu. 
Psalms109:1 Kunyunyuta kwomunhu ari munhamo Imi Mwari wandinorumbidza regai kunyarara 
Psalms109:2 nokuti vakaipa navarevi venhema vari kundirwisa vachindirevera nhema 
Psalms109:3 vandikomba namashoko oruvengo vachindirwisa pasina chikonzero. 
Psalms109:4 Vanondivenga kunyange zvazvo ini ndichivada asi ini ndichatovanamatira. 
Psalms109:5 Saizvozvo vanodzorera kuvada kwangu nezvakaipa uye rudo rwangu noruvengo. 
Psalms109:6 Sarudzai munhu wakaipa wokumupikisa, ngapave nomupomeri kurudyi kwake." 
Psalms109:7 Paanotongwa ngaabatwe nemhosva. Munamato wake ngautorwe sechitadzo. 
Psalms109:8 Mazuva ake ngaaite mashoma basa rake ngaritorwe nomumwe. 
Psalms109:9 Vana vake ngavave nherera dzisina baba mudzimai wake ave chirikadzi. 
Psalms109:10 Vana vake ngavadzungaire vachipemha ngavadzingwe mumatongo avanenge vagere vari. 
Psalms109:11 Waakatorera chikwereti ngaamutorere zvose zvaanazvo, vatorwa ngavapambe zvaakashandira." 
Psalms109:12 Ngaparege kuva nomunhu anomunzwira tsitsi kana anonzwira tsitsi nherera dzake dzisina baba. 
Psalms109:13 Vana vake ngavaparadzwe, zita rake ripfudzike pachizukuru chechipiri." 
Psalms109:14 Zvakaipa zvamadzibaba ake ngazvirangarirwe naTENZI; chitadzo chaamai vake chirege kupfudzwa," 
Psalms109:15 zvirambe zviri pana TENZI kuitira kuti vasamboyeukwazve panyika. 
Psalms109:16 Nokuti haana kuyeuka kuita mwoyo wakanaka; asi akaronda varombo navasina chavanacho navakarasa mwoyo kusvikira vatofa. 
Psalms109:17 Aifarira kurengerera rushambwa, rushambwa ngarumupfukire. Haana kufarira chikomborero saka ngachivewo kure naye." 
Psalms109:18 Akapfeka kurengerera rushambwa sebhachi, dai kukamutotesa semvura, samafuta mumapfupa ake." 
Psalms109:19 Dai kukangoita sehanzu yaanozvimonera nayo uye sebhande raanozvisunga naro zuva nezuva. 
Psalms109:20 Iwoyu ngauve mubayiro wavanondipa mhosva unobva kuna TENZI wavo vanotaura zvakaipa nezvangu. 
Psalms109:21 Asi imi Mwari TENZI wangu ndibatsirei pamusana pezita renyu nokuti mwoyochena wenyu wakanaka, ndinunureiwo" 
Psalms109:22 nokuti ndiri murombo asina chaanacho, uye ndabaiwa mwoyo." 
Psalms109:23 Ndavakunyangarika somumvuri kumanheru ndazunzirwa pasi semhashu. 
Psalms109:24 Mabvi angu arenda nokutsanya, ndaonda ini." 
Psalms109:25 Ndava chinhu chinoshorwa navandipomera mhosva; vakandiona vanozunguza musoro. 
Psalms109:26 Ndibatsireiwo TENZI Mwari wangu ndinunureiwo nemwoyochena wenyu. 
Psalms109:27 Ngavazvizive kuti iri isimba renyu uye kuti imi TENZI ndimi makazviita. 
Psalms109:28 Regai zvavo varengerere rushambwa asi imi komborerai vanondirwisa zvavo; asi vachanyara ini muranda wenyu ndichitofara. 
Psalms109:29 Vanondipa mhosva ngavafukidzwe nokuzvidzwa. Ngavamoneredzwe nokunyara kwavo sejira. 
Psalms109:30 Ndichatenda TENZI kwazvo nomuromo wangu ndichamurumbidza paruzhinji rwavanhu 
Psalms109:31 nokuti anomira naasina chaanacho kumununura kuna vanomutongera rufu. 
Psalms110:1 Rwiyo rwaDhavhidhi. TENZI akati kuna TENZI wangu, “Uya ugare kurudyi kwangu kusvikira ndaisa vavengi vako pasi petsoka dzako.”" 
Psalms110:2 TENZI anotumira kubva muZioni simba rako guru rokutonga. “Tonga pakati pavavengi vako.” 
Psalms110:3 Vanhu vako vachazvipira nomwoyo unoda pauchatungamirira hondo yako pamakomo ako anoera kubvira kumangwanani-ngwanani? Sedova, vechiduku vako vachauya kwauri." 
Psalms110:4 TENZI akapika uye haachasanduka mwoyo kuti, “Uri mupristi nokusingaperi wegovero raMerekizedheki.”" 
Psalms110:5 TENZI ari kurudyi rwako achaparadza madzimambo pazuva rake rehasha. 
Psalms110:6 Achatonga mukati mendudzi dzavanhu maachazadza nezvitunha, achaparadza vatungamiri kusvika kure kure chaiko." 
Psalms110:7 Iye achanwa murukova ruri pedyo nenzira, saka ndiye chete anenge akasimudza musoro." 
Psalms111:1 Areruya. Ndichatenda TENZI nomwoyo wangu wose mugungano ravakarurama, musangano." 
Psalms111:2 Mabasa aTENZI makuru anodzidzwa navose vanoafarira. 
Psalms111:3 Basa rake rino mukurumbira nechiremera, ururami hwake hunogara huripo nokusingaperi." 
Psalms111:4 Akadzika chokuti timuyeuke nacho mabasa ake anoshamisa, TENZI ane mwoyo wakanaka uye ano tsitsi." 
Psalms111:5 Anopa chokudya vanomutya, haakanganwi chitenderano chake." 
Psalms111:6 Akaratidza vanhu vake simba ramabasa ake nokuvapa kwaakaita nhaka yaiva yamarudzi. 
Psalms111:7 Mabasa amaoko ake anotendeseka uye anoruenzaniso, mitemo yake inovimbika." 
Psalms111:8 Ipfirapo narini narini, yakatemwa mukutendeka nomuchokwadi." 
Psalms111:9 Akatuma ruponeso kuvanhu vake; akasunga chitenderano chake nokusingaperi, zita rake rinoera uye rinotyisa." 
Psalms111:10 Kutya TENZI ndiko kutanga kwoungwaru, vose vanoita kudaro vanobva vava nokunzwisisa chaiko. Mwari acharumbidzwa nokusingaperi." 
Psalms112:1 Areruya. Akakomborerwa zvake munhu anotya TENZI, anofarira mitemo yake zvikuru." 
Psalms112:2 Zvizukuru zvake zvichava zvakasimba panyika zvizvarwa zvakarurama zvichakomborerwa. 
Psalms112:3 Musha wake uchazara noupfumi nepfuma uye ururami hwake huchagara nokusingaperi. 
Psalms112:4 Chiedza chinovhenekera mururami murima. 
Psalms112:5 Wakanaka zvake munhu anoita mwoyochena uye anokweretesa anoita zvinhu zvake noruenzaniso. 
Psalms112:6 Mururami haambozunguziki acharangarirwa nokusingaperi. 
Psalms112:7 Haambotya marehwarehwa akaipa; akasimba mwoyo, anovimba naTENZI." 
Psalms112:8 Akagadzana mwoyo, haambotya kusvikira aona zvaanoda zvichiitika kumhandu dzake." 
Psalms112:9 Ndimupanegombe chaiye anopa kuvarombo; kururama kwake kunoramba kuripo nokusingaperi, simba rake rinorumbidzwa nomukurumbira." 
Psalms112:10 Munhu wakaipa anozviona agogumbuka nazvo; anofinyamisa uso obva anyangarika; zvinodiwa nowakaipa hazvina kwazvinosvika. 
Psalms113:1 Areruya. Imi varanda vaTENZI rumbidzai, rumbidzai zita raTENZI." 
Psalms113:2 Zita raTENZI ngarirumbidzwe kubvira zvino kusvikira nokusingaperi. 
Psalms113:3 Kubvira pakubuda kwezuva kusvika pakudoka kwaro, zita raTENZI ngarirumbidzwe." 
Psalms113:4 TENZI ari pamusoro pamarudzi ose mbiri yake inorumbidzwa kumusoro kwamatenga. 
Psalms113:5 Ndiani akaita saTENZI Mwari wedu kumusoro ndokwaagere? 
Psalms113:6 Anotoita zvokukotamira pasi kuti aone matenga napasi. 
Psalms113:7 Anobvisa varombo muhuruva achisimudza vasina chavanacho kubva mudota 
Psalms113:8 achivagarisa namachinda, namachinda avanhu vake." 
Psalms113:9 Anopa mudzimai asina mbereko musha achimuita amai vavana vanofara. Areruya. 
Psalms114:1 Vanhu veIsiraeri pavakabuda muIjipiti, imba yokwaJakobho ichibva muvanhu vorumwewo rurimi," 
Psalms114:2 Judha yakave nzvimbo yake inoera Isiraeri ikave nyika youmambo hwake. 
Psalms114:3 Gungwa rakazviona rikatiza rwizi rwaJorodhani rwakadzokera shure. 
Psalms114:4 Makomo akachirika sehondohwe zvikomo zvikachirika sehwayana. 
Psalms114:5 Zvakanga zvaita seiko nhaiwe gungwa kuzotiza, newe Jorodhani kuzodzokera shure kudaro" 
Psalms114:6 nemi makomo kuzochirika sehondohwe nemiwo zvikomo kuita sehwayana kudaro? 
Psalms114:7 Dedera iwe nyika pana TENZI, pana Mwari wokwaJakobho" 
Psalms114:8 anopindura dombo richiva dziva remvura dombo romusarasara richiva kasipiti kemvura. 
Psalms115:1 Kwete isu TENZI, kwete isu asi zita renyu ndiro ngaripiwe mukurumbira nokuda kwemwoyochena wenyu nokutendeka kwenyu." 
Psalms115:2 Marudzi tingaapirei mukana wokuti vati, “Mwari wavo aripiko?”" 
Psalms115:3 Mwari wedu ari kumatenga, anoita zvaanoda." 
Psalms115:4 Zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata, isirivha nendarama, zvakaitwa namaoko avanhu." 
Psalms115:5 Zvine miromo asi hazvitauri; zvina maziso asi hazvioni. 
Psalms115:6 Zvine nzeve asi hazvinzwi; zvine mhuno asi hazvinhuwidzi 
Psalms115:7 zvina maoko asi hazvigoni kubata; zvina makumbo asi hazvifambi, hapana kana izwi razvinogona kuburitsa nehuro dzazvo." 
Psalms115:8 Saka vanozviumba vachafanana nazvo; vachafananawo nazvo vanovimba nazvo. 
Psalms115:9 Asi vaIsiraeri vanovimba naTENZI; ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo. 
Psalms115:10 Imba yokwaAroni inovimba naTENZI; ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo. 
Psalms115:11 Vanotya TENZI vanovimba naTENZI; ndiye mubatsiri wavo nenhoo yavo. 
Psalms115:12 TENZI anotirangarira; achatikomborera. Achakomborera imba yokwaIsiraeri; achakomborera imba yokwaAroni. 
Psalms115:13 Achakomborera vanotya TENZI vakuru navaduku. 
Psalms115:14 TENZI ngaakuwanziridzei imi navana venyu. 
Psalms115:15 Dai makangokomborerwa naTENZI akasika denga napasi. 
Psalms115:16 Matenga ndeaTENZI asi nyika akaipa kuvanhu. 
Psalms115:17 Vakafa havarumbidzi TENZI kana vaya vanoenda kurunyararo 
Psalms115:18 Asi isu ticharumbidza TENZI kubvira zvino nokusingaperi. Areruya. 
Psalms116:1 Ndinoda TENZI nokuti akanzwa izwi rangu nechichemo changu; 
Psalms116:2 nokuti akarerekera nzeve yake kwandiri naizvozvo ndichadaidzira kwaari chero ndichiri mupenyu. 
Psalms116:3 Misungo yorufu yakandikomba, kurwadza kwenzvimbo yavakafa kwakandibata. Ndakaona nhamo namatambudziko." 
Psalms116:4 Ndakazodana zita raTENZI ndichiti, “Ndinokukumbirai TENZI ndinunureiwo.”" 
Psalms116:5 TENZI wakanaka, akatendeka; Mwari wedu ane tsitsi." 
Psalms116:6 TENZI anochengeta vanhuwo zvavo. Pandakanga ndasakadzwa nenhamo, akandinunura." 
Psalms116:7 Mwoyo wangu dzikama zvako nokuti TENZI akandiitira zvakanaka 
Psalms116:8 nokuti makandinunura kurufu mukandipukuta misodzi mukanditsigira kuti ndirege kuwa. 
Psalms116:9 Saizvozvo ndinofamba ndiina TENZI munyika yavapenyu. 
Psalms116:10 Ndakaramba ndiine chitendero changu, kunyange ndaiti zvangu, “Ndiri kutambudzika zvikuru.”" 
Psalms116:11 Pandakanga ndazunzika kudaro ndakati, “Kuvimba nomunhu hakuna maturo.”" 
Psalms116:12 Ko TENZI ndichamupeiko pane zvizhinji zvaakandipa? 
Psalms116:13 Ndichapira mukombe womuteuro woruponeso ndichidaidza zita raTENZI. 
Psalms116:14 Ndichaita zvandakatsidza kuna TENZI vanhu vake vose vachiona. 
Psalms116:15 Kuna TENZI, rufu rwavarurami vake rwakakosha." 
Psalms116:16 TENZI ini ndiri muranda wenyu. Ndiri muranda wenyu, mwanakomana womurandakadzi wenyu, makandinunura kurufu." 
Psalms116:17 Ndichapira kwamuri chibayiro chokutenda ndichinamata zita raTENZI. 
Psalms116:18 Ndichaita zvandakatsidza kuna TENZI vanhu vake vose vachizviona 
Psalms116:19 mumipanda yemba yaTENZI mukati mako iwe Jerusaremu. Areruya. 
Psalms117:1 Rumbidzai TENZI imi marudzi ose; mukudzei imi vanhu vose 
Psalms117:2 nokuti mwoyochena wake kwatiri mukuru uye kutendeka kwaTENZI kunogara nokusingaperi. Areruya. 
Psalms118:1 Tendai TENZI nokuti wakanaka, mwoyochena wake hauperi narini." 
Psalms118:2 Isiraeri ngaiti, “Mwoyochena wake hauperi narini.”" 
Psalms118:3 Imba yokwaAroni ngaiti, “Mwoyochena wake hauperi narini.”" 
Psalms118:4 Vanotya TENZI ngavati, “Mwoyochena wake hauperi narini.”" 
Psalms118:5 Ndakadaidzira kuna TENZI ndiri munhamo, TENZI akandipindura akandipinza murusununguko." 
Psalms118:6 TENZI zvaari kudivi kwangu handityi, munhu angandiitei." 
Psalms118:7 TENZI zvaari kudivi kwangu somumwe wavabatsiri vangu, vanondivenga ndichatovayeva zvangu." 
Psalms118:8 Zviri nani kupotera kuna TENZI panokuvimba nomunhu. 
Psalms118:9 Zviri nani kupotera panaTENZI panokuvimba namachinda. 
Psalms118:10 Marudzi akandikomba, muzita raTENZI ndakavaparadza." 
Psalms118:11 Vakandikomba zvokundikomberedza kwazvo mativi ose; muzita raTENZI ndakavaparadza. 
Psalms118:12 Vakandimomotera senyuchi vakati viru viru somoto wetsotso dzeminzwa; muzita raTENZI ndakavaparadza. 
Psalms118:13 Ndakasundidzirwa zvine simba zvokutoda kuwa asi TENZI akandibatsira. 
Psalms118:14 TENZI ndiye simba rangu norumbo rwangu, ndiye akava ruponeso rwangu." 
Psalms118:15 Heyo mheterwa nemipururu yokupururudzira kukunda zvinonzwika mumatendhe avarurami. Simba rorudyi rwaTENZI rakaita zvinogara zvakadaro. 
Psalms118:16 Simba rorudyi rwaTENZI rinosimudzira kukunda, simba rorudyi rwaTENZI rinoita zvinogara zvakadaro." 
Psalms118:17 Handimbofi asi ndichatorarama ndigorondedzera mabasa aTENZI. 
Psalms118:18 TENZI akandiranga zvinorwadza asi haana kunditsvitsa pakufa. 
Psalms118:19 Ndizarurireiwo mukana woururami kuti ndiwane pokupinda napo nditende TENZI. 
Psalms118:20 Uyu ndiwo musuwo waTENZI; vakarurama vachapinda nawo. 
Psalms118:21 Ndinokutendai nokuti makandipindura mukava ruponeso rwangu. 
Psalms118:22 Dombo rakarambwa navavaki ndiro rakazova dombo guru rapakona. 
Psalms118:23 Uku kuita kwaTENZI, chinhu chinoshamisa." 
Psalms118:24 Iri ndiro zuva rakaitwa naTENZI ngatifarei kwazvo tipembere mariri. 
Psalms118:25 Tinunureiwo TENZI tinokutetererai TENZI tinokutetererai itaiwo kuti tibudirire. 
Psalms118:26 Ngaarumbidzwe iye anouya muzita raTENZI; tinokurumbidzai tiri mumba yaTENZI. 
Psalms118:27 TENZI ndiMwari; akatipa chiedza. Batanai mudungwerungwe namapazi enyu mumaoko, kusvika kune zvinenge nyanga zviri paatari." 
Psalms118:28 Imi ndimi Mwari wangu uye ndichakutendai; ndimi Mwari wangu ndinokukudzai. 
Psalms118:29 Tendai TENZI nokuti wakanaka, mwoyochena wake hauperi narini." 
Psalms119:1 Vakakomborerwa zvavo vanoupenyu husina chinoshoreka, vanofamba zviri pamutemo waTENZI. Arefu" 
Psalms119:2 Vakakomborerwa vanochengeta mitemo yake, vanomutsvaka nomwoyo wose" 
Psalms119:3 uye vasingaiti zvakaipa asi vanotevera gwara rake. 
Psalms119:4 Makati mitemo yenyu ichengetwe zvakanakisa. 
Psalms119:5 Dai maitiro angu angova akatendeka mukuchengeta mirau yenyu. 
Psalms119:6 Ipapo handizonyadziswa, ziso rangu richagara riri pamitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:7 Ndichakurumbidzai nomwoyo uri pachokwadi pandinodzidza zvirongwa zvenyu zvakarurama. 
Psalms119:8 Ndichachengeta mitemo yenyu musandirase zvachose. 
Psalms119:9 Ko jaya ringachengete seiko maitiro aro akanaka? Rinofanira kuzvichengetedza maererano neshoko renyu. Beti 
Psalms119:10 Ndinokutsvakai nomwoyo wose, itai kuti ndirege kutsauka pamirau yenyu." 
Psalms119:11 Ndakaisa shoko renyu mumwoyo mangu kuti ndirege kukutadzirai. 
Psalms119:12 TENZI ngaarumbidzwe, ndidzidziseiwo zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:13 Ndinodudza pachena nomuromo wangu zvakatemwa nomuromo wenyu. 
Psalms119:14 Ndinofara namamiriro omutemo wenyu sokufarira kwandinoita upfumi hwose. 
Psalms119:15 Ndichafungisisa nezvemirau yenyu ndigorangarira nzira dzenyu. 
Psalms119:16 Ndinofarira mitemo yenyu, handimbokanganwi shoko renyu." 
Psalms119:17 Ndibatei zvakanakisisa ini muranda wenyu kuti ndirarame ndichengete shoko renyu. Gimeri 
Psalms119:18 Zarurai meso angu kuti ndione zvinoshamisa zviri mumutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:19 Ndiri mweni panyika, musandiwanzire mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:20 Mweya wangu unosuwira kwazvo zvirongwa zvenyu panguva dzose. 
Psalms119:21 Munotsiura vanozvikudza, vanhu vorushambwa, vanotetereka kubva pamitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:22 Ndibvisireiwo kunyadziswa nokushorwa nokuti ndakachengeta mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:23 Kunyange machinda akagara pasi achindirangana, ini muranda wenyu ndicharangarira zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:24 Zvamakatema zvinondifadza, ndiwo makurukota angu." 
Psalms119:25 Ndinorara muhuruva, ndimutsurudzei neshoko renyu. Dareti" 
Psalms119:26 Pandakareurura nzira dzangu makandipindura, ndidzidziseiwo zvirevo zvenyu." 
Psalms119:27 Itai kuti ndinzwisise mufambiro wemitemo yenyu; ini ndichanyatsofunga nezvamabasa enyu anoshamisa. 
Psalms119:28 Ndaparara nokusuruvara, ndisimbiseiwo sokutsidza kwamakaita." 
Psalms119:29 Ndichengetei ndirege kurasika, munyatsondidzidzisawo mutemo wenyu." 
Psalms119:30 Ndakasarudza nzira yokutendeka, ndakaisa zvirongwa zvenyu pamberi pangu." 
Psalms119:31 Ndinoti kwati kwati nezvamakatema, imi TENZI regai kuti ndinyadziswe." 
Psalms119:32 Ndichamhanya nomugwara remitemo yenyu kana mandipa kunzwisisa kwakawanda. 
Psalms119:33 TENZI ndidzidziseiwo gwara rezvirevo zvenyu ndicharitevera kusvika kwokugumisa. Ite 
Psalms119:34 Ndipeiwo kunzwisisa ndichengete mutemo wenyu ndiutevedze nemwoyo wangu wose. 
Psalms119:35 Nditungamirireiwo munzira yemitemo yenyu nokuti ndinoifarira. 
Psalms119:36 Rerekerai mwoyo wangu kumitemo yenyu kwete kune zvinondipfumisa. 
Psalms119:37 Dzorai maziso angu pazvinhu zvisina maturo mundipewo upenyu mugwara renyu. 
Psalms119:38 Chengetai chitsidzo chenyu kumuranda wenyu chamakatsidza kuna vanokutyai. 
Psalms119:39 Ndinzvengeseiwo kune kushorwa kwandinotya nokuti zvirongwa zvenyu zvakanaka. 
Psalms119:40 Tarisai muone kuti ndinoshuwira mitemo yenyu. Pamusana pokuti makarurama, ndipeiwo upenyu." 
Psalms119:41 Ndiitireiwo mwoyochena wenyu, TENZI mundiponesewo sokutsidza kwenyu. Wawu" 
Psalms119:42 Ndopandingakwanise kupindura vanonyomba nokuti ndinovimba neshoko renyu. 
Psalms119:43 Musaite kuti ndibva ndatadza kutaura chokwadi zvachose nokuti chitarisiro changu chiri muzvirongwa zvenyu. 
Psalms119:44 Ndichagara ndichichengeta mutemo wenyu narini narini. 
Psalms119:45 Ndichafamba ndakasununguka nokuti ndinotsvaka mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:46 Ndichataura nezvemitemo yenyu pana madzimambo, handimbonyari." 
Psalms119:47 Nokuti ndinofarira mitemo yenyu nokuti ndinoida. 
Psalms119:48 Ndinoremekedza mitemo yenyu uye ndinoida uyezve ndichafungisisa zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:49 Yeukai zvamakataura kumuranda wenyu zvakandipa chitarisiro. Zaini 
Psalms119:50 Chinondinyaradza munhamo yangu ndechichi chokuti chitsidzo chenyu chinondipa upenyu. 
Psalms119:51 Vanozvikudza vanondishora zvazviri asi handisiani nomutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:52 Pandinorangarira mirau yakare zvinondinyaradza, TENZI." 
Psalms119:53 Ndinoviruka nehasha pamusana pavakaipa vanokanda pasi mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:54 Mitemo yenyu ndiyo rumbo rwangu mumusha wandinogara ndiri muutapwa. 
Psalms119:55 Ndinoyeuka zita renyu usiku TENZI uye ndinochengeta mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:56 Ndozvanguwo izvozvo zvokuti ndakachengeta mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:57 TENZI ndiye nhaka yangu, ndinotsidza kuchengeta shoko renyu. Heti" 
Psalms119:58 Ndinotsvaka nomwoyo wangu wose kuti mundicheukewo, ndinzwireiwo ngoni sokutsidza kwenyu." 
Psalms119:59 Ndikafunga makwara enyu ndinobva ndatendeuka ndotevera mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:60 Ndinokurumidza, handinonoki kuchengeta mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:61 Kunyange misungo yavakaipa ichinditeya handikanganwi mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:62 Ndinomuka pakati pousiku ndichikurumbidzai nokuda kwezvirevo zvenyu zvakarurama. 
Psalms119:63 Ndiri shamwari yavose vanokutyai, wavose vanochengeta mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:64 Nyika izere nemwoyochena wenyu, TENZI, ndidzidzisei mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:65 Makachengeta ini muranda wenyu zvakanaka, TENZI, sokutaura kwenyu. Teti" 
Psalms119:66 Ndipeiwo ungwaru pakufunga uye ruzivo nokuti ndinovimba nemitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:67 Ndisati ndarohwa neshamhu ndakarasika asi pari zvino ndinochengeta shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:68 Makanaka uye munoita zvakanaka, ndidzidziseiwo mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:69 Vanozvikudza vanondizorazora nhema; asi ndinochengeta mitemo yenyu nemwoyo wangu wose. 
Psalms119:70 Asi vakaoma mwoyo, havana hanya asi ini ndinofarira mutemo wenyu." 
Psalms119:71 Zvakanaka kuti ndakamborwadziwa kuti ndidzidze mitemo yenyu 
Psalms119:72 Mutemo unobva pamuromo penyu urinani kwandiri kupfuura zviuru zvemari yendarama nesirivha. 
Psalms119:73 Maoko enyu ndiwo akandisika akandiumba, ndipeiwo kunzwisisa kuti ndidzidze mitemo yenyu. Yodi" 
Psalms119:74 Vanokutyai vachandiona vagofara nokuti ndakatarisira mamuri. 
Psalms119:75 Ndinoziva kuti zvirongwa zvenyu zvakarurama, TENZI uye kuti makandirwadzisa zviri pamutemo." 
Psalms119:76 Ndinyaradzeiwo nemwoyochena wenyu sokutsidza kwenyu kuneni muranda wenyu. 
Psalms119:77 Svikai kwandiri nengoni dzenyu kuti ndirarame nokuti ndinofarira mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:78 Vanozvikudza ngavanyadziswe nokuti vakandipomera nenhema asi ini ndichanyatsofunga nezvemitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:79 Vanokutyai ngavauye kwandiri kuti vazive mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:80 Dai ndikangoteerera mitemo nemwoyo wangu wose kuti ndirege kunyadziswa. 
Psalms119:81 Mwoyo wangu unosuwira ruponeso rwenyu shoko renyu ndiro chitarisiro changu. Kafu 
Psalms119:82 Ndaneta nokutarisira chitsidzo chenyu. Ndinobvunza kuti muchandinyaradza rini," 
Psalms119:83 nokuti ndafanana nechigubhu chewaini chamatehwe chiri muutsi asi mitemo yenyu handina kuikanganwa? 
Psalms119:84 Ini muranda wenyu ndinofanira kutirira kusvikira rinhiko? Muchatonga rini vanonditambudza. 
Psalms119:85 Vanozvikudza vakandicherera hunza vanhu vasingatevedzi mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:86 Mitemo yenyu yose yakatendeka, vanonditambudza namanyepo, ndibatsireiwo." 
Psalms119:87 Vavakutosvika pakuda kundiparadza panyika asi mitemo yenyu handina kuirasa. 
Psalms119:88 Ndiraramiseiwo nemwoyochena wenyu kuti ndichengete mitemo yomuromo wenyu. 
Psalms119:89 TENZI, shoko renyu rakadzika midzi kudenga nokusingaperi. Ramadhi" 
Psalms119:90 Kutendeka kwenyu kunosvika kuzvizvarwa nezvizvarwa makadzika nyika uye inoramba yakasimba. 
Psalms119:91 Nokuronga kwenyu nanhasi zvichiripo nokuti zvinhu zvose varanda venyu. 
Psalms119:92 Pasina kutofarira murau wenyu kwandakaita, ndingadai ndakaparara munhamo dzangu." 
Psalms119:93 Mitemo yenyu handimboikanganwa nokuti ndiyo yamakandiraramisa nayo. 
Psalms119:94 Ndiri wenyu, ndiponeseiwo nokuti ndinotsvaka mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:95 Vakaipa vanondivandira kuti vandiparadze, asi ini chandinongofunga mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:96 Ndakaona kuti hapana chisina mugumo asi mutemo wenyu ziendanakuenda risina miganhu. 
Psalms119:97 Hakusi kuuda ikoko kwandinoita mutemo wenyu ndiwo wandinongofunga zuva rose. Memi 
Psalms119:98 Mutemo wenyu unoita kuti ndive wakangwara kupinda vavengi vangu nokuti unogara uineni. 
Psalms119:99 Ndinotonzwisisisa kupinda vadzidzisi vangu vose nokuti mitemo yenyu ndiyo yandinongofunga. 
Psalms119:100 Ndinotonzwisisa kupinda vakwegura nokuti ndinochengeta mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:101 Ndinozvidzora kunzira dzose dzakaipa kuitira kuti ndichengete shoko renyu. 
Psalms119:102 Handitsaukani nezvirevo zvenyu nokuti makandidzidzisa. 
Psalms119:103 Hakusi kunaka ikoko parurimi kwakaita mashoko enyu, anonaka kupinda uchi mukanwa mangu." 
Psalms119:104 Ndinowana kunzwisisa nemitemo yenyu naizvozvo ndinovenga nzira dzose dzenhema. 
Psalms119:105 Shoko renyu ndiro rambi retsoka dzangu nemwenje unondivhenekera nzira. Nunu 
Psalms119:106 Ndakatsidza uye ndinosimbisisa kuti ndichachengeta zvirevo zvenyu zvakarurama. 
Psalms119:107 Ndinorwadziwa zvikuru, TENZI, ndiraramiseiwo sokutsidza kwenyu." 
Psalms119:108 TENZI gamuchiraiwo mupiro wangu wokurumbidza mundidzidzisewo zvirevo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:109 Ndinogara ndakabatira ura mumaoko asi mutemo wenyu handiukanganwi 
Psalms119:110 Vaipi vakanditeya asi handitsauki pamitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:111 Mitemo yenyu ndiyo nhaka yangu nokusingaperi. Ehe, ndiyo rufaro rwomwoyo wangu." 
Psalms119:112 Ndakazvipira kuchengeta mitemo yenyu narini kusvika kumugumo. 
Psalms119:113 Ndinovenga vanhu vane mwoyo miviri asi chandinoda mutemo wenyu. Sameki 
Psalms119:114 Ndimi mudziviriri wangu nenhowo yangu, ndinovimba neshoko renyu." 
Psalms119:115 Ibvai kwandiri imi vaiti vezvakaipa kuti ndiwane machengetero emitemo yaMwari wangu. 
Psalms119:116 Nditsigireiwo sokutsidza kwamakaita kuitira kuti ndirarame, musaite kuti ndinyare nechitarisiro changu." 
Psalms119:117 Nditsigirei ndichengeteke ndirambe mwoyo uri pamitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:118 Munorasa vanhu vose vanotsauka pamitemo yenyu nokuti varevi venhema, vanyengedzi." 
Psalms119:119 Munoshora vakaipa samagufu, nokudaro ndinoda mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:120 Ndinodedera nokukutyai; ndinotya kutonga kwenyu. 
Psalms119:121 Ndakaita zviri pamutemo uye zvakarurama musandisiye mumaoko avanondidzvinyiriri vangu. Aini 
Psalms119:122 Tsidzai kuti ndimi muchabatsira ini muranda wenyu. Musarege vanozvikudza vachindidzvinyirira. 
Psalms119:123 Meso angu aneta nokutarisira ruponeso rwenyu nokuzadzikiswa kwechitsidzo chenyu chakarurama. 
Psalms119:124 Ndiitireiwo mwoyochena mundidzidzisewo mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:125 Ndiri muranda wenyu, ndipeiwo kunzwisisa kuti ndizive mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:126 Yasvika zvino nguva TENZI yokuti muchiwana zvamunoita nokuti mutemo uri kutyorwa. 
Psalms119:127 Naizvozvo ndinoda mitemo yenyu kupinda ndarama, kupinda ndarama yakanakisisa." 
Psalms119:128 Nezvo nemitemo yenyu ndinowana nzira kwayo, ndinovenga maitiro ose ounyengedzi." 
Psalms119:129 Mitemo yenyu yakanaka kwazvo ndokusaka ndichiichengeta. 
Psalms119:130 Shoko renyu parizvino ratambanuka, rinopa chiedza, rinopa vanhuwo zvavo kunzwisisa." 
Psalms119:131 Ndinofemereka ndakashama muromo nokuti ndinodisisa mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:132 Ndicheuke mundiitirewo zvakanaka zvamunongoita kuna vanoda zita renyu. 
Psalms119:133 Ndisimbisei tsoka sokutsidza kwamakaita uipi hurege kunditonga. 
Psalms119:134 Ndinunureiwo kuvadzvinyiriri kuitira kuti ndichengete mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:135 Ndiitireiwo mwoyo wakanaka, ini muranda wenyu, mundidzidzise mirau yenyu." 
Psalms119:136 Maziso angu anosvimha misodzi nokuti vanhu havachengeti mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:137 TENZI makarurama uye kutonga kwenyu kwakarurama. Tsadhe 
Psalms119:138 Makatema mirau yakarurama, iri pachokwadi chaipo." 
Psalms119:139 Ndinobaiwa mwoyo neshungu nokuti vavengi vangu vanokanganwa zvavo mazwi enyu. 
Psalms119:140 Chitsidzo chenyu ndechepachokwadi chaicho uye muranda wenyu anochida. 
Psalms119:141 Ndiri muduku zvangu uye ndinoshorwa asi handikanganwi mirau yenyu. 
Psalms119:142 Ururami hwenyu hwakarurama nokusingaperi uye mutemo wenyu ndewechokwadi. 
Psalms119:143 Nhamo nokurwadziwa mwoyo zvandiwira, asi ndinofarira mutemo wenyu." 
Psalms119:144 Mitemo yenyu yakarurama nokusingaperi ndipeiwo kunzwisisa ndirarame. 
Psalms119:145 Ndinochema nemwoyo wangu wose, ndipindureiwo TENZI ndichengete zvirevo zvenyu. Kofu" 
Psalms119:146 Ndinochema kwamuri, ndiponeseiwo kuti ndichengete mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:147 Ndinotangira mambakwedza kumuka ndichikumbira rubatsiro, chitarisiro changu chiri mumashoko enyu." 
Psalms119:148 Ndinenge ndatosvinura maziso nguva inotsinhanha varindi isati yasvika kuti ndidzamise pfungwa nezvezvitsidzo zvenyu. 
Psalms119:149 Nemwoyochena wenyu, inzwai kuchema kwangu, TENZI ndiraramiseiwo noruenzaniso rwenyu." 
Psalms119:150 Vanonditambudza vari kuuya kwandiri nepfungwa dzakaipa, vari kure nomutemo wenyu." 
Psalms119:151 Asi imi muri padyo TENZI uye mitemo yenyu ndeyechokwadi. 
Psalms119:152 Ndakaziva kare zvemitemo yenyu kuti makaidzika nokusingaperi. 
Psalms119:153 Tarisaiwo kutambura kwangu mundinunurewo nokuti handikanganwi mutemo wenyu. Reshi 
Psalms119:154 Ndimiririreiwo mundinunure, ndiraramiseiwo sokutsidza kwamakaita." 
Psalms119:155 Ruponeso rwuri kure navakaipa nokuti havana hanya nemitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:156 Tsitsi dzenyu dzakawanda, TENZI ndiraramiseiwo noruenzaniso rwenyu." 
Psalms119:157 Vanonditambudza navanondirwisa vakawanda asi handitsauki pamitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:158 Ndinotarisa vanyengedzi ndichivasema nokuti havachengeti mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:159 Rangarirai mudiro wandinoita mitemo yenyu, nemwoyochena wenyu ndichengetereiwo upenyu hwangu." 
Psalms119:160 Chokwadi ndicho mwoyo weshoko renyu uye zvirevo zvenyu zvose zvakarurama, zvinogara nokusingaperi." 
Psalms119:161 Machinda anonditambudza pasina chikonzero asi ini chandinoremekedza zvikuru mumwoyo mangu, mashoko enyu. Shini" 
Psalms119:162 Ndinofadzwa neshoko renyu somunhu awana zvokupamba zvakawanda. 
Psalms119:163 Ndinovenga uye ndinosema nhema asi ndinoda mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:164 Ndinokurumbidzai kanomwe pazuva nokuda kwezvirevo zvenyu zvakarurama. 
Psalms119:165 Vanoda mutemo wenyu vane rugare rukuru. Hapana chinovaita kuti vadzadzarike. 
Psalms119:166 Ndinotarisira ruponeso rwenyu, TENZI uye ndinochengeta mitemo yenyu." 
Psalms119:167 Ndinochengeta mitemo yenyu uye ndinoida zvikuru kwazvo. 
Psalms119:168 Ndinochengeta mitemo yenyu nemirawo yenyu nokuti nzira dzangu dzose munodziziva. 
Psalms119:169 Regai chichemo changu chisvike kwamuri TENZI regai ndinzwisise sokutsidza kwamakaita. Tau 
Psalms119:170 Regai munamato wangu usvike kwamuri mundinunurewo sokutaura kwenyu. 
Psalms119:171 Muromo wangu uchakurumbidzai nokuti munondidzidzisa mirao yenyu. 
Psalms119:172 Shoko renyu richava rumbo parurimi rwangu nokuti mitemo yenyu yose yakarurama. 
Psalms119:173 Ruoko rwenyu ngarugaririre kundibatsira nokuti changu ini chandakasarudza mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms119:174 Ndinosuwira ruponeso rwenyu TENZI uye ndinofarira mutemo wenyu. 
Psalms119:175 Ndiraramisei kuti ndikurumbidzei zvirevo zvenyu ngazvindibatsire. 
Psalms119:176 Ndatetereka sehwai yarasika Nditsvakei ini muranda wenyu nokuti handikanganwi mitemo yenyu. 
Psalms120:1 Munamato wokukumbira rubatsiro Munhamo yangu ndakachema kuna TENZI kuti andipindure. 
Psalms120:2 Ndinunureiwo TENZI kumiromo inotaura nhema, kururimi runonyengedza." 
Psalms120:3 Shamhu yauchapiwa ndeipi, chimwe chauchaitwa chii, iwe murevi wenhema?" 
Psalms120:4 Miseve yavarwi yakapinza namazimbe anopfuta omuti womutsvairo. 
Psalms120:5 Rushambwawo rwokuti ndinogara muMesheki ndichigara mumatendhe okuKedhari.

Psalms120:7 asi ndikati nditaure ivo vavakutoda zvehondo. 
Psalms121:1 TENZI muchengeti wavanhu Ndinosimudzira meso angu kumakomo. Kunobva rubatsiro rwangu ndokupi? 
Psalms121:2 Rubatsiro rwangu runobva kuna TENZI akasika denga napasi. 
Psalms121:3 Haaregi tsoka yako ichitsvedzemuka iye anokuchengeta haatsomwaire nehope. 
Psalms121:4 Onai iye anochengeta Isiraeri haatsomwaire nehope kana kukotsira. 
Psalms121:5 TENZI ndiye muchengeti wako TENZI ndiye mumvuri wako kurudyi rwako. 
Psalms121:6 Zuva harikupisi masikati kana mwedzi nousiku. 
Psalms121:7 TENZI achakudzivirira kune zvakaipa zvose achachengeta upenyu hwako.

Psalms132:1 Kuunzwa kweBhokisi reChitenderano noumbowo hwaDhavhidhi TENZI rangarirai Dhavhidhi nenhamo dzose dzaakatiirira

Psalms137:1 Pedyo nehova dzeBhabhironi taigarapo tichichema patainge tafunga Zioni.

Psalms137:4 Ko taigoimba sei rumbo rwaTENZI munyika yavatorwa. 
Psalms137:5 Kana ndikakukanganwa iwe Jerusaremu ruoko rwangu rworudyi ngaruune. 
Psalms137:6 Rurimi rwangu ngarubve rwanamira kumusoro kwomukanwa mangu, kana ndikarega kukurangarira kana ndikarega kutora Jerusaremu somufaro wangu mukurusa."

Psalms138:1 Rumbo rwokutenda Ndinotenda TENZI nomwoyo wangu wose ndinokurumbidzai vamwari vachizviona. 
Psalms138:2 Ndinokotamira ndakananga kutemberi yenyu tsvene ndichitenda zita renyu nemwoyochena wenyu nokutendeka kwenyu nokuti makaisa zita renyu neshoko renyu pamusoro pezvinhu zvose. 
Psalms138:3 Pandakachema makandidavira, mukandisimbaradza." 
Psalms138:4 Madzimambo apasi pose achakurumbidzai TENZI nokuti akanzwa mashoko omuromo wenyu 
Psalms138:5 vachaimba vachikudza maitiro aTENZI nokuti mbiri yaTENZI ihuru. 
Psalms138:6 Kunyange zvazvo TENZI ari kumusoro ane hanya navanozvidukupisa, asi vanozvitutumadza anovazivira kurekure." 
Psalms138:7 Kunyange ndikafamba zvangu mukati mematambudziko, imi munochengeta upenyu hwangu, ruoko rwenyu rwesimba runorwisana navavengi vangu vane hasha ruoko rwenyu rworudyi runondinunura." 
Psalms138:8 TENZI achazadzisa chinangwa chake mandiri mwoyochena wenyu TENZI hauperi musarase basa ramaoko enyu. 
Psalms139:1 Mwari anoziva zvose TENZI makandiongorora mukandiziva. 
Psalms139:2 Munoziva mafambiro namagariro munonzwisisa pfungwa dzangu imi muri kure zvenyu. 
Psalms139:3 Imi munocherechedza kufamba kwangu nokurara kwangu uye munoziva nzira dzangu dzose," 
Psalms139:4 nokuti izwi risati rambove parurimi rwangu, imi TENZI munenge matonyatsoriziva." 
Psalms139:5 Munondikomberedza mberi neshure muchitoisa ruoko rwenyu pandiri. 
Psalms139:6 Ruzivo rwakadaro runondishamisa zvakanyanyisisa, rwuri pamusoro handimbokwanisa kuruwana." 
Psalms139:7 Kwandingaende ndokupiko, kusina Mweya wenyu uye ndingatizire kupiko kwamusiri" 
Psalms139:8 nokuti ndikati ndiende kudenga imi muriko? Ndikati ndiwarire uvato hwangu kunzvimbo yavakafa imi muriko," 
Psalms139:9 ndikati regai ndipepereke nemhepo yorungwanani ndichindogara kwakaperera gungwa," 
Psalms139:10 kunyange ikoko ruoko rwenyu ndirwo ruchanditungamirira makandibata noruoko rwenyu rworudyi. 
Psalms139:11 Ndikati nditi rima rindifukidze uye kuti chiedza chiri pandiri chive usiku 
Psalms139:12 kunyange rima harina kusviba kwamuri, usiku hwakachena samasikati. Kwamuri rima nechiedza zvakangofanana." 
Psalms139:13 Nokuti ndimi makaumba nhengo dzangu dzomukati-kati. Ndimi makandiruka munhumbu maamai vangu. 
Psalms139:14 Ndinokurumbidzai nokuti munotyisa uye munoshamisa. Mabasa enyu anoshamisa munonyatsondiziva. 
Psalms139:15 Zvandiri zvakanga zvisina kuvanzika kwamuri pandaiumbwa muchivande, ndichinyatsosonanidzwa pasi pasi chaipo penyika." 
Psalms139:16 Makandiona nemeso nhengo dzangu dzisati dzaumbwa. Dzakanga dzanyorwa mubhuku menyu dzikazoumbwa panguva yadzo kusvikira dzose dzapera. 
Psalms139:17 Hakusi kukosha kwakaita pfungwa dzenyu kwandiri TENZI uye hakusi kukura kwadzakaita. 
Psalms139:18 Dai kuri kuti ndinodziverenga, dzakawanda kupinda jecha. Pandinomuka ndinenge ndisati ndambopedza nemi." 
Psalms139:19 Dai muchingouraya zvenyu vakaipa, Mwari uye kuti mhondi dzisudurukane neni" 
Psalms139:20 vanhu vanotaura vachikushorai zvakaipa vanokumukirai zvakaipa. 
Psalms139:21 Vanokuvengai TENZI handivavengi here ini? Handivengi here vanokumukirai, TENZI?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndinovavenga zvokuvavenga zviya, vanotovawo vavengi vangu." 
Psalms139:23 Ndiongororeiwo Mwari muzive zviri mumwoyo mangu. Ndiedzei muzive zvandinofunga 
Psalms139:24 muone kana mune chakaipa mandiri munditungamirire munzira yokugara nokugara. 
Psalms140:1 Munamato wokukumbira kudzivirirwa Ndinunurei TENZI kuvanhu vakaipa ndichengeteiwo kuvanhu vanokuvadza vamwe 
Psalms140:2 vanhu vanorangana zvakaipa mumwoyo mavo, vanogara vakamutsa hondo." 
Psalms140:3 Vanorodza rurimi rwavo serwenyoka; pasi pemiromo yavo pane uturu hwechiva. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms140:4 Ndichengeteiwo TENZI ndirege kuwira mumaoko avakaipa ndichengeteiwo kuvanhu vanokuvadza vamwe vakaronga kupingirisha makumbo angu. 
Psalms140:5 Vanhu vanozvikudza vakanditeya zvakavanda, vakawarira misungo munzira samambure, vakanditeya nomusungo munzira. Dzepfunde." 
Psalms140:6 Ndinoti kuna TENZI, “Ndimi Mwari wangu inzwaiwo izwi rokukumbira kwangu, TENZI.”" 
Psalms140:7 TENZI Mwari wangu, mununuri wangu ane simba, makadzivirira musoro wangu pazuva rehondo." 
Psalms140:8 Musape vakaipa zvavanoda, musaite kuti zvavanoronga zvibudirire. Dzepfunde" 
Psalms140:9 Kana vanondikomba vava kusimudza misoro, zvavakarangana nemiromo yavo ngazvivapfukire." 
Psalms140:10 Ngavawirwe namazimbe omoto unopisa, vakandwe muhunza mavasingazombobuda." 
Psalms140:11 Munyombi ngaarege kudzika midzi munyika, zvakashata ngazviwire nokukurumidza munhu anokuvadza vamwe." 
Psalms140:12 Ndinoziva kuti TENZI anomiririra nyaya dzavarombo uye anoitira zvinoruenzaniso vasina chavanacho. 
Psalms140:13 Vakarurama vachatotenda zita renyu; vari pachokwadi vachagara panemi. 
Psalms141:1 Mururami anochema kuna Mwari pakati pavakaipa Ndinodanidzira kwamuri TENZI kurumidzai kuuya kwandiri. Teererai izwi rangu pandinodanidzira kwamuri. 
Psalms141:2 Munamato wangu ngauite serusenzi kwamuri uye kusimudza kwandinoita maoko kuite sechibayiro chamanheru. 
Psalms141:3 Batai muromo wangu TENZI; chengetedzai musuwo womuromo wangu. 
Psalms141:4 Regai kurerekesa mwoyo wangu kune chinhu chakaipa kuti ndiite zvinhu zvakaipa, pamwechete navanhu vanoita zvakaipa regai kuti ndidye twunonaka twavo." 
Psalms141:5 Wakarurama angandirove zvake, kana kunditsiura zvakanaka, asi mafuta avakaipa asatombozora zvao musoro wangu nokuti munamato wangu unogara wakanangana nezvakaipa zvavo." 
Psalms141:6 Kana vaiswa mumaoko avanhu vanovabata nemhosva, ndipo pavachadzidza kuti mazwi aTENZI ndeechokwadi." 
Psalms141:7 Sokutsemura kunoita munhu dombo achiripwanyira pasi, saizvozvowo mapfupa avo achanzi mwarara pamusuo weguva." 
Psalms141:8 Asi maziso angu anotarisa kwamuri Mwari TENZI; ndinopotera kwamuri musandisiye ndiri pamhene. 
Psalms141:9 Ndidzivirireiwo kumisungo yavakanditeya nayo uye kumariva avaiti vezvakaipa. 
Psalms141:10 Vaipi ngavawire mumambure avo pamwechete ini ndichipunyuka. 
Psalms142:1 Nhetembo yaDhavhidhi paaiva mubako munamato. Ndinochema zvinonzwika kuna TENZI; nezwi rangu ndinotsvitsa chichemo changu kuna TENZI. 
Psalms142:2 Ndinodurura nhuna dzangu pamberi pake. Ndinotaura nhamo dzangu pamberi pake. 
Psalms142:3 Kana mweya wangu washaya simba imi munoziva nzira yandinofanira kutora munzira yandinofamba vakanditeera musungo. 
Psalms142:4 Tarisai zvenyu kurudyi muone kuti hakuna anombondionawo, hakuna kwokupotera, hapana ane hanya neni." 
Psalms142:5 Ndinochema kwamuri TENZI ndichiti ndimi diziro rangu; nhaka yangu munyika yavapenyu. 
Psalms142:6 Chinzwai kuchema kwangu nokuti ini ndapera simba; ndiponeseiwo kuvanhu vanonditambudza nokuti vane simba kupinda ini. 
Psalms142:7 Ndiburitseiwo mujeri kuti nditende zita renyu vakarurama vachandikomberedza pamusana pokundiitira zvakanaka kwenyu. 
Psalms143:1 Kukumbira rubatsiro Inzwai munamato wangu TENZI; teererai chichemo changu. Ndipindureiwo nokutendeka kwenyu noururami hwenyu. 
Psalms143:2 Musapinze ini muranda wenyu dare nokuti hapana mupenyu akarurama pamberi penyu," 
Psalms143:3 nokuti muvengi ari kundironda; andibvumburudza muvhu. Akaita kuti ndigare murima savakafa kare kare. 
Psalms143:4 Ndokusaka ndapererwa nesimba, ndadzongodzwa mwoyo ini." 
Psalms143:5 Ndinoyeuka mazuva akare, ndinorangarira zvose zvamakaita ndinofungisisa zvakaitwa namaoko enyu." 
Psalms143:6 Ndinosimudzira maoko angu kwamuri mweya wangu une nyota nemi sapasi pakaoma. Dzepfunde. 
Psalms143:7 Kasikai kundipindura TENZI ndapererwa ini, musavanze uso hwenyu ndingadaro ndikaita savaya vanoenda kuguva." 
Psalms143:8 Regai ndinzwe nezvemwoyochena wenyu mangwanani nokuti ndinovimba nemi. Ndidzidziseiwo nzira yandingafambe nayo, nokuti ndinosimudzira pfungwa nemwoyo wangu kunemi." 
Psalms143:9 Ndinunureiwo kuvavengi vangu TENZI ndinopotera kwamuri. 
Psalms143:10 Ndidzidziseiwo kuita kuda kwenyu nokuti ndimi Mwari wangu; mweya wenyu wakanaka ngaunditungamirire nomunzira yakati sandara. 
Psalms143:11 Ndichengetedzeiwo ndiri mupenyu nokuda kwezita renyu, pamusana poururami hwenyu, ndiburitseiwo mumatambudziko." 
Psalms143:12 Pamusana pomwoyochena wenyu, paradzai vavengi vangu, muparadze mhandu dzangu dzose nokuti ndiri muranda wenyu." 
Psalms144:1 Munamato wamambo wokutenda Ngaarumbidzwe TENZI dombo rangu, anodzidzisa maoko angu hondo uye minwe yangu kurwisa." 
Psalms144:2 Ndiye dombo rangu nenzvimbo yangu yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo, ndiye nhare yangu nomununuri wangu. Ndiyewo nhoo yangu nediziro rangu iye anoisa vanhu pasi pangu." 
Psalms144:3 Nhai TENZI iye munhu chiikowo zvake wamunorangarira iye munhuwo zvake wamunofunga. 
Psalms144:4 Munhu akaita sefemo, mazuva ake akaita somumvuri unopfuura." 
Psalms144:5 Kotamisai matenga enyu muburuke TENZI, batai makomo apfumbuke utsi." 
Psalms144:6 Penyesai mheni muvamwararise; tumai miseve yenyu muvadzipure. 
Psalms144:7 Tambanudzai ruoko rwenyu kubva kumusoro ikoko mundinunure, mundiponese mumvura zhinji, mumaoko avatorwa" 
Psalms144:8 vane miromo inoreva nhema vane ruoko rworudyi ruoko rwerudyi rwokutsidza narwo nhema. 
Psalms144:9 Ndichakuimbirai rwiyo rutsva, Mwari ndichikuridzirai dimbwa rine gumi retambo." 
Psalms144:10 Imi munoita kuti madzimambo akurire imi makanunura Dhavhidhi muranda wenyu. 
Psalms144:11 Ndinunurei kubakatwa rehondo youtsinye; mundinunure mumaoko avatorwa, vanhu vanotaura manyepo vano ruoko rwavo rworudyi, ruoko rworudyi rwokutsidza narwo nhema." 
Psalms144:12 Tinokumbirawo kuti vana vedu vakomana, kubvira pauduku hwavo vaite sezvinomera zvakasvika, vana vedu vasikana vave sembiru dzapamakona dzakavezerwa kuvaka muzinda." 
Psalms144:13 Matura edu ngaazare apote achiwanisa vanhu zvinhu zvose. Hwai dzedu dzibereke gumi nefararira mumafaro muve namazana akazanirana. 
Psalms144:14 Mombe dzedu ngadzive navana vakawanda, pasina isingabereki kana inosvodza. Parege kuva nokuungudza mumigwagwa yedu." 
Psalms144:15 Rwakakomborerwa rudzi rwakadaro, rwakakomborerwa rudzi runa TENZI samwari warwo." 
Psalms145:1 Rumbo rwokurumbidza Mwari mambo Ndinokukudzai Mwari wangu namambo wangu, ndicharumbidza zita renyu narini narini." 
Psalms145:2 Ndichakurumbidzai mazuva ose ndichikudza zita renyu narini narini. 
Psalms145:3 TENZI mukuru uye anofanira kurumbidzwa zvikuru; ukuru hwake haugoni kutsvagurudzwa hukawanikwa. 
Psalms145:4 Chizvarwa chicharumbidza kune chimwe chizvarwa mabasa enyu uye chichaparidza zviito zvesimba renyu. 
Psalms145:5 Ndichanyatsofungisisa nezvomukurumbira woumambo hwenyu husingaitiki uye nezvamabasa enyu anoshamisa. 
Psalms145:6 Vanhu vachataura nezvesimba rezvamunoita zvinotyisa; ini ndicharondedzera ukuru hwenyu. 
Psalms145:7 Vachakurukura kwazvo mukurumbira wokunaka kwenyu kukuru uye vachaimba zvikuru nezvokururama kwenyu. 
Psalms145:8 TENZI akanaka uye ane tsitsi, haakurumidzi kushatirwa uye azere nemwoyochena." 
Psalms145:9 TENZI akanaka kumunhu wose uye ane tsitsi nechose chaakasika. 
Psalms145:10 Zvose zvamakasika zvichakutendai TENZI uye vatsvene venyu vose vachakutunhidzai; 
Psalms145:11 vachataura nezvembiri youmambo hwenyu vachikurukura nezvesimba renyu," 
Psalms145:12 kuzivisa vanhu simba ramabasa enyu uye mukurumbira woumambo hwenyu husingaitiki. 
Psalms145:13 Umambo hwenyu umambo hwokugara nokugara kutonga kwenyu kunogara kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa. TENZI anotendeka pane zvose zvaanotaura uye zvaanoita zvose anozviita nemwoyochena. 
Psalms145:14 TENZI anotsigira vanenge vavakuputsika uye anosimudzira vanenge varasiswa mwoyo. 
Psalms145:15 Meso ose anotarisa kwamuri imi muchivapa chokudya chavo nenguva yakafanira. 
Psalms145:16 Munotambanudza ruoko rwenyu muchigutsa nezvinodiwa nechinhu chose chipenyu. 
Psalms145:17 TENZI akarurama panzira dzake dzose uye ane mwoyochena pane zvose zvaanoita. 
Psalms145:18 TENZI ari pedyo navanodanidzira kwaari kuna vose vanodanidzira kwaari muchokwadi. 
Psalms145:19 Anozadzisa zvido zvavanomutya uye anonzwa kuchema kwavo achivaponesa. 
Psalms145:20 TENZI anochengetedza vose vanomuda asi vakaipa vose anovaparadza. 
Psalms145:21 Muromo wangu uchataura uchirumbidza TENZI vanhu vose ngavarumbidze zita rake rinoera narini narini. 
Psalms146:1 Rumbidza TENZI rumbidza TENZI iwe mweya wangu. 
Psalms146:2 Ndicharumbidza TENZI chero ndichiri mupenyu, ndichaimba ndichirumbidza Mwari wangu ndichiri mupenyu." 
Psalms146:3 Usavimbe namachinda, kuvimba nomunhu asina chaanobatsira." 
Psalms146:4 Mweya wake paunobuda, anodzokera kuvhu rake, pazuva iroro zvirongwa zvake zvinobva zvaparara." 
Psalms146:5 Akakomborerwa zvake munhu anobatsirwa naMwari waJakobho anovimba naTENZI Mwari wake 
Psalms146:6 akasika denga napasi negungwa nazvose zvirimo anochengeta chitsidzo chake nokusingaperi. 
Psalms146:7 Anoona kuti vakadzvinyirirwa vaitirwa zvino ruenzaniso anopa chokudya vane nzara TENZI anosunungura vasungwa. 
Psalms146:8 TENZI anosvinudza meso amapofu TENZI anosimudzira vanenge varasiswa mwoyo TENZI anoda vakarurama. 
Psalms146:9 TENZI anotarisa vatorwa anotsigira chirikadzi nenherera asi nzira yavakaipa anoiparadza. 
Psalms146:10 TENZI achatonga nokusingaperi, Mwari wako iwe guta reZioni, pazvizvarwa nezvizvarwa. Areruya." 
Psalms147:1 Rumbidzai TENZI, zvakanaka kuimba tichirumbidza Mwari wedu. Nokuti wakanaka uye zvakakodzera seiko kumuombera norumbo tichimurumbidza." 
Psalms147:2 TENZI anovakazve Jerusaremu, anounganidza vakaraswa vaIsiraeri." 
Psalms147:3 Anorapa vakarasa mwoyo, anosunga maronda avo." 
Psalms147:4 Ndiye akaronga uwandu hwenyenyedzi ndiye anodzidoma dzose namazita adzo. 
Psalms147:5 TENZI wedu mukuru uye ane simba rakawanda uye kunzwisisa kwake hakutauriki. 
Psalms147:6 TENZI anosimudzira vakadzvinyirirwa vakaipa anovaputsira pasi. 
Psalms147:7 Imbirai TENZI muchimutenda ridzirai Mwari wedu mumhanzi nechipendani. 
Psalms147:8 Anofukidza denga namakore; anonaisa mvura panyika; anokurisa uswa pamakomo. 
Psalms147:9 Ndiye anopa mhuka zvokudya zvadzo uye manyana amakunguo anochema. 
Psalms147:10 Haanei navanovimba nesimba ramabhiza, kana navanovimba navarwi vakasimba makumbo," 
Psalms147:11 asi TENZI anofadzwa navanomutya vanovimba nomwoyochena wake. 
Psalms147:12 Rumbidza TENZI, Jerusaremu; rumbidza Mwari wako iwe Zioni" 
Psalms147:13 nokuti anosimbisa zvihuri zvemisuwo yako mikuru anokomborera vana vari mauri. 
Psalms147:14 Anopa nyika yako rugare, anokugutsa nembeswa dzakanakisisa." 
Psalms147:15 Anotuma chirevo kunyika, shoko rake rinobva ramhanya nokukasika." 
Psalms147:16 Anounza mazaya echando sewuru; anoparadzira mazaya echando chamangwanani sedota. 
Psalms147:17 Anokanda chivhuramahwe samavhinga; ndiani angatirire chando chake. 
Psalms147:18 Anongotaura izwi chete zvichibva zvanyongodeka, anovhuvhutisa mhepo yake mvura ichibva yayerera." 
Psalms147:19 Akataura mazwi ake kune vekwaJakobho nemirao nezvirevo zvake kuvaIsiraeri. 
Psalms147:20 Haana kumboita zvakadai norumwe rudzi. Havazivi zvirevo zvake. Areruya. 
Psalms148:1 Areruya. Rumbidzai TENZI kumatenga; murumbidzei kumusorosoro. 
Psalms148:2 Murumbidzei imi vatumwa vake vose; murumbidzei imi hondo dzake dzose. 
Psalms148:3 Murumbidzei imi zuva nemwedzi; murumbidzei imi nyenyedzi dzinopenya. 
Psalms148:4 Murumbidzei imi matenga okumusorosoro nemi mvura dzokumusoro kwamatenga. 
Psalms148:5 Ngazvirumbidze zita raTENZI nokuti akataura, izvo zvikabva zvasikwa." 
Psalms148:6 Akazvimisa panzvimbo yazvo nokusingaperi, akazvisiira miganhu yazvo yazvisingapfuuri." 
Psalms148:7 Pasi ngaparumbidzewo TENZI: imi mazigaranyanya nemi hwenje hose hwegungwa 
Psalms148:8 newe moto nechivhuramahwe namazaya echando namazaya echando chamangwanani nemi dutu remhepo rinoita zvaanoreva; 
Psalms148:9 imi makomo nezvikomo zvose, miti yemichero nemisidhari yose," 
Psalms148:10 imi zvikara nemi mombe dzose, imi zvinhu zvinokambaira, nemi shiri dzinobhururuka," 
Psalms148:11 nemi madzimambo apasi nemi vanhu vose, imi machinda nemi vatongi vose vapasi" 
Psalms148:12 nemi majaya nemhandara pamwechete imi vakwegura nemi vana," 
Psalms148:13 rumbidzai zita raTENZI nokuti zita rake roga ndiro riri pamusorosoro, mukurumbira wake, denga napasi zvinosara pasi." 
Psalms148:14 Akaita kuti vanhu vake vave rudzi rune simba varurami vake vose ngavarumbidzwe ngavarumbidzwe vanhu veIsiraeri vari pedyo naye. Areruya. 
Psalms149:1 Areruya. Imbirai TENZI rumbo rutsva murumbidzei mugungano ravakarurama. 
Psalms149:2 Isiraeri ngaifare noMusiki wayo; vana veZioni ngavafare naMambo wavo. 
Psalms149:3 Ngavarumbidze zita rake vachitamba, vachiridza tambureni nezvipendani" 
Psalms149:4 nokuti TENZI anofadzwa navanhu vake anokudza varombo nokuita kuti vakunde. 
Psalms149:5 Vakarurama ngavapembere kukurira. Ngavaimbe norufaro vari mumasofa avo. 
Psalms149:6 Ngavapururudze namagure pahuro vaine mapakatwa omucheka kose mumaoko. 
Psalms149:7 Kutsividza vechirudzi uye kuranga marudzi 
Psalms149:8 vachisunga madzimambo avo nengetani namachinda avo namakechemu esimbi 
Psalms149:9 kuti vavape chirango chakanyorwa. Iyi ndiyo mbiri yavakarurama vake vose. Areruya. 
Psalms150:1 Areruya. Rumbidzai Mwari munzvimbo yake inoera murumbidzei muziendanakuenda rake rine simba. 
Psalms150:2 Murumbidzirei mabasa ake ane simba, murumbidzei zvinowirirana noukuru hwake hwakakurisisa." 
Psalms150:3 Murumbidzei nehwamanda, murumbidzei nedimbwa nechipendani." 
Psalms150:4 Murumbidzei netambureni muchitamba murumbidzei nenyere namabhanjo. 
Psalms150:5 Murumbidzei namakwakwakwa, murumbidzei namakwakwakwa anorira kwazvo." 
Psalms150:6 Zvose zvinofema ngazvirumbidze TENZI. Areruya. 
Proverbs1:1 Tsumo dzaSoromoni mwanakomana waDhavhidhi mambo weIsiraeri 
Proverbs1:2 dzokuti vanhu vazive ungwaru nezvidzidzo kuti vanzwisise mashoko ezvakadzama," 
Proverbs1:3 dzinoitawo kuti munhu adzidze uchenjeri, ururami, noruenzaniso nokuva pachokwadi." 
Proverbs1:4 Kuitirawo kuti vanhuwo zvavo vapiwe uchenjeri nevechidiki kufunga. 
Proverbs1:5 Mungwaru achadzinzwawo agopamhidzira ruzivo anonzwisisa agowanawo mano. 
Proverbs1:6 Kuri kuitira kuti munhu anzwisise tsumo namadimikira uye mazwi avangwaru nezvirahwe zvavo. 
Proverbs1:7 Kutya Tenzi ndiko kutanga kworuzivo mapenzi anoshora ungwaru nechidzidziso. 
Proverbs1:8 Mwanangu, teerera zvaunodzidziswa nababa vako. Usarambe zvaunorairwa naamai vako." 
Proverbs1:9 Zvichava tsungare yokushongedza musoro wako nayo nechuma chokushongedza huro yako nacho. 
Proverbs1:10 Mwanangu, vatadzi vakakunyengetedza kuita chinhu, usabvume." 
Proverbs1:11 Kana vakati, “Uya tiende tindovandira vanhu tivauraye tindovhurumukira kuvarwisa vasina mhaka uye zvisina tsarukano" 
Proverbs1:12 sezvinoita nzvimbo yavafi tivamedze vari vapenyu vakangodaro sezvavakaita sezvinoita vanodzika muguva," 
Proverbs1:13 tichawana zvose zvakakosha tigozadza dzimba dzedu nezvinhu zvokupamba," 
Proverbs1:14 isa mugove wako kwatiri tive nechikwama chimwechete.” 
Proverbs1:15 Mwanangu, rega kufamba munzira navo usarege tsoka yako ichienda munzira dzavo" 
Proverbs1:16 nokuti tsoka dzavo dzinomhanyira kuuipi uye vanokurumidza kudeura munhu ropa 
Proverbs1:17 nokuti hazvina zvazvinobatsira kuteya urimbo shiri dzichiona. 
Proverbs1:18 Vanhu ivava kutozvivandira ikoko kuti ivo vafe vanovandira kuparara kwoupenyu hwavo pachavo. 
Proverbs1:19 Iwoyu ndiwo mugumo wavose vanowana zvinhu nenzira isina kunaka zvinoparadza upenyu hwomuridzi wazvo. 
Proverbs1:20 Ungwaru hunodanidzira mumugwagwa hunoshevedzera pamisika. 
Proverbs1:21 Hunodaidzira zvikuru pamusoro petsvingo hunotaura mashoko ahwo huri kumusuo wedare reguta. 
Proverbs1:22 Nhaimi vasinganzwisisi muchasvika rinhi musinganzwisisi? Imi vashori kusvikira rinhiko muchifarira kunyomba uye muri mapenzi asingadi ruzivo? 
Proverbs1:23 Teererai zvandinokutsiurai ini ndichazvikwengura ipfungwa dzangu kwamuri ndikuzivisei mashoko angu 
Proverbs1:24 ndinodaro nokuti ndakadaidzira asi makaramba kudavira. Ndakatambanudza ruoko asi hapana akambotirimuka. 
Proverbs1:25 Hauna kumboita hanya nemazano angu makaramba kuti ndikutsiurei. 
Proverbs1:26 Kana neniwo ndichakusekai mupfumvu yenyu ndikusveveredzei kana mabatwa nokutya," 
Proverbs1:27 kana kutya kwakuvhungai sedutu pfumvu yakuwirai sechamupupuri kuora mwoyo nokurwadziwa kwamonerana nemi. 
Proverbs1:28 Vachandidaidza asi ini handipinduri vachanditsvagisisa asi havandiwani. 
Proverbs1:29 Nokuti vakavenga ruzivo uye havana kusarudza kutya Tenzi. 
Proverbs1:30 Havana kuita hanya nemazano angu vakashora kuvatsiura kwangu. 
Proverbs1:31 Ndizvozvo vachadya michero yemaitiro avo vagoguta netwavanonanga," 
Proverbs1:32 nokuti vasinganzwisisi vanouraiwa nokutsauka kwavo kushaya hanya kwamapenzi kunoauraya. 
Proverbs1:33 Asi anonditeerera anogarika achava pamutambaratede wokusambotya chinhu chakaipa. 
Proverbs2:1 Mwanangu, ukagamuchira mashoko angu uye ukapfimbika mauri mitemo yangu," 
Proverbs2:2 uchirerekera nzeve yako kuungwaru, uchitorwa mwoyo nenzwisiso" 
Proverbs2:3 nokungewo uchichemera kuzivisisa uchidaidza kunzwisisa 
Proverbs2:4 ukatsvaka ungwaru sesirivha uchihutsvaka upfumi hwakavandika. 
Proverbs2:5 Kutya Tenzi unobva wakunzwisisa uchibva wawana kuziva Mwari," 
Proverbs2:6 nokuti Tenzi ndiye anopa ungwaru mukanwa make ndimo munobva ruzivo nokunzwisisa 
Proverbs2:7 anochengetera vakarurama ungwaru chaihwo ndiye nhowo yokudzivirira vanofamba zvakarurama. 
Proverbs2:8 Anochengetedza maitiro okutonga kwakarurama achichengetedza nzira yavarurami vake. 
Proverbs2:9 Ndopaunozonzwisisa kuti ururami noruenzaniso nokuva pachokwadi chii uyewo maitiro ose akarurama 
Proverbs2:10 nokuti uchapindura mwoyo noungwaru uye ruzivo ruchave shamwari yako. 
Proverbs2:11 Kuziva kusarudza kuchakuchengetedza, kuziva chokusarudza kuchakutarira." 
Proverbs2:12 Kuchakununura kunzira yakaipa kuvanhu vanotaura zvakaora," 
Proverbs2:13 vanhu vanosiya nzira tsvene vachifamba munzira dzerima; 
Proverbs2:14 vanofarira kuita zvakaipa vanonakirwa nokushata kwouipi; 
Proverbs2:15 vanhu vane nzira dzakakombama vanokuita kwakamonyoroka. 
Proverbs2:16 Zvinokununura kumukadzi asiwako kumukadzi asingazivikanwi twaanotaura norurimi rwake twunotapira 
Proverbs2:17 mukadzi anosiya shamwari yake yepaudiki achikanganwa chitsidzirano chaMwari wake. 
Proverbs2:18 Anonyudza pasi kurufu imba yake nzira dzake dzinodzika kuvafi. 
Proverbs2:19 Wose anoenda kwaari haadzoki haazowanazve nzira youpenyu. 
Proverbs2:20 Saka famba nenzira yavanhu vakanaka uchengetedze nzira dzavakarurama 
Proverbs2:21 nokuti vakarurama ndivo vachagara panyika uye vanotendeseka vachararama mairi 
Proverbs2:22 vakaipa vachabviswa panyika vanoujarijari vachatipurwapo. 
Proverbs3:1 Mwanangu usakanganwe chidzidziso changu, mwoyo wako ngauchengete mitemo yangu" 
Proverbs3:2 nokuti zvichakupa mazuva mazhinji namakore oupenyu akawanda uye kugarika kukuru. 
Proverbs3:3 Usasiane nokuvimbika nokutendeseka zvisungirire muhuro, zvinyore pachiredhi chemwoyo wako." 
Proverbs3:4 Naizvozvo uchava nezita rakanaka uchifarirwa naMwari navanhu. 
Proverbs3:5 Vimba naTenzi nomwoyo wako wose usavimbe nokuona kwako zvinhu nemazvo. 
Proverbs3:6 Muzviito zvako zvose muzive, iye achatasanudza nzira dzako" 
Proverbs3:7 usazviite munhu anoziva itya Tenzi ufuratire uipi. 
Proverbs3:8 Zvichakurapa muviri wako zvigonyava mapfupa ako. 
Proverbs3:9 Remekedza Tenzi nezvaunazvo uye nembesanwa dzinotanga kuibva. 
Proverbs3:10 Matura ako anobva azadzwa nezvakawanda makuvi ako ewaini anozopfachukira. 
Proverbs3:11 Mwanangu usashore kudzidziswa kwaunoitwa naTenzi kana kuneta nokukutsiura kwaanoita 
Proverbs3:12 nokuti Tenzi anotsiura wavanoda sezvinoita baba mwana waanoda. 
Proverbs3:13 Akakomborerwa munhu anowana ungwaru, munhu anowana kunzwisisa," 
Proverbs3:14 nokuti zvinowanikwa mahuri zviri nani pano zvinowanikwa musirivha uye zvibereko zvahwo zvinokunda zvibereko zvendarama. 
Proverbs3:15 Ungwaru hwakakosha kukunda zvishongo, hapana chaungade chingaenzaniswe nahwo." 
Proverbs3:16 Murudyi rwahwo muno upenyu hurefu muruboshwe mahwo muno upfumi norukudzo. 
Proverbs3:17 Nzira dzahwo inzira dzinofadza uye maitiro ahwo ndoorugare. 
Proverbs3:18 Muti woupenyu kuna vanohuwana. Vanohubatisisa vanonzi vakakomborerwa zvavo. 
Proverbs3:19 Noungwaru Tenzi akadzika ugaro hwapasi akamisawo nokunzwisisa kwake denga. 
Proverbs3:20 Noruzivo rwake akaita pasi-pasi patubuke mvura uye kuti makore adonhedze dova. 
Proverbs3:21 Mwanangu chengeta ungwaru chaihwo uye kugona kusarudza ngazvirege kupunyuka maziso ako. 
Proverbs3:22 Zvichava hupenyu hwako uye chishongo chomutsipa wako. 
Proverbs3:23 Ipapo unozofamba nzira yako pasina chinokuwana tsoka yako haizogumburwi. 
Proverbs3:24 Kana wagara hauzotya uye paunorara uchavata hope dzakanaka. 
Proverbs3:25 Hauzotya chivhundumukira chezvinotyisa kana pfumvu yowira vaipi," 
Proverbs3:26 nokuti Tenzi ndiye waunovimba naye. Iye achachengeta tsoka yako kuti irege kubatwa nomusungo. 
Proverbs3:27 Usarege kuitira munhu anokodzera kuitirwa zvakanaka kana uchizvikwanisa. 
Proverbs3:28 Usati kuno mumwe wako enda zvako uzouyazve, mangwana ndozokupa asi iwe uinacho." 
Proverbs3:29 Usaronge kuitira mumwe wako zvakaipa anogara pamwechete newe achivimba newe. 
Proverbs3:30 Rega kumutsana nomunhu pasina chiripo, asina chaakutadzira." 
Proverbs3:31 Usaitire shanje munhu weganyavhu usasarudze kana imwe yenzira dzake 
Proverbs3:32 nokuti Tenzi anosema munhu ano mwoyo wakaipa asi munhu ari pachokwadi munhu wake wapamwoyo. 
Proverbs3:33 Tenzi anoita kuti imba yomunhu wakaipa iwirwe norushambwa asi dzimba dzavakarurama anodzikomborera. 
Proverbs3:34 Vanoshora anovashorawo asi vanozvidukupisa anovaitira mwoyochena. 
Proverbs3:35 Vangwaru vanowana mugove worukudzo asi mapenzi, chavo kuwanziridza kunyara." 
Proverbs4:1 Chinzwai vanangu chidzidziso chababa muteerere kuti muone zvinhu nemazvo 
Proverbs4:2 nokuti ndichakupai mirao yakanaka, musakande pasi zvandinokudzidzisai." 
Proverbs4:3 Zvandaiva mukomana ndiina baba vangu, ndichiri mudiki, ndichingove ndini mwana mumwechete waamai vangu" 
Proverbs4:4 vakandidzidzisa vachiti, “Chengeta nomwoyo wose zvandinokutaurira chengeta mitemo yangu kuti urarame." 
Proverbs4:5 Iva noungwaru uone zvinhu nemazvo usakanganwe, usatsauke pamashoko omuromo wangu." 
Proverbs4:6 Usasiane noungwaru, ihwo huchakuchengeta hude, ihwo huchakuchengetedza." 
Proverbs4:7 Chinhu chokutanga paungwaru, wana ungwaru. Pana zvose zvaungawane wana kunzwisisa.”" 
Proverbs4:8 Huremekedze zvikuru ihwo huchakusimudzira kana ukahumbundira. 
Proverbs4:9 Hunokudzika tsungare yamaruva mumusoro hugokugadza ndaza yakanaka. 
Proverbs4:10 Teerera mwanangu, utambire zvandinokutaurira kuti makore oupenyu hwako awande." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndakakudzidzisa nzira dzoungwaru ndikakutungamirira mumakwara ukava pachokwadi. 
Proverbs4:12 Kana wofamba, nhanho dzako hadzizovhiringidzwi, kana womhanya haugumburwi." 
Proverbs4:13 Batisisa zvaunodzidziswa, usazvikande pasi, ramba wakazvichengeta nokuti ndihwo upenyu hwako." 
Proverbs4:14 Usafambe namakwara avaipi kana kutevera nzira dzavakaipa. 
Proverbs4:15 Siana nayo, usadimure nekwairi. Tsaukana nayo uinyenyeredze." 
Proverbs4:16 Ndinodaro nokuti havakwanisi kuvata kana vasina kuita zvakaipa, havawane hope, kusvikira vatovhiringidza mumwe munhu," 
Proverbs4:17 nokuti uipi ndicho chokudya chavo uye utsinye ndiyo waini yavanonwa. 
Proverbs4:18 Gwara ravarurami rakaita samambakwedza anoramba achingochena kusvikira ava masikati makuru. 
Proverbs4:19 Asi nzira yavakaipa yakaita sezarima havambozivi chinogumbura. 
Proverbs4:20 Mwanangu teerera mashoko angu rerekera nzeve yako kune zvandinoreva. 
Proverbs4:21 Ngazvirege kupunyuka ziso rako zvichengete mumwoyo mako 
Proverbs4:22 nokuti upenyu kuna anozviwana uye zvinorapa nyama yake yose. 
Proverbs4:23 Nyatsochengetedza mwoyo wako nomwoyo wose nokuti mauri ndimo mune zvisipiti zvoupenyu. 
Proverbs4:24 Bvisa mauri muromo wenhema uye pamuromo pako kutaura zvisizvo. 
Proverbs4:25 Kutarisa kwako ngakuti twasa, yeva zviri pamberi pako." 
Proverbs4:26 Tanga wafunga nzira yauchafamba nayo. Nzira dzako dzigove muchechetere 
Proverbs4:27 usatsaukire kurudyi kana kuruboshe tsoka yako ngairege kuenda kunezvakaipa. 
Proverbs5:1 Mwanangu teerera ungwaru hwangu rerekera nzeve yako kumazwi angu okunzwisisa 
Proverbs5:2 kuti uchengetedze kuziva kusarudza uye miromo yako ichengete ruzivo. 
Proverbs5:3 Miromo yomukadzi asiwako inodonha uchi zvaanotaura zvinotsvedzerera kupinda mafuta 
Proverbs5:4 asi pokupedzisira anokarakata segavakava akapinza sebakatwa rinocheka kose. 
Proverbs5:5 Tsoka dzake dzinoenda kurufu nhanho dzake kuvafi ndiko kwadzo. 
Proverbs5:6 Haambofungi nezvenzira inoeda kuupenyu, nzira dzake dzinopota-pota asi haazvizivi." 
Proverbs5:7 Zvino vanangu ndinzwei musasiane namazwi omuromo wangu 
Proverbs5:8 tambira kure naye usambosvika zvako pedyo nomusuo wemba yake. 
Proverbs5:9 Ungadaro ukapa rukudzo rwako kunavamwe uye makore ako kuna vasina tsitsi 
Proverbs5:10 vamwewo vanhu vangadaro vakutorera upfumi hwako zvawakashandira zvikaenda kumutorwa. 
Proverbs5:11 Pakupedzisisa poupenyu hwako unozowuwura nyama yako nomuviri zvadyiwa zvino wavakuti," 
Proverbs5:12 “Chandakarambirawo zvangu kudzorwa chiiko, mwoyo wangu uchishora kutsiurwa." 
Proverbs5:13 Ndairamba kuteerera zvaitaurwa navarairidzi vangu kana kurerekera nzeve yangu kuvadzidzisi vangu. 
Proverbs5:14 Ndakanga ndasvika pokutoparara zvachose mukati megungano rakaungana.” 
Proverbs5:15 Inwa mvura inobva mumugodhi wako mvura inoerera inobva mutsime rako. 
Proverbs5:16 Zvisipiti zvako zvongoyerera nenyika here mihoronga yemvura yako iyerere mumigwagwa zvayo here? 
Proverbs5:17 Ngaive yako yoga kwete yevatorwa vaunavo. 
Proverbs5:18 Rega kasipiti kako kakomborerwe ufadzwe nomukadzi wapahudiki hwako 
Proverbs5:19 sesheshe yemhembwe kunaka, senhunzvi yengururu yakanakisa kukuda kwake ngakukuzadze nokufara ugutsikane nguva dzose norudo rwake." 
Proverbs5:20 Sei uchibatwa mwoyo mwanangu, nomukadzi asiwako uchimbundira chipfuva chepfambi?" 
Proverbs5:21 Chiripo ndechokuti Tenzi anoona zviito zvomunhu anotarisa nzira dzake dzose. 
Proverbs5:22 Munhu anoteewa nouipi hwake anobatwa mubasa rake iroro rechitadzo. 
Proverbs5:23 Anofa pamusana pekutadza kuzvibata uye anorasika pamusana poupenzi hwake hukuru. 
Proverbs6:1 Mwanangu ukati ndiwe wokumiririra chikwereti chomumwe uchitsidza panzvimbo pomumwe," 
Proverbs6:2 kana wateewa mukutaura kwomuromo wako wabatwa mumazwi omuromo wako 
Proverbs6:3 zvaunofanira kuita ndezvizvi, mwanangu, kuitira kuti uzvinunure nokuti unenge watowira mumaoko omumwe wako. Enda uzvirereke utadzise mumwe wako iyeyo kudya rinopisa." 
Proverbs6:4 Usambobvuma zvako kuti meso ako abatwe nehope kana kutsomwaira nehope. 
Proverbs6:5 Zvinunure semhara kumuvhimi kana seshiri mumaoko omutei weshiri. 
Proverbs6:6 Iwe tsimbe, enda kumujuru uongorore maitiro awo udzidze ungwaru." 
Proverbs6:7 Mujuru hauna mambo, hauna muchinda kana mutongi" 
Proverbs6:8 asi unogadzirira sadza rawo muzhizha unounganidza chokudya chawo pakukohwa. 
Proverbs6:9 Uchasvika riniko wakarara nhaiwe tsimbe uchamuka riniko muhope dzako? 
Proverbs6:10 Izvo zvokuti, “Regai ndimboti kotsire kashoma.” “Regai ndimboti tsomwaire kashoma. Ndimboti maoko gumbate kuzorora.”" 
Proverbs6:11 Urombo hunobva hwati pauri tutururu serombe uye kushaiwa kunouya kwauri somunhu akapakata zvombo zvokurwa. 
Proverbs6:12 Nhubu munhu akaipa anongofamba achikanganisa mashoko. 
Proverbs6:13 Anochonya maziso anotondeka netsoka dzake achinongedzera nongedzera neminwe yake. 
Proverbs6:14 Anoronga twaanoronga nomwoyo wakashata achiramba achingokonzera manyongori. 
Proverbs6:15 Nhamo inoyerekana yamuwira, nenguva isipi anotyorwa-tyorwa zvisina karapiro." 
Proverbs6:16 Pane zvinhu zvitanhatu zvisingadiwi naTenzi zvinotosvika zvinomwe zvinosemesa kwaari, zvinoti:" 
Proverbs6:17 Kuzvikudza, nokunyepa maoko anodeura ropa risina mhosva" 
Proverbs6:18 nomwoyo unoronga zvirongwa zvakaipa netsoka dzinomhanyirira kune zvakaipa 
Proverbs6:19 chapupu chenhema chinotaura manyepo munhu anomutsa gakava pakati pehama. 
Proverbs6:20 Mwanangu chengeta mitemo yababa vako, usakande pasi mirao yaamai vako" 
Proverbs6:21 isungirire mumwoyo mako isungirire muhuro mako nguva dzose. 
Proverbs6:22 Kana wofamba inokutungamirira, kana worara inokuchengetedza. Kana wakasvinura inokurukura newe." 
Proverbs6:23 Chandinodariro ndechokuti mutemo mwenje, murao chiedza kutsiurwa nokudzidziswa ndiwo mafambiro ohupenyu" 
Proverbs6:24 kuitira kuti zvikudzivirire kumukadzi wakaipa kururimi rwunotapira rwomukadzi pfambi. 
Proverbs6:25 Usatorwe mwoyo norunako rwake usabatwe kumeso netsiye dzake. 
Proverbs6:26 Nokuti pfambi inogona kutengwa nemari yechingwa asi mukadzi womumwe anonanga zvokutora upenyu hwakakosha hwomunhu. 
Proverbs6:27 Munhu angatakure moto pachipfuva, hanzu dzake dzikarega kutsva here?" 
Proverbs6:28 Kana kuti munhu angafambe pamavhunze anopisa, tsoka dzake dzikarega kutsva here?" 
Proverbs6:29 Ndizvo zvakaita munhu anoenda kumukadzi womumwe hakuna anomubata bata akarega kurangwa. 
Proverbs6:30 Handiti vanhu vanoshora mbavha here inenge yaba kuti irape nzara yayo? 
Proverbs6:31 Asi ikabatwa inoripiswa kakapetwa kanomwe inobvisa upfumi hwose hwomumusha mayo. 
Proverbs6:32 Munhu anoita upombwe haana njere, anoita zvakadai kuzviuraya" 
Proverbs6:33 chaanowana ipapa maronda nokushorwa uye kuzvidzwa kwako hakufe kwakabva 
Proverbs6:34 nokuti shanje inoitisa munhu hasha, kana wotsividza anotsividza zvisina tsitsi" 
Proverbs6:35 zvokuti pakaripwa haambozviona kana kugadzana mwoyo nokumupa kwako zvipo zvakawanda. 
Proverbs7:1 Mwanangu, chengetedza mashoko angu upfimbike mitemo yangu mauri." 
Proverbs7:2 Chengeta mitemo yangu urarame chengeta mirao yangu semboni yeziso rako. 
Proverbs7:3 Isungirire paminwe yako. Inyore pakafendefa kemwoyo wako," 
Proverbs7:4 iti kuungwaru, “Uri hanzvadzi yangu.” Kunzwisisa ukuti, “Ndiwe shamwari yangu yapamwoyo.”" 
Proverbs7:5 Zvinokudzivirira kumukadzi asiwako, mukadzi pfambi worurimi rwunotapira." 
Proverbs7:6 Nokuti ndiri pahwindho remba yangu ndakatarisa napasefa yangu. 
Proverbs7:7 Ndakaona pakati pevoruzhinji ndikaongorora pane vechidiki jaya risina njere," 
Proverbs7:8 richipfuura nepedyo nomukadzi uya richienda nenzira inoenda kumba kwake 
Proverbs7:9 nguva yoruvhunzavaeni kumanheru panguva yousiku, yerima." 
Proverbs7:10 Ndopandakaona mukadzi osangana naye akapfeka sepfambi aine zvaainanga 
Proverbs7:11 achipupira kwazvo kutaura asingagari pamba. 
Proverbs7:12 Akamboti mumugwagwa, hoyo kumusika anogaririra pakona dzose dzose." 
Proverbs7:13 Akamubata akamutsvoda akati kwaari, zvisina nenyadzi dzose," 
Proverbs7:14 “Ndanga ndiine chibayiro chokuti ndipire ndazadzisa nhasi mhiko dzangu. 
Proverbs7:15 Ndokusaka ndauya, kuzokuchingura ndichikutsvagisisa zvino ndakuwana." 
Proverbs7:16 Ndawaridza mubhedha wangu zvakanaka namachira emavara-mavara okuIjipiti erineni. 
Proverbs7:17 Ndapfapfadzira mubhedha nemura, nearoi nechinamoni." 
Proverbs7:18 Uya tigutsane nezvorudo kusvikira kwaedza ngatifadzane nerudo 
Proverbs7:19 nokuti murume wangu haapo, akafamba rwendo rurefu." 
Proverbs7:20 Akatakura katsapo kemari anozodzoka mwedzi wave jenaguru.” 
Proverbs7:21 Akamugombedzera namashoko mazhinji okunyengetedza, namazwi ake akanyorovera akamumanikidza." 
Proverbs7:22 Iyewo akabva amutevera pakarepo senzombe iri kuenda kundouraiwa, sebenzi riri kutungamidzwa kuchitokisi" 
Proverbs7:23 kusvikira abaiwa mudumbu, seshiri inomhanyira muriva, asingazivi kuti kuparara kwoupenyu hwake." 
Proverbs7:24 Zvino imi vanakomana ndinzwei muteerere mashoko omuromo wangu. 
Proverbs7:25 Mwoyo wako ngaurege kupindukira kunzira dzake usagare munzira dzake 
Proverbs7:26 nokuti vaakakuvadza akarigira pasi vakawanda. 
Proverbs7:27 Imba yake inzira yokuenda kunzvimbo yavafi, inodzika kudzimba dzorufu." 
Proverbs8:1 Inga ungwaru hunodanidzira wani, runzwisiso rwunoshevedzera wani" 
Proverbs8:2 huri pachiturunhuru chiri pedyo nenzira, hunomira pamharadzano dzenzira" 
Proverbs8:3 Uye parutivi pesuo guru mberi kweguta, kokupinda nako, hunodaidzira pamusuo." 
Proverbs8:4 “Ndinodaidzira kwamuri, imi vanhu, wandinoshevedzera ndimi vanhu." 
Proverbs8:5 Imi voruzhinji dzidzai uchenjeri, imi mapenzi ivai nemwoyo unonzwisisa." 
Proverbs8:6 Teererai nokuti ndichataura zvinhu zvakakosha, mumuromo mangu muchabva zvakarurama." 
Proverbs8:7 Muromo wangu uchataura chokwadi uipi chinhu chinosemesa kumuromo wangu. 
Proverbs8:8 Mazwi angu ose akarurama, maari hamuna chakakombama kana chakaminama." 
Proverbs8:9 Ose akati twasa kuna anonzwisisa uye akarurama kune vanowana ruzivo. 
Proverbs8:10 Torai chidzidziso changu pano kutora sirivha uye ruzivo pane kutora ndarama yakanakisisa 
Proverbs8:11 nokuti ungwaru huri nani pane zvishongo, chose chaungade hapana chingaenzane nahwo." 
Proverbs8:12 “Ini ungwaru ndinogara nouchenjeri, ndine ruzivo uye ndinoziva kusarudza."

Proverbs8:20 Ndinofamba nenzira yoururami namakwara oruenzaniso. 
Proverbs8:21 Ndinopfumisa vanondida ndichivazadzira matura avo. 
Proverbs8:22 “Tenzi aiva neni pakutanga kwamaitiro ake chaiwo, ndini ndaiva chokutanga chezviito zvake zvakare."

Proverbs14:3 Kutaura kwebenzi ndiyo shamhu inorirova musana asi zvinotaura vangwaru ndizvo zvinovachengetedza. 
Proverbs14:4 Pasina mombe hapanawo mbeswa asi nesimba remombe mbeswa dzinowanda.

Proverbs14:7 Siana nebenzi nokuti hapana mashoko oungwaru aunowana pariri.
