Proverbs14:12 Pane dzimwe nzira dzaunofunga kuti inzira kwadzo asi mugumo wadzo rufu. 
Proverbs14:13 Munhu anogona kuseka zvake asi mumwoyo make muino kusuwa panopera kufara-fara kuya, yauya nhamo." 
Proverbs14:14 Munhu wakaipa achazadzwa nomubayiro wezvaanoita wakanakawo nemichero yezviito zvake. 
Proverbs14:15 Munhu asina pfungwa dzakadzama anongobvumira zvose zvose asi munhu wakangwara anotarisa paanotsika. 
Proverbs14:16 Mungwaru anochenjerera zvinhu uye anonzvenga zvakaipa asi benzi rinozviita suku nasai, harikendenge." 
Proverbs14:17 Munhu anokurumidza kushatirwa zvaanoita ndezvoupenzi asi munhu anoona zvinhu nemazvo anoita mwoyo murefu. 
Proverbs14:18 Vanhu vasina pfungwa dzakadzama chavo upenzi, vakangwara chavo indaza yoruzivo." 
Proverbs14:19 Vaipi vanogwadamira vakanaka, ndizvo zvinoita vakaipa pamisuo mikuru yavarurami." 
Proverbs14:20 Varombo havadiwi kunyange nomuvakidzani navo asi mupfumi ane shamwari zhinji. 
Proverbs14:21 Munhu anoshora mumwe wake mutadzi, akakomborerwa zvake munhu anoitira varombo tsiye nyoro." 
Proverbs14:22 Ko havakanganise here vanhu vanoronga kuita zvakaipa? Vanoronga kuita zvakanaka vanowana mwoyochena nokutendeseka. 
Proverbs14:23 Basa rose rose rine chimuko, asi kungotaura bedzi kunosvitsa pakushaiwa." 
Proverbs14:24 Upfumi indaza yavachenjeri, asi upenzi indaza yamapenzi." 
Proverbs14:25 Chapupu chechokwadi chinoponesa upenyu, asi munhu anoreva nhema mutengesi." 
Proverbs14:26 Mukutya Tenzi mune chivimbo chakasimba, kana vana vakewo vanowana kwokupotera." 
Proverbs14:27 Kutya Tenzi chisipiti choupenyu, kuitira kuti munhu anzvenge misungo yorufu." 
Proverbs14:28 Kuwanda kwavanhu ndiyo mbiri yamambo ishe akashaya vanhu anoparara. 
Proverbs14:29 Munhu asingakurumidzi kushatirwa munhu anonzwisisa, asi anokurumidza kushatirwa, anoita kuti upenzi huwande." 
Proverbs14:30 Pfungwa dzikagadzikana, muviri unoita utano shungu dzomwoyo dzinoodza mapfupa." 
Proverbs14:31 Anodzvinyirira murombo zvisina kunaka anoshora musiki wake, asi anoita tsiye nyoro kwaari anoremekedza musiki wake."

Proverbs21:6 Kuwana upfumi namanyepo ibute rinongopfuura uye iriva rorufu.

Proverbs27:4 Hasha dzina utsinye, kugumbuka kunowodzvoka asi ndiani angamirisane neshanje." 
Proverbs27:5 Kutsiurwa pachena kuri nani pano kudiwa zvakavanda. 
Proverbs27:6 Mavanga eshamwari maronda kwawo asi muvengi anotsvoda kakawanda. 
Proverbs27:7 Munhu akaguta haadi kana uchi asi kune ane nzara kana zvinovava zvinotapira.

Proverbs27:10 Usarasane neshamwari yako kana shamwari yababa vako. Pazuva redambudziko rako usaende kumba yomukoma kana munun'una wako. Muvakidzani newe ari padyo ari nani pane mukoma kana munun'una ari kure. 
Proverbs27:11 Iva munhu akangwara, mwanangu uite kuti mwoyo wangu ufare kuitira kuti ndiwane mhinduro kune anonditsoropodza." 
Proverbs27:12 Munhu akachenjera akaona njodzi anovanda asi dununu romunhu rinongoenda rozotambura nazvo. 
Proverbs27:13 Munhu anomiririra chikwereti chomunhu waasingazivi ngaatorerwe hanzu yake ive chitsidzo chokumiririra kwake chikwereti chomunhu waasingazivi. 
Proverbs27:14 Munhu anokwazisa muvakidzani naye achiita zvokutomukira mangwanani-ngwanani achizhamba akafanana nomunhu anorengerera mumwe rushambwa. 
Proverbs27:15 Imba inoramba ichidonha pazuva remvura nomukadzi ane pamuromo zvakafanaka. 
Proverbs27:16 Kuedza kumuvigiridza kwakafanana nokuvigiridza mhepo kana munhurume kupfumbata mafuta. 
Proverbs27:17 Simbi inorodza imwe simbi vanhu vanofanira kuvandudzana. 
Proverbs27:18 Munhu anokudza muonde anozodya muchero wawo uye munhu anochengetedza tenzi wake anozoremekedzwa. 
Proverbs27:19 Sezvinoita mumvura uso hunoona uso imomo mumwoyo munhu anozviona kuti munhui. 
Proverbs27:20 Nzvimbo yavafi nenzvimbo yokuparadza hazviguti mazisowo avanhu haaguti. 
Proverbs27:21 Bisiro ndere sirivha virira ndere ndarama, mbiri yomunhu inoonesa zvaari." 
Proverbs27:22 Unogona zvako kutswa benzi muduri pamwechete nembeswa asi upenzi hwaro haubve pariri. 
Proverbs27:23 Nyatsoziva mamiriro ezvipfuwo zvako unyatsochengetedza mombe dzako 
Proverbs27:24 nokuti upfumi haugari narini narini ndaza inogara nokusingaperi here? 
Proverbs27:25 Kana uswa hwapera ruswiswi rwukabuda zvinofura mombe mumakomo zvaunganidzwa 
Proverbs27:26 hwayana dzinokuwanisa zvokupfeka, mari yembudzi inokutengera munda" 
Proverbs27:27 uchawana mukaka wembudzi wokudya wakakwana nokudya kwemhuri yako, uye kwokuriritirawo vashandi vako vechikadzi." 
Proverbs28:1 Akaipa anotiza pasina anomudzingirira asi vakarurama vane chivindi kunge shumba. 
Proverbs28:2 Munyika mukapandukwa vatongi vanowanda asi kana muine munhu anonzwisisa ane ruzivo inoenderera mberi yakatsiga. 
Proverbs28:3 Murombo anodzvinyirira vamwe varombo zvakaipa imvura inopurana zvayo isina chokudya chainosiya. 
Proverbs28:4 Vanoramba mutemo vanorumbidza vaipi asi vanochengeta mutemo vari kutorwisana navo. 
Proverbs28:5 Vaipi havanzwisisi ruenzaniso asi vanotsvaka Tenzi vanonyatsorunzwisisa. 
Proverbs28:6 Zviri nani kuva murombo ari pachokwadi pane mupfumi ane tsika dzakanzvongama. 
Proverbs28:7 Mwana anochengeta mutemo ano ungwaru, anoshamwaridzana nemharadzi dzevana anonyadzisa baba vake." 
Proverbs28:8 Munhu anowanziridza upfumi hwake nechimbadzo kana kungowedzerawo anounganidzira munhu ane tsiye nyoro kuvarombo.

Proverbs28:11 Mupfumi anozviona semungwaru asi murombo anonzwisisa anomubata zvaari. 
Proverbs28:12 Kana vakarurama vakakunda, kunopemberwa vakaipa vakawana chinzvimbo chapamusoro vanhu vanozvivanza." 
Proverbs28:13 Munhu anoviga unyangadzi hwake haabudiriri, asi anoreurura achisiyana nazvo anonzwirwa tsitsi." 
Proverbs28:14 Akakomborerwa zvake munhu ane kakuzeza nguva dzose asi munhu anoomesa mwoyo achapinda nhamo. 
Proverbs28:15 Mutongi wakaipa akaita seshumba inodzvova kana sebere rinorwisa varombo. 
Proverbs28:16 Mutongi asinganzwisisi munhu anobata vanhu noutsinye. Asi munhu anovenga kuwana zvinhu nenzira isiriyo anowana upenyu hurefu. 
Proverbs28:17 Munhu anoremerwa nemhosva yokuuraya munhu iguva raakazviparira, regai akadaro." 
Proverbs28:18 Munhu anoita zviri pachokwadi, achanunurwa asi ano upenyu hwoujarijari achatopaputsika." 
Proverbs28:19 Munhu anorima munda wake, anowana chokudya chakawanda asi munhu anotandana nezvisina maturo urombo huchamuwandira." 
Proverbs28:20 Munhu akavimbika, anowana makomborero akawanda asi munhu anoda kukurumidza kupfuma haazoregi kurangwa." 
Proverbs28:21 Rusarura rwakaipa, pamusana pechidimbu chechingwa munhu anotogona kuva wakaipa." 
Proverbs28:22 Munhu anonyima anomhanyirira upfumi asi haazivi kuti achashaiwa 
Proverbs28:23 Munhu anotsiura mumwe ndiye anotozoremekedzwa kupinda muzvambarara wokunyengedza norurimi rwake. 
Proverbs28:24 Anobira baba kana amai vake achiti hakusi kukanganisa ishamwari yemharadzi. 
Proverbs28:25 Munhu anemakaro anomutsa muchokoto asi anovimba naTenzi anopfumiswa.

Proverbs28:28 Vaipi vakawana chinzvimbo chapamusoro vanhu vanozvivanza, kana vakaparara vakarurama vanobudirira." 
Proverbs29:1 Munhu anotsiurwa kakawanda asinganzwi, achayerekana atyoka zvisingarapiki."

Proverbs29:13 Chavanofanana vapfumi navarombo chimwechete chokuti Tenzi ndiye anovhenekera meso vose vari vaviri. 
Proverbs29:14 Kana mambo akatonga varombo zvakarurama chigaro chake choumambo chinobva chadzika midzi. 
Proverbs29:15 Shamhu nokutsiura zvinopa ungwaru asi mwana akaregererwa anonyadzisa amai vake. 
Proverbs29:16 Kana vakaipa vari ivo vari kutonga kutadza kunowanda, asi vakarurama vachavaona vachiputsika." 
Proverbs29:17 Dzidzisa mwana wako, iye achakupa zororo achakufadza mwoyo."

Proverbs29:19 Muranda haadzoreki namazwi chete kunyange akanzwisisa haamboita hanya nazvo.

Proverbs29:22 Munhu wehasha anomutsa manyongori nyahasha anokonzera kutadza kwakawanda.

Ecclesiastes1:1 Mashoko omuparidzi, mwanakomana waDhavhidhi, mambo womuJerusaremu." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Hazvinzwisisiki hazvinzwisisiki, ndozviri kutaura muparidzi, hazvinzwisisiki, zvinhu hazvinyatsonzwisisika." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nhai imi munhu anofireiko nebasa chaizvo, nokufondoka kwose kwaanoita pasi pezuva?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Chimwe chizvarwa chinoenda chimwewo chizvarwa chichiuya asi nyika inoramba iripo chete. 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Zuvawo rinobuda, zuva rinodoka romhanyazve iwee kunzvimbo kwaro kwarinobuda!" 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Mhepo inoenda kumaodzanyemba yopishinukazve yoenda kuchamhembe, ichingotendererawo, ichingotenderera. Mhepo inoramba ichingoenda nemayamboenda namo imomo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Nzizi dzose dzinoyerera kugungwa asi gungwa harizari. Nzizi kwadzinoyerera dzinoyererazve ikoko. 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Zvinhu zvose zvinofinha, hapana angagone kuzvitaura. Ziso hariguti kuona kana nzevewo haiguti kunzwa." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Zvakamboitika zvichaitikazve. Zvakamboitwa zvichaitwazve. Hapana chitsva pasi pezuva. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Panechinhu here chinganzi ona chinhu icho chitsva. Chaivapo kare panguva yakare. 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Hakuna chete anoyeuka zvinhu zvakare. Hakunawo achazoyeuka panevachauya mushure macho. Uye kuyeuka pachange pasina pakati pane vachauya mushure machowo. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Ini Muparidzi ndakatonga Isiraeri ndiri muJerusaremu. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndakazvipira kunyatsotsvaga nokuongorora noungwaru zvose zvinoitika pasi pedenga. Aiwaiwa! Mutoro wacho wakapiwa vanhu naMwari kuti vatakure haufadzi. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndakatarisa mabasa ose anoitwa pasi pezuva ndikaona zvangu kuti zvose hazvinzwisisiki uye kuti kunongova kudzingirirana nemhepo zvako. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Chakakombama hachitasanudziki chisipo hachigone kuverengwa. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndakambozvifunga zvangu mumwoyo ndichiti, “Ini ndakawana ungwaru hunokunda vamwe vose vakanditangira kuva vatongi veJerusaremu. Zvakanyatsondipindawo mumwoyo kuti chinonzi ungwaru chii uye kuti chinonzi ruzivo chii.”" 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndakazvipira kwazvo kuti ndizive kuti chinonzi ungwaru chii uyewo kuti chinonzi upenzi chii. Ndakaonawo ikoku kuri kungodzingirirana zvako nemhepo. 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Chandinodariro ndechokuti ungwaru hukawanda nhamowo dzinobva dzaita murwi kuwanda. Anozviwanzira ruzivo anozviwanzirawo matambudziko. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndakafunga mumwoyo kuti regai ndimboonawo kuti kuzvifadza kwakaitawosei ndinyatsombosasana zvangu. Ndakaonawo izvozviwo zviri zvisinganzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndakati kuseka kupenga chaiko uye kuzvifadza hakuna chimuko. 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndakati regai ndimbotsvaka zvokuzvifadza muviri wangu newaini asi mumwoyo mangu ndichitungamirirwa noungwaru kuti ndinyatsonzwisisa kuti chii chinonzi upenzi kuitira kuti ndione kuti ndezvipi zvakanakira vanhu kuti vaite pasi pedenga mazuva mashoma oupenyu hwavo. 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndakaita mabasa makuru. Ndakazvivakira dzimba, ndikazvirimira minda yemigirepisi." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Ndakazviitira bindu nenhandare dzokutandarira ndikadyaramo miti inobereka michero yose zvayo. 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ndakachera matsime okuti ndiwane mvura yokudiridza nayo munda wemiti yainge ichikura. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ndakatenga varanda vechirume nevechikadzi uye ndaive navaranda vakaberekerwa mumusha mangu. Ndaivawo nematanga emombe nezvipfuwo zvakawanda kupinda ani zvake akagara muJerusaremu ndisati ndavapo. 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ndakazviunganidzirawo sirivha nendarama noupfumi hwamadzimambo namatunhu. Ndakawana vaimbi vechirume nevechikadzi navarongo vakawanda, zvinhu zvinofarirwa navarume." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Saizvozvo ndakava mukurumukuru zvokutokunda vaiva muJerusaremu ndisati ndavapo uye ndakangoramba ndiino ungwaru hwangu. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Chainge chadiwa nemeso angu handina kuzvirambidza. Chaidawo mwoyo wangu chokuzvifadza handaizvirambidza. Ndainzwa mwoyo kufara nebasa rangu rose. Ndiwo waivawo mubayiro wangu webasa rangu rose. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ndazoti rangarirei basa rose ramaoko angu nokushingaira kwandakaita pariri, ndakaona zvose zvisinganzwisisiki uye kuri kudzingirirana nemhepo uye kuti hapana chaunowana munhu pasi pedenga." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndakatendeuka kuti nditarise nyaya yezvoungwaru, noupenzi noutununu nokuti munhu anotsiva mambo chiiwo chaangaite kusiya zvanga zvichiitwa namambo?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ndakazoona kuti ungwaru hunopfuura upenzi sokupfuura kunoita chiedza rima. 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mungwaru anogara akazarura maziso ake asi benzi rinofamba murima asiwo chandinoziva ndechokuti firo yavo vose imwechete. 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ndakazviti nechomumwoyo, “Chinowira benzi chinondiwanawo zvino chandakafiririrawo zvangu kuva mungwaru chii ipapa.” Ndakazvifunga mumwoyo ndikati, “Kunyange izvozvi hazvinzwisisiki.”" 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Nokuti zvakangoita mungwaru ndizvozvowo zvine benzi zvokurangarirwa nokusingaperi hapana. Samaziviro atinoita, mumazuva ari kuuya, vanenge vatokanganwika kare. Pfiro yomungwaru ndiyo ndiyo yebenzi!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Naizvozvo ndakavenga upenyu nokuti zvinoitwa pasi pedenga zvakandiipira. Chiripo ndechokuti zvose hazvinzwisisiki uye kunongova kudzingirira mhepo. 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ndakavenga basa rangu rose randaishingairira kuita pasi pedenga sezvandinoona kuti ndinofanira kurisiira michero yaro anonditevedzera. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ndiani angazive kuti anenge ari mungwaru here kana kuti benzi? Asi iye achave muridzi wezvinhu zvose zvandakashanda ndichishandisa ungwaru hwangu pasi pedenga. Izvozviwo hazvinzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Naizvozvo ndakapinduka ndorasa mwoyo pabasa rangu randakaita pasi pedenga 
Ecclesiastes2:21 nokuti dzimwe nguva munhu anenge ashanda noungwaru noruzivo uye noumhizha anofanira kusiya zvose zvokuzofadza zvazvo munhu asina kuzvishandira. Izvozvi hazvinzwisisiki uye zvakaipa kwazvo. 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Iye munhu anowanei nokushingaira nokutambura kwaanoita pasi pedenga? 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Chandinodariro ndechokuti mazuva ose omunhu anongova matambudziko chete nenhamo. Kunyange usiku pfungwa dzake hadzizorori. Izvozviwo hazvinzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Hapana chakanaka kumunhu pane kudya zvake nokunwa nokuzvifadza nezvaanenge ashandira. Izvi ndakazvionawo kuti chipo chinobva muruoko rwaMwari; 
Ecclesiastes2:25 nokuti pasina iye ndiani angadye ndiani angapafare? 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nokuti munhu, anofadza Mwari anomupa ungwaru neruzivo nerufaro. Asi mutadzi anomupa basa rokunhongerera achiunganidza zvinhu zvokuzopiwa zvazvo kumunhu anofadza Mwari. Izvozviwo zvinopazamisa musoro uye kunongova kudzingirira mhepo." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Chinhu chimwe nechimwe chine nguva yacho uye basa rimwe nerimwe rine nguva yaro pasi pedenga. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Pane nguva yokuberekwa nenguvawo yokufa. Pane nguva yokusima nenguvawo yokudzipura zvakasimwa. 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Pane nguva yokuuraya nenguvawo yokuporesa. Pane nguva yokupaza nenguvawo yokuvaka. 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Pane nguva yokuchema nenguvawo yokuseka. Pane nguva yokuungudza nenguvawo yokupembera. 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Pane nguva yokukanda mambwe uko nokoko nenguvawo yokuunganidza mabwe. Pane nguva yokumbundirana nenguvawo yokusambundirana. 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Pane nguva yokutsvaka nenguvawo yokurasa. Pane nguva yokuchengeta nenguvawo yokurasa. 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Pane nguva yokubvarura nenguvawo yokusona. Pane nguva yokunyarara nenguvawo yokutaura. 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Pane nguva yokuda nenguvawo yokuvenga. Pane nguva yehondo nenguvawo yorugare. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Ko iye munhu anoshanda anowanei chaizvo nokushingaira kwake kwaanoita nebasa? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndakaona zvangu basa rakapiwa vanhu naMwari kuti vawane chokuita. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Akaita kuti zvinhu zvose zvive nenguva yazvo yakafanirana nazvo, uye akaisa muvanhu pfungwa yenguva isina mugumo. Asi munhu asingakwanise kunzwisisa zvakaitwa naMwari kubvira pakutanga kusvika pamugumo." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Chandinoziva ndechokuti hapana chakanaka kuvanhu sokufara zvavo nokufarikana mazuva oupenyu hwavo hwose. 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Chimwewo ndechokuti chipo chaMwari kumunhu kuti munhu wose adye zvake, anwe uye kuti afadzwe nebasa rake rose raanoita." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Ndinoziva kuti zvose zvinoitwa naMwari zvicharamba zviripo nokusingaperi, hapana chingawedzerwe pazviri kana chingabviswe pazviri. Mwari akaita izvozvo kuitira kuti vanhu vamutye." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Chiripo, chakanga chiripo kare, chichazovapo, chakanga chiripo kare Mwari achiitawo kuti zvakamboitika zviitikezve." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Ndakaonawo pasi pedenga kuti panofanira kuva noruenzaniso ipapo ndipo pano uipi panofanira kuva noururami ipapo ndipo pano uipi. 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndakazviti nechomumwoyo, “Mwari achatonga vakarurama navakaipa nokuti akatemera chinhu chimwe nechimwe nguva yacho uye nguva yebasa roga roga.”" 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndakazvifungawo mumwoyo nezvavanhu kuti Mwari anenge achivaedza zvake kuti avaratidze kuti ivo pachavo imhuka. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Zvinowira vanhu ndizvowo zvinowira mhuka, munhu anofa, mhukawo inofa. Zvinofema mweya mumwechete. Munhu haana chaanokunda mhuka nacho nokuti zvose hazvinzwisisiki." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Zvose zvinoenda kunzvimbo imwecheteyo. Zvose zvinobva muvhu uye zvose zvinodzokerazve kuvhu. 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ndiani angazive kuti mweya womunhu unokwira kumusoro here kana kuti mweya wemunhu unodzika pasi muvhu. 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ndokusaka ndakaona kuti hapana chakanaka kumunhu panekufadzwa nebasa rake nokuti ndiwo mugove wake. Hapana angagone kuita kuti aone zvichazoitika kwaari. 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Uyewo ndakazorangarirazve ndikaona kudzvinyirira kunoitwa pasi pedenga. Panoti misodzi yokudzvinyirirwa kunoitwa vanhu vasina anovanyaradza, vanodzvinyirira vamwe zvakaipa ndivo vane masimba vasina anovanyaradza." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ndakakungura kuti zvavo vakafa, vakatofa kare vari nani zvavo pane vapenyu, vachino upenyu." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Asi ari nani kupinda vose vari vaviri munhu asina zvake kumbovapo asina zvake kumboona zviito zvakaipa zvinoitwa pasi pedenga. 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Uyewo ndakaona kuti kushingaira nebasa kose kunoitwa nokubudirira kose kunoitwa kunobva mumapitse anoita munhu kune mumwe wake. Kana izvozvi hazvinzwisisiki uye kunongova kudzingirira mhepo. 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Benzi romunhu rinogara maoko rigopera muviri nokuonda. 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Asi zviri nani kuva neruoko rumwechete runerunyararo pane maoko maviri ari kushingaira nebasa achidzingirira zvawo mhepo. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Panezvimwezve zvandakaonawo kuti hazvinzwisisiki pasi pedenga. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Pangave nomunhu anongova oga, asina mwana kana munun'una asi asingazorore kushingaira nebasa maziso ake asingambogutsikani noupfumi hwake hwose nokuti haambozvibvunza kuti, “Ko wandiri kutamburira kudai ndiani ndichizvishaisa mufaro zvangu.” Izvozviwo izvi hazvinzwisisiki uye ibasa risina chinofadza mariri." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Vanhu vaviri vari nani pane mumwechete, nokuti zvavanoita zvinobuda zvakanaka." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Nokuti kana vakapunzika mumwe achasimudza mumwe wake; asi hamheno zvake anongova oga. Kana akawira pasi hapana anomusimudza. 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Chimwezve ndechokuti vaviri vakarara pamwechete vanodziirirwa. Ko anenge ari oga anodziirwa sei? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Munhu angagone zvake kukurira munhu ari oga asi vaviri vanogona kumirisana naye. Tambo yakakoswa netambo nhatu haikurumidzi kudambuka. 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Zvirinani kuva munhu wechidiki asi ane ungwaru kupinda kuva mambo akwegura asi asina ungwaru asingagone kugamuchira mazano avamwe," 
Ecclesiastes4:14 angave zvake munhu akabva kujere achienda paumambo kana kunge akaberekwa ari murombo munyika yamambo wake. 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndakaona vose vapenyu vanofamba-famba pasi pedenga uyewo ndakaonawo mumwe wechidiki achitora nzvimbo yamambo 
Ecclesiastes4:16 achitungamirira vanhu vasingaverengeki kuwanda. Zvakadaro zvazvo vaizotevera mushure make havana kumufarira. Izvi hazvina maturo uye kunongova kudzingirira mhepo. 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Chenjerera mafambiro ako kana uchienda kuimba yaMwari. Zviri nani kuendako pamusana pokuda kuteerera pano kundopira chibayiro chamapenzi nokuti havazivi kuti vari kuita zvakaipa. 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Pakutaura pana Mwari rega kumedza kutsenga uchakuda kana kupindwa nomwoyo wokukurumidza kutaura pana Mwari nokuti Mwari ari kudenga iwe uri pasi pano. Saizvozvo zvaunotaura ngazvive zvishoma. 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Kurotomoka kunouya kana twunonetsa twawanda. Ndizvozvowo nezvinotaurwa nebenzi kana twarinotaura twawanda. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Kana wapika mhiko kuna Mwari rega kunonoka kuita zvawapika zvacho. Haafariri mapenzi. Ita zvawakapika kuita. 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Zviri nani kusapika mhiko panokupika mhiko uchizorega kuita zvawapika. 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Rega kuti murumo wako ukutungamirire kutadzira Mwari, uye usati kumutumwa kwaingova zvako kukanganisa. Seiko uchida kuti Mwari ashatirwe nezvaunotaura achizoparadza basa ramaoko ako?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Kurotomoka kungawande zvako, zvinotaurwa zvingawande zvazvo asi chako iwe itya Mwari." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Kana ukaona mudunhu varombo vachidzvinyirirwa, uye ruenzaniso nokururama zvakandwa pasi ngazvirege kukushamisa nokuti mukuru-mukuru anoongororwa nomukuru kwaari uye kuna vamwe vakuruwo pamusoro pavo." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Chinhu chakanaka kwazvo kuti nyika ive namambo asi iri nyika inorimwa. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Munhu anoda mari haaguti mari uye anoda upfumi nokubereka kwahwo izvozviwo hazvinzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Upfumi hukawanda vanohudya vanowandawo muridzi wahwo chaanowana chii mahuri kusiya kungohuona nameso? 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Hakusi kunaka ikoko kwakaita hope dzomushandi kunyange adya zvizhinji kana zvishoma, kuwandirwa kwomupfumi nomupfumi kunomushaisa hope." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kune chimwe chinhu chakaipa chandakaona pasi pedenga chokuti munhu anozviunganidzira upfumi hwozomukuvadza. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Upfumi ihwohwo anorasikirwa nahwo mukuita zvakaipa sarei mumaoko asisina chaanacho asi iye ari baba womwana 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Sokubuda kwaakaita mudumbu maamai vake ndomuendero waachaita ari musvi, sokuuya kwaakaita pasina chaangatakure chebasa rake chaangaende nacho mumaoko." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kunyange ichochi chinhu chakaipisisa; samauiro aakaita ndiwo maendero aachaita. Chaakawana chii zvino zvaakashandira mhepo zvayo kudaro 
Ecclesiastes5:17 achipedza mazuva ake ose murima nomukutambura mumwoyo nokurwara nokushatirwa. 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Chandakazoona zvangu kuti chinhu chakanaka uye chinokodzera ndechokuti munhu adye zvake achinwa achifara zvichibva pabasa raanoshingairira kuita pasi pedenga mazuva mashoma oupenyu hwake aakapiwa naMwari nokuti iwoyu ndiwo mugovewo wake. 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ichiwo chipo chaMwari chokuti munhu wose anopiwa upfumi nepfuma nesimba rokugona kufadzwa nazvo, agone kugamuchira mugove wake nokuwanawo rufaro runobva mubasa raanoshingairira kuita." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti haambonyatsorangarira mazuva oupenyu hwake nokuti Mwari anomuita kuti agare achifara mumwoyo make. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Panechimwe chinhu chakaipa chandakaona pasi pedenga chinoremera vanhu kwazvo. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Munhu anopiwa naMwari upfumi nepfuma noukuru zvokuti haana chaanenge achida chaanoshaya asi Mwari orega kumupa simba rokuti afadzwe nazvo asi mutorwa ndiye wofadzwa zvake nazvo. Izvi hazvinzwisisiki uye chinhu chinorwadza. 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Munhu anogona kuva nevana zana agogara makore mazhinji zvokuti anova namakore mazhinji iye asingawani rufaro mune zvinhu zvakanaka zvoupenyu uye asingavigwe kana azofa. Ini ndinoti mwana aberekwa nguva yake yokuberekwa isati yasvika ari nani kupinda iye. 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kuuya kwake hakunzwisisiki, anopinda murima, zita rake richibva rakwidibirwa nerima." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Chimwezve ndechokuti haana kuona zuva, kana kumboziva chinhu asi uyu anowana zororo kupinda iye." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Kunyangwe akagara chiuru chamakore chakapetwa kaviri iye asingawani rufaro mune zvinhu zvakanaka, handiti vanhu vose vanoenda kunzvimbo imwecheteyo?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Kushingaira nebasa kunoita munhu, anenge achishandira muromo asi havi yokuda kudya haiperi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ko munhu ane ungwaru chii chaanokunda nacho benzi uyewo murombo anowanei nokuziva kwake kuzvibata pane vanhu? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Chinhu chauri kuona neziso chiri nani pane chauri kusuwira izvozviwo hazvinzwisisiki. Kunongova kudzingirira mhepo. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Chinhu chipi nechipi chakambovapo chikatotumidzwa zita munhu anozivikanwa kuti chii uye haakwanisi kukwidzana dare neane simba kupinda iye. 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Panowanda zvinotaurwa, zvisinganzwisisiki zvinowandawo chazvinobatsira munhu chii?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ndiani angazive zvinganakire munhu paupenyu hwake hupfupi husina pahwo hunopfuura somumvuri. Ndiani angakwanise kutaurira munhu zvichazoitika mushure pasi pedenga. 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Zita rakanaka riri nani pano mafuta anokosha uye zuva rokufa riri nani pane zuva rokuberekwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Zviri nani kuenda kuimba iri kuchemwa rufu pano kuenda kuimba yemafaro. Nokuti rufu ndiwo maperero omunhu wose. Vapenyu vanofanira kuzvichengeta mumwoyo izvozvo. 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kusuruvara kuri nani pano kuseka mwoyo unofara unogona kuvanzwa muuso hwakasuwa. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mwoyo yavangwaru iri muimba inochemwa rufu asi mwoyo yamapenzi iri muimba yemafaro. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Zviri nani kuteerera kutsiura kwomungwaru pano kuteerera rwiyo rwamapenzi. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Kubwabwatika kunoita minzwa pasi pebhodho, ndozvakangoitawo kuseka kwamapenzi izvozvowo hazvinzwisisiki." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Kudzvanyirira mumwe zvakaipa kunoita kuti mungwaru ave benzi. Pfumbamuromo inokanganisa pfungwa dzomunhu. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kupera kwechinhu kuri nani pane kutanga kwacho. Munhu ano mwoyo murefu ari nani pane ane mweya wokuzvikudza. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Usakurumidze kushatirwa nokuti mumwoyo yamapenzi ndimo mumusha madzo hasha. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Usabvunze kuti, “Ko seiko mazuva akare akanga akanaka kupfuura anhasi uno? Mubvunzo wako haubvi muungwaru.”" 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Sezvakangoita nhaka, ungwaru chinhu chakanaka chinobatsira vachiri kuona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Sokuchengetedza munhu kunoita mari ndizvozvowo zvinoita ungwaru kuchengetedza munhu uye chakanakira ruzivo ndechichi chokuti ungwaru hunochengetedza upenyu hwomunhu anahwo. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Rangarira zvakaitwa naMwari. Ndiani angatwasanudze chaanenge akombamisa? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Pamazuva okubudirira, fara, kana zvinhu zvaipa mazuvayo, rangarira kuti Mwari ndiye akaita mazuva okutanga aya namazuva echipiri aya kuitira kuti munhu arege kuziva zvichazoitika." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Paupenyu hwangu husina zvahwo maturo ndakaona zvose izvi zvokuti. Munhu wakarurama anofa nyangwe akarurama zvake anofa. Kwouyawo munhu akaipa kunyange akaipa anogara upenyu hurefu muzviito zvake zvakaipa. 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Usapfurikidze pakururama kwako uye rega kupfurikidza pakungwara unodirei kuzviparadza. 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Rega kupfurikidza pauipi hwako kana kuva benzi chaunofira nguva yako isati yasvika chii? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Rega kubva wati nechimwechete tetere uchikanganwa chimwe chiya nokuti munhu anotya Mwari anobudirira mune zvose zviri zviviri. 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ungwaru hunosimbisa mungwaru kupinda gumi ravatongi vari muguta. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Hakuna mururami panyika anoita zvakanaka asingatadzire Mwari. 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Usangoteerera zvose zvose zvinotaurwa navanhu ungadaro ukatonzwa musevenzi wako achikureva. 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Iwe unoziva mumwoyo mako kuti wakamboreva vamwe kazhinji. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Zvose izvi ndakazviedza neungwaru ndakati regai ndingware asi ungwaru hwaiva kure neni. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Zvakaitika kare zviri kure uye zvakadzama, zvakadzamisisa. Ndianiwo zvake angazviwane?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndakazosvika pakuzvibvunzurudza mumwoyo ndikazviedza, ndikatsvagisisa ndichivhima ungwaru neuwandu hwezvinhu uye kuti ndizive kuipa kwoupenzi uyezve kuti upenzi urema chaiho." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndakaona kuti munhukadzi anorwadza kupinda rufu anongova misungo yoga yoga, mumwoyo wake mimbure chaiyo maoko ake zvikachikiro chaizvo. Munhu akarurama pana Mwari anomupunyuka asi mutadzi anokachikirwa naye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Muparidzi anoti izvi ndizvo zvandawana ndichinyatsofungisisa chinhu chimwe nechimwe kuti ndiwane kuwanda kwazvo. 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Ndakatsvaka kwenguva ndefu pasina chandakawana. Ndakawana murume mumwechetechete akarurama mukati mechiuru asi pakati pavakadzi vose zvavo hapana wandakawana. 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Chandakaona chete ndechichi chokuti Mwari akasika munhu akarurama asi vanhu ndivo vakazozvitsvakirawo zvavo twakawanda. 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ndiani angaenzaniswe nomungwaru. Ndianizve angazive kutsanangura zvinhu. Ungwaru hunopenyesa uso hwomunhu huchipa munhu uso hwakasununguka. 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ini ndinoti, “Teerera zvinenge zvataurwa naMambo.” Pamusana pemhiko kuna Mwari" 
Ecclesiastes8:3 ibva paari; usanonoke munzvimbo yenjodzi yakadaro nokuti mambo anogona kuita chose chaada kuita. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Nokuti zvinenge zvataurwa namambo ndizvozvo. Ndiani angamuti, “Ko chii chamaita?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Munhu anoteerera mutemo hapana chinomuwira mungwaru anoziva mumwoyo make nguva kwayo nezvinofanira kuitwa. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Nokuti chinhu chimwe nechimwe chine nguva yacho namaitirwo acho kunyange munhu achiremerwa nenhamo 
Ecclesiastes8:7 nokuti hapana anoziva zvichaitika uye ndiani angamutaurire kuti zvichaitika sei. 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Hapana munhu anokwanisa kutonga mweya kana kuramba akauchengetedza. Hapanawo ane simba nezvezuva rokufa. Hondo haina wainosia uipi hauponesi mwene wahwo. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Zvose izvozvi ndakazviongorora ndichirangarira zvose zvinoitwa pasi pezuva, munhu achiremedza vamwe asi zvichizomupfukira iye." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ndakaonawo vakaipa vachivigwa vakabuda munzvimbo tsvene vachirumbidzwa muguta ravaiita zvakadaro izvozvi izvi hazvinzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Pamusana pokuti chirango chezvakaipa zvinenge zvaitwa hachisi kupiwa nokukurumidza, vanhu vanobva varamba mwoyo yavo yavakudisisa kuita zvakaipa." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mutadzi anogona zvake kuita zvakaipa kazana agove noupenyu urefu asi chandinoziva ndechokuti, “Vanotya Mwari ndovachanakirwa nezvinhu pamusana pokumutya kwavanoita." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Muipi hazvimbomufambira zvakanaka. Uye haakwanisi kurebesa upenyu hwake somumvuri nokuti haatyi Mwari.” 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Pane zvimwe zvisinganzwisisiki zvinoitika panyika zvokuti kune varurami vanowirwa nezvinowira vakaipa kwouyawo vaipi vanowana mubayiro unowanikwa navakarurama. Ndakati izviwo hazvinzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Saka ini ndinokurudzira kufara nokuti munhu haana chimwe chinhu pasi pedenga kusiya kudya nokunwa nokufara nokuti izvi ndizvo zvinobva mukushingaira kwake nebasa mumazuva ake oupenyu aakapiwa naMwari pasi pedenga. 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Pandakazvipira mwoyo kuti ndizive ungwaru uye kuti ndione basa riri kuitwa panyika ungatotadza kukotsira nazvo siku nesikati. 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Ndakaona kuti pamabasa ose aMwari, munhu haangakwanise kuziva basa rinoitwa pasi pedenga. Hazvina mhosva kuti munhu angashingaire sei kuzvitsvaka, haambozviwana. Kunyange mungwaru angati anozviziva haambokwanisa kuzviwana." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Izvozvi zvose ndakazviongorora mumwoyo mangu ndichinyatsozviongorora ndikazviona kuti zviito zvavakarurama navangwaru zviri mumaoko aMwari, zvingave rudo kana ruvengo munhu haangazvizivi. Kwatiri vanhu zvose zvinenge zvisinganzwisisiki." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Nokuti chinowira mumwe, ndicho chinowira vose, kungave kumururami kana kumuipi kuna vakanaka kana kuna vakaipa kuna vatsvene kana kuna vakan'ora kuna anopira chibayiro kana kuna asingapiri chibayiro. Zvakangofanana kumururami nokumutadzi. Anopika mhiko naasingapiki mhiko zvakangofanana." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Izvi ndozvakaipa pane zvose zvinoitika pasi pedenga zvokuti tinowirwa nenhamo imwecheteyo. Chimwezve ndechokuti mwoyo yavanhu izere nouipi. Kana vari vapenyu chete kupenga kurimo mumwoyo yavo, mushure macho vanoenda kuvafi." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Asi munhu achiri mupenyu navamwe vose vapenyu anechitarisiro nokuti imbwa mhenyu iri nani pane shumba yakafa. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Chandinodariro ndechokuti vapenyu vanoziva kuti vachafa asi vakafa havana zvavanoziva. Mubayiro havachisina uye zvokuyeukwa hapachina. 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Rudo rwavo, noruvengo rwavo, uye shanje yavo zvakaparara. Havachisina kana mugove zvavo narini wose pazvinhu zvinoitwa pasi pedenga" 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Enda udye chokudya chako nomufaro unwe waini yako nemwoyo unofara nokuti Mwari anofadzwa nezviito zvako. 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Gara wakapfeka zvichena. Gara wakazora mafuta mumusoro. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Gara uchifara nomukadzi wepamwoyo pako mazuva ako ose ohupenyu hwako husina maturo aakakupa pasi pedenga nokuti ndiwo mugove wako paupenyu uye pabasa rako raunoshingaira kuita pasi pedenga. 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Chaunenge wagona kuita namaoko ako chiite nesimba rako rose nokuti kunzvimbo yavafi kwauri kuenda hakuna basa kana pfungwa kana ruzivo kana ungwaru. 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Chimwe chandakaona pasi pedenga ndechokuti shasha yokumhanya haisiyo inokunda vamwe vose. Gamba rokurwa harisiro rinokunda muhondo vangwaru havasivo vanowana chokudya vakachenjerawo havasivo vanowana upfumi, mhizha hadzisidzo dzinobudirira nguva yavanayo imwechete uye zvinowira mumwe zvinowira vose." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Munhu haazivi nguva yake. Sezvinoitwa hove dzinobatwa mumumbure wakaipa uye seshiri dzinobatwa parugombe ndizvo zvine vanhu vanobatwa panguva yakaipa pazvinongoerekana zvavawira. 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Chimwewo chandakaona soungwaru ndechichi pasi pedenga uye kwandiri chinhu chikuru. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Paivapo kamwe kaguta kaive navanhu vashoma makari. Mumwe mambo akakavinga akakakomba. Akavaka zvokukakomba nazvo. 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Mukaguta ikako maiva nemurombo mungwaru. Noungwaru hwake akanunura kaguta ikako asi hapana akamboyeuka murombo iyeyo. 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Asi chandinotaura ndechokuti ungwaru huri nani pane simba. Kunyange zvazvo ungwaru hwomurombo huchishorwa uye mazwi ake asingateererwi. 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Mashoko oungwaru anofanira kuteererwa kupinda kushevedzera kwomutungamiri anodaidzira pakati pemapenzi. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Ungwaru huri nani pane zvombo zvehondo asi mutadzi mumwechete anogona kuparadza zvizhinji zvakanaka. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Nhunzi dzakafa dzinogona kunhuwisa mafuta anonhuhwira, saizvozvo utununu hunogona kukanganisa ungwaru nokuremekedzwa." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Pfungwa dzomungwaru dzakarerekerera kurudyi pfungwa dzebenzi dzakarerekera kuruboshe. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Nyange richifamba munzira benzi harina njere rinotaura kumunhu wose kuti ibenzi. 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Kana mutongi wako akakuvirukira nehasha, usabve pabasa rako nokuti kuzvibata kwako kunoita kuti mhosva huru iregererwe." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Pane chimwe chinhu chakaipa chandakaona pasi pedenga kuri kukanganisa kwavatongi. 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Mapenzi anoiswa pamabasa makuru asi vapfumi vachigara panzvimbo dzapasi 
Ecclesiastes10:7 ndakaona varanda vari pamabhiza machinda achifamba pasi netsoka savaranda. 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Munhu anochera hunza achiwira mairi, anoputsa madziro anorumwa nenyoka." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Anokwakwanura mabwe anokuvadzwa nawo anotsemurawo huni anogona kukuvadzwa nadzo. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Kana demo rakagomara pamusana pokuti harina kurodzwa, kurishandisa unofanira kutoita nesimba rakawanda. Pakadai ungwaru ndihwo hunoita kuti munhu abudirire." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Nyoka ikaruma munhu isati yaitwa mapipi pairi, anoita mapipi wacho hapana chaanowana." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Mazwi emungwaru anoita kuti adiwe navanhu asi muromo webenzi unoriparadzisa. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Anotanga nokutaura zvisina maturo ozopedzisira nokupenga kwakaipa. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Benzi rinotaura zvakawanda asi hapana munhu angazive zviri mune ramangwana. Ndiani angazivise munhu zvichazoitika mushure make? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Benzi rinoshanda zvokufa zvokuti kunyange nzira yokuguta hariizivi. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Inenhamo nyika inamambo achiri jaya zvaro uye inemachinda ayo anodyiririra mangwanani. 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Yakakomborerwa zvayo nyika inamambo akaberekwa kumbahuru uye inamachinda anodya nenguva kwayo vanodyira kusimba kwete kuraradza. 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Pamusana penungo denga remba rinowira mukati pamusana pokugara maoko imba inodonha. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Chokudya chinoita kuti vanhu vafare waini inoita kuti upenyu hunakidze mari ndiye mupedzanhamo. 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Usatsoropodze mambo kunyange nechomumwoyo usashurikidze rushambwa vapfumi kunyange mumba mako mokurara nokuti shiri ingadaro ikatakura mazwi ako zvimwe chipembenene chingadaro chikandotaura zvinhu zvacho. 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Tumira mbeswa dzako mhiri kwamakungwa mushure zvichakudzorera. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Isa mari yako kunhu kunomwe kana kusere nokuti hauzivi chinokuwira pasi pano. 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Kana makore azere mvura anoidururira pasi kana muti ukawira kumaodzanyemba kana kuchamhembe, paunowira ndipo paucharara." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Munhu anogara akatarisa mhepo haambodyara uye anodyara akatarisa makore haakohwe. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Sokusaziva kwaunoita kuti mweya unouya sei mumapfupa munhumbu memukadzi anepamuviri, saizvozvo hauzivi mabasa aMwari anoita zvose." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kumangwanani dyara mbeu dzako. Kumanheru usagare maoko nokuti hauzivi kuti chichabudirira ndechipi, chinoichi kana kuti icho pamwe zvose zviri zviviri zvinoita zvakanaka." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Chiedza chakanaka, uye chinhu chakanaka kumaziso kuona zuva." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Munhu akagara makore mazhinji, anofanira kufara maari ose asi ayeuke kuti mazuva erima achawanda zvose zvinozouya hazvinzwisisiki." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Iwe wechiduku fara pamazuva ako ohuduku mwoyo wako ngaufare pamazuva ako ohuduku ita zvinoda mwoyo wako uye zvaunofunga asi ziva kuti pana izvozvi zvose Mwari achakutonga. 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Rega kuzvidya mwoyo bvisa zvose zvinokurwadza muviri nokuti uduku noujaya hazvinzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Yeuka musiki wako uchiri muduku, mazuva akaipa asati asvika, mazuva auchazoti, “Handiafariri asati asvika;”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 zuva nechiedza nomwedzi nenyenyedzi zvisati zvasviba makore asati adzoka mushure mokunaya kwomvura; 
Ecclesiastes12:3 pazuva rinenge vachengeti vepamba vongweda kutya majaya akasimba okombama, vokukuya vorega nokuti vanenge vava vashoma vachiti kana vatarisa napahwindo maziso anoona rima;" 
Ecclesiastes12:4 makonhi ari munzira izvozvo ogara akazarirwa ruzha rwezvigayo rwavakuderera, munhu ava kumutswa nokuchema kweshiri dzokutanga panguva yakunenge kuimba kwaderera," 
Ecclesiastes12:5 kukwira mukwidza kwavakutyisa kufamba chaiko kwavakutyisawo iwo musoro, muarimondi zvawo kuchena maruva zvino wava mhashu zvayo kuzvova napasi, havi dzose dzapera iwe wavakuenda kumusha wako wokusingaperi vokuchema vakafa vavakuunganidzana mumigwagwa." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Tambo yesirivha isati yadambuka ndiro yendarama isati yapwanyika chirongo chisati chaputsika patsime. 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Ivhu rodzokera kunyika sezvarakanga riri mweya wodzokera kuna Mwari akamboupa. 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Kusanzwisisika kwezvisinganzwisisiki ndozviri kutaura muparidzi zvose hazvinzwisisiki. 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Pamusoro pokuva mungwaru muparidzi akadzidzisa vanhu ruzivo iye achiera nokudzidza achigadziridza zvakanakisa zvirevo. 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Muparidzi akatsvaka nzira yokutaura nayo zvakanakisa uye kuti anyorere vanhu zvazviri mazwi echokwadi. 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Mashoko avangwaru akaita sechokubaisa uye sehoko dzanyatsorovererwa nomufudzi zvichiitwa nomufudzi mumwechete. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Chimwezve mwanangu, chenjerera izvi zvokuti kunyora mabhuku hakuperi uye kudzidza kunonetsa muviri." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kuchipedzisa muchidimbu, zvose zvanzwika. Itya Mwari uchengete mitemo yake ndiro basa romunhu rose." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Nokuti Mwari achatonga zviito zvose, zvose, zvakavandika zvingave zvakanaka kana zvakaipa." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Rwiyo rwakanakisisa rwaSoromoni. 
SongOfSongs1:2 Dai wangonditsvodawo zvako unditsvode-tsvode nomuromo wako nokuti kuita zvorudo kwako kunokunda waini. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Mafuta ako okuzora anonhuwirira; zita rako rakaita samafuta adururwa ndosaka vasikana vachikuda. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ndikweve kwauri timhanye muende neni mumba menyu, mambo. Ngatifarei tichikupemberera tichirumbidza rudo rwako kupfuura waini. Ndosaka wani uchidiwa." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Vakunda veJerusaremu wee! Kusviba ndakasviba zvangu asi ndakanaka ndakasviba zvangu samatendhe eKedhari asi kunaka kwangu samachira chaiwo okudzikatirisa okwaSoromoni. 
SongOfSongs1:6 Musatarise zvenyu kusviba kwandakaita izuva iri rakanditsvukurutsa kudai. Hanzvadzi dzangu dzomumba dzakandiitira zvehasha; dzakandiita muchengeti weminda yamagirepisi. Asi munda wangu wamagirepisi handina kuuchengeta. 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndiudzewo mudiwa wangu wapamwoyo, unofudzirepiko zvipfuwo zvako? Unozvizorodza kupi pamasikati makuru? Usandirege ndichingodzungaira, ndichitevedza namatanga avamwe vako." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Iwe nyakunakisisa panavakadzi vose kana usingazivi, tevera matsimba ehwai ufudzire mbudzana dzako pedyo namatendhe avafudzi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Iwe chido chemwoyo wangu ndinokuenzanisa nomukono webhiza riri pangoro dzaFarao dzehondo. 
SongOfSongs1:10 Hakusi kunaka ikoko kwakaita matama ako nemhete idzi! Naiwo mutsipa wako uyu, nezvishongo zvawo izvi, aiwaiwa!" 
SongOfSongs1:11 Tichakuitira mhete dzendarama nezvuma zvesirivha. 
SongOfSongs1:12 Mambo paainge akazendama zvake pasofa, mafuta angu enadhi akati pfuu kunhuwirira." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Kwandiri mudiwa wangu wakaita sakahomwe kemura kakarara pakati pamazamu angu. 
SongOfSongs1:14 Kwandiri ini mudiwa wangu akaita sechitsumbu chamaruva ehena muminda yeEnigedhi yamagirepisi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Hakusi kunaka ikoko kwawakaita, iwe chido chemwoyo wangu! Kunaka here ikoko! Iwo maziso aya, aiwaka njiva inosara pasi!" 
SongOfSongs1:16 Kunaka here ikoko kwakaitawo iwe mudiwa wangu! Hakusi kunaka kani ikoko! Patinovata pakati gude gude kusvibira. 
SongOfSongs1:17 Mapango emba yedu okutandarika achava omusidhari, nhungo dzawo dziri dzomupaini." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ini ndiri ruva romurosi wekuSharoni ruva reriri zvaro romumapani. 
SongOfSongs2:2 Seruva reriri mukati merukato ndizvo zvakaita chido chemwoyo wangu pakati pevasikana. 
SongOfSongs2:3 Somuti wemuapuru mukati mesango, ndozvakaita mudiwa wangu mukati memajaya. Muti wandakagara mumumvuri wawo norufaro une michero yawo inondinakira." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Akaenda neni kumabiko ewaini. Rudo ndorwaiva pamusoro, somureza." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Dai ukangondidzorawo mwoyo nemichero yemagirepisi akaomeswa undimutse mwoyo nemaapuru nokuti ini ndashaya pokuisa mwoyo ini norudo! 
SongOfSongs2:6 Dai ruoko rwake rweruboshe ruri pasi pemusoro wangu rudyi rwake rwakandigumbatira. 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndinokukomeresai imi vanasikana veJerusaremu mupike nemhara nemhene dzesango kuti hamutirimutsi kana kumutsa havi dzorudo nguva yacho isati yasvika. 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ndiri kunzwa mutsindo womudiwa wangu, hoyo wouya, achiuruka mumakomo." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Achisvetuka zvikomo mudiwa wangu akaita semhara kana kuti setsvana yemhene. Hoyo wamira zvino seri kwemadziro edu achidongorera napawindo achitarisa nepawaya yesefa. 
SongOfSongs2:10 Mudiwa wangu hoyo wotaura achinditi: “Simuka chido chemwoyo wangu iwe tsvarakadenga yangu uuye.” 
SongOfSongs2:11 Nguva yechando yapfuura mvura yokunaya yapera, uye yaenda." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Maruva abuda panyika nguva yokuimba yasvika kurira kwenjiva kwava kunzwika munyika medu. 
SongOfSongs2:13 Muonde wavakubereka maonde, migirepisi yava namaruva ari kunhuwirira. Simuka chido chemwoyo wangu uya zvako tsvarakadenga yangu." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Iwe njiva yangu iri mumikaha yamabwe nemakavandika muzvikomo. Rega ndione zvangu uso hwako, ndinzwe hangu izwi rako nokuti izwi rako rakanakisa uye uso hwako hunoyevedza." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Tibatirei makava, tukava tudiki turi kukanganisa minda yedu yamagirepisi, nokuti minda yedu yamagirepisi yava namaruva." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Mudiwa wangu ndewangu, ini ndiri wake, anofudzira zvipfuwo zvake mukati memaruva amariri." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Kusvikira rungwanani kwofefetera; rima roenda udzoke mudiwa wangu, uite semhara pamakomo eBheta." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Usiku ndiri pauriri hwangu pfungwa dzangu dzaiva kumudiwa wangu ndaingomutsvaka asi handina kumuona, ndakamudaidza asi haana kudavira." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndakati regai ndisimuke ndimutsvake muguta iye wangu wapamwoyo mumigwagwa nemumisika ndakamutsvaka asi handina kumuwana. 
SongOfSongs3:3 Vachengetedzi veguta vakandiona pavaingunofamba neguta ndakavati, “Mamboonawo here mudiwa wangu?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Ndakangovati pfuurei ndokubva ndamuwana wandinoda. Ndakabva ndamuti mbunde ndisingade kuti aende kusvikira ndaenda naye kumba kwaamai vangu, mumba mewakandibereka wacho." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndinokukomeresai imi vanasikana veJerusaremu mupike nemhara nemhene dzesango kuti hamutirimutsi kana kumutsa havi dzorudo nguva yacho isati yasvika. 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ko chiiko icho chiri kubva nokurenje chakaita seshongwe youtsi chinonhuwirira serusenzi nemura netunonhuwira twose twavashambadzi? 
SongOfSongs3:7 Inga chigaro chaSoromoni wani akakombwa namakumi matanhatu emagamba pamagamba okwaIsiraeri. 
SongOfSongs3:8 Vose vakapakata mapakatwa avo dziri nyanzvi dzokurwa hondo. Vose vakanga vakagadzirira kwazvo, munhu nebakatwa rake parutivi kuti chauya chauya usiku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Mambo Soromoni akazvigadzirira chigaro nemiti yokuRebhanoni. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Mapango acho okumisa aiva esirivha, katenga kacho kari kendarama, chigaro chacho chiri cheruvara rwehute mukati macho makanga makanyatsogadzirwa kwazvo navakadzi veJerusaremu." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Budai vanasikana vemuZioni muone zvenyu Mambo Soromoni, mumusoro akaiti dzi ngundu youshe, ndaza yaakagadzwa nayo naamai vake pazuva romuchato wake, pazuva romwoyo wake, zuva rerufaro." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Hakusi kunaka ikoko, chido chemwoyo wangu, hakusi kunaka kwawakaita! Iwo maziso ako aya, ungati injiva chokwadi muvhoiri mako imomo. Iro vhudzi rako ungati idanga rembudzi dziri kuita murikitira pamateru eGireadhi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Iwo mazino acho, ungati idanga zvaro rehwai dzavakuda kuveurwa padzinobuda madzinoshambidzwa. Dzose dziina mapatya pasina kana yakasvodza." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Iyo miromo yako iyi, kuita setambo tsvuku chaiyo. Muromo wako wakazonaka! Ndoda katauriro kako! Hakusi kutapira mhani ikoko. Matama ako ungati muchero wamapomegiraniti wakachekwa nepakati muvhoiri mako imomo." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Mutsipa wako heyo shongwe zvayo yaDhavhidhi yakavakwa senhurikidzwa pakarembera churu chenhoo. Dzose dziri nhoo dzamagamba ehondo. 
SongOfSongs4:5 Iwo mazamu ako ari maviri, ungati zvimhuru zviviri zvemhara, mapatya chaiwo emhara dziri kufura zvadzo mukati mamaruva amariri." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Kwofefetera kusvikira rungwanani rima raenda, ndichazvitututsa kumakomo emura uye kugomo rorusenzi." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Wakazonaka ufunge, chido chemwoyo wangu, hauna kana kan'an'a zvako." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ngatichibva kuno kuRebhanoni, mwenga wangu ngatichibvai kuno kuRebhanoni, Tiza panhongonya yegomo reAmana ubve pamusoro pemakomo eSeniri neHerimoni ubve mumapako eshumba nomumakomo embada." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Wanditora mwoyo mwana wamai, mwenga wangu. Wanditora mwoyo nokungonditi tarise kwawaita uye nechishongo chako chimwechete chomuhuro." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Hakusi kunaka kwakaita rudo rwako, mwana wamai, iwe mwenga wangu. Rudo rwako kana waini inosara pasi. Twokubikisa tunonhuwirira twuya pamafuta ako anonhuwirira hatupasviki." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Mumiromo mako munobuda usvisvi hunotapira, mwana wamai pasi porurimi rwako mukaka oga nouchi. Kunhuwirira kwehembe dzako ungati kunhuhwirira kweRebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Hanzvadzi yangu, iye mwenga wangu uyu ibindu rakakiiwa, kasipiti zvako kakanamirwa" 
SongOfSongs4:13 mabukira ako munda chaiwo wamapomegiraniti une michero yakanakisisa yeHena ine Nadhi. 
SongOfSongs4:14 Ine Nadhi neSafuroni neKaramusi nechinamoni nemiti yose yorusenzi nemura negavakava uyewo tunonhuwirira twukuru-twukuru. 
SongOfSongs4:15 Mune Kasipiti kebindu, tsime remvura mhenyu netukova tunoyerera tuchibva kuRebhanoni." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Iwe mhepo yokuchamhembe muka, uya iwe mhepo yokuMaodzanyemba; vhuvhuta pabindu rangu. Kunhuwira kwaro kupeperetsere kose kose. Mudiwa wangu ngaauye kubindu rake adye michero yaro yakanakisisa." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndauya ini kubindu rangu iwe mwana wamai, mwenga wangu. Ndavakunongerera mura yangu uye tunonhuwirira twangu. Ndavakutodya zinga rouchi uyewo uchi hwangu ndava kutonwa ini waini nemukaka wangu. Idyai shamwari munwe; nwiririrai, imi vadiwa." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Ndakavata zvangu asi kukotsira mukati umu handina. Ndiye inzwei mudiwa achigogodza, achiti, “Ndizarurire mwana wamai, iwe chido chemwoyo wangu, njiva yangu iwe wakaperera nokunaka. Nokuti musoro wangu munyoro nedova, vhudzi rangu ratota namadonhwe ousiku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndanga ndatopfekenura hanzu. Ndidzipfeke zvakare here? Ndanga ndashamba tsoka dzangu ndodzisvibisazve nevhu here? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Mudiwa wangu akapinza ruoko rwake ndokubata chihuri mwoyo wangu wakanzwa manyawi. Ndakanzwa manyawi mumwoyo mangu. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Pandakazoti regai ndimuke ndizarurire mudiwa wangu, maoko angu achidonha mura minwe ichiyerera mura ichitoyerera pane chokuzarurisa gonhi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndakazarurira mudiwa wangu asi mudiwa wangu akanga atendeuka aenda, zvakandipedza simba paakadzokera. Ndakamutsvaka ndikamushaya ndakamudaidza asi haana kupindura." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Vachengetedzi veguta vakandiona pavaingunofamba-famba neguta, vakandirova vakandikuvadza vakanditorera gemenzi rangu ivo vachengetedzi vaparusvingo." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndinokukumbirisai chaizvo vanasikana veJerusaremu kuti kana mawana mudiwa wangu mumutaurire kuti ndapera ini norudo. 
SongOfSongs5:9 Nhaiwe mukadzi akanakisisa kudai iye mudiwa wako chii chaizvo chaanopfuura vamwe nacho? Iye mudiwa wako chaanopfuura vamwe nacho chii chaizvo zvokutotikumbirisa ukadaro? 
SongOfSongs5:10 Mudiwa wangu akapenyerera, akatsvukirira, anonyatsoonekwa mukati mezviuru gumi zvavanhu." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Musoro wake indarama chaiyo yakanakisisa. Vhudzi rake, rinoyerera rakasviba kuti ndo-o segunguwo." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Maziso ake anenge njiva dziri pedyo namadziva emvura, akanyikwa mumukaka, akanyatsoiswa panzvimbo pawo zvakanaka." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Matamawo ake akaita semihomba yetwokubikisa tunonhuwirira tunoburitsa kunhuwirira; iyo miromo yake iyi, maruva zvawo amariri, inodonha mura inoyerera." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Maoko ake, heyo mibhadha zvayo yendarama yakashongedzwa zvishongo muviri wake ndiro zvayo yemunyanga wenzou yakaiswa tutombo twesafaya." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Iwo makumbo ake aya, hedzo mbiru zvadzo dzakamiswa muzvigadzikiro zvendarama uyewo chimiro chake ungati iRebhanoni kunaka kwazvo semiti yemisidhari." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Zvaanotaura izvi zvinotapira samare, iye wose, sezvaari anodiwa. Ndiye mudiwa wangu iyeyo ndiye shamwari yangu, imi vanasikana veJerusaremu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Ko mudiwa wako aendepi, nhai iwe nyakururamisisa pavakadzi vose, mudiwa wako atsaukira kupi? Kuti timutsvake pamwechete newe." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Mudiwa wangu aenda kubindu rake kumihomba yetwokubikisa tunonhuwirira. Kundofudzira hwai dzake mumapindu uye kundotanha maruva amariri. 
SongOfSongs6:3 Mudiwa wangu ndewangu ini ndiri wake anofudzira zvipfuwo zvake mumaruva amariri. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Mudiwa wangu wakarurama seguta reTiriza uye unoyevedza seJerusaremu, achityisawo sehondo ine mireza." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Bvisa maziso ako kwandiri, anondidzimaidza kuona, iro vhudzi rako, ungati idanga rembudzi dziri kuita murikitira pamateru eGireadhi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Iwo mazino ako ungati idanga zvaro rehwai hadzi rabuda madzinoshambidzwa dzose dzine mapatya pasina kana yakasvodza. 
SongOfSongs6:7 Matama ako, ungati muchero wamapomegiraniti akachekwa napakati muvhoiri mako imomo." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kungave zvako namakumi matanhatu emadzimambokadzi kana makumi masere avarongo uye vashandikadzi vasingaverengeki. 
SongOfSongs6:9 Asi njiva yangu, nyakururamisisa mumwechete mwana wapamwoyo waamai vake anodiwa zvikuru nomubereki wake. Vashandikadzi vakamuona vakamuti, “Zvako wakakomborerwa,” kunyange madzimambokadzi navarongo vakamuona vakamurumbidza." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Vakati, “Ndiani uyu akaita samambakwedza akarurama somwedzi, anopenya kunge zuva, anotyisa sehondo ine mireza.”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndaenda kumunda wenzungu kundoona maruva omubani, kundoona kuti migirepisi yatunga here uye kuti mipomegiraniti yava namaruva here." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Handina kutomboziva kuti musikana wangu akanga atondiita jinda pakati pavanhu. 
SongOfSongs6:13 Dzoka, dzoka iwe muShurami, dzoka dzoka tikuyeve. Munodirei kuyeva musikana wokuShurami achitamba pakati pomutsetse wavanotamba." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Kunaka here ikoko kwakaita tsoka dzako dziri mushangu; mwanasikana wejinda chaiye, izvo zvidya zvako kuurungana kwazvo, ungati zvishongo zvebasa remhizha." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Guvhu rako, mukombe wakafuturwa, waini haishaikwi mariri. Iro dumbu rako hausi murwi zvawo here wekoroni, wakatenderedzwa namaruva amariri!" 
SongOfSongs7:3 Iwo mazamu ako ari maviri, ungati zvimhuru zviviri zvemhara, mapatya chaiwo emhara." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Mutsipawo uyu unenge shongwe zvayo yenyanga dzenzou, maziso acho ungati madziva emvura okuHeshobhoni ari pedyo nesuo guru reBhatirabhimu. Mhuno yako ungati ishongwe yokuRebhanoni yakatarisana neDhamasikusi." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Musoro wako unouti twi segomo reKameri. Bvudzi racho kusvibira kwazvo sohute; mambo chaiye anoti tarazaza kukanhamiswa netsama dzevhudzi rako. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Hakusi kunaka ikoko kwawakaita chido chemwoyo wangu, iwe unofadza." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Iwe wakanyatsoti twi somuti womurara mazamu ako ari iwo zvisumbu zvawo. 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndakati regai ndikwire muti womurara ndibatirire pamapazi awo. Dai mazamu ako aya, kwandiri aita sezvisumbu zvamagirepisi; kunhuwirira kwefemo rako, kuite samaapuru." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Uye kutsvoda kwako kuite sewaini yakanakisisa inonyatsodzika iwe, ichiyerera zvayo pamusoro pemiromo namazino." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Ini ndiri womudiwa wangu chaanoda chaicho ndini. 
SongOfSongs7:11 Uya hako mudiwa wangu, handei kuminda tindogara hedu kumamisha." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngatifumirei kumunda wamagirepisi tindoona kuti migirepisi yakatungira here uye kuti maruva emugirepisi azaruka here uyezve kuti mipomegiraniti yava namaruva here. Ikoko ndichakuitira zvorudo. 
SongOfSongs7:13 Mamandirekisi ava kuburitsa kunhuwirira kwawo, pamisuo yedu inongova michero yoga, yakanakisisa yorudzi norudzi mitsva nemitsaru yandakuwarikira zvako, iwe wangu wapamwoyo." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Dai iwe kwandiri uri sehanzvadzi uri wakayamwa pazamu ramai vangu. Dai kuri kuti ndinokuona kunze ndaikutsvoda. Uye hapana aimbondishora. 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ndaienda newe kumba kwaamai vangu, mumba maiye akandibereka. Ndaikupa waini ino tunonhuwirira kuti umwe, muto wamapomegiraniti angu." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Dai ruoko rwake rweruboshwe ruri pasi pamusoro wangu rudyi rwake rwakandigumbatira zvarwo. 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndinokukomeresai imi vanasikana veJerusaremu kuti musatirimutse kana kumutsa havi dzorudo nguva yacho isati yasvika. 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ndiani uyo ari kuuya achibva kurenje akazendamira pana chido chemwoyo wake. Pasi pomuti wemuapuru ndakakumutsa, ipapo amai vako vaiva panguva yokusununguka ivo vakakubereka vaiva pahata." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndiite sechidhindo pamwoyo wako sechidhindo paruoko rwako nokuti rudo rwakasimba sorufu, shanje ino utsiye seguva kuvaima kwayo kuvaima kwemoto, moto chaiwo unoririma." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mvura zhinji zvayo haikwanisi kudzimura rudo. Kunyange mapopopo emvura haagoni kunyudza rudo. Kunyange munhu akati regai nditsinhanise rudo nokupa upfumi hwose hwomusha wake zvinonyatsoshorwa. 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tine kahanzvadzi kedu kaduku asi hakana mazamu. Tichaitei nehanzvadzi yakadai pazuva raanopfimbwa. 
SongOfSongs8:9 Dai kuri kuti madziro, taivaka chokuzvidzivira nacho muhondo chesirivha kana dai kuri kuti igonhi, taimuvakirira namapuranga esidha." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ini ndiri chidziro, mazamu angu akaita seshongwe kwaari, ndiri chigadzanisa mwoyo." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Soromoni aiva nomunda wamagirepisi kuBharihamoni. Akaisako vanhu vokuuchengeta, mumwe nomumwe aifanira kuunza muchero unoita churu chemari yesirivha." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Asi munda wangu wemagirepisi ndowangu ini pachangu. Iwe Soromoni ungava zvako nechuru chemari yesirivha iyoyo vachengeti vayo vachiwana zvavo mazana maviri. 
SongOfSongs8:13 Iwe unogara mumapindu, shamwari dzangu dziri kuteerera izwi rako. Rega ndirinzwewo zvangu." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Mhanya mudiwa wangu uite semhara kana setsvana yemhene pamakomo etwokubikisa tunonhuwirira. 
Isaiah1:1 Zvinhu zvakaoneswa Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi pamusoro peJudha neJerusaremu panguva yokutonga kwamadzimambo aya okwaJudha anoti Uziya naJotamu naAhazi naHezekia. 
Isaiah1:2 “Teerera iwe denga, unzwewo iwe nyika nokuti ini Tenzi ndava kutaura, ‘Ndakarera vana ini ndikavayarutsa asi ivo vakandipandukira." 
Isaiah1:3 Mombe inoziva muridzi wayo kana dhongi rinozivawo parinopirwa zvokudya nomuridzi waro asi Isiraeri haimboziva zvayo, vanhu vangu havambonzwisisa.’ ”" 
Isaiah1:4 Zvichakuwanai zvenyu rudzi rwavanhu vezvitadzo! Iyemi vanhu vazere uipi, imi zvizukuru zvavaiti vezvakaipa, vana vane muitiro wakaora. Makandiramba imi, ini Tenzi, mukandishora ini Anoera weIsiraeri, mukanyatsondipa zvenyu gotsi." 
Isaiah1:5 Munodirei kuti shamhu irambe iri pamusana wenyu, zvaunodai kuramba makapanduka? Musoro wase wanyeka namaronda, mwoyo wako wose wachiti rukutu." 
Isaiah1:6 Kubvira pasi petsoka kusvikira pamusoro hapana papenyu, dzangova mbonje namavanga, angova maronda ari kubuda ropa asina kusvinwa kana kusungwa kana kupfaviswa zvako namafuta." 
Isaiah1:7 Nyika yenyu yangova nyikawo zvayo maguta enyu aririmiswa nomoto nyika yenyu yarozvwa namabvakure, yangova nyika sokunge yakurirwa namabvakure imi makatarisa." 
Isaiah1:8 Iwe mukunda weZioni Jerusaremu, wasara wangove sekatumba kemumunda wamagirepisi sakadushwa kari mumunda wamagaka seguta rakombwa." 
Isaiah1:9 Dai Tenzi wehondo nehondo asina kutisiyira zvake chitsama chavakapunyuka, tingadai takaita hweSodhomu kana kuita hweGomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Chiteererai munzwe shoko raTenzi, iyemizve vatongi veSodhomu! Teererai munzwe mutemo waMwari wedu iyemizve vanhu veGomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Ndinei ini nokuwanda kwezvibayiro zvenyu? Mipiro yokupisa yehondohwe neyemafuta emhuka dzakakodzwa zvandifinha ini; handisisiri kufadzwa neropa rehandira kana rehwayana kunyange rezvikotora." 
Isaiah1:12 Ipo pamunouya kwandiri kuzonamata, ndiani chaizvo anenge achida kuti muzotsokodzere zvenyu nhandare dzangu?" 
Isaiah1:13 Chiregai kunge muchauya nemipiro isina maturo rusenzi runondisemesa. Mazuva enyu okugara kweMwedzi namaSabata nemisangano yamunokokerana kukanyanisa ikoku, nokuti musangano mukuru wezvokunamata pamwechete nouipi, zvandifinha." 
Isaiah1:14 “Mazuva Makuru enyu oKugara kwoMwedzi namazuva makuru akatemwa, mwoyo wangu hauzvidi. Kwandiri yave nhamo chaiyo yokuzvitakura, ndaneta ini nokuzvitakura." 
Isaiah1:15 Pamunosimudza maoko mudenga ini ndichatarisa rutivi, kunyange pamunogoorera kunamata handiteereri, maoko enyu azere ropa." 
Isaiah1:16 Shambai muzvichenese, bvisai zviito zvenyu zvakaipa mumaziso mangu. Kandai pasi uipi." 
Isaiah1:17 Dzidzai kuita zvakanaka, onai kuti kuri kutongwa zvino ruenzaniso vanodzvinyirira vanhu ngavagadziridzwe. Miririrai nherera muchireverera chirikadzi.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Kana madaro mochiuya zvenyu titaurirane, kunyange zvazvo zvitadzo zvenyu zvakatsvuka seropa, zvichati mbu-u kuchena somukaka, kunyange zvakati piriviri kutsvuka zvichati mbu-u kuchena sedonje." 
Isaiah1:19 Kana mukada zvokuteerera muchadya zvinhu zvakanaka zvenyika. 
Isaiah1:20 Asi mukaramba muchipanduka, bakatwa richakutsakatisai nokuti ndini Tenzi ndazvireva nomuromo wangu.”" 
Isaiah1:21 Zvauya sei chokwadi kuti guta rakanga rakatendeka riite senzenza kudai guta rakanga rizere noruenzaniso. Ururami ndomaiva mumusha mahwo asi zvino mava memhondi. 
Isaiah1:22 Sirivha yako haisisina maturo, waini yako yashapiswa nemvura." 
Isaiah1:23 Machinda ako vapanduki neshamwari dzembavha Munhu wose ava kutarisira pfumbamuromo, ava kungomhanyira kupiwa zvipo, havamiririre nherera nhamo dzechirikadzi, mumusoro hadzivapindi." 
Isaiah1:24 Naizvozvo Tenzi anotaura, iye Tenzi wehondo nehondo, iye Samasimbaose weIsiraeri achiti, “Chiregai zvenyu muchiona, ndochipedzera hasha dzangu pavanhu vanondivenga ndichitsividza mhandu dzangu." 
Isaiah1:25 Nesimba roruoko rwangu ndava kukupindukirai! Zvose zvisina maturo mavari ndichanyatsozvinyungurutsa ndichibvisa zvose zvisina kunaka mauri. 
Isaiah1:26 Ndichadzosera vatongi vako sapakutanga paye namakurukota ako sapamavambo paya. Mushure mezvo uchazonzi guta rakarurama guta rakatendeka.” 
Isaiah1:27 Zioni richanunurwa noruenzaniso, vanopinduka vachiponeswa pamusana poururami." 
Isaiah1:28 Asi vapanduki navatadzi vachaparadzwa pamwechete, vanofuratira Tenzi vachatsakatiswa." 
Isaiah1:29 Ndinodaro nokuti zvokufarira mioku yokunamata zvichakunyadzisai; muchanyara namapindu enyu amakatsaura; 
Isaiah1:30 nokuti muchaita somuti womuoku unowuna mashizha, sebindu risina mvura." 
Isaiah1:31 Mikuru yacho ichaita setsotso, basa rake richiita sakamoto kubarika. Zvose zviri zviviri zvichatsva pamwechete, pagoshaya anogona kuzvidzimura." 
Isaiah2:1 Zvinhu zvakaoneswa Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi zvakanangana nenyika yokwaJudha neguta reJerusaremu," 
Isaiah2:2 Zvichazoitika pamazuva ari kuuya kuti gomo reTemberi yaTenzi richanyatsoti dzu-u pamusoro pemamwe makomo zvokupfuurira zvikomo kureba marudzi ose achakotonokera kwariri; 
Isaiah2:3 ndudzi dzavanhu dzisingaverengeki dzichauyako dzichiti, “Uyai tikwire kugomo raTenzi, kuTemberi yaMwari waJakobho atidzidzise nzira dzake kuti tigofamba mumakwara ake.” Ndinodaro nokuti muGomo reZioni ndimo munobva mutemo uye shoko raTenzi rinobva muJerusaremu." 
Isaiah2:4 Achatonga marudzi ose evanhu achienzanisa mhosva dzendudzi dzavanhu dzakawanda; vachapfura mapakatwa avo vachiaita miromo yemagejo, mapfumo vachiaita majeko okupemhenesa. Hakuna rudzi ruchazosimudzira rumwe rudzi zvarwo bakatwa, zvokudzidzisana kurwa hondo pachange pasisina." 
Isaiah2:5 Douyai nhaimi vemba yaJakobho tifambe muchiedza chaTenzi. 
Isaiah2:6 Chiripo ndechokuti imi makaramba vanhu venyu, imba yaJakobho pamusana pokuti mavari muzere vashoperi vokumabvazuva nevanofembera namaminimini sevaFirisitia uye vanotorovana zvavo maoko nevechirudzi." 
Isaiah2:7 Nyika yavo izere nesirivha nendarama, upfumi hwavo hauverengeki. Nyika yakazara namabhiza, ngoro dzavo dzehondo hadziverengeki." 
Isaiah2:8 Nyika yavo izere zvifananidzo zvokunamata vanopfugamira basa ravakaita namaoko avo zvinhu zvavakaita ivo neminwe yavo. 
Isaiah2:9 Ipapo munhu anoninipiswa, munhu anodukupiswa. Musavaregerere zvitadzo zvavo!" 
Isaiah2:10 Pindai mubako, hwandai muvhu, muhwande hasha dzaTenzi muhwande mbiri youkuru hwake." 
Isaiah2:11 Kutarisa kwomunhu kune kuzvikudza mukati, kuchadukupiswa kuzvikudza kwomunhu kuchininipiswa. Tenzi ndiye chete acharumbidzwa musi iwoyo." 
Isaiah2:12 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi wehondo nehondo, ane zuva rake, zuva raachaworora kudada kwose nokuzvikudza achiwororawo zvose, manyawi nokuzvitutumadza." 
Isaiah2:13 Zuva raachaworora miti yose yemisidhari yokuRebhanoni ina manyawi, inozvitutumadza achiworora miti yose yemioku yokuBhashani" 
Isaiah2:14 achiwororawo makomo marefu ose nokuworora zvikomo zvose zvakati dzu-u kumira. 
Isaiah2:15 Achaworora nharire ndefu yose yose nokuwororawo guta rose rakavakirwa netsvingo 
Isaiah2:16 achiworora ngarava dzose dzokuTarishishi kuworora zvinhu zvose zvinoyevedza zvakaitwa noumhizha. 
Isaiah2:17 Kuzvikudza kwomunhu kuchaninipiswa kuzvitutumadza kwomunhu kuchadukupiswa Tenzi ndiye chete acharumbidzwa musi iwoyo. 
Isaiah2:18 Zvezvifananidzo zvokunamata izvi zvichanyatsopera. 
Isaiah2:19 Vanhu vachapinda mumapako ematombo nomuninga dzepasi apa vachihwanda kutyisa kwaTenzi nokuhwanda mbiri youkuru hwake paachasumukira nyika kuzoidederesa. 
Isaiah2:20 Musi iwoyo vanhu vacharasa zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvesirivha nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvendarama zvavakanga vazvigadzirira kuti vapfugamire vachizvirasira kunhuta nokuturemwaremwa 
Isaiah2:21 kuti vapinde mumapako amatombo nomumitswe yamazitombo vohwanda kutyisa kwaTenzi vachihwanda mbiri youkuru hwake paachasumukira nyika kuzoidederesa. 
Isaiah2:22 Siyanai nomunhu anongovawo zvake nemweya wokufema mumhuno nokuti chii chaari chaicho? 
Isaiah3:1 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo ava kubvisa muJerusaremu nemaJudha zvose zvinovararamisa nezvinovatsigira zvinoti: chokudya chose chinovararamisa, nechokunwa chose chinovararamisa," 
Isaiah3:2 negamba rose zvaro nomurwi wehondo wose nomutongi wose nomuporofita wose zvake nomushoperi wose zvake nomunhu wose wechikuru 
Isaiah3:3 uye nomutungamiriri wose wechikwata chamakumi mashanu avarwi nomubati wose wechigaro uyewo gurukota rose zvaro negodobori rose roun'anga nenyanzvi yose yezvamazango. 
Isaiah3:4 Ndichaita kuti vakomana zvavo vave ndiwo madzishe avo vatongwe nepwere. 
Isaiah3:5 Vanhu vachabatisana pfumvu chaiyo, munhu woga woga achidaro kuna mumwe wake munhu wose achidaro kune waakagarisana naye wechidiki oitira vakuru misikanzwa, dzenga romunhu richidaro kune anoremekedzwa." 
Isaiah3:6 Kana munhu akatora mukoma kana munun'una womumba achiti, “Iwe unotova nechokupfeka zvako ndiwe ungatova mutungamiriri wedu uye murwi wamatongo uyu utongwe newe zvako.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Pazuva iroro iye achadura pachena kuti, “Handingave ini wokukuponesai, mumba mangu hamuna chokudya kana nechokufuka Hamungandiite mutungamiriri wavanhu,”" 
Isaiah3:8 nokuti Jerusaremu yawondomoka, Judha yakoromoka nokuti zvavanotaura nezvavanoita zvinopesana naTenzi, zvinozvidza kuvapo kwake kuno mukurumbira." 
Isaiah3:9 Iho uso hwavo hunopupurira kuita kwavo kwakaipa. Vanoparidzira chitadzo chavo savanhu veSodhomu, havachivanziridze. Zvichavawana zvavo nokuti nhamo yavo ndeyokuzviparira." 
Isaiah3:10 Taurirai vakarurama kuti zvichavanakira, nokuti vachadya mubayiro wezvavakaita." 
Isaiah3:11 Zvichamuwana wakaipa, zvichamuipira, nokuti zvaakabata namaoko ake ndozvaachaitirwawo." 
Isaiah3:12 Vanhu vangu, vari kuoneswa ndondo nepwere vachitongwa navakadzi vanhu vangu, vatungamiriri venyu vari kukuendesai mutome vachivhiringidza makwara enyu amunofanira kutevera." 
Isaiah3:13 Tenzi ava panzvimbo yake yapadare anosimuka kuti achitonga marudzi. 
Isaiah3:14 Tenzi ava kupinza dare vakuru vakuru pamwechete namakurukota avanhu vake, achivapa mhosva yokuti, “Ndimi makarozva munda wamagirepisi, mudzimba dzenyu mune zvinhu zvamakapamba imi kuvarombo." 
Isaiah3:15 Simba rokutsika-tsika vanhu vangu kudai munoriwana kupi, muchidzungaidza nokupazamisa varombo?” Ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi, Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Isaiah3:16 Tenzi ari kuti, “Pamusana pokuti vanasikana veZioni vanozvikudza vachifamba vakarebesa kwazvo mutsipa vachidingaringa kwazvo nemesomeso vachifamba vachigogodeka, mumakumbo umu, ndarira dzichingwengwereka." 
Isaiah3:17 Tenzi acharova neshamhu yezvisasa musoro wavanasikana veguta reZioni, Tenzi achavaita baravara mumusoro.”" 
Isaiah3:18 Musi iwoyo Tenzi achavabvutira ndarira dzakanaka mumakumbo netsungare mumusoro nenyembe dzinenge mwedzi 
Isaiah3:19 nemhete munzeve namakoza omumaoko namadhuku 
Isaiah3:20 nenguwani namakoza namabhandhi nezvinu zvamafuta okuzora anonhuwirira namazango 
Isaiah3:21 neringi dzomumaoko dzokudhindisa nadzo nemhete dzapamhuno 
Isaiah3:22 nehanzu dzomutambo namajasi namachari namabhegi okubatira mumaoko 
Isaiah3:23 namachira akangwerevera nembatya dzerineni nenguwani nemimbure yokufukidza uso. 
Isaiah3:24 Panze pokuva namafuta okuzora anonhuwirira, pachave nezvinoita gutukutu rokunhuwa; panze pokuva nebhandhi pachave netambo zvayo; panzvimbo pokuva nevhudzi rakanyatsorukwa, pachava nemhanza; panzvimbo pokupfeka gemenzi rinokosha pachapfekwa mbikiza dzamasaga; panzvimbo penyora dzorunako pachava nenyora dzakanyeka." 
Isaiah3:25 Varume venyu vachaurayiwa nebakatwa, magamba enyu achifira kuhondo." 
Isaiah3:26 Dare rokumisuo mikuru kweZioni richahwihwidza kuchema rachiti pasi pwashasha kugara somukadzi asiyiwa achiti dano asina chaakapfeka. 
Isaiah4:1 Zuva iroro kana rasvika, vakadzi vanomwe vacharwidzana pamurume mumwechete vachiti, “Chokudya ndechedu, mbatya tichazvitsvakira, chatinongoda isu ndechekunzi tiri vakadzi vako chete, utinyadzurudzewo.”" 
Isaiah4:2 Musi iwoyo bukira raTenzi richayevedza zvine mukurumbira uye muchero wenyika iyoyi uchava chinhu chokuti vanhu veIsiraeri vanopunyuka utapwa vadade nacho chichivapa mbiri. 
Isaiah4:3 Munhu anenge azosara muZioni achiramba ari muJerusaremu achanzi anoera, wose zvake anenge akanyorwa zita kunzi mugari weJerusaremu." 
Isaiah4:4 Ipapo Tenzi anenge achenura kun'ora kwevanasikana veZioni asuka mhosva yeropa iri mukati meguta reJerusaremu inobviswa nomweya wake wokutonga, nemweya wake wokuroromesa" 
Isaiah4:5 Tenzi achazviratidza pamusoro peGomo rose reZioni napamusoro pemagungano aro, ari mugore, masikati, usiku, ari muutsi nomurimi romoto rinon'aima kupenya kwokuvapo kwaMwari kugoti gude gude pose ipapo sekatenga uye sedumba." 
Isaiah4:6 Uchange uri mumvuri masikati wokudzivirira kupisa nediziro nepokuhwanda mvura yokunaya ine dutu remhepo nemheni. 
Isaiah5:1 Regai ndimboimbira zvangu shamwari yangu rwiyo rwokuda kwaaiita munda wake wamagirepisi Shamwari yangu iyi yakanga iino munda wemagirepisi pachikomo chakanyatsoorera kwazvo. 
Isaiah5:2 Akauwunda akaubvisa mabwe ose akasimamo miti yomugirepisi yakanakisisa kwazvo. Akavaka dara renharirire mukati mawo uye akachera garingiro rokusvinira magirepisi mariri achiutarisira kuti uchabereka magirepisi, asi wakamuberekera indye dzamagirepisi kuvava." 
Isaiah5:3 “Zvino imi vagari veJerusaremu, imi vanhu vokwaJudha ndienzanisireiwo nyaya iri pakati pangu ini Mwari nomunda wangu wamagirepisi." 
Isaiah5:4 “Pane chimwe here chandaifanira kuitira munda wangu wemagirepisi chandisina kuuitira? Pandaiutarisira kuti ubereke magirepisi kwawo wakazoberekerei indye dzamagirepisi kuvava? 
Isaiah5:5 “Zvino chiregai ndikuudzei zvandichaita kumunda wangu wamagirepisi. Ndichapaza ruzhowa rwawo, ugorozvwa. Ndichaputsa rusvingo rwawo utsokodzerwe pasi." 
Isaiah5:6 Ndichauita kuti usare rangova zita chete kuti munda. Handichaupemhena kana kuutimbira Minzwa norukato ndozvichakura zvazvo imomo Ndichaudzawo makore kuti arege kunayisa mvura pauri.” 
Isaiah5:7 Zvino ipapa apa munda wacho wamagirepisi waTenzi wehondo nehondo, ndiyo imba yaIsiraeri. Vanhu ivava vomunyika maJudha, ndivo vacho vaakanyatsosima akatarisira ruenzaniso asi wanei potodeurwa ropa zvapo achitarisirawo kururama asi inzwei mhere!" 
Isaiah5:8 Zvichakuwanai imi, munokumba dzimba nedzimba nokuzviwanira munda nomunda kudzamara pasisina kana nzvimbo muchiita kuti mugare mangova zindoga pakati penyika." 
Isaiah5:9 Tenzi wehondo nehondo akapika ini ndichinzwa nenzeve dzangu kuti, “Dzimba huru dzakanaka idzi dzichasara dzangova matongo asina munhu." 
Isaiah5:10 Munda wamagirepisi unoita gumi remahekita kukura uchange woita marita masere ewaini. Pamabhagidhi mapfumbamwe embeu dzekoroni pachakohwewa koroni inenge yoda kuzara bhagidhi.” 
Isaiah5:11 Vane nhamo vanomukirira rungwanangwana vachiteveredzana nedoro, vachiti tatata naro kusvikira pakati pousiku kusvikira vapengeswa naro!" 
Isaiah5:12 Pamitambo yavo vanenge vaine zvipendani nemadimbwa netambureni nenyere newaini; asi mabasa aTenzi havana hanya nawo kana kumbotarisawo zvavo zvaakaita namaoko ake. 
Isaiah5:13 Saka vanhu vangu vachatapwa pamusana pokushaya kunzwisisa ikoko, vanhu vavo vanoremekedzwa vacho vachifa nenzara, voruzhinji vachinzwiswa nenyota." 
Isaiah5:14 Naizvozvo nzvimbo yavachakabvu yava kumedzera mate ichishama muromo wayo zvakanyanyisa kwazvo kuti imedze zvayo vokumba huru vomuJerusaremu pamwechete nevoruzhinji vacho vezhowezhowe remo rokusasana. 
Isaiah5:15 Vanhu vachadukupiswa vanhu vachaninipiswa navanhuwo vane mutarisiro wokuzvidza, vachaderedzwa." 
Isaiah5:16 Asi Tenzi wehondo nehondo acharumbidzwa nokutonga kwaanoita iye Mwari Anoera acharatidza kuera kwake nokuda kwoururami. 
Isaiah5:17 Hwayana ndopadzichafura zvadzo sokunge dziri kumafuro zvipfuwo zvakakora nembudzana zvichifura zvazvo mumatongo. 
Isaiah5:18 Zvichakuwanai imi munotokweva zvenyu uipi netambo dzounyengedzi munokwekweretsana nechitadzo netambo dzakaita sedzengoro 
Isaiah5:19 muchiti, “Ngaakurumidzeka, ngaachimbidzike kuita zvaanoitazvo tione. Zvaanoda kuti zvacho iye Anoera wacho weIsiraeri ngazviuyeka tizvizivewoka!”" 
Isaiah5:20 Zvichakuwanai imi munoti zvakaipa zvakanaka, zvakanaka muchizviti zvakaipa munosandura rima muchiriita chiedza chiedza muchiita rima muchiisawo zvinovava panzvimbo pezvinotapira zvinotapira muchiisa panzvimbo pezvinovava." 
Isaiah5:21 Vane nhamo vanozviona sevakangwara vanhu vanozviona savakachenjera. 
Isaiah5:22 Zvichakuwanai imi shasha dzokunwa waini imi zviradza zvokudiranisa mhando nemhando dzehwahwa. 
Isaiah5:23 Munopembedza ane mhosva pamusana pepfumbamuromo, munotadzisa munhu asina mhosva kuwana zvaanofanira kuti ave nazvo." 
Isaiah5:24 Naizvozvo sezvinongoita rimi romoto rinopisa zvidzitsi, uye sokumbombomera kunoita uswa murimi romoto, sokudaro midzi yahwo ichaora maruva ahwo agondimuka seguruva nokuti vakaramba mutemo waTenzi wehondo nehondo vakashora shoko reAnoera weIsiraeri." 
Isaiah5:25 Ndokusaka Tenzi akavirukira vanhu vake nehasha, akavasimudzira ruoko rwake rune simba akavarova, makomo akandengendeka zvitunha zvavo zvikaita semarara pakati pemigwagwa. Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo hasha dzake hadzina kupora, muruoko rwake shamhu ichiri mudenga." 
Isaiah5:26 Achaninira kurudzi rwevanhu ruri kure kure chaiko, achivaridzira mheterwa vari uko pasi kwenyika chaiko, rudzi rwavanhu irworwo runobva rwakasika kuuya." 
Isaiah5:27 Pakati pavo hapana akaneta-neta hapana anogamhina, hapana anotsimwaira kana anokotsira kunyange mundya wakaregedzera kana ane tambo dzeshangu dzakadambuka." 
Isaiah5:28 Miseve yavo yakarodzwa, uta hwavo hwakakungwa, matsiko emabhiza avo akaoma sedombo romusarasara, mavhiri acho chamupupuri chaicho." 
Isaiah5:29 Kudzvova kwavo, shumba chaidzo vanodzvova sevana veshumba dzinohon'a dzigobata nyama yadzo dzinoiti piku kutakura kuenda pasina anogona kununura." 
Isaiah5:30 Dzinoihon'erana pazuva iroro sokutinhira kwegungwa. Uchiti ukatarisa kunyika uku unongoona rima chete nenhamo nechiedza chachinzi kwirindindi kudzikatidzwa nerima ravo. 
Isaiah6:1 Mugore rakafa mambo Uziya, ndakaona Tenzi vakagara pachigaro choumambo, chiri pamusoro chakakwirira. Jira regemenzi rake raizvezvera pasi raizadza Temberi." 
Isaiah6:2 Pamusoro pavo pakanga pakamira vatumwa vanonzi maserafimu, serafi roga roga raiva namapapiro matanhatu. Rakanga rakazvifukidza uso namapapiro maviri, namamwe maviri rakazvifukidza makumbo richibhururuka namamwe maviri." 
Isaiah6:3 Aidaidzirana achiti: “Munoera, Munoera, Munoera! Imi Tenzi wehondo nehondo pasi pose pazere nembiri yenyu.”" 
Isaiah6:4 Ugaro hwemba iyi hwokumusuo hwakandengendeka pamusana pezwi rewainge adaidza. Imba iyoi yakazara noutsi. 
Isaiah6:5 Ndakati, “Maiwe-e, maiwe-e zvangu inga ndaparara nokuti ndiri munhu ane miromo yakan'ora uye ndigere pakati pavanhu vane miromo yakan'ora nokuti ini nameso angu ndaona Mambo, Tenzi wehondo nehondo!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Rimwe serafi rakabhururukira kwandiri rakabata mumaoko nembato vhunze romoto rarakatora paatari. 
Isaiah6:7 Rakasvikondigunzva muromo naro rikati, “Tarisa uone wagunzwa muromo nevhunze iri hauchisina mhosva, chitadzo chako charegererwa.”" 
Isaiah6:8 “Ndakanzwa izwi raTenzi richiti, ‘Ndiani wandingatume, ndiani angatiendere?’ Ini ndakati, ‘Ndiri pano. Nditumei ini.’ ”" 
Isaiah6:9 Ivo ndokuti, “Enda utaurire vanhu ava kuti, ‘Zvokuteereresa, regaika zvenyu kuteerera, handiti mungadaro mukazonzwisisa; kana zvokunyatsotarisisa, regaika zvenyu kutarisa handiti mungadaro mukazoona here.’" 
Isaiah6:10 “Zvino iwe chitosindimadza zvako vanhu ivava mwoyo utyorere zvimiti munzeve dzavo uvapfige maziso nokuti vangadaro vakaona nameso avo vakanzwa nenzeve dzavo uye vangadaro vakanzwisisa mumwoyo mavo vakazopindukira kwandiri ndikavaponesa. 
Isaiah6:11 “Ini ndikati, ‘Kusvikira riniko nhai Tenzi?’ Ivo vakati, ‘Kusvikira maguta aparara musisina anogaramo, dzimba dzisisina vanhu, nyikawo yanyatsoparara," 
Isaiah6:12 Tenzi abvisa vanhu avaendesa kurekure, munyika mave namatunhu mazhinji asina vanhu." 
Isaiah6:13 Kunyange zvako kukasara gumi pazana naivo vacharoromeswa somuti womuterebhini kana kuti muoku une chigutsa chinosara chimire kana warigwa.’ ” Chigutsa ichocho ndiyo mbeu inoera. 
Isaiah7:1 Mumazuva aAhazi mwanakomana waJotamu mwanakomana waUziya mambo wokwaJudha, Rezini mambo weSiria naPeka mwanakomana waRemaria mambo wokwaIsiraeri vakauya kuzorwisa guta reJerusaremu asi havana kukwanisa kurikurira." 
Isaiah7:2 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzevemba yaDhavhidhi kuti Siria neEfuremu dzaita rimwe rokuda kukutsirana, iye navanhu vose vakadedera mumwoyo sezvinongoita miti yomusango ichivhuvhutwa nemhepo." 
Isaiah7:3 Tenzi akati kuna Isaya, “Iwe nemwanakomana wako Sheariyashuvhu endai mundosangana naAhazi, kunoperera mugero wokudziva rokumusoro pamugwagwa mukuru wokumunda womusuki wembatya" 
Isaiah7:4 usvikoti kwaari, “Chinyatsonzwisisa, nyarara, rega kutya. Usadedereswe mwoyo pamusana pezvigutsa izvi zviviri zviri kupfungaira pamusana pokutya kuviruka nehasha kwaRezini nekweSiria nekwemwanakomana waRemaria" 
Isaiah7:5 vadai kukufungira zano rakaipa vachiti," 
Isaiah7:6 ‘Handei tindorwisa nyika yokwaJudha tiidederese nokutya. Ngatindoikurira tiite yedu tigadze mwanakomana waTabhieri umambo pakati payo. 
Isaiah7:7 Izvi ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi Mwari.’ Izvozvo hazvisi kuzombomira uye hazvizi kuzomboitika. 
Isaiah7:8 Handiti guta guru reSiria iDhamasikusi, uye musoro weDhamasikusi ndiRezini handiti? (Kusati kwapera makore makumi matanhatu namashanu Efuremu iyi ichaparara kuita ubvurubvuru chaihwo zvokuti ichasara isisiri dzinza)." 
Isaiah7:9 “Uye vokwaEfuremu vanovimba neSamaria, handitiwo musoro weSamaria ndiye mwanakomana waRemaria. Kana iwe usina chokwadi nazvo pamusana paizvozvo haumbopamira.”" 
Isaiah7:10 Tenzi akataurazve kuna Ahazi achiti," 
Isaiah7:11 “Kumbira Tenzi Mwari wako chiratidzo, chingave chakadzika pasi pasi senzvimbo yavachakabvu kana kuti chiri kudengadenga sedenga.”" 
Isaiah7:12 Asi Ahazi akati, “Handidi kukumbira! Handidi kuedza Tenzi.”" 
Isaiah7:13 Iye akati, “Chinzwai imi vemba yaDhavhidhi. Iko kunetsa vanhu kwamunoita hakukukwanirei here zvamunoda kutonetsawo kunyange naMwari wangu?" 
Isaiah7:14 Naizvozvo Tenzi pachavo ndivo vachakupai chiratidzo. Chiteererai munzwe, mhandara yava napamuviri ichabereka mwana mukomana waichatumidza zita rokuti Imanueri." 
Isaiah7:15 Achatosvika pakudya mukaka wakakora nouchi nokuti anenge oziva kuramba chakaipa nokusarudza chakanaka. 
Isaiah7:16 Ndinodaro nokuti mwana iyeyu paachange asati aziva kuramba chakaipa nokusarudza chakanaka, nyika yacho ine madzimambo maviri ari kukudederesai ichasara yangova nyikawo zvayo, isisina munhu." 
Isaiah7:17 “Tenzi achakupinzai imi navanhu venyu nevemba yemadzibaba enyu mumazuva asati ambovapo kubvira nguva yakabva vokwaEfuremu kune wokwaJudha, wacho ari kurehwa apa ndimambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah7:18 “Pazuva iroro Tenzi acharidzira mheterwa nhunzi dziri kunovambira hova dzokuIjipiti, nenyuchi dziri kunyika yeAsiria." 
Isaiah7:19 Dzichauya dzichizomhara mumakoronga akanyura chaizvo emumakomo nomumitswe yakadzika yematombo nomuzvikwenzi zvose zveminzwa nomumafuro mose. 
Isaiah7:20 “Musi iwoyo Tenzi achagusa nechisvo chaanenge akwereta kumhiri kwerwizi rwaYufuratesi chisvo chacho chiri chamambo weAsiria achigusa musoro nevhudzi rokumakumbo chichiwumbura nendebvu. 
Isaiah7:21 Pazuva iroro munhu achange akapfuwa mhou ichiri duku nenhunzvi mbiri dzehwai 
Isaiah7:22 pamusana pokuwanda kwomukaka wadzinenge dzichibudisa; iye achadya zvake mukaka wakakora nokuti munhu wose anenge asara ari munyika ino achadya mukaka wakakora nouchi. 
Isaiah7:23 “Musi iwoyo munda wose wose waimbova nechiuru chimwechete chemiti yemigirepisi chinoita chiuru chimwechete chemari yesirivha yemashekeri, uchanyatsoti memete nemakwenzi eminzwa norukato." 
Isaiah7:24 Vanhu vanenge vava kutoenda kundovhima vaine uta nemiseve nokuti nyika yose ichange yangova minzwa norukato chete. 
Isaiah7:25 Kana zviri zvomuzvikomo maimborimwa nemapadza hamuzombokuenda asi nokutya minzwa norukato kuti kuchange kwava zvako kwokusaidzira mombe kwava kwokutotsokodzerwa zvako nehwai.”
