Isaiah8:1 Tenzi akanditi, “Tora zifendefa guru unyore pariri namavara anogona kuverengwa nomunhu wose zvake kuti, ‘Nyachimbichimbikupambamandikurumidzekutapa.’ ”" 
Isaiah8:2 Ndakatora vanhu vakavimbika vokundipupurira vanoti: mupristi Uriya naZekariya mwanakomana waJebherekiya kuti vazondipupurira. 
Isaiah8:3 Ini ndakazopinda mumba namai muporofita mudzimai wangu vakabva vava napamuviri ndokubereka mwana mukomana. Tenzi ndokuti, “Mutumidze zita rokuti, ‘Nyachimbichimbikupambamandikurumudzekutapa.’" 
Isaiah8:4 Nokuti mwana iyeyo asati ava kugona kuti baba wangu kana kuti amai vangu, upfumi hweDhamasikusi nezvakapambwa neveSamaria zvichatorwa namambo weAsiria zvoendwa nazvo.”" 
Isaiah8:5 Tenzi akanditizve," 
Isaiah8:6 “Pamusana pokuti vanhu ivava ava vakaramba mvura yomuShiroa inoerera zvinyoronyoro vakahuta kudedera Rezini nomwanakomana waRemaria; 
Isaiah8:7 naizvozvo chinzwa, Tenzi ari kuzovaunzira Rwizi runa mafashamo emvura yakawanda ine simba. Rwizi rwacho ndimambo weAsiria nomukurumbira wake wose. Ruchazadza makoronga arwo ose rugofashukira kumahombekombe." 
Isaiah8:8 Ruchatsvaira munaJudha ruchafashukira ruchienda rwakatutumuka zvokusvika mumutsipa. Mwari anesu achatambanudza mapapiro ake zvokutovhamira upamhi hwenyika yenyu iyoyo.” 
Isaiah8:9 Chibatisisai izvi imi marudzi kuparadzwa ndokwenyu. Teererai imi nyika dziri kure gadzirirai hondo asi mukangaidzwe gadzirirai hondo asi mukangaidzwe. 
Isaiah8:10 Ranganai zvamunoda kurangana asi hazvina chimuko temai zvamunoda kutema asi zvamunotema hazvimbomira nokuti Mwari anesu. 
Isaiah8:11 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi akataura kwandiri, ruoko rwake rune simba ruri pandiri, akandiyambira kuti ndisafambe mugwara ravanhu ivava achiti," 
Isaiah8:12 “Zvose zvinenge zvichinzi navanhu ivava ibangano, usazviti ibangano, zvavanotya, usazvitye kana kuva mbwende." 
Isaiah8:13 Asi Tenzi wehondo nehondo, iyeyo ndiye waunofanira kueresa, ndiye waunofanira kutya, ndiye waunofanira kudedera." 
Isaiah8:14 Iye achava nzvimbo inoera neibwe rinogumbura nedombo rinogumbura kudzimba dzose dzokwaIsiraeri dziri mbiri, uye riva nechokuteya nacho vagari vomuJerusaremu." 
Isaiah8:15 Vazhinji vachagumburwa naro vachiwira pasi vachiputsika; vachateyiwa vachibatwa.” 
Isaiah8:16 Ndinopfundira umboo uhwu ndigonamirira mutemo muvadzidzi vangu. 
Isaiah8:17 Ini ndomirira zvangu Tenzi ari kuviga uso hwake kumba yaJakobho uye maari ndimo mune chitarisiro changu. 
Isaiah8:18 Chionai kuti ini navana vandakapiwa naTenzi, tave zviratidzo nemanenji muIsiraeri zvinobva kuna Tenzi wehondo nehondo, anogara paGomo reZioni." 
Isaiah8:19 Kana vachikutii, “Endai kundobvunzira kumidzimu nen'anga dzinoshwinya nokun'urun'uta, vanhu havafanire kundobvunza kuna Mwari wavo here? Vanofanira kundobvunzira kuvakafa here vachiitira vapenyu?”" 
Isaiah8:20 Izvozvi izvi zvinenge zvichinangana nomutemo noumboo hwacho. Kutaura vangataure zvavo saizvozvo asi hazvina chazvinobatsira. 
Isaiah8:21 Ipapo vachatunhaira nenyika vachishungurudzwa kwazvo nenhamo vaine nzara. Vaine nzara kudaro, vachaviruka nehasha vakatuka mambo wavo naMwari wavo vakatarisa kudenga." 
Isaiah8:22 Vachati tarisei pasi, onei matambudziko nerima nokusuruvadzwa nenhamo uye vachakandwa muzarima rakati kwirindindi." 
Isaiah9:1 Asi hapachave nokusuruvara munyika iya yakanga ichitambura. Kare, Mwari akambopinza munhamo nyika yokwaZebhuruni nenyika yokwaNafutari asi munguva iri kuuya achaita kuti nzira yokugungwa inyatsopfumbira, nyika iri mhiri kwaJorodhani muGarirea kugere vechirudzi." 
Isaiah9:2 Vanhu vaifamba murima vaona chiedza chikuru; vanhu vaigara munyika yezarima rorufu, chiedza chavavhenekera." 
Isaiah9:3 Maita kuti rufaro rwavo ruwande mavapa rufaro rwakawanda vari kupembera kufara pamberi penyu sokufarwa kunoitwa pakukohwa sokufara kunoita vanhu pakugovana zvinenge zvapambwa. 
Isaiah9:4 Pamusana pokuti matyora joko raimuremera netsvimbo yokumurova mapfudzi, neshamhu yaiye waimubata zvakaipa, sepazuva riya ramakakurira Midhiani" 
Isaiah9:5 nokuti shangu dzose dzomurwi wehondo dzavanogiga nadzo pasi muhondo nehanzu dzose dzakaumburudzwa muropa dzichapiswa sehuni dzomoto; 
Isaiah9:6 nokuti tazvarirwa mwana, tapiwa mwana mukomana; umambo uchava mumaoko make uye zita rake richanzi, “Gurukotarinoshamisa,” “Mwarisamasimbaose,” “Babanyakugaranokugara,” “Jindarorugare.”" 
Isaiah9:7 Umambo hwake hucharamba huchingoenderera mberi huine rugare rusina mugumo ari pachigaro chaDhavhidhi paumambo hwake kuti hudzike midzi nokuhutsigisa noruenzaniso noururami kubvira zvino kusvikira narini wose. Tenzi wehondo nehondo neshungu dzake achatozviita izvozvo. 
Isaiah9:8 Tenzi atumira vokwaJakobho shoko richasvika munzeve dzaivava vokwaIsiraeri 
Isaiah9:9 vanhu vose vachariziva vokwaEfuremu vagari vokuSamaria vanotaura vachizvikudza vanozvitutumadza vachiti," 
Isaiah9:10 “Zvidhina zvakakoromoka zvazvo, asi isu tichavaka namabwe akavezwa; mikuyu yakatemwa zvayo, asi tichaitsiva nemisidhari isu,”" 
Isaiah9:11 nezvo Tenzi achavamutsira mhandu agovanyandurira vavengi vavo 
Isaiah9:12 zvichiti vaSiria kumabvazuva, vaFirisitia kumadokero miromo yakashama kuti vazhanye Isiraeri. Nokuda kwaizvozvi hasha dzake hadzina kupora uye muruoko rwake shamhu ichiri mudenga." 
Isaiah9:13 Vanhu havana kupindukira kuna iye aivaranga kana kutsvaka Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Isaiah9:14 Ipapo Tenzi achagwishura nhungamiri dzacho muIsiraeri nokuita nhimura vokumuswe ivavo, bazi romurara norutsanga zvarwo pazuva rimwechetero." 
Isaiah9:15 Vakuru vakuru navanoremekedzwa ndidzo nhungamiri dzacho, vaporofita vanodzidzisa zvenhema, ndivo muswe ivavo;" 
Isaiah9:16 nokuti vanotungamirira vanhu ava vanovatungamirira kusiriiko navanotungamirirwa ivavo vanobva vadzungaira. 
Isaiah9:17 Naizvozvo Tenzi haazi kumbozoregerera majaya avo achipunyuka, haasi kuzoitira tsiye nyoro nherera nechirikadzi dzavo nokuti munhu wose zvaMwari haachazvida uye vose vatova vaiti vezvakaipa zvose zvavanotaura nemiromo yavo ndezvoupenzi. Nokuda kwaizvozvi hasha dzake hadzina kupora muruoko rwake shamhu ichiri mudenga." 
Isaiah9:18 Chinondidariso ndechokuti uipi hunopisa somoto hunoririmisa minzwa norukato unotungidza majokochwa esango zvigotogoka gore reutsi mudenga. 
Isaiah9:19 Pamusana pehasha dzaTenzi wehondo nehondo, nyika inororoma kutsva vanhu vachiita sehuni dzomoto pasisina zvokunzwirana tsitsi." 
Isaiah9:20 Vanoti uku norudyi tyorei vachingosara vanayo nzara, ukuwo noruboshwe vachimochira kudya asi havaguti, mumwe nomumwe achidya mumwe wake;" 
Isaiah9:21 vokwaManase vorwisana nevokwaEfuremu, vokwaEfuremu vachirwisana nevokwaManase vose pamwechete vachirwisa vokwaJudha. Nokuda kwaizvozvi hasha dzake hadzina kupora, muruoko rwake shamhu ichiri mudenga." 
Isaiah10:1 Zvichavawana vanotema zvirevo zvisina kururama vanyori vanoramba vachinyora zvirevo zvebasa rechibharo 
Isaiah10:2 kuti vatadzise vasina chavanacho kuwana ruenzaniso, vachipamba varombo muvanhu vangu zvinhu zvavanofanira kuti vawane uye kuti vapambe chirikadzi nokutorera nherera zvinhu zvadzo." 
Isaiah10:3 Muchaita waani musi wokurangwa nedutu remhepo richauya richibva kure kure muchatizira kunaani kwamungawane rubatsiro, upfumi hwenyu muchahusiya kupi?" 
Isaiah10:4 Chenyu imi kunenge kwangova kuti undundu pakati pavasungwa kana kungoti rakata pakati pezvitunha. Nokuda kwaizvozvo hasha dzake hadzina kupora, muruoko rwake shamhu ichiri mudenga." 
Isaiah10:5 Iwe Asiria, shamhu yangu yokunge ndatsamwa, tsvimbo yangu yokunge ndaviruka nehasha" 
Isaiah10:6 ndichakuti uvinge rudzi rwavanhu vasisadi zvaMwari ava, ndichakutuma kuvanhu vandinoda kuranga kuti undopamba nokuvatorera zvinhu nokuvatsokodzera pasi samavhu omumigwagwa." 
Isaiah10:7 Asi izvozvi haasi kumbozvifunga, mumwoyo make izvozvi hazvimo. Chiri mupfungwa dzake kuparadza chete nokutsakatisa ndudzi dzavanhu dzakawanda" 
Isaiah10:8 nokuti anototi, “Inga vatungamiriri vangu vehondo vose madzimambo wani." 
Isaiah10:9 Guta reKarino harina kuitwa zvakaitwa neKarishemeshi here? Ko Hamati harina kuitwa zvakaitwa neAripadhi here? Ko Samaria harina kuita zvakaitwa neDhamasikusi here? 
Isaiah10:10 Sokutambanudzira ruoko rwangu ndichiranga nyika nenyika dzinonamata zvifananidzo, dzine zvifananidzo zvakakura kupinda zveJerusaremu neSamaria" 
Isaiah10:11 ndozvandichaita izvozvi kuJerusaremu nezvifananidzo zvayo sezvandakangoita kuSamaria nezvifananidzo zvaro!” 
Isaiah10:12 Pachapedza Tenzi basa rake rose paGomo reZioni napaJerusaremu, ndicharangira mambo weAsiria kuzvitutumadza nokuzvikudza kwaanoita nokudada kwaanoita achidhadhaira" 
Isaiah10:13 achiti, “Ini noruoko rwangu ndini pano ndakazviita ini nesimba rangu, ndakazviita ini noungwaru hwangu nokuti ndinonzwisisa. Miganhu yedzindudzi dzavanhu ndakaibvisa ini, ndikapamba upfumi hwavo. Sehandira chaiyo, vainge vari pazvigaro zvoumambo ndakavatozomora ini." 
Isaiah10:14 “Ndakawana upfumi hwendudzi dzavanhu sezvinongoita ruoko runenge rwawana dendere reshiri, uye sezvinongoita vanhu kuunganidza mazai akaramwiwa, ndokukukucha zvangu kwandakaita nyika. Hapana akambosimudza bapiro kana kushama muromo kana kuti chwe-e.”" 
Isaiah10:15 “Iro demo ringadhadhairire here munhu anoritemesa, iro soo ringadadire here anorichekesa wacho? Sokunge mubhadha ungavheyese anousimudza, kana kuti tsvimbo ingasimudze iye asiri chimuti!”" 
Isaiah10:16 Naizvozvo Tenzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo achatumira denda rokuperezeka muviri mukati mehweswa chaidzo dzevarwi vake, mukati momukurumbira wake muchapisa sokupisa kunoita moto uri kubvira." 
Isaiah10:17 Mwenje weIsiraeri uchaita somoto. Anoera wake achaita serimi romoto, uchapisa nokuroromesa minzwa yake norukato nezuva rimwechete." 
Isaiah10:18 Masango ake ane mukurumbira neminda yake inopa, Tenzi achaparadza zvose mweya nomuviri, zvichiita somurwere aperezeka muviri." 
Isaiah10:19 Miti yemasango ake ichasara yava mishoma zvokuti mwana muduku angatogonawo kuiverenga. 
Isaiah10:20 Pazuva iroro chitsama chevaIsiraeri vanenge vasara nevemba yaJakobho vakapunyuka rufu vachange vasisazemberane norudzi rwakavarova asi vachazembera pana Tenzi Anoera waIsiraeri pachokwadi. 
Isaiah10:21 Chitsama chichadzoka, chitsama chevokwaJakobho chichadzokera kuna Mwari Samasimbaose" 
Isaiah10:22 nokuti kunyange zvazvo vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri vakawanda sejecha rokumahombekombe kwegungwa, chitsama chavo chete ndicho chichadzoka. Zvokuparadza izvi zvakatotemwa zviri chinhu chizere noururami," 
Isaiah10:23 nokuti Tenzi Mwari wehondo achanyatsopedza kuita zvaakatema mukati menyika yose. 
Isaiah10:24 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, Tenzi wehondo nehondo, “Imi vanhu vangu vagere muZioni musatye zvenyu vaAsiria pavanokurovai netsvimbo yavo vachikusimudzirai shamhu sezvakaita vaIjipiti," 
Isaiah10:25 nokuti mushure mekanguva kadikidiki hasha dzangu dzichapera asi ini nehasha dzangu ndovapindukira kuvaparadza. 
Isaiah10:26 Tenzi wehondo nehondo achavasumudzira shamhu yokuvarova somurovero waakaita Midhiani padombo rokuOrebhu, tsvimbo yake ichange yakatambanudzirwa pamusoro pegungwa achiisimudza sezvaakaita muIjipiti." 
Isaiah10:27 Pazuva iroro mutoro wake uchabviswa pamapfudzi ako; joko rake richatyorwa rigobviswa pamutsipa penyu.” Asiria yakakwidza achibva kuRimoni," 
Isaiah10:28 yakasvika kuAiati, yakapfuura nokuMigironi yakasiya yachengetesa nhumbi dzayo kuMikimashi." 
Isaiah10:29 Yadimura napamupata wegomo yakazorara yava kuGebha, guta reRama radedera vomuGibhia guta rokwaSauro vakatiza." 
Isaiah10:30 Ridza mhere iwe mukunda, guta reGarimu, teerera unzwe nhaiwe Raisha umudaire iwe Anatoti." 
Isaiah10:31 Madhimena ririkutiza vagari vomuGebhimu votizira kundopotera. 
Isaiah10:32 Iye nhasi uno wakare Asiria ichandomira yava kuNobhu ichazunza chibhakera chayo ichikungira gomo romukunda weZioni, chikomo cheJerusaremu chacho." 
Isaiah10:33 Chionai, Tenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo achavakwazhura semapazi nesimba rinotyisa, mazipazi marefurefu achatemerwa pasi uye akati dzu-u mudenga achiarizhira pasi pasi." 
Isaiah10:34 Achatemera pasi nedemo majokochwa amasango, uye Rebhanoni ichaparara pamwechete nemiti yayo mirefu." 
Isaiah11:1 Naizvozvo pachigutsa chokwaJese pachatungira nhungirwa, bukira richamera pamidzi yake." 
Isaiah11:2 Mweya waTenzi uchagara paari Mweya woungwaru newokunzwisisa Mweya unopa zano newesimba Mweya woruzivo newokutya Tenzi. 
Isaiah11:3 Zvokutya Tenzi ndozvaanofarira. Haatonge nezvaanoona nameso chete kana kutevedza zvaanonzwa nenzeve 
Isaiah11:4 asi kuti achatonga varombo zvakarurama achipipirira vatamburi vepanyika uye nyika achairova neshamhu yomuromo wake nefemo romuromo wake anopfuudza vakaipa. 
Isaiah11:5 Ururami ndihwo huchava bhandhe raanosungisa muchiuno chake, kutendeseka kuri bhandhe rake muchiuno." 
Isaiah11:6 Mhumhi ichagarisana zvayo nehwayana mbada icharara zvayo pamwechete nembudzana, mhuru neshumba nechigondora chakakora zviri pamwechetewo, zvichifudzwa zvazvo nemwana muduku." 
Isaiah11:7 Mhou nebere zvichatofura pamwechete vana vazvo vachirara zvavo pamwechete, shumba ichafura sora semombe." 
Isaiah11:8 Mwana ari kuyamwa achatamba zvake pamwena wemhakure ndumurwa ichiisa zvayo ruoko mumwena wechiva. 
Isaiah11:9 Hazvizombokuvadza kana kuparadza mugomo rangu rose rinoera nokuti panyika pachange zvino pazara nokuziva Tenzi sokuzadza kunoita mvura gungwa. 
Isaiah11:10 Pazuva iroro, bukira romudzi wokwaJese richamira sechiratidzo kudzindudzi dzavanhu, iyeyo ndiye achange wototsvagwa nevechirudzi, Nzvimbo yake yokugara ichava nomukurumbira." 
Isaiah11:11 Nomusi iwoyo, Tenzi achatambanudza ruoko rwake kechipiri kununura chitsama chakasara chevanhu vake kubva kunyika idzi dzinoti: Asiria neIjipiti nePatirosi neItiopia neEramu neShinari neHamati nenyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa." 
Isaiah11:12 Achasimudzira marudzi avanhu chiratidzo achikokorodza vasemwi veIsiraeri agounganidza vanhu vokwaJudha vakamwarariswa kubva kumativi mana enyika. 
Isaiah11:13 Pfini dzevokwaEfuremu dzichapera, vanovenga vokwaJudha vachapera. VokwaEfuremu havachazoitira shanje vokwaJudha vokwaJudha havazotambudza vokwaEfuremu" 
Isaiah11:14 asi vachatoita chirwirangwe kurwisa vaFirisitia kumadokera uye pamwechete, vachapamba vanhu vokumabvazuva. Vachaita mubatirapamwe kurwisa Edhomu neMoabhu, vaAmoni vachavateerera." 
Isaiah11:15 Tenzi achanyatsoparadza muromo wegungwa reIjipiti, achavheyesa ruoko rwake pamusoro peRwizi rwacho nemhepo yake inopisa zvakaipisisa kwazvo achirurova achiruparadzanisa kuita tukova tunomwe kuti vanhu vayambuke zvavo vachitsika pasi pakaoma." 
Isaiah11:16 Pachava nomugwagwa mukuru unobva kuAsiria, wokuitira chitsama chavanhu vake vakasara sewakaitirwa vaIsiraeri pavakabuda vachibva kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Isaiah12:1 Musi iwoyo iwe uchazoti “Ndinokutendai imi Tenzi nokuti kunyange makambondishatirirwa zvenyu kushatirwa kwenyu kwakapera mukandinyaradza. 
Isaiah12:2 Tarisai muone, kuti Mwari ndiye ruponeso rwangu, ndinovimba naye handichatyi nokuti iye Tenzi Mwari, ndiye simba rangu, ndiye rumbo rwangu ndiye ava ruponeso rwangu." 
Isaiah12:3 “Muchafara muchiteka mvura mumatsime oruponeso.” 
Isaiah12:4 Pazuva iroro muchati, “Ngatitendei Tenzi tidaidze zita rake tiparidze mabasa ake kumarudzi avanhu tichivazivisa kuti zita rake izita romukurumbira." 
Isaiah12:5 “Ngatirumbidzei Tenzi nokuti akaita zvinoshamisa, pasi pose ngapazvizive." 
Isaiah12:6 Pururudzai muchiimba norufaro imi vagari veZioni nokuti Anoera weIsiraeri ari pakati pedu mukuru.” 
Isaiah13:1 Iri shoko rinorema rakanangana neBhabhironi rezvakaonekwa naIsaya mwanakomana waAmozi: 
Isaiah13:2 Pamhene zvapo pamusoro pechikomo misaipo chiratidzo muzhambarare kudaidzira kwavari muvaninire ruoko kuti vapinde mumisuo mikuru yokuvakuru vakuru. 
Isaiah13:3 Ini pachangu ndatema vanhu vangu vandakazvitsaurira ndikakoka magamba angu okurwa vanozvinzwa kuti vazopedzera hasha dzangu pavanhu ivava. 
Isaiah13:4 Herwo ruzha rwemhomho yavanhu pamakomo runenge rwegurumwandira chairo ravanhu! Hero bongozozo redzinyika, rwamarudzi ari kukokorodzana pamwechete! Tenzi wehondo nehondo ari kuunganidza hondo yavarwi yokurwisa." 
Isaiah13:5 Vanobva kunyika iri kure uko, vachibva kwakaperera denga chaiko, Tenzi nezvombo zvake zvehondo zvokushatirwa kwaakaita kuzoparadza nyika yose zvayo." 
Isaiah13:6 Hwihwidzai kuchema, nokuti Zuva raTenzi rava padyo, iroro richasvika riri zuva rokuparadza kwaSamasimbaose." 
Isaiah13:7 Naizvozvo maoko ose acharukutika munhu wose acharohwa nehana 
Isaiah13:8 zvichivakanhamisa. Vachabatwa nokurwadziwa zvokutodemba, vacharwadziwa somukadzi ari pakusununguka. Vachangoti nde-e kutarisana vazvishayira pazvo zviso zvavo zvichidikitira." 
Isaiah13:9 Hero Zuva raTenzi rouya! Zuva routsinye nokutsamwa nerehasha dzinotyisa rokusiya nyika yava renje nokuparadza vatadzi mairi; 
Isaiah13:10 nokuti nyenyedzi dzedenga negurusvusvu radzo dzichange dzisisavhenekere, zuva richange rakasviba pakubuda kwaro, mwedziwo usisina chiedza chaunopa." 
Isaiah13:11 “Ndicharangira nyika zvivi zvayo uye vatadzi uipi hwavo. Ndichapedza kuzvikudza kwose kwavanozvitutumadza, ndichitonhodza kuzvinyundumadza kwavasingakatare." 
Isaiah13:12 Ndichaita kuti vanhu vave vashoma kupinda ndarama yakanyatsokwenenzverwa. Kuwana vanhu kunenge kwotonetsa kupinda kuwana chidimu chendarama yokuOfiri. 
Isaiah13:13 Naizvozvo ndichaita kuti matenga azunguzike pasi pandengendeke pabve panzvimbo yapo pamusana pehasha dzaTenzi wehondo nehondo pazuva rehasha dzake dzinotyisa. 
Isaiah13:14 Semhara iri kudzingirirwa kana kuti sehwai dzisina anodzikokorodza mumwe nomumwe achaenda kuvanhu vokwake munhu achitizira kunyika yokwake. 
Isaiah13:15 Anenge angowanikwa anobayiwa anenge angobatwa anofa nebakatwa. 
Isaiah13:16 Pwere dzavo dzichapwashurwa vakatarisa dzimba dzavo dzichipambwa vakadzi vavo vachibhinywa. 
Isaiah13:17 “Chionai ndavakuvamutsira vaMidhia vasina hanya nesirivha kana kufarira zvendarama. 
Isaiah13:18 Uta hwavo hucharakasha kuuraya majaya vachange vasina tsitsi norusvava kana kuitira vana tsiye nyoro. 
Isaiah13:19 Bhabhironi, guta rinoshamisa panyika dzose mbiri nechidadiso chevaKaridhea richaita seSodhomu neGomora paakaparadzwa naMwari." 
Isaiah13:20 Hamuzombofa makagarwa kana kumboitwa musha imomo pazvizvarwa zvose zvazvo. Hakuna muArabhu achazomisa tendhe rake imomo hakuna vafudzi vachararisa hwai dzavo imomo. 
Isaiah13:21 Asi muchatorarwa zvamo namakava esango, dzimba dzavo dzichazara namazizi namajijidza. Mhou dzichagaramo uye zvidhoma zvichatambiramo." 
Isaiah13:22 Mapere acharidza zvawo huwi munharire dzavo namakava achihukura, mumizinda yavo inoyevedza. Nguva yaro yatosvika mazuva acho zvemberengera hapasisina.”" 
Isaiah14:1 Tenzi achanzwira Jakobho ngoni achisarudzazve Isiraeri uye achavaita kuti vagare munyika mavo, vatorwa vachazobatana navo kugaramo vagoti kwati kwati kune vemba yaJakobho." 
Isaiah14:2 Vechirudzi ava vachavatora vachivaendesa kwavo uye veimba yaIsiraeri vachavaita vavo munyika yaTenzi sevaranda vavo vechirume nevechikadzi. Vachatapa zvavo vacho vakambovatapa ivavo votonga zvino vaye vokumbovabata zvakaipa. 
Isaiah14:3 Tenzi paachakuzorodzai kumarwadzo enyu nomupfumvu yenyu nepabasa rakaomarara ramaishandiswa," 
Isaiah14:4 muchatotsvinyirawo mambo weBhabhironi muchiti, “Hezvoka, nyakuitira vamwe zvakaipa, zvakuperera kuzvitutumadza nehasha kwapera." 
Isaiah14:5 Tenzi atyoranisa shamhu yomuipi, iyo tsvimbo yamadzishe" 
Isaiah14:6 akarova ndudzi dzavanhu akashatirwa achadakarira kurova chete, achitonga dzindudzi dzavanhu akatsamwa achivaonesa ndondo pasina zvokumbomira." 
Isaiah14:7 Nyika yose yave norugare norunyararo vanhu vachitomboimba zvavo. 
Isaiah14:8 Miti yemisaipurasi yototi toko waro nokufara! Miti yemusidhari yokuRebhanoni yotiwo, ‘Kubvira musi wawakanzi pasi mbombombo nevokutema miti havachambotivinga.’" 
Isaiah14:9 “Nzvimbo yavakafa, yavachakabvu yatozhandanuka kuzochingurana newe, paunosvikako inomutsa vachakabvu kuti vakukwazise vaiva vatungamiriri panyika. Inovasimudza pazvigaro zvavo zvoumambo vose vaimbova madzimambo endudzi dzavanhu." 
Isaiah14:10 Vose vachataurawo kwauri vachiti, ‘Newe wachitiwo rukutu sesu! Tafanana!" 
Isaiah14:11 Kuenda mbiri kwako nomutinhimira wemadimbwa ako zvachinzi pasi mbombombo, munzvimbo yevachakabvu, zvidukutse ndizvo zvava bonde rako, poworara honye ndodzava gumbeze rako.’" 
Isaiah14:12 “Zvakuvingaka! Kutotozomoka mudenga kudai, iwe Nyamatsatsi, hweva yamangwanani zvauya sei kuti unzi pasi rikiti, iyewe waimbombomesa ndudzi dzavanhu," 
Isaiah14:13 waizviti nechomumwoyo, ‘Ndichaita chitundumusere-musere chaicho kukwira kudenga kupfuura nyenyedzi dzaMwari, ndiise chigaro changu choumambo pamusoro, nditi zvangu tendhe kugara pagomo padare ravo riri kuchamhembe uko." 
Isaiah14:14 Ndichakwira kumusoro kwamakute, ndizviite soWokumusorosoro.’" 
Isaiah14:15 Asi waunzwa pasi kunzvimbo yevachakabvu pasi pasi chaipo peGomba. 
Isaiah14:16 Vachakuona vacharamba vakakuti kanha kutarisa vachifunga nezvako vachiti; ‘Ndiye here chokwadi munhu aiita kuti pasi padedere uyu? Aingwendesa dzinyika," 
Isaiah14:17 nyakuita kuti nyika ive segwenga achikurira maguta ayo, vasungwa vake, asingavabvumire kudzokera kumusha?’" 
Isaiah14:18 Madzimambo ose arere zvawo nomukurumbira wawo mumwe nomumwe muguva rake," 
Isaiah14:19 asi iwe warasirwa kunze, kure neguva rako sokusemwa kunoitwa kusvodza, wakomberedzwa navakaurayiwa, vaya vakabayiwa namapakatwa vanoenda mumatombo eGomba sechitunha chiri kutsikirirwa zvacho netsoka." 
Isaiah14:20 Hauzi kuzovigwa sezvavakaitwa pamusana pokuti wakaparadza nyika yako ukauraya vanhu vako. Zvizvarwa zvevaiti vezvakaipa ngazvirege kana kuzombodomwa zita. 
Isaiah14:21 Gadzirirai kuuraya vanakomana vake pamusana pemhosva dzamadzibaba avo, vangadaro vakamukira nyika vakaiita yavo vakazadza pasi pano pose namaguta.”" 
Isaiah14:22 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Ndichavamukira ndigotsakatisa muBhabhironi zita nechitsama chacho chakasara, mwana wose zvake nechizukuru chose, ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndichaiita kuti ive musha wenguruve dzomusango namadziva emvura ndichaitsvaira nomutsvairo wokuparadza ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo.” 
Isaiah14:24 Tenzi wehondo nehondo apika achiti, “Zvandakaronga ndizvo zvichaitika izvozvo uye zvandakati zvinoitwa ndizvo zvinoitika." 
Isaiah14:25 Ndichaparadza vaAsiria munyika mangu ndigoitsokodzera netsoka dzangu joki ravo richibva rabva pavari nomutoro wavo uchibva waturwa pamapfudzi avo.” 
Isaiah14:26 Ichi ndicho chinangwa chakatemwa chakanangana napasi pose uye urwu ndirwo ruoko rwacho ruchine shamhu ichiri mudenga yokuranga marudzi ose avanhu. 
Isaiah14:27 Nokuti Tenzi wehondo nehondo atema izvozvo ndiani achazvidzivisa, ruoko rune shamhu ruchiri mudenga ndiani acharudzora." 
Isaiah14:28 Mugore rakafa mambo Ahazi kwakauya mutoro weshoko iri raiti," 
Isaiah14:29 “Musafare zvenyu vaFirisitia, mose zvenyu muchiti shamhu yaitirova yakatyoka nokuti panzvimbo penyokawo zvayo pava kubuda chiva, vana vacho vachava nyoka dzinobhururuka." 
Isaiah14:30 Asi varombo vokupedzesera vachafura zvavo mumafuro angu vapemhi vachinyatsogarikana, asi ndichauraya dzinde rako nenzara uye chitsama chevako chinenge chasara ndichachiuraya." 
Isaiah14:31 Iwe suo guru hwihwidza kuchema, iwe guta chema. Gwambai nokutya imi vaFirisitia, gwambai imi mose zvenyu. Nokuti kuri kuuya utsi huchibva kuchamhembe muhondo yake imomo hamuna mbwende.”" 
Isaiah14:32 Chii chatichapindura nhume dzavaFirisitia? Tichati Tenzi akavaka guta reZioni, mariri vanhu varo vachawana pokuhwanda." 
Isaiah15:1 Shoko rakanangana neMoabhu. Guta reMoabhu, Ari, raparara nousiku umwechete ndokupararawo kwenyika yeMoabhu ikoko. Guta reKiti raparara nousiku umwechete ndokupararawo kwenyika yeMoabhu ikoko." 
Isaiah15:2 Vanhu vokuDhibhoni vakwira kunzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokunamata kundochema, nyika yeMoabhu inochema guta reNebho neMedhebha, Moabhu inoungudza kuchema, musoro wose wava muparavara vose vaguswa ndebvu." 
Isaiah15:3 Mumigwagwa vanopfeka masaga, vapamusoro pedzimba nomunhandare vanhu vari kubongomora vachimokoteka misodzi." 
Isaiah15:4 Guta reHeshibhoni neEreare ari kuridza mhere, kuchema kwavo kuri kunzwika kunyange kuJahazi. Naizvozvo varwi vokuMoabhu vari kudandaura kuchema vapindwa nokudedera." 
Isaiah15:5 Mwoyo wangu unochema Moabhu, vanhu vayo vanotizira kuZoari, vanosvika kwose nokuEgiratisherishiya nokuti vanokwira mukwidza wokuRuhiti iri mhere chete kuhwihwidza nokunzira yokuHoronaimu vari kuchema kuparadzwa kwavo." 
Isaiah15:6 Mvura yokuNimurimu yakapwa, uswa hwakaoma, bundo hapachisina, hapachisina kana chinyoro." 
Isaiah15:7 Naizvozvo upfumi hwavakawana, vakachengeta vavakutohutakura kuyambuka kaKova Kemushambangwena." 
Isaiah15:8 Mhere yavo iri kusvika kumiganhu yenyika yeMoabhu, kubongomora kwavo kuchisvika kuEgirami kuungudza kwavo kuchisvikawo kuBhierierimu." 
Isaiah15:9 Mvura yokuDhimoni izere ropa asi ndichatounza rimwe rakawanda muDhimoni vanenge vapotera munyika yeMoabhu nechitsama chavo chichange chasaramo ndichavasasadzira shumba. 
Isaiah16:1 Vanhu veMoabhu vari kuguta reSera riri kurenje vakatumira hwayana kumutongi wenyika, kugomo romukunda, guta reZioni." 
Isaiah16:2 Seshiri dziri kupupurika, samanyana amwararidzwa, ndozvangoitawo vakunda veMoabhu kumazambuko aArinoni, vachiti," 
Isaiah16:3 “Tipeiwo mazano mutiitirewo zvino ruenzaniso, mumvuri wenyu uti gude gude sousiku zuva richirova panhongonya, mungovigiridzawo waro vasemwi, musaburitse pachena vanenge vapotera." 
Isaiah16:4 Regai zvenyu vasingadiwe kuMoabhu vambotiwo garei zvavo pakati penyu muve diziro ravo rokuhwanda muparadzi. Pachazenge zvamuperera wokudzvinyirira vamwe uyu, zvokuparadza izvi kusisina, naiye nyakutsokodzera vamwe netsoka atsakatika panyika," 
Isaiah16:5 ndopachagadzikwa chigaro choumambo chichimiswa nenyasha. Pachiri, mumwe akatendeseka wetendhe rokwaDhavhidhi achagarapo. Iyeyo anenge ari munhu anotonga akanangana noruenzaniso uye anokurumidza kuita zvakarurama.”" 
Isaiah16:6 “Takanzwa nezvokuzvikudza kweMoabhu nokudada kukuru kwayaiita; nezvokuzvitutumadza kwayo nokuzvitora kwainoita, nokutafura kwayo kuzvizuwidza kwayo, hakuna chakunobatsira.”" 
Isaiah16:7 Naizvozvo Moabhu ngaizvicheme, rungairai chaizvo kuchema, munhu wose ngaacheme Moabhu, ngavacheme zvambwa zvamagirepisi okuKirihareseti" 
Isaiah16:8 nokuti minda yokuHeshibhoni neminda yamagirepisi yokuSibhuma yosvava, madzishe edzindudzi akakwazhura mapazi ayo aisvika kana nokuJazeru achirasikira nokugwenga uko; nhungirwa dzacho dzichitandira uko nouko dzichitopfuura zvadzo napamusoro pegungwa." 
Isaiah16:9 Naizvozvo ndochema ini sokuchema kuri kuita vokuJazeru, kuchema minda yamagirepisi yokuSibhuma. Ndinonyorovesa nemisodzi, iwe guta reHeshibhoni newe guta reEreare nokuti michero yako nezvaunokohwa muminda zvawirwa nehondo." 
Isaiah16:10 Zvokupembera nokufara izvi zvabviswa mumunda unobereka. Muminda yamagirepisi hamuna rwiyo ruri kuimbwa kana mhururu dzinorira wokusvina waini, mokusvinira hapasisina huro dzepajakwara rokusvina dzachiti zii kunyarara." 
Isaiah16:11 Naizvozvo mweya wangu uri kudandaura sechipendani kuchema Moabhu, nomwoyo wangu uchishungurudzirwa Kiriheresi." 
Isaiah16:12 Moabhu painouya ichizvitambudza kuuya panzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira painouya kunzvimbo yayo inoera kuzonamata, hapana chimuko kwairi." 
Isaiah16:13 Iroro ndiro shoko rakanga rataurwa kare naTenzi rakanangana neMoabhu. 
Isaiah16:14 Asi zvino Tenzi anoti, “Mumakore matatu, sezvinoita makore omunhu anoita marikicho, mbiri yeMoabhu ichashorwa kunyange zvazvo aine gurumwandira ravanhu iroro, vachapunyuka rufu vacho vachange vari vashoma dziri ndonda zvadzo.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Shoko rakanangana neDhamasikusi chinzwai munzwe, “Dhamasikusi, zvokuva guta izvi zvichariperera richava murwi wematongo." 
Isaiah17:2 Maguta aAroeri achagara asisina munhu achatenge zvawo ava ezvipfuwo zvicharara zvazvo pasi, pasisina anozvivhundutsira." 
Isaiah17:3 Guta retsvingo richaparara kwaEfuremu kuDhamasikusi umambo huchabviswa chitsama chichasara cheveSiria chichaita zvakaitika kumukurumbira wevanhu vokwaIsiraeri,” ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Isaiah17:4 “Pazuva iroro mukurumbira wokwaJakobho uchanyatsoti pasi mbombombo. Kukora ikoko kuchapera. 
Isaiah17:5 Zvichaita somunda wakohwiwa hura dzimire, wakohwiwa hura idzodzo namaoko, somunhu anofuhwa hura idzodzo mubani reRefaimu." 
Isaiah17:6 Hongu zvokufuhwa zvichasarawo zvirimo sezvinongoitawo muti womuorivhi kana wagumwa. Maorivhi maviri kana matatu anosara pabazi rokumusorosoro, michero mina kana mishanu pamapazi omuti womuchero.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari weIsiraeri." 
Isaiah17:7 Pazuva iroro vanhu vachave nehanya nomusiki wavo votarisa kune mururami weIsiraeri. 
Isaiah17:8 Vanenge vasisina hanya neatari dzavakavaka namaoko avo vasisatarise kune zvinhu zvakaitwa neminwe yavo, zvingave maAshera kana atari dzorusenzi." 
Isaiah17:9 Pazuva iroro maguta avo akasimba achaita samatongo avaHivhi naavaAmori avakatiza pamusana pavaIsiraeri, achava renje." 
Isaiah17:10 Ndinodaro nokuti imi makakanganwa Mwari ruponeso rwenyu mukakanganwa dombo ramunopotera. Naizvozvo kunyange mukadyara mbesa dzakanaka kana kusima migirepisi yavamwari vokumwe 
Isaiah17:11 kunyange mukadziitisa kuti dzikure nezuva ramunodzidyara, muchidziitisa kuti dzitumbuke mangwanani ezuva ramunodzidyara zvokudzikohwa zvichakunzvengai ava mazuva enhamo nokurwara kusingarapiki." 
Isaiah17:12 Mai we-e, mutsindo wendudzi dzavanhu vakawanda unotinhira samaungira egungwa, mai we-e kutinhira kwendudzi dzavanhu vanoriridza sokutinhira kwemvura zhinji" 
Isaiah17:13 ndudzi dzavanhu dzinoriridza sokutinhira kwemvura zhinji. Vachadzitsiura dzigoti ware kutizira kure sehundi inopupurutswa nemhepo mugomo sechamupupuri chedutu remhepo 
Isaiah17:14 kumanheru heyo hondo inotyisa, mambakwedza hapasisina aripo ndiwo mugove wavanotipamba mugove wavanotitorera zvinhu zvedu." 
Isaiah18:1 Hameno zvayo nyika yamapapiro anobhabhama iri mhiri kwenzizi dzokuItiopia 
Isaiah18:2 inotumira vamiririri nomuna Nairi nomagwa enhokwe pamvura, ichiti, “Chiendai imi nhumwa dzinokurumidza kuvanhu varefu vane ganda rinotsvedzerera vanhu vanotyiwa padyo nokurekure rudzi rune simba runokurira rune nyika yakakamuraniswa nehova." 
Isaiah18:3 “Imi mose vagari vapasi pose imi mugere panyika, kana pamakomo pasimudzwa mucherechedzo, tarisai, kana kwaridzwa bhosvo, teererai" 
Isaiah18:4 nokuti Tenzi ati kwandiri, ‘Ndichatarisa chinyararire ndiri kwandigere sokupisa kwezuva masikati machena, souma hwenguva yokupisa yapakukohwa.’" 
Isaiah18:5 “Ndinodaro nokuti, panongoti kutumbuka perei ruva racho rava girepisi ratookuibva, achacheka nhungirwa dzacho nejeko rokupemhenesa, mapazi akatandavara achiatema." 
Isaiah18:6 Vose zvavo vachasiyiwa vave nyama yeshiri dzomumakomo nokuzvikara zvapasi pano. Vachasaruka vachidyiwa, muzhizha vachichochonhwa neshiri, pachirimo vachibubunwa nezvikara zvesango." 
Isaiah18:7 “Panguva iyo mipiro ichaunzwa kuna Tenzi wehondo nehondo zvichibva kuvanhu varefu vane ganda rinotsvedzerera, vanhu vanotyiwa padyo nokurekure, rudzi rune simba runokurira, rune nyika yakakamuraniswa nehova vachiuya nayo kuGomo reZioni nzvimbo ine zita raTenzi wehondo nehondo.”" 
Isaiah19:1 Shoko rakanangana neIjipiti. Tarirai muone “Tenzi agere pagore riri kumhanya chaizvo achienda kuIjipiti, zvifananidzo zvokunamata zveIjipiti zvichadedera nokuvapo kwake, vaIjipiti vachadumbirwa nazvo." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndichaita kuti vaIjipiti vamukirane, vacharwisana pachavo, mumwe achirwisana nomumwe wake, maguta achirwisana pachawo, madzimambo achirwisanawo pachawo," 
Isaiah19:3 VaIjipiti vacharasiswa mwoyo, ndichavhiringidza mazano avo. Ivo ndopavachaenda kundobvunzira kuzvifananidzo zvokunamata, nokuna vano un'anga hwokufembera namaminimini vachindobvunzirawo kumidzimu nokun'anga." 
Isaiah19:4 Iniwo ndopandicharamwira vaIjipiti ivavo, mumaoko atenzi ano mwoyo wakaoma, vatongwe namambo anotyisa ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Mvura yomuna Nairi ichapwiswa rwizi ruchanyatsoti papata kuoma. 
Isaiah19:6 Migero yayo ichava gutukutu kunhuwa, tukova tunodira muna Nairi yeIjipiti tuchaserera tugopwa, tsanga nenhokwe dzichaora." 
Isaiah19:7 Kuchaita madzvanga madzvanga muna Nairi kumahombekombe aNairi, zvose zvinodyarwa pedyo naNairi zvichaoma zvigopeperetswa pasare pasisina." 
Isaiah19:8 Varedzi vachaungudza vachichema, vose zvavo vanokanda chirauro muna Nairi vachanyatsoti gojoto, ivavo vanokanda usvasvi mumvura." 
Isaiah19:9 Vashandi vanokuruza rwodzi rweFurakisi, vachaora mwoyo pamwechete navanoruka machira nedonje jena." 
Isaiah19:10 Varuki vamachira vachadumbirwa nazvo vashandi varasa mwoyo. 
Isaiah19:11 Machinda okuguta reZoani, mazipenzi chaiwo evanhu, ngwazi dzomakurukota aFarao dzinopa mazano asina nomusoro wose. Ndicho chii chamunotaura kuna Farao muchiti, “Ini ndiri mwanakomana wengwazi, mwanakomana wamadzimambo echinyakare?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Ko zvino ngwazi dzenyu dziripi? Ngadzichikutauriraika, dzifanokuzivisai zvarongwa kuitwa kuIjipiti naTenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Isaiah19:13 Machinda okuguta reZoani ava mapenzi avanhu uye machinda okuguta reMemufisi, azofuririkana; vakuru vakuru vomumadzinza eko vateteretsa Ijipiti." 
Isaiah19:14 Tenzi apinza mukati mayo mweya wenyonganyonga vakaita kuti Ijipiti idzedzereke mune zvose zvazvo zvainoita sokudzadzarika kunoita chidhakwa mumarutsi acho. 
Isaiah19:15 Hapana chichagona kuitwa muIjipiti nenhungamiri nevokumuswe vacho kana kuitwa nebazi romurara kunyange norutsanga zvarwo. 
Isaiah19:16 Pazuva iroro vaIjipiti vachaita savakadzi chaivo vodedera kutya simba roruoko rwaTenzi wehondo nehondo runenge rwozunzwa pamusoro pavo. 
Isaiah19:17 Nyika yokwaJudha ichava chazezesa kuvaIjipiti. Anongoinzwa chete ichidomwa achatya pamusana pedzavarongerwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Isaiah19:18 Musi iwoyo munyika yeIjipiti muchava namaguta mashanu anotaura rurimi rweKanani vachitopika naTenzi wehondo nehondo. Rimwe rawo richanzi, “Gutarezuva.”" 
Isaiah19:19 Nomusi iwoyo kuchava neatari yaTenzi mukati menyika yeIjipiti nomusimboti waTenzi kumuganhu kwayo. 
Isaiah19:20 Zvichange zviri chiratidzo chinopupurira Tenzi wehondo nehondo munyika yeIjipiti pavanochema kuna Tenzi pamusana pevanodzvinyirira vamwe iye anozovatumira mununuri achavadzivirira achivaponesa. 
Isaiah19:21 Tenzi achazvizivisa kuvaIjipiti, vaIjipiti vachazivawo Tenzi pazuva iroro vagomupfugamira nokupira kwaari zvibayiro nomupiro wokupisa. Vachapika mhiko kuna Tenzi vachidzichengeta." 
Isaiah19:22 Tenzi acharova Ijipiti nedenda, airova kudaro, achazoiporesa, ivo vachazotendeukira kuna Tenzi, iye achazonzwa zvichemo zvavo agovarapa." 
Isaiah19:23 Nezuva iroro kuchava nomugwagwa mukuru unobva kuIjipiti uchienda kuAsiria. VaAsiria vachauya muIjipiti, vokuIjipiti vachiendawo kuAsiria uye vaIjipiti vachanamata pamwechete nevaAsiria." 
Isaiah19:24 Pamusi iwoyo Isiraeri ichava yechitatu kunyika yeIjipiti neAsiria dzichange dzava chikomborero chaicho pakati penyika," 
Isaiah19:25 Tenzi wehondo nehondo, dzaachakomborera achiti, “Makakomborerwa zvenyu imi vanhu vangu vaIjipiti, nemi vaAsiria vandakasika namaoko angu, nemi vaIsiraeri nhaka yangu.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Mugore rakatumwa mutungamiriri mukuru wehondo naSarigoni mambo weAsiria akaenda kuAshidhodhi akarirwisa, ndokurikurira." 
Isaiah20:2 Panguva iyoyo, Tenzi akanga afanotaura nokuna Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi kuti, “Enda unosunungura mutikisha wamasaga uubvise muchiuno mako, ubvise shangu dzako mumakumbo.” Akaita saizvozvo, ava kufamba ari mutwi asina shangu," 
Isaiah20:3 Tenzi akati, “Sokufamba kwakaita Isaya muranda wangu ari mutwi asina kupfeka shangu kwamakore matatu nechiratidzo kuIjipiti neItiopia" 
Isaiah20:4 ndizvo zvichaita mambo weAsiria. Achatinha nhapwa dzevaIjipiti nevaItiopia achienda nadzo vose zvavo vakuru navadiki vari mutwi vasina shangu mumakumbo magaro ari pachena, chinhu chinonyadzisa muIjipiti." 
Isaiah20:5 Ipapo zvichavapazamisa misoro vachitonyarira Itiopia yavaivimba nayo neIjipiti chidadiso chavo. 
Isaiah20:6 “Vagari venyika yomumahombekombe megungwa muno, pazuva iroro vachati, ‘Tarisai muone zvaitika kuvanhu vaya vataivimba navo, kuvanhu vaye kwataitizira kundobatsirwa kuti tinunurwe mumaoko mamambo weAsiria! Zvino isu tingapapunyuke sei ipapa?’ ”" 
Isaiah21:1 Herino shoko rakanangana nerenje rokugungwa. Sokutsvaira kunoita chamupupuri munyika yeNegevhu chinouya chichibva kugwenga, chichibva kunyika inotyisa kwazvo." 
Isaiah21:2 Ndakaziviswa nezvechiratidzo chakaomarara, mupambi wopamba, muparadzi woparadza. Eramu enda uku, Midhia komba kutura mafemo kwose kwawakakonzera ndichakupedza." 
Isaiah21:3 Ipapo ndarwadziwa kwazvo zvokuti muchiuno mangu, handichagona. Ndabatwa ini namarwadzo samarwadzo omukadzi ari kusununguka. Ndakotamiswa zvokuti handichanzwa, ndatopazamiswa nazvo zvokuti handichaona." 
Isaiah21:4 Ndatenderera musoro, nhamo yandishayisa chokuita. Mambakwedza andanga ndichichemera andisandukira akava nguva yokuhuta kudedera." 
Isaiah21:5 Hezvo vogadzikira chokudya pateburu vowaridza dzichari vachidya vachinwa zvavo. “Mukai machinda, zorai nhoo mafuta,”" 
Isaiah21:6 nokuti Tenzi akanditi, “Enda unoisa munhu nharirire azivise zvaanenge aona." 
Isaiah21:7 Saka kana aona vachairi vengoro dzehondo dzamabhiza akabopwa ari maviri maviri navanhu vakatasva madhongi navakatasva ngamera, ngaanyatsoteerera, ateererese chaizvo.”" 
Isaiah21:8 Ipapo nharirire iya yakati, “Tenzi, ini ndimire panharire pano pandinoswera ndiri masikati nousiku hwose ndopandinenge ndiri.”" 
Isaiah21:9 Zvino havo vauya vachairi vengoro dzehondo dzamabhiza akabopwa ari maviri maviri! Iye akati, “Yaparara, yaparara Bhabhironi pamwechete nezvifananidzo zvose zvavamwari vayo azvibwadamurira pasi.”" 
Isaiah21:10 Nhai nyakupurwa, nyakuurutswa wangu zvandanzwa kuna Tenzi wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri, ndozvandinokuzivisa." 
Isaiah21:11 Herino shoko rakanangana neDhuma. Mumwe ari kudaidza kwandiri ari kuSeiri, ari kuti, “Nharirire we-e kusvikira riniko nousiku ihwohwu? Nharirire we-e, kusvikira riniko nousiku ihwohwu?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Mutariri ndokuti, “Mangwanani achauya uye usiku huchauya zvakare. Kana uchida kuzobvunza, dzoka zvako uzobvunza.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Herino shoko rakanangana neArabhia. Mumajokochwa amasango omuArabhia ndomamuchatogara, imi vamadungwerungwe engamera vokwaDhedhani" 
Isaiah21:14 ane nyota muigirei mvura, anenge apotera muchingureiwo nechokudya, imi vagari venyika yokwaTema," 
Isaiah21:15 nokuti vakatiza mapakatwa, vachitiza bakatwa rakaburitswa muhara, nouta hwakanga hwatatamurwa, kuri kutiza hondo yatsviriridza kurwiwa" 
Isaiah21:16 nokuti Tenzi akanditi, “Gore risati rapera sezvakangoita makore amarikicho mbiri yose yokwaKedhari ichapera kuti hwa." 
Isaiah21:17 Uye marimbirimbi evarwi vemiseve vokumagamba ehondo okuvanakomana vokwaKedhari vachava vashoma nokuti Tenzi Mwari weIsiraeri ndizvo zvaareva.” 
Isaiah22:1 Herino shoko rakanangana neBani Rechiratidzo. Ndochii chamaita ichochi chokukwira mudenga, mose zvenyu pamatenga pedzimba kudaro" 
Isaiah22:2 iyewe uzere mheremhere guta rebongozozo guta ramafaro? Vako vakaurayiwa, havana kuita zvokuurayiwa nebakatwa kana kufira muhondo." 
Isaiah22:3 Vatongi vako vose zvavo vati ware kutiza pamwechete, asi vabatwa pasina kana kumboshandiswa uta. Vako vose vangowanikwa, vabatwa, kunyange vanga vatizira kure kure." 
Isaiah22:4 Naizvozvo ini ndati, “Ndifuratirei zvenyu ndicheme zvangu misodzi yeropa. Regai kuzvinetsa nokundinyaradza pamusana pokuparara kwomukunda wevanhu vokwangu, Jerusaremu.”" 
Isaiah22:5 Chiripo ndechokuti, Tenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo ane zuva rebongozozo nokutsokodzera nemanyongori mubani rechiratidzo, rokuwondomorera pasi rusvingo nokudaidzira kumakomo." 
Isaiah22:6 Eramu ndoyakapakata mukutu iine ngoro dzehondo nevarwi vemabhiza, uye vaKiri voisa nhoo pachena." 
Isaiah22:7 Mapani enyu akanakisisa achiti shutu nengoro dzehondo, varwi vemabhiza vamira panzvimbo dzavo pamusuo mukuru." 
Isaiah22:8 Abvisa changa chichidzivirira vokwaJudha. Nomusi iwoyo makandotarisa zvombo zvokurwisa nazvo zvokuImba yezvokuimbayesango 
Isaiah22:9 mukaona kuti zvikanganiso zveGuta raDhavhidhi zvakanga zvakawanda mukandoteka mvura yokudziva rezasi. 
Isaiah22:10 Mukaverenga dzimba dzomuJerusaremu mukapaza dzimba movakiridza rusvingo kurusimbisa. 
Isaiah22:11 Makagadzira zigaringiro rokuchengetera mvura pakati petsvingo mbiri rokubata yomudziva rekare riya. Asi hamuna kutarisa kwaari iye nyakuriita kana kumbokendenga zvenyu nezvaiye akaronga kareko kuti rizoitwa. 
Isaiah22:12 Pazuva iroro Tenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo akati vanhu vaungudze kuchema vaine miparavara vakapfeka hanzu dzamasaga. 
Isaiah22:13 Hoko kupembera nokusasana pachibayiwa mombe nehwai nokudyira-dyira nyama nokunwira-nwira waini vachiti, “Ngatidyei tinwe nokuti mangwana tinofa.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Tenzi wehondo nehondo pachake akandizivisa ndikazvinzwa nenzeve dzangu idzi kuti, “Havambofa vakaregererwa uipi ihwohwu vanofa vakadaro,” ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo." 
Isaiah22:15 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Chiuya uende kuna Shebhuna mutariri wokumuzinda umubvunze kuti," 
Isaiah22:16 ‘Chii chauri kuita pano? Waunovimba naye ndiani chaizvo kutozvicherera zvako guva mudombo kudai, iwe unotozvicherera zvako guva mudombo pamusorosoro kudaro uchitozvivezera imba mudombo nhai?’" 
Isaiah22:17 Chinzwa, Tenzi achanyatsokuti hupukupu kukukanda kure, iyewe mukweshwa werume. Achanyatsokuti dzvi kukubata agokuvheyesa chamudzungururu" 
Isaiah22:18 agokupotsera sebhora munyika yakapamhama. Ikoko ndokwauchafira, ikoko ndokuchava nengoro dzako dzehondo dzamandiriri, iyewe nyakufumura imba yatenzi wako." 
Isaiah22:19 Ndichakudzinga pabasa, ndigokubvisa pachigaro chako chaunacho." 
Isaiah22:20 Pazuva iroro ndichadaidza muranda wangu Eriyakimu mwanakomana waHirikiya 
Isaiah22:21 ndigomupfekedza gemenzi rako bhanhire rako ndirisunge paari ndigoisa ukuru hwako mumaoko ake, iye achizova baba wavagari vomuJerusaremu nevemba yokwaJudha." 
Isaiah22:22 Iye ndiye wandichatakudza pamafudzi basa rokuva nekiyi dzemba yaDhavhidhi. “Kana azarura, hapana anokwanisa kuzarira, Kana azarira hapana anogona kuzurura." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndichamuroverera sehoko panzvimbo yakanyatsosimba, achave noumambo hunopa mukurumbira kuimba yababa vake." 
Isaiah22:24 Vemba yababa vake vachamuti memete vakarembera vose paari vana navazukuru semidziyo midiki yose yomumba kubvira kumakapu kusvikira kuzvirongo zvose zvikuru. 
Isaiah22:25 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, nomusi iwoyo hoko yakanga yarovererwa panzvimbo pakasimba ichazunguzika, ichatemwa igowa. Ipapo mutoro wakanga wakaiswa pairi uchaparadzwa, nokuti ndozvataurwa naTenzi.”" 
Isaiah23:1 Herino shoko rakanangana neguta reTire. Imi ngarava dzokuTarishishi ridzai mhere nokuti guta reTire raparadzwa, harisisina imba kana dumba zvaro! Shoko irori richasvika kwamuri richibva kunyika yeSaipurasi." 
Isaiah23:2 Batai mwoyo imi vagari vokumahombekombe kwegungwa, imi vokuSidhoni vemhindu dzokutengesa zvinhu. Nhume dzenyu dzakapfumiswa navanhu vanofamba nengarava," 
Isaiah23:3 dzichange dzava pamvura yakawanda, chenyu chamuchawana imbesa dzokuShihori, goho rokuna Nairi. Ndimi mava vemhindu dzokutengesa pamarudzi ose avanhu." 
Isaiah23:4 Nyarawo kani iwe Sidhoni nokuti hwenje hwegungwa hwati handina kumborwadzwa kana kumbosununguka munhu. Handina majaya andakarera kana mhandara dzandakayarutsa ini. 
Isaiah23:5 Kusvika kuchaita shoko iroro kuIjipiti vachashushikana mwoyo nezvichange zvawira Tire. 
Isaiah23:6 Chitoyambukirai zvenyu kuTarishishi muchiridza mhere imi vagari vokumahombekombe kwegungwa. 
Isaiah23:7 Ndiro guta renyu here ramafaro guta rapasi chigare rakatandira kune dzimwe nyika pamusana pevana varo vakaita chitsva chiri murutsoka? 
Isaiah23:8 Ndiani akarongera Tire zvakadai, guta roumambo, raiva nevemhindu dzokutengesa zvinhu, vakanga vari machinda rine nevekutengesa zvinhu vairemekedzwa panyika." 
Isaiah23:9 Tenzi wehondo nehondo ndiye azvironga kuti aparadze kuzvikudza kweveimba youmambo kunyadzisa vose vanoremekedzwa panyika. 
Isaiah23:10 Tekeshera zvako nenyika yako sokufashukira kweNairi iwe mukunda, guta reTarishishi hapasisina achakudzivisa." 
Isaiah23:11 Atambanudza ruoko rwake pamusoro pegungwa, akadederesa madzimambo Tenzi atemera Kanani chirevo chokuti nhare dzaro dzokuzvidzivira muhondo dziparadzwe." 
Isaiah23:12 “Ati kwauri iwe zvamafaro zvakuperera iwe mhandara yaoneswa ndondo, mukunda, guta reSidhoni, simuka, uyambukire kuSaipurasi kunyange ikoko zororo hauna.”" 
Isaiah23:13 Chitarisai muone nyika iya haisiri Asiria havasiri vaAsiria asi kuti vanhu ava vechiKaridhea ndivo vakakanzera Tire kuti rive guta remhuka dzesango vakavaka nharire dzokurikomba nadzo vakaparadza mizinda yaro vakariita kuti rive dongo. 
Isaiah23:14 Ridzai mhere, imi ngarava dzeTarishishi nokuti nhare yenyu yokuzvidzivirira muhondo yaparadzwa." 
Isaiah23:15 Panguva iyoyo guta reTire richazokanganwika kwamakumi manomwe amakore, zvakangoenzana namakore amambo mumwechete panopera makore makumi manomwe iwaya zvichazoitika kuguta reTire sezvinotaurwa norwiyo rwepfambi runoti," 
Isaiah23:16 “Pakata dimbwa utenderere neguta iwe pfambi yakakanganwika Ita mutinhimira wakanaka uchiimba nziyo dzakawanda kuti uzoyeukwawo.” 
Isaiah23:17 Panopera makumi manomwe amakore Tenzi achashanyira guta reTire, iro richazodzokera kubasa raro rokuzvitengesa richiita upfambi nedzinyika dzose dzapanyika pano pose." 
Isaiah23:18 Zvamabhindauko aro nezvebasa raro rokuzvitengesa zvichava zvinotopirwa kuna Tenzi, hazvizochengetwa kana kuvigwa asi kuti mabhindauko aro achatozowanisa vanogara pana Tenzi zvokudya nezvokupfeka zvakawanda." 
Isaiah24:1 Chinzwai, Tenzi achaparadza pasi pose Achipaita renje achawondonga nyika achimwararanisa vageremo." 
Isaiah24:2 Munhu wose achaitirwa zvimwechetezvo, vangave vanhu zvavo kana mupristi, angave muranda kana tenzi wake, angavewo musikana webasa kana amai vaanoshandira angave mutengi kana mutengesi, angave mukweretesi kana mukwereti, angave mudzoreri kana mudzorerwi." 
Isaiah24:3 Pasi pose pachanyatsoparadzwa zvokunyatsoitwa dongo chairo nokuti Tenzi wazvitaura. 
Isaiah24:4 Pasi pose pari kuchema, pauna, nyika iri kuperezeka nokusvava, matenga ari kuperezekawo pamwechete napasi pose." 
Isaiah24:5 Pasi pose paipiswa navagari vemo nokuti vakadarika mitemo vakaramba mirao vakatyora chitenderano chokugara nokugara. 
Isaiah24:6 Naizvozvo rushambwa rwaparadza pasi pose vagari vemo vanotambudzikira mhosva dzavo. Ndokusaka vagari vepasi pose vakatsva kwasara vanhu vashoma. 
Isaiah24:7 Waini inochema migirepisi inosvava vose vamafaro vaya vari kutowuwura. 
Isaiah24:8 Rufaro rwokuridza ngoma rwamiswa, ruzha rwevamafaro rwapera, rufaro rwokuridza zvipendhani rwamiswa." 
Isaiah24:9 Zvokunwa waini vachiimba zvachiti nho-o, hwahwa, kune avo vanohunwa, hwava kuvava." 
Isaiah24:10 Guta remhirizhonga rachiti pasi mbombombo, dzimba dzose dzachinzi gwibha gwibha kuzarira, zvokuti hapana anogona kupinda." 
Isaiah24:11 Rave jemedzanwa mumigwagwa, pamusana pokushaya waini mafaro ose asvika kumapeto kwawo, rufaro rwapanyika rwarambidzwa." 
Isaiah24:12 Muguta chasara hapasisina, misuo mikuru yabvungunjurwa kusara asakara." 
Isaiah24:13 Izvozvo ndozvazvichaita mukati menyika, pakati pamarudzi avanhu sezvinongoita muti womuorivhi kana wagumwa, sepanguva yokufuhwa magirepisi nguva yokusvina waini yapera." 
Isaiah24:14 Vanodaidzira vachiimba norufaro vanodaidzira nezvoukuru hwaTenzi kumadokero. 
Isaiah24:15 Naizvozvo vokumabvazuva, rumbidzai Tenzi, vokunyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa, rumbidzai zita raTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri." 
Isaiah24:16 Kubva kwakaperera nyika tinonzwa nziyo dzokurumbidza, mbiri yaiye Mururami. Asi ndati, “Ndapera ini, ndapera simba! Nhamo yangu iyi, nokuti vanyengedzi vari kuita zvounyengedzi, vanyengedzi vari kuita zvounyengedzi chaizvo.”" 
Isaiah24:17 Imi vagari vapanyika kutya nehunza nomusungo zvavanemi. 
Isaiah24:18 Anotiza maungira anotyisa achawira muhunza, anenge ati regai ndibude muhunza imomo anobva anzi kachi nomusungo nokuti mawindho edenga akazaruka nougaro hwenyika huri kundengendeka." 
Isaiah24:19 Pasi pose panyatsomeduka-meduka, pasi pose patsemuka, pasi pose pazunzwa zvakaipisisa kwazvo." 
Isaiah24:20 Nyika iri kudzedzereka sechidhakwa, iri kuzvebuka semba. Kukanganisa kwayo kuri kuiremera, iri kutoputsika, haichazombomukazve." 
Isaiah24:21 Pazuva iroro Tenzi acharanga hondo dzomudenga, mudenga imomo madzimambo apasi ipo pasi pano" 
Isaiah24:22 vachaunganidzwa pamwechete savasungwa vari muhunza, vachapfigirwa mujeri mushure memazuva mazhinji vanozorangwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Ipapo mwedzi uchaora zuva rigodzima nokuti Tenzi wehondo nehondo achatonga paGomo reZioni muJerusaremu acharatidza mbiri yake kuvakuru vakuru vake. 
Isaiah25:1 Imi Tenzi, ndimi Mwari wangu, ndinokukudzai ndichirumbidza zita renyu, nokuti makaita zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvamakaronga kare kare zvino kutendeseka kwechokwadi;" 
Isaiah25:2 nokuti makaita kuti guta rive murwi guta retsvingo rive dongo muzinda wavanozvikudza hauchisiri guta hauchazombovakwa. 
Isaiah25:3 Naizvozvo vanhu vane simba vachakurumbidzai, maguta avanhu voutsinye achakutyai" 
Isaiah25:4 nokuti ndimi diziro ravarombo, botero ravanhu vasina chavanacho, dumba rokuhwanda dutu nomumvuri wokuhwanda zuva nokuti kufemuruka kwemunhu ane utsinye kunenge dutu riri kurovera kurusvingo" 
Isaiah25:5 sokupisa kwenzvimbo yakaoma. Munonyaradza ruzha rwemabvakure sokutonhodza kunoita gute kupisa saizvozvo ndokunyaradzwa kunoitwa nziyo dzemunhu ane utsinye. 
Isaiah25:6 Pagomo irori, Tenzi wehondo nehondo achaitira ndudzi dzose dzavanhu mabiko ezvakakora, mabiko ewaini isina kana kasese, mabiko ezvakakora zvizere mwongo ewaini yamasese akanyatsosvinwa." 
Isaiah25:7 Achaparadza pagomo irori chakaputira marudzi ose, dandadzi rakaputira ndudzi dzose dzavanhu." 
Isaiah25:8 Achatsakatisa rufu nokusingaperi, uye Tenzi, Tenzi achapukuta vose musodzi pamatama, uyewo achabvisa kuzvidzwa kwavanhu vake pasi pose, nokuti Tenzi ndiye azvireva." 
Isaiah25:9 Pazuva iroro vanhu vachati, “Hauwoneka, uyu ndiye Mwari wedu watanga takamirira kuti atinunure. Uyu ndiTenzi, ndiye watanga takamirira, ngatichifarai tichipemberera kutiponesa kwake.”" 
Isaiah25:10 Simba roruoko rwaMwari richava pagomo irori, asi Moabhu achatsokodzerwa munzvimbo make sokutsokodzerwa kunoitwa mashanga mudanga." 
Isaiah25:11 Achatambanudza maoko ake ari mukati maro sokutambanudza kunoita munhu anenge oda kushambira, asi Tenzi achaninipisa kuzvikudza kwake ikoku pamwechete noumhizha hwamaoko ake." 
Isaiah25:12 Nhare ndefu dzokuzvidzivirira muhondo dzamasvingo ake achadzikoromora achidziparadza achidzirigira pasi pavhu chaipo. 
Isaiah26:1 Musi iwoyo munyika maJudha muchaimbwa rwiyo urwu runoti: Guta redu, iguta rakasimba kununura kwaakatiita kwakabva kwava sorusvingo nechimudhuri chokudzivirira." 
Isaiah26:2 Zarurai misuo mikuru, rudzi rwakatendeseka rupinde." 
Isaiah26:3 Munhu anoramba pfungwa dzake dzakati kwati kwati nemi, munomuchengeta ari murugare chairwo nokuti anovimba nemi." 
Isaiah26:4 Vimbai naTenzi narini wose nokuti muna iye Tenzi Mwari ndimo mubako rokugara nokugara 
Isaiah26:5 nokuti akaninipisa vagari venyika dzokumusoro, guta rinozvikudza akaridukupisa akariti pasi mbombombo, muvhu chaimo kuriti umburu." 
Isaiah26:6 Rinotsikwa-tsikwa zvaro netsoka, tsoka dzavarombo zvavo muchifambwa zvamo navasina chavanacho." 
Isaiah26:7 Gwara rowakarurama muchechetere nzira yomururami munoiita kuti ive yakati sandara. 
Isaiah26:8 Tenzi, zvamunenge matema imi ndozvatinomirira, imi ndimi watinomirira. Zita renyu risingakanganwike ndochido chemwoyo yedu." 
Isaiah26:9 Ini ndinokushuwai nousiku, mweya wangu mandiri unokutsvakisisai kwazvo nokuti kana kutonga kwenyu kwasvika panyika vagari vepasi pano vanobva vadzidza ururami." 
Isaiah26:10 Kana muipi akaitirwa zvakanaka, haazodzidza kururama, munyika yakarurama imomo iye anenge achingoita zvoujarijari asingamboona zvake ukuru hwaTenzi." 
Isaiah26:11 Imi Tenzi, muruoko rwenyu shamhu iri mudenga, asi havasi kumbozviona. Chimbovaratidzai shungu dzamuinadzo nevanhu venyu, vanyare. Nehasha dzenyu dzinopisa ririmisai vavengi venyu." 
Isaiah26:12 Imi Tenzi, ndimi muchatiwanisa rugare, nokuti basawo rose ratinoita iri, ndimi." 
Isaiah26:13 Imi Tenzi, Mwari wedu, kune mamwe madzishe akambotitonga asirimi, asi imi ndimi mune zita ratinoziva." 
Isaiah26:14 Madzishe acho iwayo akafa haachazombovazve mapenyu, vangova mimvuri havachazombomuka, ndokusaka makavaranga nokuvaparadza mukavatsakatisa zvokusamboyeukwa." 
Isaiah26:15 Asi imi Tenzi makapamhidzira vanhu kurudzi rwedu, muchitiwanziridza murudzi rwedu. Imi munorumbidzwa makawedzeredza nyika yacho yose." 
Isaiah26:16 Imi Tenzi, munhamo vakakutsvakai vakaita munamato yokudurura, pamaivaranga." 
Isaiah26:17 Somukadzi anenge ano pamuviri anoyaura achichema mukurwadziwa kwake kana nguva yake yokusungunuka yasvika. Ndizvo zvatanga takaitawo isu tisiri panemi Tenzi. 
Isaiah26:18 Takanga takazvitakura tikayaura asi takasununguka mhepo. Kununura nyika ino hatina, kunyange vagari vapanyika havana kukurirwa." 
Isaiah26:19 Vakafa venyu vachava vapenyu, miviri yavo ichamuka. Vashakabvu vari muvhu mukai muimbe norufaro. Tinodaro nokuti dova renyu idova rine chiedza uye nyika yavashakabvu ichasununguka." 
Isaiah26:20 Vanhu vangu, endai mupinde mumba muzarire makonhi mumbohwanda kwenguva shoma kusvikira hasha dzake dzapera." 
Isaiah26:21 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi ari kuuya achibva kunzvimbo yake kuzorangira vagari vepanyika zvitadzo zvavo. Pasi pose vanhu vachareurura kuuraya vanhu kwavakaita, zvitadzo zvavo vanenge vasisavanzi." 
Isaiah27:1 Pazuva iroro Tenzi acharanga zigaranyanya nebakatwa rake rakaoma guru rakasimba, iro zinyoka rokutiza, zigaranyanya, zinyoka rinozvongonyoka, achaurayawo zigaranyanya romugungwa." 
Isaiah27:2 Pazuva iroro Tenzi achataura nezvemunda wake wamagirepisi achiti uimbirei muchiti," 
Isaiah27:3 “Ini Tenzi ndini muchengeti wawo ndinoudiridzira nguva dzose. Kuitira kuti pasave naanouparadza ndinouchengetedza siku nesikati. 
Isaiah27:4 Hasha aiwa handichisina. Dai kuri kuti pane minzwa norukato zvandinofanira kuita hondo nazvo, ndaitosimuka ndikarwisana nazvo, ndaizviti unga unga ndizvipise." 
Isaiah27:5 Kana vachida kudzivirirwa neni ngavayanane neni.” 
Isaiah27:6 Mune ramangwana Jakobho achadzika midzi, Isiraeri ichatumbuka igoita nhungirwa igozadza pasi pose namapudzi." 
Isaiah27:7 Ko akamboirova here sokurova kwaakaita, vakamboirova? VaIsiraeri vakambourayiwa here sokuurayiwa kwakaitwa vakambovauraya?" 
Isaiah27:8 Makavaitira zvine mwero nokumbovaita kuti vatapwe maitira kuti vafunge akavabvisa aviruka kwazvo nehasha pazuva remhepo yokumabvazuva. 
Isaiah27:9 Saka naizvozvo chitadzo chevokwaJakobho chichazoregererwa, izvozvi ndouchava mubayiro wokuregererwa kwechitadzo chavo. Paachaita kuti mabwe ose eatari abhwadutsirwe pasi somunyakwe somunyakwe kuti mwarara, hapana chifananidzo chokunamata chinomiririra Ashera kana atari dzorusenzi dzichasara dzimire;" 
Isaiah27:10 nokuti guta retsvingo rangosara rava roga roga somusha wakasiyiwa wakaramwiwa, serenje chairo mava kutofura zvamo mhuru ichitorara zvayo pasi ichitokwazwura zvayo mapazi aro." 
Isaiah27:11 Kana mapazi aro anooma otyoka vakadzi vanouya vozoakuhwidzisa moto. Pamusana pokuti vanhu ivava vanhu vasina pfungwa, naizvozvo iye akavasika haazovanzwira tsitsi iye wacho akavaumba haambovaitira mwoyochena." 
Isaiah27:12 Pamusi iwoyo kubvira kuRwizi rweYufuratesi kusvikira kuKakova keIjipiti, Tenzi achapfuura achikunongererai mumwe nomumwe imi vanhu veIsiraeri." 
Isaiah27:13 Zvino nezuva iroro kucharidzwa zibhosvo guruguru. Vanhu vakanga vateterekera munyika yeAsiria navakanga vambodzingwa munyika yeIjipiti, vachauya kuzopfugamira Tenzi pagomo rinoera muJerusaremu." 
Isaiah28:1 Mune nhamo imi vanozvikudza voumambo hwokwaEfuremu hwezvidhakwa hune mukurumbira waiyevedza wava kuwuna seruva riri pamusoro pebani rine ivhu rakanaka nevakararadza newaini! 
Isaiah28:2 Chinzwai, Tenzi ane rimwe gamba rakasimba akaita sedutu rine chimvuramahwe semhepo ine simba rakawanda inoparadza sedutu rakasimba ramafashamo emvura, iyeyo acharigira izvozvo pasi, pavhu chaipo zvakaomarara." 
Isaiah28:3 Vanozvikudza voumambo hwezvidhakwa hwokwaEfuremu, vachatsokodzerwa pasi netsoka;" 
Isaiah28:4 mukurumbira wahwo waiyevedza, uri kuwuna seruva, uri pamusoro pebani rine vhu rakanaka, uchaita seguyu rokutangisa kuibva zhizha risati rasvika rokuti munhu kana akariona anobva aridya paanongoribata chete mumaoko." 
Isaiah28:5 Pazuva iroro, Tenzi wehondo nehondo, achava mambo ane mukurumbira nechishongo chinoyevedza kuchitsama chavanhu vake vakasara" 
Isaiah28:6 achava iye mweya woruenzaniso kune anenge agere pakutonga achavawo simba kuna vanodzora hondo pamisuwo mikuru. 
Isaiah28:7 Kana ivava vanodzengedza newaini vachidzadzarika nahwo hwahwa vapristi navaporofita vanodzadzarika nahwo hwahwa vapazamiswa misoro newaini vachidzadzarika nahwo hwahwa vava kuvhiringika pane zvavanooneswa, vari kukanganisika pakutonga nyaya," 
Isaiah28:8 nokuti mateburu ose azara marutsi hapana pasisina tsvina. 
Isaiah28:9 “Iye achadzidziswa ndiani uye ndiani achatsanangurirwa shoko racho? Ndumurwa here? Kana kuti mwana achangobva achangorumurwa? 
Isaiah28:10 Zvaari kutoita mutemo nomutemo murao nomurao mutsetse nomutsetse zvishoma nezvishoma.” 
Isaiah28:11 Aiwa! Asi kutoti nomuromo wamabvakure, norurimi rwevanhu vechirudzi, Tenzi achataura kuvanhu vake" 
Isaiah28:12 vaakaudza kuti, “Zororo nderiri iri: zorodzai vakaneta ndokuzorora ikoku,” asi vakaramba kuteerera." 
Isaiah28:13 Ndokusaka shoko raTenzi richizova kwavari, mutemo nomutemo, murao nomurao mutsetse nomutsetse, zvishoma nezvishoma kuti vagoenda vagoti nemanhede njaya kuwira pasi vaputsike, vateyewe vabatwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Naizvozvo chinzwai shoko raTenzi imi vadadi, iyemi munotonga vanhu muJerusaremu," 
Isaiah28:15 nokuti makatika imi, “Takaita chibvumirano norufu tikaita chitsidzirano neNzvimbo yeVachakabvu, panozopfuurawo shamhu yokuranga ichirakasha, haimbotisvika, nokuti isu takaita kuti kunyepa kuve ndokwatinohwanda nako, nhema dziri bako ratinohwanda.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Naizvozvo Tenzi Mwari anoti, “Chinzwai! Ndava kuisira ugaro hweZioni ibwe, ibwe rakaongororwa, ibwe rinokosha rapakona rougaro chaihwo hwakasimba: Anenge akatendeseka haazi kuzomboita zvamandikurumidze." 
Isaiah28:17 Ndichaita kuti ruenzaniso ruve setambo yokuera nayo kururama kuri setambo yokuvakisa chimvuramabwe chichatsvaira botero ramakuhwa mvura ichakukura nzvimbo yokuvanda.” 
Isaiah28:18 Ndopachapedzwa zvechibvumirano chenyu norufu, chitsidzirano chenyu neNzvimbo yeVachakabvu chichiparara. Kana shamhu yokuparadza yava kupfuura muchanyatsorikitwa." 
Isaiah28:19 Nguva yose yainopfuura ichakurova ichapfuura mangwanani oga oga uye masikati nousiku. Kunzwa chete zvainoreva kuchava chinhu chinokutyisa kwazvo. 
Isaiah28:20 Ndinodaro nokuti zvichaita somubhedha mupfupi wokuti munhu haakwanisi kutambarara pauri uye segumbeze duku zvokuti munhu haakwanisi kurifuka," 
Isaiah28:21 uye nokuti sezvakaita Tenzi paGomo rePerazimu achasimuka uye sezvaakaita muBani reGibheoni, achashatirwa agoita zvinhu zvake, zvinhu zvake zvisina akamboona agoshanda basa rake basa rake risina akamboriona." 
Isaiah28:22 Zvino imi zvokudada regai, majoti enyu angadaro akabva anyatsosungwa chaizvo kuti nganganga nokuti ndakanzwa ini chirevo, chirevo chokuparadza munyika mose zvamo chinobva kuna Tenzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Isaiah28:23 Ndipeiwo nzeve, munzwe zvandiri kutaura, chimbonzwaiwo munzwe zvandiri kureva." 
Isaiah28:24 Iye anorimira kudyara, anoramba here achingorima chete? Anoramba here achingobamura zvake ivhu nokungohara chete?" 
Isaiah28:25 Kana achinge aita kuti pamusoro pacho pati chechetere, haamwaye here mbeu dzedhiri nokudyara mbeu dzekumini, agoisamo koroni mumitsetse, nebhari panzvimbowo payowo chaipo, koroni yesipereti yakapoteredzawo kumucheto?" 
Isaiah28:26 Akadzidziswa zvakanaka nokuti Mwari wake ndiye anomuudza. 
Isaiah28:27 Dhiri imbesa isingakwanisiki kupurwa nechirhei chokupurisa kana kuita zvokukungurutsa vhiri rengoro pambesa yekumini. Asi dhiri inotopurwa neshamhu, kumini ichipurwawo nesharapu." 
Isaiah28:28 Pakupura, munhu angabva apwanya koroni yechingwa here? Kweteka, haarambe achingoipura chete. Paanofambisa mavhiri engoro yake pairi namabhiza ake, haabvi aibvukuchura." 
Isaiah28:29 Izvozvi izvi zvinobvawo kuna Tenzi wehondo nehondo. Mupi wemazano anoshamisa ano ungwaru hunoshamisa. 
Isaiah29:1 Zvichakuwana zvako Arieri, iyewe Jerusaremu guta raigara Dhavhidhi! Itaika zvenyu mazuva makuru iwayo gore negore achirundana kudaro." 
Isaiah29:2 Asi Arieri ndichaipa nhamo, pachave nokuchema nokuungudza guta reArieri kwandiri richaita seatari yazara ropa." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndichazokukomba mativi ose ndikupoteredze nenharire ndigovaka zvokukukomba nazvo. 
Isaiah29:4 Ndopauchazotaura uri pasi, pasi pasi chaipo penyika, mazwi ako achabuda achibva pasi chaipo muvhu, inzwi rako richibva pasi sezwi redzimudzangara. Izwi rako richaita, kazevezeve mumhukutu." 
Isaiah29:5 Gurusvusvu ravavengi vako richaita sehuruva, gurusvusvu revanoutsinye richiita sehundi inopfuura hayo. Nenguva isipi uchayerekana" 
Isaiah29:6 washanyirwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo nemabhanan'ana nokundengendeka kwenyika noruzha rukuru nechamupupuri nedutu nerimi romoto unororomesa. 
Isaiah29:7 Gurusvusvu ravanhu ramarudzi ose, anorwisa guta reArieri, vose zvavo vanorirwisa vachirwisawo nhare yaro yokuzvidzivirira muhondo, vanoripa nhamo; vachaita sokunge chiroto zvacho, chiratidzo chinoonekwa usiku." 
Isaiah29:8 Sezvinoitika kana munhu ane nzara anorota achidya ozomuka aine nzara yake, iyoyo asina kuguta, kana kuti zvinoitika kana munhu ane nyota anorota achinwa mvura anomuka akarezuka ane nyota yake isina kupera ndozvichaita gurusvusvu ravanhu vamarudzi ose vanorwisa Gomo reZioni." 
Isaiah29:9 Zungairai muti tuzu dzimairai mupofomare. Mudhakwe, asi isiri waini inokudhakai; mudhadharike, asi husiri hwahwa hunokudhadharitsai," 
Isaiah29:10 nokuti Tenzi akakudururirai chipo chomweya wehope dzorufu uye akazarira maziso enyu imi vaporofita, akakwidibira misoro yenyu imi vaoni." 
Isaiah29:11 Saka chioneso chaizvozvi zvose chave semazwi ebhuku rakanamwa. Kana vanhu vakaripa kuno munhu anogona kuverenga vachimuti, “Verenga bhuku iri.” Iye anoti, “Handikwanisi, nokuti rakanamwa.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Uyewo kana voripa kuno munhu asingagoni kuverenga vachiti, “Verenga bhuku iri,” iye anoti, “Handikwanisi kuverenga.”" 
Isaiah29:13 Tenzi akati, “Pamusana pokuti vanhu ava vanongouya kuzondinamata zvapamuromo chete vachindikudza nemiromo yavo asi mwoyo yavo iri kure neni, kundiremekedza kwavo, unongova mutemo wavakadzidziswa wavakabata nomusoro chete." 
Isaiah29:14 Naizvozvo chinzwai, ndichaita zvakare zvinoshamisa vanhu ava zvinhu zvinoshamisa zvinokatyamadza. Ungwaru hwavakachenjera vavo huchaparara. Kunzwisisa kwavanonzwisisa vavo kuchavanzwa.”" 
Isaiah29:15 Zvichakuwanai zvenyu imi munoviga kwazvo mazano enyu pana Tenzi imi vemabasa erima, muchiti, “Ndiani anozviona, ndiani angazvizive." 
Isaiah29:16 Munovhiringidza zvinhu zvose. Muumbi ndiye anganzi ndiye mutapo here? Muumbi anganzi ndiye munyakwe here? Kana chinhu chakaitwa choti kuna akachiita, ‘Haaziriye akandigadzira.’ Chinhu chakaumbwa choti, kune akachiumba, ‘Haanzwisisi.’ ”" 
Isaiah29:17 Handiti kwangosara kanguva kadikidiki kwazvo kokuti Rebhanoni richisandurwa kuitwa munda unopa michero, munda wacho unopa michero uchizoonekwa sesango chairo handiti?" 
Isaiah29:18 Pamusi iwoyo matsi dzichanzwa mazwi omubhuku maziso amapofu ainge ari makati ndindo muzarima achaona. 
Isaiah29:19 Vatamburi vachamutsurudzwa rufaro, vari muna Tenzi, varombo muvanhu umu, vachapembera norufaro rwavanowana muna iye Anoera waIsiraeri" 
Isaiah29:20 nokuti vanoutsinye vachaguma, vadadi vachapera, vose vanogaririra kuita zvakaipa vachatsakatiswa," 
Isaiah29:21 vanoti kana nezwi rimwechete ravanominunutsa, voita kuti munhu atonzi apara mhaka; vanotoita zvokuteya kwazvo munhu anoraya vamwe padare rokusuo guru vanoti namazwi asina maturo munhu ane nyaya inonzwika aendeswe nyaya yake isina kutongwa." 
Isaiah29:22 Naizvozvo Tenzi akanunura Abhurahamu, anotaura nezvemba yaJakobho achiti: “VokwaJakobho havachanyadziswa, uso hwavo hauchazomboti wuna wuna" 
Isaiah29:23 nokuti pavachatarisa vana vavo vandakaumba ini namaoko angu vari pakati pavo vachaeresa zita rangu, vachaeresa iye Anoera waJakobho vachimira vachitya Mwari waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah29:24 Vanhu vakazungaira vachauya kuzonzwisisa, navanhu vokunyunyuta vachizobvuma kuudzwa.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Mune nhamo imi, mhandupandu dzavanhu. Munotoita zvenyu zvamunenge maronga imi Musingaite zvangu ini. Munotoita zvenyu bangano risinei zvaro nemweya wangu muchitowedzera zvenyu chitadzo pamusoro pechimwe chitadzo." 
Isaiah30:2 Munotopinda munzira kudzika kuIjipiti nhai musina kana kutombobvunza zvenyu zano rangu. Kundopotera kwaFarao here kuti mudzivirirwe naye nokundotsvaka zvenyu iyeyoka, dumba nomumvuri weIjipiti nhai?" 
Isaiah30:3 Naizvozvo kudzivirira kwaFarao ikoko kuchapinduka kukakunyadzisai, iye dumba nomumvuri weIjipiti opinduka ova anokunyadzisai." 
Isaiah30:4 Chiripo ndechokuti, kunyange zvazvo makurukota enyu ava ikoko kuguta reZoani, vamiririri venyika yenyu vatosvikawo nokuguta reHanesi," 
Isaiah30:5 munhu wose zvake achanyara navanhu vasina chavanovabatsira vasina rubatsiro kana chimuko asi kunyara nokunyadziswa.” 
Isaiah30:6 Munotakura imi upfumi hwenyu muchipfuura nokuNegevhu kunopisa, nomo munyika yenhamo namatambudziko ine shumba hadzi nehono nenyoka dzinouturu nenyoka dzinobhururuka, makahutakudza pamisana yemadhongi uye upfumi hwenyu makahutsiga panyundhwa dzengamera muchienda nahwo kuvanhu vasina nechavanobatsira" 
Isaiah30:7 nokuti rubatsiro rweIjipiti haruna chimuko haruna kana maturo, ndokusaka ini ndaitumidza zita rokuti, “NdiRahabhu shumba isina meno.”" 
Isaiah30:8 Zvino wochienda uzvinyore pafendefa vachiona, unyore izvozvo mubhuku kuitira kuti mune ramangwana zvizova chapupu nokusingaperi" 
Isaiah30:9 pamusana pokuti imhandupandu dzavanhu vanakomana vanoreva nhema vanakomana vasinganzwe zvinorehwa naTenzi. 
Isaiah30:10 Vanototi zvavo kuvaoni, “Zvokuona chiregai,” kuvaporofita uku vachitoti, “Zviratidzo zvamunotionera ngazvirege kuva zvechokwadi, ingotitaurirai zvenyu zvinhu zvisina kuomarara, titaurirei zvinhu pasina." 
Isaiah30:11 Siyanai negwara iroro mutsauke panzira iyoyo tirege kuramba tichinzwa nezvaiye Anoera waIsiraeri.” 
Isaiah30:12 Ndokusaka zvanzi naiye Anoera waIsiraeri “Pamusana pokuti imi muri kuramba shoko irori muchivimba nokuonesa vanhu ndondo nouipi muchibva mazendama chaizvo pazviri," 
Isaiah30:13 naizvozvo uipi ihwohwu huchakupfukirai sezvinoita rusvingo rurefu rune mutswe, runofutunukira kunze, runoti kana rwokoromoka runobva rwati pakarepo pasi rikiti nenguva isipi," 
Isaiah30:14 rune mupwanyikiro unenge wehari yomuumbi inenge yabhwadurirwa pasi zvine utsinye zvokuti hapana kazenga kayo kanowanika kwokutapisa moto kunyange kwokutekesa mvura mumugodhi wemvura,”" 
Isaiah30:15 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, iye Anoera waIsiraeri, “Ruponeso rwenyu ruri mukudzokera kwenyu kwandiri nomukuzviisa kwenyu mumaoko mangu. Simba renyu riri mukunyarara nokuvimba neni,” asi imi munoramba" 
Isaiah30:16 asi chamunototaura ndechokuti, “Aiwa, nokuti tichamhanyisa kwazvo tiri pamabhiza,” Saizvozvo muchamhanya chaizvo. Uye munoti, “Tichati karakata kutasva pamabhiza emikono anoribiduka kumhanya,” saizvozvo mucharondwa navanomhanya chaizvo." 
Isaiah30:17 Chiuru chenyu chichatiza munhu mumwechete Masoja mashanu chaiwo achaita kuti muti ware kutiza muchisara mangoita, sechimuti chemureza pamusoro pegomo, somureza pachikomo." 
Isaiah30:18 Naizvozvo Tenzi anomirira kuti akuitirei zvakanaka. Naizvozvo anofarira kwazvo kukuitirai tsitsi nokuti Tenzi ndiMwari woruenzaniso. Vakakomborerwa zvavo vose vanomumirira. 
Isaiah30:19 Hongu, imi vanhu veZioni munogara muJerusaremu hamuchazombochemazve. Achanyatsokuitirai nyasha paanonzwa kuchema kwenyu, paanongokunzwai achakupindurai." 
Isaiah30:20 Kunyange zvazvo Tenzi achikuitai kuti zvimhingamupinyi zvive chokudya chenyu nhamo iri mvura yenyu yokunwa, Mudzidzisi wenyu haachazvivanzi kwamuri. Asi kuti imi nameso enyu muchatoona Mudzidzisi wenyu" 
Isaiah30:21 uye kuti pamunenge mava kutsaukira kurudyi kana kuruboshwe muchatonzwa inzwi munzeve dzenyu richiti, “Nzira ndeyiyi itevedzei iyoyo.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Muchaona sezvinhu zvakan'ora zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvakanamirirwa nesirivha yako nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zvoutare hwakanyungurutswa zvakanamirirwa nendarama yako. Muchazvirasa serengenya rine tsvina muchiti, “Ngazvitibvire.”" 
Isaiah30:23 Achapa mvura yokuti mudyarise mbeu dzenyu. Mbesa dzinobva muvhu imomo dzichange dzakawanda dzakakora. Panguva iyoyo mombe dzenyu dzichafura mumafuro akakura. 
Isaiah30:24 Nzombe dzenyu namadhongi okurimisa dzichadya zvokudya zvakaiswa munyu hwakasandurudzwa nefoshoro neforogo. 
Isaiah30:25 Pamakomo ose marefu nomuzvikomo zvose zvakareba muchave notukova tune mvura inoerera pamusi ucharakashwa vanhu kuuraya pachapunzika nharire. 
Isaiah30:26 Chiedza chomwedzi chichaita sechiedza chezuva uye chiedza chezuva chinenge chakapetwa kanomwe sokunge chamazuva manomwe pazuva iroro Tenzi paachasunga makatyoka vanhu vake achiporesa maronda avakakuvadzwa nokurohwa. 
Isaiah30:27 Chinzwai munzwe, Tenzi anouya muzita rake achibva kure kure akaviruka nehasha dzake ari muutsi hwakati kwirindindi huri kutogoka mudenga nomuromo wake ari kutaura ari kutaura azere nehasha, rurimi rwake ruchinge moto unopisa" 
Isaiah30:28 kufema kwake kuchiita sorukova rwuzere runosvika mumutsipa kuti azungure marudzi avanhu norusero rwokuparadza nokuzoisa pashaya dzendudzi dzavanhu matomho okuvateteresa mutome. 
Isaiah30:29 Muchaimba rwiyo serwousiku hunochengetwa zuva guru rinoera muchifara mumwoyo umu sezvinoita munhu anopinda munzira aine mumhanzi wenyere achikwira kugomo raTenzi kuna iye Bako raIsiraeri 
Isaiah30:30 Tenzi achaita kuti vanhu vanzwe izwi rake roukuru achaitawo kuti shamhu yoruoko rwake ionekwe inenge yatozomoka kuzorova nehasha dzinotyisa nerimi romoto unororomesa uine gore raita zvokuwodzvoka kunaya nedutu nemhepo huru ine simba rechimvuramabwe. 
Isaiah30:31 VechiAsiria vachatya kwazvo vachinzwa izwi raTenzi paanovarova netsvimbo yake. 
Isaiah30:32 Shamhu yose yose yokuranga yavanorohwa naTenzi, inenge ichipembererwa nomumhanzi wengoma nezvipendani; achiita hondo, muruoko shamhu achiivheyesa mudenga achirwisana navo" 
Isaiah30:33 nokuti nzvimbo yokupisira yakatogadzirirwa kare yokuitira mambo iyeyu, yakatogadzirirwa kare. Gomba rayo rakaitwa rakadzika uye rakafutunurwa kwazvo pamwechete nemoto nehuni zvakawanda, femo raTenzi rinoita sekakova kedombo regwenya ndorinoritungidza moto." 
Isaiah31:1 Vane nhamo vanhu vanodzika kuIjipiti kundotsvaka rubatsiro vachivimba namabhiza, vanovimba nengoro dzehondo pamusana pokuwanda kwadzo, vanovimba navarwi vamabhiza pamusana pokuti vakasimba kwazvo asi vasingatarisi kuna iye Anoera weIsiraeri kana kubvunza Tenzi." 
Isaiah31:2 Asi ariye ane ungwaru, ariiye anounza nhamo anoti raareva ndiroro asingasanduke. Achamukira imba yevaiti vezvakaipa achirwisa vabatsiri vevanoita zvakaipa." 
Isaiah31:3 VaIjipiti vanhu, havasi Mwari uye mabhiza avo ndinyama, haasiri mweya. Tenzi akatambanudza ruoko rwake mubatsiri iye achatatarika iye anobatsirwawo wacho achaputsika vagoparara pamwechete;" 
Isaiah31:4 nokuti Tenzi akanditi, “Sezvinoita shumba kana kuti shumba ichiri kuzvinzwa inohon'era mhuka yayabata kana vafudzi vakokerwa kurwisa haityisidzirwe nokuzhamba kwavo kana kuvhundutswa noruzha rwavo. Ndizvozvowo zvichaitwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo, achaburukira paGomo reZioni kuzorwisa pachikomo charo." 
Isaiah31:5 Sezvinoita shiri kudzengerera mudenga, ndizvowo zvichaita Tenzi wehondo nehondo achidzivirira Jerusaremu, acharidzivirira achirinunura achirichengetedza achiriponesa.”" 
Isaiah31:6 “Imi vanhu veIsiraeri pindukirai kuna iye wamakapandukira zvisingatauriki 
Isaiah31:7 nokuti nezuva iroro munhu wose acharasa zvifananidzo zvake zvokunamata zvesirivha nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvokunamata zvendarama zvamakatadzira Mwari nazvo muchizviumbira imi namaoko enyu. 
Isaiah31:8 “VaAsiria vachaparadzwa nebakatwa asi risiri bakatwa romunhu richavaparadza, vachatiza bakatwa majaya avo agoiswa kubasa rechibharo." 
Isaiah31:9 Iye dombo ravo achapfuura achitya vakuru vakuru vavo vomuhondo vachapomoka mureza nokutya,” ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi ane moto uri muZioni ane vira romoto muJerusaremu." 
Isaiah32:1 Chinzwai, kana mambo ava kutonga noururami makurukota ava kutonga noruenzaniso," 
Isaiah32:2 mumwe nomumwe wavo anenge ave senzvimbo yokuvanda mhepo senzvimbo yokuhwanda dutu setukova twemvura munzvimbo yakaoma, somumvuri wedombo mukuru munyika yakaoma." 
Isaiah32:3 Maziso avanofanira kuti vatarise zvinhu haazotsinzinya nenzeve dzavanofanira kunzwa dzichateerera. 
Isaiah32:4 Vane pfungwa yokuti zvose ndezvechimbichimbi vachava nourongwa hwakanaka, vanokakama vachataura vasingazezi, uye zvinonzwika." 
Isaiah32:5 Rema romunhu harizonzi munhu anofanira kuremekedzwa kana kuti kanyimiramundiro onzi mupanegombe. 
Isaiah32:6 Rema romunhu rinotaura zvenhema pfungwa dzaro dziri pakuronga kuita zvakaipa napakuita zvisingadiwe naMwari richitaura zvisiri izvo pamusoro paTenzi. Ane nzara anomuregera nenzara yavo vane nyota nenyota yake. 
Isaiah32:7 Zvinoitwa navanoudyire zvakashata vanoronga mazano akaipa kuti varozve varombo nenhema dzavanotaura vachitadzisa vanotambura kuwana zvinhu zvavane mvumo yokuti vawane. 
Isaiah32:8 Asi munhu kwaye anoitawo zvinhu nomazvo zvinhu zviri pachokwadi ndozvaanomira nazvo. 
Isaiah32:9 Simukai imi vakadzi makagarika, izwai izwi rangu imi vanasikana imi munozviti ndisu pano chimbonzwai zvandiri kutaura." 
Isaiah32:10 Mushure menguva ndikindiki inongoti pfuurei gore, muchazvishayira pazvo, iyemi vakadzi munozviti ndisu pano nokuti zvokusvina waini panenge pasisina uye zvokukohwa, panenge pasisina." 
Isaiah32:11 Dederai imi vakadzi makagarika, hutai iyemi munozviti ndisu pano. Pfekenurai musare musina chamakapfeka musungire muchiuno mitikisha yamasaga." 
Isaiah32:12 Batai gotsi mucheme, minda yakanakisa yemiti yemigirepisi inobereka muchero" 
Isaiah32:13 mucheme ivhu ravanhu vangu mava kungokura zvamo mumunzwa norukato, ehe! Mucheme dzimba dzose dzemafaro dzomuguta remafaro" 
Isaiah32:14 nokuti muzinda wamambo uchazongosara wakadaro guta ranga rizere navanhu richasara risisina vanhu chikomo nenharire pokutaririra zvichava matanga narini wose anofarirwa nemadhongi omusango mokufura zvamo zvipfuwo. 
Isaiah32:15 Kusvikira Mweya wadururirwa kwatiri uchibva kudenga renje rava munda unobereka zvirimwa munda wembeswa rave sango zvaro. 
Isaiah32:16 Ipapo ruenzaniso ruchawanika kunyange nokurenje ururami huchiwanika kunyange nomumunda unobereka zvirimwa. 
Isaiah32:17 Rugare ndoruchava muchero wokururama ikoko muchero wokururama ikoko uchava runyararo nokuvimbika nokusingaperi. 
Isaiah32:18 Vanhu vangu vachagara mumisha ine rugare mudzimba dzisina njodzi dzokuzororera dzine runyararo. 
Isaiah32:19 Sango richanyatsoparara guta richanyatsonzi pasi mbombombo. 
Isaiah32:20 Makakomborerwa zvenyu imi munodyara pose pane mvura munogona zvenyu kuita mombe namadhongi enyu zvokutosaidzira. 
Isaiah33:1 Zvichakuwana iwe muparadzi, iwe usina kumboparadzwa iwe woujarijari usina ani akambokuitirawo ujarijari! Paunongomira chete kuparadza unobva waparadzwa, paunongogumisa kuita ujarijari, unobva waitirwa ujarijari." 
Isaiah33:2 Tenzi, tinzwireiwo nyasha tinotarisira kwamuri Ivai simba redu mangwanani oga oga, mutiponesewo panguva yokutambudzika." 
Isaiah33:3 Pamusana pemaungira ebongozozo, ndudzi dzavanhu dzichiti ware kutiza pamunosumuka imi, marudzi avanhu anoita chimwanda-mwanda." 
Isaiah33:4 Vachaunganidza zvokupamba sokuunganidzwa kunoitwa hwiza vanhu vachichirikira pazviri sokumomotera kunoita mhashu. 
Isaiah33:5 Tenzi anokudzwa nokuti anogara kumusoro achazadza Zioni noruenzaniso noururami. 
Isaiah33:6 Zvinodiwa zvacho achaita kuti zvivepo zvinoti: ruponeso rwakawanda noungwaru noruzivo, kutya Tenzi ndiko kunenge kuri upfumi hwake." 
Isaiah33:7 Chionai, magamba anochema kunze uku, vamiririri vorugare vachihwihwidza zvinosiririsa kwazvo." 
Isaiah33:8 Migwagwa mikuru yangove migwagwa zvayo isina anoshandisa. Vanhu venzira hapasisina. Zvibvumirano zviri kutyorwa vokupa umboo vachizvidzwa, munhu haachaonekwa somunhu." 
Isaiah33:9 Nyika iri kugurukuta ichiondongoka Rebhanoni yapazamiswa musoro nazvo, yasvava; Sharoni yava kunge gwenga zvaro, uye Bhashani neKarimero dzasasamuka mashizha adzo." 
Isaiah33:10 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Zvino ndava kusimuka, zvino ndava kunyatsoti kwaku kusimuka pari zvino ndiremekedzwe." 
Isaiah33:11 Zvirongwa zvenyu marara chete zvamunoburamo magufu, kufemeruka kwenyu ndomoto uchakuroromesai." 
Isaiah33:12 Ndudzi dzavanhu dzichaita sedzapiswa kuita rota seminzwa yatemerwa pasi ikapiswa mumoto.” 
Isaiah33:13 Chinzwai munzwe zvandakaita imi muri kure uko nemi muri padyo muzive simba rangu. 
Isaiah33:14 Vatadzi muZioni umu vava kutya. Vasingatyi Mwari hedzo mbwende kudedera dzichiti: “Ndiani chaizvo pakati pedu angagone kugara mumoto unororomesa? Ndiani chaizvo pakati pedu angakwanise kugara mukutsva kusingaperi?” 
Isaiah33:15 Munhu anofamba noururami achitaura zvakarurama, anosema upfumi hunowanikwa nokuonesa vanhu ndondo, anozunza maoko ake kuti arege kubata pfumbamuromo, anodzivira nzeve kuti arege kunzwa zvokudeura ropa, anozarira maziso ake kuti arege kutarisa zvinhu zvakaipa." 
Isaiah33:16 Iyeyo achagara makakwirira nyare yake yokuzvidzivirira ichange iri tsvingo dzamabwe achiwaniswa chokudya chake, mvura yake yokunwa isingamboshayika." 
Isaiah33:17 Maziso ako achaona kuyevedza kwamambo, achaona nyika yakatandira nokoko." 
Isaiah33:18 Mumwoyo mako ucharangarira nezvaityisa uchitoti “Aripiko wokuverenga uya, aripiko uya aiera kurema kwomutero? Aripiko wokuverenga nharire uya?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Vanhu vaye vokutsvinya hauchazovaonizve vane mutauro wakavandika usinganzwisisike vanokakama vanorurimi rusinganzwisisike. 
Isaiah33:20 Tarisa uoneka guta reZioni guta remazuva edu makuru akatemwa unobva waonawo Jerusaremu musha worunyararo, musha wepfirapo dzamatendhe ane hoko dzisingambofa dzakadzurwa, asina kana tambo zvayo inodimuka." 
Isaiah33:21 Imomo Tenzi acharatidza simba rake pamusana pedu, inenge iri nzvimbo ine hova nenzizi dzakapamhama, kusina ngarava dzokurwisa nadzo dzine mikwasvo dzinofamba nomo kana ngarava huru, dzinopfuura nomo;" 
Isaiah33:22 nokuti Tenzi ndiye mutongi wedu, Tenzi ndiye anotipa mutemo, Tenzi ndiye mambo wedu ndiye achatinunura." 
Isaiah33:23 Tambo dzoko dzadembera hadzichakwanisi kusimbisa bango rengarava bango rengarava panzvimbo paro kana kuti tendhe rokufambisa ngarava nemhepo rirambe rakatambanuka. Ipapo vanhu vachagovana zvavo zvinhu zvizhinji zvokupamba nezvavanowana muhondo kunyange vakaremara vachatotorawo zvinowanikwa muhondo. 
Isaiah33:24 Hapana mugari wemo achati, “Ndiri kurwara.” Vanhu vanogara imomo vacharegererwa uipi hwavo." 
Isaiah34:1 Swederai padyo imi marudzi avanhu muzonzwa, tererai munzwe imi ndudzi dzavanhu. Nyika ngaiteerere nezvose zviri mairi naipo pasi pose nezvinhu zvose zvazvo zvinobva mairi," 
Isaiah34:2 nokuti Tenzi avirukira nehasha marudzi ose avanhu ashatirirwa vose zvavo nouwandi hwavo kudaro avatemera kuparadzwa avatemera kuti vakatakazhwe kuurayiwa. 
Isaiah34:3 Zvitunha zvavo zvichanzi hupukupu kuraswa kunze, zvitunha zvavo zvichaita gutukutu kunhuwa. Makomo achayerera ropa ravo." 
Isaiah34:4 Gurusvusvu rezvomudenga richaora, matenga omonwa sebhuku rokumononora gurusvusvu razvo zvose richidonha samashizha anosasamuka mumugirepisi samashizha ari kusasamuka mumukuyu." 
Isaiah34:5 Chikonzero ndechokuti bakatwa rangu ranwa rikaguta nezvokumatenga, hero, rava kuburuka kuzoranga Edhomu pavanhu vandatemera kuparadzwa." 
Isaiah34:6 Tenzi ane bakatwa bakatwa racho rizere ropa rakanunirira namafuta neropa rehwayana nerembudzi namafuta etsvo dzehondohwe nokuti Tenzi ane chibayiro kuBhozira kukatakazhwa chaiko kwavanhu munyika yeEdhomu. 
Isaiah34:7 Vacharigirwa pasi pamwechete nenyati nezvigondora zvenzombe uye nehandira dzakasimba. Nyika yavo ichanyata neropa ivhu ravo rakoreswa namafuta 
Isaiah34:8 nokuti Tenzi ane zuva rake rokutsividza gore rokudzosera achitsividzira Zioni.
