Isaiah34:9 Hova dzeEdhomu dzichasandurwa dzikasviba setara ivhu ravo richaita somoto wesarufa nyika yavo ichava setara iri kutsva 
Isaiah34:10 siku nesikati isina anogona kudzima utsi hwayo huchatogoka mudenga nokusingaperi. Ichagara chizvarwa nechizvarwa isina anoishandisa hapana anenge achipfuura nemo kudzamara narini wose. 
Isaiah34:11 Asi inenge yatova zvayo mumaoko morukodzi nenungu, nezizi negunguo zvotogara zvazvo imomo. Achakaka tambo yemanyongori pamusoro payo, nokuimutsira nyonganyonga inorema sekasimbi kokukakisa nako tambo yokuvakisa." 
Isaiah34:12 Vachazoitumidza zita rokuti “Kasinaumamboikoko” machinda ayo achange ari vanhu pasina. 
Isaiah34:13 Minzwa ichakura zvayo munhare dzayo dzokuzvidzivira muhondo nadzo, uye unye namakwenzi eminzwa mumaguta ayo etsvingo. Ichange yava dambiro ramakava nomusha wemhou." 
Isaiah34:14 Mhuka dzesango dzichasangana namapere, madzimudzangara achidaidzirana namamwe awo madzangaradzimu. Ehe, imomo ndomuchapindwa nomweya werima uchizviwanira pokuzororera." 
Isaiah34:15 Zizi richazvivakira zvaro dendere imomo nokutokandira zvaro mazai richizoachochonya nokutozovhumbamirawo vana varo mumumvuri waro. Ehe, njerere dzichaunganidzana imomo dziri mbiri mbiri, jongwe nesheshe yaro." 
Isaiah34:16 Zvitsvakei izvozvi muchazviverenga muBhuku raTenzi, hakuna nechimwe chaizvozvi izvi chichazenge chisimo zvose zvichange zviri chikono nechikadzi nokuti ndizvo zvatemwa nomuromo waTenzi Mweya wake ndouchazviunganidza." 
Isaiah34:17 Chimwe nechimwe akachipa mugove wacho akazvitarira mutsetse noruoko rwake achizvigovanisa uchava mugove wazvo narini wose. Zvichagara imomo kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa. 
Isaiah35:1 Renje richafara nyika yakaoma ichafara gwenga richamwekuma nokufara, rachiti kakaka maruva kutumbuka somunhundurwa." 
Isaiah35:2 Richanyatsoti namaruva akawanda tsvete rigopembera nokufara nokuimba, richapiwa mbiri yeRebhanoni nokuyevedza kwakaita sekweKarimeru nekweSharoni. Vachaona mbiri yaTenzi nomukurumbira waMwari wedu." 
Isaiah35:3 Simbisai maoko akaregedzera musimbise mabvi akarengwendeka. 
Isaiah35:4 Itii kune vane mwoyo unotya, “Simbai mwoyo, regai kutya. Tarirai muone, Mwari wenyu ari kuuya kuzotsividza nokutsividza kwaMwari, achizogadziridza zvamakakanganisirwa, achauya okununurai.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Maziso amapofu achasvinudzwa, nzeve dzamatsi dzichivhurwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Ipapo mheta makumbo dzichachirika semhene, rurimi rwechimumumu ruchaimba norufaro nokuti murenje muchaita mafashamo emvura, mugwenga muchaita tukova twemvura." 
Isaiah35:7 Mujecha munopisa muchava madziva, ivhu rine nyota richiva zvitubu zvemvura. Paimbova dambiro ramakava pachava jahwi rine uswa netsanga nenhokwe." 
Isaiah35:8 Imomo muchava nomugwagwa mukuru uchanzi, “Mugwagwa Unoera.” Vakan'ora havafambi nawo. Hakuna benzi richafamba nawo kundorasisa vanenge vatsaukira kwairi. Kunyange mapenzi avanhu chaiwo haamborasika zvawo imomo." 
Isaiah35:9 Muchange musina shumba imomo kana chikara chinorura chinotsikamo hazvisi kuzowanikwa imomo. Asi vakanunurwa ndovachafamba zvavo naimomo," 
Isaiah35:10 vakaponeswa ivavo vaTenzi, vachadzokera vagouya kuZioni vachiimba, pamusoro apa, vakadzika sendaza rufaro runogara narini wose Vachawana kupembera nokufara, kusuwa nokudemba zvichati ware kutiza." 
Isaiah36:1 Mugore regumi nechina rokutonga kwamambo Hezekiya, Senakeribhu mambo weAsiria akauya kuzorwisa maguta ose okwaJudha akanga akavakirirwa netsvingo akaakurira." 
Isaiah36:2 Mambo weAsiria akatuma mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda make nehondo huru kubva kuRakishi kuna mambo Hezekiya kuJerusaremu. Akasvikomira padyo nomugero wokudziva rokumusoro pamugwagwa mukuru wokuMunda woMusuki waMachira. 
Isaiah36:3 Kwakabuda Eriyakimu mwanakomana waHirikiya aiva mukuru mukuru womumuzinda nasamunyori mukuru, Shebhuna nomunyori Joa mwanakomana waAsafu." 
Isaiah36:4 Mutariri mukuru uya wezvomumuzinda akati kwavari, “Itii kuna Hezekiya, zvanzi namambo mukuru mambo weAsiria, ‘Unovimba neiko?’" 
Isaiah36:5 Ndiri kuti iko kutaura pamuromo apa ndiko kuronga hondo here ikoko kana kuti ndiro simba rokurwa hondo iroro? Ndiani wawava kuvimba naye zvawava kutondipandukira kudai? 
Isaiah36:6 Zvino, chinzwa, uri kuvimba neIjipiti norutsanga zvarwo urwo rwakatyoka, runobaya muchanza munhu anenge ada kuti agamwe narwo. Ndozvakaita Farao mambo weIjipiti kuna vose vanovimba naye." 
Isaiah36:7 “Asi kana zvako ukati kwandiri, ‘Tinovimba naTenzi. Mwari wedu,’ haasi ndiye here ane nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira neatari dzacho dzakabviswa naHezekiya achitaurira Judha neJerusaremu kuti, ‘Munofanira kunamata muri paatari iyi.’" 
Isaiah36:8 Zvino mochipikirana natenzi wangu mambo weAsiria, ndikupe mabhiza zviuru zviviri. Pakopo ungaawanirewo vachayiri here?" 
Isaiah36:9 Kunyange akava mukuru mukuru wehondo pakati pamakurokota okupedzisira chaiwo atenzi wangu ungabva wafemera kumumhanyisa iwe, iwe uchidaro kutovimba neIjipiti kuti uwane ngoro dzehondo navachairi." 
Isaiah36:10 Uyewo kuuya kwandaita kuzorwisa ndichiparadza nyika ino, ndangouyawo here zvisina Tenzi mukati? Tenzi ndiye akanditi, ‘Vinga nyika iyoyi uiparadze.’ ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Eriakimu naShebhuna naJoa vakati kumutariri wezvomumuzinda, “Dai mukataura zvenyu kwatiri isu varanda venyu nechiSiria nokuti tinochinzwa. Regai zvenyu kutaura nesu nechiJudha vanhu vari parusvingo apo vachinzwa.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Asi mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda akati, “Munoti tenzi wangu andituma kuzotaura izvozvi kuna tenzi wenyu nokwamuri nhai ndichirega kutaurirawo izvozvi varume vagere parusvingo apo vapinda nyatwa pamwechete nemi yokudya ndove yavo nemvura yavo?”" 
Isaiah36:13 Mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda ndopaakasimuka kwazvo oshevedzera chaizvo muchiJudha achiti, “Tererai munzwe mashoko amambo mukuru, mambo weAsiria." 
Isaiah36:14 Zvanzi namambo, ‘Regai kunyengedzwa naHezekiya nokuti haakwanisi kukununurai." 
Isaiah36:15 Musarege Hezekiya achikutii muvimbe naTenzi achiti Tenzi anonyatsokununurai uye kuti guta rino harimboiswa mumaoko amambo wavaAsiria.’ 
Isaiah36:16 “Musateerere Hezekia nokuti zvanzi namambo weAsiria ngatinzwananei mubude kuno kwandiri. Mukadaro mumwe nomumwe achadya zvake muchero womugirepisi wake, munhu wose achidya zvake michero yomuonde wake, munhu wose achinwa mvura yomutsime rake," 
Isaiah36:17 kusvikira ndauya kuzokutorai ndoenda nemi kunyika yakangoita senyika yenyu iyi. “Nyika yembesanwa newaini nyika yechingwa neminda yemagirepisi. 
Isaiah36:18 Chenjererai. Hezekiya uyu angadaro akakufurirai achiti, ‘Tenzi achatinunura.’ Pamarudzi ose, pana mwari here akanunura nyika yake mumaoko amambo weAsiria?" 
Isaiah36:19 ‘Ko vamwari vokuHamati nokuAripadhi varipi?’ Ko vamwari vokuSefarivhaimu varipiko? Vakanunura Samaria mumaoko mangu here? 
Isaiah36:20 Pakati pavamwari vose venyika idzodzo ndivanaani vakanunura nyika dzavo mumaoko mangu zvingazonzi Tenzi achanunura Jerusaremu mumaoko angu?” 
Isaiah36:21 Asi vanhu vakati mwiro kunyarara vakarega nokumupindura kwose nokuti chirevo chamambo chaiti, “Regai kumupindura.”" 
Isaiah36:22 Ipapo Eriyakimu mwanakomana waHirikiya aiva mukuru mukuru womumuzinda naShebhuna samunyori mukuru nomunyori Joa mwanakomana waAsafu vakaenda kuna Hezekiya vabvarura hanzu. Vakamusvitsa zvakanga zvataurwa nomutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda. 
Isaiah37:1 Pazvakasvika munzeve dzamambo, Hezekiya akabvarura hanzu dzake akapfeka masaga, akapinda mumba yaTenzi." 
Isaiah37:2 Akabva atuma Eriyakimu mukuru mukuru womumuzinda wake naShebhuna samunyori mukuru navakuru vakuru vavapristi kumuporofita vakapfeka masaga Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi. 
Isaiah37:3 Vakandomuti, “Zvanzi naHezekiya, ‘Nhasi uno izuva rokusuruvara, zuva rokutsiurwa, zuva rokufumurwa, nokuti nguva yokuti vana vachiberekwa yasvika, asi simba rokuvasununguka hapasisina." 
Isaiah37:4 Zvingangoita kuti Tenzi, Mwari wenyu anzwa zvataurwa nomutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda uya atumwa natenzi wake mambo weAsiria kuzonyomba Mwari mupenyu; iye Tenzi Mwari wenyu angadaro akatsiudza zvaanzwa zvacho. Naizvozvo dai mukanamatirawo chitsama chavanhu chasara.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:5 Pakasvika makurukota amambo Hezekiya kuna Isaya," 
Isaiah37:6 Isaya akati kwavari, “Endai mundotaurira tenzi wenyu kuti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Usatye zvako pamusana pamashoko awanzwa kumakurukota amambo weAsiria okundinyomba." 
Isaiah37:7 Chiripo ndechichi ichi, ndichapinza mweya maari wokuti achangonzwa runyerekupe rwamarehwarehwa agopishinuka kudzokera kunyika kwake kwandichandomupinza murufu rwokuurayiwa nebakatwa munyika make imomo.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:8 Mutariri mukuru wezvomumuzinda uya akadzokera nokuti akanga anzwa kuti mambo weAsiria abva kuRakishi akatomuwana achirwisana neRibhuna. 
Isaiah37:9 Mambo weAsiria paakanzwa nezvaTirihaka mambo weItiopia akanga ari munzira kuuya kuzomurwisa, akatumazve nhume kuna Hezekiya achiti," 
Isaiah37:10 “Endai mundoti kuna Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha zvanzi, ‘Usanyengedzwe naTenzi waunovimba naye achiti, Jerusaremu harichaiswa mumaoko mamambo weAsiriya." 
Isaiah37:11 Tarisa uone, iwe wakangozvinzwirawo woga zvakaitwa namadzimambo eAsiria kunyika dzose zvokunyatsodziparadza chaizvo. Ko iwe ndopaunganunurwe here?" 
Isaiah37:12 Ko vedzimwe ndudzi dzakaparadzwa namadzibaba angu idzi dzinoti: dzokuGozani nokuHarani neRezevhu navanhu vokuEdheni vaiva kuTeresari, vamwari vadzo vakadzinunura here?" 
Isaiah37:13 Ko mambo weHamati aripi zvino? Ko mambo weAripadhi? Ko mambo weguta reSefarivhaimu? Ko mambo weHena namambo weIvha varipi?’ ” 
Isaiah37:14 Hezekiya akagamuchira tsamba iyoyo mumaoko enhumwa dziya akaverenga akaenda nayo kumba yaTenzi ndokundoiti ware ware pana Tenzi. 
Isaiah37:15 Hezekiya akanamata kuna Tenzi achiti," 
Isaiah37:16 “Tenzi, wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri, imi mugere pamusoro pamakerubhu. Imi moga ndimi Mwari wenyika dzose dzapasi pano pose. Ndimi makasika denga napasi." 
Isaiah37:17 Rerekai nzeve yenyu Tenzi munzwe. Zazurai meso enyu Tenzi muone, munzwe mashoko aSenakeribhu aatumira kuzonyomba nawo Mwari mupenyu." 
Isaiah37:18 Ichokwadi Tenzi kuti madzimambo eAsiria akaparadza marudzi ose nenyika dzawo. 
Isaiah37:19 Akapisa vamwari vavo nomoto. Akadaro, hongu, nokuti vakanga vasiri Mwari asi kuti zvaingova zvinhu zvakagadzirwa namaoko avanhu, miti zvayo namatombo. Ndokusaka akazviparadza." 
Isaiah37:20 Zvino Tenzi, Mwari wedu tinunureiwo mumaoko make, nyika dzose dzapasi pano dzizive kuti imi Tenzi ndimi moga Mwari.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akatuma shoko kuna Hezekiya rokuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Pamusana pokuti wanamata kwandiri nezvaSenakeribhu mambo weAsiria.’ ”" 
Isaiah37:22 Zvataurwa naTenzi nezvake ndezvizvi: “Iri kukushora inokuzvidza mhandara yeZioni. Ari kutozunguza zvake musoro shure kwako mukunda weJerusaremu. 
Isaiah37:23 “Wawanyomba ukatuka ipapa ndiani? Wauri kuzhambira ipapa ndiani chaizvozvo? Waunodzvondorera maziso kuzvikudza kudaro ndiani? Wauri kudaro ndiyeni Mutsvene weIsiraeri 
Isaiah37:24 navaranda vako uchitonyombaka Tenzi iwe. Uchitoti zvako: ‘Negurusvusvu rangu rengoro dzehondo, ndakakwira makomo ini kusvika pamusoro, nadzo ndikasvika kwakaperera Rebhanoni, miti yeko yakarebesesa yemisidhari ndikairizhanisa, miti yeko yemisaipurasi yakanakisisa ndikaitema, ndikaenda ini pamusoro pacho chaipo, chaimo mumasango ayo matema;" 
Isaiah37:25 ndikatocheramo matsime ndikanwa ini mvura. Ndakatsika ini netsoka yangu tukova twose tweIjipiti twukaoma kuti gwa.’ 
Isaiah37:26 Zvaive mumwoyo mangu kwenguva ndefu hazvisati zvakusvika munzeve nhai, zvandakaronga kare kare pasichigare, zvandava kutozoita iye nhasi zvokuti maguta ane tsvingo uaite mirwi yamatongo?" 
Isaiah37:27 Vagari vemo vachiti rukutu kupera simba, vakangaidzwa vazvishaira pazvo vaita sezvinhu zvinomera musango soruswiswi, souswa hunomera padenga remba hunoshauruka kuoma husati hwambokura." 
Isaiah37:28 Mugariro wako ndinouziva kwaunofamba ndinokuziva twaunobata ndinotuziva kunyange kundipunyairira kwako nehasha ndinokuziva 
Isaiah37:29 nokuti uri kundipunyairira nehasha iwe, kuzvitutumadza kwako kwasvika munzeve dzangu. Ndichaisa chikochekero changu pamhuno dzako ndichakuisa matomhu mukanwa ndikupishunutsire nokwakare kunzira kwawakauya nako kuno." 
Isaiah37:30 Ichi ndicho chichava chiratidzo chako, nakauno zvamuchadya zvichamera zvoga, gore ramakei zvichava zvamahoko, mugore rechitatu muchadyara mukatokohwa, muchatosima zvenyu minda yemagirepisi, mukatodyawo zvenyu michero yayo." 
Isaiah37:31 Chitsama chavanhu vokwaJudha chichasara chichadzika midzi pasi, mudenga chichibereka michero" 
Isaiah37:32 nokuti chitsama chinosara chichabuda muJerusaremu chikwata chavanopunyuka rufu chichabuda mugomo reZioni. Shungu dzina Tenzi wehondo nehondo ndidzo dzichaita izvozvi. 
Isaiah37:33 Naizvozvo panyaya yamambo weAsiria uyu zvanzi naTenzi; ‘Haambopinda muguta rino kana museve, haamborikanda. Hapana nhoo yaanomborivheyesera, kana kuriumbira nevhu kurusvingo chimusana chenzou kuita pokupindamo napo." 
Isaiah37:34 Nzira yaakauya nayo yacho ndiyo yaachadzokera nayo. Kupinda muguta rino haambomupinda ndiTenzi anodaro kutaura. 
Isaiah37:35 Ndichadzivirira guta rino ndigoriponesa. Izvozvo ndichiitira iyeni pachangu uye pamusana pomuranda wangu Dhavhidhi.’ ” 
Isaiah37:36 Mutumwa waTenzi akaenda akauraya vanhu zana rezviuru rine zviuru makumi masere nezvishanu. Pakafumomuka vanhu mangwanani, onei ivava vose zvangova zvitunha." 
Isaiah37:37 Senakeribhu mambo weAsiria ndokusimuka oenda kumusha akandogara muNinevhe. 
Isaiah37:38 Zvino akati achinamata ari mumba maNisiroki mwari wake, vanakomana vake, Adhiramereki naSharezeru vakamuuraya nebakatwa vakatizira kunyika yeArarati. Mwanakomana wake Esarihadhoni ndiye akazotonga panzvimbo pake." 
Isaiah38:1 Mumazuva iwayo Hezekiya akarwara zvokuti upenyu pakanga pasisina. Muporofita Isaya mwanakomana waAmozi akaenda kwaari akamuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, chirongai zvomusha wenyu nokuti mava kuzofa, zvoupenyu kwamuri hapasisina.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Ipapo Hezekiya akatendeukira kumadziro ndokunamata kuna Tenzi 
Isaiah38:3 achiti, “Ndakutetererai zvangu Tenzi! Dai mangoyeukawo waro kuwadzana kwandakaita nemi mumafambiro angu ndakatendeseka nomwoyo wose ndichiita zvakarurama zvamunoda.” Hezekiya akaungudza achichema zvikuru kwazvo," 
Isaiah38:4 ndokubva izwi raTenzi rauya kuna Isaya richiti," 
Isaiah38:5 “Enda kuna Hezekiya undoti, zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari watateguru wako Dhavhidhi, ndanzwa munamato wako ndikaona misodzi yako. Chiteerera unzwe, ndichawedzera upenyu hwako namakore gumi namashanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Ndichanunura iwe neguta iro rino iri mumaoko mamambo weAsiria. Ndichadzivirira guta rino iri.” 
Isaiah38:7 “Chiratidzo chamunoitirwa naTenzi chamuchaziva nacho kuti Tenzi achaita zvaakuvimbisai ndechichi. 
Isaiah38:8 Chinzwa, ndichaitisa kuti mumvuri wechiringazuva chiya chakavakwa naAhazi udzokere shure nhano gumi zuva rorereka.” Saizvozvowo zuva rakadzokera shure nhano gumi pachiringazuva chacho dzarakanga rambofamba." 
Isaiah38:9 Zvakanyorwa naHezekiya mambo wokwaJudha mushure mokunge amborwara apora paurwere hwake ndezvizvi: 
Isaiah38:10 Ndakazviti, inga ndava kupfuura ini ndichiri kuzvinzwa kudai. Changu ini chandatemerwawo zvangu chava chokundozaririrwa munzvimbo yavachakabvu upenyu hwangu hwose." 
Isaiah38:11 Ndakazviti, handichazoona Tenzi, Tenzi, ndiri munyika yavapenyu. Ziso rangu harichazoona munhu zvakare ndiri mukati mavanhu vayo nyika." 
Isaiah38:12 Musasa wandiri wapazwa ukabviswa pandiri setendhe yomufudzi. Upenyu hwangu hwapetwa-petwa sezvinoita muruki akandidimura kubva pachirukiso kubvira kwachena kusvikira usiku munondipedzisa. 
Isaiah38:13 Ndinochemera rubatsiro kusvikira kuedze. Anondityora mapfupa angu ose sezvinoita mhondoro kubvira kwachena kusvikira usiku. 
Isaiah38:14 Sekanyenganyenga kana kuti senhapata ndinorira, ndinowuwura senjiva. Maziso angu aneta kutarisa mudenga. Tenzi, ndaona nhamo ini, ivai imi wokundichengeta!" 
Isaiah38:15 Asi chandingataurewo chii nokuti iye ndiye ataura kwandiri, uye iye pachake ndiye azviita. Ndichananavara kufamba upenyu hwangu hwose, zvichikonzerwa nokushungurudzwa mwoyo kwandiri kuita." 
Isaiah38:16 Tenzi, wandichararamira ndimi, mweya wangu unoraramira imi moga. Ndiporesei mundiraramise." 
Isaiah38:17 Ehe, kushungurudzwa kwazvo mwoyo kwandanga ndinako, kwanga kuri kuti zvindinakirewo paupenyu. Asi pamusana porudo rwenyu makandiraramisa mugomba rokuparadzwa nokuti makakanda zvitadzo zvangu zvose shure kwenyu." 
Isaiah38:18 Chandinodariro ndechokuti, nzvimbo yavachakabvu haikutendei, rufu harukurumbidzei, vanoenda kugomba havangakwanise kuva nechitarisiro chokutendeka kwenyu." 
Isaiah38:19 Mupenyu, mupenyu chete ndiye anokutendai sezvandiri kuita nhasi uno. Madzibaba vanotaurira vana vavo nezvokutendeseka kwenyu." 
Isaiah38:20 Tenzi akandinunura nezvo tichiridza zvokuimbisa mazuva ose oupenyu hwedu pamba yaTenzi. 
Isaiah38:21 Ipapo Isaya akanga ati, ngavatore chambwa chemakuyu vachinamire pamota kuti ipore." 
Isaiah38:22 Hezekia akanga atobvunzawo kuti, “Chiratidzo chokuti ndichazoenda kuimba yaTenzi ndechipiko?”" 
Isaiah39:1 Panguva iyoyo Merodhakibharadhani mwanakomana waBharadhani mambo weBhabhironi, akatumira nhume netsamba nechipo kuna Hezekiya nokuti akanga anzwa kuti Hezekiya akanga amborwara akaita nani." 
Isaiah39:2 Hezekiya akavagamuchira zvake akavaratidza dzimba dzake dzokuchengetera upfumi hwomumuzinda hunoti sirivha nendarama netwokubikisa tunonhuwirira namafuta anokosha nezvombo zvake zvehondo nezvose zvaiva mudzimba dzake dzokuchengetera zvinhu. Hezekiya hapana chaakasiya kuvaratidza chaiva mumuzinda make kana zvose zvoumambo. 
Isaiah39:3 Muporofita Isaya akaenda kuna Hezekiya akati kwaari, “Ko shoko rauya navarume ava ndereyi? Vakakubvira nepi?” Hezekiya akati, “Vauya kwandiri vachibva kunyika iri kure kwazvo kuBhabhironi.”" 
Isaiah39:4 Iye akati, “Chiiko chavaona mumuzinda menyu?” Hezekiya akapindura achiti, “Vaona zvose zviri mumuzinda mangu. Hapana chandasiya kuvaratidza mudzimba dzangu dzokuchengetera zvinhu.”" 
Isaiah39:5 Isaya ndokuti kuna Hezekiya, “Chiteererai munzwe zvarehwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Isaiah39:6 Kuchasvika mazuva okuti zvose zviri mumuzinda menyu nezvakachengetwa namadzibaba enyu kusvikira pari nhasi zvitutwe kuendwa nazvo kuBhabhironi pasina chinozosara, ndiTenzi anodaro kutaura." 
Isaiah39:7 Vamwe vana venyu vakomana vamakabereka vachatapwa vakasvikogadzirwa kuitwa vayuniki mumuzinda wamambo weBhabhironi.” 
Isaiah39:8 Hezekiya akati kuna Isaya, “Shoko raTenzi rawataura ishoko rakanaka, nokuti chero kuine rugare nokugadzikana kwezvinhu mumazuva angu.”" 
Isaiah40:1 “Nyaradzai, nyaradzai vanhu vangu” ndizvo zviri kutaura Mwari wenyu," 
Isaiah40:2 “Taurirai Jerusaremu mazwi anonyaradza mwoyo, muparidze Jerusaremu kuti nguva yenyu yehondo yapera uye kuti mhosva yenyu yaregererwa uyewo kuti makatogamuchira kare kakapetwa kaviri chirango cheshamhu yaTenzi chezvitadzo zvenyu zvose.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Izwi rinodaidzira richiti, “Gadzirai murenje mugwagwa waTenzi, ruramisirai Mwari wedu mugwagwa mukuru mugwenga." 
Isaiah40:4 Mapani ose ngaafushirwe, makomo ose nezvikomo ngazviparadzirwe zviti pasi sandarara. Panenge pasina kuenzana panyatsonzi chechetere, pana magadhi magadhi panyatsoti ware ware." 
Isaiah40:5 Mbiri yaTenzi ichaburitswa pachena, vanhu vose vachaiona pamwechete, nokuti Tenzi anozvitaura nomromo wake.”" 
Isaiah40:6 Izwi rakati, “Daidzira!” Ini ndikati, “Ndodaidzira kuti kuti?” Iti, “Vanhu vose zvavo uswa norunako rwavo rwakaita seruva zvaro resango." 
Isaiah40:7 Uswa hunouna, ruva rinosvava pazvinongorohwa nemhepo inofuridzwa naTenzi kwazviri, chokwadika vanhu uswa zvahwo." 
Isaiah40:8 Uswa hunouna, ruva rinosvava asi shoko raMwari wedu rinogara nokusingaperi.”" 
Isaiah40:9 Kwira pamusoro pegomo refu iwe Zioni muparidzi wamashoko akanaka, udaidzire nezwi guru iwe Jerusaremu muparidzi wamashoko akanaka, daidzira usatye. Iti kumaguta ekwaJudha, hoyo, tarirai muone Mwari wenyu." 
Isaiah40:10 Tarisai muone, Tenzi ari kuuya nesimba rake anotonga nesimba roruoko rwake. Tarirai muone, mubayiro wake anawo, muripo wake ndiwo waanotungamidza." 
Isaiah40:11 Achafudza zvipfuwo zvake somufudzi achagumbatira hwayana mumaoko ake achidzitakura pachifuva chake achinyatsonanaidza dzina vana. 
Isaiah40:12 Ndiani akamboera mvura yamakungwa nechanza choruoko rwake kana akamboerawo matenga nechanza chake, kana akamboisa ivhu rapasi pose zvapo mumugomo kunyange kuera makomo muzvikero, kana zvikomo muchikero chomurengarenga?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ndiani akambotungamirira Mweya waTenzi, kana segweta rake achimurayiridza;" 
Isaiah40:14 waakambondobvunza mazano kuti amujekesere ndiani; akambomudzidzisa gwara roruenzaniso ndiani, akambomudzidzisa amupa ruzivo ndiani; akamuratidza nzira yokunzwisisa nayo?" 
Isaiah40:15 Chinzwai munzwe, marudzi ose avanhu aya akaita sedonhwe remvura riri mumugomo, uye akangoita semhukutu iri muzvikero, muonewo zvenyu kuti, zvitsuwa anozvikuhumura zvake seguruva rakatsetseka." 
Isaiah40:16 Rebhanoni haina huni dzakakwana kana mhuka dzayo hadzikwane kuita mupiro wokupisa. 
Isaiah40:17 Marudzi ose zvawo kwaari iye akangoita sechinhu chisina maturo, iye anoaona seasiri chinhu zvavo uye sechinhu pasina." 
Isaiah40:18 Mwari mungamufananidze nei chaizvo, kana kuti chii chaichowo chamungamuenzanise nacho?" 
Isaiah40:19 Chifananidzo chokunamata, chinotoita zvokugadzirwa nomushandi, mhizha yezvendarama yochinamirira nendarama yochigadzirira cheni dzesirivha." 
Isaiah40:20 Murombo anotozozvisarudzira zvake huniwo zvadzo dzisingaori kuti awane chokuitisa mupiro anotsvakawo nyanzvi inoziva basa kuzomisa chifananidzo chokunamata chisingazobviswa. 
Isaiah40:21 Hamuna zvamunoziva here? Hamuna chamakambonzwa here? Hamuna here chamakataurirwa pakutanga? Hamunzwisisi here mavambirwo akaita nyika? 
Isaiah40:22 Iye agere pamusoro peziendanakuenda rakatenderedza nyika ina vanhu vageremo, vakaita sezvitaunhau iye akawarira matenga sejira rokudzikatirisa anoatambanudza somusasa wetendhe wokugara," 
Isaiah40:23 anoita kuti machinda ave zvinhu zvisina maturo, anoita kuti vatongi vapanyika vave vanhu pasina." 
Isaiah40:24 Vanoita sokungonzi simwei kana kuti dyarwei midzi isati yatombobata muvhu, iye akangovafuridza nemhepo yake vanobva vawuna votututswa nemhepo huru ine simba sehundi." 
Isaiah40:25 Zvino munonditora saani chaizvo wamunondienzanisa naye? Ndizvo zviri kubvunzwa naiye Anoera. 
Isaiah40:26 Munodiiko kumbosimudza musoro mukaonawo kuti ndiani chaizvo akasika zvose izvozvi, iye anozvitungamirira sehondo nouwandi hwazvo kudaro achizvidaidza zvose namazita. Pamusana poukuru hwesimba rake uye nokuti pasimba chikakarara chaicho, hapana nechimwe chinenge chisipo." 
Isaiah40:27 Nhaiwe Jakobho, nhaiwe Isiraeri, unodirei kutaura. Chii chauri kunyunyutira uchiti? “Upenyu hwangu ini kuna Mwari hwava chinhu chakavandika uye zvokuti ndiwane zvandinofanira kuwana Mwari haasisina hanya nazvo.”" 
Isaiah40:28 Hamuna zvamunoziva here? Hamuna chamakambonzwa here kuti, Tenzi ndiye Mwari, Chidzachepo kuti ndiye Musiki wenyika yose zvayo kusvika kwainoperera? Haamborukutika kana kuneta zvako, udzamu hwepfungwa dzake hakuna angahubate." 
Isaiah40:29 Anopa simba munhu anenge arukutika, anenge asina simba anomusimbaradza." 
Isaiah40:30 Kunyange vechidiki vanorukutika vachitoneta, majaya anowira pasi nokuneta" 
Isaiah40:31 asi vanovimba naTenzi simba ravo richavandudzwa, vachabhururuka namapapiro samakondo vachamhanya asi vasinganeti vachafamba asi vasingarukutiki." 
Isaiah41:1 “Nditeererei makanyarara imi nyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa, imi ndudzi dzavanhu chisungai dzisimbe muuye padyo mutaure, ngatiunganei pamwechete titongane." 
Isaiah41:2 “Ndiani akasvosva munhu wokumabvazuva anoti pose paatsika anongokurira chete. Anoti marudzi mumaoko make kacha achitsokodzera madzimambo pasi petsoka. Nebakatwa rake anoita kuti vave guruva, nouta hwake achivaitisa chimwandamwanda samashanga." 
Isaiah41:3 Anonyatsovaronda pasina kana chinomuwana nenzira dzaasati ambotsika zvake. 
Isaiah41:4 Ndiani akaita kuti zvose izvozvi zviitike, ndiani aipa zvijana kuzvizvarwa nezvizvarwa kubvira pakutanga? Ndinika iyeni Tenzi. Ndini iye wokutanga noWokupedzisira." 
Isaiah41:5 “Nyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa dzakazviona dzikatya, vekwakaperera nyika chaiko vakadedera vava kukotonoka kuuya." 
Isaiah41:6 Vanhu vari kuyamurana mumwe achitaurira mumwe wake kuti, ‘Tsunga mwoyo.’" 
Isaiah41:7 Mhizha yebasa inokurudzirana nemhizha yezvendarama nowokukwenenzvera achipfura nenyundo neanorova pachisindi achiti kune anonama, ‘Manamiro acho akanaka.’ Vanorovera chifananidzo chokunamata nezvipikiri kuti chirege kuzunguzika." 
Isaiah41:8 “Asi iwe Isiraeri, muranda wangu, iwe Jakobho wandakasarudza Imi chizvarwa chaAbhurahamu, shamwari yangu." 
Isaiah41:9 Iwe wandakatora kubva kwakaperera nyika ndikakudaidza kubva kure kure, ndichiti kwauri ‘Iwe uri muranda wangu ndakusarudza handina kukurasa." 
Isaiah41:10 Naizvozvo usatye nokuti ndinewe. Usatambudzike zvako mumwoyo nokuti ini ndini Mwari wako. Ini ndichakusimbisa ndichikubatsira, ndichakutsigira noruoko rwangu runokurira.’" 
Isaiah41:11 “Chinzwa, vose zvavo vane daka newe vachanyadziswa zvigovapazamisa, vanorwisana newe vachava sezvinhu pasina vagotsakatika." 
Isaiah41:12 Vanokwikwidzana newe uchavatsvaka ukavashaya vanorwisana newe vachava sechinhu chisina maturo 
Isaiah41:13 nokuti ini Tenzi, Mwari wako ndakakubata ruoko rwako rworudyi. Ini ndini ndiri kukuti, ‘Rega kumbotya zvako ndinokubatsira.’" 
Isaiah41:14 “Rega kutya Jakobho, iyewe honye zvayo kudai, iyemi vanhu veIsiraeri! Ndichakubatsirai, ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi; mununuri wenyu, ndini Anoera waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah41:15 Chinzwai, ndichakuitai chinhu chokupurisa nacho chitsva chakapinza china mazino uzopura makomo uchiaparadza, zvikomo uchizviita semarara zvawo." 
Isaiah41:16 Muchazviurutsa zvigopeperetswa nemhepo zvigomwarariswa nedutu. Asi imi muchazofara zvikuru muri muna Tenzi, muchakurumbira naiye Anoera waIsiraeri." 
Isaiah41:17 “Varombo navasina chavanacho vari kutsvaka mvura, asi hapana vatooma pahuro nenyota, ini Tenzi ndichavapindura, Ini Mwari weIsiraeri handivafuratiri." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndichadziura hova pazvikomo zvisina miti nezvisipiti mumapani, Renje ndichariita dziva remvura pasi pakaoma ndichipaita chisipiti chemvura." 
Isaiah41:19 Murenje ndichamumeresa miti yemisidhari yemiunga neyemumituri nemiorivhi, ndichisima mugwenga misaipurasi nemipureni nemipaini pamwechete" 
Isaiah41:20 kuitira kuti vanhu vaone vagoziva, varangarire vagonzwisisa pamwechete kuti simba roruoko rwaTenzi ndorwaita izvozvi, uye kuti iye Anoera waIsiraeri ndiye asika izvozvi." 
Isaiah41:21 “Tenzi ari kuti, pirai nyaya yenyu muunze zvokutsigira nyaya yenyu. Ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naMambo wevokwaJakobho." 
Isaiah41:22 Ngavauye nazvo zvifanotinyevera zvichazoitika, zvititaurire zvinhu zvapasi chigare kuti ndezvipi zvacho, tifunge nezvazvo tizive kwazvichazoperera kana kuti zvitizivise zviri mune ramangwana," 
Isaiah41:23 zvititaurire zvichaitika mangwana tiziveka kuti muri vanamwari. Wanaiwo chamungaite chingave chakanaka kana chakaipa chitikangaidzeka kana kutityisa. 
Isaiah41:24 Chionaika kuti, hapana nezvamuri, zvamunoita zvinhu pasina. Anokusarudzai anosemesa kwazvo." 
Isaiah41:25 “Ndamutsa mumwe wokumaodzanyemba ari kuuya nechokumabvazuva anonamata zita rangu. Anotsokodzera vatongi semadhaka, somuumbi ari kukanya munyakwe." 
Isaiah41:26 Ndiani akazvitaura pakutanga kuti tizvizivewo akafanozvireva kuti tigoti, ‘Aiva pachokwadi.’ Hapana akafanozvitaura kana kuwana akazviparidza. Hapana kana neakambokunzwai muchizvitaura." 
Isaiah41:27 Hezvika ndatotanga kuzviparidza muZioni, ndapa kuJerusaremu muparidzi weshoko rakanaka." 
Isaiah41:28 Asi ndinoti ndakatarisa ndinoona pasina mumwe akadai. Pakati paivava hapana kana jinda zvaro rokuti kana ndikabvunza ringapindure. 
Isaiah41:29 Munongozvionawo kuti, vose zvavo mazungairwa chaiwo, zvavanoita hazvina maturo zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvoutare hwakanyungurutswa inongovawo mhepo zvayo, hapana zviripo.”" 
Isaiah42:1 “Hoyu muranda wangu wandinotsigira munhu wandakazvisarudzira, wangu wepamwoyo. Ndakaisa Mweya wangu maari, achaunzira marudzi avanhu ruenzaniso." 
Isaiah42:2 Haazoita zvokudaidzira kana zvokushevedzera nenzwi rake kunyange kuita kuti rinzwike mumugwagwa. 
Isaiah42:3 Rutsanga runenge rwakatyoka haridimure, rambhi rine tambo inoti kamoto roi roi kubvira haaridzime, achaunzira vanhu ruenzaniso chairwo." 
Isaiah42:4 Haachazorasa mwoyo kana kudzokera shure. Kusvikira aunza ruenzaniso panyika, nyika dziri kumahombekombe kwegungwa dzamirira mutemo wake.”" 
Isaiah42:5 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, iye akasika matenga achiatambanudza nokokoko iye akawarira nyika nezviri mairi iye anopa vanhu mweya wokufema iye anopa upenyu vanofamba mairi," 
Isaiah42:6 “Ndini Tenzi. Ndakakudaidzira kuzoita zvinhu chaizvo zvakarurama, ndakakubata ruoko ndikakuchengeta. Iwe ndiwe wandakaita kuti uve sechitenderano changu nendudzi dzavanhu chiedza kumarudzi avanhu" 
Isaiah42:7 kuzozarura maziso amapofu, kuzoburitsa vasungwa mujeri rapasi pevhu kuburitsa mujeri vagere muzarima." 
Isaiah42:8 Ndini Yahweh, irori ndiro zita rangu. Hakuna zvako kana mumwe wandinopa ukuru hwangu kana kupa kurumbidzwa kwandinoitwa kuzvifananidzo zvokunamata zvakavezwa." 
Isaiah42:9 Chionaika kuti, zvinhu zvakare zvakatoitika zvino ndava kukuzivisai zvinhu zvitsva nguva yokuitika kwazvo isati yasvika, ndava kufanokutaurirai nezvazvo.”" 
Isaiah42:10 Imbirai Tenzi rwiyo rutsva mumurumbidze, kubvira kumucheto wapasi pose. Gungwa ngaritinhire nezvose zviri mariri nenyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa navagari vadzo." 
Isaiah42:11 Gwenga namaguta aro ngazvidaidzire nezwi razvo nemishawo inogara Kedhari. Vagari vokuSera ngavaimbe nokufara kwazvo. Ngavadaidzire vari pamusoro chaipo pamakomo. 
Isaiah42:12 Ngavape mbiri kuna Tenzi vadhumise mukurumbira wake munyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa 
Isaiah42:13 Tenzi ari kuenda zvake segamba chairo rehondo, anoviruka nehasha somunhu wehondo. Anodaidzira anoshevedzera achizviratidza kuti ane simba rokukurira mhandu dzake." 
Isaiah42:14 Kwenguva ndefu ndanga ndinyerere zvangu, ndanga ndakangobata mwoyo ndichizvidzora zvangu. Zvino ndava kuridza mhere somukadzi ari panguva yokusununguka, ndochitura femo ndichifemereka." 
Isaiah42:15 Makomo nezvikomo ndichazviti pasi mbombombo kuparadza ndiomese zvose zvinomeramo. Nzizi ndichadzisandura kuita zvitsuwa madziva ndichiaomesa. 
Isaiah42:16 Uye mapofu ndichaatungamirira nenzira yavasingazivi, ndichivatungamirira nomutunzira twavanga vasingazivi. Panzvimbo perima rakavaputira ini ndichaisa chiedza pana makomba makomba ndichiita kuti pati chechetere. Izvozvi izvi ndozvinhu zvandichaita, handisi kuzovafuratira." 
Isaiah42:17 Asi vachapishunurwa vachinyadziswa chaizvo vanovimba nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvakavezwa, vanoti kuzvifananidzo zvoutare hwakaita zvokunyungurutswa, “Imi ndimi vamwari vedu.”" 
Isaiah42:18 Chinzwa unzwe iwe matsi chitarisa iwe bofu uonewo! 
Isaiah42:19 Ndiani chaizvo ano upofu kusatoti iye muranda wangu, kana kuti ane umatsi sohwenhume yangu yandinotuma? Ndiani chaizvo ane upofu sehwaiye akateketererweni uyu, kana kuti ane upofu hwakaita sohwemuranda waTenzi?" 
Isaiah42:20 Unoona zvako zvinhu zvakawanda asi haunyatsozvicherechedza, nzeve dzako dzakazaruka asi haunzwe." 
Isaiah42:21 Tenzi, pamusana pokururama kwake, akafadzwa nokurumbidza mutemo wake nokuita kuti ukurumbire." 
Isaiah42:22 Asi vanhu ivava vanhu vakabhinywa, vakapambwa, vose zvavo vakazaririrwa muninga vakahwandiswa mujeri, vakapinda munhamo isina anonunura, chinhu zvacho chokupamba chisina anoti, “Ngachidzorerwe!”" 
Isaiah42:23 Pakati penyu nyaya iyoyi ndiani angaitetekere nzeve akateerera akanzwa zvakanangana neramangwana? 
Isaiah42:24 Ndianiko wakaisa wokwaJakobho mumaoko omupambi, uye vokwaIsiraeri mumaoko amabhinya? Handiti ndiTenzi here watakatadzira, ana makwara avasina kutevedza ano mutemo wavasina kuteerera?" 
Isaiah42:25 Ndokusaka akapedzera paari shungu dzokuviruka kwaakanga aita nehasha, nokumupinza munhamo yehondo. Akaputirwa namarimi omoto asi kuti zvazvaireva haana kuzvibata zvakamupisa asi chidzidzo chacho hachina kumupinda mumusoro." 
Isaiah43:1 Asi pari zvino zvanzi naTenzi, Iye akasika iwe Jakobho, iye akakuumba iwe Isiraeri “Rega zvako kutya nokuti ndakakununura, ndikakudaidza nezita, uri wangu." 
Isaiah43:2 “Paunopfuura nomumvura zhinji ndichave newe, kana ukapfuura nomunzizi hadzikutore, kana ukafamba nomumoto haukupisi, rimi romoto harikuroromesi." 
Isaiah43:3 Ndinodaro nokuti ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wako iye Anoera waIsiraeri mununuri wako. Ndiri kupa Ijipiti kuti ive chokukutsikinurisa nacho, Itiopia neSebha dzive dzokutsiva iwewe," 
Isaiah43:4 nokuti kwandiri, iwe wakakosha unoremekedzeka uye ndinokuda. Ndinobvisa vanhu kukutenga iwe, vanhu vokutsinhanisa noupenyu hwako" 
Isaiah43:5 Usatye nokuti ndinewe, vana vako ndichavaunza kubva kumabvazuva ndichikukokorodzai kubva kumadokero." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndichati kune vokuchamhembe, regai vanhu ava; kune vokumaodzanyemba ndichiti, musavarambire; unzai vanakomana vangu kubva kure ikoko navanasikana vangu kubva kwakaperera nyika," 
Isaiah43:7 wose zvake wandakadaidza nezita rangu wandakasikira mbiri yangu wandakaumba, wandakaita.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Uya navo vanhu ivavo, mapofu zvawo asi maziso vainawo, matsi zvadzo asi nzeve vainadzo." 
Isaiah43:9 Marudzi ose avanhu ngaaungane pamwechete, ndudzi dzavanhu ngadziungane. Ndiani pakati pavo anogona kuzivisa vanhu izvozvi izvi, atirondedzere zvakaitika kare? Ngavauyeka nezvapupu zvavo zvizovapipirira vanzwe vagoti, “Ichokwadi.”" 
Isaiah43:10 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Imimi ndimi, zvapupu zvangu, iyemi ndimi muranda wangu wandakasarudza kuti mugoziva munditende munzwisise kuti inini ndini iye ari. Hapana mwari akaumbwa ini ndisati ndavepo, kana kuzova nomumwewo zvake mushure mangu." 
Isaiah43:11 Ini ndini Tenzi, kunze kwangu hakuna mununuri." 
Isaiah43:12 Ini ndakataura ndikanunura ndikazviparadza, izvozvo, pakati penyu pakanga pasati pava navamwari vesirivo, imimi ndimi zvapupu zvangu,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi" 
Isaiah43:13 “Ndini Mwari ini. Namangwana ese ndini Iye ari. Hakuna ane chaanogona kununura mumaoko mangu. Chandinenge ndaita ndiani chaizvo angachidzivise?” 
Isaiah43:14 Zvanzi naTenzi, Mununuri wako, iye Anoera waIsiraeri, “Pamusana pako iwe ndichatumira vanhu kuBhabhironi kundotyoranisa zvihuri zvose; zhowezhowe revaKaridhea richasandurwa rikava kuchema." 
Isaiah43:15 Ini ndini Tenzi, iye Anoera wenyu, Musiki weIsiraeri, Mambo wenyu.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Zvanzi naTenzi, iye anoita mugwagwa mugungwa, nenzira mukati memvura ine simba," 
Isaiah43:17 nyakuunza ngoro nebhiza nehondo nomurwi wayo zvigoti pasi umburu pazvisingagoni kumukazve, zvakadzimwa zvikafuridzwa setambo yerambi" 
Isaiah43:18 “Regai kurangarira zvinhu zvakare kana kufunga zvinhu zvepasichigare," 
Isaiah43:19 Chionai ndava kuita chinhu chitsva, chava kutoitika. Hamusi kuchiona here? Ndichaita nzira murenje nenzizi mugwenga." 
Isaiah43:20 Mhuka dzesango dzichandikudza, makava kana mhou; nokuti ndichaita kuti murenje muve nemvura mugwenga muve nenzizi ndichipa mvura yokunwa kuvanhu vangu vandakasarudza," 
Isaiah43:21 vanhu vangu vandakatozvisikira kuti vaite kuti mbiri yangu idhume.” 
Isaiah43:22 “Asi iwe Jakobho hauna kudaidzira kwandiri asi wakatoneta neni iwe Isiraeri. 
Isaiah43:23 Hauna kundivigira hwayana yako yemipiro yokupisa kana kundiremekedza nezvibayiro zvako. Handina kukuremedza nemipiro kana kukunetsa norusenzi. 
Isaiah43:24 Hauna kunditengera nemari rusenzi runonhuhwirira kana kundigutsa namafuta ezvibayiro zvako. Asi kutoti wakatonditakudza mutoro wezvitadzo zvako, ukandifinha nouipi hwako." 
Isaiah43:25 Ini, ini ndini Iye Ari, anodzima zvikanganiso zvako ndichizviita pamusana pangu, zvitadzo zvako ndicharega kuzvirangarira." 
Isaiah43:26 Ndiyeuchidze, ngatiitei dare upire nyaya yako uratidze kuti hauna mhosva." 
Isaiah43:27 Tateguru wako wokutanga akapara mhaka yechitadzo, vaikumiririra kwandiri, vakandikanganisira." 
Isaiah43:28 Ndokusaka ndakan'oresa machinda omuNzvimbo Inoera ndakapinza Jakobho mukuparadzwa chaiko ndikapinza Isiraeri mukushorwa.” 
Isaiah44:1 “Asi zvino chinzwa iwe Jakobho muranda wangu iwe Isiraeri wandakasarudza. 
Isaiah44:2 Tenzi, iye akakusika, iye akakuumba uchiri munhumbu, iye achakubatsira anoti, rega kutya iwe Jakobho muranda wangu iwe Jeshuruni wandakasarudza" 
Isaiah44:3 nokuti ndichadira mvura panyika ine nyota nehova pasi pakaoma. Ndichadururira Mweya wangu pazvizvarwa zvenyu nechikomborero changu pavana venyu. 
Isaiah44:4 Vachatungira souswa huri pakati pemvura zhinji semisambangwena iri muhova dzinoerera. 
Isaiah44:5 Mumwe nomumwe achazviti, ‘Ini ndiri munhu waTenzi ini,’ mumwewo achizvidaidza nezita rokwaJakobho mumwewo achizvinyora paruoko kuti ‘WokwaTenzi,’ achizvipa zita redzinza rokwaIsiraeri.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Zvanzi naTenzi. Mambo weIsiraeri Mununuri wake Tenzi wehondo nehondo, “Ndini Wokutanga, ndini Wokupedzesera. Kunze kwangu ini, hakuna mumwe mwari." 
Isaiah44:7 Ndiani chaizvo akaita seni? Ngaazviparidze, azvizivise vanhu azviise pachena ini ndiripo kudai. Ndiani akafanotaura kare ikako nezvezvinhu zvichauya? Ngavatitaurireka zvichazoveko!" 
Isaiah44:8 Rega zvako kutya kana kuita umbwende, handina kukutaurira here kare ndikatotema izvozvo? Imimi ndimi zvapupu zvangu! Kuno mumwe Mwari here kunze kwangu ini? Hakuna kana rimwe Dombo kana nerimwe zvaro randinoziva.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Vose vanogadzira zvifananidzo zvokunamata, hapana nezvavanhu, uye zvinhu zvavanofarira zvacho izvozvo hazvina chimuko, zvapupu zvacho hazvioni uye hazvina zvazvinoziva kuitira kuti vanyare nazvo." 
Isaiah44:10 Kugadzira here chokwadi mwari kana kuforoma uchiumba chifananidzo chokunamata chisina kana chachinobatsira! 
Isaiah44:11 Chiona, vanamati vacho vachanyadziswa vose zvavo, vagadziri vazvo, vanhu, ngavakokorodzane vose vamire apa, vachadumbirwa nazvo, vachanyara pamwechete." 
Isaiah44:12 Mizha yezvoutare inochipfura ichishandisa moto wamarasha, anochipfura nenyundo, anochipfura nesimba roruoko rwake kuita zvaanoda. Nzara ikamubata opera simba akarega kunwa mvura anorezuka." 
Isaiah44:13 Muvezi anotambanudza tambo wotara nepenzura ochipanha nembezo ochitara nekambasi ochiita kuti chive nechimiro chomunhu chiine runako rwomunhu chiri chokunzi chigare mumba. 
Isaiah44:14 Anotema muti womusidhari kana kusarudza muti womuhorumu kana muoku ourega wokura mukati memiti yesango. Anosima musidhari mvura yokunaya youkudza," 
Isaiah44:15 wotova zvawo huni dzavanhu. Anotora chidimbu chawo wochidziya moto, anobatidza nacho moto obika chokudya. Uyewo anogadzira nacho mwari ochipfugamira, anochiita chifananidzo chokunamata ochigwadamira." 
Isaiah44:16 Chidimbu chacho anochipisa nomoto, pane chimwe chidimbu ndopaanodyira zvake nyama. Anogochera nyama ipapo achitoguta otodziyawo moto wacho achitoti, “Hamuoneka ndadziyirwa ini. Ndomotoka uyu!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Chimwe chidimbu chese chasara ichi anochiveza kuita mwari, chifananidzo chake chokunamata. Anochigwadamira achichipfugamira achichinamata achiti, “Ndinunureiwo, ndimi mwari wangu!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Havazivi kana kugona kupatsanura zvinhu nokuti akavapfiga maziso zvokuti havagoni kuona akavaputira ndangariro kuti vatadze kunzwisisa. 
Isaiah44:19 Hapana anofunga, kana ano ruzivo kunyange anozoitawo ndangariro dzokuti, “Chimwe chidimbu, ndakachikuhwidzisa moto ndikatobika zvangu chokudya pamazimbe acho ndikatogocha nyama ndikadya zvangu, zvino ini ndopandingatore chasara chacho ndoita chinhu chisingadiwi naMwari here? Ndipfugamire here chokwadi chimuti ini?”" 
Isaiah44:20 Kudya dota chaiko ikoku, kurasika njere ikoku kwamurasisa uye haachagona kuzvinunura kana kuzviti, “Chandakabata murudyi ichi hachisi chinhu chenhema here ichi?”" 
Isaiah44:21 “Rangarira zvinhu izvozvi iwe Jakobho izvozvi zvokuti uri muranda wangu iwe Isiraeri. Ndini ndakakusika, uri muranda wangu. Isiraeri, handisi kuzombokukanganwa." 
Isaiah44:22 Ndakawumbura seguti kubvisa zvikanganiso zvako ndikawumbura semhute zvitadzo zvako. Dzokera kwandiri nokuti ndakakununura. 
Isaiah44:23 Imbai norufaro imi matenga imbirai Tenzi nokuti ndiye akazviita imi nzvimbo dzakadzikadzika dzapasi penyika daidzirai, imi makomo tangisai kuimba, newe sango nomuti wose urimo, nokuti Tenzi akanunura Jakobho uye acharumbidzwa muIsiraeri." 
Isaiah44:24 Tenzi, mununuri wako, akakuumba uchiri munhumbu anoti, ‘Ndini Tenzi akasika zvinhu zvose,’ iye woga akatambanudza matenga akawarira nyika nokokoko. Ndiani aiva neni ipapo?" 
Isaiah44:25 Iye anoshayisa mazano shuramanenji dzinofembera zvenhema anopusisa vanoshopera, iye anosandutsa vachenjeri, ruzivo rwavo achiruita chinhu chisina maturo." 
Isaiah44:26 Ndiye anotsigira shoko romuranda wake anoita kuti mazano enhume ashande. Iye anotaura nezveJerusaremu kuti, ‘Richagarwazve navanhu,’ uye nezvamaguta okwaJudha kuti, ‘Achavakwa,’ ndichasimudza kuvaka matongo acho." 
Isaiah44:27 Anoti kuhwenje, ‘Iti papata kuoma, ndichiita kuti nzizi dzenyu dzipwe.’" 
Isaiah44:28 Ndini iyeni ndinoti kuna Sairasi: mufudzi wangu achaita zvose zvandakaronga, achitoti nezveJerusaremu, ‘Ngarivakwe,’ achitiwo, ‘NezveTemberi ugaro hwayo ngahuvakwe.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Tenzi ari kutaurira muzodzwa wake Sairasi wandakabatana ruoko rwerudyi zvokuti ndinofanokurira marudzi avanhu mberi kwake nokushayisa madzimambo simba nokufanozarura makonhi mberi kwake kuitira kuti misuo mikuru irege kupfigwa achiti," 
Isaiah45:2 “Ndichafanoenda mberi kwako ndichifanoita kuti nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dziti chechetere, ndichipaza kuti mwarara makonhi endarira ndichidimura zvihuri zvesimbi." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndichakupa upfumi hwomurima hwakavigwa munzvimbo dzechivande kuti uzive kuti ini ndini Tenzi Mwari weIsiraeri ari kukudoma nezita. 
Isaiah45:4 Chandiri kuitira muranda wangu Jakobho, naIsiraeri wandakasarudza. Ndinokudoma nezita ndichikudaidza nezita redzinza rako kunyange zvako usingandizivi." 
Isaiah45:5 Ndini Tenzi hakuna mumwe, hakuna mumwe Mwari kunze kwangu anokupa simba ndini kunyange usingandizivi" 
Isaiah45:6 kuitira kuti kubvira kumabuda zuva kusvikira kumadokero vanhu vagoziva kuti hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu. Ndini Tenzi hakuna mumwe. 
Isaiah45:7 Ndini ndinoita kuti chiedza chivepo ndichisikawo rima. Ndini ndinoita kuti kuve nokugarika. Ndini ndinounza pfumvu. Ndini iyeni Tenzi ndinoita zvinhu zvese izvozvi. 
Isaiah45:8 “Imi matenga muchadenga'mu nayai, makuti anaise ururami nyika ngaizaruke ruponeso rumere pairi iite kuti ururami hutungirewo, Ini Tenzi ndini ndinozviita.”" 
Isaiah45:9 Ane nhamo munhu anokakavadzana noMusiki wake, ihari inorwisana nomuumbi wayo! Iro ivhu rokuumbisa ringabvunze here anoumba naro kuti, “Ko ndicho chii ichochi chauri kuumba?” Kana kuti, “Inga zvokuumba izvi, hamuna maoko nazvo?”" 
Isaiah45:10 Ane nhamo mwana anoti kuna baba, “Ko ndicho chiikowo ichochi chamakabereka?” Kana kutoti zvake kuna mai, “Ko chiikowo ichochi chamakasununguka?”" 
Isaiah45:11 Tenzi, iye Anoera waIsiraeri, Musiki wake anoti, “Wada here iwe kundibvunza nezvevana vangu? Kana kutondiudza zvokuita nebasa randinoita ini namaoko angu?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ndini ndakaita nyika ndikasika munhu pairi; ini namaoko angu ndini ndakatambanudza matenga uko nekokoko. Ndini ndakabata mumaoko gurusvusvu rezvose zvomudenga imomu. 
Isaiah45:13 Ndini ndakamumutsa mwoyo ndikamupa ukundi ndicharuramisawo makwara ake ose. Achavaka guta rangu achasunungura vanhu vangu vari muutapwa pasina zvokupiwa mubayiro kana muripo.” Ndozvinotaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Isaiah45:14 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Zvinhu zvinoshandwa kuIjipiti noupfumi hwokuItiopia nevaSabhia ivo vaye hofori dzavanhu zvichauya kwamuri zvichiva zvenyu. Vachati rongondo munzira kukuteverai vachayambukira kwamuri vakasungwa nemajoti vachizoti kwamuri pasi kota kota. Vachakutetererai vachiti, imimi chete ndimi muna Mwari, hakuna mumwe, kunze kwake, hakunazve mumwe Mwari!”" 
Isaiah45:15 Imi muri Mwari anozvivanza zvenyu imi Mwari weIsiraeri, Mununuri." 
Isaiah45:16 Vose zvavo vanenge vanyadziswa, vatsveruka, vagadziri vezvifananidzo zvokunamata vachadumbirwa pamwechete." 
Isaiah45:17 Asi Isiraeri inonunurwa naTenzi nokununura kunogara narini wose asi imimi zvokunyadziswa hamunyadziswe kana kutsverutswa zvako nokusingaperi. 
Isaiah45:18 Chikonzero ndechokuti iye Tenzi, Nyakusika matenga ndiye Mwari iyeyu akaumba nyika akaiita, akaita kuti imire kudai; haana kuisika sechinhu chisina kunyatsoumbwa. Chaakaisikira kuti igarwe navanhu. Ari kuti, “Ini ndini Tenzi, hakuna mumwe." 
Isaiah45:19 Handina kutaura muchivande mukati menyika yerima. Handina kumboti kuzvizvarwa zvokwaJakobho, ‘Nditsvakei pasina.’ Zvandinoreva ini Tenzi, zvakarurama ndinotaura zvinhu zviri pachokwadi.”" 
Isaiah45:20 “Kokorodzanai muuye muswedere pedyo pamwechete imi vakapunyuka vokumarudzi avanhu uku! Havana noruzivo zvarwo ivo vanotakura zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvezvimiti vachidzunga nazvo vachingogoorera kunamata kuna mwari asingagone kununura. 
Isaiah45:21 Zivisai vanhu mupire nyaya yenyu murege vapane mazano pamwechete! Ndiani akafanozvitaura izvozvi kareko? Ndiani akazvizivisa vanhu kare ikako? Handisiri here ini Tenzi hakuna mumwe Mwari kunze kwangu ini, Mwari akarurama, Mununuri hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu." 
Isaiah45:22 “Tendeukirai kwandiri muponeswe imi vekwose kwakaperera nyika ndinodaro nokuti ini ndini Mwari hakuna mumwe. 
Isaiah45:23 Ndinopika neni pachangu kuti shoko rangu randareva muururami muromo usingawire pasi rinoti, ‘Ibvi rose zvaro richandipfugamira rurimi rwese zvarwo ruchandipupura.’" 
Isaiah45:24 “Zvichataurwa nezvangu zvichinzi, ‘Muna Tenzi chete ndimo mune ururami nesimba. Vose zvavo vaiva nedaka naye vachauya kwaari vachinyara.’" 
Isaiah45:25 “Muna Tenzi umu zvizvarwa zvose zvokwaIsiraeri zvichava nokukurira nembiri.” 
Isaiah46:1 Bhero achiti gojoto Nebho achiti undundu, zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvatoiswa pazvipfuwo napamombe zvinhu zvenyu izvozvi zvava kuita zvokutotakurwa pamhuka dzakaneta zvadzo." 
Isaiah46:2 Zvose pamwechete zvakati undundu, zvachiti gojoto mutoro wazvinofanira kununura zvipfuwo hazvichaugona kuununura asi kutoti naizvowo zvotoenda kuutapwa." 
Isaiah46:3 Chimboteererai kwandiri munzwe, imi vemba yokwaJakobho imi mose chitsama chavanhu vokwaIsiraeri chakasara, imi vandakatakura kubvira pakuberekwa kwenyu. Ndakakutakurai kubvira muchiri mudumbu" 
Isaiah46:4 kusvikira pamunochembera, ndini, kusvikira muchene musoro ndini ndinokutakurai. Ndini ndinosika, ndini ndinochengeta, ndini ndinotakura, ndini ndinonunura." 
Isaiah46:5 Munondifananidza naani chaizvo wamunoti akaita seni, munondienzanisa naani wamungandifananidza naye?" 
Isaiah46:6 Vanoodzvora ndarama muhomwe dzavo vachiera sirivha pazvikero, vanokumbira mupfuri wesimbi ovaumbira mwari ivo vototi pasi gwadagwa kuchipfugamira!" 
Isaiah46:7 Vanochisumudza vochichiisa pamapfudzi vochitakura vondochigadzika panzvimbo pacho chobva chati ipapo mbikiti zvokutsukunyuka ipapo hachigoni Kana munhu akachema kwachiri hachipinduri kana kumununura munhamo yake. 
Isaiah46:8 Yeukai zvinhu izvozvi muchinyatsofungisisa murangarire izvozvi izvi mumwoyo menyu imi vakanganisi 
Isaiah46:9 rangarirai zvinhu zvaiveko chigariro nokuti inini ndini Mwari hakuna mumwe. Ndini Mwari iyeni hakuna mumwe akaita seni," 
Isaiah46:10 ndakaparidza kubvira pakutanga magumiro achaita zvinhu kubvira pasi chigare zvinhu zvainge zvisati zvaitika ndichiti, “Zvandinenge ndaronga zvinotoitika chandinenge ndafunga kuita ndinotobudirira kuchiita.”" 
Isaiah46:11 Ndichadaidza kumabvazuva shiri inodya nyama munhu wokuita zvandakaronga wokunyika yokurekure. Ndini ndazvitaura uye ndichaita kuti zviitike ndini ndazvironga ndichazviita. 
Isaiah46:12 Chiteererai kwandiri munzwe imi tsvuuramuromo dzavanhu iyemi muri kure noruponeso 
Isaiah46:13 nguva yangu yokukunda yave padyo, haisisiri kure uye ruponeso rwangu haruchanonoka. Ndichaponesa Zioni kuitira Isiraeri mbiri yangu." 
Isaiah47:1 Chiburuka pasi ugare pavhu iwe mukunda mhandara, guta reBhabhironi ugare pasi usina chigaro choumambo. Iwe mukunda, guta revaKaridhea nokuti hauchanzi munhu ano mwoyo munyoro mwoyo wokuziva." 
Isaiah47:2 Chitotora makuyo uchikuya zvako upfu, vhoiri rako bvisa, katanura rokwe rako rinozvezvera napasi. Kwinya rokwe rako urisvitse muchiuno uyambuke nzizi." 
Isaiah47:3 Muviri wako uchaiswa pachena, uonererwe navanhu. Ndichatsividza ndisina wandinosiya." 
Isaiah47:4 Mununuri wedu ndiTenzi wehondo nehondo, ndozita rake iroro, ndiye Anoera weIsiraeri." 
Isaiah47:5 Chigara chinyararire upinde murima, iwe mukunda guta revaKaridhea, nokuti hauchazonzi shasha anotonga dzinyika." 
Isaiah47:6 Ndakanga ndashatirirwa vanhu vangu ndikan'oresa nhaka yangu ndikaiti mumaoko mako kuche, iwe hauna kuvaitira tsiye nyoro. Pane vakanga vakwegura ava joko rako wakariita kuti rinyatsoremesesa chaizvo" 
Isaiah47:7 uchizviti, “Ndini ndichagara ndiri shasha narini wose.” Zvokuti mumwoyo mako umu zvinhu izvozvi izvi hauna kumbozvifunga kana kumborangarira zvako magumo wazvo." 
Isaiah47:8 Zvino naizvozvo chinzwa zvinhu izvi, iwe munhu wokusasana, iwe wakanyatsogarikana unozviti mumwoyo “Ndini pano ini, hakuna mumwe akaita seni! Ini, kugara sechirikadzi, hazvitomboitika, kana iko zvako kunzi ndafirwawo navana.”" 
Isaiah47:9 Izvozvi zviri zviviri uchayerekana zvakuwira zuva rimwechetero, iko kushayikirwa navana nouchirikadzi, zvichakuwira nomwero wakanyatsokwana kunyange zvazvo iwe uine uroyi hwakanyanya kudai nesimba guru remakona ako." 
Isaiah47:10 Wakatogadzikana zvako mwoyo uri muhuipi hwako ihwohwo uchitozviti, “Hakuna anondiona.” Uchenjeri hwako noruzivo rwako, zvakakurasisa uchizviti mumwoyo, “Ndini pano ini hakuna mumwe kunze kwangu.”" 
Isaiah47:11 Asi nhamo ichakuvinga yausingagoni kupedza nokupfupira, uchawirwa nenyatwa yausingakwanise kupodza nokupira, uchayerekana wawirwa nedzinoparadza dzausina chaunoziva nezvadzo." 
Isaiah47:12 Batisisa zvemakona ako izvozvo nezvouroyi hwako hwakanyanya ihwohwo zvawadai kushanda nazvo kubvira pauduku hwako dzimwe nguva ungagone kubudiriraka, zvimwe ungambotyisidzirawo." 
Isaiah47:13 Waneteswa nawo mazano ako akawanda, ngaachimiraka akununure tione, ivo vanoisa matenga muzvikamu zvikamu vanoongorora nyenyedzi pakugara kwemwedzi vanoti pakugara kwemwedzi vofemberaka pamusoro pezvichazokuwira." 
Isaiah47:14 Hezvo vava kunge zvidzitsi, moto wovaroromesa zvino. Havachakwanisi kuzvinunura kusimba rokupisa kwerimi racho. Haasi mavhunze okuti munhu adziye usiri moto wokugara padyo uchigota!" 
Isaiah47:15 Ndizvozvo chete zvavanogona kukuitira kuna ivo vacho kwawaindobvunzira kubvira pauduku hwako, vachakudzvamuka voti uyu nokwake uyu nokwake, wokukununura panenge pasisina." 
Isaiah48:1 Teererai munzwe izvi imi vemba yokwaJakobho imi munodaidzwa nezita raIsiraeri uye makabva muura hwaJudha, imi munopika nezita raTenzi uye munozviti vanamati vaMwari weIsiraeri musingazviiti pachokwadi kana nomazvo," 
Isaiah48:2 nokuti munozviti vagari veguta rinoera uye kuti munovimba naMwari weIsiraeri ane zita rokuti Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Isaiah48:3 Zvinhu zvakare, ndakafanozvitaura nomuromo wangu ndikazviparidza, uye ndakazviita pakarepo zvikabva zvaitika." 
Isaiah48:4 Pamusana pokuti ndaizviziva kuti iwe uri tsvuuramuromo wakaomarara sesimbi uye kuti sendarira hautepuki," 
Isaiah48:5 ndakazviparidza kwamuri kubvira kare zvisati zvaitika, ndakazvitaura kwamuri ndichiti mungadaro mukazoti zvifananidzo zvedu zvekunamata ndizvo zvakazviita, kana kuti zvifananidzo zvedu zvokuveza kana zvokuumba ndozvakati zviitwe." 
Isaiah48:6 Makazvinzwa zvino mazvionaka zvose izvi saka imi hamusi kubvuma here? Kubvira iye zvino ndavakukutaurirai zvinhu zvitsva zvinhu zvakavanzika zvamusati mamboziva. 
Isaiah48:7 Zvandava kuita iye zvino, kwete zvakaitika kare kare, kusvika pari nhasi hamusati mambozvinzwa nokuti mungadaro mukati, “Ndaizviziva wani.”" 
Isaiah48:8 Hamuna kumbozvinzwa kana kumbozviziva, nakare kose hazvina kumbopinda munzeve dzenyu, nokuti ndaiziva kuti imi hamutendeki, uye kuti kubvira pauduku hwenyu mainzi vapanduki." 
Isaiah48:9 Pamusana pezita rangu ndiri kumbodzora zvangu hasha dzangu. Pamusana pembiri yangu ndiri kudzidzora zvangu kuti ndirege kukuparadzai. 
Isaiah48:10 Chinzwai, ndakakunatsai, asi kwete kuita sesirivha, ndakakuedzai muvira ramatambudziko." 
Isaiah48:11 Ndiri kuzviitira ini pachangu, Wandiri kuitira wacho ndini. Chandingashorerwe zvangu zita rangu chii? Handingaregi mbiri yangu ichienda zvayo kuna vamwe." 
Isaiah48:12 “Chimbondinzwa unzwe Jakobho, iwe Isiraeri wandakadaidza. Ndini Iye ari, ndini wokutanga ndini wokupedzesera." 
Isaiah48:13 Ini noruoko rwangu ndini ndakaita ugaro hwenyika ini norudyi rwangu ndikaawarira matenga. Pandinozvidaidza zvinobva zvati pamwechete zhandanu kumira. 
Isaiah48:14 “Kokorodzanai mose zvenyu munzwe, ndiani pakati pavo akaparidza zvinhu izvozvi? Tenzi anomuda achiita zvaanoda neBhabhironi, nesimba roruoko rwake acharwisa vaKaridhea." 
Isaiah48:15 Ini iyeni ndini ndataura, ndini ndakamudaidza ndikauya naye uye achabudirira mune zvose zvaanoita." 
Isaiah48:16 Swederai kwandiri munzwe izvi, kubvira pakutanga handina kumbotaura, muchivande, kubvira panguva yazvakaitika ini ndakanga ndiripo.” Iye zvino Tenzi Mwari andituma neMweya wake." 
Isaiah48:17 Zvanzi naTenzi, Mununuri wenyu, iye anoera weIsiraeri, “Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu iye anokudzidzisai zvine chimuko, anokutungamirirai mugwara ramunofanira kufamba naro." 
Isaiah48:18 Dai makangoteerera waro mitemo yangu, rugare rwenyu rungadai rwakaita serwizi, kururama kwenyu kuchiitawo samasaisai egungwa," 
Isaiah48:19 vana venyu vangadai vakaita sejecha kuwanda, zvizukuru zvenyu zvakaita setsanga dzaro zita ravo risingamboitwa kuti rirove kana zvako kutsakatika kwandiri.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Budidzanai muBhabhironi mutize munyika yeKaridhea Paridzai vanhu zvinhu izvozvi, muchiita mupururu wokupembera kufara muchivazivisa izvozvi zvisvitsei kwakaperera nyika chaiko muchiti, “Tenzi anunura muranda wake Jakobho!”" 
Isaiah48:21 Havana kumbonzwa nyota paakavatungamirira nomurenje, akavaitira kuti mvura iyerere ichibuda mudombo, akatsemura padombo mvura ikapfachuka kubuda." 
Isaiah48:22 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Vakaipa havana rugare.”" 
Isaiah49:1 Nditeererei munzwe imi nyika dzokumahombekombe, munzwe imi ndudzi dzavanhu dzokurekure Tenzi akandidaidza ndichiri munhumbu akanditumidza zita ndiri munhumbu mamai vangu." 
Isaiah49:2 Akaita kuti muromo wandinotaura unge bakatwa rakapinza akandihwandisa mumumvuri weruoko rwake. Akandiita museve wakakwenenzverwa akandihwandisa mumukutu wake. 
Isaiah49:3 Akanditi, “Iwe ndiwe muranda wangu iwe Isiraeri uchaita kuti ndidhumhe mbiri.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Asi ini ndakati, “Inga ndakashandira pasina ndakapedzera simba pasina, nezvinhu zvisina maturo ose. Asi changu ini chiri muna Tenzi, nomubayiro wangu una Mwari wangu.”" 
Isaiah49:5 Saka zvino zvanzi naTenzi, iye akandiumba ndichiri mudumbu kuti ndizova muranda wake wokudzosera vokwaJakobho kwaari kuti Isiraeri izoungana kwaari nokuti ini ndiri munhu anoremekedzeka kuna Tenzi, uye Mwari ndiye simba rangu," 
Isaiah49:6 iye anoti, “Chinhu chiduku nhai chokuti iwe uve muranda wangu, wokumutsa rudzi rwekwaJakobho nokudzosera pakare vacho vakachengetedzeka vokwaIsiraeri. Inga ndichaita kuti uve sechiedza kumarudzi evanhu kuitira kuti ruponeso rwangu rusvike kwakaperera nyika chaiko.”" 
Isaiah49:7 Zvanzi naTenzi, iye Mununuri weIsiraeri iye Anoera wayo kuna iye anozvidzwa zvokupedzesera anosemwa namarudzi evanhu, iye muranda wevatongi achiti, “Madzimambo achakuona vakasimuka machinda vachakupfugamira pamusana paTenzi akatendaka Anoera waIsiraeri akakusarudza.”" 
Isaiah49:8 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Ndichakupindura panguva kwayo pazuva roruponeso ndichakubatsira ndichakuchengeta. Ndichaita kuti uve mumiriri wevanhu vose ndichiita chitenderano changu navo chokuvadzosera nyika uye vagogoverwa nhaka yakanga yadai kuparara" 
Isaiah49:9 uye kuti uti vasungwa vabude muusungwa, vari murima vabude pachena. Vachafura zvavo, munyasi memigwagwa mikuru uye pamitunhu yakatunhumara isina miti ndopavachafurira zvavo" 
Isaiah49:10 havachazonzwa nzara kana nyota, kunyange mhepo inopisa nezuva hazvizovatumhisa, nokuti iye anovada kwazvo achavatungamirira achivasesedza nokuzvitubu zvemvura." 
Isaiah49:11 Ndichaita kuti pamakomo angu pose pave nomugwagwa, uye migwagwa yangu mikuru ichaitwa kuti itanhuke." 
Isaiah49:12 Tarisai muone vamwe vachabva kure, vamwe vachibva kuchamhembe nokumadokero, vamwewo vachibva kunyika yeAsiwani.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Imbai norufaro imi matenga upembere iwe nyika, tsemurai mumhanzi imi makomo nokuti Tenzi ava kunyaradza vanhu vake nokunzwira tsitsi vanhu vake vari munhamo." 
Isaiah49:14 Asi guta reZioni rakati, “Tenzi akandifuratira Tenzi wangu, akandikanganwa.”" 
Isaiah49:15 “Mudzimai angakanganwe here mwana wake achiri kuyamwa, achitadza kuva netsitsi nomwana akabva munhumbu make? Kunyange zvazvo ivava vakakanganwa asi ini handizokukanganwi." 
Isaiah49:16 Chinzwa unzwe ndakaita zvokukutemera senyora muzvanza zvamaoko angu, tsvingo dzako dzinogara dziri mupfungwa dzangu." 
Isaiah49:17 “Vana venyu vava kupitipidza kudzoka vaikuparadzai vava kubudidzana kuenda. 
Isaiah49:18 Simudzai musoro mutarise kwose kwose muone kuti vari kuungana vose zvavo vachiuya kwamuri. Hezvino ndakudai ini Tenzi, ndinoti vose zvavo vachatoti pauri nyerere sezvishongo, sezvinoita muroora pamuchato kusungirira hanzu ndozvauchaita kuunganidza pauri vana vako." 
Isaiah49:19 “Kunyange zvazvo nzvimbo dzemako dzakanga dzarozvwa chaizvo dzasara dzava matongo, ivhu rako rasakadzwa; uye zvino uchanyatsova kamanimani zvokuti vagari vemako vanenge vasisakwane, vaya vakambokuzhanya vachange vava kure kure." 
Isaiah49:20 Vana vakaberekwa nguva yenhamo yako vachakutaura uchinzwa kuti, ‘Nzvimbo iyi yaita diki kwandiri, ndiwanisewo pokugara pakati kurei;’" 
Isaiah49:21 iwe ndopauchati nechomumwoyo, ‘Ko ndiani akandiberekera ivava? Inga ndakanga ndafirwa ini ndisisabereke, ndakanga ndatopwa ini ndachinzi hangu uko njo, ko akazorera ivava ava ndiani? Zvamunoona ndakasiyiwa ndava ndoga, ko ava vabva nepiko?’ ”" 
Isaiah49:22 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Chinzwa, ndichasumudza ruoko rwangu kumarudzi avanhu, ndichininira kundudzi dzavanhu. Vachauya vakatakura vanakomana mumaoko, vanasikana vako vari pamapfudzi." 
Isaiah49:23 Madzimambo achave madzibaba okukuchengeta vanavahosi vavowo vari vanamaiwo vokukurera. Vachati uso pasi kota kota vachikuremekedza, vachizvirereka zvokutonanzva guruva retsoka dzako. Ndopaunobva wazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi vose vanovimba neni havazonyadziswa.”" 
Isaiah49:24 Ko chawira mumaoko eane simba chingabvutwe here kana kununura nhapwa dzomutongi ane utsinye 
Isaiah49:25 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, “Kunyange chawira mumaoko meane simba chichabvutwa, nhapwa dzichinunurwa kumutongi ane utsinye nokuti ndicharwisana nevanokurwisa ndichanunura vana vako." 
Isaiah49:26 Ndichaita kuti ivo vanokudzvanyirira vadye nyama yomuviri wavo, vachadhakwa neropa ravo ivo sevadhakwa newaini. Ndopachaziva munhu wese kuti ini Tenzi ndini Muponesi wako, Muponesi wako noMununuri wako iyeni Samasimbaose waJakobho.”" 
Isaiah50:1 Tenzi ari kuti, “Ko tsamba yegupuro yandakapa amai venyu iripiko yandakavaramba nayo? Kana kuti ndiani wandine chikwereti naye kwandakakuendesai somuripo wechikwereti? Chinzwai, makaendeswako somuripo pamusana pouipi hwenyu kukanganisa kwenyu imi ndokwakaita kuti amai venyu varambwe." 
Isaiah50:2 Seiko pandakauya ndisina kusvikowana munhu, zvandakadaidza sei pasina akadaira? Ko ruoko rwangu rwakapfupikiswa zvokuti harugone kununura here? Kana kuti simba rokununura handina here? Chinzwai, nezwi rangu ini rokutsiura, gungwa rinobva raoma, ndichiita kuti nzizi dzive gwenga zvaro, hove dzadzo dzigonhuhwa nokushaya mvura dzichifa nenyota." 
Isaiah50:3 Ndinoitisa matenga kuti ati ndo-o kusviba ndichiapfekedza masaga sehanzu inopfekwa neakafirwa.” 
Isaiah50:4 Tenzi Mwari akandipa muromo wakadzidziswa kuti ndizive kusimbaradza neshoko vakarukutika. Mangwanani oga oga anondimutsa anondimutsa kuti nzeve yangu iite seyomudzidzi. 
Isaiah50:5 Tenzi Mwari akazarura nzeve dzangu ini handina kupanduka kana kufuratira. 
Isaiah50:6 Ndakarega vanhu vachindirova musana ndikatendeutsira matama angu kune vaindidzura ndebvu. Handina kuvanza chiso changu pamusana penyadzi kana nokupfirwa mate. 
Isaiah50:7 Sezvo Tenzi Mwari anondibatsira naizvozvo handimbopazama musoro, ndokusaka ini ndakaruma shaya uye ndinoziva kuti handizombonyadziswa." 
Isaiah50:8 Anondipipirira ari padyo. Ndiani angapikisane neni? Ngatimirisanei. Ari kundipa mhosva wacho ndiani? Ngaauye pano pandiri. 
Isaiah50:9 Chinzwa, Tenzi Mwari anondiyamura. Ndiani achanditi iwe une mhosva? Teerera unzwe, vose zvavo vachasakara sehembhe vachidyiwa notumashaveshave." 
Isaiah50:10 Ndiani pakati penyu anotya Tenzi iye anoteerera izwi romuranda wake, anofamba murima asina mwenje anovimba nezita yaTenzi? Achitsamira pana Mwari wake?" 
Isaiah50:11 Chinzwai munzwe imi mose munotungidza moto imi munobatidza mazhenje, fambaika zvenyu muchiedza chomoto wenyu iwoyo nemazhenje iwayo amakatungidza. Asi shamhu yandichakupai noruoko rwangu ndeyokugara munhamo." 
Isaiah51:1 “Nditeererei imi munotevera ururami, imi munotsvaka Tenzi. Tarisai kudombo kwamakakwakwanurwa nokuziware kwamakacherwa." 
Isaiah51:2 Hamuone here baba wenyu Abhurahamu, naSara akakuberekai? Nokuti pandakamudaidza, akanga achingova munhu mumwechete ndikazomukomborera nokumupa vana vazhinji," 
Isaiah51:3 nokuti Tenzi achanyaradza guta reZioni achinzwira tsitsi matongo aro ose achaita kuti renje raro rive seEdheni, gwenga raro richiita sebindu raTenzi. Muchafarwa imomo muchipemberwa, muchitendwa Mwari muchiimbwa." 
Isaiah51:4 “Teererai kwandiri vanhu vangu ndinzwei imi rudzi rwavanhu vangu nokuti kwandiri ndokuchabva mutemo noruenzaniso rwangu rwunopa chiedza kumarudzi. 
Isaiah51:5 Nguva yangu yokununura yava kutosvika izvozvi, nguva yangu yokuti ndichiponesa yatova kuuya izvozvi, marudzi evanhu achava mumaoko mangu, ndichatonga nyika dzokumakungwa dzakamirireni, vava kungotarisira kwandiri inini noruoko rwangu." 
Isaiah51:6 Simudzai musoro mutarise nameso enyu kumatenga, mutarisewo panyika pasi pasi nokuti matenga achanyangarika soutsi, pasi pachasakara sembatya, vanhu vanogaramo vachafawo senhunzi. Asi kununura kwangu kuchagara narini wose uye kukunda kwangu kuchavapo nokusingaperi." 
Isaiah51:7 “Nditeererei munzwe imi munoziva ururami, vanhu vane mwoyo une mutemo wangu, regai kutya kushorwa navanhu musatye kunyomba kwavo." 
Isaiah51:8 Ndinodaro nokuti vachadyiwa namabetepeswa sehembe vachidyiwa nezviundudzi semvere. Asi kukunda kwangu kuchavapo nokusingaperi uye kununura kwangu kuchagara kuripo zvizvarwa zvenyu zvose.” 
Isaiah51:9 “Simukai, simukai mukoke simba, imi Tenzi nesimba reruoko rwenyu simukai somumazuva aye epasichigare mazuva aye ekarekare. Hamusirimi here makaita Rahabhu kanyama kanyama muchibaya garanyanya riya?" 
Isaiah51:10 Hamusirimi here makaomesa gungwa mvura zhinji yehwenje chaiyo muchiita kuti pasi pasi pegungwa pave nenzira, kuitira kuti vakanunurwa vapfuure." 
Isaiah51:11 Ipapo vakanunurwa naTenzi vachadzoka, vachauya kuZioni vachiimba vaine rufaro rusingaperi mumwoyo vachava nokupembera nokufara kusuwa nokuyaura zvichati ware kutiza." 
Isaiah51:12 “Ini iyeni ndini ndinokunyaradzai, chaunotyira munhu anofa chii munhuwo zvake akaita souswa" 
Isaiah51:13 uchikanganwa Tenzi akakusika akawarira matenga akaita ugaro hwenyika uchiswerotya zvako ukasha hwomunhu anodzvanyirira, iye akaisa mwoyo mune zvokuparadza? Hwava papiko ukasha hwomunhu anobata vamwe zvakaipa wacho?" 
Isaiah51:14 Nyakumbonzi pasi kota kota atobva asunungurwa izvozvi. Haachapafa kana kudzika kuGomba kunyange kushaya chokudya 
Isaiah51:15 nokuti ini Tenzi, ndini Mwari wako anobvundura gungwa kuti masaisai aro atinhire. NdiTenzi wehondo nehondo ndozita rake irori." 
Isaiah51:16 Ndaisa mashoko angu mumuromo mako iwe ndikakuhwandisa mumumvuri weruoko rwangu, matenga ndinoadzika nyika ndichiitirawo ugaro hwayo ndiri kuti kuguta reZioni, ‘Muri vanhu vangu.’ ”" 
Isaiah51:17 Muka Muka, uti twii kumira iwe guta reJerusaremu iwe wakatumhiswa neshamhu yeruoko rwaTenzi mukombe wehasha dzake iwe wakanwa namasese ese kapfuko kezvakakudhadharitsa." 
Isaiah51:18 Hapasisina nomumwe anotungamirira Jerusaremu pakati pevanakomana vose zvavo varakabereka; wokurisesedza noruoko hapasisina pakati pevanakomana varo vose zvavo varakarera. 
Isaiah51:19 Zvinhu zviviri izvozvi izvi zvakakuwira iwe zvino ndiani achakubata maoko? Ko paumharadzi nepakuparadza kwose uku nepashangwa yenzara nepamapakatwa ehondo zvakakuwirai izvi, pakadai, ndinokunyaradza ndakaita sei?" 
Isaiah51:20 Vana vako vacharukutika vakati rakata kurara pakona yoga yoga yomugwagwa vachiita sengwarati iri mumambure Mwari ari kuvaonesa ndondo nehasha dzake, kuri kutsiudza kwaMwari wavo." 
Isaiah51:21 Naizvozvo iwe Jerusaremu teerera unzwe izvi, iwe uri kuoneswa nhamo iwe wakadai kudhakwa, nezvisiri waini." 
Isaiah51:22 Zvanzi naTenzi wako, Tenzi, Mwari wako anopipirira vanhu vake nhuna dzavo, “Chinzwa unzwe ndobvisa mumaoko mako mukombe waikudhadharitsa nekapfuko kehasha dzangu hauchazvinwazve." 
Isaiah51:23 Asi vaikuonesa ndondo ivavo ndivo vandava kupa muruoko mukombe wenhamo iyoyo, ivo vaikuti, ‘Zvambarara pasi tifambe napamusoro pako,’ iwe ukanyatsoita kuti musana wako uti kwasvarara sepasi uye somugwagwa wavanofamba nawo.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Muka, muka, usunge dzisimbe, iwe guta reZioni. Pfeka hanzu dzako dzakanakisisa; iyewe Jerusaremu, guta rinoera, nokuti mauri iwe hamuchazombopinda zvamo vasina kudzingiswa kana vakan'ora." 
Isaiah52:2 Ibva muvhu, umuke, ugare, iwe Jerusaremu musungwa, bvisa majoti muhuro mako, iwe nhapwa, mukunda, guta reZioni." 
Isaiah52:3 Ndinodaro nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, “Pamakatengeswa hapana chakaripwa, saizvozvowo kununurwa kwenyu hapana mari inobviswa," 
Isaiah52:4 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, pakutanga imi vanhu vangu makaenda kuIjipiti mukambondogara ikoko uyewo vechiAsiria vakazokuonesai nhamo mahara." 
Isaiah52:5 Zvino pakadai apa, changu chaizvo chiiwo ipapa, ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi, zvichinyatsoonekwa kuti vanhu vangu vari kungotorwa zvavo mahara? Tenzi ari kuti vatongi vavo vari kugurukuta, zita rangu richisweroshorwa." 
Isaiah52:6 Naizvozvo vanhu vangu vachaziva zita rangu. Nokudaro, zuvaro vachazivawo kuti ini ndini Iye Ari ndiri kutaura kudai, iyeni pano.”" 
Isaiah52:7 Hakusi kunaka ikoko, pamakomo, kwakaita tsoka dzaanouya neshoko rakanaka, anoparidza vanhu shoko rorugare achiunza shoko rakanaka shoko rezvakanaka, anoparidza vanhu shoko roruponeso achiti kuguta reZioni, “Mwari wenyu ndiye anotonga.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Teerera unzwe zvoita vachengetedzi veguta havo vodaidzira voimba pamwechete norufaro nokuti vari kunyatsozvionera nameso kudzoka kwaTenzi kuZioni. 
Isaiah52:9 Chitsemurai mumhanzi pamwechete, imi matongo eJerusaremu nokuti Tenzi ava kunyaradza vanhu vake ava kuzonunura Jerusaremu." 
Isaiah52:10 Tenzi ava kuratidza simba roruoko rwake runoera ndudzi dzose dzavanhu dzichiona kwose zvako nekwakaperera nyika vachaona ruponeso rwaMwari wedu. 
Isaiah52:11 Chibudai chibudaimo muBhabhironi musambobata zvenyu chinhu chakan'ora! Budai mukati maro zvichenurei imi pachenyu imi vatakuri vemidziyo yaTenzi," 
Isaiah52:12 nokuti kubuda hamusi kuzobuda zvechimbichimbi, hamusi kuzobudamo zvekutiza nokuti Tenzi achakutungamirirai, Mwari weIsiraeri achakuperekedzai ari necheshure." 
Isaiah52:13 “Inzwai munzwe, muranda wangu achabudirira, acharumbidzwa, achasumudzirwa pamusoro achiva wapamusorosoro." 
Isaiah52:14 Sezvakaitika kuti vazhinji vakakatyamara naye asisatarisike zvakanaka, asisamboonekwa somunhu. Chimiro chake zvokuti munhu pasisina," 
Isaiah52:15 Ndudzi dzakawanda dzichaomawo mate mukanwa nazvo, madzimambo chaiwo achibatawo muromo pamusana pake, nokuti zvavasati vambotaurirwa zvavo ndozvavachaona nezvavasina kumbonzwa ndizvo zvavachazonzwisisa.”" 
Isaiah53:1 “Ndiani angatende rondedzero yezvatakaudzwa? Uye ndiani akaratidzwa simba roruoko rwaTenzi? 
Isaiah53:2 Pamusana pokuti akakura pana Mwari sebukira romuti uye somudzi unotungira pavhu rakaoma. Akanga asisina chimiro, chokuti munhu kana kwavo nechingayemurike paari, zvokuti tingambotarisawo zvedu kwaari, asisina kana runako rwokuti tiitewo mwoyo wokumuda." 
Isaiah53:3 Akashorwa akarambidzanwa navanhu iye munhu wokutambura munhu anoziva nhamo uye somunhu wokuti vanhu vakamutarisa vanotofuratira zvavo. Akazvidzwa tikatadza kumuyemura. 
Isaiah53:4 “Asi chaizvoizvo, nhamo dzaakatakura, dzaiva nhamo dzedu uyewo matambudziko aakatakurana nawo aiva matambudziko edu. Asi isu takatomuona somunhu ari kuzvamburwa nokurohwa naMwari achitambudzwa." 
Isaiah53:5 “Akabayirwa zvitadzo zvedu akakuvadzirwa uipi hwedu, kurangwa kwaakaitwa ndokwakatiponesa, shamhu dzaakarohwa dzakaporesa isu." 
Isaiah53:6 Tose zvedu takanga taita sehwai dzakarasika mumwe nomumwe wedu atetereka nenzira yake, Tenzi akaisa zvitadzo zvedu zvose paari." 
Isaiah53:7 Akaoneswa nhamo akabatiswa ndondo, asi haana kana kumboti muromo bufu; sehwayana akatungamidzwa kundourayiwa sokunyarara kwehwai inenge ichivewurwa makushe saizvozvowo haana zvake kumboti muromo bufu." 
Isaiah53:8 Vakaita zvokumumanikidza vakamupinza dare ndokumutora voenda naye. Ivo vechizvarwa chokwake pane akamboita hanya nazvo here zvokuti akadimurirwa upenyu munyika yevapenyu achiponderwa zvitadzo zvavanhu vangu? 
Isaiah53:9 Vakamuitira guva rake mukati mavaipi, uyewo nomupfumi parufu rwake; kunyange zvazvo akanga asina utsinye hwaakanga aita, uye kunyange zvazvo unyengedzi pamuromo pake pakanga pasina.”" 
Isaiah53:10 Asi kuti chaive chiri chido chaTenzi, kumurwadzisa ndiye akamupa nhamo. Nokuzvipira kwaakaita kudaro somupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo achaona zvizukuru zvake, achaita kuti mazuva ake awande. Zvinodiwa naTenzi zvichabudirira zviri mumaoko make." 
Isaiah53:11 Achaona mubayiro wezvaakatamburira iye pachake agogutsikana. Noruzivo rwake iye muranda wangu, mururami achaita kuti vazhinji vazonzi varurami, ndiye achatakura zvitadzo zvavo." 
Isaiah53:12 Naizvozvo ini ndichamupa mugove mukati mavakuru vakuru, achakamurirana navane simba zvinhu zvinenge zvapambwa nokuti akazvipira kufa akaverengerwa pamwechete navatadzi akatakura zvitadzo zvavazhinji achinamatira vatadzi." 
Isaiah54:1 “Imba zvako iwe usina mbereko iwe usina kumbobereka denhura rumbo upururudze iwe usina kumborwadziwa napamuviri nokuti vana vako iwe wakasiyiwa vachawanda kupfuura vana veakaroorwa ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi. 
Isaiah54:2 Kudza-kudza tendhe rako udhadhanure machira emaunogara okudzikatirisa usaregedze zvako rebesa tambo dzako, hoko dzako ngadzinyatsoti ndendende kusimba," 
Isaiah54:3 nokuti uchatekeshera uku nouku zvizvarwa zvako zvichatonga marudzi avanhu, maguta ava matongo vachaaita misha yavo." 
Isaiah54:4 “Rega zvako kutya nokuti hausi kuzombonyara, rega zvako kutenderedzwa musoro nazvo nokuti hausi kuzombonyadziswa pamusana pokuti zvakakunyadzisa uchiri mudiki, uchatozvikanganwa uye kushorwa kwako pamusana pouchirikadzi hausi kuzombokuyeuka;" 
Isaiah54:5 nokuti Musiki wako ndiye murume wako Tenzi wehondo nehondo ndiro zita rake iroro, uye Anoera weIsiraeri ndiye Mununuri wako iye anonzi Mwari wapasi pose." 
Isaiah54:6 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi achakudaidza somudzimai akanga arambwa akashungurudzwa mwoyo somusikana akabvisa jaya mugota paanenge zvino adzingwa, ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naMwari wako." 
Isaiah54:7 Ndakambokuti furatirei kwechinguva, asi nengoni dzangu dzakawanda kudai ndichakuunganidzai." 
Isaiah54:8 Nokungoti virukei kwechinguva kwandakanga ndaita nehasha, ndakakupa gotsi. Asi norudo rusingaperi ndichakunzwira tsitsi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mununuri wako." 
Isaiah54:9 “Ndinodaro nokuti kwandiri ini, mazuva ano iwaya achaita semazuva aNowa andakatsidza kuti mafashamo aNowa haafaniri kuzombovazve panyika. Nokudaro ndinotsidza kuti handichazombokushatirirwazve kana kuzombokutsiudzazve." 
Isaiah54:10 Ndinodaro nokuti makomo angabve zvawo paanenge ari, zvikomo zvikatozunguzika zvazvo; asi mwoyochena wangu kwauri iwe, hauzombobva uye chitenderano changu newe, chorugare, hachizombozunguziki ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi ane rudo newe.”" 
Isaiah54:11 “Nhai nyakuoneswa ndondo iwe wokutututswa nedutu remhepo iwe wakashaya anokunyaradza! Chiteerera unzwe ndichagadzikira nheyo dzako pamatombo anokosha eandimoni ndichikuvakira ugaro hwako wamatombo anokosha esafaya. 
Isaiah54:12 “Zvisuvi zvako ndichazviita nematombo anokosha eageti misuo yenyu mikuru ndichiita nematombo anokosha ekabhinikuru rusvingo rwako rwese ndichiruita namatombo anokosha. 
Isaiah54:13 Vana vako vose vachadzidziswa naTenzi, vana vako vachapfuma zviya zvokupfuma zviya." 
Isaiah54:14 Kururama ndokuchava hwaro zvokudzvanyirirwa zvichava kure newe nokuti unenge usisatye. Umbwende huchava kure newe nokuti haumboswedera pedyo newe. 
Isaiah54:15 Chinzwa, kudenha vanhu vachakudenha, asi zvinenge zvisingabve kwandiri. Anenge adenhana newe uchamukandisa mapfumo pasi." 
Isaiah54:16 Chinzwa unzwe, kana dziri mhizha dzezvoutare izvi dzinovhutira moto wemazimbe nemvuto dzichipfura zvombo zvokurwisa nazvo zvokushandisa mabasa akasiyana-siyana, ndini ndakadzisika ndiniwo ndakasika marudzi anoparadza acho." 
Isaiah54:17 Hakuna chombo chokurwisa chichagadzirirwa iwewe chichakwanisa kuita basa racho, uye uchakonesa munhu wese anenge akukwirira dare. Iyoyi iyi ndiyo nhaka yevaranda vaTenzi uye ndokuvatsigira kwandinoita.” Ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi." 
Isaiah55:1 “Imi mose mune nyota uyai kumvura kunyange musina mari uyai zvenyu mutenge mudye! Uyai mutenge waini nomukaka pasina mari. 
Isaiah55:2 Chamunopedzera mari chiiko muchitenga zvisiri chokudya muchifondoka kushandira zvinhu zvisingagutse chii? Nyatsonditeererai mugodya zvakanaka mugozvibaya zvenyu nokudya zvakakora. 
Isaiah55:3 Tetekerai nzeve, muuye kwandiri, munzwe muzviponese. Ndichaita chitenderano changu nemi chokugara nokugara. Izvozvo uri mwoyochena wangu kuna Dhavhidhi, chaiwoiwo wechokwadi." 
Isaiah55:4 Sezvamunongoonawo kuti ndakamuita kuti ave sechapupu kumarudzi avanhu nashe nomutungamiriri wemarudzi evanhu. 
Isaiah55:5 Zvamuchione muchadaidza dzindudzi dzavanhu dzamusingazive, ndudzi dzavanhu vasingakuzivei dzichamhanyidzana kwamuri, achadariso ndiTenzi, Mwari wako naiye Anoera weIsiraeri nokuti ndiye akupai mbiri.”" 
Isaiah55:6 “Tsvagai Tenzi achiri kuwanika, daidzai kwaari achiri padyo." 
Isaiah55:7 Wakaipa ngaasiye nzira yake, asina kururama asiyane netwaanofunga, adzokere kuna Tenzi kuitira kuti amunzwire tsitsi, adzokere kuna Mwari wedu nokuti anomuregerera chaizvo." 
Isaiah55:8 Ndinodaro nokuti mafungiro angu haasiriwo mafungiro enyu, kana iwo maitiro enyu haasiriwo maitiro angu.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi," 
Isaiah55:9 nokuti sezvakangoita matenga kuti ari pamusoro nyika iri pasi ndizvo zvakangoitawo maitiro angu kuti ari pamusoro pamaitiro enyu uye ndangariro dzangu dziri pamusoro pendangariro dzenyu. 
Isaiah55:10 “Nokuti sezvinongoita mvura nechando kunaya zvichibva mudenga zvisingambodzokerako zvisina kudiridza nyika zvichiita kuti imerese nokutumbutsa, ichipa mbeu kuna anodyara nechokudya kuna anodya," 
Isaiah55:11 ndizvo zvakangoitawo shoko rangu rinobva mumuromo mangu, haridzokeri kwandiri risina charinacho asi richatoita zvandinenge ndati riite richibudirira kuita zvandinenge ndarituma kuita." 
Isaiah55:12 “Ndinodaro nokuti kubuda kwamuchaita muchabuda norufaro mugonyatsoperekedzwa murugare. Makomo nezvikomo, pamberi penyu zvichadandaura kuimba, miti yose yesango icharidza makwa." 
Isaiah55:13 Painge pachimera minzwa pachazenge pomereswa misaipurasi painge pachimera rukato pachazenge pomereswa migwavha. Izvozvi izvi kuna Tenzi zvichava sechiyeuchidzo, zvichiva mucherechedzo wokugara nokugara usingazombobviswa.”" 
Isaiah56:1 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Itai zvinhu noruenzaniso muite zvakarurama nokuti kukuponesai kwangu kwava kutosvika uye kukununurai kwangu kwava kutoratidzwa pachena." 
Isaiah56:2 Akakomborerwa hake munhu anoita izvozvi uye nomunhu anozvibatisisa anochengeta Sabata asingarin'orese, asina twaanobata-bata.”" 
Isaiah56:3 Mutorwa akazvibatanidza naTenzi ngaarege kuti, “Tenzi achakaronditsaura muvanhu vake,” uye muyuniki ngaarege kuti, “Pangu pano ndiri aniwo zvangu muti zvawo wakaoma.”" 
Isaiah56:4 Ndinodaro nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, “Vayuniki vanochengeta maSabata angu vachisarudza kuita zvandinoda vachichengetedza chitenderano changu," 
Isaiah56:5 ndichaita kuti pave nechimwe chinovakwa chokuyeuka nacho zita ravo mukati memba yangu nomukati metsvingo dzangu chinokunda kuva navana vakomana kana vasikana, Ndichavapa zita risina mugumo risingatsakatiki.”" 
Isaiah56:6 Vatorwa vose vanozvibatanidza neni Tenzi nokundishandira vachida zita reni vachiva varanda vangu, vose zvavo vanochengeta masabata vasingaan'oresi vachichengetedza chitenderano changu," 
Isaiah56:7 ivava ndichavaunza kugomo rangu rinoera ndigovaita kuti vafare muimba yangu yokunamatira. Mipiro yavo inopiswa nezvibayiro ndichazvigamuchira paatari yangu nokuti imba yangu ichanzi imba yokunamatira yamarudzi ose avanhu 
Isaiah56:8 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari “Iye anounganidza vaIsiraeri vakadzingwa ini ndichaunganidza kwavari vamwewo vanhu vandinenge ndisina kuunganidza.”" 
Isaiah56:9 “Imi zvikara zvesango uyai mudye, uyai zvenyu imi zvikara zvomudondo." 
Isaiah56:10 Vatariri vake mapofu, zvokuziva havazivi zvimumumu chaizvo zvembwa. Havagoni kuhukura vanotorotomoka zvavo, chavo kurara chete vachinakirwa nehope." 
Isaiah56:11 “Imbwa idzi dzina makaro, hadzimboguti, ndivava vafudzi vacho vasinganzwisisi, vose vachiti uyu nenzira yake, uyu nenzira yake mumwe nomumwe achizvitsvagira upfumi, vose zvavo." 
Isaiah56:12 Vanototaurirana zvavo vachiti, ‘Handei tinotsvaka waini, handei tinodutira hwahwa, mangwana nyaya ndiyo ndiyo, zvinenge zvisingambotauriki kuwanda.’ ”" 
Isaiah57:1 Mururami anoparara zvake pasina anombozviitirawo hanya, vanamati chaivo vachitorwa pasina anozvinzwisisa, nokuti vakarurama anobviswa munhamo," 
Isaiah57:2 opinda murugare, vazorora zvavo pamibhedha yavo, ivo vanofamba muururami." 
Isaiah57:3 Asi imi swederai kuno vana vana amai varoyi, vana vemhombwe nepfambi." 
Isaiah57:4 Ndiani wamuri kuita zvokutamba naye kudai? Muri kugarira kutaura nani, muchitoraputsa rurimi kudaro, Hamusi vana vomusango here? Imi vana vounyengedzi," 
Isaiah57:5 iyemi munobayiwa noruchiva muri mukati memioku pasi pemiti yose yakasvibira, imi munoita vana venyu zvibayiro mumapani mumikaha yamatombo?" 
Isaiah57:6 Chenyu imimi ihurungudo dzomubani. Ndidzo dzamunonamata. Kwandiri idzodzo ndidzo dzamunopira mupiro wokuteura muchiunzako mupiro wembesanwa. Ndozvingandinyevenutse mwoyo here izvozvo? 
Isaiah57:7 Pagomo refu, panhungamakore yegomo, ndipo pamava kuita sapauriri hwenyu hwoupombwe. Ipapo ndopamunokwira kundopira zvibayiro." 
Isaiah57:8 Kuseri kwegonhi napagwatidziro wakazviisira chokuratidza nacho kuti undifuratire. Wakafugura uriri hwako ukakwira pahuri ukahukudza-kudza ukatozvitengesa zvako kwazviri ukatorwa mwoyo nouriri hwavo, ukatozviyeva zvako zviri mutwi kudaro." 
Isaiah57:9 Munoenda imi kundonamata Moreki muina mafuta, muchivirikidza kuzora mafuta anonhuwirira; munotuma nhume dzenyu kure zvokuti vanotodzika kwazvo kunyange nokuNzvimbo yeVachakabvu." 
Isaiah57:10 Wakareberwa nenzira iwe zvikakunetesa asi hauna kumbozviti, “Hazvina maturo.” Wakatozvigwinyisa nokudaro hauna kufizuka." 
Isaiah57:11 “Kunyeba kwawakaita wawaitya ipapa ndiani uchitadza kundiyeuka kana kutombondifunga zvako? Handina kunyarara zvangu here kwenguva ndefu chaiyo, ndokusaka usisandityi nhai?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ndichafumura ururami hwako ihwohwo nezvaunoita iwe asi hazvina zvazvichakuyamura. 
Isaiah57:13 Kana woridza mhere iro zanzwe rako rezvifananidzo zvokunamata ngarikununure. Zvichatututswa nemhepo, zvichapupurutswa nemwando. Asi anopotera kwandiri ndiye achava muridzi wenyika, gomo rangu rinoera iri achiriita nhaka yake.”" 
Isaiah57:14 Zvichazonzi, “Pangurai pangurai, mugadzire nzira mubvise zvose zvingapingaidze vanhu vangu munzira,”" 
Isaiah57:15 nokuti zvanzi naNyadenga iye Wokumusorosoro iye Chidzachepo ane zita rokuti Anoera, “Ndinogara kumusoro munzvimbo inoera, uye ndinogarawo navane mwoyo wakapinduka vano mwoyo wokuzvirereka kutimutsurudza mwoyo wavanozvidukupisa nokumutsurudza mwoyo yavanhu vanenge vatendeuka."
