Isaiah57:16 Ndinodaro nokuti handicharamba ndichingovapa mhosva kana kuramba ndakangovashatirirwa, nokuti kwandiri ini ndokunobva mweya, ndini ndakasika mweya wacho unofema." 
Isaiah57:17 Pamusana pemhosva yoruchiva rwake uyu ndakashatirwa, ndikamurova ndikafuratira ndakashatirwa. Asi iye ndopaakatoomesa gotsi achiita zvake zvomusoro wake." 
Isaiah57:18 Ndakaona hangu kuita kwake asi ndichamuporesa ndichamutungamirira ndigomupa mubayiro wokugarika ndichiita kuti pamiromo yavanoungudza pabude mipururu yokurumbidza 
Isaiah57:19 Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Imi vokure nemi vapadyo, ndinokupai rugare, rugare chairwo, ndichakuporesai.’" 
Isaiah57:20 Asi vakaipa vakaita samasaisai egungwa asingagarikike pasi; mvura yaro haigadzikani inobvundura nhope netsvina," 
Isaiah57:21 vakaipa havana rugare,” ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naMwari wangu." 
Isaiah58:1 “Taurisa, usamborega zvako daidzira nezwi sebhosvo uparidze kuvanhu vangu kukanganisa kwavo utaurire vemba yaJakobho zvitadzo zvavo." 
Isaiah58:2 Kunyange zvavo vachinditsvaga, vachinditsvaga zuva nezuva, vachidisisa kuziva makwara angu sokunge rudzi rwavanhu vanoita zvakarurama uye vasina kukanda pasi murao weni Mwari wavo; vanotodawo kuti ndivape mitemo yakarurama vachidisisa kwazvo kuuya padyo neni Mwari" 
Isaiah58:3 Vanoti, ‘Chatinotsanyira chii, imi musingazvioni? Chii chaizvo chatinoitira zvinhu zvokuzviramba, imi musingamboita hanya nazvo?’ Tarisai muone, musi wokutsanya kwenyu munotozvitsvagira zvokuzvifadza nazvo muchionesa ndondo vose vanokushandirai." 
Isaiah58:4 Kutsanya, hongu munotsanya, asi uku muchipopota nokurwa nokurova vamwe nezvibhakera. Kutsanya sokwenyu uku nhasi uno hakuite kuti zvichemo zvenyu zvinzwike kuna wokumusoro." 
Isaiah58:5 Ikoku ndokutsanya kwandinoda here, musi wokuti munhu azvirereke? Kungorerekedza musoro pasi senhokwe here, kana kutora masaga nedota ozviita ndozvokuwarira? Ndokwamungati kutsanya ikoku uye kuti ndozuva rinofadza Mwari iroro?" 
Isaiah58:6 “Ko kutsanya kwandinoda hakusi uku here kwokusunungura majoto ouipi nokukurura zvitirobho zvejoko nokusunungura vanenge vachidzvinyirirwa vagoenda zvavo nokutyorawo joko rose rose zvaro? 
Isaiah58:7 “Hakusi here kugoverana chokudya chako neane nzara nokupinza mumba mako varombo vanongodzungaira nenyika, ukaona asina chokupfeka uchimupawo chokupfeka usinganzvengi kuyamura hama yako?" 
Isaiah58:8 “Ipapo chiedza chako ndopachichanyatsochena samambakwedza, wobva wazokasika kurapwa. Ururami hwako ihwohwo huchazokutungamirira, uchiperekedzwa mushure nembiri yaTenzi." 
Isaiah58:9 “Kana ukazonamata, Tenzi achakupindura, kana ukadaidzira iye anoti ndiri pano. Kana pakati penyu mukakanda pasi joko rokudzvinyirira nokunongedzerana munwe nokutaura zvakaipa" 
Isaiah58:10 uye kana ukawanisa vane nzara chokudya uchipedza nhuna dzavatamburi, chiedza chako ndopachichanyatsoti ngwe-e kuvheneka murima, rima rakakupoteredza richazoita samasikati machena." 
Isaiah58:11 Tenzi achakutungamirira nguva dzose zvadzo achikugutsa nezvakanaka achikusimbisa iwewe pachako ugoita sebindu rine mvura yakawanda sechisipiti chemvura isingapwi. 
Isaiah58:12 Pamatongo enyu pachavakwazve, muchamutsazve ugaro hwedzimba dzapasi chigare; uchazonzi mugadziridzi wezvakapazika, mugadziridzi wemigwagwa yepokugara." 
Isaiah58:13 “Kana ukatsaukana neSabata worega kuita zvaunoda pazuva rangu rinoera, wava kuti Sabata, izuva rinofadza, uyewo wava kuti zuva rinoera raTenzi rinoremekedzeka, kana ukariremekedza usingaite zvomusoro wako uchiita zvaunoda uchidya zvako nyaya." 
Isaiah58:14 “Ipapo Tenzi achava rufaro rwako, panyika ndichakuita kuti uve wapamusorosoro chaipo ndichiita kuti udye, nhaka yababa vako Jakobho nokuti ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi.”" 
Isaiah59:1 “Teerera unzwe, ruoko rwaTenzi runoponesa; haruna kupera simba, zvokuti haachagona kuponesa nzevewo dzake dzinonzwa hadzina kudzivira." 
Isaiah59:2 Asi kutoti uipi hwenyu ndihwo hwakakuparadzanisai naMwari wenyu, zvivi zvenyu zvikavanza uso hwake kwamuri zvokuti haachambokunzwai," 
Isaiah59:3 nokuti maoko enyu akasvibiswa neropa, uye minwe yenyu nezvakaipa, uye miromo yenyu nokureva nhema, rurimi rwenyu runotaura zvakaipa." 
Isaiah59:4 “Hapana anokwirira mumwe kumatare mhosva chaiyo yechokwadi, hapana anonyatsotevedza zviri pamurao. Vanovimba netwaanotaura tusina maturo vachireva nhema zvavo. Vanodyara misikanzwa vachizokohwa zvakaipa." 
Isaiah59:5 Vanochechenya mazai echiva, vanoruka dandadzi, anodya mazai azvo, anofa, rinenge rangochochonywa chete, munobva mabuda mvumbi." 
Isaiah59:6 Madandadzi avo iwayo haangamboshandiswa sembatya, vanhu havangambopfeka zvinenge zvarukwa nawo. Twavanobata ivo tunhu twouipi chete, mabasa avanobata namaoko avo ndeoutsinye." 
Isaiah59:7 Zvakaipa ndozvavanomhanyirira, vanofatira kudeura ropa ravanhu vasina mhosva. Uipi ndohwavanoswerofunga, migwagwa yavo mikuru vanosiya yangove matongo noumharadzi." 
Isaiah59:8 Chinonzi rugare havachizive, maitiro avo haana ruenzaniso, mafambiro avo akakombama, anodimura nemariri rugare haamborunhuwa." 
Isaiah59:9 “Heya ndokusaka ruenzaniso rwava kure kwazvo nesu kudai ururami uhu hatichambohunhuhwa. Patinotarisira kuwana mwenje tinongowana hero rima, pototi tiwanewo chiedza ndopatava kufamba muzarima." 
Isaiah59:10 Tinotsvanzvadzira madziro samapofu tichiputaira savanhu vasina maziso. Tinodzadzarika masikati machena sokunge manheru, pakati pavanhu chaivo vakasvika, isu tinenge zvitunha." 
Isaiah59:11 Tose tinobongomora sezvitsere, tinouura nokuura senjiva tichitarisirawo kuwana ruenzaniso asi ruenzaniso hapana tichitarisirawo ruponeso asi ruri kure kwazvo nesu." 
Isaiah59:12 “Nokuti zvatakanganisa pamberi penyu zvawanda, kutadza kwedu tinokuziva, nokuti zvatakakutadzirai tinazvo mumwoyo, mhosva dzedu tinodziziva." 
Isaiah59:13 Ndedzidzi dzinoti: kukukanganisirai, nokukurambai imi Tenzi, nokukupai gotsi kwatinoita tichifuratirai imi Mwari wedu nenyaya dzoutsinye kudyara mhodzi youmhandupandu, mumwoyo'mu, dziri nyaya dzemakuhwa." 
Isaiah59:14 Ruenzaniso runonzi kure narwo, ururami hwava kumirira kure nesu nokuti chokwadi, pamatare, hapasisina, kutendeka kwapata." 
Isaiah59:15 Hapana kwaunowana chokwadi anenge angoti regai ndisiyane nouipi ndiye anobva atopinda mupfumvu.” Tenzi akazviona uye hazvina kumufadza kuti hapana ruenzaniso. 
Isaiah59:16 Akaona kuti pakanga pasina kana munhu zvake, akashamiswa kuti pakanga pasina angarandutsire. Ipapo simba roruoko rwake rakamuwanisa kukunda, ururami hwake huchimutsigira." 
Isaiah59:17 Akapfeka ururami demautare rokuzvidzivirira naro muhondo noruponeso senguwani yesimbi, akapfeka kutsividza sehanzu dzokupfeka akazviputira nehasha somunhu afuka jira." 
Isaiah59:18 Achavatsividza maererano nezvavakaita mhandu dzake achidzionesa hasha, vavengi vake achivatsividza. Nyika dzokumahombekome kwegungwa achadzitsividza." 
Isaiah59:19 Naizvozvo vachatya zita raMwari kubva kumadokero, iyo mbiri yaMwari kubva kumabvazuva nokuti achauya sakakova kazere kanenge kachitututswa nemhepo yaTenzi." 
Isaiah59:20 “Achauya kuZioni soMununuri, kune vokwaJakobho vanenge vadzoka vasiyana nezvitadzo, ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi.”" 
Isaiah59:21 Tenzi anoti, “Kana ndirini, chitenderano changu navo ndechichi chokuti, Mweya wangu uri pauri namashoko angu andakaisa mumuromo mako, hazvifaniri kumbobva pamuromo pako uye hazvifaniri kubva pamuromo pavana vako kana pamuromo pavana vavana vako kubvira zvino kusvikira narini wose,” ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi." 
Isaiah60:1 Chisimuka uti ngwe-e kuvheneka nokuti chiedza chako chasvika uye mbiri yaTenzi yapenya pamusoro pako 
Isaiah60:2 nokuti tarisa uone nyika ichanzi kwidiba nerima, vanhu vachanzi nezarima gude gude. Asi pauri Tenzi achanyatsoti ngwe-e, mbiri yake ichaonekwa pauri." 
Isaiah60:3 Vechirudzi vachauya kuchiedza chako, madzimambo achauya kuchiedza chako chinenge chasimuka." 
Isaiah60:4 Simudzai musoro mutarise uku nokuku muone, vose vari kuunganidzana vari kuuya kwauri, vanakomana vako vari kuuya vachibva kure, vanasikana vako vakaita zvokutakurwa mumaoko." 
Isaiah60:5 Ipapo uchazviona ugomwekuma kufara, mwoyo usingagoni nokufara nokuti upfumi hwose hwegungwa hunenge hwonanga kwauri upfumi hwevechirudzi huchauya kwamuri." 
Isaiah60:6 Mauri muchava nebvakapfaka renghamera, nghamera dzichine simba dzokuMidhiani nokuEfa nedzose dzinobva kuShebha dzichakotonoka. Dzichauya nendarama norusenzi, dzichadhumisa mbiri yaTenzi." 
Isaiah60:7 Matanga ese ezvipfuwo zvokuKedhari achakurumukira kwauri, hondohwe dzokwaNebhaoti ndodzichava dzebasa rokupira kwako. Dzichave dzinogamuchirika paatari yangu, ndichapa mbiri kuimba yangu inomukurumbira." 
Isaiah60:8 Ko avo ndivanaani avo vanopepera sekaguti, sehangaiwa dzananga pamusuo padzo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ndinodaro nokuti nyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa uku dzichandishandira, kutanga nengarava dzokuTashishi dzichiuya navana vako dzichibva navo kure kure vakatakura sirivha yavo nendarama zvokurumbidza nazvo zita raTenzi, Mwari wako, iye Anoera weIsiraeri nokuti akakupa mukurumbira." 
Isaiah60:10 Vatorwa zvavo ndovachakuvakira tsvingo dzako, madzimambo avo ivo ndoanenge otokushandira iwe. Ndakakuranga pamusana pokushatirwa kwandakanga ndaita, asi zvino pamusana pemwoyochena wangu ndava kukuitira tsiye nyoro." 
Isaiah60:11 Misuo mikuru yako ichangogara yakazaruka siku nesikati, kuzarirwa isingazarirwi kuitira kuuya kunenge kuchiita vanhu kwauri noupfumi hwevechirudzi, vachitungamirirwa namadzimambo avo." 
Isaiah60:12 Zvichavepo ndezvokuti rudzi kana nyika inenge isingakushandirei ichaparara, marudzi iwayo achanyatsotsakatiswa." 
Isaiah60:13 Mbiri yacho yeRebhanoni inoti: misaipurasi nemipureni nemipaini iyoyo, ichauya kwauri kuzoshongedza pamana pangu paNzvimbo yangu Inoera ndichiita kuti mandinotsika ini netsoka dzangu mukurumbire." 
Isaiah60:14 Vana vavaikudzvinyirira vachauya kwauri vachisvikoti pasi kota kota, vose zvavo vaikushorai vachasvikoti pasi gwadagwa patsoka dzako. Vachakutumidzai zita rokuti, Guta raTenzi, Guta reZioni raiye Anoera weIsiraeri." 
Isaiah60:15 Wakanga wafuratirwa uchivengwa pasisina kana neachadimura namauri, zvino ndichakuita guta rino mukurumbira narini narini richange riri rinofadza pachizvarwa nechizvarwa." 
Isaiah60:16 Uchayamwa mukaka wevechirudzi uchayamwa mazamu amadzimambo ndopauchaziva kuti ini Tenzi, ndini Muponesi wako, iye Mununuri wako iye Samasimbaose waJakobho." 
Isaiah60:17 Ndichakuigira ndarama panzvimbo pendarira ndichikuigira sirivha panzvimbo pesimbi panzvimbo pamapango, ndarira panzvimbo pamabwe, simbi. Rugare ndorwandichaita kuti ruve somutariri wako, ururami hurihwo mushandisi wako pabasa." 
Isaiah60:18 Manyongori haachazombonzwikizve munyika mako. Umharadzi nokuparadza kwose hazvichazombonzwikizve munyika yakatenderedzwa nemiganhu yako. Tsvingo dzako uchadzitumidza zita rokuti Ruponeso, misuo mikuru yako zita rokuti Kurumbidza." 
Isaiah60:19 Chichakuvhenekera masikati harisi zuva nechichakuvhenekera usiku unenge usisiri mwedzi, asi kuti ini Tenzi ndini ndichava chiedza chako narini wose. Ini Mwari wako ndini ndichava mbiri yako." 
Isaiah60:20 Kwauri iwe zuva harizombodoka kana iwo mwedzi kwauri iwe hauchazombonyura nokuti ini Tenzi ndini ndichakuvhenekera narini wose. Mazuva ako okuchema achabva apera. 
Isaiah60:21 Vanhu vako vose zvavo vachave vakarurama, nyika ichava yavo nokusingaperi, ivo bukira rangu randakasima namaoko angu kuti ndigorumbidzwa." 
Isaiah60:22 Mudikidiki pavari ndichaita kuti ave dzinza chairo, mudukuduku pavari achiva rudzi rwavanhu rukuru. Ndini Tenzi, panguva yayo ndichakurumidza kuzviita." 
Isaiah61:1 Mweya waTenzi Mwari uri pandiri nokuti Tenzi akandizodza kuti ndiparidze shoko rakanaka kuvarombo. Akandituma kuzonyaradza vakasuruvara mwoyo, nokuparidzira vari muutapwa rusununguko, nokusunungurwa kwavari muusungwa" 
Isaiah61:2 uye kuparidza kuvanhu gore raTenzi retsiye nyoro nezuva raMwari wedu rokutsiva nokunyaradza vose vanochema 
Isaiah61:3 kuti ape vanochema muguta reZioni chiremba chokufara chamaruva panzvimbo pamadota okusuwa, mafuta amafaro pachinzvimbo chenhamo yokuchema avape hanzu dzokurumbidza nadzo panzvimbo pokuora mwoyo. Vachatonzi miti yemioku yoururami yakasimwa naTenzi kuti agorumbidzwa." 
Isaiah61:4 Vachavakazve pamatongo akare vachamutsurudza zvinhu zviya zvakanga zvati pasi mbombombo. Vachagadziridzazve maguta akanga aparadzwa akanga aita matongo kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa. 
Isaiah61:5 Vauyi zvavo ndovachava vokukufudzira zvipfuwo, vatorwa ndovachava vokukurimirai minda nevokukuchengetedzerai minda yamagirepisi." 
Isaiah61:6 Asi imimi muchanzi vapristi vaTenzi, vanhu vachakutii vashandiri vaMwari wedu. Muchatodya upfumi hwevechirudzi muchiwana zvenyu mukurumbira noupfumi hwavo." 
Isaiah61:7 Panze pokuti munyare muchatopiwa mugove wakapetwa, kaviri. Panze pokunyadziswa muchafara nomugove wenyu. Naizvozvo munyika menyu imomo mugove wakapetwa kaviri uchange uri wenyu chenyu imi chichava rufaro rwokugara nokugara." 
Isaiah61:8 “Ndinodaro nokuti ini Tenzi ndinoda ruenzaniso, zvokupamba vanhu ndinozvivenga, ndinovengawo zvokuita zvakaipa. Ndichavapa mubayiro wavo chaivo, ndichaita chitenderano navo chokugara nokugara." 
Isaiah61:9 Zvizukuru zvavo zvichanyatsozivikanwa mukati memarudzi evanhu, navana vavo mukati mavanhu vose. Vose vachavaona vachabvuma kuti vanhu vakakomborerwa naTenzi.”" 
Isaiah61:10 “Ini ndinokurumbidzai Tenzi nomwoyo wangu wose, mweya wanguwo unopemberera Mwari wangu nokuti akandipfekedza hanzu dzoruponeso, akandifukidza nehanzu dzokururama sokuzvipfekedza kunoita murume anenge achichata uye sokuzvishongedza nezvishongo kunoita musikana ari kuchata." 
Isaiah61:11 Sezvinongoita nyika inomeresa mabukira, uye sezvinongoitawo bindu kumeresa zvinenge zvadyarwamo ndizvozvowo zvinoita Tenzi Mwari, anoita kuti ururami nomukurumbira zvitungire, marudzi ese zvawo evanhu achiona.”" 
Isaiah62:1 Pamusana peZioni, handimbonyarara kutaura. Pamusana peguta reJerusaremu handimbozorora kusvikira kupembedzwa kwaro kwajeka sechiedza, ruponeso rwaro rwanyatsovhenekera semwenje." 
Isaiah62:2 Marudzi avanhu achaona kupembedzwa kwako, madzimambo ose achaonawo mbiri yako. Iwe uchadaidzwa nezita idzva rauchatumidzwa naTenzi nomuromo wake." 
Isaiah62:3 Uchave ndaza yakanakisisa muruoko rwaTenzi, nenyembe youmambo chaiyo muruoko rwaMwari wako." 
Isaiah62:4 Iwe hauchazonzi, “Murambwi,” nyika yako haichazonzi, “Dongo.” Asi uchatonzi, “Wangu wapamwoyo,” nyika yako ichinzi, “Muroora,” nokuti Tenzi anofadzwa newe, nyika yenyu icharoorwa" 
Isaiah62:5 sezvinongoita mukomana anoroora mhandara, iye akakuvaka wacho achakuroora uye sokufarira kunoita mukomana mukadzi waaroora ndokukufarirai kuchaita Mwari wenyu." 
Isaiah62:6 Pasvingo ako iwe Jerusaremu ndaisa vatariri, havambonyarara siku nesikati. Imi munoyeuka Tenzi kudai musazorore," 
Isaiah62:7 musambomupa zvenyu zororo, kudzamara aita kuti guta reJerusaremu rimire ariita kuti rive nomukurumbira pasi pano." 
Isaiah62:8 Tenzi apika norudyi rwake apika nesimba roruoko rwake kuti, “Handichambofa ndakapazve mbesanwa dzenyu kuti dzive chokudya chavavengi venyu uye vatorwa havasi kuzombonwazve waini yenyu yamakadikitira kushanda." 
Isaiah62:9 Asi kutoti vanenge vaisa mbesanwa mumatura ndivo vachadzidya vachirumbidza Tenzi, vanenge vatanha magirepisi ndivo vachanwa waini yacho vari munhandare dzeNzvimbo yangu Inoera.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Pindai pindai nomumisuo mikuru gadzirirai vanhu mugwagwa, gadzirai gadzirai mugwagwa mukuru mubvisei mabwe musimudze mureza pamusoro pendudzi dzavanhu." 
Isaiah62:11 Teererai munzwe, Tenzi ari kuzivisa vanhu kusvikira kwakaperera nyika. Itii kuguta reZioni, “Tarisai muone, ruponeso rwenyu rwava kusvika. Tarisai muone, mubayiro wake anawo, muripo wake ndiwo waanotungamidza.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Vachanzi vanhu, “Vanoera vaNyakununurwa vaTenzi” iwe uchinzi, “Wapamwoyo pavanhu guta risina kutizwa.”" 
Isaiah63:1 “Ndianiko uyo ari kuuya achibva Edhomu, akapfeka hanzu tsvuku dzeBhozira, akapfeka hanzu dzake dzemandiriri ari kukanyaira achigwanha kwazvo zvine simba pamusana poukuru hwake? Ndini iyeni! Ndiri kuzivisa vanhu zvokukurira kwangu, ini Changamire wokuponesa." 
Isaiah63:2 “Ko idzo hanzu dzako kutsvuka kudai chii? Sei mbatya dzako kubva dzaita somunhu anga achisvina waini kudai muchisviniro? 
Isaiah63:3 Ndasvina ndoga waini muchisviniro, pasina mumwe wavanhu aiva neni. Ndakavatsika-tsika ini nehasha ndichivatsokodzera ndakashatirwa; ropa ravo rinovararamisa rakadeukira pahanzu dzangu, ndokusaka mbatya dzangu dzose dzatsvuka ropa kudai." 
Isaiah63:4 Ndinodaro nokuti zuva rokutsividza, ndakanga ndinaro mumwoyo uye gore rangu rokununura rasvika." 
Isaiah63:5 Ndakatarisa wanei wokundibatsira hapana zvakandishamisa kuti pakanga pasina wokunditsigira, saka kukurira kwandakaita isimba roruoko rwangu ndichitsigirwa ini nehasha dzangu." 
Isaiah63:6 Nehasha dzangu ndakatsokodzera vanhu, ndudzi dzavanhu dzikaita sedzadhakwa ndikadeurira pasi ropa ravo rinovararamisa.”" 
Isaiah63:7 Ndichadetemba kurumbidza mwoyochena waTenzi, mukurumbira waTenzi nokuona zvose zvatawaniswa naTenzi nezvose zvakanakisisa kwazvo zvaakaitira vemba yaIsiraeri zvaakadai kuvapa netsitsi dzake nomwoyochena wake wakanyanya kukura kudai," 
Isaiah63:8 nokuti anoti, “Vanhu vangu ava, vana vasina zvounyengedzi,” nezvo akava Mununuri wavo." 
Isaiah63:9 Nhamo yavo yose yavakaona yaivawo nhamo yake, uye mutumwa wokuvapo kwake ndiye akavaponesa, akavanunura norudo rwake uye netsiye dzake nyoro, akavasimudza akavatakura mumazuva ose akare." 
Isaiah63:10 Asi ivo vakapanduka vakashungurudza Mweya Mutsvene wake, ndokusaka iye akavapindukira oita somuvengi wavo, iye pachake ovarwisa." 
Isaiah63:11 Ndipo paakarangarira mazuva akare aye, mazuva omuranda wake Mosesi. Aripiko chaizvo nyakunyurura mugungwa, mufudzi wedanga rezvipfuwo zvake? Aripiko akaisa Mweya Mutsvene wake mukati mavo," 
Isaiah63:12 akaita kuti simba reruoko rwake rivewo kurudyi rwaMosesi akaparadzanisa mvura pamberi pavo achiitira kuti azviwanire zita rinogara nokusingaperi? 
Isaiah63:13 Iye akavatungamirira nomuhwenje. Vakafamba vasingadzengedzeke sezvinoita bhiza risingadzengedzeke murenje. 
Isaiah63:14 Sokutungamirirwa kunoitwa zvipfuwo kubani, Mweya waTenzi wakavapa zororo, saizvozvo makatungamirira vanhu venyu mukazviwanira zita rine mukurumbira." 
Isaiah63:15 Tarisai pasi muone muri kudenga ikoko, muri munzvimbo menyu mamunogara munoera mune mbiri. Shungu dzenyu nesimba zviripi? Ko inga rudo rwenyu netsitsi dzenyu, kwandiri hapasisina." 
Isaiah63:16 Inga ndimi baba wedu wani kunyange Abhurahamu asingatizivi uye kunyange zvazvo Isiraeri, asingatitore sevana vake, imi Tenzi ndimi Baba vedu, Mununuri wedu, kubvira kare nakare, iroro ndiro zita renyu." 
Isaiah63:17 Nhai Tenzi munoitirei kuti titsauke panzira dzenyu tiomese mwoyo zvokutotadza kukutyai? Dzokai zvenyu pamusana pevaranda venyu vemadzinza enhaka yenyu. 
Isaiah63:18 Kwekanguva kadiki Nzvimbo yenyu iyi Inoera yanga iri mumaoko mevanhu venyu, vavengi vedu vakatoitsokodzera zvavo pasi." 
Isaiah63:19 Isu tangoitawo sevanhu vamusina kana kumbotonga zvenyu savanhu vasingadaidzwe nezita renyu. 
Isaiah64:1 Dai mabvurura matenga mukaburuka pasi pano, makomo angandengendeke nokuvapo kwenyu imi," 
Isaiah64:2 sokubvira kunoita tsotso, sokufashaidza mvura kunoita moto kuti zita renyu rizivikanwe nevavengi venyu, marudzi adedere pamusana pokuvapo kwenyu." 
Isaiah64:3 Inga wani makaita zvinhu zvinotyisa zvatakanga tisingatarisiri. Makaburuka pasi makomo akandengendeka pamusana pokuvapo kwenyu. 
Isaiah64:4 Kubvira pasichigare hazvina kumbonzwika kana kupinda munhu munzeve kunyange ziso zvaro rati ramboona mumwe Mwari kunze kwenyu imimi, anoitira zvakadai vanotarisira kwaari." 
Isaiah64:5 Munosanganawo naanofarira kuita zvakarurama, ivo vanokurangarirai panzira dzenyu imi. Handiti makashatirwa, isu tichikutadzirai tagarisa muzvitadzo zvedu zvino tichaponeswawo here iyesu?" 
Isaiah64:6 Tose zvedu isu, tangova somunhu akan'ora. Zvose zvazvo zvoururami zvatakaita zvava kunge hanzu dzakatindivara. Tose tabhuruvara seshizha. Zvino uipi hwedu uhu hunotipupurutsa semhepo." 
Isaiah64:7 Hakuna kana nomumwe achiri kunamata zita renyu kana anombonzwawo shungu yokuti abatirire pamuri, nokuti makazvihwandisa kwatiri ndokubva matiti kuche kuzvitadzo zvedu." 
Isaiah64:8 Asi imi Tenzi, ndimi Baba wedu. Isu tiri ivhu rokuumbisa imi ndimi muumbi wedu tose zvedu tiri basa ramakaita imi namaoko enyu." 
Isaiah64:9 Tenzi regai zvenyu kubva matoshatirwa mukadaro. Regai zvenyu kuramba mongorangarira zvakaipa nokusingaperi. Tonderai inga wani tose tiri vanhu venyu. 
Isaiah64:10 Maguta enyu anoera angova renje zvaro, guta reZioni rava renje chairo, Jerusaremu rave dongo." 
Isaiah64:11 Imba yedu iyi inoera yakanakisisa kwazvo mamairemekedzerwa nemadzibaba edu yakaroromeswa nomoto. Nzvimbo dzedu dzose dzakanaka dzangova matongo zvawo. 
Isaiah64:12 Zvino moramba makangotarisa zvenyu here zvinhu zvakadai nhai Tenzi? Moramba makangonyarara zvenyu here muchitionesa nhamo inorwadza kudai? 
Isaiah65:1 “Ndakanga ndakatomirira kuti nditsvakwe navanhu vasina kundibvunza. Ndakanga ndakamirira ini kuti vanhu vandiwane asi pakanga pasina. Ini ndaiti, ‘Ndiri pano, ndiri pano,’ kurudzi rusingambodaidza zvarwo zita rangu," 
Isaiah65:2 ndichiswerotambanudzira maoko kumhandupandu dzavanhu, vanofamba nenzira isina kunaka vachiita zvavo zvomusoro wavo." 
Isaiah65:3 Vanhu vanoramba vachindidenha ndiripo kudai, vachipira zvibayiro mumapindu vachipisira rusenzi pazvidhina." 
Isaiah65:4 Vanhu vanogara kumakuva vachirara vari munzvimbo dzakavandika vachidya nyama yenguruve, nomuto wezvinhu zvakan'ora zviri mumidziyo yavo." 
Isaiah65:5 Vanhu vanotozviti zvavo, ‘Mirira kure uko usaswedere pedyo neni nokuti kwauri ndinoera.’ Ivava kwandiri utsi zvahwo hunondipfungaidza mumhuno, zvichindipa mazaridzwa kunge moto unopfuta muswere wose." 
Isaiah65:6 “Chinzwai munzwe chiga chemhosva yavo chakanyorwa ndinacho. Zvokunyarara, handinyarari, asi ndichavaranga. Honguka, ndichavaripisa kudzamara pachipfuva chaipo, pavanochengetera mari yavo." 
Isaiah65:7 Ndichavaripisa uipi hwavo nouipi hwamadzibaba avo pamwechete,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, achiti, “Ndinodaro nokuti vaindopisa rusenzi pamakomo vachindishonha pazvikomo. Ndichaona zvangu mwero wandichavatorera pachipfuwa pavo pavanochengetera mari ndichivaripisa zvavakaita kare.”" 
Isaiah65:8 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Sezvinongoitawo waini kuti inowanikwa muchitsumbu chamagirepisi, vanhu vachiti regai kuchiparadza nokuti machiri mune chikomborero izvozvi, ndozvineni, pamusana pavaranda vangu handisi kuzovaparadza vose." 
Isaiah65:9 Ini ndichaunza zvizvarwa zvokwaJakobho, vari vedzinza rokwaJudha kuti vatore makomo angu ave avo, vasarudzwi vangu vagare nhaka nyika yavo ivava varanda vangu ndivo vachagara zvavo imomo." 
Isaiah65:10 KuSharoni uku kuchava mafuro ezvipfuwo, nebani reAkori richava mafuro emombe, pamusana pevanhu vangu vanenge vachinditsvaga." 
Isaiah65:11 “Asi imimi makafuratira Tenzi, imi makakanganwa gomo rangu rinoera, imi munotonamata zvenyu Gadhi, imi munozadza makapu emasanganiswa ewaini okuteura kuna Meni," 
Isaiah65:12 chenyu imi chandakutemerai kufa muchiurayiwa namapakatwa, mose mucharakatiswa kufa, nokuti ndakakudaidzaika ini asi hamuna kudaira. Pandaitaura, hamunaka kuteerera. Zvandinoti zvakaipa ndozvacho zvamakatoita, muchisarudza zvenyu kuita zvinhu zvandisingadi.”" 
Isaiah65:13 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Varanda vangu vachadya asi imi muchifa nenzara. Mazvinzwa! Varanda vangu vachanwa asi imi muchifa nenyota. Mazvinzwaka! Varanda vangu vachapembera nokufara, asi imi muchanyadziswa." 
Isaiah65:14 Chinzwai munzwe, kuvaranda vangu achava makuwerere kuimba nokufara, asi kwamuri imi ichava misodzi chete kuchema muchirwadziwa mwoyo muchihwihwidza kuchema muchishungurudzwa mwoyo." 
Isaiah65:15 Zita renyu imi richasara pakati pevasarudzwi vangu rava chokutukisa nacho vanhu. Tenzi Mwari achakuurayai asi varanda vake achavadaidza nerimwewo zita. 
Isaiah65:16 Zvinenge zvava panyika ndezvokuti, munhu anenge ava kuda chikomborero, achakumbira kukomborerwa naMwari wechokwadi, neanenge oda kupika mhiko pasi pano achazopika naMwari wechokwadi. Ndinodaro nokuti nhamo dziye dzakare dzichange dzakanganwika dzisisimo mumaziso angu.”" 
Isaiah65:17 “Chionai kuti ndava kusika denga idzva nenyika itsva. Zvinhu zvakare zviya hazvichazoyeukwa kana kuuya hazvo mumusoro. 
Isaiah65:18 Asi farai zvenyu mufare kwazvo nokusingaperi muchifarira zvandava kusika nokuti tarisai muone ndava kusika Jerusaremu rorufaro nevanhu varowo vari vanhu vakafara chaizvo. 
Isaiah65:19 Ini ndichafarira Jerusaremu vanhu vangu ndichivafarira. Mariri hamuzonzwika izwi rokuchema kana kuridza mhere. 
Isaiah65:20 Hamuna mucheche mariri achararama mazuva mashomanana, kana munhu achembera anodimurirwa panzira mazuva oupenyu hwake. Chinenge chotovepo ndechokuti mwana anotozofa asvitsa zana ramakore. Kunyange mutadzi kufa aine zana remakore runenge ruchitova rushambwa." 
Isaiah65:21 Vanhu vachavaka dzimba vakatodzigara, vachisima minda yamagirepisi vachitozodyawo michero yayo." 
Isaiah65:22 Havazomboti ivo vakavaka, mumwewo zvake ndiye ozogaramo, hazvisiri kuzombosima mumwe achizodya, nokuti vanhu vangu vachararama samakore anogara hunde yomuti. Vasarudzwi vangu ava vachasaraka chaizvo vachingofarira basa ravanoita ivo namaoko avo." 
Isaiah65:23 Havasi kuzomboshandira pasina kana kuberekera vana vavo nhamo nokuti ivo nevana vavo vanenge vari vana vaTenzi, nyakurumbidzwa." 
Isaiah65:24 Vasati vatombonamata ini ndinenge ndatopindura kare munamato wavo, ivo vachiri kutaura, ini ndinenge ndatozvinzwa." 
Isaiah65:25 Mhumhi nehwayana zvichafura pamwechete, shumba inenge yofura sora semombe, nyoka ichange yodya guruva. Zvinenge zvisisakuvadze kana kuparadza mugomo rangu rose zvaro rinoera,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Isaiah66:1 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Denga ndiro chigaro changu choushe, nyika iri iyo pokuisa tsoka dzangu. Imba yorudzii yamungandivakire, inzvimboi inganzi ndeyangu yokuzororera?" 
Isaiah66:2 Zvose izvozvi ndini ndakazviita noruoko rwangu? Ipapo zvose izvi ndezvangu ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, asi munhu wandinocheuka munhu akadai izvi: munhu anozvidukupisa ane mwoyo wokutendeuka anodedera izwi rangu." 
Isaiah66:3 “Zvavakati kuuraya mombe kwakafanana nokuuraya munhu kana kuti anoita hwai chipiro zvakafanana nokutyora imbwa mutsipa kana anopira mupiro wembwesanwa akafanana neanopira ropa renguruve uye kuti munhu anopira mupiro wokuyeuka worusenzi akafanana neanoremekedza chifananidzo chokunamata, vanhu vakadai vanoita zvomusoro wavo vanofarira zvinhu zvavo izvozvo zvinosemesa." 
Isaiah66:4 Ini ndichavasarudzirawo nhamo ndichivaunzira zvavanenge vachitya nokuti ndakadaidza asi hapana akadavira. Ndakataura asi hapana akateerera asi vakatoita zvakaipa zvandisingamboda vachizvisarudzira zvinhu zvandisingadi.” 
Isaiah66:5 Chimbonzwai zviri kutaurwa naTenzi imi munodedera izwi rake: “Hama dzenyu dzinokuvengai, dzinokudzingai pamusana pezita rangu vakataura vachiti, ‘Regai iye Tenzi arumbidzwe, tione kufara kwenyu ikoko!’ Asi ivo ndivo vachanyadziswa." 
Isaiah66:6 Hero bongozozo richibva muguta, izwi riri kubva kuTemberi, izwi raTenzi, ari kuranga vavengi vake achivatsividza." 
Isaiah66:7 “Asati amborwadzwa zvake nepamuviri mukadzi akasununguka mwana, asati abatwa nemarwadzo emimba akasununguka mwana mukomana." 
Isaiah66:8 Ndiani chaizvo ati ambonzwa chinhu chakadaro ndiani ati amboona zvakadaro. Nyika ingaberekwe nomusi mumwechete here? Rudzi rwavanhu rungabva rwaberekwa nenguva isipi here? Ndinodaro nokuti guta reZioni parakangoti rwadzwei nemimba rakabva rasununguka vana varo vakomana. 
Isaiah66:9 Ko ndingasvitse munhu panguva yokuti apone mwana ndigorega kuti asununguke here? Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ko ini ndinoita kuti vanhu vabereke vana, ndini ndingazodzivisa here kuti pamuviri pasunungukwe?” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Mwari wako." 
Isaiah66:10 Pamberi nokufara neguta reJerusaremu muchirifarira imi mose munorida. Farai naro muchipembera nokufara imi mose munorichema. 
Isaiah66:11 Kuti muyamwe zvenyu muchiguta pamazamu aro anonyaradza, kuti munyatsoyamwa muchinakirwa noupfumi hwakawanda hwomukurumbira waro." 
Isaiah66:12 Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi, “Teererai munzwe, ndichaita kuti upfumi rugare ruerere kwariri serwizi, upfumi hwavamarudzi huchiita sorukova rwakafashukira kuzara. Muchayamwa zvenyu makaita zvokutakurwa parutivi paro muchivarayidzwa muri pamakumbo paro." 
Isaiah66:13 Semwana ari kunyaradzwa naamai vake ndokunyaradza kwandichakuitawo imi. Muchanyaradzwa muri muJerusaremu. 
Isaiah66:14 Muchatozvionerawo moga mugofara mumwoyo, muchinyatsokura zvakanaka muviri kuita souswa. Ndopazvichazikanwa kuti simba reruoko rwaTenzi riri pavaranda vake, asi akashatirirwa kwazvo vavengi vake.”" 
Isaiah66:15 Chinzwai, ndinodaro nokuti, Tenzi achauya ari mumoto, ngoro dzake dzehondo dzichinge dutu remhepo, kuzotsiva nehasha achiranga namarimi omoto" 
Isaiah66:16 nokuti Tenzi achatonga nomoto nebakatwa rehondo yake richawira vanhu vose zvavo panyika, vachaurayiwa naTenzi vachange vakawanda." 
Isaiah66:17 “Vanozviita vatsvene navanozvichenura kuti vaende mumapindu vachiteveredzana nomumwe ari pakati vachidya nyama yenguruve nezvinhu zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naMwari nembeva, vachapera pamwechete ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Isaiah66:18 “Ndinodaro nokuti, ndinoziva mabasa avo netwavanofunga. Ndiri kuuya kuzounganidza ndudzi dzose dzavanhu nendimi dzose zvadzo vachasvikoona mbiri yangu." 
Isaiah66:19 Ndichaisa mucherechedzo pakati pavo, ndichatora mukati mavo imomo chitsama chavanhu chichapunyuka rufu ndigochitumira kudzindudzi, kuTashishi nokuPuru nokuRudhi vanokunga uta. Ndichavatumirawo kuTubharu nokuJavhani nokunyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa kure uko kusina kumbonzwika mukurumbira wangu kana kuonekwa mbiri yangu. Vachadhumhisa mbiri yangu mukati mendudzi dzavanhu." 
Isaiah66:20 Ivo vachauya nehama dzenyu dzose vachibva nadzo kundudzi dzose dzavanhu somupiro kuna Tenzi vari pamabhiza nomungoro dzehondo nomungoro dzine tutenga napamanyurusi nepanghamera dzinomhanya kwazvo vakananga kugomo rangu rinoera, Jerusaremu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, vachiita sokuuya kunoita vaIsiraeri nomupiro wembesanwa uri mumudziyo wakachena kumba kwaTenzi." 
Isaiah66:21 Vamwewo vavo ndichavaita vapristi vamwe ndichivaita vaRevhi, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Isaiah66:22 “Ndinodaro nokuti sezvazvichangoita kuti denga idzva nenyika itsva zvandichasika zvicharamba zviri pandiri. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, ndozvichangoitawo zvizvarwa zvenyu nezita renyu zvicharamba zvichingovapo.”" 
Isaiah66:23 “Kubvira pakugara kwomwedzi kusvikira panozogarawo mumwe mwedzi, uye kubvira paSabata kusvikira pane rimwe Sabata, munhu wose zvake achange achiuya kuzondigwadamira,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Isaiah66:24 “Vachabudamo zvavo vachindoona zvitunha zvevanhu vakandipandukira nokuti honye dzavo hadzizofi, moto wavo uchange usingadzimi. Vachange vari chinhu chinosemesa kwazvo kumunhu wese zvake.”" 
Jeremiah1:1 Aya ndiwo mazwi aJeremiya mwanakomana waHirikiya mumwe wavapristi vaiva muguta reAnatoti munyika yokwaBhenjamini. 
Jeremiah1:2 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwaari mumazuva aJosiya, mwanakomana waAmoni, mambo wokwaJudha, muri mugore regumi nechitatu rokutonga kwake." 
Jeremiah1:3 Rakauya mumazuvawo aJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo wokwaJudha kudzamara kumagumo kwegore regumi nechiposhi rokutonga kwaZedhekiya mwanakomana waJosiya, mambo wokwaJudha, kusvikira pakutapwa kweJerusaremu mumwedzi wechishanu wacho." 
Jeremiah1:4 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Jeremiah1:5 “Ndisati ndambokuumba mudumbu ramai, ndaitokuziva, usati waberekwa ndakakutsaura. Ndakakureresa ndakakusarudza somuporofita kumarudzi avanhu.”" 
Jeremiah1:6 Ini ndokuti, “AA! Nhai Tenzi Mwari! Tarisai muone kuti ini handikwanisi kutaura nokuti ndiri muduku!”" 
Jeremiah1:7 Asi Tenzi akati kwandiri, “Rega kuti ndiri muduku, nokuti kune vose vandinenge ndakutuma unofanira kuenda uye zvandinenge ndakuudza unofanira kutaura." 
Jeremiah1:8 Rega kuvatya nokuti ini ndinenge ndinewe kuzokununura. Ndozviri kutaura Tenzi.” 
Jeremiah1:9 Tenzi akabva atambanudza ruoko rwake akabata muromo wangu Tenzi akati kwandiri, “Chinzwa unzwe, ndaisa mazwi angu mukanwa mako." 
Jeremiah1:10 “Chiona, nhasi uno ndakupa masimba pamusoro pamarudzi namadzimambo okudzipura nookupaza, okuparadza, nookukurira okuvaka nookusima.”" 
Jeremiah1:11 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti, “Jeremiya, chii chauri kuona?” Ini ndakati, “Ndiri kuona bazi romuarimondi.”" 
Jeremiah1:12 Tenzi ndokuti kwandiri, “Waona zvazviri, nokuti ini ndiri kutarisa kuti shoko rangu rakazadzikiswa.”" 
Jeremiah1:13 Izwi raTenzi rakazouyazve kwandiri richiti, “Chii chauri kuona?” Ini ndakati, “Ndiri kuona hari iri pamoto iri kuvira yakafuratira kuchamhembe.”" 
Jeremiah1:14 Tenzi akati kwandiri, “Kuchamhembe uku kuchabva nhamo ichawira vagari vose venyika ino." 
Jeremiah1:15 Ndinodaro nokuti zvamunoona, ndava kuzodaidza ndudzi dzavanhu vamadzimambo oKuchamhembe, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. “Vanhu ivavo vachauya, mumwe nomumwe wavo agogadzikira chigaro choumambo hwake kwokupinda nako pamisuo mikuru yeguta reJerusaremu vagokomberedza masvingo eJerusaremu uye vagokomberana maguta ose zvawo okwaJudha." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ndichavatemera chirango chezvakaipa zvavo zvose zvokundifuratira kwamakaita vachipisira vamwe vamwari rusenzi nokupfugamira mabasa avanoita namaoko avo. 
Jeremiah1:17 Asi iwe wochisunga dzisimbe usimuke uvataurire zvose zvandinokuudza. Rega kuvatya, ukavatya ndinokuita mbwende pamberi pavo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Tarisa uone, nhasi uno, ini iyeni ndakuita guta retsvingo, nomusimboti wesimbi chaiwo, namasvingo endarira kurwisana nenyika ino yose zvayo namadzimambo okwaJudha namachinda ayo navapristi vayo navagari vayo." 
Jeremiah1:19 Vachakurwisa asi havazokukurira nokuti ini ndinewe ndichazokununura, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah2:1 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Jeremiah2:2 “Enda undoparidza, Jerusaremu ichizvinzwa, kuti zvanzi naTenzi: “Ndinorangarira mwoyo wokuda zvokunamata wawaiva nawo pauduku hwako norudo rwawaiva narwo semwenga nokunditevera kwawaindiita murenje, munyika isina chinorimwamo." 
Jeremiah2:3 “Isiraeri yakanga ichiera kuna Tenzi iri michero yake chaiyo yokutanga kukohwa, vose zvavo vakaidya vakapara mhosva vakapinda nhamo ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah2:4 Inzwai shoko raTenzi imi vemba yokwaJakobho, imi mose vemadzinza emba yaIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah2:5 Zvanzi naTenzi: “Ndechipiko chakaipa chakaonekwa namadzibaba enyu mandiri zvavakabva vatoenda kure neni kudai votevera zvinhu zvisina maturo vachibva vavawo vanhu vasina maturo? 
Jeremiah2:6 “Havana kumbobvunzawo kuti, iye Tenzi aripiko akatiburitsa munyika yeIjipiti, akatitungamirira murenje, munyika yamagwenga namakoronga, munyika yakaoma, nyika yezarima, munyika isina anopfuura nomo, kusina anogarako?" 
Jeremiah2:7 “Ndakakuunzai munyika ine ivhu rakanaka kuti mudye henyu michero yayo nezvakanaka zvayo. Asi imi pamakapinda mairi makan'oresa nyika yangu mukaita kuti nhaka yangu ive chinhu chinosemesa. 
Jeremiah2:8 “Vapristi havana kubvunza kuti, ‘Tenzi ari kupi?’ Vanoona nezvomutemo havana kundiziva. Vafudzi vavanhu vakandipandukira, vaporofita vakaporofita nomweya waBhaari vachitevedza zvinhu zvisina chimuko." 
Jeremiah2:9 “Zvanzi naTenzi, naizvozvo ndichakugadzai dare, ndichagadzawo vana vavana venyu" 
Jeremiah2:10 nokuti yambukirai kumahombekombe eSaipurasi muone, kana kutumira nhume kuKedhari dzindonyatsoongorora kwazvo muone kana kwakamboitika chinhu chakadai." 
Jeremiah2:11 Kuno rudzi here rwakambochinjanisa vaMwari varwo, kunyange zvazvo ivo vasiri vamwari? Asi vanhu vangu vakatsinhanisa Mbiri yavo vachiitsiva nezvinhu zvisingabatsiri." 
Jeremiah2:12 “Matenga ngaakatyamarewo nezvakadai izvi akangaidzwe, apazaniswe musoro, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi;" 
Jeremiah2:13 nokuti vanhu vangu vakanditadzira nezvizvi zviviri zvokuti vakandifuratira ini tsime remvura mhenyu vakatozvicherera mazigaringiro emvura mazigaringiro akabamuka asingagone kuchengeta mvura. 
Jeremiah2:14 “Nyika yeIsiraeri nyika yevaranda here? Vakaberekerwa muuranda here? Sei vava nyama yamagora. 
Jeremiah2:15 Shumba dzakamudzovera dzichiita ruzha chairwo kudzvova. Nyika yeIsiraeri vaiita kuti ingova nyika isina zvayo chinhu, maguta ayo ava matongo asisina anogaramo." 
Jeremiah2:16 “Uyewo vanhu vokuguta reMemufisi nereTapanesi vakatsemura Isiraeri musoro. 
Jeremiah2:17 Hazvisi zvokuzviparira here izvi nokufuratira kwawakaita Tenzi, Mwari wako iye achingunokutungamirirai mugwara?" 
Jeremiah2:18 “Ko zvino chii chamunowana nokuenda kuIjipiti, kundonwa mvura yomuna Nairi nhai? Uye chii chamunowana nokuenda kuAsiria, kundonwa mvura yomuna Yufuratesi here?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Uipi hwako huchakupfukira; umhandupandu hwako ndohuchakugadzira. Chaunofanira kuziva nokuona ndechokuti chinhu chakaipa chinorwadza, kufuratira Tenzi, Mwari wako zvokunditya mauri hamuna ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo.”" 
Jeremiah2:20 “Ndinodaro nokuti kare kare wakatyora iwe Joko rako ukadambura zvitorobho zvako uchiti, ‘Handichakushandirai.’ Heeka, pachikomo chose chose zvacho napasi pomuti wose zvawo wakasvibira wakapfugamidzapo sepfambi." 
Jeremiah2:21 “Asi ini ndakanga ndakusima somugirepisi wakanakisisa chaizvo, chaiwo une mhodzi dzakasvika. Zvauya sei kuti ubva wasanduka kudai, kubva wava somugirepisi womudondo zvawo?" 
Jeremiah2:22 “Kunyange zvako ukazvishambidza nesoda nesipo ine simba chaizvo uchiipupumisa kwazvo kutindivara kwemhosva yako ndinenge ndichingokuona chete ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Jeremiah2:23 “Ko ungagoti sei, handina kun'ora ini, handina kutevera vanaBhaari? Tarisa uone gwara rako mumupata, uzive twawakaita. Uri tsiru renghamera rabindura risina kugadzikana rinodimuranisa nyika." 
Jeremiah2:24 Uri dhongi zvaro romusango rajairira zvomurenje rinongofemhedza mhepo nokubindura kwaro! Ndiani angaridzore pahavi dzaro? Hapana mikono inenge ichiritsvaga inofanira kuzvinetsa zvayo, mumwedzi waro wokubindura inotoriwana chete." 
Jeremiah2:25 Ngwarirai kuti muchasvuuka tsoka mugooma pahuro nenyota. Asi wakati iwe, ‘Hazvina basa nokuti ndinodanana navamwari vechirudzi saka changu ini kwangova kundenderedzana navo ikoko.’ ”" 
Jeremiah2:26 “Sokunyara kunoita mbavha kana yabatwa, ndokunyara kuchaita vemba yaIsiraeri, ivo, namadzimambo avo namachinda avo, navapristi vavo navaporofita vavo." 
Jeremiah2:27 Vanhu vanototi kumuti ‘Ndimi baba vangu,’ vachiti kudombo, ‘Ndimi makandibereka, nokuti vakandipa gotsi'va vakandivanza uso.’ Asi kana pava panhamo zvino ndopovoti, ‘Simukai mutinunureiwo.’" 
Jeremiah2:28 “Ko vamwari vako vawakazvigadzirira varipi? Ngavasimukeka ivo kana vachikwanisa kukununura zvaunenge wapindwa nenhamo kudaro nokuti iwe Judha kuwanda kwakaita maguta ako, ndokuwanda kwakaitawo vaMwari vako." 
Jeremiah2:29 “Chamunondipira mhosva chii ipapa? Makandipandukiraka imi mose zvenyu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi anoti:" 
Jeremiah2:30 Kubangorangawo zvangu vana vako neshamhu, havana kana kumbodzoreka zvavo. Mapakatwa ako iyewe ndiwo aparadza vaporofita vangu seshumba inorura." 
Jeremiah2:31 Imi vechizvarwa chino ichi, chinzwai munzwe zviri kutaurwa naTenzi. Iyeni ndabva ndaita segwenga here kuvaIsiraeri? Kana kuti senyika yezarima zvayo? Ko vanhu vangu zvovotozuwa zvavo vachiti: ‘Tochiita pamadiro zvino, kwamuri hatichambokutsikazve?’" 
Jeremiah2:32 Mhandara ingakanganwe zvishongo zvayo here, kana kuti mwenga kukanganwa hanzu yake yomuchato here? Asi vanhu vangu vakandikanganwa kwamazuva asingaverengeki." 
Jeremiah2:33 Inga unoziva kwazvo kurondorodza zvikomba zvako! Kunyange vakadzi vakaipa wakatovadzidzisa maitiro ako. 
Jeremiah2:34 Kunyange pambatya dzako pakatsvuka ropa ravarombo vasina mhosva. Hauna kuvawanikidza vachipaza. Kunyange zvose izvozvi zvakadai 
Jeremiah2:35 iwe ndopaunoti, handina mhosva, zvokundishatirirwa haachambondishatirirwa. Chinzwa, ndichakupa chirango chokukurangira muromo wako iwoyo wokuti, ‘Handina kutadzira Mwari.’" 
Jeremiah2:36 Unongoti pano batu, pano batu zvisina netsarukano yese. Uchanyadziswa neIjipiti sokunyadziswa kwawakaitwa neAsiria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Naikokozve uchadzoka wakabata gotsi nokuti Tenzi akaramba vaunovimba navo vacho. Chaunowanawo iwe uchibatsirwa navanhu ivavo hapana.” 
Jeremiah3:1 “Kana murume akarambana nomudzimai wake, iye akaenda akandova mudzimai womumwe murume, murume uyu angadzokerana naye here? Nyika iyoyo haingan'oreswe zvakanyanya here? Wakaitaka zvoufeve nezvikomba zvakawanda, ungadzokere here, iwe, kwandiri? Ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi." 
Jeremiah3:2 Simudza musoro utarisewo kumitunhu yakatunhumara kusina miti. Ndapapi pausina kuitira chakaipa? Mudzinzira waigara wakamirira zvikomba zvako, sokuhwandira kunoita muArabhu mugwenga. Wan'oresa nyika iwe nounzenza hwako hunosemesa." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ndokusaka mvura yakambomiswa kunaya, mvura yomunhuruka ikarega kuturuka. Asi iwe une uso hwepfambi, haunyari." 
Jeremiah3:4 “Handiti iye zvino unonditi, ‘Baba vangu,’ uchinditi, ‘Muri shamwari yangu kubvira pauduku hwangu," 
Jeremiah3:5 mucharamba makangotsamwa here narini wose; mucharamba makangoshatirwa kusvikira kumagumo here?’ Tarisa uone kuti izvi kutaura unotaura zvako asi iwe wakaita zvakaipa paunokwanisira napo.” 
Jeremiah3:6 Mumazuva amambo Josiya, Tenzi akati kwandiri, “Wakaona here zvakaitwa nomukadzi akapanduka uya, Isiraeri kunekura kwaaiita nezvikomo zvose nepasi pomuti wose wose wakasvibira achiitira ufeve hwake imomo?" 
Jeremiah3:7 Ndakafunga kuti, kana apedza kuita kwake kwose ikoko achadzokera kwandiri, asi haana kudzoka, izvozvo munyengedzi munun'una wake Judha uyu, zvaiva mumazisowo make." 
Jeremiah3:8 Judha akaona kuti pamusana poupombwe hwomukadzi asingavimbiki uya, Isiraeri, ini ndakamuramba netsamba yegupuro. Asi munun'una wake, munyengedzi, Judha, hazvina kumbomurovesa hana. Asi ndopaakatondoitawo unzenza." 
Jeremiah3:9 Pamusana pokufumuka kwake nounzenza akan'oresa nyika ino achiita zvounzenza hwokunamata matombo nemiti. 
Jeremiah3:10 Kunyange zvose izvi zvakadaro zvazvo, munyengedzi munun'una wake Judha haana kudzokera kwandiri nomwoyo wose asi zvechipameso chete, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah3:11 Tenzi akati kwandiri, “Iye Isiraeri mukadzi akapanduka uya, anozvionesa somunhu asina mhosva pane munyengedzi uyu Judha." 
Jeremiah3:12 Enda undoparidza kuchamhembe mazwi aya utaure uchiti: “Zvanzi naTenzi, chidzoka iwe Isiraeri mhandupandu yomunhu. Handichakutsvukisira meso nehasha nokuti ndine ngoni, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi handicharamba ndakashatirwa nokusingaperi." 
Jeremiah3:13 Chako iwe chete, bvuma uipi hwako kuti wakapandukira Tenzi, Mwari wako ukatoti zvako mwarara kurasira makomborero ako kuvamwari vasivo pasi pomuti wose zvawo wakasvibira ubvumewo kuti wakarega kuteerera izwi rangu, ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi." 
Jeremiah3:14 “Zvanzi naTenzi dzokai imi vana vasina kutendeka nokuti ini ndini tenzi wenyu. Ndichakutorai ndichiti muguta iri ndotora mumwechete, mumhuri iyi ndichitora vaviri, ndozokuunzai kuguta reZioni." 
Jeremiah3:15 “Ndichakupai vafudzi vangu vapamwoyo vachakupai chokudya choruzivo nokunzwisisa. 
Jeremiah3:16 Zvanzi naTenzi pamazuva iwayo kana zvino maberekana kwazvo mawanda munyika ino, havachazombodoma kuti, ‘Bhokisi rechitenderano chaTenzi.’ Harisi kana kuzombouya zvaro mumusoro mavo kunyange kurirangarira zvako kana kumborisuwirwawo, harisi kuzombogadzirwa zvakare." 
Jeremiah3:17 Panguva iyoyo guta reJerusaremu rinenge rava kunzi, ‘Chigaro chaTenzi choumambo’. Ndudzi dzose dzavanhu dzichakotonokerako kuJerusaremu muzita raTenzi. Izvozvo vanenge vakanda pasi zvokuomesa musoro nokufuririka nomwoyo wavo wakaipa." 
Jeremiah3:18 Mumazuva iwayo vemba yokwaJudha vachabatana nevemba yokwaIsiraeri. Vachadzoka pamwechete vachibva kunyika kuchamhembe vachiuya kunyika yandakapa madzibaba enyu kuti ive nhaka yavo.” 
Jeremiah3:19 Ini Tenzi ndakati, “Zvaizofadza seiko kukubatai somumwe wevanakomana vangu ndichikupai nyika yakanaka, nhaka yakanakisisa pane yamamwe marudzi ose. Ndaifunga kuti maizondidaidza kuti, ‘Baba vangu’ musisandifuratire morega kunditevera." 
Jeremiah3:20 Zvinongoita mudzimai anenge apanduka achisiya murume wake, ndokusatendeka kwawakaita iwe imba yaIsiraeri ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah3:21 Pane kuchema kuri kunzwika pamutunhu wakatunhumara pasina miti, kuhwihwidza nokuteterera kwevanakomana veIsiraeri nokuti vaminamisa gwara ravo, vakanganwa Tenzi, Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Dzokai imi vanakomana vakapanduka ndichakurapai mwoyo wokupanduka. Hezvika, tauya kwamuri nokuti imi ndimi Tenzi, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Zvomuzvikomo izvi kuzvinyengedza, ndizvo zvimwechetezvo nezhowezhowe inoitwa mamakomo'mu. Chokwadi ruponeso rwedu ruri muna Tenzi, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah3:24 “Asi kubvira pauduku hwedu Chakafumuka chakaparadza zvose zvakanga zvashandwa namadzibaba edu zvinoti: matanga emombe nezvimwe zvipfuwo navanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo. 
Jeremiah3:25 Ngatitii pasi ware ware kurara nenyadzi, kunyara kutikwidibire nokuti takatadzira Tenzi, Mwari wedu, isu namadzibaba edu kubvira pahuduku hwedu kusvikira pari nhasi. Uye hatina kuteerera izwi raTenzi, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah4:1 Zvanzi naTenzi “Iwe Isiraeri kana wafunga zvokudzoka, kwandiri ndokwaunofanira kudzokera. Kana ukabvisa pandiri pangu zvinondisemesa izvi usingaite mwoyo miviri" 
Jeremiah4:2 uye kana ukapika uchiti, ‘NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu’ uchipika pachokwadi zviri pamwero chaipo zviri mukururama, ndudzi dzavanhu ndopadzichazviwanira zvikomborero pamusana pako; vachiwana mbiri pamusana pako.”" 
Jeremiah4:3 Nokuti zvanzi naTenzi kuvanhu vokwaJudha nokuvagari veJerusaremu, “Rimai minda yenyu yakasaruka murege kudyara muminzwa." 
Jeremiah4:4 Zvidzingisirei Tenzi imi vanhu vokwaJudha nemi vagari veJerusaremu. Pakudzingiswa ikoko, chinobviswa chacho, ngachibviswe mumwoyo menyu, ndingadaro ndikakuvirukirai nehasha kunge moto unopisa usina ani angaudzimure pamusana pezvakaipa zvamunoita.”" 
Jeremiah4:5 Paridzai maJudha'mu muzivise muJerusaremu muti, “Ridzai mabhosvo nomunyika mose mudaidzire kwazvo muchiti, ‘Unganai tiende tindopinda mumaguta etsvingo!’" 
Jeremiah4:6 Simudzai mureza munange kuZioni tizai mundopotera, regai kugara, nokuti ndiri kuunza nhamo inobva kuchamhembe nokuparadza kwakakura kwazvo." 
Jeremiah4:7 Shumba yabuda mumajokochwa mayo; muparadzi wamarudzi avanhu abuda, asimuka achibva kwake, kuzoparadza nyika yako, maguta ako achava matongo, asisina anogaramo." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ipapo iwe chipfeka masaga uungudze ucheme nokuti Tenzi haana kurega kutivirukira kwazvo nehasha.” 
Jeremiah4:9 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Nomusi iwoyo, mambo namachinda vose zvavo vachapererwa nechivindi, vapristi vachadumbirwa nazvo vaporofitawo zvichivaomesa mate mukanwa.”" 
Jeremiah4:10 Ini ndokuteterera ndichiti, “Ho baba iwe, nhai Tenzi Mwari, inga marega vanhu ava neJerusaremu iyi vachinyatsonyengedzwa vachinzi, ‘Zvichakunakirai,’ ihwo upenyu hwavo hwatova parumano nehondo yebakatwa.”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Panguva iyoyo zvichazonzi kuvanhu ivava uye kuJerusaremu, heyo mhepo inopisa inobva kumatunhu akatunhumara kugwenga ichivinga mwanasikana iyeyu, vanhu vangu kwete mhepo yokuurutsisa kana kuchenesa," 
Jeremiah4:12 mhepo ine simba kwazvo kwazvo yandinotuma ini. Iye zvino izvi ndini ndava kuvatemera chirango. 
Jeremiah4:13 Tarira uone, vouya samakore, hedzo ngoro dzake dzehondo sechamupupuri mabhiza ake, anomhanya anosara pasi. Tawira iwe, taparara!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Iwe Jerusaremu shamba zvakaipa zvemwoyo wako kuti uponeswewo. Kusvikira rini chaizvo pfungwa dzouipi idzi dzakagara mauri? 
Jeremiah4:15 Nokuti kwaDhani kwabva shoko riri kuparidza, riri kuparidza nhamo iri kubva kuGomo rokwaEfuremu." 
Jeremiah4:16 Yambira marudzi avanhu kuti ava kuuya, muzivise Jerusaremu kuti, kuri kuuyiwa navakombi vamaguta vanobva kunyika iri kure. Vari kudaidzira kumaguta okwaJudha." 
Jeremiah4:17 Tenzi ari kuti vakomberana Judha savanhu vanochengetedza munda nokuti akandipandukira. 
Jeremiah4:18 Nzira dzako namaitiro ako ndozvakupfukira, ndokupera kwako ikoku. Zvinorwadza zvakusvika pamwoyo chaipo." 
Jeremiah4:19 Maiwe, maiwe, ndinobinduka nokurwadziwa, mwoyo wangu maiwe, mwoyo wangu uri kurova zvakanyanya. Handikwanisi kunyarara nokuti ndiri kunzwa kurira kwamabhosvo, iri yambiro yehondo." 
Jeremiah4:20 Nhamo dzavirikidzana zvakaomarara, nyika yose yaparadzwa, misasa yangu yematendhe yangoerekana yaparara machira angu okudzikatirisa aparara nenguva isipi." 
Jeremiah4:21 Kusvikira riniko ndichingoona mureza uyu ndichingonzwa kurira kwamabhosvo 
Jeremiah4:22 nokuti, “Vanhu vangu mazungairwa, ini handivazivi, mazirema evana, havanzwisisi. Vanochamirira kuita zvakaipa asi kuita zvakanaka havamboziva.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndakatarisa panyika, ndikaona paparara, pasisina chiripo. Ndakatarisa kudenga, ndikaona kusina chiedza" 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndakatarisa makomo, ndikaona achindengendeka, zvikomo zvose zvichivheya uko nokoko." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ndakatarisa ndikaona pasina kana munhu, kunyange shiri dzose dzedenga dzakanga dzatiza." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndakatarisa, onei, nyika yaibereka zvibereko zvayo yangove gwenga, maguta ayo ose angove matongo pamberi paTenzi uye nehasha dzake." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ndinodaro nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, nyika yose ichaparara, asi handisi kuzoiparadza zvachose." 
Jeremiah4:28 Nyika ichachema nokuda kwaizvozvo, denga kumusoro uko, richasviba nokuti ndizvo zvandatema, ndozvandada. Handimboteti kana kudzokera shure." 
Jeremiah4:29 Pavanongonzwa mutsindo wamabhiza neyevemiseve, guta rose, munhu anobva angoti gumbo ndibereke, zvobva zvongoti runopinda mumajokochwa norunokwira mumatombo, maguta ose anosara angova maguta chete asina munhu anogaramo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Zvino iwe Mushayavanhu, chaunobangopfekera hanzu tsvuku chii? Zvaunobva watozviti memete nezvishongo zvendarama kudai uye kutokudza-kudza meso ako nependi. Chaunozvishongedzera chaizvo hapana, zvikomba zvako izvozvo zvinokuzvidza. Chavanenge vachitotsvaga kukuuraya" 
Jeremiah4:31 nokuti ndakanzwa kuchema kunenge kwomukadzi arwadzwa napamuviri kurwadzwa sokwemukadzi ari pakusununguka mwana wokutanga. Mhere yeJerusaremu, mukunda weZioni achitofemuruka achitambanudza maoko ake achiti, “Maiwe zvangu! Ndava kutofizuka zvangu pameso pemhondi.”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Bvongodzai nomumigwagwa yeJerusaremu mutarise muongorore. Tsvakurudzai mumisika yaro muone, kana mukawana mumwechete zvake anoita zvine ruenzaniso uye ari pachokwadi, ndiriregerere guta irori." 
Jeremiah5:2 Kunyange zvazvo vachiti, “NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu,” izvozvo vanenge vachipika zvenhema." 
Jeremiah5:3 Nhai Tenzi, handiti meso enyu anotsvaga chokwadi here? Kuvarova makavarova zvenyu asi hazvina kuvarwadza. Makavakuya, imi, asi vakaramba kudzorwa. Vakatoomesa musoro kutopinda dombo, vakaramba kutendeuka." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ini ndokuti, “Ava vanhu varombo zvavo chete havanzwisisi nokuti nzira yaTenzi havaizivi, iwo mutemo waMwari wavo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ndichaenda kuvakuru vakuru vacho ndigotaura navo nokuti vanoziva nzira yaTenzi, iwo mutemo waMwari wavo. Asi vose zvavo vakaita zvimwechetezvo vakatyorawo joko racho vakadambura zvitorobho." 
Jeremiah5:6 “Naizvozvo shumba ichabva mudondo ivauraye, mhumi yokugwenga ichavaparadza; mbada iri kuhwandira mumaguta avo. Ani naani anongobudamo achabvamburwa-bvamburwa. Nokuti kukanganisa kwavo kwawanda; umhandupandu hwavo hwanyanya." 
Jeremiah5:7 “Ndingagokuregererai seiko? Vana venyu vakandifuratira vakatopika zvavo navasiri vamwari. “Pandaivapa chokudya vachiguta ivo ndopavakaita upombwe vachiunganidzana kudzimba dzepfambi. 
Jeremiah5:8 Vakanga vava mikono yamabhiza yakakodzwa yava kuda makadzi, rimwe nerimwe rohwihwidzira mukadzi werimwe raro." 
Jeremiah5:9 Ndingarege here kuvarangira zvinhu izvozvi? Ndozviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndingarege here kutsividza rudzi rwakaita sairworu? 
Jeremiah5:10 “Pindai nomumitsara yemigirepisi yake muchiparadza, asi musabva maparadza zvachose. Mukwazhurei mapazi ake nokuti haasi mapazi aTenzi." 
Jeremiah5:11 Ndinodaro nokuti vemba yokwaIsiraeri nevemba yokwaJudha, vakanga vari vanhu vasina kunyatsotendeseka kwandiri. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah5:12 Vanoreva nhema nezvaTenzi vachiti, “Hapana chaanoita uyu. Hapana nhamo ichatiwira. Hondo yemapakatwa, hatisi kuzomboiona isu, kana zveshangwa yenzara.”" 
Jeremiah5:13 Vaporofita vangova mhepo zvayo mavari hamuna shoko racho. Saka izvozvo ndozvichaitwa kwavari! 
Jeremiah5:14 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo, “Chinzwa, pamusana pomuromo wavanotaura iwoyo, ndichaita kuti mazwi angu anobva mumuromo mako ave moto, vanhu ivava vanenge vari ivo huni dzacho; moto iwoyo uchavaroromesa.”" 
Jeremiah5:15 Chinzwai, imi vemba yaIsiraeri ndiri kukuunzirai rudzi rwavanhu, vanobva kure, kure ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Rudzi rwacho rudzi rwapasichigare rudzi rwaivapo kubvira chingo nechingo, rudzi runo mutauro wamusingazivi vamusingagoni kunzwisisa kutaura kwavo." 
Jeremiah5:16 Mukutu wavo unenge guva rakashama, vose zvavo magamba okurwa chaiwo." 
Jeremiah5:17 Vachadya goho renyu nechokudya chenyu Vachaparadza vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu. Vachadya matanga emombe dzenyu neezvimwe zvipfuwo zvenyu. Vachadya magirepisi enyu uye maonde enyu. Maguta enyu etsvingo amunovimba nawo vachaaparadza nehondo yebakatwa. 
Jeremiah5:18 Asi zvanzi naTenzi, “Kunyange mumazuva iwayo handisi kuzobva ndakutsakatisai." 
Jeremiah5:19 Vanhu vokwako ava kana vokubvunza vachiti, ‘Tenzi, Mwari wedu akaitireiko zvinhu izvi kwatiri?’ Iwe vataurire kuti, ‘Sokundifuratira kwamakaita muchindonamata vaMwari vasiriivo munyika menyu, saizvozvowo muchandonamatawo vamwari vasirivo kunyika isiri yenyu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah5:20 “Paridzai izvozvi kune vemba yokwaJakobho; zivisai izvozvi mune vemba yaJudha. 
Jeremiah5:21 Chinzwai izvi mazungairwa avanhu, vanhu vasina pfungwa, vana maziso, asi havaoni, vane nzeve, asi kunzwa vasinganzwi." 
Jeremiah5:22 “Tenzi anoti, hamundityi here, uye hamundidederi here? Ini ndakaisa jecha samahombekombe egungwa. Muganhu wokugara wakadaro warisingagoni kudimura. Kunyange mafungu akausunda haanga usudurudze kunyange zvazvo akatinhira haakwanisi kuudarika." 
Jeremiah5:23 Asi vanhu ivava itsvuuramuromo dzavanhu vane mwoyo woumhandupandu vakatsauka vakateterekera kure. 
Jeremiah5:24 Mumwoyo mavo havambozvitiwo, ngatityei Tenzi, Mwari wedu, anonayisa mvura mumwaka wayo; nemvura yobumharutsva neyomunhuruka, nokutipa masvondo akatemerwa nguva yokukohwa." 
Jeremiah5:25 Uipi hwenyu ndohurikuzvitandira kure, zvitadzo zvenyu ndizvo zviri kukutadzisai kuwana zvakanaka" 
Jeremiah5:26 nokuti pakati pevanhu vangu pane vamwe vanhu vakaipa. Vanohwandira savateyi veshiri vakagaririra. Vanoteya chokuteyesa vachibata vanhu. 
Jeremiah5:27 Setswanda yokuteyesa shiri yazara nadzo, dzimba dzavo dzakati pamu pamu kuzara nezvinhu zvoujarijari. Saizvozvo vava mbombo chaidzo dzakapfuma," 
Jeremiah5:28 vakakora, vakaita miviri unoyevedza. Kuita kwavo kwouipi hakuna muganho, havatonge zvine ruenzaniso; mhaka dzenherera kuti dzibudirire. Havambomiririra varombo pazvinhu zvinofanira kuve zvavo." 
Jeremiah5:29 “Tenzi ari kuti ndingarege here kuvarangira zvinhu izvozvi? Ndingarege here kutsividza rudzi rwevanhu vakadai urwu? 
Jeremiah5:30 Kwaitika chinhu chinodumbirisa chinhu chakaipisisa kwazvo munyika ino 
Jeremiah5:31 chokuti: vaporofita vari kuporofita zvenhema vapristiwo vachitonga vachingoita kuti zvivanakire. Vanhu vangu ndozvavari kutodawo zvakadaro izvozvo, asi muchaita sei kana kuguma kwazvosvika?”" 
Jeremiah6:1 Tizai muJerusaremu munohwanda imi vanhu vokwaBhenjamini, ridzai hwamanda muTekoa, uye simudzai mumise chiratidzo paBhetihakeremu, nokuti heyo nhamo youya ichibva kuchamhembe, kuparadza kukuru chaizvo." 
Jeremiah6:2 Guta reJerusaremu, mukunda weZiyoni kunyange rakanaka zvaro kudaro ndichariparadza." 
Jeremiah6:3 Vafudzi namatanga ezvipfuwo zvavo, vachadzika misasa yavo yematendhe vakarikomberana mumwe nomumwe achifudzira zvake pachindima chake." 
Jeremiah6:4 “Gadzirirai hondo tivarwise, simukai tivarwise zuva richirova nhongonya.” “Inga tapinda nhamoka isu zuva rava kuvira kudai mimvuri yokudoka kwokunze yava kureba." 
Jeremiah6:5 Simukai tirwise nousiku tiparadze mizinda yaro.” 
Jeremiah6:6 Nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo, “Temerai pasi miti yaro muvake nevhu chinenge musana wenzou kurusvingo rweJerusaremu. Guta irori iri, iguta rinofanira kurangwa, udzvinyiriri ndohuzeremo chete." 
Jeremiah6:7 “Sezvinoita tsime kunyatsochengetedza mvura yaro yakanaka, ndizvo zviri kuita guta irori kunyatsochengetedza uipi hwaro. Utsinye nokuparadza ndizvo zvinonzwika mariri urwere namaronda zviri kugara zviri pameso pangu." 
Jeremiah6:8 Iwe Jerusaremu uchinzwawo! Ndingadaro ndikachekana ukama newe ndinokusiya wangova nzvimbo chete, nyika isina ageremo.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo: “Vachanyatsoita sokufuhwa mugirepisi vachifuhwa chitsama chavakasara cheIsiraeri, somutanhi wamagirepisi dzokererazve kupinza ruoko rwako mumapazi awo.”" 
Jeremiah6:10 “Ndiani chaizvo wandingataurire ndichiyambira kuti vanzwe? Hezvi nzeve dzavo dzakadzivira, havanzwi. Zvamunoona, kwavari ivo, shoko raTenzi rangova chinhu chinoshoreka, havachamborifarirai" 
Jeremiah6:11 Ndokusaka ndakapaka kuzara nehasha dzaTenzi, ndaneta nadzo kudzinyaradza. Dzidururire pavana vari mumugwagwa napamapoka amajayawo. Vose zvavo murume nomukadzi vachatapwa, vezera ravakura navakwegura chaivo.”" 
Jeremiah6:12 “Misha yavo ichava yavamwe pamwechete neminda yavo namadzimai avo nokuti ini noruoko rwangu ndichasumudza shamhu yokuranga vagari venyika ino, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi," 
Jeremiah6:13 nokuti kubvira kumudiki kusvikira kumukuru wacho chaiye, munhu wose ano makaro okuwana zvinhu nenzira isina kururama, kubvira kumuporofita kusvikira kumupristi munhu wose ari kungoita zvounyengedzi." 
Jeremiah6:14 Kurapa ronda ravanhu vangu, vanorapa zvavo asi zvechipa meso vachiti, ‘Rugare, rugare,’ ipo pasina rugare rwacho." 
Jeremiah6:15 Havaifanira kunyara here pavakaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwi naMwari? Kwete havana kana kumbonyara ava. Havazivi kuti kunonyarwa sei. Naizvozvo vachafawo panofira vamwe, panguva yandichavaranga ndipo pavachakundwa, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah6:16 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Mirai pamhararano munyatsotarisa, mubvunzisise nezvenzira dzakare kuti gwara rakanaka nderipi mufambe naro muzviwanire zororo.” Asi ivo vakatoti, “Hatidi kufamba mariri.”" 
Jeremiah6:17 Ndakaisa vatariri vokukutarirai, ndichiti, “Teererai kurira kwehwamanda.” Asi vanoti, “Hatimboda kana kuzvinzwa izvozvo.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 “Saka zvino chinzwai munzwe imi ndudzi dzavanhu, imi gungano ravanhu muzive zvinhu zvichavawira." 
Jeremiah6:19 Iwe nyika, teerera unzwe! Tarisa uone, nhamo dzandava kuuyisa pavanhu ava zvibereko zvetwavanoita, nokuti vakarega kuteerera shoko rangu. Mutemo wangu vakauramba." 
Jeremiah6:20 Chandinouyisirwa rusenzi runobva kuShebha chii, kana idzo nzimbe dzinotapira dzokunyika yokure? Mipiro yenyu yokupisa haigamuchiriki, zvibayirowo zvenyu hazvindifadzi." 
Jeremiah6:21 Ndokusaka zvanzi naTenzi, chinzwa, ndava kuisira vanhu ava zvinhu zvokuvagumbura zvichavagumbura, madzibabawo pamwechete navakomana, vachaparara muvakidzani neshamwari vachaparara.”" 
Jeremiah6:22 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Chinzwa, kune vanhu vari kuuya vachibva kunyika yokuchamhembe, rudzi rukuru rwavanhu rwuri kuzhandanuka ruchibva kure kwakaperera nyika chaiko." 
Jeremiah6:23 Vakapakata uta namapfumo, vanoutsinye uye havana tsitsi. Ruzha rwavo runenge ruzha rwegungwa, vanotasva mabhiza akarongana savanhu vari kundorwa hondo kuzorwisa iwe Jerusaremu, mukunda weZioni!”" 
Jeremiah6:24 “Takanzwa runyerekupe rwazvo, maoko edu akabva arengenduka, takarwadziwa isu namarwadzo anenge omukadzi ari kusununguka." 
Jeremiah6:25 Regai kupinda mumunda kana kufamba pamugwagwa nokuti muvengi ane bakatwa, zvinotyisa zvapoteredza.”" 
Jeremiah6:26 “Iwe mukunda wavanhu vangu, Jerusaremu pfeka masaga uwumburuke mudota uchichema sokuchema mwana mukomana mumwechete oga, kuchema kunosiririsa kwazvo, nokuti nenguva isipi, muparadzi achatiwira." 
Jeremiah6:27 Ndakakuita kuti uve muongorori nomuonorori mukati mavanhu vangu kuti uzive uye uongorore nzira dzavo. 
Jeremiah6:28 Vose zvavo inhunzvatunzva dzakapanduka, vanofambidzana navanamuzvinaguhwa. Vangova sendarira nesimbi; vose zvavo vano kuita kwakaora." 
Jeremiah6:29 Mvuto dziri kufutidza zvinotyisa, mutobvu wonyungurutswa nomoto zvokuuchenesa pasina, nokuti vatadzi havana kubviswa." 
Jeremiah6:30 Vachanzi, marara zvawo esirivha nokuti Tenzi akavaramba.”" 
Jeremiah7:1 Iri ndiro izwi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi richiti," 
Jeremiah7:2 “Mira pasuo guru remba yaTenzi uzivise vanhu ipapo shoko iri, uti inzwai shoko raTenzi imi mose vokwaJudha munopinda napamisuo mikuru ino iyi muchindonamata Tenzi." 
Jeremiah7:3 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, iye Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Gadziridzai nzira dzenyu nezviito zvenyu, iniwo ndipo pandichakuitai kuti mugare munzvimbo ino.’" 
Jeremiah7:4 Regai kuvimba namazwi aya anonyengedza muchingoti, ‘Iyi iTemberi yaTenzi, Temberi yaTenzi, Temberi yaTenzi.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 “Chiripo ndechokuti kana mukanyatsogadziridza nzira dzenyu namaitiro enyu, muchinyatsoitirana zvinhu zvine ruenzaniso" 
Jeremiah7:6 mukaregawo kudzvanyirira muuyi kana nherera kana chirikadzi, kana zvokudeura ropa romunhu asina mhosva munzvimbo ino, uyewo kana mukakanda pasi zvokuteveredzana navamwe vamwari zvinokupinzai munhamo," 
Jeremiah7:7 ndopandichakuregai makagara munzvimbo ino, munyika yandakapa kare kumadzibaba enyu narini narini wose." 
Jeremiah7:8 “Chinzwai, izvozvi imi muri kungovimba namazwi anonyengedza zvisina chimuko." 
Jeremiah7:9 Mungati here imi maba, mauraya munhu, maita upombwe, mapika zvenhema, mapisira rusenzi kuna Bhaari matevedza vamwe vamwari vamusingazivi" 
Jeremiah7:10 pedzepo mouya kuzomira pandiri muimba ino, imba inodaidzwa nezita rangu muchitoti zvenyu, ‘Takaponeswa isu,’ imi muchingoenderera mberi chete kuita zvinondisemesa zvose izvi?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Ko iyo imba iyoyi inodaidzwa nezita rangu, mukuona kwenyu yatova bako remakororo nhai? Chinzwai, ini iyeni ndakatozviona, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah7:12 Asi chimboendai kunzvimbo yangu yaiva kuShiro, kwandakamboisa zita rangu pokutanga muone zvandakaita kwairi pamusana pouipi hwavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah7:13 Zvanzi naTenzi zvino pamusana pezvose zvamakaita izvi, pandakaramba ndichingotaura kwamuri, imi makarega kuteerera. Pandakakushevedzai hamuna kudaira." 
Jeremiah7:14 Naizvozvo ndichaita kuimba iyi inodaidzwa nezita rangu, yamunovimba nayo yacho uye kunzvimbo yandakapa kwamuri nokumadzibaba enyu, sezvandakaita kuShiro." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ndichakudzingirai kure neni sokudzinga kwandakaita hama dzenyu dzose dzechizvarwa chokwaEfuremu.” 
Jeremiah7:16 “Iwe rega kunamatira vanhu ivava kana kuvaisira chichemo kana munamato. Usavateterere kwandiri nokuti handimbokuteerera. 
Jeremiah7:17 Hausi kuona here zvavari kuita mumaguta okwaJudha nomumigwagwa yeJerusaremu? 
Jeremiah7:18 Vana ndivo vokutsvaga huni madzibaba acho achikuhwidza moto madzimai varivo vokukanya mukanyiwa wokubikisa zvingwa zvokupira kuna vahosi vamambo wedenga. Vanotoita mipiro yokuteura kune vamwe vamwari kuti vandishatirise. 
Jeremiah7:19 Wavari kurwadzisa ipapa ndini here? Ndozviri kutaura Tenzi. Havasi kutozviparira zvavo here vachitozodzungaira? 
Jeremiah7:20 Naizvovo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari tarisa uone ndava kuvirukira nzvimbo ino nehasha ndakashatirirwa vanhu nemhuka nemiti yesango nemichero yenyika. Uchava moto moto usingadzimurike.” 
Jeremiah7:21 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, iye Mwari weIsiraeri, “Wanziridzai zvenyu iyo mipiro yenyu yokupisa kututsira zvibayiro zvenyu muchidya nyama dzacho." 
Jeremiah7:22 Chiripo ndechokuti musi wandakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti, handina ini kutaurira madzitateguru enyu kana kuvapa somurao nezvemipiro yokupisa kana nezvezvibayiro." 
Jeremiah7:23 Asi chandakavapa somutemo ndechichi chokuti, “Teererai zvandinoreva ini ndichava Mwari wenyu imi muchava vanhu vangu mufambe nenzira dzandakareva kuti zvikunakirei." 
Jeremiah7:24 Asi havana kuteerera kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo. Vakatotevedza zvomusoro wavo nemwoyo yavo yakapanduka yakaipa vakadzokera shure kunze kwokuti vatoenda mberi. 
Jeremiah7:25 Kubvira zuva rakabuda madzitateguru enyu munyika yeIjipiti kusvikira pari nhasi, ndanga ndichingovatumira varanda vangu vose vaporofita mangwana mangwana." 
Jeremiah7:26 Asi havana kumbonditeerera kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo. Vakatoomesa musoro vakatoita zvakaipa kupinda madzibaba avo. 
Jeremiah7:27 “Ipapo uchataura zvako mazwi ose iwaya kwavari asi havambokuteerera. Uchavashevedza zvako asi havambokudavira. 
Jeremiah7:28 Asi unofanira kuvataurira kuti, rudzi urwu, rudzi rwavanhu vasingateereri zvinotaura Tenzi, Mwari warwo, rudzi rwavanhu vasingadzoreke. Mavari, chokwadi chakapera, pamuromo pavo hapachambobuda chokwadi." 
Jeremiah7:29 “Vevurai vhudzi renyu murirase, tangai kuungudza pamitunhu yakatunhumara nokuti Tenzi aramba akafuratira chizvarwa ichi chevanhu ava chaachapedzera shungu dzehasha dzake." 
Jeremiah7:30 “Chiripo ndechokuti, vokwaJudha vakaita zvakaipa mumaziso mangu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Vakaisa zvinosemesa mumba inodaidzwa nezita rangu kuin'oresa." 
Jeremiah7:31 Vakavakawo nzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira kuBisiro nzvimbo iri mubani roMwanakomana wokwaHinomu pokupisira sechibayiro vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo mumoto. Izvozvo zvinhu zvandisina kumbotema ini uye hazvina kana kumbouya mupfungwa dzangu. 
Jeremiah7:32 Naizvozvo, chinzwa, zvanzi naTenzi kuchasvika mazuva aisiri kuzombonzizve kuBisiro kana kunzi kuBani reMwanakomana wokwaHinomu. Asi kuchatonzi kuBani rokuDeurirwa ropa, nokuti vachatoviga vanhu kuBisiro ikoko pamusana pokuti kumwe kose kuchange kusisina nzvimbo." 
Jeremiah7:33 Uye zvitunha zvavanhu ivava zvichave chokudya cheshiri dzedenga nezvikara zvenyika pasina anozvidzinga. 
Jeremiah7:34 Ndichagumisa mumaguta okwaJudha nomumigwagwa yeJerusaremu chikwe-e chokuseka kana mheremhere yokufara nokupemberera mwenga kana kufarira murume wacho pamusana pokuti nyika ichasara isisina chinhu.” 
Jeremiah8:1 “Tenzi anoti, panguva iyoyo, mapfupa amadzimambo okwaJudha namapfupa amachinda acho uye mapfupa avapristi mapfupa avaporofita namapfupa avagari veJerusaremu achaburitswa mumakuva avo." 
Jeremiah8:2 Achanzi yacha kuyanikwa muzuva nemwedzi uye napamberi pegurusvusvu rezvose zvedenga izvo zvakavatora mwoyo uye zvavaishandira, izvozvo zvavaiteveredza uye zvavaitsvaka vachinamata. Mapfupa iwayo haasiri kuzounganidzwa kana kuzovigwa achangoti warara sendove pasi pavhu." 
Jeremiah8:3 Chitsama chakasara chavanhu vose ivava vemhuri yevaipi vachange vari kunzvimbo dzose kwandakavadzingira chichakungura kuti kufa kuri nani pane kurarama. Ndozviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo.” 
Jeremiah8:4 Unofanira kuvataurira kuti, zvanzi naTenzi, “Vanhu pavanoputsika, havasumukezve here? Ko kana munhu atsauka mugwara haadzokezve here?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Ko vanhu ava vadarirei kubva varamba vakatsauka zvokupanduka kudai? Vanobatisisa kune zvounyengedzi vachiramba kudzoka. 
Jeremiah8:6 Ndakarerekera nzeve ndichiteerera, asi hapana chakanaka chakabuda mumuromo mavo. Hakuna anopfidza uipi hwake achidemba achiti, ‘Ndicho chii ichochi chandakaita.’ Munhu wose yangova njakenjake sezvinongoita bhiza kumhanya kwazvo richipinda muhondo." 
Jeremiah8:7 “Inga wani kunyange shuramurove zvaro mudenga umu, rinoziva nguva yaro uye njiva kana mherepere kunyange nhapata dzinochengetedza nguva yadzo yokuuya wani. Asi vanhu vangu havamboziva zvavo murao waTenzi." 
Jeremiah8:8 Pakadai apa ndopamungataure here kuti, ‘Tiri vangwaru vevanhu isu uye tinawoka mutemo waTenzi isu?’ Asi chionai kuti, penzura yemanyepo yenyanzvi dzomutemo yakauita kuti muve manyepo." 
Jeremiah8:9 “Vangwaru vachanyadziswa, vachapazamiswa musoro nazvo vachibva vabatwa. Hezvika, vakaramba shoko raTenzi; zvino ungwaru hwavanahwo ndohupi?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Naizvozvo vakadzi vavo ndichavapa kuna vamwe; minda yavo ndichipa kune vamwe vokuva varidzi vayo, nokuti kubvira kumudiki kusvikira kumukuru chaiye munhu wose ane makaro okuwana zvinhu nenzira isina kururama. Kubvira kumuporofita kusvikira kumupristi munhu wose ari kungoita zvounyengedzi." 
Jeremiah8:11 “Kurapa ronda ravanhu vangu, vanorapa zvavo, asi zvechipameso vachiti, ‘Rugare, rugare,’ ipo pasina rugare rwacho." 
Jeremiah8:12 Havaifanira kunyara here pavakaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi? Kwete havana kana kumbonyara. Havazivi kuti kunonyarwa sei. Naizvozvo vachafawo panofira vamwe panguva yandichavaranga ndipo pazvichavaperera, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah8:13 “Zvanzi naTenzi, pandinenge ndada kuvaunganidza, ndinoona vari somugirepisi usina magirepisi, kana kuti muonde usina maonde, kunyange namashizhawo awo asvava kana zvandakanga ndavapa zvakatopfuura kare kare." 
Jeremiah8:14 “Torambirei takati teshe kugara? Ngatiunganei pamwechete tindopinda mumaguta etsvingo tindopararira imomo zvedu nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wedu atitemera kuparara uye atipa mvura ine chepfu kuti tinwe nokuti isu takatadzira Tenzi." 
Jeremiah8:15 “Taitarisira kuwana rugare asi hapana chakanaka chakauya, tikatarisira nguva yokurapwa, asi zvinotyisa ndozvotoona." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kufemuruka kwamabhiza avo, kunonzwika nokwaDhani. Pamusana poruzha rwokuhwihwidza kwamabhiza avo makono, nyika yose inondengandenga. Vanouya vachisvikoparadza nyika ino nezvose zvizere mairi, guta navanhu vageremo." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ndinodaro nokuti ndava kutuma nyoka mukati menyu, zviva chaizvo zvisina kana mapipi angazvidzivise izvozvo ndizvo zvichakukoborai.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah8:18 Kurwadziwa mwoyo kwangu hakuna angakunyaradze mukati mangu, mwoyo wangu warwadza." 
Jeremiah8:19 Inzwai kuchema kwemwanasikana wangu, kuchema kwavanhu vangu; kuchibva kose kose munyika ino vachiti, “Ko Tenzi haasi muguta reZioni here? Mambo weZioni haasisimo here muguta imomu? Vakandishatirisirei nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvemabwe zvakavezwa nezvimwe zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvevechirudzi zvisina maturo?" 
Jeremiah8:20 “Kukohwa kwakapfuura, mwaka wezhizha wakatopfuura asi hatina kuponeswa.”" 
Jeremiah8:21 Chiripo ndechokuti ronda remwanasikana wangu, ronda raivo vanhu vangu ava randirwadza mwoyo. Ndiri kuchema nhamo ini, zvandishayisa chokuita!" 
Jeremiah8:22 Ko imo muGireadhi hamunawo pfuta here? Hamuna here murapi imomo? Zvino seiko urwere, hwavanhu vangu ava husina kurapwa?" 
Jeremiah9:1 Dai zvazvo musoro wangu uchingova mvura chete, uye maziso angu ari chisipiti chemisodzi, ndingadai ndichisvimha misodzi siku nesikati kuchema vanenge vaurayiwa, ivo vanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah9:2 Dai zvangu kugwenga'ku ndaiva nedumba ravapfuuri nenzira; ndingadai ndabva muvanhu vangu ndaenda kure navo, nokuti vose zvavo inzenza dzavanhu boka ravanhu vounyengedzi." 
Jeremiah9:3 “Vanokunga rurimi rwavo souta, chavanosimbirira munyika muno manyepo chete, kwete chokwadi nokuti vanoenda kundotutsira uipi pamusoro pohumwe uye havandizivi, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah9:4 Munhu wose ngaachenjerere mumwe wake, arege kuvimba kana nehama zvayo, nokuti hama ipi neipi zvayo inonyengedza inonyengedza uchitora nzvimbo dzavamwe nokubata vanhu kumeso vose zvavo vangova vanazimwaya." 
Jeremiah9:5 Munhu wose anonyengedza mumwe wake, hapana anotaura chokwadi. Vakajaidza rurimi rwavo kutaura manyepo, vachitoita zvavo zvakaipa. Zvokutendeuka zvava kuvanetsa" 
Jeremiah9:6 vachidzvinyirira vanhu vadzvinyirirazve, vachiita unyengedzi pamusoro pohumwe hunyengedzi, vasingadi kundiziva; ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ndokusaka zvichinzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Chiona, ndichavachenesa ndivaedze nokuti chimwe chandingaite chii chaizvo pamusana pavanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah9:8 Rurimi rwavo, museve unouraya, runotaura zvokunyengedza. Nomuromo uyu munhu anonyatsokurukurirana nomumwe wake zvakanaka asi mumwoyo make anenge achitoronga zvokumuhwandira." 
Jeremiah9:9 “Pakadai, ndingarege kuvarangira zvinhu izvozvi here? Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndingarege here kutsividza rudzi rwavanhu vakadai ava?" 
Jeremiah9:10 “Ndava kusvimha misodzi ndichiridzira mhere mumakomo ndichichema mafuro okurenje nokuti aparadzwa zvokuti hakuna kana achadimura neko uye kukuma kwomombe hakuchambonzwika ikoko, zvose zvazvo zvinoti shiri dzedenga nemhuka zvati ware kutiza, zvaenda." 
Jeremiah9:11 “Ndichaita kuti guta reJerusaremu rive murwi zvawo wamatongo, nzvimbo inorara makava. Ndichaita kuti maguta okwaJudha asare ava magutawo asina ageremo." 
Jeremiah9:12 “Ndiani ano ungwaru hwokuti agone kunzwisisa izvozvi izvi? Ndiani chaizvo akataurirwa nomuromo naTenzi kuti azvizivise kuvanhu? Nyika yaparadzwa nei kudai kubva yarozvwa kusara yava serenje zvokusawana kana nomumwe anopfuura nemo?” 
Jeremiah9:13 Zvino Tenzi anoti, “Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti vanhu ava vakafuratira mutemo wangu wandakavapa uye vakarega kuteerera izwi rangu kana kuritevedza zvako." 
Jeremiah9:14 Asi vakaita musikanzwa vachitevera zvomusoro wavo. Vakatevedza vanaBhaari sokudzidziswa kwavakaitwa namadzibaba avo. 
Jeremiah9:15 Ndokusaka zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri: Chinzwa, ndichadyisa vanhu ivava gavakava ndichivapa mvura yokunwa ine chepfu." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndichavati mwarara mukati mendudzi dzavanhu vavasingamboziva uye vasina kumbozivikanwa namadzibaba avo. Ndichati varondwe nehondo yebakatwa kusvikira ndavatsakatisa.” 
Jeremiah9:17 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Chifungai zvokuita, mutodaidza vakadzi vokuchema, panhamo vauye kokai nyanzvi chaidzo dzavakadzi dziuye." 
Jeremiah9:18 “Ngavaite zvokukasika varidze mhere dzokutichema kuti tichururuke misodzi mumaziso medu, mvura iite zvokupfachuka muhwidibiro dzamaziso edu," 
Jeremiah9:19 nokuti mhere yokuhwihwidza yanzwika kuguta reZioni ichiti: ‘Inga taparara isu! Tazonyadziswa zvikuru nokuti tatosiya nyika yedu nokuti vaparadza misha yedu.’ 
Jeremiah9:20 “Asi imi vakadzi inzwai shoko raTenzi, murerekere nzeve dzenyu munzwe shoko romuromo wake. Dzidzisai vanasikana venyu nhetembo yokuungudza, mumwe nomumwe wake rwiyo rwengondo yokuchema" 
Jeremiah9:21 nokuti rufu rwatipindira napahwindo rukapinda mumizinda yedu ruchipedza vana mumigwagwa'mu namajaya mudzinhandare. 
Jeremiah9:22 Iti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi zvitunha zvevanhu zvichati kata kata pasi sendove mugura sezvisote pabva mukohwi pasina anovaunganidza.’ ”" 
Jeremiah9:23 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Ngwazi ngairege kuzvikudza noungwaru hwayo, gamba rehondo rikande pasi zvokuzvitutumadza nougamba hwaro mupfumi ngaarege kuzvibhebhesa noupfumi hwake." 
Jeremiah9:24 Asi kutoti munhu anenge achizvipa mbiri ngaazvirumbidzire kuti anenge achindinzwisisa uye achindiziva kuti “Ini ndini Tenzi ndinoita panyika mwoyochena noruenzaniso nokururama nokuti izvozvi izvi ndozvandinofarira ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Jeremiah9:25 “Zvanzi naTenzi mazuva ari kuuya andicharanga vose zvavo vanozviti vakadzingiswa asi ivo vasina kudzingiswa-venyika yeIjipiti nokwaJudha neEdhomu navanakomana vokwaAmoni nevekwaMoabhu uye vose zvavo vagere mugwenga vanovevura makona evhudzi ravo nokuti ndudzi dzose idzodzi ndedzavanhu vasina kudzingiswa. 
Jeremiah9:26 Asi vose zvavo vemba yaIsiraeri, mumwoyo'mu ndimo mavasina kudzingiswa.”" 
Jeremiah10:1 Teererai munzwe zviri kureva Tenzi kwamuri imi vemba yaIsiraeri. 
Jeremiah10:2 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Regai kudzidza nzira dzamamwe marudzi, kana kudedereswa zvenyu nezviratidzo zvomumatenga, nokuti ndizvo zvinodederwa namarudzi" 
Jeremiah10:3 pamusana pokuti tsika dzamamwe marudzi hadzina maturo. Nokuti vanotema muti mudondo wopanhwa nedemo nomuvezi namaoko ake. 
Jeremiah10:4 “Vanhu vochishongedza nesirivha nendarama vachirovera zvipikiri nenyundo kuitira kuti zvisimbe. 
Jeremiah10:5 “Zvakaita sezvimifananidzo zvokudzingisa nazvo makunguo mumunda wamagaka. Kutaura, hazvigone kutaura zvinoita zvokutotakurwa nokuti hazvigone kufamba. Musazvitye nokuti hazvikwanisi kuita zvakaipa kana kuita zvakanaka.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Hakuna akaita semi imi Tenzi. Imi muri mukuru uye zita renyu imi izita guru kwazvo rine simba. 
Jeremiah10:7 Ndiani angarege kukutyai, imi Mambo wendudzi dzavanhu? Nokuti ndozvakakodzerana nemi izvozvi nokuti pakati pengwazi dzose dzamarudzi munyika dzavo dzose hamuna akaita semi." 
Jeremiah10:8 Asi izvo mazungairwa namapenzi hapana chaungadzidze kuzvifananidzo zvokunamata nokuti zvimiti chete. 
Jeremiah10:9 Sirivha yakapfurwa yacho, yaibva kuTashishi nendarama ichibva kuUfazi; zvifananidzo zvacho ibasa ramaoko emhizha uye rinoitwa namaoko emhizha dzendarama. Hanzu dzazvo dzinenge dziri tsvuku kana dzoruvara rwehute, zvose izvozvo ibasa renyanzvi dzavanhu." 
Jeremiah10:10 Asi Tenzi ndiye Mwari wechokwadi, ndiye Mwari mupenyu ndiye Mambo wokugara nokugara. Kana aita hasha nyika inondengendeka, uye ndudzi dzavanhu hadzimbogonana nokutsamwa kwake." 
Jeremiah10:11 “Unofanira kuvataurira kuti, vamwari vacho ivavo vasirivo vasiki vematenga napasi, vachaparara panyika uye vachaparara pasi pematenga." 
Jeremiah10:12 “Iye ndiye akaita nyika nesimba rake ndiye akasika nyika noungwaru hwake uye nokunzwisisa kwake akawarira matenga. 
Jeremiah10:13 Paanongoti burutsei muromo mumwechete, mvura inodhiriridza mumatenga. Anoita kuti mhute isimuke kubvira kwakaperera nyika achiita kuti mumvura inonaya muve nemheni achiuyisa mhepo ichibva maanoichengetera." 
Jeremiah10:14 “Munhu wose zvake rangova zungairwa, vanhu vasina ruzivo, mhizha yose yezvendarama ichinyadziswa nezvifananidzo zvayo zvokunamata, nokuti zvifananidzo zvayo zvokunamata ndezvenhando uye hazvina mweya unofema mazviri." 
Jeremiah10:15 “Hazvina kana maturo ese ibasa rounyengedzi, panguva yazvo yokurangwa, zvichaparara." 
Jeremiah10:16 “Iye haana kumboita saizvozvi izvi, iye mugove wevokwaJakobho nokuti ndiye akasika zvinhu zvose uye verudzi rwechiIsiraeri ndivo rudzi rwake rwenhaka. Zita rake rinonzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Jeremiah10:17 “Sungai, twenyu mutakure, imi vagari venyika yakakombwa" 
Jeremiah10:18 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi chinzwai, rwendo rwuno, ndava kuvhiriridzira kure vagari vomunyika muno ndichivapinza nhamo chaiyo vambonzwa kurwadza kwazvinoita." 
Jeremiah10:19 “Maiwe zvangu, inga ndakuvara ini! Ronda rangu rinosiririsa kwazvo! Asi ndakangozviti, nhamo inhamo chokwadi, kwava kutongotirira." 
Jeremiah10:20 Tendhe rangu raparadzwa tambo dzangu dzose dzadamburwa. Vana vangu vandisiya uye havasisipo. Wokundimisirazve tendhe rangu hakusisina, kana wokunditurikirira machira angu okudzikatirisa" 
Jeremiah10:21 nokuti vafudzi vacho havana kana musoro havambobvunzawo kuti Tenzi anoti kudii. Ndochakavapa kutadza kubudirira uye kuti danga ravo rose zvaro rezvipfuwo riti mwarara. 
Jeremiah10:22 “Herwo runyerekupe, herwo rwouya! Bongozozo chairo richibva kunyika yokuchamhembe rokuzoita kuti maguta okwaJudha asare angove magutawo zvawo nzvimbo inogara makava.”" 
Jeremiah10:23 Nhai Tenzi! Inga ndinoziva wani kuti munhu haasiri iye pachake anozvirongera gwara rokufamba naro, uye kuti pakufamba munhu haasiri iye anozvitungamirira." 
Jeremiah10:24 Imi Tenzi, kundidzora, ndidzorei henyu, asi zviri pamwero musina kushatirwa nokuti mungadaro mukaita kuti pangu pandiperere." 
Jeremiah10:25 Dururirai hasha dzenyu pane vechirudzi vasingakuzivei, uye pamarudzi asinganamati zita renyu nokuti vakazhanya vokwaJakobho vakavazhanya vakaparadzawo musha wavo." 
Jeremiah11:1 Herino izwi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi richiti," 
Jeremiah11:2 “Teerera unzwe zviri kurehwa nechitenderano ichi, utaurire vanhu vokwaJudha navagari veJerusaremu," 
Jeremiah11:3 uti kwavari, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Ngaapinde rushambwa munhu asingachengeti zviri kurehwa nechitenderano ichi" 
Jeremiah11:4 chandakati madzibaba enyu achengete pandakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti,’ muvira romoto resimbi ndichiti, ‘Teererai izwi rangu muite zvose zvandinokuudzai, nokudaro muchava vanhu vangu, ini ndichivawo Mwari wenyu," 
Jeremiah11:5 kuitira kuti ndichengete chitsidzo chandakapika kumadzibaba enyu chokuvapa nyika yakanaka nyika yomukaka nouchi sezvazviri pari nhasi.’ ” Ini ndakapindura ndichiti, “Ngazvive saizvozvo Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah11:6 Tenzi akabva ati kwandiri, “Paridza mashoko ose iwayo mumaguta okwaJudha nomumigwagwa yeJerusaremu uchiti inzwai zvinotaurwa nechitenderano ichi muzviite." 
Jeremiah11:7 Ndinodaro nokuti ndakayambira ndayambirazve madzibaba enyu pandakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti ndikaramba ndichivayambira kusvikira pari nhasi ndichingoti, teererai izwi rangu."
