Jeremiah11:8 Asi ivo kuteerera havana kuteerera kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo. Asi kuti munhu wose akatotevera zvake zvomusoro wake zvakaipa. Ndokusaka ini ndakaita kuti vawirwe nezvose zvinorehwa nechitenderano ichi chandakati vachengete asi ivo vakarega zvavo.” 
Jeremiah11:9 Tenzi akatizve kwandiri, “Mukati mavanhu vokwaJudha navagari veJerusaremu mapandukwa." 
Jeremiah11:10 Vadzokerazve muuipi hwamadzibaba avo vakaramba kunzwa zvandinotaura. Vavakutevera vamwe vamwari vachivanamata. Imba yokwaIsiraeri nemba yokwaJudha vakatyora chitenderano changu chandakaita namadzibaba avo. 
Jeremiah11:11 Naizvozvo, zvanzi naTenzi, chinzwa, ‘Ndavakuvaunzira nhamo yavasingakwanisi kunzvenga. Kunyange vakachema kwandiri, handisi kuzovateerera.’" 
Jeremiah11:12 Zvino maguta okwaJudha navagari veJerusaremu vachaenda kundochema kuna vamwari ivavo vavanopisira rusenzi, asi havakwanisi kuvanunura munhamo dzavo panguva yenhamo yavo." 
Jeremiah11:13 Nokuti imi vokwaJudha, kuwanda kwakaita maguta enyu ndokuwandawo kwakaita vaMwari venyu. Uyewo sokuwanda kwakaita migwagwa yeJerusaremu ndokuwandawo kwakaita atari dzamakavakira icho chakafumuka ichi, atari dzokupisira rusenzi kuna Bhaari." 
Jeremiah11:14 “Naizvozvo iwe rega kunamatira vanhu ava kana kumbovaisira chichemo kana munyengetero wokuvakumbirira nokuti handisi kuzoteerera kana vodaidzira kwandiri panguva yavo yenhamo. 
Jeremiah11:15 “Iye mudiwa wangu chaachiri kuda mumba mangu chii iye akabata twakaipa twukadai? Idzo mhiko dzenyu nenyama yezvibayiro ndozvingakununurei kunhamo here? Kutoita rurasademo kufara zvenyu nhai? 
Jeremiah11:16 Inga wani Tenzi akambokutii muri muorivhi wakasvibirira une michero yakanaka inoyevedza. Asi noruzha rwedutu guru remhepo achauririmisa nomoto, mapazi awo aroromeswe." 
Jeremiah11:17 “Tenzi wehondo nehondo iye akakusimai ati muwirwe nenhamo pamusana pezvakaipa zvakaitwa nemba yokwaIsiraeri nemba yokwaJudha vachindishatirisa nokupira rusenzi kuna Bhaari.” 
Jeremiah11:18 Tenzi akandiruma nzeve ini ndikabva ndazoziva ndokubva mandiratidza bangano ravo. 
Jeremiah11:19 Asi ini ndakanga ndakapfava sehwayana iri kuendeswa kunourayiwa, ndisingamboziva kuti twavaironga vainge vachitorongereni vachiti, “Ngatiparadzei muti nomuchero wawo, ngatimutsakatisei panyika yavapenyu zita rake ribva rakanganikwa." 
Jeremiah11:20 “Zvino, imi Tenzi; wehondo nehondo munotonga zvakarurama imi munoongorora zviri mumwoyo nomupfungwa dzomunhu dai waro mukaita kuti ndione kuvatsividza kwamunoita nokuti ndakaisa kwamuri zvinondinetsa.”" 
Jeremiah11:21 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi panyaya yavanhu veAnatoti vari kuda kupfuudza upenyu hwako vachiti, “Rega kuporofita nezita raTenzi nokuti tingakuuraye namaoko edu aya,”" 
Jeremiah11:22 nezvo zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Chinzwa, ini ndichavaranga; majaya achafira muhondo yebakatwa. Vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo vachafa neshangwa yenzara." 
Jeremiah11:23 Hapana achasara nokuti ndichaunza nhamo pavanhu veAnatoti mugore ravo rokurangwa.” 
Jeremiah12:1 Tenzi, pandinokunyunyutirai, imi ndimi munenge muri pachokwadi asi ndinoda kumbokutaurirawo nezvoruenzaniso. Seiko vakaipa vachibudirira mune zvavanoita? Sei vanyengedzi vose vachibudirira?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Ndimi munovasima, ivo vanobva vadzika midzi. Vanokura vagotobereka michero, izvozvo musingabve pamuromo pavo, asi mumwoyo mavo munenge imi musimo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Asi imi Tenzi munondiziva munondiona uye munoongorora pfungwa dzangu kwamuri. Vakwekweretsei sehwai dziri kundourayiwa muvatsaurire zuva rorufu. 
Jeremiah12:4 Kusvikira rini chaizvo nyika ichichema nhamo, uswa huchisvava mumasango mose? Pamusana pokuipa wavageremo mhuka neshiri zvatsvairwa nokuti vanhu vanoti, “Mwari magumo edu haamboaona." 
Jeremiah12:5 “Kana wakaneta kumhanya navanhu ko kutozoti namabhiza uchakwikwidzana sei? Kana uchiputsika munyika yakanaka kudai, ko kutozoti mumapinga okuna Jorodhani uchaita sei?" 
Jeremiah12:6 “Nokuti kana vakoma, navanun'una vako vemba yokwababa vako; kunyange ivavo vakaita zvounyengedzi kwauri vari kutochema kuti vangakuwane sei, usavanzwe kunyange zvavo vachitaura mazwi akanaka kwauri." 
Jeremiah12:7 “Ndapa gotsi imba yangu, nhaka yangu ndaifuratira, chido chemwoyo wangu ndachikanda mumaoko mavavengi vacho." 
Jeremiah12:8 Kwandiri ini nhaka yangu yaita seshumba zvayo yesango, akandiitira pamuromo ndokusaka ini ndava kutomuvenga." 
Jeremiah12:9 “Ko kwandiri ini, iye nhaka yangu ava here shiri ina matsatsa matsatsa inodya nyama? Akombwa here izvozvi neshiri dzinodya nyama? Endai mundokokorodza mhuka dzose dzesango muuye nadzo dzidye." 
Jeremiah12:10 Vafudzi vakawanda vakaparadza munda wangu wemagirepisi vakatsokodzera mugove wangu, vachiita kuti mugove wangu wakanaka uve renje risina chinhu." 
Jeremiah12:11 Vakauita kuti uve chinhu pasina uri chinhu pasina kudaro unochema kwandiri. Nyika iyoyi yose yangova nyika, asi anombozvifunga hapana." 
Jeremiah12:12 “Pamitunhu yakatunhumara pose zvapo, pasina miti mugwenga'mu, mharadzi dzauya nokuti hondo yaTenzi yebakatwa yoparadza, kubvira kumuganhu wenyika ino kusvikira kwainoperera hakusisina ane rugare." 
Jeremiah12:13 “Vakadyara zvavo koroni, asi minzwa ndoyavakazokohwa, vakanetera pasina. Vachanyara nezvaunokohwa pari pamusana pehasha dzinotyisa dzaTenzi.”" 
Jeremiah12:14 Izvi ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi izvi, kune vamwe vangu vose vakaipa mwoyo vanotambanudzira ruoko nhaka yandakapa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri kuti ive yavo achiti, “Chiregai muone ndava kuvadzipura munyika yavo iyoyi, ndichadzura imba yokwaJudha mukati mavo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Mushure mokunge ndavatipura kudaro, ndichavanzwirazve ngoni ndigovadzorerazve mumwe nomumwe kunhaka yake uyezve mumwe nomumwe kunyika kwake." 
Jeremiah12:16 Chichavapo ndechokuti, kana vakazonyatsodzidzawo nzira dzevanhu vangu dzokupika nezita rangu vachiti, ‘NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu,’ sezvavaingoitawo kurunzira vanhu vangu kupika naBhaari, ipapo ndopavachavaka vari mukati mavanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah12:17 Asi kuwana rudzi rusinganzwi, ndichanyatsorutipura ndirwuparadze, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah13:1 Tenzi akandirayira kuti, “Enda utenge jira romutikisha uusungirire muchiuno mako, asi rega kuunyika mumvura.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Saizvozvo ndakatengawo jira romutikisha maereranowo neshoko raTenzi, ndikarisungira muchiuno mangu." 
Jeremiah13:3 Zvino shoko raTenzi rakauyazve kwandiri rwechipiri rikati," 
Jeremiah13:4 “Tora jira riya romutikisha rawakatenga rawakasungira muchiuno, mako usimuke uende kurwizi rwaYufuratesi urivige mumutswe wedombo ikoko.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Saizvozvo ini ndakaenda ndikandoriviga muna Yufuratesi sezvandakaudzwa naTenzi. 
Jeremiah13:6 Mushure memazuva akawanda, Tenzi akati kwandiri, “Chisumuka uende kurwizi rwaYufuratesi undotora ikoko jira romutikisha riya randakati urivige ikoko.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Ipapo ndakaenda kuna Yufuratesi ndikafukura ndikatora jira romutikisha riya paya pandakanga ndariviga onei jira riya ramvungunjika risisina basa. 
Jeremiah13:8 Izwi raTenzi ndoparakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Jeremiah13:9 “Zvanzi naTenzi saizvozvi ndokusakadzawo kwandichaita kuzvikudza kwaJudha nokuzvikudza kukuru kweJerusaremu. 
Jeremiah13:10 Vanhu vakaipa ivava ava, vanoramba kunzwa zvandinotaura vanoita zvavo musikanzwa vachiita zvomusoro wavo. Vava kushandira vamwe vamwari vachivanamata vachaita sejira irori iri risisina basa." 
Jeremiah13:11 Chiripo ndechokuti sokunyatsobata kunoita jira iroro muchiuno chomunhu ndozvandakaita ini ndikaita kuti imba yose yokwaIsiraeri nemba yose yokwaJudha vanyatsoti kwati kwati neni kuitira kuti ndivewo navanhu uye kuti ndive nezita nomukurumbira nembiri. Asi vakaramba kuteerera, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Zvaunofanira kuvataurira ndezvizvi zvokuti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Chirongo chose chichazadzwa newaini.’ Ivo vachakuti, ‘Ko isu hatizvizivi here kuti chirongo chose chichazadzwa newaini?’" 
Jeremiah13:13 Saka iwe uvataurire kuti, zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Chomochiziva ndechokuti ini ndichararadzisa vagari vose venyika ino, madzimambo anogara pachigaro choumambo chokwaDhavhidhi navapristi navaporofita navagari veJerusaremu vose.’" 
Jeremiah13:14 Ndichavadhumanisa, madzibaba navana vavo vakomana pamwechete, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Handisi kuzovanzwira tsitsi kana kuvarega kana kuvanzwira nyasha kuti ndirege kuvaparadza.”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Teererai munzwe, regai kuzvikudza nokuti Tenzi ava kutaura." 
Jeremiah13:16 Ipai mbiri kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu asati aunza rima, musati matatarika pamakomo paita karimarima uye pamunotarisira kuwana chiedza, iye ndopaanotoita kuti rive zarima achiita kuti rive rima rakati kwirindindi." 
Jeremiah13:17 Asi kana mukarega kuteerera ndichakuchemai zvangu muchivande pamusana pokuzvikudza kwenyu ndichisvimha misodzi ichimokoteka zvinosiririsa nokuti vedanga raTenzi vatapwa. 
Jeremiah13:18 Udza mambo namambokadzi wake kuti, “Garai pachigaro chakazvidzika nokuti mukurumbira wechiremba chenyu wakutunuka mumusoro." 
Jeremiah13:19 Maguta okuNegevhu azarirwa; hapasisina wokuazarura. Judha yose zvayo yatapwa, yose zvayo yaendwa nawo kuutapwa.”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Simudzai musoro muone vanhu vari kubva nokuchamhembe. Varipi vedanga rawakanga wapiwa vedanga rako rinoyevedza. 
Jeremiah13:21 Muchazoti kudii pavanenge ivo vazviita vatungamiriri venyu vamakadzidzisa imi pachenyu kuti vave vashamwari venyu? Hazvizokurwadzai here samarwadzo omukadzi ari pakusununguka? 
Jeremiah13:22 Kana ukazozviti nechomumwoyo zvauya sei kuti ndiwirwe nezvinhu izvozvi izvi? Chadariso, kukombodza kwouipi hwako saka wafukurwa marokwe wavawo kuitirwa zvoutsinye." 
Jeremiah13:23 Ko munhu muEtiopia angasandure ganda rake here kana iyo ingwe mavara ayo? Kana zvakadaro iwewo ungatoitawo zvakanaka iyewe wajairira kuita zvakaipa. 
Jeremiah13:24 Ndichakutii mwarara sehundi iri kupeperetswa nemhepo yokugwenga. 
Jeremiah13:25 Ndochakowo ichochi, mugove wandakukamurirawo ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi nokuti wakandikanganwa ukavimba nezvinhu zvenhando." 
Jeremiah13:26 Ini iyeni ndichakufukura marokwe ndikukwidibire uso nawo uonererwe. 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndakaona zvinhu zvako zvandisingade, uye unzenza hwako nokuhwihwidzira somukono webhiza noufeve hwako hwakafumuka pazvikomo musango'mu. Zvichakuwana Jerusaremu! Kusvikira riniko wakangodai kun'ora." 
Jeremiah14:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richitaura nezvemvura yakanga yaramba kunaya richiti," 
Jeremiah14:2 “Nyika yeJudha iri mukuchema nhamo magutawo ayo ari kugurukuta, vanhu vayo vachiungudza vakati pasi rakata uye mhere yeJerusaremu yanzwika." 
Jeremiah14:3 “Vanhu vokumba huru vanotuma varanda vavo kumvura. Varanda vanosvika kumatsime, asi havasi kuwana mvura. Vanodzokera nezvirongo zvavo mvura vasina vaora mwoyo vasisazive chokuita vakabata rushaya." 
Jeremiah14:4 “Pamusana pokuti pasi pachiti papata nokushayika kwaita mvura yokunaya panyika, varimi vacho vadumbirwa nazvo vobata rushaya." 
Jeremiah14:5 “Kunyange nhunzvi yemhembwe musango yototiza katsvana kayo kasvava pamusana pokushaya uswa. 
Jeremiah14:6 Madhongi omusango amira pamitunhu yakatunhumara pasina miti achifemereka samakava kuri kutsvaka mhepo yokufema, maziso awo achionera madzerere nokuti hakusisina bundo." 
Jeremiah14:7 “Kunyange zvazvo zvakaipa zvedu zvichitipa mhosva, wanaiwo chamungaite, imi Tenzi nokuda kwezita renyu nokuti umhandupandu hwedu hwanyanya takakutadzirai isu." 
Jeremiah14:8 Nhaimi chitarisiro cheIsiraeri, imi Mununuri wayo panguva yokutambura, madireiko kubva maita somutorwa chaiye munyika muno, kubva matoita here somupfuuri nenzira anoti tsaukirei pakadaro apo omborarapo hake usiku ihwohwo?" 
Jeremiah14:9 “Madirei kuita somunhu atenderera musoro, segamba chairo rehondo risingagoni kununura? Nyange zvakadaro zvazvo imi Tenzi muri pakati pedu uye tinodaidzwa nezita renyu, regai henyu kutisiya." 
Jeremiah14:10 “Tenzi ari kutaura shoko rinonangana navanhu ivava rokuti, ‘Kudzunga saizvozvi ndokwavanoda havana kumbozvidzorawo mufambiro. Ndokusaka Tenzi asingavagamuchiri, zvazvino izvi acharangarira uipi hwavo agovarangira zvitadzo zvavo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah14:11 Tenzi akanditi, “Rega kunamatira vanhu ava kuti zvinhu zvivafambire zvakanaka" 
Jeremiah14:12 nokuti kunyange zvavo vakatsanya handiteereri chichemo chavo. Kunyange vakapira zvavo mupiro wokupisa kana mupiro woupfu hwembesanwa handiigamuchiri. Changu chandichaita kuvapedza nehondo yebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda.” 
Jeremiah14:13 Ini ndokuti, “Nhai Tenzi Mwari, inga wani vaporofita vari kuvaudza kuti hondo, yebakatwa hamusi kuzomboiona kana kuti kuzova neshangwa yenzara, asi kutoti ndichaita kuti muve norugare chairwo munzvimbo ino.”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Tenzi ndokuti kwandiri, “Vaporofita vari kuporofita zvenhema muzita rangu. Handina kuvatuma ini kana kumbovaudza kana kutaura kwavari. Vari kukuitirai chiporofita chokuona zvenhema kushopera zvako kusina namaturo ese, unyengedzi zvahwo hwomusoro wavo." 
Jeremiah14:15 Nezvo zvanzi naTenzi nezvavaporofita ivavo vanoporofita muzita rangu ini ndisina kuvatuma vachitoti, ‘Hondo yebakatwa neshangwa yenzara hazvisi kuzouya munyika muno,’ vaporofita ivava vachaparadzwa nehondo yebakatwa nemvemve yenzara." 
Jeremiah14:16 Vanhuwo vavanoporofitira vacho vachanzi rakata mumigwagwa yeJerusaremu vova ndivo vokufa neshangwa yenzara nebakatwa rehondo pasina anovaviga, ivo navanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo nokuti ndichadurira pavanhu ivavo uipi hwavo.”" 
Jeremiah14:17 Vataurire izvi zvokuti: “Chiregai zvenyu meso achiramba achiyerera misodzi siku nesikati pasina zvokumbomira ivo vanhu vangu ava, vakuvadzwa ronda guru kwazvo, varohwa zvinosiririsa kwazvo." 
Jeremiah14:18 “Ndikati ndiende musango'mu hezvo zvitunha zvakarakatiswa nebakatwa rehondo. Kana ndikapinda muguta heyo nhamo yeshangwa yenzara nokuti muporofita nomupristi vose vanobvonga nemunyika iyoyi mose vasina ruzivo.” 
Jeremiah14:19 VokwaJudha matovaramba zvachose here? Mwoyo wenyu wava kusema here vanhu veguta reZioni? Madirei kutipa shamhu yakadai isingarapike? Taitarisira kuwana rugare asi hapana chakanaka chakauya, tichitarisira nguva yokuporeswa asi zvinotyisa ndozvotoona." 
Jeremiah14:20 Tinoreurura uipi hwedu Tenzi, nezvitadzo zvamadzibaba edu nokuti takakutadzirai." 
Jeremiah14:21 Pamusana pezita renyu, chiregai henyu kutiramwa, dai mukaregawo kufumura mbiri yechigaro chenyu choumambo. Dai waro mukarangarira henyu murege kutyora chitenderano chenyu nesu." 
Jeremiah14:22 Kuna vanaani chaizvo pakati pavana mwari vasina maturo vokumarudzi avanhu angagone kunayisa mvura? Kana iwo matenga zvawo angagone nhai kunayisa mvura? Handiti ndimi iyemi Tenzi, Mwari wedu? Chitarisiro chedu tinochiisa mamuri nokuti ndimi munoita zvose izvozvi." 
Jeremiah15:1 Tenzi akazoti kwandiri, “Kunyange dai Mosesi naSamueri vakamirira vanhu ava kwandiri handaimbodzora mwoyo wangu kwavari. Chivabvisa pameso pangu vaende!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Kana vakazokubvunza kuti, ‘Kwotoenda kwacho ndokupi?’ iwe uvati zvanzi naTenzi: “Vedenda, vaende kudenda vebakatwa, kubakatwa, veshangwa yenzara, vaende kunzara vokuhutapwa, vaende kuhutapwa." 
Jeremiah15:3 “Ndichavasarudzira zvinhu zvina zvokuvaparadza nazvo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, zvinoti bakatwa rokuvaurayisa nembwa dzokuvabvanzura uye shiri dzedenga nemhuka zvesango dzokuvazhanya nokuvaparadza." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndichaita kuti zvionese ndondo nyika dzose dzapasi pano pamusana pezvakaparwa muJerusaremu naManase mwanakomana waHezekiya mambo wokwaJudha. 
Jeremiah15:5 “Ndianikowo achakunzwira tsitsi nhaiwe Jerusaremu, kana kuti ndianiwo achakuchema? Ndiani zvake achatsauka achikubvunzawo upenyu?" 
Jeremiah15:6 “Wakandirambaka iwe ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Unoramba uchingodzokera shure chete. Ndokusaka ndakazokubatira shamhu yokukuparadza nayo. Ndaneta nokukuitirai mwoyo murefu. 
Jeremiah15:7 “Ndakavawurutsa neforogo yokuwurutsisa mumaguta enyika iyoyi. Ndakaita kuti vaone nhamo yorufu ndikaparadza vanhu vangu, asi kusiyana nenzira dzavo havana." 
Jeremiah15:8 “Ndakaita kuti chirikadzi dzavo dziwande kudarika jecha rokumakungwa. Ndakaunzira vana amai vemajaya mharadzi zuva rakacheka nyika. Ndakaita kuti kurwadziwa nokutya zvingoyerekana zvavapinda. 
Jeremiah15:9 “Amai vavanomwe vatambura nokuchema, vakarezuka, rakavadokera masikati machena, akanyadziswa akafumurwa, vamwe vacho vose ndichavaurayisa nebakatwa rehondo mumaoko mavavengi vavo, ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah15:10 Nhai amai we-e zvangu! Chamakandiberekera, ini zvangu munhu wenharo, ini matatapure munyika ino yose. Handina kukweretesa kana kukwereta munhu asi vose vanondirengerera rushambwa." 
Jeremiah15:11 Tenzi akati, “Handina kukuramba here? Ndingarege here kukuunzira vavengi?" 
Jeremiah15:12 Munhu angagone here kutyora simbi, simbi yokuchamhembe nendarira?" 
Jeremiah15:13 “Upfumi hwenyu nezvinhu zvenyu zvinokosha ndichazviita kuti zvipambwe mahara munyika yenyu yose pamusana pezvitadzo zvenyu. 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndichakuitai kuti mushandire vavengi venyu munyika yamusingazivi nokuti ndaviruka nehasha; moto ukabaka unoramba uchingobvira nokusingaperi. 
Jeremiah15:15 “Tenzi, imi ndimi munoziva ndirangarireiwo mundishanyire mungonditsividzirawo vanonditambudza. Pamusana pomwoyo wenyu murefu musandipfuudze munozviziva wani kuti kuzvidzwa kwandinako uku kuzvidzirwa imi." 
Jeremiah15:16 “Shoko renyu pandariwana ndarizeya mazwi enyu iwayo aindipa mufaro ariwo angu akanga ari mazwi apamwoyo andinofarira nokuti ndinodaidzwa nezita renyu imi Tenzi, Mwari wehondo nehondo." 
Jeremiah15:17 “Handina kumbogara muboka ravanhu vamafaro kana kumbopembera nokufara. Ndaingogara ndiri ndoga zvangu nokuti simba roruoko rwenyu raiva pandiri. Ndinodaro nokuti makandizadza nehasha. 
Jeremiah15:18 “Ko iko kurwadzwa kwangu kusingaperi kwakaita seiko, ronda rangu risingarapiki rakaita sei risingapori? Asi kwandiri, munoda kuita sakakova kanonyengedza, semvura inopwa?”" 
Jeremiah15:19 Nokudaro zvanzi naTenzi, “Kana ukadzoka ndichakudzorera pabasa rako undishandire. Kana ukataura zvinhu kwazvo usingataure zvinhu zvisina maturo ndiwe uchava muromo wangu, vachadzokera kwauri asi iwewe haudzokere kwavari." 
Jeremiah15:20 “Kuna vanhu ivava ava ndichaita kuti vave rusvingo rwendarira. Vachakurwisa asi havakukuriri nokuti ndinewe ndinokuponesa nokukununura, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah15:21 “Ndichakuponesa mumaoko mavakaipa ndichikununura kana wabatwa navanhu voutsinye.” 
Jeremiah16:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti, “Haufanire kuroora mukadzi" 
Jeremiah16:2 kana kuva zvako navanakomana kana vanasikana munzvimbo ino 
Jeremiah16:3 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi nezvavanasikana ivavo vanoberekerwa munzvimbo ino uye nezvamadzimai vakavabereka uye nezvemadzibaba akavabereka munyika muno zvinoti: 
Jeremiah16:4 vachafa nezvirwere zvakaipisisa. Havazochemwi kana kuvigwa, vachati pasi pwata pwata sendove pavhu, vapera nebakatwa neshangwa yenzara. Zvitunha zvavo zvichava ndizvo chokudya cheshiri dzedenga nemhuka dzesango." 
Jeremiah16:5 “Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi, usapinde kana kuenda kuimba iine rufu kundoungudza kana kuvachema nokuti rugare rwangu ndarubvisa mukati mavanhu ava uye ndabvisa mavari mwoyochena wangu nomutsa wangu." 
Jeremiah16:6 Vose zvavo vakuru navaduku vachafa munyika muno, havachazovigwa, hapana achavachema kana kuzvicheka-chekera vafi vacho kunyange kuzviveurira ivavo muparavara." 
Jeremiah16:7 Hakuna achazodya nomumwe achimunyaradza kana afirwa, kana kuwanawo chaanonwa nomumwe anenge afirwa nababa kana naamai vake achimunyaradza." 
Jeremiah16:8 “Iwe usapinde mumba yemabiko kundogara uchidya nokunwa navo 
Jeremiah16:9 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri: chiona, ndichagumisa munzvimbo ino imi muchizviona nameso enyu, mumazuva enyu, chikwe-e chokuseka ichi kana mheremhere yokufara nokupemberera mwenga kana kufarira murume wacho." 
Jeremiah16:10 “Pauchataurira vanhu ivava zvinhu zvose izvozvi, ivo vachakuti, ‘Ko Tenzi atemereiko kuti tiwirwe nepfumvu huru yakadai? Takapareiko? Chitadzo chatakapara kuna Tenzi Mwari wedu ndechei?’" 
Jeremiah16:11 Iwe unofanira kuvataurira kuti, ‘Chikonzero ndechichi chokuti madzibaba enyu akandifuratira, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi uye vakatevera vamwe vamwari vakavashandira nokuvanamata. Uye vakandifuratira vakarega kuchengeta mutemo wangu" 
Jeremiah16:12 uye nokuti imi makaita zvakaipa zvinodarika zvakaitwa namadzibaba enyu nokuti mumwe nomumwe wenyu ava kungotevedza zvake musikanzwa womusoro wake muchiramba kunditeerera. 
Jeremiah16:13 Naizvozvo iniwo ndichakukandai kunze kwenyika ino ndichikurasirai kunyika yamusingamboziva imimi kana madzibaba enyu. Ikoko muchashandira vamwe vamwari siku nesikati nokuti handisi kuzokunzwirai tsitsi.’ 
Jeremiah16:14 “Naizvozvo chinzwai munzwe, zvanzi naTenzi, mazuva ari kuuya achapera zvokuti, ‘NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu, akaburitsa vanhu veIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti’" 
Jeremiah16:15 asi kutoti, ‘NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu akaburitsa vanhu veIsiraeri kunyika yokuchamhembe, kubva kunyika dzose kwaakanga avadzingira nokuti ndichavadzorera kunyika yavo yandakapa kumadzitateguru avo.’" 
Jeremiah16:16 “Chinzwai, zvanzi naTenzi ndichatuma varauri vazhinji vavabate. Mushure macho ndichatuma vavhimi vazhinji vakuvhimei mumakomo mose nomuzvikomo zvose nomumapako" 
Jeremiah16:17 nokuti kuita kwavo kwose ndinokuona mumaziso mangu, hapana chakavanzika kwandiri. Kunyange kuipa kwavo hauna kuvandika mumaziso mangu." 
Jeremiah16:18 Zvino ndava kutanga kuvarangira kakapetwa uipi hwavo nechitadzo chavo nokuti vakan'oresa nyika yangu nezvitunha zvezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvinosemesa vachizadza nhaka yangu nezvinhu zvavo zvandisingadi.” 
Jeremiah16:19 Imi Tenzi imi simba rangu nenhare yangu yokuhwanda hondo diziro rangu pazuva renhamo, kwamuri ndokuchauya marudzi avanhu achibva kwakaperera nyika achiti, “Madzibaba edu akawana nhaka yezvinhu pasina, zvinhu zvamanyepo zvinhu zvisina maturo, zvisina chimuko." 
Jeremiah16:20 Ko munhu angazvigadzirire vamwari here? Zvinhu zvakadaro hazvisi vamwari. 
Jeremiah16:21 “Naizvozvo, chinzwa, ndichaita kuti vazive, rwendo runo ndichaita kuti vazive simba rangu noukuru hwangu ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ini ndini ndinonzi Mwari." 
Jeremiah17:1 “Chitadzo chevokwaJudha chakanyorwa nepenzura yesimbi ine muromo wedhaimondi, chakaita zvokutemerwa pafendefa remwoyo wavo uye napazvinenge nyanga zvapakona dzeatari dzavo." 
Jeremiah17:2 Izvozvo vana vavo pfungwa dzinenge dziri kuatari dzavo nokuzvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvinomiririra Ashera pasi pomuti wose wose wakasvibira nomuzvikomo zvirefu 
Jeremiah17:3 nomumakomo musango umu. Upfumi hwenyu nezvose zvamunazvo zvakakosha ndichaita kuti zvipambwe somubayiro wezvitadzo zviri munyika yenyu yose zvayo. 
Jeremiah17:4 Imi nhaka yandakakupai muchairegedza ndichikuitai kuti mushandire vavengi venyu munyika yamusingazivi nokuti ndaviruka nehasha, moto ukabaka unoramba uchingobvira.”" 
Jeremiah17:5 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Ane rushambwa munhu anovimba nomunhu, anoti munhu, ndiye simba rake ane mwoyo wokufuratira Mwari." 
Jeremiah17:6 “Akafanana negwenzi riri mugwenga hapana chakanaka chaanowana. Achagara munzvimbo dzakaoma dzomugwenga, munyika yebare isingagare munhu." 
Jeremiah17:7 “Akakomborerwa munhu anovimba naTenzi, munhu ane chivimbo naTenzi" 
Jeremiah17:8 akaita somuti wakasimwa pamvura unoendesa midzi yawo mukakova hauzozeza kupisa kana kuchiuya nokuti mashizha awo anoramba akasvibira uye hauzotyira gore rokushaikwa kwemvura nokuti haumborega kubereka muchero. 
Jeremiah17:9 “Mwoyo unonyengedza kupfuura zvinhu zvose zvazvo uye wakaora nouipi ndiani angaunzwisise husingarapiki. 
Jeremiah17:10 Ini Tenzi ndinoongorora mwoyo ndichipenengura pfungwa dzomunhu kuti ndipe munhu wose maererano nomugariro wake, uye maererano nezviito zvake.”" 
Jeremiah17:11 Sezvinoita hware kuunganidza nhiyo dzaisina kuchechenya, ndozvinoita munhu anowana upfumi zvisina mvumo. Huchamukurumuka pamazuva oupenyu hwake achagumisira ava benzi romunhu." 
Jeremiah17:12 Nzvimbo yedu Inoera, chigaro choumambo chomukurumbira chakaiswa pakakwirira kubvira pakutanga chaipo." 
Jeremiah17:13 Imi Tenzi, chitarisiro cheIsiraeri, vose vanokufuratirai imi vachanyadziswa. Vanenge vachiipa gotsi vachanyorwa pavhu nokuti vakafuratira Tenzi tsime remvura mhenyu." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ndirapeiwo Tenzi kuti ndipore ndinunureiwo ndipone nokuti ndimi wandinorumbidza. 
Jeremiah17:15 Hezvika vava kunditi, “Ko zvinorehwa naTenzi zvacho zviripiko? Ngazviuyeka!”" 
Jeremiah17:16 Handina kukumanikidzirai kutumira zvakaipa kana kusuwira zuva renhamo, imi munozviziva. Hapana chakabuda pamuromo pangu chamusingazivi." 
Jeremiah17:17 Regai kundityisa imi ndimi diziro rangu pazuva renhamo. 
Jeremiah17:18 Nyadzisai vanonditambudza asi ini murege kundinyadzisa ngavavhiringike nazvo asi ini ndirege kuvhiringika. Vaunzirei zuva renhamo munyatsovaparadza zvokuparadza zviya. 
Jeremiah17:19 Tenzi akanditi, “Enda undomira paSuo Guru raVanhu panopindwa nokubudiwa napo namadzimambo okwaJudha uye nepamisuo yose mikuru yeJerusaremu," 
Jeremiah17:20 uti, ‘Imi madzimambo okwaJudha nemi mose vokwaJudha navagari vose veJerusaremu vanopinda napamisuo mikuru iyoyi, inzwai shoko raTenzi.’" 
Jeremiah17:21 Zvanzi naTenzi, zvichenjererei upenyu hwenyu murege kutakura mutoro musi weSabata kana kupinda nawo napamisuo mikuru yeJerusaremu." 
Jeremiah17:22 Regaiwo kutakura mutoro muchibuda nawo mudzimba dzenyu nomusi weSabata kana kuita basa ripi neripi zvaro. Asi eresai zuva reSabata sokuudza kwandakaita madzibaba enyu. 
Jeremiah17:23 Asi havana kuteerera kana kurerekera nzeve yavo asi kuti vakatoomesa musoro kuti varege kunzwa kana kudzidzisika. 
Jeremiah17:24 “Tenzi ari kuti asi kana imi mukanditeerera mukaregawo kupinda nomutoro nomumisuo mikuru yeguta rino pazuva reSabata muchieresa zuva reSabata musingaite basa pazuva iroro," 
Jeremiah17:25 pakadarowo madzimambo namadzishe anogara pachigaro choumambo hwokwaDhavhidhi vachapinda napamisuo mikuru yeguta rino vari mungoro dzehondo dzamabhiza ivo namachinda avo vanhu vokwaJudha navagari veJerusaremu uye guta rino richagarwa narini narini. 
Jeremiah17:26 Vanhu vachakurumuka vachibva kumaguta okwaJudha nenzvimbo dzomunharaunda meguta reJerusaremu vachibvawo kunyika yokwaBhenjamini nokunyika yoKumanhika nokunyika yamakomo nokuNegevhu vachiuya nemipiro yokupisa nezvibayiro nemipiro youpfu hwembesanwa norusenzi vachiuyawo nemipiro yokutenda kumba yaTenzi. 
Jeremiah17:27 Asi kana mukarega kunditeerera kuti muerese zuva reSabata muchirega kutakura mutoro nokupinda nayo napamisuo mikuru yeJerusaremu pamusi weSabata, nezvo ini ndichabatidza moto mumisuo mikuru yaro ucharoromesa mizinda yeJerusaremu usingadzimiki.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Izwi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi rikati," 
Jeremiah18:2 “Chisumuka udzike kumba yomuumbi wehari, ikoko ndichaita kuti unzwe shoko rangu.”" 
Jeremiah18:3 Saizvozvowo ndakadzika kumba kwomuumbi wehari onei achiumbira zvinhu pane chokuumbira chinotenderera. 
Jeremiah18:4 Zvino mudziyo waakanga achiumba nevhu iroro wakakanganisika uri mumaoko make kudaro akabva aumbazve mumwe mudziyo naro sokuda kwake. 
Jeremiah18:5 Izwi raTenzi ndokubva rauya kwandiri richiti," 
Jeremiah18:6 “Nhai imi vemba yeIsiraeri ndinotadza here kuita nemi zvaitwa nomuumbi uyu? Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Chinzwai, sezvakangoita munyakwe uri mumaoko omuumbi ndozvamakangoita imi mumaoko mangu, imi vemba yaIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah18:7 Nguva yose yandinenge ndataura chinhu ndakananga rudzi rwavanhu, kana nyika kuti ndichaidzipura kana kuipaza kana kuiparadza" 
Jeremiah18:8 uye kana rudzi rwavanhu ivavo rune zvandinenge ndataura zvacho rukapinduka pakuipa kwarwo neniwo ndinobva ndaregawo kuita zvakaipa zvandinenge ndambofunga kuti ndiite kwarwuri. 
Jeremiah18:9 Uyewo nguva yose zvayo yandinenge ndatemera rumwe rudzi rwavanhu kana imwe nyika kuti ndichaivaka ndigoisima," 
Jeremiah18:10 kana rudzi rwacho irworwo rukaita zvakaipa ruchirega kuteerera izwi rangu, ini ndinobva ndasandukawo ndorega kuruitira zvakanaka zvandakanga ndaronga kuruitira." 
Jeremiah18:11 Saka zvino wochitaurira vanhu vokwaJudha navagari veJerusaremu kuti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi, ndiri kukurongerai nhamo, ndiri kukurukirai mazano okukutsvatai. Pindukai, munhu wose akande pasi nzira dzake dzakaipa mugadziridze mafambiro enyu namaitiro enyu.’" 
Jeremiah18:12 “Asi ivo vanoti, ‘Hazvina maturo izvi. Tinotevera zvirongwa zvedu mumwe nomumwe achitevera zvake zvomusoro wake zvakaipa.’ ”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Naizvozvo, zvanzi naTenzi: “Imbobvunzaiwo pakati pevechirudzi kuti ndiani akambonzwawo zvakadai sezvizvi? Mhandara iyi, Isiraeri yakaita zvinhu zvakaipisisa kwazvo." 
Jeremiah18:14 “Chando cheRebhanoni chinombopera here pazvikangararwe zveGomo reSirioni? Mvura yomugomo inombopwa here kuerera, tukova tune mvura inotonhorera?" 
Jeremiah18:15 “Asi vanhu vangu vandikanganwa. Vanopisira rusenzi kuna vamwari vasirivo vanogumburwa munzira dzawo, nzira dzakare vakapinda mutwunzirawo zvatwo kwete mumigwagwa mikuru" 
Jeremiah18:16 vachiita kuti nyika yavo ive chiseko chaicho chinhu chinoridzirwa zvacho tsamwa narini wose. “Munhu wose anopfuura nemairi anokatyamadzwa nazvo achidzungudza musoro wake. 
Jeremiah18:17 “Sezvinoita mhepo yokumabvazuva, ndichavamwayanisa kuvavengi. Ndichavapa gotsi ndisingambovatarisa pazuva ravo renhamo.”" 
Jeremiah18:18 Vanhu ndopavakati, “Uyai tironge mazano okutsvata nawo Jeremiya nokuti kuvapristi mutemo hauzofa wakarova kunyange zano kuna vangwaru harimboperi, kana irowo shoko rinobva kumuporofita. Uyai timutape mukanwa, tirege kumboteerera zvedu zvaanotaura." 
Jeremiah18:19 “Imi Tenzi, Teererai munzwe chichemo changu." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ko zvakaipa zvingave ndizvo here zvokutsiva nazvo zvakanaka? Asi vakandicherera hunza kuti vandiurayire imomo. Rangarirai kumira kwendakaita pamberi penyu ndichivareverera kuti mudzore hasha dzenyu kwavari. 
Jeremiah18:21 Naizvozvo pinzai vana vavo mushangwa yenzara vaparadzwe namapakatwa, vadzimai vavo vasare vasisina vana, dzangove chirikadzi varume ngavafe nedenda, majaya avo aurayiwe nebakatwa muhondo." 
Jeremiah18:22 Mudzimba dzavo ngamuve nokuchema, pamunoerekana mavaunzira muurayi, nokuti vakandicherera hunza kuti ndiwiremo, vakateyera tsoka dzangu misungo." 
Jeremiah18:23 Asi imi Tenzi munoziva bangano ravo rokuda kundiuraya. Musavaregerere uipi hwavo kana kubvisa chitadzo chavo pameso penyu. Vadzadzarisei pamberi penyu makashatirwa.” 
Jeremiah19:1 Zvanzi naTenzi, enda utenge hari yevhu yomuumbi utore vamwe vavakuru vakuru vavanhu navakuru vakuru vavapristi" 
Jeremiah19:2 ubude uende kuBani reMwanakomana wokwaHinomu panopindwa napo kuSuo Guru reZvimedu Zvehari undoparidza ikoko mazwi andinokutaurira. 
Jeremiah19:3 Uti, “Inzwai izwi raTenzi imi madzimambo okwaJudha nemi vagari veJerusaremu. Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri chionai ndavakuzounzira nzvimbo ino nhamo inowungisa nzeve dzaani naani anozvinzwa." 
Jeremiah19:4 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti vanhu vakandifuratira vakan'oresa nzvimbo ino nokupisira rusenzi mairi kuvamwe vamwari vasingazikanwi naivo kana namadzibaba avo kana namadzimambo okwaJudha uye pamusana pokuti vakazadza nzvimbo ino neropa ravanhu vasina mhosva 
Jeremiah19:5 vachivakawo nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira kuna Bhaari dzokupisira vanakomana vavo mumoto semipiro yokupisira kuna Bhaari yandisina kumbotema ini kana kupa somutemo uye hazvina kana kumbouya mupfungwa dzangu. 
Jeremiah19:6 Naizvozvo, onai, zvanzi naTenzi kuchasvika mazuva okuti nzvimbo iyoyi haizombonzizve kuBisiro kana kunzi kuBani raMwanakomana wokwaHinomu. Asi kuchatonzi kuBani rokuDeurirwa ropa." 
Jeremiah19:7 Panzvimbowo iyoyi mazano evokwaJudha novokuJerusaremu ndichaashayisa basa uye ndicharakatisa kuuraya vanhu ivavo nebakatwa revavengi vavo nomumaoko mavanoda kupfuudza upenyu hwavo. Ndichapa zvitunha zvavo kuti zvive chokudya cheshiri dzedenga nemhuka dzesango. 
Jeremiah19:8 Guta irori ndichariita chiseko zvacho chenyika, chinhu chinoridzirwa tsamwa. Munhu wose anopfuura nepo achadumbirwa nazvo achiridza tsamwa pamusana penyatwa dzaro dzose." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ndichaitawo kuti vadye nyama yavanakomana vavo nenyama yanavanasikana vavo. Vachadyanana vose zvavo munhamo yavo iyoyo yokukombwa yavanenge vachioneswa navavengi vavo uye navanenge vachitsvaka kuvatsvata. 
Jeremiah19:10 “Unofanira kuzoputsa hari yacho varume vaunenge waenda navo ivavo vachiona 
Jeremiah19:11 wozoti kwavari, zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo ndizvo zvandichaita kuparadza saizvozvi vanhu ivava neguta irori somunhu ari kuputsa mudziyo womuumbi zvokuti hauzombofa wakagadzirikazve. Vachatoviga vanhu kuBisiro pamusana pokuti kumwe kose kuchange kusisina nzvimbo yokuviga vanhu." 
Jeremiah19:12 Zviri kunzi naTenzi ndozvandichaita kunzvimbo ino nokuvagari vayo, guta rino iri richiitwa Bisiro." 
Jeremiah19:13 Dzimba dzeJerusaremu nemizinda yamadzimambo okwaJudha, padzimba dzose zvadzo dzina matenga akambopisirwa rusenzi pamusoro padzo ruchipirwa kugurusvusvu rose rezvinhu zvomudenga pachidururirwa mipiro yokuteura kuna vamwe vamwari dzichan'oreswa sezvichaitwawo nzvimbo yokuBisiro.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Jeremiya akazobva kuBisiro kwaakanga atumwa naTenzi kuya kundoporofita akandomira kunhandare yemba yaTenzi akataura kuvanhu vose kuti: 
Jeremiah19:15 “Zvanzi naTenzi, wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri chinzwai, ndava kuunzira guta rino notumaguta twaro twose zvinhu zvose zvakaipa zvandakamboreva nezvaro nokuti vakaomesa musoro vachiramba kunzwa zvandinoreva.”" 
Jeremiah20:1 Izvozvo mupristi Pashuri mwanakomana waImeru akanga ariye mukuru mukuru aiona yezvepamba paTenzi akanzwawo Jeremiya achiporofita zvinhu izvi. 
Jeremiah20:2 Ipapo Pashuri akarova muporofita Jeremiya akamuisa muchitokisi chaiva paSuo Guru rokwaBhenjamini rokumusoro kwemba yaTenzi. 
Jeremiah20:3 Ramangwana racho, Pashuri paakasunungura Jeremiya muchitokisi, Jeremiya akati kwaari, “Tenzi haana kukupa zita rokuti Pashuri asi rokuti, ‘Nyakukombwanezvinotyisa.’" 
Jeremiah20:4 Nokuti Tenzi ari kuti; ‘Chiona ndichakupinza mune zvinotyisa iwe neshamwari dzako dzose. Vacharakatiswa nebakatwa revavengi vavo iwe makatarisa nameso ako. Uye ndichaisa Judha yose mumaoko mamambo weBhabhironi, achavatapa oenda navo kuBhabhironi achivauraya nebakatwa." 
Jeremiah20:5 Uyewo ndichapa upfumi hwose hweguta rino nezvose zvarinowana nezvinokosha zvaro zvose nezvinhu zvose zvazvo zvinokosha zvamadzimambo okwaJudha mumaoko mavavengi vavo, vachavapamba vachivabata vachiendwa navo kuBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah20:6 Zvino iwe Pashuri, navose vagere mumba mako muchaendwa nemi kuutapwa. KuBhabhironi munotokuenda, ikoko ndokwamuchandofira, ikoko ndokwamuchavigwa, iwe neshamwari dzako dzose dzawaitaurira chiporofita chenhema.’ ”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Imi Tenzi makandinyengedza, ini ndikabvuma kunyengedzwa. Imi makasimba kupinda ini uye imi makandikurira. Ndava chiseko chenyika zuva rose. Munhu wose anondisvoveredza." 
Jeremiah20:8 Nokuti pandinoti nditaure, ndinoshevedzera ndichidaidzira ndichiti, “Hecho chisimba noumharadzi!” Nokuti shoko raTenzi rave kwandiri chinhu chinondishoresa nokundisekesa zuva rose." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ndikati nditi, “Handichambofunga nezvake kana kutaurazve nezita rake,” mumwoyo mangu munoita somune moto unopisa wakapfigirwa mumapfupa angu, zvandikunda ini, handichazvigona." 
Jeremiah20:10 Nokuti ndiri kunzwa vazhinji vachiita kazevezeve, mativi ose zvangove zvinotyisa. “Mumhan'arirei! Ngatimumhan'arirei,” ndizvo zviri kutaura shamwari dzangu chaidzo dzose dzakangotarisira kuti pangu pandiperere, vachiti zvimwe angafuririke tikamukurira tobva tamutsividza." 
Jeremiah20:11 Asi Tenzi aneni somurwi wehondo anotyisa. Naizvozvo vanondionesa ndondo vachagumburwa uye havambondikunda. Vachanyadziswa zvikuru nokuti havasi kuzombobudirira. Kunyadziswa kwavo kusingaperi hakusi kuzombofa kwakakanganikwa. 
Jeremiah20:12 Imi Tenzi wehondo nehondo munoedza wani vakarurama, imi munoona mumwoyo nomupfungwa dzomunhu, itai henyu kuti ndione imi muchivatsividza nokuti ndazviturira mumaoko menyu." 
Jeremiah20:13 Imbirai Tenzi rumbidzai Tenzi nokuti akanunura upenyu hwavasina chavanacho mumaoko mevaiti vezvakaipa. 
Jeremiah20:14 Ngarive norushambwa zuva randakaberekwa musi wandakaponwa namai vangu, ngaurege kuva musi wakakombererwa." 
Jeremiah20:15 Ngaapinde rushambwa munhu akaunza kuna baba vangu shoko rokuti, “Maberekerwa mwana mukomana,” achivaita kuti vafare zvikuru kwazvo." 
Jeremiah20:16 Munhu iyeyo ngaaitwe samaguta akaparadzwa naTenzi asingaanzwirwi tsitsi. Ngaanzwe mhere yokuchema mangwanani nemhere yokuyambira, masikati" 
Jeremiah20:17 nokuti akarega kundiuraya ndichiri munhumbu maamai zvokuti amai vangu ndivo vangadai vakava guva rangu, nhumbu yavo yakaramba zvayo yakakura." 
Jeremiah20:18 Chaizvoizvo ini ndakabudirei munhumbu ini, kuzoona nhamo ndichisuruvara kudai nokupedzera mazuva angu mukunyadziswa?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Herinoi shoko rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi, mambo Zedhekiya paakatuma kwaari Pashuri mwanakomana wokwaMarikiya nomupristi Zefaniya mwanakomana wokwaMaaseya neshoko rokuti," 
Jeremiah21:2 “Tibvunzireiwo kuna Tenzi tinzwe kuti anoti kudii nokuti Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi ari kurwa hondo nesu. Zvimwe Tenzi angadaro akatiitira zvinoshamisa zvose zvaanosiita akaita kuti asiyane nesu aende.” 
Jeremiah21:3 Jeremiya akabva ati kwavari," 
Jeremiah21:4 “Endai mundotaurira Zedhekiya kuti, zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ndichaita kuti zvombo zvehondo zvamakapakata mumaoko menyu zvamuri kurwisa nazvo mambo weBhabhironi muchirwisa vanhu vechiKaradhia vakakukombai nechokunze kwetsvingo zvikupindukirei. Ndichazviunganidza pamwechete mukati meguta rino." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ini ndichakurwisai noukuru hwangu nesimba guru roruoko rwangu ndakaviruka nehasha ndakashatirwa zvikuru kwazvo. 
Jeremiah21:6 Izvozvo ndicharova vagari veguta rino, vanhu pamwechete nemhuka zvichafa nedenda guru." 
Jeremiah21:7 Zvanzi naTenzi, mushure mezvo ndichaisa Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha namakurukota ake navanhu vomuguta rino vachapunyuka kudenda nokubakatwa nokushangwa yenzara mumaoko maNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi, uye mumaoko mavavengi vavo, nomumaoko mavanhu vanotsvaga kupfuudza upenyu hwavo. Achavarakasha nebakatwa asinganzwire tsitsi kana kuvasiya vari vapenyu kana kuvaitira tsiye nyoro.”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Kuvanhu ivava ava enda undoti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, chinzwai, ndaisa pamberi penyu, uku nzira yokuupenyu uku nzira yokurufu." 
Jeremiah21:9 Anenge agara muguta rino achafa nebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda. Asi anenge abuda kundozviisa mumaoko avaKaridhea vakakukombai achararama uye upenyu hwake ndohwaachawana somubayiro wehondo 
Jeremiah21:10 nokuti zvino ndanyatsotarisana chaizvo neguta rino kuti ndiripinze nhamo kwete kuriitira zvakanaka. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, richaiswa mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi acharipisa nomoto.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 Kune vemba yamambo wokwaJudha, “Inzwai shoko raTenzi" 
Jeremiah21:12 imi vemba yokwaDhavhidhi! Zvanzi naTenzi: “Tongai zvine ruenzaniso achiri mangwanani, mununure waro mumaoko omunhu anoonesa vamwe ndondo; munhu anenge apambwa ndingadaro ndikaviruka nehasha somoto unopisa usina angaudzimure pamusana pezviito zvenyu zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah21:13 “Zvanzi naTenzi, chinzwa, izvozvi handichawirirana newe iwe mugari womubani, iwe dombo romubani. Imi munozviti, ‘Ndiani chaizvo angadzike kuzotidenha, ndiani chaizvo angapinde mudzimba dzedu isu?’" 
Jeremiah21:14 “Ndichakuranga zvakakodzerana nezvinobva mukuita kwako, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndichabatidza moto mumasango mako ucharoromesa zvose zviri munharaunda yako.”" 
Jeremiah22:1 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Dzika kumba yamambo wokwaJudha undotaurako shoko iri" 
Jeremiah22:2 rokuti: ‘Iwe mambo wokwaJudha ugere pachigaro choumambo chokwaDhavhidhi, iwe namakurukota ako navanhu vako vanopinda napamisuo mikuru iyi, zvanzi naTenzi." 
Jeremiah22:3 Zvanzi naTenzi itai zvinhu zvine ruenzaniso, zvakarurama muchinunura munhu anenge apambwa mumaoko maanenge achimuonesa nhamo achimudzvanyirira. Uye musakanganisire kana kuitira utsinye mutorwa kana nherera kana chirikadzi kana kudeura ropa risina mhosva munzvimbo ino.’" 
Jeremiah22:4 Ndinodaro nokuti mukanyatsoteerera chaizvo shoko irori, pamisuo mikuru yemba ino iyi pachazopinda madzimambo achazogara pachigaro choumambo hwokwaDhavhidhi vari mungoro dzehondo napamabhiza, ivo namakurukota avo navanhu vavo." 
Jeremiah22:5 Asi kana mukarega kuteerera mazwi aya, zvanzi naTenzi, ndinopika neni pachangu kuti imba ino ichava dongo," 
Jeremiah22:6 nokuti zviri kutaura Tenzi zvinonangana nemba yamambo wokwaJudha ndezvizvi zvokuti: “Kwandiri ini, iwe unoyevedza senyika yokwaGireadhi kudai uye somutunhu chaiwo wakakwirira weRebhanoni asi ndichanyatsokuita gwenga zvaro, guta risina ageremo." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndichavarongera mharadzi dzokuvapadza imwe neimwe nezvombo zvayo zvehondo. Dzichatemera pasi iyo misidhari yako yakaisvonaka vagoikanda mumoto. 
Jeremiah22:8 “Marudzi avanhu akawanda achadarika napaguta irori, munhu wose achitaurirana nomumwe wake achiti, ‘Tenzi akadarirei chaizvo kubva aita chinhu chakadai kuguta iri rakakura sezvizvi?’" 
Jeremiah22:9 Ipapo vachapana mhinduro yokuti, ‘Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti vakafuratira chitenderano chaTenzi, Mwari wavo vakanamata vamwe vamwari vachivashandira.’ ”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Anenge afa musamucheme kana kuchema nhamo yake asi kuti motohwihwidza kuchema zvinosiririsa uyo anoenda nokuti haachadzokizve kuzoona nyika yaakaberekerwa 
Jeremiah22:11 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi nezvaSharumu naSharumu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha uya akazotonga panzvimbo yababa wake Josiya, Sharumu uya akazoenda achibva kunzvimbo kuno, “Haasi kuzombodzokazve kuno." 
Jeremiah22:12 Asi kuti kwaanenge aendwa naye senhapwa, ndokwaachafira ikoko uye nyika ino haazombofa akaionazve.”" 
Jeremiah22:13 Ane nhamo munhu anovaka imba yake nokusarurama, dzimba dzake dzemunhurikidzwa achidzivaka nezvinhu zvisiri pamutemo achiita kuti mumwe amushandire pasina, asina kana chaanomutambirisa" 
Jeremiah22:14 achizviti, “Regai ndizvivakire zimba gurusa, rine munhurikidzwa ine dzimba dzakafara kwazvo.” Izvozvo anoichekera muhwindo achiiti kumadziro uku tsveete kuroverera musidhari nokuipenda nependi tsvuku." 
Jeremiah22:15 Heya wava kutofungawo kuti uri mambowo nhai pamusana pokukwikwidzana navamwe nezvomusidhari izvozvi izvi? Handiti baba vako vaidya nokunwa vachiita zvinhu zvine ruenzaniso zvakarurama? Saka zvinhu zvakavafambirawo zvakanaka. 
Jeremiah22:16 Vaitonga zvichemo zvavarombo nezvavasina chavanacho zvikabva zvavafambira zvakanaka. Zvanzi naTenzi, “Hakusiri iko kundiziva here ikoko?" 
Jeremiah22:17 “Asi meso nomwoyo wenyu zviri pakubiridzira chete nokudeura ropa risina mhosva nokuita udzvinyiriri noutsinye. 
Jeremiah22:18 “Ndokusaka Tenzi achitaura nezvaJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo weJudha achiti: “Havasi kuzombomuchema. Vachiti, ‘Maiwe-e hama yangu!’ Kana kuti, ‘Yowe-e hanzvadzi kani!’ Havasi kuzombozviita zvokuchema vachiti, ‘Maiwe-e kani Tenzi!’ Kana kuti, ‘Changamire kani!’" 
Jeremiah22:19 “Achavigwa sedhongi zvaro achiita zvokuzvuzvurudzwa napasi agonzi hupukupu kukandwa kunze kwemisuo mikuru yeJerusaremu.” 
Jeremiah22:20 Kwira kuRebhanoni uridze mhere ubongomore uri kuBhashani uridze mhere uri kuAbharimu nokuti vadiwa vako vose vaparadzwa. 
Jeremiah22:21 Ndakataura newe uchakagarika, asi iwe wakati, “Zvokuteerera, handidi!” Ndiwo maitiro ako kubvira pauduku hwako okurega kuteerera inzwi rangu." 
Jeremiah22:22 Mhepo ndoichafudza vafudzi vako vose. Vadiwa vako vose vachaendeswa kuutapwa. Ipapo uchanyara uchikangaidzwa nazvo, pamusana pouipi hwako hwose." 
Jeremiah22:23 Iwe chidza cheRebhanoni nyakurererwa mudendere pakati pemisidhari uchanzwisa tsitsi pauchabatwa namarwadzo, marwadzo soumukadzi ari pakusununguka mwana." 
Jeremiah22:24 “Zvanzi naTenzi, hezvino ndiripo kudai, kunyange zvazvo iye Koniya mwanakomana waJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha ariye ringi rechidhindo rokuruoko rworudyi rwangu asi ini ndichakubvarura" 
Jeremiah22:25 ndigokuisa mumaoko avanotsvaka kupfuudza upenyu hwako, mumaoko aivo vaunotya, mumaoko aNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi uye mumaoko mevanhu vechiKaridhea." 
Jeremiah22:26 Iwe namai vakakubereka ndichakukandai kune imwe nyika kwamusina kuberekerwa ikoko ndokwamuchafira. 
Jeremiah22:27 Asi kunyika kuno kwavanenge vosuwira kudzokera, havasiri kuzodzokerako." 
Jeremiah22:28 “Ko iye Koniya wava munhu akashoreka here kana kuti hari zvayo yakaputsika, mudziyo usina ani anouchengeta? Ko iye navana vake vanzarirwei kubva vakandwa kunyika yavasingazive?”" 
Jeremiah22:29 Nhai nyika! Nyika wee! Iwe nyika! Teerera shoko raTenzi! 
Jeremiah22:30 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Nyora munhu uyo somunhu asina mwana, munhu asingazofa akabudirira mumazuva ake oupenyu nokuti hapana nomumwe wechizvarwa chake achazombogara pachigaro choumambo hwokwaDhavhidhi achitongazve kwaJudha.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Zvichavawana vafudzi vanoparadza vachimwararisa hwai dzamafuro angu! Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Jeremiah23:2 Naizvozvo Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri ari kutaura zvinonangana nemi vafudzi iyemi munochengeta vanhu vangu achiti, “Makamwararisa danga rehwai dzangu, mukadzidzinga mukarega kudzifudza. Chinzwai, zvino ini ndava kunangana nemi pamusana pezviito zvenyu zvakaipa ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ipapo ndopandichakokorodza danga rehwai dzangu dzinenge dzasara kunyika dzese kwandakambodzidzingira ndivaunze mudanga ravo, vachaberekana vagowanda." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndichavaisira vafudzi vokuvachengeta, uye zvokutya vasisatyi kana kudumbirwa zvako; hakuna kana neimwe icharasika ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah23:5 Chionai, zvanzi naTenzi, “Mazuva achasvika andichamutsira Dhavhidhi Bazi rakarurama iyeyo achazotonga samambo zvino ungwaru achitonga zvino ruenzaniso zvakarurama munyika muno." 
Jeremiah23:6 Mumazuva ake iyeyu nyika yokwaJudha ichanunurwa, Isiraeri ichagarikika zvakanaka. Iri ndiro zita ravachamudaidza naro rokuti, ‘Tenzihururamihwedu.’" 
Jeremiah23:7 “Naizvozvo, chinzwai, zvanzi naTenzi mazuva ari kuuya acharega vanhu kupika vachiti, ‘NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu akaburitsa vanhu veIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti’" 
Jeremiah23:8 asi kutoti, ‘NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu akaburitsa akatungamirira zvizvarwa zvemba yeIsiraeri kubva kunyika yokuchamhembe uye kubva kunyika dzose kwandakanga ndavadzingira.’ Ndipo pavachazogara munyika yavo chaiyo." 
Jeremiah23:9 “Maererano nezvevaporofita zvandirwadza mumwoyo; zvandisvika pamapfupa chaipo. Ndaita somunhu araradza somunhu adhakwa newaini pamusana paTenzi uye pamusanawo peshoko rake rinoera 
Jeremiah23:10 nokuti nyika yazara mhombwe, pamusana pokurengererwa nyika iri kuchema uye mafuro okurenje aoma. Chavo chavakananga kuipa chete, simba ravo vachiripedzera mukuita zvisina kururama." 
Jeremiah23:11 “Vose zvavo muporofita nomupristi havambotya Mwari kunyange nomumba mangu kuipa kwavo ndakakuona ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Jeremiah23:12 “Naizvozvo kwavari ivo nzira yavo ichava sotunzira tunotsvedza murima mavachatinhirwa vachitsvedzemuka nokuti ndichavapinza nhamo mugore rokurangwa kwavo, ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah23:13 “Muvaporofita vokuSamaria, ndakaona chinhu chisina musoro chokuti vakaporofita naBhaari. Vakateteresera vanhu vangu veIsiraeri kusiko." 
Jeremiah23:14 “Kana muvaporofita vomuJerusaremu ndakaonawo chinhu chakaora kwazvo chokuti vanoita upombwe vachitevedza nhema zvadzo vachitsigira vaiti vezvakaipa zvokuti hapana anozopinduka achisiyana nouipi hwake. Kwandiri ini, vose zvavo vaita seSodhomu, navagari vacho vaita seGomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 “Naizvozvo Tenzi wehondo nehondo ari kutaura nezvevaporofita ivavo achiti: ‘Chinzwa, ndichadyisa vanhu ivava gavakava, ndichivapa mvura yokunwa ine chepfu nokuti muvaporofita vomuJerusaremu ndimo makabva zvokurega kutya Mwari zvikatekeshera nenyika iyoyi yose.’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Musateerere zvinorehwa navaporofita vanoporofita kwamuri vachikuzadzai nezvitarisiro zvisina maturo. Vanotaura nezviratidzo zvomusoro yavo zvisingabvi mumuromo waTenzi." 
Jeremiah23:17 Kune vanhu vanoshora shoko raTenzi vanoramba vachingovati, ‘Zvichakunakirai!’ Uye kune wosewo anenge achitevera zvomusoro wake, vanenge vachingoti, ‘Hapana chakaipa chichakuwira.’" 
Jeremiah23:18 “Chiripo chaicho ndechokuti pakati pavo, ndiani chaizvo, akambopindawo mudare raTenzi kundozvionera nokunzwa shoko rake, kana kuti ndiani zvake akamboteerera nokunzwa shoko rake?" 
Jeremiah23:19 “Hero dutu remhepo raTenzi rovhuvhuta rakashatirwa chaizvo riri chamupupuri chaicho chine simba chichaputikira pamusoro pavanhu vakaipa. 
Jeremiah23:20 “Hasha dzaTenzi hadzichadzoreki kusvikira atopedza kuita zvaakaronga mumwoyo make. Mumazuva okupedzisira uchanyatsonzwisisa. 
Jeremiah23:21 “Vaporofita ivavo ini handina kuvatuma asi ivo vari kumhanya. Ini handina zvandakataura kwavari asi ivo vari kuporofita. 
Jeremiah23:22 “Dai kuri kuti vakambopindawo mudare rangu, vangadai vakaparidza mazwi angu kuvanhu vangu, vangadaiwo vakavadzora munzira dzavo dzakaipa nokuzviito zvavo zvakaipa." 
Jeremiah23:23 “Tenzi ari kuti ko ndiri Mwari ari pedyo chete, handisi Mwari ari kurewo here?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Iye munhu angagone nhai kubva ahwanda munzvimbo dzokuvanda zvokubva ndatadza kumuona? Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Handiti ini ndinozadza denga nenyika here? Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Jeremiah23:25 Ndakazvinzwa zvinotaura vaporofita vachiporofita zvenhema muzita rangu vachiti, ‘Ndarotswa! Ndarotswa!’" 
Jeremiah23:26 Kusvikira riniko chaizvo mukati mavanhu muine vaporofita vanotaura zvenhema vachiporofita zvomusoro wavo," 
Jeremiah23:27 vanoda kuti vanhu vangu vakanganwe zita rangu pamusana pezviroto zvavo zvavanotaurirana sezvakazoita madzibaba avo vakakanganwa zita rangu voyeuka raBhaari. 
Jeremiah23:28 Regai muporofita ane chaarota arotomoke zvake, asi munhu ane shoko rangu ngaaritaure sezvazviri. Musvo wekoroni namashanga hapana maenzanisiro aungazviite? Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah23:29 Izwi rangu harina kuita somoto here, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi kana senyundo inopwanya-pwanya mabwe?" 
Jeremiah23:30 Naizvozvo chionai zviri kunzi naTenzi handiwirirani navaporofita ivavo vanobirana mashoko avanoti anobva kwandiri. 
Jeremiah23:31 Chinzwai, ini handiwirirani navaporofita vanoshandisa rurimi rwavo vachiti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi,’ kana kuti, ‘Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi.’" 
Jeremiah23:32 Chinzwai, ini handiwirirani navanoporofita vanotaura kurotswa kwenhema. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Vanozvitaura vachitungamirira vanhu vangu kusiri iko nenhema dzavo nokushaya hanya kwavo ini ndisina kumbovatuma kana kuvaudza kuti vaite. Naizvozvo hapana chavanombobatsira vanhu ava nacho. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah23:33 “Kana mumwe munhu, muporofita kana mupristi, akubvunzai achiti, ‘Mutoro waTenzi ndoupi?’ Vataurirei kuti, ‘Iyemi ndimi mutoro wacho.’ Ini ndichakukandai kwakadaro, ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah23:34 Kana ari muporofita kana mupristi kunyange mumwe wavanhu ava anotaura achiti, ‘Mutoro waTenzi’ munhu iyeyo ndichamuranga iye nemba yake." 
Jeremiah23:35 Mose zvenyu muchazotaurirana mumwe nomumwe mugarisani nomugarisani wake, hama nehama muchiti, ‘Nhaimi, Tenzi akapa mhinduro yokuti kudii?’ kana kuti, ‘Tenzi ataurei?’" 
Jeremiah23:36 Asi regai kuzombodomazve mutoro waTenzi nokuti mutoro iwoyo ishoko rava kurehwa nomunhu wose. Zvino imi munominamisa mashoko aMwari mupenyu, Tenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Muporofita wacho iyeyo mubvunzei kuti, ‘Tenzi akapa mhinduro yokuti kudii?’ kana kuti, ‘Tenzi ataurei?’" 
Jeremiah23:38 Asi kana uchiti, ‘Mutoro waTenzi,’ zvanzi naTenzi, pamusana pokutaura kwako ikoko kwokuti, ‘Mutoro waTenzi,’ ini ndakambokutumira yambiro yokuti, rega zvokutaura uchiti, ‘Mutoro waTenzi,’" 
Jeremiah23:39 naizvozvo chinzwa, ndichakusumudza ndigokukanda kure neni, iyewe neguta randakapa iwe namadzibaba ako." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ndichakuita chiseko chenyika narini wose chinhu chinonyadzisa zvokugara zvakadaro zvisingazokanganwiki.” 
Jeremiah24:1 Mushure mokunge Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi atapa muJerusaremu Jekoniya mwanakomana waJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha pamwe namachinda okwaJudha nenyanzvi dzamabasa amaoko nemhizha dzezvoutare akavaendesa kuBhabhironi, Tenzi akandionesa chiratidzo chakadai izvi. Ndakaona tswanda mbiri dzemaonde dzakagadzikirwa pamberi peTemberi yaTenzi." 
Jeremiah24:2 Imwe tswanda yacho yakanga ine maonde akanakisisa kwazvo akaita samaonde aye anotangisisa kuibva. Asi imwe tswanda yacho yakanga ina maonde akaipisisa kwazvo, akanga akaipa zvokuti akanga asingadyiki." 
Jeremiah24:3 Tenzi akanditi, “Nhai Jeremiya chii chauri kuona?” Ini ndikati, “Maonde! Maonde akanaka, akanakisisa kwazvo! Uye namaonde akaipa akaipisisa kwazvo! Asingadyiki akaipisisa zvokuti akanga asingadyiki.”" 
Jeremiah24:4 Izwi raTenzi ndokubva rauya kwandiri roti," 
Jeremiah24:5 “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri sezvakangoita maonde aya akanaka, ndizvo zvandichangoita kuona kwandichaita nhapwa dzokwaJudha dzandakabvisisa munzvimbo ino dzikaendwa nadzo kunyika yavaKaridhea ndichavaona savanhu kwavo vakanaka." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ndichazoramba ndakaisa ziso rangu pavari kuitira kuti ndivaitire zvakanaka uye ndichavadzosera kunyika ino. Ndichavadyara ndisingazovadzipuri, ndichavasima ndisingavadzipuri." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndichavapa mwoyo wokuziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi uye vachava vanhu vangu, iniwo ndiri Mwari wavo nokuti vachadzokera kwandiri nomwoyo wavo wose." 
Jeremiah24:8 “Asi zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Sezvakangoita maonde akaipa zvokuti haadyiki, ndizvo zvandichaitawo kuna Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha namachinda ake nechitsama chavanhu vachasara munyika muno navanhu vagere kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Jeremiah24:9 Ndichaita kuti vave chinhu chinokatyamadza nyika dzose dzapasi pano uye kuti vave chokutukisa nacho, vachiva dimikira, nechiseko, uye kuti vave chinhu chino rushambwa kunzvimbo dzose kwandichavadzingira." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ndichavatumidzirawo bakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda kusvikira vanyatsoparara munyika yandakapa ivo, namadzibaba avo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah25:1 Shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya rakananga kuvanhu vokwaJudha vose zvavo, muri mugore rechina rokutonga kwaJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha. (Iroro ndiro gore raiva rechiposhi rokutonga kwaNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi.)" 
Jeremiah25:2 Muporofita Jeremiya akataura kuvanhu vose vokwaJudha nokuvagari vose veJerusaremu shoko irori rokuti," 
Jeremiah25:3 “Kwamakore makumi maviri namatatu, kubvira pagore regumi nechitatu rokutonga kwaJosiya mwanakomana waAmoni mambo wokwaJudha kusvikira pari nhasi, shoko raTenzi ranga richingouya kwandiri ini ndichirambawo ndichikutaurirai, asi imi hamuna kuteerera." 
Jeremiah25:4 Makaramba kuteerera kana kurerekera nzeve dzenyu kuti munzwe, kunyange Tenzi akaramba achingokutumirai varanda vake vaporofita" 
Jeremiah25:5 achiti, ‘Chitodzokai izvozvi munhu wose asiyane nenzira yake yakaipa netwakaipa twaanobata mugogara munyika iyi yamakapiwa imi namadzibaba enyu kubvira kare kare nokusingaperi." 
Jeremiah25:6 Regai kutevera vamwe vamwari kundovashandira kana kuvanamata kana kundishatirisa nebasa ramunoita namaoko enyu. Kana madaro iniwo handizokukuvadzai.’ 
Jeremiah25:7 Asi hamuna imi kunditeerera, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, kuti imimi mungadaro mukandishatirisa nebasa ramunoita namaoko enyu zvikazokukuvadzai." 
Jeremiah25:8 “Ndokusaka zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, zvamakarega kuteerera mashoko angu, chinzwai," 
Jeremiah25:9 ‘Iniwo ndava kukoka vemadzinza ose okuchamhembe, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi ndichikoka Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi, muranda wangu ndigovaunza kuzorwisa nyika iyoyi navagari vayo kuzorwisawo marudzi ose akaitenderera. Ndichavaparadza zvachose ndichivaita kuti vave chinhu chinokatyamadza, nechinhu chinoridzirwa tsamwa nechinhu chokutukisa nacho." 
Jeremiah25:10 Uyewo ndichagumisa mukati mavo chikwe-e chokuseka kana mheremhere yokufara nokupemberera mwenga kana kufarira murume wacho kana kurira kwemakuyo nemwenje werambi.’ 
Jeremiah25:11 “Nyika ino yose ichava dongo zvaro risina kana chinhu; marudzi ose iwaya achashandira mambo weBhabhironi kwamakumi manomwe amakore. 
Jeremiah25:12 Mushure mokunge kwapera makore makumi manomwe ndichazoranga mambo weBhabhironi nevechirudzi ivavo nenyika yevaKaridhea pamusana pouipi hwavo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, nyika yacho ndichiiparadza zvachose." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ndichaita kuti nyika iyoyo iwirwe nezvose zvakabva pamuromo pangu zvichinangana nayo, zvose zvakanyorwa mubhuku rino zvakaporofitwa naJeremiya zvichinangana namarudzi evanhu ose zvawo." 
Jeremiah25:14 “Zvichavapo ndezvokuti ndudzi zhinji namadzimambo makuru chaiwo achatovaita varanda kunyange ivo. Ini ndichavapa zvinofambirana nezviito zvavo uye namabasa avanoita namaoko avo.” 
Jeremiah25:15 Nechikonzero ichochi Tenzi Mwari weIsiraeri akanditi, “Tambira mukombe uyu uri muruoko rwangu wewaini yehasha dzangu, ugoita kuti marudzi ose kwandinenge ndakutuma aunwe." 
Jeremiah25:16 Vachaunwa vagodhadharika vagopengeswa nebakatwa randichatumira pakati pavo.” 
Jeremiah25:17 Saizvozvowo ini ndakatora mukombe waiva muruoko rwaTenzi ndikaita kuti marudzi ose kwandakatumwa naTenzi aunwe," 
Jeremiah25:18 kuJerusaremu namaguta okwaJudha, uye namadzimambo ayo namachinda acho kuti ave matongo asina kana chinhu, ave chinhu chinoridzirwa tsamwa charengererwa rushambwa sezvazviri pari nhasi" 
Jeremiah25:19 kwouya Farao mambo weIjipiti namakurukota ake namachinda ake navanhu vake vose 
Jeremiah25:20 pamwechete namabvakure ose ari pakati pavo, madzimambo ose enyika yeUzi uye namadzimambo enyika yavaFirisitia ose zvawo (Ashikeroni neGaza neEkironi nechitsama chakasara chevokuAshidhodhi)" 
Jeremiah25:21 kwouyawo Edhomu neMoabhu navanakomana vokwaAmoni 
Jeremiah25:22 namadzimambo ose eTire uye madzimambo ose eSidhoni namadzimambo okumahombekombe kumhiri kwegungwa," 
Jeremiah25:23 kwoti Dhedhani neTema neBhuzi navose vanoveura makona evhudzi ravo 
Jeremiah25:24 namadzimambo ose eArabhia namadzimambo ose avanhu vakasangana-sangana vagere kurenje 
Jeremiah25:25 uye madzimambo ose okwaZimuri namadzimambo ose okuEramu namadzimambo ose okuMidhia 
Jeremiah25:26 kozoti madzimambo ose okuchamhembe okure neepedyo mumwe nemumwe uyewo umambo hwose zvahwo hwapanyika pasi pose zvapo. Mushure mavo mambo Sheshaki achazonwawo. 
Jeremiah25:27 Wozobva wovataurira kuti, zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, “Inwai muraradze mugorutsa muputsike musingazomukazve pamusana pebakatwa randava kutuma pakati penyu." 
Jeremiah25:28 “Kana vakaramba kugamuchira mukombe iwoyo muruoko rwako kuti vaunwe, vaudze kuti, zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, ‘Munofanira kutonwa chete!" 
Jeremiah25:29 Nokuti chionai, ndava kutotangisa kumutsira nhamo guta rinodaidzwa nezita rangu. Zvino imi ndipo pamungarege kurangwa here? Zvokurangwa hamumborega kurangwa nokuti ndiri kudaidzira bakatwa pavagari vose zvavo vepasi pano ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo.’" 
Jeremiah25:30 “Naizvozvo iwe unofanira kuvaporofitira uchivaudza mashoko aya ose uchivati: “Tenzi achadzvova mudenga umu, inzwi rake richibuda muNzvimbo yake Inoera. Achadzvovera vedanga rake zvinotyisa achidaidzira sezvinoitwa navanokanya magirepisi achinangana navagari vapanyika." 
Jeremiah25:31 Ruzha rwacho ruchariridza kusvikira kwakaperera nyika Nokuti Tenzi ane mhosva yaari kupa marudzi, ari kuzogadza dare vanhu vose, vakaipa achivauraya nebakatwa. Ndozviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah25:32 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo chionai, nhamo ichauira; ndudzi nendudzi dzavanhu, dutu guru remhepo riri kutangisa kuuya richibva kumiganhu yapasi." 
Jeremiah25:33 Pazuva iroro vanenge vaurayiwa naTenzi vachati rakata kubvira kwainovambira nyika kusvikira kwainopererawo. Havachazochemwa kana kuunganidzwa kana kuvigwa. Vachava ndove zvayo pamusoro pevhu. 
Jeremiah25:34 Ungudzai imi vafudzi mucheme muumburuke mudota, imi madzichangamire amatanga nokuti mazuva okuurayiwa nokupararira kwenyu asvika, uye imi muchati mwarara somudziyo wakanakisa." 
Jeremiah25:35 Pachasara pasina nzvimbo yokupotera yavafudzi kana yokupukunyukira yamadzichangamire amatanga. 
Jeremiah25:36 Inzwa unzwe, kuchema kuri kuita vafudzi nokuungudza kuri kuita madzichangamire amatanga, nokuti Tenzi oparadza mafuro avo," 
Jeremiah25:37 nezvo matanga akanyatsozvigarira zvawo anobva aparadzwa nokuda kwehasha dzinotyisa dzaTenzi. 
Jeremiah25:38 Asimuka seshumba yabva painohwanda nokuti nyika yavo haisisina chinhu pamusana pebakatwa romudzvinyiriri napamusanawo pehasha dzaTenzi dzinotyisa. 
Jeremiah26:1 Mukutanga kutonga kwaJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha, shoko iri rakabva kuna Tenzi rokuti," 
Jeremiah26:2 “Zvanzi naTenzi mira muruvanze rwemba yaTenzi utaurire vamaguta ose zvawo okwaJudha vanouya kuzonamata mumba yaTenzi mashoko ose andinokuudza kuti uvataurire, rega kuva neshoko rimwe zvaro raunovanza." 
Jeremiah26:3 Zvimwe vangateerere, munhu wose akatendeuka pakuita kwake kwakaipa kuitira kuti ndirege kuita kwavari chakaipa chandanga ndavarongera pamusana pezvakaipa zvavakaita." 
Jeremiah26:4 “Unofanira kuvataurira kuti zvanzi naTenzi kana mukarega kunditeerera kuti mufambe mumurau wangu wandakaisa pamberi penyu," 
Jeremiah26:5 kana kunzwa mazwi avaranda vangu vaporofita vandinokutumirai zvechimbichimbi kunyange zvazvo imi musina kumboita hanya nazvo," 
Jeremiah26:6 nezvo Temberi iyi ndava kuiita sezvandakaita yokuShiro uye guta rino ndichariita kuti rive guta rakarengererwa rushambwa pamarudzi ose apasi pano.” 
Jeremiah26:7 Vapristi navaporofita navanhu vose vakanzwa Jeremiya achitaura mazwi iwaya mumba yaTenzi. 
Jeremiah26:8 Jeremiya paakanga apedza kutaura zvose zvaakanga audzwa naTenzi kuti ataurire vanhu vose, ipapo vapristi navaporofita vakamubata vachiti," 
Jeremiah26:9 “Unotopafa chete! Waporofitirei muzita raTenzi uchiti Temberi ino ichaitwa sezvakaitwa yokuShiro uye kuti guta rino richava dongo risina anogaramo?” Izvozvo vanhu vose vakaunganira Jeremiya imomo mumba yaTenzi. 
Jeremiah26:10 Machinda okwaJudha paakanzwa zvinhu izvi akabuda achibva mumuzinda wamambo achienda kumba yaTenzi akasvikogara muzvigaro zvawo panopindwa napo kuSuo Guru Idzva remba yaTenzi. 
Jeremiah26:11 Vapristi navaporofita vakataurira machinda navanhu vose kuti, “Murume uyu anofanira kutongerwa rufu nokuti aporofita achinangana neguta rino iri sezvamazvinzwirawo imi nenzeve dzenyu.”" 
Jeremiah26:12 Jeremiya ndokubva ataura kumachinda ose nokuvanhu vose achiti, “Tenzi akandituma kuzoporofita ndakanangana nemba ino uye neguta iro rino mashoko ose amanzwa." 
Jeremiah26:13 Saka zvino chitogadziridzai nzira dzenyu nezviito zvenyu mugoteerera inzwi raTenzi, Mwari wenyu. Tenzi achadzora mwoyo orega kuita kwamuri zvaakareva nezvenyu." 
Jeremiah26:14 Kana ndiri ini, hezvika ndiri mumaoko menyu, itai henyu neni zvamunoona kuti zvakanaka uye zviri pamwero." 
Jeremiah26:15 Asi munofanira kunyatsoziva kuti kana mukandiuraya muchapfukirwa neropa risina mhaka, imi, neguta rino navagari varo nokuti zvechokwadi Tenzi akandituma kwamuri kuzotaura mashoko ose iwaya muchizvinzwa nenzeve dzenyu.”" 
Jeremiah26:16 Machinda navanhu vose vakabva vati kuvapristi nokuvaporofita, “Murume uyu haafanire kutongerwa rufu nokuti ataura kwatiri muzita raTenzi, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah26:17 Ipapo vamwe vakuru vakuru venyika iyi akasumuka akataurira gungano ravanhu vose ivavo kuti," 
Jeremiah26:18 “Mika wokuMoresheti akamboporofita mumazuva aHezikiya mambo wokwaJudha achitaurira vanhu vose vokwaJudha achiti: “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo guta reZioni richarimwa somunda, Jerusaremu ichava murwi wamatongo gomo reTemberi richasara rava sango zvaro riri pakatunhumara." 
Jeremiah26:19 Ko Hezekiya mambo wokwaJudha neJudha yose vakamuuraya here? Haana here kutya Tenzi akateterera kuti Tenzi amuitire tsiye nyoro? Uye Tenzi haana here kuzodzora mwoyo orega kuita kwaari zvakaipa zvaakanga avazivisa? Asi isu tava kutozvidenhera nhamo huru!” 
Jeremiah26:20 Kune mumwe murume akaporofita muzita raTenzi, ainzi Uriya mwanakomana wokwaShemiya anobva kuKiraitijearimu. Iyeyo akaporofitawo achinangana neguta iro rino iri nenyika ino namazwi akafanana neari kutaurwa naJeremiya." 
Jeremiah26:21 Mashoko iwayo paakasvika munzeve dzamambo Jehoyakimu pamwechete navarwi vake vehondo namachinda ake, mambo akada kumuuraya. Asi Uriya paakazvinzwawo akatya ndokubva atiza akaenda kuIjipiti." 
Jeremiah26:22 Mambo Jehoyakimu akazotumira kuIjipiti vamwe varume, vanoti Erinatani mwanakomana waAkibhori navamwewo varume vaaiva navo." 
Jeremiah26:23 Vakandotora Uriya kuIjipiti vakauya naye kuna mambo Jehoyakimu, mambo akamuuraya nebakatwa akakanda chitunha chake munzvimbo yokuviga voruzhinji." 
Jeremiah26:24 Asi Jeremiya akachengeteka mumaoko maAhikamu mwanakomana wokwaShafani zvokuti haana kuzoturirwa kuvanhu kuti vamuuraye. 
Jeremiah27:1 Pakutanga kutonga kwakaita Zedhekia mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha, kwakauya shoko iri kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi." 
Jeremiah27:2 Tenzi akanditi, “Zvigadzirire joko nezvitorobho zvaro uzvibope naro pamutsipa pako" 
Jeremiah27:3 utumire shoko kuna mambo weEdhomu namambo weMoabhu namambo wavanakomana vokwaAmoni namambo wokuTire namambo wokuSidhoni uritumire nenhume dzakauya kuJerusaremu kuna Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha.” 
Jeremiah27:4 Uvati vatakurire vakuru vavo shoko iri rokuti: “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri" 
Jeremiah27:5 zvino mochindozivisa vakuru venyu shoko iri rokuti, ‘Inini namasimba angu makuru nesimba roruoko rwangu ndini ndakasika nyika pamwechete navanhu nemhuka zviri panyika. Ndinozvipa kunaani zvake wandinenge ndaona kuti zvakakodzera kumupa." 
Jeremiah27:6 Pari zvino nyika dzose idzodzi ndadziisa mumaoko maNebhukadhineza, mambo weBhabhironi, muranda wangu. Ndakamupawo zvikara zvesango kuti zvimushandire." 
Jeremiah27:7 Marudzi ose avanhu achamushandira iye nomwanakomana wake nomuzukuru wake mukomana kusvikirawo jana renyika yakewo rasvika rokuti marudzi mazhinji namadzimambo makuru chaiwo vazomuitawo muranda wavo.’ 
Jeremiah27:8 “Asi kuwana rudzi kana nyika zvayo yazoramba kushandira Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi uyu, ruchirega kurerekera mutsipa warwo pasi pejoko ramambo weBhabhironi, ndicharanga rudzi irworwo nebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda kusvikira ndarutsakatisa nesimba roruoko rwake. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah27:9 Saka imi chiregai kuteerera vaporofita venyu kana vashoperi venyu kunyange varoti venyu kana vafemberi venyu vemaminimini kana vanhu venyu vakaromba mushonga vari kukutii, hamusi kuzoshandira mambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah27:10 Chiripo chaicho ndechokuti inhema chaidzo dzavari kukuporofitirai zvichakusvitsai pakubviswa muchiendeswa kure nenyika yenyu izvozvo ini ndichakudzingai muno mugoparara. 
Jeremiah27:11 Asi rudzi rupi norupi runenge rwaunza mutsipa warwo pasi pejoko ramambo weBhabhironi rukamushandira ndicharusiya ruri munyika yarwo ruchirima rugeremo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah27:12 Ndakataurawo zvimwechetezvo kuna Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha ndichiti, “Rerekerai mitsipa yenyu pasi pejoko ramambo weBhabhironi mumushandire iye navanhu vake mugorarama." 
Jeremiah27:13 Ko imi navanhu venyu chii chaizvo chamungafire nebakatwa neshangwa nenzara nedenda sezvataura Tenzi pamusoro perudzi rupi norupi runenge rwaramba kushandira mambo weBhabhironi? 
Jeremiah27:14 Regai kuteerera zvinotaura vaporofita ivavo vari kukutii: ‘Hamusi kuzoshandira mambo weBhabhironi, nokuti vari kukuporofitirai nhema.’" 
Jeremiah27:15 Zvanzi naTenzi ini handina kuvatuma, asi vari kuporofita zvenhema muzita rangu, zvichakonzera kuti ndikudzingei muchibva matsakatika imi pamwechete navaporofita vari kukuporofitirai vacho.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Ndakazotaurira vapristi navanhu vose ivava ndichiti: “Zvanzi naTenzi, musateerere zvinorehwa navaporofita venyu vari kukuporofitirai vachiti, ‘Chiregai muone zvenyu, midziyo yemba yaTenzi yava kutodzorerwa kuno izvozvi ichibva kuBhabhironi’ nokuti vari kukuporofitirai zvenhema." 
Jeremiah27:17 Regai kuvateerera! Shandirai mambo weBhabhironi murarame. Chii chaizvo chingaitirwe kuti guta rino rive dongo? 
Jeremiah27:18 Kana vari vaporofitawo uye kana vane shoko raTenzi, regaika vateterere kuna Tenzi wehondo nehondo kuti midziyo yasara mumba yaTenzi nomumba yamambo wokwaJudha nomuJerusaremu irege kuenda kuBhabhironi”" 
Jeremiah27:19 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo nezvemisimboti nezibhavhu riya nezvigadzikiro zvaro nemimwe midziyo yose yakasara muguta rino," 
Jeremiah27:20 zvisina kutorwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi paakatapa muJerusaremu Jekoniya mwanakomana waJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha navose vokumbahuru yokwaJudha neveJerusaremu achivaendesa kuBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah27:21 zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri nezvemidziyo yakasara mumba yaTenzi nomumuzinda wamambo wokwaJudha nomuJerusaremu:" 
Jeremiah27:22 “Ichatakurwa igoendwa nayo kuBhabhironi igareko kusvikira musi wandichazofunga zvokuita nayo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndipo pandichaiunzazve kuno ndichiidzosera munzvimbo ino.”" 
Jeremiah28:1 Hananiya anokakavadzana naJeremiya. Mugore rakarero, mukutanga kutonga kwaZedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha mumwedzi wechishanu wegore rechina, Hananiya mwanakomana wokwaAzuru, muporofita wokuguta reGibheoni akataura kwandiri mumba yaTenzi, vapristi navanhu vose varipowo achiti:" 
Jeremiah28:2 “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri ndatyora joko ramambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah28:3 Mumakore maviri ndichadzosera munzvimbo muno midziyo yose yemba yaTenzi yakatorwa naNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi munzvimbo muno achiiendesa kuBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah28:4 Ndichadzoserawo kunzvimbo ino Jekoniya mwanakomana waJehoyakimu, mambo wokwaJudha navakatapwa vose vokwaJudha vakaenda kuBhabhironi ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi. Ndinodaro nokuti ndichatyora joko ramambo weBhabhironi.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Muporofita Jeremiya akabva ataura kumuporofita Hananiya, vapristi varipo navanhu vose vakanga vamire muTemberi yaTenzi." 
Jeremiah28:6 Muporofita Jeremiya akati, “Ameni Tenzi ngaaite saizvozvo, Tenzi ngaaite kuti shoko ravaporofita riitike pachokwadi adzoserewo kunzvimbo ino midziyo iya yemba yaTenzi navakatapwa vose achivatora kuBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah28:7 Asi chinzwa zvino shoko iri randinokutaurira iwe uchizvinzwira vanhu vose zvavo vachinzwawo. 
Jeremiah28:8 Vaporofita vakatitangira ini newe kubvira karekare, vakaporofita nezvehondo neshangwa yenzara nedenda zvaizowira nyika zhinji noumambo hune simba." 
Jeremiah28:9 Kwaiti kana muporofita akaporofita nezvorugare, shoko romuporofita iyeyo rikazoitika, ndopaizozikanwa kuti zvechokwadi Tenzi ndiye akatuma muporofita iyeyo.”" 
Jeremiah28:10 Ipapo muporofita Hananiya akakumura joko mumutsipa momuporofita Jeremiya akarityora. 
Jeremiah28:11 Hananiya ndokutaura vanhu vose vachinzwa achiti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, ndichatyorawo saizvozvi joko raNebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi ndichiribvisa mumutsipa wamarudzi ose avanhu mumakore maviri.” Asi muporofita Jeremiya akabva aenda hake." 
Jeremiah28:12 Garegare, mushure mokunge muporofita Hananiya atyora joko mumutsipa womuporofita Jeremiya, izwi raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya rikati," 
Jeremiah28:13 “Enda undoudza Hananiya kuti zvanzi naTenzi, wakatyoraka iwe joko rechimuti asi uchatogadzira joko resimbi rokuritsiva naro" 
Jeremiah28:14 nokuti zvanzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, ndaisa pamutsipa yamarudzi ose avanhu joko resimbi, rouranda hwokushandira Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi. Vanofanira kumushandira nokuti ndatomupa kunyange nezvikara zvesango.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Muporofita Jeremiya ndokuti kumuporofita Hananiya, “Chinzwa Hananiya! Tenzi haana kumbokutuma iwe! Asi uri kuita kuti vanhu ava vavimbe namanyepo." 
Jeremiah28:16 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Chinzwa, ndava kukupfuudza pamusoro payo nyika.’ Iro gore rino chairo uchafa nokuti wakaburitsa mazwi okupandukira Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah28:17 Mugore rakarero, mumwedzi wechinomwe, muporofita Hananiya akabvawo afa." 
Jeremiah29:1 Haanoi mashoko etsamba yakatumirwa naJeremiya ichibva kuJerusaremu ichienda kuvakuru vakuru vose vevakatapwa vaya, nokuvapristi nokuvaporofita nokuvanhu vose vakanga vatapwa naNebhukadhineza muJerusaremu vachiendwa navo kuutapwa kuBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah29:2 Izvozvo maiva mushure mokunge mambo Jekoniya naamai vamambo uyu navayuniki namachinda okwaJudha neveJerusaremu nenyanzvi dzamabasa amaoko nemhizha dzezvoutare dzabva muJerusaremu. 
Jeremiah29:3 Tsamba iyi yakatumidzirwa namaoko aErasa mwanakomana waShafani aina Gemariya mwanakomana waHirikiya akatumwa naZedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha kuBhabhironi kuna Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi ichiti: 
Jeremiah29:4 “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri kunemi nhapwa dzose dzandakaendesa kuBhabhironi kuutapwa dzichibva kuJerusaremu:" 
Jeremiah29:5 “Vakai dzimba mugaremo zvenyu, simai mapindu mudye zvinobudamo." 
Jeremiah29:6 Roorai vakadzi muve navana vakomana navasikana. Roorerai vakadzi vanakomana venyu muroodzewo vanasikana venyu kuti vabereke vana vakomana navasikana muwande ikoko murege kushomeka. 
Jeremiah29:7 Vavarirai kuti guta randinenge ndakuendesai muutapwa rive norugare murinamatire kuna Tenzi nokuti kugarika kwaro ndiko kugarikawo kwenyu. 
Jeremiah29:8 Chandinodariro ndechokuti, zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri, Musanyengedzwe navaporofita venyu vari mukati menyu. Musanzwe zviroto zvavanorotomoka" 
Jeremiah29:9 nokuti inhema dzavanoprofita kwamuri muzita rangu. Handina kumbovatuma, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah29:10 “Nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, kana Bhabhironi yapedza makore makumi manomwe, ndichazokushanyirai ndigokuitirai zvandavimbisa ndigokudzoserai kunzvimbo ino," 
Jeremiah29:11 nokuti ini ndinoziva zvandakakurongerai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Zvirongwa zvacho ndezvokuti zvinhu zvikunakirei kwete kuti zvikuipirei, kuri kukupai upenyu muneramangwana hune chitarisiro." 
Jeremiah29:12 Ipapo muchazochema kwandiri muchiuya kuzondinamata, ini ndichakunzwai." 
Jeremiah29:13 Muchanditsvaka mugondiwana kana manditsvaka nemwoyo wose. 
Jeremiah29:14 Muchandiwana ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi ndigokudzoserai makomborero enyu ndigokukokorodzai kumarudzi ose nokunzvimbo dzose kwandakudzingirai ndichikudzoserai kwandakambokubvisai pandakakuendesai kuutapwa, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Pamusana pokuti imi mava kuti Tenzi azotimutsira vaporofita muBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah29:16 hezvinoi zviri kutaura Tenzi nezvamambo agere pachigaro choumambo hwokwaDhavhidhi uye nezvevanhu vose vagere muguta rino ivo hama dzenyu dzisina kuenda nemi kuutapwa. 
Jeremiah29:17 Tenzi wehondo nehondo anoti, ‘Regai muone, ndava kuvatumira bakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda. Uye ndivaite samaonde akaora kwazvo aipa zvokuti haadyiki.’" 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndichavaronda nebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda ndichiita kuti vave chinhu chinotyisa kunyika dzose dzapasi pano charengererwa rushambwa chinodederwa, chinoridzirwa tsamwa nechiseko zvacho mukati memarudzi kwandakavadzingira" 
Jeremiah29:19 nokuti vakaramba kuteerera mashoko angu ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi; andakaramba ndichitumira kwamuri navaranda vangu vaporofita. Asi imi zvokuteerera, makaramba ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah29:20 Ipapo inzwai shoko raTenzi, imi mose nhapwa dzandakabvisa kuJerusaremu ndichidziendesa kuBhabhironi inzwai shoko raTenzi." 
Jeremiah29:21 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri nezvaAhabhu mwanakomana waKoraya uye nezvaZedhekiya mwanakomana waMaaseya vari kuporofita kwamuri muzita rangu, chinzwai, ndichavaisa mumaoko maNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi achavauraya makatarisa." 
Jeremiah29:22 Ivava ava vachakonzera kuti nhapwa dzose dzokwaJudha dziri muBhabhironi dzizogarotaura tsumo yorushambwa yokuti: ‘Tenzi ngaakuite hwaZedhekiya naAhabhu vakakangwa mumoto namambo weBhabhironi’ 
Jeremiah29:23 nokuti vanoita zvinhu zvoupenzi muIsiraeri, vakaita upombwe namadzimai evamwe vavo vakataura muzita rangu zvinhu zvokunyepa zvandisina kumbovatuma. Ini iyeni ndinozviziva uye ndini chapupu chacho. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Kuna Shemaya wokuNeheramu iti: 
Jeremiah29:25 “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri: ‘Wakatumiraka iwe matsamba muzita rako kuvanhu vose vari muJerusaremu nokunaZefaniya mwanakomana wokwaMaaseya mupristi, nokuvapristi vose’ uchiti," 
Jeremiah29:26 ‘Tenzi akuita mupristi panzvimbo pomupristi Jehoyadha kuti uve mukuru wokuona nezvomumba maTenzi uye benzi rose rinenge richiporofita riri pasi pako kuti uriise muchitokisi nesimbi muhuro.’ 
Jeremiah29:27 Zvino wakarega nei kutsiura Jeremiya wokuAnatoti ari kukuporofita? 
Jeremiah29:28 Hezvi akatitumira shoko kuBhabhironi rokuti, ‘Kuchaita nguva ndefu chaiyo muri kuutapwa. Chivakai dzimba mugaremo henyu musime mapindu mudye michero yawo.’ ”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Mupristi Zefaniya vakaverenga tsamba iyoyi muporofita Jeremiya achizvinzwira. 
Jeremiah29:30 Izwi raTenzi rakabva rauya kuna muporofita Jeremiya rikati," 
Jeremiah29:31 “Endesa shoko kunhapwa dzose rokuti hezvinoi zviri kutaurwa naTenzi zvakanangana naShemaya wokuNeheramu. Pamusana pokuti Shemaya akaporofita kwamuri ini ndisina kumutuma akakuitai kuti muvimbe nenhema," 
Jeremiah29:32 naizvozvo Tenzi anoti ndicharanga Shemaya wokuNeheramu nezvizvarwa zvake. Hapana kana nomumwe wokwake achava mupenyu kuti azoonawo zvakanaka zvandichaitira vanhu vangu, ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTenzi nokuti akataura mazwi okupandukira Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah30:1 Shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi richiti," 
Jeremiah30:2 “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, nyora mubhuku mashoko ose andakakutaurira" 
Jeremiah30:3 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi mazuva ari kuuya andichadzosera vanhu vangu vokwaIsiraeri nevokwaJudha makomborero, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Uye ndichavaunzazve kunyika yandakapa kumadzibaba avo vagoiitazve yavo.”" 
Jeremiah30:4 Aya mazwi akataurwa naTenzi achireva nezvevokwaIsiraeri novokwaJudha: 
Jeremiah30:5 “Zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Takanzwa mhere inodederesa inotyisa isina rugare.’" 
Jeremiah30:6 “Imbobvunzai zvenyu muzvione, munhurume angapone mwana here? Zvamboita sei chaizvo kuti ini ndione murume wose akabata chiuno namaoko somukadzi ari pakusununguka? Uso hwomunhu wose kuchenuruka kudai zvaita sei chaizvo?" 
Jeremiah30:7 “Hezvino ndakadai, ‘Zuva iroro izuva guru, hakuna kana nerimwe rakaita sairoro, inguva yenhamo chaiyo kune vokwaJakobho asi vachanunurwa zvavo mariri.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:8 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Musi iwoyo zvichaitika ndezvokuti ndichatyora joko ndichiribvisa mumutsipa mavo uye ndichagwishura tambo dzenyu, vechirudzi havazombova madzichangamire avo." 
Jeremiah30:9 “Asi kutoti vachashandira Tenzi, Mwari wavo naDhavhidhi mambo wavo wandichavamutsira." 
Jeremiah30:10 “Zvino iwe Jakobho, muranda wangu, rega zvako kutya, kana kudumbirwa nazvo iwe Isiraeri, ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi, nokuti, chionai, ndichakununurai ikoko kunzvimbo iri kure. Vana vako ndichavanunura munyika youranda hwavo. VokwaJakobho vachadzoka vavave norunyararo norudekaro, hapana achavatyisidzira" 
Jeremiah30:11 nokuti ndinemi kuitira kuti ndikununurei, ndizvo zvinorehwa naTenzi. Nokuti marudzi ekwandakakumwararidzai ndichaaparadza imi handisi kuzokuparadzai zvachose, asi ndichakurangaiwo nemwerowo wakafanira, handisi kuzokuregai musina kurangwa.”" 
Jeremiah30:12 Chikonzero ndechokuti, zvanzi naTenzi, “Kukuvara kwenyu hakucharapiki, ronda renyu rakakurisisa." 
Jeremiah30:13 Chichemo chako hachina achapipirira, hapana mushonga weronda rako, zvokupora haupore." 
Jeremiah30:14 “Vadiwa vako vose vakukanganwa, havana kana hanya newe nokuti ndakakurova nokurova kwomuvengi, chirango chomuvengi ane utsinye nokuti mhosva yako ihuru, nokuti zvitadzo zvako zvakawanda." 
Jeremiah30:15 Chaunochema kukuvadzwa kwako chii? Marwadzo ako haachapora Pamusana pokukura kwemhosva yako, pamusanawo pokuwanda kwezvitadzo zvako, ndokusaka ndakaitawo izvozvi kwauri." 
Jeremiah30:16 “Naizvozvo vose vanokuparadza vachaparadzwawo, uye vavengi vako vose zvavo, mumwe nomumwe wavo vachaenda kuutapwa. Vanokupamba iwe vachavawo nhapwa. Vose vanokuita nyama yamagora ini ndichavaitawo nyama yamagora" 
Jeremiah30:17 nokuti ndichakudzosera utano hwako maronda ako ndichiaporesa ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi pamusana pokuti vakakutumidza kuti ‘Musemwa.’ Vachitokuti, ‘Zionimurambwanavose.’ ”" 
Jeremiah30:18 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Chionai, ndichadzosera makomborero omumatende evokwaJakobho ndichiitira ngoni mavo mavagere. Guta richavakwa pachimudhuri charo muzindawo uchamira pawaiva."
