Jeremiah30:19 “Mazviri muchabuda nziyo dzokutenda nezhowezhowe ravaiti vemafaro. Ndichaita kuti vawande havasi kuzombova vashoma. Ndichaita kuti varemekedzwe vachange vasiri vanhuwo zvavo. 
Jeremiah30:20 Vana vavo vachaita zvavakanga vari kare, gungano ravo richadzikazve midzi paneni iniwo ndicharanga vose vanovaonesa nhamo." 
Jeremiah30:21 “Jinda ravo richange riri mumwe wavo ivo, mutongi wavo achimuka mukati mavo imomo. Ndichamuswededza pedyo iye agobvawo asvika pandiri nokuti ndiani chaizvo angabva atofemera hake kusvika pandiri? Ndozviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah30:22 Muchavawo vanhu vangu ini ndichivawo Mwari wenyu.” 
Jeremiah30:23 Hero dutu remhepo raTenzi rovhuvhuta rakashatirwa chaizvo riri chamupupuri chaicho chine simba chichaputikira musoro wavanhu vakaipa. 
Jeremiah30:24 Hasha dzinotyisa dzaTenzi hadzimboserera kusvikira atopedza kuita zvaakaronga mumwoyo make. Mumazuva anotevera acho munozonyatsozvinzwisisisa kwazvo. 
Jeremiah31:1 “Panguva iyoyo, zvanzi naTenzi ini ndinenge ndiri Mwari wedzimhuri dzose dzeIsiraeri naivowo vachava vanhu vangu.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Vanhu vakapunyuka bakatwa vaya vakawana nyasha kurenje, paitsvaga Isiraeri runyararo." 
Jeremiah31:3 Ini Tenzi ndakazvionesa kwauri ndiri nechokure. Ndakakuda norudo rusina mugumo ndokusaka ini ndakaramba ndakangotendeka kwauri. 
Jeremiah31:4 “Ndichakuvaka, ugovakika, iwe mhandara, Isiraeri. Uchazvishongedza zvakare netambureni uendewo uchindodzana pamutambo navanenge vachifara." 
Jeremiah31:5 “Uyewo uchasima minda yamagirepisi mumakomo eSamaria. Vasimi vachasima vagofarira kudya nomuchero wacho 
Jeremiah31:6 nokuti kuchava nezuva rokuti vachengetedzi vachayambira vari munyika yokwaEfuremu yamakomo vachiti, ‘Simukai tikwire kuguta reZioni kuna Tenzi, Mwari wedu.’ ”" 
Jeremiah31:7 Chikonzero ndechokuti, zvanzi naTenzi, “Imbai muchiita zvokutodaidzira muchifarira vokwaJakobho mushevedzere kwazvo muchiitira changamire wendudzi nendudzi dzavanhu, muparidze murumbidze muchiti, ‘Tenzi akanunura vanhu vake chitsama chavakasara veIsiraeri.’" 
Jeremiah31:8 “Chinzwai ndichavauyisa ndichivabvisa kunyika yokuchamhembe ndichivakokorodza kure kure kwakaperera nyika chaiko pakati pavo paina mapofu nevakaremara nomudzimai akazvitakura pamwechete nomukadzi anenge achirwadzwa pakusununguka. Vachadzoka kuno vari gurusvusvu guru chairo. 
Jeremiah31:9 “Vachauya vachihwihwidza kuchema, ndichivanyaradza nokuvatungamirira pakudzoka. Ndichavafambisa nomuhova dzemvura, munzira yakati twasu mavasingazofa vakadzedzereka nokuti ini ndiri baba kuIsiraeri uye vokwaEfuremu ndivo dangwe rangu." 
Jeremiah31:10 “Inzwai shoko raTenzi, imi ndudzi nendudzi dzavanhu, muriparidze kure kunyika dzomumahombekombe megungwa. Itii, ‘Nyakumwararisa Isiraeri uya, achaikokorodzazve achizoichengeta sokuchengetedza kunoita mufudzi danga rezvipfuwo zvake.’" 
Jeremiah31:11 “Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti Tenzi akaponesa vokwaJakobho achivanunura mumaoko meane simba kukunda iye. 
Jeremiah31:12 Vachauya vagoimba vachiita zvokudaidzira pamutunhu wakatunhumara weZioni vachifarira mwoyo wakanaka waTenzi, vachifarira mbeswa newaini namafuta eorivhi, vachifarirawo vana vezvipfuwo zvavo nemhuru. Upenyu hwavo huchaita sebindu rinodiridzwa, havachazofazve vakazvidya mwoyo." 
Jeremiah31:13 “Ipapo ndopachapembera kufara, vasikana vodzana zvino, majaya navakura vachifara zvavo. Nhamo yavo yokuchema ndichaishandura kuva kupembera kufara. Ndichavanyaradza ndichivapa mufaro panzvimbo pokusuruvara." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ndichaita kuti vapristi vanakirwe mumwoyo nezvakawanda vanhu vangu vachigutswa nezvakanaka zvangu ndozvinoreva Tenzi.” 
Jeremiah31:15 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Izwi rinonzwika kuRama, kuungudza nokuhwihwidza kuchema Rakeri achiridzira mhere vana vake vachiramba kunyaradzwa nezvevana vake pamusana pokuti havasisipo.”" 
Jeremiah31:16 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Izwi rako ngarichirega kana kuburitsa misodzi mumaziso mako nokuti uchapiwa mubayiro webasa rako, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, uye vachadzoka vachibva kunyika yomuvengi." 
Jeremiah31:17 Chitarisiro chichiripo choupenyu hwako hweramangwana ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi uye vana vako vachadzoka kunyika yavo. 
Jeremiah31:18 “Ndanzwa vokwaEfuremu vachichema nhamo Inga makandipingudza, ndakapinguka sejongosi risina kupingudzwa. Ndidzoserei kwakare ndiite sezvandakanga ndiri nokuti imi ndimi Tenzi, Mwari wangu." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ndinodaro nokuti mushure mokunge ndarasika ndakapinduka, uyewo mushure mokunge ndadzidziswa ndakaombera maoko ndakabatwa nenyadzi ndikadumbirwa nazvo nokuti ndaitenge ndakafumuka nezvandakaita kubvira pauduku hwangu." 
Jeremiah31:20 “VokwaEfuremu ava mwanakomana wangu wapamwoyo here chaizvo? Ndiye here mwana wangu wandinodisa? Chinondipa kudaro ndechokuti pose pandinotaura zvokumuyambira ndinenge ndichingomufunga chete. Ndokusaka mwoyo wangu uchimusuwa, ndichatomuitira tsitsi chete, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah31:21 Zviisirei mucherechedzo mugwara muzvigadzirire zvikwangwani zvokuzotevedza, nyatsofungai mugwagwa mukuru, nzira yamakaenda nayo. Chidzoka nhai mhandara Isiraeri udzokere kumaguta ako iwaya." 
Jeremiah31:22 “Kusvikira rini chaizvo uchingowaya-waya kudai, nhaiwe mwanasikana asina kutendeka? Chavapo ndechokuti Tenzi asika chinhu chitsva panyika chokuti munhukadzi ndiye ava kupfimba munhurume.”" 
Jeremiah31:23 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, “Vachamutsiridzazve munyika yokwaJudha nomumaguta ayo pandinenge ndavadzosera makomborero avo, kutaura, chikomborero ichi chokuti: “Tenzi ngaakukomborere iwe musha wokururama iyewe chikomo chinoera!" 
Jeremiah31:24 Izvozvo nyika yokwaJudha namaguta ayo ose vachagarisana pamwechete navarimi vaya vanopota-pota zvavo namatanga avo ezvipfuwo 
Jeremiah31:25 nokuti ini ndichagutsa mweya wakaneta ndichisimbaradza mweya wose wakarukutika. 
Jeremiah31:26 “Ndakapepuka ndikaona kuti ihope dzangu dzanga dzichindinakira. 
Jeremiah31:27 “Chinzwai, zvanzi naTenzi mazuva ari kuuya andichasima imba yokwaIsiraeri nemba yokwaJudha vanhu nemhuka." 
Jeremiah31:28 Zvimwe zvichazoitika ndezvokuti sokuona kwandakaita vachidzipurwa nokupazwa vachikurirwa vachiparadzwa nhamo dzichivawira saizvozvo ndichatoonawo kuti vavakwa nokusimwa, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah31:29 Mumazuva iwayo vanhu vacharega kutaura muromo wokuti: “Madzibaba akadya magirepisi anovava, nezvo vana vaita ugugu mumazino." 
Jeremiah31:30 “Asi kutoti munhu wose anofanira kufira chitadzo chake, nyakudya magirepisi anovava ndiye ane mazino achaita ugugu." 
Jeremiah31:31 “Chionai, zvanzi naTenzi mazuva achasvika andichaita chitenderano chitsva nemba yokwaIsiraeri nemba yokwaJudha." 
Jeremiah31:32 Chichange chisina kufanana nechitenderano chiya chandakaita namadzitateguru avo pandakavabata ruoko ndichivaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti, chitenderano changu chavakaputsa kunyange zvazvo ini ndiri ini ndaiva murume wavo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah31:33 Asi ichi ndochitenderano chandichaita nemba yeIsiraeri mushure memazuva iwayo, ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi, chokuti: “Ndichauisa mutemo wangu mavari ndichiunyora pamwoyo pavo. Ini ndichava Mwari wavo, ivo vachivawo vanhu vangu." 
Jeremiah31:34 Kuchange kusisina zvokudzidzisanazve mumwe nomumwe, hama nehama, munhu achiti, ‘Zivawo Tenzi,’ nokuti vose zvavo vachandiziva kubvira kumuduku-duku kusvikira kumukuru wacho ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi nokuti ndichavaregerera uipi hwavo uye chitadzo chavo handichazombochirangarirazve.”" 
Jeremiah31:35 Zvanzi naTenzi, iye anopa kuti zuva rivhenekere masikati nokurongera mwedzi zvokugara uchiita nenyenyedzi kuvhenekera usiku, iye anobvongodza gungwa zvokuti mafungu atinhire, zita rake ndiYahweh wehondo nehondo." 
Jeremiah31:36 Kana urongwa ihwohu hukabva pamberi pangu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi ndopachozorega zvizvarwa zveIsiraeri kuva rudzi pamberi pangu narini wose." 
Jeremiah31:37 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Kana matenga mudenga'mu achigona kuerwa, uye ugaro hwenyika muvhu umu huchigona kuongororwa, iniwo ndopandingarase zvizvarwa zvose zveIsiraeri ndichivarasira twose twavakabata, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah31:38 Chinzwai zvanzi naTenzi, “Mazuva achasvika achavakirwa Tenzi guta iri kubvira paNharire yokwaHananero kusvikira kuSuo Guru repakona." 
Jeremiah31:39 Uye tambo yokueresa ichapfuudzwa ipapo yoti tande yakananga kuchikomo cheGarebhu yozotsaukira kuGoa. 
Jeremiah31:40 Bani rose zvaro rezvitunha namadota uye namakura ose kusvikira kuKakova keKidhironi kudzamara kukona yeSuo Guru raMabhiza tonanga kumabvazuva richava rinoera raTenzi. Harisi kuzofa rakadzipurwa kana kukurirwazve kusvikira narini wose.” 
Jeremiah32:1 Shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi mugore regumi rokutonga kwaZedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha riri gore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwaNebhukadhireza. 
Jeremiah32:2 Panguva iyoyo hondo yamambo weBhabhironi yakanga yakakomba Jerusaremu, izvozvo muporofita Jeremiya akanga akapfigirwa munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo yaiva mumuzinda wamambo wokwaJudha." 
Jeremiah32:3 Zvakanga zvaitika ndezvokuti, Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha akanga amuisa mujeri achiti, “Unoporofitirei uchiti, zvanzi naTenzi regai muone ndava kuisa guta rino mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi uye acharitora?" 
Jeremiah32:4 Zedhekiya uyu mambo wokwaJudha haasi kuzopunyuka mumaoko mavaKaridhea. Asi achatoiswa chete mumaoko mamambo weBhabhironi vagotaurirana vakatarisana chiso nechiso vachionana ziso neziso. 
Jeremiah32:5 Achaendesa Zedhekiya kuBhabhironi, achagara ikoko kusvikira ndazomushanyira, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Kunyange zvazvo muchirwisana navaKaridhea sei, hamusi kuzokurira?”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Jeremiya akati, “Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati" 
Jeremiah32:7 chiona, Hananero mwanakomana wokwaSharumu babamudiki vako, achauya kwauri achiti, ‘Tengai zvenyu munda wangu uri kuAnatoti nokuti mvumo yokuununura muchiutenga ndeyenyu imi.’" 
Jeremiah32:8 “Munun'una wangu Hananero akazouyawo kwandiri ndiri munhandare yevachengetedzi vokwamambo maererano neshoko raTenzi akati kwandiri, ‘Tengai henyu munda wangu uri kuAnatoti munyika yokwaBhenjamini nokuti imi ndimi mune mvumo yokutenga neyokuva mwene wawo. Dai henyu mukautenga!’ Ini ndokubva ndaziva kuti ndoshoko raTenzi riya.”" 
Jeremiah32:9 Ini ndakatenga munda iwoyo kuAnatoti kumunun'una wangu Hananero ndikamuerera mari yacho yamashekeri esirivha gumi namanomwe. 
Jeremiah32:10 Ndakasaina zita rangu patsamba yechibvumirano chacho ndikaidhinda ndikawana zvapupu ndikaera mari iyoyo pazvikero. 
Jeremiah32:11 Ndakatora tsamba yakadhindwa iyoyo yechibvumirano chokuutenga yakanga iine mitemo yakawiriranwa nezvaizofanira kutevedzwa zvacho neimwewo tsamba. 
Jeremiah32:12 Ndakapa tsamba iyoyo yechibvumirano chokuutenga kuna Bharuku mwanakomana waNeriya mwanakomana wokwaMahiseya. Ndakavapa munun'una wangu Hananero aripo, zvapupu zviya zvakanga zvasainwa patsamba yechibvumirano chokuutenga zviripowo. Izvozvo paivawo navaJudha vakanga vachiita dare munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ndakarayira Bharuku iyoyo aripo kuti," 
Jeremiah32:14 “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, tora tsamba idzi dzose dziri mbiri dzinoti yechibvumirano chokutengeserana yakadhindwa, neimwe tsamba iyi udzirongedze mumudziyo wevhu kuitira kuti dzichengetekemo kwenguva refu" 
Jeremiah32:15 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri: ‘Dzimba namapindu namapindu amagirepisi zvichatengeseranwazve imo munyika muno'mu.’ ” 
Jeremiah32:16 Mushure mokunge ndagamuchidza tsamba yechibvumirano chokutenga ichocho kuna Bharuku mwanakomana wokwaNeriya, ndakanamata kuna Tenzi ndichiti, “Nhai Tenzi Mwari," 
Jeremiah32:17 imimi ndimi makasika matenga napasi nesimba roruoko rwenyu rakakurisa. Hakuna chinokuomerai," 
Jeremiah32:18 imi munoitira mwoyochena zviuru nezviuru muchitsividza mhosva dzamadzibaba kuvana vavo vanouya mushure mavo. Imi ndimi Mwari mukuru mukuru ana masimba ane zita rokuti Tenzi wehondo nehondo," 
Jeremiah32:19 zvamunoronga zvikuru uye mabasa enyu makuru mune meso anoona nzira dzose dzavanhu munowanisa munhu wese mubayiro wezviito zvake maereranowo nezvinobva mukuita kwake. 
Jeremiah32:20 Imi makaonesa zviratidzo nezvishamiso munyika yeIjipiti kusvikira pari nhasi muIsiraeri nomukati mavanhu vose zvavo mukazviwanira zita sezvazviri nhasi uno. 
Jeremiah32:21 Makaburitsa vanhu venyu vaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti nezviratidzo nezvishamiso nesimba guru roruoko rwenyu noukuru hwenyu uye nezvinhu zvinodederesa kwazvo. 
Jeremiah32:22 Makazovapa nyika ino yamakatsidza kumadzitateguru avo kuti muchazovapa nyika yakanaka, yomukaka nouchi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Vakapindamo vakaiitawo yavo, asi havana kuteerera izwi renyu kana kutevedza mutemo wenyu. Hapana kana chavakaita pazvinhu zvose zvamakavatemera kuti vaite. Ndokusaka imi makaita kuti nhamo iyi ivawire." 
Jeremiah32:24 “Hezvika, zvimudhuri zvinenge musana wenzou zvokukomba nazvo zvazosvikirawo guta rino kuzoritora. Zvino bakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda zvakonzera kuti guta rino riiswe mumaoko mavaKaridhea vari kurirwisa. Zvamakareva zvaitika uye kana imi muri kutozviona." 
Jeremiah32:25 Zvakadaro zvazvo, imi Tenzi Mwari makanditi, ‘Tenga gura iro nemari uve nezvapupu,’ kunyange zvazvo guta irori ratoiswa mumaoko mavaKaridhea.”" 
Jeremiah32:26 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya rikati," 
Jeremiah32:27 “Chinzwa, ndini Tenzi, Mwari wechose chine mweya wokufema, pane chinhu chingabva chanyatsondiomera here?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, chiona, ndava kuisa guta rino mumaoko mavaKaridhea nomumaoko maNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi, iye acharitora." 
Jeremiah32:29 VaKaridhea vari kurwisa guta rino vachauya vagotungidza guta rino nomoto varipise pamwechete nedzimba dzine pamatenga paipisirwa rusenzi kuna Bhaari pachiteurwa mipiro yezvokunwa kuna vamwe vamwari kuti vandishatirise. 
Jeremiah32:30 Chandinodariro ndechokuti vanhu vokwaIsiraeri nevokwaJudha hapana chimwe chavakaita kusara kwouipi chete mumaziso mangu kubvira pauduku hwavo. Vanhu vokwaIsiraeri hakuna chimwe chavakaita kusara kwokungondishatirisa chete netwavanobata namaoko avo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah32:31 Guta rino rakanditsamwisa rikandishatirisa kubvira musi warakavakwa kusvikira pari nhasi, zvokuti handichadi kuriona mumaziso mangu" 
Jeremiah32:32 raparirwa nouipi hwavanhu vokwaIsiraeri navanhu vokwaJudha hwavakaitira kuti vandishatirise, ivo namadzimambo avo namachinda avo navapristi vavo uye navaporofita vavo, vanhu vokwaJudha navagari veJerusaremu." 
Jeremiah32:33 Vakatondipa gotsi vachirega kunditarisa uye kunyange zvazvo ndakaramba ndichivadzidzisa, ivo havana kana kumboteerera kuti vagamuchire zvavaiudzwa." 
Jeremiah32:34 Vakatogadziki zvavo zvandisingade mumba inodaidzwa nezita rangu, kuin'oresa." 
Jeremiah32:35 Vakavakira Bhaari nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira mubani romwanakomana wokwaHinomu pokupira vanakomana vavo navanasikana vavo sezvibayiro kuna Moreki, kunyange zvazvo ini ndisina kuvatuma uye hazvina kana kumbouya mumwoyo mangu kuti vazoita chinhu chandisingade ichi vachipinza vokwaJudha muchitadzo." 
Jeremiah32:36 “Zvino ndokusaka zvava kunzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, maererano neguta irori iri rawati, ‘Ratoiswa mumaoko mamambo weBhabhironi nebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda:’" 
Jeremiah32:37 Chinzwa, ndichavakokorodza kunyika dzose kwandakavadzingira ndakatsamwa ndakashatirwa ndakapaka nehasha zvikuru kwazvo. Ndichavadzorera kunzvimbo ino vachizogara vakachengeteka." 
Jeremiah32:38 Vachava vanhu vangu, ini ndichivawo Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndichavapa mwoyo mumwechete nenzira imwechete kuitira kuti vagonditya narini wose kuti zvivanakire ivo zvichizonakirawo vana vavo vachauya mushure mavo. 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndichaita chitenderano navo chokugara narini wose chokuti handizomborega kuvaitira zvakanaka. Uye ndichaisa mumwoyo mavo mweya wokunditya kuti varege kuzondifuratira. 
Jeremiah32:41 Ndichafarira kuti ndivaitire zvakanaka uye ndichavasima munyika muno nokutendeka ndichizviita nomwoyo wangu wose nomweya wangu wose. 
Jeremiah32:42 “Chikonzero ndechokuti, zvanzi naTenzi, sezvandakangoita kupinza nhamo vanhu ava ndozvandichangoitawo, ndava kuvawanisa zvakanaka zvose zvandakavavimbisa." 
Jeremiah32:43 Minda ichatengwa munyika iyo ino iyi yauri kuti yava renje risisina munhu kana mhuka yatoiswa mumaoko mavaKaridhea. 
Jeremiah32:44 Minda ichatengwa nemari pachisainiranwa zvibvumirano zvichidhindwa zvine umbowo munyika ino iyi yokwaBhenjamini munzvimbo dzomunharaunda meJerusaremu nomumaguta okwaJudha nomumaguta okunyika yemakomo uye nomumaguta okunyika yokumanhika kuShefera uyewo nomumaguta okuNegevhu nokuti ndichavadzosera makomborero avo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah33:1 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya kechipiri paakanga achakapfigirwa munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo 
Jeremiah33:2 rikati, zvanzi naTenzi, iye akasika nyika akaiumba akaisimbisa, zita rake ndiYahweh, anoti," 
Jeremiah33:3 “Daidzirai kwandiri ndinokupindurai ndichikuudzai zvinhu zvikuru zvakavanzika zvamusati mamboziva. 
Jeremiah33:4 Ndinodaro nokuti zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri nezvedzimba dzeguta rino uye nezvemizinda yamadzimambo okwaJudha zvakapazirwa kuti pavakwe zvokuzvidzivirira nazvo kuhondo yezvimidhuri zvinenge musana wenzou nokubakatwa," 
Jeremiah33:5 vaKaridhea vari kuuya muno kuzorwisa nokudzizadza nezvitunha zvavanhu vandicharakatisa ndakatsamwa ndakashatirwa. Chandinodariro ndechokuti guta rino ndakatorifuratira pamusana pouipi hwavo vose. 
Jeremiah33:6 Chionai, ndichariwanisa utano nokuriporesa uye ndichavarapa ndichivaonesa kubudirira chaiko kwakanyanya nokuchengetedzeka." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ndichachinja utapwa hwevokwaJudha noutapwa hwevokwaIsiraeri, ndichavavaka kuti vaite sezvavaiva pakutanga." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndichavachenura kuuipi hwavo hwose hwavakanditadzira nahwo ndigovaregerera uipi hwavo hwose hwavakanditadzira nahwo nokundipandukira kwavo. 
Jeremiah33:9 Jerusaremu ichandiwanisa zita rinopembererwa nokurumbidzwa nembiri kumarudzi ose apasi pano achanzwa zvakanaka zvose zvandinovaitira. Vachatya vakadedereswa nezvakanaka zvacho zvose izvozvo uye pamusana pokubudirira kwandichaiwanisa.” 
Jeremiah33:10 Zvanzi naTenzi, munzvimbo ino iyi yaunoti, “Yava dongo risina munhu kana mhuka, imo mumaguta okwaJudha nomumigwagwa yeJerusaremu zvaparara izvi zvisisina munhu ageremo kana mhuka, muchatozonzwikazve" 
Jeremiah33:11 chikwe-e chokuseka nemheremhere yokufara neyokupemberera mwenga nokufarira murume wacho nomumhanzi wevanoimba vachiuya nemipiro yokutenda kumba yaTenzi vachiti: “Tendai Tenzi wehondo nehondo nokuti Tenzi akanaka nokuti mwoyochena wake hauperi! Ndinodaro nokuti ndichachinja utapwa hwenyika iyoyi igova sapakutanga, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah33:12 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Munzvimbo ino iyoyi yava dongo risisina munhu kana mhuka nomumaguta ayo ose, muchavazve nemisasa yavafudzi vachizorodza zvavo matanga avo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mumaguta omunyika yamakomo nomumaguta okunyika yokunhika kuShefera uye nomumaguta okuNegevhu nokunyika yokwaBhenjamini munzvimbo dzose dzomunharaunda meJerusaremu nomumaguta okwaJudha, matanga ezvipfuwo achapfuura zvakare napasi poruoko rweanoaverenga ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah33:14 “Chinzwai, zvanzi naTenzi, mazuva ari kuuya andichazadzisa nawo zvandakavimbisa imba yokwaIsiraeri nemba yokwaJudha." 
Jeremiah33:15 Mumazuva iwayo uye panguva iyoyo, ndichaita kuti rimwe Bukira rakarurama ritunge kuitira Dhavhidhi. Iye achazotonga zvine ruenzaniso nokururama munyika iyoyi." 
Jeremiah33:16 Namazuva iwayo nyika yokwaJudha ichaponeswa, Jerusaremu igonyatsogarika. Izvozvo zita raichazenge yava kudaidzwa naro nderiri rokuti: ‘Tenzisakururamakwedu.’" 
Jeremiah33:17 Chinodariso ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi, Dhavhidhi haasi kuzomboshaya murume wokwake wokugara pachigaro choumambo hweIsiraeri" 
Jeremiah33:18 uye vapristi vechiRevhi havazombofa vashayawo mumwe wokwavo wokupira pandiri mipiro yokupisa uye kupisa mipiro youpfu hwembesanwa nokuita zvibayiro narini wose.” 
Jeremiah33:19 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya rikati," 
Jeremiah33:20 “Zvanzi naTenzi, kana mukagona kutyora chitenderano changu chandakaitirana nesiku kana chitenderano changu chandakaitirana nesikati zvokuti masikati kana usiku zvibva zvarega kuuya nenguva yazvo yazvakatemerwa," 
Jeremiah33:21 kana zvadaro chitenderano changu naDhavhidhi chingatyorwewo zvacho zvokuti haazombofa akava nemwanakomana angazogara pachigaro choumambo hwokwake ndizvo zvimwechetezvo nechitenderano changu navapristi vechiRevhi vashumiri vangu. 
Jeremiah33:22 Sezvakangoita gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvomudenga risina angariverenge uye jecha regungwa risingapimiki, izvozvo ndozvandichangoita kuti zvizvarwa zvokwaDhavhidhi muranda wangu zviwande navapristi vechiRevhi vanoshumira kwandiri.”" 
Jeremiah33:23 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richiti," 
Jeremiah33:24 “Zviri kutaura vanhu ava hauna kumbozviongororawo here zvokuti, Tenzi akaramba mhuri mbiri dzaakanga asarudza? Ipapo vanozvidza vanhu vangu zvokuti, kutaura kuno, vava kutovaona sorudzi pasina." 
Jeremiah33:25 Zvanzi naTenzi, dai ndakanga ndisina kunge ndakaitirana chitenderano nesiku kana nesikati nezvirongwa zvedenga napasi" 
Jeremiah33:26 ndingadaiwo ndaizoramba zvizvarwa zvokwaJakobho nezvokwaDhavhidhi muranda wangu ndichibva ndarega kuzvisarudzira kana nomumwe zvake wechizvarwa chokwake wokuzotonga vembeu yokwaAbhurahamu naIsaki naJakobho nokuti ndichachinja utapwa hwavo ndichavanzwirawo ngoni.” 
Jeremiah34:1 Izwi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi, izvozvo Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi nehondo yake yose nenyika dzose dzohumambo hwapasi pano dzaaitonga namarudzi ose avanhu vakanga vachirwisa Jerusaremu namaguta ayo ose rikati," 
Jeremiah34:2 “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, enda undotaura naZedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha uti kwaari, zvanzi naTenzi, chiona, ndiri kuisa guta rino irori mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi. Iye acharipisa nomoto." 
Jeremiah34:3 Iwe hausi kuzopunyuka mumaoko make, asi uchatobatwa ugoiswa mumaoko make. Uchaonana ziso neziso namambo weBhabhironi mugotaurirana makatarisana uso neuso. Iwe uchaenda kuBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah34:4 Asi chinzwa shoko raTenzi iwe Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha. Zvanzi naTenzi nezvako iwe: ‘Hausi kuzofa rufu rwebakatwa. 
Jeremiah34:5 Uchafa zvako murugare.’ Uye sokupisirwa kwaingoitwa zvinonhuwirira madzibaba ako, madzimambo ekare aya akakutangira, ndokupisawo kuchaita vanhu zvinonhuwira vachiitira iwe vachiungudza kukuchema vachiti, ‘Maiwe changamire!’ Chiripo ndechokuti ndini ndazvireva, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Muporofita Jeremiya akataura mashoko ose iwaya kuna Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha muJerusaremu. 
Jeremiah34:7 Izvozvo hondo yamambo weBhabhironi yakanga ichirwisa Jerusaremu namaguta okwaJudha ose akanga asara anoti Rakishi neAzeka nokuti iwaya ndiwo oga maguta etsvingo okwaJudha akanga asara. 
Jeremiah34:8 Shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi, mushure mokunge mambo Zedhekiya aita chibvumirano navanhu vose vomuJerusaremu kuti avape chiziviso chorusununguko" 
Jeremiah34:9 chinoti: Munhu wose anofanira kusunungura varanda vake vechiHebheru vechirume kana vechikadzi zvokuti hakuna anofanira kuita kuti hama yake muJudha ave muranda. 
Jeremiah34:10 Vanhu vakabvawo vateerera, paiti machinda ose navanhu vose vakanga vapinda muchibvumirano ichochi chokuti: Munhu wose anofanira kuzosunungura muranda wake wechirume kana wechikadzi kuitira kuti varege kuzoitwazve varanda. Vakateerera vakavasunungura." 
Jeremiah34:11 Asi pedzezvo norweseri vakatorazve varanda vechirume nevechikadzi vaya vavakanga vasunungura vachivaisa pasi pavo savaranda. 
Jeremiah34:12 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi rikati," 
Jeremiah34:13 “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, ini ndakaita chitenderano namadzibaba enyu pandakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti ndichivaburitsa mumba youranda chokuti:" 
Jeremiah34:14 ‘Kukange kwapera makore matanhatu mumwe nomumwe wenyu anofanira kusunungura mumwe wake wechiHebheru anenge akatengeswa kwauri akushandira kwamakore matanhatu. Murege aende zvake asununguke kwauri.’ Asi madzibaba enyu akaramba kunditeerera kana kurerekera zvavo nzeve kwandiri. 
Jeremiah34:15 Imi manga muchangotendeuka matoita chinhu chinondifadza nokutema chirevo chorusununguko mumwe nomumwe mukatoitirana chibvumirano pandiri ini mumba inodaidzwa nezita rangu. 
Jeremiah34:16 Asi imi pidigu mon'oresa zita rangu, mumwe nomumwe wotorazve muranda wake wechirume newechikadzi vamakanga mambosunungura maererano nezvidowo zvavo, uye makatovaisazve pasi penyu savaranda venyu." 
Jeremiah34:17 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, imi hamuna kunditeerera nokusaparidzirana kwamaitirana rusununguko kuno mumwe nomumwe wenyu rwokuuraiwa uye kuhama nehama. Chinzwai imi ndava kukuparidzirai rusununguko rwamuchaitwa nebakatwa nedenda neshangwa yenzara ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndichakuitai chinhu chinokatyamadza kwazvo kunyika dzose dzoumambo hwapasi pano." 
Jeremiah34:18 Ivo vanhu vakatyora chitenderano changu vasina zvisungo zvechitenderano ichocho, chavakaita pamberi pangu, ndichavaita zvinoitwa mhuru yechitenderano inodimburwa napakati kuitwa mapandi maviri vanhu vachibva vazopfuura napakati pamapandi ayo." 
Jeremiah34:19 Machinda okwaJudha namachinda eJerusaremu navayuniki navapristi pamwechete navanhu vose venyika iyoyo vakapfuura napakati pamapandi emhuru. 
Jeremiah34:20 Zvino ndichavaisa mumaoko mavavengi vavo nomumaoko mevanotsvaka kupfuudza upenyu hwavo. Zvitunha zvavo zvichava nyama yeshiri dzedenga nezvikara zvesango. 
Jeremiah34:21 Zedhekiyawo mambo wokwaJudha namachinda ake, ndichavaisa mumaoko mavavengi venyu uye nomumaoko mevanotsvaka kupfuudza upenyu hwavo, uye mumaoko mehondo yamambo weBhabhironi yanga yasuduruka kwamuri." 
Jeremiah34:22 Chinzwai, zvanzi naTenzi ndichati vadzoke kuguta rino varirwise varitore vagoripisa nomoto. Maguta okwaJudha, ndichaaita dongo risina ageremo.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi mumazuva aJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha richiti: 
Jeremiah35:2 “Enda kumba yevokwaRekabhu utaure navo, uuye navo kumba yaTenzi usvikopinda navo mune imwe imba yemo ugovapa waini vanwe.”" 
Jeremiah35:3 Saizvozvowo ini ndakatora Jaazaniya mwanakomana waJeremiya mwanakomana wokwaHabhaziniya, pamwechete navakoma navanun'una vake navanakomana vake vose nemba yose zvayo yekwaRekabhu." 
Jeremiah35:4 Ndakaenda navo kumba kwaTenzi ndikapinda navo mune imwe imba yemo yavanakomana vokwaHanani mwanakomana waIbhudhariya munhu waMwari, imba yaiva pedyo nemba yamachinda pamusoro pemba yokwaMaaseya, mwanakomana waSharumu muchengetedzi wapamusuo." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ndakabva ndagadzikira vokwaRekabhu hari dzizere newaini nemikombe ndikati kwavari, “Inwai waini.”" 
Jeremiah35:6 Asi ivo ndokupindura vachiti, “Hatisi kuzonwa waini nokuti Jonadhabhu mwanakomana wokwaRekabhu baba wedu akatirayira achiti, ‘Imi hamufanire kunwa waini, imi iyemi kana vana venyu narini wose." 
Jeremiah35:7 Hamufaniri kuvaka imba, hamufaniri kudyara mbeu, hamufanirewo kusima kana nomunda wemagirepisi zvawo. Asi kutoti munofanira kugara mumisasa yematendhe mazuva ose oupenyu hwenyu kuitira kuti mugare mazuva akawanda panyika yamunoti apa garei tamei apa garei tamei.’" 
Jeremiah35:8 Isu tinoteerera izwi raJonadhabhu mwanakomana wokwaRekabhu baba wedu pazvinhu zvese zvaakatirayira kuti tirege kunwa waini mazuva ose oupenyu hwedu isu namadzimai edu navanakomana vedu navanasikana vedu," 
Jeremiah35:9 uye kuti tirege kuvaka dzimba dzokugara. Hatina kana munda wamagirepisi kana munda zvawo kana mbeu. 
Jeremiah35:10 Asi tinogara mumatendhe tichiteerera nokutevedza zvose zvatakanzi tiite naJonadhabhu, baba wedu." 
Jeremiah35:11 Asi pakazouya Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi kuzorwisa nyika ino, takataurirana kuti regai tiende kuJerusaremu kuri kutya hondo yavarwi vechiKaridhea nehondo yevarwi vechiSiria. Saka tigere muJerusaremu kudai.”" 
Jeremiah35:12 Zvino izwi raTenzi rakabva rauya kuna Jeremiya rikati," 
Jeremiah35:13 “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, enda undotaurira vanhu vokwaJudha navagari veJerusaremu kuti, ‘Hamudi here kunzwa zvandinokuudzai kana kuteerera mazwi angu?’ Ndizvo zviri kubvunza Tenzi." 
Jeremiah35:14 Mutemo uya wakatemwa naJonadhabhu mwana waRekabhu waakapa vana vake kuti varege kunwa waini uri kuchengetwa. Havanwi waini kusvikira pari nhasi nokuti vanoteerera mutemo wababa wavo. Ndakataura ndataurazve kwamuri, asi imi hamuna kunditeerera." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ndakakutumirai varanda vangu vose, vaporofita, ndichivatuma ndatumazve ndichiti, munhu wose ngaatendeuke asiye nzira dzake dzakaipa, mugadziridze zviito zvenyu, murege kutevedza vamwe vamwari muchivashandira. Ipapo munozogara munyika yandakakupai imi namadzibaba enyu. Asi imi hamuna kurerekera nzeve kana kundinzwa zvako." 
Jeremiah35:16 Inga wani vana vokwaJonadhabhu mwanakomana waRekabhu vakachengeta murao wavakatemerwa nababa wavo. Asi vanhu ava havana kunditeerera. 
Jeremiah35:17 Ndokusakawo zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari wehondo nehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri, Chinzwai, ndava kuunzira nyika yokwaJudha navagari vose veJerusaremu nhamo yose yandanga ndati ivawire. Ndinodaro nokuti ndakavaudza asi havana kumboteerera. Ndakavashevedza asi ivo havana kudavira.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Asi kune vemba yokwaRekabhu, Jeremiya akati, “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, pamusana pokuteerera kwamunoita mutemo wababa wenyu Jonadhabhu muchichengeta mirao yake yose muchiita zvese zvaakati muite," 
Jeremiah35:19 nezvo zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri: Jonadhabhu mwanakomana waRekabhu haazombofa akashaya murume anondishandira.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mugore rechina rokutonga kwaJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha, shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi richiti," 
Jeremiah36:2 “Tora bhuku rokumononora unyore mariri mashoko ose andakakutaurira akanangana nenyika yokwaIsiraeri neyokwaJudha namarudzi ose kubvira musi wandakataura kwauri, kubvira mumazuva aJosiya kusvikira nhasi uno." 
Jeremiah36:3 Zvimwe vemba yokwaJudha vanganzwe zvakaipa zvose zvandiri kufunga kuvapinza mazviri zvikaita kuti munhu wose asiyane nenzira yake yakaipa kuti ndivaregerere uipi hwavo nechitadzo chavo.” 
Jeremiah36:4 Ipapo Jeremiya akadaidza Bharuku mwanakomana waNeriya. Bharuku akazonyora mubhuku rokumononora, mazwi achibva mumuromo maJeremiya, mazwi ose aakanga ataurirwa naTenzi." 
Jeremiah36:5 Jeremiya akarongera Bharuku kuti, “Ini handichabvumirwi kutsika kumba yaTenzi." 
Jeremiah36:6 Saka iwe unofanira kuendako uri musi wokutsanya. Vanhu vose vachizvinzwira kudaro, mumba yaTenzi imomo, unofanira kuverenga mazwi aTenzi mubhuku rokumononora iri rawanyora zvandakutaurira. Unofanira kuaverengerawo vanhu vose vokwaJudha vanenge vabva kumaguta kwavo vazvinzwire." 
Jeremiah36:7 Minyengetero yavo pamwe ingasvike pana Tenzi uyewo kuti munhu wose angabva asiyana nenzira yake yakaipa nokuti Tenzi akataura akatsamwa akashatirwa zvakaipisisa kwazvo nezvavanhu ivava ava.” 
Jeremiah36:8 Saizvozvowo Bharuku mwanakomana waNeriya akaita zvose zvaakanzi nomuporofita Jeremiya aite zvokundoverengera mazwi aTenzi omubhuku iroro mumba yaTenzi. 
Jeremiah36:9 Mugore rechishanu rokutonga kwaJoyakimu, mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha, mumwedzi wechipfumamwe, vanhu vose vomuJerusaremu pamwechete navanhu vakanga vabva kumaguta okwaJudha vakauya kuJerusaremu vakazvitemera zuva rokutsanya pana Tenzi." 
Jeremiah36:10 Ipapo, vanhu vose vachizvinzwira, Bharuku akabva averenga mazwi aJeremiya aya mubhuku riya mumba yaTenzi mune imwe imba yaGemariya mwanakomana waShafani munyori wapadare yakanga iri nechokumusoro kwenhandare kwaipindwa nako kuSuo Guru Idzva remba yaTenzi." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mikaya mwanakomana waGemariya mwanakomana wokwaShafani paakanzwa mashoko ose aTenzi achiverengwa mubhuku iroro," 
Jeremiah36:12 akadzika kumuzinda wamambo akasvikopinda mumba yomunyori. Izvozvo machinda ose akanga ageremo. Paiti munyori Erishama, pouya Dheraya mwanakomana wokwaShemaya tevere Erinatani mwanakomana wokwaAkibhori, uyewo Gemariya mwanakomana wokwaShafani, kozoti Zedhekiya mwanakomana waHananiya namachinda ose." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaya akavarondedzera mazwi ose aakanga anzwa paiverenga Bharuku bhuku riya vanhu vachizvinzwira. 
Jeremiah36:14 Machinda ose ndopaakatuma Jehudhi mwanakomana waNetaniya mwanakomana waSheremiya mwanakomana waKushi neshoko kuna Bharuku rokuti zvanzi, “Tora mumaoko mako bhuku rokumononora rawaverengera vanhu vachinzwa uuye.” Saizvozvo Bharuku mwanakomana waNeriya akatora mumaoko bhuku racho rokumononora ndokuenda kwavari." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ivo vakamuti, “Gara pasi uri verenge.” Bharuku akavaverengera bhuku iroro." 
Jeremiah36:16 Vakatarisana vava kutya vakabva vati kuna Bharuku, “Tinofanira kundonyatsopira mashoko aya kuna mambo nezvinhu zvose zvarehwa izvozvi.”" 
Jeremiah36:17 Vakabvunza Bharuku voti, “Tiudze. Zvakambouya sei chaizvo kuti iwe uzonyora mazwi ose iwaya?" 
Jeremiah36:18 Zvaibva mumuromo make here izvi?” Bharuku ndokupindura achiti, “Akaita zvokunditaurira mazwi ose iwaya ini ndichinyora neingi mubhuku rokumononora irori.”" 
Jeremiah36:19 Machinda iwayo akabva aruma nzeve Bharuku oti, “Chiendai mundohwanda, iwe naJeremiya parege kuva kana nomumwe anoziva kwamuri.”" 
Jeremiah36:20 Saizvozvowo vakaenda mudare kuna mambo vasiya vaisa bhuku rokumononora riya mumba yomunyori Erishama, vakapira kuna mambo mashoko ose iwayo." 
Jeremiah36:21 Mambo akabva atuma Jehudhi kundotora bhuku iroro rokumononora akandoritora mumba yomunyori Erishama muya, Jehudhi akariverengera mambo namachinda ose anokuta mambo." 
Jeremiah36:22 Iwoyo wakanga uri mwedzi wechipfumbamwe, mambo agere hake mumba yake yenguva yechando. Izvozvo paiva nomoto wairirima muchoto iye achigota moto hake." 
Jeremiah36:23 Jehudhi aingoti akati verengei zvikamu zvaro zvitatu kana zvina, mambo aibva agwishura zvikamu izvozvo nekapanga obva azviti chi-i mumoto mumbaura kudzamarara bhuku rokumononora rose rapera kutsva nomoto waiva mumbaura." 
Jeremiah36:24 Zvakadaro zvazvo pakati pamambo namakurukota ake akanga anzwa mashoko iwaya ose hapana kana nomumwe wavo akatya kana kubvarura hanzu dzavo neshungu. 
Jeremiah36:25 Kunyangewo Erinatani naDheraya naGemariya pavaiteterera kuna mambo kuti arege kupisa bhuku rokumononora iroro, mambo haana kumbovateerera." 
Jeremiah36:26 Asi mambo akatoudza Jerahimieri, mwanakomana wamambo naSeraya mwanakomana wokwaAzirieri uyewo Sheremiya mwanakomana waAbhudhieri kuti vabate Bharuku munyori nomuporofita Jeremiya, asi Tenzi akavahwandisa." 
Jeremiah36:27 Zvino mushure mokunge mambo apisa bhuku rokumononora riya ramazwi akanyorwa naBharuku achibva mumuromo maJeremiya, shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya rikati," 
Jeremiah36:28 “Tora rimwe bhuku rokumononora unyore mariri mazwi ose aya aiva mubhuku rokumononora rokutanga riya rakapiswa naJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha. 
Jeremiah36:29 Zvaunofanira kunyora zvichinangana naJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha ndezvizvi zvokuti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi, handiti wapisaka iwe bhuku rokumononora iri’ uchiti, ‘Wakanyorerei mariri kuti mambo weBhabhironi achauya chete kuzoparadza nyika ino achitsakatisa mairi vanhu nemhuka?’" 
Jeremiah36:30 Naizvozvo Tenzi ari kutaura nezvaJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha kuti haazofa akawana wokwake anozogara pachigaro choumambo hwokwaDhavhidhi uye chitunha chake chichakandwa panze chitsve nezuva masikati usiku chichitonhorwa nechando. 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndichamuranga iye nezvizvarwa zvake navaranda vake ndichivarangira uipi hwavo. Ndichaunzira vanhu ava navagari vomuJerusaremu navanhu vokwaJudha zvakaipa zvose zviya zvandakati zvivawire asi ivo havana kuteerera.” 
Jeremiah36:32 Jeremiya akatorawo rimwe bhuku rokumononora akaripa kunyanzvi yomutemo, Bharuku mwanakomana waNeriya akabva anyora mariri mazwi ose aibva mumuromo maJeremiya, mashoko ose omubhuku riya rakanga rapiswa mumoto naJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha achiisawo mamwe mazwi akawanda akaita saiwawo." 
Jeremiah37:1 Zedhekiya mwanakomana waJosiya akanga aitwa mambo munyika yokwaJudha naNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi akatonga panzvimbo paKoniya mwanakomana waJehoyakimu. 
Jeremiah37:2 Asi iye kana makurukota ake navanhu venyika havana kuteerera zvakataurwa naTenzi nomuromo womuporofita Jeremiya. 
Jeremiah37:3 Mambo Zedhekiya akatuma Jehukaru mwanakomana waSheremiya nomupristi Zefaniya mwanakomana waMaaseya kumuporofita Jeremiya neshoko rokuti, “Tinamatirewo kuna Tenzi, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah37:4 Izvozvo Jeremiya akanga achiri kufamba fambawo zvake mukati mavanhu nokuti akanga asati aiswa mujeri. 
Jeremiah37:5 Hondo yaFarao yakanga yabuda kuIjipiti, izvovo pazvakasvika munzeve dzavaKaridhea vaiva vakatokomba Jerusaremu vakabva vabva paJerusaremu." 
Jeremiah37:6 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya muporofita richiti," 
Jeremiah37:7 “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri heinoi mhinduro yokundopa mambo wokwaJudha akakutumai kuzonzwa kuti ini ndinoti kudii. Ndinoti, chinzwai, iyo hondo yaFarao yakauya kuzokubatsirai yava kutoda kudzokera kuIjipiti kunyika kwayo." 
Jeremiah37:8 Zvino vaKaridhea vachadzokazve vozorwisa guta rino, vacharitora vagoriroromesa nomoto." 
Jeremiah37:9 Zvanzi naTenzi musazvifurire henyu muchizviti, ‘VaKaridhea havachambofa vakatsika kwatiri kuno,’ nokuti havasi kuzorega kuuya kuno." 
Jeremiah37:10 Ndinodaro nokuti kunyange mukakurira hondo yose yavaKaridhea vari kukurwisai, zvokungosara kwavari ikoko varwi vakakuvadzwa chete, vari mumatendhe avo, ivavo vaitomuka, vagopisa guta rino nomoto.”" 
Jeremiah37:11 Zvino hondo yavaKaridhea zvayakanga yabva Jerusaremu kudaro nokuuya kwakanga kuchiita hondo yaFarao," 
Jeremiah37:12 Jeremiya akasimuka muJerusaremu oenda kunyika yokwaBhenjamini, kundogoverwa nhaka yake pakati pavanhu." 
Jeremiah37:13 Paakasvika paSuo Guru rokwaBhenjamini mumwe mugariri wepo ainzi Iriya mwanakomana waSheremiya mwanakomana waHananiya, akabata muporofita Jeremiya achiti, “Kutizira kuvaKaridhea kwawava kuitaka iwe!”" 
Jeremiah37:14 Jeremiya ndokuti, “Handizvo! Handisi kutizira kuvaKaridhea ini!” Asi Iriya haana kumbomuteerera, akabata Jeremiya akamuunza kumachinda." 
Jeremiah37:15 Machinda akabva apengera Jeremiya nehasha, vakamurova vakamuisa mujeri mumba yomunyori, Jonatani nokuti yakanga yaitwa jeri." 
Jeremiah37:16 Jeremiya paakanga aiswa mujeri rapasi, agaramo mazuva mazhinji," 
Jeremiah37:17 mambo Zedhekiya akatuma vanhu kundomutora ndokubva amugamuchira. Mambo akamubvunza muchivande mumuzinda make kuti, “Pane shoko rabva kuna Tenzi here?” Jeremiya akati, “Hongu riripo.” Akabva ati, “Imimi muchaiswa mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi.”" 
Jeremiah37:18 Jeremiya akatizve kuna mambo Zedhekiya, “Chii chaizvo chandakakutadzirai imi namakurukota enyu navanhu ava chakakonzera kuti mundiise mujeri?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Varipiko zvino vaporofita venyu vaya vaikutaurira vachiti, ‘Mambo weBhabhironi haasi kuzokurwisai kana kuzorwisa nyika ino?’" 
Jeremiah37:20 Zvino chinzwai imi changamire wangu, mambo! Ndateterera hangu donzwaiwo chichemo changu murege kundidzosera kumba kwaJonatani, munyori uya, ndingadaro ndikafirako.”" 
Jeremiah37:21 Nokudaro mambo Zedhekiya akatema zvaifanira kuitwa, vanhu vakabva vachengetera Jeremiya munhandare yevachengetedzi vokwamambo. Izvozvo Jeremiya akanga ava kupiwa chingwa chimwechete pazuva chichibva kumugwagwa weguta wainzi Wavabiki Vechingwa kusvikira chingwa chose chomuguta chapera. Saizvozvo Jeremiya akaramba ari munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo." 
Jeremiah38:1 Zvino Shefatiya mwanakomana waMatani, uye Gedhariya mwanakomana waPashuru uyewo Jukari mwanakomana waSheremiya pamwechete naPashuri mwanakomana waMarikiya, pavakanzwa mashoko aJeremiya aaitaurira vanhu vose okuti," 
Jeremiah38:2 “Zvanzi naTenzi anenge agara muguta rino achafa rufu rwebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda asi anenge abuda achindozvipereka kuvaKaridhea achararama. Achapunyuka noupenyu hwake. 
Jeremiah38:3 Zvanzi naTenzi, guta rino iri richaiswa mumaoko mehondo yamambo weBhabhironi richibva ratorwa.”" 
Jeremiah38:4 Machinda aya akati kuna mambo, “Madii kuuraya munhu uyu nokuti ari kurukutisa maoko avarwi vasara muguta rino achirukutisawo maoko avanhu vose nokuvataurira mazwi akadaro. Chiripo ndechokuti murume uyu haasi kuda kuti zvinhu zvifambire vanhu ava zvakanaka asi kuti zvivaipire.”" 
Jeremiah38:5 Mambo Zedhekiya akati, “Inga wani ari mumaoko menyu nokuti mambo hapana chaangaite chinopesana nemi.”" 
Jeremiah38:6 Ipapo vakatora Jeremiya vakamukanda mumugodhi waMarikiya mwanakomana wamambo. Mugodhi iwoyo waiva munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo. Vakaita zvokudzikisa Jeremiya netambo. Mumugodhi imomo makanga musisina mvura asi mangove madhaka chete ndokubva Jeremiya anyura mumadhaka imomo. 
Jeremiah38:7 Mumwe munhu wokuItiopia muyuniki anonzi Ebhedhimereki aiva mumuzinda wamambo paakanzwa zvichinzi vakanda Jeremiya mumugodhi, izvozvo mambo aiva padare kuSuo Guru rokwaBhenjamini," 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebhedhimereki akabuda mumuzinda wamambo akasvikoti kuna mambo," 
Jeremiah38:9 “Changamire wangu mambo, varume ava vaita chinhu chakaipa kwazvo pazvinhu zvose zvazvo zvavaita kuno muporofita Jeremiya nokumukanda kwavamuita mumugodhi. Jeremiya achafira imomo nenzara nokuti hapasisina kana chingwa chasara muguta muno.”" 
Jeremiah38:10 Mambo ndokutuma Ebhedhimereki, munhu wokuItiopia achiti, “Chitora varume vatatu pano apa uende navo kundoburitsa muporofita Jeremiya mumugodhi macho asati afa.”" 
Jeremiah38:11 Ebhedhimereki akabvawo atora varume akaenda navo mumuzinda wamambo. Vakasvika muwodhirobu mumba maichengeterwa zvinhu; vakatoramo mamvemve namarengenya embatya aakadzikisa netambo pasi paiva naJeremiya mumugodhi. 
Jeremiah38:12 Ebhedhimereki munhu wokuItiopia uya akati kuna Jeremiya, “Isa mamvemve namarengenya ayo muhapwa dzako, pakati pehapwa dzako netambo.” Jeremiya akaita saizvozvowo." 
Jeremiah38:13 Ivo ndokubva vakweva Jeremiya netambo vakamuburitsa mumugodhi muya. Jeremiya akaramba ari munhandare yevachengetedzi vokwamambo. 
Jeremiah38:14 Mambo Zedhekiya akatumira nhume kundodaidza muporofita Jeremiya akabva andochingamidzana naye kumusuo wetatu wokupinda muTemberi yaTenzi. Mambo akati kuna Jeremiya, “Ndava kukubvunza mubvunzo, iwe rega kundivanzira kana chinhu zvacho.”" 
Jeremiah38:15 Jeremiya akapindura Zedhekiya achiti, “Kana ndikakutaurirai chokwadi hamuzondiuraya here? Kunyange ndikakurumai nzeve hamumbofa makandinzwa.”" 
Jeremiah38:16 Mambo Zedhekiya ndokupika mhiko muchivande kuna Jeremiya yokuti, “NaTenzi mupenyu chaiye, musiki wemweya yedu, handisi kuzokuuraya kana kukuturira mumaoko avarume ava vanovavarira kukupfuudza upenyu.”" 
Jeremiah38:17 Jeremiya akabva ati kuna Zedhekiya, “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, kana mukaita zvokuzvipereka kumachinda amambo weBhabhironi uye guta rino iri harizopiswa nomoto uyewo imi nemba yenyu muchararama." 
Jeremiah38:18 Asi kana mukarega henyu kuzvipereka kumachinda amambo weBhabhironi zvichaita kuti guta rino riiswe mumaoko mavaKaridhea vacharipisa nomoto. Imi hamuzombopunyuki mumaoko mavo.” 
Jeremiah38:19 Mambo Zedhekiya akati kuna Jeremiya, “Ndiri kutya vaJudha vakatizira kuvaKaridhea ndingazongoiswa mumaoko avo vakandionesa nhamo.”" 
Jeremiah38:20 Jeremiya ndokuti, “Hamusi kuzoiswa mumaoko mavo! Chingoteererai zvenyu izwi raTenzi pane zvandiri kukutaurirai kuitira kuti zvikunakirei. Uye muchasiyiwa muri mupenyu." 
Jeremiah38:21 Asi kana mukaramba kuita zvokuzvipereka henyuka, hechinoi chiratidzo chandaoneswa naTenzi." 
Jeremiah38:22 Ndinoona vakadzi vose zvavo vachibva mumuzinda wamambo wokwaJudha vachibudwa navo kuenda kumachinda amambo weBhabhironi vachiti, “ShaMwari dzako dzawaivimba nadzo dzakakunyengedza dzikakwanisa. Zvino wachiti makumbo tindindi kunyura mudhaka ivo vakakufuratira kusiya." 
Jeremiah38:23 “Madzimai enyu ose navanakomana venyu vachaendwa navo kuvaKaridhea, imiwo hamusi kuzopunyuka. Asi muchatobatwa namambo weBhabhironi uye guta rino richapiswa nomoto.”" 
Jeremiah38:24 Zedhekiya akabva ati kuna Jeremiya, “Rega kuva newaunozozivisa hurukuro iyoyi nezvo kufa, hauzofa." 
Jeremiah38:25 Kana machinda akanzwa kuti ndakurukura newe, akauya kwauri achiti, ‘Tiudzeiwo zvawataura kuna mambo nezvawazotaurirwawo namambo. Rega kana kuva nechaunotivanzira, isu hatizokuuraya,’" 
Jeremiah38:26 uti kwavari, ‘Ndakasvitsa chichemo changu kuna mambo ndichiteterera kuti varege kundidzosera kumba kwaJonatani ndirege kufirako.’ ”" 
Jeremiah38:27 Machinda ose akazouyawo kuna Jeremiya vakamubvumunza, iye akavapindura sokunyeverwa kwaakanga aitwa namambo. Ipapo vakabva varega kutaura naye nokuti hurukuro iyoyo yakanga isina wamboinzwa." 
Jeremiah38:28 Izvozvo Jeremiya akaramba ari munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo kudzamara musi wakazotorwa Jerusaremu. 
Jeremiah39:1 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaZedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha, mumwedzi wegumi, Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi nehondo yake yose vakauya kuzorwisa guta reJerusaremu vakarikomba." 
Jeremiah39:2 Mugore regumi nechiposhi rokutonga kwaZedhekiya, mumwedzi wechina pamusi wepfumbamwe wemwedzi iwoyo, rusvingo rweguta rwakapazwa." 
Jeremiah39:3 Jerusaremu payakatorwa, machinda ose amambo weBhabhironi akapinda akagaririra pasuo guru repakati. Paiti mumwe ainzi Nerigarishareza naSamigarinebho uye Sarisikimu jinda guru nomumwe mukuru mukuru anonzi Nerigarishareza mukuru mukuru pamwechete navamwe vakuru vakuru vose vamambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah39:4 Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha navarwi vose vehondo pavakazviona vakatiza muguta nousiku nokubindu rokwamambo napasuo rapakati pemasvingo maviri vakananga kuArabhia. 
Jeremiah39:5 Asi hondo yavaKaridhea yakavaronda ikabatira Zedhekiya mumapani okuJeriko. Pavakamubata vakamuuyisa kuna Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi kuguta reRibhura mudunhu reHamati akabva amutemera chirango ipapo. 
Jeremiah39:6 Mambo weBhabhironi akauraya vanakomana vaZedhekiya paRibhura ipapo iye akatarisa. Mambo weBhabhironi akaurayawo vokumbahuru vokwaJudha. 
Jeremiah39:7 Akasvukunura Zedhekiya maziso akamusunga nengetani kuti aende naye kuBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah39:8 VaKaridhea vakapisa muzinda wamambo nedzimba dzavanhu vakapaza masvingo eJerusaremu. 
Jeremiah39:9 Mumwe mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo anonzi Nebhuzaradhani akatapa vanhu vakanga vasara muguta navakanga vatizira kwaari pamwechete navakanga vasina kutizira kwavari vakaenda navo kuBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah39:10 Nabhuzaradhani mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo, akasiya munyika yokwaJudha vamwe varombo vasina chavanacho akavapa minda yamagirepisi pamwechete nemimwe minda." 
Jeremiah39:11 Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akatemera Jeremiya chirevo nokuna Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavachengetedzi wokwamambo uya chokuti: 
Jeremiah39:12 “Mutore umuchengete zvakanaka urege kumukuvadza, asi umuitire zvaanenge akutaurira.”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Saizvozvowo Nebhuzaradhani, mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo naNebhushazibhana rimwe jinda guru naNegarishareza mumwe mukuru mukuru wacho navatungamiriri vakuru vose vamambo weBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah39:14 vakatuma vanhu vakatora Jeremiya munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo vakamuisa mumaoko maGedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu, mwanakomana waShafani kuti amuperekedze kumusha. Naizvozvo Jeremiya akandogara hake mukati mavanhu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya paakanga achakapfigirwa munhandare yavachengetedzi vokwamambo richiti," 
Jeremiah39:16 “Enda utaurire Ebhedhimereki uya muItiopia kuti, zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, zvaunoona ini ndichazadzisa shoko rangu randakareva nezveguta rino rokuti zvinhu zviriipire kwete kurinakira. Izvozvo zvichazadziswa iwe uchizviona musi iwoyo." 
Jeremiah39:17 Asi pazuva iroro ini ndichakununura, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Uye hausi kuzofa wakaiswa mumaoko avarume vauri kutya." 
Jeremiah39:18 Chiripo chaicho ndechokuti ndichatokununura chete uye hausi kuzofa rufu rwebakatwa. Asi uchapunyuka noupenyu hwako nokuti wakavimba neni. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.” 
Jeremiah40:1 Shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya richibva kuna Tenzi mushure mokunge Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo uya amuti aende hake achibva kuRama. Izvozvo akanga atora Jeremiya amusunga nengetani pamwechete nedzimwe nhapwa dzeJerusaremu nedzokwaJudha dzakanga dzichiendwa nadzo kuBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah40:2 Mukuru wavachengetedzi wokwamambo uya akatora Jeremiya akamuti, “Tenzi, Mwari wenyu ndiye akati kwaari nzvimbo ino iwirwe nenhamo ino." 
Jeremiah40:3 Tenzi aita kuti zviitike akaita sezvaakamboreva, nokuti makatadzira Tenzi mukasateerera inzwi rake saka izvi zvakuwirai." 
Jeremiah40:4 Zvino, chinzwa, nhasi uno ndinokusunungura ngetani idzi mumaoko mako. Kana uchiona zvakakunakira kuti tiende tose kuBhabhironi, ngatiende, ndichazokuchengetawo zvakanaka. Asi kana uchiona zvakakuipira kuti tiende tose kuBhabhironi, usauye zvako. Chiona nyika ndiyoyi yose yauri kuona iyi! Enda hako kose kose kwaunofunga kuti ndiko chaiko kwakakunakira." 
Jeremiah40:5 Kana uchida kusara ungadzokere zvako kuna Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu, mwanakomana waShafani akasarudzwa namambo kuva sadunhu wamaguta okwaJudha undogara naye mukati mavanhu kana kuenda hako kose kose kwaunofunga kuti kwakakunakira.” Ipapo mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo akati Jeremiya awaniswe mbuva nechipo agoenda hake." 
Jeremiah40:6 Jeremiya akabva aenda kuna Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu, kuMizipa akandogara naye mukati mavanhu vakanga vasiyiwa munyikamo." 
Jeremiah40:7 Kuzoti vakuru vakuru vehondo dzavarwi vaiva mumasango navarwi vavo pavakanzwa kuti mambo weBhabhironi akanga asarudza Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu achimuita Sadunhu munyika iyoyo uye kuti akaisa mumaoko make varume navakadzi navana vaiva varombo vokupedzesera chaivo munyika iyoyo uye vakanga vasina kutapwa vachiendeswa kuBhabhironi," 
Jeremiah40:8 vakaenda kuna Gedhariya kuMizipa. Paiti: Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya naJohanani mwanakomana waKarea kwouya Seraya mwanakomana waTanhumeti vokwaEfai wokuNetofa ndokuzoti Jezaniya mwanakomana wokwaMaaka, ivo navarwi vavo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu mwanakomana waShafani akapika mhiko kwavari navanhu vavo achiti, “Regai kutya kushandira henyu vaKaridhea. Garai zvenyu munyika imomo muchishandira mambo weBhabhironi zvinhu zvichakufambirai zvakanaka." 
Jeremiah40:10 Inini ndichagara hangu kuMizipa ndichikumiririrai kuvaKaridhea vanenge vauya kwatiri. Asi imi potai muchiunganidza waini nemichero yezhizha namafuta eorivhi muzvichengetere mumidziyo yenyu muchigara zvenyu mumaguta enyu amakawana.” 
Jeremiah40:11 Zvimwechetezvo navaJudha vose vaiva kuMoabhu nomukati mavaAmoni nomuEdhomu nomunyika dzimwe pavakanzwawo kuti mambo weBhabhironi akanga asiya chimwe chitsama chevokwaJudha uye kuti akanga asarudza Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu, mwanakomana waShafani akamuita sadunhu wavo," 
Jeremiah40:12 ipapo vaJudha vose vakadzoka vachibva kunzvimbo dzose kwavakanga vaparadzirwa, vakauya kunyika yokwaJudha kuna Gedhariya kuMizipa. Vakazopota vachiunganidza waini nemichero yezhizha zvakawandisisa kwazvo." 
Jeremiah40:13 Zvino Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navakuru vakuru vehondo dzavarwi vaiva mumasango vakauya kuna Gedhariya kuMizipa 
Jeremiah40:14 vakati kwaari, “Munozviziva here kuti Bhaarisi mambo wevaAmoni akatuma Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya kuzopfuudza upenyu hwenyu?” Asi Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikari haana kumbovateerera." 
Jeremiah40:15 Johanani mwanakomana waKareya akataura muchivande kuna Gedhariya paMizipa ipapo akati, “Regai ndiende ndinouraya Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya hakuna achazviziva. Adirei chaizvo kupfuudza upenyu hwenyu? Hakusi kuitira kuti vaJudha vakaunganidzana kwamuri vaite rumwe rumwe, chitsama chakasara chevokwaJudha ichi chichibva charova?”" 
Jeremiah40:16 Asi Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu akati kuna Johanani mwanakomana waKarea, “Iwe rega kuita izvi nokuti uri kurevera Ishimaeri nhema.”" 
Jeremiah41:1 Mumwedzi wechinomwe, Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya, mwanakomana waErishama mumwe wokumbahuru aiva mumwe wavatungamiriri vakuru vokwamambo, akauya negumi ravarume kuna Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu kuMizipa. Pavakanga vachidya zvavo pamwechete paMizipa ipapo," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya negumi ravarume raaiva naro vakasimuka vakabaya Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu mwanakomana waShafani nebakatwa vakamuuraya iye akanga asarudzwa namambo weBhabhironi aitwa sadunhu wenyika iyoyo. 
Jeremiah41:3 Ishimaeri akaurayawo vaJudha vose vaiva naGedhariya paMizipa pamwechete navarwi vehondo vechiKaridhea vaakawanikidza varipo. 
Jeremiah41:4 Ramangwana acho mushure mokupondwa kwaGedhariya ikoku pasati pava neazviziva," 
Jeremiah41:5 pakasvika makumi masere avarume vachibva kuShikemu nokuShiro nokuSamaria vakaveura ndebvu vaine hanzu dzakabvaruka, miviri yavo akachekwachekwa vachiuya nemipiro yembesanwa norusenzi kuzozvipira kuTemberi yaTenzi." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya akavabudira kuMizipa kuzochingurana navo, akauyako achihwihwidza kuchema. Paakasanganidzana navo akati kwavari, “Uyai mupinde muna Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu.”" 
Jeremiah41:7 Pavakapinda muguta, Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya navarume vaaiva navo vakavaponda kuuraya vakavakanda mumugodhi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Asi pakati pavo pakaita varume gumi vakateterera kuna Ishimaeri vachiti, “Dai marega zvenyu kutiuraya nokuti tine pfimbi dzekoroni nebhari namafuta eorivhi nouchi zvatakaviga mumasango.” Nokudaro akarega kuvauraya pamwechete navamwe vavo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Zvino mumugodhi macho maikanda Ishimaeri zvitunha zvose zvavanhu vaakatsakatisa rakanga riri zimugodhi guru rakacherwa namambo Asa achizvidzivirira kuna Bhaasha mambo weIsiraeri. Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya akarizadza nevaipondwa ivavo. 
Jeremiah41:10 Ishimaeri akazotapa vamwe vose vaiva Mizipa, ava vanoti: vakunda vamambo navanhu vose vakanga vasiyiwa paMizipa vaiva vaiswa Nebhuzaradhani uya mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo mumaoko maGedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu. Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya akavatapa ndokubuda opinda munzira oyambukira kuvaAmoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Asi Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navatungamiriri vose vehondo dzavarwi vaaiva navo pavakanzwa nezvouipi hwakanga hwaitwa naIshimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya," 
Jeremiah41:12 vakatora varwi vavo vose vakaenda kundorwisa Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya. Vakamusvikira ari padziva guru riri kuGibheoni. 
Jeremiah41:13 Vanhu vose vaiva naIshimaeri pavakangoona Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navatungamiriri vose vehondo dzavarwi vaaiva navo, vakapembera kufara." 
Jeremiah41:14 Saka vanhu vose vakanga vatapwa naIshimaeri kuMizipa vakapishunuka vodzokera kuna Johanani mwanakomana waKarea. 
Jeremiah41:15 Asi Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNetaniya navarume vasere vakapunyuka kuna Johanani akasvovera kuvaAmoni. 
Jeremiah41:16 Ipapo Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navatungamiriri vose vehondo dzavarwi vaaiva navo vakatora vamwe vose vakanga vatapwa vaendwa navo naIshimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya kuMizipa mushure mokunge auraya Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu, varwi vehondo navakadzi navana navayuniki vakaunzwa naJohanani kubva kuGibheoni." 
Jeremiah41:17 Vachiuya kudaro vakamboti garei kuGeruti Chimhamu pedyo neBheterehemu vaiva nepfungwa yokuenda kuIjipiti 
Jeremiah41:18 pamusana pokuzeza vaKaridhea nokuti vaivadedera nemhosva yokuti Ishimaeri mwanakomana waNataniya akanga aponda Gedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu akanga aitwa sadunhu wenyika iyoyo namambo weBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah42:1 Vatungamiriri vose vehondo dzavarwi naJohanani mwanakomana waKarea naJezaniya mwanakomana waHoshaya pamwechete navanhu vose kubvira kumudukuduku kusvikira kumukuru chaiye 
Jeremiah42:2 vakaenda kumuporofita Jeremiya vakati kwaari, “Inzwaiwo chichemo chedu mutinamatire kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu muchinyengeterera chitsama chavose vakasara ichi (nokuti tangosara tava vashomanana pavazhinji vaya sokutiona kwamuri kungoita nameso enyu)" 
Jeremiah42:3 kuitira kuti Tenzi Mwari wenyu atiratidzewo gwara ratinofanira kutevedza uye nezvatinofanira kuti tiite.” 
Jeremiah42:4 Muporofita Jeremiya akavapindura achiti, “Ndazvinzwa! Chionai ndichanamata kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu maererano nechichemo chenyu. Mhinduro yose yandinenge ndapiwa naTenzi, ini ndichakutaurirai. Handisi kuzombokuvanzirai kana chinhu.”" 
Jeremiah42:5 Ivo ndokuti kuna Jeremiya, “Dai Tenzi angova chapupu chechokwadi chakatendeka kwatiri kana isu tikarega kuita zvose zvinenge zvarehwa naTenzi akutumai kwatiri." 
Jeremiah42:6 Kunyange zvikava zvakanaka kana zvakaipa, chedu isu kuteerera chete izwi raTenzi, Mwari wedu watiri kukutumai kwaari, kuitira kuti zvitinakire patinenge tateerera izwi raTenzi, Mwari wedu.”" 
Jeremiah42:7 Kuzoti kwapera gumi ramazuva shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya. 
Jeremiah42:8 Iye akabva adaidza Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navatungamiriri vehondo dzavarwi vaiva naye navanhu vose kubvira kumudukuduku kusvikira kumukuru chaiye akati kwavari," 
Jeremiah42:9 “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri kuya kwamakandituma kundosvitsa chichemo chenyu:" 
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Kana mukaramba muri munyika muno iniwo ndichakuvakai ndisingakupazei. Ndichakusimai ndisingakudzipurei nokuti ndinorwadziwa mwoyo nenhamo yandakakupinzai. 
Jeremiah42:11 Regai kutya mambo weBhabhironi wamunodai kudedera. Musambomutya zvenyu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, nokuti ndinemi kuitira kuti ndikuponesei ndichikununurai mumaoko make." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndichakunzwirai ngoni kuti iye agokuitiraiwo tsiye nyoro kuti mugare munyika yenyu chaiyo.’ 
Jeremiah42:13 “Asi kana imi mukati, ‘Hatisi kuda kuramba tiri munyika,’ muchiramba kuteerera izwi raTenzi, Mwari wenyu muchiti henyu," 
Jeremiah42:14 ‘Kwete isu tichaenda kunyika yeIjipiti kwatisingazoonizve hondo kana kunzwa kurira kwehwamanda kunyange nenzara yechokudya ndokwatichandogara ikoko,’" 
Jeremiah42:15 nezvo imi chitsama chakasara chevokwaJudha chinzwai shoko raTenzi. Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Kana mukava nepfungwa yokuenda kuIjipiti kundogarako," 
Jeremiah42:16 bakatwa ramuri kutya richakuwirai ikoko munyika yeIjipiti makaremo, neshangwa yenzara yacho yamuri kuzeza ichatsviriridza kusonana nemi kuIjipiti mufire ikoko." 
Jeremiah42:17 Vanhu vose vanoisa mwoyo papfungwa yokuenda kuIjipiti kundogarako, vachafa rufu rwebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda pasina wavo anosara kana anopunyuka rufu kunhamo dzose dzandichavauyisira.’" 
Jeremiah42:18 “Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri: ‘Sokuviruka kwandakaita ndatsamwa nehasha ndikadziwodzvorera pavagari veJerusaremu, ndokuwodzvorera kwandichakuitirai hasha dzangu kana mukangoenda kuIjipiti. Muchava sendove chinhu chinokatyamadza chine rushamba chiseko zvacho. Nzvimbo ino hamuzombofa makaionazve.’" 
Jeremiah42:19 “Imi chitsama chakasara chovokwaJudha Tenzi ati kwamuri, ‘Regai kuenda kuIjipiti.’ Nyatsozivai kuti nhasi uno ndakuyambirai" 
Jeremiah42:20 kuti uku ndokutorasika kwamava kutoita muchida kuzviurayisa henyu. Handiti makandituma kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu muchiti, ‘Tinamatirewo kuna Tenzi, Mwari wedu, uye chose zvacho chinenge charehwa naTenzi Mwari wedu tiudze tigozviita.’" 
Jeremiah42:21 Zvino ini nhasi uno ndakutaurirai. Asi imi hamuna kuteerera izwi raTenzi, Mwari wenyu, pazvinhu zvose zvaakandituma kuzokutaurirai." 
Jeremiah42:22 Saka zvino mochinyatsoziva kuti chenyu imi kufa chete nebakatwa neshangwa yenzara nedenda munzvimbo yacho iyoyo kwamuri kurwarira kundogara.” 
Jeremiah43:1 Pakapedza Jeremiya kutaurira vanhu vose mashoko ose iwaya aTenzi Mwari wavo, emhinduro yaTenzi Mwari wavo yaakatumwa nayo kwavari," 
Jeremiah43:2 Azariya mwanakomana waHoshaya pamwechete naJohanani mwanakomana waKarea nendambakunzwa dzavanhu vose zvavo vakati kuna Jeremiya, “Inhema dzauri kutaura. Tenzi, Mwari wedu haana kumbokutuma kuti uzotaura kuti, ‘Regai kuenda kuIjipiti kundogarako.’" 
Jeremiah43:3 Asi iye Bharuku mwanakomana waNeriya ndiye atokufurira kuti utipandukire ugotiisa mumaoko mavaKaridhea kuti vatiuraye kana kutitapa vachitiendesa kuBhabhironi.” 
Jeremiah43:4 Ipapo Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navatungamiriri vose vehondo dzavarwi navanhu vose vakaramba kuteerera izwi raTenzi rokuti varambe vagere munyika yokwaJudha. 
Jeremiah43:5 Asi Johanani mwanakomana waKarea navatungamiriri vose ivavo vehondo dzavarwi vakatora chitsama chose chakasara chevokwaJudha chavanhu vakanga vadzoka kuzogara munyika yokwaJudha vachibva kuvanhu vechirudzi vose kwavakanga vaparadzirwa. 
Jeremiah43:6 Paiti varume navakadzi navana navakunda vokwamambo nomunhu wose akanga asiyiwa naNebhuzaradhani mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo ari mumaoko maGedhariya mwanakomana waAhikamu mwanakomana waShafani uyewo nomuporofita Jeremiya naBharuku mwanakomana waNeriya. 
Jeremiah43:7 Ivavo vakasvika munyika yeIjipiti nokuti vakanga varamba kuteerera izwi raTenzi. Vakasvikira kuTahipanhesi. 
Jeremiah43:8 Ipapo shoko raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya muTahipanhesi imomo rikati," 
Jeremiah43:9 “Tora mumaoko mako mhitsa dzamabwe udzivige muvhu munzira yakaita zvokuroverwa kunopindwa nako mumuzinda waFarao uri muTahipanhesi muno, vanhu vokwaJudha vachizviona." 
Jeremiah43:10 Uti kwavari zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, chinzwai, ndichatumira shoko rokundotora muranda wangu Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi. Ini ndichagadzikira chigaro choumambo hwokwake pamabwe iwaya andaviga apa. Achazobhabhanura kumisa katendhe kake koumambo kane denga nechapamusoro pawo." 
Jeremiah43:11 Achasvikorova nyika yeIjipiti achipinza vakatemerwa denda kudenga vakatemerwa utapwa kuutapwa nokuuraisa nebakatwa vakatemerwa kurufu rwebakatwa. 
Jeremiah43:12 Achatungidza moto mumatemberi avamwari veIjipiti; iye achavapisa agovatakura senhapwa achichenesa nyika yeIjipiti sokuchenesa kunoita mufudzi jasi rake achiribvisa zviundudzi. Achazobva ipapo oenda hake murunyararo. 
Jeremiah43:13 Achaputsa mabwe marefu eimba inonzi yezuva munyika yeIjipiti muno. Acharirimisawo nomoto temberi dzavamwari veIjipiti.” 
Jeremiah44:1 Shoko iri rakauya kuna Jeremiya richinangana navaJudha vose vakanga vagere munyika yeIjipiti kuMigidhori nokuTahipanhesi nekuMemufisi nokunyika yePatrosi 
Jeremiah44:2 richiti, “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, handiti makazvionera here, nhamo yandakapinza Jerusaremu namaguta ose okwaJudha, chionai kuti, pari nhasi angova matongo zvawo asina ageremo" 
Jeremiah44:3 zvakonzerwa nouipi hwavakaita. Vaindishatirisa nokuita kwavo vachienda kundopisira rusenzi nokutoshandirawo vamwe vamwari vavasingazivi ivo kana imi kana madzibaba enyu. 
Jeremiah44:4 Asi ini ndaingoramba ndichitumira varanda vangu vose, vaporofita ndichiyambira kuti musaite zvinhu zvinosemesa zvandinovenga." 
Jeremiah44:5 Asi havana kuteerera kana kurerekera nzeve dzavo kuti vatendeuke kuuipi hwavo varege kupisira vamwe vamwari rusenzi. 
Jeremiah44:6 Ndokusaka ndakatsamwa ndikaviruka nehasha ndikapedzera shungu pamaguta okwaJudha nemigwagwa yeJerusaremu akabva aita marara zvawo nechinhu pasina sezvaari pari nhasi. 
Jeremiah44:7 “Saka zvino zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, ‘Munodirei kuzviparira nhamo yakakura ikadai, kuzvitsakatisa murume nomukadzi nomucheche nomwana pakati pevokwaJudha zvokusara pasisina anosara?’" 
Jeremiah44:8 Munodirei kundishatirisa netwamunobata namaoko enyu imi, kutopisira zvenyu vamwe vamwari rusenzi munyika yeIjipiti mamakauya kuzogara kuti ndikutsakatisei muchizova vanhu vorushambwa nechiseko mukati memarudzi ose pasi pano?" 
Jeremiah44:9 “Makakanganwa here uipi hwamadzibaba enyu nouipi hwamadzimambo okwaJudha nouipi hwavakadzi vavo, nouipi hwenyu pachenyu nouipi hwamadzimai enyu hwavakaita munyika yokwaJudha nomumigwagwa yomuJerusaremu?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Havana kana nokutombozvininipisa kwose kusvikira pari nhasi. Havana kunditya kana kuchengeta mutemo wangu nezvirevo zvangu zvandakaisa kwamuri nokumadzitateguru enyu. 
Jeremiah44:11 Saka zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari waIsiraeri: Chionai ndichakufuratirai ndigokuisai munyatwa ndichitsakatisa vokwaJudha." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ndichaita kuti chitsama chavanhu vokwaJudha chakasara chakada kuuya kuzogara kunyika yeIjipiti chitsakatiswe chose. Vachafira munyika yeIjipiti nebakatwa nenzara. Kubvira kuvacheche kusvikira kuvakuru vakuru vachafa nebakatwa nenzara vachibva vava ndove nechinhu chinokatyamadza nechine rushambwa nechiseko. 
Jeremiah44:13 Ndicharanga vanhu vanogara munyika yeIjipiti sezvandakaita Jerusaremu yandakaranga nebakatwa yeshangwa yenzara nedenda," 
Jeremiah44:14 kuitira kuti pachitsama chovokwaJudha vakasara vaya vakauya kuzogara kuIjipiti pashayikwe kunyange mumwe zvake anopunyuka kana kurarama kana kuzodzokerazve kunyika kwavaJudha kwavanodisa kudzokera vachinogarako, nokuti havasiri kuzodzokerako kunze kwavapoteri vashoma chete.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Ipapo varume vose vaiziva kuti madzimai avo vakanga vapisira rusenzi kuna vamwe vamwari namadzimai ose akanga amire, negungano guru navanhu vose vaigara kuPatirosi munyika yeIjipiti vakapindura Jeremiya vachiti:" 
Jeremiah44:16 “Maererano neshoko raTenzi rawatitaurira, hatisiri kuzombokuteerera." 
Jeremiah44:17 Asi tichaita zvose zvatakatsidza kuita zvokupisira rusenzi kune hosi yedenga tichiipira mupiro wokuteura sezvatakaita isu namadzitateguru edu namadzimambo edu, uye namachinda edu mumaguta okwaJudha nomumigwagwa yeJerusaremu, nokuti panguva iyoyo taiva nezvokudya zvakawanda tichibudirira tisingawani njodzi." 
Jeremiah44:18 Asi kubvira panguva yatakaregera kupisira rusenzi kune hosi yedenga nokuipira mupiro wokuteura takava vanhu vasina chinhu tikabva taparadzwa nebakatwa nenzara.” 
Jeremiah44:19 Vakadzi ndokutiwo, “Patakapisira rusenzi kune hosi yedenga tichiipira mupiro wokuteura varume vedu vakanga vasina kutibvumira here kubika makeke ane mufananidzo wayo tichimupira mupiro wokuteura.”" 
Jeremiah44:20 Zvino Jeremiya akataura kuvanhu vose varume navakadzi navanhu vose vakanga vamupa mhinduro iyoyi achiti," 
Jeremiah44:21 “Kana zviri zvorusenzi rwamakapisa muri mumaguta okwaJudha nomumigwagwa yomuJerusaremu, imi namadzitateguru enyu namadzimambo enyu namachinda enyu navagari vomunyikamo, Tenzi haana kurangarira here? Hazvina kupinda mundangariro dzake here?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Tenzi haana kukwanisa kuramba achikuitirai mwoyo murefu mune zvakaipa zvenyu nezvinosemesa zvamunoita, ndokusaka nyika yenyu rava dongo, namarara norushambwa isina anogaramo sezvairi nhasi uno." 
Jeremiah44:23 Chikonzero ndechokuti makapisa rusenzi uye makatadzira Tenzi pamakarega kuteerera izwi raTenzi nokuchengeta mutemo wake nezvakatemwa nezvakapupurwa, ndizvo zvakonzera kuti muwirwe nezvakaipa sezvazviri nhasi uno.”" 
Jeremiah44:24 Jeremiya akataura kuvanhu vose, varume navakadzi achiti, “Inzwai shoko raTenzi imi vokwaJudha mose muri munyika yeIjipiti," 
Jeremiah44:25 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri: ‘Imi namadzimai enyu makataura nomuromo yenyu, mukazvizadzisa nezviito zvamaoko enyu,’ muchiti, ‘Tichatozadzisa mhiko dzedu dzatakapika, dzokupisira rusenzi kuhosi yedenga tichimupira mupiro wokuteura.’ Naizvozvo itai zvamakapika muzadzise mhiko dzenyu." 
Jeremiah44:26 Saka inzwai Shoko raTenzi imi mose vokwaJudha vagere munyika yeIjipiti. Chinzwai, zvanzi naTenzi, ndakapika nezita rangu guru, kuti zita rangu harichazodanwi nomuromo waani zvake wokwaJudha munyika yose yeIjipiti achiti, ‘Ndinopika naMwari Tenzi mupenyu.’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Inzwai, ndiri kuvaongorora kuti ndivape zvinovaipira, kwete zvanovanakira. Varume vose vokwaJudha vari munyika yeIjipiti vachaurayiwa nebakatwa neshangwa yenzara kusvikira vapera." 
Jeremiah44:28 Vachapukunyuka pabakatwa vachabuda munyika yeIjipiti vachidzokera kunyika yokwaJudha, vava vashomanana. Vakasara vose vokwaJudha, vakauya kuIjipiti kuzogara; vachaziva kuti ane shoko rechokwadi ndiani, rangu here kana kuti ravo." 
Jeremiah44:29 Zvanzi naTenzi, ichi ndicho chichava chiratidzo kwamuri chokuti ndichakurangirai munzvimbo ino kuti muzive chokwadi chokuti zvakaipa kwamuri zvandakakuyambirai zvichaitika." 
Jeremiah44:30 Zvanzi naTenzi, chionai, ndava kuzoisa Farao Hofura mambo weIjipiti mumaoko mavavengi vake nomumaoko mevanotsvaka kumuuraya, sokuisa kwandakaita Zedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha mumaoko maNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi, muvengi wake aitsvaka kumuuraya.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Shoko romuporofita Jeremiya raakataurira Bharuku mwanakomana waNeriya paakanyora mashoko aya mubhuku achiaudzwa naJeremiya mugore rechina rokutonga kwaJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha," 
Jeremiah45:2 achiti, “Zvanzi naTenzi, Mwari waIsiraeri, kwauri iwe Bharuku:" 
Jeremiah45:3 wakati iwe, ‘Ndine nhamo ini nokuti Tenzi akawedzera kusuwa pakurwadziwa kwangu. Ndaneta nokugomera kwangu, handiwani zororo.’" 
Jeremiah45:4 Saka taura izvozvo kwaari uchiti, Zvanzi naTenzi, Chinzwa, zvandakavaka zviya ndava kuzozvipaza uye zvandakasima ndava kuzozvidzura zvichireva nyika yose." 
Jeremiah45:5 Imi munozvitsvakira zvinhu zvikuru here? Regai kuzvitsvaka nokuti chionai, ndava kuzounza nhamo kuzvisikwa zvose, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Asi iwe ndichaita kuti upunyuke noupenyu hwako.”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kuna Jeremiya richitaura nezvevanhu vechirudzi. 
Jeremiah46:2 Zvakanangana neIjipiti: shoko rakataura richinangana nehondo yavarwi yaFarao anonzi Neko, mambo weIjipiti yakanga iri pedyo nerwizi rwaYufuratesi paKarikemishi, hondo iya yakazokurirwa naNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi mugore rechina rokutonga kwaJehoyakimu mwanakomana waJosiya mambo wokwaJudha; rakauya richiti:" 
Jeremiah46:3 “Gadzirirai nhoo duku nehuru muende kundorwa hondo! 
Jeremiah46:4 Sungai mabhiza, chitasvai imi vatasvi vamabhiza. Mirai makarongana mumutsetse heremende dzenyu dziri mumusoro. Nyatsokwenenzverai kurodza mapfumo enyu. Shongai mademautare enyu okuzvidzivirira nawo muhondo!" 
Jeremiah46:5 “Ko zvandava kuonazve izvi? Vapazama musoro, yava tsoka ndibereke kutiza. Varwi vavo vakurirwa chava chipatapata kutiza. Zvokucheuka hapasisina, zvinotyisa zvavakomberana ndozviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah46:6 “Shasha dzokumhanya semhepo hadzimbogona kupatiza, kana murwi wehondo haapapunyuki, kuchamhembe kurwizi rwaYufuratesi vari kugumburwa vachiputsika." 
Jeremiah46:7 “Ndiani uyu ari kututumuka seNairi, senzizi dzafashukira nemvura mhiri nemhiri?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ijipiti yatutumuka saNairi senzizi dzafashukira mhiri nemhiri. Yakazviti ndichasumuka pasi pano ndipati fuse fuse kukwidibira ndichiparadza maguta navagari vemo. 
Jeremiah46:9 “Imi mabhiza chipindai muhondo, imi ngoro dzehondo chitii sika sika. Varwi vehondo ngavabudewo, vanhu vokuItiopia nokuPuti vanopakata nhoo navanhu vokuRudhi nyanzvi dzokupakata uta.”" 
Jeremiah46:10 Musi iwoyo, izuva raMwari, Tenzi wehondo nehondo, zuva rokutsividza rokuti iye azvitsividze vavengi vake. Bakatwa richaparadza rikatoguta haro, richaguta kudutira ropa ravo. Nokuti Tenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo ari kupira chibayiro anoriita zuva guru rechibayiro kunyika yokuchamhembe pedyo nerwizi rwaYufuratesi." 
Jeremiah46:11 Kwidzai kuGireadhi mundotorako mushonga webharimu iwe mwanasikana mhandara, Ijipiti. Inga wakatamburira pasina kuzvirapa nemishonga yakawanda, zvokuti upore hazviiti." 
Jeremiah46:12 Ndudzi dzavanhu dzakanzwa guhu rokunyadziswa kwako; pasi pano pazara mhere yako nokuti varwi vehondo vakaita mawiramombe vachibva vati pamwechete pasi rikiti. 
Jeremiah46:13 Shoko iri rakataurwa naTenzi kumuporofita Jeremiya richireva nezvokuuya kwaNebhukadhireza, mambo weBhabhironi kuzorova nyika yeIjipiti, rakati:" 
Jeremiah46:14 “Paridzai muIjipiti muzivise vanhu muguta reMigidhori muudze vanhu muMemufisi nomuTahipanhesi muti, ‘Mirai makagadzirira, sungai dzisimbe nokuti bakatwa richaparadza munharaunda menyu kutenderera.’" 
Jeremiah46:15 Zvauya sei kuti Apisi utize. Handira yako yakatadza kumira sei? Nokuti yakarigirwa pasi naTenzi. 
Jeremiah46:16 “Aita kuti vazhinji venyu vatatarike vachiwira pasi vakataurirana vachiti, ‘Ngatisimukei tidzokere kune vokwedu kunyika yedu kwatakaberekerwa. Pamusana pebakatwa romudzvinyiriri.’" 
Jeremiah46:17 “Daidzai Farao, mambo weIjipiti zita rokuti, ‘Nyamheremhereanopedzeranguvamukuzuwa.’" 
Jeremiah46:18 “Hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kureva Mambo ane zita rinonzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo kune mumwe achauya akati dzu-u segomo reTabhori mukati memakomo uye segomo reKameri pedyo negungwa?" 
Jeremiah46:19 “Imi vagari veIjipiti sungai mikwende mugadzirire kuenda kuutapwa nokuti Memufisi ichava zvayo dongo risina ageremo. 
Jeremiah46:20 Ijipiti itsiru rinoyevedza asi imwe mbuwo yokuchamhembe yachiti naro tsvome tsvome. 
Jeremiah46:21 “Kunyange varwi vanorwira kubhadhara vava sezvigondora zvakakodzwa. Hongu, vapira gotsi, vachiti ware kutiza pamwechete, havana kumbopamira nokuti zuva ravo renhamo ravasvikira, nguva yokurangwa kwavo." 
Jeremiah46:22 “Ijipiti, iri kushona senyoka yozvongonyoka ichienda nokuti vavengi vayo, varivinga vakabopa vari kuuya vakaribatira matemo savatemi vemiti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Vachatema sango rake, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, kunyange zvazvo risingadimuriki nomo nokuti ivo pasi mhashu dzinosara kuwanda, havaverengeki." 
Jeremiah46:24 “Iye mukunda, Ijipiti achafumurwa achaiswa mumaoko mavanhu vokuchamhembe.”" 
Jeremiah46:25 Tenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri ati: “Chinzwai, ndava kuunza shamhu yangu yokuranga Amoni anoereswa kuTebhesi pamwechete naFarao neIjipiti navamwari vayo namadzimambo ayo, pana iye Farao navanovimba naye." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ndichavaisa mumaoko mavanhu vanovavira kuvapfuudza upenyu, mumaoko maNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi namakurukota ake. Gare gare Ijipiti ichazogarwa zvayo sapamazuva ayo akare ndizvo zvareva Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah46:27 Asi rega hako kutya iwe Jakobho muranda wangu kana kukangaidzwa zvako iwe Isiraeri nokuti tarira, ndichakununura kure ikoko uye zvizvarwa zvako kunyika yavari youtapwa. Jakobho achadzoka agova muchechetere mvura yeguvi; pasisina anomutyisidzira." 
Jeremiah46:28 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Usatye hako iwe Jakobho muranda wangu nokuti ndinewe. Ndichanyatsoparadza ndudzi dzose, dzokwandakakutinhira. Asi iwe handibva ndanyatsokuparadza Ndichakuranga zviri pamwero chaipo Handimborega kukuranga.”" 
Jeremiah47:1 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kunomuporofita Jeremiya richitaura nezvevaFirisitia Farao asati arwisa guta reGaza richiti," 
Jeremiah47:2 “Zvanzi naTenzi, chinzwai, mvura yava kusimuka ichibva kuchamhembe, ichava mafashamo chaiwo ehova dzichanyatsoti fasha nenyika ino nezvose zviri mairi, zvinoti guta navagari vemo. Vanhu vacharidza mhere, mugari wose zvake wenyikayo achihwihwidza kuchema." 
Jeremiah47:3 “Donzwa kukakatika kwamakumbo amabhiza ake makono nokuuruka kumhanya kwengoro dzake dzehondo nokuriridza kwamavhiri adzo madzibaba asisacheuki vana vawo, maoko avo achiti rukutu" 
Jeremiah47:4 pamusana pezuva riri kuuya rokuparadzwa kwavaFirisitia vose, kutsakatisa muyamuri wose akasimba kuTire kana kuSidhoni, nokuti Tenzi ari kuparadza vaFirisitia, marimbirimbi acho evokwaKafutori kunyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa." 
Jeremiah47:5 “VokuGaza vava musvuu, guta reAshikeroni raparara. Imi marimbirimbi evaAnakimu kusvikira rini chaizvo muchingozvicheka-cheka kudai?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Iwe bakatwa raTenzi, kusvikira rini chaizvo kuti uzonyarara. Chizvipinza hako muhara mako uzorore wakati mwi-i." 
Jeremiah47:7 “Ringagonyarara sei kana Tenzi aritemera basa rokuita, rokurwisa kuAshikeroni nokumahombekombe kwegungwa kwaakarituma?”" 
Jeremiah48:1 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri nezveMoabhu, “Zvazoriwana guta reNebho nokuti raparara, Kiriyataimu yanyadziswa, yatorwa, guta remasvingo rafumurwa rapazwa." 
Jeremiah48:2 Mbiri yeMoabhu hapasisina muguta reHeshibhoni imomo vakarirongera bangano rakaipa rokuti, ‘Uyai tiritsakatise sorudzi.’ Nairowo guta reMadhimeni richaitwa kuti riti zirikiti kunyarara, bakatwa richakuronda." 
Jeremiah48:3 “Heyo mhere yarira kuHoronaimu! Hero dongo zvaro, raparara zvokuparara zviya!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Moabhu yaparara, heyo mhere yepwere dzacho" 
Jeremiah48:5 nokuti vanokwira mukwidza wokuRuhiti iri mhere chete kuhwihwidza nokuti pamateru okuHoronaimu heyo mhere yenhamo yokuparadzwa. 
Jeremiah48:6 “Tizai muzviponese. Itai sedhongi romusango murenje," 
Jeremiah48:7 pari pamusana pokuti makavimbaka imi namabasa enyu noupfumi hwenyu, newewo uchatotorwa iye mwari wenyu Kemoshi achaendwa naye kuutapwa, pamwechete navapristi vake namachinda ake." 
Jeremiah48:8 “Mharadzi ichasvika mumaguta ose pasina kana guta rinopapunyuka, nhika ichaparara bani richiparadzwa sokureva kwakaita Tenzi." 
Jeremiah48:9 Ipa Moabhu mapapiro kuti abhururuke, maguta ayo achava matongo asina munhu ageremo.”" 
Jeremiah48:10 Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu asingaite basa raTenzi nomwoyo wose. Ngaawirwe norushambwa munhu anochengeta zvake bakatwa asingadeure ropa naro. 
Jeremiah48:11 Moabhu yakagarika kubvira paupwere hwayo uye igere zvayo kudivi ramakomo kusina mhepo. Haina kana kumbokwengurwa zvayo, chirongo nechirongo kana kutomboendeswa muutapwa. Saka mukanwa mayo muchakangodaro kunhuwirira kwayo hakusatiwo kwasanduka." 
Jeremiah48:12 “Naizvozvo, zvanzi naTenzi chinzwai, ‘Mazuva ari kuuya andichaitumidzira vadeuri vachamurereka vagokwengura midziyo yayo vachipwanya-pwanya zvirongo zvayo.’" 
Jeremiah48:13 Ipapo Moabhu ichanyara namwari wayo, Kemoshi, sokunyara kwakaita imba yeIsiraeri neBhetieri chivimbo chayo." 
Jeremiah48:14 “Chamungabangotaurirawo muchizviti, ‘Tiri magamba chaiwo chii, nemvumba chaidzo dzokurwa hondo,’" 
Jeremiah48:15 Mharadzi dzeMoabhu namaguta ayo vakwidza kuno uku. Majaya ayo, ano chaiwo, akasvika achiti zvino rororo kufa. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Mambo ane zita rokuti Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Jeremiah48:16 Nyatwa yeMoabhu yasvika nhamo yayo iri kumhanya kuuya. 
Jeremiah48:17 Ichemei imi mose muri munharaunda yayo yakaitenderera nemi mose munoiziva nezita. Itii: ‘Zvauya sei chokwadi kuti tsvimbo huru youmambo ityoke, mudonzvo wacho wembiri.’" 
Jeremiah48:18 Jitika pambiri yako apo ugarewo pasi pakati kukutu kuoma, iwe mugari weDhibhoni nokuti mharadzi yeMoabhu yakuvinga ikaparadza nzvimbo dzoko dzokuhwanda muhondo." 
Jeremiah48:19 Mira panzira utarise iwe mugari wokuAroero ubvunze mutizi nomupunyuki kuti, ‘Zvaita sei?’" 
Jeremiah48:20 Moabhu yanyadziswa nokuti yaputsika, hwihwidzai muchichema! Udza vanhu muna Arinoni kuti, Moabhu yaparara." 
Jeremiah48:21 “Yasvika nguva yokutongwa kwenyika yomuzanda wakasandarika neHoroni neJahiza neMefaati 
Jeremiah48:22 neDhibhoni neNebho neBhetidhibhuratimu 
Jeremiah48:23 neKiriyataimu neBhetigamuri neBhetimeoni 
Jeremiah48:24 neKiriati neBhozira namaguta ose enyika yeMoabhu okure neepedyo. 
Jeremiah48:25 Umambo hwekwaMoabhu hwaparara, simba reMoabhu rakaparara. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah48:26 “Muraradzisei nokuti azvitutumadza kwazvo pana Tenzi muite kuti Moabhu isare yava kuumburuka mumarutsi ayo iyowo ive chiseko chenyika. 
Jeremiah48:27 Handiti Isiraeri yanga iri chiseko chako iwe Moabhu. Iyo Isiraeri yakambowanikwa iri pakati pembavha here, zvaunobva wati paunongotaura nezvayo unobva wadzungudza musoro kudaro?" 
Jeremiah48:28 “Tamai mumaguta mundogara mubako, imi vagari veMoabhu. Itai hwenjiva inovaka dendere mumativi memipata yamakomo." 
Jeremiah48:29 Guhu rokuzvikudza kweMoabhu takarinzwa, kuzvikudza kukuru kwazvo nokuzvitutumadza kwayo nokuzvizuwidza kwayo nokuzvidadisa kwayo nomwoyo wayo wokuzvinyundumadza." 
Jeremiah48:30 “Ndinoziva unhunzvatunzva hwayo, kuzvikudza kwayo hakuna zviripo zviito zvayo hazvina maturo. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ndokusaka ndichihwihwidza kuchema Moabhu, ndinobongomora mhere kuchema Moabhu yose, ndinochema vanhu vokuKiriheresi." 
Jeremiah48:32 “Iwe mugirepisi weSibhuma, ndinokuchema kupinda gungwa reJazeru! Mapazi ako anotandira napamusoro pegungwa kusvikira nokuJazeru. Michero yako yapazhizha nezvinobva mumunda wamagiresi zvawirwa nomuparadzi." 
Jeremiah48:33 “Rufaro nokupembera zvabviswa munyika inobereka zvakawanda, nyika yeMoabhu. Ndakaita kuti waini ipwe muzvisviniro zvewaini. Hapana achambokanya magirepisi nenziyo dzokufara, kudaidzira kwaro hakusisiri kwokufara." 
Jeremiah48:34 “Maguta Heshibhoni neEreare aridza mhere nokuJahazi kwose vadudza nezwi ravo kubvira kuZoari kusvikira kuHoronaimu nokuEgiratishereishiya. Chiripo ndechokuti mvura yokuNimurimu yaperawo. 
Jeremiah48:35 Izvozvi ndava kuita kuti Moabhu zvichiiperera, ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi, iyo Moabhu inopira chibayiro panzvimbo yakatunhumara yokuteurira ichipisira rusenzi kuna mwari wayo."
