Jeremiah48:36 Ndokusaka ndichidandaura mumwoyo senyere, ndichichema Moabhu. Mwoyo wangu uri kuchema senyere vanhu vokuKiriheresi nokuti upfumi hwavanga vazviwanira hwaparara." 
Jeremiah48:37 “Musoro woga woga wakaveurwa, uye ndebvu dzose dzaguswa, akachekwachekwa maoko ose akasungira saga muchiuno." 
Jeremiah48:38 Pamatenga ose edzimba dzeMoabhu napamisika yayo kunongova kuchema koga koga, nokuti ndakapwanya Moabhu sehari isina achaida. Ndizvo zvinotaurwa naTenzi." 
Jeremiah48:39 Kupwanyika here ikoko! Kuungudza here ikoko! Kudzoka here ikoko kwakaita Moabhu achinyara! Moabhu yava chiseko chenyika nechinhu chinokatyamadza vose vomunharaunda yayo.” 
Jeremiah48:40 Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi: “Mamboti maonei zvenyu, kuchaita munhu achabhururuka ari mhepo zvayo kumhanya segondo, achitambanudzira mapapiro ake kurwisa Moabhu!" 
Jeremiah48:41 Maguta achatorwa uye nhare dzokuzvidzivirira muhondo dzichabvutwa. Mwoyo yavarwi veMoabhu, pazuva iroro, ichaita semwoyo womukadzi ari pakusununguka." 
Jeremiah48:42 Moabhu ichaparadzwa isisazovazve rudzi, pamusana pokuti yakazvitutumadza ichirwisana naTenzi." 
Jeremiah48:43 Kutyisa negomba nomusungo zvakumirira iwe mugari weMoabhu. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi. 
Jeremiah48:44 “Anenge atiza zvinhu zvinotyisa achawira muhunza anenge abuda muhunza imomo achabatwa nomusungo nokuti ndichapinza Moabhu muna izvozvi mugore rokurangwa kwavo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah48:45 Mumumvuri weHeshibhoni vatizi vanombomiramo simba ravaperera nokuti muHeshibhoni mabvira moto, murazvo wabvira mumba maSihoni. Waroromesa huma yeMoabhu, ndaza youmambo hwokuvanakomana vebongozozo." 
Jeremiah48:46 “Zvakuwana iwe Moabhu! Vanamati vaKemoshi pavo pavaperera nokuti vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vakatapwa vaendwa navo kuutapwa. 
Jeremiah48:47 “Zvakadaro zvazvo ndichadzosera Moabhu makomborero ayo mune ramangwana,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Zvarehwa izvozvi ndokutongwa kuchaitwa Moabhu." 
Jeremiah49:1 Zvanzi naTenzi nezvevekwaAmoni, “KwaIsiraeri hakuna vanakomana here? Hakunawo here mudyi wenhaka? Ko Mirikomu adarirei kutorera vokwaGadhi nyika, vanhu vake vachitondogara mumaguta avo?" 
Jeremiah49:2 “Naizvozvo chinzwai, zvanzi naTenzi, mazuva achasvika andichaitisa kuti ngondo inzwike yokurwisa guta reRabha yevokwaAmoni. Richava chimudhuri chedongo, misha yaro icharoromeswa nomoto. Isiraeri ndopaichapamba vaya vakamboipambawo. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah49:3 “Iwe guta reHeshibhoni hwihwidza kuchema nokuti guta reAi raparara! Ridzai mhere imi vanasikana veRabha! Sungai masaga muchiuno, ungudzai muchimhanya uko nokoko, mukati moruzhowa noruzhowa! Chatovapo ndechichi chokuti iye Mirikomu mwari wenyu achaendwa naye kuutapwa pamwechete navapristi vake namachinda ake." 
Jeremiah49:4 “Chaunozvitutumadzira namapani ako chii, iwe mwanasikana asina kutendeka, iwe unovimba noupfumi hwako uchizviti, ‘Ndiani chaizvo angauye kuzondirwisa?’" 
Jeremiah49:5 Chinzwa, zvanzi naTenzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo ndiri kukuunzira kutya kuchibva kumativi munharaunda mako. Muchatandaniswa muchiburitswa kunze munhu wose achitiza nepaakananga napo ipapo pasina anokokorodza vanenge vatiza." 
Jeremiah49:6 “Asi gare gare ndichazodzosera zvangu makomborero evokwaAmoni ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.” 
Jeremiah49:7 Kune veEdhomu zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo: “Ko munyika yeTemani ungwaru hamusisina here? Vangwaru vapererwa namazano here? Uchenjeri hwavo hwavatiza here? 
Jeremiah49:8 “Pishinukai mutizire kundohwanda munzvimbo dzakadzika-dzika, imi vagari vokuDhedhani nokuti ndichaunza nyatwa yokwaEsau pavari panguva yandichavaranga." 
Jeremiah49:9 “Kuri kuti mavingwa navatanhi vamagirepisi, havangakusiyirei kana mamwe okufuhwa here? Kuri kuti mbavha dzauya nousiku, handiti dzinongopaza pokuzvibatsira idzo chete here?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Asi vokwaEsau ndakavasiya vasisina chavanacho. Pavanohwanda ndakapaisa pachena, kuzvivanza haachagoni. Vana vake vakaparadzwa pamwechete navakoma-navanun'una vake, vavakidzani naye vakapararawo, naiyewo hapasisina." 
Jeremiah49:11 Siyai zvenyu nherera dzenyu, ndichadzichengeta dziri mhenyu uyewo chirikadzi dzenyu ngadzivimbe neni." 
Jeremiah49:12 “Nokuti zvanzi naTenzi: ‘Kana vanhu vakanga vasingakodzeri kunwa mukombe iwoyo vakaunwa, ko iwe ndiwe ungazogare here usina kurangwa? Haumborega kurangwa, unotounwa chete.’" 
Jeremiah49:13 Nokuti ndakapika neni pachangu, ndizvo zvinotaurwa naTenzi, kuti Bhozira ichava chinhu chinokatyamadza. Ichava chiseko nerenje zvaro nechinhu chine rushambwa uye maguta aro ose achava matongo okugara nokugara.”" 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndakanzwa dama rakabva kuna Tenzi nenhume yakatumwa mukati memarudzi avanhu ichiti, “Kokorodzanai pamwechete murwise Edhomu musimuke murwe hondo" 
Jeremiah49:15 nokuti, chionai, ndava kukudukupisai pakati pamarudzi ose kukuitai vanhu vakashoreka mukati mavamwe." 
Jeremiah49:16 Kutyisidzira okuzvikudza kwenyu zvakakufurirai, imi munogara mumikaha yamatombo iyemi munotonga misoro muri pameso pamakomo. Kunyange zvazvo mukaisa matendere enyu padengadenga segondo, ini ndichakutozomorai ipapo. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edhomu ichava chinhu chinokatyamadza. Munhu ose anodimura nemo achakanhamara achiridza muridzo pamusana petsaona dzaro," 
Jeremiah49:18 sezvakaita Sodhomu neGomora pamwechete namaguta akanga akavakidzana nawo paakaparadzwa. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi. Hapana munhu achaita musha imomo kana munhu wokugara kwekanguva chete imomo. 
Jeremiah49:19 Regai muone, ndichaita seshumba yabva mujokochwa romuna Jorodhani ichauya kumafuro, vachaerekana ndava kuvaitisa chimwandamwanda kubva muEdhomu. Ndichaisarudzira chero wandinenge ndada kuti aitonge. Ndinodaro nokuti ndiani akaita seni? Ndiani chaizvo angandigadze dare? Ndoupi mufudzi angamirisane neni?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Naizvozvo chinzwai chirongwa charongerwa Edhomu naTenzi nezvaari kuda kuita kuvagari vokwaTemani ivavo chokuti: Kunyange notwana twedanga irori tuchandundurutswa, danga ravo rigonyatsodumbirwa chaizvo nomugumo wavo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Kurira kwokuputsika kwavo kuchadederesa nyika, mhere yokuchema kwavo ichinzwika kuGungwa Dzvuku." 
Jeremiah49:22 Chinzwai mumwe achakwira mudenga ari mhepo zvayo kubhururuka segondo agovinga guta reBhozira akatambanudza mapapiro. Izvozvo mwoyo wavarwi vokuEdhomu musi iwoyo uchaita somwoyo womukadzi ari mumarwadzo pakusununguka. 
Jeremiah49:23 “Izvi ndizvo zvakataurwa nezveDhamasikusi zvokuti, Hamati neAripadhi vatenderera musoro nokuti varikunzwa mashoko akaipa, vaparara nokutya. Vabvongodzeka segungwa risinganyarari." 
Jeremiah49:24 Dhamasikusi yaondoroka yapishinuka ikatiza. Yabatwa nokutya, yarwadziwa mwoyo yasuruvara somukadzi ene mimba yarwadza." 
Jeremiah49:25 Zvauya sei kuti guta risuwe, guta rangu, guta rorufaro." 
Jeremiah49:26 “Naizvozvo majaya aro achati rakata munhandare dzaro, masoja aro ose achaparadzwa zuva iroro. Ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Jeremiah49:27 “Ndichavesa moto murusvingo rweDhamasikusi ucharoromesa nhare yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo yokwaBhenihadhadhi.” 
Jeremiah49:28 Zvakatongerwa Kedhari nenyika dzeHazori dzakakundwa naNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi. Zvanzi naTenzi, “Simukai murwise Kedhari! Paradzai vanhu vokumabvazuva!" 
Jeremiah49:29 Matendhe avo nezvipfuwo zvavo zvinofanira kuti zvitorwe namachira avo okudzikatirisa nezvinhu zvavo zvose, nengamera dzavo vanofanira kuti vazvitore zviendwe nazvo. Varume vachadaidzira kwavari vachiti, ‘Hokoyoi kumativi kwose kwaipa.’" 
Jeremiah49:30 Tizai, dzengererai muri kure, garai makadzika, imi vagari veHazori. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi. Nokuti Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi akurongerai zano rakaipa, ane chinangwa chakaipa." 
Jeremiah49:31 “Zvanzi naTenzi, Simukai munorwisa rudzi ruri pamutambaratede, rugere zvarwo pasina chinorunetsa rusina misuo mukuru kana zvihuri runogara ruri rwoga." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ngamera dzavo dzinofanira kutorwa, matanga avo emombe apambwa. Vose vanogera vhudzi kuitwa makona mumusoro ndichavati mwarara kumativi kwose. Ndichaita kuti nyatwa dzivakombe kumativi ose, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah49:33 Guta reHazori richava dambiro zvaro ramakava richazogara riri dongo nokusingaperi. Hapana munhu achagaramo kana wokumbogarawo zvake kwekanguva chete imomo.” 
Jeremiah49:34 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kumuporofita Jeremiya richitaura nezveEramu pakutanga kwokutonga kwaZedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha rikati," 
Jeremiah49:35 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Regai muone zvenyu ndichatyora uta hweEramu, musimboti wesimba ravo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndichaita kuti Eramu ivingwe nemhepo dzokumativi mana edenga ndigovati mwarara kumhepo ina dzose idzodzo. Hakuna rudzi rwavanhu kusingazoendwi nevanenge vadzingwa muEramu. 
Jeremiah49:37 Ndichapinza muEramu mweya woumbwende, wokutya vavengi vavo, navanhu vanotsvaka zvokupfuudza upenyu hwavo. Ndichavapinza nhamo ndigouya nehasha dzinotyisa ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndichavatumidzira bakatwa rivaronde kudzamara ndavapedza kuti nho." 
Jeremiah49:38 Izvozvo ndichaisa chigaro changu choumambo muEramu ndigoparadza mambo wavo namachinda avo, ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah49:39 Asi mumazuva okupedzesera ndichadzosera Eramu makomborero ayo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Shoko iri rakataurwa naTenzi nokumuporofita Jeremiya richinangana neBhabhironi uye richinangana nenyika yavaKaridhea rikati: 
Jeremiah50:2 “Paridzai mukati memarudzi avanhu muzivise vanhu nhau dzikai mureza mupadze, regai kuzviviga mumwoyo muti, Bhabhironi yatorwa, mwari wayo Bhero wafumurwa mwari wayo Merodhaki akangaidzwa. Zvifananidzo zvayo zvokunamata zvanyadziswa zvifananidzo zvayo zvokunamata zvakangaidzwa!" 
Jeremiah50:3 Ndinodaro nokuti kuchamhembe, kuri kuuya rudzi rwavanhu kuzorwisa ruchasiya nyika yayo yava renje risina achagaramo vanhu nemhuka zvichatiza." 
Jeremiah50:4 “Zvanzi naTenzi mumazuva iwayo uye panguva iyoyo vanhu vokwaIsiraeri navanhu vokwaJudha vachaungana pamwechete vachichema pavanenge vachiuya kudaro, vachatsvaka Tenzi, Mwari wavo." 
Jeremiah50:5 Vachabvunza nzira yokuguta reZioni vobva vananga kwairi vachiti, ‘Uyai tindozvibatanidza naTenzi nechitenderano chokugara nokugara chisingazokanganikwi.’" 
Jeremiah50:6 “Vanhu vangu vava hwai dzakarasika, vafudzi vadzo vakadzitungamirira mumutome zvamo vakadzisairira mumakomo. Dzava kumbeya namakomo nomuzvikomo dzakanganwa, uye dzisisazivi danga radzo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Chose zvacho chinodziwana chinodzidya uye vavengi vadzo vanotozviti, ‘Hatina mhosva nokuti ivo ndivo vakatotadzira Tenzi, iye ugaro hwavo chaihwo, Tenzi chitarisiro chamadzibaba avo.’" 
Jeremiah50:8 “Tizai mukati meBhabhironi mubve munyika yevaKaridhea muite sezvikotora zvatungamira danga 
Jeremiah50:9 nokuti hezvi ndiri kunyandura boka ramarudzi makuru avanhu okunyika yokuchamhembe andiri kuunza kuzorwisa Bhabhironi. Ivo vacharonganirana kuzoirwisa kubvira ipapo ichatorwa. Miseve yavo yakaita senyanzvi yokurwa hondo isingadzoki isina chayaita 
Jeremiah50:10 Nyika yeKaridhea ichapambwa vapambi vayo vose vachaguta, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Jeremiah50:11 “Kufara, kufara zvako, kupembera, kupembera hako, iyewe nyakupamba nhaka yangu kunyange uchikara hako uswa setsiri kudaro uchihwihwidza somikono yamabhiza," 
Jeremiah50:12 amai vako vachafumurwa zvokunyatsofumurwa zviye, ivo vakakubereka vachanyadziswa. Rega uone, vachava vokupedzesera pamarudzi avanhu, vachava renje rakaoma regwenga zvaro." 
Jeremiah50:13 “Pamusana pehasha dzaTenzi haisi kuzombogarwa navanhu asi ichava renje zvaro. Wose anozopfuura nepaBhabhironi achakatyamadzwa nazvo maronda ayo ose. 
Jeremiah50:14 “Ronganai murwise Bhabhironi muite zvokuikomberana. Imi mose vakungi vouta ipfurei murega kusara kana nomuseve nokuti yakatadzira Tenzi. 
Jeremiah50:15 Iitirei ruzha makaikomberana yakanda pasi mapfumo. Zvainovimba nazvo muhondo zvaputsika masvingo ayo apazwa, nokuti uku ndiko kutsividza kwaTenzi mutsividzei muitewo kwaari zvaakaitawo." 
Jeremiah50:16 “Paradzai varimi vembeu muBhabhironi navacheki vanobata jeko panguva yokukohwa. Pamusana pebakatwa romudzvinyiriri, munhu wose achatizira kuvanhu vokwake, munhu wose achitizira kunyika yokwake." 
Jeremiah50:17 “Isiraeri ihwai iri kuvhimwa iri kudzinganiswa neshumba. Pakutanga akambozhanyiwa neAsiria. Zvino Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi ari kun'un'una mapfupa ake. 
Jeremiah50:18 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo Mwari weIsiraeri, ndiri kuunzira mambo weBhabhironi nenyika yake chirango sokuranga kwandakaita mambo weAsiria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndichadzorera Isiraeri kumafuro ayo. Achafura zvake paKarimeri nokuBhashani. Zvaanoda zvose achazviwana pazvikomo zvokwaEfuremu uyewo muGiriadhi. 
Jeremiah50:20 Pamazuva iwayo, nepanguva iyoyo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, vanhu vachaedza kutsvaka uipi muIsiraeri asi munenge musisina, vachaedza kutsvaka zvitadzo munyika yokwaJudha asi hapana zvavanowana; nokuti ndicharegerera zvitadzo zvechitsama chavanhu vandinenge ndasiya.”" 
Jeremiah50:21 “Endai mundorwisa nyika yeMirataimu mundorwisawo vagari vokuPekodhi. Urayai mutevere muchinyatsoparadza, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi kuti itai zvose zvandati muite." 
Jeremiah50:22 “Mheremhere yehondo yava munyika uye kuparadza kukuru! 
Jeremiah50:23 Zvazoitikaiwe! Iyo nyundo yapasi pose yagwishurwa ikapwanyika! Iyo Bhabhironi chaiyo yava chinhu chinokatyamadza pakati pamarudzi avanhu! 
Jeremiah50:24 “Ndakakuteya ukasungwa nomusungo iwoyo, iwe Bhabhironi asi iwe hauna kuzviziva. Wakaonekwa wakanzi koche mumusungo nokuti wakamirisana naTenzi." 
Jeremiah50:25 “Tenzi azarura maanochengetera zvombo zvokurwisa nazvo muhondo akaburitsa zvombo zvacho zvehasha dzake nokuti Tenzi Mwari wehondo nehondo ane chokuita munyika yavaKaridhea. 
Jeremiah50:26 “Uyai kuzoirwisa muchibva kwose kwose svikozarurai matura ayo muiunganidze kuita mirwi nemirwi sembesanwa mugoitsakatisa pasina charo chinosara. 
Jeremiah50:27 “Handira dzayo dzose, urayai; ngadzinobayiwa. Padzo padziperera nokuti zuva radzo rasvika ndonguva yokurangwa kwadzo." 
Jeremiah50:28 “Havo vanotiza munyika yeBhabhironi kundosvitsa shoko kuguta reZioni rokutsividza kwaTenzi, Mwari wedu, achitsividzira Temberi yake." 
Jeremiah50:29 “Kokai varwi vouta vapfure guta reBhabhironi, vose zvavo vanokunga uta. Dzikai musasa yematendhe makarikomberana parege kuwana anopunyuka. Ngariwane zvinopindiranawo nezviito zvaro muriitire zvakakodzerana nokuitawo kwaro nokuti rakazvikudza richizvidza Tenzi iye Mutsvene weIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah50:30 Naizvozvo majaya aro achati rakata munhandare dzaro uye navarwi vehondo vose vachaparadzwa zuva iroro, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah50:31 “Chiona, ndanangana newe iyewe nyakuzvikudza iwe, ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi, Tenzi wehondo nehondo nokuti zuva rako rasvika, nguva yokuti ndikurange." 
Jeremiah50:32 “Nyakuzvikudza achagumburwa aputsika pasina wokumusimudza. Ndichatungidzawo moto mumaguta ake ucharoromesa zvomunharaunda make.” 
Jeremiah50:33 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, “Vanhu veIsiraeri vari kudzvinyirirwa pamwechete novokwaJudha. Vose vakavatapa vakabva vavabatisisa chaizvo vakaramba kuvarega kuti vaende zvavo." 
Jeremiah50:34 Mununuri wavo anesimba, zita rake ndiTenzi wehondo nehondo. Achavamiririra panyaya yavo kuitira kuti awanise nyika zororo, asi achiishaisa zororo vagari veBhabhironi.”" 
Jeremiah50:35 “VaKaridhea ngavauraiwe nebakatwa ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Vagari veBhabhironi ngavauraiwe nebakatwa. Machindawo avo ngavauraiwe nebakatwa uye vangwaru vavo. 
Jeremiah50:36 Naro bakatwa pavashoperi kuti vave mazungairwa. Naro bakatwa pavarwi vavo vehondo kuti vaparadzwe. 
Jeremiah50:37 Naro bakatwa pamabhiza eBhabhironi nepangoro dzayo dzehondo, uye napahondo dzose dzavarwi vechirudzi vari mukati mayo, kuti vave vakadzi zvavo. Ngaipindirwe nebakatwa muupfumi hwayo kuti hupambwe." 
Jeremiah50:38 Ngavashaye mvura inonaya, mvura yavo ipwe nokuti nyika yavo inyika yezvifananidzo vanopengereka nezvifananidzo zvokunamata." 
Jeremiah50:39 “Naizvozvo mhuka dzomusango mapere zvichagara zvazvo muBhabhironi, nemhou dzichagara zvadzo mairi. Haichazombogarwa navanhu nokusingaperi kana kuzove navanhu vanozomboita musha mairi kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa." 
Jeremiah50:40 Sezvakangoita Mwari kuparadza guta reSodhomu nereGomora namaguta akanga akavakidzana nawo, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, saizvozvo hapanawo achazogaramo kana munhu zvake achaita musha imomo." 
Jeremiah50:41 “Tarira uone vanhu vari kuuya vachibva kuchamhembe rudzi rune simba namadzimambo akawanda hero bvakapfaka riri kubva kwakaperera nyika chaiko. 
Jeremiah50:42 “Vakapakata uta nepfumo, vane utsinye, uye havana tsitsi. Kuriridza kwomutsindo wavo kunenge kuunga kwegungwa, vanotasva pamabhiza vakarongedzera somurwi ari muhondo vachizorwisa iwe mwanasikana Bhabhironi!" 
Jeremiah50:43 “Mambo weBhabhironi akasvitswa shoko rezvavo, maoko ake achibva ati ragwada zvikamushungurudza zvikamurwadza somukadzi arwadzwa nemimba." 
Jeremiah50:44 “Chirega uone zvako, ndichaita seshumba yakwira ichibva mujokochwa resango romuna Jorodhani ichivinga danga rehwai rakasimba, vachayerekana ndovaitisa bararamhanya kutizamo ndigosarudza wandinenge ndada kuti aitonge nokuti ndiani akaita seni? Ndianiwo zvake angandigadze dare? Ndoupi mufudzi angamirisane neni?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Naizvozvo, chinzwai mazano akarongerwa Bhabhironi kuti arikaurise nezvakaipa zvaakarongera nyika yavaKaridhea. Twana twezvipfuo zvavo twuchandundurutswa pamwechete namatanga ezvifuwo zvavowo. Matanga avo achatokanhamiswa nomugumo wavo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Kuriridza kwokukurirwa kweBhabhironi kuchadederesa nyika, mhere yayo ichanzwika mukati memarudzi.”" 
Jeremiah51:1 Zvanzi naTenzi: “Chinzwa, ndava kumutsa mweya womuparadzi wokuzorwisa Bhabhironi, achirwisa vagari veKaridhea." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndichatumira kuBhabhironi vapepeti vachazoipepeta zvavo vachirozva nyika yayo kusiya isisina chinhu, pavachaivinga vakaita zvokuikomberana, pazuva iroro renhamo." 
Jeremiah51:3 “Murwi wouta ngaarege kukunga uta kana kumira ari mademautare. Majaya avo musaasiye ari mapenyu paradzai zvokuparadza zviye hondo yayo yose zvayo. 
Jeremiah51:4 “Vachati rakata kufa munyika yevaKaridhea vamwe vakuvadzwa mumigwagwa yayo 
Jeremiah51:5 nokuti vokwaIsiraeri nevokwaJudha havana kubva vafuratirwa naMwari wavo, iye Tenzi wehondo nehondo. Asi nyika yevaKaridhea yakati pamu pamu kuzara nemhosva dzavakatadzira Mutsvene weIsiraeri." 
Jeremiah51:6 “Tizai mukati meBhabhironi regai munhu wose azviponese upenyu. Regai kutsakatiswawo mukurangwa kwayo nokuti iyi ndiyo nguva yokutsividza kwaTenzi achiiwanisa zvakakodzeranawo nayo. 
Jeremiah51:7 “Bhabhironi, mumaoko aTenzi yaiva mukombe chaiwo wendarama ichiraradzisa pasi pose zvapo. Marudzi aidutira waini yayo ndokusaka marudzi akapengeswa nayo." 
Jeremiah51:8 “Bhabhironi yangoyerekana yati ngondo ngondo yapwanywa, ichemei! Iigirei mushonga webharumu wokuitira kurwadzwa kwayo zvimwe ingarapike." 
Jeremiah51:9 “Taida kurapa Bhabhironi asi haina kurapika. Isiyei tiende mumwe nomumwe kunyika kwake nokuti kutongwa kwake, kwasvika kana nokudenga kunyange nomuchadenga umu." 
Jeremiah51:10 “Tenzi aburitsa pachena kuti hatina mhosva. Chiuya tizivise vanhu muguta reZioni basa raTenzi, Mwari wedu." 
Jeremiah51:11 “Rodzai miseve! Zadzai mikutu! “Tenzi amutsa mweya wamadzimambo wavaMidhi nokuti chinangwa chake neBhabhironi ndechokuiparadza, ikoko ndokutsiva kwaTenzi achitsividzira Temberi yake." 
Jeremiah51:12 “Misai mureza patsvingo dzeBhabhironi, zvokugariridza ngazvisimbaradzwe, isai varwi vokugaririra; vokuhwandira ngavagadzirire. Nokuti Tenzi akaronga uye akaita zvaakataura nezvevagari veBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah51:13 “Imi vokugara kumvura yakawanda imi muzere noupfumi penyu pakupererai, mudzira wakabata upenyu hwenyu wadimurwa." 
Jeremiah51:14 “Tenzi wehondo nehondo apika naiye pachake kuti, ndichakuti farara kuzadza navanhu semhashu vacharidza mupururu wokukurira." 
Jeremiah51:15 “Iye nesimba rake ndiye akaita nyika, ndiye noungwaru hwake akasika nyika. Uye nokunzwisisa kwake akawarira matenga." 
Jeremiah51:16 “Paanongoti buritsei muromo mumwechete mvura inodhiriridza mumatenga. Anoita kuti mhute isimuke kubvira kwakaperera nyika achiita kuti mumvura inonaya muve nemheni achiuyisa mhepo ichibva maanoichengetera. 
Jeremiah51:17 “Munhu wose rangova zungairwa, vanongova vanhu vasina ruzivo, mhizha yose yezvendarama ichinyadziswa nezvifananidzo zvayo zvokunamata nokuti zvifananidzo zvayo zvokunamata hazvina maturo uye hazvina mweya unofema mazviri." 
Jeremiah51:18 “Hazvina kana namaturo ibasa risina musoro. Panguva yazvo yokurangwa zvichaparara. 
Jeremiah51:19 “Iye haana kumboita saizvozvi iye mugove wevokwaJakobho nokuti ndiye akasika zvinhu zvose uye verudzi rwechiIsiraeri ndivo rudzi rwake rwenhaka. Zita rake rinonzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Jeremiah51:20 “Ndiwe nyundo yangu nechombo changu chehondo. Newe ndinopwanyanisa marudzi newe ndinoparadza umambo hwedzinyika. 
Jeremiah51:21 “Newe ndinobvambura-bvambura bhiza nomutasvi waro; newe ndichityoranisa ngoro yehondo nomuchairi wayo. 
Jeremiah51:22 “Newe ndinoita kanyama-kanyama murume kana mukadzi, newe ndichiita kanyama-kanyama munhu wechikuru kana wechiduku. Newe ndinodambura-dambura jaya kana mhandara." 
Jeremiah51:23 “Newe ndinoita kanyama-kanyama mufudzi nedanga rake rezvipfuwo. Newe ndinoita kanyama-kanyama murimi nevechikwata chake. Newe ndinoita kanyama-kanyama vatongi namadzishe. 
Jeremiah51:24 “Ndichatsividza Bhabhironi navagari vose vokuKaridhea iwe uchiona nameso ako pari pamusana pouipi hwose hwavakaita muguta reZioni, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah51:25 “Chinzwa, ndanangana newe zvino iyewe gomo roumharadzi, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi; iwe unoparadza pasi pose. Ndichasumudza ruoko rwangu ndakanangana newe, ndigokukungurutsira pasi pamawere ndichikuita gomo rakatsva." 
Jeremiah51:26 “Mauri hamusi kuzombotorwa ibwe rokuvakisa pakona, kana ibwe zvaro rokuvakisa ugaro, asi kuti uchava dongo rechigariro, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah51:27 “Misai mureza pasi ridzai bhosvo mukati memarudzi, gadzirirai marudzi kuti aite hondo nayo. Kokerai umambo hwedzinyika dzimurwise imi munoti vokuArarati nevokuMini nevokuAshikenazi sarudzai mutungamiriri wehondo vokundoyirwisa unzai mabhiza semhashu dzinoparadza." 
Jeremiah51:28 “Gadzirirai marudzi azoita hondo nayo iwo madzimambo okuMidhi namasadunhu awo navatevedzeri vavo nenyika yose zvayo iri pasi payo. 
Jeremiah51:29 “Pasi padedera pamononoka namarwadzo nokuti zvakarongerwa Bhabhironi naTenzi zvinotoitika, zvokuita kuti nyika yeBhabhironi ive dongo zvaro risina ageremo." 
Jeremiah51:30 “Varwi veBhabhironi varega kurwa vangova munhare dzavo dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo hondo simba ravo rapera, vava vakadzi chaivo, misha yavo iri kuririma nomoto zvihuri zvayo zvatyoka." 
Jeremiah51:31 “Vokumhanya vari kuita zvokutosangana nhume ichisanganawo nenhume kundosvitsa shoko kuna mambo weBhabhironi rokuti guta rake ratorwa mativi ose zvawo. 
Jeremiah51:32 “Mazambuko ava mumaoko mavavengi, nhare dzokuzvidzivirira muhondo dzaroromeswa nomoto, varwi vehondo vatenderera nazvo musoro" 
Jeremiah51:33 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari weIsiraeri, iye mwanasikana uyu, Bhabhironi ava kunge buriro panguva yokupura. Kwangosara kanguva kadikidiki nguva yokukohwa yotosvika.”" 
Jeremiah51:34 Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi akandizhanya akanditsonda. Akaita kuti ndive mudziyo zvawo usina chinhu, andimedza segaranyanya. Azadza dumbu rake noudobo hwangu andidzumburudza." 
Jeremiah51:35 Utsinye hwandakaitirwa ini pamwechete nehama dzangu, ngahuitirwewo kuBhabhironi. Vagari veguta reZioni ngavati: “Ropa rangu ngaripfukire vagari vekuKaridhea,” regai Jerusaremu idaro." 
Jeremiah51:36 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi, “Chinzwa, ini ndichakumiririra ndigokutsividzira. Gungwa rake ndichariomesa, kasipiti kake ndikaomese kuti gwa." 
Jeremiah51:37 Bhabhironi ichava murwi wamatongo dambiro zvaro ramakava nechinhu chinokatyamadza, chinhu chinoridzirwa muridzo wokusiririswa, isina ageremo." 
Jeremiah51:38 “Vachadzvovedzana pamwechete seshumba vachihon'erana sevana veshumba. 
Jeremiah51:39 Pavanenge vane manyawi kudaro ndichavagadzirira mabiko ndivararadzise kusvikira vafarisa uye kuti vakotsire hope dzomutorododo dzavasingazopepukizve, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndichavadzikisa kundobayiwa sehwayana nehondohwe nezvikotora. 
Jeremiah51:41 “Bhabhironi chaiyo, kutorwa uku nhai! Kubatwa here chokwadi iyo chidadiso chapasi pose! Chaiyo Bhabhironi here kuva chinhu chinokatyamadza mukati memarudzi!" 
Jeremiah51:42 “Gungwa rachiti fushe fushe kukwidibira Bhabhironi; Bhabhironi rakwidibirwa namasaisai aro anovhavhamuka," 
Jeremiah51:43 maguta aro ava renje zvaro nyika yakaoma, gwenga zvaro nyika isingagare munhu isina kana munhu anopfuura nomo." 
Jeremiah51:44 Uye ndicharangawo Bheru Mwari wavo, muBhabhironi. Ndichamurutsisa zvose zvaakamedza. Marudzi haasi kuzodiranazve kwaari rusvingo rweBhabhironi rwapazika." 
Jeremiah51:45 “Vanhu vangu! Budai mukati mayo! Munhu wose ngaazviponese upenyu kuhasha dzaTenzi dzinotyisa. 
Jeremiah51:46 Regai kurasa mwoyo kana kutya namarehwarehwa anonzwika munyika. Kana pakauya marehwarehwa gore iri kana kuzouya mamwe marehwarehwa mune rimwe gore, kunyange utsinye hwava munyika mutongi worwisana nomutongi." 
Jeremiah51:47 “Naizvozvo, chinzwa, mazuva ari kuuya andicharanga nawo zvifananidzo zvokunamata zveBhabhironi. Nyika yayo yose ichanyadziswa Vose vanenge vaurayiwa vachati rakata mukati mayo." 
Jeremiah51:48 “Izvozvo matenga napasi nazvose zviri mazviri, zvichaimba nomufaro pamusoro peBhabhironi nokuti mharadzi dzichauya kuzoirwisa dzichibva kuchamhembe ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah51:49 “Bhabhironi inofanira kuti iparadzwewo pamusana pavaIsiraeri vakaurayiwa, sokuti Bhabhironi yakaparadzawo vanhu vakaurayiwa vepasi pose." 
Jeremiah51:50 “Imi vanyakupunyuka bakatwa, chitoendai musambomira henyu. Muri kure kudaro yeukai Tenzi murangarire Jerusaremu kuti:" 
Jeremiah51:51 “Takanyadziswa isu, kutsiudzwa takakunzwa takadonha uso nokunyara nokuti vechirudzi vakapinda munzvimbo dzinoera dzetemberi yaTenzi." 
Jeremiah51:52 “Naizvozvo, mazuva ari kuuya. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi pandicharanga zvifananidzo zvayo. Munyika yayo yose, vanenge vakuvara vachagomera." 
Jeremiah51:53 “Kunyange Bhabhironi ikareba kukwira mudenga. Uye kunyange kukwira kwayo mudenga kukasimbaradzwa, ndichangoiunzira mharadzi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Jeremiah51:54 “Heyo mhere yokuchema muBhabhironi, ruzha rwokuparadza kukuru, ruri kubva munyika yevaKaridhea" 
Jeremiah51:55 nokuti Tenzi ari kuparadza Bhabhironi achiita kuti ruzha rwayo rukuru runyarare. Masaisai avo anoriridza semvura zhinji, mheremhere yamazwi avo yakwira mutanda" 
Jeremiah51:56 nokuti mharadzi yaivinga yasvikira iyo Bhabhironi. Varwi vayo vehondo vatapwa, uta hwavo hwatyorwa-tyorwa nokuti Tenzi, ndiMwari anotsiva achanyatsotsividza." 
Jeremiah51:57 “Ndichararadzisa machinda ayo navangwaru vayo namasadunhu ayo pamwechete navatungamiriri vehondo vayo navarwi vayo vehondo. Vachakotsira hope dzomutorododo dzavasingazopepukizve ndizvo zviri kutaura Mambo iye anonzi Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Jeremiah51:58 “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo rusvingo rwakapamhama rweBhabhironi ruchanyatsonzi pasi mwarara, nemisuo mikuru yaro yakareba kudaro icharirimiswa nomoto. Marudzi achashandira nhando, ndudzi dzavanhu dzichitambudzikira zvinhu zvinopiswa nomoto.”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Izvi ndizvo zvakarongwa nomuporofita Jeremiya kuti zviitwe naSeraya mwanakomana waNeriya vokwaMahiseya pavakaenda kuBhabhironi naZedhekiya mambo wokwaJudha mugore rake rokutonga rechina. Seraya akanga ari jinda racho. 
Jeremiah51:60 Jeremiya akanyora mubhuku nyatwa dzose dzaizofanira kuwira Bhabhironi namazwi ose iwaya akanyorwa anoera nezveBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah51:61 Jeremiya akati kuna Seraya, “Ukange wazosvika kuBhabhironi, uone kuti mashoko ose iwaya waaverenga uti," 
Jeremiah51:62 ‘Imi Tenzi makataura nezvenzvimbo ino kuti muchanyatsoiparadza zvokuti hapana chichazombogaramozve kunyange munhu kana mhuka. Asi kutoti ichava dongo narini wose.’ 
Jeremiah51:63 Paunenge wapedza kuverenga bhuku irori risungirire dombo urikande murwizi rwaYufuratesi 
Jeremiah51:64 utaure uchiti, ‘Ndiko kunyura kuchaitawo Bhabhironi ikoku risingazodzumbunukizve zvichikonzerwa nenyatwa dzandichaiunzira.’ ” Apa ndipo paperera mazwi aJeremiya." 
Jeremiah52:1 Zedhekiya akanga ava namakore makumi maviri nerimwechete paakava mambo. Akatonga kwamakore gumi nerimwechete ari muJerusaremu. Zita raamai vake vainzi Hamutari mwanasikana waJeremiya wokuRibhuna. 
Jeremiah52:2 Iye akaita zvakaipa zvisingadiwe naTenzi achitevedzera zvose zvakanga zvaitwawo naJehoyakimu. 
Jeremiah52:3 Zvakazosvitsa chaipo pokuti Tenzi aite izvi zvakadai zvokubvisa Jerusaremu nenyika yevokwaJudha pameso pake, pamusana pokushatirwa kwaakanga aita. Zedhekiya akazopandukira mambo weBhabhironi." 
Jeremiah52:4 Mugore rechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwaZedhekiya, mumwedzi wegumi, pazuva regumi romwedzi iwoyo, Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi akauya nehondo yake yose kuzorwisa Jerusaremu vakarikomba vakatutira mavhu kurusvingo kuritenderedza chinenge musana kuita chokupindamo nacho." 
Jeremiah52:5 Nokudaro guta rakakombwa kusvikira mugore regumi nechiposhi rokutonga kwamambo Zedhekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Pazuva rechipfumbamwe romwedzi wechina wacho, nzara yakabaya zvinorwadza muguta imomo zvokuti vanhu vomunyika imomo vakanga vasisina chokudya." 
Jeremiah52:7 Kwakapazwa rusvingo muguta imomo, hondo yose yavarwi ikasvova nousiku nokunzira yokusuo guru pakati petsvingo mbiri pedyo nebhindu ramambo, izvozvo vaKaridhea vakarikomba kudaro. Vakananga nokuArabha." 
Jeremiah52:8 Asi hondo yavaKaridhea yakaronda mambo ikabatira Zedhekiya kumapani okuJeriko. Hondo yake yose yakamudzvamuka," 
Jeremiah52:9 ivo vakabata mambo vakauya naye kuna mambo weBhabhironi kuRibhura mudunhu reHamati akamutemera chirango chemhosva yake. 
Jeremiah52:10 Mambo weBhabhironi akauraya vanakomana vaZedhekiya iye akatarisa, akaurayawo machinda ose okwaJudha paRibhura ipapo." 
Jeremiah52:11 Akasvukunura Zedhekiya maziso akamusunga nengetani. Mambo weBhabhironi akaenda naye kuBhabhironi, akamuisa mujeri kusvikira musi waakafa." 
Jeremiah52:12 Mumwedzi wechishanu pazuva regumi romwedzi iwoyo, riri gore regumi nechipfumbamwe rokutonga kwamambo Nebhukadhireza, mambo weBhabhironi, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru mukuru wevachengetedzi vamambo iyeyo, aishandira mambo weBhabhironi akapinda muJerusaremu." 
Jeremiah52:13 Akapisa imba yaTenzi nomuzinda wamambo nedzimba dzose dzeJerusaremu nedzimba dzakanga dzakati kurei dzose akadzipisa nomoto. 
Jeremiah52:14 Hondo yose yevaKaridhea yakanga ino mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo, vakakoromora tsvingo dzose dzakanga dzakapoteredza Jerusaremu." 
Jeremiah52:15 Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo akatapa vamwe vanhu varombo navamwe vose vakanga vasara mugutamo navakanga vapandukira kuna mambo weBhabhironi pamwechete navamwe vose vaive mhizha vakanga vasara. 
Jeremiah52:16 Nebhuzaradhani, mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vokwamambo akasiyawo vamwe varombowo zvavo vokupedzesera vomunyika iyi kuti vave vachengeti vemigirepisi navarimi veminda." 
Jeremiah52:17 VaKaridhea vakadimura-dimura misimboti yendarira yaiva mumba yaTenzi nengoro nezibhavhu ziguruguru riya zvaiva pamba yaTenzi vakatakura ndarira yacho kuBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah52:18 Vakatakura mapoto namafoshoro nezvigero nembenge nendiro dzorusenzi nemidziyo yose yendarira yokushandisa muTemberi 
Jeremiah52:19 uyewo ndiro diki namagwati okutapisa moto nembenge namapoto nezvigadzikiro zvomwenje namadhishi orusenzi nemidziyo yomupiro wokuteura. Zvakanga zviri zvendarama, mukuru mukuru wevachengetedzi vamambo akazvitakura sendarama zvesirivha sesirivhawo." 
Jeremiah52:20 Kana zviri zvemisimboti miviri iya nezibhavhu ziguruguru rimwechete nehandira dzendarira gumi nembiri dzaraigadzikirwa dziya nezvigadzikiro zvacho, zvakanga zvagadzirwa namambo Soromoni achigadzirira imba yaTenzi, ndarira yacho yezvinhu zvose izvozvi hakuzi kurema ikoko kwayaiita." 
Jeremiah52:21 Kana zviri zvemisimboti iya, kureba kwemusimboti mumwechete kwaiita mamita masere, ukobvu hwaro kuritenderera huchiita mamita mashanu ane chikamu chemita chinenge choda kusvitsa chikamu chapakati napakati chemita utare hwacho hwakaita mamirimita makumi manomwe namashanu kukobvuka. Rakanga riine zimhango." 
Jeremiah52:22 Pamusoro paro paiva nechepamusoro chendarira. Kureba kwomusimboti mumwechete kukwira mudenga kwaiita mamita maviri ana masendimita makumi maviri. Paiva nakamumbure uye mapomegiraneti zvose zviri zvendarira zvaiva zviri pane chepamusoro chiya zvakachitenderedza. Uye musimboti wechipiri wakanga wakaita zvimwechetezvo uine mapomegiraneti. 
Jeremiah52:23 Mapomegiraneti aiva kumativi ainge ari makumi mapfumbamwe namatanhatu. Ose pamwechete, mapomegiraneti akakanga akarukirirwa, akatenderera, aiva zana." 
Jeremiah52:24 Mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo uya akatapa mupristi mukuru, Seraya nomutevedzeri wavo Zefaniya nevachengetedzi vatatu vokumusuo." 
Jeremiah52:25 Muguta, akatapa mumwe mukuru mukuru aimbenge ari mutungamiriri wevarwi kuhondo namachinda amambo manomwe vaiva muguta umu nasamunyori womutungamiriri wehondo aitungamirira vanhu venyika iyoyi. Akatapawo makumi matanhatu avarume venyika iyi vaiva mukati megutamo." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebhuzaradhani mukuru mukuru uya wevachengetedzi vamambo akaenda navo kuna mambo weBhabhironi kuRibhura. 
Jeremiah52:27 Mambo weBhabhironi akavaponda vakafa kuRibhura kunyika yeHamati. Ndiko kutapwa kwakaitwa vokwaJudha vachibviswa munyika mavo. 
Jeremiah52:28 Uhu ndihwo uwandi hwavanhu vakatakurwa naNebhukadhireza mugore rechinomwe kuutapwa. Vaiva vari vaJudha zviuru zvitatu zvina makumi maviri navatatu. 
Jeremiah52:29 Mugore regumi nechisere rokutonga kwaNebhukadhireza, akatapa kubva muJerusaremu vanhu vaiita mazana masere ana makumi matatu navaviri." 
Jeremiah52:30 Mugore ramakumi maviri nerechitatu rokutonga kwaNebhukadhireza, Nebhuzaradhani mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo akatapa vaJudha vaiita mazana manomwe ana makumi mana navashanu. Vanhu vose pamwechete vaisvika zviuru zvina zvine mazana matanhatu." 
Jeremiah52:31 Mugore remakumi matatu nechinomwe routapwa hwaJehoyakini mambo wokwaJudha, mumwedzi wegumi nechipiri, pazuva ramakumi maviri nechishanu romwedzi iwoyo, Evhirimerodhaki mambo weBhabhironi, mugore raakatangisa kutonga akasimudzira Jehoyakini mambo wokwaJudha pamusoro akamubudisa mujeri." 
Jeremiah52:32 Akataura naye zvakanaka akamupa chigaro chepamusoro kupinda madzimambo aayiva nawo muBhabhironi. 
Jeremiah52:33 Naizvozvo Jehoyakini akabvisa hanzu dzake dzousungwa. Mazuva ose oupenyu hwake akazenge ava kudya namambo pateburu nguva dzose. 
Jeremiah52:34 Panyaya yezvaaifanira kutambiriswa aitambiriswa mugove wezvinobva kwamambo nguva dzose maererano nezvaikwanisa kumuraramisa zuva nezuva kudzamara pazuva rokufa kwake upenyu hwake hwose. 
Lamentations1:1 O babawe kani! Guta riya rangove guta iwe guta raimbove bvakapfaka ravanhu. Kuita sechirikadzi kudai! Guta raimbova mambokadzi chaiye pamaguta ose nhasi pidigu rava murandawo zvake. 
Lamentations1:2 Usiku rinosvimha misodzi zvinosiririsa, misodzi ichiti mekete mekete, pamatama aro. Pazvikomba hapana kana mumwe wokurinyaradza. Shamwari dzake dzose dzakaritamba isina kunaka, ivo ndivo vatova mhandu dzaro." 
Lamentations1:3 VaJudha, pamusana penhamo, vatapwa noutapwa vakapindana nouranda hwakaomarara vachiti njo mukati mevechirudzi, ivo pokugara vasina, vanodzingirira vaya vakavawira panguva yedambudziko ravo." 
Lamentations1:4 Nzira dzokuenda kuZioni dzinoungudza nokuti anouya kumazuva makuru akatemwa hapana. Misuo yaro mikuru yachiti haradada kushama. Vapristi varo vari kugomera, vanasikana varo vakakwekweretswa, iro guta pacharo riri kutambura zvikuru." 
Lamentations1:5 Mhandu dzavo ndidzo dzava pamusoro, vavengi varo ndivo vabudirira, nokuti Tenzi akavapinza dambudziko pamusana pezvikanganiso zvaro, vana varo vaenda kuutapwa vachitinhwa navavengi vavo." 
Lamentations1:6 Jerusaremu yarasikirwa nomukurumbira wayo, machinda ayo ungati imhara chaidzo dzashaya mafuro dziri kutiza dzisisina simba dzichitiza vanodzidzingirira." 
Lamentations1:7 Hezvo pamazuva ayo enhamo nokurwadzwa Jerusaremu inoyeuka zvinhu zvayo zvinokosha zvaiva zvayo kubvira pasichigare, vanhu vayo pavakawira mumaoko emhandu asi wokuibatsira pakanga pasina, vavengi vayo vaitonakidzwa zvavo nokuitarisa vachiisveeredza pamusana pokuputsika." 
Lamentations1:8 Guta reJerusaremu rakatadza zvakaipisisa rikava chinhu chinosemesa, vaimboriremekedza vavakurishora nokuti vakariona riri mutwi, charo kugomera kwoga nokuvanza uso." 
Lamentations1:9 Tsvina yaro yava pamijivha yaro asi kuti irangarire mugumo waro, haina. Saizvozvo kuputsika kwaro kunotyisa wokurinyaradza hapana. Ndionereiwo nhamo yangu, imi Tenzi muvengi wangu wakurira." 
Lamentations1:10 Mhandu yakatambanudza maoko ayo ichitora zvayo zvinhu zvayo zvinokosha, yakatoona marudzi achipinda zvawo muNzvimbo Inoera ivavo vamakarambidza kupinda muungano yenyu." 
Lamentations1:11 Vose vanhu varo vari kugomera vachitsvaka chokudya, votoshambadza zvinhu zvavo zvinokosha kuti vawane chokudya chokuvasimbaradza. “Tarisai zvenyu Tenzi muone ndiri kushorwa ini.”" 
Lamentations1:12 “Ko imi mose vapfuuri nenzira, hamunei nazvo here? Tarisaiwo zvenyu muone kuti kune nhamowo here yakaita senhamo yangu yakaunzwa pandiri, nhamo yandakapinzwa naTenzi pazuva rehasha dzake dzinotyisa?" 
Lamentations1:13 Akatuma moto ukapinda mumapfupa angu uchibva kumusoro. Makumbo angu akaateya namambure. Akandisiya ndadumbirwa, akandidzosa ndakati rukutu zuva rose." 
Lamentations1:14 “Zvikanganiso zvangu vakazviita sejoko zvaro ravakasungirira namaoko avo pamutsipa wangu; akandipedza simba Tenzi akandiisa mumaoko evandisingagoni kumirisana navo. 
Lamentations1:15 “Tenzi akaseka zvake magamba angu ose okurwa aiva mandiri. Akandirongera hondo yavanhu kuzoparadza vechiduku vangu. Tenzi akatsikatsika Jerusaremu somuguvi rewaini. 
Lamentations1:16 Pamusana paizvozvi ndinochema. Maziso angu anoerera misodzi. Nokuti munyaradzi wokundisimbaradza ari kure neni. Vana vangu vachiti dano, havachisina chavanacho nokuti muvengi akunda." 
Lamentations1:17 Guta reZioni rasimudza maoko richinamata asi wokurinyaradza hapana Tenzi akati vavakidzani naJakobho vave ndivo mhandu dzake. Jerusaremu yave chinhu chinosemesa kwavari. 
Lamentations1:18 “Tenzi haana mhosva ini ndini ndakapanduka pane zvaakataura; asi chimbondinzwai zvenyu nhai vanhu mose muonewo zvenyu kutambura kwangu kuenda kuutapwa kuri kuita vanasikana vangu nevanakomana. 
Lamentations1:19 “Ndakachema kushamwari asi vakandinyengedza, vapristi vangu nevakuru vakuru vafira muguta muno vachitsvaka chokudya chokuzviraramisa." 
Lamentations1:20 “Tarisai zvenyu muone Tenzi nhamo yacho yandinayo. Ini ndatambura ini, mwoyo wangu wadzongodzwa mukati mangu nokuda kwokupanduka kwangu kwakaipisa; mumigwagwa'mu mapakatwa chete kuuraya, mudzimbawo rufu rwoga rwoga." 
Lamentations1:21 “Ndinzweiwo kugomera kwangu, hapana wokundinyaradza. Zvakavafadza kwazvo vavengi vangu vose kunzwa nezvokutambura kwangu kuti ndimi makazviita. Unzai zuva renyu ramakatsidzira ivo vavewo sezvandiri." 
Lamentations1:22 “Dai zvakaipa zvavo zvose zvangouya pamberi penyu zvazvo moitawo kwavari zvamakaita kwandiri.” Muti kwavari, “Sezvamakaita kwandiri nokuda kwezvikanganiso zvangu kuungudza kwangu kwawandisa uye mwoyo wangu warukutika.”" 
Lamentations2:1 Pamusana pehasha dzake Tenzi, kukwidibira here ikoko kwamakaita Jerusaremu negore! Akapatitsira pasi kubva mudenga chinonzi mbiri yaIsiraeri ichocho. Pazuva rehasha dzake haana kuyeuka chitambarariko chetsoka dzake." 
Lamentations2:2 Tenzi zvaasina kuitira tsitsi vagari vose vokwaJakobho akavaparadza akakoromora nehasha nhare dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo dzemisha yokwaJudha. Akaputsira pasi nyika nevatongi vayo akadzinyadzisa. 
Lamentations2:3 Akaparadza nehasha simba rose reIsiraeri. Rubatsiro rwake akarega kuvapa, izvozvo muvengi achiuya. Akapisa, somoto, vokwaJakobho akaroromesa nharaunda yose." 
Lamentations2:4 Akakunga uta hwake somuvengi, rudyi rwake rwateya kune mhandu. Akauraya vanhu vapamwoyo pedu akaviruka nehasha somoto muJerusaremu." 
Lamentations2:5 Tenzi aita somuvengi; aparadza Isiraeri, aparadza mizinda yayo yose. Nhare dzayo dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo, akadziita matongo zvawo. Akawanziridza muJerusaremu kuchema nokuungudza." 
Lamentations2:6 Akaparadza musasa wake somusasa womubindu achiita kuti nzvimbo yamazuva ake makuru ive dongo. Tenzi zvamazuva makuru namaSabata akazvimisa. Madzimambo navapristi akavazvidza pamusana pehasha dzake dzinotyisa. 
Lamentations2:7 Tenzi akashora atari yake. Akaramba Nzvimbo yake Inoera. Tsvingo dzemizinda yake akadziisa mumaoko avavengi. Mumba yaTenzi makaitwa ruzha sapazuva guru rakatemwa. 
Lamentations2:8 Tenzi akatema zvokuita kuti rusvingo rweJerusaremu ruve dongo, akaiganhura netambo rutivi rwaakanyatsoparadza. Nhare norusvingo zvakaungudza zvikadhirika pamwechete." 
Lamentations2:9 Misuo yaro mikuru yakanyura muvhu akaondonga nokutyora zvihuri zvaro mambo waro namachinda aro vari mukati mevechirudzi. Zvomutemo hapachisina; vaporofita havachawana zvavanooneswa naTenzi. 
Lamentations2:10 Vakuru vakuru veJerusaremu vanogara pasi vakanyarara vakazvidira ivhu mumusoro vakapfeka masaga, vasikana veJerusaremu vakakotamisa misoro yavo pasi." 
Lamentations2:11 Maziso angu aneta nokuchema, iyeni pachangu ndadumbirwa shungu dzandipedza mwoyo pamusana pokuparadzwa kweguta ravanhu vangu nokuti vacheche netusvava twuri kuziya mumigwagwa yomuguta." 
Lamentations2:12 Vanochema kunana amai vavo vachiti, “Chingwa newaini zviripi pavanoziya kudaro savarume vakuvadzwa mumigwagwa yeguta vachitandadza vari pamakumbo amai vavo.”" 
Lamentations2:13 Ndoti kudiiko kwauri ndokuenzanisa neiko iwe guta reJerusaremu? Ndokufananidza neiko kuti ndikunyaradze iwe mhandara tsvene yeZioni nokuti sokukura kwakaita gungwa ndokukurawo kwakaita kuparadzwa kwako. Ndiani angakudzorere pakare? 
Lamentations2:14 Vaporofita venyu vaikuonerai zviratidzo zvenhema zvokunyengedza. Uipi hwenyu havana kuhuburitsa pachena kuti zvakanaka zvenyu zvidzokere kwamuri; vakakuonerai zviratidzo zvenhema zvinokutungamirirai kusiri iko. 
Lamentations2:15 Vose vanopfuura nenzira vanorovanisa maoko; vanoridza tsamwa vachidzungudza musoro kuguta reJerusaremu, vachiti, “Ndiro guta riya here iri rainzi rakanakisisa kwazvo rinopa rufaro pasi pose.”" 
Lamentations2:16 Vavengi vako vose vanokusveeredza vachiridza tsamwa vachikunyinurira mazino. Vanotodanidzira vachiti, “Takariparadza; ndiro zuva rataimirira zvino tavanaro, tinoriona.”" 
Lamentations2:17 Tenzi akaita zvaakanga aronga akaita zvaakamboyambira sokutema kwaakanga azviita pasi chigare. Akapaza zvisina tsitsi akaita kuti muvengi afare nezvakaitika kwauri, akasimudzira pamusoro simba ravavengi vako." 
Lamentations2:18 Mwoyo yavanhu inochema kuna Tenzi iwe rusvingo rweJerusaremu misodzi yako ngaiyerere serwizi siku nesikati usazorore kana kuzorodza maziso ako. 
Lamentations2:19 Simuka ucheme usiku pakutanga panguva dzakasiyana-siyana dzokugaririra, durura zviri pamwoyo pako semvura mberi kwaTenzi. Simudzira maoko ako kwaari kuitira upenyu hwavana vako vari kurezuka nenzara pakona yoga yomugwagwa." 
Lamentations2:20 Tarisai muone zvenyu, Tenzi kuti ndiani chaizvo wamuri kuitira izvozvi. Madzimai adye here mapudzi avo, vana vavo chaivo vavanochengeta nerudo kana kuti vapristi navaporofita vauraiwe muNzvimbo Inoera yaTenzi." 
Lamentations2:21 Panze zvapo vakuru navadiki hero gatakata. Mhandara nemajaya vakauraiwa nebakatwa pazuva rehasha dzenyu pamakavauraya muchavakatakazha zvisina tsitsi. 
Lamentations2:22 Makakoka kubva kumativi ose zvinotyisa sokunge pane, zuva guru rakatemwa iyi yakanga iri nguva yenyu yehasha, Tenzi. Hapana aipapunyuka ipapo kana kupararama vandairezva vacho ndichirera vavengi vangu vakavaparadza zvavo." 
Lamentations3:1 Ini ndiri munhu ndakaziva nhamo neshamhu yehasha dzaMwari. 
Lamentations3:2 Akandidzinga akandiendisa murima kwete muchiedza. 
Lamentations3:3 Anonditendeudzira atendeudzazve shamhu yake muswere wose. 
Lamentations3:4 Akaita kuti ndiperezeke muviri neganda rangu zviperezeke; akandityora mapfupa. 
Lamentations3:5 Akandikomberedza akandiputira nenhamo namatambudziko. 
Lamentations3:6 Akandigarisa murima savafi vepasi chigare. 
Lamentations3:7 Akandipoteredza nechidziro zvokuti handikwanise kupunyuka, akandisunga nengetani dzake dzinorema." 
Lamentations3:8 Kunyange ndikachema ndichikumbira kubatsirwa kunamata kwangu akakuvhariridza. 
Lamentations3:9 Akadzivirira nzira dzangu namabwe akavezwa akamonyorotsa nzira dzangu. 
Lamentations3:10 Kwandiri akaita sebere rakavandira uye seshumba yakahwanda. 
Lamentations3:11 Akanditsautsa munzira yangu akandibvadzura-bvadzura akandisiya ndachiti dano! 
Lamentations3:12 Akakunga uta hwake, chaainanga chacho ndini." 
Lamentations3:13 Akandinanga pakaipa nemiseve yegoba rake. 
Lamentations3:14 Ndakave chiseko chevanhu vose ndikave rumbo kwavari muswere wose. 
Lamentations3:15 Akandigutsa nezvinovava akandiraradzisa negavakava. 
Lamentations3:16 Akaita kuti mazino angu agejere namatombo akandiumburudza kumadota. 
Lamentations3:17 Akandibvisira paupenyu chinounza rugare, ndakatokanganwawo chinonzi kugarika." 
Lamentations3:18 Saka ndichiti zvangu zvomukurumbira wangu zvakapera uyewo zvandaitarisira kuna Tenzi zvakapera. 
Lamentations3:19 Ndikafunga nhamo namatambudziko angu ini, igavakava nenduru zvayo." 
Lamentations3:20 Ndinoramba ndichingozvifunga iwe, uye ndave hotakota mukati mangu." 
Lamentations3:21 Asi izvi ndicharamba ndichizviyeuka uye zvichandipa chitarisiro ndezvizvi zvokuti: 
Lamentations3:22 Mwoyochena waTenzi hauperi tsitsi dzake hadziperi. 
Lamentations3:23 Mangwanani oga oga zvinenge zviri zvitsva. Kutendeka kwenyu kwakakura. 
Lamentations3:24 Ini ndinoti Tenzi ndiye nhaka yangu, naizvozvo ndiye chitarisiro changu." 
Lamentations3:25 Tenzi akanaka kuna vanomumirira kumunhu anomutsvaka. 
Lamentations3:26 Chinhu chakanaka kumirira ruponeso rwaTenzi chinyararire. 
Lamentations3:27 Chinhu chakanaka kuti munhu atakure joko rake achiri mudiki. 
Lamentations3:28 Ngaagare pasi chinyararire nokuti ndiMwari anenge ariisa paari. 
Lamentations3:29 Ngaaise zvake muromo wake pavhu zvichida pane chitarisiro chichiripo. 
Lamentations3:30 Ngaaperekere zvake dama rake kune anorova ashorwe zvake zvizere. 
Lamentations3:31 Nokuti Tenzi haarase munhu zvachose. 
Lamentations3:32 Anogona kurwadzisa zvake asi ane tsitsi maererano nokuwanda kwemwoyochena wake. 
Lamentations3:33 Hachisi chinhu chinomufadza kutambudza kana kurwadzisa vanhu. 
Lamentations3:34 Zvokuti vasungwa vose vapasi pose vatsikwe-tsikwe pasi petsoka; 
Lamentations3:35 kana kurega kupa munhu zvaanokodzera, zvaanemvumo nazvo pamberi paWokumusorosoro" 
Lamentations3:36 kana kusatonga mhosva dzavanhu zvakanaka izvozvi izvi Tenzi haazvidi. 
Lamentations3:37 Ndiani angati chinhu ngachiitike chichibva chaitika kusatoti Tenzi ada kuti chiitike. 
Lamentations3:38 Zvingave zvinhu zvakanaka kana zvakaipa handiti zvinenge zvatobva mumuromo woWokumusorosoro here? 
Lamentations3:39 Chero munhu ari mupenyu chete anganyunyutirei kana achirangirwa zvitadzo zvake. 
Lamentations3:40 Ngatitarisei tiongorore nzira dzedu tidzokere kuna Tenzi. 
Lamentations3:41 Ngatisimudzirei mwoyo yedu namaoko edu kuna Mwari kudenga tichiti," 
Lamentations3:42 “Takatadza tikapanduka; asi imi hamuna kuregerera. 
Lamentations3:43 Makamonerwa nehasha mukatironda muchiuraya zvisina tsitsi. 
Lamentations3:44 Makazviputira imi negore zvokuti hapana munamato unogona kupfuura. 
Lamentations3:45 Makatiita zvinhu zvisina maturo namarara pakati pavanhu. 
Lamentations3:46 “Vavengi vedu vanotisveeredza. 
Lamentations3:47 Kutya nehunza kwatiri zvauya uye kupera nokuparadzwa. 
Lamentations3:48 Maziso angu anoyerera hova dzemisodzi pamusana pokuparadzwa kweguta ravanhu vangu. 
Lamentations3:49 “Maziso angu acharamba achingosvimha misodzi pasina zvokumbomira. 
Lamentations3:50 Kusvikira Tenzi atarisa kubva kudenga azviona. 
Lamentations3:51 Zvandinoona zvakaitika kuvakadzi vose veguta rangu zvinondirwadza. 
Lamentations3:52 “Ndakavhimwa ndavhimwazve seshiri navakanga vari mhandu dzangu pasina chikonzero. 
Lamentations3:53 Vakandipinza mugomba ndiri mupenyu vakakungurutsira dombo pandiri. 
Lamentations3:54 Mvura yakandikwidibira musoro ndikati ndaparara ini. 
Lamentations3:55 “Ndakakudaidzai nezita imi Tenzi, ndiri pasi pegomba." 
Lamentations3:56 Makanzwa imi chichemo changu musadzivire nzeve yenyu pandinochemera rubatsiro. 
Lamentations3:57 Makauya pedyo pazuva randakadanidzira kwamuri mukanditi, ‘Usatye.’" 
Lamentations3:58 “Makaita hanya nezvenyaya yangu, Tenzi mukanunura upenyu hwangu." 
Lamentations3:59 Imi Tenzi makaona zvakaipa zvakaitwa kwandiri. Ndienzanisireiwo nyaya yangu. 
Lamentations3:60 Makaona, imi, kutsividza kwavo kwose netwavaindirongera." 
Lamentations3:61 “Makanzwa imi Tenzi kunyomba kwavo netwose twavanondirongera vanondinyeya nokundifungira 
Lamentations3:62 vavengi vangu vanondinyeya vachindifungira muswere wose wezuva. 
Lamentations3:63 Kunyange pavanenge vagere zvavo kana kuti pavanenge zvino vamira ini ndini ndinongova rumbo rwavo. 
Lamentations3:64 “Tenzi, dai mukavadzorera maererano nezviito zvamaoko avo." 
Lamentations3:65 Vaomeserei mwoyo muvarengerere rushambwa. 
Lamentations3:66 Muvadzingirire nehasha muvaparadze imi Tenzi, mudenga imomo.”" 
Lamentations4:1 Kubhuruvara here ikoko kwaita ndarama yedu! Ungati kusanduka here ikoko kwaita ndarama yakanakisisa. Matombo enzvimbo inoera achiti zvawo katakata pamakona emigwagwa yose. 
Lamentations4:2 Tarisai muone vanakomana veJerusaremu vaimbova nouremo hwavo sendarama yakanakisisa, zvino kuita sehari dzevhu zvadzo dzakaumbwa namaoko omuumbi!" 
Lamentations4:3 Kunyange makava chaiwo anopa achiyamwisa vana vawo asi madzimai emuvanhu vangu vave noutsinye, vaita seshiri yemhou murenje." 
Lamentations4:4 Rurimi rwamanyana rwavakutonamatira kumusoro mukanwa pamusana penyota, twana twunokumbira chokudya asi hapana anotwupa." 
Lamentations4:5 Vaye vaidyiririra twunonaka vari kupararira mumigwagwa. Vaya vakarerwa muupfumi vava kutorara pamaturunhuru zvapo. 
Lamentations4:6 Chirango cheguta revanhu vangu chikuru kupinda chirango cheSodhomu rakaparadzwa nekanguva kadikidiki pasina maoko akashandiswa pariri. 
Lamentations4:7 Machinda aro akanga akachena kupinda mazaya echando; akachena kupinda mukaka. Miviri yavo yakanga yatsvukira kupinda mabwe ekorari; runako rwechimiro chavo rwakanga rwakaita sesafaya. 
Lamentations4:8 Asi zvino zviso zvavo zvakasviba kupinda tsito. Hapana aigona kuvaziva mumugwagwa, ganda ravo rakaunyana rikaomorerana namapfupa avo rikaoma somuti." 
Lamentations4:9 Vakauraiwa namapakatwa vaiva nani pane vokufa nenzara vakaondoroka nokushaya michero yeminda. 
Lamentations4:10 Maoko amadzimai etsitsi akabika vana vavo pachavo vakave chokudya chavo pakaparadzwa guta revanhu vangu. 
Lamentations4:11 Tenzi akanyatsoviruka chaizvo nehasha dzake akanyatsoratidza hasha dzake dzinotyisa akabakisa moto muZioni ukapisa ugaro hwaro. 
Lamentations4:12 Madzimambo apasi pano havana kutenda, kunyange vagari vepasi pose havana kutenda kuti mhandu kana kuti muvengi angapinde mumisuo mikuru yeJerusaremu." 
Lamentations4:13 Izvi zvakaitika pamusana pezvitadzo zvavaporofita varo nouipi hwavapristi varo vaideura ropa ravakarurama mukati maro. 
Lamentations4:14 Vakadzengerera neguta samapofu mumigwagwa vakanga vakazorwa-zorwa ropa zvokuti hapana aida kuvabata hanzu. 
Lamentations4:15 Vanhu vaidaidzira vachiti, “Ibvai makan'ora ibvai ibvai musavabate.” Naizvozvo vakave vatizi navadzungairi. Ndizvo zvaitaurwa nevechirudzi. Zvokuti vagare nesu hapachisina." 
Lamentations4:16 Tenzi pachake akavamwararisa akarega kuita hanya navo; akarega kuremekedza vapristi; kana kupa rukudzo kuvakuru-vakuru. 
Lamentations4:17 Takanga tichitsvokorera maziso tichitarisira rubatsiro, takatarisa tatarisazve kunyika isingakwanise kununura." 
Lamentations4:18 Vanhu vakatiteeredza kwataienda zvokuti hataikwanisa kufamba mumigwagwa yedu. Kuguma kwedu kwakanga kwaswedera. Mazuva edu akanga apera, mugumo wedu wakanga wasvika." 
Lamentations4:19 Vaitironda vaimhanya kupinda magora omudenga umu. Vakadzingirirana nesu mumakomo vakatigaririra murenje. 
Lamentations4:20 Iye upenyu hwedu, muzodzwa waTenzi akatorwa mumakomba avo imomo iye wataiti isu, mumumvuri make ndimo matichagara tiri mukati mevechirudzi." 
Lamentations4:21 Pembera ufare zvako iwe guta reEdhomu iwe mugari wenyika yokwaUzi. Nyange kwauri iyewe mukombe wenhamo uchakuvingawo, uchararadza ugopfekenura kusara wave musvo." 
Lamentations4:22 Chirango chako iwe guta reZioni chakwana, haachazokuendesazve kuutapwa asi uipi hwako iwe guta reEdhomu uchahurangirwa, zvitadzo zvako achazviburitsa pachena." 
Lamentations5:1 Yeukai, Tenzi zvakatiwira, mutarisewo zvenyu muone kunyadziswa kwedu." 
Lamentations5:2 Nhaka yedu yashanduka yava yavatorwa, dzimba dzedu dzava dzamabvakure." 
Lamentations5:3 Taita senherera dzisina baba; vanaamai vedu vaita sechirikadzi. 
Lamentations5:4 Tavakutobhadhara mvura yatinonwa, huni dzatinowana totoita dzokutenga." 
Lamentations5:5 Nejoko redu pamutsipa iwe, tinochairwa zvakaomarara uye taneta, zororo hatipiwi." 
Lamentations5:6 Takaombera maoko isu kuvaIjipiti nokuvaAsiria kuti tiwane chokudya chakakwana. 
Lamentations5:7 Madzitateguru edu akatadzira Mwari zvino havachisipo; asi isu ndisu tava kutakura mutoro wouipi hwavo. 
Lamentations5:8 Tava kutongwa isu navaranda, wokutinunura kwavari hapana." 
Lamentations5:9 Chokudya chedu tinochiwana nenhamo. Pamusana pehondo yebakatwa inobva kurenje'ku. 
Lamentations5:10 Ganda redu ratumha kupisa sehovhoni pamusana pokupisa kwaita nzara. 
Lamentations5:11 Vakadzi vari kubhinywa muZioni'mu, mhandara dzichibatwa chibharo mumaguta okwaJudha." 
Lamentations5:12 Machinda ari kurembedzwa akasungirirwa maoko; vakuru-vakuru rukudzo havachapiwaba. 
Lamentations5:13 Majaya vanofondokeswa naro basa pamakuyo, vakomana vachidhadharika nawo masvinga ehunhi." 
Lamentations5:14 Harahwa matare dzakaasiya vechidiki vakasiyawo zvokuimba. 
Lamentations5:15 Rufaro rwatibva mumwoyo; kudzana kwedu kwasanduka kukava kuchema. 
Lamentations5:16 Ndaza yakudubuka mumusoro medu; hamhenoka zvedu iyesu nokutadzira Mwari kwedu ikoku. 
Lamentations5:17 Pamusana pazvo tinorwadziwa mwoyo, pamusana paizvozvo maziso tavakuonera madzerere." 
Lamentations5:18 Guta reZioni rangove guta, ndomava mumusha memakava." 
Lamentations5:19 Asi imi Tenzi munotonga nokusingaperi; chigaro chenyu choushe chinoramba chiripo kwezvizvarwa nezvizvarwa. 
Lamentations5:20 Munotikanganwireiko nokusingaperi munotirasireiko kwenguva yakareba kudai? 
Lamentations5:21 Tidzorerei kwamuri Tenzi kuti tidzokere pakare. Vandudzai mazuva edu ave sakare. 
Lamentations5:22 Kana kuti mabva matiramwa zvachose here; uye hasha dzenyu dzakanyanyisa here? 
Ezekiel1:1 Zvakaitika kuti mugore rechimakumi matatu mumwedzi wechina pazuva rechishanu romwedzi iwoyo pandakanga ndiri pakati penhapwa pedyo nerwizi rweKebhari, denga rakazaruka ndikaona zviratidzo zvaMwari." 
Ezekiel1:2 Pazuva reshanu romwedzi iwoyo (muri mugore rechishanu rokutapwa kwamambo Jehoyakini)," 
Ezekiel1:3 izwi raTenzi rakauya kumupristi Ezekieri, mwanakomana waBhuzi, munyika yavaKaradhea pedyo nerwizi rweKebhari, izvozvo simba roruoko rwaTenzi rakava paari ikoko." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ndakatarisa, onei hero dutu remhepo richibva kuchamhembe uye negore guru nomoto wainjenjema nechiedza chaipenya kwazvo kuritenderedza. Moto wairamba uchingovavaya, izvozvo mukati memoto makaita sendarira." 
Ezekiel1:5 Zvino mukati macho makabuda zvimwe zvinhu zvina zvakaita sezvisikwa zvipenyu. Chimiro chazvo chakanga chakadai seizvi, zvakanga zvakaita savanhu." 
Ezekiel1:6 Asi chimwe nechimwe chazvo chaiva nezviso zvina uye chimwe nechimwe chazvo chaiva namapapiro mana. 
Ezekiel1:7 Makumbo azvo aiva akati twasu uye tsoka dzamakumbo azvo dzakanga dzakaita samazondo emhuru dzichipenya sendarira yakakwenenzverwa. 
Ezekiel1:8 Pasi pamapapiro azvo, kumativi mana azvo, zvaiva namaoko omunhu. Pahuna hwazvo, uso hwazvo namapapiro azvo zvakanga zvakamira zvakadai sezvizvi:" 
Ezekiel1:9 mapapiro azvo akanga akagumana chimwe nechimwe chazvo chaingofamba chakananga pachakananga chichienda chisingatsauki. 
Ezekiel1:10 Uso hwazvo hwaitarisika sezvizvi: chimwe nechimwe pahuna hwazvo, chaiva nouso hwomunhu. Pahuna hwazvo ihwohu zvaiva nouso hweshumba nechokurudyi kwazvo, zviri zvina kudaro zvaiva nouso hwemombe kuruboshwe uye pahuna hwazvo kudaro zviine uso hwegondo." 
Ezekiel1:11 Ndizvo zvakanga zvakaita uso hwazvo. Mapapiro azvo akanga akatambanudzirwa mudenga, chimwe, nechimwe, chezvisikwa izvozvo chaiva namapapiro maviri zvakagumana mapapiro izvozvo namamwe maviri zvakafukidza muviri wazvo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Zvino chimwe nechimwe chaifamba chakananga pachakananga zvichienda kwose kwose kwainge kuchienda mweya, zvaienda zvisingatsauki." 
Ezekiel1:13 Zvinhu izvozvo zvanga zvakaita samazimbe ari kubhebha nomoto, semazhenje omoto, kana kuti semwenje unovheya-vheya pakati pezvinhu zvipenyu zviya. Moto wacho wakanga uchipenya, mheni yaivaima mauri." 
Ezekiel1:14 Zvinhu zvipenyu zviya zvaimhanya-mhanyawo sokupenya kwemheni. 
Ezekiel1:15 Zvino ndakati ndatarisa zvisikwa zvipenyu zviya ndikaona chimwe chezvipenyu izvozvo paine vhiri rimwechete. 
Ezekiel1:16 Mamiriro akanga akaita mavhiri iwaya namagadzirirwo awo ndeaya: Kutarisika kwawo kwakanga kwakaita sokupenya kweibwe rinokosha rebheriri. Ari mana kudaro akanga akafanana. Magadzirirwo awo aiva akaita sevhiri mukati merimwe vhiri. 
Ezekiel1:17 Paainge ofamba, aifamba akananga chero kune rimwe divi ramativi mana awo, achienda zvisingatendeuki." 
Ezekiel1:18 Mavhiri mana iwaya aiva namarhimu nezvipokisi. Marhimu awo akanga akazara namaziso kutenderera. 
Ezekiel1:19 Zvisikwa zvipenyu zviya pazvaifamba mavhiri aifambawo ari pamativi pazvo. Paisumukawo zvinhu zvipenyu izvozvo mudenga zvichibva pasi mavhiri acho aisumukawo mudenga. 
Ezekiel1:20 Kwose zvako kwainge kuchienda mweya izvo zvaiendawo, mavhiri acho aibva angosumukawo pamwechete nazvo nokuti mweya wezvisikwa zvipenyu izvozvo wakanga uri mumavhiri." 
Ezekiel1:21 Hwaingova hwese, zvichiti kwazvaenda, iwo oendawo, zvikamira iwo omirawo, pazvaisumuka mudenga kubva pasi, iwo mavhiri aisumukawo nazvo nokuti mweya wezvisikwa zvipenyu izvozvo waiva mumavhiri acho." 
Ezekiel1:22 Pamusoro pezvisikwa zvipenyu izvozvo paiva nechimwe chakaita seziendanakuenda romudenga, chakati ngwe-e kuchena sekirisitaru yakati chinga chinga pamusoro pazvo." 
Ezekiel1:23 Izvozvo pasi pedenga racho mapapiro azvo akanga akatambanudzwa zvakatwasuka akatarisana uye chimwe nechimwe chazvo chaiva namapapiro maviri akafukidza muviri wacho. 
Ezekiel1:24 Zvisikwa zvipenyu izvi zvaiti zvikafamba, ini ndonzwa kubhabhama kwamapapiro azvo soruzha rwemvura zhinji, sokudhiriridza kwaiye Aripagomo, murikitira zvawo wemhomho unenge zhwerendende regurusvusvu rehondo. Zvaiti zvikati mbikiti kumira, mapapiro zvoati pasi regedzerei." 
Ezekiel1:25 Paibva pabva izwi raibva muziendanakuenda romudenga pamusoro pazvo, izvo zvakati mbikiti kumira kudaro, mapapiro zvakati pasi regedzerei saizvozvo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Nechapamusorowo muziendanakuenda pakaonekwa chimwe chainge chigaro choumambo ibwe rinokosha resafaya rakaita sechigaro choushe pakanga pakagarwa nechimwe chinhu chine chimiro chinenge chomunhu. 
Ezekiel1:27 Kubvira mainge muchiuno chake zvichikwira ndakaona chinenge ndarira yainjenjemera somoto wakachitenderedza. Kubvawo mainge muchiuno macho zvichidzika ndakaona chainge moto. Uye kwakanga kwangoti ngwe-e kuchena kumutenderedza. 
Ezekiel1:28 Sezvakangoita muraraungu mumakore pamusi wemvura ndokuonekwa kwaita chiedza kutenderera. Ikoku ndokutarisika kwaiita kupenya kokuvapo kwaTenzi. Zvino ini pandakakuona ndakati pasi zvambarara ndikabva ndanzwa izwi romumwe aitaura. 
Ezekiel2:1 Iye akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu mira namakumbo ako nditaure newe.”" 
Ezekiel2:2 Paakataura kwandiri, Mweya wakapinda mandiri akandisimudza ndikamira namakumbo angu ndikamunzwa achitaura kwandiri." 
Ezekiel2:3 Akati kwandiri, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu ndinokutuma kuvanhu veIsiraeri, kurudzi rwemhandupandu dzavanhu vakandipandukira. Ivo namadzibaba avo vagara vari vanhu vokundipandukira kusvikira pari nhasi." 
Ezekiel2:4 Vanhu vakaoma musoro; ndambakuudzwa dzavanhu, ndavakukutuma kwavari undovataurira kuti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari" 
Ezekiel2:5 ‘Vangarege kuteerera pamusana pokuti vanhu ivava vanhu vakapanduka. Vangateerere kana kuti vachaziva kuti panga pane muporofita pakati pavo.’ 
Ezekiel2:6 Iwe mwnakomana womunhu usavatye kana kutya zvavanotaura, kunyange zvazvo kwauri vari rukato neminzwa sokunge ugere pamusoro pamarize usatye zvavanotaura kana kutyiswa nokutarisika kwavo nokuti imba yakapanduka." 
Ezekiel2:7 Uchandovataurira mazwi angu kunyange vakateerera kana kuti vakaramba kuteerera nokuti imba yakapanduka. 
Ezekiel2:8 Asi iwe mwanakomana womunhu teerera zvandinokutaurira, usapanduke semba iyi yakapanduka, shama muromo wako udye chandinokupa." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ndakati tarisei, onei ruoko rwakanga rwatambanudzwa kwandiri, wonei muruoko macho maiva nebhuku rokumononora rakanyorwa." 
Ezekiel2:10 Akaritambanudza pamberi pangu; raiva rakanyorwa seri neseri. Mariri makanga makanyorwa mazwi okuchema nokuungudza nokuyambira.” 
Ezekiel3:1 Akanditizve, “Mwanakomana womunhu idya zvauri kupiwa izvo. Idya bhuku rokumononora iri uende undotaura kumba yeIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel3:2 Saizvozvo ndakashama muromo akandipa bhuku rokumononora kuti ndidye. 
Ezekiel3:3 Akatizve kwandiri, “Iwe munhu idya bhuku iri rokumononora randiri kukupa uzadze dumbu rako naro.” Ipapo ndakaridya, mukanwa mangu umu raitapira souchi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Akatiwo kwandiri, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu chienda kumba yaIsiraeri utaure kwavari namazwi angu aya." 
Ezekiel3:5 Chiripo ndechokutika handisi kukutuma kune vanhu vanotaura chirudzi kana mumwe mutauro wakaoma, asi kuti kumba yaIsiraeri," 
Ezekiel3:6 kusiri kumarudzi mazhinji anotaura chirudzi, kana mumwe mutauro wakaoma una mazwi ausingagoni kunzwisisa. Kuri kuti chaizvoizvo ndakutuma kuvanhu vakaita saivavo vaikunzwa." 
Ezekiel3:7 Asi imba yokwaIsiraeri haikunzwi nokuti havadi kunditeerera nokuti imba yose yokwaIsiraeri yakaoma musoro, indambakuudzwa dzavanhu." 
Ezekiel3:8 Chinzwa ndinokupa uso hune chivindi chokutarisana navo ndichiita kuti uomeserane navo musoro. 
Ezekiel3:9 Ndaita kuti uve nomusoro wakaoma kuti papata chaizvo seibwe romusarasara. Rega kumbovatya kana kuzeza mutarisiro wavo nokuti imba yemhandupandu dzavanhu.” 
Ezekiel3:10 Uyezve akatiwo kwandiri, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, mashoko angu ose andichakutaurira agamuchire mumwoyo mako, uanzwe nenzeve dzako," 
Ezekiel3:11 ugoenda kunhapwa kuvanhu vokwako undovati ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari kunyange vakanzwa kana zvavo vakaramba kunzwa.” 
Ezekiel3:12 Ipapo Mweya wakandisumudza, ndikabva ndanzwa mushure mangu kudhiriridza kukuru kwokundengendeka zvichinzi, “Mbiri yaMwari ngairumbidzwe munzvimbo yake.”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Izvozvo kwakanga kuri kubhabhama kwemapapiro achirovana ezvisikwa zvipenyu zviya, uyewo nokuriridza kwamavhiri aya pamativi azvo kwaidhiriridza sokundengendeka kukuru." 
Ezekiel3:14 Mweya wakandisumudza mudenga saizvozvo akaenda neni ndikaenda mweya wangu uchishungurudzwa kwazvo neshungu. Izvozvo simba roruoko rwaTenzi rakandibata kwazvo. 
Ezekiel3:15 Ndakasvika kuTerabhibhi kunhapwa dzaiva dzigere parwizi rwaKebhari. Ndakagarapo pakati pavo kwamazuva manomwe ndakadumbirwa nazvo. 
Ezekiel3:16 Kuzoti kwapera mazuva manomwe, shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel3:17 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu ndakuita nharirire yemba yaIsiraeri. Paunongonzwa chete shoko randinoreva nomuromo wangu, unofanira kuti uvape yambiro yangu." 
Ezekiel3:18 Kana ndikati akaipa, uchafa, zvirokwazvo iwe ukarega kumuyambira kana kunyevera akaipa kuti akande pasi nzira yake yakaipa kuitirawo kuti azviponese upenyu, munhu akaipa iyeyo achafira muuipi hwake, asi mhosva yokudeuka kweropa rake ndinoipa iwe." 
Ezekiel3:19 Asi kana uchinge wayambira akaipa iyeyo, iye agorega zvake kutendeuka kuuipi hwake kana munzira yake yakaipa, achafira muuipi hwake ihwohwo, asi iwe unenge wanunura mweya wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 “Uyezve kana munhu akarurama akatsauka pakururama kwake akaita zvakaipa, ini ndikamuisira chibingamupinyi achafa pamusana pokuti unenge usina kumupa yambiro achafira chitadzo chake ichocho, mabasa ake akarurama aya aakamboita haazomborangarirwa, asi mhosva yokudeuka kweropa rake ndichaipa iwe." 
Ezekiel3:21 Asi kana ukayambira munhu akarurama iyeyo kuti arege kupara chitadzo, iye akarega kuita chitadzo, kurarama achatorarama nokuti akateerera kuyambirwa. Iwe uchazviponesawo upenyu.”" 
Ezekiel3:22 Ruoko rwaTenzi rwakanga ruri pamusoro pangu, akabva ati kwandiri, “Chisimuka uende kubani! Ndichataura newe ikoko.”" 
Ezekiel3:23 Saizvozvowo ndakasimuka ndikaenda kubani, onei kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kumire pakadaro apo sokupenya kuya kwandakaona pedyo nerwizi rwaKebhari ndikabva ndati pasi zvambarara uso." 
Ezekiel3:24 Asi Mweya akapinda mandiri akandimisa namakumbo akataura neni achiti, “Chienda undozvipfigira mumba mako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Iwe mwanakomana womunhu uchasungwa netambo zvokutadza kubuda mukati mavanhu. 
Ezekiel3:26 Ndichaita kuti rurimi rwako runamatire mukanwa mako zvokuti uchava chimumumu ugotadza kuvadzora nokuti imba yavanhu vakapanduka. 
Ezekiel3:27 Asi kana ndataura kwauri ndichakuzarurira misuo; unofanira kuti zvanzi naTenzi, ‘Anenge achikunzwa ngaanzwe. Anenge asingade kunzwa ngaarege zvake nokuti imba yakapanduka.’" 
Ezekiel4:1 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu tora chidhina uchiise mberi kwako ukwenge pachiri mufananidzo weguta reJerusaremu. 
Ezekiel4:2 Uisepo zvokurikomba nazvo zvehondo, uye rusvingo rwakavakwa rwakaritenderera rwokurikomba narwo unyorewopo chinenge musana wenzou chevhu chakatsamirana naro. Utarepo musasa wematendhe wakarikomba ugoriisirawo zvombo zvakaita sehondohwe zvokuridhugumurisa zvakadzikwa zvakaritenderera." 
Ezekiel4:3 Unozotorawo chirata chesimbi wochimisa chakaita sorusvingo rwesimbi ruri pakati pako neguta racho iroro. Iwe wobva wanyatsotarisana naro uriite segutawo ratova mukukombwa chaimo uite kuti kukombwa kwacho kubva kwanyatsotsviriridzawo chaizvo. Ichochi ichi chiratidzo chokuitira imba yaIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel4:4 “Pedzezvo worara nokuruboshwe kwako iniwo ndichaisa uipi hweIsiraeri pauri, mazuva ose aunenge wakarara naikoko unenge wakatotakura chirango chavo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ndiri kukutemera chirango cheIsiraeri chamazuva mazana matatu namazuva makumi mapfumbamwe, zuva roga roga richimirira gorewo rokurangwa kwavo." 
Ezekiel4:6 “Kana wapedza mazuva iwaya, unofanira kuvata kechipiri nokurudyi kwako utakure chirango chevemba yokwaJudha. Ndinokutemera makumi mana amazuva, zuva richimiririra gore." 
Ezekiel4:7 “Unofanira kutarisa wakanangana nokukombwa kweJerusaremu wakarikungira chibhakera pachena ugoporifita uchiyambira guta iroro kuti: 
Ezekiel4:8 ‘Zvino chiteerera unzwe, ndichakusunga mbira dzakondo netambo zvokuti unotadza kupindukira kune rimwe divi kudzamara nguva yako yokukombwa yapera.’" 
Ezekiel4:9 “Tora koroni nebhari nebhinzi nenyemba namapfunde nekoroni yesipereti uzvisanganise mumudziyo mumwechete ubike chingwa nazvo. Mumazuva acho aunenge wakatseyama norutivi aya, mazana matatu namakumi mapfumbamwe ndochaunenge uchidya." 
Ezekiel4:10 Chokudya chauchadya iwe pazuva chinofanira kunge chichirema mazana maviri amagiramu ana magiramu makumi matatu. 
Ezekiel4:11 Izvozvo mvura yako yokunwa inenge ichitoitwa zvokuyerwa. Unofanira kunwa magirazi emvura maviri kamwechete pazuva. 
Ezekiel4:12 Unofanira kuchidya sechingwa chebhari uchibike vachiona pamoto wendove yavanhu.” 
Ezekiel4:13 Tenzi akatiwo, “Ndomadyiro achaita vaIsiraeri chingwa chavo chakan'ora pakati pamarudzi kwandichavadzingira.”" 
Ezekiel4:14 Ini ndikati, “Aa-a nhai Tenzi Mwari! Zvamunoona handisati ndambozvin'oresa kubvira pauduku hwangu kusvikira pari zvino. Handisati ndambodya chakafa choga kana chakaita zvokubvamburwa-bvamburwa nezvikara kana zvako kuisa mukanwa mangu'mu nyama yakaipa.”" 
Ezekiel4:15 Iye akabva anditi, “Chiona, ndochikupa ndove yemombe panze pendove yomunhu yomoto paunobikira chingwa chako.”" 
Ezekiel4:16 Iye akanditizve, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, chiona, ndichashomekesa kuwanda kwechokudya muJerusaremu. Vachadya chokudya chavo chichiita zvokutopimirwa vachitya, uye mvura yavo vachinwa ichiita zvokutoyererwa vachidumbirwa nazvo," 
Ezekiel4:17 ndichaiita izvozvo nokuti chokudya chavo nemvura zvichava zvishomashoma. Vachatarisana vagodumbirwa navo vagoperezeka nechirango chavo ichocho. 
Ezekiel5:1 Tsama nhatu dzevhudzi raEzekieri. “Zvino iwe mwanakomana womunhu tora bakatwa rakapinza urishandise sechisvo chokuveurisa uveure musoro wako nendebvu dzako. Wozotora zviyereso zvokuyeresa wokamuranisa vhudzi iroro. 
Ezekiel5:2 Chimwe chezvikamu zvitatu zvevhudzi iroro unofanira kuchipisa mumoto pakati chaipo peguta. Kana mazuva okukombwa kwaro azopera, unotora chimwewo chikamu charo chiya wochidimura-dimura nebakatwa kutenderera guta iroro. Zvino chimwewo chikamu charo chechitatu unochimwaya kumhepo uye ndichavaburitsira bakatwa muhara rivaronde." 
Ezekiel5:3 Unofanira kutsamhura katsama kaduku pana irori woripfundira kumucheto wegemenzi rako. 
Ezekiel5:4 Uye pavhudzi irori unofanira kutora rimwe worikanda mumoto woripisa mumoto. Kubva ipapo moto uchauya uchitungidza imba yeIsiraeri yose.” 
Ezekiel5:5 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Ndirorika guta reJerusaremu iri randadai kumisa pakati pamarudzi avanhu nenyika dzakaikomberedza." 
Ezekiel5:6 Asi rakapandukira zvirevo zvangu zvakaipa kupinda mamwe marudzi uye mirao yangu kutopfuura nyika dzakaikomberedza nokuramba zvirevo zvangu uye nokusatevedza mirao yangu kwavakaita. 
Ezekiel5:7 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, pamusana pokuti iwe unotutumara kudarika marudzi akakukomberedza uchiregera kutevedza mirao yangu kana kuchengeta zvirevo zvangu asi wakachengeta zvirevo zvamarudzi akakukomberedza," 
Ezekiel5:8 ndokusakawo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chiona, iniwo ndava kukumukira ini iyeni uye ndichaita zvandakatema kuita pakati pako marudzi achiona." 
Ezekiel5:9 Uyewo pamusana pezvinosemesa zvako zvose ndichaita kwauri zvandisati ndamboita uye zvinhu zvakadaro handimbofa ndakazviitazve. 
Ezekiel5:10 Ndizvozvo, vabereki vachadya vana vavo mukati menyu navanawo vachidya vabereki vavo ndoita zvandakatema kuita pamuri; kuwana vanenge vangopunyuka ndichavamwararisa kumativi ose." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Naizvozvo, sezvandiripo kudai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari, zvedi, pamusana pokuti wakan'oresa nzvimbo yangu inoera nezvinhu zvenyu zvisingadiwe nezvose zvinosemesa zvenyu; naizvozvowo ini ndichakuparadzai. Handimbokuitirai tsiye nyoro kana kukuitirai tsitsi." 
Ezekiel5:12 Chimwe chezvikamu zvenyu zvitatu zvavanhu chichafa nedenda kana kuparara nenzara pakati penyu, chimwe chacho chichaurayiwa nebakatwa munharaunda yenyu. Chikamu chechitatu ndichachimwararisa kumativi ose chakabatirwa bakatwa mumaoko." 
Ezekiel5:13 “Ndiwo maperero achaita hasha dzangu, pandichapedzera shungu dzangu pavari ndobva ndagutsikana. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ini ndakataura ndiine shanje, kana ndapedzera shungu dzangu pavari." 
Ezekiel5:14 Uyezve ndichaita kuti usare wangova nyikawo zvayo nechinhu chinoshoreka pakati pemarudzi ari munharaunda yako nomumaziso avapfuuri nenzira vose zvavo. 
Ezekiel5:15 “Iwe uchava chinhu chinozvidzwa nechitukiso neyambiro chaiyo nechinhu chinokatyamadza kumarudzi omunharaunda yako pandichaita zvandakatema kuita pamuri ndakashatirwa ndakapaka uye nechirango chinorwadza kwazvo. Ini iyeni Tenzi ndini ndazvireva. 
Ezekiel5:16 Ipapo ndichavakanda miseve inouraya yeshangwa yenzara nemiseve yokuparadza yandichavatepfenurira kuti ndikuparadze ndichiita kuti pauri shangwa yenzara irambe yongotsviriridza ndikushayisei chokudya chokukuraramisai nacho. 
Ezekiel5:17 Ndichakutumirai shangwa yenzara nezvikara zvesango, zvichakurozvai vana, denda richakuvingai ropa richideuka pakati penyu ndichikuuyisirai bakatwa pamuri iyemi. Ini Tenzi ndini ndazvireva.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti, “Mwanakomana womunhu," 
Ezekiel6:2 chinangana namakomo eIsiraeri uporofite kwavari 
Ezekiel6:3 uchiti, ‘Imi makomo eIsiraeri, inzwai izwi raTenzi Mwari! Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari kumakomo nezvikomo namakoronga namapani chionai ndava kukuunzirai bakatwa iyeni ndichizoparadza nzvimbo dzenyu dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira." 
Ezekiel6:4 Atari dzenyu dzichasara dzangova atari zvadzo dzisina chinhu neatari dzenyu dzorusenzi dzichaputswa. Uye ndichakanda vokwenyu vanenge vaurayiwa pamberi pezvifananidzo zvenyu zvokunamata.’ 
Ezekiel6:5 “Ndichati kata-kata zvitunha zvavanhu veIsiraeri pamberi pezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata. Mapfupa enyu ndichaita kuti amwarariswe pamativi ose eatari dzenyu. 
Ezekiel6:6 Kwose kwose zvako kwamunogara, maguta enyu achasara angova magutawo zvawo asina chinhu nzvimbo dzenyu dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzaparadzwa zvokuti atari dzenyu dzichasara pasisina chinhu, dzaparadzwa. Zvifananidzo zvenyu zvokunamata zvichaputswa zvichiparadzwa; atari dzenyu dzorusenzi dzichipwanywa, mabasa enyu achibva apera kutsvairwa." 
Ezekiel6:7 Vanhu vanenge vaurayiwa pakati penyu vachati rakata. Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel6:8 “Asi vamwe venyu, ndichavarega vari vapenyu. Kana pakati pamarudzi ipapo, mukava navamwe vanopunyuka bakatwa napamunenge mamwarariswa kudzinyika," 
Ezekiel6:9 ipapo vamwe venyu vanenge vapunyuka vachandirangarira vari mukati memarudzi kwavanenge vakaendwa navo kuutapwa pandichaparadza mwoyo wavo woruchiva wakabva kwandiri ukapofomadza meso avo voita kamwoyomwoyo kokupindukira kuzvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata. Saka zvichaita kuti vazvishore pamusana pouipi hwavakaita nezvinhu zvavo zvinondisemesa. 
Ezekiel6:10 Ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi. Handina kutaura pasina kuti ndichavaitira zvakaipa izvi.” 
Ezekiel6:11 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Rova-rovanisai maoko muchitamba-tambisa makumbo muchiti, ‘Maiwe-e kani inga zvatiwana, pamusana pezvinosemesa Mwari zvose zvemba yaIsiraeri, nokuti vachafa nebakatwa, neshangwa yenzara, nedenda.’" 
Ezekiel6:12 Vari kure vachafa nedenda, vari pedyo vachafa nebakatwa, vanenge vasara vachengetedzeka vachafa neshangwa yenzara. Ndiko kupedzera hasha dzangu pavari kwandichaita." 
Ezekiel6:13 Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi panenge poti zvitunha zvavo pasi katakata mukati mezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvatenderedza atari dzavo pazvikomo zvose, napamusoro pemakomo ose, nepasi pemuti woga woga una mashizha manyoro napasi pomiti yose yemioku yakati gudegude napose pavanopira zvinonhuwira kuzvifananidzo zvavo zvose zvokunamata." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndichasimudza simba reruoko rwangu kuvarwisa ndichiita kuti nyika isakare isare yangova nyika zvayo kwose kugere vanhu kubvira kurenje kusvika kuRibhura. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel7:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel7:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu zvanzi naTenzi Mwari kunyika yeIsiraeri, hokuno kuguma. Kuguma kwagogodzera kumativi mana enyika." 
Ezekiel7:3 “Isiraeri zvino pako pakuperera, ndava kuzokuratidza kuti ndakakushatirirwa ndichakutonga maererano namaitiro ako, ndichikurangira zvinhu zvako zvose zvinosemesa." 
Ezekiel7:4 Handichakuitira tsiye nyoro kana kukuitira tsitsi asi ndichakurangira nzira dzako zvinosemesa zviri pakati pako. Ipapo ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel7:5 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Nhamo dzichavirikana. Heyo nhamo youya!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Kuparara kwauya, kwauya kuparara kwakumukirai!" 
Ezekiel7:7 Hoko kwauya! Mugumo wako wasvika iwe mugari wenyika ino, nguva yasvika, zuva raswedera, zuva rebongozozo kwete romupururu wokufara mumakomo." 
Ezekiel7:8 Iye zvino ndava kukuvirukira nehasha ndipedzere hasha dzangu pauri ndichikutonga maererano namaitiro ako ndichikurangira zvinhu zvako zvose zvinosemesa. 
Ezekiel7:9 Handichakuitira tsiye nyoro kana kukuitira tsitsi asi ndichakurangira nzira dzako idzodzo nezvinosemesa zviri pakati pako. Ipapo ndipo pauchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi anorova.” 
Ezekiel7:10 Hero zuva riya, hero rouya! Kuparara kwako kwasvika! Kushaya ruenzaniso kwapfumvudza, kuzvikudza kwatumbuka." 
Ezekiel7:11 Utsinye hwakura kutoitawo kamuitiro chaiko kouipi. Hakuna nomumwe wavo achasara kana zvinhu zvavo zvakawanda kunyange upfumi hwavo kana kuzovawo nembiri pakati pavo. 
Ezekiel7:12 Nguva iya yauya, zuva riya raswedera. Mutengi ngaarege hake kupembera kufara kunyange iye mutengesiwo kuchema nhamo nokuti hasha dzavirukira gungano ravo rose." 
Ezekiel7:13 Chiripo ndechokuti mutengesi haasi kuzodzokera kune zvaakatengesa zviya vachiri vapenyu nokuti hasha dzawira gungano ravo rose hadzisi kudzokera shure uye pamusana pouipi hwake, munhu haakwanise kuzviponesa upenyu hwake." 
Ezekiel7:14 Varidza bhosvo vakaita kuti vose vagadzirire. Asi hapana ari kusumuka kuenda kuhondo nokuti hasha dzangu dzavirukira gungano ravo rose. 
Ezekiel7:15 Kunze uku kune bakatwa, mukati mune denda neshangwa yenzara. Vari musango vari kupera nebakatwa, vari mukati meguta vari kupera kufa neshangwa yenzara nedenda." 
Ezekiel7:16 Kana vamwe vakapunyuka, vachava mumakomo senjiva dzomumakan'a, vose zvavo vachichema nhamo; munhu wese achichema uipi hwake." 
Ezekiel7:17 Vose varukutika maoko, vose zvino mabvi yava mvura zvayo kurukutika." 
Ezekiel7:18 Vava kupfeka masaga; kutya kwavabata. Vose uso, dzangova nyadzi dzoga, misoro yose, yangova miparavara." 
Ezekiel7:19 Sirivha yavo vavakutoirasa mumigwagwa, ndarama yavo yaita sechinhu chakan'ora. Sirivha yavo nendarama hazvigoni kuvanunura pazuva rehasha dzaTenzi. Hazvigoni kupedza nzara yavo kana kuzadza matumbu avo nokuti ndozvakanga zviri chibingamupinyi nehonzeri youipi hwavo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Zvishongo zvayo zvinoyevedza, vaizvishandisira mbiri isina maturo vachigadzira zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata zvsingadiwi naMwari nezvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa. Naizvozvo iniwo ndaita kuti zvinhu zvavo izvozvo zvive zvinhu zvakan'ora kwavari." 
Ezekiel7:21 “Ndichaisa zvinhu izvozvo mumaoko mevechirudzi senyama yamagora uye kunavaipi vapanyika sechinhu chokupamba vagochin'oresa. 
Ezekiel7:22 Ndichavafuratira kuitira kuti vanhu vagon'oresa nzvimbo yangu yakakosha. Makororo achapindamo vagoin'oresa 
Ezekiel7:23 vagoita nyonganyonga. “Pamusana pokuti nyika yazara nemhosva dzokudeura ropa, gutawo rizere noutsinye." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ndichaunza rudzi rwakaipisisa kuzovatorera dzimba dzavo. Zvokuzvikudza kwavo ndichazvipedza, nzvimbo dzavo dzinoera dzichin'oreswa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Kudandaura nenhamo pakuchauya vachatsvaga rugare asi pachange pasina. 
Ezekiel7:26 Nhamo dzichaita mututemutute, marehwarehwa asingaperi. Vachatsvagira chiporofita kumuporofita pasina; kumupristi zvomutemo zvinenge zvaparara, kuvakuru vakuru mazano kunenge kusisina." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mambo achachema nhamo, jinda rozanga kuora mwoyo uye vanhu munyika varukutiswa maoko nokutya. Ndichavaitira zvinofambirana nokuita kwavo uye ndichavatonga nekatongero kavo. Ipapo ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Mugore rechitanhatu mumwedzi wechitanhatu pazuva reshanu romwedzi iwoyo pandakanga ndakagara pasi mumba mangu, vakuru vakuru vokwaJudha vagere pamberi pangu, simba roruoko rwaTenzi Mwari rakaturukira pandiri." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ipapo ndakatarisa ndiye onei chimwe chine chimiro chinenge chomunhu. Kubvira mainge muchiuno make zvichienda pasi wakanga uri moto uye kubvira muchiuno zvichikwira kumusoro kwaitarisika sokupenya kuchingarikira sendarira. 
Ezekiel8:3 Iye akatambanudza chainge ruoko akandibata zhumu romusoro wangu. Izvozvo Mweya wakandisumudza mudenga pakati pedenga nenyika akandiendesa muzviratidzo zvaMwari kuJerusaremu pokupinda napo peSuo Guru renhandare yomukati yakatarisa kuchamhembe pakanga paine paigara chimufananidzo chokunamata cheshanje chaikonzera Mwari shanje. 
Ezekiel8:4 Ndakaona mbiri yokuvapo kwaMwari weIsiraeri iripo sezvandakanga ndamboona muchiratidzo chomubani. 
Ezekiel8:5 Akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu simudza musoro wakatarisa kuchamhembe.” Saizvozvo ndakasimudza musoro ndakatarisa kuchamhembe, onei kuchamhembe kweSuo Guru rokuAtari pamusuo pakanga paine chimufananidzo chiya chokunamata cheshanje."
