Ezekiel8:6 Akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, uri kuona here zvavari kuita izvi zvinondisemesa kwazvo zviri kuitwa muno nemba yaIsiraeri? Vari kuzviitira here kuti vanditandanisire kure neNzvimbo yangu Inoera? Uchatoona zvinosemesa kwazvo kupinda izvozvi.”" 
Ezekiel8:7 Akaenda neni kumusuo wenhandare pandakatarisa ndakaona kuti paive neburi murusvingo. 
Ezekiel8:8 Akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, tiginura murusvingo imomu.” Ndakati tigunurei murusvingo imomo wanei pane musuo," 
Ezekiel8:9 ndokunditizve, “Pinda uone zvakaipisisa kwazvo zvinosemesa zviri kuitwa muno.”" 
Ezekiel8:10 Saizvozvo ndakapinda ndikaona imomo makanzi charavanda mumadziro kuatenderedza, zvinhu zvinokambaira zvemhando nemhando dzose nemhuka dzinosemesa nezvifananidzo zvose zvokunamata zvemba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel8:11 Pamberi pazvo pakanga pamire makumi manomwe avarume vari vakuru vakuru vemba yaIsiraeri vaina Jaazaniya mwanakomana wokwaShafani amire pakati pavo. Mumwe nomumwe wavo aiva nebisiro rorusenzi muruoko. Izvozvo gore routsi hworusenzi hwaitogoka mudenga. 
Ezekiel8:12 Iye akabva anditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu waona here zviri kuitwa murima navakuru vakuru vemba yaIsiraeri, munhu oga oga ari mumba make memifananidzo? Chiripo ndechokuti vari kutozviti, ‘Tenzi haatione, Tenzi akafuratira nyika ino.’ ”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Akatiwo kwandiri, “Uchatoonawo zvimwe zvinosemesa zvakakurisa zvavanoita.”" 
Ezekiel8:14 Akandiunza pokupinda napo peSuo Guru rokuchamhembe remba yaTenzi ndikaona vakadzi vakati mbwe-e kugara vachihwihwidza kuchema Tamuzi. 
Ezekiel8:15 Akati kwandiri, “Wazviona here izvi nhai iwe mwanakomana womunhu? Uchaona zvimwe zvinosemesesa zvakakura kupinda izvi.”" 
Ezekiel8:16 Akapinda neni munhandare yomukatikati memba yaTenzi, onei pamusuo weTemberi yaTenzi pakati pekamba kepamusuo neatari paine varume vaikarosvika makumi maviri navashanu vakapira gotsi Temberi yaTenzi vakatarisa kumabvazuva vachipfugamira zuva kumabvazuva." 
Ezekiel8:17 Iye akabva anditi, “Wazviona here izvi nhai mwanakomana womunhu? Inyaya diki here iyi yokuti imba yokwaJudha kuita zvinosemesa zvavari kuita muno izvi kutozadza zvavo nyika noutsinye uye kundishatirisa? Chitarisa uone vanoisa bazi kumhuno dzavo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Naizvozvo zvandava kuita ndavakuita ndakashatirwa ndisingaite tsiye nyoro kana kunzwa tsitsi kunyange vakabongomora kuchema handisi kuzovateerera.” 
Ezekiel9:1 Mwari akazodaidza nezwi guru ini ndichinzwa nenzeve dzangu achiti, “Swederai kuno imi vanhu veguta vokuuraya vanhu, munhu nomunhu akapakata muruoko chombo chake chokuparadzisa.”" 
Ezekiel9:2 Ndipo pakabva pati tutururu kusvika varume vatanhatu vachibva nokuSuo Guru rokumusoro rakatarisa kuchamhembe, mumwe nomumwe wavo akapakata muruoko chombo chake chokuurayisa. Vaiva nomumwe murume akapfeka rineni kaguchu keingi padivi pake. Vakapinda vakasvikomira munyasi meatari yendarira iya." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ipapo kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi weIsiraeri kwakanga kwabva pamakerubhu pakwaigara kwaenda kumusuo wemba yacho. Iye akadaidzira kumurume akanga akapfeka rineni uya aiva nekaguchu keingi padivi pake. 
Ezekiel9:4 Ipapo Tenzi akati kwaari, “Enda nomuguta, nomuJerusaremu uise rupao pahuma dzavanhu vanodemba vachidunura pamusana pezvinhu zvose zvinosemesa zviri, kuitwa mariri.”" 
Ezekiel9:5 Kuna vamwe akataura ndichinzwa, achiti, “Endai nomuguta muchimutevera muchiuraya, musaite tsiye nyoro kana kunzwira tsitsi." 
Ezekiel9:6 Urayayi varume vakuru, majaya nemhandara, navana vaduku namadzimai asi ane rupao regai kana kumubata. Tangirai paNzvimbo yangu Inoera.” Saizvozvo vakatanga navarume vakuru vaive mberi kweTemberi." 
Ezekiel9:7 Ndokubva avati, “N'oresai imba iyi muzadze nhandare dzacho navanhu vanenge vaurayiwa. Chiendai!” Saizvozvo vakaenda kundouraya vanhu muguta." 
Ezekiel9:8 Vachingunorakatisa kuuraya vanhu kudaro ini ndakasara ndangova ndoga ndokuti nouso kwidiba ndichichema ndichiti, “Aa-a nhai Tenzi Mwari asi mava kutoparadza zvose zvakasara zveIsiraeri pamusana pokuvirukira kwenyu Jerusaremu nehasha?”" 
Ezekiel9:9 Iye ndokunditi, “Mhosva yemba yokwaIsiraeri neyokwaJudha yakurisisa. Nyika yazara ropa; guta rizere namaitiro asina ruenzaniso nokuti vanoti Tenzi akafuratira nyika iyi uye Tenzi haaoni." 
Ezekiel9:10 Zvino ini handichavaitira tsiye nyoro kana kunzwa tsitsi. Asi ndichaita kuti kuita kwavo ikoko kuvapfukire.” 
Ezekiel9:11 Hezvo munhu uya akanga akapfeka rineni aine kaguchu keingi parutivi akadzoka neshoko achiti, “Ndaita sezvamandiudza.”" 
Ezekiel10:1 Ndakazotarisa ndikaona katenga kaiva nechepamusoro pamakerubhu. Nechepamusoro pawo pakaonekwa chakaita sebwe rakakosha resafaya chakaita sechigaro choumambo. 
Ezekiel10:2 Akabva ati kumunhu akanga akapfeka rineni uya, “Enda pakati pamavhiri ari kutendereka pasi pemakerubhu uzadze zvanza zvako namazimbe ari kunjenjema moto ari pakati pamakerubhu uamwaye pamusoro peguta.” Akapinda ndakatarisa." 
Ezekiel10:3 Izvozvo makerubhu aiva amire kumaodzanyemba kwemba iyoyo pakapindamo munhu uya; gore rakazadza nhandare iya yomukatikati. 
Ezekiel10:4 Ipapo kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakasumuka mudenga kukabva pamakerubhu kukaenda kumusuo kwemba iyoyi, imba iyi yakazara gore uye nhandare ikazara nokupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi." 
Ezekiel10:5 Kubhabhama kwamapapiro amakerubhu kwainzwika kusvikira kunhandare yokunze zvichiita sezwi raiye Aripagomo paanenge otaura. 
Ezekiel10:6 Paakaudza munhu uya akanga akapfeka rineni kuti, tora moto pakati pamavhiri arikutenderera pakati pamakerubhu, akaenda akamira munyasi memavhiri." 
Ezekiel10:7 Pakati pemakerubhu, rimwe racho rakatambanudzira ruoko rwaro kumoto waiva pakati pemakerubhu rikatora mumwe moto rouisa mumaoko momurume uya akanga akapfeka rineni. Iye akautora akabuda." 
Ezekiel10:8 Makerubhu aive nechimwe chainge ruoko rwomunhu pasi pemapapiro awo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Zvino ndakatarisa onei paiva namavhiri mana pedyo namakerubhu iwayo, vhiri rimwechete riri parutivi pekerubhu kutarisika kwamavhiri iwayo kwakanga kwakaita sokupenya kweibwe rinokosha rebheriri." 
Ezekiel10:10 Mamiriro aakanga akaita ndeaya aya, ari mana kudaro, akanga akafanana aivawo akaita sevhiri mukati merimwe vhiri." 
Ezekiel10:11 Paainge ofamba, aifamba akananga chero kune rimwe divi ramativi mana awo achienda asingatendeuki. Asi aiti kwainge kwangonangwa nevhiri remberi mamwe ose aibva atevera achienda asingatendeuki." 
Ezekiel10:12 Muviri wawo wose nemisana yazvo namaoko azvo namapapiro awo namavhiri azvo zvakanga zvakazara namaziso kutenderera mavhiri iwayo aivawo nawo pahuna hwawo. 
Ezekiel10:13 Zvino mavhiri iwayo ndakanzwa achidaidzwa kunzi kuvhiririka. 
Ezekiel10:14 Kerubhu rimwe nerimwe rakanga riine zviso zvina, uso hwokutanga huri uso hwekerubhu, hwechipiri hwaiva uso hwomunhu, hwetatu huri uso hweshumba, hwechina hwacho huri uso hwegondo." 
Ezekiel10:15 Ipapa makerubhu akakwira mudenga, iwaya akanga ari iwo makerubhu aya andakaona kurwizi rweKebhari." 
Ezekiel10:16 Zvino makerubhu paaifamba, mavhiri aifamba ari pamativi awo. Painge makerubhu asumudza mapapiro awo kuti akwire mudenga achibva pasi, mavhiri haaimbobva parutivi." 
Ezekiel10:17 Hwaingova hwese, achiti akati mbikiti akamira, mavhiri amirawo. Paaikwira mudenga, mavhiri aibva akwirawo mudenga nawo nokuti mweya wezvisikwa zvipenyu zviya wakanga uri maari." 
Ezekiel10:18 Kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwazobva kumusuo kwemba kukandomira pamusoro pamakerubhu. 
Ezekiel10:19 Makerubhu ndokubva asumudza mapapiro awo akakwira mudenga kubva pasi ndichiona achienda kudaro aine mavhiri parutivi pawo akasvikomira pamusuo weSuo Guru rokumabvazuva remba yaTenzi kupenya kwokuvapo kwaMwari weIsiraeri kwaiva pamusoro pazvo. 
Ezekiel10:20 Ndicho chisikwa chipenyu chiya chandakamboona ichochi ichi nechepasi paMwari weIsiraeri pedyo nerwizi rwaKebhari nezvo ndakabva ndaziva kuti makerubhu aya. 
Ezekiel10:21 Kerubhu rimwe nerimwe raiva nouso huna uye rimwe nerimwe riine mapapiro mana. Pasi pemapapiro awo paiva nezvainge maoko omunhu. 
Ezekiel10:22 Zvino kufanana kwouso hwawo, hwakanga hwakangoita sehwandakaona chaihwo pedyo norwizi rwaKebhari. Zvaifamba zvakananga pazvakananga chete." 
Ezekiel11:1 Mweya wakandisimudza mudenga, wakandiunza kuSuo Guru rokumabvazuva kwemba yaTenzi rakatarisa kumabvazuva. Ipapo ndakaona pamusuo peSuo Guru pacho paine varume makumi maviri navashanu. Ndakaonawo pakati pavo paina Jaazaniya mwanakomana waAzuru naPeratiya mwanakomana waBhenaya, machinda evanhu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Iye akabva anditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, varume ivava ndivo vakaruka mazano akaipa vachisoka guta rino mano akaipa" 
Ezekiel11:3 vachifurira vanhu kuti, ‘Nguva yokuvaka dzimba haisati yasvika. Iro guta rino ndiro bhodho, isu ndisu nyama yacho.’" 
Ezekiel11:4 Saka porofita kwavari, Mwanakomana Womunhu porofita.”" 
Ezekiel11:5 Mweya waTenzi wakauya pandiri akati kwandiri iti zvanzi naTenzi, “Imi vemba yaIsiraeri, heya ndozvamuri kufunga izvi. Chiripo ndechokuti zvinouya mumusoro menyu ini ndinozviziva." 
Ezekiel11:6 Vamakauraya vakawanda muguta rino mukazadza migwagwa yaro nezvitunha. 
Ezekiel11:7 Ndokusaka zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Vamakauraya zvamakaradzika mariri ndonyama, guta irori ndiro bhodho racho asi imi muchabviswa mukati maro.’" 
Ezekiel11:8 Munotya bakatwaka, ndichakuunzirai bakatwa ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndichakuburitsai mukati maro ndichikuisai mumaoko mevechirudzi ndichiita zvandakatema kuita kwamuri. 
Ezekiel11:10 Muchafa rufu rwebakatwa; ndichakutongerai kumuganhu weIsiraeri. Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel11:11 Guta rino harisi kuzova bhodho renyu kana imiwo kuva nyama yacho mukati maro. Ndichakutongerai kumuganhu weIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel11:12 Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi nokuti hamuna kutevera mirao yangu kana kuita zvirevo zvangu asi makaita muchitevedza zvirevo zvamarudzi vakakutenderedzai.” 
Ezekiel11:13 Zvakaitika kuti pandaiporofita, Peratiya mwanakomana waBhenaya akafa. Ndakawira pasi nouso ndikaridza mhere ndochema ndichiti, “Aa! Nhai Tenzi mopedzisa here vaIsiraeri vakasara.”" 
Ezekiel11:14 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel11:15 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, hama dzako, hama dzako chaidzo dzakatapwa pamwechete newe, ivo vanhu vose veIsiraeri ndivo vari kunzi navagari veJerusaremu, ‘Vaye vakaenda kure naTenzi saizvozvo nyika ino yakapiwa kwatiri kuti ive yedu.’" 
Ezekiel11:16 Naizvozvo iti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Kunyange zvazvo ndakavabvisa ndikavaendesa kure mukati memarudzi, uye kunyange ndakavaparadzira mudzinyika, ndanga ndiri nzvimbo inoera kwavari kwechinguvana munyika dzavakaenda.’" 
Ezekiel11:17 Naizvozvo iti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari ndichakukokorodzai mumarudzi avanhu ndigokuunganidzai kubva munyika dzamakaparadzirwa ndizokupai nyika yeIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel11:18 Pavanenge vauya vachabvisa mairi zvose zvakaipa nezvinosemesa. 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndichavapa mwoyo mumwechete ndigoisa Mweya mutsva mavari. Ndichabvisa munyama yavo mwoyo wedombo ndichivapa mwoyo wenyama," 
Ezekiel11:20 kuitira kuti vatevere mirao yangu vachichengeta zvirevo zvangu nokuzviteerera. Ivo vachava vanhu vangu ini ndichava Mwari wavo. 
Ezekiel11:21 Asi vane mwoyo wokuda zvakaipa nezvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa ndichaita kuti zviito zvavo zvivapfukire ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel11:22 Zvino makerubhu akasimudza mapapiro awo namavhiri ari pamativi awo. Kupenya kwokuvapo kwaMwari weIsiraeri kwakanga kuri pamusoro pavo. 
Ezekiel11:23 Kupenya kwekuvapo kwaMwari kwakabva pakati peguta kukandomira pagomo riri kumabvazuva eguta. 
Ezekiel11:24 Mweya akandisimudza muchioneso akandiendesa kuvatapwa kuKaridhea naMweya waMwari. Ndipo pakabva papera chiratidzo chandakanga ndaoneswa. 
Ezekiel11:25 Ndakataurira vatapwa zvinhu zvose zvandakanga ndaratidzwa naTenzi. 
Ezekiel12:1 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel12:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu unogara pakati pemba yavanhu vakapanduka vane meso okuonesa asi havaoni, vane nzeve dzokunzwa asi havanzwi." 
Ezekiel12:3 Nokuti ivo imba yakapanduka. Naizvozvo iwe mwanakomana womunhu zvigadzirire mutoro wenhapwa uende kuutapwa masikati machena vachiona. Unofanira kuenda senhapwa uchibva panzvimbo pako uchienda kune imwe nzvimbo ivo vachiona. Pamwe vanganzwisise kunyange vari imba yakapanduka. 
Ezekiel12:4 Unofanira kuburitsa midziyo yako semidziyo yenhapwa masikati machena ivo vachiona. Iwe unofanira kuzoenda kumanheru ivo vachiona sezvinoitwa navanhu vanenge vachienda kuutapwa. 
Ezekiel12:5 Unofanira kuzotiginura murusvingo ubude naipapo vakatarisa. 
Ezekiel12:6 Uchaisa mutoro wako pamafudzi vachiona wobuda wakatakura murima ufukidze uso hwako kuitira kuti urege kuona nyika nokuti ndakakuita chiratidzo kumba yaIsiraeri.” 
Ezekiel12:7 Saizvozvowo ndakaita sezvandakanga ndanzi ndiite ndikabuda nemidziyo yangu masikati machena semidziyo yenhapwa. Kuzoti mava mumanheru ndakatiginura namaoko angu ndikaboora rusvingo ndikabuda kunze murima ndakatakura nhumbi dzangu pamafudzi ivo vachiona. 
Ezekiel12:8 Mangwanani acho shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel12:9 “Nhai mwanakomana womunhu, handiti here iyo imba yaIsiraeri imba yevapanduki yakakubvunzaka kuti, chii chauri kuita?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Wochivaudza kuti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ichochi ichi chiratidzo chinonangana nejinda reJerusaremu nemba yose yaIsiraeri iri mukati mavo." 
Ezekiel12:11 Iti ndiri chiratidzo kwamuri. Sezvandangoita izvi ndozvavachaitwa ivo. Vachaenda senhapwa kuutapwa. 
Ezekiel12:12 Nairowo jinda riri pakati pavo richatakura midziyo yaro pamapfudzi murima roenda rigotiginura murusvingo rigobuda naipapo. Achafukidza uso kuitira kuti asve arega kuona nyika ino nameso ake. 
Ezekiel12:13 Ndichamukomba nomumbure wangu agobatwa neriva rangu ndigomuendesa kuBhabhironi kunyika yevaKaradhea, asi haasi kuzoiona, achafira ikoko." 
Ezekiel12:14 Uye ndichamwararisa kumativi mana emhepo vose zvavo vanogara vakamukomberedza namakurukota ake nezvikwata zvake zvehondo zvose. Ndichavati vateveranwe navo nebakatwa. 
Ezekiel12:15 “Vachaziva zvavo kuti ini ndini Tenzi pandinenge ndavamwararisa mukati memarudzi vachiti uyu kwake uyu kwake nomudzinyika. 
Ezekiel12:16 Asi ndichaita kuti katsama kavo kapunyuke kubakatwa nokushangwa yenzara nokudenda kuri kuitira kuti vareurure zvinhu zvavo zvose zvinosemesa mukati memarudzi kwavachaenda, vazivewo kuti ini ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel12:17 Uyezve izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel12:18 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu idya chingwa chako uchidedera unwewo mvura uchigwagwadza nokutya. 
Ezekiel12:19 Utaure nezvevanhu venyika iyoyi kuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari zvakanangana navagari veJerusaremu vari munyika yeIsiraeri vachadya chingwa chavo mukutya, mvura yavo vachainwa vakadumbirwa nokuti nyika yavo icharozvwa zvose zvainazvo ichiparirwa noutsinye hwavanhu vose vagere mairi." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ipapo maguta agere vanhu achasara angova maguta asisina chinhu, nyikawo ichasara yangova nyika isina chinhu. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Zvino shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati, “Nhai iwe mwanakomana womunhu," 
Ezekiel12:22 itsumoi yamava kutaura nezvenyika yeIsiraeri yokuti, ‘Mazuva ari kuwanda aya, chiratidzo chose chose zvacho hapana chatinobura machiri?’" 
Ezekiel12:23 Saka naizvozvo chivaudza kuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari tsumo iyoyi iyi ndichaimisa vagorega kuzomboishandisazve setsumo mukati meIsiraeri. Asi uvaudze kuti mazuva acho otosvika zvinorehwa nezviratidzo izvozvo zvose zvotoitika. 
Ezekiel12:24 Ndinodaro nokuti hapazova nechioneso chenhema kana zvokushopera zvinongobata vanhu kumeso mukati memba yaIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel12:25 Asi ini Tenzi ndichataura zvandinotaura zvichiitika, hazvichanonoka. Ndichataura chinhu chichiitika munguva yenyu iyoyo, imi imba yavapanduki.” Ndichati ndikataura chinhu chinobva chaiitika, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel12:26 Shoko raTenzi rakauyazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel12:27 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu chinzwa, vemba yaIsiraeri vari kuti zviratidzo zvaanoona zvichatora mazuva chaizvo, zvamaporofita ndezvemazuva achiri kure kure." 
Ezekiel12:28 Naizvozvo chivataurira kuti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari hapana chandichataura chichambononoka. Chandinenge ndataura chichabva chaitika,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel13:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu chiporofita uchiyambira vaporofita veIsiraeri vari kuporofita. Uti kune vari kuporofita zvomusoro wavo, chinzwai izwi raTenzi.”" 
Ezekiel13:3 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Zvichakuwanai imi mapenzi evaporofita vanotevera zvomusoro wavo vasina chavaona." 
Ezekiel13:4 Vaporofita vako iwe Isiraeri vakaita samakava mukati mematongo. 
Ezekiel13:5 Hamuna imi kukwira kunzvimbo dzakakoromoka kana kuvakirira norusvingo imba yaIsiraeri kuitira kuti igonewo kurwisa muhondo pazuva raTenzi. 
Ezekiel13:6 Vanotaura zvemanyepo vachishopera zvenhema vachiti zvanzi naTenzi iye Tenzi asina kuvatuma. Izvozvo vanenge vachitarisira kuti Mwari achazadzisa zvavanenge vataura. 
Ezekiel13:7 Munoonaka imi chiratidzo chemanyepo muchishopera kutaura zvenhando pose pamunoti zvanzi naTenzi ini ndisina hangu chandataura?” 
Ezekiel13:8 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pamusana pokuti imi munotaura zvenhema, muchiona zvinhu zvenhando, naizvozvo chionai ini ndavakuita zvinorwisana nemi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ini noruoko rwangu ndichaonana navaporofita ivavo vanoona zviratidzo zvamanyepo vachishopera zvenhando. Havasi kuzombofa vava mudare ravanhu vangu kana kunyorwa mazita mubhuku remba yaIsiraeri kunyange kutsika munyika yeIsiraeri. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel13:10 “Honguka nokuti vakatungamirira vanhu vangu kusiri iko vachiti rugare irwo rugare rwacho pasina, uyewo nokuti vanhu pavakavaka rusvingo, vaporofita ivava ava vaibvawo varudzurura nesuko." 
Ezekiel13:11 Taurirai vari kurudzurura nesuko kuti ruchakoromoka. Kuchava namafashamo emvura yokunaya uye chimvuramahwe chikuru chichanaya; dutu remhepo richivhuvhuta. 
Ezekiel13:12 Zvino pachaputsika rusvingo irworwo, hamuzonzi here iko kudzurura kwenyu kuripi?”" 
Ezekiel13:13 Ndokusaka zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Ndichavhuvhutisa dutu remhepo ndakashatirwa, pachaita mafashamo emvura ndashatirwa uye chimvuramahwe chikuru chokuparadza pamusana pehasha dzangu." 
Ezekiel13:14 Ndichaparadza rusvingo irworwo rwamakadzurura nesuko runyatsoti pasi ngondongondo zvokuti ugaro hwarwo huchanyatsoti pachena charavanda. Kana rwawa muchaparara mukati marwo. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel13:15 “Ndomapedzero andichaita ushungushungu hwangu parusvingo irworwu napavanhu vacho vanenge varudzurura nesuko. Ndipo pandichakutaurirai kuti hakuchisina rusvingo rwuya, kana vanyakurudzurura vaya," 
Ezekiel13:16 vaporofita veIsiraeri vakaporofita nezveJerusaremu vachirionera zviratidzo zvorugare ipo rugare pasina.” Ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel13:17 “Zvino iwe mwanakomana womunhu, chinangana navakadzi vavanhu vokwako vanoporofita zvomusoro wavo. Nangana navo uporofite uchiti" 
Ezekiel13:18 zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, zvichakuwanai imi vakadzi munosonera mazango pamaoko ose avanhu muchisona madhuku anoenderana nemisoro yamazera ose avanhu kuri kuvhima mweya yavanhu. Munoda kuva nesimba pamusoro poupenyu norufu rwavanhu vangu kuti zvikupundutsei nhai!" 
Ezekiel13:19 Makandishora pakati pevanhu muchiitira kuti muwane tsama dzebhari nezvimedu zvechingwa muchiuraya vanhu vasina kukodzera kufa asi muchirega vanhu vakakodzera kufa vari vapenyu nenhema dzenyu dzamunonyepera vanhu vangu vanoteerera nhema.” 
Ezekiel13:20 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chinzwai, “Ndakanangana zvino namazango enyu amunosevenzesa kuva nesimba pamusoro poupenyu norufu rwavanhu seshiri. Ndabvarura mazango iwayo pamusoro poupenyu norufu mumaoko menyu ndiite kuti mweya yavanhu vamuine simba ravo vabhururuke vaende zvavo seshiri." 
Ezekiel13:21 Madhuku enyu iwayo ndichaabvarura ndichiabvisa ndigonunura vanhu vangu mumaoko menyu varege kuva senyama yamagora mumaoko menyu. Ipapo ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel13:22 “Pamusana pokuti makaodza mwoyo mururami namanyepo kunyange zvazvo ini ndakanga ndisina kumuodza mwoyo mukakurudzira akaipa kuti arege kutendeuka achisiya gwara rake rakaipa kuti azviponesewo upenyu; 
Ezekiel13:23 naizvozvo hamuchazoonizve zviratidzo zvenhema kana kuzomboshoperazve. Ndichanunura vanhu vangu mumaoko menyu. Ipapo ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel14:1 Kwakazouya vamwe vavakuru vakuru veIsiraeri kwandiri vakasvikogara mberi kwangu. 
Ezekiel14:2 Shoko raTenzi rikabva rauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel14:3 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu varume ava vakatorwa mwoyo nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata vakazviisira chibingamupinyi chouipi hwavo mberi kwavo. Ndipo pandingazorega here vachidai kuuya kuneni kuzonzwa kuti ndinoti kudii? 
Ezekiel14:4 Naizvozvo chivataurira uchivaudza kuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ani zvake wemba yaIsiraeri anotorwa mwoyo nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zvake achizviisira chibingamupinyi chouipi hwake mberi kwake pedzezvo ouya kumuporofita, ini Tenzi ndini ndichamupa mhinduro iyeni zvichienderanawo nokuwanda kwezvifananidzo zvake zvokunamata." 
Ezekiel14:5 Chandichadariro ndechokuti ndibate mwoyo yevemba yaIsiraeri vose vakasiyana neni pamusana pezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata. 
Ezekiel14:6 “Naizvozvo chiti kumba yaIsiraeri, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari pindukai mufuratire zvifananidzo zvenyu zvokunamata mufuratire zvinhu zvenyu zvose zvinosemesa izvi." 
Ezekiel14:7 Chiripo ndechokuti ani naani zvake wemba yaIsiraeri kana mumwe wevauyi vapfuuri zvavo muIsiraeri, anenge azvitsaura kwandiri achitorwa mwoyo nezvifananidzo zvake zvokunamata achizviisira chibingamupinyi chouipi hwake mberi kwake pedzezvo ouya kumuporofita kuzonzwa iye kuti ini ndinoti kudii, ini Tenzi ndini iyeni pachangu ndichamupa mhinduro." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ndichanyatsoonana naye ndimuite muenzaniso uye setsumo ndimutsakatise pakati pevanhu vangu mugozoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel14:9 “Kana muporofita akanyengedzeka akataura shoko ini Tenzi ndini ndinenge ndarasisa muporofita iyeyo. Ipapo ndichazomutambanudzira ruoko rwangu ndigomuparadza pakati pavanhu vangu veIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel14:10 Izvozvo shamhu yavo yokuvaranga ichava pavari ivo, vacharangwa zvimwechetezvo, muporofita iyeyo nanyakutsvaka chiporofita wacho" 
Ezekiel14:11 kuitira kuti imba yaIsiraeri irege kuzosiyanazve neni kana kuzozvin'oresazve nezvikanganiso zvavo zvose, asi kuti vavewo vanhu vangu iniwo ndichiva Mwari wavo. Ndizvo zviri kutarura Tenzi Mwari.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel14:13 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, kana nyika ikanditadzira nokuita kwayo kusina kutendeka ini ndikaisumudzira roruoko rwangu ndikaishayisa zvokudya ndaitumira shangwa yenzara ndichitsakatisa munhu nemhuka mairi," 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyange zvazvo varume vatatu ava vanoti Nowa naDhanieri naJobhu vaivamo, chavaikwanisa chete kungozvinunura upenyu noururami hwavo ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel14:14 kunyange zvazvo varume vatatu ava vanoti Nowa naDhanieri naJobhu vaivamo, chavaikwanisa chete kungozvinunura upenyu noururami hwavo ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel14:15 “Kanawo ndikaita kuti zvikara zvipinde nomunyika zvikaiparadza ikasara yangoitwa nyika zvayo isina chinhu zvokutoshaya kana nomumwe unodimura nomo zvichikonzerwa nezvikara izvozvo," 
Ezekiel14:16 kunyange zvazvo ivava varume vatatu vaivamo, hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari havaikwanisa kununura vana vavo vakomana kana vasikana. Ivo bedzi ndivo vaitonunurwa asi nyika ichisara yangova nyikawo zvayo isina chinhu." 
Ezekiel14:17 “Kana kuti ini ndikaunzira nyika iyoyo nhamo yebakatwa, ndigoti bakatwa ngaripinde nomunyika iyoyo ndikaparadza mairi munhu nemhuka," 
Ezekiel14:18 kunyange zvazvo varume vatatu ava vaivamo, hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari havaimbogona kununura vana vavo vakomana kana vasikana, asi ivo voga ndovaitonunurwa." 
Ezekiel14:19 “Kunyangewo ndikatumira denda munyika imomo ndopedzera pairi hasha dzangu neropa ndichiparadza mairi munhu nemhuka," 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyangova dai Nowa naDhanieri naJobhu vaiva mairi hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutarura Tenzi Mwari vangadai vasingagone kununura mwana wavo mukomana kana musikana. Asi kuti chavaikwanisa chete kungozvinunura upenyu hwavo ivo nokururama kwavo.”" 
Ezekiel14:20 kunyangova dai Nowa naDhanieri naJobhu vaiva mairi hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutarura Tenzi Mwari vangadai vasingagone kununura mwana wavo mukomana kana musikana. Asi kuti chavaikwanisa chete kungozvinunura upenyu hwavo ivo nokururama kwavo.”" 
Ezekiel14:21 Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Ko kutozoti pandichatumira Jerusaremu shamhu dzangu ina dzinorwadza dzinoti bakatwa neshangwa yenzara nezvikara zvinorura nedenda kuti nditsakatise mairi munhu nemhuka," 
Ezekiel14:22 kunyange zvazvo kukange kwasara mairi vanyakupunyuka rufu vokutungamirira vanakomana navanasikana pavanosvika kwauri uchiona nzira dzavo nokuita kwavo zvichakunyaradza mwoyo panhamo yose yandakaunzira Jerusaremu pamusana pezvose zvandakaiuyisira? 
Ezekiel14:23 Vachakunyaradza mwoyo pauchaona nzira dzavo nokuita kwavo ndipo pauchaziva kuti hapana chandakanga ndaita pasina chikonzero pazvinhu zvose zvandakaita mariri” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel15:1 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel15:2 “Nhai mwanakomana womunhu ko iwo muti womugirepisi unokundawo pai chaizvo mimwe miti yose yesango? 
Ezekiel15:3 Pauri pangatorwe bango here rokutoitisa chimwe chinhu? Vanhu vangatore here pauri kamhanda kokuturikawo kana chinhu zvacho? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ko ukaiswa mumoto sehuni moto ukapisa kumhuno nokugaro kwawo, pakati pawo pakava tsito unenge uchine basa rei?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Usati watsva, hapana chawaigona kuita nawo, ko kutozoti wapiswa nomoto waita tsito zvawo chii chaungazomboshandiswa kuita?”" 
Ezekiel15:6 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari: “Sehuni dzomuti womugirepisi pakati pemiti yesango dzandakaisa muchoto ndizvo zvandichaita vagari veJerusaremu. 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndichaonana navo. Kunyange vakapunyuka moto, moto uchatovapisa chete, kana ndakatarisana navo kudaro, ndipo pamuchandiziva kuti ndini Tenzi." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ndichaita kuti nyika iyoyi ive renje zvaro. Nokuti kuita kwavo hakuna kutendeka.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Ezekiel16:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauyazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel16:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu zivisa Jerusaremu unyangadzi hwaro hwakan'ora. 
Ezekiel16:3 Uti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari kuJerusaremu, kunyika yeKenani ndiko kwawakabva, ndiko kwawakaberekerwa. Baba vako vaiva muAmori, amai vako vaiva muHiti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Maberekerwo ako ndiwaya aya, pamusi wawaberekwa rukuvhute rwako haruna kuchekwa hauna kushambidzwa mumvura kuti uchene. Hauna kana kukwizwa munyu kana kuputirwa namachira." 
Ezekiel16:5 Hapana akambokuitira tsiye nyoro kuti akuitire kana chimwe chinhu zvacho chaizvozvi pamusana petsitsi kwauri. Asi wakatoraswa pachenachena musango nokuti waisemwa pamusi wawaberekwa. 
Ezekiel16:6 “Pandakapfuura nepawaiva ndakakuona uchitakanyika muropa rako. Uri muropa rako kudaro, ndakati rarama" 
Ezekiel16:7 ukure sechinhu chinomera musango. Wakakura ukareba ukasvika pakutova mhandara. Mazamu ako akabuda, bvudzi rako rikakura asi wakanga uri mutwi, usina chawakapfeka." 
Ezekiel16:8 “Ndakazopfuura zvakare nepawaiva ndikakutarisa. Izvozvo wanga wasvika pazera rokuda zvokuroorwa ndakatambanudzira hanzu yangu pauri ndikakufukidza muviri wako waiva mutwi. Ndakaita chitsidzo changu kwauri ndikaita chitenderano newe; ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari, iwe ukabva wava wangu.”" 
Ezekiel16:9 “Ndakazokushambidza nemvura ndichikushambidza ropa pauri ndikakuzora mafuta. 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndakakupfekedza nguo dzakarukirirwa ndikakupfekedza shangu. Ndakakupfekedza shangu dzeganda rembiti yakanakisisa ndikakupfekedza nesirika. 
Ezekiel16:11 “Ndakakushongedza zvakanakisisa nezvishongo ndikaisa makoza mumaoko ako netimbwa kechuma. 
Ezekiel16:12 Ndakaisa mhete mumhuno mako ndikakupfekedza mhete munzeve dzako. Ndakakugadza ndaza yakanakisa mumusoro. 
Ezekiel16:13 “Saizvozvo wakashongedzeka nendarama nesirivha. Zvipfeko zvako zvakanga zviri zverineni yakanakisisa nesirika namachira akarukirirwa. Waidya upfu hwekoroni hwakatsetseka nouchi namafuta. Wakabva wava nechimiro chakanakisisa kwazvo. Ukaita mambo chaiye wechikadzi. 
Ezekiel16:14 Mbiri yako yakadhumha mukati memarudzi avanhu pamusana porunako rwako nokuti rwakanga rwuri runako chairwo ruzere pamusana peururami hwandakanga ndakupa. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel16:15 “Asi wakavimba norunako rwako ukaita unzenza pamusana pembiri yako ukaita unzenza ihwohwo nomupfuuri nenzira ari wose. 
Ezekiel16:16 Wakatora dzimwe dzehanzu dzako ukadzishandisa kushongedza zvinoyemurika nzvimbo dzako dzokunamatira. Panzvimbo idzodzo wakaitira unzenza hwako ipapo. Hapana zvakadaro zvati zvamboitika kana zvichambofa zvakaitika kudaro. 
Ezekiel16:17 Wakatorawo iwe zvishongo zvako zvakanaka zvendarama yangu nesirivha yangu zvandainge ndakupa, ukazvishandisa kuzvigadzirira zvifananidzo zvevanhu ukaita zvounzenza nazvo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Wakatora iwe dzimwe dzehanzu dzako dzakarukirirwa uchizvishongedza nadzo uchipira mafuta angu norusenzi rwangu kwazviri. 
Ezekiel16:19 Chokudya chandakupa chaiti upfu hwakatsetseka hwandaikupa kuti udye namafuta nouchi wakandozvipira kwazviri somupiro unonhuwirira. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel16:20 Wakatora iwe vana vako vakomana navasikana vawakandiberekera ukavapira kuti vadyiwe zvavo. Ihwo hunzenza hwako ihwohwo hudiki nhai," 
Ezekiel16:21 hwokuti wakauraya vana vangu ukavapira kwazviri somupiro unopiswa nomoto? 
Ezekiel16:22 Muzvinhu zvako izvozvo zvinosemesa nomuunzenza hwako hauna kurangarira mazuva ako epaucheche pawakanga uri mutwi usina chawakapfeka uchitakanyika uri muropa rako. 
Ezekiel16:23 “Mushure mouipi hwako hwose uhu, (zvichakuwana zvako, ndizvo zviri kutara Tenzi Mwari)." 
Ezekiel16:24 Wakatozvivakira mupanda chaiwo nenzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira munhandare yoga yoga. 
Ezekiel16:25 Pakona yomugwagwa woga woga wakazvivakira nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira ukan'oresa noufeve runako rwako uchizarurira makumbo mupfuuri nenzira wose wose wonyanya nahwo hufeve hwako. 
Ezekiel16:26 Wakaitawo ufeve iwe navaIjipiti ivo vavakidzani nemi voruchiva ava uchinyanya nahwo hufeve hwako kuti undishatirise. 
Ezekiel16:27 “Saka naizvozvo chinzwa, ndakusimudzira shamhu muruoko ndichikutapudzira mugove wako wawakagoverwa ndichikuisa mumaoko mavavengi vako vana makaro, vanasikana vevaFirisitia, ivo vaitonyara nokuita kwako kwoufeve." 
Ezekiel16:28 “Pamusana pokuti hauguti wakaita unzenza navaAsiria. Wakaita unzenza navo iwe asi kuguta hauna kuguta. 
Ezekiel16:29 Wakanyanya nahwo hunzenza hwako nenyika youshambadzi yeKaridhea. Kunyange izvozvi hazvina kukugutsa.” 
Ezekiel16:30 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Chakurwadza mwoyo ukadai chii zvokuti kunyange zvazvo uchionawo kuti zvose izvi, zviito zvenzenza chaiyo yokupedzesera," 
Ezekiel16:31 uchizvivakira mupanda chaiwo pakona yomugwagwa woga woga uchigadzira nzvimbo dzako dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira munhandare yokutandarira yoga yoga. Asi iwe hauna kuita sepfambi, unotoramba zvako muripo wacho." 
Ezekiel16:32 Uri chifeve chaicho chomukadzi chinotorana navatorwa chichisiya murume wacho. 
Ezekiel16:33 Varume ndivo vanobhadhara pfambi, vanhu vanotopa zvipo. Asi iwe ndiwe urikutopa zvipo kuzvikomba zvako zvose kuti vauye kwauri vachibva kumativi ose kuzoita upombwe newe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Saka iwe wakasiyana chaizvo navamwe vakadzi muunzenza hwako. Hapana akakutsvetera kuti uite zvounzenza. Wakatopa muripo asi iwe muripo hauna kupiwa. Saka wakasiyana navamwe.” 
Ezekiel16:35 Nezvo chinzwa iwe pfambi zviri kutaura Tenzi," 
Ezekiel16:36 zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pamusana poruchiva rwako rwakawanda wakazvipfekenura ukasara usisina chawakapfeka muunzenza hwako nezvikomba zvako uye pamusana pezvifananidzo zvako zvokunamata uye pamusana peropa ravana vako rawakapira kwazviri." 
Ezekiel16:37 Naizvozvo, chiona, ndichaunganidza zvikomba zvako zvose zvawakazvifadza nazvo; zvikomba zvawaida nazvose zvawakanga usingadi. Ndichavakokorodza kumativi ose vakurwise ndigokupfekenura kuti vakuone zvawakaita uri mutwi." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndichakutonga sezvinoitwa vakadzi vanorambana navarume vavo uye savakadzi vanenge vadeura ropa. Ndichadeurawo ropa rako ndichikutsividzawo ndiine hasha neshanje. 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndichakuisa mumaoko ezvikomba zvako. Ivo vachaputsira pasi mupanda wako vagowondomorera pasi nzvimbo dzako dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira. Vachakupfekenura hanzu dzako vachitora zvishongo zvako zvakanaka vachikusiya usina chawakapfeka, uri mutwi." 
Ezekiel16:40 “Vachakuvinga nehondo yavarwi, vachikutaka namatombo vachakuita kanyama kanyama namapakatwa avo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Vachapisa dzimba dzako vachikuranga vakadzi vazhinji vachizviona. Ndichaita kuti zvounzenza uzvirege uyewo zvokupa zvipo kuzvikomba zvichabva zvapera. 
Ezekiel16:42 Ndiko kupedzera hasha dzangu pauri kwandichaita. Kuva neshanje newe kunobva kwapera. Ndichabva ndagadzana mwoyo uye handichazoshatirwazve. 
Ezekiel16:43 Pamusana pokuti hauna kuyeuka mazuva apauduku hwako asi kutoti wakandishatirisa nezvinhu izvozvi zvose, naizvozvo chinzwa, ini ndichakurangirawo zviito zvako. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. Hauna here kupara mhosva younzenza pamusoro pezvimwe izvi zvose zvinosemesa zvaunoita.”" 
Ezekiel16:44 “Munhu wose wose anenge avakuzoda kutaura tsumo achishandisa tsumo iyi nezvako achiti ‘Mbudzi kudya mufenje kufana nyina.’ 
Ezekiel16:45 Iwe uri mwanasikana chaiye waamai vako vanovenga murume wavo navana vavo. Uri munun'una chaiye wavakoma vako vaivenga varume vavo navana vavo. Amai vako vaiva muHiti, baba vako vaiva muAmori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Mukoma wako ndiSamaria aigara navana vake vasikana kuchamhembe kwako. Munun'una wako aigara kumaodzanyemba kwako ndiSodhomu navana varo vasikana. 
Ezekiel16:47 Asi hauna kuda kutevera nzira dzavo chete kana kuita zvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa asi kutoti nakanguva kaduku wakanga watoshata kupinda ivo mumaitiro ako ose. 
Ezekiel16:48 “Hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari, munun'una wako Sodhomu navana vake vasikana havana kuita sezvawakaita iwe navanasikana vako." 
Ezekiel16:49 Chiona, iyi ndiyo mhosva yakanga iri yomunun'una wako Sodhomu. Iye navanasikana vake vaizvikudza, vaine zvokudya zvakawandisa nokugarika vari vanhu vari pamutambaratede asi haana kubatsira varombo nevaiva muushai." 
Ezekiel16:50 Vaizvikudza vachiita zvinhu zvinosemesa mumaziso angu naizvozvo ndakavabvisa pandakazviona. 
Ezekiel16:51 “Pazvitadzo, Samaria haina kumboita hafu yezvako. Iwe wakaita zvinosemesa zvakawanda kupinda Samaria. Wakatoita kuti mukoma wako aite somururami pamusana pezvinosemesa zvawakaita." 
Ezekiel16:52 Zvino newewo unofanira kunyara nokuti wakatoita kuti mukoma wako nomunun'una wako vaite savarurami pamusana pezvitadzo zvako zvawakaita zvinosemesa kupinda zvavo. Ivo vanotova varurami kudarika iwe saka nyarawo iwe utakurane nenyadzi dzako nokuti wakaita kuti mukoma wako nomunun'una wako vaite savarurami panewe. 
Ezekiel16:53 “Ndichadzorera zvakare kubudirira kweguta reSodhomu nemisha yaro nokubudirira kweSamaria nemisha yayo. Ndichaita kutiwo kubudirira kwako kudzokere pakare mukati mavo. 
Ezekiel16:54 Uku kunenge kuri kuitira kuti ufumuke unyare nezvose zvawakaita uchizova chinhu chinovanyaradza. 
Ezekiel16:55 Kana zviri zvomukomanomunun'una newe; Sodhomu navanasikana varo richadzokera richiva zvaraiva riri kare Samariawo navanasikana varo richadzokerawo kuva zvarakanga riri. Newewo navanasikana vako uchadzokerawo kuva zvawakanga uri. 
Ezekiel16:56 Pamazuva ako awaizvitutumadza, munun'una wako, Sodhomu, akanga asiri chiseko pamuromo pako here" 
Ezekiel16:57 iwe kuipa kwako husati hwabuda pachena? Iye zvino wangoitawo saiye, wava chiseko chemisha yeEdhomu navavakidzani nemisha yavaFirisitia vari munharaunda yako vanokushora." 
Ezekiel16:58 Unofanira kutakura mutoro wokuipa kwako nezvinhu zvako zvinosemesa.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Ezekiel16:59 Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Ndichaita kwauri sekuitawo kwawakaita iwe wakashora mhiko nokutyora kwawakaita chitenderano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Asi ndinoyeuka chitenderano changu newe pawakanga uchiri muduku. Ndichaita newe chitenderano chokugara nokugara. 
Ezekiel16:61 Ndipo pauchayeuka maitiro ako uchinyara pandinenge ndatora mukoma wako nomunun'una wako vose vari vaviri ndichizovapa kwauri savanasikana vako asi kwete pamusana pechitenderano changu newe. 
Ezekiel16:62 Ndichaita chitenderano changu newe. Uchabva waziva kuti ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel16:63 Ndinenge ndichiitira kuti uyeuke udumbirwe nazvo urege kuzofa wakazarura muromo wako zvakare pamusana penyadzi dzako pandinenge ndakuregerera zvose zvawakaita.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel17:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel17:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, rondedzera dimikira, utaure nomuenzaniso kuimba yeIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel17:3 Iti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Rimwe gondo guru rina mapapiro makuru rine minhenga mirefu yakawanda ina mavara-mavara rakaenda kuRebhanoni rikatanha musoro womuti womusidhari." 
Ezekiel17:4 Rakatanha kapazi kapamusoro-soro chaipo rikakatakura kunyika yevemhindu dzokutengeserana. Rakanokaisa muguta ravashambadzi. 
Ezekiel17:5 Gondo rakatorawo mhodzi yomunyikamo rikaidyara muvhu rakaorera, rakaidyara munyasi memvura zhinji sekusimwa kunoitwa kapazi komuti womusambangwena." 
Ezekiel17:6 Mhodzi iya yakabuda ikava mugirepisi unoti unotanda napasi. Mapazi awo akakwira mudenga; akakura akananga kugondo riya. Midzi yawo yakadzika pasi. Saizvozvo wakava mugirepisi wakaita mapazi ukaita pfumvudza. 
Ezekiel17:7 Asi pakanga paine rimwezve gondo guru rina mamapiro makuru rine minhenga yakawanda. Zvino mugirepisi uya wakanangisa midzi yawo kwariri mugirepisi wakarerekera mapazi awo kwariri kuti gondo riudiridze. Gondo iri rakautora ipapo 
Ezekiel17:8 rikandousima pavhu rakanaka pane mvura yakawanda kuti uite mapazi akawanda ubereke muchero, uvewo mugirepisi wakanakisisa." 
Ezekiel17:9 “Taura uti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Ucharara here? Gondo irori haiudzuri here richiutyora mapazi awo. Zvokuti pfumvudza dzawo dzinouna. Haumboda ruoko rwakasimba kana kuti vanhu vakawanda vokuudzura nemidzi.’" 
Ezekiel17:10 Nhaimi, kana ukabviswa ipapa ukasimwa pamwe unorarama here? Haubva wanyatsouna here? Kana mhepo yokumabvazuva ikauvhuvhuta uchibva wauna panzvimbo ipapo pawasimwa.”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Izwi raTenzi rakazouya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel17:12 “Taurira imba yakapanduka iyi kuti, ‘Hamuzivi here zvinoreva zvinhu izvozvi? Vataurire kuti Mambo weBhabhironi akauya kuJerusaremu akatora mambo waro namachinda aro akaenda navo kuBhabhironi.’" 
Ezekiel17:13 Akatora mumwe wokumba huru semhodzi akaita chitenderano naye achimuita kuti apike nemhiko. Vakuru-vakuru vaakanga atora," 
Ezekiel17:14 akavatorera kuti nyika iyo ininipiswe irege kusimudza musoro. Uye kuti nokuchengeta kwainenge yaita chitenderano chake naye ikwanise kuramba imire. 
Ezekiel17:15 Asi akamupandukira nokutumira kwakaita nhume dzake kuIjipiti kuti imupe mabhiza nehondo huru. Achabudirira here? Munhu anoita zvakadai angapunyuke here? Anogona kutyora chitsidzirano achizopunyuka here? 
Ezekiel17:16 “Hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari, munhu uyu akarega kufira mukati imomo meBhabhironi, munzvimbo yacho yamambo akamugadza umambo ane chitsidzirano chaakashora uye ane chitenderano naye chaakatyora handisirini." 
Ezekiel17:17 Farao nehondo yake huru navanhu vazhinji haangagoni kumubatsira muhondo paye panenge paitwa mudhuri vatutira mavhu kurusvingo kuritenderedza kuita chokupindamo nacho kuti vauraye vanhu vazhinji," 
Ezekiel17:18 nokuti akazvidza mhiko akatyora chitenderano, asi akatosimudza ruoko kupika, pedzepo woita zvose izvi, haambopunyuki.”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Hezvino ndakadai, ndikarega ini kuti chitsidzirano changu chaakashora, nechitenderano changu naye chaakatyora zvimupfukire, handisirini." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ndichamukanda mambure angu omuti mbunde-mbunde kumubata ndigoenda naye kuBhabhironi ndigomupinza dare ikoko nemhosva yokusatendeseka kwake kwandiri. 
Ezekiel17:21 Nyanzvi chaidzo dzevarwi vake vehondo vachafa nebakatwa; vanenge vapunyuka vachiti mwarara kumativi ose. Iwe uchabva waziva kuti ndini Tenzi ndazvitaura.” 
Ezekiel17:22 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Iyeni pachangu ndichatanhawo pabazi rapamusorosoro chaipo pomuti murefu womusidhari bukira. Ndichatanha richiri idzva-idzva rapamusoro-soro penzvanzvana dzamapazi awo iyeni pachangu ndichirisima pamusoro pegomo rakakwirira refu-refu." 
Ezekiel17:23 Ndicharisima pakakwirira mugomo reIsiraeri kuti uve nemapazi ubereke muchero uve musidhari wakanakisisa. Pasi pawo pachizogara mhuka dzamarudzi namarudzi, mumumvuri mawo shiri dzemhando nemhando dzichizoita matendere adzo." 
Ezekiel17:24 Miti yose yesango ichaziva kuti ini Tenzi ndinopfupikisa muti murefu ndichirebesa muti mupfupi. Ndinoomesa muti munyoro ndichipfumvudzisa muti wakaoma. Ndini Tenzi ndazvitaura uye ndichazviita.” 
Ezekiel18:1 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandirizve richiti," 
Ezekiel18:2 “Zvinoreveiko kuramba muchingodzokorora tsumo iyi panyika yeIsiraeri yokuti, “Vabereki vakadya magirepisi anovava vana ndivo vakaita ugugu." 
Ezekiel18:3 “Hezvino ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, zvetsumo iyoyi haichazomboshandiswa nemi muIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel18:4 Chinzwai, munhu ari wose zvake ndowangu. Munhu angave baba kana mwana ndowangu. Munhu anenge apara chitadzo ndiye achafa." 
Ezekiel18:5 “Kana munhu akarurama achiita zvakarurama nezviri pamwero," 
Ezekiel18:6 asingandodyira pamakomo kana kutarisa zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvemba yaIsiraeri, asingatadze nomudzimai womumwe, kana kugara nomukadzi panguva yake yokutevera," 
Ezekiel18:7 asingadzvinyiriri mumwe anodzorera zvikwereti kwaakwereta, asingapambi munhu uye anopa chokudya kune ane nzara, anopfekedza vasina chokupfeka," 
Ezekiel18:8 anokweretesa asingati mari yake inofanira kudzoka yabereka imwe mari asingabati zvinhu zvakaipa, anoitira munhu nomunhu zvino ruenzaniso" 
Ezekiel18:9 anotevera mitemo yangu achinyatsochengeta mirawo yangu, mururami. Anofanira kurarama, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Asi akabereka mwana mukomana, gororo, muurayi," 
Ezekiel18:11 anoita zvinhu zvakaita sezvizvi zvokuti anodyira pamakomo, anotadza nomudzimai womumwe," 
Ezekiel18:12 anodzvinyirira varombo navari muushai, anopamba asingadzoreri zvikwereti, anotarisa zvifananidzo zvokunamata anoita zvinosemesa" 
Ezekiel18:13 anokweretesa achiti mari yake idzoke yabereka imwe mari, achiita chimbadzo; munhu akadaro anofanira kurarama here? Haafaniri kurarama. Akaita zvinhu zvose izvi zvinosemesa, anofanira kutoti afe, uye kuve nezvinomupfukira." 
Ezekiel18:14 “Ngatitii anoita mwana mukomana anoona zvose zvakaipa zvinoitwa nababa vake otya orega kuzvitevedzera," 
Ezekiel18:15 oita munhu asingadyiri pamakomo kana kutarisa zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvemba yaIsiraeri, asingatadzi nomudzimai womumwe," 
Ezekiel18:16 asingatadziri mumwe, asinganetsi nechikwereti, kupamba asingapambi, asi achipa vane nzara vasina chokupfeka achivapfekedza," 
Ezekiel18:17 asingabati zvinhu zvouipi asingati chikwereti chake ngachibereke kana kuita chimbadzo, ari anochengeta zvirongwa zvangu achifamba mumirao yangu haafaniri kufira uipi hwababa vake. Anofanira kurarama." 
Ezekiel18:18 Asi baba vake, pamusana pokuti vaiita zvechisimba vachipamba vanhu zvinhu, vachiita zvisina kunaka pakati pevanhu vokwake, achafa pamusana peuipi hwake." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Asi imi mungati, ko mwana wake anoregerei kutambudzika pamusana pouipi hwababa vake? Apa mwana akaita zviri pamutemo uye zvakarurama akanyatsochengeta mirao yangu yose anofanira kuti ararame." 
Ezekiel18:20 Munhu anoita chitadzo ndiye anofanira kuti afe. Mwana haafaniri kutambudzika nokuda kwohwutadza hwababa vake kana babawo kutambudzika nokuta kweuipi hwemwana wake. Mururami achawana mubayiro woururami, muipi achiwanawo mubayiro wouipi." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Asi kana munhu akaipa akasiyana nezvitadzo zvake zvose zvaakapara oita zviri pamutemo zvakarurama, anofanira kurarama, haafe." 
Ezekiel18:22 Hakuna kana chimwechete chaakakanganisa chinozorangarirwa. Pamusana pezvakarurama zvaanenge aita izvozvo, anofanira kurarama." 
Ezekiel18:23 Ndinofarira rufu rwomuipi here?” Ndizvo zviri kubvunza Tenzi Mwari, “Ndisingatofarira kuti atendeuke kunzira dzake agorarama?" 
Ezekiel18:24 “Asi kana mururami akasiyana noururami hwake oita zvakaipa achiita zvinhu zvinosemesa zvimwechetezvo zvinoitwa nowakaipa, angararame here ipapo? Hakuna kana nechimwe chezvakarurama zvaakamboita chinozomborangarirwa. Pamusana pemhosva yaanayo younyengedzi uye nechitadzo chaakapara, anofanira kufa." 
Ezekiel18:25 “Imi ndipo pamuri kuti maitiro aTenzi haana ruenzaniso. Chinzwai zvino, imi imba yaIsiraeri! Maitiro angu haana ruenzaniso nhai? Handiti kuita kwenyu ndiko kusina ruenzaniso?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Mururami kana akasiyana noururami hwake oita zvakaipa anofa nokuda kwaizvozvo. Uipi hwaanenge aita ndihwo hunoita kuti afe. 
Ezekiel18:27 “Uye kana akaipa, akasiyana nouipi hwaakaita oita zviri pamutemo, zvakarurama achazviponesa upenyu hwake" 
Ezekiel18:28 nokuti anenge afunga akabva asiyana nezvikanganiso zvose zvaakakanga aita anofanira kutorarama, haafi." 
Ezekiel18:29 Asi imba yaIsiraeri ndipo pamuri kuti maitiro aTenzi haana ruenzaniso. Nhaimi vemba yaIsiraeri, maitiro angu haana ruenzaniso here? Handiti kuita kwenyu imi ndiko kusina ruenzaniso?" 
Ezekiel18:30 “Naizvozvo ndichakutongai mumwe nomumwe maererano namaitiro ake, imi vemba yaIsiraeri, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. Tendeukai musiyane nezvikanganiso zvenyu zvose uipi hungadaro hukakuparadzai." 
Ezekiel18:31 Kandai pasi zvikanganiso zvenyu zvose zvamakapara kwandiri muwane mwoyo mutsva nomweya mutsva. Madireiko kufa, nhaimi vemba yaIsiraeri?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Chikonzero ndechokuti handifariri kuti ani naani zvake afe.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. “Saka pindukai murarame.” 
Ezekiel19:1 Chiimba rwiyo rwokuungudza kuchema machinda eIsiraeri 
Ezekiel19:2 uchiti: “Ii-i amai vako vaiva shumba chaiyo pane dzimwe shumba, yaiti pasi hwatata pakati peshumba diki ichirera vana vayo." 
Ezekiel19:3 “Yakayarutsa mumwe mwana wayo akava mukono uchiri kuzvinzwa, yakadzidza udzimba hwokubata nyama ikadya vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:4 Runyerekupe rwezvazvo rwakazengezanwa mumarudzi, yakawira muhunza yavo. Vakaiendesa iine zvikochekero kunyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel19:5 “Payakaona kuti zvayaitarisira zvaponga, chitarisiro chayo chapera, yakatora mumwe mwana wayo ikamuita kuti ave chimukono cheshumba." 
Ezekiel19:6 Chaizvikakanyadza mukati medzimwe shumba chikava chimukono chaicho cheshumba, yakadzidza udzimba hwokubata nyama yakava yokudya vanhu." 
Ezekiel19:7 Yakabvongodza munhare dzavo dzokuhwanda muhondo, ikaparadza maguta avo; nyika navagari vomo ikashaya pokuisa mwoyo nokutya payainge yodzvova." 
Ezekiel19:8 “Marudzi akaiteya kumativi ose. Vakaikanda mambure avo ikabva yabatwa muhunza yavo. 
Ezekiel19:9 Iine zvikochekero kudaro vakaipfigira muchizarira vakaiendesa kuna mambo weBhabhironi vakaizaririra muchitokisi kuti pasave neanonzwa izwi rayo mumakomo eIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel19:10 “Amai vako vaiva somugirepisi wakarimwa mumunda wamagirepisi wakasimwa pedyo nemvura unowa michero wakati mapazi sarara pamusana pemvura zhinji. 
Ezekiel19:11 Mapazi awo akaita hunde akakura kuita tsvimbo dzoumambo, wakareba mudenga nomukati megwindingwi ramapaazi. Nokureba kwawo uchioneka wakati dzu-u mudenga uina mazhinji mapazi." 
Ezekiel19:12 “Asi mugirepisi iwoyo wakadzipurwa nehasha ukarigirwa pasi, mhepo yokumabvazuva yakauomesa michero yawo ikakurumurwa. Hunde yawo yakasvava ukaroromeswa nomoto." 
Ezekiel19:13 Zvino wakasimwa mugwenga munyika yakaoma ine nyota. 
Ezekiel19:14 Moto wakabva pahunde yacho ukaroromesa mapazi awo nomuchero wawo zvokuti pauri pakanga pasisina rumuti rwakasimba runogona kana kuitwa tsvimbo youmambo.” Irworu rwiyo rwokuungudza rwava rwiyo rwokuungudza. 
Ezekiel20:1 Mugore rechinomwe mumwedzi wechishanu pamusi wechigumi wemwedzi iwoyo, vamwe vakuru vakuru veIsiraeri vakauya kuzoda kunzwa kuti Tenzi anoti kudii. Vakasvikogara mberi kwangu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ipapo izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel20:3 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu taurira vakuru vakuru veIsiraeri ava uvaudze kuti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Chamavinga pano apa kuda here kuzonzwa kuti ndinoti kudii?’ Zvino hezvinoi ndakadai, ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi, zvokuti imi muuye kuzonzwa kuti ini ndinoti kudii handizvidi." 
Ezekiel20:4 Iwe mwanakomana womunhu wotovatongaka! Vatonge vazivise unyangadzi hwakan'ora hwamadzibaba avo uchivaudza kuti," 
Ezekiel20:5 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, pazuva randakasarudza Isiraeri, ndakatsidza nemhiko kumbeu yemba yaJakobho ndichizvizivisa kwavari munyika yeIjipiti. Ndakatsidza nemhiko kwavari ndichiti ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu." 
Ezekiel20:6 Pazuva iroro ndakatsidza kwavari nemhiko kuti ndichavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti ndichivaendesa kunyika yandakavatsvakira, nyika youchi nomukaka, nyika yakakurumbira kwazvo kupinda nyika dzose zvadzo." 
Ezekiel20:7 Izvozvo ndakavati kandai pasi zvinhu zvounyangadzi hwakan'ora zvamunofarira kuona nameso enyu ani naani zvake wenyu murege kuzvin'oresa nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zveIjipiti, ini ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Asi vakandipandukira vakarega kunditeerera. Mumwe nomumwe wavo haana kukanda pasi zvinhu zvinosemesa zvavaifarira kuona nameso avo kana kusiyana nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zveIjipiti. Ipapo ndakafunga zvokuvavirukira nehasha, ndipedzere hasha dzangu pavari mukati menyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel20:9 Asi ndakaitira kuti zita rangu rirege kun'oreswa mumaziso avanhu vechirudzi mavakanga vagere nokuti ndakanga ndazvionesa kwavari ndichivazivisa kuti ndichazoburitsa vaIsiraeri munyika yeIjipiti. 
Ezekiel20:10 Ipapo ndakavaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti ndikavaunza murenje. 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndakavapa mirao yangu ndikavarayiridza mitemo yangu yokuti munhu anenge aichengeta ararame nayo. 
Ezekiel20:12 Ndakavapawo mazuva angu eSabata sechiratidzo pakati pangu navo kuti vazive kuti ini Tenzi, ndini ndinovaita kuti vave vatsvene." 
Ezekiel20:13 Asi imba yaIsiraeri yakandipandukira murenje. Havana kutevedza mirao yangu asi vakaramba mitemo yangu yokuti munhu anenge aichengeta anorarama nayo. Masabata angu vakan'oresa zvikuru. Ndipo pandakafunga zvokuti ndipedzere hasha dzangu pavari murenjemo kuti ndibva ndanyatsovatsakatisa. 
Ezekiel20:14 Asi ndakaitira kuti zita rangu rirege kun'oreswa mumaziso avanhu vechirudzi vakanga vaona nameso avo ndichivaburitsa. 
Ezekiel20:15 Uyewo ndakapika kwavari murenje nemhiko kuti handisi kuvasvitsa kunyika yandakanga ndavapa, nyika yakanaka nyika yomukaka nouchi nyika yakakurumbira kwazvo kupinda nyika dzose" 
Ezekiel20:16 nokuti vakaramba zvirongwa zvangu vakarega kutevedza zvirevo zvangu vakan'oresa masabata angu nokuti vakanga vatorwa mwoyo nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata. 
Ezekiel20:17 “Zvakadaro zvazvo ndakavaitira tsiye nyoro ndikarega kuvaparadza kana kubva ndanyatsovatsakatisa murenjemo. 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndakatiwo kuvana vavo murenje, musatevedze mirao yamadzibaba enyu kana kuteerera mitemo yavo kunyange kuzvin'oresa nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata." 
Ezekiel20:19 Ini Tenzi, ndini Mwari wenyu, tevedzai mirao yangu muchenjerere kuteerera mitemo yangu" 
Ezekiel20:20 muerese masabata angu kuitira kuti uve somucherechedzo pakati pangu nemi mugoziva kuti ini Tenzi ndini Mwari wenyu. 
Ezekiel20:21 “Asi vana vavo vakandipandukira vakarega kutevedza mirao yangu uye havana kuitira mitemo yangu hanya yokuichengeta yokuti munhu anenge aichengeta anorarama nayo. Vakan'oresa masabata angu. Ndipo pandakafunga kuti ndivavirukire nehasha ndipedzere hasha dzangu pavari murenje imomo. 
Ezekiel20:22 Asi ndakadzora ruoko rwangu, ndichiitira kuti zita rangu rirege kun'oreswa mumaziso avanhu vechirudzi." 
Ezekiel20:23 Uyezve ndakavapikira murenje kuti ndichavaparadzira mukati memarudzi ndichivaendesa kudzinyika 
Ezekiel20:24 nokuti havana kuchengeta mitemo yangu asi kuti vakaramba mirao yangu vakan'oresa masabata angu izvozvo meso avo akanga angova pazvifananidzo zvokunamata zvamadzibaba avo. 
Ezekiel20:25 Uyewo ndakavapa mirao yakanga isina kunaka nemitemo yaiita kuti vatadze kuwana upenyu. 
Ezekiel20:26 Ndakavan'oresawo nezvipo zvavo izvozvo ndichiita kuti vapire nomoto somupiro matangwe avo ose echikomana kuitira kuti vadumbirwe nazvo. Ndakazviita kuti vazive kuti ini ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel20:27 “Naizvozvo iwe mwanakomana womunhu taurira imba yaIsiraeri uchivaudza kuti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari hechinoi chimwezve chakaitwa namadzibaba enyu chokundishonha nokusatendeka kwandiri." 
Ezekiel20:28 Ndinodaro nokuti pandakavaunza munyika yandakatsidza kuzovapa vaiti vakangoona chikomo chirefu kana muti wakasvibira, ipapo vaibva vatopira zvibayiro zvavo vachipa mipiro yavo inotsamwisa vachipwitititsirapo zvavo zvinonhuwirira uye vachiteurira ipapo mipiro yavo yokuteura." 
Ezekiel20:29 (Ndakavati ndiko kui kunzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira kwamunoenda? Sakawo zita rapo rakanzi ‘Pakatunhumara.’ Kusvikira pari nhasi.) 
Ezekiel20:30 Nezvo chiti kumba yaIsiraeri, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari munodirei kuzvin'oresa sezvakaita madzibaba enyu muchiteterekera mutome kutevera unyangadzi hwavo hwakan'ora?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Pamunopira zvipo zvenyu nokubayira vanakomana venyu sechibayiro pamoto muchizvin'oresa nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvose zvokunamata kusvikira pari nhasi. Pakadai ndipo here pamungazoda kundinzwa kuti ini ndinoti kudii, nhai imba yaIsiraeri? Hezvino ndakadai ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi Mwari, handidi zvangu kuti imi muzobvunza kuti munzwe kuti ini ndinoti kudii!" 
Ezekiel20:32 “Zviri mumwoyo menyu izvozvo hazvisi kuzofa zvakaitika zvokufunga kuti tinoda kuve sevechirudzi kuti muite samarudzi ari mudzinyika uye kuti munamate zvimiti namatombo. 
Ezekiel20:33 “Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Hezvino ndakadai, ndikarega ini kukutongai muri mumaoko mangu shamhu yangu iri mudenga uye ndikaviruka nehasha, handisirini." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndichakubvisai mukati memarudzi iwayo ndigokukokorodzai munyika dzamunenge mapararira. Ndichazviita izvozvo namaoko angu aya shamhu yangu iri mudenga ndakaviruka nehasha. 
Ezekiel20:35 Ipapo ndichakuunzai murenje revechirudzi ndigokupinzai dare takatarisana uso nouso. 
Ezekiel20:36 Ndichakutongesai sokutongesa kwandakaita madzibaba enyu murenje renyika yeIjipiti,’ ndichakukwidzai dare ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel20:37 “Ndichakuitai kuti mupfuure napasi petsvimbo yangu ndichikuunzai muchisungo chechitenderano changu. 
Ezekiel20:38 Ndichabvisa vapanduki pakati penyu navavo vanenge vandikanganisira. Ndichavaburitsa munyika mavari kumbogara asi havasi kuzopinda munyika yeIsiraeri. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel20:39 “Asi kana zviri zvenyu, imimi vemba yaIsiraeri, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari endaika zvenyu mumwe nomumwe kundonamata zvifananidzo zvake zvokunamata asi mushure maizvozvo kunyange zvazvo mukarega kunditeerera asi zita rangu rinoera hamusi kuzorin'oresazve nezvipo zvenyu nezvifananidzo zvenyu zvokunamata." 
Ezekiel20:40 Zviripo ndezvokuti pagomo rangu rinoera gomo refu reIsiraeri, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari, ipapo imba yose yavaIsiraeri vose zvavo vachandinamata munyika imomo. Ipapo ndichavagamuchira, ipapowo ndichati muite mudememudeme muchibvisa zvipo zvenyu zvakanakisisa nemipiro yenyu yose inoera." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ndichakugamuchirai somupiro unonhuwirira pandichakubvisai mumarudzi ndichikukokorodzai kudzinyika kwamakapararira. Ndicharatidza kuera kwangu pakati penyu marudzi achiona. 
Ezekiel20:42 Muchabva maziva kuti ndini Tenzi pandichakuunzai munyika yeIsiraeri, nyika yandakatsidzira kuzopa madzibaba enyu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Imomo muchayeuka kuita kwenyu nezviito zvose zvamakazvin'oresa nazvo, muchatozvisema nezvakaipa zvose zvamakaita." 
Ezekiel20:44 Uye muchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi kana ndava kuzoita nemi zvandinoita ndichiremekedza zita rangu, kwete zvinokodzerana nenzira dzenyu dzakaipa kana zviito zvenyu zvakaora, iyemi vemba yaIsiraeri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel20:45 Shoko raTenzi rakauyawo kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel20:46 “Iwe Mwanakomana womunhu wochinangana nemaodzanyemba uparidze wakanangana namaodzanyemba uporofite wakanangana namaruwa amasango okuNegevhu. 
Ezekiel20:47 Iti kusango rokuNegevhu, inzwai izwi raTenzi. Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chinzwa, ndichabatidza moto mauri ucharoromesa muti wose wakasvibira uri mauri nomuti wose wakaoma usingazodzimiki; rimi rinonganduka risingadzimuriki. Uchavavaidza uso hwose kubvira kumaodzanyemba dakara kuchamhembe." 
Ezekiel20:48 Vose vose vachaona kuti Tenzi ndiye akabatidza moto iwoyo usingadzimuriki.” 
Ezekiel20:49 Ini ndipo pandakati, “Aa-a nhai Tenzi Mwari inga vari kutaura nezvangu vachiti haasi munhu wokungotaura namadimikira here?”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel21:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu wochinangana neJerusaremu uparidze wakanangana nenzvimbo dzacho dzinoera uporofite wakanangana nenyika yeIsiraeri 
Ezekiel21:3 uti kunyika yeIsiraeri, zvanzi naTenzi chinzwa, ndanangana newe zvino. Ndichaburitsa bakatwa rangu muhara ndiuraye mukati mako vakarurama navakaipa." 
Ezekiel21:4 Sezvo ndichauraya mukati menyu vakarurama navakaipa kudaro saka bakatwa rangu richabudira muhara vanhu vose kubvira kumaodzanyemba dzamara kuchamhembe. 
Ezekiel21:5 Vanhu vose vachaziva kuti ini Tenzi ndini ndaburitsa bakatwa rangu muhara. Harichadzoserwazve muhara. 
Ezekiel21:6 Ungudza iwe munhu! Ungudza nomwoyo wakasuruvara nokushungurudzika kukuru vachiona nameso avo. 
Ezekiel21:7 “Kana vakakuti zvauya sei kuungudza kudai, iwe uti ‘Pamusana pamashoko. Paachasvikira munhu wose achadumbirwa nazvo; maoko avose achapera simba, mweya yose ichirukitika; mabvi ose achati rukutu semvura zvayo. Hezvo rosvika uye richatoitika.’ ” Ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel21:8 Shoko raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel21:9 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu porofita uti zvanzi naTenzi, iti: Bakatwa, bakatwa rakarodzwa uye rikakwenenzverwawo" 
Ezekiel21:10 richirodzerwa kuuraya nokukwenenzvererwa kupenya semheni! Ndipo patingabva tatofaririra nhai? Tarisai muone tsvimbo youmambo yapenyeserwa mwanakomana wangu kuti azvidze zvimiti zvokunamata. 
Ezekiel21:11 Bakatwa rakanzi rirodzwe kuti ribatwe. Rakarodzwa rikakwenenzverwa kuti riiswe mumaoko momuurayi. 
Ezekiel21:12 “Ridza mhere uchihwihwidza, iwe mwanakomana womunhu pamusana pezvawira vanhu vangu zvichinangana namachinda eIsiraeri ose. Ipapo vanofanira kuuraiwa nebakatswa iwe chibata rushaya," 
Ezekiel21:13 nokuti kuedzwa hakusi kuzorega kuuya chamakazvidzira tsvimbo youmambo chii? Hamusi kuzobudirira.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel21:14 “Saka zvino chiporofita iwe mwanakomana womunhu. Rovanisa maoko bakatwa rigouya pasi kaviri kana katatu kese, ibakatwa ravanofanira kuti vaurayiwe. Ibakatwa rokuuraya vanhu kwakanyanyisa rakatarisana navo" 
Ezekiel21:15 kuitira mwoyo yavo idedere, vazhinji vafe mumaguta mavo mose. Ndakapa bakatwa rinopenya. Heekaka! Rakagadzirwa semheni rikaputirwa kuitira kuzourayisa." 
Ezekiel21:16 Nyatsocheka uku nouku kunenge kwangonanga rutivi runocheka. 
Ezekiel21:17 Ini ndicharovanisawo maoko angu ndichipedza hasha dzangu. Ndini Tenzi ndazvireva.” 
Ezekiel21:18 Izwi raTenzi rakauyazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel21:19 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu tara nzira mbiri dzokuitira hondo yebakatwa yamambo weBhabhironi ichauya. Dzose dziri mbiri dzichabva kunyika imwecheteyo. Umise chikwangwani uchidzike pakona yomugwagwa wokupinda muguta. 
Ezekiel21:20 Tara nzira yebakatwa inoenda kuguta reRabha rokuvaAmoni neinoenda kwaJudha muguta retsvingo reJerusaremu. 
Ezekiel21:21 Ndinodaro nokuti mambo weBhabhironi anosvikomira pamhararano penzira idzodzo panoparadzana nzira mbiri idzodzo oshopera. Anoita miseve hakata dzokukandira nadzo, obvunzira kutumwari twechiterafimu achinan'anidza pachiropa." 
Ezekiel21:22 Muruoko rwake rworudyi chin'ange chinenge chabata Jerusaremu kuti iisirwe zvombo zvakaita sehondohwe zvokudhugumurisa, nokundoshamarara kuridza mhere dzokuuraya nokudaidzirisa kwazvo nokumisa zvombo zvakaita sehondohwe zviya zvokudhugumurisa zvakatarisana nemisuo mikuru yacho nokuzoriisira chinenge musana wenzou chevhu kurusvingo nokuzovaka nokuchera mugero." 
Ezekiel21:23 Asi kwavari ivo zvichatarisika sokushopera kusina maturo vachitozviti vakapika mhiko chaidzo dzakasimba. Asi achaita kuti mhosva yavo iyeukwe kuitira kuti vagobatwa. 
Ezekiel21:24 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari pamusana pokuti makaita kuti chitadzo chenyu chiyeukwe nokuiswa pachena kwaitwa chitadzo chenyu zvokuti muzviito zvenyu zvose zvazvo, zvitadzo zvenyu zvava kuonekwa, zvaita kuti imi muyeukwe; muchaiswa mumaoko mavo." 
Ezekiel21:25 Iwe muipi, akan'ora, muchinda weIsiraeri zuva rokutongwa kwako kwokupedzisira rasvika zvino." 
Ezekiel21:26 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari bvisa ngundu ukutunure chiremba choumambo. Zvinhu hazvicharamba zvakaita zvazvakaita. Vapasi vachasimudzwa vapamusoro vachaderedzwa. 
Ezekiel21:27 Ndichaita kuti uve dongo, dongo, dongo zvaro zvisati zvamboitika kusvikira ane mvumo yokuritonga auya ndiye wandicharipa." 
Ezekiel21:28 “Zvino iwe mwanakomana womunhu porofita uchiti, ‘Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari nezvevaAmoni uye nezvokunyadziswa kwavo achiti, bakatwa, bakatwa raburitswa muhara kuzorakatisa.’ “Rakakwenenzverwa zvokuva nokupenya kunenge kwemheni" 
Ezekiel21:29 ivo vachikuonerai zviratidzo zvenhema kudaro vachishopera zvenhema nezvenyu saizvozvo bakatwa richazoiswa pamutsipa yavakaipa vakan'ora vasvikirwa nenguva yokutongwa kwavo kwokupedzisira. 
Ezekiel21:30 Ridzosere muhara maro. Munzvimbo mawakasikwa imomo munyika mawakaberekerwa ndimo mandichakutongera. 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndichapedzera shungu dzangu pauri ndichava moto moto kukuvirukira nehasha dzangu. Ndichakuisa mumaoko mavanhu voutsinye mharadzi chaidzoidzo. 
Ezekiel21:32 Muchava huni dzokupisa moto, ropa renyu richierera mukati menyika. Hamuchazoyeukwazve nokuti ini Tenzi ndazvireva.”" 
Ezekiel22:1 Uyewo izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel22:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu tonga guta iri guta remhosva yokudeura ropa, ritonge. Ritaurire zviito zvaro zvose zvinosemesa." 
Ezekiel22:3 Unofanira kuti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Guta rokudeura ropa mukati maro nguva yako yazosvika; iyewe nyakugadzira zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvokuzvin'oresa!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Une mhosva iwe pamusana peropa rawakadeura ukan'oreswa nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zvawakaita. Ipapo wakaita kuti zuva rako risvike, nguva yako yamakore awakatarirwa yasvika. Naizvozvo ndakuita kuti uve chiseko zvacho kumarudzi nechinhu chinoshoreka munyika dzose zvadzo." 
Ezekiel22:5 Vepedyo nevokure newe vachakunyomba, iwe nhunzvatunzva izere mheremhere." 
Ezekiel22:6 “Tarisa uone, machinda eIsiraeri, mumwe nomumwe sokugona kwake, anokarira kudeura ropa." 
Ezekiel22:7 Vanhu vava kuzvidza baba naamai mauri iwe guta, vava kutorera mari vaenzi nenzira dzokusevenzesa chisimba mukati mako. Vanhu vava kuitira zvakaipa nherera nechirikadzi mauri iwe." 
Ezekiel22:8 Munozvidza zvinhu zvangu zvinoera muchin'oresa mazuva angu eSabata. 
Ezekiel22:9 Mauri iwe, vanhu vari kudeura ropa namakuhwa avo, uye vanhu vari mauri iwe vanodyira mumakomo vava kuita zvinhu zvisina hunhu mukati mako." 
Ezekiel22:10 Mauri iwe vanasikana vari kufeva namadzibaba avo. Mauri iyewe varume vari kumanikidza kugara navakadzi vari panguva yavo yokutevera. 
Ezekiel22:11 Mumwe anoita zvinhu zvinosemesa nomudzimai womumwe, mumwewo achiita upombwe hunotonyadzisa nomuroora wake. Mumwezve murume mauri iwe anotadza nehanzvadzi yake, mwana wababa vake chaiye." 
Ezekiel22:12 Mauri vanhu vanogamuchira chiokomuhomwe chokuti vadeure ropa. Munokweretesa mari nechimbadzo muchitarisira kuti idzoke yabereka muchizviwanira zvinhu nokutorera vamwe nenzira dzokushandisa chisimba mukandikanganwa.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel22:13 “Chinzwa, naizvozvo ini ndinorova pasi nechibhakera changu ndichikomekedza nezvokuwana zvinhu nokubiridzira kwamunoita uye ndichikomekedza nezveropa rinodeurwa pakati pako." 
Ezekiel22:14 Naicho chivindi chako ichochi ungapamire here, kana kutokwinyirirawo kwazvo namaoko ako iwe mumazuva andinenge ndanangana newe? Ini Tenzi ndini ndataura uye ndichazviita." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndichakutii mwarara mukati memarudzi ndichiita kuti mupararire nedzinyika. Ndicharoromesa zvakaora mauri. 
Ezekiel22:16 Muchava vanhu vakan'ora mukuona kwamarudzi. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel22:17 Shoko raTenzi rakauyazve kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel22:18 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, imba yaIsiraeri yangova marara zvawo outare kwandiri. Vose zvavo, vaita sesirivha nendarira noutare hwerata nesimbi nomutobvu zviri muvirira romoto vangova marara hawo outare." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ndokusaka zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, mose zvenyu zvamava marara zvawo outare kudai naizvozvo, chinzwai, ndichakuunganidzai pakati peJerusaremu." 
Ezekiel22:20 Sokuunganidza kunoitwa sirivha nendarira nesimbi nomutobvu noutare hwerata muvirira romoto zvigovhutirwa moto kuitira kuti zvinyongodeke, ndokuunganidza kwandichakuitai ndakashatirwa ndakatsamwa ndichakurongererai imomo ndikunyongodesei." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ndichakuunganidzai ndigokuvhutirai nemoto chaiwo wehasha dzangu. Muchanyongodeka mukati mawo. 
Ezekiel22:22 Sokunyongodeka kunoita sirivha muvirira ndiko kunyongodeka kwamuchaita mukati mawo. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ini Tenzi ndini ndakuvirukirai nehasha.” 
Ezekiel22:23 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel22:24 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu iti kunyika iyi uri nyika isina kuchenurwa, isina kuniwa nemvura pazuva rehasha." 
Ezekiel22:25 Machinda, mukati mayo vakaita seshumba dziri kuwomba dzichibvambura-bvambura nyama. Vakapfuudza upenyu hwavanhu. Vakapamba upfumi nezvinhu zvakakosha. Vakaita kuti vazhinji vave chirikadzi mukati mayo." 
Ezekiel22:26 Vapristi vayo vakatyoranisa mutemo wangu, vakan'oresa zvinhu zvangu zvinoera; havana kusiyanisa chinhu chinoera nechinhuwo zvacho. Havanawo kudzidzisa kusiyana kwezvan'ora nezvisina. Masabata angu havana kuaitira hanya zvokuti ndava chinhu chakan'ora pakati pavo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Machinda, mukati mavo, vava mhumi zvadzo dzinobvambura-bvambura nyama nokudeura ropa vachiparadza upenyu vachizviwanira zvinhu nenzira dzisina kutendeka." 
Ezekiel22:28 Uye vaporofita vayo vanodzurura nesuko vachiona zviratidzo zvenhema vachishopera chiporofita chamanyepo vachiti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari; iye Tenzi asina chaataura. 
Ezekiel22:29 Vanhu venyika iyoyi vanotorera vanhu zvinhu nechisimba uye vanopamba. Vanoonesa nhamo varombo navasina chavanacho; vanoitira zvakaipa mueni zvisina ruenzaniso. 
Ezekiel22:30 Zvino ndakatsvaga pakati pavo munhu angavake rusvingo, anomira pakakoromoka pamberi pangu, akamiririra nyika kuitira kuti ndirege kuiparadza. Asi hapana wandakawana." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ipapo ndakavavirukira nehasha ndikavaroromesa nomoto wehasha dzangu. Maitiro avo ndakati avapfukire.” Ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel23:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel23:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu, paivapo vakadzi vaviri vaiva vana vamai vamwechete." 
Ezekiel23:3 Vakaita unzenza muIjipiti. Vakaita ufeve hwacho vachiri vechiduku vachidzvanywa mazamu avo minyatso yavo youmhandara ichibatwa-batwa. 
Ezekiel23:4 Mukuru wacho ainzi Ohora munun'una wake achinziwo Ohoribha. Vakava vangu vakabereka vana vakomana navasikana. Pamazita avo apa Nyadumba iSamaria, Mudumba iJerusaremu." 
Ezekiel23:5 “Ohora akaita upfambi iye ari wangu. Mwoyo wake waidokwairira zvikomba zvake vaAsiria ivo 
Ezekiel23:6 varwi vakapfeka hanzu dzoruvara rwohute, masadunhu navatungamiriri vakuru vehondo vose, zvavo vari majaya anoyemurika, varwi vamabhiza vanotasva mabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:7 Akaita ufeve hwake navo ivo varume vakanakisisa veAsiria vose zvavo vachizvin'oresa nezvifananidzo zvokunamata zvomumwe nomumwe wose waaidokwairira. 
Ezekiel23:8 Haana kumbosiyana noufeve hwaaiita mazuva aaiva muIjipiti nokuti paakanga achiri wechiduku varume vairara naye vachibata-bata nyatso dzake dzoumhandara vachipedzera shungu dzoruchiva rwavo paari. 
Ezekiel23:9 Naizvozvo ndakamuisa mumaoko mezvikomba zvake izvozvo, mumaoko mavaAsiria vaaidokwairira vacho." 
Ezekiel23:10 Ivava vakamupfekenura kumusiya ava mutwi. Vakabata vanakomana vake navanasikana vake. Iye vakamuuraya nebakatwa akabva ava tsumo zvayo pakati pavakadzi paakanga zvino atemerwa chirango chake. 
Ezekiel23:11 “Munun'una wake uya, Mudumba izvozvi zvaiva mumaziso make asi akava mukadzi ane tsika dzakatonyanyisisa kuora kumudarika iye mukudokwaira mwoyo woufeve hwake hwakanga hwakatoipisisa kupfuura hwomukoma wake." 
Ezekiel23:12 Mukadzi uyu akadokwairira vaAsiria, masadunhu acho navatungamiriri vakuru vehondo ivo varwi vakanga vakapfeka zvinhu zvokuhondo chaizvo zvakakwana vari varwi vemabhiza vachitasva mabhiza, vose vari majaya anoyemurika." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ipapo ndakaona kuti akanga aton'oreswa uye vose vari vaviri vakanga vatora nzira imwecheteyo. 
Ezekiel23:14 “Asi iye akatopindiridza kwazvo ufeve hwake. Akaona varume vakanzi chechetere pamadziro, mifananidzo yavanhu vechiKaridhea yakanzi kumadziro chechetere neingi tsvuku" 
Ezekiel23:15 vakasunga mindya muchiuno vaine ngundu mumusoro dzinoti rembe rembe. Vose vaitarisika savakuru vakuru uri mufananidzo zvawo wevaBhabhironi vagari venyika yeKaridhea. 
Ezekiel23:16 Paakavaona akavadokwairira mwoyo akatumira nhume kwavari kuKaridhea. 
Ezekiel23:17 VaBhabhironi vakauya kwaari vakaenda naye pamubhedha wezverudo vakamun'oresa nehavi dzavo. Mushure mokunge an'oreswa navo kudaro, akavaramba asviba mwoyo." 
Ezekiel23:18 Paakanga oita ufeve hwake pasina zvokuvanza wongoita ufambi zviri pachena achizviyanika muviri wake, ndakasviba mwoyo ndikamuramba sezvandakaita mukoma wake." 
Ezekiel23:19 Asi ufeve hwake ndipo paakatohunyanya oyeuka zvino mazuva oumhandara hwake paaiita ufeve nenyika yeIjipiti 
Ezekiel23:20 kwaaidokwairira mhombwe dzake ikoko dzine mhuka dzinenge dzamadhongi dzinowadzura mbeu samabhiza makono. 
Ezekiel23:21 Ndokusuwira kwawaiita kushaya hunhu pahudiki hwako zviya zvokuIjipiti kwawaibatwa-batwa minyatso yako uchidzvanywa mazamu ako akanga achiri echidiki.” 
Ezekiel23:22 Naizvozvo iwe Ohoribha zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Chinzwa ndichaita kuti upandukirwe navadiwa vako ivavo vawakaramba wasviba mwoyo. Zvino ndichavaunza vagokukomberana kumativi ese," 
Ezekiel23:23 ivo vaBhabhironi navanhu vose vechiKaridhea vokuPekodhi nokuShoa nokuKoa uye nevaAsiria vose vavanavo, majaya acho anoyemurika, masadunhu navatungamiriri vakuru vehondo, vose vakuru vakuru, varwi vose zvavo vakatasva mabhiza." 
Ezekiel23:24 “Vachakuvinga vachibva kuchamhembe vaine ngoro dzehondo nezvikochikari negurusvusvu ravanhu vamarudzi. Vacharongana kuzokurwisa kumativi ose vaine nhoo huru neduku nenguwani dzesimbi. Ndivo vandichati vakugadze dare; vachakutonga iwe maererano nematongerowo avo. 
Ezekiel23:25 Iwewe ndiwe wandichanangana naye ndakashatirwa ivowo vagokuitira zvehasha. Vachacheka mhuno dzako nenzeve dzako, vanenge vasara vokwako vachifa nebakatwa. Vachabata vanakomana navanasikana vako. Vanenge vasara vokwako vachavaroromesa nomoto." 
Ezekiel23:26 Vachakupfekenurawo hanzu dzako vachikutorerawo zvishongo zvako zvakanakisisa. 
Ezekiel23:27 Saizvozvo ndichapedza kushaya kwako hunhu uye ufeve hwako hwakabva kunyika yeIjipiti zvokuti hauzombotarisa kana kuyeukazve vaIjipiti," 
Ezekiel23:28 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chinzwa, ndava kukuisa mumaoko mavavo vaunovenga mumaoko maavo vawakaramba wasviba mwoyo." 
Ezekiel23:29 Ivo zvavachaita kwauri vachakuitira noruvengo, vachakutorera zvose zvawakawana nokushanda kwako vagokusiya wangodaro wakashama mutwi uye ufeve hwako huchasiyiwa hwava pachena. Pamusana pokushaya hunhu hwako noufeve hwako" 
Ezekiel23:30 unenge wawirwa nezvinhu izvozvi nokuti wakaita ufeve namarudzi avanhu ukazvin'oresa nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata. 
Ezekiel23:31 Wakatevedza nzira yomukoma wako, nezvo ndichaisa mukombe wake wehasha dzangu mumaoko mako.”" 
Ezekiel23:32 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Unofanira kuti utonwa mukombe womukoma wako, zigombe guru chairo. Uchasekwa nokudadirwa nokuti rine zvakawanda." 
Ezekiel23:33 “Uchanyatsoraradza zvako ugonyatsosuruvara. Mukombe unodumbirisa wokuparadza ndiwo mukombe womukoma wako Samaria. 
Ezekiel23:34 Uchaunwa zvokuukwengura ugotobanda zvimedu zvawo wobvanzura mazamu ako nokuti ndini ndazvireva.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel23:35 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pamusana pokuti wakandikanganwa ukandikanda kuseri kwako. Hezvoka worumwa nechokuchera nokushaya kwakoka hunhu nounzenza hwako." 
Ezekiel23:36 “Tenzi akanditi iwe mwanakomana womunhu chitonga Ohora naOhoribha. Vazivise zviito zvavo zvinosemesa 
Ezekiel23:37 nokuti vakaita ufeve uye vane ropa mumaoko. Vakaita ufeve nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata vachitopira kwazviri sechokudya vana vaya vavakandiberekera. 
Ezekiel23:38 Uyezve vakaita izvi kwandiri, vakan'oresa Nzvimbo yangu Inoera panguva imwechetewo vachin'oresa maSabata angu" 
Ezekiel23:39 nokuti pavakauraya vana vavo vachivaita chibayiro kuzvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata pazuva rimwechetero vakauya kuNzvimbo yangu Inoera kuzoin'oresa. Hezvo, zvavakaita mumba mangu." 
Ezekiel23:40 “Vakatotumira shoko rokukoka varume vanobva kure vakatumirwa nhume ndokubvawo vauya. Wakazvishambidza ukapenda maziso ako ukazvishongedza nezvishongo uchiitira ivo. 
Ezekiel23:41 Wakati tendhe kugara pachigaro chaiva neteburu yakagadzikirwa zvokudya mberi kwacho pawakanga iwe waisa rusenzi rwangu namafuta angu eorivhi. 
Ezekiel23:42 Izvozvo paiva nemheremhere yemhomho yavanhu vaiva naye uye nezvidhakwa zvamadzenga zvawo avarume vokurenje. Vakaisa tsambo mumaoko avakadzi nendaza dzakanakisa pamisoro yavo. 
Ezekiel23:43 Ndakazoti ko zvino ivo varume havaite upombwe here kana vachiita ufeve naye? 
Ezekiel23:44 Vakatadza naye sezvinoita varume vanotadza nepfambi. Ndiko kutadza kwavakaita naOhora naOhoribha vachiita zvisina hunhu. 
Ezekiel23:45 Vanhu vakarurama vachavatongera mhosva youpfambi uye nemhosva yavakadzi vanodeura ropa nokuti zvifeve uye vane ropa mumaoko mavo.” 
Ezekiel23:46 Ndinodaro nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Vaunzire hondo kuzovarwisa uite kuti vave chinhu chinotyisa nechinhu chokupamba." 
Ezekiel23:47 Hondo iyoyo inofanira kuvataka namabwe ivapfuudze namapakatwa ayo vachauraya vanakomana navanasikana vavo uye ichiroromesa dzimba dzavo. 
Ezekiel23:48 Ndomapedzero andichaita kushaya hunhu munyika iyoyi kuitira kuti vakadzi vose vawane yambiro varege kuzoshaya hunhu sezvakaita imi. 
Ezekiel23:49 Kushaya kwenyu hunhu kuchakupfukirai mugopiwa shamhu yechirango chechitadzo chenyu chokunamata zvifananidzo. Ipapo ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi Mwari.” 
Ezekiel24:1 Mugore rechipfumbamwe mumwedzi wegumi pamusi wechigumi wemwedzi iwoyo, izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel24:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, nyora zita rezuva ranhasi, iro ranhasi chairo. Mambo weBhabhironi atokomba Jerusaremu iye nhasi uno chaiye." 
Ezekiel24:3 Zvino wochitaura nomuenzaniso kumba yavapanduki uvati zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Gadzai poto, gadzai poto pamoto mudirewo mvura mairi." 
Ezekiel24:4 Rongererai mairi nhindi dzenyama, nhindi dzose dzakanaka dzenyama dzechidya nedzebandauko, muiti pamu pamu kuzadza namapfupa akanakisisa ayo" 
Ezekiel24:5 mutore chipfuwo chakanakisisa chomudanga murongerere huni pasi pacho mubike nhindi dzacho, mapfupa acho abikei pamwechete nacho.”" 
Ezekiel24:6 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Zvichakuwana, iwe guta rinodeura ropa, iyewe poto ine ngura, ngura isina kumbopera. Chachurai mukati mayo nhango nenhango pasina zvokuswerosarudza" 
Ezekiel24:7 nokuti ropa raro rakadeurwa richiri mukati maro. Rakariisa paruware pachena zvapo. Harina kudira ropa iroro pasi kuitira kuti rifushirwe zvaro nevhu. 
Ezekiel24:8 Ndakaisa ropa rarakadeura racho paruware pachena zvapo kuitira kuti rirege kufushirwa kuitira kuti hasha dzangu dzigomuka ndigotsividza.” 
Ezekiel24:9 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Zvichariwana guta rokudeura ropa. Ndichaita kuti pave nezirimi romoto." 
Ezekiel24:10 Unganidzai matanda mubatidze moto mubike zvakanaka nyama mukune muto wayo murege mapfupa atsve. 
Ezekiel24:11 Gadzai poto yacho pamazimbe omoto isina chinhu mukati kuitira kuti ipise, mhangura yayo itsvuke kuitira kuti tsvina yayo yainayo inyongodeke; ngura yayo iroromeswe." 
Ezekiel24:12 Chandakanetera hapana apa, ngura yacho yakanyanyisa haibve nomoto." 
Ezekiel24:13 Ngura yacho kushaya hunhu hwako nokuti ndingadai ndakatokuchenura asi hauna kuzochenurwa kuuipi hwako. Hausi kuzochenurwa kusvikira hasha dzangu pauri dzapera. 
Ezekiel24:14 Ndini Tenzi ndataura! Zvichatoitika ndichazviita! Handisi kuzodzokera shure! Handisi kuzonzwira tsitsi! Handisi kuzodzora mwoyo. Uchatongwa zvinofambiranawo nokuita kwako uye nezviito zvako.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel24:15 Izwi raTenzi rakauyawo kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel24:16 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, chinzwaka, ini ndava kukutorera iye paswerameso wako chaiye kamwe kamwe nedenda. Asi iwewe haufaniri kuungudza kana kuhwihwidza kunyange kusvimha misodzi." 
Ezekiel24:17 Tura befu zvisinganzwiki usacheme vakafa. Monerera nguwani yako upfeke shangu dzako mumakumbo. Usafukidze miromo kana kudya chokudya chaparufu.” 
Ezekiel24:18 Saizvozvo ndakataurira vanhu kumangwanani, kumanheru mudzimai wangu achibva afa. Mangwana acho mangwanani ndakaita sezvandakanga ndaudzwa." 
Ezekiel24:19 Ipapo vanhu vakati kwandiri, “Hamutiudzewo here kuti zvamuri kuita izvi zvinorevei kwatiri?”" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ini ndakati kwavari," 
Ezekiel24:21 “Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati iti kumba yaIsiraeri zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chinzwai, ndichan'oresa Nzvimbo yangu Inoera, iyo yacho yamunoinzva nayo, iyo paswerameso yenyu iyoyo, pane mwoyo wenyu chaipo. Vanakomana navanasikana venyu vamakasiya vachafa nebakatwa rehondo." 
Ezekiel24:22 Muchaitawo sezvandaita. Hamuchazofukidza miromo yenyu kana kudya chokudya chaparufu. 
Ezekiel24:23 Muchange makapfeka nguwani dzenyu mumusoro, shangu dziri mumakumbo. Hamufaniri kuchema vakafa kana kuhwihwidza. Asi muchangoperezeka muuipi hwenyu muchigomera." 
Ezekiel24:24 Saizvozvi Ezekieri achava chiratidzo kwamuri. Zvaanenge aita ndizvo zvamuchaitawo. Kana izvi zvoitika muchabva maziva kuti ndini Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel24:25 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, musi wandichavatorera musimboti wavo, chinovapa rufaro nembiri chacho, paswera meso pavo pane mwoyo wavo chaipo; uyewo vana vavo vakomana navasikana," 
Ezekiel24:26 musi iwoyo munhu anenge apunyuka achauya kwaari kuzokutaurira shoko racho. 
Ezekiel24:27 Musi iwoyo muromo wako uchazaruka kumunhu iyeyo anenge apunyuka, ugotaura, zvokuva chimumumu zvichibva zvapera. Saizvozvo uchave chiratidzo kwavari vagoziva kuti ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel25:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel25:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu chinangana nevaAmoni uporofite wakanangana navo. 
Ezekiel25:3 Iti kuvaAmoni, inzwai shoko raTenzi Mwari. Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari imi zvamakati tsvatu waro kuNzvimbo yangu Inoera payakan'oreswa uye kunyika yeIsiraeri payakaitwa renje zvaro uye nokumba yokwaJudha payakaenda kuutapwa" 
Ezekiel25:4 naizvozvo ndava kukuisai mumaoko mavanhu vokumabvazuva kuti muve vanhu vavo. Vachaita mataga avo pakati penyu vachitoita misha yavo pakati penyu. Vachadya muchero wenyu vachinwa mukaka wenyu. 
Ezekiel25:5 Guta reRabha ndichariita mafuro engamera maguta avaAmoni achiva danga rezvipfuwo. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi 
Ezekiel25:6 nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari imi zvamakabva marova-rovanisa maoko muchitamba-tambisa makumbo muchifaririra kwazvo nomwoyo woutsinye wokuvenga nyika yeIsiraeri 
Ezekiel25:7 naizvozvo chinzwai, ini ndakusumudziraiwo shamu muruoko rwangu. Ndichakuisai mumaoko edzimwe ndudzi sezvinhu zvakapambwa. Ndichakutsakatisai pakati pamarudzi ndichiita kuti murove mudzinyika. Ndichakuparadzai; ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pamusana pokuti Moabhu yakati, ‘Inga vanhu vokwaJudha vakangofanana ava navamamwe marudzi ose wani.’" 
Ezekiel25:9 Naizvozvo ndichaita kuti rimwe divi reMoabhu rizaruke, divi rokumaguta okumuganho wayo, anopa mbiri kunyika iyoyo: anoti Bhetijeshimoti neBhaarimeoni neKiriatiaimu." 
Ezekiel25:10 Ndichaiisa pamwechete nevaAmoni mumaoko mavanhu vokumabvazuva kuti ive yavo kuitira kuti irege kuzomboyeukwazve mukati memarudzi avanhu.
