Ezekiel25:11 Ndichaita zvandatongera Moabhu ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel25:12 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pamusana pokuti Edhomu yakatsividza imba yokwaJudha yakaita utsinye chaihwo payakanga ichivatsividza." 
Ezekiel25:13 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari ndichasimudzira Edhomu shamhu muruoko rwangu ndichitsakatisa mairi munhu pamwechete nemhuka. Ndichaita kuti isare yava renje zvaro kubvira kwaTemani kusvikirawo kuDhedhani, vachafa nebakatwa." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndichatsividza Edhomu ndichishandisa vanhu veIsiraeri. Ivo vanofanira kuzoita kuEdhomu zvinoenderana nehasha dzangu zvichiwirirana nokutsamwa kwangu. Ipapo vachaziva kutsividza kwangu.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel25:15 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “VaFirisitia zvavakatsividza vachitsiva nomwoyo woutsinye hwokuparadza nedaka risingaperi," 
Ezekiel25:16 naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chirega uone ndichasumudzira vaFirisitia shamhu muruoko rwangu ndichirakatisa vanhu veKireti ndichiparadza kumwe kwose kwemahombekombe egungwa. 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndichavatsividza zvakakura kwazvo nokuranga chaiko kune hasha. Ipapo ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi kana ndavatsividza kudaro.” 
Ezekiel26:1 Mugore regumi nechiposhi, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi iwoyo, izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti:" 
Ezekiel26:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, guta reTire zvarakati nezveJerusaremu, ‘Hero Suo Guru revechirudzi rapazika, razarukireni regai ndichizvigutsa hangu sezvo raparadzwa kudai,’" 
Ezekiel26:3 naizvozvo Tenzi Mwari ati chinzwa iye zvino ndanangana newe Tire. Ndichakuunzira marudzi akawanda kuzorwisana newe segungwa ramutsa mafungu aro. 
Ezekiel26:4 Vachaparadza tsvingo dzeTire vachiriga pasi nharirire dzaro. Ndichaparadza kubvisa ivhu raro mariri ndichiita kuti rive ruware zvarwo. 
Ezekiel26:5 Tire richava mukati chaimo megungwa richiva nzvimbo zvayo yokuyanikira usvasvi. Ndinodaro nokuti ndini ndataura ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. Uye richava sechinhu chokupamba kumarudzi. 
Ezekiel26:6 “Vanasikana varo vari panyika huru vacharakatika kuurayiwa nebakatwa ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel26:7 “Zvavepo ndezvokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chinzwa, ndichaita kuti Tire ivingwe nomumwe wokuchamhembe, Nebhukadhireza, mambo weBhabhironi, ndimambo wamadzimambo, iyeyo aina mabhiza nengoro dzehondo navarwi vamabhiza nehondo yavarwi vazhinji." 
Ezekiel26:8 “Iye achauraya nebakatwa vanasikana vako vari munyika yomukati. Achakuisira rusvingo rwokukurwisa narwo agokuvakirira nevhu chinenge musana wenzou kurusvingo agokusumudzira denga zvaro renhoo. 
Ezekiel26:9 Achanangisa kwauri iwe kuriridza kwezvombo zvake zvehondo zvinenge hondohwe zvokudhugumurisa tsvingo dzako iwe. Namatemo ake achapaza nharirire dzako. 
Ezekiel26:10 Mabhiza ake achange akawanda zvokuti huruva yawo ichakuputira. Tsvingo dzako dzichazunguzika pamusana poruzha rwavamabhiza nengorowo zvadzo nengoro dzehondo dzamabhiza, paachapinda pamisuo mikuru yenyu somunhu anopinda muguta rapazwa rusvingo." 
Ezekiel26:11 Nematsiko amabhiza ake achatsokodzera migwagwa yenyu yose achauraya vanhu vako nebakatwa Misimboti yako yakasimba iyoyo ichati pasi gwajata. 
Ezekiel26:12 Vachapamba upfumi hwako. Vachakubvutira zvamunoshava nazvo upfumi vachapaza tsvingo dzako vachiwondomorera pasi mizinda yenyu yedzimba, matombo ako nemiti yako zvichanzi mukati memvura bvuva bvuva." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndichagumisa mimhanzi wenziyo dzako kurira kwezvipendani zvako hakuchazombonzwikazve. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ndichakuita kuti uve ruware rusina chinhu. Uchava nzvimbo zvayo yokuyanikira mimbure hauchazombofa wakavakwazve nokuti ndini Tenzi ndataura.” Ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel26:15 Tenzi Mwari ari kutaura akanangana neTire kuti nyika dzomumahombekombe megungwa hadzisi kuzondengendeka here nokuriridza kwokuputsika kwako, pachauraiwa vanenge vakuvadzwa mukati mako marakatiswa kuuraya vanhu?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Ipapo machinda okugungwa ose achabva pazvigaro zvawo zvouchangamire vagokatanura majasi avo vagobvisa magemenzi avo akarukirirwa. Vachaputirwa nokudedera, vachagara pasi vachiramba vachingodedera vadumbirwa nezvako." 
Ezekiel26:17 Vachakuimbira ngondo vachikuti: “Kubva watonyangarika kudai mumakungwa iwe guta rembiri, waimbova nesimba guru nezvokugungwa iwe navagari vako waivhundutsa nyika dzose dzomukati." 
Ezekiel26:18 Zvino zvitsuwa zvodedera pazuva rokuputsika kwako. Heeka, zvitsuwa zviri kugungwa zvakangaidzika nomupfuuriro wako.”" 
Ezekiel26:19 Chikonzero ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pandichakuita kuti usare wava renje zvaro reguta samaguta asina ageremo pandichakuti ndondondo muhwenje hwegungwa, mvura zhinji igokuti fuse fuse." 
Ezekiel26:20 Naizvozvo ndichakukanda pasi pamwechete navanoenda mugomba; kuvanhu vakare. Ndichati ugare munzvimbo yapasi pasi penyika, munzvimbo yamatongo akare-kare pamwechete navanodzika mugomba zvokuti hapana achaita musha mauri kana kuwanawo nenzvimbo mukati menyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel26:21 Ndichakusvitsa pamugumo unosiririsa, pako panenge pakuperera, vanhu vachakutsvaka zvako asi hauzowanikwazve.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel27:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel27:2 “Zvino iwe mwanakomana womunhu, ungudza pamusoro peTire" 
Ezekiel27:3 uti kuTire, guta rigere pokupinda napo mugungwa, mushambadzi wezvoupfumi kumarudzi mazhinji enyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa iri zvanzi naTenzi Mwari: “Iwe Tire wakazviti, ndiri tsvarakadenga parunako." 
Ezekiel27:4 Miganhu yako iri pakatikati pegungwa vavaki vako vakaita kuti uve tsvarakadenga parunako. 
Ezekiel27:5 Mapuranga ako ose vakaaita nomusaipurasi wokuSiniri. Vakatora musidhari weRebhanoni kuti vakuitire musimboti wengarava. 
Ezekiel27:6 Mioku yokuBhashani ndoyavakakugadzirira nayo zvokukwasvisa mutumbi wako wengarava vakauita nemipaini yokumahombekombe kweSaipurasi wakanamirirwa nomunyanga wenzou mukati. 
Ezekiel27:7 Rineni yakanyatsorukirirwa yokuIjipiti ndoraiva jira rako rokufambisa ngarava richiita somureza wako. Jira roruvara rwedenga noruvara rwohute rokumahombekombe eErisha ndoraiva denga rayo. 
Ezekiel27:8 Vagari vokuSidhoni nokuArivhadhi ndovaiva vanhu vako vokukwasva nyanzvi dzavarume vaiva mauri ndivo vaifambisa ngarava. 
Ezekiel27:9 Vakuru vakuru vokuguta reGebhari nenyanzvi dzavarume dzeko dzaiva mauri ndichadzinama mumupendero yako. Ngarava dzose dzegungwa navashandi vemo vaiva mauri vachiita mhindu dzokutengeserana. 
Ezekiel27:10 “Pezhia neRudhi nePuti vaivawo muhondo yako savarwi vehondo vachiturika mauri nhoo nenguwani dzesimbi vachikupa mukurumbira. 
Ezekiel27:11 Varume vokuArivhadhi nehondo yako yavarwi vaiva patsvingo dzako kukutenderera uye varume vokuGamadhi vaiva munharirire dzako. Vaiturikawo nhoo dzavo patsvingo dzako kukutenderera vachinyatsoita kuti uve norunako chairwo. 
Ezekiel27:12 “Tarishishi yaifambidzana newe pamusana poupfumi hwako hwakanyanya hwemhando nemhando hunoti sirivha nesimbi noutare hwerata nomutobvu zvavaitsinhana newe nezvako. 
Ezekiel27:13 Javhani neTubhari neMesheki dzaitengeseranawo newe. Vaitsinhana newe uchivapa midziyo yendarira ivo vachipa varanda. 
Ezekiel27:14 Bhetitogarima yaitengeserana newe ichikupa mabhiza, namabhiza ehondo namanyurusi iwe uchivapa zvinhu zvawainge wagadzira." 
Ezekiel27:15 Vanhu veRodhesi vaitengeserana newe. Nyika zhinji dzokumahombekombe dzaitenga kwauri dzichikubhadhara nyanga denzou nomuti weebhoni. 
Ezekiel27:16 Edhomu yaitengeserana newe pamusana pezvinhu zvako zvakawanda. Vaiita mutengano webveni newe, iwe uchivapa zvinhu zvakanaka zvawainge wagadzira ivowo vachikupa matombo anokosha eemeradhi nomushonga woruvara rwohute, namachira akarukirirwa nerineni yakanakisisa nekorari namatombo anokosha eageti." 
Ezekiel27:17 Judha nenyika yeIsiraeri vaitengeserana newe vachiita mutengano webveni newe wokukupa koroni namaorivhi namaonde okutanga nouchi namafuta eorivhi netwokuzora tunonhuwirira twebharimu. 
Ezekiel27:18 Dhamasikusi yaitengeserana newe pamusana pezvinhu zvako zvakawanda nokuda kwoupfumi hwako hwakawanda hworudzi norudzi newaini yokuHeribhoni newuru chena. 
Ezekiel27:19 Dhani neJavhani kubva kuUzari zvichienda mberi vaikuwanisa simbi netunonhuwira twekasia nekaramusi iwe uchivapa zvinhu zvako. 
Ezekiel27:20 Dhedhani yaitengeserana newe machira ezvityaro akutasvisa. 
Ezekiel27:21 Arabhia namadzishe ose eKedhari vaitengeserana newe hwayana, nehondohwe nembudzi." 
Ezekiel27:22 Vashambadzi vokuShebha nokuRaama vaitengeseranawo newe vachiita mutengano webveni newe vachikupa tunonhuwirira twakanakisisa twose twose, iwe uchivapa zvawainge wagadzira, namatombo ose anokosha nendarama." 
Ezekiel27:23 Harani neKane neEdheni, neAshuru neKirimadhi vaitengeserana newe." 
Ezekiel27:24 Ivava vaitengeserana newe hanzu dzakanakisisa, nehanzu dzoruvara rwedenga, namakapeti ana mavara-mavara akarukwa nemikosi netambo dzakakoswa zvakanaka. Izvozvi ndizvo zvavaitengeserana newe." 
Ezekiel27:25 Ngarava dzokuTashishi dzaikutakurira zvinhu zvako zvokutengesa. “Saka wakanga wakati shutu kuzara wakaremerwa kwazvo kutakura mukatikati mawo makungwa. 
Ezekiel27:26 Vakwasvi vako vakaenda newe kumakungwa ana mafungu Mhepo yokumabvazuva yakakuparadza mukatikati memakungwa. 
Ezekiel27:27 Upfumi hwako nezvinhu zvawakagadzira nezvinhu zvoko zvokutengesa, vanhu vako vanoshanda mungarava navanhu vako vanofambisa ngarava namakapenda ako navatengesi vako vezvinhu navarwi vako vose vari mauri navamwe vose vari mauri vanonyura mukati memakungwa pazuva rako rokuparara." 
Ezekiel27:28 “Nyika inodedera pakunzwa mhere inobva kuvafambisi vengarava. 
Ezekiel27:29 Ipapo vakwasvi vose vachatiza ngarava dzavo. Vashandi vomungarava navafambisi vose vengarava vachandomira pamahombekombe egungwa. 
Ezekiel27:30 Vacharidza mhere vachikuchema zvinosiririsa vachizvidira ivhu mumusoro vachiumburuka mudota. 
Ezekiel27:31 “Vanozviveura muparavara vachiitira iwe, vanopfeka masaga vachikuchema nemwoyo wakasuruvara vachiungudza zvinorwadza mwoyo." 
Ezekiel27:32 Mukuridza kwavo mhere kudaro vachaungudza pamusoro pako vachikuchema vachiti: ‘Ndiani chaizvo akamboitwa hweTire akaparadzwa seTire pakati paro gungwa kudaro? 
Ezekiel27:33 Zvinhu zvawainge wagadzira pazvaitutunurwa zvichibva kumakungwa waigutsa marudzi mazhinji, noupfumi hwako hwakanyanya uye neshavo huru youpfumi wakapfumisa madzimambo apanyika." 
Ezekiel27:34 Zvino waparadzwa iwe namakungwa muhwenje yemvura yegungwa; shavo yako youpfumi navashandi vako vose vomungarava vanyura pamwechete newe. 
Ezekiel27:35 Vagari vose venyika dzomumahombekombe megungwa vadumbirwa nezvako uye madzimambo avo vabayikana nokutya, uso hwavo hwadonha." 
Ezekiel27:36 Vemhindu dzokutengeserana mukati mevemarudzi umu vava kukuridzira tsamwa magumo ako ashata hauchazovipo narini wose.’ ” 
Ezekiel28:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel28:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu iti kujinda reTire, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari: “Pamusana pokuti une mwoyo wokuzvikudza, uchizviti ndiri mwari; ndinogara pachigaro chavamwari; pakati chaipo pamakungwa asi iwe uri munhu zvako asiri Mwari kunyange zvazvo uchifunga kuti uri mungwaru saMwari." 
Ezekiel28:3 Ichokwadi kuti wakangwaraka iwe kupinda Dhanieri hakuna chakavandika kwauri," 
Ezekiel28:4 noungwaru hwako nokunzwisisa kwako wakazviwaniraka upfumi iwe ukazviunganidzira ndarama nesirivha munzvimbo dzako dzaunochengetera upfumi iwe; 
Ezekiel28:5 nouchenjeri hwako hwakadzama mumhindu dzokutengeserana ukawedzera upfumi hwako ukava nomwoyo wokuzvikudza mukupfuma kwako ikoko," 
Ezekiel28:6 nezvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Iwe zvaunozviti mumwoyo mako uri mungwaru saMwari," 
Ezekiel28:7 naizvozvo chirega uone, ndichakuunzira vatorwa pauri, vanhu vakaipa mwoyo pamarudzi ose. Vachaburitsira bakatwa ravo voparadza runako rwoungwaru hwako uye vagosvibisa iyo mbiri yako." 
Ezekiel28:8 Vachakukanda mugomba, uchafa rufu rwokupondwa mukatikati memakungwa.’" 
Ezekiel28:9 “Uchazoramboti ndiri mwari here pamberi pavanokuuraya, iwe uri munhu zvako usiri Mwari izvozvo uri mumaoko mavanokukuvadza?" 
Ezekiel28:10 Uchafa rufu rwavasina kudzingiswa uchifira mumaoko mavatorwa nokuti ndini ndataura.” Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel28:11 Izwi raTenzi rakauyazve kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel28:12 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu ungudza uchichema mambo weTire uti kwaari, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari: “Iwe waiva mucherechedzo wokukwana uzere noungwaru norunako rwakakwana." 
Ezekiel28:13 Mawakanga ugere muEdheni, mumunda waMwari, ibwe rose rakakosha riri chishongo chako pachiti mabwe erubhi neekaneriani netopazi nejasipa needhaimhondi nebheriri neonikisi neesafaya neketekoizi neemeradhi; tumasefa twako twokugadzikira twakanga twakaitwa nendarama nezvimwe zvako zvawakaveza. Pazuva rawakasikwa zvakanga zvatogadzirirwa." 
Ezekiel28:14 Ndakakuisapo hangu nekeribhu rokukuchengetedza ukava pamusoro pegomo rinoera raTenzi. Pakati pemabwe omoto ndipo pawaifamba napo. 
Ezekiel28:15 Wakanga usina chinongo mukuita kwako kubvira panguva yawakasikwa kudzamarara pakuzowanikwa uipi mauri. 
Ezekiel28:16 Mukuwanda kwemhindu dzako dzokutengeserana wakazara utsinye ukazoita chitadzo. Ipapo ndakakukanda pasi sechinhu chakan'ora zvacho kubva pagomo raMwari. Ipapo kerubhu rokuchengetedza rakazokudzinga pakati pamabwe omoto. 
Ezekiel28:17 Wakava nomwoyo wokuzvikudza pamusana porunako rwako; wakaodza ungwaru hwako uchifuririka nomukurumbira wako. Ndakakunda pasi ndikakuisa pachena zvapo panotoonekwawo namamwe madzimambo kuti vakutarise zvavo. 
Ezekiel28:18 Nokunyanyawo kwakanga kwaita kuipa kwako mukushaya kwako nduramo pamhindu dzako dzokutengeserana wakan'oresa Nzvimbo dzako Dzinoera. Naizvozvo ndakatungidza moto mukati mako ukakuroromesa ndikakuita madota zvawo ari pasi mumaziso mevose vaikuona. 
Ezekiel28:19 Vose zvavo vanokuziva mukati memarudzi avanhu, vakadumbirwa nezvako wasvika pamugumo wakaipa uye hauchazovipo narini wose.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel28:21 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu chinangana neSidhoni uporofite wakanangana neguta iroro uchiti: 
Ezekiel28:22 “Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Chinzwa, ndanangana newe iwe Sidhoni. Ndichaonesa mbiri yangu mukati mako imomo. Ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi pandicharitemera chirango charo ndicharatidza kuera kwangu mariri." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ndinodaro nokuti ndichatumira denda kwariri nokudeuka kweropa mumigwagwa yaro. Vanenge vaurayiwa vachati rakata mukati maro nebakatwa rinenge rorirwisa kumativi ose zvawo. Ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi.’ 
Ezekiel28:24 “Zvino kana zviri zvemba yaIsiraeri hakuzombovizve norukato runobaya kana munzwa unovakuvadza pakati pavavakagarisana navo vaimbovashora. Ipapo ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi Mwari.” 
Ezekiel28:25 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pandichakokorodza veimba yaIsiraeri mukati memarudzi mavakapararira ndichiratidza kuera kwangu mavari mumaziso mendudzi idzodzo, vachazogara munyika yavo yandakapa kuna Jakobho muranda wangu." 
Ezekiel28:26 Ivo vachagara pasina chinovawana mairi; vachavaka dzimba vachisima minda yamagirepisi. Vachagara zvavo pasina chinovawana pandicharanga vavakagarisana navo vose ivo vaya vakambovashora. Ipapo ndipo pavachazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi Mwari wavo.” 
Ezekiel29:1 Mugore regumi mumwedzi wegumi pamusi wegumi nechipiri wemwedzi iwoyo izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel29:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu chinangana naFarao mambo weIjipiti uporofite wakanangana naye unanganewo neIjipiti yose. 
Ezekiel29:3 Taura uti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari: “Chinzwai ndanangana newe, iwe Farao mambo weIjipiti iwe garanyanya zvaro guru rigere pakati potukova twaro rinotozviti, ‘Rwizi rwangu rweNairi nderwangu ini pano! Ndini inini ndakarwugadzira! Ndichakuti koche koche shaya dzako nezvirauro." 
Ezekiel29:4 Ndichakuisa zvikochekero mushaya dzako ndigoita kuti hove dzomutukova twako dziti name name mumakwande mako imomo. Ndichakuraura kukuburitsa mukati motukova twako pamwechete nehove dzose dzomutukova twako dzacho dzinenge dzakuti namata mumakwande mako. 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndichakukanda mugwenga iwe nehove dzose dzomutukova twako idzodzo, muchati katakata musango zvamo pasina zvokuunganidzwa muchivigwa. Ndatokuitai nyama yezvikara zvesango neyeshiri dzedenga.’" 
Ezekiel29:6 “Ipapo vagari vose venyika yeIjipiti ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi nokuti vanga vari mudonzvo worutsanga waivimbwa nawo nemba yaIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel29:7 Pavakakubata muruoko wakabva watyoka ukabvarura mapfudzi avo ose. Pavakazendama newe, wakabva watyoka ukaita kuti vatyoke musana." 
Ezekiel29:8 Naizvozvo Tenzi Mwari ati chinzwa, ndichaunza bakatwa pauri rigotsakatisa mauri vanhu pamwechete nomhuka" 
Ezekiel29:9 nyika yeIjipiti igova renje zvaro risina chinhu. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi. “Zvaunoti rwizi rweNairi ndorwangu, uye ndini ndakarwuita," 
Ezekiel29:10 naizvozvo chirega uone, ndanangana newe, ndananganawo notukova twako. Ndichaita kuti nyika yeIjipiti ive nyika pasina, ive renje zvaro kubvira kuMigidhori zvichikwira kudzamara kuAswani zvichaenda kusvikira pamuganhu weItiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Hakuna munhu achatsika nomo norutsoka rwake kana tsiko haro remhuka richidimuradimura nomo. Ichagara kwamakore makumi mana isina munhu. 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndichaita kuti nyika yeIjipiti ive renje mukati medzimwe nyika uye maguta ayo achiva matongo mukati memamwe maguta akava matongo kwamakore makumi mana. Ndichaparadzira vaIjipiti mukati memarudzi ndichivati mwarara nedzinyika. 
Ezekiel29:13 “Nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, mushure memakore makumi mana acho, ndichakokorodza vaIjipiti kubva kuvanhu kwavanenge vambopararira." 
Ezekiel29:14 Uye ndichadzosera Ijipiti makomborero ayo, ndigovadzosera kudunhu rePatirosi, dunhu ravo kwavakabva. Ikoko vachava noumambo zvawo husina mukurumbira." 
Ezekiel29:15 Ichava humambo hwokupedzesera chaihwo pane humwe hwose, haizombofa yava pamusoro pamamwe marudzi. Ndichaininipisa zvokuti haichazombotonga zvakare kana mamwe marudzi." 
Ezekiel29:16 Haizombofazve yakava iyo inovimbwa nayo neIsiraeri asi kutoti kudzokera kwairi kunenge kwatova chiyeuchidzo chokuipa kwavo. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi Mwari.” 
Ezekiel29:17 Mugore ramakumi maviri nechinomwe, mumwedzi wokutanga pamusi wechiposhi wemwedzi iwoyo, izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel29:18 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, Nebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi akaita kuti hondo yake irwise Tire zvakaomarara, vanhu vose vakasvuuka musoro, mapfudzi avo akasvauka asi iye nehondo yake havana chavakawana pakurwisa kwavo ikoko." 
Ezekiel29:19 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Chinzwai, ndava kupa nyika yeIjipiti kuna Nebhukadhireza, mambo weBhabhironi; achatakura upfumi hwayo; achaitora nokuipamba. Ndiwo uchava muripo wamasoja avo iwoyo." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndamupa nyika yeIjipiti somuripo wake waakashandira nokuti vakandishandira.’ Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel29:21 “Pazuva iroro ndichaita kuti imba yaIsiraeri ive nesimba uye ndichaita kuti uzaruke muromo pakati pavo. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel30:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel30:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu porofita uti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari: “Daidzira uchiti, ‘Hero zuva riya" 
Ezekiel30:3 nokuti zuva racho rava kusvika. Zuva raTenzi rave pedyo, richange riri zuva rakati gude gude namakuti, nguva yokuparara kwamarudzi avanhu." 
Ezekiel30:4 Bakatwa richaparadza Ijipiti, Itiopia ichawirwa nenhamo, vanenge vaurayiwa muIjipiti vachiti rakata; upfumi hwayo huchaendwa nahwo, ugaro hwayo huchiputswa.’" 
Ezekiel30:5 “Itiopia nePuti neRudhi neArabhia yose neRibhia navanhu venyika dzine chirangano chokubatana vachanziwo nebakatwa pamwechete navo kata kata.” 
Ezekiel30:6 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Vanotsigira Ijipiti vachaputsika kuzvikudza kwayo nesimba kuchaderera kubvira kuMigidhori kusvikira kuAswani vachati nebakatwa rakata mukati mayo. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel30:7 “Vachasara vava renje rokupedzesera mukati medzimwe nyika dzakava renje uye maguta avo achiva maguta zvawo okupedzesera pakati pamamwe akaparadzwa 
Ezekiel30:8 ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ndini Tenzi kana ndapisa Ijipiti nomoto vatsigiri vayo vose vakaparadzwa. 
Ezekiel30:9 “Pazuva iroro nhumwa dzichabva kwandiri nengarava dzichindotyisidzira vanhu veItiopia vakavarairwa zvavo. Nhamo ichavawira zuva iroro rokuparara kweIjipiti nokuti hero rouya.” 
Ezekiel30:10 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari; “Ndichaita kuti mhomho dzeIjipiti padzo padziperere mumaoko maNebhukadhireza mambo weBhabhironi. 
Ezekiel30:11 Iye pamwechete navarwi vake vanachazezesa vacho kumarudzi avanhu vachaunzwamo kuzoparadza nyika iyoyo. Vachaburitsira Ijipiti mapakatwa avo vagozadza nyika yacho navanhu vanenge vaurayiwa. 
Ezekiel30:12 Ipapo ndichaomesa rwizi rweNairi, nyika yacho ndoitengesa mumaoko avanhu vakaipa. Ndichaita kuti nyika iyoyo iparadzwe navatorwa pamwechete nezvinhu zvose zvirimo ini Tenzi ndini ndataura.”" 
Ezekiel30:13 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Ndichaparadza zvifananidzo zvokunamata ndichigumisa zvifananidzo zvokunamata zviri muguta reMemufisi. Munyika yeIjipiti hamuchafa makaita jinda remo nezvo ndichaisa kutya munyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel30:14 Dunhu rePatirosi ndichariita renje zvaro ndichibva ndabatidza moto kuZoani uye ndichagadza dare guta reTebhesi ndichiranga guta iroro. 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndichavirukira guta rePerusiumu nehasha nhare yeIjipiti ndichirakatisa kuuraya gurusvusvu racho reTebhesi. 
Ezekiel30:16 Ijipiti ndichaitungidza nomoto Perusiumu icharwadziwa zvikuru. Tebhesi ichakoromorwa rusvingo rwayo rugopazwa. 
Ezekiel30:17 Majaya okuOni nokuPibheseti vacharakatiswa nebakatwa vanhukadzi vachaenda kuutapwa. 
Ezekiel30:18 KuTehafunehesi kuchasviba masikati machena pandichaparadzako umambo hweIjipiti uye kuzvitutumadza kwaro nesimba kuchapera rigonzi kwidiba negore. Vanasikana varo vachaenda kuutapwa. 
Ezekiel30:19 Ndizvo zvandichaita kuIjipiti pandichaigadza dare. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Mugore regumi nechiposhi, mumwedzi wokutanga pazuva rechinomwe remwedzi iwoyo, izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel30:21 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu ndaparadza simba roruoko rweIjipiti. Asi tarisa uone hakuna arisunga kuti ripore nokurisunga nebhandeji kuitira kuti risimbe zvokugona kuvheesa bakatwa. 
Ezekiel30:22 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chiona ndanangana naFarao mambo weIjipiti. Ndichatyora maoko ake ose ari maviri, rwakasimba nerwakambotyoka rwuya. Uye ndichamukandisa pasi bakatwa riri muruoko rwake." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndichaita kuti vaIjipiti vapararire nomumarudzi avanhu ndichivati mwarara nedzinyika. 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndichasimbaradza maoko amambo weBhabhironi ndiise bakatwa rangu mumaoko make. Asi ndichatyora maoko aFarao, agombe ari mberi kwake somunhu akuvara zvokufa chaizvo." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ndichasimbaradza maoko amambo weBhabhironi asi Farao achati maoko regwede. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi. Pandinenge ndaisa bakatwa rangu mumaoko amambo weBhabhironi, acharisimudzira nyika yeIjipiti." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndichaparadza vaIjipiti mukati memarudzi ndichivamwararisa nomudzinyika. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel31:1 Mugore regumi nechiposhi mumwedzi wechitatu pazuva rokutanga romwedzi iwoyu, izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Ezekiel31:2 “Mwanakomana womunhu iti kuna Farao mambo weIjipiti nokuhuzhinji hwenyika yeIjipiti: “Ndiani waungafananidzwe naye chaizvo paukuru hwako? 
Ezekiel31:3 SeAsiriaka! Yakanga yakaita somuti womusidhari wokuRebhanoni namapazi anoyevedza mumvuri wesango, wakareba zvikuru kwazvo zvokuti dzu-u kumira mukati megwindingwi chairo resango." 
Ezekiel31:4 Mvura zhinji yakauwanisa zvokudya, mvura yapasi pevhu yakaukudza, tukova twaierera kutenderera pawakanga umire pose pachiita makoronga kumiti yose yesango." 
Ezekiel31:5 Naizvozvo iwo wakachiti dzu-u kureba pamusoro pemiti yose yesango. Mapazi awo akava makuru, matavi awo akareba pamusana pemvura zhinji." 
Ezekiel31:6 Shiri dzose dzedenga dzakaita matendere adzo mumapazi awo, mhuka dzose dzakaberekera vana vadzo pasi pamapazi awo, marudzi ose avanhu makuru akaita musha wawo mumumvuri wawo." 
Ezekiel31:7 Kukura kwawakanga wakaita kwaiyevedza, nomureberowo wakanga wakaita mapazi awo nokuti midzi yawo yaienda kumvura yakawanda." 
Ezekiel31:8 Pamisidhari yaiva mumunda waMwari hapana waiupfuura kureba, kunyange musaipurasi zvawo waimboenzana nawo mapazi awo. Pamapazi, muti iwoyo mupureni hahwaimbopasvika. Hapana muti mumunda waMwari waienzana nawo parunako." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndakaita kuti uve unoyevedza nezanzwe rokuwanda kwamapazi awo miti yose yomuEdheni, yaiva mumunda waMwari yakauitira shanje." 
Ezekiel31:10 “Naizvozvo, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Pamusana pokuti wakarebaka iwe kuita nhungamakore chaiyo mukati megwindingwi resango ukava nomwoyo wokuzvikudza nourefu hwako ihwohwo," 
Ezekiel31:11 naizvozvo ini ndichakuisa mumaoko momumwe ana masimba pakati pamarudzi avanhu, achaita kwauri zvakakodzerana nokuipa kwako. Ndakakurasa ini." 
Ezekiel31:12 Vatorwa, vanhu vorudzi rwakaipisa kwazvo vacharitemera pasi vagorisiya rakadaro. Matavi awo achawira pamakomo nomumapani ese. Uye mapazi awo akatyoka achati kata kata pasi munoyerera nemvura munyika iyoyo. Vanhu vose vapasi pano vachabva mumumvuri mawo vachiusiya." 
Ezekiel31:13 Pamatongo pawo ndipo pachagara shiri dzose dzedenga uye pamapazi pawo paine mhuka dzose dzesango. 
Ezekiel31:14 Zvose izvozvi, kuri kuitira kuti kurege kuva nomuti unokura pedyo nemvura zvokuti unoreba kuti dzu-u mugwindingwi resango, uye kuti parege kuva nomuti unonwa mvura zvokureba saivo nokuti chavo chavatemerwa kufa nokuenda pasi pasi penyika pakati pavanhu pamwechete navanodzika kugomba.’ ”" 
Ezekiel31:15 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pauchadzika kunzvimbo yavashakabvu, ndichaita kuti uchemwe ndichamisa nzizi dzawo uye mvura zhinji ichamiswa. Ndichapfekedza Rebhanoni nhamo yokuuchema, miti yese yesango ichanava pamusana pawo." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ndichaita kuti marudzi adedere nokuriridza kwokuwa kwawo, pandichaukanda pakadzika munzvimbo yavachakabvu pamwechete navanodzika kugomba. Izvozvo miti yose yomuEdheni inoyevedza yakanakisisa yeRebhanoni yose zvayo inonwa mvura ichanyaradzwa pasi pasi penyika ipapo." 
Ezekiel31:17 Naiyowo ichadzika kunzvimbo yavachakabvu nawo kune vakaurayiwa nebakatwa, vayawo vakaita misha mumumvuri mawo pakati pamarudzi avanhu vachaparara." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Pakati pemiti yomuEdheni, ndianiwo zvake akaita sewe pambiri noukuru? Zvakadaro zvazvo uchadzikiswa pamwechete nemimwe miti Edheni kunzvimbo yapasi pasi. Uchavata mukati mavasina kudzingiswa pamwechete navakauraiwa namapakatwa. Ndizvo zvichamuwana Farao izvi negurusvusvu rake ravanhu.” Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel32:1 Mugore regumi nechipiri, mumwedzi wegumi nechipiri, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel32:2 “Iwe munhu ungudza pamusoro paFarao mambo weIjipiti uti kwaari, “Unozviti uri shumbaka iwe pakati pamarudzi avanhu. Asi chauri chaicho uri garanyanya romumakungwa. Unoti pindikiti munzizi dzako uchibvongodza mvura namakumbo ako, nzizi dzacho dzichiva bvondwe." 
Ezekiel32:3 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Ndichakukanda mambure avanhu vakawanda ivo vachakukwevai mumambure angu okukukudza," 
Ezekiel32:4 ndichakutii pasi yacha, ndichakukandai pachena zvapo. Ndichaita kuti shiri dzose dzedenga dzimhare pamusoro pako; zvikara zvapasi pose zvizvimbirwe nokudya iwe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Nyama yako ndichaiti katakata pamakomo ndigozadza mapani nezvitunha zvako. 
Ezekiel32:6 Ndichati nyika neropa rako rinoerera kopokopo kusvika kunyange kumakomo, makoronga achazara neropa rako." 
Ezekiel32:7 Pandinenge ndakutsakatisa ndichakwidibira denga ndichisvibisa nyenyedzi; zuva ndicharikwidibira negore. Mwedzi unenge usisape chiedza. 
Ezekiel32:8 Zviedza zvose zvedenga ndichazviti ndo-o pauri ndigoisa rima panyika yako.’ Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel32:9 “Ndichadzongodza mwoyo yavanhu vakawanda. Pandinokuendesa kuhutapwa mukati mevechirudzi kunyika dzausingazivi. 
Ezekiel32:10 Ndichaita kuti vanhu vazhinji vadumbirwe nezvako; madzimambo avo achadedera pamusana pako. Kana ndovheyesa bakatwa rangu kwavari vachangwenda nguva dzose mumwe nomumwe achityira upenyu hwake musi wazvichakuperera.” 
Ezekiel32:11 Nokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Bakatwa ramambo weBhabhironi richakuvinga." 
Ezekiel32:12 Ndichaita kuti vazhinji venyu vafe nebakatwa ravanesimba vose, vari vanhu vanotyisa kwazvo mukati memarudzi. “Vachapedza kuzvikudza kweIjipiti, vose zvavo nokuwanda kwavo vachaparara." 
Ezekiel32:13 Mhuka dzavo dzose ndichadziparadza panyasi pemvura zhinji. Hapana rutsoka rwomunhu ruchaibvongodzazve kana matsiko emhuka dzavo dzichaibvundura. 
Ezekiel32:14 Ipapo ndichachenesa mvura yavo, nzizi dzavo ndichidziita kuti dzierere samafuta. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel32:15 Kana ndaita nyika yeIjipiti renje; zvose zvizere mairi zvabviswa, vose vagari vomo ndavauraya, ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi." 
Ezekiel32:16 “Urwu ruchava rumbo rwokuungudza ruchaimbwa navakadzi vamarudzi vachiimbira Ijipiti negurusvusvu ravanhu vayo.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Ezekiel32:17 Mugore regumi nechipiri, mumwedzi wokutanga pazuva regumi nerechishanu romwedzi izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel32:18 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu ungudza kuchema gurusvusvu ravanhu veIjipiti uvaendese pasi pasi, iyo navanhukadzi vamarudzi makuru makuru kunyika yapasi pasi kuna vakadzika kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:19 “Ndiani chaizvo waunokunda parunako iwe, chidzika undoradzikwa pamwechete navasina kudzingiswa." 
Ezekiel32:20 “Vachafa mukati mavanouraiwa nebakatwa; Ijipiti pamwechete negurusvusvu rayo ravanhu. 
Ezekiel32:21 Munzvimbo yavachakabvu imomo, vakuru vakuru vokuhondo vachataura nezveIjipiti navatsigiri vayo vachiti, ‘Vazoburukawo, varere navasina kudzingiswa uye navanhu vakaurayiwa nebakatwa rehondo.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Asiria irikowo negungano rayo rose, yakakomberedzwa namakuva avo, vose zvavo vakauraiwa vakarakatiswa nebakatwa rehondo." 
Ezekiel32:23 Vana makuva akaitwa kwokupedzesera chaiko kwegomba uye gungano rayo rakatokomberedza makuva ayo. Vose vakafa vakaurayiwa nehondo yebakatwa iyo yaimbozezesa vanhu nokutya munyika yavapenyu. 
Ezekiel32:24 “Eramu irikowo negungano rayo rose rakakomba guva rayo, vose zvavo vakauraiwa vakarakatiswa nebakatwa rehondo vanyakudzika pasi pasi penyika vasina kudzingiswa, iyo yaimbozezesa vanhu nokutya munyika yavapenyu, vachipindwa nokunyara pamwechete navanoburukira kugomba." 
Ezekiel32:25 Vakamupa uriri mukati mavakaurayiwa nehondo yebakatwa pamwechete negurusvusvu rayo rose ravanhu; makuva ayo akaikomberedza. Vose vasina kudzingiswa vakaurayiwa nehondo yebakatwa nokuti yaimbozezesa vanhu nokutya munyika yavapenyu. Vachanyara pamwechete navanhu vanoenda kugomba vaiswawo mukati mavakaurayiwa. 
Ezekiel32:26 “Mesheki naTubhari dzirikowo negurumwandirawo radzo rose, makuva avo akadzikomberedza, vose vasina kudzingiswa vakaurayiwa nehondo yebakatwa nokuti vaimbozezesa vanhu nokutya munyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel32:27 Asi havana kuradzikwa pamwechete namagamba apasichigare vakadzika kunzvimbo yavachakabvu vaine zvombo zvavo zvehondo. Vakanga vakatsamira kumusoro mapakatwa avo, nhoo dzavo dziri pamapfupa avo nokuti kutya magamba avanhu kwakanga kwava munyika yavapenyu." 
Ezekiel32:28 Asi iwe uchapwanyiwa uchizovata pakati pavasina kudzingiswa pamwechete navakauraiwa nehondo yebakatwa. 
Ezekiel32:29 “Edhomu iriko namadzimambo namachinda ayo ose, vakaradzikwa pamwechete navasina kudzingiswa naavo vanodzika mugomba kunyange vaive nesimba, vakaradzikwa pamwechete navakauraiwa nebakatwa rehondo." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Machinda okuchamhembe variko vose nevekuSidhoni vakadzika pamwechete vachinyara navakauraiwa pamusana pokutyisidzira kwavakaita nokuda kwesimba ravo. Vakaradzikwa vasina kudzingiswa vari pamwechete navakauraiwa nebakatwa rehondo. Vakanyara pamwechete navanhu vanoenda kugomba. 
Ezekiel32:31 “Kana Farao avaona zvichamunyaradza pamusoro pegurusvusvu rose ravanhu vake, iye Farao navarwi vake vose vakafa nebakatwa rehondo. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi Mwari," 
Ezekiel32:32 nokuti akambozezesa vanhu nokutya munyika yavapenyu, naizvozvo acharadzikwa mukati mavanhu vasina kudzingiswa, pamwechete navakauraiwa nehondo yebakatwa, iye Farao negurusvusvu rake ravanhu.” Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel33:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel33:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, taurira vanhu vokwako uti kwavari, ‘Ini ndikauisa hondo yebakatwa munyika, ivo vanhu vakatora munhu pakati pavo vakamuita nharirire." 
Ezekiel33:3 Kana iye akaona hondo yebakatwa ichiuya munyika, akaridza hwamanda achiyambira vanhu," 
Ezekiel33:4 munhu anenge anzwa kurira kwehwamanda akarega kuzvichenjererawo zvake, hondo yebakatwa ikamutora, munhu iyeyo rufu rwake nderwokuzviparira." 
Ezekiel33:5 Akanzwa kurira kwehwamanda asi haana kuzvichenjerera; rufu rwake nderwokuzviparira. Dai akazvichenjerera angadai akazviponesa upenyu. 
Ezekiel33:6 Asi kana nharirire ikaona bakatwa richiuya, munhu iyeyo akarega kuridza hwamanda, zvokuti vanhu vanosara vasina kuyambirwa, hondo yebakatwa iya youya yotora mumwe wavo. Munhu iyeyo akatorwa muhuipi hwake; ini mhosva yake ndichaiisa panharirire iyoyo.’" 
Ezekiel33:7 “Saizvozvo iwe mwanakomana womunhu, ndakuita nharirire yemba yokwaIsiraeri. Ukangonzwa shoko pamuromo pangu unofanira kupa vanhu yambiro inobva kwandiri." 
Ezekiel33:8 Kana ndikati kumutadzi iwe muipi uchafa chete, iwe worega kutaurira akaipa kuti apinduke pauipi hwake, muipi iyeyo achafa muuipi hwake asi mhosva yorufu rwake ndichaiisa pauri." 
Ezekiel33:9 Asi ukayambira akaipa kuti apinduke pauipi hwake asi iye worega zvake kupinduka panzira yake, achafira muuipi hwake asi iwe unenge wazviponesa upenyu." 
Ezekiel33:10 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu taurira imba yokwaIsiraeri kuti, ‘Imi makati kukanganisa kwedu nezvitadzo zvedu zviri patiri, takagara nazvo. Torarama sei?’" 
Ezekiel33:11 Vataurire kuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, hezvino ndakadai, handifarire rufu rwomutadzi asi kuti mutadzi apinduke panzira yake ararame. Tendeukai, tendheukai panzira dzenyu dzakaipa, ko munodirei kufa, nhaimi vemba yaIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel33:12 Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, taurira vanhu vokwako kuti, ururami hwomunhu mururami haugoni kumuponesa kana akapara chitadzo. Kutadza kwomutadzi hakusiriko kunomuputsira pasi kana akapinduka kuuipi hwake. Mururami haagoni kurarama noururami hwake kana atadza." 
Ezekiel33:13 Kunyange ndikati kumunhu wakarurama achararama, zvino iye wovimba noururami hwake wondotadza zvake, hapana zvakarurama zvaakaita zvinozomborangarirwa. Achafa muuipi hwaanenge aita." 
Ezekiel33:14 Uyewo kunyange ndikati kumunhu akaipa unofanira kutofa asi iye opinduka kuchivi chake oita zviri pamutemo zvakarurama," 
Ezekiel33:15 ngatitii muipi anodzorera rubatso, achidzorerawo zvaanenge apamba, achitevedzawo mutemo wehunhu asingaiti chitadzo anofanira kuti atorarama, haafaniri kufa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Hapana chitadzo chake chicharangarirwa kana kuchipirwa mhosva. Anenge aita zviri pamutemo uye zvakarurama. Anofanira kurarama. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Asi vanhu vokwako vanoti nzira dzaTenzi hadzina kururama, nzira dzavo dziri idzo dzisina kururama." 
Ezekiel33:18 Kana mururami akapinduka paururami hwake oita zvakaipa, achafa pamusana paizvozvo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Kana mutadzi akapindukawo pakuipa kwake, akaita zviri pamutemo nezvakarurama, anofanira kurarama pamusana paizvozvo." 
Ezekiel33:20 Asi imi munoti, ‘Nzira dzaTenzi hadzina kururama.’ Imi imba yaIsiraeri, ini ndichatonga mumwe nomumwe wenyu maererano nezviito zvake.”" 
Ezekiel33:21 Mugore regumi nechipiiri rokunge vanhu taendeswa kuutapwa, mumwedzi wegumi pazuva rechishanu racho romwedzi, mumwe murume akanga apunyuka kuJerusaremu akauya kwandiri akati, “Guta rakurirwa.”" 
Ezekiel33:22 Simba roruoko rwaTenzi rakanga riri pandiri mauro acho munhu uya akatiza hondo asati asvika. Panguva yaakazosvika Mwari akanga atozarura muromo wangu mangwanani. Saizvozvo muromo wangu wakazaruka, ndakanga ndisisiri chimumu." 
Ezekiel33:23 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel33:24 “Iwe Mwanakoamana womunhu, vagari venzvimbo idzi dzave matongo munyika yeIsiraeri vanoramba vachiti, ‘Abhurahamu aingova munhu mumwechete asi nyika iyi yaiva yake. Asi isu takatowanda, saka nyika yakapiwa kwatiri kuti ive yedu.’" 
Ezekiel33:25 Naizvozvo iti kwavari, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari munodyaka imi nyama ineropa muchanamata zvifananidzo zvokunamata, muchiuraya vanhu, ndimi mungaite kuti nyika ive yenyu here?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Munovimbaka namapakatwa imi, muchiita zvinosemesa mumwe nomumwe wenyu achin'oresa mukadzi womumwe. Ndimi mungati nyika ive yenyu here?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Vataurire kuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, hezvino ndakadai, ivo vari mumatongo ivavo vachauraiwa nehondo yebakatwa. Vanenge vari musango ndichavapa kuzvikara vadyiwe nezvikara. Vanenge vari munhare kana mumapako vachafa nedenda." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ndichaita kuti nyika ive renje risina chinhu, kuzvikudza kwavo nesimba zvipere. Makomo eIsiraeri achava renje zvokuti hapana anozopfuura nomo." 
Ezekiel33:29 Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi, pandinenge ndaita kuti nyika iyoyi ive renje risina chinhu pamusana pezvose zvandisingadi zvavakaita." 
Ezekiel33:30 “Asi kana zviri zvako, iwe mwanakomana womunhu, zvavanhu vanokunyeya pamadziro edzimba napamisuo yedzimba vachitaurirana mumwe nomumwe vachiti douya unzwe shoko riri kubva kuna Tenzi," 
Ezekiel33:31 izvozvi vachauya kwauri sokuuya kunongoita vanhu, vogara mberi kwako savanhu vangu, vachiteerera zvauri kutaura asi havambozviita. Zviripo ndezvokuti vanoratidza rudo rukuru zvepamuromo chete asi mwoyo wavo uri pane zvavangawane chete." 
Ezekiel33:32 Tarisa uone, iwe wakaita somunhu anoimba dzimbo dzorudo nezwi rakanakisa uchiridza chaunoridza. Nokuti vanonzwa zvaunotaura asi havazviiti." 
Ezekiel33:33 Kana izvozvi zvaitika—kuitika zvichatoitika—ipapo ndipo pavachaziva kuti muporofita akanga ari pakati pavo.” 
Ezekiel34:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel34:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu porofita wakanangana navafudzi veIsiraeri, porofita uti kwavari, kuvafudzi ivava uti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Nhaimi vafudzi veIsiraeri, imi munozvifudza zvenyu. Vafudzi havafaniri kufudza hwai here?’" 
Ezekiel34:3 Munodyaka imi mafuta muchizvipfekedza zvenyu newuru, muchiuraya zvenyu hwayana dzakakodzwa asi kufudza hwai musingafudzi." 
Ezekiel34:4 Dzakarukutika hamuna kudzisimbisa, dzinorwara hamuna kudzirapa, dzakatyoka makumbo hamuna kudzisunga kasekete, dzinotetereka hamuna kudzidzora, dzakarasika hamuna kudzitsvaga. Uye makadzitonga nechisimba nehasha." 
Ezekiel34:5 Naizvozvo dzangopararira zvadzo pamusana pokuti pakanga pasina mufudzi dzikava zvadzo chokudya chezvikara zvose zvesango. 
Ezekiel34:6 Hwai dzangu dzakapararira, dzakateterekera mumakomo mose nomuzvikomo zvose zvirefu. Hwai dzakapararira nenyika yose dzisina anodzironda kana kudzitsvaka." 
Ezekiel34:7 “Naizvozvo imi vafudzi chinzwai shoko raTenzi. 
Ezekiel34:8 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, hezvino ndakadai, pamusana pokuti hwai dzangu dzakava zvadzo nyama, hwai dzangu dzakava chokudya chezvikara zvose zvesango pamusana pokuti pakanga pasina mufudzi uye pamusana pokuti vafudzi vangu havana kutsvaka hwai dzangu asi vafudzi vakatozvifudza ivo pachavo asi hwai dzangu havana kudzifudza," 
Ezekiel34:9 naizvozvo imi vafudzi chinzwai shoko raTenzi; 
Ezekiel34:10 zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ‘Chionai ndanangana navafudzi. Wandichabvunza wacho ndivo vafudzi. Ndichavamisa kufudza hwai dzacho zvokuzvifudza ivo vafudzi zvichapera. Ndichanunura hwai dzangu pamiromo yavo kuitira kuti dzirege kuva chokudya chavo.’" 
Ezekiel34:11 “Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chionai, ini iyeni pachangu ndini ndicharonda hwai dzangu ndidzitsvake." 
Ezekiel34:12 Sezvinongoita mufudzi anotsvaka hwai dzake kana dzimwe dzapararira ndizvozvo zvandichaita kutsvaka hwai dzangu. Ndichadzinunura munzvimbo madzakapararira, pamusi wamakuti nerima rakati kwirindindi." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndichadziburitsa mukati memarudzi ndichidzikokorodza mudzinyika uye ndichadziunza munyika yadzo. Ndichadzifudzira mumakomo eIsiraeri nomuzvitubu zvemvura nomunogara vanhu mose zvamo munyika iyoyi. 
Ezekiel34:14 Ndichadzifudzira pamafuro akanaka uye napamusoro pamakomo marefu eIsiraeri pachange pari pamafuro adzo. Imomo dzicharara mumafuro akanaka, dzichifura mumafuro chaiwo manyoro mumakomo eIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ini ndini ndichafudza hwai dzangu, ndini ndichadzirarisa pasi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel34:16 Dzinenge dzarasika ndichidzitsvaka ndichadzora dzinenge dzatetereka, dzinenge dzakuvara ndichidzisunga kasekete, dzinenge dzarukutika ndichidzisimbaradza. Asi dzakakora nedzakasimba ndichadzitarisa ndichidzifudza noruenzaniso." 
Ezekiel34:17 “Kana zviri zvenyu imi danga rangu, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chinzwai, ini ndichatonga pakati pehwai nehwai napakati pehondohwe nezvikotora." 
Ezekiel34:18 Hazvikwane here kwamuri kuti mufure mumafuro akanaka zvamunobva matsokodzera zvenyu mafuro mamwe ose netsoka dzenyu? Hazvikwane here kwamuri kuti mumwe mvura yakachena, zvamunobva mabvongodza imwe yose namakumbo enyu?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Hwai dzangu dzinofanira kudya zvamunenge matsokodzera netsoka dzenyu nhai, dzichinwa mvura yamunenge mabvongodza henyu namakumbo enyu?" 
Ezekiel34:20 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari kwavari, chinzwai, ini iyeni ndichatonga pakati pehwai yakakora nehwai yakaonda." 
Ezekiel34:21 Imi zvamunosairira norutivi nebendekete muchibaya ndonda dzose nenyanga dzenyu kusvikira dzachiti mwarara kunze," 
Ezekiel34:22 ndichanunura danga rangu hadzizovizve nyama yamagora, ndichatonga pakati pehwai nehwai." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ndichadziisira mufudzi mumwechete. Achadzifudza, iye muranda wangu Dhavhidhi. Iyeyo ndiye achava mufudzi wadzo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ini Tenzi ndini ndichava Mwari wavo, muranda wangu Dhavhidhi ariwo jinda pakati pavo. Ini Tenzi ndini ndazvireva." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndichaitirana navo chitenderano chorugare ndigobvisa munyika zvikara zvesango kuitira kuti dzigozogara hadzo murenje pasina chinodziwana dzichirara zvadzo mumasango. 
Ezekiel34:26 “Ndichaita kuti idzo nenharaunda yapachikomo changu zvive chikomborero. Ndichatumira mvura inonaya nomwaka wayo. Mvura yacho inonaya ichava chikomborero. 
Ezekiel34:27 Izvozvo miti yomusango ichabereka michero yayo, nyika ichaberekawo michero yayo, vachagara pasina chinovawana. Vachaziva zvavo kuti ndini Tenzi pandichatyora zvikei zvejoko ravo ndichivanunura mumaoko mavanhu vanovaita varanda." 
Ezekiel34:28 Havachazovizve nyama yemagora kumarudzi avanhu kana kuparadzwa nemhuka dzomunyikamo. Vachagara havo pasina chinovawana pasinawo chinovatyisa. 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndichavaita kuti vave nenzvimbo yokurima ine mukurumbira zvokuti havazombopararizve neshangwa yenzara munyika imomo kana kuzonyarazve nokusveeredzwa namarudzi. 
Ezekiel34:30 Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ini Tenzi, Mwari wavo ndinavo uye kuti ivo vemba yaIsiraeri, vanhu vangu. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel34:31 Imimi ndimi hwai dzangu, hwai dzomumafuro angu. Iniwo ndini Mwari wenyu” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel35:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel35:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, zvino chinangana neGomo reSeiri uriporofite uchiti kwariri:" 
Ezekiel35:3 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chiona, ini ndanangana newe iwe Gomo reSeiri. Ndichakusumudzira shamhu ndichikuita kuti uve renje zvaro risina chinhu." 
Ezekiel35:4 Ndichaita kuti maguta ako asare ava matongo uve renje zvaro ugozoziva kuti ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel35:5 Iwe zvawakava nedaka risingaperi mumwoyo ukaurayisa vanhu veIsiraeri nehondo yebakatwa panguva yokutambudzika kwavo, panguva yokurangwa kwavo kwokupedzisira." 
Ezekiel35:6 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chenyu chavapo iropa, hezvino ndakadai, ropa richakupfukirai nokuti imi mune mhosva yokudeura ropa, nezvo ropa richakupfukirai." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndichaita kuti kugomo reSeiri kuve renje risina chinhu, ndichadzivisa vose vachapfuura nemo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Mumakomo ayo ndichamuzadza nezvitunha zvayo uye muzvikomo zvako nomumapani ako uye mumakoronga ako vakauraiwa nehondo yebakatwa vachati imomo ririri. 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndichakuita renje rinogara rakadaro, magutawo ako haachazogarwa navanhu. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi." 
Ezekiel35:10 “Pamusana pokuti unotika iwe, marudzi avanhu maviri aya nenyika mbiri idzi zvichava zvangu uye tichazviita kuti zvive zvedu, kunyange zvazvo Tenzi aivamo," 
Ezekiel35:11 naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, hezvino ndakadai, ndichaita kwauri zvinoenderanawo nehasha neshanje zvawakaratidzawo kwavari uye ndichazvizivisa kwamuri pandinenge ndava kukutongai pamusana poruvengo rwamunarwo kwavari." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ndipo pauchaziva kuti ini Tenzi ndakanzwa zvose zvokushora kwawakaita makomo eIsiraeri uchiti aitwa renje zvaro, aiswa mumaoko medu kuti tiaparadze." 
Ezekiel35:13 Iwewe wakatozvitutumadzawo kwandiri nomuromo wako ukaita pamuromo kwazvo kwandiri. Ndakazvinzwa. 
Ezekiel35:14 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, kuitira kuti pasi pano pose papembere kufara ndichakuita renje." 
Ezekiel35:15 Sokufarira kuitwa renje kwakaita nhaka yemba yeIsiraeri, ndozvandichaitawo kwauri uchava renje iwe Gomo reSeiri neEdhomu yose, yose zvayo. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu porofita wakanangana namakomo eIsiraeri uti, imi makomo eIsiraeri inzwai shoko raTenzi," 
Ezekiel36:2 zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, pamusana pokuti muvengi akati nezvako, ‘Hekanhi waro, nzvimbo dzapasichigare dzakatunhumara dzavawo dzedu.’" 
Ezekiel36:3 Saka chiporofita uchiti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, pamusana pokuti, hongu, pamusana pokuti vakaita kuti uve renje vakakupwanya kumativi ose zvokuti makave mumaoko amamwe marudzi ose ukava pamiromo yavanhu vachikureva," 
Ezekiel36:4 naizvozvo imi makomo eIsiraeri chinzwai shoko raTenzi Mwari. Zvanzi naTenzi kumakomo nokuzvikomo nokumakoronga nokumapani uye kumarenje asina chinhu nokumatongo amaguta ava nyama zvayo yamagora nechiseko zvacho kumamwe marudzi avanhu vomunharaunda. 
Ezekiel36:5 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari ndiri kutaura izvi ndiine shanje chaiyo kumamwe marudzi nokuEdhomu yose vakazvipa nyika yangu kuti ive yavo vachitopembera kufara nomwoyo wose vachishora zvakanyanya kuti vaiite yavo vaipambe. 
Ezekiel36:6 “Naizvozvo chiporofita wakanangana nenyika yeIsiraeri uti kumakomo nokuzvikomo nokumakoronga nokumapani Tenzi Mwari ari kuti, chinzwai ndiri kutaura ndiine shanje nehasha nokuti makanyara nokushorwa namarudzi." 
Ezekiel36:7 Saka zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, ndinosimudza ruoko rwangu ndichipika kuti marudzi ose ari munharaunda menyu ndivo vachanyara." 
Ezekiel36:8 Asi imi makomo eIsiraeri, mapazi enyu achatungira mugoberekera vanhu vangu veIsiraeri muchero wenyu nokuti vachadzokera kumusha iye zvinouno" 
Ezekiel36:9 nokuti, chionai, ini ndiri kudivi kwenyu uye ndichakucheukai, mucharimwa mugodyarwa." 
Ezekiel36:10 Ndichaitawo kuti mauri vanhu vatekeshere, imba yose yaIsiraeri, yose zvayo. Maguta achagarwa navanhu nenzvimbo dzerenje dzichavakwa misha." 
Ezekiel36:11 Uye ndichaita kuti vanhu nemhuka zvitekeshere mamuri zviberekane zviwande. Ndichakonzera kuti vanhu vagare mamuri sapakutanga uye ndichakuitirai zvakanaka zvakawanda kupinda kare. Ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel36:12 Ndichaita kuti vanhu vafambe pamuri, ivo vangu vaIsiraeri, ivo vachakuita nyika yavo, iwe uchava nhaka yavo. Hauzoita kuti vafirwe navana zvakare." 
Ezekiel36:13 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari pamusana pokuti vanhu vanoti kwamuri anodya vanhu uye kuti unokonzera kuti rudzi rwavanhu vako vafirwe navana. 
Ezekiel36:14 Ipapo zvokudya vanhu hauchazviitazve kana zvokukonzera kuti rudzi rwavanhu vako vafirwe navanazve, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel36:15 Handichakurega uchinzwa zvokushorwa namarudzi uye hauchazonyadziswa navanhu. Hauzokonzera rudzi rwako kuti rwugumburwe.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Ezekiel36:16 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel36:17 “mwanakomana womunhu imba yokwaIsiraeri payaigara munyika mayo yakain'oresa nenzira dzavo nezviito zvavo. Kwandiri, maitiro avo akanga akaita sokun'ora kwomukadzi anenge achitevera" 
Ezekiel36:18 saizvozvo ndakavavirukira nehasha pamusana peropa ravakadeura munyika, uye pamusana pezvifananidzo zvokunamata zvavakain'oresa nazvo." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ndakavamwararisa mukati memarudzi vakabva vatiwo mwarara mukati medzinyika. Ndakavaranga zvakaenzanirana namaitiro avo. 
Ezekiel36:20 Pavakaenda mumarudzi, kwose kwose kwavakasvika vakan'oresa zita rangu rinoera paizonzi navanhu ndivoka ava vanhu vaTenzi asi vakabuda munyika make imomo." 
Ezekiel36:21 Asi ini ndakaita hanya nezita rangu rinoera rakan'oreswa nemba yaIsiraeri mukati memarudzi kwavakaenda. 
Ezekiel36:22 “Naizvozvo taurira imba yaIsiraeri kuti zvanzi naTenzi Mwari zvandavakuita handisi kuitira imi vemba yaIsiraeri asi pamusana pezita rangu rinoera ramakan'oresa mukati memarudzi kwamakaenda. 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndicharatidza kuyera kwezita rangu guru rakan'oreswa mukati memarudzi, ramakan'oresa iyemi mukati mavo. Marudzi achaziva kuti ndini Tenzi, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. Ipapo ndinenge ndazviita nemamuri ndichiratidza kuyera kwangu ivo vachiona." 
Ezekiel36:24 Chiripo ndechichi chokuti ini ndichakubvisai mumarudzi ndigokukokorodzai kubva munyika dzose ndigokuuisai kunyika yenyu. 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndichakusasai mvura yakachena muchibva machenurwa kun'ora kwenyu kwose. Ndichakuchenurai kuzvifananidzo zvenyu zvokunamata. 
Ezekiel36:26 Ndichakupai mwoyo mutsva ndigoisa mamuri mweya mutsva. Ndichabvisawo mamuri mwoyo wedombo ndichikupai mwoyo wenyama. 
Ezekiel36:27 Ndichaisa mweya wangu mamuri, ndigoita kuti mutevere mirawo yangu nokuchengeta zvirewo zvangu." 
Ezekiel36:28 Muchagara munyika yandakapa kumadzibaba enyu, muchava vanhu vangu ini ndichava Mwari wenyu." 
Ezekiel36:29 “Ndichakununurai kune zvose zvinokun'oresai, ndichati kuuye mbeswa, dziwande uye handizokupai nzara." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndichaita kuti michero yemiti nezvirimwa zvomumunda zviwande kuitira kuti murege kuzonyara pakati pamarudzi nenhamo yenzara. 
Ezekiel36:31 Ndipo pamuchayeuka maitiro enyu akaipa nezviito zvenyu zvisina kunaka. Muchazvisema pamusana pouipi hwenyu nezviito zvenyu zvinosemesa. 
Ezekiel36:32 Zvandinenge ndichiita ndinenge ndisingaitire imi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. Zvizivei izvozvo. Nyaraiwo, munyarewo nezviito zvenyu imi vemba yaIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel36:33 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pazuva randichakuchenurai kuuipi hwenyu hwose ndichaita kuti maguta agarwe navanhu. Matongo achavakwazve." 
Ezekiel36:34 Nyika yerenje icharimwa panze pokuva renje kwayaive sokuonekwa kwayaiitwa navapfuuri. 
Ezekiel36:35 Vachati nyika yaive renje yaita sebindu reEdheni. Maguta akanga aparadzwa akasiiwa ava matongo asina chirimo ava kugarwa navanhu uye atova norusvingo. 
Ezekiel36:36 Ipapo marudzi anenge asara munharaunda yenyu achaziva kuti ini Tenzi ndini ndakavakazve maguta iwayo ndikarima maive renje. Ndini Tenzi ndazvitaura uye ndichazviita.” 
Ezekiel36:37 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Izvozvi izvi ndichati vemba yaIsiraeri vandikumbire kuti ndiwanziridze vanhu sedanga rezvipfuwo." 
Ezekiel36:38 Sezvinongoita matanga ezvipfuwo zvechibayiro, samatanga ezvipfuwo muJerusaremu pamazuva makuru akatemwa. Ndizvo zvichaita maguta aiva matongo kuzara navanhu. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Ruoko rwaTenzi rwakava pandiri. Akandiburitsa nesimba raMweya waTenzi akandondiisa mubani, rakanga rizere namapfupa." 
Ezekiel37:2 Akandifambisa mukati mawo kutenderera, wonei akanga ari hungwandagwanda kuwanda mubani imomo uye akanga akati papata kwazvo kuoma." 
Ezekiel37:3 “Akanditi nhai mwanakomana womunhu mapfupa aya angava mapenyu here?” Ini ndakati, “Imi Tenzi Mwari ndimi munoziva.”" 
Ezekiel37:4 Akanditizve porofita kumapfupa iwaya uti kwaari, “Imi mapfupa akaoma inzwai shoko raTenzi." 
Ezekiel37:5 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari kumapfupa aya, chinzwai, ndichapinza mweya mamuri mugorarama." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndichaisa marunda pamuri, ndichaitawo kuti nyama ive pamuri ndikuputirei neganda ndigokufemerai mweya mamuri muchiva vapenyu. Muchabva maziva kuti ndini Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Saizvozvo ndakaporofita sokuudzwa kwandakanga ndaitwa. Pandaiporofita kudaro pakaita ruzha, pakave nokukwacharika. Mapfupa achienda kundobatana pamwechete, pfupa richienda pane rimwe pfupa raro." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ndakati tarisei onei ave namarunda uye ava nenyama, aputirwa neganda. Asi akanga asina mweya." 
Ezekiel37:9 Akazonditi porofita kumweya, mwanakomana womunhu, porofita uti kumweya, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Iwe mweya uya uchibva kumativi mana ufemere pane vakauraiwa ava kuti vave vapenyu.”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Saizvozvo ndakaporofita, sokuudzwa kwandanga ndaitwa, mweya ukapinda mavari vakava vapenyu, vakamira namakumbo avo ikava hondo huru huru yavanhu." 
Ezekiel37:11 Zvino akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu mapfupa iwaya ndiyo imba yose yaIsiraeri; onaka kuti vanoti mapfupa edu aoma chitarisiro chedu chapera uye taparara isu." 
Ezekiel37:12 Naizvozvo porofita uti kwavari, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chinzwai, imi vanhu vangu, ndavakuzozarura makuva enyu ndikumutsei mumakuva enyu, ndikuunzei kumusha kwenyu kunyika yeIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel37:13 Ndipo pamuchaziva, imi vanhu vangu, kuti ndini Tenzi pandichazarura makuva enyu ndichikumutsai mumakuva enyu." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ndichaisa mweya wangu mamuri muchiva vapenyu. Ndichakuisai munyika menyu, ndipo pamuchaziva kuti ndini Tenzi ndataura uye ndini ndazviita.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Ezekiel37:15 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel37:16 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu tora tsvimbo unyore pairi kuti: “VokwaJudha navanhu vokwaIsiraeri vavanofambidzana navo. “Wozotorawo imwe tsvimbo unyorewo pachiri kuti: “VokwaJosefi, (tsvimbo yekwaEfuremu) navose vemba yokwaIsiraeri vavanofambidzana navo." 
Ezekiel37:17 “Unodzibatanidza pamwechete kuita tsvimbo imwechete kuti dzive chinhu chimwechete muruoko rwako. 
Ezekiel37:18 Vanhu vako kana vazokuti hamungatitaurirewo zvamunoreva nezvizvi," 
Ezekiel37:19 uti kwavari, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chinzwai, ndava kuda kutora tsvimbo yokwaJosefi iri muruoko rwevokwaEfuremu mumadzinza okwaIsiraeri vanofambidzana naye. Ndichaibatanidza netsvimbo yevokwaJudha kudziita tsvimbo imwechete kuitira kuti dzive chinhu chimwechete muruoko rwangu." 
Ezekiel37:20 Tsvimbo dzauchanyora padziri padzinenge dziri muruoko rwako ivo vakatarisa nameso avo ipapo iti kwavari," 
Ezekiel37:21 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chinzwai ndichatora vanhu veIsiraeri pakati pamarudzi kwavakaenda ndivakokorodze kumativi ose ndichivauyisa kunyika kwavo chaiko." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ndichavaita kuti vave rudzi rumwechete munyika iyoyo mumakomo eIsiraeri uye vose zvavo vachatongwa namambo mumwechete. Havachazovezve marudzi maviri uyewo kana kuzombove noumambo huviri hwakaparadzana. 
Ezekiel37:23 Havazombozvin'oresazve nezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata nezvinhu zvavo zvinosemesa kana nekai zvako kezvikanganiso zvavo. Asi kutoti ini ndichavanunura mune zvokudzokera shure mavakadai kupara chitadzo. Ndichavachenurawo ivo vagova vanhu vangu. Ini ndichava Mwari wavo. 
Ezekiel37:24 “Muranda wangu Dhavhidhi achange ari mambo wokuvatonga uye vose vachava nomufudzi mumwechete. Vachatevedza mirao yangu vachiteerera mitemo yangu. 
Ezekiel37:25 Vachagara havo munyika iyoyo yandakapa kumuranda wangu Jakobho ikagarwawo namadzibaba enyu. Ivo navana vavo navana vavana vavo, vachagara imomo narini wose uyu muranda wangu Dhavhidhi ndiye achava ishe wavo narini wose." 
Ezekiel37:26 “Ndichaitirana navo chitenderano chorugare chichava chitenderano chokugara nokugara. Ndichavakomborera ndigoita kuti vawande uye ndichaisa Nzvimbo yangu Inoera pakati pavo narini wose. 
Ezekiel37:27 Ndichaita musha wangu mukati mavo uye ndichava Mwari wavo, ivo vachavawo vanhu vangu." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ndipo pachazoziva vemarudzi kuti ini Tenzi ndini ndinoeresa Isiraeri, Nzvimbo yangu Inoera painenge iri pakati pavo narini wose.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Izwi raTenzi rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Ezekiel38:2 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu chitarisana naGogu wokunyika yokwaMagogu, iye muchinda mukuru wokuMesheki nokuTubhari uporofite kwaari uchiti," 
Ezekiel38:3 zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, chinzwa, ndanangana newe, iyewe Gogu muchinda mukuru wokuMesheki nokuTubhari." 
Ezekiel38:4 Ndichakupishinutsa ndikuise zvirauro mushaya dzako. Ndichakuunza nehondo yako yose, namabhiza navatasvi vacho vose zvavo vakapakata zvombo zvehondo zvinenge zviri gurumwandira guru ravanhu vose vaine nhoo huru nediki vachivhevhetesa mapakatwa," 
Ezekiel38:5 vePezhia neItiopia neRibhiya vanavowo vose vane nhoo neheremendi 
Ezekiel38:6 uye Gomera nemhomho dzake dzese neBhetitogarima vekwokupedzesera chaiko kuchamhembe nemhomhowo dzake dzose, gurusvusvu chairo raunenge unaro." 
Ezekiel38:7 Gadzirira ugare wakagadzirira iwe nehondo yevarwi yawakaunganidzana nayo, iyewe uve ndiwe wokuvachengetedza." 
Ezekiel38:8 Mushure memazuva mazhinji uchataurirwa zvaunofanira kuti uite, mushure memakore achauya uchandorwisa nyika inenge yambozororawo hondo, nyika yavanhu vanenge vakokorodzwa kubva kumarudzi akawanda mumakomo eIsiraeri yainge yava renje rokugara rakadaro. Vanhu vayo vakakokorodzwa kubva kumarudzi, pari zvino votogarawo zvavo vasina chinovawana vose zvavo." 
Ezekiel38:9 Uchauya uchisvika sedutu remhepo uchinge guti raputira nyika, iwewe nemhomho dzako uine gurusvusvu ravanhu.”" 
Ezekiel38:10 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Nezuva iroro uchapindwa nepfungwa mumwoyo mako ugoronga mano akaipa." 
Ezekiel38:11 Uchati regai ndiende kundorwisa nyika ine misha iri pachena zvapo ndichingoyerekana ndasvikira vanhu vakazvigarira havo vose vagere vasina rusvingo kana zvihuri kunyange misuo mikuru 
Ezekiel38:12 kundopamba zvinhu nokutakura zvinhu zvokupamba nokurwisa matongo ava kugara vanhu navanhu vaya vakakokorodzwa kubva kunamamwe marudzi avanhu vane mombe nezvinhu, vagere pakatikati penyika." 
Ezekiel38:13 VeShebha neDhedhani navanhu vemhindu dzokutengeserana vokuTashishi nemisha yayo vachati kwauri, ‘Mauya here kuzopamba zvinhu? Maunganidzira hondo yenyu kuzotakura zvinhu zvokupamba, kutakura sirivha nendarama nokuzotora zvipfuwo nezvinhu nokuzopamba zvinhu zvakawanda here?’" 
Ezekiel38:14 “Naizvozvo, chinzwa, iwe mwanakomana womunhu chiporofita uti kuna Gogu zvanzi naTenzi Mwari. ‘Pazuva iroro vanhu vangu veIsiraeri, pavanenge vakazvigarira zvavo, uchasimuka" 
Ezekiel38:15 wobuda mumana rako, kubva kwokupedzesera chaiko kuchamhembe, iyewe navanhu vazhinji vaunenge unavo, vose zvavo vachange vakatasva mabhiza vari gurusvusvu guru ravanhu, hondo huru." 
Ezekiel38:16 Uchauya kuzorwisa vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri segore raputira nyika iyoyi. Mumazuva achauya ndichakuunza kuzorwisa nyika yangu kuitira kuti marudzi vandizive pandichaonesa kuera kwangu nemairi iwe Gogu ivo vachiona nameso avo.’ 
Ezekiel38:17 “Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari handiti ndiwe here wandaireva kubvira pasichigare nomuromo wavaranda vangu vaporofita veIsiraeri vakaporofita mumazuva iwayo kwamakore kuti ndichakuunza kuzovarwisa.” 
Ezekiel38:18 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pazuva iroro richauya Gogu kuzorwisa nyika yeIsiraeri, ndichaviruka nehasha." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ndizvo zvandiri kutaura izvozvo ndiine shanje ndakaviruka nehasha nezuvaro pachaita kundengendeka kukuru munyika yeIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel38:20 Hove dzegungwa neshiri dzedenga nemhuka dzesango nezvose zvinokambaira nokuzvova napasi navanhu vose zvavo vari panyika zvichahuta kudedera nokuvapo kwangu. Makomo achawisirwa pasi hunguruhwe dzamatombo dzichitozomokera pasi madziro ose achikoromokera pasi. 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndichatumira Gogu kose kose. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. Vanhu vose vachabayana namabakatwa hama nehama. 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndichamuranga nedenda nokudeurwa kweropa; ndichimubaya iye nemhomho dzake dzavanhu navanhu vazhinji vaanavo; bvachapfacha remvura nechimvuramahwe nomoto nesarufa. 
Ezekiel38:23 Ndokuratidza kwandichaita ukuru hwangu nokuera kwangu ndichiita kuti ndizivikanwe namarudzi avanhu. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi.” 
Ezekiel39:1 “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu porofita kuna Gogu uti, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari chiona, ndanangana newe Gogu, jinda guru rokuMesheki nokuTubhari." 
Ezekiel39:2 Ndichakupishinudza ndigokutinhira mberi ndikuunze kubva kwokupedzesera chaiko kudivi rokuchamhembe ndigokutungamirira kundorwisa makomo eIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel39:3 Ipapo ndicharova uta hwako muruoko rworuboshwe ndigokudonhedzesa miseve muruoko rwako rworudyi. 
Ezekiel39:4 Uchafira mumakomo meIsiraeri, iyewe nemhomho dzako idzodzo navanhu vaunenge unavo. Ndichakuita nyama yamagora kushiri dzinodya nyama dzorudzi norudzi uye kuzvikara zvesango kuti udyiwe." 
Ezekiel39:5 Uchafira musango zvamo nokuti ndini iyeni ndakataura, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ndichatumira moto kuna Magogu nokuvanhu vakazvigarira havo munyika dzokumahombekombe kwegungwa. Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi. 
Ezekiel39:7 Zita rangu rinoera, ndichaita kuti riziikanwe pakati pavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri. Handizorega zita rangu richin'oreswa zvakare. Ipapo marudzi ndipo paachaziva kuti ndini Tenzi, Anoera muIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel39:8 Hero rouya uye zvichatoitika, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. Ndiro zuva riya randaireva." 
Ezekiel39:9 “Vagari vamaguta eIsiraeri vachabuda vakavesera zvombo zvokurwa moto vachizvipisa. Zvose zvinoti nhoo duku nenhoo huru, nouta namapfumo, netsvimbo nemiseve. Vachazvivesera moto kwamakore manomwe" 
Ezekiel39:10 zvokuti havazoda huni musango kana kundodzitema musango. Moto wavo vachauvesa nezvombo zvavo izvozvo zvehondo. Vanenge votopamba vanhu vakambovapamba vachitorera zvinhu vanhu vaya vakambovatorerawo zvinhu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Pazuva iroro ndichapa Gogu nzvimbo yokuviga vanhu muIsiraeri, nzvimbo yeBani reVerwendo kumabvazuva kwegungwa uchadzivirira verwendo nokuti imomo ndomunenge makavigwa Gogu nemhomho yake yose. Ichange yava kunzi, ‘Baniremhomhoyokwagogu.’" 
Ezekiel39:12 Kwemwedzi minomwe, imba yaIsiraeri ichange ichingovaviga kuitira kuti ichenure nyika." 
Ezekiel39:13 Vanhu vose venyika iyoyi vachavaviga zvichivawanisa mukurumbira pazuva randicharatidza mbiri yangu. Ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel39:14 Vachatsaura varume vanoramba varipo vokuviga vanenge vasaririra pamusoro payo nyika kuitira kuti ichenurwe, mushure memwedzi minomwe iyoyo ndomavachange vachitsvaga saizvozvo." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ivava pavanenge vachienda nomunyika kudaro, anenge angoona pfupa romunhu anobva aisa mucherechedzo pedyo naro kusvikira vokuviga vaya variviga muBaniremhomhoyokwagogu." 
Ezekiel39:16 (Gutawo rinonzi Mhomho richange riripowo.) Ndokuchenura kwavachaita nyika iyoyo. 
Ezekiel39:17 “Asi iwe mwanakomana womunhu zvanzi naTenzi Mwari taura kushiri dzemhando dzose nokumhuka dzose dzesango kuti unganai muuye, kokorodzanai kumativi ose kumabiko echibayiro andiri kukugadzirirai, mabiko makuru echibayiro pamakomo eIsiraeri. Muchadya nyama nokunwa ropa." 
Ezekiel39:18 Muchatodya zvenyu nyama yamagamba muchinwa ropa ramachinda apanyika ndovanenge vari hondohwe nehwayana nembudzi nehandira dzacho vose zvavo vari ivo zvipfuwo zvacho zvakakodzwa zveBhashani. 
Ezekiel39:19 Muchatodya zvenyu mafuta kusvikira maguta mugonwa ropa kusvikira matoraradza pamabiko echibayiro andiri kukugadzirirai. 
Ezekiel39:20 Pateburu yangu ipapo muchaguta nokudya mabhiza navatasvi vacho namagamba avarwi navarwi vemhando nemhando. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel39:21 “Ndicharatidza mbiri yangu kumarudzi avanhu uye marudzi ose achaona kutonga kwangu kwandinenge ndaita nesimba randakasevenzesa pavari namaoko angu. 
Ezekiel39:22 Imba yaIsiraeri ichaziva kuti ndini Tenzi, Mwari wavo kubvira musi iwoyo zvichienda mberi." 
Ezekiel39:23 Marudziwo avanhu achaziva kuti imba yaIsiraeri yakaenda kuutapwa pamusana pouipi hwavo nokuti havana kutendeka kwandiri zvokuti ndakazvivanza uso kwavari ndikavaisa mumaoko avavengi vavo ndokubva vose vaurayiwa nehondo yebakatwa. 
Ezekiel39:24 Ndakaita kwavari maererano nokun'ora kwavo uye nokukanganisa kwavo ndikazvivanza uso kwavari.” 
Ezekiel39:25 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Zvino ndava kudzosera pakare makomborero okwaJakobho ndichiitira tsiye nyoro imba yaIsiraeri yose uye ndichaitira shanje zita rangu rinoera." 
Ezekiel39:26 Vachakanganwa kunyadziswa kwavo nokusatendeka kwose kwavakandiitira pavachange vagara havo munyika yavo pasina chinovawana pasina anovatyityidzira. 
Ezekiel39:27 Izvozvo ndinenge ndavadzosa vabva kumarudzi ndavakokorodza kunyika dzavavengi vavo uye nemavari ndaratidza kuera kwangu marudzi namarudzi avanhu achiona. 
Ezekiel39:28 Ndipo pavachaziva kuti ini ndini Tenzi, Mwari wavo nokuti ndakambovaendesa kuutapwa pakati pamarudzi acho ndikabva ndazovakokorodza munyika yavo chaiyo. Hapana wandichasiya ikoko." 
Ezekiel39:29 Uye handichazozvivanzazve uso kwavari pandichadururira Mweya wangu pamba yaIsiraeri” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel40:1 Mugore ramakumi maviri nechishanu rokutapwa kwatakaitwa pakutangisa pegore, pazuva rechigumi romwedzi iwoyo, mugore regumi nechina mushure mokunge guta rakurirwa, pazuva rakarero chairo, simba roruoko rwaTenzi rakauya pandiri akandiendesa ikoko." 
Ezekiel40:2 Akandiendesa muzviratidzo zvaMwari kunyika yeIsiraeri akandigarisa pasi pagomo refu refu paiva nechimwe chakavakwapo chinenge guta kumaodzanyemba kwacho. 
Ezekiel40:3 Paakandisvitsa ipapo, onei, hoyo mumwe murume aitarisika sendarira aine tambo yerineni norutsanga rwokueresa mumaoko make izvozvo akanga amire pamusuo weSuo Guru." 
Ezekiel40:4 Murume iyeyo akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu tarisa nameso ako unzwe nenzeve dzako uise pfungwa dzako dzose pane zvandichakuratidza nokuti chawaunzirwa kuno, kuitira kuti ndikuratidze izvozvo. Zvaunenge waona zvose zvitaurire kumba yaIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel40:5 Ndakaona kuti paiva nerusvingo rwakatenderedza nhandare yose yeTemberi. Rutsanga rwokueresa rwakanga rwuri muruoko rwomurume uya rwaiva namakiyubhiti marefu matanhatu. Kiyubhiti racho iroro rimwechete, kureba kwaro kwaiita makumi mashanu amasendimita nemasendimita maviri. Akabvawo aera kureba korusvingo kuenda mudenga kukaita mamita matatu uye ukobvu hwaro hukaita maimita matatu." 
Ezekiel40:6 Ndokubva aenda pamusuo weSuo Guru rakatarisa kumabvazuva akakwira napamatanho epo akaera pamusuo weSuo Guru pakaita mamita matatu kudzika. 
Ezekiel40:7 Uye dzimba dzomumativi macho imwe neimwe yakaita mamita matatu kumativi ose. Padzimba idzodzo, nzvimbo yaiva pakati pemba nemba yaiita mamita maviri ane hafu. Kumusuo kweSuo Guru pedyo nekamba kapaSuo Guru kwokupedzesera mukati kakaita mamita matatu." 
Ezekiel40:8 Akazoera kamba kapaSuo Guru pakaita mamita mana kudzika. 
Ezekiel40:9 Magwatidziro acho rimwe nerimwe raiita mita imwechete izvozvo kamba keSuo Guru kakanga kari mukati kwokupedzesera. 
Ezekiel40:10 Paivawo nedzimba nhatu dzomumativi macho uku nouku kweSuo Guru rokumabvazuva. Pahutatu hwadzo kudaro dzakanga dzakaenzana uye magwatidziro acho uku nouku akanga akaenzana. 
Ezekiel40:11 Akazoerawo urefu hwapamusuo weSuo Guru hukaita mamita matanhatu ane hafu upamhi hweSuo Guru huchiita mamita mashanu. 
Ezekiel40:12 Paiva nechokudzivirira nacho mberi kwedzimba dzomumativi idzodzo divi rimwe nerimwe richiita hafu yemita. Dzimba idzi dzaiva namativi akaenzana dzichiita mamita matatu rutivi rwega rwega. 
Ezekiel40:13 Misuo yadzo yaiva yakatarisana dziri pakanyatsotarisana neSuo Guru zvokuti paakaera pacho kubva kuseri kwemba imwe kusvika kuseri kweimwe, pakaita gumi ramamita rine mamita maviri ane hafu." 
Ezekiel40:14 Akaerawo kamba kaya, kakaita gumi remamita kufara. Uye kutenderera kamba ikako kapaSuo Guru, maingova munhandare." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kubvira pamberi peSuo Guru rokupinda naro kusvikira kwokupedzisira kwekamba komukati kepaSuo Guru pakaita makumi maviri amamita ana mamita mashanu. 
Ezekiel40:16 Nechomukati meSuo Guru kutenderera maiva namahwindo nechomukatiwo mekamba kapaSuo Guru ipapo maiva namahwindo uye pamagwatidziro acho pakanga paine mifananidzo yemirara. 
Ezekiel40:17 Akazondisvitsa munhandare yokunze, onei, imomo maiva nedzimba uye nekahuva kakanga kakatenderera nhandare iyoyo. Paiva namakumi matatu edzimba dzakanga dzakatarisana nekahuva ikako." 
Ezekiel40:18 Zvino kahuva kacho kaitevedzana namativi emisuo mikuru kachitevedza kureba kwakaita misuo mikuru yacho. Ndokacho kaiva kahuva kapazasi. 
Ezekiel40:19 Akazoera chinhambwe chinotangira nechomukati kumberi kweSuo Guru rezasi kusvikira kumberi kwenhandare yomukati pakaita makumi mashanu amamita. 
Ezekiel40:20 Akanditungamirira nokuchamhembe ndakaona pane Suo Guru raiva rakatarisa kuchamhembe riri rokunhandare yokunze. Akariera urefu hwaro noupamhi hwaro. 
Ezekiel40:21 Dzimba dzaro dzomumativi dzakanga dzakati uku nhatu uku nhatu uye magwatidziro acho nekamba karo zvakanga zvakaenzana sezvakanga zvakangoitawo Suo Guru rokutanga. Urefu hwaro hwaiita makumi maviri amamita ana mamita mashanu, kufara kwaro kuchiita gumi ramamita rina mamita maviri ane hafu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Mahwindo aro nekamba kapamusuo, nemirara iya yokuvezera yakanga yakaenzana neiya yokuSuo Guru rakatarisa kumabvazuva. Raiva namatanho manomwe okukwira kwariri. Kamba karo kapamusuo kaive nechomukati." 
Ezekiel40:23 Sezvakanga zvakangoitawo kumabvazuva, paiva pakatarisana neSuo Guru pakanga paine Suo Guru rokupinda munhandare yomukati. Iye ndokuera achibva pane rimwe Suo Guru kusvikira kune rimwe pakaita mamita makumi mashanu." 
Ezekiel40:24 Akazonditungamirirawo nokumaodzanyemba, onei, kune Suo Guru. Akaera magwatidziro aro nekamba kepamusuo paro zvakanga zvakaenzana nezvemimwe misuo mikuru." 
Ezekiel40:25 Maiva namahwindo kuritenderera mariri uye nomukamba karo kapamusuo samahwindo emimwe yacho. Urefu hwaro hwakaita makumi maviri amamita namamita mashanu, kufara kwaro kuchiita gumi ramamita rina mamita maviri ane hafu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Paivawo namatanho manomwe okukwira nawo kuSuo Guru racho. Kamba karo kapamusuo kainge kari nechomukati uye raiva nemifaninidzo yemirara pamagwatidziro paro rakati rumwe rutivi murara rumwewo murara. 
Ezekiel40:27 Paivawo neSuo Guru kuchamhembe kwenhandare yomukati. Iye akaera kubvira paSuo Guru rimwe kusvikira kune rimwe akananga kumaodzanyemba pakaita makumi mashanu amamita. 
Ezekiel40:28 Pedzezvo akandiunza munhandare yomukati tapinda neSuo Guru rokumaodzanyemba. Akabva aera Suo Guru rokumaodzanyemba, rakanga rakangoenzana nemimwe." 
Ezekiel40:29 Dzimba dzaro dzomumativi namagwatidziro aro nakamba karo kapamusuo zvakanga zvakangoenzana nemimwe. Mariri makanga mune mahwindo kuritenderera uye nomukamba karo kepamusuo kuritenderera. Urefu hwaro hwakaita makumi maviri ana mamita mashanu, upamhi hwaro huchiita mamita gumi namaviri ane hafu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Paivawo notumba twepamusuo kutenderera tuchiita mamita makumi maviri namashanu kureba uye upamhi huchiita mamita maviri ane hafu. 
Ezekiel40:31 Kamba karo kapamusuo kakanga kakatarisana nenhandare yokunze, pamagwatidziro aro paine mifananidzo yemirara. Matanho aro okukwirisa kwariri akanga ari masere." 
Ezekiel40:32 Akazoenda neni kunhandare yomukati kumabvazuva akaera Suo Guru iroro, rakanga rakangoenzanawo nemimwe." 
Ezekiel40:33 Dzimba dzaro dzomumativi namagwatidziro aro nakamba karo kapamusuo zvakanga zvakangoenzana sezvimwe. Uye raiva namahwindo mariri kuritenderera nomukamba kacho kapamusuo. Urefu hwaro hwaiva makumi mashanu amamita noupamhi hwaro hwaiita gumi ramamita rina mamita maviri ane hafu. 
Ezekiel40:34 Kamba karo kapamusuo kakanga kakatarisana nenhandare yokunze. Raivawo nemifananidzo yemirara pamagwatidziro aro yakati mumwe uku mumwe uku. Matanho aro okukwirisa kwariri akanga ari masere. 
Ezekiel40:35 Akandisvikisawo kuSuo Guru rokuchamhembe akariera. Rakanga rakaenzanawo nemimwe. 
Ezekiel40:36 Dzimba dzaro dzomumativi namagwatidziro aro nakamba karo kapamusuo zvakanga zvakangoenzana. Uye raiva namahwindo mariri kuritendererera. Urefu hwaro hwaiva makumi maviri amamita ana mamita mashanu noupamhi hwaro hwaiita gumi ramamita rina mamita maviri ane hafu. 
Ezekiel40:37 Kamba karo kapamusuo kakanga kakatarisana nenhandare yokunze. Raivawo nemifananidzo yemirara pamagwatidziro aro yakati mumwe uku mumwe uku. Matanho aro okukwirisa kwariri akanga ari masere. 
Ezekiel40:38 Paivawo nemba ine gonhi rayo mukamba karo kapamusoro kumagwatidziro eSuo Guru racho paigezerwa mupiro wokupisa. 
Ezekiel40:39 Zvino mukamba kacho kapaSuo Guru paiva namateburu maviri kumativi ose ari maviri. Ndipo paiurayirwa mupiro wokupisa nomupirowo wokuripira zvitadzo uyewo mupiro wokuripa mhosva. 
Ezekiel40:40 Nechokunze kwekamba ikako kepamusuo pokupinda napo kuSuo Guru rokuchamhembe, paivawo namateburu maviri. Kune rimwe divi rakamba ikako keSuo Guru pakanga pana mateburu maviri." 
Ezekiel40:41 Kwaiva namateburu mana mukati macho namateburu manawo nechokunze kudivi rimwe reSuo Guru. Ose pamwechete aiva mateburu masere pakanga pachiurayirwa zvibayiro. 
Ezekiel40:42 Paivawo namamwe mateburu mana amabwe akavezwa pokuitira mupiro wokupisa, imwe neimwe ichiita makumi mashanu amasendimita kureba iine pamusoro pakaenzana mativi mana ose, divi roga roga richiita makumi manomwe emasendimita ana masendimita mashanu. Ipapo ndipo pairongedzerwa midziyo yokuurayisa mipiro yokupisa uye nezvibayiro." 
Ezekiel40:43 Paivawo nezvokupaikira zvakanga zvakaita sechanza kureba zvaiva zvakarovererwa zvakatenderedza zviri nechomukati. 
Ezekiel40:44 Akazonditora kunze ondipinza munhandare yomukati, onei, pane dzimba mbiri munhandare yomukati imomo. Imwe yaiva kudivi rokuSuo Guru rokuchamhembe yakatarisa kumaodzanyemba imwewo yacho iri kudivi rokuSuo Guru rokumaodzanyemba yakatarisa kuchamhembe." 
Ezekiel40:45 Iye akanditi, “Imba iyo yakatarisa kumaodzanyemba, ndeyavapristi vebasa rokuona nezveTemberi." 
Ezekiel40:46 Imbawo iyo yakatarisa kuchamhembe, ndeyavapristi vebasa rokuona nezveatari, ivava ava ndovanakomana vokwaZadhoki, ndivo voga pakati pavanakomana vokwaRevhi vangaswedere kuna Tenzi kuzomushandira.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 Akaerawo nhandare ikaita mamita makumi mashanu kureba, upamhi huriwo makumi mashanu amamita, yakaenzana mativi ose ari mana. Atari yakanga imire pamberi peTemberi." 
Ezekiel40:48 Pedzepo akandiunza kukamba kapamusuo peTemberi akabva aera magwatidziro akamba kepamusuo kacho. Kakaita mamita maviri ane hafu uku nouku. Kufara kweSuo Guru iroro kwaisvitsa mamita manomwe. Mumativi meSuo Guru masvingo akanga achiita mita imwechete nehafu uku nouku. 
Ezekiel40:49 Urefu hwekamba kapamusuo ikako hwaiita gumi ramamita, kufara kwako kuchiita mamita matanhatu. Paiva namatanho gumi okukwirisa kwariri, paine misimboti pedyo namagwatidziro uku nouku." 
Ezekiel41:1 Akazondiunza muzimba guru racho ndokubva aera magwatidziro aro. Magwatidziro iwayo akaita mamita matatu kupamhama pachiti rouku nerouku. 
Ezekiel41:2 Kufara kwomusuo iwoyo kwakaita mamita mashanu uye madziro omumativi mepamusuo ipapo achisvitsawo mamita maviri ane hafu uku nouku. Akaerawo kureba kwezimba iroro kukasvika makumi maviri amamita, upamhi hwaro huchiita gumi ramamita." 
Ezekiel41:3 Akapinda mumba yomukati akaera magwatidziro omusuo wayo akaita mita rimwechete, kufara kwepamusuo ipapo kukaita mamita matanhatu. Madziro omumativi mopokupinda napo akasvitsawo mamita matatu ane hafu." 
Ezekiel41:4 Akaerawo kureba kwemba iyoyi ikaita gumi remamita kufara kukaitawo gumi ramamita mukati mezimba guru riya. Ndokubva iye anditi, “Ino iyi ndiyo Nzvimbo Inoeresesa yacho.”" 
Ezekiel41:5 Akaerawo chidziro cheTemberi chikaita mamita matatu oukobvu uye kufara kwedzimba dzomumativi dzacho kwakaita mamita mana dzakatenderera Temberi iyoyo. 
Ezekiel41:6 Dzimba dzacho dzomumativi dzaiva dzakaita nhurikidzwa nhatu, imwe iri pamusoro peimwe, dziri makumi matatu panhurikidzwa yoga yoga. Pakanga paine zvimwe zvokutsigirisa zvakavakwa mumadziro macho zvakabudira nechokunze kutenderera chidziro chose ichocho cheTemberi kuitira kutsigira dzimba dzomumativi idzodzo kuti dzirege kutsigirwa nechidziro cheTemberi iyoyo." 
Ezekiel41:7 Kufara kwedzimba dzomumativi dzapasi dzacho kwaikurirwa nedzepamusoro. Dzepamusoro idzodzo dzichikurirwawo kufara nedzapamusorosoro, zvichifambiranawo nokukudzwa-kudzwa kwezvimwe zvokutsigirisa zviya zvakavakwa mumadziro zvichabudira nechokunze nhurikidzwa yoga yoga kutenderera Temberi iyoyo. Padivi peTemberi paiva namatanho aikwira mudenga. Ndiwo makwiriro aiita munhu kuti abve pasi achienda kumusoro achipinda nomunhurikidzwa yapakati." 
Ezekiel41:8 Ndakaonawo kuti muTemberi makanga muine huva yakakwirira kutenderera yose. Ugaro hwedzimba dzomumativi dzacho hwakanga huchiita mamita maviri marefu kureba. 
Ezekiel41:9 Ukobvu hwechidziro chokunze kwedzimba idzodzo dzomumativi hwaiita mamita maviri nehafu. Paivawo nepamwe pakanga pasina chinhu pakati pedzimba idzodzo neTemberi 
Ezekiel41:10 nedzimba dzomunhandare yakanga ichiita gumi ramamita kumativi ose eTemberi kuitenderera. 
Ezekiel41:11 Magonhi edzimba dzomumativi idzi aizaruka nokunzvimbo iya yakanga yakasiyiwa isina chinhu. Rimwe raizaruka rakanangana nokuchamhembe rimwewo rakanangana nokumaodzanyemba. Kufara kwenzvimbo iyoyo yokusiyiwa isina chinhu yaiita mamita maviri nehafu. 
Ezekiel41:12 Imba yaive iri kumadokero yakanga yakatarisana nenhandare yeTemberi yaiva iri makumi matatu amamita ana mamita mashanu upamhi. Chidziro chemba iyoyo chakanga chiine ukobvu hunoita mamita maviri ane hafu. Kureba kwayo kwakanga kuchiita makumi mana amamita ana mamita mashanu. 
Ezekiel41:13 Akaerawo Temberi ikaita mamita makumi mashanu kureba uye nhandare neimba yacho iyoyo namadziro ayo zvikaitawo makumi mashanu amamita kureba. 
Ezekiel41:14 Akaerawo upamhi hwokumberi kweTemberi iyoyo kumabvazuva nenhandare zvikaita makumi mashanu amamita. 
Ezekiel41:15 Akazoera urefu hwemba yakatarisa kumadokero nhandare namadziro ayo kumativi ose ikaita mamita makumi mashanu. Zimba reTemberi nemba yomukati nekamba kapamusuo kokunze 
Ezekiel41:16 zvakanga zvakaroverwa namapuranga. Dzose dziri nhatu kutenderedza dzaive namahwindo asingazaruki. Temberi iyoyi, kumusuo kwacho kwakanga kwakanzi chechetere namapango akavezwa, kubvira pasi payo kusvikira mumahwindo. (Izvozvo mahwindo akanga akadzivirwa)" 
Ezekiel41:17 kusvika panzvimbo iri pamusoro pegonhi nyangewo kusvikira mumba yomukati uyewo nechokunze. Mumadziro mose, kutenderera, mumba yomukati iyoyo nezimba riya maiva nemifananidzo yakavezwa" 
Ezekiel41:18 yakaita samakerubhu nemiti yemirara pakati pekerubhu nerimwewo kerubhu. Kerubhu roga roga raiva nezviso zviviri zvaiti; 
Ezekiel41:19 uso hwomunhu hwaiva hwakatarisa kunerimwe divi kumurara uya, uso hweshumba ichiri kuzvinzwa hwaive kumiti yomurara. Mifananidzo yacho yaiva yakavezerwa paTemberi yose iyoyo kuitenderera." 
Ezekiel41:20 Kubvira pasi dakara pamusoro pegonhi aingova chete makerubhu nemiti yomurara. 
Ezekiel41:21 Magwatidziro apamusuo pezimba riya aiva akangoenzana mativi ose ari mana. Pamberi peNzvimbo Inoera paiva nechimwe 
Ezekiel41:22 chinomiririra atari yamapango yaiita mita imwechete nehafu kureba kuenda mudenga upamhi hwacho huri mita imwechete. Kona dzacho nechigadzikiro chazvo namadziro ayo akanga ari omuti. Akati kwandiri, “Ino iyi ndiyo teburu iri pana Tenzi.”" 
Ezekiel41:23 Zimba guru riya neNzvimbo Inoera zvakanga zviine makonhi maviri maviri. 
Ezekiel41:24 Makonhi acho akanga ari maviri maviri pamusuo, ari masasa maviri aizaruka pamusuo woga woga." 
Ezekiel41:25 Zvino pamagonhi ezimba guru pakanga pana makerubhu akavezwa painewo miti yemirara sezvakangoita zviya zviya zvakanga zvakavezerwa pamadziro pekamba kapamusuo kaya nechokunze. 
Ezekiel41:26 Paivawo namahwindo asingazaruki nemifananidzo yemiti yemirara kumativi ese pamadziro ekamba ikako. 
Ezekiel42:1 Akazondiburitsamo akanditungamirira munhandare yomukati nechokuchamhembe. Akandiunza kudzimba dzaiva dzakatarisana nenhandare yeTemberi dzakatarisanawo nemba iri nechokuchamhembe. 
Ezekiel42:2 Kureba kwemba yaiva nechokuchamhembe kwaiita mamita makumi mashanu upamhi huri makumi maviri amamita ana mamita mashanu ane hafu. 
Ezekiel42:3 Pakanga pakatarisana nepamwe paiita gumi ramamita pakanga pari penhandare yomukati pakatarisanawo nakahuva kokunhandare yokunze paiva nemba dzenhurikidzwa nhatu dzina maperere. 
Ezekiel42:4 Pamberi pedzimba idzodzo paiva nopokupinda napo mukati paiita mamita mashanu kufara, urefu hwacho huchiita makumi mashanu amamita. Makonhi adzo akanga ari nechokuchamhembe." 
Ezekiel42:5 Zvino dzimba dzapamusoro dzako dzakanga dzakati dukupei nokuti maperere akanga akadzitorera nzvimbo yakati kuti kupfuura dzimba dzapasi nedzapakati dzacho dzapamba iyoyo
