Ezekiel42:6 nokuti dzaiva nhurikidzwa nhatu dzisina misimboti semisimboti yomunhandare yokunze. Ndokusaka dzimba idzodzo dzapamusoro dzakanga dzakavakwa dzakanyanya kuswedera shure kubvira pasi kupfuura dzimba dzapasi nedzapakati dzacho. 
Ezekiel42:7 Paivawo nechidziro nechokunze chakavambirana nedzimba idzodzo woenda kunhandare yokunze pakatarisana nedzimba. Dzaiita makumi maviri amamita ana mamita mashanu kureba. 
Ezekiel42:8 Chaivapo ndechokuti dzimba dzomunhandare yokunze dzakanga dzichiita mamita makumi maviri namashanu kureba. Dziya dzaiva dzakatarisana neTemberi dzaiita makumi mashanu amamita kureba. 
Ezekiel42:9 Nechapasi pedzimba idzi, paiva nepokupinda napo nechokumabvazuva uchipinda madziri uchibva nokunhandare yokunze" 
Ezekiel42:10 maiva nedzimwe nomukana wokufamba nawomu. Kumaodzanyembawo kwacho pakatarisana nenhandare pakatarisanawo neimba iyoyo, paiva nedzimba pamberi padzo paino mukana wokupfuura nawo." 
Ezekiel42:11 Dzakanga dzakafanana nedzimba dziya dzaiva kuchamhembe, urefu hwadzo noupamhi hwadzo hwakaenzana, nemokubuda namo makangofanana, uyewo namamiriro acho namagonhi adzo." 
Ezekiel42:12 Uyezve nechapasi kwedzimba dzokumaodzanyemba kwaiva nepokupinda napo nechokumabvazuva ukange wapinda napamukana iwoyo uye pakanga pakatarisana nadzo paiva nechidziro chaiganhura. 
Ezekiel42:13 Akazoti kwandiri, “Dzimba dzokuchamhembe nedzimba dzokumaodzanyemba dzakatarisana nenhandare, dzimba dzinoera, munodyira vapristi vanoswedera pana Tenzi mipiro inoeresesa kwazvo. Imomo ndomavacharongedza mipiro inoeresesa kwazvo inoti: mupiro woupfu hwembesanwa nomupiro wokupirira zvitadzo nomupiro wokuripira mhosva nokuti nzvimbo iyoyo iNzvimbo Inoera." 
Ezekiel42:14 Kana vapristi vopinda muNzvimbo Inoera, havafaniri kuzobuda mairi vachienda kunhandare yokunze vasina kusiyamo magemenzi avanenge vakapfeka pabasa ravanga vachiita imomo nokuti anoera. Vanofanira kupfeka mamwe magemenzi vasati vaswedera kune zvavanhu.”" 
Ezekiel42:15 Kuzoti zvino apedza kuera nzvimbo yomukati meTemberi, akandiburitsa nokuSuo Guru raiva rakatarisa kumabvazuva akabva aera nzvimbo yeTemberi kuitenderera nharaunda iyoyo." 
Ezekiel42:16 Akaera kumabvazuva ikoko norutsanga rwuya rwokueresa narwo kukaita mazana maviri namakumi mashanu amamita okuera norutsanga irworwo. 
Ezekiel42:17 Akatendeuka akaera divi rokuchamhembe kwacho kukaita mazana maviri namakumi mashanu amamita okuera norutsanga irworwo rwokueresa narwo. 
Ezekiel42:18 Akatendeuka akaera kudivi rokumaodzanyemba kukaitawo mazana maviri namakumi mashanu amamita okuera norutsanga irworwo rwokueresa narwo. 
Ezekiel42:19 Akazotendeukira kudivi rokumadokero akaera kukaita mazana maviri namakumi mashanu amamita okuera norutsanga rwuya rwokueresa narwo. 
Ezekiel42:20 Akaiera mativi mana. Yakanga iine chidziro, kuitenderera, chakanga chichiita mamita mazana maviri namakumi mashanu kureba uye mazana maviri namakumi mashanu amamita upamhi chokuparadzanisa kudivi rinoera nedivi risingaeri." 
Ezekiel43:1 Mushure maizvozvo akaenda neni kuSuo Guru rakatarisa kumabvazuva 
Ezekiel43:2 onei kupenya kwokuvapo kwaMwari weIsiraeri kuchibva kumabvazuva uye kutinhira kwokuuya kwake kwainge kuwunga kwamafashamo emvura uyewo nyika yakabva yati ngwe-e kuchena nembiri yake. 
Ezekiel43:3 Zvino chiratidzo chandakaona chakanga chakafanana nechiratidzo chandakanga ndamboona paakauya kuzoparadza guta, chakaitawo sechiratidzo chandakamboona ndiri pedyo nerwizi rweKebhari. Ndakawira pasi nouso." 
Ezekiel43:4 Kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi pakwakapinda muTemberi nokuSuo Guru rakatarisa kumabvazuva," 
Ezekiel43:5 Mweya akandisumudza akaenda neni kunhandare yomukati, ndiye onei kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakazadza Temberi." 
Ezekiel43:6 Murume uya paakanga amire neni kudaro ndakanzwa mumwe aitaura kwandiri ari muTemberi. 
Ezekiel43:7 Akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu, ino iyi ndiyo nzvimbo yechigaro changu choumambo nechitambarariko chetsoka dzangu. Ndimo mandichagara pakati pavanhu veIsiraeri nokusingaperi. Imba yaIsiraeri haichazombofa yakan'oresa zita rangu rinoera, ivo kana madzimambo avo nounzenza hwavo kana nezvitunha zvamadzimambo avo." 
Ezekiel43:8 Vanoita izvi nokuisa misuo yavo pamusuo pangu namagwatidziro avo akatarisana namagwatidziro angu, nechidziro chiricho choga chatakaganhurana, ivo neni. Vakan'oresa zita rangu rinoera zvinosemesa zvavo zvavakaita, ndokusaka ndakavaroromesa nehasha dzangu." 
Ezekiel43:9 Zvino ngavakande pasi kunamata kwavo zvifananidzo ikoku, uye zvitunha zvamadzimambo vakande kure neni, iniwo ndichagara pakati pavo nokusingaperi." 
Ezekiel43:10 “Zvino iwe mwanakomana womunhu tsanangurira imba yaIsiraeri nezveTemberi nokutarisika kwayo namamiriro ayo kuitira kuti vanyare uipi hwavo. 
Ezekiel43:11 Kana vakazonyara pana zvose zvavakaita, vatsanangurire nezveTemberi, mamiriro ayo, paibudwa napo nepaipindwa napo nokutarisika kwayo kwose. Uvazivisewo mitemo yayo yose nemirao yayo yose uinyore vachiona nameso avo kuitira kuti vachengete nokuita zvose zvinorehwa nemitemo yayo yose pamwechete nemirao yayo yose." 
Ezekiel43:12 Uno uyu ndomutemo weTemberi unoti: Nharaunda yose yapamusoro pegomo chaipo inzvimbo inofanira kuereswa kwazvo. Iwoyo ndomutemo weTemberi.” 
Ezekiel43:13 Uku ndokupimwa kwakaitwa atari ichierwa namamita, (mita racho iroro rimwechete richiita zana ramasendimita rina masendimita mana). Pasi payo pakaita masendimita makumi mashanu namaviri kureba kuenda mudenga, ichiitawo masendimita makumi mashanu namaviri kufara, iine bhande rinoita makumi maviri amasendimita ana masendimita mashanu kureba kuitenderera. Uhu ndohurefu hweatari iyoyo kukwira mudenga," 
Ezekiel43:14 kubvira pasi payo pavhu apa kusvika pachimbimbi chapazasi pakaita mita rimwechete, paine upamhi hunoita hafu yemita, kubvirawo pachimbimbi chidiki kusvikira pachimbimbi chikuru chacho pachiita mamita maviri chiine upamhi hunosvika chikamu chehafu yemita." 
Ezekiel43:15 Kouya choto cheatari iyoyo chaiita mamita maviri uye kubvirawo pachoto chapaatari ichocho paine zvinenge nyanga zvina zvinoita chikamu chehafu yemita kureba kuenda mudenga. 
Ezekiel43:16 Choto cheatari iyoyo chakanga chino mativi mana akaenzana, urefu hwacho hwaiita mamita matanhatu upamhi hwacho huri mamita matanhatuwo." 
Ezekiel43:17 Chimbimbi chawo chakanga china mativi mana akaenzana, urefu hwacho huri mamita manomwe, upamhi hwachowo huri mamita manomwe chiine bhandi rakachitenderera rinoita masendimita makumi maviri namashanu. Pasiwo pacho pakaita hafu yemita kupatenderera. Matanho apaatari akanga akatarisa kumabvazuva." 
Ezekiel43:18 Akazonditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu zvanzi naTenzi Mwari mirao yapaatari ndeyiyi iyi: Pazuva rainovakirwa kupirira pairi mupiro yokupisa uye nokusasa ropa pairi" 
Ezekiel43:19 unofanira kupa vapristi vechiRevhi vemhuri yokwaZadhoki ivo vanoswedera kwandiri kuzondishandira, handira yomupiro wokupirira zvitadzo. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel43:20 Unofanirawo kutora rimwe ropa rayo urizore pane zvinenge nyanga zvina zviya zvepaatari napamakona mana echimbimbi urizorewo pabhandi kuritenderera. Ndokuchenura kwauchaita atari nokuipfupirira. 
Ezekiel43:21 Uyewo unofanira kutora handira yomupiro wokupirira zvitadzo inofanira kundopisirwa panzvimbo yacho yakasarudzwa iri yapaTemberi ipapo asi kuri nechokunze kweNzvimbo Inoera. 
Ezekiel43:22 Zvino pazuva repiri unofanira kupira gotora risina chinoshoreka pariri romupiro wokupfupira zvitadzo, atari ichabva yachenurwa sokuchenurwa kwainoitwa nehandira." 
Ezekiel43:23 Kana wapedza kuichenura, unofanira kuzopira handira isina chinoshoreka pairi nechihondohwe chomudanga chisina chinoshoreka." 
Ezekiel43:24 Unofanira kuuya nazvo pana Tenzi, vapristi vanofanira kudzimwaya-mwaya munyu vagodzipira somupiro wokupisa kuna Tenzi." 
Ezekiel43:25 Kwamazuva manomwe unofanira kuita kuti pave nembudzi yomupiro wokupirira zvitadzo uyewo nehandira nehondohwe zvomudanga zvisina chinoshoreka, ndozvinofanira kuitwa." 
Ezekiel43:26 Kwamazuva manomwe vanofanira kupfupirira atari vaichenure, nokudaro inoereswa." 
Ezekiel43:27 Kana vazopedza mazuva iwaya, ipapo kubvira pazuva resere zvichienda mberi vapristi vachange vachipira paatari mipiro yenyu yokupisa nemipiro yenyu yokuwadzana, ndichakugamuchirai” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel44:1 Akazondidzosera kuSuo Guru rokunze kweNzvimbo Inoera rakatarisa kumabvazuva rakanga rakapfigwa. 
Ezekiel44:2 Tenzi akati kwandiri, “Suo Guru iri richaramba rakapfigwa. Harifaniri kumbozarurwa. Hapana anofanira kumbopinda nepo nokuti Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri ndipo paapinda napo. Naizvozvo rinofanira kugara rakapfigwa." 
Ezekiel44:3 Jinda chete, ndiro ringagarepo zvaro richidya chingwa pana Tenzi. Richapinda nenzira yokukamba kapamusuo kapaSuo Guru rigobuda nenzira imwecheteyo.”" 
Ezekiel44:4 Akandiunza nenzira yokuSuo Guru rokuchamhembe kumberi kweTemberi. Ini ndikatarisa ndikaona kupenya kwokuvapo kwaTenzi kwakazara muTemberi yaTenzi ndikawira pasi nouso. 
Ezekiel44:5 Tenzi ndokubva ati kwandiri, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu pfundira mumwoyo mako ucherechedze nemeso ako unzwe nenzeve dzako zvose zvandichakutaurira zvinonangana nemirao yose yeTemberi yaTenzi nemirao yayo yose, uzvichengetedze mumwoyo mako kuti ndavanani vanobvumirwa kupinda pamusuo weTemberi uye kuti ndavanaani vasingabvumirwi muNzvimbo Inoera." 
Ezekiel44:6 Uti kuvapanduki, imba yaIsiraeri, zvanzi naTenzi Mwari imi vemba yaIsiraeri zvose zvounyangadzi hwenyu hwakan'ora ngazvipere," 
Ezekiel44:7 zvokubvumira vatorwa, vanhu vane mwoyo nomuviri isina kudzingiswa kuti vave muNzvimbo yangu Inoera vachiin'oresa pamunopira kwandiri zvokudya zvangu namafuta neropa. Makatyora chitenderano changu pamusoro pezvounyangadzi hwenyu." 
Ezekiel44:8 Panze pokuti imi muite basa rokuchengeta munzvimbo yangu inoera makatoisa imi vatorwa kuti ivo ndivo vave nebasa rokuchengetedza muNzvimbo yangu Inoera. 
Ezekiel44:9 “Naizvozvo zvanzi naTenzi Mwari hapana mutorwa asina kudzingiswa mumwoyo kana pamuviri wake, pavatorwa vose zvavo vari pakati pavaIsiraeri anobvumirwa kupinda muNzvimbo yangu Inoera." 
Ezekiel44:10 “Asi vaRevhi vakaenda kure neni, vachirasika kwandiri, vachitevera zvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata paye pakaenda Isiraeri mutome vachawanawo mubayiro wokurangwa." 
Ezekiel44:11 Kushanda muNzvimbo Inoera vachashandawo zvavo, vachitarirawo zvapamisuo mikuru yapaTemberi; vachishandawo muTemberi, vachibayawo chibayiro chomupiro wokupisa, nechibayiro chavanhu. Vachaita mabasa vachibatsira vanhu." 
Ezekiel44:12 Pamusana pokuti vakavaitira mabasa pamberi pezvifananidzo zvavo zvokunamata vakave chipingamupinyi chokuipa kuimba yaIsiraeri saka ndakapika kuti vachawana mubayiro wavo wokurangwa. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Ezekiel44:13 Havafaniri kusvika pedyo neni vachindiitira basa roupristi kana kusvika pane zvinhu zvangu zvose zvinoera, kana pedyo nezvinhu zvinoeresesa asi kutoti vanofanira kunyara nazvo pamusana pounyangadzi hwavo hwakan'ora." 
Ezekiel44:14 Kunyange zvakadaro zvavo ndichavasarudza kuti vaite basa rokuchengetedza muTemberi, kuita mabasa omo anofanira kuitwa imomo." 
Ezekiel44:15 “Asi vapristi vechiRevhi, vanakomana vokwaZadhoki vanoita basa rokuchengetedza Nzvimbo yangu Inoera pakatetereka vanhu veIsiraeri mutome vachibva kwandiri, ndivo vachauya kwandiri vachindishandira. Ndivo vachandiitira basa rokupira kwandiri mafuta neropa. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel44:16 Ivava ndivo vachapinda muNzvimbo yangu Inoera, uye ndivo vachasvika paAtari yangu kuzondishandira. Ndivo vachandiitira basa rokuchengetedza zvinhu." 
Ezekiel44:17 Pavanopinda paSuo Guru renhandare yomukati, vanofanira kupfeka hanzu dzerineni. Havafaniri kuva nechii zvacho chewuru pavari pavanenge vachiita basa kumisuo mikuru yomunhandare yomukati nomuTemberi." 
Ezekiel44:18 Vanofanira kupfeka nguwani dzerineni mumusoro mavo, muchiuno mavo vakasungira mabhurukwa erineni. Havafaniri kupfeka chose chose chinokonzera dikita." 
Ezekiel44:19 Uye pavanobuda kunhandare yokunze kuvanhu, vanofanira kubvisa magemenzi avanga vachishanda vakapfeka voarongedza mudzimba dzinoera vopfeka mamwe magemenzi nokuti vangadaro vakaitisa vanhu zvinhu zvino muko namagemenzi avo iwayo." 
Ezekiel44:20 Havafaniri kuveura musoro wavo kana kurega vhudzi ravo richireba. Chavo chete kugerwa vachichekererwa vhudzi ravo. 
Ezekiel44:21 Hapana mupristi anofanira kunwa waini paanopinda munhandare yomukati. 
Ezekiel44:22 Havafaniri kuroora chirikadzi kana mukadzi akarambwa, asi mhandara chete yorudzi rwemba yaIsiraeri kana chirikadzi yomupristi." 
Ezekiel44:23 Vanofanira kudzidzisa vanhu vangu mutsauko wezvinoera nezvisingaeri vachivaratidza kusiyanisa zvakan'ora nezvisina kun'ora. 
Ezekiel44:24 Panenge paita gakava, ivava ndivo vachava vatongi vacho vachitonga maererano nemirawo yangu. Vanofanira kuchengeta mitemo yangu nemirao yangu pamazuva angu makuru akatarwa uye vanofanira kueresa maSabata angu." 
Ezekiel44:25 Havafaniri kuzvin'oresa nokuenda pedyo nechitunha chomunhu kusiya chete nechitunha chababa kana chaamai kana chomwanakomana kana chomwanasikana kunyange chomukoma kana munun'una kana chehanzvadzisikana isina kuroorwa vanogona zvavo kuzvin'oresa. 
Ezekiel44:26 Asi kana azvichenura ngavamuverengere mazuva manomwe. 
Ezekiel44:27 Pazuva raanosipinda muNzvimbo Inoera, munhandare yomukati kundoshanda muNzvimbo Inoera, anofanira kupira mupiro wake wokupirira zvitadzo. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel44:28 “Havafaniri kuva nenhaka, ini ndini nhaka yavo. Saka usavape nyika muIsiraeri, ini ndini nyika yavo." 
Ezekiel44:29 Vanofanira kudya mupiro wembesanwa nomupiro wokupirira zvitadzo nomupiro wokuripira mhosva nechose zvacho chinenge chateketererwa kuna Mwari muIsiraeri, chichava chavo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Michero yose yokutanga yemhando dzose zvadzo nomupiro wose wemhando dzose pazvinhu zvose zvamunopira zvichava zvavapristi. Munofanirawo kupa kumupristi upfu hwakamanzika kuitira kuti imba yako iwane chikomborero. 
Ezekiel44:31 Vapristi havafaniri kudya chinhu chipi nechipi chakafa choga, ingava shiri kana mhuka yafa yoga kana yabvamburwa-bvamburwa.”" 
Ezekiel45:1 Pamunogova nechin'ange nyika senhaka munofanira kutsaurira Tenzi chimwe chikamu chenyika iyoyo sedunhu rinoera rinoita gumi ramakiromita rina makiromita maviri nehafu kureba chichiita makiromita gumi upamhi. Nharaunda yayo yose inenge iri dunhu rinoera. 
Ezekiel45:2 Padunhu racho ngapave nenzvimbo yakaenzana mativi ose, divi roga roga richiita mazana maviri amamita ana mamita makumi mashanu, iyoyo ichave Nzvimbo Inoera." 
Ezekiel45:3 Mudunhu rinoera iroro unofanira kuera utsaure nzvimbo inoita makiromita gumi namaviri nehafu kureba ine upamhi hwamakiromita mashanu, muchava Nzvimbo Inoera, Nzvimbo Inoeresesa." 
Ezekiel45:4 Chikamu chenyika ichocho chichava chikamu chinoera. Chichava chavapristi vanoshanda muNzvimbo Inoera vanoenda panaTenzi kundomushandira. Nzvimbo iyo ichava nzvimbo yedzimba dzavo uye ichava nzvimbo tsvene yeNzvimbo Inoera. 
Ezekiel45:5 Rimwewo dunhu rinoita gumi ramakiromita rina makiromita maviri ane hafu kureba iine makiromita mashanu kufara, rinofanira kuva ravaRevhi vanoshanda kuTemberi; ndiyo nzvimbo yamaguta avo okuti vagare." 
Ezekiel45:6 Pakavambirana nedunhu rinenge ratsaurwa racho sedunhu rinoera, unofanira kuganhurira guta nzvimbo inoita makiromita maviri ane hafu upamhi iine urefu hunosvika gumi ramakiromita rine hafu." 
Ezekiel45:7 Nyika iri kumativi maviri ose edunhu rinoera ichange iri yashe pamwechete nezvinhu zveguta iroro zvichitevedza dunhu rinoera nezvinhuwo zveguta iroro kumadokero nokumabvazuva zvakangoreba zvakaenzana nedunhu rerimwe ramadzinza zvichienda zvakadaro kubvira kumuganhu wokumadokera kudzamarara kumuganhu wokumabvazuva wenyika. 
Ezekiel45:8 Ndiwo uchava mugove wake iwoyo muIsiraeri. Madzishe angu iwayo haazodzvinyiriri vanhu vangu, asi kutoti vachaita kuti vemba yaIsiraeri vawane nyika maererano namadzinza avo." 
Ezekiel45:9 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Zvakwana, imi madzishe eIsiraeri. Kandai pasi utsinye noudzvinyiriri mutonge vanhu noruenzaniso nourarami. Zvokudzinga vanhu vangu izvi ngazvipere, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Munofanira kuva nezvikero zvakarurama nebhagidhi nomugoro zvakarurama. 
Ezekiel45:11 Bhagidhi racho nomugoro zvinofanira kuva zvakaenzana. Mugoro wacho unofanira kuva namarita makumi maviri ana maviri, uye bhagidhi richifanirawo kuva namarita makumi maviri ane maviri. Marita mazana maviri ane marita makumi maviri ndiwo anofanira kuva mwero wacho chaiwo wokueresa." 
Ezekiel45:12 Mari yeshekeri inofanira kuita zana ramagiramu rina magiramu makumi maviri uye mashekeri mashanu achiita makumi mashanu amagiramu ane magiramu manomwe ane hafu uyewo gumi ramashekeri richiitawo magiramu zana rine gumi namashanu, minawo renyu rimwechete richiita mamirigiramu makumi matanhatu." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Mupiro wenyu unofanira kuva wakadai sezvizvi: Pamabhagidhi gumi ekoroni munobvisa marita matatu ana makumi matanhatu amamiririta ane mamiririta matanhatu. Pagumi ramabhagidhi ebhari, munobvisawo marita matatu ane makumi matanhatu emamiririta ane mamiririta matanhatu." 
Ezekiel45:14 Mafuta acho anozoramba achingovapo chete anofanira kuti aite marita maviri ane mamiririta makumi maviri pamazana maviri amarita ane marita makumi maviri. (Mwero wokupimisa wainzi koru nounonzi homa yakafanana mumwe nomumwe wakanga uchiita sewainziwo bhati waive negumi ramabhagidhi.) 
Ezekiel45:15 Kubva mumhuri dzavaIsiraeri, padanga roga roga remazana maviri ehwai ngapabviswe hwai imwechete. “Iyoyi ndiyo mipiro yekoroni, nemipiro yokupisa, nemipiro yokuwadzana iri mipiro yokupfupira zvitadzo. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Vanhu vose muIsiraeri vanofanira kupa mupiro iwoyo kunashe. 
Ezekiel45:17 Ishe ndiye achave nebasa rokuona kuti pane mipiro yokupisa, mipiro yekoroni nemipiro yokuteura pamazuva makuru, naPakugara kweMwedzi, nepamaSabata napamazuva ose makuru akatemwa emba yaIsiraeri. Ibasa rake rokuona kuti pane mipiro yokupfupira zvitadzo nemipiro yekoroni nemipiro yokupisa nemipiro yokuwadzana iri mipiro yokuripira zvitadzo zvemba yaIsiraeri.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Pamwedzi wokutanga pazuva rokutanga romwedzi, unofanira kutora handira ichiri duku isina chinoshoreka pairi uchenure Nzvimbo Inoera." 
Ezekiel45:19 Mupristi anotora rimwe ropa rechibayiro chokupfupira zvitadzo arizore pamagwatidziro eTemberi nepamakona mana echimbimbi chokunze cheatari napamapango paSuo Guru renhandare yomukati. 
Ezekiel45:20 Unofanira kuita izvozvi pazuva rechinomwe remwedzi uchiitira ani naani zvake anenge atadzira Mwari mukukanganisa kana mukusaziva. Saizvozvo ucharipira zvitadzo zvomuTemberi. 
Ezekiel45:21 “Mumwedzi wokutanga pazuva regumi nerechina muchachengeta Zuva Guru rePasika. Kwamazuva manomwe kunofanira kudyiwa chingwa chisina mbiriso. 
Ezekiel45:22 Pazuva iroro ishe anofanira kuzviwanira iye nevanhu vose venyika handira ndiki yokupfupira zvitadzo. 
Ezekiel45:23 Pamazuva manomwe iwayo mumazuva makuru anofanira kuti pave nenzombe dzichiri diki nomwe, nehondohwe nomwe dzisina chinoshoreka dzomupiro wokupisa kuna Tenzi pazuva nezuva mumazuva manomwe iwayo, uyewo zuva nezuva gotora rokupfupira zvitadzo." 
Ezekiel45:24 Anofanira kuona kuti pane bhagidhi roupfu pahandira yoga yoga uye bhagidhi roupfu pahondohwe imwe neimwe namarita mana amafuta eorivhi pabhagidhi roga roga pamupiro wembesanwa. 
Ezekiel45:25 Mumwedzi wechinomwe pamusi wegumi nechishanu womwedzi iwoyo uye napamazuva manomwe ezuva guru iroro, anofanira kuona kuti zvimwechetezvo zvavepo kuitira mipiro yokupirira zvitadzo nemipiro yokupisa nemipiro yembesanwa uye neyamafuta.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Suo Guru romunhandare yomukati rakatarisa kumabvazuva rinofanira kupfigwa pamazuva matanhatu ebasa. Asi pazuva reSabata racho rinofanira kuzarurwa uye napaZuva Guru roKugara kwoMwedzi rinofanira kuzarurwa." 
Ezekiel46:2 Ishe anosungirwa kupinda nokukamba kapaSuo Guru ari nechokunze omira panzvimbo pake amire nebango repaSuo Guru iroro. Vapristi vanosungirwa kupira mupiro wake wokupisa nomupiro wake wokuwadzana agopfugama ari kumusuo kweSuo Guru iroro. Anofanira kuzobuda asi Suo Guru racho harifaniri kuzarirwa kusvikira mumanheru. 
Ezekiel46:3 Vanhu venyika iyoyo vanosungirwa kupfugama pamusuo weSuo Guru iroro pana Tenzi pamazuva eSabata napaMazuva Makuru okugara kweMwedzi. 
Ezekiel46:4 Mupiro wokupisa unopirwa nashe kuna Tenzi pazuva reSabata ndowehwayana nhanhatu dzisina chinoshoreka padziri nehondohwe isinawo chinoshoreka pairi," 
Ezekiel46:5 uyewo mupiro woupfu hwembesanwa nehondohwe yazvo hunofanira kuva bhagidhi kwouya mupiro woupfu hwembesanwa nehwayana dzacho uchava sapaanogona napo pamwechete namarita mana amafuta eorivhi pabhagidhi. 
Ezekiel46:6 PaZuva Guru roKugara kwoMwedzi anosungirwa kupira handira ichiri duku isina chinoshoreka pairi nehwayana nhanhatu nehondohwe dzisina chinoshoreka padziri. 
Ezekiel46:7 Anofanira kuona kuti pave nebhagidhi roupfu nehandira yacho uye bhagidhiwo roupfu nehondohwe uyewo nehwayana sapaanogonawo napo pamwechete namarita mana amafuta eorivhi pabhagidhi. 
Ezekiel46:8 Panopinda ishe anosungirwa kupinda nokukamba kapaSuo Guru uye anofanira kuzobuda nokumwecheteko. 
Ezekiel46:9 “Panouya vanhu venyika iyoyo pana Tenzi, pamazuva makuru akatemwa, anenge apinda nokuSuo Guru rokuchamhembe kuzonamata anosungirwa kubuda neSuo Guru rokumaodzanyemba. Anenge apindawo nokuSuo Guru rokumaodzanyemba ngaandobuda neSuo Guru rokuchamhembe. Hakuna anofanira kudzoka nokuSuo Guru kwaanenge ambopinda nako asi kutoti munhu ose anofanira kuramba achingoenda chete mberi." 
Ezekiel46:10 Pavanopinda pacho, ishe anofanira kupinda pamwechete navo, pavanozobudawo, iye anofanira kubuda." 
Ezekiel46:11 Pamazuva makuru napamwaka yakatemwa, mupiro woupfu hwembesanwa nehandira ichiri duku unofanira kuva bhagidhi kwouya hondohwe nebhagidhi kwozoti hwayana sapaanogona napo kupa pamwechete namarita maviri amafuta eorivhi." 
Ezekiel46:12 Ishe paanoona kuti pave nomupiro wokupa nechido, ungave mupiro wokupisa kana mipiro yokuwadzana somupiro wokupa nechido kuna Tenzi, Suo Guru rakatarisa kumabvazuva acharizarurirwa. Ipapo anofanira kupira mipiro yake yokupisa kana mupiro wake wokuwadzana sezvaanoita musi weSabata. Ndipo paanozobuda, kana aenda Suo Guru robva razarirwa." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Anofanira kuita kuti pave nehwayana ine gore rimwechete isina chinoshoreka yomupiro wokupisira kuna Tenzi zuva nezuva. Ngaaitewo kuti uvepo mangwanani oga oga. 
Ezekiel46:14 Anosungirwa kuita kuti pave nomupiro wembesanwa pamwechete nawo mangwanani oga oga, hupfu hunokaroita marita mana uye mafuta eorivhi anokaroita marita maviri okunyava upfu hwacho hwekoroni somupiro wembesanwa wokupira kuna Tenzi. Iwoyu ndiwo murao womupiro wokupisa unoramba uchiitwa." 
Ezekiel46:15 Nokudaro hwayana iyoyo nomupiro woupfu hwembesanwa namafuta eorivhi zvinofanira kuitwa kuti zvivepo mangwanani oga oga kuitira kuti mupiro wokupisa urambe uchiitwa.” 
Ezekiel46:16 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Kana ishe akapa chipo kumwanakomana wake upi zvake chinobva panhaka yake chichava chavanakomana vake. Inhaka yavo yavakaita zvokusiyirwa." 
Ezekiel46:17 Asi kana ishe apa chipo chacho chichibva panhaka yake achipa mumwe wavaranda vake, chichava chomuranda iyeyo kusvikira pagore rorusununguko. Ipapo ndipo pachinozodzoserwa kunashe. Vanakomana vake chete ndivo zvavo vangagone kuramba vakachengeta chipo chenhaka yake." 
Ezekiel46:18 Ishe haafaniri kutora kai zvako kenhaka yavanhu ivava achivadzinga panyika yavo. Anosungirwa kupa vanakomana vake nhaka yavo yaanoita zvokubvisa pazvinhu zvake iye pachake kuitira kuti parege kuva kana nomumwe wavanhu vangu anozotorerwa zvinhu zvake.” 
Ezekiel46:19 Akazondiunza napamusuo waiva padivi peSuo Guru kumutsara wokuchamhembe wedzimba dzinoera dzavapristi. Ipapo ndakaona imwe nzvimbo kumucheto kwadzo kwokupedzisira chaiko kumadokero. 
Ezekiel46:20 Iye akabva anditi, “Iyoyi ndiyo nzvimbo inofanira kubikwa chibayiro chokuripira mhosva nomupiro wokupirira zvitadzo uye ndipo pavanosungirwa kubikira mupiro woupfu hwembesanwa kuitira kuti varege kuiburitsa kunhandare yokunze vangadaro vakaitisa vanhu zvinhu zvinoera.”" 
Ezekiel46:21 Akazondiunza kumberi kunhandare yokunze akaenda neni kumativi mana enhandare iyoyo. Pakona yoga yoga yenhandare iyoyo pakange paine ruvanze. 
Ezekiel46:22 Mukona ina dzenhandare iyoyo maiva nezvivanze zviduku zvinoita mamita makumi maviri kureba noupamhi hunoita mamita gumi namashanu, pahuna hwazvo kudaro zvakanga zvakaenzana." 
Ezekiel46:23 Nechomukati kutenderera zvivanze izvozvo, rumwe norumwe rwakanga rwakati chechetere nomutsara wamabwe paine zvoto zvakaitwa nechepasi pemitsara yacho kutenderera." 
Ezekiel46:24 Iye ndokubva ati kwandiri, “Idzodzi idzi ndodzimba dzokubikira, ndimo munozobikirwa zvibayiro zvavanhu ava navanhu vanoshanda paTemberi.”" 
Ezekiel47:1 Akazodzokera neni kumusuo weTemberi, onei mvura ichibuda pazasi pomusuo weTemberi yakananga kumabvazuva (nokuti Temberi yakanga yakatarisa kumabvazuva.) Zvino mvura iyoyo yaiyerera pasi ichibva nechapazasi pamucheto pakadziva kumaodzanyemba kwomusuo weTemberi, nechokumaodzanyemba kweatari." 
Ezekiel47:2 Akazondiburitsa kunze nokuSuo Guru rokuchamhembe akatenderera neni kunze ikoko kuSuo Guru rokunze rakatarisa kumabvazuva. Mvura yaibuda kudivi rokumaodzanyemba. 
Ezekiel47:3 Akananga kumabvazuva aine tambo yokueresa mumaoko akabva aera panoita mazana mashanu amamita ndokubva afamba neni nomumvura imomo iyo yakanga ichinyudza zvokusvika muchiziso chegumbo. 
Ezekiel47:4 Akaerazve mamwe mazana mashanu emamita akafamba neni nomumvura imomo, iyo yakanga ichinyudza zvokusvika mumabvi. Akaerawo mamwe mamita mazana mashanu akabva ofamba neni nomumvura macho, yakanga zvino yosvika muchiuno." 
Ezekiel47:5 Akazoerazve mamwe mazana mashanu amamita, rwakanga rwatova rukova rwandakanga ndisisakwanise kuyambuka nokuti mvura yakanga yakwira. Yakanga yawanda zvokuti munhu aitogona kushambira mairi rwava rukova rusisayambukiki." 
Ezekiel47:6 Akazonditi, “Nhaiwe mwanakomana womunhu, waona here izvi?” Akabva adzokera neni achitevedza mahombekombe orukova irworwo." 
Ezekiel47:7 Pandaidzoka kudaro, ndakaona kumativi erwizi rwacho miti yakawanda kwazvo uku nokuku." 
Ezekiel47:8 Akati kwandiri, “Mvura iyoyi inoyerera yakananga kuruwa rwamabvazuva ichidzika nokuArabha. Kana yapinda mugungwa inoita kuti mvura yacho inake." 
Ezekiel47:9 Kwose kunoyerera rwizi irworwo, zvipenyu zvose zvinoshambira zvichararama. Imomo muchava nehove dzakawanda nokuti mvura iyoyi inoenda imomo kundoita kuti mvura yegungwa inake. Ipapo zvinhu zvose zvichararama kwose kunosvika rwizi urwu." 
Ezekiel47:10 Varauri vehove vachamira pedyo negungwa iroro; kubvira kukasipiti kuEnigedhi kusvikira kukasipiti keEnigiraimu pachange pari nzvimbo yokutambanudzira mimbure, hove dzayo dziri dzemhando dzakasiyana kwazvo sehove dzokugungwa guru." 
Ezekiel47:11 Asi zvidzengerere zvarwo zvemvura namajakwi haazova mvura yakanaka zvichasiyiwa kuri kuitira munyu. 
Ezekiel47:12 Mumahombekombe kumativi erwizi rwacho ose ari maviri kuchamera miti yamarudzi ose yemichero. Mashizha ayo haazosvava kana michero yayo kukuva. Asi kutoti ichabereka michero mitsva mwedzi nomwedzi nokuti mvura yayo inoyerera ichibva muNzvimbo Inoera. Michero yayo ichava chokudya, mashizha ayo ari mushonga wokurapisa.”" 
Ezekiel47:13 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Iyi ndiyo miganhu yamuchakamuranisa nayo nyika yenhaka pakati pamadzinza gumi namaviri eIsiraeri. RokwaJosefi richawana migove miviri." 
Ezekiel47:14 Munofanira kuikamuranisa zvakaenzana. Ndakatsidzira kuzoipa kumadzibaba enyu, zvino nyika iyoyi ichava mumaoko menyu senhaka yenyu." 
Ezekiel47:15 “Uyu ndomuganhu wenyika iyoyi kuchamhembe: “Kutangira kugungwa guru zvichienda nokuHetironi kusvikira pokunge tava kupinda kuHamati nokuZedhadhi 
Ezekiel47:16 nokuBheratati nokuSibhuraimu (iri pamuganhu pakati peDhamasikusi neHamati) kusvikira kuHazerihatikoni iri pamuganhu wokuHaurani. 
Ezekiel47:17 Saka muganhu uchabva kugungwa kudzamara kusvika kuHazerenoni iri kuchamhembe kwemuganhu wokuDhamasikusi nokumuganhu wokuHamati kuchamhembe. Ikoku ndokuchave kudivi rokuchamhembe kwomuganhu. 
Ezekiel47:18 “Kudivi rokumabvazuva, muganhu wacho uchadimura napakati peHaurani neDhamasikusi uchitevedza rwizi rwaJorodhani pakati peGireadhi nenyika yeIsiraeri kusvikira kuGungwa roKumabvazuva kusvikira kuTamari. Ndouchava muganhu wokumabvazuva iwoyu." 
Ezekiel47:19 “Kudivi rokumaodzanyemba, uchabvira kuTamari kudzamara kumvura yokuMeribhakadheshi wotevedza kaKova keIjipiti kusvikira kuGungwa Guru. Iwoyu ndomuganhu wacho wokumaodzanyemba." 
Ezekiel47:20 “Kudivi rokumadokero, Gungwa Guru ndiro richava muganhu wacho kusvikira pamwe pakatarisana nokunge tava kusvika kuHamati. Ndiro richava divi rokumadokero." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Ndokukamurirana kwamuchaita nyika iyoyi pakati penyu zvichienderanawo namadzinza eIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel47:22 Munofanira kuigova senhaka yenyu iyemi navatorwa vagere mamuri vakatoberekawo vana pakati penyu. Kwamuri imi vachange vakangoita savana vevhu vomuIsiraeri. Vanofanira kugoverwa pamwechete nemi mugove wenhaka pakati pemadzinza eIsiraeri. 
Ezekiel47:23 Mudzinza ripi zvaro munenge mugere mutorwa iyeyo ndimo maanopiwa nhaka yake.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel48:1 Aya ndiwo madzinza acho tichibvira kumuganho wokuchamhembe, kubva kugungwa tichienda nokuHetironi woenda nokwokunge tavakupinda muHamati kundosvika Hazarenoni (guta riri kumuganhu wokuchamhembe yeDhamasikusi kwakatarisana neHamati) ichibvira kumabvazuva ichienda kumadokero, dzinza rokwaDhani, mugove mumwechete." 
Ezekiel48:2 Dzinza rokwaAsheri, mugove mumwechete, unobvira kumuganhu wokumabvazuva kusvikira kumuganhu wokumavirira wakabatana nenyika yokwaDhani." 
Ezekiel48:3 Dzinza rokwaNafutari, mugove mumwechete, unobvira kumabvazuva kudakara kumadokero wakabatana nenyika yokwaAsheri." 
Ezekiel48:4 Dzinzawo rokwaManase, mugove mumwechete, unobvira kumabvazuva kudzamara kumavirira wakabatana nenyika yokwaNafutari." 
Ezekiel48:5 Dzinza rokwaEfuremu, mugove mumwechetewo, unobvira kumabvazuva kudzamara kumadokero wakabatana nenyika yokwaManase." 
Ezekiel48:6 Dzinza rokwaRubheni mugove mumwechete unobvira kumabvazuva kudzamara kumavirira wakabatana nenyika yokwaEfuremu. 
Ezekiel48:7 Dzinza rokwaJudha mugovewo mumwechete unobvira kumabvazuva kudzikara kumadokero wakabatana nenyika yokwaRubheni. 
Ezekiel48:8 Nyika yokwaJudha inofanira kunge yakabatana nedunhu riya ramuchatsaura rigochengetedzwa rinobvira kumabvazuva kusvikira kumavirira riya rina upamhi hunoita gumi ramakiromita rine makiromita maviri ane hafu. Rinenge rakareba sokureba kwakangoitawo mumwe womugove yamadzinza kubvira kumabvazuva kusvikira kumadokero iine Nzvimbo Inoera mukati mayo. 
Ezekiel48:9 Dunhu ramuchatsaurira Tenzi rinofanira kuita makiromita gumi namaviri ane hafu kureba, kufara kwacho kuchiita gumi ramakiromita." 
Ezekiel48:10 Iyoyi ndoichava migove yedunhu rinoera: vapristi vanofanira kuva nomugove wakareba kuita makiromita gumi namaviri ane, chikamu chepakati nepakati chekiromita kudivi rokuchamhembe upamhi hwacho kudivi rokumadokero huchiita makiromita mashanu uye kudivi rokumabvazuva kuchiitawo makiromita mashanu, kurebawo kwedivi rokumaodzanyemba kuchiita gumi ramakiromita rina makiromita maviri ane chikamu chepakati nepakati chekiromita, Nzvimbo Inoera yaTenzi iri pakati payo." 
Ezekiel48:11 Ipapa panofanira kuva pavapristi vakateketererwa kuna Mwari, vanakomana vokwaZadhoki vakaramba vari pabasa rangu, vasina kuenda mutome, vanhu veIsiraeri pavakaenda mutome sezvakaitwa navaRevhi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Pachava pavo, chiri chikamu chavakapiwa chinobva panzvimbo inoera kwazvo yakabatana nenyika yavaRevhi." 
Ezekiel48:13 VaRevhi vachava nemugove wavo wenyika yakavambirana neyavapristi inoita makiromita gumi namaviri ane hafu kureba iine upamhi hunoita makiromita mashanu. Kureba kwayo kwose kuchaita makiromita gumi namaviri ane hafu iine upamhi hunoita makiromita mashanu. 
Ezekiel48:14 Havafaniri kuitengesa kana kutsinhanisa kana kachidimbu zvako kayo. Havafaniri kurasa mugove iwoyu wedunhu irori rakakosha nokuti idhunhu rinoereserwa Tenzi. 
Ezekiel48:15 Panenge pasara pacho pakafara kuita makiromita mashanu uye pakareba kuita makiromita gumi namaviri ane hafu, panofanira kuva pokushandiswawo zvapo neguta iroro kuita pokugara uye kuva mafuro aro." 
Ezekiel48:16 Zvino aya ndomakuriro aichange yakaita, kudivi rokuchamhembe kunoita makiromita maviri ana mamita mazana maviri namakumi mashanu. Kudivi rokumaodzanyemba kuchaitawo makiromita maviri ana mamita mazana maviri namakumi mashanu. Kudiviwo rokumabvamazuva kuchange kuchiita makiromita maviri ana mamita mazana maviri ana makumi mashanu, kudivi rokumavirira kuchiita makiromita maviri ane mamitawo mazana maviri ane makumiwo mashanu." 
Ezekiel48:17 Guta iroro richava namafuro akadai izvi, kuchamhembe kuchaita zana ramamita rina mamita makumi maviri namashanu uye kumaodzanyemba kuchiitawo zana ramamita rina mamitawo makumi maviri namashanu uyewo kumabvazuva kuriwo zana ramamita rina makumi maviri amamita ana mamita mashanuwo kwozoti kumadokero kuchiitawo zana ramamita rine mamitawo makumi maviri ane mashanu." 
Ezekiel48:18 Panenge pasara uchitevedza kwakareba kwacho kwedunhu pachange pachiita makiromita mashanu kumabvazuva uye makiromita mashanu kumavirira. Inenge ichitevedza dunhu rinoera, michero yayo ichava kudya kwavashandi vomuguta iroro." 
Ezekiel48:19 Vashandi vomuguta vanobva kumadzinza ose eIsiraeri vacharimamo. 
Ezekiel48:20 Dunhu iroro rose ramuchasarudza rinofanira kunge rakaenzana mativi ose divi richiita makiromita gumi namaviri ane hafu zvichisanganisira dunhu rinoera pamwechete nenzvimbo yeguta iroro. 
Ezekiel48:21 Ndima yose inosara kumativi maviri edunhu rinoera nenzvimbo yeguta iroro inofanira kuva yashe ichitangira paya panoita makiromita gumi namaviri nehafu padunhu rinoera riya ichindosvika kumuganhu wokumabvazuva, kwouya kumadokero ichitangirawo paya panoitawo makiromita gumi namaviri ane hafu ichindosvika kumuganhu wokumadokero yakatevedza migove yenyika dzamadzinza iwayo, ichava nyika yashe. Kubvisa dunhu riya rinoera neNzvimbo Inoera yeTemberi iri mukati maro" 
Ezekiel48:22 kubvisawo nyika yavaRevhi nenzvimbo yeguta racho zviri pakati penyika yomugove washe, zvimwe zvose izvi, zviri pakati pemiganhu yekwaJudha naBhenjamini ndezvashe." 
Ezekiel48:23 Sezvakangoita mamwe madzinza ose, kubva kumabvazuva kusvika kumadokero, dzinza rokwaBhenjamini rinowana mugove mumwechete." 
Ezekiel48:24 Dzinza rokwaSimioni rinowana mugove waro mumwechete unobvira kumabvazuva kusvika kumadokero wakabatana nenyika yokwaBhenjamini. 
Ezekiel48:25 Dzinza rokwaIsakari rinowana mugove mumwechete unobvira kumabvazuva kusvika kumadokero wakabatana nenyika yokwaSimioni. 
Ezekiel48:26 Dzinza rokwaZebhuroni rinowana mugove mumwechete unobvira kumabvazuva kusvika kumavirira wakabatana nenyika yokwaIsakari. 
Ezekiel48:27 Dzinza rokwaGadhi rinowanawo mugove mumwechete unobvira kumabvazuva kusvika kumavirira wakabatana nenyika yokwaZebhuroni. 
Ezekiel48:28 Muganhu wenyika yokwaGadhi nedivi rokuNegevhu, kumaodzanyemba, muganhu wokumaodzanyemba uchatangira kuTamari wonanga kumvura yokuMeribhakadheshi wobva waenda nokuKakova keIjipiti kundosvika kuGungwa Guru." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Ndiyo nyika yacho iyi yamuchagovera senhaka kumadzinza eIsiraeri. Iyoyi ndiyo migove yakasiyana-siyana yavo.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi Mwari. 
Ezekiel48:30 Nzvimbo dzokubuda nadzo muguta ndidzo idzi: dzinoti: Kuchamhembe kwacho kunoita makiromita maviri ana mamita mazana maviri ane makumi mashanu kwaerwa 
Ezekiel48:31 kunova nemisuo mikuru mitatu inoti, Suo Guru rokwaRubheni neSuo Guru rokwaJudha neSuo Guru rokwaRevhi, misuo mikuru iyoyo ichatumidzwa mazita amadzinza eIsiraeri." 
Ezekiel48:32 Kwouya kumabvazuva kuchange kuchiita makiromita maviri ana mamita mazana maviri namakumi mashanu, ngakuve nemisuo mikuru mitatu inoti Suo Guru rokwaJosefi neSuo Guru rokwaBhenjamini neSuo Guru rokwaDhani." 
Ezekiel48:33 Kwouyawo kumaodzanyemba, kwacho kunenge kuchisvika makiromita maviri ana mazana maviri emamita ane mamita makumi mashanu kuve nemisuo mikuru mitatu inoti, Suo Guru rokwaSimioni neSuo Guru rokwaIsakari neSuo Guru rokwaZebhuruni." 
Ezekiel48:34 Kozouya kumadokero, kunoitawo makiromita maviri ana mazana maviri amamita ana mamita makumi mashanu, kuchaita misuo mikuru mitatuwo inoti, Suo Guru rokwaGadhi neSuo Guru rokwaAsheri neSuo Guru rokwaNafutari." 
Ezekiel48:35 Kureba kweguta iroro rose kuritenderera, kuchange kuchiita makiromita mapfumbamwe. Izvozvo zita reguta rinenge rava kuzonzi, “Tenziaripo.”" 
Daniel1:1 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwaJehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha, Nebhukadhineza mambo weBhabhironi akauya kuguta reJerusaremu akarikomba," 
Daniel1:2 Tenzi akabva aita kuti Jehoyakimu mambo wokwaJudha akurirwe atorerwe mimwe midziyo yomuTemberi yaMwari. Nebhukadhineza akaenda nazvo kunyika yeShinari kuTemberi yake akarongedza midziyo iyoyo mumba maichengeterwa zvinhu zvamwari wake. 
Daniel1:3 Mambo akaudza mumwe muyuniki aiva muranda wake mukuru ainzi Ashipenazi kuti auye navamwe vanhu vechiIsiraeri asi vaifanira kuva vokumbahuru vane chiremera," 
Daniel1:4 uye vari majaya asina chinoshoreka ane chimiro chakarurama dziri nyanzvi chaidzo dzino ungwaru hwose zvahwo, uyewo vari vanhu vano ruzivo vanonzwisisa zvokudzidza, vanogona kushandawo mumuzinda wamambo. Akamuti avadzidzise zvinyorwa zvorurimi rwechiKaridhea." 
Daniel1:5 Mambo akarayira kuti zuva nezuva vapote vachipiwawo mugove wechokudya chakanaka chaidyiwa namambo newaini yaainwa. Vaizoita makore matatu vachidzidziswa, mushure menguva iyoyo, ndivo vaizenge vava vokushanda pana mambo." 
Daniel1:6 Pakati pamajaya iwaya paivawo naDhanieri naHananiya naMishaeri naAzariya vedzinza rokwaJudha. 
Daniel1:7 Mukuru wavayuniki, akavapa mamwe mazita. Akapa Dhanieri zita rokuti Bheriteshaza, Hananiya akamutumidza rokuti Shadhiraki. Akapawo Mishaeri zita rokuti Meshaki ndokutumidza Azariya zita rokuti Abhedhinego." 
Daniel1:8 Asi Dhanieri akazviti nechomumwoyo handimboda zvangu kuzvin'oresa nechokudya chamambo chakanakisisa kana newaini yaanonwa. Naizvozvo akakumbira muyuniki mukuru kuti amubvumire zvake kusazvin'oresa. 
Daniel1:9 Ipapo Mwari akaita kuti Dhanieri aitirwe tsiye nyoro akanzwirwa ngoni nomuyuniki, mukuru uya." 
Daniel1:10 Mukuru wavayuniki iyeyo akati kuna Dhanieri, “Chandinotya ndechokuti dai changamire wangu, ivo mambo, vakatema kuti imi mupiwe chokudya nechokunwa chenyu vazokuonai imi mapera kwazvo muviri masiyana nevechidiki vezera renyu. Ipapo mungatondidimurisa musoro namambo.”" 
Daniel1:11 Dhanieri akataura kuno mumwe mutariri akanga apiwa basa nomuyuniki uya mukuru rokuona zvavanaDhanieri naHananiya naMishaeri naAzariya kuti," 
Daniel1:12 “Dai mukambotiedza isu varanda venyu kwamazuva gumi, mombotirega tichipiwa miriwo yokudya nemvura yokunwa." 
Daniel1:13 Ipapo imi mugocherechedza muone kutarisika kwatichange tava kuita nokutarisika kuchange kuchiita majaya aya anodya chokudya chakanaka chokwamambo. Imimi mozoitawo nesu varanda venyu, somuonero wamunenge maita.”" 
Daniel1:14 Saizvozvo iye akabvuma zvavakareva izvi ndokumbovaedza kwegumi remazuva. 
Daniel1:15 Mushure memazuva gumi iwayo, pakaonekwa kuti vakanga vava kutarisika zvakanaka uye vatoita muviri kudarika majaya mamwe ose aya akanga achidya chokudya chakanaka chokwamambo." 
Daniel1:16 Nokudaro mutariri uya akabva abvisa chokudya chiya chakanaka newaini yavaifanira kuti vanwe ndokubva avakuvapa miriwo. 
Daniel1:17 Majaya iwaya ari mana kudaro, Mwari, akaapa ruzivo nounyanzvi hwezvezvinyorwa zvose noungwaru uye Dhanieri ainzwisisa zvose zviratidzo nezviroto." 
Daniel1:18 Kuzoti nguva iya yapera, mambo paakati majaya iwayo auyiwe nawo, muyuniki uya, mukuru akavaunza makanga muina Nebhukadhineza." 
Daniel1:19 Mambo akataura navo. Zvino pakati pavo vose hapana mumwe akanga akaita saDhanieri naHananiya naMishaeri naAzariya. Naizvozvo vakabva vava vokushanda pana mambo. 
Daniel1:20 Panyaya yose yose zvayo painge pava kutsvakwa ungwaru nouchenjeri pazvinhu zvavainge vabvunzwa namambo, mambo aiona kuti vaiva vari nani zvokutopeta kagumi vamapipi kana vamaminimini vaiva munyika dzose dzoumambo hwake." 
Daniel1:21 Dhanieri akaramba aripo kusvikira gore rechiposhi rokutonga kwamambo Sairasi. 
Daniel2:1 Mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaNebhukadhineza, iye Nebhukadhineza akarota hope akashushikana mumwoyo zvikamushayisa hope." 
Daniel2:2 Mambo akabva ati vamapipi navamaminimini navanhu vamakona navaKaridhea vadaidzwe kuzodudzira mambo hope dzake. Saizvozvowo vakauya vakamira pana mambo. 
Daniel2:3 Mambo akavati, “Ndarota hope, zvino ndiri kutambura mumwoyo mangu kuti ndizive hope dzacho.”" 
Daniel2:4 VaKaridhea vakabva vati kuna mambo muchiArameiki, “Mambo! Ngazvirambe zvakadaro muchitonga! Tirondedzerei henyu hope dzacho isu varanda venyu, tichadudzira zvadzinoreva.”" 
Daniel2:5 Mambo akapindura vaKaridhea kuti, “Zvandinoreva ndezvechokwadi. Kana imi mukarega kundizivisa hope idzodzo, nokudzidudzira kwacho muchabvamburwa kuitwa zvidimbu zvidimbu. Misha yenyu ichisara yava matongo." 
Daniel2:6 Asi mukandirondedzera hope dzacho nezvadzinoreva, ndichakupai zvipo nemibayiro noukuru hwakakura kwazvo. Naizvozvo chinditaurirai hope idzodzo nedudziro yadzo.”" 
Daniel2:7 Vakapindurazve mambo kuti, “Mambo rondedzerai henyu hope dzacho isu varanda venyu, tikududzirei zvadzinoreva.”" 
Daniel2:8 Mambo ndokuti, “Ndazonyatsoziva zvino kuti mava kungovemberedza nguva nokuti maona kuti zvandareva ndezvechokwadi" 
Daniel2:9 zvokuti kana imi mukarega kundizivisa hope idzodzo, chenyu chasara chirango, chimwechete chete. Heya matobvumirana kuzonditaurira zvokunyepa nenyaya dzakaora kusvikira mamiriro ezvinhu asanduka. Naizvozvo ndirondedzerei hope idzodzo ndibva ndazivawo kuti kana kudzidudzira munogona.”" 
Daniel2:10 VaKaridhea vakapindura mambo vachiti, “Hakuna kana nomunhu pasi pano angagone kuita zviri kudiwa namambo izvi nokuti hakunawo changamire mambo chaiye ane simba ati ambobvunza zvakadai izvi kuna ani zvake wamapipi kana wamaminimini kunyange kumuKaridhea upi zvake." 
Daniel2:11 Izvi zvakumbirwa namambo, zvakaoma uye hakuna angagone kuzviisa pachena kuna mambo, asi kutoti vamwari chete vasingaiti musha mukati mavanhu.”" 
Daniel2:12 Pamusana paizvozvi mambo akashatirwa akaviruka kwazvo nehasha akapa chirevo chokuti: Vachenjeri vose veBhabhironi ngavaurayiwe. 
Daniel2:13 Nokudaro chirevo ichochi chokuti: vachenjeri vanofanira kuti vaurayiwe, chakafamba. Vakatsvagawo Dhanieri neshamwari dzake kuti vavauraye." 
Daniel2:14 Ipapo Dhanieri akapa mhinduro yakanyatsofungwa ine uchenjeri chaihwo kuna Arioku mukuru mukuru wavachengetedzi vamambo uyewo munhu akanga auya kuzouraya vachenjeri veBhabhironi. 
Daniel2:15 Dhanieri akati kuna Arioku mukuru mukuru wokwamambo, “Zvaita sei kuti chirevo chamambo chibva chaoma kudai?” Arioku ndokuzivisa Dhanieri nyaya yacho." 
Daniel2:16 Dhanieri akapinda akandoteterera kuna mambo kuti amutaurire nguva yaaizopa mambo dudziro yacho. 
Daniel2:17 Dhanieri akabva aenda kumba kwake akazivisawo nyaya iyoyo shamwari dzake dziya vanaHananiya naMishaeri naAzariya. 
Daniel2:18 Akavataurira kuti vakumbire Mwari Wedenga agovanzwirawo tsitsi nezvechinhu chakavanzika ichi, kuitira kuti Dhanieri neshamwari dzake varege kuparadzwa pamwechete navamwe vangwaru vose veBhabhironi." 
Daniel2:19 Ndipo pakazoziviswa Dhanieri usiku chakavanzika chacho muchiratidzo, ndokubva Dhanieri arumbidza Mwari Wedenga." 
Daniel2:20 Dhanieri akati: “Zita raMwari ngarirumbidzwe narini narini wose ndiye mwene woungwaru nesimba. 
Daniel2:21 “Anosandura nguva nemwaka; anobvisa madzimambo uye anogadzawo madzimambo; anopa uchenjeri kuna vangwaru noruzivo kuvanhu vanonzwisisa. 
Daniel2:22 “Anoisa pachena zvinhu zvakadzama, zvinhu zvakavanzika. Anozviziva zviri murima iye chiedza ndipo pamusha." 
Daniel2:23 “Ndinokutendai ndichikurumbidzai imi Mwari wamadzibaba angu nokuti makandipa ungwaru nesimba mukandizivisawo zvatakakukumbirai nokuti matizivisa imi nyaya iyi yamambo.” 
Daniel2:24 Naizvozvo Dhanieri akaenda kuna Arioku uya akanga apiwa namambo basa rokuparadza vangwaru veBhabhironi. Akaenda akamutaurira kuti, “Chiregai zvenyu kuparadza vangwaru veBhabhironi. Ndisvitseiwo kuna mambo nditsanangurire mambo.”" 
Daniel2:25 Arioku akabva akurumidzawo kusvitsa Dhanieri pana mambo akasuma kuna mambo achiti, “Ndazowana munhu mukati menhapwa dzakatapwa kwaJudha anogona kuzivisa mambo dudziro iya.”" 
Daniel2:26 Mambo akabvunza Dhanieri uya akanga ava kunzi Bheriteshaza kuti, “Unogona here kundizivisa hope dzandakarota nedudziro yadzo?”" 
Daniel2:27 Dhanieri akadaira kuna mambo achiti, “Hakuna vangwaru kana vanhu vamapipi kana vamaminimini kunyange nyanzvi dzokufembera nenyenyedzi, vangagone kuonesa kuna mambo chakavanzika ichi chakakumbirwa namambo." 
Daniel2:28 “Asi kudenga uku kuna Mwari! Ndiye anoisa pachena zvakavanzika, akatozozivisawo imi mambo Nebhukadhineza zvichaveko mune ramangwana. Hope dzamakarota ndedzidzi idzi nezviratidzo zvakauya mumusoro menyu murere zvenyu pamubhedha ndezvizvi." 
Daniel2:29 Kwakauya kwamuri imi mambo murere zvenyu pamubhedha pfungwa dzezvichauya mune ramangwana, iye anodudzira zvakavanzika achikuzivisai zvinhu zvichazovapo." 
Daniel2:30 Asi zvakavanzika izvozvi hazvina kuoneswa kwandiri pamusana pokuti ini ndini ndazova muchenjeri chaiye kupfuura vapenyu vose. Asi zvangoitirwa kuti mambo aziviswe dudziro yacho uye kuti mugonzwisisa pfungwa dzakasvika mumusoro menyu. 
Daniel2:31 “Mambo, imi makatarisa mukaona, hero zimufananidzo guru. Zimufananidzo iroro rakanga rakasimba chaizvo richipenya zvakanyanyisa kwazvo rimire mberi kwenyu richityisa kutarisa." 
Daniel2:32 Musoro wezimufananidzo irori wakanga uri wendarama chaiyo yakanakisisa, dundundu raro namaoko ari esirivha, dumbu racho nezvidya zvakanga zviri zvendarira, makumbo aro ari esimbi." 
Daniel2:33 Tsoka dzaro dzakanga dzakati pamwe ndepesimbi pamwe pomunyakwe. 
Daniel2:34 Makatarisa kudaro, pakapipfurwa dombo risina kudimurwa namaoko omunhu, rikatema zimufananidzo racho patsoka dzaro idzodzo dzaiti apa ndepesimbi apa ndepomunyakwe rikadzipwanyanisa." 
Daniel2:35 Ipapo simbi iya nomunyakwe wacho nendarira yacho nesirivha iya nendarama yacho zvakapwanyaniswa zvose pamwechete, zvikabva zvaita sehundi iri paburiro pachirimo zvikapupurutswa nemhepo zvikatsakatika. Asi dombo riya rakanga ratema mufananidzo uya rakava zigomo guru rikatozara pasi pose." 
Daniel2:36 “Idzodzi ndidzo hope dzacho idzi. Zvino tochikutaurirai, mambo, zvadzinoreva." 
Daniel2:37 Imimi mambo, mambo wamadzimambo, iyemi nyakupiwa naMwari Wedenga dzinyika dzoumambo hwenyu kudai nesimba noukuru nembiri," 
Daniel2:38 mumaoko menyu ndimo makaiswa, vanhu nomhuka dzesango neshiri dzedenga, kwose kwose ikoko kwazvigere, akakuitai kuti muve nohutongi hwazvo zvose izvozvo. Musoro wendarama uya, ndimi wacho." 
Daniel2:39 Mushure menyu, kuchamuka humwe umambo hwakati dererei pane hwenyu, tevere umambo hwechitatu, umambo hwendarira huchazotonga pasi pose zvapo." 
Daniel2:40 Kuchazovawo noumambo hwechina huchange hwakasimba sesimbi inopwanya nokutiwo simbi inopwanya ichinyatsoparadza zvinhu zvose. Uye sesimbi inopwanya, umambo ihwohwo huchipwanya huchiparadza zvose izvozvi." 
Daniel2:41 Sokuonawo kwamakaita tsoka dzacho nezvigunwe zvakati apa pesimbi apa pomunyakwe, umambo ihwohwo huchange huri umambo hune mazvakemazvake. Asi pamwe nepamwe muumambo ihwohwo, pachange pakasungwa noutare sokusimbawo kwesimbi sokuona kwamakaita simbi yakasanganiswa nomunyakwe womuumbi." 
Daniel2:42 Uye zvigunwe sezvazvakanga zvakati pamwe ndepesimbi pamwe ndepomunyakwe saizvozvo umambo hwacho huchange hwakati apa pakasungwa noutare apa zinyekenyeke. 
Daniel2:43 Sokuona kwamakaita simbi yakasanganiswa nomunyakwe, saizvozvo vachaita mawirirano okuroorerana. Asi kunyatsobatana chaikoiko havambobatani, sezvinongoita simbi nomunyakwe zvisingakwanisi kunyatsobatana." 
Daniel2:44 Zvino mumazuva amadzimambo iwayo Mwari Wedenga achagadza umambo husingazofa hwakaparadzwa kunyange kuti masimba ahwo ambokuurirwa kune rumwe rudzi rwavanhu. Huchapwanyanisa nyika dzose dzoumambo ihwohwo huchidzisvitsa kumugumo. Asi ihwo, huchazogara narini narini wose." 
Daniel2:45 Sokuona chaiko kwamakaita kuti dombo rakapipfurwa richibva pagomo risina kudimurwa noruoko rwomunhu, uye kuti rakandopwanyanisa simbi nendarira nomunyakwe nesirivha nendarama zviya, Mwari mukurukuru kwazvo ndiye azivisemi mambo zvinhu zvichazovako mune ramangwana. Hope idzodzi, ihope chaidzo, uye dudziro yacho ndeyechokwadi.”" 
Daniel2:46 Mambo Nebhukadhineza akabva ati nouso pasi kota kota achiremekedza Dhanieri, akati vanhu vapire mupiro norusenzi kuna iye Dhanieri." 
Daniel2:47 Mambo akati kuna Dhanieri: “Zvechokwadi, Mwari wako ndiMwari wavamwari ndiye Changamire wamadzimambo. Mududziri wezvakavanzika nokuti iwe wagona kududzira zvakavanzika izvi.”" 
Daniel2:48 Mambo akabva apa kuna Dhanieri ukuru ukuru hwapamusorosoro nezvipo zvikuru zvakawanda akamuitawo mutongi wenyika yose yeBhabhironi nomukuru mukuru wavatungamiriri wavangwaru vose zvavo veBhabhironi. 
Daniel2:49 Dhanieri akasvitsawo chichemo kuna mambo, mambo akabva apa Shadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego basa rokuona nezvenyaya dzenyika yeBhabhironi. Asi Dhanieri akaramba achingova wepadare ramambo." 
Daniel3:1 Mambo Nebhukadhineza akagadzira chifananidzo chendarama chakanga chichiita mamita makumi maviri namanomwe urefu hwacho kuenda mudenga, chichiitawo mamita anenge matatu upamhi hwacho. Akachimisa mubani reDhura, munyika yeBhabhironi." 
Daniel3:2 Mambo Nebhukadhineza akatumira shoko rokuunganidza madzishe navatungamiriri uye masadunhu namakurukota namadzisahomwe uye namagweta navatongi vedzimhosva navakuru vakuru vose zvavo venyika idzodzo kuti vauye paizoteketerwa kuna vamwari chifananidzo ichocho chakanga chamiswa naNebhukadhineza. 
Daniel3:3 Ipapo madzishe navatungamiriri vaya namasadunhu namakurukota uyewo namadzisahomwe namagweta navatongi vedzimhosva pamwechete navakuru vakuru vose zvavo venyika idzodzo vakaunganidzana kuzoteketerera chifananidzo chacho chakanga chamiswa namambo Nebhukadhineza kuna vamwari. Vakaungana pamberi pechifananidzo ichocho chakanga chakagadzirwa chikamiswa naNebhukadhineza. 
Daniel3:4 Mumwe webasa rokuzivisa vanhu akabva adaidzira achiti, “Vanhuwee, ndudzi nendudzi, ndimi nendimi! Muri kunzi:" 
Daniel3:5 Pamunongonzwa chete kurira kwehwamanda nenyere nezvipendhani namabhanicho namadimbwa nengororombe nokuimba kwose kwose zvako, munofanira kugwadama pasi mupfugamire chifananidzo ichi chakamiswa namambo Nebhukadhineza." 
Daniel3:6 Kuwana ani zvake anorega kugwadama pasi achipfugama, pakarepo anobva atokandwa muvira romoto unopisa kwazvo.”" 
Daniel3:7 Naizvozvo vanhu vamarudzi ose pavakangonzwa chete kurira kwehwamanda nenyere nezvipendhani namabhanicho namadimbwa nengororombe nokuimba kwose kwose zvako, marudzi ose iwayo nendudzi dzose nendimi vakati pasi gwadagwa vachipfugamira chifananidzo ichocho chendarama chakanga chamiswa namambo Nebhukadhineza." 
Daniel3:8 Nguva iyoyo ndipo pakauya vamwe vaKaridhea kuzopomera mhosva vaJudha zviri zvoruvengo chairwo. 
Daniel3:9 Vakapira shoko ravo kuna mambo Nebhukadhineza vachiti, “Mambo, garirai kure nomoto!" 
Daniel3:10 Handiti imimi mambo, makatema chirevo chinoti: Munhu anenge angonzwa chete kurira kwehwamanda nenyere nezvipendhani namabhanicho namadimbwa nengororombe nokuimba kwose kwose zvako, anofanira kugwadama pasi achipfugamira chifananidzo chendarama ichi" 
Daniel3:11 muchiti kuwana ani zvake anorega kugwadama pasi achipfugama, anofanira kukandwa muvira remoto unopisa kwazvo?" 
Daniel3:12 Uku kwaita vamwe vaJudha vamakapa iyemi ukuru hokuona zvenyika yeBhabhironi vanaShadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego. Mambo, varume ivavo havanei nezvamunotaura. Havanamati vamwari venyu kana kupfugamira zvako chifananidzo chiya chendarama chamakagadzira mukachimisa.”" 
Daniel3:13 Nebhukadhineza akabva apenga nehasha akati Shadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego vaunzwe. Vanhu vakaenda navarume ivava pana mambo. 
Daniel3:14 Nebhukadhineza akavati, “Ichokwadi here, nhai Shadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego kuti imi hamunamati vamwari vangu kunyange kupfugamira chifananidzo chendarama chandakamisa ini?" 
Daniel3:15 Zvino kana magadzirira kuti pamunongonzwa kurira kwehwamanda nenyere nezvipendhani namabhanicho namadimbwa nengororombe imiwo mobva magwadama pasi muchipfugamira chifananidzo chandakaita, patsvene, uye pakanaka ipapo. Asi kana imi mukangorega kupfugama, pakarepo munofanira kubva makandwa muvira romoto unopisa kwazvo. Ndoupi mwari angakununurei mumaoko mangu?”" 
Daniel3:16 Shadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego vakapindura mambo Nebhukadhineza vachiti, “Chatingakupirei mhinduro panyaya iyoyi iyi, hapana." 
Daniel3:17 Zvikange zvaitika saizvozvo, Mwari wedu watinonamata anogona kutinunura muvira romoto unopisa ndiye achatinunurawo mumaoko menyu imi mambo." 
Daniel3:18 Kunyange, zvazvo akarega kutinunura mochiziva, mambo, kuti hatisi kuzonamata vamwari venyu kunyange kuzopfugamira chifananidzo ichi chamakamisa.”" 
Daniel3:19 Nebhukadhineza akaviruka nehasha ndokushanduka otsvukisira meso Shadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego. Akati moto ukuchidzirwe vira ripise kwazvo kakapetwa kanomwe kupfuura zvarinochiita. 
Daniel3:20 Akatuma vamwe varume vaiva magamba chaiwo ehondo yake yavarwi kuti vasunge mbiradzakondo vanaShadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego akati vavakande muvira romoto unopisa. 
Daniel3:21 Varume ivava vakasungwa vakapfeka hanzu dzavo kudaro nemajasi avo nenguwani dzavo dzoukuruukuru namagemenzi avo nedzimwe hanzu dzavo vakabva vakandwa muvira racho remoto unopisa kwazvo. 
Daniel3:22 Pamusana pokuti chirevo chamambo chakanga chakaoma kwazvo, vira rakapoorerwa kwazvo moto, rimi romoto rikauraya varume vaye, magamba vakanga vakatakura Shadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego." 
Daniel3:23 Varume vatatu ivava vanaShadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego vakawira muvira romoto unopisa vakasungwa kudaro. 
Daniel3:24 Mambo Nebhukadhineza akashamiswa akabva ati nyamu kusumuka ndokuti kumakurukota ake, “Nhaimi hatina here kukanda muvira umu, varume vatatu vakasungwa mbiradzakondo?” Vanhu vakapindura mambo vachiti, “Ndizvozvo chaizvo mambo!”" 
Daniel3:25 Iye ndokuti, “Asi ini ndiri kuona varume vana vasina kusungwa vari kutofamba zvavo mumoto imomu vasina kukuvara. Kutarisika kwewechina wacho, kunenge kwemwanakomana wamwari.”" 
Daniel3:26 Nebhukadhineza akabva aenda pedyo nomusuo wevira riya romoto unopisa akati, “Shadhiraki! Meshaki! Abhedhinego! Imi varanda vaMwari Wokumusorosoro, chibudai muuye pano!” Shadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego vakabuda zvavo mumoto." 
Daniel3:27 Madzishe navatungamiriri namasadunhu namakurukota amambo vakaunganidzana pamwechete. Vakaona kuti simba romoto harina kugona kukurira muviri wavarume ivavo, vhudzi ravo mumusoro risina kana kumbobvuraudzwa pasina chaitika, vasingambonhuwa moto." 
Daniel3:28 Ipapo Nebhukadhineza akati, “Ngaarumbidzwe Mwari waShadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego, iye watuma mutumwa wake akanunura varanda vake, vakavimba naye akashaisa basa chirevo chamambo. Vakaisa miviri yavo parumano vachisarudza kufa pano kuti vanamate vachipfugamira mumwewo mwari zvake asi kuti kunamata Mwari wavo." 
Daniel3:29 Naizvozvo ndinotema chirevo chokuti: Rudzi rupi zvarwo, kana ndudzi dzipi zvadzo dzavanhu, kunyange rurimi runotaura zvakaipa nezvaMwari kuwana vane rakaipa ravanongoti bufu kutaura nezvaMwari waShadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego vachabvamburwa kuita zvidimbu zvidimbu, misha yavo igoitwa matongo. Ndinodaro nokuti, hakuna mumwe Mwari anogona kununura saizvozvi izvi.”" 
Daniel3:30 Nebhukadhineza akabva asumudzirazve pamusoro vanaShadhiraki naMeshaki naAbhedhinego imomo munyika yeBhabhironi. 
Daniel4:1 “Ini mambo Nebhukadhineza ndinokunyorerai tsamba imi vanhu vamarudzi ose zvawo, nduzi nendudzi ndimi nendimi imi mugere munyika yose. Dai kwamuri runyararo rwaita muchechetere mvura yeguvi." 
Daniel4:2 “Ini ndakaona zviri zvakanaka kukuratidzai zviratidzo nezvishamiso zvandakaitirwa naMwari Wokumusorosoro. 
Daniel4:3 Kukura here ikoko kwakaita zviratidzo zvake. zvishamiso zvake, harisi simba iroro. Umambo hwake ipfirapo, haupere narini, kutonga kwake ndekwechizvarwa nechizvarwa." 
Daniel4:4 “Ini Nebhukadhineza ndakanga ndakagarikana zvangu ndiri mumba mangu, zvinhu zvichindifambirawo zvakanaka mumuzinda mangu." 
Daniel4:5 Ndakarota hope dzakandityisa ndirere hangu pamubhedha. Kwakauya pfungwa nezvimwe zvandaioneswa mumusoro mangu zvikabva zvandibvundisa nokutya. 
Daniel4:6 Naizvozvo ini ndakatema chirevo chokuti vangwaru vose veBhabhironi vauyiwe navo kwandiri kuti vanditsanangurirewo zvinoreva hope idzodzo. 
Daniel4:7 Vamaminimini navamapipi navaKaridhea nenyanzvi dzokufembera nenyenyedzi, vakapinda, ini ndikavarondedzera hope dzangu. Asi havana kugona kundizivisa zvadzinoreva." 
Daniel4:8 Pakupedzesera akapinda Dhanieri, uya akatumidzwa zita rokuti Bheriteshaza rinoenderanawo nezita ramwari wangu, akapinda mandaiva. Maari mune Mweya waMwari Anoera. Ndakamutaurira hope idzodzo ndichiti," 
Daniel4:9 ‘Iwe Bheriteshaza mukuru mukuru wavanhu vamaminimini, hedzino hope dzandakarota nditaurire zvadzinoreva nokuti ndinozviziva kuti mauri iwe mune Mweya waMwari Anoera uye kuti hakuna chakavandika chingakunetse.’" 
Daniel4:10 “Zvandakaoneswa mumusoro mangu ndirere pamubhedha ndezvizvi izvi. Ndakatarisa ndikaona muti pakati penyika wakanga wakareba zvikuru kwazvo. 
Daniel4:11 Muti iwoyo wakakura ukasimba ukaita nhungamakore chaiyo kureba uchitoonekwa kwose nekwakaperera nyika. 
Daniel4:12 Mashizha awo aiyevedza kwazvo, uye wakanga wakabereka michero zvokubereka zviya. Zvose zvaiwana zvokudya mauri: Mhuka dzesango dzaiwana mumvuri pasi pawo, shiri dzedenga dzichitogara zvadzo mumatavi awo. Zvipenyu zvose zvichitowana zvokudya mauri." 
Daniel4:13 “Ndichitarisa kudaro zvinhu zvandaioneswa mumusoro mangu ndirere saizvozvo pamubhedha ndakaona hoyo mutariri anoera achiburuka kudenga. 
Daniel4:14 Akadaidzira kwazvo achiti, ‘Temai muti uyu muusanzaure mapazi muukwazhure mashizha, michero yawo muiti mwarara. Regai zvenyu mhuka dziparamuke kutiza pasi pawo shiriwo dzidzvamuke mumapazi awo." 
Daniel4:15 Asi regai chigutsa nemidzi yacho zvisare zviri muvhu chakasungwa nengetani dzesimbi nendarira muuswiswi hwomusango. Muregei ambonyorova nedova redenga ambova weboka romhuka muuswa hwenyika. 
Daniel4:16 Regai ambosandurwa pfungwa apiwe pfungwa dzomhuka zvayo kumbopera makore manomwe akadaro. 
Daniel4:17 Chirango ichochi ichi, chatemwa navatariri; chisungo chacho ishoko revanoera. Izvozvi zvaitirwa kuti vapenyu vazivewo kuti iye Wokumusorosoro ndiye anotonga humambo hwavanhu, uye anohupa kuna ani naani waanenge ada zvake, kunyange vapasi pasi zvavo.’" 
Daniel4:18 “Izvozvi izvi ndizvo zvandakarota ndichiona, ini mambo Nebhukadhineza. Saka zvino iwe Bheriteshaza dudzira zvadzinoreva nokuti vangwaru vose zvavo venyika youmambo hwangu havana kugona kundizivisa dudziro yacho. Asi iwe unozvikwanisa pamusana pokuti mauri mune Mweya waMwari Anoera.”" 
Daniel4:19 Ipapo Dhanieri wokutumidzwa zita rokunzi Bheriteshaza uya akambodumbirwa nazvo kwekanguva; pfungwa dzikamunetsa mumwoyo. Mambo akabva ati, “Bheriteshaza rega kunetseka nehope idzodzi kana nedudziro yadzo. Bheriteshaza ndokuti, ‘Changamire wangu dai zvazvo hope idzi nedudziro yadzo zvananga vanhu vanokuvengai.’" 
Daniel4:20 Muti wamakaona wakakura ukasimba zvokuita nhungamakore chaiyo kureba uchitooneka kwose zvako nekwakaperera nyika," 
Daniel4:21 waiva namashizha anoyevedza kwazvo wakabereka michero, zviya zvokubereka zviya zvose zvichiwana zvokudya mauri pasi pawo paripo pamumvuri wemhuka dzesango shiri dzedenga dzichitogara zvadzo mumatavi awo," 
Daniel4:22 muti iwoyo, ndimi, iyemi imi mambo. Makava mukuru mukuru chaiye mukavawo nesimba. Ukuru hwenyu hwakakura zvokutosvika kudenga, umambo hwenyu hwakatosvika nekwakaperera nyika." 
Daniel4:23 “Zvino sokuona kwamakaita mumwe mutariri anoera achiburuka kudenga achiti, ‘Temai muti uyu muuparadze! Asi regai chigutsa nemidzi yacho zvisare zviri muvhu chaita zvokusungwa chaizvo nengetani dzesimbi nendarira nouswiswi hwomusango, mumurege ambonyorova nedova redenga ambova kuboka remhuka muuswa hwenyika ambosaruka kanomwe akadaro.’" 
Daniel4:24 “Changamire heinoi dudziro yazvo: Izvozvi chirevo chatemwa noWokumusorosoro chakanangana nemi changamire wangu, mambo," 
Daniel4:25 chokuti muchabviswa mukati mavanhu mugondogara pamwechete nemhuka dzesango. Muchafuriswa uswa semombe muchinyorova nedova redenga, muchapedza makore manomwe makadaro, kusvikira imi mazoziva kuti iye Wokumusorosoro ndiye anotonga humambo hwevanhu achihupa kuna ani naani waanenge ada zvake." 
Daniel4:26 Sokutemwa kwazvaitwa kuti chigutsa nemidzi yazvo zvisare zvakadaro, umambo hauzomborega kuva hwenyu kubvira panguva yamunozoziva kuti Wedenga ndiye anotonga." 
Daniel4:27 Naizvozvo imimi mambo dai waro mukandinzwawo zano rangu iri rokuti, kandai pasi zvitadzo zvenyu muite zvakarurama musiyane nouipi muitire tsiye nyoro vakadzvinyirirwa, ndipo pazvingangoitika kuti zvinhu zvikufambirei zvakanaka.”" 
Daniel4:28 Zvose izvozvo zvakawira mambo Nebhukadhineza. 
Daniel4:29 Kwakati kwapera mwedzi gumi nemiviri, iye akati achifamba zvake ari padenga remba yomuzinda weBhabhironi," 
Daniel4:30 mambo akazvizuwidza achiti, “Handiti Bhabhironi iguta rakakura kwazvo here, iguta randakavaka ini noukuru hwangu nesimba rangu somuzinda wamambo kuitira kuti mbiri youmambo hwangu idhume.”" 
Daniel4:31 Mashoko iwayo achiri pamuromo wamambo kudaro, kudenga kwakabva izwi rikati, “Iwe mambo Nebhukadhineza herino shoko ratinoreva kwauri: Iwewe wabviswa paumambo," 
Daniel4:32 uchabviswa mukati mavanhu wava kundogara pamwechete nemhuka dzesango kwauchafuriswa uswa semombe, uchasaruka kanomwe wakadaro udzidze kuti iye Wokumusorosoro ndiye anotonga umambo hwavanhu uye anohupa kuna ani naani waanenge ada zvake.”" 
Daniel4:33 Pakarepo izvozvo zvakabva zvaitika kuna Nebhukadhineza. Akabviswa mukati mavanhu akabva ava kufura uswa semombe, muviri wake uchinyorova nedova redenga, dakara mvere dzake dzareba seminhenga yegondo, nzarawo dzake dzaita senzara dzeshiri." 
Daniel4:34 Kuzoti mazuva iwayo apera, ini Nebhukadhineza ndakatarisa nameso angu kudenga uku ndokubva pfungwa dzangu dzadzokera pamwechete. Ndipo pandakatenda iye Wokumusorosoro ndichirumbidza nokuremekedza iye Anogara narini wose: nokuti hutongi hwake hutongi hwokugara nokugara uye umambo hwake, umambo hunoramba huripo chizvarwa nechizvarwa." 
Daniel4:35 Vagari vapanyika vose zvavo havatomboverengwa sechinhu uye iye anoita zvinhu samadiro ake, mugurusvusvu rezvinhu zvomudenga napakatiwo pavagari vapanyika hapana angapikisane naye pasimba kana kumuti, “Ndicho chii chauri kuita.”" 
Daniel4:36 Panguva yakareyo pfungwa dzangu dzakadzokera pamwechete uyewo mbiri youmambo hwangu noukuru hwangu nomukurumbira wangu zvakabva zvadzokera kwandiri. Makurukota angu namadzishe angu vakanditsvaga ndikazogarazve paumambo hwangu ndokubva ndatonyanya kuwedzerwa kupiwa humwe ukuru. 
Daniel4:37 Zvino ini, Nebhukadhineza ndinorumbidza, nokukudza nokumuremekedza iye Mambo Nyadenga nokuti mabasa ake ose akarurama, uye makwara ake ano ruenzaniso, vanhu vanozvikudza anogona kuvadukupisa." 
Daniel5:1 Mambo Bherishaza akaitira chiuru chamadzimambo ake mabiko makuru kwazvo akanwa waini pamberi pechuru ichocho. 
Daniel5:2 Bherishaza paakaravira waini, akatuma vanhu kuti vaunze midziyo yendarama neyesirivha iya yakanga yapambwa naNebhukadhineza baba wake muTemberi kuJerusaremu kuitira kuti iye mambo namadzishe ake nevakadzi vake navarongo vake vanwire mumidziyo iyoyo." 
Daniel5:3 Saizvozvo vakaunza midziyo yendarama neyesirivha yakanga yapambwa yacho muTemberi, mumba yaMwari kuJerusaremu. Mambo namadzishe ake navakadzi vake navarongo vake, vakanwira zvavo mairi." 
Daniel5:4 Vakanwa waini vachirumbidza vamwari vendarama nevesirivha nevendarira navamwari vesimbi nevezvimiti navamabwe. 
Daniel5:5 Pakarepo pakaonekwa minwe yechanza chomunhu chikanyora pakadzururwa pamadziro omuzinda wamambo pakatarisana nechigadzikiro chomwenje. Chanza ichocho pachainyora kudaro mambo aizviona. 
Daniel5:6 Mambo akasanduka uso, pfungwa dzikamunetsa mumwoyo, makumbo akarukutika, mabvi ake akarovana nokugwagwadza." 
Daniel5:7 Mambo akadaidzira kuti paunzwe vanhu vamapipi navaKaridhea nenyanzvi dzinofembera nenyenyedzi. Mambo ndokuti kuvangwaru veBhabhironi, “Ani naani zvake anenge agona kuverenga zvakanyorwa apa izvi akandiudzawo dudziro yacho, anofanira kuti apfekedzwe hanzu dzoruvara rwehute ashongedzwe muhuro cheni yendarama, anozova mutongi wechitatu muumambo huno.”" 
Daniel5:8 Vangwaru vose zvavo vokwamambo vakapindamo asi havana kukwanisa kuverenga zvakanga zvakanyorwa zvacho kana kuzivisa mambo zvazvaireva. 
Daniel5:9 Ipapo mambo Bherishaza akashushikana chaizvo mumwoyo akasanduka uso madzishewo ake zvakavaputsa musoro. 
Daniel5:10 Mambokadzi, pamusana pezvakataurwa namambo namadzishe ake, vakapindawo muzimba maipembererwa mabiko iwayo. Mambokadzi, vakapira shoko vachiti, “Mambo! Garirai kure nomoto! Regai zvenyu kunetseka mwoyo nendangariro kana kusanduka uso." 
Daniel5:11 Munyika youmambo hwenyu, muno mumwe murume ano Mweya waMwari Anoera Mumazuva aitonga baba venyu, chiedza nokunzwisisa noungwaru, ugwaru hunenge hwaMwari chaihwo zvaiwanikwa maari. Ipapo mambo Nebhukadhineza, baba venyu vakamuita kuti ave ndiye mukuru mukuru wavanhu vamaminimini navamapipi navaKaridhea nenyanzvi dzokufembera nenyenyedzi." 
Daniel5:12 Chakadariso ndechichi chokuti mweya wakanaka kwazvo noruzivo, nokunzwisisa zvokududzira hope izvi, nokurapanura zvirahwe, nokunyatsogadzirisa zvinenge zvanetsa, zvaiva muna Dhanieri iyeyo akazenge apiwa namambo zita rokuti Bheritishaza. Zvino Dhanieri ngaadaidzwe agokuratidzai dudziro yazvo.”" 
Daniel5:13 Dhanieri akaunzwamo pana mambo, Mambo akati kuna Dhanieri, “Handiti iwe ndiwe Dhanieri, mumwe wenhapwa dzokwaJudha vaya vakaunzwa kuno nababa wangu kubva kwaJudha?" 
Daniel5:14 Ndakanzwa nezvako iwe zvichinzi Mweya waMwari Anoera uri mauri uye kuti chiedza nokunzwisisa noungwaru hwakanakisisa chaizvo zvinowanikwa mauri. 
Daniel5:15 Zvino vangwaru navanhu vamapipi vakambounzwa muno kwandiri kuzoverenga zvakanyorwa izvi nokundizivisa zvazvinoreva. Asi vakatadza kunditsanangurira zvinhu zvazvinoreva. 
Daniel5:16 Asi ndakanzwa kuti iwe unokwanisa kududzira zvinhu nokupedza nhamo. Zvino, kana ukagona kuverenga zvakanyorwa izvi ukanditsanangurira zvazvinoreva, uchapfekedzwa hanzu yoruvara rwohute ugoshongedzwa muhuro necheni yendarama uyezve unozova mutongi wechitatu muumambo huno.”" 
Daniel5:17 Dhanieri akapindura kuna mambo achiti, “Zvipo zvenyu ngazvive zvenyu imi; mibayiro yenyu muipe zvenyu kuno mumwe. Asi kukuverengerai, mambo ndichakuverengerai zvakanyorwa izvozvi ndigodudzira zvazvinoreva." 
Daniel5:18 Mambo Mwari wokumusorosoro akapa Nebhukadhineza baba venyu imi, umambo noukuruukuru nembiri nechiremera." 
Daniel5:19 Pamusana poukuruukuru hwaakavapa, marudzi ose zvawo nendudzi dzavanhu, ndimi nendimi vaidedera kuvatya. Vaiti wavada kuuraya vouraya, wavainge vada kurega ari mupenyu vorega zvavo. Wavainge vadawo kusumudzira vaimusumudzira pamusoro. Wavaingewo vada zvavo kudzikisira pasi vaidzikisa." 
Daniel5:20 Asi pavakazongozvitutumadza vakaomesa mwoyo kuita kwavo kukabva kwava kwokuzvikudza, vakabviswa pachigaro chavo choumambo vakatorerwa mbiri yavo." 
Daniel5:21 Vakabviswa mukati mavanhu vakapiwa mwoyo womhuka. Vakandogara pamwechete namadhongi esango vofura sora semombe vachinyorova muviri nedova redenga kudzamara pavakazoziva kuti iye Mwari Wokumusororo ndiye anotonga humambo hwavanhu achihupa kuna ani naani waanenge ada zvake. 
Daniel5:22 Zvino iwe mwanakomana wake, iwe Bherishaza hauna kuzvidukupisa kunyangwe, zvose izvozvi waizviziva hako." 
Daniel5:23 Asi iwe wakatozvitutumadza zvako uchikanganisira Tenzi Wedenga. Ukatoraka iwe midziyo yomumba make ikaunzwa pauri, iwewe namadzishe ako navakadzi vako navarongo vako ukanwira mairi uchitorumbidza hako vamwari vesirivha nevendarama nevendarira nevesimbi nevezvimiti navamabwe, vasina chavanoona kana kunzwa vasina nechavanoziva. Asi Mwari, iye akabata upenyu hwako mumaoko make, iye anoti kwaanenge ati unoenda ndiko kwaunoenda hauna kumuremekedza." 
Daniel5:24 Ndokusaka kwatumwa chanza chichibva kwaari chikabva chasvikonyora zvakanyorwa izvi. 
Daniel5:25 “Zvakanyorwa apa zvacho ndezvizvi izvi. MENE MENE TEKERI UYE PARISINI. 
Daniel5:26 Zvazvinoreva ndezvizvi: MENE, zvinoreva kuti; Mwari averenga mazuva oumambo hwenyu akahusvitsa kumagumo." 
Daniel5:27 TEKERI zvinoreva kuti imi pachenyu maerwa pachikero mukawanikwa musina kukwana," 
Daniel5:28 PERESI, zvichireva kuti umambo hwenyu hwakakamuraniswa hukapiwa kuvaMidhi nevaPezhia.”" 
Daniel5:29 Bherishaza akatema zvaifanira kuti zviitwe, Dhanieri akabva ashongedzwa hanzu dzoruvara rwehute necheni yendarama ikaiswa muhuro make, vanhu ndokuziviswa nezvake zvokunzi ndiye akanga atova mutongi wechitatu muumambo hwenyika iyoyo." 
Daniel5:30 Usiku hwakarehwo Bherishaza, mambo wavaKaridhea akaurayiwa." 
Daniel5:31 Dhariusi muMidhi akagara paumambo aina makore aikaroita makumi matanhatu namaviri okuberekwa. 
Daniel6:1 Dhariusi akaona chiri chinhu chakanaka chokuti agadze madzishe zana namakumi maviri munyika youmambo hwake kuti vave munyika yose zvayo youmambo ihwohwo. 
Daniel6:2 Pamusoro paivava akagadzawo vamwe vatatu kuti vave madzichangamire avo, Dhanieri ari mumwe wavo vaizotumirwa nyaya namadzishe iwayo kuitira kuti mambo asawane chaanorasikirwa nacho." 
Daniel6:3 Zvino Dhanieri iyeyu akava munhu mumwewo chaiye akasiyana navamwe vose zvavo pamadzichangamire iwayo namadzishe acho nokuti maari maiva nomweya wakanaka kwazvo kwazvo. Nokudaro mambo akanga aronga kuti Dhanieri ave ndiye changamire wenyika yose youmambo ihwohwo somukurumukuru. 
Daniel6:4 Mamwe madzichangamire aye namadzishe aya vakatsvaga pokuti vamutsvate napo vagowanawo mhosva chaiyowo yokupa Dhanieri ichinangana nezvamatongerwo enyika iyoyo. Asi vakashaya mhosva yokupa Dhanieri kana chaaikanganisa nokuti aiva munhu akatendeseka, asina chaaikanganisa kana kutsveyamisa." 
Daniel6:5 Varume ivavo vakazonyeverana kuti, “Imika; hatimbowana mhosva yokupomera nayo Dhanieri uyu kusatoti taiwana mune zvomutemo waMwari wake.”" 
Daniel6:6 Ipapo madzichangamire iwayo namadzishe akabvumirana kuenda kuna mambo vakati kwaari, “Mambo Dhariusi! Garirai kure nomoto." 
Daniel6:7 Vose zvavo madzichangamire enyika youmambo huno navatungamiriri namadzishe namakurukota namasadunhu vawirirana kuti mambo ngaaite murao ateme chirevo chokuti: Kwamakumi matatu amazuva hapafaniri kuwanikwa munhu anosvitsa mukumbiro kuna mwari upi noupi zvake kana kumunhu, kusiri kwamuri imi mambo, anofanira kuti akandwe mugomba reshumba." 
Daniel6:8 Zvino imi mambo chiitai chirevo ichocho musaine gwaro iroro kuti zvirege kuzosandurwa maererano nomutemo wavaMidhi navaPezhia usingasanduriki.” 
Daniel6:9 Naizvozvo mambo Dhariusi akasaina gwaro iroro. 
Daniel6:10 Dhanieri paakazviziva kuti gwaro rasainwa namambo zita ravo, akaenda kumba kwake mumba yake yapamusoro yaiva namahwindo akashama akatarisa kuJerusaremu, aipfugama pasi imomo katatu pazuva achinamata achitenda Mwari wake sezvaaingoita kare." 
Daniel6:11 Varume vaya vakawirirana ndiye unga unga kwaari wanei Dhanieri achinamata achinyengetera kuna Mwari wake. 
Daniel6:12 Vakabva vauya kuna mambo vakapira nyaya yainangana nechirevo chiya vachiti, “Nhai mambo, hamuna here kusaina chirevo chiya? Chokuti: Kwamakumi matatu amazuva hapafaniri kuwanikwa ani zvake anosvitsa mukumbiro kuna ani naani zvake, kungave kuna mwari kana kumunhu, mumakumi matatu amazuva kusiri kwamuri imi mambo, anofanira kuti akandwe mugomba reshumba.” Mambo akapindura achiti, “Ndizvozvo chaizvoizvo maererano nomutemo wavaMidhi navaPezhia usingasanduki.”" 
Daniel6:13 Ivo ndokuti kuna mambo, “Dhanieri uya mumwe wenhapwa dzakatapwa kwaJudha, haambokendenga zvake nezvenyu imi mambo kunyange icho chirevo chamasaina. Asi anotoita munamato wake rutatu pazuva.”" 
Daniel6:14 Mashoko iwaya paakasvika munzeve dzamambo kudaro zvakamushungurudza mwoyo akafunga zvokununura Dhanieri. Akashanda kwazvo kusvikira zuva radoka achida kumununura. 
Daniel6:15 Varume ivava vakarangana kuenda kuna mambo vakati kwaari, “Chizivai mambo kuti, mutemo wavaMidhi navaPezhia wokuti: Hakuna chirevo kana murao unenge wasainwa namambo unozoshandurwa.”" 
Daniel6:16 Ipapo mambo akati atorwe, Dhanieri akatorwa akakandwa mugomba reshumba. Mambo akati kuna Dhanieri, “Dai iye Mwari wako waunoramba uchinamata angokununura.”" 
Daniel6:17 Pakaunzwa ibwe rikanzi gwibha pamuromo wegomba iroro. Mambo akazvitsinhira neringi rake rechidhindho nemaringiwo ezvidhindho amadzishe ake zvichiitirwa kunzi parege kumbova zvapo nechinosandurwa nezvaDhanieri. 
Daniel6:18 Mambo akaenda kumuzinda kwake akararirotsanya usiku ihwohwo zvokumbomuvaraidza zviya pasina, hope dzikamutiza." 
Daniel6:19 Zvino nguva yamambakwedza mambo akamuka akaenda achikurumidza kugomba reshumba. 
Daniel6:20 Paakasvika pedyo negomba reshumba maiva naDhanieri, akadaidzira nezwi rairatidza kurwadziwa mwoyo achiti kuna Dhanieri, “Nhai Dhanieri muranda waMwari mupenyu! Ko iye Mwari wako waunodai kunamata nguva dzose akwanisa here kukununura kushumba?”" 
Daniel6:21 Dhanieri ndokudaira kuna mambo achiti, “Mambo! Garirai kure nomoto!" 
Daniel6:22 Mwari wangu akatuma mutumwa wake akabva azarira shumba idzi muromo. Nezvo hadzina kundikuvadza nokuti zvakaonekwa kuti hapana chandakamutadzira kana chandakatadzira imimi mambo.” 
Daniel6:23 Mambo ndipo paakazopembera nokufara akati Dhanieri ngaaburitswe mugomba imomo. Saizvozvowo Dhanieri akaburitswa mugomba muya akawanikwa asina kana kumbokuvadzwa zvake pamusana pokuti akavimba naMwari wake. 
Daniel6:24 Mambo akatema chirevo, varume vaya vaipomera Dhanieri mhosva vakabva vauyiwa navo vakakandwawo mugomba reshumba, ivo navana vavo pamwechete navakadzi vavo. Vasati vatombosvika pasi pegomba iroro shumba dzakavaita dzakurira dzikapwapwanyura mapfupa avo." 
Daniel6:25 Ipapo mambo Dhariusi akanyorera tsamba kumarudzi ose avanhu nendudzi dzose zvadzo ndimi nendimi dzavagere pasi pano pose achiti: “Dai kwamuri runyararo rwaita muchechetere mvura yeguvi. 
Daniel6:26 Ndatema chirevo chokuti: Kwose kwandinotonga ini samambo, vanhu ngavadedere vachitya Mwari waDhanieri: “Nokuti iyeyu ndiye Mwari mupenyu anogara narini narini wose. Umambo hwake haumbofa hwakaparadzwa, hutongi hwake huchavako kudzamara kumagumo chaiko." 
Daniel6:27 “Anonunura uye anoponesa, anoita zviratidzo nezvishamiso kudenga napasi iye akanunura Dhanieri mukanwa meshumba.”" 
Daniel6:28 Nokudaro Dhanieri akabudirira kwazvo panguva dzokutanga kwaDhariusi uyewo dzokutonga kwamambo Sairasi wechiPezhia. 
Daniel7:1 Mugore rechiposhi rokutonga kwaBherishaza, mambo weBhabhironi, Dhanieri akarota hope. Akaona zviratidzo mumusoro make arere pamubhedha wake. Akanyora chiroto ichocho akarondedzera muchidimu zvaakarota." 
Daniel7:2 Dhanieri akati, “Zvandakaona muchiratidzo usiku ndezvizvi. Ndakaona mhepo dzokumativi mana edenga dzichisimudza zigungwa guru." 
Daniel7:3 Ndokubva mugungwa imomo madzumbunuka zvikara zvina zvakakura chaizvo zvakasiyana. 
Daniel7:4 Chokutanga chakanga chakaita seshumba uye chiina mapapiro egondo. Ndakati ndakatarisa kudaro, mapapiro acho akadzurwa ndokubva chasumudzwa kubva pasi chikaitwa kuti chimire namakumbo maviri somunhu chikapiwa pfungwa dzinenge dzomunhu." 
Daniel7:5 “Onei hecho chimwe chikara chechipiri zvino, chakafanana nebere chakati kwirirei kumwe uku chakaruma namazino pamuromo mbabvu nhatu. Zvino ichi chakanzi, ‘Sumuka udye nyama yakawanda!’" 
Daniel7:6 “Pedzepo ndakaona hecho chimwewo chinenge mbada chiina mapapiro mana eshiri pamusana pacho. Chikara ichi chakanga chiine misoro mina chikabvawo chapiwa simba rokutonga. 
Daniel7:7 “Tevere, ndakaona zviratidzo usiku, ndakaona chimwezve chikara chechina chakashata chinotyisa kwazvo chiine simba guru kwazvo. Chaiva namazino makuru esimbi chaizhanya chichibvambura-bvambura chichitsokodzera netsoka zvainge zvasara. Chakanga chakasiyana nezvimwe zvikara zvose zvakachitangira. Chakanga chiine nyanga gumi." 
Daniel7:8 Ndichicherechedza kudaro panyanga idzodzo pakatukudza imwe nyanga duku ikatipura nemidzi dzimwe nyanga nhatu panyanga dzokutanga dziya. Nyanga iyoyo yaiva namaziso anenge omunhu nomuromo waitaura mazwi asingatauriki. 
Daniel7:9 “Ndakachitarisa kudaro, pakagadzikirwa zvigaro zvoumambo, mumwe, iye Chidzachapo ndokubva agara pachigaro chake. Hanzu dzake dzakanga dzakati ngwe-e kuchena sechando iro vhudzi iri mumusoro make, rakachena kuti mbu-u sewuru yakanakisisa. Chigaro chake choumambo chakanga chiri marimi omoto anovavaya, mavhiri acho ari moto chaiwo." 
Daniel7:10 Kakova chaiko kemoto kaiyerera kachitangira mberi kwake. Zviuru nezviuru zvaimushandira, gumi rezviuru rakapetwa kagumi rakanga rimire paari pakagarwa dare rokutonga, mabhuku akazarurwa." 
Daniel7:11 “Ini ndakatarisa pamusana pemheremhere yamazwi asingatauriki aitaurwa nenyanga iyoyo. Ndakatarisa kudaro, chikara ichocho chakaurayiwa mutumbi wacho ukaparadzwa chikabva chapiswa nomoto." 
Daniel7:12 Zvimwe zvikara zvose zviya zvakatorerwa simba razvo rokutonga asi zvakambosiyiwa zviri zvipenyu kwemwaka nekachinguva. 
Daniel7:13 “Muzviratidzo izvozvo usiku, ndakaona, hezvo nomumakore mudenga kuchiuya mumwe anenge mwanakomana womunhu. Akasvika kuna Chidzachapo akabva asumwa kwaari.”" 
Daniel7:14 Iye ndokupiwa utongi nembiri noumambo kuitira kuti vanhu vamarudzi ose zvawo ndudzi nendudzi, ndimi nendimi vave vokumushandira, hutongi hwake, huri hutongi hwokugara nokugara husingazombofa hwakapera, umambowo hwake umambo husingafi hwakaparadzwa." 
Daniel7:15 “Ini Dhanieri ndakashushikana mwoyo ndikadumbirwa kwazvo nezviratidzo zvakauya mumusoro mangu. 
Daniel7:16 Ndakaenda pane mumwe akanga amirepo ndikamubvunza chokwadi chezvinhu izvozvi. Nokudaro akanditaurira zvazvaireva achiti," 
Daniel7:17 ‘Zvikara zvina zvikuru izvozvi, madzimambo mana achamuka panyika." 
Daniel7:18 Asi vatsvene vaiye Wokumusorosoro vachapiwa umambo vachabata umambo ihwohwo nokusingaperi narini narini wose.’ 
Daniel7:19 “Ini ndipo pandakada kuziva chaizvoizvo zvaireva chikara chechina chiya chakanga chakasiyana nezvimwe zvose chaityisa kwazvo, chaiva namazino esimbi nenzara dzendarira, chaibvambura chichityoranisa chichitsokodzera netsoka dzacho zvainge zvasara" 
Daniel7:20 uye ndakada kuziva nezvaireva gumi renyanga dzaiva pamusoro wacho uyewo neimwe nyanga iya yakatukudza ikawisira pasi dzimwe nhatu, nyanga iya yaiva namaziso nomuromo waitaura zvisingatauriki uye yakanga ichiita sehuru kupinda dzimwe dzayo." 
Daniel7:21 Pandainge ndakatarisa, nyanga iyoyo yakaita hondo navatsvene ikavakurira" 
Daniel7:22 kusvikira Chidzachapo auya ndokuitwa dare rokupipirira vatsvene vaWokumusorosoro, nguva ikazosvika yakapiwa vatsvene umambo.”" 
Daniel7:23 Iye akati, “Zvinoreva chikara chechina ndezvokuti, kuchauya umambo hwechina panyika huchange hwakasiyana nohumwe humambo hwose. Huchazhanya pasi pose zvapo huchipatsokodzera nokuhupwanya-pwanya." 
Daniel7:24 Zvegumi renyanga dziya zvinoreva kuti muumambo ihwohu muchamuka madzimambo gumi kwozomukawo mumwezve mushure mahwo. Iyeyu uyu achange akasiyana navamwe vaya vokutanga, achakurira madzimambo matatu." 
Daniel7:25 Achataura mazwi okushonha Wokumusorosoro; achaonesa nhamo vatsvene vaiye Wokumusorosoro. Achafunga zvokusandura nguva nemitemo vachaiswa mumaoko make vasaruke vakadaro vagosarukazve kaviri vagosvikazve pachikamu chepakati napakati chamakei iwayo. 
Daniel7:26 Asi kuchagarwa dare simba rake rokutonga acharitorerwa rigororomeswa richiparadzwa zvachose. 
Daniel7:27 Ipapo umambo nohutongi noukuru hwoumambo hwose pasi pedenga pose zvapo huchapiwa kurudzi rwavatsvene vaiye Wokumusorosoro: umambo hwavo huchava umambo hwokugara nokusingaperi. Vose vane simba rokutonga vachavashandira vachivateerera.” 
Daniel7:28 “Pano ndipo pakaperera nyaya iyoyi. Asi ini Dhanieri ndakadumbirwa kwazvo nendangariro dzangu ndikasanduka ruvara, asi ndakangozvichengeta mumwoyo mangu.”" 
Daniel8:1 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwamambo Bherishaza ini Dhanieri ndakaona chiratidzo mushure mechiya chandakamboona kwokutanga.
