Daniel8:2 Muchiratidzo ichochi ndakatarisa ndikaona ndava muguta reSusa, riri munyika yeEramu. Izvozvo muchiratidzo ichi ndakaona ndiri kurwizi rwaUrai." 
Daniel8:3 Ndakatarisa nameso angu onei hondohwe imire pakadaro apo kumahombekombe kwerwizi. Yaiva nenyanga mbiri, dzose dziri mbiri dzakareba, asi imwe yakanga yakareba kudarika imwe. Ndefu yacho iyi ndiyo yakapedzesera kubuda." 
Daniel8:4 Ndakaona hondohwe iya ichirwisa yakananga kumadokero nokuchamhembe nokumaodzanyemba pasina mhuka yaimbofemera kumirisana nayo uye kusina nomumwe aigona kununura chawira mumaoko mayo. Hondohwe iyoyo yaitoita zvainoda zvayo, yaizvitutumadza." 
Daniel8:5 Pandaicherechedza kudaro, onei hero gotora richiuya richibva kumadokero richidimura nenyika yose zvayo risingatsiki pasi. Mbudzi iyoyo yaiva norunyanga rwainyatsoonekwa nechapakati pamaziso ayo." 
Daniel8:6 Gotora riya rakasvika kuhondohwe iya yaiva nenyanga mbiri yandakanga ndamboona imire kumahombekombe kwerwizi kuya. Rakamhanyira kwairi nehasha dzakanyanya. 
Daniel8:7 Ndakaona roswedera kuhondohwe iya rikabva raishatirirwa kwazvo. Rakadhuma hondohwe iyoyo rikatyora nyanga dzayo mbiri dziya, hondohwe ikashaya simba rokumirisana naro, rikabva ratoiriga pasi rikaitsokodzera pasina nomumwe akagona kununura hondohwe yacho mumaoko maro." 
Daniel8:8 Gotora iri rakabva razvitutumadza zvikuru kwazvo asi parakanga zvino rasimba, zinyanga guru riya rakatyoka. Panzvimbo paro pakabuda nyanga ina dzainyatsoonekwa dzakanga dzakananga mumhepo kumativi mana edenga." 
Daniel8:9 Mune imwe yenyanga idzodzo makabuda kamwe kanyanga kakakura kwazvo kakananga kumaodzanyemba, kakanangawo kumabvazuva uye kakanangawo nyika yembiri." 
Daniel8:10 Kakakurakura chaizvo zvokutosvika kugurusvusvu rezvinhu zviri mudenga. Mamwe magurusvusvu enyenyedzi kaikurumurira pasi kachitodzitsokodzera zvako. 
Daniel8:11 Kanyanga ikako kakazvitutumadza zvokutosvika kunyange nokuJinda regurusvusvu. Zvokupira kwaari mupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa zvikaregerwa uye Nzvimbo yake Inoera ikakurirwa. 
Daniel8:12 Ipapo gurusvusvu riya rakaiswa mumaoko mayo pamwechete nomupiro wokupisa pamusana pouipi. Chokwadi chakakandwa pasi, nyanga iyoyi ikaita zvayaiita zvikabudirira." 
Daniel8:13 Ndakanzwa mumwe anoera achitaura ndokubva mumwewo anoera abvunza uya akanga ataura kuti, “Ko izvo zvechiratidzo chomupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa izvi nezvokumbosiya zvakadaro Nzvimbo Inoera negurusvusvu racho zvichitsokodzerwa zvazvo netsoka, zvichapedza nguva yakadii?”" 
Daniel8:14 Iye ndokuti kwaari, “Zvichapedza zviuru zviviri zvina mazana matatu amanheru namangwanani, Nzvimbo Inoera ndipo paichazochenurwazve yoita chaizvoizvo zvainofanira kunge yakaita.”" 
Daniel8:15 Ini Dhanieri pandakaona chiratidzo ichochi ndakatvsaka kuti ndichinzwisise ndiye vhu kumira mberi kwangu mumwe aiva nechimiro chinenge chomunhu. 
Daniel8:16 Ndakanzwa izwi romunhu pakati pamahombekombe maviri aUrai richidaidzira kuti, “Gabhurieri tsanangurira munhu uyu anzwisise chiratidzo ichi.”" 
Daniel8:17 Nokudaro iye akaswedera pandaiva ndimire. Paakasvika kudaro, zvakandityisa ndikawira pasi nouso. Asi iye akanditi, “Iwe mwanakomana womunhu inzwa unzwe, chiratidzo ichi ndechenguva yokupedzesera chaiyo.”" 
Daniel8:18 Achitaura neni kudaro, ndakabatwa nehope dzorufu chaidzo ndakatsikitsira uso pasi. Asi iye akandibata akandimisa netsoka dzangu." 
Daniel8:19 Akati: “Chinzwa ndava kukuzivisa zvichazoitika pakupedzesera chaiko kwehasha dzaMwari nokuti ndezvenguva yakatemwa yokumagumo. 
Daniel8:20 “Zvehondohwe yawaona iya ine nyanga mbiri, ndiwo madzimambo avaMidhi navaPezhia." 
Daniel8:21 Gotora rinomirira mambo wenyika yeGirisi nyanga huru yepakati pamaziso aro ndimambo wokutanga wacho. 
Daniel8:22 Nyanga yatyoka iya, ina panzvimbo pakamuka nyanga dzimwe ina, ndihwo umambo huna huchamuka muvanhu vake asi zvisingabve musimba rake." 
Daniel8:23 “Kumagumo chaiko kwohutongi hwavo, vakaipa pavanengewo zvino vakombodza, kuchazomuka mumwe mambo, munhu ane uso hune chivindi, shasha mumadimikira." 
Daniel8:24 Achava nesimba guru. Achaita kuti kuve nokuparadza kunotyisa achibudirira mune zvaanoita achiparadza magamba chaiwo pamwechete nevorudzi rwavatsvene. 
Daniel8:25 Noujarijari hwake achaita kuti unyengedzi hutekeshere, zvinhu zviri mumaoko make, uye mumwoyo make achizvitutumadza. Achaparadza vazhinji pasina zvokuyambira zviya, achatomukirawo kana nairo Jinda ramachinda, asi kuparara achaparara asi kwete kuparadzwa noruoko rwomunhu." 
Daniel8:26 Chiratidzo chezvamanheru nezvamangwanani charehwa chiya ndechechokwadi. Asi wochipfundira chiratidzo ichocho nokuti ndechezvichauya mushure menguva ndefu.” 
Daniel8:27 Zvino ini Dhanieri ndakadumbirwa nazvo ndikarara ndava kurwara kwamazuva mazhinji. Ndakazomuka zvangu ndikafamba nenyika ndichiita basa rokwamambo. Asi ndakadumbirwa mumwoyo nechiratidzo ichocho pasina kchandanzwisisa. 
Daniel9:1 Mugore rechiposhi raDhariusi mwanakomana waAhasuerusi wechizvarwa chavaMidhi akava mambo paumambo hwavaKaridhea," 
Daniel9:2 mugore rake rokutanga kutonga, ini Dhanieri ndakanzwisisa nomumabhuku uwandi hwamakore akanga ataurwa naTenzi nomuromo womuporofita Jeremiya kuti Jerusaremu inofanira kupedza makumi manomwe amakore iri dongo." 
Daniel9:3 Ipapo ndakatarisa kuna Tenzi Mwari ndichimutsvaka nomunamato neminyengetero nokutsanya ndakapfeka hanzu dzemasaga ndakazvidira dota. 
Daniel9:4 Ndakanamata kuna Tenzi, Mwari wangu ndichireurura ndichiti: “Imi Tenzi, Mwari mukurukuru anotyisa anochengeta chitenderano achiitira mwoyochena kuvanhu vanomuda vanochengeta mitemo yake;" 
Daniel9:5 takatadza, takaita zvakaipa, takakanganisa. Takapanduka tikatsaukana nemitemo nemirao yenyu." 
Daniel9:6 Hatina kuteerera varanda venyu vaporofita vaitaura nomuzita renyu kumadzimambo edu nokumachinda edu nokumadzibaba edu uye kuvanhu vose zvavo venyika iyoyi. 
Daniel9:7 Imimi Tenzi, ndimi muridzi woururami asi isusu, uso inyadzi dzoga dzoga sezvazviri pari nhasi kuvanhu vokwaJudha kuvagari veJerusaremu nokuIsiraeri yose zvayo vari padyo navari kure chaiko kunyika dzose zvadzo kwamakavadzingira pamusana pounyengedzi hwavakaita kwamuri." 
Daniel9:8 Tenzi, kwatiri uso inyadzi dzoga dzoga uye nokumadzimambo edu nokumachinda edu nokumadzibaba edu pamusana pokuti takakutadzirai." 
Daniel9:9 Imimi Tenzi Mwari wedu ndimi muridzi wetsitsi nokuregerera nokuda kokuti isu takakupandukirai 
Daniel9:10 tikarega kuteerera zvamakareva imi Tenzi Mwari wedu tichitevera mitemo yenyu yamakatipa nomuromo wavaranda venyu, vaporofita." 
Daniel9:11 Isiraeri yose zvayo yakatyora mutemo wenyu ikatsauka ichiramba kuteerera zvaunotaura. Ipapo rushambwa nemhiko zviya zvakanyorwa mumutemo waMosesi muranda waMwari zvakawodzvorerwa patiri pamusana pokuti takakutadzirai. 
Daniel9:12 Akatsigira shoko rake reyambiro yake yaakatipa isu navatongi vedu vaititonga nokutiunzira kwaakaita jambwa guru nokuti kwose zvako pasi pedenga hakuna kwakamboitwa zvakafanana nenhamo yakapinzwa Jerusaremu. 
Daniel9:13 Jambwa irori rakatiwira sokunyorwa kwazvakaitwa mumutemo waMosesi. Asi isu hatina kukutetai imi Tenzi, Mwari wedu tichipinduka kuuipi hwedu nokugamuchira chokwadi chenyu." 
Daniel9:14 Naizvozvo Tenzi akatichengetera jambwa ndokuriita kuti ritiwire nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wedu akarurama mumabasa ake ose aakaita asi isu hatina kuteerera izwi rake." 
Daniel9:15 “Saka zvino imi Tenzi Mwari wedu imi makaburitsa vanhu venyu munyika yeIjipiti nesimba roruoko rwenyu mukazviwanira zita sezvazviri nhasi uno, isu takatadza, takaita zvakaipa." 
Daniel9:16 Tenzi, hasha dzenyu ngadziserere, kushatirirwa guta renyu reJerusaremu chikomo chenyu chinoera kupore maererano namaitiro enyu akarurama nokuti pamusana pezvitadzo zvedu nouipi hwamadzibaba edu, Jerusaremu navanhu venyu vakava chiseko chenyika chavanhu vari munharaunda yatiri." 
Daniel9:17 Saka naizvozvo, imi Mwari wedu, rerekerai nzeve yenyu kumunamato womuranda wenyu nokumunyengetero wake uye muchizviitira iyemi Tenzi pachenyu, cheukaiwo Nzvimbo yenyu Inoera yakadai kuva dongo." 
Daniel9:18 Nhai Mwari wangu rerekerai nzeve yenyu munzwe, zarurai maziso enyu muone kuparara kwataita neguta rinodaidzwa nezita renyu. Chatinodariro ndechokuti kunyengetera kwatiri kuita kwamuri kudai hakusi kuti isu takarurama, asi kuti pamusana petsitsi dzenyu dzakawanda." 
Daniel9:19 Tenzi inzwai Tenzi regererai. Tirimukai muwane zvamungaite, musanonoke zvenyu, muchizviitiremi, Mwari wangu, nokuti guta renyu navanhu venyu zvinodaidzwa nezita renyu.”" 
Daniel9:20 Pandainamata ndichitaura kudaro ndichireurura kutadza kwangu nokutadza kwavanhu vokwangu, vaIsiraeri ndichisvitsa kuteterera kwangu pana Tenzi, Mwari wangu ndichinamatira chikomo chinoera chaMwari wangu" 
Daniel9:21 ndichitaura kudaro mumunamato, munhu uya, Gabhurieri wandakanga ndaona muchiratidzo pokutanga paya, akauya kwandiri achibhururuka semhepo kumhanya panguva yechibayiro chamanheru." 
Daniel9:22 Akanditsanangurira achiti: “Dhanieri, chandabudira iye zvino kuzokupa ungwaru nokunzwisisa." 
Daniel9:23 Pakutanga kwawaita kuteterera kwako ndipo pabuda shoko randauya kuzokutaurira nokuti iwe uri wapamwoyo chaiye saka wochirangarira shoko racho unzwisise chiratidzo ichi. 
Daniel9:24 “Vanhu vokwako neguta rokwako rinoera makatemerwa makumi manomwe amakore akapetwa kanomwe okuti kukanganisa kupere nokugumisa chitadzo nokuripira uipi nokuunza ururami hunogara nokusingaperi uye nokutsinhira chiratidzo nomuporofita nokuzodza Nzvimbo Inoera. 
Daniel9:25 Saka wochiziva unyatsonzwisisa kuti kubvira panotaurwa shoko rokugadzirisa nokuvakazve Jerusaremu kusvikira panouya muzodzwa, muchinda, pachaita masvondo manomwe. Richavakwa kwamasvondo makumi matanhatu nemaviri richivakwa patsva namabwe nenhandare nemigero yacho asi muchange muri munguva yenhamo." 
Daniel9:26 Mushure memasvondo makumi matanhatu namaviri muzodzwa achagurwa pake pachimuperera. Ipapo vanhu vomuchinda achauya vachaparadza guta neNzvimbo Inoera. Kuguma kwacho kuchauya samafashamo iri hondo chete kusvikira kumagumo, zvokuparara zvakatotemwa." 
Daniel9:27 Achaita chitenderano chakasimba navazhinji kwesvondo rimwechete. Kwechikamu chepakati napakati pesvondo racho, achaita kuti zvibayiro nemipiro zvimbomira. Panzvimbo pazvo zvinhu zvinosemesa Mwari parutii rweTemberi pachava nechinosemesa Mwari chiya kusvika kumagumo kusvikira chirevo chokuparadza mharadzi iyoyo chatemwa.”" 
Daniel10:1 Mugore rechitatu rokutonga kwaSairasi mambo wePezhia, pane zvimwe zvinhu zvakaoneswa Dhanieri ainzi Bheriteshaza. Zvinhu zvacho zvaiva zvechokwadi, zvaiva zvehondo chaizvo. Zvinhu izvozvo akazvinzwisisa akanzwisisawo chiratidzo chacho." 
Daniel10:2 Mumazuva iwayo, ini Dhanieri ndaingunochema kwamasvondo matatu." 
Daniel10:3 Ndakanga ndisingadyi zvokudya zvakanakisa kana nyama kana waini yakambopinda mukanwa mangu. Handina kumbozora mafuta kwamasvondo matatu chaiwo akakwana. 
Daniel10:4 Pazuva ramakumi maviri nechina romwedzi wokutanga ndakanga ndimire pamahombekombe erwizi rukuru rwaTigirisi. 
Daniel10:5 Ndakasimudza musoro ndikatarisa ndikaona mumwe munhu akanga akapfeka rineni akasunga muchiuno bhandhi rendarama yeUfazi. 
Daniel10:6 Muviri wake wakanga wakaita samatombo ebheriri uso hwake huchiita semheni, maziso ake achingarikira somwenje womoto, maoko ake namakumbo achivaima sendarira yakakwenenzverwa ruzha rwezvaaitaura ruchiita semhomho yavanhu." 
Daniel10:7 Iyeni Dhanieri ndoga ndini ndakaona chiratidzo ichocho nokuti varume vandaiva navo havana kuona chiratidzo ichocho. Asi vakapindwa nokudedera kukuru kwazvo vakatiza kundohwanda. 
Daniel10:8 Ipapo ndakasiyiwa ndangova ndoga ndichiona chiratidzo ichocho chikuru asi ndisisina simba. Kunyatsoonekerawo kwouso hwangu kwakasanduka zvinotyisa ndikapera simba. 
Daniel10:9 Ndipo pandakanzwa izwi rake kutaura. Pandakanzwa kutaura kwake ikoko ndakabva ndati kwimha pasi nouso ndokubva ndanzi koche kubatwa nehope dzorufu uso hwangu huri pasi kudaro. 
Daniel10:10 Ndokubva ruoko rwandibata rukandipfugamisa namabvi namagokora ndichidedera. 
Daniel10:11 Akanditi, “Dhanieri, munhu wapamwoyo chaiye nyatsoteerera mazwi andava kukutaurira chinyatsomira nokuti zvino ndatumwa kwauri.” Paakataura neni izvozvi ndakamira ndichidedera." 
Daniel10:12 Akanditi, “Usatye zvako Dhanieri nokuti kubvira musi wawatangisa kuva nomwoyo wokuda kunzwisisa zvinhu izvozvi uchizvirereka pana Mwari wako, zvawaitaura zvakanzwika, nokudaro ndauya pamusana pezvawaireva." 
Daniel10:13 Asi muchinda wenyika yePezhia aipikisana neni kwamazuva makumi maviri nerimwechete. Asi Mikaeri mumwe wamachinda makuru akauya kuzondibatsira naizvozvo ndamusiya ikoko nomuchinda wenyika yePezhia.” 
Daniel10:14 Ndauya kuitira kuti unzwisise zvichawira vanhu vokwako mumazuva anotevera, nokuti chiratidzo ichochi ndechamazuva ari kuuya." 
Daniel10:15 Paakanditaurira saizvozvi, ndakabva ndati uso pasi tsikitsiki ndokushaya kana neromuromo." 
Daniel10:16 Ndokubva mumwe akaita sevanakomana vavanhu andigunzva miromo. Ndakashamisa muromo ndikataura kune uya akanga amire pamberi pangu kuti, “Changamire chiratidzo chiya ichi chakonzera kuti ndive nokurwadziwa kwandava nako handichisina simba." 
Daniel10:17 Ini muranda wenyu ndingataure seiko nemi changamire? Simba randiperera ini, handichakwanisi kufema.”" 
Daniel10:18 Uya uya wechimiro chinenge chomunhu akandibatazve akandisimbaradza. 
Daniel10:19 Akati, “Nhaiwe, munhu wapamwoyo chaiyechaiye, usatye, rugare ngaruve newe. Shinga utsunge mwoyo.” Paakataura kwandiri ndakabva ndasimbaradzwa ndokubva ndati, “Changamire chiregai nditaure nemi nokuti mandisimbaradza.”" 
Daniel10:20 Iye ndokuti, “Zvandauyira kwauri unozviziva here? Asi iye zvino ndava kudzokera kundorwisa muchinda wePezhia. Ndikange ndapedza naye ndipo pachauya muchinda wenyika yeGirisi." 
Daniel10:21 “Asi ini ndichakutaurira zvakanyorwa mubhuku rechokwadi. Hakuna kana mumwe angabatsire ari kudivi kwangu kusiya Mikaeri muchinda wokwenyu. 
Daniel11:1 “Asi ini mugore rokutanga rokutonga kwaDhariusi wechiMidhi, ndakasimuka kuti ndimusimbise nokumutsigira." 
Daniel11:2 Iye zvino ndava kukuratidza chokwadi.” “Chinzwa, kuchamuka madzimambo matatu munyika yePezhia. Wechina wacho achava mupfumi kupinda vamwe vose zvavo. Kana ave nesimba, pamusana poupfumi hwake acharunzira vamwe vose kuti varwise umambo hwenyika yeGirisi." 
Daniel11:3 Ndipo pachamuka mumwe mambo ane simba achatonga nesimba guru achiita zvake zvaanoda. 
Daniel11:4 Paachange amuka kudaro, umambo hwake huchaparadzwa hugokamuraniswa huchienda kumativi mana emhepo dzedenga. Izvozvo hunenge husingakamuraniswe pakati pevemba yake kana maererano nesimba rokutonga raaitonga naro nokuti umambo hwake huchatipurwa hugoiswa kune vamwewo vasiri ivava." 
Daniel11:5 “Mambo wokumaodzanyemba achange akasimba, asi mumwe wamachinda ake achange achimudarika pasimba uye umambo hwake hwaanenge achitonga huchange huri umambo hwakakura." 
Daniel11:6 Mushure memakore akati kuti vachaita chibvumirano. Mukunda wamambo wokumaodzanyemba achaenda kuna mambo wokuchamhembe kuti pave nokuwirirana. Asi mukunda iyeyo haazokwanisa kuramba aine simba mumaoko make. Murume wacho nomwana wake havambopagara, asi mukunda iyeyo achapfuudzwa pamwechete navanomushandira nomwana wake naiye akamuroora wacho." 
Daniel11:7 “Panguva iyoyo imwe nhungirwa yokudzinde kwakabva mukunda iyeyo yechirume ichamuka panzvimbo pake. Murume iyeyo achauya kuzorwisa hondo yacho yevarwi agopinda muguta retsvingo ramambo wokuchamhembe achivarwisa agovakurira. 
Daniel11:8 Achatakurawo achiendesa kuIjipiti vamwari vavo nezvifananidzo zvavo zvakaumbwa noutare hwakanyunguruswa pamwechete nemidziyo yavo inokosha yesirivha neyendarama. Achazoitawo makore akati kuti asingarwise mambo wokuchamhembe. 
Daniel11:9 Iye mambo wokuchamhembe anenge aenda kunyika yamambo wokumaodzanyemba achadzokera hake kunyika kwake. 
Daniel11:10 “Vanakomana vake vachaita hondo vagounganidza gurusvusvu guru rehondo dzavarwi dzichauya dziri bvakapfaka dzichipfuura, dzamukirira nayo hondo kudzamara dzasvika kunhare yake yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo." 
Daniel11:11 Ipapo aviruka nehasha, mambo wokumaodzanyemba achabuda kuzorwisa mambo wokuchamhembe. Achaunganidza gurusvusvu guru ravanhu asi richakurirwa namambo wokumaodzanyemba." 
Daniel11:12 Paachange akurira gurusvusvu iroro, achazvitutumadza agorakatisa kuuraya makumi namakumi ezviuru. Asi haazoramba achikurira" 
Daniel11:13 nokuti mambo wokuchamhembe achaunganidzazve gurumwandira rakakura kupfuura rekare riya. Mushure memakore akati kuti achauya aine hondo huru yevarwi aine zvinhu zvokurwisa nazvo zvakawanda. 
Daniel11:14 Munguva idzodzo, vazhinji vachamukira mambo wokumaodzanyemba, uye vanhu voutsinye pakati pavanhu vokwako vachamukawo kuti vazadzise chiratidzo ichochi asi vachakundika." 
Daniel11:15 Zvino mambo wokuchamhembe achauya ovaka chinenge musana wenzou chokukombesa nacho guta agorikurira, guta rakanyatsovakirirwa netsvingo. Varwi vehondo yokumaodzanyemba havambopamira kunyange zvikwata zvenyanzvi dzake dzavarwi nokuti simba rokumira panenge pasisina." 
Daniel11:16 Asi anenge angouya kuzomurwisa wacho achaita zvake zvaanoda hapana anombomirisana naye. Achamira munyika yembiri, yose zvayo ichava mumaoko make." 
Daniel11:17 “Achafunga zvokuuya nesimba rake rose roumambo achiuya nezvingaunze rugare agosvikozviita. Achamupa mhandara yomukadzi yokuti aparadze nayo nyika iyoyo asi hazvizoitika kana kumubatsira. 
Daniel11:18 Pedzepo achazopishinuka onanga kunyika dzokumahombekombe egungwa, achikukucha zvake kutora vazhinji. Asi mumwe mutungamiriri wehondo achapedza kuzvitutumadza kwake ikoko achinyatsoita kuti kuzvitutumadza kwake ikoko kumupindukire." 
Daniel11:19 Achazodzokako onanga kuguta retsvingo renyika yake, asi achadzadzarika agowira pasi zvokusazowanikwa." 
Daniel11:20 “Panzvimbo pake pachamuka mumwe achatuma wokuteresa mutero achiitira mbiri youmambo. Asi mushure memazuva mashomanana achaparara pasina zvehasha kana hondo.” 
Daniel11:21 “Panzvimbo pake pachamuka munhu anoshoreka asina kumbopiwa ukuru hwoumambo. Achangoyerekana apindamo agowana umambo nounyengedzi. 
Daniel11:22 Hondo nehondo dzichatsvairwa naye dzichiparara pamwechetewo nomuchinda uya wechitenderano. 
Daniel11:23 Kubvira panguva yavachaitirana chibvumirano naye iye achaita zvounyengedzi uye achava nesimba rakawanda kunyange aina vanhu vashoma. 
Daniel11:24 Achangozoyerekana asvika munzvimbo dzakapfumisisa kwazvo dzenyika iyoyo agoitamo zvisina ani ati amboita kana madzibaba ake kunyange madzitateguru ake zvawo achimwayanisa mukati mavo zvinhu zvokupamba nezvokutora muhondo nezvimwewo zvinhu. Nhare dzokuhwanda muhondo, achadzirongera mano asi zvichingova zvekachinguva." 
Daniel11:25 Achakoka simba agoita chivindi chokundorwisa mambo wokumaodzanyemba nehondo huru yavarwi. Mambowo wokumaodzanyemba acharwisawo aine hondo huru huru kwazvo ine simba asi haambopamira nokuti acharukirwa mazano. 
Daniel11:26 Kunyangewo vaanodya navo udobo hwake hwezvokudya zvakanaka ndivo vacho vachave mharadzi dzake. Hondo yake yavarwi ichatsvairwa, vazhinji vavo vagorakatiswa kufa." 
Daniel11:27 Madzimambo iwayo ari maviri achange ari pakunyengedza bedzi. Vachataurirana nhema ivo vachidya patebhuru imwechete asi zvisina chimuko nokuti kuguma kwacho kuchauya zvako nenguvawo yako yakatemwa. 
Daniel11:28 Ipapo iye achadzokera kunyika yake akagukuchira chaizvo zvinhu, asi mwoyo wake unenge uri pakurwisa chitenderano chinoera ichi. Ipapo achaita zvaanoda obva azodzokera kunyika yake." 
Daniel11:29 “Nenguva yakatemwa, achadzoka agosvikopinda kumaodzanyemba, asi rwendo runo hazvizoita sezvazvakamboita kare kaya." 
Daniel11:30 Sokuti ngarava dzokuKitimu dzichauya kuzomurwisa, zvino iye achatya agopishinuka odzokera kwaabva agosvikopedzera ushungushungu pakurwisa chitenderano chinoera. Achadzoka achiwirirana navanhu vakafuratira chitenderano chinoera." 
Daniel11:31 Hondo dzichabva kwaari dzichisvikon'oresa Temberi nenhare yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo dzicharegesawo mupiro wokupisa unogaroitwa. Uye vachamisa chimwe chisingambodiwa zvacho naMwari chinon'oresa. 
Daniel11:32 Achafurira achibata vanhu kumeso vanotyora chitenderano ichocho. Asi vanhu chaivo, vanoziva Mwari wavo vachamira vakasimba vachiwana zvokuita." 
Daniel11:33 Vangwaru mukati mavanhu'mu vachaita kuti vamwe vanzwisise kunyange zvazvo vachizoitwa murakatira kufa namapakatwa nomoto uye noutapwa nokupambwa kwamazuva akati kuti. 
Daniel11:34 Vachifa zvavo kudaro, vachawanawo chimwe chiduku chinovayamura, vazhinji vachabatana navo kuri kubatwa zvavo kumeso." 
Daniel11:35 Asi vamwe vavo vangwaru, vachafa kuri kuitira kuti vapepetwe vachinatswa pakati pavo vachene kudzamara nguva yokuguma nokuti nguva yakatemwa ichigere kusvika." 
Daniel11:36 “Mambo iyeyo achaita sokuda kwake zvake; achazvitutumadza achizvikudza pamusoro pavamwari vose achitaura zvinhu zvokushamisira achishora Mwari wavamwari. Achabudirira kusvikira Mwari aratidza hasha dzake nokuti zvakarongwa izvozvo zvichatoitika. 
Daniel11:37 Achava munhu asina hanya navamwari vemadzitateguru ake kana iye mwari wavakadzi, wapamwoyo pavo. Anenge asingamboona zvake kuti chinonzi mumwe mwari chii sezvo anenge achizvikudza pamusoro pavo vose zvavo." 
Daniel11:38 Iye acharemekedza mwari wamaguta nenhare yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo panzvimbo paivava, mwari akanga asingazikanwi namadzitateguru ake iyewo ndiye waachatoremekedza nendarama nesirivha namatombo anokosha nezvipo zvinodaidza mari yakawanda." 
Daniel11:39 Achawana zvaanoita nenhare dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo chaiyo akasungwa noutare kusimba achibatsirwa namwari wechirudzi. Vanenge vamugamuchira achavakudza nokuvapa mbiri achivaita vatongi vavanhu vakawanda achikamura-kamura zvake nyika achiitengesa. 
Daniel11:40 “Pakupera kwenguva iyoyo, mambo wokumaodzanyemba achamurwisa. Asi mambo wokuchamhembe achamuvhunga sechinyamupupuri aine ngoro dzehondo navarwi vamabhiza nengarava zhinji. Izvozvo achapinda mudzinyika vagoita bvakanyira imomo nokudimura zvavo nomo." 
Daniel11:41 Achapinda munyika yembiri makumi namakumi ezviuru agoita murakatira kufa. Asi vachapunyutswa mumaoko make ndevava vanoti nyika yeEdhomu neMoabhu nechikamu chikuru chaicho chavaAmoni. 
Daniel11:42 Nesimba roruoko rwake acharwisa chaizvo dzinyika, kana nyika yeIjipitiwo haipunyuki ipapo." 
Daniel11:43 Upfumi hwendarama nesirivha huchava mumaoko make nezvinhu zvose zvakakosha zveIjipiti; vokuRibhiya nevaItiopia vava kutotevera gwara rake iye. 
Daniel11:44 Asi nhau dzichabva kumabvazuva nokuchamhembe dzichamushayisa mazano. Ipapo achaendako achiviruka kwazvo nehasha kundotsakatisa achiparadza zvokuparadza zviya vazhinji. 
Daniel11:45 Ipapo achazvidzikira muzinda womusasa wematendhe pakati pegungwa negomo rembiri rinoera. Asi ikoko ndokuchava kuguma kwake pasina anomubatsira. 
Daniel12:1 “Panguva iyoyo ndipo pachamuka Mikaeri, iye muchinda mukuru anomiririra vanhu vokwako. Pachaita nguva yenhamo isati yambovapo kubvira pakatanga kuva norudzi rwavanhu kusvikira panguva yacho iyoyo. Asi nguva iyoyo munhu wose wokwako anenge aine zita richawanikwa rakanyorwa mubhuku, achanunurwa." 
Daniel12:2 Vazhinji vevavete muvhu renyika vachamuka, vamwe vachamukira upenyu husingaperi, asi vamwe vachimukira kunyadziswa nokushorwa kusina mugumo." 
Daniel12:3 Vangwaru vachapenya sechiedza cheziendanakuenda romudenga uye vanhu vanotendeutsira vazhinji kuururami vachapenya senyenyedzi narini narini. 
Daniel12:4 “Asi iwe Dhanieri viga mashoko aya unamire bhuku racho kusvikira nguva yokuguma, vazhinji vachatsvagurudza uye ruzivo ruchawedzerwa.”" 
Daniel12:5 Ini Dhanieri ndakatarisa ndikaona vamwe vaviri vakanga vakamira, mumwe amire pamahombekombe orukova nechemhiri ino mumwewo amire pamahombekombe orukova kumhiri uko." 
Daniel12:6 Ndakati kumunhu akanga akapfeka rineni uya aiva kumusoro kwemvura yomurukova irwowo, “Kuchapera nguva yakadii yokuzosvika kumagumo kwezvishamiso izvozvi?”" 
Daniel12:7 Munhu akanga akapfeka rineni aiva kumusoro kwemvura yomurukova uya akasumudzira ruoko rwake rworudyi noruoko rwake rworuboshwe kudenga. Ndakamunzwa achipika naiye Chidzachapo kuti, “Zvichasaruka zvigosarukazve kaviri nokutozosvika pachikamu chapakati napakati chamakei acho uye kuti pachazoperawo zvokuparadza simba rorudzi runoera, zvinhu zvose izvozvi zvichange zvatoitika.”" 
Daniel12:8 Kunzwa ndakanzwa asi handina kunzwisisa. Ndipo pandakati, “Nhai changamire wangu. Zvinhu izvozvo zvichaperera mukuita sei?”" 
Daniel12:9 Iye akati, “Chienda zvako Dhanieri nokuti mazwi acho mashoko akavigwa akanamirirwa kusvikira panguva yokuguma." 
Daniel12:10 Vazhinji vachazvichenura vachinyatsozvichenesa vagova vanhu vakanatswa, asi vakaipa vachaita zvakaipa. Hapana wakaipa achanzwisisa, asi vangwaru vachanzwisisa." 
Daniel12:11 “Kubvira panguva icharegeswa mupiro wokupisa uye pachamiswa chimwe chisingambodiwa zvacho naMwari chinon'oresa chiya, pachaita chiuru chimwechete chamazuva china mazuva mazana maviri namakumi mapfumbamwe." 
Daniel12:12 Akakomborerwa zvake achamirira kusvikira mumazuva chiuru chimwechete namazana matatu anamazuva makumi matatu namashanu. 
Daniel12:13 “Asi iwe wochiita maitiro ako iwayo kusvikira kumagumo ugozozorora uchizova panzvimbo yakowo yawakapiwa mumazuva okupedzesera.” 
Hosea1:1 Herinoi shoko raTenzi, raakataurira Hosea mwanakomana waBheeri nguva yaitonga madzimambo aya okwaJudha anoti: Uziya naJotamu naAhazi naHezekiya uye iri nguvawo yaJerobhoamu mambo wokwaIsiraeri mwanakomana waJehoashi." 
Hosea1:2 Pakatangisisa chaipo Tenzi kutaura nomuromo waHosea, iye Tenzi akati kuna Hosea, “Enda undotora pfambi uite vana nayo voufeve nokuti nyika iri kuita ufeve hwakakurisa kwazvo hwokufuratira Tenzi.”" 
Hosea1:3 Saizvozvowo akaenda akandotora Gomero mwanasikana waDhibhuraimu. Iye akaita pamuviri akamuberekera mwana mukomana. 
Hosea1:4 Tenzi akabva ati kuna Hosea, “Mutumidze zita rokuti ‘Jezirieri,’ nokuti kwangosara kanguva kadikidiki kwokuti ndichiranga imba yaJehu, ndichiirangira ropa raakadeura kuJezirieri, ndichitsakatisa umambo hwokwaIsiraeri." 
Hosea1:5 Pazuva iroro ndichaparadza hondo yavarwi vouta yeIsiraeri muBani reJezirieri.” 
Hosea1:6 Akaitazve pamuviri akasununguka mwana musikana. Tenzi akabva ati kuna Hosea, “Tumidza musikana uyu zita rokuti, ‘Mushayirwatsitsi’ nokuti handichaitirazve imba yokwaIsiraeri tsitsi. Handimbofa ndakavaregerazve." 
Hosea1:7 Asi imba yokwaJudha, ndichaiitira tsiye nyoro ndigovanunura nesimba raTenzi, Mwari wavo. Handisi kuzovanunura nouta kana nebakatwa kana nehondo kunyange namabhiza kana navarwi vamabhiza.”" 
Hosea1:8 Mukadzi uyu paakarumura Mushayirwatsitsi, akabata pamuviri akabereka mwana mukomana." 
Hosea1:9 Tenzi akati kuna Hosea, “Mudaidzei zita rokuti, ‘Vasivangu’ nokuti imi hamusi vanhu vangu. Iniwo handisi Mwari wenyu.”" 
Hosea1:10 Zvakadaro zvazvo, vanhu vokwaIsiraeri vachawanda sejecha regungwa risingagone kuerwa kana kuverengeka. Panzvimbo pokuti munzi, “Vasivangu” muchanzi “Vanhu vaMwari mupenyu.”" 
Hosea1:11 Vanhu vokwaJudha navanhu vokwaIsiraeri vachaunganidzwa pamwechete. Vachazvisarudzira mutungamiriri mumwechete vagomera munyika ino nokuti zuva rokusima kwaMwari iroro richava zuva guru kwazvo. 
Hosea2:1 Chiti kuvakomanavanun'una vako, “Vava vanhu vangu,” utaurire hanzvadzi dzako kuti, “Mava kunzwirwa tsitsi.” Tsiurai amai venyu!" 
Hosea2:2 Vatsiurei nokuti havachisiri mukadzi wangu, uye handichisiri murume wavo, kuitira kuti vabvise pauso hwavo zviratidzo zvoufeve hwavo nezvinoratidza ufeve hwavo zviri pakati pamazamu avo." 
Hosea2:3 Ndingadaro ndikavapfekenura mbatya vakasara vangoita sokuuya kwavakaita musi wavakaberekwa ndivaite segwenga zvaro, ndivaite senyika yakaoma ndikavauraya nenyota." 
Hosea2:4 Kunyange nemiwo vana vacho, handisi kuzokunzwiraiwo tsitsi nokuti muri vana voupombwe imi," 
Hosea2:5 pamusana pokuti amai venyu vakaita ufeve, ivo vakabata pamuviri penyu ndivo vacho vakaita zvinhu zvakafumuka nokuti amai ava vakati, “Regai nditeveredzane nezvikomba zvangu zvinondiwanisa sadza nemvura newuru neshinda yofurakisi namafuta nezvokunwira-nwira.”" 
Hosea2:6 Naizvozvo ndichasosa nzira yavo neminzwa ndigovavakirira nerusvingo kuti vatadze kuwana nzira dzavo. 
Hosea2:7 Vacharonda zvikomba zvavo vagotadza kuzvibata, vachazvitsvaka vagozvishaya. Ndipo pavachati, “Regai ndisve ndadzokera kumurume wangu wokutanga nokuti zvakanga zviri nani kwandiri pane zvazviri nhasi.”" 
Hosea2:8 Havaimboziva kuti ndini ndaivapa mbesanwa newaini namafuta uye kuti ndaivapa matutu namatutu emari, sirivha nendarama yavaishandisa kunamata zvavo Bhaari." 
Hosea2:9 Naizvozvo ini ndichavatorera mbesanwa dzangu panguva yadzo newaini yangu itsva mumwaka wayo, ndichabvisa wuru yangu neshinda yangu yefurakisi yavaizowana nayo zvokupfeka." 
Hosea2:10 Iye zvino ndava kuzovafumura ufeve hwavo ihwohwo vaonererwe nezvikomba zvavo. Hakuna kana nomumwechete achagona kuvanunura mumaoko mangu 
Hosea2:11 kusasana nokufara kwavo ndichakupedza; pamwechete namazuva avo makuru neokugara kwomwedzi yavo namasabata avo namamwe mazuva avo makuru avakatemerwa. 
Hosea2:12 Minda yavo yamagirepisi nemiti yemionde ndichaisiya isisina chinhu, iyo yavaizuwa nayo vachiti, “Ndizvo zvomuripo wangu izvi wandakapiwa nezvikomba zvangu.” Ndichaiita kuti rive sango zvaro ichidyiwa zvayo nemhuka dzesango." 
Hosea2:13 Ndichavarangira mazuva makuru avanochengetera vanaBhaari pamunopisira rusenzi kwavari vachizvishongedza nemhete nezvishongo zvinokosha vachiteveredzana nezvikomba zvavo vachitondikanganwa zvavo. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Hosea2:14 Naizvozvo chinzwai, ndichanyengetedza amai venyu ndiende navo kurenje nditaure navo zvinovabata mwoyo." 
Hosea2:15 Ikoko ndokwandichavadzosera minda yavo yamagirepisi ndigoita kuti Bani rokutambura rive musuo wechitarisiro. Ikokowo vachadaira sapamazuva avo oumhandara senguva iya yavakabuda muIjipiti. 
Hosea2:16 Zvanzi naTenzi, pazuva iroro, mudzimai iwe uchazondidaidza kuti, “Murume wangu.” Hauchazondidaidza kuti, “Bhaari wangu.”" 
Hosea2:17 Ndinodaro nokuti ndichabvisa mazita avanaBhaari pamuromo pake, havachazodomwazve nezita." 
Hosea2:18 Pazuva iroro, kuri kuitiremi zvenyu, ndichaita chitenderano nemhuka dzesango neshiri dzedenga nezvinokambaira nepasi, zvouta nezvamapakatwa nezvehondo izvi, munyika muno, ndigozvipedza ndichiita kuti munyatsorara zvenyu pasina chinokuwanai." 
Hosea2:19 Ndichakuroorazve uchiva wangu nokusingaperi. Ndichakuroorazve ndigova pachokwadi newe. Zvandinenge ndoita kwauri, zvinenge zviri zvinhu zviri pamwero zvine rudo chairwo netsitsi." 
Hosea2:20 Ndichakuroorazve tigoitirana mukutendeka. Ndipo pachazoziva Tenzi. 
Hosea2:21 Zvanzi naTenzi, “Pazuva iroro, ini ndichanzwa chichemo chamatenga, matengawo achanzwawo chichemo chenyika mvura igonaya," 
Hosea2:22 nyikawo igopindurawo chichemo ichocho nembesanwa newaini namafuta zvichipindura chichemo chaMwarianosima.” 
Hosea2:23 Ndichamusimireni pachangu munyika iyoyi, ndichinzwirawo tsitsi, “Mushayirwatsitsi” ndigoti kuna, “Vasivangu,” “Imi mava vanhu vangu,” Vasivangu achizotiwo, “Ndimi Mwari wangu.”" 
Hosea3:1 Tenzi akanditiwo, “Chiendazve undodanana nomukadzi ane chikomba iye ari pfambi, sezvakangoitawo Tenzi anoda vanhu veIsiraeri, kunyange zvazvo ivo vachitendeukira kune vamwe vamwari vachitorwa mwoyo nezvambwa zvamaonde," 
Hosea3:2 saizvozvo ndakamubvisira mari yesirivha yemashekeri gumi namashanu nebhari inoita masaga matatu.” 
Hosea3:3 Ndakamuti, “Unofanira kugara somudzimai wangu kwemazuva mazhinji. Zvoupfambiwo izvi kana zvokuenda kune mumwe murume, woregera. Iniwo ndozvandichaita kwauri.”" 
Hosea3:4 Ndinodaro nokuti vaIsiraeri vachagara kwamazuva mazhinji vasina mambo kana muchinda, vasina chibayiro kana musimboti unoera zvawo kana hanzu yeefodhi kana terafimu zvaro." 
Hosea3:5 Mushure maizvozvo vaIsiraeri vachadzoka zvavo kuzotsvaka Tenzi, Mwari wavo, naDhavhidhi mambo wavo. Vachauya kuna Tenzi vachitya kumakomborero ake mumazuva achauya iwayo." 
Hosea4:1 Chinzwai munzwe shoko raTenzi, “Imi vanhu veIsiraeri, nokuti Tenzi ane mhosva yaari kupa imi vagari venyika ino, pamusana pokuti chokwadi hapasisina, mwoyo wakanaka hapasisina, kana kuziva Mwari chaiko hapasisina munyika'mu." 
Hosea4:2 Kupika nhema nokureva nhema nokuuraya, nokuba nokuita upombwe, uye utsinye husina muganhu, uyezve kuuraya kusina magumo." 
Hosea4:3 Ndokusaka nyika ichichema kudai, vosewo vagere mairi, vapera simba, uyewo mhuka dzesango neshiri dzedenga kunyange hove dzegungwa dzichabviswa.”" 
Hosea4:4 “Asi zvokupomerana mhosva regai zvenyu kupomerana, kana kutsoropodzana nokuti chaiye wandinopa mhosva ndiwe iyewe mupristi." 
Hosea4:5 Uchadzadzarika masikati machena muporofitawo achadzadzarika pamwechete newe nousiku. Ndichaparadza Isiraeri amai venyu ivavo. 
Hosea4:6 Vanhu vangu vaparara nokushaya ruzivo pamusana pokuti iwe wakaramba ruzivo, iniwo ndinokuramba kuti uve mupristi kwandiri. Pamusana pokukanganwa kwawakaita mutemo waMwari wako, iniwo pachangu ndichakanganwawo vana vako." 
Hosea4:7 “Sokuwanda kwamakaita, imi vapristi ndokuwandawo kwakaita zvitadzo zvenyu kwandiri. Mhiri yenyu ndichaisandura ndikaiita nyadzi." 
Hosea4:8 Zvitadzo zvavanhu vangu ndizvo zvinokuraramisai ndokusaka muchitosuwira kuti dai zvitadzo zvatonyanya kuwanda. 
Hosea4:9 Sezvinenge zvaita mupristi ndizvowo zvichange zvakaita vanhu ndichakurangirai maitiro enyu ndichatsividza zviito zvenyu. 
Hosea4:10 Kudya, muchadya zvenyu asi musingaguti, zvoufeve izvi muchiita asi pasina vana vanoberekwa nokuti makafuratira Tenzi muchifarira ufeve." 
Hosea4:11 “Waini newaini itsva zvinotora vanhu mwoyo. 
Hosea4:12 Vanhu vangu vanondobvunzira kuchinhu chechimuti zvacho mudonzvo wavo uriwo unovaitira maminimini, nokuti mweya woupfambi wakavateteretsera mutome. Vanosiya Mwari wavo vachienda kundoita zvoufeve." 
Hosea4:13 Zvavanoita zvacho ndezvokuti, vanondopira zvibayiro pamusoro pamakomo vachipira mipiro pamusoro pezvikomo pasi pemuoku nomupopura nomuti womuterebhini nokuti mumvuri wayo wakanaka. “Ndokusaka vanasikana venyu vachiita zvavo upfambi, varoorawo venyu vachiita zvavo upombwe." 
Hosea4:14 Handisi kuzoranga vanasikana venyu ivo vanoita upfambi vacho kunyange ivo varoora venyu vacho vanoita upombwe nokuti varumewo pachavo vanotsaukawo nepfambi. Vanopirawo zvibayiro pamwechete nemhombwe kana zvifeve zvetemberi. Zvino vanhu vasinganzwisisi vachasvika mukuparara. 
Hosea4:15 “Iwe Isiraeri kunyange zvazvo uchiita ufeve vokwaJudha ngavarege kubatwa mumhosva idzodzo. Ngavarege kundopira kuGirigari kana kukwira kuBhetiavheni kunyange kupika vachiti, ‘NaTenzi chaiye mupenyu.’ ”" 
Hosea4:16 Isiraeri itsvuura muromo chaiyo, tsiru zvaro risingabatiki, pakadaro, Tenzi ndipo paangavafudze here sehwayana zvadzo dziri mumafaro akafara?" 
Hosea4:17 VokwaEfuremu vapindwawo nomweya wokunamata zvifananidzo, varegei vakadaro." 
Hosea4:18 Chikwata zvacho chezvidhakwa zvavanhu vanongoda zvoufeve. Vanotorwa mwoyo chaizvo nezvinhu zvakafumuka kutodarika chaizvo kuda kwavanoita zvinhu zvinovapa chimiro. 
Hosea4:19 “Vapindwa nomweya iwoyu unovatututsa, zvezvibayiro zvavo izvozvi zvichavanyadzisa.”" 
Hosea5:1 “Chinzwai, imi vapristi, muteerere imi vemba yokwaIsiraeri, muteye nzeve imi vemba yokwamambo, nokuti mhosva yacho ndeyenyu pamusana pokuti imi, ndimi makava chokuteya nacho vanhu kuMizipa'ku, mumbure zvawo wakachinzi wareware kuteyewa paGomo reTabhori," 
Hosea5:2 mukaita hunza yakadzika kuShitimu asi ndichakurangai mose zvenyu. 
Hosea5:3 VokwaEfuremu ndinovaziva hapanawo chokwaIsiraeri chakavanzika kwandiri nokuti kutaura kuno imi vokwaEfuremu makaita ufeve imi vokwaIsiraeri man'ora.” 
Hosea5:4 Twavanoita twava kuvatadzisa kudzokera kuna Mwari wavo nokuti mweya woufeve uyu uri mavari, uye havazivi Tenzi." 
Hosea5:5 Kuzvitutumadza kwevokwaIsiraeri, kwava kuvapfukira, vokwaEfuremu vachadzedzereka nemhosva yavo iyoyo, vokwaJudhawo vachadzadzarika pamwechete navo." 
Hosea5:6 Nezvibayiro zvemombe nezvimwewo zvipfuwo vachaenda kundotsvaka Tenzi, asi havazi kuzomuwana nokuti kwavari akabva." 
Hosea5:7 Havana kuva pachokwadi naTenzi nokuti vakaita vana vomusango. Zvino Zuva guru rokugara kwomwedzi ndorichava kuparara kwavo iyemi neminda yenyu. 
Hosea5:8 Ridzirai hwamanda muGibhea, nebhosvo muRama, muridze huhwi muBhetiavheni. Narwoyi rwokurwisa imi vokwaBhenjamini" 
Hosea5:9 Efuremu ichasara yangova nyika zvayo, isina chinhu pazuva rayo rokurangwa. Zvandiri kutaura ini ichokwadi ichocho mukati memadzinza okwaIsiraeri." 
Hosea5:10 “Machinda okwaJudha angovawo savanhu vanobvisa hoko yomuganhu, hasha dzangu dzichadirana pavari semvura." 
Hosea5:11 VokwaEfuremu vari kudzvinyirirwa kutongwa kwavo ndokwekumbunyikidzwa, pamusana pokuti vakaramba voda zvisina maturo." 
Hosea5:12 Naizvozvo ini ndava sechipfukuto kune vokwaEfuremu uye sechiundudzi kune vemba yokwaJudha. 
Hosea5:13 “VokwaEfuremu pavakaona chirwere chavo, vokwaJudha vachionawo ronda ravo, ipapo vokwaEfuremu vakaenda kuAsiria votuma nhume kuna mambo mukuru uya. Asi zvokukurapai haasi kuzokwanisa kana kuporesa ronda renyu." 
Hosea5:14 Ndinodaro nokuti kune vokwaEfuremu ndichaita seshumba chaiyo, kune vemba yokwaJudha ndichaita semhondoro ichiri kuzvinzwa. “Ini iyeni pachangu ndichavabvambura ndigoenda zvangu ndichizvuzvurudza pasina anogona kununura." 
Hosea5:15 “Ndichadzokerazve kunzvimbo yangu kusvikira vabvuma mhosva yavo vachizonditsvaga, vapindwa nenhamo kudaro vava kunditsvaga vachiti.”" 
Hosea6:1 “Uyai tidzokere kuna Tenzi nokuti ndiye akatibvambura kudai, kuti atirape; ndiye akadai kutirova, achatisunga maronda." 
Hosea6:2 Mushure memazuva kana maviri zvawo achatimutsurudza, mune rechitatu iri achitimutsa kuti tigare zvedu naye." 
Hosea6:3 Ngatizivei, ngativavarirei kuziva Tenzi kuuya kwake kuri pachokwadi sokusvika kunoita mambakwedza, achauya kwatiri semvura inonaya semvura yomunhuruka inodiridza nyika." 
Hosea6:4 “Ndodiiko nemi vanhu vokwaEfuremu? Ndodiiko ini nemi vanhu vokwaJudha? Rudo rwenyu, rwakaita semhute yemangwanani, sedova zvaro risingatani kunyungudika." 
Hosea6:5 Ndokusaka ndakavapanha nevaporofita, ndichivasakadza kuuraya namazwi omuromo wangu. Kutonga kwangu kunoti bha-a kuvheneka sechiedza." 
Hosea6:6 Ndinodaro nokuti chandinoda ini, rudo chairwo kwete zvibayiro, uye kuziva Mwari pane kupirwa mipiro yokupisa." 
Hosea6:7 “Asi savanhu vakatyora Chitenderano ikoko havana kuva vanhu vakatendeseka kwandiri. 
Hosea6:8 Gireadhi iguta ravaiti vezvakaipa, guta revadeuri veropa." 
Hosea6:9 Sezvinongoita makororo kuhwandira vanhu ndizvozvo zviri kuitwa navapristi, vanouraya vanhu panzira inoenda Shikemu. Ndozvavanoita chaizvo zvakaipisa." 
Hosea6:10 Ndakaona chinhu chakaipisisa muimba yokwaIsiraeri VokwaEfuremu vanoita ufeve vachin'oresa vanhu vokwaIsiraeri," 
Hosea6:11 nemiwo vokwaJudha muchakohwa mubayiro wenyu wakakumirirai. Pandichadzosa kutapwa vanhu vangu.” 
Hosea7:1 Ndichiporesa vokwaIsiraeri, kuipa mwoyo kwevokwaEfuremu kuchaiswa pachena, nezviito zvakaipa zveSamaria zvichange zvichiiswawo pachena nokuti vanoita ujarijari uku mbavha dzinopaza kunze uku, mabhinya achipamba." 
Hosea7:2 Asi havambofungi kuti inini ndinoyeuka zvakaipa zvavo zvose. Zvino zvitadzo zvavo zvakavakomberedza ini ndiri kuzviona zvangu. 
Hosea7:3 “Vanotobata mambo kumeso nouipi hwavo vachibata kumeso machinda nounyengedzi hwavo. 
Hosea7:4 Vose zvavo, imhombwe, dzinoita sehovhoni yapisa, ine mubiki amborega zvake kukuchidzira moto, achimbokanya mukanyiwa kusvikira watutumuka nembiriso." 
Hosea7:5 Pazuva guru ramambo, machinda akarwara nomudumbu, vakabva vadziirwa newaini mambo akatobatana zvake maoko nevashonhi." 
Hosea7:6 Ndinodaro nokuti sokupisa kunoita hovhoni, ivo vanotorwa mwoyo netwavanoronga, usiku hwose zvahwo hasha dzavo dzinorariropfumbuka, mumangwanani umu dzichin'anduka serimi romoto." 
Hosea7:7 Vose zvavo vanopisa sehovhoni vanoparadza vatongi vavo. Madzimambo avo ose akaurayiwa hapana kunyange mumwechete wavo anonamata kwandiri. 
Hosea7:8 “VokwaEfuremu vava kudyidzana nevechirudzi, vokwaEfuremu vava kunge mbodza zvayo yechingwa." 
Hosea7:9 Vatorwa vari kuvasveta simba asi ivo havasi kumbozviziva, vhudzi ravo rava neimvi, asi havasi kuzviziva." 
Hosea7:10 Kuzvitutumadza kwevokwaIsiraeri kwavapfukira zvino asi havasi kudzoka kuna Tenzi, Mwari wavo, kunyange kumutsvaka pamusana pezvose izvozvi." 
Hosea7:11 VokwaEfuremu ava vakaita senjiva yakazungaira inoita zvisina musoro, vanoridzira mhere yorubatsiro kuIjipiti pedzepo voenda kuAsiria." 
Hosea7:12 Vachiendako kudaro, ndichati pamusoro pavo mumbure wangu ware ware ndivarakatise seshiri dzedenga ndichivarangira zviito zvavo zvakaipa." 
Hosea7:13 “Zvichavawana zvavo ivo vakatetereka vachibva kwandiri, kuparadzwa ndokwavo, nokuti vakandipandukira. “Kuvanunura, ndaigona zvangu kuvanunura asi vanotaura manyepo nezvangu." 
Hosea7:14 Havanamati kwandiri nemwoyo wose asi vanohwihwidza kuchema vari pamibhedha yavo. Pavanokumbira mbesanwa newaini vanonamata vachizvicheka-cheka muviri vachitondipandukira zvavo. 
Hosea7:15 Kunyange zvazvo, ndiri ini zvangu, ndakavadzidzisa ndichivasimbaradza, asi ivo vakaita bangano rokutondipandukira zvavo." 
Hosea7:16 Vanotendeukira kundonamata Bhaari vachiita souta hwakakombama-kombama. Machinda avo achafa nehondo yebakatwa pamusana pokuzvizuwidza kwavanoita nomuromo wavo. Izvozvi izvi zvichavaita kuti vave chiseko chaicho kunyika yeIjipiti.” 
Hosea8:1 “Nomuromo wako, chiridza bhosvo sezvo vemba yokwaTenzi vatova nyama yemagora nokuti vakatyora chitenderano changu ini navo vakatyora mutemo wangu." 
Hosea8:2 Kwandiri ndokwavanochema vachiti, ‘Nhai Mwari wangu! Inga isu vokwaIsiraeri tinokuzivai wani!’" 
Hosea8:3 Asi vokwaIsiraeri ivavo, vakasema zvinhu zvakanaka, muvengi achavaronda." 
Hosea8:4 “Vakagadza madzimambo avo vasina kumboti ini ndive mukati mazvo; vakazvisarudzira machinda vasina kundizivisa nesirivha yavo, nendarama yavo, vakazvigadzirira zvifananidzo zvokunamata kuri kuzvitsvakira kuparadzwa." 
Hosea8:5 Ndinosema kwazvo mhuru yako yaunoeresa, iwe guta reSamaria. Ndinovirukira nehasha vanhu ivavo. Kuchasvika rinhi chaizvo kuti vokwaIsiraeri vazova vanhu vavatsvene." 
Hosea8:6 Inga wani zvakabva muIsiraeri. Zvakagadzirwa nemhizha mhuru iyoyo, haisi Mwari. Mhuru yacho inoereswa muSamaria ichapwanyiwa kuti mwarara" 
Hosea8:7 nokuti vanodyara mhepo vachakohwawo chamupupuri; mashanga zvawo akangomira asina hura asingape upfu. Dai aipa upfu, vatorwa ndovaitohudya zvavo." 
Hosea8:8 Asi Isiraeri yamedzwa iyi. Yatova zvayo somudziyo usina basa mukati mevechirudzi. 
Hosea8:9 VokwaIsiraeri idhongi zvaro, romusango riri kudzungaira roga nokuti vakakwira kuAsiria, vokwaEfuremu vakaita zvokutondotenga zvikomba." 
Hosea8:10 Kunyange zvazvo vakaita zvokubhadhara vatorwa vokuvakuta, mukati mevechirudzi ndichavakokorodza zvangu iye zvino uno vamborega kwakanguva kadiki zvokugadza mambo namachinda." 
Hosea8:11 “Kunyange vokwaEfuremu vakavaka zvavo atari neatari dzokupfupirira zvitadzo, atari dzacho dzava atari dzokuparira zvitadzo." 
Hosea8:12 Ndikavanyorera zviuru zvemitemo yangu; ivo, vanotoshama kuti ndochii ichochi." 
Hosea8:13 Zvokupira zvibayiro ndizvo zvavanofarira vanoitaka chibayiro chenyama vodya nyama iyoyo asi Tenzi haambozvifarira iye zvino ava kutorangarira uipi hwavo agorangira zvitadzo zvavo. Vachapishinukira kwakare kuIjipiti," 
Hosea8:14 nokuti vokwaIsiraeri vakakanganwa Musiki wavo vakavaka mizinda. VokwaJudha vakavakawo maguta etsvingo akawanda asi ndichatuma moto pamaguta avo, ucharoromesa nzvimbo dzavo dzokuzvidzivirira muhondo.”" 
Hosea9:1 Musafare imi vokwaIsiraeri, musapembere kufara sezvinoita marudzi nokuti makaita ufeve muchifuratira Mwari wenyu. Makafarira muripo woufeve nezvinowanika pamaburiro ose ose." 
Hosea9:2 Paburiro pacho napachisviniro chewaini hapana chokudya chavanowanapo, uye zvewaini itsva zvichavaperera." 
Hosea9:3 Munyika yaTenzi, havacharamba vageremo asi kutoti vokwaEfuremu vachadzokera kuIjipiti uye vachazodya chokudya chakan'ora vava kuAsiria'ku." 
Hosea9:4 Ikoko zvokuti ivo vapire mipiro yokuteura yewaini kuna Tenzi, panenge pasisina, vasisakwanisi kumufadza nezvibayiro zvavo. Chokudya chavo chichange chichiita sechokudya chaparufu chinon'oresa wose anochidya nokuti chokudya chavo chichange chiri chokupodza nzara yavo chete chisingaendwe nacho kumba yaTenzi." 
Hosea9:5 Zvino pazuva guru rakatemwa muchaitei, uye pazuva guru raTenzi?" 
Hosea9:6 Ndinodaro nokuti izvozvi, vari kutoenda mukuparadzwa. Ijipiti ichavatuta vachindovigwa kuMemufisi. Hunye huchati memete pazvinhu zvavo zvinokosha zvesirivha mumisha yavo yematendhe muchava neminzwa." 
Hosea9:7 Mazuva okurangwa asvika mazuva okutsiva auya vokwaIsiraeri muchazoziva izvozvo. Kwamuri imi; muporofita, ibenzi romunhu; munhu anenge afemerwa naMweya, munhu anopenga, pari pamusana pouipi hwenyu hwakaipisisa uye pamusana peruvengo rwenyu rwakanyanyisa." 
Hosea9:8 Muporofita ndiye munhu ane basa rokutarisa zvinoitika muvanhu vokwaEfuremu, vanhu vaMwari wangu. Asi muporofita ari kuteyiwa nzira dzake dzose seshiri achivengwa mumba yaMwari wake." 
Hosea9:9 Vakanyatsoti tindindi kwazvo kunyura muzviito zvakaora somumazuva eGibhea. Mwari acharangarira uipi hwavo agovarangira zvitadzo zvavo. 
Hosea9:10 “Kuwana kwandakaita Isiraeri yainge magirepisi omusango nepandakaonawo madzibaba enyu ndakaaona semaonde okutangisa mumwaka wawo wokutanga. Asi pavakasvika kuBhaaripeori vakazvipira kunamata Bhaari vakabva vava chinhu chinosemesa kutofanana nechinhu chavakanga vava kuda ichocho. 
Hosea9:11 Mbiri yevokwaEfuremu ichabhururuka kutiza seshiri. Zvokusununguka mwana pasisina, zvokuzvitakura zvapera kusisina zvokubata pamuviri." 
Hosea9:12 Kunyange zvazvo vakarera vana ndichaita kuti vafirwe kusvikira pasisina anosara. Zvichavawana zvavo pandichavafuratira.” 
Hosea9:13 Sokuona kwangu, vanhu vokwaEfuremu vatova nyama yemagora. VokwaEfuremu chavo chete kutungamirira vana vavo kundourayiwa." 
Hosea9:14 Imi Tenzi vapei zvamunenge mada kuvapa, vapei kuti vaparadzike pamuviri uye mazamu akaoma." 
Hosea9:15 “Uipi hwavo hwose hwabvira kuGirigari ndiko kwandakatangisira kuvavenga kwaita kuti ndivarange Pamusana pouipi hwamabasa avo ndichavadzinga mumba mangu. Handichambodazve; machinda avo ose imhandupandu chaidzo dzevanhu. 
Hosea9:16 VokwaEfuremu, vava muti zvavo wakarohwa mudzi wawo ukaoma havachabereka muchero. Kunyange vakabereka vana ndichauraya vana vavo vapamwoyo.”" 
Hosea9:17 Mwari wangu achavarasa, nokuti havana kumuteerera; vachava vadzungairi mukati mavanhu vechirudzi." 
Hosea10:1 VokwaIsiraeri vaiva mugirepisi wakanyatsopasa kwazvo uchibereka michero yawo. Waiti ukawadzura kubereka michero, ivo ndopovovaka atari neatari. Sokubudirirawo kwaiita nyika yavo ndokunyatsogadziridzwawo kwavaiita shongwe dzamabwe dzakamisirwa vamwari vavo." 
Hosea10:2 Vane mwoyo wokunyengera; nokudaro vanofanira kupfukirwa nemhosva yavo. Tenzi achaparadza atari dzavo achipaza shongwe dzavo dzamabwe dzakamisirwa vamwari vavo. 
Hosea10:3 Ndinodaro nokuti iye zvino izvi vachati, “Hatina mambo nokuti hatityi Tenzi. Zvino mambo chaangatiitirewo pakadaro ndechipi?”" 
Hosea10:4 Kutaura kwavo, ndezvepamuromo chete, kana voita zvitsidzirano vanoita mhiko dzechipameso. Saka kutonga kwakarurama kwava bise runomera mumvinga dzomumunda." 
Hosea10:5 Vagari vomuSamaria vari kudedera vachityira zvimhuru zvokuBhetiavheni. Vanhu veko vachazvichema navapristi vazvo, vanamati vezvifananidzo vachazvichema, mbiri yazvo inenge yasasamuka." 
Hosea10:6 Naichowo chichatakurwa kuendwa nacho kuAsiria somutero kuna mambo mukuru. VokwaEfuremu vachanyadziswa, vokwaIsiraeri vachinyadziswa nezano ravo ravanotevedza." 
Hosea10:7 Mambo weSamaria achaparara sakabanzu kanoyangarara pamvura. 
Hosea10:8 Nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira kuna Avheni, chitadzo chevokwaIsiraeri, dzichaparadzwa. Minzwa norukato zvichamera paatari dzavo, vachati kumakomo, “Tihwandisei,” kuzvikomo vachiti, “Tiwirei.”" 
Hosea10:9 “Imi vaIsiraeri, kubvira pamazuva aye okuGibhea, makapara zvitadzo, kubvira ipapo makaramba muchingotadza. Hondo haichavasvikira here kuGibhea ikoko." 
Hosea10:10 Pandinenge ndada, nzenza dzevanhu idzodzo ndichadziranga, uye vachamomoterwa nevechirudzi pavanenge vachirangirwa zvitadzo zvavo zvakapetwa." 
Hosea10:11 “VokwaEfuremu vainge vari tsiru rakapingudzwa raifarira kupura. Ndichaisa joko pamutsipa waro wakanaka, ndichabopa vokwaEfuremu; vokwaJudha ndivo vacharima vokwaJakobho vachatimbinura pasi." 
Hosea10:12 ‘Zvidyirirei ururami mukohwe mwoyochena bandirai minda yenyu yakararira nokuti ino ndiyo nguva yokutsvaka Tenzi kuti auye kuzonayisa ruponeso pamuri.’ 
Hosea10:13 Makarima uipi mukakohwa zvisina ruenzaniso, makadya muchero wenhema. Pamusana pokuti makavimba nengoro dzenyu dzehondo nokuwanda kwavarwi venyu vehondo," 
Hosea10:14 naizvozvo mukati mevanhu venyu muchamuka manyongori ehondo, nzvimbo dzenyu dzokuzvidzivirira muhondo dzose zvadzo dzichaparadzwa, sokuparadzwa kwakaita Sharumani guta reBhetiaribheri pazuva rakarwiwa hondo, madzimai akaitwa kanyamakanyama pamwechete nevana vavo." 
Hosea10:15 Izvozvo ndozvichaitwawo kwamuri imi vemba yokuBhetieri, pari pamusana pouipi hwenyu hwakakura kudai. Mambo wokwaIsiraeri achanyatsotsakatiswa mambakwedza.”" 
Hosea11:1 “Isiraeri paakanga achiri mwana mudiki, ndaimuda. Ndakadaidza mwana wangu iyeyu kubva kuIjipiti." 
Hosea11:2 Pandaimudaidza ndopaainyanya kutsaukana neni. Vakaramba vachipira zvibayiro zvavo kuna Bhaari uye vachipisirawo rusenzi kuzvifananidzo zvokunamata. 
Hosea11:3 Asi iyeni ndini ndakadzidzisa vokwaEfuremu kufamba. Ndaivatakura mumaoko asi zvokuziva kuti ndini ndaivarapa, havana kuziva." 
Hosea11:4 Ndaivatungamirira netambo yengoni pamwe neyamabhande orudo. Ndakavasimudza somwana muduku pachipfuva changu ndikakotama ndichivapa chokudya. 
Hosea11:5 “KuIjipiti havachadzokera asi Asiria ndiyo ichavatongao nokuti vakaramba kudzokera kwandiri. 
Hosea11:6 Hondo ichatsviriridza mumaguta avo ichityoranisa zvihuri zvemisuo mikuru yavo, ichivaparadza mutsvingo dzavo dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo." 
Hosea11:7 Vanhu vangu vaomarara nenyaya yokutsaukana neni. Saka joko nderavo hapana anovakumura. 
Hosea11:8 “Ndingagokurasai seiko nhai vokwaEfuremu? Ndingagokutii kuche mumaoko avo seiko nhaimi vokwaIsiraeri? Ndingagokubatai somubatiro wandakaita guta reAdhima here, kana zvandakaita kuguta reZebhoimu? Mwoyo wangu unoramba mukati mangu. Mwoyo wangu wetsitsi uri kutoramba uchiwedzera kukudai." 
Hosea11:9 Handicharatidza hasha dzangu dzinotyisa, vokwaEfuremu, handichavaparadza zvakare nokuti ini ndiri Mwari handisi munhu, iye Anoera, ndiri pakati penyu uye handisi kuuya kuzoparadza." 
Hosea11:10 Vachatevera Tenzi iye achidzvova seshumba, achidzvova kudaro vana vake vachauya vachidedera vachibva kumadokero." 
Hosea11:11 Vachauya vachibhabhama seshiri vachibva kuIjipiti, senjiva, vachibva kunyika yeAsiria ndichivadzosera kumisha yavo, ndozviri kutaura Tenzi.”" 
Hosea11:12 VokwaEfuremu vandikomberedza namanyepo, vembawo yokwaIsiraeri vachindikomberedza nounyengedzi. Asi vokwaJudha vanofamba naTenzi uye vakatendeseka kuna iye Anoera." 
Hosea12:1 VokwaEfuremu vanoita ushamwari nemhepo, vachiswerodzingirirana zuva rese nemhepo yokumabvazuva zvayo. Nhema noutsinye, ndizvo zvavanowanza vachiita zvibvumirano neAsiria vachituta mafuta kuaenda kuIjipiti." 
Hosea12:2 Tenzi ane mhosva yaari kupa vokwaJudha, acharanga vokwaJakobho maererano nezviito zvavo achivatsividza maererano nezviito zvavo." 
Hosea12:3 Jakobho, achiri mudumbu, akanga akabata chitsitsinho chomukoma wake, kuzoti ava murume mukuru akaita tsimba naMwari." 
Hosea12:4 Jakobho akaita tsimba nomutumwa akabva akurira, akachema achimukumbira chikomborero. Akasangana naMwari paBhatieri ipapo Mwari akataura naye," 
Hosea12:5 iye Tenzi, Mwari wehondo nehondo dzavarwi, zita rake raanodaidzwa naro izita rokuti Yahweh." 
Hosea12:6 Saka imimi, norubatsiro rwaMwari wenyu, tendeukai, mubatisise rudo noruenzaniso mumirire Mwari wenyu nguva dzose." 
Hosea12:7 “Munhu wemhindu dzokutengesa zvinhu ane chikero mumaoko chinonyengedza, chaanongoda chete kudzvanyirira vamwe." 
Hosea12:8 VokwaEfuremu vanotozviti zvavo, ‘Hauoneka, ndiri mupfumi, ndazozviwanira upfumi.’ Asi upfumi hwavo hwose ihwohwo haumbovapunyutsa pamhosva yavakapara." 
Hosea12:9 Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wenyu, ndakakubvisai kunyika yeIjipiti. Ndichaitazve kuti mugare mumisasa yamatendhe sezvinoitwa panguva yamazuva makuru akatemwa." 
Hosea12:10 Ndini ndaitaura kuvaporofita, ini ndini ndaionesa zviratidzo nezviratidzo, ndichipawo nokuvaporofita mienzaniso." 
Hosea12:11 MuGireadhi mune uipi, vanhu vasina maturo; muGirigari muchipirwa zvibayiro kuhandira, atari dzavo dzichaitawo semirwi zvayo yamatombo mumigero yomumunda.”" 
Hosea12:12 (Jakobho akatizira kunyika yeAramu iye Isiraeri kwaakandoita ugariri achiitira mukadzi, akafudzira hwai mukadzi.)" 
Hosea12:13 Tenzi akaburitsa Isiraeri kuIjipiti achizviita nomuporofita, nomuporofita akavachengetedza." 
Hosea12:14 VokwaEfuremu vakamudenha zvakaipisisa; nezvo Tenzi achamurega achipfukirwa nemhosva yokudeura ropa. Tenzi achamutsividza kutsvinya kwake ikoko. 
Hosea13:1 Painge vokwaEfuremu votaura, vanhu vaidedera, vairemekedzwa kwazvo muIsiraeri asi vakapara mhosva, pamusana paBhaari, vakafa." 
Hosea13:2 Iye zvino vari kungoramba vachipara zvitadzo pamusoro pezvimwe; vari kuzviumbira zvifananidzo zvesimbi, zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvakanyatsogadzirwa zvesirivha zvose zviri zvinhu zvakaitwa namaoko avanhu vachitoti kuvanhu, “Pirai zvibayiro kune zvizvi,” vanhu vachitotsvoda zvimhuru." 
Hosea13:3 Naizvozvo vachangoita semhute yamangwanani; kana sedova risingatani kupera, sehundi inondimuka paburiro, kana kuti soutsi hunobuda napahwindo." 
Hosea13:4 “Ndini Tenzi, Mwari wako kubvira kunyika yeIjipiti. Hakuna mumwe Mwari waunoziva kusiya ini, kunze kwangu hakunazve mumwe muponesi." 
Hosea13:5 Ini ndini ndaikuchengeta murenje munyika yakaoma. 
Hosea13:6 Ndakakufudzai mukaguta. Pamakanga maguta, makabva mapindwa nomwoyo wokuzvikudza mukabva mandikanganwa." 
Hosea13:7 Saka ndichava seshumba kwavari, ndichavahwandira munyasi menzira sembada." 
Hosea13:8 Ndichavawira sebere rabvutirwa vana varo. Ndichavatsemura dundundu ndigovazhanya seshumba sokubvamburwa kwavangaitwe nechikara chesango. 
Hosea13:9 “Ndakakuparadzai, imi vaIsiraeri ndiani achakununurai?" 
Hosea13:10 Zvino iye mambo wenyu aripiko kuti akuponesei? Machinda enyu ose aripiko kuti akudzivirirei? Ivo vamaiti, ‘Tipeiwo mambo namachinda.’" 
Hosea13:11 Ndakakupai madzimambo ndakashatirwa nehasha, ndikavabvisawo nehasha." 
Hosea13:12 “Uipi hwevokwaEfuremu hwakapfundirwa, chitadzo chavo chakachengetwa mupfimbi." 
Hosea13:13 Zvaita semimba yarwadza yokuberekwa kwavo, mwana wacho oita zungairwa otadza kuuya kumusuo wedumbu." 
Hosea13:14 Ndovanunura here mumaoko menzvimbo yavachakabvu? Ndovanunura here kurufu? Nhai rufu nhamo dzaunoonesa dziripiko? Nhai nzvimbo yavachakabvu kuparadza kwako kuripiko? Zvetsiyenyoro handichisina. 
Hosea13:15 Kunyange zvazvo akapasa setsanga dutu rokumabvazuva dutu raTenzi richauya richatutuka kubva kurenje; chitubu chavo chichaoma kuti papata, chisipiti chake chichaoma kuti gwa. Richarozva upfumi hwavo nechose zvacho chakakosha." 
Hosea13:16 Samaria ichapfukirwa nemhosva yayo nokuti yakapandukira Mwari wayo. Vacharakatiswa kufa nehondo yepfumo, pwere dzavo dzichipwatitsirwa pasi madzimai avo akazvitakura achitumburwa.”" 
Hosea14:1 Imi vaIsiraeri, dzokerai kuna Tenzi, Mwari wenyu nokuti makadhadharika pamusana pouipi hwenyu." 
Hosea14:2 Chidzokerai kuna Tenzi namazwi okuteterera mundoti kwaari, “Tibvisireiwo uipi hwose mugamuchire waro zvinenge zvakanaka tichipira muromo watinotaura kwamuri sehandira." 
Hosea14:3 Nyika yeAsiria haimbotiponesa zvamabhiza, hatisiri kuzoatasva. Hatisiri kuzombotaura kuzvinhu zvatakagadzira namaoko edu tichizviti, ‘Nhai Mwari wedu.’ ” Mamuri imimi, nherera ndomadzinowana nyasha." 
Hosea14:4 “Umhandupandu hwavo ihwohwo ndichahurapa, ndichavada zvangu pachena nokuti kuvashatirirwa kwandanga ndakaita, ndazvidzora." 
Hosea14:5 Ndichaita sedova kuIsiraeri igotumbuka seruva rejongwe igodzika midzi somupopura 
Hosea14:6 nhungirwa dzayo dzichipasa uko nokoko, kuyevedza kweIsiraeri kuchaita sekwemuorivhi, kunhuwirira kwayo, kuchiita sekwenyika yeRebhanoni." 
Hosea14:7 Vachadzoka kuzogara mumumvuri wangu vagoita sebindu rizere nezvirimwa. Vachapfumvudza somugirepisi kunhuwirira kwavo kuchiita sewaini yeRebhanoni. 
Hosea14:8 Nhaimi vokwaEfuremu Munei nezvifananidzo zvokunamata? Inini ndini ndinokupai mhinduro ndini ndinokuchengetai. Ini ndakaita somusaipurasi unogara wakasvibira, kwandiri ini ndokunobva michero yenyu.”" 
Hosea14:9 Munhu wose ano ungwaru, ngaanzwisise zvinhu izvozvi, ani naani zvake anofunga ngaazive zvinhu izvi, nokuti makwara aTenzi makwara akarurama, uye vakarurama vanofamba maari asi vakaipa vanogumburwa nawo." 
Joel1:1 Shoko raTENZI iri rakauya kuna Joeri mwanakomana waPetueri richiti; 
Joel1:2 Inzwai munzwe izvi, imi vechikuru chikuru, rerekerai nzeve mose, imi vagari venyika iyi! Ko zvakadai izvi zvakamboitikawo here mumazuva enyu, kana mumazuva amadzibaba enyu?" 
Joel1:3 Zvirondedzerei kuvana venyu, vana venyu vaudzewo vana vavo, vataurirewo chimwewo chizvarwa," 
Joel1:4 kuti zvakasiiwa nomuteteni, vana vemhashu, zvadyiwawo nehwiza dzegwatakwata; uye zvakasiyiwamo zvasiyiwawo nemhashu dzegute, zvadyiwawo nehwiza dzegwatakwata; uye zvakasiyiwa nehwiza dzegwatakwata zvadyiwa nemhashu dzinorozva." 
Joel1:5 Pepukai imi zvidhakwa muhwihwidze kuchema muridze mhere imi mose vanwi vewaini pamusana pewaini itsva nokuti maibvutirwa iri pamuromo. 
Joel1:6 Nokuti kwaita rudzi rwavanhu vauya kuzorwisa nyika yangu, rudzi rune simba rusingaverengeki. Mazino arwo, mazino eshumba chaiwo, mbangura dzamazino arwo anenge mazino eshumba hadzi." 
Joel1:7 Rwaparadza migirepisi yangu rukatsemura-tsemura mikuyu yangu. Rwakayikwatura ganda rayo rukarikanda pasi, matavi ayo akati ngwerewere kuchena." 
Joel1:8 Ungudzai semhandara yakapfeka masaga iri kuchema chikomba chayo chousikana. 
Joel1:9 Zvomupiro wembesanwa nomupiro wokuteura, pamba yaTENZI zvamiswa, vapristi vari kuchema, ivo vashandiri vaTENZI." 
Joel1:10 Minda yaparara, ivhu riri kuchema nokuti mbesanwa dzaparadzwa. Waini yavakupera mafuta eorivhi avakupwa." 
Joel1:11 Ngazvikudumbirei imi varimi veminda. Ridzai mhere vachengeti vemigirepisi, chemai koroni nebhari nokuti zvokukohwa mumunda zvaparara." 
Joel1:12 Mugirepisi wasvava, muonde warezuka. Mupomegiraneti nomurara nomuapuru nemiti yesango yose zvayo yauna. Rufaro muvanhu rwapera." 
Joel1:13 Pfekai masaga muungudze imi vapristi, hwihwidzai kuchema, imi vashandi vepaatari. Pindai murare makapfeka masaga imi vashandiri vaMwari wangu nokuti zvomupiro wembesanwa nomupiro wokuteura zvamiswa mumba yaMwari wenyu." 
Joel1:14 Tsaurai zuva rokutsanya kokerai musangano wezvokunamata muunganidze vakuru vakuru navagari vose zvavo venyika iyi kumba yaTENZI, Mwari wenyu mucheme kuna TENZI." 
Joel1:15 Hameno zvenyu nezuva iroro nokuti zuva racho raTENZI rava kusvika rinouya sezuva rokuparadza kwaSamasimbaose. 
Joel1:16 Handiti chokudya chatiperera takatarisa uye mhururu norufaro zvakatiperera mumba yaMwari wedu? 
Joel1:17 Mbeu dzakauna mumavhinga akaoma, mokuchengetera mbesa maparara matura angova matongo zvawo nokuti mbesa dzashayikwa." 
Joel1:18 Idzo mhuka rangove jemedzanwa! Matanga emombe azvishayira pazvo nokuti mafuro hapachisina kunyange namatangawo ehwai zvavakukangaidzikawo. 
Joel1:19 Ndochema kwamuri TENZI nokuti moto waririmisa mafuro erenje rimi romoto rapisa miti yose zvayo yesango. 
Joel1:20 Kana nemhukawo dzesango dziri kuchema kwamuri nokuti hova dzemvura dzaoma motowo wakarorormesa mafuro erenje. 
Joel2:1 Ridzai hwamanda muguta reZioni ridzai bhosvo reyambiro pagomo rangu rinoera. Vagari venyika ino vose zvavo ngavadedere nokuti zuva raTENZI riri kuuya, ratova pedyo." 
Joel2:2 Zuva iroro izuva rerima nezarima, zuva ramakore, zuva rakati kwirindindi kusvipa. Soutonga hwatsvuka pamakomo, ungati rudzi rwavanhu rune simba rusina kumbovapo nyange pasichigare uye kuti rwakadaro haruchazovapo mushure madzo pamakore ezvizvarwa zvose zvazvo." 
Joel2:3 Dzemberi kwacho ungati moto unororomesa. Dzeshure moto zvawo unoririma. Mberi kwadzo uku, nyika yacho ungati ibindu reEdheni; asi shure kwadzo, kwava renje zvaro raparara. Hapana chinodzipunyuka." 
Joel2:4 Dzinotarisika samabhiza, dzichimhanya samabhiza ehondo." 
Joel2:5 Dzinoriridza sengoro dzehondo, dzinosvetuka pamisoro yamakomo sokubarika kwerimi romoto riri kuroromesa mashanga, sehondo ine simba yarongwa kuti ichirwa hondo." 
Joel2:6 Pakudziona marudzi avanhu achatambura, zviso zvose zvichati suruduru!" 
Joel2:7 Savarwi chaivo, dzavakutanga kurwisa; savarwi, madziro chairo dzinoati karakata kukwira, dzinofamba imwe neimwe yakati tande nenzira yayo dzisingatsauki gwara radzo." 
Joel2:8 Hadzisundidzirani, imwe neimwe inongofamba iri mugwara rayo chete. Dzinodimura nomukati mezvombo zvehondo dzisina kana anodzimisa." 
Joel2:9 Dzinosvetukira pamusoro peguta, dzinomhanya napamusoro petsingo; dzinokwira dzichipinda mudzimba, dzichipinda nepamahwindo sembavha." 
Joel2:10 Nyika inondengendeka mberi kwadzo, matenga achidedera, zuva nomwedzi zvinokwidibirwa, nyenyedzi dzorega kupenya." 
Joel2:11 TENZI akaburitsa izwi rake mberi kwehondo yake nokuti hondo yake igurusvusvu guru kwazvo anoita zvinhu zvaanenge areva, ane simba nokuti zuva raTENZI izuva guru rinotyisa kwazvo. Ndiani angaritirire?" 
Joel2:12 “Asi kunyange nazvino, ndozviri kutaura TENZI dzokerai kwandiri nomwoyo wenyu wose muchitsanya nokuhwihwidza nokuungudza." 
Joel2:13 Uye bvarurai mwoyo yenyu kwete hanzu dzenyu. Dzokerai kuna TENZI Mwari wenyu nokuti iye ane nyasha netsitsi. Haakurumidzi kushatirwa uye azere nomwoyochena, anozvidzora orega kuita zvakaipa.”" 
Joel2:14 Ndiani angazive, zvimwe angapinduke akazvidzora zvake achibva azosiya makomborero mushure make, zvokuti vanhu vanogona kupira mupiro wembesanwa nomupiro wokuteura kuna TENZI, Mwari wenyu?" 
Joel2:15 Ridzai hwamanda muguta reZioni, tsaurai zuva rokutsanya, kokerai musangano wezvokunamata," 
Joel2:16 unganidzai vanhu, chenurai gungano ravanhu unganidzai vakuru vakuru, kokorodzai vana, kunyangewo vacheche vachiri kuyamwa. Chikomba ngachisiye gota racho mwenga asiyewo nhanga yake." 
Joel2:17 Pakati pekamba kepamusuo neatari, vapristi, vashandiri vaTENZI ngavahwihwidze kuchema vari ipapo vachiti, “TENZI we-e regai vanhu venyu vari vapenyu musaite kuti nhaka yenyu ive chiseko zvacho, kana kuva dimikira pakati pamarudzi. Madirei kuti marudzi ataurirane kuti, ‘Mwari wavo aripi?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Ipapo TENZI akaita shungu nenyika yake, akanzwira vanhu vake urombo." 
Joel2:19 TENZI akapindura vanhu vake achiti, “Chinzwai, ndava kukutumirai mbesanwa newaini namafuta eorivhi zvokuti muchaguta uye handichazombokuitazve kuti muve chiseko chenyika pakati pamarudzi avanhu." 
Joel2:20 Ndichaendesa wokuchamhembe kure nemi ndigomudzingira murenje zvaro renyika, nhungamiri dzake dzavarwi ndidziti rororo mugungwa rokumabvazuva, varwi vake vokutsigira shure ndichivati ririri mugungwa rokumadokero. Gutukutu rokunhuwa kwake richasumuka, nokuti yaakapara ihuru." 
Joel2:21 “Iwe nyika rega zvako kutya! Fara upembere nokuti TENZI akaita zvinhu zvikuru! 
Joel2:22 Imi mhuka dzesango regai henyu kutya nokuti mafuro okurenje asvibirira ruswiswi, miti inobereka michero yayo muonde nomugirepisi, yanyatsobereka michero yakakwana." 
Joel2:23 “Farai henyu imi vana veguta reZioni mupembere kufara naTENZI, Mwari wenyu, nokuti akakunayisirai mvura yomunhuruka achiita zviri pamwero akakuwodzvorerai mvura yomunhuruka neyamatsutso sakare." 
Joel2:24 Maware achazara nembesanwa mokusvinira muchifashuka waini namafuta eorivhi. 
Joel2:25 Ndichakudzoserai zvinotsivana namakore okudyirwa nemhashu dzegute nehwiza dzegwatakwata uye neemhashu dzinorozva nedzomuteteni, hondo yangu huru yandakatumira pakati penyu." 
Joel2:26 Muchadya zvakawanda zvokutoguta muchirumbidza zita raTENZI, Mwari wenyu anenge akuitirai zvishamiso. Nezvo vanhu vangu havazofa vakanyadziswazve." 
Joel2:27 Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti ndiri mukati meIsiraeri uye kuti ini, TENZI ndini Mwari wenyu, hakuna mumwe uye vanhu vangu havazombofa vakanyadziswazve." 
Joel2:28 “Mushure mezvo zvichazoitika kuti ndichadururira Mweya wangu pamusoro pavanhu vose. Vanakomana venyu navanasikana venyu vachaporofita, vakwegura venyu vacharotswa hope, vechidiki venyu vachaona zviratidzo." 
Joel2:29 Kunyange pavaranda zvavo vechirume nevechikadzi, mumazuva iwayo, ndichadururirawo Mweya wangu pavari." 
Joel2:30 “Ndichaita zviratidzo mumatenga napanyika zvokudeuka kweropa nemoto nebwititi routsi. 
Joel2:31 Zuva richasandurwa kuva rima, mwedzi ugoita ropa, zuva guru raTENZI rinotyisa kwazvo risati rasvika." 
Joel2:32 Zvichaitika kuti ani naani anodana zita raTENZI achaponeswa nokuti muGomo reZioni nomuJerusaremu muchava navanhu vanopunyuka sokutaura kwakaitawo TENZI uye mukati mevanenge vapunyuka muchava navanhu vakadaidzwa naTENZI.” 
Joel3:1 “Ndinodaro nokuti, tarisai mumazuva iwayo, panguva iyoyo pandichadzosera pakare vokwaJudha neveJerusaremu makomborero avo," 
Joel3:2 ndichakokorodza ndudzi dzose dzavanhu ndidzidzikise kubani reJehoshafati ndigovagadza dare ikoko ndichiitira vanhu vangu, ivo nhaka yangu, Isiraeri, nokuti vakavamwararisa mukati memarudzi uye vakaganhura-ganhura zvavo nyika yangu." 
Joel3:3 Vakatoitirawo vanhu chi'ange; mukomana chaiye vachimutsinhanisa nepfambi; musikana vachimutengesa newaini vakatoinwa. 
Joel3:4 “Ndochii chamuri kundiitira ichochi? Nhaiwe Tire newe Sidhoni nemi matunhu ose avaFirisitia? Mune chamuri kunditsividza here? Kana kuti muri kunditsividza? Ndichakasikawo kuita kuti zviito zvenyu zvibva zvakupfukirai nenguva isipi 
Joel3:5 nokuti makatoraka imi sirivha yangu nendarama yangu mukatakura henyu upfumi hwangu hwakakosha kutemberi dzenyu. 
Joel3:6 Makatengesaka imi vanhu vokwaJudha neJerusaremu kuvaGiriki muchivaendesa kure nenyika yavo. 
Joel3:7 Asi zvino ndichavamutsa kuti vachibva kunzvimbo dzacho kwamakavatengesa uye ndichaita kuti mupfukirwe nezviito zvenyu. 
Joel3:8 Ndichatengesawo vana venyu vakomana navasikana kuvaJudha, ivowo vagovatengesa kuvanhu veSabia kurudzi rwokure nokuti TENZI ataura." 
Joel3:9 “Zivisai zvinhu izvi mukati memarudzi zvokuti, ‘Gadzirirai kurwa hondo, mutsai magamba mwoyo, varwi vehondo vose ngavaswedere padyo, ngavakwidze kuno." 
Joel3:10 Pfurai miromo yenyu yamagejo muiite mapakatwa mupfure zvigero zvenyu zvokupemhenesa kuita mapfumo. Ndonda ngaazvitiwo, ndiri gamba rehondo ini." 
Joel3:11 Itai chipatapata muuye, imi mose marudzi ari munharaunda'mu, unganidzanai ikoko. Burutsai magamba enyu ehondo imi TENZI.’ ”" 
Joel3:12 “Marudzi ngaamuke akwire kubani reJehoshafati nokuti ikoko ndokwandichagadza dare marudzi ose omunharaunda'mu. 
Joel3:13 Pinzai jeko nokuti kukohwa kwasvika. Pindai mutsike-tsike nokuti mokusvinira waini machiti shutu kuzara. Makate ari kufashukira nokuti uipi hwavo hwakura.” 
Joel3:14 Gurumwandira, negurumwandira muBani rokutemera zvinofanira kuitwa nokuti zuva raTENZI roswedera muBani rokutemera zvinofanira kuitwa." 
Joel3:15 Zuva nemwedzi zvichaora kusviba nyenyedzi dzigorega kupenya. 
Joel3:16 Izvozvo TENZI achadzvova ari muguta reZioni achiburitsa izwi rake ari muJerusaremu matenga nenyika zvigondengendeka asi TENZI ndiye diziro ravanhu vake nhare chaiyo yokuhwanda hondo kuvanhu veIsiraeri. 
Joel3:17 Nezvo muchaziva kuti ndini TENZI, Mwari wenyu akaita musha wake muguta reZioni gomo rangu rinoera uye Jerusaremu richava guta rinoera. Vatorwa havazofazve vakatsikanomo." 
Joel3:18 Zvino pamusi iwoyo makomo achachucha waini inonaka zvikomo, zvichiyerera mukaka uye tukova twose twokwaJudha twuchayererawo mvura chitubu chichatubuka mumba yaTENZI chichindodiridza Bani reShitimu." 
Joel3:19 Ijipiti ichava renje zvaro Edhomu ichiva renje risina chinhu kutsivawo utsinye hwakaitwa kuvanhu vokwaJudha nokuti vakadeura ropa risina mhosva munyika yavo. 
Joel3:20 Asi nyika yokwaJudha ichagara vanhu nokusingaperi Jerusaremuwo ichagarwa pazvizvarwa zvose zvazvo. 
Joel3:21 Ndichatsividza ropa ravo uye handisi kuzombopembedza munhu ane mhosva, nokuti TENZI anogara muguta reZioni." 
Amos1:1 Aya ndiwo mazwi okusuma aAmosi mumwe wavafudzi vokuTekowa, chaiva chiri chioneso chaitaura nezveIsiraeri. Izvozvo maive muri munguva yaUziya mambo wokwaJudha, uyewo muri munguva yaJerobhoamu, mwanakomana waJoashi mambo wokwaIsiraeri makore maviri kundengendeka kwapasi kusati kwaitika." 
Amos1:2 Akati, “TENZI ari kudzvova ari kuZioni, ari kudaidzira ari kuJerusaremu mafuro avafudzi ari kuchema mvura, pamusoro pegomo reKarimero paomerwa.”" 
Amos1:3 TENZI ari kuti, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kweDhamasikusi kutosvika runa handimborega kuiranga, nokuti vakakuya vanhu vokuGireadhi nezvirhei zvesimbhi." 
Amos1:4 Saka ndichatumira moto kumba yaHazaeri, ucharoromesa nzvimbo dzaBhenihadhadhi dzokuzvidzivirira nazvo muhondo." 
Amos1:5 Ndichatyora zvihuri zveDhamasikusi ndigotsakatisa vagari vomubani reAvheni naiye ane umambo kuBhetiedheni. Vanhu veSiria vachatapwa vachiendeswa kunyika yeKiri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos1:6 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kweguta reGaza kutosvika zvaro runa, handimborega kuriranga nokuti vakatapa vanhu rudzi rwose zvarwo rwavanhu vakaenda narwo kundovati kuche mumaoko eEdhomu." 
Amos1:7 Saka iniwo ndichatumira moto kurusvingo rweGaza, ucharoromesa nzvimbo dzaro dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo." 
Amos1:8 Ndichatsakatisa vagari veAshidhodhi naiye ane umambo kuAshikeroni. Nesimba roruoko rwangu, ndicharanga guta reEkironi, marimbirimbi akasara avaFirisitia achaparara,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI Mwari." 
Amos1:9 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kweguta reTire kutosvika runa, handimborega kuriranga; nokuti vakakukura kutapa vanhu, rudzi rwose rwavanhu vakaenda narwo kuEdhomu vachirega kurangarira chibvumirano chavakaitirana paukama." 
Amos1:10 Naizvozvo ndichatumira moto parusvingo rweguta reTire ugororomesa nhare dzaro dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo.” 
Amos1:11 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kwenyika yeEdhomu kutosvika zvayo runa, handimborega kuiranga, nokuti yakaronda hama dzayo namapakatwa, zvetsitsi yakakanda pasi, yakaramba achingoviruka nehasha yakaramba iine pfundipfundi mumwoyo." 
Amos1:12 Naizvozvo ndichatumira moto kuTemani ugororomesa nhare dzokuBhozira dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo.” 
Amos1:13 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kwevokwaAmoni kutosvika zvavo runa, handimborega kuvaranga; nokuti vakatumbura madzimai akazvitakura okuGireadhi vachiitira kukudza-kudza nyika yavo." 
Amos1:14 Nezvo ndichatungidza moto murusvingo rweguta reRabha uroromese nhare dzaro dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo. Pachava nejemedzanwa pazuva rehondo iyoyo ichaita sedutu remhepo pazuva rechamupupuri. 
Amos1:15 Mambo wavo achatapwa agoendwa naye, iye pamwechete namachinda ake,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos2:1 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kwenyika yeMoabhu kutosvika zvayo runa, handimborega kuiranga nokuti vakapisa zvokurotesa mapfupa amambo wokuEdhomu." 
Amos2:2 Nokudaro ndichatumira moto panyika yeMoabhu ugozhirimisa nhare dzeguta reKerioti dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo. VaMoabhu vachafira mukati mebongozozo iroro muruzha imomo, mabhosvo achirira." 
Amos2:3 Ndichapfuudza mutongi wacho mukati maro ndigouraya machinda ose omo,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos2:4 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kwenyika yokwaJudha kutosvika zvayo runa, handimborega kuiranga; nokuti vakaramba mutemo waTENZI vakarega kuchengeta mirao yake. Asi zvifananidzo zvavo zvenhema zvokunamata izvi, zvaitevedzwa namadzibaba avo, zvakavarasisa." 
Amos2:5 Naizvozvo ndichatumira moto panyika yokwaJudha uririmise nhare dzeJerusaremu dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo.” 
Amos2:6 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Pamusana pokutadza rutatu rutatu kwenyika yevokwaIsiraeri kutosvika zvayo runa, handimborega kuiranga; nokuti vanototengesa nemari vanhu vakarurama, vachitotengesa varombo neshangu mbiri." 
Amos2:7 Vanotsokodzera varombo musoro muvhu renyika, vachisaidzira varombo kurutivi. Baba nomwanakomana wavo vachitadza nomushandi wechisikana mumwecheteyo, kun'oresa zita rangu rinoera." 
Amos2:8 Vanoti pasi rare rare pedyo neatari yose yose pahanzu dzavakafanobatiswa navarombo somuripo vachinwira mumba yamwari wavo waini yavanhu vanenge varipiswa. 
Amos2:9 “Asi ini ndakavatsakatisira vaAmori vakanga vakareba semiti yemisidhari, uye vakanga vakasimba somioku. Iyeni ndini ndakaparadza michero yake mudenga'mu nemidzi yawo pasi'pa." 
Amos2:10 Uye ndakakuburitsai munyika yeIjipiti ndikakutungamirirai kwamakore makumi mana murenje, kuti mundotora nyika yavaAmori muiite yenyu." 
Amos2:11 Ndakaita kuti vamwe vevana venyu vakomana vave vaporofita, uye kuti mamwe majaya enyu ave vaNazari. Hazvisiri izvo chaizvoizvo izvi here, nhaimi vanhu veIsiraeri?” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos2:12 “Asi munotoita kuti vaNazari vanwe waini muchirambidza vaporofita kuporofita. 
Amos2:13 Ndichakutsikirirai pasi panzvimbo penyu chaipo sokutsikirira pasi kunoita ngoro izere nezvisote. 
Amos2:14 Vanozviti ndivo vamhanyi chaivo, zvokumhanya izvozvo zvichavaperera, vane simba, simba racho richapera, kunyangewo negamba chairo richatadza kuzviponesa upenyu." 
Amos2:15 Iye anopakata uta haambopamira. Shasha yokumhanya semhepo ichakoniwa kuzviponesa, kanawo wokumhanya namabhiza kuzviponesa upenyu, haambozviponesa" 
Amos2:16 kunyange mumwe wamagamba chaiye ane mwoyo chaiwo wechivindi, achati gumbo ndibereke asina chaakapfeka zuva iroro,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos3:1 Chinzwai shoko rinotaurwa naTENZI rokukuyambirai imi vanhu veIsiraeri, ndichiyambira mhuri yose zvayo yandakaburitsa munyika yeIjipiti:" 
Amos3:2 “Imimi chete ndimi vandinoziva pamhuri dzose dzapasi pano, naizvozvo ini ndichakurangirai uipi hwenyu hwose.”" 
Amos3:3 Ko vanhu vaviri vangafambe pamwechete vasina kurangana here? 
Amos3:4 Ko shumba ingahon'e musango here iyo isina nyama yayabata? Ko shumba ichine simba rayo zvayo ingadhurume here mubako mayo iyo isina chayakabata? 
Amos3:5 Ko ipo panyika pano shiri ingabatwe pamusungo pasina kuteiwa here? Ko musungo ungarapuka here usina chinhu chawabata? 
Amos3:6 Ko tsuri ingaridzwe here muguta vanhu vakasatya? Ko guta ringawirwa nenhamo here TENZI asina kutoti zviitike? 
Amos3:7 TENZI Mwari haana chaanomboita asina kutanga ambozivisa vaporofita, varanda vake." 
Amos3:8 Kana shumba ikadzvova ndiani asingatyi? TENZI Mwari akataura ndiani angasaporofita. 
Amos3:9 Daidzirai kumizinda yeAsiria nokumizinda yeIjipiti muti, “Unganai pagomo reSamaria muone zvenyu nyonganyonga iri mariri namabatirwo akaipa ari kuitwa vanhu mariri.”" 
Amos3:10 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Havazivi kuita zvinhu nemazvo, vanotopfimbika utsinye nokupamba mumizinda mavo." 
Amos3:11 Naizvozvo, zvanzi naTENZI Mwari, muvengi achakomba nyika ino agokoromora zvinokudzivirirai zvacho nhare yenyu yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo igopambwa.”" 
Amos3:12 Saka zvanzi naTENZI, “Sokununura kunoita mufudzi mukanwa meshumba, makumbo zvawo maviri echipfuwo kana kuti kadimbu kenzeve, ndozvichangoitwawo vanhu veIsiraeri vanogara muSamaria vachinunurwa vari pakakona kesofa kana pachidimbu chomubhedha." 
Amos3:13 “Chinzwa, uzivise vemba yaJakobho,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI Mwari, Mwari wehondo nehondo, “Kuti" 
Amos3:14 pazuva randicharangira Isiraeri kutadza kwayo, ndichavinga atari dzeBhetieri, zvinenge nyanga zvapaatari yacho zvichagwishurwa zvigoti kwatarara pasi." 
Amos3:15 Ndichaparadza dzimba dzokugara mumwaka wechando nedzimba dzapazhizha nedzimbawo dzomunyanga wenzou dzichaparara, uye dzimba dzakawanda dzichaparara.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:1 Teererai munzwe shoko iri imi madzimai, iyemi mhou dzokuBhashani imika mumakomo okuSamaria, imimi munodzvinyirira varombo, iyemi munoonesa ndondo vanhu vasina chavanacho, munoti kuvarume venyu, “Garai makatiwanisa doro tinwe!”" 
Amos4:2 TENZI Mwari apika nokuera kwake achiti, “Chinzwai, muchavingwa namazuva pavachakutii kachi nezvirauro zvehove muchiendwa nemi. Kunyangewo wokupedzesera chaiye wenyu acharaurwa nezvirauro." 
Amos4:3 Muchaita zvokutobuda namakapazika rusvingo, mumwe nomumwe wenyu napaakanangana napo muchirasirwa kuMarara,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:4 “Uyai zvenyu iko kuBhetieri kwacho muiteka zvitadzo, muuye iko kuGirigari ikoko mundonyanya kuita zvitadzo, muchiendesaka zvibayiro zvenyu mangwanani oga oga nezvegumi zvenyu pazuva retatu roga roga," 
Amos4:5 pirai zvenyuka chibayiro chacho chokutenda chezvinhu zvine mbiriso. Paridziraika zvenyu izvozvo zvemipiro yokupa nechido, muzvizuwidze nokuti ndizvo zvamunoda iyemi vanhu veIsiraeri!” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:6 “Ndakakubatisai paura nenzara mumaguta enyu ose zvawo ndichikushayisai zvokudya munzvimbo dzenyu dzose. Asi imi hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:7 “Uyewo ini ndakamisa mvura kuti irege kunaya kwamuri ipo pachine mwedzi mitatu kuti nguva yokukohwa isvike. Ndaiti pane rimwe guta ndonayisa zvangu mvura pane rimwewo guta ndorega kuinayisa, mumwe munda uchiniwa nemvura mumwewo unenge usina kunayiwa uchiuna." 
Amos4:8 Nokudaro vamaguta maviri kana matatu vaizodzungaira kuenda kuguta rimwechete vachitsvaka mvura yokunwa vasingawane mvura yakakwana. Asi imi hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:9 “Ndakakuparadzirai mbesa dzenyu nezvikukuve nechakuvhuvhu ndikaita kuti zanzwe ramapindu enyu neminda yenyu yamagirepisi zvisare zvisisina chinhu, michero yenyu yemionde nemiorivhi zvikarozvwa nehwiza. Asi imi hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:10 “Ndakatumira nhamo pakati penyu sedzandakatumira kuIjipiti, ndakauraya majaya enyu namapakatwa pamwechete nokupamba mabhiza enyu ndikaitawo kuti gutukutu rapamusasa wenyu wamatendhe rindimuke richiita gutukutu kunhuhwa mumhuno dzenyu iyemi. Asi imi hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:11 “Ndakatsakatisa vamwe venyu sezviya zvakaita Mwari achiparadza guta reSodhomu nereGomora. Izvozvo imi mainge chitsiga chomoto chaburwa mumoto. Asi imi hamuna kudzokera kwandiri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos4:12 “Naizvozvo iwe Isiraeri izvozvo ndizvo zvandichaita kwauri, pamusana pokuti ndichaita izvozvi kwauri chigadzirira kusangana naMwari wako, iwe Isiraeri!”" 
Amos4:13 Ndinodaro nokuti iye anoumba makomo anosikawo mhepo, iye anozivisa munhu zvaaronga mumwoyo make, iye anoita kuti kusvibe iwo achiri mangwanani zvawo achinyatsotsika zvake chaimo makakwirira menyika, zita rake ndiYahweh, Mwari wehondo nehondo." 
Amos5:1 Teererai munzwe shoko rakanangana nemi randava kutaura ndichiungudza, kwamuri imi vemba yaIsiraeri rokuti," 
Amos5:2 “Isiraeri, waparara, zvokumukazve hapasisina, wava mhandara yarambwa, uri munyika mako imomo usisina kana newokukusumudzawo.”" 
Amos5:3 Ndinodaro nokuti zvanzi naTENZI Mwari, “Guta rakabuda chiuru chavarwi, richasara rava nezana revarwi, uye rakabudawo zana revarwi richasara rava navarwi gumi vokumba kwaIsiraeri.”" 
Amos5:4 Nokuti TENZI ari kutaurira vemba yaIsiraeri kuti, “Nditsvakei mugorarama," 
Amos5:5 asi regai kutsvaka kunamata zvokuBhetieri, kana kupinda zvenyu muGirigari kunyange kuyambukira kuBheerishevha pamusana pokuti Girigari ichatoenda chete muutapwa uyewo Bhetieri zvichaiperera.”" 
Amos5:6 Tsvagai TENZI, murarame, angadaro akaviruka somoto mumba yokwaJosefi, akaitsakatisa pasina kana anoidzimura achireverera Bhetieri." 
Amos5:7 Hokoyoi imi munosandura ruenzaniso muchiruita gavakava chairo kuvava muchikanda pasi ururami. 
Amos5:8 Iye akasika nyenyedzi dzechinyamutanhatu nedzegwara ravatonga; iye anosandura rima rakati kwirindindi kuti rive mangwanani zvavo achiita kuti masikati ave usiku, iye anodaidza mvura yegungwa achiidira pasi panyika, zita rake iyeyo, ndiYahweh," 
Amos5:9 anoita kuti kuparadza vane simba, kurove semheni zvokuti umharadzi hunobva hwawira nhare dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo." 
Amos5:10 Vanhu vanovenga munhu anovatsiura padare, vachizvonda anotaura chokwadi." 
Amos5:11 Naizvozvo, pamusana pokuti imi munotsokodzera pasi murombo muchimumanikidza kuti atokupai chete koroni, dzimba dzamakavaka dzamabwe akavezwa, hamudzigari mukasimaka imi munda yakanakisa yamagirepisi, asi hamusi kuzonwa waini yaiwo." 
Amos5:12 Ndinodaro nokuti ndinoziva ini kuwanda kwezvamakakanganisa nokukura kwakaita zvitadzo zvenyu, iyemi munoonesa ndondo vakarurama, munogamuchira pfumbamuromo padare muchiti kumunhu ane nhuna dzaanadzo tibvire pano."
