Amos5:13 Naizvozvo munhu akangwara anonyarara zvake panguva dzakaita saidzodzi idzi, nokuti inguva dzakaipa." 
Amos5:14 Tsvakai zvakanaka, kwete zvakaipa kuitira kuti murarame, nezvo TENZI, Mwari wehondo nehondo, achava nemi, sokureva kwenyu." 
Amos5:15 Vengai zvakaipa mude zvakanaka musimbise zvoruenzaniso padare. Zvimwe TENZI, Mwari wehondo nehondo, angaitire nyasha chitsama chakasara chevokwaJosefi." 
Amos5:16 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTENZI, Mwari wehondo nehondo iye TENZI, “Munhandare dzose zvadzo muchange muchihwihwidzwa kuchema, mumigwagwa yomuguta yose zvayo vachati, ‘Yowe maiwe-e!’ Vachadaidza varimi kundochema vachadaidzawo vebasa rokuhwihwidza kuzoungudza," 
Amos5:17 nomuminda yose yamagirepisi muchava nokuhwihwidza kuchema nokuti ndichapfuura nomukati menyu,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos5:18 Zvichakuwanai imi munoti dai zuva raTENZI rachingosvika. Chamunodira chaizvo kuti zuva raTENZI risvike, chii? Izuva rerima kwete rechiedza" 
Amos5:19 rakaita somunhu anoti, uku ari kutiza shumba obva anowira mukanwa mebere; kana kuti somunhu anoti pindei mumba ozendama zvake noruoko kumadziro nyoka yobva yamuruma." 
Amos5:20 Ko handiti zuva raTENZI, izuva rerima here, kwete rechiedza, zuva rakati kwirindindi kusviba, risina kana nekanopenya mariri." 
Amos5:21 “Ndinovenga, uye ndinozvidza mazuva enyu makuru, handisi kumbofarira zvangu misangano yenyu yezvokunamata." 
Amos5:22 Kunyange zvenyu mukapira kwandiri mipiro yenyu yokupisa nemipiro yenyu yembesanwa handisi kuzoigamuchira. Kanawo mipiro yokuwadzana yezvipfuwo zvenyu zvakakodzwa, handisi kuzoitarisa." 
Amos5:23 Ndinyararirei mheremhere yenziyo dzenyu, mumhanzi wamadimbwa enyu handisi kana kuzombouteerera." 
Amos5:24 Asi ruenzaniso ngarudirane kuyerera semvura uye kururama kuitewo sorukova runogarosaruka ruchingoyerera. 
Amos5:25 “Ko makambouya here kwandiri nezvibayiro kana nemipiro kwamakumi mana amakore amakanga muri murenje, nhaimi vemba yaIsiraeri?" 
Amos5:26 Imi muchatakura zvifananidzo zvenyu zvokunamata zvamakazvigadzirira zvinoti Sakuti, mambo wenyu naKaiwani, mwari wenyu wenyenyedzi." 
Amos5:27 Naizvozvo ndichakutorai ndichikuendesai muutapwa mberi kupfuura guta reDhamasikusi.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI anonziwo Mwari wehondo nehondo. 
Amos6:1 Zvichakuwani imi mugere pamutambaratede muguta reZioni nevanozviti tigere zvakanaka mugomo reSamaria, vanhu vanozivikanwa kwazvo vokutangatanga verudzi rwavanhu, kunoenda imba yaIsiraeri." 
Amos6:2 Yambukirai kuguta reKarine, muone zvenyu, mubvepo muende, kuguta reHamati, guta guru, muzodzika kuguta reGati ravaFirisitia. Maguta iwayo ari nani here pane nyika mbiri idzi? Kana kuti iyo nyika yavo, ihuru here pane yenyu?" 
Amos6:3 Nhaimi munoramba kuti zuva rakaipa richasvika muchitoita kuti utsinye hutonge," 
Amos6:4 iyemi munorara pamibhedha yomunyanga wenzou, muchitambarara zvenyu muri mumitepfetepfe yezvigaro, muchidya zvenyu nyama, yehwayana dzomuzvirugu, neyemhuru dzomudanga rezvipfuwo;" 
Amos6:5 iyemi munoumba nziyo itsva dzokuimba namadimbwa; saDhavhidhi muchizvigadzirirawo zvokuridzisa mumhanzi nazvo zvitsva; 
Amos6:6 iyemi munodutira kunwa waini negate muchizvizora mafuta amandiriri asi kuparara kwevokwaJosefi kusingakurwadzei mwoyo! 
Amos6:7 Saka imimi ndimi muchava vokutanga chaivo kuenda kuutapwa, iyemi vokutambarara imi, kudyiririra ikoko nehohoho yenyu iyoyo, zvichapera." 
Amos6:8 TENZI Mwari apika naiye pachake, (zvanzi naTENZI, Mwari wehondo nehondo): “Kuzvikudza kwevokwaJakobho ndinokuzvonda, uye nhare dzake dzokuzvidzivirira nadzo muhondo ndinodzivenga saka guta racho nezvose zvirimo ndichazviisa mumaoko evavengi.”" 
Amos6:9 Kana vanhu gumi vakasara mumba imwechete, vachatopafa." 
Amos6:10 Hama yomunhu yomumba chaiyo inomuviga yacho, paichauya kuzotakura zvitunha mumba imomo, ikabvunza anenge akahwandamo mukatikati kuti, “Muchine mumwe here asara?” Iye achati, “Kwete.” Uyewo uya achabva ati, “Taurira pasi! Kana kudoma zita raTENZI, ngatiregei.”" 
Amos6:11 Nokuti chionai TENZI atema kuti, zimba guru richaparadzwa kuti warara, kamba kaduku kachisarawo kangova zvimedu." 
Amos6:12 Ko mabhiza anomhanya paruware here? Ko munhu angarime here nenzombe pagungwa? Asi imi munosandura ruenzaniso muchiruita chepfu, muchero woururami muchiaita gavakava kuvava," 
Amos6:13 iyemi munofarira zvinhu zvisina maturo, muchitozviti, “Hatisirisu here isu pano, takatora guta reKarinaimu tikatoriita redu pachedu here?”" 
Amos6:14 Saka chinzwai munzwe, TENZI Mwari wehondo nehondo ari kuti, “Imi vemba yaIsiraeri ndichakumutsirai rudzi rwavanhu vachakudzvanyirirai kubvira tava kuda kupinda muguta reHamati, kusvikira kuKakova keArabha.”" 
Amos7:1 TENZI Mwari akandionesa chiratidzo: Muchiratidzo ichochi ndakaona achisika bute rehwiza mushure mokunge mambo apedza kucheka uswa hwezvipfuwo zvake napanguva yakwakanga kwava kutunga uswiswi. 
Amos7:2 Padzakanga dzapedza kudya uswa kwenyika ino, ini ndakati, “Nhai TENZI Mwari, ndateterera doregererai! Jakobho; angapamire sei chaizvo iye ari mudiki kudai?" 
Amos7:3 TENZI akadzora mwoyo panyaya iyoyi. TENZI ndokuti, ‘Hazvichaitika.’ ”" 
Amos7:4 TENZI Mwari akandionesazve chimwe chiratidzo. Muchiratidzo ichocho TENZI Mwari akanga achigadzirira kuranga vanhu nomoto. Moto iwoyu wakapisa hwenje hwegungwa ndokubva wanhanhirawo kundopisa nyika. 
Amos7:5 Ndipo pandakati, “Nhai TENZI Mwari, ndateterera regai zvenyu kudaro Jakobho angapamire sei chaizvo ari mudiki kudai!”" 
Amos7:6 TENZI akadzora mwoyo panyaya iyoyi, iye TENZI Mwari ndokuti, “Izvozviwo izvi hazvichaitika.”" 
Amos7:7 Mwari akandionesawo izvi. Ndakaona TENZI amire panyasi porusvingo rwakavakwa pachishandiswa tambo yokuvakisa yokueresa nayo kutwasuka kworusvingo kuenda kumusoro. Akanga akabata muruoko tambo yacho yokuvakisa. 
Amos7:8 TENZI akanditi, “Nhai Amosi, chii chauri kuona?” Ini ndakati, “Tambo yokuera nayo kutwasuka.” TENZI ndokubva ati, “Chinzwa, ndava kuisa tambo yokueresa nayo kutwasuka pakati pavanhu vangu vaIsiraeri Handichazombofazve ndakapfuura napavari." 
Amos7:9 Nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzokuteurira dzokwaIsaki, dzichaparadzwa, neNzvimbo Dzinoera dzokwaIsiraeri dzichaparadzwa. Ndichamukira imba yaJerobhoamu nebakatwa.”" 
Amos7:10 Ipapo Amaziya, mupristi wokuBhetieri, akatumira shoko kuna Jerobhoamu, mambo wokwaIsiraeri, rokuti, “Amosi ari kukupandukirai mukati memba yevokwaIsiraeri. Zvose zviri kubuda pamuromo pake apa, nyika haichagona kutakurana nazvo" 
Amos7:11 nokuti Amosi ari kuti, “ ‘Jerobhoamu achafa rufu rwebakatwa rehondo, uye kuti vokwaIsiraeri, vachatoendwa navo chete kuutapwa kure nenyika yavo.’ ”" 
Amos7:12 Amaziya akati kuna Amosi, “Iwe muoni chibva, utizire kunyika yokwaJudha uwane chokudya chako ikoko, uchiporofita uri ikoko." 
Amos7:13 Asi usambofa wakazoporofitazve pano paBhetieri nokuti pano apa, iNzvimbo Inoera yamambo iTemberi yenyika.”" 
Amos7:14 Amosi ndokupindura Amaziya achiti, “Handisi muporofita ini, kana mumwe webato revaporofita. Asi ndinotova mufudzi nomuchengetedzi weminda yamaonde." 
Amos7:15 Saka TENZI ndiye akandibvisa mukufudza mombe, iye TENZI ndiye akanditi, ‘Enda undoporofita kuvanhu vangu vaIsiraeri.’" 
Amos7:16 “Saka zvino chinzwai shoko raTENZI, iyemi muri kuti, ‘Rega kuporofita pamusoro peIsiraeri uye rega kuparidza uchitsoropodza imba yokwaIsaki.’" 
Amos7:17 Naizvozvo zvanzi naTENZI, ‘Mudzimai wenyu achava pfambi muguta muno, vana venyu vakomana navasikana vachafa rufu rwepfumo Nyika yenyu imi ichagovanwa. Iyemi pachenyu muchafira kunyika yakan'ora, uye vaIsiraeri vachatoendwa navo chete kuutapwa kure nenyika yavo.’ ”" 
Amos8:1 TENZI Mwari akandionesazve izvi. Ndakaona tswanda yemichero yomuzhizha. 
Amos8:2 Iye akati, “Amosi chauri kuona chii?” Ini ndikati, “Tswanda yemichero yomuzhizha.” TENZI akanditi, “Vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri, zvino pavo pazovaperera, rwendo runo zvokunge ndichavadarika hapasisina." 
Amos8:3 Dzimbo dzeTemberi dzichava nziyo dzokuungudza nezuva iroro, Zvitunha zvavanhu richave gatakata, zvichiraswa kwose kwose zvako chinyararire.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI Mwari." 
Amos8:4 Chinzwai izvi, imi munotsokodzera vasina chavanacho, muchisvitsa varombo vomunyika muno pakugumirwa." 
Amos8:5 Munotika imi, “Ko iro zuva guru roKugara Kwomwedzi, haraichipfuura zvaro, kuti tichitengesa zvedu mbesanwa dzedu? Uye muchiti Ko iro zuva reSabata iri harichisva rapera here kuti tichiburitsa zvedu koroni titengese tichidaro kudukupisa bhagidhi nokukwidza mutengo, tichiitawo zvokuziva nemwero yokubiridzira," 
Amos8:6 kuti titenge varombo nemari tichitengawo neshangu mbiri varombo vasina chavanacho uye kuti titengese kunyange marara zvawo ekoroni.” 
Amos8:7 Ini TENZI ndinopika neni pachangu wamunodada naye imi vokwaJakobho kuti, “Handimbofa ndakakanganwa kunyange chimwechete zvacho chezvakaipa zvamakaita." 
Amos8:8 Nyika ingarege kundengendeka here pamusana paizvozvo uye mugari wose wemo agoungudza, nyika yose zvayo ichitutumuka kuzara serwizi rwaNairi ichazara igosererazve, seNairi rwokuIjipiti?”" 
Amos8:9 Zvanzi naTENZI Mwari, “Pazuva iroro, ndichadokesa zuva ari masikati machena, pasi pagoti svi-i kusviba masikati machena chaiwo." 
Amos8:10 Mazuva enyu makuru ndichaasandura achiva okuchema, nziyo dzenyu dzose dzive kuungudza. Ndichaita kuti musungire mitikisha yamasaga muchiuno muveure misoro yenyu mose mugoita savanhu vanochema mwana wavo wechikomana mumwechete, zuva iroro richapera ichingova nhamo chete.”" 
Amos8:11 Zvanzi naTENZI Mwari, “Chinzwai, kuchasvika mazuva andichatuma shangwa yenzara panyika, kwete nzara yechokudya kana chokunwa; asi nzara yokuda kunzwa shoko raTENZI." 
Amos8:12 Vanhu vachadzungaira kubva kune rimwe gungwa kusvikira kune rimwe, kubvawo kuchamhembe kusvikira kumabvazuva, vachamhanya-mhanya kwose kwose vachitsvaga shoko raTENZI, vasingariwane." 
Amos8:13 Pazuva iroro tsvarakadenga dzemhandara namajaya vachafizuka nenyota. 
Amos8:14 Vanopika naAshima chifananidzo chokunamata chokuSamaria vachitoti, ‘Namwari wenyu chaiye mupenyu imi vokuDhani,’ kana kutoti, ‘Naiye anonamatwa mupenyu womunzira yokuBheerishebha,’ ivavo vachaputsika vasingazombofa vakamuka zvakare.”" 
Amos9:1 Ndakaona TENZI amire paatari, akati, “Bhogomora zvapamusoro pembiru kudzamara kamba kapamusuo wokupinda muTemberi kava kuzunguzika uzviti mwarara pamusoro pavo vose. Vamwe vavo vanenge vasara, ndichavarakatisa kufa rufu rwepfumo pasina kana mumwe wavo anotiza kana mumwe wavo anopapunyuka." 
Amos9:2 Kana zvavo vakaita zvokuchera napasi kundohwanda kuNzvimbo yaVachakabvu, naikokowo ndichavatora noruoko rwangu, kunyange zvavo vakakwira mudenga ndichavakoromorera pasi." 
Amos9:3 Kana zvavo vakandohwanda pamusoro peGomo reKameri, naikoko ndichavaronda ndikavatora, kunyange vakandondihwanda pasi pegungwa, ndichati nyoka ivarume ikoko." 
Amos9:4 Vavengi vavo vakaenda navo kuutapwa, ikoko ndichatuma hondo yebakatwa ivarakatise kuuraya. Ndichangoramba ndati navo nanga nanga kuvaitira zvakaipa kwete zvakanaka.”" 
Amos9:5 TENZI Mwari wehondo nehondo anoti akagunzva nyika nyika inonyungudika navagari vemo vose vanochema, vose vanotutumuka serwizi rwaNairi vachibva vaserera zvakare seNairi rwokuIjipiti," 
Amos9:6 iye wacho anovaka dzimba dzenhurikidzwa mudenga, akasika ziendanakuenda rapamusoro penyika, iye anodaidza mvura yegungwa achiidira pasi panyika, zita rake iyeyo, ndiYahweh." 
Amos9:7 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Nhaimi vanhu veIsiraeri, izvozvi kwandiri ini, munoti makasiyana nhai navaItiopia. Handisini ndakaburitsa vaIsiraeri muIjipiti here? Handisirini ndakaburitsa vaFirisitia kuKafutori, navaSiria kuKiri here?" 
Amos9:8 Chinzwai, ziso raTENZI Mwari rava panyika iyoyi izere zvitadzo, ndichaitsakatisa panyika pasi pano. Kunyange zvakadaro zvazvo handisi kuzobva ndanyatsotsakatisa imba yaJakobho.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Amos9:9 “Ndinodaro nokuti ndichatema kuti imba yaIsiraeri izunzwe pakati pendudzi dzose dzavanhu sokusefa kunoita munhu nesefa pasina kana nakatsanga zvako kanodonhera pasi. 
Amos9:10 Vatadzi vose vari muvanhu vangu, vachafa rufu rwepfumo muhondo, ivavo vanozviti, ‘Hapana chakaipa chichatiwana kana chichatiwira.’ ”" 
Amos9:11 “Nezuva iroro, ndichamutsa imba yokwaDhavhidhi yakadai kuputsika ndiigadziridze pakapazika ndichimutsurudza matongo ayo, ndichiivaka patsva samazuva akare" 
Amos9:12 kuti vagotonga chitsama chakasara chokwaEdhomu nevechirudzi vose vanodaidzwa nezita rangu.” Ndizvo zvinotaura TENZI muiti waizvozvi. 
Amos9:13 Zvanzi naTENZI, “Chionai, mazuva ari kuuya, okuti kurima kuchasvika kukohwa kusati kwapera uye okusima magirepisi wokuasvina asati apedza. Makomo achajuja waini inonaka nezvikomo zvose zvichayerera waini." 
Amos9:14 Ndichadzosera vanhu vangu vaIsiraeri zvose zvavaiva nazvo. Maguta avo akanga aparadzwa, vachaavakazve vakatoagara. Vachasima zvavo minda yamagirepisi, vachitozonwa, waini yayo. Vachaitawo mapindu, vagodya muchero yawo." 
Amos9:15 Ndichavagarisa munyika yavo pasina achazovatamisamozve achivabvisa munyika iyi yandakavapa ini.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI, Mwari wenyu." 
Obadiah1:1 Zvakaoneswa Obhadhiya. Zvanzi naTENZI Mwari nezveEdhomu takanzwa shoko richibva kuna TENZI uye nhumwa iri kutumwa mukati memarudzi ichiti, “Simukai, ngatimumukirei timurwise.”" 
Obadiah1:2 Chinzwai, “Ndichakuitai mudiki pakati pamarudzi. Muchashorwa zvikuru." 
Obadiah1:3 Mwoyo wenyu wokuzvikudza wakakurasisai imi mune musha womumapako mumikaha, mune musha uri pamusoro, imi munozviti nechomumwoyo. ‘Ndianiwo zvake angatikoromorere pasi.’" 
Obadiah1:4 Kunyange zvazvo muri muchadenga imomo segondo, nyange movakira zvenyu dendere renyu pakati penyenyedzi, ikoko ndichakukoromorerai pasi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Obadiah1:5 “Kana mbavha dzikakuvinga kana kuti vapambi vousiku, handiti vanongotora chete zvinokwanirana navo? Kana vokukohwa magirepisi vakakuvinga handiti vanotosiyawo mamwe okufuhwa zvawo? Asi kuparadzwa kwamuchaitwa imi, aiwaiwa!" 
Obadiah1:6 Tarisaiwo muone zvenyu kuparadzwa kwaitwa nyika yaEsau, upfumi hwayo hwapambwa." 
Obadiah1:7 Vamwe venyu vose vakakufurirai vakakudzingirai kumuganhu, shamwari dzenyu chaidzo dzakupandukirai zvino. Madzisahwira enyu chaiwo amunovimba nawo akuisirai chokukuteyai nacho hazvichambonzwisisiki." 
Obadiah1:8 “TENZI ari kuti nezuva iroro handisi kuzoparadza vangwaru muEdhomu here noruzivo muGomo rokwaEsau? 
Obadiah1:9 Magambawo enyu avarwi, imimi wokwaTemani, achadumbirwa zvokuti munhu wose wokuGomo rokwaEsau achapfuudzwa nebakatwa." 
Obadiah1:10 “Imi vokwaEsau pamusana poutsinye hwamakaita kuvanun'una venyu vokwaJakobho muchanyara imi nokusingaperi uye muchaparadzwa zvachose. 
Obadiah1:11 Pamusi uya wamakamirira kure vatorwa vachipamba upfumi hwevokwaJakobho, vatorwa vacho vachitopinda mumaguta avo, vachiitira Jerusaremu chin'ange imi maitoita somumwe wavo." 
Obadiah1:12 Asi mungadai musina kutonakidzwa nokuonerera zvenyu zuva ravanun'una venyu pazuva renyatwa dzavo mungadai musina kupembera kwazvo kufara nezvevanhu vokwaJudha nezuva rokuparara kwavo, mungadai musina kutozvitutumadza pamusi wenhamo iyoyo." 
Obadiah1:13 Hamaifanira kumbopinda henyu muguta ravanhu vangu pazuva repfumvu yavo. Hamaifanira kutonakidzwa nokuonerera kuparara kwavo pamusi wepfumvu yavo. Mungadai musina kumbopamba zvinhu zvavo pazuva repfumvu yavo. 
Obadiah1:14 Mungadai musina kundomirira pamharadzano muchipfuudza vainge votiza. Hamaifanira kudzosera kwakare vainge vapunyuka pamusi wenhamo yavo. 
Obadiah1:15 “Chiripo ndechichi chokuti zuva raTENZI riri kuzosvikira marudzi ose avanhu. Zvamunenge maitawo imi ndizvo zvichaitwawo kwamuri, zviito zvenyu zvichakupfukirai" 
Obadiah1:16 nokuti sokudhakwa kwamakaita imi pagomo rangu rinoera, marudziwo ose omunharaunda imomo achararadzawo nawo. Vachanwa zvokudutira vagosara vava kunge vanhu vasina kana kumbovapo zvavo." 
Obadiah1:17 “Asi muGomo reZioni muchava navanenge vapunyuka uye richava gomo rinoera. Imbawo yokwaJakobho ichatora hayo zvinhu zvayo zvizova mumaoko mayo. 
Obadiah1:18 Imba yokwaJakobho ichava moto imba yokwaJosefi ichiva murazvo womoto imba yokwaEsau ichiva zvidzitsi zvamashanga. Ivo vachavapisa vagovaroromesa. Hapazova navanopunyuka kune vemba yokwaEsau nokuti TENZI ataura. 
Obadiah1:19 “Vanhu vokuNegevhu vachatora Gomo rokwaEsau kuriita ravo vanhuwo vokumanhika kuShefera vachitorawo nyika yavaFirisitia kuita yavo. Nyikawo yokwaEfuremu nenyikawo yeSamaria vachadzitora kuva mumaoko mavo uyewo vokwaBhenjamini vagotora havo dunhu rokwaGireadhi. 
Obadiah1:20 Hondo yenhapwa dzokwaIsiraeri iri kuHara ichatora hayo nyika yeFonisia kusvikira kuZarifati kuita zvavo nyika yavo. Nhapwawo dzokuJerusaremu dziri kuSefaradhi dzichatorawo maguta okuNegevhu kuaita adzo. 
Obadiah1:21 Vakundi vachakwira Gomo reZioni vachatonga gomo rokwaEsau umambo huchava hwaTENZI.” 
Jonah1:1 Shoko raTENZI rakauya kuna Jona mwanakomana waAmitai richiti," 
Jonah1:2 “Simuka uende kuNinivhe, guta guru riya undoriyambira nokuti uipi hwavo hwasvika kudenga pamberi pangu.”" 
Jonah1:3 Asi Jona akasumuka kuti atizire kuTashishi achida kubva pana TENZI. Akadzika kuJopa, akawanako ngarava yaienda kuTarishishi iye akabva abvisa mari yerwendo ndokupinda mukati mayo kuti aendewo navo kuTarishishi achibva pana TENZI." 
Jonah1:4 Asi TENZI akatututsa mhepo huru mugungwa pakaita dutu remhepo guru zvokuti ngarava yakanga yoda kupazika. 
Jonah1:5 Ipapo vafambisi vengarava vakabatwa nokutya, mumwe nomumwe ndokubva anamata kuna mwari wake. Vakakanda mugungwa zvinhu zvavaiva nazvo mungarava macho kuitira kuti ivarerukire. Izvozvo Jona akanga adzika pasi mukatikati chaimo mengarava atorara zvake achitopfodora hope." 
Jonah1:6 Zvino mukuru mukuru wengarava iyoyo akasvika akamuti, “Zvinoreveiko, nhaiwe, mupfodori wehope? Muka unamatewo kuna mwari wako! Zvimwe mwari angatifungewo kuti tirege kuparara.”" 
Jonah1:7 Vakataurirana kuti, “Ngatiitei chin'ange tizive kuti ndiani atiparira nhamo yatiwira iyi.” Saizvozvo vakaita chin'ange, chikabata Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Ndokubva vamuti, “Iwe tiudze kuti ndiani akonzera kuti tipinde nhamo iyi. Basa rako nderei? Unobvepi? Uri wenyika ipi? Uri worudzi rwupi?”" 
Jonah1:9 Iye akavapindura kuti, “Ndiri muHebheru, uye ndinotya TENZI, Mwari Wedenga, akasika gungwa nenyika yakaoma.”" 
Jonah1:10 Varume ivavo vakatya zvikuru kwazvo vakati kwaari, “Ndochii ichochi chawaita,” nokuti varume ivavo vakanga vazviziva kuti akanga achitiza pana TENZI nokuti ndizvo zvaakanga avataurira." 
Jonah1:11 Ivo ndokuti kwaari, “Zvino toitei kwauri kuti gungwa ritidzikamire?” Nokuti gungwa rakanga zvino rotonyanya kuramba richinyanduka zvikuru nedutu remhepo." 
Jonah1:12 Iye akati kwavari, “Nditorei mundikande mugungwa, gungwa rinobvawo rakudzikamirai nokuti ndinoziva kuti ndini ndakonzera kuti dutu guru remhepo iri rikumukirei.”" 
Jonah1:13 Asi varume ivava vakambovavarira zvavo kukwasva zvakasimba, kuti vadzosere ngarava panyika pakaoma, vakakundika nokuti gungwa rakabva ratonyanyisisa kunyanduka nedutu remhepo." 
Jonah1:14 Naizvozvo vakachema kuna TENZI vachiti, “Tateterera zvedu TENZI, regai zvenyu kuti tiparare pamusana poupenyu hwomurume uyu musatipe mhaka yokudeura ropa risina mhosva. Inga wani imi, TENZI, maita zvamunoda.”" 
Jonah1:15 Ipapo vakatora Jona vakamukanda mugungwa, gungwa rikarega kupenga kwaro." 
Jonah1:16 Varume ava vakabva vatya TENZI zvikuru kwazvo vakapira chibayiro kuna TENZI vakaita zvitsidzo. 
Jonah1:17 TENZI akasarudza zihove guru rokumedza Jona. Jona akagara mudumbu rehove iyoyo siku nesikati kwamazuva matatu. 
Jonah2:1 Jona akabva anamata kuna TENZI, Mwari wake ari mudumbu rehove macho" 
Jonah2:2 achiti, “Ndakachema kuna TENZI ndiri munhamo yangu, iye akandipindura. Ndakachema ini ndiri mudumbu renzvimbo yavachakabvu, imi makanzwa izwi rangu" 
Jonah2:3 nokuti makandikanda muhwenje, muhwenje hwegungwa zvahwo pakati-kati chaipo pamakungwa ndakanga ndakakomberedzwa namafashafasha emvura mafungu namasaisai enyu aipfuura zvawo napamusoro pangu." 
Jonah2:4 “Ipapo ndakazviti ndazoraswa zvangu kure nemi ndichatarisazve sei temberi yenyu inoera. 
Jonah2:5 Mvura yakanditi fuse fuse hwenje hwakandikomberedza zvinomera mugungwa zvakanga zvakanditi mumusoro monemone. 
Jonah2:6 Pamidzi yemakomo ndakanga ndichidzika kunyika ine zvihuri zvaindipfigiramo narini narini asi imi TENZI, Mwari wangu makandiponesa upenyu mukandiburitsa mugomba iroro." 
Jonah2:7 Mweya wangu pawakapera simba mukati mangu, ndakarangarira TENZI; munamato wangu wakasvika kwamuri muTemberi yenyu inoera." 
Jonah2:8 “Vanhu vanoremekedza zvifananidzo zvisina maturo vanokanda pasi kutendeseka kwavo kwapachokwadi. 
Jonah2:9 “Asi ini nezwi rokutenda ndichapira chibayiro kwamuri. Ndichaita zvandakapika. Kununura ndokwaTENZI.” 
Jonah2:10 TENZI akataura kuhove iya ikarutsira Jona panyika pakaoma. 
Jonah3:1 Ipapo shoko raTENZI rakauyazve kuna Jona rwepiri richiti," 
Jonah3:2 “Sumuka uende kuNinivhe guta guru riya uriparidzire shoko randinokuudza.” 
Jonah3:3 Saizvozvowo Jona akasimuka akaenda kuNinivhe sokutaura kwakanga kwaita TENZI. Zvino guta reNinivhe raiva guta rakakurisisa kwazvo rine upamhi hwaitoda rwendo rwamazuva matatu. 
Jonah3:4 Jona akatanga kupinda muguta racho achifamba rwendo rwomuswere wezuva achidaidzira kuti, “Kwangosara mazuva makumi mana chete okuti Ninivhe iparadzwe.”" 
Jonah3:5 Vanhu veNinivhe vakatenda muna Mwari, kukadaidzirwa shoko rokuti vanhu ngavatsanye vapfeke masaga kubvira kuvakuruvakuru kusvikira kuvadikidiki." 
Jonah3:6 Shoko racho iri rakazosvikawo kuna mambo weNinivhe akasimuka pachigaro chake choumambo ndokubvisa jasi rake ndokupfeka masaga ndokundogara kumadota. 
Jonah3:7 Akabva adaidzira chirevo akachizivisa vanhu muNinivhe yose chokuti, “Nechirevo ichi chatemwa namambo pamwechete novokumba huru; ngaparege kuva nomunhu kana mhuka zvayo kunyange mombe kana chimwe chipfuwo zvacho chinoisa chinhu mukanwa, ngazvirege kana kunwa mvura." 
Jonah3:8 Asi kutoti vanhu nemhuka ngavapfeke masaga acheme zvikuru kwazvo kuna Mwari. Munhu wose zvake ngaasiyane nenzira yake yakaipa akande pasi twaanobata-bata. 
Jonah3:9 Ndianiko angazive, zvimwe Mwari angadzore mwoyo akarega kutivirukira nehasha dzake dzinotyisa kuti tirege kutsakatika.”" 
Jonah3:10 Mwari paakaona zvavakanga vaita izvi zvokukanda pasi kwavakaita maitiro avo akaipa, akazvidzora akarega kuvaonesa nhamo yaakanga ati achauyisa kwavari. Saka haana kuzozviita." 
Jonah4:1 Asi izvi zvakagumbura Jona zvakanyanya zvikamushatirisa 
Jonah4:2 akabva anamata kuna TENZI achiti: “Nhai imi TENZI, ko izvi hazvisirizvo here zvandakamboreva ndichiri kunyika yokwangu? Ndokusaka ndakakurumidza kutizira kuTashishi nokuti ndaizviziva kuti imi muri Mwari wengoni ane tsitsi uye asingakurumidzi kushatirwa azere nomwoyochena anozvidzora kune zvakaipa." 
Jonah4:3 Saka naizvozvo ndapota TENZI ndiurayei zvenyu nokuti zviri nani kuti ndife zvangu pano kuti ndirarame.” 
Jonah4:4 TENZI ndokubva ati, “Zvauri kuita izvi zvokushatirwa, zvakanaka here?”" 
Jonah4:5 Jona akabva abuda muguta iroro akandogara kumabvazuva kweguta iri. Akazvigadzirira musasa ikoko. Akagara hake pasi pawo mumumvuri achimirira kuona zvaizowira guta iroro. 
Jonah4:6 Ipapo TENZI akameresa mupfuta akaukurisa pana Jona ukava mumvuri pamusoro pake kuti amufaranutse munhamo yake. Ipapo Jona akafadzwa zvikuru kwazvo nomupfuta wacho. 
Jonah4:7 Kuzoti ramangwana acho mambakwedza, Mwari akatuma gonye rikaruma mupfuta uya ukabva wauna." 
Jonah4:8 Zuva parakabuda, Mwari akatuma mhepo inopisa inobva kumabvazuva, zuvawo rikatumhisa musoro waJona zvokuti akafizuka, akakumbira kuti afe zvake achiti, “Zviri nani kuti ndife zvangu pano kuti ndirarame.”" 
Jonah4:9 Asi Mwari akati kuna Jona, “Zvauri kuita izvozvi zvokushatirirwa mupfuta zvakanaka here?” Iye akapindura achiti, “Zvokushatirwa zvandiri kuita zvakanaka, ndiri kutoshatirwa zvokufa.”" 
Jonah4:10 TENZI akati, “Unonzwira urombo mupfuta wausina kushandira zvako uye wausina kumboita kuti ukure. Wakavapo nousiku umwechete ukazopararawo nousiku humwechete." 
Jonah4:11 Ini ndingarege here kunzwira tsitsi Ninivhe guta guru rina vanhu vanodarika zana namakumi maviri ezviuru vasingazivi kusiyanisa rudyi noruboshwe rwavo uyewo mune zvipfuwo zvakawanda.” 
Micah1:1 Shoko raMwari rakauya kuna Mika wokuMoresheti mumazuva okutonga kwaJotamu naAhazi naHezekiya, madzimambo okwaJudha raakaporofita richinangana nezveSamaria neJerusaremu." 
Micah1:2 Teererai munzwe, imi marudzi avanhu, mose zvenyu. Inzwa unzwe iwe nyika nazvose zviri mauri, rega Tenzi Mwari ave ndiye anokuroverera, iye Tenzi wokuNzvimbo yake Inoera." 
Micah1:3 Ndinodaro nokuti Tenzi ari kuuya achibva kunzvimbo yake, achaburuka pasi agotsokodzera nzvimbo dzakatunhumara dzapanyika." 
Micah1:4 Makomo achanyongodeka pasi pake, mapani achitsemuka senamo yanyautswa nomoto, semvura yadeurirwa pasi pamutenure chaipo." 
Micah1:5 Zvose izvi zvichaitika pamusana pokukanganisa kwevokwaJakobho uye pamusana pezvitadzo zvevemba yokwaIsiraeri. Ko ane mhosva yokukanganisa kwevokwaJakobho ndiani? Harisi guta reSamaria here? Ko ane mhosva yechitadzo chemba yokwaJudha ndiani? Harisi guta reJerusaremu here? 
Micah1:6 Naizvozvo ndichaita kuti guta reSamaria rive murwi pakati penyika, rive nzvimbo yokurima magirepisi. Ndichagudumutsira matombo aro mubani ndichiisa ugaro hwaro pachena." 
Micah1:7 Zvose zvifananidzo zvaro zvokunamata zvichapwanywa-pwanywa. Zvose zvarakawana nounzenza ihwohwo zvichapiswa nomoto uye zvifananidzo zvaro zvokunamata zvichaparadzwa, nokuti rakazviwana noufeve saka zvichadzorerwawo kune veunzenza ivavo." 
Micah1:8 Izvi zvinondipa kuungudza nokuchema ndichafamba ndakadaro ndiri mutwi ndichiungudza samakava, ndichichema semhou" 
Micah1:9 nokuti ronda rake harirapiki rakasvikawo kwaJudha; ratosvikawo kusuo guru ravanhu vangu kuJerusaremu. 
Micah1:10 Musasvitse nyaya iyi kune vokuGati kana kutombosvimha zvenyu misodzi. MuBhetireafura zviumburudzei muvhu. 
Micah1:11 Pfuurai zvenyu nenzira, imi vagari vokuShafiri, musina chamakapfeka muchinyara. Kuva vagari vokuZaanani zvokubuda hapana. Kuungudza kweBhetiezeri, kuchakubvisirai chamunofunga kumira nacho ikoko" 
Micah1:12 nokuti vagari vokuMaroti vavakusuwira kwazvo ruyamuro nokuti Tenzi apinza nhamo pamusuo peJerusaremu. 
Micah1:13 Imi vagari vokuRakishi bopai mikono yamabhiza pangoro dzehondo. Ndimi vakava vokutanga kupara chitadzo cheguta reJerusaremu nokuti makaitawo zvitadzo zvevokwaIsiraeri muguta reRakishi. 
Micah1:14 Naizvozvo chitopananai zvipo zvokuonekana nevokuMoresheti kuGati, musha weAkizibhu uchava musha wounyengedzi kumadzimambo eIsiraeri." 
Micah1:15 Ndichakuunzirai wokukukurirai, imi vagari vokuMaresha, uyezve madzichangamire omuIsiraeri achandohwanda kuAdhuramu." 
Micah1:16 Zvigusei muparavara wenhamo mugerwe vhudzi renyu muzviite muparavara unenge wegora nokuti vana venyu vapamwoyo vachabva kwamuri vachiendeswa kuutapwa. 
Micah2:1 Zvichavawana, avo vanorangarira kuita zvakaipa vachironga kuita zvouipi vari pamibhedha yavo! Kukangochena chete vobva vatozviita nokuti simba rokuzviita vanaro." 
Micah2:2 Vanochiva minda voitora nechisimba, vanochiva dzimba vachidzibvuta. Vanokukucha munhu pamwechete nemhuri yake, munhu nezvinhu zvake zvenhaka." 
Micah2:3 Naizvozvo Tenzi anoti, “Chinzwai ini ndava kurongera mhuri iyoyi zvinhu zvakaipa zvamusingagoni kuzvitakanura pamutsipa. Zvokufamba muchizvikudza zvichakupererai nokuti inenge yava nguva yakaipa." 
Micah2:4 Munguva iyoyo kuchaimbwa rumbo rwokukusekai imi muchihwihwidza kuchema muchiungudza zvinosiririsa muchiti: ‘Tanyatsoparara isu, nhaka yevokwangu, yasandurwa, ndikaitorerwa. Minda yokwedu yagoverwa zvayo kuvanhu vakatipamba.’ ”" 
Micah2:5 Saka ipapo mugungano raTenzi, munenge musisina munhu anokupimirai migove yenyu netambo." 
Micah2:6 Vanoparidza vachiti, “Musaparidze. Rega kuparidza zvinhu zvakadaro. Hapana chinotinyadzisa chichatiwira.”" 
Micah2:7 Imba yokwaJakobho ingapinde rushambwa nhai? Tenzi haasisina mwoyo murefu here? Ndiwo maitiro ake here? Handiti ndinototaura zvakanaka kune vanotevedza ururami? 
Micah2:8 Imi ndimi matova mhandu yacho kuvanhu vangu munobvutira munhu asina mhaka batye rake, munhu anenge avarairwa achiti hapana chinouya kwaari momupa nhamo yokunge ari muhondo." 
Micah2:9 Munodzinga imi madzimai avanhu vangu mudzimba dzavo dzavanoda kwazvo, vana vavo munovabvutira nokusingaperi chikomborero chandakavapa." 
Micah2:10 Simukai muende nokuti pano hapasisiri pokugara pamusana pokun'ora kunoparadzwa zvikuru kwazvo kuchaita kuti iparadzwe zvachose. 
Micah2:11 “Kana munhu akafamba zvake achitaura mwando zvawo enhema achiti, ‘Regai ndikutaurirei kuti waini nedoro zvichabooka,’ iyeyo ndiye angatova zvake ava muporofita wavanhu ava." 
Micah2:12 “Imi vokwaJakobho ndichanyatsokukokorodzai mose zvenyu, ndichinyatsounganidza chitsama chakasara chevokwaIsiraeri. Ndichavaisa pamwechete sedanga rehwai, sedanga rezvipfuwo zviri mumafuro azvo, vari mhomho chaiyo yavanhu." 
Micah2:13 Iye achavavhurira nzira, ndiye achavatungamirira vachityora napasuo guru vobuda napo. Mambo wavo, Tenzi ndiye achavatungamirira ari mberi.”" 
Micah3:1 Ndakati: “Teererai munzwe, imi vatungamiriri vokwaJakobho nemi vatongi vemba yokwaIsiraeri. Harisi basa renyu here kuziva ruenzaniso?" 
Micah3:2 Imi munovenga zvakanaka muchida zvakaipa, munovhiya vanhu vangu ganda muchivamwaura nyama pamapfupa avo." 
Micah3:3 Munodya vanhu vangu nyama, muchivakwatura ganda imi. Muchivatyora-tyora mapfupa muchivajajada senyama mupoto, senyama zvayo mumazibhodho." 
Micah3:4 Ndopayeka pavanozochema kuna Tenzi asi haavapinduri. Ndipo paanotobva atovanza uso hwake nokudawo kokuti vakaita zviito zvakaipa.” 
Micah3:5 Zvanzi naTenzi kuna vaporofita vanotungamirira vanhu vangu mutome, munodaidzira kuti, “Kwakanaka,” kana muchiwaniswa chokudya asi kune vasingakuwanisi chokuisa kumuromo heyo hondo naye." 
Micah3:6 Nezvo kwamuri, zvokuona zviratidzo izvozvo, huchava usiku zvahwo. Muchava murima, zvokushopera pasisina. Vaporofita, zuva richavadokera, zuva richasviba kwavari." 
Micah3:7 Vaoni vachafumurwa, vanoshopera vachanyadziswa. Vachati kapu kubata muromo nokuti mhinduro kuna Mwari panenge pasisina." 
Micah3:8 Asi ini ndakazara nesimba ndizere naMweya waTenzi uye ndakazara neruenzaniso nesimba kuti nditaurire vokwaJakobho kukanganisa kwavo, nevekwaIsiraeri chitadzo chavo." 
Micah3:9 Chinzwai izvi, imi vatungamiri vemba yokwaJakobho nemi vatongi vemba yokwaIsiraeri. Munovenga ruenzaniso, uye zvose zvinenge zviri pamwero muchizviminamisa." 
Micah3:10 Munovaka Zioni neropa, Jerusaremu iyoyi nezvakaipa." 
Micah3:11 Vatungamiriri vayo vanoda pfumbamuromo pakutonga. Vapristi vacho, vanotoda muripo, kuti vadzidzise. Vaporofita vacho, vanoda mari kuti vashopere, uku vachivimba naTenzi vachiti, “Handiti Tenzi ari pakati pedu here? Hakuna chakaipa chichatiwira.”" 
Micah3:12 Naizvozvo pamusana penyu, guta reZioni richarimwa somunda, Jerusaremu ichava murwi wamatongo, chikomo cheTemberi chichava chitunhu chemiti." 
Micah4:1 Mumazuva achauya zvichaitika kuti gomo reTemberi yaTenzi richaitwa kuti rive gomo rakarebesesa kupfuura makomo ose zvawo. Marudzi avanhu achakurumukira kuenda kwariri," 
Micah4:2 ndudzi zhinji dzavanhu dzichauya dzichiti: “Uyai, tikwire kugomo raTenzi, kumba yaMwari wokwaJakobho atidzidzise makwara ake, titevedze nzira dzake nokuti muZioni ndimo muchabva mutemo, shoko raTenzi richabva kuJerusaremu.”" 
Micah4:3 Ndiye achava mutongi wamarudzi avanhu akawanda achienzanisira mhosva dzendudzi dzavanhu kusvikira kuna vari kure kure. Vachapfura mapakatwa avo vachiaita miromo yegejo, mapfumo avo vachiaita majeko okupemhenesa miti nawo, pasisina rudzi runosumudzira rumwe rudzi bakatwa, uye zvokudzidza kurwa hondo panenge pasisina." 
Micah4:4 Asi munhu wose achagara pamunda wake wamagirepisi newamaonde, pasina anovatyisidzira nokuti ndozvataurwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo nomuromo wake." 
Micah4:5 Asi zviripowo ndezvizvi zvokuti: marudzi ose avanhu, rudzi norudzi runofamba muzita ramwari warwo. Isuwo tichafamba muzita raTenzi Mwari wedu narini narini." 
Micah4:6 “Zvanzi naTenzi, pazuva iroro, ndichaunganidza zvirema, ndichakokorodza vakadzingirwa kure navandakapinza nhamo." 
Micah4:7 Zvirema izvozvo ndizvo zvandichaita chitsama chacho chavanhu vanosara. Ivava pamwechete navakambodzingirwa kure vaya ndichavaita rudzi rwakasimba. Tenzi achavatonga ari paGomo reZioni kubvira ipapo kusvikira nokusingaperi.” 
Micah4:8 Kana zviri zvewe nharirire yedanga rezvipfuwo, iwe gomo reguta reZioni, ukuru hwawaiva nahwo, uchahudzoserwa. Umambo huchauya paguta reJerusaremu." 
Micah4:9 Zvino chii chaizvo chaunobongomorera kudai? Asi mauri hamuna mambo here? Jinda rako raparara here kubva warwadzwa kudai somukadzi arwadziwa napamuviri? 
Micah4:10 Shanyarika udunure, iwe guta reZioni somukadzi arwadziwa napamuviri nokuti iye zvino uchabva muguta irori undogara musango zvamo. Uchaenda iwe kuBhabhironi, ikoko uchaponeswa. Tenzi achakununura ikoko mumaoko mavavengi vako." 
Micah4:11 Izvozvi marudzi mazhinji avanhu ari kukukokerana achiti, “Guta reZioni ngarin'oreswe, tirionerere.”" 
Micah4:12 Asi zviri mumwoyo maTenzi havazvizivi, zvirongwa zvake, havazvinzwisisi kuti atovaunganidza sezvisote zvaunzwa paburiro." 
Micah4:13 “Chisimuka upure zvako iwe guta reZioni nokuti ndichaita kuti uve nenyanga dzesimbi namatsiko endarira uchapwapwanyisa marudzi namarudzi ugopira kuna Tenzi zvavakanga vawana, kupira upfumi hwavo kuna Changamire wapasi pose.”" 
Micah5:1 Ronganisa hondo dzako iwe guta rehondo dzavarwi nokuti watokombwa iwe. Vacharova mutongi weIsiraeri neshamhu padama. 
Micah5:2 “Iwe Bheterehemu wokwaEfurata, kunyange uri muduku zvako, mukati memadzinza okwaJudha, mauri iwe muchabuda mutongi wangu, achatonga Isiraeri, dzinde rokwaakabva nderakare kare rapasichigare chaipo.”" 
Micah5:3 Naizvozvo achambovaregera vakadaro kwechinguva kusvikira ane pamuviri pari kurwadza asununguka. Ipapo dzimwe hama dzake dzose ndopadzichadzokera kuvanhu veIsiraeri. 
Micah5:4 Mwana iyeyo ndiye achatozomira chaizvo achifudza danga rake rezvipfuwo aine simba raTenzi, aine chiremera chezita raTenzi Mwari wake uye vachanyatsogara zvakanaka nokuti ukuru hwake huchasvika kwakaperera nyika." 
Micah5:5 Iyeyu ndiye achatozovawanisa rugare. Patichapindirwa neAsiria munyika medu ichitsokodzera zvayo munzvimbo dzedu, tichaimutsira vokutifudza vanomwe vokuonana nayo, makurukota chaiwo avanhu, kana kutoita masere chaiwo." 
Micah5:6 Ivava ndivo vachatozotonga nyika yeAsiria nehondo yamapakatwa, vachatonga nyika iyoyi yeNimurodhi vakaiburitsira bakatwa. Ivava ndivo vachatinunura kuAsiria patinenge tapindirwa munyika medu neAsiria paya ichitsokodzera munyika medu." 
Micah5:7 Chitsama chevokwaJakobho chinenge chazosara chichazova mukati mendudzi nendudzi dzavanhu, chichiva sedova rinobva kuna Tenzi uye sehore dzemvura pauswa zvisingambomirira zvazvo kana vanhu." 
Micah5:8 Chitsama chevokwaIsiraeri chinenge chazosara chichava mukati memarudzi nomukati mendudzi nendudzi dzavanhu, seshumba mukati memhuka dzesango seshumba ichiri duku mumatanga ehwai inoti kana ikapinda nomo inotsokodzera ichibvambura-bvambura pasina anogona kununura." 
Micah5:9 Uchasumudzira shamhu, vanokuvenga, vavengi vako vose vachaurayiwa." 
Micah5:10 “Pazuva iroro, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, pakati penyu ndichauraya mabhiza enyu ndichiparadza ngoro dzenyu dzehondo." 
Micah5:11 Ndichaparadzawo maguta omunyika menyu ndichipaza nzvimbo dzenyu dzose dzokuzvidzivirira ndadzo muhondo. 
Micah5:12 Ndichaparadzazve uroyi hwamuchashandisa namaoko enyu ndigosiya usisina vanofembera namaminimini. 
Micah5:13 Uye ndichaparadza mukati menyu zvifananidzo zvenyu zvamabwe zvokunamata, hauchazokotamirazve kunamata zvinhu zvamakagadzira imi namaoko enyu." 
Micah5:14 Ndichadzipura mukati menyu zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvinomiririra Ashera nokuparadza maguta ako. 
Micah5:15 Ndichatsiva ndakashatirwa nehasha marudzi ose asingateereri.” 
Micah6:1 Chinzwai zviri kutaura Tenzi. Imimi Mwari simukai mutaure mhosva yenyu pamberi pamakomo, zvikomowo zvinzwe izwi renyu." 
Micah6:2 Teererai, imi makomo, nhuna dzaTenzi nemi ugaro hwenyika hwokugara nokugara nokuti Tenzi ane nhuna navanhu vake nezvo achaita dare neIsiraeri." 
Micah6:3 “Nhai vanhu vangu, chii chandakakuitirai chaizvo? Ndakakunetsai neiko? Ndipindurei!" 
Micah6:4 Nokuti ini ndakakuburitsaika munyika yeIjipiti, ndikakununurai mumba youranda. Ndakakutumirai Mosesi naAroni naMiriamu kuzokutungamirirai." 
Micah6:5 Vanhu vangu, rangarirai zviya zvakanga zvarongwa naBharuki mambo weMoabhu nemhinduro iya yaakapiwa naBhiriamu mwanakomana waBheori. Rangarirai zviya zvakaitika kubvira kuShitimu kusvikira kuGirigari kuitira kuti muzive mabasa akarurama aTenzi.”" 
Micah6:6 Ndouya neiko chaizvo kuna Tenzi ndichizopfugamira iye Mwari wokumusoro? Ndouya here kwaari ndiine mipiro yokupisa yemhuru dzegore rimwechete? 
Micah6:7 Ko iye Tenzi angafadzwe here nezviuru nezviuru zvehondohwe kana kuti gumi rezviuru zvehova dzamafuta? Ndopirira here kukanganisa kwangu dangwe rangu romukomana, ura hwangu ndichihupirira chitadzo changu ini?" 
Micah6:8 Inga wakaudzwa wani, nhai munhu kuti zvakanaka ndezvipi; uye kuti Tenzi anoda kuti uitei, zvaanoda dzezvizvi zvokuti: uite zvine ruenzaniso, uye zvomwoyochena zvikupinde muropa nokufambawo naMwari wako wakazvirereka." 
Micah6:9 Izwi raTenzi rinodaidzira kuguta rino, zvino ungwaru chaihwo zvokutya zita renyu, “Chinzwai, imi dzinza negungano romuguta muno." 
Micah6:10 Ndingakanganwe here, zviereso zvokubiridzira nezvikero zvisiri pamwero zviri mudzimba dzavakaipa? Zvisingambodiwa zvazvo naMwari." 
Micah6:11 Ndoti haana mhosva here munhu ane zvikero zvokubiridzira nazvo nesaga rizere nezvokueresa zvinobiridzira? 
Micah6:12 Vapfumi veguta rino vane utsinye vagari vemo varevi venhema zvinobva pamuromo pavo ndezvounyengedzi. 
Micah6:13 Ndokusaka iniwo ndava kukurwadzisai nokukurovai ndichikuita dongo reguta pamusana pezvitadzo zvenyu. 
Micah6:14 Imi muchadya asi kuguta musingaguti, muchabata paura nenzara. Muchapfundiridza zvinhu asi zvisingachengeteki. Zvamunenge makwanisa kuchengetedza ndichazviparadzisa nehondo yebakatwa." 
Micah6:15 Kudyara muchadyara zvenyu asi pasina chamunokohwa. Kusvina maorivhi muchasvina zvenyu asi mafuta acho hamuazori. Magirepisi muchasvina zvenyu asi waini yacho, hamuinwi." 
Micah6:16 Makachengeta imi mirao yamambo Omuri namaitiro ose evemba yamambo Ahabhu uye makatevedza imi tsika dzavo. Ndokusaka ini ndave kuita guta rino dongo uye vagari varo ndichivaita chiseko, saka nhamo yavanhu vangu yokusekwa ndiro richaberekana nayo.”" 
Micah7:1 Maiwe zvangu inga ndawira ini, nokuti ndaita senguva yezhizha iya yokunge michero yapera kutanhwa, senguva yokunge magirepisi apera kufuhwiwa, kusisina zvako kana chisumbu chokuti udye, kusisinawo maonde okutangisisa kuibva andinodisisa aya." 
Micah7:2 Vanhu vanotya Mwari vapera pasi pano, muvanhu'mu hamusisina mutsvene. Vose zvavo vanohwandirana vachida kuurayana vachivhimana nomumbure hama nehama." 
Micah7:3 Uipi ndohwavana maoko nahwo, ishasha chaidzo pakuhuita, gurukota nomutongi vose vanoda pfumbamuromo, mukuru mukuru chaiye anototaura zvake zvakaipa zviri mumwoyo make vobva vatoiruka nyaya yacho pamwechete." 
Micah7:4 Wakanakisisa chaizvo pakati pavo akaita sorukato ari pachokwadi chaipo wacho akaita soruzhowa rweminzwa. Rasvika zuva riya rokurangwa zuva renharirire zvokukangaidzwa kwenyu zvauya zvino. 
Micah7:5 Rega kuvimba nomumwe wako kana kuvimba neshamwari zvayo, bata rurimi rwako kunyange kumudzimai wako chaiye" 
Micah7:6 nokuti mwanakomana haachambooni baba vake sechinhu mwanasikana achimukirawo amai vake muroora achipandukira vamwene vake. Mhandu dzomunhu dzava vanhu vomumba make chaimo. 
Micah7:7 Asi kana ndiri ini, changu kutarisa kuna Tenzi. Ndichamirira Mwari, ruponesi rwangu, Mwari wangu achandinzwa." 
Micah7:8 Muvengi wangu iwe, rega zvako kunditi toko waro. Kana dai ndikaputsikira pasi, ndichamuka, kana dai ndikagara zvangu murima Tenzi achava chiedza changu." 
Micah7:9 Ndichatirira zvangu kushatirirwa kwandakaitwa naTenzi nokuti ndakamutadzira kusvikira iye Mwari ava kutondirevererawo andienzanisirawo mhosva yangu. Achandisvitsa kuchiedza ndichitozvionerawo kununura kwake. 
Micah7:10 Ipapo vavengi vangu vachazviona, nyika igobatwa nenyadzi, nyika yaimbonditi, “Ko Tenzi, Mwari wako aripiko?” Ndichanyatsoitarisa nyika iyoyo izvozvo ichitsokodzerwa pasi samatope munzira." 
Micah7:11 Richasvika haro zuva rokuvaka masvingo ako. Pazuva iroro muganho wenyika uchasvika uko nokokoko. 
Micah7:12 Pazuva iroro vanhu vachauya kwauri vachibva kuAsiria nokumaguta ekuIjipiti uye kubva kuIjipiti kundosvikawo kurwizi rweYufuratesi kubvawo kugungwa kundosvikawo kugungwa kubvawo kugomo kundosvika kune rimwe gomo. 
Micah7:13 Asi nyika ichasara yava renje pamusana pavagari vayo uri mubayiro wezviito zvavo. 
Micah7:14 Fudzai vanhu venyu nomudonzo wenyu, danga renyu renhaka vava kungogara zvavo voga musango mukati menyika yamapindu. Varegei vandofura zvavo muBhashani nomuGireadhi sapamazuva apasichigare." 
Micah7:15 Sapamazuva aya amakabuda munyika yeIjipiti muvaratidze zvinhu zvinoshamisa. 
Micah7:16 Marudzi avanhu achazvionerawo agonyara vaine simba ravo zvavo kudaro. Vachati nazvo muromo kapu vachitodzivira nzeve nazvo. 
Micah7:17 Vachananzva guruva senyoka sezvinokambaira zvapasi pano. Vachabuda vachihuta kudedera munhare dzavo dzokuhwanda hondo. Vachatendeukira kuna Tenzi, Mwari wedu vachitya pamusana penyu." 
Micah7:18 Ndiani Mwari akaita semi anoregerera uipi anokanganwira vanhu kukanganisa kuchitsama chavakasara chenhaka yake. Iye haarambi akashatirwa narini narini nokuti chaanofarira kuita mwoyochena. 
Micah7:19 Achatinzwira ngoni zvakare agotsokodzera uipi hwedu pasi petsoka dzake. Muchakanda zvitadzo zvedu zvose pasi pasi pegungwa. 
Micah7:20 Imi mucharatidza vokwaJakobho kutendeseka kwenyu muchionesawo vokwaAbhurahamu mwoyochena wenyu sokupika nemhiko kwamakaita kumadzibaba edu kubvira pasichigare. 
Nahum1:1 Chirevo chinonangana neNinivhe. Bhuku rezvakaoneswa Nahumu wokuErikoshi. 
Nahum1:2 Tenzi ndiMwari weshanje anotsividza, Tenzi anotsividza, anoviruka nehasha, Tenzi anotsividza vavengi vake, anodzvokora vavengi vake." 
Nahum1:3 Tenzi haakurumidzi kushatirwa asi simba anaro guru uye Tenzi haaregi kuranga munhu ane mhosva. Muchamupupuri nedutu remhepo ndimo mune nzira yake makore ari huruva yetsoka dzake. 
Nahum1:4 Anotsiura gungwa achiriomesa anopwisa nzizi dzose kuBhashani nokuKarimero kuchisvava pfumvudza yeRebhanoni ichinava. 
Nahum1:5 Pamberi pake makomo anodedera zvikomo zvichinyongodeka, pamberi pake nyika inonyandurwa, pasi pose nezvose zvigere mairi." 
Nahum1:6 Ndiani chaizvo angamirisane nehasha dzake? Chaizvo ndiani angapamire paanenge aviruka nehasha? Hasha dzake dzinoita zvokuviruka somoto matombo achitsemurwa-tsemurwa naye. 
Nahum1:7 Tenzi akanaka, inhare yokuhwanda pazuva rokutambudzika. Iye anozivawo vanotizira kwaari." 
Nahum1:8 Asi nemafashamo achanyatsoritsvaira panzvimbo paro achironda vavengi vake kusvikira murima. 
Nahum1:9 Ibanganoi ramunoitira Tenzi? Achanyatsotsvaira kupedza vavengi vake. Haapamhidzi ruviri kunyatsovatsividza 
Nahum1:10 savanhu vakadhakwa nezvokunwa vacharoromeswa seminzwa yakakochekerana uye sezvidzitsi zvemashanga zvakaoma. 
Nahum1:11 Handiti mamuri makabva mumwe akarongera Tenzi chimwe chinhu chakaipa akapa mazano asina maturo? 
Nahum1:12 Zvanzi naTenzi Mwari, “Kunyange zvavo vaine simba uye vakawanda, vachapfuudzwa vakatsakatika. Kunyange zvangu ndakambokurwadzisa handichakurwadzisazve." 
Nahum1:13 Saka zvino ndava kutyora joko rake riri pauri ndigodambura-dambura tambo dzako.” 
Nahum1:14 Tenzi atema chirevo nezvako chokuti “Zita rako harichafanira kuramba richiyeukwa. Zvifananidzo zvako zvokunamata zvemabwe akavezwa nezvoutare hwakanyungurutswa ndichazviparadza mumba yavamwari vako. Ndichakuitira guva nokuti hauna maturo.” 
Nahum1:15 Inzwai munzwe tsoka dzenhumwa inouya namashoko akanaka ichiparidza nezvorugare! Imi vokwaJudha, chengetai mazuva enyu makuru itai zvamakatsidza nokuti hazvizoitika zvakare nokuti muipi haachauyezve kuzokurwisa, anyatsoparadzwa chaizvo." 
Nahum2:1 Muparadzi akuvinga chengetedzaika nhare yokuzvidzivirira nayo muhondo garirirai mumugwagwa sungai dzisimbe kokai simba renyu rose. 
Nahum2:2 (Chikonzero ndechokuti Tenzi ari kudzosera pakare vokwaJakobho umambo soumambo hwokwaIsiraeri nokuti vapambi vakavarozva vakaparadza matavi avo). 
Nahum2:3 Nhoo dzamagamba ake itsvuku varwi vake vehondo vakapfeka hanzu dzakati piriviri kutsvuka, ngoro dzacho dzehondo dzinovakuma serimi romoto dzaunganidzwa dzaronganiswa, varwi vemabhiza vorimbinyuka." 
Nahum2:4 Ngoro dzacho dzehondo hero besanwa mumigwagwa dzichivhetemesewa kumhanya dzichipenya semwenje dzichipenya semheni. 
Nahum2:5 Vakuru vakuru vanodaidzwa vanotatarika vachiendako, vanomhanyira kurusvingo varonganisa zvokuzvidzivirira nazvo." 
Nahum2:6 Misuo yekurwizi yazarurwa muzinda wamambo, wadumbirwa nazvo." 
Nahum2:7 Vahosi varo vapfekenurwa hanzu vaendwa navo vasikana vanovashandira vachiungudza vachichema senjiva. Vachizvirova chipfuva. 
Nahum2:8 Ninivhe yakaita sedziva rine mvura yavhozhoka. Vanodaidzira kuti ngaimire ngaimire, asi hapana ari kudzokeramo." 
Nahum2:9 Pambai sirivha. Pambai ndarama zvinhu zvavo hazviverengeki kana upfumi hwezvose zvinokosha. 
Nahum2:10 Heko kuparara! Kuparara kuita dongo! Mwoyo yapera simba mabvi achirovana kudedera. Vanhu vose vaita musana, zviso zvese zvachiti surududu." 
Nahum2:11 Riripiko zvino iro bako reshumba, bako reshumba ichiri kuzvinzwa, kwayaiuyisa nyama yayo kwaiva navana vayo pasina chinovakanganisa?" 
Nahum2:12 Shumba yacho yaibvamburira vana vayo nyama yakakwana ichidzipira hadzi yayo nyama; yaizadza mapako ayo nenyama uye mumba mayo nenyama yakadanzurwa-danzurwa. 
Nahum2:13 Chinzwa, Tenzi wehondo nehondo ari kuti ndanangana newe zvino. “Ngoro dzako dzehondo ndichadzipwitititsa kupisa. Shumba dzako dzichiri kuzvinzwa dzicharozvwa nebakatwa. Ndichaparadza panyika nyama yako iyoyo uye mazwi enhumwa dzako haachazonzwikazve.”" 
Nahum3:1 Zvakuwana iwe guta reropa! Guta rose rizere manyepo, rizerewo nezvinhu zvokupamba, kupamba kwacho kusingaperi!" 
Nahum3:2 Heko kurira kwetyava! Nokuvhiririka kwemavhiri nokukakatika kwamabhiza, nokunjanjarika kwengoro dzehondo." 
Nahum3:3 Ivo varwi vamabhiza vachiuya kuzorwisa, vachivhevhetedza bakatwa nepfumo rinopenya. Vafi hero zararira, mirwi nemirwi yezvitunha, zvitunha zvisingaverengeki vachitogumburwa nezvitunha!" 
Nahum3:4 Zvose izvozvo izvo zvichikonzerwa noufeve husingatauriki hwechifeve yacho inoyevedza asi iine mazango anouraya. Inoisa ndudzi munhamo nohufeve hwayo ihwohwo ichiisawo mhuri dzavanhu kurufu namazango ayo. 
Nahum3:5 Chinzwa, ini ndanangana newe, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo. “Ndichakufugura marokwe ako kusvika kuuso hwako marudzi akuonerere." 
Nahum3:6 Nyika dzikuonerere zvinonyadzisa zvako ndichakuti tsvina pororo ndikuite sechinhu chisina maturo uve chinhu chinokatyamadza. 
Nahum3:7 Vose vachakuona vachakukanuka vachikusuduruka vachiti, ‘Ninivhe yaparara. Ndiani achaichemawo ndichaiwanira kupikowo vokuinyaradza.’ ”" 
Nahum3:8 Unokunda Tebhesi here iwe guta raive pedyo naNairi? Raive rakatenderedzwa nemvura gungwa riri iro rokuridzivirira mvura iri iyo rusvingo rwayo? 
Nahum3:9 Itiopia ndiyo yaiva musimboti waro, ndoda Ijipiti zvakanga zvisina magumo Puti nevekuRibhia vaivawo vabatsiri varo." 
Nahum3:10 Asi iyo yakatotorwa ikaenda kuutapwa pwere dzayo dzikapwatitsirwa pasi pakona yomugwagwa wose wose chin'ange chakakandirwa vanhu vayo vanoremekedzeka vakuru vakuru vayo vose vasungwa nengetani. 
Nahum3:11 Newewo uchadhakwa zvokutonyatsokundwa chaizvo ugotsvaga kwokupotera wotiza zvino muvengi. 
Nahum3:12 Maguta enyu etsvingo ose zvawo akaita semiti yemionde ine maonde okutanga kuibva, anoti kungoati zunzei anobva awira mukanwa momudyi." 
Nahum3:13 Chiona zvikwata zvako zvavarwi vava vakadzi zvavo mukati mako. Misuo mikuru yenyika yako, yakatoti hayo haradada kuzarukira zvayo vavengi vako moto waroromesa zvihuri zvako." 
Nahum3:14 Chitotekai mvura hondo zvayakukombai kudai simbaradzai zvokuzvidzivirira nazvo. Pindai mumatope! Kanyai ivhu! Batai zvikombore zvezvidhina! 
Nahum3:15 Pachaita moto uchakuparadzai bakatwa richakutsakatisai richakuparadzai semhashu. Chizviwanzai semhashu muwande sevana vemhashu. 
Nahum3:16 Wakawanza vanhu vako vemhindu dzokutengeserana kupfuura nyenyedzi dzedenga. Mhashu inotambanudza mapapiro ayo yobva yabhururuka kuenda kure. 
Nahum3:17 Machinda ako akaita semhashu, nyanzvi dzako dzezvomutemo dzava kuita semhashu dzomhara zvadzo paruzhowa nezuva rakunenge kuchitonhora. Panobuda zuva idzo dzinobhururuka dzoenda kusina anoziva kwadzinenge dzaenda." 
Nahum3:18 Vafudzi vako vakavata iwe mambo weAsiria kumbahuru kwako vakakotsira. Vanhu vako vapararira nomumakomo pasina anovakokorodza. 
Nahum3:19 Wakuvara zvingarapike ronda rako rakaipisisa kwazvo. Vose zvavo vachanzwa nezvako vacharova makwa vachiitira iwe nokuti ndiani chaizvo asina kuwirwa nohuipi hwako husingaperi? 
Habakkuk1:1 Chirevo chaMwari chakaonekwa nomuporofita Habhakuku. 
Habakkuk1:2 Nhai TENZI, kusvikira rinhi chaizvo ndichingochemera rubatsiro, imi musingateereri? Kana kuchema kwamuri kuti, “Ko utsinyeka uhu!” Asi imi musinganunuri?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Chamunondionesera zvakaipa chii imi kusarurama muchikuona zvenyu? Kuparadza noutsinye zvatarisana neni, gakava nokunetsana zvinomuka." 
Habakkuk1:4 Saka mutemo waita zinyekenyeke uye hapasisina ruenzaniso runoitwa nokuti vakaipa vanokomberana varurami saka ruenzaniso rwava kuminamiswa. 
Habakkuk1:5 “Zvino chitarisai muone mukati memarudzi zvichatokushamisai zvigokukatyamadzai nokuti ndiri kuita basa mumazuva enyu rokuti kana mukarinzwa hamumboribvumi. 
Habakkuk1:6 Nokuti chiripo ndechichi, kuti ndiri kunyandutsa vaKaridhea, rudzi rwakaipa mwoyo ruya, rudzi rwavanhu akarikiriki vanobvongodza nyika yose kundopamba misha isiyavo." 
Habakkuk1:7 Vanotyisa uye vanodederesa. Kutonga kwavo ndokwomusoro wavo. Ukuru hwavo ndohwokuzvipa. 
Habakkuk1:8 “Mabhiza avo, kumhanya, mbada dzinosara pasi achityisa kupinda mhumhi dzinofamba usiku varwi vavo vamabhiza vanokakatika vachizvikudza. Heeka, varwi vavo vamabhiza vanobva kure vachibhururuka segondo risingatani kudya." 
Habakkuk1:9 “Chavanovinga vose zvavo kuzorwisa, chavananga ndichocho, havadzokeri shure vanounganidza nhapwa sejecha." 
Habakkuk1:10 Vanofifida kuseka madzimambo, vatongi vanoita zvokutotamba navo. Vanotoseka guta rese retsvingo nokuti vanoriitira chimutundurundu chevhu chinenge musana wenzou vobva varitora zvavo." 
Habakkuk1:11 Vobvapo, heyo mhepo kuenda mberi, vanhu vane mhosva, simba ravo vanoritora sokunge mwari wavo.”" 
Habakkuk1:12 Inga wani ndimi Chidzachapo nhai TENZI, Mwari wangu, Anoera wangu. Isu hatisi kuzofa Inga imi TENZI makavasarudzira kuti vaunze ruenzaniso imi Dombo, ndimi makaita kuti vasimbarare kuti vave vokuranga." 
Habakkuk1:13 Maziso enyu akaruramisisisa zvokuti hamufaniri kutarisa zvinhu zvakaipa. Haakwanisi kutarisa kuita kwakatsauka. Munodarirei kungotarisa zvenyu vanhu vasina kutendeka kana iko kunyarara kwenyu muipi achimedza akarurama kupinda iye? 
Habakkuk1:14 Nokuti vanhu munovaita kuti vave sehove dzegungwa, sezvinhu zvinokambaira zvisina mutongi." 
Habakkuk1:15 Anoraura nechirauro ozvikukudza nomumbure wavo anozviti unge unge mumambure avo agopembera kwazvo kufara. 
Habakkuk1:16 Naizvozvo anobayira chibayiro kumimbure yake, opisira rusenzi kumambure ake ndizvo zvinomupa kugarika uye nezvokudya zvakawanda." 
Habakkuk1:17 Ko ivo vacharambokutura mimbure yavo vachingouraya zvisina tsitsi marudzi avanhu nokusingaperi here? 
Habakkuk2:1 Ndichaenda panzvimbo pangu pokutarisira ndiri ndigova panharirire ndakagaririra ndione kuti achanditaurira kuti kudii. Uyewo kuti ini ndichapindurei nezvokunyunyuta kwangu. 
Habakkuk2:2 Akandipindura akati, “Nyora chiratidzo ichi uite kuti chinyatsoonekwa chiri pamafendefa kuitira kuti anoverenga averengewo achimhanya" 
Habakkuk2:3 nokuti chiratidzo ichocho chinomiririra nguva yacho yakatemwa chiri kumhanyira kumagumo acho; haasi manyepo. Kunyange zvikaita sezvononoka, zvimirire zvokuitika, zvinotoitika chete hazvisikuzombononoka." 
Habakkuk2:4 Chinzwa, ‘Munhu ane mwoyo usina kururama munhu iyeyo achakundikana asi akarurama achararama nokutendeseka kwake.’ ”" 
Habakkuk2:5 Uyewo upfumi hunonyengedza, anozvitutumadza haaregi kurangwa. Makaro ake aanawo inzvimbo yakapamhamha seyavachakabvu, sorufu haambofa akati ndaguta. Anozvikokorodzera ndudzi dzavanhu dzose achizviunganidzira marudzi avanhu ose kuaita ake." 
Habakkuk2:6 Vose ivava havazomuka here kumunyomba vachimushora vachimusveeredza vachiti, “Zvichamuwana zvake. Anounganidza zvisizvake, kusvikira rinhiko izvozvi? Zvichamuperera iye anotakurana nezvitsidzo zvakawanda!”" 
Habakkuk2:7 Ivo vane ngava newe havazoerekana vakupandukira here kana kumukirwa navamwe, vangazokudederesa ukava nyama yamagora kwavari?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Iwe zvawakapamba ndudzi zhinji kudaro, vanosara mumarudzi ose iwayo, vachakupambawo iyewe kutsividza ropa ravanhu noutsinye ihwohwo pasi pano, kumaguta nokuvanhu vose vageremo." 
Habakkuk2:9 Zvichamuwana munhu anowanira imba yake zvinhu nenzira yakaipa kuti azvivakire dendere rake pamusoro kuti arege kusvikwa nezvinokuvadza. 
Habakkuk2:10 Wakafumura imba yako nokuuraya vanhu vakawanda ukazvirasisa upenyu hwako 
Habakkuk2:11 nokuti ibwe richaridza mhere mumadziro uye kumapango uku nhungo dzigodairawo. 
Habakkuk2:12 Zvichamuwana zvake munhu anovaka guta neropa kana kutanga guta pahwaro hwouipi. 
Habakkuk2:13 Handiti zvinobva kuna TENZI wehondo nehondo here zvokuti vanhu vanoshingairira zvinhu zvinozopiswa zvazvo nomoto marudzi achizvinetesera pasina? 
Habakkuk2:14 Nokuti pasi pano pachazara noruzivo rwembiri yaTENZI, sokuzadza kunoita mvura gungwa." 
Habakkuk2:15 Zvichamuwana munhu anoraradzisa vamwe vake nomukombe wehasha dzake achivaita kuti vadhakwe kuti avaonerere. 
Habakkuk2:16 Uchazvimbirwa iwe nokushorwa panze pokuwana mbiri. Newewo inwa zvako udzadzarike! Uchasvika napauri mukombe uri murudyi rwaTENZI, mbiri yako ichakurirwa nenyadzi dzako." 
Habakkuk2:17 Utsinye hwawakaita kuRebhanoni huchakupfukira, kuparadza kwawakaita mhuka kuchakutyisa, pamusana pokudeura ropa ravanhu noutsinye hwawakaita pasi pano kumaguta nokuvagari vemo vose." 
Habakkuk2:18 Chifananidzo chokunamata, ndechebasa rei chaizvo, icho chakatoitwawo zvacho nomunhu; kana chifananidzo chokunamata chesimbi chinodzidzisa nhema? Nokuti anochigadzira wacho anovimba nezvaanenge aita, anoita zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvisingatauri." 
Habakkuk2:19 Zvichamuwana munhu anoti kuchimuti zvacho, “Domukaiwo nhai,” neanoti kudombo zvaro risingataure, “Dosimukai.” Zvingavewo here nechinhu chazvingagone kuzivisa munhu? Zvamunoona kuti chakanamirirwa ndarama kana sirivha uye machiri icho hamuna kana mweya unofema." 
Habakkuk2:20 Asi TENZI, ari muTemberi yake Inoera, pasi pose ngapati mwiro kunyarara pamberi pake." 
Habakkuk3:1 Munamato womuporofita Habhakuku wokuita neShigionoti akati," 
Habakkuk3:2 TENZI ndakanzwa nezvenyu uye basa renyu TENZI rinondityisa. Rivandudzei mukati memakore muite kuti rizivikanwe mukati memakore, kana mukushatirwa rangarirai tsiye nyoro." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mwari akabva kuTemani uye Anoera achibva kuGomo reParani, mbiri yake yakakwidibira matenga nyika ikazara nokurumbidzwa kwake. Dzepfunde" 
Habakkuk3:4 Kupenya kwake kwakanga kuchiita sechiedza, mirazvo ichipenya mumaoko make, akahwandisa simba rake imomo." 
Habakkuk3:5 Mberi kwake denda rakanga rakatungamira; zvirwere zvakatsikana tsoka naro. 
Habakkuk3:6 Akasimuka akapima nyika akatarisa akadederesa marudzi, makomo apakatikati ndokuati mwarara, makomo apasichigare akati ndondondo kunyura pasi. Maitiro ake aya akanga akaita saapasichigare." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ndakaona misasa yamatendhe yokuKushi yapinda nhamo, machira okudzikatirisa enyika yeMidhia odedera." 
Habakkuk3:8 Nhai TENZI, makanga mashatirirwa nzizi here? Kana kuti hasha dzenyu dzakavirukira nzizi kana kuti makavirukira gungwa nehasha, pamakanga makatasva mabhiza enyu muri mungoro dzenyu dzehondo dzokukurira?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Makasunungura hara pauta hwenyu mukaisa museve wenyu patambo yokukungisa mukatsemura nyika nenzizi. Dzepfunde 
Habakkuk3:10 Makomo akakuonai akazvongonyoka; mvura ine hasha ikakukura hwenje hukaunga; masaisai akasimuka mudenga. 
Habakkuk3:11 Zuva nemwedzi zvakati mbikiti kumira panzvimbo pazvo kuchiedza chemiseve yenyu yaipembera kuenda pakuvaima kwepfumo renyu. 
Habakkuk3:12 Makatara nhanho pasi pano makatsamwa mukatsokodzera marudzi avanhu makashatirwa. 
Habakkuk3:13 Makabuda kundonunura vanhu venyu, kuponesa muzodzwa wenyu. Makapwanya musoro womuipi mukamupfekenura kusiya ava musvo kubvira kumakumbo kusvikira pamutsipa. Dzepfunde" 
Habakkuk3:14 Makabaya varwi vake musoro nemhayo dzenyu vakanga vauya sechamupupuri kuzondimwararisa, vachifara kwazvo sokunge vanoda kuzhanya varombo muchivande." 
Habakkuk3:15 Makabvongodza gungwa namabhiza enyu, mvura yamafashafasha ine simba." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ndinonzwa muviri wangu uchigwagwadza, miromo yangu ichidedereswa noruzha. Ndatyorwa mapfupa ini, kufamba ndava kungodhadharika. Ndichamirira chinyararire zuva renhamo richawira vanhu vanotirwisa." 
Habakkuk3:17 Kunyange zvazvo mukuyu ukarega kupfumvudza, kunyange mugirepisi ukashaya michero kana pamuorivhi pakashaika michero mindawo isina kubereka chokudya zvipfuwo muzvirugu zvapera kufa mumatanga musisina mombe," 
Habakkuk3:18 zvakadaro zvazvo ndichafara muna TENZI. Ndichafara naMwari muponesi wangu. 
Habakkuk3:19 TENZI, Mwari ndiye simba rangu. Makumbo angu anoaita seemhara achindifambisa panzvimbo dzangu dzokumusoro. Izvi ndezvomuimbisi ane zvokuimbisa zvine tambo dzokuridza." 
Zephaniah1:1 Shoko rakauya kuna Zefaniya mwanakomana waKushi, mwana waGadharia mwanakomana waAmariya, mwanakomana waHezekiya, mumazuva aJosiya mwanakomana waAmoni mambo wokwaJudha." 
Zephaniah1:2 “Ndichanyatsotsvaira kutopedza zvose zviri pamusoro payo nyika. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. 
Zephaniah1:3 Ndichatsvaira vanhu nemhuka uye ndichatsvaira shiri dzedenga nehove dzegungwa uye zvimhingamupini, vanhu vakaipa, ndichatsakatisa vanhu pamusoro payo nyika. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Zephaniah1:4 “Ndichasumudzira vokwaJudha shamhu yoruoko rwangu uye vagari veJerusaremu vose zvavo. Ndichatsakatisawo munzvimbo ino vokwaBhaari vakasara uye nezita revapristi vanonamata zvifananidzo. 
Zephaniah1:5 Ivo vanopfugama kunamata pamusoro pedzimba gurusvusvu rezvinhu zvomumatenga, vanopfugama pasi vachipika nezita raTenzi ivo vachipika zvavo nezita raMirikomu," 
Zephaniah1:6 navakafuratira Tenzi vasisatsvaki Tenzi kana kunzwa kuti anotii.” 
Zephaniah1:7 Chitotii zvenyu mwi-i pamberi paTenzi Mwari nokuti zuva raTenzi rosvika Tenzi akagadzirira chibayiro akazvitsaurira vaenzi vake. 
Zephaniah1:8 “Pazuva raTenzi rechibayiro ndicharanga vakuru vakuru navanakomana vamambo nevose zvavo vanopfeka hanzu dzechirudzi. 
Zephaniah1:9 Nezuva iroro ndicharanga munhu wose anodarika chikumbaridzo napamusuo navanozadza dzimba dzatenzi wavo noutsinye nounyengedzi. 
Zephaniah1:10 “Pazuva iroro ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi kucharira mhere kuSuo Guru reHove kuungudza kuchibva kumana rechipiri, kungondomoka kukuru kuzvikomo." 
Zephaniah1:11 Chemai imi vagari vokuMakiteshi nokuti vemhindu dzokutengeserana vose hapasisina ivo vokupima sirivha vose vakatsakatika. 
Zephaniah1:12 “Panguva iyoyo ndichatsvaka nerambi muJerusaremu ndichiranga vanhu ivavo vane manzvengeredzero avo vanozviti nechomumwoyo, ‘Tenzi hapana zvaanomboita, zvakanaka kana zvakaipa.’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Zvinhu zvavo zvichapambwa dzimba dzavo dzichaparadzwa kunyange zvavo vakavaka dzimba havazombodzigari. Kunyange zvavo vakasima minda yemagirepisi, waini yacho havainwi.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Zuva guru raTenzi rosvika, rokasika chaizvo kusvika, bongozozo rezuva raTenzi rinorwadza, gamba chairo richatobongomora kuiridza mhere ipapo." 
Zephaniah1:15 Zuva iroro izuva rehasha musi wokutambura nokurwadzwa zuva repfumvu nokuparara musi werima nezarima zuva ramakore akati kwirindindi 
Zephaniah1:16 zuva rokurira kwehwamanda nokurira kwemhere yehondo yokurwisa maguta etsvingo nezvokuzvidzivirira nazvo zvakati dzu-u kureba. 
Zephaniah1:17 “Ndichaonesa vanhu nhamo zvokutofamba samapofu zvawo nokuti vakatadzira Tenzi. Ropa ravo richanyatsowodzvorwa seguruva uye nyama yavo sendove.” 
Zephaniah1:18 Kunyange sirivha yavo kana ndarama yavo haigoni kuvanunura, pamusi wehasha dzaTenzi. Nyika yose zvayo icharoromeswa mumoto wehasha dzake dzeshanje; achanyatsoyerekana avaparadza; ndozvaachaita kuvagari vapasi pano vose zvavo." 
Zephaniah2:1 Kokorodzanai muite musangano imi rudzi rwavanhu vasinganyari 
Zephaniah2:2 musati mapupurutsirwa kure sehundi iri kupepetswa imi musati mavirukirwa nehasha dzaTenzi musati mawirwa nezuva rehasha dzaTenzi. 
Zephaniah2:3 Tsvakai Tenzi, imi mose varombo venyika iyi vanotevedza mirao yake. Tsvakai kururama mutsvage kuzvininipisa, zvimwe mungahwandiswe pamusi wehasha dzaTenzi." 
Zephaniah2:4 Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti: Gaza iyi ichatizwa uye Ashikeroni ichava dongo zvaro vanhu veAshidhodhi vachadzingwa zuva rakacheka nyika, uye Ekironi ichadzipurwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Muchawira zvenyu imi vagari vokumahombekombe kwegungwa, imi rudzi rwevanhu vechiKereti. Shoko raTenzi ranangana nemi. Iwe Kanani, nyika yevaFirisitia ndichakuparadza zvokusara musisina anogara imomo." 
Zephaniah2:6 Nemi mahombekombe egungwa muchava mafuro zvawo makan'a avafudzi pamwechete namatanga ezvipfuwo. 
Zephaniah2:7 Nyika yokumahombekombe kwegungwa ichava yechitsama chakasara chemba yokwaJudha ichiva mafuro avo uye nomudzimba dzeAshikeroni ndomavacharara zvavo kumanheru nokuti Tenzi, Mwari wavo achange avabvakachira achivadzosera makomborero avo." 
Zephaniah2:8 “Ndakanzwa ini kunyomba kweMoabhu nokutuka kwavaAmoni kutuka kwavakaita vanhu vangu vachidadira nyika yavo. 
Zephaniah2:9 Ndokusaka zvava kunzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo iye Mwari weIsiraeri, hezvino ndakadai, Moabhu ichaita seSodhomu vanhu vechiAmoni vachaita seGomora kuva nyika yorukato namakomba omunyu yava renje nokusingaperi. Chitsama chavanhu vangu chinosara chacho chichavapamba, verudzi rwangu vanenge vapunyuka rufu vachavaita vanhu vavo.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Iwoyu ndouchava mubayiro wavo wokuzvikudza kwavo nokuti vaishora nokudadira vanhu vaTenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Zephaniah2:11 Tenzi achavatyisa kwazvo. Hongu achashayisa maturo vamwari vapanyika vese uye marudzi achati kwaari pasi gwadagwa vari kunzvimbo dzavo ikoko. 
Zephaniah2:12 Newewo iyewe Itiopia uchaurayiwa nehondo yebakatwa rangu. 
Zephaniah2:13 Iye achasumudzira vokuchamhembe shamhu yoruoko rwake agoparadza Asiria Ninivhe achisiya yava dongo renje zvaro rakaoma rakaita segwenga. 
Zephaniah2:14 Matanga emombe acharara zvawo pakati paro, mhuka dzose dzesango magora nenjiri zvose zviri zviviri zvichagara pambiru dzaro, kuchema kwezizi kuchinzwika mumawindho gunguo richachema riri pamusuo mapango emusidhari achanzi panze yacha kufukurwa." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ndirorika guta ramafaro rakanga rigere pamutambaratede rokumbozviti, “Ndini pano, ini chete, hakuna kana mumwezve.” Hero rava renje zvaro dambiro remhuka dzesango. Munhu wose anopfuura nepariri achashamiswa achirasa-rasa maoko ake." 
Zephaniah3:1 Rine nhamo guta rakapanduka rakan'ora, guta rinoonesa vanhu ndondo." 
Zephaniah3:2 Hakuna izwi rarinoteerera, indambakuudzwa zvayo yeguta. Harivimbi naTenzi hariswederiwo pedyo naMwari waro." 
Zephaniah3:3 Vakuru vakuru varo vari mariri ishumba dzinodzvova, vatongi varo imhumi dzamanheru dzisina chadzinosiya chinosvika mangwanani." 
Zephaniah3:4 Vaporofita varo havana hunhu, vanhu vasina kutendeka. Vapristi varo vanon'oresa zvinhu zvinoera vachityora havo mutemo." 
Zephaniah3:5 Tenzi ari mukati maro akarurama, hapana chaanokanganisa. Mangwanani ari wose anoratidza ruenzaniso rwake, mambakwedza oga oga haakundikani. Asi vanhu vasina ruenzaniso havazivi chinonzi kunyara." 
Zephaniah3:6 “Ndakatsakatisa dzindudzi, zvokuzvidzivirira nazvo kuhondo zvasara zvava matongo. Ndakaparadza migwagwa yavo zvokuti hapana achatsikamo. Maguta avo ava matongo asina munhu kana anogaramo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ndaiti ini, zvimwe richanditya rikabvuma kutsiurwa rikarega kurasikirwa nezvose zvandakaripa. Ndopavaibva vatoita zviito zvavo zvakaipa zvose." 
Zephaniah3:8 “Naizvozvo chindimirirai,” ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi mumirire zuva randichasimuka sechapupu nokuti chandiri kufunga ndechokuunganidza marudzi nokukokorodza dzinyika kuti ndipedzere pavari shungu dzangu, kuviruka kwangu kwose nehasha nokuti nyika yose icharoromeswa mumoto wehasha dzeshanje yangu." 
Zephaniah3:9 “Eeka panguva iyoyo ndichapindura matauriro evechirudzi kuti vaite mutauriro mutsvene kuitira kuti vose zvavo vanamate zita raTenzi vamushandire nemwoyo mumwechete. 
Zephaniah3:10 Kubvira kumhiri kwenzizi dzeItiopia vangu ini vanondinamata, vana vavanhu vangu vakapararira nenyika; vachandivigira mipiro yangu. Vanozvirereka vanenge vasara muIsiraeri." 
Zephaniah3:11 Pazuva iroro hamuchazonyadziswi nezviito zvamakandipandukira nazvo nokuti ipapo ndichabvisa pakati penyu vose vanozvikudza vachizvibhebhesa. Hamuzozvitutumadza mugomo rangu. 
Zephaniah3:12 Chiripo ndechichi chokuti ndichasiya pakati penyu vanhu vanozvidukupisa vanozvirereka. Vachapona nokupotera nezita raTenzi. 
Zephaniah3:13 Vanhu vanenge vasara muIsiraeri havana uipi hwavachazoita kana kureva nhema. Mumuromo mavo hamuchazowanikwa rurimi rune unyengedzi nokuti vacharara zvavo kusina anovatyityidzira.” 
Zephaniah3:14 Imbisa zvikuru kwazvo iwe mukunda guta reZioni. Daidzira iwe Isiraeri. Pembera kufara nomwoyo wako wose iwe mukunda guta reJerusaremu! 
Zephaniah3:15 Tenzi abvisa kurangwa kwako kwakakumirira, vavengi vako avadzinga. Mambo weIsiraeri, Tenzi ari pakati pako hapana chakaipa chauchazotyazve." 
Zephaniah3:16 Nomusi iwoyo kuchanzi nezveJerusaremu, “Rega zvako kutya iwe Zioni rega zvako kurukutika maoko ako." 
Zephaniah3:17 Tenzi, Mwari wako ari mukati mako, murwi wehondo anoita kuti ukurire achakufarira zvikuru aine rufaro, achakumutsirudza murudo rwake achakupemberera achiimbisa zvikuru kwazvo" 
Zephaniah3:18 sezvinoitwa pazuva guru.” “Ndichakubvisira nhamo pauri zvokuti hauzonyara nazvo. 
Zephaniah3:19 Chinzwa, panguva iyoyo, ndichaonana nevanokurwadzisa ndigonunura zvirema ndikokorodze vanosemwa. Ndichapindura kunyara kwavo ndichikuita kuti kuve kurumbidza kuzivikanwe pasi pose." 
Zephaniah3:20 “Panguva iyoyo ndichakudzorerai kumusha, panguva yacho yandinenge ndakuunganidzai pamwechete. Honguka ndichaita kuti muve nembiri nokurumbidzwa pakati pamarudzi ose avanhu vepanyika pandinenge ndokudzorerai kubudirira kwenyu muchitozviona.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Haggai1:1 Mugore rechipiri ramambo Dhariusi, mumwedzi wechitanhatu, pazuva rokutanga romwedzi shoko raTenzi rakauya nokunomuporofita Hagai kuna Zerubhabhero, mwanakomana waShearitieri mutongi wokwaJudha, uye kuna Joshuwa, mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru." 
Haggai1:2 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo: “Vanhu ava vanoti nguva ichigere kusvika yokuvakazve Temberi yaTenzi.” 
Haggai1:3 Ndipo pakazouya shoko raTenzi nokunemuporofita Hagai richiti," 
Haggai1:4 “Ndiyo nguva here iyoyi yokuti imi munogara zvenyu mudzimba dzakashongedzwa namapango akavezwa, imba iyi riri dongo?" 
Haggai1:5 Zvino zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, chimbofungaiwo mumwoyo menyu kuti zviri kukufambirai sei." 
Haggai1:6 “Inga makadyara zvakawanda wani asi mukakohwa tushomanani, munodya zvenyu asi kuguta hamuguti, kunwa munonwa asi nyota yenyu haiperi; munopfeka asi hamudziirwi. Anotambira mubayiro nokusevenza kwake anotambirira kuuisa muhomwe yakabooka." 
Haggai1:7 Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, chimbofungai zvenyu mumwoyo menyu kuti zviri kumbokufambirai sei." 
Haggai1:8 Endai kumakomo mundotora mapango muvake imba iyoyi, ndichafadzwa nayo uye ndicharumbidzwa, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Haggai1:9 “Maitarisira kuva namaguta asi twakawanikwa twacho twushomanani. Pamakatwuunza kumusha, ini ndakatwupupurutsa. Pamusana peiko? Ndiwo mubvunzo una Tenzi wehondo nehondo. Chikonzero ndechokuti Temberi yangu inongova dongo zvaro mumwe nomumwe wenyu achimhanya mhanya nezvemba yake." 
Haggai1:10 Ndokusaka mvura yarambira mudenga uye nyikawo isina chayakabereka. 
Haggai1:11 Ndakarambidza mvura kunaya panyika napamakomo, napambesa, napamagirepisi matsva, napamiorivhi, uye nembeswa dzose dzinorimwa muvhu, napavanhu nepamombe, napazvinhu zvose zvavanorima.”" 
Haggai1:12 Ipapo Zerubhabhero mwanakomana waShearitieri, naJoshuwa mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, nechitsama chavanhu chakanga chasara vakateerera shoko raTenzi Mwari wavo namashoko omuporofita Hagai sokutumwa kwaakanga aitwa naTenzi Mwari wavo. Vanhu vakatya Tenzi." 
Haggai1:13 Zvino Hagai nhumwa yaTenzi, akataura kuvanhu aine shoko raTenzi achiti Tenzi ari kuti, “Ndinemi.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Haggai1:14 Tenzi akamutsa mwoyo waZerubhabhero, mwanakomana waShearitieri mutongi wokwaJudha, nemwoyo waJoshuwa mwanakomana waJehozadhaki mupristi mukuru, uyewo mwoyo yechitsama chavanhu vose vakasara vakauya vakashanda paTemberi yaTenzi wehondo nehondo, Mwari wavo" 
Haggai1:15 pazuva remakumi maviri nerechina romwedzi, mumwedzi wechitanhatu." 
Haggai2:1 Mugore rechipiri ramambo Dhariusi, pamwedzi wechinomwe pazuva ramakumi maviri nerimwechete shoko raTenzi rakauya nokunaHagai, muporofita richiti," 
Haggai2:2 “Zvino taurira Zerubhabhero, mwanakomana waShearitieri mutongi wokwaJudha, uye Joshuwa mwanakomana waJehozadhaki, mupristi mukuru, uye chitsama chavanhu chose chakasara uti," 
Haggai2:3 ‘Pane mumwe here pakati penyu asara akaona kunaka kwakanga kwakaita Temberi iyi pakutanga, munoiona yakadii zvino izvi? Sokuonawo kwenyu handiti inenge chinhu pasina?’" 
Haggai2:4 Zvisinei hazvo, zvino tsunga mwoyo iwe Zerubhabhero, ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi. Tsunga mwoyo Joshuwa mwanakomana waJehozadhaki mupristi mukuru. Tsungaiwo mwoyo imi vanhu vose venyika ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Zviri kunzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, ‘Shandai nokuti ndinemi" 
Haggai2:5 sokukutsidzirai kwandakaita pamakabuda muIjipiti. Mweya wangu uri mamuri, musatye.’" 
Haggai2:6 “Chandinodariro ndechokuti, zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo, ‘Kusati kwapera nguva ndefu ini ndichazunzazve matenga nenyika negungwa napasi pakaoma." 
Haggai2:7 Ndichazunza marudzi ose avanhu zvokuti upfumi hwamarudzi ose huchauya ndigozadza Temberi ino norunako,’ ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Haggai2:8 Mari ndeyangu, nendarama ndeyangu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Haggai2:9 Runako rweTemberi iyi yeshure ruchava pamberi kupfuura yakare iya. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo. Nzvimbo ino ndichaiita kuti ibudirire.” 
Haggai2:10 Pazuva regumi nerechina romwedzi wechipfumbamwe, muri mugore rechipiri raDhariusi, shoko raTenzi rakauya nokunaHagai muporofita richiti," 
Haggai2:11 “Zvanzi naTenzi wehondo nehondo bvunza vapristi mubvunzo uyu vakuudze kuti ndizvo here. 
Haggai2:12 Iti, ‘Ko kana munhu akatakura nyama inoera mumukombero wehanzu dzake akazogumha nemukombero iwoyo chingwa, kana kuti bota, kana waini kana mafuta kana chokudya chipi nechipi zvacho, chinobva chava chinoera here?’ ” Vapristi vakati, “Kwete.”" 
Haggai2:13 Hagai ndokutizve, “Ko munhu anenge an'ora pamusana pokugunzva chitunha iye ozondogumha chimwe chaizvozvi izvi chinobva chan'ora here?” Vapristi vakati, “Chinon'ora.”" 
Haggai2:14 Hagai ndokuti, “Ndizvo zvimwechete navanhu ava, nerudzi urwu rwavanhu ruri pamberi pangu, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Ndizvo zvine basa ramaoko avo kanawo zvavanopira ipapo zvakan'ora.”" 
Haggai2:15 “Zvino momborangarira izvi mumwoyo menyu zvichaitika kubvira nhasi uno zvichienda mberi. Ko paTemberi iyi yaTenzi pasati paiswa dombo pamusoro perimwe zvaikufambirai sei. 
Haggai2:16 Zvaiti kana munhu akaenda pamurwi unezviero makumi maviri aiwana paine gumi chete. Kana munhu aienda kuguvi rewaini kundochera zviero makumi mashanu aiwana muine makumi maviri chete. 
Haggai2:17 Ndakakurovai neshamhu uye ndikarovawo basa ramunoita neshamu yechirwere, nechiundudzi nechimvuramahwe. Asi hamuna kudzokera kwandiri, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Haggai2:18 Chimbozvifungai kuti kubvira nhasi uno zviri kuenda mberi, kubvira pazuva rechimakumi maviri nechina romwedzi wechipfumbamwe, musi wacherwa ugaro hweTemberi yaTenzi imbozvifungaiwo" 
Haggai2:19 mune mbeu dzichiri mudura nanhasi handiti? Kusvikira pari nhasi mugirepisi nomuwonde nomupomegraniti, nomuorivhi hapana chairi kubereka handiti. Kubvira pari nhasi ndichakukomborerai.”" 
Haggai2:20 Shoko raTenzi rakauya rwechipiri kuna Hagai pazuva ramakumi maviri nerechina romwedzi richiti 
Haggai2:21 taura kuna Zerubhabhero mutongi wokwaJudha uti, “Ndava kuzozunza matenga napasi." 
Haggai2:22 Uye kuzoparadza umambo hwedzinyika, ndava kuda kuzoparadza simba reumambo hwamarudzi ndichikurira ngoro dzehondo nevanenge vakakwiramo, mabhiza acho navatasvi vawo vachati pasi rikiti kuwa vose zvavo vachiurayana namapakatwa." 
Haggai2:23 Pazuva iroro, ndizvo zviri kutaurwa naTenzi wehondo nehondo ndichakutora iwe, Zerubhabhero, muranda wangu, mwanakomana weShearitieri, ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi ndikuite seringi rechidhindo nokuti ndakusarudza,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Zechariah1:1 Mumwedzi worusere, mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi, shoko raTENZI rakauya kuna Zekariya mwanakomana waBherekiya mwanakomana waIdho muporofita rikati," 
Zechariah1:2 “TENZI akashatirirwa zvikuru kwazvo madzibaba enyu. 
Zechariah1:3 Naizvozvo chiti kwavari TENZI wehondo nehondo ati dzokerai kwandiri, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo kuti iniwo ndidzokere kwamuri. Ndizvo zviri kurehwa naTENZI wehondo nehondo." 
Zechariah1:4 Regai kuita samadzibaba enyu akadanidzirwa navaporofita vokutanga vachiti, ‘TENZI wehondo nehondo ati dzokai kunzira dzenyu dzakaipa mudzoke kuzviito zvenyu zvakaipa.’ Asi ivo havana kuteerera kana kunzwa, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Zechariah1:5 Madzibaba enyu aripi zvino? Kana ivo vaporofita vanogara narini narini here? 
Zechariah1:6 Ko iwo mashoko angu nemirao yangu zvandakaudza varanda vangu vaporofita hazvina kukaurisa madzibaba enyu here? Vakazotendeuka voti inga wani zviya zvakanga zvarongwa kuitwa kwatiri naTENZI wehondo nehondo zvichifambirana nenzira dzedu nezviito zvedu ndizvo zvaari kuita kwatiri.” 
Zechariah1:7 Pamusi wegumi nechina wemwedzi wegumi nechiposhi, uri mwedzi waShebhati, mugore rechipiri rokutonga kwaDhariusi, shoko raTENZI rakauya kuna Zekariya mwanakomana waBherekiya mwanakomana waIdho muporofita;" 
Zechariah1:8 “Usiku ndakaona hoyo munhu akatasva bhiza dzvuku. Izvozvo aiva amire mukati memadenhe emumiti yorukato mumupata kuseri kwake kuina mabhizawo matsvuku neakatsvukuruka namachena. 
Zechariah1:9 Ini ndokuti, ‘Zviiko izvozvi nhaimi changamire wangu?’ Mutumwa aitaura neni iyeyo akati, ‘Ndichakuratidza kuti zvii izvozvi.’" 
Zechariah1:10 Murume akanga amire pakati pamakwenzi emimitiri uya akapindura achiti, ‘Ivava ndidzo nhumwa dzakatumwa naTENZI dzichafamba nenyika yose.’" 
Zechariah1:11 “Ivo vakapindura mutumwa waTENZI uya aiva amire mukati mamakwenzi emimitiri vachiti, ‘Tafamba nenyika yose tikaona kuti igere murunyararo.’" 
Zechariah1:12 “Mutumwa waTENZI akati, ‘Nhai TENZI wehondo nehondo, kusvikira rinhi chaizvo musingaitirewo tsiye nyoro Jerusaremu namaguta okwaJudha amakadai kushatirirwa kwamakumi manomwe amakore?’" 
Zechariah1:13 “TENZI akapindura mutumwa waitaura neni namazwi akanaka anonyaradza mwoyo. 
Zechariah1:14 Nokudaro mutumwa aitaura neni akanditi, ‘Danidzira uchiti zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo, Jerusaremu neZioni zvandipa kuti ndiite shanje inobaya mwoyo kwazvo." 
Zechariah1:15 Uye ndashatirirwa kwazvo marudzi avanhu vagere zvavo mumutambaratede nokuti pandakamboti hangu shatirwei zvishoma ivo ndipo pavakatodarikidza kuparadza. 
Zechariah1:16 Ndokusaka zvava kunzi naTENZI ndadzokera kuJerusaremu ndiine tsiye nyoro. Imba yangu ichavakwa mukati maro, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo, uye tambo yokuyeresa ichanzi tande tande pamusoro peJerusaremu.’" 
Zechariah1:17 “Danidzirazve uchiti TENZI wehondo nehondo anoti, ‘Maguta angu achafashukira noupfumi, achanyaradzazve Zioni achisarudza Jerusaremu zvakare.’ ”" 
Zechariah1:18 Ndakasimudza musoro ndikaona hedzo nyanga ina! 
Zechariah1:19 Ini ndokuti kumutumwa wandaikurukura naye, “Ko zviiko izvi?” Iye akabva anditi, “Ndidzo nyanga dzakamwararisa vokwaJudha nevokwaIsiraeri neJerusaremu.”" 
Zechariah1:20 TENZI akandiratidzawo vapfuuri vesimbi vana. 
Zechariah1:21 Ini ndikati, “Ko ivava vari kuuya kuzoitei?” Iye ndokuti, “Ndidzo nyanga dzakamwararisa vokwaJudha zvokushaya kana nomumwechete akasimudza musoro. Zvino ivava vauya kuzovatyityidzira vachiwondomorera pasi masimba amarudzi akasimudza nyanga dzawo achitunga nyika yokwaJudha kuti iparare.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Ndakasimudza musoro ndikaona hoyo munhu ane tambo yokueresa muruoko rwake. 
Zechariah2:2 Ndakati, “Uri kuendepiko?” Iye akati kwandiri, “Kundoera Jerusaremu ndigoona kuti upamhi hwayo hwakadii uye kuti urefu hwayo hwakadii?”" 
Zechariah2:3 Ndiye onei mutumwa uya aitaura neni wauya ndokubva mumwe mutumwawo auyapo kuzosangana naye 
Zechariah2:4 akati kwaari, “Mhanyira kumukomana uyo uti kwaari, ‘Jerusaremu ichagarwa semisha isina tsvingo zvakonzerwa nokuwanda kwavanhu nezvipfuwo mairi.’" 
Zechariah2:5 Zvichavapo ndezvokuti ini ndichava kwairi rusvingo rwomoto kuitenderera, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI, uye ini ndichava mbiri mairi.”" 
Zechariah2:6 “Hezvo! Hezvo iwe! Tizai kunyika yokuchamhembe ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI nokuti ndakakuitai rumwe rumwe uyu kwake uyu kwake, kumativi mana emhepo yokumatenga, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Zechariah2:7 Hezvo iwe tizirai kuguta reZioni imi mugere nomukunda iyeyo Bhabhironi 
Zechariah2:8 nokuti zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo, mushure momukurumbira wake iye akazondituma kumarudzi aya akakupambai nokuti anenge angokugunzvai watobata mboni yeziso rake," 
Zechariah2:9 ‘Chirega uone, ndichavazunzira ruoko rwangu vagova nhapwa kuna vaivashandira.’ “Ipapo ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti TENZI wehondo nehondo ndiye akandituma." 
Zechariah2:10 “Imba upembere zvako iwe mukunda, guta reZioni nokuti ndichauya ndigoita musha mukati mako.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI." 
Zechariah2:11 Izvozvo marudzi akawanda achazvibatanidza naTENZI nomusi iwoyo uye vachavawo vanhu vangu. Ini ndichaita musha mukati mako. Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti TENZI wehondo nehondo ndiye akandituma kwauri. 
Zechariah2:12 Ipapo TENZI achagara nhaka vokwaJudha somugovewo wake munyika inoera achizosarudza zvakare Jerusaremu. 
Zechariah2:13 Imi vanhuwe — e, mose zvenyu, itii mwiro kunyarara pana TENZI nokuti azvisumukira iye pachake kubva mumusha make munoera." 
Zechariah3:1 Akazondiratidzawo Joshuwa mupristi mukuru amire mberi kwomutumwa waTENZI uye Satani amirewo kurudyi kwake kuti amupe mhosva. 
Zechariah3:2 TENZI akati kuna Satani, “TENZI ngaakurange iwe Satani! TENZI nyakuzvisarudzira Jerusaremu ngaakurange! Handiti iyeyu chitsiga chakatoburwa mumoto here?”" 
Zechariah3:3 Izvozvo Joshuwa akanga akapfeka mbatya dzine tsvina amire pamberi pomutumwa. 
Zechariah3:4 Mutumwa uya akataura kuna vaiva vakamira pamberi pake achiti, “Mupfekenurei hanzu dzine tsvina idzi.” Akatiwo kuna Joshuwa, “Tarira uone, ndakubvisa uipi hwako uye ndava kukushongedza hanzu yemandiriri.”" 
Zechariah3:5 Ini ndikati, “Ngavadzike Joshuwa ngundu yakachena mumusoro.” Saizvozvowo vakamudzika ngundu yakachena mumusoro vakamushongedza hanzu dzacho. Izvozvo mutumwa waTENZI aiva amire pedyo navo." 
Zechariah3:6 Mutumwa waTENZI akakomekedza Joshuwa kuti: 
Zechariah3:7 “Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo, kana ukatevedza nzira dzangu uchichengeta zvandakati uite uchatonga imba yangu uye nhandare dzangu dzichavawo mumaoko ako. Ndichakupawo mvumo yokupinda mukati mavanhu vamire pano." 
Zechariah3:8 Chinzwa, zvino iwe mupristi mukuru Joshuwa, iyewe neshamwari dzako dzaugere nadzo sezvo vari chiratidzo cheramangwana rakanaka. Chinzwai, ndichaunza muranda wangu iye Bazi" 
Zechariah3:9 nokuti zvaunoona! Pabwe randakaisa pamberi paJoshuwa, pabwe rimwechete zvaro rine mativi manomwe, ndichaitapo zvokutemera zvinyorwa zvapo, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo. Ndichabvisawo uipi hwenyika ino nezuva rimwechete chairo." 
Zechariah3:10 Pamusi iwoyo, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo, mumwe nomumwe wenyu achakoka waakagarisana naye kuzotandara pasi pomugirepisi wake napasi pomukuyu wake.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Mutumwa aitaura neni uya akauya zvakare akandimutsa somunhu amutswa kutsi kwehope
