Zechariah4:2 akati kwandiri, “Uri kuonei?” Ini ndakati, “Ndiri kuona chigadzikiro chomwenje chendarama chose zvacho chine mudziyo uri pamusoro pacho una marambi manomwe pauri ana marimi manomwewo parambi rimwe nerimwe ramarambi iwayo ari pamusoro pacho." 
Zechariah4:3 Uye pane miti yemiorivhi pedyo nacho yakati mumwe kurudyi kwomudziyo iwoyo mumwewo uri kuruboshwe kwawo.” 
Zechariah4:4 Ini ndakabvunza mutumwa aitaura nemi ndikati, “Ko zviiko izvozvi nhai changamire wangu?”" 
Zechariah4:5 Mutumwa aitaura neni uya akandidaira achiti, “Hauzivi nhai kuti zvii izvozvo?” Ini ndokuti, “Kwete, changamire wangu.”" 
Zechariah4:6 Akabva anditi, “Herino shoko raTENZI rinonangana naZerubhabhero rinoti: ‘Hazviitwi zvehondo kana zvechisimba asi naMweya wangu, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo.’" 
Zechariah4:7 Uri chii chaizvo iwe zigomo guru? Mberi kwaZerubhabhero uchava bani zvaro iwe, iye achiunza mberi ibwe rapamusoro kuchidaidzirwa kunzi, ‘Kunaka here ikoku, kunaka here uku!’ ”" 
Zechariah4:8 Shoko raTENZI rakauyazve kwandiri richiti," 
Zechariah4:9 “Zerubhabhero namaoko ake ndiye akavaka ugaro hwemba ino uye achaipedzesawo namaoko ake. Ndipo pauchaziva kuti TENZI wehondo nehondo ndiye andituma kwauri. 
Zechariah4:10 Chandinodariro ndechokuti ani zvake anenge akambosvora zuva retunhu tudiki achatozopemberawo achizvionera nameso ake Zerubhabhero akabata muruoko tambo yokuvaka nayo yokuyeresa kutwasuka. “Zvinomwe izvi, maziso aTENZI anobvongodza kuona pasi pose zvapo.”" 
Zechariah4:11 Ndakati kwaari, “Ko iyi miti miviri yemiorivhi iyi yakati uyu kurudyi uyu kuruboshwe kwechigadzikiro chomwenje, zviiko izvozvi?”" 
Zechariah4:12 Ndakamubvunza rwepiri kuti, “Ko maikowo iwaya mapazi maviri omuti womuorivhi aya ari padivi pepombi mbiri dzendarama, dzinoburitsa mafuta endarama?”" 
Zechariah4:13 Iye akati kwandiri, “Hauzivi here kuti izvozvi zvii?” Ndikati, “Kwete changamire wangu.”" 
Zechariah4:14 Akabva ati, “Ivava ndovazodzwa vaviri vanomira naChangamire wapasi pose.”" 
Zechariah5:1 Ndakasimudza musoro ndikatarisa wonei bhuku rokumononora richibhururuka. 
Zechariah5:2 Akabva anditi, “Ko chii chauri kuona?” Ndakadavira ndichiti, “Ndiri kuona bhuku rekumononora riri kubhururuka. Urefu hwaro hunoita mamita mapfumbamwe uye upamhi hwaro huchiita mamita mana ane hafu.”" 
Zechariah5:3 Akazoti kwandiri, “Irworwu urwu ndirwo rushambwa rwawira pamusoro penyika yose nokuti kubvira iye zvino anenge angoba chete anosungirwa kuparadzwa zvichienderanawo norushambwa irworwo uye anopika nhema achaparadzwa zvechienderana narwo." 
Zechariah5:4 Ndini charwutumidzira, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo rugopinda mumba membavha nomumba memunhu anopika zvenhema nezita rangu rwuchagara mumba make rwuiroromese mapango zvose namatombo.”" 
Zechariah5:5 Mutumwa aitaura neni uya akauyapo akati kwandiri, “Simudza musoro uone kuti zvii zvavakuuya.”" 
Zechariah5:6 Ini ndakati, “Chiiko?” Akati, “Ibhaghidhi riri kuuya.” Akatiwo, “Irori ndiho uipi hwavo munyika iyoyi yose zvayo.”" 
Zechariah5:7 Ndiye onei chivharo chomutobvu chakuduburwa. Izvozvo makanga muina mukadzi agere mubhaghidhi imomo. 
Zechariah5:8 Mutumwa uya ndokuti, “Uhu huipi uhu.” Akabva amukanda pasi imomo mubhaghidhi makare akaroverera pasi chivharo chacho chomutobvu chairema pamuromo waro." 
Zechariah5:9 Ndakasimudza musoro ndikaona havo vakadzi vaviri vachiuya mberi. Mhepo yakanga iri mumapapiro mavo. Vaiva vane mapapiro akaita semapapiro eshuramurove. Vakasumudzira bhaghidhi iroro pakati penyika nedenga. 
Zechariah5:10 Ndakabvunza mutumwa aitaura neni uya kuti, “Ko ivava vava kuendesa bhaghidhi iroro kupi?”" 
Zechariah5:11 Akanditi, “Kunyika yeShinari kundorivakira imba yokunamatira. Rikange ravakirwa saizvozvo richagadzikirwa pachigadzikiro paro.”" 
Zechariah6:1 Ndakasimudzazve musoro ndikaona hedzo ngoro ina dzehondo dzichibuda napakati pamakomo maviri. Makomo acho akanga ari makomo endarira. 
Zechariah6:2 Ngoro yehondo yokutanga yakanga ina mabhiza matsvuku, yechipiri iina mabhiza matema" 
Zechariah6:3 yetatu yacho iina mabhiza machena. Ngoro yehondo yechina yaiva namabhiza mapfumbu, ano chaiwo." 
Zechariah6:4 Ndakabvunza mutumwa uya aitaura neni kuti, “Ko izvi zviiko nhai changamire wangu?”" 
Zechariah6:5 Mutumwa uye akandipindura achiti, “Idzodzi dziri kuenda kumativi mana emhepo dzedenga mushure mokunge dzambozvikumikidza kuna Changamire wapasi pose.”" 
Zechariah6:6 Ngoro yehondo ina mabhiza matema inoenda kunyika yokuchamhembe, machena achaenda kunyika yokumadokero. Mapfumbu anoendawo kunyika yokumaodzanyemba." 
Zechariah6:7 Pakabuda mabhiza, aya ano chaiwo akanga asingagare zvakanaka nokuda kupinda munzira kuti apote nenyika. Ndokubva iye ati, “Chiendai mupote nenyika.” Saizvozvowo akapota nayo nyika." 
Zechariah6:8 Akazodaidzira kwandiri achiti, “Chinzwa, vaya vanoenda kunyika yokuchamhembe vapa kuti mweya wangu uwane zororo kunyika yokuchamhembe.”" 
Zechariah6:9 Shoko raTENZI rakazouya kwandiri rikati," 
Zechariah6:10 “Enda kunhapwa utore Heridhai naTobhiya naJedhaya vasvika vachibva kuBhabhironi ubva waenda musi wakarewo kumba kwaJosiya mwanakomana waZefaniya. 
Zechariah6:11 Unotora kwavari sirivha nendarama uite nayo ngundu uidzike mumusoro maJoshuwa mwanakomna waJehozadhaki mupristi mukuru 
Zechariah6:12 umuti zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo: ‘Chinzwa, murume ane zita rokuti Bazi achabukira kuva bazi munzvimbo maari achizovaka Temberi yaTENZI." 
Zechariah6:13 Iye ndiye achavaka Temberi yaTENZI uye achawana chiremera choumambo uye achagara pachigaro choumambo achitonga. Pachava nomupristi pedyo nechigaro chake choumambo vachiwirirana vachinzwisisana kwazvo pauviri hwavo.’ 
Zechariah6:14 Ngundu dzinofanira kuzova muTemberi yaTENZI sechiyeuchidzo chokuyeuka nacho Heridhai naTobhiya naJedhaya naJosiya mwanakomana waZefaniya.” 
Zechariah6:15 Vari kurewo vachauya kuzovaka Temberi yaTENZI. Ndipo pamuchazoziva kuti TENZI wehondo nehondo andituma kwamuri. Izvozvi zvichaitika kana mukanyatsoteerera izwi raTENZI, Mwari wenyu." 
Zechariah7:1 Mugore rechina rokutonga kwamambo Dhariusi, shoko raTENZI rakauya kuna Zekariya pamusi wechina wemwedzi wechipfumbamwe uri mwedzi waKisirevhu." 
Zechariah7:2 Zvino vanhu vokuBhetieri vakanga vatumira Sharezeru naRegemereki navarume vokwavo kundoteterera kuti vaitirwe tsiye nyoro naTENZI," 
Zechariah7:3 nokundobvunzawo vapristi vepamba yaTENZI wehondo nehondo navaporofita kuti, “Ndinofanira here kuchema nhamo kana kutsanya mumwedzi wechishanu sezvandanga ndichingoita kwamakore namakore?”" 
Zechariah7:4 Shoko raTENZI wehondo nehondo rakazouya kwandiri richiti," 
Zechariah7:5 “Taura kuvanhu vose zvavo venyika iyi uye nokuvapristi uti: ‘Heya pamaitsanya muchichema nhamo mumwedzi wechishanu newechinomwe kwamakore makumi manomwe maitsanyira ini here? 
Zechariah7:6 Kunyange napaya pamunodya napamunonwawo, handiti munenge muchitozvidyira nokuzvinwirawo zvenyu iyemi pachenyu?’ ”" 
Zechariah7:7 Jerusaremu payakange igere vanhu, zvinhu zvichibudirira zvakanaka pamwechete nemisha yayo yakaikomberedza uyewo iwo maodzanyemba nenyika yokumanhika pakwakanga kugere vanhu iwaya haasiri iwo mashoko aiparidzwa navaporofita vokutanga here?" 
Zechariah7:8 Shoko raTENZI rakauya kuna Zekariya richiti," 
Zechariah7:9 “Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo tongai zviri pachokwadi chaipo muchiitirana mwoyo wakanaka muchinzwirana tsitsi hama nehama. 
Zechariah7:10 Regai kuonesa nhamo chirikadzi nenherera nomuuyi kunyange murombo. Uye ngaparege kuva nomunhu anorongera mumwe wake mano akaipa mumwoyo. 
Zechariah7:11 “Asi ivo vakaramba kunzwa, vakagwikura mapfudzi vachityorera zvimiti munzeve dzavo kuti varege kunzwa." 
Zechariah7:12 Vakaomesa mwoyo chaizvo vachiti vangadaro vakazonzwa mutemo namashoko akatumidzirwa naTENZI wehondo nehondo naMweya wake nomuromo wavaporofita vokutanga. Ndokusaka TENZI wehondo nehondo akashatirwa zvinotyisa kwazvo. 
Zechariah7:13 Sokudaidza kwandakaita ivo vakaramba kunzwa, ndokudaidzawo kwavakazoita ini ndigokaregawo kuvateerera, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo." 
Zechariah7:14 Uye ndakavati mwarara nechamupupuri chaicho mukati memarudzi ose avakanga vasingazivi, nezvo nyika yavakasiya yakava renje zvaro zvokushaya kana nomunhu aifamba — fambamo; saizvozvo, nyika yakanaka yaitwa renje zvino.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Shoko raTENZI wehondo nehondo rakauya kwandiri rikati," 
Zechariah8:2 “Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo ndine shanje neguta reZioni, shanje chaiyo huru uye kuti ndiri kuriitira shanje ndakaviruka nehasha dzakakura kwazvo." 
Zechariah8:3 Zvanzi naTENZI ndichadzokera kuZioni ndigoita musha mukati meJerusaremu. Jerusaremu richazodaidzwa kunzi guta rakatendeseka uye kunzi Gomo raTENZI wehondo nehondo, gomo rinoera." 
Zechariah8:4 Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo harahwa nechembere dzichatoti zvadzo mboya mboya kugara munhandare dzeJerusaremu mumwe nomumwe aine mudonzvo muruoko pari pamusana pokunyatsokwegura. 
Zechariah8:5 Migwagwawo yeguta ichange yakazaridzana vakomana navasikana vachitamba havo mumigwagwa mayo. 
Zechariah8:6 “TENZI wehondo nehondo ari kuti kana zvikashamisa zvazvo chitsama cheverudzi urwu chakasara mumazuva ano aya ndipo pazvingandishamisewo ini here, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo?" 
Zechariah8:7 Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo regai zvenyu muone, ndichanunura vanhu vangu ndivabvise kunyika yokumabvazuva nokunyika yokumadokero" 
Zechariah8:8 ndichivadzosera kuzogara mukati meJerusaremu. Ivo vachava vanhu vangu, ini ndiri Mwari wavo pachokwadi uye nomukururama." 
Zechariah8:9 “Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo simbisai maoko imi muri kunzwa mazwi aya anobva mumiromo wavaporofita mazuva ano aya kubvira musi wakavakwa ugaro hwemba yaTENZI wehondo nehondo kuiitira kuti Temberi ivakwe. 
Zechariah8:10 Ndinodaro nokuti mazuva iwayo asati asvika kwakanga kusina chaitambiriswa munhu kana chaitambirisirwa chipfuwo. Kunyange mukufamba makanga musina kuchengetedzeka kwakanaka kumuvengi nokuti ndakanga ndaita kuti vanhu vavengane. 
Zechariah8:11 Asi parizvino handichaitira chitsama chavanhu ava chakasara sapamazuva akare aya ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo 
Zechariah8:12 nokuti kuchadyarwa rugare, mugirepisi uchabereka muchero wawo ivhu richipa zvinobva mariri, matenga achadonhesawo dova rawo. Ini ndichaita kuti zvose izvozvo zvive zvevechitsama chakasara chavanhu ava." 
Zechariah8:13 Uye sezvo imi manga mava chitukiso mukati memarudzi imi vemba yokwaJudha nemi vemba yokwaIsiraeri, saka ini ndichakununurai muve chikomborero. Regai kutya, simbisai maoko.”" 
Zechariah8:14 Chiripo ndechokuti zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo, “Sokuronga kwandakamboita kukupinzai nhamo paya pandakatsamwiswa namadzibaba enyu ndikarega kudzora mwoyo, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo" 
Zechariah8:15 saizvozvo ndarongawo mazuva ano kuti ndichiitira Jerusaremu zvakanaka nemba yokwaJudha. Regai kutya! 
Zechariah8:16 Hezvinoi zvamunofanira kuita: “Tauriranai chokwadi. Mumatare enyu, tongai zviri pachokwadi muite zvinouyisa rugare." 
Zechariah8:17 “Kandai pasi zvokurongerana mano akaipa mumwoyo, murege kuda mhiko dzenhema nokuti zvose izvozvi ini ndinozvivenga. Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Shoko raTENZI wehondo nehondo rakauya kwandiri richiti," 
Zechariah8:19 “Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo kutsanya kwapamwedzi wechina, nokutsanya kwapamwedzi wechishanu, nokutsanya kwewechinomwe uye nokutsanya kwewechigumi kunofanira kuva mwaka yokupembera kufara namazuva makuru okupembera kune vemba yokwaJudha, naizvozvo idai chokwadi norugare.”" 
Zechariah8:20 Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo, “Kuchati kwouya mamwe marudzi vagari vamaguta mazhinji chaivo." 
Zechariah8:21 Vagari verimwe guta vachaenda kune rimwe racho vachiti, ‘Ngatibvei tatoenda kundoteterera kuti tiitirwe tsiye nyoro naTENZI tindotsvaka TENZI wehondo nehondo, ini ndava kuenda!’" 
Zechariah8:22 Marudzi mazhinji nendudzi dzakasimba dzichauya kuzotsvaga TENZI wehondo nehondo muJerusaremu vachizoteterera kuti TENZI avanzwirewo ngoni. 
Zechariah8:23 Zvanzi naTENZI wehondo nehondo namazuva iwayo gumi ravanhu vokumarudzi endimi dzose richabata muJudha hanzu yake richiti ngatiendei nemi nokuti takanzwa kuti Mwari anemi.” 
Zechariah9:1 Hechinoi chirevo. Shoko raTENZI rakanangana nenyika yeHadhiraki uye richasvikawo kuDhamasikusi nokuti maziso avanhu anototarisira kuna TENZI sezvinongoitawo madzinza ose eIsiraeri 
Zechariah9:2 uyewo Hamati inoganhurana nayo neTire neSidhoni kunyange zvazvo vane ungwaru. 
Zechariah9:3 Guta reTire rakazvivakira nhare dzaro dzokuzvidzivirira kuhondo rikaunganidzawo sirivha sevhu uye nendarama samatope omumugwagwa. 
Zechariah9:4 Asi TENZI acharikatanura zvinhu zvaro zvarinazvo agoti kupukupu kukanda upfumi hwaro mugungwa. Tire icharoromeswa nomoto. 
Zechariah9:5 Ashikeroni ichazviona igodedera kutya, Gazawo ichamonyoroka ichirwadzwa kwazvo nazvo, pamwechetewo neEkironi nokuti zvayaitarisira zvakangaidzika. MuGaza muchasara musisina mambo Ashikeroni richasara risisina vageremo." 
Zechariah9:6 Rudzi rwavana vomusango ndoruchatozoita musha muAshidhodhi uye ndichapedza kuzvitutumadza kweFirisitia. 
Zechariah9:7 Ndichaibvisa nyama ine ropa mukanwa mayo nezvakan'ora zvayo mumazino mayo naiyowo ichava chitsama chavanhu vakasara chaMwari wedu. Ichavawo seimwe imba yomudzinza rokwaJudha Ekironi ichaita hwevanhu vokuJebhusi. 
Zechariah9:8 Ndipo pandichaita musasa pamba pangu somuchengetedzi kuti parege kuwana munhu anodzengererapo. Hakuna mudzvinyiriri achazombovakurira nokuti ndazvionera zvino namaziso angu aya. 
Zechariah9:9 Fara zvikuru kwazvo iwe mukunda, guta reZioni. Pururudza kwazvo kwazvo iwe mukunda, guta reJerusaremu. Hoyo mambo wako anouya kwauri! Ahwinha, mukundi chaiye, anozvirereka zvake nokutasva dhongi, chigondora chemwana wedhongi." 
Zechariah9:10 “Ndichaparadza ngoro yehondo mudzinza rokwaEfuremu nebhizawo rehondo muJerusaremu uye uta hwehondo huchaparadzwawo. Iye achatiwo kumarudzi ngakuve norugare, umambo hwake huchatonga kubvira kune rimwe gungwa kusvikira kune rimwewo gungwa nokubvirawo kuRwizi kudzamara kwakaperera nyika chaiko.”" 
Zechariah9:11 “Kana zviri zvakowo iwe, ndichiitira hangu ropa rechitenderano changu newe, ndichasunungura nhapwa dzokwako mumugodhi usina mvura vaende zvavo." 
Zechariah9:12 Dzokerai zvenyu kunhare dzenyu dzokuzvidzivirira muhondo, imi nhapwa dzechitarisiro! Nhasi uno ndinoti ndichakudzoserai zvakapetwa ruviri" 
Zechariah9:13 nokuti ndakakunga vokwaJudha souta hwangu, vokwaEfuremu ndikavaita museve wacho. Iwe guta reZioni ndichavhevhetesa vanakomana vako pamusoro pavanakomana vako iwe nyika yeGirisi, uye ndichakuvheyesa sebakatwa romurwi wehondo.”" 
Zechariah9:14 TENZI ndipo paachaonekwa nechapamusoro pavo, misevewo yake iri mheni zvayo kuenda. TENZI Mwari acharidza hwamanda agoenda achifamba hake nomuchamupupuri chamaodzanyemba." 
Zechariah9:15 TENZI wehondo nehondo achavadzivirira, vachazhanya nokutsokodzera pasi varwi vezvimviriri zvamatombo. Ropa ravo vacharinwa sewaini kuzara somundiro, zvokutotota sapamakona eatari." 
Zechariah9:16 Nomusi iwoyo TENZI, Mwari wavo achavanunura nokuti ivowo, idanga rehwai dzavanhu vake. Chiripo ndechokuti ivo sezvishongo zvapangundu vachapenya munyika make." 
Zechariah9:17 Eeka! Hamungati kunaka ikoko, i — i zvakazonaka. Hakuzi kuyevedza kwakadaro, haiwaiwa zvinoyevedza! Mbesanwa dzichaita kuti zvinhu zvinakire majaya uye waini itsva ichiitira zvakanaka vasikana." 
Zechariah10:1 Kumbirai TENZI mvura munguva yemvura yomunhuruka, kuna TENZI anogadzira dutu ramakore emvura. Ndiye anopa vanhu mvura inonaya achipawo kumunhu wose zvinhu zvinomera mumunda make." 
Zechariah10:2 Chandinodariro ndechokuti zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvinongowawata nhema zvadzo, uye vashoperi vanoona zvamanyepo, varotiwo vachirotomoka zvenhema vachinyaradza vanhu zvokungovabata kumeso chete. Nezvo vanhu vanodzungaira sehwai vanotambura nokushaya mufudzi." 
Zechariah10:3 Hasha dzangu dzavirukira kwazvo vafudzi ivavo, saka ndichapa vatungamiriri shamhu yokuranga, nokuti TENZI wehondo nehondo ane hanya nedanga rehwai dzake iyo imba yokwaJudha. Uye achavaita samabhiza ake akanakisisa okurwisa nawo kuhondo." 
Zechariah10:4 Mavari ndimo muchabva ibwe rapakona, mavari muchibuda hoko yetendhe, mavari muchabvawo uta hwehondo, mavari ndimo muchamuka mutongi wose zvake." 
Zechariah10:5 Vose pamwechete vachava magamba chaiwo avarume vehondo, vanotsokodzera muvengi mumatope omumigwagwa. Vacharwa hondo nokuti TENZI anavo. Vachapazamisa musoro vatasvi vamabhiza." 
Zechariah10:6 Ini ndichasimbisa imba yokwaJudha ndigoponesa imba yokwaJosefi. Ndichavadzosera kuno nokuti ndinovanzwira ngoni. Vachaita sokunge ndisina kumbovaramba nokuti ini ndini TENZI, Mwari wavo uye ndichavapindura." 
Zechariah10:7 Ipapo vokwaEfuremu vachava segamba rokurwa hondo mumwoyo vachifara savanhu vanwa waini. Vana vavo vachazvionawo vakafara zvikuru, mwoyo yavo ichafara muna TENZI." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndichavaridzira mheterwa ndivaunganidzemo nokuti ndakavanunura. Uye vachawanda sezvavaiva kare. 
Zechariah10:9 Kunyange zvazvo ndakanga ndavati mwarara mukati memarudzi asi kunyika dzokure ikoko vachandirangarira, uyewo vachararama pamwechete navana vavo vagozodzokazve kuno." 
Zechariah10:10 Ndichavadzosera kumusha ndichivabvisa kunyika yeIjipiti, ndichavakokorodza kuAsiria ndigovaunza kudunhu rokwaGireadhi nokuRebhanoni kusvikira pasisina pokugara." 
Zechariah10:11 Vachadimura nomugungwa reIjipiti, mafungu egungwa achange akamiswa, hwenje hwese hwemvura yaNairi huchange hwati gwa kuoma. Kuzvitutumadza kweAsiria kuchaderedzwa pasi pasi chaipo, uye tsvimbo youmambo hweIjipiti ichabva." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndichavasimbaradza muna TENZI vachafamba muzita rake. Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI. 
Zechariah11:1 Zurura misuo yako iwe Rebhanoni moto uroromese miti yako yemisidhari. 
Zechariah11:2 Iwe muti womusaipurasi ungudza nokuti miti yemisidhari yawa nokuti miti ine mbiri yaparara. Hwihwidzai kuchema imi mioku yeBhashani nokuti sango dema rarizhaniswa. 
Zechariah11:3 Terera unzwe mhere yavafudzi nokuti mbiri yavo yaparadzwa. Heko kudzvova kweshumba nokuti jokotywa resango, sango raJorodhani raparara." 
Zechariah11:4 Zvanzi naTENZI, Mwari wangu, “Iva zvako mufudzi wedanga rezvipfuwo zvakatemerwa kuuraiwa." 
Zechariah11:5 Vanenge vadzitenga vanodziuraya voenda havo vasina kurangwa, uye vanodzitengesa vanotozviti, ‘TENZI ngaarumbidzwe!’ Ndazopfuma ini, uye vafudzi vavo chaivoivo havana tsitsi navo." 
Zechariah11:6 Ndinodaro nokuti handisisina tsitsi navagari venyika iyi, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI. Rega zvako uone! Ndichaitisa vanhu kuti mumwe nomumwe awire mumaoko omufudzi wake, mumwe nomumwe achiwira mumaoko amambo wake. Vachapwanya nyika, handina wandinonunura mumaoko mavo.”" 
Zechariah11:7 Saizvozvowo ini ndakabva ndava mufudzi wedanga rezvipfuwo zvakatemerwa kuuraiwa navanoita mhindu dzokutengeserana makwai. Ipapo ndakatora tsvimbo mbiri, imwe ndakaitumidza zita rokuti, “Nyasha.” Imwewo ndikaipa zita rokuti, “Kuwirirana.” Ndakafudza hwai dzacho." 
Zechariah11:8 Nomwedzi mumwechete chaiwo, ndakaparadza vafudzi vatatu. Asi ndakazodzamara ndotsamwa kwazvo nadzo, idzo dzaiita daka neni." 
Zechariah11:9 Nokudaro ndakati handichava mufudzi wenyuzve. “Chafa chafa, chaparara chapararawo, zvinenge zvasara regai zvidyane kunyanya zvazvo.”" 
Zechariah11:10 Ndakatora tsvimbo yangu iya inonzi “Nyasha,” ndikaityora kuri kutotyora chibvumirano chandakanga ndaitirana namarudzi avanhu ose zvawo." 
Zechariah11:11 Nezvo chibvumirano chacho chakabvawo chadzimwa pazuva iroro. Izvozvo vaya vemhindu dzokutengeserana makwai vakanga vakaisa maziso pandiri vakabva vazviziva kuti iroro rakanga riri shoko raTENZI. 
Zechariah11:12 Ini ndokuti kwavari, “Kana maona zvakanaka nditambiriseiwo zvenyu mubayiro wangu, asi kana zvisina uchengetei henyu.” Saka vakayera makumi matatu emari yamashekeri yesirivha." 
Zechariah11:13 TENZI akandiudza kuti, “Iise munochengeterwa upfumi,” iwo mazimari acho omubayiro wavakanditambirisa. Saizvozvo ini ndakatora makumi matatu emari yamashekeri yesirivha ndikaiisa munochengeterwa upfumi mumba yaTENZI." 
Zechariah11:14 Ndakatyorawo tsvimbo yangu yechipiri iya inonzi, Kuwirirana, ndichitoparadza ukama huri pakati pevokwaJudha nevokwaIsiraeri." 
Zechariah11:15 TENZI akabva ati kwandiri, “Chimbotorazve iye zvino zvombo zvomufudzi asina maturo." 
Zechariah11:16 Nokuti, chinzwa, ini ndava kumutsa munyika iyi mufudzi asina hanya nedzinoparara, kana kutsvakawo dzinorasika, kunyange kurapa dzakakuvara, kana kupa chokudya dzakagwinya. Asi kuti anotodya dzakakora, achikwachura mazondo adzo." 
Zechariah11:17 “Ane nhamo, mufudzi wangu, mufudzi asina maturo anotiza danga rezvipfuwo. Bakatwa ngaribaye ruoko rwake, neziso rake rorudyi. Ruoko rwake ngarubva rwanyatsoti rukutu. Ziso rake rorudyi ribve ranyatsopofomara.”" 
Zechariah12:1 Shoko raTENZI rinotaura nezveIsiraeri kuti, zvanzi naTENZI, iye akawarira matenga akaita nyika, iye akasika mweya uri mumunhu anoti," 
Zechariah12:2 “Chionai, ini ndava kuzoita kuti Jerusaremu rive mukombe unotenderedza musoro kuvanhu vari munharaunda yaro. Ichavawo nhamo yawira vokwaJudha panokombwa Jerusaremu ipapo." 
Zechariah12:3 Zvichazoitika kuti pazuva iroro ndichaita kuti Jerusaremu ringe dombo rinorema kuvanhu vose. Vose vanorisimudza vachakuvara zvakanyanya. Asi marudzi ose apanyika achauya kuzorikomberana. 
Zechariah12:4 Pazuva iroro, ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI, ndichapandutsa bhiza riri rose nokutya, vatasvi vawo ndichivapengesa. Ndichatarira vemba yokwaJudha asi mabhiza avamarudzi ndichaapofomadza." 
Zechariah12:5 Mhuri dzokwaJudha ndipo padzichazozviti inga vagari veJerusaremu simba ravo riri muna TENZI, Mwari wavo." 
Zechariah12:6 “Panguva iyoyo ndichaita kuti mhuri dzokwaJudha dzinge choto zvacho chomoto musango, sezhenje romoto mumashanga. Vacharakatisa vanhu uku nokuku nharaunda yose. Izvozvo Jerusaremu, vagari varo rinenge richinavo, imomu muJerusaremu." 
Zechariah12:7 “TENZI achatanga kununura mhuri dzokwaJudha kuitira kuti mbiri yemba yokwaDhavhidhi nembiri yavagari vomuJerusaremu irege kupfuura yedzimwewo mhuri dzose dzokwaJudha. 
Zechariah12:8 Panguva iyoyo TENZI achadzivirira vagari veJerusaremu zvokuti kunyange ndonda chaidzo pakati pavo, nguva iyoyo, dzichaita saDhavhidhi, imba yokwaDhavhidhi ichinge Mwari, sokunge mutumwa waTENZI kuvatungamirira." 
Zechariah12:9 Zvichaitika kuti panguva iyoyo chandinenge ndichitotsvaka kuparadza marudzi ose anenge auya kuzorwisa Jerusaremu. 
Zechariah12:10 “Ndichanyatsopinza muimba yaDhavhidhi nomuvagari veJerusaremu mweya wetsitsi nowokunamata zvokuti vachatarisa kwaari iye wavanenge vabaya. Vachamuchema sokuchema kunoita munhu anochema mwana anga achingova mumwechete oga, vachamuchema zvinosiririsa sokuchema kunoita munhu dangwe rechikomana." 
Zechariah12:11 Pazuva iroro kuchema kwavo kuchanyanya sokuchemwa kwakaitwa Hadhadhirimoni mubani reMeghidho. 
Zechariah12:12 Nyika ichachema, mhuri nemhuri ichichema iri payo, zvichiti: “Mhuri yokwaDhavhidhi iri payo madzimai avo ari pachavo voga. Mhuri yemba yokwaNatani iri payowo, madzimai avo vari pachawo." 
Zechariah12:13 Mhuri yemba yokwaRevhi iri payo, madzimai avo ari pachavo. Mhuriwo yokwaShimei iri payo, madzimai avo ari pachavo." 
Zechariah12:14 Nedzimwewo mhuri dzose dzinenge dzasara dzichiti iyiwo payo iyiwo payo madzimai avowo ari kwavo oga.” 
Zechariah13:1 Panguva iyoyo imba yaDhavhidhi navagari veJerusaremu vachazarurirwa chisipiti chokuvashambidza zvitadzo zvavo nokun'ora kwavo. 
Zechariah13:2 “Pazuva iroro,” ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo, “Ndichaparadza munyika zvifananidzo zvokunamata zvokuti hazvizombofa zvakarangarirwazve. Uye ndichabvisa munyika vaporofita nemweya yakaipa." 
Zechariah13:3 Pakabudawo munhu ava kuti muporofita, baba naamai vake vokumubereka chaivo vachamuti haufaniri kurarama nokuti uri kutaura nhema muzita raTENZI. Baba naamai vakamubereka chaivo vachamubaya kana akaporofita." 
Zechariah13:4 Pazuva iroro muporofita ari wose achanyara nezvaanooneswa paanenge achiporofita. Haazopfeki zijari rine mvere rokunyengedza naro vanhu," 
Zechariah13:5 asi anenge ava kutoti handisi muporofita ini, ndiri murimiwo zvangu nokuti kubvira pauduku hwangu changa chiri changu ivhu." 
Zechariah13:6 Kana munhu akamubvunza kuti, ‘Ko maronda ari pamusana pako ndeei?’ Iye achati, ‘Ndakaawana mumba meshamwari dzangu.’ ”" 
Zechariah13:7 TENZI wehondo nehondo anoti, “Muka iwe bakatwa umukire mufudzi wangu umukire akabatana neni, rova mufudzi, hwai dzipararire. Hwayana dzacho ndichadzisimudzira shamhu." 
Zechariah13:8 Zvanzi naTENZI munyika yose zvayo vaviri pavatatu vacharakatiswa kufa. Mumwechete pavatatu ndiye achararama. 
Zechariah13:9 Chikamu chavanhu chechitatu ichocho ndichachipinza mumoto, vanhu ivava ndichavachenesa sesirivha. Ndichavaedza sokuedzwa kunoitwa ndarama vachadana nezita rangu; ini ndichavapindura. Ndichiti, ‘Ava vanhu vangu.’ Ivowo vachati, ‘TENZI ndiye Mwari wedu.’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Chinzwa zuva raTENZI riri kuuya rokuti zvinhu zvinenge zvapambwa zvichagovanwa makatarisa. 
Zechariah14:2 Chiripo ndechokuti ndichakokorodza marudzi ose kuzorwisa Jerusaremu. Jerusaremu richakurirwa, dzimba dzigopambwa, vakadzi vachibhinywa. Hafu yeguta irori ichaendwa nayo kuutapwa. Vanhu vanenge vasara havazoparara muguta." 
Zechariah14:3 TENZI ndipo paachandorwisa marudzi iwayo sokurwisa kwaanoita pazuva rehondo. 
Zechariah14:4 Pamusi iwoyo iye achanoti dzi kumira kugomo reMuorivhi riri pakatarisana neJerusaremu kumabvazuva. Gomo reMuorivhi richakamuraniswawo napakati muzvikamu zviviri kubva kumabvazuva zvichienda kumadokero richakamuraniswa nebani guru. Chimwe chikamu chichaenda kuchamhembe chimwe chikamu chichienda kumaodzanyemba. 
Zechariah14:5 Bani iroro rinenge riri pakati pezvikomo richavharwa. Richavharwa kusvika kuJasori. Richavharwa sokuvharwa kwarakaitwa nokundengendeka kwenguva yaUziya mambo wokwaJudha. TENZI Mwari wangu ndipo paachauya pamwechete navarurami vose. 
Zechariah14:6 Pazuva iroro panenge pasina chiedza, pasina kutonhora kana chando" 
Zechariah14:7 richange riri zuva riri roga, risina zvokuti masikati kana kuti usiku. Izvi zvinozivikanwa naTENZI. Kana kwasvika nguva yamanheru kunenge kune chiedza." 
Zechariah14:8 Pazuva iroro mvura mhenyu ichayerera ichibva muJerusaremu imwe ichayerera kumabvazuva imwe ichiyerera kumadokero. Icharamba ichingodaro zhizha napachando. 
Zechariah14:9 TENZI achava mambo wapasi pose. Pazuva iroro TENZI achave ndiye oga; zita rake richingova ndiro rimwechetero. 
Zechariah14:10 Nyika yose ichapindutswa kuva bani kubvira kuGebha kusvika kuRimoni kumaodzanyemba eJerusaremu. Asi guta reJerusaremu richaramba rakangoti kangarara, richibvira kusuo guru rokwaBhenjamini kusvika kusuo guru rakare riya, zvichinosvikawo kusuo guru repakona; zvichibvawo panharire yokwaHananeri kusvika kuguvi ramambo rewaini." 
Zechariah14:11 Richange rakagarwa navanhu risisina zvokutsaurirwa kuparadzwa. Jerusaremu richagara murunyararo. 
Zechariah14:12 Iri ndiro denda richapiwa naTENZI kuvanhu vanozoita hondo neJerusaremu: Nyama yavo ichaora ivo vachiri kufamba. Maziso avo achaora mumahobi avo uye rurimi rwavo ruchaora mukanwa mavo. 
Zechariah14:13 Panguva iyoyo TENZI achapazamisa vanhu musoro zvokuti munhu achangoti ruoko rwomumwe ndu — u mumwewo iyeyo ruokowo runenge rwatova mudenga kare rwokurwisana naye. 
Zechariah14:14 Judha chaiyo icharwisana neJerusaremu. Upfumi hwamarudzi akatenderedza ose huchaunganidzwa hunoti ndarama nesirivha namatutu — matutu ezvokupfeka. 
Zechariah14:15 Denda rimwechetero richawirawo mabhiza namanyurusi nengamera namadhongi nedzimwewo mhuka dzingange dziri pamatendhe iwayo. 
Zechariah14:16 Ipapo vanenge vasara pamarudzi ose anouya kuzorwisa Jerusaremu, munhu wose achaenda kuJerusaremu kundonamata Mambo, TENZI wehondo nehondo uye kuzochengeta mazuva makuru amatumba." 
Zechariah14:17 Kana imwe mhuri yapanyika pano ikarega kuenda kuJerusaremu kundonamata Mambo TENZI wehondo nehondo, hainairwe nemvura." 
Zechariah14:18 Kana mhuri yeIjipiti isina kuenda kundoshanya ikoko haichawirwi nenhamo inopiwa naTENZI mamwe marudzi anorega kuenda kundochengeta mazuva makuru amatumba. 
Zechariah14:19 Ichochi ndicho chichava chirango cheIjipiti uyewo chirango chamarudzi ose asingaendi kundochengeta mazuva makuru amatumba. 
Zechariah14:20 Panguva iyoyo madare anorira amabhiza anenge akanyorwa kunzi, “Zvinoera zvaTENZI.” Poto dzomumba maTENZI dzichange dzakangoita sendiro dziri pamberi peatari." 
Zechariah14:21 MuJerusaremu nomaJudha, poto iri yose zvayo inenge iri inoera yaTENZI wehondo nehondo. Uku kunenge kuri kuitira kuti vanoda kupira chibayiro vanogona kuuya vachidzitora vachibikira nyama yechibayiro madziri. Hapazofanira kuva nomunhu anoita mhindu dzokutengesa mumba yaTENZI wehondo nehondo pazuva iroro." 
Malachi1:1 Chirevo: Shoko raTenzi kuvaIsiraeri raakataura nomuromo waMaraki. 
Malachi1:2 “Ndakakudai.” Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. Asi imi munoti, “Makatida nomutowo upi? Handiti Esau mukoma waJakobho here?” Ndizvo zviri kubvunzwa naTenzi, “Asi wandakada ndiJakobho," 
Malachi1:3 asi Esau ndakamuramba. Nyika yake yamakomo ndakaiita renje zvaro ndikasiyira nhaka yake kumakava okugwenga'ku.” 
Malachi1:4 Dai kuri kuti Edhomu inoti, “Takaputswa asi tichavaka hedu matongo acho.” Tenzi wehondo nehondo ari kuti, “Kuvaka, vangavake havo asi ini ndichavapaza kudzamara vava kunzi, ‘Nyika youipi yavanhu vakagara vakashatirirwa naTenzi narinhi wose.’ ”" 
Malachi1:5 Muchatozozvionerawo nemeso enyu uye muchatozoti, “Tenzi mukuru ikoko kure nenyika yeIsiraeri.”" 
Malachi1:6 Inga wani mwanakomana anoremekedza baba vake, muranda anoremekedza vatenzi vake. “Zvino kana ini ndiri baba, kuremekedzwa kwangu kuripi? Kana ini ndiri tenzi, kutyiwa kwangu kuripi? Ndizvo zviri kureva TENZI wehondo nehondo kwamuri iyemi vapristi munozvidza zita rangu. Munotika imi takazvidza zita renyu sei," 
Malachi1:7 nokupira chokudya chakan'ora paatari yangu. Uye munoti takachin'oresa sei, nokufungaka kwenyu kuti tebhuru yaTenzi inogona kushorwa zvayo." 
Malachi1:8 Kana imi muchipira sechibayiro mhuka dzakapofomara maziso, hausi huipi here ihwohwo? Ko kana muchipira dzakaremara kana dzine chirwere, hausi huipi here ihwohwo? Endai muzvipe kumutongi wenyu, anofadzwa nemi kana kukuitiraiwo zvakanaka here?” Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo." 
Malachi1:9 Zvino chikumbirai Mwari tione kuti atiitire tsiye nyoro agotinzwirawo ngoni. Imi mune chipo chakadaro mumaoko menyu angakuitirei tsiye nyoro here? Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo. 
Malachi1:10 “Dai zvazvo pane mumwe pakati penyu anopfiga zvake misuo kuti imi murege kubatidza moto paatari yangu zvisina maturo! Handichakufarirai. Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo uye handichambogamuchira mupiro wamunopira imi namaoko enyu 
Malachi1:11 nokuti kubvira kunobuda zuva kudzamara kwarinodokera zita rangu iguru pakati pemarudzi uye munzvimbo dzose rusenzi runopirwa kuzita rangu pamwechete nemipiro mitsvene nokuti zita rangu, izita guru mukati memarudzi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo." 
Malachi1:12 Asi imi munorin'oresa muchiti teburu yaTenzi yakasvibiswa muchipira zvenyu pairi chokudya chakazvidzika. 
Malachi1:13 Munototi zvenyu, ‘Haiwaiwa zvinonetsa izvi,’ izvozvo muchitondifinyamisira mhuno imi. Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo. Munounzaka imi zvinhu zvakatorerwa vanhu nechisimba kana zvakaremara kana zvinorwara ndozvamunouya nazvo somupiro wenyu? Ini ndigamuchire zvakadaro kwamuri here ini? Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi." 
Malachi1:14 Ngaawirwe norushambwa munyengedzi ane chipfuwo chikono mudanga make chaanoti iye atsidza kuzochipira pidigu opira kuna Tenzi chibayiro chinoshoreka nokuti ini ndiri Mambo mukuru ini. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo, uye zita rangu rinotyiwa mukati memarudzi.”" 
Malachi2:1 “Zvino imi vapristi mutemo uyu mutemo wenyu. 
Malachi2:2 Kana mukarega kuteerera kana kurega henyu kuuisa mumwoyo kuti mupe mbiri kuzita rangu ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi, inini ndichati muwirwe nejambwa. Ndichati zvikomborero zvenyu zvive jambwa nazvinowo ndatozviti zvive jambwa nokuti hamuuise mumwoyo." 
Malachi2:3 Chinzwai ndichati zvibereko zvenyu zviwirwe norushambwa, ndichakuzora — zorai uso nendove, ndove yemipiro yenyu uye ndigokubvisai kwandiri." 
Malachi2:4 Ndopamuchazoziva kuti ndakutemerai murao iwoyu kuitira kuti chitenderano changu nevokwaRevhi chibate. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Malachi2:5 “Chitenderano changu chandakaita naye chakanga chiri chitenderano choupenyu norugare. Ndakamupa izvozvo kuitira kuti agotyawo, saizvozvowo ainditya achidedera kwazvo zita rangu." 
Malachi2:6 “Rudzidziso rwechokwadi ruri pamuromo pake, uipi hahwaiwanikwa pamuromo pake. Akafamba neni mukuwadzana nomukururama. Akadzora vazhinji kuhuipi." 
Malachi2:7 Ndinodaro nokuti miromo yomupristi inofanira kuchengetedza ruzivo. Vanhu vanotsvaka rudzidziso kumuromo wake nokuti iye inhumwa yaTENZI wehondo nehondo. 
Malachi2:8 “Asi imimi makatsauka mugwara, makaitisa kuti vakawanda vapingiridzwe nechidzidziso chenyu. Makan'oresa chitenderano chokwaRevhi ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Malachi2:9 Ndokusaka ini ndavakuitawo kuti imi muve vanhu vakashoreka vokupedzesera zvavo kuvanhu vose sokuregawo kuchengeta nzira dzangu kwamakaita, makatoita zvenyu rusaruro pane zvemitemo.”" 
Malachi2:10 Handiti tina baba mumwechete here? Hatina kusikwa naMwari mumwechete here? Nemhaka yei tichirega kuitirana zvakatendeka tichin'oresa chitenderano chemadzibaba edu kudai. 
Malachi2:11 VokwaJudha havana kutendeka, muIsiraeri nomuJerusaremu makaitwa zvinhu zvisingadiwi naMwari. Chikonzero ndechokuti vokwaJudha vakan'oresa Nzvimbo Inoera yaTenzi yapamwoyo, vachitoroora zvavo vanasikana vokuvamwari vasiri ivo." 
Malachi2:12 Dai TENZI angoiti munhu iyeyo asawane uchapupu kana kurevererwa mumisasa yematendhe yovokwaJakobho paanouya nomupiro kuna Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Malachi2:13 Zvimwewo zvamunoita ndezvizvi: munochakatisa atari yaTenzi nemisodzi nokuhwihwidza kuchema nokuungudza nokuti haasisina hanya nomupiro kana kuugamuchira nomufaro mumaoko enyu. 
Malachi2:14 Munobvunza kuti, “Ko chaanoregerera chii?” Chikonzero chacho ndechokuti Tenzi ndiye chapupu chinopupurira chitenderano chako iwe nomudzimai akakubvisa mugota wausina kutendeka kwaari iye ari mumwe wako uyezve ari mudzimai wako wechitenderano." 
Malachi2:15 Haasiri iye here akavaita chinhu chimwechete akaramba angotichengetera mweya woupenyu? Shungu dzake ipapo ndedzokuitei chaizvo? Handiti kuti pamuke rudzi runotya Mwari? Saka chichenjererai kuti munhu arege kuva asina kutendeseka kumudzimai wake akamubvisa mugota," 
Malachi2:16 nokuti, “Ndinovenga kurambana.” Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi, Mwari weIsiraeri, uye munhu anopfeka utsinye sehembe. Ndizvo zviri kutaura TENZI wehondo nehondo. Naizvozvo imi ngwarirai mweya yenyu murege kuva vanyengedzi." 
Malachi2:17 Mapfuvisa Tenzi nezvamunotaura. Asi imi munoti, “Tamupfuvisa seiko chaizvo?” Nokutaura muchiti, “Vose vanoita zvakaipa ndivo vakanaka pana Tenzi uye ndivo vaanofarira ivavo.” Kana nokubvunza kuti, “Ko Mwari woruenzaniso aripi?”" 
Malachi3:1 Chinzwai, “Ndichatuma nhumwa yangu kuzofanondigadzirira nzira, Tenzi wamunodai kutsvaka achayerekana auya kuTemberi yake, nhumwa iyoyo yechitenderano yamunofarira iri kuuya,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Malachi3:2 Asi ndianiko angatirire zuva rokuuya kwake uye ndiani angapamire kana iye auya? Ndinodaro nokuti akaita somoto womunyungurutsi woutare kana kuti sesipo yomusuki. 
Malachi3:3 Achagara pasi somunyungurutsi uye somuchenesi wesirivha achachenesa vanakomana vokwaRevhi agovachenesa sendarama nesirivha kudzamara vava kupira mipiro yakarurama kuna Tenzi. 
Malachi3:4 Mupiro wokwaJudha neJerusaremu ndopauchazofadza Tenzi sezvazvaiita pasichigare sezvawaiita mumakore akapfuura. 
Malachi3:5 “Ndopandichakuvingai kuzokugadzai dare ndiri chapupu chinokurumidza kupupura chakanangana navanhu vanoromba mushonga nemhombwe navanopika zvemanyepo uye navanhu vanobata zvakaipa mushandi wavo pane zvavanomutambirisa nokuonesa nhamo chirikadzi nenherera uye navanhu vanosaidzira muuyi kure navo, vasinganditye zvavo. Ndizvo zvinotaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Malachi3:6 “Chiripo ndechokuti ini Tenzi handisanduke — sanduke naizvozvo imiwo vanakomana vokwaJakobho hamuna kutsakatika. 
Malachi3:7 Kubvira mumazuva amadzibaba enyu, manga muchingokanda pasi mirao yangu muchirega kuichengeta. Chidzokerai kwandiri, ini ndichadzokerawo kwamuri, ndozvinotaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo. Asi imi munoti, ‘Ko todzokera sei?’" 
Malachi3:8 Nhaimi, iye munhu angabire Mwari here? Asi imi munondibiraka imi. Asi munoti tinokubirai seiko? Imo muzvegumi zvenyu nomumipiro yenyu." 
Malachi3:9 Makapinda jambwa nokuti muri kundibira, iyemi rudzi rwenyu rwose zvarwo." 
Malachi3:10 Uyai nezvegumi zvakakwana mumba mokuchengetera zvinhu kuitira kuti mumba mangu muve nechokudya nezvo mundiedze henyu ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo muone kuti ini ndinorega here kukuzarurirai mahwindho okudenga ndichikuwodzvorerai mafashafasha emakomborero. 
Malachi3:11 Ndichakumisirai mharadzi kuti irege kuparadza michero yevhu renyu uyewo mugirepisi wenyu, muminda hauzotadza kubereka. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Malachi3:12 Ipapo marudzi ose avanhu achakutii muri vanhu vakakomborerwa nokuti muchange muri munyika yorufaro. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Malachi3:13 “Munotaura zvakaomarara kwandiri,” ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi. “Asi ndipo pamunoti mi, ‘Ko takataura zvakaomarara sei?’" 
Malachi3:14 Munoti, ‘Hazvina namaturo ose kushandira Mwari. Zvinotibatsireiko kuteerera mirao uye kufamba takazvirereka kuna Tenzi wehondo nehondo wacho?" 
Malachi3:15 Asi zvino zvatiri kuona ndezvokuti vanozvikudza ndivo vakatokomborerwa zvavo. Vaiti vezvakaipa havasi kungobudirira chete asi kutoti kunyange vakaedza zvavo Mwari vanopunyukawo.’ ” 
Malachi3:16 Vanhu vaitya Tenzi vakataurirana. Tenzi akateerera akavanzwa. Izvozvo bhuku roKuyeuchidza ravanhu vanotya Tenzi navanhu vanofunga nezvezita rake rakanyorwa mberi kwake. 
Malachi3:17 “Ivavo vachava vanhu vangu,” ndizvo zviri kureva Tenzi wehondo nehondo. “Vachava upfumi hwangu hwakakosha kwazvo pazuva randichazoita zvandinoita. Uye ndichavachengetedza sokuchengetedza kunoita munhu mwana wake mukomana anomushandira." 
Malachi3:18 Ipapozve ndipo pamuchazosiyanisa mutsauko uri pakati pomururami nomuipi napakatiwo pomunhu anoshandira Mwari neasingamushandire.” 
Malachi4:1 “Chinzwai, hero zuva rinouya, “Zuva rinopisa sechoto. Ipapo vanhu vanozvikudza navaiti vezvakaipa vachava zvidzitsi zvazvo zvemashanga. Zuva iroro richauya racho richavaroromesa zvokuti harivasiyire mudzi kana bazi zvaro. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo." 
Malachi4:2 Asi imi munotya zita rangu muchabudirwa nezuva roururami, zuva rine kuporesa mumapapiro maro. Muchaita chomurambamhuru semhuru dzinobuda muchirugu." 
Malachi4:3 Izvozvo muchatsokodzera pasi vakaipa nokuti vachava madota zvawo pasi petsoka dzenyu pazuva racho randichaita zvandichaita. Ndizvo zviri kutaura Tenzi wehondo nehondo. 
Malachi4:4 “Rangarirai mutemo womuranda wangu Mosesi murao uya nezvirevo zvandakamutemera kuHorebhu zvinosunga Isiraeri yose zvirevo nemirawo. 
Malachi4:5 “Chinzwai, ndichakutumirai muporofita Eriya, zuva guru raTenzi rinotyisa iroro risati rasvika." 
Malachi4:6 Iye achapindutsa mwoyo yamadzibaba kuti vanzwanane navana vavo uyewo kupindutsa mwoyo yavana kuitira kuti vanzwanane namadzibaba avo; nokuti ndingadaro ndikauya ndikapinza nyika murushambwa.” 
Matthew1:10 Hezekia akabereka Manase. Manasewo akabereka Amosi. Amosi ndokubereka Josia 
Luke3:25 mwanakomana waMatatiasi, mwanakomana waAmosi, mwanakomana waNahumi, mwanakomana waEsiri, mwanakomana waNagai," 
Luke3:25 mwanakomana waMatatiasi, mwanakomana waAmosi, mwanakomana waNahumi, mwanakomana waEsiri, mwanakomana waNagai," 
Romans9:25 Sokutaura kwaanoita muna Hosea achiti: “Avo vakanga vasiri vanhu vangu ndava kuvati vanhu vangu, vandaiti havasi vapamwoyo ndava kuvati vapamwoyo.”" 
James5:11 Inga wani tinoti vakakomborerwa vakatirira. Inga makanzwa kutirira kwaJobhu mukaona chinangwa chaTenzi kuti Tenzi ane ngoni netsitsi zvakadii.
